Genesis1:1 Ompacereroni Muluku aapattuxa erimu ni vathi. 
Genesis1:2 Vano, khayaakhanle ekhalelo vathi va. Epiphi yaasareya vasulu wa maahi ootheene ni Munepa wa Muluku waakhuneela maahi." 
Genesis1:3 Muluku aaheera: “Okhale waara” ni waakhala. 
Genesis1:4 Muluku aahoona oreera waara, ni aamwalamwaliha waara ni epiphi." 
Genesis1:5 Muluku aahiitthana waara “othana,” ni epiphi “ohiyu.” Waahiila ni onaxa, ni nne naari nihuku noopacera." 
Genesis1:6 Vahoolowaya Muluku aaheera: “Ekhale erimu emwalamwaxaka maahi a vathi ni a osulu.” 
Genesis1:7 Vano Muluku aapaka erimu ni aamwalamwaliha maahi vathi ni osulu. Ni hiiho yaaheereya. 
Genesis1:8 Muluku aahiitthana yeeyo emwalamwalinghe “erimu.” Vano waahiila ni onaxa, ni nne naari nihuku nanaaveeli." 
Genesis1:9 Muluku aaheera: “Ethukumane vanipuroni nimoha maahi ari vathi wa erimu ni wooneye mpatta wa etthaya yoowuuma.” Ni hiiho yaaheereya. 
Genesis1:10 Mpatta woowuuma Muluku aahiitthana “etthaya” ni aahiitthana maahi yaathukumanne “ephareiya.” Vano vamaithoni wa Muluku waari wooreera. 
Genesis1:11 Muluku aaheera: “Etthaya eruwere malaxi ni nyiri simvaha mmiso, ni nyiri siniima soowiimasaya, sootheene siimeke mootaaya. Ni hiiho yaaheereya." 
Genesis1:12 Vano vatthayani yaamela malaxi, yaawo aniima mmiswaaya, ni nyiri siniima soowiimasaya simvaha mmiswaaya. Vamaithoni wa Muluku waari wooreera." 
Genesis1:13 Waahiila ni onaxa, ni nne naari nihuku nanaararu." 
Genesis1:14 Muluku aaheera: “Sikhale soomwaleela wiirimu weera omwalamwalihiwe othana ni ohiyu. Iyo nsivarele muteko ntoko ethoonyero ya okawanyeya wa mahuku, ihuhu ni iyaakha." 
Genesis1:15 Okhale waara wa wiirimu weera omwaleeleke elapo ya vathi. Ni hiiho yaaheereya. 
Genesis1:16 Muluku aapattuxa soomwaleela piili: Etokweene weera elamuleke othana ni ekhaani elamuleke ohiyu. Aapattuxatho ithenyeeri. 
Genesis1:17 Muluku aakhaliha seiyo wiirimu weera simwaleele elapo ya vathi. 
Genesis1:18 Aakhalihatho seiyo weera silamule othana ni ohiyu ni weera simwalamwalihe waara ni epiphi. Vano vamaithoni wa Muluku waari wooreera. 
Genesis1:19 Waahiila ni onaxa, ni nne naari nihuku nanaaxexe." 
Genesis1:20 Muluku aaheeratho: “Sisareye mmaahini ikhalelo sootheene siri ni okumi ni sivave ipalame osulu.” 
Genesis1:21 Hiiho Muluku aapattuxa inama sitokotoko sa mphareiyani ni ikhalelo sootheene sinkhala mmaahini, nitho ikhalelo sootheene sa ipalame. Vamaithoni wa Muluku waari wooreera." 
Genesis1:22 Muluku aareeliha, eeraka: “Mwaandyeereraneke. Musareyeke mmaahini. Ni saandyeereraneke ipalame sa elapo ya vathi.”" 
Genesis1:23 Waahiila ni onaxa, ni nne naari nihuku nanaathanu." 
Genesis1:24 Vano Muluku aaheera: “Eruwere etthaya ikhalelo sootheene siri ni okumi: Inama soohuwiwa, sa ntuphini ni siniipurula – khula muxovo ni ekhalelowaaya. Hiiho waaheereya." 
Genesis1:25 Muluku aapattuxa ikhalelo sootheene sa inama sa ntuphini, soohuwiwa nitho siniipurula. Vamaithoni wa Muluku waari wooreera.”" 
Genesis1:26 Vano Muluku aahiixeerela: “Nimpattuxeke mulopwana niilikanxaka moota wooweera akhalaneke ekhalelowaahu. Alamuleke ihopa sootheene siri mphareiyani; ipalame sootheene sa wiirimu; inama soohuwiwa sootheene ni seiye sootheene siniipurula.” 
Genesis1:27 Muluku aampattuxa mulopwana akhalanaka ekhalelowaawe; aani, aampattuxa akhalanaka ekhalelo ya Muluku – aampattuxa mulopwana ni muthiyana." 
Genesis1:28 Muluku aahaareeliha ni aaweerela: “Mwaandyeereraneke. Musareyeke ni mulamuleke elapo ya vathi yootheene. Mulamuleke ihopa mphareiyani; ipalame sa wiirimu ni inama sootheene sa mweelaponi ya vathi.” 
Genesis1:29 Muluku aaheera: “Moone, kinoovahani nyiri sootheene simvaha mmiso ni nyiri sootheene siniima soowiimasaya ni inukusaya. Iyo nsikhale soocasanyu." 
Genesis1:30 Miyo kinoovahani soomela sootheene wa seiyo sirino okumi weera muceeke – wa inama sitokotoko sootheene sa vathi; ipalame sootheene sa wiirimu ni soopattuxiwa sootheene siniipurula.” Ni waaheereya hiiho. 
Genesis1:31 Muluku aahoona sootheene aapankaawe ni sootheene saari sooreeraxa. Vano waahiila ni onaxa, ni nne naari nihuku nanaathannamosa." 
Genesis2:1 Hiiho yaamalihiwa opattuxiwa erimu ni etthaya ni sootheene siri mwemmo. 
Genesis2:2 Vanihukuni nanaathannameeli, hapo Muluku aamalihalaawe ovara mutekwaawe, nihuku nne aahiitthuuwa." 
Genesis2:3 Muluku aareeliha nihuku nanaathannameeli ni aatteeliha, niwoko nihuku nne aahiitthuuwa mwa miteko aavanraawe moopattuxanimwawe." 
Genesis2:4 Ola ori mwaha wa ephattuwelo ya erimu ni etthaya mweehuhuni sipattuxiwaaya: Yave aapankaawe erimu ni etthaya," 
Genesis2:5 nlelo neera nihinaaye ophuwa naari niphuwa nimoha na ntuphini, hata mwiri mmoha weera ohinaaye omela, niwoko Yave eera ahinaaye orupiha epula vatthayani nitho khaakhanle mutthu eera alimeke." 
Genesis2:6 Wa soothesene, yaakhuma etthabwe vatthayani ni yaahelela etthaya yootheene." 
Genesis2:7 Vano Yave Muluku aamoopa mulopwana avarelaka muteko ntthupi na etthaya ni aamwiiseelela mphulanimwawe ngwiya wa okumi ni mulopwana aathatuwa okhala ni okumi. 
Genesis2:8 Moone, Yave Muluku aahaala mmatta wEdeni wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa ni aamwiikaathimo mulopwana aamoompaawe." 
Genesis2:9 Vano, vatthayani Yave Muluku aameliha moota wootheene wa nyiri soosiveleya mmaithoni ni sooreera oca. Eriyari ya ematta waakhala mwiri wa okumi ni mwiri wa woosuweliha yooreera ni yoonanara." 
Genesis2:10 wEdeni waaphattuwa mooloko waahelela ematta. Vahoolowaya waakawanyeya mipatta mixexe. 
Genesis2:11 Nsina na woopacera ti Pixoni. Vano owo onrukureera elapo yootheene ya Havila, eraayawo eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Genesis2:12 Eyuuma yoorikaxa ya elapo ele ti yooreera. Iwe yaakhalatho ebwanyaasi yoowunkhelaxa eniitthaniwa budeliyo* ni makina aniitthaniwa onikisi*. 
Genesis2:13 Wanaaveeli ti Giyomi omvira elapo yootheene ya oKuxe. 
Genesis2:14 Wanaararu omvira mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa wAsiriya, nsinanawe Tigere ni mooloko wanaaxexe ti Efratesi." 
Genesis2:15 Vano, Yave Elohim aamukhaliha mulopwana mmatta ya wEdeni weera alimeke ni alamuleke." 
Genesis2:16 Yave Muluku aamulamulela mulopwana, amweerelaka: “Muceeke soowiima sa wakhalaru mwiri wEdeni," 
Genesis2:17 vaheera muhiceru sa mwiri onsuweliha yooreera ni yoonanara, niwoko nihuku muneeraanyu muce sa yoowo, vekhaikhai mmwikhwe.”" 
Genesis2:18 Yave Muluku aaheera: “Khoohiyono wooreera mulopwana okhala meekhaawe; kinoompaka mukina weera amukhavihereke ni akhaleke mukhwaawe. 
Genesis2:19 Oopiyeene vatthayani inama sootheene sa ntuphini ni ipalame sootheene sa wiirimu. Yave Muluku aamuruuhela mulopwana ole weera oone moota heeni eeraawe attehe masinaaya. Ni khula nsina eeraawe attehe ikhalelo sootheene sa okumi sootheene – nno naarowa okhala nsinanaya. 
Genesis2:20 Hiiho mulopwana aatteha masinaaya mihuwo sootheene; ipalame sa wiirimu ni inama sootheene sa ntuphini. Wa soothesene, khaaphwanyaneya wa mulopwana ole mukina eera amukhavihereke weera akhaleke mukhwaawe." 
Genesis2:21 Vano Yave Muluku aamuruuhela mulopwana ikhove weera akonaxe vancipale, ni akonaka hiihaale, aamvenxa niparari nimoha awalaka nipuro nne ni ethai ya erutthwaawe." 
Genesis2:22 Yave Muluku aampaka muthiyana ni niparari aavenxalaawe mweerutthuni ya mulopwana ni aamuroihela ole. 
Genesis2:23 Vanonto, mulopwana aaheera: “Aani, ola ti nikhuva na makhuvaaka ni erutthu ntoko erutthwaaka! Ola aniitthaniwe “muthiyana,” niwoko okhumihiwe mweerutthuni ya mulopwana.”" 
Genesis2:24 Tivawo, mulopwana anaahiye atithawe ni amayawe ni anaathukumane ni mwaariye ni awo eniithatuwe erutthu emoha paahi." 
Genesis2:25 Mulopwana ni mwaariye yaakhala woohiwara, mene khaayuuliwaru muru." 
Genesis3:1 Vano enowa yaari ni miruku soolokottha opwaha inama sootheene sa ntuphini Yave Muluku aapankaawe. Enowa yaamukoha muthiyana: “Ti yeeyo Muluku eenraawe: ‘Muhice naari yoowiima emoha ya nyiri sa ematta’?” 
Genesis3:2 Muthiyana aahaakhula enowa: “Ninoowera oca soowiima sa nyiri sa mmatta," 
Genesis3:3 mene Muluku eenre: ‘Muhice yoowiima ya mwiri ori eriyari ya ematta hata muhitave weera muhikhwe.’” 
Genesis3:4 Enowa yaamweerela muthiyana: “Vekhaikhai, khamurwa mukhwa!" 
Genesis3:5 Muluku oosuwela weera vanihukuni nyuwo muneeraanyu muce, maithwaanyu eniihuleye ni mmwikhale ntoko Muluku, musuwelaka yooreera ni yoonanara!”" 
Genesis3:6 Oonakaru muthiyana weera mwiri ole waalikana woosiva wa nlumi, woohaaweleya wa maitho ni, ohiya toko yeeyo, woomvorenghela murima weera aphwanye miruku, aarukula yoowiima ya mwiri ole, anaca, anamvaha iyawe ni owotho aahooca." 
Genesis3:7 Maitho a ooweeli ale yaahuleya ni yaahoona weera khayaawanre. Vano yaakohola makukhu a efiigu* weera yiittiyeleleno. 
Genesis3:8 Iiwaka mulopwana ni mwaariye mikhitto sa Yave Muluku eettaka mmatta yoopaka epheyo ya oxekuwa, yaahiipitha vamaithoni wa Yave Muluku variyari wa nyiri sa mmatta." 
Genesis3:9 Vano Yave Muluku aamwiitthana mulopwana amukohaka: “Muri woowi nyuwo?” 
Genesis3:10 Owo aamwaakhula: “Kohiiwa mikhittosanyu mmatta ni kinoova niwoko kiri pwitipwiti, tivawo kiipinthaaka.”" 
Genesis3:11 Vano Muluku aamukoha: “Taani ooleenleni weera khamuwanre? Nyuwo murimooca yoowiima ya mwiri, mwa yoowo Miyo kookhoottihenraakani oca?”" 
Genesis3:12 Mulopwana aaheera: “Ti muthiyana mukivanghaanyu ntoko mukhwaaka okivanghe yoowiima ya mwiri ni miyo kohooca.” 
Genesis3:13 Yave Muluku aamukoha muthiyana: “Eheeni nyuwo mpankaanyu?” Vano muthiyana aamwaakhula: “Enowa yookilokottha ni miyo kohooca.” 
Genesis3:14 Yave Muluku aaheerela enowa: “Weenre opakaka yeeyo – oolaphiwa ti weyo variyari wa mihuwo sootheene ni variyari wa inama sa ntuphini. Ngwiipurule ni erukuluwaawo ni ngweesele ntthupi mahuku ootheene a okumaawo. 
Genesis3:15 Nkiittanihe variyariwawo ni muthiyana, variyari wa ekhapiraawo ni ya muthiyana. Owo anaaswanye murwaawo ni weyo onuulume etthottopwaawe.”" 
Genesis3:16 Aamweerela muthiyana: “Nkaattihe vancipale ohaawa wa orupalawanyu. Moohaawani nyuwo munimwaayara anamwane. Yoohaawelaanyu eniikhale wa ayinyu ni owo onimoolamulani.” 
Genesis3:17 Vano aamweerela mulopwana: “Mweenre mmwiiwelelaka mwaarinyu ni muca yoowiima ya mwiri, mwa yoowo Miyo koolamulenlaakani weera muhice, yoolaphiwa ti etthaya niwoko na nyuwo. Mmwice ni ohaawa otokotoko mwa yeeyo mookuminimwanyu wa mahuku ootheene." 
Genesis3:18 Eyo eniyoovaheeni malaxi a nyiiwa ni ontthuneya weera nyuwo muceeke soomela sa mmatta. 
Genesis3:19 Mmweereke oca yoocaanyu muvaraka muteko moota woovihaxa mpaka muneeraanyu muhokoleele vatthayani. Vano mmwivenxiwe mwa yeeyo, niwoko nyuwo ntthupi ni mmwihokoleele wa ntthupini.”" 
Genesis3:20 Adamu aamutteha mwaariye Eva, niwoko owo aarwa othatuwa maayi a omutthu wootheene." 
Genesis3:21 Yave Muluku aapaka soowara sa ixapala ni aahaawariha seiye Adamu ni Eva. 
Genesis3:22 Vanonto Yave Muluku aaheera: “Vano mutthu oothatuwa ntoko Hiyo asuwelaka yooreera ni yoonanara. Khoontthuniheriwa weera owo arukuleke yoowiima ya mwiri wa okumi weera ace ni akhale ni okumi mahuku ootheene. 
Genesis3:23 Tivawo Yave Muluku aamoomonlaawe mmatta ya wEdeni weera alimeke mutthayani mwa mwemmwe owo aakhumihiwaawe. 
Genesis3:24 Amoomolakaru mulopwana, Yave Muluku aawiikaathi mpatta wa ninkhuma nsuwa wa ematta ya wEdeni akerubini* ni ikatana sa mooro ni saattikinyeya elipelelaka ephiro enrowa wa mwiri wa okumi." 
Genesis4:1 Vano Adamu aamukonano Eva ni owo aarupala, anamuyara Kayini. Eva aaheera: “Ni ekhavihero ya Yave koomuyara mwaana mulopwana.”" 
Genesis4:2 Vahoolowaya aamuyara Abeli, munneiye Kayini. Abeli aari mukukhuli aarino muhuwo ni Kayini aari namalima." 
Genesis4:3 Eviraka ehuhu, Kayini aamuruuhela Yave soowiima sa vatthayani ntoko yooveleela." 
Genesis4:4 Abelitho aamuruuhela Yave mipatta sooneneva sa ikhondoolo ntoko yooveleela wa seiye saari matthaara. Yave aasivelihiwa ni Abeli ni sooveleelasawe 
Genesis4:5 mene khaasivelihiwe ni Kayini ni sooveleelasawe. Tivawo Kayini aanyoonyiwaawe vancipale ni ekhove yaammora. 
Genesis4:6 Vano Yave aamweerela Kayini: “Heeni munyoonyingwaanyu? Heeni muhihakalanlaanyu? 
Genesis4:7 Mwapaka yeeyo eri yooreera, munimwaakhuleliwa. Mwaahipaka yeeyo eri yooreera, vano yoottheka yoohiireherera wootuphelani vamulako. Eyo enghaawela woowinani, mene ontthuneya weera nyuwo muhiihiyerere ni yeeyo." 
Genesis4:8 Kayini aamweerela munneiye: “Nrowe omatta.” Ereene hiihaale mmatta, Kayini aammana munneiye, anamwiiva." 
Genesis4:9 Vahoolowaya Yave aamukoha Kayini: “Ori woowi munninyu?” Owo aahaakhula: “Nkisuwenle. Apaale kiri namalipelelaawe?” 
Genesis4:10 Yave aamukoha: “Mpanke eheeni? Mwiiwe, ephome ya munninyu enkikhuwelela Miyo vatthayani." 
Genesis4:11 Vano oolaphiwa ti nyuwo mweelaponimu, mwa yeeyo ehunle eyanowaaya weera yaakhele ephome ya munninyu nyuwo mmwiivalaanyu." 
Genesis4:12 Mwaalimaka ematta, kheerwatho eruwera. Mmwikhale namarwa oohikhalano wiitthuuwa mweelaponimu.”" 
Genesis4:13 Kayini aamweerela Yave:“Nttaruxonaka ti noopwahaxa yeeyo kingweraaka ovilela. 
Genesis4:14 Olelo munkoomola mweelaponimu ni nkikhalatho vakhoveniwanyu. Nkikhale ootthawatthawa oohikhalano wiitthuuwa mweelaponi ni akhalaru mutthu aneera akiphwanye, onookiiva.”" 
Genesis4:15 Yavetho aamwaakhula: “Khoorwa weereya hiiho. Mukina amwiiva Kayini, anaahaawe woohaalikeleya.” Yave aamwiikaathera Kayini eneneero weera ahikhale mutthu aneera amphwanya, amwiive." 
Genesis4:16 Vano Kayini aasusa vamaithoni wa Yave ni aarowa omaka mweelaponi ya oNodi, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wEdeni." 
Genesis4:17 Kayini aakonano mwaariye ni owo aarupala, anamuyara Henoki. Vahoolowaya Kayini aateka esidade emoha, mwa yeeyo aatteha nsina na mwanawe Henoki." 
Genesis4:18 Henoki aamuyanre Irade; Irade aamuyanre Mehuxayeli; Mehuxayeli aamuyanre Metusayeli ni Metusayeli aamuyanre Lameki. 
Genesis4:19 Lameki aahaathela asithiyana eeli – mmoha iitthaniwa Ada ni mukina Zila. 
Genesis4:20 Ada aamuyanre Yabali aari tiithi a ootheene yaale yaakhala muheemani ni yaahuwa mihuwo. 
Genesis4:21 Nsina na munneiye naari Yubali aari tiithi a ootheene yaawiipa amakita ni ampetta. 
Genesis4:22 Nave Zila, aamuyanre mwaana mulopwana iitthaniwa Tubal-Kayini aahana iyuuma sootheene soorikaxa sa ebronze* ni iyuuma. Murokoriye Tubal-Kayini aari Nahama." 
Genesis4:23 Lameki aaweerela axaariye: “Ada ni Zila mukiiwe; axaara a Lameki mwiiwelele maswaaka: Miyo kaamwiiva mulopwana mmoha niwoko na okivulaliha, aani mmiravo mmoha niwoko na okimana." 
Genesis4:24 Kayini iinleliwa ikuhu imaara ithannapiili, vano Lameki imaara soohaalikeleya!" 
Genesis4:25 Adamu aakonanotho mwaariye ni owo aamuyara mwaana mulopwana mukina iitthaniwa Seeti, eeraka: “Muluku ookivaha mwaana mulopwana mukina vanipuroni na Abeli, eenre Kayini amwiivaka.”" 
Genesis4:26 Vanonto Seeti aamuyara mwaana mulopwana mukina aamuttenghaawe nsinanawe Enoxi. Wa ehuhuweene yeele atthu yaapacera wiitthana Nsina na Yave. 
Genesis5:1 Masina a ekhapira ya Adamu ti ala: Muluku ampattuxaka mulopwana, aahiilikanxa Yoowo." 
Genesis5:2 Aampattuxa ntoko mulopwana ni muthiyana. Aapattuxakaru, aahaareeliha ni aawiitthana “atthu.”" 
Genesis5:3 Wa iyaakha ncira ni miloko miraru, Adamu aamuyara mwaana mulopwana iilikanxaka mukhalelowaawe, anamutteha nsinanawe Seeti." 
Genesis5:4 Amuyanreene Seeti, Adamu aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha macira mathannamararu ni aahaayaratho anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana akina." 
Genesis5:5 Iyaakhasawe sootheene sa okumaawe saari macira mathannamaxexe ni miloko miraru, anakhwa." 
Genesis5:6 Mwa iyaakha ncira ni iyaakha ithanu Seeti aamuyara Enoxi. 
Genesis5:7 Amuyanreene Enoxi, Seeti aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha macira mathannamararu ni iyaakha ithannapiili ni aahaayara anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana akina." 
Genesis5:8 Iyaakhasawe sootheene sa okumaawe saari macira mathannamaxexe ni iyaakha muloko ni piili, anakhwa." 
Genesis5:9 Mwa iyaakha miloko mithannamixexe Enoxi aamuyara Kenani. 
Genesis5:10 Amuyanreene Kenani, Enoxi aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha macira mathannamararu ni iyaakha muloko niithanu ni aahaayara anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana akina." 
Genesis5:11 Iyaakhasawe sootheene sa okumaawe saari macira mathannamaxexe ni iyaakha ithanu, anakhwa." 
Genesis5:12 Mwa iyaakha miloko mithannamiili, Kenani aamuyara Mahalaleli." 
Genesis5:13 Amuyanreene Mahalaleli, Kenani aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha macira mathannamararu ni iyaakha miloko mixexe ni aahaayara anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana akina." 
Genesis5:14 Iyaakhasawe sootheene sa okumaawe saari macira mathannamaxexe, anakhwa." 
Genesis5:15 Mwa iyaakha miloko mithannamosa ni iyaakha ithanu, Mahalaleli aamuyara Yaredi." 
Genesis5:16 Amuyanreene Yaredi, Mahalaleli aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha macira mathannamararu ni iyaakha miloko miraru ni aahaayara anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana akina." 
Genesis5:17 Iyaakhasawe sootheene sa okumaawe saari macira mathannamararu ni iyaakha miloko mithannamixexe niithanu, anakhwa." 
Genesis5:18 Mwa iyaakha ncira ni iyaakha miloko mithannamosa ni piili, Yaredi aamuyara Henoki." 
Genesis5:19 Amuyanreene Henoki, Yaredi aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha macira mathannamararu ni aahaayara anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana akina." 
Genesis5:20 Iyaakhasawe sootheene sa okumaawe saari macira mathannamaxexe ni iyaakha miloko mithannamosa ni piili, anakhwa." 
Genesis5:21 Mwa iyaakha miloko mithannamosa ni piili, Henoki aamuyara Metusalemu." 
Genesis5:22 Amuyanreene Metusalemu, Enokhi anneetta ni Muluku iyaakha macira mararu ni aahaayara anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana akina." 
Genesis5:23 Iyaakhasawe sootheene sa okumaawe saari macira mararu ni iyaakha miloko mithannamosa niithanu. 
Genesis5:24 Henoki aaheetta ni Muluku ni aalakaseya vamaithoni wa atthu, niwoko Muluku aamucophola." 
Genesis5:25 Mwa iyaakha ncira ni miloko mithannamiraru ni iyaakha ithannapiili, Metusalemu aamuyara Lameki." 
Genesis5:26 Amuyanreene Lameki, Metusalemu aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha macira mathannameeli ni iyaakha miloko mithannamiili ni piili ni aahaayara anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana akina." 
Genesis5:27 Iyaakhasawe sootheene sa okumaawe saari macira mathannamaxexe ni iyaakha miloko mithannamosa ni piili, anakhwa." 
Genesis5:28 Mwa iyaakha ncira ni iyaakha miloko mithannamiraru ni piili, Lameki aamuyara mwaana mulopwana mmoha." 
Genesis5:29 Aamutteha nsinanawe Nowe eeraka: “Ola onoonipepesa mwa mitekosahu soovihaxa ni ohaawa wa matataahu, woonaka weera Yave aalapha elapo.”" 
Genesis5:30 Amuyanreene Nowe, Lameki aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha macira mathanu ni iyaakha miloko mithannamixexe niithanu ni aahaayara anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana akina." 
Genesis5:31 Iyaakhasawe sootheene sa okumaawe saari macira mathannameeli ni iyaakha miloko mithannamiili niithannapiili, anakhwa." 
Genesis5:32 Areeneno iyaakha macira mathanu, Nowe aamuyara Xemi, Hami ni Yafeti." 
Genesis6:1 Yaapacereya waandyeererana atthu mweelaponi, yaahaayara anamwane asithiyana." 
Genesis6:2 Vano, anamwane a Muluku yaahoona weera anamwane asithiyana a atthu yaari ooreera ni yaahiithanlela yaawo yaatthunaaya." 
Genesis6:3 Vano Yave aaheera: “Munepaaka khoorwa omaka mwa mutthu mahuku ootheene, weenre omutthu owehereraka okhwa. Owo anaakhale ni okumi iyaakha ncira ni miloko miili paahi." 
Genesis6:4 Wa mahuku ale ni vahoolowaya yaakhala aNeefili* mweelaponimu, eyo tiiyo ehuhuweene yeele anamwane a Muluku yaathelanaaya ni anamwane asithiyana a atthu yaayarelaka anamwane. Vano aNeefili* ale yaari atthu oolipaxa murima a ehuhu ya khalayi, aani atthu a epili." 
Genesis6:5 Yave aahoona waandyeerereya wa sootakhala sa atthu mweelaponi ni weera soowuupuwela sa mirimasaya sannaasaasa mahuku ootheene seiye siri soonanara paahi. 
Genesis6:6 Yave aathananihiwa niwoko na ompakawawe mutthu mweelaponimu, ni eyo yaamvoreya vamurimaniwawe." 
Genesis6:7 Yave aaheera: “Kinoophwata omutthu mwa elapo ya vathi, mwa yoowo kipattunxaaka. Aani kinimwaaphwata atthu ootheene vamoha ni inama soopattuxiwa sitokweene ni sikhaani ni ipalame sa musulu, niwoko kooriipiwa murima woopattuxa.”" 
Genesis6:8 Wa soothesene, Nowe aamusiveliha Yave." 
Genesis6:9 Ola ori mwaha wa Nowe: Nowe aari mulopwana mmoha oororomeleya ni oohikhalano milattu variyari wa muloko wa ehuhuwaawe. Vano owo anneetta vamoha ni Muluku. 
Genesis6:10 Aakhalano anamwane asilopwana araru: Xemi, Hami ni Yafeti." 
Genesis6:11 Muluku aahoona weera elapo ya vathi yaasareya soonanara ni nipuhero. 
Genesis6:12 Muluku awehaka elapo ya vathi, aahoona sootakhala sincipale niwoko ootheene yaamanke elapo ya vathi, yaatthara iphiro sootapanyeya." 
Genesis6:13 Tivawo Muluku aamweerenlaawe Nowe: “Koolakela waaphwata atthu ootheene, niwoko elapo ya vathi yootheene yoosareya nipuheronaya. Vekhaikhai, kinimwaaphwata vamoha ni elapo yootheene." 
Genesis6:14 Mpake nikula ntokotoko na mwiri wa goferi* ni ikwartu soohiyanahiyana ni muttikitthele nnyoma mpuwa ni omokoni. 
Genesis6:15 Mpakeke ni miringo iya: mweerakameloni imeetru* ncira ni miloko miraru niithanu, mweekhuveeloni imeetru* miloko miili ni piili ni eriyari ya emeetru*, ni orakamawaya okhuma vathi wookela osulu imeetru* muloko nitthaaru ni eriyari ya emeetru*." 
Genesis6:16 Mpake nipatho moota wooweera ehale ekhato eriyari ya nikula ni nipatho, orakamawaya eriyari ya emeetru*. Mpake mulako mpararinimwaya ni mukawanyihe nikula mpatta mmoha vathi, mukina eriyari ni wookisera osulu." 
Genesis6:17 Miyo kinoorupiha mirupi sincipale mweelaponi yootheene ya vathi weera kiphwate soopattuxiwa sootheene siri ni okumi. Sootheene siri mweelaponi yootheene sinimookhwa. 
Genesis6:18 Vano kinookhaliha wiiraana ni nyuwo. Ontthuneya ovolowa munikulani nyuwo vamoha ni amwaarinyu, anamwaniinyu ni axaarayatho." 
Genesis6:19 Vanonto, moota wootheene wa soopattuxiwa soohiyanahiyana muvoloiheke munikulani piili-piili, ethiyana ni elopwana, weera sikhale ni okumi vamoha ni nyuwo." 
Genesis6:20 Piili sa mikhalelo sootheene sa ipalame, sa asinama ni sa siniipurula sirweeke wa nyuwo weera sipwaherere ni okumi." 
Genesis6:21 Mukuxeke moota wootheene wa sooca ni muthokororeke weera muce nyuwosa ni iyo.” 
Genesis6:22 Nowe aapaka sootheene ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe. 
Genesis7:1 Vahoolowaya Yave aamweerela Nowe: “Mvoloweke munikulani, nyuwo vamoha ni emusaanyu, niwoko kohoona weera ti nyuwo paahi muri oororomeleya mwa ekhapireene yeela." 
Genesis7:2 Mwarowaneke sootheene sa asinama ootteela: Ithannapiili soothelana – elopwana ni ethiyana, nitho wa sootheene sa asinama oohitteela: Piili-piili – elopwana ni ethiyana." 
Genesis7:3 Mukuxetho soothelana ithannapiili sa ipalame, sa moota wootheene wa ipalame – elopwana ni ethiyana, weera sipwaherereke okhala ni okumi mweelaponi yootheene." 
Genesis7:4 Yavira mahuku mathannameeli, kinoorupiha epula elapo yootheene wa mahuku miloko mixexe ni ohiyutho miloko mixexe. Kinoottakaneeliha itthu sootheene siri ni okumi mweelaponi kipattunxaaka.”" 
Genesis7:5 Nowe aapaka sootheene ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe. 
Genesis7:6 Nowe aarino iyaakha macira mathannamosa saaphiyalaaya mirupi mweelaponi. 
Genesis7:7 Nowe vamoha ni amwaariye, anamwanaawe, ni axaaraya yaavolowa munikulani weera etthawe maahi a mirupi." 
Genesis7:8 Eeli-eeli a asinama oothelana ootteela ni oohitteela ni piili-piili sa moota wootheene wa ipalame soothelana muloko neeli-eeli a moota wootheene wa asinama aniipurula 
Genesis7:9 yaavolowa munikulani vamoha ni Nowe ntoko Muluku aamulamulenlaawe. 
Genesis7:10 Eviraka mahuku mathannameeli, saapacera mirupi omorela elapo ya vathi yootheene." 
Genesis7:11 Naari nihuku na naamuloko ni mathannameeli na mweeri wanaaveeli wa eyaakha Nowe aarinaawe iyaakha macira mathannamosa. Nihuku nenenenne anaattuuttu ootheene a mphareiyani yaahuleya ni erimu yaahuleyatho. 
Genesis7:12 Epula yaarupa mweelaponi othana miloko mixexe ni ohiyutho miloko mixexe. 
Genesis7:13 Nihuku nenenenne Nowe vamoha ni anamwanaawe Xemi, Hami ni Yafeti, ni amwaariye nitho axaaraya anamwanaawe araru yaavolowa munikulani." 
Genesis7:14 Vamoha ni yaawosa saavolowa mikhalelo sootheene sa asinama, sa mihuwo, sa soowiipurula ni sa ipalame – sootheene saarino mapupha." 
Genesis7:15 Soopattuxiwa sa inama sootheene soothelana saarino okumi saavolowa piili-piili munikulani vamoha ni Nowe. 
Genesis7:16 Inama saavolongwe munikulani saari piili-piili, ethiyana ni elopwana, ntoko Muluku aamulamulenlaawe Nowe. Vahoolowaya Yave aawala mulako." 
Genesis7:17 Mirupi iye saarupa wookwana mahuku miloko mixexe ni maahi yaahaandyeerereya, nnaphamba nikula." 
Genesis7:18 Vano maahi ale yannaandyeerereya vancipale, ni nikula naaphamba." 
Genesis7:19 Vanonto, maahi yeera yaandyeerereyaka mweelaponi mpaka nyaako sootheene siriwo saamireya." 
Genesis7:20 Nyaako saamireya mpaka maahi yaapwahera vasulu wa nyaako wookwana imeetru* ithannapiili. 
Genesis7:21 Soopattuxiwa sa okumi sootheene – siniipurula, ipalame, mihuwo sootheene ni inama sa ntuphini – soopattuxiwa sootheene sinkhala mweelaponi ya vathi yootheene vamoha ni atthu ootheene – saahookhwa." 
Genesis7:22 Sootheene saari vatthayani yoowuuma ni saarino okumi saahookhwa. 
Genesis7:23 Soopattuxiwa sa okumi sootheene saari mweelaponimu saaphwatiwa – okhuma atthu, hiihotho mpaka inama sitokweene ni ikhaani, seiye siniipurula vathi ni ipalame sa wiirimu – sootheene saaphwatiwa. Vano aahanle Nowe ni seiye saari ni yoowo munikulani paahi." 
Genesis7:24 Maahi ekhuneenleene elapo ya vathi yaamanle mahuku ncira ni miloko mithanu. 
Genesis8:1 Vano Muluku aamuupuwelela Nowe ni inama sootheene sa ntuphini ni soohuwiwa saari vamoha ni yoowo munikulani, anarumiha epheyo mweelaponi yootheene ni maahi yaapacera owelela." 
Genesis8:2 Anaattuuttu a mphareiyani moowiixera nitho milako sa wiirimu saawaleya ni epula yaamaaxa. 
Genesis8:3 Maahi yannawelela vakhaani vakhaani vatthayani. Evinreene mahuku ncira ni miloko mithanu, maahi yaavukuwa." 
Genesis8:4 Vano nihuku nanaamuloko ni mathannameeli na mweeri wanaathannamiili, nikula naaheemela vamwaakoni wArarati." 
Genesis8:5 Maahi yeera ewelelaka mpaka mweeri wanaamuloko, ni munihukuni noopacera na mweeri ole saapacera okhuma itthomela sa nyaako." 
Genesis8:6 Eviraka mahuku miloko mixexe, Nowe aahula exanela aapankaawe vanikulani." 
Genesis8:7 Owo aamuruma nakhuku okhumela vaate, mene owo aamweera ovava paahi mpaka owelela maahi yaari vatthayani." 
Genesis8:8 Vahoolowaya Nowe aarumiha ekhunda weera yoone yaawelenleene maahi vatthayani. 
Genesis8:9 Vano ekhunda khayaaphwannye nipuro nooweemela niwoko maahi nlelo yeera ehinaaye omala owelela vasulu wa etthaya. Tivawo yaahokoleenlaaya munikulani na Nowe. Aahookola moono, anavara ekhunda ni anavoleiha munikulani." 
Genesis8:10 Nowe aawehereratho mpaka omala mahuku mathannameeli, anarumihatho ekhunda." 
Genesis8:11 Oxekuwaka, yaahokolowaaya ekhunda, yaaruuha epampeene nikukhu nnyowani na mwiri wa sooliveira*. Vano Nowe aasuwela weera maahi aawelela vatthayani." 
Genesis8:12 Aaweherera mpaka omala mahuku mathannameelitho, anarumihatho ekhunda, mene emaareene yeele, eyo khayaahokolongwe." 
Genesis8:13 Munihukuni noopacera na mweeri woopacera vayaakhani ya macira mathannamosa ni eyaakha emoha ya okumi wa Nowe, yaawelela maahi ootheene vasulu wa etthaya. Vano Nowe aavenxa nipatho na nikula, anoona weera etthaya yeera yuumaka." 
Genesis8:14 Munihukuni na naamiloko miili ni mahuku mathannameeli na mweeri wanaaveeli, etthaya yootheene yaakwanela wuuma." 
Genesis8:15 Vano Muluku aamweerela Nowe: 
Genesis8:16 “Mukhume munikulani, nyuwo vamoha ni amwaarinyu, anamwaniinyu nitho axaaraya." 
Genesis8:17 Mwaakhumihetho axinama ootheene ari vamoha ni nyuwo, ipalame, inama itokweene ni ikhaani soowiipurula. Mukhumihe weera simwaramwareele mweelaponi yootheene, siyaraneke ni saandyeereraneke.”" 
Genesis8:18 Vano Nowe aakhuma munikulani vamoha ni amwaariye, anamwanaawe nitho axaaraya." 
Genesis8:19 Inama sootheenetho – inama soowiipurula sootheene ni ipalame – sootheene saakhuma munikulani, moota wa ikhalelo sootheene." 
Genesis8:20 Vahoolowaya, Nowe aampakela altaari* Yave ni aakuxaka axinama akina ootteela ni ipalame sikina sootteela, aaveleela ntoko sooveleela ahisaka vasulu wa altaari*." 
Genesis8:21 Vano Yave aahoona wunkhela wooreeraxa ni aahiixeerela: “Nkirwa kilaphatho etthaya niwoko na mutthu, orookhalaru murimaawe woosareya ni soonanara okhuma oyariwawawe. Nkirwatho kiphwata itthu sootheene siri ni okumi ntoko kipankaaka emaara ela." 
Genesis8:22 Elapo ya vathi ereene nlelo, khoorwa othowa mmiso, nitho soohepha, oriira naari oviha, elimwe naari eyiita, othana naari ohiyu.”" 
Genesis9:1 Vano Muluku aamureeliha Nowe vamoha ni anamwanaawe aweerelaka: Muyaraneke ni mwaandyeereraneke weera musareyeke mweelaponi moothemwene. 
Genesis9:2 Inama sa ntuphini sootheene, ipalame, soowiipurula sootheene, ni ihopa sa mphareiya nseereke woothukumelani. Sootheene iyo moovahereriwa mmatatanimwanyu." 
Genesis9:3 Itthu sootheene sirino okumi nsikhale yoocaanyu. Hiiho ntoko koovanghaakani soowiima weera muce, hiihotho kinoovahani itthu sootheene." 
Genesis9:4 Muhikhuureke enama nlelo ereene ni ephomaaya, eyo tiiyo okumaaya." 
Genesis9:5 Vano yoole aneera awiiveeni, hata mwaamunama naari mutthu Miyo kinoomuthoriha, niwoko na ephomaanyu. Miyo kinoomuthoriha yoowo aneera amwiive mukhwaawe." 
Genesis9:6 Yoowo aneera ayeehe ephome ya mukhwaawe, ephomaawe eniiyeehiwe, niwoko mutthu aapathuxiwe mweekhaleloni ya Muluku." 
Genesis9:7 Vano nyuwo muyaraneke ni mwaandyeereraneke. Mmwaramwareyeke elapo yootheene ni musareyeke.” 
Genesis9:8 Vano Muluku aahuuluma ni Nowe vamoha ni anamwanaawe yaari ni yoowo aweerelaka: 
Genesis9:9 “Kinookhaliha wiiraanawaka ni nyuwo ni ekhapiraanyutho ya muhoolo. 
Genesis9:10 Aani, kinookhalihatho ni itthu sootheene siri ni okumi siri vamoha ni nyuwo, ipalame, mihuwo, ni inama sa ntuphini sootheene sikhumme munikulani vamoha ni nyuwo, eyo tiiyo itthu sootheene siri ni okumi." 
Genesis9:11 Wu ti wiiraana kinkhalihaaka ni nyuwo. Khasirwatho siphwatiwa itthu sootheene siri ni okumi niwoko na maahi a epula ya mirupi. Khasirwa sikhalatho mirupi sineera siphwate elapo ya vathi yootheene.” 
Genesis9:12 Vano Muluku aapwaherera: “Ela ti eneneero ya wiiraana kimpakaaka ni nyuwo, ni itthu sa okumi sootheene siri ni nyuwo, wa ikhapira sootheene sa muhoolo:" 
Genesis9:13 Muuraaka kiikaathiyaaka mmahutteni. Eniikhale eneneero ya wiiraanawaka kinkhalihaaka ni elapo ya vathi. 
Genesis9:14 Miyo kaaruuhaka mahutte mweelaponi ya vathi ni mwemmo wakhuma muura," 
Genesis9:15 vano nkuupuwelele wiiraanawaka ni nyuwo ni itthu sootheene sirino okumi sa moota wootheene. Khasirwa sikhala mirupi sineera siphwate elapo yootheene. 
Genesis9:16 Imaara sootheene muura oneeraaya okhumeke mmahutteni, nkiwehe yoowo ni nkuupuwelele wiiraana woohimala variyari wa Muluku ni itthu sa okumi sootheene sinkhala mweelaponi ya vathi.”" 
Genesis9:17 Amalihaka wuuluma, Muluku aamweerela Nowe: “Ela ti eneneero kikhalinghaaka variyari wa Miyo ni ikhalelo sootheene sa okumi siri mweelaponi ya vathi.”" 
Genesis9:18 Anamwane a Nowe yaakhumme munikulani aari Xemi, Hami ni Yafeti. Hami aari tiithi a Kanaani." 
Genesis9:19 Ale yaari anamwane a Nowe. Okhuma wa yaale elapo yootheene yoomakiwa ni atthu ancipale. 
Genesis9:20 Nowe aari namalima nitho aari oopacera ophatteya ematta ya iwuuva*. 
Genesis9:21 Aawura eviinyu, anahapaliwa mpakatho anarula muheemanimwawe." 
Genesis9:22 Hami, tiithi a Kanaani aahoona ohiwara wa atithawe, anarowa waathalihera axunneiye eeli yaari vaate." 
Genesis9:23 Vano Xemi ni Yafeti yaakuxa ekuwo ni, yiikuttelenleene, yaawaattamela atithaya. Vanonto, yeettaka nttulittuli erowaka wa atithaya, yaahaakhuneela atithaya, ehoonaka ohiwarawaya." 
Genesis9:24 Nowe ommwareyaka ohapaliwa ni oonelelaka yeeyo aapankaawe neetthaako, aaheera:" 
Genesis9:25 “Oolamphwa akhale Kanaani. Owo anaakhale ookisera a ipottha sootheene sa axunneiye!” 
Genesis9:26 Vano aapwaherera: “Ooreelihiwa akhale Yave, Muluku a Xemi! Vano, Kanaani akhale epotthaawe." 
Genesis9:27 Muluku unnuwihe elapo ya Yafeti, weera ekhapiraawe emake vamoha muheemani mwa Xemi, ni weera Kanaani akhaleke epotthaaya!”" 
Genesis9:28 Sivinreene mirupi, Nowe aapwaherera okhala ni okumi iyaakha macira mararu ni miloko mithanu." 
Genesis9:29 Aakhanle ni okumi iyaakha macira mathannamaxexe ni miloko mithanu, anakhwa." 
Genesis10:1 Ela yaari ekhapira ya Xemi, Hami ni Yafeti, anamwane a Nowe. Anamwanaayatho yaayariwe sivinreene mirupi." 
Genesis10:2 Anamwane a Yafeti yaari ala: Gomeri, Magogi, Madayi, Yava, Tubali, Meseke ni Tirasi." 
Genesis10:3 Anamwane a Gomeri yaari ala: Askenazi, Rifati ni Togarma." 
Genesis10:4 Anamwane a Yava yaari ala: Elisa, Tarsisi, aKitimi ni aRodanemi." 
Genesis10:5 Mwa yaale aamwaramwareya atthu ootheene amanke mukerekhere ephareiya. Miloko iyo saakawanyeya mwa mahimwaaya, ni khula muloko waakhalano elapwaaya ni nuulumonaya." 
Genesis10:6 Anamwane a Hami yaari ala: Kuxe, Mizrayimi, Pute ni Kanaani." 
Genesis10:7 Anamwane a Kuxe yaari ala: Seba, Havila, Sabeta, Rahama ni Sabuteka. Anamwane a Rahama yaari ala: Xeba ni Dedani." 
Genesis10:8 Kuxe aamuyanretho Nimerodi, mulopwana oopacera aari ooweraxa mweelaponi ya vathi." 
Genesis10:9 Owo aaritho namalupattha ooweraxa ni ekhavihero ya Yave. Tivawo oneeriwaaya mpaka olelo: ‘Namalupattha ooweraxa ntoko Nimerodi ni ekhavihero ya Yave.’ 
Genesis10:10 Woopacerani aalamula isidade sa oBabiloniya, Ereki, Akadisi ni Kalne, mweelaponi ya oSinari." 
Genesis10:11 Woovenya vaavaale aapwaherera alamulaka oSiriya, ni aateka isidade sa oNinive ni oReyoboti-Iri, oKala." 
Genesis10:12 Aatekatho oReheseni, eriyari ya oNinive ni oKala, yaari esidade etokweene." 
Genesis10:13 Mixrayimi aari nikholo na atthu yaamanke oLudi, wAnemi, oLeyabi ni oNaftuhi." 
Genesis10:14 Aaritho nikholo wa atthu yaamanke oPatrosi, oKasluhi ankhumelelaayawo aFilisti ni aKaftori." 
Genesis10:15 Kanaani aari tiithi a Sidoni, mwanawe oopacera ni a Heti." 
Genesis10:16 Aaritho tiithi a aYebusi, awAmori, aGirgasi," 
Genesis10:17 aHivi, awArki ni aSini." 
Genesis10:18 Aari tiithitho a awArvadi, aSemari ni aHamati. Vano, vahoolowaya saamwareya mipatta sa mahimo a Kanaani." 
Genesis10:19 Elapo ya Kanaani yaakhumme oSidoni, wookela mpatta wa oGerari mpaka oGaza, wookela mpatta wa oSodoma, oGomora, wAdma, oZeboyimi ni oLaxa." 
Genesis10:20 Ti seiya saari ikhapira sa Hami saakawanyeiye nihimo nihimo, nuulumo nuulumo, elapo elapo ni miloko miloko." 
Genesis10:21 Xemi, munna mutokweene a Yafeti, aakhalanotho anamwane. Xemi aari nikholo na anamwane ootheene a Heberi." 
Genesis10:22 Anamwane a Xemi yaari ala: Elami, Asuri, Arpaksadi, Ludi ni Arami." 
Genesis10:23 Anamwane a Arami yaari Uzi, Huli, Getheri ni Masi." 
Genesis10:24 Arpaksadi aari tiithi a Xela ni Xela aari tiithi a Heberi. 
Genesis10:25 Heberi aari tiithi a anamwane eeli – mmoha iitthaniwa Pelegi, niwoko ehuhuweene yeele omutthu waamwaramwareya mweelaponi, ni mukina iitthaniwa Yokitani." 
Genesis10:26 Yokitani aari tiithi a Almodadi, Xelefi, Hazarmaveti, Yerakhi," 
Genesis10:27 Hadorami, Uzali, Dikla," 
Genesis10:28 Obali, Abimayili, Xeba," 
Genesis10:29 Ofiri, Havila ni Yobabi. Ootheene ala yaari anamwane a Yokitani." 
Genesis10:30 Yaamanke mweelaponi okhuma oMexa mpaka oSefari, mweelaponi ya mmanyaakoni mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa." 
Genesis10:31 Ti seiya saari ikhapira sa Xemi saakawanyeiye nihimo nihimo, nuulumo nuulumo, elapo elapo ni miloko miloko." 
Genesis10:32 Ala ti mahimo a anamwane a Nowe, yaakawanyeiye ekhapira ekhapira ni muloko muloko. Vano, okhuma wa yaawo, miloko sa atthu saamwaramwareya mweelaponi ya vathi, sivinreene mirupi." 
Genesis11:1 Vano mweehuhuweene yeele atthu ootheene yuuluma nuulumo nimoha, ni ootheene yaavarela muteko masu mamoharu yaawo." 
Genesis11:2 Vano ettimulaka atthu ekhumaka ninkhuma nsuwa, yaaphiya elapo yoothatawala ya oXineyari ni vaavaale yaamaka." 
Genesis11:3 Vanonto yaaheerelana: “Nipake indyerwa ni vahoolowaya nooxeke nnenesene.” Yaavarela muteko indyerwa vanipuroni na maluku ni yaavarela muteko ittoko ntoko sementte. 
Genesis11:4 Vahoolowaya yaaheera: “Vano nrowe niteke esidade emoha ni etoore* etokotoko eneera ephiyeke mpaka wiirimu. Hiiho hiyo nneereke okhalano epili, ni khanirwa nimwalamwaxiwa mweelaponi.”" 
Genesis11:5 Yave aakhuruwa weera oone esidade ni etoore* atthu yaatekaaya. 
Genesis11:6 Vano Yave aahiixeerela: “Awo ari muloko mmoharu paahi ni anuuluma nuulumo nimoharu paahi. Yapwaherera hiiha, vano khaawotho mukina aneera awere waahiiha yeela yuupuwelenlaaya opaka." 
Genesis11:7 Nikhuruweke weera navirikanyihe nuulumonaya, weera awo ehiiwananeke mukina ni mukhwaawe.”" 
Genesis11:8 Hiiho Yave aahaamwaramwaxela mweelaponi yootheene ni awo yaahiya oteka esidade ele. 
Genesis11:9 Tivawo esidade ele eniitthaniwaaya Babeli, niwoko ti weiwe Yave aavirikanyihalaawe nuulumo na atthu, nitho waari weiwe aamwaramwaxenlaawe mweelaponi yootheene." 
Genesis11:10 Ela ti ekhapira ya Xemi: Siviraka iyaakha piili vahoolo wa mirupi, Xemi, areeneno iyaakha ncira, aamuyara Arpaksadi." 
Genesis11:11 Vahoolo wooyariwa Arpaksadi, Xemi aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha macira mathanu, ni aari tiithi a anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana." 
Genesis11:12 Arinweene iyaakha miloko miraru niithanu, Arpaksadi aamuyara Xela." 
Genesis11:13 Vahoolo wa oyariwa wa Xela, aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha macira maxexe ni iyaakha tthaaru ni aari tiithi a anamwane asilopwana, ni asithiyanatho." 
Genesis11:14 Xela arinweene iyaakha miloko miraru, aamuyara Heberi." 
Genesis11:15 Vahoolo wa oyariwa wa Heberi, Xela aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha macira maxexe ni iyaakha tthaaru ni aari tiithi a anamwane asilopwana, ni asithiyanatho." 
Genesis11:16 Heberi arinweene iyaakha miloko miraru ni iyaakha ixexe, aamuyara Pelegi." 
Genesis11:17 Vahoolo wa oyariwa wa Pelegi, Heberi aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha macira maxexe ni iyaakha miloko miraru ni aari tiithi a anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyanatho." 
Genesis11:18 Pelegi arinweene iyaakha miloko miraru, aamuyara Rehu." 
Genesis11:19 Vahoolo wa oyariwa wa Rehu, Pelegi aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha macira meeli ni iyakha ithanniixexe ni aari tiithi a anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyanatho." 
Genesis11:20 Rehu arinweene iyaakha miloko miraru ni iyaakha piili, aamuyara Serugi." 
Genesis11:21 Vahoolo wa oyariwa wa Serugi, Rehu aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha macira meeli ni iyaakha ithannapiili, ni aari tiithi a anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyanatho." 
Genesis11:22 Serugi arinweene iyaakha miloko miraru, aamuyara Nahori." 
Genesis11:23 Vano vahoolo wa oyariwa wa Nahori, Serugi aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha macira meeli ni aari tiithi a anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyanatho." 
Genesis11:24 Nahori arinweene iyaakha miloko miili ni iyaakha ithanniixexe, aamuyara Tera." 
Genesis11:25 Vahoolo wa oyariwa wa Tera, Nahori aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha ncira ni iyakha muloko niithanniixexe ni aari tiithi a anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyanatho." 
Genesis11:26 Tera arinweene iyaakha miloko mithannamiili, aakhalano asinamwane araru: Abraamu, Nahori ni Harani." 
Genesis11:27 Ela ti ekhapira ya Tera: Tera aari tiithi a Abraamu, Nahori ni Harani. Ni Harani aari tiithi a Loti." 
Genesis11:28 Tera nlelo areene ni okumi, Harani aahookhwa wUri wa aKaldeya weiwo aayariwaawe." 
Genesis11:29 Abraamu ni Nahori yaathelasa. Amwaariye Abraamu yiithaniwa Sarai, ni amwaariye Nahori yaari Milka, mwaana a Harani. Harani aari tiithi a Milka ni Yiska." 
Genesis11:30 Vano Sarai aari mwali eekupa, ni khaarino anamwane." 
Genesis11:31 Vano Tera aavenya wUri wa aKaldeya amukuxaka Mwanawe Abraamu ni musulwaawe Loti, mwaana a Harani. Aamukuxatho Sarai, mwaara a Abraamu, erowaka oKanaani. Wa soothesene, yaaphiyalaaya oHarani, yaamakawo." 
Genesis11:32 Tera aakhala ni okumi iyaakha macira meeli ni iyaakha ithanu, anakhwa oHarani." 
Genesis12:1 Yave aamweerela Abraamu: “Muhiye elapwaanyu, asinaangolowaanyu ni vaate wa atithinyu, ni murowe elapo Miyo kineeraaka kiwoonihereni." 
Genesis12:2 Wa nyuwo kinookhaliha muloko mutokotoko. Kinimooreelihani ni Miyo kinimoovahani epili. Vano nyuwo munookhala nreeliho. 
Genesis12:3 Miyo nkaareelihe yaawo eneera yooreeliheni ni nkaalaphe yaawo eneera yoolapheeni. Vanonto, mwaha wa nyuwo nsireelihiwe miloko sootheene sa mweelaponi.”" 
Genesis12:4 Abraamu aattimula ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe, ni Loti aarowa vamoha ni yoowo. Abraamu aarino iyaakha miloko mithannamiili ni iyaakha ithanu aavenyaawe oHarani." 
Genesis12:5 Aamukuxa mwaariye Sarai ni musulwaawe Loti ni mihakhu sootheene aarinaawe ni arumeiyaawe aathummaawe oHarani, enarowa elapo ya oKanaani." 
Genesis12:6 Abraamu aaphutula mweelaponi mmwe mpaka oXekhemi, vakhiviru wa mwiri wa ekarivalyu*, wa oMore. Mwa ehuhuweene yeele atthu a oKanaani ti yaamanke elapo ele." 
Genesis12:7 Vano vaavaale Yave aahiixoonihera wa Abraamu, anamweerela: “Kinoovahani elapo ela ni wa ekhapiraanyu yootheene.” Vanonto Abraamu aamutekela Yave altaari* vanipuroni nne iixoonihenraawe." 
Genesis12:8 Evinyero vaavaale aarowa mpaka omwaako ori mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa oBeteli. Vano aakunga eheemaawe eriyari ya oBeteli ni wookela ninkela nsuwa wAi. Aamutekela Yave altaari* ni aahiitthana Nsina na Yave. 
Genesis12:9 Vano aapwaherera arowaka oNegeba. 
Genesis12:10 Vanonto etala yaawirima oKanaani ni Abraamu aarowa wExipitu ni aakhala weiwo aarerihelaka vakhaani. 
Genesis12:11 Ahaleelaka ophiya wExipitu, aamweerela mwaariye Sarai: “Miyo koosuwela weera nyuwo muthiyana ooreera." 
Genesis12:12 Vano yaawoonakani atthu a wExipitu, ankela weera: ‘Nyuwo amwaara a Abraamu,’ ni awo anoowera okiiva, weera ehale ni nyuwo." 
Genesis12:13 Tivawo, mweereke: ‘Ala acimweene’ weera miyo kaakheleliwe nnenesene ni okumaaka wuureliwe niwoko na nyuwo.”" 
Genesis12:14 Ephiyaka wExipitu, atthu a elapo ele yaahoona weera owo ari muthiyana ooreeraxa." 
Genesis12:15 Yaamoonatho mapwattapwattha a Farawu*. Vano hiiho mwaariye Abraamu aakuxiwa aroihiwaka empa ya emwene ya Farawu*. 
Genesis12:16 Farawu* aamwaakhelela nnenesene Abraamu niwoko na Sarai, ni Abraamu aahaakhela ikhondoolo, imombe, abuuru alopwana ni athiyana, arumeiyi alopwana nitho athiyana mpaka ahaaci." 
Genesis12:17 Yave aamuttaruxa Farawu* vamoha ni atthu a vaatevawe, aattaruxaka ni iretta sitokotoko, mwaha wa Sarai, mwaara a Abraamu." 
Genesis12:18 Tivawo Farawu* aalamunlaawe wiitthaniwa Abraamu, aneera: “Eheeni nyuwo mukipankaanyu? Heeni mwahaakileelaanyu weera owo mwaarinyu?" 
Genesis12:19 Heeni mweenraanyu weera murokorinyu? Tivawo miyo kimukunxaaka okhala mwaaraka. Amwaarinyu awo, mwaakuxeke ni muroweno.”" 
Genesis12:20 Vahoolowaya Farawu* aahaalamula atthu akina mwaha wa Abraamu. Vano awo yaamuhoola Abraamu ni mwaariye vamoha ni itthu sootheene aarinaawe. 
Genesis13:1 Abraamu aavenya wExipitu vamoha ni mwaariye ni Loti ni sootheene aarinaawe arowaka oNegeba. 
Genesis13:2 Abraamu aari namapuha vancipale akhalanaka mihuwo sincipale, mpakatho iyuuma soorikaxa sincipale." 
Genesis13:3 Owo aavenya oNegeba athaamathaamaka mpaka ophiya oBeteli weiwe aamankaawe khalayi, eriyari ya oBeteli ni wAi." 
Genesis13:4 Aarowa weiwo aatenkaawe altaari* ni vaavaawo aamwiitthana Yave. 
Genesis13:5 Mpakatho Loti aarongwe vamoha ni Abraamu aakhalano mihuwo ni iheema. 
Genesis13:6 Tivawo wahaawereyaaya omaka vamoha niwoko khanaariwo nipuro nookwana mihakhu sa ooweeli yaarinaaya. 
Genesis13:7 Vano waakhumelela onyakulihana variyari wa akukhuli a Abraamu ni a Loti. Ehuhuweene yeele aKanaani ni aPerizi yaamanke elapweene yeele. 
Genesis13:8 Tivawo Abraamu aamweerenlaawe Loti: “Khoontthuneya weera okhaleke ohiiwanana variyariwahu naari wa akukhulaahu, niwoko hiyo nri emusi emoharu." 
Genesis13:9 Ohoolowanyu yookhala elapo yincipale. Kinoovekelani weera nimwalamwale. Mwarowa moono muthiyana, kinoorowa mulopwana; mwarowa moono mulopwana, kinoorowa muthiyana.”" 
Genesis13:10 Vano Loti aaweha anoona oreyareyani wa Yordaanu: Yaakhala maahi mancipale ni waakhala ntoko muttimbeni mwa Yave, olikanaka ntoko wExipitu, hiihaawo mpaka elapo ya oZowari. Yeeyo yeereiye Muluku ahinaaye ophwata oSodoma ni oGomora." 
Genesis13:11 Hiiho Loti aathanla mpatta wa oreyareyani wa oYordaanu ni aarowa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Vano yaamwalamwala mukina ni mukhwaawe moota ola: 
Genesis13:12 Abraamu aahanle elapo ya oKanaani vaheera Loti aatthaama arowaka isidade saari mukerekhere wa oYordaanu, ni aakunga iheemasawe mpatta wa oSodoma." 
Genesis13:13 Vanonto atthu yaamanke oSodoma yaari ooxilili ni anamattheka evirikanyihaka otthuna wa Muluku. 
Genesis13:14 Emwalamwanleene Loti ni Abraamu, Yave aamweerela Abraamu: “Vaavaawo nyuwo muraanyu, ngwehe mipatta sootheene." 
Genesis13:15 Elapo yootheene ela munoonaanyu, Miyo kinimoovahani nyuwo ni ekhapiraanyu yootheene wa mahuku ootheene." 
Genesis13:16 Nkaandyeerere ekhapiraanyu yootheene weera ekhale ntoko ntthupi na vathi. Khaawo ongwera waalikela mihaava sa ntthupi na etthaya. Mooteene yoowo khaawo aneera awere waalikela ekhapiraanyu. 
Genesis13:17 Vano mweetteette elapo yootheene ela mipatta sootheene, niwoko kinimoovahani.”" 
Genesis13:18 Vano Abraamu aaceendya nipuro aamankaawe, arowaka omaka vakhiviru wa nyiri sa ikarivalyu* oMamre, vakhiviru wa oHeberoni, weiwo aamutekenlaawe altaari* Yave." 
Genesis14:1 Ehuhuweene yeele Amrafel, mwene a oXineyari, Ariyokhe mwene a wElasari, Kedorlawomeri mwene a wElami, ni Tidali mwene a oGoyimi" 
Genesis14:2 yaarowa owana ni Bera mwene a oSodoma, Birxa mwene a oGomora, Xinabi mwene a wAdema, Xemeberi mwene a oZeboyimi ni mwene a oBela ori Zowari." 
Genesis14:3 Ootheene ookisera awo yaahaatakansa anakhottwaaya oreyareyani wa oSidimi, eraayawo ephareiya ya maakha." 
Genesis14:4 Wa iyaakha muloko ni piili yaamurumeela Kedorlawomeri, mene wa eyaakha yanaamuloko ni tthaaru yaarukunuwelana." 
Genesis14:5 Vano mwa eyaakha yanaamuloko niixexe Kedorlawomeri ni mamwene yiiraanne ni yoowo, yaahaawina aRefayimi a wAsterote-Karnayimi, aZuzi a oHami ni awEmiti a oXave-Kiriyatayimi," 
Genesis14:6 ni aGori okhuma nyaako sa oSeyir mpaka wEli-Parani, vakhiviru wa nikare." 
Genesis14:7 Vahoolowaya yaahokolowa, enarowa wEni-Mispate, ori oKadexi, ni yaawinawo elapo yootheene ya awAmaleki ni ya awAmori yaamanke oGazezoni-Tamari." 
Genesis14:8 Vanonto mamwene a ilapo sa oSodoma, oGomora, wAdema, oZeboyimi, ni oBela, ori oZowari, yaaheetta erowaka okhottoni, enawana oreyareyani wa oSidimi" 
Genesis14:9 ni Kedorlawomeri, mwene a wElami, Tidali, mwene a oGoyimi, Amerafel, mwene a oXineyari ni Ariyokhe, mwene a wElasari. Wa ootheene yaari mamwene maxexe ewanaka ni mamwene mathanu." 
Genesis14:10 Oreyareyani wa oSidimi waasareya ni soowiixera soopakiwa ni ettoko, ni vano, etthawaka mamwene a oSodoma ni oGomora, yaavuluwela mwemmwe. Vano atthwaaya akina yaahanle yaatthawela omwaako." 
Genesis14:11 Anamawina yaakuxa mihakhu sootheene sa oSodoma ni sa oGomora nitho soocasene, enarowa." 
Genesis14:12 Yaamukuxatho musulwaawe Abraamu, Loti, ni mihakhusawe sootheene, niwoko Loti aakhala oSodoma." 
Genesis14:13 Vanonto, mmoha oopongwe, aarowa omuthalihera Abraamu, muHeberi, yeele yeereiye. Owo aakhala vakhiviru wa nyiri sa ikarivalyu* oMamre. Vano Mamre ori munna a Eskoli ni a Aner, mwa yaawo Abraamu iiraanannaaweno." 
Genesis14:14 Abraamu iiwaka weera musulwaawe ootthukiwa, aahaakuxa arumeiyaawe ootureene yaayariwe vaatewawe, wookwana macira mararu ni muloko mmoha ni athannaararu, anaattharelela amwiittana mpaka oDani." 
Genesis14:15 Moohiyuni aahaakawanyiha anakhottwaawe mipatta-mipatta, anaawanano ni aahaawina. Vano yaapwaherera waattharelela mpaka oGoba, ori wookela mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa elapo ya oDamasku." 
Genesis14:16 Aawera ohokoloxa mihakhu sootheene, anamoopola musulwaawe Loti ni mihakhusawe, vamoha ni asithiyana ni anamatthukiwa akina." 
Genesis14:17 Abraamu ahokolowaka vahoolo wa owana ni Kedorlawomeri ni mamwene oowiiraananaawe, mwene a oSodoma aavenya weera akumaneno oreyareyani wa oXave, ori oreyareyani wa Mwene." 
Genesis14:18 Vanonto, Melkisedeki, mwene a oSalemi, aari musaserdoti* a Muluku Musulusulu, aahiixoonihera akuxaleene yooca ni eviinyu." 
Genesis14:19 Aamureeliha Abraamu ni masu ala: “Ooreelihiwa akhale Abraamu ni Muluku Musulusulu, Yoowo opattunxe erimu ni elapo ya vathi." 
Genesis14:20 Ooreelihiwa akhale Muluku Musulusulu, ooweringhe waawina amwiittanaawo. Vano, Abraamu aamvaha mpatta wanaamuloko sa sootheene." 
Genesis14:21 Mwene a oSodoma aamweerela: “Okivahe paahi atthu, mene sooreela ti sawawo.”" 
Genesis14:22 Abraamu aamwaakhula mwene a oSodoma: “Kinlipela ni ntata kimweemexeraka Yave, Muluku Musulusulu, opattunxe erimu ni elapo ya vathi," 
Genesis14:23 weera yeeyo eri yawinyu nkintthunaru. Vekhaikhai, nkintthuna hata eciikhwe, naari muramba weera kitthukele ikwakwaatta. Nkintthuna weera nyuwo mweere: ‘Ti miyo kimpuhinghe Abraamu.’" 
Genesis14:24 Vano wa miyo, kintthuna paahi yeele arumeiyaaka aciiyaaya ni mpatta ophwanenle wa yaale yiitakansale ni miyo, eyo tiiyo Aner, Eskoli ni Mamre. Yaakhele mpattaaya.”" 
Genesis15:1 Vano, vahoolo wa yeeyo Yave aahiixoonihera wa Abraamu, anamweerela: “Muhoove Abraamu, Miyo ti yoowiixaakiheraanyu, ni munookhalano ntthuvelo ntokotoko.”" 
Genesis15:2 Abraamu aamwaakhula: “Ii! Adonai Yave, heeni mungweraanyu okivaha miyo, woonaka weera nkinkhalanne mwaana? Ori murumeiyaaka Eliyezeri, a oDamasku paahi aneera akuxe mihakhusaka?”" 
Genesis15:3 Abraamu aanyesera: “Khamukivanghe anamwane ni murumeiyaaka mmoha aneera akhale namahiyeriwaaka.” 
Genesis15:4 Vano Yave aamwaakhula: “Kharwa akhala yoowo namahiyeriwaanyu. Hoye, mwaana muneeraanyu mungyare aneera akhale namahiyeriwaanyu.”" 
Genesis15:5 Muluku aamulamulela okhumela vaate, anamweerela: “Ngwehe wiirumu. Moone, mwawera, waalikela ithenyeeri. Niwoko hiiho oneeraaya okhale waatta wa atthu a ekhapiraanyu.”" 
Genesis15:6 Vano Abraamu aamwaakhulela Yave, tivawo Muluku aamwaakhenlaawe ntoko oororomeleya." 
Genesis15:7 Muluku aamweerelatho: “Miyo ti Yave koovenxaleni wUri, mweelaponi ya aKaldeya, weera koovaheeni elapo ela ntoko yoohiyeriwaanyu.”" 
Genesis15:8 Abraamu aamukoha: “Adonai, Yave, nkisuweleke hayi weera eyo eniikhale elapwaaka?”" 
Genesis15:9 Yave aamwaakhula: “Mukiruuhele emombe exaana ethiyana emoha, epuri ethiyana emoha, nitho emombe elopwana emoha, sootheene sa iyaakha tthaaru, mpakatho nsiya nimoha ni ekhunda emoha.”" 
Genesis15:10 Abraamu aamuruuhela axinama ale, anaameyanyiha eriyariru, anawiikaathi khula mpatta ohoolo wa mukhwaaya. Paahi ipalame iye ahaakawanyinghaawe." 
Genesis15:11 Vano mattawo yaapacera omorela saaraaya inama iye, mene Abraamu aamoomolela." 
Genesis15:12 Wiilaka, Abraamu aakonaxa vancipale, ni yaamukhuneela ewiriphi etokotokoxa." 
Genesis15:13 Vano Muluku aamweerela: “Musuwele weera anamwane a ekhapiraanyu eniikhale ntoko anamarwa mweelaponi yoohikhala yawaya ni eniyeereke opuheriwa ni ohasuliwa wookwana ehuhu ya iyaakha macira maxexe. 
Genesis15:14 Miyo muneenaaka nkeereke waattaruxa yaawo eneera yoopuherekeni, ni vahoolowaya eniikhume ni mihakhu sincipale." 
Genesis15:15 Vano wa nyuwo, mmuuluvale mmuretteleni ni mmwivithiwe ni wuuluvala wooreera vamoha ni makholowaanyu." 
Genesis15:16 Mwa epuumba yanaaxexe, anamwane a ekhapiraanyu, eniihokoleele wenno, niwoko otakhala wa awAmori nlelo khoonaaye okwanela.”" 
Genesis15:17 Mwa yeeyo waahiila ni yaakhala epiphi. Vano waahooniwa mooro otthuwaka mwiixi, ni onyaari ovarelaka oviraka eriyari ya axinama ookawanyihiwa." 
Genesis15:18 Nihiku nenenenne Yave aakhaliha wiiraana onttharelana ni Abraamu: “Kinoovaha ekhapiraanyu elapo ela, okhuma mukhwipi mwa wExipitu mpaka mooloko mutokweene Efratesi." 
Genesis15:19 Aani, kinoovaha elapo ya aKeni, aKenizi, aKadimoni," 
Genesis15:20 aHiti, aPerizi, aRefayimi," 
Genesis15:21 mpakatho elapo ya awAmori, aKanaani, aGirgasi nitho aYebusi." 
Genesis16:1 Sarai, mwaara a Abraamu, khaamuyanre naari mwaana mmoha. Vano owo aakhalano epottha emoha ya wExipitu, yiitthaniwa Hagari." 
Genesis16:2 Sarayi aamweerela Abraamu: “Yave ookooceeliha oyara. Vano, apaale epotthaaka enoowera wooyarelani mwaana wa miyo. Munkoneno.” Abraamu aahaakhulela aatthunaawe Sarayi." 
Genesis16:3 Vano hiihaawo, vahoolo wa iyaakha muloko ekhalaka elapo ya oKanaani, Sarai, mwaara a Abraamu, aamvaha iyawe epotthaawe Hagari ngwExipitu, ntoko mwaariye." 
Genesis16:4 Abraamu aamukonano Hagari ni owo aarupala. Vano asuwelaka weera oorupala, Hagari aapacera omuramusa Sarai." 
Genesis16:5 Sarai aamweerela Abraamu: “Miyo kohoovahani mmatatanimwanyu epotthaaka, ni vano yoonnaaya weera yoorupala, eyo enookiramusa. Yave akhale Mphukaahu.”" 
Genesis16:6 Abraamu aamwaakhula Sarai: “Owo nlelo onoopwaherera okhala epotthaanyu. Mumpakeke yeeyo muntthunaanyu.” Vano Sarai aapacera omuhasula moota wooweera owo aatthawa. 
Genesis16:7 Ndyelo a Yave aamphwanya vanaattuuttuni, munikareni, ori mphironi enrowa oXuri," 
Genesis16:8 anamukoha: “Hagari, epottha ya Sarai, mungweela woowi ni munkela woowi?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Kinimtthawa Sarai, pwiiyaaka.”" 
Genesis16:9 Vano ndyelo a Yave aamweerela: “Muhokoleele vaate wa pwiiyaanyu ni mwamwiiwelelewo.” 
Genesis16:10 Vanonto, ndyelo aapwaherera: “Kinimwaandyeerera ekhapiraanyu weera ahikhale anaawere waalikela.”" 
Genesis16:11 Ndyelo a Yave aaheeratho: “Nyuwo moorupala ni mmungyare mwaana mulopwana muneeraanyu munttehe nsinanawe Iximayeli, niwoko Yave ohoona ohaawawanyu." 
Genesis16:12 Anaakhale ntoko buuru a muthupini ni mahuku ootheene aniittane ni ootheene, ni ootheene eniyiittane ni yoowo. Owo anaakhale oohasuweene iittanaka ni axunna ootheene.”" 
Genesis16:13 Nno naari nsina Hagari aamuttenghaawe Yave aamweerenlaawe yoowo: “Nyuwo ti Muluku munkoona,” niwoko aaheera: “Nkimoone Yoole onkoona.”" 
Genesis16:14 Tivawo naattuuttu ole iitthaniwaawe “Beer Lahi-Royi” ni omphwanyaneya eriyari ya oKadexi ni oBeredi. 
Genesis16:15 Hagari aamuyara mwaana mulopwana, vano atithawe, Abraamu, yaamutteha nsinanawe Iximayeli." 
Genesis16:16 Abraamu aarino iyaakha miloko mithannamiraru niithannamosa Hagari aamuyanraawe Iximayeli. 
Genesis17:1 Abraamu arinweene iyaakha miloko mithannamixexe niithanniixexe, Yave aahiixoonihera wa yoowo, anamweerela: “Miyo ti Muluku a ikuru sootheene, mweette vamoha ni Miyo ni mukhaleke ookwaneleene." 
Genesis17:2 Miyo kinookhaliha wiiraana variyariwahu ni nkaandyeerere ekhapiraanyu moota woowaattaxa.” 
Genesis17:3 Abraamu aahuuramaxa ni Muluku aamweerelatho: 
Genesis17:4 “Vano mwa mpattaaka kimpakaaka wiiraana ni nyuwo ti wu: Mmwithatuwe tiithi a miloko soowaatta. 
Genesis17:5 Nsinananyu khaneeriwaka Abraamu, mene Abrahaamu, niwoko kohookhalihani tiithi a miloko sincipale." 
Genesis17:6 Kinimoovahani ikhapira soowaattaxa ni wa nyuwo nseereke okhumelela miloko soohiyanahiyana, aani, eniikhumelele mamwene variyari wa ekhapiraanyu." 
Genesis17:7 Kinookhaliha wiiraanawaka ni nyuwo, ni ekhapiraanyutho ya muhoolo, ntoko wiiraana woohimala. Miyo nkikhale Mulukwaanyu, ni Muluku a ekhapiraanyu." 
Genesis17:8 Vano elapo yootheene ya oKanaani, weiwo nyuwo vaanaano muraanyu namarwa, kinimoovahani ni wa ekhapiraanyu ntoko yawinyuweene yoohimala, ni nkikhale Mulukwaaya.”" 
Genesis17:9 Muluku aamweerela Abrahaamu: “Wa mpattaanyu muthokorore wiiraanyihawaka, okhuma nyuwo mpaka ekhapiraanyu yootheene." 
Genesis17:10 Wu ti wiiraanyihawaka ni nyuwo ni ekhapiraanyu, wiiraana ontthuneya othokororiwa: asilopwana ootheene yiineliweke." 
Genesis17:11 Eniyiineliwe mwa elopwanaaya ni wiineliwa iwo onuukhale eneneero ya wiiraana variyariwahu. 
Genesis17:12 Okhuma epuumbaanyu mpaka ya muhoolo, anamwane asilopwana ootheene a mahuku mathanamararu a oyariwawaya yiineliweke, yaawo ooyariwa vaatewanyu, mpakatho yaawo eneera ethummweke ilapo sikina, mwa yaawo eneera ehikhale a ekhapiraanyu." 
Genesis17:13 Hata ekhalaka a vaatewanyu, naari oothummwa, ontthuneya wiineliwa. Wiiraanyihawaka wiikaathiwe mweerutthunimwanyu onuukhale wiiraana woohimala." 
Genesis17:14 Akhalaru mwaana mulopwana aneera aahiineliwe, oomoliweke munlokonimwawe, niwoko khiiwelenle wiiraanyihawaka.”" 
Genesis17:15 Vano Muluku aamweerelatho Abrahaamu: “Okhuma vanaano vaava mpaka ohoolo, amwaarinyu kheerwa yiitthaniwatho Sarai; nsinanaya nnikhale Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Vano Miyo nkimureelihe, nitho mwa yoowo kinimoovahani mwaana. Aani, Miyo nkimureelihe, ni mwa yoowo nsikhumelele miloko ni mamwene a miloko.”" 
Genesis17:17 Abrahaamu aahuuramela vathi, anatheya, aniixeerela: “Mulopwana a iyaakha ncira onoowera omuyara mwaana? Sara onoowera oyara areene ni iyaakha miloko mithannamixexe?”" 
Genesis17:18 Vano Abrahaamu aamweerela Muluku: “Eya! Iximayeli akhaleke namahiyeriwaaka!” 
Genesis17:19 Muluku aamwaakhula: “Vekhaikhai Sara onimooyarelani mwaana mulopwana ni nyuwo mmunttehe Isaki. Nkikhalihe wiiraanyihawaka ni yoowo ni ekhapiraawe ya muhoolo ntoko wiiraana woohimala. 
Genesis17:20 Vano mwaha wa Iximayeli, kohiiwa nivekolonanyu. Nkimureelihe ni nkimuvahe ekhapira etokotoko. Anaakhale tiithi a mahimo muloko ni meeli, ni mwa yoowo nkikhalihe muloko mutokotoko." 
Genesis17:21 Vano wiiraanyihawaka Miyo nkikhalihe mwa Isaki, mwaana a Sara aneeraawe amuyare mwaahiyu mwa ehuhuweene yeela.”" 
Genesis17:22 Muluku amalihakaru wuuluma ni Abrahaamu, aavenyawo." 
Genesis17:23 Nihuku nenenenne Abrahaamu aamukuxa mwanawe Iximayeli, ootheene ooyariwa vaatewawe, mpaka oothummwa ootheene a vaatewawe, aani, asilopwana ootheene a vaatewawe, anawiinela, ntoko Muluku aamuleelenlaawe." 
Genesis17:24 Abrahaamu iineliwe areeneno iyaakha miloko mithannamixexe niithanniixexe. 
Genesis17:25 Mwanawe Iximayeli aarino iyaakha muloko ni tthaaru iineliwaawe. 
Genesis17:26 Abrahaamu vamoha ni mwanawe Iximayeli yiineliwe nihuku nenenenne. 
Genesis17:27 Vano, vamoha ni Abrahaamu yaahiineliwa ootheene a vaatewawe, ooyariwa weiwe mpaka oothummwa a ilapo sikina." 
Genesis18:1 Yave aahiixoonihera wa Abrahaamu vakhiviru wa nyiri sa ikarivalyu* sa oMamre, akilaathiyeene vamulako wa eheemaawe, mwa ehuhu yoovihaxa ya othana." 
Genesis18:2 Abrahaamu aawoona asilopwana araru yeemenleene woorakamela vakhaani. Awoonakaru, aavenya vamulako wa eheemaawe, anaatthimakela weera aakumaneno, anuuramela vathi." 
Genesis18:3 Vano aaheera: “Asipwiyaka, mwakitthunela, muhivire wa murumeiyaanyu muheemenle." 
Genesis18:4 Kinooruma oroweliwa maahi vakhaani weera murapihe inaawo nitho weera mwiitthuuwe vakhaani vathi wa mwiri ola. 
Genesis18:5 Vano woonaka weera moophiya wa murumeiyaanyu, kinimooruuhelanitho yooca, weera mpwaherere weetta ni ikuru.” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Paahi, opakeke ntoko ohimalaawo.”" 
Genesis18:6 Woowaakuveya Abrahaamu aavolowa muheemanimwawe anamweerela Sara: “Waakuveke – okuxe mipatta miraru sa ephepa ya etrigu yooreeraxa ni weetheye opake ipaawu.” 
Genesis18:7 Vahoolowaya aatthimakela omuhuwoni, anathanla emombe exaana yooneneva, anamvaha murumeiyaawe weera aakuvihe oreherera." 
Genesis18:8 Vano aaruuha emombe exaana yoorehereriweene, mukaka ni manteeka saarehereriwe, anaarumeela. Ecaaka, owo aaweemelela vathi wa mwiri." 
Genesis18:9 Vano yaamukoha: “Ari woowi amwaarinyu Sara?” Owo aawaakhula: “muheemani mmwe.” 
Genesis18:10 Mmoha a yaawo aaheera: “Mwaahiyu ehuhuweene yeela, kinimoohokoleelani. Vano Sara anaamuyare mwaana.” Sara eera iiwelelaka vamulako wa eheema, ottuli wa Abrahaamu." 
Genesis18:11 Abrahaamu ni Sara yaahuuluvala vancipale, ni wa Sara, saavira misingu sooweera ayare." 
Genesis18:12 Tivawo Sara iitheyaawe uupuwelaka: “Hiyo nuuluvanleene, weeraka kinookhalano yooreera eyo?”" 
Genesis18:13 Vano Yave aamweerela Abrahaamu: “Heeni Sara oniitheyaawe eeraka: ‘Vekhaikhai kinoowera omuyara mwaana hiiha kuuluvanleene?’ 
Genesis18:14 Yookhala etthu yoohiwereya wa Yave? Mwaahiyu ehuhuweene yeela kinimoohokoleelani ni amwaarinyu anookhalano mwaana mulopwana.” 
Genesis18:15 Sara aahoova vancipale tivawo aarunnaawe eeraka ‘miyo nkitheiye.’ Vano owo aaheera: “Ohirune, weyo wootheya." 
Genesis18:16 Vano asilopwana ale yeemenlaaya weera epwaheke, yaaweha mpatta wa oSodoma, ni Abrahaamu aahaahoola weera eraxelane." 
Genesis18:17 Vano Yave aaheera: “Kinoomwiipithiha Abrahaamu yeeyo kihanlaaka vakhaani opaka? 
Genesis18:18 Abrahaamu anaakhale tiithi a muloko mutokotoko ni woolipaxa, ni mwaha wa yoowo miloko sootheene sa mweelaponi nsireelihiwe." 
Genesis18:19 Vano Miyo kimuthanlenle weera aweettihe anamwanaawe ootheene ni ikhapirasawe sootheene weera etthare ephiro ya Yave, epakaka yeeyo eri yoororomeleya ni yoowookowa. Hiiho Yave onoomukwaniherela Abrahaamu yeeyo aamuroromelinghaawe.”" 
Genesis18:20 Vano Yave aamweerela: “Soowootheriwa sa oSodoma ni oGomora sootepa waattaxa ni yootthekaaya eri yoowoopiha," 
Genesis18:21 moota wooweera kinookhuruwelawo weera koone seiyo ampakaaya saalikanaka ni yeeyo kiiwalaaka.” 
Genesis18:22 Asilopwana ale yaarowa mpaka oSodoma, mene Abrahaamu aapwaherera okhala vamaithoni wa Yave." 
Genesis18:23 Abrahaamu aamwaattamela, amweerelaka; “Weeraka munrowa waaphwata atthu oohikhala ni nthowa vamoha ni yaawo ari ni nthowa?”" 
Genesis18:24 Noone ha: “Yakhala atthu miloko mithanu oohikhalano nthowa esidadeene yeele, munrowa ophwata? Khamunrowa wuurela nipuro nno niwoko na waasivela atthu miloko mithanu yaale ari mwemmo?" 
Genesis18:25 Khoongwereya wa Nyuwo opaka etthweene yeeyo omuthorihela okhwa mutthu oohikhalano nthowa vamoha ni mutthu orino nthowa. Mooteene yoowo khoongwereya wa Nyuwo waapakela moota mmoha atthu oohikhalano nthowa ni ookhalano nthowa. Nyuwo muri Mphuki a elapo ya vathi yootheene, ontthuneya othoriha nnene.”" 
Genesis18:26 Yave aamwaakhula: “Miyo kaaphwanya miloko mithanu oohikhalano nthowa oSodoma, nkuurele esidade yootheene niwoko na waasivela yaawo.”" 
Genesis18:27 Vano Abrahaamu aapwaherera wuuluma: “Koosuwela weera kootaphuwa woowuuluma ni Adonai, kiroohipwaharu etthaya ni ettuura." 
Genesis18:28 Ankha yahaleela athanu okwana miloko mithanu oohikhalano nthowa? Munophwata esidade niwoko na ohaleela athanu?” Owo aaheera: “Kaaphwanya atthu miloko mixexe naathanu oohikhalano nthowa, nkinrowa ophwata.”" 
Genesis18:29 Abrahaamu aanyesera: “Ankha mwaaphwanya atthu miloko mixexe paahi?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Mwaha woowaasivela atthu miloko mixexe, nkinrowa ophwata.”" 
Genesis18:30 Vano Abrahaamu aapwaherera: “Adonai, muhinyoonyiwe, mene mukitthunihere wuulumatho. Ankha mwaaphwanya atthu miloko miraru paahi?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Kaaphwanya atthu miloko miraru, nkinrowa ophwata.”" 
Genesis18:31 Abrahaamu aapwaherera: “Vano hapo kootaphuwa woowuuluma ni Yave, kinookoha: Ankha mwaaphwanya atthu miloko miili paahi?” Yave aamwaakhula: “Niwoko na waasivela atthu miloko miili, nkinrowa ophwata.”" 
Genesis18:32 Vano Abrahaamu aaheera: “Muhinyoonyiwe, Adonai, mene mukitthunihere wuuluma emaara emoha paahi. Ankha mwaaphwanya paahi muloko?” Owo amwaakhula: “Niwoko na waasivela atthu muloko, nkinrowa ophwata.”" 
Genesis18:33 Amalihaka Yave wuuluma ni Abrahaamu, aapwaha ni Abrahaamu aahokoleela oheemaniwawe." 
Genesis19:1 Wiilaka, andyelo eeli ale yaaphiya oSodoma, ni Loti eera akilaantheene vamulako wa esidade. Awoonakaru, aaheemela, anarowa owaakhelela, anuuramela vathi." 
Genesis19:2 Vano aaheera: “Asipwiyaka, dyoontte, mukihoole vaate wa murumeiyaanyu weera mwarapihewo inaawosanyu, ni mmwavirihe ohiyu wootheene weiwo. Omaalo oxeexelo mwapwaherereke ni mukwaahaanyu.” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Hoye, hiyo nnivirihe ohiyu munseweni.”" 
Genesis19:3 Loti aahaanyesereriha vancipale, ommaleloniwaya yaamuhoola, enavolowa mpaanimwawe. Loti aalamulela weera ereherereliwe yooca, ni yooxeriwe epaawu yoohikhala eferementu ni awo yaahooca." 
Genesis19:4 Vano nlelo yeera ehinaaye orowa okona, atthu ootheene a esidade ya oSodoma, okhuma asimiravo mpaka asitokweene, yaarukurera empa." 
Genesis19:5 Yaamwiitthana Loti enamweerela: “Ari woowi asilopwana awiiye ohiyuweene yoola vaatevawo va? Oniruuhele hiyo vaate va – nintthuna okonano yaawo.” 
Genesis19:6 Loti aakhuma mpaani, anawala nsele ottuli ottuli." 
Genesis19:7 Vano aaheera: “Hoye asinthamwenaaka, muhipake etthu yootakhala eyo." 
Genesis19:8 Moone ha, miyo kookhalano asinamwane eeli nlelo axaaruusi. Kinimooruuhelani weera mwaapake yeeyo nyuwo muntthunasaanyu. Muhaapake etthu asilopwana ala, niwoko aaphiya vaatevaka ni amphwanela waakihawaka.”" 
Genesis19:9 Vano yaakhuwela: “Ovenye vamulako!” Eneera: “Mulopwana ola oophiya nno ntoko namarwa, vano ontthuna wiipaka mphuki! Nnimoopaka weyo wootepaxa waapwaha yaawo.” Yaamukakha Loti yeerelaka okakharula nsele." 
Genesis19:10 Vano aletto eeli ale yaamvara Loti, enampurulela mpaani, enawala mulako." 
Genesis19:11 Vahoolowaya atthu yaari vamulako yaakhalihiwa evaasi, okhuma asimiravo mpaka asitokweene, moota wooweera yaahooceela woona mulako." 
Genesis19:12 Asilopwana eeli ale yaamukoha Loti: “Nyuwo mookhalano mutthu mukina musidadenimu – ntoko asikamwene, anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana, naari mmusi mukina? Mwaakhumihe mu," 
Genesis19:13 niwoko nihanle vakhaani ophwata nipuro nenenenna. Soowoothera sipakeleiye muloko ola sootepa waatta moota wooweera Yave onirumihenlaawe ophwata esidade.” 
Genesis19:14 Vano Loti aarowa wuuluma ni asikamwenaawe yeera yaatheleke anamwanaawe weera evenye woowaakuveya nipuro nne, niwoko Yave aahanle vakhaani ophwata esidade. Aletho yuupuwela weera ole oopa mwaha." 
Genesis19:15 Oxaaka, andyelo yaamunyeserera Loti, yeeraka: “Mwaakuveke, mwaakuxeke amwaarinyu, ni anamwaniinyu eeli weera muhikhwe Yave aattaruxaka esidade ela.”" 
Genesis19:16 Vano owo nlelo ahovelaka, asilopwana yaamvara ni matata vamoha ni mwaariye nitho anamwanaawe asithiyana eeli, enaakhumiha mmwe yaanyesereraka, enawiikaathi okerekhere wa esidade, niwoko Yave aahaamorela ikharari." 
Genesis19:17 Yaavenxaka musidadeni, mmoha a yaale eeli aamweerela Loti: “Mutthawe weera muurele okumi! Muhiwehe ottuli, hata muheemele vamuhawalawani. Mutthaweleke onyaakoni mwaaheera hiiho munimookhwa.”" 
Genesis19:18 Wa soothesene, Loti aaweerela: “Hoye, apwiyaaka!" 
Genesis19:19 Murumeiyaanyu oovuluwa ni oreerawanyu murima niwoko Yave aareera murima wa miyo, uurelaka okumaaka. Nkingwera otthawela onyaakoni, niwoko nkiphwanyiwe ni nttaruxo nno kikhweeke." 
Genesis19:20 Vano, vakhiviru va, yookhala esidade emoha ekhaanene. Yookhuveelaxa, wookwana otthawelawo. Mukihiye kitthawelewo erimweeraru ereene ekhaanene, nkavuluwewo.”" 
Genesis19:21 Owo aamwaakhula: “Paahi, kinoowaakhulelani nivekelo nno. Nkinrowa ophwata esidade mwa yeeyo nyuwo munghimaanyu." 
Genesis19:22 Mutthaweke mwaakuveke, niwoko nkingwera opaka etthu nyuwo muhinaaye opwahawo.” Tivawo esidade ele yiitthaniwaaya Zowari." 
Genesis19:23 Loti aphiyakaru oZowari, nsuwa naakhuma mweelaponi yootheene." 
Genesis19:24 Vano Yave muneenaawe aarupihela oSodoma ni oGomora enxofre ni mooro okhumelelaka wiirimu. 
Genesis19:25 Hiiho Owo aaphwata isidade piili iye ni mukhwipimwaya moothemwene, vamoha ni atthu oottheene yaamanke isidade iye, nitho sootheene saamenle mwemmwe." 
Genesis19:26 Vano amwaariye Loti yaaweha ottuli, enathatuwa pontto a maakha." 
Genesis19:27 Oxaawaya Abrahaamu aavenya, anahokoleela nipuro nenenenne aaraawewo ohoolo wa Yave." 
Genesis19:28 Awehaka oSodoma ni oGomora ni oreyareyani wootheene, aahoona mwiixi mwincipale otthuwakawo ntoko niikho ntokotoko." 
Genesis19:29 Muluku aphwatakaru isidade iye sa elapo ele, aamuupuwelela Abrahaamu, anamvenxa Loti mwa ophwata iwe waaphwante isidade piili iye Loti aamankaawe." 
Genesis19:30 Loti aavenya oZowari ni anamwanaawe eeli asithiyana, anarowa omaka onyaakoni, niwoko aamova opwaherera omaka oZowari. Owo vamoha ni anamwanaawe eeli yaakhala munikhukuni nimoha." 
Genesis19:31 Vano nihuku nimoha, mwaana mutokweene aamweerela mukhaani: “Atithihu ahuuluvala. Vano khanaattamanne ni atthu akina weera enithele ntoko akhovelenlaaya atthu ootheene a elapo ya vathi yootheene." 
Genesis19:32 Nrowe, naavahe eviinyu atithihu, naakonaneke weera enivahe ekhapira.”" 
Genesis19:33 Ohiyuweene yoole yaahaavaha eviinyu atithaya ni mwaana muthiyana mutokweene aavolowa, anaakonano. Vano awo khayaasuwenle weera ole aakonawo naari aavenyaawe." 
Genesis19:34 Oxaawaya mwaana muthiyana mutokweene aamweerela mukhaani: “Osilo ohiyu kookonano atithaka. Nrowe naavahetho eviinyu, ni weyotho okonaneke, weera nipwahereriheke ekhapira ya atithihu.”" 
Genesis19:35 Vano emaara ekinatho yaahaavaha eviinyu atithaya ohiyuweene yoole, ni mwaana muthiyana mukhaani aakonano, owo ahisuwelaka weera ookonano naari aavenyaawe." 
Genesis19:36 Hiiho anamwane eeli ale a Loti yaarupalihiwa ni atithaya. 
Genesis19:37 Mwaana muthiyana mutokweene aamuyara mwaana mulopwana, anamutteha nsinanawe Mowabe. Owo ti tiithi a aMowabe ari mpaka olelo." 
Genesis19:38 Mwaana muthiyana mukhaani aamuyara nave mwaana mulopwana, anamutteha nsinanawe Ben-Ami. Owo ti tiithi a awAmoni ari mpaka olelo." 
Genesis20:1 Vano Abrahaamu aavenya weiwe arowaka elapo ya oNegeba, anarowa omaka eriyari ya oKade ni oXuri. Vano, aakhala wa mahuku makina oGerari." 
Genesis20:2 Owo eera weera maariye Sara aari murokoriye. Vano Abimeleki, mwene a oGerari, aarumiha oroweliwa Sara, anamukuxa." 
Genesis20:3 Wa soothesene, Muluku aahoowa wa Abimeleki moolohani, anamweerela: “Weyo onimookhwa! Muthiyana omukuxalaawo ootheliwa.”" 
Genesis20:4 Vano, Abimeleki nlelo eera ahinaaye okonano ni aaheera: “Yave munoophwata muloko woohikhalano nthowa?" 
Genesis20:5 Khahiyono yoowo okeerenle: ‘Ola murokoraka’? Ni muthiyana munenaawe eenre: ‘Ala acimweene’? Yeeyo kipankaaka, kipanke ni murima wootteeleene ni matata ooreereene.”" 
Genesis20:6 Vano Muluku aamwaakhula moolohani: “Aani Miyo koosuwela weera weyo opanke yeeyo ni murima wootteela. Miyo muneenaaka koowooceeliha weera ohikitthekele Miyo, tivawo kihootthunihenraaka omutava." 
Genesis20:7 Vano, omuhokoloxere mwaneene a muthiyana owo. Owo mprofeeti, onimoovekelela weera weyo ohikhwe. Mene waahimuhokoloxera, osuwele nnenesene weera weyo vamoha ni amusaawo onimookhwa.”" 
Genesis20:8 Oxaawaya Abimeleki aahaalattula anamalakaawe ootheene ni aathaliherakaru yeeyo yaamukhumelenle, yaahoova vancipale." 
Genesis20:9 Vahoolowaya Abimeleki aamwiitthana Abrahaamu, anamweerela: “Onipankeni? Kootthekenle eheeni okiruuhelaka nthowa ntokotoko miyo vamoha ni omwenaaka? Yeeyo okipankaawo kheehiyono etthu yooreera omupaka mukhwaawo.”" 
Genesis20:10 Vano Abimeleki aamukoha Abrahaamu: “Eweeringhe eheeni opakaka yeela?” 
Genesis20:11 Abrahaamu aamwaakhula: “Miyo kohiixeerela mwaneenaaka: ‘Vekhaikhai khaawo ammoova Muluku nipuro nna, ni eniikiive mwaha wa mwaaraka." 
Genesis20:12 Ohiya toko yeeyo, vekhaikhai owo murokoraka wa mpatta wa atithaka ohikhanle mpatta wa amaayi, anakhala mwaaraka." 
Genesis20:13 Vano Muluku aakivenxaawe vaate wa atithaka, miyo kaamweerela: Wiixoonihereke onnenaawo moota ha: mmapuroni moothemwene nneeraahu niroweke, weereke: ‘ala acimweene’.’“" 
Genesis20:14 Vano Abimeleki aakuxa ikhondoolo, ni imombe, ipottha ilopwana ni ithiyana, anamvaha Abrahaamu, anamuhokoloxera mwaariye Sara." 
Genesis20:15 Vano Abimeleki aamweerela: “Elapwaaka eri ohoolowawo – omakeke ontthunaawo.” 
Genesis20:16 Vanonto, aamweerela Sara: “Koomvaha murokoriyo ixekeli* macira muloko weera kiwoonihere awawo ootheene weera khoonono nthowa ni ahikhale aneera awoothere etthu.”" 
Genesis20:17 Abrahaamu aamvekela Muluku ni Owo aamulamiha Abimeleki, amwaariye ni mpaka ipotthasawe ni hiiho yaaweratho oyara." 
Genesis20:18 Vano, ehinaaye, Yave aahaakhaliha asimwali eekupa asithiyana ootheene a vaate wa Abimeleki mwaha wa Sara, mwaara a Abrahaamu." 
Genesis21:1 Vano Yave aamuxekura Sara ni aampakela ntoko aamuroromelinghaawe. 
Genesis21:2 Sara aarupala, anamuyarela mwaana mulopwana Abrahaamu ngwuuluvalanimwawe, mweehuhuni aahimalaawe Muluku." 
Genesis21:3 Abrahaamu aamutteha nsinanawe Isaki, mwaana aamuyarenlaawe Sara." 
Genesis21:4 Isaki aarinaawe mahuku mathannamararu a oyariwawawe, Abrahaamu aamwiinela ntoko Muluku aamulamulenlaawe." 
Genesis21:5 Amuyaraka Isaki, Abrahaamu eera akhalanneene iyaakha ncira." 
Genesis21:6 Vano Sara aaheera: “Muluku ookisariha ni otheya, ni ootheene asuwenle yeeyo anootheya vamoha ni miyo.”" 
Genesis21:7 Vano aaheera: “Taani aahovela wa Abrahaamu weera Sara anaamwaamwihe mwaana? Wa soothesene, miyo koomuyarela mwaana mulopwana orookhalaru oowuuluvaleene.”" 
Genesis21:8 Vano mwaana ole aahunnuwa, anahiihiwa waamwa. Ni nihuku aahiihiwaawe waamwa, Abrahaamu aapaka efesta etokotoko." 
Genesis21:9 Wa soothesene, Sara aahoona weera mwaana a Hagari, ngwExipitu, aamuyarenlaawe Abrahaamu aamutthebwa Isaki." 
Genesis21:10 Vano aarowa wuuluma ni Abrahaamu: “Moomole epottha ela vamoha ni mwanaya. Nkintthuna weera mwanaya akhale namahiyeriwa vamoha ni mwanaka, Isaki.”" 
Genesis21:11 Vano Abrahaamu khaahakalalenle masu ale, niwoko aahimmwa mwanawe." 
Genesis21:12 Vano Muluku aamweerela Abrahaamu: “Muhithanane mwaha wa mwaana ni epottha. Mwaakhuleleke yeeyo oovekenlaaweni Sara, niwoko epuumbaanyu eniyaalikeleliwe mwa Isaki yoowo." 
Genesis21:13 Vano mwaana a epottha kinoomukhalihatho muloko, niwoko owotho mwaninyu.”" 
Genesis21:14 Oxaawaya Abrahaamu aakuxa yooca ni ekacikhi yoosareya maahi, anamvaha Hagari. Vano, amuthatelihakaru mmakhatani, aamulaxera vamoha ni mwaana. Owo aapacera weetta amakamakaka munikareni na oBerxeba." 
Genesis21:15 Vano emalakaru maahi aahenlaawe mukacikhini, aamuhiya mwaana vaniphuwani." 
Genesis21:16 Vano aarowa okilaathi ottai vakhaani, moota onkotaaya wuumpha wa muupa, niwoko uupuwela: “Nkintthuna omoona mwaana akhwaaka.” Akilaathiyeene vathi aahiinla vancipale." 
Genesis21:17 Vano Muluku aamwiiwa mwaana iinlaka, ni ndyelo a Yave aamwiitthana Hagari wiirimu eeraka: “Enoothananiha eheeni Hagari? Ohoove, niwoko Muluku ohiiwa nsu na mwaana weiwo weyo omuhiyalaawo." 
Genesis21:18 Ovenye, omukuxe mwaana omvareleke ni ntata, niwoko mwa yoowo kinookhaliha muloko mutokotoko.”" 
Genesis21:19 Muluku aamoonihera Hagari ehime. Aarowawo, anasariha maahi mukacikhini, anamvaha owura mwaana." 
Genesis21:20 Muluku aamukhavihera mwaana ole ni owo aahunnuwa. Aamanke munikareni ni aathatuwa namawera olatha ni muupa. 
Genesis21:21 Aakhala munikareni na oParani ni amayawe yaamutheliha muthiyana a wExipitu. 
Genesis21:22 Vano wa ehuhuweene yeele Abimeleki ahooliwaka ni Pikoli, mutokweene a anakhottwaawe, aamweerela Abrahaamu: “Muluku ori mpattaawo mwa sootheene seiye ompakaawo." 
Genesis21:23 Vano kinoovekela weera vaanaanova omulipele Muluku weera khoorwa onilokottha hata miyo, naari anamwanaaka mpaka ekhapiraaka yootheene. Opwatthe muloko owaakhelenle ntoko namarwa ni oreerawene murima weiwo miyo koonihenraaka.”" 
Genesis21:24 Abrahaamu aamwaakhula: “Miyo kinoolipela!” 
Genesis21:25 Wa soothesene, Abrahaamu aahuuluma ni Abimeleki sa ehime arumeiyaawe Abimeleki yaakamenlaaya." 
Genesis21:26 Vano Abimeleki aamwaakhula: “Nkaasuwenle taani yaapanke yeeyo. Khoonatoko okileela etthu. Olelonto kimmweera osuwela.” 
Genesis21:27 Vano Abrahaamu aaruuha ikhondoolo ni imombe, anamvaha Abimeleki, ni ooweeli awo yaahiiraana." 
Genesis21:28 Abrahaamu aamwalamwaliha ikhondoolo ithannapiili ithiyana sa muhuwaawe. 
Genesis21:29 Vano Abimeleki aamukoha: “Entaphulela eheeni ikhondoolo ithannapiili ithiyana omwalamwanxaawo ni iyo sikina?” 
Genesis21:30 Vano owo aamwaakhula: “Mwaakhelele ikhondoolo iya ithannapiili ithiyana sawaka ntoko onamoona weera musuwele weera ti miyo kaathimpe ehime ele.” 
Genesis21:31 Tivawo nipuro nne niitthaniwaaya oBerxeba, niwoko iwe ooweeli yaahiiraana." 
Genesis21:32 Vano yaakhulelaka wiiraana iwe oBerxeba, Abimeleki ni Pikoli, mutokweene a anakhottwaawe, yaahokoleela elapo ya aFilisti." 
Genesis21:33 Abrahaamu aaphatteya oBerxeba tamargira*, aniitthana Nsina na Yave, Muluku oohimala." 
Genesis21:34 Vano, Abrahaamu aamaka elapo ya aFilisti mweehuhuni yincipale." 
Genesis22:1 Vano eviraka mahuku makina, Muluku aamoota murima Abrahaamu amweerelaka: “Abrahaamu!” Owo aamwaakhula: “Miyo kiri va!”" 
Genesis22:2 Vanonto Muluku aamweerela: “Munkuxe mwaninyu mmoharu, Isaki yoowo nyuwo munimusivelaanyu, ni murowe elapo ya oMoriya. Mwampake yooveleela yoohisa mwaako yoowo Miyo kineeraaka koothoonyereni.”" 
Genesis22:3 Vano oxaawaya Abrahaamu aahiireherera, anatthukelela murindaawe vabuuruni. Vamoha ni yoowo aahaakuxa eeli a arumeiyaawe nitho mwanawe, Isaki. Vahoolo wa othikila ikhuuni wa yooveleela, aavenya arowaka mpatta ole Muluku aamuthoonyenraawe." 
Genesis22:4 Nihuku nanaararu na mukwaahaawe, Abrahaamu aaweha, anoona ottaiwene nipuro nne." 
Genesis22:5 Vanonto owo aaweerela arumeiyaawe: “Muhaleke vaava ni buuru ola. Miyo ni mmiravo ninrowa mpaka iwe. Vahoolo wa omulapa Muluku, nimmoophwanyani.”" 
Genesis22:6 Abrahaamu aakuxa ikhuuni sa yooveleela, anamuthateliha mwanawe. Owo muneenaawe aakuxa mooro ni mwaalo. Erowaka vamoha ooweeli ale," 
Genesis22:7 Isaki aamweerela Abrahaamu: “Tiithi?” Ni owo aamwaakhula: “Okileele mwanaka.” Isaki aamukoha: “Hiyo va, mooro nookuxa, ikhuuni nookuxa, vano eputtiputthi ya yooveleela eri woowi?”" 
Genesis22:8 Abrahaamu aamwaakhula: “Mwanaka, Muluku muneenaawe onooruuha eputtiputthi ya yooveleela.” Yaapwaherera ooweeli weetta ni mukwaahaaya." 
Genesis22:9 Ephiyakaru vanipuroni Muluku aamuthoonyenraawe, Abrahaamu aahaateka altaari*. Aahuukela ikhuuni vasuluwaya, anamutthuka mwanawe Isaki, anamwiikaathi vasulu ikhuuni wa altaari*." 
Genesis22:10 Vano aahookola moonowaawe, anakuxa mwaalo weera amwiive mwanawe." 
Genesis22:11 Vanonto, ndyelo a Yave aamwiitthana wiirimu: “Abrahaamu! Abrahaamu!” Owo aamwaakhula: “Miyo kiri va!”" 
Genesis22:12 Ndyelo eenre: “Muhimutave mmiravo owo! Muhimpake etthu. Vano koosuwela weera nyuwo munnimoova Muluku, niwoko khamukikhoottihenre mwaninyu mmoharu.”" 
Genesis22:13 Abrahaamu aattukhula maitho, anoona eputtiputthi yooneneva yaangihiweene manyaka muniphuwani. Vano aarowa, anakuxa, anapaka yooveleela vanipuroni na mwanawe." 
Genesis22:14 Abrahaamu aatteha nipuro nne Nsina na “Yave anaavahe.” Tivawo mpaka olelo eneeriwaaya: “Vamwaakoni wa Yave, eniivahiwe”" 
Genesis22:15 Vanonto, emaara yanaaveeli ndyelo a Yave aamwiitthana Abrahaamu wiirimu, aneera:" 
Genesis22:16 “Kiniilipela Miyo muneenaaka: Mweenre mpakaka yeeyo, muhikikhoottiheraka mwaninyu mmoharu," 
Genesis22:17 vano vekhaikhai Miyo nkooreeliheni. Ekhapiraanyu eniikhale yoowaattaxa ntoko ithenyeeri sa wiirimu ni muhaava wa mukerekhere wa ephareiya. Aani, ekhapiraanyu eniiwine isidade seiyo sineera siittane ni yeeyo." 
Genesis22:18 Vano mwaha wa yeeyo miloko sootheene sa elapo ya vathi nsireelihiwe niwoko nyuwo mookiiwelela.” 
Genesis22:19 Abrahaamu aahokoleela wa arumeiyaawe, anarowa vamoha ni yaawo oBerxeba mwa weiwo aamankaawe." 
Genesis22:20 Eviraka ehuhu ekina, aaheereliwa Abrahaamu weera Milka aamvaha anamwane asilopwana munneiye Nahori:" 
Genesis22:21 Uzi, mutokweenexa, munneiye Buzi, Kemuweli tiithaawe Arami," 
Genesis22:22 Kesedi, Hazo, Pilidaxi, Yidelafi ni Betuweli," 
Genesis22:23 atithawe Rebeka. Ala yaari anamwane athannaararu Milka aamuyarannaawe Nahori, munneiye Abrahaamu." 
Genesis22:24 Vano ekuxowaawe yaari epottha yiitthaniwa Rehuma, aakhalano anamwane ala: Teba, Gahami, Tahaxi ni Mahaka." 
Genesis23:1 Saara aakhala ni okumi iyaakha ncira ni miloko miili niithannapiili. 
Genesis23:2 Aakhwenle oKiriyate-Arba, ori oHeberoni, elapo ya oKanaani ni Abrahaamu aarowa olalamika ni omwiinlela yoowo." 
Genesis23:3 Vahoolowaya Abrahaamu aahiya muttembo wa mwaariye, anarowa wuuluma ni aHiti aweerelaka:" 
Genesis23:4 “Miyo kiri paahi namarwa variyariwanyu. Mukithumihere nipuro weera kipake nihiye weera kimvithe mwaaraka.” 
Genesis23:5 Vano aHiti yaamwaakhula Abrahaamu: 
Genesis23:6 “Muniiwe apwiya, nyuwo ti mutokweene mmoha a Muluku variyariwahu. Mumvithe mwaarinyu variyari wa mahiyaahu, muthanlaka nipuro muntthunaanyu. Khawowo hata mutthu mmoha aneera ookhoottiheni omvitha mwaarinyu.”" 
Genesis23:7 Abrahaamu aaheemela, anaarukunuwela atthu a elapo ele ya aHiti." 
Genesis23:8 Vanonto aaweerela: “Vano mwakitthunihera omvitha mwaaraka, mumvekele Efroni mwaana a Zowari," 
Genesis23:9 weera akivahe nikhuku na Makipela, nri nawawe, nimphwanyaneya mukerekhere wa emattaawe. Miyo kinooliva muneeraanyu mukilamule. Hiiho nkikhale muneene a nihiye nimoha mweelaponimwanyu.”" 
Genesis23:10 Vano Efroni, muHiti, eera akilaantheene variyari wa mulokwaawe ni aamwaakhula Abrahaamu, iiwiwaka ni aHiti ootheene yaawo yaavira vamulako wa esidade:" 
Genesis23:11 “Hoye, apwiya, mukiiwe. Miyo kinoovahani ematta, nitho nikhuku nri mwemmo. Kinoovahani vamaithoni wa mulokwaaka, mwaavitheke amwaarinyu.”" 
Genesis23:12 Emaara yanaaveelitho Abrahaamu aarukunuwela muloko wa elapo ele. 
Genesis23:13 Aamweerela Efroni iiwiwaka ni atthu ootheene: “Dyoontte, mukiiwe. Nkilive hiiho muntthunelaanyu. Mwaakhulele, weera kivithe muttembo wa amwaaraka.”" 
Genesis23:14 Vano Efroni aamwaakhula Abrahaamu:
