Genesis23:15 “Mukiiwe, apwiyaaka: Mpatta wa etthaya ele, omphwanela othumihiwa ixekeli* macira maxexe. Yoopwattheleya eheeni variyariwahu? Mwaavithe amwaarinyu.”" 
Genesis23:16 Vano Abrahaamu aahaakhulela oliva yeeyo Efroni aalamunlaawe, anamvaha vamaithoni wa atthu ootheene ixekeli* macira maxexe, yeeyo yaahimalaaya anamathumiha." 
Genesis23:17 Hiiho ematta ya Efroni eri oMakipela ohoolo wa oMamre, nitho nikhuku ni nyiri sootheene saarimo aathumiheriwa Abrahaamu." 
Genesis23:18 Aavahiwa Abrahaamu okhala sawawe vamaithoni wa aHiti ootheene yaarwiiye vamulako wa esidade. 
Genesis23:19 Vahoolowaya Abrahaamu aamvitha mwaariye Sara munikhukuni mwa ematta ya oMakipela, vakhiviru wa oMamre, ori oHeberoni, elapo ya oKanaani." 
Genesis23:20 Hiiho ematta ni nikhuku na mwemmwe aavahiwa Abrahaamu ni aHiti, weera mwemmo aavitheke atthwaawe yaakhwaaka." 
Genesis24:1 Abrahaamu aahuuluvala vancipale, ni Yave aamureeliha mwa sootheene." 
Genesis24:2 Vanonto aamweerela murumeiyaawe mutokweene aawehaweha sootheene aarinaawe sa vaatevawe: “Wiikaathi ntatanawo vatakhwiniwaka 
Genesis24:3 ni omulipele Yave Muluku a wiirimu nitho a elapo ya vathi weera ohimwaasere muthiyana mwanaka variyari wa anamwane asithiyana a oKanaani, eriyari ya yaawo miyo kimankaaka." 
Genesis24:4 Vano ontthuneya weyo orowa elapwaaka weera waamuthanlelewo mwanaka Isaki muthiyana eriyari ya asinaangolowaaka.” 
Genesis24:5 Murumeiyi ole aamukoha: “Ankha muthiyana owo aahitthuna okitthara elapweene yeela? Kimuroiheke mwaninyu elapo yeeyo mukhumelenlaanyu?” 
Genesis24:6 Abrahaamu aamwaakhula: “Nnene! Ohimuhiye mwanaka ahokoleelaka weiwo. 
Genesis24:7 Yave Muluku a wiirimu, aakivenxale vaate wa atithaka ni elapwaaka kiyariwaaka ni aakiroromelinghe ni nlipelo weera aarwa ovaha elapo ela ekhapiraaka, anaamurumihe ndyelowaawe ohoolowawo, weera weiwo wamuruuhele muthiyana mwanaka." 
Genesis24:8 Vano muthiyana owo aahitthuna orwa wenno, weyo khoonono mulattu ni nlipelo, mene ohimuhokoloxere mwanaka wuuwu.”" 
Genesis24:9 Murumeiyi aahiikaathi ntatanawe vatakhwini wa Abrahaamu, apwiyaawe, analipela weera anaakwanihere masu ale." 
Genesis24:10 Vanonto, murumeiyi ole aavenya ni ahaaci muloko a apwiyaawe, akuxakatho itthu sikina sooreeraxa sa apwiyaawe. Aavenya arowaka oMesopotamiya, mpatta wa esidade Nahori aamankaawe." 
Genesis24:11 Vano, wiilaka, aahaakokhoriha aahaaci muxerexere wa ehime ya ottuttuwani yaari okhwipi wa esidade ele. Yaari ehuhu emoharu yeeyo asithiyana a esidade ele yaakhovolenlaaya orika maahi ohimeni." 
Genesis24:12 Vano aavekela: “Yave, Muluku a apwiyaaka Abrahaamu, mukivahe nihuku nna etthu yooreeraxa, ni mukhale ni murima wooreera mwaakhalelaka apwiyaaka Abrahaamu." 
Genesis24:13 Ntoko munoonaanyu, kiri va mukhwipi wa ehime ela ni asimwali a muloko wa esidade ela anrwa orika maahi." 
Genesis24:14 Muntthunihere weera kamweerela mwaamwali: ‘Okivahe maahi’ ni owo aneera: ‘Ngwure ni kinimwaavaha akamelowaanyu maahi,’ vano, akhale yoowo munthanlenlaanyu murumeiyaanyu Isaki. Hiiho, nkisuwele weera mohaareerela murima apwiyaaka.”" 
Genesis24:15 Owo ahinaaye omaliha ovekela, aakhumelela Rebeka iireiyeene mwaapu. Owo aari mwaana muthiyana a Betuweli, mwaana mulopwana a Milka, mwaara a Nahori, munneiye Abrahaamu." 
Genesis24:16 Mwaamwali ole aari ooreeraxa ni oowiikosoopa, hata mulopwana mmoha kaatonke okonano. Rebeka aakhuruwela vahimeni, anarika maahi, anarowa." 
Genesis24:17 Vano murumeiyi ole aarowa woowaakuveya omukumanano, anamweerela: “Dyoontte mukivahe maahi vakhaani a mmwaapunimwanyu.”" 
Genesis24:18 Owo aaheera: “Ngwureke apwiyaaka,” ni woowaakuveya aarula mwaapu anamurumeela." 
Genesis24:19 Vano amvahakaru owura maahi, aamweerela: “Nkaavahetho maahi akamelowaanyu weera ewureke mpaka waakwana.”" 
Genesis24:20 Woowaakuveya aahiittha maahi iitthelaka nipuro na owura, anatthimakela ohimeni weera ariketho maahi ookwana owuriha ikamelu* sootheene." 
Genesis24:21 Vanonto, murumeiyi a Abrahaamu aangwehexexa ole amaanleene, weera oone Yave aariki akwanihere otthuna wa apwiyaawe." 
Genesis24:22 Ikamelu* iye simalihakaru owura maahi, mulopwana ole aamvaha mwaamwali ecipini ya ebeka* emoha olemelawaya, anangwariha mmoononimwawe ipangiiri piili sa eyuuma yoorikaxa, ixekeli* muloko olemelawaya." 
Genesis24:23 Vanonto aamukoha: “Weyo mwaana awani? Dyoontte okileele naariweene nipuro vaate wa atithawo weera miyo ni asikhwaaka nakonewo.” 
Genesis24:24 Ole aamwaakhula: “Miyo ti mwaana a Betuweli, mwaana a Milka ni a Nahori." 
Genesis24:25 Vano owannyihu nookhala nipuro nookwana wa nyuwo okhalawo, nitho nookhalano malaxi ni yooca yincipale yookwana oca axinama.”" 
Genesis24:26 Mulopwana ole aahuurama amulapaka Yave, eeraka:" 
Genesis24:27 “Ooreelihiwa ti Yave, Muluku a apwiyaaka Abrahaamu, ohihiyerenre owoonihera apwiyaaka oreerawawe murima ni ororomeleyawawe. Wa mpattaaka, Yave aakeettiha akihoolaka mphironi mpaka vaate wa asinaangolowaaya apwiyaaka.”" 
Genesis24:28 Vano, mwaamwali ole aatthimakela owannyawe, anaathalihera soothesene amusaaya amayawe." 
Genesis24:29 Rebeka aakhalano acimweenaawe yiitthaniwa Labani. Awo yaavenya woowaakuveya erowaka ohimeni weera yamusuwele mulopwana ole. 
Genesis24:30 Yoonakaru ecipini ni ipangiiri mmoononi mwa murokoraya, ni emwiiwakaru Rebeka athalihaka sootheene mulopwana ole aamuleenlaawe, aavenya, anamphwanya mulopwana ole eemenleene vahimeni mukerekhere wa akamelowaawe." 
Genesis24:31 Vano yaamweerela: “Ngweeke ooreelihiwa a Yave. Mukhalenle heeni okerekhere iwo? Kooreherera empa ni nipuro na ikamelu*.” 
Genesis24:32 Vanonto murumeiyi aarowa owaani ni Labani aalamulela okuruxiwa mirindi vakameluni. Aavaha malaxi ni yooca ikamelu* iye ni maahi wa mulopwana ole vamoha ni yaawo yaari ni yoowo weera erapihe inaawo. 
Genesis24:33 Vahoolowaya yaangwiihera yooca, mene murumeiyi aaheera: “Nkirwa kica kihinaaye wooleelani etthu kirinaaka.” Labani aamweerela: “Hayaka, muulumeke.”" 
Genesis24:34 Vano owo aaheera: “Miyo ti murumeiyi a Abrahaamu. 
Genesis24:35 Yave aamureeliha vancipale ni owo aakhalano mihakhu sincipale. Oomvaha ikhondoolo, imombe, iyuuma soorikaxa, arumeiyi alopwana ni athiyana, ikamelu* ni abuuru." 
Genesis24:36 Sara, mwaara a apwiyaaka, ngwuuluvalanimwawe aahaayarela mwaana ori namahiyeriwa a soothesene Abrahaamu orinaawe." 
Genesis24:37 Vano apwiyaaka yaakilipeliha, yeeraka: ‘Weyo khoorwa omwaasera muthiyana mwanaka variyari wa asithiyana a oKanaani a elapweene yeela kimankaaka." 
Genesis24:38 Orowe wa emusi ya atithaka, wa nihimonaka noohaasaasiwa weera wamwaasere mwanaka muthiyana.’" 
Genesis24:39 Vanonto kaahaakoha apwiyaaka: ‘Ankha muthiyana owo aahitthuna okitthara’ 
Genesis24:40 Awo yaakaakhula: ‘Yave Yoowo kinimurumeelaaka anoorumihele ndyelowaawe, nitho anoowerihe weera weyo weette nnenesene ni mukwaahaawo, weeratho omuruuhele mwanaka, muthiyana a nihimonaka, aani a emusi ya atithaka." 
Genesis24:41 Vano, waaphiyaka wa asinaangolowaaka ni awo yakhootta omvaha mwanaka muthiyana, weyo onuukhale ootaphuweene ni nlipelo nna. Aani, vamwaheene yoola, weyo khootthukiwa ni nlipelo nna.’" 
Genesis24:42 Olelo kiphiyakaru ohimeni koovekela: ‘Yave, Muluku a apwiyaaka Abrahaamu, waari weera mukwaahaaka ti otthunawanyu, mwiiwe nivekelonaka nna:" 
Genesis24:43 Va miyo kiri yeemelelo ohoolo wa ehime ela. Vano, arwa mwaamwali orika maahi ni miyo kamweerela: ‘Dyoontte okivahe maahi weera kiwure a mmwaapunimwawo,’" 
Genesis24:44 ni owo akaakhula: ‘Ngwureke, nitho kinimwaavaha maahi akamelowaanyu,’ vano, akhale yoowo Yave omuthanlalaawe weera akhale mwaara a mwanaya apwiyaaka.’" 
Genesis24:45 Vanonto kihinaaye omaliha ovekela mmurimanimwaka, aakhumelela Rebeka iireiyeene mwaapu. Aarowa vahimeni anarika maahi, ni miyo kinamweerela: ‘Dyoontte okivahe kiwure.’" 
Genesis24:46 Woowaakuveya aarula mwaapwaawe, aneera: ‘Ngwureke. Ni kinimwaavahatho maahi akamelowaanyu.’ Miyo koowura, ni owo aahaavahatho owura maahi akamelowaaka." 
Genesis24:47 Vahoolowaya kaamukoha: ‘Weyo, mwaana awani?’ Owo aakaakhula: ‘a Betuweli, mwaana a Nahori ni Milka.’ Vano kaangwariha ecipini ni ipangiiri mmoononimwawe." 
Genesis24:48 Kaahuurama kimulapaka Yave. Kaamutthapela Yave, Muluku a apwiyaaka Abrahaamu, aakihoonle mphironi ya ekhaikhai weera kamwaasere mwanaya musulwaaya munnaya apwiyaaka." 
Genesis24:49 Vano mwatthuna owoonihera ororomeleya ni oreera murima apwiyaaka, mukileele, ni mwaahitthuna mukileeletho, weera miyo kilakele etthu yoopaka.”" 
Genesis24:50 Labani ni Betuweli yaamwaakhula: “Eyo engweela wa Yave. Kheewo nneeraahu nooleele yooweera aani naari hoye. 
Genesis24:51 Rebeka ti yoola. Omukuxeke ni ola akhale mwaara a mwaana a apwiyaawo ntoko Yave eenraawe.” 
Genesis24:52 Vano murumeiyi a Abrahaamu iiwakaru yeeyo yaahimalaaya, aahuuramela vathi ohoolo wa Yave." 
Genesis24:53 Murumeiyi ole aamvaha Rebeka itthu sa iyuuma soorikaxa ni soowara. Anaavahatho itthu soorikaxa acimweenaawe ni amayawe. 
Genesis24:54 Vahoolowaya owo ni asilopwana ale yaamuhoonle yaahooca, enawura ni iwe yaaviriha ohiyu wootheene. Oxaawaya murumeiyi a Abrahaamu aaheera: “Mukihiye kihokoleele wa apwiyaaka.”" 
Genesis24:55 Acimweenaawe ni amayawe Rebekatho yaamwaakhula: “Omuhiye mwaamwali akhaletho ni hiyo wookwana mahuku muloko. Vahoolowaya apwaheke.” 
Genesis24:56 Mene aawaakhula: “Muhicerewihe ohokolowawaka, niwoko Yave oheettiha mukwahaaka nnenesene. Mukihiye kirowe weera kihokoleele wa apwiyaaka”" 
Genesis24:57 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Nrowe nimwiitthane mwaamwali weera noone aneeraawe ahime.” 
Genesis24:58 Vano yaamwiitthana Rebeka, enamukoha: “Weyo wootthuna orowa ni mulopwana ola?” Owo aawaakhula: “Aani, kinoorowa.”" 
Genesis24:59 Amusi yaaraxelana ni acimweenaawe Rebeka, murumeiyaawe, murumeiyi a Abrahaamu ni asilopwana yaamuhoonle." 
Genesis24:60 Yaamureeliha Rebeka emweerelaka: ”Wunnuwe murokorihu mpaka okhale maayi a atthu ancipalexa! Ekhapiraawo ewine isidade sa amwiittanaawo.” 
Genesis24:61 Vahoolowaya Rebeka ni arumeiyaawe yaahiireherera, enawela ikamelu*, enamutthara murumeiyi a Abrahaamu. Ni hiiho aamukuxa Rebeka, anapwahano." 
Genesis24:62 Vano, Isaki eera awaaka oBeher-Lahi-Royi, niwoko aamanke oNegeba." 
Genesis24:63 Oxekuwa omoha, aavenya akelaka omatta weera atthokelele. Attukhulaka maitho, aahoona ikamelu* saattamelaka." 
Genesis24:64 Rebekatho aattukhula maitho ni aamoona Isaki. Owo aakhuruwa wakameluni," 
Genesis24:65 anamukoha murumeiyi a Abrahaamu: “Mulopwana taani yoole ongweela omatta aniciceeraka?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Ti apwiyaaka.” Vano Rebeka aakhuneela ekhovaawe ni ekuwo. 
Genesis24:66 Vahoolowaya, murumeiyi aamuthalihera Isaki sootheene seereiye." 
Genesis24:67 Isaki aamuroiha Rebeka muheemani mwa amayawe Sara. Aamuthela ni aamusivela. Ni hiiho Isaki aapepeseya okhwa wa amayawe. 
Genesis25:1 Vano Abrahaamu aamuthela muthiyana mukina iitthaniwa Ketura. 
Genesis25:2 Owo aamuyarela anamwane ala: Zimerani, Yokixani, Medani, Yixbaki ni Xuwa." 
Genesis25:3 Yokixani aamuyanre Xeba ni Dedani. Vano ekhapira ya Dedani yaari awAxuri, Aletuxi ni aLewumi." 
Genesis25:4 Anamwane a Midiyani yaari Efa, Eferi, Hanoki, Abida ni Eldaha. Ootheene ala yaari a ekhapira ya Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Abrahaamu aamuhiyera Isaki sootheene aarinaawe. 
Genesis25:6 Vano wa anamwane akina a ikuxosawe sa okaporo yaakhala ni Abrahaamu, aahaavaha itthu sikina aarinaawe ni areene nlelo ni okumi, aahaarumihela mpatta wa ninkhuma nsuwa weera ehikhale vamoha ni mwanawe Isaki." 
Genesis25:7 Abrahaamu aakhala ni okumi iyaakha ncira ni miloko mithannamiili niithanu. 
Genesis25:8 Aakhwiiye uuluvanleene, ni misingu sitokweene, anavithiwa athukumanyihiwaka vamoha ni makholowaawe." 
Genesis25:9 Vano anamwanaawe Isaki ni Iximayeli yaamvitha munikhukuni na oMakipela waattamela oMamre, mmatta mwa Efroni, mwaana a Zowari, muHiti." 
Genesis25:10 Yaari ematta Abrahaamu aathummaawe ni aHiti. Ti weiwo Abrahaamu ovithiwaawe vamoha ni mwaariye Sara. 
Genesis25:11 Vahoolo wa okhwa wa Abrahaamu, Muluku aamureeliha mwanawe Isaki. Vano, Isaki aamanke vakhiviru wa oBeher-Lahi-Royi." 
Genesis25:12 Okawanyeya wa ekhapira ya Iximayeli, mwaana a Abrahaamu aayareliwaawe ni epottha Hagari ngwExipitu Sara aamvanghaawe ti wu:" 
Genesis25:13 Masina a anamwane a Iximayeli alempwale ettharihiwaka oyariwawaya ti ala: Nebayoti, ntthaara na Iximayeli, Kedari Adibeeli, Mibsami," 
Genesis25:14 Mixma, Duma, Masa," 
Genesis25:15 Hadadi, Tema, Yeturi, Nafixi ni Kedema." 
Genesis25:16 Yaari ti yaala anamwane muloko neeli a Iximayeli, yaathatungwe asitokweene a ipuumbasaya. Mittetthesaya ni mapuro yaamankaaya yaahaakhela masinaaya." 
Genesis25:17 Iximayeli aakhala ni okumi iyaakha ncira ni miloko miraru niithannapiili. Aahookhwa, anavithiwa athukumanyihiwaka vamoha ni makholowaawe." 
Genesis25:18 Vano anamwanaawe yaamwaramwareya variyari wa elapo wookela oHavila ni oXuri, vakhiviru ni mwiinano ni wExipitu, ohoolo wa mutthu arowaka wAxuri. Vano yaakhala oohiiwanana ni axunnaya ootheene." 
Genesis25:19 Ola ti mwaha wa emusi ya Isaki, mwaana a Abrahaamu. Abrahaamu aamuyanre Isaki." 
Genesis25:20 Vano Isaki aarino iyaakha miloko mixexe aathelanaawe ni Rebeka, mwaana muthiyana a Betuweli, ngwArami a oPadan-Arami, ni murokoriye Labani, ngwAramitho." 
Genesis25:21 Vano Isaki aamvekela Yave mwaha wa mwaariye, niwoko owo aari mwali eekupa. Yave aamwaakhula nivekelonawe ni Rebeka, mwaariye, aarupala." 
Genesis25:22 Asinamwane yaamukakhana mmirimanimwawe, tivawo eenraawe: “Heeni enkikhumelelaaya yeela?” Vano aarowa omukoha Yave." 
Genesis25:23 Yave aamweerela: “Miloko miili sa atthu siri mmirimanimwanyu. Miloko miili sa atthu sinookhuma murukulunimwanyu. Mmoha wa seiyo onuukhale woolipaxa, mene mutokweene anamurumeele mukhaani.”" 
Genesis25:24 Vano ephiyaka ehuhu ya oyara waasuwanyeya weera mmirimanimwawe yaakhala maphapo. 
Genesis25:25 Mwaana aapacenre oyariwa aari ooxeera vancipale ni erutthu yootheene yoosareya mapururu, tivawo yamutthenghaaya Esawu." 
Genesis25:26 Vahoolowaya aayariwa munneiye ntatanawe nivanreene etthottopwa ya Esawu, mwa yoowo yaamutthenghaaya Yakobe. Vano ehuhu Rebeka aayaraawe, Isaki aarino iyaakha miloko mithannamosa." 
Genesis25:27 Asinamwane ale yaahunnuwa. Esawu aathatuwa namalupattha ooweraxa ni wannamusivela mutuphini. Vaheera Yakobe aari mutthu oomaala ni wannamusivela okilaathi paahi muheemani. 
Genesis25:28 Isaki aamukupaleelaxa Esawu, niwoko owo aatthunaxa enama, vaheera Rebeka aamukupaleelaxa Yakobe." 
Genesis25:29 Vanonto emaara emoha, Yakobe eera aapeyaka nrupantakanse, Esawu aahokolowaawe mutuphini avoliweene etala." 
Genesis25:30 Owo aamvekela: “Okimeele vakhaani nrupantakanse nooxeera nno vawo. Koovoliwa etala.” Tivawo iitthaniwaawetho Edomi. 
Genesis25:31 Vano Yakobe aamwaakhula: “Okithumihereke toko soophwanela sa ontthaara.” 
Genesis25:32 Esawu aaheera: “Kihanle vakhaani okhwa, yoopwattheya ti eheeni okhala ntthaara?”" 
Genesis25:33 Wa soothesene, Yakobe aamunyeserera: “Olipele toko.” Hiiho ole aalipela amuthumiheraka munneiye soophwanela sa ontthaara." 
Genesis25:34 Vano Yakobe aamurumeela Esawu, amvahaka yooca ni nrupantakanse na irooro. Owo aahooca, anawura, aneemela, anarowa. Hiiho Esawu aaderera soophwanela sa ontthaara." 
Genesis26:1 Vano yaakhala etala mweelaponi ele ntoko yaakhumelenlaaya mweehuhuni ya Abrahaamu. Tivawo Isaki aarongwaawe oGerari weiwo Abimeleki aaraawe mwene a aFilisti. 
Genesis26:2 Yave aahiixoonihera wa Isaki anamweerela: “Muhirowe wExipitu, mene murowe elapo yeeyo Miyo kineeraaka koothoonyereni." 
Genesis26:3 Mpwaherereke okhala elapweene yeela mahuku vakhaani. Miyo nkikhale ni nyuwo, nitho nkooreeliheni. Nkoovaheeni, nyuwo vamoha ni ekhapiraanyu yootheene elapo yootheene ela ni nkikwanihere nlipelo kaapakenlaaka atithinyu, Abrahaamu." 
Genesis26:4 Vano nkaandyeerere ekhapiraanyu ntoko ithenyeeri sa wiirimu, nitho nkivahe ilapo sootheene iya. Mwaha wa ekhapiraanyu miloko sootheene sa elapo ya vathi nsireelihiwe," 
Genesis26:5 niwoko Abrahaamu aahiiwelela, anakwanihera kaamurumalaaka sootheene, malamulo ootheene, ikano sootheene ni soolamulasaka sootheene." 
Genesis26:6 Vanonto Isaki aamaka oGerari. 
Genesis26:7 Atthu a elapo ele yaamukohakohaaya mwaha wa mwaariye, owo eera weera aari murokoriye, oovaka weera, eera mwaariye, yaammwiiva weera emuthele Rebeka eenre areeraxaka." 
Genesis26:8 Isaki areene ehuhu yincipale oGerari, nihuku nimoha Abimeleki, mwene a aFilisti areene vaxanelani, aamoona Isaki apakaka orottolo ni mwaariye Rebeka." 
Genesis26:9 Vanonto Abimeleki aamwiitthana Isaki, anamweerela: “Vekhaikhai ola mwaariyo, heeni okeerenlaawo weera ola murokoraka?” Isaki aamweerela: “Kuupuwela weera nkiiviwe niwoko na yoowo.”" 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleki aaheera: “Eheeni yeela onipankaawo? Mukina a muloko ola aangwera okonano mwaariyo, ni weyotho waankhala ni nthowa wa yoonanareene yeeyo.”" 
Genesis26:11 Vano Abimeleki aalamulela mulokwaawe wootheene: “Akhalaru mutthu aaneera amutave mulopwana ola naari mwaariye, vekhaikhai anaakhwe.”" 
Genesis26:12 Isaki, mweelapweene yeele, aahaala mmatta ni aahepha eyaakheene yeele miringosene ncira sa seiyo aanlaawe, niwoko Yave aamureeliha." 
Genesis26:13 Vanonto, owo aathadyireya ni weera waandyeerereyaka, mpakatho anakhala thadyirixa." 
Genesis26:14 Aakhalano mihuwo sincipale ni arumeiyi ancipale, moota wooweera aFilisti yannamukhalela nrima." 
Genesis26:15 Awosa yaahuuheela ihime esarihaka etthaya. Saari ihimesene seiye saathimpwe ni arumeiyi a Abrahaamu, atithawe Isaki, mweehuhuni ya Abrahaamu." 
Genesis26:16 Vanonto Abimeleki aamweerela Isaki: “Othaame elapwaahu, niwoko weyo woothatuwa oolipaxa oniphwaha hiyo.”" 
Genesis26:17 Tivawo Isaki aathaammaawewo, anamaka vareyareyani na oGerari ni iwe aahiitekiha." 
Genesis26:18 Isaki aahuuhulatho ihime saathimpwe mweehuhuni ya atithawe Abrahaamu, mwa seiyo aFilisti yuuheelenlaaya vahoolo wa okhwa wa Abrahaamu. Aahokoloxera masina wa khula ehime nsinanaya naarinaaya mweehuhuni ya Abrahaamu." 
Genesis26:19 Vano arumeiyi a Isaki ethipaka ehime vareyareyani, yaamuttemula naattuuttu a maahi." 
Genesis26:20 Akukhuli a oGerari yaapacera onyakulihana ni akukhuli a Isaki, yeeraka: “Maahi ala ti awihu.” Tivawo Isaki aattenghaawe ehime ele Eseki, niwoko waakhumelela onyakulihana mwaha wa ehimeene yeele." 
Genesis26:21 Yaathipatho ehime ekina, onakhumelelatho onyakulihana mwaha wa yeeyo, tivawo aattenghaawe Sitina." 
Genesis26:22 Isaki aathaama iwe, anathipa ehime ekina ni khayaanyakulihanne mwaha wa yeeyo, tivawo aattenghaawe Rehoboti, eeraka: “Vano Yave oonunnuwihera nipuro weera naandyeereraneke mulaponi.”" 
Genesis26:23 Vahoolowaya Isaki aarowa oBerxeba. 
Genesis26:24 Ohiyuweene yoole Yave aahiixoonihera wa yoole, anamweerela: “Miyo ti Muluku a atithinyu Abrahaamu. Muhoove, niwoko Miyo kiri ni nyuwo. Nkooreeliheni, ni nkaandyeerere ekhapiraanyu niwoko na omusivela murumeiyaaka Abrahaamu.”" 
Genesis26:25 Vano aahaatekawo altaari*, aniitthana Nsina na Yave, anakunga eheemaawe ni arumeiyi a Isaki yaathipawo ehime." 
Genesis26:26 Nihuku nimoha, Abimeleki aavenya oGerari, vamoha ni namalakaawe Ahuza, nitho ni Fikoli, mutokweene a anakhottwaawe, weera uulume ni Isaki." 
Genesis26:27 Isaki aamukoha: “Nyuwo muhikitthunaka, mpaka mookoomola elapwaanyu, vano heeni mungwaanyu wuuluma ni miyo?”" 
Genesis26:28 Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Hiyo nohoona weera Yave ori ni nyuwo ni nohuupuwela weera fataari wiiraana ni nyuwo. Nintthuna weera okhale wiiraana variyariwahu. 
Genesis26:29 Onuukhale ha: Weera muhinipakele etthu yoonanara, ntoko hiyo nihoopakenlaahuni, mene noopakelani yooreera paahi, ni naahoohiyani murowaka mmuretteleni. Noosuwela weera Yave ohooreelihani.”" 
Genesis26:30 Isaki aahaarehererela efesta, enaca, enawura." 
Genesis26:31 Vanonto oyaaka ni oxa yaalipela mukina ni mukhwaawe. Vahoolowaya yaalaxerana, enapwaha mmuretteleni." 
Genesis26:32 Nihuku nenenenne yaahoorwa arumeiyi a Isaki, ni yaamuthalihera mwaha wa ehime yaathimpaaya emweerelaka: “Noottemula maahi!”" 
Genesis26:33 Isaki aatteha ehime ele Xiba. Tivawo mpaka olelo esidade ele eneeriwaaya Berxeba. 
Genesis26:34 Esawu areeneno iyaakha miloko mixexe, aamuthela Yudite, mwaana muthiyana a muHiti Beeri, ni Basemati mwaana muthiyana a muHiti Eloni." 
Genesis26:35 Asithiyana ale yaamutannyera itthu soopwexiha muru Isaki ni Rebeka. 
Genesis27:1 Isaki uuluvanleene ni akhaliweene evaasi, aamwiitthana Esawu, ntthaaranawe, anamweerela: “Mwanaka.” Owo aamwaakhula: “Miyo kiri va.”" 
Genesis27:2 Owo aamweerela: “Miyo kohuuluvala ni nkisuwenle nihuku heeni miyo kineeraaka kikhwe. 
Genesis27:3 Vanonto okuxe ikapwitthisawo, nyuupa ni nyuura ni orowe otuphini weera wakiivele enama." 
Genesis27:4 Vano, ohoolowaya okaapeele yooca yeele yookisivaxa, ni okiruuhele weera miyo kiceeke ni weera kooreelihe kihinaaye okhwa.”" 
Genesis27:5 Rebeka eera iiwaka Isaki uulumaawe ni mwanawe Esawu. Vano owo aarowa otuphini weera iive enama yoowaaruuhela atithawe. 
Genesis27:6 Vano Rebeka aamuleela mwanawe Yakobe eeraka: “Miyo koowiiwa atithawo yuulumaka ni amunnawaanyu Esawu, yeeraka:" 
Genesis27:7 ‘Okiruuhele enama ni okipakele yooca yeele yookisivaxa weera miyo kiceeke ni kooreelihe vamaithoni wa Yave, kihinaaye okhwa.’" 
Genesis27:8 Vanonto mwanaka, wiiwe nnenesene ni opake yeeyo kinoolamuleelaaka." 
Genesis27:9 Orowe vano omuhuwoni ni wakiruuhele weiwo ipuri piili sooreeraxa weera kiwaapeele atithawo yooca yoowaasivaxa. 
Genesis27:10 Okuxeke waavaheke atithawo weera yaceeke nitho yooreeliheke ehinaaye okhwa.” 
Genesis27:11 Yakobetho aaweerela amayawe: “Moone, amunnaka Esawu ti mulopwana a mapururu, mene miyo nkinono." 
Genesis27:12 Ankha yakaapapela atithaka? Vamaithoniwaya nkikhale namalokottha, ni hiiho nkiiruuhele mwaneenaaka nlapho ehikhanle mareeliho.”" 
Genesis27:13 Amayawe yaamweerela: “Mwanaka, olamphwawawo okhale ni miyo. Wiiwelele paahi nsunaka: Orowe wakiruuhele.”" 
Genesis27:14 Vano aarowa, anakuxa anaaruuhela amayawe. Rebeka aahaapeya yooca yoosivaxa, ntoko atihawe yaasivaxaaya." 
Genesis27:15 Vahoolowaya, Rebeka aakuxa soowara sooreeraxa saathokororiwe mpaani mwa Esawu, ntthaaranawe, anangwariha Yakobe, mwanawe mukhaani." 
Genesis27:16 Aangwariha ixapala sa ipuri nyoonosawe ni exiko yahaarino mapururu. 
Genesis27:17 Aamwinnyerera mwanawe Yakobe yooca yoosivaxa ni epaawu aapankaawe. 
Genesis27:18 Aarowa wa atithawe, aneera: Tiithi.” Ni awo yaamwaakhula: “Miyo mwanaka, weyo taani?”" 
Genesis27:19 Vano Yakobe aaweerela atithawe: “Miyo ti Esawu, ntthaarananyu, koopaka ntoko mwaakileenlaanyu. Mvenyeke ni mukilaathiki. Mukhuureke enama kiivalaaka, weera mukireelihe.”" 
Genesis27:20 Isaki aamukoha mwanawe: “Ophwannye hai enama woowaakuveya mwanaka?” Owo aawaakhula: “Yave Mulukwaanyu aakirumihela okumanano.” 
Genesis27:21 Vano Isaki aamweerela Yakobe: “Okaattamele mwanaka weera miyo kiwaapapele ni kisuwele waareene yooweene mwanaka Esawu.” 
Genesis27:22 Yakobe aawaattamela atithawe Isaki, enamwaapapela, enamweerela: “Nsu ti na Yakobe, vaheera nyoono ti sa Esawu.”" 
Genesis27:23 Khayaamoonelenle niwoko nyoonosawe saari sa mapururu ntoko sa Esawu munneiye, enamureeliha." 
Genesis27:24 Isaki aamukohatho: “Weyo ti yooweene mwanaka Esawu?” Owo aawaakhula: “Ti yoomeene.” 
Genesis27:25 Isaki aamweerela: “Mwanaka, okiruuhele wiivalaawo weera kikhuure ni kooreelihe.” Owo aahaaronghela, enakhuura, anaaruuhelatho eviinyu, enawura." 
Genesis27:26 Vanonto Isaki aamweerela: “Nkawa mwanaka okibeeceke.” 
Genesis27:27 Aamwaattamela, anambeeca. Vano oonaka wunkhela wa soowara aamureeliha eeraka: “Ii! Wunkhela wa mwanaka ori ntoko wunkhela wa ntuphi Yave oreelihalaawe." 
Genesis27:28 Muluku oovahe nikame na wiirimu ni ohepha wooreera wa vatthayani, aani, waatta wa etrigu ni eviinyu." 
Genesis27:29 Soorumeele miloko, ni amalapo yookokhorele. Okhale pwiiya a axunneiyo ni anamwane a amayawo yookokhorele. Oolaphiwa ekhale yaawo eneera yoolaphe, ni ooreelihiwa yaawo eneera yooreelihe.”" 
Genesis27:30 Isaki aamaliha omureeliha Yakobe. Vano Yakobe aavenyaawewo, aaphiya Esawu, munneiye, ahokolowaka wuulupatthani." 
Genesis27:31 Owotho aahaarehererela yooca yoosivaxa, anaaroihela atithawe, anaweerela: “Mvenye tiithi ni mukhuureke enama kiivalaaka weera mukireelihe.”" 
Genesis27:32 Isaki aamukoha: “Weyo taani?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Ti yoomi – Esawu, ntthaarananyu.”" 
Genesis27:33 Isaki aatuthuwa vancipale, aneera: “Vano taani yoole aakunxe enama, anakiruuhela? Miyo kookhuura weyo ohinaaye orwa ni koomureeliha. Vano, vekhaikhai owo ti ooreelihiwa.”" 
Genesis27:34 Esawu iiwaka masu a atithawe, aakhuwelaxa ni aananariwa vancipale, anaadyoonttelela atithawe: “Mukireelihe miyotho tiithi.”" 
Genesis27:35 Owo aamwaakhula: “Aahoorwa munneiyo ni onyeenga anaakhela mareeliho yeera ekhaleke awawo.” 
Genesis27:36 Owo aaheera: “Vekhaikai nsinanawe ti Yakobe ni ettiitthu! Aakilokottha imaara piili. Soophwanelasaka sa ontthaara ookaakha, vanonto ookuxa mareelihowaaka.” Ni aahaakoha atithawe: “Tiithi, khamukisungenre nreeliho hata nimoha?”" 
Genesis27:37 Isaki aamwaakhula Esawu: “Koomvaha ikuru soowoolamula weyo nitho asinaangolwaawo moota wooweera nyuwosa munoothatuwa arumeiyaawe, ni koomuroromeliha etrigu ni eviinyu. Nkoopakele eheeni mwanaka?”" 
Genesis27:38 Esawu aahaavekela: “Tiithi weeraka murino nreeliho nimoha paahi? Mukireelihe miyotho tiithi!” Ni ahimaka yeeyo Esawu aahiinla akhuwelaka vancipale. 
Genesis27:39 Isaki aamwaakhula: “Weyo onuukhale ottai wa etthaya ya ethaadyira, ottai wa nikame nimmora wiirimu." 
Genesis27:40 Weyo onuukhalele okumi ekatanaawo ni onuumurumeeleke munneiyo. Weyo waahivilelaxa onuupase onyooro wa okaporo.” 
Genesis27:41 Esawu aamunyoonyeriwa munneiye Yakobe mwaha wa mareelihoweene yaale atithawe yaamureelinghaaya. Vano Esawu aahiixeerela: “Annikhuveela mahuku a olalamikela okhwa wa atiithi ni vahoolowaya nkimwiive munnaka Yakobe.” 
Genesis27:42 Emuthaliherakaru Rebeka yeeyo aahimalaawe Esawu, owo aarumiha wiitthaniwa Yakobe mwanawe mukhaani, anamweerela: “Esawu oniipepesa ni soowuupuwela atthunaka oowiiva." 
Genesis27:43 Vanonto mwanaka wiiwe nsunaka, otthawele woowaakuveya wa acimweenaaka Labani oHarani." 
Genesis27:44 Wakhale wuuwu mahuku makina mpaka oneeraaya omale onyoonyiwa wa munneiyo. 
Genesis27:45 Owo ahiya woonyoonyeriwa weyo ni attiwala yeeyo oopakenlaawo, miyo kinimoolamulela ohokoleela nno. Niwoko na heeni kineeraaka kaayeleele anamwane ooweeli nihuku nimoha?”" 
Genesis27:46 Rebeka aarowa omuleela Isaki: “Kookhulumuwa ni khaankisivela asithiyana ala aHiti. Yakobe amuthela muthiyana a elapweene yeela, miyo kinookupaleela weera fataari kikhwe.”" 
Genesis28:1 Isaki aarumiha wiitthaniwa Yakobe, anamureeliha, anamuleela: “Ohimuthele muKanaani." 
Genesis28:2 Oroweke oPadan Aram, owannyawe Betuweli, apwiyaawo, ni wamuthanlewo mwaarawo variyari wa anamwane asithiyana a atatawo Labani." 
Genesis28:3 Muluku a ikuru sootheene ooreelihe ni oovahe ekhapira yoowaatta, moota wooweera mwa weyo siphattuwe miloko sincipale." 
Genesis28:4 Ekhale ni weyo ni ekhapiraawo mareeliho aareelihiwaaweno Abrahaamu, weera weyo olamule elapo yeela onkhalaawo ntoko namarwa, aani elapweene yeela Muluku aamvanghaawe Abrahaamu.”" 
Genesis28:5 Isaki aamulaxera Yakobe anarowa oPadan Aram, vaate wa Labani aari mwaana a Betuweli ngwArami, acimweenaawe Rebeka, amayawe Yakobe ni Esawu." 
Genesis28:6 Esawu aahiiwa weera Isaki aamureeliha Yakobe ni aamurumiha orowa oPadan Aram weera amuthele muthiyana a wuuwu, nitho weera amureelihaka, aamulamulela eeraka: “Ohimuthele muKanaani.”" 
Genesis28:7 Aasuwelatho weera Yakobe aawiiwelela atithawe ni amayawe, anarowa oPadan Aram." 
Genesis28:8 Vano Esawu aasuwela weera Isaki khaatthuna anamwane asithiyana a oKanaani. 
Genesis28:9 Esawu aarowa wa Iximayeli ni, waahiya toko axaariye akina, aamuthelatho Mahalati, munneiye Nebayothi ni mwaana a Iximayeli, mwaana a Abrahaamu." 
Genesis28:10 Yakobe aavenya oBerxeba arowaka oHarani. 
Genesis28:11 Aaphiya vanipuroni nimoha ni wiilaka, aaheemela weera akone. Aakuxa nluku nimoha na nipuro nenenenne, anaphiteera waamuruwawe, anakona." 
Genesis28:12 Vano moolohani aahoona makweelelo yeemexiweene vathi, ni osulu wa makweelelo waatava erimu. Vanonto andyelo a Muluku yeera ekhuruwaka, akina ewelaka vamakweeleloweene yaale." 
Genesis28:13 Yave aari mukhwipimwaya, aneera: “Miyo ti Yave, Muluku a Abrahaamu apwiyaanyu ni Muluku a atithinyu Isaki. Elapweene yeela mukonnaanyu kinikoovaheeni, vamoha ni ekhapiraanyu yootheene." 
Genesis28:14 Ekhapiraanyu eniikhale ntoko ntthupi na etthaya ni eniimake okhuma ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkela nsuwa, nitho oottuttuwani mpaka ohitto wa elapo, ni mwa miloko sootheene sa mulaponi nsireelihiwe niwoko na nyuwo ni ekhapiraanyu." 
Genesis28:15 Vano Miyo kiri ni nyuwo, ni nkookosoopeni mpaka weiwo muneeraanyu murowe, ni nkoohokoloxereni elapweene yeela, niwoko nkirwa koohiyaani mpaka eneeraaya epakeye yeeyo koororomelinghaakani.”" 
Genesis28:16 Yakobe avenyakaru, aaheera: “Woohihovela, Yave ori nipuro nenenenna ni miyo nkaasuwenle.”" 
Genesis28:17 Vano oovaka aapwaherera: “Nipuro heeni noowoopiha ntoko nna! Nna khanihiyono nipuro nikina ehikhanle Empa ya Muluku. Ola ti mulako wa wiirimu.” 
Genesis28:18 Waaxiiye oxeexelo Yakobe aakuxa nluku aaphiteenraawe waamuru, aaheemexa ntoko nrimbu, anamiinela makhura vasuluwaya." 
Genesis28:19 Aatteha nipuro nenenenne Beteli yaari mweeraru esidade ele khalayeene yiitthaniwa Luzi. 
Genesis28:20 Vano Yakobe aalipela muneenaawe eeraka: “Muluku akhala ni miyo, akikosoopa ni mukwaheene yoola kimpakaaka, akivaha epaawu weera kice ni soowara weera kiwareke" 
Genesis28:21 ni akihokoloxera oocekendeyeene vaate wa atithaka, vano Yave anaakhale Mulukwaaka." 
Genesis28:22 Nluku nna keemenxaaka olelo ntoko nrimbu nnikhale Empa ya Muluku, ni sootheene muneeraanyu mukivahe, miyo kinimoovahanitho yanaamuloko.”" 
Genesis29:1 Vano Yakobe aapwaherera mukwaahaawe, anarowa elapo ya amaki a ninkhuma nsuwa." 
Genesis29:2 Nihuku nimoha, awehaka mukhwipi, aahoona ehime ntuphini ni mihuwo miraru sa ikhondoolo siixaatalenleene mukerekheremwaya, hapo mihuwo iye saawura ehimeene yeele. Vano ehime ele yaakhuneeliwa ni nluku ntokotoko." 
Genesis29:3 Tivawo mihuwo sootheene saathukumanaayawo, akukhuli yannapirikixa nluku naawaleliwa ehime, enawuriha maahi ikhondoolo ni vahoolowaya yaamuhokoloxera nluku nne vahimeni." 
Genesis29:4 Vano Yakobe aahaakoha: “Axunna nyuwosa ti a woowi?” Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Hiyo ti a oHarani.” 
Genesis29:5 Vanonto owo aahaakohatho: “Moomusuwela Labani musulwaawe Nahori?” Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Aani, noomusuwela.”" 
Genesis29:6 Owo aapwaherera: “Owo ori salaama?” Ni awosa yaaheera: “Aani, ori salama. Mmooneke mwaamwali ole onrwa vale ni ikhondoolo. Ti mwanawe Rakheli.”" 
Genesis29:7 Owo aaheera: “Hapo nlelo othana, kheehiyono ehuhu ya othukumanya muhuwo. Fataari ngwuriheke maahi ikhondoolo, ni muroweke mwaciheke.”" 
Genesis29:8 Vano awosa yaamwaakhula: “Khoongwereya mihuwo sootheene sihithukumanne, ni nluku nihipirikixingwe ninkhuneeleliwa ehime. Nto ningwurihaahu ikhondoolo.”" 
Genesis29:9 Owo nlelo eera atthekulaka, aarwiiyaawe Rakheli ni ikhondoolo sa atithawe, niwoko owo aari mukukhuli." 
Genesis29:10 Yakobe amoonaka Rakheli, mwaana a Labani, acimweenaaya amayawe ni ikhondoolosaya, aahaattamela, anapirikixa nluku naakhuneeleliwe ehime, anawuriha ikhondoolo sa atatawe Labani." 
Genesis29:11 Yakobe aambeeca Rakheli, aniinla akhuwelaka." 
Genesis29:12 Vanonto Yakobe aamuthalihera Rakheli weera aari mmusi a atithawe nitho weera aari mwaana a Rebeka. Rakheli aatthimaka, anarowa waaleela atithawe." 
Genesis29:13 Iiwaka Labani ihaali sa Yakobe, musulwaawe, aamutthimakela, anamukumanano, anamukhupaara, anambeeca. Vahoolowaya aamukuxa amurowanaka owaani. Wu Yakobe aamuthalihera itthu sootheene saamukhumelenle." 
Genesis29:14 Labani aamweerela: “Vekhaikhai weyo mmusaaka xaxaxa. Yakobe areene vaate wa Labani wookwanaka mweeri mmoha," 
Genesis29:15 Labani aamweerela: “Wookhala mmusaaka khoontaphulela weera onoovara muteko wa siiyo. Okileele nlivo heeni kineeraaka koolive?” 
Genesis29:16 Labani aarino anamwane asithiyana eeli. Nsina na mutokweene naari Leya ni na mukhaani Rakheli. 
Genesis29:17 Vano maitho a Leya yaari oohiphwaneliwa, mene Rakheli aari ooreera ni oophwaneliwa." 
Genesis29:18 Hapo Yakobe aamusivelaxa Rakheli, aamwaakhula: “Kinimoovarelani muteko iyaakha itthannapiili mukiliveleke mwaninyu mukhaani ori Rakheli.”" 
Genesis29:19 Labani aamweerela: “Fataari omuthela weyo ohikanle omuthela akhalaru mukina. Okhaleke va ni miyo.” 
Genesis29:20 Hiiho Yakobe aamvarela muteko iyaakha ithannapiili amweerelaka Rakheli. Wa soothesene, vamaithoniwawe yaari ehuhu ekhaani niwoko na omusivelaxawawe." 
Genesis29:21 Vano Yakobe aamweerela Labani: “Mukivaheke mwaaraka niwoko iyaakha naavarihannaahu sookwanela. Kintthuna ovolowa ntheli” 
Genesis29:22 Labani aahaathukumanyiha atthu ootheene a nipuro nne, anapaka efesta." 
Genesis29:23 Wa soothesene, wiilakaru, Labani aamuronghela Yakobe Leya ni Yakobe aakonano." 
Genesis29:24 Vanonto, Labani aamvaha Leya epotthaawe Zilipa weera amurumeeleke." 
Genesis29:25 Oxaawaya aahoona weera aari Leya! Tivawo aamweerenlaawe Labani: “Mukipankeni? Koovara muteko kimweerelaka Rakheli! Vano Mukilokontthenleni?” 
Genesis29:26 Labani aamwaakhula: “Mweelaponimwahumu khookhoveleliwe hiiho weera atheliweke toko mukhaani mutokweene ahinaaye. 
Genesis29:27 Okwanihereke esimanaawe ola, vano nnoovahetho mukhaani wavara muteko iyaakha ithannapiilitho.”" 
Genesis29:28 Yakobe aahaakhulela, anakwanihera esimanaawe ole. Vahoolowaya Labani aamvaha Rakheli, mwanawe, weera amutheleke." 
Genesis29:29 Labani aamvaha Rakheli epotthaawe Biliya weera amurumeeleke. 
Genesis29:30 Aamuthelatho Rakheli, aari yoowo aamukupaleenlaawe ompwaha Leya. Aamvarelatho muteko Labani iyaakha ithannapiili." 
Genesis29:31 Yave oonaka weera Leya khaapwatthiwa, aamvahera oyara, vaheera Rakheli aari mwali eekupa." 
Genesis29:32 Leya aarupala, anamuyara mwaana mulopwana mmoha, anamutteha Rubeni, niwoko aaheera:“Yave ohoona othananawaka, vano aiyaka anookisivela.”" 
Genesis29:33 Aarupalatho, anamuyara mwaana mulopwana eeraka: ”Vanonto Yave oonaka weera miyo nkinsiveliwa, ookivahatho ola. Ni aamutteha Simeyoni.”" 
Genesis29:34 Aarupalatho, anamuyara mwaana mulopwana aneera: “Emaara ela aiyaka anootepa okitthunaxa miyo, niwoko kohaayarela anamwane araru.” Tivawo amuttenghaawe Leevi." 
Genesis29:35 Aarupalatho, anamuyara mwaana mulopwana, aneera: “Emaara ela kinoomuttottopela Yave.” Tivawo aamuttenghaawe Yuda, anahiya oyara." 
Genesis30:1 Rakheli oonaka weera khaamuyarela Yakobe anamwane, owo aahaakhalela nrima a munneiye, anamweerela Yakobe: “Mukiyarihe hoye hoye kikhwe!”" 
Genesis30:2 Yakobe amunyoonyeriwaka Rakheli aaheera: “Weeraka miyo kiri vanipuroni na Muluku ongwooceeliha oyara?” 
Genesis30:3 Owo aaheera: “Biliya ola murumeiyaaka. Munkonaneke, weera mukiyarelekeno anamwane, ni mwa yoowo miyotho kikhalane emusi.”" 
Genesis30:4 Tivawo aamvanghaawe Biliya, murumeiyaawe ntoko ekuxo, ni Yakobe aamukonano." 
Genesis30:5 Vanonto Biliya aarupala anamuyarela Yakobe mwaana mulopwana. 
Genesis30:6 Rakheli aaheera: “Muluku ookaakiha, ohiiwa wiikhupanyerawaka, anakivaha mwaana mulopwana.” Tivawo aamuttenghaawe Dani." 
Genesis30:7 Biliya murumeiyi a Rakheli aarupalatho, anamuyarela Yakobe mwaana mulopwana anaaveeli." 
Genesis30:8 Rakheli aaheeratho: “Kaakhalano ekhotto etokotoko ni amunnaka, ni koowina.” Aamutteha mwaana ole Nafitali." 
Genesis30:9 Leya oonaka weera koohiya oyara, aamukuxa murumeiyaawe Zilipa, anamvaha Yakobe ntoko ekuxo." 
Genesis30:10 Zilipa, murumeiyaawe Leya, aamuyarela Yakobe mwaana mulopwana." 
Genesis30:11 Leya aaheera: “Kooreeriwa!” Tivawo aamuttenghaawe Gadi. 
Genesis30:12 Zilipa murumeiyi a Leya, aamuyarelatho Yakobe mwaana mulopwana." 
Genesis30:13 Leya aatthapa: “Moota kihakalanlaaka! Asithiyana akina eniyeereke: ‘Oohakalala!’ Tivawo aamutthenghaawe mwaana ole Axeri. 
Genesis30:14 Mweehuhuni ya ohepha etrigu, Rubeni aarowa ntuphini, anarukula soowiima siitthaniwa madragora*, anamuroihela Leya, amayawe. Vano Rakheli aamvekela Leya: “Dyoontte mukihawulele madragora* ooruuhenlaaweni mwaninyu.”" 
Genesis30:15 Leya aamwaakhulatho: “Khawookwanneni mwaakuxalaanyu aiyaka? Nlelo muntthuna okaakhatho soowiima sa madragora* okiruuhenlaawe mwanaka?” Rakheli aamwaakhula: “Vanonto Yakobe akoneke ni nyuwo ohiyuweene yoola naakakhanyihaka ni madragora* oruuhale mwaninyu.” 
Genesis30:16 Yakobe ahokolowaka omatta oxekuweene yoole, Leya aamuciceera, anamweerela: “Olelo munkona ni miyo, niwoko miyo koothuma ni madragora* a mwanaka weera mukone ni miyo.” Vano Yakobe aakonano ohiyuweene yoole." 
Genesis30:17 Muluku aahiiwa mavekelo a Leya, ni owo aarupalatho, anamuyarela Yakobe mwaana anaathanu." 
Genesis30:18 Leya aaheera: “Muluku ookitthuvela woowaavaha aiyaka murumeiyaaka ntoko ekuxo.” Tivawo aamuttenghaawe mwaana ole Isakari. 
Genesis30:19 Vahoolowaya Leya aarupalatho, anamuyarela Yakobe mwaana anaathannamosa." 
Genesis30:20 Vano aaheera: “Muluku ookivaha yootthuneyaxa. Aiyaka anookittittimiha nnenesene, niwoko kohaayarela anamwane asilopwana athannamosa.” Tivawo aamuttenghaawe mwaana ole Zebuloni." 
Genesis30:21 Eviraka ehuhu ekinoowo aamuyara mwaana muthiyana, anamutteha Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Muluku aamuupuwelela Rakheli, aahiiwa wiikhupanyerawawe, anamvaha ikuru sooyara." 
Genesis30:23 Hiiho, owo aarupala, anamuyara mwaana mulopwana, aneera: “Khweeli Muluku ookivenxa wuuliwawaka muru.”" 
Genesis30:24 Aaheeratho: “Yave akaandyeereretho mwaana mukina.” Tivawo aamuttenghaawe mwaana ole Yoseefe. 
Genesis30:25 Rakheli amuyarakaru Yoseefe, Yakobe aamweerela Labani: “Mukihiye kihokoleele elapwaaka." 
Genesis30:26 Mukihiyetho kaakuxe axaaraka ni anamwanaaka, mwa yaala miyo koovarenlaakani muteko ni kipwaheke. Moosuwela nnenesene ehuhu yootheene koovarenlaakani muteko.”" 
Genesis30:27 Labani aamwaakhula: “Okoonihereke murima wooreera. Kohoonelela weera mwaha wa weyo Yave ookireeliha.” 
Genesis30:28 Aaheeratho: “Ohime nlivonawo ni miyo nkoolive.” 
Genesis30:29 Yakobe aamwaakhula: “Moosuwela nnenesene moota koovarenlaakani muteko ni moota waandyeerereiyaaya muhuwaanyu ni okosoopawaka. 
Genesis30:30 Miyo kihinaaye orwa, muhuwaanyu waari vakhaani, vahoolowaya wohaandyerereya vancipale, hapo Yave ooreeliha muhuwaanyu niwoko na owawaka. Wa soothesene, yaakhani miyo kineeraaka kikhalane ehuhu yoowaavarela muteko amusaaka?”" 
Genesis30:31 Labani aamukoha: “Ontthuna koovahe eheeni?” Yakobe aamwaakhula: “Muhikilive etthu. Kiri oolikaneene opwaherera okosoopa muhuwaanyu, mwaakhulela etthu miyo kineeraaka kooleeleni." 
Genesis30:32 Olelo kinooviravira mmihuwonimwanyu moothemwene. Vano, kikuxe ikhondoolo ni ipuri sootheene sa malepa hoye hoye sa mitthaalala vamoha ni iputtiputthi sooriipa. Iyo nsikhale nlivonaka." 
Genesis30:33 Hiiho wiixuumaalihawaka onookikhalela onamoona muhoolo imaara sootheene muneeraanyu muupuwele yookiliva. Mwaphwanya mwawaka epuri yoohikhalano malepa hoye hoye mitthaalala, ni eputtiputthi yoohiriipa, mweereke: ‘Soowiiyiwa.’”" 
Genesis30:34 Labani aamwaakhula: “Kohaakhulela. Okhale ntoko ohimmaawo.” 
Genesis30:35 Vano, nihuku nenenenne, Labani aahaakawanyiha anapunci ootheene yaari a mitthaalala hoye hoye a malepa ootteela, nitho ipuri ithiyana sootheene saarino mitthaalala hoye hoye malepa ootteela, ni iputtiputthi sooriipa sootheene, anawinnyerera anamwanaawe weera ekosoopeke." 
Genesis30:36 Labani aasusa wa Yakobe orakamelanawaya waari wooweetta mahuku mararu ni Yakobe aapwaherera ociha muhuwo waahanle wa Labani. 
Genesis30:37 Yakobe aahaasa ikopo soorimbelela sa exopu*, emandoweira*, ni eplatanu*. Mipatta sikina sa makula sa ikoposene seiye aahuumbula avaxavaxaka, ooniheraka hiiho otteelawaya mpuwa mwa ikopo." 
Genesis30:38 Vano aalipiha ikopo uumbunlaawe, ohoolo wa moowuurelamo. Saarowaaya owura, anapunci yannawela ithiyana." 
Genesis30:39 Ewelanaka ohoolo wa ikopo, muhuwo wannaayara axaana ooriipa, a malepa ni a mitthaalala." 
Genesis30:40 Yakobe aahaamwalamwaxa axaana ni mihuwo saahanle aawehihera sa mitthaalala ni sooriipa sa Labani. Hiiho aahiithanlela mihuwosawe muneenaawe ahitakanseraka ni mihuwo sa Labani. 
Genesis30:41 Imaara sootheene ithiyana soolipaxa saakhalaaya ni iyaasi, Yakobe anniikaathera ikopo ohoolowaya mukerekhere moowurelamo weera siwelanekewo vakhiviru wa ikope." 
Genesis30:42 Mene inama soolosowa khasiikaatheriwa ikopo iye ohoolowaya moota wooweera soolosowa saarwa okhala sa Labani ni soolipa sa Yakobe. 
Genesis30:43 Hiiho Yakobe aathatuwa thadyiri akhalaka muneene a mihuwo sincipale, arumeiyi asithiyana ni asilopwana nitho ikamelu* ni abuuru." 
Genesis31:1 Wa soothesene, Yakobe aahiiwa yuulummwaka weera anamwane a Labani yeera: “Yakobe ookuxa sootheene seiye yaarinaaya atithihu anathukumanyiha mihakhu seera sikhaleke sa atithihu.”" 
Genesis31:2 Yakobe aapacera woona weera mweettelo wa Labani waamvirikaneela. 
Genesis31:3 Yave aamweerela Yakobe: “Muhokoleele elapo ya anatithinyu ni wa amusaanyu, ni Miyo nkikhale ni nyuwo.”" 
Genesis31:4 Yakobe aarumiha wiitthaniwa Rakheli ni Leya weera erowe ntuphini saaraayamo mihuwosawe. 
Genesis31:5 Vano aaweerela: “Kinoona weera mweettelo wa atithinyu wa miyo khoohiyono yoole wa khalayi. Muluku a atithaka ori ni miyo. 
Genesis31:6 Vano nyuwo moosuwela nnenesene weera kohaavarela muteko atithinyu moota kaaweraaka. 
Genesis31:7 Mene awo yaakipaka nsikini eceendyaka nlivonaka imaara muloko. Wa soothesene, Muluku khaatthunihenre weera ekihasule." 
Genesis31:8 Awo yeeraaya: ‘Mihuwo sa malepa nikhaleke nlivonawo,’ vano saayariwa paahi samalepa, vaheera yeeraayatho: ‘Vano paahi sooriipa ti nlivonawo’; saayariwa paahi sooriipa." 
Genesis31:9 Ti hiiho Muluku owaankhaawe muhuwo atithinyu akivahaka miyo. 
Genesis31:10 Nihuku nimoha, ehuhu saawelanaaya, kaaloha weera anapunci ootheene yaawenle ithiyana yaari ooriipa, a mitthaalala ni a malepa." 
Genesis31:11 Vano ndyelo a Yave aakiitthana moolohani: ‘Yakobe!’ Miyo kaamwaakhula: ‘Miyo kiri va!’ 
Genesis31:12 Owo aakeerela: ‘Moone, anapunci ootheene angwelana ni ithiyana ari ooriipa, a mitthaalala ni a malepa, niwoko kohoona sootheene Labani oopankaaweni." 
Genesis31:13 Miyo ti Muluku a oBeteli, mwa weiwo nyuwo mwaamiinenlaanyu makhura vanlukuni ni mwalipenlaanyuwo. Tivawo, mvenye elapweene yeela, muhokoleele elapo muyareliwaanyu.’”" 
Genesis31:14 Rakheli ni Leya yaamwaakhula: “Weeraka nookhalano nlelo mpatta wa yoohiyeriwa vaate wa atithihu? 
Genesis31:15 Vano awo annoona ntoko anamarwa. Yeenre enithumihaka, aananariha musurukhu yaaphwannyaaya mwa hiyo." 
Genesis31:16 Vekhaikhai, mihakhu sootheene Muluku owaakhiyaawe atithihu ti sawihu vamoha ni anamwanaahutho. Vanonto, mpakeke sootheene Muluku oolamulenlaaweni.”" 
Genesis31:17 Yakobe aahaakhavihera anamwanaawe ni axaariye owela ikamelu*. 
Genesis31:18 Attimulihaka muhuwaawe wootheene ni sootheene ole aaphwannyaawe ehuhu aaraawe oPadan Aram, aarowa oKanaani weera akhale vaate wa atithawe Isaki." 
Genesis31:19 Labani arongweene omettha muhuwaawe, Rakheli aawiiyera icaambulo sa miluku soolokottha sa nihimonawe." 
Genesis31:20 Ti hiiho Yakobe aamulokontthaawe Labani ngwArami, atthawaka vaatewawe ahimuleelaka etthu." 
Genesis31:21 Yakobe aathawa ni sootheene owo aarinaawe. Alapuwaka mooloko Efratesi, aarowa mpatta wa nyaako sa oGiliyade." 
Genesis31:22 Eviraleene mahuku mararu, Labani aaleeliwa weera Yakobe ootthawa." 
Genesis31:23 Labani aahaakuxa asilopwana a emusaawe, anamutthimakela Yakobe wa mahuku mathannameeli, anamphwanya onyaakoni sa oGiliyade." 
Genesis31:24 Muluku aahiixoonihera wa Labani ngwArami moolohani, mweehuhuni ya ohiyu, anamoopopiha, eeraka: “Mwiipasoope weera muhimweere etthu Yakobe. Muhimuroromelihe etthu naari muhimoopopihe.”" 
Genesis31:25 Labani aamphwanya Yakobe aakonenlaawewo vanyaakoni sa oGiliyade. Vano Labani vamoha ni amusaawe aakonenle vaavaale. 
Genesis31:26 Labani aamukoha Yakobe: “Opanke eheeni? Khookitthangwe paahi, mene wohaakuxatho anamwanaaka ntoko oovariwa ni ekhotto." 
Genesis31:27 Okilokotthenleni otthawaka ni mwiitiho ohikileelaka? Kaasuwenle, saano kipakihaleene efesta yooraxelana ni wiipa, ikoma ni amakita." 
Genesis31:28 Khookitthunihenre waabeeca anamwanaaka asilopwana ni asithiyana hata axisuluwaaka weera kaaraxele. Woheetta ololo! 
Genesis31:29 Ikuru saakhala mmatatanimwaka weera koohasule, mene ohiyu ovirale Muluku a atithawo ohuuluma ni miyo akoopopihaka: ‘Mwiipasoope weera muhimweere Yakobe etthu. Muhimuroromelihe etthu naari muhimoopopihe.’" 
Genesis31:30 Vanonto, weyo ottimulenle niwoko noowunkhela vaate wa atithawo, vano wiiyenreni milukusaka?”" 
Genesis31:31 Yakobe aamwaakhula: “Miyo kaamoova wooleelani, niwoko kuupuwela weera nyuwo mwaankaakha ni ikuru anamwaniinyu." 
Genesis31:32 Vanonto mwaha wa milukusanyu, akhala mukina va muneeraanyu mumphwanyeno, iiviweke. Vamaithoni wa amusaahu ootheene, muwehaweheke muneenaanyu yaareene vaava ni miyo yakhalaru etthu eri yawinyu. Yakhala, muhokolowekeno.” Yakobe khaasuwenle weera ti Rakheli iiyale." 
Genesis31:33 Labani aavolowa muheemani mwa Yakobe, mwa Leya, ni mwa arumeiyaawe eeli asithiyana woohiphwanya etthu. Vahoolowaya avolowa muheemani ya Rakheli." 
Genesis31:34 Rakheli iiyaathiye miluku iye mmaahotthani yaari vasulu wa ekamelu*, anakilaathela. Labani aatholathola muheemani moothemwene, mene khaaphwannye etthu." 
Genesis31:35 Rakheli aaweerela atithawe: “Muhikinyoonyeriwe apwiyaaka kiheemenlaaka vamaithoniwanyu, niwoko kirookhalano mpingu wa athiyana.” Ni hiiho Labani aapwaherera waasaasa icaambulo sa milukusawe, mene khaaphwannye." 
Genesis31:36 Yakobe aanyoonyiwa, anamurukunuwela Labani, anamukoha: “Yoonanara heeni koopakenlaakani? Yoottheka heeni koopakenlaakani nyuwo munkittharattharaanyu hiiha?" 
Genesis31:37 Mootholathola itthusaka sootheene. Moophwanya eri yawinyu? Mwaphwanya, mwiikaathi sootheene ohoolo wa amusaahu, weera awosa enithorihe hiyo eelaahu." 
Genesis31:38 Iyaakha miloko miili kiri ni nyuwo. Ikhondoolosanyu ni ipurisanyu ithiyana khasinatoko orihakasa iyaasisaya, hata nkinakhuure naari enamaanyu emoha ya muhuwaanyu." 
Genesis31:39 Nkinooruuheleni mwaamunama oowiiviwa ni axinama ooluwa; miyo muneenaaka kannavilela ohaawa wootheene. Ni nyuwo mwannakivekela nlivo na axinama oowiiyiwa, othana naari ohiyu." 
Genesis31:40 Vano othana, kaahaawa oviha, ohiyu, oriira; imaara sincipale ohiyu nkaakona." 
Genesis31:41 Ti hiiho kikhanlaaka owannyinyu iyaakha miloko miili. Kohoovarelani muteko iyaakha muloko niixexe naakakhanyihaka ni anamwaniinyu eeli asithiyana ni iyaakha ithannamosa ni muhuwaanyu. Imaara muloko mwaaceendya nlivonaka. 
Genesis31:42 Ahaakhanle Muluku a apwiyaaka, Abrahaamu ni woopiha wa atithaka Isaki, vekhaikhai nyuwo mwaankihiya matataru. Vano Muluku aahoona ohaawawaka mutekwaaka woovihaxa, ni ohiyu ovinre Owo ohoonihera olakelawawe.”" 
Genesis31:43 Labani aamwaakhula Yakobe: “Axaarawo ti anamwanaaka, osuulu ti wawaka, mihuwo ti sawaka, sootheene iya va onoonaawo ti sawaka. Vano nkeere hai ni anamwanaaka, ni axisulwaaka?" 
Genesis31:44 Tivawo, hiyo ooweeli nrowe niiraane weera okhale onamoona variyariwahu.”" 
Genesis31:45 Yakobe aakuxa nluku aneemexa ntoko nrimbu. 
Genesis31:46 Owo aaweerela amusaawe: “Muukele maluku makina,” ni awo yaapaka hiiho. Yaattottela maluku nduu. Vahoolowaya yaahooca vaavaale muxerexere wa maluku ale." 
Genesis31:47 Labani aatteha nipuro nne oYegari Sahaduta, vaheera Yakobe aatteha oGalehedi." 
Genesis31:48 Vano Labani aaheera: “Maluku ala nuukenlaahu olelo ti onamoona variyariwahu.” Tivawo nitteehiwaaya oGalehedi. 
Genesis31:49 Noottehiwatho oMizepa, niwoko aaheera: “Weera Yave aniwehawehe hiyo ooweeli, nimmwalamwala mukina ni mukhwaawe." 
Genesis31:50 Waahasula anamwanaaka, hoye hoye waahaapwattha waathelaka athiyana akina, hata ohooniwaka, osuweleke weera Muluku onookhala Namoona variyariwahu”" 
Genesis31:51 Nlelotho Labani aamweerela Yakobe: “Va aakhala maluku ala ni nrimbu nna keemenxaaka variyariwahu. 
Genesis31:52 Maluku ala ari anamoona weera miyo kihilapuwele iwo weera koohooxe hata weyo ohilapuwele nno weera okihooxe. 
Genesis31:53 Muluku a Abrahaamu ni a Nahori, Muluku a asitithaya akhale Mphukaahu.” Yakobe aalipela mwa nsina na woopiha wa atithawe Isaki." 
Genesis31:54 Vano Yakobe aapaka yooveleela vamwaakoni, anaalattula amusaawe yaari vaavaale weera eceno. Vano ecaakaru, yaakonelawo." 
Genesis31:55 Oxaawaya, Labani aavenya, anaabeeca axisulwaawe ni anamwanaawe, anaareeliha ni vahoolowaya aahokoleela elapwaawe." 
Genesis32:1 Vanonto, Yakobe aapwaherera ni mukwaahaawe, anaakumanano andyelo a Muluku." 
Genesis32:2 Yakobe awoonakaru, aakhuwela: “Ala ti anakhotto a Muluku!” Tivawo aattenghaawe nipuro nne Manayimi." 
Genesis32:3 Yakobe aahaarumiha anamitthenga ohoolowawe, wa munneiye Esawu, aari muttetthe wa oSeyiri, mweelaponi ya wEdomi." 
Genesis32:4 Vano aahaalamulela: “Nyuwosa mweere ha wa pwiiyaaka Esawu: ‘Murumeiyaanyu, Yakobe, oneera ha: ‘Kookhala vaate wa Labani ni yoowo kilekelaka mpaka vaanaanova”" 
Genesis32:5 Kookhalano imombe, abuuru, ikhondoolo, ipuri ni arumeiyi asithiyana nitho asilopwana. Vano kinrumiha mutthenga ola wa pwiiyaaka weera mukaakhelele nnenesene.’”" 
Genesis32:6 Anamitthenga yaahokoleenlaaya wa Yakobe, yaamweerela: “Noophiya waamunnawaanyu Esawu. Awo eneera ewaaka vamoha ni asilopwana macira maxexe weera yoociceereni.”" 
Genesis32:7 Yakobe aasareya woova vancipale ni aatthukuruma. Aahaakawanyiha mikuttula miili ootheene aaraaweno, hiihotho ikhondoolo, imombe, ipuri ni ikamelu*." 
Genesis32:8 Vano uupuwenle ha: “Esawu awanano mukuttula mmoha, mukina onimoopowa.”" 
Genesis32:9 Yakobe aavekela: “Ii! Muluku a apwiyaaka Abrahaamu ni a atithaka Isaki, Yave mukeerenle: ‘Muhokoleele elapwaanyu ni wa amusaanyu ni Miyo nkiweettihereni sootheene nnenesene,’" 
Genesis32:10 vano miyo koosuwela weera nkiphwanenle onnene wootheene, ni ororomeleya mumpakenlaanyu murumeiyaanyu. Kaamulapuwaaka mooloko Yordanu, kaarino ekopowaaka paahi, mene vano kookhalano sooreela ni asinama ancipale." 
Genesis32:11 Dyoontte, mukoopole mmatatani mwa amunnawaaka Esawu. Kinoova weera animoowa okiwanano miyo, asimaayi, anamwane, asithiyana, nitho anamwane." 
Genesis32:12 Nyuwo moororomeliha weera munookeettihera nnenesene sootheene, nitho ekhapiraaka enimwaandyeerereya, ntoko muhaava wa mphareiya, ohinaalikeleya.”" 
Genesis32:13 Evirihakaru ohiyu wootheene aathanla mmuhuwonimwawe yoowaavaha amunnawaawe Esawu inama iya: 
Genesis32:14 Ipuri ithiyana macira meeli, anapunsi miloko miili, ikhondoolo ithiyana macira meeli ni ilopwana miloko miili," 
Genesis32:15 Ikamelu* ithiyana miloko miraru ni axaanaaya, imombe ithiyana miloko mixexe, imombe ilopwana muloko, abuuru athiyana miloko miili, ni alopwana muloko." 
Genesis32:16 Khula muhuwo aamvaherera murumeiyaawe amweerelaka: “Muroweke ohoolowaka, murakamelaneke mukina ni mukhwaawe." 
Genesis32:17 Wa yoole aahoolenle aamweerela ha: “Waakumanano amunnawaaka Esawu ni yookoha weera nyuwo awani, munkela woowi, ni muhuwo wootheene ola wawani, vano weyo wawaakhule ha:" 
Genesis32:18 ‘Iya ti sa murumeiyaanyu Yakobe. Ti yoowaavaha apwiyaaka Esawu. Yakobe oneera awaaka ottuliwahu.’” 
Genesis32:19 Wa anaaveeli, anaararu ni ootheene yaahoola mihuwo, aahaalamulelatho: “Mwaaleeleketho masweene yaawo mwaakumanano Esawu." 
Genesis32:20 Mwaweereleketho: ‘Murumeiyaanyu Yakobe oneera awaaka ottuliwahu.’” Yakobe uupuwela ha: “Miyo kintthuna oriiriha murima wa amunnawaaka ni soovaha iya kinrumihaaka miyo kihinaaye. Kapena kaawaaka ekaakhele.” 
Genesis32:21 Hiiho soovaha sa Yakobe saahoolela, mene owo muneenaawe aaviriha ohiyu waakonelingwe." 
Genesis32:22 Ohiyuweene yoole, Yakobe aavenya aakuxaka axaariye eeli, arumeiyaawe eeli ni anamwanaawe muloko nimmoha weera elapuwe nxaapwa Yaboke." 
Genesis32:23 Aalapuxakaru ootheene nxaapwa, aalapuxatho itthu sootheene aarinaawe." 
Genesis32:24 Yakobe aahanle meekhaawe ni aahoowa mulopwana mmoha, anamukhittaanano mpaka oxa." 
Genesis32:25 Oonaka mulopwana ole weera nkingwera ongwina, aamuttiindanyiha ommela mwetto wa Yakobe ekhittaanaka." 
Genesis32:26 Mulopwana ole aamweerela: “Mukihiye kirowe, niwoko wohooxa.” Yakobe aamwaakhula: “Nkinoohiyani murowaka muhinaaye okireeliha”" 
Genesis32:27 Mulopwana ole aamukoha: “Nsinananyu taani?” Yakobe aamwaakhula: “Yakobe.” 
Genesis32:28 Vano mulopwana ole aaheera: “Nsinananyu khanirwa niitthaniwatho Yakobe, mene Yixrayeli, niwoko nyuwo moowana ni Muluku, nitho atthu, munawina,”" 
Genesis32:29 Yakobe aapwaherera: “Dyoontte mukileele nsinananyu.” Vaheera Owo aamwaakhula: “Munkohera heeni nsinanaka?” Ni vaavaale aamureeliha. 
Genesis32:30 Yakobe aatteha nipuro nne Peniyeli, eeraka: “Koomoona Muluku ttunda ttunda, Wa soothesene, okumaaka wohuureleya.”" 
Genesis32:31 Nikhumaka nsuwa, aalapuwa oPeniyeli atuthunyaka mwaha wa ottiindanyihiwa." 
Genesis32:32 Tivawo, mpaka olelo va, aYixrayeli ahinkhuuraaya musemba onkumana omenlaayawo mwetto, niwoko ti musembeene yoowo Yakobe aattiindanyihingwaawe." 
Genesis33:1 Yakobe oonaka weera Esawu aneera akhuveelaka ni asilopwana macira maxexe, aahaakawanyiha asinamwane a Leya, Rakheli ni arumeiyi eeli asithiyana." 
Genesis33:2 Aawiikaathi arumeiyi ni anamwanaaya ohoolo, Leya ni anamwanaawe, vahoolowaya, ni Rakheli ni Yoseefe woomalihera." 
Genesis33:3 Owo muneenaawe aarowa ohoolo ni, awaattamelaka amunnawaawe, aahaakokhorela imaara ithannapiili." 
Genesis33:4 Esawu aamutthimakela Yakobe, anamukhubaara muxikomwawe, anambeeca. Vano awosa yaahiinla." 
Genesis33:5 Esawu aahula maithwaawe, anawoona asithiyana ni asinamwane, anamukoha: “Alesa taani?” Yakobe aawaakhula: “Alesa ti anamwane Muluku omvanghaawe murumeiyaanyu.”" 
Genesis33:6 Arumeiyi asithiyana ni anamwanaaya yaamukhuveela enamukokhorela. 
Genesis33:7 Vahoolowaya Leya ni anamwanaawe yaahoorwa, enamukokhorela. Wookisera, aaphiya Yoseefe ni Rakheli, enamukokhorelatho." 
Genesis33:8 Esawu amukoha: “Entaphulela eheeni muhuwo wootheene ole kiphwannyaaka mphironi?” Yakobe aamwaakhula: “Weera kaakheleliwe nnenesene ni nyuwo, apwiya.”" 
Genesis33:9 Wa soothesene, Esawu aaheera: “Munnaka miyo kookhalano mwincipale. Wiithokororele yeeyo eri yawawo.”" 
Genesis33:10 Mene Yakobe aanyeserera: “Hoye! Mwatthuna okoonihera murima wooreera, mwaakhelele yoovahaaka. Vano, woona ekhovaanyu onlikana ntoko woona ekhove ya Muluku ni, ohiya toko yeeyo, nyuwo mookaakhela nnenesene." 
Genesis33:11 Mwaakhelele yoovaha muruuheliwaanyu. Muluku ookiruweriha mpaka miyo kookhalano, sootheene kintthunaaka.” Yakobe aamunyeserera mpaka Esawu aahaakhelela." 
Genesis33:12 Esawu aaheera: “Nrowe nipwaheke ni miyo kinimoohoola. 
Genesis33:13 Wa soothesene, Yakobe aamweerela: “Apwiyaaka moosuwela weera asinamwane ala aakhulumuwa ni ontthuneya wuupuwelela ikhondoolo ni imombe singwaamwiha axaanaaya. Nanyeserihaxa weetta hata nikhalaka nihuku nimoha paahi, onookikhwela muhuwaaka wootheene." 
Genesis33:14 Tivawo, apwiyaaka, muroweke ohoolo wa murumeiyaanyu ni miyo kinimoottharani ottuli, keettaka vakhaani vakhaani vamoha ni muhuwaaka nitho anamwane mpaka kineeraaka kiphiye wa apwiyaaka oSeyiri.”" 
Genesis33:15 Esawu aaheera: “Vanonto, okitthunihere woohiyera asilopwana akina.” Yakobe aamukoha: “Aheeni apwiyaaka? Waakheleliwawaka nnenesene, wookikwana.”" 
Genesis33:16 Nihuku nenenenne, Esawu aahokoleela oSeyiri." 
Genesis33:17 Wa soothesene, Yakobe aarowa oSukota, weiwo aatenkaawe empaawe ni nikhoola na muhuwaawe. Tivawo, nipuro nne nniitthaniwaaya Sukota." 
Genesis33:18 Ahokolowaka oPadan-Arami, Yakobe aaphiya oowoopoweene oXekhemi oKanaani ni aakonenle vakhiviru wa esidade." 
Genesis33:19 Aathuma mpatta wa ematta weiwo aakungaawe iheemasawe ni makhoobiri ncira a eparatha*, aathumiheriwe ni anamwane a Hamori, atithawe Xekhemi." 
Genesis33:20 Vano vaavaale aahaateka altaari* ni aahaatteha Eli Elohe* Yixrayeli. 
Genesis34:1 Emaara emoha, Dina, mwaana a Leya aamuyarenlaawe Yakobe, aavenya weera aasuwele asithiyana a elapo ele." 
Genesis34:2 Vano, Xekhemi, mwaana a Hamori, muHivi, aalamula elapweene yeele, aamoona, anamvara ni ikuru, anamukoniha." 
Genesis34:3 Murimaawe waasivelaxiwa ni Dina, mwaana a Yakobe, ni aamusivela mwaamwali ole, anamuulumano amunyeengaka." 
Genesis34:4 Tivawo Xekhemi aarongwaawe waaleela atithawe Hamori eeraka: “Mwakuurele mwaamwali ole weera kimuthele.” 
Genesis34:5 Yakobe aasuwelaawe weera mwaniye Dina aaveihiwa, anamwanaawe yeera ereene ntuphini ni muhuwo. Tivawo aaweherenraawe emaalelo mpaka ohokolowawaya." 
Genesis34:6 Hamori, atithawe Xekhemi, yaarowa wuuluma ni Yakobe." 
Genesis34:7 Ehokolowakaru anamwanaawe Yakobe ntuphini, ni esuwelaka sootheene, yaathananaxa ni onyoonyiwa. Niwoko Xekhemi aapaka etthu yoowuulihaxa muru oYixrayeli woomukoniha mwaana a Yakobe – etthu ehineeriwa!" 
Genesis34:8 Hamori aaweerela: “Mwanaka, Xekhemi, oosivelaxiwa ni mwaninyusa. Dyoontte, mmwinnyerere owo weera amuthele." 
Genesis34:9 Nithelaneke yoohiru. Munivaheke anamwaniinyu asithiyana, ni nyuwo mwaakuxeke awihu." 
Genesis34:10 Mwiitekiheke ni hiyo. Elapwaahu moohuleliwa nyuwosa. Mmakekemo, mumpakekemo nakoswaanyu ni mphwanyeke sawinyusene.”" 
Genesis34:11 Xekhemi aahaavekela atithawe ni axirokoriye Dina: “Dyoontte mwaakhulele. Miyo kiri oolikaneene woovahani yeeyo nyuwo muneeraanyu mukivekele. 
Genesis34:12 Hata mwaandyeereraka muttengo nitho yoovaha wa omutthomera, kinimoolivani yeeyo muneeraanyu mukivekele. Paahi mukivahe mwaamwali ola weera kimuthele.”" 
Genesis34:13 Anamwanaawe Yakobe yaahaakhula yaalokotthasaka Xekhemi ni atithawe, Hamori, mwaha woomukoniha murokoraya Dina." 
Genesis34:14 Vano yaaheera: “Khoongwereya opaka yeeyo nimvahereraka murokorihu wa mulopwana oohiineliwa. Napaka yeeyo, eniikhale yoonuuliha muru." 
Genesis34:15 Hiyo nnaakhulele yoohimaanyu ni yoohimaahu: weera nyuwosa mwaakhulele wiineliwa asilopwanaanyu ootheene, ntoko ekhovelelowaahu." 
Genesis34:16 Vahoolowaya, nneeraahu noovaheeni, anamwanaahu ni nnithelelaneke ni awinyu. Hiyo nnimakeke ni nyuwosa, ni nnikhale muloko mmoha paahi." 
Genesis34:17 Mwaahaakhulela wiineliwa, ninoomukuxa murokorihu nipwaheke.”" 
Genesis34:18 Vano, yoohimaaya yaamureera Hamori ni mwanawe Xekhemi." 
Genesis34:19 Xekhemi, mmiravo oottittimiheyaxa a ootheene a vaate wa atithawe, khaalekenle okwanihera yaavekenlaaya, niwoko vekhaikhai aamutthunaxa mwaana a Yakobe." 
Genesis34:20 Hamori vamoha ni mwanawe Xekhemi yaarowa vamulako wa esidade weera yuulume ni atthwaaya yeeraka: 
Genesis34:21 “Atthu awo ti a murettele. Mwaatthunihere weera emakeke mweelaponimwahu, ni muumu empakeke nakoswaaya ni hiyo, niwoko nookhala nipuro nookwana wa yaawo. Vano naatheleke anamwanaaya, ni awo yaatheleketho awihu." 
Genesis34:22 Vano, awo eniilikane okhala ni hiyo ntoko muloko mmoha, naakhulela weera asilopwanaahu ootheene yiineliweke ntoko awotho yiinelingwaaya." 
Genesis34:23 Muupuwelele weera mihuwosaya, inamasaya, sooreelasaya ni iyuumasaya soorikaxa sinoowereya okhala sawihu. Vano naakhuleleke otthunawaya weera awo ekhaleke ni hiyo.”" 
Genesis34:24 Atthu ootheene yaathukumanne vamulako wa esidade yaahaakhulela masu a Hamori ni Xekhemi, ni asilopwana ni asimiravo ootheene a esidade ele yaahiinelasiwa." 
Genesis34:25 Eviraleene mahuku mararu a wiineliwa, nlelo ehaawaka ovoreya wa wiineliwa, anamwane eeli a Yakobe, Simeyoni ni Leevi, axirokoriye Dina, yaakuxa ikatanasaya, enavolowa musidadeni ehihovelaka etthu, enawiiva asilopwana ootheene." 
Genesis34:26 Vanonto yaamwiiva ni ikatana Hamori vamoha ni mwanawe Xekhemi, enamukhumiha Dina mpaani mwa Xekhemi, enapwaha." 
Genesis34:27 Asinamwane akina a Yakobe yaavolowa musidadeni ni eviraka saaraaya mittembo, yaahuhula esidade weiwo murokoraya aaveihingwaawewo." 
Genesis34:28 Yaakuxasa ikhondoolo, imombe, abuuru ni sootheene saari musidade ni mmatta." 
Genesis34:29 Yaahaakuxa asithiyana, anamwane, mihakhusaya sootheene nitho sootheene yaaraayano mmampaani." 
Genesis34:30 Yakobe aamweerela Simeyoni ni Leevi: “Nyuwosa mookiwayawayiha mukiruuhelaka osoondiwa ni aKanaani ni aPerizi, asimwaneene muumu. Hiyo nri vakhaani ni awosa yatakansa ikurusaya, ni yanirweela miyo ni amusaaka nniiphwatiwe.”" 
Genesis34:31 Awo yaamwaakhula: “Wookhala nnene murokorihu omukhaliha ntoko puuta?” 
Genesis35:1 Muluku aamweerela Yakobe: “Mvenye nno ni mwamake oBeteli, ni wu mwamutekele altaari* Muluku, mwa Yoowo iixoonihenre wa nyuwo mwaatthawaka amunnawaanyu Esawu.”" 
Genesis35:2 Yakobe aaweerela yaawo a vaatewawe nitho yaawo aaraaweno: “Mwiitapuxe wa miluku sa anamarwa siri variyariwanyu. Mwiitteelihe ni muceendye ikuwo. 
Genesis35:3 Nrowe nithaamele oBeteli. Kintthuna kamutekelewo altaari* Muluku okikhavihenre miyo kaaraaka moothananani, ni okihoonle mmapuroni moothemwene miyo keettaaka.”" 
Genesis35:4 Yaamvaha Yakobe miluku sootheene sa anamarwa yaarinaaya, ni axiveeve yaawanraaya. Vano Yakobe aathipela sootheene muxerexere mwiri wa ekarivalyu* waattamela wa oXekhemi." 
Genesis35:5 Awo ettimulakaru, Muluku aahaaruuhela amaki a isidade iye yaavinraaya woova vancipale, moota wooweera khaawo aatthimakenle anamwane a Yakobe." 
Genesis35:6 Yakobe ni ootheene yaari ni yoowo yaaphiya oLuzi, eyo tiiyo oBeteli, elapo ya oKanaani." 
Genesis35:7 Weiwe aamutekela altaari* Muluku, anatteha nipuro nne El-Beteli, niwoko iwe Muluku aahiixoonihera wa yoowo aatthawaawe amunnawaawe." 
Genesis35:8 Vano Debora, murumeiyi a Rebeka, aahookhwa, anavithiwa vathi wa mwiri wa ekarivalyu* waattamela oBeteli. Tivawo Yakobe aattenghaawe nipuro nne Aloni Bakuti." 
Genesis35:9 Ahokoleelaka Yakobe oPadan Aram, Muluku aahiixooniheratho wa yoowo, anamureeliha," 
Genesis35:10 amweerelaka: “Nsinananyu ti Yakobe, mene vano khamurwa mwiitthaneliwatho Yakobe; nsinananyu nnikhale Yixrayeli.” Hiiho aamutteha Yixrayeli." 
Genesis35:11 Aamweerelatho: “Miyo ti Muluku a ikuru sootheene. Muyaraneke ni mwaandyeereraneke. Vano muloko, aani mpaka miloko sincipale, nsikhumelele mwa nyuwo, ni eniikhale mamwene variyari wa ekhapiraanyu." 
Genesis35:12 Elapo kaamvanghaaka Abrahaamu ni Isaki, kinoovahanitho nyuwo, ni kinoovaha mooteene yoowo ekhapirwaanyu.”" 
Genesis35:13 Vahoolowaya Muluku aawela wa nipuro nne uulummaawe ni yoowo. 
Genesis35:14 Yakobe aaheemexa nrimbu na nluku vanipuroni nenenenne Muluku aamuulumannaawe, anamiinela yooveleela yoowura ni aattikitthela makhura." 
Genesis35:15 Yakobe aatteha nipuro nne Muluku uulummaawe ni yoowo Beteli. 
Genesis35:16 Yaattimula oBeteli, ni exuurakamelanneene ni wEfrata, Rakheli aapacera oyara ni mahooxo matokotoko." 
Genesis35:17 Woowoona hiiho, namayariha aamweerela: “Muhoove, mookhalano va mwaana mulopwana mukina!”" 
Genesis35:18 Vano ahaleelaka okhwa, aamutteha mwaana ole Ben-Oni, mene atithawe yaamuttenghe Benyamini." 
Genesis35:19 Rakheli aahookhwa, anavithiwa mukerekhere ephiro enrowa wEfrata, eyo tiiyo oBeteleheemu." 
Genesis35:20 Yakobe aaheemexa nrimbu vanihiyeni na Rakheli, ni mpaka olelo va nrimbu nne nri ekanyero ya nihiye na Rakheli." 
Genesis35:21 Yixrayeli aattimulatho, anakunga eheemaawe ohoolo wa oMigedal Ederi." 
Genesis35:22 Amankeene nlelo elapweene yeele, Rubeni aamukonano Biliya, ekuxo ya atithawe. Yixrayelitho aasuwela yeeyo. Yakobe aakhalano anamwane muloko neeli." 
Genesis35:23 Yaayariwe ni Leya yaari Rubeni, nttharanawe Yakobe, Simeyoni, Leevi, Yuda, Isakari ni Zebuloni." 
Genesis35:24 Yaayariwe ni Rakheli yaari Yoseefe ni Benyamini. 
Genesis35:25 Yaayariwe ni Biliya, murumeiyi a Rakheli, yaari Dani ni Nafitali." 
Genesis35:26 Yaayariwe ni Zilipa, murumeiyi a Leya, yaari Gadi ni Axeri. Ti yaala anamwane a Yakobe yaayareliwe oPadan Aram." 
Genesis35:27 Vahoolowaya Yakobe aarowa waaxekura atithawe, Isaki, oMamre, vakhiviru ni oHeberoni, eyo tiiyo oKiriyati. Ti weiwo Abrahaamu ni Isaki yaamankaaya." 
Genesis35:28 Isaki aakhalano iyaakha ncira ni miloko mithannamiraru sa okumaawe. 
Genesis35:29 Okhwiiye akwaaxeiyeene, anavithiwa athukumanyihiwaka vamoha ni makholowaawe. Vano, anamwanaawe, Esawu ni Yakobe, yaamvitha." 
Genesis36:1 Ola ti mwaha wa ekhapira ya Esawu, eyo tiiyo Edomi." 
Genesis36:2 Esawu aahaathela asithiyana a oKanaani: Ada, mwaana a Eloni, muHiti, Oholibama, mwaana a Ana, osuulu wa Zibeyoni, muHivi," 
Genesis36:3 nitho Basemati, mwaana a Iximayeli ni murokoriye Nebayoti." 
Genesis36:4 Ada aamuyarela Esawu mwaana mulopwana iitthaniwa Elifazi, ni Basemati aamuyarela Rewuyeli." 
Genesis36:5 Oholibama aamuyarela Yewuxi, Yalami ni Kora. Awo yaari anamwane a Esawu, yaayariwe mweelaponi ya oKanaani." 
Genesis36:6 Esawu aahaakuxa axaariye, anamwanaawe asilopwana ni asithiyana, ootheene a vaatevawe, hiihotho mihuwosawe, asinama akina ootheene ni sooreelasawe sootheene aaphwannyaawe oKanaani, anarowa elapo ekina ottai wa munneiye Yakobe." 
Genesis36:7 Sooreelasaya saari sincipale woohikwana okhala vamoha, niwoko elapo yaamankaaya khayaawera ociha mihuwo sa ooweeli." 
Genesis36:8 Tivawo Esawu, eyo tiiyo Edomi, aarongwaawe omaka onyaakoni sa oSeyiri." 
Genesis36:9 Ola ti mwaha wa ekhapira ya Esawu, ori nikholo na awEdomi, mweelaponi ya nyaako sa oSeyiri." 
Genesis36:10 Anamwanaawe ti ala: Elifazi, mwaana a Ada, mwaariye Esawu, ni Rewuyeli, mwaana a Basemati, mwaariye Esawu." 
Genesis36:11 Anamwane a Elifazi yaari ala: Temani, Omari, Zepo, Gatami, ni Kenazi." 
Genesis36:12 Elifazi, mwaana a Esawu, aakhalano ekuxo yoopottha yiitthaniwa Timena, ni owo aamuyarela mwaana mulopwana aamuttenghaawe Amaleki. Yaari ti yaala axisulwaawe Ada, mmoha a axaariye Esawu." 
Genesis36:13 Anamwane a Rewuyeli yaari ala: Nahati, Zera, Xama, ni Miza. Yaari ti yaala axisulwaawe Basemati, mukina a axaariye Esawu." 
Genesis36:14 Mwaariye mukina Esawu, Oholibama, mwaana a Ana ni musulwaawe Zibeyoni, aamuyarelatho anamwane ala: Yewuxi, Yalami ni Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Ala yaari mapwattapwattha a ekhapira ya Esawu: Anamwane a Elifazi, ntthaara na Esawu: Temani, Omari, Zepo, Kenazi," 
Genesis36:16 Kora, Gatami ni Amaleki. Yaari ti yaala mapwattapwattha a epuumba ya Elifazi, mweelaponi ya wEdomi yaari osuulu wa Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Vano, wa anamwane a Rewuyeli, mwaana a Esawu, mapwattapwattha yaari ala: Nahati, Zera, Xama, ni Miza. Yaari ti yaala mapwattapwattha a ekhapira ya Rewuyeli, mweelaponi ya wEdomi yaari osuulu wa Basemati, mwaariye Esawu." 
Genesis36:18 Vanonto, wa anamwane a Oholibama, mwaana a Ana, mwaariye Esawu, mapwattapwattha yaari Yewuxi, Yalami ni Kora. Yaari ti yaala mapwattapwattha a ekhapira ya Oholibama, mwaariye Esawu, mwaana a Ana." 
Genesis36:19 Yaari ti yaala anamwane a Esawu, eyo tiiyo Edomi, ni yaala yaari mapwattapwatthaawe." 
Genesis36:20 Anamwane a Seyiri, muGori aamanke mweelaponi ele, yaari ala: Lotani, Sobali, Sibeyoni, Ana," 
Genesis36:21 Dixoni, Ezeri, ni Dixani. Anamwane ala a Seyiri yaari mapwattapwattha a aGori mweelaponi ya wEdomi." 
Genesis36:22 Anamwane a Lotani yaari Hori ni Hemani. Vano murokoriye Lotani aari Timena. 
Genesis36:23 Anamwane a Sobali yaari Alvani, Manahati, Ebali, Xefo ni Onami." 
Genesis36:24 Anamwane a Zibeyoni yaari Aya ni Ana. Aari Aaneene yoowo aawoonelenle anaattuuttu a maahi ooviha munikareni aaroihaawe waaciha abuuru a atithawe Zibeyoni. 
Genesis36:25 Anamwane a Ana yaari Dixoni ni Oholibama, mwaana muthiyana a Ana." 
Genesis36:26 Anamwane a Dixoni yaari Hemda, Exbani, Yitrani ni Kerani." 
Genesis36:27 Anamwane a Ezeri yaari Biliyani, Zahavani ni Akani." 
Genesis36:28 Anamwane a Dixani yaari Uzi ni Arani. 
Genesis36:29 Mapwattapwattha a aGori yaari ti ala: Lotani, Sobali, Zibeyoni, Ana," 
Genesis36:30 Dixoni, Ezeri ni Dixani. Awo yaari mapwattapwattha a aGori, khula pwattapwattha ni nihimonawe mweelaponi ya oSeyiri." 
Genesis36:31 Ala yaari mamwene yaalamula mweelaponi ya wEdomi, ahinaaye okhala mwene variyari wa aYixrayeli:" 
Genesis36:32 Bela, mwaana a Bewori aalamula wEdomi ni esidadaawe yiitthaniwa Dinihaba." 
Genesis36:33 Akhwaakaru Bela, aarandeliwe ni Yobabi, mwaana a Zera a oBozera." 
Genesis36:34 Akhwaakaru Yobabi, aamurandenle ti Huxami a elapo ya aTemani." 
Genesis36:35 Akhwaakaru Huxami, aamurandenle ti Hadadi, mwaana a Bedadi, mwa yoowo aawinne aMidiyani mureyareyani mwa oMowabe. Vano esidadaawe yiitthaniwa Avithi." 
Genesis36:36 Akhwaakaru Hadadi, Samela a oMasereka aari namarandelaawe." 
Genesis36:37 Samela aahookhwa ni Xawuli a oRehoboti, mukerekhere wa mooloko Efratesi, aari namarandelaawe." 
Genesis36:38 Xawuli aahookhwa ni Bahali–Hanani, mwaana a Akhebori, aari namarandelaawe." 
Genesis36:39 Bahali–Hanani, mwaana a Akhebori, aahookhwa, ni Hadadi aari namarandelaawe. Esidadaawe yiitthaniwa oPawu. Vano mwaariye, Mehetabeli aari mwaana a Materedi ni osuulu wa Mezahabi." 
Genesis36:40 Awo yaari mapwattapwattha a ekhapira ya Esawu, khula pwattapwattha ni nsinanawe, nihimonawe ni mittetthesawe: Timena, Alevani, Yethethi," 
Genesis36:41 Oholibama, Ela, Pinoni," 
Genesis36:42 Kenazi, Temani, Mibezari," 
Genesis36:43 Magediyeli ni Irami. Vano, awo yaari mapwattapwattha a wEdomi, khula mutthu a yaawo aamaka mmuttettheni mwa elapo aakamenlaawe. Vano awEdomi yaari a ekhapira ya Esawu." 
Genesis37:1 Yakobe aamaka elapo ya oKanaani, weiwo yaamankaayawo atithawe ntoko namarwa." 
Genesis37:2 Mwaha wa emusi ya Yakobe ti ola: Yoseefe aarinaawe iyaakha muloko niithannapiili sa okumaawe, annakosoopa mihuwo vamoha ni axunneiye yaari anamwane a Biliya ni a Zilipa yaari ikuxo sa opottha sa atithawe. Vano aahaathalihera atithawe ohinnene wa axunneiye." 
Genesis37:3 Yixrayeli aamusivelaxa Yoseefe waapwaha anamwane akina, niwoko aamuyanre ngwuuluvalanimwawe. Tivawo aaruminghaawe ottottheliwa mukaandyo woorakama." 
Genesis37:4 Axunneiye, yoonakaru weera atiithi annimusivelaxa yoowo waapwaha anamwane akina, yaamuthanya ni khayaawera omuulumano ni murettele." 
Genesis37:5 Emaara emoha Yoseefe aaloha ni aathaliherakaru axunneiye, awosa yaatepaxa omuthanya." 
Genesis37:6 Yoseefe aaweerela: “Mwiiwe etthu kilonghaaka. 
Genesis37:7 Neera nitthukaka irece sa etrigu mmatta, vano erecaaka yaaheemela ni irecesanyu saatakanserana sirukureeraka yawaka ni saahuuramela ohoolowaya.”" 
Genesis37:8 Axunneiye yaaheera: “Weeraka weyo onookhala mwenaahu? Onghima weera weyo onrowa onilamula?” Vano yaatepaxa omuthanya mwaha wa olohawawe, ni yeeyo aahimmaawe." 
Genesis37:9 Vahoolowaya Yoseefe aalohatho, anaathaliheratho axunneiye. Owo aaweerela: “Koolohatho. Ni emaara ela nsuwa ni mweeri ni ithenyeeri muloko nimmoha saahuuramela ohoolowaka.”" 
Genesis37:10 Aathaliherakaru yooloha ele atithawe, ni axuneiye, atithawe yaamveihera enamweerela: “Moota heeni wa oloha weyo olonghaawo? Weeraka miyo ni amayawo nitho axunneiyo ninrowa wookokhorela ohoolowawo?”" 
Genesis37:11 Hiiho, axunneiye yaamukhalela ehace. Vanonto atithawe yeera yuupuwelelaka yeeyo mmurimanimwaya." 
Genesis37:12 Axunneiye Yoseefe yaarowa ociha muhuwo wa atithaya waattamela oXekhemi. 
Genesis37:13 Yixrayeli aamweerela Yoseefe: “Axunneiyo anciha muhuwo oXekhemi. Vano kintthuna weera weyo orowewo.” Yoseefe aawaakhula: “Kinoorowa.” 
Genesis37:14 Yakobe aapwaherera: “Orowe woone sootheene seettaka nnene ni axunneiyo nitho muhuwo, ni okiruuhele ihabari. Yakobe aamurumihale areene vareyareyani na oHeberoni. Vano Yoseefe aathweelela aattamelaka oXekhemi." 
Genesis37:15 Vawo mulopwana mmoha aamuphwanya axoraxoraka ntuphini, anamukoha: “Onaasa eheeni?”" 
Genesis37:16 Owo aamwaakhula: “Kingwaasaasa axunnaka. Moosuwela weiwo awosa ancihaayawo muhuwo?” 
Genesis37:17 Mulopwana ole aamwaakhula: “Awosa aapwaha va. Miyo kiwiiwale yeeraka: ‘Nrowe oDotani.’” Hiiho Yoseefe aarowa awaasaka axunneiye, anaaphwanya vakhiviru ni oDotani." 
Genesis37:18 Axunneiye yaamoona arwaaka ottaiwene, ni owo ahinaaye ophiya, yaavaanela omwiiva." 
Genesis37:19 Yaaheerelana mukina ni mukhwaawe: “Namaloha ole ti yoole ongwa vale. 
Genesis37:20 Nrowe nimwiive, nitho nimvonyere muhimeni emoheemoha ya seiya. Vano nneereke: ‘Mwamunama mmoha a ntuphini oomukhuura.’ Nnoone eniyeereiye ni soolohasawe.”" 
Genesis37:21 Iiwakaru yeeyo Rubeni aatthuna waahiiha omwiiva aweerelaka: “Nihimwiive.” 
Genesis37:22 Aaheeratho: “Muhivuuvihe ephome. Mumvonyereke muhimeni mmwe eri munikareni, mene muhimpake etthu yoonanara.” Etthu aatthunaawe yaari omoopola mmatatanimwaya ni omuhokoloxera wa atithawe." 
Genesis37:23 Yoseefe aphiyakaru, awosa yaamurula mukaandyowaawe ole woorakama aawanraawe," 
Genesis37:24 yaamvara, enamvonyera muhimeni yoowelela yahaakhanle maahi." 
Genesis37:25 Ekilaathiki weera ece, yaahoona ottaiwene mukuttula wa aYixmayeli yaakhuma oGiliyade. Akamelowaaya yaalemeliwa itthu sooreerela, balsamu* ni emira*, ni iyo yaaroiha wExipitu." 
Genesis37:26 Yuda aaweerela axunneiye: “Nniwine eheeni namwiiva munnihu niipithihaka okhwawawe? 
Genesis37:27 Nrowe naathumihere aYixmayeli ale. Nihimpaketho etthu yoonanara, niwoko munnihu xaxaxa, ooyariwano.” Axunneiye yaamwaakhulela yoowo." 
Genesis37:28 Ananakoso aYixmayeli a oMidiyani ale yaattamelakaru, axunneiye yaamukhumiha Yoseefe muhimeni, enaathumihera aYixmayeli ni ixekeli* miloko miili. Awosa yaamuroiha wExipitu." 
Genesis37:29 Ahokoleelakaru Rubeni ohimeni, ni oonaka weera Yoseefe khaakhanlemo, aahaahula soowarasawe," 
Genesis37:30 anahokoleelatho wa axunneiye, anaweerela: “Mmiravo khamomo! Vano miyo kikeleke woowi?”" 
Genesis37:31 Axunneiye yaamwiiva nampunci, enakuxa mukaandyo wa Yoseefe, enattikitthelano mukaandyo," 
Genesis37:32 enaarumihela atithaya mutthenga ola: “Noottotta ola. Moone waari wa mwaninyu.” 
Genesis37:33 Yakobe aasuwela, anakhuwela: “Vekhaikhai ti mukaandyo wa mwanaka. Mwaamunama a ntuphini oomukhuura! Yoseefe oonyaanyiwa!”" 
Genesis37:34 Vano Yakobe aahaahula soowarasawe, anawara esaakho, ni aathananaxa mahuku mancipale amwiinlelaka mwanawe." 
Genesis37:35 Anamwanaawe asilopwana ni asithiyana yanneerera ompepesa, mene owo aakhootta opepesiwa, eeraka: “Hoye! Kinoomwiinlela mpaka kineeraaka kikhale vamoha ni mwanaka mookhwaani.” Vano owo aapwaherera omwiinlela." 
Genesis37:36 Ehuhuweene yeeyo aMidiyani yaamuthumiha Yoseefe emuthumiheraka Potifari aari namuteko mutokweene a Farawu* ni mutokweene a anamalipelelaawe. 
Genesis38:1 Mweehuhuweene yeele Yuda aamwalamwala ni axunneiye, anarowa okhala nivaate na mulopwana mmoha a wAdulami iitthaniwa Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Weiwo, Yuda aamphwanya muthiyana muKanaani iitthaniwa Xuwa, anamuthela, anakonano." 
Genesis38:3 Owo aarupala, anamuyara mwaana mulopwana, mwa yoowo aamuttenghaawe Eri." 
Genesis38:4 Vahoolowaya, aarupalatho, anamuyara mwaana mulopwana, anamutteha Onani." 
Genesis38:5 Vano aamuyaratho mwaana mulopwana mukina, anamutteha Xela. Owo aayariwe Yuda areene oKezibi." 
Genesis38:6 Yuda aamuthanlela Eri, Mwanawe a ntthaara, muthiyana mmoha iitthaniwa Tamari weera amuthele." 
Genesis38:7 Wa soothesene, Yave khawaamusivenle mweettelo wooriheya wa Eri, ntthaara na Yuda, tivawo aamwiivalaawe." 
Genesis38:8 Yuda aamweerela Onani: “Othelaneke ni naamukweli a munneiyo, weera okwanihere ekhovelelo ya nikelampa ni yoowo, ni weera hiiho ekhumelele ekhapira wa amunnawaawo.”" 
Genesis38:9 Onani aasuwela weera ekhapira ele khayaakhala yawawe. Tivawo, khula emaara aakonaaweno naamukhweli, owo annarihela vathi olopwanaawe weera ahihiye ekhapira wa amunnawaawe." 
Genesis38:10 Mukhaleloweene yoole khawaamusivenle Yave, tivawo aamwiivalaawetho." 
Genesis38:11 Yuda aamweerela Tamari, mwaara a mwaniye: “Ohokoleeleke wa atithawo ni wakhalekewo ntoko naamukhweli, mpaka aneeraawe unnuwe mwanaka Xela.” Vano Yuda aamoova weera owo anaakhwe ntoko axunneiye. Hiiho Tamari aarowa okhala vaate wa atithawe." 
Genesis38:12 Eviraka ehuhu ekina, aahookhwa mwaariye Yuda, mwaana muthiyana a Xuwa. Oviraleene wiinanela, Yuda aarowa oTimena owoona anamamettha a muhuwaawe vamoha ni nthamwenaawe Hira, ngwAdulami." 
Genesis38:13 Aleeliwakaru Tamari: “Atatinyu ari mphironi ya oTimena weera emetthe ikhondoolosaya,”" 
Genesis38:14 owo aaceendya ikuwosawe sa onaamukhweli, anakhuneela ekhovaawe ni ekuwo, anakilaathi vamulako wa wEnayimi ori mphironi ya oTimena. Owo aapaka yeeyo niwoko aahoona weera Xela ohunnuwa, ni nlelo eera ahinaaye othelana ni yoowo." 
Genesis38:15 Yuda amoonakaru, uupuwela weera aari puuta, niwoko owo aakhuneela ekhovaawe." 
Genesis38:16 Ahisuwelaka weera aari mwaara a mwanawe, aamurowela muxexere wa musewe, anamweerela: “Orwe va. Kintthuna wookonano.” Tamari aamwaakhula: “Mmukivahe eheeni weera mukikonane?”" 
Genesis38:17 Owo, aamwaakhula: “Kinimoorumihela epuri emoha ya muhuwaaka.” Ole aamwaakhula: “Khamunkivaha yookiroromeliha mpaka muneeraanyu mukirumihele yeeyo?”" 
Genesis38:18 Owo aamukoha: “Yoororomeliha heeni kineeraaka koovahe?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Munelaanyu woottittelano ni eciikhwe nitho ekopowaanyu mvarenlaanyu mmatatani.” Owo aamvaha yeeyo, anakonano ni ole aarupala." 
Genesis38:19 Vahoolowaya owo aarowa, anarula ekuwo iikhuneenlaawe, anahokoleela owara ikuwo sa onaamukhweli." 
Genesis38:20 Yuda aarumiha epuri, amwinnyereraka nthamwenaawe ngwAdulami, weera aakhele yoororomelihiwaawe muthiyana ole, mene khaamphwannye." 
Genesis38:21 Vanonto, aahaakoha atthu a elapweene yeele: “Ori woowi puuta a wEnayimi onkhovelela okilaathi mukerekhere wa ephiro?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Nno khawoworu puuta.”" 
Genesis38:22 Ole aahokoleela wa Yuda, anamweerela: “Nkimphannye ni, ohiya hiiho, atthu a nipuro nne yeenre weera khawoworu puutawo.”" 
Genesis38:23 Yuda aamwaakhula: “Omuhiyekeno, weera nihitheiwe. Ekhaikhai ti weera koomurumihela epuri, mene weyo khoomphwannye.”" 
Genesis38:24 Siviraleene nyeeri miraru, yaamweerela Yuda: “Mwaara a mwaninyu Tamari, ooraruwa, ni mooraruwanimwawe oorupala.” Vano Yuda aawaakhula: “Munkhumihere vaate weera ahisiwe mukumi!”" 
Genesis38:25 Owo aakhumiheriwaawe vaate, aahaarumihela atithaya aiyawe mutthenga ola: “Miyo kirupalihiwe ni mulopwana ori muneene a itthu iya. Mooneke nnenesene weera munsuwele muneene taani a munela woottittelano ola, eciikhwe ela ni ekopo ela.”" 
Genesis38:26 Yuda aasuwela weera saari sawawe, aneera: “Ola ti oororomeleya okipwaha miyo, niwoko kaaheereke omwinnyerera mwanaka Xela.” Vanonto khaamukonannetho." 
Genesis38:27 Ephiyerakaru ehuhu ya oyara, yaari maphapo mmirimanimwawe." 
Genesis38:28 Eyariwaka hiihaale, mmoha a yaawo aakhumihera vaate ntata, ni namayariha aakuxa nliinya nooxeera anamulutta mmoononimwawe eeraka: “Ola ti opacenre okhuma.”" 
Genesis38:29 Owo aahokoloxa ntata, ni oopacera oyariwa aari mukina! Vano namayariha aaheera: “Khuu! Ophutunle moota heeni woowaakuveya?” Vano aamutteha Perezi." 
Genesis38:30 Vahoolowaya aakhuma munneiye aarino nliinya nooxeera mmoononimwawe, anattehiwa Zera." 
Genesis39:1 Yoseefe aaroihiwa wExipitu. Potifari, namuteko mutokweene a Farawu* ni mutokweene a anamalipelela a vaate wa Farawu*, aamuthumale ni aYixmayeli, mwa yaawo yaamuroihalewo." 
Genesis39:2 Yave aari ni Yoseefe ni aamukhavihera weera sootheene simweettele nnenesene ni aakhala vaate wa apwiyaawe ngwExipitu. 
Genesis39:3 Potifari, asuwelakaru weera Yave aari ni Yoseefe ni weera sootheene aavaraawe sannamweettela nnenesene," 
Genesis39:4 aamuhakalalela vancipale Yoseefe, anamukhaliha muhooleli a itthusawe. Potifari aamuhiyera okosoopa vaatevawe amuroromelaka ni sootheene aarinaawe." 
Genesis39:5 Okhuma ahiyeriwakaru vaate wa Potifari ni sooreelasawe sootheene, Yave aareeliha vaate wa ngwExipitu ole niwoko na Yoseefe. Vanonto mareeliho a Yave yaari mwa sootheene Potifari aaraaweno okhumela vaate mpaka mmatta." 
Genesis39:6 Owo aamuhiyera okosoopa Yoseefe sootheene aarinaawe, ni khaapwattharu etthu, ehikhanle yoocaawe. Yoseefe aari mulopwana ooyareya ni oophwaneliwa." 
Genesis39:7 Eviraka ehuhu ekina, amwaarawe Potifari yaamuhaawelaxa, ni awo yaamveka Yoseefe weera aakoneno." 
Genesis39:8 Yoseefe aakhootta, anamweerela mwaaraya apwiyaawe: “Moone, apwiyaaka khaampwattha itthu sa vatthokoni siri ni miyo, mpaka aakinnyerera mmatatanimwaka itthusaya sootheene." 
Genesis39:9 Khawowo mutthu mukina a vaate va ookipwaha miyo. Sootheene kinlamula ti miyo woohiyani nyuwo paahi muri amwaaraya. Moota heeni miyo kineeraaka kipake etthweene yeeyo yoonanara kimutthekelaka Muluku?” 
Genesis39:10 Hiiho naari awo yaamunyeserereene Yoseefe khula nihuku, owo aamukhootta okonano yaawo ni annasemba owaattamela." 
Genesis39:11 Nihuku nimoha, Yoseefe aavolowa mpaani weera avare mutekwaawe, ni khaarimo naari murumeiyi mmoha." 
Genesis39:12 Awo yaamvara malayaawe, enamweerela: “Owe okone ni miyo!” Owo aatthawela vaate, aahiyeraka malayaawe mmatatanimwaya." 
Genesis39:13 Awo yoonakaru weera wootthawa aahaahiyera malayaawe mmatatanimwaya," 
Genesis39:14 aawiitthana arumeiyi akina a vaatevene vaavaale, anaweerela: “Mooneke! muHeberi ole niruuheliwaahu weera aniruwane. Owo aavolowa mu, aneerera okiveiha, mene miyo kaakhuwela vancipale."
