Genesis39:15 Vano owo akiiwakaru miyo kikhuwelaka, ookihiyera malayaawe, anatthawela vaate.”" 
Genesis39:16 Muthiyana ole aathokorora malaya ale, mpaka orwa wa apwiyaawe Yoseefe." 
Genesis39:17 Vano yaahaaphitela mwaha ole: “Murumeiyi ole muHeberi muniruuhenlaanyu, ookaattamela weera akiruwane." 
Genesis39:18 Mene kikhuwelakaru, aakihiyera malayaawe, anatthawela vaate.”" 
Genesis39:19 Apwiyaawe Yoseefe, yiiwakaru masu muthiyana aathalihenraawe: ‘Ti hiiho murumeiyaanyu okeenraawe,’ yaanyoonyiwa." 
Genesis39:20 Apwiyaawe Yoseefe yaarumiha oroweliwa Yoseefe, enamvonyera mukaliposo yaawaleliwaayamo anamatthukiwa a mwene. Vano Yoseefe aakhala mukaliposo." 
Genesis39:21 Vawo Yave aari ni yoowo, amooniheraka oreerawawe murima ni amutatuxaka mutokweene a mukaliposo weera amureereliwe murima Yoseefe." 
Genesis39:22 Tivawo mutokweene a mukaliposo aamvaherenraawe Yoseefe waawehaweha anamatthukiwa ootheene, ni itthu sootheene saapakeya mmwe. Yoseefe ti aalamula moota seeraaya sipakeyemo." 
Genesis39:23 Mutokweene a mukaliposo kheewo aapwatthaawe mwa itthu saari ni Yoseefe, niwoko Yave aari ni yoowo. Hiiho sootheene Yoosefe aapakaawe, sannamweettela nnenesene." 
Genesis40:1 Vahoolowaya yaaheereya weera namarumeela a soowura ni namooxa ipaawu a amwene a wExipitu yaahaapahula apwiyaaya, amwene a wExipitu." 
Genesis40:2 Farawu* aahaanyoonyeriwa vancipale asitokweene eeli ale, mutokweene a anamarumeela soowura ni mutokwene a anamooxa ipaawu," 
Genesis40:3 analamulela otthukiwa vaate wa mutokweene a anamalipelela, mukaliposomwene mwemmwe aaraawemo Yoseefe." 
Genesis40:4 Mutokweene a anamalipelela aamulamulela Yoseefe waawehaweha ni waarumeela yaawo. Eviraleene ehuhu ekina," 
Genesis40:5 namarumeela a soowura ni namooxa ipaawu a amwene a wExipitu yaari mukaliposo, yaalohasa. Khula mutthu aakhalano yoolohaawe, ooweeli ohiyu omoha, ni khula yooloha yaakhalano etaphulelowaaya." 
Genesis40:6 Oxaawaya, Yoseefe aarowa waaxekura, anawoona weera yaari oohitteene." 
Genesis40:7 Owo aahaakoha anamiteko ale a Farawu* yaatthukiwetho vaate wa apwiyaaya: “Heeni nyuwo olelo muraanyu oohitteene?” 
Genesis40:8 Vanonto, awo yaamwaakhula: “Niwoko hiyo ooweeli nooloha, mene khaawo ongwera onitaphulela soolohasahu.” Yoseefe aaweerela: “Ti Muluku paahi ongwera onitaphulela sooloha. Mukithalihere seiyo mulonghaanyu.”" 
Genesis40:9 Mutokweene a anamarumeela a soowura aamuthalihera Yoseefe yoolohaawe: “Moolohanimwaka kohoona ohoolowaka evideira*. 
Genesis40:10 Vano mwireene yoowo waakhalano iphandi tthaaru, onaphuwa makukhu, onakhalano ithutu, oniima mukhucenimwaya iwuuva* siitthwa." 
Genesis40:11 Mmatatanimwaka kaakhalano ekoomixi ya Farawu*. Kaakuxa iwuuva*, kinaamela mukoomixini ya Farawu*, kinaavaherera ekoomixi mmatatanimwaya.”" 
Genesis40:12 Yoseefe aamwaakhula: “Yoothapulela ti ela: Iphandi tthaaru sintaphulela mahuku mararu. 
Genesis40:13 Evinreene mahuku mararu, Farawu* anootaphule ni anoohokoloxere muteko waavaraawo khalayi. Hiiho onuuwinnyerere ekoomixi mmatatanimwaya a Farawu*, ntoko waakhovelenlaawo khalayi waaraawo mutokweene a anamarumeela a soowura." 
Genesis40:14 Kinoovekela weera wakuupuwelele miyo, itthu saaweettelaka nnenesene, ni waadyoonttelele aFarawu* weera yuupuwelele mulattwaaka weera miyo kikhume mukaliposo mu." 
Genesis40:15 Hapo kiroonyesererihiwa mweelaponi ya aHeberi nitho nno kheewo kipankaaka weera kiwaleliwe mukaliposomu.” 
Genesis40:16 Iiwaka mutokweene a anamooxa ipaawu etaphulelo yooreerela ele, aamweerera Yoseefe: “Vano miyotho kooloha kiirengyeene mipapara miraru sa ipaawu sootteela." 
Genesis40:17 Mumpaparani kiirengyaaka waakhala moota wootheene wa ipaawu ni soococowa soohiyanahiyana saasiva aFarawu*. Vanonto, saahoowa ipalame, sinaca seiyo kiirengyaaka.”" 
Genesis40:18 Yoseefe aamwaakhula: “Etaphulelo ti ela: “Mipapara miraru sintaphulela mahuku mararu. 
Genesis40:19 Eviraleene mahuku mararu, aFarawu* eniilamulele ohitiwawawo ni onuutthukeleliwe mmwirini, moota wooweera ipalame sinimoowa wookhuura.”" 
Genesis40:20 Eviraleene mahuku mararu yaari efesta yoowuupuweleliwa oyariwa wa Farawu*, ni owo aahaarehererela anamalakaawe yooca. Vamaithoni wa ootheene aalamulela oruuhiwa mutokweene a anamarumeela a soowura ni a anamooxa ipaawu weera erowe ohoolowawe." 
Genesis40:21 Aamuhokoloxeratho mutekwaawe mutokweene a anamarumeela a soowura, moota wooweera ole aahokoleela okhala yoole aamwinnyerera ekoomixi Farawu*." 
Genesis40:22 Vaheera aamutthukelela mmwirini mutokwene a anamooxa ipaawu, ntoko Yoseefe aataphulenlaawe." 
Genesis40:23 Wa soothesene, mutokweene a anamarumeela a soowura khamuupuwelenle Yoseefe. Ohiyanawaya, aamuttiwalaxa." 
Genesis41:1 Siviraleene iyaakha piili, Farawu* aaloha. Owo eera eemenleene mukerekhere wa mooloko Nilu." 
Genesis41:2 Vano saakhuma mmwe imombe ithiyana ithannapiili sooreeraxa ni sooneneva, sinapacera oca mutiilini." 
Genesis41:3 Vahoolowaya saakhumatho imombe ithiyana sikina ithannapiili soonanara ni soowoonda, sinarowa saaraayawo soopacera mukerekhere Nilu." 
Genesis41:4 Imombe ithiyana soowoonda ni soonanara saakhuura imombe ithiyana ithannapiili sooreera ni sooneneva. Vano vahoolowaya Farawu* aavenya mookonanimwawe. 
Genesis41:5 Aahokoleelatho okona, analoha moota mukina. Yaari makala mathannameeli a etrigu oowiitthwaxa ni ooreera muntathini mmoha." 
Genesis41:6 Woottharelana yaathapuruwa makala makina mathannameeli oopheepuwa ni oowuuma niwoko na epheyo engweela ninkhuma nsuwa. 
Genesis41:7 Makala makina mathannameeli oopheepuwa yaamira makala mathannameeli makina yaari oowiitthwaxa ni ooreera. Mwa yeeyo Farawu* aavenya, anoona weera waari oloha." 
Genesis41:8 Oxaawaya aari oohitteene, analamulela wiitthaniwa anamatthoma ni asuweli ootheene a wExipitu weera etaphulele soolohasawe, mene khaawo aawenre." 
Genesis41:9 Mutokweene a anamarumeela a soowura aamweerela Farawu*: “Vekhaikhai olelo kinuupuwelelaaka ohiyanyihawaka. 
Genesis41:10 Ekwaha emoha Farawu* aanyoonyeringwaawe arumeiyaawe eeli, aalamulela okitthuka vamoha ni mutokweene a anamooxa ipaawu vaate wa mutokweene a anamalipelela." 
Genesis41:11 Ohiyu mmoha, hiyo ooweeli naakhalano yooloha ni khula yooloha yaakhalano etaphulelowaaya." 
Genesis41:12 Vano, aakhalawo vamoha ni hiyo mmiravo mmoha muHeberi aari murumeiyi a mutokweene a anamalipelela a Farawu*. Naamuthalihera soolohasahu, ni owo aanitaphulela anithaliheraka ooweeli hiyo etaphulelo ya khula yooloha." 
Genesis41:13 Sootheene saaheereya mooteene yoowo aanitaphulenlaawe: Farawu* ookihokoloxera mutekwaaka, vaheera mukina ootthukeleliwa. ”" 
Genesis41:14 Farawu* aalamulela wiitthaniwa Yoseefe, aaruuhiwe woowaakuveya okaliposo. Ametthiwakaru, aaceendya yoowara, aniixoonihera wa Farawu*." 
Genesis41:15 Farawu* aamweerela Yoseefe: “Miyo kooloha, mene khaawo owenre okitaphulela. Miyo kohiiwa yeeriwaka wiiwa yakhalaru yooloha onoowera otaphulela.”" 
Genesis41:16 Yoseefe aamwaakhula: “Iwo khoohiyono owerawaka. Ti Muluku anaavahe aFarawu* yoowaakhula yooreerela.” 
Genesis41:17 Vanonto Farawu* aamuthalihera Yoseefe yoolohaawe: “Miyo kilonghe keemenleene mukerekhere mooloko Nilu," 
Genesis41:18 sikhumakaru mmoolokoni imombe ithiyana ithannapiili sooneneva ni sooreera saapacera oca mutiilini. 
Genesis41:19 Vahoolowaya saakhuma sikina ithannapiili samarewe, soowoonda ni soonanara, moota miyo kihitonkwaaka woona wExipitu wootheene nno." 
Genesis41:20 Imombe soowoonda ni soonanara ithannapiili saakhuura iye ithannapiili sooneneva saapacenre okhuma. 
Genesis41:21 Naari saarookhuuraru, kasaasuwanyeya weera sookhuura, niwoko sannapwaherera woonda ntoko seerenlaaya woopacera. Vahoolowaya kaavenya." 
Genesis41:22 Kaalohatho moota mukina. Kaahoona makala mathannameeli a etrigu yoowiitthwaxa ni yooreera muntathini mmoha. 
Genesis41:23 Woottharelana yaathapuruwatho makala makina mathannameeli oonyaala, oopheepuwa ni oowuumeene niwoko na epheyo engweela ninkhuma nsuwa." 
Genesis41:24 Makala mathannaneeli makina oopheepuwa yaamira makina ale ooreera. Kohaathalihera yeeyo anamatthoma, mene khaawo aawenre otaphulela.”" 
Genesis41:25 Yoseefe aamweerela Farawu*: “Sooloha soopiili sa Farawu* vekahaikhai sintaphulela etthu emoharu paahi. Ti Muluku ontthuna owoonihera aFarawu* yeeyo Owo aneeraawe apake. 
Genesis41:26 Imombe ithannapiili sooreera sintaphulela iyaakha ithannapiili, ni makala mathannameeli ooreera antaphulelatho iyaakha ithannapiili. Ti yooloha emohamoharu yeeyo paahi." 
Genesis41:27 Imombe ithannapiili soowoonda ni soonanara, saakhumme vahoolowaya sinoolikanatho iyaakha ithannapiili, hiiho ntoko makala mathannameeli oopheepuwa yuumihiwe ni epheyo engweela ninkhuma nsuwa. Iyo siri iyaakha ithannapiili sa etala sineera siweeke." 
Genesis41:28 Ti yeeyoweene ntoko kooleenlaakani aFarawu: Muluku oowoonihera aFarawu* yeeyo aneeraawe apake. 
Genesis41:29 Sinimoowa iyaakha ithannapiili sa oruwera otokotoko wExipitu wootheene. 
Genesis41:30 Vahoolowaya nsiwe iyaakha ithannapiili sa etala. Vano ehuhu yootheene yooruwera eniittiwaliwe hapo etala eniihele mathala elapo yootheene. 
Genesis41:31 Etala eniirwe eniikhale etokotoko moota wooweera iyaakha sooruweriwa sivinre khasirwa suupuweleliwa. 
Genesis41:32 aFarawu* yaaloha imaara piili, niwoko Muluku oolakela okwanihera yeeyo ni eniyereye woowaakuveya." 
Genesis41:33 Tivawo, mmwaase nyuwo aFarawu* mulopwana mmoha a miruku ni oosuwela weera eettihe itthu sootheene sineera sikhumelele mweelaponi ya wExipitu." 
Genesis41:34 Ontthuneya waakhalihatho ahooleli mweelaponi yootheene weera elamuleke nnenesene ni ethokorore mpatta wanaathanu wa yoohepha ya wExipitu mpuwa mwa iyaakha ithannapiili sooruweriwa. 
Genesis41:35 Awo ethukumanyihe sooca iyo sa iyaakha sooruweriwa sinrwa. Ethokororeketho etrigu musidadeni sootheene weera sikhale sooca sa muhoolo. Sootheene iyo silamuleliweke ni aFarawu*. 
Genesis41:36 Yeeyo eneera ethokororiweke ekhale yoowiisungera wa iyaakha ithannapiili sa etala eneera eweeke wExipitu. Hiiho etala kheewa ephwata elapo.” 
Genesis41:37 Yoovaanela ya Yoseefe yaamusiveliha Farawu* nitho anamalakaawe. 
Genesis41:38 Farawu* aahaakoha anamalakaawe: “Weeraka nnoomphwanya mukina ntoko mulopwana ola ookhalano Munepa wa oMuluku?” 
Genesis41:39 Vano aamweerela Yoseefe: “Eenre Muluku awooniheraka itthu sootheene iya, khawowo mukina a miruku ni oosuwela ntoko weyo." 
Genesis41:40 Okhaleke mutokweene oolamula vaatewaka ni mulokwaaka wootheene wiiweleleke malamulowaawo. Miyo paahi nkikhale mutokweene oowoopwaha weyo, niwoko ti mwene.”" 
Genesis41:41 Farawu* aapwaherera: “Vanonto kingwinnyerera weyo ohoolela elapo yootheene ya wExipitu.” 
Genesis41:42 Ahimakaru yeeyo, Farawu* aamurula munelaawe oottittano aangwanraawe vakathani, anangwariha Yoseefe, anangwarihatho soowara sooreeraxa ni aangwariha muxikomwawe onyooro wa eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Genesis41:43 Vahoolowaya, aangweliha mukaaroni yanaaveeli ya omwene, ni atthu yannakhuwela vahoolowawe: “Muhule ephiro!” Hiiho Yoseefe aavahereriwa ohoolela elapo yootheene ya wExipitu." 
Genesis41:44 Farawu* aamweerelatho Yoseefe: “Miyo ti Farawu*, mene weyo waahilamulela etthu, khaawo aneera apakeke yakhalaru etthu wExipitu nno.”" 
Genesis41:45 Farawu* aamutteha Zafenati-Paneya, anamvaha Asenati, mwaana muthiyana a Potifari, musaserdoti* a wOni, weera amutheleke. Vahoolowaya, Yoseefe aapacera weetteetta elapo yootheene ya wExipitu." 
Genesis41:46 Yoseefe aarino iyaakha miloko miraru sa oyariwawawe aapacenraawe omurumeela Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu. Vahoolowaya, aamulaxera Farawu*, anapacera weetteetta elapo ya wExipitu yootheene." 
Genesis41:47 Mweehuhuni ya iyaakha itthannapiili sa oruweriwa, elapo ya wExipitu yaaruwera soohepa soowaattaxa." 
Genesis41:48 Hiihaawo owo aalamulela othukumanyiwa sooca saathokororiwe mweehuhuni ya iyaakha ithannapiili sooruweriwa wExipitu, analamulelatho othokororiwa musidade etrigu yaahanle mmamattani wa khula muttetthe." 
Genesis41:49 Hiiho Yoseefe aawera othokorora etrigu yoowaattaxa, ntoko muhaava wa mphareiyani. Aathokorora etrigu yoowaattaxa moota wooweera Yoseefe aahiya ophima niwoko khaawo yeera ewere waalikela." 
Genesis41:50 Nlelo sihinaaye ophiyera iyaakha sa etala, Asenati, mwaana muthiyana a Potifari, musaserdoti* a wOni, aamuyarela Yoseefe anamwane asilopwana eeli." 
Genesis41:51 Wa antthaara, Yoseefe aamutteha Manaxe, eeraka: “Muluku ookittiwaliha ohaawawaka wootheene, ni vaate wa atithaka wootheene.”" 
Genesis41:52 Wa mwaana anaaveeli, aamutteha Efrayimi, eeraka: “Muluku ookiweriha oyara mweelaponi kihaawiyaaka.”" 
Genesis41:53 Hiiho waaphiya ommaleloni wa iyaakha iye sooruweriwa wExipitu. 
Genesis41:54 Vanonto saapacera iyaakha ithannapiili sa etala mooteene yoole Yoseefe aahimmaawe. Mweelaponi sootheene sikina yaakhala etala etokotoko, vaheera wExipitu yaakhalawo yooca." 
Genesis41:55 wExipitu wootheene opacerakaru ohaaweya mwaha wa etala, muloko ole waapacera omukhuwelela Farawu* mwaha wa yooca. Owo aahaakhula ha: “Murowe wa Yoseefe ni mwapakeke yeeyo owo aneeraawe oolamulelekeni.”" 
Genesis41:56 Vanonto yaakwanenlaaya etala mweelaponi yootheene ya wExipitu, Yoseefe aalamulela ohuleliwa impa sootheene yaathokororiwe etrigu, anapacera waathumihera atthu a wExipitu." 
Genesis41:57 Vano atthu a ilapo sootheene yannarowa wa Yoseefe weera ethume etrigu wExipitu, niwoko etaleene yeele yaatepaxa waatta mweelaponi yootheene." 
Genesis42:1 Yakobe, oonaka weera yaakhala yooca wExipitu, aaweerela anamwanaawe: “Heeni muraanyu xiixee ngwehanaka mukina ni mukhwaawe?”" 
Genesis42:2 Aaheeratho: “Kohiiwa weera yookhala etrigu wExipitu. Murowewo weera mwathume etrigu weera nihikhwe etala.” 
Genesis42:3 Hiiho axuneiye Yoseefe yaarowa wExipitu weera yathume etrigu. 
Genesis42:4 Yakobe khaamuhiyale Benyamini, munneiye Yoseefe, arowaka ni yaawo, oovaka weera eniimukhumelele etthu yoonanara." 
Genesis42:5 Anamwane a Yixrayeli yaarowa othuma etrigu yaatakansana vamoha ni akina yaarowelatho etthweene yeeyo, niwoko etala yaakwanela elapo yootheene ya oKanaani." 
Genesis42:6 Yoseefe aari ti yoowo aahoolela elapo yootheene ya wExipitu nitho aari ti yoowo aathumihera etrigu miloko sootheene sa mweelaponi. Tivawo, ephiyakaru axunneiye Yoseefe, yaamukokhorenlaaya ohoolowawe." 
Genesis42:7 Awoonaka axunneiye, Yoseefe aahaasuwela, mene iixeera weera khaasuwenle ni aawuulumela ni owali: “Mungweela woowi nyuwosa?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “Ningweela oKanaani weera nithume yooca.”" 
Genesis42:8 Yoseefe aahaasuwela axunneiye, mene awosa khayaamusuwenle." 
Genesis42:9 Yoseefe aahuupuwelela soolohasawe mwaha wa yaale, aneera: “Nyuwosa anamahottela! Murweenle woona mipatta heeni sa elapo ela sihikhapeleleiyaayawo!”" 
Genesis42:10 Awosa yaamweerela: “Hata vakhaani apwiya! Arumeiyaanyu ala arweenle paahi othuma yooca. 
Genesis42:11 Ootheene hiyo ti anamwane a tiithi mmoharu. Arumeiyaanyu ti atthu oororomeleya, khaahiyono anamahottela!”" 
Genesis42:12 Yoseefe aanyesera: “Hoye! Nyuwo murweenle paahi woona mipatta heeni sa elapo sihikhapeleleiyaayawo.” 
Genesis42:13 Awo yaanyesereratho: “Arumeiyaanyu yaari axunna muloko neeli, ootheene anamwane a tiithi mmoharu onkhala elapo ya oKanaani. Vano neetthaako ohanle owaani ni atiithi ni mukina ohookhwa.”" 
Genesis42:14 Wa soothesene, Yoseefe aaheera: “Ti yeele miyo kooleenlaakani. Nyuwo anamahottela!" 
Genesis42:15 Miyo kinoowootani murima. Kinlipela mwa okumi wa Farawu* weera khamurwa mvenyasa mweelaponimu ahinaaye orwa munninyu neetthaako. 
Genesis42:16 Mmoha a nyuwo arowe amukuxe munninyu neetthaako akinaawo engwehereraka okaliposo. Hiiho onookupaleya maswaanyu yaareene a ekhaikhai naari hoye. Vano yaahikhala ekhaikhai kinlipela mwa okumi wa Farawu* weera onimooneya weera nyuwosa anamahottela.” 
Genesis42:17 Yoseefe aahaawalela mukaliposo mwemmo mahuku mararu. 
Genesis42:18 Ommaleloni wa mahuku mararu ale Yoseefe aweerela: “Miyo kimmoova Muluku. Tivawo mwatthuna wuurela okumaanyu, mweereke ha:" 
Genesis42:19 Nyuwosa mwaareene atthu oororomeleya, munghiye munninyu mmoha mukaliposo mu. Vanonto muhokoloweke, mukuxaleene etrigu weera mwiive etala mweemusinimwanyu." 
Genesis42:20 Wa soothesene, mwakiruuhele nno munninyu neetthaako ekupaleeleye maswaanyu ni muhikhwe.” Vano ale yaahiireherera weera epake yeeyo." 
Genesis42:21 Yaaheerelana: “Vekhaikhai ninttaruxeliwa yeeyo nimpankaahu munnihu, niwoko naamoona moota owo aakacamiheiyaawe aanidyoonttelelaawe mwa okumaawe, mene khanaamwiiwelenle. Tivawo aniweenlaaya makacamiho ala.”" 
Genesis42:22 Rubeni aaweerela: “Miyo kaahooleelani nnenesene weera muhimpakele etthu yoonanara mmiravo ole, mene khamwaakiiwelenle. Vanonto okhwawawe munnihu wooniphwanya.”" 
Genesis42:23 Vano ale khayaasuwela weera Yoseefe aamwiiwexexa yeele yuulumaaya, hapo yuuluma ni Yoseefe emvarelaka muteko namataphulela." 
Genesis42:24 Yoseefe aavenya vaavaale, anapacera wiinla ni, amalihakaru wiinla, aahokololeela wuuluma ni yaawo. Aamuthanla Simeyoni, analamulela otthukiwa ni onyooro vamaithoniwaya." 
Genesis42:25 Vano Yoseefe aalamulela weera esarihiwe etrigu musaakhonimwaya, ni ahokoloxeriwe khula mutthu musurukhwaawe. Aalamulelatho weera evahiwe booso a munkwahani, ni hiiho waahereya." 
Genesis42:26 Awo yaatthukelela isaakho sa etrigu mwaabuurunimwaya, enapwaha." 
Genesis42:27 Vanipuroni yeemenlaaya weera ekonele, mmoha a yaawo aataphula esaakhwaawe weera amvahe yooca buurwaawe, anoona musurukhu owanoni wa esaakho ele." 
Genesis42:28 Aahaathalihera axunneiye: “Aakihokoloxera musurukhu! Mooneke musaakhonimwaka mu!” Awosa yaatuthuwa ni ethukumelasaka, yaaheerelana: “Eheeni yeela Muluku onipankaawe?”" 
Genesis42:29 Ephiyakaru vaate wa atithaya, Yakobe, elapo ya oKanaani, yaahaathalihera sootheene seiye saakhumelenle, yeeraka:" 
Genesis42:30 “Mulopwana ole onghoolela elapo ele oonuulumela ni owali, mpaka oneerela hiyo anamahottela a elapo." 
Genesis42:31 Vano hiyo noomuroromeliha weera nri atthu oororomeleya ni khanihiyono anamahottela. 
Genesis42:32 Noomuleelatho weera naari axunna muloko neeli, anamwane a tiithi mmoha, ni weera mmoha ohookhwa, ni neetthaako ohanle ni atiithi oKanaani." 
Genesis42:33 Mulopwana onghoolela elapo ele ooneerela: ‘Nnoone nyuwosa mwaareene atthu oororomeleya: Mmoha a axunninyu ahaleke wenno ni miyo. Akinaawo eroweke ni ekuxeke yooca weera yiive etala mweemusinimwanyu. 
Genesis42:34 Vahoolowaya mwakiruuhele munninyu neetthaako. Hiiho kinoosuwela weera khamuhiyono anamhottela, mene atthu oororomeleya. Vahoolowaya kinimoohokoloxerani munninyu ni munoowera ompaka nakoso mweelaponimu.’”" 
Genesis42:35 Woowiittha esaakho ya khula mutthu waakhalamo murupa woosareya musurukhu. Vano awosa ni atithaya yoonaka mirupa soosareya musurukhu, yaahoova." 
Genesis42:36 Yakobe aaweerela: “Nyuwosa munoovira mukimaliheraka anamwanaaka. Yoseefe ohookhwa, Simeyoni khakhanle vaava, vano nlelo muntthuna okaakha Benyamini! Olatta wookikhuruwela.”" 
Genesis42:37 Rubeni aawaakhula atithawe: “Ngwiiveke anamwanaaka eeli miyo kaahimuhokoloxa Benyamini. Kinoomulipano ni miyo nkimuhokoloxe.” 
Genesis42:38 Yakobe aamwaakhula: “Mwanaka kharowa vamoha ni nyuwo, niwoko amunnawaawe ahookhwa, ni ohanle yoola paahi. Yamukhumelela erisa munkwahani muneeraanyu mweette, nthowa nnikhale nawinyu weera namuuluvala ola akhwe moothananani.”" 
Genesis43:1 Etala yaawirima mulaponi. 
Genesis43:2 Emalihakaru etrigu anamwane a Yakobe yaaruuhalaaya wExipitu, atithaya yaaweerela: “Muhokoleeletho wExipitu weera mwathumetho yooca.”" 
Genesis43:3 Yuda aawaakhula: “Mulopwana ole aanoopereraxa weera nihihokoleelewotho nihimukuxale munnihu ola. 
Genesis43:4 Mwanivaherera munnihu, nnirowe ni nnoothumeleni yooca." 
Genesis43:5 Mwaahinivaherera, khanirowa, niwoko mulopwana ole eenre ha: ‘Muhihokoleele kiraaka muhikiruuhenle neetthaako.”" 
Genesis43:6 Yixrayeli aahaakoha: “Heeni munkithananihaanyu munleelaka mulopwana owo weera ookhalatho munna mukinatho?” 
Genesis43:7 Awo yaawaakhula: “Ti mulopwana owo aanikohakonghe sa emusaahu. Aanikoha: ‘Atithinyu nlelo akumi? Nyuwosa mookhalano munninyu mukina? Vano hiyo naakhunle paahi yeeyo owo aanikonghaawe. Naarowa osuwela hai weera ole aarowa oninyesereriha omukuxa munnihu?” 
Genesis43:8 Yuda aahaavekela atithawe, Yixrayeli: “Munghiye mmiravo arowe ni miyo. Hiiho nnipwahe woowaakuveya weera hiyo ootheene nikhale ni okumi, nihikhwaaka etala." 
Genesis43:9 Miyo kohiipereka muneenaaka, kinoomulipano mukiweheke miyo kineera kingwehawehe. Miyo kaahimuhokoloxa, ni kaahimwiikaathi nnenesene va, nkikhale ni nthowa ohoolowanyu mookuminimwaka wootheene." 
Genesis43:10 Ori woowooneyawene, nahaapinse, sano nirongweene ni nihokolongweene imaara piili.”" 
Genesis43:11 Atithaya, Yixrayeli, yaaweerela: “Hapo yoheereya hiiho, nneere ha: Muhele musaakhonimwanyu itthu soottittikala nraahuno mweelaponi ni mwamvahe mulopwaneene yoowo. Mukuxeke ebalsamu*, oravo, itthu sooreerela, emiira* ni mutteesa a epistasiyo* ni a emandoweira*." 
Genesis43:12 Mukuxeke musurukhu woopwaha yoowo muhokoloxeringwaanyu weera muhokoloxe yoowo waaheliwe musaakhonimwanyu ni mwathumetho yooca. Apaale waari otapanya. 
Genesis43:13 Munkuxeketho munninyu, ni muhokoleele wa mulopwana owo." 
Genesis43:14 Muluku a ikuru sootheene oomoreliweni ikharari vamaithoni wa mulopwaneene yoowo weera owo atthunihere omuhokoloxa munninyu ni Benyamini vamoha ni nyuwosa. Vano, kaahikhalano anamwane, kheewo yooweera.”" 
Genesis43:15 Asilopwana ale yaarowa wExipitu ekuxaka soovaha, musurukhu woopwaha ni Benyamini. Ephiyakaru, yaahiixoonihera wa Yoseefe." 
Genesis43:16 Yoseefe amoonakaru Benyamini areene ni yaale, aamweerela mutokweene a vaatewawe: “Waaronghe asilopwana ala owannyaka, wiive enama emoha, wareherere, niwoko eniice ni miyo othana eriyari.”" 
Genesis43:17 Mulopwana ole aapaka yeeyo Yoseefe aamulamulenlaawe, anaaroiha asilopwana ale owannyawe Yoseefe." 
Genesis43:18 Yoonaka weera yaaroihiwa owannyawe Yoseefe, yaapacera woova yeerelanaka: “Ti niwoko na musurukhu hiyo naaphwannyaahu musaakhoni emaara yoopacera. Owo onooniwanano, aninyesereraka weera nikhale ipotthasawe ni onoowaakamelatho abuurwaahu.”" 
Genesis43:19 Evolowaka vaate wa Yoseefe, yaamwaattamela mulopwana aakunxe, enamweerela:" 
Genesis43:20 “Mwiiwe apwiya! Emaara yoopacera hiyo naarwiiyaahu wExipitu nno, vekhaikhai naatthuna othuma etrigu paahi." 
Genesis43:21 Vano, nihokoleelaka owaani, naaheemela mphironi ni naaphwanya musaakhonimwahu musurukhu wa khula mutthu aaruuhalaawe mpaka wookwaneleene. Tivawo nihokolonxaahu musurukhu ole." 
Genesis43:22 Nooruuha musurukhu mukinatho weera nithume etrigu. Khanimusuwenle taani aahenle musurukhu ole musaakhonimwahu.” 
Genesis43:23 Mulopwana ole aawaakhula: “Mukakamuwe. Mulukwaanyu ni Muluku a atithinyu, ti Yoowo aahenle muhakhu musaakhonimwanyu, niwoko musurukhwaanyu kaahaakhelela.” Mulopwana ole aamutaphula Simeyoni, anamuroiha vaavaale yaaraayawo." 
Genesis43:24 Vahoolowaya aahaaroiha vaate wa Yoseefe, anaavaha maahi weera erapiheke inaawosaya, anaavahatho yooca abuurwaaya." 
Genesis43:25 Awosa yaareherera soovahasaya, ewehereraka orwa wa Yoseefe othana eriyari, niwoko yaasuwela weera yaarowa oca vaavaale." 
Genesis43:26 Yoseefe aphiyakaru vaatewawe, awosa yaamvaha soovaha yaaruuhalaaya, enuuramela ohoolowawe." 
Genesis43:27 Awuulumihakaru, aahaakoha: “Ari salaama atithinyu, mulopwana oowuuluvala mwaakileenlaanyu? Nlelo ori ni okumi?”" 
Genesis43:28 Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Murumeiyaanyu, atithihu, nlelo akumi ni aneetta ni salaama. Vahoolowaya yaahuuramatho emooniheraka nttittimiho.”" 
Genesis43:29 Awehaka mukhwipimwawe, Yoseefe aamoona munneiye Benyamini aayariwe ni amayaya amoharu, anaakoha: “Ti yoola munninyu neetthaako mwaakileenlaanyu?” Vahoolowaya aamweerela: “Muluku oovahe mahala, mwanaka.”" 
Genesis43:30 Yoseefe waamuumaxa owanoni mwaha wa munneiye ole moota wooweera aatthuna wiinla. Tivawo aavennyaawe woowaakuveya, anavolowa mukwaartunimwawe, aniinla." 
Genesis43:31 Asuusulakaru ni omukhurunuwaka murima, aahokolowa, aneera: “Niceeke.”" 
Genesis43:32 Yaamvahera wawawe emwalamwaxaka ni axunneiye mpakatho awExipitu yaaca ni yoowo, niwoko khawaatthunihereya oca ni aHeberi. Wa yaawo ocano ti mwiikhowaaya" 
Genesis43:33 Axunneiye Yoseefe yaakilaathiye ohoolowawe ethataanneene nnenesene okhuma mutokweene mpaka mukhaani, ni yaawehana ncerekhule." 
Genesis43:34 Yoseefe aalamulela weera eceeke vameesa vamoharu ni yoowo, ni waatta wa yooca ya Benyamini waari wookwana miceco mithanu waapwaha asikhwaawe. Vano, awosa yaapaka efesta, enawura yaatthunelaaya." 
Genesis44:1 Yoseefe aamulamulela mutokweene a vaatewawe: “Osarihe etrigu musaakhoni sa asilopwana ale, ni ohokoloxere musurukhu wa khula mutthu owanoni wa esaakhwaawe." 
Genesis44:2 Vahoolowaya ohele ekoomixaaka ela ya eyuuma yoorikaxa owanoni wa esaakho ya neetthaako, vamoha ni musurukhu owo olimvaaweno etrigu.” Mulopwana ole aapaka sootheene ntoko Yoseefe aamulamulenlaawe." 
Genesis44:3 Oxaawaya, axunna ale ni abuurwaaya yaaraxeliwa." 
Genesis44:4 Hiiho, nlelo ehinaaye orakamela esidade, Yoseefe aamweerela mutokweene a vaatevawe: “Waatthimakele woowaakuveya asilopwana ale ni waaphwanya, waweerele: “Heeni mwaakakhanyihalaanyu yooreera ni yoonanara?" 
Genesis44:5 Mohiiya ekoomixi ya apwiyaaka, mwa yeeyo yaawurelaaya ni yaatthomaayano. Nyuwosa moopaka etthu yoonanaraxa!”" 
Genesis44:6 Mulopwana ole aaphwanyakaru, aaphitela masu ale." 
Genesis44:7 Ale yaamwaakhula: “Heeni apwiya aneeraaya hiiho? Ottai wa arumeiyaaya opaka etthweene yeela. 
Genesis44:8 Moone, musurukhu hiyo naaphwannyaahu musaakhonimwahu, nohoohokoloxerani mweelaponi ya oKanaani. Ongwereya hayi wiiya itthu sa iyuuma soorikaxa sa vaate wa apwiyaanyu?" 
Genesis44:9 Mmoha a hiyo aphwanyaniwa yeeyo, anaakhwe. Vano hiyo ootheene akina nnikhale ipottha sa Yoseefe.”" 
Genesis44:10 Mulopwana ole aawaakhula: “Kinimwaakhulela. Nneere ha: Yoowo kineeraaka kimpwanyane ekoomixi, anaakhale epotthaaka, mene wa akina kheekhalano mulattu.”" 
Genesis44:11 Khula mutthu a yaawo aakuruxa esaakhwaawe, anataphula." 
Genesis44:12 Mulopwana ole aakungura apaceraka wa mutokweene mpaka wa mukhaani, anaphwanya ekoomixi musaakhoni ya Benyamini." 
Genesis44:13 Vahoolowaya awosa yaahaahula soowarasaya, enawelihatho isaakho mwaabuurunimwaya, enahokoleela osidade." 
Genesis44:14 Yuda ni axunneiye yaaphiyaaya vaate wa Yoseefe, owo nlelo aari weiwo. Vano awosa yaahiikuhera vathi ohoolowawe." 
Genesis44:15 Yoseefe aahaakoha: “Mukipanke eheeni? Khamusuwenle weera miyo kinoowera oloha?” 
Genesis44:16 Yuda aamwaakhula: “Nneereke hai wa apwiyaaka? Nnihimekeni? Moota heeni nneeraahu nooviriyeleni weera hiyo khaninono nthowa? Muluku oomwaleela nthowa na arumeiyaanyu. Vano noolikana weera nikhale ipotthasanyu vamoha ni yoowo ophwanyaningwe ekoomixaanyu.” 
Genesis44:17 Wa soothesene, Yoseefe aawaakhula: “Hata vakhaani nkimpaka etthweene yeeyo. Paahi yoowo ophwanyaningwe ekoomixaaka aneera akhale epotthaaka, mene nyuwosa muhokoleeleke vaate wa atithinyu mmuretteleni.”" 
Genesis44:18 Yuda aamwaattamela anamweerela: “Dyoontte apwiyaaka. Muntthunihere murumeiyaanyu ola weera uulume nsu nimoha vamaithoniwanyu, ni muhikinyoonyeriwe muroolikanaru ni Farawu*." 
Genesis44:19 Apwiyaaka mwaanikoha weera nookhalano atithihu ni munnihu mukina. 
Genesis44:20 Hiyo naawaakhulani weera nlelo nookhalano atithihu oowuuluvaleene, mwanaya neetthaako amuyanre yuuluvanleene. Vano amunnawaawe a amayawe amoharu ahookhwa ni ola ohanle meekhaawe ni atithawe, annamusivela vancipale." 
Genesis44:21 Apwiyaaka mwaaweerela arummeyaanyu ala: ‘Mwakiruuhele wenno weera kimoone.’ 
Genesis44:22 Vano hiyo naawaakhulani apwiyaaka, weera mmiravo owo khawaawereya waahiya atithawe, niwoko aahiya, atithawe animookhwa." 
Genesis44:23 Apwiyaaka mwaanyeserera mweeraka: ‘Mwaahimuruuha munninyu neetthaako, khamungwera ohokoleela wenno." 
Genesis44:24 Nihokoleelakaru wa murumeiyaanyu, atithihu, naahaathalihera yeeyo apwiyaaka mwaahimalaanyu." 
Genesis44:25 Atithihu yaanirummaaya ohokoleelatho wExipitu weera nithume etrigu," 
Genesis44:26 hiyo naawaakhula: ‘Nnihokoleelewo paahi namukuxa munnihu neetthaako. Vano khoongwereya ophiya ohoolo wa mulopwana ole munnihu neetthaako aahikhala ni hiyo. 
Genesis44:27 Tthiri, murumeiyaanyu, atithihu, aneerenle: ‘Moosuwelasa nnenesene weera amwaaraka kaayaranne anamwane eeli paahi." 
Genesis44:28 Mmoha a yaawo oottakaneela ni kaaheera: ‘Vekhaikhai oonyaanyiwa ni mpaka olelo nkimmoona. 
Genesis44:29 Vano nyuwosa mwakaakha Benyamini olatho ni yamukhumelela erisa, namuuluvala ola anaakhwe moothananani.’" 
Genesis44:30 Tivawo, nahokoleela wa murumeiyaanyu, atithihu, nihimurowanne munnihu, yanoonaru atithihu, ehireere osiveliwa ni yoowo," 
Genesis44:31 yoona weera munnihu khakhanle ni hiyo, vano arumeiyaanyu eniyaatannyere atithaya okhwa moothananani." 
Genesis44:32 Ohiya hiiho, murumeiyaanyu ohaaroromeliha atithawe omulipano mmiravo aweerelaka: ‘Kaahooruuhelani ola, miyo nkikhaleno nthowa wa mmiravo ola mookuminimwaka wootheene.’" 
Genesis44:33 Tivawo kinoovekelaakani, dyoontte munghiye murumeiyaanyu akhale ntoko epotthaanyu vanipuroni na mmiravo ni mutthunihere weera owo ahokolowe ni axunneiye." 
Genesis44:34 Khoongwereya ohokoleela wa atithaka kihimukuxale mmiravo. Hoye, kihoone erisa eneera yaarweele atithaka.”" 
Genesis45:1 Emaareene yeele Yoseefe aahooceela ovilela. Aahaalamula yaale yaamvarela muteko: “Mukivenyerase.” Vano hiiho khaawo aahanle ni yoowo ehuhu Yoseefe iisuwelihaawe wa axunneiye. 
Genesis45:2 Yoseefe aakhuwela iinlaka moota wooweera mpaka awExipitu wiiwa, ni ihabari iye saaphiya vaate wa Farawu*." 
Genesis45:3 Yoseefe aaweerela axunneiye: “Miyo ti Yoseefe. Atithaka nlelo akumi?” Mene ale yaatteenguwa vamaithoniwawe woohiwera omwaakhula. 
Genesis45:4 Yoseefe aaweerela axunneiye: “Mukikhuveele.” Awosa emwaattamelakaru, aaweerela: “Miyo ti Yoseefe, munninyu yoole mwaamuthumihalaanyu wExipitu." 
Genesis45:5 Vano muhiithananiherase, naari muhiixoove niwoko na okithumiha wenno. Aari Muluku aakirumihale ohoolowanyu weera ancipale ekhale ni okumi." 
Genesis45:6 Hapo nrino iyaakha piili emvolaaya etala mweelaponi ni iyaakha ithanu sinrwa, khoorwa olimmwa naari ohemphwa." 
Genesis45:7 Muluku ookirumiha ohoolowanyu weera akhapelele ekhapiraanyu mweelaponimu, ni weera avuluxe okumaahu moota wootikhiniheya." 
Genesis45:8 Khamuhiyono nyuwosa mukiruuhale nno, mene aani Muluku muneene. Owo ookikhaliha ntoko namalaka a Farawu* ni muhooleli a vaatewawe wootheene ni elapo yootheene ya wExipitu." 
Genesis45:9 Muhokoleele woowaakuveya wa atithaka, mwaweerele: ‘Mwaninyu, Yoseefe, eenre ha: ‘Muluku ookikhaliha pwiiya a wExipitu wootheene. Nrwe wenno woowaakuveya.’" 
Genesis45:10 Nyuwosa mmwakhale elapo ya oGoxeni, ni hiiho mmwikhale vakhiviruwaka, nyuwosa vamoha ni anamwaniinyu, nitho osuulwaanyu, ikhondoolosanyu ni imombesanyu, ni sooreelasanyu sootheene." 
Genesis45:11 Miyo nkookhavihereni ni yooca, niwoko nlelo soohala iyaakha ithanu sa etala. Moota ola nyuwo ni amusaanyu ootheene ni mihuwosanyu sootheene khasirwa sihaawa." 
Genesis45:12 Nyuwosa ni munnaka Benyamini muneera moonaka ni maithwaanyu weera vekhaikhai ti miyo kinuuluma ni nyuwosa. 
Genesis45:13 Mwaaleele atithaka ovuwawaka wootheene wExipitu, ni sootheene nyeenyuweenesa moonnaanyu, ni mwaawiihe nno atithaka woowaakuveya.”" 
Genesis45:14 Vano iinlaka, owo aamutuphela munneiye Benyamini anamukhubaara, ni Benyaminitho aamukhubaara, iinlaka." 
Genesis45:15 Woottharelana, Yoseefe aahaabeca axunneiye ootheene ni aahiinla ni yaawosa. Vahoolowaya paahi yaawenraaya ontthekulano." 
Genesis45:16 Wiiwanyeyakaru wa Farawu* weera axunneiye Yoseefe ahoowa, owo ni anamalakaawe ootheene yaahakalalasa." 
Genesis45:17 Farawu* aamweerela Yoseefe: “Waaleele axunneiyo weera eweliheke mirittisaya mwaaxinamanimwaya, ehokoleeleke elapo ya oKanaani." 
Genesis45:18 Muhokoleeleke nno mwaaruuhaka atithinyu ni emusaanyu. Kinimoovahani nipuro nooreeraxa na wExipitu ni nyuwosa mmweereke ocano sooruuweriwa sa elapo ela. 
Genesis45:19 Mwaalamuleleketho weera ekuxe ikaaro sikina sa wExipitu weera yaaruuhelekeno axaaraya, anamwanaaya ni atithaya." 
Genesis45:20 Muhitthukuruwe ni sooreelasanyu, niwoko sooreerelaxa sootheene sa wExipitu nsikhale sawinyu.”" 
Genesis45:21 Vano anamwane a Yixrayeli yaapaka yeeyo. Yoseefe aahaavaha ikaaro ntoko Farawu* aalamulenlaawe, anaavahatho yooca wa mukwaahaaya." 
Genesis45:22 Wa khula mutthu aamvaha ikuwo sikina sinyowani. Wa soothesene, aamvaha Benyamini ixekeli* macira mararu ni ikuwo sinyowani sincipale." 
Genesis45:23 Aahaarumihela atithawe abuuru muloko ekunxeene sooreerelaxa saari wExipitu ni abuuru asithiyana muloko ekunxeene etrigu, ipaawu ni sooca sikina sa munkwahani." 
Genesis45:24 Vahoolowaya aahaaraxela axunneiye ni, epwahaka, Yoseefe aaweerela: “Muhicocopolaneke mphironi!”" 
Genesis45:25 Vano yaavenya wExipitu, enahokoleela wa atithaya, elapo ya oKanaani" 
Genesis45:26 ni yaahaathalihera ihabari iya: “Yoseefe ori ni okumi! Mwa yeeyo: Ti mutokweene a wExipitu wootheene.” Yakobe owanoni waamuuma ni khaawaakhulela. 
Genesis45:27 Mene emuthaliherakaru sootheene Yoseefe aaweerenlaawe, ni oonaka Yakobe ikaaro Yoseefe aaruminghaawe sookuxeriwano, munepaawe waakakhamuwa." 
Genesis45:28 Yakobe aaheera: “Kooviriyeliwa! Mwanaka Yoseefe nlelo mukumi! Kinoorowa kamoone kihinaaye okhwa.” 
Genesis46:1 Yixrayeli aattimula ni soorelasawe sootheene. Aaphiyaawe oBerxeba, aampakela yooveleela Muluku a atithawe Isaki." 
Genesis46:2 Vano Muluku aamuulumano Yixrayeli mmooneloni moohiyuni: “Yakobe, Yakobe!” Owo aamwaakhula: “Miyo kiri va.”" 
Genesis46:3 Owo aamweerela: “Miyo ti Muluku, aani, Muluku a atithinyu. Muhoove orowa wExipitu, niwoko kinimookhalihaniwo muloko mutokotoko." 
Genesis46:4 Miyo Yoomeene kinimoohoolani wExipitu ni vekhaikhai kinimoohokoloxani. Vano ntata na Yoseefe nniwale maithwaanyu.” 
Genesis46:5 Yakobe aattimula oBerxeba. Anamwane a Yixrayeli yaahaakuxa atithaya Yakobe, anamwanaaya ni axaaraya mukaaroni Farawu* aaruminghaawe." 
Genesis46:6 Yaakuxatho mihuwosaya ni sooreela yaaphwannyaaya oKanaani. Hiiho Yakobe aarowa wExipitu ni ekhapiraawe yootheene. 
Genesis46:7 Aahaarowano wExipitu anamwanaawe, asilopwana ni asithiyana ni axisulwaawe asilopwana ni asithiyana, eyo tiiyo ekhapiraawe yootheene." 
Genesis46:8 Vano masina a anamwane a Yixrayeli (eyo tiiyo Yakobe ni anamwanaawe) yaarongwe wExipitu ti ala: Rubeni, ntthaara na Yakobe." 
Genesis46:9 Anamwanaawe Rubeni yaari ala: Hanokhi, Palu, Hezironi ni Karimi." 
Genesis46:10 Anamwane a Simeyoni yaari ala: Yemuyeli, Yamini, Ohadi, Yaki, Zowari ni Xawuli, mwaana a muthiyana muKanaani." 
Genesis46:11 Anamwane a Leevi yaari ala: Gerxono, Kohathi ni Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Anamwane a Yuda yaari ala: Eri, Onani, Xela, Perezi ni Zera. Eri ni Onanitho yaahookhwa mweelaponi ya oKanaani. Anamwane a Perezi yaari ala: Hezironi ni Hamula." 
Genesis46:13 Anamwane a Isakari yaari ala: Tola, Puwa, Yope ni Ximeroni." 
Genesis46:14 Anamwane a Zebuloni yaari ala: Serede, Eloni ni Yaleyeli." 
Genesis46:15 Yaari yaala anamwane Leya aamuyarannaawe Yakobe oPadan-Arami omuhiya mwanawe muthiyana, Dina. Vano ekhapiraawe yootheene yaari miloko miraru naararu." 
Genesis46:16 Anamwane a Gadi yaari ala: Zifeyoni, Hagi, Xuni, Ezeboni, Eri, Arodi ni Ariyeli." 
Genesis46:17 Anamwane a Axeri yaari ala: Yimena, Yixeva, Yixevi ni Beriya. Vano murokoriye aari Sera. Anamwane a Beriya yaari ala: Heberi ni Malekiyeli." 
Genesis46:18 Ela yaari ekhapira Zilipa aamuyarannawe Yakobe. Vano aari Zilipa Labani aamvanghaawe mwanawe muthiyana, Leya, ntoko murumeiyi. Zilipa aahaayara wookwana anamwane muloko ni athannamosa." 
Genesis46:19 Anamwane a Rakheli, mwaariye Yakobe yaari ala: Yoseefe ni Benyamini." 
Genesis46:20 wExipitu, Asenati, mwaana muthiyana a Potifari musaserdoti* mmoha a wOni, aamuyarano Yoseefe anamwane eeli ala: Manaxe ni Efrayimi." 
Genesis46:21 Anamwane a Benyamini yaari ala: Bela, Bekeri, Axebeli, Gera, Nahamani, Ehi, Roxi, Mupimi, Hupimi ni Arede." 
Genesis46:22 Ala yaari anamwane Rakheli aamuyarannaawe Yakobe – muloko ni axexe. 
Genesis46:23 Mwaana a Dani aari Huximi. 
Genesis46:24 Anamwane a Nafitali yaari ala: Yakhezeyeli, Guni, Yezeri ni Xileme." 
Genesis46:25 Ala yaari anamwane Biliya aamuyarannaawe Yakobe. Vano aari Biliya yoowo Labani aamvanghaawe mwanawe muthiyana, Rakheli, ntoko murumeiyi. Biliya aahaayara anamwane athanneeli." 
Genesis46:26 Ootheene yaale yaarongwe wExipitu ni Yakobe – ekhapiraawe yootheene waahiya axaaraya anamwanaawe waapwexerera yaari atthweene miloko mithannamosa ni athannamosa. 
Genesis46:27 Navetho, yaalikeleliwa anamwane eeli Yoseefe aayanraawe wExipitu, epuumba ya emusi ya Yakobe yaarongwe wExipitu yaaphiyera miloko mithannamiili." 
Genesis46:28 Vano Yakobe aamuhooliha Yuda wa Yoseefe weera asuwele moota woorowa oGoxeni, enaphiya elapo ya oGoxeni." 
Genesis46:29 Yoseefe aawela ekaaro, anarowa oGoxeni weera aakumaneno atithawe Yakobe. Akumanakaru ni atithawe, aatthimaka weera aakhubaare, ni aakhubaaraka yaawo, aahiinla vancipale apisaka omaala." 
Genesis46:30 Yakobe aamweerela Yoseefe: “Vano kikhweeke hapo kohoona ekhovaawo ni koosuwela weera weyo nlelo mukumi!” 
Genesis46:31 Yoseefe aaweerela axunneiye ni emusi yootheene ya atithawe: “Kinoorowa kaaleele aFarawu* weera axunnaka ni emusi yootheene ya atithaka yaamanke mweelaponi ya oKanaani, ahoorwa wenno." 
Genesis46:32 Nkeere weera asilopwanaawo akukhuli ankosoopa mihuwo ni aarwaano mihuwosaya ni sootheene arinaaya.’ 
Genesis46:33 Vano Farawu* alamula owiitthanani ni ookohani: ‘Mumvara mutekoni?,’" 
Genesis46:34 mwamwaakhule ha: ‘Arumeiyaanyu anghuwa muhuwo okhuma enamwanaaya ntokotho yaapakaaya makholowaaya.’ Hiiho munootthuniheriwa omaka mweelaponi ya oGoxeni, niwoko akukhuli ootheene ari oonyoosiwa ni awExipitu.”" 
Genesis47:1 Yoseefe aarowa omuthalihera ihabari Farawu*: “Atithaka ni axunnaka ahoorwa wookhuma oKanaani ni mihuwosaya ni sooreelasaya sootheene ni vano ankhala mweelaponi ya oGoxeni.” 
Genesis47:2 Vahoolowaya aahaathanla athanu a axunneiye anamoonihera Farawu*. 
Genesis47:3 Farawu* aahaakoha: “Mumvara muteko heeni?” Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Arumeiyaanyu ti akukhuli ntoko makholowaaya.” 
Genesis47:4 Nlelo yaamweerelasa: “Nirwiiye omaka wenno mweehuhuni vakaani, niwoko mweelaponi ya oKanaani etala yoowirimaxa ni mihuwo sa arumeiyaanyu khasinono yooca. Vano, dyoontte, mutthunihere weera arumeiyaanyu ekhale mweelaponi ya oGoxeni.”" 
Genesis47:5 Farawu* aamweerela Yoseefe: “Atithinyu ni axunninyu yoorweenleni nyuwo. 
Genesis47:6 Elapo ya wExipitu moovahereriwa: Atithinyu ni axunninyu emakeke mpatta wooreerelaxa wa wExipitu. Mwaahiyeke emakeke oGoxeni. Ni nyuwo moona weera akina a yaawo anoowera, mwaakhaliheke ookosoopa mihuwosaka." 
Genesis47:7 Vano Yoseefe aahaarongha atithawe Yakobe wa Farawu* ni aawoonihera wa yoowo. Yakobe aamureeliha Farawu*. 
Genesis47:8 Vanonto Farawu* aamukoha Yakobe: “Pwiiya, murino iyaakha ihai?”" 
Genesis47:9 Yakobe aamwaakhula: “Iyaakha sa mukwaahaaka mweelaponi ya vathi soophiyera ncira ni miloko miraru. Iye siri vakhaani ni soorika ni khasimphiyera iyaakha sa mukwaahaaya makholowaaka.” 
Genesis47:10 Vano, Yakobe aamureeliha Farawu*, anapwaha." 
Genesis47:11 Hiiho Yoseefe aahaamakiha atithawe ni axunneiye ni aahaakawela mpatta wooreeraxa wooreerela wExipitu, eyo tiiyo elapo ya oRamesese, ntoko Farawu* aalamulenlaawe." 
Genesis47:12 Yoseefe aahaavahatho atithawe, axunneiye ni emusi yootheene ya atithawe yooca, attharihaka waatta wa anamwane a khula mutthu." 
Genesis47:13 Khayaariwo yooca elapo yootheene, niwoko etala yaawirima. Okhuma wExipitu mpaka oKanaani wannahaawiwa mwaha wa etala." 
Genesis47:14 Yoseefe aahuukanya musurukhu wootheene wa atthu yaari wExipitu ni oKanaani waaliviwano etrigu atthu yaathumaaya, anarongha empa ya emwene ya Farawu*." 
Genesis47:15 Omalakaru musurukhu wootheene mweelaponi ya wExipitu ni oKanaani, awExipitu ootheene yaamwaattamela Yoseefe emudyoonttelelaka: “Munivahe yooca. Muhinihiye nikhwaaka weenre musurukhwaahu omalaka.”" 
Genesis47:16 Vano Yoseefe aahaakhula: “Mwaahikhalano musurukhu, mukiruuhele mihuwosanyu ntoko nlivo na yooca.”" 
Genesis47:17 Hiiho yaamuruuhela Yoseefe mihuwo ni owo aahaavahasa etrigu yaakakhanyihaka ni ikavalusaya*, ikhondoolosaya, ipurisaya, imombesaya ni abuurwaaya. Ophiyera eyaakha yootheene ele owo aahaaciha yaakakhanyihaka ni mihuwosaya sootheene." 
Genesis47:18 Eyaakha yaamala, ni eyaakha yaattharelana yaahokoleela wa Yoseefe yeeraka: “Khannookhuwani etthu nyuwo apwiyaahu. Weenre musurukhwaahu omalaka ni mihuwosahu sikhalaka sawinyu, khaninono hata etthu emoha yoowoovahani, ohikhanle axineenaahu ni imattasahu." 
Genesis47:19 Muhinihiye nikhwaaka ni imattasahu sikhwelakhwelaka nyuwo moonaka! Munithume hiyo ni imattasahu naakakhanyihaka ni etrigu. Hiiho hiyo ni imattasahu nnikhale ipottha sa Farawu*. Munivahe etrigu weera nikhale ni okumi ni nihikhwe etala nitho weera elapo ehikhale meekhaaya.” 
Genesis47:20 Vano Yoseefe aathuma imatta sootheene sa wExipitu amuthumelaka Farawu*. Khula ngwExipitu aathumiha emattaawe woonaka weera etala ti yaaweeriha. Imatta sootheene saathatuwa sa Farawu*. 
Genesis47:21 Hiiho Yoseefe aahaakhaliha awExipitu ootheene ipottha – okhwipi ni okhwipi. 
Genesis47:22 Wa soothesene, paahi imatta sa asaserdoti* sahaathumihiwe, niwoko munlamuloni awo yannacihiwa ni Farawu* ni yaakhalela yeeyo. Tivawo yahaathuminghaaya imattasaya." 
Genesis47:23 Vano Yoseefe aaheerela muloko: “Mwiiwe! Olelo kohoothumasani, nyuwosa ni imattasanyu kimuthumelaka Farawu*. Mukuxe ezo ela weera mwaale mmatta." 
Genesis47:24 Mene nyuwosa mmumvahe Farawu* mpatta wanaathanu wa soohepha. Mipatta sinisihale, nsikhale sawinyu. Mvareleke muteko ntoko ezo wa imattasanyu, ni ntoko sooca sa nyuwo, anamwaniinyu ni atthu a vaatewanyu.”" 
Genesis47:25 Awo yaamwaakhula:“ Pwiiyaahu, nyuwo mohoopola okumaahu! Moonoonihera onnene ni nnikhale ipottha sa Farawu*.”" 
Genesis47:26 Hiiho Yoseefe aavaha nlamulo nimpwaherera mpaka olelo nneera weera mpatta wanaathanu wa soohepha wa elapo yootheene ya wExipitu ti wa Farawu*. Paahi imatta sa asaserdoti* sahaakhanle sa Farawu*. 
Genesis47:27 Vano aYixrayeli yaahiitekiha wExipitu mweelaponi ya oGoxeni. Weiwo yaaphwanya sawayasene, yaayarana, enaandyeererana." 
Genesis47:28 Yakobe aakhala iyaakha muloko niithannapiil wExipitu ni iyaakha sootheene sa okumaawe saari ncira ni miloko mixexe niithannapiili. 
Genesis47:29 Ekhuveelaka ehuhu ya okhwawawe, Yakobe aamwiitthana mwanawe Yoseefe, anamweerela: “Watthuna okisiveliha, wiikaathiki ntatananawo wiithela etakhwaaka ni okiroromeliheke weera onookoonihere onnene ni ororomeleya: Ohikivitheke mwExipitu." 
Genesis47:30 Miyo kaakhwaaka ntoko asitithaka, okivenxe wExipitu nno ni wakivithe vamoha ni yaawosa.” Yoseefe aamwaakhula: “Kinoopaka yeeyo mukivekenlaanyu.”" 
Genesis47:31 Yakobe aanyesera:“Olipele.” Vano Yoseefe aalipela ni Yakobe aahiixaatalela wayoophiteeraawe. 
Genesis48:1 Eviraka ehuhu ekina, aaheereliwa Yoseefe: “Atithinyu anoovoreiwa.” Vano aarowa owoona aakuxaka anamwanaawe eeli, Manaxe ni Efrayimi." 
Genesis48:2 Yakobe aaheereliwa: “Mwaninyu Yoseefe ohoorwa owoonani. Yixrayeli aahiilipihera, anakilaathi vakaamani." 
Genesis48:3 Yakobe aamweerela Yoseefe: “Muluku a ikuru sootheene aahiixoonihera oLuzi, mweelaponi ya oKanaani ni weiwe aakireeliha" 
Genesis48:4 akeerelaka: “Kinimoovahani ekhapira etokotoko ni mwa nyuwo nsikhumelele miloko sincipale. Nkivahe ekhapiraanyu elapo ela ntoko yawaya wa mahuku ootheene. 
Genesis48:5 Vano, anamwaniinyu eeli mwaayanraanyu wExipitu kihinaaye orwa nno eniisuweliwe ntoko awaka. Efrayimi ni Manaxe eniikhale awaka ntoko araaya awaka Rubeni ni Simeyoni." 
Genesis48:6 Anamwane eniiyariwe vahoolowaya eniikhale awawo; awo eniyaalikeliwe mpuumbani sa Efrayimi ni Manaxe yaphiyera ehuhu yoowaakhela yoohiyeriwa. 
Genesis48:7 Miyo kihokolowaka oPadan, wa othananawaka Rakheli aahookhwa mweelaponi ya oKanaani, hiyo nlelo nireene ni mukwaahaahu naattamelaka wEfrata. Vano kaamvitha vaavaale, mukerekhere ephiro enkela wEfrata, eyo tiiyo oBeteleheemu.”" 
Genesis48:8 Yakobe awoonakaru anamwane a Yoseefe, aakoha: “Alasa taani?”" 
Genesis48:9 Yoseefe aawaakhula atithawe: “Ti anamwane Muluku okivanghaawe wenno.” Yixrayeli aaheera: “Mukiruuhele va weera kaareelihe.” 
Genesis48:10 Yixrayeli maithwaawe yaari ookotakota niwoko na wuuluvala ni khaawera woona nnenesene. Tivawo Yoseefe aawaattamihenraawe anamwanaawe, ni atithawe yaahaabeca, enaakhubaara." 
Genesis48:11 Vano Yixrayeli aamweerela Yoseefe: “Nkuupuwelela weera nkoonetho ekhovaawo, ni vano Muluku ookitthunihera owoonatho anamwanaawo.”" 
Genesis48:12 Vahoolowaya Yoseefe aahaavenxasa mmakuthanimwaya, ni aahuuramela vathi ohoolowawe." 
Genesis48:13 Yoseefe aahaakuxa ooweeli – Efrayimi moono mulopwana vakhiviru wa moono muthiyana wa Yixrayeli ni Manaxe moonowaawe muthiyana vakhiviru wa moono mulopwana wa Yixrayeli ni aawaattamihera. 
Genesis48:14 Wa soothesene, Yixrayeli aahookola moono woolopwana aniikaathera vamuru wa Efrayimi aarookhalaru mukhaani ni avirikanyihaka nyoono, aahiikaathera moono woothiyana vamuru wa Manaxe aarookhalaru ntthaara." 
Genesis48:15 Vano aamureeliha Yoseefe eeraka: “Muluku aareelihe anamwane ala. Makholowaaka Abrahaamu ni Isaki yaamurumeela Muluku Owo, ni Owo aari Mukukhulaaka mahuku ootheene mpaka olelo." 
Genesis48:16 Aani, ti Mulukweene Yoowo aari ndyelo okivulunxe wa soonanara sootheene. Ekhale oowiitthaniwa mwa nsinanaka ni masina a atithaka Abrahamu ni Isaki nitho ekhalaneke ekhapira etokotoko mweelaponimu.”" 
Genesis48:17 Yoseefe awoonakaru atithawe emwiikaatheraka ntata na woolopwana vamuru wa Efrayimi, khaahakalanle. Tivawo aavanraawe moono wa atithawe eerelaka oceendya vamuru wa Efrayimi aronghaka wa Manaxe." 
Genesis48:18 Yoseefe aaweerela atithawe: “Hoye tiithi! Ntthaara ti nna. Mwiikaathere ntatananyu na woolopwana vamuruwawe. 
Genesis48:19 Mene atithawe yaakhootta yeeraka: “Koosuwela, mwanaka. Miyo koosuwela. Owotho anaathatuwe muloko. Anaakhaletho mutokweene mmoha. Wa soothesene, munneiye mukhaani anaakhale mutokweene ompwaha yoowo ni ekhapiraawe eniithatuwe miloko sincipale.”" 
Genesis48:20 Nihuku nne Yakobe aahaareeliha eeraka: “Muloko wa aYixrayeli onuuvarele muteko masinaanyu weera ereelihaneke ni masu: ‘Muluku oopakeeni nyuwo ntoko ompankaawe Efrayimi ni Manaxe.’ Hiiho aamunnuwiha Efrayimi amuhiyanyihaka Manaxe. 
Genesis48:21 Woottharelana Yixrayeli aamweerela Yoseefe: “Miyo kihanle vakhaani okhwa, mene Muluku anaakhale ni nyuwo ni anoohokoloxereni elapo ya makholowaanyu." 
Genesis48:22 Weenre okhalaka muhooleli a axunneiyo, kinimoovaha elapo ya onyaakoni kaakunxaaka wa awAmori ni ekatanaaka ni nyuurasaka." 
Genesis49:1 Vano Yakobe aawiitthana anamwanaawe aweerelaka: “Mukisuseerelase va weera koothalihereni yeeyo eneera yookhumelelaseni mmahukuni a muhoolo. 
Genesis49:2 Muthukumane ni mwiiwe, anamwane a Yakobe; ngwiiwelele atithinyu Yixrayeli!" 
Genesis49:3 Rubeni, weyo ntthaaranaka, ikurusaka ni eneneero yoopacera ya olopwanaaka – mutokweene munttittimihoni ni moowerani." 
Genesis49:4 Oowuupa ntoko maahi, khookhalatho mutokweene, niwoko woowela ekaama ya atithawo vankonaakawo ni khawuumaanle." 
Genesis49:5 Simeyoni ni Leevi ti axunna. Ikatanasaya ti ikapwiitthi sa nipuhero. 
Genesis49:6 Nkintthuna ovolowa anthukumanaayawo! Kihiyeke weera kihikhale mpatta wa ediyanxaaya, niwoko musaranimwaya yaawiiva atthu ni yaahintaka mapita a imombe mwayiini." 
Genesis49:7 Soolaphiwa sikhale isarasaya sootepaxa ni onyoonyiwawaya woonanaraxa! Kinimwaakawanyiha mweelaponi ya Yakobe ni kinimwaamwaramwaxa mwa Yixrayeli. 
Genesis49:8 Yuda, axunnawo animoottottopela. Ntatanawo nnikhale vaxiko wa amwiittanaawo ni anamwane a atithawo ammookokhorela oholowaawo." 
Genesis49:9 Yuda, weyo ti mwaaxaana a mwatto; aani mwanaka, ntoko mwatto ahokolowaka woolupatthani. Oniireherera otuphela ntoko mwatto; oniixaatalela ntoko mwatto muthiyana. Taani ongwera ongwanano?" 
Genesis49:10 Ekopo kheerwa ekuxiwa wa Yuda, aani ekopo yoolamula eniikhale eriyari ya nyettosawe mpaka aneeraawe arwe yoowo ori muneene a ekopweene yeeyo. Ni miloko nsimwiiwelele yoowo." 
Genesis49:11 Owo anaamutthukelele buurwaawe vamwirini wa iwuuva*; aani mwaaxaana a buuru muthiyana vaphandini yooreeraxa ya evideira*. Anaakatthe soowarasawe vaviinyuni; mukaandyowaawe musuumuni mwa iwuuva*. 
Genesis49:12 Maithwaawe eniikhale ooriipa opwaha eviinyu ni mainwaawe ootteela opwaha mukaka. 
Genesis49:13 Zebuloni anaamake mukerekhere wa ephareiya ni anaathatuwe nipuro nooweemela makula matokotoko. Nyiinaanosawe nsiphiye mpaka oSidoni. 
Genesis49:14 Isakari ti buuru oolipaxa iixaatalenleene vamirittiniwawe. 
Genesis49:15 Oonaka weera nipuronawe na wiitthuuwa ni elapwaawe ti yooreera, anuurame vathi wa yoolemela ni anaavilele miteko soonyesererihiwa." 
Genesis49:16 Dani anaakihe yoophwanela ya mulokwaawe hiiho ntoko empakaaya yakhalaru epuumba ya aYixrayeli. 
Genesis49:17 Dani anaakhale ntoko enowa mukerekhere musewe, ntoko evili mukerekhere ephiro enluma etthottobwa ya ekavalu* ni enimmoroxa nttulittuli namweettiha." 
Genesis49:18 Ii! Yave, miyo kingweherera woopolawanyu!" 
Genesis49:19 Gadi anaakaraweliwe ni alavilavi, mene ti yoowo aneera aakarawele ni aattharelele." 
Genesis49:20 Meesa a Axeri sinisaatte sooca ni owo anaareherere sooca sa emwene. 
Genesis49:21 Nafitali ti naahe ootaphuwa. Owo onlaleiya masu ooreeraxa. 
Genesis49:22 Yoseefe ti mwiri woowiimaxa; wusa wusa wusa mukerekhere naattuuttu. Iphandisaya sinrambela vasulu wa exiri. 
Genesis49:23 Alipa oolatha nyuupa yaangwanano, yaamvonya nyuupa moota woomwiitta." 
Genesis49:24 Mene muupaawe waahaanya nnenesene ni nyoonosawe saari soohithukumela niwoko na ntata na Namawera a Yakobe ori Mukukhuli ni Mwala a Yixrayeli. 
Genesis49:25 Aani ti Mulukweene Yoowo a atithawo onookhavihera; Muluku a ikuru sootheene onooreeliha ni mareeliho a wiirimu, a moowiixera, a mapele ni a oyara." 
Genesis49:26 Mareeliho a atithawo ti oowaatta, woopwaha mareeliho a nyaako soohimala, woopwaha samahala soowaattaxa sa mattumuxa oohimala. Mareelihowaaka ootheene ekhale vamuru wa Yoseefe, vayuuci ya oothanliwa variyari wa axunneiye." 
Genesis49:27 Benyamini ti mwiici oxeexelo onkhuura yoolupatthiwa ni wiilaka onkawa ovanraaya.” 
Genesis49:28 Ti seiya ipuumba muloko ni piili sa Yixrayeli ni ti seiya atithaya yaaleelansaaya yaareelihaka, emvahaka khula mutthu nreeliho naamwaattama." 
Genesis49:29 Vano Yakobe aahaalamulela eeraka: “Kihanle vakhaani othukumanyiwa ni atthwaaka. Mwakivithe vamoha ni makholowaaka munikhukuni nri mmatta ya muHiti Efroni. 
Genesis49:30 Ti nikhuku nne nri mmatta ya Makipela, vakhiviru wa oMamre, elapo ya oKanaani. Abrahaamu aathuma ni muHiti Efroni ntoko yawayeene weera evithaneke." 
Genesis49:31 Weiwe oovithiwa Abrahaamu ni Sara, mwaariye; Isaki ni Rebeka, mwaariye. Weiwetho koomvitha Leya." 
Genesis49:32 Ematta ni nikhuku nri mwemmo yaathumiheriwe ni aHiti.” 
Genesis49:33 Yakobe amalihakaru waalamulela anamwanaawe, aahiixaatalela, anakhwa ni aathukumanyihiwa ni atthwaawe." 
Genesis50:1 Yoseefe aawuuramela atithawe awiinlelaka, anaabeca." 
Genesis50:2 Vahoolowaya Yoseefe aahaalamulela mameediku yeemenle muteko nihuku nenenenne weera ettikitthele murette woopisiha wuntta muttembo wa atithawe Yixrayeli, enapaka yeeyo." 
Genesis50:3 Yaavira mahuku miloko mixexe ookwaneleene, niwoko eyo yaari ehuhu yoottikitthela murette woohunttiha. Ni awExipitu yaahiinla okhwawawe Yakobe mahuku miloko mithannamiili." 
Genesis50:4 Eviraka mahuku oolalamika, Yoseefe aahuuluma ni atthu a vaate wa Farawu* aweerelaka: “Mwatthuna okoonihera murima wooreera, mwamuleeleke Farawu* mukeerelaka miyo:" 
Genesis50:5 ‘Atithaka yaakilipeliha yeeraka: ‘Kihanle vakhaani okhwa. Mwakivitheke munihiyeni kiirehererenlaaka mweelaponi ya oKanaani.’ Vano, dyoontte mukitthunihere orowa waavitha atithaka ni kamaliha, kinoohokolowa.’”" 
Genesis50:6 Farawu* aaheera: “Murowe, mwaavithe atithinyu ntoko yoolipelinghaayani.”" 
Genesis50:7 Hiiho Yoseefe aapwaha waavitha atithawe ni anamalaka ootheene a Farawu* vamoha ni asitokweene ootheene a vaate wa Farawu* ni a wExipitu yaamuhoola. 
Genesis50:8 Waahiya yaawosa, emusi yootheene ya Yoseefe, axunneiye ni ootheene a vaate wa atithawe yaarowatho. Paahi anamwane, imombe ni ikhondoolo saahanle oGoxeni." 
Genesis50:9 Ikaaro ni anamweettiha a ikavalu* yaamuhoolatho. Aari nakupa. 
Genesis50:10 Yaaphiyalaaya nipuro nimveeriwa* etrigu na wAtadi, mukerekhere mwa Yordanu, yaahiikhupanyera ni ekuttho etokweene ya malatta. Yoseefe aawiinlela atithawe ekuttho ya mahuku mathannameeli." 
Genesis50:11 Akanaani yaamankewo yiiwakaru ekuttho ele vanipuroni nimveeriwa* etrigu na wAtadi, yaaheera: “awExipitu antthara ekhovelelo ya ekuttho ya malatta. Tiwawo nniitthaniwaaya nipuro nne vakhiviru wa Yordanu Abeli-Mizerayimi." 
Genesis50:12 Hiiho anamwane a Yakobe yaapaka yeeyo aalamulenlaawe: 
Genesis50:13 Yaamurongha oKanaani, enamvitha munikhukuni nri mmatta mwa Makipela, vakhiviru wa oMamre – nikhuku nne Abrahaamu aathummaawe wa muHiti Efroni weera nikhale nawaya noovithanamo." 
Genesis50:14 Aavithakaru atithawe, Yoseefe aahokoleela wExipitu vamoha ni axunneiye ni ootheene yaale yaamuhoonle." 
Genesis50:15 Vano, axunneiye Yoseefe yoonaka weera atithaya ahookhwa, yaaheerelana: “Ankha Yoseefe nlelo anithanya, uupuwelelaka ikukuttula mwa sootheene seiye naampankaahu?”" 
Genesis50:16 Yaamurumihela Yoseefe mutthenga ola: “Atithinyu ehinaaye okhwa yaanilamulela 
Genesis50:17 weera nooleeleni ha: ‘Kinoovekani weera mulevelele soohiyanyiha ni soottheka sa axunninyu yoopankaayani moota woonanara! Vano mulevelele soottheka sa arumeiyi a Muluku a atithinyu.’” Aleeliwakaru, Yoseefe aahiinla." 
Genesis50:18 Vahoolowaya yaahoorwa axunneiye, yaamukokhorela ohoolowawe, enamweerela: “Hiyo va ti ipotthasanyu.”" 
Genesis50:19 Wa soothesene, Yoseefe aawaakhula: “Muhoove. Nkikhanle vanipuroni na Muluku!" 
Genesis50:20 Nyuwosa mwaakivaanelela yoonanara, mene Muluku ootatuxa yooreera moota wooweera olelo wuureliwe okumi wa atthu ancipale." 
Genesis50:21 Tivawo, muhoove. Miyo nkoocihaseni nyuwosa ni anamwaniinyu.” Ni hiiho aahaakurunuxa ni aawuulumela moosivelani." 
Genesis50:22 Yoseefe aapwaherera okhala wExipitu vamoha ni emusi yootheene ya atithawe. Aakhala ni okumi iyaakha ncira ni muloko mmoha 
Genesis50:23 ni aahoona osuulu wa Efrayimi. Ohiya hiiho, aawaakhela ntoko awawe anamwane a Makiri, mwaana a Manaxe." 
Genesis50:24 Ahinaaye okhwa, Yoseefe aaweerela axunneiye: “Miyo kihanle vakhaani okhwa. Vekhaikhai, Muluku anookhavihereni ni anoovenxeni mweelaponi ela, ooronghakani elapo aamuroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yakobe." 
Genesis50:25 Yoseefe aahaalipeliha anamwane a Yixrayeli eeraka: “Vekhaikhai, Muluku anookhavihereni okhuma ni ehuhuweene yeeyo mukuxe makhuvaaka nno." 
Genesis50:26 Yoseefe okhwiiye areereno iyaakha ncira ni muloko mmoha. Ni attikittheliwakaru murette woohunttiha, aaheliwa munipokosini wExipitu." 
Exodus1:1 Masina a anamwane a Yixrayeli yaavolongwe ni yoowo wExipitu, khula mutthu ni emusaawe xaxaxa ti ala:" 
Exodus1:2 Rubeni, Simeyoni, Leevi, Yuda," 
Exodus1:3 Isakari, Zebuloni, Benyamini," 
Exodus1:4 Dani, Nafitali, Gadi ni Axeri." 
Exodus1:5 Wa ootheene ekhapira ya Yakobe yaaphiyera atthu miloko mithannamiili, Yoseefe areene wExipitu." 
Exodus1:6 Vano Yoseefe, axunneiye ni ootheene a ekhapira ele yaahookhwaasa." 
Exodus1:7 Wa soothesene, aYixrayeli yaayarana enaandyeererana vancipalexa mpaka osareya mweelaponi." 
Exodus1:8 Vano aalamula wExipitu aari mwene munyowani ahaasuwenleru sa Yoseefe. 
Exodus1:9 Owo aaweerela atthwaawe: “Moone! Muloko wa aYixrayeli wohaatta ni ti woolipaxa onipwaha hiyo. 
Exodus1:10 Nrowe naavaanelele weera ehaandyeereranase ni, yakhala enkhumelela ekhotto, ehiiraane ni amwiittanahu ewanaka ni hiyo ni weera ehipwahe mweelaponimu." 
Exodus1:11 Vano yaahaathanla asitokweene weera yaavariheke miteko sa maviho ni yaahooxase ni miteko soolipa. Ni hiiho aYixrayeli yaamutekela Farawu* isidade soothokorora sooca siniitthaniwa Pitomo ni Ramesese. 
Exodus1:12 Wa soothesene, yaahasulaxiwaaya, yaatepaaya waandyeererana ni omwaramwareya. Tivawo awExipitu yaawoovaaya aYixrayeli," 
Exodus1:13 ni yaakhalihaaya opottha moota woonanara. 
Exodus1:14 Awo yaahaawaawiherasa okumaaya, yaavahasaka muteko woovihaxa weetheya ittoko ni opaka indyerwa ni khula muteko woolima yaamvara. Mmitekoni sootheene awExipitu yannaakhalela oxilili mpotthani." 
Exodus1:15 Mwene a wExipitu aahaalamulela anamayariha eeli aHeberi, yiitthaniwa Xifera ni Puwa:" 
Exodus1:16 “Mwaakhaviheraka aHeberi oyara, mungweheke aari mulopwana. Akhala, mmwiive; akhala muthiyana munghiyeke ni okumi.”" 
Exodus1:17 Wa soothesene, anamayariha yaamoova Muluku ni khayiiwelenle malamulo a mwene a wExipitu. Yaahaahiya ni okumi anamwane asilopwana." 
Exodus1:18 Mwene a wExipitu aawiitthana anamayariha, anaakoha: “Mpakelanse heeni hiiho? Heeni mwaahiyalaanyu ni okumi anamwane asilopwana?”" 
Exodus1:19 Awo yaamwaakhula Farawu*: “Asithiyana aHeberi khaanlikana ni awExipitu. Khaanghaawano oyara ni angyara ahinaaye orwa namayariha.” 
Exodus1:20 Vano Muluku aahoonihera murima wooreera wa anamayariha ni muloko wannatepa waandyerereya ni waalipa vancipalexa. 
Exodus1:21 Yeenre anamayariha yaamoovaka Muluku, aahaavahera oyara weera ekhalaneke emusaaya." 
Exodus1:22 Farawu* aahaalamulela atthwaawe ootheene moota ola: “Mwaavonyere mmoolokoni Nilu asilopwana ootheene eneera eyariweke, mene anamwane asithiyana, mwaahiyeke.”" 
Exodus2:1 Vano mulopwana mmoha a epuumba ya Leevi aathelana ni muthiyana muLeevitho. 
Exodus2:2 Owo aarupala, anamuyara mwaana mulopwana. Oonaka weera aari ooreera, aamwiipithiha nyeeri miraru." 
Exodus2:3 Wahaawereyaaya omwiipithiha, aakuxa mpapara wootthaviwa ni etiili, anattikitthela ni nnyoma ni nkhora. Vano aamuhelamo mwaana ole ahiyaka mpapara eriyari ya ettheere mukerekhere wa Nilu." 
Exodus2:4 Amurokoriye mwaana ole yaaheemela okhwipi weera yoone yeera emukhumelele. 
Exodus2:5 Vano mwaana muthiyana a Farawu* aarowa omoolokoni Nilu weera arape ni arumeiyaawe yaavira mukerekhere mooloko. Mwa yeeyo aahoona mpapara muttheereni, anamuruma murumeiyaawe okuxa." 
Exodus2:6 Akhunulaka, aamoona mwaana iinlaka. Owo aammorela ikharari aneera: “Ola muHeberi.”" 
Exodus2:7 Amurokoriye mwaana yaamwaattamela mwaana a Farawu*, enamukoha: “Muhano munootthuna weera kamwiitthane muthiyana muHeberi weera amwaamwihe ni amuhuwe mwaana ola?”" 
Exodus2:8 Owo aamwaakhula: “Aani.” Vano mwaamwali aarowa anawiitthana amayawe mwaana. 
Exodus2:9 Vahoolowaya mwaana a Farawu* aamweerela muthiyana ole: “Omukuxe mwaana ola ni okaamwihere, ni miyo kinimooliva. Vano muthiyana aamukuxa, anamwaamwiha." 
Exodus2:10 Unnuwakaru mwaana, amayawe yaamurongha wa mwaana muthiyana a Farawu* ni aamwaakhela ntoko mwaniye. Aamutteha Moisesi eeraka: “Niwoko miyo kimuruuhale mmaahini.”" 
Exodus2:11 Nihuku nimoha, Moisesi unnuwaleene, aarowa nipuro yaaraaya atthwaawe ni aahoonelela moota waaviraaya muteko yaavaraaya. Weiwo aamoona ngwExipitu mmoha angwaxulaka muHeberi, mmoha a atthwaawe." 
Exodus2:12 Aatthiimaka awehaka mipatta sootheene ni ahimoonaka mutthu, aamwiiva ngwExipitu, anamvitha veehaavani." 
Exodus2:13 Waaxawaya, aarowa, anawoona aHeberi eeli ewanaka. Aamukoha namatannya:“Oningwaxulela heeni mukhwaawo?”" 
Exodus2:14 Vano mulopwana aamwaakhula: “Taani oovanghe otokweene ni mphukaahu? Ontthuna okiivatho ntoko omwiivalaawo ngwExipitu?” Moisesi aahoova uupuwelaka: ‘vekhaikhai, sootheene sohooneleliwa!’" 
Exodus2:15 Farawu* asuwelakaru yeeyo, aahaasaasa omwiiva Moisesi, mene owo aamutthawa Farawu*, anarowa omaka elapo ya oMidiyani. Iwe aakilaathi mukerekhere ehime." 
Exodus2:16 Vano musaserdoti* mukina a oMidiyani aakhalano anamwane asithiyana athanneeli ni awosa yaarowa orika maahi weera esarihe maahi moowurelamo ni ewurihe muhuwo wa atithaya. 
Exodus2:17 Akukhulitho akina yaaphiyawo, enapacera owoomolasawo. Wa soothesene, Moisesi aahoowa owaakiha, anawuriha muhuwaaya." 
Exodus2:18 Ephiyakaru asimwali wa atithaya, Rewuyeli, owo aahaakohasa: “Mwaakuvenlenisa ohokolowa olelo?”" 
Exodus2:19 Awosa yaamwaakhula: “ngwExipitu mmoha oonaakiha wa akukhuli nitho oonirikela maahi veehimeni, anawuriha muhuwo.”" 
Exodus2:20 Vano aahaakoha: “Ori woowi mulopwana owo? Heeni munghiyenreniwo? Mwamwiitthane weera ace ni hiyo.” 
Exodus2:21 Moisesi aarowa oca ni aahaakhulela okhala vaate wa Rewuyeli ni owo aamvaha Moisesi mwanawe Zipora weera ethelane. 
Exodus2:22 Zipora aamuyara mwaana mulopwana mwa yoowo Moisesi aamuttenghaawe Gerxomo, eeraka: “Kiri namarwa mulaponimu.”" 
Exodus2:23 Vahoolo wa ehuhu yincipale, aahookhwa mwene a wExipitu. aYixrayeli yanniixiinlela ekhuwelaka niwoko na opottha. Ni Muluku aahiiwa okhuwelawaya." 
Exodus2:24 Vano Muluku aahiiwa wiikhupanyerawaya, anuupuwelela wiiraana aapankaawe ni Abrahamu, Isaki ni Yakobe." 
Exodus2:25 Muluku aahaaweha aYixrayeli, anaatthukuruwela." 
Exodus3:1 Moisesi eera akukhulaka muhuwo wa atatawe oowaathelela, Yethero, musaserdoti* a oMidiyani. Nihuku nimoha aakuxa muhuwo arowanaka mpatta mukina wa nikare, anaphiya oHorebi, mwaako wa Muluku." 
Exodus3:2 Vaavaale ndyelo a Yave aamukhumelela mmalumini a mooro yaakhuma vaniphuwani. Moisesi aahoona weera naamvarelaru niphuwa, khanaasa." 
Exodus3:3 Moisesi aahuupuwela: “Yootikhiniha heeni? Niphuwa nihinsela heeni? Kaattameleke yeele koone.” 
Exodus3:4 Yave aahoona weera owo aamwaattamela weera oonexexe. Vanonto Muluku aamwiitthana vaniphuwani: “Moisesi, Moisesi!” Ni Moisesi aamwaakhula: “Miyo kiri va.”" 
Exodus3:5 Muluku aamweerela: “Muhaattameletho! Murule ikwakwaattasanyu, niwoko nipuro mweemenlaanyu ti nootteela.”" 
Exodus3:6 Aapwaherera eeraka: “Miyo ti Muluku a atithinyu; Muluku a Abrahaamu, a Isaki ni a Yakobe.” Vano Moisesi aakhuneela ekhovaawe niwoko aahoova ongweha Muluku." 
Exodus3:7 Yave aaheera: “Vekhaikhai kohoona ohasuliwawaya mulokwaaka wExipitu. Kohiiwa okhuwelawaya niwoko na anamahooxa ni koosuwela ohaawawaya. 
Exodus3:8 Tivawo kikhurungwaaka weera kaatapuxe mmatatani mwa awExipitu ni weera kaavenxeke nno kaaronghaka elapo yooreera ni yoowunnuwa, yoosareya ni mukaka ni oravo, eyo tiiyo elapo ya aKanaani, awAmori, aHiti, aPerizi, aHivi ni aYebusi." 
Exodus3:9 Vanonto, okhuwela wa aYixrayeli wookiphwanya. Kohoona moota awExipitu anaahasulaaya." 
Exodus3:10 Vano muroweke. Kinoorumihani wa Farawu* weera mwakhumihewo mulokwaaka aYixrayeli mwExipitu.” 
Exodus3:11 Wa soothesene Moisesi aamwaakhula Muluku: “Miyo taani weera kamweemelele Farawu* ni weera kaakhumihe aYixrayeli mwExipitu?” 
Exodus3:12 Muluku aamwaakhula: “Miyo nkikhale ni nyuwo. Ni ela eri eneneero weera ti Miyo kinoorumihani: Mwaakhumihaka atthu mwExipitu, nyuwosa mmwinlape Muluku mwaakweene yoola.”" 
Exodus3:13 Moisesi aamukoha Muluku: “Miyo kaphiya wa aYixrayeli ni kaaweerela: ‘Muluku a makholowaanyu ookirumiha wa nyuwo’ ni awosa yakikohasa: ‘Nsinanawe taani?,’ vano kaaweereleke hai?”" 
Exodus3:14 Muluku aamweerela Moisesi: “MIYO TI MIYO*.” ti yeeyo muneeraanyu mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘MIYO TI MIYO koorumihenlasiyeni.’” 
Exodus3:15 Muluku aamweerelatho Moisesi: “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Yave, Muluku a atithinyu, Muluku a Abrahaamu, a Isaki ni a Yakobe ti Yoowo okirumihale wa nyuwo.’ Nna ti Nsinanaka wa mahuku ootheene, Nsina mwa nenno kineeraaka kuupuweleliweno ikhapira ikhapirasene." 
Exodus3:16 Muroweke, mwaathukumanyihe asitokweene a aYixrayeli ni mwaaleele: ‘Yave, Muluku a atithinyu, Muluku a Abrahaamu, a Isaki ni a Yakobe ookikhumelela, anakeerela: ‘Miyo kohootthukuruwelasani, niwoko kohoona mumpakasiwaanyu wExipitu." 
Exodus3:17 Koororomeliha wookhumihasani moohasuliwani wExipitu wooronghani elapo ya aKanaani, awAmori, aPerizi, aHivi ni aYebusi, aani elapo yoosareya mukaka ni oravo.’" 
Exodus3:18 Asitokweene a aYixrayeli anoowaakhulelani. Vahoolowaya nyuwo mmurowe ni yaawosa wa mwene a wExipitu ni mwamweerele:‘Yave, Muluku a aHeberi, ooniphwanya. Munihiyeke neette ekwaha ya mahuku mararu munikareni weera nampakele sooveleela Yave, Mulukwaahu.’" 
Exodus3:19 Koosuwelatho weera mwene a wExipitu kharwa ootthuniherani nihaanyesereenre ntata nooweraxa. 
Exodus3:20 Tivawo kineeraaka kookole moonowaaka ni nkaapakele awExipitu sootikhiniha sootheene eriyaraaya ni vahoolo wa yeeyo, owo onimootthuniherasani okhuma." 
Exodus3:21 Kinimweeriha weera awExipitu ereereliwe murima muloko moota wooweera waakhumaka, ohikhume matataru." 
Exodus3:22 Asithiyana aYixrayeli ootheene yaavekele asimwaattamanaaya ni asithiyana eneera ephiyere vaatewaya itthu sa iyuuma soorikaxa nitho ikuwo. Nyuwosa muneeraanyu mwaawarihe anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana. Hiiho nyuwosa mmwaahuhule awExipitu.” 
Exodus4:1 Moisesi aamwaakhula: “Ankha awosa yaahikaakhulelasa hata yaahitthuna okiiwa ni yeera: ‘Yave khookhumelenleni?’” 
Exodus4:2 Vano Yave aamukoha: “Eri mmatatanimwanyu mmo eheeni?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Ekopo ela.” 
Exodus4:3 Yave aamweerela: “Mmoroxele vathi ekopwaanyu.” Vano Moisesi aamoroxa, enathatuwa eyo enowa, anatthawa Moisesi." 
Exodus4:4 Yave aamweerela: “Mookole moonowaanyu ni mvareke waamwiila.” Moisesi aahookola moonowaawe anavara enowa ni yaathatuwa ekopo mmatatanimwawe. 
Exodus4:5 Yave aamweerela: “Eyo keerenle weera awo yaakhulele weera Muluku a atithaya, Muluku a Abrahaamu, a Isaki ni a Yakobe ohookhumelelani nyuwo.”" 
Exodus4:6 Yave aamweerelatho: “Mwiikaathi ntatananyu vakakasani.” Moisesi aahiiwelela ni avenxakaru, nno naakhalihiwa maleepela naari noosareyaxa. Naari nootteela ntoko etthabwe." 
Exodus4:7 Vahoolowaya aamulamulela: “Muhokoloxeretho ntatananyu vakakasani.” Aapaka yeeyo ni avenxakaru, nno naahokoleela ntoko neerenlaaya!" 
Exodus4:8 Yave aapwaherera eeraka: “Awosa yaahiwaakhulelani ehipwatthelaka eneneero yoopacera, eniyaakhulele yanaaveeli." 
Exodus4:9 Ni nlelo awosa yaahaakhulela ineneero piili iyo hata yaahipwatthela, mwarike maahi vakhaani a muNilu ni mwiitthele vatthayani yoowuuma. Mwiitthela maahi awo vatthayani yoowuuma, eniithatuwe ephome.”" 
Exodus4:10 Moisesi aamweerela Yave: “Ii! Adonai, wuulumawaka onkhala woohaawano, hata khalayeene, naari vaanaano vaava Nyuwo munuulumaanyu ni murumeiyaanyu. Nkingwera wuuluma nnenesene.”" 
Exodus4:11 Yave aamwaakhula: “Taani omvanghe eyano mutthu? Taani onkhalinghe oohiiwa naari oohuuluma? Taani onimvaha woona hoye hoye ohoona? Ti Yoomi, Yave!" 
Exodus4:12 Vanonto muroweke. Miyo nkikhale ni nyuwo kooxuttihakani yeeyo muneeraanyu mweereke.” 
Exodus4:13 Mene Moisesi aamwaakhula: “Ii! Apwiya, kinoovekelani weera munrumihe mutthu mukina.”" 
Exodus4:14 Vano Yave aamunyoonyeriwa Moisesi, anamweerela: “Nyuwo khamunono munninyu Aharoni, muLeevi? Koosuwela weera owo onuuluma nnenesene. Owo aneera arwaaka weera oociceereni ni anaahakalale woowoonani." 
Exodus4:15 Nyuwo mmuulume ni yoowo munleelaka yeeyo aneeraawe ahimeke. Miyo kinookhala ni nyuwosa muulumaka ni kinimooleelani yooweera. 
Exodus4:16 Owo anuulume ni muloko wa mpattaanyu. Onuukhale ntoko ereene eyanowaanyu ni nyuwo mureene Mulukwaawe. 
Exodus4:17 Mukuxe mmatatanimwanyu ekopo ela weera mwapake sootikhiniha ni yeela.” 
Exodus4:18 Vano Moisesi aahokoleela wa Yethero, atatawe oowaathelela, anaweerela: “Kintthuna ohokoleela wExipitu weera kasuwele amusaaka yaakhanle.” Vano Yethero aamwaakhula: “Muroweke mmuretteleni.”" 
Exodus4:19 Moisesi nlelo areene oMidiyani, Yave aamweerela: “Muhokoleele wExipitu, niwoko ootheene yaale yaasaasa owiivani ahookhwa.”" 
Exodus4:20 Vano Moisesi aahaakuxa amwaariye ni anamwanaawe, anaawelihasa vabuuruni, anahokoleela wExipitu. Aakuxatho ekopo ya Muluku mmatatanimwawe." 
Exodus4:21 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mwaahokoleelaka wExipitu, mwiipasoope woopaka ohoolo wa Farawu* sootikhiniha sootheene koovanghaakani owera opaka. Vaheera Miyo kinimuumiha murimaawe moota wooweera kharwa atthunihera muloko okhuma." 
Exodus4:22 Vahoolowaya mwamuleele Farawu*: ‘Yave eenre ha: ‘Yixrayeli ti ntthaaranaka 
Exodus4:23 ni Miyo koomuleela: ‘Omuhiyeke mwanaka arowaka okilapa. Mene weyo khoomuhingye arowaka. Tivawo kineeraaka kiive ntthaaranawo.’” 
Exodus4:24 Waakoneliwa ephiro eriyari, Yave aarowa okumana ni Moisesi atthunaka omwiiva." 
Exodus4:25 Vano, Zipora aakuxa nluku noowiitha, anamwiinela mwanawe, anavonyera aathikinlaawe mmettoni mwa Moisesi amweerelaka: ‘Vano nyuwo ti aiyaka a ephome." 
Exodus4:26 Owo aaheera: ‘Aiyaka a ephome,’ athoonyeraka wiineliwa. Vanonto ehuhuweene yeele Yave aamuhiya Moisesi." 
Exodus4:27 Yave aamweerela Aharoni: “Murowe onikareni weera munciceerewo Moisesi.” Hiiho owo aarowa, anakumana ni Moisesi vamwaakoni wa Muluku, anamuulumiha ni ebeecu." 
Exodus4:28 Vano Moisesi aamuthalihera Aharoni sootheene Yave aatthunaawe weera amuleele Farawu* nitho sa sootikhiniha sootheene Muluku aamulamulenlaawe opaka. 
Exodus4:29 Hiiho Moisesi ni Aharoni yaarowasa ni yaahaathukumanyiha asitokweene ootheene a aYixrayeli. 
Exodus4:30 Aharoni aahaathalihera sootheene Yave aamuleenlaawe Moisesi. Woottharelana Moisesitho aapaka sootikhiniha sootheene vamaithoniwaya ni 
Exodus4:31 awo yaaroromela. Muloko osuwelakaru weera Yave oonitthukuruwela ni ohoona ohasuliwawahu, waahuurama omulapaka Muluku." 
Exodus5:1 Vahoolowaya Moisesi ni Aharoni yaarowa wuuluma ni Farawu*, enamweerela: “Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli eenre ha: ‘Ohiyeke mulokwaaka orowe wakipakele efesta munikareni.’”" 
Exodus5:2 Farawu* aahaakhula: “Yave Owo taani weera miyo kimwiiwelele ni kaahiye aYixrayeli erowaka? Nkimusuwenle Yave ni nkirwa kaahiya aYixrayeli epwahaka.” 
Exodus5:3 Awosa yaanyesera: “Muluku a aHeberi aahoorwa okumana ni hiyo. Vano, munitthunihere weetta mukwaha wa mahuku mararu munikareni weera nampakele sooveleela Yave, Mulukwaahu. Naaheera hiiho, Owo onooniruuhela mahooxo hoye hoye ekatana.”" 
Exodus5:4 Mwenetho a wExipitu aawaakhula: “Moisesi ni Aharoni, muncerewihelasani muloko mitekosaya? Muhokoleele omutekoni!”" 
Exodus5:5 Farawu* aaheeratho: “Atthu ala ahaattaxa, vano nyuwosa nlelo mungweemexiha muteko!”" 
Exodus5:6 Nihuku nenenenne Farawu* aahaalamulela anamahasula ni alipa oohoolela muteko wa aYixrayeli: 
Exodus5:7 “Okhuma vaanaano va muhaavahetho malaxi weera epake indyerwa ntoko mwaakhovelenlaanyu. Eroweke weera ethukumanyihe malaxaaya asineenaaya. 
Exodus5:8 Mene mwaanyesererihe weera epwaherere opaka indyerwa waattawene weiwe; ehivukule waattawaya. Ti anooreesi, ni tivawo ankhuwelaaya: ‘Munihiyeke nirowe nampakele sooveleela Mulukwaahu!’" 
Exodus5:9 Mwaandyeerere oviha wa muteko wa angwera ala weera ekwanihere mitekosaya ehiiwelelaka soowootha!” 
Exodus5:10 Vano anamahasula ni alipa oohoolela muteko wa aYixrayeli yaarowa oleela muloko: “Farawu* eenre ha: ‘Nkirwa koovahaanitho malaxi.’ 
Exodus5:11 Murowe mwaanyule muneeraanyu mwaphwanye, mene mutekwaanyu khoorwa ovukuliwa.’”" 
Exodus5:12 Hiiho atthu yaamwaramwareela mweelaponi yootheene ya wExipitu weera yaanyule ihalahala sa malaxi vanipuroni na malaxi ooreera. 
Exodus5:13 Anamahasula yaawooperera yeeraka: “Mukwaniheraseke muteko wa mahuku ootheene mwaanyesereriwaanyu mvahiweene malaxi. 
Exodus5:14 Ahooleli a aYixrayeli a muteko yaathanliwe ni anamahasula a Farawu* yannaawaxula ekohakohiwaka: “Muhikwaniherenle heeni osilo ni olelo waattawene weiwe wa indyerwa wa mahuku a khalayi?” 
Exodus5:15 Vano ahooleli a aYixrayeli a muteko yaarowa wiikhupanyera wa Farawu* emweerelaka: “Mungweerihelani hiiha arumeiyaanyu? 
Exodus5:16 Hiyo arumeiyaanyu khanimvahiwa malaxi. Hata hiiho noolamuleliwa: ‘Mpakeke indyerwa!’ Arumeiyaanyu aawaxuliwa, mene nthowa ti na mulokwaanyu xaxaxa.”" 
Exodus5:17 Farawu* aawaakhula: “Anooreesi ti nyuwosa! Anooreesi! Tivawo muneeraanyu: ‘Munihiyeke niroweke nampakele sooveleela Yave.’ 
Exodus5:18 Vano muhokoleelase omutekoni! Nyuwosa khamurwa mwaakhelatho malaxi. Mpwaherere okwanihera waatta wa indyerwa.” 
Exodus5:19 Farawu* aweerelakaru: “Nkimvukula waatta wa indyerwa saanyesereriwa khula nihuku,” ahooleli a aYixrayeli a muteko yaasuwela weera vano noovolowa mmahooxoni." 
Exodus5:20 Vano evinyakaru wa Farawu*, yaamukumanano Moisesi ni Aharoni, mwa yaawo yeera yaawehereraka." 
Exodus5:21 Ahooleli ale yaaweerela: “Yave oowehawehaseni ni oothorihaseni! Nyuwosa moonitothela manyaanya wa Farawu* ni arumeiyaawe mwa hiyo. Mohaavaha nthowa nooniivela.” 
Exodus5:22 Moisesi aamwaattamelatho Yave, anamweerela: “Ii! Apwiya! Muhasulenleni muloko ola? Vano mukirumenleni?" 
Exodus5:23 Okhuma ehuhu kirwiiyaaka wuuluma ni Farawu* mwa Nsinananyu, owo oohasula muloko ola ni Nyuwo khamvulunxeru mulokwaanyu.”" 
Exodus6:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Nyuwo mmoone yeeyo kineeraaka kimpakele Farawu*. Mwa Ntatanaka nooweraxa owo onootthunihera muloko orowa. Mwa Ntatanaka nooweraxa owo onimoomola muloko elapwaawe.” 
Exodus6:2 Muluku aamweerelatho Moisesi: “Miyo Yave. 
Exodus6:3 Kaahiixoonihera wa Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yakobe ntoko Muluku a ikuru sootheene, mene mwa Nsinanaka, Yave, nkiixoonihenre wa yaawosa." 
Exodus6:4 Vahoolowaya kookhaliha wiiraanyihawaka ni yaawo weera kaavahe elapo ya oKanaani, mwa weiwe yaamankaaya ntoko anamarwa." 
Exodus6:5 Vano, kohiiwa wiikhupanyera wa aYixrayeli mwa yaawo awExipitu anaapakaaya ipottha ni kohuupuwelela wiiraanyihawaka." 
Exodus6:6 Tivawo: Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Miyo ti Yave. Kinimootapuxani mwa miteko sooviha sa awExipitu. Miyo kinimootapuxani mpotthani ni kinoowoopolani ni moono woolipa ni miteko sitokotoko sa nthoriho. 
Exodus6:7 Miyo kinimookhalihani mulokwaaka ni kinookhala Mulukwaanyusa. Vano nyuwosa mmwisuwele weera Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu mwa Yoowo onootapuxani mmutekoni mumvarihiwaanyu ni awExipitu. 
Exodus6:8 Miyo kinimooronghani mulaponi kaalipenlaaka keemexaka ntata weera kaarwa omvaha Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yakobe. Kinimoovahani ntoko elapwaanyu. Miyo ti Yave!’”" 
Exodus6:9 Moisesi aahaathalihera yeeyo aYixrayeli, mene awosa khayaamwiiwelenle niwoko na othanana ni mitekosaya soovihaxa." 
Exodus6:10 Vano Yave aamulamulela Moisesi: 
Exodus6:11 “Murowe mwamuleele Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu, weera aahiye aYixrayeli ekhume mulaponi.”" 
Exodus6:12 Wa soothesene, Moisesitho aamweerela Yave: “aYixrayeli ehikiiwaka miyo – anaakiiwe hai Farawu*? Wootepaxa miyo nkinlokolola nnene.”" 
Exodus6:13 Vaheera Yave aamulamulela Moisesi ni Aharoni weera yaaleele aYixrayeli ni Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu, weera Muluku oolamulela waakhumiha aYixrayeli mwExipitu." 
Exodus6:14 Asitokweene a emusi ya aYixrayeli yaari ti ala: anamwane a Rubeni, ntthaara na Yixrayeli: Hanokhi, Palu, Hezironi ni Karemi. Ala yaari mahimo a Rubeni." 
Exodus6:15 Anamwane a Simeyoni yaari Yemuweli, Yamini, Ohadi, Yakini, Zowari ni Xawuli, mwaana a muthiyana muKanaani. Ala yaari mahimo a Simeyoni." 
Exodus6:16 Ala yaari masina a anamwane a Leevi ottharihiwaka oyariwawaya: Gerxomo, Kohathi ni Merari. Leevi aarino iyaakha ncira ni miloko miraru niithannapiili." 
Exodus6:17 Anamwane a Gerxomo ettharihiwaka maimwaaya: Libeni ni Ximei. 
Exodus6:18 Anamwane a Kohathi yaari Amerama, Yizehara, Heberoni ni Uziyeli. Kohathi aarino iyaakha ncira ni miloko miraru ni tthaaru." 
Exodus6:19 Anamwane a Merari yaari Makheli ni Muxi. Ala yaari mahimo a Leevi ottharihiwaka oyariwawaya. 
Exodus6:20 Amerama aamuthela napaapaawe iitthaniwa Yokhebedi, ni owo aamuyara Aharoni ni Moisesi. Amerama aarino iyaakha ncira ni miloko miraru niithannapiili." 
Exodus6:21 Anamwane a Yizehara yaari Kora, Nefege ni Zikeri." 
Exodus6:22 Anamwane a Uziyeli yaari Mixayeli, Elezafana ni Siteri." 
Exodus6:23 Aharoni aamuthela Elixeba, mwaana a Aminadabi ni murokoriye Nakhexoni. Owo aamuyarano Nadabi, Abihu, Eleyazara ni Itamara." 
Exodus6:24 Anamwane a Kora yaari Asiri, Elekana ni Abiyasafa. Awo yaari mahimo a aKora." 
Exodus6:25 Eleyazara, mwaana a Aharoni, aamuthela mwaana mmoha a Putiyeli, mwa yoowo aamuyarannaawe Pinehasa. Ala yaari asitokweene a emusi ya aLeevi ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya." 
Exodus6:26 Vano aari Aharoneene yoowo ni Moiseseene yoowo Yave aaweerelansaawe: “Mwaakhumihe aYixrayeli mwExipitu mwaarehereraka muttharihaka okawanyeyawaya.” 
Exodus6:27 Aari Moisesi ni Aharoni yuulumme ni Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu, eerelaka waakhumiha aYixrayeli mwExipitu." 
Exodus6:28 Vano Yave uulummaawe ni Moisesi wExipitu," 
Exodus6:29 aamweerela: “Miyo ti Yave. Mwamuleele Farawu*, mwene a wExiptu, sootheene kineeraaka kooleeleni.”" 
Exodus6:30 Moisesitho aamukoha Yave: “Anaakiiwe hai Farawu* kihuulumaka nnene?” 
Exodus7:1 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Kinimoovahani ikuru ohoolo wa Farawu* ni munninyu, Aharoni, anuulume ntoko eyanowaanyu." 
Exodus7:2 Nyuwo mmuulume sootheene kineeraaka koolamuleleni ni munninyu Aharoni anaamuleele Farawu* weera aatthunihere aYixrayeli okhuma mulaponi. 
Exodus7:3 Miyotho kinimuumiha murima wa Farawu* ni naari saandyeerereyaka ineneerosaka ni sootikhiniha wExipitu," 
Exodus7:4 owo kharwa awiiwaani. Vano, kinimwiikaathera Ntatanaka wExipitu ni kinimwaakhumiha anakhottwaaka, mulokwaaka, aYixrayeli ni owera miteko sa nthoriho." 
Exodus7:5 Ni awExipitu eniisuwele weera Miyo ti Yave kookolelaka moonowaaka wExipitu ni kaavenxakawo aYixrayeli.” 
Exodus7:6 Moisesi ni Aharoni yaapaka ntoko Yave aalamulenlaawe. 
Exodus7:7 Moisesi aarino iyaakha miloko mithannamiraru ni Aharoni miloko mithannamiraru ni tthaaru yuulumasaaya ni Farawu*. 
Exodus7:8 Yave aamweerela Moisesi ni Aharoni: 
Exodus7:9 “Farawu* oovekelani: ‘Mpake yootikhiniha,’ vano mwamweerele Aharoni: ‘Mukuxeke ekopwaanyu ni mvonyere ohoolo wa Farawu*.’ Ni eyo enoothatuwa enowa.”" 
Exodus7:10 Moisesi ni Aharoni yaarowa wa Farawu*, enapaka yeeyo Yave aalamulenlaawe. Aharoni aavonyera ekopwaawe ohoolo wa Farawu* ni anamalakaawe, enathatuwa enowa." 
Exodus7:11 Vano Farawu*tho aawiitthana anamiruku ni akhwiri ni anamacitta a wExipitu ni ale yaapaka etthweene yeeyo ni olowawaya woowiipithiheya. 
Exodus7:12 Khula mutthu a yaale aavonyera vathi ekopwaawe ni ikoposaya sootheene saathatuwa inowa. Ekopotho ya Aharoni yaamira inowasaya sootheene. 
Exodus7:13 Wa soothesene, Farawu* aahuumiha murima ni owo khaawiiwelelanse Moisesi ni Aharoni, ntoko Yave eenraawe." 
Exodus7:14 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Farawu* ohuumihiwa murima ni owo khantthunihera muloko wa aYixrayeli orowa. 
Exodus7:15 Omaalo, oxeexelo, muroweke wa Farawu*, owo aarowaka oluusi. Mwangweherere mukerekhere mooloko Nilu weera mwamukumaneno. Mukuxeketho ekopo yaathatungwe enowa." 
Exodus7:16 Mwamuleele: ‘Yave, Muluku a aHeberi ookiruma wooleelani: ‘Muhiyeke mulokwaaka orowaka weera wakilape munikareni.’ Mene mpaka vano khamukiiwale." 
Exodus7:17 Masu a Yave ti ala: ‘Mwa yeeyo mmwisuwele weera Miyo ti Yave: nkimanele maahi a Nilu ni ekopo eri mmatatanimwaka ni awo eniithatuwe ephome. 
Exodus7:18 Ihopa sa muNilu nsikhwe, mooloko oniwunkhe woovirula, ni awExipitu kheewera owura maahi ale.’”" 
Exodus7:19 Vano, Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi: “Munlamulele Aharoni: ‘Mukuxe ekopwaanyu ni mookolele moonowaanyu mmaahini a wExiptu – mmanyoolokoni, mmipopeni, mmarattani ni mmapuroni moothemwene araayamo maahi weera ethatuwe ephome. Eniikhale ephome mweelaponi yootheene ya wExipitu – mpaka mmikubuni sa itthaabwa ni sa maluku." 
Exodus7:20 Moisesi ni Aharoni yaapaka ntoko Yave aalamulenlaawe: Aharoni aakuxa ekopo anamanela maahi a muNilu Farawu* ni anamalakaawe yoonaka, ni maahi ale yaathatuwa ephome." 
Exodus7:21 Ihopa saahookhwa ni mooloko waanunkha woovirula moota wooweera awExipitu khayaawera owura maahi ale. Mweelaponi yootheene ya wExipitu yaakhala ephome. 
Exodus7:22 Vaheera anamacitta a wExipitu yaapaka etthweene yeeyo ni olowawaya woowiipithiheya. Farawu* aahuumiha murima ni khaamwiiwelenle Moisesi ni Aharoni, ntoko Yave aahimalaawe." 
Exodus7:23 Ohiyanawaya, aahaarerasa ettuli, anahokoleela owannyawe ahiphwatthaka itthusene seiye." 
Exodus7:24 awExipitu ootheene yaathipa ihime mukerekhere wa Nilu weera ephwanye maahi ooreera hapo maahi a Nilu khayaawureya. 
Exodus7:25 Yaavinre mahuku mathanameeli Yave amanneene maahi a Nilu. 
Exodus8:1 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Muroweke wa Farawu* ni mwamuleeleke: ‘Yave eenre ha: ‘Muhiyeke mulokwaaka orowaka weera wakilape. 
Exodus8:2 Mwaahitthunihera orowa, kinoolamula weera elapwaanyu yootheene ekhuneeliwe ni anaphulu." 
Exodus8:3 Nilu anaasareye anaphulu; awo eniiwele evolowaka mpaanimwanyu, okwartuniwanyu mpakatho vakaamaniwanyu. Eniivolowetho mmampaani mwa anamalakaanyu ni mwa mulokwaanyu, mpuwa mwa maikhwaanyu ni mooweetheelamwene." 
Exodus8:4 Vano anaphulu animootuphelani nyuwo, anamalakaanyu ni mulokwaanyu.’”" 
Exodus8:5 Vano Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi: “Munlamulele Aharoni: ‘Mookoleleke moonowaanyu ni ekopwaanyu mmanyoolokoni, mmipopeni ni mmarattani ni mwemmo mwaawelihe anaphulu mweelaponi ya wExipitu."
