Exodus8:6 Hiiho Aharoni aahookolela moonowaawe maahi a wExipitu ni anaphulu yaawela, enasareya elapo ya wExipitu." 
Exodus8:7 Anamacittatho yaapaka etthweene yeeyo ni olowawaya woowiipithiheya; yaahaaweliha anaphulu mweelaponi ya wExipitu. 
Exodus8:8 Farawu* aarumiha wiitthaniwa Moisesi ni Aharoni aweerelaka: “Mumvekele Yave weera akivenxere anaphulu ni wa mulokwaakatho; ni vahoolowaya kinoohiya muloko orowaka weera wampakele sooveleela Yave.” 
Exodus8:9 Vano Moisesi aamweerela Farawu*: “Nyuwo murino nttittimiho na olakela: Yaakhani muntthunaanyu weera miyo koovekeleleni nyuwo, anamalakaanyu ni mulokwaanyu weera anaphulu evenxiwe wa nyuwo ni mmawannyinyu weera ehale a mmoolokoni Nilu paahi?”" 
Exodus8:10 Farawu* aamwaakhula: “Omaalo.” Vano Moisesi aamwaakhula: “Enimweereya ntoko mweenraanyu. Hiiho munoosuwela weera Yave, Mulukwaahu ti oohilikanxereya." 
Exodus8:11 Anaphulu animoohiyani, mmawannyinyu, anamalakaanyu, ni mulokwaanyu; eniihale a mmoolokoni paahi.”" 
Exodus8:12 Moisesi ni Aharoni evenyakaru wa Farawu*, Moisesi aamudyoonttelela Yave niwoko na anaphulu aamurumihenlaawe Farawu*." 
Exodus8:13 Yave aahaakhulela yooveka ya Moisesi: Yaahookhwa anaphulu yaari mmampaani, mmavaate ni mmamattani." 
Exodus8:14 Yaathukumanyihiwa mapuro mapuro ni tivawo elapo yuunkhalaaya woovirula. 
Exodus8:15 Farawu*, oonnaawe weera omumula waakhala, aahuumiha murimaawe ahimwiiwelelaka Moisesi ni Aharoni, ntoko Yave eenraawe." 
Exodus8:16 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Munlamulele Aharoni: ‘Mookole ekopwaanyu ni mukhuruleno ntthupi vatthayani. Vano nno nnoothatuwa anlukuveeve mweelaponi yootheene ya wExipitu.’” 
Exodus8:17 Yaapaka hiiho ni Aharoni ookolakaru moono ni ekopwaawe aakhurula ntthupi na etthaya enaakhumelela anlukuveeve atthu ni axinama. Ntthupi nootheene na elapo ya wExipitu naathatuwa anlukuveeve. 
Exodus8:18 Anamacittatho yeereraka waakhuumeleliha anlukuveeve ni olowawaya woowiipithiheya, khayaawenre. Vano anlukuveeve yannaaluma atthu ni axinama." 
Exodus8:19 Yaamweerela Farawu*: “Ela ti ekatha ya Muluku.” Wa soothesene, murima wa Farawu* waapwaherera wuumihiwa ni owo khaatthuna owiiwa, ntoko Yave eenraawe." 
Exodus8:20 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Omaalo, oxeexelo, mvenye ni murowe wa Farawu*, owo arowaka oluusi. Mwamuleele: ‘Yave eenre ha: ‘Muhiyeke mulokwaaka orowaka weera wakilape." 
Exodus8:21 Nyuwo mwaahitthunihera mulokwaaka orowa, kinimoorumihelani nasope a amunkaanga, anamalakaanyu, mulokwaanyu ni impasanyu. Impa sa awExipitu ni annyikalaayamo anoosareyamo amukaanga." 
Exodus8:22 Mene nihuku nno kinoovirikanyiha elapo ya oGoxeni, onkhalaayawo mulokwaaka. Kharwa akhala naari nasope mmoha a amunkaanga weera nyuwo musuwele weera Miyo, Yave, kiri elapweene yeele." 
Exodus8:23 Kinoohiyanyiha mulokwaaka ni mulokwaanyu. Eneneero eyo yootikhiniha enookhumelela omaalo.’” 
Exodus8:24 Vano Yave aapaka hiiho. Anasope atokotoko a amukaanga yaasareya vaate wa Farawu* ni mmavaate wa anamalakaawe ni wExipitu wootheene waahononeya mwaha wa amukaanga. 
Exodus8:25 Farawu* aarumiha wiitthaniwa Moisesi ni Aharoni aweerelaka: “Murowe, mwampakele sooveleela Mulukwaanyu, mene muhithaame mulaponimu.”" 
Exodus8:26 Moisesitho aamwaakhula: “Eyo kheelonke. Sooveleela hiyo nnimpakelaahu Yave Mulukwaahu ti sa mwiikho wa awExipitu. Hiyo napaka sooveleela sinkhala ntoko mwiikhwaaya, awo anoonivonya maluku." 
Exodus8:27 Ontthuneya weera hiyo neette mukwaha wa mahuku mararu munikareni weera nampakele sooveleela Yave, Mulukwaahu, ntoko onilamulenlaawe.”" 
Exodus8:28 Farawu* aamweerela: “Kinimootthuniherani orowa munikareni ompakela sooveleela Yave, Mulukwaanyu. Mene muhirakamelaxe ni mwakivekeleletho miyo.”" 
Exodus8:29 Moisesi aamwaakhula: “Miyo vaava kimvenyaaka vamaithoniwanyu, kinoomvekela Yave. Omaalo, nasope a amukaanga anaamuhiye Farawu*, anamalakaanyu ni mulokwaanyu. Nave weera Farawu* ahihokoleele wuupuwelela ethiru, ooceelihaka muloko orowa ompakela sooveleela Yave.”" 
Exodus8:30 Vano Moisesi aapwaha vamaithoni wa Farawu* ni aamvekela Yave. 
Exodus8:31 Yave aahaakhulela yoovekaawe: Amukaanga yaamuhiya Farawu*, anamalakaawe ni mulokwaawe; khaakhanleru hata mukaanga mmoha aahanle." 
Exodus8:32 Mene emaareene yeeletho Farawu* aahuumiha murimaawe ahitthuniheraka opwaha muloko. 
Exodus9:1 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Murowe wa Farawu* ni mwamuleele: ‘Yave, Muluku a aHeberi eenre ha: ‘Muhiye mulokwaaka orowaka weera wakilape." 
Exodus9:2 Nyuwo mwapwaherera ohiiha orowa ni wooceeliha," 
Exodus9:3 vano musuwele weera moono wa Yave onooruuhela nihooxo noowoopiha mihuwo sa Farawu* siri mmamattani: Ikavalu*, abuuru, ikamelu*, imombe ni ikhondoolo ni ipuri." 
Exodus9:4 Yavetho onoohiyanyiha mihuwo sa aYixrayeli ni sa awExipitu. Hata mwaamunama mmoha a aYixrayeli kharwa akhwa.’” 
Exodus9:5 Yave aavaha ehuhu: “Omaalo Yave onoopakela elapweene yeela yeeyo ororomelinghaawe.” 
Exodus9:6 Vano waaxawaya Yave aapaka yeeyo: Mihuwo sootheene sa awExipitu saahookhwa, vaheera wa aYixrayeli hata muhuwo mmoha khawaakhwiiye." 
Exodus9:7 Farawu* aarumiha owehawehiwa ni aahoonelela weera mihuwo sootheene sa aYixrayeli saari ni okumi. Hata hiiho, murimaawe waapwaherera wuuma ni khaatthunihera orowa muloko." 
Exodus9:8 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi ni Aharoni: “Munyoottole ettuura vaniikhoni ni Moisesi amwaramwaxele musulu ohoolo wa Farawu*. 
Exodus9:9 Eyo enoothatuwa ntoko ntthupi nootteettheya mweelaponi yootheene ya wExipitu ni ithuku sootathareya sinookhumelela mwaatthuni ni mwaaxinamani a wExipitu.” 
Exodus9:10 Vano yaanyottolasa ettuura ya muniikhoni, enarowano wa Farawu*. Moisesi aamwaramwaxela osulu ni ithuku sootathareya saapacera waakhumelela atthu ni axinama." 
Exodus9:11 Khaawo a anamacitta aawera ophwanyaneya aaraawewo Moisesi, niwoko yaasareya makhwatta ntoko awExipitu ancipale akina." 
Exodus9:12 Mene Yave aahuumiha murima wa Farawu* ni owo aakhootta omwaakhulela Moisesi ni Aharoni, ntoko Yave aamuleenlaawe Moisesi." 
Exodus9:13 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mpeherere ovenya, murowe wa Farawu* ni mwamuleele: ‘Yave, Muluku a aHeberi eenre ha: ‘Muhiye mulokwaaka orowaka weera wakilape!" 
Exodus9:14 Mwaaheera hiiho, emaara ela, kinimoorumihelani mahooxowaaka ootheene ni anamalakaanyu ni mulokwaanyu weera nyuwo musuwele weera khawowo mukina ntoko Miyo mweelaponi ya vathi yootheene." 
Exodus9:15 Miyo kaangwera wookola moono koovulalihakani nyuwo ni mulokwaanyu ni mahooxo yeera ewiiveeni mulaponi. 
Exodus9:16 Mene Miyo koowuurelani mpaka vaanaanova keerelaka owooniherani ikurusaka ni weera Nsinanaka nilaleiwe mweelaponi yootheene. 
Exodus9:17 Wa soothesene, nyuwo nlelo munnyeserera wooceeliha mulokwaaka muhitthuniheraka orowa." 
Exodus9:18 Omaalo, ehuhuweene yeela, kinoorumiha epula ya maralala matokotoko ahitonko omorela mwExipitu, okhuma epaceriwaaya mpaka olelo." 
Exodus9:19 Vano, mulamulele okukhuleliwa mihuwosanyu ni sootheene murinaanyu mmatta weera siroihiwe mmwiikitthoni. Yaamoraka maralala, eniyaamorele atthu ni axinama ootheene eneera ehikhale mpuwa ni eniikhwe.”" 
Exodus9:20 Anamalaka a Farawu* yoova nsu na Yave, yaahaakuveya okukhulela mpuwa ipotthasaya ni mihuwosaya." 
Exodus9:21 Vaheera yaale yahaapwatthenle nsu na Yave, yaahiya ipotthasaya ni mihuwosaya mmatta." 
Exodus9:22 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mweemexere moonowaanyu osulu weera emorele maralala mweelaponi yootheene ya wExipitu – mwaatthuni, mwaaxinamani ni mmapoondani ootheene a wExipitu." 
Exodus9:23 Moisesi eemexerakaru ekopwaawe osulu, Yave aahoopiha itari ni maralala, ni waakhala overinya. Hiiho Yave aamoroxela maralala mwExipitu." 
Exodus9:24 Yaamora maralala ni yannaaleleya erimu ni overinya mipatta sootheene. Kheenakhale ettheku ya maralala ntoko yeele wExipitu wootheene okhuma ethatuwakaru elapo. 
Exodus9:25 wExipitu wootheene maralala yaamorela sootheene sahaakhanle mpuwa, okhuma atthu mpaka axinama. Yaaphwata mapoonda ootheene ohiya ophwatiwa wa nyiri sootheene." 
Exodus9:26 Elapo ya oGoxeni paahi, yaaraayawo aYixrayeli, yahaamorenlaayawo maralala." 
Exodus9:27 Vano Farawu* aarumiha wiitthaniwa Moisesi ni Aharoni aweerelaka: “Emaara ela koottheka. Yave ti oororomeleya ni miyo ni mulokwaaka nookhalano nthowa. 
Exodus9:28 Mumvekele Yave, niwoko itari ni maralala a Muluku aatepa. Kinimoohiyani murowaka – khoontthuneyatho okhala mu.”" 
Exodus9:29 Moisesi aamweerela: “Vaava kimvenyaaka, musidade, kinimweemexa matata kimvekaka Yave. Itari nsimaale ni kheemoratho maralala. Hiiho mmusuwele weera elapo ya vathi ti ya Yave." 
Exodus9:30 Koosuwelatho nnenesene weera nyuwo ni anamalakaanyu khamummoova Yave.” 
Exodus9:31 Vano eliinyu* ni esevada* yaaphwatiwa, niwoko esevada* yaathapuruwa ni eliinyu* yaamuttuva." 
Exodus9:32 Wa soothesene, etrigu ni esenteyo* khayaaphwatiwe, niwoko ti soopisa wiitthwa." 
Exodus9:33 Hiiho Moisesi aavenya wa Farawu*, anakhuma musidade. Aamweemexera matata Yave. Itari ni maralala yaamala ni epula yaamaaxa." 
Exodus9:34 Farawu*, oonaka weera epula, maralala ni itari yaamala, aatthekatho. Owo vamoha ni anamalakaawe yaahuumiha mirimasaya." 
Exodus9:35 Murimaawe Farawu* waapwaherera wuumihiwa ni owo khaatthunihera orowa aYixrayeli, ntoko Yave eenraawe mwa Moisesi." 
Exodus10:1 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Murowe wa Farawu*, niwoko Kohuumiha murimaawe ni mirima sa anamalakaawe weera kikwanihere sootikhiniha variyariwaya." 
Exodus10:2 Kinoopaka seiyo weera nyuwo ngwere waathalihera anamwaniinyu ni axisulwiinyu moota kaatheiyaaka awExipitu ni moota kaapakenlaaka sootikhiniha. Hiiho mmwisuwele weera Miyo ti Yave.” 
Exodus10:3 Moisesi ni Aharoni yaarowa wa Farawu* emweerelaka: “Yave, Muluku a aHeberi eenre ha: ‘Mpaka yaakhani mukhoottaka wiiyeviha ohoolowaka? Muhiyeke mulokwaaka weera wakilape!" 
Exodus10:4 Mwaahitthunihera orowa, omaalo kinoorumihela misoope mweelaponimwanyu." 
Exodus10:5 Iyo osareyawaya sinookumanela mweelaponi mpaka oohooneya etthaya. Sinoowenya yeeyo ehanle vakhaani ya nihooxo na maralala nitho nyiri sootheene simphuwa ntuphini. 
Exodus10:6 Sinoosareya mmampaanimwanyu ni impa sa anamalakaanyu ni awExipitu ootheene; etthu ahitonkwaaya woona asitithinyu naari makholowaanyu okhuma nihuku yaaphiyalaaya mweelaponimu mpaka olelo.” Vano Moisesi aarukunuwa, anavenya wa Farawu*." 
Exodus10:7 Anamalakaawe Farawu* yaamweerela: “Mpaka yaakhani mulopwana ole aneeraawe akhale yoowoopopihaahu? Mwaatthunihere orowa weera yamulape Yave Mulukwaaya. Khamusuwenle weera elapo ya wExipitu ennaheleya mathala?” 
Exodus10:8 Hiiho Moisesi ni Aharoni yaaronghiwa wa Farawu* ni aaweerela: “Murowe mwamulape Yave Mulukwaanyu. Mene mukileelase: Taani anaarowe?” 
Exodus10:9 Moisesi aamwaakhula: “Ontthuneya waakuxa ootheene: asimiravo ni asitokweene, anamwaniihu asilopwana ni asithiyana, ikhondoolosahu ni imombesahu, niwoko ninkela ompakela efesta Yave.”" 
Exodus10:10 Farawu* aamweerela: “Nyuwosa munoohaawela ekhavihero ya Yave miyo khootthuniherani orowa nyuwo ni anamwaniinyu! Wohooneya weera nyuwosa soowuupuwelasanyu siri moota mukina. 
Exodus10:11 Hata vakhaani! Eroweke asilopwana paahi weera yamulapeke Yave ntoko nyuwosa mvekenlaanyu.” Vano Moisesi ni Aharoni yaahoomolasiwa vamaithoni wa Farawu*. 
Exodus10:12 Mene Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mookoolele moono wExipitu weera misoope siwe mweelaponi yootheene ni weera siwenye mapoonda ootheene ni sootheene sihanle vahoolo wa maralala.” 
Exodus10:13 Moisesi aahookolela ekopwaawe wExipitu ni Yave aahoopiha epheyo mweelaponi eweelaka ninkhuma nsuwa nihuku nne ni ohiyu wootheene. Vano oxaawaya, epheyo ele yaaruuha misoope." 
Exodus10:14 Misoope saakwanela wExipitu wootheene ni aari nasope mwincipale aakwanenle mipatta sootheene. Khanakhale nasope, hata kharwa akhala." 
Exodus10:15 Saakwanela vathi wootheene moota wooweera elapo yaari wukaa. Saawenya sootheene saahanle vahoolo wa maralala – mapoonda ootheene ni soowiima sootheene sa nyiri. Khayaahanleru ekithi mmirini naari ntuphini mweelaponi yootheene ya wExipitu. 
Exodus10:16 Wowaakuveya Farawu* aarumiha wiitthaniwa Moisesi ni Aharoni aweerelaka: “Koomutthekela Yave, Mulukwaanyu ni kohootthekelani nyuwosa." 
Exodus10:17 Vano, mukileveleletho yootthekaaka ni mumvekele Yave Mulukwaanyu weera aronghe ottaiwaka nihooxo nna noowiiva.”" 
Exodus10:18 Moisesi aavenya wa Farawu* ni aamvekela Yave. 
Exodus10:19 Yave aahoopiha epheyo etokotoko yaakhuma ninkela nsuwa ni eyo yaakuxakuxa misoope enavonyera mphareiyani yooxeera. Khawaahanleru musoope naari mmoha mweelaponi yootheene ya wExipitu. 
Exodus10:20 Yavetho aahuumiha murima wa Farawu* ni owo khaatthunihera aYixrayeli orowa. 
Exodus10:21 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mweemexere matata osulu ni epiphi enoosareya elapo ya wExipitu; epiphi yoohoonaniwa.” 
Exodus10:22 Moisesi aaheemexera matata osulu ni wa mahuku mararu yaakhala epiphi etokotoko mweelaponi yootheene ya wExipitu. 
Exodus10:23 Khaawo aawera woona etthu hata ovenya vanipuroniwawe wookwana mahuku mararu. Wa soothesene, aYixrayeli ootheene yaakhalano waara mmapuroni yaamankaaya." 
Exodus10:24 Vano Farawu* aalamula wiitthaniwa Moisesi amweerelaka: “Murowe, mwamulape Yave – mpaka asithiyana ni anamwane eroweke. Paahi ikhondoolosanyu ni imombesanyu sihaleke wenno.”" 
Exodus10:25 Moisesitho aakhootta: “Nyuwo muneenaanyu munoonivaha axinama a sooveleela ni a soohisera weera hiyo namveleelele Yave. 
Exodus10:26 Ohiya toko hiiho, mihuwosahutho nnoorowano – hata mwaamunama mmoha khanghala! Ontthuneya waathanla akina a yaawo weera namulape Yave, Mulukwaahu, ni nihinaaye ophiya vanipuroni, khanaasuwela axinama heeni antthuneya waapaka sooveleela.”" 
Exodus10:27 Yavetho aahuumiha murimaawe Farawu* ni khaatthunihera aYixrayeli orowa. 
Exodus10:28 Farawu* aamweerela Moisesi: “Mukivenyerewo va! Mwiipasoope weera muhihokoleele ovira va. Nihuku muneeraanyu mphiye varaaka, munimookhwa.”" 
Exodus10:29 Moisesi aamwaakhula: “Onuukhale ntoko mweenraanyu: nkoonatho ekhovaanyu.” 
Exodus11:1 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Kinoomurumihelatho Farawu* ni wExipitu nihooxo nookisera. Wa nenno, owo onimootthuniherani ovenya va. Mpaka onoowoomolani woohihela iperwa." 
Exodus11:2 Mwaaleele atthu – asilopwana ni asithiyana – weera yaavekele aximwaattamanaaya itthu sa iyuuma soorikaxa.” 
Exodus11:3 Yave aahaakhaliha awExipitu oosivela mulokwaawe. Ohiya toko yeeyo, Moisesi muneenaawe aakhalano epili etokotoko wExipitu ni anamalakaawe Farawu* ni muloko wa awExipitu." 
Exodus11:4 Vano Moisesi aamweerela Farawu*: “Yave eenre ha: ‘Ehuhu ya ohiyu eriyari kinooviravira mwExipitu moothemwene. 
Exodus11:5 Matthaara ootheene a awExipitu animookhwa – okhuma ntthaara na Farawu* namukalamba, mpaka ntthaara na epottha ethiyana enxila, mpakatho matthaara a mihuwosaya." 
Exodus11:6 Vano onuukhale okhuwela ni wiinla otokotoko mweelaponi yootheene ya wExipitu ohitonke okhumelela naari khoorwa okhumelelatho. 
Exodus11:7 Wa soothesene, variyari wa aYixrayeli kheewo yoonanara eneera yaakhumelele atthu hoye hoye axinama. Vano munoosuwela weera Yave onoohiyanyiha oYixrayeli ni wExipitu." 
Exodus11:8 Anamalakaanyu ootheene ala animoorwa wa miyo ekikokhorelaka, ekidyoonttelelaka: ‘Mpwahe nyuwo vamoha ni mulokwaanyu onoottharani!’ Vahoolowaya kinoopwaha.” Vano, anyoonyiweene vancipale, Moisesi aavenya wa Farawu*." 
Exodus11:9 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Farawu* kharwa awiiwaani weera sootikhinihasaka saandyeerereye wExipitu.” 
Exodus11:10 Moisesi ni Aharoni yaapaka sootikhiniha sootheene iye ohoolo wa Farawu*, mene Yave aahuumiha murimaawe ni khaatthunihera opwaha aYixrayeli mulaponi." 
Exodus12:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi ni Aharoni wExipitu: 
Exodus12:2 “Mweeri ola okhaleke mweeri woopacera wa eyaakhaanyu. 
Exodus12:3 Mulamule muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli weera vanihukuni nanaamuloko na mweereene yoola khula mutthu a nyuwosa athanle eputtiputthi emoha hoye hoye epuri wa emusaawe; emoha wa khula etthoko. 
Exodus12:4 Emusi ekina yaahaatta atthu wa mwaamunama mpurukuma, ameelaneke ni mwaattamanaawe okhuveelananxaawe, attharihaka waatta wa atthu ni ongweraawe okhuura khula mutthu." 
Exodus12:5 Mwaamunama oothanliwa akhaleke mulopwana a eyaakha emoha oohirakala hata ekhalaka eputtiputthi naari epuri. 
Exodus12:6 Amuthokororeke mpaka nihuku na naamuloko ni maxexe na mweereene yoola ni aarooka oveleeliwa ni muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli, nsuwa nineelaka." 
Exodus12:7 Vano atthu ekuxeke ephome vakhaani ya mwaamunama iiviwe, ettikittheleke musereemuni soorakama ni yookhuveya sa masele a impa mwemmo eneeraaya ekhuurelemo enama." 
Exodus12:8 Ohiyuweene yoowo ekhuureke enama eyo yoowooxiwa ni makukhu oonyuunya ni epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu. 
Exodus12:9 Muhikhuure enama ekithi hata yoowaapeiwa, mene yoowooxiwa – muru, nyetto ni marupo." 
Exodus12:10 Muhixeeleleru mpaka waaxiiye; yakhala enghala, muhise." 
Exodus12:11 Mwaakhuuraka mukhale oolikaneene ovenya: Laamba muyuununi; ngwanreene ikwakwaatta, ni ekopo mmatatani. Mukhuureke mwaakuvihaka. Ola ti mPaska* a Yave." 
Exodus12:12 Ohiyuweene yoowo kinooviravira mweelaponi yootheene ya wExipitu ni kinimwiiva matthaara ootheene okhuma a atthu mpaka a axinama. Nkaanyoke ni nthorihelo mwa miluku sootheene sa wExipitu. Miyo ti Yave. 
Exodus12:13 Ephome eniikhale eneneero yoothoonyera impa muneeraanyu mukhale. Miyo koona ephome, kinoopwaherera. Nihooxo na onyoka khanirwa noophwanyaani Miyo kaawiinlihaka awExipitu." 
Exodus12:14 Nihuku nno nikhaleke noowuupuweleliwa nyuwosa ni ekhapiraanyu. Khula eyaakha vanihukuni nno mmuupuwelele mumpakelaka efesta Yave, ntoko nlamulo noohimala." 
Exodus12:15 Wa mahuku mathannameeli ontthuneya weera muceeke ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu. Munihukuni noopacera mukhumihere vaate eferementu, niwoko yoowo aneera ace yakhalaru etthu yooheliwa eferementu okhuma nihuku noopacera mpaka nanaathannameeli anoomoliwe mwa aYixrayeli." 
Exodus12:16 Mulattule muthukumano wootteela munihukuni noopacera ni mukina nihuku nanaathanameeli. Muhivareru muteko mahukweene yaawo erehereriweke paahi yooca ya atthu ootheene. Ti yeeyo paahi mutthuniheriwaanyu opaka. 
Exodus12:17 Muupuwelele efesta eyo ya epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu, niwoko naari nihuku nenenenno Miyo khaakhuminghaaka anakhottwaanyu wExipitu. Muupuwelele nihuku nno ntoko nlamulo noohimala wa ikhapirasanyu sootheene." 
Exodus12:18 Wa mweeri woopacera muceeke epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu okhuma wiila wa nihuku na naamuloko ni maxexe mpaka wiila wa nihuku na naamiloko miili ni nimoha. 
Exodus12:19 Wa mahuku mathannameeli nyuwosa muhikhalaneru eferementu owaani. Yoowo anaace yakhalaru etthu yooheliwa eferementu, hata akhalaka namarwa naari muYixrayeli, anoomoliwe munlokoni wa aYixrayeli." 
Exodus12:20 Muhice yakhalaru etthu yooheliwa eferementu. Weiwo muneeraanyu mwamake, mwaceeke epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu.”" 
Exodus12:21 Vano Moisesi aawiitthana asitokweene ootheene a aYixrayeli, anaweerela: “Muthanle eputtiputthi hoye hoye epuri wa khula emusi. Mpake yooveleela weera nimuupuwelele mPaska*." 
Exodus12:22 Muruweye iphandi sa hisopo* mphomeni eneera ekhale mpasiyani, ni muttikitthele musereemuni sa masele. Ahikhale a nyuwo aneera akhume mpaani mpaka oxa." 
Exodus12:23 Yave aaviraviraka mweelaponi weera awiive awExipitu, onimoona ephome musereemuni sa masele ni onoopwaha mulakweene yoowo. Mwa yeeyo, khamuntthunihera namanyoka ovolowa mmampaanimwanyu weera awiivaseni." 
Exodus12:24 Mwiiwelele ikano iya ntoko nlamulo noohimala wa nyuwo ni ikhapirasanyu sootheene. 
Exodus12:25 Mwaavolowaka mweelaponi Yave ororomelinghaawe woovahani, muupuwelele efesta ela." 
Exodus12:26 Vano anamwaniinyu yookohasani: ‘Efesta ela entaphulela eheeni?’ 
Exodus12:27 Mwaathalihere: ‘Ti yooveleela ya mPaska* wa Yave, mwa Yoowo aaviravinre mmampaani sa aYixrayeli wExipitu ni uurenle impasahu Owo awiivaka awExipitu.’” Vano muloko waahuurama omulapaka." 
Exodus12:28 aYixrayeli yaarowa enapaka yeeyo Yave aamulamunlenlaawe Moisesi ni Aharoni. 
Exodus12:29 Vano, ohiyu eriyari Yave aahiiva matthaara ootheene a wExipitu, okhuma ntthaara na Farawu*, namukalampa, mpaka ntthaara na namatthukiwa aari mukaliposo, nitho a mihuwo sootheene." 
Exodus12:30 Ohiyu eriyari, Farawu* vamoha ni anamalakaawe ni awExipitu ootheene yaaheemela. Yaakhala ekuttho etokotoko wExipitu, niwoko khayaariwo empa ahaakhanlaawewo nookhwa." 
Exodus12:31 Ohiyuweene yoole Farawu* aalamulela wiitthaniwa Moisesi ni Aharoni, anaweerela: “Mukivenyere woowaakuveya wa mulokwaaka nyuwosa ni aYixrayeli. Muroweke mwamulape Yave ntoko mumvekelaanyu." 
Exodus12:32 Mukuxe mihuwosanyu ntoko mwaahimalaanyu ni mukireelihe miyotho.” 
Exodus12:33 awExipitu yaahaanyesereriha aYixrayeli weera evenye woowaakuveya mulaponi yeeraka: “Ootheene hiyo nnikhweeke!” 
Exodus12:34 Vano muloko waakuxa ephepa yooweetheiwa yahaaheliwe eferementu ni waathatela yeetheliwaayamo ehuruwenleene mukuwonimwaya. 
Exodus12:35 aYixrayeli yaahaakhulela nlamulo na Moisesi ni yaahaavekela awExipitu itthu sa iyuuma soorikaxa ni ikuwotho. 
Exodus12:36 Yave aatava mirima sa awExipitu weera ewoonihere onnene aYixrayeli, moota wooweera yaahaavaha yeeyo aYixrayeli yaavekenlaaya. Hiiho awosa yaahaahuhula awExipitu." 
Exodus12:37 aYixrayeli yaavenya oRamesese erowaka oSukota. Yaari wookwanaka asilopwana 600 000 ooweetta waahiya asithiyana ni anamwane. 
Exodus12:38 Nakupa mutokotoko a moota wootheene wa anamarwa aarongwe ni yaawosa, ohiya waatta wa mihuwo sa imombe, ikhondoolo ni ipuri." 
Exodus12:39 Vano, yaapaka ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu evarelaka muteko ephepa yaawaannaaya wExipitu. Ephepa yaari yoohikhalano eferementu, niwoko noowoomolasiwa wExipitu ehikhalanaka ehuhu yooreherera yooca." 
Exodus12:40 Vano ehuhu aYixrayeli yaakhalaaya wExipitu, yaari ya iyaakha macira maxexe ni miloko miraru." 
Exodus12:41 Nihuku yaakwaniheraaya iyaakha macira maxexe ni miloko miraru, anakhotto ootheene a Yave yaavenya wExipitu." 
Exodus12:42 Woonaka weera Yave aahaawehaweha aYixrayeli ohiyuweene yoole weera aakhumihe wExipitu, vano ontthuneya weera aYixrayelitho ewehaweheke mwa ikhapirasaya sootheene ohiyuweene yoola weera emuttittimihase Yave." 
Exodus12:43 Yave aamweerela Moisesi ni Aharoni: “Ikano sa mPaska* ti iya: Khoontthuniheriwa weera namarwa amuceno. 
Exodus12:44 Epottha yoothummwa emuceeke mPaska* yiineliwaru. 
Exodus12:45 Vaheera namarwa hoye hoye namuteko ahikhanle muYixrayeli ahimuce. 
Exodus12:46 Munceeke ntthoko nimoha paahi. Muhikhumihere vaate naari entthuri emoha hata muhipwexeru nikhuva. 
Exodus12:47 Muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli ompakeke mPaska*. 
Exodus12:48 Akhalaru namarwa omanke variyariwanyu ontthuna ompaka mPaska* a Yave, awiineleke asilopwana a emusaawe yootheene. Vahoolowaya amuceekeno ntoko neethi a mulaponi. Ahikhale oohiineliwa aneera amuceno." 
Exodus12:49 Ikanosene seiya seetteliweke wa muYixrayeli ni namarwa omankemo.” 
Exodus12:50 Vano aYixrayeli ootheene yaapaka yeeyo Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi ni Aharoni. 
Exodus12:51 Nihuku nenenenne Yave aahaakhumiha aYixrayeli wExipitu attharihaka mipatta soohiyanahiyana sa anakhottwaaya. 
Exodus13:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Exodus13:2 “Mukitteelihere matthaara ootheene. Khula ntthaara na muloko ti nawaka; khaahiyono paahi atthuru, menetho axinama.”" 
Exodus13:3 Vano Moisesi aaheerela muloko: “Muupuwelele nihuku nna nyuwo mwaakhumalaanyu wExipitu, elapo ya okaporwaanyu, niwoko Yave ohookhumihani iwe ni ntatanawe nooweraxa. Muhiceru yooheliwa eferementu." 
Exodus13:4 Nihuku nna na mweeri wa Abibi, nyuwo mookhuma." 
Exodus13:5 Yave oovoleihakani mweelaponi ya aKanaani, aHiti, awAmori, aHivi ni aYebusi, vano muupuwelele opaka efesta mweereene yoola. Ti elapweene yeeyo Owo aaroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo makholowaanyu weera aarwa woovahani; elapo yoosareya oravo ni mukaka." 
Exodus13:6 Wa mahuku mathannameeli muceeke epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu ni nihuku nanaathanameeli mumpakele Yave efesta ela. 
Exodus13:7 Muceeke epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu wa mahuku mathanameeli awo. Ehiphwanyaneyeru yookhalano eferementu variyariwanyu, hata ehikhaleru eferementu mweelaponimwanyu." 
Exodus13:8 Nihuku nno khula mutthu amweereleke mwanawe mulopwana: ‘Kimpaka hiiha, niwoko na yeele Yave okipakenlaawe kaakhumaaka wExipitu.’" 
Exodus13:9 Eyo eniyookhaleleni eneneero mmatatanimwanyu ni yoowuupuwelela vayuuciwanyu, weera Nlamulo na Yave nikhale vayanoniwanyu, niwoko Yave ohookhumihani wExipitu ni ntatanawe nooweraxa." 
Exodus13:10 Mukwanihere ikano iya ehuhu emoharu yeeyo wa khula eyaakha. 
Exodus13:11 Vahoolo woowoovoleihani Yave mweelaponi ya aKanaani ntoko oororomelinghaaweni ni nlipelo nyuwo ni makholowaanyu, ni woovahani," 
Exodus13:12 vano muntteelihere Yave ntthaara na khula engyariwa. Mwaxaana napunci a mihuwo sootheene ti a Yave. 
Exodus13:13 Matthaara ootheene a abuuru yoopoliwe ni eputtiputthi, mene mwaahitthuna woopola, vano mwintake exiko. Moopoleletho matthaara ootheene a anamwaniinyu ni eputtiputthi." 
Exodus13:14 Muhoolommo anamwaniinyu yookohani: ‘entaphulela eheeni yeela?,’ vano mwaaleele: ‘Yave onikhuminghe wExipitu, elapo ya okaporo ni ntata nooweraxa." 
Exodus13:15 Farawu* aakhoottaawe ni murima woowuuma weera nipwaheke, Yave aahiiva matthaara ootheene wExipitu, okhuma a atthu mpaka a axinama. Tivawo nnimveleelelaahu Yave khula napunci mwaaxaana a ntthaara ni nnoopolela matthaaraahu malopwana ootheene.’" 
Exodus13:16 Eyo eniyookhaleleni eneneero mmatatanimwanyu ni yoowuupuwelela vayuuciwanyu, weera Yave oonikhumiha wExipitu ni ntatanawe nooweraxa.”" 
Exodus13:17 Farawu* aatthuniheraawe muloko orowa, Muluku khaavirihale mpatta wa aFilisti yaarookhalaru ephiro yoothikila, niwoko Muluku eenre: “Awosa yavolowa mukhottoni, kapena eniirukunuwe, ehokoleelaka wExipitu.”" 
Exodus13:18 Hiiho Muluku aahaarukureeriha aYixrayeli munikareni ekuxeraka ephiro enrowa Ephareiya Yooxeera. aYixrayeli yaavenya wExipitu oolikaneene owana. 
Exodus13:19 Moisesi aakuxa makhuva a Yoseefe, niwoko Yoseefe aahaalipeliha anamwane a Yixrayeli aweerelaka: “Vekhaikhai Muluku anookhaviheraseni ni ehuhuweene yeeyo ekuxeke makhuvaaka nno.”" 
Exodus13:20 aYixrayeli yaattimula oSukoti, enakonela wEtami, mukerekhere nikare." 
Exodus13:21 Othana Yave aakhala ohoolowaya ni nrimbu na mahutte weera aweettihe mphironi, ni ohiyu ni nrimbu na mooro weera aamwaleele. Hiiho yaangwera weetta othana ni ohiyu." 
Exodus13:22 Nrimbu na mahutte ni nrimbu na mooro naakhala ohoolowaya ehuhu yootheene. 
Exodus14:1 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Exodus14:2 “Mwaalamule aYixrayeli weera evenye akonenlaaya ni yakonele woowaattamela oPi-Hahiroti, eriyari ya oMigedoli ni ephareiya. Ekoneleke mukerekhere ephareiya okhopela oBahal-Zifeyoni." 
Exodus14:3 Farawu* onimuupuwela: ‘aYixrayeli anxoraxora oopupurumeene erukureeriweene nikare.’ 
Exodus14:4 Vano nkuumihe murima wa Farawu* ni owo onimwaatthimakela. Wa soothesene, Miyo nkittottopeliwe mwa Farawu* ni anakhottwaawe ootheene, ni awExipitu ootheene anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.” Vano aYixrayeli yaapaka hiiho." 
Exodus14:5 Aathaliheriwa mwene a wExipitu weera aYixrayeli aatthawa. Farawu* ni anamalakaawe yaaceendya soowuupuwelasaya yeeraka: “Nipankeni? Nohaatthunihera aYixrayeli orowa ni vano nooyeleela ipotthasahu!” 
Exodus14:6 Hiiho Farawu* aarumiha olikanxiwa ekaarwaawe ya ekavalu*, anaarowano anakhottwaawe." 
Exodus14:7 Aakuxa ikaaro sa ikavalu* macira mathannamosa sooreerela vamoha ni ikaaro sa ikavalu* sootheene sikina sa wExipitu; khula ekaaro ni mutokweene. 
Exodus14:8 Yave aahuumiha murima wa Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu, ni owo aahaatthimakela aYixrayeli, mwa yaawo yeetta moowinani." 
Exodus14:9 awExipitu ni ikavalu*, ikaaro sa ekhotto sootheene sa Farawu*, vamoha ni anamweettiha a ikavalu* nitho anakhotto yaavenya yaatthimakelaka aYixrayeli. Vano yaahaaphwanya yaakonenlaayawo mukerekhere ephareiya ya oPi-Hahiroti, okhopela wa oBahali-Zifeyoni." 
Exodus14:10 Farawu* awaattamelaka, aYixrayeli yaaweha, enawoona awExipitu yaarweelasaka. Yaahoova vancipale, enamukhuwelela Yave." 
Exodus14:11 Yaamweerela Moisesi: “Yaahaleela mahiyaahu wExipitu muniruuhenlaanyu weera nikhwe munikareni? Munipankeni munivenxaka wuuwu? 
Exodus14:12 Hiyo nireene nlelo wExipitu naahooleelani: ‘Munihiyeke nikhale ipottha sa awExipitu. Fataari naari ipottha sa awExipitu ohikhanle okhwa munikareni!’” 
Exodus14:13 Moisesi aaweerela: “Muhoove, mminye murima ni moone olelo ovuluxa wa Yave. awExipitu mungwoonaanyu olelo khamurwa ngwoonatho." 
Exodus14:14 Yave onoowana aweerelakani nyuwo – mweereke omaala paahi!” 
Exodus14:15 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Nyuwo munkikhuwelela heeni? Mwaaleele aYixrayeli weera epwaherere!” 
Exodus14:16 Mutheteye ekopwaanyu ni mookolele moonowaanyu mphareiya ni maahi anookawanyeya weera aYixrayeli elapuwe vatthayani yoowuumeene. 
Exodus14:17 Wa soothesene, Miyo kinimuumiha mirima sa awExipitu ni awosa animoottharelelani. Kinimwaakhela ovuwa moomphwatani Farawu*, anakhottwaawe ootheene, ikaarosawe sa ekhotto ni anamweettiha a ikavalu*." 
Exodus14:18 awExipitu anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave kaavuwihiwaka moomphwatani Farawu*, ikaarosawe sa ekhotto ni anamweettiha a ikavalu*.”" 
Exodus14:19 Vano ndyelo a Muluku aahoolela anakhotto a aYixrayeli aavenya, anaakhalela ottuliwaaya. Hiihotho nrimbu na mahutte naavenya ohoolowaya, nnaakhalelatho ottuliwaya" 
Exodus14:20 variyari wa awExipitu ni aYixrayeli. Nrimbu naaruuhela epiphi wa awExipitu ni waara wa aYixrayeli. Hiiho awExipitu khayaawenre owaattamela aYixrayeli ohiyu wootheene. 
Exodus14:21 Vano Moisesi aahookolela moonowaawe mphareiyani ni Yave aakawanyiha ephareiya, anatatuxa etthaya yoowuuma ni epheyo etokotoko yaaweela ninkhuma nsuwa yoopale ohiyu wootheene. Maahi yaakawanyeya" 
Exodus14:22 ni aYixrayeli yaalapuwa ephareiya vatthayani yoowuuma sireene ixiri sa maahi moono mulopwana ni muthiyana. 
Exodus14:23 awExipitu yaahaattharelela ni ikavalu* sootheene, ikaaro sa ekhotto ni anamweettiha a ikavalu* sootheene sa Farawu* mpaka eriyari ya ephareiya." 
Exodus14:24 Oxiiyeene Yave aawona anakhotto awExipitu vanrimbuni na mahutte ni mooro ni aahaarukureerihasa nyuru. 
Exodus14:25 Aakhuliha mareko a ikaarosaya moota wooweera yaakhalano makacamiho ooweettiha. Vano awExipitu yaaheerelana: “Nrowe naatthawe aYixrayeli! Yave ongwana ni hiyo aweerelaka yaawosa!” 
Exodus14:26 Vanonto Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mookolele moonowaanyu mphareiyani weera maahi yaakhuneele awExipitu, ikaarosaya sa ekhotto ni anamweettiha a ikavalu*.”" 
Exodus14:27 Moisesi aahookolela moonowaawe mphareiyani ni nsuwa nikhumaka ephareiya yaawalana. awExipitu yaatthawaaya yaakumana maahi ni Yave aahaamirengha mphareiya. 
Exodus14:28 Maahi yaakhuneela ikaarosaya sa ekhotto, anamweettiha a ikavalusaya* nitho anakhotto ootheene a Farawu* yaattharelenle aYixrayeli mpaka mphareiya. Khawowo aahanle ni okumi." 
Exodus14:29 Vaheera aYixrayeli yaalapuwasa ephareiya yeettaka vatthayani yoowuuma sireene ixiri sa maahi moono mulopwana ni muthiyana. 
Exodus14:30 Nihuku nne Yave aahaavuluxa aYixrayeli mmatatani mwa awExipitu ni aYixrayeli yaawoona awExipitu ookhweene mphareiya. 
Exodus14:31 aYixrayeli yaahoonasa ikuru sitokotoko sa Yave aawananaka awExipitu, yaamoova Yave ni yaamuroromela Yoowo nitho murumeiyaawe Moisesi." 
Exodus15:1 Vano Moisesi ni aYixrayeli yaamwiipelasa Yave ecipo ela: “Kinimwiipela Yave niwoko ti oowina moovuwani. Oovonyera mphareiya ekavalu* ni namweettihaaya. 
Exodus15:2 Yave ti ikurusaka ni ecipwaaka; ti ovuluxiwawaka. Owo ti Mulukwaaka ni nkimuttottopele; ti Muluku a atithaka ni kinoomvuwiha. 
Exodus15:3 Yave ti Nakhotto; Nsinanawe ti Yave. 
Exodus15:4 Owo oovonyera mphareiya ikaaro sa ekhotto ni anakhotto a Farawu*. Ephareiya yooxeera yaahaamira asitokweene ooreerela a anakhottwaawe Farawu*. 
Exodus15:5 Maahi oowiixera yaahaakhuneela; aaneela woowiixa ntoko nluku. 
Exodus15:6 Ntatananyu noolopwana, Yave, naari noovuwihiweene mooweraxani. Ntatananyu noolopwana, Yave, nohaanyaanya amwiittana." 
Exodus15:7 Moowinanimwanyu otokotoko mohaaphwata amwiittanaanyu. Moorumiha isarasanyu soovarela ni iyo sohaahisa ntoko malaxi. 
Exodus15:8 Ngwiya woolipa wa mphulanimwanyu waathukumanya maahi; maahi oowuupa yaari ntoko exiri. Maahi oowiixera aavaraana mmirimani eriyari ephareiya. 
Exodus15:9 Mwiittana aahiihima: ‘Nkaattharatthare; nkaaphwanye; nkakawanye soohuhula ni nkaanyaanye. Ni ekatanaaka nkaahonone.’ 
Exodus15:10 Nyuwotho mohiiseelela mphareiya ni eyo yohaakhuneela. Aaneela ntoko eyuuma yoolemela mmaahini oowiixera. 
Exodus15:11 Taani a miluku sikina ori ntoko Nyuwo, Yave? Taani onlikana Nyuwo? Mutokweene mootteelanimwanyu; ooweraxa mmutekoni woovuwa, Muneene a sootikhiniha." 
Exodus15:12 Munookola moonowaanyu mulopwana ni elapo enaamira. 
Exodus15:13 Moosivelanimwanyu muneettiha muloko mooponlaanyu; mukurunimwanyu munrongha vaNipuroniwanyu Nootteela*. 
Exodus15:14 Miloko sinniiwa ni sinthukumela; othanana onnaavara aFilisti. 
Exodus15:15 Asitokweene a wEdomi anoopopiheya; asitokweene a oMowabi woohaavara woova ni yaawo amanke oKanaani aatteenguwa. 
Exodus15:16 Woova ni otteenguwa ongwuuwela yaawosa. Ni ikuru sa moonowaanyu ankhala ooweemeleene ntoko nluku mpaka ovira mulokwaanyu, Yave, mwa yoowo muthummaanyu." 
Exodus15:17 Nyuwo mmwivolonghe ni mmwiphattheye vamwaakoniwanyu wa yoohiyeriwa; elapo Nyuwo, Yave, mpakenle wookhalawaya; Nipuro Nootteela* matataanyu atenkaaya." 
Exodus15:18 Nyuwo Yave munlamula wa mahuku ootheene.” 
Exodus15:19 Ikavalu*, ikaaro sa ekhotto ni anaweettiha a ikavalu* sa Farawu* evolowakaru mphareiya, Yave aahaakumanyihera maahi a ephareiya. Vaheera aYixrayeli yaalapuwa ephareiya vatthayani yoowuuma." 
Exodus15:20 Vano Miriyami, mprofeeti muthiyana ni murokoriye Aharoni, aakuxa ekoma ni asithiyana ootheene yaamutthara, yiipaka ikoma ni yiinasaka." 
Exodus15:21 Miriyami aawaakhulela iipaka: “Mmwiipele Yave, niwoko oowina moovuwani. Oovonyera mphareiyani ekavalu* ni namweettihaaya.”" 
Exodus15:22 Vahoolowaya Moisesi aaweettiha aYixrayeli okhuma Ephareiya Yooxeera mpaka munikareni na oXuri. Yaaheetta mahuku mararu munikareni ehiphwanyaka maahi. 
Exodus15:23 Yaaphiyasa oMara, mene khayaawera owura maahi a mwemmwe, niwoko yaari oowaawa. Tivawo nipuro nne nniitthaniwaaya oMara." 
Exodus15:24 Vano muloko waapacera omuttaandawula Moisesi weeraka: “Niwureni?” 
Exodus15:25 Moisesi aamukhuwelela Yave ni Owo aamuthoonyera nthatu noowuuma. Moisesi aavonyera mmaahini ni awo yaathatuwa ooreera. oMara Yave aahaavaha aYixrayeli ikano ni malamulo ni aawoota murima," 
Exodus15:26 aweerelaka: “Nyuwosa mwamwiiwelela Yave, Mulukwaanyu, ni mwapaka yeeyo onaakhulelaawe ni mwiiwelela malamulowaawe muttharaka ikanosawe sootheene, nkoorumihelasani hata eretta emoha sa seiye kaarumihenlaaka awExipitu, niwoko Miyo ti Yave onoolamihani.”" 
Exodus15:27 Vahoolowaya yaaphiyasa wElimi yaaraayawo anaattuuttu muloko neeli a maahi ni mavare miloko mithannamiili. Vano yaakonelasa vamaaheene yaale. 
Exodus16:1 aYixrayeli ootheene yaattimula wElimi, enaphiya onikareni na oSini weenre nno wElimi ni oSinayi. Naari nihuku nanaamuloko ni mathanu na mweeri wanaaveeli evennyeene wExipitu." 
Exodus16:2 Munikareni muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli waamuttaandawula Moisesi ni Aharoni. 
Exodus16:3 aYixrayeli yaaweerela: “Eya! Fataari Yave aaniivenle wExipitu! Wuuwu naakilaathi nrinceene nyaapu sa enama ni naaca yooca naatthunelaahu. Vaheera nyuwo muniruuhenle munikarenimu weera nakupa ootheene ola akhwe etala.” 
Exodus16:4 Wa soothesene, Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Miyo kinoowiitthelelasani sooca sa wiirimu. Khula nihuku muloko onoovenyera ottottaka yookwana oca wa nihukuni. Mwa yeeyo kinoowoota murima weera kiwoone yaattharaka hoye hoye yaahittharaka ikanosaka." 
Exodus16:5 Vano, vanihukuni nanaathannamosa, yiittotteleke ya mahuku meeli weera erehereriwe.”" 
Exodus16:6 Hiiho Moisesi ni Aharoni yaaweerelasa aYixrayeli ootheene: “Wiilaka mmwisuwele weera ti Yave ookhumihaleni wExipitu. 
Exodus16:7 Vano omaalo ohinaxeru munimoonasa ovuwa wa Yave, niwoko ohiiwa omuttaandawulawanyu. Hiyo taani weera nyuwosa munikhupanye?”" 
Exodus16:8 Moisesi aaweerelatho: “Yave onimoovahasani enama yookhuura waaxekuwaka, ni sooca muntthunelaanyu oxeexelo, niwoko ohiiwa omuttaandawulawanyu. Hiyo taani? Khamunnikhupanya hiyo, mene Yave.”" 
Exodus16:9 Vano Moisesi aamweerela Aharoni: “Muleele muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli: ‘Mwiixoonihere ohoolo wa Yave, niwoko Owo ohiiwa wiikhupanyerawanyu.’”" 
Exodus16:10 Aharoni uulumaka ni muloko wootheene, yaawehasa ootheene onikareni ni ovuwa wa Yave waakhumelelawo vanihutteni." 
Exodus16:11 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Exodus16:12 “Kohiiwa ottaandawula wa aYixrayeli. Mwaaleele: ‘Wiilaka munookhuura enama; waaxaaka munoovonasa yooca. Hiiho munoosuwelasa weera Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu.’” 
Exodus16:13 Wiilaka yaahoorwa anapiri yaakonenlaayawo ni oxeexelo naahiima nikame nincipalexa nirukureenreene yaakonelasiyaayawo. 
Exodus16:14 Nimorakaru nikame, saahalahala vathi itthu sikhaanene sivaranneene pharamanda." 
Exodus16:15 Vano aYixrayeli yoonakaru yeeyo yaaheerelana: “Eheeni yeela?” Khayaasuwelasa yeereiya. Moisesi aaweerela: “Ela ti yooca Yave oovahasiyaaweni weera muce. 
Exodus16:16 Yave aavaha nlamulo nna: ‘Khula pwattapwattha a emusi akhupeke ontthunelaawe. Akuxe ikiilu* piili wa khula mutthu a muheemanimwawe.’” 
Exodus16:17 aYixrayeli yaapaka yeeyo yaaleeliwaaya – akina yaakhupa yoowaatta; akina vakhaaneene. 
Exodus16:18 Eringakaru ni waatta wa ikiilu* piili yaawo yaakhumpe yincipale khayaahanle, ni yaawo yaakhumpe vakhaani yaakwanela. Khula mutthu aakhupa aatthunelaawe." 
Exodus16:19 Vano Moisesi aahaalamulela: “Ahikhale aneera axeelele ya omaalo.” 
Exodus16:20 Wa soothesene, akina a yaawo khayaamwiiwelenle Moisesi ni yaaxeelela vakhaani mpaka waaxiiye. Mene yeeyo yaasareya nyuungu ni yaahunkha woovirula. Tivawo Moisesi aanyoonyeringwaawe." 
Exodus16:21 Khula oxeexelo ootheene yannakhupasa yaatthunelaaya, niwoko nsuwa naavihaaya iyo sannatothowa." 
Exodus16:22 Nihuku nanaathannamosa yaakhupasa ya mahuku meeli – ikiilu* ixexe wa khula mutthu. Vano asitokweene a aYixrayeli yaarowa omuthalihera Moisesi. 
Exodus16:23 Owo aahaathalihera: “Nlamulo na Yave ti nna: ‘Omaalo nnikhale nihuku na wiitthuuwa; eSaabadu yootteeliheriwa Yave. Mooxeke ni mwaapeyeke muntthunelaanyu. Muthokororeke enghala mpaka waaxiiye.” 
Exodus16:24 Hiiho yaathokorora yeeyo mpaka waaxiiye, ntoko Moisesi aalamulenlaawe ni khayunkhaleru hata khayaarino nyuungu." 
Exodus16:25 Moisesi aaweerela: “Mucaaseke olelo, niwoko olelo ti eSaabadu ya Yave. Olelo nyuwosa khamuphwanyawo." 
Exodus16:26 Wa mahuku mathannamosa mukhupaseke, vaheera nihuku nanaathanameeli khamuphwanya etthu.”" 
Exodus16:27 Waarookhalaru hiiho, akina a yaawo yaavenya nihuku nanaathannameeli weera yakhupe, mene khayaaphwannye etthu." 
Exodus16:28 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mpaka yaakhani muneeraanyu muhiye orambura ikanosaka ni malamulowaaka? 
Exodus16:29 Muupuwelele weera Yave ohoovahani nihuku na eSaabadu, tivawo nihuku nanaathannamosa Owo onnoovahani sooca sa mahuku meeli. Nihuku na eSaabadu, khula mutthu akhaleke vanipuroniwawe; ahikhale aneera avenye." 
Exodus16:30 Vano muloko waahiitthuuwa nihuku nanaathannameeli. 
Exodus16:31 aYixrayeli yaatteha yooca ele emana*. Yaari yootteela ntoko etthabwe ni yaasiva ntoko mukotto wa oravo. 
Exodus16:32 Moisesi aaheera: “Nlamulo na Yave ti nna: ‘Mukuxe ikiilu* piili sa emana* weera mukhapelelele ikhapira sa muhoolo weera yoone sooca koovanghaakani munikareni Miyo kookhumihaakani wExipitu.’” 
Exodus16:33 Moisesi aamweerela Aharoni: “Muhele mutthuni yookwana ikiilu* ixexe sa emana*. Vahoolowaya mwiikaathi ohoolo wa Yave weera ekhapeleleye wa ikhapira sa muhoolo.” 
Exodus16:34 Aharoni aahiikaathi emana* ohoolo wa Namoona* weera ekhapeleleye vaavaale, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Exodus16:35 aYixrayeli yaahooca emana* wa iyaakha miloko mixexe mpaka yaaphiyaaya elapo yoomakeya. Yaahooca emana* mpaka yaaphiyaaya mwiinano wa oKanaani. 
Exodus16:36 Vano miringo yaakhupelaya khula nihuku ti mpatta wanaamuloko wa efa*. 
Exodus17:1 Muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli waattimula onikareni na oSini, weeraka okhelanno okhelanno, ottharihaka Nlamulo na Yave. Vano waakonela oRefidimi, mene iwe khayaariwo maahi oowura." 
Exodus17:2 Niwoko nenenenno aYixrayeli yaamuttaandawula Moisesi emunyesereraka: “Munivahe maahi niwure!” Moisesi aawaakhula: “Munkittaandawulela heeni? Mummootela heeni murima Yave?” 
Exodus17:3 Mulokotho ovoliweene ntthona waamuttaandawula Moisesi omweerelaka: “Muniruuhenle heeni wExipitu? Muniruuhenle weera nikhwe ntthona – hiyo, anamwaniihu ni mihuwosahu?”" 
Exodus17:4 Vano Moisesi aahiikhupanyera wa Yave eeraka: “Nkeeriheni muloko ola? Ohanle vakhaani okivonya maluku!” 
Exodus17:5 Yave aamwaakhula: “Murowe ohoolo wa muloko. Muroweno asitokweene a aYixrayeli mukuxaleene ekopo yeele mwaammanenlaanyu mooloko Nilo, ni muroweke ohoolo." 
Exodus17:6 Miyo kinimoowehererani vamwala vamwaako Horebi. Mwamane mwala, ni vawo anookhuma maahi oowura muloko.” Moisesi aapaka hiiho vamaithoni wa asitokweene a aYixrayeli." 
Exodus17:7 Owo aatteha nipuro nne Masa ni Meriba, niwoko iwe aYixrayeli yaattaandawula emootaka murima Yave, yeeraka: “Yave ori ni hiyo, hoye hoye khakhanle?”" 
Exodus17:8 Vano awAmaleki yaahaarweela waawanano aYixrayeli oRefidimi. 
Exodus17:9 Moisesi aamweerela Yoxuwa: “Mwaathanle anakhotto akina a atthwaahu ni murowe mwaawaneno awAmaleki. Omaalo kinimweemela vasulu wa nttumuxa ni ekopo ya Muluku mmatatanimwaka. 
Exodus17:10 Hiiho Yoxuwa aarowa waawanano awAmaleki ntoko Moisesi aamulamulenlaawe, vaheera Moisesi, Aharoni ni Huri yaawelasa osulu nttumuxa." 
Exodus17:11 Ehuhu yootheene Moisesi eemexaawe nyoono, aYixrayeli yaahaleela owina, mene imaara sootheene aakuruxaawe nyoono, awAmaleki yaahaleela owina." 
Exodus17:12 Moisesi saamuumaaya nyoono, awosa yaakuxa nluku, emwiikaatheraka vathiwawe weera akilaathele. Aharoni ni Huri yaattukhulela nyoono sa Moisesi osulu – mmoha moono mulopwana ni mukina muthiyana. Hiiho nyoonosawe saapwaherera soottukhuleyeene mpaka oneela nsuwa." 
Exodus17:13 Vano Yoxuwa aahaawina anakhotto a awAmaleki ni ekatana. 
Exodus17:14 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mulepe yeeyo mulivuruni ntoko etthu yoowuupuwelela ni munthalihere nnenesene Yoxuwa weera awAmaleki nkaakhalihe oottiwaliwa mweelaponi yootheene. 
Exodus17:15 Moisesi aahaateka altaari*, anaatteha: Yave Nisi*" 
Exodus17:16 Aaheera: “Matata yaawelihiwa ohoolo wa ehice ya wiirimu. Yave onnaawanano awAmaleki khula ekhapira. 
Exodus18:1 Vano Yethero, musaserdoti* a oMidiyani ni atatawe oowaathelela Moisesi, aasuwela sootheene Muluku aapakaawe mwa Moisesi ni wa muloko wa aYixrayeli ni moota Yave aakhumihalaawe aYixrayeli wExipitu." 
Exodus18:2 Moisesi aamuruma mwaariye, Zipora, vaate wa atatawe oowaathelela, Yethero, aamwaakhelenle" 
Exodus18:3 vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana eeli. Mmoha a yaawosa iitthaniwa Gerxomo, niwoko Moisesi eenre: “Koothatuwa namarwa mweelaponi ekina.”" 
Exodus18:4 Mukina iitthaniwa Eliyezeri, niwoko eenre: “Muluku a atithaka aari namakhaviheraaka; ookivuluxa wa ekatana ya Farawu*.”" 
Exodus18:5 Yethero, atatawe oowaathelela Moisesi, vamoha ni anamwanaawe ni mwaariye Moisesi, yaahoowa omukumanano munikareni aakonenlaawe, vakhiviru wa mwaako wa Muluku." 
Exodus18:6 Yethero aarumiha oleeliwa Moisesi: “Ti miyo, atatinyu oowaathelela, kineera kirwaaka wookumananani vamoha ni mwaarinyu ni anamwanaawe asilopwana eeli.”" 
Exodus18:7 Vano Moisesi aahaaciceera atatawe, anuurama, anaabeeca. Yaahuulumihana, enavolowasa muheemani." 
Exodus18:8 Moisesi aahaathalihera atatawe sootheene Yave aampakenlaawe Farawu* ni awExipitu ngwaasivelani aYixrayeli ni sa makacamiho ootheene yaaweereela mphironi ni moota Yave aavulunxaawe. 
Exodus18:9 Yethero aahakalala woowiiwa itthu sooreera sootheene Yave aapakenlaawe aYixrayeli aavulunxaawe mmatatani mwa awExipitu. 
Exodus18:10 Aaheera: “Atthapeliwe Yave, mwa Yoowo oovuluxanseni mmatatani mwa awExipitu ni Farawu* ni ovulunxe muloko mmatatani mwa awExipitu." 
Exodus18:11 Vano koosuwela weera Yave ti mutokweene oopwaha miluku sootheene sikina, niwoko na yeeyo aapakenlaawe yaawo yaahasula aYixrayeli moota woowiixoona.”" 
Exodus18:12 Yethero, atatawe Moisesi, yaampakela Muluku sooveleela soohisa ni sooveleela sikina. Vano Aharoni vamoha ni asitokweene ootheene a aYixrayeli yaahoorwa weera ece ni atatawe Moisesi vamaithoni wa Muluku." 
Exodus18:13 Oxaawaya Moisesi aakilaathi weera athalihe mikhalelo sa muloko ni atthu yaamurukureera okhuma oxeexelo mpaka oxekuwa. 
Exodus18:14 Atatawe Moisesi, yoonaka sootheene aapakelaawe muloko, yaamweerela: “Nyuwo mumpakani? Munkilaathela heeni weera muthalihe nyuwo paahi muloko wootheene ola woorukureerakani okhuma oxeexelo mpaka oxekuwa?”" 
Exodus18:15 Moisesi aawaakhula: “Muloko onkeerela va kimukohe Muluku. 
Exodus18:16 Imaara sootheene mukina omvalavelaawe ti ankiruuhelaaya ni miyo kinoolakela variyari wa ooweeli, kaathaliheraka ikano ni malamulo a Muluku.”" 
Exodus18:17 Atatawe Moisesi yaamwaakhula: “Yeeyo mumpakaanyu kheereenre. 
Exodus18:18 Nyuwo ni mulokwaanyu munoovelasa. Muteko ola ti woowoolemelaxani – khoongwereya okhalela meekhiinyu. 
Exodus18:19 Mukiiweke – kinimoolakani ni Muluku akhaleke ni nyuwo. Ontthuneya weera mukhale muhooleli a muloko vamaithoni wa Muluku muroihaka wa Muluku soovalavelihasaya. 
Exodus18:20 Mwaaxuttihe mukanoni ni mmalamuloni ni ngwooniheraka moota wooweetta mookumuni ni mmutekoni. 
Exodus18:21 Mwaathanle variyari wa muloko wootheene asilopwana oowera, mwa yaawo ammoova Muluku, oororomeleya ni oothanya makhwankwa. Mwaakhalihase ntoko asitokweene a macira muloko, ncira, miloko mithanu ni muloko mmoha." 
Exodus18:22 Awosa ekhaleke aphuki a muloko mahuku ootheene weera ethorihe soovalaveliha. Yooruuhelekeni nyuwo paahi seiyo soorikaxa, vaheera sookhweyakhweya elakeleke asineenaaya. Hiiho eyo enooveruwiha mutekwaanyu, niwoko aakawana ni nyuwo." 
Exodus18:23 Mwapaka hiiho ni Muluku alamulela, munoowera ovilela olemela wa muteko ni atthu ootheene ala anoohokoleela owaani oohakalaleene.”" 
Exodus18:24 Moisesi aahaakhulela miruku sa atatawe ni aapaka sootheene awo yaamuleenlaaya. 
Exodus18:25 Aahaathanla asilopwana oowera variyari wa aYixrayeli ootheene ni aahaakhaliha ntoko asitokweene a muloko; asitokweene a macira muloko, ncira, miloko mithanu ni muloko mmoha." 
Exodus18:26 Awosa yaakhala anamathoriha a muloko wa mahuku ootheene. Soovalaveliha soorikaxa yaamuronghela Moisesi, mene seiye sookhweyakhweya yaalakela asineenaaya." 
Exodus18:27 Vano Moisesi aahaalaxera atatawe ni Yethero aahokoleela elapwaawe. 
Exodus19:1 Nihuku yaakwaniherasaaya nyeeri miraru aYixrayeli evennyeene wExipitu, yaaphiyasa nikare na oSinayi." 
Exodus19:2 Evennyeene oRefidimi, yaavolowa munikareni na oSinayi ni aYixrayeli yaakonelawo mukerekhere mwaako." 
Exodus19:3 Vano Moisesi aawela mwaako weera amukumaneno Muluku ni Yave aamwiitthana wa mwaako eeraka: “Mwaleele masu ala ekhapira ya Yakobe, aYixrayeli:" 
Exodus19:4 “Nyuwo mohoona yeeyo kaapakenlaaka awExipitu ni moota kookuxalaakani mmapuphani mwa xaaka ni kooruuhalaakani wa Miyo. 
Exodus19:5 Vano mwakiiwelela oororomeleyeene ni mwathokorora wiiraanyihawaka, munookhala atthu ootthuneyaaka variyari wa miloko sootheene. Erookhalaru elapo yootheene yawaka," 
Exodus19:6 nyuwosa munookhala omwene wa asaserdoti* ni mulokwaaka wootteela.’ Mwaaleele masu ala aYixrayeli.” 
Exodus19:7 Vano Moisesi aahokolowa, anaawiitthana asitokweene a muloko ni aahaathalihera masu ootheene Yave aamulamulenlaawe ohima." 
Exodus19:8 Muloko wootheene waamwaakhula vamoha: “Hiyo nnoopaka sootheene Yave olamulenlaawe.” Hiiho Moisesi aamuronghela Yave yoowaakhulaaya. 
Exodus19:9 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Kinimoorwa wa nyuwo munihutteni nooriipihana weera muloko okiiwaka wuuluma, woororomeleni mahuku ootheene.” Vano Moisesi aamuthalihera Yave yoowaakhula ya muloko." 
Exodus19:10 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Murowe wa muloko ni mwatteelihe olelo ni omaalo. Awosa ecapeke soowarasaya 
Exodus19:11 weera ekhale oolikaneene munihukuni nanaararu. Nihuku nenenenno Yave onookhuruwela vamwaakoni Sinayi, muloko wootheene woonaka." 
Exodus19:12 Mwakhalihere mipika sirukureenreene mwaako ni mwaleele muloko: ‘Mwiipasoope weera muhiwele mwaako hoye hoye muhiphiye omenlaaya mwaako. Yoowo aneera aphiye vamwaako vekhaikhai iiviwe. 
Exodus19:13 Owo onoovonyiwa maluku hoye hoye onimwiiviwa ni nyuupa. Ahikhale aneera atave ni ntata. Hata mutthu, naari mwaamunama khankhala ni okumi. Paahi naruma nipalapatta awo eweleke vamwaako.’”" 
Exodus19:14 Moisesi akhuruwakaru vamwaako, aatteeliha muloko ni awo yaacapa soowarasaya." 
Exodus19:15 Aaweerela atthu: “Mwiirehererele nihuku nanaararu ni muhikoneno axaarinyu.” 
Exodus19:16 Oxa wa nihukuni nanaararu saahoopa itari ni overinya ni mwaako waakhuneeliwa ni nihutte nooriipihana ni nipalapatta naaruma vancipalexa. Atthu ootheene a waakonelingwe yaathukumela ni woova. 
Exodus19:17 Moisesi aakhumihera muloko okerekhere wa waakoneliwe weera wakumane ni Muluku, ni awosa yaaheemela mukerekhere mwaako." 
Exodus19:18 Vano mwaako Sinayi waakhuneeleya ni mwiixi, niwoko Yave aakhuruwela vaavaawo ni malumi a mmooroni. Mwa yoowo waatthuwa mwiixi ntoko wa niikho ni mwaako wootheene waatetereya vancipale" 
Exodus19:19 ni oruma wa nipalapatta wannapwaherera wiiwanyeyaxa. Vano Moisesi aahuuluma, ni Muluku aamwaakhula mutarini." 
Exodus19:20 Yave aakhuruwela vatthomelani wa mwaako Sinayi ni aamwiitthana Moisesi vasulu mwaako. Moisesi aawela 
Exodus19:21 ni Yave aamweerela: “Mukhuruwe ni mwawooperere atthu weera ehituphe mipika weera emoone Yave. Yeera hiiho, ancipale eniikhwe." 
Exodus19:22 Mpakatho asaserdoti* yaamwaattamelaka Yave yiitteeliheke weera Yave ahaaphwate.” 
Exodus19:23 Vano Moisesi aamwaakhula Yave: “Atthu khaangwera owela mwaako Sinayi, niwoko Nyuwo muneenaanyu moonooperera: ‘mukhalihe mipika sirukureenreene mwaako ni mweereleke wootteela.”" 
Exodus19:24 Yave aamwaakhula: “Mukhuruwe ni munrwaane Aharoni. Vaheera asaserdoti* ni atthutho ehituphe mipika etthunaka owela wa Yave weera Yave ahaaphwate.” 
Exodus19:25 Vano Moisesi aakhuruwa, anooperera muloko." 
Exodus20:1 Vano Muluku aahuuluma masu ootheene ala: 
Exodus20:2 “Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu, mwa Yoowo ookhumihaleni wExipitu, elapo ya okaporo." 
Exodus20:3 Muhikhalane miluku sikina okihiya Miyo. 
Exodus20:4 Muhiipakele ecaambulo ya miluku sikina mulikanxeraka yakhalaru etthu eri wiirimu hoye hoye vathi, naari mmaahini." 
Exodus20:5 Muhikokhorele seiyo naari muhilape, niwoko Miyo, Yave Mulukwaanyu, ti Muluku a ehace. Miyo kinaattaruxa anamwane niwoko na soottheka sa asitithaya mpaka ekhapira yanaararu ni yanaaxexe ya yaawo ankithanya." 
Exodus20:6 Vaheera kinaakosoopa ni onnene wa mahuku ootheene yaawo ankisivela ni aneettela malamulowaaka. 
Exodus20:7 Muhinyemule Nsina na Yave Mulukwaanyu niwoko vekhaikhai Yave onimuttaruxa yoowo onnyemula Nsinanawe. 
Exodus20:8 Muupuwelele nihuku na eSaabadu mutteelihaka. 
Exodus20:9 Mahuku mathannamosa a khula esimana mvareke mitekosanyu sootheene," 
Exodus20:10 mene nihuku nanaathannameeli ti eSaabadu ya Yave Mulukwaanyu. Nihuku nno muhivareru muteko nyuwo, hata anamwaniinyu asilopwana naari asithiyana, hata arumeiyaanyu asilopwana hoye hoye asithiyana, naari axinamaanyu, hata anamarwa ankhala musidadenimwanyu." 
Exodus20:11 Vano wa mahuku mathannamosa Yave aapattuxa erimu ni vathi, ephareiya ni sootheene siri mwemmo, mene nihuku nanaathannameeli aahiitthuuwa. Tivawo Yave oreelinghaawe nihuku nanaathannameeli atteelihaka." 
Exodus20:12 Mwaattiitiimihe atithinyu ni amayinyu weera woorakameleni okumi mweelaponi Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni. 
Exodus20:13 Muhiive. 
Exodus20:14 Muhiraruwe. 
Exodus20:15 Muhiiye. 
Exodus20:16 Muhikhale namoona oowootha a mukhwiinyu. 
Exodus20:17 Muhiinlele vaate wa mukhwiinyu. Muhimwiinlele mwaara a mukhwiinyu, naari epottha elopwana hoye hoye ethiyana, naari emombaawe, hata buurwaawe, naari sakhalaru itthu sikina sa mukhwiinyu." 
Exodus20:18 Atthu yoonaka etari, overinya ni mwaako wookhuneeliwa ni mwiixi, ni yiiwaka oruma wa nipalapatta, yaatuthuwa, enathukumela. Yaarakamela," 
Exodus20:19 emweerelaka Moisesi: “Nyeenyuweene muulume ni hiyo ni nnimwiiwa. Muluku ahuulume ni hiyo weera nihikhwe.” 
Exodus20:20 Moisesi aaweerela atthu: “Muhoove. Muluku orweenle owootani murima weera woopiha wa Muluku okhale ni nyuwo owooceelihakani ottheka.” 
Exodus20:21 Atthu yaari erakamelelo, mene Moisesi aahaattamela nihutte nooripihana aaraawemo Muluku." 
Exodus20:22 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Nyuwo mohiixoonela weera Miyo kohuuluma ni nyuwo wiirimu. 
Exodus20:23 Muhipake miluku sa eparatha* naari eyuuma yoorikaxa weera mukilikanxerele. 
Exodus20:24 Mwakitekele altaari* a etthaya ni mwa yaawo mukipakeleno sooveleela soohisa ni sa murettele, eyo tiiyo ikhondoolosanyu ni imombesanyu. Weiwo kineeraka kitthunihere ovuwihiwa Nsinanaka, kinimoorweelani ni kinimooreelihani." 
Exodus20:25 Mwakitekela altaari* a maluku, muhaateke ni maluku ooraatteliwa, niwoko ni ikaruma munimwaahiiriha altaari*." 
Exodus20:26 Muhaawele ni ixikada altaaraaka* weera etiriyaanyu ehooneye.’” 
Exodus21:1 Mwaathalihere aYixrayeli ikano iya: 
Exodus21:2 ‘Mwathuma epottha muHeberi, eyo yoovareleni muteko iyaakha ithannamosa. Vano eyaakha yanaathannapiili etapuxiweke, ohitthuneyaka oliva etthu." 
Exodus21:3 Yarwa moothupani, epwaheke yootapuxiweene moothupani. Vaheera yarwa yootheleene, mwaaraya erowekeno." 
Exodus21:4 Apwiyaaya yavaha muthiyana ni owo aayarano anamwane asilopwana hoye hoye asithiyana, muthiyana owo ni anamwanaawe eniikhale a apwiyaaya; epottha paahi eniipwahe yootaphuweene." 
Exodus21:5 Wa soothesene, epottha eyo yeera: ‘Miyo kinnaasivela apwiyaaka, amwaaraka ni anamwanaaka ni nkintthuna opwaha ootaphuweene," 
Exodus21:6 apwiyaaya eroiheke wa aphuki. Erongheke vamulako hoye hoye vaseremuni ni ethoroleke naarunaya. Hiiho epottha eyo eniikhale ya apwiyaaya wa mahuku ootheene. 
Exodus21:7 Mutthu amuthumiha mwaniye muthiyana ntoko epottha, owo kharwa atapuxiwa ntoko ipottha ilopwana." 
Exodus21:8 Epottha eyo ethiyana yaahimusiveliha pwiiyaaya, atthunihereke weera eyo yoopoliweke. Ehithumiheriweke anamarwa, niwoko ti pwiiya okattannye wiiwanana." 
Exodus21:9 Vano apwiyaaya yamuthanlela mwanaya epottha eyo, epwattheke ntoko mwanaya muthiyana." 
Exodus21:10 Mwaana a pwiiya owo amuthela muthiyana anaaveeli, ahimukhootteleke oopacera yooca, ikuwo ni sookwanela sa vatthokoni." 
Exodus21:11 Mulopwana owo aahikwanihera soonyesererihiwa tthaaru iya, vano muthiyana oopacera owo apwaheke ootaphuweene ahilivaka etthu." 
Exodus21:12 Yoowo onimuvulaliha mukina mpaka okhwa, vekhaikhai, iiviweke." 
Exodus21:13 Wa soothesene, aahipaka mwayiini, yapakeya ni erisa, atthaweleke nipuro Miyo kineeraaka kimoonihere." 
Exodus21:14 Mukina uupuwela omwiiva mukhwaawe mwayiini, mumvenxe valtaariniwaka* weera iiviwe." 
Exodus21:15 Yoowo onaamana atithawe hoye hoye amayawe, vekhaikhai iiviweke." 
Exodus21:16 Yoowo ommwiiya mukina anamuthumiha hoye hoye anaphwanyaniwa, vekhaikhai iiviweke." 
Exodus21:17 Yoowo onaalapha atithawe hoye hoye amayawe vekhaikhai iiviweke. 
Exodus21:18 Asilopwana eeli yawana ni mmoha amvulaliha mukina ni nluku naari ecipakhira, mene oomaniwa aahikhwa anummaathi," 
Exodus21:19 vano yoowo ovulalinghe khathorihiwa oomaniwa avenya anapacera weetta ni muttontto. Wa soothesene, owo amuliveke ehuhu oyeleenlaawe wiixaasera ni amukhavihereke mpaka olama." 
Exodus21:20 Mulopwana avulaliha epotthaawe elopwana hoye hoye ethiyana ni muruputtho enakhwa, attaruxiweke." 
Exodus21:21 Vaheera epottha yavira mahuku meeli hoye hoye mararu ehikhwiiye, ahittaruxiweke yeenre ekhalaka yawawe." 
Exodus21:22 Akina yawana enamvulaliha muthiyana oorupala enamutathiha aahikhalano makacamiho, namapahula aliveke yeeyo aneeraawe anyeserere iyawe muthiyana ole attharaka olakela wa aphuki." 
Exodus21:23 Yakhala makacamiho matokotoko, waakakhanyihiwe okumi ni okumi," 
Exodus21:24 niitho nniitho; niino nniino; ntata ni ntata; nnaawo ni nnaawo; 
Exodus21:25 ohisa ni ohisiwa; nikhwatta nnikhwatta, aani omana ni omaniwa." 
Exodus21:26 Mulopwana apwexa niitho na epotthaawe elopwana hoye hoye ethiyana ehinoona, owo atapuxeke okaporwaaya niwoko na niithonaya." 
Exodus21:27 Akhula niino na epottha elopwana hoye hoye ethiyana, owo atapuxeke okaporwaaya niwoko na niinonaya." 
Exodus21:28 Emombe elopwana yamuhoma mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana mpaka omwiiva, eyo evonyiweke maluku mpaka okhwa ni khoontthuniheriwa okhuura enamaaya. Wa soothesene, muneene a emombe eyo khakhalano mulattu." 
Exodus21:29 Wa soothesene, emombe yaari yaakhovelenle ohoma ni mwaneene asuwenleene ahinatthuka, ni emombe eyo enamwiiva mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana, vano emombe evonyiweke maluku ni muneenetho iiviweke." 
Exodus21:30 Wa soothesene, muneene anyesereriwa oliva, oopoleke okumaawe alivaka yeeyo onnyesereriwaawe." 
Exodus21:31 Nthorihelo nna nivareliweketho muteko emombe yamuhoma mmiravo hoye hoye mwaamwali. 
Exodus21:32 Emombe yahoma epottha elopwana hoye hoye ethiyana, vano muneene a emombe eyo amuliveke ixekeli* miloko miraru muneene a epottha ni emombe evonyiweke maluku." 
Exodus21:33 Mukina athipa nlitti ahinakhuneela ni yamorelamo emombe elopwana hoye hoye buuru," 
Exodus21:34 muneene a nlitti aliveke yoolamuliwa; amulivaka muneene a mwaamunama ni amuhalaneke mwaamunama ookhwa. 
Exodus21:35 Emombe elopwana ya mukina yavulaliha emombe ya mukhwaawe ni yiiva, ethumihiweke emombe ekumi ni ekawaneke musurukhu eriyariru ni mooteene yoowo enama yookhwa." 
Exodus21:36 Wa soothesene, emombe elopwana yaari yaakhovelenle ohoma ni muneene ahinatthukelela, owo aliveke emombe ekumi ahalaneke yookhwa." 
Exodus22:1 Mukina iiya emombe elopwana hoye hoye ekhondoolo, aniiva naari athumiha, aliveke imombe ithanu wa emombe eyo ni ikhondoolo ixexe wa ekhondoolo eyo." 
Exodus22:2 Namwiiya avariwa iiyaka ni avulalihiwa, anakhwa, yoowo omvulalinghe khankhalano nthowa na onyala." 
Exodus22:3 Vaheera yakhumelela oxeexeloweene, anaakhaleno nthowa na onyala. Namwiiya aliveke iiyalaawe, mene aahikhalano yoolivano, athumihiweke weera alive iiyalaawe." 
Exodus22:4 Axinama oowiiyiwa aphwanyaniwa ereene ni okumi – ekhalaka emombe, buuru naari ekhondoolo, namwiiya aliveke iphura." 
Exodus22:5 Mukina arongha ociha muhuwaawe mmatta hoye hoye mmatta ya iwuuva* ni ahiya ocaaka ematta ya mukina, aliveke ni sooreerela sa mmattamwawe hoye hoye mmattamwawe ya iwuuva*." 
Exodus22:6 Mukina apattiha mooro, onatuphela moothakoni, onahisa etrigu eri mmatta hoye hoye ihara naari ematta yootheene ya mukina, vano yoole opattinghe aliveke itthu soothesene seiye sisiiye." 
Exodus22:7 Mukina amwinnyerera mukhwaawe eyuuma yoorikaxa hoye hoye sooreela weera amuthokororele ni iyo siiyiwa mpaani mwa mukhwaawe ole, vano namwiiya, avariwa, aliveke iphura." 
Exodus22:8 Namwiiya aahiphwanyiwa, muneene a vaate owo iixoonihere ohoolo wa aphuki weera yooneye owo aahiiyale sooreela sa mukhwaawe." 
Exodus22:9 Yakhala eneereya atthu eeli enyakulihanaka weera emombe elopwana, buuru, ekhondoolo, ekuwo hoye hoye yooreela yooriheya ti yawaya, ooweeli yiixoonihere ohoolo wa aphuki. Yoowo anaathoonyiwe ni aphuki ntoko nanthowa, amuliveke mukhwaawe iphura." 
Exodus22:10 Mutthu amwinnyerera mukhwaawe weera amusungere buuru, emombe, ekhondoolo naari enama ekina ni eyo yakhwa, yavulalihiwa naari yiiyiwa ahimoonaka mutthu," 
Exodus22:11 mulattwaayasa wuulummweke olipeliwaka vamaithoni wa Yave weera miyo nkikunxe ya muneene. Vano ontthuneya weera muneene aakhuleleke yeeyo; mukhwaawe khoontthuneya oliva etthu. 
Exodus22:12 Vaheera mwaamunama iiyiwa a mukhwaawe, amuliveke muneene." 
Exodus22:13 Mwaamunama owo anyaanyiwa ni axinama a ntuphini, amurongheleke yoowoonihera ehanle ni kharwa aliva etthu." 
Exodus22:14 Mukina amooliha mwaamunama a mukhwaawe ni owo avulalihiwa hoye hoye akhwa ahikhanle muneene, yoole oolinghe aliveke." 
Exodus22:15 Muneene akhalawo, khoontthuneya oliviwa. Muneene aliviwa oolihihaka, yooliviwaawe enooliveleya ni yeeyo yeereiye ni mwaamunama." 
Exodus22:16 Mulopwana amunyeenga mwaamwali oowiikosoopa ohitthomeriwe, anamukonano, vano aliveke nlivo nintheleliwa ni anaakhale mwaariye." 
Exodus22:17 Atithawe mwaamwali ole yaahitthuna omutheliha mulopwana, nlelo aliveke mulopwana owo nlivo na mwaamwali oowiikosoopa." 
Exodus22:18 Muhimuhiye mukhwiri ni okumi. 
Exodus22:19 Akhalaru mutthu onimukonano mwaamunama, iiviweke." 
Exodus22:20 Akhalaru mutthu aneera apakele sooveleela wakhalaru muluku mukina omuhiya Yave, aphwatiweke." 
Exodus22:21 Muhaahasule naari muhaahooxe anamarwa, niwoko nyuwo mwaaritho anamarwa wExipitu." 
Exodus22:22 Muhaahaawihe asinaamukhweli naari ikwaasuni. 
Exodus22:23 Mwaahaawiha ni awo yakikhuwelela, vekhaikhai kinoowaakhulela makhupanyowaaya." 
Exodus22:24 Onyoonyiwawaka onuukhale otokotoko ni kinoowiivasani ni ekatana. Axaarinyu eniithatuwe asinaamukhweli ni anamwaniinyu ikwaasuni. 
Exodus22:25 Vano mwamoolihiha musurukhu mutthu mmoha a atthwaaka ori oohaawa, muhikhale ntoko namakopiha; muhimunyeserere oliva musurukhu woopwahaxa." 
Exodus22:26 Mwaakhela mukaandyo wa mukhwiinyu ni ororomeliha, munghokoloxere ohinaanye wiila," 
Exodus22:27 niwoko mukaandyowaawe ti yoowiikhuneelaawe emoharu oraaweno. Aniikhuneele eheeni? Owo akikhuwelela, kinimwiiwa, niwoko Miyo ti a ikharari." 
Exodus22:28 Muhimveihe Muluku naari muhimulaphe muhooleli a mulokwaanyu. 
Exodus22:29 Muhikiimane sooveleela sa matathaanyu naari nipuronanyu noowaama iwuuva*. Mukitteelihere mwaanaanyu a ntthaara," 
Exodus22:30 ni matthaara a mihuwo sa imombe, ikhondoolo ni ipuri. Axaana mwaahiyeke ni amayaya wa mahuku mathanameeli, mene nihuku nanaathannaararu mukivaheke Miyo." 
Exodus22:31 Nyuwosa ti mulokwaaka wootteela. Muhikhuureru enama yoonyaanyiwa ni axinama a ntuphini; mwaavonyereke alapwa. 
Exodus23:1 Ahikhale aneera amwaramwaxe ihaali soowootha. Muhimukhavihere namatakhala munkhalelaka namoona moota woowootha. 
Exodus23:2 Muhitthare yaatteliwe epakiwaka yoonanara. Nyuwo mwakhalela onamoona vantthekoni, muhivirikanyihe ekhaikhai mweerelaka osiveliha yaatteliwe." 
Exodus23:3 Muhimpakele nthalu mutthu oohaawa vantthekoni. 
Exodus23:4 Mwaphwanya emombe hoye hoye buuru a mwiittanaanyu ariheiyeene, munghokoloxere muneene." 
Exodus23:5 Nyuwo mwamoona buuru a mukina onoothanyani amoranaka murittaawe, muhimuhiyewo – mwamukhavihere." 
Exodus23:6 Muhaakhoottele oohaawa mmilattunimwaya othoriha nnene. 
Exodus23:7 Musembe milatthu soowoothera ni muhimwiive mutthu oororomeleya ni oohikhalano mulattu, niwoko nkinimulevelela nanthowa." 
Exodus23:8 Muhaakhulele makhwankwa, niwoko awo anaaphuta owiitho yaale anoona ni anghenyengeriha masu a oororomeleya." 
Exodus23:9 Muhaahasule anamarwa, niwoko nyeenyuweene moosuwela nnenesene onamarwa ti heeni mweenre mwakhalaka anamarwa wExipitu." 
Exodus23:10 Mwaale ni muhephe mmattamwanyu mwa iyaakha ithannamosa," 
Exodus23:11 mene eyaakha yanaathannapiili muhiye yiitthuuwaka ehilimmwaka. Hiiho anamahaawa variyariwanyu eceeke seiyo simmorela ni seiyo singhalahala nsikhale sa axinama a ntuphini. Mpakeketho hiiho ni imattasanyu sa iwuuva* ni sooliveira*. 
Exodus23:12 Wa mahuku mathannamosa mvare mitekosanyu, mene nihuku nanaathannameeli muhivareru weera imombesanyu, abuurwaanyu, ipotthasanyu ni anamarwa yiitthuuwe ni saarweele ikuru." 
Exodus23:13 Mwiipasoope opaka sootheene seiyo koolamulenlaakani. Muhiitthane masina a miluku sikina; ehiiwiwe masinaaya mmwanomwanyu. 
Exodus23:14 Vano imaara tthaaru vayaakhani mukipakele efesta. 
Exodus23:15 Mpake efesta ya epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu. Muceeke epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu wa mahuku mathanameeli ntoko koolamulenlaakani. Mpake yeeyo mweehuhuni yoothanliwa mmweerini wa Abibi, niwoko mweereene yoowo mwaakhumihingwaanyu wExipitu. Ahikhale anaaphiye ohoolowaka matataru." 
Exodus23:16 Mpake efesta ya ohepha, eyo tiiyo sa soohepha soopacera sa mutekwaanyu woowaala. Mpake efesta ya emalihero ya ohepha ommaleloni wa eyaakha nyuwo mwaathokororaka soohepha." 
Exodus23:17 Asilopwana ootheene yiixoonihereke ohoolo wa Yave Muluku imaara tthaaru vayaakhani. 
Exodus23:18 Muhikiveleelele ephome ya sooveleela vamoha ni yakhalaru etthu enkhalano eferementu. Makhura a sooveleela a ifestasaka ehisungiweke mpaka waaxiiye. 
Exodus23:19 Muruuhe Empa ya Yave Mulukwaanyu mpatta woopacera wooreerelaxa wa soohephasanyu. Muhimwaapeye mwaaxaana a epuri mmukakani wa amayawe. 
Exodus23:20 Vano, kinoorumihelani ndyelo ohoolowanyu weera ookosoopeni mukwaha wootheene ni weera oophiihaseni vanipuroni koorehererenlaakani." 
Exodus23:21 Nnene mwiiwelele yeeyo owo onghimaawe muhimvaanyeke, niwoko kharwa alevelela ovaanyawanyu neenre Nsinanaka nikhalaka mwa yoowo." 
Exodus23:22 Mwiiwelela nnenesene yeeyo aneeraawe ahime ni mwapaka sootheene kinoolamulelaakani, nkikhale mwiittana a amwiittanaanyu ni ngwanani a awananaanyu." 
Exodus23:23 Ndyelowaaka onimoohoolelani ni onimoophiihasani elapo ya awAmori, aHiti, aPerizi, aKanaani, aHivi ni aYebusi ni kinimwaaphwata." 
Exodus23:24 Muhikokhorele ohoolo wa milukusaya, hata muhilape naari muhitakihe epakelowaaya. Mphwate miluku iyo ni mwaakankhaanyule amarimbwaaya ootteela." 
Exodus23:25 Munlape Yave Mulukwaanyu ni onimooreelihasani oovahakani yooca ni maahi. Kinoovenxa iretta variyariwanyusa. 
Exodus23:26 Mweelaponimwanyu khaawo muthiyana anaarupale anahokolowa hiiho. Hata khakhala mwali eekupa. Kinookwanihera waatta wa mahukwaanyu. 
Exodus23:27 Kinoorumiha ohoolowanyu woopihawaka weera erukureereye nyuru maloko ootheene nyuwo muneeraanyu mphwanye. Nkaarerihe ettuli amwiittanaanyu ootheene etthawaka ohoolowanyu. 
Exodus23:28 Kinootannyera mitteendehu weera siwoomole aHivi, aKanaani ni aHiti ohoolowanyu." 
Exodus23:29 Nkirwa kiwoomola ootheene eyaakha emoha weera elapo ehiheleye mathala ni axinama a ntuphini ehaandyeerereye ewoopopihasakani. 
Exodus23:30 Kinoowoomola vakhaani vakhaani mpaka nyuwosa muneeraanyu mwaandyeererane muxuwaattaka weera mukuxe elapo. 
Exodus23:31 Kinookhaliha nyiinanosanyu okhuma Ephareiya Yooxeera mpaka ephareiya ya aFilisti, ni okhuma onikareni mpaka mooloko Efratesi. Kinimoovahani mmatatanimwanyu miloko siri mweelaponi mmo, mwa seiyo muneeraanyu moomole ohoolowanyu." 
Exodus23:32 Muhiwiiraaneno yaawo hata milukusaya. 
Exodus23:33 Muhihiye miloko iyo simakaka mweelaponimwanyu weera sihootthekiheni wa Miyo, niwoko woolapa milukusaya, wa nyuwosa nnikhale ntapha.”" 
Exodus24:1 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Ngweleke vamwaako weera munkumaneno Yave – nyuwo vamoha ni Aharoni, Nadabi, Abiyu ni asitokweene miloko mithannamiili a aYixrayeli. Mulape ottai ottai." 
Exodus24:2 Moisesi paahi ti aneera amwaattamele Yave; akinaawo hoye. Mulokotho ohiwele ni yoowo.” 
Exodus24:3 Moisesi aarowa wa muloko, anathalihera masu ni ikano sootheene sa Yave ni awosa yaamwaakhula moota mmoha: “Nnoopaka sootheene Yave olamulenlaawe.”" 
Exodus24:4 Vano Moisesi aalepa sootheene Yave aahimmaawe. Oxaawaya aavenya, anaateka altaari* mukerekhere mwaako, anaweemexa amarimbu muloko neeli a maluku ethoonyeraka ipuumba muloko ni piili sa aYixrayeli." 
Exodus24:5 Vahoolowaya aahaarumiha amiravo aYixrayeli yaapanke sooveleela soohisa ni yaawiiva axaana a imombe ntoko sooveleelela murettele wa Yave. 
Exodus24:6 Moisesi aakuxa mpatta mukina wa ephome, anahela mmayoopweni ni mpatta mukina aayeehera mukhwipi altaari*." 
Exodus24:7 Vahoolowaya aasomela muloko Elivuru ya Wiiraana. Awo yaamwaakhula: “Nnoopaka moororomeleyani sootheene Yave olamulenlaawe.” 
Exodus24:8 Vano Moisesi aamisa muloko ni ephome eeraka: “Ela ti ephome ya wiiraana Yave ompakaawe ni nyuwo ngwiiwananani ni masu ootheene ala.” 
Exodus24:9 Moisesi, Aharoni, Nadabi, Abiyu ni asitokweene miloko mithannamiili a aYixrayeli yaawela" 
Exodus24:10 ni yaamoona Muluku a aYixrayeli. Vathi wa inaawosawe yaakhalawo yoonyikalela maluku a safira*, waarawaya ntoko erimu." 
Exodus24:11 Wa soothesene, Muluku khaattarunxe asitokweene a muloko wa aYixrayeli. Yaamoona Muluku, vahoolowaya yaahooca, enawura." 
Exodus24:12 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Ngwele mwaako, murwe wa Miyo ni mukhale va. Kinimoovahani itthaabwa sa maluku sikhalanaka malamulo ni ikano kilempaaka weera muxuttiheno muloko.”" 
Exodus24:13 Vano Moisesi aapwaha vamoha ni Yoxuwa, namakhaviheraawe, enawela vamwaakoni wa Muluku." 
Exodus24:14 Moisesi aaweerela asitokweene: “Muniweherere wenno mpaka nneeraahu nihokolowe. Aharoni ni Huri anoohala ni nyuwo. Yoowo anaakhalane mulattu, awaasaaseke yaawosa.”" 
Exodus24:15 Moisesi awelakaru, nihutte naakhuneela mwaako," 
Exodus24:16 ni ovuwa wa Yave waakhala vamwaakoni Sinayi. Nihutte naakhuneela mwaako wa mahuku mathannamosa ni nihuku nanaathannameeli Yave aamwiitthana Moisesi munihutteni. 
Exodus24:17 Vamaithoni wa aYixrayeli ovuwa wa Yave waari ntoko mooro woohisa vasulu mwaako. 
Exodus24:18 Moisesi awelaka mwaako, aavolowa munihutteni. Vano aakhalamo othana miloko mixexe ni ohiyu miloko mixexetho." 
Exodus25:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Exodus25:2 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli weera ekiruuhele sooveleela. Mwaakhelele sa yoole omvaha ni murima wootheene. 
Exodus25:3 Sooveleela muneeraanyu mwaakhele wa yaawo ti iya: Iyuuma soorikaxa, ebronze*," 
Exodus25:4 ikuwo sooxeera, sa kanka ni sookankela, ikuwo sootteettheya, mapururu a ipuri," 
Exodus25:5 ixapala sa amaankhoro sooningiwa yooxeera, exapala yoohukhiwa, mwiri wa akaasiya*;" 
Exodus25:6 makhura oomwaleelela, itthu sooreerela sintakansiwano makhura oottikitthelano ni erubani* yoowunkhelaxa;" 
Exodus25:7 onikisi* ni maluku makina oowaaraxa weera ettottheleliwe wa mooxikoottini a esaserdoti ni ya vakakasani. 
Exodus25:8 Vahoolowaya mukitekele Nipuro Nootteela* weera kimake variyari wa muloko. 
Exodus25:9 Mwateke etabernaakulu* vamoha ni itthusaya sootheene muttharaka nnenesene ekhalelo kineeraaka kiwoonihereni. 
Exodus25:10 Mwaapake Arka* a mwiri wa akaasiya* ni miringo iya: emeetru* emoha ni vakhaani, vamoha ni eriyari ya emeetru* emoha, vamoha ni eriyari ya emeetru* emoha." 
Exodus25:11 Mwaahuruwele mpuwa ni omokoni ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera mulepelelaka mukhwipimwaya ni eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
Exodus25:12 Mwaapake annela axexe a eyuuma yoorikaxa ni mwaatthukelele mmaloothoni oomaxexe; annela eeli wa khula mpatta. 
Exodus25:13 Vahoolowaya mwapake ikopo sa mwiri wa akaasiya* ni muhuruweleke ni eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
Exodus25:14 Mvolonghere mwa annelani mpararini mwa Arka* weera eteexiwekeno. 
Exodus25:15 Ikopo sikhaleke mwa annelani a Arka*; sihivenxiweke. 
Exodus25:16 Vano mwaheleke mwa Arkani* Namoona* kineeraaka koovaheeni. 
Exodus25:17 Mwapake yookhuneelano ya eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera ni miringo iya: emeetru* emoha ni vakhaani, vamoha ni eriyari ya emeetru* emoha." 
Exodus25:18 Mwaapake akerubini* eeli a eyuuma yoorikaxa oohaniwa, mukhwipimwaya yookhuneelano." 
Exodus25:19 Mumpake kerubini* mmoha mukerekhere wa mpatta mmoha ni anaaveeli mpatta mukina, ooweeli awo ni yookhuneelano emohamoharu." 
Exodus25:20 Akerubini* ekhalaneke mapuphaaya ookungeela ohoolo ekhunelenleeneno yookhuneelano. Awo ekhalelaneke ohoolo yuuramenleene yookhuneelano. 
Exodus25:21 Ngwiikaathereke yookhuneelano Arka*, ni mpuwamwaya Namoona* kineeraaka koovaheeni." 
Exodus25:22 Vawo, vasulu yookhuneelano variyari wa akerubini* eeli ari vasulu wa Arkani* a Namoona, kinoophwanyaneya ni nyuwo ni kinimoovahani malamulowaaka ootheene yeereliwe aYixrayeli." 
Exodus25:23 Mwapake meesa a mwiri wa akaasiya* ni miringo iya: wookwanaka emeetru* emoha, vamoha ni eriyari ya emeetru* emoha, vamoha ni eriyari ya emeetru* emoha." 
Exodus25:24 Mwahuruwele ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera mulepelelaka mukhwipimwaya ni eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
Exodus25:25 Muheleketho muxoreke mwiittaaya isentimeetru* ithanu ni tthaaru ni mulepelele ni icaambulo sa eyuuma yoorikaxa mukhwipimwaya. 
Exodus25:26 Mwaapake annela axexe a eyuuma yoorikaxa ni mwaatthukeleleke mmaloothonimwaya oomaxexe simvolowaayamo nyettosaya mixexe. 
Exodus25:27 Vano annela etthukeleliweke vakhiviru ni mooxoriwa weera annela singhuleeliwaayamo ikopo sinteexeriwa meesa ekhale oolipeene. 
Exodus25:28 Mwapake ikopo sa mwiri wa akaasiya* muhuruwelaka eyuuma yoorikaxa ni ekuxiwekeno seiyo. 
Exodus25:29 Mwapakele ni eyuuma yoorikaxa isasaanisaya nitho ikhope, ibasiya ni ikoomixi simvareliwa muteko woovuuvihera sooveleela soowura." 
Exodus25:30 Mwiikaathi vameesa epaawu ya Okhala* weera ekhale ohoolowaka mahuku ootheene. 
Exodus25:31 Mpake onyaari wa eyuuma yoorikaxa woohaniwa. Nnaawonaya, mwettwaaya, ikoomixisaya, soottuvasaya ni ithutusaya sootheene sikhaleke etthu emohamoharu paahi." 
Exodus25:32 Iphandi ithannamosa sikhumeke woonyaarini – khula mpatta wa mwettwaaya tthaaru tthaaru. 
Exodus25:33 Sikhaleke ithutu tthaaru sa emandoweira* sikhalanaka soottuvasaya ni makukhwaaya wa ephandi emoha – ni hiihotho wa iphandi ithannamosa sootheene sinkhuma woonyaarini. 
Exodus25:34 Vanonto mwettwaaya okhalaneke ithutu ixexe sa emandoweira* sikhalanaka soottuvasaya ni makukhwaaya. 
Exodus25:35 Ethutu yoopacera ya mwetto ekhaleke vathi wa iphandi piili soopacera sinkhuma woonyaarini; yanaaveeli vathi wa piili sinttharelana ni yanaararu vathi wa piili soomalihera. 
Exodus25:36 Iphandi ni ithutusaya sikhaleke etthu emohamoharu ni onyaari, sootheene soopakiwa ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera ni soohaniwa." 
Exodus25:37 Vahoolowaya mpakeleketho soomwaleela ithannapiili ni muhelelekewo weera simwaleeleke ohoolowaya. 
Exodus25:38 Soorehererano mutthambo ni soocipiherasaya sikhaleke sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera. 
Exodus25:39 Vano mvareleke muteko ikiilu* miloko miraru niithanu sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera weera mpake onyaari ni ikarumasaya sootheene. 
Exodus25:40 Mwiipasoope woopaka muttharaka moota muxutterihiwaanyu omwaako. 
Exodus26:1 Mpake etabernaakulu* ni iluttu muloko sa mpuwa wa ikuwo sa eliinyu* sootthaveliwa ni sa kanka, sookankela ni sooxeera. Vano mulamulele oxoriwamo akerubini*." 
Exodus26:2 Iluttu sootheene silikaneleke: imeetru* muloko ni piili ni eriyari ya emeetru*, vamoha ni emeetru* emoha ni wookwanaka imeetru* piili." 
Exodus26:3 Muluttanye iluttu ithanu sa mpuwa ekina ni ekhwaaya ni mpake hiiho ni ithanu sikina iyo. 
Exodus26:4 Muttotthelele miramba sa ekuwo ya kanka mukhwipi wa eluttu yookisera ya ithanu soopacera ni hiihotho eluttu yookisera ya ithanu sikina. 
Exodus26:5 Muttotthele miramba miloko mithanu muluttuni yookisera ya ithanu soopacera nitho miramba miloko mithanu muluttuni yookisera ya ithanu sikina moota wooweera miramba siwehaneke. 
Exodus26:6 Vano mpake ivarelelo miloko mithanu sa eyuuma yoorikaxa muneeraanyu mutthukeleleno iluttu sa mpuwa ekina ni ekhwaaya weera etabernaakulu* ekhaleke emohamoharu. 
Exodus26:7 Moopopanye iluttu muloko niimoha sa mapururu a ipuri mpake eheema yookhuneelano etabernaakulu*. 
Exodus26:8 Iluttu muloko niimoha silikaneleke: imeetru* muloko ni tthaaru ni eriyari ya emeetru*, vamoha ni emeetru* emoha ni wookwanaka imeetru* piili." 
Exodus26:9 Muluttanye mpatta mmoha iluttu ithanu nitho ithannamosa sikina mpatta mukina. Mupintte mipatta miili eluttu yanaathannamosa ohoolo wa eheema. 
Exodus26:10 Muttotthelele miramba miloko mithanu mukhwipi wa eluttu yookisera ya ithanu soopacera ni miramba miloko mithanu mukhwipi wa yookisera ya ithannamosa sikina. 
Exodus26:11 Vano mpake ivarelelo miloko mithanu sa ebronze* ni muhele mmirambani weera eheema ekhale emohamoharu. 
Exodus26:12 Enghala mweerakameloni wa iluttu sa eheema, nkhwapa onuuhale, otthukeleliweke opithela wa etabernaakulu*." 
Exodus26:13 Vano khula mpatta wa iluttu muloko onghala eriyari ya emeetru* emoha, ni yeeyo enghala etthukeleliweke mipatta miili sa etabernaakulu* weera ekhuneeleke." 
Exodus26:14 Mpakeletho yookhuneelela eheema ya ixapala sa amaankhoro sooningiwa yooxeera, ni vasuluwaya ixapala soohukhiwa." 
Exodus26:15 Mwaapakele acikhi a mwiri wa akaasiya* etabernaakulu*. 
Exodus26:16 Khula cikhi akhaleke ni miringo iya: imeetru* ixexe, vamoha ni eriyari ya emeetru* emoha." 
Exodus26:17 Khula cikhi alubaanyihiweke veeli weera akumane ni mukhwaawe. Ti hiiho muneeraanyu mwaalumbaanyiheke acikhi ootheene. 
Exodus26:18 Mwaapakeke acikhi miloko miili ohitto wa etabernaakulu* 
Exodus26:19 ni vathiwaya nyettosaya miloko mixexe sa eparatha* – nyetto miili wa khula cikhi; mmoha vathi wa khula makumano. 
Exodus26:20 Vano wa mpatta mukina ori ottuttuwani wa etabernaakulu* mwaapake acikhi muloko miili 
Exodus26:21 ni vathiwaya nyettosaya miloko mixexe sa eparatha* – nyetto miili wa khula cikhi. 
Exodus26:22 Mwaapake acikhi athannamosa mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa etabernaakulu* 
Exodus26:23 ni acikhi eeli mpatta wa ottuli mmaloothoni. 
Exodus26:24 Acikhi a mmaloothoni meeli awo ephitaanyiweke okhuma vathi mpaka osulu etthukiweene ni munela mmoha. Ooweeli epakiweke moota mmoha. 
Exodus26:25 Mooteene yoowo eniikhale acikhi athannaararu ni nyetto muloko ni mithannamosa sa eparatha*; miili vathi wa khula cikhi. 
Exodus26:26 Mwapaketho mikoomba mithanu sa mwiri wa akaasiya* wa acikhi a mpatta mmoha wa etabernaakulu*," 
Exodus26:27 mithanu wa acikhi a mpatta mukina nitho mithanu wa yaawo a mpatta ninkela nsuwa, opithela wa etabernaakulu*." 
Exodus26:28 Vano mukoomba wa eriyari okhumeke okhwipi mpaka okhwipi variyari wa acikhi. 
Exodus26:29 Mwaahuruweleke acikhi ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera ni mwaapake annela a eyuumeene yeeyo oolipiherano mikoomba. Vano mikoomba iyo sihuruweliweketho eyuumeene yeeyo. 
Exodus26:30 Mwapake etabernaakulu* mooteene yoowo mooniheringwaanyu omwaako. 
Exodus26:31 Mwapake eluttu yookawanya ya eliinyu* yootthaveliwa ni ya kanka, yookankela ni yooxeera ni mwalamulele oxoriwamo akerubini*." 
Exodus26:32 Mwakwettihere eluttu eyo mweevareleloni ixexe mwaamarimbuni axexe a mwiri wa akaasiya* ahuruweliwe ni eyuuma yoorikaxa ni yeemexeriwe mwettwaaya wa eparatha*. 
Exodus26:33 Mwakwettihere eluttu mweevareleloni ni mwawiikaathi Arka* a Wiiraana ottuli wa eluttu. Vano eluttu eyo eniikawanyihe Nipuro Nootteela* ni Nootteelaxa*. 
Exodus26:34 Vanonto, mwiikaathere yookhuneelano wa Arkani* a Wiiraana vaNipuroni Nootteelaxa*." 
Exodus26:35 Mwiikaathi meesa omokoni wa eluttu eyo mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa etabernaakulu* ni onyaari ohoolowaya meesa, mpatta wa ohitto." 
Exodus26:36 Mwapakele eluttu wa mulako wa eheema ya eliinyu* yootthaveliwa ni ya kanka, yookankela ni yooxeera, yoopakiwa ni namaxora." 
Exodus26:37 Mwapakele eluttu ivarelelo ithanu ni amarimbu athanu a mwiri wa akaasiya* ni mwaahuruwele ni eyuuma yoorikaxa. Mwarumihe ohaneliwa nyetto mithanu sa ebronze* wa yaawo. 
Exodus27:1 Mwaapake altaari* a mwiri wa akaasiya* ekhaleke oolikanela ni miringo iya: imeetru* piili ni vakhaani, vamoha ni imeetru* piilitho ni vakhaani, vamoha ni emeetru* emoha ni vakhaani." 
Exodus27:2 Mwaapakele nnyakanene mmaloothoni oomaxexe sikhalaka iyo etthu emohamoharu ni altaari* eneera ehuruweliheke ebronze*. 
Exodus27:3 Mwapaketho ikaruma sootheene sa ebronze* – mookhupelamo ettuura, apoxoro, ibasiya soovuuvihera, igarfu* sa enama ni yootholelano makhala." 
Exodus27:4 Mwapakeletho nivali na ebronze* antoko ntthavi ni munela a ebronze* wa khula nlootho na nivali. 
Exodus27:5 Vano mwiikaathere vathi wa eriyari ya waathi wa altaari* eneera ekhale eriyari ya orakamela wa altaari*. 
Exodus27:6 Mwaapakele altaari* ikopo sa mwiri wa akaasiya* ni mwahuruwele ebronze*. 
Exodus27:7 Ikoposene seiyo sivolongheriweke mwaannelani mwa mipatta miili sa altaari*, awo yaateexiwaka." 
Exodus27:8 Mwaapake altaari* a nikhuku, a itthaabwa ntoko mooniheriwaanyu omwaako." 
Exodus27:9 Mwapakele etabernaakulu* nipuwa. Vano mpatta wa ohitto nikhalekeno imeetru* miloko mixexe niithannamosa mweerakameloni. Vahoolowaya mwapake iluttu sa omokoni sa eliinyu* sootthaviwa," 
Exodus27:10 ni amarimbu miloko miili vamoha ni nyettosaya miloko mili sa ebronze* nitho ivarelelo ni makumano a eparatha* mwaamarimbuni. 
Exodus27:11 Mpatta wa ottuttuwanitho ekhalekeno imeetru* miloko mixexe niithannamosa mweerakameloni. Vano ekhalekenotho iluttu sa omokoni, amarimbu miloko miili, nyetto miloko miili sa ebronze*, ivarelelo ni makumano a eparatha* mwaamarimbuni." 
Exodus27:12 Mpatta wa ninkela nsuwa ni iluttusaya sa omokoni etabernaakulu* ekhalekeno imeetru* miloko miili ni piili ni eriyari ya emeetru* mweekhuveeloni ni amarimbu muloko ni nyettosaya muloko. 
Exodus27:13 Mpatta wa ninkhuma nsuwa ekhalaneketho imeetru* miloko miili ni piili ni eriyari ya emeetru* mweekhuveeloni. 
Exodus27:14 Vano nsikhale iluttu sa omokoni sa imeetru* ithannamosa ni eriyari ya emeetru* mweerakameloni wa mpatta wa mulako ni amarimbu araru ni nyettosaya miraru,"
