Exodus27:15 ni iluttu sa omokoni sa imeetru* ithannamosa ni eriyari ya emeetru* mweerakameloni wa mpatta mukina wa mulako ni amarimbu araru ni nyettosaya miraru. 
Exodus27:16 Mulako wa nipuwa onuukhaleno eluttu ya imeetru* ithanniixexe mweerakameloni, ya eliinyu* yootthaveliwa ni ya kanka, yookankela ni yooxeera. Eniipakiwe ni namaxora ekhalanaka amarimbu axexe ni nyettosaya mixexe." 
Exodus27:17 Amarimbu ootheene arukureenre nipuwa ekhumanyihiweke ni ivarelelo sa eparatha* ni nyetto sa ebronze*. 
Exodus27:18 Nipuwa nno nnikhale ni miringo iya: imeetru* miloko mixexe niithannamosa, vamoha ni imeetru* miloko miili ni piili ni eriyari ya emeetru*. Nnikhalanetho iluttu sa eliinyu* soothaviwa ni imeetru* piili ni vakhaani orakamelawaya ni nyetto sa ebronze*." 
Exodus27:19 Ikaruma sootheene sa muteko wa etabernaakulu* mpakatho ikhomo sa eheema ni sa nipuwa sipakeliweke ebronze*. 
Exodus27:20 Mwaalamule aYixrayeli weera yooruuheleni makhura ooreera a sooliveira* oowaamiwa yeereliwaka omwaleelela weera onyaari ovareleke woohihiyerera. 
Exodus27:21 Muheemani mwa muthukumano, omokoni wa eluttu yookawanya eri ohoolo wa Namoona*, Aharoni ni anamwanaawe epwahereraseke opattiha onyaari ohoolo wa Yave ekhumelo woosilo mpaka oxa. Nna nikhaleke nlamulo noohimala variyari wa aYixrayeli wa khula ekhapira." 
Exodus28:1 Vano mmwiitthane munninyu Aharoni ni mummwalamwaxe ni aYixrayeli vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana, Nadabi, Abiyu, Eleyazari ni Ithamari weera ekirumeele ntoko asaserdoti*." 
Exodus28:2 Mumpakele munninyu soowara sootteela sinoonihera ovuwa ni nttittimiho. 
Exodus28:3 Mwaalamulele asilopwana ootheene oowera mwa yaawo kaaweringhaaka weera ettotthe soowaara sootteela sa Aharoni weera akirumeele ntoko musaserdoti*. 
Exodus28:4 Soowara sineera sittotthiweke ti iya: Yoowara vakakasani, mooxikootti, evestidu, mukaandyo wooxoriwa, ecireemba ni laamba. Emuttottheleke munninyu Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana soowara sootteela iyo weera ekirumeele ntoko asaserdoti*." 
Exodus28:5 Evareleke muteko ikuwo sa nliinya nootteettheya, na ncano, na kanka, nookankela ni nooxeera." 
Exodus28:6 Empake mooxikootti a ncano, a kanka, ookankela, ooxeera ni nliinya nootteettheya – oottotthiwa ni aratti." 
Exodus28:7 Akhalanekeno miramba miili sootthukelano weera mipatta soomiili sikumanyihiweke nnene. 
Exodus28:8 Laamba a mooxikootti ontthukeliwaaweno akhaleke a ekuwo emoha. Vano laamba owo akhaleketho ootteettheya ootthaviwa ni maliinya a ncano, a kanka, ookankela ni ooxeera." 
Exodus28:9 Ekuxe maluku meeli a onikisi* ni elepemo masina a anamwane asilopwana a Yixrayeli. 
Exodus28:10 Elepe masinaaya ettharihaka oyariwawaya – masina mathannamosa vanlukuni nimoha ni mathannamosa makinaawo nikinanno. 
Exodus28:11 Elepe masina a anamwane asilopwana a Yixrayeli mmalukuni meeli moota namalepa a maluku onlepaawe munnelani woottittelano. Vahoolowaya mutthukelele maluku muloko ni meeli vakaaxani ekhaanene muloko ni meeli a eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
Exodus28:12 Vano, mutthukelele mmakhatani mwa mooxikootti ntoko maluku oowuupuxera anamwane asilopwana a Yixrayeli. Aharoni akuxeke masina awo mmakhatanimwawe ntoko eyuupuxero ohoolo wa Yave." 
Exodus28:13 Epakele ikaaxa sikhaanene sa eyuuma yoorikaxa 
Exodus28:14 ni onyooro miili wa eyuuma yoorikaxa, woorithiwa ntoko mukhoyi ni mutthukeleleno ikaaxa." 
Exodus28:15 Aratti epake yoowara ya vakakasani yoolakelano. Epake antoko mooxikootti: Ootthaviwa ni maliinya ootteettheya, a ncano, a kanka, ookankela ni ooxeera." 
Exodus28:16 Ekhaleke yoolikanela ni miringo iya: isentimeetru* miloko miili ni piili, vamoha ni isentimeetru* miloko miili ni piilitho. Vano mupinde veeli." 
Exodus28:17 Woottharelana mutthukelelewo misera mixexe sa maluku oowaaraxa. Mmuserani woopacera akhaleke rubi*, topaziyo* ni berilo*." 
Exodus28:18 Mmuserani wanaaveeli yaspe*, safira* ni esmeralda*;" 
Exodus28:19 mmuserani wanaararu yasinto*, agata* ni ametista*" 
Exodus28:20 ni mmuserani wanaaxexe krisolito*, onikisi* ni yaspe*. Maluku ootheene awo etthukeleliweke vakaaxaniwaya ni eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Exodus28:21 Ekhaleke maluku muloko ni meeli – nimoha wa khula nsina na anamwane asilopwana a Yixrayeli; khula nluku noolempwa ntoko munnelani woottittelano, nikhalanaka nsina nimoha na khula epuumba." 
Exodus28:22 Epakeletho yoowara ya vakakasani onyooro wa eyuuma yoorikaxa, woorithiwa ntoko mukhoyi." 
Exodus28:23 Yaapaketho annela eeli a eyuuma yoorikaxa ni yaatthukelele okhwipi wa mipatta miili sa yoowara ya vakakasani. 
Exodus28:24 Etthukeleletho onyooro miili wa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni annela ari okhwipi wa yoowara ya vakakasani. 
Exodus28:25 Mipatta sikina sa onyooro sitthukeleliweke ni ikaaxa piili. Vahoolowaya etthukeleleke sootheene iyo mmakhatani mwa mooxikootti mpatta wa ohoolo. 
Exodus28:26 Yaapake annela eeli akina a eyuuma yoorikaxa ni yaatthukelele muxerexere wa mipatta miili sikina sa yoowara ya vakakasani; wa yooxoriwa ya mpuwa, vakhiviru wa mooxikootti." 
Exodus28:27 Yaapake annela eeli akina a eyuuma yoorikaxa ni yaatthukelele mpatta wa vathi vathi wa sa mmakhatani, ohoolo wa mooxikootti, mukerekhere nttottho, ciireru osulu wa laamba a mooxikootti." 
Exodus28:28 Annela a yoowara ya vakakasani etthukeleliweke ni mooxikootti ni muramba wa kanka, eluttiwaka ni laamba weera ehiinaineke." 
Exodus28:29 Imaara sootheene Aharoni aneeraawe avolowe Nipuro Nootteela*, onookuxa masina a anamwane asilopwana a Yixrayeli vamurimaniwawe mpatta wa yoowara ya vakakasani yoolakelano, ntoko yoowuupuwelela yoohimala vamaithoni wa Yave." 
Exodus28:30 Mwiikaathitho Urimi ni Tumimi* mpatta wa yoowara ya vakakasani yoolakelano weera sikhale vamurimani wa Aharoni imaara sootheene aneeraawe avolowe vamaithoni wa Yave. Hiiho, Aharoni onookuxa vamurimani moota woolakelano mwa aYixrayeli ohoolo wa Yave." 
Exodus28:31 Evestidu yootheene ya mooxikootti ettotthiwe ya kanka," 
Exodus28:32 ni eriyari ehelewo nlaka weera ovirewo muru. Mukhwipi mwa nlaka nno ephitaanyeke mattotthelo ntoko ekolarinya, weera ehaahuwe." 
Exodus28:33 Vano mooxoriwamwaya muheleke irooma* sa kanka, sookankela ni sooxeera ni evaxavaxaka ni ingilingili sa eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Exodus28:34 Ingilingili sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni irooma* soovaxavaxiwa sirukureereke mooxoriwa mwa evestidu yootheene. 
Exodus28:35 Aharoni awareke imaara sootheene aneeraawe arumeele. Oruma wa ingilingili nsiiwiweke owo aavolowaka Nipuro Nootteela* ohoolo wa Yave ni aakhumaka, weera ahikhwe." 
Exodus28:36 Mpake etthu ya malootho mararu ya eyuuma yoorikaxa ni mulepemo ntoko namalepa onlepaawe munnelani woottittelano. Mulepe ha: YOOTTEELIHERIWA YAVE. 
Exodus28:37 Mutthukelele eyo ohoolo wa ecireemba ni muramba wa kanka. 
Exodus28:38 Etthweene yeeyo ekhaleke vayuucini wa Aharoni ni anaakuxe nthowa na yakhalaru yoottheka aYixrayeli eneeraaya epahule mwaha wa sooveleelela sootteela. Ekhaleke vayuucini wa Aharoni mahiku ootheene weera aYixrayeli ekhale oowaakhuleliwa ni Yave. 
Exodus28:39 Evestiduweene yeeyo ni ecireemba sitthaviweke ni nliinya nootteettheya. Laamba apakiwe ni namaxora. 
Exodus28:40 Mwaapakele anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni ivestidu, alaamba ni sootthukela mmuru sinoonihera ovuwa ni nttittimiho." 
Exodus28:41 Mungwaringheene munninyu Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni soowara iyo, mwaattikitthelase, mwaakhalihase ni mwaatteelihase weera ekirumeele ntoko asaserdoti*." 
Exodus28:42 Mwaattotthelase akaputtula a mpuwa a nliinya nootteettheya okhuma muyuununi mpaka mutakhwini weera yiikuttelelase etiriyaaya. 
Exodus28:43 Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ewaraseke iyo imaara sootheene eneraaya evolowaseke Muheemani mwa Muthukumano, hoye hoye yaarowasaka wa altaari* weera erumeele vaNipuroni Nootteela*. Hiiho anoosemba nthowa ninruuhela okhwa. Nna nikhaleke nlamulo noohimala wa Aharoni ni ekhapiraawe." 
Exodus29:1 Mwaakhalihe moota ola weera ekirumeele ntoko asaserdoti*: Munkuxe mwaaxaana a emombe ni anapunci eeli oohirakala. 
Exodus29:2 Mpake ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu ni ephepa yooreerelaxa ya etrigu ni mpaketho iboolu sootakansiwa ni makhura ni ipaawu soozazaala soottikittheliwa makhura. 
Exodus29:3 Muhele mumpaparani ni mumveleeleno vamoha ni mwaamombe ni anapunci eeli. 
Exodus29:4 Vahoolowaya munruuhe Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano* ni mwaavululase. 
Exodus29:5 Mukuxe soowara sa esaserdoti ni mungwarihe Aharoni evestidu ni yoowara ya vakakasani. Muntthukelele mooxikootti ni laamba ootthaviwa. 
Exodus29:6 Mungwarihe ecireemba muvarelaka muteko ediyadema* mmuru. 
Exodus29:7 Vano munghele makhura anttikitthelelaniwa, mmiinelaka mmuru mwa Aharoni." 
Exodus29:8 Mwaaruuhe anamwanaawe asilopwana ni mwaawarihaseke evestidu 
Exodus29:9 ni yootthukano mmuru. Muntthukeletho laamba Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana. Hiiho osaserdoti* ti wawaya niwoko na nlamulo noohimala. Vano nyuwo munkhalihe Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana moota ola. 
Exodus29:10 Munruuhe mwaamombe ohoolo wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana emwiikaathere matata vamuruwawe. 
Exodus29:11 Munghite vamaithoni wa Yave vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. 
Exodus29:12 Vano mukuxe mpatta mukina wa ephome ya mwaamombe ni muhinge ni ekatha vamanyakani a altaari*. Vahoolowaya mmiinele yeeyo enghala mukhwipi wa altaari*. 
Exodus29:13 Vanonto mukuxe makhura ootheene anrukureera marupo – hapa ni miso miili – vamoha ni makhura ari vasuluwaya ni muhise vasulu wa altaari*. 
Exodus29:14 Wa soothesene, enama, exapala ni mpuule wa mwaamombe sihisiweke okhwipi wa okonelingwe. Ti yooveleela niwoko na yoottheka." 
Exodus29:15 Munkuxe mmoha a anapunci ni Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana yiikaathereke matata vamuru wa mwaamunama. 
Exodus29:16 Munghite, mukuxe ephome ni mmisere mukhwipi moothemwene wa altaari*." 
Exodus29:17 Munthikilanye napunci intthuri intthuri, muhapihe marupwaaya ni nyettosaya, ni mwiikaathi mpatta siri nyuru ni mipatta sikina." 
Exodus29:18 Vano munghise napunci mpurukuma valtaarini*. Ti yooveleela yoohisa wa Yave, yoowunkhela yooreeraxa; yooveleela yoopakeliwa Yave vamooroni." 
Exodus29:19 Munkuxe napunci mukina ni Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana yiikaathereke matata vamuru wa mwaamunama. 
Exodus29:20 Munghite, mukuxe ephome ni munghinge okhwipi wa naaru na woolopwana na Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana. Munghingetho vakathani etokweene ya mmatatani ya moono mulopwana ni mwetto mulopwana wa Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana. Vahoolowaya mmisere ephome enghala mukhwipi moothemwene wa altaari*." 
Exodus29:21 Vano mukuxe ephome vakhaani wa altaari* ni makhura vakhaani oottikitthelano ni mummisereno Aharoni ni ikuwosawe ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni ikuwosaya. Vahoolowaya owo vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni ikuwosaya nsitteelihiwe. 
Exodus29:22 Mvenxe makhura a napunci owo, mpatta woonuna wa mwiila, makhura anghuruwela marupo, makhura aninghuruwela hapa ni miso miili nitho makhura anghuruwela etakhwi yoolopwana. Owo ti napunci a otteelihiwa." 
Exodus29:23 Mukuxe epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu, eboolu yootakansiwa ni makhura ni epaawu emoha yoozazaala eri mumpaparani ori ohoolo wa Yave." 
Exodus29:24 Mumvaherere ipaawusene seiyo Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni yiinainiheke ohoolo wa Yave ntoko sooveleela soowiinainihiwa. 
Exodus29:25 Vahoolowaya mvenxe seiyo mmatatanimwaya ni muhiseke valtaarini* vamoha ni sooveleela soohisa ntoko yoowunkhelaxa yoomusiveliha Yave. Ti yooveleela yoopakeliwa Yave vamooroni. 
Exodus29:26 Vahoolo wookuxa ehoce ya napunci omvareliwa muteko woomutteelihera Aharoni, mwiinainihere ohoolo wa Yave ntoko sooveleela soowiinainihiwa. Vano eyo eniikhale yawinyu." 
Exodus29:27 Mutteelihe mipatta sa napunci omvareliwa muteko woomutteelihera Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana: Ehoce ni etakhwi siinainihiwe. 
Exodus29:28 Mipatta iya eniimvaheke aYixrayeli Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana. Eyo ti yoowaandyeererihana ni nlamulo eniikhalihe sooveleelasaya. Ti mipatta sa sooveleelela murettele simpakeliwa Yave sintthuneya omvaha Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana otthuna ni ohitthuna. 
Exodus29:29 Soowara sootteela sa Aharoni nsikhale sa ekhapiraawe weera ewarihiwe yaattikittheliwaka ni yaakhalihiwaka. 
Exodus29:30 Mwaana aneera amurandele Aharoni ntoko musaserdoti* aavolowaka Muheemani ya Muthukumano* weera arumeele vaNipuroni Nootteela* awareke seiyo wa mahuku mathannameeli. 
Exodus29:31 Munkuxe napunci omvareliwa muteko woomutteeliha Aharoni ni mmwaapeye vaNipuroni nikina Nootteela*. 
Exodus29:32 Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ekhuureke enama ya napunci owo ni epaawu eri mumpaparani, awo ereene vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*." 
Exodus29:33 Awo ekhuureke sooveleela seiyo, niwoko wohiiraaniheya mwaha wa seiyo wa okhalihiwawaya ni otteelihiwawaya. Ahikhale mukina anaakhuure seiyo, niwoko ti sootteela." 
Exodus29:34 Yahala enama ya napunci omvareliwa muteko woomutteeliha Aharoni hoye hoye epaawu mpaka waaxiiye, muhiseke. Sihikhuuriweke seenre sitteelihiwaka." 
Exodus29:35 Mumpakele Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana sootheene Miyo koolamulenlaakani, mwaatteelihaka wa mahuku mathannameeli." 
Exodus29:36 Khula nihuku munghite mwaamombe ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka enruuha wiiraana. Mwaatteelihe altaari* ngwiiraanyihaka ni mwaattikitthele weera ekhale ootteelihiwa. 
Exodus29:37 Ngwiiraanyihe altaari* wa mahuku mathannameeli mwaatteelihaka. Vano altaari* eniikhale ootteelaxa ni eniyaataveru eniikhale yootteela. 
Exodus29:38 Vano sooveleela muneeraanyu mpake khula nihuku ti iya: Iputtiputthi piili sa eyaakha emoha. 
Exodus29:39 Mveleele emoha oxeexelo ni ekina wiilaka. 
Exodus29:40 Vano ni yooveleela yoopacera, mveleeletho ikiilu* piili sa ephepa ya etrigu yooreeraxa yoowootoweleliwa eliitru* emoha ya makhura a sooliveira* ni eliitru* emoha ya eviinyu ntoko yooveleela yoomiineliwa." 
Exodus29:41 Mveleele eputtiputthi ekina wiilaka vamoha ni yooveleeleene yeeyo ya ephepa ni ya yoowura ya oxeexelo. Ti yooveleela yoowunkhelaxa enimusiveliha Yave; yoopakeliwa Yave vamooroni. 
Exodus29:42 Khula ekhapira epake yooveleela yoohisa ela khula nihuku vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano* ohoolo wa Yave. Nipuro nno kinimoophwanyasani ni kinimuuluma ni nyuwo. 
Exodus29:43 Iwo kinoophwanyaneyawo ni aYixrayeli ni nipuro nno nniitteelihiwe ni ovuwawaka. 
Exodus29:44 Vano kinootteeliha Eheema ya Muthukumano* ni altaari* ni kinoomutteelihatho Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana weera ekirumeelase ntoko asaserdoti*. 
Exodus29:45 Kinookhala variyari wa aYixrayeli kikhalaka Mulukwaaya. 
Exodus29:46 Awo eniisuwele weera Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaaya, mwa Yoowo aakhuminghe wExipitu weera kikhale variyariwaya. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaaya." 
Exodus30:1 Mwaapake altaari* a mwiri wa akaasiya* weera ehisiwe erubani*. 
Exodus30:2 Ekhaleke oolikanela ni miringo iya: eriyari ya emeetru* emoha, vamoha ni eriyari ya emeetru*, vamoha ni wookwanaka emeetru* emoha. Manyakaaya ekhaleke etthu emohamoharu ni altaari*." 
Exodus30:3 Muttikitthele mpatta wa osulu, mipatta sikina sootheene nitho manyaka ni eyuuma yoorikaxa. Mvirihele mukhwipimwaya ni eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Exodus30:4 Mwaapakele annela eeli a eyuuma yoorikaxa wa khula mpatta wa altaari* vathi wa yooviriheliwa simvolongheriwaayamo ikopo sinteexeriwa. 
Exodus30:5 Mpake ikopo sa mwiri wa akaasiya* ni muttikitthele ni eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
Exodus30:6 Ngwiikaathi altaari* ohoolo wa eluttu eri ohoolo wa Arka* a Namoona; ohoolo wa yookhuneelano ya Wiiraana enimukhuneela Namoona, mwa weiwo kineeraaka kaphwanyaneye ni nyuwo." 
Exodus30:7 Khula oxeexelo Aharoni aarehereraka onyaari, ahiseketho erubani* valtaarini*." 
Exodus30:8 Ahiseketho erubani* apattihaka onyaari wiilaka weera ehisiwe erubani* woohihiyerera ohoolo wa Yave wa khula ekhapira. 
Exodus30:9 Muhiveleele valtaareene yaala wakhalaru moota mukina wa erubani*, hoye hoye sooveleela soohisa, naari sooveleela sa etrigu ni muhimiinelewo sooveleela sa soowura." 
Exodus30:10 Emaara emoha vayaakhani Aharoni apakeke wiiraana vamanyakaniwaya. Wiiraanawene weiwo wa khula eyaakha opakiweke ni ephome ya yooveleela mwaha wa yoottheka weera siiraane ikhapira sootheene sa muhoolo. Altaari* awo ti ootteelaxa wa Yave.” 
Exodus30:11 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Exodus30:12 “Nyuwo mwaampakaka namalepela a aYixrayeli, khula mutthu, aalikeliwaka, amulive Yave nlivo noowiixoopolela. Hiiho khanaarweela nakhalaru nihooxo nyuwo mwaawaalikelaka." 
Exodus30:13 Khula mutthu aalepeliwaka, amuliveke Yave eriyari ya exekeli, eyo tiiyo igrama* ithannamosa, ettharaka exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*, mwa yeeyo enlemela igrama* muloko ni piili. Eriyari ya exekeli* eyo ti yoomveleelela Yave." 
Exodus30:14 Atthu ootheene alepeliwe a iyaakha miloko miili wookela muhoolo empakele Yave yooveleela. 
Exodus30:15 Vano atthu yaampakelaka Yave yooveleela yoowiixoopolela, anamapuha ehiliveke woopwaha eriyari ya exekeli* naari oohaawa ehiliveke vakhaani." 
Exodus30:16 Musurukhu wa woopola waakheliwe wa aYixrayeli yiinnyerereke omutekoni wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. Eniikhale yoowuupuwelela wa aYixrayeli ohoolo wa Yave weera yoopolele ikumisanyu.” 
Exodus30:17 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Exodus30:18 “Mpake ebasiya yoowiivululelano ya ebronze* ni mweettwaaya wa ebronze*. Mwiikaathi eriyari ya Eheema ya Muthukumano* ni altaari* ni mulamulele osarihiwamo maahi. 
Exodus30:19 Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana yiivululeke matataaya ni inaawosaya ni maahi a mbasiyani. 
Exodus30:20 Imaara sootheene eneeraaya evolowaseke Muheemani ya Muthukumano*, yiivululaseke weera ehikhwaase. Vano awo yaawaattamelaka altaari* weera emurumeele Yave, eveleelaka yooveleela vamooroni," 
Exodus30:21 yiivululeke weera ehikhwaase. Nna ti nlamulo noohimala wa Aharoni ni ekhapiraawe yootheene wa mahuku ootheene.” 
Exodus30:22 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Exodus30:23 “Muthukumanye sooreerela sooreeraxa sinttharelana: ikiilu* ithannamosa sa emiira* ya maaheene, ikiilu* tthaaru sa kanela* oosiva, ikiilu* tthaaru sa mihali* soowunkhela," 
Exodus30:24 ikiilu* ithannamosa sa kasiya*, sittharaka mphimo wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*, ni mwaandyeereretho iliitru* ixexe ni eriyaraaya sa makhura a sooliveira*." 
Exodus30:25 Mutakansere seiyo weera ekhale makhura ootteela amvareliwa muteko woottikitthelano; ootakansiwa soowunkhela, oopakiwa ni namweeka. Eniikhale makhura ootteela amvareliwa muteko woottikitthelano." 
Exodus30:26 Vahoolowaya muvareleke muteko makhura awo weera muttikitthele Eheema ya Muthukumano*, Arka* a Namoona," 
Exodus30:27 meesa ni ikarumasaya sootheene, onyaari ni ikarumasaya, altaari* a erubani*," 
Exodus30:28 altaari* a sooveleela soohisa ni ikarumasaya ni ebasiya ni mweettwaaya. 
Exodus30:29 Ontthuneya weera nyuwo mutteelihe itthu iya weera sikhale sootteelaxa ni eniyaataveru eniikhale yootteela. 
Exodus30:30 Munttikitthele Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni mwaatteelihe weera ekirumeele ntoko asaserdoti*. 
Exodus30:31 Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Awo ekhaleke makhura ootteela oottikitthelano wa ikhapira sa mahuku ootheene. 
Exodus30:32 Muhimmiineleru mukina naari muheeke makhura makina ntoko yaala. Ti ootteela ni hiiho nyuwosa muttittimihereke. 
Exodus30:33 Akhalaru mutthu aneera eeke makhura ntoko yaala hoye hoye anaammiinele mukina ahikhanle musaserdoti*, oomoliweke munlokonimwawe.’”" 
Exodus30:34 Vahoolowaya Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Muthukumanye itthu sooreerela soowunkhelaxa sinttharelana: mattonyo a otothowa wa nnyoma, onika*, nnyoma na niphuwa niitthaniwa galabano, ni erubani* yooreeraxa – sootheene silikaneleke waattawaya." 
Exodus30:35 Mweeke erubani* yootakansiwa ni soowunkhelaxa, yoopakiwa ni namweeka. Eyo yeeleeliweke, yooreeraxa ni yootteelihiwa." 
Exodus30:36 Axileke mpatta mukina mpaka oxileya ni iikaathiki ohoolo wa Namoona Muheemani ya Muthukumano*, mwa weiwo kineeraaka kaphwanyaneyewo ni nyuwo. Eyo eniikhale yootteelaxa wa nyuwo." 
Exodus30:37 Muheekeru erubani* ekina mulikanxaka yeela weera mvarele muteko; muttittimihereke weera yootteela, ekhalaka ya Yave." 
Exodus30:38 Akhalaru mutthu aneera eeke erubani* ntoko yeela weera emusivele wunkhelawaya oomoliweke munlokonimwawe.” 
Exodus31:1 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Exodus31:2 “Koomuthanla Bezaleli, mwaana a Uri, mwaana a Huri, a epuumba ya Yuda" 
Exodus31:3 ni koomusariha Munepa wa Muluku kimvahaka miruku, wiiwexexa ni ettottho ya nyoota soohiyanahiyana sa muteko." 
Exodus31:4 Hiiho onoowera ocaambula, avarelaka muteko eyuuma yoorikaxa, eparatha* ni ebronze*," 
Exodus31:5 athikilaka maluku, atthukelelaka, avarelaka muteko itthaabwa ni aweraka miteko soohiyanahiyana sa ettottho." 
Exodus31:6 Ohiya toko yeeyo, koomukhaliha Oholiyabi, mwaana a Ahisamaki a epuumba ya Dani weera amukhavihere Bezaleli. Kohaavahatho eluunda aneettottho weera epake sootheene koolamulenlaakani:" 
Exodus31:7 Eheema ya Muthukumano*, Arka* a Namoona ekhalanaka yookhuneelano ni ikaruma sikina sootheene sa muheemani," 
Exodus31:8 meesa ni ikarumasaya, onyaari wa eyuuma yoorikaxa woohaniwa ni ikarumasaya sootheene, altaari* a erubani*," 
Exodus31:9 altaari* a sooveleela soohisa ni ikarumasaya, ebasiya ni mwettwaaya," 
Exodus31:10 soowara sa esaserdoti – soowara sootteela sa musaserdoti* Aharoni ni sa anamwanaawe asilopwana awo yaarumeelasaka ntoko asaserdoti*," 
Exodus31:11 makhura oottikitthelano ni erubani* yoowunkhelaxa wa Nipuro Nootteela*. Sootheene sipakiweke hiihoweene koolamulenlaakani.” 
Exodus31:12 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Exodus31:13 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Muttittimihe iSaabadusaka. Eyo eniikhale eneneero ya Miyo ni nyuwosa wa khula ekhapira weerela musuwele weera Miyo ti Yave onootteelihasani. 
Exodus31:14 Muttiittimihe eSaabadu, niwoko ti yootteela wa nyuwo. Akhalaru mutthu aneera anyoose eSaabadu, iiviweke ni akhalaru mutthu aneera avare muteko nihuku nenenenno, oomoliweke munlokonimwawe." 
Exodus31:15 Ovariweke muteko mahuku mathannamosa, mene nihuku nanaathannameeli ti eSaabadu, nihuku noowiitthuuwa, nootteela wa Yave. Akhalaru mutthu aneera avare muteko nihuku na eSaabadu, iiviweke." 
Exodus31:16 aYixrayeli ni ikhapirasaya ettittimiheke eSaabadu ntoko wiiraana woohimala. 
Exodus31:17 Eniikhale eneneero yoohimala wa Miyo ni aYixrayeli, niwoko wa mahuku mathannamosa Yave aapattuxa erimu ni vathi, mene nihuku nanaathannameeli khaavanre muteko ni aahiitthuuwa.’”" 
Exodus31:18 Amalihakaru wuuluma ni Moisesi vamwaako Sinayi, Yave aamvaha itthaabwa piili sa Namoona, itthaabwa sa maluku soolempwa ni ekatha ya Muluku." 
Exodus32:1 Muloko woonaka weera Moisesi annapisa vancipale okhuruwa vamwaako, waathukumana omurukureeraka Aharoni, onamweerela: “Nkarwani, munipakele miluku sineera sinihoolele. Vano Moiseseene yoowo onikhumihale wExipitu – khanisuwenle emukhumelenle.”" 
Exodus32:2 Aharoni aahaakhula: “Mwaarule axiveeve a eyuuma yoorikaxa yaawanraaya axaarinyu ni anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana ni mukiruuhele.” 
Exodus32:3 Vano atthu ootheene yaahaarula axiveeve a eyuuma yoorikaxa, enamuroihela Aharoni." 
Exodus32:4 Aahaakuxa yaawo yaamuruuhenlaaya, anaahana, aatatuxaka ootheenaawo muluku oowootha akhalanaka ekhalelo ya mwaamombe. Vano awo yaaheera: “aYixrayeli, iya va milukusanyu sookhumihaleni wExipitu.”" 
Exodus32:5 Oonaka yeeyo, Aharoni aahaateka altaari* ohoolo wa mwaamombe, analaalika: “Omaalo eniikhale efesta wa Yave.”" 
Exodus32:6 Oxaawaya atthu yaavenya oxeexelo enapaka sooveleela soohisa ni sa murettele. Vahoolowaya yaakilaathi weera ece ni ewure ni yaapacera ococopolana. 
Exodus32:7 Vanonto, Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mukhuruweke, niwoko mulokwaanyu, mwa yoowo mukhumihalaanyu wExipitu, woohapuwela ephiro yoolokottha." 
Exodus32:8 Woowaakuveya aahiya yeele kaalamulenlaaka ni ahiipakela muluku oowootha mmukhaleloni wa mwaamombe. Awo aamuuramela empakelaka sooveleela, yeeraka: ‘aYixrayeli, iya va milukusanyu sookhumihaleni wExipitu.’”" 
Exodus32:9 Yave aapwaherera eeraka: “Kohoona weera muloko owo woottiyamaaru! 
Exodus32:10 Vano mukihiyeke weera waanyoonyeriwawaka waapattele ni weera kaaphwate! Vahoolowaya kinimootatuxerani muloko mutokotoko.” 
Exodus32:11 Wa soothesene, Moisesi aamudyoonttelela Yave, Mulukwaawe, akhuwelaka: “Yave, heeni munnyoonyeriwaanyu mulokwaanyu owo, mwa yoowo mukhumihalaanyu wExipitu ni ikuru sitokotoko ni ntatananyu noolipaxa?" 
Exodus32:12 Muntthuna weera awExipitu yeere: ‘Owo aahaakhumiha ni murima woonanara weera awiivele mmanyaakoni ni aaphwatele mweelaponimu? Mukurunuxe isarasanyu soowoopiha! Muupuwele moota mukina ni muhiruuhele yoonanara eyo mulokwaanyu. 
Exodus32:13 Muupuwelele sa arumeiyaanyu Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yakobe. Nyuwo mwaahiilipela: ‘Nkaandyeerere ekhapiraanyu ntoko ithenyeeri sa wiirimu ni kinoovaha elapo yootheene ela kaaroromelinghaaka. Eniikhale yoohiyeriwaaya wa mahuku ootheene.’”" 
Exodus32:14 Vano Yave aaceendya soowuupuwelasawe ahipakelaka mulokwaawe yoonanara oopopiheraawe. 
Exodus32:15 Moisesi aakhuruwa vamwaako, akunxeene itthaabwa piili sa Namoona. Iye saalempwe ninno ninno." 
Exodus32:16 Itthaabwa saapakiwe ni Muluku, yeeyo yaalempwemo aalempe Muluku, silempwe mmatthaabwani." 
Exodus32:17 Yoxuwa iiwakaru onyakula wa atthu ekhuwelaka, aamweerela Moisesi: “Wookhala onyakula wa ekhotto okonelingwe.”" 
Exodus32:18 Moisesi aamwaakhula: “Khoohiyono oruma wa owina naari owiniwa – kiniiwa oruma wa icipo.” 
Exodus32:19 Moisesi aattamelaka waakonelingwe ni amoonakaru mwaamombe ni atthu yiinaka, aanyoonyiwa vancipale. Aavonyera vathi mukerekhere mwaako itthaabwa saari mmatatanimwawe apwexaka." 
Exodus32:20 Aamukuxa mwaamombe awosa yaampankaaya, anamuhisa. Vahoolowaya aamuxila mpaka oxileya, aahootowela mmaahini, aanyesererihaka aYixrayeli owura." 
Exodus32:21 Aamweerela Aharoni: “Atthu ala aweeringheni weera nyuwo mwaaruuhele yoottheka etokotoko ela?” 
Exodus32:22 Aharoni aamwaakhula: “Muhinyoonyiwe pwiiyaaka. Moosuwela nnenesene weera muloko ola ontthuna opaka soonanara. 
Exodus32:23 Awo yaakeerela: ‘munipakele miluku sineera sinihoolele. Vaheera Moiseseene yoowo aanikhuminghe wExipitu – khanisuwenle emukhumelenle.’ 
Exodus32:24 Vano miyo kaaweerelasa: ‘Ootheene arino itthu sa iyuuma soorikaxa, ekiruuhele. Awo yaakiruuhela eyuuma yoorikaxa, kinavonyera mmooroni anakhumelela mwaamombe owo!”" 
Exodus32:25 Moisesi aahoona weera atthu yaaheettela moota woohiiwelela ni weera Aharoni aahaahiya waawehaweha ni hiiho amwiittanaaya yannaatheya. 
Exodus32:26 Vano aaheemela vamulako wa waakhoneliwe, aneera: “Yaawo ari mpatta wa Yave, ethukumane ni miyo.” Ootheene a epuumba ya Leevi yaathukumana ni yoowo." 
Exodus32:27 Vano Moisesi aaweerela:“Yave, Muluku a Yixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Khula mutthu iitthukele nluwonawe aviravire okonelingwe khula eheema ni amwiivaka munneiye, nthamwenaawe ni mwaattamanaawe.’”" 
Exodus32:28 aLeevi yaapaka yeeyo Moisesi aalamulenlaawe ni nihuku nne yaahookhwa atthu wookwanaka macira miloko miraru variyari wa muloko. 
Exodus32:29 Moisesi aaweerela: “Nyuwosa olelo mohiitteelihera Yave, niwoko khaawo a nyuwosa omuurenle mwanawe naari munneiye moota wooweera Yave ohooreelihasani nihuku nna.”" 
Exodus32:30 Oxaawaya Moisesi aaheerela muloko: “Nyuwosa mootthekaxa, mene kinoowela wa Yave. Apaale kinoowera wiiraanyiha wa yootthekaanyu.”" 
Exodus32:31 Moisesi aahokoleela wa Yave, anamweerela: “Ii! Muloko wootthekaxa! Wohiipakela miluku sa eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Exodus32:32 Vanonto, dyoontte, mulevelele yootthekaaya. Mwaahilevelela, mucipihe nsinanaka mulempaanyu mulivurinimwanyu.”" 
Exodus32:33 Yave aamwaakhula Moisesi: “Kinoocipiha mulivurunimwaka masina a ootheene yaale akitthekenle.” 
Exodus32:34 Vano, murowe, mwahoolele muloko wa nipuro Miyo kooleenlaakani, ni ndyelowaaka onimoohoolelani. Wa soothesene, yaphiyera ehuhu yoottaruxa, kinimwaattaruxa niwoko na yootthekaaya.”" 
Exodus32:35 Yave aaruuhela muloko nihooxo niwoko waamvekela Aharoni ompaka mwaamombe. 
Exodus33:1 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Muttimule nipuro nna ni muloko mukhuminghaanyu wExipitu ni murowe elapo kaamuroromelinghaaka ni nlipelo Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yakobe keeraaka: ‘Kinoovaha wa ekhapiraanyu.’" 
Exodus33:2 Miyo kinoomurumiha ndyelo ohoolowanyu, kiwoomolaka aKanaani, awAmori, aHiti, aPerizi, aHivi ni aYebusi." 
Exodus33:3 Murowe elapo yoosareya mukaka ni oravo. Vaheera Miyo nkinrowa ni nyuwosa weera kihoophwataseni, niwoko nyuwosa ti muloko woottiyamaaru.”" 
Exodus33:4 Muloko wiiwaka masu ale oowoopiha, waapacera olalamika ni khaawo aawanre itthu sooreera soorikaxa." 
Exodus33:5 Waalalamika, niwoko Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Nyuwosa ti muloko woottiyamaaru. Miyo kaarowa ni nyuwo hata wa ehuhu vakhaani, kaamphwata muloko owo. Vano, murule itthusanyu sooreera soorikaxa ni kinoolakela yoowoopakasani.”" 
Exodus33:6 Tivawo okhuma omwaako Horebi mpaka ohoolo aYixrayeli khayaawararu itthusaya sooreera soorikaxa. 
Exodus33:7 Vano Moisesi aakhovelela okunga eheema okerekhere wa waakhoneliwa yiitthaniwaka eyo “Eheema ya Muthukumano*.” Akhalaru mutthu aatthuna omukoha Yave aarowa eHeemeene yeeyo okerekhere wa waakhoneliwa. 
Exodus33:8 Imaara sootheene Moisesi aarowaawewo, muloko wootheene wannavenya weemelaka vamulako wa iheemasaya, ongwehexexaka Moisesi mpaka ovolowamo." 
Exodus33:9 Moisesi aavolowaawemo, nrimbu na mahutte nannakhuruwa nikhuneelaka Mulako wa Eheema, Yave uulumaka ni Moisesi." 
Exodus33:10 Khula emaara muloko woonaaya nrimbu na mahutte nikhuneenleene mulako wa Eheema, ootheene yanneemela, enalapa – khula mutthu vamulako wa eheemaawe." 
Exodus33:11 Yave uuluma ni Moisesi ttunda ttunda ntoko mutthu onuuluma ni nthamwenaawe. Vahoolowaya Moisesi annahokoleela waakhoneliwa, mene namakhaviheraawe Yoxuwa, mwaana a Nuni, khaavenyaru vaheemani." 
Exodus33:12 Moisesi aamweerela Yave: “Nyuwo mookeerela: ‘Muhoolele muloko ola,’ mene khamunkitthunihera omusuwela taani muneeraanyu mukirumihele. Mweenre: ‘Kohoosuwelani nnenesene ni wa nyuwo koosiveliwa.’" 
Exodus33:13 Mwakoona ntoko oosiveleya, mukoonihere sootthunasanyu weera koosuweleni ni kipwaherereke waakhuleliwa ni Nyuwo. Muupuwelele weera muloko ola ti wawinyu.”" 
Exodus33:14 Yave aamwaakhula: “Okhalawaka onimoohoolelani ni kinimoovahani wiitthuuwa.” 
Exodus33:15 Vano Moisesi aamweerela: “Okhalawanyu waahinihoola, muhinilamulele ottimula wenno." 
Exodus33:16 Ngwisuwanyeye hai weera miyo ni mulokwaanyu munnanihakalalela Nyuwo mwaahinihoola? Onuuhiyaneye hai hiyo ntoko mulokwaanyu ni miloko sikina sootheene sa elapo ya vathi?” 
Exodus33:17 Yave aamwaakhula Moisesi: “Kinoopaka etthweene yeeyo mukivekenlaanyu, niwoko mookisiveliha ni kohoosuwelani nnenesene.”" 
Exodus33:18 Vanonto Moisesi aamweerela: “Mukoonihere ovuwawanyu.” 
Exodus33:19 Yave aaheera: “Kinoorumiha onnenaaka weera ovire ohoolowanyu ni kinoolaleiya Nsinanaka, Yave, muraanyuwo. Kinoommorela ikharari yoowo kintthunaaka ommorela ni kinoompixera murima yoowo kintthunaaka ompixera." 
Exodus33:20 Wa soothesene, khoonghwereya woona ekhovaaka, niwoko khaawo ongwera okoona anapwaherera ni okumi.”" 
Exodus33:21 Vano Yave aapwaherera: “Nookhala va nipuro vakhivuruwaka, mwa weiwo mungweraanyu weemela vamwala." 
Exodus33:22 Waaviraka ovuwawaka, kinimoohelani munikhukuni nri vamwala ni kinimookhuneelani ni ntatanaka mpaka Miyo ovira." 
Exodus33:23 Vahoolowaya kinoovenxa ntatanaka ni nyuwo munimoona ettulaaka, mene Koontthuniheriwa woona ekhovaaka.”" 
Exodus34:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mukuxe enyutto ni ephalo mwaattule itthaabwa piili sa maluku ntoko seiye soopacera ni mwa seiyo kinoolepa masu yaarimo soopacera, mwa seiyo mpwenxaanyu." 
Exodus34:2 Oxeexelo mukhale oolikaneene weera ngwele vamwaako Sinayi. Vaavaawo mwiixoonihere wa Miyo. 
Exodus34:3 Ahikhale mukina anaarowe ni nyuwo hata anaakhale mukhwipi wa mwaako. Mpakatho mihuwo sootheene khoontthuniheriwa ociha mukhwipi mwaako.” 
Exodus34:4 Hiiho Moisesi aahaattula itthaabwa piili sa maluku ntoko seiye soopacera ni oxeexelo aawela vamwaako Sinayi, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe, akunxeene itthaabwa piili iye sa maluku." 
Exodus34:5 Vano Yave aakhuruwa munihutteni, anakhala vaavaale ni Moisesi, alaleiyaka Nsinanawe, eyo tiiyo, Yave." 
Exodus34:6 Aavira ohoolo wa Moisesi alaleiyaka: “Yave, Yave – Muluku oopixa murima ni a ikharari, oovilela, oosareya osivela ni ororomeleya," 
Exodus34:7 mwa Yoowo ompwaherera ni waasivelawawe atthu oohaalikeleya, alevelelaka otakhala, ovaanya ni yoottheka. Hata hiiho, khanghiya omuttaruxa nanthowa. Owo onaattaruxa anamwane ni osuulwaaya mpaka ekhapira yanaararu ni yanaaxexe niwoko na soottheka sa asitithaya.”" 
Exodus34:8 Woowaakuveya Moisesi aahuuramela vathi, anamulapa," 
Exodus34:9 amweerelaka: “Yave, mwatthuna okoonihera murima wooreera, munihoole. Orimweeraru muloko owo oreene woottiyamaaru, mulevelele sootakhalasahu ni sootthekasahu ni munaakhele ntoko yoohiyeraanyu.”" 
Exodus34:10 Vano Yave aamweerela: “Kimpaka wiiraana ni nyuwo. Vamaithoni wa mulokwaanyu wootheene kinoopaka sootikhiniha sihitonke opakiwa variyari wa miloko sikina sootheene sa mweelaponi. Muloko mwa yoowo munkhalaanyu onimoona muteko wootikhiniha Miyo, Yave, kineeraaka kipake." 
Exodus34:11 Mwiiwelele yeeyo kinoolamulelaakani olelo. Kinoowoomolelani ohoolowanyu awAmori, aKanaani, aHiti, aPerizi, aHivi ni aYebusi." 
Exodus34:12 Mwiipasoope weera muhaataane ni yaawo amanke mweelaponi mwa weiwo munrowaanyuwo weera nyuwo muhipharihiwe ni ntaphanaya. 
Exodus34:13 Ohiyanawaya, mwaaphwate altaaraaya, mwaapwexe amarimbwaaya ootteela ni mwathikile nyiri soothipeleliwa sa Axera." 
Exodus34:14 Muhilaperu miluku sikina, niwoko Yave, mwa yoowo Nsinanawe ti Ehace, Owo ti Muluku a ehace." 
Exodus34:15 Mwiipasoope weera muhaataane ni yaawo amanke mweelaponi. Awo yaararuwaka ni milukusaya epakelaka sooveleela, awo animoolattulani ni animookuxani weera muceno sooveleelasaya." 
Exodus34:16 Mwaathanlaka akina a anamwanaaya asithiyana ntoko axaaraya anamwaniinyu, ni asithiyana awo yararuwa ni milukusaya, eniyeereke waakuxa anamwaniinyu asilopwana elavalaveketho." 
Exodus34:17 Muhiipakele miluku sa iyuuma soohaniwa. 
Exodus34:18 Muupuwelele efesta ya epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu. Muceeke ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu wa mahuku mathannameeli, ntoko koolamulenlaakani. Mpake yeeyo mweehuhuni yoothanliwa, mmweerini wa Abibi, niwoko waari mweereene yoowo mwaakhummaanyu wExipitu." 
Exodus34:19 Matthaara ootheene ti awaka, mpakatho matthaara asilopwana a mihuwosanyu sootheene, hata imombe naari ikhondoolo." 
Exodus34:20 Matthaara ootheene a abuuru yoopoliwe ni eputtiputthi, mene mwaahitthuna woopola, vano mwintake exiko. Moopoleletho matthaara ootheene a anamwaniinyu. Ahikhale anaaphiye ohoolowaka matataru." 
Exodus34:21 Mahuku mathannamosa mvareke mitekosanyu, mene nihuku nanaathannameeli mwiitthuuweke, hata ekhalaka ehuhu ya olima naari ohepha, ontthuneya wiitthuuwa nihuku nno." 
Exodus34:22 Muupuwelele efesta ya isimana ni soohepha soopacera sa etrigu ni efesta ya ohepha ommaleloni wa eyaakha. 
Exodus34:23 Imaara tthaaru sa khula eyaakha asilopwana ootheene yiixoonihereke ohoolo wa Adonai Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli." 
Exodus34:24 Miyo kinimoomola miloko ohoolowanyu ni kinimunnuwiha elapwaanyu. Nyuwo mwaawelaka imaara tthaaru sa khula eyaakha weera mwiixoonihere wa Yave Mulukwaanyu, khaawo aneera iinlele elapwaanyu." 
Exodus34:25 Muhikiveleelele ephome ya sooveleela vamoha ni yakhalaru etthu yootakansiwa eferementu ni muhixeeleleru sakhalaru sa sooveleela sa efesta ya mPaska* mpaka waaxiiye. 
Exodus34:26 Muruuhele Empa ya Yave Mulukwaanyu mpatta woopacera wooreerelaxa wa soohephasanyu. Muhimwaapeye mwaaxaana a epuri mmukakani wa amayawe.” 
Exodus34:27 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mulepe masu ala, niwoko ni yaala kimpaka wiiraana ni nyuwo ni aYixrayeli ootheene.”" 
Exodus34:28 Moisesi aakhala vaavaale vamoha ni Yave othana miloko mixexe ni ohiyu miloko mixexe ahicaka yooca naari ahiwuraka maahi. Aalepa vamatthaabwani masu a Wiiraana – Malamulo Muloko. 
Exodus34:29 Akhuruwaka Moisesi vamwaako akunxeene itthaabwa piili sa Namoona, khaasuwela weera ekhovaawe yaamwaara woowuuluma ni Yave." 
Exodus34:30 Aharoni ni aYixrayeli ootheene emoonakaru Moisesi ni ekhove yoowaara, yaahoova omwaattamela." 
Exodus34:31 Wa soothesene, Moisesi aawiitthana ni Aharoni vamoha ni ahooleli ootheene a muloko yaarowasa, ni Moisesi aahuuluma ni yaawosa." 
Exodus34:32 Vahoolowaya aYixrayeli ootheene yaamwaattamela ni aahaavaha malamulo ootheene Yave aamvanghaawe vamwaako Sinayi. 
Exodus34:33 Amalihakaru wuuluma ni yaawo, Moisesi aakhuneela ekhovaawe ni ekuwo." 
Exodus34:34 Imaara sootheenetho aavolowaawe atthunaka wuuluma ni Yave, aamwiikhunula ekuwo mpaka okhumawawe. Imaara sootheene aakhumaawe aaleelaka aYixrayeli yeeyo aalamulelingwaawe," 
Exodus34:35 yannoona weera ekhovaawe yannaaraxa. Vano annakhuneela ekhovaawe ni ekuwo mpaka ovolowatho weera uulume ni Yave. 
Exodus35:1 Moisesi aathukumanyiha muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli, aneerela: “Itthu Yave oolamulenlaaweni opaka ti iya:" 
Exodus35:2 Ontthuniheriwa ovara muteko wa mahuku mathannamosa, mene nihuku nanaathannameeli nikhaleke nihuku nootteelananyu, eSaabadu ya wiitthuuwa wa Yave. Akhalaru mutthu aneera avare muteko nihuku nno, vekhaikhai iiviweke." 
Exodus35:3 Hata muhiiseeleru mooro mmavaatenimwanyu nihuku na eSaabadu.” 
Exodus35:4 Moisesi aaheerela muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli: “Yave olamulenle ha: 
Exodus35:5 ‘Mumveleelele Yave sa sooreelasanyu. Ootheene yaale eniikhaleno murima woolikaneene eruuhe yoomvaha Yave sooveleela sa eyuuma yoorikaxa, eparatha*” ni ebronze*;" 
Exodus35:6 ikuwo sooxeera, sa kanka ni sookankela, ikuwo sootteettheya, mapururu a ipuri;" 
Exodus35:7 ixapala sa amaankhoro sooningiwa moota wooxeera, ixapala soohukhiwa;" 
Exodus35:8 makhura a sooliveira* oomwaleelela, itthu sooreerela sintakansiwano makhura oottikitthelano ni erubani* yoowunkhelaxa;" 
Exodus35:9 ni onikisi* ni maluku makina oowaaraxa weera ettottheleliwe vamooxikoottini a esaserdoti ni ya vakakasani. 
Exodus35:10 Ootheene ooweraxa variyariwanyu eweeke ni epakeke sootheene Yave olamulenlaawe: 
Exodus35:11 Etabernaakulu* ni Eheemaaya ni yookhuneeleliwaaya, ivarelelosaya, acikhaaya, mikoombasaya, amarimbwaaya ni nyettosaya;" 
Exodus35:12 Arka* ni ikoposaya, yookhuneelano ya Wiiraana ni eluttu enkuttelela;" 
Exodus35:13 meesa ni ikoposaya ni ikarumasaya sootheene, ni epaawu ya Okhala*;" 
Exodus35:14 onyaari woomwaleelano ni ikarumasaya, mithuko ni makhura oomwaleelano;" 
Exodus35:15 altaari* a erubani* ni ikoposaya, makhura oottikitthelano ni erubani* yoowunkhelaxa; eluttu yookuttelelano mulako wa etabernaakulu;" 
Exodus35:16 altaari* a sooveleela soohisa ni nivalinaya na ebronze*, ikoposaya ni ikarumasaya sootheene; ebasiya ya ebronze* ni mweettwaaya;" 
Exodus35:17 iluttu sa omokoni wa nipuwa ni amarimbwaaya ni nyettosaya ni eluttu ya vamulako wa nipuwa; 
Exodus35:18 mikuro sa etabernaakulu* ni sa nipuwa ni mikhoyisaya; 
Exodus35:19 soowara simvareliwa muteko aarumeelaka vaNipuroni Nootteela* – soowara sootteela sa musaserdoti* Aharoni ni sa anamwanaawe asilopwana awo yaarumeelaka ntoko asaserdoti*.” 
Exodus35:20 Vahoolowaya muthukumano wootheene wa aYixrayeli waavenya aaraawewo Moisesi. 
Exodus35:21 Ootheene yaari oolikaneene, enyesereriheliwaka ni mirimasaya, yaamuruuhela Yave sooveleela sa muteko wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*, wa mitekosaya sootheene ni wa soowara sootteela." 
Exodus35:22 Ootheene yiivaherenre, okhuma alopwana mpaka athiyana, yaaruuhela iyuuma soorikaxa soohiyanahiyana ntoko iyuuma sa laamba, axiveeve, annela ni ipangiiri. Ootheene yaale yaahoonihera iyuumasaya soorikaxa ntoko sooveleela soowiinainihiwa wa Yave." 
Exodus35:23 Ootheene yaarino ikuwo sooxeera, sa kanka ni sookakela, ikuwo sootteettheya, mapururu a ipuri; ixapala sa amaankhoro sooningiwa yooxeera hoye hoye ixapala soohukhiwa, yaaruuha." 
Exodus35:24 Yaawo yoonihenre sooveleela sa eparatha* hoye hoye ebronze* yaaruuha ntoko sooveleela wa Yave ni ootheene yaarino itthaabwa sa mwiri wa akaasiya* weera sivareliwe wakhalaru muteko yaaruuhatho. 
Exodus35:25 Asithiyana ootheene yaawera, yaatthava ni matataawe, enaruuha yeeyo yaatthamvaaya – ikuwo sooxeera, sa kanka ni sookankela ni nliinya nootteettheya." 
Exodus35:26 Asithiyana ootheene yaatthuna ni yaawera yaatthava mapururu a ipuri. 
Exodus35:27 Ahooleli yaaruuha onikisi* ni maluku makina oowaaraxa weera ettottheleliwe vamooxikoottini a esaserdoti ni ya vakakasani," 
Exodus35:28 itthu sooreerela ni makhura a sooliveira* oomwaleelano, makhura oottikitthelano ni a erubani* yoowunkhelaxa." 
Exodus35:29 aYixrayeli asilopwana ni asithiyana ootheene yaatthuna yaamuruuhela Yave sooveleela ni otthunawaya wa miteko sootheene Yave aalamulenlaawe opaka mwa Moisesi. 
Exodus35:30 Vano Moisesi aaweerela aYixrayeli: “Moone, Yave oomuthanla Bezaleli, mwaana a Uri, mwaana a Huri a epuumba ya Yuda," 
Exodus35:31 anamusariha Munepa wa Muluku amvahaka miruku, wiiwexexa, osuwela ni akhili a miteko." 
Exodus35:32 Aamvaha akhili awo weera acaambule akwaniheraka iyo avarelaka muteko eyuuma yoorikaxa, eparatha* ni ebronze*," 
Exodus35:33 ni weera aattule maluku attotthelaka, nitho weera avarele muteko itthaabwa wa sakhalaru miteko sa ettottho." 
Exodus35:34 Aamvahatho yoowo vamoha ni Oholiyabi, mwaana a Ahisamaki a epuumba ya Dani, moota woowaaxuttiha akina." 
Exodus35:35 Aahaasariha ootheenaawo owera miteko soohiyanahiyana ntoko anamaratta, anamasomela miteko, anamaxora a nliinya nootteettheya ni ikuwo sa kanka, sookankela ni sooxeera ni ntoko anamatthava. Awo yaangwerasa osomela ni opaka wakhalaru muteko wa oratti." 
Exodus36:1 Bezaleli ni Oholiyabi ni asilopwana ootheene oowera, mwa yaawo Yave aavanghaawe oowera ni akhili okwanihera miteko sootheene sa oteka wa Nipuro Nootteela*, evareke muteko ntoko Yave aalamulenlaawe.”" 
Exodus36:2 Vano Moisesi aamwiitthana Bezaleli ni Oholiyabi ni asilopwana ootheene oowera, mwa yaawo Yave aaweringhaawe ni yaari oolikaneene orwa ovara muteko." 
Exodus36:3 Yaahaakhela wa Moisesi sooveleela sootheene aYixrayeli yaaruuhalaaya weera sitekeliweno Nipuro Nootteela*. Khula ooxeexelo atthu yannapwaherera oruuha sooveleela ni otthunawaya. 
Exodus36:4 Tivawo aratti ootheene yaavara muteko vaNipuroni Nootteela* yooceelinghaaya mitekosaya," 
Exodus36:5 enamweerela Moisesi: “Atthu anniruuha vanceene opwaha onkwanelaaya weera nivarele muteko Yave olamulenlaawe.” 
Exodus36:6 Vano Moisesi aahaalamulela weera wahimmwe okonelingwe mutthenga ola: ‘Ahikhaleru mulopwana naari muthiyana aneera apaketho sooveleela sikina wa Nipuro Nootteela*.’ Hiiho atthu yaahiihiwa oruuhatho," 
Exodus36:7 niwoko yeeyo yaaruuhiwe yaahaattaxa mpaka okwanela muteko wootheene. 
Exodus36:8 Asilopwana ootheene yaawera variyari wa anamiteko yaateka etabernaakulu* ni iluttu muloko sa mpuwa sa nliinya nootteettheya sitthaviweene ni ikuwo sa kanka, sookankela ni sooxeera, ni akerubini* exoreliweenemo." 
Exodus36:9 Iluttu sootheene sa mpuwa saamulikanela: imeetru* muloko ni piili ni eriyari ya emeetru*, vamoha ni emeetru* emoha ni wookwanaka imeetru* piili." 
Exodus36:10 Yaaluttanya iluttu ithanu ekina ni ekhwaaya ni yaapaka hiiho ni ithanu sikina iye. 
Exodus36:11 Vahoolowaya yaattotthelela miramba sa ikuwo sa kanka mukhwipi wa eluttu yookisera ya ithanu soopacera ni hiihotho eluttu yookisera sa ithanu sikina. 
Exodus36:12 Yaattotthela miramba miloko mithanu muluttuni yookisera ya ithanu soopacera, nitho miramba miloko mithanu muluttuni yookisera ya ithanu sikina moota wooweera miramba siwehaneke." 
Exodus36:13 Yaapaka ivarelelo miloko mithanu sa eyuuma yoorikaxa evarelaka muteko iye wootthukelelano iluttu ekina ni ekhwaaya weera etabernaakulu* ekhaleke emohamoharu. 
Exodus36:14 Yaahoopopanya iluttu muloko niimoha sa mapururu a ipuri enapakasa eheema yookhuneelano etabernaakulu*. 
Exodus36:15 Iluttu muloko niimoha saamulikanela: imeetru* muloko ni tthaaru ni eriyari ya emeetru*, vamoha ni emeetru* emoha ni wookwanaka imeetru* piili." 
Exodus36:16 Yaaluttanya mpatta mmoha iluttu ithanu nitho ithannamosa sikina mpatta mukina. 
Exodus36:17 Vahoolowaya yaattotthelela miramba miloko mithanu mukhwipi waaxoriwe wa eluttu yookisera ya ithanu soopacera ni miramba miloko mithanu mukhwipi waaxoriwe wa yookisera ya ithannamosa sikina. 
Exodus36:18 Yaapaka ivarelelo miloko mithanu sa ebronze* weera ekumanyihe eheema ekhalihaka emohamoharu. 
Exodus36:19 Yaapakelatho eheema yookhuneelano ya ixapala sa amaankhoro sooningiwa yooxeera, ni vasuluwaya ixapala soohukhiwa." 
Exodus36:20 Yaapakela etabernaakulu* acikhi a mwiri wa akaasiya*. 
Exodus36:21 Khula cikhi aakhalano miringo iya: imeetru* ixexe ni eriyari ya emeetru*, vamoha ni wookwanaka emeetru* emoha," 
Exodus36:22 alubaanyihiwaka veeli weera akumane ni mukhwaawe. Ti hiiho yaapankaaya acikhi ootheene a etabernaakulu*. 
Exodus36:23 Yaahaapaka acikhi miloko miili mpatta wa ohitto wa etabernaakulu* 
Exodus36:24 ni vathiwaya nyettosaya miloko mixexe sa eparatha* – nyetto miili wa khula cikhi; mmoha vathi wa khula makumano. 
Exodus36:25 Vano, wa mpatta mukina ori ottuttuwani wa etabernaakulu*, yaahaapaka acikhi miloko miili," 
Exodus36:26 ni vathiwaya nyettosaya miloko mixexe sa eparatha* – nyetto miili wa khula cikhi. 
Exodus36:27 Yaahaapakatho acikhi athannamosa opithela wa etabernaakulu*, eyo tiiyo mpatta ninkela nsuwa," 
Exodus36:28 ni acikhi eeli yaahiikaathiwa opithela mmaloothoni a etabernaakulu*. 
Exodus36:29 Acikhi a mmaloothoni meeli awo yaaphitaanyiwa okhuma vathi mpaka osulu, etthukiweene ni munela mmoha. Ooweeli yaapakiwa moota mmoha." 
Exodus36:30 Vano yaakhala acikhi athannaararu ni nyetto muloko ni mithannamosa sa eparatha*; miili vathi wa khula cikhi. 
Exodus36:31 Yaapakatho mikoomba mithanu sa mwiri wa akaasiya* wa acikhi a mpatta mmoha wa etabernaakulu*," 
Exodus36:32 mithanu wa acikhi a mpatta mukina, nitho mithanu wa yaawo a mpatta ninkela nsuwa, opithela wa etabernaakulu*." 
Exodus36:33 Yaapaka mukoomba wa eriyari weera okhume okhwipi mpaka okhwipi variyari wa acikhi. 
Exodus36:34 Yaahaahuruwela acikhi ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera ni yaahaapaka annela a eyuumeene yeeyo oolipiherano mikoomba. Vano mikoomba iyo saahuruweliwatho ni eyuumeene yeeyo. 
Exodus36:35 Yaapaka eluttu ya nliinya nootteettheya etthaveliweene ni ikuwo sa kanka, sookankela ni sooxeera. Vano akerubini* yaaxoriwamo ni anamaxora ooweraxa." 
Exodus36:36 Yaapakela amarimbu axexe a mwiri wa akaasiya*, enaahuruwela ni eyuuma yoorikaxa. Yaapakelatho ivarelelo sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni yaatotoxera mikoomba sa eparatha*." 
Exodus36:37 Vano yaapakela eluttu wa mulako wa eheema ya nliinya nootteettheya yootthaveliwa ni ikuwo sa kanka, sookankela ni sooxeera, yoopakiwa ni namaxora." 
Exodus36:38 Yaapakela eluttu ivarelelo ithanu ni amarimbu athanu a mwiri wa akaasiya*, enahuruwela ni eyuuma yoorikaxa. Yaahanelatho nyettosaya mithanu sa ebronze*." 
Exodus37:1 Bezaleli aahaapaka Arka* a mwiri wa akaasiya* ni miringo iya: emeetru* emoha ni vakhaani, vamoha ni eriyari ya emeetru* emoha, vamoha ni eriyari ya emeetru* emoha." 
Exodus37:2 Aahaahuruwela mpuwa ni omokoni ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera alepelelaka mukhwipimwaya ni eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
Exodus37:3 Aahaapaka annela axexe a eyuuma yoorikaxa aatthukelelaka mmaloothoni oomaxexe; annela eeli wa khula mpatta. 
Exodus37:4 Vahoolowaya aapaka ikopo sa mwiri wa akaasiya*, anahuruwela ni eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Exodus37:5 Vano aavolonghera mwa annelani mpararini mwa Arka* weera eteexiwekeno. 
Exodus37:6 Aapaka yookhuneelano ya eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera ni miringo iya: emeetru* emoha ni vakhaani, vamoha ni eriyari ya emeetru* emoha." 
Exodus37:7 Vahoolowaya aahaapaka akerubini* eeli a eyuuma yoorikaxa oohaniwa, enakhomeleliwa mukhwipimwaya yookhuneelano." 
Exodus37:8 Aampakatho kerubini* mmoha mukerekhere wa mpatta mmoha ni anaaveeli mpatta mukina; ooweeli awo ekhalaka emohamoharu ni yookhuneelano. 
Exodus37:9 Akerubini* yaakhalano mapuphaaya ookungeela ohoolo ekhuneelakano yookhuneelano. Awo yaakhalelana ohoolo ewehaka yookhuneelano. 
Exodus37:10 Aapaka meesa a mwiri wa akaasiya* ni miringo iya: wookwanaka emeetru* emoha, vamoha ni eriyari ya emeetru* emoha, vamoha ni eriyari ya emeetru* emoha." 
Exodus37:11 Aahuruwela ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera alepelelaka mukhwipimwaya ni eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
Exodus37:12 Aaxoratho mukhwipimwaya, mwiittaaya waari isentimeetru* ithannatthaaru, analepelela ni icaambulo sa eyuuma yoorikaxa mukhwipimwaya." 
Exodus37:13 Aahanela mesa annela axexe a eyuuma yoorikaxa atthukelelaka mmaloothonimwaya oomaxexe simvolowaayamo nyettosaya mixexe. 
Exodus37:14 Vano annela yaatthukeleliwa mukerekhere mooxoriwa weera sivolongheriwe ikopo sooteexerano meesa. 
Exodus37:15 Vano ikopo sooteexerano meesa saapakiwe ni mwiri wa akaasiya* sihuruweliwaka eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
Exodus37:16 Aapaka ikaruma sa meesa a eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreeraxa: Isasaanisaya nitho ikhope, ibasiya ni ikoomixi simvareliwa muteko woovuuvihera sooveleela soowura." 
Exodus37:17 Aapaka onyaari wa eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera woohaniwa. Nnaawonaya, mwettwaaya, ikoomixisaya, soottuvasaya ni ithutusaya sootheene saakhala etthu emohamoharu paahi." 
Exodus37:18 Iphandi ithannamosa saakhuma woonyaarini – khula mpatta wa mwettwaaya tthaaru tthaaru. 
Exodus37:19 Saakhala ithutu tthaaru sa emandoweira* sikhalanaka soottuvasaya ni makukhwaaya a ephandi emoha – ni hiihotho wa iphandi sootheene sikina sikhumme woonyaarini. 
Exodus37:20 Vamwettoniwaya waakhalano ithutu ixexe sa emandoweira* sikhalanaka soottuvasaya ni makukhwaaya. 
Exodus37:21 Ethutu yoopacera ya mwetto yaakhala vathi wa iphandi piili soopacera sinkhuma woonyaarini; yanaaveeli vathi wa piili sinttharelana ni yanaararu vathi wa piili soomalihera – opwexerera saari ithannamosa. 
Exodus37:22 Iphandi ni ithutusaya saakhala etthu emohamoharu ni onyaari, sootheene soopakiwa ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera ni soohaniwa." 
Exodus37:23 Vahoolowaya aapakelatho soomwaleela ithannapiili vamoha ni soorehererano mutthambo ni soocipiherasaya sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera. 
Exodus37:24 Aapaka onyaari ni ikarumasaya sootheene avarelaka muteko ikiilu* miloko miraru niithanu sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera. 
Exodus37:25 Aahaapaka altaari* a erubani* a mwiri wa akaasiya*. Yaari oolikanela ni miringo iya: eriyari ya emeetru* emoha, vamoha ni eriyari ya emeetru* emoha, vamoha ni wookwanaka emeetru* emoha. Manyakaaya yaari etthu emohamoharu ni altaari*." 
Exodus37:26 Aahuruwela mpatta wa osulu, mipatta sikina sootheene, nitho manyaka ni eyuuma yoorikaxa alepelelaka mukhwipimwaya ni eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Exodus37:27 Aahaapakela altaari* annela eeli a eyuuma yoorikaxa wa khula mpatta vathi wa ehuruwelelo weera sivolongheriwe ikopo sooteexerano. 
Exodus37:28 Aapaka ikopo ni mwiri wa akaasiya*, anahuruwela ni eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Exodus37:29 Aaheekatho makhura ootteela oottikitthelano ni erubani* yoowunkhelaxa yooreera – oopakiwa ni namweeka. 
Exodus38:1 Aahaateka altaari* a sooveleela soohisa a mwiri wa akaasiya* ni miringo iya: imeetru* piili ni vakhaani, vamoha ni imeetru* piilitho ni vakhaani, vamoha ni emeetru* emoha ni vakhaani." 
Exodus38:2 Aahaapakela manyaka mmaloothoni oomaxexe ekhalaka awo etthu emohamoharu ni altaari*, mwa yaawo aahuruwenlaawe ni ebronze*." 
Exodus38:3 Aapakatho ikarumasaya sootheene sa ebronze*: Mookhupelamo ettuura, apoxoro, ibasiya soovuuvihera, igarfu* sa enama ni yootholelano makhala." 
Exodus38:4 Aahaapakelatho nivali na ebronze* antoko ntthavi waathi wa altaari*, eriyari ya orakamela wa altaari*." 
Exodus38:5 Aahaahana annela axexe a ebronze* woovolongheramo ikopo, mmoha wa khula nlootho na nivali." 
Exodus38:6 Aapaka ikopo ni mwiri wa akaasiya*, anahuruwela ni ebronze*." 
Exodus38:7 Ikoposene seiye saavolongheriwa mwaannelani mwa mipatta miili sa altaari*, weera eteexeriweke. Aahaapaka altaari* a nikhuku epakiweene ni itthaabwa." 
Exodus38:8 Aapaka ebasiya ya ebronze* ni mweettwaaya wa iloola sa asithiyana yaarumeela vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. 
Exodus38:9 Vahoolowaya aapakela etabernaakulu* nipuwa. Vano mpatta wa ohitto naakhalano imeetru* miloko mixexe niithannamosa mweerakameloni ni iluttu sa nliinya nootteettheya nootthaviwa," 
Exodus38:10 ni amarimbu miloko miili vamoha ni nyettosaya miloko miili sa ebronze* nitho ivarelelo ni makumano a eparatha* mwaamarimbuni. 
Exodus38:11 Mpatta wa ottuttuwanitho yaakhalano imeetru* miloko mixexe niithannamosa mweerakameloni okhalanaka amarimbu miloko miili, nyetto miloko miili sa ebronze*, ivarelelo ni makumano a eparatha* mwaamarimbuni." 
Exodus38:12 Mpatta wa ninkela nsuwa waakhalano imeetru* miloko miili ni piili ni eriyari ya emeetru* mweekhuveeloni okhalanaka iluttu, amarimbu muloko ni nyettosaya muloko, ivarelelo ni makumano a eparatha* mwaamarimbuni." 
Exodus38:13 Mpatta wa ninkhuma nsuwa waakhalanotho imeetru* miloko miili ni piili ni eriyari ya emeetru* mweekhuveeloni. 
Exodus38:14 Vano saakhala iluttu sa omokoni sa imeetru* ithannamosa ni eriyari ya emeetru* mweerakameloni wa mpatta mmoha wa mulako vamoha ni amarimbu araru ni nyettosaya miraru," 
Exodus38:15 ni iluttu sa omokoni sa imeetru* ithannamosa ni eriyari ya emeetru* mweerakameloni wa mpatta mukina wa mulako wa nipuwa vamoha ni amarimbu araru ni nyettosaya miraru. 
Exodus38:16 Iluttu sootheene saarukureenre nipuwa saapakiwe ni nliinya nootteettheya nootthaviwa. 
Exodus38:17 Nyetto sa amarimbu saari sa ebronze*. Ivarelelo ni makumano mwaamarimbuni saari sa eparatha* ni vasulu amarimbutho yaahuruweliwe ni eparatha*. Vano amarimbu ootheene a nipuwa yaakumanyihiwe ni eparatha*. 
Exodus38:18 Eluttu ya mulako wa nipuwa yaakala ya nliinya nootteettheya yootthaviwa ni ikuwo sa kanka, sookankela ni sooxeera. Yaapakiwa ni namaxora ekhalanaka imeetru* ithanniixexe mweerakameloni ni, ntoko iluttu sa nipuwa, imeetru* ithanu mweerakamelonimwaya." 
Exodus38:19 Yaakhalanotho amarimbu axexe ni nyettosaya mixexe sa ebronze*. Ivarelelosaya ni makumano saapakiwe ni eparatha* ni vasulu wa amarimbu yaahuruweliwe ni eparatha*. 
Exodus38:20 Mikuro sootheene sa Eheema ya Etabernaakulu* ni sa nipuwa naarukureenre saari sa ebronze*. 
Exodus38:21 Itthu iya saavareliwa muteko oteka etabernaakulu*, aani etabernaakulu* ya Wiiraana. Moisesi aahaalamula aLeevi weera elepe itthu iya, yaahooleliwa ni Ithamari, mwaana mulopwana a musaserdoti* Aharoni." 
Exodus38:22 Bezaleli, mwaana a Uri, mwaana a Huri, a epuumba ya Yuda, aapaka sootheene Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Exodus38:23 Oholiyabi, mwaana a Ahisamaki, a epuumba ya Dani, namaratta, namasomela mmutekoni, nitho namaxora a nliinya na ekuwo yootteettheya ya kanka, yookankela, ni yooxeera, aamukhavihera Bezaleli." 
Exodus38:24 Eyuuma yoorikaxa yootheene yaavahiwa ni sooveleela soowiinainihiwa ni yaavareliwa muteko weera Nipuro Nootteela* nitekiwe yaalemela ikiilu* macira muloko, ettharaka olemela wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*." 
Exodus38:25 Eparatha* yaakheliwe wa yaawo yaalikeliwe variyari wa aYixrayeli yaalemela ikiilu* macira miloko miraru ni macira maxexe, ettharaka olemela wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*." 
Exodus38:26 Entaphulela weera khula mutthu aalepelingwe okhuma iyaakha miloko miili mpaka ohoolo aavaha ebeka* emoha (enoolikana exekeli* eriyari), ettharaka olemela wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*. Vano waatta wa yaawo yaavanghe waapwexerera yaari atthu 603 550." 
Exodus38:27 Vano italentu* ncira sa eparatha* saavareliwa muteko weera nyetto sa acikhi a Nipuro Nootteela* ni iluttu sihaneliwe. Saakhala nyetto ncira, eyo tiiyo etalentu* emoha wa khula mwetto." 
Exodus38:28 Yaavarela muteko ikiilu* miloko miili weera epake ivarelelo sa amarimbu, weera ehuruwele mpatta wa osulu wa amarimbu ni weera epake makumanowaaya." 
Exodus38:29 Olemela wa ebronze* yaakheliwe ntoko sooveleela soowiinainihiwa waari ikiilu* macira miloko miili ni macira maxexe. 
Exodus38:30 Yaavarela muteko ebronze* ele weera epake nyetto sa mulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*, altaari* a ebronze* vamoha ni nivalinaya ni ikarumasaya sootheene." 
Exodus38:31 Yaavarela mutekotho wa nyetto sa nipuwa naarukureenre, mulakwaaya ni mikuro sootheene sa etabernaakulu* ni sa nipuwa naarukureenre." 
Exodus39:1 Yaattottha soowara sootthaviwa ni ikuwo sa kanka, sookankela, ni sooxeera weera asaserdoti* erumeeleke vaNipuroni Nootteela*. Yaamuttotthelatho Aharoni soowara sootteela, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Exodus39:2 Yaamuttottha mooxikootti ootteettheya, ootthaviwa ni nliinya na ekuwo ya ncano, ya kanka, yookankela ni yooxeera." 
Exodus39:3 Yaahana ezazaalihaka eyuuma yoorikaxa, enaleka awaayeene weera exoreliwekeno ikuwo sa nliinya nootteettheya na kanka, nookankela ni nooxeera – muteko wooreerela wa namaratta." 
Exodus39:4 Yaampakela mooxikootti miramba sa mmakhatani sitthukiweene okhwipi wa mipattasaya soomiili weera sitthukeliwekeno. 
Exodus39:5 Laamba aatthukeliwa ni mooxikootti yaari ekuwo emohamoharu. Laambatho aapakiwe ni nliinya nootteettheya nootthaviwa ni maliinya a ncano, a kanka, ookankela ni ooxeera, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Exodus39:6 Yaattotthelela maluku a onikisi* mukaaxani ekhaanene ya eyuuma yoorikaxa, enalepamo masina a anamwane asilopwana a Yixrayeli, ntoko namalepa onlepaawe munnelani woottittelano." 
Exodus39:7 Vahoolowaya yaattotthelela mmakhatani a mooxikootti ntoko maluku oowuupuwelelano anamwane asilopwana a Yixrayeli, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Exodus39:8 Yaapaka yoowara ya vakakasani, muteko wa namaratta. Yaapaka ntoko mooxikootti: Nliinya nootteettheya nootthaviwa na maliinya a ncano, a kanka, ookankela ni ooxeera." 
Exodus39:9 Yaari yoolikanela ni miringo iya: isentimeetru* miloko miili ni piili, vamoha ni isentimeetru* miloko miili ni piilitho ni yoopindiwa veeli." 
Exodus39:10 Vahoolowaya yaatthukelelamo misera mixexe sa maluku oowaaraxa. Mmuserani woopacera aakhala rubi*, topaziyo* ni berilo*." 
Exodus39:11 Mmuserani wanaaveeli yaspe*, safira* ni esmeralda*;" 
Exodus39:12 mmuserani wanaararu yasinto*, agata* ni ametista*" 
Exodus39:13 ni mmuserani wanaaxexe krisolito*, onikisi* ni yaspe*. Ootheene yaatthukeleliwe vakaaxani sikhaanene sa eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Exodus39:14 Yaakhala maluku muloko ni meeli – nimoha wa khula nsina na anamwane asilopwana a Yixrayeli; khula nluku noolempwa ntoko onlempwaaya munnelani woottittelano, nikhalanaka nsina nimoha na khula epuumba." 
Exodus39:15 Yaapakela yoowara ya vakakasani onyooro wootthaveliwa ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera, ntoko mikhoyi." 
Exodus39:16 Vano yaapaka ikaaxa piili sikhaanene sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni annela eeli a eyuuma yoorikaxa, mwa yaawo yaatthukelenlaaya mmaloothoni meeli a yoowara ya vakakasani." 
Exodus39:17 Yaatthukelela onyooro miili wa eyuuma yoorikaxa mwaannelani eeli a mmaloothoni a yoowara ya vakakasani. 
Exodus39:18 Vano mipatta sikina sa onyooro saatthukeleliwa ni ikaaxa sikhaanene piili etthukelelaka hiiho sootheene mmakhatani mpatta wa ohoolo wa mooxikootti. 
Exodus39:19 Yaahaapaka annela eeli akina a eyuuma yoorikaxa, enaatthukelela mmaloothoni meeli makina a yoowara ya vakakasani mpuwa waaxoriwe, vakhiviru wa mooxikootti." 
Exodus39:20 Vahoolowaya yaahaapakatho annela eeli akina a eyuuma yoorikaxa, enaatthukelela vathi wa sa mmakhatani, ohoolo wa mooxikootti, vakhiviru wa nttottho, ciireru vasulu laamba a mooxikootti." 
Exodus39:21 Yaahaatthukelela annela a yoowara ya vakakasani ni yaawo a mooxikootti ni muramba wa kanka okumanyihiweene ni laamba weera yoowara ya vakakasani ehiinaine vamooxikoottini. Yaapaka ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi. 
Exodus39:22 Yaattottha evestidu ya mooxikootti yootheene eyo ya nliinya na kanka, muteko wa namatthava." 
Exodus39:23 Yaakhalano nlaka eriyari, ni mukhwipimwaya nlaka nno waapindeliwa ntoko ekolariinya weera ehaahuwe." 
Exodus39:24 Yaattotthela irooma* sa nliinya nootteettheya nootthaviwa ni ekuwo ya kanka, yookankela ni yooxeera mooxoriwa wa evestidu." 
Exodus39:25 Yaapakela ingilingili ikhaanene sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera etthukelelaka mwaaxoriwe evaxaka ni irooma*. 
Exodus39:26 Ingilingili ni irooma* saavaxana mooxoriwa moothemwene wa evestidu, sootheene saapakeliwe weera siwareliweke woorumeela, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Exodus39:27 Yaamuttotthela Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana mikaandyo sa nliinya nootteettheya, soopakiwa ni namatthava." 
Exodus39:28 Yaapakatho icireemba, sootthukano mmuru ni akaputtula a mpuwa ootthaviwa ni nliinya nootteettheya." 
Exodus39:29 Laambatho aari a nliinya nootteettheya nootthaviwa ni ekuwo ya kanka, yookankela ni yooxeera, oopakiwa ni namaxora, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Exodus39:30 Yaapaka ediyadema* ya eyuuma yoorikaxa, enalepamo ntoko namalepa onlepaawe munnelani woottittelano. Yaalepa ha: YOOTTEELIHERIWA YAVE.”" 
Exodus39:31 Vahoolowaya yaatthukela yeeyo ni muramba wa kanka mpatta wa osulu wa ecireemba, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Exodus39:32 Hiiho miteko sootheene sa etabernaakulu*, Eheema ya Muthukumano*, saamalihiwa. aYixrayeli yaapaka sootheene ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Exodus39:33 Vahoolowaya yaamuruuhela Moisesi etabernaakulu: Eheema ni ikarumasaya sootheene, ivarelelosaya, acikhaaya, mikoombasaya, amarimbwaaya ni nyettosaya," 
Exodus39:34 yookhuneelano ya ixapala sa amaankhoro sooningiwa yooxeera, ni yookhuneelano ya ixapala soohukhiwa, eluttu yookuttelelano," 
Exodus39:35 Arka* a Wiiraana ni ikoposaya, yookhuneelano," 
Exodus39:36 meesa ni ikarumasaya sootheene, epaawu ya Okhala*," 
Exodus39:37 onyaari wa eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera ni misera sa soomwaleela vamoha ni ikarumasaya sootheene nitho makhura oomwaleelela," 
Exodus39:38 altaari* a eyuuma yoorikaxa, makhura oottikitthelano, erubani* yoowunkhelaxa, eluttu ya mulako wa eheema," 
Exodus39:39 altaari* a ebronze* ni nivalinaya, ikoposaya ni ikarumasaya sootheene, ebasiya ni mweettwaaya," 
Exodus39:40 iluttu sa nipuwa ni amarimbwaaya ni nyettosaya, eluttu ya mulako wa nipuwa, mikhoyi ni mikuro sa eheema ya nipuwa, ikaruma sootheene sa etabernaakulu*, Eheema ya Muthukumano*," 
Exodus39:41 soowara soorumeelano vaNipuroni Nootteela* – soowara sootteela sa Aharoni, musaserdoti* mpaka sa anamwanaawe asilopwana yaarumeelaka ntoko asaserdoti*." 
Exodus39:42 aYixrayeli yaapaka miteko sootheene ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi. 
Exodus39:43 Moisesi woowoona muteko, aahaattapahera weera soopakeya sootheene ntoko Yave aalamulenlaawe. Vano Moisesi aahaareeliha." 
Exodus40:1 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Exodus40:2 “Mweemexe etabernaakulu*, Eheema ya Muthukumano*, vanihukuni noopacera na mweeri woopacera." 
Exodus40:3 Ngwiikaathimo Arka* a Namoona ni mwaakuttelele ni elutto. 
Exodus40:4 Muruuhe meesa ni mwiikaathiwo sa vaavaawo. Vahoolowaya muruuheke onyaari ni mpattihe soomwaleelasaya. 
Exodus40:5 Ngwiikaathi altaari* a eyuuma yoorikaxa a erubani* ohoolo wa Arka* a Namoona ni mutthukelele eluttu vamulako wa etabernaakulu*. 
Exodus40:6 Ngwiikaathi altaari* a sooveleela soohisa ohoolo wa mulako wa etabernaakulu*, Eheema ya Muthukumano*." 
Exodus40:7 Mwiikaathi ebasiya eriyari ya Eheema ya Muthukumano* ni altaari* ni musarihemo maahi. 
Exodus40:8 Mweemexere nipuwa ninrukureera Eheema ya Muthukumano* ntoko ekintaali ni mutthukelele eluttu vamulako wa nipuwa. 
Exodus40:9 Mukuxe makhura oottikitthelano ni muttikitthele etabernaakulu* ni sootheene sirimo, mutteelihe eyo ni ikarumasaya sootheene ni vano eniitteelihiwe." 
Exodus40:10 Vahoolowaya mwaattikitthele altaari* a sooveleela soohisa ni ikarumasaya sootheene; mwaatteelihe altaari* ni awo eniitteelaxe. 
Exodus40:11 Muttikittheletho ebasiya ni mwettwaaya ni mutteelihe. 
Exodus40:12 Munruuhele Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano* ni mwaalamulele wiivulula. 
Exodus40:13 Vahoolowaya mungwarihe Aharoni soowara sootteela; munttikitthele ni muntteelihe weera akirumeele ntoko musaserdoti*. 
Exodus40:14 Mwaaruuheke anamwanaawe asilopwana ni mwaawarihe mikaandyo. 
Exodus40:15 Mwaattikitthele ntoko mwaattikitthenlaanyu atithaya weera ekirumeele ntoko asaserdoti*. Ottikittheliwawaya onookhaliha osaserdoti* woohimala wa ikhapira sootheene sinrwa.” 
Exodus40:16 Moisesi aapaka sootheene ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe. 
Exodus40:17 Hiiho etabernaakulu* yaaheemexiwa vanihukuni noopacera na mweeri woopacera wa eyaakha yanaaveeli. 
Exodus40:18 Eemexaka Moisesi etabernaakulu*, aahiikaathi nyetto mmapuronimwaya, aaweemexa acikhi, aaweliha mikoomba ni aaweemexa amarimbu." 
Exodus40:19 Vahoolowaya aakunga eheema vatabernaakuluni, anakhuneela ni yookhuneelano ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe." 
Exodus40:20 Aahiikaathitho itthaabwa sa Namoona mwaarkani*, aatthukelelamo ikopo ni aahiikaathera vasuluwaya yookhuneelano ya wiiraana." 
Exodus40:21 Vano aahaavolongha Arka* mutabernaakuluni, anatthukelela eluttu yookuttelelano aakuttelelaka Arka* a Namoona, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe." 
Exodus40:22 Moisesi aahiikaathi meesa Muheemani mwa Muthukumano, mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa etabernaakulu*, mpatta wa omokoni wa eluttu." 
Exodus40:23 Aahiikaathiwo epaawu ya Okhala*, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe." 
Exodus40:24 Aahiikaathi onyaari Muheemani mwa Muthukumano ohoolo wa meesa, mpatta wa ohitto wa etabernaakulu*," 
Exodus40:25 anapattiha soomwaleela ohoolo wa Yave, ntoko Owo aamulamulenlaawe." 
Exodus40:26 Moisesi aawiikaathitho altaari* a eyuuma yoorikaxa Muheemani mwa Muthukumano ohoolo wa eluttu," 
Exodus40:27 anahisamo erubani* yoowunkhelaxa, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe." 
Exodus40:28 Vahoolowaya aatthukelela eluttu vamulako wa etabernaakulu*. 
Exodus40:29 Aawiikaathi altaari* a sooveleela soohisa vakhiviru wa mulako wa etabernaakulu*, Eheema ya Muthukumano*, anapakawo sooveleela soohisa ni sa etrigu, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe." 
Exodus40:30 Aahiikaathi ebasiya eriyari ya Eheema ya Muthukumano* ni altaari*, anasariha maahi." 
Exodus40:31 Moisesi, Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana yaavarela muteko maahi awo weera yiivulule." 
Exodus40:32 Imaara sootheene yaavolowasaaya Muheemani mwa Muthukumano hoye hoye yaawaattamelaaya altaari* yanniivulula, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Exodus40:33 Woomalihera Moisesi aaheemexa nipuwa ninrukureera etabernaakulu* ni altaari* ntoko ekintaali, anatthukelela eluttu vamulako wa nipuwa. Hiiho Moisesi aamaliha miteko." 
Exodus40:34 Vano nihutte naakhuneela Eheema ya Muthukumano* ni ovuwa wa Yave waasareya mutabernaakuluni. 
Exodus40:35 Moisesi khaawera ovolowa Muheemani mwa Muthukumano, niwoko nihutte naari mwemmo ni ovuwa wa Yave waasareya muTabernaakuluni*." 
Exodus40:36 Imaara sootheene nihutte naawelaaya vaTabernaakuluni*, aYixrayeli ti yeettaaya ni mukwahaaya." 
Exodus40:37 Vaheera nihutte naahiwela, awo khayaapwaha, mpaka nihuku nihutte naawelaaya." 
Exodus40:38 Vano khula othana nihutte na Yave naakhuneela etabernaakulu* ni khula ohiyu waakhala mooro munihutteni, muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli woonaka mmikwahanimwaya moothemwene." 
Leviticus1:1 Yave aamwiitthana Moisesi anuuluma ni yoowo Muheemani mwa Muthukumano. Aamweerela: 
Leviticus1:2 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli ha: ‘Yoole aneera ampakele Yave yooveleela, aruuheke ntoko yooveleela mwaamunama a imombe hoye hoye ikhondoolo." 
Leviticus1:3 Yooveleela yakhala yoohisa, mutthu owo amuruuheke mwaamunama mulopwana oohirakala. Owo amuruuheke vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano* weera aakhuleliwe ni Yave." 
Leviticus1:4 Owo iikaathiki ntatanawe vamuru wa mwaamunama a yooveleela yoohisa, ni eyo enimwaakhuleliwa ntoko yoorehererela wiiwanana ni Yave." 
Leviticus1:5 Vano owo amwiiveke mwaamunama vamaithoni wa Yave ni asaserdoti*, anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni, erongheke ephome ni emisereke mipatta sootheene sa valtaarini* vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*." 
Leviticus1:6 Owo ampereke mwaamunama ni amuthikilaseke. 
Leviticus1:7 Asaserdoti*, anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni, epattiheke mooro valtaarini* ni ekukhumanyeke mooro owo." 
Leviticus1:8 Vahoolowaya asaserdoteene yaawo ethateke intthuri vamoha ni muru ni makhura vakhuunini siri vayikho valtaarini*. 
Leviticus1:9 Marupo ni nyetto sirapihiweke toko, ni musaserdoti* ahiseke sootheene iyo valtaarini*. Ti yooveleela yoohisa, yooveleela erehereriwe vayikho, yooveleela yoowunkhelaxa enimusiveliha Yave." 
Leviticus1:10 Yooveleela yakhala yooveleela yoohisa ya ikhondoolo, ekhalaka ekhondoolo hata epuri, mutthu owo amveleeleke mwaamunama oohirakala." 
Leviticus1:11 Owo iiveliweke mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa altaari* vamaithoni wa Yave ni asaserdoti*, anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni, emisereke ephomaawe mipatta sootheene sa altaari*." 
Leviticus1:12 Mutthu owo amuthikilaseke intthuri intthuri. Vano musaserdoti* athateke intthuri iyo vamoha ni muru ni makhura vakhuunini siri vayikho valtaarini*. 
Leviticus1:13 Marupo ni nyetto sirapihiweke toko, ni musaserdoti* aruuheke ntoko yoovaha ni ahiseke valtaarini*. Ti yooveleela yoohisa, yooveleela erehereriwe vayikho, yooveleela yoowunkhelaxa enimusiveliha Yave." 
Leviticus1:14 Yooveleela yakhala yooveleela yoohisa ya ipalame, owo aruuheke mwaansiya hoye hoye nikhinda." 
Leviticus1:15 Musaserdoti* amuruuheke mwaapalame, amuhiteke ni amuhiseke valtaarini*. Owo ahiyeke ephome ekhwalalelaka vaxirini ya altaari*." 
Leviticus1:16 Owo avenxeke ecohocoho ni seiyo siri mwemmo, avonyereke mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa altaari* enriheliwaayawo ettuura." 
Leviticus1:17 Owo amuthaleke mwaapalame eriyariru ahimukawanyiheke, ni vano musaserdoti* amuhiseke vayikho vakhuunini mooro ovarelaka. Ti yooveleela yoohisa, yooveleela erehereriwe vayikho, yooveleela yoowunkhelaxa enimusiveliha Yave." 
Leviticus2:1 Yoole aneera amuruuhele Yave yooveleela ya irooro, yooveleelaawe ekhaleke ya ephepa yooreerela. Vasuluwaya owo amiineleke makhura ni iikaathiki erubani*," 
Leviticus2:2 aaroiheleke asaserdoti*, anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni. Mmoha a yaawo anyottoleke ephepa yooreerela, makhura ni erubani* yootheene, ahisereke valtaarini* ntoko eyuupuxero. Ti yooveleela yoohisa, yooveleela erehereriwe vayikho, yooveleela yoowunkhelaxa enimusiveliha Yave." 
Leviticus2:3 Singhala iyo sa sooveleela sa irooro ti sa Aharoni ni anamwanaawe; ti mpatta wootteelaxa wa sooveleela ompakeliwa Yave soorehereriwa vayikho. 
Leviticus2:4 Nyuwo mwaruuha yooveleela ya irooro yoowooxiwa vayikho, eyo ekhaleke ya ephepa yooreerela: iboolu soopakiwa woohikhalano eferementu ni sooweetheeliwa makhura, hoye hoye ipaawu sikhaanene soohikhalano eferementu ni soottikittheliwa makhura." 
Leviticus2:5 Yooveleelaanyu ya irooro yarehereriwa munooxeriwa, eyo ekhaleke ya ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura yoohikhalano eferementu." 
Leviticus2:6 Muttikitthe ni mmiinele makhura; ti yooveleela ya irooro. 
Leviticus2:7 Yooveleelaanyu ya irooro yaapeiwa mmwaapuni, eyo ekhaleke ya ephepa yooreerela ni makhura." 
Leviticus2:8 Munruuhele Yave yooveleela ya irooro yoopakiwa ntoko ohimeriwaaya ni mmwinnyerereke musaserdoti*, mwa yoowo aneera aronghe valtaarini*." 
Leviticus2:9 Owo avenxeke mpatta wa eyuupuxero ya yooveleela ya irooro ni ahisereke valtaarini*; ti yooveleela erehereriwe vayikho, yooveleela yoowunkhelaxa enimusiveliha Yave." 
Leviticus2:10 Singhala iyo sa sooveleela sa irooro ti sa Aharoni ni anamwanaawe; ti mpatta wootteelaxa wa sooveleela ompakeliwa Yave soorehereriwa vayikho. 
Leviticus2:11 Khula yooveleela ya irooro yootheene muneeraanyu munrongheleke Yave ehiheliwe eferementu, niwoko khoontthuniheriwa ohisa eferementu naari oravo mwaampakelaka yooveleela Yave yoorehereriwa vayikho." 
Leviticus2:12 Nyuwo munrongheleke yeeyo Yave ntoko yooveleela ya soowiima soopacera, mene muhiveleelele valtaarini* ntoko yooveleela yoowunkhelaxa." 
Leviticus2:13 Muutuwanyere maakha sooveleelasanyu sootheene sa irooro. Muhihiye sooveleelasanyu sa irooro soohiheliwa maakha a wiiraana wa Mulukwaanyu; mwaandyeerere maakha sooveleelasanyu sootheene. 
Leviticus2:14 Nyuwo mwamuruuhela Yave yooveleela ya irooro ntoko yooveleela ya soowiima soopacera, munruuhele inuku soottikitthiwa sa irooro inyowani soowaarikiwa." 
Leviticus2:15 Mmiinelekewo makhura ni muheleke erubani*; ti yooveleela ya irooro. 
Leviticus2:16 Musaserdoti* ahiseke mpatta wa eyuupuxero ya irooro soottikitthiwa ni makhura vamoha ni erubani* yootheene ntoko yoomveleelela Yave yoorehereriwa vayikho. 
Leviticus3:1 Yooveleela ya mukina yakhala yooveleelela murettele, epakiweke ha: owo amveleela mwaamunama a muhuwo – akhalaka mulopwana naari muthiyana; owo amuruuheleke Yave mwaamunama oohirakala." 
Leviticus3:2 Owo iikaathiki ntata vamuru wa mwaamunama a yooveleela yoohisa aneera iiveliwe vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. Asaserdoti*, anamwane a Aharoni, emisereke ephome mipatta sootheene sa altaari*." 
Leviticus3:3 Wa yooveleelela murettele eyo, owo amuruuhele Yave yooveleela erehereriwe vayikho: makhura ootheene anghuruwela marupo ni alumbaanneno," 
Leviticus3:4 miso miili vamoha ni makhura anghuruwela, ni mpatta wa hapa onkuttelela ni simvenxiwa vamoha ni miso." 
Leviticus3:5 Vano anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni ehiseke sootheene iyo vasulu wa sooveleela soohisa siri vakhuunini sivarelaka valtaarini* ntoko yooveleela erehereriwe vayikho, yooveleela yoowunkhelaxa enimusiveliha Yave." 
Leviticus3:6 Mukina amuruuhela Yave mwaamunama a muhuwo a ekhondoolo ntoko yooveleelela murettele, amuruuheleke ya elopwana hoye hoye ethiyana yoohirakala." 
Leviticus3:7 Owo aruuha eputtiputthi, amuroiheleke Yave." 
Leviticus3:8 Owo iikaathiki ntata vamuru wa mwaamunama aneera iiveliwe ohoolo wa mulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. Vano anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni emisereke ephome mipatta sootheene sa altaari*. 
Leviticus3:9 Wa yooveleelela murettele eyo, owo amuruuhele Yave yooveleela erehereriwe vayikho: makhuraaya, mwiila wooneneva woothikiliwa nnenesene ni makhura ootheene anghuruwela marupo elumbaanneene," 
Leviticus3:10 miso miili vamoha ni makhura anghuruwela, ni mpatta wa hapa onkuttelela ni simvenxiwa vamoha ni miso." 
Leviticus3:11 Musaserdoti* ahiseke valtaarini* ntoko yooca yoovahiwa Yave, yooveleela erehereriwe vayikho." 
Leviticus3:12 Yooveleela yakhala ya epuri, owo amuroiheleke Yave." 
Leviticus3:13 Owo iikaathiki ntata vamuru wa mwaamunama aneera iiveliwe ohoolo wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. Vano anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni emisereke ephome mipatta sootheene sa altaari*. 
Leviticus3:14 Wa yooveleeleene yeeyo, owo amuruuhele Yave yooveleela yoorehereriwa vayikho: makhura ootheene anghuruwela marupo ni alumbaanneno," 
Leviticus3:15 miso miili vamoha ni makhura anghuruwela, ni mpatta wa hapa onkuttelela ni simvenxiwa vamoha ni miso." 
Leviticus3:16 Asaserdoti* ehiseke valtaarini* ntoko yooca, yooveleela yoorehereriwa vayikho, yoowunkhelaxa. Makhura ootheene ekhaleke a Yave." 
Leviticus3:17 Ela ti ekano yoohimala wa ikhapira sineera sirwe, mmapuroni ootheene muneeraanyu mwakhalemo: muhikhuureru makhura naari ephome." 
Leviticus4:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus4:2 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Mukina attheka mweerisani apakaka yeeyo ekhoottihiwe mwa nakhalaru Nlamulo na Yave, apakeke ha:" 
Leviticus4:3 Musaserdoti* oottikittheliwa attheka, aruuhelaka hiiho nthowa muloko, owo amuruuheleke Yave emombe exaana yoohirakala ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka opankaawe." 
Leviticus4:4 Owo amuroihele Yave emombe vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. Owo iikaathiki ntata vamuru wa emombe eneera yiiviwe vamaithoni wa Yave. 
Leviticus4:5 Vano musaserdoti* oottikittheliwa akuxeke ephome vakhaani ya emombe aroihaka Muheemani ya Muthukumano*. 
Leviticus4:6 Owo aruweyeke ekatha mphomeni ni amisereke imaara ithannapiili vamaithoni wa Yave, ohoolo wa eluttu ya Nipuro Nootteela*." 
Leviticus4:7 Vahoolowaya musaserdoti* ahingeke mpatta wa ephome mmanyakani a valtaarini* a erubani* yoowunkhelaxa eri vamaithoni wa Yave, Muheemani ya Muthukumano*. Ephome eneera ehale ya emombe eyo ayeeherele vathi wa altaari* a sooveleela soohisa vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*." 
Leviticus4:8 Owo avenxeke makhura ootheene a emombe a yooveleelela yoottheka – makhura ootheene anghuruwela marupo ni alumbaanneno," 
Leviticus4:9 miso miili vamoha ni makhura anghuruwela, ni mpatta wa hapa onkuttelela ni simvenxiwa vamoha ni miso," 
Leviticus4:10 mooteene yoowo amvenxiwaaya makhura a emombe eveleeleliwaka ntoko yooveleelela murettele. Vanonto musaserdoti* ahiseke seiyo valtaarini* a sooveleela soohisa. 
Leviticus4:11 Vaheera exapala ya emombe ni ethayaaya yootheene, muru ni nyetto, marupo ni mpuule," 
Leviticus4:12 eyo tiiyo sootheene sineera sihale sa emombe, owo akhumihereke vaate okhwipi wa okonelingwe aroihaka vanipuroni nootteelihaxiwa, attharihaka soonyesereriwasaya sa mapuro ootteela. Ti nipuro nenenenno ettuura enriheliwaayawo. Vano itthu seiyo sihisiweke vasulu ikhuuni sivarelaka yuukeliwaayawo ettuura." 
Leviticus4:13 Muloko wootheene wattheka mweerisani opakaka yeeyo ekhoottihiwe mwa nakhalaru Nlamulo na Yave, naari ohisuwelaka weera ori ni nthowa, nlelo ori ni nthowa." 
Leviticus4:14 Owo waasuwelaka weera woottheka, vano muthukumano oruuheke emombe exaana ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, arongheke mpaka ohoolo wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*." 
Leviticus4:15 Asitokweene a mulokweene yoowo yiikaathiki matata vamuru wa emombe vamaithoni wa Yave, ni emombe yiiviweke ohoolo wa Yave." 
Leviticus4:16 Vano musaserdoti* oottikittheliwa akuxeke ephome vakhaani ya emombe, arongheke Muheemani ya Muthukumano*." 
Leviticus4:17 Owo aruweyeke ekatha mphomeni ni amisereke imaara ithannapiili vamaithoni wa Yave ohoolo wa eluttu ya Nipuro Nootteela*. 
Leviticus4:18 Vahoolowaya musaserdoti* ahingeke mpatta wa ephome mmanyakani a valtaarini* ari ohoolo wa Yave, Muheemani ya Muthukumano*. Ephome eneera ehale ya emombe eyo ayeeherele vathi wa altaari* a sooveleela soohisa vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*." 
Leviticus4:19 Vano owo avenxeke makhura ootheene a emombe ni ahisereke valtaarini*," 
Leviticus4:20 apakelaka emombe mooteene yoowo aapakenlaaweno emombe ya yooveleelela yoottheka. Moota hiiho musaserdoti* onoorehererela wiiwanana ni Yave, ni owo onooleveleliwa." 
Leviticus4:21 Vanonto owo akhumihereke emombe vaate wa okonelingwe ni ahiseke ntoko aahinsaawe emombe yoopacera. Ela ti yooveleelela yoottheka ya muloko. 
Leviticus4:22 Mutokweene mmoha attheka mweerisani, apakaka yeeyo ekhoottihiwe mwa nakhalaru Nlamulo na Yave Mulukwaawe, onookhalano nthowa." 
Leviticus4:23 Owo oonelela yootthekaawe, amuruuheke napunci oohirakala ntoko yooveleelelaawe." 
Leviticus4:24 Owo iikaathiki ntata vamuru wa napunci aneera iiveliwe vanipuroni siniiveliwaayawo sooveleela soohisa vamaithoni wa Yave. Ela ti yooveleelela yoottheka. 
Leviticus4:25 Vano musaserdoti* ataveke ni ekatha ephome vakhaani ya yooveleelela yoottheka ni ahingeke mmanyakani a altaari* a sooveleela soohisa. Ephome ekina eyo ayeehereke vathi valtaarini*. 
Leviticus4:26 Owo ahiseke makhura ootheene valtaarini* ntoko aahinsaawe makhura a yooveleelela murettele. Moota hiiho musaserdoti* onoorehererela wiiwanana ni Yave wa yoottheka ya mulopwana owo, ni owo onooleveleliwa." 
Leviticus4:27 Mmoha a muloko attheka mweerisani, apakaka yeeyo ekhoottihiwe mwa nakhalaru Nlamulo na Yave, owo onookhalano nthowa." 
Leviticus4:28 Owo oonelela yootthekaawe, aruuheke ntoko yooveleelelaawe yoottheka epuri ethiyana yoohirakala." 
Leviticus4:29 Owo iikaathiki ntata vamuru wa mwaamunama a yooveleelela yoottheka aneera iiveliwe vanipuroni siniiveliwaayawo sooveleela soohisa. 
Leviticus4:30 Vano musaserdoti* ataveke ni ekatha ephome vakhaani ya yooveleelela yoottheka, ni ahingeke mmanyakani a altaari* a sooveleela soohisa. Ephome ekina eyo ayeehereke vathi valtaarini*." 
Leviticus4:31 Owo avenxeke makhura ootheene mooteene yoowo amvenxeriwaaya makhura a yooveleelela murettele. Vanonto musaserdoti* ahiseke seiyo valtaarini* ntoko yooveleela yoowunkhelaxa enimusiveliha Yave. Moota hiiho musaserdoti* onoomurehererela wiiwanana ni Yave, ni mulopwana owo onooleveleliwa." 
Leviticus4:32 Owo aruuha eputtiputthi ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, ekhaleke ethiyana yoohirakala." 
Leviticus4:33 Owo iikaathiki ntata vamuru wa mwaamunama aneera iiviweke ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka vanipuroni siniiveliwaayawo sooveleela soohisa. 
Leviticus4:34 Vano musaserdoti* ataveke ni ekatha ephome vakhaani ya yooveleelela yoottheka ni ahingeke mmanyakani a altaari* a sooveleela soohisa. Ephome ekina eyo ayeehereke vathi valtaarini*. 
Leviticus4:35 Owo avenxeke makhura ootheene a eputtiputthi ya yooveleelela murettele. Vanonto musaserdoti* ahiseke seiyo valtaarini* vasulu wa soomveleelela Yave soorehereriwa vayikho. Moota hiiho musaserdoti* onoomurehererela wiiwanana ni Yave, ni mulopwana owo onooleveleliwa." 
Leviticus5:1 Mukina iitthaniwa weera akhalele onamoona mwaha wa etthu oonnaawe hoye hoye osuwenlaawe ni akhootta, ti yoottheka ni omphwanela nthorihelo."
