Leviticus5:2 Mukina atava yakhalaru etthu yoohitteela, hata akhalaka mwaamunama ookhwa a mutuphini hoye hoye mihuwo soohitteela, hoye hoye soopattuxiwa soohitteela siniipurula – naari ahisuwelaka, owo onoothatuwa oohitteela ni ookhalano nthowa." 
Leviticus5:3 Hoye hoye owo atava etthu yoohitteela ya omutthu, yakhalaru etthu eneera emutatuxe oohitteela – naari ahisuwelaka, owo oonelela, onookhalano nthowa." 
Leviticus5:4 Mukina moohuupuwelanimwawe alipela opaka etthu yooreera hoye hoye yoonanara, yakhalaru etthu aneeraawe alipelele ahiipasoopaka, naari ahisuwelaka yeeyo, vano oonelela, onookhalano nthowa." 
Leviticus5:5 Mukina akhalano nthowa niwoko na emoha ya itthusene seiya, owo alapeke yootthekaawe." 
Leviticus5:6 Owo amuruuheleke Yave ekhondoolo hoye hoye epuri ethiyana ya muhuwaawe ntoko nlivo niwoko na yoottheka opankaawe, eyo tiiyo yooveleelela yoottheka. Vano musaserdoti* onoomurehererela wiiwanana ni Yave wa yootthekaawe." 
Leviticus5:7 Owo aahikhalano meerelo a yooveleela ya eputtiputthi, amuruuheleke Yave aximasiya meeli hoye hoye makhinda meeli ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka – nimoha wa yooveleelela yoottheka ni nikina nno wa yooveleela yoohisa." 
Leviticus5:8 Owo amuruuhele musaserdoti* aneera apacere woonihera toko yooveleelela yoottheka. Owo ahiteke ahikwasulaka muru. 
Leviticus5:9 Woottharelana amisereke okhwipi wa altaari* ephome yooveleelela yoottheka. Ephome eniihale eyo ahiyeke ekhwalalelaka vathi wa altaari*. Eyo ti yooveleelela yoottheka. 
Leviticus5:10 Vahoolowaya musaserdoti* amveleeleke mwaapalame mukinoowo ntoko yooveleela yoohisa ni attharihaka soonyesereriha sa sooveleela, amurehererelaka wiiwanana ni Yave niwoko na yoottheka opankaawe, ni owo onooleveleliwa." 
Leviticus5:11 Wa soothesene aahikhalano meerelo ooveleelela aximasiya meeli hoye hoye makhinda meeli, aruuheke ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka ikiilu* piili sa ephepa ya etrigu yooreerela weera aveleelele yootthekaawe. Owo ahimiinelewo makhura naari ahiikaathi erubani*, niwoko ti yooveleelela yoottheka." 
Leviticus5:12 Owo amuruuhele yeeyo musaserdoti*, ni musaserdoti* anyottoleke vakhaani ntoko mpatta wa eyuupuxero, ni eyo ahisereke valtaarini* vasulu wa sooveleeleliwa Yave soorehereriwa vayikho. Eyo ti yooveleelela yoottheka." 
Leviticus5:13 Moota hiiho musaserdoti* onoomurehererela wiiwanana ni Yave wa yakhalaru ya soottheka seiya opankaawe, ni owo onooleveleliwa. Yooveleela eniihale eyo ti ya musaserdoti*, ntoko simpakiwaaya sooveleela sa irooro.’”" 
Leviticus5:14 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus5:15 “Mukina aatapanya atthekaka mweerisani wa yakhalaru etthu yootteeliheriwa Yave, owo amuruuheleke Yave napunci a muhuwaawe oohirakala oophimiwa mparathani*, ettharaka olemela wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*. Eyo ti yooveleelela nthowa." 
Leviticus5:16 Owo areherereketho yeeyo ooceelenlaawe opaka mwaha wa itthu sootteeliheriwa; aandyeerere mpatta wanaathanu wa mutteengo ni amulive musaserdoti* mutteengo vamoha ni mpatta wanaathanutho. Vano musaserdoti* onoomurehererela wiiwanana ni Yave amvarelaka muteko napunci ntoko yooveleelela nthowa ni owo onooleveleliwa. 
Leviticus5:17 Mutthu attheka apakaka ninghiihaaya nakhalaru Nlamulo na Yave, naari ahisuwelaka, onookhalano nthowa ni onoohaawa nthorihelo." 
Leviticus5:18 Owo amuruuheleke musaserdoti* napunci a muhuwaawe oohirakala ni oowaakhuleliwa ntoko yooveleelela nthowa. Moota hiiho musaserdoti* onoomurehererela wiiwanana ni Yave mwa yootapanya opankaawe mweerisani ni owo onooleveleliwa. 
Leviticus5:19 Ti yooveleelela nthowa; vekhaikhai owo aakhalano nthowa niwoko aamutthekela Yave. 
Leviticus6:1 Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi: 
Leviticus6:2 “Mukina attheka ampahulaka Yave, amulokotthaka mwaattamanaawe mwaha wa yoosunga hoye hoye yooweemexera, naari etthu yoowiiyiwa, hata yoowoopopiherela," 
Leviticus6:3 hoye hoye attotta etthu yooriheya ni akhuwa, naari alipela, oothaka mwaha wa yakhalaru etthu atthekaka hiiho," 
Leviticus6:4 vanonto, mutthu apaka moota hiiho, akhalanaka nthowa, ontthuneya ohokoloxa yeeyo iiyalaawe hoye hoye okunxaawe oopopiherelaka, hoye hoye innyereriwaawe naari sooriheya ottonttawe," 
Leviticus6:5 naari yakhalaru etthu olipenlaawe oolokottha. Vano owo aliveke wookwanela aandyeererakatho mpatta wanaathanu wa yeeyo, amvahaka sootheene muneene nihuku nenenenno aneeraawe oonihere yooveleelelaawe nthowa." 
Leviticus6:6 Owo amuruuheleke musaserdoti* yoomveleelela Yave: napunci a muhuwaawe oohirakala ni oowaakhuleliwa. 
Leviticus6:7 Moota hiiho musaserdoti* onoomurehererela wiiwanana ni Yave, ni owo onooleveleliwa vamaithoni wa Yave yakhalaru etthu ya seiyo opankaawe simutatunxe nanthowa.”" 
Leviticus6:8 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus6:9 “Mwamulamulele Aharoni ni anamwanaawe nlamulo nna: ‘Ikano mwaha wa yooveleela yoohisa ti iya: Eyo epwaherereke oza vamakhalani a valtaarini* mpaka oxeexelo ni mooro ohicipihiweke. 
Leviticus6:10 Vano musaserdoti* awareke ikuwo sa eliinyu* ni kaputtulaawe campuwa a eliinyu*, akhupeke ettuura ya yooveleela yoohisa yaalalihiwa ni mooro wa altaari* ni iikaathiki mukerekhere wa altaari*." 
Leviticus6:11 Vahoolowaya aceendyeke soowara ni arongheke ettuura okhwipi wa okonelingwe vanipuroni noothanliwa ntoko nootteela. 
Leviticus6:12 Ohicipihiweke mooro valtaarini* opwaherereke ovarela. Khula oxeexelo musaserdoti* aandyeerereke ikhuuni ni iikaathiki vayikho sooveleela soohisa, ni ahiserekewo makhura a sooveleelela murettele." 
Leviticus6:13 Opwahererihiweke mooro valtaarini* ohicipihiweke. 
Leviticus6:14 Ikano mwaha wa sooveleela sa irooro ti iya: anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni eruuheke vamaithoni wa Yave, ohoolo wa altaari*." 
Leviticus6:15 Musaserdoti* anyottoleke ephepa yooreerela ni makhura vamoha ni erubani* yootheene eri vasulu wa yooveleela ya irooro ni ahisereke valtaarini* mpatta wa eyuupuxero ntoko yoowunkhelaxa enimusiveliha Yave. 
Leviticus6:16 Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana eceeke yooveleela enghala eyo, mene eceeke yoohikhalano eferementu vaNipuroni Nootteela*; vanipuwani na Eheema ya Muthukumano." 
Leviticus6:17 Yooveleela eyo ehooxiwe ni eferementu; kohaavaha yeeyo ntoko mpattaaya wa sooveleela kireherereliwaaka Miyo vayikho. Ti yootteelaxa ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka ni yooveleelela nthowa. 
Leviticus6:18 Paahi ekhapira ya asilopwana ootheene a Aharoni ti eneera eceeke yeeyo. Ti mpattaaya wa sooveleela soomveleelela Yave soorehereriwa vayikho. Ti ekano yoohimala wa ikhapira sa muhoolotho. Ootheene eniitave seiyo anoothatuwa ootteela.’” 
Leviticus6:19 Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi: 
Leviticus6:20 “Nihuku na ottikittheliwa wa Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana, awosa emuruuheleke Yave yooveleela ela: iliitru* piili sa ephepa yooreerela ntoko yooveleela ya irooro – vakhaani oxeexelo ni vakhaanitho oxekuwa." 
Leviticus6:21 Mureherere yeeyo ni makhura vanooxeriwa, muruuheke yootakanseriwa nnenesene ni moonihere yooveleela ya irooro yoomeyanyiwa ntoko yoowunkhelaxa enimusiveliha Yave." 
Leviticus6:22 Khula mwaana mulopwana a Aharoni aneera amurandele ntoko musaserdoti* oottikittheliwa, areherereke yooveleela eyo. Ti mpatta wa Yave mukanoni yoohimala ni ehisiweke woomalela." 
Leviticus6:23 Khula yooveleela ya irooro ya musaserdoti* ehisiweke woomalela – eyo ehiciweru.” 
Leviticus6:24 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus6:25 “Mwamuleele Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana: ‘Ikano mwaha wa sooveleelela yoottheka ti iya: Yooveleelela yoottheka yiiviweke vamaithoni wa Yave vanipuroni eniiveliwaayawo yooveleela yoohisa. Eyo ti yooveleela yootteelaxa. 
Leviticus6:26 Musaserdoti* aneera amveleele mwaamunama amukhuureleke vaNipuroni Nootteela* – vanipuwani na Eheema ya Mutkukumano. 
Leviticus6:27 Ootheene eneera etave yooveleeleene yeeyo anoothatuwa ootteela ni ephome yattonyera vakuwoni, vano ecapeliweke vaNipuroni Nootteela*." 
Leviticus6:28 Mwaapu oneera waapeeliwe enama opwexiweke, vaheera yaapeeliwa mmwaapuni wa ebronze*, mwaapweene yoowo okutthiweke ni orapihiweke ni maahi." 
Leviticus6:29 Khula mulopwana a mweemusini ya musaserdoti* aceeke yeeyo; ti yootteelaxa. 
Leviticus6:30 Vaheera khula yooveleelela yoottheka ephomaaya eneera eruuhiwe Muheemani mwa Muthukumano weera ereherereliwe wiiwanana ni Yave vaNipuroni Nootteela*, ehikhuuriwe; eyo ehisiweke." 
Leviticus7:1 Ikano mwaha wa yooveleelela nthowa eri yootteelaxa ti iya: 
Leviticus7:2 Mwaamunama oomveleelela nthowa iiveliweke vanipuroni siniiveliwaayawo sooveleela soohisa ni ephomaaya eyeeheriweke mukerekhere wa altaari*. 
Leviticus7:3 Makhura ootheene a yooveleelela nthowa eveleeliweke: mpatta woonunaxa wa mwiila ni makhura anghuruwela marupo," 
Leviticus7:4 miso miili vamoha ni makhura anghuruwela, ni mpatta wa hapa onkuttelela ni simvenxiwa vamoha ni miso." 
Leviticus7:5 Musaserdoti* ahisereke seiyo valtaarini* ntoko yoomveleelela Yave yoorehereriwa vayikho; ti yooveleelela nthowa. 
Leviticus7:6 Asilopwana ootheene a mweemusini ya musaserdoti* eceeke yeeyo, mene eceliweke yeeyo vaNipuroni Nootteela*, niwoko ti yootteelaxa." 
Leviticus7:7 Ekanoweene yeeyo epakeliweke sooveleelela yoottheka mpaka sa nthowa: enama ti ya musaserdoti*. 
Leviticus7:8 Musaserdoti* aneera ampakele mukina yooveleela yoohisa ahalaneke exapala eyo. 
Leviticus7:9 Khula yooveleela ya irooro yoowooxiwa vayikho hoye hoye yoowaapeiwa mmwaapuni naari vanipuroni noowooxera, ti ya musaserdoti* aneera aveleele yeeyo." 
Leviticus7:10 Khula yooveleela ya irooro yooweetheliwa makhura hoye hoye yooheetheeliwa ti ya ekhapira yootheene ya Aharoni. 
Leviticus7:11 Ikano mwaha wa sooveleelela murettele sineera siveleeliwe wa Yave ti iya: 
Leviticus7:12 Mukina apaka yeeyo atthapelaka, vano vamoha ni yooveleelaawe ya otthapela aveleeleketho iboolu soohikhalano eferementu sooweetheliwa makhura, ipaawu sikhaanene soohikhalanotho eferementu ni soottikittheliwa makhura, ni iboolu sa ephepa yooreerela yooweetheiwa nnenesene ni yooweetheliwa makhura." 
Leviticus7:13 Owo aveleeleketho iboolu sooheliwa eferementu vamoha ni yooveleeleene yeeyo ya murettele. 
Leviticus7:14 Owo aruuheke emoha ya khula yoowooxiwa eyo ntoko yoomveleelela Yave, ni iyo ti sa musaserdoti* ommisamisa ephome ya sooveleelela murettele." 
Leviticus7:15 Enama ya yooveleelela murettele ya otthapela ekhuuriweke nihuku nenenenno emveleeliwaaya; ehikone. 
Leviticus7:16 Wa soothesene yooveleelaawe yakhala yookwanihera nlipelo hoye hoye ya otthunawawe, eyo ekhuuriweke nihuku nenenenno emveleeliwaaya, mene eneera ehale eyo ekhuuriweke waaxiiye." 
Leviticus7:17 Vaheera yakhalaru enama eneera ehale mpaka nihuku nanaararu ehisiweke. 
Leviticus7:18 Yakhalaru enama ya yooveleelela murettele yakhuuriwa vanihukuni nanaararu, eyo kheerwa yaakhuleliwa ni Muluku. Yooveleela eyo kheemvareleya muteko ni yoole oveleenle, niwoko ti yoonanara. Mutthu aneera akhuure onookhalano nthowa." 
Leviticus7:19 Enama yatavaru etthu yoohitteela ehikhuuriweke; eyo ehisiweke. Mwaha wa enama yootteela – ootheene ari ootteelihiwa, ekhuureke." 
Leviticus7:20 Vaheera mukina ori oohitteela akhuura enama ya yooveleelela murettele eri ya Yave, vano mutthu owo amalamalihiweke mmulokonimwawe." 
Leviticus7:21 Yoowo aneera ataveru etthu yoohitteela – ekhalaka yoohitteela ya omutthu, ya axinama naari yakhalaru etthu yoohitteela ya mwiikho – ni akhuura enama ya yooveleelela murettele eri ya Yave, mutthu owo amalamalihiweke mmulokonimwawe.’”" 
Leviticus7:22 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus7:23 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Muhikhuureru makhura a imombe, ikhondoolo hoye hoye ipuri." 
Leviticus7:24 Makhura a mwaamunama oovettuliwa naari oonyaanyiwa ni axinama a ntuphini avareliwe muteko wa miteko sikina, mene ahikhuuriweru." 
Leviticus7:25 Yoowo aneera akhuure makhura a mwaamunama ooveleeleliwa Yave wa yooveleela yoorehereriwa vayikho amalamalihiweke mmulokonimwawe. 
Leviticus7:26 Weiwo muneeraanyu mwamakeru, muhice ephome ya mwaapalame hata mwaamunama." 
Leviticus7:27 Yoowo aneera ace onoomalamalihiwa mmulokonimwawe.’” 
Leviticus7:28 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus7:29 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Yoowo aneera amveleelele Yave yooveleelela murettele, aruuheke mpatta wa yeeyo ntoko yoomveleelelaawe Yave." 
Leviticus7:30 Owo aruuheke ni matataawe muneenaawe yoomveleelela Yave yoorehereriwa vayikho. Owo aruuheke makhura vamoha ni ehoce iinainiheraka ehoceene yeeyo ohoolo wa Yave ntoko yooveleela ya wiinainihera. 
Leviticus7:31 Musaserdoti* ahisereke makhura valtaarini*, mene ehoce ti ya Aharoni ni anamwane asilopwana." 
Leviticus7:32 Nyuwo mumvahe musaserdoti* mwetto woolopwana wa ottuli wa yooveleelela murettele ntoko mpattaawe. 
Leviticus7:33 Mwaana mulopwana a Aharoni aneera aveleele ephome ni makhura a yooveleelela murettele aakheleke mwetto woolopwana wa ottuli ntoko mpattaawe. 
Leviticus7:34 Wa sooveleelela murettele sa aYixrayeli kookuxa ehoce yoowiinainiheriwa ni mwetto omveleeliwa ni koomvaha musaserdoti* Aharoni ni anamwane asilopwana ntoko mpattaaya wa khula nihuku wa aYixrayeli. 
Leviticus7:35 Ola ti mpatta wa soomveleelela Yave soorehereriwa vayikho siri sa Aharoni ni anamwane asilopwana vanihukuni akhalihiwaaya weera emurumeele Yave ntoko asaserdoti*. 
Leviticus7:36 Ti yeeyo Yave aalamulenlaawe waavahasa vanihukuni yaattikittheliwaaya eriyari ya aYixrayeli. Ti ekano yoohimala wa ikhapira sootheene. 
Leviticus7:37 Vano iya ikano mwaha wa yooveleela yoohisa, yooveleela ya irooro, yooveleelela yoottheka, yooveleelela nthowa, yooveleela ya ottikittheliwa ni yooveleelela murettele." 
Leviticus7:38 Yave aamwinnyerera Moisesi vamwaako Sinayi vanihukuni aalamulenlaawe aYixrayeli omuruuhela Yave sooveleelasaya, munikareni na oSinayi.’”" 
Leviticus8:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus8:2 “Munruuheke Aharoni ni anamwane asilopwana, ikuwosaya, makhura oottikitthelano, emombe elopwana wa yooveleelela yoottheka, anapunci eeli ni mpapara orino ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu," 
Leviticus8:3 ni muthukumanyihe muloko wootheene vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*.” 
Leviticus8:4 Moisesi aapaka yeeyo Yave aamulamulenlaawe ni muloko waathukumana vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. 
Leviticus8:5 Moisesi aaheerela muloko: “Ti yeeyo Yave olamulenlaawe.” 
Leviticus8:6 Vano Moisesi aamweemexa Aharoni ni anamwane asilopwana ohoolo wa muthukumano, anaarapiha." 
Leviticus8:7 Aangwariha Aharoni mukaandyo wa esaserdoti, anamphitelela laamba, anangwariha malaya ni mooxikootti. Owo aamphitelelatho mooxikootti ni laamba a esaserdoti." 
Leviticus8:8 Aangwarihatho yoowara vakakasani iikaathiki Urimi ni Tumimi* mpatta wa yoowara ya vakakasani. 
Leviticus8:9 Vahoolowaya aamutthuka ecireemba ereeneno eyuuma yoorikaxa mpatta wa ohoolo wa ecireemba, eyo tiiyo ediyadema*, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Leviticus8:10 Vahoolowaya Moisesi aakuxa makhura ootteeliha anattikitthelano etabernaakulu* ni sootheene saarimo, atteelihaka seiyo." 
Leviticus8:11 Owo aahaamisera altaari* imaara ithannapiili ni makhura, aattikitthelaka altaari* ni ikarumasaya sootheene vamoha ni ebasiya ni mwettwaaya weera atteelihe." 
Leviticus8:12 Aamiinela mmuru mwa Aharoni makhura oottikitthelano, anamutteeliha." 
Leviticus8:13 Vahoolowaya aahaaruuha ohoolo anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni, anaawariha mikaandyosaya, anaaphitelela alaamba aatthukaka icireemba, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Leviticus8:14 Woottharelana aamuruuha mwaamombe wa yooveleelela yoottheka, ni Aharoni vamoha ni anamwane asilopwana yaahiikaathera matata vamuru wa mwaamombe ole." 
Leviticus8:15 Moisesi aamuhita mwaamombe, anaxuweya ekatha mphomeni, anahinga manyaka ootheene a altaari* weera aatteelihe. Ephome yaahanle eyo ayeehera vathi wa altaari*. Hiiho ahaarehererela wiiwanana ni Yave." 
Leviticus8:16 Moisesi aakuxatho makhura ootheene anghuruwela marupo, hapa ni miso miili ni makhura anghuruwela, anahisera valtaarini*." 
Leviticus8:17 Vaheera mipatta sikina sa mwaamombe ni exapalaaya, ethai ni marupo aahisa okerekhere wa okonelingwe, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Leviticus8:18 Vahoolowaya Moisesi aalamulela oruuhiwa napunci a yooveleela yoohisa, ni Aharoni vamoha ni anamwane asilopwana yaahiikaathera matata vamuruwawe." 
Leviticus8:19 Vano Moisesi aamwiiva napunci, anayeehera ephome mukhwipi wa altaari*." 
Leviticus8:20 Aamuthikilela napunci intthuri intthuri, anahisa muru, intthuri ni makhura." 
Leviticus8:21 Aarapiha marupo ni nyetto, anamuhisera napunci ootheene valtaarini* ntoko yooveleela yoohisa, yoowunkhelaxa yoomveleelela Yave yoorehereriwa vayikho, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Leviticus8:22 Woottharelana aalamulela oruuhiwa napunci mukina, yooveleelela ntteeliho, ni Aharoni vamoha ni anamwane asilopwana yaahiikaathera matata muruwaawe." 
Leviticus8:23 Vanonto Moisesi aamwiiva napunci, anahinga ephome naaru noolopwana na Aharoni, vakathani etokweene yoolopwana ni ya nnaawonawe noolopwana." 
Leviticus8:24 Moisesi aalamulelatho weera anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni ekhuveele ni khula mmoha a yaawosa aamuhinga ephome naaru noolopwana, vakathani etokweene yoolopwana ni ya nnaawonawe noolopwana. Vano ephome yaahanle eyo aayeehera mukhwipi wa altaari*." 
Leviticus8:25 Aakuxa makhura, mwiila wooneneva, makhura ootheene anghuruwela marupo ni makhura animuhuruwela hapa ni miso miili nitho makhura anghuruwela etakhwi yoolopwana." 
Leviticus8:26 Mumpaparani orino ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu waari vamaithoni wa Yave, aakuxa epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu, epaawu yooheliwa makhura ni epaawu yoozazaala, aniikaathi vamakhurani ni vatakhwini yoolopwana." 
Leviticus8:27 Sootheene iya aamwinnyerera Aharoni ni anamwane asilopwana, aniinainiha seiya vamaithoni wa Yave ntoko yooveleela yoowiinainiheriwa." 
Leviticus8:28 Vahoolowaya Moisesi aakuxatho seiya mmatatanimwaya, anahisa valtaarini* vasulu wa yooveleela yoohisa, ntoko yooveleelela ntteeliho, yooveleela yoowunkhelaxa enimusiveliha Yave yoorehereriwa vayikho." 
Leviticus8:29 Owo aakuxatho ehoce yaari yawaweene ya napunci a ntteeliho, aniinainihera yeeyo ohoolo wa Yave ntoko yooveleela yoowiinainiheriwa, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Leviticus8:30 Woottharelana Moisesi aakuxa makhura vakhaani a ottikitthelano ni ephome vakhaani yaari valtaarini*, anammiserano Aharoni ni soowarasawe sa esaserdoti ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni soowarasaya sa esaserdoti. Hiiho aamutteeliha Aharoni ni soowarasawe sa esaserdoti ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni soowarasaya sa esaserdoti." 
Leviticus8:31 Vanonto Moisesi aamweerela Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana: “Mwaapeye enama vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*, mwacewo vamoha ni epaawu ya ebasiya ya sooveleela sa ntteeliho, ntoko kaalamulenlaaka keeraka: ‘Aharoni ni anamwane asilopwana eceeke yeeyo.’" 
Leviticus8:32 Vahoolowaya muhise enama ni epaawu eneera ehale. 
Leviticus8:33 Muhivenye vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano* wa mahuku mathannameeli mpaka okwanela otteelihiwawanyu niwoko ehuhu ya otteelihiwawanyu enoopwaherera wa mahuku mathannameeli. 
Leviticus8:34 Yeeyo epakeiye olelo elamuleliwe ni Yave weera yooreherereleni wiiwanana ni Yoowo. 
Leviticus8:35 Mukhaleke vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano* wa mahuku mathannameeli ootheene mpakaka yeeyo Yave ontthunaawe weera muhikhwe, niwoko ti yeeyo kilamuleliwaaka.”" 
Leviticus8:36 Vano Aharoni ni anamwane asilopwana yaapaka sootheene Yave aalamulenlaawe mwa Moisesi. 
Leviticus9:1 Vanihukuni nanaathannamararu Moisesi aamwiitthana Aharoni ni anamwane asilopwana nitho asitokweene a aYixrayeli. 
Leviticus9:2 Aamweerela Aharoni: “Munkuxe mwaamombe mulopwana wa yooveleelela yoottheka ni napunci wa yooveleela yoohisa, ooweeli oohirakala, muruuheke vamaithoni wa Yave." 
Leviticus9:3 Vahoolowaya mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Munruuhe napunci wa yooveleelela yoottheka, mwaamombe ni eputtiputthi, soopiili iyo sa eyaakha emoha ni soohirakala wa sooveleela soohisa," 
Leviticus9:4 ni emombe ni napunci wa yooveleelela murettele weera mveleele vamaithoni wa Yave vamoha ni yooveleela ya irooro sooweetheiwa ni makhura. Niwoko olelo Yave onimwiixoonihera wa nyuwo.’” 
Leviticus9:5 Awosa yaaruuha itthu Moisesi aalamulenlaawe ohoolo wa Eheema ya Muthukumano* ni muloko wootheene waakhuveela, oneemela ohoolo wa Yave." 
Leviticus9:6 Vano Moisesi aaheerela: “Ti seiya Yave oolamulenlaaweni opaka weera ovuwa wa Yave wiixoonihere wa nyuwo.” 
Leviticus9:7 Moisesi aamweerela Aharoni: “Murweeke valtaarini*, mwapakele yooveleelelaanyu yoottheka ni yooveleelaanyu yoohisa, mwiirehererele wiiwanana ni Yave, mwareherereletho muloko; mwapakele yooveleela muloko ni mwarehererele wiiwanana ni Yave, ntoko Owo aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Vano Aharoni aarowa valtaarini*, anamwiiva mwaamombe ntoko yooveleelela yootthekaawe." 
Leviticus9:9 Anamwanaawe yaamuruuhela ephome ni owo aaxuweyamo ekathaawe, anahinga manyaka a valtaarini*; ephome yaahanle eyo aayeehera vathi valtaarini*." 
Leviticus9:10 Owo aahisa valtaarini* makhura, miso, makhura aninghuruwela hapa a yooveleelela yoottheka, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Leviticus9:11 Wa soothesene etthai ni exapala aahisera okhwipi wa okonelingwe. 
Leviticus9:12 Vanonto aahiiva yooveleela yoohisa. Anamwanaawe yaamwinnyerera ephome ni owo aayeehera mukhwipi wa altaari*. 
Leviticus9:13 Woottharelana yaamwinnyerera yooveleela yoohisa intthuri intthuri vamoha ni muru, anahisera seiyo valtaarini*." 
Leviticus9:14 Aarapiha marupo ni nyetto, anahisera vasulu wa yooveleela yoohisa valtaarini*." 
Leviticus9:15 Vahoolowaya Aharoni aarongha yooveleela wa muloko. Aamukuxa napunci a yooveleelela yoottheka ya muloko, anamwiiva, anamveleelela soottheka ntoko aapankaawe ni yoopacera." 
Leviticus9:16 Aakuxa yooveleela yoohisa, anaveleela yeeyo attharaka soonyesererihiwa sa sooveleela." 
Leviticus9:17 Aaruuhatho yooveleela ya irooro, ananyottola, anahisera valtaarini*, ohiya sa sooveleela soohisa sa oxeexelo." 
Leviticus9:18 Aahiiva emombe ni napunci ntoko yooveleelela murettele wa muloko. Anamwanaawe yaamuruuhela ephome ni owo aayeehera mukhwipi wa altaari*. 
Leviticus9:19 Vaheera mipatta sa makhura a emombe ni napunci –mwiila wooneneva, makhura anghuruwela marupo, miso ni hapa –" 
Leviticus9:20 seiye yaahiikaathi vahoceni, ni vano Aharoni aahisa iyo valtaarini*." 
Leviticus9:21 Aharoni ahiinainihera ihoce ni vatakhwini yoolopwana vamaithoni wa Yave ntoko yooveleela yoowiinainiheriwa, ntoko Moisesi aalamulenlaawe." 
Leviticus9:22 Vahoolowaya Aharoni aaheemexera matata muloko, anareeliha. Amalihaleene opaka yooveleelela yoottheka, yooveleela yoohisa ni yooveleelela murettele, aakhuruwa." 
Leviticus9:23 Moisesi ni Aharoni yaavolowa Muheemani ya Muthukumano*. Ekhumakaru, yaareeliha muloko ni ovuwa wa Yave waahiixoonihera wa muloko wootheene." 
Leviticus9:24 Yave aarumiha mooro onahisa yooveleela yoohisa ni mipatta sa makhura valtaarini*. Muloko wootheene woonakaru yeeyo, waakhuwela ni ohakalala, onuuramihela vathi ekhovaaya." 
Leviticus10:1 Nadabi ni Abihu, anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni, yaakuxa yaahiseriwa erubani*, mwa mwemmo yaapattinghaaya mooro, enahela erubani* ni yaapattiha mooro woohitthuniheriwa vamaithoni wa Yave, ehilamuleliwe." 
Leviticus10:2 Vano Yave aarumiha mooro onaalaliha ni yaahookhwa vamaithoni wa Yave. 
Leviticus10:3 Vanonto Moisesi aamweerela Aharoni: “Uulummaawe Yave ti ela: ‘Kinimwiixoonihera Ootteelaxa variyari wa yaala ankaattamela; Miyo kinoovuwihiwa vamaithoni wa muloko wootheene.’” Aharoni aari mwaasa omaala. 
Leviticus10:4 Moisesi aamwiitthana Mixayeli ni Elezafana, mwaana mulopwana a atatawe Aharoni, anaweerela: “Nkarwani, mwaavenxe axisuluwiinyu mukhwipi wa okonelingwe, vaate wa mpatta wa ohoolo wa Nipuro Nootteela*.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Vano yaarowa, enaavarela mikaandyo, enaapurulela mpaka okhwipi wa okonelingwe, ntoko Moisesi aalamulenlaawe." 
Leviticus10:6 Vanonto Moisesi aamweerela Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana Eleyazari ni Ithamari: “Muhimetthe mayihaanyu hata muhaahule soowarasanyu mwiinanelaka weera muhikhwe ni Yave ahinyoonyeriwe muloko wootheene. Vaheera imusisanyu, ipuumba sootheene sa aYixrayeli ewiinleleke yaale Yave aaphwantaawe ni mooro." 
Leviticus10:7 Muhivenye vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano* weera muhikhwe, niwoko makhura a ottikitthelano a Yave ari mwa nyuwo.” Vano yaapaka yeeyo Moisesi aahimmaawe." 
Leviticus10:8 Vano Yave aamweerela Aharoni: 
Leviticus10:9 “Nyuwo ni anamwaniinyu asilopwana muhiwure eviinyu naari soowura sikina sirino eferementu soohapala muhinaaye ovolowa Muheemani ya Muthukumano weera muhikhwe. Ela ti ekano yoohimala wa ikhapira sootheene. 
Leviticus10:10 Muntthuneya okawanyiha yeeyo eri yootteela ni yeeyo eri yoohitteeliheriwa; yeeyo yootteela ni yoohitteela," 
Leviticus10:11 ni mwaaxuttihe aYixrayeli ikano sootheene Yave aavanghaawe mwa Moisesi.” 
Leviticus10:12 Moisesi aamweerela Aharoni ni anamwane asilopwana yaahanle, Eleyazari ni Ithamari: “Mukuxe yooveleela ya irooro ehanle mwa yoomveleelela Yave erehereriwe vayikho, muceleke yoohikhalano eferementu mukerekhere valtaarini*, niwoko ti yootteelaxa." 
Leviticus10:13 Muceleke vaNipuroni Nootteela*, niwoko ti mpattaanyu ni mpatta wa anamwaniinyu asilopwana wa sooveleeleliwa Yave sirehereriwe vayikho. Vano keenraaka malamuleliwo." 
Leviticus10:14 Mene nyuwo, anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana ekhuureke ihoce soowiinainiheriwa ni etakhwi yooveleeleliwa. Mukhuureke vanipuroni noothanliwa ntoko nootteela; iyo moovahiwa nyuwo ni amanwaniinyu ntoko mpattaanyu wa sooveleelela murettele sa aYixrayeli." 
Leviticus10:15 Etakhwi yooveleeliwa ni ehoce yoowiinainiheriwa eruuhiweke vamoha ni mipatta sa makhura a sooveleela soorehereriwa vayikho weera siinainihiweke vamaithoni wa Yave. Ola onookhala mpatta wa khula nihuku wa nyuwo ni anamwaniinyu, ntoko Yave aalamulenlaawe.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Moisesi amwaasaasiyeene mipatta sootheene napunci a yooveleelela yoottheka ni asuwelakaru weera oohisiwa, aamunyoonyeriwa Eleyazari ni Ithamari, anamwane asilopwana yaahanle a Aharoni, anaakoha:" 
Leviticus10:17 “Muhikhuurenle heeni yooveleelela yoottheka vaNipuroni Nootteela*? Ti yooveleela yootteelaxa mvahiwaanyu weera mvenxe nthowa wa muloko murehererelaka wiiwanana ni Yave wa yoowo vamaithoniwawe. 
Leviticus10:18 Yeenre ephome ya yooveleela eyo ehironghiwaka vaNipuroni Nootteela*, nyuwo mwaahikhuureleke vanipuroni nootteeliheriwa ntoko kilamulenlaaka.”" 
Leviticus10:19 Aharoni aamwaakhula Moisesi: “Olelo awosa aapakela sooveleelela soottheka ni soohisasaya vamaithoni wa Yave – hata hiiho etthu yoonanara ntoko ela yookikhumelela. Miyo kaakhuurale yooveleelela yoottheka olelo, vano khaamunsiveliha Yave?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Vano Moisesi aahaakhulela masu ale. 
Leviticus11:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi ni Aharoni: 
Leviticus11:2 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Variyari wa axinama ootheene a mulaponi muneeraanyu mwakhuureke ti ala: 
Leviticus11:3 Akhalaru mwaamunama orino inaawo soothaleya makharu meeli ni oncukhula, munkhuureke." 
Leviticus11:4 Aakhala akina ancukhula paahi ehikhalanne inaawo soothaleya sa makharu meeli hoye hoye arino inaawo soothaleya sa makharu meeli, mene khaancukhula – muhaakhuure. Haaci, onoocukhularu, khathaleiye inaawo sa makharu meeli; ti yoohitteela wa nyuwo." 
Leviticus11:5 Matthika onoocukhularu, khathaleiye inaawo makharu meeli, ti oohitteela wa nyuwo." 
Leviticus11:6 Hukula, onoocukhularu, khathaleye inaawo makharu meeli, ti oohitteela wa nyuwo." 
Leviticus11:7 Ekuluwe eroothaleyaru inaawo makharu meeli kheencukhula, ti yoohitteela wa nyuwo." 
Leviticus11:8 Muhikhuure inamasene seiyo hata muhitaveru sookhwasaya, ti soohitteela wa nyuwo." 
Leviticus11:9 Sa soopattuxiwa sootheene sinkhala mmaahini nyuwosa mukhuureke seiyo sirino malakhalakha ni makamba. 
Leviticus11:10 Vaheera sootheene iyo sihikhalanne malakhalakha ni makamba – sikhalaka sa soopattuxiwa sikhaani sootheene, sikhalaka sa sikina iyo sinkhala mmaahini – muthanyeke." 
Leviticus11:11 Weenre otthuneyaka othanya, muhikhuure inamasaya ni muthanye sookhwasaya." 
Leviticus11:12 Soopattuxiwa sootheene sinkhala mmaahini sihikhalanne malakhalakha ni makamba ti sa mwiikho wa nyuwosa. 
Leviticus11:13 Ipalame siri soohitteela wa nyuwo mwa seiyo muneeraanyu muhikhuureke niwoko sookhoottiheriwa ti iya: xaaka, enaka, nrepo," 
Leviticus11:14 xaattula makula, ni ikhalelo sootheene sa nttawo," 
Leviticus11:15 ikhalelo sootheene sa anakhuku," 
Leviticus11:16 nikhakanttore, namame, haamaama, ikhalelo sootheene sa ahaamaama," 
Leviticus11:17 esiisi, engwasi, nikunkhuni," 
Leviticus11:18 mwaacaace, mwaacaace a mmakareni, khuruwela," 
Leviticus11:19 ntiki, ikhalelo sootheene sa antiki, kokotthi ni nantuuthu." 
Leviticus11:20 Aciitthu ootheene amvava yeettaka nyetto mixexe mwaathanyeke. 
Leviticus11:21 Wa soothesene variyariwaya mwaakhuureke arino miphonyoongo sootuphano. 
Leviticus11:22 Variyariwaya mootthuniheriwa okhuura wakhalaru moota wa misoope. 
Leviticus11:23 Vaheera ikhalelo sootheene sirino mapupha ni nyetto mixexe sikhaleke sa mwiikho wa nyuwo. 
Leviticus11:24 Ikhalelosene seiyo sinimootatuxani oohitteela; yoole aneera atave sookhwasaya onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa. 
Leviticus11:25 Yoole aneera akuxe yakhalaru yookhwa emoha ya seiyo, acapeke soowarasawe ni onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus11:26 Akhalaru mwaamunama oohikawanyeya inaawo ni makharu meeli hoye hoye ohincukhula ti oohitteela wa nyuwo. Yoole aneera atave yookhwa emoha ya seiyo onookhala oohitteela. 
Leviticus11:27 Variyari wa axinama ootheene aneetta ni nyetto mixexe, yaawo aneetta ni inaawo ti oohitteela wa nyuwo; yoole aneera atave sookhwasaya onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus11:28 Yoole aneera akuxe yakhalaru yookhwa emoha ya seiyo, acapeke soowarasawe ni onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa. Seiyo ti soohitteela wa nyuwo." 
Leviticus11:29 Eriyari ya axinama aniipurula ari oohitteela wa nyuwo ti ala: nawili, nikhule ni sakhalaru ikhalelo sa makoottwa," 
Leviticus11:30 nimara, naakoonkho munengele, hala, naakoonkho a mweehaavani ni namanriya." 
Leviticus11:31 Eriyari ya axinama aniipurula ti ari oohitteela wa nyuwo. Yoole aneera amutave ookhwa mmoha a yaawo onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa. 
Leviticus11:32 Mmoha a yaawo akhwiiyeene amorela vasulu wa yakhalaru ekaruma emvareliwa muteko, vano etthweene yeeyo enookhala yoohitteela. Ekaruma eyo, hata ekhalaka etthu ya itthaabwa, ekuwo, exapala hata esaakho, ti yoohitteela. Eruweiweke – enookhala yoohitteela mpaka oxekuwa ni vahoolowaya enootteela." 
Leviticus11:33 Mmoha a yaawo amorela mmwaapuni, sootheene siri mwemmo sinookhala soohitteela ni nyuwo mpwexeke." 
Leviticus11:34 Yakhalaru yooca eniittonyeriwe ni maahi awo enookhala yoohitteela ni yakhalaru yoowura eniikhale mmwaapuni mmo enookhalatho yoohitteela. 
Leviticus11:35 Yakhalaru etthu eneera emoreliwe ni akhalaru mwaamunama ookhwa a yaawo enoothatuwa yoohitteela. Akhala ttukuttha hoye hoye moota wa niikho na oloko mpwexeke. Ti soohitteela ni nyuwosa moonele okhala soohitteela. 
Leviticus11:36 Wa soothesene naattuuttu hoye hoye ehime ya maahi enoopwaherera okhala yootteela, mene yoole aneera atave sookhwasaya onookhala oohitteela." 
Leviticus11:37 Mwaamunama ookhwa amorela vammisoni oneera waaliwe, vano owo onoopwaherera okhala wootteela;" 
Leviticus11:38 vaheera yariheliwa maahi vammisoni ti woohitteela wa nyuwo. 
Leviticus11:39 Akhwa mwaamunama onkhuuriwa, vano yoole aneera amutave ookhwa a yoowo, onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus11:40 Yoole aneera amukhuure mwaamunama oowiikhwela, acapeke soowarasawe ni onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa. Yoole aneera amukuxe mwaamunama ookhwa, acapeke soowarasawe ni onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus11:41 Ikhalelo sootheene siniipurula ti sa mwiikho wa nyuwo; khamuntthuniheriwa okhuura. 
Leviticus11:42 Khamuntthuniheriwa okhuura yakhalaru ekhalelo eniipurula, ekhalaka ni erukulu, ekhalaka ni nyetto mixexe hoye hoye nyetto sincipale; sootheene iyo ti sa mwiikho wa nyuwo." 
Leviticus11:43 Muhiivalihe ni ikhalelosene seiyo. Muhiitatuxe oohitteela ni seiyo ni sihootatuxeni oohitteela. 
Leviticus11:44 Miyo ti Yave, Mulukwaanyu; mwiitteelihe ni mukhaleke ootteela niwoko Miyo ti Ootteela. Muhiivalihe ni yakhalaru ekhalelo eniipurula." 
Leviticus11:45 Miyo ti Yave ookhumihaleni wExipitu weera kikhale Mulukwaanyu; tivawo: mukhaleke ootteela niwoko Miyo ti Ootteela. 
Leviticus11:46 Iya ikano mwaha wa axinama, ipalame, ikhalelo sootheene siri mmaahini ni seiyo siniipurula." 
Leviticus11:47 Mwaakawanyihe axinama ootteela ni oohitteela; yaawo mutthuniheriwaanyu waakhuura ni ohaakhuura.’” 
Leviticus12:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus12:2 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Muthiyana arupula, anamuyara mwaana mulopwana, muthiyana owo onookhala oohitteela wa mahuku mathannameeli mooteene yoowo onaatalelaawe." 
Leviticus12:3 Vanihukuni nanaathannamararu mwaana mulopwana owo iineliweke. 
Leviticus12:4 Vahoolowaya muthiyana aweherereke mahuku miloko miraru ni mararu weera atteelihiwe ngwiinanelanimwawe. Owo ahitave etthu yootteela naari ahiroweru wa Nipuro Nootteela* mpaka okwanela mahuku a otteelihiwawawe. 
Leviticus12:5 Muthiyana amuyara mwaana muthiyana, muthiyana owo onookhala oohitteela wa isimana piili, mooteene yoowo onaatalelaawe. Vahoolowaya owo aweherereke mahuku miloko mithannamosa ni mathannamosa weera atteelihiwe ngwiinanelanimwawe." 
Leviticus12:6 Yakwanela mahuku a ootteelihiwawawe vahoolo wa omuyara mwaana mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana, owo amuruuheleke musaserdoti* vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano* eputtiputthi ya eyaakha emoha ntoko yooveleela yoohisa ni nikhinda hoye hoye mwaansiya ntoko yooveleelela soottheka." 
Leviticus12:7 Owo amveleeleleke Yave sooveleela iyo weera amurehererele wiiwanana ni Yave, ni muthiyana owo onookhala ootteelihiwa ngwiinanelanimwawe. Iya ikano mwaha wa muthiyana anaamuyare mwaana mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana." 
Leviticus12:8 Owo aahikhalano meerelo oophwanya eputtiputthi, aruuheke aximasiya meeli hoye hoye makhinda meeli – nimoha wa yooveleela yoohisa ni nikina wa yooveleelela yoottheka. Moota hiiho musaserdoti* onoomurehererela wiiwanana ni Yave, ni onookhala ootteelihiwa.’”" 
Leviticus13:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi ni Aharoni: 
Leviticus13:2 “Mukina yamukhala yoowiipa, ethuku naari nleepela noowaaraxa muxapalanimwawe apaale nithoonyeraka makokho, owo arongheliweke musaserdoti* Aharoni hoye hoye wa mmoha a anamwanaawe ori musaserdoti*." 
Leviticus13:3 Vano musaserdoti* awehaweheke nnenesene exapaleene yeeyo ni mapururu a vathukuni yatteela ni anoona weera wohiixera, vano ethuku eyo ti makokho. Musaserdoti* awehawengheene, amwiitthaneke okhala oohitteela." 
Leviticus13:4 Nleepela muxapalanimwawe natteela nihiniixera, ni mapururu yaahitteelawo, musaserdoti* amulamuleke mutthu owo weera akhale meekhaawe wa mahuku mathannameeli." 
Leviticus13:5 Munihukuni nanaathannameeli musaserdoti* amuwehaweheke ni oona weera nleepela khaniceendyeiye naari khanimwareenle erutthu yootheene, owo amulamuleke okhala meekhaawe wa mahuku mathanameelitho." 
Leviticus13:6 Munihukuni nanaathannameeli musaserdoti* amuwehaweheketho ni ethuku yanyaala ehimwareenle erutthu yootheene, vano musaserdoti* amwiitthaneke ootteelihiwa – ti ethuku paahi. Mutthu owo akattheke ikuwosawe ni onookhala ootteelihiwa." 
Leviticus13:7 Vaheera mutthu owo iixoonihenreene wa musaserdoti* weera iitthaniwe ootteelihiwa ethukwaawe yaamwareela mweerutthuni yootheene, owo iixoonihereketho wa musaserdoti*." 
Leviticus13:8 Musaserdoti* amuwehaweheke ni oona weera ethuku yoomwareela mweerutthuni, musaserdoti* amwiitthaneke oohitteela; ethuku eyo ti makokho." 
Leviticus13:9 Mukina oonelela eneneero ya makokho, owo aroihiweke wa musaserdoti*." 
Leviticus13:10 Musaserdoti* amuwehaweheke ni oona weera yoomukhala yoowiipa yootteela, etatuxaka mapururu ootteela ni wakhala sututu," 
Leviticus13:11 ti makokho ni musaserdoti* amwiitthaneke oohitteela. Owo ahimulamule okhala meekhaawe niwoko ti oohitteela wa mahuku ootheene. 
Leviticus13:12 Eretta yuulaana erutthu yootheene ni musaserdoti* anoona weera aamuttokoneela," 
Leviticus13:13 vano musaserdoti* aamuwehaweheke ni oona weera eretta ele yohuulaana erutthu yootheene, musaserdoti* amwiitthaneke ootteela. Yeenre ekhalaka yootteela yootheene, owo ti ootteela." 
Leviticus13:14 Vaheera yeerawo ethai sututu, owo onookhala oohitteela." 
Leviticus13:15 Musaserdoti* oonaka ethai yeenre sututu, amwiitthaneke oohitteela. Ethai yeenre sututu ti yoohitteela; eyo ti makokho." 
Leviticus13:16 Vano weenre sututu waceendyeya onatteela, owo ahokoleeleketho wa musaserdoti*." 
Leviticus13:17 Musaserdoti* amuwehaweheke ni oona weera mpatta woovaliheya woothatuwa wootteela, musaserdoti* amwiitthane mutthu owo ootteela; owo onootteelihiwa." 
Leviticus13:18 Akhala mukina orino namkoxo ovonle," 
Leviticus13:19 ni vanipharimani wattukuttela hoye hoye waxeerawo, mutthu owo iixoonihereke wa musaserdoti*." 
Leviticus13:20 Vano musaserdoti* awehaweheke exapaleene yeeyo ni oona weera wohiixeraxa ni mapururu yatteelawo, vano musaserdoti* amwiitthaneke oohitteela. Ti eneneero ya makokho ettukuttelinghe nikhwatta." 
Leviticus13:21 Vaheera musaserdoti* amuwehaweha ahinoona mapururu ootteela ni nipuro nno naahiixeraxa ni wavukuwawo, musaserdoti* amulamuleke mutthu owo weera akhale meekhaawe mahuku mathannameeli." 
Leviticus13:22 Mene nno nuulaana, musaserdoti* amwiitthaneke oohitteela; ti makokho." 
Leviticus13:23 Vaheera nleepela naahitepa naari naahuulaana, ti nipharima paahi na nikhwatta ni musaserdoti* amwiitthaneke ootteela." 
Leviticus13:24 Mukina aza, nnakhumelelawo nleepela nooxeera hoye hoye nootteela vanikhwattani yeenraayawo ethai sututu," 
Leviticus13:25 vano musaserdoti* awehaweheke nleepela ni oona weera mapururuwaaya aathatuwa ootteela ni nno nniixeraxa, ti makokho atannyereiye ni oza. Vano musaserdoti* amwiitthaneke oohitteela – ti makokho." 
Leviticus13:26 Vaheera musaserdoti* awehaweha nleepela ni aahoonawo mapururu ootteela ni waahiixeraxawo, onavukuwa, musaserdoti* amulamuleke mutthu owo weera akhale meekhaawe mahuku mathannameeli." 
Leviticus13:27 Munihukuni nanaathannameeli musaserdoti* angwehaweheke ni oona weera nleepela nohuulaana erutthu yootheene, musaserdoti* amwiitthaneke oohitteela; ti makokho." 
Leviticus13:28 Vaheera nleepela nno naahuulaana naari naahimwareela erutthu yootheene nnavukuwa, ti wiipa wa oza ni musaserdoti* amwiitthaneke ootteela. Ti nipharima na oza paahi." 
Leviticus13:29 Mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana yamphwanya yoonanara ya mmuru hoye hoye vattwattwarani," 
Leviticus13:30 musaserdoti* awehaweheke nleepela ni oona weera nohiixeraxawo ni mapururu yakhala ancano ni ootteettheya, vano musaserdoti* amwiitthaneke oohitteela. Ti epuhera ni ovele, eyo tiiyo makokho a mmuru hoye hoye a ettwattwara." 
Leviticus13:31 Vaheera musaserdoti* awehaweha eneneero ya ovele ni waahiixeraxa ni yaahikhalawo mapururu ooripa, vano musaserdoti* amulamuleke mutthu oovaliheya weera akhale meekhaawe mahuku mathannameeli." 
Leviticus13:32 Munihukuni nanaathannameeli musaserdoti* awehaweheke woovaliheya ni oona weera ovele khawuulaanne, ni yaahikhalawo mapururu ancano ni waahiixeraxawo," 
Leviticus13:33 mutthu owo ametthiweke ohiya woovaliheya ni musaserdoti* amulamuleke yoowo weera akhaletho meekhaawe mahuku mathannameeli. 
Leviticus13:34 Munihukuni nanaathannameeli, musaserdoti* awehaweheketho ni oona weera ovele khawuulaanne, ni waahiixeraxawo, musaserdoti* amwiitthaneke ootteela. Mutthu owo akattheke ikuwosawe ni onookhala ootteela." 
Leviticus13:35 Vaheera ovele wuulaana mweerutthuni iitthaningweene ootteela," 
Leviticus13:36 musaserdoti* awehaweheke ovele ni wuulaana mweerutthuni naari muxapalani, khoontthuneya musaserdoti* waasaasa mapururu ancano – mutthu owo ti oohitteela." 
Leviticus13:37 Vano, musaserdoti* oona weera khawuulaanne ni aamelelawo mapururu ooripa, ovele owo woomala. Owo ti ootteela ni musaserdoti* amwiitthaneke ootteela." 
Leviticus13:38 Mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana akhalano maleepela ootteela mweerutthuni," 
Leviticus13:39 musaserdoti* awehaweheke ni maleepela yakhala ootteela ehinaara, ti eretta yoohoopiha yuulaanne; mutthu owo ti ootteela." 
Leviticus13:40 Mulopwana yammora mayihi, anahala ntariru, owo ti ootteela." 
Leviticus13:41 Owo yammora mayihi vatthomelani, ti ntari – ti ootteela." 
Leviticus13:42 Vaheera akhaliwa nikhwatta nooxeera vayuuci hoye hoye waakohi vantariniwawe, ti makokho anuulaana vayuuci hoye hoye waakohi." 
Leviticus13:43 Musaserdoti* angwehaweheke ni oona weera nleepela na vayuuci hoye hoye waakohi nootteela nixeenreene ni ekhalelo ya makokho," 
Leviticus13:44 mutthu owo ti namakokho ni oohitteela. Musaserdoti* amwiitthaneke oohitteela niwoko na nleepela na mmurumwawe. 
Leviticus13:45 Yoowo aneera akhaliwe makokho sooneyakawo sakhalaru ineneero sa makokho, awareke ikuwo soothaala, eettakano mputu; owo akutteeleleke eyano akhuwelaka: “Ohitteela! Ohitteela!”" 
Leviticus13:46 Owo nlelo areeneno makokho, onookhala oohitteela. Owo akhaleke meekhaawe okhwipi wa okonelingwe." 
Leviticus13:47 Yakhumelela eretta yoowoopiha ya mukuwoni, ekhalaka yootteettheya naari ya mapururu a ekhondoolo hoye hoye eliinyu*," 
Leviticus13:48 ekhalaka yootthaviwa hoye hoye yooxoriwa ya mapururu a ekhondoolo naari eliinyu*, hoye hoye yakhalaru exapala hoye hoye etthu yoopakiwano exapala:" 
Leviticus13:49 vano wakhala weera nlepa na vakuwoni, vaxapalani, naari wa yootthaviwa hoye hoye yooxoriwa naari yakhalaru vaxapalani nri noorimbelela hoye hoye nooxeera, ti eretta yoowoopiha ya mukuwoni ni ooniheriweke musaserdoti*." 
Leviticus13:50 Musaserdoti* awehaweheke nlepa ni ikaathiki ekuweene yeeyo nipuronaya wa mahuku mathannameeli. 
Leviticus13:51 Eviraleene mahuku mathannameeli, musaserdoti* awehaweheke yeeyo ni nlepa namwareela mukuwoni hoye hoye mukuwoni yootthaviwa hoye hoye yooxoriwa, naari vaxapalani, yakhalaru etthu emvareliwa muteko, ti eretta yoowoopiha ya mukuwoni – ekuweene yeeyo ti yoohitteela." 
Leviticus13:52 Owo ahiseke ekuwo eyo yootthaviwa hoye hoye yooxoriwa naari yakhalaru exapala eniikhaleno nlepa, niwoko ti eretta yoowoopiha ya mukuwoni – etthu eyo ehisiweke." 
Leviticus13:53 Vaheera musaserdoti* awehaweha nlepa naahimwareela mukuwoni naari mwa yootthaviwa hoye hoye yooxoriwa hoye hoye ya exapala," 
Leviticus13:54 owo alamuleke weera ekuwo yoovaliheya ekatthiweke. Vahoolowaya owo ikaathiki wawaya mahuku mathannameelitho. 
Leviticus13:55 Ekuwo yoovaliheya ekatthiweene, musaserdoti* awehaweheke ni oona weera nlepa khaniceendyeiye naari nihimwareelaxiye, ekuwo eyo ti yoohitteela. Muhise, muhipwatthaka mpatta heeni wa ekuwo nlepa nivalinghaaya." 
Leviticus13:56 Vano musaserdoti* awehaweha nlepa na ekuwo ekatthiweene ni oona weera noovukuwa, owo athikileke mpatta ovaliheiye wa ekuwo, exapala hoye hoye yootthaviwa naari yooxoriwa." 
Leviticus13:57 Vaheera nlepa nakhumelelatho mukuwoni hoye hoye wa yootthaviwa naari yooxoriwa hata vaxapalani, ti eretta yoowoopiha ya mukuwoni emmwareela, ni sootheene sivaliheiye sihisiweke." 
Leviticus13:58 Vano ekatthiweene ekuwo hoye hoye yootthaviwa naari yooxoriwa hata exapala ni nlepa nnamalamala, vano, ekatthiweketho ni enootteelihiwa.”" 
Leviticus13:59 Iya ikano mwaha wa eretta yoowoopiha ya mukuwoni ya mapururu a ekhondoolo hoye hoye eliinyu*, yootthaviwa hoye hoye yooxoriwa naari ya exapala weera yiitthaniwe yootteela hoye hoye yoohitteela." 
Leviticus14:1 Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi: 
Leviticus14:2 “Ikano mwaha wa otteelihiwa wa namakokho ti iya: owo aronghiweke wa musaserdoti* 
Leviticus14:3 ni musaserdoti* amuroiheke okerekhere wa okonelingwe, ni angwehaweheke namakokho. Mutthu owo olamihingwe makokho," 
Leviticus14:4 musaserdoti* alamuleke weera siruuhiwe ipalame piili ikumi soowaakhuleleya, etthaabwa ya esidari*, ekuwo yooxeera ni ephandi ya hisopo* mwaha wa yoole aneera atteelihiwe." 
Leviticus14:5 Vahoolowaya musaserdoti* alamuleke weera mmoha a ipalame yiiveliweke muyoopweni ni maahi a oluusi. 
Leviticus14:6 Vano amukuxe mwaapalame mukumi vamoha ni etthaabwa ya esidari*, ekuwo yooxeera ni ephandi ya hisopo*, amuxuweyeke mphomeni mwa mwaapalame iiveliwe mmaahini a oluusi." 
Leviticus14:7 Musaserdoti* ammisekeno namakokho aneera atteelihiwe mwa makokho imaara ithannapiili, ni amwiitthaneke ootteelihiwa. Vaholowaya amutaphulele mwaapalame ori ni okumi vanlakani." 
Leviticus14:8 Mutthu aneera atteelihiwe akatthe soowarasawe, ametthe mayihi ni mapururu, arapeke ni vahoolowaya onookhala ootteela. Aamalihakaru opaka yeeyo, owo avoloweke okonelingwe, mene akhaleke okerekhere wa eheemaawe wa mahuku mathannameeli." 
Leviticus14:9 Vanihukuni nanaathannameeli owo amettheke mayihaawe ootheene, irerusawe, makwikhwaawe ni mapururu ootheene. Owo akattheke ikuwosawe, arapeke ni onookhala ootteelihiwa." 
Leviticus14:10 Vanihukuni nanaathannamararu aruuheke iputtiputthi ilopwana piili ni yoothiyana emoha ya eyaakha emoha ni soohirakala vamoha ni iliitru* ithannamosa ni nttikha sa ephepa ya etrigu yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura ntoko yooveleela ya irooro nitho nttikha na eliitru* emoha ya makhura. 
Leviticus14:11 Musaserdoti* ompakiha ootteelihiwa amoonihereke mutthu owo vamoha ni sooveleelasawe wa Yave vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. 
Leviticus14:12 Vano musaserdoti* akuxeke emoha ya iputtiputthi ilopwana, ni iiveke ntoko yooveleelela nthowa vamoha ni nttikha na eliitru* emoha ya makhura; owo iinainiheke ohoolo wa Yave ntoko yooveleela yoowiinainihiwa." 
Leviticus14:13 Owo iiveleke eputtiputthi vaNipuroni Nootteela* siniiveliwaayawo sooveleelela soottheka ni soohisa. Hiiho ntoko simpakiwaaya sooveleelela soottheka, hiihotho sooveleelela nthowa ti sa musaserdoti*; ti sootteelaxa." 
Leviticus14:14 Musaserdoti* ahingeke ephome ya yooveleelela nthowa okhipi wa naaru noolopwana na yoowo aneera atteelihiwe, vakathani etokweene ya ntatanawe noolopwana ni ya nnaawonawe noolopwana." 
Leviticus14:15 Vahoolowaya musaserdoti* akuxeke makhuraawo ni amiineleke muntatanimwawe noothiyana," 
Leviticus14:16 axuweyeke ekatha ya woolopwana mmakhurani ari muntatani noothiyana ni amisekeno imaara ithannapiili vamaithoni wa Yave. 
Leviticus14:17 Woottharelana musaserdoti* aheletho makhura ahanle mmatatanimwawe okhipi wa naaru noolopwana na yoowo aneera atteelihiwe, vakathani etokweene ya ntatanawe noolopwana ni ya nnaawonawe noolopwana vasulu wa ephome ya yooveleelela nthowa." 
Leviticus14:18 Makhura eneera ehale muntatanimwawe musaserdoti* amiineleke mmuru mwa yoowo aneera atteelihiwe, amurehererelaka wiiwanana ni Yave vamaithoni wa Yoowo." 
Leviticus14:19 Vanonto musaserdoti* iiveke yooveleelela yoottheka ni amureherereleke wiiwanana ni Yave yoole aneera atteelihiwe moohitteelanimwawe. Vahoolowaya musaserdoti* iiveke yooveleela yoohisa," 
Leviticus14:20 ni aveleeleke valtaarini* vamoha ni yooveleela ya irooro ni hiiho onoomurehererela wiiwanana ni Yave namaveleela mwa yoowo anaatteele. 
Leviticus14:21 Vaheera mukina akhala namahaawa ahiweraka oliva itthusene seiyo, akuxeke eputtiputthi elopwana emoha ntoko yooveleelela nthowa eniinainiheriwa weera amurehererele wiiwanana ni Yave, vamoha ni iliitru* piili sa ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura ntoko yooveleela ya irooro, nitho nttikha na eliitru* emoha ya makhura," 
Leviticus14:22 ni aximasiya meeli hoye hoye makhinda meeli ntoko ongwerelaawe – nimoha wa yooveleelela yoottheka ni nikina wa yooveleela yoohisa. 
Leviticus14:23 Vanihukuni nanaathannamararu owo amuruuheleke musaserdoti* wa otteelihiwawawe vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*, vamaithoni wa Yave." 
Leviticus14:24 Musaserdoti* akuxeke eputtiputthi wa yooveleelela nthowa vamoha ni nttikha na eliitru* ya makhura, ni iinainihereke ohoolo wa Yave ntoko yooveleela yoowiinainihiwa." 
Leviticus14:25 Musaserdoti* iiveke eputtiputthi wa yooveleelela nthowa, akuxeke ephome vakhaani ni ahingeke okhipi wa naaru noolopwana na yoowo aneera atteelihiwe, vakathani etokweene ya ntatanawe noolopwana ni ya nnaawonawe noolopwana." 
Leviticus14:26 Vahoolowaya musaserdoti* akuxeke makhura awo ni amiineleke muntatanimwawe noothiyana," 
Leviticus14:27 ni amisekeno makhura vakhaani a ntatanawe noothiyana ni nthoonyo noolopwana imaara ithannapiili vamaithoni wa Yave. 
Leviticus14:28 Owo ahingekeno makhura a muntatanimwawe mmapuronimwene mwemmo ohingaawe ephome ya yooveleelela nthowa – okhipi wa naaru noolopwana na yoowo aneera atteelihiwe, vakathani etokweene ya ntatanawe noolopwana ni ya nnaawonawe noolopwana." 
Leviticus14:29 Makhura eneera ehale muntatanimwawe musaserdoti* amiineleke mmuru mwa yoowo aneera atteelihiwe, amurehererelaka wiiwanana ni Yave vamaithoni wa Yoowo." 
Leviticus14:30 Woottharelana iiveke mwaansiya hoye hoye nikhinda nimoha ntoko ongwerelaawe oliva – 
Leviticus14:31 nimoha wa yooveleelela yoottheka ni nikina wa yooveleela yoohisa vamoha ni yooveleela ya irooro. Moota hiiho musaserdoti* onoomurehererela wiiwanana ni Yave vamaithoni wa Yoowo mwaha wa yoowo aneera atteelihiwe.” 
Leviticus14:32 Iya ikano mwaha wa yaawo arino makokho ehikhalanaka maveleelelo a otteelihiwawaya. 
Leviticus14:33 Yave aamweerela Moisesi ni Aharoni: 
Leviticus14:34 “Mwaavolowaka mulaponi ya oKanaani Miyo kineeraaka koovaheeni ntoko yawinyu ni Miyo kiikaathera eretta yoowoopiha ya muxirini enamwareela mpaani mweelaponi eyo," 
Leviticus14:35 vano muneene a empa eyo aroweke wa musaserdoti* weera amweerele: ‘Kinoona ntoko nookhala muxirini nlepa na eretta yoowoopiha mpaanimwaka.’ 
Leviticus14:36 Musaserdoti* alamuleke weera sikhumihiwe itthu sootheene siri mpaani, owo ahinaaye ovolowa weera sootheene sirimo sihithatuwe soohitteela. Vahoolowaya musaserdoti* avoloweke ni awehaweheke empa." 
Leviticus14:37 Owo awehawehe malepa a muxirini ni awo yarimbelela hoye hoye yaxeera ni yakhala ntoko aaphiya mpuwa," 
Leviticus14:38 musaserdoti* akhumeke mpaani ni ahiyeke ewaleliwo wa mahuku mathannameeli. 
Leviticus14:39 Vanihukuni nanaathannameeli musaserdoti* ahokoloweke weera awehawehe empa. Vano malepa yamwareela muxirini," 
Leviticus14:40 owo alamuleke weera indyerwa soovaliheya ni malepa sivenxiweke ni sivonyeriweke vanipuroni noohitteela okhwipi wa esidade. 
Leviticus14:41 Owo alamuleke weera ixiri sootheene siwakiwe mpuwapuwa ni seiyo singwakiwa mukulukutthingwe sivonyeriweke vanipuroni noohitteela okhwipi wa esidade. 
Leviticus14:42 Vahoolowaya awo ehokoloxereke indyerwa sikina mmapuroni oopacera ni ekulukutthiweketho. 
Leviticus14:43 Malepa yakhumelelatho emwareelaka muxirini vahoolo wa ovenxiwa wa indyerwa ni okulukutthiwawaya," 
Leviticus14:44 musaserdoti* aroweke ni awehaweheke ni malepa yamwareela muxirini, ti eretta yoowoopiha ya muxirini; empa eyo ti yoohitteela." 
Leviticus14:45 Empa eyo ekurumuliweke – indyerwa, itthaabwa ni mookulukutthiwa moothemwene, ni sootheene iyo siriheliweke vanipuroni noohitteela okhwipi wa esidade." 
Leviticus14:46 Yoole aneera avolowe mpaani mmo ewalingweene, vano onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus14:47 Yoowo anaakonemo hoye hoye anaacemo akattheke ikuwosawe. 
Leviticus14:48 Vaheera musaserdoti* arwa ni awehaweha, anoona weera malepa khaamwareenletho ekulukutthiwakaru, owo iitthaneke empa eyo yootteela niwoko malepa aalakaseya." 
Leviticus14:49 Musaserdoti* akuxe ipalame piili, etthaabwa ya esidari*, ekuwo yooxeera ni ephandi ya hisopo* weera empa etteelihiwe." 
Leviticus14:50 Vahoolowaya owo amwiiveleke mwaapalame mmoha muyoopweni ereenemo maahi a oluusi. 
Leviticus14:51 Woottharelana akuxeke etthaabwa ya esidari*, ephandi ya hisopo*, ekuwo yooxeera ni mwaapalame mukumi ni amuxuweyeke mphomeni mwaapalame iiviwe ni mmaahini a oluusi, ni vano amisekeno empa imaara ithannapiili." 
Leviticus14:52 Owo atteeliheke empa ni ephome ya mwaapalame, maahi a oluusi, mwaapalame mukumi, etthaabwa ya esidari*, ephandi ya hisopo* ni ekuwo yooxeera." 
Leviticus14:53 Vaholowaya amutaphuleleke mwaapalame mukumi vanlakani okhwipi wa esidade. Moota hiiho owo onoorehererela wiiwanana ni Yave wa empa, ni empa eyo enootteelihiwa.”" 
Leviticus14:54 Iya ikano mwaha wa makokho, ovele," 
Leviticus14:55 malepa a eretta yoowoopiha ya mukuwoni hoye hoye muxirini," 
Leviticus14:56 soowiipa, ethuku naari nleepela noowaara" 
Leviticus14:57 weera yooneye etthu yaareene yootteela hoye hoye yoohitteela. Iya ikano mwaha wa yakhalaru ekhalelo ya makokho ni malepa a eretta yoowoopiha. 
Leviticus15:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi ni Aharoni: 
Leviticus15:2 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Mulopwana iittheya, vano iwo ti ohitteela." 
Leviticus15:3 Naari apwahereraka hata ahipwahereraka, eyo enoomutatuxa oohitteela. Wiittheya iwo onoomutannyera ohitteela moota ola:" 
Leviticus15:4 Yakhalaru ekaama onkonelaawe mulopwana owo oniittheya ti yoohitteela ni hiihotho ihice sootheene aneeraawe akilaathele. 
Leviticus15:5 Yoowo aneera atave ekaamaawe akatthe soowarasawe ni arapeke ni onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa. 
Leviticus15:6 Yoowo aneera akilaatheleru yakhalaru etthu mulopwana owo okilaathenlaawe, akatthe soowarasawe ni arapeke, ni onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus15:7 Yoowo aneera amutave mulopwana oniittheya, akatthe soowarasawe ni arapeke ni onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus15:8 Mulopwana owo oniittheya amusenyela mutthu ori ootteeleene, owo akatthe soowarasawe ni arapeke, ni onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus15:9 Yakhalaru etthu mulopwana oniittheya aneeraawe akilaathele angwelaka mwaamunana, enookhala yoohitteela," 
Leviticus15:10 ni yoole aneera atave yakhalaru etthu aakilaathenlaawe mulopwana oniittheya, onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa. Yoowo aneera akuxeru itthusene seiyo akatthe soowarasawe ni arapeke, ni onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus15:11 Yoowo mulopwana oniittheya aneera amutave ahinanyawa, vano otavingwe akatthe soowarasawe ni arapeke ni onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus15:12 Mulopwana owo atava mwaapu, vano mwaapu owo opwexiweke ni atava yakhalaru ekaruma ya etthaabwa, eyo erapihiweke." 
Leviticus15:13 Mulopwana owo oniittheya alama, aalikeleleke mahuku mathannameeli mpaka otteelihiwawawe; akatthe ikuwosawe ni arapeke mmoolokoni, ni onookhala ootteelihiwa." 
Leviticus15:14 Vanihukuni nanaathannamararu akuxeke aximasiya meeli hoye hoye makhinda meeli ni iixoonihere vamaithoni wa Yave vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano* amvahaka musaserdoti*. 
Leviticus15:15 Musaserdoti* iiveke – nimoha ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka ni nikina ntoko yooveleela yoohisa. Moota ola onoomurehererela wiiwanana ni Yave vamaithoni wa Yoowo niwoko na wiittheya. 
Leviticus15:16 Mulopwana yaamukhumaka elopwana, arapeke ni onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus15:17 Yakhalaru etthu ya ekuwo hoye hoye exapala eneera ettonyeriwe elopwana, ekatthiwe ni enookhala yoohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus15:18 Mulopwana amukonano muthiyana ni yamukhuma elopwana, ooweeli awo erapeke, ni anookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus15:19 Muthiyana akhala ni mpingu, ohitteela wa mpingwaawe iinaneleke mahuku mathannameeli ni yoowo aneera amutave onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus15:20 Yakhalaru etthu aneeraawe akonele mweehuhuni ya mpingwaawe enookhala yoohitteela ni yakhalaru etthu aneeraawe akilaathele enookhalatho yoohitteela. 
Leviticus15:21 Yoowo aneera atave ekaama ya muthiyana owo, akattheke ikuwosawe ni arapeke ni onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus15:22 Yoowo aneera atave yakhalaru etthu aakilaathenlaawe muthiyana owo, akattheke ikuwosawe ni arapeke ni onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus15:23 Hata ekhalaka ekaama naari yakhalaru etthu muthiyana owo aakilaathenlaawe – mukina atavaru yeeyo, onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus15:24 Mulopwana amukonano muthiyana owo ni mweeraawe onamuttonyera, onookhala oohitteela wa mahuku mathannameeli; yakhalaru ekaama aneeraawe akonele enookhala yoohitteela." 
Leviticus15:25 Muthiyana yamukhuma ephome wa mahuku mancipale ohikhanle mpingwaawe hoye hoye opwahaxa ehuhuwaawe ya mpingwaawe, onookhala oohitteela mmahukuni mwa okhumawawe ephome, ntoko mweehuhuni ya mpingwaawe." 
Leviticus15:26 Yakhalaru ekaama aneeraawe akonele mweehuhuni mwa okhummwawawe ephome, enookhala yoohitteela, ntoko eneereyaaya ni ekaamaawe mweehuhuni ya mpingwaawe ni yakhalaru etthu aneeraawe akilaathele, enookhalatho yoohitteela, ntoko mweehuhuni ya mpingwaawe." 
Leviticus15:27 Yoowo aneera atave yakhalaru etthu ya seiyo onookhala oohitteela; akattheke ikuwosawe ni arapeke, ni onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa." 
Leviticus15:28 Vano waamalaka okhummwawawe ephome, aalikeleleke mahuku mathannameeli ni vahoolowaya onootteelihiwa." 
Leviticus15:29 Vanihukuni nanaathannamararu owo akuxeke aximasiya meeli hoye hoye makhinda meeli ni amurongheleke musaserdoti* vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. 
Leviticus15:30 Musaserdoti* iiveke – nimoha ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka ni nikina ntoko yooveleela yoohisa. Moota ola onoomurehererela wiiwanana ni Yave vamaithoni wa Yoowo niwoko na ohitteela wa okhummwawawe ephome. 
Leviticus15:31 Nyuwo mwaalamule aYixrayeli weera ekhale ottai wa itthu sineera saatatuxe oohitteela weera ehikhwe moohitteelanimwaya enanarihaka Nipuronaka kimankaaka variyariwaya.’” 
Leviticus15:32 Iya ikano mwaha wa mulopwana oniittheya ni yoowo enimukhuma elopwana emutatuxaka oohitteela," 
Leviticus15:33 wa muthiyana munpingunimwawe, wa mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana oniittheya ni wa mulopwana onimukonano muthiyana ori oohitteela." 
Leviticus16:1 Yave aahuuluma ni Moisesi vahoolo wa okhwa wa anamwane asilopwana eeli a Aharoni niwoko na waattamela ohoolo wa Yave. 
Leviticus16:2 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mwamuleele munninyu Aharoni weera ahivoloweke yakhalaru ehuhu ontthunaawe vaNipuroni Nootteelaxa*, wiithela eluttu ohoolo wa ekhuneelelo ya vArkani* a Wiiraana weera ahikhwe, niwoko Miyo kinimwiixoonihera munihutteni vasulu wa ekhuneelelo eyo ya varkani* a Wiiraana." 
Leviticus16:3 Vano Aharoni avolowe nipuro nenenenno moota ola: amukuxe mwaamombe ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka ni napunci ntoko yooveleela yoohisa. 
Leviticus16:4 Owo awareke mukaandyo wa eliinyu* wootteeliheriwa ni kaputtula campuwa a nliinya nootteettheya; owo iitthukeleke laambatho a nliinya nootteettheya ni atthukeke ecireemba ya eliinyu*. Ikuwosene seiyo ti sootteela – tivawo arapeke ahinaaye owara. 
Leviticus16:5 Owo aakheleke wa aYixrayeli ipuri ilopwana piili ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka ni napunci ntoko yooveleela yoohisa. 
Leviticus16:6 Aharoni amwiiveke mwaamombe ntoko yooveleelela sootthekasawe iirehererelaka owo ni emusaawe wiiwanana ni Yave. 
Leviticus16:7 Vahoolowaya akuxe ipuri piili, oonihereke vamaithoni wa Yave vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*." 
Leviticus16:8 Owo ampakeke mwaathanle wa ipuri piili – emoha wa Yave ni ekina eneera yoomoleliwe munikareni. 
Leviticus16:9 Aharoni aruuhe epuri yoothanleliwa Yave ni iiveke ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka. 
Leviticus16:10 Vaheera epuri ekina eyo ethanleliwe woomoleliwa munikareni yooniheriweke ekumeene vamaithoni wa Yave weera ereherereliweno wiiwanana ni Yave woowoomoleliwa munikareni ntoko epuri enkuxa nthowa. 
Leviticus16:11 Aharoni amuruuheke mwaamombe ntoko yooveleelela sootthekasawe weera iirehererele yoowo ni emusaawe wiiwanana ni Yave ni owo amwiiveke ntoko yooveleelela yootthekaawe. 
Leviticus16:12 Owo akuxeke enghiseriwa erubani* yoosareya makhala a valtaarini* ari ohoolo wa Yave ni erubani* matata meeli ephepeene yoowunkhelaxa ni arongheke wiithela eluttu. 
Leviticus16:13 Owo ahiseke erubani* vamaithoni wa Yave ni mwiixi wa erubani* onookuttelela ekhuneelelo eri vasulu itthaabwa sa Wiiraana weera ahikhwe. 
Leviticus16:14 Owo akuxe ephome vakhaani ya mwaamombe ni amisereke ni ekatha mpatta wa ohoolo wa ekhuneelelo; vahoolowaya amisereke ni ekatha ephomeene yeeyo imaara ithannapiili ohoolo wa ekhuneelelo. 
Leviticus16:15 Woottharelana amwiiveke napunci oomveleelela yoottheka eerelaka muloko ni arongheke ephome wiithela eluttu; apakeleke ephome eyo mooteene yoowo opankaawe ni ya mwaamombe: amisereke ekhuneelelo ni ohoolowaya. 
Leviticus16:16 Moota hiiho onoorehererela Nipuro Nootteela* wiiwanana ni Yave niwoko na ohitteela ni ovaanya wa aYixrayeli – sakhalaru sootthekasaya sootheene. Owo apakeleketho Eheema ya Muthukumano* eri eriyaraaya moohitteelanimwaya. 
Leviticus16:17 Ahikhaleru mukina aneera avolowe Muheemani ya Muthukumano* okhuma ehuhuweene yeeyo Aharoni aneeraawe avolowe weera arehererele wiiwanana ni Yave Nipuro Nootteela* mpaka okhumawawe amalihaleene wiirehererela owo, emusaawe ni muloko wootheene wiiwanana ni Yave." 
Leviticus16:18 Vano owo aroweke valtaarini* ari vamaithoni wa Yave, ni vawo areherereleke wiiwanana ni Yave. Owo akuxe ephome vakhaani ya mwaamombe ni ya napunci, ahingeke mmanyakani ootheene a altaari*." 
Leviticus16:19 Owo amisereke ephome vakhaani ni ekatha imaara ithannapiili weera aarapihe ni aatteelihe yaawo mwa ohitteela wa aYixrayeli. 
Leviticus16:20 Aharoni aamalihaka orehererela wiiwanana ni Yave Nipuro Nootteelaxa*, Eheema ya Muthukumano* ni altaari*, owo amurongheke ohoolo napunci mukumi." 
Leviticus16:21 Owo iikaathereke matataawe oomeeli mmuru mwa napunci mukumi, alapeke sootakhala sootheene ni ovaanya wootheene wa aYixrayeli – sootthekasaya sootheene – ni iikaathiki seiyo mmuru mwa napunci. Vahoolowaya amurumiheleke napunci munikareni awehawehiwaka ni mulopwana othanleliwe yeeyo." 
Leviticus16:22 Napunci onoorowano soottheka sootheene sa aYixrayeli vanipuroni na meekhaawe; ni mulopwana owo onoomutaphulela munikareni. 
Leviticus16:23 Vahoolowaya Aharoni avoloweke Muheemani ya Muthukumano*, aruleke ikuwo sa eliinyu* aawarenlaawe weera avolowe vaNipuroni Nootteelaxa*, ni ahiyekemo." 
Leviticus16:24 Owo arapeke vaNipuroni Nootteela*, awareke ikuwosawe sa khula nihuku. Vanonto akhumeke, iipakeleke yooveleela yoohisa ni yooveleela yoohisa wa muloko, iirehererelaka owo ni muloko wiiwanana ni Yave." 
Leviticus16:25 Owo ahisereketho valtaarini* makhura a yooveleelela soottheka. 
Leviticus16:26 Mulopwana yoowo aneera amutaphulele napunci munikareni, akattheke soowarasawe ni arapeke; vahoolowaya avoloweke okonenle muloko." 
Leviticus16:27 Emombe ni napunci wa sooveleelela soottheka, mwa seiyo ephomaaya eruuhiwe vaNipuroni Nootteelaxa* weera erehererele wiiwanana ni Yave, eroihiweke okhwipi wa okonelingwe; ixapalasaya, ethai ni marupwaaya sihisiweke." 
Leviticus16:28 Mulopwana aneera ahise seiyo akatthe ikuwosawe, arapeke ni vahoolowaya avoloweke okonelingwe." 
Leviticus16:29 Ekanowaanyu yoohimala ti ela: vanihukuni nanaamuloko na mweeri wanaathannamiili mwiiyevihe ni muhivareru muteko – akhalaka muYixrayeli xaxaxa hoye hoye namarwa onkhala variyariwanyu," 
Leviticus16:30 niwoko vanihukuni nenenenno munooreherereliwa wiiwanana ni Yave weera mutteelihiwe. Vano munookhala ootteelihiwa mwa sootthekasanyu vamaithoni wa Yave. 
Leviticus16:31 Ti eSaabadu ya wiitthuuwa ni mwiiyevihe; ti ekano yoohimala. 
Leviticus16:32 Musaserdoti* oothanliwa ni oottikittheliwa weera aarandele atithawe ntoko mutokweene a asaserdoti*, areherereleke wiiwanana ni Yave. Owo aware ikuwo sa eliinyu* sootteela," 
Leviticus16:33 areherereleke wiiwanana Nipuro Nootteelaxa*, Eheema ya Muthukumano*, altaari*, asaserdoti* ni atthu ootheene a muloko." 
Leviticus16:34 Ekanowaanyu yoohimala ti ela: orehererela wiiwanana ni Yave opakiweke emaara emoha vayaakhani wa soottheka sootheene sa aYixrayeli.” Ni sootheene saapakiwa ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi. 
Leviticus17:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus17:2 “Mwamuleele Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ootheene nitho aYixrayeli ootheene: ‘Yave onlamulela ha: 
Leviticus17:3 Akhalaru muYixrayeli aneera aveleele emombe, eputtiputthi hoye hoye epuri mpuwa naari okhwipi okonelingwe," 
Leviticus17:4 ahinaruuha vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano* weera oonihere ntoko yoomveleelela Yave ohoolo wa etabernaakulu* ya Yave, vano mulopwana owo onookhalano nthowa na ephome; owo ooyeeha ephome ni onoomalamalihiwa mmulokonimwawe." 
Leviticus17:5 Eyo entthuneya weera aYixrayeli emurongheleke Yave sooveleelasaya ampakelaaya ottai wa okonelingwe. Awosa emuruuheleke musaserdoti*, eyo tiiyo, wa Yave, vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano ni epakeke ntoko sooveleelela murettele." 
Leviticus17:6 Musaserdoti* amisereke ephome valtaarini* a Yave vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano ni ahiseke makhura ntoko yoowunkhelaxa enimusiveliha Yave. 
Leviticus17:7 Awosa ehipakeletho yakhalaru yooveleela miluku sa ipuri mwa seiyo anlapaaya moota wa mwiikho. Ela ti ekano yoohimala wa yaawosa ni wa ikhapirasaya.’ 
Leviticus17:8 Mwaaleele: ‘Akhalaru muYixrayeli hoye hoye namarwa onkhala variyariwaya aneera apake yooveleela yoohisa hoye hoye yooveleela ekina," 
Leviticus17:9 ahinaruuha yeeyo vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano weera amveleelele Yave, mulopwana owo onoomalamalihiwa mmulokonimwawe." 
Leviticus17:10 Akhalaru muYixrayeli hoye hoye namarwa onkhala variyariwaya aneera ace yakhalaru ephome ya mwaamunama, vano Miyo kinoothatuwa Mwiittanaawe kimmalamaliheke mmulokonimwawe." 
Leviticus17:11 Vano okumi wa soopattuxiwa sootheene sineetta ori mphomeni, ni Miyo kohoovahani weera murehererele wiiwanana ni Yave valtaarini*; ti ephome enrehererela okumi wiiwanana ni Yave." 
Leviticus17:12 Tivawo kiweerenlaaka aYixrayeli: ‘Ahikhaleru mmoha a nyuwo aneera ace ephome hata akhalaru namarwa onkhala variyariwanyu. 
Leviticus17:13 Akhalaru muYixrayeli hoye hoye namarwa onkhala variyariwaya aneera amulupatthe mwaamunama hoye hoye mwaapalame onkhuuriwa, ayeehereke toko ephome vathi ni uuheeleke etthaya," 
Leviticus17:14 niwoko okumi wa soopattuxiwa sootheene sineetta ori mphomeni. Ti niwoko na yeeyo kiweerenlaaka aYixrayeli: ‘Muhiceru ephome ya yakhalaru mwaamunama, niwoko okumi wa soopattuxiwa sootheene sineetta ori mphomeni; yoowo aneera ace onoomalamalihiwa.’" 
Leviticus17:15 Akhalaru muYixrayeli xaxaxa hoye hoye namarwa aneera amukhuure akhalaru mwaamunama oovettuliwa naari oonyaanyiwa ni axinama a ntuphini, vano mulopwana owo akattheke ikuwosawe ni arapeke. Onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa ni vahoolowaya onootteelihiwa." 
Leviticus17:16 Vaheera owo aahikattha ikuwosawe naari aahirapa, owo onoohaawa mootakhalanimwawe.’”" 
Leviticus18:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus18:2 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli ha: ‘Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Leviticus18:3 Muhipake yeeyo ampakaaya awExipitu mwaakhalaanyu ni muhipake yeeyo empakiwa mweelaponi mwa oKanaani mwa weiwo kineeraaka koorongheni. Muhitthare mweettelowaaya. 
Leviticus18:4 Mweetteleke soolamulelasaka, mwiiwelelaka ikanosaka ni muttharihe. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu." 
Leviticus18:5 Mutthareke ikanosaka ni malamulowaaka. Vano yoowo aneera iiwelele onookhalela yaawo. Miyo ti Yave. 
Leviticus18:6 Ahikhaleru anaamukhuveele mmusaawe weera amukoneno. Miyo ti Yave. 
Leviticus18:7 Muhaaveihe atithinyu mwaakonanaka amayinyu. Awo ti amayinyu – muhaakoneno. 
Leviticus18:8 Muhaakoneno amwaara a atithinyu – hiiho munimwaaveiha atithinyu. 
Leviticus18:9 Muhimukoneno murokorinyu; akhalaka mwaana a atithinyu naari a amayinyu; hata akhalaka xaxaxa hoye hoye a nipuro nikina. 
Leviticus18:10 Muhimukoneno mwaana a mwaninyu mulopwana naari a mwaninyu muthiyana; hiiho munooveiheya. 
Leviticus18:11 Muhimukoneno mwaana muthiyana a mwaara a atithinyu; aayariweene ni atithinyu – owo ti murokorinyu. 
Leviticus18:12 Muhimukoneno murokoraya atithinyu; ti emusi xaxaxa ya atithinyu. 
Leviticus18:13 Muhimukoneno munnaya amayinyu – ti emusi xaxaxa ya amayinyu. 
Leviticus18:14 Muhimuveihe munnaya atithinyu ngwaattamelaka amwaariye weera mwaakoneno; awo ti amayinu. 
Leviticus18:15 Muhimukoneno mwaara a mwaninyu; ti mwaara a mwaninyu; muhimukoneno. 
Leviticus18:16 Muhimukoneno mwaara a munninyu; eyo enoomveiha munninyu. 
Leviticus18:17 Muhimukoneno muthiyana nitho mwanawe muthiyana. Muhimukoneno naari mwaana muthiyana a mwanawe mulopwana hata mwaana muthiyana a mwanawe muthiyana; awosa ti amusi xaxaxa. Eyo ti mwiikho. 
Leviticus18:18 Muhimuthele naari muhimukoneno munna a mwaarinyu awo nlelo ereene ni okumi, mwaawanawanihaka." 
Leviticus18:19 Muhimwaattamele muthiyana weera munkoneno mweehuhuni ya ohitteela wa waatalawawe. 
Leviticus18:20 Muhimukoneno mwaara a mukhwiinyu mwiiveihaka ni yoowo. 
Leviticus18:21 Muhiwinnyerereru anamwaniinyu weera yiiviwe ntoko yoomveleelela Molekhi, niwoko khoontthuniheriwa oveiha Nsina na Mulukwaanyu. Miyo ti Yave." 
Leviticus18:22 Muhimukoneno mulopwana mukina ntoko ni muthiyana; eyo ti ya mwiikho. 
Leviticus18:23 Muhimukoneno mwaamunama mwiivalihakano. Muthiyana ahiixinnyerere wa mwaamunama weera amukoneno; khavapiliwo. 
Leviticus18:24 Muhiivalihe ni yakhalaru etthu ya seiyo, niwoko ti hiiho siivalinghaaya miloko kineeraaka koomole ohoolowanyu." 
Leviticus18:25 Mpakatho elapo yoovaliheya ni Miyo kaattaruxa sootakhalasaya ni elapo yaahaarapheya amakaaya. 
Leviticus18:26 Vaheera nyuwosa mwiiwelele malamulowaaka ni ikanosaka. aYixrayeli ni anamarwa ankhala variyariwanyu ehipakeru itthusene seiyo sa mwiikho. 
Leviticus18:27 Vano itthu sootheene seiyo saapakiwa ni yaale yaamanke mweelaponi nyuwo muhinaaye ni elapo yaavaliheya. 
Leviticus18:28 Nyuwosa mwavaliha elapo, eyo enimoorapheyani nyuwosa ntoko yaarapheyaaya yaawosa yaamankemo nyuwosa muhinaaye." 
Leviticus18:29 Ootheene yaale eneera epake itthu iyo sa mwiikho – awosa ootheene anoomalamalihiwa mmulokonimwaya. 
Leviticus18:30 Mwiiwelele ikanosaka ni muhitthareru sookhovelela sa mwiikho saapakiwa nyuwosa muhinaaye ni muhiivalihe ni seiyo. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu.’” 
Leviticus19:1 Yave aamwerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus19:2 “Mwaleele muthukumano wootheene wa aYixrayeli: ‘Mukhale ootteela niwoko Miyo, Yave Mulukwaanyu, ti Ootteela." 
Leviticus19:3 Khula mutthu a nyuwosa aattittimihe amayawe ni atithawe nitho iSaabadusaka. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Leviticus19:4 Muhitthare miluku soowootha naari muhiipakele miluku sa iyuuma soohaniwa. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Leviticus19:5 Mwaampakelaka Yave yooveleelela murettele, mpake yeeyo weera yaakhuleliwe mweereliwaka nyuwo." 
Leviticus19:6 Eyo ekhuuriwe munihukuni mumveleelaanyu hoye hoye waaxiiye; seiyo sineera sihale mpaka nihuku nanaararu sihisiweke. 
Leviticus19:7 Sakhalaru sa seiyo sineera sikhuuriwe vanihukuni nanaararu, sinookhala soohitteela ni khasaakhuleleya." 
Leviticus19:8 Yoowo aneera akhuure seiyo onoohaawa mootakhalanimwawe niwoko ooveiha yeeyo eri yootteela wa Yave; mutthu owo onoomalamalihiwa mmulokonimwawe. 
Leviticus19:9 Nyuwosa mwaahephaka mmattamwanyu, muhihephe mpaka mukotihenraanyu olima naari muhittottattotte simmoramora sa ohephawanyu." 
Leviticus19:10 Muhihephe emattaanyu ya iwuuva* emaara yanaaveeli naari muhittottattotte iwuuva* simmoramora. Munghiyereke oohaawa ni namarwa. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Leviticus19:11 Muhiiye, muhoothe; muhilokotthane." 
Leviticus19:12 Muhilipele moota woolokotheya mwa Nsinanaka muveihaka hiiho Nsina na Mulukwaanyu. Miyo ti Yave. 
Leviticus19:13 Muhimuhooxe mukhwiinyu naari muhimwiiyere. Muliveke nlivo na namuteko onaakhela vanihukuni muhimpisihereke mpaka waaxiiye. 
Leviticus19:14 Muhimulaphe oohiiwa hoye hoye muhimwiikaathere nluku nninkwakwathula oohoona, mene mmoove Mulukwaanyu. Miyo ti Yave." 
Leviticus19:15 Muhivirikanyihe ekhaikhai mwaathorihaka, muhimuthorihele oohaawa ni nthalu naari muhaathorihele asitokweene ni nthalu, mene munthorihele mukhwiinyu ni ekhaikhai." 
Leviticus19:16 Muhimwaramwaxe soowaapa eriyari ya mulokwaanyu. Muhipakeru etthu enoopopiha okumi wa mukhwiinyu. Miyo ti Yave. 
Leviticus19:17 Muhimuthanye munninyu mmurimanimwanyu. Munghiihe mwaattamwanaanyu mweekhaikhaiyini weera muhikhalanetho nthowa. 
Leviticus19:18 Muhaasaase wiinlela ikukuttula naari muhimunyoonyeriwe mukina a mulokwaanyu, vaheera munsivele mukhwiinyu ntoko muniisivelaanyu. Miyo ti Yave." 
Leviticus19:19 Mwiiwelele ikanosaka. Muhaathelanyihe axinama oovirikana. Muhaale izo nyoota miili mmattamwanyu. Muhiware ekuwo yoovaxavaxiwa. 
Leviticus19:20 Mulopwana akonano epottha ethiyana etthomeriwe ni mulopwana mukina, mene ehoopoliwe hata ehitapuxiwe, vano attaruxiweke moota ontthuneyaaya. Vaheera awosa ehiiviwe, niwoko epottha eyo khayaatapuxiwe." 
Leviticus19:21 Wa soothesene mulopwana owo amuruuheleke Yave napunci vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano ntoko yooveleelela nthowa. 
Leviticus19:22 Musaserdoti* amukuxeke napunci a yooveleelela nthowa amurehererelaka wiiwanana ni Yave vamaithoni wa Yoowo mwa yoottheka opankaawe, ni yootthekaawe enooleveleliwa." 
Leviticus19:23 Mwaavolowaka mweelaponi, munaphatteya wakhalaru mwiri wa soowiima, moonele weera soowiimasaya ti soohitthuniheriwa. Moonele seiyo ntoko soohitthuniheriwa wa iyaakha tthaaru; iyo sihiciweru." 
Leviticus19:24 Vayaakhani yanaaxexe soowiimasaya sootheene sinookhala sootteela; sooveleela sa omuttottopela Yave. 
Leviticus19:25 Vaheera vayaakhani yanaathanu muceeke soowiimasaya. Moota hiiho soohephasanyu sinimwaandyerereya. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Leviticus19:26 Muhikhuureru enama ni ephome. Muhaase ihako hoye hoye itthu sa okhwiri. 
Leviticus19:27 Muhicemele hata muhicemelele ireru. 
Leviticus19:28 Muhiithikilase niwoko na anamakhwa naari muhiipophe. Miyo ti Yave. 
Leviticus19:29 Muhimuverule mwaninyu muthiyana muntatuxaka puuta niwoko hiiho elapo enoohokoleela opuuta, esareyakano sootakhala." 
Leviticus19:30 Muthokorore iSaabadusaka ni muttittimihe Nipuronaka Nootteela*. Miyo ti Yave. 
Leviticus19:31 Muhiwaasaaseru yaale anaahera ihako hoye hoye anuuluma ni anamakhwa, niwoko munoovalihiwa ni yaawosa. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu." 
Leviticus19:32 Ngweemelele anamuuluvala ni mwaattittimihe asitokweene a muloko; mmoove Mulukwaanyu. Miyo ti Yave. 
Leviticus19:33 Namarwa aakhalaka mweelaponimwanyu, muhimuhasule." 
Leviticus19:34 Namarwa onkhala ni nyuwosa mmoonelekemo ntoko muYixrayeli. Munsivele ntoko muniisivelaanyu niwoko mwaari anamarwa wExipitu. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Leviticus19:35 Mwaaphimaka orakama, olemela hoye hoye waattawaya, mvarele muteko muringo wa ekhaikhai." 
Leviticus19:36 Mvareleke muteko miringo sa ekhaikhai mwaaphimaka soolemela sa irooro, mpaka sa maahi maahi. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu kookhumihaleni wExipitu." 
Leviticus19:37 Mwiiwelele ikanosaka sootheene ni malamulowaaka ootheene ni mutthareke yaawo. Miyo ti Yave.’” 
Leviticus20:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus20:2 “Mwaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Khula muYixrayeli hoye hoye namarwa onkhala oYixrayeli mwa yoowo aneera amwinnyerere mmoha a anamwanaawe wa Molekhi, iiviweke. Muloko wa mweelaponi omvonyeke maluku." 
Leviticus20:3 Miyo kinoothatuwa Mwiittana a mulopwana owo ni kinoommalamaliha mmulokonimwawe, niwoko oowinnyerera anamwanaawe Molekhi, avalihaka Nipuronaka Nootteela* ni aramusaka Nsinanaka Nootteela." 
Leviticus20:4 Vano muloko waahipwattha mulopwana owo aamwinnyereraka mmoha wa anamwanaawe wa Molekhi ohinamuthorihela okhwa," 
Leviticus20:5 Miyo kinoothatuwa Mwiittana a mulopwana owo ni emusaawe ni kinoommalamaliha mmulokonimwawe owo ni ootheene animutthara ntoko mapuuta a Molekhi. 
Leviticus20:6 Miyo kinoothatuwa Mwiittana a mulopwana yoowo onaahera ihako hoye hoye onuuluma ni anamakhwa. Yoole ompaka hiiho onoothatuwa puuta ni Miyo kinoommalamaliha mmulokonimwawe. 
Leviticus20:7 Mwiitteelihe ni mukhaleke ootteela, niwoko Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu." 
Leviticus20:8 Mwiiwelele ikanosaka ni mutthare. Miyo ti Yave kinootteelihani. 
Leviticus20:9 Mukina aneera aalaphe atithawe hoye hoye amayawe, iiviweke. Woowaalapha atithawe hoye hoye amayawe, oophwanela okhwa." 
Leviticus20:10 Mulopwana araruwa ni mwaara a mukina – mwaara a mukhwaawe – ooweeli awosa yiiviweke. 
Leviticus20:11 Mulopwana aakonano amwaaraya atithawe, owo ohaaveiha atithawe. Mulopwana ni muthiyana owo yiiviweke, niwoko aaphwanela okhwa." 
Leviticus20:12 Mulopwana amukonano mwaara a mwanawe mulopwana, ooweeli awo yiiviweke. Yeeyo apankaaya ti yoonanaraxa; awosa aaphwanela okhwa." 
Leviticus20:13 Asilopwana yakonihana ntoko onkonaneliwaawe muthiyana, ooweeli aapaka yeeyo eri ya mwiikho. Awosa yiiviweke; aaphwanela okhwa." 
Leviticus20:14 Mulopwana amwaatteya mwaana ni amayawe, ti yoonanara. Owo vamoha ni yaawosa ehisiweke weera sihikhaletho sootakhala variyariwanyu." 
Leviticus20:15 Mulopwana amukonano mwaamunama, owo iiviweke ni ontthuneya nyuwosa omwiivatho mwaamunama." 
Leviticus20:16 Muthiyana amwaattamela mwaamunama weera amukoneno, mmwiive muthiyana nitho mwaamunama; awosa yiiviweke niwoko aaphwanela okhwa." 
Leviticus20:17 Mulopwana amuthela murokoriye, mwaana muthiyana a atithawe hoye hoye amayawe ni amukonano, ti ya mwiikho. Awosa emalamalihiweke vamaithoni wa mulokwaaya. Owo oomveiha murokoriye ni onoohaawa mwa sootakhalasawe." 
Leviticus20:18 Mulopwana amukonano muthiyana mweehuhuni ya mpingwaawe, ooweeli awosa aakhalano nthowa na ohoonelamo oyeeheya wa ephomaawe; tivawo ooweeli emalamalihiweke mmulokonimwaya." 
Leviticus20:19 Muhimukoneno munnaya amayinyu hoye hoye murokoraya atithinyu, niwoko eyo enooveiha emusi xaxaxa; ooweeli nyuwosa munoohaawa mwa sootakhalasanyu." 
Leviticus20:20 Mulopwana aakonano amwaaraya atatawe, ohaaveiha atatawe. Awosa anoohaawa mwa sootakhalasaya ni animookhwa ehiyanre." 
Leviticus20:21 Mulopwana amuthela mwaara a munneiye, ti etthu yoohitteela; owo oomuveiha munniye. Awosa kheeyarasa." 
Leviticus20:22 Mwiiwelele ikanosaka ni malamulowaaka ootheene ni mutthare weera elapo kinooronghaakani ehoorapheyeni. 
Leviticus20:23 Muhitthare ikhovelelo sa miloko seiyo kineeraaka koomole ohoolowanyu. Woopaka itthusene seiyo sa mwiikho, koothanya miloko iyo." 
Leviticus20:24 Vaheera kaaweerelani: “Munookuxa elapwaaya; kinimoovahani ntoko yoohiyeriwa; elapo yoosareya mukaka ni oravo.” Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu koothanlaleni eriyari ya miloko. 
Leviticus20:25 Tivawo ontthuneyaaya weera nyuwo mwaakawanyihe axinama ootteela ni oohitteela ni ipalame sootteela ni soohitteela. Muhiivalihe ni axinama hoye hoye ipalame, naari yakhalaru yoopattuxiwa eniipurula ni ennyongolowa mwa seiyo kookawanyihenraakani niwoko na ohitteelawaya." 
Leviticus20:26 Nyuwosa mukhaleke ootteela wa Miyo, niwoko Miyo, Yave, ti Ootteela ni kohoomwaramwaxani eriyari ya miloko weera mukhale mulokwaaka." 
Leviticus20:27 Alopwana hoye hoye athiyana variyariwanyu anaahera ihako hoye hoye anuuluma ni anamakhwa, yiiviweke. Awosa evonyiweke maluku – awosa aaphwanela okhwa.’”" 
Leviticus21:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mwaaleele ha asaserdoti*, anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni: ‘Musaserdoti* ahithatuwe oohitteela niwoko na mukina a mulokwaawe aneera akhwe," 
Leviticus21:2 ohikhanle mwaha wa mmusaawe xaxaxa ntoko amayawe, atithawe, mwanawe mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana, munneiye," 
Leviticus21:3 hoye hoye murokoriye oowiikosoopa, oohitheliwa, onkhaviheriwa ni musaserdoteene yoowo. Owo ti anaamutatuxe oohitteela." 
Leviticus21:4 Musaserdoti* ahithatuwe oohitteela, iivalihaka mwaha wa otheliwa wa mmusi." 
Leviticus21:5 Asaserdoti* ehicemele naari ehicemelele ireru, hata ehiithikilase." 
Leviticus21:6 Asaserdoti* ekhaleke ootteela wa Mulukwaaya ehiveihaka Nsina na Mulukwaaya. Awosa ekhaleke ootteela, niwoko ampaka soomveleelela Yave soorehereriwe vayikho; sooveleela siri sooca wa Mulukwaaya." 
Leviticus21:7 Awosa ehimutheleke puuta, mwaamwali oohiikosoopa hoye hoye muthiyana omwalanne ni aiyawe, niwoko asaserdoti* ekhaleke ootteela wa Mulukwaaya." 
Leviticus21:8 Mmoonele okhala ootteela, niwoko awosa anreherera sooca sa Mulukwaanyu. Mmoonele okhala ootteela, niwoko Miyo, Yave kinootteelihani, kiri ootteela." 
Leviticus21:9 Mwaana muthiyana a musaserdoti* iiveiha athatuwaka puuta, owo onaaveiha atithawe; ahisiweke mpaka okhwa." 
Leviticus21:10 Mutokweene a asaserdoti*, mulopwana yoole eriyari ya axunneiye mwa yoowo ottikittheliwe makhura mmurumwawe ni okhalihiwe weera aware ikuwo sa esaserdoti aheette ni mayihi capurukhwa hata ahaahule ikuwosawe ooniheraka wiinanela." 
Leviticus21:11 Owo ahivolowe oraayamo muttembo. Ahiitatuxe oohitteela – naari mwaha wa atithawe hoye hoye amayawe," 
Leviticus21:12 hata ahihiye Nipuro Nootteela* na Mulukwaawe hoye hoye ahiveihe nno, niwoko owo ootteeliheriwa ni makhura oottikitthelano wa Mulukwaawe. Miyo ti Yave." 
Leviticus21:13 Muthiyana aneeraawe amuthele akhaleke oowiikosoopa. 
Leviticus21:14 Owo ahimuthele naamukhweli, muthiyana omwalanne hoye hoye muthiyana oohiikosoopa, hata puuta, mene akhaleke mwaamwali oowiikosoopa a mulokwaawe" 
Leviticus21:15 weera ahiveihe ekhapiraawe eriyari ya mulokwaawe. Miyo ti Yave kinimutteeliha. 
Leviticus21:16 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus21:17 “Mwamuleele Aharoni: ‘Wa ikhapira sootheene sa muhoolo ahikhaleru a mukhapiranimwanyu orakanle aneera aruuhe yooveleela eri yooca Yave Mulukwaanyu.
