Leviticus21:18 Ahikhaleru mulopwana orakanle anaakhuveele: akhalaka oohoona, ooheetta, orino ekhove yoorakala hoye hoye naari erutthu yoovirikana;" 
Leviticus21:19 mulopwana orino ntata hoye hoye nnaawo noorakala," 
Leviticus21:20 hoye hoye orino namaangara hoye hoye ookhuveyaxa, naari eevaasi, hata orino ithuku sootathareya naari oniittheya hoye hoye orino ikhapwembwe." 
Leviticus21:21 Ahikhaleru mulopwana oorakala a ekhapira ya Aharoni, musaserdoti*, aneera amwaattamele Yave weera ampakele sooveleela soorehereriwa vayikho. Owo ti oorakala; ahimuruuheleru Mulukwaawe." 
Leviticus21:22 Owo aceeke yooca yootteelaxa ya Mulukwaawe nitho yooca yootteela ekina. 
Leviticus21:23 Vaheera, niwoko na orakalawawe, ahaattamele eluttu hoye hoye altaari* weera ahiveihe Nipuronaka Nootteela*. Miyo ti Yave kinaatteeliha.’”" 
Leviticus21:24 Vano Moisesi aamuthalihera itthu seiya Aharoni, anamwanaawe nitho aYixrayeli ootheene." 
Leviticus22:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus22:2 “Mwamuleele Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana weera ettittimihe sooveleela sootteela aYixrayeli ankitteeliheraaya esembaka oveiha Nsinanaka Nootteela. Miyo ti Yave. 
Leviticus22:3 Mwawooperere: Wa ikhapira sootheene sa muhoolo, mukina a ekhapiraawe akhala oohitteela aakhuveelaka sooveleela sootteela aYixrayeli animutteeliheraaya Yave, mulopwana owo amalamalihiwe vamaithoniwaka. Miyo ti Yave." 
Leviticus22:4 Ahikhaleru a ekhapira ya Aharoni orino makokho hoye hoye enimukhuma ephome, aneera ace yooveleela yootteela mpaka aneeraawe atteelihiwe. Owo onookhalatho oohitteela atava etthu yookhwa hoye hoye ni yamukhuma elopwana," 
Leviticus22:5 naari atava yakhalaru yoopattuxiwa hata akhalaru mutthu aneera amutatuxe oohitteela ni wakhalaru moota wa ohitteela. 
Leviticus22:6 Yoowo aneera atave itthusene seiyo onookhala oohitteela mpaka oxekuwa. Owo ahice yooveleela yootteela ahirampe. 
Leviticus22:7 Wiilaleene, onookhala ootteela ni vahoolowaya aceeke yooveleela yootteela, niwoko ti yoocaawe." 
Leviticus22:8 Owo ahimukhuuretho mwaamunama oovettuliwa hoye hoye oonyaanyiwa ni axinama a ntuphini athatuwaka hiiho oohitteela mwa seiyo. Miyo ti Yave. 
Leviticus22:9 Asaserdoti* yiiweleleke ikanosaka weera ehikhalane nthowa ekhwaaka niwoko na oramusa seiyo. Miyo ti Yave kinaatteeliha. 
Leviticus22:10 Aceeke paahi musaserdoti* ni emusaawe yooveleela yootteela; muletto a musaserdoti* hoye hoye namutekwaawe ahiceekeru. 
Leviticus22:11 Vaheera musaserdoti* athuma epottha hoye hoye epottha yaayareliwa vaatevawe, epottheene yeeyo eceeke yoocaawe." 
Leviticus22:12 Mwaana muthiyana a musaserdoti* atheliwa ni mulopwana oohikhala musaserdoti*, vano awosa ehice yooveleela yootteela." 
Leviticus22:13 Vaheera mwaana muthiyana a musaserdoti* akhala naamukhweli hoye hoye amwalana ahiyanre, anahokoleela vaate wa atithawe ntoko aakhalaawe mweehuhuni ya emwalaawe, owo aceeke yooca ya atithawe. Ahiceru mutthu mukina." 
Leviticus22:14 Mukina aca woohilakela yooveleela yootteelihiwa, owo aliveleke yooveleela ya musaserdoti* ni aandyeereretho mpatta wanaathanu wa ociiyaawe." 
Leviticus22:15 Asaserdoti* ehiveihe sooveleela sootteela aYixrayeli animuruuhelaaya Yave," 
Leviticus22:16 yaatthuniheraka oca sooveleelasene seiyo, yaaruuhelaka nthowa ninnyesereriwa oreherera. Miyo ti Yave kinaatteeliha.”" 
Leviticus22:17 Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi: 
Leviticus22:18 “Mwamuleele Aharoni, anamwanaawe asilopwana ni aYixrayeli ootheene: ‘Akhala mukina a nyuwosa, akhalaka muYixrayeli hoye hoye namarwa onkhala oYixrayeli, aruuha yoomveleelela Yave ntoko yoohisa, hata ekhalaka yooveleela yookwanihera nlipelo hoye hoye yooveleela ya otthunawawe paahi," 
Leviticus22:19 vano mulopwana owo amuruuheke mwaamunama mulopwana oohirakala a imombe, ikhondoolo hoye hoye ipuri weera aakhuleliwe mwaha wa nyuwo." 
Leviticus22:20 Muhimuruuheru mwaamunama oorakala niwoko khamwaakhuleleliwa mwaha wa nyuwo. 
Leviticus22:21 Mukina aamuruuhaka mwaamunana a emombe, hoye hoye a muhuwo wa ikhondoolo ntoko yooveleelela murettele wa Yave weera akwanihere nlipelo hoye hoye niwoko na otthunawawe, vano eyo ekhale yoohirakala ni yookwanela weera yaakhuleliwe." 
Leviticus22:22 Muhimupakele Yave yooveleela ya mwaamunana oohoona, oovulalihiwa naari oorakala, ookwituwa mwetto, hata oovoreyeya oosareya makhwatta a ithuku hoye hoye ookhuma marohi. Muhimwiikaathiru valtaarini* ntoko yoomveleelela Yave yoorehereriwa vayikho." 
Leviticus22:23 Wa soothesene ontthuniheriwa opaka yooveleela ya otthunawanyu ya emombe elopwana hoye hoye ekhondoolo yoorakala hoye hoye yootuthunya, mene eyo khayaakhuleliwa mwaakwaniheraka nlipelo." 
Leviticus22:24 Muhimupakele Yave yooveleela ya mwaamunama orino ikhete soorakala, soonyaanyeya, soophweeya hoye hoye soothikiliwa. Muhipake yeeyo mweelaponimwanyu," 
Leviticus22:25 hata muhiwaakhele axinama ntoko awo mwa anamarwa weera mwaavahe ntoko yaawo ntoko yooca wa Mulukwaanyu. Awosa khamwaakhuleleliwa niwoko ti oohikwanela ni oorakala. 
Leviticus22:26 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus22:27 “Aayariwaka mwaamombe, eputtiputthi hoye hoye mwaapuri, owo akhaleke mahuku mathannameeli ni naangolo. Okhuma nihuku nanaathannamararu wookela ohoolo onimwaakhuleliwa ntoko yoomveleelela Yave yoorehereriwa vayikho." 
Leviticus22:28 Muhiive emombe, ekhondoolo, naari epuri ethiyana vamoha ni axaanaaya nihuku nimoha." 
Leviticus22:29 Mwaampakelaka Yave yooveleela ya otthapela, mpake yooveleeleene yeeyo moota wooweera mwaakhuleleliwe." 
Leviticus22:30 Eyo ekhuuriweke nihuku nenenenno; muhihiyeru mpaka waaxiiye. Miyo ti Yave. 
Leviticus22:31 Mwiiwelele malamulowaaka ni mutthare yaawo. Miyo ti Yave. 
Leviticus22:32 Muhiveihe Nsinanaka Nootteela. Miyo kinoosuweliwa ntoko Ootteela ni aYixrayeli. Miyo ti Yave kinootteelihani 
Leviticus22:33 ni kookhumihaleni wExipitu weera kikhale Mulukwaanyu. Miyo ti Yave.” 
Leviticus23:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus23:2 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Ifestasaka, ifesta sithanliwe ni Yave muneeraanyu mulaleiyeke ntoko mithukumano sootteela, ti iya:" 
Leviticus23:3 Aakhala mahuku mathannamosa oovaraanyu muteko, mene nihuku nanaathannameeli ti eSaabadu ya wiitthuuwa, nihuku na muthukumano wootteela. Muhivareru muteko wakhalaru muneeraanyu mukhalewo; ti eSaabadu wa Yave." 
Leviticus23:4 Ifesta sithanliwe sa Yave, mithukumano sootteela muneeraanyu mulaleiye mweehuhunimwaya ti iya:" 
Leviticus23:5 mPaska* a Yave ompacera mweehuhuni ya wiila vanihukuni nanaamuloko nimaxexe na mweeri woopacera. 
Leviticus23:6 Vanihukuni nanaamuloko nimathanu na mweereene yoowo empacera efesta ya Yave, efesta ya ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu; wa mahuku mathannameeli muceeke ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu." 
Leviticus23:7 Vanihukuni noopacera mpakeke muthukumano wootteela ni muhivareru muteko. 
Leviticus23:8 Mumpakele Yave sooveleela soorehereriwa vayikho wa mahuku mathannameeli ni vanihukuni nanaathannameeli, mpakeke muthukumano wootteela ni muhivareru muteko." 
Leviticus23:9 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus23:10 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Nyuwosa mwaavolowaka mweelaponi kineeraaka koovaheeni ni mwaahephaka, munruuhele musaserdoti* ehupu ya etrigu yoopacera muneeraanyu muhephe." 
Leviticus23:11 Owo iinainihere ehupu eyo ohoolo wa Yave weera mwaakhuleleliwe; musaserdoti* iinainihere ehupu eyo waaxiiye eSaabadu. 
Leviticus23:12 Nihuku musaserdoti* aneeraawe iinainihe ehupu, mumpakele Yave yooveleela yoohisa ya eputtiputthi erino eyaakha emoha ni yoohirakala." 
Leviticus23:13 Mumveleeleletho Yave yooveleela ya irooro ya ikiilu* ixexe ya ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura yoorehereriwa vayikho, yoowunkhela yooreeraxa nitho yooveleela yoowura ya eliitru* emoha ya eviinyu." 
Leviticus23:14 Muhiceru yooca naari erooro yoowaarikiwa hata ekithi mpaka nihuku nenenenno muneeraanyu munruuhele yooveleela eyo Mulukwaanyu. Nna nikhaleke nlamulo noohimala wa ikhapirasanyu sootheene nakhalaru nipuro muneeraanyu mmake. 
Leviticus23:15 Okhuma waaxiiye eSaabadu, nihuku nenenenno muneeraanyu muruuhe ehupu ya yooveleela yoowiinainihera, mwaalikeleleke isimana ithannapiili sookwanelasene." 
Leviticus23:16 Mwaalikelele mahuku miloko mithanu mpaka waaxiiye eSaabadu yanaathannapiili ni vano mumveleelele Yave yooveleela ya erooro enyowani. 
Leviticus23:17 Muneeraanyu mmakeru, murwaaneke owaani ipaawu piili soopakiwa ni eferementu ya ikiilu* ixexe sa ephepa yooreerela soowooxiwa ntoko yooveleela yoowiinainihera ya soowiima soopacera wa Yave." 
Leviticus23:18 Mveleele vamoha ni ipaawusene seiyo iputtiputthi ithannapiili ilopwana, khula eputtaputthi ya eyaakha emoha ni yoohirakala, mwaamombe mulopwana mmoha ni anapunci eeli. Iyo nsikhale soomveleelela Yave soohisa vamoha ni sooveleelasaya sa irooro ni soowura – sooveleela soorehereriwa vayikho, soowunkhelaxa sinimusiveliha Yave." 
Leviticus23:19 Vahoolowaya mmwiive napunci mmoha ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka ni iputtiputthi piili, khula eputtiputthi ya eyaakha emoha, ntoko yooveleelela murettele." 
Leviticus23:20 Musaserdoti* iinainihere vamaithoni wa Yave iputtiputthi piili iyo ntoko yooveleela yoowiinainihera vamoha ni ipaawu sa soowiima soopacera. Eyo ti yooveleela yootteela wa Yave ni ti sa musaserdoti*. 
Leviticus23:21 Nihuku nenenenno mpakeke muthukumano wootteela ni muhivareru muteko. Nna nikhaleke nlamulo noohimala wa ikhapirasanyu sootheene nakhalaru nipuro muneeraanyu mmake. 
Leviticus23:22 Nyuwosa mwaahephaka mmattamwanyu, muhiphiye mmakoteloni hata muhittottattotte simmoramora mwaahephaka. Mwaahiyere oohaawa ni anamarwa. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu." 
Leviticus23:23 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus23:24 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Vanihukuni noopacera na mweeri wanaathannamiili nikhaleke nihuku noowiitthuuwa, muthukumano wootteela opakiweke ni oruma wa mapalapatta." 
Leviticus23:25 Muhivareru muteko, mene mumveleelele Yave yooveleela yoorehereriwa vayikho." 
Leviticus23:26 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus23:27 Nihuku nanaamuloko na mweeri wanaathannamiili ti nihuku na orehererela wiiwanana ni Yave. Mpakeke muthukumano wootteela, mwiiyevihe ni mumveleelele Yave yooveleela yoorehereriwa vayikho." 
Leviticus23:28 Muhivare muteko vanihukuni nenenenno, niwoko ti nihuku na orehererela wiiwananawanyu ohoolo wa Yave Mulukwaanyu." 
Leviticus23:29 Yoowo aneera ahiiyevihe vanihukuni nenenenno onoomalamalihiwa mmulokonimwawe. 
Leviticus23:30 Kinoomphwata eriyari ya mulokwaawe yoowo aneera avare muteko vanihukuni nenenenno. 
Leviticus23:31 Muhivareru muteko. Nna nikhale nlamulo noohimala wa ikhapirasanyu sootheene mmapuroni ootheene muneeraanyu mukhale. 
Leviticus23:32 Ti eSaabadu ya wiitthuuwa wa nyuwo ni muntthuneya wiiyeviha. Okhuma oxekuwa wa nihuku nanaathannamaxexe na mweeri owo mpaka oxekuwa wa waaxiiye muntthuneya ottittimiha eSaabadu eyo. 
Leviticus23:33 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus23:34 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: “Vanihukuni nanaamuloko ni mathanu na mweeri wanaathannamiili efesta ya mmikotthani wa Yave epacereke ni eyo epwaherereke wa mahuku mathannameeli. 
Leviticus23:35 Nihuku noopacera okhaleke muthukumano wootteela; muhivareru muteko. 
Leviticus23:36 Mumveleelele Yave sooveleela soorehereriwa vayikho ni vanihukuni nanaathannamararu mpake muthukumano wootteela ni mumveleelele Yave yooveleela yoorehereriwa vayikho. Ti muthukumano woottittimiheya; muhivareru muteko. 
Leviticus23:37 Iya ti ifesta sikhalihiwe ni Yave sintthuneya olaleiya ntoko mithukumano sootteela weera aruuheliwe Yave sooveleela soorehereriwa vayikho – sooveleela soohisa ni sa etrigu; sooveleela sikina ni soovaha sooyeehiwa soonyesererihiwa wa khula nihuku. 
Leviticus23:38 Ohiya toko sooveleela seiyo, sookhalatho seiyo sa iSaabadu sa Yave, soovahasanyu, ni sakhalaru seiyo muroromelinghaanyu nitho sa otthunawanyu munimvahaanyu Yave." 
Leviticus23:39 Hiiho naapaceraka vanihukuni nanaamuloko ni mathanu na mweeri wanaathannamiili muhempheene sootheene muruwenraanyu, mumpakele efesta Yave wa mahuku mathannameeli; nihuku noopacera ni nanaathannamararu ekhaleketho a wiitthuuwa." 
Leviticus23:40 Vanihukuni noopacera murukuleke soowiima sooreerela sa nyiri, makukhu a mavare, iphandi soopombaxa sa isalgeru* ni muhakalale vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaanyu wa mahuku mathannameeli." 
Leviticus23:41 Mpake yeeyo ntoko efesta wa Yave wa mahuku mathannameeli a iyaakha sootheene. Nna nikhale nlamulo noohimala wa ikhapirasanyu sootheene mmapuroni ootheene muneeraanyu mukhale. Mpake efesta ela mmweerini wanaathannamiili. 
Leviticus23:42 Mukhaleke mmikotthani wa mahuku mathannameeli. aYixrayeli ootheene ekhaleke mmikotthani 
Leviticus23:43 weera ikhapirasanyu sisuwele weera Miyo kaahaapakiha aYixrayeli okhala mmikotthani kaakhumihaleene wExipitu. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu.’” 
Leviticus23:44 Vano Moisesi ahaalaleera aYixrayeli ifesta aakhalihalaawe Yave. 
Leviticus24:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus24:2 “Mwaalamule aYixrayeli weera yooruuheleni makhura ooreera a sooliveira* oowaamiwa yeereliwaka omwaleelela weera onyaari okhaleke epattelo. 
Leviticus24:3 Omokoni wa eluttu ya Namoona, Muheemani mwa Muthukumano, Aharoni apwaherereke opattiha onyaari ohoolo wa Yave ekhumelo woosiilo mpaka oxa. Nna nikhale nlamulo noohimala wa ikhapirasanyu sootheene mmapuroni ootheene muneeraanyu mukhale." 
Leviticus24:4 Onyaari orino nyetto sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera onkhala ohoolo wa Yave okhaleke epattelo. 
Leviticus24:5 Mukuxe ephepa yooxiliwa nnenesene ni mpake ipaawu muloko ni piili, muvarelaka muteko ikiilu* ixexe wa khula epaawu." 
Leviticus24:6 Muthateke mmiserani miili; khula musera ipaawu ithannamosa, vameesa a eyuuma yooreeraxa vamaithoni wa Yave." 
Leviticus24:7 Muhele erubani* yootteela khula musera ntoko mpatta woowuupuwelela vanipuroni na ipaawu ni weera ekhale yooveleela yoomurehererela vayikho Yave. 
Leviticus24:8 Ipaawu iyo sireherereliweke Yave khula eSaabadu yeereliwaka aYixrayeli ntoko wiiraana woohimala. 
Leviticus24:9 Iyo ti sa Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana mwa yaawo eneera eceleke vaNipuroni Nootteela*, niwoko ti mpatta wootteelaxa wa mipattasaya sa khula nihuku sa sooveleela soomurehererela vayikho Yave. Ti ekano yoohimala.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Vano, mwaana mulopwana a muYixrayeli muthiyana ni ngwExipitu mulopwana aarowa eriyari ya aYixrayeli ni waakonelingwe waakhala munyakunyaku owo ni muYixrayeli." 
Leviticus24:11 Mwaana mulopwana a muYixrayeli muthiyana owo aaveiha Nsina na Yave ni nlapho; tivawo yaamuronghenlaaya Moisesi. Nsina na amayawe naari Xelomiti, mwaana muthiyana a Dibri, muDani." 
Leviticus24:12 Yaamutthuka mpaka yeeraaya yaakhele otthuna wa Yave mwaha wa yoowo. 
Leviticus24:13 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus24:14 “Munkhumihere vaate wa okonelingwe. Ootheene yaawo amwiiwale emwiikaathereke matata vamuruwawe ni muthukumano wootheene omvonyeke maluku. 
Leviticus24:15 Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Akhala mukina aneera amulaphe Mulukwaawe, onookhalano nthowa na yootthekaawe;" 
Leviticus24:16 ootheene anlapha Nsina na Yave yiiviweke. Muthukumano wootheene omvonyeke maluku. Okhuma neethi mpaka namarwa – alapha Nsina na Yave, iiviweke." 
Leviticus24:17 Akhala mutthu aneera amwiive mukina, owo iiviweke." 
Leviticus24:18 Yoole aneera amwiive mwaamunama a mukina amulivanyiheke – okumi mwa okumi. 
Leviticus24:19 Mukina amvulaliha mukhwaawe, anamurakaliha, apakiweke moota yoowo opankaawe:" 
Leviticus24:20 nikhwatta nnikhwatta; niitho nniitho; niino nniino; mooteene yoowo omvulalihalaawe mukina amurakalihaka, hiihotho owo avulalihiweke." 
Leviticus24:21 Yoole aneera amwiive mwaamunama amulivanyiheke, vaheera yoole aneera amwiive mutthu, iiviweke." 
Leviticus24:22 Malamulo ala ti wa namarwa nitho muYixrayeli. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu.’” 
Leviticus24:23 Vano Moisesi uulumaleene ni aYixrayeli, awosa yaamukhumihera vaate namalapha owo, enamvonya maluku. aYixrayeli yaapaka yeeyo Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Leviticus25:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi vamwaako oSinayi: 
Leviticus25:2 “Mwaaleele ha aYixrayeli: ‘Mwaavolowaka mweelaponi Miyo kineeraaka koovaheeni, elapweene yeeyo emuttittimihereleke Yave eSaabadu." 
Leviticus25:3 Wa iyaakha ithannamosa mwaaleke mmattamwanyu, mukwasereke iwuuvasanyu ni muhepheke mwaanlaanyu." 
Leviticus25:4 Vaheera vayaakhani yanaathannapiili elapo ekhalaneke eSaabadu yoowiitthuuwa, emuttittimiherelaka Yave. Muhaale imattasanyu naari muhikwasere iwuuvasanyu." 
Leviticus25:5 Muhihephe soomorela naari iwuuva* sa imatta sihikwaseriwe. Elapo ekhalaneke eyaakha yoowiitthuuwa. 
Leviticus25:6 Nyuwosa muceeke yeeyo eniiruwere elapo eyaakheeneeyo – nyuwosa, epotthaanyu elopwana ni ethiyana, namuteko onliviwa ni namavira onkhala eriyaraanyu," 
Leviticus25:7 nitho mihuwosanyu, axinama a ntuphini a elapwaanyu. Sootheene eneeraaya eruwere elapo siciweke." 
Leviticus25:8 Mwaalikele iyaakha sa iSaabadu ithannapiili, eyo tiiyo ithannapiili sa iyaakha ithannapiili, opwexerera ti iyaakha miloko mixexe niithanniixexe." 
Leviticus25:9 Vano mulamule weera yiipiwe mapalapatta vanihukuni nanaamuloko na mweeri wanaathannamiili; vanihukuni na orehererela wiiwanana ni Yave mwiipe mweelaponimwanyu moothemwene. 
Leviticus25:10 Mutteelihe eyaakha yanaamiloko mithanu ni mwaalaleere mweelaponi moothemwene otapuxeyawaya amaki. Wa nyuwosa eniikhale ehuhu ya otthapa, khula mutthu a nyuwo ahokoleelaka owannyawe mweemusinimwawe ni munihimonimwawe." 
Leviticus25:11 Eyaakha yanaamiloko mithanu eniyookhaleleni ya otthapa; muhaale naari muhihephe soomorela hata iwuuva* sa imattasanyu soohikwaseriwa. 
Leviticus25:12 Vano ti eyaakha ya otthapa ni yookhalelekeni yootteela; muceeke paahi enruweraaya elapo. 
Leviticus25:13 Muyaakhani eyo ya otthapa khula mutthu ahokoleele owannyawe. 
Leviticus25:14 Mwamuthumihera ettimaanyu mukhwiinyu hoye hoye mwathuma yawawe, mpakelaneke ekhaikhai." 
Leviticus25:15 Munthumihere mukhwiinyu mwaalikelelaka okhuma Eyaakha ya Otthapa. Vano owo athumiheke aalikelelaka iyaakha sihanle sa ohepha. 
Leviticus25:16 Saatta iyaakha, mwaandyeerereke mutteengo, vaheera sayeva mvukuleke mutteengo niwoko vekhaikhai yeeyo owo onoothumiheraaweni ti maattelo a ohepha." 
Leviticus25:17 Mpakelaneke ekhaikhai mmoovaka Mulukwaanyu. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Leviticus25:18 Mutthareke ikanosaka ni mwiiwelele nnenesene malamulowaaka ni munookhala oolipeene mweelaponi. 
Leviticus25:19 Vano elapo enimwiimiha soowiimasaya ni munimooca mpaka ovona, mukhalaka oolipeene." 
Leviticus25:20 Apaale munookoha: “Nniceni vayaakhani yanaathannapiili, hiyo nihaanle naari nihihemphe?”" 
Leviticus25:21 Musuwele weera Miyo kinimoorumihelani mareeliho vayaakhani yanaathannamosa moota wooweera elapo enooruwera yookwana iyaakha tthaaru. 
Leviticus25:22 Mwaaphatteyaka vayaakhani yanaathannatthaaru, munimooca nlelo sookonela ni sinoopwaherera mpaka yoohepha ya eyaakha yanaathannaaxexe." 
Leviticus25:23 Elapo ehithumihiwekeru, niwoko eyo ti yawaka ni nyuwosa muri anamarwa ni anamathaamathaama paahi." 
Leviticus25:24 Mweelaponi yootheene munkuxaanyu munootthunihera woopola mweehuhuni yootthuneya. 
Leviticus25:25 Mukina a aYixrayeli ahaawa anathumiha mpatta wa ettimaawe, vano mmusaawe xaxaxa arweeke oopoleke yeeyo othuminghaawe." 
Leviticus25:26 Wa soothesene mutthu aahikhalano oomoopolela ettima, mene owo iisaasa anaphwanya moota woowoopolela," 
Leviticus25:27 owo aalikeleke iyaakha sivinre okhuma othuminghaawe ni ahokoloxeke yoohiyana wa yoole omuthumihenraawe; vahoolowaya akuxeketho. 
Leviticus25:28 Vaheera aahiphwanya moota woowoopolela ettima othumihalaawe, epwaherereke mmatatani mwa namathuma mpaka Eyaakha ya Otthapa. Vayaakhani ya Otthapa ehokoloxiweke ni vano owo aneeraawe akuxeketho." 
Leviticus25:29 Mulopwana athumiha empaawe musidadeni yootekeleliwa, oophwanela woopola mpaka okwanela eyaakha ethumihiweene. Ehuhuweene yeeyo oopoleke." 
Leviticus25:30 Owo aahoopola empeene yeeyo ehinaaye okwanela eyaakha, empa eyo enookhala ya namathuma ni ikhapirasawe wa mahuku ootheene. Eyo kheehokoloxiwa vaYaakhani ya Otthapa." 
Leviticus25:31 Vaheera impa sa mmittettheni soohitekeleliwa sooneliweke okhala sa vanlakani. Iyo soopoliweke ni sihokoloxiweke vaYaakhani ya Otthapa. 
Leviticus25:32 Mwaha wa isidade sa aLeevi, awosa anoophwanela woopola impasaya musidadeni siri sawaya." 
Leviticus25:33 Tivawo impa sa aLeevi sinkhalaaya soowoopoleya – eyo tiiyo empa yoothumihiwa yakhalaru esidadaaya, ontthuneya ohokoloxeriwa vaYaakhani ya Otthapa, niwoko impa sa musidadeni sa aLeevi ti sawaya eriyari ya aYixrayeli." 
Leviticus25:34 Vaheera moocihamo ori mwa isidadesaya ohithumihiwemo; ti sawaya wa mahuku ootheene. 
Leviticus25:35 Mukina a aYixrayeli ahaawa, ahinawera wiiciha, munkhavihere ntoko ompakeliwaawe namarwa hoye hoye namavira weera apwaherere okhala eriyaraanyu." 
Leviticus25:36 Muhimukokoceru woopwaha, mene mmoove Mulukwaanyu weera muYixrayeli owo apwaherere okhala eriyaraanyu." 
Leviticus25:37 Nyuwo mwamukoongoriha musurukhu, owo oolivekeni hiiho ni mwamukoongoriha sooca, owo oohokoloxerekenitho hiiho." 
Leviticus25:38 Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu kookhumihaleni wExipitu weera koovaheeni elapo ya oKanaani ni kikhale Mulukwaanyu. 
Leviticus25:39 muYixrayeli mukina variyariwanyu ahaawa, aniithumiha wa mukina a nyuwo, muhimvarihe muteko ntoko epottha." 
Leviticus25:40 Owo ooneliweke ntoko namuteko ooliviwa hoye hoye namavira; owo oovarelekeni muteko mpaka vaYaakhani ya Otthapa. 
Leviticus25:41 Vahoolowaya owo ni anamwanaawe etapuxiweke ni owo ahokoleeleke opuumbaniwawe ni wa makholowaawe. 
Leviticus25:42 Yeenre aYixrayeli ekhalaka arumeiyaaka Miyo kaakhumihalaaka wExipitu, awosa ehithumihiwe ntoko ipottha." 
Leviticus25:43 Muhaalamule muhaamorelaka ikharari, mene mmoove Mulukwaanyu." 
Leviticus25:44 Ipotthasanyu ilopwana ni ithiyana sikhaleke sa miloko sinkhala mukhwipimwanyu; mwa seiyo muthumeke ipotthasanyu. 
Leviticus25:45 Mwaathumeketho eriyari ya anamavira ankhala eriyaraanyu ni a mahimwaaya ayareliwe mweelaponimwanyu ni awosa anoothatuwa awinyu. 
Leviticus25:46 Muntthuniheriwa waahiyera anamwaniinyu ntoko yoohiyeriwa ni muntthuniheriwa waatatuxa ipottha wa mahuku ootheene, mene mwaha wa aYixrayeli, muhaalamule muhaamorelaka ikharari." 
Leviticus25:47 Namarwa hoye hoye namavira onkhala variyariwanyu athadyireya, ni muYixrayeli mukina ahaawa, aniithumiha wa namarwa, hoye hoye wa mukina onkhala variyariwanyu ori a nihimo na namarwa owo," 
Leviticus25:48 muYixrayeli owo oophwanela woopoliwa naari iithumihaleene. Mmoha a emusaawe amoopoleke: 
Leviticus25:49 atatawe hoye hoye musuluwaawe hoye hoye akhalaru mmusi xaxaxa amoopoleke. Naari owo atadyireiyeene, iixoopoleke." 
Leviticus25:50 Owo ni namathumaawe yaalikeleke ehuhu okhuma eyaakha iithumihalaawe mpaka vaYaakhani ya Otthapa. Mutteengo woowoopolela ottharihiweke ntoko wa namuteko onliviwa ottharihiwaka waatta wa iyaakhasene seiyo aakhanlaawe epottha. 
Leviticus25:51 Sahala iyaakha sincipale mpaka Eyaakha ya Otthapa, owo aliveke mutteengo attharihaka iyaakha sihanle." 
Leviticus25:52 Sahala iyaakha vakhaani mpaka Eyaakha ya Otthapa, owo aalikeleke ni aliveke attharihaka iyaakha sihanle." 
Leviticus25:53 Owo ooneliweke ntoko namuteko onliviwa vayaakhani; mwiipasoope weera pwiiyawe ahimulamule ahimmorelaka ikharari. 
Leviticus25:54 Owo aahoopoliwa ni wakhalaru moota wa seiya, mutthu owo ni anamwanaawe evoloweke ootapuxeyeene vaYaakhani ya Otthapa," 
Leviticus25:55 niwoko aYixrayeli ti arumeiyaaka. Mwa yaawo kaakhumihalaaka wExipitu. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Leviticus26:1 Muhipake miluku soowootha naari muhiipakele icaambulo hoye hoye amarimbu ootteeliheriwaanyu, hata muhiikaathi nluku nookheriwa mulaponimwanyu weera mukokhorele ohoolowaya. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu." 
Leviticus26:2 Muthokorore iSaabadusaka ni muttittimihe Nipuronaka Nootteela*. Miyo ti Yave. 
Leviticus26:3 Nyuwosa mwatthara ikanosaka ni mwiiwelela malamulowaaka," 
Leviticus26:4 kinimoorupihelani epula mweehuhunimwaya ni imatta sinooruwera soohephasaya ni nyiri sa ntuphini soowiimasaya. 
Leviticus26:5 Khaweemeleleya oveera mpaka ohepha wa iwuuva* ni ohepha wa iwuuva* onoopwaherera mpaka ehuhu ya waala, ni munimooca mpaka ovona mukhalaka oolipeene mweelaponimwanyu." 
Leviticus26:6 Kinoovaha mureettele mweelaponi ni munimwiixaatalela ni khaawo aneera awoopopiheni. Kinimwaalakaseiha axinama ooluwa mweelaponi ni ekatana kheevira mulaponimwanyu. 
Leviticus26:7 Munimwaattharelela amwiittanaanyu ni awosa animwiiviwa ni ekatana ohoolowanyu. 
Leviticus26:8 Athanu a nyuwosa animwaattharelela ncira, ni ncira a nyuwosa macira macireene muloko ni amwiittanaanyu animwiiviwa ni ekatana ohoolowanyu." 
Leviticus26:9 Miyo kinookhala ni nyuwosa ni kinimoorelanyihani; kinoowaattihani kipwahererihaka wiiraanawaka ni nyuwosa. 
Leviticus26:10 Nyuwosa nlelo mucaaka sookonela, munookakha weera muhele soohepha sa mutano." 
Leviticus26:11 Kinookhaliha woomakawaka variyariwanyu ni nkirwa kooramusani. 
Leviticus26:12 Kinimweetta variyariwanyu ni kinookhala Mulukwaanyu ni nyuwosa munookhala mulokwaaka. 
Leviticus26:13 Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu ookhumihaleni wExipitu weera muhikhaletho ipottha sa awExipitu; Miyo koopwexa mavatta a opotthaanyu kiweettihakani moota wootapuxeya. 
Leviticus26:14 Vaheera nyuwosa mwaahikiiwa Miyo, muhikwaniheraka malamulo ootheene ala," 
Leviticus26:15 ni mwaahoonela ikanosaka muramusaka malamulowaaka ni mooceela okwanihera soolamulasaka, mveihaka hiiho wiiraanawaka," 
Leviticus26:16 vano Miyo kinimoopakani ha: Kinimooruuhelani woova wootutuxereya, ikwerere soohonona, xipwexa soowiipayipa sineera sooruuheleni evaasi, siyavayavihaka okumi. Munimwaala, mene khamphurela etthu niwoko amwiitthanaanyu animooca izosanyu." 
Leviticus26:17 Kinoothatuwa Mwiittanaanyu moota wooweera munoowiniwa ni amwiittanaanyu; yaawo anoothanyani animoolamulani ni munootthawa naari muhoomoliwaka. 
Leviticus26:18 Vahoolo wa itthu sootheene iyo nyuwosa nlelo mwaahikiiwa, kinimoottaruxani imaara ithannapiili wa sootthekasanyu." 
Leviticus26:19 Kinoophwata wiixoonawanyu woolipaxa kitatuxaka erimu ya osuluwanyu ntoko eyuuma ni etthaya ya vathiwanyu ntoko ebronze*. 
Leviticus26:20 Ikurusanyu khasivareleya muteko niwoko khamuruwera etthu mulaponi, hata nyiri khasiwiimelani." 
Leviticus26:21 Nyuwo mwapwaherera okhala amwiittanaaka mukhoottaka okiiwa, kinimwaandyeerera soohoxasanyu imaara ithannapiili, ntoko sootthekasanyu simphwanelaaya." 
Leviticus26:22 Kinimoorumihelani axinama a ntuphini eneera ewiive anamwaniinyu, kimalamalihaka mihuwosanyu, koovukulakani mpaka iphirosanyu sinoowalana." 
Leviticus26:23 Ni mwaahipwattha itthusene seiya, mukhoottaka soolakasaka ni mwapwaherera okivaanya," 
Leviticus26:24 Miyo muneenaaka kinookhala Mwiittananyu koohooxakani imaara ithannapiili niwoko na sootthekasanyu. 
Leviticus26:25 Kinimoorumihelani ekatana weera mwiinlele ikukuttula wiiraana. Nyuwosa mwaatthawelasaka musidadenimwanyu, kinimoorumihelani nihooxo ni munimwinnyereriwa mmatatani mwa amwiittana." 
Leviticus26:26 Miyo kaavukulaka woovahani sooca, asithiyana muloko eniyooxereke ipaawu niikho nimoha ekawanaka vamuringoni. Munimooca, mene khamvona." 
Leviticus26:27 Vanonto mwaahikiiwa ni mwapwaherera okhala amwiittanaaka," 
Leviticus26:28 Miyo kinookhala Mwiittananyu koonyoonyeriwakani, koottaruxakani imaara ithannapiili niwoko na sootthekasanyu." 
Leviticus26:29 Munimwaakhuura anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana. 
Leviticus26:30 Kinoophwata mapurowaanyu ootteela vasulu mattumuxa, kaapwexaka altaaraanyu* a erubani* ni kinoothukumanyiha mittembosanyu vasulu wa milukusanyu soolokottha soohikhalano okumi ni kinimoothanyani." 
Leviticus26:31 Kinoohiya isidadesanyu ittuxoru, kiphwataka mapurowaanyu ootteela, ni khookisiveliha wunkhela wa sooveleelasanyu." 
Leviticus26:32 Kinoophwata elapo moota wooweera amwiittanaanyu eneera ekhalewo animuumiwa owanoni. 
Leviticus26:33 Kinimoomwaraxelani variyari wa miloko ni kinimootheteelani ekatanaaka. Elapwaanyu enoothaamiwa ni isidadesanyu sinookhala ittuxoru. 
Leviticus26:34 Hiiho elapo enoohakalala iyaakhasaya sa eSaabadu ehuhu yootheene ya othaamiwawaya, nyuwosa mureene mweelaponi mwa amwiittanaanyu. Vano elapo enimwiitthuuwa ekhalanaka iSaabadusaya." 
Leviticus26:35 Ehuhu yootheene eneera ehale yoothaamiweene, elapo enookhalano wiitthuuwa wa iSaabadu ehitonkwaaya wiitthuuwa nyuwosa mukhalakamo." 
Leviticus26:36 Mwaha wa yaale a nyuwosa eneera ehale, kinootatuxa mirimasaya soosareya woova mweelaponi mwa amwiittanaaya moota wooweera, yiiwaka onyakula wa oruma nikukhu nimvavihiwa mpheyoni, anootthawa. Anootthimaka ntoko mutthu ontthuna otthawa ekatana ni anoomora naari ehoomoliwaka." 
Leviticus26:37 Anookwakwathulana ntoko atthu antthawa ekatana, naari ehoomoliwaka. Vano khamurwa mwaawera amwiittanaanyu." 
Leviticus26:38 Munookhwela variyari wa miloko, elapo ya amwiittanaanyu enimoophwatani." 
Leviticus26:39 Yaale a nyuwosa eneera ehale animunttela mweelaponi mwa amwiittanaaya niwoko na sootthekasaya, nitho sa makholowaaya." 
Leviticus26:40 Vaheera ontthuneya weera awosa elape sootthekasaya, soottheka sa makholowaaya, ohiroromeleyawaya ni okirukunuwelawaya," 
Leviticus26:41 mwa seiyo sikitannyenre owiitta moota wooweera mpaka owoomolela mweelaponi mwa amwiittanaaya. Vano mirimasaya soottiyamaaru siiyeviha ni awosa yaakhulela ottaruxeliwa sootthekasaya," 
Leviticus26:42 Miyo kinimuupuwelela wiiraanawaka ni Yakobe ni wiiraanawaka ni Isaaki ni wiiraanawaka ni Abrahaamu ni kinimuupuwelela elapo. 
Leviticus26:43 Vano elapo enoothaamiwa ni yaawosa ni enookhalano iSaabadusaya ereene meekhaaya. Awosa animwaakhela nttaruxo na sootthekasaya niwoko yaahiya malamulowaaka ni yaaveiha ikanosaka. 
Leviticus26:44 Hata hiiho, awosa ereene mweelaponi mwa amwiittanaaya, nkaakhootta naari nkaaramusa. Nkaaphwata woomalela kimalihaka hiiho wiiraanawaka ni yaawo. Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaaya." 
Leviticus26:45 Mwaha wa waasivelawaka kinimuupuwelela wiiraana ni makholowaaya kaakhumihalaaka wExipitu vamaithoni wa miloko weera kikhale Mulukwaaya. Miyo ti Yave.’” 
Leviticus26:46 Iya ti ikano, malamulo ni soolamula Yave aakhalinghaawe vamwaako oSinayi variyari wa Yoowo ni aYixrayeli mwa Moisesi." 
Leviticus27:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Leviticus27:2 “Mwaaleele ha aYixrayeli: ‘Mukina aroromeliha aatteeliheraka atthu mwa Yave apakeke attharihaka nlivo nintthuneya; 
Leviticus27:3 avareleke muteko moota ola: wa asilopana variyari wa iyaakha miloko miili ni miloko mithannamosa okhuma oyariwawaya aliveke ixekeli* miloko mithanu, ettharaka exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*;" 
Leviticus27:4 ni nlivo na muthiyana nikhaleke ixekeli* miloko miraru. 
Leviticus27:5 Asilopwana variyari wa iyaakha ithanu ni a iyaakha miloko miili okhuma oyariwawaya, nlivo na mulopwana nikhaleke ixekeli* miloko miili ni na muthiyana ixekeli* muloko." 
Leviticus27:6 Wa atthu variyari wa mweeri mmoha ni iyaakha ithanu okhuma oyariwawaya, nlivo na mulopwana nikhaleke ixekeli* ithanu sa eparatha* ni na muthiyana ixekeli* tthaaru sa eparatha*." 
Leviticus27:7 Atthu arino iyaakha miloko mithannamosa wookela muhoolo okhuma oyariwawaya, nlivo na mulopwana nikhaleke ixekeli* muloko niithanu ni na muthiyana ixekeli* muloko." 
Leviticus27:8 Yoowo onroromeliha akhala oohaawaxa ahiweraka oliva nlivo nenenenno, owo amwaattameleke musaserdoti* ni musaserdoti* owo onoomuleela nlivo attharihaka yeeyo mulopwana ongweraawe oliva." 
Leviticus27:9 Yeeyo ororomelinghaawe akhala mwaamunama oowaakhuleleya wa Yave ntoko yooveleela, mwaamunama owo oovahiwa wa Yave onoothatuwa ootteela." 
Leviticus27:10 Owo ahiceendyiweke hata ahimwaakakhanyihe ooreera ni oonanara naari oonanara ni ooreera; owo amwaakakhanyiha mwaamunama mmoha ni mukina, ooweeli awo anoothatuwa ootteela." 
Leviticus27:11 Mwaamunama owo omuroromelinghaawe akhala oohitteela– mmoha oohaakhuleleya ntoko yooveleela wa Yave – vano mwaamunama owo ooniheriweke wa musaserdoti*," 
Leviticus27:12 mwa yoowo anaamoone makhalelowaawe. Moonelo wa musaserdoti* onoohima otthuneya wa mwaamunama owo. 
Leviticus27:13 Muneene a mwaamunama atthuna omoopola mwaamunama owo, owo aandyeerereke mpatta wanaathanu ni nlivo nno." 
Leviticus27:14 Mulopwana amutteelihera empaawe Yave, musaserdoti* ahimeke makhalelo a empa. Moonelo wa musaserdoti* ti oneera ohime muttengwaaya." 
Leviticus27:15 Mulopwana otteelinghe empaawe atthuna woopola yeeyo, owo aandyeerereke mpatta wanaathanu ni nlivo nno. Vano empa eyo enoohokoleela okhala yawawe." 
Leviticus27:16 Mulopwana amutteelihera Yave mpatta wa ettima ya amusaawe; nlivonaya niphimiweke oottharihiwaka mmiso mpatta ontthuneya – ixekeli* miloko mithanu wa ikiilu* macira ni miloko mithannararu sa mmiso wa esevada*. 
Leviticus27:17 Owo atteeliha ettimaawe vaYaakhani ya Otthapa, nlivo nipwaherereke nennoweene." 
Leviticus27:18 Vaheera atteeliha ettima vahoolo wa Eyaakha ya Otthapa, musaserdoti* aphimeke nlivo attharihaka waatta wa iyaakha singhala mpaka Eyaakha ya Otthapa onttharelana, ni nlivonawe nnoovukuliwa." 
Leviticus27:19 Mulopwana ontteeliha ettimaawe atthuna woopola, owo aandyeerereke mpatta wanaathanu wa nlivo nno, ni ettimeene yeeyo enoohokoleela okhala yawawe." 
Leviticus27:20 Wa soothesene, owo aahoopola ettima hoye hoye athumiha, khoongwereya woopolatho." 
Leviticus27:21 Ettima yaatapuxiwa vaYaakhani ya Otthapa, enoothatuwa yootteela, ntoko ettima yootteeliheriwa Yave; enoothatuwa ettima ya asaserdoti*." 
Leviticus27:22 Mulopwana amutteelihera Yave ettima othummaawe, eyo ehikhanle ya mpatta wa amusaawe," 
Leviticus27:23 musaserdoti* akhaliheke nlivonaya mpaka Eyaakha ya Otthapa onttharelana ni mulopwana aliveke nihuku nenenenno ntoko etthu yootteeliheriwa Yave. 
Leviticus27:24 vaYaakhani ya Otthapa ittima sihokoloxeriweke wa yoole aathumihale. 
Leviticus27:25 Nlivo nootheene niphimiweke ettharihiwaka exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*, mwa yeeyo enlemela igrama* muloko ni piili." 
Leviticus27:26 Ahikhaleru aneera atteelihe ntthaara na muhuwo, yeenre matthaara ootheene ekhalaka a Yave; ekhalaka emobe hoye hoye epuri naari ekhondoolo, ti a Yave." 
Leviticus27:27 Akhala mmoha a mwaamunama oohitteela, owo oopoliweke ni nlivo nna nikhalihingwe waandyeereriwaka mpatta wanaathanu wa nlivo nno. Owo aahoopola, mwaamunama owo athumihiwe ni nlivo nikhalihingwe." 
Leviticus27:28 Wa soothesene ehikhaleru etthu orinaawe mutthu ni omutteelihenraawe Yave, okhuma mutthu, etthu eri ya mulopwana omutteelihenre Yave – akhalaka mutthu, mwaamunama hoye hoye ettima yawaweene eneera ethumihiwe naari eniyoopoliwe; itthu sootheene sitteelihingwe ti sootteelaxa wa Yave." 
Leviticus27:29 Mutthu otteeliheriwe ophwatiwa; ahoopoliweke; owo iiviweke. 
Leviticus27:30 Mpatta wanaamuloko wa sootheene siri mulaponi – ekhalaka etrigu hoye hoye soowiima sa nyiri – ti sa Yave; ti sootteeliheriwa Yave. 
Leviticus27:31 Mulopwana atthuna woopola mpatta wanaamulokwaawe, owo aandyeerereke mpatta wanaathanu wa nlivonawe." 
Leviticus27:32 Mpatta wanaamuloko wootheene wa mihuwo sootheene – khula mwaamunama anaamuloko amvira vathi wa ekopo ya mukukhuli – onookhala ootteela wa Yave. 
Leviticus27:33 Muneene ahaavenxeke ooreerela eriyari ya oonanarela hata ahiwaakakhanyihe. Owo awaakakhanyiha, axinama eeli awosa, ooweeli anoothatuwa ootteela wa Yave ni khoongwereya owoopola.’”" 
Leviticus27:34 Iya ti ikano, malamulo ni soolamula Yave aakhalinghaawe vamwaako oSinayi variyari wa Yoowo ni aYixrayeli mwa Moisesi." 
Numbers1:1 Vanihukuni noopacera na mweeri wanaaveeli wa eyaakha yanaaveeli, aYixrayeli ekhumaleene wExipitu, Yave aahuuluma ni Moisesi Muheemani ya Muthukumano*, munikareni na oSinayi. Owo aamweerela:" 
Numbers1:2 “Mumpake namalepela wa muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli, mmahimoni ni mweemusinimwaya, mwaalepaka atthu ootheene, mutthu ti mutthu ni nsinanawe." 
Numbers1:3 Nyuwo ni Aharoni ngwaalikele asilopwana ootheene oolikana orumeela okhottoni, okhuma a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo, muttharihaka okawanyeyawaya." 
Numbers1:4 Mulopwana a khula epuumba, mapwattapwattha a imusi, ookhavihereni." 
Numbers1:5 Masina a yaawo eneera yookhavihereni ti ala: a epuumba ya Rubeni, Elisuri, mwaana mulopwana a Sediwuri;" 
Numbers1:6 a epuumba ya Simeyoni, Xalumiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Zurixadayi;" 
Numbers1:7 ya Yuda, Nahexoni, mwaana mulopwana a Aminadabi;" 
Numbers1:8 ya Isakari, Netaneli, mwaana mulopwana a Zuwari;" 
Numbers1:9 ya Zebuloni, Eliyabi, mwaana mulopwana a Heloni;" 
Numbers1:10 a anamwane a Yoseefe: a epuumba ya Efrayimi, Elixama, mwaana mulopwana a Amihudi; ya Manaxe, Gamaliyeli mwaana mulopwana a Pedazuri;" 
Numbers1:11 ya Benyamini, Abidani, mwaana mulopwana a Gidiyoni;" 
Numbers1:12 ya Dani, Ahizeri, mwaana mulopwana a Amixadayi;" 
Numbers1:13 ya Axeri, Pagiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Okrani;" 
Numbers1:14 ya Gadi, Eliyasafi, mwaana mulopwana a Deyuweli;" 
Numbers1:15 ya Nafitali, Ahira, mwaana mulopwana a Enani." 
Numbers1:16 Ti yaala yaathanliwe eriyari ya muloko, ahooleli a ipuumba sa makholowaaya, mapwattapwattha a mahimo a aYixrayeli." 
Numbers1:17 Vano Mosesi ni Aharoni yaahaathukumanyiha asilopwana yaathanliwe," 
Numbers1:18 enathukumanyiha muloko wootheene munihukuni noopacera na mweeri wanaaveeli. Asilopwana a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo yaahiilepiha ettharihaka mahimwaaya ni imusisaya, khula mutthu ni nsinanawe," 
Numbers1:19 ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi. Vano owo aawaalikela munikareni na oSinayi moota ha: 
Numbers1:20 A ikhapira sa Rubeni, mwaana a ntthaara na Yixrayeli: asilopwana ootheene a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa muhoolo yeera erumeeleke okhottoni yaalepeliwe, khula mutthu ni nsinanawe, ottharihiwaka olepeliwa wa mahimwaaya ni imusisaya." 
Numbers1:21 Waatta wa epuumba ya Rubeni yaari asilopwana 46 500. 
Numbers1:22 A ekhapira ya Simeyoni: asilopwana ootheene a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo yeera erumeeleke okhottoni yaalepeliwe, khula mutthu ni nsinanawe ottharihiwaka olepeliwa wa mahimwaaya ni imusisaya." 
Numbers1:23 Waatta wa epuumba ya Simeyoni yaari asilopwana 59 300. 
Numbers1:24 A ekhapira ya Gadi: asilopwana ootheene a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo yeera erumeeleke okhottoni yaalepeliwe, khula mutthu ni nsinanawe attharihiwaka namalepela a mahimwaaya ni imusi." 
Numbers1:25 Waatta wa epuumba ya Gadi yaari asilopwana 45 650. 
Numbers1:26 A ekhapira ya Yuda: asilopwana ootheene a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo yeera erumeeleke okhottoni yaalepeliwe, khula mutthu ni nsinanawe attharihiwaka namalepela a mahimwaaya ni imusi." 
Numbers1:27 Waatta wa epuumba ya Yuda yaari asilopwana 74 600. 
Numbers1:28 A ekhapira ya Isakari: asilopwana ootheene a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo yeera erumeeleke okhottoni yaalepeliwe, khula mutthu ni nsinanawe, attharihiwaka namalepela a mahimwaaya ni imusi." 
Numbers1:29 Waatta wa epuumba ya Isakari yaari asilopwana 54 400. 
Numbers1:30 A ekhapira ya Zebuloni: asilopwana ootheene a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo yeera erumeeleke okhottoni yaalepeliwe, khula mutthu ni nsinanawe, attharihiwaka namalepela amahimwaaya ni imusi." 
Numbers1:31 Waatta wa epuumba ya Zebuloni yaari asilopwana 57 400. 
Numbers1:32 Wa anamwane asilopwana a Yoseefe: A ekhapira ya Efrayimi: asilopwana ootheene a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo yeera erumeeleke okhottoni, yaalepeliwe, khula mutthu ni nsinanawe, ottharihiwaka olepeliwa wa mahimwaaya ni imusi." 
Numbers1:33 Waatta wa epuumba ya Efrayimi yaari asilopwana 40 500. 
Numbers1:34 A ekhapira ya Manaxe: asilopwana ootheene a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo, yeera erumeeleke okhottoni, yaalepeliwe, khula mutthu ni nsinanawe, ottharihiwaka olepeliwa wa mahimwaaya ni imusi." 
Numbers1:35 Waatta wa epuumba ya Manaxe yaari asilopwana 32 200. 
Numbers1:36 A ekhapira ya Benyamini: asilopwana ootheene a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo, yeera erumeeleke okhottoni yaalepeliwe, khula mutthu ni nsinanawe, ottharihiwaka olepeliwa wa mahimwaaya ni imusi." 
Numbers1:37 Waatta wa epuumba ya Benyamini yaari asilopwana 35 400. 
Numbers1:38 A ekhapira ya Dani: asilopwana ootheene a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo, yeera erumeeleke okhottoni, yaalepeliwe, khula mutthu ni nsinanawe, ottharihiwaka olepeliwa wa mahimwaaya ni imusi." 
Numbers1:39 Waatta wa epuumba ya Dani yaari asilopwana 62 700. 
Numbers1:40 A ekhapira ya Axeri: asilopwana ootheene a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo, yeera erumeeleke okhottoni yaalepeliwe, khula mutthu ni nsinanawe, ottharihiwaka olepeliwa wa mahimwaaya ni imusi." 
Numbers1:41 Waatta wa epuumba ya Axeri yaari asilopwana 41 500. 
Numbers1:42 A ekhapira ya Naftali: asilopwana ootheene a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo, yeera erumeeleke okhottoni, yaalepeliwe, khula mutthu ni nsinanawe, ottharihiwaka olepeliwa wa mahimwaaya ni imusi." 
Numbers1:43 Waatta wa epuumba ya Naftali yaari asilopwana 53 400. 
Numbers1:44 Ala yaari asilopwana yaalikeliwe ni Moisesi vamoha ni Aharoni ni mwa ahooleli muloko neeli a aYixrayeli, khula muhooleli akhalaka vanipuroni na emusaawe." 
Numbers1:45 aYixrayeli ootheene a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo yeera erumeeleke okhottoni yaalikeliwe sittharihiwaka imusisaya. 
Numbers1:46 Ootheene awo yaari asilopwana 603 550. 
Numbers1:47 Wa soothesene, imusi sa epuumba ya Leevi khasaalikeleliwe vamoha ni sikina," 
Numbers1:48 niwoko Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers1:49 “Muhimpake namalepela a epuumba ya Leevi naari muhilepele eriyari ya aYixrayeli akinaawo. 
Numbers1:50 Ohiya yeeyo, mwaakhalihe aLeevi ntoko ookhapelela etabernaakulu* enthokorora itthaabwa sa wiiraana, soovarelasaya muteko sootheene ni mwa sootheene sirimo. Awosa eteexeke etabernaakulu* ni soovarelasaya muteko sootheene; ekhapeleleke ni ekoneleleke mukhwipimwaya." 
Numbers1:51 Imaara sootheene etabernaakulu* eneeraaya eteexiweke, aLeevi yuukululeke, ni imaara sootheene enkungiwaaya, aLeevi epakeke hiiho. Akhalaru mutthu mukina anaakhuveele etabernaakulu*, iiviweke." 
Numbers1:52 aYixrayeli ekungeke iheemasaya, ettharihaka okawanyeyawaya, khula mutthu okonenlaawewo ni eneneerowaawe." 
Numbers1:53 Wa soothesene, aLeevi ekungeke iheemasaya muxerexere wa etabernaakulu* enthokorora itthaabwa sa wiiraana, weera isara sa Muluku sihimorele muloko wa aYixrayeli. Ti aLeevi eniikosoope etabernaakulu* enthokorora itthaabwa sa wiiraana." 
Numbers1:54 aYixrayeli yaapaka sootheene hiihoweene ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi. 
Numbers2:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi ni Aharoni: 
Numbers2:2 “aYixrayeli ekoneleke muxerexere wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*, wooxuurakamelana – vathi wa eneneero ya emusaawe." 
Numbers2:3 Anakhotto ni atthu a oYuda ekoneleke vathi wa eneneerowaaya mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Anaahoolele aYuda ti Nahexoni, mwaana mulopwana a Aminadabi." 
Numbers2:4 Anakhottwaawe yaari asilopwana 74 600. 
Numbers2:5 Epuumba ya Isakari ekoneleke mpatta wa Yuda. Muhooleli a Isakari akhaleke Netaneli, mwaana mulopwana a Zuwari." 
Numbers2:6 Anakhottwaawe ari asilopwana 54 400. 
Numbers2:7 Enttharelana ti epuumba ya Zebuloni. Muhooleli a Zebuloni anaakhale Eliyabi, mwaana mulopwana a Heloni." 
Numbers2:8 Anakhottwaawe yaari ailopwana 57 400. 
Numbers2:9 Waatta wa anakhotto ootheene yaalepeliwe a waakonelingwe wa oYuda waari 186 400. Awosa ti eniipacere orowa. 
Numbers2:10 Mpatta wa ohitto ekhaleke anakhotto ni atthu a okonelingwe wa Rubeni, vathi wa eneneerowaaya. Muhooleli a aRubeni anaakhale Elisuri, mwaana mulopwana a Sediwuri." 
Numbers2:11 Anakhottwaawe ari asilopwana 46 500. 
Numbers2:12 Epuumba ya Simeyoni ekoneleke mpatta wa Rubeni. Muhooleli a Simeyoni anaakhale Xalumiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Zurixadayi." 
Numbers2:13 Anakhottwaawe ari asilopwana 59 300. 
Numbers2:14 Enttharelana ti epuumba ya Gadi. Muhooleli a Gadi anaakhale Eliyasafi, mwaana mulopwana a Deyuweli." 
Numbers2:15 Anakhottwaawe ari asilopwana 45 650. 
Numbers2:16 Waatta wa anakhotto yaalepeliwe a waakonelingwe wa aRubeni waari 151 450. Awosa eniikhale anaaveeli orowa. 
Numbers2:17 Woottharelana aLeevi anoorowa ekuxaleene Eheema ya Muthukumano* eriyari ya mukonelingwe mukina. Anoorowa mooteene yoowo eneeraaya ekonele, khula mutthu vanipuroniwawexa, vathi wa eneneerowaaya." 
Numbers2:18 Mpatta ninkela nsuwa eniikhale anakhotto ni atthu a okonelingwe wa Efrayimi, vathi wa eneneerowaaya. Muhooleli a awEfrayimi anaakhale Elixama, mwaana mulopwana a Amihudi." 
Numbers2:19 Anakhottwaawe ari asilopwana 40 500. 
Numbers2:20 Epuumba ya Manaxe ekoneleke mukhwipi mwa Efrayimi. Muhooleli a Manaxe anaakhale Gamaliyeli mwaana mulopwana a Pedazuri. 
Numbers2:21 Anakhottwaawe ari asilopwana 32 200. 
Numbers2:22 Woottharelana ti epuumba ya Benyamini. Muhooleli a Benyamini anaakhale Abidani, mwaana mulopwana a Gidiyoni." 
Numbers2:23 Anakhottwaawe ari asilopwana 35 400. 
Numbers2:24 Waatta wa anakhotto ootheene yaalepeliwe waakonelingwe wa Efrayimi waari 108 100. Awosa eniikhale anaararu orowa. 
Numbers2:25 Mpatta wa ottuttuwani ekhaleke anakhotto ni atthu a okonelingwe wa Dani, vathi wa eneneerowaaya. Muhooleli a Dani anaakhale Ahizeri, mwaana mulopwana a Amixadayi." 
Numbers2:26 Anakhottwaawe yaari asilopwana 62 700. 
Numbers2:27 Epuumba ya Axeri ekoneleke mukhwipi mwa Dani. Muhooleli a Axeri, anaakhale Pagiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Okrani." 
Numbers2:28 Anakhottwaawe ari asilopwana 41 500. 
Numbers2:29 Epuumba ya Nafitali, ti eniittharelane. Muhooleli a Naftali anaakhale Ahira, mwaana mulopwana a Enani." 
Numbers2:30 Anakhottwaawe ari 53 400. 
Numbers2:31 Waatta wa asilopwana ootheene alepeliwe okonelingwe wa Dani, waari 157 600. Awosa eniikhale oomalihera orowa, vathi wa eneneerowaaya." 
Numbers2:32 Ti yaala aYixrayeli yaalikeliwe, ettharihaka imusisaya. Waatta wa ootheene yaalikeliwe waakonelingwe, waari 603 550." 
Numbers2:33 Wa soothesene, aLeevi khayaalikeliwe ni aYixrayeli akina, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Numbers2:34 Hiiho aYixrayeli yaapaka sootheene Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi; awosa yaakonela moota ole vathi wa eneneerowaaya, ni ola waari moota yaattimunlaaya, khula mutthu ni nihimonawe ni emusaawe." 
Numbers3:1 Ola ti mwaha wa ekhapira ya Aharoni ni Moisesi, Yave uulummaawe ni Moisesi vamwaako Sinayi." 
Numbers3:2 Masina a anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni ti ala: Nadabi, mwaana a ntthaara, Abiyu, Eleyazari ni Ithamari." 
Numbers3:3 Ti yaala masina a anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni, oottikittheliwa yaakhalihingwe orumeela ntoko asaserdoti*." 
Numbers3:4 Vanonto Nadabi ni Abiyu yaahookhwa ohoolo wa Yave yaamuruuhenlaaya yooveleela ni mooro yoohitthuniheriwa, munikareni na oSinayi. Yeenre yahikhalakano anamwane, Eleyazari ni Ithamari ti yaarumeela ntoko asaserdoti* mweehuhuni ya atithaya Aharoni." 
Numbers3:5 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers3:6 “Mulamulele wiitthaniwa epuumba ya Leevi ni moonihere wa musaserdoti* Aharoni weera emukhavihere. 
Numbers3:7 Awosa emurumeeleke Aharoni ni muloko wootheene, ekwaniheraka miteko sintthuneya opakiwa Muheemani ya Muthukumano*." 
Numbers3:8 Ewehaweheke ikaruma sootheene sa Muheemani ya Muthukumano*, ekwaniheraka soonyesererihiwa sa aYixrayeli mmutekoni mwa etabernaakulu*." 
Numbers3:9 Mwaatteelihe aLeevi weera emurumeele Aharoni ni anamwanaawe. Awosa ethanliweke eriyari ya aYixrayeli weera ekhale ootteeliheriwa Aharoni. 
Numbers3:10 Munkhalihe Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ookwanihera soonyesereriwa sa osaserdoti*; akhalaru mukina anaakhuveele vaNipuroni Nootteela*, iiviweke.”" 
Numbers3:11 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers3:12 “Miyo muneenaaka kinaathanla aLeevi eriyari ya aYixrayeli vanipuroni na mwaana a ntthaara na khula muthiyana muYixrayeli. aLeevi ti awaka," 
Numbers3:13 niwoko matthaara ootheene ti awaka. Kiivalaaka matthaara ootheene a wExipitu, kaahiimwalamwalihera matthaara ootheene a aYixrayeli, okhuma eriyari ya atthu mpaka ya mihuwo. Anookhala awaka. Miyo ti Yave.”" 
Numbers3:14 Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi munikareni na oSinayi: 
Numbers3:15 “Ngwaalikele aLeevi mweemusinimwaya ni mahimo. Yaalikeliweke asilopwana ootheene a mweeri mmoha wa oyariwawaya woorowa ohoolo.” 
Numbers3:16 Vano Moisesi aawaalikela, attharihaka nlamulo aakhenlaawe wa Yave." 
Numbers3:17 Masina a anamwane a Leevi ti ala: Gerexono, Kohati ni Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Masina a mahimo a Gerexono ti ala: Libeni ni Ximeyi. 
Numbers3:19 Masina a mahimo a Kohati ti ala: Amerami, Yizehara, Hebroni ni Uziyeli." 
Numbers3:20 Masina a mahimo a Merari ti ala: Maheli ni Muxi. Ti yaala yaari ahooleli a mahimo a Leevi. 
Numbers3:21 Mahimo a aLibini ni aSemiyita yaari a Gerexono. Ti yaala yaari mahimo a aGerexono. 
Numbers3:22 Waatta wa ootheene yaalikeliwe – asilopwana a mweeri mmoha wa oyariwawaya woorowa ohoolo – yaari atthu 7 500. 
Numbers3:23 Mahimo a aGerexono waatthuneya okonela mpatta ninkela nsuwa, wiithela etabernaakulu*." 
Numbers3:24 Muhooleli a imusi sa aGerexono aari Eliyasafi, mwaana mulopwana a Layeli." 
Numbers3:25 Muheemani ya Muthukumano*, aGerexoni yaakhalano muteko wookosoopa etabernaakulu* vamoha ni eheemaaya, ekuttelelowaaya, eluttu ya vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*," 
Numbers3:26 iluttu sa omokoni wa nipuwa, iluttu sa mulakwaaya sinrukureera etabernaakulu* ni altaari*, ni mikhoyi vamoha ni sootheene saari vamohamoharu ni muteko owo." 
Numbers3:27 Mahimo awAmrami, awIzerahi, aHeberoni awUziyeli yaari a aKohati." 
Numbers3:28 Waatta wa asilopwana a mweeri mmoha wa oyariwawaya woorowa ohoolo, yaari asilopwana 8 600. aKohati yaakhalano muteko wookosoopa Nipuro Nootteela*." 
Numbers3:29 Mahimo a aKohati waatthuneya okonela mpatta wa ohitto wa etabernaakulu*. 
Numbers3:30 Muhooleli a imusi sa mahimo a Kohati aari Elizafani, mwaana mulopwana a Uziyeli." 
Numbers3:31 Aakhalano muteko woowaakosoopa Arka*, meesa, onyaari, altaari*, ikaruma saavareliwa muteko vaNipuroni Nootteela* ni eluttu ni sootheene saari vamohamoharu ni muteko owo." 
Numbers3:32 Muhooleli mutokweene a aLeevi aari Eliyazari, mwaana mulopwana a Aharoni. Owo aakhalano muteko woowaawehaweha yaawo yaahoolela miteko sa okosoopa Nipuro Nootteela*." 
Numbers3:33 Mahimo a aMaheli ni aMuxiti yaari a aMerari; yaari ti yaala mahimo a aMerari. 
Numbers3:34 Waatta wa asilopwana yaale yaalikeliwe a mweeri mmoha wa oyariwawaya woorowa ohoolo, yaari asilopwana 6 200." 
Numbers3:35 Muhooleli a imusi sa mahimo a aMerari aari Zuriyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Abihayili; waatthuneya awosa okonela mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa etabernaakulu*." 
Numbers3:36 aMerari yaakhalano muteko woowaakosoopa acikhi a etabernaakulu*, mikoombasaya, amarimbu, nyettosaya, ikarumasaya sootheene ni sootheene saari vamohamoharu ni muteko owo," 
Numbers3:37 nitho amarimbu a nipuwa mukhwipimwaya ni nyettosaya, mikurosaya ni mikhoyisaya." 
Numbers3:38 Moisesi, Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ekoneleke mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, wa etabernaakulu*, ohoolo wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. Awosa yaakhalano muteko wookosoopa Nipuro Nootteela* eweerelaka aYixrayeli. Akhalaru mukina anaakhuveele vaNipuroni Nootteela*, iiviweke." 
Numbers3:39 Waatta wa aLeevi yaalikeliwe ni Moisesi ni Aharoni, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe, ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya – asilopwana ootheene a mweeri mmoha wa oyariwawaya woorowa ohoolo, yaari asilopwana 22 000." 
Numbers3:40 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Ngwaalikele anamwane asilopwana a matthaara ootheene a aYixrayeli okhuma a mweeri mmoha wa oyariwawaya woorowa ohoolo ni mulepeke masinaaya. 
Numbers3:41 Mukitteelihere aLeevi vanipuroni na matthaara ootheene a aYixrayeli, ni mihuwo sa aLeevi, vanipuroni na matthaara a mihuwo sa aYixrayeli. Miyo ti Yave.”" 
Numbers3:42 Moisesi aawaalikela anamwane asilopwana a matthaara ootheena a aYixrayeli, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe." 
Numbers3:43 Waatta wa anamwane asilopwana a matthaara ootheene, okhuma a mweeri mmoha wa oyariwawaya woorowa ohoolo, elepeliwaka ni masinaaya yaari asilowana 22 273." 
Numbers3:44 Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi: 
Numbers3:45 aLeevi ekhaleke vanipuroni na matthaara ootheene a aYixrayeli, ni mihuwo sa aLeevi vanipuroni na mihuwo sa aYixrayeli. aLeevi ekhaleke awaka. Miyo ti Yave.”" 
Numbers3:46 Wa woopoliwa wa anamwane asilopwana a matthara a aYixrayeli 273 apwanghe waatta wa aLeevi," 
Numbers3:47 mukuxe ixekeli* ithanu sa eparatha* wa khula mutthu a yaawosa, muttharaka olemela wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*, enlemela igrama* muloko ni piili." 
Numbers3:48 Mmwinnyerere Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana, eparatha* yoowoopolela anamwane asilopwana a matthara a aYixrayeli yaawo apwanghe waatta wa aLeevi." 
Numbers3:49 Hiiho Moisesi aakuxa eparatha* yoowoopolela yaale yaapwanghe waatta wa aLeevi. 
Numbers3:50 Wa anamwane asilopwana a matthaara a aYixrayeli, owo aarongha ixekeli* 1 365, ettharaka olemela wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*." 
Numbers3:51 Moisesi aamwinnyerera Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana eparatha* yoowoopolela, ntoko aalamulelingwaawe ni Yave." 
Numbers4:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi ni Aharoni: 
Numbers4:2 “Mwaalepele aKohati a epuumba ya aLeevi – mmahimonimwaya ni mweemusini; 
Numbers4:3 ngwaalikele asilopwana ootheene okhuma a iyaakha miloko miraru mpaka iyaakha miloko mithanu – ootheene angwera orumeela Muheemani mwa Muthukumano. 
Numbers4:4 Muteko wa aKohati Muheemani ya Muthukumano* ti wookhapelela itthu sootteelaxa. 
Numbers4:5 Waathaamiwaka okonelingwe, Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana evoloweke ni ekuruxeke eluttu enkuttelela ni yaakhuneelekeno Arka* a wiiraana." 
Numbers4:6 Vahoolowaya yaakhuneeleke ni exapala yoohukhiwa, yaataleke ekuwo ya mpuwa ya kanka vasuluwaya ni yiikaathiki ikopo mmapuronimwaya." 
Numbers4:7 Vameesa a okhala, awosa yaataleke ekuwo ya kanka ni yiikaathiki isasaani, moohiseramo erubani*, ibasiya, ni nyaapu sa sooveleela soowura; ipaawu sa okhala sipwaherereke okhalawo." 
Numbers4:8 Yaataleke vasulu wa sootheene iyo ekuwo yooxeera ni ekhuneelekeno exapala yoohukhiwa. Vahoolowaya yiikaathiki ikopo mmapuronimwaya. 
Numbers4:9 Ekuxeketho ekuwo ya kanka ni ekhuneelekeno onyaari omvareliwa muteko woomwaleelela, soomwaleelasaya, soorehererano mutthambo, soocipiherasaya ni ixaaru sootheene sirino makhura." 
Numbers4:10 Woottharelana seiyo ni ikarumasaya sootheene ehuruwelekeno mweekutteleloni ya exapala yoohukhiwa ni yiikaathiki mweevareleloni sooteexerano. 
Numbers4:11 Valtaarini* a eyuuma yoorikaxa, yaatalekewo ekuwo ya kanka ni yiikaathiki exapala yoohukhiwa. Vahoolowaya yiikaathiki ikopo mmapuronimwaya." 
Numbers4:12 Ekuxeke ikaruma sootheene simvareliwa muteko woorumeelano vaNipuroni Nootteela*, vahoolowaya ehuruweleke mukuwoni ya kanka ni ekhuneelekeno exapala yoohukhiwa; vahoolowaya yiikaathiki mweevareleloni mooteexerano." 
Numbers4:13 Ekhupeke ettuura ya altaari* a ebronze* ni yaatalekewo ekuwo yookankela. 
Numbers4:14 Yiikaathikiwo ikaruma sootheene simvareliwa muteko woorumeelano valtaarini*: yootholela makhala, igarfu sa enama, apoxoro ni ibasiya soovuuvihera. Vasuluwaya yaatalekewo exapala yoohukhiwa ni yiikaathiki ikopo vanipuroniwaya." 
Numbers4:15 Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana yaamalihaka okhuneela ikaruma sootteelihiwa, aani itthu sootteelihiwa sootheene, ni muloko ohanleene vakhaani ottimula okonelingwe, aKohati erweeke eteexeke. Vaheera ehitave itthu sootteelihiwa weera ehikhwe. aKohati eteexeke ikaruma siri Muheemani mwa Muthukumano." 
Numbers4:16 Eleyazari, mwaana mulopwana a musaserdoti* Aharoni, ti anaawehaweheke makhura a omwaleelela, erubani* yoowunkhelaxa, sooveleela sa khula nihuku sa irooro ni makhura oottikitthelano. Ti anaawehawehe etabernaakulu* yootheene ni sootheene sirimo, eyo tiiyo ikarumasaya, aani ikarumasaya sootteelihiwa sootheene." 
Numbers4:17 Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi ni Aharoni: 
Numbers4:18 “Muhitthunihere weera mahimo a aKohati emalamalihiwe eriyari ya aLeevi. 
Numbers4:19 Yeeyo entthuneya opaka nyuwo weera aKohati ehikhwe yaakhuveelaka itthu sootteelaxa ti ela: Aharoni ni anamwanaawe evolowaseke vaNipuroni Nootteela* ni emuthanleleke khula mutthu mutekwaawe ni yeeyo entthuneya okuxa. 
Numbers4:20 aKohati ehivolowemo weera yoone itthu sootteeliheriwa, hata vakhaani, weera ehikhwe." 
Numbers4:21 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers4:22 Mumpaketho namalepela a aGerexoni, mweemusinimwaya ni mahimo." 
Numbers4:23 Ngwaalikele asilopwana okhuma a iyaakha miloko miraru mpaka iyaakha miloko mithanu – ootheene angwera orumeela, weera evare muteko Muheemani mwa Muthukumano." 
Numbers4:24 Mahimo a aGerexoni muteko avahiwaaya ovara ti ola: 
Numbers4:25 Awosa ekuxeke iluttu sa mpuwa mwa etabernaakulu*, Eheema ya Muthukumano*, sookhuneelasaya, exapala yoohukhiwa sa omokoni ni iluttu sa vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*." 
Numbers4:26 Awosa eteexeketho iluttu sa omokoni wa nipuwa nirukureenre etabernaakulu* ni altaari*, eluttu ya vamulako, mikhoyi ni ikaruma sootheene simvareliwa mutekwaaya. aGerexoni ti eneera epake itthusene seiyo sootheene." 
Numbers4:27 Mitekosaya sootheene, sootheene sintthuneya opaka ni oteexa, silamuleliweke ni Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana. Mwaakhalihere yootthuneyaaya sootheene eneeraaya eteexe." 
Numbers4:28 Ola ti muteko wa mahimo a aGerexoni Muheemani mwa Muthukumano. Mitekosaya siwehawehiweke ni Ithamari, mwaana mulopwana a Aharoni." 
Numbers4:29 Ngwaalikele aMerari muttharihaka mahimwaaya ni imusi. 
Numbers4:30 Ngwaalikele asilopwana okhuma a iyaakha miloko miraru mpaka iyaakha miloko mithanu – ootheene angwera orumeela, weera evare muteko Muheemani mwa Muthukumano." 
Numbers4:31 Mahimo a aMerari muteko avahiwaaya ovara ti ola: Waateexa acikhi a etabernaakulu*, mikoombasaya, amarimbwaaya ni nyettosaya," 
Numbers4:32 mpakatho amarimbu a nipuwa, arukureenre Eheema, ni nyettosaya, mikurosaya ni mikhoyisaya; aani ikarumasaya sootheene ni sootheene siri vamohamoharu woovareliwani muteko. Khula mutthu athanleleke khula etthu entthuneya okuxa." 
Numbers4:33 Ola muteko wa mahimo a aMerari. Mutekwaaya wootheene wa Muheemani mwa Muthukumano owehawehiweke ni Ithamari, mwaana mulopwana a Aharoni." 
Numbers4:34 Moisesi, Aharoni ni ahooleli a muloko yaawaalikela aKohati, ettharihaka mahimwaaya ni imusisaya –" 
Numbers4:35 asilopwana ootheene okhuma a iyaakha miloko miraru mpaka iyaakha miloko mithanu – ootheene angwera orumeela, weera evare muteko Muheemani mwa Muthukumano." 
Numbers4:36 Yaale yaalikeliwe ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya ni imusisaya yaari asilopwana 2 750. 
Numbers4:37 Wu waari waatta wa yaale yaalepelingwe – ootheene a mahimo a aKohati yaarumeela Muheemani mwa Muthukumano. Vano Moisesi ni Aharoni yaawaalikelasa ettharihaka yeeyo Yave aalamulenlaawe mwa Moisesi. 
Numbers4:38 aGerexoni yaalikeliwe ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya ni imusisaya. 
Numbers4:39 Asilopwana ootheene okhuma a iyaakha miloko miraru mpaka miloko mithanu sa oyariwawaya angwera orumeela Muheemani mwa Muthukumano 
Numbers4:40 yaalikeliwe ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya ni imusi yaari asilopwana 2 630. 
Numbers4:41 Wu waari waatta wa yaale yaalepelingwe a mahimo a aGerexoni yaarumeela Muheemani mwa Muthukumano. Vano Mosesi ni Aharoni yaawaalikelasa ettharihaka Nlamulo na Yave. 
Numbers4:42 aMerari yaalikeliwe ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya ni imusisaya. 
Numbers4:43 Asilopwana ootheene okhuma a iyaakha miloko miraru mpaka miloko mithanu, angwera orumeela, Muheemani mwa Muthukumano" 
Numbers4:44 yaalikeliwe ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya yaari asilopwana 3 200. 
Numbers4:45 Wu waari waatta wa yaale yaalepelingwe a mahimo a aMerari yaarumeela Muheemani ya Muthukumano*. Moisesi ni Aharoni yaawaalikelasa, ettharihaka yeeyo Yave aalamulenlaawe mwa Moisesi." 
Numbers4:46 Hiiho Moisesi, Aharoni ni ahooleli a aYixrayeli yaawaalikela aLeevi ootheene, ettharihaka mahimwaaya ni imusisaya." 
Numbers4:47 Asilopwana ootheene okhuma a iyaakha miloko miraru mpaka miloko mithanu sa oyariwawaya, yaarwiiye weera erumeele ni eteexe Eheema ya Muthukumano*" 
Numbers4:48 yaari asilopwana 8 580. 
Numbers4:49 Moisesi aamuthanlela khula mutthu mutekwaawe ni yeeyo yaatthuneya oteexa ntoko Yave aalamulenlaawe mwa yoowo. Hiiho awosa yaahaalikeliwa ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi. 
Numbers5:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers5:2 “Mwaalamulele aYixrayeli weera yaakhumihere okerekhere wa okonelingwe ootheene eniikhaleno makokho, hoye hoye yakhalaru enaakhuma ephome, naari anaakhale oohitteela niwoko na otava muttembo." 
Numbers5:3 Mwaakhumihere okerekhere wa okonelingwe, okhuma asilopwana mpaka asithiyana, weera ehivalihe akonenlaayawo, mwa weiwo kinkhalaakawo eriyaraaya." 
Numbers5:4 aYixrayeli yaapaka hiiho, enaakhumihera okerekhere waakonelingwe ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Numbers5:5 Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi: 
Numbers5:6 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana ampahula mutthu mukina, khammoonelamo Yave ni hiiho onookhala ni nthowa." 
Numbers5:7 Alapeke yoottheka opankaawe, aliveke woomalela, andyeerereke mpatta wanaathanu wa yeeyo olimvaawe ni amvaheke sootheene iyo yoowo ompahunlaawe." 
Numbers5:8 Vaheera, opahulingwe aahikhalanaru mmusi xaxaxa oowaakhela yooliviwa, eyo enookhala ya Yave ni innyereriweke musaserdoti* vamoha ni napunci ooreherereliwano wiiwanana ni Yave wa nanthowa." 
Numbers5:9 Micaango sootteela sootheene, aYixrayeli animuruuhelaaya musaserdoti* sikhaleke sawawe." 
Numbers5:10 Soovaha sootteelihiwa sa khula mutthu ti sawawe, vaheera yeeyo owo aneeraawe amvahe musaserdoti*, eniikhale ya musaserdoti*." 
Numbers5:11 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers5:12 “Mwaaleele ha aYixrayeli: ‘Mwaara a mutthu ahapuwa, anamukhalela oohiroromeleya," 
Numbers5:13 ni mulopwana mukina amukonano, ni eyo yiipithiheya wa iyawe ni ohitteelawawe waahooneleliwa (niwoko na ohimukhalela anamoona naari ohivariwano yeeyo)," 
Numbers5:14 ni iyawe akhala ehace ni amuhovela mwaariye, akhalaka ootteela naari oohitteela," 
Numbers5:15 owo amurongheke wa musaserdoti*. Mulopwana akuxeke yoovaha ya ikiilu* piili sa ephepa ya esevada* amweerelaka mwaariye. Ahiyeehere makhura hata ahihele erubani* vaphepani niwoko ti yoovaha ya irooro mwa ehace weera yoonihereye ekhaikhai ya yoottheka. 
Numbers5:16 Musaserdoti* amuruuheke muthiyana ni amwiikaathiki ohoolo wa Yave. 
Numbers5:17 Vano akuxeke maahi vakhaani ootteelihiwa muyoopweni ni aheleke mmaahini mwaantthupi na vathi wa etabernaakulu*. 
Numbers5:18 Amwiikaathiyeene muthiyana ohoolo wa Yave, musaserdoti* ataphuleke mayihi a muthiyana owo ni amuheleleke mmatatanimwawe yooveleela yoowuupuwelela, aani yooveleela ya irooro mwa ehace musaserdoti* muneenaawe akuxaleene maahi oowaawa anruuha nlapho." 
Numbers5:19 Vano musaserdoti* amulipeliheke muthiyana ni amweereleke: “Mwaahimukonanneru mulopwana mukina ni nyuwo mwaahikhanle oohiroromeleya naari mwaahithatungwe oohitteela mutheliweene, maahi oowaawa ala anruuha nlapho ehoopakeni yoonanara." 
Numbers5:20 Vaheera, mwaahiroromeleiye mutheliweene ni mwiivalingheene woomukonano mulopwana ohoothenleni,…”" 
Numbers5:21 vano hiiho musaserdoti* amulipeliheke ni nlapho muthiyana amweerelaka: “Yave oopakeeni etthu yoolamphwa ni onyoosiwa eriyari ya muloko, apakihaka weera erukulwaanyu esare ni muhiyarerutho." 
Numbers5:22 Maahi ala anruuha nlapho evolowe mweerutthunimwanyu ni esare erukuluwaanyu ni ewooceeliheni oyara.” Vano muthiyana eereke: “Ame. Okhale hiiho.” 
Numbers5:23 Musaserdoti* alepeke malapho ala mukarattani, vahoolowaya arapiheleke mmaahini oowaawa." 
Numbers5:24 Owo angwuriheke maahi oowaawa anruuha nlapho, ni maahi awo evoloweke mweerutthunimwawe, emutannyeraka ohaawaxa." 
Numbers5:25 Musaserdoti* akuxeke mmatatani mwa muthiyana owo yooveleela ya irooro mwa ehace, iinainihereke ohoolo wa Yave ni aruuheke valtaarini*." 
Numbers5:26 Vano musaserdoti* anyottoleke yooveleela ya irooro ntoko yooveleela yoowuupuwelela ni ahisereke valtaarini*. Vahoolowaya angwuriheke maahi muthiyana owo. 
Numbers5:27 Muthiyana owo avaliheya, akhalaka oohiroromeleya wa iyawe, musaserdoti* angwurihaleene maahi anruuha nlapho, maahi awo anoovolowa mweerutthunimwawe ni anoomutannyera ohaawaxa; erukulwaawe enoosara ni owo khaweraru oyara; onoothatuwa oolaphiwa eriyari ya mulokwaawe." 
Numbers5:28 Wa soothesene, muthiyana aahivaliheya, anakhala ootteeleene, khahaawa nttaruxo ni onoowera oyara." 
Numbers5:29 Vano eyo ekano mwaha wa ehace, muthiyana akhala oohiroromeleya ni iivaliha atheliweene," 
Numbers5:30 hoye hoye ehace yamukhalaxa mulopwana niwoko noomuhovela mwaariye. Musaserdoti* amwiikaathiki ohoolo wa Yave ni amviriheke mukanoni yootheene ela. 
Numbers5:31 Ihovasi saakhuleleya naari saahaakhuleleya, iyawe khakhalano nthowa; vaheera muthiyana onoohaawa mwa soopakasawe sootakhala." 
Numbers6:1 Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi: 
Numbers6:2 “Mwaaleele ha aYixrayeli: “Mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana atthuna omuroromeliha etthu yooreera, aani yoororomeliha ya omwalanyiha wa Yave ntoko muNaziri*," 
Numbers6:3 ahiwureke eviinyu ni soowura sikina soohapala ni ahiwure eviinyu yoonyuunya naari yoowura ekina yoohapala. Ahiwure iwuuva* naari ahikhuure iwuuva* hata iwuuva* soowuuma. 
Numbers6:4 Areene muNaziri*, ahiceru etthu ekuxingwe ngwuuvani, hata inukusene hoye hoye makacapha." 
Numbers6:5 Mweehuhuni yootheene ya ororomelihawanyu omwalanyiha, muhimetthiweru. Mpaka omala ehuhu ya omwalamwaliheriwa Yave, owo akhaleke ootteelihiwa ni ahiyeke yunnuwaka mayihi a mmurumwawe." 
Numbers6:6 Mweehuhuni yootheene ya omwalamwaliheriwa Yave, ahaattameleru muttembo." 
Numbers6:7 Naari ekhalaka atithawe hoye hoye amayawe hata murokoriye naari munneiye okhwiiye, owo ahithatuwe oohitteela mwaha wa yaawosa, niwoko mayihi a mmurumwawe ti eneneero ya omwalanyihereyawawe ni Muluku." 
Numbers6:8 Mweehuhuni yootheene ommwalanyiheriwaawe, anaakhale ootteeliheriwa Yave." 
Numbers6:9 Mukina akhwa wootutuxereya vakhiviruwawe, hiiho avalihaka mayihi otteelihalaawe, owo amettheke mayihi mmahukuni mathannameeli – eyo tiiyo ehuhu ya otteelihiwawawe." 
Numbers6:10 Vanihukuni nanaathannamararu aruuheke aximasiya meeli hoye hoye makhinda meeli wa musaserdoti* areene vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. 
Numbers6:11 Musaserdoti* amveleeleleke mmoha ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka ni mukinoowo ntoko yooveleela yoohisa, weera amurehererele wiiwanana ni Yave, niwoko oottheka woowaattamela muttembo. Nihuku nenenenno muNaziri* onootteelihatho muruwaawe." 
Numbers6:12 Owo iitteelihereleke Yave mweehuhuni ya wiimwalanyiherawawe ni aruuheke eputtiputthi ya eyaakha emoha ntoko yooveleelela nthowa. Khayaalikeliwa mahuku a khalayi niwoko oovaliheya mweehuhuni ya omwalanyihereyawawe. 
Numbers6:13 Eyo ti ekano ya muNaziri* yaamalaka ehuhu ya omwalamwalawawe: Owo aruuhiweke vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. 
Numbers6:14 Vano amuruuhelekewo Yave yooveleelaawe: Eputtiputthi elopwana ya eyaakha emoha ni yoohirakala ntoko yooveleela yoohisa, eputtiputthi ethiyana ya eyaakha emoha ni yoohirakala ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, napunci oohirakala ntoko yooveleelela murettele," 
Numbers6:15 vamoha ni yooveleelaawe ya irooro ni soowura ni mpapara wa ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu, iboolu soopakeliwa ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura ni ipaawu soozazaala soottikittheliwa makhura a sooliveira*." 
Numbers6:16 Musaserdoti* amuruuheleke Yave ni apakeke yooveleelela yoottheka ni yoohisa. 
Numbers6:17 Aruuheke mpapara wa ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu ni amveleeleke napunci ntoko yooveleelela murettele wa Yave, vamoha ni yooveleela ya irooro ni soowura." 
Numbers6:18 Woottharelana, muNaziri* amettheleke mayihi otteelihalaawe vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano* ni avonyereke vamooroni ori vathi wa yooveleelela murettele." 
Numbers6:19 muNaziri* amenttheene mayihi a otteeliherawawe, musaserdoti* amwinnyerereke mmatatani khakobe mmoha oowaapeiwa a napunci, eboolu ni epaawu yoozazaala sikhumihiwe mumpaparani, soopiili iyo soohikhalano eferementu." 
Numbers6:20 Musaserdoti* iinainihereke iyo ohoolo wa Yave ntoko yooveleela yoowiinainihiwa; ti sootteela ni sa musaserdoti*, hiihotho ehoce yiinainihiwe ni etakhwi yooniheriwe. Vahoolowaya, muNaziri* awureke eviinyu." 
Numbers6:21 Ela ekano ya yoororomeliha ya muNaziri* ni ya yooveleela yootteeliheriwa Yave, ottharihiwaka omwalamwalawawe, ehaalikeleliwaka yakhalaru etthu ekinoowo ongweraawe oliva weera aandyeereke. Akwanihereke yoororomeliha opankaawe, attharihaka ekano ya muNaziri*." 
Numbers6:22 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers6:23 “Munleele Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana weera mwaareelihe aYixrayeli moota ola: 
Numbers6:24 ‘Yave ooreeliheni ni oothokororeni; 
Numbers6:25 Yave awaariheleni ekhovaawe ni awoonihereni murima wooreera; 
Numbers6:26 Yave ooweheeni ni oovaheeni murettele. 
Numbers6:27 Ola moota asaserdoti* eneeraaya yaareeliheke aYixrayeli mwa Nsinanaka, ni Miyo kinimwaareelihasa." 
Numbers7:1 Moisesi amalihaleene oreherera etabernaakulu*, owo aattikitthela, anatteeliha vamoha ni ikarumasaya. Aahaattikitthelatho altaari* ni ikarumasaya sootheene, anatteeliha." 
Numbers7:2 Vano ahooleli a aYixrayeli, mapwattapwattha yaari ahooleli a ipuumba yaangwehaweha namalepela, yaapaka sooveleela." 
Numbers7:3 Yaaruuha soovahasaya wa Yave: Ikaaro ithannamosa sookhuneeliwa, ni imombe muloko ni piili – emombe emoha wa khula muhooleli ni ekaaro emoha wa khula ahooleli eeli. Iyo yaarongha ohoolo wa etabernaakulu*." 
Numbers7:4 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers7:5 “Mwaakhelele sooveleelasaya weera sivareliwe muteko wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. Ngwinnyerere aLeevi, muttharihaka muteko wa khula mutthu.”" 
Numbers7:6 Vano Moisesi aahaakhela ikaaro ni imombe anawinnyerera aLeevi. 
Numbers7:7 Aahaavaha aGerexoni ikaaro piili ni imombe ixexe attharihaka waatthuneyaaya wa mutekwaaya; 
Numbers7:8 ikaaro ixexe ni imombe ithannatthaaru wa aMerari, attharihaka waatthuneyaaya wa mutekwaaya. Ootheenaawo yaawehawehiwa ni Ithamari, mwaana mulopwana a musaserdoti*, Aharoni." 
Numbers7:9 Vaheera wa aKohati Moisesi khaavangheru etthu, niwoko awosa waatthuneya othatela ikaruma sootteeliheriwa mwa seiyo yaawehawehaaya." 
Numbers7:10 Ettikittheliweene altaari*, ahooleli yaaruuha sooveleelasaya weera etteelihiwe altaari*, enoonihera ohoolowaya." 
Numbers7:11 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Khula nihuku muhooleli mmoha aruuheke yooveleelaawe yoowaatteelihera altaari*.” 
Numbers7:12 Vanihukuni noopacera, Nahexoni, mwaana mulopwana a Aminadabi, a epuumba ya aYuda, aaruuha yooveleelaawe." 
Numbers7:13 Yoveleelaawe yaari esasaani ya eparatha* ya ixekeli* ncira ni miloko miraru ni ebasiya ya eparatha* wa soomiserano ya ixekeli* miloko mithannamiili, soopiili iyo siringiweene ottharihiwaka moota wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*. Soopiili soosareya ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura, ntoko yooveleela ya irooro;" 
Numbers7:14 nipoottoro na eyuuma yoorikaxa na ixekeli* muloko, noosareya erubani*;" 
Numbers7:15 mwaamombe mmoha, napunci ni eputtiputthi elopwana ya eyaakha emoha ntoko yooveleela yoohisa;" 
Numbers7:16 napunci mmoha a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka; 
Numbers7:17 ni imombe piili, anapunci a ikhondoolo athanu, anapunci athanu ni iputtiputthi ilopwana ithanu sa eyaakha emoha weera siveleeliwe ntoko yooveleelela murettele. Ela yaari yooveleela ya Nahexoni, mwaana mulopwana a Aminadabi." 
Numbers7:18 Vanihukuni nanaaveeli, Netaneli, mwaana mulopwana a Zuwari, muhooleli a awIsakari, aaruuha yooveleelaawe." 
Numbers7:19 Yooveleelaawe yaari esasaani ya eparatha* ya ixekeli* ncira ni miloko miraru ni ebasiya ya eparatha* wa soomiserano ya ixekeli* miloko mithannamiili, soopiili iyo siringiweene ottharihiwaka moota wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*. Soopiili soosareya ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura, ntoko yooveleela ya irooro;" 
Numbers7:20 nipoottoro na eyuuma yoorikaxa na ixekeli* muloko, noosareya erubani*;" 
Numbers7:21 mwaamombe mmoha, napunci ni eputtiputthi elopwana ya eyaakha emoha ntoko yooveleela yoohisa;" 
Numbers7:22 napunci mmoha a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka; 
Numbers7:23 ni imombe piili, anapunci a ikhondoolo athanu, anapunci athanu ni iputtiputthi ilopwana ithanu sa eyaakha emoha weera siveleeliwe ntoko yooveleelela murettele. Ela yaari yooveleela ya Netaneli, mwaana mulopwana a Zowari." 
Numbers7:24 Vanihukuni nanaararu, Eliyabi, mwaana mulopwana a Heloni, muhooleli a aZebuloni, aaruuha yooveleelaawe." 
Numbers7:25 Yooveleelaawe yaari esasaani ya eparatha* ya ixekeli* ncira ni miloko miraru ni ebasiya ya eparatha* wa soomiserano ya ixekeli* miloko mithannamiili, soopiili iyo siringiweene ottharihiwaka moota wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*. Soopiili soosareya ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura, ntoko yooveleela ya irooro;" 
Numbers7:26 nipoottoro na eyuuma yoorikaxa na ixekeli* muloko, noosareya erubani*;" 
Numbers7:27 mwaamombe mmoha, napunci ni eputtiputthi elopwana ya eyaakha emoha ntoko yooveleela yoohisa;" 
Numbers7:28 napunci mmoha a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka; 
Numbers7:29 ni imombe piili, anapunci a ikhondoolo athanu, anapunci athanu ni iputtiputthi ilopwana ithanu sa eyaakha emoha weera siveleeliwe ntoko yooveleelela murettele. Ela yaari yooveleela ya Eliyabi, mwaana mulopwana a Heloni." 
Numbers7:30 Vanihukuni nanaaxexe, Elisuri, mwaana mulopwana a Sedewuri muhooleli a aRubeni, aaruuha yooveleelaawe." 
Numbers7:31 Yooveleelaawe yaari esasaani ya eparatha* ya ixekeli* ncira ni miloko miraru ni ebasiya ya eparatha* wa soomiserano ya ixekeli* miloko mithannamiili, soopiili iyo siringiweene ottharihiwaka moota wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*. Soopiili soosareya ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura, ntoko yooveleela ya irooro;" 
Numbers7:32 nipoottoro na eyuuma yoorikaxa na ixekeli* muloko, noosareya erubani*" 
Numbers7:33 mwaamombe mmoha, napunci ni eputtiputthi elopwana ya eyaakha emoha ntoko yooveleela yoohisa;" 
Numbers7:34 napunci mmoha a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka; 
Numbers7:35 ni imombe piili, anapunci a ikhondoolo athanu, anapunci athanu ni iputtiputthi ilopwana ithanu sa eyaakha emoha weera siveleeliwe ntoko yooveleelela murettele. Ela yaari yooveleela ya Elisuri, mwaana mulopwana a Sedewuri." 
Numbers7:36 Vanihukuni nanaathanu, Xalumiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Zurixadayi, muhooleli a aSimeyoni, aaruuha yooveleelaawe." 
Numbers7:37 Yooveleelaawe yaari esasaani ya eparatha* ya ixekeli* ncira ni miloko miraru ni ebasiya ya eparatha* wa soomiserano ya ixekeli* miloko mithannamiili, soopiili iyo siringiweene ottharihiwaka moota wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*. Soopiili soosareya ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura, ntoko yooveleela ya irooro;" 
Numbers7:38 nipoottoro na eyuuma yoorikaxa na ixekeli* muloko, noosareya erubani*;" 
Numbers7:39 mwaamombe mmoha, napunci ni eputtiputthi elopwana ya eyaakha emoha ntoko yooveleela yoohisa;" 
Numbers7:40 napunci mmoha a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka; 
Numbers7:41 ni imombe piili, anapunci a ikhondoolo athanu, anapunci athanu ni iputtiputthi ilopwana ithanu sa eyaakha emoha weera siveleeliwe ntoko yooveleelela murettele. Ela yaari yooveleela ya Xalumiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Zurixadayi." 
Numbers7:42 Vanihukuni nanaathannamosa, Eliyasafi, mwaana mulopwana a Deyuweli muhooleli a aGadi, aaruuha yooveleelaawe." 
Numbers7:43 Yooveleelaawe yaari esasaani ya eparatha* ya ixekeli* ncira ni miloko miraru ni ebasiya ya eparatha* wa soomiserano ya ixekeli* miloko mithannamiili, soopiili iyo siringiweene ottharihiwaka moota wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*. Soopiili soosareya ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura, ntoko yooveleela ya irooro;" 
Numbers7:44 nipoottoro na eyuuma yoorikaxa na ixekeli* muloko, noosareya erubani*;" 
Numbers7:45 mwaamombe mmoha, napunci ni eputtiputthi elopwana ya eyaakha emoha ntoko yooveleela yoohisa;" 
Numbers7:46 napunci mmoha a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka; 
Numbers7:47 ni imombe piili, anapunci a ikhondoolo athanu, anapunci athanu ni iputtiputthi ilopwana ithanu sa eyaakha emoha weera siveleeliwe ntoko yooveleelela murettele. Ela yaari yooveleela ya Eliyasafi, mwaana mulopwana a Deyuweli." 
Numbers7:48 Vanihukuni nanaathannameeli, Elixama, mwaana mulopwana a Amihudi, muhooleli a awEfrayimi, aaruuha yooveleelaawe." 
Numbers7:49 Yooveleelaawe yaari esasaani ya eparatha* ya ixekeli* ncira ni miloko miraru ni ebasiya ya eparatha* wa soomiserano ya ixekeli* miloko mithannamiili, soopiili iyo siringiweene ottharihiwaka moota wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*. Soopiili soosareya ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura, ntoko yooveleela ya irooro;" 
Numbers7:50 nipoottoro na eyuuma yoorikaxa na ixekeli* muloko, noosareya erubani*;" 
Numbers7:51 mwaamombe mmoha, napunci ni eputtiputthi elopwana ya eyaakha emoha ntoko yooveleela yoohisa;" 
Numbers7:52 napunci mmoha a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka; 
Numbers7:53 ni imombe piili, anapunci a ikhondoolo athanu, anapunci athanu ni iputtiputthi ilopwana ithanu sa eyaakha emoha weera siveleeliwe ntoko yooveleelela murettele. Ela yaari yooveleela ya Elixama, mwaana mulopwana a Amihudi." 
Numbers7:54 Vanihukuni nanaathannamararu, Gamaliyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Pedasuri, muhooleli a aManaxe aaruuha yooveleelaawe." 
Numbers7:55 Yooveleelaawe yaari esasaani ya eparatha* ya ixekeli* ncira ni miloko miraru ni ebasiya ya eparatha* wa soomiserano ya ixekeli* miloko mithannamiili, soopiili iyo siringiweene ottharihiwaka moota wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*. Soopiili soosareya ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura, ntoko yooveleela ya irooro;" 
Numbers7:56 nipoottoro na eyuuma yoorikaxa na ixekeli* muloko, noosareya erubani*;" 
Numbers7:57 mwaamombe mmoha, napunci ni eputtiputthi elopwana ya eyaakha emoha ntoko yooveleela yoohisa;" 
Numbers7:58 napunci mmoha a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka; 
Numbers7:59 ni imombe piili, anapunci a ikhondoolo athanu, anapunci athanu ni iputtiputthi ilopwana ithanu sa eyaakha emoha weera siveleeliwe ntoko yooveleelela murettele. Ela yaari yooveleela ya Gamaliyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Pedasuri." 
Numbers7:60 Vanihukuni nanaathannamaxexe Abidani, mwaana mulopwana a Gidiyoni, muhooleli a aBenyamini, aaruuha yooveleelaawe." 
Numbers7:61 Yooveleelaawe yaari esasaani ya eparatha* ya ixekeli* ncira ni miloko miraru ni ebasiya ya eparatha* wa soomiserano ya ixekeli* miloko mithannamiili, soopiili iyo siringiweene ottharihiwaka moota wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*. Soopiili soosareya ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura, ntoko yooveleela ya irooro;" 
Numbers7:62 nipoottoro na eyuuma yoorikaxa na ixekeli* muloko, noosareya erubani*;" 
Numbers7:63 mwaamombe mmoha, napunci ni eputtiputthi elopwana ya eyaakha emoha ntoko yooveleela yoohisa;" 
Numbers7:64 napunci mmoha a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka; 
Numbers7:65 ni imombe piili, anapunci a ikhondoolo athanu, anapunci athanu ni iputtiputthi ilopwana ithanu sa eyaakha emoha weera siveleeliwe ntoko yooveleelela murettele. Ela yaari yooveleela ya Abidani, mwaana mulopwana a Gidiyoni." 
Numbers7:66 Vanihukuni nanaamuloko, Ahizeri, mwaana mulopwana a Amixadayi, muhooleli a aDani, aaruuha yooveleelaawe." 
Numbers7:67 Yooveleelaawe yaari esasaani ya eparatha* ya ixekeli* ncira ni miloko miraru ni ebasiya ya eparatha* wa soomiserano ya ixekeli* miloko mithannamiili, soopiili iyo siringiweene ottharihiwaka moota wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*. Soopiili soosareya ephepa yooreerela moota wa exekeli* yooweetheeliwa makhura, ntoko yooveleela ya irooro;" 
Numbers7:68 nipoottoro na eyuuma yoorikaxa na ixekeli* muloko, noosareya erubani*;" 
Numbers7:69 mwaamombe mmoha, napunci ni eputtiputthi elopwana ya eyaakha emoha ntoko yooveleela yoohisa;" 
Numbers7:70 napunci mmoha a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka; 
Numbers7:71 ni imombe piili, anapunci a ikhondoolo athanu, anapunci athanu ni iputtiputthi ilopwana ithanu sa eyaakha emoha weera siveleeliwe ntoko yooveleelela murettele. Ela yaari yooveleela ya Ahizeri, mwaana mulopwana a Amixadayi." 
Numbers7:72 Vanihukuni nanaamuloko nimmoha, Pagiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Okrani, muhooleli a awAxeri, aaruuha yooveleelaawe." 
Numbers7:73 Yooveleelaawe yaari esasaani ya eparatha* ya ixekeli* ncira ni miloko miraru ni ebasiya ya eparatha* wa soomiserano ya ixekeli* miloko mithannamiili, soopiili iyo siringiweene ottharihiwaka moota wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*. Soopiili soosareya ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura, ntoko yooveleela ya irooro;" 
Numbers7:74 nipoottoro na eyuuma yoorikaxa na ixekeli* muloko, noosareya erubani*;" 
Numbers7:75 mwaamombe mmoha, napunci ni eputtiputthi elopwana ya eyaakha emoha ntoko yooveleela yoohisa;" 
Numbers7:76 napunci mmoha a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka; 
Numbers7:77 ni imombe piili, anapunci a ikhondoolo athanu, anapunci athanu ni iputtiputthi ilopwana ithanu sa eyaakha emoha weera siveleeliwe ntoko yooveleelela murettele. Ela yaari yooveleela ya Pagiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Okrani." 
Numbers7:78 Vanihukuni nanaamuloko ni meeli, Ahira, mwaana mulopwana a Enani, muhooleli a aNafitali, aaruuha yooveleelaawe."
