Numbers7:79 Yooveleelaawe yaari esasaani ya eparatha* ya ixekeli* ncira ni miloko miraru ni ebasiya ya eparatha* wa soomiserano ya ixekeli* miloko mithannamiili, soopiili iyo siringiweene ottharihiwaka moota wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*. Soopiili soosareya ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura, ntoko yooveleela ya irooro;" 
Numbers7:80 nipoottoro na eyuuma yoorikaxa na ixekeli* muloko, noosareya erubani*;" 
Numbers7:81 mwaamombe mmoha, napunci ni eputtiputthi elopwana ya eyaakha emoha ntoko yooveleela yoohisa;" 
Numbers7:82 napunci mmoha a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka; 
Numbers7:83 ni imombe piili, anapunci a ikhondoolo athanu, anapunci athanu ni iputtiputthi ilopwana ithanu sa eyaakha emoha weera siveleeliwe ntoko yooveleelela murettele. Ela yaari yooveleela ya Ahira, mwaana mulopwana a Enani." 
Numbers7:84 Iya saari sooveleela sa ahooleli a aYixrayeli soowaatteelihera altaari* awo yaattikittheliwaaya. Sootheene iyo saari isasaani sa eparatha* muloko ni piili, ibasiya wa soomiserano sa eparatha* muloko ni piili ni mapoottoro a eyuuma yoorikaxa muloko ni meeli." 
Numbers7:85 Khula esasaani ya eparatha* yaalemela ixekeli* ncira ni miloko miraru, ni khula ebasiya wa soomiserano yaalemela ixekeli* miloko mithannamiili. Olemela wootheene wa khula eparatha* waari ixekeli* 2 400, ottharihiwaka moota wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*." 
Numbers7:86 Mapoottoro muloko ni meeli oosareya erubani* yaalemela khula nipoottoro ixekeli* muloko, ottharihiwaka moota wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela*. Mapoottoro ootheene a eyuuma yoorikaxa yaalemela ixekeli* ncira ni miloko miili." 
Numbers7:87 Axinama ootheene yaapakeliwe yooveleela yoohisa yaari aximombe muloko neeli, anapunci a ikhondoolo muloko neeli ni iputtiputthi ilopwana muloko ni piili sa eyaakha emoha vamoha ni sooveleela sa irooro. Anapunci a ipuri muloko neeli yaaruuhiwa wa yooveleelela yoottheka." 
Numbers7:88 Axinama ootheene yaapakeliwe yooveleelela murettele yaari imombe miloko miili niixexe, anapunci a ikhondoolo miloko mithannamosa, anapunci a ipuri miloko mithannamosa ni iputtiputthi ilopwana miloko mithannamosa sa eyaakha emoha. Saari seiya sooveleela saaruuhiwe weera etteelihiwe altaari*, vahoolo wa ottikittheliwawaya." 
Numbers7:89 Moisesi aavolowaawe Muheemani ya Muthukumano* weera uulume ni Yave, anniiwa nsu naamuulumano eriyari ya akerubini* eeli, vasulu wa yookhuneelano ya Arka* a wiiraana. Vanonto, Yave uulumaawemo ni yoowo." 
Numbers8:1 Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi: 
Numbers8:2 Mwamuleele Aharoni: ‘Mwaarehereraka soomwaleela ithannapiili, iyo simwaleeleke mpatta wa ohoolo wa onyaari." 
Numbers8:3 Aharoni aapaka hiiho. Aahiikaathi soomwaleela moota seeraaya siwehihiwe ohoolo wa onyaari, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Numbers8:4 Onyaari waapakeliwe eyuuma yoorikaxa woohaneliwa okhuma nyettosaya mpaka ithutusaya, hiihoweene Yave aamoonihenraawe Moisesi." 
Numbers8:5 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers8:6 “Mwaamwalamwalihe aLeevi eriyari ya aYixrayeli ni mwaatteelihase. 
Numbers8:7 Otteelihiwawaya okhaleke ha: nyuwo mwaamisereke maahi a otteelihera; vahoolowaya mpakihe weera emetthe erutthu yootheene ni ecape soowarasaya weera yiitteelihe. 
Numbers8:8 Woottharelana awosa emuruuheke mwaamombe ni sooveleela sa irooro sa ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura, ni nyuwo munruuheke mwaamombe anaaveeli ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka." 
Numbers8:9 Mwaarongheke aLeevi ohoolo wa Eheema ya Muthukumano* ni muthukumanyiheke muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli. 
Numbers8:10 Mwaarongheke aLeevi vamaithoni wa Yave, ni aYixrayeli ewiikaathereke matata." 
Numbers8:11 Aharoni aarongheke aLeevi wa Yave ntoko yooveleela yoowiinainiheriwa wa mpatta wa aYixrayeli weera awosa etteeliheriweke muteko wa Yave. 
Numbers8:12 aLeevi yiikaathenreene matata mmuru mwa aximombe, nyuwo mumveleeleke mwaamombe mmoha ntoko yoomveleelela yoottheka ni mukinoowo ntoko yoomveleelela yoohisa weera aareherereleke wiiwanana ni Yave aLeevi." 
Numbers8:13 Ngwiikaathi aLeevi ohoolo wa Aharoni ni wa anamwanaawe asilopwana ngwooniheraka ntoko yooveleela yoowiinainiheriwa Yave. 
Numbers8:14 Moota owo, nyuwo munimwaamwalamwaxa aLeevi eriyari ya aYixrayeli, ni aLeevi anookhala awaka." 
Numbers8:15 Mwaatteelihaleene aLeevi ni ngwoonihenreene ntoko yooveleela yoowiinainiheriwa, awosa evoloweke Muheemani ya Muthukumano* weera erumeelemo." 
Numbers8:16 Awosa ti aYixrayeli kineeraaka kitteeliheraxiwe. Miyo kaamwalamwalihenre weera ekhale awaka vanipuroni na matthaara, aani matthaara asilopwana a khula muthiyana muYixrayeli." 
Numbers8:17 Matthaara asilopwana ootheene a aYixrayeli a eriyari ya atthu ni axinama, ti awaka. Miyo kimwalamwalihenre kaavulalinghaaka matthaara ootheene a wExipitu." 
Numbers8:18 Vanonto kinaathanla aLeevi vanipuroni na matthaara ootheene a aYixrayel. 
Numbers8:19 Eriyari ya aYixrayeli ootheene, kohaatteeliha aLeevi ntoko yoomvaha Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana; awosa anoorumeela Muheemani ya Muthukumano* mwa nsina na aYixrayeli ni animwaarehererela wiiwanana ni Yave weera nihikhaleru nihooxo nneera naaphwanye aYixrayeli yaattamelaka Nipuro Nootteela*." 
Numbers8:20 Moisesi, Aharoni ni muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli yaahaapakela aLeevi ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Numbers8:21 aLeevi yaahiitteeliha, enacapa soowarasaya ni Aharoni aahaaruuha ntoko yooveleela yoowiinainiheriwa ohoolo wa Yave, anaarehererela wiiwanana ni Yave weera aatteelihe." 
Numbers8:22 Vahoolowaya, aLeevi yaahoorwa orumeela Muheemani mwa Muthukumano ewehawehiwaka ni Aharoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana. Yaahaapakela aLeevi ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Numbers8:23 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers8:24 “Moota aLeevi antthuneyaaya otthara ti ola: asilopwana okhuma a iyaakha miloko miili niithanu woorowa ohoolo angwera orumeela, epacereke ovara muteko Muheemani mwa Muthukumano." 
Numbers8:25 Vaheera okhuma a iyaakha miloko mithanu ehiyeke ovara muteko ni ehipwahereretho. 
Numbers8:26 Yaakhavihereke asikhwaaya mmutekoni wookosoopa Eheema ya Muthukumano*, mene awosa ehivareketho muteko. Ti hiiha nyuwosa muneeraanyu muthanleke sootthuneya sa aLeevi." 
Numbers9:1 Vamweerini woopacera vayaakhani yanaaveeli, aYixrayeli ekhumaleene wExipitu, Yave aamweerela Moisesi, munikareni na oSinayi:" 
Numbers9:2 “aYixrayeli emuupuweleleke mPaska* mweehuhunimwawe. 
Numbers9:3 Mpake efesta ela mweehuhuni yoothanliwa nsuwa nneelaka vanihukuni nanaamuloko ni maxexe na mweereene yoowo muttharihaka malamulowaaya ni ikanosaya sootheene.” 
Numbers9:4 Vano Moisesi aahaalamulela aYixrayeli weera epakeke efesta ya mPaska*; 
Numbers9:5 ni awosa yaapaka yeeyo munikareni na oSinayi, nsuwa nneelaka vanihukuni nanaamuloko ni maxexe na mweeri woopacera. aYixrayeli yaapaka sootheene ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Numbers9:6 Vaheera akina akina a yaawo khayaawenre opaka efesta ya mPaska* nihuku nne yeenre yathatuwaka oohiitteela wootava muttembo. Tivawo yaamwaattamenlaaya Moisesi ni Aharoni nihuku nenenenne," 
Numbers9:7 enamweerela Moisesi: “Hiyo noothatuwa oohitteela wootava muttembo, vano heeni neeraahu nihiihiwe omoonihera yooveleelaahu Yave mweehuhunimwaya, ntoko aYixrayeli akinaawo?”" 
Numbers9:8 Moisesi aawaakhulasa: “Ngwehererase mpaka miyo kineeraaka kisuwele yeeyo Yave olamulenlaawe aweerelakani nyuwo.” 
Numbers9:9 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers9:10 Mwaaleele aYixrayeli weera mukina a nyuwo hoye hoye a ekhapiraanyu athatuwa oohitteela wootava muttembo hoye hoye arakamela niwoko na mukwaha, hata hiiho apakeke efesta ya mPaska* a Yave." 
Numbers9:11 Mpakeke efesta ya mPaska* vanihukuni nanaamuloko ni maxexe na mweeri wanaaveeli, nsuwa nneelaka. Mukhuureke eputtiputthi vamoha ni epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu ni mapoonda oowaawa." 
Numbers9:12 Muhihiyeru etthu mpaka waaxiiye ni muhipwexeru nikhuva na eputtiputthi. Mwaapakaka efesta ya mPaska*, mwiiweleleke ikano sootheene sa mPaska*." 
Numbers9:13 Wa soothesene, mulopwana akhala ootteela ahinarakamela niwoko na mukwaha, ni hiiho aahipaka efesta ya mPaska*, owo oomoliweke eriyari ya mulokwaawe eenre ahimpakelaka yooveleela Yave mweehuhuni yootthuneya. Owo onoohaawa ni makacamiho a sootthekasawe." 
Numbers9:14 Namarwa onkhala eriyaraanyu ontthuna opaka efesta ya mPaska* a Yave, apakeke attharihaka malamulo ni ikano sa mPaska*. Malamuloweene yaawo ekhaleke wa namarwa mpaka neethi." 
Numbers9:15 Vanihukuni yaakungiwaaya etabernaakulu* – Eheema enthokorora itthaabwa sa wiiraana, nihutte naakhuneela eyo. Okhuma oxekuwa mpaka oxa nno vasulu wa etabernaakulu* naalikana ni mooro." 
Numbers9:16 Mahuku ootheene yeereya ha: Othana nihutte naakhuneela eyo ni ohiyu naalikana ni mooro. 
Numbers9:17 Imaara sootheene nihutte naawelaaya vasulu wa Eheema, aYixrayeli yaamuttimula; vanipuroni naakhuruwaaya nihutte, awosa yaamukonelawo." 
Numbers9:18 aYixrayeli yaattimula ettharihaka Nlamulo na Yave, ntokotho ni Nlamulo na Yave yaamukonela. Ehuhu yootheene nihutte naakhalaaya vasulu wa etabernaakulu*, aYixrayeli khayeetta." 
Numbers9:19 Nihutte naakhalaaya vasulu etabernaakulu* mweehuhuni yincipale, aYixrayeli yiiwelela olamula wa Yave ni khayaattimula." 
Numbers9:20 Imaara sikina nihutte naakhala vasulu etabernaakulu* mahuku vakhaani ni awosa yannakonela ntoko aalamulenlaawe Yave. Vahoolowaya yaattimula elamuleliweene ni Yave. 
Numbers9:21 Imaara sikina nihutte nannapwaherera okhuma oxekuwa mpaka waaxiiye, ni oxeexelo naawelaaya, awosa yaamuttimula. Othana hoye hoye ohiyu, imaara sootheene nihutte naawelaaya, awosa yaamuttimula." 
Numbers9:22 Naari nihutte naakhalaaya vasulu etabernaakulu* mahuku meeli, mweeri mmoha hoye hoye eyaakha emoha, aYixrayeli yaamupwaherera waakoneliwa ni khayaattimula. Vaheera nno naawelaaya, yaamuttimula." 
Numbers9:23 Mwa yeeyo, yaakhala ni yaattimula ettharihaka Nlamulo na Yave. Yannakwanihera otthuna wa Yave, ettharihaka olamula waalaleiwale mwa Moisesi." 
Numbers10:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers10:2 “Mpake mapalapatta meeli a eparatha* yoohaniwa weera mvarele muteko woothukumanyiha muloko ni wooniherela okonelingwe eneneero yoottimulela. 
Numbers10:3 Yaarumaka mapalapatta meeli, muloko wootheene othukumaneke ohoolowanyu vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*." 
Numbers10:4 Vano, naruma nimoha paahi, ahooleli, mapwattapwattha a mahimo a aYixrayeli, ethukumaneke ohoolowanyu." 
Numbers10:5 Nipalapatta naarumaka, ipuumba sikonenle mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa sittimuleke." 
Numbers10:6 Naarumaka emaara yanaaveeli, okonelingwe mpatta wa ohitto ottimuliweke. Oruma onuukhale ethoonyero weera ottimuliwe." 
Numbers10:7 Waatthuneyaka othukumanyiha muloko, murumihe mapalapatta, mene ohikhaleke ntoko oruma wa ottimula." 
Numbers10:8 Anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni, asaserdoti* yiipeke mapalapatta. Ela ti ekano yoohimala wa nyuwo ni ikhapirasanyu." 
Numbers10:9 Mwaavolowaka mukhottoni mulaponimwanyu, mungwananaka mwiittana anoohasuleni mwiipe mapalapatta. Vano Yave, Mulukwaanyu, onoowuupuwelelani ni onimootapuxani mwa amwiittanaanyu." 
Numbers10:10 Mmahukunimwanyutho a ifesta soothanliwa ni vanihukuni noopacera na khula mweeri, nyuwosa mwiipeke mapalapatta mweehuhuni ya sooveleela soohisa ni ya sooveleelasanyu sa murettele, ni iyo nsikhale soowuupuweleleliwasanyu ohoolo wa Mulukwaanyu. Miyo ti Yave, Mulukwaanyu." 
Numbers10:11 Vanihukuni nanaamiloko miili na mweeri wanaaveeli wa eyaakha yanaaveeli, nihutte naaheemela vasulu etabernaakulu* enthokorora itthaabwa sa wiiraana." 
Numbers10:12 Vano aYixrayeli yaattimula munikareni na oSinayi, yeeraka ekelanno ekelanno mpaka nihutte neemenlaaya munikareni na oParani." 
Numbers10:13 Hiiho yaattimulasa emaara yoopacera, ntoko Yave aalamulenlaawe mwa Moisesi." 
Numbers10:14 Anakhotto a waakonelingwe wa oYuda ti yaapacenre ottimula, vathi wa eneneerowaaya. Nahexoni, mwaana mulopwana a Aminadabe, ti aahoolela." 
Numbers10:15 Netaneli, mwaana mulopwana a Zuwari, aari mutokweene a anakhotto a epuumba ya Isakari," 
Numbers10:16 ni Eliyabe, mwaana mulopwana a Heloni, ti aahoolela anakhotto a epuumba ya Zebuloni." 
Numbers10:17 Etabernaakulu* yuukululiwaaya, aGerexoni ni aMerari yaamuteexa, enattimula." 
Numbers10:18 Woottharelana yaattimunle ti anakhotto a waakonelingwe wa aRubeni, vathi wa eneneerowaaya. Elisuri, mwaana mulopwana a Sediwuri, ti aahoolela." 
Numbers10:19 Xalumiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Zurixadayi, ti aahoolela anakhotto a epuumba ya Simeyoni," 
Numbers10:20 ni Eliyasafi, mwaana mulopwana a Deyuweli, ti aahoolela anakhotto a epuumba ya Gadi." 
Numbers10:21 Vano aKohati yaattimula ekuxaleene itthu sootteelihiwa. Awosa ehinaaye ophiya, waatthuneya weera etabernaakulu* ekhaleke yookungiweene." 
Numbers10:22 Woottharelana yaattimunle ti anakhotto a waakonelingwe wa awEfrayimi, vathi wa eneneerowaaya. Aahoolela ti Elixama, mwaana mulopwana a Amihudi." 
Numbers10:23 Gamaliyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Pedazuri, ti aahoolela anakhotto a epuumba ya Manaxe," 
Numbers10:24 ni Abidani, mwaana mulopwana a Gidiyoni, ti aahoolela anakhotto a epuumba ya Benyamini." 
Numbers10:25 Woomalihera yaattimunle ti anakhotto a waakonelingwe wa aDani, vathi wa eneneerowaaya; awo yaari ookisera wa waakonelingwe wootheene. Ahizeri, mwaana mulopwana a Amixadayi, ti aahoolela." 
Numbers10:26 Pagiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Okrani, ti aahoolela anakhotto a Axeri," 
Numbers10:27 ni Ahira, mwaana mulopwana a Enani, ti aahoolela anakhotto a epuumba ya aNafitali." 
Numbers10:28 Ola waari moota wa anakhotto a aYixrayeli yaattharihaaya ngweettanimwaya. 
Numbers10:29 Vano Moisesi aamweerela Hobabi, mwaana mulopwana a mMidiyani Rewuyeli, atatawe oowaathelela Moisesi: “Ninttimula nirowaka vanipuroni mwa nenne Yave eenraawe: ‘Miyo kinimoovahasani.’ Murowe ni hiyo, ni nnimookosoopani nnenesene niwoko Yave oororomeliha itthu sooreera wa aYixrayeli.”" 
Numbers10:30 Owo aamwaakhula: “Hoye, nkinrowa. Kinoohokoleela elapwaaka ni wa mulokwaaka.”" 
Numbers10:31 Wa soothesene, Moisesi aamweerela: “Dyoontte, muhinihiye. Nyuwo moosuwela weiwo ontthuneya weera nikonele munikareni. Munihooleleke." 
Numbers10:32 Mwarowa ni hiyo, nnookawana ni nyuwo itthu sooreera sootheene Yave aneeraawe anivahe.”" 
Numbers10:33 Vano awosa yaattimula vamwaako wa Yave, eneetta mahuku mararu. Arka* a wiiraana a Yave yaari ohoolowaya mmahukuni mararu ale weera ephwanye nipuro noowiitthuuwa." 
Numbers10:34 Othana nihutte na Yave naakhala vasuluwaya imaara sootheene yaattimulaaya erowaka okonela nipuro nikina. 
Numbers10:35 Imaara sootheene yaattimulaaya Arka*, Moisesi eera: “Mweemele Yave! Emwaraxiwe amwiittanaanyu ni awananaanyu etthawe ohoolowanyu!”" 
Numbers10:36 Imaara sootheene yeemelaaya Arka*, owo eera: “Muhokoleele Yave wa aYixrayeli oohaalikeleyaru.”" 
Numbers11:1 Waaheereya weera muloko waapacera wiikhupanyera niwoko na sookacamihasaya, emuleelaka Yave. Owo awiiwakaru, isarasawe saapatta ni mooro wa mpatta wa Yave waahaahisa eriyaraaya onalaliha mukhwipi mukina wa waakonelingwe." 
Numbers11:2 Vano muloko waamukhuwelela Moisesi ni owo aamvekela Yave, mooro onacipha." 
Numbers11:3 Tivawo nipuro nne niitthaniwaaya oTabera, niwoko mooro wa mpatta wa Yave waahisa eriyaraaya." 
Numbers11:4 Mukuttula mmoha wa anamarwa waari eriyaraayasa waasareya ohaawela sooca sa mulaponimwaya, ni aYixrayeli yaapacera wiikhupanyeratho, yeeraka: “Eya! Mano naarino enama yookhuura!" 
Numbers11:5 Hiyo nnuupuwelela ihopa naakhuuraahu mahaleene wExipitu, mpakatho mixiri, mwiirukule, aaliyu*, isebola ni iporawu*." 
Numbers11:6 Vaheera vano munkhela woonimalela; seenre sootheene iyo sihooneyaka, ehikhanle emana* paahi!" 
Numbers11:7 Emana* yaalikana ni etthapweene ni ekhalelo mattonyo a otothowa wa nnyoma. 
Numbers11:8 Muloko wannarowa ottottattotta emana* mukhwipimwaya, ni yaaxila vaxiloni hoye hoye yaatthipula muraweni. Vahoolowaya ti yaapeyaaya emana*, enapakela iboolu. Saasiva ntoko iboolu sooweetheeliwa makhura a sooliveira*." 
Numbers11:9 Ohiyu nikame niimaaya waakonelingwe, ti yaamoraayatho emana*." 
Numbers11:10 Moisesi aawiiwa atthu a imusi sootheene ettaandawulaka, khula mutthu vamulako wa eheemaawe. Vano isara sa Yave saapatta, ni Moisesi aahitta." 
Numbers11:11 Moisesi aamukoha Yave: “Munruuhelenleni yoonanara ela murumeiyaanyu? Ti niwoko na ohoosivelihaniwaka Nyuwo mukithanlalaanyu owehaweha muloko wootheene ola? 
Numbers11:12 Weeraka ti miyo kirupanle muloko ola? Ti miyo kiyanre? Munkivekelela heeni weera kihele vayaawani ntoko naamwaana onimukuxaawe mwaana ooyariwa vaanaano weera kironghe elapo mwaaroromelinghaanyu ni nlipelo makholowaaya? 
Numbers11:13 Kaphwanye woowi enama wa muloko wootheene ola? Awosa ankikhupanya miyo yeeraka: ‘Munivahe enama weera nikhuure!’ 
Numbers11:14 Miyo nkingwera okuxa meekhaaka muloko wootheene ola; muteko ola wookivikana. 
Numbers11:15 Mwakipakela hiiha, mukiive vaanaano va; mwakisivela, muhikihiye koonaka oheleyawaka nthala.”" 
Numbers11:16 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mwaathukumanyihe asitokweene miloko mithannamiili a aYixrayeli mwaasuwenlaanyu ntoko ahooleli ni angwehaweha eriyari ya muloko. Mwaaronghe Muheemani ya Muthukumano* weera yakhalewo ni nyuwo. 
Numbers11:17 Miyo kinookhuruwa ni kinimuulumawo ni nyuwo; kinoovenxa mpatta wa munepa ori mwa nyuwo kiheleke mwa yaawosa. Awosa animookhaviherani muteko wooviha woohoolela muloko, moota wooweera nyuwo khamwaaholeela meekhiinyu." 
Numbers11:18 Muleele muloko: ‘Mwiitteeliherase omaalo, niwoko nyuwosa munookhuura enama. Yave oowiiwani mwaamukhupanyaanyu, mweeraka: ‘Eya! Mano naarino enama weera nikhuure! Fataari naaraahu wExipitu! Vano Yave onimoovahani enama, ni nyuwosa munookhuura." 
Numbers11:19 Nyuwosa khamukhuura enama nihuku nimoha paahi, hoye hoye mahuku meeli, naari mathanu hata miloko miili," 
Numbers11:20 mene mweeri wootheene, mpaka enama owunkhani ni oweettihani murima, niwoko moomukhootta Yave ori variyariwanyusa, ni moomukhupanya, mweeraka: Nivenyenreni wExipitu?”" 
Numbers11:21 Wa soothesene, Moisesi aamweerela: “Miyo kiri va yeemelelo eriyari ya asilopwana 600 000, ni muneera: Kinimwaavahasa enama weera ekhuure mweehuhuni ya mweeri wootheene!”" 
Numbers11:22 Weeraka siiviwe mihuwo sootheene yaamukhala yookwanela yaawo? Weeraka ihopa sootheene sa mphareiya saawaruliwe yaamukhala yookwanela yaawo? 
Numbers11:23 Yave aamwaakhula Moisesi: “Weeraka onookota owera wa Yave? Vano nyuwo munimoona maswaaka yakwanihereya hoye hoye yaahikwanihereya.” 
Numbers11:24 Vano Moisesi aakhuma, anathalihera muloko yeeyo Yave aahimalaawe. Aahaathukumanyiha asitokweene miloko mithannamiili a eriyaraaya ni vahoolowaya aaweemexasa mukhwipi wa Eheema." 
Numbers11:25 Yave aakhuruwa munihutteni anamuulumano, anakhumiha mpatta wa munepa waari mwa Moisesi, anahela mwa asitokweene miloko mithannamiili. Munepa waakhuruwelakaru yaawosa, yaathalihera otthuna wa Muluku, mene khayaahokoleenletho opaka yeeyo." 
Numbers11:26 Vanonto asilopwana eeli yiitthaniwa Eldadi ni Medadi, yaahanle waakonelingwe. Ooweeli yaari munkuttulani wa asitokweene, mene khayaarongwe oHeemani. Munepa waahoorwatho wa yaawosa, enathaliherasa otthuna wa Muluku waakonelingwe." 
Numbers11:27 Vano mmiravo mmoha aatthimaka, anamuthalihera Moisesi: “Eldadi ni Medadi anthalihera otthuna wa Muluku okonelingwe.”" 
Numbers11:28 Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwanana a Nuni aari namakhaviheraawe Moisesi okhuma emiravowaawe aahuuluma, eeraka: “Apwiyaaka, Moisesi, mwaahiihase awo!”" 
Numbers11:29 Vaheera Moisesi aahaakhula: “Nyuwo munkikhalela nthiti? Kinghaawelaxa weera Yave ahele munepa muloko wootheene ola ni ootheene ekhale maprofeeti!” 
Numbers11:30 Vano Moisesi ni asitokweene a aYixrayeli yaahokoleela waakonelingwe. 
Numbers11:31 Vahoolowaya, yaahoopa epheyo ya mpatta wa Yave, enaaruuha anapiri a mphareiya anaamoroxela waakonelingwe wootheene, othataanyeranawaya wookwanaka emeetru* emoha, aamwaraxelaka mipatta sootheene ettima yookwana weetta nihuku nenenenno." 
Numbers11:32 Nihuku nootheene nne, ohiyu ole ni nihuku naattharelana nootheene, muloko waavenya onaattottattotta anapiri. Khaawo aattontte woohiphiyera mirindi muloko." 
Numbers11:33 Vaheera ekhuuraka nlelo enama ni ehinaaye omira, isara sa Yave saapattela eriyari ya muloko, ni owo aavulaliha ni nihooxo noowoopiha." 
Numbers11:34 Tivawo nipuro nne niitthaniwaaya oKiberoti-Hataava, niwoko yaavithiwawo yaawo yaahaawela sooca sikina." 
Numbers11:35 oKiberoti-Hataava muloko waattimula orowaka oHazeroti, onakhalawo." 
Numbers12:1 Miriyami ni Aharoni yaapacera omukhupanya Moisesi niwoko owo aamuthenle muthiyana muKuxe. 
Numbers12:2 Awosa yaakohasa: “Apaale Yave onuuluma paahi ni Moisesi? Owo khanuuluma ni hiyo?” Vano Yave aahiiwa yeeyo. 
Numbers12:3 Moisesi aari mulopwana oowiiyevihaxa, ahilikanxereyaka ni akhalaru mutthu mukina a mulaponi." 
Numbers12:4 Woowaakuveya, Yave aamweerela Moisesi, Aharoni ni Miriyami: “Nyuwosa ooraaru, murowase oHeemani ya Muthukumano.” Hiiho ooraaru ale yaarowawo." 
Numbers12:5 Vano Yave aakhuruwa munrimbuni na nihutte ni, areene vamulako wa Eheema, aamwiitthana Aharoni ni Miriyami. Ooweeli awo yaarowa ohoolo," 
Numbers12:6 ni Owo aaweerela: “Mwiiwe maswaaka: Aakhalaka eriyaraanyu mprofeeti a Yave, kiniixoonihera mwa yoowo mmooneloni; kinuuluma ni yoowo moolohani." 
Numbers12:7 Wa soothesene, khoohiyono hiiho, ni murumeiyaaka Moisesi – owo ti oororomeleya waapwaha arumeiyi ootheene akina." 
Numbers12:8 Kinuuluma ni yoowo ttunda ttunda, woohivitheya, ohikhanle ni marikarika; ni owo onoona moota okhanlaawe Yave. Muhoovenle heeni omukhupanya murumeiyaaka Moisesi?”" 
Numbers12:9 Vano isara sa Yave saahaapattelasa ni Owo aahaahiyasa. 
Numbers12:10 Nihutte nisusaleene vaheemani, Miriyami aakhalanowo makokho; yaari ntoko etthapwe. Aharoni aangweha Miriyami, anoona weera owo aakhalano makokho." 
Numbers12:11 Aharoni amweerela Moisesi: “Dyoontte apwiyaaka, muhinittaruxele yoottheka nipankaahu moololoni." 
Numbers12:12 Muhitthunihere weera owo akhale ntoko mwaana oovirela weiwo onkhuma mmirimani mwa amayawe, ophwateiyeene mpatta mukina wa erutthu.”" 
Numbers12:13 Vano Moisesi aamukhuwelela Yave: “Ii Muluku, mummorele ikharari ni munlamihe!”" 
Numbers12:14 Yave aamwaakhula Moisesi: “Atithawe yaamusenyenle owiitho, owo aamuulihiheya muru mmahukuni mathannameeli. Munsusihe weera akhale meekhaawe okerekhere wa okonelingwe wa mahuku mathannameeli; vahoolowaya owo ahokoloxiweke.”" 
Numbers12:15 Hiiho, Miriyami aakhala meekhaawe mahuku mathannameeli okerekhere wa waakonelingwe, ni muloko khawaattimunle owo ahihokoloxiwe." 
Numbers12:16 Vahoolowaya yaattimula oHazeroti, enakonelasa munikareni na oParani." 
Numbers13:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers13:2 “Mwaarumihe asilopwana akina akina weera yahottele elapo ya oKanaani, mwa yeeyo kinaavahaaka aYixrayeli. Munrumihe muhooleli mmoha a khula epuumba ya makholowaaya.”" 
Numbers13:3 Hiiho Moisesi aahaarumiha munikareni na oParani, ntoko aalamulenlaawe Yave. Ootheene awo yaari mapwattapwattha a aYixrayeli." 
Numbers13:4 Masinaaya ti ala: A epuumba ya Rubeni, Xamuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Zakuri;" 
Numbers13:5 a epuumba ya Simeyoni, Xafati, mwaana mulopwana a Hori;" 
Numbers13:6 a epuumba ya Yuda, Kalebi, mwaana mulopwana a Yefune;" 
Numbers13:7 a epuumba ya Isakari, Igali, mwaana mulopwana a Yoseefe;" 
Numbers13:8 a epuumba ya Efrayimi, Hoxeya, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni;" 
Numbers13:9 a epuumba ya Benyamini, Palti, mwaana mulopwana a Rafu;" 
Numbers13:10 a epuumba ya Zebulomi, Gadiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Sodi;" 
Numbers13:11 a epuumba ya Yoseefe, eyo tiiyo, a epuumba ya Manaxe, Gadi, mwaana mulopwana a Susi;" 
Numbers13:12 a epuumba ya Dani, Amiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Gemali;" 
Numbers13:13 a epuumba ya Axeri, Seturi, mwaana mulopwana a Mixayeli;" 
Numbers13:14 a epuumba ya Naftali, Nahebi, mwaana mulopwana a Vofesi;" 
Numbers13:15 a epuumba ya Gadi, Geyuweli, mwaana mulopwana a Maki." 
Numbers13:16 Ti yaala masina a asilopwana aarumihalaawe Moisesi weera yahottele elapo. Moisesi aamutteha Hoseya, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni nsina na Yoxuwa." 
Numbers13:17 Moisesi aarumihaawe weera yahottele oKanaani, aaheera: “Mvire oNegebe ni mwapwaherere mpaka elapo ya mmanyaakoni." 
Numbers13:18 Moone moota ekhanlaaya elapo ni muloko onkhalawo waareene woolipa hoye hoye woohilipa, yaareene ancipale hoye hoye vakhaani." 
Numbers13:19 Moone elapo ankhalaaya yaareene yooreera hoye hoye yoonanara; isidade ankhalaaya saahitekeleliwe hoye hoye saareene soolipihiwa. 
Numbers13:20 Moone etthaya eyo yaareene ya ethaadyira hoye hoye yookhwelakhwela; waakhanleenewo othako hoye hoye naari. Mwiilipihere weera muruuhe soowiima sikina sikina sa mulaponi. Vano eyo yaari ehuhu saapaceriwaaya ohephiwa iwuuva*. 
Numbers13:21 Awosa yaarowa, enahottela elapo, okhuma munikareni na oZini mpaka oRehobi, mpatta wa oLebo-Hamati." 
Numbers13:22 Awosa yaavinre oNegebe, enaphiya oHebroni, aakhalaawewo Ahimoni, Xexai ni Talemayi a ekhapira ya Enaki. Vano, oHebroni waatekiwe ottuli wa iyaakha ithannapiili ohinaaye oZowani mulaponi mwa wExipitu." 
Numbers13:23 Ephiyaleene mureyareyani na wEskoli, yaathikila ephandi mwa yeeyo yaarino ekhuce ya iwuuva*. Eeli a yaawosa yaakuxa ekhuce etthukelenleene mukoponi. Yaarukulatho irooma* ni ifiigu." 
Numbers13:24 Nipuro nne niitthaniwa nreyareya na wEskoli niwoko na ekhuce ya iwuuva* yaathikinlaayawo. 
Numbers13:25 Evinreene mahuku miloko mixexe, awosa yaahokolowa yaarummwalaayawo ohottela elapo ele." 
Numbers13:26 Vano awosa yaahokoleela wa Moisesi, Aharoni ni muloko wootheene wa oYixrayeli elapo ya oKadexi, munikareni na oParani, yaathalihenraayawo sootheene yoonnaayawo ni yaawoonihera soowiima sa mulaponi." 
Numbers13:27 Yaamuthalihera Moisesi yoonnaaya: “Noovolowa mulaponi mwaanirumihenlaanyu, ni yoosareyawo emana*, mukaka ni oravo! Moone soowiima iya sa weiwo." 
Numbers13:28 Vaheera muloko onkhalawo ti woolipaxa ni isidade ti soolipihiwa ni sitokotoko. Noowoonatho akina a ekhapira ya Enaki. 
Numbers13:29 awAmaleki ankhala oNegebe; aHiti, aYebusi ni awAmori ankhala mmanyaakoni; aKanaani ankhala vakhiviru wa ephareiya muxerexere Yordanu.”" 
Numbers13:30 Vano Kalebi aamaaliha muloko ohoolo wa Moisesi, aneera: “Nrowe nakuxe elapo ni hiyo nnoowera yeeyo!”" 
Numbers13:31 Vaheera asilopwana yaarongwe ni yoowo yaaheera: “Nihiwanane muloko owo, niwoko ti woolipaxa onipwaha hiyo.”" 
Numbers13:32 Vano awosa yaamwaramwaxa eriyari ya aYixrayeli mutthenga wookhootteya mwaha wa elapo ele. Awosa yaaheera: “Elapweene yeele naarongwaahu ohottela enaanyaanya yaawo ankhalamo. Ootheene niwoonnaahu ti oorakamaxa. 
Numbers13:33 Noowoonatho aNeefili* – ekhapira ya Enaki, moota wooweera hiyo niixoona ntoko misoope, ni awosatho yaanoona hiiho." 
Numbers14:1 Ohiyu ole muloko wootheene waapacera wiinla okhuwelaxaka. 
Numbers14:2 aYixrayeli ootheene yaamukhupanya Moisesi ni Aharoni, ni muloko wootheene waaweerelasa: “Fataari naakhwenle wExipitu hoye hoye mulaponimu mwa nikare!" 
Numbers14:3 Yave onnironghela heeni elapo eyo? Weera niiviwe ni ekatana? Axaarihu ni anamwaniihu anookuxiwa ntoko soohuhuliwa mukhottoni. Khawaareerela ohokoleela wExipitu?” 
Numbers14:4 Vano yaaheerelana: “Nimuthanleke muhooleli, nihokoleeleke wExipitu!”" 
Numbers14:5 Hiiho, Moisesi ni Aharoni yaahuuramihela ekhovaaya vathi, ohoolo wa muthukumano wootheene wa aYixrayeli." 
Numbers14:6 Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, ni Kalebi, mwaana mulopwana a Yefune, yaari eriyari ya yaawo yaarongwe ohottela elapo, yaahaahulasa soowarasaya," 
Numbers14:7 eneerela muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli: “Elapo niviravinraahu nihottelaka ti yooreera. 
Numbers14:8 Yave asiveleya wa hiyo, Owo onoonivolongha mulaponi mmo, eraayamo emana*, mukaka ni oravo, ni onoonivaha." 
Numbers14:9 Muhimvaanye Yave. Muhoove muloko wa mulaponi, niwoko hiyo nnoottukuttula. Okhapeleleyawaya woomala, mene Yave ori ni hiyo. Muhiwoovase!”" 
Numbers14:10 Vaheera muloko wootheene waatthuna waavonyasa maluku. Vano ovuwa wa Yave waahaakhumelela aYixrayeli ootheene Muheemani ya Muthukumano*. 
Numbers14:11 Yave aahuuluma ni Moisesi, amweerelaka: “Mpaka yaakhani muloko ola opwahereraka ohikoonelamo? Onuuhiye yaakhani okihovela, kirimooniheraru ineneero sootikhiniheya kipankaaka variyariwaya?" 
Numbers14:12 Miyo kinimwaavulalihasa ni nihooxo ni kinimwaaphwatasa, mene kinimoopakasani muloko mutokotoko ni woolipaxa waapwaha yaawosa.”" 
Numbers14:13 Moisesi aamweerela Yave: “Vano awExipitu animwiiwa yeeyo. Mooweranimwanyu mookhumiha muloko ola eriyaraayasa," 
Numbers14:14 ni anoowuulumela yeeyo amaki a elapo ela. Awosa ahiiwa weera Nyuwo, Yave, muri ni muloko ola ni weera Nyuwo mohooniwa ttunda ttunda. Ahiiwa weera nihutte ninkhala mwa yaawosa, ni weera munrowa ohoolowaya munrimbuni na nihutte othana, ni ohiyu munrimbuni na mooro." 
Numbers14:15 Mwamalamaliha muloko ola, miloko siiwa sa epilaanyu sinimweera:" 
Numbers14:16 ‘Yave khawenre orongha muloko ola mulaponi aaroromelinghaawe munlipeloni, tivawo owiivenlaawe munikareni.’" 
Numbers14:17 Vaheera vano, ikuru sa Yave soonihereye, ntoko muroromelinghaanyu:" 
Numbers14:18 Yave ompisa onyoonyiwa ni oosareya osivela woohimala, alevelelaka otakhala ni ovaanya. Vaheera khanghiya yoottheka woohittaruxa, ni onaattaruxa anamwane mwa sootakhala sa asitiithi mpaka ekhapira yanaararu ni yanaaxexe." 
Numbers14:19 Muttharihaka osivelawanyu otokotoko, mulevelele sootakhala sa muloko ola, mooteene yoole mulevelenlaanyu muloko ola okhuma evenyakaru wExipitu mpaka vano.”" 
Numbers14:20 Yave aamwaakhula: “Miyo koolevelela, ntoko nyuwo mvekenlaanyu." 
Numbers14:21 Wa soothesene, kinlipela mwa ovuwa wa Yave onsariha elapo yootheene," 
Numbers14:22 weera khakhalaru naari mmoha a yaawo yoonne ovuwawaka ni ineneero sootikhiniha kipankaaka wExipitu ni munikareni, ekootaka murima ni ehikiiwelelaka imaara muloko," 
Numbers14:23 aani khakhalaru naari mmoha a yaawosa anoone elapo kiroromelinghaaka ni nlipelo wa makholowaaya. Ootheene yaawo ahikoonenleru khayoona. 
Numbers14:24 Vaheera, eenre murumeiyaaka Kalebi akhalanaka munepa mukina ni akitthara ni moota wookwanela, Miyo kinoopakiha weera avolowe mulaponi aarongwaawe ohottela, ni ekhapiraawe enookuxa elapo eyo." 
Numbers14:25 Yeenre awAmaleki ni aKanaani emaka mureyareyani, omaalo muhokolowe ni muttimule murowaka onikareni mukuxeraka ephiro enrowa ophareiya yooxeera.”" 
Numbers14:26 Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi ni Aharoni: 
Numbers14:27 “Mpaka yaakhani muloko ola wootakhala okikhupanyaka? Kohiiwa wiikhupanyera wa aYixrayeli ala anamattaandawula. 
Numbers14:28 Mwaaleele: ‘Kinlipela mwa Nsinanaka, onghima Yave, weera kinimoopakelasani sootheene mvekenlaanyu:" 
Numbers14:29 Sinoomorela munikareni mittembo sa ootheene nyuwo, okhuma a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo, yaalikeliwe munamalepelani ni akikhupannye." 
Numbers14:30 Khakhalaru naari mmoha a nyuwo anaavolowe mulaponi kaalipelenlaaka keemenxeene ntata woovahani weera mmakemo, ahikhanle paahi Kalebi, mwaana mulopwana a Yefune, ni Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni." 
Numbers14:31 Vaheera, wa anamwaniinyu, mwa yaawosa nyuwosa mweenraanyu weera yaamukuxiwa ntoko soohuhuliwa mukhottoni, Miyo kinimwaavolongha weera yakuxe elapo nyuwosa mukhoottiyaanyu." 
Numbers14:32 Wa soothesene, mittembosanyu sinoomorela munikarenimu." 
Numbers14:33 Anamwaniinyu asilopwana anookhala akukhuli a muumu, mweehuhuni ya iyaakha miloko mixexe, ehaawaka mwa ohiroromeleyawanyu, mpaka muttembwaanyu wookisera oneeraaya ophwateliwe munikareni." 
Numbers14:34 Mweehuhuni ya iyaakha miloko mixexe, nyuwosa munoohaawa sookacamiha sa sootthekesanyu ni munoosuwela etaphulelo ya okikhootta Miyo; khula eyaakha eniilikaneleke wa khula nihuku a miloko mixexe mwa yaawo mwaarongwaanyu ohottela elapo." 
Numbers14:35 Miyo, Yave, kohuuluma ni vekhaikhai kinoopakela itthu iyo muloko wootheene wootakhala ola, okivaanelenle. Anoophwanya ommaleloniwaya munikarenimu; anookhwela muumu.’”" 
Numbers14:36 Vanonto asilopwana yaarumihiwe ni Moisesi weera yahottele elapo – yaawosa ehokolongweene yaatannyera muloko wootheene omukhupanya Moisesi woomwaraxa mutthenga wookhootteya; 
Numbers14:37 asilopwana awo yaamwaramwaxenle mutthenga wookhootteya mwaha wa elapo yaahottelingwe, yaahookhwa ni nihooxo ohoolo wa Yave." 
Numbers14:38 Wa ootheene yaarongwe ohottela elapo, yaapwaherenre ni okumi aari Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, ni Kalebi, mwaana mulopwana a Yefune." 
Numbers14:39 Moisesi athaliherakaru masu ala wa aYixrayeli ootheene, awosa yaahiinlaxa." 
Numbers14:40 Oxeexeloxa wa waaxiiye yaawelasa vasulu mwaako, eneera: “Noottheka! Vaheera vano nri oolikaneene owela vanipuroni Yave onithoonyenraawe.”" 
Numbers14:41 Wa soothesene, Moisesi aaheera: “Muhiniiwelelela heeni Nlamulo na Yave? Eyo kheeweettelani nnene!" 
Numbers14:42 Muhiwelase, niwoko Yave khakhanle ni nyuwosa. Munoowiniwa ni amwiittana," 
Numbers14:43 niwoko awAmaleki ni aKanaani animoowanananiwo, ni nyuwosa munimwiiviwa ni ekatana. Mweenre muhiyaka omutthara Yave, Owo khakhanle ni nyuwosa." 
Numbers14:44 Waarookhalaru hiiho, awosa yaawela moovaanyanimwaya vasulu wa elapo ya nyaako, mene okhuma Moisesi mpaka Arka* a wiiraana a Yave yaahanle waakonelingwe." 
Numbers14:45 Vano awAmaleki ni aKanaani yaakhalawo yaakhuruwa, enaawinasa yaattharelelaka mpaka oHorema." 
Numbers15:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers15:2 “Mwaaleele ha aYixrayeli: ‘Mwaavolowaka mulaponi kinoovahaakani weera mwamakemo," 
Numbers15:3 ni mwaamuruuhelaka Yave yooveleela ya imombe hoye hoye ikhondoolo – yoorehereriwa vayikho ntoko yoowunkhela yoomusiveliha Yave, ekhalaka yooveleela yoohisa hoye hoye ekina, ekhalaka weera mukwanihere yoororomeliha, hoye hoye ntoko yooveleela ya otthunawanyu naari yooveleela ya yakhalaru efesta," 
Numbers15:4 vano yoowo anaaruuhe yooveleelaawe, amuruuheleketho Yave yooveleela ya irooro ya ikiilu* piili sa ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa eliitru* emoha ya makhura." 
Numbers15:5 Wa khula eputtiputthi ya yooveleela yoohisa hoye hoye yooveleela, mureherere yooveleela ya eliitru* emoha ya eviinyu ntoko yooveleela yoowura." 
Numbers15:6 Mureherere yooveleela ya irooro ya ikiilu* piili sa ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa ni eliitru* emoha ya makhura wa khula napunci 
Numbers15:7 nitho eliitru* emoha ya eviinyu ntoko yooveleela yoowura. Mveleele ntoko yoowunkhela yoomusiveliha Yave. 
Numbers15:8 Mmoha a nyuwosa aamurehereraka mwaamombe wa yooveleela yoohisa hoye hoye yooveleela weera akwanihere yoororomeliha yooreera hoye hoye ntoko yooveleelela murettele wa Yave," 
Numbers15:9 vano aandyeerereke ikiilu* ithannamosa sa ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa iliitru* piili sa makhura. 
Numbers15:10 Muruuhetho iliitru* piili sa eviinyu wa yooveleela yoowura. Eyo eniikhale yooveleela erehereriwe vayikho, yooveleela yoowunkhelaxa enimusiveliha Yave." 
Numbers15:11 Khula mwaamombe hoye hoye napunci a ekhondoolo naari eputtiputthi hoye hoye epuri, erehereriweke mooteene yoola." 
Numbers15:12 Mpakeke yeeyo wa khula mwaamunama, wa ootheene muneeraanyu mwaareherere." 
Numbers15:13 Khula neethi apakeke hiiho aruuhaka yooveleela erehereriwe vayikho, yooveleela yoowunkhelaxa enimusiveliha Yave." 
Numbers15:14 Vano namarwa onkhala eriyaraanyu, hoye hoye eriyari ya ekhapiraanyu ya muhoolo aruuha yooveleela erehereriwe vayikho, yooveleela yoowunkhelaxa enimusiveliha Yave, apakeke hiihotho." 
Numbers15:15 Muthukumano okhalaneke malamuloweene yaawo, eniyooreereleni nyuwo mpaka namarwa onkhala eriyaraanyu. Nna nikhale nlamulo noohimala wa ikhapirasanyu sootheene sineera sirwe. Ohoolo wa Yave, enimooreerelani nyuwosa mpaka namarwa onkhala ni nyuwo." 
Numbers15:16 Nlamulo nenenenno ni ikano iyo, seetteliweke ni nyuwo mpaka namarwa onkhala ni nyuwo." 
Numbers15:17 Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi: 
Numbers15:18 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Mwaavolowasaka mulaponi kinoovahasaakani," 
Numbers15:19 munacamo yoowiima ya mulaponi, mukhumihe mpatta mmoha ntoko yooveleela wa Yave." 
Numbers15:20 Muruuhe eboolu yoopakeliwa sooca soopacera sa ephepaanyu. Muruuhe ntoko yooveleela wa yoohephaanyu. 
Numbers15:21 Ikhapirasanyu sootheene sineera sirwe siruuheke sooca soopacera sa ephepa ntoko yooveleela wa Yave. 
Numbers15:22 Vaheera nyuwosa mwattheka mweerisani, muhikwaniheraka nakhalaru nlamulo na ootheene ala," 
Numbers15:23 eyo tiiyo nakhalaru na ootheene Yave olamulenlaawe mwa Moisesi, okhuma nihuku oolamulenlaaweni nyuwosa ni wa ikhapirasanyu sootheene sa muhoolo" 
Numbers15:24 ni eyo yapakiwa mweerisani ni yaahisuweliwa ni muloko, vano muloko wootheene omveleeleke mwaamombe ntoko sooveleela soohisa soowunkhela soomusiveliha Yave. Emveleeleketho vamoha ni yooveleelaaya ya irooro ni yooveleela yoowura, ntoko olamuleliwaaya, nitho napunci a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka." 
Numbers15:25 Musaserdoti* areherereleke wiiwanana ni Yave muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli, ni awosa anooleveleliwa, niwoko yootthekaaya kheehiyono mweerisani, ni awosa yaamuruuhela Yave yooveleela yoorehereriwa vayikho ni yooveleelela yoottheka." 
Numbers15:26 Muloko wa aYixrayeli wootheene ni anamarwa ankhala eriyaraaya anoolevelelasiwa, niwoko muloko wootheene waakhalano nthowa na yoottheka mweerisani." 
Numbers15:27 Wa soothesene, mutthu mmoha paahi attheka mweerisani, owo aruuheke epuri ethiyana ya eyaakha emoha ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka." 
Numbers15:28 Musaserdoti* amureherereleke wiiwanana ni Yave yoowo otthenke mweerisani ohoolo wa Yave, ni owo onooleveleliwa." 
Numbers15:29 Nlamulo nimoha paahi nnikhale wa yoowo anaattheke mweerisani, akhalaka neethi, naari namarwa onkhala ni nyuwo." 
Numbers15:30 Vaheera yoowo onttheka mwayiini akhalaka neethi, hata namarwa onkhala ni nyuwo, onimuruwana Yave, ni amalamalihiweke eriyari ya mulokwaawe." 
Numbers15:31 Niwoko na ohoonela masu a Yave ni onanariha malamulowaawe, amalamalihiweke; nthowa ti nawawe." 
Numbers15:32 Nihuku nimoha, aYixrayeli ereene munikareni, yaamphwanya mulopwana mmoha aasaka ikhuuni nihuku na eSaabadu." 
Numbers15:33 Yaawo yaamphwannye aasaka ikhuuni, yaamurongha wa Moisesi, Aharoni ni muloko wootheene," 
Numbers15:34 enamvara, niwoko khayaasuwela yoompakela." 
Numbers15:35 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mulopwana owo iiviweke. Muloko wootheene omvonyeke maluku okerekhere okonelingwe.” 
Numbers15:36 Hiiho, muloko wootheene waamurongha okerekhere wa okonelingwe, onamvonya maluku mpaka okhwa, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Numbers15:37 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers15:38 “Mwaaleele ha aYixrayeli: ‘Mpake icikwayitti mukhwipi mwa soowarasanyu ni eheleke nliinya na kanka wa khula ecikwayitti; epakeke yeeyo wa ikhapira sootheene sineera sirwe. 
Numbers15:39 Moonaka icikwayitti iyo, nyuwosa munimuupuwelela malamulo ootheene a Yave weera mwiiwelele ni muhiraruwe hata muhitthare soohaawela sa murimaanyu ni sa maithwaanyu." 
Numbers15:40 Hiiho nyuwosa munimuupuwelela wiiwelela malamulowaaka ni nyuwosa munookhala muloko wootteeliheriwa Mulukuwaanyu. 
Numbers15:41 Miyo ti Yave, Mulukwaanyu, ooruuhaleni wExipitu weera kikhale Mulukwaanyu. Miyo ti Yave, Mulukwaanyu.’”" 
Numbers16:1 Kora, mwaana mulopwana a Yizehara, mwaana mulopwana a Kohati, mwaana mulopwana a Leevi vamoha ni Datani ni Abirami, anamwane asilopwana a Eliyabi ni Oni, mwaana mulopwana a Peleti, ootheenaawo a epuumba ya Rubeni, yaathatuwa anamavaanelela" 
Numbers16:2 ni awosa yaamurukunuwela Moisesi. Yaakhala ni yaawosa aYixrayeli macira meeli ni miloko mixexe – ahooleli oosuwanyeyaxa mmulokoni yaathanliwe ohoolela muthukumano. 
Numbers16:3 Awosa yaamwaattamela Moisesi ni Aharoni, enaweerelasa: “Wookwana! Muthukumano wootheene ola ti wootteela, khula mutthu a yaawosa ti ootteela, ni Yave ori eriyaraayasa. Vano heeni nyuwosa muniixunnuwihaanyu mmuthukumanoni wa Yave?”" 
Numbers16:4 Iiwakaru yeeyo Moisesi aahuuramihela ekhovaawe vathi. 
Numbers16:5 Vahoolowaya aamweerela Kora ni anamattharaawe: “Oxeexelo Yave onoomoonihera yoowo ori awawe ni onimwiikhuveelihera yoole ori ootteela. Mulopwana Muluku aneeraawe amuthanle, onimwiikhuveelihera." 
Numbers16:6 Nyuwo Kora, ni anamattharaanyu ootheene mpake ha: Mukuxe yoohisera erubani* ni" 
Numbers16:7 omaalo muhelemo mooro ni erubani* ohoolo wa Yave. Yoowo Yave aneeraawe amuthanle onookhala mulopwana ootteelihiwa. Nyuwosa aLeevi wookwana mpaka vaava!” 
Numbers16:8 Moisesi aamweerelatho Kora: “Vano mukiiwe nyuwosa aLeevi! 
Numbers16:9 Khawookwanneni oomwalamwalinghaaweni Muluku a oYixrayeli ni muloko mukinoowo wa oYixrayeli ni iiruuhenlaawe weera mvare muteko mutabernaakuluni* ya Yave ni weera mukhale oolikaneene orumeela muloko? 
Numbers16:10 Owo ohooruuhani nyuwo ni axunninyu aLeevi ootheene vamaithoniwawe, ni vano muntthunatho osaserdoti*?" 
Numbers16:11 Nyuwo ni anamattharaanyu moomvaanya Yave! Aharoni taani oomukhupanya?” 
Numbers16:12 Vano Moisesi aamwiitthaniha Datani ni Abirami, anamwane asilopwana a Eliyabi, mene awosa yaaheera: “Hiyo khaninrowa!" 
Numbers16:13 Khawookwanneni onikhumihawanyu mulaponi oraayamo mukaka ni oravo weera muniivele munikareni? Muntthunatho wiikhaliha mutokweenaahu? 
Numbers16:14 Ohiya yeeyo, nyuwo khamunikunxe mulaponi oraayawo mukaka ni oravo hata khamunivangheru yoohiyeriwa ya imatta ni imatta sa iwuuva*. Nyuwo munuupuwela weera munoowera waalokottha asilopwana ala? Hiyo, khaninrowa!”" 
Numbers16:15 Vano Moisesi aanyoonyaxiwa, anamweerela Yave: “Muhaakhulele sooveleelasaya, niwoko miyo nkimwaakhenle mwa yaawo naari buuru mmoha hata nkaapakenleru yoonanara.”" 
Numbers16:16 Moisesi aamweerela Kora: “Nyuwo ni anamattharaanyu ootheene mwiixooniheraseke omaalo wa Yave – nyuwo, awosa ni Aharoni." 
Numbers16:17 Khula mutthu akuxeke yoohiseraawe erubani*, ahelekemo erubani* ni arongheke wa Yave. Sootheene iyo sikhaleke soohisera erubani* macira meeli ni miloko mithanu. Nyuwo ni Aharoni muruuhaseketho soohiserasanyu erubani*.”" 
Numbers16:18 Hiiho khula mutthu a yaawosa aakuxa yoohisera erubani*, anapattiha erubani*, anakhala vamoha ni Moisesi ni Aharoni vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*." 
Numbers16:19 Kora aathukumanyihaleene anamattharaawe ootheene vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*, ovuwa wa Yave waahoonihereya wa muloko wootheene." 
Numbers16:20 Yave aamweerela Moisesi ni Aharoni: 
Numbers16:21 “Mususe wa muloko ola weera Miyo kaamalihase woowaakuveya.” 
Numbers16:22 Vaheera Moisesi ni Aharoni yaahuuramihelasa ekhove vathi, enamwaakhula: “Ii Muluku, Muluku onaavaha okumi ootheene, munoonyoonyeriwa muloko wootheene atthenkeene mutthu mmoha paahi?”" 
Numbers16:23 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers16:24 “Muleele muloko weera osuse muheemani sa Kora, Datani ni Abirami.”" 
Numbers16:25 Moisesi aavenya, anarowa aaraawewo Datani ni Abirami, ni asitokweene a aYixrayeli yaamutthara." 
Numbers16:26 Owo aahooperera muloko: “Mususe muheemani mwa atakhali ala! Muhitaveru etthwaaya, weera muhimalamalihiwe niwoko na sootthekasaya.”" 
Numbers16:27 Awosa yaasusa muheemani sa Kora, Datani ni Abirami. Vano Datani ni Abirami yaakhala yeemelelo vamulako wa iheemasaya vamoha ni axaaraya, anamwanaaya mpaka asikhaani." 
Numbers16:28 Moisesi aaheera: “Nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Yave ookirumiha weera kipake itthu sootheene iya, ni weera eyo kheekhumme mwa miyo moota ola:" 
Numbers16:29 Alasa yakhwa onkhweliwaaya eneereya paahi yeele engweereela atthu ootheene, eyo ti eneneero yooweera Muluku khakiruminghe." 
Numbers16:30 Vaheera Yave oonihera etthu enyowanixa ni etthaya yahula eyanowaaya, enaamirasa vamoha ni sootheene siri sawaya ni awosa yakhuruwela mulittini akumi, vano nyuwosa munoosuwela weera asilopwana ala aamveiha Yave." 
Numbers16:31 Moisesi amalihakaru ohima sootheene iyo, mpatta wa etthaya yeemelansaaya yaahaaleleya" 
Numbers16:32 ni etthaya yaahuleya, enaamirasa vamoha ni imusisaya, anamatthara ootheene a Kora ni mihakhusaya sootheene." 
Numbers16:33 Yaakhuruwela mulittini eri akumi, ni sootheene yaarinaaya; etthaya yaawuuheelela, ni yaariheya elakaseyaka eriyari ya muthukumano." 
Numbers16:34 Woowiiwa okhuwelawaya, aYixrayeli yaari muxerexere yaatthawa yoovaka omiriwatho ni etthaya." 
Numbers16:35 Vano waahoorwa mooro waakhumelela wa Yave onaalaliha asilopwana macira meeli ni miloko mithanu yaaveleela erubani*. 
Numbers16:36 Vanonto Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers16:37 “Mwamuleele Eleyazari, mwaana mulopwana a musaserdoti* Aharoni, weera akuxe soohisera erubani* eriyari ya yeeyo ehanle evihaka ni amwaramwaxe makhala, niwoko soohisera erubani* ti sootteela." 
Numbers16:38 Soohisera erubani* sa atthu siwiivale mwa sootthekasaya sinoohaniwa ntoko ireesa ni sinoovareliwa muteko woowaahuruwelano altaari*, niwoko sooveleeleliwa Yave ni soothatuwa sootteelihiwa. Iyo sikhaleke eneneero wa aYixrayeli.”" 
Numbers16:39 Musaserdoti* Eleyazeri aathukumanyiha soohisera erubani* sa ebronze* saaveleeliwe ni yaale yaalalihiwe ni mooro. Soohisera erubani* seiye saahaniwa sinavareliwa muteko woowaahuruwelano altaari*," 
Numbers16:40 ntoko Yave aalamulenlaawe mwa Moisesi. Eyo yaapakiwe ntoko eyuupuxero wa aYixrayeli weera ahikhaleru anaahise erubani* ohoolo wa Yave ahikhanle a ekhapira ya Aharoni. Ovirikanawaya onoothatuwa ntoko Kora ni anamattharaawe. 
Numbers16:41 Oxaawaya, muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli waapacera omukhupanya Moisesi ni Aharoni, weeraka: “Nyuwosa mohiiva muloko wa Yave.”" 
Numbers16:42 Wa soothesene, muloko omuthukumanenleene Moisesi ni Aharoni, ni awosa ekhuveelakaru oHeemani ya Muthukumano, wootutuxereya nihutte naakhuneela Eheema ni ovuwa wa Yave waahooneya." 
Numbers16:43 Vano Moisesi ni Aharoni yaarowasa ohoolo wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*," 
Numbers16:44 ni Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers16:45 “Mvenye eriyari ya muloko ola weera Miyo kaamalihase woowaakuveya.” Vaheera awosa yaahuuramihelasa ekhovaaya vathi," 
Numbers16:46 ni Moisesi aamweerela Aharoni: “Mukuxe yoohiseraanyu erubani* ni muhelemo erubani* vamoha ni mooro woovaliwa valtaarini*, ni murowe woowaakuveya omulokoni weera mwarehererele wiiwanana ni Yave, niwoko wa Yave sookhumelela isara sitokotoko ni nihooxo noopacera.”" 
Numbers16:47 Aharoni aapaka yeeyo aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi, anatthimakela eriyari ya muthukumano. Nihooxo naapacera eriyari ya muloko, mene Aharoni aaveleela erubani*, anarehererela wiiwanana ni Yave." 
Numbers16:48 Aharoni aaheemela eriyari ya ookhwa ni akumi ni nihooxo naamala. 
Numbers16:49 Yaawo yaakhwiiye ni nihooxo nne yaari 14 700, waahiya yaale yaakhwiiye mwaha wa Kora." 
Numbers16:50 Vano Aharoni aahokoleela wa Moisesi vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*, niwoko nihooxo naamala." 
Numbers17:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers17:2 “Mwaavekele aYixrayeli weera eruuhe ikopo muloko ni piili, emoha wa khula pwattapwattha a epuumba. Mulepe nsina na khula muhooleli mukoponimwawe." 
Numbers17:3 Mukoponi ya Leevi mulepe nsina na Aharoni, niwoko ontthuneya weera ekhale ekopo emoha wa khula pwattapwattha a khula epuumba." 
Numbers17:4 Mvolonghe Muheemani ya Muthukumano*, ohoolo wa Arka* arino itthaabwa sa wiiraana, weiwo kinkumanaakawo ni nyuwosa." 
Numbers17:5 Ekopo ya yoowo kineeraaka kimuthanle enoottuva, ni Miyo kinimwiitapuxa mwa okhupanyaxa anoopakelasaayani aYixrayeli.”" 
Numbers17:6 Hiiho, Moisesi aahaaleela aYixrayeli, ni ahoolelaaya yaavahasa ikopo muloko ni piili, emoha wa khula pwattapwattha a epuumba ni ekopo ya Aharoni yaari eriyari ya seiyo." 
Numbers17:7 Moisesi aavolongha ikopo ohoolo wa Yave, Muheemani enthokorora itthaabwa sa wiiraana." 
Numbers17:8 Oxaawaya Moisesi aavolowa Muheemani, anoona weera ekopo ya Aharoni yaathoonyera epuumba ya Leevi, yaattuva, ekhalanaka mihupu ni ithutu, mpakatho soowiima sa imandoweira*." 
Numbers17:9 Vano Moisesi aakhumiha ikopo sootheene saari ohoolo wa Yave, anarongha ohoolo wa aYixrayeli ootheene. Awosa yaahoona ikopo, ni khula pwattapwattha aakuxa ekopowaawe." 
Numbers17:10 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Muronghetho ekopo ya Aharoni ohoolo wa Arka* arino itthaabwa sa wiiraana weera ethokororiwe ntoko woopereriwa wa anamavaanya. Eyo enoomaliha okikhupanyawaya weera ehikhwe.” 
Numbers17:11 Moisesi aapaka yeeyo Yave aamulamulenlaawe. 
Numbers17:12 aYixrayeli yaamweerelasa Moisesi: “Hiyo nnimookhwa! Nooriheya, ootheene hiyo, nooriheya!" 
Numbers17:13 Ootheene yaawo eniyaattamele Nipuro Nootteela* na Yave animookhwa. Weeraka ootheene hiyo nnimookhwa?” 
Numbers18:1 Yave aamweerela Aharoni: “Nyuwo, anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni emusi ya atithinyu, munookhalano nthowa na wakhalaru moota wa oveihiwa Nipuro Nootteela*. Nyuwo ni anamwaniinyu munookhalano nthowa mwa sakhalaru sooveiha sipakeiye mmutekoni wa esaserdoti." 
Numbers18:2 Mwaaruuhetho axunninyu aLeevi ari a epuumba ya makholowaanyu, weera ethukumane ni nyuwo ni yookhavihereni nyuwo ni anamwaniinyu mwaarumeelaka ohoolo wa Eheema enthokorora itthaabwa sa wiiraana." 
Numbers18:3 Awosa yoovarelasekeni muteko ni ekhapeleleketho muteko wa Eheema, mene ehaattameleru ikaruma sa Nipuro Nootteela* hoye hoye altaari*, niwoko yapaka hiiho, animookhwa okhuma awosa mpaka nyuwosa." 
Numbers18:4 Awosa ethukumaneke ni nyuwosa, ni mutekwaaya onuukhale wookosoopa Eheema ya Muthukumano*, evaraka miteko sootheene sintthuneya. Ahikhaleru anaawaattamelaseni." 
Numbers18:5 Nyuwosa munookhalano muteko wookosoopa Nipuro Nootteela* ni altaari*, weera sihaamoreletho aYixrayeli isara sa Yave." 
Numbers18:6 Miyo muneenaaka kohaathanla axunninyu aLeevi eriyari ya aYixrayeli ntoko yoowoovahani; etteeliheriweene Yave weera evare muteko Muheemani mwa Muthukumano. 
Numbers18:7 Vaheera nyuwo ni anamwaniinyu paahi murumeeleke ntoko asaserdoti* mwa sootheene sa valtaarini* siri wiithela eluttu. Kinoovahani nyuwo muteko wa esaserdoti ntoko yoovaha. Akhalaru mutthu ohitthuniheriwe anaattamele Nipuro Nootteela* iiviweke.” 
Numbers18:8 Vano Yave aamweerela Aharoni: “Miyo muneenaaka kohookhalihani namawehaweha a micaango kinruuheliwaaka. Vano sooveleela sootteela sootheene aYixrayeli eneeraaya ekivahe, Miyo kinimoovahani ntoko mpattaanyu ni wa anamwaniinyu." 
Numbers18:9 Wa sooveleela sootteelaxa nyuwo munookhalano mpatta onuureliwa vayikho. Eriyari ya soovaha ankiruuhelaaya ntoko sooveleela sootteelaxa – sikhalaka sa irooro, hata sa soottheka, naari sa nthowa, mipatta iyo ti sawinyu ni wa anamwaniinyu." 
Numbers18:10 Muceeke ntoko etthu yootteelaxa; asilopwana ootheene eceeke. Mooneleke okhala sootteelaxa. 
Numbers18:11 Kinoovahanitho nyuwo, ni anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana, micaango sootheene ankhumihaaya aYixrayeli sa sooveleela soowiinainihiwa, ntoko ekano yoohimala. Ootheene a emusaanyu eneera ekhale ootteeleene, eceeke." 
Numbers18:12 Kinoovahani nyuwo makhura ooreerela, eviinyu enyowani yooreerela ni etrigu yooreerela aYixrayeli eneeraaya emveleeleleke Yave ntoko soowiima soopacera sa ohepha." 
Numbers18:13 Soowiima soopacera sootheene sa mulaponi eneeraaya emuruuhele Yave, ti sawinyu. Ootheene a emusaanyu eneera ekhale ootteeleene, eceeke." 
Numbers18:14 Sootheene sa aYixrayeli sineera sitteeliheriwe Yave ti sawinyu. 
Numbers18:15 Matthaara ootheene eneera eveleeleliwe Yave, akhalaka mutthu, hata mwaamunama, anaakhale awinyu. Vaheera nyuwo mmoopoleke akhalaru mwaana mulopwana a ntthaara, mpakatho matthaara ootheene a mihuwo soohitteela." 
Numbers18:16 Yaakhalanaka mweeri mmoha wa oyariwawaya, nyuwo ngwoopoleke ni nlivo noowoopolela nri igrama* miloko mithannamosa sa eparatha* ettharaka moota wa exekeli* ya Nipuro Nootteela* enlemela igrama* muloko ni piili." 
Numbers18:17 Wa sootheene, muhoopole ntthaara na emombe, ekhondoolo hoye hoye na epuri, niwoko ti ootteela. Muyeehere ephomaaya valtaarini* ni muhise makhuraaya ntoko yooveleela yoorehereriwa vayikho, yoowunkhela yoomusiveliha Yave." 
Numbers18:18 Enama ya axinama awo ti yawinyu, mpakatho ehoce ya yooveleela yoowiinainihiwa ni vatakhwini yoolopwana." 
Numbers18:19 Sootheene sineera simwalamwaxiwe eriyari ya soovaha sootteela aYixrayeli eneeraaya emveleelele Yave, Miyo kinoovahani nyuwo ni anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana ntoko ekano yoohimala. Ti wiiraana woohimala wa maakha ohoolo wa Yave, wa nyuwo ni ekhapiraanyu.”" 
Numbers18:20 Yave aamweerelatho Aharoni: “Nyuwo khamukhalano yoohiyeriwa mulaponimwaya, hata khamukhalano ettima eriyaraayasa; Miyo ti ettimaanyu ni yoohiyeriwaanyu eriyari ya aYixrayeli." 
Numbers18:21 Kinaavaha aLeevi sanaamuloko sootheene sa aYixrayeli ntoko ntthuvelo na muteko amvaraaya woorumeela Muheemani ya Muthukumano*. 
Numbers18:22 Okhuma vaanaano va mpaka ohoolo, aYixrayeli ehaattameleke Eheema ya Muthukumano*. Yaattamela, anoohaawa makacamiho a sootthekasaya ni animookhwa." 
Numbers18:23 Ti yootthuneya ya aLeevi ovara muteko Muheemani ya Muthukumano* ni anookhalano nthowa na yakhalaru yoonanara eneera yeereiyemo. Ela ekano yoohimala wa ikhapira sootheene sineera sirwe. Awosa khayaakhelaru yoohiyeriwa eriyari ya aYixrayeli. 
Numbers18:24 Ohiya yeeyo, yoohiyeriwa kinaavahaaka aLeevi ti sanaamuloko aYixrayeli eneeraaya eveleeleke ntoko mucaango wa Yave. Tivawo Miyo keenraaka weera awosa kheekhalanoru yoohiyeriwa eriyari ya aYixrayeli.”" 
Numbers18:25 Vahoolowaya, Yave aamweerela Moisesi:" 
Numbers18:26 “Mwaaleele ha aLeevi: ‘Mwaakhelaka wa aYixrayeli sanaamuloko kinoovahasaakani ntoko yoohiyeriwa, nyuwosa mveleeleke yanaamuloko emoha sa sanaamuloko iyo ntoko yooveleela wa Yave." 
Numbers18:27 Eyo eniyooneliwe ntoko mpatta wanaamulokwaanyu, ntoko ereene ya etrigu mumveerelaanyuwo hoye hoye munaamelaanyuwo eviinyu." 
Numbers18:28 Hiiho nyuwo mumveleeleleketho yooveleela Yave ya sanaamuloko sootheene saakheliwe wa aYixrayeli. Mwa sanaamuloko iyo, nyuwosa mvaheke mucaango wa Yave wa musaserdoti* Aharoni." 
Numbers18:29 Eveleeleke ntoko yooveleela wa Yave mpatta wooreerela, aani mpatta wootteelihiwa wa sootheene muneeraanyu mvahasiweke.’" 
Numbers18:30 Mwaaleele aLeevi: ‘Mwaaveleelaka mpatta wooreerela, mpatta owo oniwooneliwe wooreerela wa yoohepha ya waneepettheliwa ni wanaamiwa iwuuva*." 
Numbers18:31 Nyuwosa ni imusisanyu muceeke mpatta owo ohanle nakhalaru nipuro, niwoko ti nlivo wa mutekwaanyu Muheemani ya Muthukumano*." 
Numbers18:32 Wooveleela mpatta wooreerela, nyuwosa khamukhalano nthowa ni khamuhiiriha sooveleela sootteelihiwa sa aYixrayeli, weera muhikhwaase.’”" 
Numbers19:1 Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi ni Aharoni: 
Numbers19:2 “Yoonyesereriha emoha ya Nlamulo Yave olamulenlaawe ti ela: Mwaalamulele aYixrayeli omuruuha mwaamombe muthiyana ooxeera, oohirakala ni oohikhalano malepa, mwa yoowo ohitonke oreiwa murindi." 
Numbers19:3 Nyuwosa mumvaheke musaserdoti* Eleyazari; owo aronghiweke okerekhere wa okonelingwe ni iiveliweke vamaithoniwawe. 
Numbers19:4 Vano musaserdoti* Eleyazari akuxeke ephome vakhaani yawawe, amisereke ni ikatha imaara ithannapiili mpatta wa mulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*." 
Numbers19:5 Mwaamombe ahisiweke vamaithoniwawe: Exapala, ethai, ephome ni marupo." 
Numbers19:6 Musaserdoti* akuxeke etthaabwa ekhaanene ya esidari*, hisopo* ni mapururu ooxeera a ekhondoolo ni avonyereke vasulu wa mwaamombe azaaka." 
Numbers19:7 Vahoolowaya, musaserdoti* acapeke soowarasawe ni arapeke. Vano avoloweke okonelingwe, mene onookhala oohitteela mpaka wiilaka." 
Numbers19:8 Yoowo aneera amuhise mwaamombe acapeketho soowarasawe ni arapeke; onookhalatho oohitteela nihuku nootheene. 
Numbers19:9 Mutthu ori ootteeleene akhupeke ettuura ya mwaamombe ni iikaathiki vaNipuroni Nootteela*, okerekhere wa okonelingwe. Ethokororiweke ni muloko wa aYixrayeli weera evareliwe muteko mmaahini a otteelihera – wa oorapihela soottheka." 
Numbers19:10 Yoowo aneera akhupe ettuura ya mwaamombe acapeketho soowarasawe, ni onookhala oohitteela mpaka wiilaka. Ela ekano yoohimala, ekhalaka wa aYixrayeli mpaka anamarwa ankhala ni nyuwo." 
Numbers19:11 Yoowo aneera atave muttembo onookhala oohitteela mweehuhuni ya mahuku mathannameeli. 
Numbers19:12 Iitteeliheke ni maahi awo munihukuni nanaararu ni nanaathannameeli. Hiiho owo onookhala ootteela. Vaheera, aahiitteeliha munihukuni nanaararu ni nanaathannameeli, khatteela." 
Numbers19:13 Yoowo aneera atave muttembo ahiniitteeliha, onoovaliha etabernaakulu* ya Yave. Owo amalamalihiweke mmulokoni wa aYixrayeli. Onookhala oohitteela niwoko khamiseriweno maahi ootteelihera; ohitteelawawe onoopwaherera." 
Numbers19:14 Nlamulo nimvareliwa muteko mukina aakhwelaka muheemani ti nna: Yoowo anaavolowe muheemani ni yoowo anaakhalemo, onookhala oohitteela mmahukuni mathannameeli," 
Numbers19:15 ni yakhalaru ekaruma eneera ehittiyeliwe nnene, enookhala yoohitteela." 
Numbers19:16 Yoowo anaakhale mmatta, anamutava mutthu iiviwe ni ekatana, hoye hoye mukina ohaawiye mookhwaani onkhweliwaaya naari vanikhuvani na mutthu, hata munihiyeni, onookhala oohitteela mmahukuni mathannameeli." 
Numbers19:17 Wa mutthu oohitteela aheliweke ettuura vakhaani ya yooveleela yoohisa yootteelihera muxaaruni ni amiineliwekemo maahi ooluusi. 
Numbers19:18 Vano mutthu ori ootteeleene, akuxeke hisopo*, axuweyeke mmaahini ni amiserekeno eheema, ikaruma sootheene ni atthu ootheene yaarimo. Ammisereketho akhalaru mutthu otamve nikhuva na mutthu, hoye hoye nihiye, hata mukina okhwiiye naari ohaangwe okhwa onkhweliwaaya." 
Numbers19:19 Yoowo ori ootteeleene ammisereke mutthu oohitteela munihukuni nanaararu ni nanaathannameeli, ni munihukuni nanaathannameeli owo amutteeliheke. Yoowo ontteelihiwa acapeke soowarasawe ni arapeke, hiiho oxekuwa wa nihuku nno onookhala ootteeleene." 
Numbers19:20 Vaheera, yoowo ori oohitteela aahiitteeliha, amalamalihiweke mmuthukumanoni, niwoko oovaliha Nipuro Nootteela* na Yave. Khamiseriwe maahi ootteelihera ni owo khatteenle." 
Numbers19:21 Ela ekano yoohimala wa yaawosa. Mutthu anaamisereno maahi ootteelihera acapeketho soowarasawe, ni akhalaru mutthu anaatave maahi ootteelihera, onookhala oohitteela mpaka wiilaka." 
Numbers19:22 Yakhalaru etthu mwa yeeyo eneera etaviwe ni mutthu oohitteela enoothatuwa yoohitteela, ni akhalaru mutthu aneera atave yeeyo, onookhala oohitteela mpaka wiilaka." 
Numbers20:1 Muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli waaphiyale munikareni na oSini mmweerini woopacera, onakhala oKadexi. Miriyami aahookhwawo, anavithiwa." 
Numbers20:2 Vano muloko khawaakhalannewo maahi, ni owo waamurica Moisesi ni Aharoni." 
Numbers20:3 Yaanyakulihana ni Moisesi yeeraka: “Fataari naakhwiiye ni axunnihu attaruxiwe ni Yave! 
Numbers20:4 Nyuwosa, muruuhenleni muloko wa Yave munikarenimu, weera hiyo ni mihuwosahu nikhwele muumu?" 
Numbers20:5 Munikhumiheranseni wExipitu muniruuhaka nipuro nna noowoopiha? Mu khasimomo irooro, hata ifiigu, naari iwuuva* hoye hoye irooma*, naari maahi oowura!”" 
Numbers20:6 Moisesi ni Aharoni yaavenyasa ohoolo wa muthukumano, enarowa vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*, enuuramihela ikhovesaya vathi, ni ovuwa wa Yave waahaarweela." 
Numbers20:7 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers20:8 “Mukuxe ekopo vamoha ni munninyu Aharoni ni muthukumanyihe muloko. Vano ohoolowaya muulumele mwala ole, ni owo onoopiluwa maahi. Nyuwosa munoorika maahi vamwala oowura muloko ni muhuwo.”" 
Numbers20:9 Vano Moisesi aakuxa ekopo yaari ohoolo wa Yave, ntoko Owo aamulamulenlaawe." 
Numbers20:10 Moisesi ni Aharoni yaathukumanyiha muloko ohoolo wa mwala, ni Moisesi aaheera: “Mwiiwe anamavaanya, weeraka ontthuneya orika maahi vamwala weera noovaheeni?”" 
Numbers20:11 Vano Moisesi aattukhula moono, anamana mwala ni ekopo imaara piili. Yaapiluwa maahi ni hiiho muloko ni muhuwo waawura." 
Numbers20:12 Wa soothesene Yave aamweerela Moisesi ni Aharoni: “Nyuwo khamukiroromenle Miyo muhittittimihaka otteelawaka vamaithoni wa aYixrayeli, tivawo nyuwosa khamvolongha muloko ola mulaponi kimvahaaka.”" 
Numbers20:13 Ala yaari maahi a oMeriba, weiwo aYixrayeli yaanyakulihannaayawo ni Yave ni Owo oonihenraawe otteelawawe eriyaraaya." 
Numbers20:14 oKadexi, Moisesi aahaarumiha anamitthenga wa mwene a awEdomi eeraka: “Munninyu Yixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Nyuwo moosuwela makacamiho ootheene anikhumelenle." 
Numbers20:15 Makholowaahu yaarowa wExipitu, ni iwe naakhalawo iyaakha sincipale. Wa soothesene awExipitu yaanihasula hiyo ni makholowaahu," 
Numbers20:16 vaheera naamukhuwelenlaahu Yave, Owo aahiiwa okhuwelawahu, anamurumiha namutthenga, ananikhumiha wExipitu. Vano nri oKadexi, esidade ehelanne mwiinano ni elapwaanyu." 
Numbers20:17 Munihiye nivire mulaponimwanyu. Khaniviraru mmatta hoye hoye ematta ya iwuuva*, hata khaniwuraru maahi a yakhalaru ehime. Nnivire mmuseweni wa mwene ni khanihapuwelaru naari moono woolopwana hata woothiyana, mpaka nneeraahu niphutule mulaponimwanyu.”" 
Numbers20:18 Vaheera Edomi aahaakhula: “Nyuwosa muhivirasemu; mweerera, hiyo nnimoowananani ni ekatana.”" 
Numbers20:19 Vano aYixrayeli yaaheera: “Axunna, nnookuxera musewe mutokweene; hiyo ni mihuwosahu nawura maahaanyu, nnooliva. Ninntthuna paahi ovira neettaka vathi, kheewowo etthu ekinatho.”" 
Numbers20:20 Vaheera Edomi aanyesera: “Nyuwosa khamumvirasa. Vano Edomi vamoha ni anakhotto ancipale ni oowera aahaawanano. 
Numbers20:21 Eenre Edomi akhoottaka waaviriha mulaponimwawe, aYixrayeli yaahapuwa." 
Numbers20:22 Muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli waattimula oKadexi, onaphiya vamwaako Hori." 
Numbers20:23 Vamwaako vale, waattamela mwiinano wa wEdomi, Yave aamweerela Moisesi ni Aharoni:" 
Numbers20:24 “Aharoni onoothukumanyihiwa ni makholowaawe. Khavolowa mulaponi kinaavahaaka aYixrayeli, niwoko nyuwosa ooweeli moovaanya Nlamulonaka mukerekhere maahi a oMeriba." 
Numbers20:25 Munkuxe Aharoni ni mwaniye mulopwana Eleyazari mpaka vasuluxa mwaako Hori. 
Numbers20:26 Munrule Aharoni soowarasawe ni mungwarihe mwaniye Eleyazari, niwoko Aharoni onoothukumanyihiwa ni makholowaawe; owo anaakhwele weiwo.”" 
Numbers20:27 Moisesi aapaka ntoko Yave aalamulenlaawe; yaawelasa vamwaako Hori, muloko wootheene woonaka." 
Numbers20:28 Moisesi aamurula Aharoni soowarasawe, anangwariha mwaniye Eleyazari. Aharoni aakhwela vasulu mwaako. Vahoolowaya Moisesi ni Eleyazari yaakhuruwa vamwaako," 
Numbers20:29 ni muloko wootheene osuwelaka weera Aharoni ohookhwa, awosa yaamwiinlela mweehuhuni ya mahuku miloko miraru." 
Numbers21:1 Mwene a oKanaani wArade aakhala oNegebe, asuwelaka weera aYixrayeli yaarweela mmuseweni wa wAtarimi, aahaawanano aYixrayeli, anaavara akina akina a yaawosa." 
Numbers21:2 Vano aYixrayeli yaamuroromeliha Yave moota ola: “Mwinnyerera muloko ola mmatatanimwahu, nnoophwata woomalela isidadesaya.”" 
Numbers21:3 Yave aahiiwa yoovekela ya aYixrayeli, anawinnyerera aKanaani. aYixrayeli yaahaaphwatasa woomalela yaawo ni isidadesaya, moota wooweera nipuro nne naahiitthaniwa oHorema." 
Numbers21:4 Yaattimulasa vamwaako Hori, ekuxeraka ephiro emvira ephareiya yooxeera weera esembe elapo ya wEdomi. Vaheera mphironi muloko waakhulumuwaxa," 
Numbers21:5 onamukhupanya Yave ni Moisesi, weeraka: “Munikhumiheranseni wExipitu weera nikhwele munikareni? Kheemomo yooca! Khaamomo maahi! Vano hiyo ninthanya yooca ela yoohiira”" 
Numbers21:6 Vano Yave aarumiha inowa soohapala saalumme muloko, ni ancipale yaahookhwa." 
Numbers21:7 Muloko waarowa wa Moisesi oneera: “Noottheka woomukhupanya Yave ni nyuwo. Mumvekele Yave weera avenxe inowa eriyaraahu.” Moisesi aavekelela muloko. 
Numbers21:8 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mpake enowa ni muthomeye vanttoroni; ootheene eneera elummwe, enaweha yeeyo, anookhala ni okumi.”" 
Numbers21:9 Vano, Moisesi aapaka enowa ya ebronze*, anathomeya vanttoroni. Mukina aalummwaawe ni enowa ni aawehaawe enowa ya ebronze, aampwaherera ni okumi." 
Numbers21:10 aYixrayeli yaattimula, enakonela wOboti." 
Numbers21:11 Vahoolowaya, yaattimulasa wOboti, enakonelasa wIye-Abarimi, munikareni muxerexere wa oMowabe, mmwiinanoni wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oMowabe." 
Numbers21:12 Woovenya vaavaale, yaattimula, enakonela mureyareyani na oZeredi." 
Numbers21:13 Evenyaka oZeredi, yaarowa okonela okhopela mooloko Arenoni, ophattungwe munikareni, onaphutula mulaponi ya awAmori opakaka mwiinano eriyari ya elapo ya aMowabe ni awAmori." 
Numbers21:14 Tivawo eneeriwaaya mulivuruni ya ikhotto sa Yave: “oWayebi mulaponi mwa wOsufa ni moovinavineya mwa mooloko wArenoni 
Numbers21:15 ni nyaako sa moovinavineya sinrowa mpaka esidade ya wAri, mukerekhere omwiinanono wa oMowabe.”" 
Numbers21:16 Woovenya vaavaale, yaapwaherera mpaka oBeeri, ehime mwa yeeyo Yave aamweerenlaawe Moisesi: “Muthukumanyihe muloko ni Miyo kinoovaha maahi.”" 
Numbers21:17 Vano aYixrayeli yaahiipa ecipo ela: “Ehime epiluwe maahi! Mwiipele ecipo," 
Numbers21:18 ehime yaathimpwale ni anamwane asilopwana a mamwene, yaathimpwale ni maneethi, ni ikopo ni mittontto soolamulelano. Woovenya munikareni yaarowasa oMatana," 
Numbers21:19 enarowa oNahaliyeli, woovenya oNahaliyeli yaarowa oBamoti," 
Numbers21:20 ni woovenya oBamote, yaarowa oreyareyani na oMowabe, engwehanaaya etthomela ya mwaako Pisega mpatta wa munikareni." 
Numbers21:21 aYixrayeli yaahaarumiha anamitthenga weera emweerele Sihoni, mwene a awAmori:" 
Numbers21:22 Munihiye nivire mulaponimwanyu. Khanihapuwelaru mmatta hata mmatta mwa iwuuva*, naari khaniwuraru maahi a muhimenimwanyu. Nnikuxere paahi ephiro etokweene, mpaka omaliha ovira mulaponimwanyu.”" 
Numbers21:23 Wa soothesene, Sihoni khaahingye aYixrayeli eviraka mulaponimwawe. Aahaathukumanyiha anakhottwaawe ootheene, anaawanano aYixrayeli munikareni. Aaphiyalaawe oYahazi, aahaawanano aYixrayeli." 
Numbers21:24 Wa soothesene, aYixrayeli yaamphwata ni ekatana, enakuxa ilaposawe okhuma wArenoni wookela oYaboki, mpaka mwiinano wa wAmoni paahi niwoko mwiinanoweene yoole waalipihiwaxa." 
Numbers21:25 aYixrayeli yaakuxa isidade sootheene sa awAmori, enaakamela, vamoha ni oHexeboni ni mittetthesaya sootheene." 
Numbers21:26 oHexeboni yaari esidade ya Sihoni, mwene a aMori, aangwananne mwene a khalayi a oMowabe, akuxaka ilaposawe sootheene mpaka wArenoni." 
Numbers21:27 Tivawo anamiruku aneeraaya: “Murwe oHexeboni! Eyo eraseliwe; erehereriwetho esidade ya Sihoni! 
Numbers21:28 Mooro waakhuma oHexeboni, malumi a mooro a esidade ya Sihoni; waalaliha wAri mulaponi mwa oMowabe, amaki a mmattumuxani a wArenoni." 
Numbers21:29 Ii! Wa nyuwosa, amaki a oMowabe! Nyuwo moophwatiwa, Ii! Muloko wa Kemoxi! Owo oowinnyerera anamwanaawe asilopwana ntoko anamatthawa, anamwanaawe asithiyana ntoko anamatthukiwa ni Sihoni, mwene a awAmori." 
Numbers21:30 Vaheera hiyo nohaawina; oHexeboni woophwatiwa ephiro yootheeneeyo mpaka oDiboni. Hiyo nohaaphwata mpaka oNofa, ni mpaka oMedeba.”" 
Numbers21:31 Hiiho aYixrayeli yaamaka mulaponi mwa awAmori. 
Numbers21:32 Moisesi aahaarumiha anamahottela oYazari, ni aYixrayeli yaakuxa mittetthe saarukureenre, enawoomolasa awAmori yaakhalawo." 
Numbers21:33 Vahoolowaya, yaahokolowasa, enavira mphironi enkela oBaxani ni Ogi, mwene a oBaxani, ni anakhottwaawe ootheene, yaarowa weera yaawaneno wEdereyi." 
Numbers21:34 Vaheera Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Muhimoove, niwoko Miyo koomwinnyerera wa nyuwo, vamoha ni anakhottwaawe ni elapwaawe. Nyuwo munoompakela yeeyo mwaampakenlaanyu Sihoni, mwene a awAmori, aakhala oHexeboni.”" 
Numbers21:35 Vano, awosa yaangwinaxa, okhuma anamwanaawe mpaka anakhottwaawe ehimuhiyakaru oohalahala. Vanonto yaakuxasa elapwaawe." 
Numbers22:1 aYixrayeli yaattimulasa, enakonela mmisaatalani sa oMowabe, mukerekhere Yordanu okhopela Yeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Balaki, mwaana mulopwana a Zipori, aahoona sootheene aYixrayeli yaapakenlaaya awAmori," 
Numbers22:3 ni Mowabe aahoovaxa muloko, niwoko yaari atthu ancipale. Aani, Mowabe aahaatteenguwa aYixrayeli." 
Numbers22:4 Vano aMowabe yaaweerelasa ahooleli a oMidiyani: “Nakupa ola onoonyaanya sootheene siri mukhwipimwahu, ntoko emombe ennyaanyaaya malaxi muncihiwa. Balaki, mwaana mulopwana a Zipori, mwene aalamula ehuhuweene yeele oMowabe," 
Numbers22:5 aahaarumiha anamitthenga weera emwiitthane Biliyami mwaana mulopwana a Beyori, aari oPetori, vakhiviru wa Efratesi, mulaponi aayareliwaawe. Vano Balaki aamweerela: “Muloko okhumale wExipitu woosareya mulaponi, oniitekiha vakhiviruwaka." 
Numbers22:6 Vano murwe mulaphe yoowo, niwoko ti woolipaxa okipwaha miyo. Apaale kinoowera owina ni woomola mulaponi, niwoko koosuwela weera yoowo munimureelihaanyu onooreeliheya, ni yoowo munimulaphaanyu onoolapheya.”" 
Numbers22:7 Ahooleli a oMowabe ni a oMidiyani yaattimulasa, ekuxaleene musurukhu waatthuneya olivela sa okhwiri. Ephiyakaru, yaamuleela Biliyami yeeyo aahimalaawe Balaki." 
Numbers22:8 Biliyami aaweerela: “Mvirihe ohiyu vaava, ni miyo kinimooruuhelasani yoowaakhula aneeraawe akivahe Yave.” Hiiho, ahooleli a oMowabe yaakhala ni yoowo." 
Numbers22:9 Muluku aarowa wa Biliyami, anamukoha: “Asilopwana heeni yaala ari va ni nyuwo?" 
Numbers22:10 Biliyami aamwaakhula Muluku: “Balaki, mwaana mulopwana a Zipori, mwene a oMowabe, ookirumihela mutthenga ola:" 
Numbers22:11 ‘Muloko okhumale wExipitu woosareya mulaponi. Vano murwe mwaalaphe. Apaale vahoolowaya kinoowera waawanano ni owoomola.’” 
Numbers22:12 Vaheera Muluku aamweerela Biliyami: “Muhirowe ni yaawosa, nyuwo khamungwera olapha muloko ola, niwoko ti muloko wooreelihiwa.”" 
Numbers22:13 Oxaawaya, Biliyami aaheemela, anaweerela ahooleli a Balaki: “Muhokoleelase elapwaanyu, niwoko Yave khatthunihenre weera miyo koohoolaseni.”" 
Numbers22:14 Ahooleli a oMowabe yaahokoleelasa wa Balaki enamweerelasa: “Biliyami ookhootta onihoola.” 
Numbers22:15 Balaki aahaarumiha ahooleli akina oowaattaxa ni oottittimiheyaxa waapwaha oopacera. 
Numbers22:16 Awosa yaarowasa wa Biliyami, enamweerelasa: “Balaki, mwaana mulopwana a Zipori, oneera ha: “Ehikhaleru eneera ewooceeliheni orwa wa miyo," 
Numbers22:17 niwoko kinimootthuvelani woowaattaxa ni kinoopaka sootheene muneeraanyu mukileele. Dyoontte, murwe ni mukilaphele muloko ola.”" 
Numbers22:18 Wa soothesene, Biliyami aawaakhula anamalaka a Balaki: “Naari Balaki akivangheene empaawe ya emwene yoosareya eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa, miyo nkaaweraru opaka etthu etokweene hoye hoye ekhaani, empwaha Nlamulo na Yave, Mulukwaaka." 
Numbers22:19 Vano, nyuwosa mukhaletho va ohiyu ola, ni miyo kinimoonelela orinaawetho Yave weera akileele.”" 
Numbers22:20 Ohiyuweene yoole Muluku aahoorwa wa Biliyami, anamweerela: “Yeenre asilopwana ale erwaaka owiitthanani, murowe ni yaawosa, mene mpake paahi yeeyo Miyo kineeraaka kooleeleni.”" 
Numbers22:21 Oxeexelo, Biliyami aavenya, anamureherera buuruwaawe, anarowa vamoha ni ahooleli a oMowabe." 
Numbers22:22 Vaheera Biliyami arongweene, saapatta isara sa Yave, ni ndyelo a Yave aaheemela mphironi weera amuhiihe opwaherera. Biliyami aarowa angwenleene buuruwaawe, ahooliwaka ni arumeiyaawe eeli." 
Numbers22:23 Buuru amoonakaru ndyelo a Yave eemenleene mphironi, avarenleene ekatana, aahapuwa mphironi, anarowa ntuphini. Biliyami aammana weera ahokoleele mphironi." 
Numbers22:24 Vano ndyelo aaheemela mphironi yoophureya eriyari ya imatta piili sa iwuuva*, saarino ixiri mmipattani soomiili." 
Numbers22:25 Buuru amoonakaru ndyelo a Yave, aaphiteera exiri, aameleliherakawo nnaawo na Biliyami. Tivawo owo aammannaawetho." 
Numbers22:26 Ndyelo a Yave aarowa ohoolo, aneemela vanipuroni noophureya, nahaakhanlaayawo nlaka noohapuwela, naari moono woolopwana hata woothiyana." 
Numbers22:27 Buuru amoonakaru ndyelo a Yave, aahiikuhera vathi, Biliyami nlelo amukilaathenleene. Biliyami aanyoonyiwa, anapacera ommana buuru." 
Numbers22:28 Vano Yave aahula eyano ya buuru, ni owo aamweerela Biliyami: “Koopankeni eheeni nyuwo wookimana imaara tthaaru iya?”" 
Numbers22:29 Biliyami aamwaakhula buuru: “Weyo wookipaka nsikini! Kaavarenle ekatana, miyo kaangwiiva vaanaano va.”" 
Numbers22:30 Vaheera buuru aamwaakhula Biliyami: “Miyo ti buuruwaanyu muningwelaanyu mahuku ootheene mpaka olelo. Kaatoko woopakani hiiha?” Biliyami aamwaakhula: “Hoye!” 
Numbers22:31 Vano Yave aahula maitho a Biliyami, ni owo aamoona ndyelo a Yave eemenleene mphironi, avarenleene ekatanaawe. Hiiho Biliyami aakokhora uuramihelaka ekhovaawe vathi." 
Numbers22:32 Ndyelo a Yave aamukoha: “Mummanenle heeni imaara tthaaru buuruwaanyu? Miyo kirweenle va weera koohiiheni opwaherera niwoko ephiro mukuxenraanyu ti yoowoopiha. 
Numbers22:33 Buuru aakoona, anakihapuwa imaara tthaaru. Owo ahaahapungwe, vekhaikhai saano kiwiivaleeneni; vaheera buuru kaammuurela.”" 
Numbers22:34 Biliyami aamweerela ndyelo a Yave: “Koottheka. Nkaasuwenle weera mwaaheemela mphironi mutthunaka okihiiha opwaherera. Vano yeeyo kimpakaaka yaahoosivelihakani, miyo kinoohokolowa.”" 
Numbers22:35 Vanonto ndyelo a Yave aamweerela Biliyami: “Murowe ni asilopwana, mene muulume paahi yeeyo Miyo kineeraaka kooleeleni.” Hiiho Biliyami aarowa vamoha ni asilopwana a mwene Balaki." 
Numbers22:36 Balaki asuwelaka weera Biliyami eera aphiyaka, aarowa omukumanano musidadeni ya oMowabe omwiinanoni wa mooloko Arenoni, ekotenle elapwaawe." 
Numbers22:37 Balaki aamukoha Biliyami: “Mwahaarweenle heeni kaawiitthannaakani imaara imaarasene? Munuupuwela weera nkingwera wootthuvelani moota omphwanelaaya?” 
Numbers22:38 Biliyami aamwaakhula: “Miyo kiri va! Vaheera miyo nkingwera ohima yakhalaru etthu. Nkihime paahi yeeyo Muluku aneeraawe akileele.” 
Numbers22:39 Vano Biliyami aarowa ni Balaki mpaka oKiriyate-Husoti. 
Numbers22:40 Balaki aaveleela imombe ni ikhondoolo, ni mpatta mukina wa enama aamvaha Biliyami ni ahooleli yaari ni yoowo." 
Numbers22:41 Oxaawaya, Balaki aamukuxa Biliyami mpaka vasulu wa mwaako Bamoti-Bahali, weiwo wooneyaayawo mpatta wa yaakonenlaayawo aYixrayeli." 
Numbers23:1 Biliyami aamweerela Balaki: “Mukitekele va altaari* athanneeli ni mukirehererele aximombe athanneeli ni anapunci a ikhondoolo athanneelitho.” 
Numbers23:2 Balaki aapaka yeeyo aamvekenlaawe Biliyami, ni ooweeli yaamveleela mwaamombe ni napunci a ikhondoolo mmoha mmoha wa khula altaari*." 
Numbers23:3 Biliyami aamweerela Balaki: “Mukhale va muxerexere wa sooveleelasanyu soohisa, miyo kivenyaka. Apaale Yave anaakikumaneno. Yeeyo Owo aneeraawe akoonihere, miyo kinimoothaliherani.” Vahoolowaya aarowa vamwaako woohimela etthu." 
Numbers23:4 Muluku aamukumanano, ni Biliyami aamweerela: “Kohaareherera altaari* athanneeli, ni khula altaari* koomveleela mwaamombe mmoha ni napunci mmoha a ikhondoolo.”" 
Numbers23:5 Yave aamuleela Biliyami yeeyo yaatthuneya ohima, amweerelaka: “Murowetho mwakumane ni Balaki ni muulume mooteene yoowo kooleenlaakani.”" 
Numbers23:6 Biliyami aahokolowa, anamphwanya Balaki nlelo yeemelelo muxerexere wa sooveleelasawe soohisa vamoha ni ahooleli a oMowabe." 
Numbers23:7 Vano Biliyami aalaleiya mutthenga ola: “Balaki okiruuhale oHarani, mwene a oMowabe okikuxale mmanyaakoni sa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Owo aaheera: ‘Murwe mukilaphele Yakobe, murwe mulaleiye woopopiheya wa aYixrayeli!’" 
Numbers23:8 Nkimulapheleni yoowo Muluku ohimulamphaawe? Nkilaleere heeni soowoopopiha wa yoowo Yave ohitthunnaawe omoopopiha? 
Numbers23:9 Miyo kingwoona kireene vasulu wa nyaako soosareya nyala; kinoona kireene osuluxa. Kinnoona muloko onkhala yooworu ni ohiniixoonaru ntoko wakhalaru muloko. 
Numbers23:10 Taani ongwera waalikela waatta wa Yakobe ori ntoko ntthupi, hata waatta wa mpatta wanaaxexe wa aYixrayeli? Fataari kikhwe okhwa wa oororomeleya ni ommaleloniwaka okhale ntoko wa muloko ola.”" 
Numbers23:11 Balaki aamweerela Biliyami: “Munkipakani? Miyo kooruuhenleni nno weera munlaphe mwiittanaaka, vano nyuwo munimweera omureeliha paahi!”" 
Numbers23:12 Owo aamwaakhula: “Kintthuneya ohima paahi yeeyo Yave okileenlaawe.” 
Numbers23:13 Balaki aamweerela: “Nrowe ni miyo vanipuroni nikina nyuwo muneeraanyu ngwoone; nyuwo mmoone paahi mpatta mmoha, mene khaahiyono ootheenaawo. Vahoolowaya mukilaphele muloko owo.”" 
Numbers23:14 Vano owo aamurongha ematta ya oZofimi, vasulu mwaako Pisega, ni vawo aahaateka altaari* athanneeli, anamveleela mwaamombe ni napunci a ikhondoolo wa khula altaari*." 
Numbers23:15 Biliyami aamweerela Balaki: “Mukhale va muxerexere wa yooveleelaanyu yoohisa miyo kirowaka omukumanano Muluku ohoolo iwo.” 
Numbers23:16 Akumanneene Yave ni Biliyami, aamvaha mutthenga amweerelaka: “Muhokoleele wa Balaki ni mwamuleele mutthengeene yoola.”" 
Numbers23:17 Owo aahokolowa, anamphwanya eemenleene muxerexere wa yooveleelaawe yoohisa, vamoha ni ahooleli a oMowabe. Balaki aamukoha: “Ohimaleni Yave?”" 
Numbers23:18 Vano owo aalaleiya mutthenga ola: “Mvenye Balaki ni mukiiwe; mukiwiriyane, mwaana mulopwana a Zipori." 
Numbers23:19 Muluku khanootha ntoko atthu; khanceendya soowuupuwelasawe ntoko ompakaaya omutthu. Yeeyo onghimaawe enookhumelela, ni yeeyo onroromelihaawe enookwanihereya." 
Numbers23:20 Kohaakhela nlamulo weera kireelihe; Owo ooreeliha ni nkingwera oceendya yeeyo. 
Numbers23:21 Kheewoworu erisa enooneya wa Yakobe, khoowoworu ohaawa oYixrayeli. Yave, Mulukwaaya, ori ni yaawosa; oruma wa okhuwela wa Mwene ori ni yaawosa." 
Numbers23:22 Muluku onaakhumiha wExipitu; awosa aakhalano ikuru sa enari. 
Numbers23:23 Khaawowo macitta angwera ongwina Yakobe, hata sa okhwiri singwera waalowa aYixrayeli. Vano onimweereliwa Yakobe ni aYixrayeli: “Moone yeeyo Muluku opankaawe!”" 
Numbers23:24 Muloko oneemela ntoko mwatto muthiyana; oneemela ntoko mwatto mulopwana, ohiniixaatalelaru mpaka onyaanya yoovaraawe ni owura ephome ya seiyo iivalaawe.”" 
Numbers23:25 Vano Balaki aamweerela Biliyami: “Muhaalaphe hata muhaareelihe!” 
Numbers23:26 Biliyami aamwaakhula: “Nkooleenleni weera ontthuneya opaka sootheene aneeraawe ahime Yave?” 
Numbers23:27 Balaki aamweerela Biliyami: “Nrowe, koorongheni vanipuroni nikina. Apaale Muluku anaavahere weera wu munoowera okilaphela.”" 
Numbers23:28 Balaki aamurongha Biliyami vasulu mwaako Peyori. Vaavale waawereyaaya woona muhawalawa wootheene. 
Numbers23:29 Biliyami aamweerela Balaki: “Mukitekele va altaari* athanneeli ni mukirehererele aximombe athanneeli ni anapunci a ikhondoolo athanneelitho.” 
Numbers23:30 Balaki aapaka yeeyo aahimalaawe Biliyami, anamveleela mwaamombe ni napunci mmoha a ikhondoolo wa khula altaari*." 
Numbers24:1 Biliyami oonaka weera waamusivela Yave waareeliha aYixreyeli, khaapanke macitta ntoko imaara sikina, mene aaweha onikareni." 
Numbers24:2 Vano aawoona aYixrayeli ekonenleene epuumba epuumba, Munepa wa Muluku waamukhuruwela," 
Numbers24:3 ni owo aalaleiya mutthenga ola: “Masu a Biliyami, mwaana mulopwana a Beyori, masu a yoole maithwaawe anoona nnenesene," 
Numbers24:4 masu a yoole oniiwa masu a Muluku, masu a yoole onoona moonelo onrweela wa Muluku a ikuru sootheene; masu a yoole ommora, anakokhora ni onoona nnenesene:" 
Numbers24:5 Moota sireenraaya iheemasanyu, ii Yakobe, moomakamwanyu, ii! aYixrayeli!" 
Numbers24:6 Anaataleya ntoko mareyareya a ethaadyira, ntoko mattimbe muxerexere mooloko, ntoko nyiri sa alowe*, ni ntoko esedari* Yave ophatteiyaawe muxerexere maahi." 
Numbers24:7 Mattankhaaya a maahi anoosareya; imattasaya sinoohelelaxiwa maahi, mwenaaya onookhala mutokweene ompwaha Agagi; omwenaaya onimunnuwihiwa." 
Numbers24:8 Muluku onaakhumiha wExipitu; awosa aakhalano ikuru sa enari, annyaanya miloko soowiitta, ampwexakasa makhuvaaya; anghomano mavakaaya." 
Numbers24:9 Awosa aniipitha ni aniixaatalela ntoko mwatto mulopwana ni muthiyana, taani anaawere waavenxa? Ereelihiwe yaawo eniyaareelihe, ni elamphwe yaawo eniyaalaphe!”" 
Numbers24:10 Vano isara sa Balaki saampattela Biliyami, ni iipa makuphi, eeraka: “Miyo kiwiitthanenleni waalapha amwiittanaaka, vaheera nyuwo mohaareeliha imaara tthaaru!" 
Numbers24:11 Vano nyuwo mutthawele owannyinyu!” Miyo kaaheera weera kaamoovahani ntthuvelo ntokotoko, vaheera Yave oowooceelihani waakhela.”" 
Numbers24:12 Vaheera Biliyami aamwaakhula Balaki: “Miyo kaahaaleela nnenesene anamitthenga mwaarumihenlaanyu owannyaka 
Numbers24:13 weera naari Balaki akivahaka empaawe ya emwene yoosareya eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa miyo nkaarambura malamulo a Yave, kipakaka yakhalaru etthu kintthunaaka, ereere hata ehireere. Yeeyo okileenlaawe Yave, ti yeeyo kineeraaka kihime." 
Numbers24:14 Vano kinoohokoleela mulokwaaka, mene mukihiye kooleeleni yeeyo muloko ola oneeraaya opakele mulokwaanyu mmahukuni a muhoolo." 
Numbers24:15 Vano owo aalaleiya mutthenga ola: “Masu a Biliyami, mwaana mulopwana a Beyori, masu a yoole maithwaawe anoona nnenesene," 
Numbers24:16 masu a yoole oniiwa masu a Muluku, orino esuwelo ya Muluku a Musulusulu, a yoole onoona moonelo onrweela wa Muluku a ikuru sootheene, a yoole ommora, anakokhora, mwa yoowo ohulingwe maithwaawe:" 
Numbers24:17 Miyo kinimoona, mene khoohiyono vaanaano va; miyo kinimoona, mene khoohiyono vakhiviru. Ethenyeeri enookhumelela wa Yakobe; ekopo ya emwene enimweemela oYixrayeli. Eyo enoopwexakasa iyuuci sa oMowabe ni makarakasa a ikhapira sootheene sa Seti." 
Numbers24:18 wEdomi onoowiniwa; oSeyiri ori mwiittanaaya, onoowiniwatho; vaheera oYixrayeli onimunnuwa mukuruni." 
Numbers24:19 Wa Yakobe onookhumelela namalamula; owo onimwaaphwata oohalahala a musidade.” 
Numbers24:20 Biliyami aawoona awAmaleki, analaleiya mutthenga ola: “awAmaleki yaari oopacera eriyari ya miloko, mene ommaleloniwaya onuukhale ophwatiwa."
