Numbers24:21 Vahoolowaya aawoona aKeni analaleiya mutthenga ola: “Woomakawanyu ti woolipa, epuuruwaanyu elipihiwe vamwala;" 
Numbers24:22 wa soothesene, nyuwosa aKeni, munoophwatiwa Axuri ookuxakani ootthukiweene.”" 
Numbers24:23 Ommaleloni aahima mutthenga ola: “Ii! Taani anaawere okhala ni okumi Muluku aapakaka yeeyo? 
Numbers24:24 Makula matokotoko eniirweele muxerexere wa ephareiya ya oKitimi ni anoomuhasula Axuri ni Eberi, vaheera ommaleloniwaya onuukhaletho ophwatiwa.”" 
Numbers24:25 Vano, Biliyami aavenya anahokoleela owaani, ni Balaki aakuxera ephirowaawe." 
Numbers25:1 aYixrayeli ereene oXitimi, asilopwana aYixrayeli yaapacera wiixinnyerera mooraruwani ni asithiyana a oMowabe," 
Numbers25:2 mwa yaawo yaalattunlaaya opakano sooveleela sa milukusaya. Muloko wannaca, okokhorelaka milukusaya." 
Numbers25:3 Hiiho, aYixrayeli yaahiitakansano omulapa Bahali-Peyori. Vano isara sa Yave saahaapattela aYixrayeli." 
Numbers25:4 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Mwaatthuke asitokweene ootheene a muloko ola, ni ngwiivele vamaithoni wa Yave, mwaatthuni, weera isara soowoopiha sa Yave sisuse wa aYixrayeli.”" 
Numbers25:5 Vano Moisesi aaweerela aphuki a oYixrayeli: “Khula mutthu a nyuwo awiiveke yaawo ari a eriyari ya atthwaawe yiitakansenre omulapa Bahali-Peyori. 
Numbers25:6 muYixrayeli mmoha aamurongha owaani muthiyana mmoha a oMidiyani, vamaithoni wa Moisesi ni wa muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli weera wiinlaka vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*." 
Numbers25:7 Pinehasi, mwaana mulopwana a musaserdoti* Eleyazari, osuulu wa musaserdoti* Aharoni, oonaka yeeyo, aakuxa nivaka," 
Numbers25:8 anamutthara muYixrayeli mpaka oheemani, anaahomasa ooweeli ni nivaka; aamuhoma muYixrayeli ni muthiyana. Hiiho naamala nihooxo naarweenle aYixrayeli." 
Numbers25:9 Vaheera yaawo yaakhwiiye mwaha wa nihooxo yaari 24 000. 
Numbers25:10 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers25:11 “Pinehasi, mwaana mulopwana a musaserdoti* Eleyazari, osuulu wa musaserdoti* Aharoni, oohapuxa isarasaka kaapattihenraaka aYixrayeli, niwoko kaari ni ehace ni ehaceene yeeyo kaakhalenlaaka yaawosa, weera muhacenimwaka Miyo kihaamalamalihe." 
Numbers25:12 Munleele weera vano kimpaka wiiraanawaka wa murettele ni yoowo. 
Numbers25:13 Okhuma vanaano vaava owo mpaka ikhapirasawe onookhala wiiraana wa osaserdoti* woohimala, niwoko owo oomukhalela nthiti Mulukwaawe aarehererelaka aYixrayeli wiiwanana ni Muluku." 
Numbers25:14 muYixrayeli iiviwe vamoha ni muthiyana a oMidiyani iitthaniwa Zimeri, mwaana mulopwana a Salu, muhooleli a emusi emoha ya aSimeyoni." 
Numbers25:15 Muthiyana iiviwe iitthaniwa Kozebi, mwaana mulopwana a Zuri, pwattapwattha a nihimo nimoha na aMidiyani." 
Numbers25:16 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers25:17 “Mwaawanane aMidiyani ni ngwiivakase," 
Numbers25:18 niwoko awosa yaahoopakani ntoko amwiittana, yeereraka woohapuxerani omulapa Bahali-Peyori ni niwoko na Kozebi, mwaana muthiyana a pwattapwattha mmoha a oMidiyani, muthiyana ole iiviwe ni nihooxo kaaruminghaaka niwoko na Peyori.”" 
Numbers26:1 Niviraleene nihooxo, Yave aamweerela Moisesi ni Eleyazari, mwaana mulopwana a musaserdoti* Aharoni:" 
Numbers26:2 “Mumpake namalepela, a muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli, muttharihaka imusisaya; ngwaalikele ootheene a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo angwera orumeela mukhottoni mwa aYixrayeli.”" 
Numbers26:3 Vano mmareyareyani a oMowabe, muxerexere Yordanu, okhopela wa oYeriko, Moisesi ni musaserdoti* Eleyazari, yaahuuluma ni yaawosa yeeraka:" 
Numbers26:4 Mumpake namalepela a asilopwana a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi.” Vanonto aYixrayeli yaakhumme wExipitu yaari ala:" 
Numbers26:5 A ekhapira ya Rubeni, mwaana a ntthaara na Yixrayeli, yaari ala: mwa Henoki, nihimo na aHenoki; mwa Palu, nihimo na aPalu;" 
Numbers26:6 mwa Hezeroni, nihimo na aHezeroni; mwa Karimi, nihimo na aKarimi." 
Numbers26:7 Ti yaala yaari a mahimo a Rubeni; yaale yaalikeliwe yaari asilopwana 43 730. 
Numbers26:8 Mwaana mulopwana a Palu aari Eliyabe," 
Numbers26:9 ni anamwane asilopwana a Eliyabe yaari Nemuweli, Datani ni Abirami. Datani ni Abirami, yaari ahooleli a muloko yaamvaannye Moisesi ni Aharoni, ereene eriyari ya anamatthara a Kora yaamvannyaaya Yave." 
Numbers26:10 Etthaya yaahuleya, enaamira vamoha ni Kora, mwa yaawo anamattharaaya yaakhwiiye waalalinghaaya mooro asilopwana macira meeli ni miloko mithanu. Awosa yaavareleya muteko ntoko eneneero yoowooperera." 
Numbers26:11 Wa soothesene, ekhapira ya Kora, khayaalakaseiye." 
Numbers26:12 Ekhapira ya Simeyoni, ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya yaari: mwa Nemuweli, nihimo na aNemuweli; mwa Yamini, nihimo na aYamini; mwa Yakini, nihimo na aYakini;" 
Numbers26:13 mwa Zera, nihimo na aZera; ya Xawuli, nihimo na aXawuli." 
Numbers26:14 Ala yaari mahimo a Simeyoni; yaari asilopwana 22 200. 
Numbers26:15 Ekhapira ya Gadi, ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya yaari: mwa Zefoni, nihimo na aZefoni; mwa Hagi, nihimo na aHagi; mwa Xuni, nihimo na aXuni;" 
Numbers26:16 mwa Ozeni, nihimo na awOzeni; mwa Eri, nihimo na awEri;" 
Numbers26:17 mwa Arodi, nihimo na awArodi; mwa Areli, nihimo na awAreli." 
Numbers26:18 Ala yaari mahimo a Gadi; yaale yaalikeliwe yaari asilopwana 40 500. 
Numbers26:19 Eri ni Onani yaari anamwane asilopwana a Yuda, mene yaakhwenle oKanaani." 
Numbers26:20 Ekhapira ya Yuda, ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya, yaari: mwa Xela, nihimo na aXela; mwa Perezi, nihimo na aPerezi; mwa Zera, nihimo na aZera." 
Numbers26:21 Ekhapira ya Perezi yaari: mwa Hezeroni, nihimo na aHezeroni; mwa Hamuli, nihimo na aHamuli." 
Numbers26:22 Ala yaari mahimo a Yuda; yaale yaalikeliwe yaari asilopwana 76 500. 
Numbers26:23 Ekhapira ya Isakari, ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya, yaari: mwa Tola, nihimo na aTola; ya Puwa, nihimo na aPuwa;" 
Numbers26:24 mwa Yaxube, nihimo na aYaxube; mwa Ximeroni, nihimo na aXimeroni." 
Numbers26:25 Ala yaari mahimo a Isakari; yaale yaalikeliwe yaari asilopwana 64 300. 
Numbers26:26 Ekhapira ya Zebuloni, ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya, yaari: ya Seredi, nihimo na aSeredi; ya Eloni, nihimo na awEloni; ya Yaleyeli, nihimo na aYaleyeli." 
Numbers26:27 Ala yaari mahimo a Zebuloni; yaale yaalikeliwe yaari asilopwana 60 500. 
Numbers26:28 Ekhapira ya Yoseefe ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya, mwa Manaxe ni Efrayimi, yaari:" 
Numbers26:29 ekhapira ya Manaxe: mwa Makiri, nihimo na aMakiri (Makiri aari tiithi a Gileyade); mwa Gileyade, nihimo na aGiliyade." 
Numbers26:30 Ekhapira ya Giliyade yaari ti ela: mwa Yezeri, nihimo na aYezeri; mwa Heleki, nihimo na aHeleki;" 
Numbers26:31 mwa Aseriyeli, nihimo na awAseriyeli; mwa Xekhemi, nihimo na aXekhemi;" 
Numbers26:32 mwa Xemida, nihimo na aXemida; mwa Heferi, nihimo na aHeferi." 
Numbers26:33 Zelofehadi, mwaana mulopwana a Heferi, khaarinoru anamwane asilopwana; aarino paahi anamwane asithiyana mwa yaawo masinaaya yaari: Mahela, Nowa, Hogela, Milka ni Tireza." 
Numbers26:34 Ala yaari mahimo a Manaxe; yaale yaalikeliwe yaari asilopwana 52 700. 
Numbers26:35 Ekhapira ya Efrayimi, ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya, yaari: mwa Xutela, nihimo na aXutela; mwa Bekeri, nihimo na aBekeri; mwa Tahani, nihimo na aTahani." 
Numbers26:36 Ekhapira ya Xutela yaari ti ela: mwa Erani, nihimo na awErani." 
Numbers26:37 Ala yaari mahimo a awEfrayimi, yaale yaalikeliwe yaari asilopwana 32 500. Ela yaari ekhapira ya Yoseefe, ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya." 
Numbers26:38 Ekhapira ya Benyamini, ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya, yaari: mwa Bela, nihimo na aBela; mwa Axebeli, nihimo na awAxebeli, mwa Ahirami, nihimo na awAhirami;" 
Numbers26:39 mwa Sufami, nihimo na aSufami; mwa Hufami, nihimo na aHufami." 
Numbers26:40 Ekhapira ya Bela, mwa Arede ni Naamani, yaari: mwa Arede, nihimo na awArede; mwa Naamani, nihimo na aNaamani." 
Numbers26:41 Ala yaari mahimo a Benyamini; yaale yaalikeliwe yaari asilopwana 45 600. 
Numbers26:42 Ekhapira ya Dani, ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya, yaari: mwa Xuhami, nihimo na aXuhami. Ala yaari mahimo a Dani," 
Numbers26:43 ootheenaawo yaari mahimo a aXuhami; yaale yaalikeliwe yaari asilopwana 64 400. 
Numbers26:44 Ekhapira sa Axeri, ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya, yaari: mwa Yimena, nihimo na aYimena, mwa Yixevi, nihimo na aYixevi, mwa Beriya, nihimo na aBeriya;" 
Numbers26:45 ni a ekhapira ya Beriya: mwa Heberi, nihimo na aHeberi; mwa Malikiyeli, nihimo na aMalikiyeli." 
Numbers26:46 Axeri aakhalano mwaana muthiyana mmoha iitthaniwa Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Ala yaari mahimo a Axeri; yaale yaalikeliwe yaari asilopwana 53 400. 
Numbers26:48 Ekhapira ya Nafitali, ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya, yaari: mwa Yahezeli, nihimo na aYahezeli, mwa Guni, nihimo na aGuni;" 
Numbers26:49 mwa Yezeri, nihimo na aYezeri; mwa Xilemi nihimo na aXilemi." 
Numbers26:50 Ala yaari mahimo a aNafitali; yaale yaalikeliwe yaari asilopwana 45 400. 
Numbers26:51 Waatta wootheene wa aYixrayeli waari 601 730. 
Numbers26:52 Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi: 
Numbers26:53 “Elapo enookawaniwa eriyaraaya ntoko yoohiyeriwa, ottharihiwaka waatta wa masina alepingwe a khula nihimo." 
Numbers26:54 Wa nihimo noowaattaxa mvahe yoohiyeriwa yoowaattaxa, ni wa nihimo nooyevaxa, mvahe yoohiyeriwa yooyevaxa; khula mutthu anaakhele yoohiyeriwaawe ottharihiwaka waatta wa oolepeliwa." 
Numbers26:55 Wa soothesene, elapo, ekawiweke apakiwaka mwaathanle. Khula mutthu anaakuxe mpattaawe nittharihiwaka nsina na epuumba ya makholowaawe." 
Numbers26:56 Khula yoohiyeriwa ekawiweke apakiwaka mwaathanle eriyari ya mahimo oowaattaxa ni ooyevaxa.” 
Numbers26:57 aLeevi yaalikeliwe, ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya, yaari ala: mwa Gerexoni, nihimo na aGerexoni; ya Kohati, nihimo na aKohati; ya Merari, nihimo na aMerari." 
Numbers26:58 Mahimo a aLeevi akinatho yaari ala: Nihimo na aLibeni; nihimo na aHeberoni; nihimo na aMaheli; nihimo na aMuxi; nihimo na aKora. Vano Kohati aari nikholo na Amerami. 
Numbers26:59 Mwaariye Amerami iitthaniwa Yokebeti, a ekhapira ya Leevi, aayareliwe wExipitu. Owo aamuyara Aharoni, Moisesi ni murokorayasa Miriyami." 
Numbers26:60 Aharoni aari tiithi a Nadabi, Abihu, Eleyazari ni Itamari." 
Numbers26:61 Vaheera Nadabe ni Abiwu yaahookhwa yaapakaaya yooveleela ni mooro woohitthuniheriwa vamaithoni wa Yave. 
Numbers26:62 aLeevi asilopwana ootheene, a mweeri mmoha woorowa ohoolo, yaalikeliwe yaari 23 000. Khayaalikeliwe vamoha ni aYixrayeli akina niwoko khayaakhenle yoohiyeriwa eriyaraaya." 
Numbers26:63 Ti yaala yaalepeliwe ni Moisesi ni musaserdoti* Eleyazari, yaawaalikelaaya aYixrayeli mureyareyani na oMowabe, muxerexere Yordanu, okhopela wa oYeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Khaariworu naari mmoha a yaale eriyari ya yaale yaalikeliwe ni Moisesi ni musaserdoti* Aharoni, yaawaalikelaaya munikareni na oSinayi." 
Numbers26:65 Yave aahaaleela weera yaamukhwela munikareni. Tivawo, ahaakhanlaaweru naari mmoha a yaawosa, ahikhanle paahi Kalebi, mwaana mulopwana a Yefune, ni Yoxuwa mwaana mulopwana a Nuni." 
Numbers27:1 Anamwane asithiyana athanu a Zelofehadi, mwaana mulopwana a Heferi, mwaana mulopwana a Gileyadi, mwaana mulopwana a Makiri, mwaana mulopwana a Manaxe yaari a epuumba ya Manaxe, mwaana mulopwana a Yoseefe. Vano masina a anamwane asithiyana ale yaari: Mahela, Nowa, Hogela, Mileka ni Tireza. Awosa yaarowa" 
Numbers27:2 wa mulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano* aakhalaawewo Moisesi, musaserdoti* Eleyazari, mapwattapwattha ni muloko wootheene, enaweerelasa:" 
Numbers27:3 “Atithihu akhwenle munikareni, mene khayaahiyono a mpatta wa yaale yaatakanseranne ni Kora, yaamurukunuwenle Yave. Atithihu siwiivale soottheka yaapankaaya ni khayaahingye anamwane asilopwana oophwanela waakhela yoohiyeriwaaya." 
Numbers27:4 Nnilakaseere heeni nsina na atithihu mweemusini niwoko noohikhalano anamwane asilopwana? Munivahe elapo yoophwanela ya okuxa mpatta wa yoohiyeriwa ntoko axunnaya atithihu.” 
Numbers27:5 Moisesi aarongha mulattu ole ohoolo wa Yave," 
Numbers27:6 ni Yave aamweerela: 
Numbers27:7 “Anamwane asithiyana a Zelofehadi ahuupuwela nnene. Mwaavahaseke yoophwanela ya okhalano mpatta wa yoohiyeriwa, ntoko axunnaya atithaya, ni opakiha weera awosa yaakhelase soohiyera sa atithaya." 
Numbers27:8 Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Mulopwana akhwa ahimuyanre mwaana mulopwana, mumvaheke yoohiyeriwaawe mwaana muthiyana." 
Numbers27:9 Owo aahikhalano mwaana muthiyana, yoohiyeriwaawe evahiweke axunneiye." 
Numbers27:10 Aahikhalano axunneiye, mwaavaheke axunnaya atithawe." 
Numbers27:11 Atithawe yaahikhalanotho axunnaya, yoohiyeriwaawe avahiweke mmusi xaxaxa a munihimonimwawe weera owo akuxe. Eyo ekhaleke yoonyesereriwa wa aYixrayeli, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi.’”" 
Numbers27:12 Vano Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Ngwele mwaako ola ori mpatta wa nyaako siniitthaniwa Abarimi ni moone elapo kaavanghaaka aYixrayeli. 
Numbers27:13 Moonneene, nyuwotho munoothukumanyihiwa ni makholowaanyu ntoko munninyu Aharoni," 
Numbers27:14 niwoko muloko waavaanyaaya mmaahini a munikareni na oZini, nyuwosa ooweeli khamwiiwelenle Nlamulonaka na ottittimiha otteelawaka ohoolowayasa. Vano eyo yeereiye mmaahini a oMeriba, oKadexi, munikareni na oZini." 
Numbers27:15 Moisesi aamweerela Yave: 
Numbers27:16 “Ii! Dyoontte, Yave Muluku onaavaha okumi akumi ootheene athanlele mutokweene muloko ola," 
Numbers27:17 weera eettihe mmapuroni ootheene eneeraaya erowe ni weera avolonghe, ni muloko wa Yave ohikhale ntoko ikhondoolo soohikhalano mukukhula.”" 
Numbers27:18 Vano Yave aamwaakhula Moisesi: Mmwiitthane Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, mwa yoowo oraayamo Munepa ni mmwiikaathere matata." 
Numbers27:19 Mwamoonihere wa musaserdoti* Eleyazari ni wa muloko wootheene munkhalihaka vamaithoniwaya. 
Numbers27:20 Mumvahe mpatta wa olamulawanyu weera muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli omwiiwelele. 
Numbers27:21 Owo iixoonihereke wa musaserdoti* Eleyazari, anaakoherere soolakela sa Urimi* amweerelaka Yoxuwa, ohoolo wa Yave. Ti moota ola Yoxuwa ni muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli oneeraaya weettele mpaka ohoolo." 
Numbers27:22 Moisesi aapaka ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe. Aamwiitthana Yoxuwa, anamoonihera musaserdoti* Eleyazari ni muloko wootheene." 
Numbers27:23 Aamwiikaathera matata, anamukhaliha ntoko Yave aahimmaawe mwa Moisesi." 
Numbers28:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers28:2 “Mwaalamulele aYixrayeli ni mwaaleele: ‘Mwiipasoope wookivaha yooca mweehuhuni ethanleliwe sooveleeleliwasaka soorehereriwa vayikho, ntoko yoowunkhela eniikhale yookisiveliha.’" 
Numbers28:3 Mwaaleele: ‘Yooveleela yoorehereriwa vayikho muneeraanyu mumvahaseke Yave ti ela: Iputtiputthi piili sa eyaakha emoha, soohirakala, ntoko yooveleela ya khula nihuku." 
Numbers28:4 Mveleele eputtiputthi emoha oxeexelo ni ekineeyo oxekuwa," 
Numbers28:5 vamoha ni yooveleela ya irooro ya ikiilu* piili ya ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa eliitru* emoha ya makhura a sooliveira* ooreerela. 
Numbers28:6 Ela ti yooveleela yoohisa ya khula nihuku, epacerihiwe omwaako Sinayi ntoko yoowunkhela yoosiveliha, yoomveleelela Yave ni yoorehereriwa vayikho." 
Numbers28:7 Vano eliitru* emoha ya soowura yooheliwa eferementu evareliweke muteko vamoha ni khula eputtiputthi. Yoomveleelela Yave yooveleela yoowura vaNipuroni Nootteela*. 
Numbers28:8 Mveleele eputtiputthi yanaaveeli oxekuwa, vamoha ni mooteene yoowo wa yooveleela ya irooro ni yoowura munrehereraanyu oxeexelo. Ti yooveleela yoorehereriwa vayikho, yoowunkhela yoomusivelha Yave." 
Numbers28:9 Vanihukuni na eSaabadu, mpakase yooveleela ya iputtiputthi piili sa eyakha emoha ni soohirakala, vamoha ni sooveleela soowura ni yooveleela emoha ya irooro ya ikiilu* piili sa ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura." 
Numbers28:10 Ela ti yooveleela yoohisa wa khula eSaabadu, ohiya yooveleela yoohisa ya khula nihuku ni ya yooveleela yoowura." 
Numbers28:11 Vanihukuni noopacera na khula mweeri, mumveleelele Yave yooveleela yoohisa ya aximombe piili, napunci mmoha a ikhondoolo ni iputtiputthi ithannapiili sa eyaakha emoha, sootheene iyo soohirakala." 
Numbers28:12 Wa khula mwaamombe ekhaleke yooveleela ya irooro ya iliitru* ithannamosa ni nttikha sa ephepa ya etrigu yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura; wa napunci ekhaleke yooveleela ya irooro ya iliitru* ixexe sa ephepa ya etrigu yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura; 
Numbers28:13 ni wa khula eputtiputthi, ekhaleke yooveleela ya irooro ya ikiilu* piili sa ephepa yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura. Eyo enookhala yooveleela yoohisa, yoowunkhela yoomusiveliha Yave, yoomurehererela vayikho Yave." 
Numbers28:14 Wa khula mwaamombe ekhaleke yooveleela yoowura ya iliitru* piili, eliitru* ni nttikha wa khula napunci a ikhondoolo ni eliitru* emoha wa khula eputtiputthi. Ela ti yooveleela yoohisa eneeneene ya nihuku noopacera na khula mweeri munyowani, wa eyaakha yootheene." 
Numbers28:15 Ohiya yooveleela yoohisa ya khula nihuku, ni yooveleela yoowura, napunci a epuri aveleeleliweke Yave ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka." 
Numbers28:16 Vanihukuni nanaamuloko ni maxexe na mweeri woopacera ti mPaska* a Yave. 
Numbers28:17 Vanihukuni nanaamuloko ni mathanu na mweereene yoowo, ekhaleke efesta; mmahukuni mathannameeli muceeke epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu." 
Numbers28:18 Vanihukuni noopacera na efesta eyo mpake muthukumano wootteela ni muhivareru muteko. 
Numbers28:19 Mumveleelele Yave yooveleela yoorehereriwa vayikho, yooveleela yoohisa ya aximombe eeli, napunci mmoha a ikhondoolo ni iputtiputthi ithannapiili sa eyaakha emoha, sootheene iyo soohirakala." 
Numbers28:20 Wa khula mwaamombe ekhaleke yooveleela ya irooro ya iliitru* ithannamosa ni nttikha sa ephepa ya etrigu yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura; wa napunci a ikhondoolo iliitru* ixexe 
Numbers28:21 ni iliitru* piili wa khula eputtiputthi. 
Numbers28:22 Mumveleele napunci a ipuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, weera mwiirehererelase wiiwanana ni Muluku." 
Numbers28:23 Mpake sooveleela iyo, ohiya sooveleela soohisa sa khula nihuku simveleeliwa oxeexelo." 
Numbers28:24 Khula nihuku na mathannameeli awo mureherereke yooca mooteene owo; Muruuhe yooca wa yooveleela yoorehereriwa vayikho, yoowunkhela yoomusiveliha Yave; eyo epakiweke, ohiya yooveleela yoohisa ya khula nihuku ni yooveleela yoowura." 
Numbers28:25 Vanihukuni nanaathannameeli, mpake muthukumano wootteela ni muhivareru muteko." 
Numbers28:26 Vanihukuni na ohepha wa soowiima soopacera, mwaampakelaka Yave sooveleela sa irooro inyowani mufestani ya isimana, mpake muthukumano wootteela ni muhivareru muteko." 
Numbers28:27 Mpake yooveleela yoohisa ya aximombe piili, napunci a ikhondoolo mmoha ni iputtiputthi ithannapiili sa eyaakha emoha, ntoko yoowunkhela yoomusiveliha Yave." 
Numbers28:28 Wa khula mwaamombe ekhaleke yooveleela ya irooro ya iliitru* ithannamosa ni nttikha sa ephepa ya etrigu yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura; wa napunci a ikhondoolo iliitru* ixexe; 
Numbers28:29 ni iliitru* piili wa khula eputtiputthi. 
Numbers28:30 Mumveleeletho napunci mmoha a ipuri weera mwiirehererele wiiwanana ni Yave. 
Numbers28:31 Sootheene iyo mureherere vamoha ni yooveleela yoowura, ohiya sooveleela soohisa sa khula nihuku ni sooveleelasaya sa irooro. Mwaawehaweheke toko axinama weera ehikhale oorakala." 
Numbers29:1 Vanihukuni noopacera na mweeri wanaathannamiili, mpake muthukumano wootteela ni muhivareru muteko. Nihuku nno nyuwosa mwiipe mapalapatta." 
Numbers29:2 Mumveleele mwaamombe, napunci a ikhondoolo ni iputtiputthi ithannapiili sa eyaakha emoha, sootheene iyo soohirakala ntoko yooveleela yoohisa, yoowunkhela yoomusiveliha Yave." 
Numbers29:3 Wa khula mwaamombe ekhaleke yooveleela ya irooro ya iliitru* ithannamosa ni nttikha sa ephepa ya etrigu yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura; wa napunci a ikhondoolo iliitru* ixexe; 
Numbers29:4 ni iliitru* piili wa khula eputtiputthi. 
Numbers29:5 Mumveleele napunci a ipuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, weera mwiirehererelase wiiwanana ni Muluku." 
Numbers29:6 Ohiya sooveleela soohisa sa khula mweeri ni sa khula nihuku vamoha ni sooveleelasaya sa irooro ni sooveleela soowura, ntoko silempwalaaya. Ti sooveleela soorehereriwa vayikho, soowunkhela soomusiveliha Yave." 
Numbers29:7 Vanihukuni nanaamuloko na mweeri wanaathannamiili owo, mpake muthukumano wootteela. Nyuwosa mwiiyevihaseke ni muhivareru muteko." 
Numbers29:8 Mumveleele mwaamombe, napunci a ikhondoolo ni iputtiputthi ithannapiili sa eyaakha emoha, sootheene iyo soohirakala ntoko yooveleela yoohisa, yoowunkhela yoomusiveliha Yave." 
Numbers29:9 Wa khula mwaamombe ekhaleke yooveleela ya irooro ya iliitru* ithannamosa ni nttikha sa ephepa ya etrigu yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura; wa napunci a ikhondoolo iliitru* ixexe; 
Numbers29:10 ni iliitru* piili wa khula eputtiputthi. 
Numbers29:11 Mumveleelasetho napunci a ipuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, ohiya yooveleelela yoottheka weera mwiirehererele wiiwanana ni Yave ni sooveleela soohisa sa khula nihuku vamoha ni sooveleelasaya sa irooro ni sooveleela soowura." 
Numbers29:12 Vanihukuni nanaamuloko ni mathanu na mweeri wanaathannamiili mpake muthukumano wootteela ni muhivareru muteko. Mumpakele efesta Yave mmahukuni mathannameeli. 
Numbers29:13 Mpakase yooveleela yoorehereriwa vayikho, yoowunkhela yoomusiveliha Yave moota ola: Yooveleela yoohisa ya aximombe muloko naararu, anapunci a ikhondoolo eeli ni iputtiputthi muloko niixexe sa eyaakha emoha, sootheene iyo soohirakala." 
Numbers29:14 Wa khula aximombe muloko naararu ekhaleke yooveleela ya irooro iliitru* ithannamosa ni nttikha sa ephepa ya etrigu yooreerela yooweetheeliwa makhura; wa khula napunci a ikhondoolo, iliitru* ixexe;" 
Numbers29:15 ni wa khula iputtiputthi ithanniixexe iliitru* piili. 
Numbers29:16 Mumveleelasetho napunci a ipuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, ohiya yooveleela yoohisa ya khula nihuku ni sooveleelasaya sa irooro ni soowura." 
Numbers29:17 Vanihukuni nanaaveeli mwaareherere aximombe muloko neeli, anapunci a ikhondoolo eeli ni iputtiputthi muloko niixexe sa eyaakha emoha, sootheene iyo soohirakala." 
Numbers29:18 Wa sooveleela sa aximombe, anapunci a ikhondoolo ni iputtiputthi, murehererase sooveleelasaya sa irooro ni soowura, ntoko silempwalaaya." 
Numbers29:19 Mumveleeletho napunci mmoha a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, ohiya sooveleela soohisa sa khula nihuku ni sooveleelasaya sa irooro ni soowura." 
Numbers29:20 Vanihukuni nanaararu mwaareherere aximombe muloko nimmoha, anapunci a ikhondoolo eeli ni iputtiputthi muloko niixexe sa eyaakha emoha, sootheene iyo soohirakala." 
Numbers29:21 Wa sooveleela sa aximombe, anapunci a ikhondoolo ni iputtiputthi, murehererase sooveleelasaya sa irooro ni soowura, ntoko silempwalaaya." 
Numbers29:22 Mumveleelasetho napunci a ipuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, ohiya yooveleela yoohisa ya khula nihuku ni sooveleelasaya sa irooro ni soowura." 
Numbers29:23 Vanihukuni nanaaxexe mwaareherere aximombe muloko, anapunci a ikhondoolo eeli ni iputtiputthi muloko niixexe sa eyaakha emoha, sootheene iyo soohirakala." 
Numbers29:24 Wa sooveleela sa aximombe, anapunci a ikhondoolo ni iputtiputthi, murehererase sooveleelasaya sa irooro ni sa soowura, ntoko silempwalaaya." 
Numbers29:25 Mumveleelasetho napunci a ipuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, ohiya yooveleela yoohisa ya khula nihuku ni sooveleelasaya sa irooro ni soowura." 
Numbers29:26 Vanihukuni nanaathanu mwaareherere aximombe athannaaxexe, anapunci a ikhondoolo eeli ni iputtiputthi muloko niixexe sa eyaakha emoha, sootheene iyo soohirakala." 
Numbers29:27 Wa sooveleela sa aximombe, anapunci a ikhondoolo ni iputtiputthi, murehererase sooveleelasaya sa irooro ni soowura, ntoko silempwalaaya." 
Numbers29:28 Mumveleelasetho napunci a ipuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, ohiya yooveleela yoohisa ya khula nihuku ni sooveleelasaya sa irooro ni soowura." 
Numbers29:29 Vanihukuni nanaathannamosa, mwaareherere aximombe athannaararu, anapunci a ikhondoolo eeli ni iputtiputthi muloko niixexe, sootheene iyo sa eyaakha emoha ni soohirakala." 
Numbers29:30 Wa sooveleela sa aximombe, anapunci a ikhondoolo ni iputtiputthi, murehererase sooveleelasaya sa irooro ni sa soowura, ntoko silempwalaaya." 
Numbers29:31 Mumveleeletho napunci mmoha a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, ohiya sooveleela soohisa sa khula nihuku ni sooveleelasaya sa irooro ni sa soowura." 
Numbers29:32 Vanihukuni nanaathannameeli, mwaareherere aximombe athanneeli, anapunci a ikhondoolo eeli ni iputtiputthi muloko niixexe sa eyaakha emoha, sootheene iyo soohirakala." 
Numbers29:33 Wa sooveleela sa aximombe, anapunci a ikhondoolo ni iputtiputthi, murehererase sooveleelasaya sa irooro ni soowura, ntoko silempwalaaya." 
Numbers29:34 Mumveleeletho napunci mmoha a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, ohiya sooveleela soohisa sa khula nihuku ni soveleelasaya sa irooro ni soowura." 
Numbers29:35 Vanihukuni nanaathannamararu mpake muthukumano ni muhivareru muteko. 
Numbers29:36 Mpake yooveleela yoorehereriwa vayikho, yoowunkhela, yoomusiveliha Yave, yooveleela yoohisa ya mwaamombe, napunci mmoha a ikhondoolo ni iputtiputthi ithannapiili sa eyaakha emoha, sootheene iyo soohirakala." 
Numbers29:37 Wa sooveleela sa aximombe, anapunci a ikhondoolo ni iputtiputthi, murehererase sooveleelasaya sa irooro ni soowura, ntoko silempwalaaya." 
Numbers29:38 Mumveleeletho napunci mmoha a epuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, ohiya sooveleela soohisa sa khula nihuku ni soveleelasaya sa irooro ni soowura." 
Numbers29:39 Ohiya sooveleela soororomeliha muneeraanyu mpake ni seiyo sa otthunawanyu, munrehererele yeeyo Yave mmafestani muthanleliwaanyu: Sooveleelasanyu soohisa, sooveleelasanyu sa irooro; sooveleelasanyu soowura ni sa murettele.”" 
Numbers29:40 Moisesi aahaaleela aYixrayeli sootheene aalamuleliwaawe ni Yave. 
Numbers30:1 Moisesi aaweerela mapwattapwattha a ipuumba sa aYixrayeli: “Yeeyo Yave onlamulelaawe ti ela: 
Numbers30:2 Mulopwana mmoha amuroromeliha Yave hoye hoye alipela okwanihera etthu, ahinanarihe maswaawe, mene akwanihere sootheene ohimmaawe." 
Numbers30:3 Mwaamwali onkhala nlelo vaate wa atithawe, amuroromeliha Yave hoye hoye iinyesererihaka ni nlipelo" 
Numbers30:4 ni atithawe yasuwela yoororomelihaawe hoye hoye nlipelonawe, mene yaahimuleela, vano soororomelihasawe sootheene ni khula nlipelo, mwa seiyo iinyesereringhaaweno, sinimooneleyamo." 
Numbers30:5 Vaheera, tiithi amukhoottiha asuwenleene yoororomeliha, khasooneleyamo soororomelihasawe hoye hoye nlipelonawe mwa seiyo iinyesereringhaaweno; Yave onoomutapuxa niwoko atithawe aamukhoottiha." 
Numbers30:6 Owo atheliwa aroromelingheene hoye hoye iinyesereringheene ni nlipelo ahitthokelelaka," 
Numbers30:7 ni iyawe asuwenleene ahinamuleelaru etthu vanihukuni aneeraawe asuwele, hiiho soororomelihasawe sootheene ni khula nlipelo, mwa seiyo iinyesereringhaaweno, sinimooneleyamo." 
Numbers30:8 Vaheera, iyawe amukhoottiha asuwenleene, kheevareleya muteko yoororomeliha enimunyesereriha hoye hoye yoororomeliha opankaawe ahitthokelelaka mwa yeeyo owo iinyesereringhaaweno, ni Yave onoomutapuxa." 
Numbers30:9 Yakhalaru yoororomeliha hoye hoye nlipelo nipakingwe ni akhalaru naamukhweli hoye hoye ni muthiyana omwalanne enimooneleyamo. 
Numbers30:10 Muthiyana othelingwe aroromeliha hoye hoye iinyesereriha ni nlipelo 
Numbers30:11 ni iyawe asuwenleene ahinamuleelaru etthu ni aahimukhoottiha, hiiho soororomelihasawe sootheene ni khula nlipelo, mwa seiyo iinyesereringhaaweno, sinimooneleyamo." 
Numbers30:12 Vaheera iyawe asuwenleene anakhoottela, hiiho kheewoworu yoororomeliha hoye hoye nlipelo uulummaawe eniyooneleyemo. Iyawe ookhootha ni Yave onoomutapuxa." 
Numbers30:13 Iyawe amwaakhuleleke hoye hoye aamukhootteleke mwaariye yakhalaru yoororomeliha naari nlipelo nnimunyesereriha wiikhootta. 
Numbers30:14 Vaheera, iyawe aahimuleelaru etthu mwaha wa yeeyo mpaka waaxiiye, eyo enimwaakhuleliha soororomelihasawe sootheene, hoye hoye soolipelasawe sootheene mwa seiyo iinyesereringhaaweno. Owo aakhuleleke ohimuleelawawe etthu iiwaleene." 
Numbers30:15 Wa soothesene, ooceeliha mweehuhuni ekina iiwaleene, owo onoohaawa makacamiho a nthowanawe." 
Numbers30:16 Ti seiya soolamulela Yave aamvanghaawe Moisesi mwaha wa mulopwana ni mwaariye ni eriyari ya tiithi ni mwaniye muthiyana onkhala nlelo vaate wa atithawe. 
Numbers31:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers31:2 “Ngwiinlele ikukuttula aMidiyani mwa yeeyo yaapakenlaaya aYixrayeli. Vahoolowaya, nyuwo munoothukumanyihiwa ni makholowaanyu.”" 
Numbers31:3 Vano Moisesi aaheerela muloko: “Mwaareherere asilopwana akina akina variyariwanyu weera erowase okhottoni waawanano aMidiyani ni omwiinlelela ikukuttula Yave yaawosa. 
Numbers31:4 Khula epuumba ya aYixrayeli yaarumiheke okhottoni asilopwana macira muloko. 
Numbers31:5 Asilopwana 12 000 oolikaneene orowa okhottoni, macira muloko wa khula epuumba, yaarumihiwa mmahimoni a aYixrayeli." 
Numbers31:6 Moisesi aahaarumihasa okhottoni asilopwana macira muloko a khula epuumba, vamoha ni Pinehasi, mwaana mulopwana a musaserdoti* Eleyazari, aakuxale ikaruma sa Nipuro Nootteela* ni mapalapatta oowiipa okhottoni." 
Numbers31:7 Vano yaahaawanano aMidiyani, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi, enawiivakasa asilopwana ootheene." 
Numbers31:8 Eriyari ya yaawo yaakhwiiye, yaari mamwene mathanu a oMidiyani ala: Evi, Rekemi, Zuri, Huri, ni Reba. Yaamwiivatho ni ekatana Biliyami, mwaana mulopwana a Peyori." 
Numbers31:9 aYixrayeli yaahaavarasa asithiyana ni anamwane a aMidiyani, enakuxatho mihuwosaya ni sooreelasaya sootheene ntoko soohuhula." 
Numbers31:10 Yaahisa isidade sootheene yiitekihalaayamo aMidiyani ni yaakonelaayamo moothemwene. 
Numbers31:11 Yaakuxasa soohuhula sootheene, vamoha ni atthu nitho axinama," 
Numbers31:12 enaakuxasa anamatthukiwa ni soohuhula, enaarongha wa Moisesi, musaserdoti* Eleyazari ni muloko wa aYixrayeli, yaakonenlaayawo, mureyareyani mwa oMowabe, okhopela wa oYeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Moisesi, musaserdoti* Eleyazari ni ahooleli ootheene a muloko, yaarowa owaakhelela okerekhere wa waakonelingwe." 
Numbers31:14 Vaheera Moisesi aahaanyoonyeriwa asitokweene a anakhotto yaahokolongwe okhottoni – ahooleli a anakhotto macira muloko ni a ncira nimoha. 
Numbers31:15 Owo aahaakohasa: “Mwaahiyenreni asithiyana ootheene ni okumi? 
Numbers31:16 Ti yaawosa yeettenle ikano sa Biliyami, enaahapuxa aYixrayeli wa Yave mwa yeele yeereiye oPeyori, moota wooweera nihooxo nimoha naalaliha muloko wa Yave." 
Numbers31:17 Vano ngwiivakase asimiravo ootheene. Ngwiivetho asithiyana ootheene akonne ni asilopwana," 
Numbers31:18 mene mwiixuurelele asimwali oowiikosoopa ootheene. 
Numbers31:19 Ootheene nyuwo mmwiivale mutthu hoye hoye mutamve muttembo, mukhale okerekhere wa okonelingwe wa mahuku mathannameeli. Vanihukuni nanaararu ni nanaathannameeli, ontthuneya wiitteeliha nyuwo ni anamatthukiwaanyu." 
Numbers31:20 Mutteelihe soowara sootheene ni sootheene sipakelingwe exapala, mapururu a epuri hoye hoye sa nakotto.”" 
Numbers31:21 Vahoolowaya, musaserdoti* Eleyazari aaweerela anakhotto yaarongwe okhottoni: “Yoonyesereriha ya Nlamulo Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi ti ela:" 
Numbers31:22 Eyuuma yoorikaxa, eparatha*, ebronze*, eyuuma, eyuuma ya eseeta, eyuuma yoolemela" 
Numbers31:23 ni sootheene sihinza, nyuwosa mviriheke vayikho weera mutteelihe, mene mutteeliheketho ni maahi ootteelihera. Vaheera sootheene sinza sirapihiweke ni maahi." 
Numbers31:24 Vanihukuni nanaathannameeli mucapeke soowarasanyu, ni nyuwosa munookhala ootteela. Vahoolowaya, mvolowaseke okonelingwe." 
Numbers31:25 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers31:26 “Nyuwo, musaserdoti* Eleyazari ni mapwattapwattha a muloko, mwawaalikele atthu ootheene ni axinama avaringwe." 
Numbers31:27 Mukawanyihe soohuhula eriyari ya anakhotto yaarongwe okhottoni ni muloko mukina waahanle owo. 
Numbers31:28 Mwa yeeyo aruuhalaaya anakhotto okhottoni, mmwalamwaxe ntoko mucaango wa Yave mmoha wa khula macira mathanu – ekhalaka atthu, imombe, abuuru, ikhondoolo hoye hoye ipuri." 
Numbers31:29 Mpatta owo mmwinnyerere musaserdoti* Eleyazari; ti mucaango wa Yave. 
Numbers31:30 Wa mpatta avahingwe aYixrayeli, muthanle mmoha wa khula miloko mithanu – ekhalaka atthu, imombe, abuuru, ikhondoolo, ipuri hoye hoye axinama akina. Mwaavahe aLeevi avahereriwe okosoopa etabernaakulu* ya Yave." 
Numbers31:31 Moisesi ni musaserdoti* Eleyazari yaapakasa ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi. 
Numbers31:32 Soohuhula saahanle mwa seiyo yaattottannyaaya anakhotto a aYixrayeli saari ikhondoolo 675 000," 
Numbers31:33 imombe 72 000," 
Numbers31:34 abuuru 61 000 
Numbers31:35 ni aximwali oowiikosoopa 32 000. 
Numbers31:36 Mpatta wa eriyari yaavahiwaaya yaawo yaawanne waari ikhondoolo 337 500," 
Numbers31:37 mwa seiyo mucaango wa Yave waari 675; 
Numbers31:38 wa imombe waari 36 000, mwa seiyo mpatta wa mucaango wa Yave waari miloko mithannamiili ni piili;" 
Numbers31:39 wa abuuru waari 30 500, mwa seiyo mpatta wa mucaango wa Yave waari miloko mithannamosa nimmoha;" 
Numbers31:40 ni mpatta wa atthu waari 16 000 mwa seiyo mpatta wa mucaango wa Yave waari miloko miraru neeli. 
Numbers31:41 Moisesi aamvaha mucaango musaserdoti* Eleyazari ntoko mucaango wa Yave, hiihoweene aalamuleliwaawe ni Yave." 
Numbers31:42 Mpatta mukinoowo waari wa aYixrayeli, mwa yoowo Moisesi aahaamwalamwalihera anakhotto." 
Numbers31:43 Vano mpatta owo wa muloko waari ikhondoolo 337 500," 
Numbers31:44 imombe 36 000," 
Numbers31:45 abuuru 30 500 
Numbers31:46 ni atthu 16 000. 
Numbers31:47 Wa mpatta wa eriyari waari wa muloko wa aYixrayeli, Moisesi aathanla mmoha wa khula miloko mithanu – okhalaka wa atthu mpaka wa axinama, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe, anawinnyerera aLeevi yaavahereriwe okosoopa etabernaakulu* ya Yave." 
Numbers31:48 Vano asitokweene a anakhotto yaari ohoolo wa mikuttula sa anakhotto – asitokweene a macira muloko ni a ncira nimoha, yaarowasa wuuluma ni Moisesi," 
Numbers31:49 enamweerelasa: “Arumeiyaanyu aawaalikela anakhotto nnaahoolelaahu, ni khawoworu ohaleenle." 
Numbers31:50 Tivawo niruuhalaahu ntoko soomveleelela Yave ikaruma sa eyuuma yoorikaxa mwa seiyo khula mutthu a hiyo okuxalaawe – mangosa, ipangiiri, annela oottittano, axiveeve ni mikhova – weera niirehererele wiiwanana ni Yave ohoolowawe.”" 
Numbers31:51 Moisesi ni musaserdoti* Eleyazari yaahaakhelasa wa yaawo itthu sooreerela sootheene sa eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
Numbers31:52 Eyuuma yoorikaxa eyo, yaavahiwe ni asitokweene a mikuttula sa macira muloko ni sa ncira nimoha sa anakhotto ntoko mucaango wa Yave, yaalemela ikiilu* ncira ni miloko mithannamiili." 
Numbers31:53 Khula nakhotto aahiikuxera soohuhula. 
Numbers31:54 Moisesi ni musaserdoti* Eleyazari yaahaakhelasa eyuuma yoorikaxa ya asitokweene a mikuttula sa macira muloko ni sa ncira nimoha sa anakhotto, enaronghasa Muheemani ya Muthukumano*, ntoko eyuupuxero weera ti Yave aawuupuwelenle aYixrayeli." 
Numbers32:1 Ipuumba sa aRubeni ni aGadi saakhalano mihuwo sincipale. Yoonaka weera elapo ya oYazeri ni oGileyade yaari yooreera ohuwawo mihuwo," 
Numbers32:2 yaarowa wuuluma ni Moisesi musaserdoti* Eleyazari ni asitokweene a muloko enaweerelasa: 
Numbers32:3 “Ilapo sa wAtaroti, oDiboni, oYazeri, oNimera, oHexeboni, wEleyaleni, oSebami, oNebo ni oBeyoni," 
Numbers32:4 owinnaawe Yave eerelaka muloko wa aYixrayeli, ti ilapo sooreerela wa muhuwo. Vano hiyo arumeiyaanyu nookhalano axinama ancipale." 
Numbers32:5 Moonihere murimaanyu wooreera ni munivahe elapo ela ntoko yawihu ohiya elapo ya okhopela wa Yordanu.” 
Numbers32:6 Moisesi aahaakhula ikhapira sa Rubeni ni Gadi: “Vano axunninyu yaarowaka okhottoni nyuwosa munookhala vaava? 
Numbers32:7 Heeni nyuwosa munaapororihaanyu aYixrayeli ovolowa mulaponi Yave aavanghaawe? 
Numbers32:8 Ti yeeyo yaapankaaya asitithinyu kaaruminghaaka oKadexi-Bareneya weera yahottele elapo. 
Numbers32:9 Yaarowasa mpaka nreyareya na wExekoli, enoona elapo, vahoolowaya yaarowasa waapororiha aYixrayeli weera awosa ehivolowe mulaponi mwa yeeyo Yave aneeraawe aavahe." 
Numbers32:10 Nihuku nne, isara sa Yave saapatta ni Owo aalipela ha:" 
Numbers32:11 “Mweenre muhittharaka ni murima wookwanela, khakhalaru naari mutthu mmoha a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo okhumme wExipitu anoone elapo kiroromelinghaaka munlipeloni wa Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yakobe." 
Numbers32:12 Paahi Kalebi, mwaana mulopwana a Yefune, a ekhapira ya Kenazi, mpakatho Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, eniivolowe elapo niwoko yaamutthara Yave ni murima wookwanela." 
Numbers32:13 Isara sa Yave saahaapattela aYixrayeli, ni Owo aahaaxoraxoriha munikareni mweehuhuni ya iyaakha miloko mixexe, mpaka omalamala ekhapira ya yaawo yaamutthekenle Yave ni mweettelowaaya woonanara." 
Numbers32:14 Nyuwo muri vawo – ekhapira ya anamattheka, mwiikhalihaka vanipuroni na makholowaanyu ni saapattelakatho aYixrayeli isara sa Yave." 
Numbers32:15 Mwahiya omutthara Yave, Owo onimoohiyanitho munikareni, ni nyuwosa munookhalano nthowa na ophwatiwa wa muloko ola.”" 
Numbers32:16 Vano, awosa yaamwaattamelasa Moisesi, enamweerelasa: “Nintthuna opaka va makhoola a mihuwosahu ni isidade sa axaarihu ni anamwaniihu." 
Numbers32:17 Vaheera hiyo nohiireherera ni nnookhala oolikaneene orowa ohoolo wa aYixrayeli mpaka nneeraahu naphiye vanipuroniwaya. Eyo eri hiiho, axaarihu ni anamwaniihu anoomaka musidadeni soolipihiwa weera yiixaakiheno wa amaki ootheene a mulaponi." 
Numbers32:18 Khanihokoleela mmatthokonimwahu aYixrayeli ootheene ehaakhenle yoohiyeriwaaya. 
Numbers32:19 Khanaakhelaru yoohiyeriwa ni yaawo okhopela Yordanu, yeenre yoohiyeriwaahu nivahiwaka mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oYordanu.”" 
Numbers32:20 Moisesi aaweerelasa: “Mwapaka yeeyo ohoolo wa Yave, muniireherera orowa okhottoni," 
Numbers32:21 ni ootheene nyuwo mwiireherera, munamulapuwa Yordanu ohoolo wa Yave mpaka Owo aneeraawe awoomole amwiittanaanyu ohoolowawe," 
Numbers32:22 vano, elapo ewiniweene ohoolo wa Yave, nyuwosa munoowera ohokolowa ni munootapuxeya mwa soonyesererihiwasanyu wa Yave ni aYixrayeli. Hiiho elapo ela enookhala yawinyuweene ohoolo wa Yave." 
Numbers32:23 Vaheera, nyuwosa mwaahipaka yeeyo, munoomutthekela Yave; ni musuwele weera nyuwosa khamoopowa wa yoottheka epakingwe." 
Numbers32:24 Mwaatekele isidade axaarinyu, anamwaniinyu, ni makhoola a mihuwosanyu, mene mpake yeeyo muroromelinghaanyu.”" 
Numbers32:25 Vano asilopwana a Gadi ni Rubeni yaamweerelasa Moisesi: “Hiyo arumeiyaanyu nnoopaka ntoko apwiyaahu anilamulenlaaya. 
Numbers32:26 Anamwaniihu, axaarihu ni mihuwosahu sootheene sinookhala musidadenimu sa oGiliyade." 
Numbers32:27 Vaheera arumeiyaanyu, asilopwana ootheene oolikaneene orowa okhottoni, anoolapuwa weera yawane ohoolo wa Yave, ntoko apwiyaahu anghimaaya.”" 
Numbers32:28 Vano Moisesi, aamulamula musaserdoti* Eleyazari, Yoxuwa mwaana mulopwana a Nuni ni mapwattapwattha a imusi sa ipuumba sa aYixrayeli mwaha wa yaawosa aweerelaka:" 
Numbers32:29 “Asilopwana a Gadi ni a Rubeni, ootheenaawo oolikaneene orowa okhottoni, yamulapuwa Yordanu ni nyuwosa ohoolo wa Yave, vano elapo yaawiniwaka ohoolowanyu, ngwinnyererase elapo ya oGiliyade ntoko yawayeene." 
Numbers32:30 Vaheera, yaahilapuwa oolikaneene ni nyuwosa, mwaakhuleleke ettimaaya oKanaani.”" 
Numbers32:31 Asilopwana a Gadi ni a Rubeni, yaahaakhula: “Arumeiyaanyu anoopaka yeeyo ohimmaawe Yave." 
Numbers32:32 Nnoomulapuwa Yordanu ohoolo wa Yave ni nnoovolowa oKanaani nikunxeene ikapwitthi, vaheera ettima naakhenlaahu ntoko yoohiyeriwa, enookhala ekhopela ela nno ya Yordanu." 
Numbers32:33 Vano Moisesi aavaha ipuumba sa Gadi ni sa Rubeni ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe, mwaana mulopwana a Yoseefe, omwene wa Sihoni, mwene a awAmori, ni omwene wa Ogi, mwene a oBaxani – elapo yootheene ni isidadesaya ni mittetthe saarukureenrewo." 
Numbers32:34 Epuumba ya Gadi yaarasela oDiboni, wAtaroti, wAroweri," 
Numbers32:35 wAtaroti-Xopani, oYazeri, oYogebeha," 
Numbers32:36 oBeti-Nimera ni oBeti-Harani ntoko isidade soolipihiwa, ni yaapaka makhoola a mihuwosaya." 
Numbers32:37 Epuumba ya Rubeni yaarasela oHexeboni, wEleyaleni ni oKiriyatayimi," 
Numbers32:38 mpakatho oNebo ni oBahali-Meyoni (masina ala yaaceendyiwa) ni oSibema. Yaatteha masina makina isidadesene seiye yaarasenlaaya. 
Numbers32:39 Ikhapira sa Makiri, mwaana mulopwana a Manaxe, saarowa oGileyade, sinamakawo sinawoomolasa awAmori yaakhalawo." 
Numbers32:40 Vano Moisesi aahaavaha oGileyade aMakiri, ikhapira sa Manaxe ni awosa yaamakawo." 
Numbers32:41 Yahiri, a ekhapira ya Manaxe, aakuxa mittetthesaya, anatteha Havoti Yayiri." 
Numbers32:42 Noba aawina oKenati ni mittetthesaya, anatteha Noba, nikhalaka nsinanaya." 
Numbers33:1 Iya ti ihuhu sa mukwaha wa aYixrayeli ekhumelo wExipitu, otthariheleyaka okawanyeyawaya, ehooliwaka ni Moisesi ni Aharoni." 
Numbers33:2 Munlamuloni na Yave, Moisesi aalepa ihuhu sa mukwahaaya. Mukwahaaya, mweehuhuni waari ola:" 
Numbers33:3 Yaakhumasa oRamesese vanihukuni nanaamuloko nimathanu na mweeri woopacera, waaxiiye wa mPaska*, enakhumasa oolipeene, awExipitu ootheene yoonaka." 
Numbers33:4 awExipitu yeera yaavithaka anamwanaaya a matthaara a khula mutthu a yaawosa, aawiivalaawe Yave, niwoko Yave oottaruxa milukusaya." 
Numbers33:5 aYixrayeli yaattimulasa oRamesese, enakonelasa oSukota." 
Numbers33:6 Yaattimula oSukota, enakonelasa wEta, mmwiinanoni wa munikareni." 
Numbers33:7 Ettimulaka wEta, yaahokoleela oPi-Hahirote, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oBahali-Zefoni, enakonelasa vakhiviru wa oMigedoli." 
Numbers33:8 Ettimulaka oPi-Hahirote, yaalapuwa ephareiya, ephiyaka munikareni ni, yeettiyeene mahuku mararu munikareni na wEtami, yaakonelasa oMara." 
Numbers33:9 Ettimulaka oMara, yaarowa wElimi, yaaraayawo anaattuuttu muloko neeli ni mavare miloko mithannamiili, enakonelasawo." 
Numbers33:10 Ettimulaka wElimi, yaakonelasa muxerexere wa Ephareiya Yooxeera." 
Numbers33:11 Wookhuma Ephareiya Yooxeera, yaakonela munikareni na oSini." 
Numbers33:12 Yaattimula munikareni na oSini, enakonelasa oDofeka." 
Numbers33:13 Ettimulaka oDofeka, yaakonela wAluxi." 
Numbers33:14 Ettimulaka wAluxi, yaakonelasa oRefidimi, mwa weiwo yahaakhanlaayawo maahi oowura." 
Numbers33:15 Ettimulaka oRefidimi, yaakonelasa munikareni na oSinayi." 
Numbers33:16 Ettimulaka munikareni na oSinayi, yaakonelasa oKiberoti-Hataava." 
Numbers33:17 Ettimulaka oKiberoti-Hataava, yaakonelasa oHazeroti." 
Numbers33:18 Ettimulaka oHazeroti, yaakonelasa oRitema." 
Numbers33:19 Ettimulaka oRitema, yaakonelasa oRimoni-Perezi." 
Numbers33:20 Ettimulaka oRimoni-Perezi, yakonelasa oLibena." 
Numbers33:21 Ettimulaka oLibena, yaakonelasa oRisa." 
Numbers33:22 Yaattimula oRisa, enakonelasa oKehelata." 
Numbers33:23 Ettimulaka oKehelata, yaakonela vamwaako Xeferi." 
Numbers33:24 Ettimulaka vamwaako Xeferi, yaakonela oHarada." 
Numbers33:25 Yaattimula oHarada, enakonela oMakeloti." 
Numbers33:26 Ettimulaka oMakeloti, yaakonela oTahati." 
Numbers33:27 Ettimulaka oTahati, yaakonela oTera." 
Numbers33:28 Ettimulaka oTera, yaakonela oMiteka." 
Numbers33:29 Ettimulaka oMiteka, yaakonela oHaxemona." 
Numbers33:30 Ettimulaka oHaxemona, yaakonela oMoseroti." 
Numbers33:31 Yaattimula oMoserote, enakonela oBene-Yaakani." 
Numbers33:32 Ettimulaka oBene-Yaakani, yaakonela oHori-Hagidegadi." 
Numbers33:33 Ettimulaka oHori-Hagidegadi, yaakonela oYotebata." 
Numbers33:34 Ettimulaka oYotebata, yaakonela wAberona." 
Numbers33:35 Ettimunleene wAberona, yaakonela wEziyoni-Geberi." 
Numbers33:36 Ettimulaka wEziyoni-Geberi, yaakonela oKadexi, munikareni na oSini." 
Numbers33:37 Yaattimula oKadexi, enakonela vamwaako Hori, mmwiinanoni wa wEdomi." 
Numbers33:38 Ti weiwo Aharoni aawenlaawe vamwaako Hori, attharihaka Nlamulo na Yave, anakhwelawo vanihukuni noopacera na mweeri wanaathanu wa eyaakha yanaamiloko mixexe aYixrayeli ekhumaleene wExipitu." 
Numbers33:39 Aharoni aakhwelaawe vamwaako Hori, aarino iyaakha ncira ni miloko miili ni tthaaru." 
Numbers33:40 Mwene muKanaani a wAradi, aakhala oNegeba, mulaponi ya oKanaani, aasuwela weera aYixrayeli yeera ephiyaka." 
Numbers33:41 Yaattimula vamwaako Hori, enakonela oZalemona." 
Numbers33:42 Ettimulaka oZalemona, yaakonela oPunoni." 
Numbers33:43 Ettimulaka oPunoni, yaakonela wOboti." 
Numbers33:44 Ettimulaka wOboti, yaakonela wIye-Abarimi, omwiinanoni ni oMowabe." 
Numbers33:45 Ettimulaka wIye-Abarimi, yaakonela oDiboni-Gadi." 
Numbers33:46 Yaattimula oDiboni-Gadi, enakonela wAlmoni-Diblatayimi." 
Numbers33:47 Ettimulaka wAlmoni-Diblatayimi, yaakonela mmanyaakoni sa wAbarimi, oluluwana ni oNebo." 
Numbers33:48 Ettimulaka mmanyaakoni sa wAbarimi, yaakonela munghawalawani wa oMowabe, muxerexere Yordanu, okhopela wa oYeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Munghawalawani wa oMowabe, awosa yaakonelasa muxerexere Yordanu okhuma oBeti-Yeximoti mpaka wAbeli-Xitimi." 
Numbers33:50 Munghawalawani wa oMowabe, muxerexere Yordanu, okhopela wa oYeriko, Yave aamweerela Moisesi:" 
Numbers33:51 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli weera, nyuwosa munlapungweene Yordanu weera mvolowe oKanaani," 
Numbers33:52 mwawoomole amaki ootheene a mulaponi. Mwaphwate icaambulo soopatthiwa sootheene ni miluku sootheene soohaniwa, ni mwaaphwate altaaraaya ootheene ari mmattumuxanimwaya." 
Numbers33:53 Mwakuxe elapo ni mwamakemo, niwoko Miyo kohoovahasani elapo weera ekhale yawinyu." 
Numbers33:54 Mwakawane elapo mumpakaka mwaathanle, muttharihaka mahimwaanyu. Wa nihimo noowaatta, mwavaheke yoohiyeriwa yoowaatta, ni wa nooyeva, mwavaheke yoohiyeriwa yooyeva. Khula nihimo naakheleke elapo mwa yeeyo nneeraaya nireereliwe. Mwakawaneke variyari wa ipuumba sa makholowaanyu." 
Numbers33:55 Wa soothesene, nyuwosa mwaahiwoomolasa amaki a mulaponi, yaawo muneeraanyu mwaatthunihere okhala, anoothatuwa nyiiwa mmaithonimwanyu ni mipuule mweerutthunimwanyu. Awosa animootannyerani milattu mulaponi mwa mwemmo muneeraanyu mwamakemo." 
Numbers33:56 Vano, Miyo kinimoopakelasani yeeyo kaatthunaaka waapakelasa." 
Numbers34:1 Yave aamweerelatho Mosesi: 
Numbers34:2 Mwaalamulele aYixrayeli ni mwaaleele: Mwaavolowasaka oKanaani, elapo muneeraanyu mureereliwe ntoko yoohiyeriwa, ekhalaneke nyiinano iya:" 
Numbers34:3 Mpatta wa ohitto opacereke munikareni na oSini muxerexere mwiinano wa wEdomi. Mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, mwiinanowaaya wa ohitto opacereke muxerexere Ephareiya ya Maakha," 
Numbers34:4 ovireke ohitto wa ekhato ya Walisi, opwaherereke mpaka oSini ni orowoke ohitto wa oKadexi-Bareneya. Vahoolowaya, ovireke mpaka oHazari-Adari ni orowoke mpaka wAzemoni," 
Numbers34:5 oneeraaya wakottoombe ni waphiye munxaapwani na wExipitu, okotelaka mphareiyani." 
Numbers34:6 Mwiinanowaanyu wa mpatta ninkela nsuwa okhaleke muxerexere Ephareiya Etokweene. Owo onuukhale mwiinano wa mpatta ninkela nsuwa. 
Numbers34:7 Vano mwiinano wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani okhaleke ha: mulepelele okhuma Ephareiya Etokweene mpaka mwaako Hori," 
Numbers34:8 ni wookhuma omwaako Hori mpaka oLebo-Hamati. Omakoteloni wa mwiinano okhaleke oZedadi," 
Numbers34:9 opwaherereke mpaka oZifroni ni okoteleke oHazari-Enani. Owo onuukhale mwiinanowaanyu wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani. 
Numbers34:10 Mwiinano wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa onuukhale ha: Mulepelele okhuma oHazari-Enani mpaka oXefami. 
Numbers34:11 Mwiinano okhumeke oXefami oroweke mpaka oRibela, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa wAyini, ni opwaherereke mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa muxerexere nyaako sa ephareiya ya oKinereti." 
Numbers34:12 Mwiinano okhuruweleke muxerexere Yordanu ni okoteleke mphareiyani ya Maakha. Eyo eniikhale elapwaanyu ni nyiinanosaya sa mipatta sootheene.” 
Numbers34:13 Moisesi aahaalamulela aYixrayeli ikano iya: “Ti yeela elapo muneeraanyu mwaakhele mooreereliwani. Muluku oolamula weera evahiwe wa ipuumba ithanniixexe ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe. 
Numbers34:14 Vano imusi sa epuumba ya Rubeni, Gadi ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe sohaakhela yoohiyeriwaaya." 
Numbers34:15 Ipuumba piili iya ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe sohaakhela yoohiyeriwaaya mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, muxerexere Yordanu okhopela wa oYeriko.”" 
Numbers34:16 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: 
Numbers34:17 “Masina a asilopwana eneera yookawelaseni elapo ntoko yoohiyeriwa ti ala: Musaserdoti* Eleyazari ni Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni." 
Numbers34:18 Munthanle muhooleli mmoha a khula epuumba weera ookhavihereni okawana elapo. 
Numbers34:19 Masinaaya ti ala: Kalebi, mwaana mulopwana a Yefune, a epuumba ya Yuda;" 
Numbers34:20 Xemuweli, mwaana mulopwana a Amihudi, a epuumba ya Simeyoni;" 
Numbers34:21 Elidadi, mwaana mulopwana a Kiseloni, a epuumba ya Benyamini;" 
Numbers34:22 Buki, mwaana mulopwana a Yogeli, muhooleli a epuumba ya Dani;" 
Numbers34:23 Haniyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Efodi, muhooleli a epuumba ya Manaxe, mwaana mulopwana a Yoseefe." 
Numbers34:24 Kemuweli, mwaana mulopwana a Xifitani, muhooleli a epuumba ya Efrayimi, mwaana mulopwana a Yoseefe;" 
Numbers34:25 Elisafani, mwaana mulopwana a Parnakhi, muhooleli a epuumba ya Zebuloni;" 
Numbers34:26 Palitiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Azani, muhooleli a epuumba ya Isakari;" 
Numbers34:27 Ahihudi, mwaana mulopwana a Xelomi, muhooleli a epuumba ya Axeri;" 
Numbers34:28 Pedaheli, mwaana mulopwana a Amihudi, muhooleli a epuumba ya Nafitali." 
Numbers34:29 Yaari ti yaalasa Muluku aalamulenlaawe weera yaakaweleke aYixrayeli elapo ya oKanaani. 
Numbers35:1 Yave aamweerela Moisesi munghawalawani wa oMowabe, muxerexere mooloko Yordanu, okhopela wa oYeriko:" 
Numbers35:2 “Mwaalamulele aYixrayeli weera yaavahe aLeevi isidade wa elapo akuxalaaya, weera aLeevi ekhalemo. Yaavahetho moocihamo muxerexere isidade." 
Numbers35:3 Hiiho, awosa anookhalano isidade soomaka ni moocihamo imombesaya, ikhondoolosaya ni mihuwo sikinatho." 
Numbers35:4 Moocihamo wa muxerexere wa isidade muneeraanyu mwaavahe aLeevi sikhumeke muxirini sirowaka imeetru* macira maxexe ni miloko mithanu, wookela oxerexere." 
Numbers35:5 Mpatta wa okhwipi wa esidade, mwaringe imeetru* macira mathannamaxexe wookela mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, mpatta wa ohitto, mpatta ninkela nsuwa ni mpatta wa ottuttuwani, esidade ereene eriyariru. Awosa ekhalaneke ettima eyo ntoko moocihamwaya mwa isidade." 
Numbers35:6 Isidade ithannamosa sa seiyo muneeranyu mwaavahe aLeevi nsikhale isidade sootthawela, aneeraawe atthaweleke yoowo anaamwiive mutthu. Ohiya isidadesene seiyo, mwaavahase isidade miloko mixexe ni piili sikina." 
Numbers35:7 Wa sootheene iyo, nyuwosa mwaavaheke aLeevi isidade miloko mixexe niithannatthaaru, vamoha ni moocihamwaya." 
Numbers35:8 Isidade muneeraanyu mwaavahe aLeevi, ilapo sa aYixrayeli, sootheene iyo mutthariheke waatta wa yoohiyeriwa ya khula epuumba; mukuxeke isidade sincipale sa epuumba erino isidade sincipale, vaheera vakhaani wa yeeyo erino vakhaani." 
Numbers35:9 Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi: 
Numbers35:10 Mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Nyuwosa munlapungweene Yordanu, munavolowasa oKanaani," 
Numbers35:11 mwathanle isidade sikina sikina, weera sikhale isidadesanyu sootthawela aneeraawe atthawelekemo mukina omwiivale mutthu mweerisani." 
Numbers35:12 Isidade iyo nsikhale isidade sootthawela mwaha wa nakukuttula ohononeliwe, weera mukina ootheriwe wiiva, ahikhwe ahinaaye wiixoonihera onthoriheloni ohoolo wa muloko." 
Numbers35:13 Isidade ithannamosa muneeraanyu muthanle nsikhale isidadesanyu sootthawela. 
Numbers35:14 Muthanleke isidade tthaaru mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa oYordanu, ni tthaaru sikina iyo, mulaponi ya oKanaani. Iyo nsikhale isidade sootthawela." 
Numbers35:15 Ekhalaka aYixrayeli mpaka anamarwa amankemo hoye hoye anamavira a eriyaraaya, isidade iyo nsikhale isidade sootthawela. Mwemmo etthawelekemo ootheene eniimwiive mutthu mweerisani." 
Numbers35:16 Mutthu amvulaliha mukina ni etthu ya eyuuma mpaka mutthu owo okhwa, owo namwiiva; vano namwiiva owo ontthuneya wiiviwa." 
Numbers35:17 Hoye hoye mukina ammana mutthu ni nluku, anamwiivela, hoye hoye anamvulaliha mutthu mpaka owo okhwa, ti namwiiva; vano namwiiva owo ontthuneya okhwa." 
Numbers35:18 Vano mukina ammana mutthu ni etthaabwa, anamwiivela, hoye hoye anamvulaliha mutthu mpaka owo okhwa, ti namwiiva; vano namwiiva owo ontthuneya wiiviwa." 
Numbers35:19 Nakukuttula ohononeliwe onoomwiiva namwiiva; aani aamphwanyaka onoomwiiva. 
Numbers35:20 Mukina amukakha mukhwaawe hoye hoye amvonya etthu ekina mwayiini mpaka mutthu owo okhwa," 
Numbers35:21 hata ammana ni ecipakhira mooxililini, anamwiiva, owo ontthuneya wiiviwa; ti namwiiva. Nakukuttula ohononeliwe amphwanya, onoomwiiva." 
Numbers35:22 Wa soothesene, mukina ahiittanne amukakha mutthu hoye hoye amvonya etthu aheerelaka ompakela yoonanara," 
Numbers35:23 hoye hoye ahimoonne, ammoroxela nluku ningwera omwiiva ni owo akhwa, vano eenre ahikhalaka mwiitthanaawe ni ahaatthuna omvulaliha," 
Numbers35:24 muloko othoriheke eriyaraawe ni nakukuttula ohononeliwe, ettharihiweke malamulo ala:" 
Numbers35:25 Muloko omukhapeleleke namootheriwa omwiivale nakukuttula ohononeliwe ni amuhokoloxeke osidade otthawenlaawe amuronghaka otthangwaawewo. Iwo akhalekewo mpaka okhwa wa mutokweene a asaserdoti* ottikittheliwe ni makhura ootteela. 
Numbers35:26 Wa soothesene, namootheriwa atupha mwiinano wa esidade yootthawela wa weiwo otthangwaawewo," 
Numbers35:27 ni nakukuttula ohononeliwe amphwanya okhwipi wa esidade, owo amwiiveke namootheriwa ni khankhalano nthowa na wiiva." 
Numbers35:28 Namootheriwa apwaherereke musidadenimwawe yootthawelawo mpaka okhwa wa mutokweene a asaserdoti*; owo ahokoloweke paahi akhwiiyeene mutokweene a asaserdoti*, arowaka elapwaawe." 
Numbers35:29 Soonyesereriha iya sikhaleke sa nyuwo ni wa ikhapirasanyu sa muhoolo, yakhalaru elapo muneeraanyu mmake." 
Numbers35:30 Mwaha wa wiiva, namwiiva athoriheliweke okhwa yakhalela anamoona ancipale; namoona mmoha paahi khoongwereya omuthorihela okhwa mutthu." 
Numbers35:31 Muhaakhulele woopoliwa okumi wa namwiiva; owo oophwanela okhwa. Woohihovela ontthuneya wiiviwa. 
Numbers35:32 Ohaakhuleliweketho woopoliwa wa mutthu otthawenle esidade yootthawela weera ahokoleele elapwaawe, ahinaaye okhwa mutokweene a asaserdoti*." 
Numbers35:33 Muhivalihe elapo nyuwosa munkhalaanyu. Oyeeha ephome onghiiriha elapo, ni oreherereliweke wiiwanana ni Yave paahi yeereliwaka elapo eyeeheriwaayawo ephome mwa yeeyo namwiiva oyeenghaawe." 
Numbers35:34 Muhivalihe elapo munkhalaanyu ni kinkhalaakawo Miyo, niwoko Miyo, Yave, kinkhala eriyari ya aYixrayeli." 
Numbers36:1 Mapwattapwattha a imusi sa nihimo na Gileyade, mwaana mulopwana a Makiri, osuulu wa Manaxe, yaari a mahimo a ikhapira sa Yoseefe, yaarowa wuuluma ni Moisesi, ahooleli ni mapwattapwattha a imusi sa aYixrayeli." 
Numbers36:2 Yaamweerela Moisesi: “Yave aalamulenlaawe apwiyaaka weera, mooreereliwani, yaavahe elapo ntoko yoohiyeriwa aYixrayeli, yaalamulelatho weera nyuwosa mwaavahe yoohiyeriwa ya munnihu Zelofehadi anamwanaawe asithiyana." 
Numbers36:3 Vaheera awosa yathelana ni mukina a epuumba ekina ya aYixrayeli, yoohiyeriwaaya enoosusihiwa wa yoohiyeriwa ya makholowaahu, ni enimwaandyeereriwa yoohiyeriwa ya epuumbaahu mwa yeeyo awosa atheliwaaya. Ni mpatta wa yoohiyeriwa nreereliwaahu hiyo onoovenxiwa." 
Numbers36:4 Yaaphiyeraka eyaakha ya otthapa wa aYixrayeli, yoohiyeriwaaya yaandyeereriweke wa epuumba eneeraaya ethelaneno, ni yoohiyeriwaayasa enoovenxiwa mwa yoohiyeriwa ya makholowaahu.”" 
Numbers36:5 Vano Moisesi axuttihiweene ni Yave, aahaalamulela aYixrayeli moota ola: “Epuumba ya ekhapira ya Yoseefe yoohima nnene." 
Numbers36:6 Olamulenlaawe Yave mwaha wa anamwane asithiyana a Zelofehadi ti ela: Awosa ethelanaseke ni akhalaru mulopwana anaasivele yaalikelelaka othelana ni munihimoni mwa epuumba ya atithaya. 
Numbers36:7 Ehikhaleru yoohiyeriwa oYixrayeli eniikhume mpuumbanimwaya erowaka mpuumbani ekina, niwoko aYixrayeli ootheene eniipwaherere mulaponi sa ipuumba sineera sihiyeriwe yoohiyeriwa ni makholowaaya." 
Numbers36:8 Akhalaru mwaana muthiyana anaakhaleno yoohiyeriwa ya elapo ya yakhalaru epuumba ya aYixrayeli, ethelaneke ni mukina a nihimo na epuumba ya atithawe weera khula muYixrayeli akhaleno yoohiyeriwa ya makholowaawe." 
Numbers36:9 Ehikhaleru yoohiyeriwa eniikhume mpuumbanimwaya erowaka mpuumbani ekina, niwoko khula epuumba ya aYixrayeli entthuneya opwaherera okhalano elapo ehiyeriwaaya." 
Numbers36:10 Anamwane asithiyana aZelofehadi, yaapaka ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Numbers36:11 Anamwane asithiyana a Zelofehadi – Mahela, Tireza, Hogela, Milka ni Nowa, yaathelanasa ni axirokoraya a wuutiithini ooyariwa ni axunnaya atithaya;" 
Numbers36:12 mmahimoni a ikhapira sa Manaxe, mwaana mulopwana a Yoseefe ni yoohiyeriwaayasa yaapwaherera munihimoni ni mpuumbani mwa atithaya." 
Numbers36:13 Ti yaala malamulo ni sooruma Yave aavanghaawe aYixrayeli mwa Moisesi, munghawalawani wa oMowabe, muxerexere Yordanu, okhopela wa oYeriko." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Ala ti masu Moisesi aaleenlaawe aYixrayeli ootheene munikareni mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa oYordanu, eyo tiiyo wAraba – ohoolo wa oSufi, eriyari ya oParani ni oTofeli, oLabani, oHazeroti ni oDizahabi." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Vano ophiya oKadexi-Bareneya okhuma oHorebi ni musewe wa mwaako Seyiri ammala mahuku muloko ni nimoha. 
Deuteronomy1:3 Vayaakhani miloko mixexe, vanihukuni noopacera na mweeri wanaamuloko nimmoha, Moisesi aahaalaleera aYixrayeli malamulo ootheene Yave aamulamulenlaawe mwaha wa yaale." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Eyo yeereiye angwinneene Sihoni, mwene a awAmori aalamula oHexeboni, ni wEdereyi aangwinneene Ogi, mwene a oBaxani aalamula wAsterote." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Moisesi aapacera othalihera malamulo mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, mweelaponi ya oMowabe, eeraka:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 Yave Mulukwaahu aaneerela oHorebi: “Nyuwosa moolekela mwaakweene yoola. 
Deuteronomy1:7 Muteexase iheemasanyu, murowe wa elapo ya mmanyaakoni sa awAmori; murowaka miloko soowaattamana sootheene wAraba, wa vathi wa nyaako, wa oNegeba ni wa mukerekhere ephareiya, elapo ya aKanaani ni oLibanu, mpaka mooloko mutokokweene Efratesi." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Moone, kohoovahani elapo eyo. Mwavolowe ni mwakuxe elapo Yave aaroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo waavaha makholowaanyu Abrahaamu, Isaki Yakobe ni ekhapiraaya.”" 
Deuteronomy1:9 Ehuhuweene yeele miyo kaaweerelasani: “Nkingwera woohoolelani meekhaaka. 
Deuteronomy1:10 Yave Mulukwaanyu oowaandyeererasani moota wooweera olelo khamureere ntoko ithenyeeri sa wiirimu. 
Deuteronomy1:11 Yave Muluku a makholowaanyu awaandyeereraseni imaara imaarasene ooreelihaseni ntoko oororomelinghaaweni! 
Deuteronomy1:12 Wa sootheesene nkingwera ohoolela meekhaaka sookacamihasanyu, soolemelasanyu ni milattusanyu." 
Deuteronomy1:13 Vanonto, mwaathanle asilopwana a miruku, oosuwela ni akhoveleli a khula nihimo na ipuumbasanyu ni miyo kinimwaakhaliha asitokweenaanyu.”" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Nyuwosa okaakhula mweenre weera ti wooreera otthara yoohimaanyu. 
Deuteronomy1:15 Hiiho kaahaathukumanyiha mapwattapwattha a ipuumba ari a miruku ni akhoveleli, kinaakhaliha asitokweene a macira muloko, a ncira, a miloko mithanu ni akina a muloko waahiya ahooleli a khula epuumba." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Ehuhuweene yeele kaahaalamulela aphukaanyu: “Mwaakhule sookacamiha sa axunninyu muthorihaka ni ekhaikhai – khoohiyono emusaanyuru, menetho muYixrayeli ni namarwa." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Muhithorihe ni nthalu, mene mmwaakhulele okhuma mutokweene mpaka mukhaani. Muhimoove akhalaru mutthu, niwoko othoriha ti wa Muluku. Yakhala makacamiho oowoorikaxani, mukiruuhele. Kinooreherera.”" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Ehuhuweene yeele kaahooleelani sootheene saatthuneya opaka. 
Deuteronomy1:19 Vahoolowaya, ntoko Yave Mulukwaahu aanilamulenlaawe, hiyo naattimula oHorebi, ninarowa wa elapo ya mmanyaakoni sa awAmori niviraka munikareni ntokotoko ni noowoopiha nne nyuwosa moonnaanyu, ninaphiya oKadexi-Bareneya." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Vano kaaweerelasani: “Moophiya mweelaponi ya mmanyaakoni sa awAmori Yave Mulukwaahu onnivaahaawe. 
Deuteronomy1:21 Moone, Yave Mulukwaanyu ohiikaati elapo ela ohoolowanyu. Murowe, mwakuxe, ntoko Yave, Muluku a makholowaanyu oweerenlaaweni. Muhoove hata muhiporore.”" 
Deuteronomy1:22 Ootheene nyuwosa mwaakaattamela mweeraka: “Munirumihele asilopwana akina ohoolowahu weera yahottele elapo ni enileele ephiro heeni nneeraahu nivire ni isidade heeni nneeraahu nirowe. 
Deuteronomy1:23 Yoohimaanyu yaakireera, tivawo kaathanlalaaka asilopwana muloko neeli, mmoha a khula epuumba." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Awosa yaawelela mweelaponi ya mmanyaakoni, enaphiya oreyareyani na wEskoli, enahottelawo." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Ekuxaka soowiima sikina sa elapo ele, yaanithalihera: ‘Elapo eyo Yave Mulukwaahu onnivahaawe ti yooreera.’”" 
Deuteronomy1:26 Wa soothesene, khamwaatthunne orowa, muhiiwelelaka Nlamulo na Yave Mulukwaanyu." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Mwaattaandawula mmahemanimwanyu mweeraka: “Yave onnanithanya, tivawo aanikhumihalaawe wExipitu weera aninnyerere mmatatani mwa awAmori weera niphwatiwe." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Nnikele woowi? Axunnihu aanipororiha yeerakaru: ‘Atthu a weiwo ti oolipaxa ni oorakamaxa oonipwaha hiyo. Isidadesaya ti sitokotoko sikhalanaka ixiri soorakamela osulu. Noowoonawotho awAnaki.’” 
Deuteronomy1:29 Vano miyo kaaweerelasani: “Muhituthuwe, muhiwoove." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Yave Mulukwaanyu onrowa ohoolowanyu onimoowanelasani nyuwo moonaka ntoko aapankaawe wExipitu. 
Deuteronomy1:31 Munikareni mwaahoonatho moota Yave Mulukwaanyu ookuxansaaweni mphironi moothemwene mviravinraanyu mpaka nipuro nna, ntoko tiithi onimkuxaawe mwanawe.”" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Wa soothesene, khamunroromenle Yave Mulukwaanyu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 mwa Yoowo oohoolenleni ohoolowanyu, ohiyu munrimbuni na mooro ni othana munihutteni awaasaaserakani mapuro ookonela ni awooniherakani ephiro yookuxera." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Yave iiwakaru yeeyo mweenraanyu, aanyoonyiwa, anaroromeliha ni nlipelo:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 “Khaawo a ekhapira yoonanara ela anoone elapo yooreera kaaroromelinghaaka waavaha makholowaanyu," 
Deuteronomy1:36 ahikhanle Kalebi, mwaana mulopwana a Yefune. Owo aneera oone ni Miyo kinoomvaha owo ni ekhapiraawe elapo yoowo ovinraawe, niwoko aamutthara Yave ni murimaawe wootheene.”" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Yave aakinyoonyeriwa miyotho niwoko na nyuwo, akeerelaka: “Nyuwotho khamuvolowawo." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Wa soothesene, namakhaviheraanyu, Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, ti anaavolowe. Munlipihere, niwoko ti yoowo anaahoolele muloko wa aYixrayeli weera okuxe elapo eyo." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Vanonto, anamwaniinyu asikhaani, mwa yaale mwaaweerenlaanyu weera anrowa okuxiwa ntoko ipottha sa okhottoni, eyo tiiyo anamwaniinyu ahisuwenle yooreera ni yoonanara, ti eniivolowemo. Kinimwaavaha elapo eyo ni awo eniikuxe." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Wa soothesene, wa nyuwo, murukunuwe ni muroweke munikareni mutthareke ephiro enkela Ephareiya Yooxeera.”" 
Deuteronomy1:41 Vahoolowaya mwaahaakhula: “Noomutthekela Yave. Hiyo nnirowe ni nniwane ntoko Yave Mulukwaahu onilamulenlaawe.” Hiiho nyuwo ootheene mwaakuxa ikapwitthisanyu muupuwelaka weera onookhweya owelela elapo ya mmanyaakoni. 
Deuteronomy1:42 Wa soothesene, Yave aakeerela: “Mwaaleele weera ewelelase hata ehiwaneru, niwoko nkinkhala ni yaawosa. Anoowiniwa ni amwiittanaaya.”" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Vano miyo kaahooleelasani yeeyo, mene khamwaakiiwelenle. Khamwiiwelenle Nlamulo na Yave ni ngwiixoonanimwanyu mwaawelela elapo ya mmanyaakoni." 
Deuteronomy1:44 awAmori yaakhala weiwo yaahoowananani ni yahoottharelelasani ntoko muupattetthe yoowinakani okhuma oSeyiri mpaka oHorema. 
Deuteronomy1:45 Mwaahokolowasa muniinla vamaithoni wa Yave, mene Owo khiiwale wiikhupanyerawanyu hata khoopwatthanseni." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Vahoolowaya mwaakhala oKadexi mwaalekelanxaanyuwo. 
Deuteronomy2:1 Vahoolowaya naahokoleela ottuli, nnarowa onikareni nikuxeraka ephiro enkela Ephareiya Yooxeera, ntoko Yave aakilamulenlaawe. Naaheetta iyaakha sincipale niviraviraka elapo ya mmanyaakoni sa oSeyiri." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Vano Yave aakeerela: 
Deuteronomy2:3 “Nyuwosa khamureere weettasa mviravirasaka elapo ya mmanyaakoni iya. Vano, murowaseke mpatta wa ottuttuwani." 
Deuteronomy2:4 Muleele muloko: ‘Nyuwosa munoovira mweelaponi ya axunninyu, ekhapira ya Esawu ankhala oSeyiri. Awosa eniyeereke owoovasani, mene mwiipasoope nnenesene." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Muhaatannyase, niwoko nkoovahasaniru mpatta wa elapwaaya, hata vakhaani. Koomvaha Esawu okuxa elapo ya mmanyaakoni sa oSeyiri." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Nyuwosa mwalivase ni eparatha* wa yooca muneeraanyu mwace ni maahi muneeraanyu mwawure.’” 
Deuteronomy2:7 Yave Mulukwaanyu ohooreelihasani mmitekonimwanyu sootheene. Owo aahookosoopani mmukwahanimwanyu munikareni ntokweene nna. Iyaakha miloko mixexe iye Yave Mulukwaanyu aari ni nyuwo ehoohaleelakani etthu. 
Deuteronomy2:8 Hiiho naavira elapo ya axunnihu, ekhapira ya Esawu yaakhala oSeyiri. Vahoolowaya naavira wookela wa wAraba, wElati ni wEzeyoni-Geberi. Naahokolowa nikottoombelaka wookela nikare na oMowabe." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Vano Yave aakeerela: “Muhaaxupe aMowabe naari muhaatannyere ekhotto, niwoko nkoovahasani mpatta wa elapwaayasa. Elapo ya wAri kohinnyerera ekhapira ya Loti.”" 
Deuteronomy2:10 Khalayi awEmiti ti yaakhalawo; waari muloko woolipaxa, woowaatta ni woorakamaxa ntoko awAnaki." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Awosa yiitthaniwa aRefayimi, hiiho ntoko awAnaki, mene aMowabe yaawiitthana awEmiti." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Khalayeenetho aGori yaakhala oSeyiri, mene ekhapira ya Esawu yaawoomolawo. Yaahaaphwata aGori, eniitekihasa mmapuronimwaya, ntoko aYixrayeli yaapankaaya mweelaponi Yave aavanghaawe." 
Deuteronomy2:13 Yave aaheera: “Mvenyase ni mulapuwase nreyareya na oZeredi.” Hiiho naalapuwa nreyareya nne. 
Deuteronomy2:14 Nivennyeene oKadexi-Bareneya saavira iyaakha miloko miraru niithannatthaaru mpaka olapuwa nreyareya na oZeredi. Mweehuhuweene yeele ekhapira yootheene ya anakhotto ti eriheiyaaya variyari wa waakonelingwe, ntoko Yave aaroromelinghaawe." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Yave aahaattaruxa ni ommaleloniwaya aahaatoloxa ootheene variyari wa waakonelingwe. 
Deuteronomy2:16 Ekhwiiyeene anakhotto ootheene a muloko," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Yave aakeerela: 
Deuteronomy2:18 “Olelo munoovira mweelaponi ya oMowabe wAri. 
Deuteronomy2:19 Mwaakhuveelaka awAmoni, muhaaxupe naari muhaatannyere ekhotto, niwoko nkoovahasaniru mpatta wa elapwaaya keenre kivahaka ekhapira ya Loti.”" 
Deuteronomy2:20 Elapo ele yiitthaniwatho elapo ya aRefayimi yaakhalaayawo khalayi. Wa soothesene, awAmoni yaawiitthana aZamezumi." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Waari muloko woolipaxa, woowaatta ni woorakamaxa ntoko awAnaki. Yave aahaaphwata ohoolo wa awAmoni mwa yaawo yaawoomonle, eniitekiha mmapuronimwaya." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Yave aapaka mooteene yoowo eerelaka ekhapira ya Esawu yaakhala oSeyiri aaphwantaawe aGori ohoolowaya. Ekhapira ya Esawu yaawoomola, eniitekiha mmapuronimwaya mpaka olelo." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Ti yeeyo yaakhumelenletho awAwi yaakhala mmittettheni soowaattamela oGaza. aKaftori erweelaka oKaftori yaahaaphwata, eniitekiha mmapuronimwaya." 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Murowe ni mwalapuwe nreyareya na wArenoni. Moone, koowinnyererani Sihoni, ngwAmori, mwene a oHexeboni, mmatatanimwanyu vamoha ni elapwaawe. Mpacere waakamela elapo ele mwaawananaka." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Olelo vaava kinoopacera woopopiha moovasiwaka nyuwo mmilokoni sootheene sa elapo ya vathi. Iyo siiwaru epilaanyu nsithukumelase ni othanana.” 
Deuteronomy2:26 Onikareni na oKedemoti kaamurumihela anamitthenga Sihoni, mwene a oHexeboni, kimurumihelaka murettele keeraka:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 “Munihiye nivire elapwaanyu. Nnivire ni musewe paahi, nihihapuwelakaru mpatta mukina." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Munithumihere yooca weera nice ni maahi weera niwure. Nnooliva. Munihiye niviraka paahi vathi," 
Deuteronomy2:29 ntoko yaanitthunihenraaya ekhapira ya Esawu enkhala oSeyiri ni aMowabe ankhala wAri. Hiyo nintthuna omulapuwa Yordanu weera navolowe elapo Yave Mulukwaahu onnivahaawe.” 
Deuteronomy2:30 Wa soothesene, Sihoni, mwene a oHexeboni, aakhootta oniviriha. Yave Mulukwaanyu aamuttiihamaaru amuumihaka murimaawe weera amwinnyerere mmatatanimwanyu ntoko onooneyaaya olelo." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Yave aakeerela: “Moone, kingwinnyererani nyuwo Sihoni ni elapwaawe. Vano mpacere waakamela mukuxaka elapo.”" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Sihoni ni anakhottwaawe ootheene aahoorwa oniwanano oYahazi. 
Deuteronomy2:33 Yave Mulukwaahu ooninnyerera mmatatanimwahu ni naamwiiva vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni anakhottwaawe ootheene. 
Deuteronomy2:34 Ehuhuweene yeele naakuxa isidadesawe sootheene, ninamaliha ophwata, niwiivasaka alopwana, athiyana ni anamwane. Khanaamuhiyaleru mutthu." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Naahalanne paahi asinama ni soohuhula sa isidade soowiniwa. 
Deuteronomy2:36 Naawina okhuma wAroweri munxaapwani na wArenoni ni esidade eri nreyareya nimoharu nenno mpaka oGiliyade. Khayaariwo esidade nooceelaahu. Yave Mulukwaahu ooninnyerera sootheene. 
Deuteronomy2:37 Wa soothesene, mwaasemba elapo yootheene ya awAmoni, elapo ya mukerekhere mooloko Yaboke nitho isidade sa mmanyaakoni, ntoko Yave Mulukwaahu aanilamulenlaawe." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Vahoolowaya naahokolowa nikuxeraka musewe onkela oBaxani ni Ogi, mwene a oBaxani, vamoha ni anakhottwaawe ootheene yaanirweela weera eniwaneno wEdereyi." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Yave aakeerela: “Muhimoove, niwoko koomwinnyerera mmatatanimwanyu ni anakhottwaawe ootheene nitho elapwaawe. Mumpakele yeeyo mwaampakenlaanyu Sihoni, mwene a awAmori, aalamula oHexiboni.”" 
Deuteronomy3:3 Hiiho Yave Mulukwaahu aaninnyereratho mmatatanimwahu Ogi, mwene a oBaxani ni anakhottwaawe ootheene. Hiyo naawiiva nihimuhiyakaru mutthu." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Ehuhuweene yeele naakuxa isidadesawe sootheene. Aani naakuxa isidade miloko mithannamosa sootheene sa elapo yootheene ya wAregobi, omwene wa Ogi oBaxani." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Isidade iye sootheene saalipiheriwa ni ixiri soorakama ni masele ni anampattika. Ohiya seiye saakhala mittetthe sincipale sikina sahaarino ixiri. 
Deuteronomy3:6 Hiyo naamaliha ophwata ntoko naampakenlaahu Sihoni, mwene a oHexiboni, niphwataka isidade sootheene niwiivakatho alopwana, athiyana ni anamwane ootheene." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Wa soothesene, naakuxa mihuwosaya ni soohuhula sa isidade ntoko soowaakha okhottoni." 
Deuteronomy3:8 Ti hiiho naakuxalaahu ehuhuweene yeele ilapo sa mamwene meeli a awAmori mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa oYordanu, ekhumme vareyareyani na wArenoni mpaka mwaako wa oHeremoni." 
Deuteronomy3:9 Vano aZidoni yiitthana Heremoni “Siriyoni” ni awAmori yiitthana “Seniri.” 
Deuteronomy3:10 Naakuxa isidade sootheene sa muttuttuwani, sa oGiliyade, sa oBaxani mpaka oSaleka ni wEdereyi siri isidade piili sa omwene wa Ogi oBaxani." 
Deuteronomy3:11 Vanonto Ogi, mwene a oBaxani, aahanle yooworu ni okumi variyari wa aRefayimi. Ekaamaawe yaari ya eyuuma yaakhalano miringo iya: imeetru* ixexe mweerakameloni ni emeetru* emoha ni wookwanaka imeetru* piili mweekhuveeloni. Eyo nlelo eri oRabati wa awAmoni." 
Deuteronomy3:12 Sa ilapo naakuxalaahu kaahaavaha aRubeni ni aGadi elapo mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa wAroweri, mukerekhere mooloko wArenoni vamoha ni eriyari ya elapo ya mmanyaakoni sa oGiliyade ni mittetthesaya." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Kaavaha eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe seiye saahanle sa oGiliyade ni oBaxani wootheene, omwene wa Ogi. Elapo yootheene ya wAregobi oBaxani khalayi yaasuweliwe ntoko elapo ya aRefayimi." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Yahiri, mmoha a ekhapira ya Manaxe, aakuxa elapo yootheene ya wAregobi mpaka omwiinanoni wa aGexuri ni aMahaakati. Elapo ele yaattehiwa nsinanaya moota wooweera mpaka olelo oBaxani oniitthaniwa Hawoti Yahiri." 
Deuteronomy3:15 Kaamvaha Makiri elapo ya oGiliyade. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Kaahaavaha aRubeni ni aGadi elapo ekhumme oGiliyade mpaka nreyareya na wArenoni, mwiinano waavira eriyariru wa nreyareya, ni okhuma vaavaale mpaka mooloko Yaboke ori mwiinano ni awAmoni." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Mwiinaanowaaya wa mpatta ninkela nsuwa waari Yordanu wAraba okhuma oKinereti mpaka Ephareiya ya wAraba (eyo tiiyo Ephareiya ya Maakha), mukerekhere mwaako oPisega." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Ehuhuweene yeele kaahoolamulelasani ha: “Yave Mulukwaanyu ohoovahasani elapo ela weera mukuxe. Anakhottwaanyu ootheene oolikaneene owana elapuweleke ohoolo wa axunninyu aYixrayeli. 
Deuteronomy3:19 Axaarinyu, anamwaniinyu, mihuwosanyu sincipale kisuwenlaaka weera ti sawinyu muhiyeke mmasidadeni koovanghaakani" 
Deuteronomy3:20 mpaka Yave aneeraawe awiitthuuwihase axunninyu ntoko koopakenlaakani ni mpaka awosa eneeraaya ekuxetho elapo Yave Mulukwaanyu onaavahasaawe, okhopela Yordanu. Vahoolowaya khula mutthu a nyuwo ahokoleeleke nipuro kimvanghaaka.”" 
Deuteronomy3:21 Ehuhuweene yeele kaamulamulelatho Yoxuwa: “Mohoona ni maithwaanyu yeeyo Yave Mulukwaanyu aapakenlaawe mamwene meeli ale. Yave onoopakela mooteene yoowo omwene wootheene muneeraanyu mvirase. 
Deuteronomy3:22 Muhiwoovase, Yave Mulukwaanyu onoowanelasani nyuwo.”" 
Deuteronomy3:23 Ehuhuweene yeele kaamudyoonttelela Yave: 
Deuteronomy3:24 “Ii! Adonai Yave, moopacera omoonihera murumeiyaanyu ovuwawanyu ni ntatananyu nooweraxa. Khawowo muluku mukina wiirimu naari elapo ya vathi ongwera opaka mitekosanyu ni sootikhiniha mumpakaanyu." 
Deuteronomy3:25 Mukihiye kilapuwele okhopela Yordanu weera koone elapo yooreera, elapo yooreera ya mmanyaakoni ni oLibanu.’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 Wa soothesene, Yave aakinyoonyeriwa ahikiiwelelaka. Yave aaheera: “Waatta! Muhikileeletho seiyo." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Mwangweleke mwaako Pisega mpaka vatthomelani ni mwawehe mipatta sootheene. Moone elapo ni maithwaanyu, niwoko nyuwo khamunlapuwa Yordanu." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Vanonto, mwamulamulele Yoxuwa, mwamulipihaxe murimaawe, niwoko ti yoowo anaahoolele muloko ola mpaka okhopela ni anaawerihe waakhela elapo nyuwo muneeraanyu mweere woona paahi.”" 
Deuteronomy3:29 Hiiho naakilaathi vareyareyani ohoolo wa oBeti-Peyori. 
Deuteronomy4:1 Vano mwiiwe aYixrayeli ikano ni malamulo kineeraaka kooxuttiheni. Mwiiwelele yaawo weera mukhale ni okumi ni mwakuxe elapo Yave Muluku a makholowaanyu onoovahaaweni. 
Deuteronomy4:2 Muhaandyeerere malamulo makina naari muhivukule malamulowaaka, mene mwiiwelele malamulo a Yave Mulukwaanyu mwa yaawo kinoolamulelaakani." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Mwaahoona ni maithwaanyu yeeyo Yave aapankaawe oBahali-Peyori. Yave Mulukwaanyu aahaaphwata ootheene yaamutthara Bahali-Peyori. 
Deuteronomy4:4 Vaheera ootheene nyuwo mpwaherenre munroromelaka Yave Mulukwaanyu olelo muri ni okumi. 
Deuteronomy4:5 Moone, kohooxuttihani ikano ni malamulo ntoko aakilamulenlaawe Yave Mulukwaaka weera mwiiwelele yaawo mweelaponi muneeraanyu mvolowe weera mwakuxase." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Mwiiwelele nnenesene niwoko eyo enimoonihera miloko sikina mirukusanyu ni osuwelawanyu. Iyo siiwaru ikano sootheene iyo, nseere: “Vekhaikhai muloko ola mutokotoko ti musuweli ni wa miruku.”" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Khoowowo muloko mutokotoko mukina, Mulukwaaya owaattamenle ntoko Yave Mulukwaahu oraawe vakhiviruwahu hiyo nnimvekelaahu." 
Deuteronomy4:8 Khoowowo muloko mutokotoko mukina orino ikano ni malamulo ooreera, ntoko malamulo ala kinoovahasakani olelo." 
Deuteronomy4:9 Mwiipasoope nnenesene weera muhittiwale itthu maithwaanyu yoonnaaya. Muupuwelele seiye mahuku ootheene a okumaanyu. Mwaathaliherase anamwaniinyu ni anamwanaaya. 
Deuteronomy4:10 Muupuwelele nihuku mwaaraanyu ohoolo wa Yave Mulukwaanyu oHorebi, Owo aakeerenlaawe: “Muthukumanyihe muloko ohoolowaka weera wiiwe maswaaka ni oxuttere okittittimiha mahuku ootheene onkhalaaya mweelaponi, waaxuttihakatho anamwanaaya.”" 
Deuteronomy4:11 Nyuwosa mwaahaattamela, munakhalasa mukerekhere mwaako, owo ovarelaka munihutteni nooriipa okhuneelaka mwaako ni epiphi." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Vano Yave aahuuluma ni nyuwo mmooroni. Mwaahiiwa masu, mene kheewo moonnaanyu – mwiiwa masuru." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Aahooxuttihasani wiiraanawawe eyo tiiyo Malamulo Muloko. Aalepa vatthaabwani piili sa maluku, anoolamulelasani weettela." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Ehuhuweene yeele Yave aakilamulela wooxuttihasani ikano ni malamulo weera nyuwosa mweettele mweelaponi munrowaanyu okuxa. 
Deuteronomy4:15 Nihuku Yave uulummaawe ni nyuwo mmooroni oHorebi, kheewo moonnaanyu. Tivawo, mwiipasoope nnenesene," 
Deuteronomy4:16 weera muhiinanarihe mwiipakelaka muluku mukina a yakhalaru ecaambulo yoolikana mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana," 
Deuteronomy4:17 naari akhalaru mwaamunama a mulaponi hata mwaapalame omvavawo," 
Deuteronomy4:18 hoye hoye yakhalaru yoopattuxiwa eniipurula, naari yakhalaru ehopa mmaahini oowiixera." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Nyuwosa mwaweha osulu moonaka nsuwa, mweeri ni ithenyeeri ni itthu sootheene sa wiirimu, muhihapuwe mukokhorelaka seiyo ni mulapaka itthu Yave Mulukwaanyu okawenlaawe miluku sootheene sa elapo ya vathi." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Wa nyuwo, Yave aahookuxani, ookhumihakani muttukutthani enghaniwa eyuuma, eyo tiiyo wExipitu, weera mukhalase muloko wa yoohiyeraawe, ntoko onooneyaaya olelo." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Yave aakinyoonyeriwa niwoko na nyuwo. Owo aalipela weera nkimulapuwa Yordanu weera kihivolowe elapo yooreera Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahasaaweni ntoko yoohiyeriwa. 
Deuteronomy4:22 Kinkhwela elapweene yeela. Nkinimulapuwa Yordanu, mene nyuwosa munoomulapuwa weera mwakuxe elapo yooreera eyo." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Mwiipasoope weera muhittiwale wiiraana wa Yave Mulukwaanyu oopakenlaaweni. Muhiipakele akhalaru muluku mulikanxeraka yakhalaru etthu Yave Mulukwaanyu ookhoottihenraaweni. 
Deuteronomy4:24 Vano, Yave Mulukwaanyu ti mooro onlaliha; Muluku a ehace." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Nyuwosa mwaayarasaka anamwane ni osuulu mukhanleene ehuhu yincipale mweelaponi ni vano mwahapuwa mwiipakelaka wakhalaru moota wa muluku mpakaka yeeyo Yave Mulukwaanyu ohintthunaawe, muntannyeraka isarasawe," 
Deuteronomy4:26 vanonto, wiirimu ni vathi ti anamoonaaka olelo weera nyuwosa munoophwatiwa woowaakuveya mweelaponi mwa yeeyo munkuxaanyu woomulapuwa Yordanu. Nyuwo khamukhalaxawo, mene munoophwatiwa woomalela." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Yave onimoomwaraxelani variyari wa miloko, eniihale paahi akina akina a nyuwosa variyari wa miloko mwa weiwo Yave aneeraawe awoomoleleni." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Weiwo mmwalape miluku soopakiwa ni atthu siri sa nyiri ni maluku sihingwera woona, wiiwa, oca hoye hoye wiimura." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Wa soothesene, nyuwosa mwamwaasawo Yave Mulukwaanyu, munoomphwanya nyuwosa mwamwaasaasa ni murimaanyu ni okumaanyu wootheene." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Nyuwosa mwaahaawasaka ni itthu sootheene iyo sookhumelelasani, hiiho mahuku a muhoolo mmwinghokolele Yave Mulukwaanyu ni mmwimwiiwelele." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Vano Yave Mulukwaanyu ti Muluku a ikharari. Owo khoohiyasani hata khoophwatasani naari khattiwala wiiraana aapakenlaawe makholowaanyu ni nlipelo. 
Deuteronomy4:32 Mukohakohe mwaha wa ihuhu sa khalayi, nyuwo muhinaaye okhalasa – okhuma nihuku aampattuxalaawe mulopwana mweelaponi; mukohakohe wiirimu wootheene: Kheenatoko okhumelela etthu etokotoko naari wiiwiwa ntoko yeela!" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Sookhala miloko sikina siiwale nsu na Muluku nuulumaka mmooroni ntoko mwiiwalaanyu ni vahoolowaya sinapwaherera ni okumi? 
Deuteronomy4:34 Khoowowo muluku mukina olakenle okhumiha muloko mmoha variyari wa mukina weera okhale wawawe ovarelaka muteko woota murima, ineneero sootikhiniheya, owana, ntata nooweraxa, moono woolipa ni miteko sitokotoko ni sooweraxa. Itthu sootheene iye oopakenlaaweni Yave Mulukwaanyu wExipitu, ntoko moonnaanyu ni maithwaanyu!" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Yave owooniherenleni itthu iye sootheene osuwela weera Yave ti Muluku. Khoowowo muluku mukina ahikhanle Yoowo. 
Deuteronomy4:36 Wiirimu oowiiwihani nsunawe weera oolakeeni. Mulaponi aawooniherani moorwaawe mutokotoko mwaahiiwa maswaawe eweelaka mmooroni. 
Deuteronomy4:37 Aahookhumihani wExipitu ni owerawawe otokotoko niwoko na waasivelawawe makholowaanyu ni othanlawawe ikhapirasaya. 
Deuteronomy4:38 Aahoomola ohoolowanyu miluku sitokotoko ni soolipaxa eerelaka woovolonghani ni okuxa elapwaaya ntoko yoohiyeriwaanyu, mooteene yoola onooneyaaya olelo." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Musuwele yeeyo olelo ni muhele vamurimani weera Yave ti Muluku a wiirimu ni vathi. Khawowo mukina. 
Deuteronomy4:40 Mwiiwelele ikanosawe ni malamulowaawe kinoovahasaakani olelo weera sootheene siweetteleni nnenesene nyuwosa ni anamwaniinyu ni weera mukhale ni okumi wa mahuku mancipale mweelaponi Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahasaaweni.” 
Deuteronomy4:41 Vahoolowaya Moisesi aathanla isidade tthaaru mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oYordanu. 
Deuteronomy4:42 Akhalaru mutthu eera amwiive mukhwaawe mweerisani ni woohilakela atthawelekemo. Namwiiva aatthawela emoha ya isidadesene seiyo eerelaka woopola okumaawe. 
Deuteronomy4:43 Isidadesene seiye saari ti iya: Wa aRubeni oBezeri muttuttuwani wa nikare; wa aGadi oRamoti oGiliyade ni wa aManaxe oGolani oBaxani. Miloko mithanu niithanu. 
Deuteronomy4:44 Nna ti nlamulo Moisesi aavanghaawe aYixrayeli. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Ti seiya ikano ni malamulo ni sooruma Moisesi aavanghaawe ekhummeene wExipitu. 
Deuteronomy4:46 Yaari okhopela Yordanu vareyareyani naapaka mwiinano wa oBeti-Peyori, mweelaponi ya Sihoni, mwene a awAmori. Owo aalamula oHexiboni ni aawiniwa ni Moisesi ni aYixrayeli ekhummeene wExipitu." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Awosa yaakuxa elapwaawe ni elapo ya Ogi, mwene a oBaxani, eyo tiiyo mamwene meeli a awAmori yaakhala mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa oYordanu."
