Deuteronomy4:48 Elapweene yeele yaakhumme wAroweri mukerekhere nreyarya na wArenoni mpaka mwaako Siyoni (eyo tiiyo Heremoni)," 
Deuteronomy4:49 yaatakanserana elapo yootheene ya wAraba, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa oYordanu, mpaka Ephareiya ya wAraba, mpatta wa ohitto mukerekhere mwaako Pisega." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Moisesi aahaathukumanyiha aYixrayeli ootheene anaweerela: “Mwiiwe aYixrayeli ikano ni sooruma kinooleelaakani olelo. Muxuttere ni mweettele nnenesene. 
Deuteronomy5:2 Yave Mulukwaahu aanikhalihera wiiraana oHorebi. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Yave aanikhalihera wiiraana ni hiyo ootheene nri ni okumi olelo; khoohiyono ni makholowaahu. 
Deuteronomy5:4 Yave aahuuluma ni nyuwo ttunda ttunda mmooroni vamwaakoni. 
Deuteronomy5:5 Ehuhuweene yeele miyo kaari variyari wa nyuwosa ni Yave weera koothalihereni masu a Yave, niwoko mwaamoova mooro ole muhitthunaka owela mwaako. Vano Muluku aaheera:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 “Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu, mwa Yoowo ookhumihaleni wExipitu, elapo ya okaporo." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Muhikhalane miluku sikina okihiya Miyo. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Muhiipakele ecaambulo ya miluku sikina mulikanxeraka yakhalaru etthu eri wiirimu hoye hoye vathi, naari mmaahini." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Muhikokhorele seiyo naari muhilape, niwoko Miyo, Yave Mulukwaanyu, ti Muluku a ehace. Miyo kinaattaruxa anamwane niwoko na soottheka sa asitithaya mpaka ekhapira yanaararu ni yanaaxexe ya yaawo ankithanya." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Vaheera kinaakosoopa ni onnene yaawo ankisivela ni aneettela malamulowaaka – mpaka ikhapirasaya macira muloko. 
Deuteronomy5:11 Muhinyemule Nsina na Yave Mulukwaanyu, niwoko vekhaikhai Yave onimuttaruxa yoowo onnyemula Nsinanawe." 
Deuteronomy5:12 Muttittimihere nihuku na eSaabadu mutteelikaha, ntoko Yave Mulukwaanyu oolamulenlaaweni." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Mahuku mathannamosa a khula esimana mvareke mitekosanyu sootheene," 
Deuteronomy5:14 mene nihuku nanaathannameeli ti eSaabadu ya Yave Mulukwaanyu. Nihuku nno muhivareru muteko nyuwo, hata anamwaniinyu asilopwana naari asithiyana, hata arumeiyaanyu asilopwana hoye hoye asithiyana, emombaanyu, buurwaanyu, naari wakhalaru muhuwaanyu, hata anamarwa ankhala musidadenimwanyu weera arumeiyaanyu asilopwana ni asithiyana yiitthuuwe, ntoko nyuwo muniitthuuwanyu." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Muupuwelele weera mwaari ipottha wExipitu ni weera Yave Mulukwaanyu aahookhumihaniwo ni ntata noolipaxa ni moono wooweraxa. Tivawo Yave Mulukwaanyu oolamulenlaaweni ottittimihera nihuku na eSaabadu. 
Deuteronomy5:16 Mwaattiitiimihe atithinyu ni amayinyu ntoko Yave Mulukwaanyu oolamulenlaaweni weera woorakameleni okumi ni sootheene siweetteleni nnenesene mweelaponi Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni. 
Deuteronomy5:17 Muhiive. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Muhiraruwe. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Muhiiye. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Muhikhale namoona oowootha a mukhwiinyu. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Muhimwiinlele mwaara a mukhwiinyu. Muhiinlele vaate wa mukhwiinyu, hoye hoye emattaawe naari epottha elopwana hoye hoye ethiyana, naari emombaawe, hata buurwaawe, naari yakhalaru yawawe." 
Deuteronomy5:22 Ala yaari masu uulummaawe Yave aleelaka muthukumano wootheene arumihaka, vamwaako mmooroni, mmahutteni ni mpiphini, ahaandyeereraka makina. Vahoolowaya aalepa yaawo vatthaabwani piili sa maluku, anakinnyerera." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Nyuwosa mwiiwakaru nsu nikhumaka mpiphini, mwaako ovarelaka, yaakaattamelasa asitokweene ootheene a ipuumbasanyu ni ahoolelaanyu." 
Deuteronomy5:24 Vano mwaaheera: “Yave Mulukwaahu oonoonihera ovuwawawe ni waarawawe ni nohiiwa nsunawe nikhumaka mmooroni. Olelo nohoona weera onoowereya mutthu opwaherera ni okumi, naari Muluku uulumaleene ni yoowo." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Vanonto, khanintthuna okhwa. Mooro mutokotoko ola onoonihisa. Napwaherera wiiwa nsu na Yave Mulukwaahu, nnimookhwa." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Vekhaikhai khawowo mutthu mweelaponi otonke wiiwa nsu na Muluku Mukumi nikhumaka mmooroni, ntoko hiyo niiwalaahu, anapwaherera ni okumi." 
Deuteronomy5:27 Moisesi, mwaattamele nyeenyu ni mwiiwe sootheene Yave Mulukwaahu aneeraawe ahime. Vahoolowaya munithalihere sootheene Yave Mulukwaahu ooleenlaaweni. Hiyo nniiwe ni nneettele.”" 
Deuteronomy5:28 Yave aahiiwa sootheene mwaakeerenlaanyu, anakeerela: “Miyo kohiiwa yeeyo muloko ola oweerenlaayani ni sootheene weenraaya wohuuluma nnene." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Ohaawelawaka ti weera owo opwaherere otthuna okittittimiha ni wiiwelela malamulowaaka ootheene weera weetteleye nnene muloko owo ni anamwanaaya wa mahuku ootheene! 
Deuteronomy5:30 Murowe, mwaaleele weera ehokoleele muheemanimwaya." 
Deuteronomy5:31 Vaheera nyuwo mukhale va ni Miyo weera kooleeleni malamulo ootheene eyo tiiyo ikano ni sooruma sootheene nyuwo muneeraanyu mwaaxuttihe. Vano awosa yeetteleke mweelaponi Miyo kinaavahaaka ntoko yawayeene.” 
Deuteronomy5:32 Tivawo, mwiipasoope woopaka sootheene Yave Mulukwaanyu oolamulenlaaweni; muhihapuweru." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Mweetteke mahuku ootheene mphironi Yave Mulukwaanyu oolamulenlaaweni weera mukhale ni okumi, sootheene siweetteleni nnene, ni mahukwaanyu yaandyeerereye mweelaponi muneeraanyu mukuxe." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Ala ti malamulo, ikano ni soolamula sootheene Yave Mulukwaanyu aakileenlaawe weera kooxuttihaseni wiiwelela mweelaponi munrowaanyu okuxa." 
Deuteronomy6:2 Mooteene yoowo, nyuwosa anamwaniinyu ni anamwanaaya mmwimoove Yave Mulukwaanyu mahuku ootheene a okumaanyu ni mmwiiwelele ikanosawe ni soolamulasawe sootheene kinoolamulelasaakani weera owaatteleni okumi." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Mwiiwe aYixrayeli ni mwiiwelelase weera sootheene siweetteleni nnene mwaattaka mulaponi waattiyaayawo mukaka ni oravo, ntoko oororomelihalaaweni Yave Muluku a makholowaanyu." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Mwiiwe aYixrayeli: Yave Mulukwaahu ti Yave Mmoharu. 
Deuteronomy6:5 Munsivele Yave Mulukwaanyu ni murimaanyu wootheene, okumaanyu wootheene ni ikurusanyu sootheene." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Malamulo ootheene ala kinoovahaakani olelo ekhaleke vamurimaniwanyu. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Mwaaxuttiheke anamwaniinyu. Mwaathalihere nyuwosa mwaakilaathiki owaani; mweettaka mphironi, mwiixaatalelaka hoye hoye mwaavenyaka." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Mutthukelele ala ntoko eneneero mmoononi ni vayuuciniwanyu. 
Deuteronomy6:9 Mwalepe musereemuni sa impasanyu ni vamulakowanyu. 
Deuteronomy6:10 Vano Yave Mulukwaanyu onimoovoleihani mweelaponi aaroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo makholowaanyu Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yakobe woovahani nyuwosa; elapo ya isidade sitokotoko ni sooreera nyuwosa muhitenkaanyu," 
Deuteronomy6:11 ni impa soosareya itthu sooreerela muhilimmaanyu, ihime muhithimpaanyu ni imatta sa iwuuva* ni sooliveira* nyuwosa muhiphatteiyaanyu. Vanonto, iyo saakhumelelaka nyuwosa mwaacaaka, munatteeliwa murima," 
Deuteronomy6:12 mwiipasoope weera muhimuttiwale Yave ookhumihaleni wExipitu, elapo ya okaporo." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Mmoove Yave Mulukwaanyu, munrumeele Yoowo paahi ni mulipele Nsinanaweru." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Muhitthare miluku sikina sa miloko sa mukhwipimwanyu," 
Deuteronomy6:15 niwoko Yave Mulukwaanyu ori variyariwanyu ti Muluku a ehace ni isarasawe nsoopattelaseni ni Owo onimoophwatasani mulaponi. 
Deuteronomy6:16 Muhimoote murima Yave Mulukwaanyu ntoko mwaapankaanyu oMasa. 
Deuteronomy6:17 Mwiiwelele nnenesene malamulo a Yave Mulukwaanyu ni ikano ni sooruma Owo oolamulenlaaweni. 
Deuteronomy6:18 Mpake yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai ni yooreera wa Yave weera sootheene siweetteleni nnenesene. Hiiho munoovolowa mukuxaka elapo yooreera Yave aaroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo makholowaanyu," 
Deuteronomy6:19 awoomolaka amwiittanaanyu ootheene ohoolowanyu, ntoko Yave aaroromelinghaawe." 
Deuteronomy6:20 Muhoolommo, anamwaniinyu yookohani: “Malamulo, ikano ni sooruma iya Yave Mulukwaahu oolamulenlaaweni sintaphulelani?”" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Vano mwaaleele: “Naari ipottha sa Farawu* wExipitu, mene Yave aanikhumihawo ni ntata nooweraxa." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Yave aapaka vamaithoniwahu ineneero sootikhiniheya sitokotoko ni soowoopihaxa wExipitu, amuhooxaka Farawu* ni emusaawe yootheene." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Vaheera Owo aanikhumihawo aniruuhaka nno elapo aaroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo makholowaahu. 
Deuteronomy6:24 Yave aanilamula wiiwelela ikano sootheene iya ni omoova Yave Mulukwaahu weera nireereliwe mahuku ootheene wuureliwaka okumaahu, ntoko nraahu olelo." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Vano neettela nlamulo nootheene nna vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaahu ntoko onilamulenlaawe, vano wu onuukhale waakhuleliwa ni Muluku.”" 
Deuteronomy7:1 Yave Mulukwaanyu oovoleihakani mweelaponi mwa weiwo munrowaanyu okuxa, Owo onimoomola ohoolowanyu miloko sincipale – aHiti, aGiregaxi, awAmori, aKanaani, aPerizi, aHivi ni aYebusi – miloko mithannamiili soolipa woopwahasani nyuwosa." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Yave Mulukwaanyu aawinnyererakani ni mwaawinaka, vano ontthuneya ophwata woomalela. Muhiiraaneno naari muhimoreliwe ikharari." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Muhithelane ni atthu a weiwo. Muhaathelihase asinamwaniinyu asithiyana ni anamwanaaya asilopwana, hata muhaakuxe anamwanaaya asithiyana mwaathelihaka anamwaniinyu asilopwana," 
Deuteronomy7:4 niwoko awo animwaahapuxa anamwaniinyu asilopwana weera ehikitthare elapaka miluku sikina. Weereya hiiho, isara sa Yave sinimoopattelasani soophwatasakani woowaakuveya." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Vano nyuwosa entthuneya opakela miloko iyo ti ela: Mwaaphwate altaaraaya, mwaapwexe amarimbwaaya ootteela, muuhe nyiri soothipeleliwa sa Axera ni mwahiseke mmooroni icaambulosaya sa miluku." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Nyuwosa ti muloko wootteeliheriwa Yave Mulukwaanyu. Owo ohoothanlani nyuwosa variyari wa miloko sootheene sa elapo ya vathi weera mukhale mulokwaawe wootthuneyaxa. 
Deuteronomy7:7 Yave khoosivelenleni nyuwosa naari khoothanlenleni waatta opwaha miloko sikina, niwoko vekhaikhai ti nyuwosa muhaattale wa miloko sootheene." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Yave ookhumihanseni ni ntata nooweraxa anawoopolani mweelaponi ya okaporo mmatatani mwa Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu, niwoko noowoosivelani Yave ni nlipelo aapakenlaawe makholowaanyu." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Musuwele weera Yave Mulukwaanyu ti Muluku. Owo ti Muluku oororomeleya ompwaherera wiiraana ni onnene wa ikhapira macira muloko sa yaawo animusivela yiiwelelaka malamulowaawe. 
Deuteronomy7:10 Vaheera Muluku onoomuttaruxa amphwataka woowaakuveya yoowo onimuthanya. 
Deuteronomy7:11 Tivawo mwiiwelele nlamulo, eyo tiiyo ikano ni sooruma kinoolamulelaakani olelo." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Mwiiwelela malamulo ala musungaka, muneettela, Yave Mulukwaanyu onimoopwahererelihani wiiraanawawe ni onnene aaroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo makholowaanyu." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Owo onimoosivelani, onimooreelihani ni onoowaandyeererani. Onimoovahani anamwane ancipale, soohepha sincipale sa etrigu, eviinyu enyowani ni makhura ni muhuwo wa imombe ni wa ikhondoolo mweelaponi Owo aalipelenlaawe makholowaanyu woovahani." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Nyuwosa munooreelihiwa opwaha miloko sikina; asilopwanaanyu ni asithiyanaanyu ootheene animwaayara anamwane mpaka axinama a mihuwosanyu. 
Deuteronomy7:15 Yave onoowaakiherani iretta sootheene. Khasookhumelelani iretta soowoopihaxa ntoko musuwenlaanyu seiye saaphwannye awExipitu; mene sinrowa waakela amwiittanaanyu ootheene. 
Deuteronomy7:16 Nyuwosa ontthuneya ophwata miloko sootheene Yave Mulukwaanyu aneeraawe oovahereraseni. Muhimoreliwe ikharari naari muhilape milukusaya niwoko eyo enimookhalelani ntapha. 
Deuteronomy7:17 Apaale munimwiixeerelasa: “Miloko iyo ti soolipaxa onipwaha hiyo. Nnoomole hai?”“” 
Deuteronomy7:18 Wa soothesene, muhoove iyo. Muupuwelele nnenesene yeeyo Yave Mulukwaanyu aampakenlaawe Farawu* ni wExipitu wootheene." 
Deuteronomy7:19 Mwaahoona ni maithwaanyu woota murima otokotoko, ineneero sootikhiniheya sitokotoko, ntata ni moono wooweraxa mwa yoowo Yave Mulukwaanyu ookhumihenraawenino. Yave Mulukwaanyu onoopakela mooteene yoowo miloko sootheene munoovaanyu." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Ohiya toko yeeyo, Yave Mulukwaanyu onimwaarukureeriha nyuru eriyaraaya mpaka waaphwata eniihalaawo, yaawo awiipithanseni." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Muhoove niwoko Yave Mulukwaanyu ori variyariwanyu ti Muluku Mutokweene ni Oowoopiha. 
Deuteronomy7:22 Yave Mulukwaanyu onimoomola miloko iyo ohoolowanyu vakhaani vakhaani. Nyuwosa muhimalihase ekwaha emoha* paahi weera ehaandyeererane asinama a mutuphini ewoopopihasakani. 
Deuteronomy7:23 Yave Mulukwaanyu onoowinnyererasani iyo mmatatanimwanyu aruuhelasaka minyakunyaku mpaka ophwatiwawaya. 
Deuteronomy7:24 Owo onoowinnyerera mmatatanimwanyu mamwenaaya ni nyuwosa munoocipiha masinaaya mulaponi moota woomalela. Khaawo anoowereeni mpaka muneeraanyu mwaaphwate. 
Deuteronomy7:25 Muhise mmooroni icaambulo sa milukusaya. Muhihaawele iparathasaya naari iyuumasaya soorikaxa sihuruweliwaayano niwoko eyo eniyookhaleleni ntapha. Itthu iyo ti sa mwiikho wa Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Deuteronomy7:26 Muhikuxeru etthu eri ya mwiikho muronghaka mpaanimwanyu weera nyuwosa muhiphwatiwetho. Muthanye ni musembe ni murimaanyu wootheene niwoko simwalamwaliheriwe ophwatiwa. 
Deuteronomy8:1 Mwiipasoope woowiiwelela malamulo ootheene ala kinoovahakani olelo weera nyuwosa mukhalase ni okumi, mwaandyeererane ni mwakuxase elapo Yave aaroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo makholowaanyu." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Muupuwelele moota Yave Mulukwaanyu oweettihalaaweni munkwahani wootheene munikareni wookwana iyaakha miloko mixexe iye. Owo aahooyevihasani awootakani murima, eerelaka osuwela yeeyo eri mmirimanimwanyu ni mwaariki mwiiwelele malamulowaawe hoye hoye mwaahiiwelela." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Aahooyevihasani, anoohiyasani mvoliwaka etala. Vahoolowaya aahoocihasani ni emana* mwa yeeyo hata nyuwo naari makholowaanyu yaahaasuwenlaaya. Owo aatthuna wooxuttihani weera mutthu khankhala ni okumi niwoko na yooca paahi, mene na masu ootheene anrweela wa Muluku." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Soowarasanyu khasathaalaru ni inawosanyu khasiiparu muyaakhani miloko mixexe iye. 
Deuteronomy8:5 Musuwele vamurimaniwanyu weera Yave Mulukwaanyu onoolakani nyuwo ntoko mulopwana onimulakaawe mwanawe. 
Deuteronomy8:6 Mwiiwelele malamulo a Yave Mulukwaanyu mweettaka mphironimwawe, munttittimihaka." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Yave Mulukwaanyu onooroihani mweelaponi yooreeraxa; elapo yoosareya nyooloko, maratta ni anaattuuttu antthimaka mmaxaapwani ni mmanyaakoni;" 
Deuteronomy8:8 elapo ya etrigu, esevada*, ematta ya iwuuva*, nyiri sa efiigu* ni sa irooma*, makhura a sooliveira* ni oravo;" 
Deuteronomy8:9 elapo mwa yeeyo ehinthowaayawo yooca ni ehinghalelaayawo etthu; elapo ya nyala siraayano iyuuma ni mmattumuxanimwaya ongwereyaaya othipa ebronze*. 
Deuteronomy8:10 Muciiyeene munavona, munttottopele Yave Mulukwaanyu niwoko na elapo yooreera oovanghaaweni." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Mwiipasoope weera muhimuttiwale Yave Mulukwaanyu, muhiyaka wiiwelela malamulowaawe, ikanosawe ni soorumasawe miyo kinoovahasaakani olelo." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Mmuupuwelele Yave niwoko, mwaacaaka ni mwaavonaka, mwaatekaka impa sooreera, mwiitekihaka," 
Deuteronomy8:13 mihuwosanyu musurukhwaanyu ni sooreelasanyu sootheene saandyeerereyaka," 
Deuteronomy8:14 vano onoowereya othatuwa oowiixoona munttiwalaka Yave Mulukwaanyu ookhumihaleni wExipitu, elapo ya okaporo." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Owo aaweettihasani munikareni ntokotoko ni noowoopiha; elapweene yeele yoowuuma ni yoohikhala maahi erino inowa ni awalisi oohapala. Owo aahokhumiherasani maahi vamwala 
Deuteronomy8:16 anoocihasani emana* munikareni, mwa yeeyo yahaasuwenlaaya makholowaanyu. Aapaka yeeyo weera ooyevihaseni awootakani murima, eerelaka sootheene siweettelaseni nnene." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Onoowereya wiixeerela: “Mihakhu sootheene iya kiwenre ni eruswaaka ni ikurusaka.” 
Deuteronomy8:18 Vaheera mmuupuwelele Yave Mulukwaanyu niwoko ti Yoowo onoowerihani ophwanya mihakhu aakhulelihaka hiiho wiiraanawawe aalipelenlaawe makholowaanyu, ntoko onooneyaaya olelo." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Nyuwosa mwamuttiwala Yave Mulukwaanyu muttharaka ni mulapaka miluku sikina weera mukokhorele ohoolowaya, kinoororomelihasani olelo weera vekhaikhai munoophwatiwa." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Moohimwiiwelelani Yave Mulukwaanyu, nyuwosa munoophwatasiwa ntoko saapakiwaaya miloko sikina mwa seiye Yave aaphwantaawe ohoolowanyu." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Mwiiwe aYixrayeli, munghala vakhaani omulapuwa Yordanu weera mwavolowase mulaponi ni mwawine miloko soowaatta ni soolipaxa woopwahasani nyuwo; miloko sirino isidade sitokotoko ni ixiri soorakamela osulu." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Atthu a weiwo ti oolipaxa ni oorakama; ti awAnaki! Nyuwosa mohiiwa wuulummwawaya mpaka moosuwela eneeriwa: “Khaawo ongwera waawina awAnaki!” 
Deuteronomy9:3 Wa soothesene, musuwele nnenesene olelo weera Yave Mulukwaanyu ti Yoowo muneenaawe onrowa ohoolowaanyu ntoko mooro onlaliha. Owo onimwaaphwata aawinaka ohoolowanyu. Nyuwosa munimoomola mphwataka woowaakuveya, ntoko Yave oororomelinghaaweni." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Vano vahoolo wa owoomola ohoolowanyu Yave Mulukwaanyu, muhiixeerelase: “Yave okiruuhenle nno weera kikuxe elapo ela niwoko na waakhuleliwawaka ni Muluku.” Hoye! Ti niwoko na otakhala wa miloko iyo Yave aneeraawe oomole ohoolowanyu." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Khoohiyono niwoko na waakhuleliwawanyu ni Muluku naari oreerawanyu murima muneeraanyu mwakuxe elapwaaya, mene niwoko na otakhala wa miloko iyo. Yave Mulukwaanyu onimoomola ohoolowanyu weera akwanihere yeeyo aaroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo makholowaanyu Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yakobe." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Tivawo, musuwele weera khoohiyono niwoko na waakhuleliwawanyu ni Muluku Owo aneeraawe oovaheeni, elapo yooreera eyo weera mwakuxe mweenre nyuwo mukhalaka muloko woottiyamaaru." 
Deuteronomy9:7 Muupuwele yeeyo ni muhittiwale moota mwaantannyenraanyu isara Yave Mulukwaanyu munikareni. Okhuma nihuku mwaakhumalaanyu wExipitu mpaka ophiyawanyu nno nyuwosa moonttiyelamaaru Yave. 
Deuteronomy9:8 oHorebi mwaamunyoonyiha Yave. Aanyoonyiwaxa moota wooweera aatthuna woophwatani. 
Deuteronomy9:9 Miyo kaawenlaka vamwaako weera kaakhele itthaabwa piili sa maluku; itthaabwa sa wiiraana Yave Muluku oopakenlaaweni, kaakhalawo mahuku miloko mixexe kihicaaka yooca naari kihiwuraka maahi." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Yave aakinnyerera itthaabwa piili sa maluku saalempwale ni ekatha ya Muluku. Mwemmo yaalempwaayamo malamulo ootheene Yave oothalihenraaweni vamwaako, nsunawe nikhumaka mmooroni vanihukuni na muthukumano." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Eviraleene mahuku miloko mixexe ale, Yave aakinnyerera itthaabwa piili sa maluku; itthaabwa sa wiiraana," 
Deuteronomy9:12 anakeerela: “Mukhuruweke woowaakuveya, niwoko mulokwaanyu owo, mwa yoowo mukhumihalaanyu wExipitu woovirikanyiha. Woohapuwa woowaakuveya mphironi Miyo kilamulenlaaka, wiipakelaka ecaambulo yoohaniwa.”" 
Deuteronomy9:13 Vanonto Yave aakeerela: “Miyo kinoona weera vekhaikhai muloko ola ti woottiyamaaru! 
Deuteronomy9:14 Mukihiyeke weera kaaphwate, kicipihaka nsinanaya mweelaponi. Kinimootatuxani muloko woolipaxa ni woowaatta woopwaha muloko owo.”" 
Deuteronomy9:15 Hiiho kaarukunuwa, kinakhuruwa vamwaako, owo ovarelaka. Itthaabwa piili sa wiiraana saari mmatatanimwaka." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Kaahoona weera mwaamutthekela Yave Mulukwaanyu; mwiipakelaka muluku a eyuuma mulikanxeraka mwaamombe. Mwaahapuwa woowaakuveya mphironi mwa Yave Mulukwaanyu olamulenlaawe. 
Deuteronomy9:17 Hiiho kaakuxa itthaabwa piili, kinavonyera vathi kipwexaka vamaithoniwanyu." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Vahoolowaya miyo kaamukokhorelatho Yave mahuku miloko mixexe kihicaaka yooca naari kihiwuraka maahi niwoko na soottheka sitokotoko mwaapankaanyu. Mwaapaka yeeyo Yave ohintthunaawe, mutannyaka isarasawe." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Koova isara ni nthorihelo na Yave, niwoko Owo aanyoonyiwa mpaka ohalela woophwatani. Wa soothesene, Yave aakiiwatho." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Yave aamunyoonyeriwa Aharoni mpaka ohaleela omphwata, mene ehuhuweene yeele kaamvekelelatho Aharoni." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Vahoolowaya kaamukuxa mwaamombe a yootthekaanyu, kinamuhisa. Kaamuttikittha, anakareya mpaka othatuwa ntthupi, kinavonyera ntthupi nne mmoolokoni ophattungwe omwaako." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Ohiya yeeyo, nyuwosa mwaatannyatho isara sa Yave oTibera, oMasa ni oKiberoti-Hataava." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Vano Yave oorumihaaweni oKadexi-Bareneya, aaheera: “Mvolowasewo ni mwakuxe elapo koovahansaakani.” Vaheera nyuwosa mwaavaanya Nlamulo na Yave Mulukwaanyu. Khamwaamuroromenle naari khamwaamwiiwelenle." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Okhuma vaavaale koosuwelaakani nyuwosa munnapwaherera omvaanya Yave. 
Deuteronomy9:25 Kaamukokhorela Yave wookwana mahuku miloko mixexe niwoko Yave aahima weera aarwa woophwatani. 
Deuteronomy9:26 Kaamvekenle Yave keeraka: “Ii! Adonai Yave, muhiphwate mulokwaanyu; yoohiyeraanyu mooponlaanyu ni ikurusanyu sitokotoko mukhumihaka wExipitu ni ntatananyu nooweraxa." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Ngwuupuwelele arumeiyaanyu Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yakobe. Muhiwehe ottiyamaaru wa muloko ola, yootakhala ni yootthekaaya." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Mwaahipaka yeeyo, amaki a elapo munikhumihalaanyu eniyeere: ‘Yave okhumihenre muloko ole weera awiive munikareni, niwoko khaawenre waarongha mweelaponi mwa yeeyo aaroromelinghaawe, aathanyaka.’" 
Deuteronomy9:29 Vaheera ola mulokwaanyu, yoohiyeraanyu, mwa yoowo mukhumihalaanyu wexipitu ni ikurusanyu sitokotoko ni moonowaanyu woolipaxa.”" 
Deuteronomy10:1 Ehuhuweene yeele Yave aakeerela: “Mwaattule itthaabwa piili sa maluku ntoko seiye soopacera ni mukaattamele vamwaako. Mwaapaketho Arka* a mwiri. 
Deuteronomy10:2 Miyo kinoolepa vatthaabwani masu yaarimo soopacera mwa seiyo mpwenxaanyu. Vano mwiikaathi mwa Arkani*.” 
Deuteronomy10:3 Hiiho kaahaapaka Arka* a mwiri wa akaasiya*, kinaattula itthaabwa piili sa maluku ntoko seiye soopacera, kinawela vamwaako kikuxaleene itthaabwa piili." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Yave aalepamo yeele aalempaawe woopacera, eyo tiiyo Malamulo Muloko, mwa yaawo oothalihenraaweni vamwaako, mmooroni, vanihukuni na muthukumano. Vanonto, Yave aakinnyerera," 
Deuteronomy10:5 kinahokolowa kikhuruwaka vamwaako, kiniikaathi itthaabwa piili mwa Arkani* kaapankaaka. Vano siri mwemmo ntoko Yave aakilamulenlaawe." 
Deuteronomy10:6 Vano, aYixrayeli yaattimula mmahimeni sa aYaakani erowaka oMosera. Weiwo okhwenlaawewo Aharoni, anavithiwa ni Mwanawe, Eleyazari, ti aamurandenle osaserdoti*." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Okhuma vaavaale yaarowa oGudegoda ni vahoolowaya oYotebata, elapo yoosareya maxaapwa." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Ehuhuweene yeele Yave aathanla epuumba ya aLeevi weera yaateexe Arka* a wiiraana a Yave; yeemele vamaithoni wa Muluku erumeelaka ni weera elaleiyeke mareeliho mwa Nsinanawe, ntoko empakeyaaya olelo." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Tivawo aLeevi ahikhalannaaya ettima hoye hoye yoohiyeriwa variyari wa axunnaya eenre Yave akhalaka yoohiyeriwaaya, ntoko Owo aaroromelinghaawe." 
Deuteronomy10:10 Vanonto, kaakhala vamwaako wookwana mahuku miloko mixexe ntoko kaapankaaka emaara yoopacera ni Yave aakiiwatho emaara ele. Owo khaatthunne woophwatani." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Yave aakeerela: “Murowe ni mwahoolele muloko mphironimwaya weera wakuxe elapo kaalipelenlaaka makholowaaya woovahani.” 
Deuteronomy10:12 Vanonto, aYixrayeli, otthuna wa Yave Mulukwaanyu ti weera mmoove Yave Mulukwaanyu, mweette mphironimwawe, munsivele, munrumeele ni murimaanyu ni okumaahu wootheene, ni" 
Deuteronomy10:13 weera mwiiwelele malamulo ni ikano sa Yave miyo kinoovahaakani olelo wa mpuhaanyu. 
Deuteronomy10:14 Wiirimu wootheene ni elapo ya vathi vamoha ni sootheene sirimo ti sa Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Deuteronomy10:15 Yave aahaatthuna makholowaanyu, aasivelaka ni aahoothanlani nyuwo, muri ikhapirasaya, variyari wa miloko sootheene, ntoko onooneyaaya olelo." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Tivawo, siineleye mirimasanyu ni muhikhaletho oottiyamaaru," 
Deuteronomy10:17 niwoko Yave Mulukwaanyu ti Muluku a miluku ni Yave aasipwiiya; Muluku Mutokweene, Ooweraxa ni Oowoopiha, oohinthalu, akhoottaka makhwankwa." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Owo onniwaakiha akwaasuni ni asinaamukhweli amusivelaka namarwa amvahaka yooca ni yoowara. 
Deuteronomy10:19 Mwaasivele anamarwa niwoko nyuwosa mwaaritho anamarwa wExipitu. 
Deuteronomy10:20 Mmoove Yave Mulukwaanyu ni munrumeeleke. Mumvarexexe Yoowo mulipelaka Nsinanaweru. 
Deuteronomy10:21 Owo ti ottottopeleyawawe, Mulukwaanyu mwa Yoowo oopakenleni sootikhiniha sitokotoko ni soowoopiha moonnaanyu ni maithwaanyu." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Makholowaanyu yaarongwe wExipitu yaari miloko mithannamiili, mene vano Yave Mulukwaanyu oowaandyeererasani ntoko ithenyeeri sa wiirimu." 
Deuteronomy11:1 Munsivele Yave Mulukwaanyu mwiiwelelaka soorumasawe, ikanosawe, malamulowaawe ni sootthunasawe mahuku ootheene." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Muupuwelele weera anamwaniinyu khaasuwenle naari khayoonne olaka wa Yave Mulukwaanyu, ovuwawawe, ntatanawe ni moonowaawe woolipaxa." 
Deuteronomy11:3 Nyuwosa mwaahoona ineneero ni sootheene sikina aampakenlaawe Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu ni elapwaaweene yootheene." 
Deuteronomy11:4 Mwaahoona yeeyo aapakenlaawe anakhotto a wExipitu, ikavalusaya* ni ikaarosaya sa ikavalu*, moota aatutuxenraawe ni maahi a Ephareiya Yooxeera, awosa yoottharelelasaayani ni moota Yave aaphwantaawe khuluwi." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Mwaahoonatho yeeyo oopakenlaaweni munikareni mpaka ophiyawanyu nipuro nno," 
Deuteronomy11:6 ni yeeyo aampakenlaawe Datani ni Abirami, anamwane asilopwana a Eliyabi, muRubeni, yaattakaneenlaaya vathi ni imusisaya, iheemasaya ni sootheene yaarinaaya aYixrayeli yoonaka." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Mwaahoona ni maithwaanyu itthu sitokotoko sootheene iye Yave aapankaawe. 
Deuteronomy11:8 Tivawo, mwiiwelele malamulo ootheene kinoovahaakani olelo weera mphwanye ikuru soovolowela ni owina elapweene yeeyo munrowaanyu, ni" 
Deuteronomy11:9 weera mukhale ni okumi mahuku mancipale mweelaponi Yave aaroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo waavaha makholowaanyu ni ikhapirasaya, elapo waattiyaayawo mukaka ni oravo." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Elapweene yeeyo munrowaanyu okuxa kheehiyono ntoko elapo ya wExipitu mwa weiwo munkhumaanyuwo ni mwaalaanyuwo inuku munahelela, ntoko muttimbeni." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Vaheera elapo munrowaanyu okuxa okhopela Yordanu ti elapo ya nyaako ni mareyareya ehinthowaayamo epula. 
Deuteronomy11:12 Ti elapo Yave Mulukwaanyu onkosoopaawe; maithwaawe annapwaherera owehawo okhuma ompacereroni mpaka ommaleloni wa eyaakha. 
Deuteronomy11:13 Tivawo mwiiwelela oororomeleyeene malamulo kinoovahaakani olelo, munsivelaka Yave Mulukwaanyu, munrumeelaka ni murimaanyu ni okumaanyu wootheene," 
Deuteronomy11:14 vano, kinoorumihela epula elapwaanyu ehuhu yootthuneya; epula mutthulo ni epula ya mulaala, weera muhephe etrigwaanyu ni mukhaleno eviinyu enyowani ni makhura." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Elapo eyo enookhalano woocihamo mihuwosanyu ni nyuwo munimooca mpaka ovona. 
Deuteronomy11:16 Mwiipasoope weera muhilokotthiwe muhapuxeriwaka olapa miluku sikina mukokhorelaka ohoolowaya. 
Deuteronomy11:17 Mwa yeeyo, isara sa Yave sinimoopattelasani ni Owo onoowala erimu weera ehirupe epula ni etthaya ehimelihe etthu. Hiiho munoophwatiwa woowaakuveya mweelaponi yooreera Yave onoovahaaweni." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Muhele vamurimani ni mmuupuweloni maswaaka ala; ngware vantatani ni mutthukelele vayuuci ntoko eneneero. 
Deuteronomy11:19 Mwaaxuttihaseke anamwaniinyu malamulo ala mwaathaliheraka nyuwosa mukilaathiyeene owaani hata mweettaka mphironi naari mwiixaatalelaka hoye hoye mvenyaka. 
Deuteronomy11:20 Mwalepe musereemuni sa impasanyu ni vamulakowanyu. 
Deuteronomy11:21 Hiiho nyuwosa ni anamwaniinyu mmwikhale ni okumi mahuku mancipale mweelaponi Yave aaroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo makholowaanyu; aani wa mahuku ootheene. 
Deuteronomy11:22 Mwiiwelela moota woororomeleya malamulo kinoovahaakani olelo munsivelaka Yave Mulukwaanyu, mweettaka mphironimwawe moothemwene mumvarexexaka Yoowo," 
Deuteronomy11:23 vano Yave onimoomola miloko sootheene iyo ohoolowanyu ni nyuwosa munoohuhula miloko soowaatta ni soolipa woopwahani nyuwo. 
Deuteronomy11:24 Mmapuroni moothemwene muneeraanyu mvire eniikhale awinyu. Elapwaanyu eniikhume munikareni mpaka oLibanu ni okhuma mooloko Efratesi mpaka ephareiya ya mpatta ninkela nsuwa. 
Deuteronomy11:25 Khaawo eniyoowereeni. Yave Mulukwaanyu onoottenguwiha ni woova miloko sootheene sa elapo muneeraanyu murowewo, ntoko Yave Mulukwaanyu oororomelinghaaweni." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Nnene! Kingwooniherani olelo nreeliho ni nlapho. 
Deuteronomy11:27 Nyuwosa munooreelihiwa mwiiwelela malamulo a Yave Mulukwaanyu miyo kinoovahasaakani olelo," 
Deuteronomy11:28 vaheera munoophwatiwa nyuwosa mwaahiiwelela malamulo a Yave Mulukwaanyu muhapuwaka mphironi kinoolamulelaakani olelo, mulapaka miluku sikina soohisuwanyeya." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Yave Mulukwaanyu ooronghakani mweelaponi yeeyo munrowaanyu okuxa, mwalaleiye mareeliho vamwaako oGerizimi ni nlapho vamwaako wEbali." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Ntoko musuwenlaanyu nyaako iyo siri okhopela Yordanu, mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa musewe, ninnelaayawo nsuwa, vakhiviru wa nyiri sitokotoko sa oMore, elapo ya aKanaani ankhala wAraba yookhuveela oGiligali." 
Deuteronomy11:31 Nyuwosa muhanle vakhaani omulapuwa Yordanu weera mwakuxe elapo Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahasaaweni. Mwaakuxaka ni mwaakhalakamo," 
Deuteronomy11:32 mwiipasoope weera mwiiwelele ikano ni malamulo ootheene kinoovahasaakani olelo. 
Deuteronomy12:1 Ti seiya ikano ni malamulo sintthuneya nyuwosa weettela wa mahuku ootheene a okumaanyu mukhalaka mweelaponi Yave Muluku a makholowaanyu oovanghaaweni ntoko yoohiyeriwa. 
Deuteronomy12:2 Mwaphwateke woomalela mapuro ootheene mmanyaakoni soorakamela, mmattumuxani ni vathi wa nyiri weiwo miloko sinlapaaya milukusaya." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Mwaaphwate altaaraaya mwaapwexakase amarimbwaaya ootteelihiwa ni mwahise nyirisaya soothipeleliwa sa Axera. Mwakakatthanye icaambulo sa milukusaya mmalamalihaka masinaaya mmapuroni awo. 
Deuteronomy12:4 Muhimulape Yave Mulukwaanyu ntoko awo anlapaaya milukusaya. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Ohiyanawaya, mwaasaase nipuro Yave Mulukwaanyu aneeraawe athanle variyari wa ipuumbasanyu sootheene weera ahelewo Nsinanawe ntoko woomakawawe. Ti weiwo ontthuneya orowa" 
Deuteronomy12:6 mukuxaka sooveleelasanyu soohisa ni sa enama, mipatta sanaamuloko, samahala sooreerela, mwa seiyo mwaaroromelinghaanyu omvaha, sooveleela sa otthunawanyu ni matthaara a mihuwosanyu sootheene." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Weiwo mmwace ni ohakalala vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaanyu, nyuwosa ni imusisanyu, niwoko na mitekosanyu sooreera sootheene eenre Yave Mulukwaanyu ooreelihakani." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Muhipakewo yeeyo mumpakaanyu wenno – khula mutthu apakaka ontthunaawe," 
Deuteronomy12:9 niwoko nlelo khamunaaye ophiya vanipuroni noowiitthuuwa ni yoohiyeriwa Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahasaaweni. 
Deuteronomy12:10 Munoomulapuwa Yordanu mwiitekihaka mweelaponi Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahasaaweni ntoko yoohiyeriwa ni Owo onimoovahani owiitthuuwa amwiittanaanyu ootheene yoorukureenreni weera mukhale oolipeene. 
Deuteronomy12:11 Vahoolowaya mwarowe nipuro Yave Mulukwaanyu aneeraawe athanle ntoko woomakawo Nsinanawe. Wu mwaronghe sootheene kinoolamulelaakani – sooveleelasanyu soohisa ni sa enama, mipatta sanaamulokwaanyu, samahala sooreerela ni seiyo sootheene mwaaroromelinghaanyu omvaha Yave." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Mwahakalalewo ohoolo wa Yave Mulukwaanyu – nyuwosa, anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana, ipotthasanyu asilopwana ni asithiyana ni aLeevi ankhala mmittetthenimwanyu mwa yaawo ahikhanleno elapo hoye hoye yoohiyeriwa." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Mwiipasoope weera muhihisere sooveleelasanyu soohisa nakhalaru nipuro nnoosivelani. 
Deuteronomy12:14 Mwahisere paahi vanipuroni Yave Mulukwaanyu aneeraawe athanle mwa emoha ya ipuumbasanyu ni iwo mweetteleke sootheene miyo kinoolamulelaakani. 
Deuteronomy12:15 Wa soothesene, ontthuniheriwa owiiva yakhalaru asinamaanyu mmittettheni ni okhuura enama muntthunelaanyu, ntoko onkhuureeliwaawe naahe hoye hoye eveyado* ettharihiwaka mareeliho Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni. Yaale aniinanela mpaka ahiniinanela ekhuureke." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Wa soothesene, muhikhuure ni ephomaaya; mwavuuvihereke vathi ntoko maahi." 
Deuteronomy12:17 Muhiceru mmittetthenimwanyu mpatta waanaamuloko wa etriguwaanyu, eviinyuwaanyu enyowani naari makhuraanyu hata matthaara a mihuwosanyu, sooveleela sa otthunawanyu hata samahala sooreerela, hoye hoye yakhalaru etthu mwaaroromelinghaanyu omvaha Yave." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Ohiyanawaya, muceeke iyo vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaanyu vanipuroni Yave Mulukwaanyu aneeraawe athanle – nyuwosa, anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana, ipotthasanyu asilopwana ni asithiyana ni aLeevi a mittetthesanyu. Mwahakalalele ohoolo wa Yave Mulukwaanyu sootheene mpankaanyu." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Mwiipasoope weera muhaattiwale aLeevi mahuku ootheene a okumaanyu mweelaponimwanyu. 
Deuteronomy12:20 Yave Mulukwaanyu aandyeerenreene elapwaanyu ntoko oororomelinghaaweni ni mwaatthunaka okhuura enama mweeraka: “Ninghaawela okhuura enama vakhaanene,” vano mwakhuure muntthunelaanyu." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Vanonto, nipuro Yave Mulukwaanyu aneeraawe athanle weera nikhalewo Nsinanawe noorakamelanixa, mwawiive asinama a muhuwo Yave Mulukwaanyu oovanghaaweni, ntoko koolamulenlaakani. Vano mwakhuureke mmittetthenimwanyu enama muntthunelaanyu." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Mukhuureke ntoko onkhuureliwaawe naahe hoye hoye eveyado*. Okhuma aniinanela mpaka ahiniinanela ekhuureke. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Muhikhuureru ni ephomaaya niwoko ephome ti okumi ni khoontthuniheriwa okhuura okumi ni enama. 
Deuteronomy12:24 Muhikhuureru ni ephomaaya; mwavuuvihereke vathi ntoko maahi. 
Deuteronomy12:25 Muhikhuure weera sootheene siweetteleni nnene nyuwosa ni anamwaniinyu woopaka yeeyo eri yoowaakhuleleya vamaithoni wa Yave. 
Deuteronomy12:26 Wa soothesene, mukuxe itthusanyu sootteeliheriwa ni seiye mwaaroromelinghaanyu omvaha Yave murowanaka vanipuroni Yave aneeraawe athanle." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Mwapakewo sooveleela soohisa valtaarini* a Yave Mulukwaanyu, eyo tiiyo enama ni ephome. Ephome ya sooveleelasanyu yiittheliweke okhwipi wa altaari* a Yave Mulukwaanyu, mene enama mwakhuureke." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Mwiipasoope weera mwiiwelele malamulo ala kinoovahasaakani weerela sootheene siweetteleni nnene nyuwosa ni anamwaniinyu wa mahuku ootheene woopaka yeeyo eri yooreera ni yoowaakhuleleya vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Deuteronomy12:29 Yave Mulukwaanyu onoophwata ohoolowanyu miloko munrowelaanyu owina ni woomola. Vaheera moomonleene ni mwiitekihaleene mulaponimwaya," 
Deuteronomy12:30 ni siphwatiweene, mwiipasoope weera muhilokotthiwe ni muhicalele milukusaya mweeraka: “Miloko iya sinlapa hai milukusaya? Nipake hiihotho.”" 
Deuteronomy12:31 Muhimulape Yave Mulukwaanyu mooteene yoowo simpakaaya miloko iyo, niwoko saalapaka milukusaya, iyo simpaka itthu soonanara soohiyanahiyana mwa seiyo Yave onthanyaawe. Awosa mpaka anaahisa anamwanaaya mmooroni ntoko sooveleela wa milukusaya." 
Deuteronomy12:32 Mwiipasoope weera mpake sootheene kinoolamulelaakani. Muhaandyeerere malamulo makina naari muhivukule malamulo a Yave. 
Deuteronomy13:1 Vano iikhumeleliha variyariwanyu mprofeeti hoye hoye akhalaru onloha sa muhoolo oolaleerakani eneneero yootikhiniheya hoye hoye marikarika, ni" 
Deuteronomy13:2 eneneero eyo hoye hoye marikarika awo owo uulummaawe yakhumelela, aneera: “Nrowe, nitthare miluku sikina soohisuwanyeya, nilape,”" 
Deuteronomy13:3 vano muhiiwelele masu a mprofeeti hoye hoye namaloha owo. Yave Mulukwaanyu ongwootani murima weera oone mwaamusivelaka ni murimaanyu ni okumaahu wootheene. 
Deuteronomy13:4 Muntthare ni munttittimihe Yave Mulukwaanyu paahi. Mweettele malamulowaawe mmwiiwelelaka. Munrumeele ni mumvarexexe Yoowo. 
Deuteronomy13:5 Mprofeeti hoye hoye namaloha owo iiviweke, niwoko oolaleiya amvirikanyihelaka Yave Mulukwaanyu, mwa Yoowo ookhumihaleni wExipitu ni owooponleni mweelaponi ya okaporo. Owo aatthuna woohapuxani mphironi Yave Mulukwaanyu oolamulenlaaweni otthara. Mmalihe yoonanara variyariwanyu." 
Deuteronomy13:6 Hata munninyu, mwaninyu mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana, mwaarinyu munimusivelaanyu naari nthamwenaanyu xaxaxa ootannyani muxiirini eeraka: “Nrowe nilape miluku sikina” – miluku hata nyuwo naari makholowaanyu yahaasuwenlaaya –" 
Deuteronomy13:7 seiyo sa miloko sinkhala mukhwipimwanyu, sikhalaka vakhiviru hoye hoye soorakamela okhuma mpatta mmoha wa elapo mpaka mukina," 
Deuteronomy13:8 muhiviriyeliwe hata muhiwiiwelele anghimaaya. Muhimmorele ikharari naari muhimwaakihe. 
Deuteronomy13:9 Vekhaikhai, mmwiive. Ntatananyu nikhaleke noopacera omwiiva ni vahoolowaya matata a muloko wootheene." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Mumvonye maluku mpaka okhwa, niwoko oheerera woohapuxani mphironi mwa Yave Mulukwaanyu mwa Yoowo ookhumihaleni wExipitu ni owooponleni mweelaponi ya okaporo." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Hiiho aYixrayeli ootheene anoosuwela yeeyo, animoova, ni khawowo a nyuwo anaapake yoonanara ntoko eyo." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Mwiiwa yeeriwaka weera esidade emoha emoha Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni weera mukhalemo," 
Deuteronomy13:13 aakhumelela anamatakhala variyariwanyu ni awosa ahaahapuxa amakaaya yeeraka: “Nrowe nilape miluku sikina” – seiyo muhisuwenlaanyu," 
Deuteronomy13:14 vano mukohakohe nnenesene yakhala ettiitthu. Moonelelela weera yoheereya etthu eyo yookhootteya yoonanara variyariwanyu," 
Deuteronomy13:15 vekhaikhai, ngwiivaseke amakaaya ootheene ni ekatana. Mphwate woomalela esidade eyo ngwiivaka amaki ni axinameene." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Muthukumanyihe soohuhula sootheene eriyari nipuwa nihinthoiwa ni muhise woomalela esidade ni soohuhulasaya sootheene ntoko yoomveleelela Yave Mulukwaanyu. Nikhalewo nthala mahuku ootheene ni ohiraseliweruwo. 
Deuteronomy13:17 Muhiphwanyaniweru elakeliwe ophwatiwa weera Yave akurunuxe isarasawe. Owo onimoomoreliwani ikharari, anaawaandyeerereni ntoko aaroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo makholowaanyu," 
Deuteronomy13:18 niwoko noomwiiwelela Yave Mulukwaanyu muttharaka malamulo ootheene kinoovahaakani olelo ni mumpakelaka yeeyo eri yoowaakhuleleyaawe. 
Deuteronomy14:1 Nyuwosa ti anamwane a Yave Mulukwaanyu. Muhipophe naari muhicemelane niwoko na anamakhwa. 
Deuteronomy14:2 Nyuwosa ti muloko wootteeliheriwa Yave Mulukwaanyu. Yave ohoothanlani nyuwosa variyari wa miloko sootheene sa elapo ya vathi weera mukhale mulokwaawe woosiveleyaxa. 
Deuteronomy14:3 Muhikhuureru ekhoottihiwe. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Inama sootthuniheriwa okhuura ti iya: Emombe, ekhondoolo, epuri," 
Deuteronomy14:5 eveyado*, naahe, puttukhu, ekhomaci, etthove, enaari ni ekhondoolo ya mmwaako." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Ontthuniheriwa omukhuura akhalaru mwaamunama orino nnaawo noothaleya makharu meeli ni oncukhula. 
Deuteronomy14:7 Wa soothesene, variyari wa axinama athaleiye mankharu meeli ancukhula khoontthuniheriwa okhuura ekamelu*, hukula hoye hoye matthika. Sinoocukhularu inaawosaya khasithaleiye, tivawo sihitteenlaaya wa nyuwo." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Ekhumbatho ti yoohitteela, niwoko eroothaleyaru nnaawo, kheencukhula. Muhikhuure inamasene seiyo hata muhitaveru erutthwaaya." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Soopattuxiwa sootheene sinkhala mmaahini nyuwosa mukhuureke paahi sirino mapupha ni makamba. 
Deuteronomy14:10 Vaheera muhikhuure sootheene iyo sihirino mapupha ni makamba, niwoko ti soohitteela wa nyuwosa." 
Deuteronomy14:11 Ontthuniheriwa omukhuura akhalaru mwaapalame ootteela. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Wa soothesene, muneeraanyu muhikhuureke ti iya: Enaka, nrepo, nrepo nooripa," 
Deuteronomy14:13 xaaka ooxeera, xaaka ooriipa hoye hoye yakhalaru ekhalelo ya xaaka," 
Deuteronomy14:14 ikhalelo sootheene sa anakhuku," 
Deuteronomy14:15 nikhakanttore, namame, haamaama, ikhalelo sootheene sa aahaamaama," 
Deuteronomy14:16 esiisi, nikunkhuni, mwaacaace," 
Deuteronomy14:17 xaattulamakula, khuruwela, engwasi," 
Deuteronomy14:18 Ntiki, ikhalelo sootheene sa antiki, kokotthi ni nantuuthu." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Ikhalelo sootheene sa axiitthu amvava ti soohitteela – muhikhuure. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Vaheera ikhalelo sootheene sirino mapupha siri sootteela mukhuureke. 
Deuteronomy14:21 Muhikhuureru yakhalaru enama yoowiikhwela. Mumvaheke namarwa onkhala musidadenimwanyu weera akhuure hoye hoye munthumihere mmalapo mukina. Wa soothesene, nyuwosa ti muloko wootteeliheriwa Yave Mulukwaanyu. Muhimwaapeye mwaaxaana a epuri mmukakani wa amayawe." 
Deuteronomy14:22 Mvahe mpatta wanaamuloko wa yeeyo munruweraanyu vayaakhani. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Muceeke mpatta wanaamuloko wa etrigwaanyu, eviinyu enyowani, makhura ni matthaara ootheene a mihuwosanyu vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaanyu vanipuroni aneeraawe athanle ntoko woomakawo Nsinanawe weera muxuttere omuttittimiha Yave Mulukwaanyu wa mahuku ootheene." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Vaheera waari weera nipuro nno ti noorakamelaxa ni nyuwo mooreelihiwa ni Yave Mulukwaanyu muhiweraka orowano mipatta sanaamulokwaanyu, niwoko nipuro Yave Mulukwaanyu aneeraawe athanle ti noorakamelaxa," 
Deuteronomy14:25 vano muthumihe sanaamulokwaanyu ni muronghe eparatha* vanipuroni Yave Mulukwaanyu aneeraawe athanle. 
Deuteronomy14:26 Eparatha* eyo muthumeno muntthunaanyu: Imombe, ikhondoolo, eviinyu hoye hoye soowura sikina naari yakhalaru etthu muntthunaanyu. Vano nyuwo ni emusaanyu mwaceeke ni mwahakalalewo vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaanyu." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Muhaattiwaleru aLeevi ankhala musidadenimwanyu, niwoko awosa khaanono nipuro hata yoohiyeriwaaya." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Ommaleloni wa khula iyaakha tthaaru, muruuheke sanaamuloko sootheene sa soohepha sa eyaakha eyo ni muthokorore mmasidadenimwanyu." 
Deuteronomy14:29 Hiiho aLeevi ahikhalanne nipuro hoye hoye yoohiyeriwaaya ni anamarwa, akwaasuni ni asinaamukhweli ankhala mmasidadenimwanyu eceeke mpaka ovona ni Yave Mulukwaanyu onimooreelihani mmitekoni mumvaraanyu." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Khula ommaleloni wa eyaakha yanaathanapiili mmaliheke ikoongori sootheene. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Eyo epakiweke moota ola: khula namakopa amaliheke aamukoongorenlaawe mukhwaawe. Ahikhaleru muYixrayeli anaamukokoce mukhwaawe, niwoko yoohimmwa ehuhu ya Yave omalihiwa wa ikoongori." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Muntthuniheriwa omukokoca namarwa, vaheera mmaliheke yakhalaru ekoongori ya axunninyu aYixrayeli." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Hiiho khakhalaru namahaawa variyariwanyu, niwoko Yave Mulukwaanyu onimooreelihaxani mweelaponi onoovahaaweni ntoko yoohiyeriwa weera mukuxe." 
Deuteronomy15:5 Vanonto nyuwosa mmwiiweleleke Yave Mulukwaanyu muttharaka malamulo ootheene ala kinoovahakani olelo. 
Deuteronomy15:6 Yave Mulukwaanyu onimooreelihani ntoko aaroromelinghaawe ni nyuwosa sinimookoongorelani miloko sincipale, mene nyuwosa khamukoongora. Munoolamula miloko sincipale, nto khoowowo muloko onoolamuleni." 
Deuteronomy15:7 Akhala muYixrayeli mukina ohaangwe yakhalaru esidade ya mulaponi Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni, muhimuumele murima hata muhimulipele mmatatani munninyu oohaawa." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Ohiyanawaya, muhimulipele mmatatani mmoolihaka sootheene ontthunaawe." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Mwiipasoope weera muhuupuwele ha: “Eyaakha yanaathannapiili yoomaliha ikoongori yookhuveela. Nkintthuna omooliha munnaka oohaawa.” Onoowereya weera owo onoomukhuwelela Yave niwoko na okhoottawanyu ni mmwiphwanyaneye ni soottheka. 
Deuteronomy15:10 Mumvahe ni murima wootheene ohoovoreyakani, niwoko na yeeyo, Yave Mulukwaanyu onooreeliha mitekosanyu sootheene ni sootheene muneeraanyu mpake." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Mulaponi anookhala anamahaawa mahuku ootheene. Tivawo kinoolamulenlaakani weera munreerele murima munninyu muYixrayeli okhuma namahaawa mpaka onghaawela mulaponimwanyu. 
Deuteronomy15:12 Munninyu muHeberi mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana iitthumiha wa nyuwo anoorumeelani iyaakha ithannamosa, vayaakhani yanaathannapiili muntapuxeke." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Nyuwo mwaamutapuxaka, muhimuhiyeke arowaka matataru." 
Deuteronomy15:14 Mumvahaxeke sa muhuwaanyu, etrigwaanyu ni eviinyuwaanyu. Mumvaheke muttharaka mareeliho Yave Mulukwaanyu oovanghaaweni." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Muupuwelele weera mwaari ipottha wExipitu ni weera Yave Mulukwaanyu oowoopolani. Tivawo kinoovahaakani malamulo ala olelo. 
Deuteronomy15:16 Vaheera murumeiyaanyu aweerelani: “Miyo nkintthuna woohiyani” niwoko na woosivelani nyuwo ni emusaanyu ni na ohithoiwa etthu," 
Deuteronomy15:17 vano mukuxe muttemuttemu ni muthoroleno naarunawe vamulako. Hiiho owo onoothatuwa murumeiyaanyu wa mahuku ootheene. Mumpakele hiihotho murumeiyaanyu muthiyana. 
Deuteronomy15:18 Woomutapuxa murumeiyaanyu, murimaanyu ohoovoreyeni niwoko ophwanela wa mutekwaawe wa iyaakha ithannamosa iyo woopwaha muteko wa namwaakhela. Ohiya yeeyo Yave Mulukwaanyu onooreeliha sootheene muneeraanyu mpake." 
Deuteronomy15:19 Mumvahe Yave Mulukwaanyu khula napunci a ntthaara na mihuwosanyu. Muhivarihe muteko matthaara a imombesanyu naari muhimetthe matthaara a ikhondoolosanyu. 
Deuteronomy15:20 Khula eyaakha nyuwo vamoha ni emusaanyu mwakhuurele vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaanyu vanipuroni Owo aneeraawe athanle. 
Deuteronomy15:21 Mwaamunama arakala hoye hoye akhala oohoona naari arakala moota mukina wootepaxa, nyuwo muhimvahe Yave Mulukwaanyu ntoko yooveleela." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Mwa yeeyo mwakhuureleke mmasidadenimwanyu. Yaale ootteela ni oohitteela ntoko ekhovelelowaanyu ekhuurekeno, ntoko onkhuureliwaawe naahe hoye hoye eveyado." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Wa soothesene, muhikhuure ephome. Mmiineleke vathi ntoko maahi." 
Deuteronomy16:1 Muupuwelele mweeri wa Abibi mumpakelaka Yave Mulukwaanyu efesta ya mPaska*, niwoko ohiyu wa mweeri wa Abibi ookhumihalaaweeni wExipitu." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Ehuhu ya mPaska* mumpakele yooveleela Yave Mulukwaanyu mmoha a mihuwosanyu vanipuroni Yave Mulukwaanyu aneeraawe athanle ntoko woomakawo Nsinanawe. 
Deuteronomy16:3 Muhikhuureno ipaawu soopakiwa ni eferementu; wa mahuku matannameeli muceeke ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu. Ti epaawu ya moohaawani niwoko mwaakhumme woowaakuveya wExipitu. Hiiho munimuupuwelela mahuku ootheene ehuhu ya okhumawanyu wExipitu. 
Deuteronomy16:4 Wa mahuku mathannameeli nyuwosa muhiphwanyaniwe yooheliwa eferementu mweelaponimwanyu. Muhixeeleleru enama ya yooveleela ya wiila wa nihuku noopacera ekonaka mpaka waaxiiye. 
Deuteronomy16:5 Muhipake efesta ya mPaska* mmasidadeni Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni," 
Deuteronomy16:6 ohikhanle vanipuroni Owo aneeraawe athanle ntoko woomakawo Nsinanawe. Mwapakewo efesta ya mPaska* oxekuwa nsuwa nineelaka, mweehuhuni ya okhumawanyu wExipitu." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Nyuwosa mwaapeyeke enama ni mwakhuureleke vanipuroni Yave Mulukwaanyu aneeraawe athanle. Vano oxeexeloweene khula mutthu a nyuwo ahokoleeleke oheemaniwawe. 
Deuteronomy16:8 Muceeke ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu wa mahuku mathannamosa, vaheera munihukuni nanaathannameeli muthukumane vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaanyu muhivarakaru muteko." 
Deuteronomy16:9 Mwaalikele isimana ithannapiili okhuma ehuhu mpacenraanyu ohepha etrigu. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Vahoolowaya mumpakele Yave Mulukwaanyu efesta ya isimana mumvahaka yooveleela ya otthunawanyu muttharaka mareeliho mwaakhenlaanyu wa Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Deuteronomy16:11 Vanonto muhakalale vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaanyu vanipuroni Owo aneeraawe athanle ntoko woomakawo Nsinanawe – nyuwosa, anamwaniinyu, arumeiyaanyu asilopwana ni asithiyana, aLeevi ankhala mmasidadenimwanyu, anamarwa, akwaasuni ni asinaamukhweli ankhala variyariwanyu." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Muupuwelele weera mwaari ipottha wExipitu ni mwiiwelele nnenesene ikano iya. 
Deuteronomy16:13 Mpake efesta ya mmikotthani wa mahuku mathannameeli muthukumannyeene soohepha mmapuroni emveeriwa* etrigu ni sinaameliwa iwuuva*. 
Deuteronomy16:14 Muhakalale mufestanimwanyu – nyuwosa, anamwaniinyu, arumeiyaanyu asilopwana ni asithiyana, aLeevi ankhala mmasidadenimwanyu, anamarwa, akwaasuni ni asinaamukhweli ankhala variyariwanyu." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Wa mahuku mathannameeli mumpakele Yave Mulukwaanyu efesta ya mmikotthani vanipuroni owo aneeraawe athanle. Yave Mulukwaanyu onooreeliha soohephasanyu sootheene ni sootheene mumvaraanyu ni ohakalalawanyu onookwanela. 
Deuteronomy16:16 Asilopwana ootheene yiixoonihereke ohoolo wa Yave Mulukwaanyu imaara tthaaru vayaakhani vanipuroni Owo aneeraawe athanle – mweehuhuni ya efesta ya ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu, ya isimana ni ya mmikotthoni. Ahikhale anaaphiye ohoolo wa Yave matataru." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Khula mutthu a nyuwosa amuruuhele Yave yamahala attharaka mareeliho aakhenlaawe wa Yave Mulukwaawe. 
Deuteronomy16:18 Mwaakhalihe aphuki ni asitokweene akina wa khula epuumba, mmasidadeni sootheene Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni ni weera awosa ethorihe muloko ettharaka ekhaikhai." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Muhivirikanyihe ekhaikhai naari muhipake nthalu. Muhaakhulele makhwankwa, niwoko awo anaaphuta owiitho anamiruku ni anghenyengera masu a oororomeleya." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Mutthareke ekhaikhai paahi weera mukhaleno okumi ni mukuxe elapo Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni. 
Deuteronomy16:21 Muheemexeru mwiri wootteeliheriwa Axera mukhwipi mwa altaari* muneeraanyu muntekele Yave Mulukwaanyu," 
Deuteronomy16:22 naari muheemexeru nrimbu nootteeliheriwa, niwoko Yave Mulukwaanyu onnathanya yeeyo." 
Deuteronomy17:1 Muhimpakele Yave Mulukwaanyu yooveleela ya emombe elopwana hoye hoye ekhondoolo yoorakala, niwoko ti sa mwiikho wa Yoowo." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Vano mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana mmoha onkhala esidade emoha emoha Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni aphwanyaniwa apakaka yeeyo Yave Mulukwaanyu ohintthunaawe ananarihaka wiiraanawawe," 
Deuteronomy17:3 ahiiwelelaka malamulowaaka niwoko na olapa ni wuuramela miluku sikina hoye hoye nsuwa, mweeri naari ithenyeeri sa wiirimu," 
Deuteronomy17:4 vano mwasuwela yeeyo, mwaasaasere yaari ettiitthu. Yakhala ettitthu, enaakhuleliwa weera yoopakiwa ehintthuneya oYixrayeli," 
Deuteronomy17:5 munronghe mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana owo opanke yoonanara eyo wa mulako wa esidadaanyu ni mumvonye maluku mpaka okhwa. 
Deuteronomy17:6 Athorihiweke yaakhulenleene anamoona eeli hoye hoye araru ahikhaleke mmoha paahi. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Eniipacere ovonya maluku ti matata a anamoona awo emvonyaka namathorihiwa ni vahoolowaya a muloko wootheene. Mmalihe yoonanara variyariwanyu. 
Deuteronomy17:8 Vanonto, nakhumelela nthoriho musidadenimwanyu, mulattu woowiiva hoye hoye owanawaniwa naari mulattu mukina muhingweraanyu wuuluma, muroweke vanipuroni Yave Mulukwaanyu aneeraawe athanle." 
Deuteronomy17:9 Murowe wa asaserdoti* ari aLeevi ni wa mphuki anaakhale mutokweene ehuhuweene yeeyo. Mwaaleele mulattu ni awosa anoohima emalihero. 
Deuteronomy17:10 Mutthareke olakela awo eneeraaya yuulume vanipuroni Yave aneeraawe athanle. Mpake nnenesene sootheene awo eneeraaya yoolamuleleni. 
Deuteronomy17:11 Mutthareke ikano anooxuttihaayani ni olakelawaya. Muhihapuweru wa seiyo. 
Deuteronomy17:12 Yoowo aniixoone ahaapwatthaka aphuki hoye hoye asaserdoti* eniimurumeeleke Yave Mulukwaanyu iiviweke. Mmalihe yoonanara variyariwanyu. 
Deuteronomy17:13 Hiiho muloko wootheene onimwiiwa ni, woovaka, khoonghokoleelatho ovaanya." 
Deuteronomy17:14 Mwaavolowaka mweelaponi Yave Mulukwaanyu aneeraawe oovaheeni, munakuxa yeeyo mwiitekihakawo ni nyuwo mweera: “Nimukhalihe mwene oonilamula ntoko sirinaaya miloko sootheene naattamannaahuno,”" 
Deuteronomy17:15 mwiipasoope woomvara mwene aneeraawe amuthanle Yave Mulukwaanyu. Muhimvare omwene namarwa ahikhanle muYixrayeli – owo akhaleke a eriyari ya axunneiye aYixrayeli. 
Deuteronomy17:16 Mwene owo ahikhalanekeru ikavalu* sincipale naari ahihokoloxere muloko wExipitu weera akhaleno ikavalu* sincipale, niwoko Yave Mulukwaanyu aaweerelani: “Muhikuxeretho ephiroweene yeele.”" 
Deuteronomy17:17 Owo ahaatheleke asithiyana ancipale weera murimaawe ohihapuxiwe. Ahithukumanyihetho eparatha* hoye hoye eyuuma yoorikaxa yincipale. 
Deuteronomy17:18 Aakilaathelaka ehice ya emwene, alamuleleke opakiwa elivuru ya malamulo yoovarelaawe muteko, eweheriwaka yoopacera enkosoopiwa ni asaserdoti* aLeevi." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Elivuru eyo eettaneke ni asomeke yeeyo mahuku ootheene a okumaawe weera axuttere omuttittimiha Yave Mulukwaawe iiwelelaka nnenesene malamulo ala ni ikano iya sootheene. 
Deuteronomy17:20 Ahiikuxerereke aapwahaka axunneiye aYixrayeli weera ahihapuweru. Hiiho owo ni anamukalampaawe eniilamule mahuku mancipale moomwenenimwawe muYixrayeli. 
Deuteronomy18:1 Asaserdoti* ari aLeevi – vekhaikhai epuumba yootheene ya aLeevi – ehikhalane elapo naari yoohiyeriwa vamoha ni aYixrayeli akina. Awosa elameleke sooveleeleliwa Yave vayikho, niwoko eyo ti yoohiyeriwaaya." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Awosa kheekhalanoru yoohiyeriwa variyari wa axunnaya; Yave ti yoohiyeriwaaya, ntoko aaroromelinghaawe." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Vano muloko waamveleelaka mwaamombe hoye hoye ekhondoolo, asaserdoti* yaakheleleke wa aYixrayeli ootheene eniirowe opaka yooveleela, okhuma emombe mpaka akhalaru mwaamunama khakope, nandere ni nipwiipwi." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Mwaavahetho mpatta wa ohepha woopacera wa etrigu, eviinyu enyowani, makhura ni mapururu a ikhondoolosanyu soopacera ometthiwa." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Yave Mulukwaanyu aahaathanla yaawosa ni ekhapiraaya variyari wa ipuumba sootheene weera erumeeleke mwa Nsina na Yave wa mahuku ootheene. 
Deuteronomy18:6 muLeevi onkhala yakhalaru esidade ya aYixrayeli atthuna orowa wa nipuro Yave aneeraawe athanle," 
Deuteronomy18:7 owo arumeeleke mwa Nsina na Yave Mulukwaawe ntoko aLeevi akina anrumeelawo vamaithoni wa Yave. 
Deuteronomy18:8 Owo aakheleke mpattaawe ntoko aLeevi akina ahaalikelelaka musurukhu aneeraawe aakheleke soothumiha sooreela sa emusaawe. 
Deuteronomy18:9 Mwaavolowaka mweelaponi Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni, muhaasaase otakiha itthu sa ohuureya simpakaaya miloko sa mwemmo." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Muhitthunihere variyariwanyu okhala mutthu anaamuhise mwanawe mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana ntoko yooveleela; onaasa ihako hoye hoye ompaka macitta; malavi, okhwiri," 
Deuteronomy18:11 naari madyiini, onuuluma mwa nsina na minepa, onkoha minepa hoye hoye anamakhwa." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Ootheene ampaka itthusene seiyo ti sa mwiikho wa Yave. Owo onoomola miloko iyo ohoolowanyu niwoko na miteko soonanara iyo. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Mukhale oohikhalano nthowa vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Deuteronomy18:14 Miloko nyuwo muneeraanyu moomole singwiiwelela anamacitta ni anahako. Vaheera mwaha wa nyuwo – Yave Mulukwaanyu khootthuniherani opaka seiyo. 
Deuteronomy18:15 Yave Mulukwaanyu onookhaliherani mprofeeti ntoko miyo oothanliwa variyari wa axunninyu. Mmwiiwelele yoowo. 
Deuteronomy18:16 Ti yeeyo mwaamvekenlaanyu Yave Mulukwaanyu oHorebi nihuku nenenenne na muthukumano mweenraanyu: “Khanintthuna wiiwa nsu na Yave Mulukwaahu naari woonatho mooro mutokotoko ola weera nihikhwe.” 
Deuteronomy18:17 Vano Yave aakeerela: “Awosa khaanootha. 
Deuteronomy18:18 Kinimwaavahasa mprofeeti ntoko nyuwo variyari wa axunnaya kihelaka maswaaka mmwaanomwawe ni owo onimwaathalihera sootheene kineeraaka kimulamulele. 
Deuteronomy18:19 Yoowo aneera aahiiwelele maswaaka yaawo aneeraawe uulume mprofeeti mwa Nsinanaka, Miyo muneenaaka kinoomuthoriha." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Vaheera mprofeeti oneera weera onuuluma mwa Nsinanaka yakhalaru etthu Miyo kihimulamulenlaaka wuuluma, hoye hoye mprofeeti onuuluma mwaha wa miluku sikina, iiviweke.”" 
Deuteronomy18:21 Onoowereya wiixeerela: “Nnisuwele hai mutthenga ohinrweela wa Yave?” 
Deuteronomy18:22 Yeeyo aneeraawe uulume mprofeeti mwa Nsina na Yave yaahikhumelela hoye hoye yaahikwaniheriwa, mutthenga owo khuulumme Yave. Ti masu a mprofeeti owo paahi. Muhimoove." 
Deuteronomy19:1 Yave Mulukwaanyu aaphwataka miloko sa elapweene yeeyo onoovahaaweni, ni nyuwosa moomolaka munaakamela mmasidadenimwaya ni impasaya," 
Deuteronomy19:2 vano muthanle isidade tthaaru sootthawelamo siri eriyari ya elapo Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni weera mwakuxe. 
Deuteronomy19:3 Muhule misewe sinrowawo ni mukawanyihe mipatta miraru elapo Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni ntoko yoohiyeriwa weera yoowo anaamwiive mutthu atthawelekemo. 
Deuteronomy19:4 Ti ala meerelo mwaha wa mulopwana anaamwiive mukina anaatthawelewo iivuluxaka: yoowo anaamwiive mukhwaawe mweerisani, woohilakela, yahiittanneene." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Ntoko ha: mulopwana mmoha arowa ni muthamwenaawe othikila ikhuuni moothakoni, ni, athikilaka hiihaale epaso yamukhuleela mukhwaawe, anakhwa, owo atthaweleke esidade emoha emoha ya seiyo weera iivuluxe." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Ohiyanawaya nakukuttula ohononeliwe aahimuttharelele oonyoonyiweene mpaka omuphwanya warakamaxawo aaheereke, omwiiva, waaroohiphwanelaru, niwoko khiittanne ni mukhwaawe." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Tivawo koolamulenlaakani othanla isidade tthaaru sootthawela. 
Deuteronomy19:8 Yave Mulukwaanyu aandyeerera elapwaanyu ntoko aaroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo makholowaanyu oovahakani elapo yootheene aaroromelinghaawe yaawosa," 
Deuteronomy19:9 vano muthanletho isidade tthaaru. Eyo eniyereiye nyuwosa mwiiwelela oororomeleyeene malamulo ala kinoolamulelaakani olelo, eyo tiiyo omusivela Yave Mulukwaanyu ni weetta mphironimwawe mahuku ootheene." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Mpake yeeyo weera ehivuuviheriwe ephome yoohinthowa mweelaponimwanyu, mwa yeeyo Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni ntoko yoohiyeriwa ni weera muhikhalane nthowa na oyeehiwa wa ephome." 
Deuteronomy19:11 Wa soothesene, mukina amusoonda mukhwaawe, amwiipithelaka mphironi, anamukarawela mpaka omwiiva ni atthawela musidade emoha emoha ya seiyo," 
Deuteronomy19:12 asitokweene a esidadaawe elamuleleke oroihiwa musidade otthawenlaawemo ni emwinnyerereke mmatatani mwa nakukuttula ohononeliwe weera akhwe. 
Deuteronomy19:13 Muhimmorele ikharari. Mmalihe variyari wa aYixrayeli nthowa noomwiiva mukina woohikhalano nthowa weera sootheene siweetteleni nnenesene. 
Deuteronomy19:14 Muhiceendye ikanyero sa nyiinano sa mwaattamwanaanyu yiikaathiyaaya makholowaanyu mwa yoohiyeriwaanyu mweelaponi Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni weera mwakuxe. 
Deuteronomy19:15 Khoonkwana omuthorihela mutthu ni namoona mmoha yakhalaru yoonanara yootakhala naari yoottheka. Yoowoothera ontthuneya waakhuleliwa ni ekhavihero ya anamoona eeli hoye hoye araru. 
Deuteronomy19:16 Akhala namoona oowootha amoothera mukhwaawe yakhalaru yoonanara," 
Deuteronomy19:17 asilopwana eeli awo yiixoonihere vamaithoni wa Yave ohoolo wa asaserdoti* ni aphuki eniirumeele ehuhuweene yeeyo. 
Deuteronomy19:18 Aphuki yaasaasereke mulattu owo, ni, waakhuleliwa weera namoothera ohootha amootheraka mukhwaawe," 
Deuteronomy19:19 vano munttaruxele yeeyo aamvaanelenlaawe munneiye. Mmalihe yoonanara variyariwanyu. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Atthu akinaawo yasuwela yeeyo animoova, kheerwatho epakeya etthu siiyeela eriyaraanyu." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Muhimmorele ikharari – mulivanyihe okumi ni okumi; niitho nniitho; niino nniino; ntata ni ntata; nnaawo ni nnaawo. 
Deuteronomy20:1 Mwarowa waawanano amwiittanaanyu ni moona ikavalu*, ikaaro sa ikavalu* ni anakhotto oowaattaxa waapwaha awinyu, muhiwoove, niwoko Yave Mulukwaanyu ookhumihaleni wExipitu, onookhala ni nyuwosa." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Nyuwosa yaaphiyeraka ehuhu yoowana, musaserdoti* aroweke ohoolo wa anakhotto ni aweereleke:" 
Deuteronomy20:3 “Mwiiwe aYixrayeli, olelo munimwaawanano amwiittanaanyu. Muhiporore hata muhoove hoye hoye muhaatteenguwe naari muhiwoovase." 
Deuteronomy20:4 Yave Mulukwaanyu onimoohoolasani oowanelasakani mwa amwiittanaanyu weera oowinihaseni.” 
Deuteronomy20:5 Asitokweene eweereleke anakhotto: “Akhala mukina otenke empaawe ahinavolowa, owo ahokoleeleke owannyawe weera ahikhwele okhottoni empaawe eyo avolowaka mukina." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Akhala mukina ophatteiye ematta ya iwuuva* ahinaca, owo ahokoleeleke owannyawe weera ahikhwele okhottoni iwuuvasawe siciwaka ni mukina." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Akhala mukina uurale ahinavolowa othela, owo ahokoleeleke owannyawe weera ahikhwele okhottoni mwaariye atheliwaka ni mukina.”" 
Deuteronomy20:8 Vanonto, asitokweene a anakhotto yaandyeerereke: “Akhala mukina onoova ahilipaka murima, owo ahokoleeleke owannyawe weera axunneiye aYixrayeli ehipoporasetho.”" 
Deuteronomy20:9 Asitokweene emalihaleene wuuluma ni anakhotto, yaathanleke ahooleli oowaalamulela anakhotto." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Nyuwosa mwaarowaka owanano esidade, mwaarumihele toko mutthenga wa murettele." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Amaki awo yaakhulela ehulaka maselaaya, anookhala ipotthasanyu yoovarelasakani miteko sooviha." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Vaheera awo yakhootta mutthenga wa murettele, enoowananani, vano mwarice esidade." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Yave Mulukwaanyu aawinnyererakani mmatatanimwanyu, ngwiivakasemo asilopwana ootheene ni ekatana." 
Deuteronomy20:14 Mwaha wa asithiyana, anamwane, mihuwo ni itthu sootheene sikina musidadeni – mukuxeke ntoko soohuhula. Mukhalanaseke seiyo muneeraanyu mwaahuhule amwiittanaanyu mvahiwaanyu ni Yave Mulukwaanyu." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Ti hiiho ontthuneyaaya opakela isidade sootheene soorakamela sihikhanle sa miloko mwaattamannaanyu. 
Deuteronomy20:16 Vaheera mmasidadeni mwa miloko Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni ntoko yoohiyeriwa mwiive sootheene sirino okumi. 
Deuteronomy20:17 Mwaaphwate aHiti, awAmori, aKanaani, aPerizi, aHivi ni aYebusi, ntoko Yave Mulukwaanyu oolamulenlaaweni." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Mwaahaaphwata, animooxuttihani opaka itthu soonanara sootheene ampakaaya elapaka milukusaya ni nyuwo munoomutthekela Yave Mulukwaanyu." 
Deuteronomy20:19 Mwaaricaka esidade mweehuhuni yoowaatta, muwananakano weera mukuxe, muhiphwate nyirisaya muuhaka ni epaso, niwoko nyuwosa munimooca soowiimasaya. Muhuuhe niwoko iyo khasihiyono atthu wooweera nyuwosa murice." 
Deuteronomy20:20 Muuheke nyiri musuwenlaanyu weera khasiniima sihivareleyaka muteko woowookuttelelani mpaka ophwateya esidade mungwananaanyuno. 
Deuteronomy21:1 Aphwanyiwa mutthu ookhweene ntuphini mwa elapweene yeeyo Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni weera mukuxe ahisuweliwaka omwiivale," 
Deuteronomy21:2 asitokweenaanyu ni aphukaanyu erowekewo weera yaphime orakama weenraaya okhuma vamuttemboni mpaka mmasidadeni soowaattamana. 
Deuteronomy21:3 Vano asitokweene a esidade eneera ekhuveelaxe muttembo emukuxeke mwaamombe ohitonke ovareliwa muteko naari ohiteexihiwe murindi. 
Deuteronomy21:4 Vahoolowaya emurongheke vareyareyani ohinalimmwewo naari ohinaaliwewo ni nraayawo nxaapa antthimakaayawo maahi. Nyuwosa mwakhumuleke exiko ya mwaamombe. 
Deuteronomy21:5 Hiiho asaserdoti* a ekhapira ya Leevi, yaphiyeke, niwoko Yave Mulukwaanyu aathanlenle ohoolela ni ovaha mareeliho mwa Nsina na Yave ni oreherera milattu sootheene sa ivilamuhano ni mapuhero." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Vahoolowaya asitokweene ootheene a esidade yaattamelanxe muttembo enyaweleke wa mwaamombeni mwa yoowo okhumuleliwe exiko vareyareyani 
Deuteronomy21:7 yeeraka: “Matataahu khaamwiivale ola naari maithwaahu khaamoonne opanke yeela. 
Deuteronomy21:8 Ii! Yave, mwaakhelele wiiraana wu wa mulokwaanyu aYixrayeli mwa yaawosa ngwooponlaanyu ni muhithorihe mulokwaanyu niwoko na okhwa wa mulopwana oohikhalano nthowa.” Hiiho nthowa na okhwa nnooleveleliwa." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Mooteene yoowo nyeenyuweenesa munimwiimalihera nthowa noomwiiva mukina oohikhalano nthowa mweenre mpakaka yeeyo eri yooreera vamaithoni wa Muluku. 
Deuteronomy21:10 Nyuwosa mwaawananaka amwiittanaanyu Yave Mulukwaanyu anawinnyerera mmatatanimwanyu munaatthukasa," 
Deuteronomy21:11 mmoha a nyuwosa anamoona muthiyana ooreeraxa ootthukiwa anamusivela, amutheleke." 
Deuteronomy21:12 Amurowaneke owannyawe, ammettheke mayihi ni amutherekeleke mankharu," 
Deuteronomy21:13 ni aruleke ikuwo aavaraniwaawe. Aamalihakaru owiinanela atithwawe ni amayawe akhalaka owannyawe wa mweereene owo, vahoolowaya munroweleke ni owo akhaleke mwaarinyu ni nyuwo mukhaleke aiyawe." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Owo aahinsivela, amuhiyeke arowaka ontthunaawe. Muhimuthumihe hoye hoye muhimpake epottha, niwoko mulopwana owo oomveiha." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Mulopwana mmoha awaatteya asithiyana eeli anamukupali mmoha a yaawo, ni ooweeli anaayarano anamwane, ntthaara nakhala na muthiyana ohinimukupalaawe," 
Deuteronomy21:16 vano mulopwana owo aarehererelaka yoohiyeriwa anamwanaawe, ahimvaheke soophwanela sa ntthaara mwaana a muthiyana ookhupaleya, mwaana a muthiyana ohinimukupalaawe vekhaikhai akhala ntthaara." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Owo attittimihereleke ntthaara na muthiyana ohinimukupalaawe, amvahaka iphura sa sooreelasawe sootheene. Mwaana owo ti eneneero yoopacera ya ikuru sa atithawe. Soophwanela sa ontthaara ti sawawe." 
Deuteronomy21:18 Mulopwana akhalano mwaana mulopwana oottiyamaaru khaleeleya, ahiwiiwelelaka atithawe ni amayawe yaamulakaka," 
Deuteronomy21:19 atithawe ni amayawe emuroiheke wa ahooleli a muloko a vamulako wa esidadaawe. 
Deuteronomy21:20 Awo eweereleke ahooleli: “Mwanihu mulopwana ola ti oottiyamaaru. Khaleeleya, khaniiwaru nsunahu; ori oohuureya ni namuhapaliwa.”" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Vano asilopwana ootheene a esidadaawe emvonyeke maluku mpaka okhwa. Mmalihe yoonanara ela variyariwanyu. aYixrayeli ootheene anoosuwela yeeyo ni animoova. 
Deuteronomy21:22 Mulopwana mmoha athoriheliwa okhwa niwoko na wiiva, anaphwanela wiiviwa wa otthukeleliwa mmwirini," 
Deuteronomy21:23 muhihiye mutembwaawe otthukeleliweene ohiyu wootheene. Muvithe nihuku nenenenno, niwoko yoowo onthomeiwa mmwirini ti oolaphiwa ni Muluku. Muhivalihe elapo Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni ntoko yoohiyeriwa." 
Deuteronomy22:1 Mwaphwanya emombe hoye hoye ekhondoolo ya munninyu eriheiyeene, mpwatthe muupuwelaka omuronghela muneene." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Munna owo aahikhala vakhiviruwanyu hoye hoye mwaahimusuwela, mukuxe eyo muroweno owannyinyu, mwiikaathi munikhoolani mpaka aneeraawe arwe munninyu aasaasaka. Vano mmwinnyerere." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Mpake mooteene yoowo mwamphwanya buuru, mukaandyo naari yakhalaru etthu eriheiye ya munninyu. Mpwattheke." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Nyuwosa mwamoona buuru hoye hoye emombe ya munninyu emorenleene mphironi, mpwattheke. Mukhavihere weemela." 
Deuteronomy22:5 Muthiyana ahiware soowara sa elopwana naari mulopwana sa ethiyana, niwoko Yave Mulukwaanyu onimuthanya yoole ompaka yeeyo." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Mwavira eraayawo epuuru ya mwaapalame, mmwirini hoye hoye vathi, ni naangolo aapuramenleene axaanaawe hoye hoye moocaawe, muhimwaavule ni axaaneene." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Ngwaavule axaana, mene munghiyeke naangolo arowaka weera sootheene siweetteleni nnenesene ni owaatteleni okumi." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Mwaatekaka empa enyowani, mutekelele mukhwipi wa nipatho weera muhiruuhele nthowa vaatewanyu wooyeeheya ephome akhala mukina anaamore vanipathoni." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Muhaale mmattamwanyu mwa iwuuva* moota miili wa mmiso. Mwaala, soohepha ni soowiima sa emattaanyu ya iwuuva* sinoovaliheya." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Muhittipure ni emombe elopwana ni buuru soopiili vamoha. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Muhiware soowara sa mapururu a ikhondoolo ootakansiwa ni nliinya ekuwo emoharu yeeyo. 
Deuteronomy22:12 Muhele icikwaitti mmaloothoni maxexe a yoowiikhuneelaanyu. 
Deuteronomy22:13 Mulopwana athela ni akonneene ni muthiyana aahimutthuna," 
Deuteronomy22:14 amuulumelaka soonanara, amwaaluxaka eeraka: “Koomuthela muthiyana ola, mene kimukonanakaru, kohoonelela weera aari oohiikosoopa.”" 
Deuteronomy22:15 Mwa yeeyo atithawe ni amayawe muthiyana owo yaarongheleke asitokweene a vamulako wa esidade eneneero enaakhulela wiikosoopawawe. 
Deuteronomy22:16 Tiithi a muthiyana owo aweereleke ahooleli: “Mulopwana ola koomutheliha mwanaka, mene khanimutthuna." 
Deuteronomy22:17 Vano owo oomwaaluxa eeraka: ‘Kohoonelela weera mwaninyu khiikosoompe.’ Vaheera eneneeroweene ela enaakhulela wiikosoopa wa mwanaka.” Vahoolowaya asinaangolowaawe ewoonihereke ahooleli a esidade eneneero ya waakhuleleya wa wiikosoopawawe. 
Deuteronomy22:18 Vanonto ahooleli emuttaruxeke mulopwana owo 
Deuteronomy22:19 ni nlivo na ixekeli* ncira sa eparatha* weera evahiwe atithawe muthiyana owo, niwoko mulopwana owo oomwaaluxa mwaamwali a muloko wa aYixrayeli. Muthiyana owo apwaherereke okhala mwaariye; mulopwana ahimwalanekeno wa mahuku ootheene." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Wa soothesene, yoowootheriwaawe yakhala ya ekhaikhai waakhuleleyaka weera mwaamwali owo khiikosoompe," 
Deuteronomy22:21 vano aronghiweke vamulako wa vaate wa atithawe ni asilopwana a esidadeene yeeyo emvonyaseke maluku mpaka okhwa. Owo oopaka yoowuuliha muru oYixrayeli wooraruwa areene vaate wa atithawe. Mmalihe yoonanara variyariwanyu. 
Deuteronomy22:22 Mulopwana aphwanyeriwa araruwaka ni mwaara a muneene, ooweeli awo yiiviweke. Mmalihe yoonanara variyariwanyu." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Esidade emoha aphwanyeriwa mulopwana araruwakano mwaamwali oowiikosoopa ootthomeriweene," 
Deuteronomy22:24 mwaaronghase ooweeli vamulako wa esidade eyo ni mwaavonyase maluku mpaka okhwa. Mwaamwali oowiikosoopa iiviweke niwoko aari musidadeni, mene khaakhuwenle avekelaka ekhavihero; ni mulopwana owo niwoko oomveihera mwaara a mukina. Mmalihe yoonanara variyariwanyu." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Vaheera mulopwana amphwanya mwaamwali oowiikosoopa ootthomeriwa ntuphini, anamvarela, mulopwana paahi iiviweke." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Muhimpakele etthu mwaamwali owo, niwoko owo kheewo opankaawe yoophwanela okhwa. Mulattu owo onlikana ni yoole onimutuphela mukhwaawe, anamwiiva." 
Deuteronomy22:27 Mulopwana owo omphwannye mwaamwali oowiikosoopa ntuphini ni hata owo aakhuwenle, khaawo yeera emukhavihere." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Mulopwana akumana ni mwaamwali oowiikosoopa oohitthomeriwa, anamukoniha, enaphwanyerasiwa," 
Deuteronomy22:29 owo aaliveke atithawe mwaamwali oowiikosoopa ixekeli* miloko mithanu sa eparatha* ni amutheleke mwaamwali, niwoko na omveiha. Ahimwalaneru." 
Deuteronomy22:30 Ahikhaleru mulopwana anaathele amwaara a atithawe niwoko onooveiha etthoko ya atithwawe. 
Deuteronomy23:1 Inoko* hoye hoye yaawo enanarihiwe elopwanaaya ehivolowe mmuthukumanoni mwa Yave. 
Deuteronomy23:2 Yoowo oraruwiwe ahivolowe mmuthukumanoni mwa Yave, ni ekhapiraaweene mpaka ekhapira yanaamuloko." 
Deuteronomy23:3 Ahikhaleru ngwAmoni naari mMowabe hata yakhalaru ekhapiraawe mpaka ekhapira yanaamuloko anaavolowe mmuthukumanoni mwa Yave. 
Deuteronomy23:4 Awosa khayoociceenreni ekuxaleene mphironi yooca ni maahi, mukhumaka wExipitu. Ohiyanawaya yaamuliva Bileyami, mwaana mulopwana a Beyori a oPetori wArami-Naharayimi weera oolaphaseni." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Wa soothesene, Yave Mulukwaanyu khwaamwaakhulenle Bileyami; nlapho naathatuwa nreelihonanyu niwoko na woosivelaniwawe Yave Mulukwaanyu." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Muhiiraaneno mookuminimwanyu wootheene. 
Deuteronomy23:7 Muhimuthanye ngwEdomi, niwoko ti munninyu. Muhimuthanyetho ngwExipitu, niwoko mwaari anamarwa mweelaponimwawe." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Anamwane a ekhapiwaraaya yanaararu evoloweke mmuthukumanoni mwa Yave. 
Deuteronomy23:9 Mukonenleene weera mwaawaneno amwiittanaanyu, musembeke itthu soohitteela sootheene." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Mmoha a anakhottwaanyu aahitteela niwoko na wiilohera, owo avenyeke mukonelingwe." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Vaheera, waaxekuwaka, owo iirapiheke ni, wiilaka, ahokoleeleke mukonelingwe." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Mwathipeke ecumbusi okhwipi wa mukonelingwe mwa weiwo muneeraanyu murowe weera mwiitthuuweke. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Khula nakhotto akhalaneke yoothipano ni aarowaka oxerexere mukonelingwe, athipekeno. Vahoolowaya uuheeleke mahiloka." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Vano Yave Mulukwaanyu onneetteetta mukonenlaanyumo weera awaakihereni awinnyererakani amwiittanaanyu. Munkonelaanyumo otteelekemo weera Owo ahoone etthu yoohitteela variyariwanyu oohiyakani. 
Deuteronomy23:15 Yootthawelelani epottha, muhihokoloxere wa apwiyaaya." 
Deuteronomy23:16 Muhiyeke ekhalaka ni nyuwo entthunelaaya yakhalaru esidade eneeraaya ethanle. Muhihasule. 
Deuteronomy23:17 Ahikhaleru muYixrayeli – mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana – anaathatuwe puuta mpaani mwa miluku sikina. 
Deuteronomy23:18 Muhironghe vaNipuroni Nootteela* na Yave Mulukwaanyu musurukhu woopuuta mulivelaka yoororomelihaanyu, niwoko eyo ti etthu ya mwiikho wa Yave Mulukwaanyu." 
Deuteronomy23:19 Muhikokoce oliviwa yoopwaha mukopeliwaanyu wa munninyu – okhalaka musurukhu, sooca naari sakhalaru itthu sikina sinoowineleyani." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Nyuwosa mwaakokoceke anamarwa oliva woopwahaxa, vaheera muhimukokoce munninyu muYixrayeli weera Yave Mulukwaanyu ooreelihaseni mwa sootheene muneeraanyu mpake mweelaponi mumvolowaanyumo weera mwakuxe." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Mwamuroromeliha etthu Yave Mulukwaanyu, muhipise okwanihera yeeyo niwoko vekhaikhai Owo onimoonyesererani okwanihera ni eyo eniithatuwe yootthekaanyu." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Wa soothesene, mwaahimuroromeliha etthu, khamukhalano nthowa." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Mukwanihere sootheene iyo muroromelihalaanyu, niwoko mpanke etthuna murima munroromelihaka Yave Mulukwaanyu." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Mwavolowa mmatta mwa iwuuva* ya mukhwiinyu, muceeke iwuuva* muntthunelaanyu, mene ehikhale muneeraanyu mukuxe." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Mwavolowa mmatta ya etrigu ya mukhwiinyu, mweere ottottattotta makala paahi, mene muhikuxere ecikwaakhwa weera mwaanyule etrigu ya mukhwiinyu." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Mulopwana amuthela muthiyana ahinamutthunatho niwoko noophwanya ohintthunaawe mookumini mwa muthiyana owo, mulopwana owo amvaheke ekaratta ya omwalana ni amoomoleke." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Vano, muthiyana owo avennyeene vaate wa mulopwana oopacera, onootthuniheriwa otheliwa ni mulopwana mukina." 
Deuteronomy24:3 Wakhala weera aiyawe anaaveeli khaanimutthuna emvahaka ekaratta ya omwalana enamoomola hoye hoye mulopwana owo anaaveeli akhwa," 
Deuteronomy24:4 vano opacenre omuhiya ahimutheletho niwoko wa yoowo muthiyana owo ti oohitteelaawe. Amuthela, eyo eniikhale ya mwiikho vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaanyu. Muhitthekihe elapo Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni ntoko yoohiyeriwa." 
Deuteronomy24:5 Mulopwana athela vaanaanoru, ahirumihiwe okhottoni naari ahilamuliwe ovara muteko mukina. Owo akhaleke owaani eyaakheene yeeyo ootaphuweene amuhakalalihaka mwaarawe." 
Deuteronomy24:6 Muhikuxe nxilo hoye hoye namaha ntoko yooweemexera, niwoko mummwaakha mpatta wa okumaawe." 
Deuteronomy24:7 Mukina aphwanyiwa amvaraka munneiye muYixrayeli weera angwinele amuthumihaka ntoko epottha, namavara owo iiviweke. Mmalihe yoonanara ela variyariwanyu." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Mwaha wa iretta sa makokho, mwiipasoope weera mpake nnenesene yeeyo asaserdoti* ari aLeevi eneeraaya yoolamuleleni. Mwiiwelele nnenesene yeeyo kaalamulenlaaka." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Muupuwelele yeeyo Yave Mulukwaanyu aampakenlaawe Miriyami mphironi mukhumaleene wExipitu. 
Deuteronomy24:10 Mmoha a nyuwo amooliha mukhwaawe yakhalaru etthu, ahivolowe mpaanimwawe iikuxeraka yooweemexera." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Mukhaleke vaate ni munghiyeke yoowo mmoolinghaanyu ooruuhelakani yooweemexera. 
Deuteronomy24:12 Mulopwana owo akhala oohaawa, yooweemexeraawe ehikone owannyinyu." 
Deuteronomy24:13 Munghokoloxere mukaandyowaawe wiilaka weera iikhuneeleno aakonaka. Hiiho owo onimoothamalani ni eyo eniikhale etthu yoowaakhuleleya wa Muluku. 
Deuteronomy24:14 Muhimuhasule namutekwaanyu oohaawaxa, akhalaka munninyu muYixrayeli hoye hoye namarwa onkhala mmasidadenimwanyu hoye hoye mulaponimwanyu." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Munlive khula nihuku ohinaaye wiila, niwoko owo namahaawa onkhalela yeeyo. Ohiyanawaya, owo onoomudyoonttelela Yave niwoko na nyuwo ni hiiho nyuwo munookhalano nthowa na yoottheka." 
Deuteronomy24:16 Muhiwiive asitiithi niwoko na soottheka sa anamwanaaya naari anamwane niwoko na soottheka sa atithaya. Khula mutthu iiviweke niwoko na sootthekasawe muneenaawe. 
Deuteronomy24:17 Muhivirikanyihe ekhaikhai mwaathorihaka anamarwa hoye hoye akwaasuni naari muhikuxe mukaandyo wa naamukhweli ntoko yooweemexera. 
Deuteronomy24:18 Muupuwelele weera mwaari ipottha wExipitu ni weera Yave Mulukwaanyu oowoopolaniwo. Tivawo kinoolamulelaakani opaka yeeyo. 
Deuteronomy24:19 Mwaahephaka munahiya ottuli ehara emoha, muhihokoleele okuxa. Munghiyere namarwa, mukwaasuni ni naamukhweli weera Yave Mulukwaanyu areelihe mitekosanyu sootheene." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Mwaapukunyaka soowiima sa makhura a sooliveira*, muhipukunye veeli. Singhala munghiyereke namarwa, mukwaasuni ni naamukhweli." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Mwaahephaka iwuuvasanyu, muhihokoleeletho. Singhala munghiyereke namarwa, mukwaasuni ni naamukhweli." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Muupuwelele weera mwaari ipottha wExipitu. Tivawo kinoolamulelaakani opaka yeeyo. 
Deuteronomy25:1 Atthu eeli yawanawana, mulattu owo erongheliweke alipa oowuuluma milattu. Vano aphuki awo elakele mulatthu engwehaka oohikhalano nthowa ni emuttaruxaka nanthowa." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Nanthowa aphwanela owaxuliwa, mphuki amulamulele weera iixaatalele ni awaxuliwe vamaithoniwawe moota ontthuneyaaya ongwaxula wa yoonanara opankaawe." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Wa soothesene, sihipwahe imaara miloko mixexe soowaxuliwa. Mwapwahiha, hiiho omuyeviha muYixrayeli mwaattuni." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Muhiphure eyano ya emombe enxila etrigu. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Axunna eeli yakhala vamoha ni mmoha a yaawo akhwa ahimuyanre mwaana mulopwana, naamukhwelaawe ahitheliwe ni emusi ekina. Munneiye mulipa oorimela ti anaamuthele, akwaniheraka onyesereriwa wa olamu." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Ntthaaranawe nittehiweke nsina na munneiye okhwiiye weera nsinanawe nihicipihiwe oYixrayeli. 
Deuteronomy25:7 Wa soothesene, mulopwana aahitthuna omuthela naamukhweli a munneiye, naamukhweli owo arowe wa ahooleli a vamulako wa esidade, aweereleke: “Munna a aiyaka onkhootta opwahereriha nsina na munneiye oYixrayeli. Khantthuna okikwaniherela onyesereriwa wa olamu.”" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Vano ahooleli a esidadaawe emwiitthaneke weera emukohakohe. Owo apwaherera eeraka: “Nkintthuna omuthela,”" 
Deuteronomy25:9 naamukhweli a munneiye amwaattameleke vamaithoni wa ahooleli, amurule ekwakwattaawe emoha, amusenyeleke owiithowawe, eeraka: “Ti ompakiwaawe hiiha mulopwana ohintthuna opwahereriha ekhapira ya munneiye.”" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Vano okhuma vaavaale nihimo na mulopwana owo nniitthaniwa oYixrayeli “Emusi ya namwetto mmoha.” 
Deuteronomy25:11 Asilopwana eeli yaawana ni mwaara a mmoha a yaawosa arowa omwaakiha iyawe mwa yoowo ongwananaaweno, anamvara mukhanukani," 
Deuteronomy25:12 athikiliweke ntatanawe. Muhimmorele ikharari. 
Deuteronomy25:13 Muhiphime ni soolemela piili soovirikana – emoha yooveruwa ni ekina yoolemelaxa. 
Deuteronomy25:14 Sihikhale mpaanimwanyu miphimo, wunnuwawaya woovirikana – mmoha mukhaani ni mukina mutokweene." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Soolemelasanyu ni miphimosanyu sikhaleke sa ekhaikhai ni sa nnene weera mukhalase ehuhu yincipale mweelaponi Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni. 
Deuteronomy25:16 Yave Mulukwaanyu onimuthanya khula mutthu ompaka itthusene seiyo, eyo tiiyo khula mutthu onlokhottha munakosoni." 
Deuteronomy25:17 Muupuwelele yeeyo yoopakenlaayani awAmaleki murwaaka wExipitu. 
Deuteronomy25:18 Mwaakhulumuwansaanyu ooveleene, awo yaahoottharani ottuliwanyu yaawananaka ookhulumuwa. Awo khayaamoomve Muluku." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Yave Mulukwaanyu aawiitthuuwihakani wa amwiittanaanyu ootheene a mukhwipimwanyu mweelaponi onoovahaaweni weera mwakuxe ntoko yoohiyeriwa, munoomaliha wuupuweleliwa wa awAmaleki mweelaponi yootheene. Muhittiwale!" 
Deuteronomy26:1 Mwaavolowaka elapo Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni ntoko yoohiyeriwa ni munakuxa mwiitekihakawo," 
Deuteronomy26:2 mwarukule soowiima soopacera sikina sikina sootheene muneeraanyu mwaruwere mweelaponi Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni ni mwaheleke sootheene mumpaparani. Vahoolowaya mwarowaseke vanipuroni Yave Mulukwaanyu aneeraawe athanle ntoko woomakawo Nsinanawe. 
Deuteronomy26:3 Mwamweerele musaserdoti* anaarumeele ehuhuweene yeeyo: “Miyo kinghima olelo vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaanyu weera kohoorwa elapo Yave aaroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo makholowaahu weera aannivaha.” 
Deuteronomy26:4 Musaserdoti* awaakhelelekeni mpapara ikaathiki ohoolo wa altaari* a Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Deuteronomy26:5 Vano mweeraseke vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaanyu: “Atithaka yaari ngwArami ooweetteetta, enarowa wExipitu ni atthu akina vakhaani, enamakawo ethatuwaka muloko mutokotoko, woolipaxa ni woowaattaxa." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Wa soothesene, awExipitu yaanipakela yoonanara enihasulaka ni enivarihaka miteko soovihaxa." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Vano naamukhuwelelatho Yave, Muluku a makholowaahu ni Owo aahiiwa maswaahu anoona ohasuwawahu, mitekosahu soovihaxa ni ohaawawahu." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Tivawo Yave aanikhumihalaawe wExipitu ni ntata nooweraxa ni moono woolipaxa apakaka miteko soowoopihaxa ni ineneero sootikhiniheyaxa. 
Deuteronomy26:9 Ooniruuha nipuro nna anivahaka elapo ela, elapo yoosareya mukaka ni oravo." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Vanonto miyo kinruuha soowiima soopacera sa vathi Nyuwo Yave mukivanghaanyu.” Mwiikaathi mpapara vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaanyu ni mwamukokhorele. 
Deuteronomy26:11 Nyuwo, aLeevi ni anamarwa variyariwanyu muhakalalele itthu sooreera sootheene Yave Mulukwaanyu oovanghaaweni nyuwo ni emusaanyu." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Mwaavahaka mpatta wanaamuloko wa soothesene, munruweraanyu khula eyaakha yanaararu, eyo tiiyo eyaakha ya sanaamuloko, mmwinnyerereke muLeevi, namarwa, mukwaasuni ni naamukhweli weera awo ecaase mmasidadenimwanyu mpaka ovona." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Vahoolowaya mwamweerele Yave Mulukwaanyu: “Kookuxa owannyaka mpatta wootteeliheriwa kinamvaha muLeevi, namarwa, mukwaasuni ni naamukhweli kittharihaka sootheene mukilamulenlaanyu. Kohiiwelela malamulowaanyu kihittiwalaka hata nimoha a yaawo."
