Deuteronomy26:14 Nkiciiyeru mpatta wootteeliheriwa kiinanelaka naari nkivenxaleru kireene oohitteela hata nkaavangheru anamakhwa ntoko sooveleela. Koomwiiwelela Yave Mulukwaaka; koopaka sootheene mukilamulenlaanyu. 
Deuteronomy26:15 Wiirimu iwo, ngwehe vaNipuroniwanyu Nootteela* ni mureelihe mulokwaanyu aYixrayeli ni elapo munivanghaanyu ntoko mwaaroromelinghaanyu ni nlipelo makholowaahu, elapo yoosareya mukaka ni oravo.”" 
Deuteronomy26:16 Yave Mulukwaanyu onoolamulelani olelo wiiwelela ikano ni malamulo ala; mutthareke nnenesene ni murimaanyu ni okumaahu wootheene. 
Deuteronomy26:17 Nyuwosa olelo mohiiwa weera Yave ti Mulukwaanyu ni weera mmweettase mphironimwawe mwiiwelelaka ikano, malamulo ni soorumasawe ni weera munoomwiiwelela." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Olelo Yave oohimatho weera nyuwo ti mulokwaawe xaxaxa ntoko Owo aaroromelinghaawe ni weera nyuwosa mwiiwelelaseke malamulowaawe ootheene. 
Deuteronomy26:19 Owo oohima weera onimoowelihani moovuwani epiili ni nttittimiho ntokotoko opwaha miloko sootheene opankaawe. Mmwikhale muloko wootteeliheriwa Yave Mulukwaanyu, ntoko aaroromelinghaawe." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Moisesi ni asitokweene a aYixrayeli aalamulela muloko: “Mwiiwelele malamulo ootheene kinoolamulelasaakani olelo: 
Deuteronomy27:2 Mwaamulapuwaka Yordanu weera mwavolowe mweelaponi Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni, mweemexe maluku matokotoko ni mwattikitthele yootteela." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Mwalepemo masu ootheene a Nlamulo nna munlapungweene mooloko weera mwavolowe mweelaponi Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni, elapo yoosareya mukaka ni oravo, ntoko oororomelinghaaweni Yave Muluku a makholowaanyu." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Munlapungweene Yordanu, mweemexe maluku awo vamwaako Ebali ntoko kinoolamulelaakani olelo ni mwattikitthele yootteela." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Mwamutekelewo Yave Mulukwaanyu altaari* a maluku oohiratteliwa. 
Deuteronomy27:6 Mwaateke altaari* a Yave Mulukwaanyu ni maluku mapurukuma ni vasuluwaya mwampakele sooveleela soohisa Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Deuteronomy27:7 Mwapakewotho sooveleelela murettele mucaaka ni muhakalalaka vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Deuteronomy27:8 Mwalepemo woohitikinsa mmalukuni awo masu ootheene a Nlamulo nna.” 
Deuteronomy27:9 Vano Moisesi ni asaserdoti* ari aLeevi aaweerela aYixrayeli ootheene: “Ii! aYixrayeli, mmaale ni mwiiwe! Nyuwosa moothatuwa vano muloko wa Yave Mulukwaanyu." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Mmwiiwelele Yave Mulukwaanyu ni mutthareke malamulowaawe ni ikanosawe kinoovahaakani olelo.” 
Deuteronomy27:11 Nihuku nenenenne Moisesi aalamulela muloko: 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Munlapungweene Yordanu, ipuumba sineera sakhale vamwaako Gerizimi weera sireelihe muloko ti iya: Simeyoni, Leevi, Yuda, Isakari, Yoseefe ni Benyamini." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Ipuumba sineera sakhale vamwaako Ebali weera sihime malapho ti iya: Rubeni, Gadi, Axeri, Zebuluni, Dani ni Nafitali." 
Deuteronomy27:14 aLeevi yaleeleke muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli ekhuwelaxaka: 
Deuteronomy27:15 “Oolaphiwa ti yoowo anaapake ecaambulo hoye hoye muluku oolokottha iipithihaka -– etthu yoopakiwa ni aratti. Ti sa mwiikho vamaithoni wa Yave.” Vano muloko wootheene weereke: “Ame!*” 
Deuteronomy27:16 “Oolaphiwa ti yoowo anaaveihe atithawe ni amayawe.” Vano muloko wootheene weereke: “Ame!*” 
Deuteronomy27:17 “Oolaphiwa ti yoowo anaaceendye ikanyero sa mwiinano wa mukhwaawe.” Vano muloko wootheene weereke: “Ame!*” 
Deuteronomy27:18 “Oolaphiwe ti yoowo anaamuhapuxe oohoona.” Vano muloko wootheene weereke: “Ame!*” 
Deuteronomy27:19 “Oolaphiwa ti yoowo anaamukhoottele ekhaikhai namarwa, mukwaasuni hoye hoye naamukhweli.” Vano muloko wootheene weereke: “Ame!*”" 
Deuteronomy27:20 “Oolaphiwa ti yoowo anaakoneno amwaaraya atithawe, niwoko omveiha ekaama ya atithawe.” Vano muloko wootheene weereke: “Ame!*”" 
Deuteronomy27:21 “Oolaphiwa ti yoowo anaamuraruxe akhalaru mwaamunama.” Vano muloko wootheene weereke: “Ame!*” 
Deuteronomy27:22 “Oolaphiwa ti yoowo anaamukoneno murokoriye a wuutiithini hoye hoye a wuumaayini.” Vano muloko wootheene weereke: “Ame!*” 
Deuteronomy27:23 “Oolaphiwa ti yoowo anaakoneno apwiyamwaanaawe.” Vano muloko wootheene weereke: “Ame!*” 
Deuteronomy27:24 “Oolaphiwa ti yoowo anaamwiive mukhwaawe wiiphiini.” Vano muloko wootheene weereke: “Ame!*” 
Deuteronomy27:25 “Oolaphiwa ti yoowo anaakhulele oliviwa wa wiiviwa oohinthowa.” Vano muloko wootheene weereke: “Ame!*” 
Deuteronomy27:26 “Oolaphiwa ti yoowo anaaheettele masu a Nlamulo nna.” Vano muloko wootheene weereke: “Ame!*” 
Deuteronomy28:1 Nyuwosa mwamwiiwelela oororomeleyeene Yave Mulukwaanyu muttharaka malamulo ootheene kinoovahakani olelo, Owo onimoowelihaxani opwaha miloko sootheene sa elapo ya vathi." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Mwamwiiwelela Yave Mulukwaanyu, mareeliho ootheene awo animoorweelasani yoohoolelakani:" 
Deuteronomy28:3 Munooreelihiwa musidadeni ni mmatta. 
Deuteronomy28:4 Anamwaniinyu eniireelihiwe, hiihotho soohepha sa imattasanyu ni sikhaani sa mihuwosanyu – axaana a imombesanyu ni iputtiputthi sa ikhondoolosanyu." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Sinooreelihiwa mipaparasanyu ni muneetheyaanyumo etrigu. 
Deuteronomy28:6 Munooreelihiwa mwa sootheene muneeraanyu mpake. 
Deuteronomy28:7 Yave onimoowinelani mwa amwiittana eniyoowananeni. Awo eniyoorweelaseni mphironi, mene khula mutthu anaatthawele mpattaawe." 
Deuteronomy28:8 Yave onooreeliha matathaanyu ni sootheene muneeraanyu mpake. Owo onimooreelihani mweelaponi onoovahaaweni. 
Deuteronomy28:9 Yave onimookhalihani mulokwaawe wootteela, ntoko oororomelinghaaweni ni nlipelo, nyuwosa mwiiwelela malamulowaawe ni mwatthara ephirowaawe." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Vano miloko sootheene sa mulaponi nsoone weera nyuwo ti a Yave ni nseereke owoovani. 
Deuteronomy28:11 Owo onooweettiherelani nnene oovahakani anamwane, axaana a mihuwosanyu ni soohepha mweelaponi aaroromelinghaawe makholowaanyu woovahani." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Yave onoohula erimu, woothokororawo muhakhwaawe weera arumihele epula elapwaanyu mweehuhuni yootthuneya ni weera areelihe mitekosanyu sootheene. Nyuwosa munookoongoriha miloko sincipale ni kheewo muneeraanyu moolihase." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Mwiiwa nnenesene malamulo a Yave Mulukwaanyu kinoovahaakani olelo ni mwatthara yaawo, nyuwosa munookhala muru wa miloko ohikhanle ekholo; munookhala vasulu ohikhanle vathi." 
Deuteronomy28:14 Muhihapuweru nakhalaru nlamulo kinoovahaakani olelo muttharaka miluku sikina ni murumeelaka. 
Deuteronomy28:15 Wa soothesene, yuwosa mwaahimwiiwelela Yave Mulukwaanyu muhittharaka malamulowaawe ni ikanosawe sootheene kinoovahaakani olelo, vano malapho ootheene eniyoomoreleni ti ala:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 Munoolaphiwa musidadeni ni mmatta. 
Deuteronomy28:17 Sinoolaphiwa mipaparasanyu ni muneetheyaanyumo etrigu. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Anoolaphiwa anamwaniinyu, hiihotho soohephasanyu, axaana a imombesanyu ni a ikhondoolosanyu." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Munoolaphiwa mwa soothesene, muneeraanyu mpake." 
Deuteronomy28:20 Yave onimoorumihelasani malapho ohiiwanana ni opwapwelana mwa sootheene muneeraanyu mpake mpaka muneeraanyu mphwatiwe muhaawaka wootutuxereya niwoko na yoonanara mpankaanyu woomuttiwala Yoowo. 
Deuteronomy28:21 Yave onimoorumihelasani mahooxo a iretta mpaka ophwatiwawanyu mweelaponi muneeraanyu mwavolowe weera mwakuxe. 
Deuteronomy28:22 Yave onimoorumihelasani ikwerere soohonona, xipwexa soowiipaipa, ovihaxa mpaka ohaawela maahi iretta sa irooro, mwa seiyo sineera soohooxaseni mpaka ophwatiwawanyu." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Erimu eniikhale ebronze* vasuluwanyu ni etthaya ntoko eyuuma vathivanyu. 
Deuteronomy28:24 Yave onootatuxa epula ettuura ni ntthupi mmamattanimanyu, mwa nenno nneera nirweele wiirimu mpaka ophwatiwawanyu." 
Deuteronomy28:25 Yave onimoopakihani weera nyuwo ngwiniwe ni amwiittanaanyu. Nyuwosa mmwaarowele ephiro emoharu, mene mmwaamwareye, soottiihakani iphumu imwene sootheene sa elapo ya vathi." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Mittembosanyu nsikhale yooca ya apalame ootheene ni ya asinama ooluwa a ntuphini, ahikhalaka oowoomolela." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Yave onimoohooxani ni anamukoxo a wExipitu, anantthweenye, makwatta a ithuku ni ovele mwa yoowo oneera wookelani, ohinalameya." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Owo onimoohooxani ni anepa, ohoona ni ohicela muru." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Nyuwo mmweereke waapapela mukhwipi othana eriyari, ntoko oohoona areene mpiphini. Khasiweettelani nnene sootheene muneeraanyu mpake. Khula nihuku mmweereke ohooxiwa ni wiiyeriwa ahikhalaka oowootapuxani." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Nyuwo mmuure, mene muthiyana owo anaatheliwe ni mulopwana mukina. Mmwiteke empa, mene khamukhalamo. Mmwiphattheiye ematta ya iwuuva*, mene khamulawiha yoowiimaaya." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Emombaanyu elopwana eniyiiviwe vamaithoniwanyu, mene khamukhuuraru. Buurwaanyu mmwaakhiwe ni khamuhokoloxeriwa. Ikhondoolosanyu eniivahiwe amwiittananaanyu ahikhalaka ootapuxa." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana eniivahereriwe wa miloko sikina ni mmwikhulumuwase waaweherera khula nihuku muhiweraka waahokoloxa. 
Deuteronomy28:33 Muloko muhisuwenlaanyu onuuce sooruwera sa elapwaanyu ni mitekosanyu sootheene ni nyuwosa mmwihasuliwe woonanara mahuku ootheene. 
Deuteronomy28:34 Nsookhwiiheni anepa seiyo muneeraanyu moone. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Yave onimoovulalihani ni anantthweenye mmakuthani ni imettoni; makhwatta matokotoko oohivola erutthu yootheene. 
Deuteronomy28:36 Yave onimooronghani nyuwo ni mwene munthanlalaanyu woolamulani mmulokoni muhisuwenlaanyu nyuwo ni makholowaanyu. Weiwo mmwalape miluku sikina sipakiwe sa nyiri ni maluku. 
Deuteronomy28:37 Mmwikhale oottiyeya iphumu, ootthebwiwa ni ootheiwa wa miloko sootheene weiwo aneerawe oorongheni Yave." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Mmwaalaxe, mene mmwahephe vakhaanixa, niwoko nasope anaahaleele omaliha." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Mmwaphatteye imatta sa iwuuva* mulimelaka, mene khamuwura eviinyuwaaya naari khamuhepha iwuuvasaya niwoko nsiwenyiwe ni nyuungu." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Mmwikhalane nyiri sa sooliveira* mweelaponimwanyu moothemwene, mene nyuwosa asineenaanyu khamvarela muteko makhura niwoko soowiimasaya nsikhale miloloru." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Mmwaayare anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana, mene awo kheekhala ni nyuwo, niwoko eniitthukasiwe." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Nasope anaakamele nyirisanyu sootheene mphatteiyaanyu mulaponimwanyu. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Anamarwa ankhala variyariwanyu eniyoovikaneni khula emaara, mene nyuwosa mmwivikaneye." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Awo eniyookoongoriheni itthu, mene nyuwo khamwaakoongoriha. Awo ti eniikhale muru, nyuwosa mukhalaka ekholo." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Malapho ootheenaawo eniyoomorelaseni. Awosa eniyoottharelelaseni ni eniyoophwanyaseni mpaka muneeraanyu mphwatiwe, niwoko na ohimwiiwelela Yave Mulukwaanyu hata oheettela malamulo ni ikano oovanghaaweni." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Malapho awo eniikhale eneneero ni woopereriwawanyu nyuwo ni ekhapiraanyuweene ya muhoolo wa mahuku ootheene. 
Deuteronomy28:47 Mweenre muhimurumeelaka ni otthapa munghakalalelaka Yave Mulukwaanyu mweehuhuni saaweettelaayani nnene," 
Deuteronomy28:48 vano nyuwosa mmwaarumeelase amwiittana aneeraawe oorumiheleni Yave, nyuwosa mureene mutalani ni muntthonani, moosiwani ni oohaawaxa. Owo anaahele nivatta na eyuuma muxikomwanyu mpaka aneeraawe oophwateeni." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Yave anootannyereleni muloko wa ottai weera woorweelaseni ntoko xaaka atthunaka ovara; muloko muneeraanyu muhiiweke nuulumonaya. 
Deuteronomy28:50 Onuukhale muloko wooluwa ohinaattittimiha mamookwaaxa hata ohinaamorela ikharari amiravo. 
Deuteronomy28:51 Oniwaamalihe axaana a mihuwosanyu ni sooruwera sa mulaponimwanyu mpaka muneeraanyu mphwatiwe. Awosa khayoohiyeraniru etrigu, eviinyu enyowani hoye hoye makhura naari axaana a imombe hata iputtiputthi sa ikhondoolosanyu mpaka muneeraanyu muhononiwe." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Awosa eniirice isidade sootheene sa mweelaponimwanyu mpaka sineeraaya sipittuwe ixiri soorakamela soolipihiwa, mwa seiyo munroromenlaanyu. Eniirice isidade sootheene mweelaponimwanyu moothemwene Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Mmweereke waakhuura anamwaniinyu asilopwanya ni asithiyana Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni niwoko na ohaawa wa ohooxiwawanyu moota muneeraanyu mwaamelelihiwe ni amwiittanaanyu. 
Deuteronomy28:54 Hata ooleeleya variyariwanyu khammorela ikharari munneiye naari mwaariye onimusivelaawe hata anamwane eniihale ni okumi," 
Deuteronomy28:55 moota wooweera khaawo aneeraawe amvaheru enama ya anamwanaawe onkhuuraawe. Khayaahaleelaru niwoko na mahooxo amwiittanaanyu eneeraaya yootannyereni mpuwa mooriciwani isidadesanyu sootheene. 
Deuteronomy28:56 Muthiyana ooleeleya ni a emutthu variyariwanyu – yoowo aahaamutannyaru mukina – anaawehe aahovelaka aiyawe onaasivelaawe nitho anamwanaawe. 
Deuteronomy28:57 Aniipithihe nrupo na vantekhuni ni mwaana a mwiiruuni weera akhuure meekhaawe ehuhu ya oriciwa niwoko na mahooxo amwiittanaanyu eneeraaya etannyere mmasidadenimwanyu. 
Deuteronomy28:58 Nyuwosa mwaaheettela oororomeleyeene masu ootheene a Nlamulo nna alempwale mulivurunimu muhittittimihaka Nsina nna noovuwaxa ni noowoopiha, eyo tiiyo Yave Mulukwaanyu," 
Deuteronomy28:59 Owo onimoorumihelani mahooxo oowoopiha nyuwosa ni ekhapiraanyu, irisa soowoopihaxa soopwaherera ni iretta sootepaxa naweiwo." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Yave onimoorumihelasani iretta soowoopiha sootheene sa wExipitu ni iyo nsookeleeni. 
Deuteronomy28:61 Owo onimoorumihelanitho moota wootheene wa ikwerere ni irisa soohiyanahiyana sihilempwe mulivuruni ela ya Nlamulo mpaka muneeraanyu mphwatiwe. 
Deuteronomy28:62 Nyuwosa khalayi mwahaareere waatta ntoko ithenyeeri sa wiirimu mmwivukuwase muhalaka vakhaani niwoko na ohimwiiwelela Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Deuteronomy28:63 Mooteene yoowo waamusivenlaaya Yave aweettiherelakani nnene ni awaattihakani, onoomusivelatho woophwatani ni woohelani nthala. Nyuwosa mmwaakhiwe elapo muneeraanyu mwavolowe weera mwakuxe." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Vano Yave onimoomwaraxelani mmilokoni sa mipatta sootheene sa elapo. Weiwo mmwalape miluku sikina sipakiwe sa mwiri ni maluku mwa seiyo nyuwosa hata makholowaanyu mwahaasuwenlaanyu. 
Deuteronomy28:65 Mmilokoni mmo nyuwosa khammumulela hata khamphwanya nipuro noowiitthuuwiha inaawosanyu. Iwo Yave onimoovahani murima woohiweherera, maitho oosareya othanana ni okumi woovalaveleya." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Mahuku ootheene mmwikhale moohovelani, oothananaxeene othana ni ohiyu, muhisuwelaka eniyookhumeleleni." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Oxeexelo mmweereke: “Eya! Fataari waari ohiyu!” ni ohiyu: “Eya! Fataari waari othana!” niwoko na woova oniwoosareyeni vamurimani ni seiyo muneeraanyu moone. 
Deuteronomy28:68 Yave onimoohokoloxerani wExipitu mmakulani mphironi kaaweerenlaakani weera khamviratho. Iwo mmwathumihiwewo ntoko ipottha ilopwana ni ithiyana, mene khaawo eniyoothumeeni.’" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Ti seiya sootthuneya sa wiiraana Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi waapakela aYixrayeli oMowabe ohiya wiiraana aapakenlaawe oHorebi. 
Deuteronomy29:2 Moisesi aawiitthana aYixrayeli ootheene anaweerela: “Mwaahoona ni maithwaanyu sootheene Yave aampakenlaawe Farawu* wExipitu ni wa asitokweenaawe ni elapwaawe yootheene. 
Deuteronomy29:3 Mwaahoona ni maithwaanyu woota murima otokotoko iwe ni ineneero sootikhiniheya sitokotoko. 
Deuteronomy29:4 Wa soothesene, mpaka olelo Yave khoovangheni soowuupuwela siniiwexexa hata maitho anoona naari maaru aniiwa." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Wa iyaakha miloko mixexe Miyo kooweettihani munikareni soowarasanyu ni ikwakwaattasanyu sihithaalaka. 
Deuteronomy29:6 Khamwaaca yooca naari khamwaawura eviinyu hata soowura sikina soohapala. Kipakenle yeeyo weera musuwele weera Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Deuteronomy29:7 Mphiyakaru nipuro nna, Sihoni, mwene a Hexeboni ni Ogi, mwene a oBaxani yaanaattamela weera eniwaneno, mene hiyo naahaawinasa." 
Deuteronomy29:8 Naakuxa elapwaaya, nnaavaha aRubeni, aGadi ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe ntoko yoohiyeriwa." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Mutthariheke oororomeleyeene sootthuneya sa wiiraana wu weera itthu siweetteleni nnenesene mwa sootheene muneeraanyu mpake. 
Deuteronomy29:10 Olelo nyuwosa ootheene muri vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaanyu – mapwattapwatthaanyu ni asilopwana oothanliwa; ahooleelaanyu ni yaawo anoolamulani nitho aYixrayeli akinaawo 
Deuteronomy29:11 vamoha ni anamwaniinyu ni axaarinyu ootheene mpaka anamarwa ankhala mukonenlaanyumo, mwa yaawosa anoothikilelani ikhuuni ni yoorikelakani maahi." 
Deuteronomy29:12 Muri va weera mvolowase ngwiiraanani ni Yave Mulukwaanyu; wiiraanawene weiwo Owo ompakaawe olelo ni nyuwosa ni nlipelo. 
Deuteronomy29:13 Owo ontthuna weera nyuwo mukhale mulokwaawe ni Owo akhale Mulukwaanyu, ntoko aaroromelinghaawe makholowaanyu Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yakobe." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Wiiraana wu ni nlipelo nkinoopakelani nyuwo paahi," 
Deuteronomy29:15 muri va ni hiyo vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaahu, menetho yaawo ahikhanle ni hiyo va olelo." 
Deuteronomy29:16 Nyuwosa asineenaanyu moosuwela moota naakhalaahu wExipitu ni moota niviravinraahu miloko soohiyanahiyana mpaka ophiya va. 
Deuteronomy29:17 Mwaahoona mmilokoni mmwe icaambulosaya sa mwiikho soopakiwa ni nyiri, maluku, eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Nnene weera ahikhale anaaphwanyaneye mwa nyuwo mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana, nihimo naari epuumba anuupuwelele omuhiya Yave Mulukwaahu, alapaka miluku sa miloko iye. Ahiphwanyaneyeru eriyaraanyu mmoha onkhala ntoko mkwankhwaari mmoha omphuwa soowaawa ni soohapala." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Mutthu ntoko owo, iiwaka masu a nlipelo nna, oniiruuhela nreeliho, eeraka: “Koolipa orookhalaru weera kintthara murimaaka.” Eyo eniiruuhele nttaruxo elapo yoonaanela mpaka yoowuumeene." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Yave kharwa amuleveleela; isarasawe ni ehacaawe sinoompattela mutthweene yoowo. Malapho ootheene alempwale mulivurunimu anoommorela ni Yave onoocipiha Nsinanawe mweelaponi. 
Deuteronomy29:21 Yave onoommwalamwaliha variyari wa ipuumba sootheene sa aYixrayeli weera ahaawe otakhaliwa etthariheyaka malapho ootheene a wiiraana alempwale mulivuruni ela ya Nlamulo. 
Deuteronomy29:22 Anamwaniinyu ni ikhapirasanyu ni anamarwa anrweela ilapo soorakamela eniyoone irisa sineera simorele mweelaponi ni moota Yave aneeraawe aruuhele iretta. 
Deuteronomy29:23 Elapo yootheene eniikhuneeleye ni maakha, enxofre* ni itthu soohisiwa moota wooweera waala etthu woohimela, kheewo eneera yunnuwewo. Onuukhale ntoko ophwatiwa wa oSodoma ni oGomora, wAdema ni oZeboyimi mwa seiye Yave aaphwantaawe oonyoonyiweene ni isara." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Miloko sootheene nsikohe: “Yave opakenle heeni hiiha elapo ela? Onyoonyiwa moota heeni wuuwu ni isara iya?” 
Deuteronomy29:25 Vano yoowaakhula eniikhale ela: “Ti niwoko muloko ola woohiya wiiraana wa Yave, Muluku a makholowaaya, wiiraanawene weiwe aapakenlaawe aakhumihaleene wExipitu." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Awosa aalapa miluku sikina ekokhorelaka seiyo; miluku yahaasuwenlaaya khalayi, mwa seiye Yave aahiihalaawe olapa." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Tivawo isara sa Yave siluttuwenlaaya elapo ela moota wooweera owo ooruuhela malapho ootheene alempwale mulivuruni ela. 
Deuteronomy29:28 Oosareyeene isara, ooriipiweene ni onyoonyaxiwa, Yave oowoomolasa mweelaponimwaya, anaavonyera elapo ekina, ntoko onooneyaaya olelo.”" 
Deuteronomy29:29 Itthu sa wiiphiini ti sa Yave Mulukwaahu, mene itthu soothupululeya ti sawihu ni anamwaniihu wa mahuku ootheene weera niiwelele masu ootheene a malamulo ala." 
Deuteronomy30:1 Yoorweelakani mareeliho ni malapho ootheene koothalihenraakani ni enoophwanyaniwo weiwo Yave Mulukwaanyu aneeraawe oomwaraxeleniwo eriyari ya miloko," 
Deuteronomy30:2 nyuwosa vamoha ni anamwaniinyu mwahokoleela wa Yave Mulukwaanyu mwiiwelelaka ni murimaanyu ni okumaanyu wootheene munatthariha sootheene koolamulenlaakani olelo," 
Deuteronomy30:3 vano Yave Mulukwaanyu onimoohokoloxani wootthukiwani, oomorelakani ikharari ni oothukumanyihakanitho ni miloko sootheene mwa weiwo mwaamwareenlaanyuwo." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Yave Mulukwaanyu onimoothukumanyihaniwo weera muhokolowe, mwaarooronghiwaru ommaleloni wa elapo." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Owo onimoohokoloxerani elapo ya makholowaanyu ni nyuwosa mmwakuxase yeeyo. Onooweettiherelani nnene awaandyeererakani waapwaha makholowaanyu. 
Deuteronomy30:6 Yave Mulukwaanyu onimoovahasani ni ekhapiraanyu murima woororomeleya weera munsiveleke ni murimaanyu ni okumaanyu wootheene ni weera mukhaleke ni okumi. 
Deuteronomy30:7 Owo onimwaarumihela malapho ootheene awo, amwiittanaanyu anoothanyani ni anoosoondani." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Nyuwosa munoomwiiwelelatho Yave Mulukwaanyu muttharaka malamulowaawe ootheene kinoovahaakani olelo. 
Deuteronomy30:9 Vano Yave Mulukwaanyu onooreeliha mitekosanyu sootheene, anamwaniinyu, axaana a mihuwosanyu ni soohepha sa imattasanyu. Owo onimoohakalalelanitho aweettiherelakani nnenesene, ntoko aahakalalenlaawe makholowaanyu," 
Deuteronomy30:10 nyuwosa mwamwiiwelela Yave Mulukwaanyu muttharaka malamulowaawe ni ikanosawe silempwale mulivuruni ela ya Nlamulo ni mwahokoleela wa Yoowo ni murimaanyu ni okumaahu wootheene. 
Deuteronomy30:11 Yeeyo koolamulenlaakani olelo kheerinke opaka hata khamunooceela ophwanya. 
Deuteronomy30:12 Nlamulo nna khanikhanle wiirimu wookwana okoha: “Taani anaawelewo weera aniruuhele Nlamulonawe weera niiwelele?” 
Deuteronomy30:13 Naari khanikhanle okhopela ephareiya wookwana okoha: “Taani anaalapuwe ephareiya weera aniruuhele Nlamulonawe anilaleerakatho weera niiwelele?” 
Deuteronomy30:14 Hoye! Nlamulo nri vakhiviruwanyu – nri mmwanomwanyu ni vamurimaniwanyu – tivawo nyuwosa muneeraanyu mweetteleke. 
Deuteronomy30:15 Moone, kinghela olelo ohoolowanyu okumi ni weetteleya nnene, ni mpatta mukina okhwa ni ophwatiwa." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Olelo kinimoolamulelani omusivela Yave Mulukwaanyu, weetta mphironimwawe ni wiiwelela malamulowaawe, ikanosawe ni soolamulasawe. Hiiho munookhala ni okumi mwaandyeerereyaka, ni Yave Mulukwaanyu onimooreelihani mweelaponi muneeraanyu mwavolowe weera mwakuxe." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Vaheera murimaanyu wahapuwa ni mwaahimwiiwelela muniihiyerera mukokhorelaka miluku sikina," 
Deuteronomy30:18 kinooleelani olelo weera vekhaikhai munoophwatiwa. Khamukhalaxawo elapo mumvolowaanyu, mwa yeeyo munrowaanyu okuxa munlapungweene Yordanu." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Wiirimu ni vathi ti anamoonaaka olelo weera koowooniherani okumi ni okhwa; mareeliho ni malapho. Vano muthanle okumi weera nyuwosa ni anamwaniinyu mukhaleke ni okumi," 
Deuteronomy30:20 ni weera munsivele Yave Mulukwaanyu, mwiiwe nsunawe mumvarexexaka Yooworu. Vanonto Yave ti okumaahu ni Owo onoowaandyeererani iyaakha mweelaponi aaroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo waavaha makholowaanyu Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yakobe.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Moisesi aawuulumelatho aYixrayeli ootheene masu ala: 
Deuteronomy31:2 “Vano kirino iyaakha ncira ni miloko miili ni nkingweratho woohoolelani. Yave aakeerela: “Khamunlapuwa Yordanu.” 
Deuteronomy31:3 Yave Mulukwaanyu muneenaawe onoomulapuwa ohoolowanyu. Owo onoophwata miloko iyo ohoolowanyu ni nyuwosa munookuxa elapwaaya. Yoxuwatho onoomulapuwa ohoolowanyu, ntoko Yave eenraawe." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Yave anaapakele iyo yeeyo aampakenlaawe Sihoni ni Ogi, mamwene a awAmori mwa yaawo Owo aaphwantaawe vamoha ni ilaposaya." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Yave onoowinnyererasani ni nyuwosa mpakele iyo sootheene seiye koolamulenlaakani. 
Deuteronomy31:6 Mukhaleke oolipa ni oominya murima. Muhoove hata muhitteenguwe seiyo, niwoko Yave Mulukwaanyu onookhala ni nyuwo. Khoohiyani meekhiinyu.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Vanonto, Moisesi aamwiitthana Yoxuwa, anamweerela vamaithoni wa aYixrayeli ootheene: “Mukhaleke oolipa ni oominya murima, niwoko ti nyuwo munimuhoolele muloko ola mweelaponi Yave aaroromelingaawe waavaha makholowaaya ni mwaakaweleke ntoko yoohiyeriwaaya." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Yave muneenaawe onimoohoolelani ni onookhala ni nyuwo. Khoohiyani meekhiinyu. Muhoove hata muhiporore.” 
Deuteronomy31:9 Hiiho Moisesi aalepa Nlamulo nna, anaavaha asaserdoti* yaari anamwane a Leevi mwa yaawo yaateexa Arka* a Wiiraana a Yave aavahakatho ahooleli ootheene a aYixrayeli." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Vahoolowaya Moisesi aahaalamulela: “Ommaleloni wa khula iyaakha ithannapiili, vayaakhani ya omalihiwa ikoongori sootheene, mweehuhuni ya Efesta ya mmikotthani," 
Deuteronomy31:11 aYixrayeli ootheene ereene vamaithoni wa Mulukwaanyu vanipuroni Owo aneeraawe athanle, vano mwaasomelekewo Nlamulo nna mwaatthuni." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Mwathukumanyihe muloko – asilopwana, asithiyana, anamwane ni anamarwa ankhala mmasidadenimwanyu weera yiiwe ni exuttere omoova Yave Mulukwaanyu ettharaka oororomeleyeene masu ootheene a Nlamulo nna." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Anamwanaaya ahisuwenle Nlamulo nna yiiweke ni exuttereke omoova Yave Mulukwaanyu mukhalaka mweelaponi mwa yeeyo muneeraanyu mwakuxe munlapungweene Yordanu.” 
Deuteronomy31:14 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Nookhuveela nihuku munkhwaanyu. Mmwiitthane Yoxuwa ni mwiixoonihereke Muheemani mwa Muthukumano weiwo kineeraaka kamukhalihe namarandelaanyu.” Hiiho Moisesi ni Yoxuwa yaarowa, eniixoonihera Muheemani mwa Muthukumano." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Vano Yave aahiixoonihera wa yaawosa Muheemani ntoko nrimbu na mahutte neemenleene vamulako wa eheema. 
Deuteronomy31:16 Yave aamweerela Moisesi: “Nyuwo munimwiitthuuwa vamoha ni makholowaanyu ni muloko ola woowaakuveya onooraruwasa, ottharaka miluku sikina sa elapo oneeraaya wavolowe. Awosa anookihiya, ehipwatthaka wiiraana kaapakenlaaka." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Nihuku nenenenno sinimwaapattela isarasaka ni Miyo kinimwaattiwalasa kaareraka ettuli ni awosa anoophwatiwa. Onimwaarweela ohaawa ni mahooxo matokotoko ni nihuku nno eniyeere: “Mahooxo ala annikhumelelela onihingyaawe Mulukwaahu.” 
Deuteronomy31:18 Woohihovela, nihuku nno kinimwaareratho ettuli niwoko na sootakhalasaya sootheene apankaaya ekokhorelaka miluku sikina." 
Deuteronomy31:19 Vano mwiilepelase ecipo ela ni mwaaxuttihe aYixrayeli ngwiipihaka. Eniikhale namoonaaka wa yaawosa. 
Deuteronomy31:20 Kaavoleihaka mweelaponi yoosareya mukaka ni oravo, mwa yeeyo kaaroromelinghaaka ni nlipelo makholowaaya, ni yaacaaka, enavona, siweettelaka nnenesene, awosa eniikokhoreleke miluku sikina elapaka ekikhoottaka Miyo ni enanarihaka wiiraanawaka." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Saarweelaka irisa ni makacamiho mancipale, ecipo ela enimwaakhalela onamoona, niwoko ekhapiraaya kheettiwala ela. Koosuwela sootthunasaya, kihinaayeru waavoleiha mweelaponi kaaroromelinghaaka ni nlipelo.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Hiiho nihuku nne Moisesi aalepa ecipo ela, anaaxuttiha aYixrayeli." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Yave aamvaha Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni nlamulo nna: “Mukhaleke oolipa ni oominya murima, niwoko nyuwo munoohoolela muloko wa aYixrayeli mweelaponi kaaroromelinghaaka ni nlipelo ni Yoomeene kinookhala ni nyuwo.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Moisesi amalihakaru olepa masu ootheene a nlamulo nna mulivurini," 
Deuteronomy31:25 aahaalamulela aLeevi yaateexa Arka* a Wiiraana a Yave: 
Deuteronomy31:26 Mukuxe elivuru ela ni mwiikaathi mukhwipi mwa Arka* a Wiiraana a Yave Mulukwaanyu. Eniikhalewo ntoko namoona wa nyuwosa. 
Deuteronomy31:27 Koosuwela moota mumvaanyaanyu ni ettiyamaarwaanyu. Nyuwosa mwaamvaanya Yave miyo kireene nlelo ni okumi kikhalaka ni nyuwo, ankha kaakhwaaka!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Mwaathukumanyihe ahooleli ootheene a ipuumbasanyu ni anamalamula ootheene weera Miyo kuulume masu ala ootheene yiiwaka, kikhalihaka wiirimu ni vathi ntoko anamoonaaya." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Vano koosuwela weera kikhwiyeene, woohihovela nyuwosa munoovirikanyiha muhapuwaka ephiro koolamulenlaakani otthara. Mahuku a muhoolo, nsoomoreleni irisa, niwoko nyuwosa mmwipakase soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave muntannyeraka isarasawe ni seiyo mumpankaanyu.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Vanonto Moisesi aahuuluma masu a ecipo yootheene ela yiiwiwaka ni muthukumano wootheene wa aYixrayeli: 
Deuteronomy32:1 Mwiiwe wiirimu, ni nkuulume, aani mwiiwe, elapo ya vathi, masu a eyanowaaka." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Nihusihonaka nirupe ntoko epula ni maswaaka yiime ntoko nikame, mooteene yoowo onrupeliwaaya munyepu, ntoko kanyenye mmaphuwani." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Nkilaleye Nsina na Yave. Otthapeliwe ovuwa wa Yave! 
Deuteronomy32:4 Owo ti Mwala; mitekosawe ti soomalela ni ephirowaawe eri ya ekhaikhai. Owo ti Muluku oororomeleya ohinghiyanyiha; aani ti a ekhaikhai ni oowookoleleya. 
Deuteronomy32:5 Mulokwaawe Yave woompakela moohiroromeleyani; ti ekhapira yoohapuwa enkhalelaka emwaanomwaano ehikhalaka anamwanaawe. Ti yoowuuliha muru! 
Deuteronomy32:6 Muloko wa anepa ni ololo! Ti hiiho muntthunaanyu omuhokoloxera Yave ni mwettelo ola? Owo ti tiithiinyu ni Mpattuxaanyu mwa Yoowo oopattunxeni oovahakani okumi. 
Deuteronomy32:7 Muupuwelele mahuku a khalayi ni ikhapira sivinre. Mwaakohe atithinyu ni animooleelani; ahoolelaanyu ni animoothaliherani. 
Deuteronomy32:8 Muluku musulusulu avangheene miloko soohiyeriwasaya; Owo akawelaka omutthu wootheene, aakhaliha mwiinano wa miloko, attharihaka waatta wa anamwane a aYixrayeli." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Vano muloko Yave aakupanlaawe ti yoola; ekhapira ya Yakobe ti yoohiyeraawe. 
Deuteronomy32:10 Yave aamphwanya munikareni; moowuururuwa ni yoosareya oruma wa inama sa ntuphini. Aamukhapelela nnenensene amuxuttihaka, anamukosoopa ntoko oosiveleyaxaawe." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Ntoko xaaka onlipelela epuurwaawe, aaraaraka wa axaanaawe, vahoolowaya onkunga mapuphaawe weera aakaphule, aahokoloxeraka mpuuruni," 
Deuteronomy32:12 mooteene yoowo ti Yave paahi aamuhoolenle mwanawe; khaawo muluku mukina aamukhavihenre. 
Deuteronomy32:13 Owo aamweettiha mmapuroni a muttuttuwani a mweelaponi ni aamuciha soowiima sa ntuphini. Aamucihatho oravo waavuliwe mmwalani ni makhura yeekiwe mmasorosoroni," 
Deuteronomy32:14 makhura ni mukaka wa imombe ni ikhondoolo, iputtiputthi ni ipuri sooneneva, anapunci ooreeraxa a oBaxani ni ephepa yooreerela ya etrigu. Mwaawura eviinyu ya iwuuva* yooxaxa." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Wa soothesene, Yexuruni aahooca mpaka ohiya, anapacera ovaanya. Nyuwo mooneneva, moottittikalela ovona yooca. Moomuhiya Muluku oopattunxeni, munamukhootta Mwala oovulunxeni." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Awosa yaatannya ehace ya Muluku niwoko na milukusaya sikina enamunyoonyiha ni icaambulosaya sa mwiikho. 
Deuteronomy32:17 Aapakela sooveleela minepa soonanara sihikhanle Muluku; miluku ahisuwenlaaya sikhumelenle othanathanaru, mwa seiyo yahaalapaaya makholowaanyu." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Mwaamuhiya Mwala mwa Yoowo ooyanreni; mwaamuttiwala Muluku oopattunxeni. 
Deuteronomy32:19 Yave aahoona yeeyo, anaakhootta, niwoko aatannyiwa ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni asithiyana." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Owo aaheera: Kinimwaarerasa etthuli weera koone emaliherowaaya, niwoko ti ekhapira yoovaanya; anamwane oohiroromeleya." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Yaakitannyera ihace ni seiyo sihikhanle miluku ni yaakinyoonyiha ni icaambulosaya soohimuteko. Kinimwaatannyerela ihace kithanlaka muloko mukina ohikhanle muloko wa ekhaikhai; kinimwaanyoonyeriwa kithanlaka muloko woohimiruku. 
Deuteronomy32:22 Vano mooro woopatta musaranimwaka: Onuukhuruwe mpaka moowiixeraxa wa okhwa, ohisaka etthaya ni soohephasaya, olalihaka mathipelo a nyaako." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Kinoowuukelela irisa kimalihaka nyuupasaka waalathela. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Kinimwaarumihela etala yoowiiva, xipwexa oowoopiha ni soohooxa soowiiva. Kinimwaarumihela axinama ooluwa ni inowa soohapala siniipurula vathi." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Anamwanaaya animwiivakasiwa mmiseweni ni ekatana; mmatthokonimwaya anoosareya maririmela. Animookhwa amiravo ni asimwali; anamwane ni anamuuluvala. 
Deuteronomy32:26 Koheera weera kintthuna waaphwata kicipihaka wuupuweleliwawaya mulaponi," 
Deuteronomy32:27 kinoova otthepwiwa wa amwiittanaaya kihitthunaka weera awo yeere: “Ntatanahu noowina – Yave, kheewo opankaawe.”" 
Deuteronomy32:28 Owo ti muloko woohileeleya, mwa yaawo khasinooneya miruku." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Eya! Yaari ooleeleya, yaamwiiwa; etthokelelaka emaliherowaaya ya muhoolo!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 Khoongwereya mulopwana mmoha waattharelela asilopwana macira muloko naari asilopwana eeli waattharelela macira miloko miili ohikhanle weera Mwalaaya ori mwaathumiha naari Yave ori mwaahiya. 
Deuteronomy32:31 Vano namwaakihaaya khahiyono ntoko Namwaakihaahu – mpaka amwiittanaahu animwaakhulela! 
Deuteronomy32:32 Imattasaya sa iwuuva* ti sa oSodoma ni soolimmwa sa oGomora. Iwuuvasaya soosareya soohapala ni mikonkha sa iwuuva* soowaawa. 
Deuteronomy32:33 Eviinyuwaaya ti soohapala sa inowa; awamwa oowiiva a ivili. 
Deuteronomy32:34 Koothokorora itthu iyo kilipelelaka omuhakhuniwaka. 
Deuteronomy32:35 Ntthuvelo ti nawaka; aani ti Yoomi kinrulela ikukuttula. Mweehuhuni yootthuneya sinooserenguwa inaawosaya. Nihuku na ophwatiwawaya nookhuveela ni emaliherowaaya ennaarweela. 
Deuteronomy32:36 Yave onoothoriha mulokwaawe ni, oonaka weera khaakuru ni weera khaawo ohanle, akhalaka neethi naari epottha, Owo onimwaamorela ikharari arumeiyaawe." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Owo aneere: “Vano siri woowi milukusaya, mwala yaatthawelaayawo" 
Deuteronomy32:38 mwa seiyo saaciiye makhura a sooveleelasaya, siwuraka eviinyu ya sooveleela soovuuvihiwa? Iyo sookhavihereni! Soovaheeni, wootthawela!" 
Deuteronomy32:39 Moone weera Miyo ti mmoharu Yoomeene. Khoowowo muluku mukina kihikhanle Miyo. Ti miyo kiniiva ni kimvaha okumi. Kimvulaliha ni kinlamiha. Khaawo ongwera wiitapuxa mmatatanimwaka. 
Deuteronomy32:40 Kineemexera ntatanaka wiirimu keeraka: Kinlipela mwa Nsinanaka weera," 
Deuteronomy32:41 kaanonaka ekatanaaka yoowaara kivarelaka mmatatani weera kithorihe, kinoowiinlela ikukuttula amwiittanaaka kaathorihaka yaawo ankithanya." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Nyuupasaka sinookhala ephomeru, ekatanaaka yaakakatthaka irutthu: ephome ya anamakhwa ni anamavariwa, nyuru sa ahooleli a amwiittana!" 
Deuteronomy32:43 Ii! Miloko ni mulokwaaya, mmwiipele ni ohakalala, niwoko Owo onimwiinlela ikukuttula ephome ya arumeiyaawe. Onimwaatthuvela ni ikukuttula amwiittanaawe apakaka wiiraana wa elapwaawe ni mulokwaawe.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Moisesi aahoorwa vamoha ni Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, anuuluma masu ootheene a ecipo ela iiwiwaka ni muloko wa aYixrayeli." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Moisesi amalihakaru waaleela masu ootheene aYixrayeli," 
Deuteronomy32:46 aaweerela: “Muhele vamurimani masu ootheene kinooleelaakani olelo mweekhaikhaiyini weera mwaalamule anamwaniinyu weettela oororomeleyeene masu ootheene a Nlamulo nna. 
Deuteronomy32:47 Khaahiyono masu oohimuteko; ti okumaahu. Munookhalela yaala wa mahuku mancipale mweelaponi mwemmo muneeraanyu mwakuxe munlapungweene Yordanu.” 
Deuteronomy32:48 Nihuku nenenenne Yave aamweerelatho Moisesi: 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Murowe mmanyaakoni sa Habarimi, mwawele mwaako Nebo ori oMowabe, ohoolo wa oYeriko ni moonewo oKanaani, elapo kineeraaka kaavahe aYixrayeli ntoko yawaya." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Vamwaako muneeraanyu mwawele, munimookhwawo muthukumanyihiwaka ni makholowaanyu, hiiho ntoko munninyu Aharoni okhwenlaawe omwaako Hori, anathukumanyiwa ni makholowaawe." 
Deuteronomy32:51 Eyo yeereenle niwoko ooweeli nyuwo khamwakiiwelenle vamaithoni wa muloko wa aYixrayeli mmaahini a oMeriba Kadexi, munikareni na oZini mwahaattittiminghaanyu ootteelawaka." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Tivawo muneeraanyu mwaase woona paahi, mene khamvolowa mulaponi kineeraaka kivahe muloko wa aYixrayeli.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Ti yaala mareeliho aavanghaawe Moisesi, mulopwana a Muluku, aareelihaka aYixrayeli ahinaaye okhwa:" 
Deuteronomy33:2 Owo aaheera: “Yave ohoorwa arweelaka oSinayi, akhumaka ntoko nsuwa iixooniheraka wa yaawo oSeyiri. Aahaarela mulokwaawe vamwaako oParani. Aarwa ni ancipalexa a ootteela a mpatta wa ohitto, okhuma mukerekhere nyaako." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Vekhaikhai ti Nyuwo munsivela mulokwaanyu; ootteela ootheene ari mmatatanimwanyu. Ootheenaawo annookokhorelani yiiwaka mahusihowaanyu," 
Deuteronomy33:4 eyo tiiyo Nlamo Moisesi aanivanghaawe; yoohiyeriwa ya muthukumano wa Yakobe. 
Deuteronomy33:5 Owo aari Mwene a oYexuruni yaathukumannaaya mapwattapwattha a muloko vamoha ni ipuumba sa aYixrayeli. 
Deuteronomy33:6 Rubeni akhaleke ni okumi ahikhwaaka ni asilopwanaawe yaatteke.” 
Deuteronomy33:7 Wa Yuda aaheera: “Ii! Yave! Mwiiwe okhuwela wa Yuda, Munghokoloxere mulokwaawe. Matataawe ekwaneleye ni weera aphwanye ekhavihero aawananaka amwiittanaawe!”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Wa Leevi aaheera: “Ii! Yave! Tumimi ni Urimaanyu* mohaavaha arumeiyaanyu oosiveleya ari aLeevi. Mwaamoota murima oMasa; mwaanyakulihanano mmaahini a oMeriba. 
Deuteronomy33:9 Leevi aaweerela atithawe ni amayawe: “Awosa nkingwoonelamo.” Khaapwantthe axunneiye hata anamwanaawe aathokorora maswaanyu ni wiiraanawanyu. 
Deuteronomy33:10 Owo onimuxuttiha ikanosanyu Yakobe ni Nlamulonanyu wa aYixrayeli. Owo onoohiserani erubani* ohoolowanyu apakaka sooveleela soohisa sookwanela valtaarininiwanyu. 
Deuteronomy33:11 Ii! Yave! Mureelihe wiilipiherawawe wootheene ni mwaakhulele mitekosawe. Nnyaanye ovaanya wa amwiittanaawe weera awosa ehimweemeleletho.” 
Deuteronomy33:12 Wa Benyamini aaheera: “Oosiveleya a Yave onookhala oolipeene vamoha ni Yoowo, niwoko Owo onimwaakiha mahuku ootheene ni wa yoowo onimusivelaawe oniitthuuwa mmatatanimwawe.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Wa Yoseefe aaheera: “Yave areelihe elapwaawe ni nikame nooreeraxa ninrweela osulu, wiirimu. Areelihetho maahi moowiixera;" 
Deuteronomy33:14 areelihiwe ni soohepha siniitthwihiwa ni nsuwa ni sooreerela sinruuwerihiwa ni mweeri. 
Deuteronomy33:15 Areelihiwe ni soovaha sooreerela soothanliwa mmanyaakoni sa khalayi ni ethaadyira ya mmattumuxani yoohimala. 
Deuteronomy33:16 Areelihiwe ni soowiima sooreerela sa mulaponi soowaattaxa ni murima wooreera wa Yoole aamukhumelenle muniphuwani nivarelaka. Mareeliho ala ootheene emurweele Yoseefe; vayuuci ya oothanliwa variyari wa axunneiye. 
Deuteronomy33:17 Moovuwani owo ori ntoko ntthaara na emombe elopwana. Manyakaawe ari ntoko manyaka a enari, mwa yaawo aneeraawe avulalihekeno miloko sa elapo yootheene. Hiiho ti macira macireene a epuumba ya Efrayimi ni Manaxe.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Wa Zebuloni aaheera: “Zebuloni ahakalale mmikwahanimwawe ni Isakari muheemanimwawe. 
Deuteronomy33:19 Awosa eniithukumanye miloko omwaako, ni iwo eniipakewo sooveleela sa ekhaikhai; epakaka efesta ni sooreela sa mphareiya, ni mihakhu soovithiwa mweehaavanimwaya." 
Deuteronomy33:20 Wa Gadi aaheera: “Ooreelihiwa akhale Muluku omvanghe Gadi elapo etokotoko! Owo iixaatalenle ntoko mwatto akhuuraka nipita ni nikarakasa. 
Deuteronomy33:21 Aahiithanlela elapo yooreerela; mpatta wa ehooleli aathokororeliwaawe. Oothatuwa mutokweene a muloko, attharaka ekhaikhai ya Yave ni ikano soowaalamulelano aYixrayeli.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Wa Dani aaheera: “Dani ti mwaaxaana a mwatto onrwa atuphaka wookhuma oBaxani.” 
Deuteronomy33:23 Wa Nafitali aaheera: “Nafitali ti oosareya mareeliho a Yave ni murimaawe wooreera; yoohiyeriwaawe ti mpatta wa ohitto ni mpatta wa mphareiya.” 
Deuteronomy33:24 Wa Axeri aaheera: “Ooreelihiwa ti Axeri variyari wa anamwane ootheene ni ookupaleya variyari wa axunneiye ootheene. Onookhalano makhura mancipale aneeraawe aneelihekemo inaawosawe. 
Deuteronomy33:25 Anampattika a nselenawe eniikhale a eyuuma ni ebronze* ni ikurusawe nsipwaherere mahuku ootheene. 
Deuteronomy33:26 Khawowo onlikana ni Muluku a Yexuruni oneetta wiirimu weera ookhavihereni, aani oneetta moovuwani mmahutteni." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Muluku ti wootthawelawanyu woohimala; nyoonosawe soohimala ti olipawanyu. Owo onoowoomola amwiittanaanyu ohoolowanyu eeraka: “Waaphwatase!” 
Deuteronomy33:28 Hiiho aYixrayeli anookhala oomaaleleya; naattuuttu a Yakobe ori oolipeene mweelaponi ya etrigu ni eviinyu enyowani mwa mwemmo ninttonyeraayamo nikame na wiirimu. 
Deuteronomy33:29 Ooreelihiwa ti nyuwo, muloko wa aYixrayeli! Khaawo oreeringwe ntoko nyuwo; Yave ti oovulunxeni. Owo ti yoowiixaakiheraanyu ni Ekatanaanyu yoowina! Amwiittanaanyu animookokhorelani, mene nyuwo mmwaanyikalele.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Vahoolowaya Moisesi aavenya mmisaatalani sa oMowabe anawela mwaako Nebo mpaka vatthomelani oniitthaniwa oPisega ori ohoolo wa oYeriko. Yave aamoonihera elapo yootheene ele ha: Okhuma oGiliyade mpaka oDani; 
Deuteronomy34:2 oNafitali wootheene; elapo ya wEfrayimi ni oManaxe; elapo yootheene ya oYuda mpaka Ephareiya ya mpatta ninkela nsuwa; 
Deuteronomy34:3 oNegeba ni elapo yootheene okhuma oreyareyani na oYeriko, esidade ya Mavare mpaka oZowari." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Vano Yave aamweerela: “Ele ti elapo kaaroromenlinghaaka ni nlipelo omvaha Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yakobe kaaweerenlaaka: ‘Kinoovaha ekhapiraanyu.’ Kohootthuniherani woona ni maithwaanyu, vaheera khamvolowamo.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Vanonto, Moisesi, murumeiyi a Yave, aakhwenle vaavaale, oMowabe, ntoko Yave aahimalaawe." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Owo omvithenle oMowabe, mureyareyani nri ohoolo wa oBeti-Peyori, mene mpaka olelo khaawo osuwenle nihiyenawe." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Moisesi okhwiiye ni iyaakha ncira nimoha ni miloko miili, maithwaawe ni ikurusawe khasaammalenle." 
Deuteronomy34:8 aYixrayeli yaamwiinlelasa Moisesi oreyareyani na oMowabe wa mahuku miloko miraru mpaka okwanihera othanana ni olalamika. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Vanonto, Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, aasarihiwa ni munepa wa miruku niwoko Moisesi aamwiikaathera matataawe. Hiiho aYixrayeli yannamwiiwelela epakaka yeeyo Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Deuteronomy34:10 oYixrayeli khakhumelenletho mprofeeti mukina ntoko Moisesi, mwa yoowo Yave aamoonnaawe ttunda ttunda" 
Deuteronomy34:11 ni aapanke ineneero sootikhiniheya sootheene iye Yave aamurumihenlaawe ompakela Farawu* wExipitu, asitokweenaawe ootheene ni elapwaawe yootheene." 
Deuteronomy34:12 Khawowo oonihenretho moota wa ikuru ntoko Moisesi, hata ovanre miteko soowoopiha ntoko opankaawe Moisesi vamaithoni wa aYixrayeli ootheene." 
Joshua1:1 Vahoolo wa okhwa wa Moisesi, murumeiyi a Yave, Yave aamweerela Yoxuwa, mwaana a Nuni, namakhaviheraawe Moisesi:" 
Joshua1:2 “Murumeiyaaka Moisesi, ohookhwa. Vano, nyuwo ni muloko wootheene ola mwiirehererase weera mulapuwe mooloko Yordanu ni mwavolowe mweelaponi kineeraaka kaavahe aYixrayeli." 
Joshua1:3 Mmapuroni moothemwene muneeraanyu mvire kinimoovahani ntoko kaamuroromelinghaaka Moisesi. 
Joshua1:4 Elapo yootheene eyo eniikhale yawinyu: Okhuma onikareni mpaka oLibanu, ni okhuma mooloko mutokotoko Efratesi mpaka ephareiya etokotoko mpatta wa ninkela nsuwa vamoha ni elapo yootheene ya aHiti." 
Joshua1:5 Khaawo eniiwere woowinani mmahukuni ootheene a okumaanyu. Kinookhala ni nyuwo ntoko kaaraaka ni Moisesi. Nkirwa koohiyaani meekhiinyu. 
Joshua1:6 Mukhaleke ookhomaala ni oolipa murima, niwoko munoohoolela muloko ola weera mphwanye elapo kaaroromelinghaaka ni nlipelo makholowaanyu ovaha." 
Joshua1:7 Mukhaleke ookhomaala ni oolipaxa murima! Nnene woowiiwelela malamulo ootheene murumeiyaaka Moisesi oovanghaaweni, muhihapuwelaka moono mulopana naari muthiyana weera siweetteleni nnene weiwo muneeraanyu mvireke." 
Joshua1:8 Masu a Elivuru ela ya Nlamulo ekhaleke mmwaanomwanyu. Mutthokelele othana ni ohiyu weera mukwanihere oororomeleyeene sootheene silempwalemo. Hiiho munooreereliwa mphironimwanyu siweettelakani nnenesene. 
Joshua1:9 Kohoolamulelani: Mukhaleke ookhomaala ni oolipa murima. Muhoove hata muhiporore, niwoko Yave Mulukwaanyu onookhala ni nyuwo weiwo muneeraanyu mvire.”" 
Joshua1:10 Vano Yoxuwa aahaalamulela asitokweene a muloko: 
Joshua1:11 “Muviravirase mukonelingwe ni mwalamulelase muloko weera oreherere itthu. Eviraleene mahuku mararu nyuwosa munoomulapuwa Yordanu vaava weera mwavolowe ni mwakuxe elapo yeeyo Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni.’” 
Joshua1:12 Vaheera aaweerela aRubeni, aGadi ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe:" 
Joshua1:13 “Muupuwelele nlamulo Moisesi murumeiyi a Yave oovahansaaweni: ‘Yave Mulukwaanyu onimoovahani wiitthuuwa ni onimoovahasani elapo ela.’ 
Joshua1:14 Axaarinyu, anamwaniinyu ni mihuwosanyu sihaleke mweelaponi Moisesi oovanghaaweni mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oYordanu, vaheera asilopwanaanyu ootheene angwera owana elapuweke ni ikaphwitthi ohoolo wa axunninyu. Nyuwosa mwaakhavihereke axunninyu aYixrayeli" 
Joshua1:15 mpaka Yave aneeraawe aavahe nipuro noowiitthuuwa ntoko oovanghaaweni ni mpakatho awo eneeraaya ekuxe elapo Yave Mulukwaanyu onoovahaaweni. Vahoolowaya nyuwosa muhokoleeleke weera mwaakamele elapwaanyu, mwa yeeyo Moisesi murumeiyi a Yave oovanghaaweni, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa Yordanu.”" 
Joshua1:16 Vano awosa yaamwaakhula Yoxuwa: “Nnoopaka sootheene nyuwo munilamulenlaanyu ni nnoorowa weiwo muneeraanyu munirumihelewo. 
Joshua1:17 Hiiho ntoko naamwiiwelenlaahu nnenesene Moisesi, nnoowiiwelelani nyuwotho. Yave Mulukwaanyu akhaleke ni nyuwo ntoko aaraawe ni Moisesi." 
Joshua1:18 Yoowo anaarambure mahusihowaanyu ahiiwelelaka yoohimaanyu apakeye yeeyo muneeraanyu mulamulele, iiviwe. Mukhaleke paahi ookhomaala ni oolipa murima.”" 
Joshua2:1 Vano Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, aahaarumihela muxiirini anamahottela eeli oXitimi. Aaweerela: “Murowe, mweettelele elapo eyo wootepaxa oYeriko.” Awosa yaarowa, enavolowa empa ya puuta iitthaniwa Rakhabi, enavirihasa ohiyu." 
Joshua2:2 Wa soothesene, mwene a oYeriko aaleeliwa: “Akina a aYixrayeli ari muumu ohiyuweene yoola weera ehottele elapo.”" 
Joshua2:3 Mwene a oYeriko aamurumihela Rakhabi mutthenga ola: “Ngwoomole asilopwana yoophiyerenleni, niwoko arweenle ohottela elapo yootheene.”" 
Joshua2:4 Wa soothesene, muthiyana owo aavinthe asilopwana eeli aahaakhula: “Ettiitthu, asilopwana eeli yaakiphiyerela, mene miyo nkaasuwenle yaakhumelelasaayawo." 
Joshua2:5 Wiilaka, ehuhu engwaliwa mulako wa esidade awosa yaattimula ni nkisuwenle akenlaayawo. Mwaatthimakelase, apaale munimwaaphwanya.”" 
Joshua2:6 Wa soothesene, owo aahaarongha vasulu etarato, anaavitha vathi wa irece sa malaxi siikaathiwewo." 
Joshua2:7 Anamatthimakela yaahaattharatthara asilopwana eeli ale mmuseweni onkela mmirorani sa Yordanu. Evenyakaru, mulako wa esidade waakokotteliwa." 
Joshua2:8 Vano, anamahottela ehinaaye okona, Rakhabi aawela vataratoni," 
Joshua2:9 anaweerela: “Koosuwela weera Yave ohoovahasani elapo ela ni nyuwo moonitannyera woova otokotoko. Amaki ootheene a elapo ela ari oottenguweene niwoko na nyuwosa. 
Joshua2:10 Nohiiwa moota Yave aamwalamwanxaawe maahi a Ephareiya Yooxeera ohoolowanyu, nyuwosa mukhumakaru wExipitu. Noohiiwatho sa yeeyo mwaapakenlaanyu mamwene meeli awAmori, Sihoni ni Ogi, mwa yaawo mwaaphwatansaanyu." 
Joshua2:11 Nisuwelakaru yeeyo, muloko waathananelaxa ni ootheene naatteenguwasa niwoko na nyuwo woonaka weera Yave Mulukwaanyu ti Muluku oosulu wa erimu ni vathi." 
Joshua2:12 Vano, dyoontte, munlipele Yave weera mummoonihera murima wooreera wa emusaaka ntoko kiwoonihenraakani oreerawaka murima. Mukivahe eneneero yookiroromeliha weera" 
Joshua2:13 khamurwa ngwiiva atithaka, amayaka, axunnaka ni asirokoraka ni ootheene ari awaya ni weera munoonitapuxa mookhwaani.”" 
Joshua2:14 Vano asilopwana yaamwaakhula: “Nnoororomelihani ni okumaahu. Mwaahimuleelaru mutthu yeeyo nimpakaahu, nnimoopakani nnene Yave aaninnyereraka elapo ela.”" 
Joshua2:15 Rakhabi aahaakhaviherasa okhuruwela vaxanelani ni mukhoyi, niwoko empa aakhalaawe yaari mpatta wa exiri ya esidade." 
Joshua2:16 Vanonto owo aaweerela: “Murowase mwaako ole weera anamattharatthara ehoophwanyaseni. Mwiipithewo mahuku marararu mpaka awosa ohokolowa ni vahoolowaya mpwahereraseke ni mukwaahaanyu.” 
Joshua2:17 Asilopwana yaamweerelasa: “Mwatthuna weera nikwanihere yoororomeliha noopakenlaahuni," 
Joshua2:18 vano hiyo naavolowaka mulaponi, mutthukelele mukhoyi ola wooxeera vaxanelani, mwa yoola munikhavihenraanyu okhuruwano ni mwaaruuhe atithinyu, amayinyu ni emusaanyu yootheene mpaanimwanyu." 
Joshua2:19 Akhala onkhumela vaate akhwa ti yawawe. Hiyo khanikhalano nthowa. Vaheera akhwa mukina areene mpaanimwanyu, vano nthowa nnikhale nawihu." 
Joshua2:20 Wa soothesene, mwathaliha yeeyo nimpakaahu, nri ootapuxeyeene ni nlipelo munipakenlaanyu." 
Joshua2:21 Owo aawaakhula: “Kohaakhulela. Yeereyeke ntoko muhimmaanyu.” Owo aahaaraxelasa, enattimula. Vanonto Rakhabi aatthukelela mukhoyi wooxeera vaxanelani." 
Joshua2:22 Awosa ettimulasakaru, yaarowa omwaako, enakhalawo mahuku mararu mpaka yaahokolowaaya anamattharatthara. Awosa yaawaasaasa mmuseweni wootheene, mene khayaaphwayanse." 
Joshua2:23 Vahoolowaya asilopwana eeli ale yaahokolowasa. Yaakhuruwa vamwaako, enalapuwa mooloko, enaphiya wa Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, enamuthalihera sootheene saakhumelenle." 
Joshua2:24 Awosa yaamweerela Yoxuwa: “Woohihovela, Yave ooninnyerera elapo yootheene. Atthu ootheene a weiwo aasareya woova niwoko na hiyo.”" 
Joshua3:1 Oxeexeloweene, Yoxuwa ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaattimula oXitimi, erowaka oYordanu, mwa weiwo yaakonenlaayawo ehinaaye omulapuwa mooloko." 
Joshua3:2 Eviraleene mahuku mararu, asitokweene yaaviravirasa waakonelingwe," 
Joshua3:3 yaalamulaka atthu: “Mwaawoonaka Arka* a Wiiraana a Yave Mulukwaanyu ni asaserdoti* ari aLeevi yaakunxeene yaawo, vano mvenye mmapuronimwanyu ni mwaattharaseke." 
Joshua3:4 Hiiho munoosuwela mpatta heeni ontthuneya orowa mweenre muhinaviraka. Wa soothesene, mwaatthare mwaarakamelaka Arka* wookwana imeetru* macira mathannamaxexe variyari wa Arka* ni nyuwo. Muhiwaattamele!”" 
Joshua3:5 Yoxuwa aaweerela atthu: “Mwiitteelihe, niwoko omaalo Yave onoopaka itthu sootikhiniheya variyariwanyu.”" 
Joshua3:6 Yoxuwa aaweerela asaserdoti*: “Mwaattukhule Arka* a Wiiraana ni murowe ohoolo wa muloko.” Awosa yaahaattukhula, enarowa ohoolo." 
Joshua3:7 Vano Yave aamweerela Yoxuwa: “Olelo kinoopacera woovuwihani vamaithoni wa aYixrayeli ootheene weera esuwele weera Miyo kiri ni nyuwo ntoko kaaraaka ni Moisesi. 
Joshua3:8 Mwaaleele asaserdoti* anaateexa Arka* a Wiiraana: ‘Nyuwosa mwaaphiyaka mukerekhere Yordanu, mweemele okerekhere mooloko.’”" 
Joshua3:9 Yoxuwa aaweerela aYixrayeli: “Nrwe mwiiwe masu a Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Joshua3:10 Moota ola munoosuwela weera Muluku mukumi ori variyariwanyu ni weera vekhaikhai onoowoomola ohoolowanyu aKanaani, aHiti, aHivi, aPerizi, aGiregaxini, awAmori ni aYebusi." 
Joshua3:11 Ngwoone, Arka* a Wiiraana a Yave Muneene a elapo yootheene anoomulapuwa Yordanu ohoolowanyu." 
Joshua3:12 Mwaathanle asilopwana muloko neeli a ipuumba sa Yixrayeli, mmoha a khula epuumba." 
Joshua3:13 Vanonto, asaserdoti* anaateexa Arka* a Yave, Muneene a elapo yootheene, nuumunyikala Yordanu wuupa wa maahi onimweemela ethikilaanaka ixirisene.”" 
Joshua3:14 Muloko okhulakhulakaru iheemasaya weera omulapuwe Yordanu, asaserdoti* yaateexa Arka* a Wiiraana yaarowasa ohoolo." 
Joshua3:15 Vano, ehuhu yootheene ya ohepha, mooloko Yordanu onsareya okhopela ni okhopela. Waarookhalaru hiiho, asaserdoti* yaateexa Arka* ephiyakaru muYordanu ni nuumunyikala," 
Joshua3:16 wuupa wa maahi waarweela ota waaheemela. Yaathikilaana exireene woorakamelaneene, vakhiviru wa esidade yiitthaniwa Adami, elapo ya oZaretani. Vaheera maahi yaakela Ephareiya ya Araba (eyo tiiyo Ephareiya ya Maakha) yaathikilanyiwa. Hiiho muloko waalapuwela oYeriko." 
Joshua3:17 asaserdoti* yaateexa Arka* a Wiiraana a Yave yaaheemelasa vatthayani yoowuuma eriyari ya mooloko Yordanu, aYixrayeli ootheene eviraka mpaka muloko wootheene waalapuwa vatthayani yoowuuma." 
Joshua4:1 Muloko wootheene omulapuwakaru Yordanu, Yave aamweerela Yoxuwa:" 
Joshua4:2 “Mwaathanle asilopwana muloko neeli a muloko, mmoha a khula epuumba," 
Joshua4:3 ni mwaalamulele weera ettotte maluku muloko ni meeli ni ekuxe eriyari ya Yordanu, nipuro yeemenle asaserdoti*. Awosa ekuxeke maluku awo mpaka nipuro muneeraanyu mukone ohiyu ola.”" 
Joshua4:4 Yoxuwa aahaathukumanyiha asilopwana muloko neeli mwa yaawo aathanlalaawe variyari wa aYixrayeli – mmoha a khula epuumba," 
Joshua4:5 anaweerela: “Murowe ohoolo wa Arka* a Yave Mulukwaanyu mpaka eriyari ya Yordanu. Khula mutthu a nyuwosa muloko neeli athateleke nluku nimoha nithoonyeraka khula epuumba ya aYixrayeli. 
Joshua4:6 Maluku awo eniikhale eneneerowaanyu. Muhoolommo, anamwaniinyu yookohani: ‘Maluku ala antaphulelani?’" 
Joshua4:7 vano mwaaleele weera maahi a Yordanu yaathikilaanyiwa ohoolo wa Arka* a Wiiraana a Yave. Arka* emulapuwaka Yordanu, maahi a Yordanu yaathikilanyiwa. Maluku ala ekhaleke yoowuupuwelela yoohimala wa muloko wa aYixrayeli.”" 
Joshua4:8 Vano aYixrayeli yaapaka ntoko Yoxuwa aalamulenlaawe. Yaateexa maluku muloko ni meeli eriyari ya Yordanu, nimoha wa khula epuumba ya aYixrayeli, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Yoxuwa. Yaateexa awo mpaka yaakonenlaayawo enahiya." 
Joshua4:9 Yoxuwa aathataanyera maluku muloko ni meeli makina eriyari ya Yordanu vanipuroni asaserdoti* yaathatela Arka* a Wiiraana, yeemenlaayawo. Maluku ale mpaka olelo ari vaavaawo." 
Joshua4:10 Vano asaserdoti* yaateexa Arka* yaari yeemelelo eriyari ya Yordanu mpaka muloko opaka sootheene Yave aamulamulenlaawe Yoxuwa mwa Moisesi. Muloko waalapuwa woowaakuveya. 
Joshua4:11 Emalelakaru ootheene olapuwa, Arka* a Yave ni asaserdoti* yaavirasa mpatta mukina vamaithoni wa muloko." 
Joshua4:12 Asilopwana a ipuumba sa Rubeni, Gadi ni eriyari ya Manaxe yaalapuwa ohoolo wa aYixrayeli, oolikaneene owana, ntoko Moisesi aalamulenlaawe." 
Joshua4:13 Wookwanaka anakhotto 40 000 yaalapuwa ohoolo wa Yave erowaka oreyareyani wa oYeriko, oolikaneene owana." 
Joshua4:14 Nihuku nne Yave aamvuhiwa Yoxuwa vamaithoni wa aYixrayeli ootheene ni yaamuttittimiha mahuku ootheene a okumaawe, ntoko yaamuttittiminghaaya Moisesi." 
Joshua4:15 Vano Yave aamweerela Yoxuwa: 
Joshua4:16 “Mwaalamule asaserdoti* anaateexa Arka* a Namoona weera ekhumeke muYordanu.” 
Joshua4:17 Hiiho Yoxuwa aahaalamulelasa asaserdoti*: “Mukhumeke muYordanu.” 
Joshua4:18 asaserdoti* yaakhuma mmoolokoni yaateexaleene Arka* a Wiiraana a Yave. Enyikalakaru omokoni, maahi a Yordanu yaakumanela, enasareya okhopela ni okhopela ntoko yeerenlaaya." 
Joshua4:19 Vanihukuni nanaamuloko na mweeri woopacera muloko waalapuwa muYordanu, onakonela oGiligali, omwiinanoni mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oYeriko." 
Joshua4:20 oGiligali Yoxuwa aathataanyera maluku muloko ni meeli yaateenxaaya muYordanu. 
Joshua4:21 Owo aaweerela aYixrayeli: “Muhoolommo, anamwaniinyu yookohani: ‘Maluku ala antaphulelani?’" 
Joshua4:22 Vano mwaathalihere: ‘aYixrayeli yaalapungwe vaava vatthayani yoowuumeene,’”" 
Joshua4:23 niwoko Yave Mulukwaanyu aangweleliha Yordanu ohoolowanyu mpaka mwaalapungwaanyu. Yave Mulukwaanyu aampakela Yordanu yeeyo aapakenlaawe Ephareiya Yooxeera aawelelinghaawe ohoolowahu mpaka hiyo olapuwa. 
Joshua4:24 Aapakenle yeeyo weera miloko sootheene sa elapo ya vathi sisuwele weera ntata na Yave ti noolipaxa ni weera mmoove Yave Mulukwaanyu mahuku ootheene.’” 
Joshua5:1 Vano mamwene ootheene a awAmori yaamanke mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa oYordanu ni mamwene ootheene a aKanaani yaamanke mukerekhere wa ephareiya yaasuwela moota Yave aangwelelihalaawe Yordanu ohoolo wa aYixrayeli mpaka olapuwawahu. Tivawo yaaporonraaya ni yahaalipihalaaya mirima woowaawanano aYixrayeli. 
Joshua5:2 Ehuhuweene yeele Yave aamweerela Yoxuwa: “Mpake nyaalo sa maluku ni ngwiinelase aYixrayeli.” 
Joshua5:3 Vano Yoxuwa aapaka nyaalo sa maluku, anawiinelasa aYixrayeli oGibeyati-Haaraloti." 
Joshua5:4 Aapaka yeeyo, niwoko asilopwana ootheene yaari anakhotto yaakhumme wExipitu yaakhwela munikareni ekhummeene wExipitu." 
Joshua5:5 Ootheene yaakhummewo yaahiinelasiwa, vaheera ootheene yaayarelingwe munikareni mmukwahani okhummwaleene wExipitu khayiinelasiwe." 
Joshua5:6 aYixrayeli yaaheetta munikareni wa iyaakha miloko mixexe mpaka anakhotto ootheene yaakhumme wExipitu okhwaasa yeenre yahaamwiiwelelaka Yave. Vano Yave aahaaroromeliha ni nlipelo weera khayaarwa woona elapo Owo aaroromelinghaawe makholowaaya weera aannivaha, elapo yoosareya mukaka ni oravo." 
Joshua5:7 Hiiho aawiikaathi anamwanaaya vanipuroniwaya, mwa yaawo Yoxuwa aawiinenlaawe. Awosa nlelo yeera ehiineliwe, niwoko khayiinelasiwe munkwahani." 
Joshua5:8 Muloko wootheene wiineliwakaru, awosa yaaweherera yaakonenlaayawo mpaka ovola." 
Joshua5:9 Vano Yave aamweerela Yoxuwa: “Olelo kohoovenxerani oyevihiwa mwaahaawanyu wExipitu.” Tivawo nipuro nne nniitthaniwaaya Giligali mpaka olelo. 
Joshua5:10 Moohiyuni wa nihuku na naamuloko ni maxexe na mweeri ole, ekonenleene oGiligali oreyareyani wa oYeriko, aYixrayeli yaapaka efesta ya mPaska*." 
Joshua5:11 Oxaawaya, nihuku nenenenne, yaahooca sa sooruwera sa elapo – epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu ni etrigu yoowaarikiwa." 
Joshua5:12 Nihuku nimoha eciiyeene sa elapweene yeele, emana* yaamala. Khayaariwotho emana* wa aYixrayeli, ni eyaakheene yeele yaahooca sa elapo ya oKanaani." 
Joshua5:13 Vanonto, Yoxuwa areene vakhiviru wa oYeriko aaweha osulu, anamoona mulopwana eemenleene ohoolowawe akuxaleene ekatana. Yoxuwa aamwaattamela, anamukoha: “Nyuwo a hiyo hoye hoye a amwiittanaahu?" 
Joshua5:14 Owo aamwaakhula: “Nkinthalu, kirwiiye ntoko mutokweene a anakhotto a Yave.” Yoxuwa aahuuramihela ekhovaawe vathi munttittimihoni, anamukoha: “Apwiyaaka mutthenga heeni araayano wa murumeiyaaya?”" 
Joshua5:15 Mutokweene a anakhotto a Yave aamwaakhula: “Murule ikwakwattasanyu, niwoko nipuro mweemenlaanyu ti nootteela.” Ni Yoxuwa aarula." 
Joshua6:1 Vano Milako sa oYeriko saari soowaliweene niwoko na aYixrayeli. Khaawo aakhuma naari aavolowa. 
Joshua6:2 Vanonto Yave aamweerela Yoxuwa: “Moone, kohoovahani Yeriko mmatatanimwanyu, vamoha ni mwenaaya ni anakhottwaawe.”" 
Joshua6:3 Mweette murukureeraka esidade emaara emoha khula nihuku vamoha ni anakhotto ootheene. Mpake yeeyo wa mahuku mathannamosa. 
Joshua6:4 Asaserdoti* athanneeli ekuxeke mapalapatta a manyaka a maankhoro ohoolo wa Arka*. Vanihukuni nanaathannameeli mweette ootheene imaara ithannapiili murukureeraka esidade, asaserdoti* yiipaka mapalapatta." 
Joshua6:5 Mwiiwaka oruma wa mapalapatta wiipiwa woopwaherera, muloko wootheene okhuwelaxeke ni vano exiri ya esidade enoomora ni muloko onoowana, khula mutthu vanipuroni aneeraawe akhale." 
Joshua6:6 Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, aawiitthana asaserdoti*, anaweerela: “Mwaateexe Arka* a Wiiraana a Yave ni asaserdoti* athanneeli a nyuwo ekuxeke mapalapatta ohoolowaya.”" 
Joshua6:7 Aalamulelatho muloko, eeraka: “Muroweke! Mweette murukureeraka esidade ni anakhotto eroweke ohoolo wa Arka* a Yave.”" 
Joshua6:8 Yoxuwa amalihakaru wuuluma ni muloko, asaserdoti* athanneeli yaakhuxale mapalapattaaya vamaithoni wa Yave yaarowa ohoolo yiipaka mapalapatta ni Arka* a Wiiraana a Yave yaatthara ottuliwaya." 
Joshua6:9 Anakhotto yaari ohoolo wa asaserdoti* yiipa mapalapatta ni anakhotto akinaawo yaatthara Arka*. Ehuhu yootheeneeyo yiipiwa mapalapatta. 
Joshua6:10 Yoxuwa aalamulela muloko: “Muhikhuwele hata muhinyakule naari muhuulume mpaka nihuku kineeraaka koolamuleleni weera mukhuwele. Vano nihuku nno muneeraanyu mukhuweleke!” 
Joshua6:11 Hiiho aYixrayeli yaarukureera mukhwipi wa esidade ni Arka* a Yave emaara emoha. Vahoolowaya yaahokoleela waakonelingwe, enavirihawo ohiyu." 
Joshua6:12 Waaxiiye Yoxuwa aavenya ni asaserdoti* yaahaateexa Arka* a Yave. 
Joshua6:13 asaserdoti* athanneeli yaakhuxale mapalapatta yaarowa ohoolo wa Arka* a Yave, yiipaka mapalapattaaya. Anakhotto yaakhala ohoolowaya ni anakhotto akinaawo yaatthara Arka* a Yave, mapalapatta epwahereraka wiipiwa." 
Joshua6:14 Nihuku nanaaveeli yaarukureeratho esidade emaara emoha, enahokoleela waakonelingwe. Yaapaka yeeyo wa mahuku mathannamosa." 
Joshua6:15 Vanihukuni nanaathannameeli yaavenyasa oyaaka ni oxa, eneettasa mooteene yoowo imaara ithannapiili, erukureeraka esidade; naari nihuku nenno paahi yaarukureenraaya esidade imaara ithannapiili." 
Joshua6:16 Emaara yanaathannapiili, asaserdoti* yiipaaya mapalapatta, vano Yoxuwa aalamulela muloko: “Mukhuweleke, niwoko Yave ohoovahererani esidade!" 
Joshua6:17 Esidade ni sootheene siri mwemmo sitteeliheriweke Yave. Paahi puuta Rakhabi ni ootheene ari mpaanimwawe eneera yuureliwe, niwoko aawiipithiha anamahottela naarumihalaahu." 
Joshua6:18 Muhikuxeru itthu sootteeliheriwa hata emoha ya seiyo. Mwakuxasa iyo, munoophwatiwa mwaaruuhelaka ophwatiwa ni irisa aYixrayeli." 
Joshua6:19 Eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yootheene ni ikaruma sa ebronze* ni iyuuma sikina sitteeliheriweke Yave ni siroihiweke omuhakhuniwawe.” 
Joshua6:20 Erumakaru mapalapatta, muloko waakhuwela. Exiri yaamora niwoko na oruma wa mapalapatta ni okhuwelaxiwa. Hiiho aYixrayeli yaavolowa, khula mutthu nipuro aaraawe, enakuxa esidade." 
Joshua6:21 Yaamutteelihera Yave esidade yaaphwataka ni ekatana ootheene ni sootheene saarino okumi – alopwana ni athiyana; amiravo ni asitokweene; imombe, ikhondoolo ni abuuru." 
Joshua6:22 Yoxuwa aaweerela asilopwana eeli yaarongwe ohottela elapo ele: “Mvolowe mpaani mwa puuta ni mwamukhumihemo vamoha ni amusaawe ootheene, ntoko mwaamuroromelinghaanyu.”" 
Joshua6:23 Vano asilopwana yaarongwe ohottela elapo yaavolowasa, enamukhumiha Rakhabi, atithawe, amayawe, axirokoriye ni amusaawe ootheene. Yaahaakhumihamo ootheene a emusaawe, enawiikaathi okhwipi yaakonelaaya aYixrayeli." 
Joshua6:24 Vahoolowaya yaahisa esidade yootheene ni sootheene saarimo. Vaheera yaavaherera eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa, ikaruma sa ebronze* ni eyuuma ekina omuhakhuni wa Empa ya Yave." 
Joshua6:25 Vano Yoxuwa aamuurela puuta Rakhabi, vamoha ni emusaawe ni anatithawe, niwoko aawiipithiha anamahottela Yoxuwa aarumihenlaawe oYeriko. Owo onkhala ni aYixrayeli mpaka olelo." 
Joshua6:26 Ehuhuweene yeele Yoxuwa aalipelaxa: “Oolaphiwa akhale yoowo aneera eerere orasela esidade ya oYeriko! Owo ahela mathipelowaaya, ntthaaranawe nnimookhwa, ni arasela maselaaya, etthaakwaawe enimookhwatho.”" 
Joshua6:27 Vano Yave aari ni Yoxuwa ni epilaawe yaamwareela mweelaponi. 
Joshua7:1 Wa soothesene, aYixrayeli khayaaroromeleiye ni itthu sootteeliheriwa. Akani, mwaana mulopwana a Karemi, mwaana mulopwana a Zabedi, mwaana mulopwana a Zera, a epuumba ya Yuda, aahiiya ikina sa seiye. Isara sa Yave saahaaluttuwela aYixrayeli." 
Joshua7:2 Yoxuwa aahaarumihela asilopwana akina wAi, waattamela oBet-Aveni, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oBeteli, aweerelaka: “Murowe ni mwahottelase elapo eyo.” Hiiho asilopwana yaarowasa, enahottela wAi." 
Joshua7:3 Yaahokoleenlaaya wa Yoxuwa, yaamweerela: “Khoontthuneya orowawo anakhotto ootheene owana wAi. Mwaarumihe asilopwana macira miloko miili hoye hoye macira miloko miraru weera yaakamelewo. Muhaakhulumule anakhotto ootheene, niwoko atthu a wAi ari vakhaani." 
Joshua7:4 Hiiho wookwanaka asilopwana macira miloko miraru yaawana ni wAi, mene kayaawenre waawina asilopwana a wAi, enatthawawo." 
Joshua7:5 Mwa yeeyo yaawiiva asilopwana miloko miraru ni athannamosa a aYixrayeli. Yaahaattharelela aYixrayeli okhuma vamulako wa esidade mpaka oXevarimi ewiivaka akina muxepani. Niwoko na yeeyo muloko waapororaxa. 
Joshua7:6 Vano Yoxuwa aahaahula ikuwosawe uuramihelaka ekhovaawe vathi ohoolo wa Arka* a Yave, iihenleene etthaya mmuru. Aakhalawo mpaka wiila. Asitokweene a aYixrayeli yaapaka mooteene yoowo." 
Joshua7:7 Yoxuwa aaheera: “Ii! Yave, Yave, heeni mulapuxenreni muloko ola muYordanu? Mweerela onivaherera mmatatani mwa awAmori weera eniphwate? Eya! Fataari naakhanle okhopela Yordanu!" 
Joshua7:8 Ii! Yave, keereke hai, yeenre aYixrayeli ewiniwaka ni amwiittanaaya?" 
Joshua7:9 aKanaani ni miloko sikina sa elapo ela sinoosuwela yeela ni sinoonirica, siniphwataka mweelaponimu. Vano mmwipake eheeni weera mwaakihe Nsinananyu ntokweene?”" 
Joshua7:10 Yave aamweerela Yoxuwa: “Mweemele, muuramenle heeni vawo?" 
Joshua7:11 aYixrayeli aattheka. Aarambura wiiraanawaka kaalamulenlaaka. Aakuxa sikina sa itthu sootteeliheriwa. Ahiiya, aavitha, enikaathi vamoha ni itthusaya." 
Joshua7:12 Ti niwoko na yeeyo aYixrayeli ahingweraaya waawina amwiittanaaya. Ammwaatthawa, niwoko ahiiruuhela ophwatiwa. Miyo nkinkhalatho ni nyuwo mwaahiphwatasa variyariwanyu yeeyo etteeliheringwe ophwatiwa." 
Joshua7:13 Murowe, mwatteelihe muloko. Mwaaleele: ‘Mwiitteeliherase weera mukhaleke oolikaneene omaalo, niwoko Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli oneera ha: Sookhala itthu sootteeliheriwa ophwatiwa variyariwanyu, aYixrayeli. Khamungwera waawina amwiittanaanyu muhithupulunle." 
Joshua7:14 Mwiixooniherase oxeexelo: epuumba ti epuumba. Vano epuumba Yave aneeraawe athanle, eroweke ohoolo. Nihimo ti nihimo na epuumba eyo niixoonihereke. Vanonto, nihimo Yave aneeraawe athanle, niroweke ohoolo. Emusi ti emusi ya nihimo nno yiixoonihere. Mutthu ti mutthu a emusi eyo iixoonihereke." 
Joshua7:15 Yoowo anaavaraniwe itthu sootteeliheriwa onoohisiwa mmooroni vamoha ni sootheene orinaawe. Owo oorambura Wiiraana wa Yave ni oopaka etthu yoowuuliha muru muYixrayeli.’” 
Joshua7:16 Oxaawaya Yoxuwa aalamula weera ootheene yiixoonihere, epuumba ti epuumba. Vano epuumba ya Yuda yaathanliwa." 
Joshua7:17 Khula nihimo na Yuda naahiixoonihera ni aZerahi yaathanliwa. Khula emusi ya nihimo na aZerahi yaahiixoonihera ni Zabedi aathanliwa. 
Joshua7:18 Yoxuwa aalamula weera mulopwana ti mulopwana a emusi ya Zabedi iixoonihere ni Akani, mwaana mulopwana a Karemi, mwaana mulopwana a Zabedi, mwaana mulopwana a Zera, a epuumba ya Yuda, aathanliwa." 
Joshua7:19 Vano Yoxuwa aamweerela Akani: “Mwanaka, mumvuwihe Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli ni munttottopeleke. Mukileele yeeyo mpankaanyu. Muhikikhuwe.”" 
Joshua7:20 Akani aamwaakhula: “Ettiitthu. Koomutthekela Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli. Kipankaaka ti ela:" 
Joshua7:21 Kaahoona variyari wa soohuhula mukaandyo wooreeraxa wa oBabiloniya, ixekeli* macira meeli sa eparatha* ni mpatta wa eyuuma yoorikaxa, olemelawaya ixekeli* miloko mithanu. Saakivoreihela murima, kinakuxa. Sivithiwe vathi wa eheemaaka, eparatha* ereene vathiwaya.”" 
Joshua7:22 Yoxuwa aahaarumiha asilopwana akina enatthimakela oheemani wa Akani weiwo saavithiwaayawo itthu, ni eparatha* vathiwaya." 
Joshua7:23 Yaakhumiha muheemani, enamuroihela Yoxuwa ni aYixrayeli ootheene, eniikaathi vamaithoni wa Yave." 
Joshua7:24 Vano Yoxuwa vamoha ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaamukuxa Akani, mwaana mulopwana a Zera, eparatha*, mukaandyo, mpatta wa eyuuma yoorikaxa, anamwanaawe asilopwana ni asithiyana, imombesawe, abuurwaawe, ikhondoolosawe, eheemaawe ni sootheene aarinaawe emuronghaka oreyareyani wa Akori." 
Joshua7:25 Yoxuwa aamukoha: “Munitannyerenle heeni erisa ela? Olelo Yave onimootannyeranitho erisa!” Vano aYixrayeli ootheene yaamvonya maluku ni vahoolowaya yaahaavonya awawe, enaahisa ootheene ni sootheene mmooroni." 
Joshua7:26 Vasulu wa Akani yaahuukeliwa maluku mancipale aakhala mpaka olelo. Yave aariiriha isarasawe. Tivawo nipuro nne nniitthaniwaaya oreyareyani wa Akori mpaka olelo. 
Joshua8:1 Vano Yave aamweerela Yoxuwa: “Muhoove. Muhiporore. Mwaakuxe anakhotto ootheene, mwawaneno wAi. Koomwinnyerera mmatatanimwanyu mwene a wAi, mulokwaawe, esidadaawe ni elapwaawe." 
Joshua8:2 Munoopakela wAi ni mwenaaya ntoko mwaapakenlaanyu oYeriko ni mwenaaya. Vano emaara ela ontthuniheriwa okuxa soohuhula ni mihuwosaya. Mwaalamule anakhotto akina weera yawiipithele wiithela esidade. 
Joshua8:3 Hiiho Yoxuwa ni anakhottwaawe ootheene yaarowa weera yawaneno esidade ya wAi. Aahaathanla asilopwana 30 000 ooweraxa, anaarumiha vaate ohiyu" 
Joshua8:4 ni nlamulo nna: “Nnene! Mwiipithe wiithela esidade. Muhirakamelaxe yeeyo. Ootheene muhiitthaalase. 
Joshua8:5 Miyo vamoha ni ootheene ari ni miyo nnimwaattamela esidade. Vano asilopwana awo yaakhumaka weera eniwaneno ntoko yaapankaaya woopacera, nnimwaatthawasa." 
Joshua8:6 Awosa anoonittharelela mpaka ottai wa esidade, niwoko animweera: ‘Awosa aanitthawasa ntoko yaanitthangwaaya woopacera.’ Vano hiyo naatthawaka," 
Joshua8:7 nyuwosa mwiithupululaseke ni mukuxeke esidade. Yave Mulukwaanyu onoowinnyererani. 
Joshua8:8 Mwaakuxaka esidade, muhiseke. Mpake yeeyo Yave olamulenlaawe. Mweetteleke nnenesene mahusihowaaka.”" 
Joshua8:9 Hiiho Yoxuwa aahaarumihasa. Awosa yaarowa, eniipithasa eriyari ya oBeteli ni wAi, mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa wAi. Wa soothesene, Yoxuwa aaviriha ohiyu ole ni anakhotto a waakoneliwe." 
Joshua8:10 Oxaawaya, Yoxuwa aawiitthana anakhottwaawe ni owo vamoha ni asitokweene a aYixrayeli yaattimula ohoolowaya erowaka wAi." 
Joshua8:11 Anakhotto ootheene yaari ni yoowo yaarowasa, enaattamela esidade, enakonelela ohoolowaya. Yaakungasa iheema mpatta wa ottuttuwani wAi, oreyareyani oreene eriyaraaya ni esidade." 
Joshua8:12 Yoxuwa aawiipitheliha wookwanaka asilopwana macira miloko mithanu eriyari ya oBeteli ni wAi, mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa esidade." 
Joshua8:13 Ootheene yaari mmapuronimwaya – akina mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa esidade ni akinaawo mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa yeeyo. Vano, ohiyuweene yoole Yoxuwa aarowa oreyareyani." 
Joshua8:14 Mwene a wAi oonaka yeeyo, owo vamoha ni anakhottwaawe ootheene yaavenya woowaakuveya oxaakaru weera yaawaneno aYixrayeli waattamela nreyareya na wAraba. Owo khaasuwela weera ahiipitheliwa wiithela esidade." 
Joshua8:15 Yoxuwa ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaahoothereriha owiniwa, enatthawela onikareni." 
Joshua8:16 Asilopwana ootheene a wAi yaalamuliwa weera yaattharelele. Awosa yaamuttharelelasa Yoxuwa mpaka ottai wa esidade. 
Joshua8:17 Asilopwana ootheene a wAi ni oBeteli yaahaattharelela aYixrayeli. Yaahiya esidade mwii yaattharelelaka aYixrayeli. 
Joshua8:18 Vano Yave aamweerela Yoxuwa: “Mutheteele nivaka nri mmatatanimwanyu mpatta wAi, niwoko kinoowinnyererani esidade.” Hiiho Yoxuwa aatheteela nivaka mpatta wAi." 
Joshua8:19 Vano atheteelakaru nivaka, anakhotto yiipinthe yaavenya woowaakuveya, enaatthimakela. Yaavolowa musidade, enawina, enahisa." 
Joshua8:20 Asilopwana a wAi ewehakaru ottuli, yaahoona otthuwaka mwiixi musidade okelaka musulu, mene khayaanono wootthawelaawo woonaka weera aYixrayeli yaatthangwe erowaka onikareni yaahaarukunuwela yaale yaawoomola." 
Joshua8:21 Yoxuwa ni aYixrayeli ootheene yoonaka weera anakhotto akina yaawina esidade, mwiixi otthuwaka musidade, yaahokolowa, enaarukunuwela asilopwana a wAi." 
Joshua8:22 Anakhotto akinaawo yaakhuma musidade weera yaawanenotho. Hiiho asilopwana a wAi yaaricasiwa, ereene aYixrayeli mipatta soomiili. aYixrayeli yaawiiva ehimuhiyaka mukumi naari ootthawa." 
Joshua8:23 Wa soothesene, yaamurongha wa Yoxuwa mwene a wAi areene ni okumi." 
Joshua8:24 Vano aYixrayeli yaawiiva ni ekatana anakhotto ootheene a wAi yaari mmatta ni munikareni mwemmo yaawoomolaayamo. Vahoolowaya aYixrayeli ootheene yaahokoleela esidade ya wAi, enawiiva yaawo yaahanlewo." 
Joshua8:25 Nihuku nenenenne yaakhwiiye atthu 12 000 – waari muloko wootheene wa wAi. 
Joshua8:26 Vano Yoxuwa khaahiyerenre otheteela nivaka mpaka ohononeya amaki a wAi. 
Joshua8:27 Wa soothesene, aYixrayeli yaahiikuxera mihuwo ni soohuhula sa esidade, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Yoxuwa." 
Joshua8:28 Hiiho Yoxuwa aahisa wAi, anahiya ittuxoru onaheleyawo mathala mpaka olelo." 
Joshua8:29 Aamutthukelela mwene a wAi mmwirini amuhiyaka mwemmwe mpaka oxekuwa. Vano wiilaka, Yoxuwa aalamulela weera ekuruxe muttembo wa mwene mmwirini ni evonyere vamulako wa esidade. Vasuluwaya yaahuukelela maluku mancipale nduu, ari mpaka olelo." 
Joshua8:30 Vahoolowaya Yoxuwa aamutekela Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, altaari* vamwaako Ebali," 
Joshua8:31 ntoko Moisesi, murumeiyi a Yave, aalamulenlaawe aYixrayeli. Aahaateka attharihaka yeeyo elempwale mulivuruni ya Nlamulo na Moisesi – altaari* a maluku oohiratteliwa, mwa yaawo khayaavareliwe ikaruma sa eyuuma. Vasuluwaya yaampakela Yave sooveleela soohisa ni sa murettele." 
Joshua8:32 Weiwo, vamaithoni wa aYixrayeli Yoxuwa aalepa mmalukuni malamulo Moisesi aalempaawe." 
Joshua8:33 aYixrayeli ootheene, akhalaka muYixrayeli hoye hoye namarwa, vamoha ni asitokweenaaya, ahoolelaaya ni aphukaaya yaari yeemelelo mipatta soomiili sa Arka* a Wiiraana a Yave yaawehawehaka yaawo yaateexa, eyo tiiyo asaserdoti* yaari aLeevi. Mpatta mukina wa muloko waari yeemelelo ohoolo vamwaako Gerizimi ni mpatta mukinoowo ohoolo vamwaako Ebali, ntoko Moisesi, murumeiyi a Yave, aalamulenlaawe khalayi muloko wa aYixrayeli weera oreelihiwe." 
Joshua8:34 Vahoolowaya Yoxuwa aasoma masu ootheene a malamulo – mareeliho ni malapho– ntoko elempwalaaya mulivuruni ya Nlamulo. 
Joshua8:35 Owo aasoma masu ootheene Moisesi aalamulenlaawe wa muthukumano wootheene wa aYixrayeli, mpakatho asithiyana, anamwane nitho anamarwa yaaphiyerenle." 
Joshua9:1 Mamwene ootheene a mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa Yordanu – yaawo a vanyaakoni, yaawo a vathi wa nyaako ni yaawosa a mukerekhere wa ephareiya etokotoko mpaka oLibanu, eyo tiiyo mamwene a aHiti, awAmori, aKanaani, aPerizi, aHivi ni aYebusi, yaahiiwa sa itthu iye." 
Joshua9:2 Vano yaathukumana weera engwaneno Yoxuwa ni aYixrayeli. 
Joshua9:3 Wa soothesene, aGibiyoni yiiwaka yeeyo Yoxuwa aapakenlaawe oYeriko ni wAi," 
Joshua9:4 yaavaanela waalokottha aYixrayeli. Yaarowa wa aYixrayeli yoothererihaka weera ankhuma ottai, aburwaaya ekuxaleene isaakho sa khalayi ni mirupa sa eviinyu sa khalayi, soothaala ni soopareiwa." 
Joshua9:5 Awosa yaawara ikwakwaatta soothaala ni soopareiwa, ewanreenetho mataparattha. Sooca sootheene sa munkhwahani saari soowuuma ni sa ekhuttela." 
Joshua9:6 Vano yaarowa wa Yoxuwa aari waakoneliwe oGiligali, enamweerela yoowo ni aYixrayeli: “Ninkhumelela elapo ya ottaiwene. Vano nintthuna weera niiraaneke.”" 
Joshua9:7 aYixrayeli yaaweerela aHivi: “Apaale munkhala vakhiviruwahu. Mwa yeeyo, khoonghwereya hiyo wiiraana ni nyuwo.”" 
Joshua9:8 Awosa yaamweerela Yoxuwa: “Hiyo arumeiyaanyu.” Yoxuwa aahaakoha: “Nyuwosa taani ni mungweela woowi?” 
Joshua9:9 Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Arumeiyaanyu angweela elapo ya ottai niwoko na epili ya Yave Mulukwaanyu. Naahiiwa ihaali sa sootheene aapankaawe wExipitu 
Joshua9:10 ni sa sootheene aapakenlaawe mamwene meeli a awAmori, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa Yordanu, Sihoni, mwene a Hexeboni ni Ogi, mwene a oBaxani aalamula wAxetaroti." 
Joshua9:11 Vano asitokweenaahu ni ootheene a elapwaahu yaaneerela: ‘Munkuxe pooso, murowe, mwaakumaneno yaawo, ngweerelaka: “Hiyo arumeiyaanyu, mwiiraane ni hiyo.”’" 
Joshua9:12 Sooca iya saari sooviha hiyo naahelaahu owaani nihuku nivennyaahu nirwaaka nno. Vanonto, moone moota suumalaaya ni sisanraaya ekhuttela." 
Joshua9:13 Ni mirupa iya sa eviinyu saari sinyowani, mene vano moone – sohaahuwa. Ikwakwattasahu ni soowarasahu soothaala niwoko na mukwaha woorakamaxa.”" 
Joshua9:14 aYixrayeli yaangwehaweha pooso a aHivi, mene khayaavenke miruku sa Yave." 
Joshua9:15 Vano Yoxuwa aakhaliha wiiraana wa murettele ni yaawosa aroromelihaka wuurela okumaaya. Asitokweene a muthukumano yaahaakhulela ni nlipelo. 
Joshua9:16 Eviraleene mahuku mararu vahoolo wa wiiraana, aYixrayeli yaasuwela weera aGibiyoni ale yaari amwaattamanaaya." 
Joshua9:17 Tivawo aYixrayeli yaattimunlaaya ni mukwaha erowaka wa isidadesaya ni eviraleene mahuku mararu yaaphiya oGibiyoni, oKefira, oBeheroti ni oKiriyati-Yeharimi." 
Joshua9:18 Wa soothesene, aYixrayeli khayaawananne, niwoko asitokweene a muthukumano yaahaaroromeliha ni nlipelo vamaithoni wa Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli. Muthukumano wootheene waahaattaandawula asitokoweenaaya," 
Joshua9:19 mene asitokweeneene yaale yaahaakhula: “Hiyo naahaaroromeliha vamaithoni wa Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, tivawo nihingweraahu etthu." 
Joshua9:20 Vanonto, nnaapakele moota ola: Nnaahiya ni okumi weera nihithorihiwe ni Muluku niwoko na onanariha nlipelo naapakenlaahu.”" 
Joshua9:21 Awosa yaapwaherera yeeraka: “Mwaahiyeke ekhaleke ni okumi, mene ekhaleke anakhuuni ni anamattuutta a maahi wa muloko wootheene.” Hiiho asitokweene yaattittimiha nlipelonaya." 
Joshua9:22 Vano Yoxuwa aahaalattula aGibiyoni, anaweerela: “Munilokontthenleni mweeraka weera munkhala ottaiwene vekhaikhai mukhalaka vakhiviru?" 
Joshua9:23 Nyuwosa moolaphiwa! Munookhala ipottha mahuku ootheene mwaasaka ikhuuni ni muttuuttelaka maahi Empa ya Mulukwaaka.” 
Joshua9:24 Awosa yaamwaakhula Yoxuwa: “Arumeiyaanyu yaaleeliwa nnenesene moota Yave Mulukwaanyu aamulamulenlaawe murumeiyaawe Moisesi weera aamoovahani elapo yootheene ela ni weera aangwiiva amaki ootheene a elapo yeela. Naamoova weera eniinikhumelele eheeni niwoko na nyuwosa, tivawo nuupuwenlaahu hiiho." 
Joshua9:25 Hiyo nri mmatatanimwanyu. Munipakele yeeyo munoonaanyu weera yooreera ni ya ekhaikhai.” 
Joshua9:26 Yoxuwa aawoopola ni khaatthunihenre wiivasiwa. 
Joshua9:27 Nihuku nne aahaapakiha aGibiyoni anakhuuni ni anamattuutta a maahi wa muloko ni wa altaari* a Yave vanipuroni Yave eeraawe athanle. Ni mpaka olelo awosa ari anakhuuni ni anamattuutta a maahi. 
Joshua10:1 Vano Adoni-Zedeki, mwene a oYerusaleemu, aasuwela weera Yoxuwa aawina wAi aphwataka voothevene ni weera aapakela wAi ni mwenaaya ntoko aapakenlaawe oYeriko ni mwenaaya. Aasuwelatho weera aGibiyoni yaapaka murettele ni aYixrayeli ekhalaka variyariwaya." 
Joshua10:2 Owo ni atthwaawe ootheene yaahoova vancipale niwoko na yeeyo, woonaka weera oGibiyoni yaari esidade yoottittimiheyaxa – ntoko esidade enlamuliwa ni mwene mmoha. Yaari etokotoko yoopwaha wAi ni asilopwanaaya ootheene yaari anakhotto ooreeraxa." 
Joshua10:3 Vano Adoni-Zedeki, mwene a oYerusaleemu, aamvekela Hohami, mwene a oHeberoni, Pireyami, mwene a oYaremuti, Yafiya, mwene a oLakixi ni Debiri, mwene a wEgeloni:" 
Joshua10:4 “Murwaase nno, munikhavihere owanano oGibiyoni, niwoko aGibiyoni aapaka murettele ni Yoxuwa vamoha ni aYixrayeli.”" 
Joshua10:5 Vanonto, mamwene mathanu ale a awAmori – mamwene a oYerusaleemu, oHeberoni, oYaremuti, oLakixi ni wEgeloni – yaathukumana. Yaarowa ni anakhottwaaya ootheene, enarica oGibiyoni, enawanano." 
Joshua10:6 aGibiyoni yaamurumihela Yoxuwa mutthenga ola waakonelingwe oGiligali: “Muhaahiye arumeiyaanyu. Ngweeke woowaakuveya ni munivuluxe! Munikhavihere, niwoko mamwene ootheene a awAmori ankhala mmanyaakoni aanithukumanela!”" 
Joshua10:7 Hiiho Yoxuwa vamoha ni anakhottwaawe ootheene nitho asilopwana ooweraxa owana yaattimula oGiligali. 
Joshua10:8 Yave aamweerela Yoxuwa: “Muhiwoove mamwene awo, kowinnyerera mmatatanimwanyu. Khawowo hata mmoha a yaawosa ongwera woowinani.”" 
Joshua10:9 Yeettaleene ohiyu wootheene ekhumaka oGiligali, Yoxuwa aahaaphwanya amwiittana wootutuxereya." 
Joshua10:10 Yave aahaapupurumiha ohoolo wa aYixrayeli ni aYixrayeli yaahaawina vancipale oGibiyoni. aYixrayeli yaahaattharelela mphironi enrowa oBeti-Horoni ewiivaka mphironi mpaka wAzeka ni oMakeda. 
Joshua10:11 Vano awosa yaatthawaka aYixrayeli onkhuruweloni wa oBeti-Horoni mpaka wAzeka, Yave aahaavonyera maralala matokweene wiirimu yaawiivale atthu ancipale opwaha ikatana sa aYixrayeli." 
Joshua10:12 Vanihukuni nenenenne Yave aawinyenraawe awAmori wa aYixrayeli, Yoxuwa aamukhuwelela Yave vamaithoni wa aYixrayeli: “Nsuwa, neemelele oGibiyoni ni mweeri, weemelele vareyareyani na wAyaloni!”" 
Joshua10:13 Vanonto, nsuwa naaheemela ni mweereene mpaka aYixrayeli owiinlela ikuhu amwiittanaaya, ntoko elempwalaaya mulivuruni ya Yaxari. Nsuwa naaheemela eriyari erimu wookwanaka nihuku nootheene ohiilaka." 
Joshua10:14 Hata khalayi naari ohoolo khanirwa nikhala nihuku nikina ntoko nenne, Yave aamwaakhulenlaawe mutthu. Vekhaikhai Yave aawana aweerelaka aYixrayeli!" 
Joshua10:15 Vahoolowaya Yoxuwa aahokoleela waakoneliwa oGiligali vamoha ni aYixrayeli ootheene. 
Joshua10:16 Vano, mamwene mathanu ale yaatthawa, enarowa wiipitha munikhukuni na oMakeda." 
Joshua10:17 Yoxuwa aaleeliwa weera mamwene mathanu yaaphwanyiwa yiipintheene munikhukuni na oMakeda. 
Joshua10:18 Owo aaheera: “Mpirikixele maluku matokotoko mulako wa nikhuku ni mwaakhalihewo asilopwana akina weera elipelelewo. 
Joshua10:19 Wa soothesene, nyuwosa muhimaale! Mwaattharelele amwiittanaanyu. Mwaawaneno ottuliwaya muhaatthuniheraka ophiya isidadesaya, niwoko Yave Mulukwaanyu oowinnyerera mmatatanimwanyu." 
Joshua10:20 Hiiho Yoxuwa ni anakhottwaawe yaahaawinasa woomalela ohaleela waamaliha, mene vakhaani akina yaawera woopowa, enatthawela musidadenimwaya soolipihiwaxa." 
Joshua10:21 Vahoolowaya anakhotto ootheene yaahokoleela ni murettele wa Yoxuwa waakonelingwe oMakeda. Khaawo eerenretho wuuluma weera aatannye aYixrayeli. 
Joshua10:22 Yoxuwa aaheera: “Muhuleke mulako wa nikhuku ni mukiruuhele mamwene mathanu awo.” 
Joshua10:23 Vano mamwene mathanu ale yaakhumihasiwa munikhukuni. Yaari mamwene a oYerusaleemu, oHeberoni, oYaremuti, oLakixi ni wEgeloni." 
Joshua10:24 Awo yaaruuhaka mamwene ale wa Yoxuwa, owo aahaalattula asilopwana ootheene a aYixrayeli, anaweerela asitokweene ootheene a anakhotto yaamuhoonle: “Ngwe va ni mwaanyikalase muxiko mamwene ala.” Hiiho awosa yaahiiwelela." 
Joshua10:25 Yoxuwa aaweerela: “Muhoove. Muhiporore. Mukhomaale ni mulipihe murima. Ti yeeyo Yave aneeraawe aapakeleke amwiittana ootheene muneeraanyu mwaawananeke.” 
Joshua10:26 Vahoolowaya Yoxuwa aahaamana, anawiiva mamwene, analamulela othomeiwa nnyirini mithanu ni yaari vaavaale mpaka wiila." 
Joshua10:27 Wiilaka Yoxuwa aalamulela weera yakuruxiwe nnyirini, enavonyeriwa munikhukuni mwemmo yiipithasiyaayamo. Yaattiya maluku matokotoko vamulako ariwo mpaka olelo."
