Joshua10:28 Nihuku nne Yoxuwa aakuxa oMakeda. Aawiiva ootheene a esidade vamoha ni mwenaaya ni ekatana aaphwataka ootheene ni sootheene ahimuhiyaka mukumi. Aampakela mwene a oMakeda yeeyo aampakenlaawe mwene a oYeriko. 
Joshua10:29 Vahoolowaya Yoxuwa ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaattimula oMakeda erowaka oLibena, enawanawo." 
Joshua10:30 Yave aahinnyereratho esidade ele ni mwenaaya mmatatani mwa aYixrayeli. Yoxuwa aawiiva ootheene a esidade ele ni ekatana ahimuhiyaka mukumi. Aampakela mwene a oLibena yeeyo aampakenlaawe mwene a oYeriko. 
Joshua10:31 Vahoolowaya Yoxuwa ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaattimula oLibena erowaka oLakixi. Yaarica, enawanano." 
Joshua10:32 Yave aawinnyerera oLakixi aYixrayeli ni waaxiiye Yoxuwa aakuxawo. Yoxuwa aawiiva ootheene a esidade ele ntoko aapakenlaawe oLibena. 
Joshua10:33 Vanonto, ehuhu emoharu yeeyo Horami, mwene a oGezeri, aarowa okhavihera oLakixi, mene Yoxuwa aangwina vamoha ni anakhottwaawe moota wooweera khaawo aahanle mukumi." 
Joshua10:34 Yoxuwa ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaattimula oLakixi erowaka wEgeloni. Yaarica, enawanano." 
Joshua10:35 Yaawina nihuku nenenenne ewiivaka ootheene esidadeene yeele ni ekatana, ntoko yaapakenlaaya oLakixi." 
Joshua10:36 Vahoolowaya Yoxuwa ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaattimula wEgeloni erowaka oHeberoni, enawanano." 
Joshua10:37 Yaakuxa esidade ewiivaka ootheene a mwemmo vamoha ni mwenaaya ni ootheene a mittetthe soowaattamana. Khayaamuhiyaleru mukumi. Yaaphwata voothevene esidade yootheene ewiivaka ootheene yaarimo, ntoko yaapakenlaaya wEgeloni." 
Joshua10:38 Vahoolowaya Yoxuwa ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaahokoleela owanano oDebiri. 
Joshua10:39 Yaakuxa esidade ewiivaka ootheene a mwemmo vamoha ni mwenaaya ni ootheene a mittetthe soowaattamana. Khayaamuhiyaleru mukumi. Yaapakela oDebiri ni mwenaaya yeeyo yaapakenlaaya oLibena ni mwenaaya nitho ni oHeberoni. 
Joshua10:40 Hiiho Yoxuwa aawina elapo yootheene yeele vamoha ni elapo ya munyaakoni, oNegeba, yaawosa a vathi wa munyaakoni ni a mmattumuxani, awiivaka mamwenaaya ootheene ahimuhiyaka mukumi. Aaphwata sootheene saari ni okumi, ntoko Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, aalamulenlaawe." 
Joshua10:41 Yoxuwa aakuxa okhuma oKadexi-Bareneya mpaka oGaza ni okhuma elapo yootheene ya oGoxeni mpaka oGibiyoni. 
Joshua10:42 Owo aahaawina mamwene ootheene ale vamoha ni ilaposaya ekwaha emoharu yeeyo, niwoko Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, aahaawanela aYixrayeli." 
Joshua10:43 Vahoolowaya Yoxuwa aahokoleela waakoneliwa oGiligali vamoha ni aYixrayeli ootheene. 
Joshua11:1 Vano Yabini, mwene a oHazori, asuwelaka yeeyo, aamwiitthana mwene Yobabi, mwene a oMadoni, mamwene a oXimeroni ni wAkexafi," 
Joshua11:2 mamwene a mpatta wa ottuttuwani yaari vanyaakoni, mamwene a wAraba, a vathi wa mmanyaakoni, a mpatta wa ohitto wa oKineroti, a oNafoti-Dori ori mpatta ninkela nsuwa," 
Joshua11:3 a oKanaani ninkhuwa ni ninkela nsuwa, aani, aawiitthanatho awAmori, aHiti, aPerizi, aYebusi ari mmanyaakoni ni aHivi ari vathi wa oHeremoni, elapo ya oMizepa." 
Joshua11:4 Yaahoorwa ni anakhottwaaya ni ikavalu* ni ikaarosaya sincipale; anakhotto oowaattaxa, ntoko muhaava wa mukerekhere wa ephareiya." 
Joshua11:5 Vano mamwene ootheene ale yaathukumana enakonela mukerekhere wa maahi a oMeromi weera yaawaneno aYixrayeli. 
Joshua11:6 Yave aamweerela Yoxuwa: “Muhiwoove, niwoko omaalo, ehuhuweene yeela, kinoowinnyerera ookhwa ootheene wa aYixrayeli. Nyuwosa mmwikakatthe itthottobwa sa ikavalusaya* ni muhiseke ikaarosaya.”" 
Joshua11:7 Yoxuwa ni anakhottwaawe yaahaatutuxerasa mukerekhere wa maahi a oMeromi, enaawanano." 
Joshua11:8 Yave aawinnyerera aYixrayeli. Awosa yaahaawina yaattharelelaka mpaka oSidoni otokweene, oMiserefoti-Mayimi, mpakatho vareyareyani wa oMizepa, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, enawiiva, ehimuhiyaka mukumi." 
Joshua11:9 Yoxuwa aahaapaka ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe. Aakakattha itthottobwa ikavalusaya*, anahisa ikaarosaya." 
Joshua11:10 Ehuhuweene yeele owo aahokoleela, anawina oHazori, anamwiiva mwenaaya, niwoko oHazori waari otokweene wa ilaposene seiye." 
Joshua11:11 Yaawiiva ootheene yaari mwemmo ephwataka esidade ni sootheene saari mwemmo ehimuhiyaka mukumi, enahisa oHazori." 
Joshua11:12 Yoxuwa aawina isidade sa emwene sootheene iye, awiivaka mamwenaaya. Aaphwata woomalela, ntoko Moisesi murumeiyi a Yave aalamulenlaawe." 
Joshua11:13 Wa soothesene, aYixrayeli khayaahinseru naari esidade emoha yaatekiwe vanttumuxani, ohiya oHazori, mwa yeeyo Yoxuwa aahinsaawe." 
Joshua11:14 aYixrayeli yaahiikuxera soohuhula ni mihuwo sootheene sa isidade iye, nave yaawiiva amaki ootheene woomalelaxa, ehimuhiyaka mukumi." 
Joshua11:15 Hiiho ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe murumeiyaawe Moisesi, hiihotho Moisesi aamulamulenlaawe Yoxuwa ni Yoxuwa aapaka yeeyo. Aapaka sootheene Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Joshua11:16 Hiiho Yoxuwa aakuxa elapo yootheene ele – elapo ya mmanyaakoni, oNegeba wootheene, elapo yootheene ya oGoxeni, elapo ya vathi wa mmanyaakoni, wAraba, nyaako sa oYixrayeli ni mihawalawasaya." 
Joshua11:17 Aakuxa okhuma mwaako Halaki ongwelela mpatta wa oSeyiri mpaka oBahali-Gadi vareyareyani wa oLibanu, vathi wa mwaako Heremoni. Aahaavara mamwenaaya ootheene, anawiiva." 
Joshua11:18 Yoxuwa annaawanano mamwene ale wa ehuhu yincipale. 
Joshua11:19 Yaari esidade emoharu yeeyo aapakenlaawe murettele ni muloko wa aYixrayeli waari oGibiyoni, weiwo yaakhalaayawo aHivi. Sikina iyo saawiniwa." 
Joshua11:20 Vano, aari Yave muneenaawe uumihale mirimasaya weera yaawaneno aYixrayeli. Aapaka yeeyo weera aaphwate woomalela, awiivaka woohaamorela ikharari, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Joshua11:21 Ehuhuweene yeele Yoxuwa aarowa waaphwata awAnaki a mmanyaakoni, oHeberoni, oDebiri, wAnabi ni nyaako sootheene sa oYuda ni oYixrayeli. Owo aahaaphwataxa vamoha ni isidadesaya." 
Joshua11:22 Khaahiiweru ngwAnaki mukumi mweelaponi ya aYixrayeli. Paahi oGaza, oGati ni wAxidodi akina yaahanlaayawo ni okumi." 
Joshua11:23 Hiiho Yoxuwa aawina elapo yootheene, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi ni aahaavaha aYixrayeli, aakawelaka elapo ipuumbasaya ntoko yoohiyeriwa. Vahoolowaya elapo yaahiitthuuwa ni ekhotto." 
Joshua12:1 Vano, mamwene yaawinnaaya aYixrayeli, ilaposaya sikuxiwaka mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oYordanu, okhuma vareyaryani wa Arenoni mpaka mwaako Heremoni, otakansa mpatta wootheene ninkhuma nsuwa wa wAraba, ti ala:" 
Joshua12:2 Sihoni, mwene a awAmori aalamula oHexeboni. Owo aalamula okhuma wAroweri mukerekhere wa vareyareyani wa wArenoni mpaka mooloko Yaboke ori mwiinano wa awAmoni, elapo eyo yaatakanseya mpatta wa oGiliyade." 
Joshua12:3 Aalamulatho mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa wAraba, okhuma ephareiya ya oKineroti mpaka ephareiya ya wAraba (eri Ephareiya ya Maakha), oBeti-Yeximoti ni mpaka mpatta wa ohitto mukerekhere mwaako Pisega." 
Joshua12:4 Aakuxatho elapo ya Ogi, mwene a oBaxani, mmoha oomalihera a aRefayimi aalamula wAsterote ni wEdereyi." 
Joshua12:5 Ogi aalamula mwaako Heremoni, oSaleka, elapo yootheene ya oBaxani mpaka omwiinanoni wa aGexuri ni aMahaakati, ni mpatta wa oGiliyade, mpakatho omwiinanoni wa Sihoni, mwene a oHexeboni." 
Joshua12:6 Moisesi, murumeiyi a Yave vamoha ni aYixrayeli aahaawina. Vano Moisesi, murumeiyi a Yave, aahaavaha ilaposaya aRubeni, aGadi ni eriyari ya aManaxe weera ephwanye ntoko yawaya." 
Joshua12:7 Yoxuwa ni aYixrayeli yaahaawina mamwene a elapo ya mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa Yordanu, okhuma oBahali-Gadi, vareyariyani wa oLibanu mpaka mwaako Halaki mpatta wa oSeyiri. Yoxuwa aakawa ilaposene seiye avahaka ipuumba sa aYixrayeli ntoko yoohiyeriwa." 
Joshua12:8 Ilapo seiye saatakansana elapo ya nyaako, elapo ya vathi wa nyaako, wAraba, mmattumuxani, munikareni, ni oNegeba siri ilapo sa aHiti, awAmori, aKanaani, aPerizi, aHivi ni aYebusi. Vano mamweneene yaawo yaari ti ala:" 
Joshua12:9 Mwene a oYeriko, mwene a wAi (vakhiviru wa oBeteli)," 
Joshua12:10 mwene a oYerusaleemu, mwene a oHeberoni," 
Joshua12:11 mwene a oYaremuti, mwene a oLakixi," 
Joshua12:12 mwene a wEgeloni, mwene a oGezeri," 
Joshua12:13 mwene a oDebiri, mwene a oGederi," 
Joshua12:14 mwene a oHarema, mwene a wAradi," 
Joshua12:15 mwene a oLibena, mwene a wAdulami," 
Joshua12:16 mwene a oMakeda, mwene a oBeteli," 
Joshua12:17 mwene a oTapuwa, mwene a oHeferi," 
Joshua12:18 mwene a wAfeki, mwene a oLaxaroni," 
Joshua12:19 mwene a oMadoni, mwene a oHazori," 
Joshua12:20 mwene a oXimeroni-Meroni, mwene a wAkexafi," 
Joshua12:21 mwene a oTahanakhi, mwene a oMegidu," 
Joshua12:22 mwene a oKedexi, mwene a oYokeneyami waattamela oKaremeli," 
Joshua12:23 mwene a oDori (oNafoti-Dori), mwene a oGoyimi, waattamela oGiligali ni" 
Joshua12:24 mwene a oTireza, ootheenaawo yaari mamwene miloko miraru ni mmoha." 
Joshua13:1 Yoxuwa uuluvalanxeene Yave aamweerela: “Nyuwo mohuuluvalaxa ni soohala nlelo ilapo sincipale weera siwiniwe. 
Joshua13:2 Mipatta sihanle ti iya: Ilapo sootheene sa aFilisti ni sa aGexuri: 
Joshua13:3 Okhuma mooloko Xihori, mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa wExipitu, mpaka elapo ya wEkeroni, ottuttuwani – elapo yootheene eyo ti ya aKanaani. Vano entakanseriwa elapo ya anamalamula athanu a aFilisti a oGaza, wAxidoti, wAxekeloni, oGati ni wEkeroni, nitho elapo ya wAwi." 
Joshua13:4 Soohalatho okhuma ohitto mipatta sikina sa aKanaani okhuma wAra wa aZidoni mpaka wAfeki, mwiinano wa awAmori," 
Joshua13:5 elapo ya aGibeli ni elapo yootheene ya oLibanu mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa oBahali-Gadi, vathi wa mwaako Heremoni mpaka oLebo-Hamati." 
Joshua13:6 Vano wa ootheene amanke mmanyaakoni okhuma oLibanu mpaka oMiserefoti-Mayimi, eyo tiiyo aZidoni ootheene, Miyo muneenaaka kinoowoomola ohoolo wa aYixrayeli. Ontthuneya nyuwo waakawela aYixrayeli elapo eyo ntoko yoohiyeriwa, keenre Miyo koolamulelakani." 
Joshua13:7 Vanonto, mwakawele eyo ipuumba ithanniixexe ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe." 
Joshua13:8 Mpatta mukina wa aManaxe, vamoha ni aRubeni, aGadi yaahaakhela yoohiyeriwaaya mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oYordanu, ntoko Moisesi, murumeiyi a Yave, aathanlalaawe." 
Joshua13:9 Vano elapo ele enkhuma wAroweri mukerekhere wa vareyareyani wa wArenoni ni muttetthe eriyari ya vareyareyani vamoha ni vareyariyani wootheene wa oMadeba, mpaka oDiboni," 
Joshua13:10 ni mittetthe sootheene sa Sihoni, mwene a awAmori aalamula oHexeboni, mpaka mwiinano wa awAmoni." 
Joshua13:11 Entakanseriwatho ni elapo ya oGiliyade, elapo ya aGexuri ni aMahaakati, mwaako wootheene wa oHeremoni ni elapo yootheene ya oBaxani mpaka oSaleka," 
Joshua13:12 eyo tiiyo omwene wootheene wa Ogi, oBaxani, aalamulaawe wAsterote ni wEdereyi aari mmoha a ookisera a aRefayimi yaahanle ni okumi. Moisesi aahaawina, anakuxa ilaposaya." 
Joshua13:13 Wa soothesene, aYixrayeli khayaawoomonle aGexuri ni aMahaakati, mwa yaawo ankhala variyari wa aYixrayeli mpaka olelo.’" 
Joshua13:14 Vanonto epuumba ya aLeevi khayaahiyenre etthu woonaka weera sooveleela soohisa soopakeliwa Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, ti yoohiyeriwaaya, ntoko aaleenlaawe." 
Joshua13:15 Moisesi aavaha epuumba ya aRubeni mipatta iya sa elapo (nihimo ti nihimo): 
Joshua13:16 Okhuma elapo ya wAroweri, mukerekhere wa vareyareyani wa wArenoni ni muttetthe eriyari ya vareyareyani, vamoha ni vareyariyani wootheene opwahaka oMadeba," 
Joshua13:17 mpaka oHexeboni ni mittetthesaya sootheene sa muttuttuwani otakanseriwaka oDiboni, oBamoti-Bahali, oBeti-Bahal-Meyoni," 
Joshua13:18 oYahazi, oKedemoti, oMefahati," 
Joshua13:19 oKiriyatayimi, oSibema, oZereti-Xahari vanttumuxani na vareyariyani," 
Joshua13:20 oBeti-Peyori, onkumanela ni oPisega ni oBeti-Yeximoti –" 
Joshua13:21 isidade sootheene sa muttuttuwani ni omwene wootheene wa Sihoni, mwene a awAmori aalamula oHexeboni. Moisesi aangwina nitho asitokweene aMidiyani: Evi, Rekemi, Zuri, Huri, ni Reba. Awosa yaari asitokweene yaakhala mweelaponi ele ni yaamukhavihera Sihoni." 
Joshua13:22 Waahiya yaawo yaakhwiiye okhottoni, aYixrayeli yaamwiivatho Bileyami, mwaana mulopwana a Beyori, mwa yoowo aahera ihako." 
Joshua13:23 Vano mwiinano wa aRubeni waari mukerekhere Yordanu. Isidade ni mittetthe iye saari yoohiyeriwa ya aRubeni, nihimo ti nihimo." 
Joshua13:24 Moisesi aavaha epuumba ya aGadi ilapo iya (nihimo ti nihimo): 
Joshua13:25 Elapo ya oYazeri, mittetthe sootheene sa oGiliyade ni eriyari ya elapo ya awAmoni mpaka wAroweri vakhiviru wa oRaba." 
Joshua13:26 Yaakhumme oHexeboni mpaka oRamati-Mizepe ni oBetonimi ni okhuma oMahanayimi mpaka elapo ya oDebiri. 
Joshua13:27 Vano vareyareyani wa Yordanu waatakanserana oBeti-Harami, oBeti-Nimera, oSukota ni Zafoni, vamoha ni yeeyo yaahanle ya omwene wa Sihoni, mwene a oHexeboni. Yaakumanela muxerexere Yordanu mpaka ephareiya ya oKineroti." 
Joshua13:28 Isidade ni mittetthe iye saari yoohiyeriwa ya aGadi, nihimo ti nihimo." 
Joshua13:29 Moisesi aavaha eriyari ya epuumba ya aManaxe (eyo tiiyo eriyari ya ekhapira ya Manaxe) ilapo iya (nihimo ti nihimo): 
Joshua13:30 Elapwaaya yaakhuumme oMahanayimi etakanseranaka ni elapo yootheene ya oBaxani, omwene wootheene wa Ogi, mwene a oBaxani, ni mittetthe sootheene sa oYahiri oBaxani – mittetthe miloko mithannamosa." 
Joshua13:31 Yaatakanseranatho eriyari ya oGiliyade ni wAxetarote ni wEdereyi – isidade sa omwene wa Ogi oBaxani. Iye saari mipatta sa elapo saakhaliheriwe eriyari ya ekhapira ya Makiri, mwaana mulopwana a Manaxe, nihimo ti nihimo." 
Joshua13:32 Moisesi aavaha yoohiyeriwa ele aaraawe vareyareyani wa oMowabe okhopela Yordanu, mpatta nikhuma nsuwa wa oYeriko." 
Joshua13:33 Wa soothesene, epuumba ya aLeevi Moisesi khaavangheru yoohiyeriwa woonaka weera Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, ti yoohiyeriwaaya, ntoko aaleenlaawe." 
Joshua14:1 aYixrayeli yaahaakhela mipatta sikina ntoko yoohiyeriwa mweelaponi ya oKanaani. Musaserdoti* Eleyazari, Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, ni asitokweene a mahimo a ipuumba sa aYixrayeli yaakawela iye." 
Joshua14:2 Okawiwa wa yoohiyeriwa yaalakeliwe mmwaathanleni eriyari ya ipuumba ithanniixexe ni eriyaraaya, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Joshua14:3 Moisesi aakawela ipuumba piili ni eriyari ya epuumba yoohiyeriwaaya mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa oYordanu, vaheera khaavanghe aLeevi yoohiyeriwa variyariwaya." 
Joshua14:4 Vano anamwane a Yoseefe yaari ipuumba piili – Manaxe ni Efrayimi, ni aLeevi khayaakhenle mpatta wa elapo. Yaakhenle paahi mittetthe sookhala ni ntuphi noociha mihuwosaya." 
Joshua14:5 Hiiho aYixrayeli yaakawana elapo ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi. 
Joshua14:6 Asilopwana a oYuda yaamwaattamela Yoxuwa oGiligali ni Kalebi, mwaana mulopwana a Yefune, muKenizi, aamweerela: “Moosuwela yeeyo Yave aamweerenlaawe Moisesi, mulopwana a Muluku, oKadexi-Bareneya mwaha wa hiyo ooweeli." 
Joshua14:7 Kaarino iyaakha miloko mixexe Moisesi, murumeiyi a Yave, aakiruminghaawe oKadexi-Bareneya weera kahottele elapo. Kaamuthalihera koonnaaka sootheene saaphwanela ororomela." 
Joshua14:8 Vaheera axunnaka yaakihoonle yaapororiha muloko ni woova. Wa soothesene, miyo kaamutthara Yave Mulukwaaka ni murimaaka wootheene." 
Joshua14:9 Vano nihuku nne Moisesi aakiroromeliha ni nlipelo: ‘Elapo mweenttaanyu eniikhale yoohiyeriwaanyu yoohimala ni ya anamwaniinyu, niwoko moomutthara Yave Mulukwaaka ni murima wootheene.’" 
Joshua14:10 Vanonto, ntoko Yave aaroromelinghaawe, aakikosoopa weera kikhale ni okumi wa iyaakha miloko mixexe niithanu okhuma ehuhuweene yeele Yave uulummaawe yeeyo ni Moisesi, aYixrayeli yeettaaya munikareni. Ni olelo kirino iyaakha miloko mithannamiraru niithanu." 
Joshua14:11 Nlelo kiri oolipeene ntoko ehuhuweene yeele Moisesi aakiruminghaawe; kiri oolikaneene owana ntoko kaaraaka ehuhuweene yeele. 
Joshua14:12 Tivawo, mukivaheke elapo ela ya mmanyaakoni, mwa yeeyo Yave aakiroromelinghaawe nihuku nne. Nyuwo muneenaanyu mwaahiiwa nihuku nne weera awAnaki yaamakawo ni weera isidadesaya saari sitokotoko ni soolipihiwaxa. Vaheera ni ekhavihero ya Yave kinoowoomola ntoko aaroromelinghaawe.”" 
Joshua14:13 Vano Yoxuwa aamureeliha Kalebi, mwaana mulopwana a Yefune, anamvaha oHeberoni ntoko yoohiyeriwa." 
Joshua14:14 Hiiho mpaka olelo oHeberoni ti wa Kalebi, mwaana mulopwana a Yefune, muKenizi, niwoko aamutthara Yave Muluku a aYixrayeli ni murimaawe wootheene." 
Joshua14:15 Khalayeene oHeberoni wiitthaniwa oKiriyati-Arba – attittimiheriwaka Arba aari mutokweenexa variyari wa awAnaki. Vahoolowaya elapo yaahiitthuuwa ni ekhotto. 
Joshua15:1 Mipatta sa elapo saakaweliwe epuumba ya Yuda, nihimo ti nihimo, saakhumme elapo ya wEdomi, wa nikare na oZini ori mpatta wa ohittoxa." 
Joshua15:2 Mwiinanowaaya wa ohitto waakhuumme omuxeloni ori mpatta wa ohitto Ephareiya ya Maakha," 
Joshua15:3 onavira mpatta wa ohitto wa ekhato ya Walisi, opwahereraka oZini ni woovenya vaavaawo mpaka mpatta wa ohitto wa oKadexi-Bareneya. Vahoolowaya waavira oHezeroni mpaka wAdara ni waarukureera wookela oKareka." 
Joshua15:4 Woovenya vaavaale waapwaherera mpaka wAzemona wookela Nxaapwa na wExipitu okotaka mphareiya. Owo waari mwiinano wa ohitto. 
Joshua15:5 Mwiinano wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa waari Ephareiya ya Maakha mpaka omahelano wa Yordanu. Mwiinano wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani waapacenre omuxeloni wa ephareiya mukerekhere wa mahelano a Yordanu," 
Joshua15:6 onawelela mpaka oBeti-Hogela, onavira ottuttuwani wa oBeti-Araba mpaka nluku na Bohani, mwaana mulopwana a Rubeni." 
Joshua15:7 Mwiinano waakhuma oDebir okelaka vareyareyani na wAkori ni waarukureera okottoombelaka mpatta wa ottuttuwani wookela oGiligali, ohoolo wa ekhato ya wAdumimi, mpatta wa ohitto wa vareyareyani. Waavira mmaahini a wEni-Xemexi orowaka mpaka wEni-Rogeli." 
Joshua15:8 Okhuma vaavaale waawelela nreyareya na oBen-Hinomi, mpatta wa ohitto wa esidade ya aYebusi (eyo tiiyo oYerusaleemu). Okhuma vaavaale waawelela mpaka vasulu mwaako, mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa nreyareya na oHinomi, mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa nreyareya na oRefayimi." 
Joshua15:9 Okhuma vasulu wa mwaako mwiinano waapwaherera onaattuuttuni wa maahi a oNefetowa mpaka mittetthe sa mwaako wEfroni, okhuruwelaka wookela oBahala ori oKireyati-Yeharimi." 
Joshua15:10 Vano okhuma oBahala waakottoombela mpatta ninkela nsuwa mpaka omwaako Seyiri, opwahereraka mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa mwaako oYeharimi (ori oKesaloni). Woottharelana waapwaherera okhuruwelaka mpaka oBeti-Xemexi ni waavira oTimena." 
Joshua15:11 Vahoolowaya waarowa mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa mwaako wEkroni, okottoombelaka wookela oXikerona, opwahereraka mpaka omwaako Bahala ni waaphiya oYabeneyeli okotaka mphareiya." 
Joshua15:12 Mwiinano wa mpatta ninkela nsuwa waari Ephareiya Etokotoko. Saari ti seiya nyiinano sa oYuda mmipattani moothemwene, ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya." 
Joshua15:13 Yoxuwa aamvaha Kalebi, mwaana mulopwana a Yefune, mpatta wa oYuda, ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe. Aamvaha oKiriyati-Arba, eyo tiiyo oHeberoni. Vano Arba aari nikholo na Enaki." 
Joshua15:14 Kalebi aawoomola oHeberoni awAnaki araru, Xexai, Ahimoni ni Talema, ekhapira ya Enaki." 
Joshua15:15 Okhuma vaavaale aahaawanano amaki a oDebiri (khalayeene wiitthaniwa oKiriyati-Seferi). 
Joshua15:16 Vano Kalebi aaheera: “Mulopwana aneera awine oKiriyati-Seferi, kinoomvaha mwanaka muthiyana, Akesa, weera amuthele.”" 
Joshua15:17 Oteniyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Kenazi, munneiye Kalebi, aawina, tivawo Kalebi aamvanghaawe mwanawe, Akesa, anamuthela." 
Joshua15:18 Akesa arowakaru okhala ni Oteniyeli, owo yaamvorenghela murima, aavekenle ematta wa atithawe. Akesa akhuruwakaru vabuuruniwawe, Kalebi aamukoha: “Muntthunani?”" 
Joshua15:19 Owo aamwaakhula: “Kintthuna mukivahe etthu. Mweenre mukivahaka elapo eri oNegeba, mukivahetho anaattuuttu a maahi.” Hiiho Kalebi aamvaha anaattuuttu akina a osulu ni a vathi." 
Joshua15:20 Vano, yoohiyeriwa epuumba ya Yuda wa khula nihimo ti ela:" 
Joshua15:21 Isidade saari mpatta wa ohittoxa sa epuumba ya Yuda oNegeba wookela omwiinanoni wEdomi saari: oKabezeyeli, wEderi, oYaguri" 
Joshua15:22 oKina, oDimona, wAdada," 
Joshua15:23 oKedexi, oHazori, wItenani," 
Joshua15:24 oZifi, oTelemi, oBeyaloti," 
Joshua15:25 oHazori-Hadata, oKeriyoti-Hezeroni (eyo tiiyo oHazori)," 
Joshua15:26 wAmami, oXema, oMolada," 
Joshua15:27 oHazari-Gada, oHexemoni, oBet-Peleti," 
Joshua15:28 oHazari-Xuwali, oBerxeba, oBizeyoteya" 
Joshua15:29 oBahala, wIyimi, wEzemi," 
Joshua15:30 wEletolade, oKesili, oHorema," 
Joshua15:31 oZikalagi, oMademana, oSanesana," 
Joshua15:32 oLebawoti, oXileyimi, wAyini ni oRimoni. Saari isidade miloko miili niithanniixexe ni mitteettesaya." 
Joshua15:33 Mukerekhere nyaako, mpatta ninkela nsuwa: wExtawoli, oZora, wAxena," 
Joshua15:34 oZanowa, wEni-Ganimi, oTapuwa, wEnami," 
Joshua15:35 oYaremuti, wAdulami, oSoko, wAzeka," 
Joshua15:36 oXaharayimi, wAditayimi ni oGedera (hoye hoye oGederotayimi). Saari isidade muloko niixexe ni mittetthesaya." 
Joshua15:37 oZenani, oHadaxa, oMigedal-Gadi," 
Joshua15:38 oDileyani, oMizepa, oYoketeyeli," 
Joshua15:39 oLakixi, oBozekati, wEgeloni" 
Joshua15:40 oKaboni, oLahemasi, oKitelixi," 
Joshua15:41 oGederoti, oBeti-Dagoni, oNahama, oMakeda. Saari isidade muloko niithannamosa ni mittetthesaya." 
Joshua15:42 oLibena, wEteri, wAxani," 
Joshua15:43 wIfeta, wAxena, oNezibi," 
Joshua15:44 oKeyila, wAkezibi, oMarexa. Saari isidade ithanniixexe ni mittetthesaya." 
Joshua15:45 wEkeroni ni iboomasaya ni mittetthesaya; 
Joshua15:46 okhuma wEkeroni mpaka ophareiya, isidade sootheene sookhuveela wAxidoti ni mittetthesaya;" 
Joshua15:47 wAxidoti ni iboomasaya ni mittetthesaya; oGaza ni iboomasaya ni mittetthesaya mpaka Nxaapwa na wExipitu ni mukerekhere Ephareiya Etokotoko. 
Joshua15:48 Ilapo sa mmanyaakoni: oXamiri, oYatiri, oSoko" 
Joshua15:49 oDana, oKiriyati-Sana (eyo tiiyo oDebiri)," 
Joshua15:50 wAnabi, wExetemo, wAnimi" 
Joshua15:51 oGoxeni, oHoloni, oGilo. Saari isidade muloko niimoha ni mittetthesaya." 
Joshua15:52 wArabi, oDuma, wExeyani," 
Joshua15:53 oYanimi, oBeti-Tapuwa, wAfeka" 
Joshua15:54 oHumeta, oKiriyati-Arba (eyo tiiyo oHeberoni) ni oZiyori. Saari isidade ithanniixexe ni mittetthesaya." 
Joshua15:55 oMawoni, oKaremeli, oZifi, oYuta," 
Joshua15:56 oYizereyeli, oYokedeyami, oZanowa," 
Joshua15:57 oKayini, oGibeya ni oTimena. Saari isidade muloko ni mittetthesaya." 
Joshua15:58 oHalehuli, oBeti-Zuri, oGedori," 
Joshua15:59 oMaharati, oBet-Anoti ni wEletekoni. Saari isidade ithannamosa ni mittetthesaya." 
Joshua15:60 oKiriyati-Bahali* (eyo tiiyo oKiriyati-Yeharimi) ni oRaba. Saari isidade piili ni mittetthesaya. 
Joshua15:61 Munikareni: oBet-Araba, oMidini, oSekaka," 
Joshua15:62 oNibexani, esidade ya maakha, ni wEni-Gedi. Saari isidade ithannamosa ni mittetthesaya." 
Joshua15:63 Vano aYuda khayaawenre owoomola aYebusi yaamanke oYerusaleemu. Mpaka olelo aYebusi amanke weiwe vamoha ni aYuda. 
Joshua16:1 Elapo yaakaweliwe ekhapira ya Yoseefe yaakhumme oYordanu, waattamela oYeriko, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa maahi a oYeriko, ni yaawelela munikareni ekelaka omanyaakoni wa oBeteli." 
Joshua16:2 Okhuma oBeteli ori oLuzi, yaarowa elapo ya awArki, wAtaroti." 
Joshua16:3 Okhuma vaavaale mwiinanowaaya waakhuruwela mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa aYafeleti, mpaka elapo ya vathi vathi oBeti-Horoni, opwahereraka mpaka oGezeri, okotaka mphareiya." 
Joshua16:4 Hiiho Manaxe ni Efrayimi, ekhapira ya Yoseefe, yaahaakhela yoohiyeriwaaya." 
Joshua16:5 Vanonto, elapo ya Efrayimi, nihimo ti nihimo, yaari ti ela: Mwiinano wa yoohiyeriwaawe waakhuumme wAtaroti Adari, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, mpaka ottuttwani wa oBeti-Horoni," 
Joshua16:6 opwahereraka mpaka mphareiya. Okhuma oMikemetati, ottuttuwaniwaya, waakottoombela mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, mpaka oTahanati-Xilo, oviraka mwa yoowo waarowa oYanowa ori mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa." 
Joshua16:7 Vahoolowaya waakhuruwela oYanowa wookela wAtaroti ni oNaharati, ohururaka oYeriko, onakota oYordanu." 
Joshua16:8 Okhuma oTapuwa mwiinano waarowa mpatta ninkela nsuwa mpaka nxaapwa na oKana ni waakota mphareiya. Yoohiyeriwa ya ekhapira ya Efrayimi, nihimo ti nihimo, yaari ti yeela," 
Joshua16:9 vamoha ni isidade sootheene ni mittetthesaya simwalamwaliheriweene awEfrayimi mwa yoohiyeriwa ya ekhapira ya Manaxe. 
Joshua16:10 Awosa khayaawoomonle aKanaani yaamanke oGezeri. Mpaka olelo aKanaani ankhala vamoha ni awEfrayimi, mene aamvarihiwa miteko sooviha." 
Joshua17:1 Saari ti seiya ilapo yaakaweliwe epuumba ya Manaxe, ntthaara na Yoseefe. Aavahiwa Makiri, ntthaara na Manaxe. Makiri aari nikholo na aGiliyade ni aahaakhela oGiliyade ni oBaxani, niwoko aari nakhotto ooweraxa." 
Joshua17:2 Vano, yaavahiwatho ilapo mahimo a anamwane akina a aManaxe; Abiyezeri, Heleki, Aseriyeli, Xekhemi, Heferi ni Xemida. Ala ti anamwane asilopwana akina a Manaxe, mwaana mulopwana a Yoseefe, ettharihiwaka maimwaaya." 
Joshua17:3 Wa soothesene, Zelofehadi, mwaana mulopwana a Heferi, mwaana mulopwana a Giliyade, mwaana mulopwana a Makiri, mwaana mulopwana a Manaxe khaarinoru mwaana mulopwana. Aarino paahi anamwane asithiyana, masinaaya yaari Mahela, Nowa, Hogela, Milka ni Tireza." 
Joshua17:4 Vanonto, awosa yaarowa wa musaserdoti*, Eleyazari, Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, ni asitokweene, enaweerela: “Yave aamulamulela Moisesi weera anivahe yoohiyeriwa variyari wa axunnihu.” Hiiho Yoxuwa aahaavaha yoohiyeriwa vamoha ni axunnaya asitithaya, ntoko Yave aalamulenlaawe." 
Joshua17:5 Epuumba ya Manaxe yaahaakhela mipatta muloko sa elapo, ohiya oGiliyade ni oBaxani, saari mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oYordanu," 
Joshua17:6 niwoko anamwane asithiyana a epuumba ya Manaxe yaahaakhela yoohiyeriwa vamoha ni yaale asilopwana. Elapo ya oGiliyade yaahiyeriwe ekhapira ekina ya Manaxe. 
Joshua17:7 Elapo ya Manaxe yaakhumme wAxeri mpaka oMikemetati, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oXekhemi. Okhuma vaavaale mwiinano waakhumme weiwe mpatta wa ohitto orowaka mpaka wa amaki a wEni-Tapuwa." 
Joshua17:8 Ilapo sa oTapuwa saari sa Manaxe, vaheera esidade ya oTapuwa, mmwiinanoni wa oManaxe, yaari ya awEfrayimi." 
Joshua17:9 Ovenyera vaavaale mwiinano waapwaherera orowaka mpaka nxaapwa na oKana. Mpatta wa ohitto wa nxaapwa, saakhala isidade saari sa Efrayimi saatakansanne ni seiye sa Manaxe, mene mwiinano wa Manaxe waari mpatta wa ota wa nxaapwa okotaka mphareiya." 
Joshua17:10 Mpatta wa ohitto wa nxaapwa elapo yaari ya Efrayimi, vaheera ni mpatta wa ota wa nxaapwa yaari ya Manaxe. Elapo ya Manaxe yaaphiya mphareiya, enakotela mpatta wa ottuttuwani wAxeri ni mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa wIsakari." 
Joshua17:11 Vano mweelaponi mwa wIsakari ni wAxeri, Manaxe aakhalanotho oBeti-Xani, oYibleyami, amaki a oDori (eyo tiiyo oNafoti-Dori), wEnidori, oTahanakhi, ni oMegidu, vamoha ni mittetthesaya." 
Joshua17:12 Wa soothesene, aManaxe kayaawenre owoomola amaki a isidasene seiyo, niwoko aKanaani yaalakela okhala elapweene yeele." 
Joshua17:13 Vanonto, aYixrayeli yaalimpaaya, yaahaanyesereriha aKanaani ovara miteko sooviha, mene khayaawoomonleru." 
Joshua17:14 Ekhapira ya Yoseefe yaamweerela Yoxuwa: “Munivahenreni mpatta wa ettima emoha paahi ya yoohiyeriwa? Hiyo khanreere waatta ni Yave oonireeliha vancipale.” 
Joshua17:15 Yoxuwa aawaakhula: “Nyuwosa mweenre mwaattaka, ni elapo ya mmanyaakoni ya wEfrayimi mapurowaaya ari vakhaani, vano murowe mwavolowe moothakoni ni mwiirehererele mapurowaanyu mweelaponi ya aPerizi ni aRefayimi.”" 
Joshua17:16 Ekhapira ya Yoseefe yaamwaakhula: “Elapo ya mmanyaakoni khanikwanela. Ohiya toko yeeyo, aKanaani amanke vareyareyani aakhalano ikaaro sa iyuuma sa ikavalu* – yaawosa ankhala oBeti-Xani, vamoha ni mittetthesaya, nitho yaawosa a vareyareyani wa oYizereyeli.”" 
Joshua17:17 Wa soothesene, Yoxuwa aaheerela epuumba ya Yoseefe eri Efrayimi ni Manaxe: “Nyuwosa mohaatta ni oolipaxa. Vano khamukhalano ettima emoha paahi," 
Joshua17:18 mene elapo ya mmanyaakoni ni othaakwaaya eniikhaletho yawinyu. Mwiirehererele mapuro ni nyaakosayasene soorakamela nsikhale sawinyu. aKanaani, arookhalanaru ikaaro sa iyuuma sa ikavalu* ni oolipeene, nyuwosa munoowoomolasa.”" 
Joshua18:1 Muthukumano wootheene wa aYixrayeli waathukumana oXilo ni vaavaale yaakungiwa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. Vano elapo yaalamuliwa ni yaawosa," 
Joshua18:2 vaheera ipuumba ithannapiili khasaakhenle soohiyeriwasaya. 
Joshua18:3 Yoxuwa aaweerela aYixrayeli: “Mpaka yaakhani muramusaka okuxa elapo Yave, Muluku a makholowaanyu, oovanghaaweni?" 
Joshua18:4 Vano, khula epuumba yaathanleke asilopwana araru. Miyo kinimwaarumihela weera yawehawehe elapo yoonaka okhala yeenraaya ettharihaka yoohiyeriwa ya khula epuumba. Vahoolowaya ehokoleeleke wa miyo." 
Joshua18:5 Mukawanyihe elapo mipatta mithannamiili. aYuda ekhaleke mweelaponimwaya ya ohitto ni epuumba ya Yoseefe mweelaponimwaya ya ottuttuwani. 
Joshua18:6 Yoona okhala seenraaya mipatta sa elapo, mukiruuheleke ni miyo kinimoopakelani mwaathanle vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaahu." 
Joshua18:7 Wa soothesene, aLeevi khayaakhela etthu variyariwaanyu, niwoko osaserdoti* wa Yave ti yoohiyeriwaaya. Vanonto, Gadi, Rubeni ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe yaahaakhela yoohiyeriwaaya mpatta wa ninkhuma nsuwa wa oYordanu. Moisesi, murumeiyi a Yave, aahaavaha elapo ele." 
Joshua18:8 Asilopwana yaattimulasaya weera yawehawehe elapo, Yoxuwa aaweerela: “Murowe mwasomele elapo ni mwalepe okhala yeenraaya. Vahoolowaya muhokoleele wa miyo ni kinimoopakelani mwaathanle wenno oXilo vamaithoni wa Yave." 
Joshua18:9 Vano awosa yaattimula, enaviravira mulaponi. Yaalepa mpapheloni okhala yeenraaya – esidade ti esidade, ekawaka elapo mipatta mipatta mithannamiili, enahokoleela wa Yoxuwa waakonelingwe oXilo." 
Joshua18:10 Vahoolowaya Yoxuwa aahaapakela mwaathanle oXilo vamaithoni wa Yave ni weiwo aahaakawela aYixrayeli elapo ntoko yaaphwanelaaya – epuumba ti epuumba. 
Joshua18:11 Yaareereliwe aBenyamini, nihimo ti nihimo. Elapo yaareereliwe yaari eriyari ya yeeyo ya ipuumba sa Yuda ni Yoseefe." 
Joshua18:12 Mpatta wa ottuttuwani mwiinanowaaya waapacenre muYordanu, oviraka vareyareyani wa ottuttuwani wa oYeriko, onapwaherera okelaka mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa elapo ya mmanyaakoni, okotaka munikareni na oBet – Aveni." 
Joshua18:13 Okhuma vaavaale waarowa mpatta wa ohitto wa nyaako sa oLuzi (eyo tiiyo oBeteli), okhuruwelaka wAterot-Adari vamwaako ori ohitto wa vathi vathi wa oBeti-Horoni." 
Joshua18:14 Vano okhumela mwaako waari omwiinanoni wa oBeti-Horoni, ohitto, waakottoombela ohitto, ottharihaka mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa mwaako onakotela oKiriyati-Bahali (eyo tiiyo oKiriyati-Yeharimi), esidade emoha ya epuumba ya Yuda. Owo waari mwiinano wa mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa elapwaaya." 
Joshua18:15 Mwiinano wa ohitto waapacenre mpatta ninkela nsuwa mukerekhere wa oKiriyati -Yeharimi, onaphiya onaattuuttuni a Maahi a oNefetowa." 
Joshua18:16 Mwiinano waarowa mpaka mukerekhere mwaako ori ohoolo wa nreyareya na oBen-Hinomi, ottuttuwani wa nreyareya na oRefayimi. Vahoolowaya waapwaherera okhuruwelaka oreyareyani wa oHimoni, ottharihaka mpatta wa ohitto wa esidade ya aYebusi, onaphiya mpaka wEni-Rogeli." 
Joshua18:17 Vano, waakottoombela ottuttuwani orowaka wEni-Xemexi ni oGeliloti ori ohoolo wa okhatoni ya wAdumimi, onakhuruwela nluku na Bohani, mwaana mulopwana a Rubeni." 
Joshua18:18 Waapwaherera mpaka ottuttuwani wa mwaako, ohururaka oBet-Araba, okhuruwelaka wAraba." 
Joshua18:19 Vahoolowaya waahurura ottuttuwani wa oBeti-Hogela, onakotela omuxeloni ota wa Ephareiya ya Maakha, omahelano wa Yordanu ohitto. Owo waari mwiinano wa ohitto." 
Joshua18:20 Mooloko Yordanu aahelanne mwiinano wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Iyo saari nyiinano saahelana mipatta sootheene sa yoohiyeriwa ya mahimo a Benyamini. 
Joshua18:21 Epuumba ya Benyamini, nihimo ti nihimo, yaahaakhela isidade iya: oYeriko, oBeti-Hogela, wEmeki-Kezizi," 
Joshua18:22 oBet-Araba, oZamarayimi, oBeteli," 
Joshua18:23 wAwimi, oPara, wOfera," 
Joshua18:24 oKefari-Hamoni, wOfeni, oGeba. Saari isidade muloko ni piili ni mittetthesaya." 
Joshua18:25 oGibiyoni, oRama, oBeheroti," 
Joshua18:26 oMizepa, oKifera, oMoza," 
Joshua18:27 oRekemi, oYirepeyeli, oTarelaya" 
Joshua18:28 oZela, oHayalefi, esidade ya aYebusi (eyo tiiyo oYerusaleemu), oGibeya ni oKiriyati. Saari isidade muloko niixexe ni mittetthesaya. Ela yaari yoohiyeriwa ya mahimo a Benyamini." 
Joshua19:1 Emaara yanaaveeli yaareereliwe epuumba ya Simeyoni, nihimo ti nihimo. Yoohiyeriwaaya yaari mpuwa mweelaponi ya Yuda." 
Joshua19:2 Awosa yaahaakhela: oBerxeba, oXeba, oMolada," 
Joshua19:3 oHazari-Xuwali, oBala, wEzemi," 
Joshua19:4 wEletolade, oBetuli, oHorema," 
Joshua19:5 oZikalagi, oBeti-Marekaboti, oHazari-Susa," 
Joshua19:6 oBeti-Lebawoti, oXaruheni. Saari muloko ni tthaaru ni mittetthesaya." 
Joshua19:7 wAyini, oRimoni, wEteri ni wAxani. Saari isidade ixexe ni mittetthesaya" 
Joshua19:8 ni mittetthe sootheene soowaattamela isidade iye mpaka oBahalati-Beheri (eyo tiiyo oRama) ori oNegeba. Ela yaari yoohiyeriwa ya epuumba ya Simeyoni, nihimo ti nihimo." 
Joshua19:9 Vano yoohiyeriwa ya epuumba ya Simeyoni yaavenxiwe mwa oYuda, yeenre elapo ya epuumba ya Yuda yaavikanaka. Hiiho epuumba ya Simeyoni yaahaakhela yoohiyeriwaaya mpuwa mweelaponi ya oYuda." 
Joshua19:10 Emaara yanaararu yaareereliwe epuumba ya Zebuloni, nihimo ti nihimo. Mwiinano wa yoohiyeriwaaya waarowa mpaka oSaridi." 
Joshua19:11 Okhuma vaavaale waarowa mpatta ninkela nsuwa, onaphiya oMareyala, oviraka oDabexeti, opwahereraka mpaka nxaapwa nookhuveela oYokeneyami." 
Joshua19:12 Okhuma oSaridi waakottoombela mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wookela oKiseloti-Tabori opwahereraka mpaka oDaberati, onawelela mpaka oYafiya." 
Joshua19:13 Vahoolowaya waapwaherera mpaka mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, orowaka oGati-Heferi ni wEti-Kazini, ophiyaka oRimoni, onakottoombela oNeya." 
Joshua19:14 Okhuma mpatta wa ottuttuwani mwiinano waahokoleela oHanatoni, onakotela nreyareya na wEfita-Eli." 
Joshua19:15 Saatakanseriwatho saari isidade sa oKatali, oNahalali, oXimenroni, oYideyala ni oBeteleheemu. Saari isidade muloko ni piili ni mittetthesaya." 
Joshua19:16 Vano isidade iye ni mittetthesaya saari yoohiyeriwa ya epuumba ya Zebuloni, nihimo ti nihimo." 
Joshua19:17 Emaara yanaaxexe yaareereliwe epuumba ya Isakari, nihimo ti nihimo." 
Joshua19:18 Elapwaaya yaarino isidade iya: oYizereyeli, oKesuloti, oXunemi," 
Joshua19:19 oHafarayimi, oXiyoni, wAnaharati," 
Joshua19:20 oRabiti, oKixeyoni, wEbezi," 
Joshua19:21 oRemeti, wEni-Ganimi, wEni-Hada ni oBeti-Pazezi." 
Joshua19:22 Mwiinano waaphiya oTabori, oXahazuma ni oBeti-Xemexi, onakotela muYordanu. Saari isidade muloko niithannamosa ni mittetthesaya." 
Joshua19:23 Vano isidade iye ni mittetthesaya saari yoohiyeriwa ya epuumba ya Isakari, nihimo ti nihimo." 
Joshua19:24 Emaara yanaathanu yaareereliwe epuumba ya Axeri, nihimo ti nihimo." 
Joshua19:25 Elapwaaya yaarino isidade iya: oHelekati, oHali, oBeteni, wAkexafi," 
Joshua19:26 wAlameleki, wAmeyadi ni oMixehali. Mpatta ninkela nsuwa mwiinano waaphiya oKaremeli ni oXihori-Libenati." 
Joshua19:27 Okhuma vaavaale waakottoombela mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wookela oBeti-Gagoni, ophiyaka oZebuloni ni nreyareya na wEfita-Eli, onarowa mpatta wa ottuttuwani wookela oBeti-Emeki ni oNeyiheli, oviraka moono muthiyana wa oKabuli." 
Joshua19:28 Waarowa wEbroni, oRehobi, oHamoni, oKana, mpakatho oSidoni Etokweene." 
Joshua19:29 Vahoolowaya mwiinano waahokoleela oRama, orowaka esidade yoolipihiwaxa ya oTiro, waakottoombela oHosa, onakotela mphareiya mulaponi mwa wAkezibi," 
Joshua19:30 wUma, wAfeki ni oRehobi. Saari isidade miloko miili ni piili ni mittetthesaya." 
Joshua19:31 Vano isidade iye ni mittetthesaya saari yoohiyeriwa ya epuumba ya Axeri, nihimo ti nihimo." 
Joshua19:32 Emaara yanaathannamosa yaareereliwe epuumba ya Nafitali, nihimo ti nihimo." 
Joshua19:33 Mwiinanowaaya waakhumme oHelefi ni mwiri mutokotoko wa oZahananimi, oviraka wAdami-Nekebi ni oYabeneyeli opwahereraka mpaka oLakumi, onakotela muYordanu." 
Joshua19:34 Mwiinano waarowa mpatta ninkela nsuwa oviraka wAzenoti -Tabori mpaka oHukoki. Waaphiya mpatta wa ohitto wa oZebuloni, mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa wAxeri ni oYordanu mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa." 
Joshua19:35 Isidade soolipihiwaxa saari oZidimi, oZeri, oHamati, oRakati, oKineroti," 
Joshua19:36 wAdama, oRama, oHazori," 
Joshua19:37 oKedexi, wEdereyi, wEni-Hazori," 
Joshua19:38 oYironi, oMigedal-Eli, oHoremi, oBet-Anati ni oBeti-Xemexi. Saari isidade muloko niithanniixexe ni mittetthesaya." 
Joshua19:39 Vano isidade iye ni mittetthesaya saari yoohiyeriwa ya epuumba ya Nafitali, nihimo ti nihimo." 
Joshua19:40 Emaara yanaathannapiili yaareereliwe epuumba ya Dani, nihimo ti nihimo" 
Joshua19:41 Elapo ya yoohiyeriwaaya yaarino isidade iya: oZoreya, wExtawoli, wIri-Xemexi," 
Joshua19:42 oXahalabini, wAyaloni, oYitela," 
Joshua19:43 wEloni, oTimena, wEkeroni," 
Joshua19:44 wEleteke, oGibetoni, oBahalati," 
Joshua19:45 oYehudi, oBene-Beraki, oGati-Rimoni," 
Joshua19:46 oMe-Yarekoni, oRakoni ni elapo eri ohoolo wa oYafa." 
Joshua19:47 Wa soothesene, epuumba ya aDani yaakhalano makacamiho ookuxano elapwaaya, tivawo yaawanenlaaya oLexemi, enawina, ewiivaka amaki a weiwo ni ekatana enaakamela. Yaahiitekihasa muLexemi, enattehamo oDani, nsina na nikholonaya." 
Joshua19:48 Vano isidade iye ni mittetthesaya saari yoohiyeriwa ya epuumba ya Dani, nihimo ti nihimo." 
Joshua19:49 Emalihakaru okawa ilapo mipatta mipatta ni nyiinanosaya, aYixrayeli yaamvahasa Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, yoohiyeriwa variyariwayasa," 
Joshua19:50 ntoko Yave aalamulenlaawe. Yaamvaha esidade aavekenlaawe – oTimenati-Sera, mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi. Vano aaraselawo esidade, iitekihaka." 
Joshua19:51 Saari ilaposene seiye musaserdoti* Eleyazari, Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, ni mapwattapwattha a mahimo a ipuumba sa Yixrayeli yaakawannaaya mooreereliwani oXilo vamaithoni wa Yave, vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*. Hiiho yaamaliha okawana elapo." 
Joshua20:1 Vano Yave aamweerela Yoxuwa: 
Joshua20:2 “Mwaaleele aYixrayeli weera ethoonyere isidade sootthawela, ntoko koolamulenlaakani mwa Moisesi." 
Joshua20:3 Hiiho yoowo anaamwiive mutthu woohilakela mweerisani, atthawelemo iixaakihaka mwa nakukuttula ohononeliwe." 
Joshua20:4 Aatthawelaka hiihaale emoha ya isidade iye, eemeleke vamulako wa esidade ni aathalihereke mulattu owo asitokweene a esidade eyo. Awosa emwaakheleke ni emvaheke nipuro nookhala variyariwayasa." 
Joshua20:5 Vano, nakukuttula ohononeliwe amuttharelela, asitokweene ehimwinnyerereke, niwoko omwiivale mukhwaawe mweerisani, woohinthowa ni woohilakela." 
Joshua20:6 Vano, owo apwaherereke okhala esidade eyo mpaka ophiya nihuku na nthorihelo vamaithoni wa muthukumano ni mpaka okhwa wa mutokweene a asaserdoti* anaarumeeleke ehuhuweene yeeyo. Vahoolowaya ahokoleeleke owannyawe esidade aatthangwaawe.”" 
Joshua20:7 Hiiho yaathanla oKedexi, oGalileya mmanyaakoni sa oNafitali, oXekhemi mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi ni oKiriyati-Arba (eyo tiiyo oHeberoni) mmanyaakoni sa oYuda." 
Joshua20:8 Mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oYordanu waattamela oYeriko yaathanla oBezeri munikareni vamwaako ori mweelaponi ya epuumba ya oRubeni, oRamoti oGiliyade, mweelaponi ya epuumba ya Gadi ni oGolani, oBaxani, mweelaponi ya epuumba ya Manaxe." 
Joshua20:9 Akhalaru muYixrayeli hoye hoye namarwa omanke variyariwaya eera amwiive mutthu woohilakela atthaweleke yakhalaru esidade emoha ya iye soothanliwa weera oopowe mwa nakukuttula ohononeliwe nihinaaye ophiyera nthorihelo vamaithoni wa muthukumano. 
Joshua21:1 Vano, mapwattapwattha a imusi sa aLeevi yaamwattamela musaserdoti* Eleyazari, Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, ni mapwattapwattha a imusu sa ipuumba sikina sa aYixrayeli" 
Joshua21:2 oXilo, oKanaani, enaweerela: “Yave aamulamulela Moisesi weera nyuwosa munivahe isidade moomakamo hiyo, ni moocihamo mihuwosahu.”" 
Joshua21:3 Hiiho, ntoko Yave aalamulenlaawe, aYixrayeli yaahaavaha aLeevi mpatta wa soohiyeriwasaya isidade iya vamoha ni moocihamwaya:" 
Joshua21:4 Yaareereliwe woopacera ti aKehati, nihimo ti nihimo. aLeevi yaari a ekhapira ya musaserdoti* Aharoni, yaahaakhela isidade muloko ni tthaaru sa ipuumba sa Yuda, Simeyoni ni Benyamini." 
Joshua21:5 Ikhapira sikina sa Kehati saahaakhela isidade muloko sikina sa mahimo a ipuumba sa Efrayimi, Dani ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe." 
Joshua21:6 Ekhapira ya Gerexono yaahaakhela isidade muloko ni tthaaru sa mahimo a ipuumba sa Isakari, Axeri, Nafitali ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe yiitekihale oBaxani." 
Joshua21:7 Ekhapira ya Merira, nihimo ti nihimo, yaahaakhela isidade muloko ni piili sa ipuumba sa Rubeni, Gadi ni Zebuloni." 
Joshua21:8 Mooteene yoowo aYixrayeli yaavahansaaya aLeevi isidadesene seiye vamoha ni moocihamo, ntoko Yave aalamulenlaawe mwa Moisesi." 
Joshua21:9 Isidade sinttharelana soovahiwa ni ipuumba sa Yuda ni Simeyoni. 
Joshua21:10 (Vano saavahiwa ekhapira ya Aharoni yaari ya mahimo a aKehati variyari wa aLeevi, niwoko awo yaari oopacera oreereliwa):" 
Joshua21:11 Yaavahiwa oKiriyati Arba (eyo tiiyo oHeberoni) vamoha ni moocihamwayamo, mmanyaakoni sa oYuda. Vano Arba aari nikholo na Enaki." 
Joshua21:12 Wa soothesene, imatta ni mittetthe saarukureenre esidade aavahiwe Kalebi, mwaana mulopwana a Yefune, ntoko sawawe." 
Joshua21:13 Yaavaha ekhapira ya musaserdoti* Aharoni, oHeberoni (esidade yootthawelamo oowootherasiwa wiiva), oLibena," 
Joshua21:14 oYatiri, wExetemowa," 
Joshua21:15 oHoloni, oDebiri," 
Joshua21:16 wAyini, oYuta, oBeti-Xemexi vamoha ni moocihamwayamo. Saari isidade ithanniixexe saavahiwe ipuumba piili iya." 
Joshua21:17 Epuumba ya Benyamini yaahaavaha aLeevi oGibiyoni, oGeba," 
Joshua21:18 wAnatoti ni wAlemoni vamoha ni moocihamwayamo. Saari isidade ixexe. 
Joshua21:19 Isidade sootheene yaavahiwe asaserdoti*, ekhapira ya Aharoni, saari muloko ni tthaaru vamoha ni moocihamwayamo." 
Joshua21:20 Mahimo makina a aKehati ari aLeevi yaahaakhela isidade sikina sa epuumba ya Efrayimi: 
Joshua21:21 Mmanyaakoni sa Efrayimi yaahaakhela oXekhemi (esidade yootthawelamo oowootherasiwa wiiva), oGezeri," 
Joshua21:22 oKibizayimi ni oBeti-Horoni vamoha ni moocihamwayamo. Saari isidade ixexe. 
Joshua21:23 Yaahaakhelatho wa epuumba ya Dani wEleteke, oGibetoni," 
Joshua21:24 wAyaloni ni oGati-Rimoni, vamoha ni moocihamwayamo. Saari isidade ixexe." 
Joshua21:25 Yaahaakhela wa eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe oTanaki ni oGati-Rimoni, vamoha ni moocihamwayamo. Saari isidade piili." 
Joshua21:26 Isidade muloko sootheene iya ni moocihamwayamo yaavahiwa mahimo makina a aKehati. 
Joshua21:27 Mahimo a aGerexoni a aLeevi yaahaakhela wa eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe isidade iya: oGolani oBaxani (esidade yootthawelamo oowootherasiwa wiiva) ni oBeyexetera vamoha ni moocihamwayamo. Saari isidade piili. 
Joshua21:28 Yaahaakhela wa epuumba ya Isakari oKixeyoni, oBaderati," 
Joshua21:29 oYaremuti ni wEni-Ganimi, vamoha ni moocihamwayamo. Saari isidade ixexe." 
Joshua21:30 Yaahaakhela wa epuumba ya Axeri oMixali, wAbedoni," 
Joshua21:31 oHelekati ni oRehobi, vamoha ni moocihamwayamo. Saari isidade ixexe." 
Joshua21:32 Yaahaakhela wa epuumba ya Nafitali oKedexi oGalileya (esidade yootthawelamo oowootherasiwa wiiva), oHamoti-Dori, ni oKaretani, vamoha ni moocihamwayamo. Saari isidade tthaaru." 
Joshua21:33 Isidade sootheene sa aGerexoni, nihimo ti nihimo, saari muloko ni tthaaru, vamoha ni moocihamwayamo." 
Joshua21:34 Vano yaawo a aLeevi yaahanle yaari mahimo a aMerari. Yaahaakhela isidade iya: Wa epuumba ya Zebuloni oYokeneyami, oKareta," 
Joshua21:35 oDimena, oNahalali, vamoha ni moocihamwayamo. Saari isidade ixexe." 
Joshua21:36 Yaahaakhela wa epuumba ya Rubeni oBezeri, oYahazi," 
Joshua21:37 oKedemoti, oMefahati, vamoha ni moocihamwayamo. Saari isidade ixexe." 
Joshua21:38 Yaahaakhela wa epuumba ya Gadi eri oRamoti oGiliyade (esidade yootthawelamo oowootherasiwa wiiva), oManahayimi," 
Joshua21:39 oHexeboni ni oYazeri, vamoha ni moocihamwayamo. Saari isidade ixexe." 
Joshua21:40 Isidade sootheene yaavahiwe mahimo a aMerari, yaari yaawosa yaahanle a aLeevi, saari muloko ni piili." 
Joshua21:41 Isidade sa aLeevi mweelaponi yaawiniwe ni aYixrayeli opwexerera saari miloko mixexe niithannatthaaru, vamoha ni moocihamwayamo." 
Joshua21:42 Khula esidade ya seiye yaakhalano moocihamwayamo. 
Joshua21:43 Hiiho Yave aahaavaha aYixrayeli elapo yootheene aaroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo makholowaaya ni awosa yaakuxasa, eniitekihasa." 
Joshua21:44 Yave aahaavahasa wiitthuuwa wa mipatta sootheene, ntoko aaroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo makholowaaya. Khaawo a amwiittanaaya aawera waawanano, niwoko Yave aawinnyerera ootheenaawo mmatatanimwaya." 
Joshua21:45 Kheewo ya soororomeliha sooreera sootheene sa Yave wa muloko wa aYixrayeli ohiyanyihenraawe; sootheene sookwaniheriwa. 
Joshua22:1 Vahoolowaya Yoxuwa aathukumanyiha ipuumba sa Rubeni, Gadi ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe," 
Joshua22:2 aneerela: “Nyuwo moopaka sootheene seiyo Moisesi, murumeiyi a Yave, aalamulenlaawe ni mohiiwelela sootheene koolamulenlaakani." 
Joshua22:3 Okhuma khalayi mpaka olelo nyuwosa khamwaahingye axunninyu, mene mookwanihera muteko Yave, Mulukwaanyu, oolamulenlaaweni." 
Joshua22:4 Vano eenre Yave Mulukwaanyu aavahaka axunninyu wiitthuuwa, ntoko aaroromelinghaawe, muhokoleele owaani, mweelaponi Moisesi, murumeiyi a Yave, oovanghaaweni okhopela wa Yordanu." 
Joshua22:5 Wa soothesene, mwiipasoope weera mwiiwelele nnenesene Nlamulo ni ikano Moisesi, murumeiyi a Yave, oovanghaaweni: Munsivele Yave Mulukwaanyu, mweette mphironimwawe, mwiiwelele malamulowaawe ootheene, mumvarexexe Yoowo ni munrumeeleke ni murimaanyu ni okumaahu wootheene.”" 
Joshua22:6 Vanonto, Yoxuwa aahaareeliha, anaalaxera, enarowa owaani." 
Joshua22:7 Moisesi aavaha eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe elapo ya oBaxani ni wa eriyari ekina Yoxuwa aavaha elapo mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa Yordanu vamoha ni axunnaya. Aalaxeraawe, Yoxuwa aahaareeliha," 
Joshua22:8 eeraka: “Muhokoleele owaani ni mihakhusanyu sootheene –mihuwo soowaatta, eparatha*, eyuuma yoorikaxa, ebronze* ni iyuuma vamoha ni ikuwo sincipale. Mwakawaneke ni axunninyu soohuhula mwaahuhunlaanyu amwiittanaanyu.”" 
Joshua22:9 Hiiho aRubeni, aGadi ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe yaahaahiya aYixrayeli oXilo oKanaani weera ehokoleele mweelaponimwaya oGiliyade, mwa yeeyo yaaphwannyaya niwoko na yeeyo Yave aamulamulenlaawe Moisesi." 
Joshua22:10 Ephiyakaru oGeliloti, waattamela oYordanu, mweelaponi ya oKanaani, aRubeni, aGadi ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe yaahaatekasa altaari* atokotoko mukerekhere wa oYordanu." 
Joshua22:11 Vano ipuumba sikina sa aYixrayeli sisuwelakaru weera yaahaateka altaari* oGeliloti, mmwiinanoni wa oKanaani, waattamela oYordanu, mpatta wa aYixrayeli," 
Joshua22:12 muthukumano wootheene wa aYixrayeli waathukumana oXilo weera waawaneno. 
Joshua22:13 aYixrayeli yaamurumiha Pinehasi, mwaana mulopwana a musaserdoti* Eleyazari, mweelaponi ya oGiliyade, wa aRubeni, aGadi ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe." 
Joshua22:14 Vamoha ni yoowo yaahaarumiha asitokweene muloko, mmoha mmoha a khula epuumba ya aYixrayeli, khula mmoha a yaawosa pwattapwattha a emusaawe variyari wa mahimo a aYixrayeli." 
Joshua22:15 Vano ephiyaleene oGiliyade, aRubeni, aGadi ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe, yaaweerela:" 
Joshua22:16 “Muthukumano wootheene wa Yave oneera ha: ‘Mpanke hai ohimuroromelaxawene wuuwu Muluku a aYixrayeli? Yoosusingheni eheeni wa Yave, mwiitekelaka altaari* ni mumvaanyaka Yoowo?" 
Joshua22:17 Yoottheka ya oPeyori yaatepaxa! Mpaka olelo khanitteelihale mwa yoottheka ele, waaroomoreliwaru nihooxo muloko wa Yave." 
Joshua22:18 Vano nyuwosa munimuhiya Yave! Nyuwosa moomvaanya Yave olelo, omaalo isarasawe sinoopattela muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli." 
Joshua22:19 Waari weera elapo nyuwo mwaakhelansaanyu ntoko yawinyuweene yoovaliheiya, murowe elapo eri ya Yave, eraayawo etabernaakulu* ya Yave ni mwakuxe mpatta wa elapweene yeele vamoha ni hiyo. Vaheera muhimvaanyeke Yave naari hiyo, mwiitekelasaka altaari* ehikhanle altaari* a Yave Mulukwaahu." 
Joshua22:20 Akani, mwaana mulopwana a Karemi, ahaaroromelengyaawe ni itthu sootteelihiwa, isara saapattela muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli. Khahiyono yooworu aakhwiiye niwoko na yootthekaawe.’”" 
Joshua22:21 aRubeni, aGadi ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe yaawaakhula mapwattapwattha a mahimo a Yixrayeli:" 
Joshua22:22 “Yoole Ooweraxa, Muluku Yave! Yoole Ooweraxa, Muluku Yave! Owo onsuwela ni aYixrayeli esuweleke! Naapanke yeeyo niwoko na ovaanya hoye hoye ohiiwelela, muhinuurele olelo." 
Joshua22:23 Niitekenleene altaaraahu weera nihimwiiwelele Yave ni weera napakewo sooveleela soohisa, sa etrigu naari sa murettele, vano Yave muneene anittaruxe!" 
Joshua22:24 Hoye! Nipakenle yeeyo noovaka weera ehuhu ya muhoolo ikhapirasanyu seerele sawihu: ‘Nyuwo khamuniiwanana ni Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli." 
Joshua22:25 Yave aamukhaliha Yordanu ntoko mwiinano variyari wa hiyo ni nyuwosa, aRubeni ni aGadi. Khamuniiwanana ni Yave.’ Mwa yeeyo ikhapirasaanyu sinimooceeliha sawihu omoova Yave." 
Joshua22:26 Tivawo nilakenlaahu: ‘Nrowe, naateke altaari* – Khoohiyono wa sooveleela soohisa hoye hoye sikina.’" 
Joshua22:27 Ohiyanawaya, ekhaleke namoona variyariwahu, ni ikhapira sineera sirwe, weera nnoomulapa Yave mphironimwawe mootteela ni sooveleelasahu soohisa, sa enama ni sa murettele. Hiiho, ehuhu ya muhoolo, ikhapirasanyu khasiwera oneerela: Nyuwo khamuniiwanana ni Yave.’" 
Joshua22:28 Noheerelanatho: ‘Awosa yaneerela yeeyo hiyo hoye hoye ikhapirasahu, nniwaakhule: ‘Mooneke ecaambulo ya altaari* a Yave asitithihu yaatenkaaya – khaahiyono a sooveleela soohisa hoye hoye sa enama, mene ntoko namoona variyariwahu ni nyuwo.’" 
Joshua22:29 Khaniweherenre omvaanya Yave naari osusa wa Yoowo niitekelaka altaari* akina a sooveleela soohisa, sa etrigu ni sa enama. altaari* a Yave Mulukwaahu ari ohoolo wa etabernaakulwaawe paahi.”" 
Joshua22:30 Vano musaserdoti* Pinehasi, asitokweene a muloko ni mapwattapwattha a mahimo a aYixrayeli ewiiwakaru yeeyo aRubeni, aGadi ni aManaxe yeenraaya, yaahakalala." 
Joshua22:31 Pinehasi, mwaana mulopwana a musaserdoti* Eleyazari, aaweerela aRubeni, aGadi ni aManaxe: “Olelo noosuwela weera Yave ori ni hiyo, niwoko nyuwosa moororomeleya wa Yave. Hiiho mohaatapuxa aYixrayeli mmatatani mwa Yave.”" 
Joshua22:32 Vahoolowaya Pinehasi, mwaana mulopwana a musaserdoti* Eleyazari, ni asitokweene yaahokolowasa omuthukumanoni yaalaxeraka aRubeni, aGadi ni aManaxe, enarowasa oKanaani, enaathalihera aYixrayeli yeeyo yeereiye." 
Joshua22:33 Awosa yaahakalalela woowiiwa masu ale, enamutthapela Muluku. Vano khayuulumelenle owana ni aRubeni ni aGadi hata weera ephwate elapwaaya." 
Joshua22:34 aRubeni ni aGadi yaahaatteha altaari* nsina nna: Namoona mmoha variyariwahu weera Yave ti Muluku. 
Joshua23:1 Eviraleene ehuhu yincipale vahoolo Yave woowaavaha aYixrayeli wiitthuuwa wa amwiittanaaya ootheene yaarukureenre, Yoxuwa, uuluvaleene vancipale," 
Joshua23:2 aahaathukumanyiha aYixrayeli ootheene – asitokweenaaya, ahoolelaaya, aphukaaya ni asitokweene akina, anaweerelasa: “Miyo kohuuluvala vancipale." 
Joshua23:3 Nyuwosa asineenaanyu mohoona sootheene Yave Mulukwaanyu opakenlaawe miloko sootheene iyo ngwoosivelani nyuwosa; ti Yave Mulukwaanyu oowanenleni. 
Joshua23:4 Muupuwelele moota kaakawenlaaka ntoko yoohiyeriwa ipuumbasanyu ilapo sootheene sa miloko seiye nlelo sihanle ni seiye kiwinnaaka variyari wa Yordanu ni Ephareiya Etokotoko mpatta ninkela nsuwa. 
Joshua23:5 Yave Mulukwaanyu onimoomola vamaithoniwanyu. Onoosusiha ohoolowanyu ni nyuwo munookuxa elapwaaya, ntoko Yave Mulukwaanyu oororomelinghaaweni." 
Joshua23:6 Mwiilipihereke ni mwiipasoope weera mwiiwelele nnenesene sootheene seiye silempwale mulivuruni ya Nlamulo na Moisesi, muhihapuwelaka moono mulopana naari muthiyana." 
Joshua23:7 Muhiitakansere ni miloko iyo sihanle variyariwanyu; muhiitthane masina a milukusaya naari muhilipeleru seiyo. Muhilape naari muhikokhorele. 
Joshua23:8 Ohiyanawaya, mumvarexexe paahi Yave Mulukwaanyu, ntoko mpankaanyu mpaka olelo." 
Joshua23:9 Yave ohoomola ohoolowanyu miloko sitokotoko ni soolipaxa. Mpaka olelo Khoowoworu muloko owenre woowinani. 
Joshua23:10 Mmoha a nyuwosa paahi onaawina amwiittana macira muloko, niwoko Yave Mulukwaanyu onoowanelani nyuwosa, ntoko ororomelinghaawe." 
Joshua23:11 Mwiipasoope weera munsivele Yave Mulukwaanyu. 
Joshua23:12 Wa soothesene, nyuwosa mwahapuwa ni mwiiraanano ahanle a miloko iyo sihanle eriyaraanyu muthelanaka ni yaawosa, ni mwatakanserana," 
Joshua23:13 vano musuwele nnenesene weera Yave Mulukwaanyu khanoomola miloko iyo ohoolowanyu. Ohiyanawaya, sinoothatuwa ntapha ni ntthavi wa nyuwosa, ekwamba mmakhatanimwanyu ni nyiiwa mmaithonimwanyu mpaka muneeraanyu mmalamale mweelaponi mooreeramu Yave Mulukwaanyu oovanghaaweni." 
Joshua23:14 Vano, kihanle vakhaani okhwa. Nyuwosa moosuwela ni murimaanyu ni okumaahu wootheene weera Yave Mulukwaanyu ookwanihera soororomeliha sootheene oopakenlaaweni. Sootheene sookwaniheriwa – kheewoworu ohiyanyihalaawe." 
Joshua23:15 Wa soothesene, mooteene yoowo khula yoororomelihiwa yooreera ya Yave Mulukwaanyu ekwaniheringwaaya, hiihotho Yave anookwanihereleni yoonanara yootheene oopopihenraawe mpaka ophwateyawanyu mulaponimu mooreera oovanghaaweni." 
Joshua23:16 Nyuwosa mwavirikanyiha wiiraana Yave Mulukwaanyu oolamulenlaaweni ni mwalapa miluku sikina, mukokhorelaka seiyo, vano isara sa Yave sinimoopattelasani ni nyuwosa munoomalamala mulaponimu mooreera oovanghaaweni.”" 
Joshua24:1 Vano Yoxuwa aathukumanyiha ipuumba sootheene sa aYixrayeli oXekhemi. Aahaathukumanyiha asitokweene, ahooleli, aphuki ni asitokweene akina a aYixrayeli ni awosa yaahiixoonihera ohoolo wa Muluku." 
Joshua24:2 Yoxuwa aaweerela atthu ootheene: “Yave Mulukwaanyu oneera ha: ‘Khalayeene makholowaanyu – mpakatho Tera, tiithi a Abrahaamu, ni Nahori – yaakhala okhopela wEfrates elapaka miluku sikina." 
Joshua24:3 Vaheera Miyo kohaavenxa atithinyu Abrahaamu mweelaponi eri okhopela Efrates kinaweettiha mweelaponi yootheene ya oKanaani ni kaahaavaha ekhapira yincipale. Kaahaavaha Isaki," 
Joshua24:4 ni Isaki kaamvaha Yakobe ni Esawu. Kaamvaha Esawu elapo ya nyaako sa oSeyiri, mene Yakobe ni anamwanaawe yaarowa wExipitu." 
Joshua24:5 Vanonto, kaamurumiha Moisesi ni Aharoni kaahasulaka awExipitu ni yeeyo kaapankaaka variyariwaya ni vahoolowaya kaahookhumihasaniwo." 
Joshua24:6 Kikhumihakaru makholowaanyu wExipitu, nyuwosa mwaaphiya mphareiya ni awExipitu yaahoottharelelasani ni ikaaro sa ikavalu* ni anamweettiha ikavalu* mpaka Ephareiya Yooxeera." 
Joshua24:7 Vaheera makholowaanyu yaakiitthana, vano Miyo kaahela epiphi variyari wa nyuwo ni awExipitu. Kaahaakumanyihera ephareiya, enamireya. Nyuwosa mwaahoona ni maithwaanyu yeeyo kaapakenlaaka awExipitu. Vahoolowaya mwaakhala munikareni ehuhu yincipale." 
Joshua24:8 Kaahooruuhasani elapo ya awAmori ankhala mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa Yordanu. Yaahoowananani, mene kaawinnyerera mmatatanimwanyu. Miyo kohaaphwatasa ohoolowanyu ni nyuwosa mookuxa elapwaaya." 
Joshua24:9 Balaki, mwaana mulopwana a Zipori, mwene a oMowabe, iireherenraawe waawanano aYixrayeli, aaruma oroweliwa Bileyami, mwaana mulopwana a Beyori, weera oolaphaseni." 
Joshua24:10 Wa soothesene, nkaampwantthe Bileyami moota wooweera owo aahaareelihasa imaara imaarasene ni Miyo kaahaatapuxasa mmatatanimwawe." 
Joshua24:11 Vahoolowaya mwaamulapuwa Yordanu, munaphiyasa oYeriko. Yaale a oYeriko yaahoowanananisa, hiihotho awAmori, aPerizi, aKanaani, aHiti, aGiregaxi, aHivi, aYebusi, mene Miyo kaawinnyererasa mmatatanimwanyu." 
Joshua24:12 Kaahaawanawaniha weera kiwoomole ohoolowanyu ntoko kaaweeringhaaka mamwene meeli a awAmori. Khamwaawinne ni ekatana naari ni nyuupa. 
Joshua24:13 Vano kohoovahani elapo nyuwosa muhilimmaanyu ni isidade muhitenkaanyu ni mwemmo munkhalaanyumo mucaka sa imatta sa iwuuva* ni sa sooliveira* nyuwosa mwahaaphatteiyaanyu.’ 
Joshua24:14 Vanonto, mmoove Yave ni munrumeele ni murima woororomeleya. Mvonyere okhwipi miluku yaalapaaya makholowaanyu okhopela wEfrates ni wExipitu ni munrumeele Yave." 
Joshua24:15 Wa soothesene, waahoosivelakani omurumeela Yave, vano munthanleke olelo taani muneeraanyu munrumeele – saari miluku yaarumeelaaya makholowaanyu okhopela wEfrates hoye hoye miluku sa awAmori a elapweene yeela munkhalaanyumo. Vaheera miyo ni emusaaka nnimurumeela Yave.”" 
Joshua24:16 Vano muloko waamwaakhula: “Khanintthuna hata vakhaani omuhiya Yave weera nilape miluku sikina! 
Joshua24:17 Aari Yave Mulukwaahu muneenaawe onikhumihale hiyo vamoha ni makholowaahu wExipitu, elapweene yeele ya okaporo apakaka sootikhiniha sitokotoko iye hiyo noonaka. Owo aanikosoopa munkwahanimwahu variyari wa miloko sootheene naaviraahu." 
Joshua24:18 Ohiya toko yeeyo, Yave aanoomolela ohoolowahu miloko sootheene mpakatho awAmori yaamanke elapweene yeela. Hiyotho nnimurumeela Yave, niwoko Owo ti Mulukwaahu.”" 
Joshua24:19 Yoxuwa aaweerela atthu: “Nyuwosa khamulikanenle omurumeela Yave. Owo ti Muluku ootteelaxa ni a ehace. Owo khalevelela ovaanyawanyu ni yootthekaanyu. 
Joshua24:20 Nyuwosa mwamuhiya Yave murumeelaka miluku sikina, Owo onimoorukunuwelani ni onimoottaruxani. Naari areene a nnene ni nyuwosa, owo onimoophwatasani.”" 
Joshua24:21 Atthu yaamweerela Yoxuwa: “Hata vakhaani! Hiyo nnimurumeela Yave.” 
Joshua24:22 Vano Yoxuwa aaweerela: “Nyuwosa muniikhalela onamoona muroothanlaru omurumeela Yave.” Awosa yaaheera: “Aani, nri anamoona.”" 
Joshua24:23 Yoxuwa aaweerela: “Vanonto, mvonyere okhwipi miluku sikina muraanyuno ni muhokoleele wa Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli.”" 
Joshua24:24 Atthu yaamweerela: “Hiyo nnimurumeela ni nnimwiiwelela Yave Mulukwaahu.” 
Joshua24:25 Nihuku nne Yoxuwa aakhaliha wiiraana ni muloko oXekhemi, anavaha malamulo ni ikano." 
Joshua24:26 Owo aalepa iye mulivuruni ya Nlamulo na Muluku. Vahoolowaya aaheemexa vaavaale nluku ntokotoko mukerekhere mwiri wa ekarivalyu* vakhiviru wa Nipuro Nootteela* na Yave. 
Joshua24:27 Owo aaweerela atthu ootheene: “Moone, nluku nna nnikhale namoonaahu. Nna nohiiwa masu ootheene Yave onileenlaawe. Nnookhaleleni onamoona mwaahimuroromela Mulukwaanyu.”" 
Joshua24:28 Vahoolowaya Yoxuwa aalaxera muloko ni khula epuumba yaarowa wa yoohiyeriwaaya. 
Joshua24:29 Eviraleene ehuhu Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, murumeiyi a Yave, aahookhwa areene ni iyaakha ncira ni muloko mmoha sa oyariwawawe." 
Joshua24:30 Atthu yaamvitha mweelaponi ya yoohiyeriwaawe, oTimenati-Sera, mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi, ottuttuwani wa mwaako Gahaxi." 
Joshua24:31 aYixrayeli yaamurumeela Yave mookumini moothemwene mwa Yoxuwa ni mwa ahooleli yaahanle ni okumi ni yaasuwenle sootheene Yave aapakenlaawe aYixrayeli. 
Joshua24:32 Makhuva a Yoseefe yaaruuhalaaya aYixrayeli wExipitu yaavithiwa oXekhemi, ematta Yakobe aathummaaweno makhoobiri ncira a eparatha* wa anamwane a Hamori, atithawe Xekhemi. Vano elapo ele yaathatuwa yoohiyeriwa ya ekhapira ya Yoseefe." 
Joshua24:33 Aahookhwatho Eleyazari, mwaana mulopwana a Aharoni, anavithiwa oGibeya, elapo aavahiwaawe mwanawe Pinehasi, mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi." 
Judges1:1 Vahoolo wa okhwa wa Yoxuwa aYixrayeli yaamukoha Yave: “Taani a hiyo anaapacere waawanano aKanaani?” 
Judges1:2 Yave aawaakhula: “Eniipacere ti epuumba ya aYuda. Miyo kohinnyerera elapo mmatatanimwaya.” 
Judges1:3 Vano asilopwana a aYuda yaaweerela axunnaya aSimeyoni: “Nrowe ootheene elapo nithanleliwaahu mooreereliwani weera naawaneno aKanaani. Vahoolowaya nnirowe ni nyuwosa elapo mvahasiwaanyu.” Hiiho aSimeyoni yaarowa ni aYuda. 
Judges1:4 Asilopwana aYuda ewanaka, Yave aawinnyerera aKanaani ni aPerizi mmatatanimwaya ni awosa yaawiiva asilopwana macira macireene muloko oBezeki." 
Judges1:5 Ti weiwe yaamphwannyaayawo Adoni-Bezeki, enangwanano, enaawina aKanaani ni aPerizi." 
Judges1:6 Adoni-Bezeki aatthawa, mene yaamuttharelela enamutthuka, enamuthikila ikatha itokweene sa mmattatani ni sa mmettoni." 
Judges1:7 Adoni-Bezeki aaheera: “Mamwene miloko mithannamiili ethikiliweene ikathasaya itokweene sa mmatatani ni mmettoni yannakhupela inyenyeeri vathi wa meesaaka. Mooteene yoowo Mulukutho ookipaka.” Awosa yaamurongha oYerusaleemu, anakhwelawo." 
Judges1:8 Asilopwana a aYuda yaawananotho oYerusaleemu enawinawo. Yaawiiva yaale yaamankewo, enahisa esidade." 
Judges1:9 Vahoolowaya yaarowa waawanano aKanaani yaakhala mmanyaakoni, oNegeba ni yaawosa yaakhala mukerekhere nyaako." 
Judges1:10 Yaahaarowela aKanaani yaakhala oHeberoni (khalayi wiitthaniwa oKiriyati-Arba), enangwina Xexai, Ahimoni ni Talema." 
Judges1:11 Okhuma vaavaale yaarowela muloko waakhala oDebiri (khalayi wiitthaniwa oKiriyati-Seferi). 
Judges1:12 Vano Kalebi aaheera: “Mulopwana aneera awine oKiriyati-Seferi, kinoomvaha mwanaka muthiyana, Akesa, weera amuthele.”" 
Judges1:13 Oteniyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Kenazi, munneiye mukhaani Kalebi, aawina esidade, tivawo Kalebi aamvanghaawe mwanawe Akesa weera amuthele." 
Judges1:14 Nihuku nimoha akhalaka ni Oteniyeli, Akesa waamvoreihela murima waavekela ematta atithawe. Vano Akesa akhuruwakaru vabuuruni, Kalebi aamukoha: “Muntthunani?”" 
Judges1:15 Owo aamwaakhula: “Mukivahe yookivaha. Mweenre pwiiya mukivahaka mpatta wa oNegeba, mukivahetho anaattuuttu a maahi.” Hiiho Kalebi aamvaha anaattuuttu akina a osulu ni a vathi." 
Judges1:16 Vano ekhapira ya muKeni, atatawe oowaathelela Moisesi, yaavenyasa musidade ya Mavare vamoha ni asilopwana a aYuda, enakhalasa eriyari ya muloko wa oNikareni wa oYuda, oNegeba, waattamela wAradi." 
Judges1:17 Vahoolowaya asilopwana a aYuda yaarowasa ni axunnaaya aSimeyoni, enaawinasa aKanaani yaakhala oZefati, enaphwata esidade. Tivawo esidade ele yiitthaniwaaya oHorema." 
Judges1:18 Asilopwana a aYuda yaawinatho oGaza, wAxekeloni, ni wEkeroni ni mittetthesaya." 
Judges1:19 Yave aari ni asilopwana a aYuda. Yaahaakamela elapo ya nyaako, mene khayaawenre owoomola atthu a mureyareyani, niwoko awosa yaakhalano ikaaro sa ekhotto soopakiwa ni eyuuma." 
Judges1:20 oHeberoni aavahiwa Kalebi, ntoko Moisesi aaroromelinghaawe. Vano Kalebi aawoomolawo anamwane asilopwana araru a Enaki." 
Judges1:21 Wa soothesene, aBenyamini yaahooceela waawina aYebusi yaakhala oYerusaleemu. aYebusi ankhala weiwe ni aBenyamini mpaka olelo." 
Judges1:22 Vano asilopwana a epuumba ya Yoseefe yaawanano oBeteli ni Yave aari ni yaawosa. 
Judges1:23 Awosa yaahaarumiha anamahottela oBeteli (khalayi wiitthaniwa oLuzi). 
Judges1:24 Anamahotteleene yaawo emoonakaru mutthu mmoha akhumaka musidade yaamweerelasa: “Munileele mavoleelo musidade weera nuurele okumaanyu.” 
Judges1:25 Vanonto, owo aawoonihera mavoleelo ni awosa yaawiivasa amaki a esidade, mene yaamuurela mulopwana ole ni emusaawe yootheene." 
Judges1:26 Owo aarowa mulaponi ya aHiti, mwa weiwo aatenkaawewo esidade, anatteha oLuzi. Nna nri nsinanaya mpaka olelo." 
Judges1:27 Wa soothesene, aManaxe yaahooceela owoomola atthu a oBeti-Xani, oTahanakhi, oDori, oYibeleyami naari oMegido ni mittetthe sa mukhwipimwaya, niwoko aKanaani yaalakelasa okhala elapo ele." 
Judges1:28 aYixrayeli elipakaru, yaahaavariha aKanaani miteko sooviha, mene khayaawoomonle ootheene." 
Judges1:29 Hiihotho awEfrayimi khayaawoomonle aKanaani yaakhala oGezeri; aKanaani yaapwaherera okhala eriyaraayasa. 
Judges1:30 Mpakatho aZebuloni khayaawoomonle aKanaani yaakhala oKiteroni ni oNahaloli. aKanaaneene yaale yaapwaherera okhala eriyaraayasa, mene yaavarihiwa miteko sooviha." 
Judges1:31 Hata awAxeri khayaawoomonle yaale yaakhala wAko, oZidoni, wAhelabi, wAkezibi, oHeleba, wAfeki naari oRehobi." 
Judges1:32 Niwoko na yeeyo awAxeri yaamaka variyari wa aKanaani a elapweene yeele. 
Judges1:33 Mpakatho aNafitali khayaawoomonle yaale yaakhala oBet-Xemexi ni oBet-Anati. Awosa yaakhala vamoha ni aKanaani a elapweene yeele ni yaale yaamaka oBet-Xemexi ni oBet-Anati yaahaavarihasa miteko sooviha. 
Judges1:34 Vano awAmori yaahelela mpika epuumba ya aDani mweelaponi ya nyaako ehitthuniheraka okhuruwela oreyareyani. 
Judges1:35 awAmori yaalakelatho opwaherera okhala vamwaako oHeresi, wAyaloni ni oXahalebimi, mene epuumba ya Yoseefe yaalimpaaya, awosatho yaavarihiwa miteko sooviha." 
Judges1:36 Mwiinano wa awAmori waawelela okhuma ekhato ya Walisi mpaka oSela ni opwahereraka ohoolo. 
Judges2:1 Ndyelo a Yave aakhumme oGiligali arowaka oBokimi, aneera: “Kohookhumihasani wExipitu ni kaahooruhasani elapo kaaroromelinghaaka ni nlipelo waavaha makholowaanyu. Miyo kaaheera: ‘Nkirwa kiphwata wiiraanawaka ni nyuwo," 
Judges2:2 ni nyuwosa khamwiiraanano miloko sa elapo ela, mene mmwaaphwate altaaraaya.’ Muhikiiwelelenle heeni?" 
Judges2:3 Vanonto kinooleelasani weera nkiwoomolasa ohoolowanyu. Awosa eniikhale amwiittanaanyu ni milukusaya nsikale ntaphananyu.” 
Judges2:4 Ndyelo a Yave amalihakaru wuuluma, muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli waahiinla ikuttho." 
Judges2:5 Vano yaatteha nipuro nne oBokimi ni yaampakelawo sooveleela Yave. 
Judges2:6 Yoxuwa aalaxerakaru aYixrayeli, awosa yaarowa waakamela elapo, khula epuumba wa yoohiyeriwaaya." 
Judges2:7 aYixrayeli yaamurumeela Yave mookumini wootheene wa Yoxuwa ni wa ahooleli yaahanle ni okumi ohoolo wa okhwa wa Yoxuwa ni yoonne sooweereya sitokweene sa Yave aaweerelaka aYixrayeli. 
Judges2:8 Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni, murumeiyi a Yave, aakhwiiye ni iyaakha ncira ni muloko mmoha." 
Judges2:9 Atthu yaamvithenle mweelaponi ya yoohiyeriwaawe, oTimenati-Sera, mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi, mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa mwaako oGahaxi." 
Judges2:10 Vano emalamanleene makholo a ekhapira yootheene yeele, yaakhumelela ekhapira enyowani yahaamusuwenle Yave, hata yeeyo aapakenlaawe aYixrayeli." 
Judges2:11 Vanonto aYixrayeli yaapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave elapaka miluku sikina siniithaniwa aBahali*. 
Judges2:12 Yaamuhiya Yave, Muluku a makholowaaya, aakhumihanse wExipitu. Yaatthara, enalapa miluku soohiyanahiyana sa miloko saarukureenre, etannyaka isara sa Yave." 
Judges2:13 Yaamuhiya Yave, enamulapa Bahali* ni miluku sikina siniitthaniwa Axetoroti." 
Judges2:14 Isara sa Yave saahaapattela aYixrayeli ni Owo aawinnyerera mmatatani mwa alavilavi, mwa yaawo yaahuhunle. Owo aawinnyerera wa amwiittana a mukhwipimwaya, wa yaawo aYixrayeli yahaawenraaya waawina." 
Judges2:15 Imaara sootheene aYixrayeli yaarowaaya okhottoni, ntata na Yave nannawiittasa moota wooweera khayaawina, ntoko Yave aawooperenraawe alipelaka. Wannaakhalela othanana otokotoko." 
Judges2:16 Vano Yave aahaakhaliha ahooleli, mwa yaawo yaatapunxe mmatatani mwa yaale yaawanano." 
Judges2:17 Hata hiiho awosa khayaatthunne owiiwa ahooleli, mene yaanlavalava ni miluku sikina elapaka iye. Awosa woowaakuveya yaahiya ephiro makholowaaya yeettaaya. Makholowaaya yaamwiiwelala Yave, mene awosa hoye." 
Judges2:18 Imaara sootheene Yave aarumihelaawe muhooleli, Owo aakhala ni muhooleli aavuluxaka mmatatani mwa amwiittanaaya, muhooleli areene nlelo ni okumi. Yave aahaamorela ikharari mwaha wa wiinlawaya ohoolo wa yaale yaahooxa ni yaathananiha." 
Judges2:19 Vaheera aakhwaawe muhooleli, aYixrayeli yaahokoleela iphiro sootepaxa oopwaha sa makholowaaya, ettharaka, ekokhorelaka ni elapaka miluku sikina. Yannakhootta ohiya mitekosaya soonanara ni iphirosaya yaawaatelelaaya." 
Judges2:20 Tivawo isara sa Yave saapattenlaaya aYixrayeli ni Owo aaheera: “Weenre muloko ola onanarihaka wiiraana kaapakenlaaka makholowaaya ni ohikiiwaka," 
Judges2:21 Miyo nkoomolaru ohoolowaya hata muloko mmoha, mwa yoowo Yoxuwa ohiyalaawe akhwaaka." 
Judges2:22 Miyo nkiwoote murima aYixrayeli weera kiwoone awosa yatthara ephiro ya Yave yeettelaka ntoko yaapankaaya makholowaaya.” 
Judges2:23 Yave aatthunihera weera miloko iye saapwaherenre. Khoomonle khuluwi, khinnyerenre mmatatani mwa Yoxuwa." 
Judges3:1 Yave aahiya miloko mweelaponi weera awoothe murima aYixrayeli ootheene yaale yahoonneru ikhotto oKanaani. 
Judges3:2 Aapakenle yeeyo weera aaxuttihe moota woowana aYixrayeli yaale yahaawanne oKanaani. Vano miloko saari ti iya: 
Judges3:3 Mamwene mathanu a aFilisti, aKanaani, aZidoni ni aHivi yaakhala mmanyaakoni sa oLibanu, okhuma mwaako oBahali-Heremoni mpaka oLebo-Hamati." 
Judges3:4 Miloko iye saahiyeriwe weera mwa seiye aYixrayeli yootiweno murima, yeeraka yiiwelele malamulo Yave aavanghaawe makholowaaya mwa Moisesi." 
Judges3:5 aYixrayeli yaakhala variyari wa aKanaani, aHiti, awAmori, aPerizi, aHivi ni aYebusi." 
Judges3:6 Yaahaatheliha anamwanaaya asithiyana ni yaatheliwa anamwanaaya ni asinamwanaya, enalapa milukusaya." 
Judges3:7 aYixrayeli yaapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave. Yaamuttiwala Yave Mulukwaaya yaalapaka aBahali* ni Axera. 
Judges3:8 Isara sa Yave saahaapattela aYixrayeli moota wooweera Owo aawinnyerera mmatatani mwa Kuxani-Rixatayimi, mwene a wArami-Naharayimi, ni yaamurumeela wa iyaakha ithannatthaaru." 
Judges3:9 Vaheera, emwiitthanakaru Yave, Owo aahaakhalihera namatapuxa mmoha iitthaniwa Oteniyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Kenazi, munneiye mukhaani Kalebi, ni owo aahaatapuxa." 
Judges3:10 Munepa wa Yave waamukhuruwela yoowo moota wooweera aahaahoolela aYixrayeli, anarowa owana. Yave aamwinnyerera Kuxani-Rixatayimi, mwene a wArami, mmatatani mwa Oteniyeli, aangwinne." 
Judges3:11 Hiiho elapo yaakhalano murettele wookwana iyaakha miloko mixexe mpaka okhwa wa Oteniyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Kenazi." 
Judges3:12 Emaara ekinatho aYixrayeli yaapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave. Tivawo Yave aamvanghaawe Egeloni, mwene a oMowabe, waalamula aYixrayeli." 
Judges3:13 Mweneene yoowo aawiitthana awAmoni ni awAmaleki weera ethukumane ni yoowo, enarowa waawanano aYixrayeli. Awosa yaawina esidade ya Mavare." 
Judges3:14 aYixrayeli yaalamuliwa ni Egeloni, mwene a oMowabe, wookwana iyaakha muloko niithannatthaaru." 
Judges3:15 aYixrayeli yaamukhuwelelatho Yave ni Owo aavanghe namatapuxa iitthaniwa Ehudi, mulopwana noonyootho, mwaana mulopwana a Gera, muBenyamini. aYixrayeli yaamurumihela ni nlivo na musoko wa Egeloni, mwene a oMowabe." 
Judges3:16 Vanonto, Ehudi aahana ekatana yoowiitha ninno ninno orakamawaya eriyari ya emeetru*, anatthukelela vatakhwini yoolopwana, mpuwa mukaandyo." 
Judges3:17 Aamvaha musoko Egeloni, mwene a oMowabe, aari mulopwana oonenevaxa." 
Judges3:18 Woottharelana, Ehudi aahaakhumihera vaate yaakunxe musoko." 
Judges3:19 Vano aphiyaka mukerekhere icaambulo sa miluku waattamela oGiligali, owo aarukunuwa, anamweerela mwene: “Mwene, kookhalano mutthenga wa exiiri ni nyuwo.” Mweneene yoowo aaheera: “Mmaale!” Ni arumeiyaawe ootheene yaakhumela vaate." 
Judges3:20 Vahoolowaya Ehudi aamwaattamela, owo akilaantheene meekhaawe esaala etokweene ya osulu ya empaawe etokotoko, mwa weiwe aakilaathaawe elimwe, anamweerela: “Kookhalano mutthenga wa Muluku ni nyuwo.” Vanonto, mwene eemelakaru vahiceniwawe," 
Judges3:21 Ehudi aahookola moono muthiyana, anatholola ekatana vatakhwiniwawe yoolopwana, anamuhoma mwene erukulu." 
Judges3:22 Mpaka ettuutta ya ekatana yaaneela ni hapo khaavenxale ekatana, makhura yaawalawo." 
Judges3:23 Vahoolowaya Ehudi awanleene Milako, aakhumela nipithela* na wiithela wa esaala." 
Judges3:24 Akhummeene, arumeiyi yaahoorwa, enaphwanya milako sa esaala ya osulu siwaliweene. Awosa yaaheerelana: “Weeraka awo ari ocumbusini.”" 
Judges3:25 Yaaweherera ekhulumuwa eenre owo aahihulaka mulako wa esaala, yaakuxa exaavi, enahula. Mmwe yaamphwannye pwiiyaaya ari vathi akhwiyeene." 
Judges3:26 Awosa nlelo ewehereraka hiihaale, Ehudi aalakaseya. Aavinre mucaambuloni sa miluku anatthawela oSeyira." 
Judges3:27 Aphiyakaru mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi, aahiipa nipalapatta, aYixrayeli yaakhuruwasa mmanyaakoni, owo areene ohoolowaya." 
Judges3:28 Owo aaweerela aYixrayeli: “Mukitthareke, niwoko Yave oowinnyerera amwiittanaanyu, aMowabe, mmatatanimwanyu. Awosa yaamutthara, enaakamela mirora sa Yordanu saarowa oMowabe ehimutthuniheraka mutthu olapuwawo." 
Judges3:29 Ehuhuweene yeele yaawiivasa wookwanaka aMowabe macira macireene muloko – ootheene oolipaxa ni ookhomaala. Khaawo oopongweru. 
Judges3:30 Nihuku nenenenne aMowabe yaawiniwa ni aYixrayeli ni elapo yaakhalano murettele wookwana iyaakha miloko mithannamiraru. 
Judges3:31 Vahoolo wa Ehudi aahoowa Xamegari, mwaana mulopwana a Anati, mwa yoowo aawiivale aFilisti macira mathannamosa ni ekopo eneettiha imombe. Owotho aahaatapuxa aYixrayeli." 
Judges4:1 Akhwiyeene Ehudi, aYixrayeli yaapakatho soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave." 
Judges4:2 Tivawo Yave aawinnyerenraawe mmatatani mwa Yabini, mwene a oKanaani, aalamula oHazori. Mutokweene a anakhottwaawe aari Sisera aamanke oHaroxeti-Hagoyimi." 
Judges4:3 Aarino ikaaro sa iyuuma macira mathannamaxexe annaahooxa woonanara aYixrayeli wookwana iyaakha miloko miili, tivawo aYixrayeli yaamukhuwelenlaaya Yave weera aakhavihere." 
Judges4:4 Vano ehuhuweene yeele Debora, mprofeeti muthiyana, mwaariye Lapadoti, aari muhooleli a aYixrayeli." 
Judges4:5 Owo aakilaathi vathi wa Nivare na Debora, eriyari ya oRama ni oBeteli, mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi. aYixrayeli yannamwaasaasa weera emuleele sookacamihasaya." 
Judges4:6 Debora aarumiha wiitthaniwa Baraki, mwaana mulopwana a Abinowami aakhala oKedexi, mweelaponi ya oNafitali, anamweerela: “Yave Muluku a aYixrayeli onoolamulelani: ‘Murowe, mwaathukumanyihe anakhotto macira macireene muloko a aNafitali ni aZebuloni ni mwaaroweno omwaako Tabori." 
Judges4:7 Miyo kinoomutannya Sisera, mutokweene a anakhotto a Yabini vamoha ni ikaarosawe sa iyuuma ni anakhottwaawe mpaka mooloko Kixoni ni kinoomwinnyererawo mmatatanimwanyu.’”" 
Judges4:8 Baraki aamweerela: “Mwarowa ni miyo, kinoorowa, mene mwaahirowa, nkinrowatho.”" 
Judges4:9 Debora aamwaakhula: “Khaveetthu, kinoorowa, mene musuwele weera mweenre muthanlaka hiiho, nttittimiho khanikhala nawinyu, niwoko Yave onoomwinnyerera Sisera mmatatani mwa muthiyana.” Debora aarowa ni Baraki oKadexi," 
Judges4:10 mwa weiwo owo aawiitthannaawe aNafitali ni aZebuloni. Asilopwana macira macireene muloko yaamutthara Baraki, ni Debora aarowanotho." 
Judges4:11 Vanonto, Heberi, muKeni, aamwalamwala ni aKeni akina, ekhapira ya Hobabi, atatawe oowaathelela Moisesi, anakunga eheemaawe vamwirini mutokotoko oZahananimi, waattamela oKedexi." 
Judges4:12 Sisera eereliwaawe weera Baraki, mwaana mulopwana a Abinowami, aawela vamwaako Tabori," 
Judges4:13 owo aathukumanyiha ikaarosawe sa iyuuma macira mathannamaxexe ni anakhottwaawe ootheene a oHaroxeti-Hagoyimi mpaka mooloko Kixoni. 
Judges4:14 Debora aamweerela Baraki: “Murowe! Nna nihuku Yave omwinnyerenraawe Sisera mmatatanimwanyu. Yave onrowa muhoolomwanyu!” Hiiho Baraki aakhuruwa mwaako Tabori atthariwaka ni asilopwana macira macireene muloko. 
Judges4:15 Mpuwa moowanani Baraki, Yave aamurukureeriha muru Sisera ni awawe moota wooweera anakhottwaawe ootheene yaakakatthasiwa, ni Sisera aakhuruwa mukaaronimwawe, anatthawa." 
Judges4:16 Baraki aattharelela ikaaro sa ekhotto ni anakhotto mpaka oHaroxeti-Hagoyimi. Anakhotto ootheene a Sisera yaahiiviwa ni ekatana; khaahanleru mutthu. 
Judges4:17 Wa soothesene, Sisera aatthawela muheemani ya Yayeli, mwaara a Heberi, muKeni, niwoko waakhala murettele eriyari ya Yabini, mwene a Hazori, ni nihimo na Heberi, muKeni." 
Judges4:18 Yayeli aamuciceera Sisera, anamweerela: “pwiiyaaka, murwe, mvoloweke muheemanimwaka, muhoove.” Hiiho aavolowa ni Yayeli aamukhuneela ni ekuwo." 
Judges4:19 Sisera aamweerela: “Koovoliwa ntthona, dyoontte mukivahe maahi kiwure.” Yayeli aamuttuula kacikhi a mukaka, anamvaha, anamukhuneela." 
Judges4:20 Sisera aamulamulela muthiyana: “Mukhale vamulako wa eheema. Avira mutthu anookohani: ‘Aakhala arimo?’ vano mweereke: ‘Hoye.’” 
Judges4:21 Vanonto Yayeli mwaara a Heberi, aakuxa ekhomo ya eheema ni enyutto, anamwiitela mpaka omwaattamela Sisera simuttokoneenleene ikhove niwoko na okhulumuwawawe. Aamukhomela mphatamaaru mpaka ophutula wiithela, anakhwa." 
Judges4:22 Baraki avirakawo amwaasaka Sisera, Yayeli aamuciceera. Owo aamweerela Baraki: “Murwe miyo kiwoonihereni mulopwana mummwaasaanyu.” Owo avolowaka muheemani, aamoona Sisera akhwiiyeene ni ekhomo ephutunleene mphatamaaru." 
Judges4:23 Nihuku nenenenne Muluku aangwina Yabini, mwene a aKanaani, ohoolo wa aYixrayeli." 
Judges4:24 aYixrayeli yannapwaherera ongwanano Yabini, mwene a aKanaani, mpaka awosa omphwata." 
Judges5:1 Nihuku nenenenne Debora ni Baraki, mwaana mulopwana a Abinowami, yaahiipasa ecipo ela:" 
Judges5:2 “Asitokweene a aYixrayeli ehoolelaka ni muloko wiiveleelaka ni otthunawaya, Yave atthapeliwe!" 
Judges5:3 Mwiiwe nyuwosa mamwene ni nyuwosa alamuli ngwiriyane! “Kinimwiipela Yave, kinimutthapela Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, ni icipo." 
Judges5:4 Ii! Yave Nyuwo mwaakhumaanyu oSeyiri mweettaka okhuma elapo ya wEdomi, etthaya yaatetereya ni erimu yaattonya epula mahutte ettonyaka maahi." 
Judges5:5 Nyaako saattikinyeya ohoolo wa Yave, Muluku a oSinayi; aani ohoolo wa Muluku a aYixrayeli." 
Judges5:6 Mmahukuni a Xamegari, mwaana mulopwana a Anati, mweehuhuni ya Yayeli, misewe khasaaviriwa; yaawo yeetta yaavira iphiro sookottoomba." 
Judges5:7 Khayaawowo anamalima mmittettheni sa aYixrayeli mpaka miyo, Debora, okhumelela, miyo kiri maayi a aYixrayeli." 
Judges5:8 aYixrayeli ethanlaleene miluku sinyowani, ekhotto yaaphiya vamulako wa esidade ni hata khayooneyaru exikudu* naari nivaka variyari wa aYixrayeli 40 000." 
Judges5:9 Murimaaka ori ni asitokweene a aYixrayeli; ni oowiixinnyerera munlokoni. Muntthapele Yave! 
Judges5:10 Nyuwosa munaawela abuuru ootteela mukilaathiyeene vasulu wa abuuru, ni nyuwosa muneetta munseweni, muupuwele!" 
Judges5:11 Mwiiwe okhuwelaxa wa anamamiinela a maahi moowureramo. Awosa aniipa owina wa ekhaikhai wa Yave ni wa asitokweene a aYixrayeli. Vahoolowaya muloko wa Yave waarowa vamulako wa esidade. 
Judges5:12 ‘Mvenye, mvenye, Debora! Mvenye, mvenye ni mwiipe! Mweemele Baraki! Mwaatthuke anamavariwaanyu, mwaana mulopwana a Abinowami!’" 
Judges5:13 Vano yaale yaahanle ni okumi yaarowa wa maneethi; muloko wa Yave waakirweela miyo ntoko anakhotto ooweraxa. 
Judges5:14 Akina yaarweenle wEfrayimi, elapo khalayi yaari ya awAmaleki; Benyamini aari ni muloko wootthanreni nyuwo. Asitokweene yaarweenle oMakiri ni yaawo ankuxa ekopo ya etokweene yaarweenle oZebuloni." 
Judges5:15 Ahooleli a Isakari yaari ni Debora; aani Isakari aari ni Baraki, iixaakuvihaka mpaka oreyareyani. Mweelaponi ya oRubeni waakhala otthokelela otokotoko." 
Judges5:16 Heeni muhanlaanyu owaani ngwiiwaka akukhuli yiitthanaka mihuwosaya? Mweelaponi ya oRubeni waakhala otthokelela otokotoko. 
Judges5:17 aGiliyade yaahala okhopela Yordanu. Heeni aDani ahanlaaya ni makulaaya? Axer aahala mukerekhere ephareiya iitthuuwaka mmuxelonimwaya. 
Judges5:18 aZebuloni yaaleva okumaaya, ntoko yaapankaaya aNafitali mmattumuxani yaawaniwe ekhotto." 
Judges5:19 Mamwene yaahoorwa, enawana. Mamwene a oKanaani yaawana oTahanaki mukerekhere maahi a oMegido, mene khayaakunxeru eparatha* hata soohuhula." 
Judges5:20 Okhuma wiirimu ithenyeeri saawana; okhuma mphironimwaya saangwanano Sisera. 
Judges5:21 Mooloko Kixoni waahaakumburula, aani, mooloko wa khalayi, Kixoni. Weette woolipeene okumaaka!" 
Judges5:22 Oruma wa mikhitto sa ikavalu* wannateterexa situphaka khira khira ikavalusaya* soowera. Ndyelo a Yave aaheera: 
Judges5:23 “Woolaphiwa okhale oMerozi ni amakaaya, niwoko khaamukhavihenre Yave, khaamukhavihenre Yave waawanano oolipaxa.”" 
Judges5:24 Ooreelihiwa akhale Yayeli, mwaariye Heberi, muKeni; ooreelihiwa akhale yoowo variyari wa asithiyana ankhala muheemani." 
Judges5:25 Aamvekela maahi ni owo aamvaha mukaka. Aamuruuhela mukaka wootikana mutixelani ya omwene. 
Judges5:26 Ntatanawe noothiyana naakuxa ekhomo ni ntatanawe noolopwana naakuxa enyutto ya namuteko. Aamukhomela Sisera; aathorola murwaawe mpaka ophutula mphatamaaru. 
Judges5:27 Vanyeettoni sa Yayeli, aahuuwawo, anakhala nwii. Vanyettoni sa Yayeli, aahuuwawo, anakhala nwii. Uuwenlaawewo aahookhwa!" 
Judges5:28 Amayawe Sisera yannaweha ereene vaxanelani ekhuwelaka wiithela exanela: ‘Ekaarwaawe ya ikavalu* empiseraxani? Ohiniiwanyeela heeni oruma wa ekaarwaawe?’ 
Judges5:29 Asithiyanaawe anamiruku yannawaakhula, awo epwahereraka wiixeerela:" 
Judges5:30 ‘Weeraka ankhupa ni ankawana soohuhula: mwaamwali mmoha hoye hoye eeli wa khula mulopwana ni soowara sa malepa ntoko soohuhula Sisera; soowara sa malepa ni sooxoriwa, aani sooxoraxoriwa muxiko weera kiware – sootheene iyo ntoko soohuhula.’" 
Judges5:31 Ii! Yave, amwiittanaanyu ootheene ephwatiwe hiiho! Vaheera yaawo anoosivelani ekhaleke ntoko nsuwa naakhumaka ni ikurusaya.” Vahoolowaya elapo yaakhalano murettele wookwana iyaakha miloko mixexe." 
Judges6:1 Emaara ekinatho aYixrayeli yaapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave ni wookwana iyaakha ithannapiili Owo aawinnyerera mmatatani mwa aMidiyani. 
Judges6:2 Vano aMidiyani yaahaapororiha aYixrayeli, tivawo aYixrayeli yiitekenlaaya mootthawelamo mmanyaakoni, mmakhukuni ni moolipamo." 
Judges6:3 Imaara sootheene aYixrayeli yaalaaya, aMidiyani, awAmeleki ni miloko sikina sa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa sannaaphutuwela." 
Judges6:4 Yannakonela mweelaponi ephwataka sooca elapo yootheene mpaka oGaza. Khayaahiyarumo etthu oYixrayeli – hata ikhondoolo, naari imombe hoye hoye abuuru."
