Judges6:5 Awosa yaarwa eruuhaka mihuwosaya ni iheemasaya erwaaka ntoko nasope. Khayaalikeleya atthwaaya ni ikamelusaya. Khayaawereya owaalikela alopwana ni ikamelusaya. Yannakwanela elapo yootheene weera ehuhule. 
Judges6:6 aYixrayeli waahaarweela osiwa niwoko na aMidiyani moota wooweera yaamukhuwelela Yave weera aakhavihere. 
Judges6:7 aYixrayeli emukhuwelelakaru Yave niwoko na aMidiyani," 
Judges6:8 Owo aahaarumihela mprofeeti eenre: “Yave Muluku a aYixrayeli oneera ha: Kohookhumihasani wExipitu, elapo ya okaporo." 
Judges6:9 Miyo kohootapuxasani mwaalamuliwaanyu wExipitu ni mmatatani mwa ananihasu ootheene. Koowoomolasa kinoovahasani elapwaaya. 
Judges6:10 Kooweerelasanitho: ‘Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu; muhilape miluku sa awAmori a elapweene yeela munkhalaanyu. Wa soothesene, khamukiiwale.’”" 
Judges6:11 Ndyelo a Yave ahoorwa, anakilaathi vathi wa mwiri wa ekarivalyu* wOfera waari wa Yowaxi, ngwAbiyezeri. Vano mwanawe Gidiyoni eera eepetthaka etrigu munttankhini saamiwa iwuuva* weera awiipithihe aMidiyani." 
Judges6:12 Ndyelo a Yave iixooniheraka wa Gidiyoni, aamweerela: “Yave ori ni nyuwo nakhotto ooweraxa!”" 
Judges6:13 Gidiyoni aamwaakhula: “Ii! Apwiiya, waari weera Yave ori ni hiyo, heeni itthu sootheene iya sinnikhumelelaaya? Siri woowi sootikhinihasawe sootheene mwa seiye asitithihu yaanithalihenraaya yeeraka: ‘Ti Yave onikhumihale wExipitu?’ Vano Yave oonihiya aninnyereraka mmatatani mwa aMidiyani.”" 
Judges6:14 Yave aamurukunuwela eeraka: “Murowe ni ikuru murinaanyu ni mwaatapuxe aYixrayeli mmatatani mwa aMidiyani. Ti Miyo kinoorumihani.” 
Judges6:15 Gidiyoni aamukoha: “Ii! Yave, nkaatapuxe hai aYixrayeli? Nihimonaka ti nikhaanene opwaha mahimo makina a aManaxe ni miyo kiri ooyevaxa mweemusinimwaka.”" 
Judges6:16 Yave aamwaakhula: Miyo kinookhala ni nyuwo ni munimwaawina anakhotto a aMidiyani ootheene.” 
Judges6:17 Gidiyoni aamweerela: “Mwatthuna okoonihera oreerawanyu, mukivahe eneneero enoonihera weera ti Nyuwo muneenaanyu munuuluma ni miyo." 
Judges6:18 Dyoontte, muhipwahe mpaka ohokolowawaka kiruuhaka sooveleelasaka weera kikilaathiki ohoolowanyu.” Vano Yave aamweerela: “Miyo kinimoowehererani mpaka ohokolowawanyu.”" 
Judges6:19 Gidiyoni aarowa owaani, anareherera epuri exaana ni, avarelaka muteko muringo wa efa* ya ephepa, aapaka ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu. Aahela enama mumpaparani ni muhusi musupuriyani, anakhumihera vaate, anamveleelela vathi wa mwiri wa ekarivalyu*." 
Judges6:20 Ndyelo a Muluku aamweerela: “Mukuxe enama ni ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu, mwiikaathi vamwala va, ni mmiinelemo muhusi.” Ni Gidiyoni aapaka hiiho." 
Judges6:21 Ndyelo a Yave aatava enama ni ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu ni ekopo yaari mmatatanimwawe. Mooro waakhuma vamwala ohisaka enama ni epaawu. Vahoolowaya ndyelo a Yave aalakaseya. 
Judges6:22 Gidiyoni asuwelaka weera aari ndyelo a Yave, aakhuwela: “Ii! Adonai Yave! Koomoona ndyelo a Yave ttunda ttunda!”" 
Judges6:23 Wa soothesene, Yave aamweerela: “Murettele okhale ni nyuwo! Muhoove, nyuwo khamukhwa.”" 
Judges6:24 Hiiho Gidiyoni aampakelawo Yave altaari*, anaatteha YAVE TI MURETTELE. Mpaka olelo ankhala wOfera elapo ya awAbiyezeri." 
Judges6:25 Ohiyuweene yoole Yave aamweerela: “Mmwalamwaxe emombe elopwana ya muhuwo wa atithinyu, yeele erino iyaakha ithannapiili, mwaaphwate altaari* a Bahali* ari a atithinyu ni mwathikile nrimbu nootteeliheriwa Axera nri mukhwipi mwa altaari*." 
Judges6:26 Vahoolowaya muntekele Yave Mulukwaanyu altaari* vasulu wa ettuttuwa eyo. Vanonto, mveleele emombe elopwana yeele muhiseraka ni nrimbu nootteeliheriwa muneeraanyu mwathikile.”" 
Judges6:27 Gidiyoni aawiitthanasa muloko a arumeiyaawe, anapaka yeeyo Yave aamuleenlaawe. Wa soothesene, awoovaka amusaawe ni atthu a musidade, sootheene iyo khaapanke othana, mene aani ohiyu." 
Judges6:28 Oxaawaya oxeexelo, atthu a musidade evenyakaru, yaawoona altaari* a Bahali* ephwatiweene ni nrimbunayanene nithikiliweene nitho emombe yanaaveeli eveleeliweenewo valtaarini* anyowani!" 
Judges6:29 Awosa yaakohana: “Taani opanke yeela?” Vano ekohakohanneene, yaaleeliwa: “Ti Gidiyoni, mwaana mulopwana a Yowaxi opanke ela.”" 
Judges6:30 Asilopwana a esidade yaamunyesereriha Yowaxi: “Munkhumihere vaate mwaninyu. Ontthuneya weera akhwe, niwoko ohaaphwata altaari* a Bahali*, anathikila nrimbu na Axera naari mukhwipimwaya.”" 
Judges6:31 Wa soothesene, Yowaxi aamwaakhula nakupa aanyoonyiwe: “Nyuwosa munimwaakiha nthowa na Bahali*? Muneerera omutapuxa Bahali*? Yoole ongwana mpattaawe iiviwe oxeexelo. Vekhaikhai Bahali* aari muluku, aamwiixaakiha yaaphwatiwaaya altaaraawe.”" 
Judges6:32 Tivawo okhuma nihuku nne yaamuttenghaaya Gidiyoni “Yeru-Bahali” yeeraka: “Bahali* angwaneno Gidiyoni’ niwoko ohaaphwata altaaraawe.” 
Judges6:33 Ehuhuweene yeele, aMidiyani, awAmaleki ni miloko sikina sa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa sootheene saahaathukumanya anakhottwaaya, enamulapuwa Yordanu, enakonela nreyareya na oYizereyeli." 
Judges6:34 Vanonto, Munepa wa Yave waamukhuruwela Gidiyoni, aniipa nipalapatta awiitthanaka awAbiyezeri weera emutthare." 
Judges6:35 Aahaarumihela anamitthenga oManaxe awiitthanelaka owana. Aahaarumihelatho wAxeri, oNafitali ni oZebuloni moota wooweera awosa yaamukumanano." 
Judges6:36 Gidiyoni aamweerela Muluku: “Kintthuna osuwela Nyuwo mwaariki mwaatapuxe aYixrayeli mwa miyo. 
Judges6:37 Moone nkiikaathi exapala ya ekhondoolo vanipuroni nimveeriwa* etrigu. Vano, yiimeliwa nikame exapala paahi, etthaya yootheene enakhala yoowuumeene, kinoosuwela weera Nyuwo mmwaatapuxe aYixrayeli mwa miyo ntoko muroromelihalaanyu.”" 
Judges6:38 Ni hiiho waaheereya. Oxaawaya, oxeexelo, Gidiyoni aapehera, anaama exapala anasariha maahi a nikame mutixelani!" 
Judges6:39 Vahoolowaya Gidiyoni aamweerela Muluku: “Muhikinyoonyeriwe, mukitthunihere ovekelatho etthu emoha. Mukitthunihere woota murima omohamoharu ni exapala ela. Emaara eyo exapala ekhaleke yoowuumeene ni etthaya yiimeliweke nikame.”" 
Judges6:40 Ohiyuweene yoole Muluku aapaka hiiho. Yuumale paahi exapala; etthaya yootheene yiimelaxiwe nikame. 
Judges7:1 Oyaaka ni oxa Yeru-Bahali* (eyo tiiyo Gidiyoni) ni anakhottwaawe ootheene yaakonela onaattuuttuni a oHarodi. Yaakonenlaayawo aMidiyani waari mpattaaya wa ottuttuwani, mureyareyani waattamela nttumuxa na oMore." 
Judges7:2 Yave aamweerela Gidiyoni: “Mohaattanaxa atthu. Kawinnyerera aMidiyani mmatatani mwa aYixrayeli, awosa eniyeereke wiixoona wa Miyo yeeraka weera ikurusaya ti saatapunxe." 
Judges7:3 Vano mwaaleele atthu: ‘Ootheene anoova, ehokoleeleke omwaako oGiliyade.’” Hiiho asilopwana 22 000 yaahokolowa, enahala asilopwana macira macireene muloko." 
Judges7:4 Wa soothesene, Yave aamweerela Gidiyoni: “Nlelo asilopwana ahaattaxa. Mwaarowanase omoolokoni ni Miyo kinimwaamwalamwaxa yaawo ahanle ni nyuwo. Miyo keera: ‘Ola aroweke ni nyuwo,’ onoorowa, mene keera: ‘Ola khanrowa ni nyuwo,’ ahaleke.”" 
Judges7:5 Vano Gidiyoni aahaarongha asilopwana omoolokoni. Weiwo Yave aamweerela: “Mwaamwalamwaxe yaawo angwura ntoko mwalapwa ni yaale ankokhora weera ewure ni matata.” 
Judges7:6 Asilopwana macira mararu yaawura ntoko mwalapwa, vaheera ancipalaawo yaakokhora weera ewure." 
Judges7:7 Yave aamweerela Gidiyoni: “Kinimoovuluxani ni asilopwana macira mararu awunre ntoko mwalapwa kiwinnyereraka aMidiyani mmtatanimwanyu. Asilopwana akinaawo mwaaleele ehokolowaseke.” 
Judges7:8 Vano Gidiyoni aahaalamula akinaawo orowa oheemaniwaya, aahalanaka asilopwana macira mararu, mwa yaawosa, yaakuxasa itthu sa munkwahani ni mapalapatta a yaale yaahokolongwe. Vano aMidiyani yaari oxepaniwaya mureyareyani." 
Judges7:9 Ohiyuweene yoole Yave aamweerela Gidiyoni: “Mvenye, murowe akonenlaayawo aMidiyani, niwoko kinoowinnyerera mmtatanimwanyu.”" 
Judges7:10 Nyuwo moova orowa waawanano, murowe ni murumeiyaanyu Pura mpaka okhwipi akonenlaayawo aMidiyani." 
Judges7:11 Mwaaphiyakawo, mwiiwe yeeyo anuulumaaya. Vahoolowaya munoolipiha murima weera mwaawaneno.” Hiiho Gidiyoni ni Pura, murumeiyaawe, yaarowa mpaka okhwipi yaaraayawo anamalipelelaaya." 
Judges7:12 Vano, aMidiyani, awAmaleki ni miloko sootheene sikina sa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa saathukumana mureyareyani. Yaahaattaxa ntoko nasope ohinaalikeleya. Hiiho ntoko ehaava ya mphareiya nave khayaalikeleya ahaacaaya." 
Judges7:13 Gidiyoni aaphiya nnenesene mweehuhuni mulopwana mmoha aamuthaliheraawe mukhwaawe yoolohaawe. Owo eera: “Kooloha epaawu ya esevada* ephirikeelaka yaakonenle aMidiyani, enakhitta eheema ni ikuruxa moota wooweera eyo yaakankhanyuwa.”" 
Judges7:14 Nthamwenaawe aamwaakhula: “Vekhaikhai eyo ti ekatana ya Gidiyoni, mwaana mulopwana aYowaxi, muYixrayeli. Muluku oomwinnyerera aMidiyani ni mukonelingwe moothemwene mmatatanimwawe.”" 
Judges7:15 Gidiyoni iiwakaru yooloha ela ni etaphulelowaaya, aamulapa Muluku. Aahokoleela yaakonenlaayawo aYixrayeli anaweerela: “Mvenye! Yave ohinnyerera okonelingwe wa aMidiyani mmatatanimwanyu!”" 
Judges7:16 Aahaakawanyiha asilopwana macira mararu mipatta miraru, anaavaha ootheene mapalapatta ni nyaapu soohikhala etthu ni mithuko mpuwamwaya." 
Judges7:17 Aaweerelasa: “Mukiweheke, mukitakihe. Kaaphiyaka okhwipi wa akonenlaayawo, mwapake nnenesene yeeyo kineeraka kapake." 
Judges7:18 Vano miyo ni ootheene yaawo ari ni miyo niipaka mapalapattaahu nirukureenreene akonenlaayawo, mwiipe awinyu ni mwakhuwelewo: ‘Wa Yave ni wa Gidiyoni!’”" 
Judges7:19 Gidiyoni ni asilopwana ncira yaamuhoonle yaaphiyasa okhwipi yaaraayawo anamalipelela, opwangheene vakhaani ohiyu eriyari ni eceendyiweene anamalipelela. Vano yaahiipasa mapalapattaaya, epwexaka nyaapu saari mmatatanimwaya." 
Judges7:20 Mipatta soomiraru saahiipa mapalapatta sipwexaka nyaapu. Evarenleene mithuko moono muthiyana, mapalapattaawo moono mulopwana, yaakhuwela: “Ekatana wa Yave ni wa Gidiyoni!”" 
Judges7:21 Khula mulopwana aakhala aaraawewo erukureenreene waakonelingwe. aMidiyani ootheene yaatthawasa etthimakaka ni ekhuwelaka. 
Judges7:22 Erumakaru mapalapatta macira mararu, Yave aaheeriha weera waakonelingwe woothewene asilopwana yaarukunuwelana ni ekatana. Vaheera anakhotto ancipale yaatthawela oBeti-Xita, mpatta wa oZerera, mpaka omwiinanoni wa wAbeli-Mehola, waattamela oTabati." 
Judges7:23 Vano aYixrayeli a oNafitali, wAxeri ni oManaxe ootheene yaahiitthaniwa, enaattharelelasa aMidiyani." 
Judges7:24 Gidiyoni aahaarumihela anamitthenga elapo yootheene ya mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi, eeraka: “Mukhuruwe, mwaawaneno aMidiyani ni mwamurice mooloko Yordanu mpaka oBeti-Bara." 
Judges7:25 Awosa yaahaavarasa ahooleli eeli a aMidiyani, Orebi ni Zeebi. Yaamwiiva Orebi vamwala wa Orebi ni Zeebi munttankhini saamiwa iwuuva* sa Zeebi. Yaahaattharelela aMidiyani, enamuruuhela Gidiyoni muru wa Orebi ni Zeebi, owo areene okhopela Yordanu." 
Judges8:1 Vano awEfrayimi yaamukohasa Gidiyoni: “Nyuwo munipakenleni hiiha? Mwahaaniitthanenle heeni mwaarowaanyu waawanano aMidiyani?” Ni awosa yaamuximwela nnenesene. 
Judges8:2 Wa soothesene, owo aawaakhula: “Kheewo kipankaaka yoovirikana ni nyuwosa. Imora sa iwuuva* sa wEfrayimi ti sooreerela opwaha soohepha sootheene sa Abiyezeri." 
Judges8:3 Muluku oowinnyerera ahooleli a aMidiyani, Orebi ni Zeebi, mmtatanimwanyu. Yeeyo kiwenraaka opaka khenlikanxereya ni yeeyo mupakansaanyu!” Yiiwakaru maswaawe, yaamaala omuximwelawaya Gidiyoni." 
Judges8:4 Gidiyoni ni anakhottwaawe macira mararu, ekhulumungweene, yaapwaherera waattharelela, enaphiya muYordanu, enamulapuwa." 
Judges8:5 Vano oSukota Gidiyoni aaweerela atthu a weiwe: “Kinoovekasani yooca vakhaani wa anakhottwaaka. Asilopwana ala aakhulumuwasa ni miyo nlelo kinimuttharelela Zeba ni Zalemuna, mamwene a aMidiyani.”" 
Judges8:6 Wa soothesene, asitokweene a oSukota yaamweerela: “Nlelo khamumvanre Zeba ni Zalemuna? Nnaavahere heeni yooca anakhottwaanyu?”" 
Judges8:7 Vano Gidiyoni aawaakhula: “Niwoko na yeeyo, Yave aakinnyereraka mmatatanimwaka Zeba ni Zalemuna, kinimwaandakasa irutthusanyu ni nyiiwa ni rupulula a munikareni." 
Judges8:8 Woovenya vaavaale aarowa oPeniyeli, anaavekela hiihaale, mene awosa yaakhulanse ntoko aSukota." 
Judges8:9 Aaweerela atthu a oPeniyeli: “Kaahokolowaka oowineene, kinoophwata etoore* ela.”" 
Judges8:10 Vano Zeba ni Zalenuma yaari oKarekari vamoha ni anakhotto wookwanaka 15 000 – yaale yaahanle wa anakhotto a miloko sa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Wookwanaka anakhotto 120 000 yaahookhwa. 
Judges8:11 Gidiyoni aarowa ephiro ya anamathaamathaama, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oNoba ni oYogebeha, anaawanano wootutuxereya anakhotto ale." 
Judges8:12 Zeba ni Zalemuna, mamwene meeli a aMidiyani, yaatthawasa, mene aahaattharelela, anaavara, aawinaka anakhottwaaya ootheene." 
Judges8:13 Vahoolowaya Gidiyoni, mwaana mulopwana a Yowaxi, aahokolowa okhottoni awelelaka okhatoni wa oHeresi." 
Judges8:14 Aamvara mmiravo mmoha a oSukota, anamukohakoha. Mmiravo ole aamulepela Gidiyoni masina a ahooleli miloko mithannamiili ni athanneeli a oSukota yaari asitokweene a esidade." 
Judges8:15 Vano, Gidiyoni aarowa oSukota, anaweerela asilopwana a weiwe: “Ori va Zeba ni Zalemuna mwa yaala mwaakiveihenraanyu mweeraka: ‘Nlelo khamunaaye omvara Zeba ni Zalemuna? Nnaavahere heeni yooca anakhottwaanyu?’”" 
Judges8:16 Owo aahaavarasa ahooleli a esidade ya oSukota, anaattaruxasa ni nyiiwa ni rupulula a munikareni." 
Judges8:17 Aaphwatatho etoore* ya oPeniyeli awiivaka asilopwana a esidadeene yeele. 
Judges8:18 Vahoolowaya aamukoha Zeba ni Zalemuna: “Yaari hai asilopwana nyuwosa ngwiivasiyaanyu oTabori?” Awosa yaamwaakhulasa: “Yaari ntoko nyeenyu, khula mutthu a yaale aalikana mwaana a mwene.”" 
Judges8:19 Gidiyoni aawaakhula: “Asilopwana ale yaari axunnaka, ooyariwano xaxaxa ni amaayi amoha. Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave: Nyuwosa muurenle okumaaya, miyo nkaawiivasani." 
Judges8:20 Vano aaheerela ntthaaranawe, Yeteri: “Owiivase!” Wa soothesene, khaatheteiye ekatana niwoko na woova eenre ayevaka." 
Judges8:21 Zeba ni Zalemuna yaamweerela Gidiyoni: “Haya, muniive nyeenyuweene, niwoko mulopwana onsuweliwa ni ikurusawe.” Hiiho Gidiyoni aawaattamela, anawiivasa, anakuxa onyooro wa muxiko wa aahaacaaya." 
Judges8:22 aYixrayeli yaamweerela Gidiyoni: “Munilamule – nyuwo, mwaninyu ni musuluwaanyu, niwoko moonitapuxa mmatatani mwa aMidiyani.”" 
Judges8:23 Wa soothesene, Gidiyoni aawaakhula: “Miyo nkoolamulasani naari mwanakeene. Ti Yave aneera oolamuleni." 
Judges8:24 Kinoovekelasani paahi ha: khula mutthu a nyuwosa akivahe xiveeve a soohuhuliwa.” Vano aYixmayeli yaakhovelela waawara axiveeve a eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
Judges8:25 Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Nnimoovahani ni murima wootheene.” Hiiho yaahaatalasa eloona ni khula mutthu aamvonyerawo xiveeve mmoha amukhumihaka moohuhulanimwawe. 
Judges8:26 Olemela wa axiveeve a eyuuma yoorikaxa waaphiyera ikiilu* miloko miili sihaalikeleliwaka itthu sooreera soorikaxa sikina iyo hata soowara sookankela yaawaraaya mamwene a oMidiya naari onyooro waari muxiko mwa ahaacaaya. 
Judges8:27 Gidiyoni aavarela muteko eyuuma yoorikaxa ele weera ampakele mooxikootti a esaserdoti, aniikaathi esidadaawe wOfera. Vano aYixrayeli ootheene yaararuwasa emulapaka mooxikootti ole. Mooxikootti ole aathatuwa ntapha wa Gidiyoni ni amusaawe." 
Judges8:28 Hiiho aMidiyani yaawiniwa ni aYixrayeli ni khayaawenretho olipa. Mookumini wootheene wa Gidiyoni elapo yaakhala ni murettele wa iyaakha miloko mixexe. 
Judges8:29 Vano Yeru-Bahali, mwaana mulopwana a Yowaxi, aahokoleela owaani." 
Judges8:30 Aarino anamwane asilopwana miloko mithannamiili ootheenaawo ti aayanraawe, eenre aathelaka athiyana ancipale." 
Judges8:31 Ekuxowaawe yaakhala oXekhemi yaamuyarela mwaana mulopwana, mwa yoowo Gidiyoni aamuttenghaawe Abimeleki." 
Judges8:32 Gidiyoni, mwaana mulopwana a Yowaxi aakhwiiye uuluvalanxeene, anavithiwa onihiyeni na atithawe Yowaxi wOfera wa awAbiyezeri." 
Judges8:33 Akhwaakaru Gidiyoni, aYixrayeli yaapacera waalapatho aBahali*. Yaamukhaliha Bahali-Beriti ntoko mulukwaaya" 
Judges8:34 emuttiwalaka Yave Mulukwaaya, mwa Yoowo aatapunxe mmatatani mwa amwiittanaaya ootheene a mipatta sootheene." 
Judges8:35 Khayaakhalenletho onnene emusi ya Yeru-Bahali, eyo tiiyo Gidiyoni, ettiwalaka mpuha aapakenlaawe aYixrayeli." 
Judges9:1 Abimeleki, mwaana mulopwana a Yeru-Bahali, aarowa wa asicimweenaaya amayawe oXekhemi, anaweerela yaawosa ni nihimo nootheene na emusi ya amayawe:" 
Judges9:2 “Mwaakohase aXekhemi ootheene: ‘Enooreerelani eheeni – olamuliwa ni anamwane asilopwana miloko mithannamiili ootheene a Yeru-Bahali, hoye hoye olamuliwa ni mulopwana mmoha paahi?’ Muupuwelele weera miyo ti xaxaxaanyu wuutiithini.”" 
Judges9:3 Vano asicimweenaaya amayawe yaahuulumasa yeeyo wa aXekhemi, mwa yaawosa yaatthunasa omuthanla Abimeleki niwoko na okhala a emusaaya." 
Judges9:4 Awosa yaamvaha ixekeli* miloko mithannamiili sa eparatha* saakhumihiwe empa ya Bahali-Beriti. Abimeleki aavarela muteko ixekeli* iye wa owiiwananano oohikhalano muteko ni attiyamaaru, mwa yaawo yaathatungwe anamattharaawe." 
Judges9:5 Aarowa vaate wa atithawe Yeru-Bahali wOfera, anawiivakasa vamwala axunneiye miloko mithannamiili, anamwane a Yeru-Bahali. Wa soothesene, Yotami, etthaako ya Yeru-Bahali, aahoopowa, aniipitha." 
Judges9:6 Vahoolowaya atthu ootheene a oXekhemi ni oBeti-Milo yaathukumana mukerekhere wa mwiri wa ekarivalyu*, vakhiviru wa nrimbu na oXekhemi weera avariwe omwene Abimeleki." 
Judges9:7 Yotami iiwakaru yeeyo, aawela vamwaako oGerizimi, anaakhuwelela: “Mukiiwe aXekhemi weera Muluku awiiweenitho." 
Judges9:8 Nihuku nimoha nyiri saavenya weera siivarele mwenaaya. Saaheerela mwiri wa olivera: ‘Mukhaleke mwenaahu.’ 
Judges9:9 Mwiri wa olivera waahaakhula: ‘Nkingwera ohiya weeka makhura, mwa yaawo amvareliwa muteko woottittimihera miluku ni atthu weera kilamule nyiri!’" 
Judges9:10 Vahoolowaya nyiri saaheerela mwiri wa efiigu*: ‘Haya, mukhaleke mwenaahu.’" 
Judges9:11 Wa soothesene, mwiri wa efiigu* waahaakhula: ‘Nkintthuna ohiya soowiimasaka soosiva ni soocoocowa weera kilamule nyiri.’" 
Judges9:12 Vahoolowaya nyiri saaheerela mwiri wa eviinyu: ‘Haya, mukhaleke mwenaahu.’" 
Judges9:13 Wa soothesene, mwiri wa eviinyu waahaakhula: ‘Nkintthuna ohiya eviinyuwaaka enghakalaliha miluku ni atthu weera kilamule nyiri.’" 
Judges9:14 Wookisera nyiri saaheerela mwiri wa nyiiwa: ‘Haya, mukhaleke mwenaahu.’" 
Judges9:15 Mwiri wa nyiiwa waaheerela nyiri: ‘Mwatthuna weera miyo kikhale mwenaanyu, murwaaseke ootheene nyuwo vamunttuusiniwaka. Mwaahitthuna, vano mooro okhume mphandinimwaka sa nyiiwa ohisaka mpaka nyiri sitokotoko sa oLibanu.’”" 
Judges9:16 Yotami aapwaherera: “Weeraka nyuwosa mohuupuwela nnenesene, munthanlaka Abimeleki ntoko mwene? Moomuttittimihera Gidiyoni ni emusaawe ntoko waaphwanelaaya?" 
Judges9:17 Muhittiwale weera atithaka ahoowanelasani ni aaleva okumaaya weera yootapuxaseni mmatatani mwa aMidiyani. 
Judges9:18 Wa soothesene, nyuwosa olelo moorukunuwela emusi ya atithaka, ngwiivelaka anamwanaaya miloko mithannamiili vamwaleene yoowo ni moomuthanla Abimeleki, mwaana mulopwana a epottha ethiyana, okhala mwene a aXekhemi niwoko na okhala munninyu." 
Judges9:19 Waari weera nyuwosa moomoonihera Yeru-Bahali ni emusaawe murima woororomeleya, vano muhakalalelaneke." 
Judges9:20 Vaheera waahikhanle hiiho, vano okhume mooro wa Abimeleki ni waahise atthu a oXekhemi ni oBeti-Milo ni okhumetho mooro wa nyuwosa, atthu a oXekhemi ni oBeti-Milo, omuhisaka Abimeleki!”" 
Judges9:21 Vahoolowaya Yotami aatthawela oBeheri, aakhanlaawewo ottaiwene ni munneiye Abimeleki." 
Judges9:22 Aakwaniheraawe iyaakha tthaaru Abimeleki aalamulaka aYixrayeli," 
Judges9:23 Muluku aarumiha munepa woonanara variyari wa Abimeleki ni aXekhemi, mwa yaawo yaapacera omuuluma Abimeleki." 
Judges9:24 Muluku aapaka yeeyo weera yootakhala aapakenlaawe Abimeleki anamwane asilopwana miloko mithannamiili a Yeru-Bahali ni oyeeheya wa ephomaayasa, yiinleliwe ikukuttula mwa munneiye Abimeleki ni mwa aXekhemi yaamukhavihenre owiivasa axunneiye." 
Judges9:25 aXekhemi yaamvaanelela Abimeleki yaathanlaka anamatakhala weera yawiipithele vanttumuxani yaawo yeera evirewo, ni Abimeleki aaleeliwa yeeyo." 
Judges9:26 Vano Gahali, mwaana mulopwana a Ebedi, aaphiya oXekhemi vamoha ni axunneiye weera ekhalewo ni aXekhemi yaamuroromela yoowo." 
Judges9:27 Waaheereya weera aXekhemi yaarowasa omatta ohepha iwuuva*, yaavotta, enapaka efesta mpaani mwa mulukwaaya. Ecaaka ni ewuraka hiihaale, yaamunyoholasa Abimeleki." 
Judges9:28 Vano Gahali, mwaana mulopwana a Ebedi aaheera: “Abimeleki taani ni Xekhemi taani? Khaninrowa olamuliwa ni yoowo! Owo ti mwaana mulopwana a Yeru-Bahali ni Zebuli ti mwaakhulaawe. Munrumeele Hamori, tiithi a Xekhemi. Munimurumeelela heeni Abimeleki?" 
Judges9:29 Eya! Kaalamula muloko ola! Miyo kaamwiitapuxa mwa Abimeleki kimweerelaka: ‘Waareherereke anakhottwaawo ni orwe niwane!’” 
Judges9:30 Zabuli, guvernadori a esidade, iiwakaru yeeyo aahimmaawe Gahali, mwaana mulopwana a Ebedi, aanyoonyiwa vancipale." 
Judges9:31 Aamurumihela anamitthenga Abimeleki muxiirini, eeraka: “Gahali, mwaana mulopwana a Ebedi ni axunneiye aahoorwa oXekhemi, enooseserelani muloko." 
Judges9:32 Vano murwe ohiyu vamoha ni anakhottwaanyu ngwehereraka mmatta. 
Judges9:33 Oxeexelo, nsuwa nikhumaka, mwawaneno esidade. Gahali ni atthwaawe yoowananani, mwaapakelase yoowoorerelani.”" 
Judges9:34 Hiiho Abimeleki ni anakhottwaawe ootheene yaattimulasa ohiyu, enaasa woowiipithawo waattamela oXekhemi mipatta mixexe." 
Judges9:35 Vano Gahali, mwaana mulopwana a Ebedi, aavenya areene vamulako wa esidade, Abimeleki ni anakhottwaawe yaahiithupulula." 
Judges9:36 Gahali awoonakaru, aamweerela Zebuli: “Moone, annirwa atthu ekhuruwaka vamwaako!” Zebuli aamwaakhula: “Nyuwo munaapanyera irungu sa nyaako ni atthu.”" 
Judges9:37 Wa soothesene, Gahali aaheeratho: “Moone, annirwa atthu erweelaka mpatta wa eriyari ya elapo ni nakupa mmoha aneera awaaka mphironi wa mwiri wa anamatthoma.”" 
Judges9:38 Vano, Zebuli aamweerela: “Mwahaanyu wootheene ole ori woowi? Nyuwo mweera: ‘Abimeleki taani, oomurumeela hiyo?’ Atthweene ti yaala nyuwo mwaanyemulaanyu. Mukhume mwaawaneno!”" 
Judges9:39 Hiiho Gahali aahaakhumihera vaate aXekhemi, anangwanano Abimeleki." 
Judges9:40 Abimeleki aamuttharelela ni owo aatthawa. aXekhemi ancipale yaahookhwa mmuseweni moothemwene mpaka wa mulako wa esidade. 
Judges9:41 Abimeleki aapwaherera okhala wAruma ni Zebuli aamoomola Gahali ni axunneiye oXekhemi. 
Judges9:42 Oxaawaya aXekhemi yaarowa mmamattani ni Abimeleki aasuwela yeeyo. 
Judges9:43 Vano aahaakawanyiha anakhottwaawe mipatta miraru, anawiipithiha mmatta. Awoonakaru atthu ekhumaka musidade, anakhottwaawe yaahiithupulula, enaawanano." 
Judges9:44 Abimeleki ni anakhotto yaari ni yoowo yaarowa mpaka wa mulako wa esidade. Vanonto, mipatta miili saahaarweela yaawo yaari mmatta, enawiivasa." 
Judges9:45 Abimeleki aawanano esidade nihuku nenenno mpaka owina ni owiiva atthwaaya. Vahoolowaya aaphwata esidade, anamwaramwaxelamo maakha." 
Judges9:46 Esuwelaka yeeyo yaawosa yaari otooreni* ya oXekhemi yaavolowasa mootthawelamo wa empa ya Eli-Beriti. 
Judges9:47 Abimeleki asuwelaka weera awosa yaavolowamo," 
Judges9:48 owo ni anakhottwaawe ootheene yaawelasa vamwaako oZalemoni. Aattotta epaso, anathikila iphandi sikina, anathatela. Aahaalamula akina yaari ni yoowo: “Mwaakuveke! Mpake yeeyo kimpakaaka!”" 
Judges9:49 Hiiho anakhotto ootheene yaathikila ipandi ethatelaka, enamutthara Abimeleki. Yaaciringelela iphandi vatooreni*, enapattiha. Hiiho atthweene yaale yaari mpuwa yaahookhwa. Vanonto atthu ootheene yakhwiiye mutooreni* yaari wookwana asilopwana ni asithiyana macira muloko." 
Judges9:50 Vahoolowaya Abimeleki aarowa oTebezi, anarica, anawinawo." 
Judges9:51 Vaheera musidadeni yaakhala etoore* yoolipaxa. Mwa yeeyo ootheene a esidade yaatthawelaayamo. Yaahiiwalela mpuwapuwa, enawela vapathoni wa etoore*." 
Judges9:52 Abimeleki aahaattamela otooreni* weera ahise. Vano aattamelaka mulako wa etoore* weera ahise," 
Judges9:53 muthiyana mmoha aamukurukundulela nxilo vamuruwawe apwexaka nikarakasa na Abimeleki. 
Judges9:54 Woowaakuveya aamulamulela namakuxa a exikudwaawe: “Otholole ekatanaawo, okiive weera eheeriwe: ‘Muthiyana mmoha oomwiiva.’” Vano, murumeiyaawe aamuhoma, anakhwa." 
Judges9:55 aYixrayeli yoonaka weera Abimeleki ohookhwa, yaahokoleelasa owaani." 
Judges9:56 Hiiho Muluku aamuhokoloxera sootakhala Abimeleki aapakenlaawe atithawe awiivaka axunneiye miloko mithannamiili. 
Judges9:57 Muluku aahaattaruxatho atthu a oXekhemi niwoko na sootakhalasaya. Nlapho na Yotami, mwaana mulopwana a Yeru-Bahali, naahaamorelasa." 
Judges10:1 Akhwiyeene Abimeleki, mulopwana a epuumba ya Isakari iitthaniwa Tola, mwaana mulopwana a Puwa, mwaana mulopwana a Dodo, aahaatapuxa aYixrayeli. Aakhala oXamiri, elapo ya mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi." 
Judges10:2 Aari muhooleli a aYixrayeli wa iyaakha miloko miili ni tthaaru, anakhwa, anavithiwa oXamiri." 
Judges10:3 Vahoolowawe aakhumelela Yahiri, muGiliyade, aahoolenle aYixrayeli wa iyaakha miloko miili ni piili." 
Judges10:4 Aakhalano anamwane asilopwana miloko miraru yaaweettiha abuuru miloko miraru. Yaalamula isidade miloko miraru mweelaponi ya oGiliyade, mwa seiyo siniitthaniwa mpaka olelo ‘Isidade sa Yahiri’." 
Judges10:5 Akhwaakaru Yahiri, aavithiwa oKamoni." 
Judges10:6 aYixrayelitho yaampahula Yave. Yaalapa miluku siniitthaniwa aBahali* ni Axetoroti ni seiye sa wArami, oSidoni, oMowabe, sa awAmoni ni sa aFilisti. Yeenre aYixrayeli emuhiyaka Yave ehimulapakatho," 
Judges10:7 isara sa Yave saahaapattelasa. Owo aawinnyerera mmatatani mwa aFilisti ni mwa awAmoni," 
Judges10:8 eyakheene yeele yaahaayeviha, yaahasulaka. Wa iyaakha muloko niithannatthaaru yaahaahasula aYixrayeli ootheene a mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa oYordanu, oGiliyade, elapo ya awAmori." 
Judges10:9 awAmoni yaamulapuwatho Yordanu weera yaawaneno aYuda, aBenyamini ni epuumba ya Efrayimi ni aYixrayeli yaathananaxa." 
Judges10:10 Vano aYixrayeli yaamukhuwelela Yave yeeraka: “Nohootthekelani Nyuwo, nimuhiyaka Mulukwaahu ni naalapaka aBahali*.”" 
Judges10:11 Yave aawaakhula: “awExipitu, awAmori, awAmoni, aFilisti," 
Judges10:12 aSidoni, awAmaleki ni aMidiyani yoohasulaayani ni mwaakikhuwelenlaanyu, Miyo kaahootapuxasani mmatatanimwayasa." 
Judges10:13 Wa soothesene, mookihiya Miyo mulapaka miluku sikina. Tivawo nkootapuxanitho." 
Judges10:14 Haya, mukhuwelelase miluku muthanlalaanyu. Miluku iyo soovuluxeni mwaavolowaka mmahoxoni!”" 
Judges10:15 Wa soothesene, aYixrayeli yaamweerela Yave: “Nohootthekelani. Munipakele yeeyo enooreerelani, mene nnoodyonttelelani weera munitapuxe emaara ela!”" 
Judges10:16 Vano yaarihela okerekhere miluku sa anamarwa yaaraayano, enamulapa Yave. Vanonto Yave khaatthuna woonatho ohooxiwa wa aYixrayeli." 
Judges10:17 Amoni yaathukumanyihiwaaya yaakonela oGiliyade, aYixrayeli yaathukumana, enakonela oMizepa." 
Judges10:18 Ahooleli a aGiliyade yaaheerelana: “Yoowo anaapacere waawanano awAmoni onookhala muhooleli a ootheene ankhala oGiliyade.” 
Judges11:1 Vano Yefeta, muGiliyade, aari nakhotto ooweraxa. Atithawe yiitthaniwa Giliyade ni amayawe yaari puuta." 
Judges11:2 Mwaariye Giliyade aamuyarela anamwane asilopwana ni awosa yunnuwansaaya, yaamoomola Yefeta emweerelaka: “Nyuwo khwamwaakhelaru yoohiyeriwa ya emusaahu, niwoko muri mwaana a muthiyana mukina.”" 
Judges11:3 Hiiho Yefeta aahaatthawa axunneiye, aniitekiha elapo ya oTobi. Weiwe alavilavi akina yaathukumanano, enamutthara." 
Judges11:4 Eviraleene ehuhu, awAmoni yaawananaka aYixrayeli," 
Judges11:5 ahooleli a oGiliyade yaamurowela Yefeta mweelaponi ya oTobi. 
Judges11:6 Awosa yaamweerela: “Ngweeke, mukhaleke mutokweenaahu a anakhotto weera niwere waawanano awAmoni.”" 
Judges11:7 Yefeta aawaakhula: “Mookithanya mukoomolaka vaate wa atithaka. Vano munkaasera heeni muraanyuno makacamiho?” 
Judges11:8 Ahooleli a oGiliyade yaamweerela: “Orookhalaru hiiho, hiyo nnoodyoonttelelani: Munihoole weera naawaneno awAmoni ni munookhala mutokweene a ootheene ankhala oGiliyade.”" 
Judges11:9 Yefeta aawaakhula: “Nyuwosa mwakihokoloxa weera kaawaneno awAmoni ni Yave akinnyerera, kinookhala mutokweenaanyu?”" 
Judges11:10 Ahooleli a oGiliyade yaamwaakhula: “Yave ti namoonaahu: Ninoopaka yeeyo muhimmaanyu.” 
Judges11:11 Vano Yefeta aarowano ahooleli a oGiliyade ni muloko waamukhaliha mutokweene ni muhooleli a anakhotto. Owo aaphitela ohoolo wa Yave oMizepa maswaawe ootheene aahimalaawe. 
Judges11:12 Vanonto Yefeta aamurumihela anamitthenga mwene a awAmoni ni yookoha ela: “Nootthekenleni eheeni muneeraanyu muniwaneno hiyo?” 
Judges11:13 Mwene a awAmoni aawaakhula anamitthenga a Yefeta: “aYixrayeli erwaaka wExipitu, yaakuxa elapwaaka okhuma wArenoni mpaka Yaboke, mpakatho oYordanu. Mukihokoloxere ilapo iyo mmuretteleni.”" 
Judges11:14 Yefeta aamurumihelatho anamitthenga mwene a awAmoni 
Judges11:15 eeraka: “Masu a Yefeta ti ala: aYixrayeli khayaakunxe elapo ya oMowabe naari ya wAmoni. 
Judges11:16 aYixrayeli erwaaka wExipitu, yeetta munikareni erowaka wa Ephareiya Yooxeera, enaphiya oKadexi." 
Judges11:17 Ehuhuweene yeele aYixrayeli yaamurumihela anamitthenga mwene a awEdomi yeeraka: ‘Munitthunihere ovira elapwaanyu,’ mene mwene a awEdomi khaatthunne. Yaamvekelatho mwene a oMowabe, mene owotho aakhootta. Hiiho aYixrayeli yaakhala oKadexi." 
Judges11:18 Vahoolowaya yaaheetta munikareni exeremaka ilapo sa wEdomi ni oMowabe, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oMowabe, enakonela okhopela wa wArenoni. Khayaavolowanse oMowabe, niwoko mooloko wArenoni waari mwiinanowaaya." 
Judges11:19 Vanonto, aYixrayeli yaamurumihela anamitthenga Sihoni, mwene a awAmori, mwa yoowo aalamula oHexiboni, emvekelaka: “Munitthunihereke ovira elapwaanyu weera nirowe elapwaahu.”" 
Judges11:20 Wa soothesene, Sihoni khaakhulenle weera aYixrayeli yaamvira elapwaawe. Aawiitthana anakhottwaawe ootheene othukumana oYahazi, enaawanano aYixrayeli." 
Judges11:21 Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, aamwinnyerera Sihoni ni anakhottwaawe ootheene mmatatani mwa aYixrayeli, ni awo yaangwina. aYixrayeli yaakuxa elapo yootheene ya awAmori yaakhalawo." 
Judges11:22 Yaakuxa elapo yootheene okhuma wArenoni mpaka oYaboke ni okhuma onikareni mpaka oYordanu. 
Judges11:23 Vano, eenre Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, awoomolaka awAmori vamaithoni wa aYixrayeli, mulokwaawe, munuupuwela weera munookuxa?" 
Judges11:24 Nyuwo munookuxa yeeyo mulukwaanyu Kemoxi onoovahaaweni. Hiihotho, nnookuxa yeeyo Yave Mulukwaahu onnivaahaawe." 
Judges11:25 Munuupuwela weera nyuwo ti ooreerela ompwaha Balaki, mwaana mulopwana a Zipori, mwene a oMowabe? Owo khatonke onyakulihana hata waawanano aYixrayeli." 
Judges11:26 Wookwana iyaakha macira mararu, aYixrayeli yaahaakamela oHexiboni, wAroweri ni mittetthe saarukureenre, vamoha ni isidade sootheene sa mukerekhere wArenoni. Mwahaawaakhenle heeni ehuhuweene yeele yootheene?" 
Judges11:27 Nkoopakenleni etthu yoonanara, mene munkipakela yoonarara mukiwananaka. Yave ori mphuki athorihe olelo variyari wa aYixrayeli ni awAmoni.”" 
Judges11:28 Wa soothesene, mwene a awAmoni khaapwatthenle mutthenga Yefeta aamurumihenlaawe." 
Judges11:29 Vano Munepa wa Yave waamukhuruwela Yefeta. Aavira oGiliyade ni oManaxe arowaka oMizepa ori oGiliyade ni okhuma vaavaale aahaarowela awAmoni. 
Judges11:30 Yefeta aamuroromeliha ni nlipelo Yave eeraka: “Nyuwo mwakinnyerera awAmoni," 
Judges11:31 akhalaru anaakhume vamulako wa empaaka miyo akiciceeraka ngwaawinanimwaka awAmoni, vano owo anaakhale a Yave. Kinoompaka yooveleela yoohisa.”" 
Judges11:32 Yefeta aarowa waawanano awAmoni ni Yave aawinnyerera mmatatanimwawe. 
Judges11:33 Aaphwata isidade miloko miili okhuma wAroweri mpaka amwaattamana a oMiniti, aphiyaka wAbeli-Keramimi. Hiiho aYixrayeli yaahaawina awAmoni." 
Judges11:34 Yefeta aakhuvelaawe owaannyawe oMizepa, mwanawe muthiyana aakhumela vamulako aaciceeraka, iinaka oruma wa akarakaxa. Aari mwaana mmoharu. Yefeta khaarino mwaana mukina, hata mulopwana, naari muthiyana." 
Judges11:35 Amoonakaru mwanawe, aahaahula soowarasawe akhuwelaka: “Ii! Mwanaka! Koothananiheya ni ooriipiweene murima mwaha wa nyuwo! Koomuroromeliha ni nlipelo Yave etthu kihingweraaka ohikwanihera.”" 
Judges11:36 Mwaana ole aaweerela: “Tiithi, moomuroromeliha Yave. Mukipakele yeeyo ntoko munroromelinghaanyu, eenre Yave awiinlelaka ikukuttula amwiittanaanyu awAmoni." 
Judges11:37 Wa soothesene, mukitthunihere nivekelo nimoha nna: mukihiye wa nyeeri miili weera kirowe mmattumuxani kiinle vamoha ni asikhwaaka, niwoko nkirwa kitheliwa.”" 
Judges11:38 Yefeta aamweerela: “Oroweke.” Aamutthunihera orowa wa nyeeri miili. Owo ni asikhwaawe akina yaarowa mmattumuxani, eniinlasa niwoko na ohitheliwawawe." 
Judges11:39 Siviraleene nyeeri miili aahokoleela wa atithawe ni Yefeta aampakela yeeyo aaroromelinghaawe. Mwaamwali ole aari oowiikosopa. Yaakhumme vaavaale ekhovelelo ya aYixrayeli 
Judges11:40 asimwali annirowa wookwana mahuku maxexe khula eyaakha weera yamuupuwelele mwaana muthiyana a Yefeta, muGiliyade." 
Judges12:1 Asilopwana a wEfrayimi yaawiitthana anakhottwaaya, enalapuwa oZafoni, enamukohasa Yefeta: “Heeni mwaarongwaanyu waawanano awAmoni muhiniitthanaka hiyo? Nnimoohiserani mpaanimwanyu!”" 
Judges12:2 Yefeta aawaakhula: “Miyo vamoha ni atthwaaka naakacamiheyaxa ni minyakunyaku ni awAmoni. Kaawiitthanani, mene khamwaakitapunxe mmatatanimwaya." 
Judges12:3 Koonakaru weera khamwaakikhavihera, kaaleva okumaaka, kinarowa waawanano awAmoni ni Yave aakiwiniha. Vano heeni nyuwo mukirweenlaanyu olelo? Apaale muntthuna okiwanano?”" 
Judges12:4 Vano Yefeta aawiitthana asilopwana a oGiliyade, enaawanano awEfrayimi. aGiliyade yaahaawina, niwoko awEfrayimi yaaheera: “Nyuwosa aGiliyade muri anamatthawatthawa a ekhapira ya wEfrayimi ni Manaxe.”" 
Judges12:5 aGiliyade yaahaakamela moohiixera mwa Yordanu mwaalapuwiwa wookela wEfrayimi. Imaara sootheene namatthawatthawa a awEfrayimi eeraawe: “Kilapuwe,” vano aGiliyade yannamukoha: “Nyuwo ngwEfrayimi?” Owo eera: “Hoye,”" 
Judges12:6 aGiliyade yaamweerela: “Mweere: ‘Xiboleti.’ Vanonto, mulopwana owo eera ‘Siboleti,’ ahiweraka oromola nnenesene Xiboleti, yaamumvara, emwiivelaka moohiixera mwa Yordanu. awEfrayimi yiiviwe ehuhuweene yeele yaari 42 000." 
Judges12:7 Yefeta aahaahoolela aYixrayeli wookwana iyaakha ithannamosa. Vano Yefeta, muGiliyade, aahookhwa, anavithiwa musidadeni mwa oGiliyade." 
Judges12:8 Vahoolowawe Ibezani a oBeteleheemu aahaahoolela aYixrayeli. 
Judges12:9 Aarino anamwane asilopwana miloko miraru ni anamwane asithiyana miloko miraru. Aahaatheliha anamwanaawe asithiyana ni asilopwana a mahimo makina ni anaaruuhela anamwanaawe asilopwana asithiyana miloko miraru a mahimo makina. Ibezani aahaahoolela aYixrayeli wookwana iyaakha ithannapiili. 
Judges12:10 Vano Ibezani aahookhwa, anavithiwa oBeteleheemu." 
Judges12:11 Vahoolowawe Eloni, muZebuloni, aahaahoolela aYixrayeli wookwana iyaakha muloko." 
Judges12:12 Eloni aahookhwa, anavithiwa wAyaloni, mweelaponi ya oZebuloni." 
Judges12:13 Vahoolowawe Abedoni, mwaana mulopwana a Heleli a oPiratoni, aahaahoolela aYixrayeli." 
Judges12:14 Aarino anamwane asilopwana miloko mixexe ni osuulu miloko miraru yaarino abuuru miloko mithannamiili. Aahaahoolela aYixrayeli wookwana iyaakha ithannatthaaru. 
Judges12:15 Abedoni, mwaana mulopwana a Hileli, aahookhwa, anavithiwa oPiratoni, elapo ya wEfrayimi, mweelaponi ya nyaako sa awAmaleki." 
Judges13:1 Emaara ekinatho aYixrayeli yaapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave. Tivawo Yave aawinnyerenraawe mmatatani mwa aFilisti wookwana iyaakha miloko mixexe. 
Judges13:2 Vano mulopwana mmoha a oZoreya iitthaniwa Manowa, a epuumba ya aDani, aamuthenle mwali eekupa, ni khaarino anamwane." 
Judges13:3 Ndyelo a Yave aahiixoonihera wa yoowo, anamweerela: “Nyuwo mwali eekupa muhirino anamwane, mene munoorupala mungyare mwaana mulopwana." 
Judges13:4 Mwiipasoope weera muhiwure eviinyu naari soowura sikina soohapala ni weera muhiceru yoohitteela," 
Judges13:5 niwoko munoorupala ni munoomuyara mwaana mulopwana. Mayihaawe ehimetthiwe, niwoko mmiravo anaakhale muNaziri* ootteeliheriwa Muluku okhuma oyariwawawe. Owo anaapacere waatapuxa aYixrayeli mmatatani mwa aFilisti.”" 
Judges13:6 Muthiyana ole aarowa waathalihera sootheene aiyawe eeraka: “Mmoha a Muluku aahoorwa wuuluma ni miyo. Aari oovuwaxa ntoko ndyelo a Muluku. Nkimukonghe aakhumelelaawe owo khakileenle nsinanawe. 
Judges13:7 Owo ookileela: ‘Munoorupala ni munoomuraya mwaana mulopwana. Muhiwure eviinyu naari soowura sikina soohapala ni muhiceru etthu yoohitteela, niwoko mmiravo owo anaakhale muNaziri* ootteeliheriwa Muluku okhuma oyariwawawe mpaka okhwawawe.’”" 
Judges13:8 Vano Manowa aamvekela Muluku: “Ii! Yave, kinoodyoonttelelani, weera mulopwana a Muluku munirumihenlaanyu, ahokoleele wa hiyo weera anixuttihe yoompakela mwaana aneera ayariwe.”" 
Judges13:9 Muluku aamwiiwa Manowa ni ndyelo a Muluku aahokoleela wuuluma ni muthiyana, owo areene mmatta. Wa soothesene, aiyawe yeera ehikhanlewo." 
Judges13:10 Muthiyana aahaatthimakela aiyawe, anaathalihera: “Mulopwana yoole iixoonihenre wa miyo nihuku nne, ola ori va!”" 
Judges13:11 Manowa aavenya, anamutthara mwaariye. Aphiyakaru wa mulopwana, aamukoha: “Ti nyuwo muulumme ni mwaaraka?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Ti yoomi.”" 
Judges13:12 Vano Manowa aamukoha: “Yakwaniheriwa maswaanyu, nnimuhuweke hai mwaana? Anaapake eheeni?”" 
Judges13:13 Ndyelo a Muluku aamwaakhula: “Amwaarinyu etthariheke sootheene seiye kaalamulenlaaka. 
Judges13:14 Awo ehiceru yoowiima ya evideira*, ehiwure eviinyu naari soowura sikina soohapala hata ehiceru yoohitteela. Yiiweleleke sootheene kaalamulenlaaka.”" 
Judges13:15 Manowa aamweerela ndyelo a Yave: “Nintthuna weera mukhale ni hiyo weera nooreherereleni mwaapuri.” 
Judges13:16 Ndyelo a Yave aamwaakhula: “Hata kikhalaka, nkikhuura etthu, vaheera mwareherere yooveleela yoohisa mumveleelele Yave.” Vano Manowa khaasuwela weera aari ndyelo a Yave." 
Judges13:17 Owo aamukoha ndyelo a Yave: “Nsinani weera noottittimihereleni yaakwaniheriwaka maswaanyu?” 
Judges13:18 Ndyelo aamwaakhula: “Munkohera heeni nsinanaka? Ti nootikhinsa.” 
Judges13:19 Manowa aamukuxa mwaapuri vamoha ni yooveleela ya etrigu, anamveleelela Yave vamwala. Vanonto Yave aapaka etthu yootikhiniheya Manowa ni mwaarawe yoonaka:" 
Judges13:20 Malumi a mooro yaawelaaya valtaarini* erowaka osulu, ndyelo a Yave aawela vamalumini. Yoonakaru yeeyo, Manowa ni mwaariye yahuuramelasa vathi." 
Judges13:21 Ndyelo a Yave iixooniheraka wa yaawosa, Manowa aasuwela weera aari ndyelo a Yave." 
Judges13:22 Aamweerela mwaariye: “Nnimookhwa, niwoko noomoona Muluku!”" 
Judges13:23 Mwaariye aamwaakhula: “Yave aatthunne oniiva, saano ahaakhenle sooveleelasahu soohisa ni sa etrigu, naari khaanoonihera itthu sootheene iya onoonihenraawe.”" 
Judges13:24 Muthiyana ole aamuyara mwaana mulopwana, anamutteha Samesoni. Ole aahunnuwa ni Yave aamureeliha." 
Judges13:25 Munepa wa Yave waapacera omuhoolela owo areene oManahe-Dani, eriyari ya oZoreya ni wExtawoli." 
Judges14:1 Samesoni aarowa oTimena, anamoonawo muthiyana muFilisti." 
Judges14:2 Ahokoleelakaru owaani, aaweerela atithawe ni amayawe: “Koomoona muthiyana muFilisti oTimena. Mwakuurele muthiyana owo weera kimuthele.”" 
Judges14:3 Atithawe ni amayawe yaamwaakhula: “Aakhala asithiyana ancipale variyari wa emusaanyu ni mulokwaanyu. Muntthuna orowa wa aFilisti oohiineliwa weera mwathelewo?” Wa soothesene, Samesoni aaweerela atithawe: “Mwakuurele. Okisivenle ti yoowo.”" 
Judges14:4 Asinaangolowaawe khayaasuwenle weera iwo waari otthuna wa Yave aasaasaka maatannyero aFilisti. Vano ehuhuweene yeele awosa yannaalamula aYixrayeli. 
Judges14:5 Samesoni aarowa oTimena vamoha ni atithawe ni amayawe. Yaakhuvelaaya imatta sa iwuuva* sa oTimena, wootutuxereya aahaakhumelela mwatto oopelaka murika aaraawe Samesoni." 
Judges14:6 Munepa wa Yave waamulipiha moota wooweera aamwiiva mwatto ahikuxale etthu antoko weera epuri. Wa soothesene, khaathalihenre atithawe hoye hoye amayawe yeeyo aapankaawe." 
Judges14:7 Vano aarowa wuuluma ni muthiyana aamutthunaawe. 
Judges14:8 Eviraleene ehuhu, owo aahokoleelaawe weera avolowe othela, Samesoni aahapuwa weera oone nikarakasa na mwatto. Mpuwa waakhalamo muupattetthe ni ikuttha." 
Judges14:9 Aahaavula oravo, anaca eettaka. Aahokoleelaawe wa asinaangolowaawe, aahaameela, enacatho. Wa soothesene, khaathalihenre weera aavunle oravo munikarakasani na mwatto." 
Judges14:10 Atithawe yaarowa owannyawe muthiyana muFilisti owo. Samesoni aapakawo efesta, ntoko waakhoveleliwaaya wa namathela." 
Judges14:11 Aphiyakaru, yaamuruuhela amiravo miloko miraru weera emuhoole ofestani." 
Judges14:12 Samesoni aaweerela: “Kinoowaalelani ethale. Mwawera otthoma mmahukuni mathannameeli a efesta ela, kinimoovahani soowara miloko miraru sa eliinyu* ni ikuwo sikina miloko miraru." 
Judges14:13 Vaheera, mwaahitthoma, nyuwosa munookivaha soowara miloko miraru sa eliinyu* ni ikuwo sikina miloko miraru.” Awosa yaamweerela: “Munaalele ethale. Niiweke.”" 
Judges14:14 Owo aawaakhula: “Wa yoole onca yookhuma yooca ni wa mukhomaali yookhuma yoocoocowa.” Wookwana mahuku mararu khayaawenre otthoma. 
Judges14:15 Vanihukuni nanaaxexe yaamweerela mwaariye Samesoni: “Mwaaviriyele aiyinyu weera ethalihe ethalaaya. Mwaaheere hiiho, nnimoohiserani nyuwo ni emusi ya atithinyu ni munimookhwa. Munilattulenle oniiya?”" 
Judges14:16 Vano mwaariye Samesoni aamuttaandawula Samesoni iinlaka: “Nyuwo munnakithanya! Khamunkisivela vekhaikhai. Mohaalela ethale mulokwaaka, mene khamukileenle yootthoma.” Owo aamwaakhula: “Nkaathalihenre yootthoma atithaka naari amayaka. Kaahooleeleleni heeni nyuwo?”" 
Judges14:17 Mwaariye Samesoni anniinla mahuku maxexe makinaawo a efesta. Vanonto, vanihukuni nanaathannameeli Samesoni aamuthalihera ethalaawe eenre apwahereraka omuxupa. Owo aarowa waathalihera atthwaawe." 
Judges14:18 Nihuku nanaathannameeli ohinaaye wiila, asilopwana a esidade yaahoorwa omuleela yootthoma: Kheewowo yoocoocowa yoopwaha oravo; khawowo oolipaxa ompwaha mwatto.” Samesoni aaweerela: “Nyuwosa mwahaaleeliwe ni amwaaraka, khamwaatthoma ethalaaka.”" 
Judges14:19 Vano Munepa wa Yave waamulipiha. Aarowa wAxekeloni, anawiivawo asilopwana miloko miraru, anakuxa soowarasaya, anaavaha yaale yaatthomme ethale. Oonyoonyiweene, aarowa vaate wa atithawe." 
Judges14:20 Vano, mwaariye Samesoni aavahiwa nthamenaawe aamuhoonle Samesoni woothelani." 
Judges15:1 Eviraleene ehuhu, mweehuhuni enghephiwa etrigu, Samesoni aakuxa epuri ekhaani ntoko yamahala, anarowa omuxekura mwaariye. Aaweerela atithaya amwaariye: “Kinkela okwartu wa amwaaraka.” Wa soothesene, atithawe muthiyana khayaamutthunihenre ovolowa." 
Judges15:2 Tiithi ole aamweerela: “Kaaviriyeleya weera nyuwo mwaamunthanya, tivawo kimvanghaaka nthamwenaanyu. Moone, munneiye mukhaani ti ooreeraxa. Muntheleke yoowo.”" 
Judges15:3 Samesoni aaheera: “Emaara ela ahikhale anaakikhupanye ni makacamiho, miyo kaarulelaka ikukuttula aFilisti!”" 
Judges15:4 Aavenya, anaavara akhwatte macira mararu, anaatthuka nyiila eeli-eeli. Vahoolowaya anaahelela mithuko nnyiilani," 
Judges15:5 anapattiha mithuko, anaweettiha akhwatte eriyari ya imatta sa etrigu sa aFilisti. Hiiho saahisiwa ihara ni etrigu ya mmatta nitho imatta sa iwuuva* ni sooliveira*." 
Judges15:6 aFilisti yaakohana: “Taani opanke yeela?” Yaaleeliwa: “Ti Samesoni, mukamwene a muTimeni, niwoko na ovahiwa mwaariye nthamwenaawe.” Hiiho aFilisti yaarowa, enamuhisa muthiyana ole nitho atithawe." 
Judges15:7 Samesoni aaweerela: “Mweenre mpakaka yeeyo, nkimmaaleleya kihoohiyeranseni ikukuttula.”" 
Judges15:8 Aahaawanano moota woowoopiha awiivaka ancipale a yaawo. Vahoolowaya aarowa, anakhala munikhukuni vamwala wa wEtami." 
Judges15:9 aFilisti yaarowa, enakonelawo oYuda emwaarelasaka mukhwipi wa oLehi." 
Judges15:10 Asilopwana a oYuda yaahaakoha: “Murweenle heeni oniwanano?” Awosa yaawaakhula: “Nintthuna omukuxa Samesoni ootthukiweene weera nimpake yeeyo onipakenlaawe hiyo.” 
Judges15:11 Vano asilopwana macira miloko miraru a oYuda yaarowa onikhukuni vamwala wa wEtami, enamweerela Samesoni: “Nyuwo moosuwela weera aFilisti ti annilamula. Mohoona munipakenlaanyu?” Owo aawaakhula: “Kaapanke yeeyo paahi akipakenlaaya.”" 
Judges15:12 Awosa yaamweerela: Nirweenle wootthukani weera nawinnyerereni wa aFilisti.” Samesoni aaweerela: “Mukiroromelihe weera nyuwosa khamukiiva.” 
Judges15:13 Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Vekhaikhai, nneere wootthukani ni nawinnyerereni mmatatanimwaya paahi. Khaniwiivani.” Awosa yaamutthuka ni mikhoyi miili sinyowani, enamukhumihasa vamwala." 
Judges15:14 Yaaphiyasaaya oLehi, aFilisti yaamuciceera ekhuwelaka. Vaheera Munepa wa Yave waamulipiha. Mikhoyi aatthukeliwaawe saathatuwa antoko weera miraambela sooza ni saamora mmononimwawe." 
Judges15:15 Amphwanyaka nandere a buuru, aamuttotta, anawiivano aFilisti asilopwana macira muloko." 
Judges15:16 Vano Samesoni aaheera: “Ni nandere a buuru, kohaatatuxa aFilisti abuuru. Koowiivano asilopwana macira muloko ni nandere a buuru.”" 
Judges15:17 Amalihakaru wuuluma aamvonyera okhwipi nandere ni nipuro nne naatteehiwa oRamati-Lehi. 
Judges15:18 Samesoni aavolaxiwa ntthona, anamukhuwelela Yave: “Mookivaha owina wu otokotoko. Vano kikhweeke ntthona kimorelaka hiiho mmatatani mwa oohiineliwa?”" 
Judges15:19 Muluku aamuhula mwala ori oLehi, enakhumawo maahi. Awuraka, saahokoleela ikuru sa Samesoni ni owo aakakhamuwa. Niwoko na yeeyo naattuuttu ole ootteehiwa wEni-Hakore ni nlelo ori oLehi." 
Judges15:20 Samesoni aahaahoolela aYixrayeli wookwana iyaakha miloko miili mmahukuni a aFilisti. 
Judges16:1 Nihuku nimoha Samesoni aarowa oGaza, anamoonawo puuta, anaviriha ohiyu ni yoowo." 
Judges16:2 Atthu a oGaza yaaleeliwa: “Samesoni ori muumu!” Awosa yaarica nipuro, enangwehererasa ohiyu wootheene vamulako wa esidade. Ohiyu wootheene khayaasunse yeerelanaka: “Oxeexelo, nnoomwiiva.”" 
Judges16:3 Wa soothesene, Samesoni aakonne paahi mpaka ohiyu eriyari. Aavenya, analipiha ovara masele a mulako wa esidade vamoha ni isereemusaya soopiili, anaphela vamoha ni anampattika. Aathatela sootheene, anarongha mpaka vasulu nttumuxa nri ohoolo wa oHeberoni." 
Judges16:4 Eviraleene ehuhu, aamusivela muthiyana mmoha aakhala vareyareyani na oSoreki, nsinanawe Delila." 
Judges16:5 Ahooleli a aFilisti yaarowasa omweerela: “Moone mwawera omuviriyela weera ooleeleni exiiri ya ikurusawe sitokotoko ni moota heeni nneeraahu ningwine nimutthukaka ni nimulamulaka. Khula mutthu a hiyo onimoovahani ixekeli* 1 100.” 
Judges16:6 Hiiho Delila aamukoha Samesoni: “Dyoontte mukileele sinrweelaayawo ikurusanyu sitokotoko ni moota muneeraanyu mutthukiwe ni mulamuliwe.” 
Judges16:7 Samesoni aamwaakhula: “Mukina akitthukela miramba sinyowani mithannamiili soohuuma, kinookhala oohilipa antoko mutthu piswa.”" 
Judges16:8 Ahooleli a aFilisti yaamuruuhela miramba sinyowani mithannamiili soohuuma, anamutthukano." 
Judges16:9 Asilopwana akina yiipithihiweene okwartu, Delila aakhuwela: “Samesoni, aFilisti ahoorweelani!” Wa soothesene, aapasa miramba iye antoko nliinya niikaathiweene mukerekhere mooro. Vano exiiri ya ikurusawe khayooneleliwe." 
Judges16:10 Vanonto Delila aamweerela Samesoni: “Mookipakiha nsikini! Haya, mukileele moota woowootthukani.”" 
Judges16:11 Owo aamwaakhula: “Mwakitthukano mukilipihaka mikhoyi sihitonke ovareliwa muteko, kinookhala oohilipa antoko mutthu piswa.”" 
Judges16:12 Hiiho Delila aakuxa mikhoyi sihitonke ovareliwa muteko, anamutthukano. Vanonto, asilopwana akina yiipithihiweene okwartu, Delila aakhuwela: “Samesoni, aFilisti ahoorweelani!” Wa soothesene, aapasa mikhoyi iye antoko nliinya." 
Judges16:13 Vano, Delila aamweerela Samesoni: “Mpaka vano mookipakiha nsikini mukilokotthaka. Mukileele moota woowootthukani!” Owo aamwaakhula: “Nyuwo mwatthava matthuttu mathannameeli a mayihaaka ni maakina ootthava mutthukelelaka ni maakineene, kinookhala oohilipa antoko mutthu piswa.” Vanonto, Samesoni akonaka, Delila aatthavano matthuttu mathannameeli a mayihaawe maakina ootthava," 
Judges16:14 anatthukela vamaakinani vamoha. Aakhuwelatho: “Samesoni, aFilisti ahoorweelani!” Avenyaka mookonani aapasa mayihi vamaakinani iitaphulaka matthuttu." 
Judges16:15 Vano Delila aamweerela: “Ongwereya hai weera munnakisivela muhikiroromelaka miyo? Ela ti emaara yanaararu munkipakihaanyu nsikini muhikileelaka exiiri ya ikurusanyu sitokotoko.” 
Judges16:16 Annahokoleela yookoha emoharu yeela mpaka Samesoni okhulumuwaxa oxumpwa mwaha wa ottaandawulawawe. 
Judges16:17 Hiiho aamuthalihera sootheene: “Nkinametthiwe, niwoko miyo ti muNaziri* okhuma oyariwawaka. Kametthiwa, ikurusaka sinookimalela ni kinookhala oohilipa antoko mutthu piswa.”" 
Judges16:18 Delila oonakaru weera aamuthalihera exiiri yootheene, aahaarumihela mutthenga ola ahooleli a aFilisti: “Ngweeketho – ookileela soothesene.” Vano ahooleli a aFilisti yaahokoleela ekuxaleene eparatha*." 
Judges16:19 Amwaatalenleene vaciroroniwawe, aamwiitthana mulopwana mmoha weera ameetthe matthuttu mathannameeli a mayihaawe apaceraka hiiho omulamula. Vano ikurusawe saammalela." 
Judges16:20 Aakhuwelatho: “Samesoni, aFilisti aahoorweelani!” Aavenya mookonani iixuupuwelaka: ‘Kinoovenya ntoko imaara sikina ni nkiitapuxe.’ Wa soothesene, khaasuwenle weera Yave aamuhiya." 
Judges16:21 Vano aFilisti yaamvara, enazoola maithwaawe, enamurongha oGaza. Yaamutthuka ni onyooro wa ebronze* ni yaamulamula opirikixa nxilo mukaliposo." 
Judges16:22 Wa soothesene, mayihaawe yaapacera wunnuwatho." 
Judges16:23 Ahooleli a aFilisti yaathukumana weera empakele yooveleela etokotoko mulukwaaya Dagoni epakaka efesta. Awosa yaaheera: “Mulukwaahu Dagoni ooninnyerera mwiittanaahu, Samesoni.”" 
Judges16:24 Atthu emoonakaru Samesoni, yaamulapa mulukwaaya yeeraka: “Mulukwaahu Dagoni ooninnyerera mwiittanaahu – yoole aaphwata elapwaahu awiivaka asinkhwiihu ancipale.”" 
Judges16:25 Awosa murima waatteenleene, yaakhuwela: “Muniruuhele Samesoni weera nimutthekulele.” Vano aaroweliwa Samesoni mukaliposo, ni owo aahaatthekuliha. Emuronghaleene eriyariya ya amarimbu eeli," 
Judges16:26 Samesoni aamweerela mmiravo aamvarela ntata: “Okikhavihere paahi waavara amarimbu anlipiha empa ya muluku Dagoni weera kaaphiteere.” 
Judges16:27 Empa yaasareya asilopwana ni asithiyana. Ahooleli ootheene a aFilisti yaakhalawotho ni vataratoni yaakhala wookwanaka asilopwana ni asithiyana macira miloko miraru weera etthekulihiwe ni Samesoni. 
Judges16:28 Vano Samesoni aamvekela Yave eeraka: “Ii! Yave, Yave! Mukuupuweleleke miyo. Ii! Muluku! Kinoodyoonttelelani weera mukivahe ikuru emaara yookisera ela. Kintthuna waarulela ikukuttula aFilisti niwoko na maithwaaka.”" 
Judges16:29 Samesoni aahiilipihera mwaamarimbuni muloko neeli a eriyari, mwa yaawo yaalipiha empa ya Dagoni. Aavarenleene amarimbu eeli ale – mukina moono mulopwana ni mukina muthiyana," 
Judges16:30 Samesoni aaheera: “Kikhwe vamoha ni aFilisti!” Vano aahaakakha ni ikurusawe sootheene ni empa ya Dagoni yaahaamorela ahooleli ni atthu ootheene yaari mwemmo. Hiiho okhwawawe Samesoni aawiiva atthu ancipale opwaha okumaawe wootheene. 
Judges16:31 Vahoolowaya axunneiye ni emusi yootheene ya atithawe yaarowa okuxa muttembo. Yaaruuha, enavitha eriyari ya oZoreya ni wExtawoli munihiyeni na atithawe Manowa. Aahaahoolela aYixrayeli wookwana iyaakha miloko miili." 
Judges17:1 Vano mulopwana mmoha iitthaniwa Mika aakhala mweelaponi ya mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi. 
Judges17:2 Aaweerela amayawe: “Kookhalano ixekeli* 11 000 seiye sa eparatha* mwiiyeriwaanyu, mwa seiyo kiiwalaaka silapheliwaka. Ti miyo kiiyale.” Vano amayawe yaamweerela: “Yave ooreeliheni, mwanaka!”" 
Judges17:3 Owo aahokoloxerakaru amayawe ixekeli* 11 000 sa eparatha*, ale yaaheera: “Miyo kinoomutteelihera Yave eparathaaka* weera mwanaka apake ecaambulo yoohaniwa nitho muluku a eyuuma. Miyo kinoohokoloxera weyo.”" 
Judges17:4 Mwanaya aahokoloxerakaru eparatha* amayawe, awo yaakuxa ixekeli* macira meeli sa eparatha*, enamvaha namahana a eparatha* aahanne ele mucaambuloni, ampakakatho muluku a eyuuma ni yeeyo. Vano ecaambulo ele ni muluku oohaniwa ole siikaathiwe mpaani mwa Mika." 
Judges17:5 Mulopwana ole Mika aakhalano Nipuro Nootteela*. Aapaka mukaandyo wa esaserdoti ni miluku sikina sa emusi, anamukhaliha mmoha a anamwanaawe ntoko musaserdotaawe." 
Judges17:6 Ehuhuweene yeele aYixrayeli khayaarino mwene – khula mutthu aapaka yeeyo yaamureerela. 
Judges17:7 Vanonto, mmiravo mmoha muLeevi a oBeteleheemu oYuda aakhala eriyari ya nihimo na aYuda" 
Judges17:8 aavenya esidadeene yeele aasaka nipuro nikina nookhala. Eettaka hiihaale aaphiya elapo ya mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi, aneemela vaate wa Mika." 
Judges17:9 Mika aamukoha: “Munrweela woowi?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Miyo muLeevi a oBeteleheemu oYuda. Kinaasaasa nipuro noomaka.” 
Judges17:10 Mika aamweerela: “Mukhale ni miyo ntoko atithaka ni musaserdotaaka ni kinimoolivani ixekeli* muloko sa eparatha* vayaakhani nitho ikuwo ni sooca.” 
Judges17:11 Mmiravo muLeevi aahaakhulela okhala ni yoowo ni aathatuwa ntoko mmoha a anamwanaawe. 
Judges17:12 Mika aamukhaliha muLeevi ntoko musaserdotaawe ni mmiravo ole aakhala vaatevawe. 
Judges17:13 Mika aaheera: “Vano koosuwela weera Yave onookoonihera murima wooreera, niwoko muLeevi ola oothatuwa musaserdotaaka.”" 
Judges18:1 Ehuhuweene yeele aYixrayeli khayaarino mwene ni epuumba ya Dani yaasaasa nipuro noowiitekiha, niwoko nlelo yeera ehaakhenle yoohiyeriwaaya variyari wa ipuumba sa aYixrayeli." 
Judges18:2 Hiiho aDani yaahaarumihasa anakhotto ooweraxa athanu a oZoreya ni wExtawoli weera yahottele okhala weenraaya. Asilopwana ale yaakhula mahimo ootheene a epuumba. Awo yaahaalamula: “Murowe moone elapo.” Vano asilopwana ale yaaphiyasa mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi, enarowasa owannyawe Mika, enavirihawo ohiyu." 
Judges18:3 Yaakhuveelaaya vaate wa Mika, yaasuwela nsu na mmiravo muLeevi ole. Yaamwaattamela, enamukohakoha: “Yooruuhaleni taani wenno? Muneerani wenno? Mukhalenle heeni wenno?”" 
Judges18:4 Owo aahaathalihera yeeyo Mika aampakenlaawe amweerelaka: “Owo ookiiwananano okhala musaserdotaawe.” 
Judges18:5 Awosa yaamvekela: “Dyoontte, munkohe Muluku waneettela nnene mukwaahaahu.”" 
Judges18:6 Musaserdoti* aawaakhula: “Murowe mmuretteleni – mukwaahaanyu wohaakhuleliwa ni Yave.” 
Judges18:7 Hiiho asilopwana athanu yaattimula, enaphiya oLayixa, weiwo yoonnayawo weera atthu yaari oolipeene, ntoko aSidoni. Yaari ooheeteteya, oomaaleleya, yoonaka mpuha niwoko elapwaaya kheewo yaahaleela. Yaahoonatho weera muloko ole waakhala ottaiwene ni aSidoni ehiiwananaka ni wakhalaru muloko." 
Judges18:8 Asilopwana athanu ale yaahoolenlaaya oZoreya ni wExtawoli, axunnaya yaahaakoha: “Moonelenle eheeni?”" 
Judges18:9 Awosa yaawaakhula: Nrowe, nawaneno! Nohoona weera elapwaaya ti yooreeraxa. Muhipiseke, muhihovele orowawo weera mwakuxe." 
Judges18:10 Mwaaphiyakawo, munrowa ophwanya muloko oheeteteyaka ni elapo yoothanuwa, mwa yeeyo Muluku owinnyenraaweni. Elapo ehinthowaayaru etthu." 
Judges18:11 Vano asilopwana macira mathannamosa a epuumba ya Dani, oolikaneene owana, yaattimula oZoreya ni wExtawoli." 
Judges18:12 Mmukwahani, yaakonela vakhiviru wa oKiriyati-Yeharimi, oYuda. Tivawo elapo ya mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa oKiriyati-Yeharimi eniitthaniwaaya Mahane-Dani mpaka olelo." 
Judges18:13 Ovenyera vaavaale yaarowa mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi, enaphiya vaate wa Mika." 
Judges18:14 Vanonto, asilopwana athanu yaahottenle elapo ya oLayixa yaaweerela axunnaya: “Nyuwo moosuwela weera emoha ya impasene seiya wookhalamo mukaandyo wa esaserdoti, miluku sikina sa emusi, ecaambulo emoha yoohaniwa ni muluku mmoha a eyuuma? Moosuwela yeeyo entthuneya opaka.”" 
Judges18:15 Yaahaattamela, enavolowa mpaani mwa mmiravo muLeevi, vaate wa Mika, enamuulumiha." 
Judges18:16 aDani macira mathannamosa, oolikaneene owana, yaaheemela vamulako." 
Judges18:17 Asilopwana athanu yaahottenle elapo yaavolowasa mpaani, enakuxa ecaambulo, mukaandyo wa esaserdoti, miluku sa emusi ni muluku a eyuuma, musaserdoti* ni anakhotto macira mathannamosa yeemenleene vamulako." 
Judges18:18 Vano asilopwana ale evolowasakaru mpaani mwa Mika weera ekuxe ecaambulo, mukaandyo wa esaserdoti, miluku sa emusi ni muluku a eyuuma, musaserdoti* aahaakohasa: “Mumpakasa eheeni?”" 
Judges18:19 Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Mmaaleke, muhilokolole etthu. Munitthare ni mukhale atithihu ni musaserdotaahu. Fataari orumeela epuumba ni nihimo na aYixrayeli ntoko musaserdoti* ohikanle orumeela paahi emusi ya mulopwana mmoha.”" 
Judges18:20 Vanonto, musaserdoti* aahakalala. Aakuxa mukaandyo wa esaserdoti, miluku sa emusi ni muluku a eyuuma, anarowa vamoha ni yaawosa." 
Judges18:21 Ewiikaathiki anamwanaaya, mihuwosaya ni soorelasaya ohoolowaya, yaarukunuwa, enattimula." 
Judges18:22 Awosa erakamenleene vaate wa Mika, asilopwana yaattamanne ni Mika yaathukumanyihiwa, enaaphwanyasa aDani." 
Judges18:23 Yeenre yarwaaka ekhuwelaka ottuliwaya, aDani yaarukunuwa, enamukoha Mika: “Makacamiho heeni muraanyuno? Mwaalattulenle heeni asilopwanaanyu weera eniwaneno?”" 
Judges18:24 Owo aawaakhula: “Mookuxa miluku kipankaaka nitho musaserdotaaka. Kihalanne eheeni? Munkohera heeni: ‘Makacamiho heeni muraanyuno?’” 
Judges18:25 Vano aDani yaamwaakhula: “Muhaakhulane ni hiyo weera asilopwana akina oowali ehoowananeni ewiivakani nyuwo ni amusaanyu.” 
Judges18:26 Hiiho aDani yaapwaherera ni mukwahaaya, vaheera Mika, oonaka weera yaalipaxa, aarukunuwa, anahokoleela owaani." 
Judges18:27 aDani yaakuxa yeeyo Mika aapankaawe vamoha ni musaserdotaawe, enarowano oLayixa, elapo ya muloko wooheeteteya ni wa murettele. Awosa yaawiivasa ootheene ni ekatana, enahisa esidadaaya." 
Judges18:28 Khaariwo oowaatapuxasa, niwoko yaakhalasa ottai wa aSidoni ni khayiiwananoru muloko mukina. Esidade yaari mureyareyani naapwaherera mpaka oBeti-Rehobi. aDani yaarasela esidade, eniitekihawo." 
Judges18:29 Esidade ele, khalayi yiitthaniwa Layixa, yaattehasa Dani, ettittimiheraka nikholonaya Dani, mwaana mulopwana a Yixrayeli." 
Judges18:30 Weiwo aDani yaahiipakelasa miluku sikina ni Yonatani, mwaana mulopwana a Gerxomo, mwaana mulopwana a Moisesi, ni anamwanaawe asilopwana yaari asaserdoti* a epuumba ya Dani mpaka ehuhu muloko waaronghiwaaya elapo ekina." 
Judges18:31 Yaapwaherera olapa miluku sikina Mika aapankaawe wa ehuhu yootheene Empa ya Muluku yaaraaya oXilo. 
Judges19:1 Ehuhuweene yeele aYixrayeli khayaarino mwene. Eyo eri hiiho, aakhumelela muLeevi mmoha aamanke mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi, mulaponi yoorakamela, aahiixaasera ekuxo oBeteleheemu oYuda." 
Judges19:2 Wa soothesene, ekuxo ele khayaaroromeleya. Yaamuthaama ehokoleelaka vaate wa atithaya oBeteleheemu, oYuda. Siviraleene nyeeri mixexe," 
Judges19:3 aiyawe yaarowa omviriyela weera ahokolowe. Aamurowano murumeiyaawe ni abuuru eeli. Ekuxo ele yaamvoleiha muLeevi mpaani mwa atithaya ni awo emoonakaru, yaamwaakhela nnene." 
Judges19:4 Atatawe oowaathelela, yaamunyesereriha weera akhale vaavaale; ni owo aapwaherera okhala ni yaawosa wookwana mahuku mararu acaaka, awuraka ni akonakawo." 
Judges19:5 Vanihukuni nanaaxexe aapeherera ovenya, mene atithaya ekuxo yaamweerela mukamwenaaya: “Muceeke toko ni vahoolowaya mpwaheke.”" 
Judges19:6 Hiiho ooweeli ale yaakilaathi weera ece ni ewure. Vahoolowaya atithaya ekuxo yaamweerela: “Dyoontte, mukhaleke ohiyu ola muhakalalaka.”" 
Judges19:7 Mulopwana ole avenyaka weera apwahe, atatawe oowaathelela yaamuviriyela weera akonetho ohiyu ole." 
Judges19:8 Oxeexelo, vanihukuni nanaathanu, owo iirehereraawe weera apwahe, atatawe oowaathelela yaamweerela: “Nrowe nice. Ngweherereke mpaka oxekuwa.” Hiiho ooweeli awo yaahooca." 
Judges19:9 Vanonto mulopwana ole, ekuxowaawe ni murumeiyaawe yeemenlaaya weera epwahase, atithaya ekuxo yaaweerelatho: “Moone, wohiilaru. Mvirihe ohiyu vaava. Mukhale ni muhakalale. Mpeheraseke omaalo murowaka owaani.”" 
Judges19:10 Ahitthunaka ovirihatho ohiyu, mulopwana ole aattimula, anarowa oYebusi (eyo tiiyo oYerusaleemu) vamoha ni abuurwaawe eeli oowiikaatheriwa yookilaathela ni ekuxowaawe." 
Judges19:11 Aakhuveela oYebusi ni, weenre wiilaka, murumeiyi aamweerela pwiiyaawe: “Nrowe, neemeleke musidadeni ela ya aYebusi weera nivirihemo ohiyu.”" 
Judges19:12 Pwiiyaawe aamwaakhula: “Hoye, nihivolowe musidadeni yoohikhala yawihu, niwoko amakaaya khaahiyono aYixrayeli. Nrowe oGibeya.”" 
Judges19:13 Aapwaherera weera: “Nrowe, neerereke ophiya oGibeya hoye hoye oRama weera navirihewo ohiyu.”" 
Judges19:14 Hiiho yaapwaherera ni nsuwa naaneelela ekhuveelaka oGibeya, elapo ya aBenyamini." 
Judges19:15 Yaavolowasamo weera evirihemo ohiyu. Yaarowa okilaathi vanipuwani na esidade. Wa soothesene, khaawo aalattunle weera yavirihe ohiyu owannyawe." 
Judges19:16 Ohiyu ole namuuluvala a mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi aamanke oGibeya aavolowa akutthunleene mmatta. Vano atthu a esidade ele yaari aBenyamini. 
Judges19:17 Awoonaka anamukwaha ereene vanipuwani na esidade, namuuluvala ole aahaakoha: “Munrweela woowi? Munkela woowi?”" 
Judges19:18 Owo aamwaakhula: “Nri ni mukwaha ninkhuma oBeteleheemu oYuda nirowaka elapo ya ottai eri mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi, mwa weiwo kinkhalaakawo. Kaakenle oBeteleheemu oYuda ni vano kinrowa Empa ya Muluku. Vaheera va khaawo okaakhelenle owannyawe." 
Judges19:19 Nookhalano malaxi ni yooca wa abuuruwaahu ni nookhalano yooca ni eviinyu wa miyo, ekuxowaaka ni wa mmiravo ori ni arumeiyaanyu. Kheewo ennihaleela.”" 
Judges19:20 Namuuluvala aamweerela: “Ngwe nnene owannyaka. Kinimookhaviherani wa yeeyo muntthunaanyu. Muhivirihe ohiyu vanipuwani na esidade.” 
Judges19:21 Hiiho aahaarowano owannyawe, anaaciha abuurwaawe. Aarapihaleene inaawosaya, yaahooca ni yaawura." 
Judges19:22 Awosa ehakalalaka hiihaawo, alavilavi akina a esidade yaarica empa. Emanaka nsele na empa, yaamukhuwelela namuuluvala aari muneene a vaate vale: “Munkhumihere vaate mulopwana ovolongwe mpaanimwanyu weera nimukoneno!”" 
Judges19:23 Muneene vaate aakhuma, anaweerelasa: “Hoye asinthamwenaaka, dyoontte muhipake yoowuuliha muru eyo. Mulopwana ole mulettwaaka. Muhipake osikineene yoola.”" 
Judges19:24 Mmoone, ori va mwanaka muthiyana ori mwaamwali oowiikosoopa nitho ekuxowaawe mulettwaaka. Miyo kinimooruuhelasani weera mwaavarele muteko ni mpake ni yaawosa yeeyo muntthunaanyu. Muhimpakele mulopwana ole osikineene yoola.”" 
Judges19:25 Wa soothesene, asilopwana ale khayaatthunne omwiiwa. Vano muLeevi aakhumihera vaate ekuxowaawe ni awosa yaamukonano empakelaka yoonanara ohiyu wootheene ni oxeexelo yaamuhiya arowaka." 
Judges19:26 Oyaaka ni oxa muthiyana ole aahokoleela vaate yaaphiyenraaya apwiyaawe, anamorela vamulako, anakhalawo mpaka oxa." 
Judges19:27 Pwiiyaawe avenyakaru oxeexelo ni ahulaka nsele weera apwaheke ni mukwahaawe, aaphwanya ekuxowaawe emorenleene vamulako yookolenleene matataaya vanseleni." 
Judges19:28 Owo aaheerela: “Ovenye, nroweke!” Mene khayaakhunle. Vano mulopwana aateexera vabuuruniwawe, anarowa owaani." 
Judges19:29 Aphiyaka owaani, aakuxa mwaalo, anameyanya erutthu ya ekuxowaawe mipatta muloko ni miili, anakawela mipatta sootheene sa aYixrayeli." 
Judges19:30 Ootheene yoonne yeeyo yaaheera: “Kheenooniwe hata kheeneereye etthu siiyeela okhuma nihuku aYixrayeli yaakhummaaya wExipitu. Muupuwele yeeyo! Mutthokelele! Muhime yooweera! 
Judges20:1 Vano aYixrayeli ootheene okhuma oDani mpaka oBerxeba ni wa elapo ya oGiliyade yaahoorwa ni murima mmoha ethukumanaka oMizepa vamaithoni wa Yave. 
Judges20:2 Ahooleli a ipuumba sa aYixrayeli ootheene yaakilaathi mmapuronimwaya wa muthukumano wa muloko wa Muluku. Yaakhalawo anakhotto 400 000 ni ikatanasaya. 
Judges20:3 aBenyamini yaasuwela weera aYixrayeli yaathukumana oMizepa. Vano aYixrayeli yaakohana: “Yoonanara ela yaakhumelenle hai?” 
Judges20:4 Hiiho muLeevi, iyawe ekuxo yiiviwe, aaheera: “Miyo va vamoha ni ekuxowaaka naaphiya oGibeya, elapo ya aBenyamini, weera navirihewo ohiyu." 
Judges20:5 Ohiyuweene yoole, asilopwana a oGibeya yaakirweela, enarica empa yeerelaka okiiva. Yaakoniha ekuxowaaka, enakhwa." 
Judges20:6 Kaakuxa ekuxowaaka, kinathikilanya mipatta mipatta kirumihelaka khula mpatta wa epuumba ya yoohiyeriwa ya aYixrayeli, niwoko yaapaka etthu ele yoonanara ni yoowuulihaxa muru mweelaponi ya aYixrayeli." 
Judges20:7 Vano, aYixrayeli ootheene nyuwo muri vaava – muulume ni mphuke.”" 
Judges20:8 Atthu ootheene yaaheemela ni murima mmoha yeeraka: “Ahikhale a hiyo anaatthikele owaani. Hoye, hata mmoha anaahokoleele vaatewawe!" 
Judges20:9 Vanonto, nneeraahu nipakele oGibeya ti ala: ninoomwalamwaxa khula epuumba weera noone eniireereliwe!" 
Judges20:10 Nimmwaathanla asilopwana muloko a khula ncira ni ncira a khula macira muloko ni macira muloko a khula atthu macira macireene muloko weera emukuxeke pooso a anakhotto oophiyano oGibeya, elapo ya Benyamini. Weiwo yaapakele aGibeya yeeyo amphwanelaaya niwoko na etthu yoowuuliha muru ela epakeiye oYixrayeli.”" 
Judges20:11 Hiiho aYixrayeli ootheene yaathukumana ni murima mmoha weera yaawaneno aGibeya. 
Judges20:12 Ipuumba sa aYixrayeli saahaarumihela anamitthenga epuumba ya Benyamini yeeraka: “Muneera hai mwaha wa etthu ela yoowuuliha muru yeereiye variyariwanyu? 
Judges20:13 Vano muninnyerere alavilavi awo a oGibeya weera niwiive nimalihaka hiiho yoonanara variyari wa aYixrayeli.” Wa soothesene, aBenyamini khayaatthunne owiiwa axunnaya aYixrayeli." 
Judges20:14 Erweelaka musidadenimwaya aBenyamini yaathukumana oGibeya weera yaawaneno aYixrayeli. 
Judges20:15 aBenyamini yaahaathukumanyiha woowaakuveya anakhotto 26 000 ni ikatanasaya vamoha ni anakhotto macira mathannameeli oothanliwa a yaale yaamanke oGibeya. 
Judges20:16 Variyari wa anakhotto ale yaakhala asilopwana macira mathannameeli ooweraxa yaakhala anoonyootho. Khula mutthu a yaale aangwera ovoonya nluku ni ekwamba woohikuza. 
Judges20:17 aYixrayeli, waahiya aBenyamini, yaahaathukumanyiha anakhotto 400 000 ni ikatanasaya – ootheene ooweraxa owana." 
Judges20:18 aYixrayeli yaarowa oBeteli yaasaasaka miruku sa Muluku. Yaaheera: “Epuumba heeni ya hiyo eniipacere waawanano aBenyamini?” Yave aawaakhula: “Eniipacere ti ya Yuda.” 
Judges20:19 Oxaawaya aYixrayeli yaavenyasa, enakonela vakhiviru wa oGibeya." 
Judges20:20 Asilopwana a aYixrayeli yaarowa waawanano aBenyamini eniireherera moota woowaawanano aGibeya. 
Judges20:21 Nihuku nne aBenyamini yaavenya oGibeya, enawiiva 22 000 aYixrayeli mukhottoni." 
Judges20:22 Wa soothesene, asilopwana a aYixrayeli yaalipiherana, enahokoleelatho mapuroweene yaale a nihuku noopacera." 
Judges20:23 aYixrayeli yaamwaattamela Yave yiinlaka vamaithoniwawe mpaka oxekuwa, emukohaka: “Naawananeketho axunnihu aBenyamini?” Yave aawaakhula: “Nyuwosa mwaawananeke.”" 
Judges20:24 Vano waaxiiye aYixrayeli yaahaarowela aBenyamini. 
Judges20:25 Vanonto, emaara ele, aBenyamini evenyakaru oGibeya weera yaawaneno, yaawiiva aYixrayeli 18 000 – ootheenaawo ni ikatanasaya." 
Judges20:26 Vahoolowaya aYixrayeli ootheene, yaarowa oBeteli, enakilaathiwo yiinlaka ohoolo wa Yave. Yaatthuka nihuku nne mpaka oxekuwa empakelaka Yave sooveleela soohisa ni sa murettele." 
Judges20:27 aYixrayeli yaamukohasa Yave. Vanonto mmahukuni ale Arka* a Wiiraana a Muluku yaari vaavaale ni 
Judges20:28 Pinehasi, mwaana mulopwana a Eleyazari, mwaana mulopwana a Aharoni, ti aarumeelawo. Yaamukoha Yave: “Niroweketho naawananeke axunnihu aBenyamini hoye hoye naari?” Yave aawaakhula: “Murowaseke, niwoko omaalo kinoowinnyerera mmatatanimwanyu.”" 
Judges20:29 aYixrayeli yaahiipitha erinceene oGibeya. 
Judges20:30 Vanihukuni nanaararu yaahaarowelasa aBenyamini, eniireherera waawanano aGibeya ntoko yaapankaaya woopacera." 
Judges20:31 aBenyamini yaakhuma weera yaawaneno ni yaarakamelihiwa ni esidade. Yaapacera waavulaliha aYixrayeli akina ntoko yaapankaaya woopacera ni asilopwana akina miloko miraru yaahiivelasiwa mmatta ni mmiseweni – mmoha onkela oBeteli ni mukina oGibeya. 
Judges20:32 aBenyamini yeeraaya: “Hiyo naawine ntoko woopacera,” vaheera aYixrayeli yeera: “Nrowe nikhume naarakamelihe esidade naaronghaka mmiseweni.”" 
Judges20:33 Asilopwana ootheene a aYixrayeli yaavenyasa mmapuronimwaya, enathataana oBahali-Tamari; vaheera aYixrayeli yiipinthe yaahiithupulula mmapuronimwaya, mpatta ninkela nsuwa oGibeya." 
Judges20:34 Vanonto anakhotto macira macireene muloko ooweraxa a aYixrayeli yaapacera owanano oGibeya. Ekhotto ele yaavihaxa, vaheera aBenyamini khayaasuwela weera wohaakhuveela otakhaliwa." 
Judges20:35 Yave aahaawina aBenyamini vamaithoni wa aYixrayeli ni nihuku nne aYixrayeli yaawiiva aBenyamini 25 100 – ootheenaawo ni ikatana. 
Judges20:36 Vano aBenyamini yaasuwela weera aawiniwa. aYixrayeli yaahaakhwenuwa aBenyamini, niwoko yaaroromela anakhotto ale yiipinthe waattamela oGibeya." 
Judges20:37 Yaale yiipinthe woowaakuveya yaatthimakela oGibeya, enavolowa musidade, enamwareela, enawiiva amaki ootheene a mwemmo ni ikatana." 
Judges20:38 aYixrayeli yaahiiwanana ni yaale yiipinthe weera yaarowa otthuwiha mwiixi mahutteene musidade," 
Judges20:39 ni yoonakaru, aYixrayeli yaamuhokoleela waawanano aBenyamini. aBenyamini yaapacera waavulaliha aYixrayeli ewiivaka wookwanaka asilopwana miloko miraru, eneera: “Hiyo nohaawina ntoko ekwaha yoopacera.”" 
Judges20:40 Wa soothesene, opacerakaru otthuwa mwiixi okhuma musidadeni, aBenyamini yaarukunuwa, enoona mwiixi owelaka osulu." 
Judges20:41 Vano aYixrayeli yaahaarukunuwela, vaheera aBenyamini yaateenguwa esuwelaka weera otakhaliwawaya woophiya." 
Judges20:42 Hiiho yaahaatthawasa aYixrayeli ekuxeraka ephiro ya onikareni, mene khayaawenre osemba ekhotto. aYixrayeli yaakhumme musidade yaawiivela vaavaale." 
Judges20:43 Yaahaaricasa aBenyamini, enaattharelelasa khayaahaawanne waaphwanya waattamela oGibeya, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa." 
Judges20:44 Anakhotto aBenyamini 18 000 yaahookhwa – ootheene ooweraxa. 
Judges20:45 Awosa erukunuwakaru weera etthawele onikareni wookela Mwala wa Rimoni, aYixrayeli yaawiivasa asilopwana macira miloko mithanu mphironi. Awosa yaahaattharelela aBenyamini mpaka oGidomi, enawiivasa atthu oopwaha macira miloko miili." 
Judges20:46 Nihuku nenenenne yaahookhwa aBenyamini 25 000 ookuxeene ikatana, ootheenaawo yaari anakhotto ooweraxa." 
Judges20:47 Wa soothesene, aBenyamini macira mathannamosa yaarukunuwa, enatthawela onikareni erowaka wa Mwala wa oRimoni yaakhanlaayawo nyeeri mixexe." 
Judges20:48 aYixrayeli yaahokoleela wa aBenyamini, enaviravira isidade sootheene ni ikatana ewiivaka ni asinameene mpaka sootheene yaaphwannyayamo. Yaahisa isidade sootheene yaavinraayawo." 
Judges21:1 oMizepa asilopwana a aYixrayeli yaalipenle ha: “Ahikhaleru a hiyo anaamuthelihe muBenyamini.” 
Judges21:2 Muloko waarowa oBeteli mwa weiwo waakilaathiyaayawo vamaithoni wa Muluku mpaka oxekuwa okhuwelaka ni wiinlaka ni wiikhupanyera. 
Judges21:3 Yaalalamika: “Ii! Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, yeereenle heeni yeela oYixrayeli? Heeni yeeraaya ehaleele olelo epuumba emoha variyari wa aYixrayeli?”" 
Judges21:4 Oxaawaya muloko waapeherera ovenya, onaateka altaari* opakaka sooveleela soohisa ni sa murettele." 
Judges21:5 Vano aYixrayeli yaakohana: “Variyari wa ipuumba sa aYixrayeli taani ohirwiiye omuthukumanoni vamaithoni wa Yave?” Yaakohenre hiiho, niwoko waalipeliwa weera yoowo eera ahithukumaneno vamaithoni wa Yave oMizepa aamwiiviwa." 
Judges21:6 aYixrayeli yaahaathananela axunnaya aBenyamini yeeraka: “Olelo aYixrayeli aayeleela epuumba emoha. 
Judges21:7 Khaningwera waaphwanya asithiyana wa yaawo ahanle ni okumi, neenre nilipelaka mwa Yave ohaatheliha anamwaniihu.”" 
Judges21:8 aYixrayeli yaakohana: “Taani a ipuumba sa aYixrayeli ohithukumanne vamaithoni wa Yave oMizepa?” Yaahoonelela weera khaawo a oYabexi-Giliyade aarwiiye waakoneleliwe mmuthukumanoni. 
Judges21:9 Yaalikelaka muloko, yaahoona weera khaariworu muYabexi-Giliyade." 
Judges21:10 Hiiho muthukumano waahaarumiha anakhotto 12 000 waalamulelaka weera erowe oYabexi-Giliyade ni yawiive ootheene yaamankewo, mpakatho asithiyana ni anamwane." 
Judges21:11 Waaweerela anakhotto:” Muneeraanyu mwapake ti ela: mwawiive alopwana ni athiyana ootheene yaahikhalaru asimwali oowiikosoopa.” 
Judges21:12 Yaahaaphwanya variyari wa amaki a oYabexi-Giliyade asimwali oowiikosoopa macira maxexe, enaaronghasa waakonelingwe oXilo, oKanaani." 
Judges21:13 Vahoolowaya muloko wootheene waahaarumihela yoovaha yoowiiraana aBenyamini yaari vaMwala wa oRimoni. 
Judges21:14 Vano ehuhuweene yeele aBenyamini yaahokolowasa, enawaakhelasa asithiyana a oYebexi-Giliyade yuureliwe. Wa soothesene, khayaakwanenle ootheene." 
Judges21:15 Muloko wa aYixrayeli waahaathananela aBenyamini, niwoko Yave aamwaramwaxa ipuumba sa aYixrayeli." 
Judges21:16 Ahooleli a muloko yaaheera: “Yeenre asithiyana a aBenyamini ekhwaaka, nniwaasere hai athiyana alopwana ahanle?" 
Judges21:17 Ontthuneya weera yaale ahanle ni okumi ekhaleno anamwane weera epuumba emoha ya aYixrayeli ehiphwateye. 
Judges21:18 Nihaathelihe anamwaniihu, niwoko hiyo aYixrayeli nilipenle ha: ‘Oolaphiwa yoowo anaamuthelihe mwaniye ni muBenyamini.’”" 
Judges21:19 Moone, vayaakhani yookhala efesta ya Yave oXilo, mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa oBeteli ni mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa musewe onkhuma oBeteli okelaka oXekhemi mpaka mpatta wa ohitto wa oLebona.”" 
Judges21:20 Hiiho yaahaalamulela aBenyamini: “Murowe mwiipithe mmatta mwa iwuuva* 
Judges21:21 ni mwaweherere. Asimwali a oXilo yaarowaka wiina, mwathupuluwe mmatta mwa iwuuva* ni khula mutthu a nyuwo iivareleke mwaamwali a oXilo. Vahoolowaya arowekeno mweelaponi ya aBenyamini." 
Judges21:22 Vano asitithaya hoye hoye asicimweenaaya yarwa okatta wa hiyo, nnooweerela: ‘Mwaamoorelase ikharari, niwoko khanaawenre waakwaniherela okhottoni asithiyana. Nyuwosa khamunthowa mweenre muhaathelihaka asinamwaniinyu.’”" 
Judges21:23 Vanonto, aBenyamini yaapaka hiiho. Yiinaaya asimwali, khula mulopwana aahiivarela muthiyana weera amuthele. Vahoolowaya yaahokoleelasa wa yoohiyeriwaaya, enarasela isidadesaya, eniitekihamo." 
Judges21:24 Ehuhuweene yeele aYixrayeli yaavenyasa nipuro nne, enahokoleela mpuumbanimwaya ni mmahimonimwaya, khula mutthu wa yoohiyeriwaawexa." 
Judges21:25 Ehuhuweene yeele aYixrayeli khayaarino mwene. Khula mutthu aapaka yeeyo yaamureerela. 
Ruth1:1 Mweehuhuni ya ahooleli yaakhala etala mweelaponi ni mulopwana mmoha a oBeteleheemu, oYuda, vamoha ni mwaarawe ni anamwanaawe asilopwana eeli yaarowa okhala ehuhu ekina mweelaponi ya oMowabe." 
Ruth1:2 Nsina na mulopwana naari Elimeleki, nsina na mwaarawe Nawomi ni masina a anamwanaawe asilopwana eeli yaari Maheloni ni Kileyoni. Awosa yaari awEferati a oBeteleheemu, oYuda. Yaarowa oMowabe, enakilaathiwo." 
Ruth1:3 Vano, Elimeleki, aiyawe Nawomi, aahookhwa ni owo aahanle meekhaawe vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana eeli." 
Ruth1:4 Anamwane ale yaahaathelasa aMowabe, mmoha iitthaniwa Orpa ni mukina Ruuti. Emalihaka okhalawo wookwanaka iyaakha muloko," 
Ruth1:5 Maheloni ni Kileyoni yaahookhwatho. Nawomi aahala meekhaawe woohikhalano iyawe hata anamwanaawe asilopwana eeli. 
Ruth1:6 Areene oMowabe Nawomi aahiiwa weera Yave aakhavihera mulokwaawe avahaka sooca, tivawo iireherenraawe ovenya oMowabe vamoha ni asipwiyamwaanaawe eeli." 
Ruth1:7 Aavenya nipuro aakhalaawe vamoha ni Orpa ni Ruuti, anarowa mmuseweni onkela mweelaponi ya oYuda." 
Ruth1:8 Vanonto Nawomi aaweerela asipwiyamwaanaawe eeli: “Murowase! Muhokoleele waanamannyu. Yave ooreereliweni ntoko nyuwosa mwareereliwaanyu mureene ni asilipa oorimeela ni wa miyotho. 
Ruth1:9 Yave oovahaseni mahala weera mwaphwanyase wiitthuuwa vantthokoni ni asiiyinyu akina.” Aahaavaha ebeecu yoowaaraxela, vaheera awosa yaakhuwela yiinlaka," 
Ruth1:10 enamweerelasa: “Hoye! Hiyo nimmoottharani omulokoniwanyu.” 
Ruth1:11 Wa soothesene, Nawomi aaweerela: “Muhokoleelase owaani, anamwanaaka. Munkittharelani? Miyo nkingwera wooyarelani anamwane asilopwana akina weera yoothelaseni." 
Ruth1:12 Muhokolowase anamwanaaka. Murowase! Miyo koopwaha misingu sa otheliwa ni mulopwana mukina. Naari miyo kuupuwela weera kinootheliwa ohiyuweene yoola, kinaayara anamwane asilopwana eeli," 
Ruth1:13 mwaamwaawehererasa mpaka wunnuwa? Khamwaatheliwa mwaawehereraka yaawosa? Hoye, anamwanaaka. Oothananaxa ti miyo woopwahani nyuwosa, niwoko ninkihooxa ntata na Yave.”" 
Ruth1:14 Yiiwaka masu ale yaahiinlatho ekhuwelasaka. Vano Orpa aahaabeeca apwiyamwaanaawe anaaraxela, mene Ruuti aahaavarexexa." 
Ruth1:15 Nawomi aamweerela: “Omoone, munnaakaawo onghokoleela omulokononiwawe ni wa milukusawe. Ohokoloweno.”" 
Ruth1:16 Wa soothesene, Ruuti aamwaakhula: “Muhikinyesererihe woohiyani ni weera kihootthareni. Munrowaanyuwo, kinoorowatho; muneeraanyu mwakhalewo, nkakhalewotho. Mulokwaanyu ti mulokwaaka ni Mulukwaanyu ti Mulukwaaka." 
Ruth1:17 Muneeraanyu mwakhwelewo, nkakhwelewotho ni nkavithiwewo. Yave akittaruxe miyo koohiyani ohikhanle niwoko na okhwa.”" 
Ruth1:18 Nawomi oonakaru weera vekhaikhai Ruuti oolipihera omutthara, khaamunyesereringhetho." 
Ruth1:19 Hiiho asithiyana ooweeli ale yaarowa, enaphiya oBeteleheemu. Ephiyakawo, esidade yootheene yaari enyuungunyuungu emoha mwaha wa yaawosa ni asithiyana a esidade yaakohana: “Weeraka Nawomi?”" 
Ruth1:20 Owo aawaakhula: “Muhikiitthanele Nawomi; fataari okiitthanela Mara, niwoko Muluku a ikuru sootheene ookiwaawihera okumaaka." 
Ruth1:21 Kaarongwe ni itthu, mene Yave okihokolonxe matataru. Muhikiitthanele Nawomi, niwoko Yave ookihooxa; Muluku a ikuru sootheene ookiruuhela olatta.”" 
Ruth1:22 Ti hiiho Nawomi eenraawe woohokolowa elapo ya oMowabe vamoha ni pwiyamwaanaawe mMowabe Ruuti. Awosa yaaphiyanse oBeteleheemu epaceriwaka ohephiwa esevada*. 
Ruth2:1 Vano, Nawomi aakhalano mmusi mmoha a nihimo na Elimeleki, nsinanawe Bowazi. Aari mulopwana oopuha ni oottittimiheya." 
Ruth2:2 mMowabe Ruuti aamweerela Nawomi: “Kinrowa ottottattotta makala a yaale eniikitthunihere.” Nawomi aamwaakhula: “Oroweke, mwanaka.”" 
Ruth2:3 Hiiho aarowa, anapacera ottottattotta makala ottuli wa anamahepha. Yaahereya weera, attottattottaka hiihaale, Ruuti aavolowa mmatta mwa Bowazi aari a nihimo na Elimeleki." 
Ruth2:4 Aavolowaawe mmatta mwa Bowazi, owo aathitanela awaaka oBeteleheemu anawuulumiha anamahepha eeraka: “Yave akhale ni nyuwosa,” ni awosa yaamwaakhula: “Yave ooreeliheni!”" 
Ruth2:5 Bowazi aamukoha namaawehaweha anamahepha: “Mwaamwali ole ti awani?” 
Ruth2:6 Owo aamwaakhula: “Ole mMowabe, mwa yoowo orwiiye oMowabe vamoha ni Nawomi." 
Ruth2:7 Owo ookivekela weera attottattotte makala eriyari ya ihupu ottuli wa anamahepha. Owo orwiiye oxeexelo ni onuurura mwemmo mpaka vano eemenle vakhaani paahi weera iitthuuwe vamunttuusini.” 
Ruth2:8 Vanonto Bowazi aamweerela Ruuti: “Okiiwe nnenesene mwanaka. Ohirowe ottottattotta ematta ekina hata ohivenyeru va. Okhaleke ni arumeiyaaka asithiyana. 
Ruth2:9 Waawehexexeke anghephaayamo asilopwana ni waatthareke ottuli vamoha ni asithiyana anrowa ohepha. Kohaalamula amiravo weera ehooxupe. Waavoliwaka ntthona, wawureke maahi mukhalini arikiwe ni asilopwana.”" 
Ruth2:10 Iiwaka yeeyo ahuurama, aneera: “Kireeriwe moota heeni vamaithoniwanyu mpaka pwiiya okipwattha miyo namarwa?”" 
Ruth2:11 Bowazi aamwaakhula: “Kooleeliwa sootheene seiyo waapakenlaawo apwiyamwaanaawo vahoolo wa okhwa wa aiyawo ni moota waahingyaawo atithawo, amayawo ni elapwaawo weera okhale ni muloko wahaasuwenlaawo." 
Ruth2:12 Yave oolive niwoko na yeeyo opankaawo. Otthuvelaxiwe ni Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli. Woothanla okosoopiwa ni Yoowo.”" 
Ruth2:13 Ruuti aamwaakhula: “Pwiiyaaka kipwaherere waakheliwa nnenesene. Mookihakalaliha ni moomulipiha murima murumeiyaanyu kiroohikhalaru mmoha a arumeiyaanyu asithiyana.” 
Ruth2:14 Ehuhu ya oca, Bowazi aamweerela Ruuti: “Oweeke wenno. Okuxe ekapatthi ya epaawu ni oruweye muviinyuni yoonyuunya. Owo akilaathiyeene vamoha ni anamahepha, Bowazi aamvaha etrigu yoowaarikiwa. Aahooca, anavona mpaka ohala." 
Ruth2:15 Vano, Ruuti avenyaka weera attottattotte makala, Bowazi aahaalamula arumeiyaawe: “Naari owo attottattottaka variyari wa ihupu, muhimuhiihe." 
Ruth2:16 Ohiyanawaya, mwaahephasaka, munghawulele makala makina a ihupu ni mmoroxe weera owo attotte. Muhimuhiihe.”" 
Ruth2:17 Hiiho Ruuti aattottattotta mmatta mpaka wiila. Vahoolowaya aaheepettha wookwana ikiilu* miloko miili niithanu sa yeeyo uukenlaawe. 
Ruth2:18 Owo aarowano omuttettheni ni apwiyamwaanaawe yaahoona yeeyo Ruute aattottattonttaawe. Ruuti aaruuhatho mvithe wa yeeyo aaciiyaawe mpaka ovona, anaavaha." 
Ruth2:19 Apwiyamwaanaawe yaamukoha: “Olelo waattottattotta woowi? Muteko owo waavara woowi? Ooreelihiwa akhale mulopwana owo oopwantthe weyo!” Vano Ruuti aahaathalihera apwiyamwaanaawe yoowo aamvaranaawe. Aaheera: “Olelo kivanre muteko mmatta mwa mulopwana oniitthaniwa Bowazi.” 
Ruth2:20 Nawomi aamweerela Ruuti: “Yave amureelihe! Khanghiya owoonihera murima wooreera akumi ni akhwiiye. Mulopwana owo ti mmusaahu, mmoha a anamakosoopa a emusi*."
