Ruth2:21 Vanonto mMowabe Ruuti aapwaherera: “Owo ookeerelatho: ‘Okhale ni anamahephaaka mpaka ommaleloni wa ohephiwa esevada*.’” 
Ruth2:22 Nawomi aamweerela Ruuti: “Mwanaka, fataari weyo waarowano arumeiyaawe asithiyana. Orowa imatta sikina, onoowereya oveihiwa.”" 
Ruth2:23 Hiiho Ruuti aari ni arumeiyi asithiyana a Bowazi mpaka ommaleloni wa ohephiwa esevada* ni etrigu akhalaka ni apwiyamwaanaawe. 
Ruth3:1 Nihuku nimoha Nawomi, apwiyamwaanaawe Ruuti, yaamweerela: “Mwanaka, kiwaasere etthoko yoowiitthuuwa weera yoohakalalihe." 
Ruth3:2 Vano Bowazi, pwiiya a arumeiyi asithiyana waaraaweno, ori mmusaahu xaxaxa. Ohiyuweene yoola owo onrowa oveera esevada* vanipuroni nimveeriwa." 
Ruth3:3 Oraparape, wiixunkhelihe owarele ni orowe vanipuroniwawe nimveeriwa. Vaheera ohirowe wiixoonihere, wiisuwelihaka, mene waweherere mpaka owo amalihaleene oca ni owura." 
Ruth3:4 Owo aarowaka okona, wangwehexexe nnenesene nipuro onrowaawe okona. Vahoolowaya akonneene wamwaattamele ni wamukhunule ninta waametto ni wiixaatalelewo. Owo onimooleela yoopaka.”" 
Ruth3:5 Ruuti aamwaakhula: “Kinoopaka sootheene mukileenlaanyu.” 
Ruth3:6 Vano aarowa wa nipuro nimveeriwa*, anapaka sootheene apwiyamwaanaawe yaamuleenlaaya." 
Ruth3:7 Bowazi amalihakaru oca ni owura aahakalala, anarowa wiixaatalela mukerekhere wa suukelingwaaya sooveeriwa. Ruuti aamwaattamela woohooneleliwa, anamukhunula waamettowawe, aniixaatalela." 
Ruth3:8 Ohiyu eriyari, Bowazi aavenyerera mukhoveni, anarukunuwa, anatuthuwa woomoona muthiyana mmoha iixaatalenleene waamettowawe." 
Ruth3:9 Owo aamukoha: “Nyuwo taani?” Ruuti aamwaakhula: “Miyo murumeiyaanyu muthiyana Ruuti. Mukikhuneele ni mukaandyowaanyu mweenre mukhalaka namakosoopa a emusaaka*.” 
Ruth3:10 Bowazi aamwaakhula: “Yave ooreelihe, mwanaka. Onnenaawo ola wootepaxa opwaha woopacera, niwoko weyo khoopwantthe otheliwa ni amiravo oopuha hoye hoye oohaawa." 
Ruth3:11 Vano, mwanaka, ohoove, kinimoopakela sootheene okivekenlaawo. Asilopwana ootheene a esidadaaka aasuwela weera weyo muthiyana a mukhalelo wooreeraxa." 
Ruth3:12 Ettiitthu, miyo namakosoopa emusaawo*, mene ookhala namakosoopa emusaawo mukina xaxaxa ookipwaha miyo." 
Ruth3:13 Oviriheke vaava ohiyu. Nnoone omaalo: Owo atthuna okhala namakosoopaawo*, wooreera – ookosoopeke. Vaheera aahitthuna, kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave weera miyo nkikhale namakosopa emusaawo*. Okone va mpaka omaalo.”" 
Ruth3:14 Ruuti aahiixaatalela waamettowawe mpaka oxeexelo, mene aapeherera ovenya nsuwa nihinaaye okhuma weera ahooniwe. Bowazi aahuupuwela: “Ahikhale aneera asuwele weera muthiyana ola aari vanipuroni nimveeriwa*.”" 
Ruth3:15 Aamweerelatho: “Okiruuhele mukaandyo ongwaraawo ni ovareleleke.” Aapaka hiiho ni Bowazi aahiitthelamo ikiilu* miloko miili niithannapiili sa esevada*, anamureya. Vahoolowaya owo aahokoleela osidade." 
Ruth3:16 Ruuti aphiyaka vaate wa apwiyamwaanaawe Nawomi, yaamukoha: “Weentte hai mwanaka?” Ni owo aamuthalihera sootheene Bowazi aampakenlaawe," 
Ruth3:17 aandyeereraka: “Ookivaha ikiilu* miloko milii niithannapiili sa esevada* eeraka: ‘ohihokoleele wa apwiyamwaanaawo matataru.’” 
Ruth3:18 Nawomi aamweerela: “Opixe murima mwanaka mpaka osuwela eniikhumelele. Woohihovela mulopwana owo khiitthuuwa olelo ahinaaye otthokiha etthweene yeela.” 
Ruth4:1 Eyo eri hiiho, Bowazi aarowa wa mulako wa esidade, anakilaathiwo. Ehuhuweene yeele namakosoopa* emusi ya Nawomi aahimmwa ni Bowazi aavirawo. Bowazi aamweerela: “Nthamwenaaka, orwe okilaathi va.” Hiiho aarowa, anakilaathi." 
Ruth4:2 Bowazi aahaathukumanyiha ahooleli muloko a esidade, anaweerela: “Mukilaathi va.” Awosa yaakilaathisa." 
Ruth4:3 Vanonto aamweerela namakosoopa emusi ya Nawomi mukina: “Nawomi, mwa yoowo ohokolongwe oMowabe, onoothumiha mpatta wa ematta yaari ya munnihu Elimeleki." 
Ruth4:4 Kohuupuwela weera fataari woosuweliha mwaha ola vamaithoni wa ahooleli a muloko ni wooleela weera okuxe ematta. Watthuna okuxa, okuxe. Waahitthuna, okileele weera miyo kisuwele, woonaka weera khaawo emphwanenle ohipacenre weyo, vahoolowaya miyo.” Mulopwana ole aamwaakhula: “Paahi, kinookuxa.”" 
Ruth4:5 Bowazi aamweerelatho: “Nihuku muneeraanyu mukuxe ematta ya Nawomi ni mMowabe Ruuti, ontthuneya omukuxatho naamukhweli weera murandele nsina na mulipa oorimeela mwa yoohiyeriwaawe.”" 
Ruth4:6 Vano mulopwana ole aamwaakhula: “Waari hiiho, nkingwera okuxa niwoko eniikiruuhele ohasuwa. Okuxeke yoowe, niwoko miyo nkingwera.”" 
Ruth4:7 Vanonto, yaari ekhovelelo ya ehuhuweene yeele weera mukina aarula ekwakwattaawe amweemexerelaka mukhwaawe ntoko eneneero ya okuxiwa wa ematta. Hiiho maronda yannaakhuleleya oYixrayeli." 
Ruth4:8 Hiiho namakosoopa emusi ya Nawomi mukina aamweerela Bowazi: “Okuxexe yoowe,” aarula ekwakwaatta." 
Ruth4:9 Vanonto, Bowazi aaweerela ahooleli ni atthu ootheene yaari vaavaale: “Olelo nyuwosa ti anamoonaaka weera kinkuxa mmatatani mwa Nawomi ilapo sootheene sa Elimeleki, Kileyoni ni Maheloni." 
Ruth4:10 Kimpwahereratho okhalano mMowabe Ruuti, naamukhweli a Maheloni, weera kirandele nsina na mulipa oorimeela mwa yoohiyeriwaawe ni weera nsinanawe nihilakaseye variyari wa emusaawe naari wa elivuru ya masina a esidade. Olelo muri anamoona a yeela.”" 
Ruth4:11 Ahooleli ni ootheene yaari vamulako yaaheera: “Hiyo anamoona. Yave ampake muthiyana owo omvolowa mweemusinimwanyu ntoko aampankaawe Rakheli ni Leya, mwa yaawosa aakhaliha ipuumba sa aYixrayeli. Mukhale oottittimiheya wEfrata ni mukhalane epili oBeteleheemu." 
Ruth4:12 Emusaanyu mwa anamwane Owo aneeraawe oovaheeni, ekhale ntoko ya nikholonaka Perezi, mwaana mulopwana a Tamari aamuyarenlaawe Yuda.”" 
Ruth4:13 Bowazi aamuthela Ruuti ni owo aakhala mwaariye. Owo aamukonano ni Yave aangweriha orupala, anamuyara mwaana mulopwana." 
Ruth4:14 Asithiyana yaamweerela Nawomi: “Atthapeliwe Yave ohoohingyeni olelo woohikhala namakosoopa a emusi*. Nsinanawe nikhale na epili variyari wa aYixrayeli! 
Ruth4:15 Mwaana anoohakalaliheni anoociheeni ngwuuluvalani, niwoko mwaana a mwaara a mwaninyu onoosivelani ni onooreerelani waapwaha anamwane asilopwana athanneeli.”" 
Ruth4:16 Vano Nawomi aamwaakanda mwaana, anamukosoopaka." 
Ruth4:17 Asithiyana oowaattamanano yaaheera: “Nawomi ookhalano mwaana mulopwana!” Yaamutteha Obedi. Owo aari tiithi a Yixai, tiithi a Davide." 
Ruth4:18 Vano ekhapira ya Perezi ti ela: Perezi aamuyanre Hezeroni; 
Ruth4:19 Hezeroni aamuyanre Rami; Rami aamuyanre Aminadabi; 
Ruth4:20 Aminadabi aamuyanre Nahexoni; Nahexoni aamuyanre Salemoni; 
Ruth4:21 Salemoni aamuyanre Bowazi; Bowazi aamuyanre Obedi; 
Ruth4:22 Obedi aamuyanre Yixai ni Yixai aamuyanre Davide. 
1Samuel1:1 Aakhala mulopwana mmoha a oRamatayimi – muZufi a mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi, nsinanawe Elikana, mwaana mulopwana a Yerohami, mwaana mulopwana a Elihu, mwaana mulopwana a Tohu, mwaana mulopwana a Zufi, ngwEfrayimi." 
1Samuel1:2 Aathenle asithiyana eeli – mmoha iitthaniwa Hana ni mukina Penina. Vano Penina aayara vaheera Hana khaayanre. 
1Samuel1:3 Khula eyaakha mulopwana ole annavenya esidadaawe arowaka oXilo weera amulape Yave a ikuru sootheene ampakelaka sooveleela. Vano Hofeni ni Pinehasi, anamwane asilopwana a Eli, yaari asaserdoti* a Yave oXilo." 
1Samuel1:4 Khula nihuku yaaraaya emaara ya Elikana opaka yooveleela, annamvaha mwaariye Penina mpatta wa enama nitho wa anamwanaawe asilopwana ni asithiyana ootheene." 
1Samuel1:5 Vaheera annamvaha Hana mipatta miili, niwoko aamusivela aarookhalaru mwali eekupa." 
1Samuel1:6 Eenre akhalaka mwali eekupa, Penina annamutannya weera amunyoonyihe." 
1Samuel1:7 Eyo yanneereya khula eyaakha. Emaara ti emaara Hana aarowaawe wa Empa ya Muluku, Penina annamutannya ni owo anniinla, akhoottaka oca." 
1Samuel1:8 Va mwaha ola aiyawe Elikana yannamweerela: “Hana, muniinlelani? Heeni muhincaanyu? Weeraka miyo nkooreerenleni waapwaha anamwane asilopwana muloko?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Ekwaha emoha awosa emalihaleene oca ni owura oXilo, Hana aaheemela. Vano, Eli, musaserdoti* eera akilaantheene vahiceni vamulako wa Empa ya Muluku." 
1Samuel1:10 Oothananaxeene Hana aahiinla, anamvekela Yave." 
1Samuel1:11 Owo aaroromeliha eeraka: “Ii! Yave a ikuru sootheene, dyoontte moone othanana wa murumeiyaanyu muthiyana ni mukuupuwelele. Muhikittiwale; mukivahe mwaana mulopwana. Mwakivaha, kinoowinnyererani wa mahuku ootheene a okumaawe ni mayihaawe ni irerusawe khasimetthiwaru.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Owo amvekelaka hiihaale Yave, Eli aaweha eyaanowaawe." 
1Samuel1:13 Hana eera avekelaka mmurimanimwawe ni eyanowaawe yaamwaasa otannyeya wohiiwanyeya nsunawe. Eli uupuwela weera ola oohapaliwa," 
1Samuel1:14 anamweerela: “Mpaka yaakhani nyuwo mpwahereraka ohapaliwa? Muhiye owura!” 
1Samuel1:15 Hana aamwaakhula: “Hoye, apwiyaaka, miyo muthiyana oothananaxa. Nkiwunre eviinyu hata yakhalaru yoowura yoohapala; miyo kiniithananela ohoolo wa Yave." 
1Samuel1:16 Muhuupuwele weera murumeiyaanyu ti muthiyana a ololo. Keera kivekelaka mwaha wa othananaxawaka ni oriipiwawaka.” 
1Samuel1:17 Eli aamwaakhula: “Murowe mmuretteleni ni Muluku a aYixrayeli oovaheeni yeeyo mumvekenlaanyu.” 
1Samuel1:18 Hana aamweerela: “Kaakheleliwe nnenesene mahuku ootheene ni nyuwo pwiiyaaka. Vahoolowaya aapwaha, anaca etthu ni ekhovaawe enatikithereya." 
1Samuel1:19 Oxawaya oxeexelo yaavenya, enalapa vamaithoni wa Muluku, enahokoleela owannyaya oRama. Elikana aamukonano mwaariye Hana ni Yave aamuupuwelela." 
1Samuel1:20 Hiiho, eviraka ehuhu ekina, Hana aarupala, anamuyarela mwaana mulopwana. Aamutteha Samuweli, eeraka: “Miyo kaamvekenle Yave.”" 
1Samuel1:21 Vano mulopwana owo Elikana aarowaawe vamoha ni emusaawe yootheene weera ampakele Yave sooveleela sa khula eyaakha ni weera akwanihere yoororomelihaawe, Hana khaarongwe." 
1Samuel1:22 Owo aaweerela aiyawe: “Mwaana ola ahiyaleene waamwa, kineeraaka kimukuxe weera kamoonihere Yave ni ola onookhalawo mahuku ootheene.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Aiyawe Elikana yaamwaakhula: “Mpake yeeyo enooreerelani. Mukhale nno mpaka aneeraawe ahiye waamwa. Yave aakhulele yoororomelihaawe.” Hiiho Hana aahala owaani, amuhuwaka mwanawe mpaka aahiyaawe waamwa." 
1Samuel1:24 Amuhiihaleene waamwa, nlelo areene mukhaanene, aamurongha Empa ya Yave oXilo vamoha ni emombe elopwana yaarino iyaakha tthaaru, efa* ya ephepa ni kacikhi a eviinyu." 
1Samuel1:25 Yiivakaru emombe, yaamuroiha mwaana wa Eli," 
1Samuel1:26 ni Hana aamweerela: “Pwiiyaaka, munnakuupuwela? Vekhaikhai ti yoomi kaari va mpattaanyu kimvekelaka Yave." 
1Samuel1:27 Kaamvekela okivaha mwaana mulopwana ola, ni Yave ookivaha yoovekaaka." 
1Samuel1:28 Tivawo miyo olelo kinimvahaaka Yave. Owo anaakhale a Yave wa mahukwaawe ootheene.” Hiiho owo aamulapawo Yave. 
1Samuel2:1 Vahoolowaya Hana aavekela, eeraka: Murimaaka onimutthapela Yave; mwa Yoowo koolipihiwa. Kinoowera waatheya amwiittanaaka kihakalalelaka, okitapuxawanyu." 
1Samuel2:2 Khawowo mukina ootteela ntoko Yave; Owo ti oohilikanxereya; khawowo mwala ntoko Mulukwaahu. 
1Samuel2:3 Muhuulume ngwiixoonani hata mmwaanomwanyu ohikhume wiikuxerera, niwoko Yave ti Muluku musuweli ni Owo onthoriha miteko sa atthu." 
1Samuel2:4 Nyuupa sa anakhotto ooweraxa sohintakiwa, mene oolosowa aasareya ikuru." 
1Samuel2:5 Yaareenle anoolola, mene yaahaangwe khaamvoliwa. Yoole aari mwali eekupa ohaayara anamwane athanneeli, vaheera yoole aarino anamwane ancipale oothova." 
1Samuel2:6 Yave onlamula okhwa ni okumi; Owo onnakuruxela mookhwaani ni onnakhumihamo. 
1Samuel2:7 Ti Yave omvaha ohaawa ni opuha; Owo onnayeviha ni onnunnuwiha. 
1Samuel2:8 Owo onnantatha ntthupi mulipa oohaawa amvenxaka vattuurani. Owo onaakilaathiha anamwane a mwene aavahaka nipuro noottittimiheyaxa. Mathipelo a elapo ya vathi ari a Yave ni mwa yaawo ookhaliha elapo. 
1Samuel2:9 Owo onnathokorora inaawo sa ootteela, vaheera atakhali anoomaalihiwa mweepiphini. Mutthu khangwina niwoko na ikuruxa;" 
1Samuel2:10 yaale ari amwiittanaawe Yave anoophwatiwa. Wiirimu Owo onoowoopelasa etari; Yave onoothoriha elapo yootheene. Owo onoomvaha ikuru mwenaawe, amulipihaka oovariwaawe." 
1Samuel2:11 Vahoolowaya Elikana aarowa owaani, vaheera mwaana ole aapacera omurumeela Yave vamaithoni wa musaserdoti* Eli." 
1Samuel2:12 Vano anamwane asilopwana a Eli yaari oohuureya; awosa khayaampwatthela Yave. 
1Samuel2:13 Yaari ekhovelelo variyari wa musaserdoti* ni atthu weera imaara sootheene mukina aapakaka yooveleela ni enama nlelo yiitthwaka, murumeiyi a musaserdoti* aarwa ni ekhope ya maino mararu mmatatanimwawe." 
1Samuel2:14 Annaruulamo mmwaapuni, naari muyoopweni hata munceconi hoye hoye mukarikhoni iiruulelaka yeeyo aahomaawe ni ekhope ya maino mararu. Annaapakela hiiho aYixrayeli ootheene yaarowa oXilo." 
1Samuel2:15 Vanonto, ehinaaye otothowa makhura, murumeiyi a musaserdoti* annarwa amweerelaka mulipa oovaha yooveleela: “Mumvahe musaserdoti* entthuri weera ooxe; owo khantthuna enama yoowaapeiwaru, ontthuna paahi ekithi.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Mulopwana aamweerela: “Ngweherere toko etothoweke makhura vahoolowaya mukuxeke yeeyo muntthunaanyu,” murumeiyi onnaakhula: “Hoye, mukivahe vaanaano. Mwaahikivaha, kinoowaakhani.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Yoottheka ele ya amiravo yaari yootepaxa vamaithoni wa Yave, niwoko awosa khayaahelela yooveleeleliwa Yave." 
1Samuel2:18 Vano Samuweli areene nlelo mmiravo annarumeela vamaithoni wa Yave awanreene mukaandyo wa eliinyu*. 
1Samuel2:19 Khula eyaakha amayawe yannamuttotthela mukaandyo mukhaani, emukuxeraka owo yaarowaaya ni aiyaya weera yapake yooveleela ya khula eyaakha." 
1Samuel2:20 Khula emaara yaarowaaya, Eli annamureeliha Elikana ni mwaariye eeraka: “Yave oovaheeni anamwane ni muthiyana ola vanipuroni na yoole owo aamvekenlaawe Yave, anamvaha.” Vahoolowaya yannahokoleela owaani." 
1Samuel2:21 Vanonto Yave aamoonihera onnene Hana. Owo aahaayara anamwane asilopwana araru ni asithiyana eeli. Eyo eri hiiho, Samuweli aahunnuwa vamaithoni wa Yave." 
1Samuel2:22 Eli, uuluvalanxeene, aasuwela sootheene anamwanaawe asilopwana yaapakelaaya aYixrayeli ootheene ni weera yannaakonano asithiyana yaarumeela vamulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*." 
1Samuel2:23 Tivawo aakohansaawe: “Mumpakelasa heeni itthusene seiya? Mpaka miyo kiniiwaaka muloko mwaha wa soonanara nyuwosa mumpakaanyu. 
1Samuel2:24 Hoye anamwanaaka, kheereenre yeeyo kiniiwaaka emwareelaka variyari wa muloko wa Yave." 
1Samuel2:25 Mukina amutthekela mukhwaawe, enoowereya weera Yave onoomukhavihera, mene mulopwana amutthekela Yave, taani anaamukhavihere?” Wa soothesene, anamwanaawe khayiiwelela ohiiha wa atithaya, niwoko Muluku aatthuna owiiva." 
1Samuel2:26 Mmiravo Samuweli eera unnuwaka imaara sootheene amusivelihaka Yave ni muloko. 
1Samuel2:27 Vanonto mulopwana mmoha a Muluku aamwaattamela Eli, anamweerela: “Yave oneera ha: ‘Kaahiixoonihera vaate wa atitthinyu awosa yaaraaya wExipitu elamuliwaka ni Farawu*." 
1Samuel2:28 Kaahaathanla atithinyu variyari wa ipuumba sootheene sa aYixrayeli weera ekhale musaserdotaaka, ewaattamele altaaraaka*, ehise erubani* ni engwanreene mooxikootti a esaserdoti vamaithoniwaka. Kaavahatho vaate wa atithinyu sooveleela sootheene soohisiwa ni aYixrayeli." 
1Samuel2:29 Mundererela heeni sooveleeleliwasaka kilamulenlaaka woomakawaka? Munaattittimiherela heeni anamwaniinyu okipwaha Miyo mwaahiyaka enenevelaka mipatta sooreerela sa sooveleela sootheene soopakiwa ni mulokwaaka aYixrayeli?’ 
1Samuel2:30 Tivawo Yave Muluku a aYixrayeli ohimmaawe: ‘Kaaroromeliha weera emusaanyu ni emusi ya atithinyu yaamukirumeela wa mahuku ootheene vamaithoniwaka.’ Vaheera vano Yave onghima: ‘Hata vakhaani! Kinimwaattittimiha yaale ankittittimiha ni yaale ahinkihelela Miyo nkaahelela. 
1Samuel2:31 Yoophiya ehuhu Miyo kineeraaka kimalihe ikurusanyu ni ikuru sa emusi ya atithinyu moota wooweera khakhalaru namuuluvala mweemusinimwanyu. 
1Samuel2:32 Mmoone makacamiho Mpaanimwaka. Naari aYixrayeli siweettelaka nnene, mweemusinimwanyu khaawo anuuluvalaxe." 
1Samuel2:33 Ekhapiraanyu yeeyo kineeraaka kihimalamalihe valtaariniwaka* eniyuureleliwe weera ewiinleleni ni weera yoothananeleni. Aani ekhapiraanyu yootheene eniikhwe eri ekithi. 
1Samuel2:34 Yeeyo eniyaakhumelele anamwaniinyu asilopwana eeli eniikhale eneneerowaanyu – ooweeli eniikhwe nihuku nimoha. 
1Samuel2:35 Kinimwiikhalihera musaserdoti* oororomeleya mwa yoowo aneette ntoko kintthunaaka ni muupuwelowaaka. Kinookhaliha nnenesene emusaawe ni owo onoorumeela mahuku ootheene vamaithoni wa oottikittheliwaaka. 
1Samuel2:36 Ehuhuweene yeeyo ootheene eniihale mweemusinimwanyu eniirwe emukokhorelaka yoowo weera ephwanye nikhoobiri na eparatha* ni yooca vakhaani. Eniimudyoonttelele: “Mukivahe wakhalaru muteko wa esaserdoti weera kiphwanye yooca.”’” 
1Samuel3:1 Mmiravo Samuweli annarumeela vamaithoni wa Yave alamuleliwaka ni Eli. Mahuku ale waakhala woothowathowa waakhela mutthu mutthenga wa Yave, ni nyoonelotho sannahaleela." 
1Samuel3:2 Ohiyu omoha, maitho a Eli ekotakonteene ahoonaka nnenesene, owo aahiixaatalela aakonaawewo." 
1Samuel3:3 Onyaari wa Muluku nlelo weera ohicimphe, ni Samuweli aari yiixaatalelelo Mpaani mwa Muluku, yaaraayamo Arka* a Muluku." 
1Samuel3:4 Vano Yave aamwiitthana mmiravo. Samuweli aamwaakhula: “Kiri va.” 
1Samuel3:5 Owo aatthimakela wa Eli, anamweerela: “Kiri va – pwiiya mookiitthana?” Vaheera Eli aamwaakhula: “Nkiwiitthanne. Ohokoloweke, wakoneke.” Hiiho aarowa, anakona." 
1Samuel3:6 Yave aamwiitthanatho: “Samuweli.” Owo aavenya, anarowa wa Eli eeraka: “Kiri va – pwiiya mookiitthana?” Eli aamwaakhula: “Nkiwiitthanne mwanaka. Ohokoloweke, wakoneke.”" 
1Samuel3:7 Vano Samuweli nlelo khaamusuwenle Yave. Eera ahinaaye wooniheriwa masu a Yave. 
1Samuel3:8 Yave aamwiitthana Samuweli emaara yanaararu. Samuweli aavenya, anarowa wa Eli eeraka: “Kiri va – pwiiya mookiitthana?” Vano Eli aahoona weera ti Yave aamwiitthana mmiravo ole," 
1Samuel3:9 anamweerela: “Oroweke, wakoneke. Owo awiitthanatho, weere: ‘Muluume, Yave, niwoko murumeiyaanyu onimwiiwa.’” Samuweli aarowa okona." 
1Samuel3:10 Vanonto Yave aamwiitthanatho ntoko imaara soopacera: “Samuweli, Samuweli!” Owo aamwaakhula: “Muluume, Yave, niwoko murumeiyaanyu onimwiiwa.”" 
1Samuel3:11 Yave aamweerela Samuweli: “Moone, Miyo kihanle vakhaani opaka etthu mmulokoni mwa aYixrayeli yoottiiha iphumu yaathalihiwaka." 
1Samuel3:12 Ehuhuweene yeeyo kinookwanihera mweemusini ya Eli sootheene kaahimmaaka – okhuma ompacereroni mpaka ommaleloni. 
1Samuel3:13 Kaamuleela weera kinoothoriha emusaawe wa mahuku ootheene niwoko na soottheka sa anamwanaawe mwa seiye owo aasuwenlaawe. Eli aasuwela weera anamwanaawe yannatannya isarasaka vaheera owo khaattaruxa. 
1Samuel3:14 Tivawo kilipelenlaaka emusi ya Eli: ‘Khanileveleliwaru nthowa na emusi ya Eli mwa sooveleela hoye hoye soovaha.’” 
1Samuel3:15 Samuweli aakona mpaka oxa, anahula milako sa Empa ya Yave. Aahoova omuleela Eli moonelo ole." 
1Samuel3:16 Vanonto, Eli aamwiitthana, amweerelaka: “Mwanaka, Samuweli!” Samuweli aamwaakhula: “Kiri va.”" 
1Samuel3:17 Eli aamukoha: “Yave ooleenle eheeni? Ohikikhuwe. Muluku oothorihe vancipale wakikhuwa yakhalaru etthu ooleenlaawe.” 
1Samuel3:18 Vano Samuweli aamuthalihera soothesene ahimukhuwaka etthu. Vahoolowaya Eli aaheera: “Owo ti Yave – apakeke yeeyo enimureerela.” 
1Samuel3:19 Samuweli unnuwaka hiihaale Yave aari ni yoowo akwaniheraka maswaawe ootheene. 
1Samuel3:20 aYixrayeli ootheene okhuma oDani mpaka oBerxeba yaahoona weera Samuweli aahaakhuleliwa ntoko mprofeeti a ekhaikhai a Yave. 
1Samuel3:21 Yave aapwaherera iixooniheraka oXilo, mwa weiwo aamukhumelenlaawe Samuweli mmasunimwawe." 
1Samuel4:1 Masu a Samuweli yaahiiwiwa ni aYixrayeli ootheene. Vano aYixrayeli yaarowa waawanano aFilisti. aYixrayeli yaakonela wEbenezeri ni aFilisti wAfeki. 
1Samuel4:2 aFilisti yaahaareherera anakhottwaaya weera yaawaneno aYixrayeli. aFilisti yaahaawanano woolipaxa aYixrayeli ni aYixrayeli yaawinasiwa ekhwaaka mukhottoni anakhotto macira miloko mixexe. 
1Samuel4:3 Anakhotto ehokoleelakaru waakoneliwe, asitokweene a aYixrayeli yaakoha: “Onihiyenre heeni Yave niwiniwaka ni aFilisti olelo? Nrowe oXilo, naakuxe Arka* a Yave weera awo niroweno, enoopolaka mmatatani mwa amwiittanaahu.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Hiiho yaarumiha oroweliwa oXilo Arka* a wiiraana a Yave a ikuru sootheene arino ehicaawe eriyari ya akerubini*. Vanonto Hofeni ni Pinehasi, anamwane asilopwana eeli a Eli yaahaahoola ni Arka* a wiiraana a Muluku." 
1Samuel4:5 Arka* a wiiraana a Yave evolowakaru waakoneliwe, aYixrayeli ootheene yaakhuwela vancipale mpaka etthaya otetereya." 
1Samuel4:6 Yiiwakaru okhuwela wa aYixrayeli yaakonenlaayawo, aFilisti yaakohana: “Entaphulela eheeni okhuweliwa iwo akonenlaayawo aYixrayeli? Esuwelakaru weera Arka* a Yave aaruuhiwa okonelingwe," 
1Samuel4:7 aFilisti yaahoova, eneera: “Miluku sohoorwa okonelingwe. Nooriheya! Kheenanikhumelele etthu siiyeela." 
1Samuel4:8 Ii! Nnoohaawa! Taani anaanitapuxe mmatatani mwa miluku sooweraxa iyo? Ti milukusene seiye saahoonxe awExipitu ni mahooxo oohiyanahiyana munikareni. 
1Samuel4:9 Mwiilipihe aFilisti! Mukhaleke ni mirima soolipa weera muhithatuwe ipottha sa aHeberi ntoko yaaraaya ipotthasanyu. Mukhaleke ni mirima soolipa ni ngwaneke!” 
1Samuel4:10 Vano aFilisti yaawana, enaawina aYixrayeli, ni aYixrayeli yaatthawela – khula mutthu muheemanimwawe. Aari noomala mutokotoko. Anakhotto a aYixrayeli yaakhwiiye yaari 30 000." 
1Samuel4:11 Arka* a Muluku yaakuxiwa ni anamwane asilopwana eeli a Eli yaahookhwa. 
1Samuel4:12 Nihuku nenenenne muBenyamini aavenya mukhottoni atthimakelaka oXilo, awanreene soothaala ni areene mmuru etthayaru." 
1Samuel4:13 Aaphiyawe, Eli eera akilaantheene vahiceniwawe mukerekhere musewe. Aatthunkuruma awoovelaka Arka* a Muluku. Mulopwana ole aavolowa musidadeni anaathalihera sootheene seereiye ni amaki ootheene a musidade yaakhuwela." 
1Samuel4:14 Eli aahiiwa okhuweliwa iwe, anakoha: “Munyakunyaku owo onghimani?” Mulopwana ole aatthimaka weera amuthalihere Eli sootheene." 
1Samuel4:15 Owo aarino iyaakha miloko mithannamixexe ni ithannatthaaru sa oyariwawawe ni maithwaawe yaakotakota khoona. 
1Samuel4:16 Mulopwana ole aamweerela Eli: “Miyo kinoophiyaru okhottoni kitthangwewo olelo vaava.” Eli aamukoha: “Ekhumelenle eheeni, mwanaka?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Namutthenga ole aamwaakhula: “aYixrayeli ahaatthawa aFilisti ni anakhotto ancipale ahookhwa. Mpaka anamwaniinyu eeli, Hofeni ni Pinehasi ahookhwa ni Arka* a Muluku aakuxiwa.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Owo aaromolakaru Arka* a Muluku, Eli akilaantheene vahiceni aavilikitthuwela ottuli mukerekhere mulako. Aahinteya exikwaawe, anakhwa niwoko aahuuluvala ni aarilalaxa. Aari muhooleli a aYixrayeli wa iyaakha miloko mixexe." 
1Samuel4:19 Mwaara a mwaniye Eli, iitthaniwa Pinehasi eera arupanleene ahaleelaka oyara. Asuwelakaru weera Arka* a Muluku yaakuxiwa ni weera atatawe Eli vamoha ni aiyawe ahookhwa, aakurukuttuwa, anayara. Masooso a mooyarani yaamutepela." 
1Samuel4:20 Ahaleelaka okhwa, asithiyana yaamukhavihera, yaamweerela: “Mulipe murima, moongyara mwaana mulopwana.” Wa soothesene, khaakunle naari khaapwantthe." 
1Samuel4:21 Aamutteha mwaana ole Ikabodi eeraka: “Ovuwa wookoongora oYixrayeli.” Eerenle yeeyo niwoko na okuxiwa wa Arka* a Muluku ni okhwa wa atatawe ni aiyawe. 
1Samuel4:22 Aaheeratho: “Ovuwa wookoongora oYixrayeli niwoko Arka* a Muluku aakuxiwa. 
1Samuel5:1 aFilisti yaakuxaleene Arka* a Muluku, yaahaavenxa wEbenezeri yaaronghaka wAxidoti." 
1Samuel5:2 Vahoolowa yaawiikaathi Arka* mpaani mwa muluku Dagoni mukerekhere mwa ecaambulo ya Dagoni. 
1Samuel5:3 Oxaawaya, amaki a wAxidoti evenyakaru, yaamphwanya Dagoni amonreene ni apopheyeiyeene ohoolo wa Arka* a Yave. Yaamweemexa Dagoni, enamwiikaathi vanipuroniwawe." 
1Samuel5:4 Vaheera oxaawaya epeherenreene ovenya, yaamphwanya Dagoni amonreene ohoolo wa Arka* a Yave! Murwaawe ni nyoonosawe saaposowasa sinamwareela vamulako – eyiitikilaawe paahi ti yaahanle." 
1Samuel5:5 Tivawo mpaka olelo asaserdoti* a Dagoni ni anamalapaawe ootheene a wAxidoti yaavolowaka mpaani mwa Dagoni ahinnyikalaaya vamulako. 
1Samuel5:6 Yave aahaahooxa amaki a wAxidoti ni a mukhwipimwaya, anaamwaraxa yaawo aaruuhelaka anantthweenye." 
1Samuel5:7 Asilopwana a wAxidoti yoonaka yeeyo yeereiye, yaaheera: “Arka* a Muluku a aYixrayeli ehikhaleketho wenno niwoko Owo onnihasula hiyo ni mulukwaahu Dagoni.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Hiiho yaawiitthana asitokweene ootheene a aFilisti, enaakoha: “Niweeriheke hai Arka* a Muluku a aYixrayeli?” Awosa yaahaakhula: “Mwaaronghe Arka* a Muluku a aYixrayeli oGati.” Hiiho yaahaakuxa Arka* a Muluku a aYixrayeli." 
1Samuel5:9 Vaheera, Arka* ephiyakaru, Yave annaahasula amaki a esidadeene yeele, aarukureerihaka nyuru. Owo aahasula muloko wa esidade ele okhuma amiravo ni asitokweene ni ikwerere sa anantthweenye." 
1Samuel5:10 Hiiho yaahaarumihela Arka* a Muluku wEkeroni. Vano Arka* a Muluku evolowakaru wEkeroni, amakaaya yaakhuwela: “Awosa Yaaruuhenle nno Arka* a Muluku a aYixrayeli weera enniive hiyo ni mulokwaahuweene." 
1Samuel5:11 Vanonto yaawiitthana asitokweene ootheene a aFilisti, enaweerela: “Mwaahokoloxe Arka* a Muluku a aYixrayeli yakhale yaaraaya. Mwaaheera hiiho awo anooniiva hiyo ni mulokwaahuweene. Yeerenle yeeyo niwoko waakhala orukureereya nyuru woowiiva esidade yootheene; Muluku annaahooxa amaki a weiwo." 
1Samuel5:12 Yaale yahaakhwiiye yaahaawa ni anantthweenye ni wiikhupanyera wa esidade waahiiwanyeya wiirimu. 
1Samuel6:1 Saakwanelaaya nyeeri mithannamiili Arka* a Muluku ereene mweelaponi ya aFilisti," 
1Samuel6:2 aFilisti yaawiitthana asaserdoti* ni anahako, enaakoha: “Niweeriheke hai Arka* a Yave? Munileele moota nneeraahu naahokoloxere onipuroniwaya.”" 
1Samuel6:3 Awosa yaawaakhula: “Nyuwosa mwaahokoloxaka Arka* a Muluku a aYixrayeli, muhaarumihe woohikhala etthu, mene murumiheketho yoovaha yooleveleelela nthona. Vano munoolamihiwa ni munoosuwela etthu oohooxenraaweni Muluku.”" 
1Samuel6:4 aFilisti yaahaakoha: “Yoovaha heeni yoolivela yoottheka nneeraahu naarumihele?” Awosa yaawaakhula: “Murumihe moota mithanu sa anantthweenye a eyuuma yoorikaxa ni makhule mathanu a eyuumeene yeeyo muttharihaka waatta wa asitokweene a aFilisti ni mahooxoweene yaawo yoophwanyanseni nyuwosa ni asitokweenaanyu. 
1Samuel6:5 Mpatthe icaambulo sa anantthweenye ni makhule, mwa yaawo amwareenle mulaponi ni munttittimihe Muluku a aYixrayeli. Apaale Owo anaakurunuxe woohooxani nyuwo, milukusanyu ni elapwaanyu." 
1Samuel6:6 Munuumela heeni mirimasanyu ntoko awExipitu ni Farawu*? Muluku aattarunxeene wootepaxa, yaahingyaaya aYixrayeli epwahaka." 
1Samuel6:7 Vano, mureherere ekaaro enyowani entthukeleliwa imombe piili sooyara vaanaanoru mwa seiyo sihitonke ovarihiwa muteko. Mwatthukelelemo ekaaro, mene mwaavenxewo axaana mwaavoleihaka munikhoolani." 
1Samuel6:8 Hiiho mwaawelihe Arka* a Yave mukaaroni, muhelaka itthu icaambulo sa eyuuma yoorikaxa mukerekhere ekaaxa ntoko yoovaha yoolivela soottheka. Vano murumihe ekaaro," 
1Samuel6:9 ni ngwehexexeke. Eyo yarowa mulaponimwaya, eyo tiiyo oBeti-Xemexi, vano ti Yave oniruuhenle nihooxo ntokotoko nna. Vaheera, eyo yaahirowa, nnoosuwela weera khanihiyono ntata na Yave ninihooxiye, ni weera itthusene seiye saanimorenle ni erisa.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Vanonto yaapaka yeeyo. Yaavara imombe ithiyana piili sa axaana, enatthukelela vakaaroni, enaawalela axaanaaya munikhoolani." 
1Samuel6:11 Yaahaaweliha Arka* a Yave mukaaroni vamoha ni ekaaxa ya makhule a eyuuma yoorikaxa ni icaambulo sa anantthweenye. 
1Samuel6:12 Imombe iye saarowa oBeti-Xemi siveelaka musewe ni sikhuwelaka ehuhu yootheene. Iye khasaahapuwela otthu. Asitokweene a aFilisti yaatthara mpaka omwiinanoni wa oBeti-Xemexi. 
1Samuel6:13 Amaki a oBeti-Xemexi yeera ehephaka etrigu vanreyareyani ewoonakaru Arka*, yaahakalalaxa." 
1Samuel6:14 Ekaaro yaaphiya mmatta mwa Yoxuwa a oBeti-Xemexi ni iwe yaaheemela mukerekhere mwala mutokotoko. Atthu yaathikila itthaabwa sa ekaaro eniiva imombe ntoko sooveleela soohisa wa Yave. 
1Samuel6:15 aLeevi yaahaakuruxa Arka* a Yave vamoha ni ekaaxa yaarino icaambulo sa eyuuma yoorikaxa, eniikaathi vamwala mutokweene. Nihuku nenenenne amaki a oBeti-Xemexi yaampakela Yave sooveleela soohisa ni soohihisa." 
1Samuel6:16 Asitokweene athanu a aFilisti yaahoona sootheene seiye, enahokoleela wEkeroni nihuku nenenenne." 
1Samuel6:17 aFilisti yaamurumihenle Yave ntoko yooveleela mwa nthowa anantthweenye ale a eyuuma yoorikaxa: Mmoha mmoha wAxidoti, oGaza, wAxekeloni, oGati ni wEkeroni." 
1Samuel6:18 Waatta wa makhule a eyuuma yoorikaxa waattharihiwa waatta wa isidade sa aFilisti, saari sa asitokweene athanu – okhuma isidade soolipihiwa mpaka mittetthe sa mmamattani. Vamwala mutokweene vaavaawo yaawiikaathiyaayawo Arka* a Yave mpaka olelo ti namoona mmatta mwa Yoxuwa a oBeti-Xemexi." 
1Samuel6:19 Vanonto, Yave aawiiva akina a amaki a oBeti-Xemexi. Asilopwana miloko mithannamiili yaahookhwa niwoko na othurumela mwa Arkani* a Yave. Muloko waalalamika niwoko na omala wa atthu Yave aapankaawe." 
1Samuel6:20 Asilopwana a oBeti-Xemexi yaakoha: “Taani anaawere opwaherera okhala vamaithoni wa Yave, Muluku ootteela ola? Nnimurumihele taani Arka* ala weera ekhale ottaiwahu?”" 
1Samuel6:21 Vano yaahaarumihela anamitthenga oKiriyati-Yeharimi yeeraka: “aFilisti ahaahokoloxa Arka* a Yave. Ngweeke ni mwaakuxe.” 
1Samuel7:1 Asilopwana a oKiriyati-Yeharimi yaahoorwa, enaakuxa Arka* a Yave. Yaahaaroiha wa Abinadabi vanttumuxani, enamvariha mwanawe Eleyazari weera aakosoope Arka* a Yave." 
1Samuel7:2 Vano Arka* a Yave yaakhala oKiriyati-Yeharimi wa ehuhu yincipale, wookwanaka iyaakha miloko miili, ni muloko wa aYixrayeli wannamudyoonttelela Yave." 
1Samuel7:3 Samuweli aaheerela muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli: “Mwatthuna omuhokoleela Yave ni murimaanyu wootheene, vano mvenxe miluku sikina variyariwanyu nitho miluku sikina siniitthaniwa Axetoroti ni vahoolowaya mumvahe mirimasanyu Yave munrumeelaka Yoowo paahi. Owo onoowoopolani mmatatani mwa aFilisti.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Hiiho aYixrayeli yaavenxa milukusaya sa aBahali* ni Axetoroti, enamurumeela Yave paahi." 
1Samuel7:5 Vano Samuweli aaweerela: “Mwaathukumanyihe aYixrayeli ootheene oMizepa ni miyo kinimoovekelelani wa Yave.” 
1Samuel7:6 Ethukumanneene oMizepa, yaarika maahi, enayeehera vamaithoni wa Yave. Nihuku nenenenne yaatthuka ni yaalapa sootthekasaya yeeraka: “Noomutthekela Yave.” Ti oMizepa Samuweli aahoolenlaawe aYixrayeli ntoko mphuki." 
1Samuel7:7 aFilisti yiiwaka weera aYixrayeli yaathukumana oMizepa, asitokweene a aFilisti yaahoorwa weera yaawaneno. Vano aYixrayeli yaasuwenlaaya yeeyo, yaawoova." 
1Samuel7:8 Yaamweerela Samuweli: “Muhihiyerere onivekelela wa Yave Mulukwaahu weera anoopole mmatatani mwa aFilisti.” 
1Samuel7:9 Samuweli aamukuxa mwaaputtiputthi aamwa, anamveleela mpurukuma ntoko yooveleela yoohisa wa Yave. Owo aamudyoonttelela Yave mwaha wa aYixrayeli ni Yave aamwaakhula." 
1Samuel7:10 Samuweli apakaka yooveleela yoohisa hiihaale, aFilisti yaawaattamela weera yaawaneno aYixrayeli. Vaheera nihuku nenenenne Yave aawoopela etari etokotoko aFilisti aarukureerihaka nyuru moota wooweera yaawiniwa ni aYixrayeli." 
1Samuel7:11 Anakhotto a aYixrayeli yaavenyasa oMizepa, enaattharelela aFilisti, ewiivaka mmuseweni mpaka oxepani wa oBeti-Kari." 
1Samuel7:12 Vano Samuweli aakuxa nluku aniikaathi eriyari ya oMizepa ni oXeni. Aatteha nipuro nne Ebenezeri, eeraka: “Mpaka va Yave oonikhavihera." 
1Samuel7:13 Hiiho aFilisti yaawiniwa ehihokoleelakatho mweelaponi ya aYixrayeli. Mweehuhuni yootheene ya Samuweli Yave annawiitta aFilisti. 
1Samuel7:14 Isidade saawiniwe ni aFilisti yaahokoloxeriwa aYixrayeli okhuma wEkeroni mpaka oGati. aYixrayeli yaakuxa ilapo sa mukhwipimwaya saalamuliwa ni aFilisti. Waakhala murettele variyari wa aYixrayeli ni awAmori. 
1Samuel7:15 Samuweli aapwaherera okhala mphuki a aYixrayeli wa okumaawe wootheene. 
1Samuel7:16 Khula eyaakha annaviravira oBeteli, oGiligali ni oMizepa aphukaka milattu sa aYixrayeli mmapuroni ootheene ale." 
1Samuel7:17 Mene imaara sootheene annahokoleela oRama mwa weiwo yaaraayawo empaawe. Iwe owo aahoolela aYixrayeli ntoko mphuki. Aahaatekawo altaari* amuttittimiherelaka Yave. 
1Samuel8:1 Samuweli uuluvanlaawe, aahaakhaliha anamwanaawe ntoko ahooleli a aYixrayeli." 
1Samuel8:2 Nsina na ntthaaranawe naari Yoweli ni anaaveeli iitthaniwa Abiya. Awosa yaari ahooleli a oBerxeba. 
1Samuel8:3 Wa soothesene, anamwanaawe khayaattharinghe ephiro ya Samuweli. Awosa yaatholela nihootthanaya; yaakhulelaka makhwankwa ni evaanyaka ekhaikhai." 
1Samuel8:4 Tivawo asitokweene ootheene a aYixrayeli yaathukumannaaya, enamwaattamela Samuweli oRama." 
1Samuel8:5 Yaamweerela: “Nyuwo mohuuluvala ni anamwaniinyu khaantthara ephirowaanyu. Vano mumvare mwene weera anihoolele, ntoko miloko sootheene sikina siraayano.”" 
1Samuel8:6 Vanonto, awosa yeerakaru: “Munivarele mwene weera anihoolele,” Samuweli khaahakalanle ni owo aamvekela Yave." 
1Samuel8:7 Yave aamwaakhula: “Mwaakhulele sootheene muloko wa atthu woovekenlaayani. Khayookhoontteni nyuwo; akikhoontte Miyo weera kihikhale Mwenaaya. 
1Samuel8:8 Hiiho ntoko yaakipakelaaya okhuma nihuku nenenenne kaakhuminghaaka wExipitu mpaka olelo ekikhoottaka Miyo ni elapaka miluku sikina, anoopakelanitho nyuwo." 
1Samuel8:9 Vano mpake yeeyo avekenlaaya, mene ngwooperere nnenesene ni mwaasuwelihe moota mwene aneeraawe aalamule.”" 
1Samuel8:10 Samuweli aahaathalihera masu ootheene a Yave yaale yaamvekenle mwene. 
1Samuel8:11 Aaweerela: “Mwene anoolamulaseni anoosuweliheni yoophwanelaawe ela: Owo anaakuxe anamwaniinyu asilopwana weera erumeele ikaarosawe sa ekhotto ni sa ikavalusawe* ni awo eniitthimake ohoolo wa ikaarosene seiyo. 
1Samuel8:12 Owo anaakhalihe akina ntoko asitokweene a macira muloko ni akinatho a miloko mithanu. Akina anoolima ni anoohepha mmattamwawe ni akinatho anoopaka ikapwitthi sa ekhotto ni ikaruma sa ikaarosawe sa ikavalu*. 
1Samuel8:13 Anoolamula weera anamwaniinyu asithiyana ekhale anamweeka a makhura oowunkhela, anamatterekha ni anamooxa a ipaawu." 
1Samuel8:14 Anaawaakheeni imattasanyu sooreerela ni imattasanyu sa iwuuva* ni sa sooliveira* aavahaka arumeiyaawe. 
1Samuel8:15 Anaawaakheeni mpatta wanaamuloko wa irorosanyu ni wa soohepha sa iwuuva* aavahaka asitokweenaawe ni arumeiyaawe. 
1Samuel8:16 Anaawaakheenitho ipotthasanyu ilopwana ni ithiyana weera emvarelase mutekwaawe, nitho sooreerela sa imombesanyu ni abuurwaanyu." 
1Samuel8:17 Anaawaakheeni mpatta wanaamuloko wa mihuwosanyu ni nyeenyuweenesa munoothatuwa ipotthasawe. 
1Samuel8:18 Nihuku nno nyuwo munoomukhuwelela Yave niwoko na mwene mwaamuthanlalaanyu asineenaanyu, mene Yave kharwa awiiwaani.”" 
1Samuel8:19 Wa soothesene, muloko khawaatthuna omwiiwa Samuweli. Waaheera: “Hoye! Nintthuna okhalano mwene." 
1Samuel8:20 Vano, nnookhala ntoko miloko sikina sootheene nilamuliwaka ni mwene anihoolelaka mukhottonimwahu.”" 
1Samuel8:21 Samuweli iiwaka sootheene muloko waahimmaaya, aaphitela maswaaya oholo wa Yave." 
1Samuel8:22 Yave aamwaakhula: “Ngwaakhulele ni mwaavahe mwene.” Vano Samuweli aaweerela aYixrayeli: “Khula mutthu ahokoleeleke esidadaawe.” 
1Samuel9:1 Aakhala muBenyamini oosuwanyeya iitthaniwa Kixi, mwaana mulopwana a Abiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Zerori, mwaana mulopwana a Bekorati, mwaana mulopwana a Afiya, a epuumba ya Beyamini." 
1Samuel9:2 Aakhalano mwaana mulopwana iitthaniwa Sawuli, mmiravo oophwaneliwa oohilikanxereya variyari wa aYixrayeli. Atthu oorakamaxa yaamukotela mmakhatani." 
1Samuel9:3 Vano abuuru a Kixi, atithawe Sawuli yaariheya. Kixi aamweerela Sawuli: “Omukuxe murumeiyi mmoha vamoha ni weyo ni wawaasaase abuuru ooriheya.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Awosa yaavinuwa nyaako sa wEfrayimi ni elapo ya oXalixa, mene khayaaphwannye abuuru. Yaapwaherera enavolowa elapo ya oXaalimi, mene abuuru khayaariwo. Vahoolowaya yaaphutula elapo ya oBenyamini, hata weiwo khayaaphwannyewo." 
1Samuel9:5 Yaaphiyalaaya elapo ya oZufi, Sawuli aamweerela murumeiyi aaraaweno: “Nrowe nihokolowe, niwoko napisatho, atithaka anoohiya owuupuwelela abuuru enuupuwelelaka hiyo.”" 
1Samuel9:6 Vano, murumeiyaawe aamwaakhula: “Moone, musidadeni ela ookhala mulopwana a Muluku oottittimiheya. Sootheene owo onghimaawe sinimweereya. Nrowe namuulumane. Apaale owo onoonithoonyera ephiro yookuxera.”" 
1Samuel9:7 Sawuli aamweerela murumeiyi: “Narowa, nnamvaheni? Poosowaahu oomala. Khaninonoru yoomvaha mulopwana a Muluku. Nnamvaheni?”" 
1Samuel9:8 murumeiyi aamwaakhula: “Kookhalano mpatta mukhaani wa eparatha*. Kinoomvaha mulopwana a Muluku weera anithoonyere ephiro yookuxera.” 
1Samuel9:9 Khalayi oYixrayeli, mukina aarowaawe waasaasa otthuna wa Muluku, eera: “Nrowe, namukohe namoonihera*, niwoko khalayi mprofeeti iitthaniwa ‘namoonihera*’.”" 
1Samuel9:10 Sawuli aamwaakhula: “Paahi. Nrowe.” Vano, yaarowa wa esidade aakhalaawewo mulopwana a Muluku." 
1Samuel9:11 Ewelasaka nttumuxa weera ephiyase musidade, yaahaakhumanano asimwali akina yaarowasa orika maahi. Yaahaakoha: “Namoonihera* ori musidadeni muumu?”" 
1Samuel9:12 Awo yaahaakhula: “Aani. Ori muhoolo mmo. Mwaakuveke – ophiyale olelo va musidadenimwahu, niwoko amaki anrowa opaka yooveleela vanttumuxani." 
1Samuel9:13 Mwavolowaru musidade, munoomphwanya ahinaaye owela vanttumuxani weera ace. Amaki kheepacera oca owo ahinaaye ophiya, niwoko owo ontthuneya oreeliha yooveleela. Vahoolowaya ancaaya oolattuliwa. Murowe vaanaanova, munoomphwanya ahinaaye.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Yaarowasa wa esidade ni evolowaka, Samuweli ti aarweelaawe mpatta yaaraaya arowaka wa altaari* vanttumuxani." 
1Samuel9:15 Vano moosiloni mwa orwa wa Sawuli, Yave aamoonihera yeeyo Samuweli moota ola:" 
1Samuel9:16 “Omaalo ehuhuweene yeela, kinimooruuhelani mulopwana mmoha a elapo ya oBenyamini. Mumvare omwene wa aYixrayeli. Owo onimoopola mulokwaaka mmatatani mwa aFilisti. Kohaakhulela mulokwaaka, niwoko okhuwelawaya wookiphwanya.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Samuweli amoonakaru Sawuli, Yave aamweerela: “Ti yoola mulopwana kooleenlaakani. Owo onoolamula mulokwaaka.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Sawuli aamwaattamela Samuweli vamulako wa esidade, anamukoha: “Dyoonte, mukileele eri woowi empa ya namoonihera*?”" 
1Samuel9:19 Samuweli aamwaakhula: “Ti yoomi. Murowe ohoolowaka vanttumuxani, niwoko olelo munimooca ni miyo ni omaalo ohinaxeru kinimooleelani sootheene muntthunaanyu osuwela koohiyekeni murowaka." 
1Samuel9:20 Muhaatthukuruwele abuuru ariheiye mahuku mararu avinre – aaphwanyiwa. Itthu sooreerela sa oYixrayeli ti sawinyu ni emusi yootheene ya atithinyu.” 
1Samuel9:21 Sawuli aamwaakhula: “Miyo muBenyamini – epuumba yooyevaxa eriyari ya ipuumba sikina sa oYixrayeli ni nihimonaka ti noohittittimiheya mmahimoni ootheene a epuumba ya Benyamini. Heeni munkeerelaanyu hiiho?” 
1Samuel9:22 Vano Samuweli aamvoleiha Sawuli ni murumeiyaawe vasaala amulamulaka okilaathi vanipuroni noopacera na oolattuliwa – wookwanaka atthu miloko miraru. 
1Samuel9:23 Samuweli aamweerela namwaapeya: “Mukiruuhele enama kiwinnyerenraakani weera muthokorore.” 
1Samuel9:24 Vano namwaapeya aakuxa enama yaari vakhakopeni, aniikaathi ohoolo wa Samuweli. Samuweli aamweerela Sawuli: “Mwaathokororeliwaanyu ti yeela. Mukhuure, niwoko okhuma ehuhu keenraaka: ‘Kookhalano oolattuliwa,’ mpatta ola mwaathokororeliwe nyuwo wa ehuhuweene yeela. Nihuku nenenenne Sawuli aahooca ni Samuweli." 
1Samuel9:25 Ekhurungweene vanttumuxani evolowaka musidade, Samuweli aahuuluma ni Sawuli vanipathoni na empaawe." 
1Samuel9:26 Oxiiyeene evenyaka mookonani, Samuweli aamwiitthana Sawuli vanipathoni, anamweerela: “Mvenye ni kinimoothoonyerani ephiro yookuxera.” Sawuli aavenya, anakhuma vamoha ni Samuweli." 
1Samuel9:27 Ekhumakaru musidade, Samuweli aamweerela Sawuli: “Munleele murumeiyaanyu weera ahoolele. Murumeiyi ole aarowa ni Samuweli aapwaherera eeraka: Nyuwo muhale vaava ehuhu vakhaani weera koovaheeni, mutthenga wa Muluku.”" 
1Samuel10:1 Vahoolowaya Samuweli aakuxa nipoottoro na makhura, anamiinela mmuru wa Sawuli, anambeca amweerelaka: “Yave ohoottikitthelani ntoko muhooleli a yoohiyeraawe." 
1Samuel10:2 Olelo nyuwo mwaattimulaka, munimwaaphwanya asilopwana eeli vakhiviru wa nihiye na Rakheli, oZeleza, mmwiinanoni wa oBenyamini. Awosa anooweerelani: ‘Abuuru mwa yaawo mungwaasaanyu aaphwanyiwa. Vano atithinyu aahiya waatthukuruwela abuuru anootthukuruwelani nyuwosa. Awo ankohakoha yeeraka: “Nkimphwanye hai mwanaka?”’" 
1Samuel10:3 Okhuma vaavaawo munoopwaherera mpaka muneeraanyu mwaphiye vamwirini mutokotoko oTabori. Mmwawoone asilopwana araru erowaka vaNipuroni Nootteela* na Muluku oBeteleheemu ni mmwaaphwanyewo. Mmoha areeneno ipuri tthaaru, mukina ipaawu tthaaru ni ookisera kacikhi a eviinyu." 
1Samuel10:4 Awosa anoowuulumihani yoovahasakani ipaawu piili ni nyuwo mwaakheleke. 
1Samuel10:5 Vahoolowaya munoorowa oGibeya wa Muluku araayawo anakhotto akina a aFilisti. Mwaattamelaka esidade, munoophwanya mukuttula wa maprofeeti okhuruwaka vanttumuxani owiipaka atthakare, akarakaxa, ampetta ni amakita. Vano awosa anoothalihera otthuna wa Muluku." 
1Samuel10:6 Munepa wa Yave onimoorweelani mukuruni ni nyuwo munoothaliheratho otthuna wa Muluku. Munookhala mulopwana munyowani. 
1Samuel10:7 Hiiho sineeraaya sikwanihereyeke ineneero iyo, mwapake yeeyo eniyooreereleni, niwoko Muluku ori ni nyuwo." 
1Samuel10:8 Muhooleke mpaka oGibeya. Vekhaikhai kinimoowa wa nyuwo weera kapake sooveleela soohisa ni sa murettele. Mwakiwehererewo mahuku mathannameeli mpaka kineeraka kaphiyewo ni vano kinimooleelani yeeyo entthuneya opaka.” 
1Samuel10:9 Samuweli arukunuwaka weera amulaxere Sawuli, Muluku aaceendya murima wa Sawuli ni ineneero sootheene iye saakwaniheriwa nihuku nenenenne." 
1Samuel10:10 Owo aphiyakaru oGibeya, mukuttula mmoha wa maprofeeti waamuciceera; Munepa wa Muluku waamurweela mukuruni ni aapacera othalihera otthuna wa Muluku eriyaraaya." 
1Samuel10:11 Ootheene yaale yaamusuwenle khalayi yoonaka weera eera athaliheraka otthuna wa Muluku vamoha ni maprofeeti, yaakohana: “Emukhumelenle eheeni mwaana mulopwana a Kixi? Weeraka Sawuli mprofeetitho?”" 
1Samuel10:12 Mulopwana mmoha a nipuro nne aakoha: “Atithawe taani?” Hiiho eriyari ya muloko yaapacera yoohimmwa ela: “Sawuli mprofeetitho?” 
1Samuel10:13 Sawuli amalihakaru othalihera otthuna wa Muluku, aarowa vanttumuxani." 
1Samuel10:14 Vano atatawe Sawuli yaamukoha yoowo ni murumeiyaawe: “Nyuwosa mwaari woowi?” Owo aawaakhula: “Naawaasaasa abuuru, mene noonaka weera khanaaphwanya, naarowa wuuluma ni Samuweli.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Atatawe Sawuli yaamukoha: “Samuweli ooleenleni eheeni?” 
1Samuel10:16 Sawuli aawaakhula: “Owo oonileela weera abuuru aaphwanyiwa.” Vano, Sawuli khaathalihenre atatawe yeeyo Samuweli aamuleenlaawe mwaha wa ovariwa omwene." 
1Samuel10:17 Vano Samuweli aahiitthana muloko wa aYixrayeli weera othukumane oMizepa," 
1Samuel10:18 aneerela: “Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Kaahaakhumiha aYixrayeli wExipitu ni kohoovuluxani mwa mukuruni sa awExipitu ni mamwene ootheene yoohooxani." 
1Samuel10:19 Wa soothesene, nyuwosa moomukhootta Mulukwaanyu, mwa Yoowo ongwoopolani mwa sookacamihasanyu sootheene ni othananawanyu. Moheera: ‘Hoye, munivarele mwene.’ Vano mwiixoonihere vamaithoni wa Yave muttharihaka ipuumbasanyu ni mahimwaanyu.’”" 
1Samuel10:20 Samuweli akhuveelihaleene ipuumba sootheene sa aYixrayeli, epuumba ya Benyamini yaathanliwa." 
1Samuel10:21 Vahoolowaya aarongha ohoolo epuumba ya Benyamini wa khula nihimo, ni naathanliwa nihimo na Materi. Woomalihera Sawuli, mwaana mulopwana a Kixi aathanliwa. Vanonto, yaamwaasansaaya, khaaphwanyingwe." 
1Samuel10:22 Vano yaamukohakoha Yave: “Mulopwana owo ohoorwa?” Yave aawaakhula: “Aani, owo iipithihiwe variyari wa mirindi." 
1Samuel10:23 Yaatthimaka, enamukhumihawo. Eemelakaru variyari wa muloko, oorakamaxa yaamukotela mmakhatani." 
1Samuel10:24 Samuweli aaweerela atthu ootheene: “Mmoone mulopwana oothanliwa ni Yave. Mmulokoni wootheene khaawo omulikananne yoola.” Vanonto muloko waakhuwela: “Mwene akhale ni okumi wa mahuku mancipale!” 
1Samuel10:25 Samuweli aathalihera muloko malamulo a omwene. Aalepa mulivuruni, anahela vamaithoni wa Yave. Vahoolowaya Samuweli aalamulela muloko ohokoleela mmawannyaya." 
1Samuel10:26 Sawulitho aahokoleela owannyawe oGibeya ahooliweene ni anakhotto ooweraxa, mwa yaawo Muluku aatamvaawe mirimasaya." 
1Samuel10:27 Vaheera alavilavi akina yaaheera: “Anaanitapuxe hai mulopwana owo?” Yaamveihera ehimuruuhelaka samahala. Mene Sawuli aamaala. 
1Samuel11:1 Vano Nataxi, ngwAmoni, aarowa oYabexi-Giliyade, anarica. Asilopwana ootheene a oYabexi yaamweerela: “Niiraaneke, weera munilamule.”" 
1Samuel11:2 Vaheera Nataxi, ngwAmoni, aawaakhula: “Kazoola niitho na moono mulopwana na khula mutthu a nyuwo, kinoowiiraananani. Hiiho kineeraaka kiwuulihihe muru aYixrayeli ootheene.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Asitokweene a oYabexi yaamwaakhula: “Munivahe mahuku mathannameeli weera naarumihele anamitthenga elapo yootheene ya aYixrayeli. Aahikhala oonikhavihera, nnimwiixinnyerera.”" 
1Samuel11:4 Anamitthenga ephiyakaru oGibeya aakhalaawewo Sawuli yaathaliheraka atthu masu ale, ootheene yaakhuwela yiinlaka." 
1Samuel11:5 Ehuhuweene yeele Sawuli eera ahokolowaka ni imombesawe wuucihani anakoha: “Ekhumelenle eheeni ni muloko? Oniinlelani?” Vano awosa yaamuthalihera yeeyo asilopwana a oYabexi yaahimalaaya. 
1Samuel11:6 Sawuli iiwakaru maswaaya, Munepa wa Muluku waamurweela mukuruni ni owo aanyoonyiwa." 
1Samuel11:7 Aakuxa imombe ilopwana piili, anakakatthanya intthuri intthuri, anaarumihela aYixrayeli ootheene awinnyereraka anamitthenga eeraka: “Sineera sikhumeleliwe imombe ti seiya wa yaawo eneera ehimutthare Sawuli ni Samuweli.” Vano woopiha wa Yave waasareya mmulokoni ni ootheene yaahoorwa ni murima mmoha." 
1Samuel11:8 Asilopwana aathukumanyinghaawe Sawuli oBezeki yaari a oYixrayeli 300 000 ni a oYuda 30 000. 
1Samuel11:9 Yaaweerela anamitthega oYabexi: “Mwaaleele asilopwana a oYabexi-Giliyade: ‘Omaalo nsuwa vamuru, munootapuxasiwa.’” Anamitthenga yaarowa, enaathalihera asilopwana a oYabexi Giliyade masu ale ni asilopwaneene yaale yaahakalalaxa." 
1Samuel11:10 Amaki a oYabexi-Giliyade yaaweerela awAmoni: “Omaalo hiyo nnimwiixinnyerera wa nyuwo weera munipakele yeeyo muntthunaanyu.” 
1Samuel11:11 Oxaawaya Sawuli aahaakawanyiha anakhottwaawe mipatta miraru. Okelaka ni oxa yaaphutuwela yaakonenlaayawo awAmoni ewiivaka mpaka othana. Yaale yaahanle ni okumi yaamwareyasa moota wooweera khula mutthu aari meekhaawe. 
1Samuel11:12 Vano muloko waamweerela Samuweli: “Taani yeenre: ‘Weeraka Sawuli anaanilamule?’ Muniruuheleke asilopwana awo weera niwiive.” 
1Samuel11:13 Wa soothesene, Sawuli aawaakhula: “Khaawo aniiviwe olelo, niwoko nihuku nna Yave oowoopola aYixrayeli.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Samuweli aaheerela muloko: “Nrowe oGiligali weera naakhulelewo omwene.” 
1Samuel11:15 Vanonto muloko wootheene waarowa oGiligali, onamvara omwene Sawuli vamaithoni wa Yave. Yaapakawo sooveleelela murettele ohoolo wa Yave ni Sawuli vamoha ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaahakalalaxa." 
1Samuel12:1 Samuweli aaheerela muloko: “Kohaakhulela sootheene mwaakivekenlaanyu koovarelakani mwene. 
1Samuel12:2 Vano mookhalano mwene anoolamulaseni. Wa miyo, kohuuluvala munoonelaanyu ipwi iya. Anamwanaaka asilopwana ari va ni nyuwo. Kookhala ni nyuwo koohoolelakani okhuma enamwanaaka mpaka olelo." 
1Samuel12:3 Kiri va. Mukhalele onamoona vamaithoni wa Muluku ni oottikittheliwaawe: Emombe hoye hoye buuru awani kimwiiyalaaka? Ookhala kimulokontthaaka? Ookhala kimuhoonxaaka? Wa taani kaakhelenlaaka makhwankwa weera kikuttelele nthowanawe? Kaapanke yakhalaru etthu ya seiyo, kinoohokoloxa.”" 
1Samuel12:4 Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Nyuwo khamunihooxale hata khamunihasunle naari khamwaakhelenleru makhwankwa.” 
1Samuel12:5 Samuweli aaweerela: “Yave ni oottikittheliwaawe ari anamoonaanyu olelo weera nyuwosa khamphwannyeru nthowa mookumunimwaka.” Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Yave ti Namoona.” 
1Samuel12:6 Vano Samuweli aaheerela muloko: “Ti Yave aamuthanlale Moisesi ni Aharoni aakhumihaka makholowaanyu wExipitu. 
1Samuel12:7 Vano mukhalase va, niwoko kinimoosomelelani vamaithoni wa Yave, kittharihaka miteko soororomeleya sipakiwe ni Yave aweerelakani nyuwo ni makholowaanyu." 
1Samuel12:8 Avolongweene Yakobe wExipitu, aYixrayeli yaamukhuwelela Yave ni Owo aamurumiha Moisesi ni Aharoni, weera aakhumihe makholowaanyu wExipitu ni awiikaathi nipuro nna." 
1Samuel12:9 Vanonto, makholowaanyu yaamuttiwala Yave Mulukwaaya, tivawo Owo aawinnyerenraawe mmatatani mwa Sisera, mutokweene a anakhotto a Hazori, ni mmatatani mwa aFilisti ni mwene a oMowabe, mwa yaawo yaawananaaya." 
1Samuel12:10 aYixrayeli yaamukhuwelela Yave yeeraka: ‘Noottheka, nimuhiyaka Yave nirumeelaka miluku siniitthaniwa aBahali* ni Axetoroti. Vano, munoopole mmatatani mwa amwiittanaahu ni nnimoorumeelani Nyuwo.’" 
1Samuel12:11 Vano Yave aamurumiha Yeru-Bahali, Baraki, Yefeta ni Samuweli ni owo oowoopolani mmatatani mwa amwiittanaanyu mipatta sootheene. Hiiho mwaakhala oolipeene." 
1Samuel12:12 Mene moonaka weera Nahaxi, mwene a awAmoni aamoorweelani woowananani, mwaakeerela: ‘Hoye, nintthuna weera mwene anilamule, Yave Mulukwaanyu orookhalaru mwene.’" 
1Samuel12:13 Vanonto, mwene munthanlalaanyu ti ola; mulopwana yoola nyuwosa mwaamvekenlaanyu. Yave ohoovahasani mwene." 
1Samuel12:14 Mwatthuna weera sootheene siweetteleni nnene, ontthuneya opaka ha: Omoova Yave; omurumeela; omwiiwelela, ohiramusa malamulowaawe, omutthara Yave Mulukwaanyu – nyuwosa ni mwene." 
1Samuel12:15 Vaheera mwaahimwiiwelela Yave muramusaka malamulowaawe, Owo onimoottaruxani, ntoko aapakenlaawe makholowaanyu." 
1Samuel12:16 Vanonto, mwiireherere ni moone etthu yootikhiniheya eyo Yave aneeraawe apake vamaithoniwanyu!" 
1Samuel12:17 Ela ti ehuhu enghephiwa ya etrigu. Kinoomvekela Yave weera oorumiheleni etari ni epula. Ni nyuwosa munoosuwela yeeyo mpankaanyu yoomunanara Yave woomvekela mwene.” 
1Samuel12:18 Vahoolowaya Samuweli aamvekela Yave ni nihuku nenenenne Owo aarumiha etari ni epula. Vano muloko wootheene waamoovaxa Yave ni Samuweli. 
1Samuel12:19 Muloko wootheene waamweerela Samuweli: “Mumvekele Yave Mulukwaanyu mwaha wa arumeiyaanyu weera nihikhwe niwoko, ohiya soottheka sootheene sikina, noomvekela weera nikhaleno mwene.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Samuweli aahaakhula: “Muhoove. Moopaka itthu soonanara sootheene iye. Hata hiiho, muhihiye omutthara Yave, mene munrumeele ni murimaanyu wootheene." 
1Samuel12:21 Muhitthare miluku soohimuteko, hata sihingwera woopakelani yooreera, niwoko khasimuteko." 
1Samuel12:22 Niwoko na Nsinanawe ntokotoko, Yave kharwa oohiyaani. Owo ohoona oreera wookhalihani mulokwaawexa." 
1Samuel12:23 Wa miyo, nkiweherenre omutthekela Yave kihiyaka woovekelelasani! Kinimooxuttihasanitho ephiro yooreera ni ya ekhaikhai." 
1Samuel12:24 Mmoove paahi Yave, munrumeeleke oororomeleyeene ni murima wootheene ni muupuwelele itthu sootikhiniheya Owo oopakenlaaweni." 
1Samuel12:25 Vaheera, mwapwaherera opaka yoonanara, nyuwosa vamoha ni mwenaanyu munoophwatiwa.”" 
1Samuel13:1 Sawuli apaceraka olamula aarino iyaakha miloko miraru, anaalamula aYixrayeli iyaakha miloko mixexe ni piili." 
1Samuel13:2 Owo aahaathanla asilopwana macira miloko miraru a oYixrayeli; owo aahalanne asilopwana macira miloko miili oMikemaxi ni elapo ya nyaako sa oBeteli, ni akinaawo macira muloko yaahanle ni Yonatani oGibeya, elapo ya Benyamini. Asilopwana yaahanlaawotho aahaahokoloxera mmaheemanimwaya." 
1Samuel13:3 Yonatani aawanano mpatta wa anakhotto a aFilisti oGeba ni aFilisti akinaawo yaaleeliwa yeeyo. Vano Sawuli aalamulela wiipiwa nipalapatta mweelaponi yootheene, aneera: “aHeberi esuwele yeeyo!”" 
1Samuel13:4 aYixrayeli ootheene yaahiiwa ihaali: “Sawuli ohaawanano aFilisti ni vano aYixrayeli aanitathela manyaanya wa aFilisti.” Vanonto, atthu yaahiitthaniwa weera ethukumane ni Sawuli oGiligali." 
1Samuel13:5 Afilisiti yaathukumana weera yaawaneno aYixrayeli. Yaarino ikaaro sa ikavaalu macira miloko miraru; anamweettiha ikaarosene seiye macira miloko mithannamosa ni waatta wa anakhotto waari ntoko ehaava ya mphareiya. Awo yaarowa oMikemaxi, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa Beti-Aveni, enakonelawo." 
1Samuel13:6 Asilopwana a aYixrayeli yoonaka weera aaxanga, ni weera anakhottwaahu aakacamiheyaxa, yaahiipithasa mmakhukuni ni mmalittini; variyari wa nyala, mmahimeni ni mmattankhini." 
1Samuel13:7 Akina a yaale mpaka yaamulapuwa Yordanu erowaka elapo ya oGadi ni oGiliyade. Sawuli aahala oGiligali ni anakhotto ootheene aaraaweno yaahoovaxa. 
1Samuel13:8 Owo aaweherera wa mahuku mathannameeli – ehuhu yaalamuleliwaaya ni Samuweli, mene Samuweli khaaphingye oGiligali ni anakhotto a Sawuli yaapacera omwaramwareya." 
1Samuel13:9 Vano Sawuli aaweerela: “Mukiruuheleke sooveleela soohisa ni sa murettele.” Ni owo aapaka sooveleela soohisa. 
1Samuel13:10 Amalihakaru opaka soohisa, Samuweli aaphiya ni Sawuli aarowa omuulumiha." 
1Samuel13:11 Samuweli aamukoha: “Mumpakani?” Sawuli aamwaakhula: “Kohoona weera anakhotto yeera emwaramwareyaka ni weera nyuwo khamwaaphiyale ehuhu yiiwananiwe nitho weera aFilisti yaathukumana oMikemaxi. 
1Samuel13:12 Vanonto, kohuupuwela: ‘aFilisti anookiwanano oGiligali ni miyo nlelo kihaasaanse ekhavihero wa Yave.’ Tivawo koonnaaka weera fataari opaka sooveleela soohisa.”" 
1Samuel13:13 Samuweli aamwaakhula: “Moheetta ololo! Khamwiiwelenle nlamulo Yave Mulukwaanyu oovanghaaweni. Mwiiwelenle, saano akhalihaleene omwenaanyu mwaalamulaka aYixrayeli mahuku ootheene." 
1Samuel13:14 Vaheera, vano omwenaanyu khoorwa opwaherera. Yave oomuthanla mulopwana oomusiveliha, anamukhaliha muhooleli a mulokwaawe, niwoko nyuwo khamwiiwelenle Nlamulo na Yave.”" 
1Samuel13:15 Vano Samuweli aavenya oGiligali, anarowa oGibeya, elapo ya Benyamini ni Sawuli aawaalikela anakhotto aaraaweno. Yaaphiyera wookwanaka macira mathannamosa." 
1Samuel13:16 Sawuli aakhala oGibeya, elapo ya Benyamini, vamoha ni Yonatani ni anakhotto yaahanle, vaheera aFilisti yaakonenle oMikemaxi." 
1Samuel13:17 Mukuttula wa anakhotto waavenya yaakonenlaayawo aFilisti ekawanaka mipatta miraru. Mmoha waarowa wOfera, vakhiviru wa Xuwali," 
1Samuel13:18 mukina wookela oBeti-Horoni ni wookisera wookela muttetthe wa omwiinanoni ottuttuwani wa nreyareya na oZeboyimi, ohoolo wa nikare." 
1Samuel13:19 Vanonto ehuhuweene yeele khaariworu namahana a iyuuma mweelaponi yootheene ya aYixrayeli, niwoko aFilisti yaaheera: “Weera aYixrayeli ehihane ikatana ni mavaka!”" 
1Samuel13:20 Tivawo waatthuneyaaya aYixrayeli ootheene orowa wa aFilisti weera yanone ixaruwa, ihipa, ipaso ni icikwaakhwasaya." 
1Samuel13:21 Ononiwa wa ixaruwa ni ihipa waalamuliwa nikhoobiri nikhaanene nimoha ni ononiwa wa ipaso, poxoro a maino mararu ni ikaruma seettiheriwa imombe waalamuliwa makhoobiri meeli makhaanene." 
1Samuel13:22 Hiiho, vanihukuni naawaniwa, khaariworu nakhotto a Sawuli aarino ekatana hoye hoye nivaka mmatatani – paahi Sawuli ni mwaniye Yonatani ti yaarino." 
1Samuel13:23 Vano mpatta wa anakhotto a aFilisti waarowa okhatoni yaari oMikemaxi. 
1Samuel14:1 Nihuku nimoha Yonatani, mwaana mulopwana a Sawuli, aamweerela mmiravowaawe aamkuxera kapwitthi: “Nrowe omukuttulani wa aFilisti ori mpatta mukina.” Wa soothesene, owo khaathalihenre atithawe." 
1Samuel14:2 Sawuli aakilaathiye mukerekhere oGibeya, vathi wa mwiri wa eromazera* oMigeroni. Aakhalano anakhotto macira mathannamosa." 
1Samuel14:3 Variyariwaya aari Abiya areeneno mooxikootti a esaserdoti. Aari mwaana mulopwana a Ahitube, munneiye Ikabodi. Ahitube aari mwaana mulopwana a Pinehasi, mwaana mulopwana a Eli, musaserdoti* a Yave oXilo. Khaawo aasuwenle weera Yonatani aavenya." 
1Samuel14:4 Vano ekhato, mwa weiwo Yonatani aatthunaawe ovira weera aphiye vanipuroni na anakhotto a aFilisti, yaari eriyari ya nyaako miili soorakamela – mmoha wiitthaniwa Bozezi ni mukina Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Mmoha waari mpatta wa ottuttuwani wookela oMikemaxi ni mukina mpatta wa ohitto wookela oGeba. 
1Samuel14:6 Yonatani aamweerela mmiravowaawe aamukuxera kapwitthi: “Nirowe vanipuroni na anakhottweene yaawo oohiineliwa. Yave wookhala woonikhaviheraka, niwoko Yave ongwera ovuluxa aavarelaka muteko hata anakhotto vakhaani hoye hoye ancipale.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Mmiravo aamukuxera kapwitthi aamwaakhula: “Mpake yeeyo munuupuwelaanyu. Miyo kinoorowa ni nyuwo.” 
1Samuel14:8 Yonatani aamweerela: “Nrowe, nilapuwele mpatta wa okhopela wa anakhotto yaawo, naahiyeke weera enoone." 
1Samuel14:9 Awo yaneerela: ‘Muniweherere mpaka niwaattameleni,’ nneemele vanipuroniwahu." 
1Samuel14:10 Vaheera yaneerela: ‘Ngweeke wenno,’ vano nnoorowa vanipuroniwaya ni eyo eniikhale eneneerowaahu weera Yave oowinnyerera mmatatanimwahu.”" 
1Samuel14:11 Vanonto ooweeli ale yaahiixoonihera wa anakhotto a aFilisti. Anakhottweene yaale yaaheera: “Ngwoone! aHeberi aniithupulula mmakhukuni yiipinthaayamo.” 
1Samuel14:12 Afilisti a ekhato ele yaamukhuwelela Yonatani ni mmiravowaawe aamukuxera kapwitthi: “Murweeke wenno ni hiyo nnimooxuttihani etthu.” Yonatani aamweerela mmiravowaawe aamukuxera kapwitthi: “Okitthare, Yave oowinnyerera mmatatani mwa aYixrayeli.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Yonatani aahaapasa awelaka mwaako mmiravowaawe aamukuxera kapwitthi amuttharaka. Yonatani aahaamoroxela vathi, mmiravowaawe anawiivakasa." 
1Samuel14:14 Moowanani woopacera iwe, Yonatani ni mmiravowaawe aamukuxera kapwitthi yaawiiva wookwanaka asilopwana miloko miili wa ettima ekhaanene." 
1Samuel14:15 Vano anakhotto ootheene a aFilisti yaapacera woova vancipale – yaale yaari waakonelingwe, mmatta, yaaweene yaari mmapuroni a anamalipelela, mpakatho yaale yaawana. Ni etthaya yaatetereya, onakhala orukureereya nyuru otokotoko waarumihiwe ni Muluku." 
1Samuel14:16 Anamalipelela a Sawuli yaari oGibeya, elapo ya oBenyamini, yaawoonasa anakhotto ancipale a aFilisti etthawelaka mipatta sootheene." 
1Samuel14:17 Vano Sawuli aaweerela anakhottwaawe: “Ngwaalikele anakhotto weera ngwoone yaakwanenle.” Ewaalikelakaru, yaahoona weera Yonatani ni mmiravowaawe aamukuxera kapwitthi khayaariwo." 
1Samuel14:18 Vanonto Sawuli aamweerela Abiya: “Mukiruuhele Arka* a Muluku.” (Ehuhuweene yeele Arka* yaari ni aYixrayeli.) 
1Samuel14:19 Sawuli uulumaka hiihaale ni musaserdoti*, onyakuleleya wa yaakonenlaayawo aFilisti waamutepa. Hiiho Sawuli aamweerela musaserdoti*: “Khoontthuneya waaruuha Arka*.”" 
1Samuel14:20 Vahoolowaya Sawuli ni anakhoottwaawe ootheene yaathukumana, enarowa okhottoni. Yaaphwannye aFilisti oopupurumeene, evulalihanaka ni ikatanasaya." 
1Samuel14:21 aHeberi akina khalayi yaakhalela mpatta wa aFilisti yaarowanne yaakonenlaayawo aFilisti, yaarowasa mpatta wa aYixrayeli yaari ni Sawuli ni Yonatani." 
1Samuel14:22 aYixrayeli ootheene yiipithanse mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi yiiwakaru weera aFilisti aatthawa, yaavolowanotho mukhottoni yaattharelelasaka." 
1Samuel14:23 Nihuku nne Yave aawoopola aYixrayeli ni ekhotto yaapwaherera mpaka mpatta mukina wa oBet-Aveni. 
1Samuel14:24 Vano asilopwana aYixrayeli yaakhulumuwaxa nihuku nenenenne niwoko Sawuli aahaatthuka ni nlipelo eeraka: “Oolaphiwa ti yoowo aneera ace ohinaaye wiila ni kihinaaye owiinlela ikukuttula amwiittanaaka.” Hiiho khaawo aaciiye etthu. 
1Samuel14:25 Anakhotto ootheene yaavolowa ntuphini waaraayamo oravo vathi. 
1Samuel14:26 Evolowakaru ntuphini, yaahoona oravo okhwalalaka, mene khaawo aaciiye yoovaka nlipelo." 
1Samuel14:27 Vaheera Yonatani khaasuwenle nlipelo atithawe yaapakenlaaya anakhotto, moota wooweera aahookolela okhwipi wa ekopo aakuxalaawe, anaxuweya wancerepheni. Acaakaru, aahoona kakhamu." 
1Samuel14:28 Vanonto mmoha a anakhotto aamweerela: “Atithinyu ahaatthuka anakhotto ni nlipelo noolipaxa yeeraka: ‘Oolaphiwa ti yoowo aneera ace olelo.’ Tivawo anakhotto ahilimpaaya.” 
1Samuel14:29 Yonatani aamwaakhula: “Atithaka aaniruuhela erisa. Moone kilawihakaru oravo vakhaani moota kikakhamungwaaka. 
1Samuel14:30 Moota weeraaya oreerele asilopwana yaaciiye olelo vakhaani sa seiye yaahuhunlaaya amwiittanaaya. Waari hiiho, saano yiiviwaleene aFilisti ancipale." 
1Samuel14:31 Nihuku nenenenne aYixrayeli ewiivakaru aFilisti okhuma oMikemaxi mpaka wAyaloni, yaakhulumuwaxa." 
1Samuel14:32 Yaakuxa soohuhulua evaraka ikhondoolo, imombe ni iputtiputthi, eniivela vaavaale, enakhuura ni ephomaaya." 
1Samuel14:33 Vano mmoha aamweerela Sawuli: “Moone, asilopwana animutthekela Yave ekhuuraka enama ni ephomaaya.” Sawuli aaheera: “Khamuroromeleiye! Woowaakuveya, mupirikixele va nluku ntokotoko!”" 
1Samuel14:34 Aapwaherera weera: “Murowe wa asilopwana ni mwaaleele: ‘Khula mutthu a nyuwo akiruuhele imombesawe ni ikhondoolosawe. Mwiive ni mukhuurele vaava. Muhimutthekele Yave mukhuuraka enama ni ephomaaya.’” Ohiyuweene yoole khula mutthu aakuxa emombaawe aniivelawo. 
1Samuel14:35 Vahoolowaya Sawuli aamutekela Yave altaari*. Awo yaari altaari* oopacera aatenkaawe. 
1Samuel14:36 Sawuli aaheeratho: “Nrowe naattharelele aFilisti ni ohiyu naahuhulaka mpaka oxa, niwiivaka ootheene.” Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Mpake yeeyo enooreerelani.” Vaheera musaserdoti* aaheera: “Nimukohakoheke toko Muluku.”" 
1Samuel14:37 Sawuli aamukoha Muluku: “Naatthareleleke aFilisti? Nyuwo munimwaavaherera mmatatani mwa aYixrayeli?” Mene nihuku nne Muluku khamwaakhunle. 
1Samuel14:38 Tivawo Sawuli eenraawe: “Ngweeke wenno, ootheene nyuwosa muri asitokweene a anakhotto weera noonelele yoottheka heeni epakeiye olelo." 
1Samuel14:39 Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave mwa Yoowo owooponle aYixrayeli, hata akhalaka mwanaka Yonatani, iiviweke.” Wa soothesene, khaawo aakhumihale nsu." 
1Samuel14:40 Vahoolowaya Sawuli aaweerela aYixrayeli ootheene: “Nyuwosa mukhale mpattaanyu; miyo ni mwanaka Yonatani nnikhale mpattaahu.” Asilopwana yaamwaakhula: “Mpake yeeyo enooreerelani.” 
1Samuel14:41 Vano Sawuli aamvekela Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli: “Dyoontte, mukoonihere nanthowa.” Vanonto, aathanlenleiye ti Yonatani ni Sawuli vahoolowaya asilopwana akinaawo yaari ootaphuweene." 
1Samuel14:42 Sawuli aaheera: “Mukipakele mwaathanle miyo ni mwanaka Yonatani.” Ni oothanliwa aari Yonatani. 
1Samuel14:43 Vano Sawuli aamweerela Yonatani: “Okithalihere opankaawo.” Hiiho Yonatani aamuthalihera: “Koolawiha oravo vakhaani paahi ni ethoka ya ekopo kaaraakano mmatatanimwaka. Eyo yoophwanela wiiveliwa?” 
1Samuel14:44 Sawuli aamwaakhula: “Muluku akittaruxe moota woonanara weyo waahikhwa, Yonatani.”" 
1Samuel14:45 Vanonto, asilopwana yaamweerela Sawuli: “Yonatani yoola aatapunxe aYixrayeli akhweeke? Eheereye! Ninlipela mwa Nsina na Yave weera ahikhwe, niwoko yeeyo opankaawe olelo yeereiye ni ekhavihero ya Muluku.” Hiiho asilopwana yaamoopola Yonatani ni owo khiiviwe." 
1Samuel14:46 Sawuli aahiya waattharelela aFilisti, ni awosa yaahokoleela mweelaponimwayaxa." 
1Samuel14:47 Vahoolo woovariwa omwene oYixrayeli, Sawuli annaawanano amwiittanaaya a mipatta sootheene: aMowabe, awAmoni, awEdomi, mamwene a oZoba, ni aFilisti. Wa khula mpatta aarowaawe annaahasula." 
1Samuel14:48 Aawana ni oolipeene murima, anaawina awAmaleki aavuluxaka aYixrayeli mmatatani mwa yaale yaahuhula." 
1Samuel14:49 Anamwane asilopwana a Sawuli yaari Yonatani, Yixevi ni Maliki-Xuwa. Nsina na mwanawe muthiyana oopacera naari Merabi ni na ookisera Mikali." 
1Samuel14:50 Nsina na mwaarawe naari Ahinowami, mwaana muthiyana a Ahimahazi. Nsina na mutokweene a anakhotto a Sawuli naari Abeneri, mwaana mulopwana a Neri, atatawe Sawuli." 
1Samuel14:51 Kixi, atithawe Sawuli, ni Neri, atithawe Abeneri, yaari anamwane a Abiyeli." 
1Samuel14:52 Veettiitthuni yaawaniwa ekhotto yoohihiyerereya ni aFilisti moomweneni moothemwene mwa Sawuli. Imaara sootheene Sawuli aamusuwelaawe mulopwana ookhomaala hoye hoye oolipa murima, aamulepela mukhottonimwawe." 
1Samuel15:1 Samuweli aamweerela Sawuli: “Yoole Yave aamuruminghaawe weera oovareni omwene wa mulokwaawe aYixrayeli ti yoomi. Tivawo mwiiwe mutthenga wa Yave. 
1Samuel15:2 Yave a ikuru sootheene eenre ha: ‘Miyo kinimwaattaruxa awAmaleki niwoko na yeeyo yaapakenlaaya aYixrayeli yaawananaka, awosa ekhumaka wExipitu." 
1Samuel15:3 Vano murowe ni mwaawaneno awAmaleki mphwataka soothesene siri sawaya. Muhimuurele mutthu; mwawiiveke asilopwana, asithiyana, anamwane, ooyariwa vaanaano, imombe, ikhondoolo, ikamelu* ni abuuru.’”" 
1Samuel15:4 Hiiho Sawuli aawiitthana anakhotto aathukumanyihaka oTelayimi – anakhotto 200 000 ni asilopwana macira macireene muloko a oYuda. 
1Samuel15:5 Sawuli aarowa esidade ya awAmaleki, anawiipithiha anakhottwaawe munxaapwani." 
1Samuel15:6 Vahoolowaya aaweerela aKeni: “Mvenyase wa awAmaleki weera kihoophwateni vamoha ni yaawo, niwoko mwaawoonihera murima wooreera aYixrayeli yaakhummaaya wExipitu.” Vano aKeni yaavenya wa awAmaleki." 
1Samuel15:7 Vanonto Sawuli aahaawanano awAmaleki ephiroweeneeyo okhuma oHavila mpaka oXuri, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa wExipitu." 
1Samuel15:8 Aamvara Agagi, mwene a awAmaleki, awiivaka atthwaawe ootheene ni ekatana." 
1Samuel15:9 Vaheera Sawuli ni anakhotto yaamuurela Agagi vamoha ni sooreerela sa ikhondoolo ni imombe, aximombe ni iputtiputthi soonenevela – sootheene saari sooreera. Khayaatthunne ophwata itthusene seiye voothevene, vaheera yaaphwata sootheene saari soothanyeya ni soohivareleya muteko." 
1Samuel15:10 Vano Yave aamweerela Samuweli: 
1Samuel15:11 “Koothanana omvarawaka omwene Sawuli niwoko ookihiya ahiiwelelaka soolamulasaka.” Samuweli aahitta, anamukhuwelela Yave ohiyu wootheene ole." 
1Samuel15:12 Oxeexelo aavenya, anarowa omuulumano Sawuli, mene aaleeliwa: “Sawuli oorowa oKarameli weemexawo ecaambulowaawe iittitimiherelaka. Vahoolowaya aarowa oGiligali.”" 
1Samuel15:13 Samuweli aamphwanyakaru, Sawuli aamweerela: “Yave ooreeliheni! Kookwanihera soolamula sa Yave.”" 
1Samuel15:14 Vanonto Samuweli aamukoha: “Vano wiinla heeni wa ikhondoolo ni imombe kiniiwaaka?” 
1Samuel15:15 Sawuli aamwaakhula: “Anakhotto ti aruuhale sa awAmaleki. Ahuurela sooreerela sa ikhondoolo ni imombe weera empakele Yave Mulukwaanyu sooveleela, mene ikina iye noomaliha ophwata.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Samuweli aamweerela Sawuli: “Mmaaleke! Kinimooleelani yeeyo Yave okileenlaawe ohiyu.” Sawuli aamwaakhula: “Haya, okileeleke.”" 
1Samuel15:17 Samuweli aamweerela: “Munimwiiyeviharu, nyuwo moothatuwa muhooleli a ipuumba sa aYixrayeli. Yave ohoovarani omwene wa aYixrayeli." 
1Samuel15:18 Owo ohoorumihani okhottoni aweerelakani: ‘Murowe ni mwaphwateke woomalela muloko ole wa awAmaleki woohiiwelela. Mwaawaneno mpaka muneeraanyu mwaamalihe.’ 
1Samuel15:19 Muhimwiiwelelenleni Yave? Mukuxenreni soohuhula mpakaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave?” 
1Samuel15:20 Sawuli aamwaakhula: “Hoye, koomwiiwelela Yave. Kookwanihera muteko Yave aakirummaawe. Kohaaphwata awAmaleki ni koomuruuha mwenaaya Agagi." 
1Samuel15:21 Anakhotto yaakuxa ikhondoolo ni imombe sooreerela sa soohuhula seiye saatteeliheriwe Muluku weera siphwatiwe yeerelaka omveleelela Yave Mulukwaanyu oGiligali.” 
1Samuel15:22 Vanonto Samuweli aamwaakhula: “Weeraka Yave onsiveliwa ni sooveleela soohisa ni sa inama opwaha wiiwelela maswaawe? Fataari omwiiwelela Yave ohikhanle opaka sooveleela; aani fataari omwiiwa ohikhanle inama sooneneva. 
1Samuel15:23 Vano ovaanya ori ntoko yoottheka ya okhwiri ni ettiyamaaru ntoko yoottheka ya olapa miluku sikina. Mweenre mukhootta masu a Yave, Owo ohookhoottani okhala mwene.”" 
1Samuel15:24 Vano Sawuli aamweerela Samuweli: “Koottheka. Kootupha malamulo a Yave ni ikanosanyu. Kaawoova anakhotto, tivawo kiwaakhulenlaaka." 
1Samuel15:25 Miyo kinoodyoonttelelani – mulevelele yootthekaaka ni muhokolowe ni miyo weera kamulape Yave.” 
1Samuel15:26 Wa soothesene, Samuweli aamweerela: “Nkinghokolowa ni nyuwo. Mookhootta masu a Yave ni Owo ohookhoottani okhala mwene a aYixrayeli!”" 
1Samuel15:27 Samuweli aarukunuwaawe weera apwahe, Sawuli aavara maleembe a mukaandyowaawe ni owo onaahuwa." 
1Samuel15:28 Samuweli aamweerela: “Yave oowaahulani nyuwo omwene wa aYixrayeli olelo ni oomwinnyerera ooreerela woopwahani nyuwo. 
1Samuel15:29 Yoole ori Ovuwa wa oYixrayeli khanootha hata khanceendya soowuupuwelasawe niwoko khahiyono mulopwana ooceendyaceendya.” 
1Samuel15:30 Sawuli aamwaakhula: “Koottheka. Mene dyoontte, mukittittimihe vamaithoni wa asitokweene a mulokwaaka ni wa aYixrayeli; muhokolowe ni miyo weera kamulape Yave Mulukwaanyu.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Vano Samuweli aarowa vamoha ni Sawuli ni Sawuli aamulapa Yave. 
1Samuel15:32 Vanonto Samuweli aaheera: “Mukiruuheleke Agagi, mwene a awAmaleki.” Agagi aarowa ahihovelaka okhwa, uupuwelaka: “Vekhaikhai, woopiha wa okhwa woovira.”" 
1Samuel15:33 Vaheera Samuweli aamweerela: “Mweenre mwaakakatthasa anamwane a asimaayi amayinyutho kheekhalano mwaana variyari wa asimaayi.” Ni Samuweli aamwiiva Agagi ohoolo wa Yave oGiligali. 
1Samuel15:34 Vahoolowaya Samuweli aarowa oRama, vaheera Sawuli aarowa owannyawe oGibeya wa Sawuli." 
1Samuel15:35 Mpaka okhwawawe Samuweli, owo khaarongwe omoonatho Sawuli aaroomuthananelaru. Vano Yave aathananaxa woomvara Sawuli omwene wa aYixrayeli." 
1Samuel16:1 Yave aamweerela Samuweli: “Mpaka yaakhani muneeraanyu mmwiinlele Sawuli, keenre kimukhootta okhala mwene a aYixrayeli? Musarihe nnyakananyu makhura ni mpwaheke oBeteleheemu. Kinimoorumihani wa Yixai. Koomuthanla mmoha a anamwanaawe asilopwana weera avariwe omwene.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Vano Samuweli aamwaakhula: “Kiroweke hai? Sawuli asuwela yeeyo, onookiiva.” Yave aamweerela: “Munkuxe mwaaputtiputthi ni mwamweerele: ‘Kaakenle ompakela Yave yooveleela.’" 
1Samuel16:3 Wuuveleelani iwo, mwamulattule Yixai ni Miyo kinimooleelani yoopaka. Mwamuttikitthele yoowo kineeraaka koothoonyereni.”" 
1Samuel16:4 Samuweli aapaka yeeyo Yave uulummaawe. Aphiyakaru oBeteleheemu, asitokweene a esidade yaamuciceera ethukumelaka ni woova. Awosa yaamukoha: “Munrwa mmuretteleni?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Samuweli aamwaakhula: “Aani, mmuretteleni. Kirweenle ompakela Yave yooveleela. Mwiitteelihase ni murwe wa miyo wuuveleelani.” Vano aamutteeliha Yixai ni anamwanaawe, anaalattula wuuveleelani." 
1Samuel16:6 Awosa ephiyakaru, Samuweli aamoona Eliyabi, anuupuwela: “Vekhaikhai, oottikittheliwa a Yave ti yoola.”" 
1Samuel16:7 Vano Yave aamweerela Samuweli: “Muhiwehexexe ekhalelowaawe naari orakamawawe, niwoko Miyo koomukhootta. Yave khangweha ekhove ntoko mutthu: Mutthu ongweha ekhove, vaheera Yave ongweha murima." 
1Samuel16:8 Vahoolowaya Yixai aamwiitthana Abinadabi, amulamulaka ovira ohoolo wa Samuweli. Vaheera Samuweli aaheera: “Yave khanimuthanlatho yoola.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Vahoolowaya Yixai aamulamula Xama ovira ohoolo wa Samuweli, mene owo aaheera: “Hata yoola.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Mooteene yoowo Yixai aahaalamula athanneeli a anamwanaawe asilopwana wiixoonihera wa Samuweli, mene owo aamweerela Yixai: “Yave khamuthanlaleru a yaala.”" 
1Samuel16:11 Vano aamukoha Yixai: “Anamwane muraanyuno ti yaala paahi?” Yixai aamwaakhula: “Ookhalatho neetthaako, mene owo onciha ikhondoolo.” Samuweli aamweerela: “Aruuhiweke wenno. Hiyo khanica owo ahirwiiye.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Hiiho Yixai aalamulela wiitthaniwa, anarwa. Owo aari ooyareya, a maitho ooreera ni oophwaneliwa. Vanonto, Yave aamweerela Samuweli: “Ti yoola – mweemele, munttikitthele.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Vano Samuweli aakuxa nnyaka noosareya makhura, anamuttikitthela vamaithoni wa axunneiye ni okhuma nihuku nenenenne Munepa wa Yave waamurweela Davide mukuruni. Vahoolowaya Samuweli aahokoleela oRama." 
1Samuel16:14 Munepa wa Yave waamuhiya Sawuli ni munepa woonanara wa Yave wannamuhasula. 
1Samuel16:15 Arumeiyi a Sawuli yaamweerela: “Moone, munepa woonanara wa Muluku onimoohasulani." 
1Samuel16:16 Apwiya yaalamuleleke arumeiyaaya omwaasaasa mmoha ongwera omwiipa makita. Hiiho woorweelakani munepa woonanara wa Muluku, mulopwana owo onoowiipelani makita ni nyuwo munookhurunuwa.”" 
1Samuel16:17 Sawuli aaweerela arumeiyaawe: “Mwamphwanye mutthu oomwiipa nnenesene ni munruuhe nno.” 
1Samuel16:18 Mmoha a arumeiyaawe aamwaakhula: “Koomusuwela mwaana mulopwana mmoha a Yixai a oBeteleheemu ongwera omwiipa makita. Owo ti nakhotto oowera, onnuuluma nnenesene ni oophwaneliwa. Ni Yave ori ni yoowo.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Vano Sawuli aamurumihela Yixai anamitthenga amweerelaka: “Mukirumihele mwaninyu Davide, mwa yoowo onciha ikhondoolo.”" 
1Samuel16:20 Hiiho Yixai aamukuxa buuru alemeliweene sooca, nipoottoro noosareya eviinyu ni epuri emoha, anamurumihela Sawuli vamoha ni mwanawe Davide." 
1Samuel16:21 Davide aahiixoonihera wa Sawuli, anapacera omurumeela. Sawuli annamusivelaxa ni Davide aathatuwa mmoha a amiravowaawe yaamukuxera kapwitthi." 
1Samuel16:22 Vano Sawuli aamurumihela Yixai mutthenga ola: “Munghiyeke Davide apwahereraka okirumeela, niwoko koomuhakalalela.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Imaara sootheene munepa woonanara wa Muluku waamurweelaaya Sawuli, Davide aamukuxa makitaawe, anamwiipa. Vano, Sawuli annakakhamuwa, akhurunuwaka ni munepa woonanara wannamuhiya." 
1Samuel17:1 aFilisti yaahaathukumanyiha anakhottwaaya weera ewane ethukumanaka oSoko, elapo ya oYuda. Yaakonelasa wEfesi-Damimi, eriyari ya oSoko ni wAzeka." 
1Samuel17:2 Sawuli ni aYixrayeli yaathukumana ekonelaka vanreyareyani na wEla. Yaathataanela waawanano aFilisti. 
1Samuel17:3 aFilisti yaakhala vanttumuxani nimoha ni aYixrayeli vanttumuxani nikina, nreyareya nreene eriyaraaya." 
1Samuel17:4 Nakhotto ooweraxa iitthaniwa Goliyati aari muGati, aakhuma yaakonenlaayawo aFilisti. Orakamawawe aahaleenle ophiya imeetru* tthaaru." 
1Samuel17:5 Aawara ekapasete ya ebronze* vamuruwawe ni yoowiixaakihera ya makaangaru a ebronze, olemelawaya waari wookwanaka ikiilu* miloko mithannamosa." 
1Samuel17:6 Mmipandyeni aawara iyuuma sa ebronze* akapantteene nivaka na ebronze. 
1Samuel17:7 Mwiitti wa mvitto wa nivakanawe waalikana etthaabwa ya maakina ootthavelano ni nivakanene naalemela ikiilu* ithannapiili. Mmiravowaawe aamukuxera kapwitthi ti aahoolenle. 
1Samuel17:8 Goliyati aaheemela anaakhuwelela anakhotto a aYixrayeli: “Heeni mwiireherenraanyu weera ngwane? Miyo muFilisti ni nyuwo muri arumeiyi a Sawuli. Munthanleke mulopwana mmoha weera akiwanane. 
1Samuel17:9 Owo awera owana ni miyo, anakiwina, hiyo nnookhala ipotthasanyu, vaheera miyo kamuwina mpaka omwiiva, nyuwosa munookhala ipotthasahu, munirumeelaka.”" 
1Samuel17:10 muFilisti aapwaherera: “Olelo kinimwaaderera anakhotto a aYixrayeli. Mukirumihele mulopwana weera kingwanane.” 
1Samuel17:11 Sawuli ni aYixrayeli ootheene yiiwakaru masu a muFilisti, awosa waawuuma owanoni enatteenguwa." 
1Samuel17:12 Vanonto, Davide aari mwaana mulopwana a ngwEferati iitthaniwa Yixai, mwa yoowo aakhala oBeteleheemu oYuda. Yixai aakhalano anamwane asilopwana athannaararu ni mweehuhuni ya Sawuli Yixai ole aakwaaxeya." 
1Samuel17:13 Anamwane araru oopacera a Yixai yaarowano Sawuli okhottoni. Antthaara iitthaniwa Eliyabi, anaaveeli Abinadabi ni anaararu Xama." 
1Samuel17:14 Davide aari neetthaako. Anamwane araaru oopacera awo yaarowano Sawuli," 
1Samuel17:15 mene Davide annarowa aakonenlaawewo Sawuli, khula emaara ahokolowaka weera acihe ikhondoolo sa atithawe oBeteleheemu." 
1Samuel17:16 Khula oxeexelo ni oxekuwa wa mahuku miloko mixexe, muFilisti annaphiya eemelaka hiihaale." 
1Samuel17:17 Vanonto Yixai aamweerela mwanawe Davide: “Waakuxere axunneiyo ikiilu* miloko miili ni piili sa etrigu yoowaarikiwa ela ni ipaawu muloko iya, otthimakihere okonelingwe." 
1Samuel17:18 Omukuxeretho mutokweene a anakhotto ikeixu* muloko iya. Woone moota araaya axunneiyo ni okiruuhele ihaalisaya. 
1Samuel17:19 Awosa ari ni Sawuli ni asilopwana ootheene a aYixrayeli vanreyareyani na wEla yaawananaka aFilisti.” 
1Samuel17:20 Waaxiiye oxeexeloxa Davide aamuhiyera muhuwo mukukhuli mukina, anamurowano pooso ntoko Yixai aamulamulenlaawe. Aaphingye waakonelingwe anakhotto erowaka othataanela owana ekhuwelelaka ekhotto." 
1Samuel17:21 aYixrayeli ni aFilisti yaathataanelasa owana ooluluwaneene. 
1Samuel17:22 Davide aahiya sootheene aakuxalaawe amuhiyeraka namawehaweha a sooreela sootheene, anatthimakela waawaniwa weera asuwele moota yaaraaya axunneiye." 
1Samuel17:23 Owo uulumaka hiihaale ni yaawosa, Goliyati, muFilisti, namaweraxa owana a oGati, aahaasuseerela aadeereraka aadeererelaawe ni Davide aahiiwa yeeyo." 
1Samuel17:24 aYixrayeli emoonakaru mulopwana ole, yaamwareya emoovaxaka." 
1Samuel17:25 Vano aYixrayeli yaaheerelana: “Moomoona nnenesene mulopwana ole? Owo onoodereratho muloko wa aYixrayeli. Mwene oororomeliha mihakhu sincipale wa yoowo anaamwiive. Mpaka onoomutheliha mwanawe muthiyana ni emusi yootheene ya atithawe kheeliva musoko oYixrayeli.” 
1Samuel17:26 Davide aahaakoha asilopwana aattamannaaweno: “Ntthuvelo heeni aneeraawe aakhele mulopwana yoowo anaamwiive muFilisti owo, aakihaka ottittimiheya wa aYixrayeli? muFulisti heeni yoowo oohiineliwa onaadeerera anakhotto a Muluku mukumi?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Awosa yaamuphitela Davide yeeyo yaahimmaaya emweerelaka: “Ti yeeyo aneeraawe aakhele yoowo anaamwiive.” 
1Samuel17:28 Vano Eliyadabi, amunnawaawe atokweene Davide aamwiiwaawe alokololaka hiihaale ni asilopwana, aamunyoonyeriwaxa, anamukoha: “Orweenleni wenno? Waahingye naani axikhondoolo munikareni? Koosuwela weera weyo ti oowiikuxa ni ootakhala murima. Orweenle woona ekhotto paahi.”" 
1Samuel17:29 Davide aamwaakhula: “Kipankeni? Kimmwaasa wuuluma paahi.” 
1Samuel17:30 Vahoolowaya aamurukunuwela mulopwana mukina, anamukoha mooteene yoowo. Ni mulopwana owo aamwaakhula ntoko woopacera." 
1Samuel17:31 Masu a Davide yaahiiwiwa ni Sawuli, tivawo aaruminghaawe oroweliwa Davide." 
1Samuel17:32 Davide aamweerela Sawuli: “Ahikhale anaamuthukumele muFilisti ole. Murumeiyaanyu onoorowa omuwanano.” 
1Samuel17:33 Sawuli aamwaakhula Davide: Weyo khoophwanenle ongwanano muFilisti ole; ori mmiravo paahi ni owo nakhotto okhuma enamwanaawe.” 
1Samuel17:34 Wa soothesene, Davide aamwaakhula Sawuli: “Murumeiyaanyu onciha ikhondoolo sa atithawe. Vano mwatto hoye hoye ursu* aavaraka ekhondoolo ya muhuwo," 
1Samuel17:35 miyo kinnamuttharelela, kimmanaka ni kimwaakhaka ekhondoolo mmwaanomwawe. Mwaamunama owo akirukunuwela, kinoomvara ittwattwara, kimmanaka mpaka okhwa." 
1Samuel17:36 Murumeiyaanyu aamwiiva mwatto ni ursu*. muFilisti oohiineliwa ole anaakhale ntoko mmoha a yaawosa, niwoko ohaaderera anakhotto a Muluku mukumi." 
1Samuel17:37 Yave, mwa Yoowo okitapunxe mmankharuni a mwatto ni ursu* onookivuluxa mmatatani mwa muFilisti ole.” Sawuli aamweerela Davide: “Orowe. Yave akhaleke ni weyo.”" 
1Samuel17:38 Sawuli aakuxa ikarumasawe sa okhottoni, anangwariha Davide. Aangwariha mmuru ekapasete ya ebronze* ni yoowiixaakihera ya vakakasani." 
1Samuel17:39 Davide aaherera ekatanaawe muyuununi aneerera weetta, niwoko khaakhovelenle seiye. Vano aamweerela Sawuli: “Nkingwera weettano iya, niwoko nkikhovelenle.” Vanonto aarula sootheene." 
1Samuel17:40 Aakuxa ekopwaawe mmatatanimwawe, anathanla maluku mathanu oovilikeya vanxaapwani, anahela mmurupani mwa mukukhuli ni akunxeene ekwambala, aamurowela muFilisti." 
1Samuel17:41 Eyo eri hiiho, muFilisti ni mmiravowaawe aamukuxera kapwitthi areene ohoolowawe, aamuciceera Davide." 
1Samuel17:42 Angwehexexakaru, aahoona weera aari mmiravo paahi oophwaneliwa ni ooreera nnenesene. Ni owo aamveihera Davide." 
1Samuel17:43 Owo aamweerela Davide: “Weeraka miyo mwalapwa mpaka okirweela ni ikopo?” Ni muFilisti aamulapha Davide mwa nsina na milukusawe. 
1Samuel17:44 Aaheeratho: “Orweeke wenno weera kivahe erutthwaawo ipalame sa wiirimu ni axinama a ntuphini!” 
1Samuel17:45 Davide aamweerela muFilisti: “Weyo onkaattamela okunxeene ekatana, nivaka ni momba, vaheera miyo kinimoowanano mwa Nsina na Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a anakhotto a aYixrayeli, mwa yaawosa weyo onaadereraawo." 
1Samuel17:46 Olelo Yave onoowinnyerera mmatatanimwaka ni miyo kinimoohita. Olelo vaava kinoovaha mittembo sa anakhotto a aFilisit ipalame sa wiirimu ni axinama ooluwa a ntuphini ni elapo ya vathi yootheene enoosuwela weera ookhala Muluku oYixrayeli! 
1Samuel17:47 Ootheene ari va eniisuwele weera Yave khangwina avarelaka muteko ekatana hoye hoye nivaka. Ekhotto eri yawawe ni Owo onoowinnyererasani ootheene nyuwo mmatatanimwahu.” 
1Samuel17:48 muFilisti amwaattamelaka weera angwaneno yoowo, Davide aatthimakela yaathatanaayawo aFilisti." 
1Samuel17:49 Aavolongha ntatanawe munrupani, anahawula nluku, anasokotta amvonyaka Goliyati, anammana vayuuci. Nluku nne naahiiwomela vayuuci ni Goliyati aamorela vathi oowiipopheyeene." 
1Samuel17:50 Hiiho Davide aangwina muFilisti ni ekwamba ni nluku nimoha ahikunxeene ekatana, anammoroxa, anammana muFilisti, amwiivaka." 
1Samuel17:51 Davide aatthimaka, anamunyikalela. Aamuhulula ekatanaawe, anamuhitelano yeeyo. Afilisti yoonakaru weera nakhottwaaya ooweraxa ohiiviwa, yaarukunuwa, enatthawa." 
1Samuel17:52 Vano anakhotto a oYixrayeli ni a oYuda yaarowa ohoolo, enakhuwela, enaattharelela aFilisti mpaka vamulako wa oGati ni wa wEkeroni. Mittembo sa aFilisti saasarasara mmuseweni wootheene wa oXaarayimi mpaka oGati ni wEkeroni." 
1Samuel17:53 aYixrayeli ehokolowaka yaattharelenlaayawo aFilisti, yaahuhula sootheene saari yaakonenlaayawo."
