1Samuel17:54 Davide aakuxa muru wa muFilisti, anaroiha oYerusaleemu, aniikaathi ekatana ya muFilisti muheemanimwawe." 
1Samuel17:55 Sawuli amuwehaka Davide amurowelaka omuwanano muFilisti, aamukoha Abeneri, mutokweene a anakhotto a aYixrayeli: “Abeneri, mmiravo ole mwaana awani?” Abeneri aamwaakhula: “Amwene, nkisuwenle hata vakhaani.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Mwene aamweerela: “Mwaasaase waasuwela atitthawe.” 
1Samuel17:57 Davide ahokolowakaru aamwiivalaawe muFilisti, Abeneri aamurongha wa Sawuli. Davide nlelo eera akuxaleene muru wa muFilisti." 
1Samuel17:58 Sawuli aamukoha: “Weyo mwaana awani?” Davide aamwaakhula: “Miyo mwaana a murumeiyaanyu Yixai a oBeteleheemu.” 
1Samuel18:1 Davide amalihakaru wuuluma ni Sawuli, Yonatani ni Davide yaathatuwa asinthamwene xaxaxa. Yonatani aamusivela Davide ntoko aasivelaawe okumaawe." 
1Samuel18:2 Okhuma nihuku nenenenne Sawuli aalamula weera Davide akhale ni yoowo ahimutthuniheraka ohokoleela wa atithawe. 
1Samuel18:3 Vano Yonatani aahiiwanano opaka onthamwene ni Davide niwoko aamusivela ntoko aasivenlaawe okumaawe. 
1Samuel18:4 Owo aarula mukaandyowaawe ni soowarela sa ekhotto aakunxaawe, anamvaha Davide, mpakatho ekatanaawe, muupa ni laamba." 
1Samuel18:5 Davide annakwanihera miteko sootheene Sawuli aamulamulelaawe opaka moota wooweera Sawuli aamukhaliha vanipuroni noottittimiheyaxa variyari wa anakhotto. Eyo yaasiveliha muloko nitho asitokweene a anakhotto a Sawuli. 
1Samuel18:6 Anakhotto yaahokoleelaaya owaani Davide amwiivaleene muFilisti, asithiyana ootheene a isidade sa oYixrayeli yaamuciceera mwene Sawuli. Yaakhuma yiipaka ni yiinaka ni akarakaxa, icipo soohakalaliha ni makita a ifiiyu tthaaru." 
1Samuel18:7 Awosa yiinaka, yaahiipa: “Sawuli oowiiva ancipale ni Davide oowiiva woopwahaxa.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Sawuli aanyoonyiwa niwoko na ecipo ele ni atoxengyeene aahuupuwela: “Awosa aneera weera Davide oowiiva atthu oopwaha yaale kiwiivalaaka. Owo onghaleela omvara omwene!” 
1Samuel18:9 Vano okhuma ehuhuweene yeele Sawuli annamukhalela nrima Davide. 
1Samuel18:10 Oxaawaya munepa woonanara waarumihiwe ni Muluku waamukhuruwela Sawuli ni ikuru ni aamuttittimuwa mpaanimwawe. Davide eera amwiipaka makita ntoko aakhovelenlaawe. Vano Sawuli avarenleene nivaka," 
1Samuel18:11 aamvonyera eeraka: “Kimphitaanyere Davide vaxirini.” Vaheera Davide aarapela veeli. 
1Samuel18:12 Sawuli ammoova Davide, niwoko Yave aari ni Davide, vaheera aamuhiya Sawuli." 
1Samuel18:13 Hiiho aamurumiha Davide ottaiwawe, amukhalihaka mutokweene a anakhotto macira muloko, mwa yaawo Davide aaweettanaawe mukhottonimwawe." 
1Samuel18:14 Sootheene Davide aapakaawe sannamweettela nnenesene, niwoko Yave aari ni yoowo." 
1Samuel18:15 Sawuli oonaka moota itthu sootheene saamweettelaaya nnene, annamoova Davide." 
1Samuel18:16 Vaheera atthu ootheene a oYixrayeli ni oYuda yannamusivela, niwoko owo annaweettiha mukhottonimwaya." 
1Samuel18:17 Sawuli aamweerela Davide: “Ori va mwanaka muthiyana a ntthaara, Merabi. Kinimoovaha weera omuthele, keerelaka weera okirumeeleke paahi ntoko nakhotto oolipa murima ohoolelaka ikhotto sa Yave.” Vanonto, Sawuli mmurimanimwawe uupuwela: “Kihimwiive; aFilisti emwiiveke!”" 
1Samuel18:18 Vano Davide aamweerela Sawuli: “Miyo ni emusaaka khaninttittimiheya oYixrayeli. Tivawo kihiphwanenlaaka okhala mukamwene a mwene.” 
1Samuel18:19 Vaheera yaaphiyeraaya ehuhu ya Merabi mwaana muthiyana a Sawuli otheliwa ni Davide, Sawuli aamvaha Aderiyeli a oMehola." 
1Samuel18:20 Vanonto Mikali, Mwanawe muthiyana mukina a Sawuli, aamusivela Davide. Sawuli aaleeliwaawe yeeyo, aahakalala," 
1Samuel18:21 uupuwelaka: “Miyo kinoomvaha Mikali weera owo akhale ntapha na Davide ni weera aFilisti engwaneno.” Hiiho Sawuli aamweerela Davide: “Vano mookhalano ehuhu yanaaveeli othatuwa mukamwenaaka.” 
1Samuel18:22 Sawuli aahaalamulela arumeiyaawe: “Muulumeke ni Davide muxiirini ni mwamweerele: ‘Moone, mwene ohoosivelani ni anamalakaawe ootheene annoottittimihani. Vano muthatuwe mukamwenaawe.’”" 
1Samuel18:23 Awosa yaamuphithelela masu ale Davide, mene owo aaheera: “Othatuwa mukamwene a mwene ti etthu etokotokoxa. Miyo ti mulopwana oohaawa ni oohisuwanyeya paahi.”" 
1Samuel18:24 Anamalaka a Sawuli emuthaliherakaru yeeyo aahimalaawe Davide," 
1Samuel18:25 Sawuli aawaakhula: “Mwamweerele Davide: Yeeyo mwene ontthunaawe ntoko yoomulivano Mikali ti matusu ncira a aFilisti weera aarulele ikukuttula aFilisti.’” Miruku sa Sawuli saari sooweera Davide iiviweke ni aFilisti. 
1Samuel18:26 Anamalaka emuthaliherakaru Davide itthu iye, owo aahakalalela woothatuwa mukamwene a mwene. Tivawo, ehinaaye omala ehuhu yaavaaneliwe," 
1Samuel18:27 Davide ni asilopwanaawe yaarowa, enawiivasa aFilisti macira meeli. Aaruuha matusu, anamvaha mwene weera athatuwe mukamwenaawe. Vano Sawuli aamutheliha mwanawe muthiyana, Mikali." 
1Samuel18:28 Sawuli asuwelakaru weera Yave aari ni Davide ni weera Mwanawe muthiyana, Mikali annamusivela," 
1Samuel18:29 Sawuli aatepaxatho omoova apwahereraka okhala mwiittanaawe mookuminimwawe wootheene. 
1Samuel18:30 Asitokweene a anakhotto a aFilisiti yannapwaherera orowa waawanano aYixrayeli ni imaara sootheene Davide annaakupha yaawo aapwahaka asitokweene akina ootheene a Sawuli. Hiiho aakhalatho ni epili. 
1Samuel19:1 Sawuli aahuuluma ni mwaniye Yonatani ni arumeiyaawe ootheene eerelaka omwiiva Davide. Mene Yonatani annamusivela Davide," 
1Samuel19:2 anamoopereraxa: “Atithaka Sawuli anaasaasa owiivani. Omaalo oxeexelo mwiipasoope. Murowe mwiipithe ni mwakhalewo. 
1Samuel19:3 Miyo ni atithaka nnoovenya nirowaka weiwo muneeraanyu mwiipithe. Kinimuulumano yaawo mwaha wa nyuwo ni seiyo kineeraaka koonelele, kinimoothaliherani.”" 
1Samuel19:4 Yonatani aahuuluma nnenesene ni atithawe sa Davide aweerelaka: “Amwene muhimpake yoonanara murumeiyaanyu Davide, niwoko owo kheewo oopahunlaaweni; ohiyanawaya yeeyo opankaawe yohaaruuhela mpuha amwene." 
1Samuel19:5 Aaleva okumaawe amwiivaka muFilisti. Yave ohaawiniha vancipale aYixrayeli ootheene; nyeenyuweene mohoona sootheene munahakalalela. Mmumpakele heeni yoonanara oohinthowa ntoko Davide, mmwiivaka woohikhala niwoko?”" 
1Samuel19:6 Sawuli aamwaakhulela Yonatani, analipela: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave weera Davide khiiviwa.”" 
1Samuel19:7 Hiiho Yonatani aamwiitthana Davide, anamuthalihera mwaha wootheene. Aamurongha wa Sawuli ni Davide aahokoleela omurumeela sawuli ntoko woopacera." 
1Samuel19:8 Emaara ekinatho yaakhumelela ekhotto ni Davide aarowa waawanano aFilisti. Owo aahaawinaxa ni awosa yaamutthawa. 
1Samuel19:9 Vanonto munepa woonanara waarumihiwe ni Muluku waamukhuruwela Sawuli owo akilaathiyeene mpaanimwawe avarenleene nivakanawe. Davide eera amwiipaka makita," 
1Samuel19:10 Sawuli aaheerera omuphitaanyera vaxirini ni nivakanawe, mene Davide aarapela, nivaka nihomaka vaxirini. Vano Davide aatthawa." 
1Samuel19:11 Ohiyuweene yoole Sawuli aahaarumila asilopwana akina vaate wa Davide weera yangwehawehe ni yamwiive oxeexelo. Vaheera Mikali, mwaarawe Davide, aamooperera: “Mutthaweke ohiyu ola weera muhiiviwe oxeexelo.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Vano Mikali aamukhumihera Davide vaxanelani, anatthawa." 
1Samuel19:13 Mikali aakuxa ettuusittuusi ya nihimo, anaatalela vabeettini, aniikaathera yoophiteera waamuru ya mapururu a ipuri." 
1Samuel19:14 Ephiyakaru asilopwana aarumihalaawe Sawuli weera emvare Davide, Mikali aaweerela: “Owo onoovoreiwa.”" 
1Samuel19:15 Vano Sawuli aahaahokoloxeratho vaate wa Davide aweerelaka: “Mwamuruuhe nno ni ebeettaaweene weera kimwiive.” 
1Samuel19:16 Vaheera asilopwana evolowakaru, yaaphwannye paahi ettuusittuusi vabeettini ni yoophiteera waamuru ya mapururu a epuri." 
1Samuel19:17 Sawuli aamukoha Mikali: “Heeni okilokhottenleni mooteene yoola onamuhiya mwiittanaka atthawaka?” Mikali aamwaakhula: “Owo aakeerela: “Mukihiyeke kitthawe kihinaaye owiivani.” 
1Samuel19:18 Atthawakaru Davide, aarowa wuuluma ni Samuweli oRama, anamuthalihera sootheene Sawuli aampakenlaawe. Vano owo ni Samuweli yaarowa oNayoti, enakhalawo." 
1Samuel19:19 Sawuli aaleeliwa: “Davide ori oNayoti, oRama,”" 
1Samuel19:20 Tivawo aalamulenlaawe asilopwana weera yamvare. Mene awosa yoonakaru mukuttula wa maprofeeti othaliheraka otthuna wa Muluku, Samuweli areene eriyaraaya ntoko muhoolelaaya, Munepa wa Muluku waahaakhuruwela asilopwana a Sawuli ni awosatho yoonnewene ethaliheraka otthuna wa Muluku." 
1Samuel19:21 Sawuli aahiiwa sa yeeyo, aarumiha mukuttula wanaaveeli ni awosatho yoonnewene ethaliheraka otthuna wa Muluku. Vahoolowaya aarumihatho mukuttula wanaararu ni mpaka awosatho yoonnewene ethaliheraka otthuna wa Muluku." 
1Samuel19:22 Ommaleloni owo muneenaawe aarowa oRama, anaphiya vahimeni etokotoko ya oSeku. Owo aahaakoha atthu a weiwe: “Ori woowi Samuweli ni Davide?” Awo yaamwaakhula: “oNayoti, oRama.”" 
1Samuel19:23 Vano Sawuli aarowa oNayoti, oRama. Wa soothesene, Munepa wa Muluku waamukhuruwela ni owo oonnewene athaliheraka otthuna wa Muluku ni ephiro mpaka ophiya oNayoti." 
1Samuel19:24 Weiwo owo aarula soowarasawe, anathalihera otthuna wa Muluku vamaithoni wa Samuweli. Anamorela vathi pwitipwiti nihuku nenenne ni ohiyuweene yoole. Tivawo yeeriwaaya: “Sawulitho omphwanyaneya variyari wa maprofeeti?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Vano Davide aatthawa oNayoti oRama, anarowa wuuluma ni Yonatani, amukohaka: “Kipankeni? Yootakhala heeni kipankaaka? Kaatthekenleni atithinyu woowaasaasera okiiva?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Yonatani aamwaakhula: “Hata vakhaani! Khamuniiviwa! Moone, atithaka kheewo eneeraaya epake ehikileenle, ettittimiheye naari ehittittimiheye. Yaahikikhuweleni yeeyo miyo? Khaveetthuwo." 
1Samuel20:3 Wa soothesene, Davide aalipela eeraka: “Atithinyu ansuwela nnenesene weera miyo koowiiraananani enuupuwela: ‘Yonatani ahisuwele yeela weera ahithanane.’ Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave – vekhaikhai – weera okhwa wookikhuveela.”" 
1Samuel20:4 Yonatani aamweerela Davide: “Miyo kinimoopakelani yeeyo muntthunaanyu.” 
1Samuel20:5 Vano Davide aamweerela: “Moone, omaalo ti efesta ya mweeri munyowani ni ontthuneya weera kace vamoha ni amwene, mene mukihiyeke kiroweke kiipitheke ntuphini mpaka ohiyu wa omurotto." 
1Samuel20:6 Atithinyu yakaasaasa, mwaaleele: ‘Davide aakinyeserera omutthunihera orowa esidadaawe, oBeteleheemu, niwoko na sooveleela sa vayaakhani simpakeliwawo munihimonimwawe nootheene.’" 
1Samuel20:7 Awo yeera: ‘Khaveetthu,’ vano murumeiyaanyu onoolipa mmakhuvani. Vaheera awo yaanyoonyaxiwa, musuwele nnenenesene weera aalakela okipakela yoonanara.’" 
1Samuel20:8 Wa nyuwo, mmoonihere murima wooreera murumeiyaanyu niwoko nohiiraana vamaithoni wa Yave. Miyo kaarino nthowa, vano mukiive nyeenyuweene. Khoontthuneya okirongha wa atithinyu.”" 
1Samuel20:9 Yonatani aamweerela: “Hata vakhaani! Miyo kasuwela weera vekhaikhai atithaka aalakela oowiivani, kinlipela weera kinimooleelani.”" 
1Samuel20:10 Davide aamukoha: “Taani anaakithalihere atithinyu yawaakhulani ni owali?” 
1Samuel20:11 Yonatani aamweerela: “Ngwe, nirowe ntuphini.” Vano yaarowa" 
1Samuel20:12 ni Yonatani aamweerela Davide: “Kinoororomelihani mwa Nsina na Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, weera, ehinaaye ophiyera ehuhu siiyeela omurotto, kinimwaatholathola atithaka! Hiiho kinoosuwela moota angwuupuwelelaayani ni kinimootiinelani." 
1Samuel20:13 Vaheera atithaka yatthuna woopakani yoonanara, Yave akittaruxe miyo kaahoosuwelihani kihoohiyakani murowaka oolipeene. Yave akhaleke ni nyuwo ntoko aaraawe ni atithaka." 
1Samuel20:14 Vanonto, miyo kapwaherera ni okumi, mukireereliwe ni onnene wa Yave;" 
1Samuel20:15 Vaheera kakhwa, muhihiye opakela onnene emusaaka, naari Yave aamalihaleene amwiittana a Davide mweelaponi.”" 
1Samuel20:16 Hiiho Yonatani aahiiwananano emusi ya Davide eeraka: “Yave aattaruxe amwiittana a Davide.” 
1Samuel20:17 Yonatani aamunyesereriha Davide ophitela nlipelonawe niwoko noomusivela, eenre akhala nthamwenaawe a vamurimani." 
1Samuel20:18 Vano Yonatani aamweerela Davide: “Omaalo ti efesta ya mweeri munyowani. Atthu animoona weera nyuwo khamuwowo niwoko ehicaanyu kheekilaathiwa. 
1Samuel20:19 Omurotto, murowe vanipuroni mwiipinthaanyu ehuhuweene yeele mulattu ola waapaceraaya. Vano mwawehererewo vanlukuni na wEzeli." 
1Samuel20:20 Miyo kinoolathelawo nyuumpa miraru ntoko kintthuna olathela. 
1Samuel20:21 Vahoolowaya kinoomurumiha mmiravo waasaasa nyuupa. Vano kamukhuwelela: ‘Nyuumpa iyo siri wenno wenno, okiruuhele,’ nyuwo murweeke niwoko kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave weera mmwikhale oolipeene. Kheekhalaru yoowoopiha." 
1Samuel20:22 Vaheera, miyo kamukhuwelela: ‘Woone, nyuupa iyo soorakamela,’ vano mpwaheke niwoko Yave onolamulelani opwaha." 
1Samuel20:23 Namoona a wiiraanawahu woohimala ti Yave.” 
1Samuel20:24 Vano Davide aahiipitha ntuphini ni yaaphiyenraaya efesta ya mweeri munyowani, Sawuli aakilaathi weera ace." 
1Samuel20:25 Aakilaathi vanipuroni aakhovelenlaawe muxerexere exiri, ohoolo wa Yonatani, ni Abeneri aattamanne ni Sawuli, mene ehice ya Davide khayaakilaathiwe." 
1Samuel20:26 Sawuli kheenre etthu nihuku nne, niwoko uupuwela: “Yookhala emukhumelenle Davide yoowiinanela. Vekhaikhai owo khatteenle.”" 
1Samuel20:27 Mene oxaawaya, nihuku nanaaveli na efesta ya mweeri munyowani, ehice ya Davide nlelo khayaakilaathiwe. Vano Sawuli aamukoha mwaniye Yonatani: “Mwaana a Yixai ohirweenleni oca okhuma osilo mpaka olelo?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Yonatani aamwaakhula: “Davide aakidyoonttelela omutthunihera orowa oBeteleheemu. 
1Samuel20:29 Aakivekela: ‘Mukitthunihere orowa, niwoko emusaahu enrowa opaka yooveleela musidadeni ni amunnawaaka aakilamulela okhalawo. Mwatthuna okoonihera murima wooreera, mukitthunihere orowa weera kawoone axunnaka.’ Tivawo owo ohirwiiyaawe vameesa wa mwene.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Sawuli aamunyoonyeriwa Yonatani anamweerela: “Weyo mwaana a muthiyana oonanara ni oovaanya! Koosuwela weera woomukhavihera mwaana a Yixai wiixuulihihaka muru nitho yoole ooyanre! 
1Samuel20:31 Vano mwaana a Yixai akhalaka ni okumi, okhuma weyo mpaka omwenaawo khootekiheya. Olamule wiitthaniwa okiruuhele, niwoko owo ontthuneya okhwa!”" 
1Samuel20:32 Yonatani aahaakoha atithawe: “Anaakhweleni? Owo opankeni?” 
1Samuel20:33 Wa soothesene, Sawuli aavonya nivaka weera amwiive. Vano Yonatani aasuwela weera atithawe yaalakela omwiiva Davide." 
1Samuel20:34 Yonatani aavenya vameesa oonyoonyiweene. Nihuku nanaaveeli nne na efesta ya mweeri munyowani owo khaaciiye oothananeene niwoko atithawe yaamuyeviha Davide. 
1Samuel20:35 Oxeexeloweene Yonatani aarowa otuphini weera amukumanane Davide mweehuhuni yaalanghannaaya. Aamurowano mmiravo," 
1Samuel20:36 anamweerela: “Otthimakeleke nyuupa kineeraaka kilathe. Vano mmiravo aatthimaka, ni Yonatani aalatha muupa ampwahihaka." 
1Samuel20:37 Mmiravo ole aphiyakaru vanipuroni waamorenlaaya muupa, Yonatani aamukhuwelela: “Muupa owo khookhanle ohoolo iwo?”" 
1Samuel20:38 Vano aakhuwela: “Nrowe! Waakuveyeke! Oheemele!” Mmiravo ole aattotta muupa, anahokolowa," 
1Samuel20:39 ahisuwelaka etthu – aasuwenle ti Yonatani ni Davide yalanghannaaya. 
1Samuel20:40 Vano Yonatani aamwinnyerera mmiravo ikapwitthisawe, anamulamula: “Orowekeno osidade.”" 
1Samuel20:41 Apwahakaru mmiravo, Davide aahiithupululela mpatta wa ohitto wa nluku, anamuuramela Yonatani imaara tthaaru, ekhovaawe attittihaka vathi. Vano yaalaxerana ni ebeecu, yiinlasaka – ootepaxa wiinla aari Davide." 
1Samuel20:42 Yonatani aamweerela Davide: “Muroweke mmuretteleni, niwoko noororomelihana onthamwene mwa Nsina na Yave neeraahu: ‘Yave ti Namoonaahu variyariwahu ni variyari wa ekhapiraanyu ni ekhapiraaka wa mahuku ootheene.’” Vanonto Davide aapwaha ni Yonatani aahokoleela osidade." 
1Samuel21:1 Davide aarowa wuuluma ni musaserdoti* Abimeleki oNobi. Abimeleki aathukumela oovaka amukumananakaru, anamukoha: “Mukhalenleni meekhiinyu? Khaawo awiiye ni nyuwo?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Davide aamwaakhula musaserdoti*, Abimeleki: “Mwene ookilamulela etthu akeerelaka: ‘Ahikhale mutthu anaasuweleru etthu ela koolamulenlaakani ni kooxuttinghaakani.’ Wa asilopwanaaka – kohaalamulela weera nakumane vanipuroni niiwanannaahu." 
1Samuel21:3 Vano nyuwo munkivahani? Mukivahe ipaawu ithanu hoye hoye yakhalaru etthu muraanyuno.” 
1Samuel21:4 Vanonto, musaserdoti* aamwaakhula Davide: “Nkirino yooca ya khula nihuku. Ohiyanawaya, sookhalamo ipaawu sootteeliheriwa – anakhotto yaahikonano asithiyana, eceeke.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Davide aamwaakhula: “Vekhaikhai hoye! Eyo ekhovelelowaahu imaara sootheene ninkhalanaahu mukwaha. Khannimutavaru muthiyana asilopwanaaka anniixiinanela wakhalaru mukwaha – wootepaxa olelo!” 
1Samuel21:6 Hiiho musaserdoti* aamvaha ipaawu sootteeliheriwa seenre sahikhala sooca sikina ohikhanle Ipaawu sa Okhala wa Yave mwa seiye aavenxalaawe vaNipuroni Nootteela* weera saakakhanyihiweke ni ipaawu sooviha. 
1Samuel21:7 Vano Doweki, ngwEdomi aari murumeiyi a Sawuli nitho mutokweene a akukhulaawe, aakhalawo nihuku nenenenne ekwaniheriwaka yoonyesererihiwa wa Yave." 
1Samuel21:8 Davide aamukoha Abimeleki: “Vaava nyuwo mookhalano nivaka hoye hoye ekatana? Nkirwaanne ekatana naari ikaphwitthi sikina niwoko mwene aakaakuvihiha.” 
1Samuel21:9 Musaserdoti* aamwaakhula: “Ekatana ya Goliyati, muFilisti mwa yoowo mwaamwiivenlaanyu vanreyareyani na wEla eri va evitikeleliwe mukuwoni wiithela mooxikootti a esaserdoti. Mwatthuna, mukuxeke. Kheewowo ekatana ekina.” Davide aamweerela: “Yooreerela ti ela. Mukivahe.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Nihuku nne Davide aamutthawa Sawuli, anarowa omwaasa Akixi, mwene a oGati." 
1Samuel21:11 Wa soothesene, murumeiyi mmoha a Akixi aamweerela: “Ola ti Davide, mwene a elapo ya oYixrayeli. Ti yoole yaamuttottopelaaya yiinaka: ‘Sawuli aawiiva ancipale, vaheera Davide oompwahaxa.’”" 
1Samuel21:12 Davide iiwakaru masu ale, aamoova Akixi, mwene a oGati." 
1Samuel21:13 Tivawo iisikineihalaawe vamaithoniwaya; areene ni yaawosa mweettelowaawe waari hiiho. Aakhera milako sa isidade akhumaka ittiindi. 
1Samuel21:14 Akixi aaweerela arumeiyaawe: “Mmoone mulopwana ola! Ti oosikineya! Mwaamuruuhelasani? 
1Samuel21:15 Ahaatta masikini – khoontthuneya okiruuhela mulopwana oohikwanakwana ohoolowaka. Orweenleni mpaanimwaka?” 
1Samuel22:1 Davide aatthawa oGati anarowa munikhukuni na wAdulami. Esuwelakaru yeeyo axunneiye ni emusi ya atithawe, yaarowawo omukumanano." 
1Samuel22:2 Ootheene yaale yaahooxiwa, anamakopa ni yaale wahaakhalakhala murima yaathukumana ni Davide ni owo aathatuwa muhoolelaaya. Yaakhalawo asilopwana ookwanaka macira maxexe." 
1Samuel22:3 Okhuma vaavaale Davide aarowa oMizepa, elapo ya oMowabe, anamweerela mwene a oMowabe: “Kinoovekelani waatthunihera atithaka ni amayaka okhala ni nyuwo mpaka kineeraaka kisuwele yeeyo Muluku aneeraawe akipakele.”" 
1Samuel22:4 Vano aahaahiya ni mwene a oMowabe ni awosa yaakhala ni yoowo ehuhu yootheene Davide aakhanlaawe woolipawo. 
1Samuel22:5 Wa soothesene, mprofeeti aamweerela Davide: “Muhipise woolipawo, muroweke oYuda.” Vano Davide aapwaha, anarowa moothakoni wa oHereti." 
1Samuel22:6 Vanonto Sawuli aasuwela weera Davide ni asilopwanaawe ohooniwa. Sawuli eera aakilaantheene vathi wa tamargira* vanttumuxani oGibeya avarenleene nivaka. Asitokweenaawe ootheene yeera emweemelenleene mukhwipi. 
1Samuel22:7 Sawuli aaweerela: “Mwiiwe anamwane a Benyamini! Mwaana mulopwana a Yixai kharwa oovahaani imatta hoye hoye imatta sa iwuuva*. Kharwatho ookhalihani asitokweene a anakhotto ncira hoye hoye a macira muloko.” 
1Samuel22:8 Ootheene nyuwo mookivaanelela. Khawowo okithalihenre mwanaka iiwananaka ni mwaana mulopwana a Yixai. Khaawo a nyuwo onkitthukuruwela hata onkithalihera weera mwanaka oomuntannyera murumeiyaaka weera akiipithele, ntoko oneeraawe mpaka olelo.”" 
1Samuel22:9 Vanonto Doweki, ngwEdomi, eemenle vamoha ni asitokweene a Sawuli, aamweerela: “Komoona Davide, mwaana mulopwana a Yixai, aphiyaka oNobi anakumanelano Ahimeleki, mwaana mulopwana a Ahitubi." 
1Samuel22:10 Ahimeleki aamukoherera Yave mwaha wa yoowo. Aamvahatho pooso ni ekatana ya Goliyati, muFilisti.”" 
1Samuel22:11 Vano mwene aarumiha oroweliwa musaserdoti* Ahimeleki, mwaana mulopwana a Ahitubi vamoha ni emusi yootheene ya atithawe yaari asaserdoti* a oNobi. Awosa ootheene yaarowasa wuuluma ni mwene." 
1Samuel22:12 Sawuli aamweerela: “Mwiiwe, mwaana mulopwana a Ahitubi.” Ahimeleki aamwaakhula: “Aani pwiiyaaka.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Sawuli aamukoha: “Munkivaanelela heeni – nyuwo ni mwaana mulopwana a Yixai? Mumvahenreni sooca ni ekatana munkohereraka Muluku mwaha wa yoowo? Owo ookivaanya ni olelo ookiipithela.” 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimeleki aamwaakhula mwene: “Khawowo a arumeiyaanyu oororomeleya ompwaha Davide, mukamwenaawe mwene, mutokweene a anamalipelelaanyu ni oottittimiheyaxa vaatevanyu!”" 
1Samuel22:15 Emaara ela kheehiyono emaara yoopacera kimukoherenraaka Muluku mwaha wa yoowo. Hoye! Mwene ahimoothere murumeiyaanyu naari akhalaru a emusi ya atithaawe, niwoko murumeiyaanyu khasuwenle eneereya.”" 
1Samuel22:16 Wa soothesene, mwene aamwaakhula: “Vekhaikhai, munimwiiviwa nyuwo vamoha ni emusi yootheene ya atithinyu.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Vano mwene aahaalamula anamalipelela yaari mukhwipimwawe: “Ngwivase asaserdoti* a Yave, niwoko awosatho aamukhavihera Davide. Yaasuwela weera owo eera atthawaka, mene khayaakileenleru.” Vaheera, arumeiyi a mwene yaakhootta owiiva asaserdoti* a Yave." 
1Samuel22:18 Vahoolowaya mwene aamulamulela Doweki: “Owiive asaserdoti*.” Doweki, ngwEdomi, aarukunuwa, anawiiva asaserdoti*. Nihuku nenenenne aawiiva asilopwana miloko mithannamiraru naathanu yaawara amooxikootti a eliinyu*." 
1Samuel22:19 Aawiivatho amaki a oNobi, esidade ya asaserdoti* – asilopwana, asithiyana, anamwane, ooyariwa vaanaano, imombe, abuuru ni ikhondoolo." 
1Samuel22:20 Vanonto Abiyatari, mwaana mulopwana a Ahimeleki, mwaana mulopwana a Ahitubi aahoopowa, anatthawa weera atakanserane ni Davide." 
1Samuel22:21 Owo aamuthalihera Davide weera Sawuli oowiiva asaserdoti* a Yave. 
1Samuel22:22 Vano Davide aamweerela Abiyatari: “Nihuku nenenenne Doweki ngwEdomi aaraawe vaavaale, kaasuwela weera aarwa omuthalihera Sawuli. Okhwa wa emusi yootheene ya atithinyu nthowa ti nawaka." 
1Samuel22:23 Mukhaleke ni miyo. Muhoove. Yoowo onaasaasa okumaanyu onaasaasa okumaakatho. Vaheera nyuwo munookhala oolipheene ni miyo.” 
1Samuel23:1 Aleeliwakaru Davide: “Moone, aFilisti anoowanano oKeyila ehuhulaka mapuro amveeriwa* etrigu,”" 
1Samuel23:2 aamvekela Yave: “Kaawananeke aFilisti awo?” Yave aamwaakhula: “Muroweke, mwaawanane aFilisti ni moopole oKeyila.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Wa soothesene, asilopwana a Davide yaamweerela: “Nri oowooveene oYuda nno. Wootepaxa narowa oKeyila waawanano anakhotto a aFilisti!”" 
1Samuel23:4 Emaara ekinatho Davide aamvekela Yave, ni Yave aamwaakhula: “Muroweke oKeyila, niwoko kinoowinnyerera aFilisti mmatatanimwanyu.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Vano Davide ni asilopwanaawe yaarowa oKeyila, enaawanano aFilisti, enakuxa mihuwosaya. Owo aawiiva aFilisti ancipale awoopolaka amaki a oKeyila." 
1Samuel23:6 Vanonto, Abiyatari, mwaana mulopwana a Ahimeleki, aamukuxa mooxikootti a esaserdoti aatthangwaawe weera iitakansere ni Davide oKeyila." 
1Samuel23:7 Sawuli aaleeliwa weera Davide oorowa oKeyila, aneera: “Muluku ookivaha mmatatanimwaka, niwoko Davide ootthukeya avolowaka musidade erino masele ni anampattika.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Sawuli aawiitthana anakhottwaawe ootheene weera eroweke oKeyila ongwanano Davide ni asilopwanaawe. 
1Samuel23:9 Iiwakaru Davide weera Sawuli ohiireherera ongwanano, aamweerela musaserdoti*, Abiyatari: “Mukiruuhele mooxikootti a esaseredoti.”" 
1Samuel23:10 Davide aaheera: “Ii! Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, murumeiyaanyu ohiiwa weera vekhaikhai Sawuli omvaanela orowa oKeyila atthunaka ophwata esidade niwoko na miyo." 
1Samuel23:11 Amaki a oKeyila anookinnyerera mmatatanimwawe? Sawuli onoophiya ntoko murumeiyaanyu iiwenlaawe? Ii! Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, mukileele.” Yave aamwaakhula: “Aani. Onimoowa.”" 
1Samuel23:12 Davide aamukohatho: “Amaki a oKeyila anookinnyerera miyo ni asilopwanaaka mmatatani mwa Sawuli?” Yave aamwaakhula: “Aani.” 
1Samuel23:13 Hiiho Davide ni asilopwanaawe – wookwanaka macira mathannamosa – yaavenya oKeyila yaasaka weetta ehisuwelaka ankelaayawo. Sawuli aleeliwaka weera Davide aatthawa oKeyila, owo aahiya orowa." 
1Samuel23:14 Davide annakhala mmapuroni oolipaxa onikareni ni mmanyaakoni a nikare na oZifi. Khula nihuku Sawuli annamwaasa, mene Muluku khamwinnyerenre mmatatanimwawe." 
1Samuel23:15 Davide areene oHorexi, munikareni na oZifi, aasuwela weera Sawuli aavenya weera amwiive." 
1Samuel23:16 Yonatani, mwaana mulopwana a Sawuli, aarowa wa Davide oHorexi amukhaviheraka ophwanya ikuru mwa Muluku." 
1Samuel23:17 Owo aamweerela: “Muhoove. Atithaka kheerwa ewiivaani. Nyuwo munookhala mwene a aYixrayeli ni miyo nkikhale anaaveeli moolamulani. Mpaka atithaka Sawuli aasuwela yeeyo.” 
1Samuel23:18 Ooweeli yaahiiraana vamaithoni wa Yave. Vahoolowaya Yonatani aarowa owaani, vaheera Davide aahala oHorexi." 
1Samuel23:19 Vano aZifi akina yaarowa wa Sawuli oGibeya enamweerela: “Davide iipinthe variyariwahu moolipamo wa oHorexi, vanttumuxani na oHakila, mpatta wa ohitto wa oYeximoni." 
1Samuel23:20 Vanonto, amwene, mwaatthunaka, murowe ni wa mpattaahu nnoomwinnyerera mmatatanimwanyu.”" 
1Samuel23:21 Sawuli aawaakhula: “Yave ooreeliheni niwoko na okipwatthawanyu. 
1Samuel23:22 Muroweke, mwiirehererasetho. Mwasuwele mapuro Davide oniipithaxaawe ni taani amoonnewo. Kooleeliwa weera owo ti oocendyera." 
1Samuel23:23 Mwasuwele mapuro oniipithaawemo ootheene ni muhokoleele nno ni masu a ekhaikhai. Vano miyo kinimoohoolani. Owo akhalawo, kinoomphwanya variyari wa mahimo ootheene a aYuda.”" 
1Samuel23:24 Hiiho yaapwaha, enarowa oZifi, Sawuli ahinaaye. Davide ni asilopwanaawe yaari munikareni na oMawoni, wAraba, mpatta wa ohitto wa oYeximoni." 
1Samuel23:25 Sawuli ni asilopwanaawe yaattimula enapacera omwaasa ni aleeliwaka Davide, aakhuruwa vamwala, anapwaherera okhala munikareni na oMawoni. Sawuli iiwakaru yeeyo, aavolowa munikareni na oMawoni amwaasaka Davide." 
1Samuel23:26 Sawuli eera eettaka mpatta mmoha wa mwaako vaheera Davide ni asilopwanaawe mpatta mukina yaakuveyaka weera emutthawe Sawuli. Vanonto, Sawuli ni anakhottwaawe yaamuricaaya Davide ni asilopwanaawe weera emvare," 
1Samuel23:27 namutthenga mmoha aahoorwa omuleela Sawuli: “Ngweeke woowaakuveya, niwoko aFilisti animwaahuhula va aYixrayeli!”" 
1Samuel23:28 Vano Sawuli aahiya omwaasa Davide, anarowa waawanano aFilisti. Ti niwoko na yeeyo nipuro nne niitthaniwaaya: oSela-Hamakelekoti." 
1Samuel23:29 Davide aapwahawo, anarowa okhala vanipuroni noolipihiwa na wEni-Gedi." 
1Samuel24:1 Sawuli aahokolowa vahoolo woowaattaratthara aFilisti, enamweerelasa: “Davide ori munikareni na wEni-Gedi.”" 
1Samuel24:2 Vano Sawuli aahaakuxa anakhotto macira miloko miraru oothanliwa variyari wa aYixrayeli ootheene, anarowa omwaasa Davide ni asilopwanaawe vakhiviru wa Nyala sa ikhomaci." 
1Samuel24:3 Aaphiya onikhoolani na ikhondoolo nari mukerekhere ephiro. Naakhalawo nikhuku ni Sawuli aavolowamo weera iitthe maahi matokweene. Davide ni asilopwanaawe yaari waakhurukutuwela. 
1Samuel24:4 Asilopwana yaamweerela: “Ti nna nihuku Yave aahimmaawe eenraawe: ‘kinoomwinnyerera mwiittanaanyu mmatatanimwanyu weera mumpake yeeyo muntthunaanyu.’” Vano Davide aamwiitela, anathikila nnleembe na mukaandyo wa Sawuli, owo ahisuwelaka." 
1Samuel24:5 Vahoolowaya Davide aathananaxa niwoko noothikila nleembe na mukaandyowaawe. 
1Samuel24:6 Aaweerela asilopwanaawe: “Yave akihiihe miyo woompakela etthu ela pwiiyaaka, hata omvulaliha, niwoko owo ti oottikittheliwa a Yave.”" 
1Samuel24:7 Davide aahaahiiha asilopwanaawe ni masu ale aakhoottihaka ongwanano Sawuli. Vano Sawuli aavenya munikhukuni, anapwaha." 
1Samuel24:8 Vano Davide aakhuma munikhukuni, anamukhuwelela Sawuli: “Amwene, pwiiyaaka!” Sawuli awehakaru ottuli, Davide aahuuramela vathi." 
1Samuel24:9 Owo aamukoha Sawuli: “Amwene mungwiiwelelela heeni yaawo anooleelani: ‘Davide ontthuna owiivani?’ 
1Samuel24:10 Olelo mohoona ni maithwaanyu moota Yave owinnyerenraaweni mmatatanimwaka munikhukuni. Akina yaakivekela owiivani, mene miyo kohuurela okumaanyu keeraka: ‘Nkirwa kimvulaliha pwiiyaaka, niwoko owo ti oottikittheliwa a Yave.’" 
1Samuel24:11 Moone, atithaka, ngwehe nleembe na mukaandyowaanyu nri mmatatanimwaka. Koothikila nleembe na mukaandyowaanyu, mene nkiwiivaleni. Vano, musuwele ni mwiiwexexe weera nkinthowa woopakelani yoonanara hata woovaanyani. Nkoopahunleni etthu, naari mukaasaasaka weera mukiive." 
1Samuel24:12 Yave akhale Mphuki variyariwahu ni oothoriheni niwoko na soonanara mukipakenlaanyu. Vaheera miyo nkirwa kiwiivaani. 
1Samuel24:13 Yoohimmwa ya khalayi eneera: ‘Wa atakhali anoona sootakhalaru.’ Tivawo kihingweraaka owiivani. 
1Samuel24:14 Mwene a aYixrayeli orweenle ongwanano taani? Onimuttharatthara taani? Mwalapwa ookhwa hoye hoye otitili? 
1Samuel24:15 Yave akhale Mphukaahu athorihaka variyariwahu. Owo athorihe ni ekhaikhai akaakihaka woopopihiwa wu.” 
1Samuel24:16 Davide amalihakaru wuuluma hiiho, Sawuli aamukoha: “Weyo ti mwanaka Davide? Vano aahiinla akhuwelaka vancipale." 
1Samuel24:17 Owo aamweerela: “Weyo ti oororomeleya okipwaha miyo. Wookipakela yooreera, miyo koopakelaka yoonanara." 
1Samuel24:18 Olelo wookoonihera murimaawo wooreera. Yave ookinnyerera mmatatanimwawo, mene weyo khookiivale." 
1Samuel24:19 Mulopwana amphwanya mwiittanaawe, onoomuhiya apwahaka? Yave ootthuvele nnenesene niwoko na moota okipankaawo olelo." 
1Samuel24:20 Koosuwela weera vekhaikhai onookhala mwene ni omwene wa aYixrayeli onuukhale woolipeene mmatatanimwawo. 
1Samuel24:21 Vano olipele vamaithoni wa Yave okeerelaka miyo weera weyo khoomaliha ekhapiraaka naari ophwata nsinanaka mwa emusi ya atithaka.” 
1Samuel24:22 Vanonto Davide aalipela amweerelaka Sawuli, ni Sawuli aahokoleela owaani, mene Davide ni asilopwanaawe yaarowa wa nipuro noolipihiwa." 
1Samuel25:1 Vano Samuweli aahookhwa ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaathukumana, eniinla okhwawawe. Yaamvithela owannyawe oRama. Vahoolowaya Davide aarowa munikareni na oMawoni." 
1Samuel25:2 Mulopwana mmoha a oMawoni, namapuhaxa, aakhalano imatta oKarameli. Aakhalano ipuri macira muloko ni ikhondoolo macira miloko miraru mwa seiyo aametthaawe oKarameli." 
1Samuel25:3 Nsinanawe naari Nabali ni mwaarawe iitthaniwa Abigayili. Vano Abigayili owo aari a miruku ni ooreeraxa; vaheera aiyawe, muKalebi, aari acilu ni a mattaattha." 
1Samuel25:4 Davide akhalaka munikareni, aahiiwa weera Nabali eera ametthaka ikhondoolo." 
1Samuel25:5 Vano aahaarumiha amiravo muloko aweerelaka: “Murowe wa Nabali oKarameli, mwamuulumihewo mwa nsinanaka." 
1Samuel25:6 Mwamuleele: “Sootheene siweetteleni nnenesene! Mpuha wa nyuwo ni vaatewanyu. Mpuha wa sootheene muraanyuno! 
1Samuel25:7 Vano kohiiwa weera ti ehuhu ya omettha ikhondoolo. Akukhulaanyu yaaraaya ni hiyo, hiyo khanaahasunle ni ehuhu yootheene yaaraaya oKarameli, kheewoworu yaariheiye." 
1Samuel25:8 Mwaakohakohe arumeiyaanyu – awosa animooleelani. Tivawo, mwaareereliwe niwoko nnaattamela ehuhu ya efesta. Dyoontte, mwaavahe arumeiyaanyu ni mwaninyu Davide seiyo mungweraanyu." 
1Samuel25:9 Amiravo ale yaarowasa enamuthalihera Nabali mutthenga mwa nsina na Davide, enaweherera." 
1Samuel25:10 Nabali aawaakhula arumeiyaawe Davide: “Davide owo taani? Mwaana mulopwana a Yixai owo taani? Aakhala arumeiyi ancipale animutthawa pwiiyaaya mahuku ala. 
1Samuel25:11 Nkirwa kikuxa yoocaaka, maahaaka ni enamaaka kaarehererenlaaka anamametthaaka kaavahasaka asilopwana miyo kihisuwenlaaka ankhumelelaayawo." 
1Samuel25:12 Asilopwanaawe Davide yaarukunuwa, enahokolowa. Yaaphingyaaya, yaamuthalihera Davide masu ootheene a Nabali." 
1Samuel25:13 Davide aaweerela asilopwanaawe: “Muherere ikatanasanyu muyuununi!” Vano awosa yaaherera ikatanasaya ni hiihotho Davide. Wookwanaka asilopwana macira maxexe yaamuhoonle Davide, asilopwana macira meeli akinaawo ehalanneene sooreelasaya." 
1Samuel25:14 Mmoha a arumeiyi aamuthalihera Abigayili, mwaariye Nabali: “Davide aahaarumiha anamitthenga onikareni weera emuulumihe pwiiyaahu, mene owo ohaaruwana." 
1Samuel25:15 Vano asilopwana awo yaanireereliwa. Khayaanihasunle. Ehuhu yootheene naaraahu ni yaawosa ntuphini khayaaniriheiyeru etthu. 
1Samuel25:16 Ohiyu ni othana awosa naalipanaahu ehuhu yootheene hiyo naaraahu ni yaawosa nicihaka ikhondoolosahu. 
1Samuel25:17 Vano muupuwele yeeyo ni moone maayi muneeraanyu mpake, niwoko yoonanara yohaakhuveela apwiyaahu ni vaatewaya wootheene. Owo mulopwana oonanara murima moota wooweera khaawo angwera omutthekulano.”" 
1Samuel25:18 Abigayili aahaakuveya, anakuxa ipaawu macira meeli, akacikhi eeli a eviinyu, ikhondoolo ithanu soorehereriwasene, mipatta mithanu sa etrigu yoowaarikiwa, iboolu ncira sa iwuuva* soowuuma ni iboolu macira meeli sa ifiigu, anatthukelela waabuuruni." 
1Samuel25:19 Aahaalamula arumeiyaawe: “Nyuwosa muhoolaseke. Miyo kinimoottharani. Vanonto, owo kheewo aaleenlaawe aiyawe Nabali." 
1Samuel25:20 Owo angwenleene buuru aviraka vanxaapwani, Davide ni asilopwanaawe yaarweela ohoolowawe ni owo aahaakumanano." 
1Samuel25:21 Ahinaaye omukumanano Davide aaheera: “Waari wasiiyo okhapelelawahu sooreela sootheene sa mulopwana owo weera sihiiyiweru. Owo ohaakakhanyiha yooreera ni yoonanara. 
1Samuel25:22 Muluku amuttaruxe Davide okhuma olelo mpaka omaalo miyo kamuhiya naari mulopwana mmoha ni okumi mweemusini ya Nabali!” 
1Samuel25:23 Abigayili amoonakaru Davide, aakhuruwa woowaakuveya vabuuruniwawe, anuuramela vathi ohoolo wa Davide." 
1Samuel25:24 Aamorela vamettoniwawe, anamweerela: “Pwiiyaaka, nthowa nootheene ti nawaka. Dyoontte muntthunihere murumeiyaanyu wuuluma ni nyuwo. Mwiiwe yeeyo ontthunaawe ohima.”" 
1Samuel25:25 Pwiiyaaka ahimpwatthe mulopwana a icilu owo Nabali, ntoko nintaphulelaaya nsinanawe – ni icilusawe sinnamulamula. Wa mpattaaka, nkiwoonne amiravo mwaarumighaanyu." 
1Samuel25:26 Vano pwiiyaaka, kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave ni mwa okumaanyu – ti Yave oohiihaleni owiiva atthu hoye hoye wiinla ikukuttula ni matataanyu. Amwiittanaanyu ni ootheene anaasaasa woopakelani yoonanara ettaruxiwe ntoko Nabali." 
1Samuel25:27 Yoovaha ela murumeiyaanyu oruuhalaawe wapwiyaaka aavaheke asilopwana ari ni nyuwo. 
1Samuel25:28 Dyoontte mulevelele nthowa na murumeiyaanyu, niwoko vekhaikhai Yave onookhaliha omwenaanyu wa mahuku ootheene mweenre ngwanaka ikhotto sa Yave. Nihiphwanyaneye nthowa mwa nyuwo wa mahuku ootheene." 
1Samuel25:29 Hata akhalaka mukina anoottharatthareni weera awiiveeni, Yave Mulukwaanyu onoowaakihani, oopolaka okumaanyu ntoko etthu yootthuneyaxa. Vaheera okumi wa amwiittanaanyu onoovonyeriwa ottaiwene ntoko nluku nivonyingwe ni ekwambala." 
1Samuel25:30 Muhoolommo, Yave ookwaniherelani sootheene aaroromelinghaawe ni ookhalihani muhooleli a aYixrayeli," 
1Samuel25:31 vano pwiiyaaka khamurwa muupuwelelela naari muriipiwa murima niwoko na oyeeha ephome yoohinthowa hoye hoye wiinlela ikukuttula ni matataanyu. Vano Yave ookwaniherelani sootheene iyo, mmuupuwelele murumeiyaanyu.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Davide aamweerela Abigayili: “Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli atthapeliwe oorumihaleni olelo weera mukumane ni miyo." 
1Samuel25:33 Mureelihiwe niwoko na mirukusanyu ni okihiihawanyu omwiiva, kiirulelaka ikukuttula muneenaaka." 
1Samuel25:34 Vano kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, mwa Yoowo okihiihale woopakelani yoonanara, nyuwo mwahaarwiiye woowaakuveya okikumanano, ohiyuweene yoola Nabali khaakalanaru naari mulopwana mmoha mukumi.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Vanonto Davide aahaakhela yeeyo aamuruuhenlaawe, anamweerela: “Murowe owaani mmuretteleni. Kohiiwa maswaanyu ni kohaakhulela yoovekaanyu.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Abigayili aahokoleelaawe wa Nabali, owo eera apakaka efesta etokotoko owaani ntoko efesta ya mwene. Owo ahapalaxiweene waamutteela murima. Tivawo Abigayili ahaamulenlaawe etthu mpaka oxa." 
1Samuel25:37 Oxaawaya, owo omuukunungweene, Abigayili aamuthalihera itthu sootheene iye. Nabali aameyanyeya, mpatta mmoha mukumi, okina iwo wuumale nlukunene." 
1Samuel25:38 Emalakaru mahuku muloko, Yave aamvulaliha Nabali, anakhwa." 
1Samuel25:39 Davide iiwakaru weera Nabali ohookhwa, aaheera: “Yave atthapeliwe aakihale nthowanaka na ongwanano Nabali, niwoko na ohikeettihawawe nnene. Yave oomuhiiha murumeiyaawe opaka yoonanara ampakihaka weera yoonanara ya Nabali emuhokoleele muneenaawe. Vano Davide aamurumihela mutthenga Abigayili amvekelaka weera amuthele." 
1Samuel25:40 Arumeiyaawe yaarowa oKarameli, enamweerela Abigayili: “Davide oonirumiha wookuxani weera ootheleeni.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Owo aavenya anuuramela vathi, eeraka: “Murumeiyaanyu ti yoomi. Kiri oolikaneene woorumeelani ni orapiha inaawo sa arumeiyi a apwiyaaka.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Woowaakuveya Abigayili aangwela buurwaawe, anarowa vamoha ni arumeiyi a Davide, ahooliwaka ni ipotthasawe ithiyana ithanu. Ni Davide aamuthela." 
1Samuel25:43 Davide aamuthelatho Ahinowami aari oYizereyeli, ni ooweeli yaari axaariye." 
1Samuel25:44 Vaheera Sawuli aamvaha mwanawe muthiyana, Mikali, mwaarawe Davide, weera amuthele Palitiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Layixi aakhala oGalimi." 
1Samuel26:1 Vano aZifi yaarowa wa Sawuli oGibeya, enamweerela: “Davide iipinthe vanttumuxani na oHakila, ohoolo wa oYeximoni.”" 
1Samuel26:2 Tivawo Sawuli aarongwaawe onikareni na oZifi vamoha ni anakhotto macira miloko miraru oothanliwa variyari wa aYixrayeli weera yamwaasewo Davide. 
1Samuel26:3 Sawuli aakonenle mukerekhere musewe vanttumuxani na oHakila, ohoolo wa oYeximoni, mene Davide aahala munikareni. Asuwelakaru weera Sawuli aamuntthara," 
1Samuel26:4 aahaarumiha anamahottela, anasuwela weera vekhaikhai Sawuli ohoorwa." 
1Samuel26:5 Davide aavenya, anarowa wa nipuro Sawuli aakonenlaawe. Aahoona nipuro Sawuli ni Abeneri, mwaana mulopwana a Neri, yiixaatalenlaayawo. Sawuli iixaatalenle eriyari, anakhottwaawe emurukureenreene." 
1Samuel26:6 Vano Davide aamukoha Ahimeleki, muHiti, ni Abixai, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha, munneiye Yowabi: “Taani anaakihoole okonenlaawewo Sawuli?” Abixai aamwaakhula: “Miyo kinimoohoolani.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Hiiho Davide ni Abixai yaavolowasa ohiyu waakonelingwe, enamphwanyawo Sawuli akonneene, nivakanawe neemexiweene waamuru. Abeneri ni anakhotto yeera yiixaatalenleene mukhwipimwawe." 
1Samuel26:8 Abixai aamweerela Davide: “Olelo Yave oomwinnyerera mwiittanaanyu mmatatanimwanyu. Mukihiyeke kimuhome ehutta mpaka ophutula vathi emaara emoha paahi ehitthuneyaka ekina.” 
1Samuel26:9 Vano Davide aamwaakhula Abixai: “Muhimwiive! Khoongwereya opwaherera woohinthowa vahoolo woomwiiva oothanliwa a Yave.” 
1Samuel26:10 Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave weera Owo muneenaawe onoomwiiva, hoye hoye eniiphiyere ehuhu ni owo anaakhwe, naari anaarowe okhottoni ni anaariheye." 
1Samuel26:11 Yave akihiiheke weera kihimwiive oothanliwa a Yave. Nikuxe nivaka ni exaaru eri ni maahi siri waamuruwawe, nipwaheke.”" 
1Samuel26:12 Vano Davide aakuxa nivaka ni exaaru ya maahi saari waamuru wa Sawuli, anapwaha. Khaawo aawoonne, naari aawiiwale hata aavennye mookonani. Ootheene yaakonasa niwoko saahaattokoneela ikhove saarweela wa Yave." 
1Samuel26:13 Davide aarowa mpatta mukina, anawela vasulu nttumuxa, arakamenleene vakhaani." 
1Samuel26:14 Aawiitthana anakhotto ni Abeneri, mwaana mulopwana a Neri: “Abeneri, mukaakhuleke!” Abeneri aamwaakhula: “Taani onimukhuwelela mwene?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Davide aamweerela: “Keera nyuwo mulopwana? Muri oohilikanxereya variyari wa aYixrayeli. Vano heeni muhimwaakinghaanyu pwiiyaanyu, mwene? Mukina aarowawo weera amwiive mwene." 
1Samuel26:16 Yeeyo mpankaanyu kheereenre. Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave weera ootheene nyuwo moophwanela okhwa mweenre muhimwaakiha mwenaanyu, oottikittheliwa a Yave. Ngwehe mukhwipimwanyu. Nri woowi nivaka ni exaaru ya maahi a mwene saari waamuruwawe?”" 
1Samuel26:17 Sawuli aasuwela nsunawe Davide, anamukoha: “Mwanaka Davide, ti nsunawo?” Davide aamwaakhula: “Ti nawaka, pwiiyaaka mwene.”" 
1Samuel26:18 Aapwaherera weera: “Pwiiyaaka, munimuttharattharela heeni murumeiyaanyu ola? Kipankeni, nthowa noonanara heeni kirinaaka?" 
1Samuel26:19 Vano, pwiiyaaka, mwene, mwiiweke masu a murumeiyaanyu: Yave ooseserani okisoonda, Owo aakheleke yooveleelaaka. Wa soothesene, yaari atthu apanke, vano elaphiwe vamaithoni wa Yave. Awo aakirakameliha wa mpattaaka wa yoohiyeriwa ya Yave ni aakeerela: ‘Murowe mwalape miluku sikina.’" 
1Samuel26:20 Muhikihiye kikhwelaka mweelaponi ya anamarwa ottaiwene wa vamaithoni wa Yave. Mwene a aYixrayeli aarowa waasa otitili, ntoko mukina onrowaawe olupattha ekhwali mmanyaakoni.”" 
1Samuel26:21 Sawuli aamwaakhula: “Koottheka. Ohokolowe, mwanaka, Davide. Olelo wohuurela okumaaka. Nkoopakatho yoonanara. Vekhaikhai koheetta ntoko mulolo kitapanyaxaka.”" 
1Samuel26:22 Davide aamwaakhula: “Nivakananyu nri va. Mmoha a arumeiyaanyu arweeke, akuxeke." 
1Samuel26:23 Yave ontthuvela ekhaikhai ni ororomeleya wa khula mutthu. Olelo Owo oowinnyererani nyuwo mmatatanimwaka, mene miyo kookhootta omutava oottikittheliwa a Yave." 
1Samuel26:24 Mooteene yoowo miyo kiwooponlaakani olelo, Yave oopole okumaaka akivuluxaka mwa ohaawawaka wootheene.”" 
1Samuel26:25 Vanonto Sawuli aamweerela Davide: “Oreelihiwe mwanaka Davide. Onoopaka itthu sootikhiniheya sincipale ni sootheene iyo sinooweettela nnene.” Vahoolowaya Davide aapwaherera ni mukwahaawe ni Sawuli aahokoleela owaani. 
1Samuel27:1 Vanonto Davide aahuupuwela: “Nookhala nihuku aneeraawe akiive Sawuli. Fataari otthawela elapo ya aFilisti. Hiiho Sawuli anaahiye okaasaasa mweelaponi ya oYixrayeli yootheene, ni miyo kinimoopowa mmatatanimwawe.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Tivawo Davide ni asilopwanaawe macira mathannamosa yaarowansaaya mpaka wa mwene Akixi, mwaana mulopwana a Mawoki, oGati." 
1Samuel27:3 Davide ni asilopwanaawe yaahiitekiha oGati yaakheliwaka ni Akixi. Khula mutthu aarino emusaawe ni Davide aarino axaariye ooweeli: Ahinowami oYizereyeli ni Abigayili oKarameli, naamukhweli a Nabali." 
1Samuel27:4 Sawuli aleeliwaka weera Davide aatthawela oGati, aahiya omwaasa." 
1Samuel27:5 Vano Davide aamweerela Akixi: “Mwakoonihera ni murima wooreera, vano mukivahe nipuro variyari wa isidadesanyu weera kamakewo. khoontthuneya weera murumeiyaanyu akhale ni nyuwo musidadeni ya emwene.”" 
1Samuel27:6 Nihuku nenenenne Akixi aamvaha oZikalagi, tivawo oZikalagi oraaya wa mamwene a aYuda mpaka olelo." 
1Samuel27:7 Davide aakhala mweelaponi ya aFilisti wa eyaakha emoha ni nyeeri mixexe. 
1Samuel27:8 Vanonto Davide ni asilopwanaawe yaarowa, enaawanano aGexuri, aGirizi, ni awAmaleki. Okhuma khalayi miloko iye saamaka mweelaponi mpatta wa oXuri ni wExipitu." 
1Samuel27:9 Khula emaara Davide aawananaawe muttetthe, aawiiva ootheene, mene aakuxa ikhondoolo, imombe, abuuru, ikamelu* ni ikuwo. Vahoolowaya aahokoleela wa aKixi." 
1Samuel27:10 Akixi aakohaawe: “Olelo waawana woowi?” Davide annaakhula: “oNegebi, elapo ya oYuda,” hoye hoye “mpatta wa ohitto wa aKeni.”" 
1Samuel27:11 Owo khaamuhiyaru ni okumi mulopwana hata muthiyana weera ehironghasiwe oGati, niwoko uupuwela: “Apaale awosa anookihima.” Eyo yaari ti epakelowaawe aakhalaawe mweelaponi ya aFilisti." 
1Samuel27:12 Akixi aamuroromela Davide iixuupuwelaka: “Owo ohiinanano mulokwaawe aYixrayeli, tivawo aneeraawe akhale murumeiyaaka wa mahuku ootheene.”" 
1Samuel28:1 Vamahukuni ale aFilisti yaahaathukumanyiha anakhottwaaya weera yaawaneno aYixrayeli. Akixi aamweerela Davide: “Osuwele nnene weera weyo ni asilopwanaawo onoonihoola okhottoni.” 
1Samuel28:2 Davide aamweerala: “Vano nyuwo munoosuwela yeeyo murumeiyaanyu ongweraawe opaka.” Akixi aamwaakhula: “Paahi, kinimookhaliha namalipelelaaka a mahuku ootheene.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Vano Samuweli aahookhwa ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaahiinla okhwawawe. Yaamvitha musidadenimwawe oRama. Sawuli aawoomola mulaponi ootheene yaahera ihako ni yuuluma ni anamakhwa. 
1Samuel28:4 Afilisti yaathukumana, enarowa okonela oXunemi ni Sawuli aawiitthana aYixrayeli ootheene enakonela oGilibowa." 
1Samuel28:5 Sawuli awoonakaru anakhotto a aFilisti, aahoova anatteenguwa." 
1Samuel28:6 Aamukohakoha Yave, mene Yave khaamwaakhunle – naari moolohani, hata ni Urimi* hoye hoye ni maprofeeti." 
1Samuel28:7 Vano Sawuli aaweerela arumeiyaawe: “Mmwasaase muthiyana onuuluma ni minepa weera kirowe kamukohakohe.” Awosa yamwaakhula: “Ookhala mmoha wEnidori.” 
1Samuel28:8 Sawuli aahiitikinsiha, awaraka ikuwo sikina, anarowa ni ohiyu vamoha ni asilopwana eeli mpaka vaate wa muthiyana ole. Aamweerela muthiyana: “Okeemexere munepa wa nsina nno kineeraaka kooleele.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Mene muthiyana aamwaakhula: “Moosuwela nnenesene yeeyo Sawuli opankaawe. Owo aawoomola ootheene ankoha minepa ni anahako ootheene mweelaponi ya oYixreyli. Vano onkirehererela heeni muraakho yoowo oneera okiive?” 
1Samuel28:10 Sawuli aamulipelela mwa Nsina na Yave: “Mwa Nsina na Yave – khamunthorihiwa niwoko na yeeyo.” 
1Samuel28:11 Vano muthiyana aamukoha: “Kiwiitthaneleni taani?” Sawuli aamwaakhula: “Mukiitthanele munepa wa Samuweli?” 
1Samuel28:12 Muthiyana ole oonakaru munepa wa Samuweli, aakhuwelaxa anamweerela Sawuli: “Mukilokontthenleni? Sawuli ti nyeenyu!”" 
1Samuel28:13 Mwene aamweerela: “Ohoove. Onoonani?” Muthiyana aamwaakhula: “Kinoona ntoko munepa onkhuma vathi.” 
1Samuel28:14 Owo aamukoha: “Ori ekhalelo heeni?” Muthiyana aamwaakhula: “Ti mulopwana oowuuluvala awanreene mukaandyo.” Vano Sawuli aasuwela weera aari Samuweli, anuuramela vathi." 
1Samuel28:15 Samuweli aamukoha Sawuli: “Munkixupelani mukivenxaka kaaraaka?” Sawuli aamwaakhula: “Miyo koovalavelihiwa niwoko aFilisti anookiwanano ni Muluku ookihiya. Owo khankaakhula – hata ni maprofeeti naari moolohani. Tivawo kiwiitthannaakani okileela yooweera.” 
1Samuel28:16 Samuweli aamukoha: “Munkikohakoherani Yave oohingyeeneni athatuwaka Mwiittanaanyu? 
1Samuel28:17 Yave aapaka yeeyo aahimmaawe mwa miyo. Aahaahula omwene mmatatanimwanyu, anamvaha mukhwiinyu Davide." 
1Samuel28:18 Yave onoopakani yeeyo olelo, niwoko khamwiiwelenle, naari khankwanihenre isarasawe soowoopiha wa awAmaleki." 
1Samuel28:19 Yave onoowinnyererani nyuwo ni aYixrayeli mmatatani mwa aFilisti ni omaalo nyuwo ni anamwaniinyu munookhala ni miyo. Yave onoowinnyereratho anakhotto a aYixrayeli mmatatani mwa aFilisti.” 
1Samuel28:20 Wootutuxereya Sawuli aamorela vathi emoopihaka masu a Samuweli. Ikurusawe saammalela niwoko aamala othana ni ohiyu wootheene ole ahicaaka. 
1Samuel28:21 Muthiyana ole amwaattamelakaru Sawuli ni oonakaru weera aahoopopiheyaxa, aamweerela: “Moone, murumeiyaanyu muthiyana oowiiwelelani. Kooleva okumaaka kipakaka yeeyo mukilamulenlaanyu." 
1Samuel28:22 Vano dyoontte mmwiiwe murumeiyaanyu. Muce vakhaani weera mphwannye ikuru soopwahererano mukwaahaanyu.” 
1Samuel28:23 Owo aakhoota eeraka: “Nkintthuna oca.” Vanonto asilopwana yaamunyesereriha vamoha ni muthiyana ole, ni owo aawaakhulelasa. Sawuli aavenya vathi anakilaathi vakaamani." 
1Samuel28:24 Woowaakuveya muthiyana aamwiiva mwaamombe ooneneva aarinaawe. Aakuxa ephepa vakhaani, aneetheya, anooxa ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu." 
1Samuel28:25 Vano aamurumeela Sawuli ni asilopwanaawe, enacaasa. Ohiyuweene yoole yaavenya, enapwaha." 
1Samuel29:1 aFilisti yaahaathukumanyiha anakhottwaaya ootheene wAfeki ni aYixrayeli yaakonenle ephattuwelo ya oYizereyeli. 
1Samuel29:2 Asitokweene a aFilisti yeera yeettaka ni mikuttulasaya sa anakhotto ncira hoye hoye macira muloko, Davide ni asilopwanaawe aatthara ottuliwaya ni Akixi." 
1Samuel29:3 Asitokweene a aFilisti yaakoha: “Ankha aHeberi ala?” Akixi aawaakhula: “Ola Davide, mwa yoowo aari mutokweene a anakhotto a Sawuli, mwene a aYixrayeli. Owo ori ni miyo woopwaha eyaakha okhuma nihuku nenenenne aamuhiyalaawe Sawuli ni kheewo opankaawe yookwana omuhovela.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Wa soothesene, asitokweene a aFilisti yaamunyoonyeriwa, enamweerela: “Munghokoloxere nipuro nne mumvanghaanyu. Ahivolowe okhottoni vamoha ni hiyo, niwoko yaapaceraka ekhotto, onooniwanano. Owiiva asilopwanaahu onuukhale moota wooreeraxa wa yoowo weera areereliwe ni apwiyaawe." 
1Samuel29:5 Ti ola mwa yoowo aYixrayeli yaamwiipelaaya yiinaka: “Sawuli aawiiva ancipale, vaheera Davide oopwahaxa.”" 
1Samuel29:6 Vano Akixi aamwiitthana Davide, anamweerela: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave weera weyo woororomeleya ni kaatthuna weera weyo okirumeele okhottoni. Okhuma nihuku weyo waarwiiyaawo wa miyo mpaka olelo nkinoohovele, mene asitokweene khaangwoona nnene." 
1Samuel29:7 Ohokolowe ni orowe mmuretteleni. Ohipake etthu ehinaasiveliha asitokweene a aFilisti.” 
1Samuel29:8 Davide aamukoha: “Kipanke eheeni? Okhuma nihuku kirwiiyaaka mpaka olelo murumeiyaanyu mmoonelenle eheeni? Kintthuna waawanano amwiittana a apwiyaaka mwene.” 
1Samuel29:9 Akixi aamwaakhula: “Koosuwela weera weyo woopaka enkisivela, ntoko ndyelo a Muluku. Wa soothesene, asitokweene a aFilisti yaaheera: ‘Owo ahinihoole okhottoni.’" 
1Samuel29:10 Vano opeherere ovenya vamoha ni arumeiyi a apwiiyaawo waarwaannaawo, ni opwaheke oxeexelo nsuwa nikhumaleene.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Vanonto Davide ni asilopwanaawe yaapehererasa ovenya weera ehokoleele elapo ya aFilisti, vaheera aFIlisti yaarowa oYizereyeli." 
1Samuel30:1 Davide ni asilopwanaawe yaaphiya oZikalagi munihukuni nanaararu. Vano awosa ereene ni Akixi, awAmaleki yaawanano oNegebi ni oZikalagi. Ewanaka ni oZikalagi, aahisa esidade" 
1Samuel30:2 enaavara asithiyana ni ootheene yaari mwemmo – ekhalaka amiravo naari anamuuluvala – enaarowano. 
1Samuel30:3 Davide ni asilopwanaawe ephiyakaru oZikalagi, yaaphwannye esidade ephwatiweene ni mooro ni yaahoona weera axaaraya ni anamwanaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana yaavarasiwa ni awAmaleki." 
1Samuel30:4 Hiiho Davide ni asilopwanaawe yaahiinla ekhuwelaka mpaka okhulumuwa. 
1Samuel30:5 Axaariye ooweeli Davide yaakuxiwatho – Ahinowami oYizereyeli ni Abigayili, naamukhweli a Nabali oKarameli." 
1Samuel30:6 Davide aathananaxa niwoko asilopwana yaatthuna omvonya maluku. Khula mutthu a yaale aatthukhuruwaxa niwoko na anamwanaawe asilopwana ni asithiyana. Vaheera Davide aahiilipihera mwa Yave Mulukwaawe. 
1Samuel30:7 Vano Davide aamweerela musaserdoti* Abiyatari, mwaana mulopwana a Ahimeleki: “Mukiruuheleke mooxikooti a esaseredoti.” Abiyatari aamuruuhela." 
1Samuel30:8 Davide aamukoha Yave: “Kittharatthareke mukuttula wa anamahuhula awo? Nkaaphwanyase?” Yave aamwaakhula: “Mwaattharatthareke. Vekhaikhai munimwaaphwanya ni munoowera waatapuxa anamavariwa.” 
1Samuel30:9 Davide ni asilopwana macira mathannamosa yaaphiya vanxaapwani oBesori ni akina yaahalawo," 
1Samuel30:10 niwoko asilopwana macira meeli yaakhulumuwaxa ehitthunaka olapuwa nxaapwa. Vaheera Davide ni asilopwana macira maxexe yaapwaherera waattharelela. 
1Samuel30:11 Awosa yaamphwanya ngwExipitu mutuphini, enamuronghela Davide. Yaamvaha maahi ni yooca –" 
1Samuel30:12 ekapatthi emoha ya eboolo ya efiigu* ni iboolu piili sa iwuuva* soowuuma. Owo aahooca analipa mmakhuvani, niwoko aaviriha othana miraru ni ohiyu miraru ahicaaka naari ahiwuraka." 
1Samuel30:13 Davide aamukoha: “Weyo ti awani? Orweenle woowi?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Miyo ngwExipitu, epottha ya ngwAmaleki. Pwiiyaaka aakihiya nsana kivoreiwaka." 
1Samuel30:14 Naawanano oNegebi wa aKereti vamoha ni elapo ya oYuda ni mpatta wa ohitto wa elapo ya Kalebi. Naahisatho oZikalagi.” 
1Samuel30:15 Davide aamukoha: “Onoowera onirongha wa mukuttula owo wa anamahuhula?” Owo aamweerela: “Mulipele vamaithoni wa Muluku weera khamukiiva hata khamukinnyerera wa apwiyaaka. Vahoolowaya, kinimoophiihaniwo.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Owo aahaaronga ni yaahaaphwanyawo awAmaleki emwaramwareenleene mmawaani, ecaaka, ewuraka ni ehakalalelaka sooreela sincipale yaahuhunlaaya mweelaponi ya aFilisti ni ya oYuda." 
1Samuel30:17 Waaxiiye, Davide aahaawanano okhuma oxeexelo mpaka wiila ahikhalaka naari mmoha a yaawo oopongwe ehikhanle amiravo macira maxexe yaawenle ikamelu*, enatthawa." 
1Samuel30:18 Davide aatapuxa sootheene awAmaleki yaahuhunlaaya – mpakatho axaariye ooweeli. 
1Samuel30:19 Kheewo yaahaleenleru, hata amiravo, naari anamuuluvala, hoye hoye anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana, hata sooreela naari yakhalaru etthu ekina yaakuxingwe. Davide aatapuxa soothesene." 
1Samuel30:20 Aakuxatho mihuwo sootheene sa awAmaleki ni anakhottwaawe Davide yaaheettiha ohoolo wa axinama akina, yeeraka: “Iya ti soohuhula sa Davide.”" 
1Samuel30:21 Vano Davide aarowa mpaka yaaraayawo asilopwana macira meeli yahaawenre olapuwa nxaapwa na oBesori niwoko na okhulumuwaxa. Awosa yaavenya weera emuciceere Davide ni atthu yaari ni yoowo. Davide ni asilopwanaawe ewaattamelaka hiihaale, owo aawuulumiha." 
1Samuel30:22 Vanonto variyari wa asilopwana yaale yaarongwe ni Davide yaakhala akina alavilavi oowuuma murima yaaheera: “Yeenre yahirowaka ni hiyo, kheewo nneeraahu naavahe sa soohuhula. Wa soothesene, khula mulopwana amukuxeke mwaariye ni anamwanaawe, apwahekeno.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Davide aawaakhula: “Hoye, axunnaka muhipake yeeyo ni seiyo Yave onivangaawe. Owo oonikhapelela awinnyereraka mmatatanimwahu amwiittanaahu yaanirweenle." 
1Samuel30:24 Taani anaakhulele yeeyo munghimaanyu? Makawanelo olikaneke ni yaale yaarongwe okhottoni ni yaahanle. Ootheene yaakheleke moota mmoha.” 
1Samuel30:25 Mwa yeeyo Davide aakhaliha ikano ni soolamula wa aYixrayeli ootheene okhuma nihuku nenenenne mpaka olelo. 
1Samuel30:26 Davide aaphiyalaawe oZikalagi, aahaarumihela mpatta wa soohuhula asitokweene a oYuda yaari asinthamwenaawe, aweerelaka: “Mwaakhele yoovahiwaanyu ekuxiwe mwa sooreela sa amwiittana a Yave.”" 
1Samuel30:27 Aahaarumihela yoovahiwa ele yaale yaakhala oBeteli, mpatta wa ohitto wa oRamoti ni oYatiri;" 
1Samuel30:28 yaale yaakhala wAroweri, oSifemoti, wExetemowa ni" 
1Samuel30:29 oRakali; yaale yaakhala musidadeni sa aYerameeli ni aKeni; 
1Samuel30:30 yaale yaakhala oHorema, oBori-Axani, wAtagi," 
1Samuel30:31 ni oHeberoni ni yaale a mmapuroni moothemwene mwa weiwo Davide ni asilopwanaawe yaavinraayawo. 
1Samuel31:1 Vano aFilisti yaahaawanano aYixrayeli. aYixrayeli yaahaatthawa ni ancipale yiiviwe vamwaako oGilibowa. 
1Samuel31:2 Afilisti yaamuttharelelasa Sawuli ni anamwanaawe asilopwana, enamwiiva Yonatani, Abinadabi ni Maliki-Xuwa, anamwane a Sawuli." 
1Samuel31:3 Ekhotto yaakukuma ni aFilisti yaamphwanya Sawuli moota wooweera ananyuupa yaamulatha enamvulalihaxa. 
1Samuel31:4 Sawuli aamweerela mmiravo aamukuxera kapwitthi: “Ohulule ekatanaawo ni okiiveno weera kihuuliwe muru kikhwelaka mmatatani mwa oohiineliwa ale.” Wa soothesene, mmiravo aamukuxera kapwitthi aahookhwa maririmela ahitthunaka opaka. Vano Sawuli aakuxa ekatanaawe, aniihomana." 
1Samuel31:5 Mmiravo aamukuxera kapwitthi oonakaru weera Sawuli ohookhwa, aahiihoma ni ekatanaawe, anakhwa ni Sawuli." 
1Samuel31:6 Hiiho Sawuli, anamwanaawe asilopwana araru, mmiravo aamukuxera kapwitthi ni anakhottwaawe ootheene yaahookhwa nihuku nenenenne." 
1Samuel31:7 Vano aYixrayeli yaamanke vanreyareyani ni yaale a okhopela Yordanu, esuwelakaru weera anakhotto a aYixrayeli yaatthawa ni weera Sawuli ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ahookhwa, yaathaama isidadesaya enatthawa. aFilisti yaarowa enaakamela seiye." 
1Samuel31:8 Oxaawaya, aFilisti yaarongwaaya ohuhula mittembo, yaamphwanya Sawuli ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ekhwenleene vamwaako oGilibowa." 
1Samuel31:9 Yaamuhita Sawuli, enakuxa ikapwitthisawe, enaarumihela anamitthenga mweelaponi yootheene ya aFilisti weera yalaleiye ihaali mmampaani mwa milukusaya ni variyari wa mulokwaaya." 
1Samuel31:10 Yaahiikaathi ikapwitthisawe mpaani mwa miluksaya siniitthaniwa Axetoroti, enatthukelela muttembwaawe vaxirini ya oBeti-Xani." 
1Samuel31:11 Amaki a oYabexi Giliyade yiiwakaru yeeyo aFilisti yaamupankaaya Sawuli," 
1Samuel31:12 asilopwana oominya murima a eriyaraaya yaaheetta ohiyuweene yoowo erowaka oBeti-Xani. Yaakuruxa muttembo wa Sawuli ni sa anamwanaawe asilopwana vaxirini ya oBeti-Xani, enarowa oYabexi, mwa weiwo yaahisenraayawo." 
1Samuel31:13 Vahoolowaya yaavithasa makhuvaaya vathi va tamargira* oYabexi, enatthuka wa mahuku mathannameeli." 
2Samuel1:1 Akhwiyeene Sawuli, Davide aahokolowa vahoolo woowaawina awAmaleki, anakhala oZikalagi mahuku meeli." 
2Samuel1:2 Vanihukuni nanaararu aaphiya mulopwana mmoha akhumaka aakonenlaawewo Sawuli, soowarasawe saahungweene ni areene itthayaru mmuru. Amwaattamelaka Davide aamuuramela ooniheraka nttittimiho." 
2Samuel1:3 Davide aamukoha: “Onkhumelela woowi?” Mulopwana ole aamwaakhula: “Kitthangwe yaakonenlaayawo aYixrayeli.” 
2Samuel1:4 Davide aamukohatho: “Okithalihere yeereiye.” Owo aamwaakhula: “Anakhottwaahu yaatthawa okhottoni. Ancipale ahiiviwa – hiihotho Sawuli ni mwanawe Yonatani.” 
2Samuel1:5 Vano Davide aamukoha mmiravo aamuruuhenle ihaali iye: “Osuwenle hai weera Sawuli ni mwanawe Yonatani ohookhwa?” 
2Samuel1:6 Mmiravo ole aamwaakhula: “Yeereya kiri vamwaako oGilibowa. Aariwo Sawuli iivonyeraawe vanivakaniwawe, ikaaro sa ikavalu* ni anamweettihaaya ehaleelaka omphwanya." 
2Samuel1:7 Owo arukunuwakaru aakoona, anakiitthana akhuwelaka ni miyo kineera: ‘Miyo kiri va?’" 
2Samuel1:8 Owo aakikoha: ‘Weyo taani?’ Kaamwaakhula: ‘Miyo ngwAmaleki’ 
2Samuel1:9 Vano aakilamulela: ‘Orwe va, okiive! Kihanle vakhaani okhwa.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Tivawo kaamwaattamenlaaka, kinamwiiva, niwoko kaasuwela weera ovulala eenraawe khaakhala. Kaakuxa ecireemba yaari mmurumwawe ni nikosanawe kinooruuhelani nyuwo, pwiiyaaka.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Vano Davide ni asilopwanaawe ootheene ni yoowo yaahaahula soowarasaya. 
2Samuel1:12 Awosa yaatthuka, eniinla mpaka wiila, emulalamikelaka Sawuli, mwanawe Yonatani, anakhotto a Yave ni muloko wa oYixrayeli, niwoko yaahiiviwa ancipale." 
2Samuel1:13 Davide aamukoha mmiravo aamuruuhenle ihaali: “Weyo a woowi?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Miyo mwaana a namarwa, ngwAmaleki.”" 
2Samuel1:14 Davide aamukoha: “Ohoovenle heeni omwiiva oottikittheliwa a Yave?” 
2Samuel1:15 Vano Davide aamwiitthana mmoha a asilopwanaawe, anamulamulela: “Orwe, omwiive.” Vanonto nakhotto ole aamvulaliha anamwiiva." 
2Samuel1:16 Ahinaaye Davide aamweerela: “Nthowa na okhwawawo ti nawawo. Eyanweene yeeyo yohookhalela onamoona weenraawo: ‘Koomwiiva oottikittheliwa a Yave.’” 
2Samuel1:17 Davide aahiipa ecipo yoolalamika ela mwaha wa Sawuli ni mwanawe Yonatani," 
2Samuel1:18 alamulelaka weera yaxuttihiwe asilopwana ootheene a epuumba ya Yuda. Ecipo ela yoolalamika esuweliwe ntoko ecipo ya Nyuura ni yoolempwa mulivuruni ya Yaxari: 
2Samuel1:19 Ii! aYixrayeli! Ovuwawanyu woowiniwa vanttumuxani. Ii! Moone moota akhwiiyaaya anakhotto! 
2Samuel1:20 Muhilaleiye yeeyo oGati hata muhithalihere mmiseweni sa wAxekeloni weera anamwane asithiyana a aFilisti oohiineliwa ehihakalalaxe. 
2Samuel1:21 Ii! Nyaako sa oGilibowa – weera sihikhalenotho nikame hata epula naari imatta sinruwera etrigu ya sooveleela, niwoko wuuwu exikudu* ya ooweraxa yooveihiwa; exikudu* ya Sawuli kheettikittheliwatho makhura" 
2Samuel1:22 ehikhanle ni ephome ya mittembo ni makhura a anakhotto. Muupa wa Yonatani khawaakuza ni ekatana ya Sawuli khayaahululiwa mahala. 
2Samuel1:23 Sawuli ni Yonatani – mookuminimwaya yaari oosiveleya ni mookhwaanimwaya khayaamwalamwaxiwe. Yaari oowaaluwaxa waapwaha axaaka ni oolipaxa oowaapwaha amwatto. 
2Samuel1:24 Ii! Anamwane asithiyana a aYixrayeli – mmwiinlele Sawuli, mwa yoowo oowarihani ikuwo sooxeera ni eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
2Samuel1:25 Moone moota akhwiiyaaya anakhotto mukhottoni! Yonatani okhwenle vamwaakoni. 
2Samuel1:26 Moota kinoothananelaaka munnaka, Yonatani! Moota kootthunaxaaka! Okisivelawawo waari wooreeraxa opwaha osivela wa asithiyana." 
2Samuel1:27 Moone moota akhwiiyaaya anakhotto! Ikapwitthisaya soomala ophwatiwa! 
2Samuel2:1 Eviraleene ehuhu ekina, Davide aamukoha Yave: “Kiroweke esidade emoha emoha ya isidade sa oYuda?” Yave aamwaakhula: “Muroweke.” Davide aamukoha: “Esidade heeni?” Yave aamwakhula: “oHeberoni.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Tivawo Davide aarongwaawe oHeberoni vamoha ni axaarawe ooweeli – Ahinowami oYizereyeli ni Abigayili, naamukhweli a Nabali oKarameli." 
2Samuel2:3 Davide aahaakuxatho asilopwana yaari ni yoowo vamoha ni imusisaya, eniitekiha oHeberoni ni mittetthesaya." 
2Samuel2:4 Vano asilopwana a oYuda yaaphiya oHeberoni, enamuttikitthelawo Davide ntoko mwene a epuumba ya Yuda. Davide iiwakaru weera asilopwana a oYabexi-Giliyade yaamvitha Sawuli," 
2Samuel2:5 aahaarumihelasa anamitthenga aweerelaka: “Yave ooreeliheni niwoko na ororomeleyawanyu woomvitha mwenaanyu Sawuli. 
2Samuel2:6 Yave awooniheraseni murimaawe wooreera ni miyotho kinoowiiraananani niwoko na yeeyo mpankaanyu. 
2Samuel2:7 Vaheera mukhaleke oolipa ni oominya murima, niwoko Sawuli, pwiiyaanyu, ohookhwa ni epuumba ya Yuda yookittikitthela ntoko mwenaaya.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Eyo eri hiiho, Abeneri, mwaana mulopwana a Neri, mutokweene a anakhotto a Sawuli, aamukuxa Ixi-Boxeti, mwaana mulopwana a Sawuli, amurowanaka oMahanayimi." 
2Samuel2:9 Aamukhalihawo mwene a oGiliyade, wAxuri, oYizereyeli, wEfrayimi, oBenyamini ni oYixrayeli wootheene." 
2Samuel2:10 Ixi-Boxeti, mwaana mulopwana a Sawuli, aarino iyaakha miloko mixexe sa okumaawe aapaceraawe olamula oYixrayeli, alamulaka iyaakha piili. Vaheera epuumba ya Yuda yaamutthara Davide." 
2Samuel2:11 Areene oHeberoni Davide aalamula oYuda iyaakha ithannapiili ni nyeeri mithannamosa. 
2Samuel2:12 Abeneri, mwaana mulopwana a Neri, vamoha ni asilopwana a Ixi-Boxeti, mwaana mulopwana a Sawuli, yaavenya oMahanayimi, erowaka oGibiyoni." 
2Samuel2:13 Yowabi, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha, vamoha ni asilopwana a Davide yaavenya, enaakumanano vanrattani na oGibiyoni. Mukuttula mmoha waari ekhopela ela nno ni mukina ekhopela ele." 
2Samuel2:14 Vano Abeneri aamweerela Yowabi: “Nrowe naawanihe anakhotto akina akina ohoolowahu.” Yowabi aamwaakhula: “Nrowe.” 
2Samuel2:15 Hiiho anakhotto muloko neeli a aBenyamini ni a Ixi-Boxeti, mwaana mulopwana a Sawuli yaalapuwa weera yaawaneno asilopwana muloko neeli a Davide." 
2Samuel2:16 Vanonto khula mulopwana aamvara mwiittanaawe muruwaawe, enahomana mpararini moota wooweera ootheenaawo yaahookhwa. Tivawo nipuro nne oGibiyoni niitthaniwaaya Heleka-Hazurimi." 
2Samuel2:17 Nihuku nenenenne ekhotto yaakukumaxa ni asilopwana a Davide yaahaawina Abeneri ni asilopwana a aYixrayeli. 
2Samuel2:18 Anamwane asilopwana araru a Zeruha yaariwo: Yowabi, Asaheli ni Abixai. Vano Asaheli munsaatalani aatthimaka ntoko naahe." 
2Samuel2:19 Aamuttharelela Abeneri, ahihapuwakaru." 
2Samuel2:20 Abeneri aaweha ottuli anamukoha: “Ti nyuwo Asaheli?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Ti yoomi.” 
2Samuel2:21 Vano Abeneri aamweerela: “Fataari ohapuwela moono mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana, mumvaraka nakhooto mmoha mmwaakhaka ikapwitthisawe.” Vaheera Asaheli khaahingye omuttharelela." 
2Samuel2:22 Emaara yanaaveeli Abeneri aamooperera: “Muhikittharelele! Nkintthuna owiivani. Moota heeni kineeraka kingwehe munninyu Yowabi vahoolo woowiivani?” 
2Samuel2:23 Wa soothesene, Asaheli khaatthunne ohiya omuttharelela, tivawo Abeneri amuhommaawe nipwiipwi ni nivaka mpaka ophuttula ottuli. Aamora, anakhwela vaavaale. Khula mulopwana aavinrewo, aaheemela vanipuroni Asaheli aamorenlaawe ookhweene." 
2Samuel2:24 Vaheera Yowabi ni Abixai yaamuttharelela Abeneri ni wiilaka, yaaphiyasa vanttumuxani na Ama, vakhiviru oGiya mphironi enrowa onikareni na oGibiyoni." 
2Samuel2:25 Vano anakhotto a aBenyamini yaathukumana emukhaviheraka Abeneri. Yaahiirehererela mukuttula mmoha, enaakamelasa vasulu nttumuxa." 
2Samuel2:26 Abeneri aamweerela Yowabi: “Khoontthuneya weera niivanane. Ommaleloni onuukhale othananaxa. Yaakhani muneeraanyu mwaalamule asilopwanaanyu ohiya waattharelela axunnaya?” 
2Samuel2:27 Yowabi aamwaakhula: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave – nyuwo mwahuulumme, anakhottwaaka yaampwaherera waattharelela axunnaya mpaka oxa.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Vanonto Yowabi aahiipa nipalapatta, ni asilopwana ootheene yaahiya waattharelela aYixrayeli ni owana." 
2Samuel2:29 Ohiyu ole wootheene Abeneri ni asilopwanaawe yaaheetta eviraka wAraba. Yaamulapuwa Yordanu eviraka elapo yootheene ya oBiteroni, enaphiya oMahanayimi oxeexeloweene yoole." 
2Samuel2:30 Yowabi ahokolowakaru vahoolo woomuttharelela Abeneri, aahaathukumanyiha asilopwanaawe ootheene. Yaahoona weera yaahaleela anakhotto muloko ni athannaaxexe omuhiya Asaheli." 
2Samuel2:31 Vaheera anakhotto a Davide yaawiiva aBenyamini macira mararu ni miloko mithannamosa yaari ni Abeneri. 
2Samuel2:32 Yaamukuxa Asaheli, enamvitha munihiyeni na atithawe oBeteleheemu. Vahoolowaya Yowabi ni asilopwanaawe yaaheettasa ohiyu wootheene, enaphiya oHeberoni oxaaka." 
2Samuel3:1 Ekhotto yaawaniwe variyari wa anamatthara a Sawuli ni a Davide yaalekela. Mpatta wa Davide wannapwaherera oolipa, vaheera wa Sawuli khawaalipa." 
2Samuel3:2 Anamwane asilopwana Davide aayarenlaawe oHeberoni ti ala: Amoni, mwaana mulopwana a Ahinowami oYizereyeli;" 
2Samuel3:3 anaaveeli Kileyabi, mwaana mulopwana a Abigayili, naamukhweli a Nabali oKaremeli; anaararu Abesalomi, mwaana mulopwana a Mahaka mwaana muthiyana a Talemayi, mwene a oGexuri;" 
2Samuel3:4 anaaxexe Adoniya, mwaana mulopwana a Hagiti, anaathanu Xefeteya, mwaana mulopwana a Abitali;" 
2Samuel3:5 ni anaathanammosa Itereyami, mwaana mulopwana a mwaarawe Davide Egela. Ti yaala anamwane Davide aayarenlaawe oHeberoni." 
2Samuel3:6 Ewanawaniwaka hiihaale Sawuli ni Davide, Abeneri aathatuwa mulopwana ooweraxa mumpattani mwa Sawuli." 
2Samuel3:7 Vano Sawuli aakhalano ekuxo yiitthaniwa Rizepa, mwaana muthiyana a Ayiha. Vanonto Ixi-Boxeti aamukoha Abeneri: “Okonanenle heeni ni ekuxo ya atithaka?”" 
2Samuel3:8 Abeneri aanyoonyaxiwa niwoko na yeeyo Ixi-Boxeti uulummaawe, anamwaakhula: “Weeraka miyo mwalapwa a oYuda? Mpaka olelo kinnaroromeleya mweemusini ya Sawuli, ni wa axunnaya ni asinthamwenaaya. Nkoohiyaleni mvariwaka ni Davide. Hata hiiho, munkoothera sa mulattu mwaha wa muthiyana owo!" 
2Samuel3:9 Yave akithorihaxe miyo kaahimpakela Davide yeeyo Yave aamuroromelinghaawe ni nlipelo," 
2Samuel3:10 avenxaka omwene wa Sawuli amvaraka Davide omwene wa aYixrayeli ni aYuda okhuma oDani mpaka oBerxeba.” 
2Samuel3:11 Ixi-Boxeti, amoovaka Abeneri, khaamwaakhunle etthu." 
2Samuel3:12 Vano Abeneri aamurumihela anamitthenga Davide amweerelaka: “Elapo ela yawani? Mpake wiiraana ni miyo ni miyo kinooreherera weera aYixrayeli ootheene ekhale mpattaanyu.” 
2Samuel3:13 Davide aamwaakhula: “Paahi, kinoopaka wiiraana ni nyuwo, mene kintthuna etthu emoha: Nyuwo muhirwe wa miyo muhikiruuhenle Mikali, mwaana muthiyana a Sawuli.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Davide amurumihela anamitthenga Ixi-Boxeti, mwaana mulopwana a Sawuli, amunyesererihaka: “Mukinnyerere mwaaraka Mikali. Kaamuthuma wa Sawuli ni mutteengo wa matusu ncira a aFilisti.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Ixi-Boxeti aalamula weera Mikali aroweliwe wa Palitiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Layixi." 
2Samuel3:16 Wa soothesene, aiyawe yaamutthara yiinlaka mpaka oBahurimi. Vano Abeneri aamweerela: “Muhokoleele owaani” ni owo aahokolowa." 
2Samuel3:17 Abeneri aathukumana ni asitokweene a aYixrayeli aweerelaka: “Okhuma khalayi mootthuna omvara Davide omwene. 
2Samuel3:18 Vano yoophiya ehuhu yoomvara, niwoko Yave aamuroromeliha Davide: ‘Kinoopola mulokwaaka mmatatani mwa aFilisti ni mwa amwaattamanaaya ootheene kimvarelaka muteko murumeiyaaka Davide.’”" 
2Samuel3:19 Abeneri aarowa wuulumatho ni aBenyamini. Vahoolowaya aarowa oHeberoni omuleela Davide sootheene aYixrayeli ni aBenyamini yaakhulenlaaya. 
2Samuel3:20 Abeneri vamoha ni asilopwana miloko miili ephiyaleene wa Davide oHeberoni, owo aamurehererela Abeneri efesta vamoha ni yaawo aaraaweno." 
2Samuel3:21 Vano Abeneri aamweerela Davide: “Mukihiyeke kirowe weera kaathukumanyihe aYixrayeli ootheene, pwiiyaaka mwene, weera awosa epake wiiraana ni nyuwo ni weera mulamule sootheene muntthunaanyu.” Vano Davide aamuhiya Abeneri arowaka, anapwaha mmuretteleni." 
2Samuel3:22 Ehuhuweene yeele asilopwanaawe Davide vamoha ni Yowabi yaahokolowa vahoolo woohuhula nipuro nikina ekuxaleene soohuhula sincipale. Mene Abeneri khaakhanletho ni Davide oHeberoni, niwoko Davide aamuhiya apwahaka mmuretteleni." 
2Samuel3:23 Yowabi aphiyaka ni anakhotto ootheene, aaleeliwa weera Abeneri, mwaana mulopwana a Neri, aaphiya wa mwene ni weera mwene aamuhiya apwahaka mmuretteleni." 
2Samuel3:24 Vano Yowabi aarowa wa mwene, anamweerela: “Mpankeni? Moone, Abeneri aarowa wa nyuwo, munamuhiya apwahaka!" 
2Samuel3:25 Moomusuwela Abeneri, mwaana mulopwana a Neri. Aarweenle woolokotthani woona okhalawanyu ni seiyo mumpakaanyu.”" 
2Samuel3:26 Yowabi aamuhiya Davide, anamurumihela anamitthenga Abeneri ni awosa yaamuhokoloxa okhuma ohimeni ya oSira. Vano Davide khaasuwenle yeeyo." 
2Samuel3:27 Vano Abeneri ahokoleelakaru oHeberoni, Yowabi aamwiitthana okhwipi vamulako wa esidade, uulumakano ntoko exiiri. Vanonto Yowabi aamvulaliha nipwiipwi. Abeneri aakhweenle niwoko na ephome ya Asaheli, munneiye Yowabi." 
2Samuel3:28 Vahoolowaya, Davide iiwakaru yeeyo, aaheera: “Wa mahuku ootheene miyo ni omwenaaka khanikhalanoru nthowa vamaithoni wa Yave mwaha wa ephome ya Abeneri, mwaana mulopwana a Neri." 
2Samuel3:29 Nthowa na okhwa wa Abeneri nikhale na Yowabi ni emusaawe yootheene! Ahikhale a ekhapiraawe anaahaleele ohaawa ithuku sootathareya, maleepela, orakala, wiiviwa ni ekatana hoye hoye ovoliwa etala.”" 
2Samuel3:30 Yowabi ni munneiye Abixai yaamwiiva Abeneri niwoko owo aamwiiva munneiye Asaheli mukhottoni ya oGibiyoni. 
2Samuel3:31 Vano Davide aamweerela Yowabi ni ootheene yaari ni yoowo: “Mwaahule soowarasanyu, ngware sa wiinanela ni munghoolele Abeneri munlalamikelaka!” Mwene Davide muneenaawe aatthara edyaneesa ya muttembo." 
2Samuel3:32 Yaamvitha Abeneri oHeberoni ni mwene aahiinla akhuwelaka ohoolo wa nihiye na Abeneri. Ni atthu ootheene yaahiinlatho. 
2Samuel3:33 Mwene aahiipa ecipo ya omulalamikela Abeneri: “Khawaawereya Abeneri okhwa ntoko mutakhali. 
2Samuel3:34 Hata matataanyu naari inaawosanyu khasaatthukiwe ni onyooro. Nyuwo mukhwiiye ntoko mutthu oniiviwa ni alavilavi.” Ni atthu ootheene yaamwiinlelaxa yoowo. 
2Samuel3:35 Vahoolowaya yaawo yaari ni Davide yaamudyoonttelela oca etthu ohinaaye wiila, mene Davide aalipela eeraka: “Yave akittaruxe miyo kaca yakhalaru etthu ohinaaye wiila.”" 
2Samuel3:36 Ootheene yaahoona ni eyo yaahaasiveliha. Vekhaikhai sootheene mwene aapankaawe sannaasiveliha. 
2Samuel3:37 Nihuku nenenenne aYixrayeli ootheene yaasuwela weera Davide khaakhalenle mpatta wa wiiviwa wa Abeneri, mwaana mulopwana a Neri." 
2Samuel3:38 Vano mwene aaweerela asilopwanaawe: “Khamusuwenle weera olelo mwaana a mwene ni mulopwana oottittimiheyaxa ohookhwa oYixrayeli? 
2Samuel3:39 Olelo, kirookhalaru mwene oottikittheliwa ni Muluku, kookhulumuwa. Anamwane ale a Zeruha ti oolipa okipwaha miyo. Yave amuttaruxe yoowo ophwanenle ottaruxiwa mwa yoonanaraawe!”" 
2Samuel4:1 Ixi-Boxeti mwaana mulopwana a Sawuli iiwakaru weera Abeneri aahookhwa oHeberoni, aatteenguwa ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaahoovaxa." 
2Samuel4:2 Vano Yaakhala asilopwana eeli yaamurumeela mwaana mulopwana a Sawuli yaari asitokweene a mikuttula miili sa anamahuhula. Oopacera iitthaniwa Bahana ni anaaveeli Rekabi. Yaari anamwane a Rimoni, muBeheroti, a epuumba ya Benyamini. Vanonto esidade ya oBeheroti yaalikeleliwa oBenyamini." 
2Samuel4:3 Amaki a oBeheroti yaatthawela oGitayimi ankhala weiwo ntoko anamarwa mpaka olelo. 
2Samuel4:4 Vano Yonatani, mwaana mulopwana a Sawuli, aakhalano mwaana mulopwana aari oorakala metto. Aarino iyaakha ithanu siiwanyeyaaya ihaali oYizereyeli weera Sawuli ni Yonatani aahiiviwa. Amayawe oomphwanya yaamukuxa, enatthawano, mene yaakuveyaka hiihaale aahaamora, ni owo aahonyongowa, anarakala. Nsinanawe naari Mefiboxeti." 
2Samuel4:5 Vanonto Rekabi ni Bahana, anamwane asilopwana a Rimoni, muBeheroti, yaavenya, erowaka wa empa ya Ixi-Boxeti, enaphiyawo ehuhu yoovihaxa nsuwa, owo eera iitthuuwaka othana." 
2Samuel4:6 Yaavolowasa mpaani ntoko anrowela etrigu, enamuhoma nipwiipi, enatthawa." 
2Samuel4:7 Yaavolowa mpaani owo iixaatalenleene mukwaartunimwawe. Vahoolo woomuhoma ni woomwiiva, yaamuhitasa. Ekuxaka murwaawe, yaaheettano ohiyuweene yoowo eviraka wAraba." 
2Samuel4:8 Yaamuruuhela Davide muru wa Ixi-Boxeti, enamweerela: “Ola muru wa Ixi-Boxeti, mwaana mulopwana a Sawuli, mwiittanaanyu, aatthuna owiivani. Olelo Yave oomwiinlela ikukuttula mwenaahu ni pwiiyaahu, Sawuli ni ekhapiraaweene.”" 
2Samuel4:9 Davide aamwaakhula Rekabi ni Bahana, anamwane asilopwana a Rimoni, muBeheroti: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave, mwa Yoowo okooponle mwa sookacamiha sootheene:" 
2Samuel4:10 Mukina akileelakaru: ‘Sawuli ohookhwa,’ uupuwelaka weera onkiruuhela ihaali sooreera, kaamvara, kinamwiiva oZikalagi. Naari ntthuvelo na ihaali aaruuhalaawe!" 
2Samuel4:11 Wootepaxa anamatakhala amwiivale mulopwana oohinthowa mpaani ni vakaamaniwawe. Vekhaikhai kinimwaattaruxasa kaamalamalihaka mweelaponi niwoko na ovuuviha ephomaawe!” 
2Samuel4:12 Vano aahaalamulela anakhottwaawe ni awosa yaawiivasa ooweeli. Vahoolowaya yaakutula matataaya ni inaawosaya enatthukelela mittembosaya orattani na oHeberoni. Vaheera yaakuxa muru wa Ixi-Boxeti, enavitha munihiyeni na Abeneri oHeberoni." 
2Samuel5:1 Ipuumba sootheene sa aYixrayeli saamwaattamela Davide oHeberoni, sinamweerela: “Hiyo emusaanyu xaxaxa." 
2Samuel5:2 Khalayi, Sawuli areene nlelo mwenaahu, ti nyuwo mwaahoolela anakhotto a aYixrayeli mukhottonimwaya. Yave aaweerelani: ‘Nyuwo mmwaahoolele aYixrayeli mulokwaaka ni munookhala mutokweenaaya.’”" 
2Samuel5:3 Asitokweene ootheene a aYixrayeli yaarowasa omukumanano mwene Davide oHeberoni. Mwene owo aawiiraanano oHeberoni vamaithoni wa Yave ni awosa yaamuttikitthela Davide ntoko mwene a aYixrayeli. 
2Samuel5:4 Davide aapacenre olamula areeneno iyaakha miloko miraru sa oyariwawawe, analamula iyaakha miloko mixexe." 
2Samuel5:5 oHeberoni aalamula oYuda iyaakha iithannapiili ni nyeeri mithannamosa ni oYerusaleemu aahaalamula aYixrayeli ootheene iyaakha miloko miraru ni tthaaru. 
2Samuel5:6 Mwene ni asilopwanaawe yaahaattamela oYerusaleemu weera yaawaneno aYebusi yaamankewo. aYebusi yaamweerela: “Khamungwera ovolowamo. Mpaka oorakala ni oohoona anoowera owoomolani.” Awosa yuupuwela: “Davide khangwera ovolowamo.” 
2Samuel5:7 Hata hiiho, Davide aawina esidade yoolipihiwaxa ya oSiyoni, enathatuwa esidade ya Davide." 
2Samuel5:8 Nihuku nne Davide aaheera: “Mukina atthuna waawina aYebusi, avireke mmaahini mmaahini weera aphiye wa oohoona ni oorakala ari amwiittana a Davide. Tivawo yeeriwaaya: ‘Atthu oorakala ni oohoona ehivolowe empa ya mwene.’”" 
2Samuel5:9 Vano Davide aahiitekiha esidade yoolipihiwaxa ele, anatteha Esidade ya Davide. Aateka exiri okhuma oMilo* mpaka empa ya mwene." 
2Samuel5:10 Owera wa Davide wannapwaherera, niwoko Yave Muluku a ikuru sootheene aari ni yoowo." 
2Samuel5:11 Vano Hirami, mwene a oTiro, aamurumihela anamitthenga Davide vamoha ni itthaabwa sa esedari*, makalipinteiru ni anamateka a impa. Awosa yaamutekela Davide empa ya mwene." 
2Samuel5:12 Davide aasuwela weera Yave aamwaakhulela ntoko mwene a aYixrayeli ni annamweettihera nnene omwenaawe eerelaka muloko wa aYixrayeli. 
2Samuel5:13 Athaamiyeene oHeberoni arowaka oYerusaleemu, Davide aakuxa ikuxo sikina ni axaara akina, anaayaratho anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana." 
2Samuel5:14 Yaayareliwe oYerusaleemu, masinaaya ti ala: Xamuwa, Xobabi, Natani, Salomoni," 
2Samuel5:15 Ibehari, Elixuwa, Nefeki, Yafiya," 
2Samuel5:16 Elixama, Eliyada ni Elifeleti." 
2Samuel5:17 aFilisti yiiwakaru weera Davide oovariwa omwene wa aYixrayeli, anakhottwaaya ootheene yaarowasa omwaasa, mene Davide aahiiwa yeeyo, anarowa woolipawo." 
2Samuel5:18 Vano aFilisti emwareelasiyeene munreyareyani na oRefayimi; 
2Samuel5:19 ni Davide aamukoha Yave: “Kaawananeke aFilisti? Nyuwo munoowinnyerera mmatatanimwaka?” Yave aamwaakhula: “Murowe, niwoko Miyo kinoowinnyerera mmatatanimwanyu.”" 
2Samuel5:20 Vanonto Davide aarowa oBahali-Perazimi, anawinawo. Aaheera: “Yave ohaaphwata amwiittanaaka ohoolowaka ntoko mirupi soowoopihaxa.” Tivawo aattenghaawe nipuro nne Bahali-Perazimi." 
2Samuel5:21 aFilisti yaahiyaawo milukusaya soolokottha ni Davide vamoha ni asilopwanaawe yaakuxa iye. 
2Samuel5:22 Emaara ekina aFilisti yaaheettatho enamwareela mureyareyani na oRefayimi. 
2Samuel5:23 Tivawo Davide aamukonghaawe Yave ni Owo aamwaakhula: “Mwaawananaka, muhiluluwaneno, mene mwaarukureere ottuliwaya ni mwaawaneno ohoolo wa nyiri sa balsamu*." 
2Samuel5:24 Mwiiwaru oruma wa mikhitto osulu wa nyiri sa balsamu*, mwaakuveke niwoko eyo eniikhale eneneero weera Yave oorowa ohoolowaanyu owiiva anakhotto a aFilisti.”" 
2Samuel5:25 Vano Davide aapaka yeeyo Yave aamulamulenlaawe, anaawiiva aFilisti okhuma oGibiyoni mpaka oGezeri." 
2Samuel6:1 Davide aahaathukumanyihatho anakhotto ooreerela variyari wa aYixrayeli, ootheenaawo yaari 30 000." 
2Samuel6:2 Owo ni ootheene yaamuhoola yaattimulasa erowaka oBahala oYuda weera yaakuxe Arka* a Muluku mwa yaawo yiitthaneliwaaya ni Nsina na Yave a ikuru sootheene akilaathiki vahiceni variyari wa akerubini* varkani*. 
2Samuel6:3 Yaawiikaathi Arka* a Muluku mukaaroni enyowani enaathaamiha vaate wa Ahinadabi yaari vanttumuxani. Uza ni Ahiyo, anamwane a Ahinadabi, ti yeettiha ekaaro enyowani," 
2Samuel6:4 Arka* ereene vasuluwaya, ni Ahiyo ti eetta ohoolowaya." 
2Samuel6:5 Davide ni aYixrayeli ootheene yeetta yiinaka ni yiipaka ni murima wootheene vamaithoni wa Yave ni amakita, atthakare ikoma, ikaruma sikina sa nyiri ni ikengere." 
2Samuel6:6 Yaaphiyaaya nipuro nimveeriwa* etrigu na Nakoni, Uza aahookola moono, anaavarela Arka* a Muluku, niwoko imombe saakwakwathuwa." 
2Samuel6:7 Yave aamunyoonyeriwa Uza niwoko na epakelowaawe yoohitteela. Tivawo Muluku aamvulalinghaawe, anakhwela vaavaaleene mukerekhere wa Arka* a Muluku." 
2Samuel6:8 Vano Davide aanyoonyiwa niwoko na isara sa Yave, ni mpaka olelo nipuro nne nniitthaniwa Perezi-Uza." 
2Samuel6:9 Nihuku nne Davide aamoova Yave, aneera: “Moota heeni kineeraaka kaakuxe Arka* a Yave?”" 
2Samuel6:10 Khaatthunne waakuxa Arka* a Yave weera ekhale ni yoowo musidadeni ya Davide. Ohiyanawaya aaronghale vaate wa Obedi-Edomi, muGati." 
2Samuel6:11 Arka* a Yave yaakhala vaatevawe Obedi-Edomi, muGati, wa nyeeri miraru ni Yave aamureeliha yoowo ni emusaawe yootheene." 
2Samuel6:12 Vanonto mwene Davide aaleeliwa: “Yave oomureeliha Obedi-Edomi ni emusaawe yootheene ni sootheene orinaawe niwoko na Arka* a Muluku.” Vano Davide ni ohakalala otokotokoko wa efesta aarowa vaate wa Obedi-Edomi, analamulela weera eronghiwe Arka* a Muluku esidade ya Davide." 
2Samuel6:13 Yaateexa Arka* a Yave yeettaaya malipa mathannamosa, owo aaveleelaawe emombe ni mwaamombe ooneneva." 
2Samuel6:14 Davide, angwanreene mooxikootti a esaseredoti a eliinyu*, anniina vamaithoni wa Yave ni murimaawe wootheene," 
2Samuel6:15 owo ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaakuxaleene Arka* a Yave ekhuwelaka ni oruma wa mapalapatta. 
2Samuel6:16 Vano Arka* a Yave evolowaka esidade ya Davide, Mikali, mwaana muthiyana a Sawuli, aaweha areene vaxanelani. Owo amoonaka mwene Davide iinaka ni ahakalalaka vamaithoni wa Yave, khaamoonenle." 
2Samuel6:17 Yaahaaruuha Arka* a Yave, enawiikaathi vanipuroniwaya muheemani Davide aarehererenlaawe, anapaka sooveleela soohisa ni sa murettele vamaithoni wa Yave." 
2Samuel6:18 Owo amalihakaru opaka sooveleela soohisa ni sa murettele, aareeliha muloko mwa Nsina na Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
2Samuel6:19 Vano aamvaha khula mutthu a aYixrayeli ootheene – asilopwana ni asithiyana – epaawu emoha, eboolu emoha ya itaamara*, ni eboolu emoha ya iwuuva* soowaarikiwa. Vahoolowaya atthu ootheene yaattimula, khula mutthu arowaka owannyawe." 
2Samuel6:20 Davide aarowaawe owaani weera areelihe emusaawe, Mikali, mwaana muthiyana a Sawuli, aamuciceera, anamweerela: “Moota olelo mwene a aYixrayeli iiveihalaawe, arulaka vamaithoni wa ipottha ithiyana sa arumeiyaawe ntoko mutthu piswa!" 
2Samuel6:21 Davide aamweerela Mikali: “Ettiitthu kohiina vamaithoni wa Yave, mwa Yoowo okithanlale miyo aahiyaka atithinyu hoye hoye akina a vaatewaya weera akikhalihe namalamula a muloko wa Yave – aYixrayeli! Kinoohakalala vamaithoni wa Yave.”" 
2Samuel6:22 Kinimwiiyevihatho kiiveihaka ntoko muhimmaanyu. Vaheera kinoottittimihiwa ni ipottha ithiyana, mwa seiyo munghimaanyu.”" 
2Samuel6:23 Vanonto Mikali, mwaana muthiyana a Sawuli, khaayanreru mpaka okhwawawe." 
2Samuel7:1 Vahoolowaya mwene aahiitekiha mpaanimwawe ya emwene ni Yave amwiitthuuwiha wa amwiittanaawe ootheene yaamurukureenre. 
2Samuel7:2 Aamweerela Natani, mprofeeti: “Miyo kinkhala va kimankeene mpaani ya emwene yoopakiwa ni nyiri sa esedari*, Arka* a Yave epwahereraka okhala muheemani piswa.”" 
2Samuel7:3 Natani aamwaakhula mwene: “Mpake yeeyo muntthunaanyu, niwoko Yave ori ni nyuwo.”" 
2Samuel7:4 Ohiyuweene yoole Yave aamweerela Natani: 
2Samuel7:5 “Murowe mwamuleele murumeiyaaka Davide: ‘Yave oneera ha: Khamuhiyono nyuwo muneera mukitekele empa weera kikhalemo.
