2Samuel7:6 Okhuma nihuku kaakhuminghaaka aYixrayeli wExipitu mpaka olelo nkinakhale mpaani; kaakhalakhala paahi muheemani. 
2Samuel7:7 Mapuro ootheene kaaviraviraaka ni aYixrayeli ootheene, nkinavekeleru naari epuumba emoha kithanlalaaka weera ehoolele mulokwaaka, aYixrayeli okitekela empa ya nyiri sa esedari*.’" 
2Samuel7:8 Vano, mwamuleele murumeiyaaka Davide: ‘Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: Kohoovenxani mwaacihaanyuwo muhuwo weera mukhale namalamula a mulokwaaka, aYixrayeli." 
2Samuel7:9 Mmapuroni moothemwene mwaaviraviraanyu kaari ni nyuwo. Kohaawina amwiittanaanyu ootheene ohoolowanyu. Vano kinoovuwiha nsinananyu, ntoko masina a atthu oottittimiheyaxa mweelaponi ya vathi." 
2Samuel7:10 Kinoorehererela nipuro mulokwaaka, aYixrayeli, kimakihaka weera okhalane etthokwaayaxa ni ohuungurumihiwe. Miloko sootakhala khasoohooxaniru ntoko woopacera," 
2Samuel7:11 ni okhuma ehuhuweene yeele kaakhalinghaaka aphuki wa mulokwaaka, aYixrayeli. Kinoowiitthuuwihani wa amwiittanaanyu ootheene. Yave oneeratho weera Owo muneenaawe onookhaliha omwenaanyu." 
2Samuel7:12 Waamalaka okumaanyu, muniitthuuwa vamoha ni makholowaanyu, kinoomukhaliha mmoha a ekhapiraanyu weera oorandeleni. Owo onookhala a ekhapiraanyu ni Miyo kinookhaliha omwenaawe." 
2Samuel7:13 Ti yoowo anaakitekele Empa attittimiherelaka Nsinanaka ni kinoolipiha ehice ya omwenaawe wa mahuku ootheene. 
2Samuel7:14 Nkikhale Atithawe ni anaakhale mwanaka. Atapanya, kinoomuttaruxa ni nttaruxo na atthu ni ikwamba angwaxulelanaaya atthu." 
2Samuel7:15 Vaheera omusivelawaka khommala wa mahuku ootheene ntoko kivenxalaaka omusivelawaka Sawuli, mwa yoowo kimvenxalaaka ohoolowanyu." 
2Samuel7:16 Emusaanyu ni omwenaanyu onuukhale wa mahuku ootheene ohoolowaka; ehicaanyu ya emwene eniipwaherere wa mahuku ootheene.’” 
2Samuel7:17 Natani aamuthalihera Davide masu ootheene aalangheriwaawe ni ooniheriwaawe ni Yave. 
2Samuel7:18 Vano mwene Davide aavolowa mutabernaakuluni, anakilaathi vamaithoni wa Yave, anavekela: “Ii! Yave onlamula sootheene, miyo ni emusaaka taani wookiruuhela ekhalelo ela olelo?" 
2Samuel7:19 Ohiya toko yeeyo, Yave onlamula sootheene, mohuulumatho sa muhoolo wa ekhapira ya murumeiyaanyu. Ti hiiha Yave onlamula sootheene, mungwerihaanyu atthu?" 
2Samuel7:20 Nkirino masu makina. Moomusuwela nnenesene murumeiyaanyu, Yave onlamula sootheene." 
2Samuel7:21 Moopaka etthu etokotoko ela ni moomuthupululela murumeiyaanyu niwoko na moosivelani maswaanyu, muttharihaka otthunawanyu." 
2Samuel7:22 Ii! Yave onlamula sootheene, Nyuwo mutokweenexa! Khawowo onlikana ni Nyuwo ni nkiniiwe sa muluku mukina ntoko Nyuwo." 
2Samuel7:23 Mulokwaanyu aYixrayeli ti woohilikanxereyatho. Ti muloko mmoharu Muluku ooponlaawe weera okhale mulokwaawe. Hiiho Muluku aatatuxa Nsinanawe na epili. Aapaka sootikhiniha sitokotoko oomoloka miloko ni milukusaya ohoolo wa muloko ola ooponlaawe wExipitu. 
2Samuel7:24 Nyeenyuweene mookhaliha mulokwaanyu, aYixrayeli, ntoko wawinyu wa mahuku ootheene ni Nyuwo, Yave, moothatuwa Mulukwaaya." 
2Samuel7:25 Vano, Yave Muluku, mukwanihere wa mahuku ootheene yoororomelihaanyu mwaha wa murumeiyaanyu ni ekhapiraawe. Mpake yeeyo muroromelinghaanyu" 
2Samuel7:26 weera Nsinananyu nivuwihiwe mahuku ootheene. Hiiho atthu eniyeere: ‘Yave a ikuru sootheene ti Muluku a aYixrayeli!’ Ni ekhapira ya murumeiyaanyu Davide eniikhale yoolipeene vamaithoniwanyu. 
2Samuel7:27 Ii! Yave a ikuru sootheene, moomuthupululela yeeyo murumeiyaanyu mweenraanyu: ‘Kinimookhaliherani omwene.’ Tivawo murumeiyaanyu olipihalaawe murima woowoovekelani." 
2Samuel7:28 Ii! Yave onlamula sootheene, Nyuwo Muluku! Maswaanyu ti oororomeleya ni Nyuwo moomuroromeliha murumeiyaanyu etthu yooreera ela." 
2Samuel7:29 Vano, ni onnenaanyu mureelihe ekhapira ya murumeiyaanyu weera eyo epwaherere vamaithoniwanyu wa mahuku ootheene. Nyuwo Yave onlamula sootheene, moororomeliha yeeyo! Ekhapira ya murumeiyaanyu eniireelihiwe mahuku ootheene niwoko na mareelihowaanyu.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Eviraka ehuhu, Davide aahaawina aFilisti, anaalamula. Owo aakuxa oMetegi-Ama wa aFilisti." 
2Samuel8:2 Davide aahaawinatho aMowabe. Aahaakuha, anaaringa avarelaka muteko mpatta wa mukhoyi. Owo uurela khula mpatta wanaararu wooringiwa. Khula mipatta miili saahala, aamwiiva. Hiiho aMowabe yaalamuliwa ni Davide emulivaka musoko." 
2Samuel8:3 Ohiyanawaya, Davide aamuwananotho Hadadezeri, mwaana mulopwana a Rehobi, mwene a oZoba, owo eereraawe okuxatho mweelaponi mukerekhere mooloko Efratesi." 
2Samuel8:4 Davide aakuxa ikaaro sa ikavalu* macira muloko sa Hadadezeri ni anamweettiha ikaarosene seiye macira miloko mathannameeli nitho anakhotto 20 000. Aahintaka mapitaaya ootheene a ikavalu* sa ikaaro ahiyaka ikavalu* ncira. 
2Samuel8:5 Vano awArami a oDamasku yaarwiiyaaya omukhavihera Hadadezeri, mwene a oZoba, Davide aawiiva 22 000 a anakhottwaaya." 
2Samuel8:6 Davide aakhaliha mikuttula sa masintinela moomweneni wa awArami oDamasku ni awArami yaalamuliwa ni yoowo, emulivaka musoko. Vano Yave aanangwiniha Davide mmipattani sootheene aarowaawe." 
2Samuel8:7 Davide aakuxa ixikudu* soowiixaakihera sa eyuuma yoorikaxa sa asitokweene a Hadadezeri, anaruuha oYerusaleemu." 
2Samuel8:8 Owo aakuxatho ebronze* yincipale oTeba ni oBerotayi, mittetthe sa Hadadezeri." 
2Samuel8:9 Vano Tohu, mwene a oHamati, iiwakaru weera Davide aahaawina anakhotto ootheene a Hadadezeri," 
2Samuel8:10 aamurumihela mwanawe, Yorami, wa mwene Davide weera amuulumihe ni amuttottopeleke niwoko na owinawawe mukhottoni ni Hadadezeri, mwa yoowo aari mwiittana a Tohu. Yorami aakuxa ni yoowo ikaruma sa eyuuma yoorikaxa, eparatha* ni ebronze*." 
2Samuel8:11 Mwene Davide aamutteelihera Yave ikaruma iye, ntoko aapakenlaawe ni eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha* ya miloko sootheene aawinnaawe:" 
2Samuel8:12 awEdomi, aMowabe, awAmoni, aFilisti ni awAmaleki. Aatteeliheratho soohuhula saakuxiwe wa Hadadezeri, mwaana mulopwana a Rehobi, mwene a oZoba." 
2Samuel8:13 Vahoolo woowiiva awEdomi 18 000 Vanreyareyani na Maakha, Davide aatepaxa okhala ni epili." 
2Samuel8:14 Owo aakhaliha mipatta sa masintinela mweelaponi yootheene ya wEdomi ni awEdomi ootheene yaalamuliwa ni yoowo. Yave aangwiniha Davide mapuro ootheene aarowaawewo. 
2Samuel8:15 Davide aalamula muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli apakaka yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai ni yoororomeleya wa mulokwaawe wootheene. 
2Samuel8:16 Yowabi, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha, aari mutokweene a anakhotto ootheene a aYixrayeli ni Yehoxafati, mwaana mulopwana a Alihudi, aari mutokweene a ilivuru sa nyaha." 
2Samuel8:17 Zadoki, mwaana mulopwana a Ahitubi, ni Ahimeleki, mwaana mulopwana a Abiyatari, yaari asaserdoti*; Seraya aari namalepa a mwene." 
2Samuel8:18 Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yoiyada, annaalamula aKereti ni aPeleti ni anamwane asilopwana a Davide yaari asaserdoti*." 
2Samuel9:1 Davide aakoha: “Mweemusini ya Sawuli ookhala ohanle? Kintthuna omoonihera murimaaka wooreera niwoko na omusivelawaka Yonatani.” 
2Samuel9:2 Vano, aakhala murumeiyi mmoha a vaate wa Sawuli, iitthaniwa Ziba. Aamwiitthana weera aphiye ohoolo wa Davide ni mwene aamukoha: “Weyo Ziba?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Ti miyo murumeiyaanyu.”" 
2Samuel9:3 Vanonto mwene aamukoha: “Mweemusini ya Sawuli ookhala ohanle? Kintthuna omoonihera onnene wa Muluku.” Ziba aamwaakhula mwene: “Ohaleenle ti mwaana mulopwana mmoha a Yonatani, oorakala imetto soomiili.”" 
2Samuel9:4 Mwene aamukoha: “Ori woowi?” Ziba aamwaakhula: “Ori vaate wa Makiri, mwaana mulopwana a Amiyeli oLo-Debari.”" 
2Samuel9:5 Vano mwene Davide aalamula oroweliwa oLo-Debari, vaate wa Makiri, mwaana mulopwana a Amiyeli." 
2Samuel9:6 Vano Mefiboxeti, mwaana mulopwana a Yonatani, mwaana mulopwana a Sawuli aphiyakaru wa Davide, aahuuramihela ekhovaawe vathi. Davide aamukoha: “Mefiboxeti.” Owo aamwaakhula: “Ti yoomi, murumeiyaanyu.”" 
2Samuel9:7 Davide aamweerela: “Muhoove. Vekhaikhayini kinoowooniherani murima wooreera niwoko na waasivelawaka atithinyu Yonatani. Kinimoohokoloxerani ilapo sootheene saari sa apwiyaanyu Sawuli ni munimooca ni miyo mahuku ootheene. 
2Samuel9:8 Mefiboxeti aahuurama, anamweerela: “Murumeiyaanyu taani weera mumpwatthe mwalapwa ookhwa ntoko miyo?”" 
2Samuel9:9 Vano mwene aamwiitthana Ziba, murumeiyi a Sawuli, anamweerela: “Koomuhokoloxera musulwaya a Sawuli apwiiyaanyu, sootheene saari sawawe ni emusaawe." 
2Samuel9:10 Weyo, anamwanaawo, ni murumeiyawo olimeke emattaawe omuruuhelaka soohepha weera saatte vaate wa osuulu wa apwiyaawo. Mefiboxeti, osuulu wa pwiiyaawo, onimooca ni miyo mahuku ootheene.” Vano Ziba aakhalano anamwane asilopwana muloko naathanu ni arumeiyi miloko miili." 
2Samuel9:11 Ziba aamweerela mwene: “Murumeiyaanyu onoopaka sootheene pwiiyaaka mwene onlamulaawe weera apake.” Vanonto Mefiboxeti aaca ni Davide, ntoko mmoha a anamwanaawe." 
2Samuel9:12 Mefiboxeti aakhalano mwaana mulopwana mmiravo iitthaniwa Mika ni ootheene a vaatewawe Ziba yaari arumeiyi a Mefiboxeti. 
2Samuel9:13 Mefiboxeti aakhala oYerusaleemu niwoko aaca ni mwene. Vano aari oorakaleene imetto. 
2Samuel10:1 Eviraka ehuhu, mwene awAmoni aahookhwa ni mwanawe mulopwana Hanuni ti aamurandenle." 
2Samuel10:2 Davide aahuupuwela: “Kinoomoonihera murima wooreera Hanuni, mwaana mulopwana a Nahaxi, ntoko atithawe yaakireerenlaaya.” Tivawo aaruminghaawe anamitthenga wa Hanuni weera oonihere othananawawe niwoko na okhwa wa atithawe. Vanonto anamitthenga a Davide yaaphiyalaaya mweelaponi ya awAmoni," 
2Samuel10:3 maneethi a awAmoni yaamweerela pwiiyaaya Hanuni: “Muhuupuwele weera Davide onimwaattittimiha atithinyu aarumihelaka asilopwana weera oonihere opepesa. Owo aarumihenle ohottela esidade eerelaka okuxa.” 
2Samuel10:4 Vano asilopwana a Hanuni yaahaavara anamitthenga a Davide, enaamettha ireru okopolomoha, enarenkha soowarasaya mmakhuttuni, enaahiya erowaka." 
2Samuel10:5 Iiwakaru yeeyo, Davide aahaarumihela anamitthenga weera yaaciceere asilopwana ale niwoko yaamuulihiheya muru. Mwene aaweerela: “Ngweherere oYeriko mpaka irerusanyu wunnuwa ni vahoolowaya muhokoleeleke owaani.”" 
2Samuel10:6 awAmoni, esuwelaka weera yaahiitothela manyaanya wa Davide, yaahaaliva anakhotto 20 000 awArami oBeti-Rehobi ni oZoba nitho mwene a oMahaka vamoha ni anakhotto macira muloko ni anakhotto 12 000 a oTobi." 
2Samuel10:7 Iiwakaru yeeyo, Davide aamulamulela Yowabe weera arowe ni anakhotto ootheene." 
2Samuel10:8 awAmoni yaarowa, enathataanela owana vamulako wa esidade; awArami a oZoba ni Rehobi ni asilopwana a Tobi ni a oMahaka ethataanenleene mmatta." 
2Samuel10:9 Yowabe aahoona weera ooriciwa, anaathanla akina a anakhotto ooweeraxa oYixrayeli weera yaawaneno awArami." 
2Samuel10:10 Aahaahiya anakhotto akinaawo elamuliwaka ni Abixai, munneiye, weera yaawaneno awAmoni." 
2Samuel10:11 Yowabe aamweerela Abixai: “awArami yalipaxa okipwaha miyo, nyuwo murwe mukikhavihere; awAmoni yalipaxa woopwahani nyuwo, miyo kinimookhaviherani." 
2Samuel10:12 Murima khuru, niwanele mulokwaahu ni isidade sa Mulukwaahu oolipeene murima. Yave apake yeeyo enimureerela.”" 
2Samuel10:13 Vano Yowabe ni anakhottwaawe yaarowa waawanano awArami enamutthawasa. 
2Samuel10:14 awAmoni yoonakaru weera awArami yaamutthawa Yowabe, awosatho yaamutthawa Abixai, enatthawelasa musidade. Vanonto Yowabe aahiya waawanano awAmoni, anahokoleela oYerusaleemu." 
2Samuel10:15 awArami yoonaka weera aawiniwa ni aYixrayeli, yaathukumanatho." 
2Samuel10:16 Hadadezeri aalamulela oruuhiwa awArami yaakhala okhopela mooloko. Awosa yaaphiyasa oHelami, ehooleliwaka ni Xobaki, mutokweene a anakhottwaawe Hadadezeri." 
2Samuel10:17 Davide aleeliwaka yeeyo, aahaathukumanyiha aYixrayeli ootheene, enamulapuwa Yordanu, enaphiya oHelami. awArami yaathataana weera yaawaneno anakhotto a Davide." 
2Samuel10:18 Wa soothesene, yaahaatthawasa aYixrayeli. Davide aawiiva anamweettiha a ikaaro sa ikavalu* 700 ni anakhotto 40 000. Xobaki, mutokweene a anakhotto, aaphwanyihiwa anakhwela vaavaaleene." 
2Samuel10:19 Mamwene ootheene yaamukhavihenre Hadadezeri yoonakaru weera awArami aawiniwa ni aYixrayeli, yaahaavekela murettele aYixrayeli enalamulasiwa ni yaale. Tivawo awArami yahaatthunaaya waakhaviheratho awAmoni." 
2Samuel11:1 Mmalayaakha, mweehuhuni mamwene yaakhovelenlaaya owana, Davide aamurumihela Yowabi vamoha ni arumeiyaawe ni anakhotto ootheene a aYixrayeli okhottoni. Yaahaaphwata awAmoni, enarica oRaba. Vaheera Davide aahanle oYerusaleemu." 
2Samuel11:2 Oxekuwa omoha Davide aavenya vakaamani, aneetteetta vataratoni ya empa ya mwene. Areene hiihaale vataratoni, aamoona muthiyana ooreeraxa arapaka." 
2Samuel11:3 Davide aamurumihela mukina weera amusuwele muthiyana taani yoole. Mulopwana owo aamweerela Davide: “Ti Batixeba, mwaana muthiyana a Eliyami, mwaarawe Uriya, muHiti.”" 
2Samuel11:4 Vano Davide aalamulela oruuhiwa. Betixeba aarowa wa yoowo ni Davide aamukonano. Eera amalihaleene vaanaanoru mwiikho wa asithiyana. Vahoolowaya aahokoleela owaani. 
2Samuel11:5 Muthiyana ole aarupala, anamurumihela ihaali Davide eeraka: “Koorupala.”" 
2Samuel11:6 Vano Davide aamurumihela mutthenga ola Yowabe: “Mukirumihele Uriya, muHiti.” Vanonto Yowabe aamurumiha." 
2Samuel11:7 Uriya aphiyakaru, Davide aamukoha moota aaraawe Yowabe ni anakhotto ni moota ekhotto yeettaaya." 
2Samuel11:8 Vano Davide aamweerela: “Murowe owannyinyu, mwiitthuuwe vakhaani.” Uriya aavenya empa ya mwene ni aarumiheliwa yoovaha ya mwene." 
2Samuel11:9 Vaheera, Uriya aakonne vamulako wa empa ya mwene vamoha ni arumeiyi a apwiyaawe ootheene ahirowaka owaani." 
2Samuel11:10 Davide iiwakaru weera Uriya khaarongwe owaani, aamukoha: “Munkhuma ottai – muroweke owaani.”" 
2Samuel11:11 Uriya aamwaakhula: “Arka* ni asilopwana a oYixrayeli ni oYuda aniitthuuwa muheemani ni pwiiyaaka Yowabe ni anakhotto a pwiiyaaka akonelanse vattendereni. Vekhaikhai nkingwera orowa owaani weera kace, kawure ni kamukoneno mwaaraka! Kinlipela mwa okumaanyu weera nkipaka siiyeeyo!”" 
2Samuel11:12 Vano Davide aamweerela: “Mukhaleke wenno wa nihuku nimohatho. Vahoolowaya kinimoohokoloxerani.” Tivawo Uriya aakhanlaawe oYerusaleemu nihuku nne ni oxaawaya. 
2Samuel11:13 Davide aamulattula, ni Uriya aahooca ni aawura ni yoowo ni Davide aamuhapaliha. Wa soothesene, ohiyu, Uriya aavenya, anarowa okona vamwinliniwawe ni arumeiyi a apwiyaawe; khaarongwe owaani." 
2Samuel11:14 Oxaawaya Davide aamulepela ekaratta Yowabe, amwinnyereraka Uriya." 
2Samuel11:15 Mukarattani mmwe aalepa: “Munghoolihe Uriya mmwiikaathiki mpatta eneeraaya eluttuwaxe ekhotto ni mwamuhiyewo meekhaawe weera avulalihiwe ni akhwe.” 
2Samuel11:16 Eenre Yowabe arica esidade, aamwiikaathi Uriya vanipuroni yaaraaya amwiittanaaya oolipaxa." 
2Samuel11:17 Asilopwana a esidade yaavenyaaya weera yaawanane anakhotto a Yowabe, akina a anakhotto a Davide yaahookhwa – hiihotho Uriya, muHiti." 
2Samuel11:18 Yowabe aamurumihela Davide sooweereya sootheene sa okhottoni. 
2Samuel11:19 Aamulamulela namutthenga: “Mwaamalihakaru oomvaha mwene ethalihero ela ya ekhotto," 
2Samuel11:20 wookhala woonyoonyiwaka mwene ookohakani: ‘Mwaakhuveelelaxa heeni esidade weera ngwanewo? Khamwaasuwela weera awosa yaaheereke woolathasani ereene vaxirini? 
2Samuel11:21 Taani amwiivale Abimeleki, mwaana mulopwana a Yerubi-Bexeti? Aari muthiyana mmoha vaxirini aamukurukundulenle nxilo vamuruwawe moota wooweera aahookhwa oTebezi. Mwaakhuveelela heeni exiri?’ Owo ookohani yeeyo, vano mwamwaakhule: ‘Mpaka murumeiyaanyu Uriya, muHiti ohookhwa.’”" 
2Samuel11:22 Namutthenga aapwaha, anaphiya wa Davide, anamuthalihera sootheene Yowabe aamulamulenlaawe ohima." 
2Samuel11:23 Namutthenga aamweerela Davide: “Amwiittana yaanirweela mmatta eniwananaka moota woovihaxa onipwaha hiyo, mene noowoomola mpaka vamulako wa esidade." 
2Samuel11:24 Vano alipa oolatha nyuupa vaxirini yaahaalathela arumeiyaanyu ni akina a asilopwana a mwene aahookhwa. Murumeiyaanyu Uriya, muHiti, ohookhwatho.”" 
2Samuel11:25 Davide aamweerela namutthenga: “Mwamuleele Yowabe: ‘Muhiicikulele niwoko na yeeyo. Itthu iya sinneereya mukhottoni. Mpwaherere owanano esidade mpaka ophwata.’ Mwamuleele yeeyo Yowabe weera alipiheye murima.” 
2Samuel11:26 Mwaarawe Uriya iiwakaru weera aiyawe ahookhwa, aawiinlela." 
2Samuel11:27 Omalakaru wiinanela, Davide aalamulela weera aruuheliwe owannyawe ni owo aamuthela, anamuyarano mwaana mulopwana. Vano, yeeyo Davide aapankaawe khayaamusivenle Yave." 
2Samuel12:1 Yave aamurumihela Davide mprofeeti Natani. Aphiyakaru, aamweerela: “Musidadeni emoha yaakhala asilopwana eeli – mmoha aari namapuha ni mukina oohaawa." 
2Samuel12:2 Namapuha aarino ikhondoolo ni imombe sincipalexa," 
2Samuel12:3 Vaheera mulopwana oohaawa khaarino mihuwo ehikhanle eputtiputthi ekhaani aathummaawe. Owo aahuwa, enunnuwa ni yoowo vamoha ni anamwanaawe. Eyo yaaca vamoha, yaawurera ekomixaawe – mpakatho yaakona vayaawaniwawe. Yaari ntoko mwaana muthiyana wa yoowo." 
2Samuel12:4 Vano muletto mmoha aaphiyera vaate wa namapuha, mene owo khaatthunne omwiivela emoha ya ikhondoolosawe hoye hoye imombesawe weera amwaapeele. Ohiyanawaya, aakuxa eputtiputthi ya mulopwana oohaawa, anamwaapeela muletto aamphiyerenle.”" 
2Samuel12:5 Davide aamunyoonyeraxiwa namapuha ole, anamweerela Natani: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave, mulopwana opanke yeeyo omphwanela wiiviwa!" 
2Samuel12:6 Owo aliveke mutteengo wa imaara ixexe wa eputtiputthi, eenre apaka etthu eyo ahimorelaka ikharari.”" 
2Samuel12:7 Vano Natani aamweerela Davide: “Mutthweene yoowo ti nyuwo! Yave Muluku a aYixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Kohoottikitthelani omwene wa aYixrayeli ni kohoovuluxani mmatatani mwa Sawuli. 
2Samuel12:8 Kohoovahani empa ni axaara a pwiiyaanyu. Kohoovahani ikhapira sa aYixrayeli ni aYuda. Sootheene iye sahookhwanneni, saano koovangheenenitho." 
2Samuel12:9 Muramburenle heeni masu a Yave mpakaka yeeyo eri yoonanara vamaithoniwawe? Momwiiva Uriya, muHiti, ni ekatana ya awAmoni, munamukuxa mwaariye." 
2Samuel12:10 Mweenre mukiramburaka munkuxaka mwaariye Uriya, muHiti, vaatevanyu, khoomala owanawana.’" 
2Samuel12:11 Yave oneeratho ha: ‘Kinimuulihiha muru veemusiniwanyu. Vamaithoniwanyu kinimwaakuxa axaarinyu kimvahaka mukina ni owo onimwaakonano woohikhuwanyeya. 
2Samuel12:12 Moopaka etthu ele muxiirini; Miyo kinoopaka yeeyo woohikhuwanyeya vamaithoni wa aYixrayeli ootheene.’” 
2Samuel12:13 Vano Davide aamweerela Natani: “Koomutthekela Yave.” Natani aamwaakhula: “Yave oolevelela yootthekaanyu. Nyuwo khamukhwa. 
2Samuel12:14 Wa soothesene, mweenre munruwana Yave, mwaninyu mulopwana onimookhwa.”" 
2Samuel12:15 Natani arongweene owaani, Yave aamutannyera eretta mwaana a mwaariye Uriya muHiti aamuyarannaawe Davide." 
2Samuel12:16 Davide aamudyoonttelela Yave amweerelaka mwaana ole. Owo aatthuka, anavolowa mpaanimwawe avirihaka ohiyu akonneene puruvuru." 
2Samuel12:17 Asitokweene a vaatevawe yaaheerera omvenxa vathi, mene aakhootta ni khaatthunne oca." 
2Samuel12:18 Vanihukuni nanaathannameeli mwaana ole aahookhwa. Arumeiyi a Davide yaahoova omuleela weera mwaana ohookhwa, niwoko yuupuwela: “Mwaana nlelo areene ni okumi, naamuulumano, mene owo khaaniiwelenle. Moota heeni nneeraahu nimuleele weera mwaana ohookhwa? Apaale onoopaka etthu ya ololo.”" 
2Samuel12:19 Davide oonaka weera arumeiyi yaamwaapelana, aasuwela weera mwaana aahookhwa, aahaakoha: “Mwaana ohookhwa?” Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Ohookhwa.”" 
2Samuel12:20 Vano Davide aavenya, anarapa, aniixunkheliha, anaceendya soowara, anavolowa Empa ya Yave, anamutthapela. Vahoolowaya aarowa owannyawe, anavekela oreherereliwa yooca, anaca." 
2Samuel12:21 Arumeiyaawe yaamukoha: “Mumpakelani hiiha? Mwaana areene mukumi, mwaatthuka mwiinlaka, vaheera mwaana akhwaakaru, mumvenyaanyu, munaca!”" 
2Samuel12:22 Owo aawaakhula: “Mwaana areene mukumi, kaatthuka, kiniinla, kuupuwelaka: ‘Apaale Yave onookimorela ikharari amuhiyaka mwaana okhala ni okumi.’" 
2Samuel12:23 Vaheera, eenre akhwaaka, khoontthuneya weera kitthuke. Nkingwera omuhokoloxera okumi. Miyo kinoorowa wa yoowo, mene owo khahokoleela wa miyo.”" 
2Samuel12:24 Vano Davide aamupepesa mwaariye, anarowa wa yoowo, anamukonano. Batixeba aamuyanre mwaana mulopwana, anamutteha Salomoni. Yave aamusivela," 
2Samuel12:25 ni aamurumihela Davide mprofeeti Natani ni mutthenga. Natani aamutteha mwaana Yedidiya. 
2Samuel12:26 Eyo eri hiiho, Yowabe aawanano oRaba wa awAmoni ni aakuxa esidade ya emwene." 
2Samuel12:27 Vano Yowabe amurumihela Davide anamitthenga eeraka: “Koowanano oRaba, kinaakamela mattankhi a maahaaya." 
2Samuel12:28 Vano ngwiitthane anakhotto akina ootheene, mwawaneno esidade ni mwakuxe. Mwaahikuxa esidade, kinimwiiwanyeya weera koowina.”" 
2Samuel12:29 Vanonto Davide aawiitthana anakhotto ootheene, anarowa oRaba, anawanano, anakuxa." 
2Samuel12:30 Aamurula ecireemba vamuru wa mwenaaya – olemelawaya waari ikiilu* miloko miraru niixexe. Ecireemba ele yaakhalano maluku oowaaraxa. Aatthukiwa Davide. Owo aakuxa soohuhula sincipalexa sa esidade. 
2Samuel12:31 Aahaaruuhatho amaki a esidade ele, anaanyesereriha ovara muteko ni esera*, epikareta* ni ipaso. Yaalamuleliwatho opaka indyerwa. Davide aapaka hiiho isidade sootheene sa awAmoni. Vahoolowaya Davide ni anakhottwaawe yaahokolela oYerusaleemu." 
2Samuel13:1 Eviraka ehuhu, Amenoni, mwaana mulopwana a Davide, aamusivela Tamari, murokoriye ooreeraxa a Abesalomi, munneiye a wuutiithini." 
2Samuel13:2 Owo aathananiheya niwoko na murokoriye a wuutiithini Tamari, moota wooweera owo aavoreiwa, eenre akhala mwaamwali oowiikosoopa ni khaawera omwaattamela." 
2Samuel13:3 Vano Amenoni aakhalano nthamwene mmoha iitthaniwa Yonadabi, mwaana mulopwana a Ximeya, munneiye Davide. Yonadabi ole aari oocendyera." 
2Samuel13:4 Owo aamukoha Amenoni: “Heeni nyuwo, mureene mwaana mulopwana a mwene, muraanyuno ekhalelo yoothananaxa nihuku ti nihuku? Mukileele, enoovirani.” Amenoni aamwaakhula: “Kinimusivela Tamari, murokoriye munnaka, Abesalomi.”" 
2Samuel13:5 Yonadabi aamweerela: “Murowe vakaamani moothererihaka ovoreiwa. Vano atithinyu yaarwaaka wooxekurani, mwaaleele: ‘Kintthuna weera murokoraka Tamari akiruuhele yooca. Owo akirehererele yooca vamaithoniwaka weera kimooneke ni kice mmatatanimwawe kimoonaka.’”" 
2Samuel13:6 Vanonto Amenoni aahaakhulela miruku iye, aniixaatalela oothererihaka ovoreiwa. Mwene aarongwaawe omuxekura, Amenoni aamweerela: “Kintthuna weera murokoraka Tamari arweeke akireherereleke iboolu piili vamaithoniwaka weera kice mmatatanimwawe.”" 
2Samuel13:7 Davide aamurumihela mutthenga Tamari mpaani mwa mwene: “Oroweke wa empa ya acimweenaawo Amenoni, waarehererele yooca.”" 
2Samuel13:8 Vano Tamari aarowa wa empa ya acimweenaawe Amenoni, yiixaatalenle. Owo aaheetheya ephepa, anapaka iboolu vamaithoniwawe, anooxa." 
2Samuel13:9 Vahoolowaya aakuxa yooxeriwa, anamuruuhela iboolu, mene aakhootta oca. Amenoni aalamulela weera ootheene ekhume. Vano ekhumaleene ootheene," 
2Samuel13:10 aamweerela Tamari: “Mukiruuhele mukwaartunimwaka weera kice mmatatanimwanyu.” Tamari aakuxa iboolu aarehererenlaawe acimweenaawe, anaaroihela mukwaartunimwaya." 
2Samuel13:11 Vanonto, owo aakhuveelaawe weera amurumeele, Amenoni aamvara, aneera: “Murokoraka, mukone ni miyo!”" 
2Samuel13:12 Tamari aamwaakhula: “Hoye acimweene, muhikiverule! Khaneeriwa ola oYixrayeli! Muhipake ololoweene yoowo!" 
2Samuel13:13 Eniikeereni? Nkitapuxeye hai overuliwawaka? Eheeni eniyookhaleeni? Nyuwo enimoomorelani erisa oYixrayeli. Dyoontte, muulume ni mwene. Owo onimootthuniherani weera nithelane.”" 
2Samuel13:14 Wa soothesene, aakhootta omwiiwelela ni eenre alipaxa ompwaha Tamari, aamukoniha." 
2Samuel13:15 Vahoolowaya Amenoni aapacera omuthanyaxa opwaha osivela otokotoko aaraaweno wopacera. Aamweerela: “Ovenye ni opwahe!” 
2Samuel13:16 Owo aamwaakhula: “Muhinakoomola, niwoko yoonanara ela enootepa opwaha yeela mukipankaanyu vaanaano va.” Vaheera aakhootta omwiiwelela." 
2Samuel13:17 Aamwiitthana murumeiyaawe a vaatevawe, anamulamulela: “Omukhumihere vaate muthiyana ola ni okokottele nsele!”" 
2Samuel13:18 Vano murumeiyaawe aamukhumihera vaate, anakokottela nsele. Tamari aawara mukaandyo wooxoraxoriwa woorakama, niwoko owo waari moota yaawaraaya anamwane asithiyana a mwene yaari asimwali oowiikosoopa." 
2Samuel13:19 Tamari aahiihela ettuura mmurumwawe, anaahula mukaandyowaawe iivarenleene muru aakuxera ephiro akhuwelaka ni iinlaka." 
2Samuel13:20 Acimweenaawe Abesalomi yaamukoha: “Yoonanara heeni yoopankaayani acimweenaanyu Amenoni? Mmaaleke murokoraka. Awo ti acimweenaanyu. Muhipwaherere othananela.” Oothananaxeene Tamari aakhala vaate wa acimweenaawe Abesalomi. 
2Samuel13:21 Mwene Davide iiwakaru yeeyo aanyoonyaxiwa. 
2Samuel13:22 Abesalomi khaamuulumenle etthu Amenoni yooreera hata yoonanara. Wa soothesene, aamuthanya Amenoni niwoko na omuverula murokoriye Tamari." 
2Samuel13:23 Siviraka iyaakha piili, anamamettha a ikhondoolo sa Abesalomi ereene oBahali-Hazori vakhiviru wa mwiinano wa wEfrayimi, Abesalomi aahaalattula anamwane asilopwana ootheene a mwene weera athukumaneno." 
2Samuel13:24 Abesalomi aarowa wa mwene, anamweerela: “Anamamettha a murumeiyaanyu aapacera mutekwaaya. Kaatthuna weera mwene ni anamalakaawe ephiye ofestaniwaka.”" 
2Samuel13:25 Mwene aamwaakhula: “Hoye, mwanaka, nihirowe ootheene niwoko eyo enimoolemelani. Abesalomi aamundyoonttelelaru, khaarongwe ni aamureeliha." 
2Samuel13:26 Vano Abesalomi aamvekela: “Mwa yeeyo, dyoontte muntthunihere munnaka Amenoni weera arowe ni hiyo.” Mwene aamukoha: “Heeni ontthunaawo weera owo oroweno?”" 
2Samuel13:27 Abesalomi annamdyoonttelela moota wooweera mwene aamutthunihera Amenoni ni anamwanaawe asilopwana akina orowano. 
2Samuel13:28 Abesalomi aahaalamulela asilopwanaawe: “Mwiiwe! Amenoni ahapaliwa eviinyu ni miyo kaweerelani: ‘Mmwiive Amenoni,’ vano mmwiive. Muhoove, niwoko ti miyo koolamulenleni. Mulipe ni mminye murima!”" 
2Samuel13:29 Vano asilopwana a Abesalomi yaampakela Amenoni yeeyo Abesalomi aalamulenlaawe. Anamwane asilopwana ootheene a mwene yaavenya, enaawela aburwaaya, enatthawa." 
2Samuel13:30 Awosa etthawaka hiihaale, Davide aahaakhela ihaali iya: “Abesalomi oowiiva anamwane asilopwana ootheene; khahanleru.”" 
2Samuel13:31 Mwene aavenya, anaahula ikuwosawe, anuuramihela ekhovaawe vathi. Arumeiyi ootheene aaraaweno yaahaahulasatho ikuwosaya." 
2Samuel13:32 Vano Yonadabi, mwaana mulopwana a Ximeya, munneiye Davide aamweerela: “Pwiiyaaka, muhuupuwele weera owo oowiiva anamwaniinyu ootheene; iiviwe paahi Amenoni. Yaari yoovaanela ya Abesalomi okhuma nihuku nenenenne Amenomi aamukoninghaawe murokoriye Tamari." 
2Samuel13:33 Muhipwatthe ihaali sineera weera anamwaniinyu ootheene ahookhwa. Ti Amenoni paahi okhwiiye.” 
2Samuel13:34 Eyo eri hiiho, Abesalomi aatthawa. Vano mulopwana aari namalipelela aaweha, anawoona atthu ancipale mmuseweni mpatta ninkela nsuwa, ekhuruwaka vanttumuxani. Namalipelela ole aarowa, anamuthalihera mwene: “Koowoona asilopwana mpatta wa oHoronayimi, mukerekhere vanttumuxani.”" 
2Samuel13:35 Yonadabi aamweerela Davide: “Moone, anamwaniinyu aaphiya. Yookhumelela ntoko murumeiyaanyu ooleenlaaweni.”" 
2Samuel13:36 Owo amalihaka wuuluma, anamwane asilopwana a mwene yaawa ni ikuttho. Mwenetho ni arumeiyaawe ootheene yaahiinlaxa." 
2Samuel13:37 Abesalomi aatthawa, anarowa wa Talemayi, mwaana mulopwana a Amihudi, mwene a oGexuri. Vanonto Davide annamuthananela Mwanawe mahuku ootheene." 
2Samuel13:38 Abesalomi atthawenleene oGexuri, aakhalawo iyaakha tthaaru." 
2Samuel13:39 Vano Davide aapacera wunkheliwa ni Abesalomi, niwoko aapepeseya okhwa wa Amenoni." 
2Samuel14:1 Yowabe, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha, aasuwela weera Davide ohunkheliwa ni Abesalomi." 
2Samuel14:2 Vano Yowabe aalamulela oroweliwa oTekowa muthiyana a miruku. Owo aamweerela muthiyana: “Moothererihe wiinanela. Ngware ikuwo sa olalamika ni muhiixunkhelihe. Mweettelowaanyu okhale ntoko wa oviringhe ehuhu yincipale iinanelaka. 
2Samuel14:3 Vano murowe wa amwene ni mwaaleele masu ala.” Ni Yowabe aamuleela masu muthiyana eeraawe athalihe. 
2Samuel14:4 Muthiyana a oTekowa iixooniheraawe wa mwene, aahuuramihela ekhovaawe vathi ooniheraka nttittimiho, anamweerela: “Dyoontte mwene, mukikhavihere!”" 
2Samuel14:5 Mwene aamukoha: “Mulattu heeni muraanyuno?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Vekhaikhai miyo naamukhweli; aiyaka ahookhwa. 
2Samuel14:6 Murumeiyaanyu ookhalano anamwane asilopwana eeli. Nihuku nimoha, yaangwana mmatta. Khaakhanlewo mukina weera awaanganyule. Mmoha aammana mukina, anamwiiva." 
2Samuel14:7 Vano nihimo na atthu ootheene noomweemelela murumeiyaanyu muthiyana nimunyesereraka: “Mmwinnyerere yoole namwiiva weera nimwiive niwoko na okumi wa munneiye – owo khaphwanenle okhala namahiyeriwa. Awosa antthuna okaakha yeeyo keeraaka kiwutele maithori nihipwahereraka nsina na aiyaka hata ekhapira mweelaponi.” 
2Samuel14:8 Mwene aamweerela muthiyana: “Murowe owaani, miyo kinoolamulela weera orehereriwe mulattwaanyu.”" 
2Samuel14:9 Vaheera muthiyana a oTekowa aamweerela: “Ii! Pwiiyaaka, mwene, ikuru sikhaleke sawaka ni sa emusi ya atithaka; mwene muhiivekelele nthowa na omwene ni na ehicaanyu.”" 
2Samuel14:10 Mwene aamwaakhula: “Akhala mukina aneera awoopopiheni, mukiruuhele. Owo khookacamihanitho.”" 
2Samuel14:11 Owo aamweerela: “Dyoontte, mulipele mwa Nsina na Yave, Mulukwaanyu weera muhimutthunihere akhalaru nakukuttula ohononeliwe omwiiva. Hiiho mwanaka mulopwana khaphwatiwa.” Davide aamwaakhula: “Mwa Nsina na Yave – hata vakhaani mwaninyu owo khiiviwa.”" 
2Samuel14:12 Vanonto muthiyana aamweerela: “Muntthunihere murumeiyaanyu weera uulumetho etthu wa mwene pwiiyaawe.” Owo aamwaakhula: “Muulumeke.” 
2Samuel14:13 Owo aamukoha mwene: “Muupuwenle hai opakela muloko wa Muluku etthu siiyeela? Amwene muulumaka hiiho, muniithoriha muneenaanyu, niwoko amwene khamuntthunihenre ohokolowa yoowo oomoliwe." 
2Samuel14:14 Khoongwereya osemba okhwawahu – ntoko ohingwereyaaya wuukanya maahi ayeeherengye vathi. Wa soothesene, Muluku khaniivaru. Ohiyanawaya, onaasaasera moota wooweera oowoomoliwa ahimurakamele." 
2Samuel14:15 Vano kirweenle wuuluma yeela wa nyuwo amwene pwiiyaaka, niwoko atthu aakoopopiha. Murumeiyaanyu ohuupuwela: ‘kinimuuluma ni mwene. Apaale onoopaka yeeyo murumeiyaawe omvekelaawe." 
2Samuel14:16 Khuno mwene onimwaakhulela omutapuxa murumeiyaawe mmatatani mwa mulopwana ontthuna okiiva miyo ni mwanaka wa yoohiyeriwa, mwa yeeyo Muluku oonivanghaawe.’" 
2Samuel14:17 Vano masu a murumeiyaanyu ti ala: ‘Olakela wa apwiya, mwene okiruuhele wiitthuuwa, niwoko pwiiya, mwene ori ntoko ndyelo a Muluku ongwera okawanyiha yooreera ni yoonanara. Yave Mulukwaanyu akhale ni nyuwo.’”" 
2Samuel14:18 Vanonto mwene aamweerela muthiyana: “Mukaakhuleke nnenesene yeeyo kineeraaka kookoheeni.” Muthiyana aamwaakhula: “Pwiiyaaka mwene muulumeke.” 
2Samuel14:19 Mwene aamukoha: “Iya miruku sa Yowabe, keera?” Muthiyana aamwaakhula: “Vekhaikhai, pwiiyaaka mwene, nkingwera okhootta moonnaanyu. Khaawo ongwera wookhuwani etthu. Aani, ti murumeiyaanyu Yowabe okilamulenle opaka yeeyo." 
2Samuel14:20 Owo aapaka yeeyo weera aceendye mukhalelo ola. Vaheera pwiiyaaka ti a miruku ntoko ndyelo a Muluku – munsuwela sootheene sinkhumelela mweelaponi ela.” 
2Samuel14:21 Mwene aamweerela Yowabe: “Wooreera. Kinimwaakhulela yooveka ela. Murowe, mwamuhokoloxe mmiravo Abesalomi.”" 
2Samuel14:22 Yowabe aahuramihela ekhove vathi, anamureeliha mwene amweerelaka: “Pwiiyaaka mwene, olelo murumeiyaanyu oosuwela weera moomoonihera murima wooreera, niwoko mwene ohaakhulela nivekelo na murumeiyaawe.”" 
2Samuel14:23 Vanonto Yowabe aarowa oGexuri, anamuruuha Abesalomi amuhokoloxeraka oYerusaleemu." 
2Samuel14:24 Vano, mwene aaheera: “Owo aroweke owannyawe. Khantthuniheriwa woona ekhovaaka.” Hiiho Abesalomi aarowa owannyawe ni khoonnetho ekhove ya mwene." 
2Samuel14:25 Variyari wa aYixrayeli ootheene khaariworu mulopwana ooreera ni oottapaheriwa ntoko Abesalomi. Mweerutthuni yootheene khaarakhanleru. 
2Samuel14:26 Imaara sootheene mayihaawe yaamulemelaxaaya, owo annamettha, aphimaka olemelawaya waakhala ikiilu* piili ni vakhaani olikanaka ni olemela wa emwene." 
2Samuel14:27 Abesalomi aakhalano anamwane asilopwana araru ni mwaana muthiyana mmoha. Vano nsinanawe mwaana muthiyana naari Tamari ni aari ooreeraxa. 
2Samuel14:28 Abesalomi aakhala oYerusaleemu iyaakha piili ahoonaka ekhove ya mwene. 
2Samuel14:29 Vano Abesalomi aamwiitthana Yowabe weera amurumihele wa mwene, mene Yowabe aakhootta orowa. Tivawo aamwiitthannaawe emaara yanaaveeli, mene aakhoottatho." 
2Samuel14:30 Abesalomi aaweerela arumeiyaawe: “Moone, ematta ya Yowabe eri mukerekhere emattaaka ni kheereeremo esevada*. Murowe mwahiseke.” Vanonto arumeiyi a Abesalomi yaahisa ematta." 
2Samuel14:31 Yowabe aarowa owannyawe Abesalomi, anamukoha: “Arumeiyaanyu ahinsenreni mmattamwaka?”" 
2Samuel14:32 Abesalomi aamwaakhula: “Moone, koowiitthanani weera koorumiheni wa mwene ni mutthenga ola: Kirweenle heeni oGexuri? Fataari kaahaarwiiye!’ Vano kintthuna woona ekhove ya mwene ni miyo kaphwanela okhwa, mwene akiiveke.”" 
2Samuel14:33 Yowabe aarowa wa mwene, anamuthalihera yeeyo. Davide aamwiitthana Abesalomi ni owo aavolowa, anuuramihela ekhovaawe vathi ohoolo wa mwene. Vano mwene aamuulumiha ni ebeecu." 
2Samuel15:1 Eviraka ehuhu, Abesalomi aaphwanya ekaaro; ikavalu* ni asilopwana miloko mithanu etthimakelaka ohoolowawe." 
2Samuel15:2 Owo annapeherera ovenya akhalaka mukerekhere mmuseweni onkela wa mulako wa esidade. Khula emaara mukina aaviraawewo omuthalihera mwene mulattwaawe weera alakele, Abesalomi annamwiitthana amukohaka: “Munkhuma muttetthe heeni?” Mutthu ole aakhula weera ti mmoha a ipuumba sa aYixrayeli," 
2Samuel15:3 vano Abesalomi annamweerela: “Mulattwaanyu wooreera ni khoonthowa, mene khawoworu mwaakhula a mwene aniiwe.”" 
2Samuel15:4 Aapwaherera eeraka: “Ii! Waari weera kookhalihiwa mphuki a elapo! Mwa yeeyo ootheene yakhalano mulattu hoye hoye makacamiho kaamuthorihela moota wa ekhaikhai.” 
2Samuel15:5 Imaara sootheene mukina aamwaattamelaawe weera amukokhorele ooniheraka nttittimiho, Abesalomi ookola moono avariwaka wahala ni abeeciwaka ntata." 
2Samuel15:6 Waari mweettelo wa Abesalomi wa ootheene yaarwa wa mwene yaasaasaka opakeliwa ekhaikhai mmulattunimwaya ni hiiho aYixrayeli yaapacera omukupaleela. 
2Samuel15:7 Simalakaru iyaakha ixexe, Abesalomi aamweerela mwene: “Mukitthunihere orowa oHeberoni weera kakwaniherewo nlipelo kaapankaaka vamaithoni wa Yave." 
2Samuel15:8 Murumeiyaanyu aaraawe oGexuri, wArami, aalipela ha: ‘Yave akihokoloxera oYerusaleemu, kinoomulapa oHeberoni.’”" 
2Samuel15:9 Mwene aamweerela: “Murowe mmuretteleni.” Tivawo aarongwaawe oHeberoni. 
2Samuel15:10 Vano Abesalomi aahaarumihela anamitthenga muxiirini atthu a ipuumba sootheene sa aYixrayeli eeraka: “Mwiiwaru oruma wa mapalapatta, vano mweere: ‘Abesalomi ti mwene oHeberoni!’”" 
2Samuel15:11 Asilopwana macira meeli a oYerusaleemu yaamuhoola Abesalomi. Yaalattuliwa, enarowawo ehisuwelaka naari ehihovelaka sa soovaanelasawe." 
2Samuel15:12 Abesalomi amalihaleene opaka sooveleela, aamwiitthana namalakaawe mwene, Ahitofeli, muGiloni, onkhala oGilo. Yoovaanelela yaakhala ni ikuru yaattaka yaawo yaamutthara Abesalomi." 
2Samuel15:13 Namutthenga mmoha aarowa omuthalihera Davide: “aYixrayeli ari ni Abesalomi.” 
2Samuel15:14 Vano Davide aaweerela anamalakaawe ootheene yaari oYerusaleemu: “Nrowe, nitthaweke. Naahitthawa, ootheene hiyo khanimoopowa Abesalomi ni owo onoophwata esidade yootheene!”" 
2Samuel15:15 Anamalakaawe yaamwaakhula: “Arumeiyaanyu aalikana opaka yeeyo pwiiyaahu mwene aneeraawe alakele.” 
2Samuel15:16 Mwene aattimula vamoha ni ootheene a emusaawe. Aahiya ikuxo muloko weera siwehawehe empa ya mwene. 
2Samuel15:17 Hiiho mwene aattimula, atthu ootheene emuttharaka ni yaaheemela vanipuroni nookhuveela esidade." 
2Samuel15:18 Asilopwanaawe ootheene yaamvira vamoha ni aKereti ni aPeleti ootheene; ni aGiti macira mathannamosa oottheene yaamuhoonle oGati yeetta ohoolowawe. 
2Samuel15:19 Mwene aamukoha Itayi, muGiti: “Onnittharelani? Ohokolowe okhaleke ni mwene Abesalomi. Weyo namarwa, oothaamihiwa mulaponimwawo." 
2Samuel15:20 Ophiyale vaanaano ni khoonreera woonyesereriha orowa ni hiyo, miyo kihisuwelaka ninkelaahuwo. Ohokolowe ni axunneiyo. Yave awoonihere onnene ni ororomeleya.”" 
2Samuel15:21 Wa soothesene, Itayi aamwaakhula mwene: “Mwa Nsina na Yave kinlipela mookumini mwa mwene: Weiwo munrowaanyu okhala pwiiyaaka amwene – murumeiyaanyutho anaakhalewo – akhalaka mookumini hoye hoye mookhwaani.”" 
2Samuel15:22 Davide aamweerela Itayi: “Wooreera, ohooleke.” Vano Itayi, muGiti, aaheetta vamoha ni asilopwanaawe ni emusaawe aaraaweno." 
2Samuel15:23 Amaki a mittetthe sootheene yaahiinla ekhuwelaka, anakhotto eviraka. Mwene aalapuwa oreyareyani na oKideroni ni atthu ootheene yaarowa ni yoowo mpatta wa onikareni." 
2Samuel15:24 Zadoki aakhalawotho ni aLeevi ootheene yaari ni yoowo yaateexa Arka* a wiiraana a Muluku. Yaawiikaathi Arka* a Muluku ni Abiyatari aapaka sooveleela mpaka atthu ootheene omala okhuma musidade. 
2Samuel15:25 Vano mwene aamweerela Zadoki: “Mwaahokoloxere Arka* a Muluku musidadeni. Yave akoonihera onnene, Owo onookihokoloxa weera kiwoonetho Arka* ni etabernaakulu*." 
2Samuel15:26 Vaheera Owo akeerela: ‘Khamuhiyono oosiveleyaaka, khamwaha! Akipakele yeeyo ontthunaawe.”" 
2Samuel15:27 Mwene aamweerelatho musaserdoti* Zadoki: “Kookhalano yoovaanela. Muhokoleele osidade mmuretteleni vamoha ni mwaninyu Ahimahazi ni Yonatani mwaana mulopwana a Abiyatari. Nyuwo ni Abiyatari mwaakuxe anamwaniinyu asilopwana eeli. 
2Samuel15:28 Miyo kinooweherera mmirorani onikareni mpaka kineeraaka kiiwe ihaalisanyu.” 
2Samuel15:29 Vano Zadoki ni Abiyatari yaahaakuxa Arka* a Muluku enaahokoloxera oYerusaleemu, enakhalawo." 
2Samuel15:30 Vaheera Davide aapwaherera awelaka mwaako wa sooliveira*, iinlaka mphironimwawe, iikhunenleene mmuru ni ahiwanre ikwakwatta. Atthu ootheene yaari ni yoowo yaahiikhuneelatho mmuru, eniinla ewelaka vamwaako." 
2Samuel15:31 Vano Davide aaleeliwa: “Ahitofeli ori mpatta wa Abesalomi.” Tivawo Davide aamvekenlaawe Yave: “Ii! Yave sihivareleye muteko miruku sa Ahitofeli!” 
2Samuel15:32 Davide aphiyakaru vasulu mwaako, mwa weiwo muloko waakhovelenlaaya omulapa Muluku, aamoona aarwaaka Huxayi, ngwArki, weera amukumaneno. Soowarasawe soothaala, mmurumwawe oreene itthayaru." 
2Samuel15:33 Davide aamweerela: “Mwarowa ni miyo, munookilemelihera." 
2Samuel15:34 Vaheera mwahokoleela osidade ni mwamweerela Abesalomi: ‘Kinookhala murumeiyaanyu, mwene. Khalayi kaarumeela atithinyu, mene vano kinookhala murumeiyaanyu,’ hiiho munookikhavihera mwaanganyeraka miruku sa Ahitofeli." 
2Samuel15:35 Asaserdoti* Zadoki ni Abiyatari anookhalawotho. Mwaathalihere sootheene muneeraanyu mwasuwele mpaani mwa mwene. 
2Samuel15:36 Aakhalawotho anamwane asilopwana eeli – Ahimahazi, mwaana mulopwana a Zadoki ni Yonatani, mwaana mulopwana a Abiyatari. Mwa yaawo mukileele sootheene muneeraanyu mwiiwe.”" 
2Samuel15:37 Vano Abesalomi avolowakaru musidade, Huxayi, nthamwenaawe Davide, aaphiyaawe oYerusaleemu,." 
2Samuel16:1 Davide arongweene wooxuurakamela vamwaako, aamphwanyawo Ziba, murumeiyi a Mefiboxeti, angwehereraka. Aarino abuuru akina ootthukiweene ni ekuxaleene ipaawu macira meeli, iboolu ncira sa iwuuva* soowaarikiwa; iboolu ncira sa efiigu* ni kacikhi oosareya eviinyu." 
2Samuel16:2 Mwene aamukoha Ziba: “Oruuhenleni itthu iya?” Ziba aamwaakhula: “Abuuru eweliweke emusi ya mwene; ipaawu ni soowiima ecaaseke asilopwana ni eviinyu yaaruuheleke ikuru yaale ankhulumuwa munikareni.” 
2Samuel16:3 Mwene aamukoha: “Ori woowi osuulu wa pwiiyaanyu?” Ziba aamwaakhula: “Ori oYerusaleemu niwoko onuupuwela: ‘Olelo aYixrayeli anookihokoloxera omwene wa nikholonaka.’” 
2Samuel16:4 Vano mwene aamweerela Ziba: “Sootheene saari sa Mefiboxeti ti sawinyu.” Ziba aamweerela: “Oowiiyeviheene kinkokhora weera amwene pwiiyaaka mukihakalalele!” 
2Samuel16:5 Davide amwaattamelaka Bahurimi, mulopwana mmoha a nihimo na Sawuli aakhumamo. Nsinanawe naari Ximei, mwaana mulopwana a Gera ni akhumaka, aamunyohola." 
2Samuel16:6 Aamvonya maluku Davide ni asitokweene ootheene a mwene yaaroomurukureeraru anakhotto ni anamalipelela. 
2Samuel16:7 Anyoholaka hiihaale, Ximei aaheera: “Okivenyere va, okivenyere va, weyo mulopwana a ephome, muhuurei!”" 
2Samuel16:8 Yave ohoohokoloxera ephome yootheene eyeehiwe mweemusini ya Sawuli, nipuro nenenenno olamulenlaawo. Yave ohinnyerera omwene mmatatani mwa mwaniyo mulopwana Abesalomi. Weyo woophwatiwa niwoko ori mulopwana a ephome.”" 
2Samuel16:9 Vano Abixai, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha, aamweerela Davide: “Khoontthuniheriwa weera mwalapwa ookhwa ola omunyohola mwene! Mukihiyeke kirowe kamuhite!”" 
2Samuel16:10 Wa soothesene, mwene aamwaakhula: “Mumpwatthela heeni yeeyo anamwane a Zeruha? Aari Yave omulamulenle okinyohola, vano nyuwo taani oomuhiiha?”" 
2Samuel16:11 Vanonto Davide aamweerela Abixai ni asitokweenaawe ootheene: “Moona, mwanaka mulopwana xaxaxa aasaasaka okiiva, ankha mulopwana ola ori a emusi ya Sawuli! Munghiyeke! Owo akinyoholeke, niwoko Yave oomulamulela.”" 
2Samuel16:12 Apaale Yave onimoona ohaawawaka olelo ni onimwaakakhanyiha yooreera ni onyohola kaakhenlaaka olelo. 
2Samuel16:13 Davide ni anakhottwaawe yaapwaherera mphironi, Ximei aviraka mukerekhere mwaako aluluwanakano, anyoholaka mphironi ni amvonyaka maluku ni makottomola." 
2Samuel16:14 Mwene ni atthu ootheene yaamuhoonle yaaphiya mukerekhere Yordanu ookhulumuweene. Iwo yaahiitthuuwawo. 
2Samuel16:15 Eyo eri hiiho, Abesalomi ni asilopwana a aYixrayeli yaavolowasa oYerusaleemu ni Ahitofeli aari ni yoowo." 
2Samuel16:16 Vano Huxayi, ngwArki, nthamwenaawe Davide, aamwaattamela Abesalomi, anamweerela: “Mwene wooyee! Mwene wooyee!”" 
2Samuel16:17 Abesalomi aamukoha Huxayi: “Ororomeleyawene ti wuuwu ni nthamwenaanyu? Muhimuttharenleni?” 
2Samuel16:18 Huxayi aamwaakhula Abesalomi: “Kinoomurumeela yoowo oothanliwa ni Yave ni asilopwana ala ni aYixrayeli ootheene. Kinoopwaherera okhala ni yoowo. 
2Samuel16:19 Ohiya toko yeeyo – olakela omuthanla omurumeela ti wawaka. Mooteene yoowo kaarumeenlaaka atithinyu, hiihotho kinimoorumeelani." 
2Samuel16:20 Abesalomi aamweerela Ahitofeli: “Munivahe mirukusanyu: Nipakekeni?” 
2Samuel16:21 Ahitofeli aamwaakhula: “Mukoneno ikuxo sa atithinyu mwa seiyo ahiyenraaya oreherera empa ya mwene. Vano aYixrayeli ootheene anoosuwela weera mwiitothela manyaanya wa atithinyu ni ootheene ari ni nyuwo onoolipihaxa murima.” 
2Samuel16:22 Yaamukungela eheema Abesalomi vataratoni, anakonano ikuxo sa atithawe woohikhuwanyeya." 
2Samuel16:23 Vano mmahukuni ale miruku sa Ahitofeli saalikana ntoko miruku saarweela wa Muluku. Davide ni Abesalomi ooweeli yiiwelela mirukusawe. 
2Samuel17:1 Ahitofeli aamweerela Abesalomi: “Mirukusaka ti iya: Mukitthunihere waathanla anakhotto 12 000 weera kittimule ohiyuweene yoola kimuttarattharaka Davide. 
2Samuel17:2 Miyo kinoongwanano owo akhulumungweene ni ahilimpe. Kinoomurukureeriha muru ni anakhottwaawe anootthawa. Vahoolowaya kinoomwiiva mwene paahi 
2Samuel17:3 koohokoloxerakani anakhottwaawe. Mummwaasa omwiiva mutthu mmoha paahi. Hiiho anakhotto ootheene anookhala mmuretteleni.” 
2Samuel17:4 Abesalomi ni asitokweene ootheene a aYixrayeli saahaareera miruku iye. 
2Samuel17:5 Vanonto Abesalomi aaheera: “Mmwiitthanetho Huxayi, ngwArki, weera niiwe mirukusawe.”" 
2Samuel17:6 Huxayi aphiyakaru, Abesalomi aamweerela: “Ahitofeli oonivaha mirukusawe. Vano nipakeke yeeyo ohimmaawe hoye hoye mookhalano miruku sikina?”" 
2Samuel17:7 Huxayi aamwaakhula Abesalomi: “Emaara ela miruku sa Ahitofeli khasireenre. 
2Samuel17:8 Moosuwela weera atithinyu ni asilopwana araayano ti anakhotto ni aanyoonyiwa ntoko mwaamunama oowali iiyeriweene axaana. Ohiya toko yeeyo atithinyu ti nakhotto a miruku. Khaankona ni anakhottwaaya. 
2Samuel17:9 Vano awo okhalaka oowiipitheene munikhukuni hoye hoye nipuro nikina. Anakhottwaanyu akina akina yiiviwa owana woopacera, yaawo eniisuwele yeeyo eniyeere: ‘Ancipale a anakhotto a Abesalomi aahiiviwa.’" 
2Samuel17:10 Hiiho mpaka nakhotto oolipa murima ntoko mwatto, onooporora, niwoko aYixrayeli ootheene aasuwela weera atithinyu ti nakhotto ooweraxa ni yaawo ari ni atithinyu ti oolipaxa murima." 
2Samuel17:11 Tivawo kinoovahaakani miruku iya: Mwaathukumanyihe aYixrayeli ootheene okhuma oDani mpaka oBerxeba – ancipalexa ntoko mihaava sa mphareiya. Ni nyuwo muneenaanyu mwaahooleleke mukhottoni. 
2Samuel17:12 Vano nimmwaawanano mapuro ootheene eneeraaya ephwanyaneyemo naamorelaka yaawo ntoko nikame nimmorelaaya vathi. Owo ni anakhottwaawe ootheene khayoopowa. 
2Samuel17:13 Owo avolowa esidade emoha, aYixrayeli ootheene anoorowanowo mikhoyi ni eniipurulele esidade ele oreyareyani, woohihiyaru etthu.”" 
2Samuel17:14 Abesalomi ni asilopwana a oYixrayeli yaaheera: “Miruku sa Huxayi, ngwArki, sooreerela soopwaha sa Ahitofeli.” Vano Yave oolakela ohonona miruku sa Ahitofeli eerelaka omphwata Abesalomi." 
2Samuel17:15 Huxayi aahaathalihera asaserdoti* Zadoki ni Abiyatari: “Miruku sa Ahitofeli wa Abesalomi saari seiye, mene koomulaka Abesalomi opaka moota mukina." 
2Samuel17:16 Vano munrumihele woowaakuveya mutthenga ola Davide: ‘Muhivirihe ohiyu mmirorani onikareni; mulapuwe mooloko woohihovela weera mwene ni atthu ootheene ari ni yoowo ehiiviwe.’” 
2Samuel17:17 Yonatani ni Ahimahaxi yaakhala wEni-Rogeli. Epottha ethiyana yannaaleelasa imaara sootheene niwoko khayaawera wiileva yiixooniheraka musidade. Awosa yaarowa omuleela mwene Davide yeeyo yiiwaaya. 
2Samuel17:18 Wa soothesene, mmiravo mmoha aawoona, anamuthalihera Abesalomi. Vano awosa yaattimula woowaakuveya, enarowa wa empa wa mmaki mmoha a oBahurimi. Aarino ehime vaatevawe ni awosa yaakhuruwelamo." 
2Samuel17:19 Mwaariye aakhuneela ehime, anamwaraxelawo irooro weera ehooneye." 
2Samuel17:20 Asilopwana a Abesalomi yaaphiya vaate wa muthiyana enamukoha: “Ari woowi Ahimahazi ni Yonatani?” Owo aawaakhula: “Aalapuwa nxaapwa.” Asilopwana ale yaawaasaasa woohaaphwanya, enahokoleela oYerusaleemu." 
2Samuel17:21 Asilopwana epwahanseene, eeli ale yaakhuma muhimeni, enarowa omuthalihera mwene Davide. Yaamuleela: “Muttimuleke woowaakuveya ni mwamulapuwe Yordanu. Ahitofeli ohoovaanelelani.”" 
2Samuel17:22 Vano Davide ni ootheene yaari ni yoowo yaarowa oYordanu. Nsuwa naakhuma, ootheene elapungweene." 
2Samuel17:23 Ahitofeli oonakaru weera mirukusawe khasaakhuleliwe, aangwela buurwaawe, anarowa owaani esidade aayareliwaawe. Aareherera itthusawe sootheene, aniitthukelela. Vano aavithiwa onihiyeni na atithawe." 
2Samuel17:24 Abesalomi ni anakhottwaawe ootheene a oYixrayeli yaamulapuwaaya Yordanu, Davide eera aphiyaleene oMahanayimi." 
2Samuel17:25 Abesalomi aamukhaliha Amasa ntoko mutokweene a anakhotto vanipuroni na Yowabe. Amasa aari mwaana mulopwana a Yeteri, muYixrayeli mwa yoowo aamuthenle Abigayili, mwaana muthiyana a Nahaxi ni murokoriye Zeruha, amayawe Yowabe." 
2Samuel17:26 aYixrayeli ni Abesalomi yaakonela mweelaponi ya oGiliyade. 
2Samuel17:27 Davide aphiyaleene oMahanayimi, Xobi, mwaana mulopwana a Nahaxi a oRaba, elapo ya awAmoni, ni Makiri, mwaana mulopwana a Amiyeli oLo-Debari, ni Barezilai, muGiliyade a oRogelimi," 
2Samuel17:28 yaamuruuhela Davide ni anakhottwaawe soowaatala vakaamani, ibasiya ni ikaruma sa oloko. Yaamuruuhelatho etrigu, esevada* ni ephepa; inuku sowaarikiwa, ttaangare ni iroro;" 
2Samuel17:29 oravo ni manteiga, ikhondoolo ni ekeixu* ni mukaka wa emombe. Yaamuruuhela iye Davide ni anakhottwaawe weera ece, “Niwoko yaasuwela weera yaahaakhulumula etala ni ntthona munikareni.”" 
2Samuel18:1 Davide aahaawehaweha anakhotto yaari ni yoowo, anaakhaliha asitokweene a nakupa a atthu macira muloko ni a ncira." 
2Samuel18:2 Vahoolowaya aahaakawanyiha anakhotto mipatta miraru: mmoha waahooleliwa ni Yowabe; mukina ni Abixai, munneiye Yowabe mwaana mulopwana a Zeruhiya ni wanaararu ni Itayi, muGiti. Mwene aaweerela anakhotto: “Vekhaikhai, miyo muneenaaka kinimoohoolelani.”" 
2Samuel18:3 Vanonto awosa yaamweerela: “Muhinihoole. Nakhala nintthawa, awosa kheenitthukuruwela hiyo – hata mpatta mukina wa hiyo okhwaaka, awosa kheepwattha. Wa soothesene, wa hiyo moophiyera anakhotto macira macireene muloko. Fataari nyuwo muhale musidade weera munikhavihere.”" 
2Samuel18:4 Mwene aawaakhula: “Kinoopaka yeeyo enooreerelani.” Vano mwene aaheemela vamulako, anakhotto eviraka ekhumaka oowiiwananeene a ncira ni a macira muloko." 
2Samuel18:5 Mwene aamulamulela Yowabe, Abixai ni Itayi: “Mwakikosoopere mmiravo Abesalomi. Anakhotto ootheene yaahiiwa yeeyo mwene aalamulenlaawe asitokweene ootheene mwaha wa Abesalomi." 
2Samuel18:6 Awosa yaarowa ntuphini weera yaawaneno aYixrayeli. Ekhotto yaawaneliwa moothakoni wEfrayimi. 
2Samuel18:7 Anakhotto a aYixrayeli yaawiniwawo ni anakhotto a Davide. Ancipale yaahookhwa nihuku nne – wookwanaka 20 000. 
2Samuel18:8 Ekhotto yaamwareela nthuphini moothemwene ni nihuku nne othako waawiiva ancipale opwaha ekatana. 
2Samuel18:9 Owaniwaka hiihaale Abesalomi angwenleene buurwaawe aahaakumanano anakhotto a Davide. Buuru aviraka vathi wa iphandi sa mwiri wa ekarivalyu*, mayihaawe Abesalomi yaahaanga mphandini sa mwiri ole. Aakhala musulusulu kuleele, buurwaawe apwangheene." 
2Samuel18:10 Mulopwana mmoha oonakaru yeeyo, aamuthalihera Yowabe: “Komoona vaanaanova Abesalomi aangiyeene mmwirini wa ekarivalyu*.”" 
2Samuel18:11 Yowabe aamweerela mulopwana aamuthalihenre yeeyo: “Eya! Momoona? Muhimwiivenleni? Mwaamwiivale, kaamoovahani ixekeli* muloko ni laamba a nakhotto ooweraxa.”" 
2Samuel18:12 Vano mulopwana aamwaakhula: “Naari mweera mukivahe ixekeli* macira muloko, nkaamwiiva mwaana mulopwana a mwene. Hiyo nohiiwa nnenesene seiye mwene oolamulenlaaweni nyuwo, Abixai ni Itayi eeraka: ‘Mwakikosoopere mmiravo Abesalomi.’" 
2Samuel18:13 Vano kiilemve kinamwiiva, amwene yaamusuwela ni nyuwo khamwaakaakiha." 
2Samuel18:14 Yowabe aamweerela: “Nkaase ocerewawene ni weyo.” Aakuxa mavaka mararu, anahomano murima wa Abesalomi, owo nlelo aangiyeene mmwirini wa ekarivalyu* areene ni okumi." 
2Samuel18:15 Vano muloko a anamakuxa a ikaphwitthi sa Yowabe yaamurica Abesalomi, enamuluha." 
2Samuel18:16 Vanonto Yowabe aahiipa nipalapatta weera anakhotto ehiye waattharelela aYixrayeli, ni hiiho awosa yaahiya." 
2Samuel18:17 Yaakuxa muttembo wa Abesalomi, enavonyera munyattani etokotoko ya ntuphini, yuukelelaka maluku nduu. Eyo eri hiiho, aYixrayeli ootheene yaatthawela owaani." 
2Samuel18:18 Vano Abesalomi areene nlelo ni okumi, aahiitekela eyuupuxero oNreyareyani na Mwene eeraka: “Nkirino mwaana mulopwana weera apwahererihe nsinanaka. Tivawo aattenghaawe eyuupuxero ele nsinanawe ni mpaka olelo eniitthaniwa eyuupuxero ya Abesalomi." 
2Samuel18:19 Vano Ahimahazi, mwaana mulopwana a Zadoki, aaheera: “Mukihiyeke kitthimakele wa mwene Davide kaaronghelaka ihaali weera Yave ohoopakani nnene ootapuxakani mwa amwiittanaanyu.”" 
2Samuel18:20 Yowabe aamwaakhula: “Olelo kheehiyono emaaraanyu omuronghela ihaali mwene. Apaale ehuhu ekina, mene olelo hoye, niwoko mwaana mulopwana a mwene ohookhwa.”" 
2Samuel18:21 Yowabe aamweerela muKuxi: “Orowe wamuthalihere mwene yeeyo woonnaawo.” muKuxi aahuramela vathi ohoolo wa Yowabe, anapwaha, atthimakaka weera athalihe ihaali." 
2Samuel18:22 Ahimahazi, mwaana mulopwana a Zadoki aamweerelatho Yowabe: “Yeereiye eneera yeereiyeeyo, dyoontte, kintthuna omutthimakela muKuxi.” Vanonto Yowabe aamwaakhula: “Mwanaka, ontthunela heeni omutthara? Weyo khawaakhelaru ntthuvelo wa ehaali ela.”" 
2Samuel18:23 Ahimahazi aanyeserera: “Yeereiye eneera yeereiyeeyo, kintthuna orowa.” Vanonto Yowabe aamweerela: “Oroweke!” Ahimahazi aatthimaka akuxeraka ephiro ya mweelaponi yoothatawala, anamukhalela ohoolo muKuxi." 
2Samuel18:24 Davide aakilaathiye variyari wa milako sa mpuwa ni sa omokoni wa esidade. Vano namalipelela awelaka vataratoni ya vamulako wa exiri, aamoona mulopwana mmoha aarwa atthimakaka." 
2Samuel18:25 Namalipelela aamwiitthana mwene amuthaliheraka yeeyo. Mwene aaheera: “Owo aari meekhaawe, entaphulela oruuha ihaali sooreera.” Ni mulopwana ole annakhuveela." 
2Samuel18:26 Namalipelela aamoona mulopwana mukina aarwa atthimakaka, anamweerela namalipelela a mulako: “Mmoone, mulopwana mukina ontthimaka meekhaawe. Mwene aaheera: “Onruuhatho ihaali sooreera.”" 
2Samuel18:27 Namalipelela aaheera: “Kinoona ntoko oopacera otthimakawawe ori ntoko Ahimahazi mwaana mulopwana a Zadoki.” Mwene aaheera: “Ti mulopwana ooreera murima. Onruuha ihaali sooreera.” 
2Samuel18:28 Vano Ahimahazi aamwaattamela mwene anamuulumiha. Aahuuramihela ekhovaawe vathi ohoolo wa mwene, aneera: “Atthapeliwe Yave Mulukwaanyu! Owo oowinnyerera asilopwana yoowananani amwene pwiiyaaka.”" 
2Samuel18:29 Mwene aamukoha Ahimahazi: “Mmiravo Abesalomi ori salaama?” Ahimahazi aamwaakhula: “Kohoona orukureereya muru otokotoko Yowabe amurumihaka murumeiyi a mwene nitho miyo, murumeiyaanyu, mene nkisuwenle ekhumelenle.”" 
2Samuel18:30 Mwene aamweerela: “Osusere iwo ni wawehererewo.” Vano Ahimahazi aaweherera. 
2Samuel18:31 Vanonto muKuxi aaphiya, aneera: “Pwiiyaaka, mwene, mwiiwe ihaali sooreera. Olelo Yave ohootapuxani wa ootheene yoowananani.”" 
2Samuel18:32 Mwene aamukoha muKuxi: “Mmiravo Abesalomi ori salaama?” MuKuxi aamwaakhula: “Amwiittana ootheene a apwiya mwene ni ootheene antthuna woopakani yoonanara emaleleke ntoko mmiravo owo onihingye olelo.” 
2Samuel18:33 Ooriipiweene, mwene aawela mukwartunimwawe wa osulu wa mulako, aniinla. Aawela iinlaka akhuwelaka: “Ii Mwanaka Abesalomi! Mwanaka, mwanaka Abesalomi! Fataari kaakhwiiye nipuronawo. Ii! Abesalomi, mwanaka, mwanaka!”" 
2Samuel19:1 Yowabe aaleeliwa: “Mwene onimwiinla amulalamikelaka Abesalomi.” 
2Samuel19:2 Wa anakhotto ootheene owina wa nihuku nne waathatuwa olalamika, niwoko nihuku nne anakhotto yaaleeliwa: “Mwene onimulalamikela Mwanawe.”" 
2Samuel19:3 Awosa yaavolowa musidadeni nihuku nne ntoko anakhotto oowiniwa etthawaka okhottoni. 
2Samuel19:4 Mwene iikhuneenleene ekhove, aahiinla, akhuwelaka: “Ii! Mwanaka, Abesalomi! Abesalomi, mwanaka mwanaka!”" 
2Samuel19:5 Vano Yowabe aavolowa mpaani ya mwene, anamweerela: “Olelo mohaapororiha anakhottwaanyu ootheene mwa yaawo yooponle okumaahu ni okumi wa anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana ni wa axaarinyu ni ikuxosanyu." 
2Samuel19:6 Munimusivela yoowo onoothanyani ni munaathanya yaale anoosivelani. Mohoonihera weera, wa nyuwo, asitokweene ni anakhottwaaya ethirwaanyu. Kinoona weera hiyo ootheene naakhwiiye olelo, Abesalomi akhalaka ni okumi, saano muhakalanleene." 
2Samuel19:7 Vano mukhume ni mwalipihe mirima sa anakhottwaayu. Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave weera mwaahikhuma, ohiyuweene yoola khamunimuhalanaru nakhotto. Eyo eniikhale yootepaxa opwaha irisa sootheene sookhumelenleni okhuma omirawaanyu.”" 
2Samuel19:8 Vano mwene aakhuma, anakilaathi vamulako wa esidade. Anakhotto yaaleeliwaaya: “Mwene okilaanthi vamulako,” ootheene yaamuthukumanela. Eyo eri hiiho, aYixrayeli yaatthawela owaani." 
2Samuel19:9 Atthu a ipuumba sootheene sa aYixrayeli yannavaanyihana yeerelanaka: “Mwene oonivuluxa mmatatani mwa amwiittanaahu. Ti yoowo onooponle mmatatani mwa aFilisti. Mene vano ootthawa mulaponi niwoko na Abesalomi; 
2Samuel19:10 ni Abesalomi, mwa yoole naamuttikitthenlaahu weera anilamule, ohookhwa mukhottoni. Vano heeni mumpisaanyu omuhokoloxa mwene?”" 
2Samuel19:11 Iiwakaru mwene yeeyo yuulumaaya ni aYixrayeli ootheene, Davide aahaarumihela asaserdoti*, Zadoki ni Abiyatari, mutthenga ola: “Mwaakohe asitokweene a oYuda: ‘Mucerewenleni omuhokoloxera mwene empaawe ya emwene?" 
2Samuel19:12 Nyuwo axunnaka xaxaxa. Mukhalenle heeni ookisera okhavihera ohokolowawaka? 
2Samuel19:13 Mwamuleele Amasa: ‘Nyuwo ti mmusaaka xaxaxa. Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave weera okhuma vaanaananova nyuwo munookhala mutokweene a anakhottwaaka vanipuroni na Yowabe.’” 
2Samuel19:14 Masu ale a Davide yaahaaviriyela aYuda ootheene. Awosa yaamurumihela mwene mutthenga ola: “Muhokolowe – nyuwo ni asilopwanaanyu ootheene.” 
2Samuel19:15 Mwene aahokolowa, anaphiya oYordanu. Vanonto asilopwana a oYuda yaarowa oGiligali weera emuciceere mwene ni emuhoole aamulapuwaka Yordanu." 
2Samuel19:16 Ximei, mwaana mulopwana a Gera, muBenyamini a oBahurimi, aarowa woowaakuveya vamoha ni asilopwana a oYuda weera yamukumaneno mwene Davide." 
2Samuel19:17 Asilopwana macira muloko aBenyamini yaari ni yoowo vamoha ni Ziba, namawehaweha a vaate wa Sawuli, anamwanaawe asilopwana muloko ni athanu Ziba ni arumeiyaawe miloko miili. Yaahaakuveya ophiya oYordanu mwa weiwo aaraawewo mwene." 
2Samuel19:18 Yaalapuwa mooloko weera yakhavihere emusi ya mwene woolapuwani ni opaka yeeyo mwene aatthunaawe. Ximei, mwaana mulopwana a Gera, alapuwaka mooloko, aamukokhorela mwene," 
2Samuel19:19 anamweerela: “Pwiiyaaka ahaalikelele yootakhalaaka. Muhuupuwelele moota murumeiyaanyu oopakenlaaweni yoonanara nihuku nenenenne pwiiyaaka mwene aavenyaawe oYerusaleemu. Dyoontte, mwene ahuupuweleletho yeeyo." 
2Samuel19:20 Vano miyo, murumeiyaanyu, koosuwela weera koottheka, mene variyari wa ekhapira ya Yoseefe yootheene miyo ti oopacera okumana ni mwene pwiiyaaka.”" 
2Samuel19:21 Vanonto Abixai, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha, aaheera: “Ximei iiviweke niwoko na yeeyo opankaawe. Oomunyohola oottikittheliwa a Yave.”" 
2Samuel19:22 Davide aamwaakhula: “Mumpwatthela heeni yeeyo anamwane a Zeruha? Olelo mookirukunuwela! khoontthuneya weera akhalaru mutthu a oYixrayeli akhwetho, niwoko ti nihiku kimpwahereraaka okhala mwene a aYixrayeli.”" 
2Samuel19:23 Vano mwene aamuroromeliha Ximei ni nlipelo: “Nyuwo khamuniiviwa.” 
2Samuel19:24 Mefiboxeti, osuulwaawe Sawuli aarowatho omuciceera mwene. Owo Khaarapinghe inaawosawe, hata khaamentthe ireru naari khaacampe ikuwosawe okhuma nihuku nne mwene aavennyaawe mpaka nihuku aahokolongwaawe mmuretteleni." 
2Samuel19:25 Aphiyaleene akhumaka oYerusaleemu amuciceeraka mwene, Davide aamukoha: “Mefiboxeti mwahaapwahenreni ni miyo?”" 
2Samuel19:26 Owo aamwaakhula: “Ii! Pwiiyaaka mwene, miyo murumeiyaanyu kiroorakalaru kaalamulela omutthukelela buurwaaka sookilaathela weera koohooleni amwene. Wa soothesene, murumeiyaaka Ziba aakilokottha." 
2Samuel19:27 Owo ookitapanyiha ni nyuwo pwiiyaaka mwene. Pwiiyaaka mwene ori ntoko ndyelo a Muluku. Vano mpake yeeyo muntthunaanyu. 
2Samuel19:28 Ekhapira yootheene ya apwiya kheewo yaphwanelaaya ohikhanle okhwa. Hata hiiho moomvaha murumeiyaanyu nipuro variyari wa yaawo muncaanyuno. Nkiphwanenle woovekelanitho yakhalaru etthu.” 
2Samuel19:29 Mwene aamwaakhula: “Muhuulumetho. Nyuwo ni Ziba mukawaneke yawinyuweene.” 
2Samuel19:30 Mefiboxeti aamweerela mwene: “Owo akuxeke sootheene. Koohakalala paahi mweenre mphiya mmuretteleni owannyinyu.” 
2Samuel19:31 Barezilai, muGiliyade, aavenyatho oRogelimi amuhoolaka mwene mpaka oYordanu weera alaxeraneno." 
2Samuel19:32 Vano Barezilai aahuuluvalaxa – aarino iyaakha miloko mithannamiraru. Ti yoowo aamuciha mwene aaraawe oMahanayimi, niwoko aari namapuha." 
2Samuel19:33 Mwene aamweerela Barezilai: “Mukitthare oYerusaleemu. Miyo kinrowa wookosoopani.” 
2Samuel19:34 Vanonto, Barezilai aamwaakhula mwene: “Hoye, Keenre kuuluvalaxa, nkingwera okhalano mwene oYerusaleemu." 
2Samuel19:35 Kirino iyaakha miloko mithannamiraru. Nkingwera othanla yooreera ni yoonanara. Murumeiyaanyu ongwera vakhaani woonelela yeeyo oncaawe naari ongwuraawe. Nkingweraru osuwela wiipa wa alopwana hoye hoye athiyana. Nkintthuna woolemeliherani, pwiiyaaka mwene." 
2Samuel19:36 Murumeiyaanyu onimwaahoola vakhaani amwene emulapuwaka Yordanu, mene nkiphwanenle otthuveleliwa yeeyo." 
2Samuel19:37 Muntthunihereke murumeiyaanyu ohokolowa weera kakhwe musidadenimwaka vakhiviru wa nihiye na atithaka ni amayaka. Moone – ori va murumeiyaaka Kimehami. Alapuweke ni mwene pwiiyaaka – mumpakele yeeyo muntthunaanyu.” 
2Samuel19:38 Mwene aamwaakhula: “Kimehami onoolapuwa ni miyo. Kinoompakela yeeyo muntthunaanyu. Sootheene muneeraanyu mukivekele, kinimoopakelani.”" 
2Samuel19:39 Vano atthu ootheene yaamulapuwa Yordanu ni mwenetho aalapuwa. Mwene aamubeeca Barezilai, anamureeliha. Vahoolowaya Barezilai aahokoleela owaani." 
2Samuel19:40 Mwene aarowa oGiligali areene ni Kimehami. Anakhotto ootheene a oYuda ni eriyari ya anakhotto a oYixrayeli yaamuhoola mwene. 
2Samuel19:41 Woowaakuveya asilopwana ootheene a oYixrayeli yaamwaattamela mwene ettaandawulaka: “Asilopwana a oYuda amwiiyenreni mwene emuronghaka okhopela Yordanu ni emusaawe ni atthwaawe ootheene?” 
2Samuel19:42 Asilopwana a oYuda yaawaakhula aYixrayeli: “Nipakenle yeeyo niwoko mwene ori mmusaahu xaxaxa. Munyoonyerasingwe heeni? Weeraka yookhala niciiyaahu ya mwene hoye hoye yookhala yawawe nikunxaahu? 
2Samuel19:43 Vano asilopwana a oYixrayeli yaawaakhula aYuda: “Hiyo nrino ipuumba muloko, vaheera nyuwo ipuumba piili paahi. Ophwanelawahu ni Davide wohoopwahani nyuwo. Muhiniramuse. Hiyo naari oopacera ohima weera mwene ahokoloweke. Vanonto asilopwana a oYuda yaawaakhulasa aYixrayeli mooxililini." 
2Samuel20:1 Vanonto aakhalawo mulopwana mmoha ookukureya iitthaniwa Xeba, mwaana mulopwana a Bikeri, muBenyamini. Aahiipa nipalapatta akhuwelaka: “Khaninono mpatta wa Davide! Mwaana mulopwana a Yixai khannimpwattha! Khula muYixrayeli aroweke owaani!”" 
2Samuel20:2 Vano asilopwana ootheene a oYixrayeli yaamuhiya Davide emuttharaka Xeba, mwaana mulopwana a Bikeri. Vaheera asilopwana a oYuda yaapwaherera ni mwenaaya mmuseweni wootheene okhuma oYordanu mpaka oYerusaleemu." 
2Samuel20:3 Davide ahokoleenleene empaawe ya emwene, aakuxa ikuxo muloko aahiyenraawe oreherera empa ya mwene, aniikaathi mpaani mwaalipeleliwa ni anamalipelela. Aaciha, mene khaakonneno. Sootheene saakhala ntoko asinaamukhweli mpaka okhwawaya." 
2Samuel20:4 Vano Davide aamulamulela Amasa: “Ngwiitthane anakhotto a oYuda weera yiixoonihere va mmahukuni marararu ni nyuwo.” 
2Samuel20:5 Wa soothesene, Amasa aaviriha ehuhu yincipale woowiitthana aYuda, apwahihaka ehuhu aavahiwaawe ni mwene." 
2Samuel20:6 Davide aamweerela Abixai: “Xeba, mwaana mulopwana a Bikeri, anaanitepelaxe ompwaha Abesalomi. Mwaakuxe anakhottwaaka ni mwamuttharatthare weera ahiphwanye esidade yoolipiheriwa, anitthawaka.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Vanonto anakhotto a Yowabe vamoha ni aKereti ni aPeleti yaavenya oYerusaleemu emuttharattharaka Xeba mwaana mulopwana a Bikeri. 
2Samuel20:8 Ereene vamwala mutokotoko wa oGibiyoni, Amasa aahaakumanano. Yowabe aagwara mukaandyo wa ekhotto ni laamba mmoha mwa yoowo aarino nluwo ohuleeliweenemo mwaalo. Yowabe amwaattamelaka Amasa, aahulula mwaalwaawe muxiirini." 
2Samuel20:9 Yowabe aamukoha Amasa: “Muri salaama munnaka?” Aamvara Amasa ni ntatanawe noolopwana ettwattwara weera amubeece. 
2Samuel20:10 Amasa khoonne mwaalo waari muntatani noothiyana mwa Yowabe. Yowabe aamuhoma vamirimani ni marupwaawe yaamorela vathi, anakhwa. Yowabe aamuhomme vamoharu paahi woohimuuluulelatho. Vanonto Yowabe ni munneiye Abixai yaapwaherera omuttharatthara Xeba, mwaana mulopwana a Bikeri." 
2Samuel20:11 Mmoha a anakhotto a Yowabe eemenle mukerekhere wa muttembo wa Amasa, aaheera: “Yaale animuthanla Yowabe ni Davide, emutthareke Yowabe!”" 
2Samuel20:12 Amasa aari pindya mmuseweni areene ephomeru. Aaviraru aamweemela omoona. Tivawo mulopwana ole aapurulenlaawe muttembo okerekhere musewe, anakhuneelano mukaandyo." 
2Samuel20:13 Ovenxiweene muttembo mmuseweni, anakhotto ootheene yaamutthara Yowabe emuttharattharaka Xeba, mwaana mulopwana a Bikeri." 
2Samuel20:14 Xeba aaviravira ipuumba sootheene sa aYixrayeli, anaphiya wAbeli-Beti-Mahaka ni aBeri ootheene yaathukumana weera ekhale ni yoowo." 
2Samuel20:15 Anakhotto ootheene a Yowabe yaaphiya, enarica wAbeli-Beti-Mahaka. Yaapaka ekaaro yookurumulela exiri enapacera ottiitta exiri ya omokoni. Ettiittaka hiihaale exiri weera epwexe," 
2Samuel20:16 muthiyana a miruku aakhuwela musidadeni: “Mwiiwe, mwiiwe! Mwamuleele Yowabe weera arwe wenno. Kintthuna wuuluma ni yoowo.”" 
2Samuel20:17 Owo amwaattamelaka, muthiyana aamukoha: “Nyuwo Yowabe?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Ti yoomi.” Vano muthiyana aamweerela: “Mwiiwe masu a murumeiyaanyu muthiyana.” Yowabe aamwaakhula: “Kinimwiiwa.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Muthiyana aaheera: “Khalayi yeeriwa: ‘Mvekele miruku musidade ya wAbeli’ ni mulattu wuulummwa hiiho. 
2Samuel20:19 Hiyo anamurettele ni oororomeleya oYixrayeli. Nyuwo munaasaasera heeni ophwata esidade eri maayi mmoha a oYixrayeli? Heeni muntthunaanyu ohela nthala yoohiyera ya Yave?” 
2Samuel20:20 Yowabe aamwakahula: “Hoye, nkintthuna hata vakhaani ohela nthala naari ophwata esidade ela!" 
2Samuel20:21 Kheehiyono yeeyo. Mulopwana mmoha iitthaniwa Xeba, mwaana mulopwana a Bikeri a elapo ya mmanyaakoni wEfrayimi aamvaanelela mwene Davide. Muninnyerere mulopwana owo ni kinoohiya esidade.” Muthiyana aamweerela Yowabe: “Wooreera. Hiyo ninoovonyera murwaawe vaxirini.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Vano muthiyana aarowa wuuluma ni amaki ootheene aasuwelihaka mirukusawe ni awosa yaamuhita Xeba, mwaana mulopwana a Bikeri, enamvonyera murwaawe Yowabe. Vano owo aahiipa nipalapatta ni anakhotto yaahiya esidade, khula mutthu ahokoleelaka owannyawe. Yowabe aahokoleela wa mwene oYerusaleemu." 
2Samuel20:23 Yowabe aari mutokweene a anakhotto ootheene a oYixrayeli; Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yoiyada, aari mutokweene a aKeriti ni aPeliti;" 
2Samuel20:24 Adonirami aari mutokweene a miteko soonyesereriwa; Yehoxafati, mwaana mulopwana a Alihudi, aari mutokweene a ilivuru sa nyaha;" 
2Samuel20:25 Xeva aari namalepa; Zadoki ni Abiyatari yaari asaserdoti* 
2Samuel20:26 ni Ira, muYayiri, aari musaserdoti* a Davide." 
2Samuel21:1 Ehuhu ekina moolamulani wa Davide, yaakhala etala yaavonle iyaakha tthaaru. Tivawo Davide aamvekenlaawe Yave. Yave aamwaakhula: “Ti niwoko na Sawuli ni emusaawe yoosareya ephome; niwoko aawiiva aGibiyoni.”" 
2Samuel21:2 Vano mwene aawiitthana aGibiyoni, anuuluma ni yaawo. Vanonto aGibiyoni khayaahiyono aYixrayeli, mene yaari yaale paahi yaahalahanle a awAmori. aYixrayeli yaahaaroromeliha ni nlipelo ohiwiiva, mene Sawuli aawiinlela ehace oYixrayeli ni oYuda aasaasaka owiiva." 
2Samuel21:3 Davide aahaakoha aGibiyoni: “Koopakelekeni eheeni? Moota heeni kineeraka kireherere seiye sipakiwe weera mureelihe yoohiyeriwa ya Yave?” 
2Samuel21:4 Vano aGibiyoni yaamwaakhula: “Mulattu nraahuno ni Sawuli ni emusaawe khoonuulumeya ni eparatha* hoye hoye eyuuma yoorikaxa; khanintthunaru omwiiva muYixrayeli.” Davide aamukoha: “Muntthuna koopakelekeni eheeni?” 
2Samuel21:5 aGibiyoni yaamwaakhula: “Aari Sawuli oniphwante atthunaka onimaliha moota wooweera khaninono ikuru hata nipuro oYixrayeli. 
2Samuel21:6 Munivahe asilopwana athanneeli a ekhapiraawe weera nawiive vamaithoni wa Yave oGibeya, esidade ya Sawuli aari oothanliwa a Yave.” Vano mwene aawaakhula: “Miyo kinoowinnyererani.”" 
2Samuel21:7 Mwene aamuurela Mefiboxeti, mwaana mulopwana a Yonatani, mwaana mulopwana a Sawuli niwoko na nlipelo naapakiwe variyari wa Davide ni Yonatani, mwaana mulopwana a Sawuli vamaithoni wa Yave." 
2Samuel21:8 Vanonto aamukuxa Aremoni ni Mefiboxeti, mwaana mulopwana a Rizepa, mwaana muthiyana a Aya, aamuyarenlaawe Sawuli, vamoha ni asilopwana athanu a Merabi, mwaana muthiyana a Sawuli, mwa yaale aamuyanrenlaawe Aderiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Barezilai, mMeholati." 
2Samuel21:9 Owo aawinnyerera aGibiyoni, mwa yaawo yiiviwe vanttumuxani vamaithoni wa Yave. Athanneeli ale yaahookhwa vamoha. Yaahiiviwa mmahukuni oopacera a ohephiwa wa esevada*." 
2Samuel21:10 Rizepa, mwaana muthiyana a Aya aakuxa esaakho, aniixaatalela vamwala. Okhuma epacerero ya yoohepha mpaka mittembo otthuleliwa epula, othana khaahiya ipalame sa wiirimu sitovaka mittembo naari ohiyu khaahiya eviraka axinama a ntuphini." 
2Samuel21:11 Davide aleeliwaka yeeyo, Rizepa mwaana muthiyana a Aya ni ekuxo ya Sawuli, aapankaawe," 
2Samuel21:12 aalamulela oroweliwa makhuva a Sawuli ni Yonatani yaakuxiwe ni amaki a oYabexi-Giliyade. Awosa yaahiiya makhuva a nipuwa na oBeti-Xani, mwa weiwo aFilisti yaathomeiyaaya mittembosaya vahoolo woomwiiva Sawuli omwaako Gilibowa." 
2Samuel21:13 Davide aaruuhawo makhuva a Sawuli ni mwaniye Yonatani ni aalamula weera makhuvaaya etakansiwe ni yaale yiiviwe ni aGibiyoni. 
2Samuel21:14 Yaavitha makhuva a Sawuli ni Yonatani onihiyeni na Kixi, atithawe Sawuli, oZela, elapo ya Benyamini, epakaka sootheene mwene aalamulenlaawe. Vahoolowaya Yave aahaakhula mavekelo eerelaka oYixrayeli." 
2Samuel21:15 Emaara ekinatho aYixrayeli yaahaawanano aFilisti. Davide ni asilopwana yaarowa waawanano aFilisti ni owo aakhulumuwaxa. 
2Samuel21:16 Vano Ixebi-Benobi a ekhapira ya Rafa aaroromeliha omwiiva Davide. Vanonto ethoka ya nivakanawe na ebronze* naaleemela ixekeli* macira mararu ni aakhalanotho ekatana enyowani. 
2Samuel21:17 Wa soothesene, Abixai, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha, aamvuluxa Davide amwiivaka muFilisti. Asilopwana a Davide yaamulipelela yeeraka: “Khamurwatho munihoola mukhottoni weera waara wa oYixrayeli ohicipihiwe.”" 
2Samuel21:18 Emaara ekina yaakhala ekhotto ekina ni aFilisti oGobi. Ehuhuweene yeele Sibekai, muHuxati, aamwiiva Safi, mmoha a ekhapira ya Rafa." 
2Samuel21:19 Mukhottoni ekina ni aFilisti oGobi Elihanani, mwaana mulopwana a Yaare-Oregamimi, muBeteleheemu aamwiiva Goliyati, muGiti. Mvittwaaya waalikana wunnuwa wa mwiri." 
2Samuel21:20 Mukhottoni mukinatho oGati, aakhala mulopwana oorakama aarino ikatha ithannamosa khula ntata ni khula nnaawo – sootheene iye saari ikatha miloko miili niixexe. Aaritho a ekhapira ya Rafa." 
2Samuel21:21 Owo aahaaruwana aYixrayeli, mene Yonatani, mwaana mulopwana a Ximeya, munneiye Davide, aamwiiva." 
2Samuel21:22 Asilopwana axexe ale yaari a ekhapira ya Rafa oGati ni yaahiiviwa ni Davide ni anakhottwaawe. 
2Samuel22:1 Davide aamwiipela Yave ecipo ela Yave amooponleene mmatatani mwa amwiittanaawe ootheene ni mwa Sawuli. 
2Samuel22:2 Aahiipa ha: “Yave ori Mwalaaka, Wootthawelawaka ni Mvuluxaaka." 
2Samuel22:3 Mulukwaaka ti Mwalaaka mwa weiwo kintthawelaakawo; Exikudwaaka yoowiixaakihera ni Nnyaka na ovuluxiwawaka. Owo ti nipuronaka noolipaxa ni etoore* yootthawelaawo. Nyuwo Yave ti Mvuluxaaka, mwa Yoowo onkoopola mwa anamapuhera." 
2Samuel22:4 Kinimwiitthana Yave ophwanenle ottottopeliwa ni koovuluwa mwa amwiittanaaka. 
2Samuel22:5 Mitekuteku sa okhwa saakikhuneela; nyooloko sa ophwata sookoopopiha. 
2Samuel22:6 Mikhoyi sa munihiyeni sookivitikelela; matapha a okhwa aakireya. 
2Samuel22:7 Ngwoovanimwaka kaamwiitthana Yave; kaamukhuwelela Mulukwaaka. Mpaanimwawe aahiiwa nsunaka; okhuwelawaka ohiiwa. 
2Samuel22:8 Elapo ya vathi yaatetereya vancipalexa; mathipelo a wiirimu yaattikinyeya. Saattikinyeenre niwoko Owo aanyoonyiwa. 
2Samuel22:9 Mphulanimwawe waakhuma mwiixi; mmwaano waakhuma mooro woolaliha. Mwa Yoowo ankhuma makhala evarelaka. 
2Samuel22:10 Aahula wiirimu, anakhuruwa; mahutte ooriipihana yaari vathi wa inaawosawe." 
2Samuel22:11 Aangwela kerubini*, anavava; aavava vamapuphani a epheyo." 
2Samuel22:12 Aahiikuttelela ni epiphi ni aahiikhuneela ni mahutte a epula. 
2Samuel22:13 Ngwaarani wa okhalawawe yaavarela makhala a mooro. 
2Samuel22:14 Yave aakukutteya wiirimu; nsu na Musulusulu naaruma. 
2Samuel22:15 Owo aalatha nyuumpa anaamwaraxa amwiittana; aaverunyiha mipatta sootheene awoomolaka. 
2Samuel22:16 Moohiihani wa Yave ni wiiselelawawe wa mphulani, wiixera wa ephareiya waahooneya ni mathipelo a elapo ya vathi yaakhala vanlakani." 
2Samuel22:17 Musulu aahookola ntata, anakivarela; aakikhumiha mmaahini moowiixera." 
2Samuel22:18 Aakivuluxa mwa mwiittanaaka ooweraxa; mwa awananaaka yaari ookivikana. 
2Samuel22:19 Awosa yaakiwanano vanihukuni na othananawaka, mene Yave aari Ekhaviherowaaka" 
2Samuel22:20 Aakikhumiha mwa soowoopiha; aakoopola niwoko onnakitthuna nnenesene. 
2Samuel22:21 Yave aakipakela yeeyo niwoko na olokawaka; aakitthuvela attharihaka mweettelowaaka woohinthowa. 
2Samuel22:22 Miyo koheettela ephiro ya Yave; nkitapannye kimuhiyaka Mulukwaaka. 
2Samuel22:23 Malamulowaawe ootheene ari ohoolowaka; nkihingye ikanosawe. 
2Samuel22:24 Nkipahunle etthu vamaithoniwawe; kaasemba soottheka. 
2Samuel22:25 Yave ookitthuvela niwoko na olokawaka ni na mweettelowaaka woohinthowa. 
2Samuel22:26 Nyuwo muniixoonihera Oororomeleya wa yaale anroromeleya; ni Ookwanela wa yaale oohinthowa. 
2Samuel22:27 Muniixoonihera Ootteela wa yaale antteela, vaheera muri mwiittana a alavilavi." 
2Samuel22:28 Munaavuluxa oowiiyeviha, mene maitwaanyu anaaweha oowiixoona weera mwaayevihe." 
2Samuel22:29 Nyuwo, Yave, ti Onyaaraaka; Yave onkimwaleela mpiphini." 
2Samuel22:30 Mukurunimwanyu kinoowera waawina anakhotto ancipale; ni ekhavihero ya Mulukwaaka kinoowera otupha exiri. 
2Samuel22:31 Ephiro ya Muluku ti yookwanela; masu a Yave ti oophwanela ororomela. Owo ti yoowiixaakihera wa ootheene animuroromela. 
2Samuel22:32 Khoowowo muluku mukina ahikhanle Yave; Mulukwaaka ti Mwala Mmoharu. 
2Samuel22:33 Ti Muluku onkivaha ikuru ni ontatuxa ephirowaaka yookwanela. 
2Samuel22:34 Onkitthimakiha woowaaluwa ntoko naahe; onkeettiha oolipeene mmanyaakoni soorakamela. 
2Samuel22:35 Onxuttiha matataaka owana; onkivareliha muupa wa ebronze*. 
2Samuel22:36 Nyuwo munkivaha yoowiixaakiheraanyu yoowina; enkilipiha ti ekhaviherowaanyu. 
2Samuel22:37 Mununnuwiha ephirowaaka weera inaawosaka sihiserenguwe. 
2Samuel22:38 Kaahaattharatthara amwiittanaaka kinaawinaxa. Nkaahokolongwe ehiphwatingwe. 
2Samuel22:39 Kaahaanyanyaxa ni khayaawenre weemelatho; yaamorela vathi wa inaawosaka. 
2Samuel22:40 Nyuwo mwaakivaha ikuru soowanano; mwaahaamoroxela amwiittanaaka mmanaawonimwaka. 
2Samuel22:41 Mwaapakiha weera amwiittanaaka ekitthawe; kohaaphwata yaale yaakithanya 
2Samuel22:42 Awosa yaakhuwela evekelaka ekhavihero, mene khaariwo oowaavuluxa; yaamvekelaxa Yave, mene Owo khaawaakhunle." 
2Samuel22:43 Kohaaxila ntoko ntthupi na vathi; kohaavotta ntoko ittoko sa mmuseweni. 
2Samuel22:44 Mookoopola moowananiwani mulokwaaka; mookikhaliha muhooleli a miloko; muloko wahaakisuwenle wookirumeela. 
2Samuel22:45 Anamarwa ankittittimihaxa; yakiiwaru, animwiiwelela khuluwi." 
2Samuel22:46 Ootheenaawo amporora; ankhuma moolipamwaya ethukumelaka. 
2Samuel22:47 Yave onkhala ni okumi! Otthapeliwe Mwalaaka. Avuvihiwe Muluku, Mwala ni Mvuluxaaka!" 
2Samuel22:48 Owo ti Muluku onkiinlela ikukuttula; Owo onlamulela miloko weera sikirumeele. 
2Samuel22:49 Ti Nyuwo munkoopola mwa amwiittanaaka; mookikhaliha vasulu wa awananaaka. Mookivuluxa mwa asilopwana oopuhera. 
2Samuel22:50 Tivawo kineeraaka kitthapele Nsinananyu, Yave, variyari wa miloko. Kinimwiipela soottottopela Nsinananyu." 
2Samuel22:51 Owo oongwinihaxa mwenaawe; ommoonihera onnene oottikittheliwaawe Davide ni ekhapiraawe wa mahuku ootheene!” 
2Samuel23:1 Masu ookisera a Davide ti ala: “Masu a Davide, mwaana mulopwana a Yixai; masu a mulopwana ovuvihiwe; mulopwana oottikittheliwa ni Muluku a Yakobe; namwiipa a icipo oYixrayeli:" 
2Samuel23:2 Munepa wa Yave wohuuluma mwa miyo; maswaaya yaari vanluminivaka. 
2Samuel23:3 Muluku a aYixrayeli ohuuluma; Mwala a oYixrayeli ookeerela: ‘Yoowo onaalamula atthu moota woororomeleya; yoowo onlamula amoovaka Muluku," 
2Samuel23:4 ori ntoko waara wa nsuwa nikhumaka ehikhanle mahutte; ntoko nsuwa nnoopa erupaleene epula nnunnuwiha nyiri sa vathi.’ 
2Samuel23:5 Emusaaka yohaakhuleliwa ni Muluku. Owo ookikhalihera wiiraana woohimala – woolipihiwa ni woororomelihiwa mmikhaleloni moothemwene. Vekhaikhai Owo onookeettiherela nnenesene mwa sootheene, akivahaka sootheene kinghaawelaaka." 
2Samuel23:6 Vaheera anamatakhala amvonyeriwa okerekhere ntoko nyiiwa sihinkwesereriwa ni matata. 
2Samuel23:7 Yaale ankweserera, amvarela muteko ekaruma hoye hoye mvitto wa nivaka. Hiiho nyiiwa singhiseriwa woomalela vaavaawo siraayawo.”" 
2Samuel23:8 Masina a anakhotto ooweraxa a Davide ti ala: Yoxebi-Baxebeti, muTakemoni mmoha aari mutokweene a atthu araru ooweraxa. Aavarela nivakanawe mweehuhuni ekina anaawanano asilopwana macira mathannamararu, anawiiva khuluwi." 
2Samuel23:9 Vahoolowawe aari Eleyazari, mwaana mulopwana a Dodai, ngwAhohi. Aaritho mmoha a anakhotto araru ooweraxa yaari ni Davide aFilisti yaathukumannaaya oPasi-Damimi weera ewane. aYixrayeli akina yaatthawa," 
2Samuel23:10 mene owo aapwaherera vanipuroniwawe aawananaka aFilisti mpaka ntatanawe omuuma mwaha wa ovukhula ekatana. Nihuku nne Yave aahaawinihaxa aYixrayeli, anakhotto enahokoleelasa aaraawewo Eliyazari, mene yaarowenle ohuhula mittembo paahi." 
2Samuel23:11 Vahoolowawe aari Xama, mwaana mulopwana a Age, muHarari. aFilisti yaathukumana vanipuroni yaaraayawo ematta yoosareya iroro. Anakhotto a aYixrayeli yaahaatthawasa aFilisti." 
2Samuel23:12 Wa soothesene, Xama aaheemela eriyari ya ematteene yeele, anaakihera ematta awiivaka aFilisti. Yave aangwinihaxa." 
2Samuel23:13 Mweehuhuni ya ohepha, asitokweene araru a nakupa a asitokweene miloko miraru, yaarowa omukumanano Davide munikhukuni na wAdulami. Vano ehuhuweene yeele yaakhala anakhotto akina a aFilisti yaakonenle vanreyareyani na oRefayimi." 
2Samuel23:14 Ehuhuweene yeele Davide aahiipitha wootthawelawawe, anakhotto a aFilisti ereene oBeteleheemu." 
2Samuel23:15 Davide aavolaxiwa ntthona, aneera: “Ii! Taani anaakivahe maahi oowura a muhimeni vakhiviru vamulako wa oBeteleheemu?”" 
2Samuel23:16 Vano asilopwana araru ooweraxa ale yaavira yaakonenlaayawo anakhotto a aFilisti, enarika maahi muhimeni vakhiviru vamulako wa oBeteleheemu, enamuronghela Davide. Vanonto, aakhootta owura, amiinelaka ntoko yooveleela vamaithoni wa Yave." 
2Samuel23:17 Owo aaheera: “Ii! Yave nkingwuraru maahi ala! Kawura, waahilikaneke ni ephome ya anakhotto alemve okumaaya weera eruuhe.” Vano Davide khaawunre. Iye saari soopaka sa anakhotto araru ooweraxa." 
2Samuel23:18 Abixai, munneiye Yowabe, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha, aari mutokweene a Miloko Miraru. Ehuhu emoha aawiiva anakhotto macira mararu ni nivakanawe, epilaawe elikanaka ni ya anakhotto araru ale." 
2Samuel23:19 Aattittimiheyaxa waapwaha akina a Miloko Miraru anathatuwa mutokweenaaya, mene khaalikananne anakhotto araru ooweraxa." 
2Samuel23:20 Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada, aari nakhotto oominya murima oKabezeyeli aapanke itthu sitokotoko. Aawiiva anakhotto eeli ooweraxa a aMowabe. Nihuku nimoha nooriiraxa aavolowa mulittini anamwiiva mwatto." 
2Samuel23:21 Aamwiivatho ngwExipitu oorakamaxa. ngwExipitu aavarela nivaka ni Benaiya aangwanano ni ekopo. Aamwaakha nivaka mmatatani mwa ngwExipitu, anamwiivano." 
2Samuel23:22 Iye saari soopaka sitokotoko sa Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada. Owo aakhalanotho epili ntoko anakhotto araru ooweraxa." 
2Samuel23:23 Aattitimihiwatho waapwaha akina a Miloko Miraru, mene khaalikananne araru ale. Davide aamukhaliha ntoko mutokweene a anamalipelelaawe." 
2Samuel23:24 Variyari wa Miloko Miraru yaari: Asaheli, muneiye Yowabe, Elihanani, mwaana mulopwana a Dodo a oBeteleheemu," 
2Samuel23:25 Xama, muHarodi, Elika, muHarodi," 
2Samuel23:26 Helezi, muPaleti, Ira, mwaana mulopwana a Ikexi a oTekowa," 
2Samuel23:27 Abiyezeri ngwAnatoti, Mebunai, muHuxati," 
2Samuel23:28 Zalemoni, ngwAhohi, Maharai, muNetofati," 
2Samuel23:29 Heledi, mwaana mulopwana a Bahana, muNetofati, Itai, mwaana mulopwana a Ribai a oGibeya, mweelaponi ya aBenyamini," 
2Samuel23:30 Benaiya, muPiratoni, Hidai a maxaapwa a oGahaxi." 
2Samuel23:31 Ali-Aleboni, ngwArebati, Azemaveti, muBarehumi," 
2Samuel23:32 Elihaba, muXahaleboni, anamwane a Yaxeni, Yonatani," 
2Samuel23:33 mwaana mulopwana a Xama, muHarari, Ahiyami, mwaana mulopwana a Xarari, muHarari," 
2Samuel23:34 Elifeleti, mwaana mulopwana a Ahasebai, mMahakati, Eliyami, mwaana mulopwana a Ahitofeli, muGiloni," 
2Samuel23:35 Hezero, muKarameli, Paarai, ngwArebi," 
2Samuel23:36 Igali, mwaana mulopwana a Natani oZoba, mwaana mulopwana a Hageri," 
2Samuel23:37 Zeleki, ngwAmoni, Naharai, muBeheroti, namakuxa a ikapwitthi sa Yowabe, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha," 
2Samuel23:38 Ira, ngwIteri, Garebi, ngwIteri ni" 
2Samuel23:39 Uriya, muHiti. Ootheenaawo yaari miloko miraru ni athanneeli." 
2Samuel24:1 Isara sa Yave saahaapattelatho aYixrayeli moota wooweera Davide aapaka yeeyo yahaareerela ni muloko, aalepelaka aYixrayeli ni aYuda." 
2Samuel24:2 Vano mwene aamweerela Yowabe ni asitokweene a anakhotto yaari ni yoowo: “Mwaviravire ipuumba sa aYixrayeli okhuma oDani mpaka oBerxeba ni mwaalikele muloko wootheene weera kisuwele waattawaya.” 
2Samuel24:3 Vanonto Yowabe aamwaakhula mwene: “Yave Mulukwaanyu aandyeereraxe muloko vamaithoni wa mwene, pwiiyaaka! Vano, mwene pwiiyaaka muntthunelani opaka yeeyo?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Mene mwene aanyesereriha weera muloko waalikeliwe, tivawo Yowabe ni asitokweene a anakhotto yaattimunlaayawo erowaka weera yaalikele muloko wa oYixrayeli." 
2Samuel24:5 Yaamulapuwa Yordanu, epaceraka wAroweri, mpatta wa ohitto wa esidade eri vanreyareyani; vahoolowaya enarowasa oGadi epwahereraka oYazeri."
