2Samuel24:6 Okhuma vaavaale yaarowa oGiliyade ni elapo ya oTatimi-Hodexi ni vahoolowaya oDani-Yahani ni elapo ya oSidoni. 
2Samuel24:7 Vanonto, yaarowa wa esidade yoolipihiwa ya oTiro ni mittetthe sootheene sa aHivi ni aKanaani. Woomalihera yaarowa mpaka oBerxeba oNegeba, elapo ya oYuda." 
2Samuel24:8 Vahoolo wooviravira elapo yootheene, yaahokoleela oYerusaleemu, emalingheene nyeeri mithannamixexe ni mahuku miloko miili." 
2Samuel24:9 Yowabe aamuthalihera mwene waatta wa anakhotto oYixrayeli. Vano oYixrayeli yaari asilopwana 800 000 yaawera owanano ekatana ni oYuda asilopwana 500 000. 
2Samuel24:10 Aalikenleene muloko, Davide aatondolowa, anamweerela Yave: “Kootthekaxa wa yeela kipankaaka. Vano kinoodyoonttelelani weera mulevelele yoottheka ya murumeiyaanyu niwoko koopaka ya ololo.”" 
2Samuel24:11 Davide aavenyaawe oxeexelo, Yave eera amuulumanneene mprofeeti Gadi aari namoonihera* a Davide, amweerelaka:" 
2Samuel24:12 “Murowe mwamuleele Davide weera Yave oneera ha: ‘Kinimoovahani soolakela tthaaru. Mwaase yoothanla ni weera Miyo koottaruxelenino.’” 
2Samuel24:13 Vano Gadi aarowa wa Davide, anamweerela: “Muthanleke: iyaakha tthaaru sa etala mweelaponimwanyu, nyeeri miraru mwaatthawaka amwiittanaanyu, awosa yoottharattharakani, hoye hoye mahuku mararu a mahooxo mweelaponimwanyu. Vanonto, muupuweleke nnenesene ni mukileele yoomwaakhula Yoole okiruminghe.”" 
2Samuel24:14 Davide aamwaakhula: “Koothananaxa. Fataari omorela mmatatani mwa Yave ohikhanle mwa atthu, niwoko ikhararisawe siri sitokotoko.”" 
2Samuel24:15 Vano Yave aahaarumihela nihooxo aYixrayeli okhuma oxeexeloweene yoole mpaka emalihero ya ehuhu yoothanliwa. Vano atthu 70 000 okhuma oDani mpaka oBerxeba yaahookhwa. 
2Samuel24:16 Ndyelo aatheteyaawe ntata weera aphwate oYerusaleemu, Yave aathananaxa niwoko na nthorihelonawe, anamweerela ndyelo eera aaphwate atthu: “Paahi! Waatta!” Ehuhuweene yeele ndyelo a Yave aari vanipuroni nimveeriwa* etrigu na Arawuna, muYebusi." 
2Samuel24:17 Davide amoonakaru ndyelo aaphwataka atthu, aamweerela Yave: “Kitthenke ti yoomi kipakaka yoonanara. Atthu ala ari ntoko ikhondoolo paahi. Kheewo apankaaya. Kithorihiwe miyo ni emusaaka.”" 
2Samuel24:18 Nihuku nenenenne Gadi aarowa wa Davide, anamweerela: “Murowe ni mwamutekele altaari* Yave vanipuroni nimveeriwa* etrigu na Arawuna, muYebusi.”" 
2Samuel24:19 Vano Davide aarowawo ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe mwa Gadi. 
2Samuel24:20 Arawuna amoonaka mwene ni asilopwanaawe erwaaka omukumanano, aavenya, anakokhora ohoolo wa mwene, uuramihelaka ekhovaawe vathi," 
2Samuel24:21 anamukoha: “Pwiiyaaka mwene murweenleni wa murumeiyaanyu?” Davide aamwaakhula: “Kintthuna othuma nipuro nimveeriwa* etrigu weera kimutekelewo Yave altaari* weera nihooxo nimale eriyari ya mulokwaaka.” 
2Samuel24:22 Arawuna aamweerela Davide: “Pwiiyaaka mwene mukuxeke nipuro weera mumveleelele Yave yooveleela eniyooreereleni. Kinimoovahanitho imombe wa yooveleela yoohisa. Siri vatho ntoko ikhuuni ikaruma simvareliwa muteko ni imombe soolima.” 
2Samuel24:23 Ii! Amwene! Kinimoovahani itthu sootheene iya.” Arawuna aamweerelatho: “Yave Mulukwaanyu aakhulele yooveleelaanyu!” 
2Samuel24:24 Wa soothesene, mwene aamwaakhula Arawuna: “Hoye, vekhaikhai, kinimoolivani wa seiya. Nkinimveleelela Yave Mulukwaaka sooveleela soohisa sihikirinke. Vano Davide aathuma nipuro nimveeriwa* etrigu ni imombe ilopwana amulivaka Arawuna ixekeli* miloko mithanu sa eparatha*." 
2Samuel24:25 Davide aamutekelawo Yave altaari*, anapaka sooveleela soohisa ni sa murettele. Yave aahaakhulela mavekelo mwaha wa elapo ni naamala nihooxo naaphwata oYixrayeli." 
1Kings1:1 Davide uuluvanleene, yaamukhuneela manta, mene owo khoona oviha." 
1Kings1:2 Vano arumeiyaawe yaamweerela: “Munihiye niwaasereni mwaamwali oowiikosoopa weera oorumeelekeni ookosoopakani. Owo akoneke ottuliwanyu weera oovaheeni, nttukuttha.”" 
1Kings1:3 Vano yaamwaasaasa mulaponi moothemwene mwa oYixrayeli mwaamwali ooreeraxa, enamphwanya Abixagi, muXunami, enamuroihela mwene." 
1Kings1:4 Mwaamwali owo aari ooreeraxa, anamurumeela mwene amukosoopaka, mene mwene khaamukonanne." 
1Kings1:5 Vano mwaana mulopwana a Davide, Adoniya, mwa yoowo amayawe yiitthaniwa Hagiti, aasareya wiixoona eeraka: “Miyo kinookhala mwene.” Aareherera ikaaro ni anamweettiha ikaaro sa ikavalu* nitho asilopwana miloko mithanu weera etthimakele ohoolowawe." 
1Kings1:6 Atithawe khaanamvirikanyihele naari khaanamukohe: “Ompakelani hiiha?” Adoniya aaritho ooreeraxa ni aayariwe vahoolo wa Abesalomi. 
1Kings1:7 Adoniya aamwiiranana Yowabe, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha ni Abiyatari, musaserdoti*, ni awosa yaamutthara enamukhavihera." 
1Kings1:8 Wa soothesene, Zadoki, musaserdoti*, Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada, Natani, mprofeeti, Ximei ni Reyi vamoha ni anamalipelelaawe Davide khayaamutthunne Adoniya okhala mwene." 
1Kings1:9 Vano Adoniya aaveleela ikhondoolo, imombe, iputtiputthi sooneneva vaNlukuni na oZoheleti vakhiviru wEni-Rogeli. Aahaalattula axunneiye ootheene – anamwane a mwene – ni asilopwana ootheene a oYuda yaari arumeiyi a mwene." 
1Kings1:10 Vaheera khaamulattunle Natani, mprofeeti, naari Benaiya, hata anamalipelela a mwene hoye hoye munneiye Salomoni." 
1Kings1:11 Vanonto Natani aamukoha Batixeba, amayawe Salomoni: “Mohiiwa weera Adoniya, mwaana mulopwana a Hagiti, oohiivara omwene, apwiyaahu Davide ehisuwelaka?" 
1Kings1:12 Mukihiye koovaheeni, miruku weera moopole okumaanyu ni wa mwaninyu Salomoni." 
1Kings1:13 Murowe mwamukohe mwene Davide: ‘Pwiiya, mwaakilipelela miyo, murumeiyaanyu: “Vekhaikhai, Salomoni, mwaninyu, onookhala namarandelaaka ni onookilaathi vahiceniwaka.” Vano, okhalenleni Adoniya mwene?’" 
1Kings1:14 Vano nyuwo muulumaka nlelo ni mwene, miyo kinoophiya kaakhulelaka maswaanyu.”" 
1Kings1:15 Batixeba aarowa omukumanano mwene uuluvalanxe, Abixagi, muXunami aamukosoopaawewo." 
1Kings1:16 Batixeba aamukokhorela mwene, uuramihelaka ekhovaawe vathi. Ohoolo wa mwene. Davide aamukoha: “Muntthunani?”" 
1Kings1:17 Owo aamwaakhula: “Pwiiyaaka, nyuwo muneenaanyu mwaakilipelela miyo, murumeiyaanyu, mwa Nsina na Yave Mulukwaanyu: ‘Salomoni, mwaninyu, onookhala namarandelaaka ni onookilaathi vahiceniwaka.’" 
1Kings1:18 Wa soothesene, Adoniya ohiivara omwene, pwiiyaaka mwene muhisuwelaka." 
1Kings1:19 Ooveleela imombe, ikhondoolo ni iputtiputthi sincipale anaalattula anamwane ootheene a mwene, musaserdoti* Abiyatari ni Yowabe, mutokweene a anakhotto. Vaheera khaamulattunle Salomoni, murumeiyaanyu." 
1Kings1:20 Pwiiyaaka mwene, aYixrayeli ootheene anoowehani nyuwo weera esuwele taani anoorandeleni omwene pwiiyaaka vahiceniwanyu." 
1Kings1:21 Mwaahimuthoonya namarandela, miyo ni mwanaka Salomoni nnooniweke ntoko anamavariha, pwiiyaka mwene mvithiweene ni makholowaanyu.”" 
1Kings1:22 Owo nlelo uulumaka hiihaale ni mwene, Natani, mprofeeti, aaphiyawo." 
1Kings1:23 Arumeiyi a mwene yaamweerela: “Mprofeeti, Natani, ohoowa.” Natani aavolowa wa Davide, anuuramihela ekhovaawe vathi ohoolo wa mwene." 
1Kings1:24 Natani aamukoha: “Pwiiyaaka mwene, weeraka mwaaheera weera Adoniya onookhala namarandelaanyu ni weera onookilaathi vahiceniwanyu?" 
1Kings1:25 Olelo owo aarowa oveleela imombe, iputtiputthi ni ikhondoolo sincipale. Ohaalattula anamwanaawe mwene ootheene, mutokweene a anakhotto ni Abiyatari, musaserdoti*. Vaanaanova awosa anca, ewuraka ni yoowo, yeeraka: ‘Woye mwene Adoniya!’" 
1Kings1:26 Wa soothesene, khaakilattunle miyo, murumeiyaanyu, naari Zadoki, musaserdoti*, hata Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada, hoye hoye murumeiyaanyu Salomoni." 
1Kings1:27 Mpaka opaka etthu siiyeela pwiiyaaka mwene muhaasuwelihaka arumeiyaanyu yoowo aneera oorandeleni amwene pwiiyaaka vahiceni?” 
1Kings1:28 Vano mwene Davide aaheera: “Mmwiitthane Batixeba.” Vanonto owo aamwaattamela, aneemela ohoolowawe." 
1Kings1:29 Mwene aalipela: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave, mwa Yoowo okooponle mmahooxoni moothemwene," 
1Kings1:30 weera vekhaikhai olelo kinookwanihera yeeyo kaalipenlaaka mwa Nsina na Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli: Salomoni, mwaninyu, onookhala namarandelaaka ni owo onookilaathi vahiceniwaka vanipuroniwaka.”" 
1Kings1:31 Vano Batixeba aahuuramihela ekhovaawe vathi, anamukokhorela mwene, eeraka: “Pwiiyaaka mwene, Davide, akhaleke ni okumi wa mahuku ootheene!”" 
1Kings1:32 Mwene Davide aalamulela: “Mmwiitthane Zadoki, musaserdoti*, Natani, mprofeeti ni Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada.” Awosa ephiyakaru ohoolo wa mwene," 
1Kings1:33 Davide aaweerela: “Mwaaroweno arumeiyi a apwiyaanyu ni mungwelihe mwanaka Salomoni vabuuruniwaka ni munronghe oGihoni. 
1Kings1:34 Zadoki, musaserdoti*, ni Natani, mprofeeti, yamuttikitthelewo weera akhale mwene a aYixrayeli. Mwiipe nipalapatta ni mwakhuweleke: ‘Woye mwene Salomoni!’" 
1Kings1:35 Vahoolowaya mwamuhoole, ni owo arweeke weera akilaathele ehicaaka alamulaka vanipuroniwaka. Koomuthanla weera alamule oYixrayeli ni oYuda.”" 
1Kings1:36 Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada, aamwaakhula mwene: “Onimweereya! Yave, Muluku a apwiyaaka mwene aakhulele!" 
1Kings1:37 Mooteene yoowo Yave aaraawe ni pwiiyaaka mwene, hiihotho akhaleke ni Salomoni weera omwenaawe okhale woovuwaxa opwaha wa pwiiyaaka mwene Davide!”" 
1Kings1:38 Vano Zadoki, musaserdoti*, Natani, mprofeeti, Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada, aKereti ni aPeleti yaarowa, enangweliha Salomoni vabuuruni a mwene Davide, enamuhoola mpaka oGihoni." 
1Kings1:39 Zadoki, musaserdoti*, aakuxa nnyaka noosareya makhura muheemani yootteela, anamuttikitthela Salomoni. Vanonto yaahiipa nipalapatta ni atthu ootheene yaakhuwela: “Mwene Salomoni woye!”" 
1Kings1:40 Atthu ootheene yaamutthara ewiipaka ampetta ni ohakalalaxa moota wooweera etthaya yaatetereya mwaha wa onyakula. 
1Kings1:41 Adoniya ni oolattuliwa ootheene yaari ni yoowo yiiwa onyakula iwe emalihaka efestaaya. Iiwakaru oruma wa nipalapatta, Yowabe aakoha: “Onyakula ni okhuweliwa iwo musidade ontaphulelani?”" 
1Kings1:42 Owo uulumaka hiihaale, Yonatani, mwaana mulopwana a Abiyatari, musaserdoti*, aaphiyaawe. Adoniya aamweerela: “Mvoloweke. Mutthu oottittimiheyaxa ntoko nyuwo wookhala wooruuhaka mutthenga wooreera.”" 
1Kings1:43 Yonatani aamwaakhula: “Hata vakhaani! Pwiiyaaka mwene Davide oomuthanla Salomoni okhala mwene. 
1Kings1:44 Mwene aamurumiha owo ni Zadoki, musaserdoti*, Natani, mprofeeti, Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada, aKereti ni aPeleti. Awosa aangwelihasa vabuuruni a mwene," 
1Kings1:45 ni Zadoki, musaserdoti*, Natani, mprofeeti oomuttikitthela okhala mwene a oGihoni. Okhuma weiwo yaarowa ehakalalaka ni esidade enyakuleleyaka. Onyakulawene ti weiwo muniiwaanyu." 
1Kings1:46 Ohiya toko yeeyo, Salomoni ookilaathela vahiceni ya emwene." 
1Kings1:47 Mpaka arumeiyi a mwene yaarowa omuulumiha Davide, mwene pwiiyaahu emweerelaka: ‘Mulukwaanyu atatuxe epili ya Salomoni opwaha epilaanyu ni omwenaawe woovuwaxa opwaha omwenaanyu!’ Vano mwene aahuurama vakaamaniwawe," 
1Kings1:48 aneera: ‘Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli atthapeliwe niwoko ookitthunihera omoona namarandela vahiceniwaka olelo!’”" 
1Kings1:49 Yiiwaka yeeyo, oolattuliwa ootheene a Adoniya yaarukureereya nyuru, enalakaseya ootheene." 
1Kings1:50 Wa soothesene, Adoniya, amoovaka Salomoni, aarowa, anavarela manyaka a mmaloothoni a altaari*." 
1Kings1:51 Vano Salomoni aaleeliwa: “Adoniya ommoova mwene Salomoni ni ovanre manyaka a mmaloothoni a altaari*. Owo oneera: ‘Mwene Salomoni akilipelele olelo weera kharwa amwiiva murumeiyaawe ni ekatana.’” 
1Kings1:52 Salomoni aahaakhula: “Owo iixoonihera oororomeleyeene, kheemukhumelela etthu. Vaheera namphwanyano yakhalaru yoonarara, onimookhwa.”" 
1Kings1:53 Vano mwene Salomoni aahaarumiha asilopwana ni awosa yaamukuruxa valtaarini*. Adoniya aahoorwa anamukokhorela munttittimihoni mwene Salomoni ni Salomoni aamweerela: “Muroweke owaani.” 
1Kings2:1 Davide aakhuveelaawe okhwa, aamuxuttiha mwanawe Salomoni soolamula iya:" 
1Kings2:2 “Miyo kihanle vakhaani okhwa. Mwiilopwaneihe, mukhaleke oolipa." 
1Kings2:3 Mwiiwelele yeeyo Yave Mulukwaanyu ontthunaawe: Mweette mphironimwawe ni mwiiwelele ikanosawe ni soolamulasawe; malamulowaawe ni sootthuneyasawe, ntoko elempwalaaya muNlamuloni na Moisesi. Hiiho itthu sinooweettelani nnenesene mwa sootheene muneeraanyu mpake ni mmapuroni moothemwene muneeranyu murowe." 
1Kings2:4 Mwapaka yeeyo, Yave onookwanihera yeeyo aakiroromelinghaawe eeraka: ‘Ekhapiraanyu yeetta mootthunanimwaka ni yakhala oororomeleya vamaithoniwaka ni murima ni okumi wootheene, nyuwo munoomukhalano namarandela vahiceni ya emwene oYixrayeli wa mahuku ootheene.’" 
1Kings2:5 Vano nyuwo moosuwela nnenesene yeeyo Yowabe, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha, aakipakenlaawe ni yeeyo aapakenlaawe asitokweene eeli a anakhotto a aYixrayeli – Abeneri, mwaana mulopwana a Neri ni Amasa, mwaana mulopwana a Yeteri. Aawiiva, ayeeheraka ephomaaya vathi mweehuhuni ya murettele apakaka ntoko vakhotto. Ephome ele yaamvuuvela laambaawe ni ikwakwaattasawe." 
1Kings2:6 Mumpakele yeeyo muntthunaanyu, mene muhimuhiye uuluvalaka, akhwaaka mmuretteleni." 
1Kings2:7 Vaheera ngwoonihere murima wooreera anamwane a Barezilai oGiliyade ni mwaatthuniheraka ocano, niwoko awosa yaakikhavihera miyo kaamutthawatthawaaka munninyu Abesalomi." 
1Kings2:8 Muhittiwale weera ori nlelo ni nyuwo Ximei, mwaana mulopwana a Gera, muBenyamini oBahurimi, mwa yoowo aakinyemunle nihuku nne kaarongwaaka oMahanayimi. Vaheera aakiciceera oYordanu, kinamuroromeliha ni nlipelo mwa Nsina na Yave: ‘Nkirwa kiwiivaani ni ekatana.’" 
1Kings2:9 Vanonto, muhuupuwele weera khanthowa. Nyuwo mookhalano miruku – munoosuwela yoompaka. Orimuuluvalaru mmwiive mooxililini.”" 
1Kings2:10 Vano Davide aahookhwa, anavithiwa vamoha ni makholowaawe musidadeni mwa Davide." 
1Kings2:11 Owo aalamunle oYixrayeli iyaakha miloko mixexe – iyaakha ithannapiili oHeberoni ni iyaakha miloko miraru ni tthaaru oYerusaleemu. 
1Kings2:12 Vahoolowaya Salomoni aakilaathela ehice ya atithawe ni olamulawawe waakhalihiwa moota woolipaxa. 
1Kings2:13 Vano Adoniya, mwaana mulopwana a Hagiti, aarowa wa Batixeba, amayawe Salomoni. Batixeba aamukoha: “Mungwa mmuretteleni?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Aani, mmuretteleni.”" 
1Kings2:14 Owo aapwaherera: “Kookhalano masu makina oowooleelani.” Batixeba aamwaakhula: “Muulumeke.” 
1Kings2:15 Adoniya aamweerela: “Ntoko musuwenlaanyu, omwene waari wawaka. aYixrayeli ootheene yaakiweha ntoko mwenaaya. Vaheera itthu sooceendyeya ni vano omwene ti wa munnaka, niwoko Yave aalakela weera ti wawawe." 
1Kings2:16 Vano kookhalano nivekelo nimoha – dyoontte mutthunihere nno.” Batixeba aamweerela: “Muhimeke.” 
1Kings2:17 Adoniya aapwaherera: “Dyoontte, mwamvekele mwene Salomoni weera akivahe Abixagi, muXunami, ntoko mwaaraka. Owo kharwa ookhoottelani.”" 
1Kings2:18 Batixeba aamwaakhula: “Paahi, kinimuuluma ni mwene kiweerelakani nyuwo.”" 
1Kings2:19 Batixeba aarongwaawe wuuluma ni mwene Salomoni amweerelaka Adoniya, mwene aaheemela weera amwaakhelele, anuurama ohoolowawe, anakilaathi vahiceniwawe ya emwene. Aalamula oruuheliwa amayawe ehice ekina ni Batixeba aakilaathi moonowaawe mulopwana." 
1Kings2:20 Owo aamweerela mwene: “Kookhalano yoowoovekani ekhaani. Muhikikhoottele.” Mwene aamwaakhula: “Mukileele maayi, kinoowaakhulelani.”" 
1Kings2:21 Batixeba aamweerela: “Mumvahe munninyu Adoniya Abixagi, muXunami, weera amuthele.”" 
1Kings2:22 Salomoni aahaakoha amayawe: “Munimvekelela heeni paahi Abixagi, muXunami ntoko mwaarawe Adoniya? Onoolikana okivekela omvaha omwene. Muupuwelele weera ori munnaka mutokweene. Aani onoolikana okivekela omvaha omwene yoowo, Abiyatari musaserdoti* ni Yowabe, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha!”" 
1Kings2:23 Vano mwene Salomoni aalipela mwa Nsina na Yave eeraka: “Muluku akittaruxaxe miyo kaahimwiiva Adoniya niwoko na nivekelo nna! 
1Kings2:24 Vanonto, kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave, mwa Yoowo okikilaathinghe vahiceni ya atithaka Davide ntoko aaroromelinghaawe, akivahaka omwene – olelo Adoniya onimookhwa!”" 
1Kings2:25 Mwene Salomoni aamulamulela Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada ni owo aamvulaliha Adoniya anamwiiva." 
1Kings2:26 Mwene aamweerela Abiyatari, musaserdoti*: “Muhokoleele elapwaanyu wAnatoti. Mumphwanela wiiviwa, mene vaanaanova nkiwiivani mweenre mwaateexa Arka* a Yave onlamula soothesene ohoolo wa atithaka Davide ni mwaahaawa ni yaawo.”" 
1Kings2:27 Salomoni aamoomola Abiyatari okhala musaserdoti* a Yave akwaniheraka hiiho masu Yave uulummaawe oXilo eerelaka ekhapira ya Eli. 
1Kings2:28 Yowabe iiwakaru ihaali iye, aatthawela muheemani mwa Yave, anavara manyaka a altaari* eenre avaanela ni Adoniya. Wa soothesene, khaavaanenle ni Abesalomi." 
1Kings2:29 Mwene Salomoni aaleeliwa weera Yowabe aatthawela Muheemani mwa Yave ni ori mukerekhere altaari* a Yave. Vano Salomoni aamulamulela Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada: “Murowe, mwamwiive!”" 
1Kings2:30 Benaiya aavolowa Muheemani mwa Yave, anamweerela Yowabe: “Mwene eenre: ‘mukhumeke!’” Wa soothesene, Yowabe aamwaakhula: “Hoye. Kikhwele muumu.” Benaiya aamuthalihera mwene yoowaakhula ya Yowabe." 
1Kings2:31 Vano mwene aamulamulela Benaiya: “Mwampake yeeyo ohimmaawe: Mwamwiive ni mwamvithe. Eyo enoomaliha wa miyo ni ekhapira ya atithaka nthowa na Yowabe owiivale atthu oohinthowa. 
1Kings2:32 Yave onoomwiivela Yowabe yeeyo ophwanenlaawe, niwoko atithaka Davide ehisuwelaka, Yowabe aawiiva asilopwana eeli oororomeleyaxa ooreerela ompwaha yoowo: Abeneri, mwaana mulopwana a Neri aari mutokweene a anakhotto a oYixrayeli, ni Amasa, mwaana mulopwana a Yeteri, mutokweene a anakhotto a oYuda." 
1Kings2:33 Nthowa na okhwa iwe nnimmorele Yowabe ni ekhapiraawe wa mahuku ootheene. Vaheera murettele wa Yave okhale wa mahuku ootheene ni Davide, ekhapiraawe, emusaawe ni ehicaawe ya emwene.”" 
1Kings2:34 Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada, aarowa, anamwiiva Yowabe. Aavithiwa mmattamwawe munikareni." 
1Kings2:35 Mwene aamukhaliha Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada, ntoko mutokweene a anakhotto vanipuroni na Yowabe ni Zadoki vanipuroni na Abiyatari ntoko musaserdoti*." 
1Kings2:36 Vano Mwene aalamula oroweliwa Ximei, anamweerela: “Mwiitekele empa oYerusaleemu ni mwakhalewo, mene muhirowe mapuro makina." 
1Kings2:37 Musuwele nnenesene weera nihuku muneeraanyu mvenye oYerusaleemu mulapuwaka nreyareya na oKideroni, vekhaikhai munimookhwa. Nthowa na okhwawanyu nnikhale nawinyu.”" 
1Kings2:38 Ximei aamwaakhula mwene: “Yeeyo muhimmaanyu ti yooreera. Murumeiyaanyu onoopaka yeeyo pwiiyaaka mwene muhimmaanyu.” Ni Ximei aakhala oYerusaleemu wa mahuku mancipale. 
1Kings2:39 Wa soothesene, sivinreene iyaakha tthaaru, ipottha piili sa Ximei saatthawela wa Akixi, mwaana mulopwana a Mahaka, mwene a oGati, ni Ximei aaleeliwa: “Ipotthasanyu siri oGati.”" 
1Kings2:40 Iiwakaru yeeyo, aangwela buurwaawe, anarowa wa Akixi oGati waasaasa ipotthasawe. Iwe Ximei aahokoloxawo ipotthasawe." 
1Kings2:41 Salomoni asuwelaka weera Ximei aarowa oGati anahokoleela oYerusaleemu," 
1Kings2:42 mwene aamwiitthana Ximei, anamweerela: “Miyo kaahoolipelihani mwa Nsina na Yave kiwoopererakani: ‘Nihuku muneeraanyu murowe nakhalaru nipuro, musuwele weera vekhaikhai munimookhwa.’ Ehuhuweene yeele mwaakaakhula: ‘Yeeyo muhimmaanyu eri yooreera. Kinimwiiwelela.’" 
1Kings2:43 Vano muhikwaniherenle heeni nlipelo mwaampakenlaanyu Yave hata muheettelenle heeni nlamulo koovanghaakani?” 
1Kings2:44 Mwene aamweerelatho: “Moosuwela nnenesene soonanara sootheene mwaapakenlaanyu atithaka Davide. Vano Yave onimoomoroxelani yoonanara mpankaanyu. 
1Kings2:45 Vaheera mwene Salomoni onooreelihiwa ni ehice ya emwene ya Davide enoopwaherera mahuku ootheene vamaithoni wa Yave.” 
1Kings2:46 Vanonto mwene aamulamulela Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada ni owo aamukakattha Ximei, anamwiiva. Hiiho omwene waakhalihiwa nnenesene mmatatani mwa Salomoni." 
1Kings3:1 Salomoni aahiixiiraanyiha ni Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu, amuthelaka mwaniye. Owo aamuruuha musidade ya Davide mpaka omalihiwa otekiwa empa ya mwene, Empa ya Yave ni exiri erukureenre oYerusaleemu." 
1Kings3:2 Wa soothesene, muloko nlelo wannapaka sooveleela mmapuroni ootteelihiwa yeenre yahitekiwa Empa ya Muluku ettittimihereliwaka Nsina na Yave." 
1Kings3:3 Salomoni aahoonihera omusivelawawe Yave ngwiiwelelani ikano sa atithawe Davide, mene aapaka sooveleela ni aahisa erubani* mmapuroni ootteela vasulu mattumuxa." 
1Kings3:4 Mwene aarowa oGibiyoni, niwoko naakhalawo Nipuro Nootteela* vasulu nttumuxa noottittimiheyaxa ni Salomoni aaveleelawo sooveleela soohisa macira muloko valtaarini* ale." 
1Kings3:5 Yave aahiixoonihera wa Salomoni oGibiyoni ohiyu mmoha moolohani, anamweerela: “Mukivekele yakhalaru etthu muntthunaanyu ni kinimoovahani.”" 
1Kings3:6 Salomoni aamwaakhula: “Mwaamoonihera murima wooreeraxa murumeiyaanyu, atithaka Davide niwoko owo aari oororomeleyaanyu, a murima wooreera ni a ekhaikhai. Mwaapwaherera omoonihera murima wooreera mumvahaka mwaana mulopwana, mwa yoowo okilaathiye vahiceniwawe olelo." 
1Kings3:7 Vano Yave Mulukwaaka, moomukhaliha murumeiyaanyu mwene vanipuroni na atithaka Davide. Wa soothesene, miyo mmiravo mukhaanene kihisuwelaka yooweera." 
1Kings3:8 Murumeiyaanyu ori va eriyari ya muloko muthanlaalaanyu – muloko woohaalikeleya. 
1Kings3:9 Vano mumvahe murumeiyaanyu murima wa miruku weera kilamule mulokwaanyu kisuwelaka okawanyiha yooreera ni yoonanara. Waahikhala hiiho, moota heeni kineeraka kilamule mulokwaanyu mutokotoko ola?”" 
1Kings3:10 Nivekelo nne na Salomoni naamuhakalalihaxa Yave. 
1Kings3:11 Muluku aamweerela: “Mweenre muvekelaka yeeyo, muhivekelaka okhala ni okumi wa mahuku mancipale, naari mihakhu hata okhwa wa amwiittanaanyu, mene aani miruku soolamulano nnene," 
1Kings3:12 kinoopaka yeeyo muvekenlaanyu. Kinimoovahani murima wa miruku onsuwela okawanyiha yoonanara ni yooreera moota wooweera khanakhale hata khakhala ntoko nyuwo. 
1Kings3:13 Ohiya toko yeeyo, kinimoovahani yeeyo muhivekenlaanyu – mihakhu ni epili – weera mookumunimwanyu mukhale oohilikanxereya ni mamwene makina." 
1Kings3:14 Ni mweetta mphironimwaka ni mwiiwelela ikanosaka ni malamulowaaka ntoko atithinyu Davide yaapankaaya, kinimoovahani okumi wa mahuku mancipale.”" 
1Kings3:15 Vano Salomoni aavenya mookonani, anasuwela weera aamuloha. Aahokoleela oYerusaleemu, aneemela ohoolo wa Arka* a wiiraana a Yave, anaveleela sooveleela soohisa ni sa murettele. Vahoolowaya aahaapakela efesta arumeiyaawe ootheene." 
1Kings3:16 Nihuku nimoha mapuuta meeli yaahiixoonihera ohoolo wa mwene. 
1Kings3:17 Mmoha a yaale aamweerela: “Ii! Pwiiyaaka, muthiyana ola ni miyo ninkhala empa emoha. Kaamuyara mwaana mulopwana, nreenemo hiyo ooweeli." 
1Kings3:18 Eviraleene mahuku mararu a oyariwa wa mwanaka, olatho aamuyara mwaana mulopwana. Nreeli, khaariworu mukina mpaani." 
1Kings3:19 Ohiyu omoha muthiyana ola aamukonela mwaniye, anakhwa." 
1Kings3:20 Vano, ola aavenya ohiyu eriyari, anamukuxa mwanaka, miyo murumeiyaanyu kikonaka. Vahoolowaya aamwaatalela ohoolowawe. Vaheera mwaniye ookhweene aamwiikaathi ohoolowaka." 
1Kings3:21 Kipeherenreene ovenya weera kimwaamwihe mwanaka, kaahoona weera ohookhwa! Wa soothesene, kingwehexexaka nnenesene, kaahoona weera khahiyono mwanaka kimuyanraaka.”" 
1Kings3:22 Vaheera muthiyana mukina aaheera: “Hoye, mwaana mukumi ti awaka ni ookhwa ti awinyu.” Wa soothesene, oopacera aanyeserera: “Hoye, ookhwa ti awinyu ni mukumi awaka.” Vano yaakhulana hiihaale ohoolo wa mwene." 
1Kings3:23 Mwene aaheera: “Ola oneera: ‘Mwanaka mukumi ni mwaninyu ohookhwa,’ ni mukina oneera: ‘Hoye! Mwaninyu ohookhwa ni awaka mukumi.’”" 
1Kings3:24 Vano mwene aalamula: “Mukiruuheleke ekatana.” Yaamuruuhela mwene ekatana. 
1Kings3:25 Vanonto aalamula: Munkakatthanye mwaana mukumi eriyariru ni mpatta mmoha mumvahe muthiyana mmoha ni mpatta mukinoowo mukhwaawe. 
1Kings3:26 Amayawe mwaana mukumi emuthananelaxaka mwanaya yaamudyoonttelela mwene: “Dyoontte pwiiyaaka, mumvahe ola mwaana mukumi. Muhimwiive!” Wa soothesene, muthiyana mukina aaheera: “Hata nyuwo naari miyo nihimukuxe. Munkakatthanye eriyariru!”" 
1Kings3:27 Vano mwene aalakela ha: “Mumvahe mwaana mukumi muthiyana oopacera. Muhimwiive. Amayawe ti yaala.” 
1Kings3:28 aYixrayeli ootheene yiiwakaru yoolakela ya mwene, yaamuttittimihaxa mwene, niwoko yaahoona weera aarino miruku sa Muluku wookwanihera ekhaikhai." 
1Kings4:1 Vano mwene Salomoni aathatuwa mwene a aYixrayeli ootheene. 
1Kings4:2 Masina a arumeiyaawe oottittimiheyaxa ti ala: Azariya, mwaana mulopwana a Zadoki: musaserdoti*;" 
1Kings4:3 Elihorefi ni Ahiya, mwaana mulopwana a Xixa yaari anamalepa. Yehoxafati, mwaana mulopwana a Ahiludi, aari mutokweene a ilivuru sa nyaha," 
1Kings4:4 Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada aari mutokweene a anakhotto ootheene a aYixrayeli; Zadoki ni Abiyatari yaari asaserdoti*;" 
1Kings4:5 Azariya, mwaana mulopwana a Natani aalamula anamalamula a ilapo; Zabudi, mwaana mulopwana a Natani, aari musaserdoti* ni namalakaawe mwene." 
1Kings4:6 Abixari aareherera sootheene mpaani ya emwene; Adonirami, mwaana mulopwana a Abida, aareherera miteko soonyesereriwa sootheene." 
1Kings4:7 Salomoni aahaakhaliha maguvernadori muloko neeli wa ilapo sootheene sa aYixrayeli mwa yaawo yaarino nlamulo na onyesereriha oruuha yaatthuneya wa mwene ni emusaawe mpaanimwawe sooreerela sootheene sootthuneya. Khula guvernadori waatthuneya oruuha sooca vayaakhani mweeri mmoha. 
1Kings4:8 Masinaaya ti ala: Beni-Huri mweelaponi ya mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi; 
1Kings4:9 Beni-Dekeri oMakazi, oXahalebimi, oBeti-Xemexi, wEloni ni oBetihanani;" 
1Kings4:10 Beni-Hesedi wAruboti (oSoko ni ilapo sootheene sa oHeferi saari sawawe); 
1Kings4:11 Ben-Abinadabi oNafoti-Dori (mwaarawe aari Tafati, mwaana muthiyana a Salomoni);" 
1Kings4:12 Bahana, mwaana mulopwana a Ahiludi oTanahaki ni oMegido ni elapo yootheene ya oBeti-Xani mukerekhere oZaretani vathi wa oYizereyeli, okhuma oBeti-Xani mpaka wAbeli-Mehola, mpakatho oYokimeyami." 
1Kings4:13 Beni-Geberi oRamoti-Giliyade (mittetthe sa Yahiri, mwaana mulopwana a Manaxe oGiliyade saari sawawe nitho elapo ya wAregobi eri oBaxani vamoha ni isidadesaya miloko mithannamosa saarino ixiri, masele ni anampattika a ebronze*)." 
1Kings4:14 Ahinadabi, mwaana mulopwana a Ido oMahanayimi;" 
1Kings4:15 Ahimahazi oNafitali (owo aathelanne ni Basemati, mwaana muthiyana a Salomoni);" 
1Kings4:16 Bahana, mwaana mulopwana a Huxai wAxeri ni wAlopeti;" 
1Kings4:17 Yehoxafati, mwaana mulopwana a Paruwa wIsakari;" 
1Kings4:18 Ximei, mwaana mulopwana a Ela, oBenyamini;" 
1Kings4:19 Geberi, mwaana mulopwana a Uri, oGiliyade (elapo ya Sihoni, mwene a awAmori, ni Ogi, mwene a oBaxani). Aari guvernadori mmoharu a elapo ele." 
1Kings4:20 Muloko wa aYixrayeli waari woohaalikeleyaxa. Awosa yannaca, yannawura, ehakalalaka." 
1Kings4:21 Salomoni aalamula elapo yootheene okhuma mooloko Efratesi mpaka elapo ya aFilisti mpakatho mwiinano wa wExipitu. Ilapo iye sannaruuha sooreerela ni saalamuliwa ni Salomoni mookuminimwawe wootheene. 
1Kings4:22 Vano sooca sa khula nihuku sa Salomoni saari ikiilu* 6 500 sa ephepa ya etrigu yooreeraxa ni ikiilu* 13 000 sa ephepa. 
1Kings4:23 Imombe muloko sooneneva; imombe miloko miili saacihiwa mutuphini ni ikhondoolo ni ipuri ncira vamoha ni itthove*, anaahe, ipaala ni ipalame soohuwiwa." 
1Kings4:24 Owo aalamula elapo yootheene mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa mooloko – okhuma oTipexa mpaka oGaza. Vano waakhala murettele wa mipatta sootheene. 
1Kings4:25 Mweehuhuni ya Salomoni, oYuda ni oYixrayeli, okhuma oDani mpaka oBerxeba waakhala woolipeene – khula mutthu aarino emattaawe ya iwuuva* ni nyiri sa efiigu*." 
1Kings4:26 Salomoni aakhalano makhoola macira miloko mixexe a ikavalusawe* seettiha ikaaro sa ekhotto ni ikavalu* 12 000 sikina. 
1Kings4:27 Maguvernadori muloko neeli a mwene yannamuronghela sooca sootheene saatthuneya wa Salomoni ni wa oolattuliwaawe. Khula mutthu a yaawosa aawehaweha sooca vamweerini khula eyaakha, yeerelaka weera ehithoweru etthu." 
1Kings4:28 Yaakuxatho yaatthunaaya orowano – esevada* ni malaxi ooca ikavalu* seettiha ikaaro sa ekhotto ni ikavalu* sikina. 
1Kings4:29 Muluku aamvaha Salomoni miruku, akhili atokotoko ni wiiwexexa woohimala ntoko ihaava sa mukerekhere ephareiya." 
1Kings4:30 Mwa yeeyo, miruku sa Salomoni saapwaha seiye sa anamiruku ootheene a mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa ni sa ootheene a wExipitu." 
1Kings4:31 Aari a miruku ompwaha akhalaru mutthu; mpakatho ompwaha Etani, ngwEzerahi, Hemani, Kalekoli ni Dareda, anamwane asilopwana a Maholi. Epilaawe yaamwareela mmilokoni sa mukhwipimwawe." 
1Kings4:32 Aakhumiha soohimmwa sa miruku macira miloko miraru, anuupuxa icipo macira muloko ni icipo ithanu." 
1Kings4:33 Aahuuluma sa nyiri – okhuma nyiri sitokotoko sa oLibanu mpaka hisopo* sinunnuwa muxirini. Aahuulumatho sa axinama, ipalame, soowiipurula ni ihopa." 
1Kings4:34 Atthu a miloko sootheene, yannarwa wiiwa miruku sa Salomoni. Awo yaarumihiwa ni mamwene ootheene a elapo ya vathi wa yaawo yiiwale suulummwaka sa mirukusawe." 
1Kings5:1 Hirami, mwene a oTiro, iiwakaru weera Salomoni oovariwa omwene, aamurumihela Salomoni anamitthengaawe, niwoko Hirami aari nthamwene oororomeleya a Davide." 
1Kings5:2 Salomoni aamurumihela mutthenga ola Hirami: 
1Kings5:3 “Moosuwela nnenesene weera atithaka Davide khawaatthuneya otekela Empa Nsina na Yave Mulukwaaya niwoko na ikhotto yaawannaaya wa mipatta sootheene. Ommaleloni Yave Mulukwaaya aahaavaha waawina amwiittanaaya ootheene. 
1Kings5:4 Vano Yave Mulukwaaka ookivaha wiitthuuwa wa mipatta sootheene ni nkinono amwiittana hata nihooxo. 
1Kings5:5 Tivawo kintthunaaka otekela Empa Nsina na Yave Mulukwaaka ntoko Yave ha aaweerenlaawe atithaka Davide: ‘Mwaninyu, mwa yoowo kineeraaka kimukhalihe ntoko namarandelaanyu ti anaatekele Empa Nsinanaka.’" 
1Kings5:6 Vano mulamule weera ekuuhere isedari* ya oLibanu. Arumeiyaaka animwaakhavihera awinyu ni miyo kinimwaaliva nlivo muneeraanyu mukilamule. Moosuwela weera khawoworu ongwera wuuha esedari* ntoko aSidoni.” 
1Kings5:7 Hirami iiwakaru mutthenga wa Salomoni, aahakalala, aneera: “Yave atthapeliwe olelo, niwoko oomvaha Davide mwaana a miruku weera alamule muloko mutokweene owo.”" 
1Kings5:8 Vanonto Hirami aamurumihela Salomoni yoowaakhula ela: “Kohaakhela mutthenga mukirumihenlaanyu ni kinoopaka sootheene muntthunaanyu, koovahakani esedari* ni nyiri sitokotoko sikina." 
1Kings5:9 Anamitekwaaka anooteexa nyiri iyo okhuma oLibanu mpaka ephareiya ephambihakamo sootthukiweene mipatta-mipatta mpaka nipuro muneeraanyu mukithoonyere. Vaavaawo kinootaphula nyuwo mwakuxeke. Yoolivelaayeene mukivaheke yooca vaatewaka.” 
1Kings5:10 Hiiho Hirami aamvaha Salomoni esedari* ni nyiri sikina sootheene aatthunnaawe. 
1Kings5:11 Salomoni aamvaha Hirami ikiilu* macira miloko mithannamosa sa etrigu ntoko sooca wa vaatewawe vamoha ni iliitru* macira miloko mithannamosa sa makhura a sooliveira*. Ti seiye Salomoni aamvaahaawe Hirami vayaakhani. 
1Kings5:12 Yave aamvaha Salomoni miruku, ntoko aamuroromelinghaawe. Waakhala wiiwanana variyari wa Hirami ni Salomoni ni ooweeli ale yanniiraana." 
1Kings5:13 Mwene Salomoni aahaathanla anamiteko oonyesererihiwa 30 000 variyari wa aYixrayeli ootheene. 
1Kings5:14 Nyeeri sootheene yannarumiheliwa oLibanu asilopwana macira macireene muloko – khula mukuttula wa macira macireene muloko waahala mweeri mmoha oLibanu ni nyeeri miili owaani. Oolamulela miteko soonyesererihiwa iye aari Adonirami. 
1Kings5:15 Salomoni aakhalano anamateexa 70 000 ni anamapwexa maluku 80 000 mmanttumuxani," 
1Kings5:16 nitho anamawehaweha 3 300, mwa yaale yaarehera miteko sootheene." 
1Kings5:17 Mwene aalamulela ovenxiwa mmanttumuxani indyerwa sooreerela sa maluku weera Empa ya Muluku ekhalane mathipelo a indyerwa sa maluku ookheriwa. 
1Kings5:18 Anamateka a Salomoni ni a Hirami vamoha ni asilopwana a oGebali, yannaceka nyiri ni yannakhera maluku yaatthuneya otekela Empa ya Muluku." 
1Kings6:1 Vayaakhani ya macira maxexe ni miloko mithannamiraru vahoolo wookhuma aYixrayeli wExipitu, eyaakha yanaaxexe ya olamula wa Salomoni oYixrayeli, mmweerini wanaaveeli wa eyaakha oniitthaniwa Zivi, Salomoni aapacera oteka Empa ya Yave." 
1Kings6:2 Vano miringo aatekenlaawe Salomoni Empa ya Yave saari iya: mweerakameloni imeetru* miloko miili niithannapiili, mweekhuveeloni imeetru* ithanniixexe, ni orakamawaya okhuma vathi wookela osulu imeetru* muloko ni tthaaru ni eriyari ya emeetru*." 
1Kings6:3 Mweekhuveeloni wa nipithela* naavoleeliwa ekwaartu etokotoko ya Empa ya Yave waari imeetru* ithanniixexe – olikanaka mweekhuveeloni wa Empa ya Yave ni naapwahereratho imeetru* ixexe ni eriyari ya emeetru* ohoolo wa Empa ya Yave. 
1Kings6:4 Salomoni aapakela ixanela ni isereemu sooreerelaxa Empa ya Yave. 
1Kings6:5 Vaxirini sa vaate wa ekwartu etokweene ni Nipuro Nootteelaxa* aatekelela ikwartu sikina saarukureenre. 
1Kings6:6 Ekhuveelo ya mpatta wa vathi yaari imeetru* piili ni vakhaani; ya mpatta wa eriyari imeetru* piili ni wookwanaka imeetru* tthaaru, ni ya mpatta wa osulu meetru* tthaaru ni vakhaani. Aatekelela itthaabwa vaxirini vaate wa Empa ya Yave, moota wooweera khawaatthuneya ovolonghera vaxirini wa Empa ya Yave." 
1Kings6:7 Mootekiwani wa Empa ya Yave, yaavareliwe muteko maluku oorehereriweene mmanttumuxani. Hiiho khawaanyakuleleyaru ni enyutto, hata ni ephalo hoye hoye wakhalaru moota wa ikaruma mootekiwani wa Empa ya Yave." 
1Kings6:8 Mulako wa mpatta wa vathi waari mpatta wa ohitto wa Empa ya Yave. Weera eweliwe mpatta wa eriyari ni wa osulu waaweliwa okottoombiwaka. 
1Kings6:9 Hiiho aateka Empa ya Yave, anamaliha, atekaka nipathonaya ni esedari* ni nyiri sikina." 
1Kings6:10 Aatekatho ikwartu sa mukhwipi Empeeneeyo. Orakamawaya wa khula ekwartu okhuma vathi wookela osulu waari imeetru* piili ni vakhaani. Iye saakumanyihiweno ixiri sa Empa ya Yave ni itthaabwa sa esedari*. 
1Kings6:11 Yave aahuuluma ni Salomoni amweerelaka: 
1Kings6:12 “Mwaha wa Empa ya Yave ela muntekaanyu, – mwatthara ikanosaka ni soolamulasaka ni mwiiwelela malamulowaaka, kinimookwaniherelani yeeyo kaaroromelinghaaka atithinyu, Davide." 
1Kings6:13 Miyo kinookhala variyari wa aYixrayeli kihihiyaka mulokwaaka.” 
1Kings6:14 Vano Salomoni aamaliha oteka Empa ya Yave. 
1Kings6:15 Ixiri sa mpuwa*, okhuma vathi mpaka munkhalaxirini mpakatho mpuwa moothemwene mwaahuruweliwa ni nyiri sa esedari*. Vathivawo saaheliwa itthaabwa sa mwiri wa goferi*." 
1Kings6:16 Aathikilanya meetru* ithanniixexe exiri ya opithela wa Empa ya Yave ni itthaabwa sa esedari*, okhuma vathi mpaka waapatho weera Mpaani mwa Yave nikhalemo Nipuro Nootteelaxa*." 
1Kings6:17 Mweerakameloni wa ekwartu etokweene ohoolo wa Nipuro Nootteelaxa* waari meetru* muloko niithannatthaaru. 
1Kings6:18 Mpuwa wa Empa ya Yave waahuruweliwa ni esedari* sipattheliweenemo icaambulo sa soowiima ni ithutu soothapuruwa sootheene iye saari sa esedari* nihooneyakaru nluku. 
1Kings6:19 Salomoni aarehereratho Nipuro Nootteelaxa* mpuwa mwa Empa ya Yave weera yiikaathiwekemo Arka* a wiiraana a Yave. 
1Kings6:20 Miringo sa Nipuro Nootteelaxa* na mpuwa saari: Mweerakameloni imeetru* ithanniixexe, mweekhuveeloni imeetru* ithanniixexe, ni orakamawaya okhuma vathi wookela osulu imeetru* ithanniixexe. Aahuruwelamo ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera. Aahaahuruwelatho ni eyuuma yoorikaxa altaari* a mwiri wa esidari*." 
1Kings6:21 Salomoni aahuruwela mpuwa wa Empa ya Yave ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera, anatthukelela onyooro wa eyuuma yoorikaxa vamulako wa Nipuro Nootteelaxa* mwa nenno aahuruwenlaawetho ni eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
1Kings6:22 Hiiho aahuruwela mpatta wa mpuwa wootheene ni eyuuma yoorikaxa, nitho altaari* yaari vaNipuroni Nootteelaxa*." 
1Kings6:23 Munipuroni Nootteelaxa* aahaapatthela akerubini* eeli a mwiri wa sooliveira*, khula kerubini* aarino imeetru* ixexe ni eriyari ya emeetru* a orakamawaya." 
1Kings6:24 Okungeya wa mapupha a akerubini* waari: imeetru* piili ni vakhaani; imeetru* ixexe ni eriyari ya emeetru* okhuma nipupha nikina mpaka nikhwaaya. 
1Kings6:25 Ooweeli yaamulikana ekhalelo emoha. 
1Kings6:26 Orakama wa khula kerubini* waari imeetru* ixexe ni eriyari ya emeetru*. 
1Kings6:27 Aawiikaathi akerubini* vaNipuroni Nootteelaxa* na Empa ya Yave ookungeyeene mapupha. Nipupha na kerubini* mmoha naaphiteera exiri ni na mukina exiri ekina. Mapupha makinaawo yaarookumanyihana eriyari ya Nipuro Nootteela*. 
1Kings6:28 Aahaahuruwela akerubini* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
1Kings6:29 Vaxirini sootheene sa omokoni ni sa mpuwa mwa Empa ya Yave aahaapatthelamo akerubini*, mavare ni ithutu soothapuruwa." 
1Kings6:30 Aahuruwelatho ni eyuuma yoorikaxa vathi okhuma exiri ya mpuwa mpaka ya omokoni wa Empa ya Yave. 
1Kings6:31 Vamulako wa Nipuro Nootteelaxa* aapakela masele a sooliveira* ni isereemu sa mattuumba mathanu. 
1Kings6:32 Mmaseleni meeli a sooliveira* aahaapatthelamo akerubini*, mavare ni ithutu soothapuruwa, anaahuruwela akerubini* ni mavare ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yoohaniwa." 
1Kings6:33 Mooteene yoowo aahaapakela amarimbu a sooliveira* a mattuumba maxexe wa mulako wa Empa ya Yave. 
1Kings6:34 Aapakatho masele meeli a mwiri wa goferi*, khula nsele ni mipatta miili saarukureeriha." 
1Kings6:35 Mmaseleni meeli ale aahaapatthelamo akerubini*, mavare ni ithutu soothapuruwa, anahuruwelano eyuuma yoorikaxa yoohaniwa." 
1Kings6:36 Aateka exiri ya nipuwa na mpuwa ni misera miraru sa maluku ooreheriwa ni mmoha wa itthaabwa sa esedari*. 
1Kings6:37 Mathipelo a Empa ya Yave yaapaceriwe vayaakhani yanaaxexe, mmweerini wiitthaniwa Zivi." 
1Kings6:38 Empa ya Yave yootheene vamoha ni sootheene saatthuneya ni saalakeliwe yaamalihiwe vayaakhani muloko niimoha, mmweerini wa naathannamiraru wiitthaniwa Buli. Salomoni aavirihale iyaakha ithannapiili atekaka." 
1Kings7:1 Salomoni atekaka empaawe ya emwene aavirihale iyaakha muloko ni tthaaru. 
1Kings7:2 Emoha ya empaawe aatenkaawe yiitthaniwa empa ya emwene ya Othako wa oLibanu, yaarino miringo iya: Mweerakameloni imeetru* miloko mixexe niithannamosa, mweekhuveeloni imeetru* miloko miili ni tthaaru, ni orakamawaya okhuma vathi wookela osulu imeetru* muloko ni tthaaru ni eriyari ya emeetru*. Yaarino misera mixexe sa amarimbu a esedari* saalipihera itthaabwa sa esedari*." 
1Kings7:3 Nipathonaya naari na itthaabwa sa esedari*. Saari itthaabwa miloko mixexe niithanu – khula musera waarino itthaabwa muloko niithanu. 
1Kings7:4 Saakhala ixanela saawehana tthaaru-tthaaru ekina ni ekhwaaya. 
1Kings7:5 Masele ootheene yaarino malootho maxexe ewehanaka nikina ni nikhwaaya mararu-mararu. 
1Kings7:6 Aateka mukwartuni etokweene ya amarimbu, mweerakamelonimwaya imeetru* miloko miili ni tthaaru ni mweekhuveelonimwaya imeetru* muloko ni tthaaru ni eriyari ya emeetru*. Ohoolowaya naakhala nipithela* ni amarimbu yaalipiha nivirelenleene." 
1Kings7:7 Aateka esaala ya ehice ya emwene yiitthaniwa Esaala ya Ophuka milattu, mwa mwemmo eeraawe athorihe, anahuruwelano esedari* okhuma vathi mpaka opathoni." 
1Kings7:8 Empaawe ya emwene mwa yeeyo eeraawe akhale yaari wiithela, yaamulikana. Salomoni aamutekelatho mwaana muthiyana a Farawu* empa ya emwene ntoko yeele, mwa yoowo aamuthenlaawe." 
1Kings7:9 Otekiwa wootheene waavareliwe muteko ni maluku ootthuneyaxa, ooringiweene ni ekheriweene mpuwa ni vaate okhuma mmathipeloni mpaka munkhalaxirini." 
1Kings7:10 Mathipelo yaapakeliwe maluku ootthuneyaxa ni matokotoko, makina imeetru* ixexe ni eriyari ya emeetru* ni makinaawo imeetru* tthaaru ni eriyari ya emeetru*." 
1Kings7:11 Mpatta wa osulu waapakeliwetho maluku ootthuneyaxa elikanxiweene ni eringiweene itthaabwa sa esedari*. 
1Kings7:12 Nipuwa ntokweene naarukureerihiwe ni exiri ya misera miraru sa maluku ooratteliwa ni musera mmoha wa itthaabwa sa esedari* nilikanaka ni nipuwa na mpuwa na Empa ya Yave ni ekwartwaaya. 
1Kings7:13 Mwene Salomoni aalamula weera Hurami aroweliwe oTiro. 
1Kings7:14 Amayawe yaari naamukhweli a epuumba ya Nafitali ni atithawe yaari a oTiro ni namahana a ebronze*. Hurami aari mulopwana ooweraxa asuwelaka miteko sincipale sa ohana ebronze*. Aarowa wa mwene Salomoni ni aapaka miteko sootheene aavahiwaawe. 
1Kings7:15 Aahaahana amarimbu eeli a ebronze* – khula nrimbu orakamawaya waari imeetru* ithannatthaaru ni vakhaani ni orukureerawawe waarino imeetru* ithanu ni eriyari ya emeetru*. 
1Kings7:16 Aahanela nyuru miili sa ebronze*– khula muru orakamawaya waari imeetru* piili ni vakhaani. 
1Kings7:17 Khula muru waaphwanelihiwa ni onyooro wootthaviwa – onyooro mithannamiili wa khula muru. 
1Kings7:18 Aapakatho misera miili sa irooma* sirukureenreene khula onyooro wootthaviwa weera okuttelele muru vasulu amarimbu. Khula muru aapakela hiiho. 
1Kings7:19 Nyuru sa amarimbu yaari mpithela* sapakiwe ethutweene ni orakamawaya waari emeetru* emoha ni wookwanaka imeetru* piili. 
1Kings7:20 Mukhwipi wa khula muru mpatta wooneyaxaayawo, mukhwipi wa onyooro wootthaviwa saakhala irooma* macira meeli sirukureenreene misera miili." 
1Kings7:21 Hurami aaweemexa amarimbu mpithela* mwa Empa ya Yave. Nrimbu na mpatta wa ohitto aahiitthana Yakini ni nikina na mpatta wa ottuttuwani Bowazi. 
1Kings7:22 Nyuru sa amarimbu saalikana ithutu. Hiiho miteko sa amarimbu saamalihiwa. 
1Kings7:23 Aahanatho nttankhi ntokotoko noorukureera ni noowiixa, mmwaanomwaya imeetru* ixexe ni eriyari ya emeetru* ni orakamawaya imeetru* piili ni eriyari ya emeetru*. Orukureerawaya waari imeetru* muloko niithanu." 
1Kings7:24 Vathi wa ekala saarukureerihiwa misera miili sa soowiima – orakamelanawaya waari wa isentimeetru* ithanu ereene emohamoharu ni nttankhi. 
1Kings7:25 Nttankhi naari vasulu wa imombe ilopwana muloko ni piili – tthaaru saawehihiwe mpatta wa ottuttuwani; tthaaru mpatta ninkela nsuwa; tthaaru mpatta wa ohitto ni tthaaru mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Nttankhi neemexiwe vasuluwaya ni nyettosaya sa ottuli saawehihiwe eriyari. 
1Kings7:26 Mwiittaaya nttankhi nne waari wa ikatha ixexe ni owanoniwaya waalikana wa ekoomixi – ntoko ethuhu yoothapuruwa. Nttankhi nne saavolowamo iliitru* 44 000. 
1Kings7:27 Aahanatho ikarinyu muloko sa ebronze* – khula ekarinyu yaarino emeetru* emoha ni wookwanaka imeetru* piili orakamawaya ni mweekhuveelonimwaya, ni wiixerawaya waari emeetru* emoha ni vakhaani." 
1Kings7:28 Ikarinyu saapakiwe moota ola: Saarino imetto sa ebronze* silipihiweene ni iyuuma sikhwaaya. 
1Kings7:29 Imetto saalipihiwe ni iyuuma saakhalamo icaambulo sa amwatto, imombe ilopwana ni akerubini*. Vasulu ni vathi wa amwatto ni akerubini* yaakhalamo makukhu a eyuuma yoohaniwa." 
1Kings7:30 Khula ekarinyu yaakhalano Mareko maxexe a ebronze* ni misomaari sa ebronze*. Mmaloothoni maxexe a khula ekarinyu yaakhalano ibasiya yeemexiwaka ni metto mixexe ehaneliweene mukhwipimwaya makukhu a eyuuma. 
1Kings7:31 Mpatta wa osulu wa khula ekarinyu naakhalawo nlaka noorukureera. Wiixerawaya waari eriyari ya emeetru* emoha ni mmwanomwaya waarino eriyari ya emeetru* emoha. Saapattheliwe icaambulo mukhwipimwaya. Vaheera imetto sa ikarinyu khasaahiyono soorukureera; saari sa mattuumba. 
1Kings7:32 Mareko maxexe awo yaalipiheriwe vathi wa metto ni misomaari saakumanyihiwe ni mettosene seiye. Waanuwawaya wa khula nreko waari wookwanaka emeetru* emoha. 
1Kings7:33 Mareko awo yaapakiwe ntoko a ikaaro sa ikavalu* – maviiri, misomaari, nreko, isipooko ni ihaapu – sootheene iyo saapakiwe ni eyuuma yoohaniwa." 
1Kings7:34 Khula ekarinyu yaarino ivarelelo ixexe saatthukiwe mmaloothoni maxexe. 
1Kings7:35 Mpatta wa osulu wa khula ekarinyu waakalano nlaka, wiixerawaya isentimeetru* miloko miili. Ivarelelo ni imetto sootheene iyo saahaneliwe vamohamoharu mpatta wa osulu wa ekarinyu." 
1Kings7:36 Aahaapatthela akerubini*, amwatto ni mavare muyuumani ni mmettoni – mmapuroni moothemwene mwaatthuneya erukureerihiweene makukhu." 
1Kings7:37 Ikarinyu muloko sootheene saapakiwe moota mmoha silikanaka wunnuwa ni ekhalelo. Khula ekarinyu yaahaniwe moota mmoha. 
1Kings7:38 Vahoolowaya aahana ibasiya muloko sa ebronze*. Khula ebasiya saavolowamo iliitru* macira mathannamararu ni miloko mithannamiraru ni mmwaanomwaya imeetru* piili – ebasiya emoha wa khula ekarinyu. 
1Kings7:39 Aahiikaathi ikarinyu ithanu mpatta wa ohitto wa Empa ya Yave ni ithanu mpatta wa ottuttuwani. Aahiikaathitho nttankhi mpatta wa ohitto, eyo tiiyo munloothoni mpatta wa ohitto ni ninkhuma nsuwa wa Empa ya Yave." 
1Kings7:40 Aahanatho ixaaru, apoxoro ni ibasiya soovuuvihera. Hiiho Hurami aamaliha miteko sootheene aalamuleliwaawe ni mwene Salomoni Mpaani mwa Yave." 
1Kings7:41 Amarimbu ooweeli; mavattaaya oomeeli epakiweene koomixeene vasulu amarimbu; onyooro miili wootthaviwa saaphwanelihiwe nyurusene seiye; 
1Kings7:42 iroma* macira maxexe wa onyooro miili (misera miili sa irooma* wa khula onyooro wootthaviwa saaphwaneliha nyuru); 
1Kings7:43 ikaarinyu muloko ni ibasiyasaya muloko; 
1Kings7:44 nttankhi ni imombe ilopwana muloko ni piili vathiwaya; 
1Kings7:45 ixaaru, apoxoro ni ibasiya soovuuvihera. Ikaruma sootheene iye Hurami aampakenlaawe mwene Salomoni wa Empa ya Yave saahaniwe ni ebronze*." 
1Kings7:46 Mwene aalamula weera ikaruma iye satotoxiwe vanreyanreyani na oYordanu eriyari ya oSukoti ni oZaretani. 
1Kings7:47 Salomoni khaalamulenle ophimiwa ikaruma iye, niwoko saahaatta ni olemela wa ebronze* khawaalikeleya." 
1Kings7:48 Salomoni aapakelatho ikaruma sikina mpuwa wa Empa ya Yave: altaari* a eyuuma yoorikaxa; meesa a eyuuma yoorikaxa mwa yaawo yaakhalaayawo epaawu ya Okhala*; 
1Kings7:49 onyaari wa eyuuma yoorikaxa woohaniwa – mithanu mpatta woolopwana ni mithanu woothiyana wa Nipuro Nootteelaxa*; ithutu sa eyuuma yoorikaxa, onyaari ni soorehererano mutthambo." 
1Kings7:50 Ibasiya sa eyuuma yoorikaxa, soorehererano mutthambo, ibasiya soovuuvihera, isasaani, ibasiya sa erubani* ni soorukureeriha masele sa eyuuma yoorikaxa wa milako sa ekwartu ya mpuwaxa – Nipuro Nootteelaxa* – nitho wa milako sa ekwartu etokweene." 
1Kings7:51 Simalihiweene miteko sootheene Salomoni aapakenlaawe Empa ya Yave, aavoleiha itthu sootheene atithawe Davide yaatteelinghaaya – eyuuma yoorikaxa, eparatha* ni ikaruma sa mpuwa, aniikaathi mukwartuni ya mihakhu sa Empa ya Yave." 
1Kings8:1 Vano mwene Salomoni aawiitthana oYerusaleemu asitokweene ootheene a aYixrayeli; asitokweene ootheene a ipuumba sa oYixrayeli ni mapwattapwattha ootheene a oYixrayeli weera yaakuxe oSiyoni, esidade ya Davide, Arka* a Wiiraana a Yave." 
1Kings8:2 Mmweerini wanaathannamiili oniitthaniwa Etanimi, mweehuhuni ya efesta, asilopwana ootheene a aYixrayeli yaathukumana wa mwene Salomoni." 
1Kings8:3 Ephiyakaru asitokweene ootheene a aYixrayeli, asaserdoti* yaahaakuxa Arka* a Yave," 
1Kings8:4 enaaruuha vamoha ni Eheema ya Muthukumano* ni ikaruma sootteela saari mwemmo. Asaserdoti* ni aLeevi ti yaaruuhale sootheene iye. 
1Kings8:5 Mwene Salomoni ni muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli aathukumannaaweno ohoolo wa Arka* yaaveleela ikhondoolo ni imombe sohaalikeleya. 
1Kings8:6 Vahoolowaya asaserdoti* yaahaakuxasa Arka* a Wiiraana a Yave yaaroihaka vanipuroniwaya mukwartuni wa mpuwaxa, eyo tiiyo Nipuro Nootteelaxa*, enawiikaathi owaathi maphupa a akerubini*." 
1Kings8:7 Mapupha ookungeyeene a akerubini* yaakuttelela Arka*, ni Arka* ni ikopo yaakuxeriwaayano." 
1Kings8:8 Ikopo iye saari soorakama omakoteloniwaya waamooneya weemenleene hata ohoolo wa Nipuro Nootteelaxa*, mene khawooneyaru mpatta wa omokoni wa Empa ya Yave. Vano iye sookhala mpaka olelo." 
1Kings8:9 Kheeyamomo etthu mwarkani* sihikhanle itthaabwa piili sa maluku Moisesi iikaathiyaawemo oHorebi, mwa weiwo Yave aapankaawe wiiraana ni aYixrayeli vahoolo wa okhumawaya wExipitu." 
1Kings8:10 Asaserdoti* evenyaka Nipuro Nootteelaxa*, nihutte naasareya Mpaani mwa Yave" 
1Kings8:11 moota wooweera asaserdoti* khayaawenre okwanihera mitekosaya niwoko na nihutte weenre ovuwa wa Yave wasareya Mpaanimwawe. 
1Kings8:12 Vanonto Salomoni aaheera: “Yave eenre weera onookhala munihutteni nooriipaxa. 
1Kings8:13 Vekhaikhai kohootekelani Empa etokotoko weera mmakemo, nipuro muneeraanyu mukhaleke mahuku ootheene.”" 
1Kings8:14 aYixrayeli ootheene ethukumanneene yeemelelo, mwene aarukunuwa, anaareeliha," 
1Kings8:15 eeraka: “Atthapeliwe Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli. Owo aakwanihera ni matataawe yeeyo aaroromelinghaawe atithaka Davide ni eyaanowaawe eenraawe:" 
1Kings8:16 ‘Okhuma nihuku nne kaakhuminghaaka mulokwaaka aYixrayeli wExipitu, nkithanlaleru naari esidade emoha variyari wa ipuumba sa oYixrayeli weera kitekelemo empa Nsinanaka, mene koomuthanla Davide weera alamule mulokwaaka.’" 
1Kings8:17 Atithaka Davide yannatthunaxa oteka Empa ettittimiherelaka Nsina na Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli." 
1Kings8:18 Wa soothesene, Yave aaweerela atithaka Davide: ‘Moopaka nnene wookhalano muupuwelo vamurimani okitekela empa muttittimiherelaka Nsinanaka." 
1Kings8:19 Vaheera khamuhiyono nyuwo muneera muteke, mene mwaninyu mulopwana xaxaxa – ti yoowo aneera atekele Empa Nsinanaka.’" 
1Kings8:20 Yave ookwanihera yoororomelihaawe – miyo ti namarandela a Davide ni vano kookilaathela ehice ya emwene wa aYixrayeli, ntoko Yave aaroromelinghaawe, ni kootekela Empa Nsina na Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli." 
1Kings8:21 Koohiyamo nipuro noowiikaathi Arka* mwa mwemmo siraayamo itthaabwa sa Wiiraana wa Yave, wiiraanawene weiwe aapakenlaawe makholowaahu aakhumingheene wExipitu.”" 
1Kings8:22 Vano Salomoni aaheemela ohoolo wa altaari* a Yave vamaithoni wa muthukumano wootheene, anatheteela matataawe wiirimu," 
1Kings8:23 anavekela: “Ii! Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, khoowowo muluku mukina onlikana ni Nyuwo wiirmu hata elapo ya vathi. Nyuwo mookwanihera wiiraanawanyu wa osivela ni arumeiyaanyu, mwa yaawo anoorumeelani ni murima wootheene." 
1Kings8:24 Mookwanihera yoororomelihaanyu wa murumeiyaanyu Davide, atithaka. Mwaaroromeliha ni eyanowaanyu ni mookwanihera ni matataanyu – ntoko onooneyaaya olelo." 
1Kings8:25 Vano, Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, mukwanihere yoororomelihaanyu wa murumeiyaanyu Davide, atithaka mweenraanyu: ‘Anamwaniinyu yiipasoopa nnenesene weera yeette mphironimwaka ntoko mweenttaanyu, munookhalano namarandela anaalamule aYixrayeli vamaithoniwaka wa mahuku ootheene.’" 
1Kings8:26 Vano Muluku a aYixrayeli, yeeyo mwaamuroromelinghaanyu murumeiyaanyu Davide, atithaka, ekwaniheriweke." 
1Kings8:27 Woohihovela Yave khamaka elapo ya vathi ela. Muluku ti Mutokweene woopwahaxa wiirimu ni mapuro a musulusulu. Wootepaxa Empa ela kitenkaaka! 
1Kings8:28 Hata hiiho, Yave, Mulukwaaka, mwiiwe nivekelo na murumeiyaanyu ni yoovekaawe ya ikharari. Mwiiwe okhuwela ni nivekelo murumeiyaanyu ompakaawe vamaithoniwanyu olelo." 
1Kings8:29 Ngwehe Empa ela ohiyu ni othana, niwoko nri nipuro nyuwo mweenraanyu: ‘Nsinanaka nnookhalamo.’ Mahuku ootheene mwiiweke mavekelowaaka ankhuma mu." 
1Kings8:30 Mwiiwe mavekelo a murumeiyaanyu ni a mulokwaanyu aYixrayeli, awo yaavekelaka mu. Wiirimu iwo mwiiwe munkhalaanyuwo ni mwiiwaka, mulevelele." 
1Kings8:31 Mulopwana amutthekela mukhwaawe, anamunyesereriha olipela, anaphiya ohoolo wa altaaraanyu* Mpaanimwanyumu," 
1Kings8:32 vano mwiiwe wiirimu ni mwaakhuleke. Muthanleke variyari wa arumeiyaanyu, munthorihaka yoowo orino nthowa munttaruxelaka yoonanara opankaawe. Mumpakele ekhaikhai yoowo oohinthowa, mooniheraka hiiho weera khanono mulattu." 
1Kings8:33 Mulokwaanyu aYixrayeli waawiniwaka ni amwiittanaaya niwoko na wootthekelani Nyuwo, owo wahokoleela wa Nyuwo wiitthanaka Nsinananyu, ovekelaka ni odyoonttelelaka Mpaanimwanyumu," 
1Kings8:34 vano mwiiwe wiirimu ni mulevelele soottheka sa mulokwaanyu aYixrayeli ni muhokoloxere elapo mwaavanghaanyu makholowaaya. 
1Kings8:35 yaahiyaka orupa epula, enathowa maahi niwoko na wootthekelani mulokwaanyu, ni owo warwa wa nipuro nna wiitthanaka Nsinananyu ohiyaka sootthekasaya niwoko na ottaruxawanyu," 
1Kings8:36 vano mwiiwe wiirimu ni mulevelele soottheka sa arumeiyaanyu aYixrayeli, mulokwaanyu. Muxuttihe ephiro ya ekhaikhai, murumihele epula elapwaanyu ela mvanghaanyu mulokwaanyu ntoko yoohiyeriwa." 
1Kings8:37 Yaavolaka etala hoye hoye nihooxo mweelaponi, hata soowaaliwa suuma niwoko na oviha, naari aaphiyaka nasope hoye hoye axiitthu akina hoye hoye mwiittana mukina awanano musidadenimwaya emoha – nakhalaru nihooxo hoye hoye iretta –" 
1Kings8:38 ni mukina a mulokwaanyu aYixrayeli avekela hoye hoye adyoonttelela ni murima woosareya othananaxa, anatheteya matataawe Mpaanimwanyumu," 
1Kings8:39 vano mwiiwe wiirimu munkhalaanyuwo ni mulevelele. Mumvahe khula mutthu yeeyo omphwanelaawe, niwoko Nyuwo munsuwela mirima sa atthu ootheene. Aani ti Nyuwo paahi munsuwela murima wa khula mutthu." 
1Kings8:40 Hiiho awosa anoowoovani mahuku ootheene eneeraaya ekhale mweelaponi mwaavanghaanyu makholowaahu. 
1Kings8:41 Anamarwa mwa yaawo ahikhanle mpatta wa mulokwaanyu aYixrayeli yarwa elapo ya ottaiwene niwoko na Nsinananyu," 
1Kings8:42 ni niwoko noowiiwa sa Nsinananyu ntokotoko, soopakasanyu ni owerawanyu, yarwa ovekela Mpaanimwanyumu," 
1Kings8:43 vano mwiiwe wiirimu munkhalaanyuwo ni mukwanihere yeeyo namarwa aneeraawe oovekeleni weera miloko sootheene sa elapo ya vathi sisuwele Nsinananyu ni siwooveeni, ntoko mulokwaanyu aYixrayeli, ni weera sisuwele weera Empaanyu ela kootekenlaakani yookhalano Nsinananyu." 
1Kings8:44 Mulokwaanyu warowa waawanano amwiittanaaya yakhalaru mapuro muntthunaanyu weera orowe ni woovekelani Nyuwo ohokoleela esidade ela muthanlalaanyu ni wa Empa ya Yave kitekenlaaka Nsinananyu," 
1Kings8:45 vano mwiiwe wiirimu nivekelonaya ni odyoonttelelawaya, mwaakihaka mulattwaaya." 
1Kings8:46 Onoowereya aYixrayeli wootthekelani, niwoko khaawo ohinttheka. Yootthekelani, Nyuwo munimwaanyoonyeriwa ngwinnyereraka mmatatani mwa amwiittana weera yaavare ootthukiweene yaaronghaka elapwaaya – ekhalaka ya ottai hoye hoye ya vakhiviru." 
1Kings8:47 Vano mweelaponi ya otthukiwawaya awosa yawuupuwelelani erukunxaka murima yoodyoonttelelakaniwo: ‘Noottheka, noopaka yoonanara neettaka ntoko anamatakhala.’" 
1Kings8:48 Awosa yoohokoleelani Nyuwo ni mirimasaya ni okumaaya wootheene mweelaponi ya amwiittanaaya, mwa yaawo yaakunxe ootthukiweene, ni yoovekelani Nyuwo ohokoleela elapo ela mwaavanghaanyu makholowaaya ni wa esidade muthanlalaanyu ni Empa ya Yave kitekenlaaka Nsinananyu," 
1Kings8:49 vano mwiiwe wiirimu munkhalaanyuwo nivekelonaya ni odyoonttelelawaya, mwaakihaka mulattwaaya." 
1Kings8:50 Mulevelele mulokwaanyu wootthekenleni; mulevelele soonanara sootheene woopakenlaayani ni muceendye mirima sa amwiittanaaya weera emorele ikharari. 
1Kings8:51 Muupuwelele weeratho ti mulokwaanyu ni yoohiyeraanyu mwa yoowo mukhumihalalaanyu wExipitu, mmavihoni." 
1Kings8:52 Maithwaanyu ewehawehe mavekelo a murumeiyaanyu ni a mulokwaanyu aYixrayeli ni Ngwiiweke yaawo yoodyoonttelelakani. 
1Kings8:53 Vano ti Nyuwo Yave Muluku muthanlale variyari wa miloko sootheene sa elapo ya vathi weera okhale yoohiyeraanyu, ntoko mweenraanyu mwa murumeiyaanyu Moisesi, mwaakhumihaleene makholowaahu wExipitu.”" 
1Kings8:54 Salomoni amalihakaru soovekela ni soodyoonttelela sootheene iye wa Yave, aaheemela ohoolo wa altaari* a Yave, mwa weiwo aakokhonraawe atheteelaka matataawe wiirimu." 
1Kings8:55 Aaheemela, anareeliha muthukumano wootheene, akhuwelaka:" 
1Kings8:56 “Yave atthapeliwe, mwa Yoowo ovanghe mulokwaawe aYixrayeli wiitthuuwa, ntoko aaroromelinghaawe. Ookwanihera soororomeliha sooreera sootheene aavanghaawe mwa murumeiyaawe Moisesi." 
1Kings8:57 Yave Mulukwaahu akhaleke ni hiyo ntoko aaraawe ni makholowaahu; Owo ahinihiye naari ahinithaame. 
1Kings8:58 Owo aceendye mirimasahu weera neette ntoko ontthunaawe ni niiwelele malamulowaawe, ikanosawe ni soolamulasawe aavanghaawe makholowaahu." 
1Kings8:59 Masu ala kivekenlaaka vamaithoni wa Yave ekhaleke vakhiviru wa Yave Mulukwaahu ohiyu ni othana weera alipihere mulattu wa murumeiyaawe ni mulokwaawe aYixrayeli ntoko sootthuneya sa khula nihuku. 
1Kings8:60 Hiiho miloko sootheene sa elapo ya vathi sinoosuwela weera Yave ti Muluku ni khoowowo muluku mukina. 
1Kings8:61 Ontthuneya weera mirimasanyu sikhaleke sa Yave Mulukwaahu. Mwiiwelele ikanosawe ni malamulowaawe mahuku ootheene ntoko mumpakaanyu olelo.” 
1Kings8:62 Vahoolowaya mwene ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaapaka sooveleela vamaithoni wa Yave. 
1Kings8:63 Salomoni aampakela sooveleelela murettele Yave – imombe 22 000 ni ikhondoolo ni ipuri 120 000. Hiiho mwene ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaari vaavaale yaatteeliha Empa ya Yave. 
1Kings8:64 Nihuku nenenenne mwene aatteeliha mpatta wa nipuwa ohoolo wa Empa ya Yave anapakawo sooveleela soohisa, sa etrigu ni sooneneva sa sooveleelela murettele, niwoko altaari* a ebronze* ohoolo wa Yave yaayevaxa, ohikwanaka opakelawo sooveleela soohisa, sa etrigu ni sooneneva sa sooveleelela murettele sootheene." 
1Kings8:65 Mweehuhuni yeele Salomoni ni aYixrayeli ootheene aapaka efesta. Waakhala muthukumano mutokotoko; atthu yaarwa okhuma oLebo-Hamati mpaka nxaapwa na wExipitu. Yaapaka efesta vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaahu wa mahuku muloko ni maxexe. 
1Kings8:66 Oxaawaya Salomoni aalamulela muloko ohokoleela mmawannyaaya. Muloko waamureeliha mwene, onarowa woohakalaleene mmirimanimwaya niwoko na itthu sooreera sootheene Yave aampakenlaawe murumeiyaawe Davide ni wa mulokwaawe aYixrayeli." 
1Kings9:1 Salomoni amalihaleene oteka Empa ya Yave ni empa ya emwene ni ikina aatthunaawe oteka," 
1Kings9:2 Yave aahiixoonihera wa yoowo emaara yanaaveeli ntoko iixoonihenraawe oGibiyoni. 
1Kings9:3 Yave aamweerela: Kohiiwa nivekelo ni odyoonttelelawanyu muvekenlaanyu vamaithoniwaka; kootteeliha Empa ya Yave ela mwa yeeyo mutenkaanyu weera mwemmo nimakemo Nsinanaka mahuku ootheene. Maithwaaka ni murimaaka onookhalamo wa mahuku ootheene. 
1Kings9:4 Mwaha wa nyuwo – mweetta mweekhaikhaiyini ni moota woororomeleya ohoolowaka ntoko atithinyu Davide yeenttaaya ni mwapaka sootheene koolamulenlaakani ni mwiiwelela ikanosaka ni malamulowaaka," 
1Kings9:5 vano kinookhaliha ehicaanyu ya emwene yoowaalamula aYixrayeli wa mahuku ootheene. Kaahaaroromeliha atithinyu Davide yeeyo kaaweerenlaaka: ‘Munookhalano namarandela vahiceni ya emwene wa aYixrayeli wa mahuku ootheene.’ 
1Kings9:6 Vaheera nyuwo hoye hoye anamwaniinyu yakihiya ehiiwelelaka ikano ni malamulo koovanghaakani weera elape miluku sikina," 
1Kings9:7 kinoovenxa muloko wa aYixrayeli mweelaponi kivanghaaka ni kinoohiya Empa ya Yave ela kitteelihenraaka Nsinanaka. Hiiho, aYixrayeli anoothatuwa ootthebwiwa ni ootheiwa wa miloko sootheene." 
1Kings9:8 Erookhalaru etokotoko Empa ya Yave ela vano, ootheene eniivire anootikhina ni anootheya yeeraka: ‘Opakenle heeni Yave elapo ela ni Empa ya Yave ela?’" 
1Kings9:9 Yoowaakhula eniikhale ela: ‘Niwoko awo yaamuhiya Yave Mulukwaaya, mwa Yoowo aakhumihale makholowaaya wExipitu ni yaatthara miluku sikina elapaka ni erumeelaka – tivawo Yave aakhumihenraawe nihooxo nna.’”" 
1Kings9:10 Siviraleene iyaakha miloko miili mwa seiye Salomoni aatenkaawe Empa ya Yave ni empa ya emwene," 
1Kings9:11 owo aamvaha Hirami, mwene a oTiro, mittetthe miloko miili sa oGalileya, niwoko Hirami aamvaha esedari*, nyiri sikina ni eyuuma yoorikaxa aatthunaawe." 
1Kings9:12 Wa soothesene, Hirami arowakaru oTiro weera oone mittetthe Salomoni aamuvanghaawe, khasaamureenre." 
1Kings9:13 Owo aamukoha: “Mukivahenre heeni mittetthesene seiye munnaka?” Vano aatteha ‘elapo ya Kabuli’, nniitthaneliwa mpaka olelo." 
1Kings9:14 Vanonto Hirami aamurumihela mwene ikiilu* macira miloko mixexe sa eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
1Kings9:15 Mwene Salomoni aavariha miteko sooviha weera etekiwe Empa ya Yave, empaawe ya emwene, oMilo*, exiri ya oYerusaleemu ni isidade sa oHazori, oMegido ni oGezeri." 
1Kings9:16 Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu aawanano oGezeri, anakuxa. Aahisa esidade awiivaka amakaaya aKanaani ni aamvaha mwanawe muthiyana amuthelihaka Salomoni." 
1Kings9:17 Vano Salomoni aarasela oGezeri, anateka mpatta wa vathi vathi wa oBeti-Horoni," 
1Kings9:18 oBalahati, ni oTademori munikareni mweelaponimwawe," 
1Kings9:19 nitho isidadesawe soothokorora sooca sootheene ni mittetthe saakhala ikaarosawe sa ekhotto ni ikavalusawe*. Aateka soothesene aatthunaawe oYerusaleemu, oLibanu ni mweelaponi yootheene ya olamulawawe." 
1Kings9:20 Vanonto yaahala akina mweelaponi yahaakhanle aYixrayeli – awAmori, aHiti, aPerizi, aHivi ni aYebusi. Salomoni aahaavara aavarihaka miteko sooviha." 
1Kings9:21 Awo khayiiviwe ni aYixrayeli ni mitekosene seiye anoopwahererano. 
1Kings9:22 Vaheera Salomoni khaamunyesereringheru muYixrayeli miteko sooviha. Awosa yaari anakhottwaawe, asitokweenaawe, asitokweene a ikaarosawe sa ekhotto ni anamweettiha a ikaarosene seiye." 
1Kings9:23 Yaaritho yaahoolela sootekateka sa Salomoni – ahooleli macira mathanu ni miloko mithanu yaawehaweha anamiteko. 
1Kings9:24 Mwaana muthiyana a Farawu* athaammeene musidade ya Davide avolowaka empa ya emwene aamutekenlaawe Salomoni, aatenkaawe oMilo*." 
1Kings9:25 Imaara tthaaru vayaakhani Salomoni annapaka sooveleela soohisa ni sa murettele valtaarini* aamutekenlaawe Yave, ahisaka erubani* vamoha ni sooveleela vamaithoni wa Yave, akwaniheraka hiiho soonyesererihiwa sa Empa ya Yave." 
1Kings9:26 Salomoni aatekatho makula matokotoko wEzeyoni-Geberi ori vakhiviru wElati, elapo ya wEdomi, mukerekhere Ephareiya Yooxeera." 
1Kings9:27 Hirami aahaarumiha mmakulani matokotoko anamweettihaawe asilopwana ooxuttereene yaasuwenle ephareiya, weera yavare vamoha ni anamweettiha a makula matokotoko a Salomoni." 
1Kings9:28 Yaaheettiha makula matokotoko mpaka wOfiri, weiwo yaaruuhalaayawo ikiilu* 14 000 sa eyuuma yoorikaxa, emvahaka mwene Salomoni." 
1Kings10:1 Pwiyamwene a oXeba iiwakaru sa epili ya Salomoni aaphwannyaawe ni ekhavihero ya Yave, aarowa oYerusaleemu weera amoote murima ni sookoha soorika." 
1Kings10:2 Aaphiya oYerusaleemu ahooliweene ni mukuttula mutokotoko wa ikamelu* sikuxaleene itthu sooreerela, eyuuma yoorikaxa ni maluku oowaaraxa. Aarowa wa Salomoni, anamukoha mwaha wa sootheene saari mmurimanimwawe." 
1Kings10:3 Salomoni aamwaakhula sookoha sootheene. Khayaariwo yookoha yaamurika waakhula. 
1Kings10:4 Pwiyamwene a oXeba oonakaru miruku sa Salomoni ni empa ya emwene aatenkaawe," 
1Kings10:5 sooca vameesawawe, ihice sa asitokweenaawe, arumeiyaawe erumeelaka ewanreene moota mmoha, anamakuxaawe ikoomixi ni sooveleela soohisa aapankaawe Mpaani mwa Yave, aatikhiniheyaxa." 
1Kings10:6 Owo aamweerela mwene: “Yeeyo kiiwalaaka mweelaponimwaka mwaha wa mitekosanyu ni mirukusanyu ettiitthu.” 
1Kings10:7 Wa soothesene, nkaakhulela yeeyo kiiwaaka mpaka koonnaaka. Vekhaikhai – khayaakiphiiherenle ekhaikhai; mirukusanyu ni mihakhusanyu soopwahaxa yeeyo kileeliwaaka." 
1Kings10:8 Moota anghakalalaaya yaawo ampwaherera okhala ohoolowanyu yiiwaka mahuku ootheene mirukusanyu! 
1Kings10:9 Yave Mulukwaanyu atthapeliwe, mwa Yoowo osiveliwe ni nyuwo ookhalihakani vahiceni ya emwene wa oYixrayeli. Owo ohookhalihani ntoko mwene weera mukwanihere ekhaikhai ni olamula nnene niwoko na osivelawawe woohimala muloko wa aYixrayeli.”" 
1Kings10:10 Owo aamvaha mwene ikiilu* macira miloko mixexe sa eyuuma yoorikaxa, itthu sooreerela sincipale ni maluku oowaaraxa. Khasinaruuhiwetho itthu sooreerela sincipale ntoko seiye pwiyamwene a oXeba aamvanghaawe mwene Salomoni." 
1Kings10:11 Makula matokotoko a Hirami yaaruuhatho eyuuma yoorikaxa wOfiri, nyiri soorikaxa, ni maluku oowaaraxa." 
1Kings10:12 Mwene aavarela muteko nyiri soorikaxa opaka ivarelelo wa Empa ya Yave ni wa empa ya emwene nitho weera epakiweno amakita ni atthakare a anacipo. Mpaka olelo khasinattuutteliwe itthaabwa soorikaxa oYixrayeli ntoko iye. 
1Kings10:13 Mwene Salomoni aamvaha pwiyamwene a oXeba sootheene aatthunaawe ni aavekenlaawe ohiya seiye aalakenlaawe omvaha. Vahoolowaya aattimula, anahokoleela elapwaawe vamoha ni arumeiyaawe." 
1Kings10:14 Iyaakha sootheene Salomoni annaakhela eyuuma yoorikaxa wookwanaka ikiilu* 23 000," 
1Kings10:15 ohiya misoko aakhelaawe wa ananakoso oohiyanahiyana sa mamwene a wArabiya ni maguvernadori a elapwaawe. 
1Kings10:16 Mwene Salomoni aapaka ixikudu* sitokotoko macira meeli sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yoohaniwa, khula exikudu* ehuruweliweeneno ikiilu* ithanamosa ni wookwanaka ikiilu* ithanapiili sa eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
1Kings10:17 Aapakatho ixikudu* sikhaani macira mararu sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yoohaniwa, khula exikudu* ehuruweliweeneno ikiilu* piili. Mwene aahiikaathi mpaani mwa emwene ya Othako wa oLibanu." 
1Kings10:18 Vahoolowaya mwene aalamulela opakiwa ehice ya emwene etokotoko ecaambuliweene maino a itthepo ni ehuruweliweeneno eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
1Kings10:19 Ehice ele yaakhalano ixikada ithannamosa ni yoophiteeraaya osuluwaya waari woorukureera. Mipatta soomiili sa ehice saakhala woophiteerihelamo nyoono ni ecaambulo ya mwatto mmoha wa khula mpatta. 
1Kings10:20 Ixikada ithannamosa iye saakhalamo icaambulo sa amwatto muloko ni piili mmoha wa khula mpatta wa khula exikada. 
1Kings10:21 Ikoomixi sootheene sa mwene Salomoni saari sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni ikaruma sootheene sa empa ya emwene ya Othako wa oLibanu saaritho sa eyuuma yoorikaxa. Khayaariworu ya eparatha*, niwoko mmahukuni a Salomoni eparatha* khayaattittimihereleya." 
1Kings10:22 Mwene aakhalano makula matokotoko a nakoso vamoha ni makula matokotoko a Hirami. Khula iyaakha tthaaru yannahokolowa ekuxaleene eyuuma yoorikaxa, eparatha*, maino a itthepo, atthupili ni akhole." 
1Kings10:23 Mwene Salomoni aakhalano mihakhu ni miruku waapwaha mamwene ootheene akina a elapo ya vathi. 
1Kings10:24 Atthu a ilapo sootheene yaatthuna wuuluma ni Salomoni weera yiiwe miruku Muluku aamvanghaawe. 
1Kings10:25 Eyaakha ti eyaakha khula mutthu aarwa omuxekura annamuruuhela soovaha– itthu sa eparatha*, eyuuma yoorikaxa, mikaandyo, ikapwitthi, itthu sooreerela, ikavalu* ni abuuru." 
1Kings10:26 Salomoni aathukumanyiha ikaaro ni ikavalu*; aakhalano ikaaro 1 400 ni ikavalu* 12 000, mwa seiye aathokororaawe mmasidadeni sa ikaaro ni oYerusaleemu mwa weiwo aaraawewo." 
1Kings10:27 Mwene aahaattiha eparatha* moota wooweera yaasarasara oYerusaleemu ntoko maluku, ni nyiri sa esedari* saahaattaxa ntoko nyiri sa efiigu* sa ntuphini vathi vathi vamwaako wa oYerusaleemu." 
1Kings10:28 Ikavalu* sa Salomoni saarweela wExipitu ni oKuwe, mwa weiwo ananakoso a mwene yaathumaayawo." 
1Kings10:29 Yaathuma ikaaro sa ikavalu* wExipitu khula ekaaro mutteengwaaya waari ixekeli* macira mathannamosa sa eparatha* ni khula ekavalu* ixekeli* ncira ni miloko mithanu. Yaahaathumiheratho iye mamwene ootheene a aHiti ni a awArami. 
1Kings11:1 Wa soothesene, mwene Salomoni aahaasivela asithiyana anamarwa ancipale omuhiya mwaana muthiyana a Farawu* – aMowabi, awAmoni, awEdomi, aSidoni ni aHiti." 
1Kings11:2 Awo yaari a miloko mwa seiye Yave aaweerenlaawe aYixrayeli: “Nyuwo muhaatheleru anamwanaaya niwoko awo animoohuluxani muttharaka milukusaya.” Hata hiiho Salomoni annanyeserera waasivela asithiyana ale. 
1Kings11:3 Aahaathela anamwane asithiyana macira mathannameeli a mamwene, nitho ikuxo macira mararu. Vano axaarawe yaamuhapuxa mphironi mwa Yave." 
1Kings11:4 Ehuhu uuluvalaawe Salomoni, axaarawe yaamuhuluxeriha miluku sikina ni murimaawe khawaamukhalela nthiti Yave Mulukwaawe, ntoko waaraaya murima wa atithawe Davide." 
1Kings11:5 Aamutthara Axeteroti, muluku muthiyana a aSidoni ni Moloki, muluku a mwiikho a awAmoni." 
1Kings11:6 Hiiho Salomoni aapaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave ahimuttharaka Yave ni murima wootheene ntoko atithawe Davide yaamutthanraaya. 
1Kings11:7 Vanttumuxani mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oYerusaleemu Salomoni aamutekelawo nipuro na osulu Kemoxi, muluku a mwiikho a aMowabi ni wa Moloki, muluku a mwiikho a awAmoni." 
1Kings11:8 Mooteene yoowo aahaapakela altaari* axaarawe ootheene anamarwa, mwa yaawosa yaahiseraayawo erubani*, eveleelelaka milukusaya." 
1Kings11:9 Yave aamunyoonyeriwa Salomoni, niwoko na murimaawe omuhiya Yave Muluku a aYixrayeli, mwa Yoowo iixoonihenre wa yoowo imaara piili." 
1Kings11:10 Yave aaroomukhoottiharu Salomoni otthara miluku sikina, owo khaamwiiwelenle." 
1Kings11:11 Vano Yave aamweerela Salomoni: “Weenre ola okhala mweettelowaanyu muhiiwelelaka wiiraanawaka naari ikanosaka koolamulenlaakani, vekhaikhai kinoowaakhani omwene kimvahaka mmoha a murumeiyaanyu." 
1Kings11:12 Wa soothesene, niwoko woomusivelani Davide atithinyu nkirwa kipaka yeeyo mureene ni okumi. Kinaakha alamulaka mwaninyu mulopwana." 
1Kings11:13 Hata hiiho, nkirwa kaakha omwenaawe wootheene. Kinoomuhiyera epuumba emoha niwoko na omusivela Davide murumeiyaaka ni oYerusaleemu, esidade kithanlalaaka.”" 
1Kings11:14 Vano Yave aampakiha Hadadi, ngwEdomi a ekhapira ya emwene ya wEdomi, mwiittana a Salomoni." 
1Kings11:15 Khalayeene, Davide awananaka omwene wa awEdomi, Yowabe, mutokweene a anakhotto a Davide aarowa waavitha anamakhwaawe, anawiiva asilopwana ootheene a wEdomi." 
1Kings11:16 Yowabe ni anakhotto a aYixrayeli ootheene yaakhalawo nyeeri mithannamosa mpaka owiiva awEdomi ootheene. 
1Kings11:17 Vaheera Hadadi, areene mmiravo paahi, aatthawela wExipitu vamoha ni arumeiyi awEdomi akina yaarumeela atithawe." 
1Kings11:18 Yaattimula oMidiyani, enarowa oParani. Vano yaakuxaka asilopwana a oParani, yaarowa wa Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu, mwa yoowo aamuvanghaawe Hadadi empa, sooca ni ematta." 
1Kings11:19 Farawu* aamwaakhela nnenesene Hadadi moota wooweera aamutheliha munnaya amwaariye, pwiyamwene Tapenesi." 
1Kings11:20 Munneiye Tapenesi aamuyarano mwaana mulopwana iitthaniwa Genubati ni Tapenesi muneene aamuhuwa vaate wa mwene. Genubati aakhalano vamoha ni anamwane a Farawu*. 
1Kings11:21 Hadadi areene wExipitu, aahiiwa weera mwene Davide nitho Yowabe, mutokweene a anakhotto, yaahookhwa. Vano Hadadi aamweerela Farawu*: “Mukihiyeke kihokoleele elapwaaka.”" 
1Kings11:22 Farawu* aamukoha: “Yookhala enoohaleelani wootthuna nyuwo ohokoleela elapwaanyu?” Hadadi aamwaakhula: “Kheewo enkihaleela, mene mukihiye kirowe.”" 
1Kings11:23 Muluku aampakiha Rezoni, mwaana mulopwana a Eliyada, mwiittana mukina a Salomoni. Owo aatthawa wa pwiiyaawe Hadadezeri, mwene a oZoba." 
1Kings11:24 Davide aaphwanteene anakhotto a oZoba, Rezoni aahaathukumanyiha asilopwana akina akina, anathatuwa mutokweene a anamavaanya. Awosa yaarowa oDamasku, enakuxa, eniitekihawo." 
1Kings11:25 Rezoni aari mwiittana a aYixrayeli mmahukuni ootheene a Salomoni aaruuhelaka milattu sincipale ohiya iye sa Hadadi. Rezoni aalamula awArami anakhala mwiittana a aYixrayeli. 
1Kings11:26 Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati, aamvaanelelatho mwene. Aari murumeiyi mmoha a mwene, ngwEfrayimi oZereda ni amayawe yaari naamukhweli iitthaniwa Zeruwa." 
1Kings11:27 Ti ha owo aamurukunuwenlaawe mwene: Salomoni aateka oMilo* anakhuneela mulakwaaya vaxirini ya esidade ya atithawe Davide. 
1Kings11:28 Vano Yerobowami aari mulopwana ooweraxa ni Salomoni oonnaawe weera annavara mutekwaawe nnenese, aamukhaliha mutokweene a ootheene yaavara miteko sooviha yaari a epuumba ya Yoseefe." 
1Kings11:29 Ehuhuweene yeele Yerobowami aavenya oYerusaleemu ni Ahiya, mprofeeti a oXilo, aamukumanano mphironi awanreene mukaandyo munyowani." 
1Kings11:30 Ooweeli yaari meekhaaya mutuphini ni Ahiya aakuxa mukaandyo munyowani aawanraawe, anaahula mipatta muloko ni miili." 
1Kings11:31 Vano aamweerela Yerobowami: “Mwiittottele mipatta muloko, niwoko Yave Muluku a aYixrayeli eenre ha: ‘Moone, kinoomwaakha omwene Salomoni koovahakani nyuwo ipuumba muloko." 
1Kings11:32 Vaheera niwoko na omusivela murumeiyaaka Davide ni esidade ya oYerusaleemu mwa yeeyo kithanlalaaka variyari wa ipuumba sootheene sa aYixrayeli, Salomoni onoohalano epuumba emoha." 
1Kings11:33 Kinoopaka yeeyo niwoko na okihiyawaya, emulapaka Axeteroti, muluku muthiyana a aSidoni, Kemoxi, muluku a aMowabe ni Moleki, muluku a awAmoni. Khayeentte mphironimwaka, naari khaapanke yeeyo kintthunaaka, hata khayiiwelenle ikanosaka ni malamulowaaka ntoko aapankaawe Davide, atithawe Salomoni." 
1Kings11:34 Vaheera nkirwa kaakha omwene wootheene mmatatani mwa Salomoni. Koomukhaliha mwene wa mahuku ootheene a okumaawe niwoko na omusivelawaka murumeiyaaka Davide, mwa yoowo kimuthanlalaaka ni iiwelenle malamulowaaka ni ikanosaka." 
1Kings11:35 Kinoomwaakha omwene mwaniye ni wa nyuwo Yerobowami kinimoovahani ipuumba muloko. 
1Kings11:36 Kinoomvaha mwaniye epuumba emoha weera murumeiyaaka Davide akhalane mahuku ootheene namarandela vahiceni ya emwene oYerusaleemu, esidade kithanlalaaka ohelawo Nsinanaka." 
1Kings11:37 Vaheera mwaha wa nyuwo – kinimookhalihani mwene a aYixrayeli ni munoolamula sootheene muntthunaanyu. 
1Kings11:38 Mwapaka yeeyo kineeraaka koolamuleleni ni mweetta mphironimwaka mwemmo Miyo kintthunaaka mwiiwelelaka ikanosaka ni malamulowaaka ntoko aapankaawe murumeiyaaka Davide, kinookhala ni nyuwo. Kinimoovahani omwene wa mahuku ootheene ntoko kaampakenlaaka Davide ni kinimoovahanitho oYixrayeli." 
1Kings11:39 Kinooyeviha ekhapira ya Davide niwoko na yeeyo, mene khoohiyono wa mahuku ootheene.’ ”" 
1Kings11:40 Salomoni aaheerera omwiiva Yerobowami, mene owo aatthawela wExipitu, wa mwene Xixaki, anakhalawo mpaka okhwa wa Salomoni." 
1Kings11:41 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina iyo sa olamula wa Salomoni – sootheene aapankaawe ni miruku aaraaweno – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa Salomoni." 
1Kings11:42 Salomoni aahaalamula aYixrayeli oYerusaleemu wa iyaakha miloko mixexe. 
1Kings11:43 Aahookhwa ni aavithiwa musidadeni ya atithawe Davide. Vanonto Rehobowami, mwanawe mulopwana ti aamurandenle." 
1Kings12:1 Rehobowami aarowa oXekhemi, niwoko aYixrayeli ootheene yaarowawo weera emvarewo mwene." 
1Kings12:2 Vano Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati, aari nlelo wExipitu, mwa weiwo aatthawenlaawewo niwoko na mwene Salomoni, ni, iiwakaru yeeyo, aahokolowawo." 
1Kings12:3 Asitokweene a aYixrayeli yaamwiitthana ni owo vamoha ni muthukumano wootheene wa aYixrayeli yaarowa wa Rehobowami, enamweerela:" 
1Kings12:4 “Atithinyu aanilemeliheraxa woovara muteko woovihaxa. Vano mvukule miteko soovihaxa iya ni yoolemela ela. Hiiho nnimoorumeelani.” 
1Kings12:5 Rehobowami aawaakhula: “Muhokoleele wa miyo eviralene mahuku mararu.” Vanonto atthu yaapwaha. 
1Kings12:6 Mwene aahuuluma ni asitokweene yaarumeela atithawe Salomoni mookuminimwaya wootheene. Owo aahaakoha: “Miruku heeni muneeraanyu mukivahe yoowaakhula muloko ola?” 
1Kings12:7 Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Nyuwo olelo mwakhala murumeiyi a muloko ola, murumeelaka ni mwaakhula nnene, owo onookhala arumeiyaanyu wa mahuku ootheene.”" 
1Kings12:8 Wa soothesene, Rehobowami aakhootta miruku sa asitokweene a aYixrayeli ni aahuuluma ni amiravo unnuwannaawe ni yaamurumeela." 
1Kings12:9 Owo aahaakoha: “Miruku heeni muneeraanyu mukivahe? Naakhule hai muloko ola onkeerela: ‘Mvukule yoolemela atithinyu anilemelihenraaya.’” 
1Kings12:10 Amiravo unnuwannaawe yaamwaakhula: “Muleele muloko owo oweerenleni: ‘Atithinyu aanilemeliheraxa, vano mvukule.’ Vano muleele: ‘Yooleemela ya atithaka yaavihaxa – yootepaxa yawaka!" 
1Kings12:11 Atithaka yaahoolemeliherani, miyo kimmoolemeliheraxani. Atithaka yoottaruxelani ni ekwamba, miyo kinimoottaruxani ni awalisi!’”" 
1Kings12:12 Eviraleene mahuku mararu Yerobowami ni atthu ootheene yaahokoleela wa Rehobowami, ntoko mwene aalamulenlaawe: “Muhokoleele wa miyo eviraleene mahuku mararu.”" 
1Kings12:13 Mwene aawaakhula atthu mooxililini akhoottaka miruku sa asitokweene a aYixrayeli," 
1Kings12:14 attharaka miruku sa amiravo. Owo aaweerela: “Atithaka yaahoolemeliherani; miyo kinimwaandyeerera yoolemela ele. Atithaka yoottaruxani ni ekwamba; miyo kinimoottaruxani ni awalisi!” 
1Kings12:15 Hiiho mwene khaakhulenle muloko niwoko oceendyeya iwe wa sookhumelela waarweela mpatta wa Yave. Hiiho yaakwanihereya masu Yave aamuleenlaawe Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati, mwa mprofeeti Ahiya." 
1Kings12:16 aYixrayeli ootheene yoonakaru weera mwene khaatthuna owiiwa, yaamwaakhula: “Kheewo enaattamme ni Davide, mwaana mulopwana a Yixai! Muroweke oheemaniwanyu aYixrayeli! Mwiipasoope vaatewanyu, ekhapira ya Davide!” Vano aYixrayeli yaarowa mmawannyaya." 
1Kings12:17 Vaheera mwaha wa aYixrayeli yaamanke mmittettheni sa oYuda, Rehobowami aapwaherera okhala mwenaaya." 
1Kings12:18 Mwene aamurumihela Adonirami, mutokweene a miteko soovihaxa, mene aYixrayeli ootheene yaamvonya maluku mpaka okhwa. Wa soothesene, mwene Rehobowami aawera owela ekaarwaawe ya ikavalu*, anatthawela oYerusaleemu." 
1Kings12:19 Hiiho aYixrayeli annavaanyera omwene wa Davide mpaka olelo. 
1Kings12:20 aYixrayeli ootheene yiiwakaru weera Yerobowami aahokolowa, yaamwiitthanela muthukumano, enamvara omwene wa aYixrayeli. Vaheera epuumba ya Yuda paahi ti yaapwaherenre oororomeleyeene wa omwene wa Davide." 
1Kings12:21 Rehobowami aphiyakaru oYerusaleemu, aahaathukumanyiha anakhotto ootheene a epuumba ya Yuda ni ya Benyamini – asilopwana 180 000 – weera yaawanane aYixrayeli ni ekuxetho omwene wa Rehobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Salomoni." 
1Kings12:22 Vanonto Yave aamweerela Xemaya, mulopwana a Muluku:" 
1Kings12:23 “Mwamuleele Rehobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Salomoni, mwene a oYuda, ni mwaaleele atthu ootheene a epuumba ya Yuda ni ya Benyamini ni akinaawotho:" 
1Kings12:24 ‘Yave oneera ha: ‘Muhirowe waawanano axunninyu, aYixrayeli. Ootheene nyuwo muhokoleele owaani, niwoko ti Miyo kipanke yeeyo. Vano yaahiiwelela masu a Yave, enahokoleelasa mmawannyaya, ntoko Yave aalamulenlaawe." 
1Kings12:25 Vano Yerobowami aalipiha oXekhemi, mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi, anamakawo. Aavenyawo, anateka oPeniyeli." 
1Kings12:26 Yerobowami aahuupuwela: “Enoowereya weera omwene ola onoohokoleela ekhapira ya Davide. 
1Kings12:27 Atthu ale yarowa oYerusaleemu weera yapake sooveleela Mpaani mwa Yave, anoomukhalelatho nthiti pwiiyaaya Rehobowami, mwene a oYuda. Mwaha wa yeeyo, anookiiva, ehokoleelaka wa mwene Rehobowami.”" 
1Kings12:28 Iilankeene, mwene aahaapaka aximombe eeli a eyuuma yoorikaxa. Owo aaweerela atthu: “Nyuwosa khamureere weetta oYerusaleemu. Siri va milukusanyu, aYixrayeli, mwa seiye sookhumihaleni wExipitu.”" 
1Kings12:29 Aamurumihela mwaamombe mmoha oBeteli ni mukina oDani. 
1Kings12:30 Etthu ele yaathatuwa yoottheka. Atthu yaarowa mpaka oDani weera yamulapewo mwaamombeene yoole. 
1Kings12:31 Yerobowami aateka mapuro ootteela vanttumuxani anaakhaliha asaserdoti* variyari wa atthu oohiyanahiyana, yaaroohikhalaru aLeevi." 
1Kings12:32 Aakhaliha efesta munihukuni na naamuloko ni mathanu na mweeri wanaathannaararu, ntoko efesta yaapakiwa oYuda, ni aapaka sooveleela valtaarini*. Aapaka yeeyo oBeteli, aapakelaka sooveleela aximombe eeli aapankaawe. Aahaakhalihatho asaserdoti* oBeteli, mmapuroni ootteela aatekenlaawe miluku sikina." 
1Kings12:33 Munihukuni na naamuloko ni mathanu na mweeri wanaathannaararu, nihuku aathanlalaawe muneenaawe, aapaka sooveleela valtaarini* aatenkaawe oBeteli. Hiiho aahaakhalihera efesta aYixrayeli, anarowa valtaarini* weera ahisewo sooveleela." 
1Kings13:1 Yave aamulamula mulopwana a Muluku mmoha okhuma oYuda arowaka oBeteli, Yerobowami eemenleene valtaarini* weera ahise erubani*." 
1Kings13:2 Aahaakhuwelela altaari* mwa Nsina na Yave eeraka: “Ii! Altaari*, altaari! Yave oneera ha: ‘mwaana mulopwana aniitthaniwa Yosiya anaayariwe mukhapirani mwa Davide. Owo anaapake sooveleela sa asaserdoti* a miluku sikina, mwa yaawo anghisa erubani* va ni makhuva a atthu eniihiseriwe vasulu valtaarini* ala.’”" 
1Kings13:3 Ehuhuweene yeele mulopwana a Muluku ole aavaha eyoonihero, eeraka: “Eyoonihero ya Yave ti ela: altaari* eniitothowe ni ettuuraaya enooriheya.”" 
1Kings13:4 Vano Yerobowami iiwakaru yeeyo mulopwana a Muluku aakhuwelenlaawe altaari* oBeteli, aamuthoonya, analamulela: “Muntthuke!” Wa soothesene, moono aamuthoonyerannaawe waahuuma ohiwereyaka ohokoleela weerenlaaya." 
1Kings13:5 Ohiya toko yeeyo altaari* yaatothowa ettuuraaya yaariheya ntoko mwaana mulopwana a Muluku eenraawe mwa Nsina na Yave. 
1Kings13:6 Vanonto mwene aamweerela mulopwana a Muluku: “Dyontte, mumvekele Yave Mulukwaanyu mwaha wa miyo weera moonowaaka olame.” Mwaana mulopwana a Muluku aamvekela Yave ni moono wa mwene waalama, onakhala weerenlaaya." 
1Kings13:7 Mwene aamweerela mulopwana a Muluku: “Nrowe owannyaka ni mwacewo etthu ni miyo kinimootthuvelani.” 
1Kings13:8 Wa soothesene, mulopwana a Muluku aamwaakhula mwene: “Naari mukivahaka eriyari ya sootheene murinaanyu, miyo nkoottharani, hata nkaaca etthu naari nkaawura nipuro nenenenno." 
1Kings13:9 Koolamuleliwa ni Yave: ‘Muhice yooca, naari muhiwure maahi, hata muhihokoleele ephiroweene yeeyo mwaarweenlaanyu.’ ”" 
1Kings13:10 Vano aahokolowaawe aakuxenre ephiro ekina ahiyaka ephiro aavoleenlaawe oBeteli. 
1Kings13:11 Vanonto aakhala mprofeeti mmoha oowuuluvaleene oBeteli ni anamwanaawe asilopwana yaamuthalihera sootheene mulopwana a Muluku aapankaawewo nihuku nne. Yaamuthaliheratho yeeyo aamweerenlaawe mwene.
