1Kings13:12 Atithaya yaahaakoha: “Okuxenre ephironi?” Anamwanaawe asilopwana yaamuthoonyera ephiro mwaana mulopwana a Muluku a oYuda aakuxenraawe. 
1Kings13:13 Aaweerela anamwanaawe: “Mukirehererele buuru.” Yaamurehererela buuru, anangwela," 
1Kings13:14 anamweettiha amwaasaka mulopwana a Muluku. Aamuphwanya aakilaantheene vathi wa mwiri wa ekarivalyu*. Mprofeeti oowuuluvala aamukoha: “Nyuwo mulopwana a Muluku owiiye oYuda?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Ti yoomi.” 
1Kings13:15 Vano mprofeeti oowuuluvala aamweerela: “Nrowe owannyaka nace.” 
1Kings13:16 Mulopwana a Muluku aamwaakhula: “Nkinoottharani, hata nkinca yooca naari nkingwura nipuro nenenenno." 
1Kings13:17 Yave ookilamulela: ‘Muhice yooca, naari muhiwure maahi, hata muhihokoleele ephiro mvoleenlaanyu.’ ”" 
1Kings13:18 Mprofeeti oowuuluvala aamwaakhula: “Miyo mprofeetitho, ntoko nyuwo. Vano ndyelo ookeerela mwa Nsina na Yave: ‘Mwanghokolowane owannyinyu weera acewo yooca ni awurewo maahi.’ Vaheera, owo aamootha." 
1Kings13:19 Vano mwaana mulopwana a Muluku aarowa ni yoowo owannyawe, anaca, anawura." 
1Kings13:20 Awosa ekilaathiyeene vameesa, Yave aahuuluma ni mprofeeti oowuuluvala, mwa yoowo aamuhokolonxe mwaana mulopwana a Muluku ole." 
1Kings13:21 Owo aamukhuwelela mulopwana a Muluku aarweenle oYuda: “Yave oneera ha: ‘Nyuwo mooramusa masu a Yave muhiiwelelaka Nlamulo na Yave Mulukwaanyu oovanghaaweni. 
1Kings13:22 Moohokolowa munaca yooca, munawura maahi vanipuroni owo aaweerenlaaweni weera muhice hata muhiwure. Tivawo muttembwaanyu oneeraaya ohivitheliwe omakholoniwaanyu.’”" 
1Kings13:23 Mulopwana a Muluku amalihaleene oca ni owura, mprofeeti oowuuluvala aamurehererela buurwaawe." 
1Kings13:24 Vano mphironi aavariwa ni mwatto, anamwiiva. Muttembwaawe waahaataleleya vathi mukerekhere wa mwatto ni buuru." 
1Kings13:25 Eviraka atthu akina, yaahoona muttembo waataleleiyeenewo mukerekhere mwatto, enarowa, enaathalihera amaki a esidade mwa weiwo mprofeeti oowuuluvala aakhalaawewo." 
1Kings13:26 Mprofeeti asuwelaka yeeyo, aaheera: “Ti mulopwana a Muluku aaramunse masu a Yave. Yave oomwinnyerera wa mwatto, mwa yoowo omvulalinghe, anamwiiva, ntoko Yave aamooperenraawe.”" 
1Kings13:27 Mprofeeti aaweerela anamwanaawe: “Mukirehererele buuru,” ni yaapaka yeeyo." 
1Kings13:28 Vano aarowa, anaphwanya muttembo omorenleene mphironi, mukhwipimwaya areene mwatto ni buuru. Mwatto khaakhuunre muttembo, hata khaamvulalinghe buuru." 
1Kings13:29 Vano mprofeeti aakuxa muttembo wa mulopwana a Muluku, anaweliha vabuuruniwawe, anahokoloxera esidadaawe weera amwiinlele ni amvithe." 
1Kings13:30 Aavithela muttembo munihiyenimwawe ni awo yaamwiinlela yeeraka: “Ii! Munnihu!” 
1Kings13:31 Amvithaleene, mprofeeti oowuluvala aaweerela anamwanaawe asilopwana: “Miyo kaakhwaaka, mukivithe munihiyeni nna na mulopwana a Muluku. Makhuvaaka mwiikaathi mukerekhere makhuvaawe." 
1Kings13:32 Mutthengaawe aahimalaawe mwa Nsina na Yave mwaha wa altaari* a oBeteli ni mapuro ootteela a mmanttumuxani mmittettheni sa oSamariya, vekhaikhai onookwaniheriwa.”" 
1Kings13:33 Waarimweeraru hiiho, Yerobowami khaaceendyiye mweettelowaawe woonanara. Aapwaherera waakhaliha variyari wa atthu oohiyanahiyana asaserdoti* wa mapuro ootteela a miluku sikina. Ootheene yaatthuna okhala musaserdoti*, owo annaatteelihera mapuroweene yaawo." 
1Kings13:34 Ti yeela yoottheka ya Yerobowami ni omwenaawe yaammoronxe ni ophwatiwawaya mweelaponi. 
1Kings14:1 Ehuhuweene yeele Abiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yerobowami aavoreiwa," 
1Kings14:2 ni Yerobowami aamweerela mwaarawe: “Mwiitikinsihe weera muhisuweliwe weera nyuwo mwaara a Yerobowami ni murowe oXilo. Vano ookhalawo mprofeeti Ahiya, mwa yoowo aakeerenle weera kaarwa okhala mwene a muloko." 
1Kings14:3 Munkuxere ipaawu muloko, iboolu sikina ni oravo. Owo onimooleelani yeeyo eniyeereiye ni mmiravo.”" 
1Kings14:4 Vano mwaarawe Yerobowami aapaka yeeyo aamulamulenlaawe, anarowa vaate wa Ahiya oXilo. Vanonto Ahiya khaawera woona – aari oohoona niwoko na wuuluvalaxa." 
1Kings14:5 Wa soothesene, Yave aamweerela Ahiya: “Mwaarawe Yerobowami onimoowa wookohererani mwaha wa mwanawe mulopwana, niwoko na ovoreiwa. Ontthuneya weera nyuwo mmwaakhule moota kineeraaka kooleeleni. Owo aaphiyaka, onimwiitikinsiha.”" 
1Kings14:6 Tivawo, Ahiya iiwalaawe mikhitto vamulako, aamweerela: “Mvoloweke, mwaara a Yerobowami. Heeni muniitikinsihaanyu? Koovahiwa mutthenga woonanara wa nyuwo." 
1Kings14:7 Murowe, mwamuleele Yerobowami weera Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, oneera ha: ‘Kohoothanlani variyari wa mulokwaanyu kinookhalihani muhooleli a mulokwaaka aYixrayeli." 
1Kings14:8 Kohaakha omwene wa ekhapira ya Davide ni kohoovahani omwene ola. Wa soothesene, nyuwo khamukhanle ntoko murumeiyaaka Davide, mwa yoowo iiwelenle malamulowaaka ni aakitthanre ni murimaawe wootheene apakaka paahi yeeyo eri yooreera vamaithoniwaka." 
1Kings14:9 Moopaka soonanara waapwaha ootheene yaale yaapaka khalayi nyuwo muhinaaye. Mohiipakela miluku sikina siri sa eyuuma; mootannyera isarasaka mukireraka ettuli. 
1Kings14:10 Niwoko na yeeyo kinooruuhela erisa ekhapira ya Yerobowami. Kinoowiiva asilopwana ootheene a ekhapiraawe oYixrayeli – akhalaka neethi hoye hoye epottha. Kinoohisa ekhapira ya Yerobowami mpaka ommaleloni ntoko singhisiwaaya ikokhola. 
1Kings14:11 Yaawo ari a Yerobowami anookhuuriwa ni alapwa eniikhwele musidade, ni ipalame sa wiirimu sinimwaaca eniikhwele mutuphini. Uulumale ti Yave!’" 
1Kings14:12 Mwaha wa nyuwo, muhokoleele owaani. Mwaavolowakaru musidadenimwanyu, mmiravo onimookhwa." 
1Kings14:13 aYixrayeli ootheene anoomwiinlela ni anoomvitha. Ti yoowo paahi a ekhapira ya Yerobowami anaavithiwe, niwoko Yave Muluku a aYixrayeli omphwannye yoowo paahi ni etthu yooreera mukhapirani ya Yerobowami." 
1Kings14:14 Yave onimwiithanlela mwene a oYixrayeli ni owo onoophwata ekhapira ya Yerobowami. Enimweereya ehuhuweene yeela – mpaka vaanaanovaava! 
1Kings14:15 Vano Yave onimwaattaruxa aYixrayeli moota wooweera onuukhale ntoko ettheere yookuxiwa ni maahi. Owo onoowaakha aYixrayeli mweelaponi yooreera ela aavanghaawe makholowaaya, aamwaraxelaka okhopela mooloko Efratesi niwoko yaatannyera isara sa Yave epakaka nyiri soothipeleliwa Axera." 
1Kings14:16 Yave onimwaahiya aYixrayeli niwoko na soottheka Yerobowami aapankaawe, aatthekihaka aYixrayeli.”" 
1Kings14:17 Vano mwaarawe Yerobowami aavenya, anahokoleela oTireza. Avolowakaru mpaanimwawe, mmiravo ole aahookhwa." 
1Kings14:18 Awo yaamvitha ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaamwiinlela, ntoko Yave eenraawe mwa murumeiyaawe, mprofeeti Ahiya." 
1Kings14:19 Sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Yerobowami – ikhottosawe ni moota aalamunlaawe – sootheene seiye silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli. 
1Kings14:20 Aalamula wa iyaakha miloko miili ni piili anavithiwa ni makholowaawe. Mwanawe mulopwana, Nadabi ti aamurandenle." 
1Kings14:21 Rehobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Salomoni aari mwene a oYuda. Aapacenre olamula aareeneno iyaakha miloko mixexe ni eyaakha emoha sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha muloko niithannamosa, esidade Yave aathanlalaawe variyari wa ipuumba sootheene sa aYixrayeli weera Nsinanawe nikhalewo. Nsina na amayawe naari Nahama – ngwAmoni." 
1Kings14:22 Atthu a oYuda yaapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave. Yaatannya isarasawe sa ehace opwaha yaapankaaya makholowaaya. 
1Kings14:23 Yaahiipakelatho mapuro ootteela a miluku sikina mmattumuxani; maluku ootteeliheriwa ni nyiri soothipeleliwa Axera, mmapuroni moothemwene a nyiri soopombaxa." 
1Kings14:24 Yaakhala mpaka mapuuta asilopwana mpaani mwa milukusaya. Yaapaka itthu soonanara sa mwiikho sa miloko sikina, mwa seiye Yave oomonlaawe ohoolo wa aYixrayeli." 
1Kings14:25 Vayaakhani yanaathanu ya olamula wa Rehobowami, Xixaki, mwene a wExipitu, aawanano oYerusaleemu." 
1Kings14:26 Aakuxa mihakhu sootheene sa Empa ya Yave ni sa empa ya emwene. Aakuxa sootheene – mpakatho ixikudu* sa eyuuma yoorikaxa Salomoni aapankaawe. 
1Kings14:27 Tivawo mwene Rehobowami aalamulenlaawe opakiwa ixikudu* sa ebronze* vanipuroniwaya, anaavaha asitokweene a anamalipelela vamulako wa empa ya emwene." 
1Kings14:28 Imaara sootheene mwene aarowaawe Mpaani mwa Yave, anamalipelela yannakuxa ixikudu* iye, ni vahoolowaya yaahokoloxera mpaani saathokororiwa ikapwitthi." 
1Kings14:29 Mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Rehobowami – sootheene aapankaawe – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda. 
1Kings14:30 Waakhala owanawana variyari wa Rehobowami ni Yerobowami. 
1Kings14:31 Rehobowami aahookhwa anavithiwa ni makholowaawe musidadeni ya Davide. Nsina na amayawe naari Nahama – ngwAmoni. Vano Abiya, mwanawe mulopwana ti aamurandenle." 
1Kings15:1 Vayaakhani yanaamuloko niithannatthaaru moolamulani mwa Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati, Abiya aathatuwa mwene a oYuda," 
1Kings15:2 analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha tthaaru. Nsina na amayawe naari Mahaka, mwaana muthiyana a Abisalomi." 
1Kings15:3 Aapaka soottheka sootheene asitithawe yaapankaaya. Murimaawe khawaaroromeleiye wa Yave Mulukwaawe, ntoko waraaya murima wa nikholonawe Davide." 
1Kings15:4 Hata hiiho, niwoko na omusivelawawe Davide Yave Mulukwaawe aamvaha waara wa oYerusaleemu amukhalihaka mwaana mulopwana weera amurandele, alipihaka oYerusaleemu." 
1Kings15:5 Vano Davide aapaka yeeyo eri yooreera vamaithoni wa Yave, aniiwelela malamulo ootheene a Yave mahuku ootheene a okumaawe, ohikhanle paahi mwaha wa Uriya, muHiti." 
1Kings15:6 Waakhala owanawana variyari wa Rehobowami ni Yerobowami mmahukuni ootheene a okumaawe Abiya. 
1Kings15:7 Mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Abiya – sootheene aapankaawe – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda. Waakhalatho owanawana variyari wa Abiya ni Yerobowami. 
1Kings15:8 Abiya aahookhwa, anavithiwa ni makholowaawe musidadeni ya Davide. Vano mwanawe mulopwana Asa, ti aamurandenle." 
1Kings15:9 Vayaakhani yanaamiloko miili moolamulani mwa Yerobowami, mwene a oYixrayeli, Asa aathatuwa mwene a oYuda," 
1Kings15:10 analamula oYerusaleemu wa iyaakha miloko mixexe ni eyaakha emoha. Nsina na amunne naari Mahaka, mwaana muthiyana a Abisalomi." 
1Kings15:11 Asa aapaka yeeyo eri yooreera vamaithoni wa Yave, ntoko nikholonawe Davide naapankaaya." 
1Kings15:12 Aawoomola mapuuta asilopwana a miluku sikina mweelaponi ni aaphwata miluku soolokottha atithawe yaapankaaya. 
1Kings15:13 Mpaka aalamula weera amunne Mahaka ehisuweliwetho ntoko naangolo pwiyamwene, niwoko awo yaampakela mwiri wootteeliheriwa Axera wa mwiikho. Asa aathikila mwiri ole, anahisa vanreyareyani na oKideroni." 
1Kings15:14 Yaaroohimalamalihiwaru mapuro ootteela a miluku sikina mmattumuxani, murimaawe Asa waaroromeleya wa Yave mookumunimwawe wootheene." 
1Kings15:15 Aaruuhela Mpaani mwa Yave eyuuma yoorikaxa, eparatha* ni ikaruma aatteelinghaawe owo ni atithawe." 
1Kings15:16 Waakhala owanawana variyari wa Asa ni Bahaxa, mwene a oYixrayeli moolamulanimwaya wootheene." 
1Kings15:17 Bahaxa aarowa owanano oYuda analipiha oRama weera ahikhale anaavolowe naari anaakhume mweelaponi mwa Asa, mwene a oYuda." 
1Kings15:18 Vano Asa aakuxa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha* yootheene yaahanle mukwartuni wa mihakhu sa Empa ya Yave nitho wa empaawe ya emwene. Sootheene iye aawinnyerera asitokweenaawe, anarumihela wa Beni-Hadadi, mwaana mulopwana a Taberimoni, mwaana mulopwana a Hezeyoni, mwene a awArami aalamula oDamasku." 
1Kings15:19 Owo aamweerela: “Okhaleke wiiwanana variyariwahu, ntoko waaraaya variyari wa asitithihu. Moone, kinoorumihelani soovaha sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha*. Vano mmalihe wiiwananawanyu ni Bahaxa, mwene a oYixrayeli weera owo akhume mweelaponimwaka.”" 
1Kings15:20 Beni-Hadadi aahaakhulela, anaarumiha asitokweene a anakhottwaawe weera yawaneno mittetthe sa oYixrayeli. Yaakuxa wIyoni, oDani, wAbeli-Beti-Mahaka ni elapo yootheene ya oKineroti nitho oNafitali." 
1Kings15:21 Bahaxa iiwakaru yeeyo, aahiya oteka ixiri sa oRama, anahokoleela oTireza." 
1Kings15:22 Vanonto, mwene Asa aahaathukumanyiha atthu ootheene a oYuda – khaawo aahanle – ni awosa yaavenxa oRama maluku ni itthaabwa Bahaxa aavarelaawe muteko. Mwene Asa aavarela muteko itthu iye weera alipihe oGeba, mweelaponi ya oBenyamini, nitho oMizepa." 
1Kings15:23 Mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Asa – sootheene aapankaawe ni isidade aatenkaawe – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda. Ngwuuluvalani, Asa aahaawa ni eretta ya inaawo." 
1Kings15:24 Asa aahookhwa, anavithiwa ni makholowaawe musidadeni ya Davide. Mwanawe mulopwana Yehoxafati ti aamurandenle." 
1Kings15:25 Vayaakhani yanaaveeli moolamulani mwa Asa, mwene a oYuda, Nadabi, mwaana mulopwana a Yerobowami, aathatuwa mwene a oYixrayeli. Aalamula oYixrayeli iyaakha piili." 
1Kings15:26 Aapaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave attharaka soottheka sa atithawe aatthekihaka aYixrayeli. 
1Kings15:27 Bahaxa, mwaana mulopwana a Ahiya a epuumba ya Isakari, aamvaanelela, anamwiivela Nadabi oGibetoni, muttetthe wa aFilisti, owo ni aYixrayeli ewanakawo." 
1Kings15:28 Bahaxa aamwiivale Nadabi vayaakhani yanaararu moolamulani mwa Asa, mwene a oYuda, anamurandela." 
1Kings15:29 Apacerakaru olamula, aawiiva ootheene a emusi ya Yerobowami. Yaawo yaari a Yerobowami, khaamuhingyeru mukumi. Aahaaphwata ootheene ntoko Yave aahimmaawe mwa murumeiyaawe Ahiya, muXiloni." 
1Kings15:30 Eyo yeereenle niwoko na soottheka Yerobowami aapankaawe aatthekihakatho aYixrayeli. Hiiho aatannya isara sa Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli." 
1Kings15:31 Mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Nadabi – sootheene aapankaawe – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli. 
1Kings15:32 Waakhala owanawana variyari wa Asa ni Bahaxa, mwene a oYixrayeli, moolamulanimwaya wootheene." 
1Kings15:33 Vayaakhani yanaararu moolamulani mwa Asa, mwene a oYuda, Bahaxa, mwaana mulopwana a Ahiya, aathatuwa mwene a oYixrayeli oTireza, analamula iyaakha miloko miili ni iyaakha ixexe." 
1Kings15:34 Aapaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave attharaka soottheka sa Yerobowami, mwa seiye Yerobowami aatthekihalaaweno aYixrayeli." 
1Kings16:1 Masu a Yave mwaha wa Bahaxa yaamurweela Yehu, mwaana mulopwana a Hanani:" 
1Kings16:2 “Kohootathani ntthupi, kookhalihakani muhooleli a mulokwaaka aYixrayeli, mene mootthara ephiro ya Yerobowami, munatthekiha mulokwaaka mutannyaka isarasaka niwoko na sootthekasaya." 
1Kings16:3 Tivawo kineeraaka kimphwate Bahaxa ni ekhapiraawe kipakelaka emusaawe yeeyo kaapakenlaaka emusi ya Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati." 
1Kings16:4 Yaawo ari a Bahaxa anookhuuriwa ni alapwa eniikhwele musidade ni ipalame sa wiirimu sinimwaaca, eniikhwele mutuphini.”" 
1Kings16:5 Mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Bahaxa – sootheene aapankaawe – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli. 
1Kings16:6 Bahaxa aahookhwa, anavithiwa ni makholowaawe oTireza. Mwanawe mulopwana Ela ti aamurandenle." 
1Kings16:7 Masu a Yave mwaha wa Bahaxa ni emusaawe yaarwiiye mwa mprofeeti Yehu, mwaana mulopwana a Hanani niwoko na soonanara aapankaawe vamaithoni wa Yave. Hiiho aatannya isarasawe Yave athatuwaka ntoko emusi ya Yerobowami, nitho niwoko na ophwatawawe emusi ya Yerobowami." 
1Kings16:8 Vayaakhani yanaamiloko miili ni iyaakha ithannamosa moolamulani mwa Asa, mwene a oYuda, Ela, mwaana mulopwana a Bahaxa, aathatuwa mwene a oYixrayeli. Aalamula oTireza iyaakha piili." 
1Kings16:9 Mutokweenaawe mmoha iitthaniwa Zinri aalamula eriyari ya ikaarosawe sa ikavalu* sa ekhotto, aamvaanelela Ela. Ehuhuweene yeele Ela aari oTireza oohapaliweene mpaani mwa Areza, mutokweene a empa ya emwene ya oTireza." 
1Kings16:10 Vayaakhani yanaamiloko miili ni iyaakha ithannapiili moolamulani mwa Asa, mwene a oYuda, Zinri aavolowa, anammana, anamwiiva Ela, anamurandela." 
1Kings16:11 Apacerakaru olamula akilaathiyeene vahiceni ya emwene, aawiiva ootheene a emusi ya Bahaxa. Khaamuurenleru naari mmoha a wuulopwanani, akhalaka mmusi hoye hoye nthamwene." 
1Kings16:12 Hiiho Zinri aaphwata emusi yootheene ya Bahaxa, ntoko Yave aahimmaawe mwa mprofeeti Yehu, mwaha wa Bahaxa." 
1Kings16:13 Yeereenle niwoko na soottheka sootheene Bahaxa ni mwanawe mulopwana Ela yaapankaaya yaatthekihaka aYixrayeli. Hiiho yaatannya isara sa Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli niwoko na milukusaya soolokottha soohimuteko." 
1Kings16:14 Mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Ela – sootheene aapankaawe – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli. 
1Kings16:15 Vayaakhani yanaamiloko miili ni iyaakha ithannapiili moolamulani mwa Asa, mwene a oYuda, Zinri aalamula oTireza mahuku mathannameeli. Anakhotto yaakonenle vakhiviru wa oGibetoni, muttetthe mmoha wa aFilisti." 
1Kings16:16 aYixrayeli yaakonenlewo, yiiwakaru weera Zinri aamvaanelela mwene, amwiivaka, nihuku nenenenne waakonelingwe iwe, yaamvara omwe Omeri, mutokweene a anakhotto." 
1Kings16:17 Vano Omeri ni anakhottwaawe ootheene yaari ni yoowo aavenya oGibetoni, anawanano oTireza." 
1Kings16:18 Zinri oonakaru weera esidade yookuxiwa, aatthawela munipuroni noolipaxa na empa ya emwene, aniihiseramo, anakhwa." 
1Kings16:19 Yeereenle niwoko na soottheka aapankaawe, apakaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave ni eettaka mphironi mwa Yerobowami ni soottheka aapankaawe aatthekihakatho aYixrayeli." 
1Kings16:20 Mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Zinri – sootheene aapankaawe ni ovaanelelawawe – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli. 
1Kings16:21 Vano atthu a oYixrayeli yaakawanyeya mipatta miili. Mpatta mmoha waatthuna weera Tibeni, mwaana mulopwana a Ginati avariwe omwene ni mukinoowo waamutthuna Omeri." 
1Kings16:22 Wa soothesene, yaale yaamutthuna Omeri yaalipaxa waapwaha anamatthara a Tibeni, mwaana mulopwana a Ginati. Tibeni aahookhwa ni Omeri aavariwa omwene." 
1Kings16:23 Vayaakhani yanaamiloko miraru ni eyaakha emoha sa moolamulani mwa Asa, mwene a oYuda, Omeri aathatuwa mwene a oYixrayeli. Aalamula iyaakha muloko ni piili – iyaakha ithannamosa iye oTireza." 
1Kings16:24 Aathuma nttumuxa na oSamariya wa Xemeri, amulivaka italentu* piili sa eparatha*, anatekawo esidade vanttumuxani, mwa yeeyo aattenghaawe Samariya, niwoko na Xemeri, nsina na muneene a khalayi." 
1Kings16:25 Wa soothesene, Omeri aapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave waapwaha yaawo yaalamula owo ahinaaye." 
1Kings16:26 Aaheetta mphironi mwa Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati, apakaka sootthekasawe mwa seiye aatthekihalaaweno aYixrayeli. Hiiho aatannya isara sa Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli niwoko na milukusaya soolokottha soohimuteko." 
1Kings16:27 Mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Omeri – sootheene aapankaawe ni aawenraawe – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli. 
1Kings16:28 Omeri aahookhwa, anavithiwa ni makholowaawe oSamariya. Mwanawe mulopwana, Ahabi, ti aamurandenle." 
1Kings16:29 Vayaakhani yanaamiloko miraru ni iyaakha ithannatthaaru moolamulani mwa Asa, mwene a oYuda, Ahabi, mwaana mulopwana a Omeri aathatuwa mwene a oYixrayeli. Aalamula oSamariya iyaakha miloko miili ni iyaakha piili." 
1Kings16:30 Ahabi, mwaana mulopwana a Omeri, aapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave ompwaha akhalaru mutthu aalamula owo ahinaaye." 
1Kings16:31 Aatthara soottheka sa Yerobowami ni wootepaxa aamuthelatho Yezebeli, mwaana muthiyana a Etibahali, mwene a aSidoni, anapacera omurumeela ni omulapa Bahali*." 
1Kings16:32 Aamutekela Bahali* altaari* mpaani mwa Bahali* mwa yeeyo aatenkaawe oSamariya. 
1Kings16:33 Ahabi aaheemexatho mwiri wootteeliheriwa atannyaka isara sa Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli waapwaha mamwene ootheene a oYixrayeli yaalamula owo ahinaaye." 
1Kings16:34 Mweehuhuni ya Ahabi, Hiyeli a oBeteli aarasela oYeriko. Apakaka mathipelowaaya, ntthaaranawe Abirami naahookhwa, ni araselaka maselaaya, etthaakwaawe Segubi yaahookhwatho, ntoko Yave aahimalaawe mwa Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Nuni." 
1Kings17:1 Vano Eliya, muTixebi arowaka oTixebi, elapo ya oGiliyadi, aamweerela Ahabi: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli mwa Yoowo kinimurumeelaaka weera khaniimaru nikame hata kheeruparu epula iyaakha sinrwa mpaka ehuhu kineeraaka kihime.”" 
1Kings17:2 Yave aamweerela Eliya: 
1Kings17:3 “Mvenye va, murowe mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, mwiipithewo munxaapwani na oKeriti, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oYordanu." 
1Kings17:4 Mwawureke maahi a munxaapwani ni kohaalamulela anakhuku weera yoocihekeniwo.” 
1Kings17:5 Vano aapaka yeeyo Yave aamulamulenlaawe. Aarowa munxaapwani na oKeriti, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa Yordanu, anakhalawo." 
1Kings17:6 Anakhuku yannamuruuhela sooca ni enama oxeexelo ni oxekuwa ni aawura maahi a munxaapwani. 
1Kings17:7 Eviraleene ehuhu ekina, nxaapwa naawelela niwoko na ohirupa epula." 
1Kings17:8 Vano Yave aamweerela: 
1Kings17:9 “Murowe woowaakuveya oZarefati, mweelaponi ya oSidoni, ni mwakhalewo. Koomulamulela naamukhweli a weiwo weera oovaheeni, yooca.”" 
1Kings17:10 Hiiho aarowa oZarefati. Aphiyakaru vamulako wa esidade, aamphwanya naamukhweli aasaka ikhuuni. Aamwiitthana, amvekelaka: “Dyoontte, mukiruuhele maahi mukahini weera kiwure.”" 
1Kings17:11 Owo arowaka orika maahi, Eliya aamvekelatho: “Dyoontte mukiruuheletho yooca.”" 
1Kings17:12 Naamukhweli aamwaakhula: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave Mulukwaanyu – nkinonoru yooca. Kirino ephepa vakhaani mmwaapuni ni makhura vakhaani munipoottoroni. Kinaasa ikhuuni weera kikuxe owaani kiitterekheleke miyo ni mwanaka mulopwana weera nace ni vahoolowaya nikhweeke etala.” 
1Kings17:13 Eliya aamweerela: “Muhoove. Murowe owaani ni mwapake yeeyo muhimmaanyu. Mukipakele toko eboolu ekhaanene sa seiyo murinaanyu ni mukiruuheleke. Vahoolowaya mpakeke yoocaanyu ni mwaninyu. 
1Kings17:14 Vano Yave Muluku a aYixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Ephepa eri mmwaapuni kheerwa emala hata makhura munipoottoroni mpaka nihuku Yave aneeraawe arupihe epula mweelaponi.’” 
1Kings17:15 Naamukhweli aarowa, anapaka yeeyo Eliya aamulamulenlaawe. Vanonto yaakhala yooca ya nihuku ti nihuku wa Eliya, naamukhweli ni emusaawe." 
1Kings17:16 Ephepa mmwaapuni hata makhura munipoottoroni khayaamanle, ntoko Yave aahimalaawe mwa Eliya." 
1Kings17:17 Eviraleene ehuhu ekina, mwaana mulopwana a naamukhweli ole aavoreiwa. Annatepaxa ni ommaleloni aahookhwa." 
1Kings17:18 Vano naamukhweli ole aamukoha Eliya: “Kootthekenleni mulopwana a Muluku? Murweenle va okuupuxera sootthekasaka ni omwiiva mwanaka?” 
1Kings17:19 Eliya aamwaakhula: “Mukivahe mwaninyu.” Aamukuxa, anamuroiha mukwartuni ya osulu mwa weiwo aaphiyenraawewo, anamwaatalela vakaamani." 
1Kings17:20 Vano aamukhuwelela Yave: “Ii! Yave Mulukwaaka, munruuhelenle heenitho erisa naamukhweli ola kimphiyerenlaaka mmwiivaka mwanawe?”" 
1Kings17:21 Owo aamphiteera mmiravo vararu amukhuwelelaka Yave: “Ii! Yave Mulukwaaka, munghokoloxere mmiravo okumi!”" 
1Kings17:22 Yave aahiiwa okhuwela wa Eliya ni mmiravo aavenyerera, anakhala ni okumi." 
1Kings17:23 Eliya aamukuruxela mmiravo vathi, anawinnyerera amayawe aweerelaka: “Mmoone, mwaninyu ori ni okumi!”" 
1Kings17:24 Vanonto muthiyana aamweerela Eliya: “Vano koosuwela weera muri mulopwana a Muluku ni masu a Yave munuulumanyu ti a ekhaikhai.” 
1Kings18:1 Eviraleene ehuhu yincipale, vayaakhani yanaararu ehirupaka epula Yave aamweerela Eliya: “Murowe, mwiixoonihere wa Ahabi ni Miyo kinoorupiha epula mweelaponi.”" 
1Kings18:2 Hiiho Eliya aarowa wiixoonihera wa Ahabi. Vano yeenre etala yaatepaxa oSamariya 
1Kings18:3 Ahabi aamwiitthana Obadiya aari namawehaweha a empa ya emwene. Vano Obadiya aamuroromela Yave ni nthiti. 
1Kings18:4 Yezebeli eera awiivaka maprofeeti a Yave. Obadiya aahaathukumanyiha maprofeeti ncira, anaavitha mmakhukuni meeli – miloko mithanu wa khula nikhuku, annaavaha yooca ni maahi." 
1Kings18:5 Emaara emoha Ahabi aamweerela Obadiya: “Nrowe mphattuwelani moothemwene ni mureyareyani mwa elapo. Apaale nnoophwanya malaxi weera nacihe ikavalu* ni abuuru. Hiiho khoontthuneya omwiiva mwaamunama.” 
1Kings18:6 Vano yaakawana elapo yaarowaaya oviravira – Ahabi aarongwe mpattaawe ni Obadiya mpatta mukina. 
1Kings18:7 Obadiya eettaka hiihaale, Eliya aamukumanano ni Obadiya aamusuwela, anuuramela vathi amukohaka: “Ti nyeenyuweene pwiiyaaka Eliya?”" 
1Kings18:8 Eliya aamwaakhuala: “Aani, murowe, mwamuleele pwiiyaanyu: ‘Eliya ori va.’”" 
1Kings18:9 Obadiya aamukoha: “Kootthekenleni eheeni wookiiviha wa Ahabi? 
1Kings18:10 Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave Mulukwaanyu weera pwiiyaaka aahaarumihela atthu wa khula muloko ni omwene weera ewaasaaseni. Khula muloko ni omwene waahimaaya weera nyuwo khamwaariwowo, owo aanyesereriha olipela weera khayaawenre woophwanyani." 
1Kings18:11 Ni vano munkilamulela orowa wa yoowo kimweerelaka: ‘Eliya ori va!’ 
1Kings18:12 Nkisuwenle woowi Munepa wa Yave oneeraaya woorongheni miyo koohiyakani. Miyo karowa omuleela yeeyo Ahabi ni owo aahoophwanyani, onookiiva. Miyo kiri murumeiyaanyu kinnamutthapela Yave okhuma emirawaaka." 
1Kings18:13 Pwiiyaaka weeraka khamwiiwale yeeyo kaapankaaka Yezebeli awiivaka maprofeeti a Yave? Kaahaavitha maprofeeti ncira a Yave mmakukhuni meeli, miloko mithanu wa khula nikhuku, kaavahaka yooca ni maahi." 
1Kings18:14 Ni vano munkilamulela orowa wa pwiiyaaka omuleela: ‘Eliya ori va.’ Owo onookiiva!” 
1Kings18:15 Eliya aamwaakhula: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave a ikuru sootheene, mwa Yoowo kinimurumeelaaka, vekhaikhai olelo kinimwiixoonihera wa Ahabi.”" 
1Kings18:16 Vanonto Obadiya aarowa omukumanano Ahabi, anamuleela, ni Ahabi aarowa omukumanano Eliya." 
1Kings18:17 Amoonakaru Eliya, aamweerela: “Ti weyo ongwuungurimiha aYixrayeli?”" 
1Kings18:18 Eliya aamwaakhula: “Nkihiyono miyo kingwuungurumiha aYixrayeli, mene ti nyuwo ni emusi ya atithinyu. Moohiya malamulo a Yave muttharaka miluku siniitthaniwa aBahali*.”" 
1Kings18:19 “Vano mwawiitthane aYixrayeli a elapo yootheene weera nakumane vamwaako Karimeli. Mwaarwaaneke maprofeeti macira maxexe ni miloko mithanu a Bahali* ni maprofeeti macira maxexe a Axera, mwa yaawo anca vamoha ni Yezebeli.”" 
1Kings18:20 Vano Ahabi aahaalattula aYixrayeli ootheene anaathukumanyiha maprofeeti vamwaako Karimeli. 
1Kings18:21 Eliya aaheemela ohoolo wa muloko eeraka: “Heeni munghovelaanyu othanla? Yave aari Muluku, muntthareke; vaheera Bahali* ari Muluku, vano muntthareke!” Wa soothesene, muloko waari emaalelo." 
1Kings18:22 Vanonto Eliya aaheera: “Variyari wa maprofeeti a Yave kihanle meekhaaka, mene Bahali* orino maprofeeti macira maxexe ni miloko mithanu." 
1Kings18:23 Mwaaruuhe aximombe alopwana eeli. Maprofeeti ala ethanleke emoha ni ethikileleke yiikaathiki vasulu ikhuuni, mene ehipattihe mooro. Miyo kinoomureherera mwaamombe mukina vasulu ikhuuni ni nkipattihawotho mooro." 
1Kings18:24 Vano nyuwosa mwiitthane nsina na mulukwaanyu ni miyo kinimwiitthana Nsina na Yave. Muluku owo anaakhule ni mooro – Muluku a ekhaikhai ti Yoowo.” Vano ootheene yaaheera: “Nohaakhulela.” 
1Kings18:25 Eliya aaweerela maprofeeti a Bahali*: “Munthanle mwaamombe mmoha ni mukhale oopacera omureherera mweenre mukhala ancipale. Mwiitthane nsina na mulukwaanyu, mene muhipattihe mooro.”" 
1Kings18:26 Vano yaamukuxa mwaamombe yaavahiwaaya, enamureherera. Vanonto yanniitthana nsina na Bahali* okhuma oxeexelo mpaka othana. Yannakhuwela: “Ii! Bahali*, munaakhuleke.” Yaahiina yaarukureeraka altaari* yaapankaaya, mene khayaakhuliwaru." 
1Kings18:27 Othana Eliya aapacera waatthebwa aweerelaka: “Mwaandyeerere okhuwelawanyu! Owo ori Muluku keera? Apaale onootthokelela, hoye hoye yookhala omvaraawe naari eettaka mmukwahani! Apaale onookona ni ontthuneya omuvenxa.”" 
1Kings18:28 Hiiho yannatepa okhuwela ni yiipophasaka ni ikatana ni mavaka, ntoko yaakhovelenlaaya, mpaka orapa ephome." 
1Kings18:29 Nsuwa naathetemanaaya, yaapwaherera okhuwelawaya mpaka ehuhu ya yooveleela ya ohiyu. Wa soothesene, khayaakhuliwa hata khawiiwanyeyaru oruma." 
1Kings18:30 Vanonto Eliya aaweerela atthu ootheene: “Mukaattameleke.” Awosa yaamwaattamela emurukureenreene ni owo aahaarasela altaari* a Yave yaaphwatingwe. 
1Kings18:31 Aakuxa maluku muloko ni meeli – nimoha wa khula epuumba ya aYixrayeli ya ekhapira ya Yakobe, mwa yoowo Yave aamweerenlaawe: “Nsinananyu nnikhale Yixrayeli.”" 
1Kings18:32 Aahaateka altaari* ni maluku mwa Nsina na Yave, anathipa nlitti aarukureerihaka altaari* wookwana iliitru* miloko miili." 
1Kings18:33 Vahoolowaya aahiikaathi ikhuuni valtaarini*, anamuthikilela mwaamombe, anamwiikaathi vakhuunini, aweerelaka: “Musarihe maahi nyaapu mixexe ni muyeehere wa yooveleela ni ikhuuni.”" 
1Kings18:34 Owo aahaalamulela: “Muphitele.” Ni awosa yaaphitela. Aahaalamulelatho: “Mpake yeeyo emaara yanaararu.” Ni yaapaka emaara yanaararu. 
1Kings18:35 Maahi yannakhwalalela valtaarini* esareyaka mulittini. 
1Kings18:36 Mweehuhuni ya yooveleela mprofeeti Eliya aaheemela, anavekela ohoolo wa altaari*: “Ii! Yave, Muluku a Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yakobe, ootheene olelo esuwelihiweke weera Nyuwo muri Muluku a oYixrayeli ni weera miyo ti murumeiyaanyu kimpaka sootthene iya niwoko na nlamulonanyu." 
1Kings18:37 Mukaakhuleke Yave, mukaakhuleke, weera atthu ala esuwele weera Nyuwo, Yave, ti Muluku ni mpakihe weera mirimasaya sihokoleele wa Nyuwo.”" 
1Kings18:38 Vano mooro wa Yave waamora, onahisa yooveleela, ikhuuni, maluku ni mpaka etthaya, owelelihakatho maahi yaari mulittini." 
1Kings18:39 Muloko woonakaru yeeyo, waahuuramihela ikhovesaya vathi okhuwelaka: “Yave ti Muluku, Yave ti Muluku!”" 
1Kings18:40 Vano Eliya aahaalamulela: “Mwaatthukase maprofeeti a Bahali*! Muhimuhiyeru naari mmoha atthawaka!” Awosa yaahaatthukasa ni Eliya aahaarongha vanreyareyani na oKixoni anawiivelawo. 
1Kings18:41 Vano Eilya aamweerela Ahabi: “Murowe, mwace ni mwawure niwoko kinniiwa oruma wa epula yincipale.”" 
1Kings18:42 Hiiho Ahabi aarowa oca ni owura, vaheera Eliya aawela vasulu vamwaako Karimeli anakokhora mpaka vathi ni ekhovaawe aniipapiha ni makutha." 
1Kings18:43 Owo aamulamulela murumeiyaawe: “Orowe wawehe mpatta wa ophareiya.” Aarowa, anaweha, anamweerela Eliya: “Kheewo eriwo.” Eliya aamuhokoloxera oweha imaara ithannapiili." 
1Kings18:44 Emaara yanaathannapiili murumeiyi aamuthalihera: “Kohoona mwaanihutte ntatanene nikhumaka mphareiya.” Vano Eliya aamweerela: “Oroweke wamuleele Ahabi: ‘Mureherere ekaarwaanyu ya ekavalu* ni muhokoleele owaani weera epula ehookutteleleni.’” 
1Kings18:45 Eyo eri hiiho, erimu yaariipihana enapacera woopa epheyo etokotoko. Vanonto Ahabi aarowa woowaakuveya oYezeriyeli." 
1Kings18:46 Ikuru sa Yave saamukhuruwela Eliya ni, aphitelenleene mukaandyowaawe ni laamba, aatthimaka ohoolo wa Ahabi ephiroweneeyo mpaka oYezeriyeli." 
1Kings19:1 Vano Ahabi aamuthalihera Yezebeli sootheene seiye Eliya aapankaawe ni moota aawiivalaawe maprofeeti ootheene ni ekatana. 
1Kings19:2 Tivawo Yezebeli aamurumihenlaawe Eliya namutthenga, amweerelaka: “Miluku sikittaruxaxe omaalo ehuhuweene yeela kaahipakela okumaanyu yeeyo mwaapakenlaanyu maprofeeti.”" 
1Kings19:3 Eliya aahoova, anatthawa uurelaka okumaawe. Aphiyakaru oBerxeba, elapo ya oYuda, aamuhiyawo murumeiyaawe." 
1Kings19:4 Owo aavolowa munikareni eettaka wa nihuku nenenno. Aaphiya wa mwiri mmoha, anakilaathi vathi avekelaka weera akhwe. Aamweerela Yave: “Ii Yave, wookwana! Mukuxe okumaaka niwoko nkihiyono ooreerela waapwaha makholowaaka.”" 
1Kings19:5 Vano aahiixaatalela vathi wa mwiri, anakona. Wootutuxereya ndyelo aamutava, anamweerela: “Mvenye, muce.”" 
1Kings19:6 Aaweha mukhwipimwawe, anoona wamuruwawe eboolu yoowooxiwa wamakhalani oovihaxa, nitho mwaapu wa maahi. Aahooca, anawura, anakonatho." 
1Kings19:7 Ndyelo aahokolowatho, anamutava, anamweerela: “Mvenye, muceeke, niwoko mwaahica mukwahaanyu onimootepelani.”" 
1Kings19:8 Aavenya, anaca, anawura. Oolipihiweene ni yooca, aaheetta othana miloko mixexe ni ohiyu miloko mixexe mpaka aaphiya oHorebi, mwaako wa Muluku." 
1Kings19:9 Aavolowawo munikhukuni, anavirihawo ohiyu. Vano Yave aamukoha: “Eliya, mumpakani wenno?”" 
1Kings19:10 Aamwaakhula: “Kinnamurumeela ni nthiti Yave, Muluku a ikuru sootheene. aYixrayeli aakhootta wiiraanawanyu ni ahaapwexa altaaraanyu*, ewiivaka maprofeetaanyu ni ekatana. Vano ti miyo paahi kihanle ni awo anaasaasa okiivatho.”" 
1Kings19:11 Yave aamweerela: Mukhume ni mweemele vamwaako vamaithoni wa Yave, niwoko Yave onoovira. Vanonto yaahoopaxa epheyo enamwalamwaxa nyaako enyaanyaka nyala ohoolo wa Yave, mene Yave khaakhanle mpheyoni. Vahoolo wa epheyo waakhala otetereya, mene Yave khaakhanle mootetereyani." 
1Kings19:12 Vahoolo wa otetereya waakhala mooro, mene Yave khaakhanle mmooroni. Ni vahoolo wa mooro yaakhala epheyo yoomaaleleya ni yooriirela." 
1Kings19:13 Eliya iiwakaru yeeyo, aahiikhuneela ekhovaawe ni mukaandyo, anavenya, eemelaka vamulako wa nikhuku. Vano aahiiwa nsu: “Mumpakani wenno, Eliya?”" 
1Kings19:14 Aamwaakhula: “Kinnamurumeela ni nthiti Yave, Muluku a ikuru sootheene. aYixrayeli aakhootta wiiraanawanyu ni ahaapwexa altaaraanyu*, ewiivaka maprofeetaanyu ni ekatana. Vano ti miyo paahi kinhanle ni awo anaasaasa okiivatho.”" 
1Kings19:15 Yave aamweerela: “Muhokoleele ephiro murweenlaanyu ni murowe onikareni na oDamasku. Mwaaphiyakawo, mwamuttikitthele Hazayeli ntoko mwene a awArami." 
1Kings19:16 Mwamuttikittheletho Yehu, mwaana mulopwana a Nimexi ntoko mwene a aYixrayeli ni Elixa, mwaana mulopwana a Xafati wAbeli-Mehola ntoko namarandelaanyu." 
1Kings19:17 Yehu anaawiive ootheene eniyoopowe ekatana ya Hazayeli ni Elixa anaawiive ootheene eniyoopowe ekatana ya Yehu. 
1Kings19:18 Kohaakhalanotho atthu akina macira miloko mithannamiili oYixrayeli, mwa yaawo yahaakokhorenle ohoolo wa Bahali* hata yaahaambeence.”" 
1Kings19:19 Vano Eliya aattimulawo, anamphwanya Elixa, mwaana mulopwana a Xafati. Owo eera alimaka ni imombe miloko miili niixexe sootthukiwa piili-piili ni owo muneenaawe eettiha sanaamuloko ni piili. Eliya aamwaattamela, anamuthateliha mukaandyowaawe." 
1Kings19:20 Elixa aahiya imombe, anamutthimakela Eliya, amweerelaka: “Mukihiye kaalaxera atithaka ni amayaka ni ebeecu ni vano kinimoohoolani.” Eliya aamwaakhula: “Muroweke. Koopankeni eheeni?”" 
1Kings19:21 Vano Elixa aahokolowa, anakuxa imombesawe, aniiva, atetheerelaka ikaruma aalimanaaweno. Aahaapeya enama, anaavaha atthu yaari vaavaale ni awosa yaakhuura. Vahoolowaya aapwaha vamoha ni Eliya, anamurumeela." 
1Kings20:1 Vano Beni-Hadadi, mwene a awArami aahaathukumanyiha anakhottwaawe ootheene. Akhaviheriwaka ni mamwene miloko miraru ni mamwene meeli vamoha ni ikavalusaya* ni ikaarosaya sa ikavalu* sa ekhotto owo aarowa, anarica oSamariya, anawanano." 
1Kings20:2 Aamurumihela anamitthenga Ahabi, mwene a oYixrayeli musidadeni, amweerelaka: “Beni-Hadadi oneera ha:" 
1Kings20:3 ‘Eparathaanyu* ni eyuumaanyu yoorikaxa ti yawaka – hiihotho axaarinyu ni anamwaniinyu ooreerela.’” 
1Kings20:4 Mwene a oYixrayeli aamwaakhula: “Kohaakhulela, pwiiyaaka ni mwenaaka – miyo ni sootheene kirinaaka ti sawinyu.”" 
1Kings20:5 Anamitthenga yaahokoleelatho wa Ahabi enamweerela: “Beni-Hadadi oneera ha: ‘Ntoko kooleenlaakani – kintthuna eparathaanyu*, eyuumaanyu yoorikaxa, axaarinyu ni anamwaniinyu." 
1Kings20:6 Ewooreene yeela omaalo, kinimwaarumiha arumeiyaaka weera ekungure empaanyu ya emwene ni impa sa asitokweenaanyu. Eniikuxe sootheene munoonelaanyu okhala etthu, ekiruuhelaka.’ ”" 
1Kings20:7 Mwene aahaathukumanyiha asitokweene ootheene a elapo, anaweerela: “Moone moota mulopwana owo ontannyeraawe milattu! Alamulelaka okuxiwa axaaraka, anamwanaaka, eparathaaka* ni eyuumaaka yoorikaxa, miyo nkaamukhoottihale.”" 
1Kings20:8 Asitokweene ni atthu ootheene yaamwaakhula: “Muhimwiiwelele hata muhaakhulele soonyesererihasawe.” 
1Kings20:9 Vano owo aawaakhula anamitthenga a Beni-Hadadi: “Mwamuleele mwene pwiiyaaka: ‘Murumeiyaanyu onoopaka sootheene mumvekenlaanyu emaara yoopacera, mene khangwera waakhulela yoonyesereriha yanaaveeli ela.’” Awosa yaattimula, enamuthalihera Beni-Hadadi yoowaakhula ya Ahabi." 
1Kings20:10 Vano Beni-Hadadi aamurumihela mutthenga mukinatho Ahabi: “Miluku sikittaruxaxe miyo kaahiphwataxa oSamariya. Kheehalaru etthu hata yoonarara.” 
1Kings20:11 Ahabi aamwaakhula: “Mwamuleele: ‘Muhiipe icipo sa owina ehinaaye omala ekhotto.’” 
1Kings20:12 Beni-Hadadi iiwa mutthenga ole owo awuraka ni mamwene makina muheemanimwaya anaalamulela anakhottwaawe: “Mwiirehererele owana!” Vano yaareherera owanano esidade. 
1Kings20:13 Eyo eri hiiho, mprofeeti mmoha aarowa wa Ahabi, mwene a oYixrayeli, anahima: “Yave oneera ha: ‘Moowoona anakhotto ala ancipalexa? Kinoowinnyerera mmatatanimwanyu olelo ni vano munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.’”" 
1Kings20:14 Ahabi aamukoha: “Taani anaapake yeeyo?” Mprofeeti aamwaakhula: “Yave oneera ha: ‘Anakhotto amiravo a asitokweene a ilapo eniipake yeeyo.’ ” Ahabi aamukohatho: “Taani anaapacere owana?” Mprofeeti aamwaakhula: “Ti nyuwo.” 
1Kings20:15 Vano Ahabi aahaathukumanyiha anakhotto amiravo a asitokweene a ilapo – ookwanaka asilopwana macira meeli ni miloko miraru neeli. Vahoolowaya aahaathukumanyiha anakhotto ootheene akina – asilopwana macira miloko mithannamiili. 
1Kings20:16 Yaavenya othana, Beni-Hadadi ni mamwene miloko miraru ni mamwene meeli iiraanannaawe ehapaliwaka muheemanimwaya." 
1Kings20:17 Anakhotto amiravo a asitokweene a ilapo yaapacera ovenya. Vano Beni-Hadadi aahaarumiha anamahottela, mwa yaawo yaamuthalihenre: “Aakhala asilopwana akina akhumme oSamariya.”" 
1Kings20:18 Owo aawaakhula: “Awosa hata erweelaka opaka murettele naari owana, mwaavare ni matata.”" 
1Kings20:19 Anakhotto amiravo a asitokweene a ilapo yaavenya musidade, anakhotto akina yaattharaka ottuliwaya," 
1Kings20:20 ni khula nakhotto aamwiiva mwiittanaawe. Hiiho awArami yaatthawasa ni aYixrayeli yaahaattharelela. Wa soothesene, Beni-Hadadi mwene a awArami aatthawa ni ekavalu* vamoha ni anamweettiha a ikavalu* akina." 
1Kings20:21 Mwene a oYixrayeli aavenya, anaphwanya ikavalu* ni ikaaro sa ikavalu*, ni awArami yaahononeleya." 
1Kings20:22 Vahoolowaya mprofeeti aarowa wa mwene a oYixrayeli, anamweerela: “Mwaasaase moota woowiilipihera, niwoko mwaahiyu mwene a awArami onimoorwa woowanananitho.”" 
1Kings20:23 Eyo eri hiiho, anamalaka a mwene a awArami yaamweerela: “Milukusaya siri miluku sa mmwaako, tivawo aniwinnaaya. Vaheera hiyo naawanano munghaawalawani, vekhaikhai nnimwaawina." 
1Kings20:24 Mpake ha: Mwaakuruxeke mamwene mukhottoni mwaahelaka asitokweenaahu. 
1Kings20:25 Mwattiye toko nipuro na anakhotto mwaayeleenlaanyu; waatta wa ikavalu* okhaleke omoharu ni hiihotho ikaaro sa ekhotto, weera naawaneno aYixrayeli munghawalawani. Vano, vekhaikhai, weiwo nnimwaawina.” Owo aahaakhulela, anapaka yeeyo." 
1Kings20:26 Eyaakha yaattharelana, Beni-Hadai aahaathukumanyiha anakhotto variyari wa awArami, anarowa wAfeki weera aawaneno aYixrayeli." 
1Kings20:27 aYixrayeli yaathukumanyihiwatho ni, emwaakhenleene pooso, yaavenyasa weera yaawaneno awArami. aYixrayeli yaakonenle ohoolowaya, ntoko mikuttula miili sa ipuri, vaheera awArami yaasareya mutuphini moothemwene." 
1Kings20:28 Mulopwana a Muluku aarowa wa mwene a aYixrayeli, anamweerela: “Yave oneera ha: ‘Yeenre awArami yuupuwelaka weera Yave ti Muluku a mmwaako ahikhanle a munghawalawani, Miyo kinoowinnyerera mmatatanimwanyu anakhotto awo oowaattaxa ni nyuwo munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.’”" 
1Kings20:29 Yaakonela ewehanneene ni vanihukuni nanaathannameeli yaapacenraaya owana. aYixrayeli yaawiiva anakhotto awArami 100 000 nihuku nimoha paahi. 
1Kings20:30 Yaahanlaawo yaatthawela esidade ya wAfeki, mwa weiwo yaamorenlaayawo exiri atthu 27 000 a yaale. Vano Beni-Hadadi aatthawelatho osidade, aniipitha mpaani ekwartu ekwartu." 
1Kings20:31 Asitokweenaawe yaamweerela: “Moone, nohiiwa weera mamwene a oYixrayeli ti a ikharari. Niroweke mpaka wa mwene a oYixrayeli niwanreene isaakho ni mikhoyi muxiko. Apaale anuurele okumaahu.”" 
1Kings20:32 Yaarowa wa mwene a oYixrayeli ewanreene isaakho yiivitikelenleene mikhoyi muxiko, enamweerela: “Murumeiyaanyu Beni-Hadadi oneera: ‘Dyoontte, muhikiive.’” Mwene a oYixrayeli aawaakhula: “Nlelo ori ni okumi? Ti munnaka.”" 
1Kings20:33 Asilopwana ale yaahoona masu ale ntoko eneneero yooreera, ni woowaakuveya yaahaakhulela: “Aani, ti munninyu.” Mwene aaweerela: “Mukiruuhele va. Aphiyakaru Beni-Hadadi, Ahabi aangweliha mukaaronimwawe.”" 
1Kings20:34 Beni-Hadadi aamweerela: “Kinimoohokoloxerani isidade atithaka yaakuxalaaya wa atithinyu. Mwatekihe emerekadwaanyu oDamasku, ntoko atithaka yaapankaaya oSamariya.” Ahabi aamwaakhula: “Paahi, nohiiwanana.” Vano yaahiiwanana ni Ahabi aamutthunihera orowa." 
1Kings20:35 Mmoha a maprofeeti, oolamuliwa ni Yave, aamweerela mukhwaawe: “Mukivulalihe!” Wa soothesene, mukhwaawe aakhootta." 
1Kings20:36 Tivawo mprofeeti aamweerenlaawe: “Mweenre muhimwiiwelela Yave, mwaavenyakaru, onimoovulalihani mwatto.” Avenyakaru mulopwana ole, mwatto aamukarawela, anamvulaliha." 
1Kings20:37 Mprofeeti aamphwanya mulopwana mukina, anamweerela: “Dyoontte, mukivulalihe!” Vano mulopwana aammana, anamvulaliha." 
1Kings20:38 Vanonto mprofeeti aarowa, aneemela mukhwipi wa musewe, angwehereraka mwene. Aahiitikinsiha, akuttelenleene owiitho." 
1Kings20:39 Mwene aaviraawe, mprofeeti aamweerela: “Murumeiyaanyu aari mukhottoni woovihaxa ni mukina aakiruuhela mwiittana aamvanraawe, anakeerela: Munkosoope mulopwana ola. Owo atthawa, munooliva ni okumaanyu, hoye hoye munooliva etalentu* ya eparatha*.”" 
1Kings20:40 Vano murumeiyaanyu apakaka itthu soohiyanahiyana sikina, namavariwa ole aatthawa.” Mwene a oYixrayeli aamwaakhula: “Nthorihelonanyu nikhaleke ntoko muhimalaanyu.”" 
1Kings20:41 Vano mprofeeti aakhunula ekhovaawe woowaakuveya ni mwene a oYixrayeli aamusuwela weera aari mmoha a maprofeeti. 
1Kings20:42 Aamweerela mwene: “Yave oneera ha: ‘Moomutapuxa mulopwana kaamulakenlaaka weera iiviwe. Tivawo oneeraaya waakakhanyiheye okumaanyu mwa okumaawe; mulokwaanyu mwa mulokwaawe.’” 
1Kings20:43 Mwene aarowa empaawe ya emwene oSamariya oonyoonyiweene ni ooriipiweene murima. 
1Kings21:1 Vano aakhala mulopwana iitthaniwa Naboti, muYizereyeli, aarino ematta ya iwuuva* oYizereyeli, vakhiviru wa empa ya Ahabi, mwene a oSamariya." 
1Kings21:2 Ahabi aamweerela Naboti: “Okivahe emattaawo ya iwuuva* weera kipakele nttimbe yeenre ekhuveela empaaka ya emwene. Vanipuroniwaya, kinimoovaha ematta ekina yooreerela, hoye hoye, watthuna, kinimooliva musurukhu woophwanela.”" 
1Kings21:3 Wa soothesene, Naboti aamwaakhula: “Mwa Nsina na Yave – nkingwera woovahani yoohiyeriwa ya makholowaaka.”" 
1Kings21:4 Hiiho Ahabi aarowa owaani oonyoonyiweene ni ooriipiweene murima niwoko Naboti aamweerenlaawe: “Nkingwera woovahani yoohiyeriwa ya makholowaaka.” Aahiixaatalela vabeettinivawe atthunkeene eyano, ahuluwenleene okina, akhoottaka oca." 
1Kings21:5 Mwaarawe Yezebeli aavolowa, anamukoha: “Munyoonyeringwe heeni? Muhincelani?”" 
1Kings21:6 Owo aamwaakhula: “Niwoko kaamweerela Naboti muYizereyeli: ‘Okithumihere emattaawo ya iwuuva* hoye hoye, watthuna kinimoovaha ematta ya iwuuva* ekina kaakakhanyihaka ni yeela.’ Vaheera aakeerela: ‘Nkingwera woovahani emattaaka ya iwuuva*.’”" 
1Kings21:7 Mwaarawe Yezebeli aamweerela: “Nyuwo muri mwene a oYixrayeli keera? Mvenye, muceeke ni muhakalale. Kinoowinnyererani ematta ya iwuuva* ya Naboti, muYizereyeli.”" 
1Kings21:8 Vano Yezebeli aalepa ikaratta mwa nsina na Ahabi, aattittelano munela woottittelano a mwene, anaarumihela asitokweene ni maneethi a esidade ya Naboti vamoha ni yoowo." 
1Kings21:9 Mukarattani mmwe aalepa: “Mulaleiyeke nihuku na otthuka ni munkilaathihe Naboti vanipuroni noottittimiheyaxa variyari wa atthu. 
1Kings21:10 Vano mwaakilaathihe anamoona oowootha eeli mukhwipimwawe emootheraka weera owo oomulapha Muluku nitho mwene. Vahoolowaya mwamukhumihere okerekhere wa esidade mumvonyaka maluku mpaka okhwa.” 
1Kings21:11 Vano asitokweene ni maneethi a esidade ya Naboti yaapaka ntoko Yezebeli aalamulenlaawe mukarattani aalepenlaawe. 
1Kings21:12 Yaalaleiya nihuku na otthuka enamukilaathiha Naboti vanipuroni noottittimiheya variyari wa atthu. 
1Kings21:13 Vano anamoona oowootha eeli yaahoorwa, enakilaathi mukhwipimwawe, enamoothera Naboti vamaithoni wa atthu yeeraka: “Naboti aamulapha Muluku nitho mwene.” Woowaakuveya atthu yaamukhumihera okerekhere esidade, enamvonya maluku mpaka okhwa." 
1Kings21:14 Vahoolowaya yaamurumihela mutthenga Yezebeli: “Naboti oovonyiwa maluku mpaka okhwa.” 
1Kings21:15 Iiwakaru weera Naboti ohookhwa, Yezebeli aamweerela Ahabi: “Mvenye, mwakuxe ematta ya iwuuva* ya Naboti, muYizereyeli, mwa yeele owo ookhoottihenraaweni woothumiherani. Vano Naboti khakhanle – ohookhwa.”" 
1Kings21:16 Iiwakaru Ahabi weera Naboti ohookhwa, aavenya, anakuxa ematta ya iwuuva* ya Naboti." 
1Kings21:17 Vano Yave aamweerela Eliya, muTixebi:" 
1Kings21:18 “Murowe weera mwamukumaneno Ahabi mwene a oYixrayeli onlamula oSamariya. Ori mmatta mwa iwuuva* ya Naboti, mwa yeeyo okunxaawe ntoko yawawe." 
1Kings21:19 Mwamuleele: ‘Yave oneera ha: ‘Moomwiiva mulopwana mukuxaka emattaawe.’ Vano mwamuleeletho: ‘Yave oneera ha: Vanipuroni alapwa alantaaya ephome ya Naboti, anoolatatho yawinyu – aani, ephomaanyu!’”" 
1Kings21:20 Ahabi aamweerela Eliya: “Vano mookiphwanya, mwiittanaaka.” Eliya aamwaakhula: “Kohoophwanyani, niwoko mohiithumiha mpakaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave." 
1Kings21:21 Yave oneera ha: ‘Kinimooruuhelani erisa! Kinoophwata ekhapiraanyu ya wuulopwanani oYixrayeli – ekhalaka epottha hoye hoye neethi. 
1Kings21:22 Kinoopakela emusaanyu ntoko kaapakenlaaka emusi ya Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati, nitho emusi ya Bahaxa, mwaana mulopwana a Ahiya, niwoko mootannya isarasaka mwaatthekihaka aYixrayeli.’" 
1Kings21:23 Mwaha wa Yezebeli Yave oneeratho: ‘Alapwa anoomukhuurela Yezebeli vaxirini ya oYizereyeli.’ 
1Kings21:24 Yaawo ari a Ahabi anookhuuriwa ni alapwa eniikhwele musidade ni ipalame sa wiirimu sinimwaaca eniikhwele mutuphini.” 
1Kings21:25 Khanakhale mukina ntoko Ahabi, mwa yoowo, aaviriyeliwe ni mwaariye Yezebeli, iithuminghe weera apake yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave." 
1Kings21:26 Aatthekaxa alapaka miluku sikina, ntoko awAmori yaapankaaya, mwa yaale Yave aawoomonlaawe ohoolo wa aYixrayeli." 
1Kings21:27 Iiwakaru Ahabi masu ale, aahaahula soowarasawe, anawara isaakho, anatthuka. Aahiixaatalela vasaakhoni, akhalaka oowiiyeviheene." 
1Kings21:28 Vano Yave aamweerela Eliya, muTixebi:" 
1Kings21:29 “Mohoona moota Ahabi iiyevinghaawe ohoolowaka? Eenre iiyeviha, nkirwa kimuruuhela erisa ela moolamulanimwawe, mene aani alamulaka mwaniye.”" 
1Kings22:1 Wa iyaakha tthaaru khawaakhanle owanawana variyari wa oYixrayeli ni wArami. 
1Kings22:2 Vaheera vayaakhani yanaararu, Yehoxafati, mwene a oYuda, aarowa omuxekura mwene a oYixrayeli." 
1Kings22:3 Mwene a oYixrayeli aaweerela asitokweenaawe: “Khamusuwenle weera oRamoti-Giliyade ori wawihu? Hata hiiho nri mwaasa omaala nihikuxaka wa mwene a awArami.” 
1Kings22:4 Vano owo aamukoha Yehoxafati: “Munookihoola owanano oRamoti-Giliyadi?” Yehoxafati aamwaakhula mwene a oYixrayeli: “Kinimookhaviherani vamoha ni anakhottwaaka ni ikavalusaka*.” 
1Kings22:5 Yehoxafati aamweerelatho mwene a oYixrayeli: “Mwaasaase toko miruku sa Yave.” 
1Kings22:6 Vano mwene a oYixrayeli aahaathukumanyiha maprofeeti wookwanaka asilopwana macira maxexe, anaakoha: “Kawananeke oRamoti-Giliyadi hoye hoye kihirowe?” Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Murowe, niwoko Yave onimwinnyerera oRamoti-Giliyadi mmatatanimwanyu.”" 
1Kings22:7 Mene Yehoxafati aamukoha: “Nno Khawowo mprofeeti mukina a Yavetho weera nimukohetho?” 
1Kings22:8 Ahabi aamwaakhula: “Ookhala nlelo mprofeeti mukina ookwana omukohakoha mwaha wa otthuna wa Yave, mene miyo kinoomuthanya, niwoko khanakileele itthu sooreera; onkileela soonanararu. Owo oniitthaniwa Mikaya, mwaana mulopwana a Imela.” Yehoxafati aamwaakhula: “Amwene, muheere hiiho.”" 
1Kings22:9 Vanonto mwene a oYixrayeli aamwiitthana mmoha a arumeiyaawe, anamweerela: “Mukiruuheleke woowaakuveya Mikaya, mwaana mulopwana a Imela!”" 
1Kings22:10 Mwene a oYixrayeli ni Yehoxafati, mwene a oYuda, yaakilaathiye vahiceniwaya sa emwene ewanreene mikaandyo sa emwene vanipuroni nimveeriwa* etrigu, vakhiviru wa mulako wa oSamariya. Maprofeeti ootheene yaathalihera yeeyo yuupuwelaaya weera ti otthuna wa Muluku ohoolo wa mamwene." 
1Kings22:11 Vano Zedekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Kenahana, aahiipakela manyaka a eyuuma, analaleiya: “Yave oneera ha: ‘Munimwaahomano manyaka ala awArami mpaka waamalamaliha.’ ”" 
1Kings22:12 Maprofeeti makinaawo yaalaleiya mooteene yoowo yeeraka: “Mwawaneno oRamoti-Giliyade ni munoowina, niwoko Yave onoowinnyerera mmatatani mwa mwene.”" 
1Kings22:13 Namutthenga aarongwe omwiitthana Mikaya aamweerela: “Moone, maprofeeti ootheene akina aneera weera mwene onoowina. Maswaanyu etthareke maswaaya.”" 
1Kings22:14 Wa soothesene, Mikaya aamwaakhula: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave – kingwera ohima paahi yeeyo Yave okileenlaawe.”" 
1Kings22:15 Aphiyakaru, mwene, aamukoha: “Mikaya, niroweke nawananeke oRamoti-Giliyadi, hoye hoye nihiroweke?” Mikaya aamwaakhula: “Mwawane ni munoowina, niwoko Yave onoowinnyerera mmatatani mwa mwene.”" 
1Kings22:16 Mwene aamweerela: “Koolipeliheke imaara ihai weera onkileela ekhaikhai ya Yave?” 
1Kings22:17 Vano Mikaya aamwaakhula: “Koowoona aYixrayeli ootheene emwareenleene mmattumuxani ntoko ikhondoolo soohikhalano mukukhuli ni Yave aaheera: ‘Atthu ala khaanono muneene. Khula mutthu a yaala aroweke owaani mmuretteleni.’” 
1Kings22:18 Mwene a oYixrayeli aamweerela Yehoxafati: “Kohooleelani weera imaara sootheene owo khanghima yooreera mwaha wa miyo, mene paahi itthu soonanara.”" 
1Kings22:19 Mikaya aapwaherera: “Mwiiwe masu a Yave: Koomoona Yave akilaantheene vahiceniwawe arukureeriweene ni anakhotto ootheene a wiirimu moonowaawe mulopwana ni muthiyana. 
1Kings22:20 Yave aaheera: ‘Taani anaamulokotthe Ahabi weera awaneno oRamoti-Giliyadi ni akhwelewo?’ Akina yaahima ekina ni akina yaahima ekina. 
1Kings22:21 Ommaleloni munepa mmoha waaheemela ohoolo wa Yave onamweerela: ‘Miyo kinoomulokottha.’ 
1Kings22:22 Yave aakoha: ‘Moota heeni?’ Munepa waamwaakhula: ‘Kinookhuma weera kakhale munepa woowootha vayanoni sa maprofeetaawe ootheene.’ Yave aaheerela: ‘Onoowera omulokottha. Orowe wapake yeeyo.’ 
1Kings22:23 Vano Yave ohiikaathi munepa woowootha vayanoni wa maprofeetaanyu ootheene ala. Yave oohima erisaanyu.” 
1Kings22:24 Zedekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Kenahana, aamwaattamela Mikaya, anammana owiitho, anamukoha: “Okikhumme moota heeni Munepa wa Yave weera wuulume ni nyuwo?”" 
1Kings22:25 Mikaya aamwaakhula: “Munoosuwela nihuku nenenenno muneeraanyu mwiivithavitheke ekwartu ekwartu.” 
1Kings22:26 Mwene aahaalamulela arumeiyaawe: “Munghokoloxere Mikaya wa Amoni, mutokweene a esidade ni wa Yowaxi, mwaana mulopwana a mwene" 
1Kings22:27 ni mwaamuleele: ‘Mwene oneera ha: Mungwalele mulopwana ola mukaliposo mumvahaka yooca vakhaani paahi ni maahi mpaka kineeraaka kihokolowe oolipeene.’” 
1Kings22:28 Mikaya aamwaakhula: “Nyuwo mwahokolowa oolipeene, Yave khuulumme mwa miyo.” Aapwaherera weera: “Mwiiwe nnenesene, atthu ootheene nyuwo yeeyo kinghimaaka!”" 
1Kings22:29 Vanonto mwene a oYixrayeli ni Yehoxafati, mwene a oYuda, yaarowa owanano oRamoti-Giliyadi." 
1Kings22:30 Mwene a oYixrayeli aamweerela Yehoxafati: “Kinrowa owana kihiwarenle sa emwene, mene nyuwo ngwareke sa emwenaanyu.” Vano mwene a oYixrayeli aahiirula, ni ooweeli yaarowa woowanani." 
1Kings22:31 Vanonto mwene a awArami aahaalamulela asitokweenaawe miloko miraru neeli a ikaaro sa ikavalu* sa ekhotto: “Muhingwanenoru mukina ahikhanle mwene a oYixrayeli.” 
1Kings22:32 Asitokweenaawe a ikaaro sa ikavalu* ale emoonakaru Yehoxafati, yaahuupuwela: “Vekhaikhai – ola ti mwene a oYixrayeli.” Tivawo yaamurincaaya weera engwaneno. Wa soothesene, Yehoxafati akhuwelaka," 
1Kings22:33 asitokweenaawe miloko miraru neeli a ikaaro sa ikavalu* yaasuwela weera khaahiyono mwene a oYixrayeli enamuhiya omuttharerela. 
1Kings22:34 Vaheera nakhotto mmoha aari mwaasa olatha muupaawe, anamulatha mwene a oYixrayeli amuhomaka mukhatoni mwa yoowiixaakiheraawe. Mwene aamulamulela namweettiha a ekaaro ya ekavalu* ya emwene: “Okikhumiheke mukhottoni, niwoko koovulalihiwa.”" 
1Kings22:35 Ekhotto yannapwaherera nihuku nenenno ni mwene a oYixrayeli eemexingweene mukaaroni ewananiwaka awArami. Ephome ya nikhwattanawe yaavuuvela vathi wa ekaaro ni wiilaka, aahookhwa." 
1Kings22:36 Naaneelaaya nsuwa waahiiwanyeya okhuweliwa wa anakhotto: “Khula mutthu aroweke esidadaawe ni elapwaawe!” 
1Kings22:37 Hiiho mwene aahookhwa, anaroihiwa oSamariya enamvithelawo." 
1Kings22:38 Yaarapiha ekaarowaawe vanrattani na oSamariya, mwa weiwo yaarapaayawo mapuuta, ni alapwa yaalata ephomaawe, ntoko Yave aahimmaawe." 
1Kings22:39 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Ahabi – sootheene aapankaawe, empa ya emwene aatenkaawe yaarino maino a etthepo ni isidade aalipinghaawe – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli." 
1Kings22:40 Ahabi aahookhwa anavithiwa ni makholowaawe ni mwanawe mulopwana Ahaziya ti aamurandenle. 
1Kings22:41 Vayaakhani yanaaxexe moolamulani mwa Ahabi, Yehoxafati, mwaana mulopwana a Asa, aathatuwa mwene a oYuda." 
1Kings22:42 Yehoxafati apaceraka olamula aarino iyaakha miloko miraru niitthanu sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha miloko miili niithanu. Amayawe yaari Azuba, mwaana muthiyana a Zilei." 
1Kings22:43 Aatthara ephiro ya atithawe Asa mwa soothesene, ahihapuwaka. Aapaka yeeyo eri yooreera vamaithoni wa Yave. Wa soothesene, khaamalinghe mapuro ootteela a miluku sikina, mwa seiye muloko waapwahereraaya oveleelela ni ohiserawo erubani*." 
1Kings22:44 Yehoxafati aakhalano murettele ni mwene a oYixrayeli. 
1Kings22:45 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Yehoxafati – sootheene aapankaawe ni ikhottosawe – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda." 
1Kings22:46 Aawoomola mweelaponi mapuuta asilopwana a impa sa miluku sikina yaahalahanlewo vahoolo wa olamula wa atithawe Asa. 
1Kings22:47 Ehuhuweene yeele khaariwo mwene wEdomi – ti pwattapwattha aalamula. 
1Kings22:48 Vano Yehoxafati aateka makula matokotoko a nakoso weera erowe wa wOferi ni yaruuhewo eyuuma yoorikaxa. Wa soothesene, khayaaphiyalewo niwoko yaattatta wEziyoni-Geberi." 
1Kings22:49 Ehuhuweene yeele Ahaziya, mwaana mulopwana a Ahabi, aamweerela Yehoxafati: “Anamweettihaaka a makula matokotoko yeetteke ni awinyu,” mene Yehoxafati aakhootta." 
1Kings22:50 Vanonto Yehoxafati aahookhwa, anavithiwa ni makholowaawe musidadeni mwa Davide, nikholonawe. Mwanawe mulopwana Yehorami ti aamurandenle." 
1Kings22:51 Vayaakhani muloko niithannapiili moolamulani mwa Yehoxafati, mwene a oYuda, Ahaziya, mwaana mulopwana a Ahabi, aathatuwa mwene a oYixrayeli oSamariya. Aalamula oYixrayeli iyaakha piili." 
1Kings22:52 Aapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave attharaka iphiro sa atithawe ni amayawe ni iphiro sa Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati, mwa yoowo aatthekinghe aYixrayeli." 
1Kings22:53 Aamurumeela ni aamulapa Bahali* atannyaka isara sa Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, ntoko yaapankaaya atithawe." 
2Kings1:1 Ahabi akhwaakaru, aMowabi yaahaavaanya aYixrayeli." 
2Kings1:2 Vano nihuku nimoha Ahaziya aamora vaxanelani ya ekwartwaawe ya osulu oSamariya, anavulalaxa. Aahaarumiha anamitthenga aweerelaka: “Murowe, mwamukoherere Bahali-Zebubi, muluku a wEkeroni kaariki kilame eretta ela.”" 
2Kings1:3 Vanonto ndyelo a Yave aamweerela Eliya, muTixebi: “Murowe, mwaakumaneno anamitthenga a mwene a oSamariya, mwaakohaka: ‘Apaale Khoowowo muluku oYixrayeli nyuwosa murowaka omukoherera Bahali-Zebubi, muluku a wEkeroni?’" 
2Kings1:4 Vano, Yave oneera ha: ‘Nyuwo khamulama. Vekhaikhai, munimookhwa!’” Vahoolowaya Eliya aapwaha." 
2Kings1:5 Anamitthenga ehokoleelaka wa mwene, owo aahaakoha: “Heeni muhokolongwaanyu?”" 
2Kings1:6 Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Mulopwana mmoha oonikumanano, ananeerela: ‘Muhokoleele wa mwene oorumingheni ni mwamuleele: “Yave oneera ha: Apaale Khoowowo muluku oYixrayeli nyuwosa murowaka omukoherera Bahali-Zebubi, muluku a wEkeroni? Tivawo nyuwo muneeraanyu muhilame. Vekhaikhai, munimookhwa!” ’ ”" 
2Kings1:7 Mwene aahaakoha: “Mulopwana munkumanannaanyu ooleenleni yeeyo ti ooweera hai?” 
2Kings1:8 Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Owo owanre ekuwo ya exapala iiphitelenleene laamba a exapala.” Ahaziya aawaakhula: “Ti Eliya, muTixebi.”" 
2Kings1:9 Vano mwene aamurumiha mutokweene a anakhotto miloko mithanu vamoha ni anakhottwaawe omwaasa Eliya. Mutokweene ole aamphwannye Eliya akilaantheene vasulu nttumuxa, anamweerela: “Mulopwana a Muluku mwene onoolamulani: ‘Mukhuruwe!’”" 
2Kings1:10 Eliya aamwaakhula mutokweene ole: “Miyo kaareene mulopwana a Muluku, okhuruwe mooro wiirimu woohiseeni nyuwo ni anakhottwaanyu miloko mithanu!” Vano mooro waakhuruwa wiirimu, onamuhisa mutokweene ni anakhottwaawe." 
2Kings1:11 Mwa yeeyo mwene aamurumiha mutokweene mukina a anakhotto miloko mithanu vamoha ni anakhottwaawe omwaasa Eliya. Mutokweene ole aamweerela: “Mulopwana a Muluku mwene onlamulela weera mukhuruwe woowaakuveya!” 
2Kings1:12 Eliya aamwaakhula mutokweene ole: “Miyo kaareene mulopwana a Muluku, okhuruwe mooro wiirimu woohiseeni nyuwo ni anakhottwaanyu miloko mithanu!” Vano mooro waakhuruwatho wiirimu, onamuhisa mutokweene ni anakhottwaawe." 
2Kings1:13 Vanonto mwene aamurumiha mutokweene anaararu a anakhotto miloko mithanu vamoha ni anakhottwaawe omwaasa Eliya. Mutokweene ole aawela vanttumuxani, anamukokhorela Eliya, amudyoonttelelaka: “Dyoontte, mulopwana a Muluku, muureleke okumaaka ni okumi wa asilopwana miloko mithanu ala ari arumeiyaanyu!”" 
2Kings1:14 Koosuwela weera mooro waahaakhuruwela wiirimu waahisaka asitokweene eeli oopacera ni anakhottwaaya ootheene. Vaheera muureleke okumaaka!” 
2Kings1:15 Ndyelo a Yave aamweerela Eliya: “Mukhuruwe ni yoowo. Muhimoove.” Tivawo Eliya aavennyaawe, anarowa ni yoowo wuuluma ni mwene." 
2Kings1:16 Aphiyakaru aamweerela mwene: “Apaale khoowowo muluku oYixrayeli nyuwosa murowaka omukoherera Bahali-Zebubi, muluku a wEkeroni? Tivawo muneeraanyu muhilame. Vekhaikhai, munimookhwa!”" 
2Kings1:17 Vano Ahaziya aahookhwa ntoko Yave aahimalaawe mwa Eliya. Eenre Ahaziya ahikhalano mwaana mulopwana, Yorami aavariwa omwene. Eyo yeereiye vayaakhani yanaaveeli ya moolamulani mwa Yehorami, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoxafati, mwene a oYuda." 
2Kings1:18 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Ahaziya ni sootheene aapankaawe – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings2:1 Yave aatthunnaawe omuweliha Eliya wiirimu mpheyoni, Eliya ni Elixa yeera evenyaka oGiligali." 
2Kings2:2 Eliya aamweerela Elixa: “Muhaleke wenno – Yave ookirumiha oBeteli.” Wa soothesene, Elixa aamwaakhula: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave ni okumaanyu: nkoohiyani.” Vano yaarowa oBeteli." 
2Kings2:3 Nakupa a maprofeeti a oBeteli aamwaattamela Elixa, anamukoha: “Moosuwela weera Yave onoongweliha pwiiyaanyu olelo wiirimu oomwalamwalihakani ni nyuwo?” Elixa aamwaakhula: “Koosuwela, mene muhuulume yeeyo.”" 
2Kings2:4 Vano Eliya aamweerela Elixa: “Muhaleke wenno; Yave ookirumiha oYeriko.” Wa soothesene, Elixa aamwaakhula: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave ni okumaanyu: nkoohiyani.” Vano yaarowa oYerkiko." 
2Kings2:5 Nakupa a maprofeeti oYeriko aamwaattamela Elixa, anamukoha: Moosuwela weera Yave onoongweliha pwiiyaanyu olelo wiirimu ammwalamwalihaka ni nyuwo?” Elixa aamwaakhula: “Koosuwela, mene muhuulume yeeyo.”" 
2Kings2:6 Vano Eliya aamweerela Elixa: “Muhaleke wenno; Yave ookirumiha oYordanu.” Wa soothesene, Elixa aamwaakhula: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave ni okumaanyu: nkoohiyani.” Vano yaarowa vamoha." 
2Kings2:7 Nakupa a maprofeeti miloko mithanu aarowa, aneemela ottai ottai wa nipuro Eliya ni Elixa yeemenlaaya muxerexere Yordanu." 
2Kings2:8 Eliya aarula mukaandyowaawe, anapinda, anamanelano maahi. Maahi yaakawanyeya ni ooweeli ale yaalapuwasa vathi wuumaleene." 
2Kings2:9 Elapuwakaru, Eliya aamukoha Elixa: “Mukileele, koopakeleni eheeni kihinaaye okuxiwa kirakamelihiwaka ni nyuwo?” Elixa aamwaakhula: “Mukikhaliheke namahiyeriwa mutokweene a munepaanyu wa okhala mprofeeti.”" 
2Kings2:10 Eliya aamweerela: “Moovekela etthu yoorikaxa. Wa soothesene, mwakoona miyo kaamwalamwalihiwaka ni nyuwo, munoophwanya mvenkaanyu. Mwaahikoona, khamuphanya.”" 
2Kings2:11 Yeettaka ni elokololaka hiihaale, wootutuxereya yaakhumelela ekaaro ya mooro yeettihiwaka ni ikavalu* sa mooro, sinaamwalamwaliha eeli ale ni Eliya aawelihiwa wiirimu muyuupuruni." 
2Kings2:12 Elixa oonakaru yeeyo, aakhuwela: “Atithaka! Atithaka! Mwaari ntoko ekaaro ya ekhotto ni anamweettiha a ikavalu* sa oYixrayeli!” Vano Elixa ahaaweraawe omoonatho, aakuxa soowarasawe, anaahula eriyariru." 
2Kings2:13 Aakuxa mukaandyo wa Eliya waamonre, anahokolowa, aneemela mukerekhere Yordanu." 
2Kings2:14 Vano aakuxa mukaandyo waamonre wa Eliya, anamanelano maahi, eeraka: “Ori woowi Yave, Muluku a Eliya?” Amanakaru maahi, awo yaakawanyeya, analapuwa." 
2Kings2:15 Nakupa a maprofeeti aarweela oYeriko oonakaru yeeyo, aaheera: “Munepa wa okhala mprofeeti wa Eliya woomukhuruwela Elixa.” Aarowa omukumanano, anuuramela ohoolowawe." 
2Kings2:16 Awosa yaamweerela: “Moone, hiyo arumeiyaanyu nookhalano asilopwana miloko mithanu oolipa. Awosa eroweke yamwaasaaseke pwiiyaanyu. Apaale Munepa wa Yave woomukuxa, onamuhiya vamwaako hoye hoye vareyareyani nikina.” Elixa aawaakhula: “Hoye. Muhaarumihe.”" 
2Kings2:17 Wa soothesene, yannamunyeserera mpaka waakhulela, anaweerela: “Mwaarumiheke atthu awo.” Vano yaahaarumiha asilopwana miloko mithanu, enamwaasaasa Eliya mahuku mararu, mene khayaamphwannye." 
2Kings2:18 Awosa ehokoleelakaru wa Elixa aahanle oYeriko, aaweerela: “Kaaweerelani weera muhirowe.”" 
2Kings2:19 Asilopwana a esidade yaamweerela Elixa: “Pwiiyaahu, ntoko munoonaanyu, esidade ela yootekeya mweelaponi yooreera, mene maahi ari oonanara ni etthaya yohuumelela.”" 
2Kings2:20 Aaweerela: “Muhele maakha mmwaapuni munyowani, ni mukiruuheleke.” Vano yaamuruuhela." 
2Kings2:21 Elixa aarowa wa ophattuweloni, anavonyerawo maakha eeraka: “Yave oneera ha: ‘Kootteeliha maahi ala. Khayiivatho hata etthaya khayuumelelatho.’”" 
2Kings2:22 Vano mpaka olelo maahi ampwaherera ootteeleene, ntoko Elixa eenraawe." 
2Kings2:23 Okhuma vaavaale, Elixa aarowa oBeteli. Eettaka hiihaale mphironi, amiravo akina yaarweela osidade yaamwaattamela, enapacera omutheya emweerelaka: “Owele nantari! Owele!”" 
2Kings2:24 Aarukunuwa, anaaweha, anaalapha mwa Nsina na Yave. Vano ursu* eeli yaakhumasa mutuphini, enaanyaanya amiravo miloko mixexe neeli." 
2Kings2:25 Aapwaherera arowaka mwaako Karimeli, ni okhuma vaavaale aahokoleela oSamariya." 
2Kings3:1 Vayaakhani yanaamuloko niithannatthaaru moolamulani mwa Yehoxafati, mwene a oYuda, Yorami aathatuwa mwene a oYixrayeli oSamariya ni aalamula iyaakha muloko ni piili." 
2Kings3:2 Aapaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave, mene kheenlikana ntoko yoonanara atithawe ni amayawe yaapankaaya. Aaphwata nluku nootteeliheriwa Bahali* atithawe yaapankaaya." 
2Kings3:3 Wa soothesene, aatthara soottheka sa Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati, mwa seiye aatthekinghaaweno aYixrayeli, ahihiyaka soottheka iye." 
2Kings3:4 Vano Mexa, mwene a oMowabe aakhalano ikhondoolo sincipale ni aanyesererihiwa omvaha mwene a oYixrayeli ikhondoolo 100 000 nitho mapururu a anapunci 100 000." 
2Kings3:5 Vaheera akhwaakaru Ahabi, mwene a oMowabe aamvaanelela mwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings3:6 Tivawo ehuhuweene yeele mwene Yorami aakhuminghaawe oSamariya aathukumanyihaka anakhotto ootheene a oYixrayeli. 
2Kings3:7 Aamurumihelatho mutthenga ola Yehoxafati, mwene a oYuda: “Mwene a oMowabe ookivaanelela. Munookihoola owanano oMowabe?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Kinimookhaviherani vamoha ni anakhottwaaka ni ikavalusaka*.” Eniikhale anakhotto amohamoharu." 
2Kings3:8 Yehoxafati aamukoha: “Ninrowa waawanano mpatta heeni?” Yorami aamwaakhula: “Nivireke munikareni na wEdomi.” 
2Kings3:9 Vano mwene a oYixrayeli aarowa vamoha ni mamwene a oYuda ni a wEdomi. Yeettiyeene mahuku mathannameeli, anakhatto yaahaamalela maahaaya ni a axinamaaya." 
2Kings3:10 Mwene a oYixrayeli aakhuwela: “Eya! Weeraka Yave onithukumanyinghe mamwene ooraaru hiyo weera aninnyerere mmatatani mwa aMowabe?” 
2Kings3:11 Vaheera Yehoxafati aamukoha: “Weeraka khawowo va mprofeeti a Yave weera nimukoherere Yave mwa yoowo?” Mutokweene mmoha a anakhotto a mwene a oYixrayeli aamwaakhula: “Elixa, mwaana mulopwana a Xafati, ori va. Aari namakhavihera a Eliya.”" 
2Kings3:12 Yehoxafati aaheera: “Masu a Yave ari ni yoowo.” Tivawo mwene a oYixrayeli, Yehoxafati ni mwene a awEdomi yaarongwaaya wuuluma ni yoowo." 
2Kings3:13 Elixa aamweerela mwene a oYixrayeli: “Nkinoopwatthelani. Murowe mwaakoherere maprofeeti a atithinyu ni amayinyu.” Mwene a oYixrayeli aamwaakhula: “Hoye, niwoko ti Yave onithukumanyinghe hiyo mamwene mararu weera aninnyerere mmatatani mwa aMowabe.”" 
2Kings3:14 Elixa aamweerela: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave a ikuru sootheene, mwa Yoowo kinimurumeelaaka, weera ahaakhanle Yehoxafati, mwene a oYuda, miyo nkoowehani, hata nkoopwatthani." 
2Kings3:15 Vano mukiruuhele namakita.” Vanonto namakita amwiipaawe, ikuru sa Yave saamukhuruwela Elixa," 
2Kings3:16 aneera: “Yave oneera ha: Muthipe ihime sincipale nreyareya nenenenna," 
2Kings3:17 niwoko Yave oneeratho: Nyuwosa khamoona epheyo hata epula, wa soothesene, nreyareya nna nnoosareya maahi ni nyuwosa, mihuwosanyu ni axinamaanyu akina munoowuramo." 
2Kings3:18 Mene wa Yave, nlelo eyo ekhaani – Owo onoowinnyereratho aMowabe mmatatanimwanyu." 
2Kings3:19 Munookuxa isidade soolipihiwa nitho isidade sootthuneyaxa sootheene. Munimuuha nyiri siniima sootheene, munimuuheela ihime sootheene ni munoosariha maluku imatta sooreera sootheene.”" 
2Kings3:20 Oxaawaya, mweehuhuni ya oveleela, maahi yaaweela mpatta wa wEdomi ni elapo yaasareya maahi." 
2Kings3:21 Vanonto aMowabe ootheene yaahiiwa weera mamwene yaahoorwa waawanano. Asilopwana ootheene yaawera waakuxa akapwitthi yaahiitthaniwa weera ethataane omwiinanoni – ekhalaka amiravo hoye hoye asitokweene. 
2Kings3:22 Yaavenyaaya oxeexelo, nsuwa naatutha mmaahini. aMowabe ereene ottai ottai, maahi yoona oxeera, ntoko ephome." 
2Kings3:23 Yaaheerelana: “Ti ephome! Nnoona ntoko mamwene awo yaawana yaawori, yiivanaka. Vano aMowabe, naahuhule!”" 
2Kings3:24 Wa soothesene, aMowabe ephiyakaru yaakonenlaayawo aYixrayeli, awosa yaahaawanano enawoomola aMowabe. Yaavolowa mweelaponi ya oMowabe enaaphwatasa." 
2Kings3:25 Yaaphwata isidade ni khula mulopwana aavonyera maluku mmatta mooruwereya moothemwene. Yaahuuheela iihime sootheene, enuuha nyiri sootheene siima. oKiri-Haseti paahi ti waahalanne maluku mmapuronimwaya, vaheera asilopwana ekunxeene ikwambala yaarica esidade ele, enawanano." 
2Kings3:26 Mwene a oMowabe oonakaru weera aangwiniwa, aahaathukumanyiha anakhotto ekunxeene ikatana macira mathannameeli weera yiilipihere ovira yamphwanye mwene a awEdomi, mene yaahooceela." 
2Kings3:27 Vano aamukuxa mwaniye a ntthaara, eyo tiiyo namarandelaawe, anamwiivela ntoko yooveleela vaxirini ya esidade. Eyo yaahaanyoonyihaxa aYixrayeli moota wooweera yaavenyasa, enahokoleela elapwaaya." 
2Kings4:1 Mwaara a mulopwana mmoha aari mpatta wa nakupa a maprofeeti aarowa omuleela Elixa: “Murumeiyaanyu, aiyaka, ahookhwa. Moosuwela weera yaamuttittimiha Yave. Vaheera aahoorwa mulipa a okoongoriha ni owo ontthuna waakuxa anamwanaaka asilopwana eeli weera ekhale ipottha.”" 
2Kings4:2 Elixa aamukoha: “Kookhaviherekeni moota heeni? Mukileele murinaanyu owaani” Naamukhweli aamwaakhula: “Murumeiyaanyu khanono etthu mpaani nihikhanle nipoottoro na makhura.” 
2Kings4:3 Elixa aamweerela: “Murowe, moolihe mapoottoro wa aximwaattamanaanyu ootheene. Mooliheke mancipale." 
2Kings4:4 Vahoolowaya mwavolowe mpaanimwanyu ni anamwanaanyu muwalaka nsele. Khula nipoottoro mwasarihe makhura ni mwamwalamwalihe ni yaawo muneeraanyu mwasarihe.” 
2Kings4:5 Aapwaha, aniiwalela mpaani ni anamwanaawe, anapacera osariha mapoottoro yaamuruuhenlaaya." 
2Kings4:6 Mapoottoro ootheene esareiyeene, aamweerela mwanawe mulopwana mmoha: “Mukiruuheletho.” Mene owo aamwaakhula: “Aamala.” Vano makhura yaahiya okhuma." 
2Kings4:7 Naamukhweli ole aarowa, anamuthalihera mulopwana a Muluku ni Elixa aamweerela: “Murowe, mwathumihe makhura ni mwalive ikoongorisanyu. Nyuwo vamoha ni anamwaniinyu mukhalekeno musurukhu ohanle.”" 
2Kings4:8 Nihuku nimoha Elixa aarowa oXunemi. Aakhalawo muthiyana mukina oopuha mwa yoowo aamudyoonttelenlaawe weera ace owannyawe. Tivawo, khula emaara Elixa aaviraawewo, anneemela weera acewo." 
2Kings4:9 Muthiyana ole aaweerela aiyawe: “Koosuwela weera mulopwana owo omviraxa va ti mulopwana ootteela a Muluku. 
2Kings4:10 Nimureherereleke ekwartu ekhaani ya osulu, niikaathikiwo ekaama, meesa, ehice ni onyaari. Vano khula emaara aneeraawe anixekure, akhalekemo.”" 
2Kings4:11 Nihuku nimoha Elixa aaphiyawe, aawela okwartuniwawe, aniixaatalela." 
2Kings4:12 Aamweerela murumeiyaawe Gehazi: “Wamwiitthane muXanemi.” Owo aamwiitthana ni muthiyana aaheemela ohoolo wa Elixa. 
2Kings4:13 Elixa aamweerela Gehazi: “Wamuleele: ‘Nyuwosa mwaakhalano muteko ola niwoko na hiyo. Noopakelekeni eheeni? Apaale muntthuna weera miyo kuulume ni mwene hoye hoye mutokweene a anakhotto mwaha wa nyuwosa?’ ” Owo aamwaakhula: “Hoye, nri nnenesene eriyari ya atthwaahu.”" 
2Kings4:14 Vano Elixa aamukoha Gehazi: “Kimpakeleni?” Gehazi aamwaakhula: “Owo khayanre ni aiyawe ahuuluvala.” 
2Kings4:15 Vanonto Elixa aamweerela: “Wamwiitthanetho.” Gehazi aamwiitthana muthiyana ole ni owo aaheemela vamulako wa ekwartu. 
2Kings4:16 Elixa aamweerela: “Mwaahiyu ehuhuweene yeela, nyuwo munoomwaakanda mwaana.” Muthiyana ole aamwaakhula: “Hoye mulopwana a Muluku, muhimutthebwe murumeiyaanyu!”" 
2Kings4:17 Muthiyana aarupala, anamuyara mwaana mulopwana eyaakha yaattharelana ehuhuweene yeele, ntoko Elixa aamweerenlaawe." 
2Kings4:18 Mwaana ole aahunnuwa ni nihuku nimoha aarowa wa atithawe yaari ni anamahepha. 
2Kings4:19 Wootutuxereya aapacera owiitthana atithawe akhuwelaka: “Muruwaaka! Muruwaaka!” Atithawe yaamweerela murumeiyi mmoha: “Omuronghe wa amayawe.” 
2Kings4:20 Murumeiyi aamurongha wa amayawe. Amayawe yaamukilaathiha mwaana ole vaciroroni mpaka othana, anakhwa." 
2Kings4:21 Amayawe yaangweliha okwartuni ya mulopwana a Muluku, enamwaatalela vabeettini, enakhuma ewalaka nsele." 
2Kings4:22 Muthiyana aawiitthana aiyawe anaweerela: “Dyoontte munrumihe mmoha a arumeiyaanyu ni buuru mmoha weera kuulumeno mulopwana a Muluku. Nkinkela opisa.” 
2Kings4:23 Aiyawe yaamukoha: “Heeni olelo? Khoohiyono mweeri munyowani hata eSaabadu?” Owo aawaakhula: “Muhipwatthe yeeyo.” 
2Kings4:24 Muthiyana aalamulela omureherera buuru, anamweerela murumeiyaawe: “Naakuveke; weemeleke paahi koolamulelaka.”" 
2Kings4:25 Vano aavenya, anamphwanya mulopwana a Muluku vamwaako Karimeli. Mulopwana a Muluku aamoonnaawe ottai ottai, aamweerela murumeiyaawe Gehazi: “Woone, onnarwa muXunami!" 
2Kings4:26 Omuciceere ni wamukohe: ‘Muri salaama? Aiyinyu ari salaama? Mwaninyu ori salaama?’ ” Muthiyana aamwaakhula: “Sootheene sinimweetta nnene.” 
2Kings4:27 Aphiyakaru wa mulopwana a Muluku vamwaako, owo aamukhubaara inaawosawe. Gehazi aahoorwa weera amususihe, mene mulopwana a Muluku aamweerela Gehazi: “Omuhiyeke! Owo oothananaxa, mene Yave kheewowo okoonihenraawe akikhuwaka nthowa na othananawawe.”" 
2Kings4:28 Muthiyana aamweerela Elixa: “Ii! Pwiiyaaka, weeraka miyo kaahoovekelani mwaana mulopwana? Nkooleenleni weera ‘Muhikilokotthe.’”" 
2Kings4:29 Elixa aamweerela Gehazi: “Wiitthukele mukaandyowaawo ni laamba, okuxe ekopowaaka ni otthimakelewo. Wakumana ni mutthu, ohimuulumihe ni mukina awuulumiha, ohimwaakhule. Wiikaathere ekopowaaka owiittho wa mwaana.”" 
2Kings4:30 Vaheera amayawe mwaana mulopwana yaamweerela: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave ni mwa okumaanyu – mwahala nkinrowa.” Tivawo Elixa aavennyaawe, anamutthara." 
2Kings4:31 Gehazi ti aapacenre, aniikaathera ekopo owiittho wa mwaana, mene owo khuulumme hata khaaramaramme. Vano Gehazi aahokoleela wa Elixa anamweerela: “Mwaana nlelo ori ookhweene.”" 
2Kings4:32 Elixa aphiyakaru vaate, aamphwanya mwaana ookhweene vabeettiniwawe." 
2Kings4:33 Aavolowa okwartuni, anawala nsele, anamvekela Yave." 
2Kings4:34 Vano aawela vabeettini, anamukhubaara mwaana – eyaano ni eyaano; maitho ni maitho ni matata ni matata. Owo aamukhubaara hiihaale mpaka erutthu ya mwaana oviha." 
2Kings4:35 Elixa aavenya, aneetteetta mukwartuni, anawela vabeettini anamukhubaaratho mwaana. Vano mwaana ole aahaaxamura imaara ithannapiili, anahula maithwaawe!" 
2Kings4:36 Elixa aamwiitthana Gehazi, anamweerela: “Wamwiitthane muXunami.” Aamwiitthana ni muthiyana aphiyakaru, Elixa aamweerela: “Munkuxe mwaninyu.”" 
2Kings4:37 Aavolowa, anakokhorela inaawosawe, uuramaka mpaka vathi. Vano aamukuxa mwaniye, anakhuma." 
2Kings4:38 Elixa aahokoleela oGiligali ni ehuhu ele yaakhala etala mweelaponi ele. Nakupa a maprofeeti athukumanneene ni yoowo, Elixa aamweerela murumeiyaawe: “Weeye ekarikho etokotoko ni owaapeele nrupantakanse asilopwana ala.”" 
2Kings4:39 Mmoha a yaale aarowa mutuphini waasa yoowaapeya, anaphwanya mwiri mmoha wooramba woohisuwanyeya. Aarukula soowiimasaya, anasariha mmukaandyonimwawe. Ahokolowakaru, aakakatthanya, anaapeya nrupantakanse, aaroohisuwelaru soowiima iye." 
2Kings4:40 Yooca yaarumeeliwa atthu ni ecaakaru, yaapacerasa omukhuwelela Elixa: “Ii! Mulopwana a Muluku – wookhalamo okhwa mukarikhoni!” Ni khayaawenre ocatho." 
2Kings4:41 Elixa aaweerela: “Mukiruuheleke ephepa.” Owo aahiitthela mukarikhoni mwa nrupantakanse, anaweerela: “Mwaarumeele atthu ootheene weera ece.” Vano mukarikhoni khawaakhanletho okhwa." 
2Kings4:42 Aahoowa mulopwana mmoha a oBahali-Xalixa, amuruuhelaka mulopwana a Muluku ipaawu miloko miili sa esevada* saapakiwe ni soohepha soopacera sa etrigu nitho makala makithi makina. Elixa aamweerela murumeiyaawe: “Waarumeele ootheene.”" 
2Kings4:43 Murumeiyaawe aamukoha: “Nkaarumeele hai yeela asilopwana ncira?” Wa soothesene, Elixa aamweerela: “Waarumeele ootheene, niwoko Yave oneera ha: ‘Awosa animooca mpaka ohala.’”" 
2Kings4:44 Vano ole aahaarumeela asilopwana ootheene, enaca mpaka ohala, ntoko Yave aahimalaawe." 
2Kings5:1 Vanonto Nahamani aari mutokweene a anakhotto a mwene a awArami. Aari oottittimiheyaxa vamaithoni wa pwiiyaawe ni oosuwanyeya niwoko mwa yoowo, Yave aangwiniha awArami. Aari nakhotto ooweraxa, mene aahaawa makokho." 
2Kings5:2 Vano nakupa mmoha a anakhotto a awArami aarowa, anamvara mwaamwali muYixrayeli mmoha ni owo aamurumeela mwaarawe Nahamani." 
2Kings5:3 Owo aaweerela apwiyaawe: “Eya! Pwiiyaaka Nahamani aarongwe omukumanano mprofeeti ori oSamariya, saano alammeene!”" 
2Kings5:4 Nahamani aarowa omuthalihera pwiiyaawe yeeyo mwaamwali muYixrayeli aahimmaawe. 
2Kings5:5 Mwene a awArami aamwaakhula: “Vekhaikhai, murowe. Kinimoovahani ekaratta ya omwinnyerera mwene a oYixrayeli.” Nahamani aattimula akunxeene italentu* muloko sa eparatha*, ixekeli* macira miloko mithannamosa sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni soowara muloko sootteettheya." 
2Kings5:6 Ekaratta aamuronghenlaawe mwene a oYixrayeli yeera: “Kinoorumihelani ekaratta ela vamoha ni murumeiyaaka Nahamani weera munlamihe makokho.” 
2Kings5:7 Mwene a oYixrayeli asomakaru ekaratta, aahaahula ikuwosawe eeraka: “Apaale miyo Muluku? Weeraka kinoowera ovaha okumi hoye hoye okhwa? Heeni mulopwana owo onkirumihelaawe mutthu weera kimulamihe makokho? Moone, owo ontthuna okiinanano!”" 
2Kings5:8 Elixa, mulopwana a Muluku, iiwakaru weera mwene a oYixrayeli aahaahula ikuwosawe, aamurumihela mutthenga ola: “Mwaahulenleni ikuwosanyu? Mulopwana owo arweeke wa miyo ni owo onoosuwela weera ookhala mprofeeti oYixrayeli!”" 
2Kings5:9 Vano Nahamani aarowa ni ikavalusawe* ni ikaarosawe, aneemela vamulako wa empa ya Elixa." 
2Kings5:10 Elixa aamurumihela namutthenga wa yoowo amweerelaka: “Murowe mwarape imaara ithannapiili mmoolokoni Yordanu ni erutthwaanyu enoolama ecapeyeke.” 
2Kings5:11 Wa soothesene, Nahamani aapwaha oonyoonyiweene eeraka: “Miyo kuupuwela weera owo aamukhuma weera akaakhelele eemenleene iitthaneke Nsina na Yave Mulukwaawe, attikitthaka makhwattaaka ni ntatanawe, ni hiiho aamukilamiha makokho." 
2Kings5:12 Abana ni Farepari, nyooloko sa oDamasku, ti sooreerela soopwaha nyooloko sa oYixrayeli. Miyo kaamurapamo mpaka olama?” Vano aapwahawo oonyoonyiweene." 
2Kings5:13 Arumeiyi a Nahamani yaamwaattamela, enamweerela: “Tiithi, mprofeeti oovekenleni etthu yoorika, khamwaapaka? Wootepaxa oweerelani paahi: ‘Mwarape ni munoolama.’”" 
2Kings5:14 Vano aarowa, anavolowa muYordanu, ananeela imaara ithannapiili, ntoko mulopwana a Muluku aamulamulenlaawe, anacapeya erutthwaawe yaatteettheya ntoko ya mwaana." 
2Kings5:15 Vahoolowaya Nahamani ni arumeiyaawe ootheene yaahokoleela vaate wa mulopwana a Muluku. Aaheemela ohoolo wa Elixa, anamweerela: “Vano koosuwela weera khoowoworu muluku mukina mweelaponi yootheene ahikhanle Muluku a oYixrayeli. Dyoontte, mwaakhele yoovaha ya murumeiyaanyu.”" 
2Kings5:16 Mprofeeti aamwaakhula: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave, mwa Yoowo kinimurumeelaaka, nkirwa kaakhelaru.” Nahamani aamunnyesereriharu, aakhootta." 
2Kings5:17 Nahamani aamweerela: “Mweenre mukhootta yoovaha, mukitthunihere okuxa etthaya olemelawaya angweraaya oteexa abuuru eeli, niwoko murumeiyaanyu kharwa apakelatho sooveleela soohisa ni sa enama miluku sikina ahikhanle Yave." 
2Kings5:18 Vaheera Yave akilevelele etthu emoha: pwiiyaaka aavolowaka mpaani mwa muluku Rimoni weera amulapemo, ontthuneyatho weera miyo kamukokhorele eenre anakaakanda. Yave akilevelele etthu eyo.”" 
2Kings5:19 Elixa aamwaakhula: “Murowe mmuretteleni.” Nahamani axuurakamenleene," 
2Kings5:20 Gehazi, murumeiyi a Elixa, mulopwana a Muluku, aahiixeerela: “Pwiiyaaka oomureerelaxiwa Nahamani ngwArami ahitthunaka soovahasawe. Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave weera kinoomutthimakela weera koone kaariki kakuxe mpatta wa itthusawe.”" 
2Kings5:21 Vano aamutthimakela Nahamani. Nahamani amoonakaru atthimakaka, aakhuruwa mukaaroni weera amukumaneno. Aamukoha: “Salaama?”" 
2Kings5:22 Gehazi aamwaakhula: “Salaama. Pwiiyaaka ookiruma wooleelani: ‘Asilopwana eeli a nakupa a maprofeeti aphiyale vaanaanovaava erweelaka mmanyaakoni sa elapo ya wEfrayimi. Dyoontte, mwaavahe etalentu* ya eparatha* ni ikuwo piili sootteettheya.’”" 
2Kings5:23 Nahamani aamwaakhula: “Wooreera. Okuxe italentu* piili.” Aamunyesereriha Gehazi waakhela iye ni aahela mmirupani miili ni soowara piili sootheene iye. Aawinnyerera arumeiyaawe eeli ni awosa yaakuxa mirupa iye emuhoolaka Gehazi. 
2Kings5:24 Gehazi aphiyakaru vanttumuxani aakhalaawe, aakuxa mirupa yaakuxalaaya arumeiyi eeli ale, anathokorora mpaanimwawe. Aahaalaxera arumeiyi ni awosa yaapwaha." 
2Kings5:25 Vano aavolowa, aniixoonihera wa pwiiyaawe Elixa. Elixa aamukoha: “Gehazi, waari woowi?” Gehazi aamwaakhula: “Murumeiyaanyu kheentteru.”" 
2Kings5:26 Vaheera Elixa aamweerela: “Osuweleke weera kaari ni weyo mmunepani Nahamani aakhuruwaawe mukaaroni weera ookumaneno. Ehuhuweene yeela kheehiyono yoowaakhela musurukhu ni ikuwo, naari yoohaawela imatta sa sooliveira* ni sa iwuuva*, ikhondoolo, imombe, ipottha ilopwana naari ithiyana." 
2Kings5:27 Makokho a Nahamani animookela weyo ni ekhapiraawo wa mahuku ootheene.” Vano Gehazi aavenya mpaani mwa Elixa oosareyeene makokho, exapalaawe etteenleene ntoko etthabwe." 
2Kings6:1 Nakupa a maprofeeti aamweerela Elixa: “Moone, nipuro ninthukumanaahu ni nyuwo nooniiyevelaxa." 
2Kings6:2 Nrowe omoolokoni Yordanu weera nuuhewo nyiri sootekelano nipuro na mithukumano.” Elixa aamwaakhula: “Muroweke.” 
2Kings6:3 Mmoha a yaale aamweerela Elixa: “Dyoontte, munihoole.” Owo aamwaakhula: “Paahi, kinoorowa.”" 
2Kings6:4 Owo aarowa ni yaale. Awosa yaarowa oYordanu, enapacera wuuha nyiri." 
2Kings6:5 Mmoha a yaale uuhaka mwiri, epaso yaakhuleela muluusi. Owo aakhuwela: “Ii! Pwiiyaaka, kaarimooliha!”" 
2Kings6:6 Mulopwana a Muluku aamukoha: “Ekhuleenle vaavi?” Owo aamoonihera nipuro ni Elixa aathikila ephandi, anavonyerawo, ni epaso yaaphamba." 
2Kings6:7 Elixa aamweerela: “Okuxe.” Mulopwana aahookola moono, anakuxa." 
2Kings6:8 Vano mwene a awArami aawanano aYixrayeli. Vahoolo woowuuluma ni asitokweenaawe, mwene a awArami aaheera: “Nakonele nipuro nno.”" 
2Kings6:9 Mulopwana a Muluku aamurumihela mwene a oYixrayeli mutthenga ola: “Musembe nipuro nno, niwoko awArami ankela weiwo.”" 
2Kings6:10 Vano mwene a oYixrayeli aahaarumihela anamahottela nipuro mulopwana a Muluku aathoonyenraawe. Emaara ti emaara Elixa annamooperera mwene moota wooweera annasemba mapuroweene yaale. 
2Kings6:11 Eyo yaamunyoonyiha mwene a awArami, anaathukumanyiha asitokweenaawe anaanyesereriha aakohaka: “Mukileele, taani a nyuwo ori mpatta wa mwene a oYixrayeli?”"
