2Kings6:12 Mmoha a asitokweene aamwaakhula: “Khanihiyono hiyo, pwiiyaaka, mene Elixa, mprofeeti ori a oYixrayeli, onimuthalihera mwene a oYixrayeli masu nyuwo munlokololaanyu mpaka mukwartunimwanyu.”" 
2Kings6:13 Mwene aalamula: “Mwaasaase onkhalaawewo weera namvare.” Emuleenleene weera ori oDotani," 
2Kings6:14 mwene a awArami aahaarumihelawo anakhotto ancipale vamoha ni ikavalu* ni ikaaro sa ikavalu* sa ekhotto. Awo yaaphiyale ni ohiyu, enarica esidade." 
2Kings6:15 Murumeiyi a mulopwana a Muluku aavenyaawe oxaawaya ni akhumakaru mpaani, aawoona anakhotto vamoha ni ikavalu* ni ikaaro sa ikavalu* sa ekhotto erinceene esidade. Murumeiyi aamukoha Elixa: “Ii! Pwiiyaaka, nipakekeni?”" 
2Kings6:16 Elixa aamwaakhula: “Ohoove. Yaale ari ni hiyo ti yaantte waapwaha yaawo.” 
2Kings6:17 Vano Elixa aavekela: “Dyoontte Yave, muhuleke maithwaawe weera oone.” Vanonto Yave aahula maitho a murumeiyi ni aaweha, anoona onttumuxani sisareiyeene ikavalu* ni ikaaro sa ikavalu* sa ekhotto sa mooro simurukureenreene Elixa." 
2Kings6:18 awArami awo yaamukhuveelaaya weera emvare, Elixa aamvekela Yave: “Mwaakelihe evaasi atthu ala!” Vano Yave aahaakeliha evaasi, ntoko Elixa aavekenlaawe." 
2Kings6:19 Elixa aaweerela: “Ola khoohiyono musewe naari esidade munaasaanyu. Mukitthareke ni kinimooronghani wa mulopwana mummwaasaanyu.” Owo aahaakuxa, anaarongha esidade ya oSamariya." 
2Kings6:20 Evolowakaru, Elixa aavekela: “Yave, muhuleke maithowaaya weera yoone.” Vano Yave aahula maithowaaya, enoona weera yaari muSamariya!" 
2Kings6:21 Mwene a oYixrayeli awoonakaru, aamukoha Elixa: “Tiithi Kiwiivaseke? Kiwiivasake?”" 
2Kings6:22 Elixa aamwaakhula: “Muhiwiive. Amwene, khamunawiive anamatthukiwa munaavaraanyu ni ekatana ni muupaanyu. Mwaavahe yooca ni maahi weera ece ni ewure ni vahoolowaya ehokoleeleke wa pwiiyaaya.”" 
2Kings6:23 Vano aahaarehererela efesta etokotoko ni emalihaleene oca ni owura, aahaalaxera, ni awo yaahokoleela wa pwiiyaaya. Hiiho anakupa a anakhotto a awArami yaahiya ohuhula ilapo sa oYixrayeli." 
2Kings6:24 Eviraleene ehuhu ekina, Beni-Hadadi, mwene a awArami, aahaathukumanyiha anakhottwaawe ootheene, enarowa, enacira oSamariya." 
2Kings6:25 Yaakhala etala etokotoko musidadeni. Yaavira ehuhu yincipale oriciweene moota wooweera muru wa buuru waathumihiwa ixekeli* miloko mithannamiraru sa eparatha* ni ekoomixi ekhaanene ya maraankhu a ikhunda yaathumihiwa ixekeli* ithanu. 
2Kings6:26 Mwene a oYixrayeli aaviraawe vaxirini ya esidade, muthiyana mmoha aamukhuwelela: “Dyoontte, pwiiyaaka mwene, mukikhavihere!”" 
2Kings6:27 Mwene aamwaakhula: “Yave aahookhaviherani, nkookhavihereni hai? Apaale yookhala etrigu vanipuroni nimveeriwaayamo hoye hoye iwuuva* sinaameliwaayamo?”" 
2Kings6:28 Wa soothesene, owo aamukoha: “Mulattu heeni murinaanyu?” Muthiyana aamwaakhula: “Muthiyana ola aakeerela: ‘Olelo nimukhuureke mwaninyu ni omaalo awaka.’" 
2Kings6:29 Vano noomwaapeya mwanaka, ninamukhuura. Oxaawaya miyo kaamweerela weera ela ti emaara yoomukhuura mwaninyu, mene ola aamvitha.”" 
2Kings6:30 Mwene iiwakaru masu a muthiyana, aahaahula ikuwosawe. Eenre akhala vaxirini, atthu yaahoona weera owo aawara esaakho." 
2Kings6:31 Owo aaheera: “Muluku akittaruxaxe miyo kaahimuhita olelo Elixa, mwaana mulopwana a Xafati." 
2Kings6:32 Vano Elixa aari owannyawe akilaantheene ni asitokweene akina yaakilaathi ni yoowo. Mwene aamuhooliha namutthenga, mene owo ahinaaye ophiyawo, Elixa aaweerela asitokweene: “Moone moota namwiiva owo okirumihenlaawe mutthu weera akihite. Vano namutthenga arwa, ngwale nsele munghiihaka ovolowa, niwoko simmwiiwanyeya mikhitto sa mwene ongwa ottuliwawe.”" 
2Kings6:33 Owo alokololaka hiihaale, namutthenga aaphiya. Vano ehuhuweene yeele mwene aamweerela: “Nna nttaruxo na Yave. Nkirwa kingwehereratho Yave.”" 
2Kings7:1 Elixa aamweerela: “Mwiiwe masu a Yave. Yave oneera ha: Ehuhuweene yeela omaalo iliitru* ithannamosa sa ephepa sinoothumihiwa exekeli* emoha, ni iliitru* muloko ni piili sa esevada* sinoothumihiwatho exekeli* emoha vamulako wa oSamariya.”" 
2Kings7:2 Mutokweene a anakhotto aamukhavihera mwene aamweerela mulopwana a Muluku: “Naari Yave ahulaka milako sa wiirimu, eyo kheneereya.” Elixa aamwaakhula: “Munimoona ni maithwaanyu, mene khamucaru etthu!”" 
2Kings7:3 Vano yaakhala asilopwana axexe anamakokho vamulako wa esidade. Yaaheerelana: “Nnikhweleni vaava? 
2Kings7:4 Hiyo navolowa musidadeni, nnimookhwa etala; nakhala vaava, nnimookhwatho. Vano niroweke akonenlaayawo awArami weera niixinnyererewo. Awo yuurela okumaahu, nnookhala, mene yaniiva khamwaha.”" 
2Kings7:5 Wiilaka, yaarowa yaakonenlaayawo awArami. Yaaphiyaaya mukerekhere waakonelingwe, yaahona weera khawaakhaliwewo." 
2Kings7:6 Vanonto Yave aawiiwiha awArami yaakonenlaayawo oruma wa ikaaro sa ekhotto, ikavalu* ni anakhotto ancipale moota wooweera yaaheerelana: “Moone, mwene a oYixrayeli oomwiiwananano mwene a aHiti ni mwene a wExipitu weera eniwaneno!”" 
2Kings7:7 Vano yaavenya, enatthawa wiilaka, ehiyaka iheemasaya, ikavulusaya ni abuurwaaya. Yaakonenlaayawo yaahiya hiiho, etthawaka weera yuurele okumaaya." 
2Kings7:8 Anamakokho axexe yaaphiyalaaya mukerekhere waakonelingwe, yaavolowasa muheemani emoha, enaca, enawura, enakuxa eparatha*, eyuuma yoorikaxa ni ikuwo, enavitha seiye. Yaavolowa eheema yanaaveeli, enakuxamo itthu sikina, enavithatho." 
2Kings7:9 Vano yaaheerelana: “Khanimpaka nnene. Olelo ti nihuku na mutthenga wooreera ni hiyo nihimaaleke! Naweherera oxa, nnoothoriheliwa. Niroweke woowaakuveya weera nathalihere yeela empa ya emwene.”" 
2Kings7:10 Vano yaarowa, enawiitthana anamalipelela a mulako wa esidade eweerelaka: “Naavolowa yaakonenlaayawo awArami ni khaniiwale naari khaawo nimoonnaahu. Saariwo paahi ikavalu* ni abuuru ootthukiweene ni iheema soohiiwa." 
2Kings7:11 Anamalipelela a mulako wa esidade yaalaleiya mutthenga ole ni waalaleiwatho mpaani mwa mwene. 
2Kings7:12 Mwene aavenya ohiyu, anaweerela asitokweenaawe a anakhotto: Kinimooleelani yeeyo awArami aavaanenlaaya. Yeenre esuwela weera ninnahaawa etala tivawo avennyaaya yaakonenlaayawo eniipithasa mutuphini yuupuwelaka: ‘Vekhaikhai awo anoovolowa waakonelingwe yuupwelaka weera khookhaliwe, ni vano nnimwaavara naavoleihaka musidadeni.’”" 
2Kings7:13 Mutokweene mmoha a anakhotto aamulaka mwene: “Asilopwana akina ekuxeke ikavalu* ithanu sihanle musidadeni. Naarumihele anamitthenga weera yahottelewo. Vano ommaleloniwaya onuulikane ntoko ommaleloniwahu neenre nikhala oothorihiweene.” 
2Kings7:14 Vano aathanla ikaaro piili ni ikavalusaya* ni mwene aahaarumiha owaasaasa anakhotto a awArami. Aahaalamulela anamweettiha a ikaaro iye: “Murowe ni moone yeereiye.” 
2Kings7:15 Yaatthara mphito wa awArami mpaka oYordanu, ephwanyaka ikuwo ni ikapwitthi ephiroweeneeyo, mwa seiye yaahiyalaaya awArami etthawaka. Vano anamitthenga yaahokolowa, enamuthalihera mwene." 
2Kings7:16 Muloko waavenya, onahuhula yaakonenlaaya awArami, vano, iliitru* ithannamosa sa ephepa saathumihiwa exekeli* emoha ni iliitru* muloko ni piili sa esevada* saathumihiwatho exekeli* emoha, ntoko Yave aahimmaawe." 
2Kings7:17 Vanonto mwene aamukhaliha mulopwana ole, mwa yoowo aamukhavihenre mwene vamulako wa Elixa ntoko mutokweene a mulako wa esidade. Wa soothesene, muloko waamukwattula, onangwatta, anakhwa ntoko mulopwana a Muluku aahimmaawe ehuhuweene yeele mwene aarwiiyaawe owannyawe." 
2Kings7:18 Yeereiye ntoko mulopwana a Muluku aamweerenlaawe mwene: “Ehuhuweene yeela omaalo iliitru* ithannamosa sa ephepa sinoothumihiwa exekeli* emoha, ni iliitru* muloko ni piili sa esevada* sinoothumihiwatho exekeli* emoha vamulako wa oSamariya.”" 
2Kings7:19 Ehuhuweene yeele mutokweene a anakhotto aamukhavihera mwene aamweerela mulopwana a Muluku: “Naari Yave ahulaka milako sa wiirimu, eyo kheeneereya.” Elixa aamwaakhula: “Munimoona ni maithwaanyu, mene khamucaru etthu!”" 
2Kings7:20 Yaaheereya hiihoweene, niwoko muloko waamukwattula onangwatta vamulako wa esidade, anakhwa." 
2Kings8:1 Vano Elixa aamweerela muthiyana mwa yoowo aamvenyererihenlaawe mwaniye mulopwana: “Mvenye nno ni emusaanyuweene muroweke muntthunaanyu, niwoko Yave oorumiha etala mweelaponimu ni eyo enoopwaherera wa iyaakha ithannapiili.”" 
2Kings8:2 Muthiyana ole aapaka yeeyo mulopwana a Muluku aamulamulenlaawe. Owo ni emusaawe aavenya, anakhala mweelaponi ya aFilisti wa iyaakha ithannapiili." 
2Kings8:3 Simanleene iyaakha ithannapiili iye, aahokolowa mulaponi mwa aFilisti, anarowa omvekela mwene omuhokoloxera vaatevawe ni emattaawe." 
2Kings8:4 Mwene aamutthekulana Gehazi, murumeiyi a mulopwana a Muluku, amweerelaka: “Okithalihere sa itthu sootikiniheya sootheene Elixa ompakaawe.”" 
2Kings8:5 Gehazi amuthaliheraka mwene moota Elixa aamvenyererihalaawe mwaana, amayawe mwaana ole yaarwaaya weera yoonihere yoovekaaya wa mwene yeerelaka ohokoleela vaatevaya ni itthusaya. Gehazi aamweerela: “Amwene pwiiyaaka, muthiyana ni mwaniyeene ti yoola, mwa yoowo aamvenyererihalaawe Elixa.”" 
2Kings8:6 Mwene aamukohakoha sa seiye ni muthiyana aahaakhulela. Vano mwene aamuthanla murumeiyi weera amukhavihere muthiyana, anamulamulela: “Omuhokoloxere sootheene saari sawawe ni soohephasene okhuma owo aavennyaawe mweelaponi mpaka olelo.”" 
2Kings8:7 Elixa aarowa oDamasku ni Beni-Hadadi, mwene a awArami, aamvoreiwa. Mwene aaleeliwa: “Mulopwana a Muluku ori musidade,”" 
2Kings8:8 owo aamulamulela Hazayeli: “Wakumaneno mulopwana a Muluku ni omukuxere yoovaha. Wakikoherele Yave kaariki kilame eretta ela?” 
2Kings8:9 Hazayeli aarowa wa Elixa akuxaleene sooreerela sikina sikina sa oDamasku saakuxiwe ni ikamelu* miloko mixexe. Aavolowa, aneemela ohoolowawe, anamweerela: “Mwaninyu, Beni-Hadadi, mwene a awArami, ookirumiha wookohani: ‘Kinoolama eretta ela?’”" 
2Kings8:10 Elixa aamwaakhula: “Mwamuleele: ‘Vekhaikhai munoolama,’ mene Yave ookoonihera weera vekhaikhai onimookhwa.”" 
2Kings8:11 Elixa aangwehexexa Hazayeli ahimuhuluwaka mpaka Hazayeli wuuliwa muru. Vano mulopwana a Muluku aapacera wiinla. 
2Kings8:12 Hazayeli aamukoha: “Pwiiyaaka muniinlelani?” Elixa aamwaakhula: “Niwoko koosuwela itthu soowoopiha muneeraanyu mwaapakele aYixrayeli. Munoohisa mapurowaaya oolipihiwa, ngwiivaka amirawaaya ni ekatana, mwaanyakattaka anamwanaaya ni munimwaaphulakasa oorupala.”" 
2Kings8:13 Hazayeli aamukoha: “Moota heeni murumeiyaanyu aneeraawe awere seiyo eenre ahittittimiheya?” Elixa aamwaakhula: “Yave ookoonihera weera munoothatuwa mwene a awArami.” 
2Kings8:14 Vano Hazayeli aavenyawo, anahokoleela wa pwiiyaawe. Beni-Hadadi aamukoha: “Elixa ohimale hai?” Hazayeli aamwaakhula: “Ookileela weera vekhaikhai munoolama.”" 
2Kings8:15 Vaheera oxaawaya aakuxa ekuwo, anaruweya, anamukhuneelano owiittho mwene moota wooweera owo aahookhwa. Vanonto Hazayeli aamurandela." 
2Kings8:16 Yehorami, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoxafati, mwene a oYuda, aapacenre olamula oYuda vayaakhani yanaathanu moolamulani mwa Yorami, mwaana mulopwana a Ahabi, mwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings8:17 Yehorami, apaceraka olamula aarino iyaakha miloko miraru ni piili sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha ithannatthaaru." 
2Kings8:18 Aatthara iphiro sa mamwene a oYixrayeli, ntoko omwene wa Ahabi waapankaaya, niwoko aamuthela mwaana muthiyana a Ahabi. Aapaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave." 
2Kings8:19 Wa soothesene, Yave khaatthunne ophwata oYuda niwoko na omusivelawawe Davide. Aaroromeliha opwahereriha ekhapira ya Davide vahiceni ya emwene." 
2Kings8:20 Mweehuhuni yeele ya Yehorami, awEdomi yaavaanya omwene wa oYuda emvaraka mwenaaya." 
2Kings8:21 Tivawo Yehorami aarongwaawe oZayiri ni ikaarosawe sa ikavalu* sootheene. awEdomi yaamurica yoowo vamoha ni asitokweenaawe a ikaaro sootheene sa ekhotto, mene aavenya, anaphutula moohiyuni. Anakhottwaawe yaatthawelasa mmawannyaya." 
2Kings8:22 Mpaka olelo awEdomi annavaanya oYuda. Ehuhuweene yeele amaki a oLibina yaavaanyatho. 
2Kings8:23 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Yehorami – sootheene aapankaawe– silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda." 
2Kings8:24 Yehorami aahookhwa, anavithiwa ni makholowaawe musidadeni ya Davide. Mwanawe mulopwana aHaziya ti aamurandenle." 
2Kings8:25 Ahaziya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehorami, mwene a oYuda aapacenre olamula vayaakhani yanaamuloko ni piili moolamulani wa Yorami, mwaana mulopwana a Ahabi, mwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings8:26 Ahaziya, apaceraka olamula aarino iyaakha miloko miili ni piili sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu eyaakha emoha. Nsina na amayawe naari Ataliya, osuulu wa Omeri, mwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings8:27 Aatthara iphiro sa Ahabi, apakaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave, ntoko omwene wa Ahabi waapankaaya, eenre amuthela mwaana a emusi ya Ahabi." 
2Kings8:28 Ahaziya aahiiraanano Yorami, mwaana mulopwana a Ahabi weera engwaneno Hazayeli, mwene a awArami oRamoti-Giliyadi. awArami yaamvulaliha Yorami," 
2Kings8:29 tivawo mwene Yorami aahokoleenlaawe oYizereyeli weera avolihe makhwatta aavulalihingwaawe oRamoti angwananaka Hazayeli, mwene a awArami. Vano Ahaziya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehorami, mwene a oYuda aarowa oYizereyeli omuxekura Yorami, mwaana mulopwana a Ahabi, mwene a oYixrayeli, aavolihaawewo makhwatta." 
2Kings9:1 Eyo eri hiiho, mprofeeti Elixa aamwiitthana mmoha a nakupa a maprofeeti anamweerela: “Mphitelele mukaandyowaanyu, mukuxeke nipoottoro nna na makhura ni murowe oRamoti-Giliyadi." 
2Kings9:2 Mwaaphiyakawo, mwamwaasaase Yehu, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoxafati, mwaana mulopwana a Nimexi. Mwavolowe oraawemo ni mwammwalamwalihe ni asinkhwaawe munroihaka esaala ekina." 
2Kings9:3 Vano mukuxe nipoottoro ni mwammiinele makhura mmurumwawe mulaleiyaka: ‘Yave oneera ha: Kinoottikitthelani omwene wa oYixrayeli.’ Vahoolowaya, mwahule nsele ni mwatthawe woowaakuveya!”" 
2Kings9:4 Vano mmiravo mprofeeti ole aarowa oRamoti-Giliyadi. 
2Kings9:5 Aphiyakawo, aahaaphwanya asitokweene a anakhotto ethukumanneene. Owo aaweerela: “Kohooruuhelani mutthenga atokweene.” Yehu aamukoha: “Wa taani?” Owo aamwaakhula: Wa nyuwo, atokweene.”" 
2Kings9:6 Yehu aavenya, anavolowa mpaani. Vano mprofeeti aammiinela makhura mmurumwawe Yehu, anamweerela: “Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Kinoottikitthelani omwene wa aYixrayeli, muloko wa Yave." 
2Kings9:7 Munoophwata ekhapira ya Ahabi, pwiiyaanyu ni kinimwiinlela ikukuttula ephome ya arumeiyaaka maprofeeti ni ya arumeiyi ootheene a Yave eyeehiwe ni Yezebeli." 
2Kings9:8 Ekhapira yootheene ya Ahabi enoophwatiwa, kaamalihaka asilopwana ootheene a emusi ya Ahabi oYixrayeli – ekhalaka epottha hoye hoye neethi." 
2Kings9:9 Kinoopakela ekhapira ya Ahabi yeeyo kaapakenlaaka ekhapira ya Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati ni ya Bahaxa, mwaana mulopwana a Ahiya." 
2Kings9:10 Mwaha wa Yezebeli, alapwa anoomukhuura mweelaponi mwa oYizereyeli ni khawowo aneera amuvithe.’” Ahimakaru yeeyo, aahula nsele, anatthimaka." 
2Kings9:11 Yehu ahokoleelaka yaaraayawo asitokweene akina a mwene, mmoha a yaale aamukoha: “Salaama?” Naaneepa owo oohaawelelani eheeni? Yehu aamwaakhula: “Nyuwosa mohaasuwela atthu awo ni seiyo anghimaaya.”" 
2Kings9:12 Awosa yaanyesera emweerelaka: “Wootha nyuwo! Munileele!” Yehu aawaakhula: “Owo ookileela: ‘Yave oneera ha: Kinoottikitthelani omwene wa aYixrayeli!’” 
2Kings9:13 Awosa woowaakuveya yaakuxasa mikaandyosaya, enaatala vathiwawe muxikadani. Vano yaahiipa nipalapatta ekhuwelaka: “Yehu ti mwene!”" 
2Kings9:14 Vano Yehu, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoxafati, mwaana mulopwana a Nimexi, aapacera omvaanelela mwene Yorami. Ehuhuweene yeele, Yorami ni anakhotto ootheene a aYixrayeli yeera yiixaakihaka oRamoti-Giliyadi wa Hazayeli, mwene a awArami." 
2Kings9:15 Vaheera mwene Yorami aahokoleela oYizereyeli weera avolihe makhwatta aavulanlaawe mukhottoni angwananaka Hazayeli, mwene a awArami. Yehu aaweerela: “Mwatthuna weera kivariwe omwene, ahikhale muneeraanyu muntthunihere okhuma musidade weera athalihere ihaali iya oYezereyeli.”" 
2Kings9:16 Vano aawela ikaarosawe sa ikavalu*, anarowa oYezereyeli niwoko Yorami aari weiwo awehereraka ovola makhwatta. Ahaziya, mwene a oYuda aarowawo omuxekura." 
2Kings9:17 Namalipelela eemenleene vatooreni* oYezereyeli oonakaru weera anakhotto a Yehu yannakhuveela, aahiitthana: “Kiniwoona anakhotto akina yaattamelaka!” Yorami aamweerela: “Omurumihe namweettiha a ekavalu* weera aakumaneno aakohaka: ‘Munrwa mmuretteleni?’”" 
2Kings9:18 Namweettiha a ekavalu* aarowa omukumanano Yehu, anamukoha: “Mwene onkoha ha: ‘Munrwa mmuretteleni?’” Yehu aamwaakhula: Ohuulume sa murettele! Okitthare!” Namalipelela aahima: “Namutthenga oophiyawo, mene khanaaye ohokolowa.”" 
2Kings9:19 Vano mwene aamurumiha namweettiha a ekavalu* anaaveeli. Owo amphwanyakaru Yehu, aamukoha: “Mwene onkoha ha: ‘Munrwa mmuretteleni?’” Yehu aamwaakhula: “Ohuulume sa murettele! Okitthare!”" 
2Kings9:20 Namalipelela aahima: “Namutthenga oophiyawo, mene khanaaye ohokolowa. Ekhalelo ya mutokweene a anakhotto ni meettiherowaawe ekaaro onkhala ntoko Yehu, mwaana mulopwana a Nimexi. Oneettiha ntoko naanepa!”" 
2Kings9:21 Yorami aalamula: “Mureherere ekaarowaaka ya ikavalu*.” Ekaaro erehereriweene, Yorami, mwene a oYixrayeli, ni Ahaziya, mwene a oYuda, yaavenyasa, khula mutthu mukaaronimwawe weera yamukumaneno Yehu. Yaamphwanya mmatta khalayi yaari ya Naboti, muYizereyeli." 
2Kings9:22 Yorami amoonakaru Yehu, aamukoha: “Yehu, munrwa mmuretteleni?” Yehu aamwaakhula: “Khoonkhala murettele amayinyu Yezebeli epwahereraka olapa miluku sikina ni soopakasaya sa okhwiri.”" 
2Kings9:23 Yorami aarukunuwa, anatthawa amukhuwelelaka Ahaziya: “Ahaziya nna ntapha!”" 
2Kings9:24 Vano Yehu aalatha muupaawe iilipihaka, anamulatha Yorami ottuli, muupa ohomaka murima mpaka ophutula, anakhwa." 
2Kings9:25 Yehu aamweerela Bidekari, namakhaviheraawe mukaaroni: “Ovonyere muttembo mmattamu yaari ya Naboti, muYizereyeli. Wuupuwelele moota Yave aanooperenraawe uulumaka sa atithawe Ahabi naamuhoonlaahu munkuttulanimwawe." 
2Kings9:26 Ehuhuweene yeele Yave aaheera: ‘Osilo kohoona ephome ya Naboti ni ya anamwanaawe asilopwana. Vekhaikhai kinimoottaruxela yeeyo ematteene yeela, oneera Yave.’ Vano ovonyere muttembo mmattamu, ntoko Yave aahimmaawe.”" 
2Kings9:27 Ahaziya, mwene a oYuda oonaka yeeyo, aatthawela oBeti-Hagani. Yehu aamuttharelela akhuwelaka: “Mmwiivetho!” Yaamvulaliha mukaaronimwawe owo arowaka oGuri, vakhiviru wa oYibleyami, mene aatthawela oMegidu, anakhwelawo." 
2Kings9:28 Arumeiyaawe yaamurongha oYerusaleemu, enamvitha vamoha ni makholowaawe munihiyenimwawe musidadeni ya Davide." 
2Kings9:29 Ahaziya, aathatuwa mwene vayaakhani yanaamuloko nimmoha moolamulani mwa Yorami, mwaana mulopwana a Ahabi." 
2Kings9:30 Vano Yehu aarowa oYizereyeli. Yezebeli iiwakaru yeeyo, aahiihinga makwikhwi, anareherera mayihaawe anathurumela vaxanelani ya empa ya emwene." 
2Kings9:31 Yehu avolowaka vamulako, Yezebeli aamukoha: “Zimeri, munrwa mmuretteleni, namwiiva a pwiiyaanyu?”" 
2Kings9:32 Yehu aaweha vaxanelani, anakhuwela: “Taani a nyuwo ori a mpattaaka?” Eeli hoye hoye araru a inoko* yaangweha." 
2Kings9:33 Yehu aaweerela: “Mummoroxele muthiyana owo vathi!” Vano awosa yaammoroxela Yezebeli vathi ni ephomaawe yaattonyera muxirini ni mwaakavaluni* ni Yehu aamukakathula. 
2Kings9:34 Yehu aavolowa, anaca anawura. Aalamula: “Munkuxe muthiyana oolaphiwa owo mwamvithe, eenre akhala mwaana muthiyana a mwene.”" 
2Kings9:35 Vaheera yaakhummaaya erowaka omuvitha, yaaphwannye paahi nikarakasa, matata, ni inaawo." 
2Kings9:36 Yaahokolowa, enamuthalihera yeeyo Yehu ni owo aaheera: “Yeeyo yeereiye niwoko na masu Yave aahimmaawe mwa murumeiyaawe, Eliya, muTixebeti: Mweelaponi ya oYizereyeli alapwa anookhuura erutthu ya Yezebeli." 
2Kings9:37 Ihalahala sa erutthwaawe sinoomwaraxeliwa oYizereyeli ntoko mahiloka mutuphini moota wooweera khawowo anaawere weera: ‘Ola ti Yezebeli.’ ” 
2Kings10:1 Vano yaakhala oSamariya anamwane asilopwana miloko mithannamiili a ekhapira ya Ahabi. Yehu aalepa ikaratta, anarumihela oSamariya, wa ahooleli a esidade, asitokweene ni anamalipelela a anamwane a Ahabi. Ekaratta yeera:" 
2Kings10:2 “Nyuwosa ti yaale anaakosoopa anamwane a pwiiyaanyu mukhalanakano ikaaro sa ekhotto, ikavalu* ni esidade yoolipihiwa vamoha ni akapwitthi. Vano mwaakhela ekaratta ela," 
2Kings10:3 mwamuthanle ooreerela ni ooweeraxa a anamwane a pwiiyaanyu, munkilaathihaka vahiceni ya atithawe. Vahoolowaya, ngwanele omwene wa Ahabi.”" 
2Kings10:4 Wa soothesene, awosa yaahoova yeeraka: “Mamwene meeli khayaawenre ongwina, nniwere hai hiyo?”" 
2Kings10:5 Vano namareherera a empa ya mwene, guvernadori, asitokweene ni anamalipelela a anamwane yaamurumihela mutthenga ola Yehu: “Hiyo nri arumeiyaanyu ni nnoopaka sootheene muntthunaanyu. Khawowo nneeraahu nimvare omwene. Mpake yeeyo enooreerelani.”" 
2Kings10:6 Vanonto Yehu aahaalepelatho ekaratta yanaaveeli yeeraka: “Nyuwosa mwaareene a mpattaaka ni mwatthuna okiiwelela, mwaahite anamwane a pwiiyaanyu ni mukiruuhele nyurusaya oYizereyeli omaalo ehuhuweene yeela.” Vano anamwane a mwene miloko mithannamiili ale yaahuwiwa ni asitokweene a esidade." 
2Kings10:7 Yaakhelakaru ekaratta, asilopwana ale yaahaahitasa anamwane a mwene, ewiivaka ootheene. Nyurusaya yaahela mmipaparani, enamurumihela Yehu oYizereyeli." 
2Kings10:8 Aleeliwaka weera sooruuhiwa nyuru, Yehu aalamulela: “Muukele seiyo vamulako wa esidade mapuro meeli weera sikhalewo mpaka omaalo.”" 
2Kings10:9 Oxaawaya, Yehu aakhuma, aneemela ohoolo wa muloko wootheene, aneerela: “Nyuwosa khamunono nthowa. Ti miyo kimvaanelenle pwiiyaaka kinamwiiva. Vaheera, ootheene ala owiivale taani?”" 
2Kings10:10 Musuwele weera masu ootheene Yave aahimmaawe mwaha wa ekhapira ya Ahabi anookhwaniheriwa. Yave oopaka yeeyo aaroromelinghaawe mwa murumeiyaawe Eliya. 
2Kings10:11 Vano Yehu aawiiva ootheene yaahanle a ekhapira ya Ahabi oYizereyeli vamoha ni asitokweenaawe, asinthamwenaawe ni asaserdotaawe woohoopowaru mutthu." 
2Kings10:12 Vahoolowaya Yehu aavenya, anarowa oSamariya. oBeti-Ekedi wa akukhuli," 
2Kings10:13 aahaakumanano amusi akina a Ahaziya, mwene a oYuda, anaakoha: “Nyuwosa taani?” Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Hiyo amusi a Ahaziya ni ninkela oxekura imusi sa mwene ni sa pwiyamwene mutokweene.”" 
2Kings10:14 Yehu aalamula: Mwaavare ni matata! Awo yaahaavara amusi a Ahaziya, enawiivela ehime ya oBeti-Ekedi – wookwana asilopwana miloko mixexe neeli. Khaahiiweru mukumi." 
2Kings10:15 Apwahakaruwo, aamukumanano Yehonadabi, mwaana mulopwana a Rekabi, mwa yoowo aarongwe omuulumano Yehu. Amuulumihaleene Yehonadabi, Yehu aamukoha: “Nyuwo moohakalalela kimpakaaka?” Yehonadabi aamwaakhula: “Aani.” Yehu aamweerela: “Mukivahe ntata.” Yehonadabi aamvaha ntata ni Yehu aamukhavihera owela ekaaro." 
2Kings10:16 Yehu aamweerela: “Mukitthare ni moone omukhalelawaka nthiti Yave.” Vano Yehonadabi aarowa ni yoowo mukaaronimwawe. 
2Kings10:17 Yehu aphiyakaru oSamariya, aawiiva ootheene yaahanle musidade yaari a emusi ya Ahabi. Aahaaphwata ntoko Yave aahimmaawe mwa Eliya." 
2Kings10:18 Vano Yehu aahaathukumanyiha atthu ootheene, anaweerela: “Ahabi aamurumeela Bahali* vakhaani, Yehu onoomurumeela woopwaha." 
2Kings10:19 Vano ngwiitthane maprofeeti ootheene a Bahali* vamoha ni arumeiyaawe ni asaserdotaawe ootheene. Ahikhaleru anaacombe, niwoko kinoompakela Bahali* yooveleela etokotoko. Yoole anaacombe, onimwiiviwa.” Wa soothesene, nne naari ntapha na Yehu weera aamalamalihe anamarumeela ootheene a Bahali*." 
2Kings10:20 Yehu aalamula: “Mulattule muthukumano nimuttittimiherelaka Bahali*!” Waalattuliwa," 
2Kings10:21 ni Yehu aahaarumihela anamitthenga mweelaponi yootheene ya oYixrayeli. Anamarumeela ootheene a Bahali* yaahoowa; khaawo aacombe. Yaathukumana mpaani mwa Bahali* enasareyamo moothemwene. 
2Kings10:22 Yehu aamweerela namalipelela a ikuwo mpaani mwa Bahali*: “Mwaaruuheleke mikaandyo anamarumeela ootheene a Bahali*.” Ni owo aaruuha. 
2Kings10:23 Vanonto Yehu ni Yehonadabi, mwaana mulopwana a Rekabi, yaavolowa mpaani mwa Bahali*. Yehu aaweerela anamarumeela a Bahali*: “Ngwehawehe mukhwipimwanyu ni moone aahikhanleru murumeiyi a Yave; ekhaleke paahi anamarumeela a Bahali*.”" 
2Kings10:24 Vano yaavolowa weera empakele Bahali* sooveleela sa axinama ni soohisa. Vanonto Yehu aahaalamulela asilopwana miloko mithannamiraru weera yeemele vaate awoopereraka: “Ahikhale anaamuhiye oopowaka naari mmoha a atthu ale kingwinnyereraakani. Yoowo anaamuhiye, nthowa na okhwa ti nawawe.”" 
2Kings10:25 Yehu amalihakaru opaka yooveleela yoohisa, aahaalamulela anamalipelela ni asitokweene a anakhotto: “Mvolowe ni ngwiive ootheene. Ahikhaleru anaatthawe!” Vano awo yaawiiva ootheene ni ekatana, enavonyera mittembo vaate, enavolowa mpatta wa mpuwa wa empa ya Bahali*." 
2Kings10:26 Yaakuxasa mpaani mwa Bahali* nrimbu nootteeliheriwa, enahisa." 
2Kings10:27 Yaaphwatasa nrimbu nootteeliheriwa Bahali*, enakurumula empa ya Bahali* ni mpaka olelo nipuro nne nipakiwe ecumbusi." 
2Kings10:28 Hiiho Yehu aaphwata olapiwa wa Bahali* oYixrayeli. 
2Kings10:29 Wa soothesene, owo khaahingye soottheka sa Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati, mwa yoowo aatthekinghe aYixrayeli, eyo tiiyo olapiwa wa aximombe a eyuuma yoorikaxa oBeteli ni oDani." 
2Kings10:30 Yave aamweerela Yehu: “Ekhapiraanyu enoolamula oYixrayeli mpaka ekhapira yanaaxexe mweenre mpaka yeeyo eri yooreera vamaithoniwaka, mpakelaka emusi ya Ahabi sootheene kaatthunaaka weera mpake.”" 
2Kings10:31 Wa soothesene, Yehu khaatthukuruwenle ni murima wootheene Nlamulo na Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli. Khaahingye soottheka sa Yerobowami, mwa seiyo saatthekinghe aYixrayeli." 
2Kings10:32 Ehuhuweene yeele Yave aapacera ovukula waatta wa aYixrayeli. Hazayeli aahaawina aYixrayeli a mipatta sincipale sa oYixrayeli," 
2Kings10:33 mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oYordanu, mweelaponi yootheene ya oGiliyadi. Aawina okhuma wAroweri vanreyareyani na wArenoni, aviraka oGiliyadi mpaka oBaxani, eyo tiiyo ilapo sa Gadi, Rubeni ni Manaxe." 
2Kings10:34 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Yehu – sootheene aapankaawe ni sooweerasawe sootheene – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings10:35 Yehu aahookhwa, anavithiwa oSamariya ni mwanawe mulopwana, Yehowahazi, ti aamurandenle." 
2Kings10:36 Yehu aalamula oYixrayeli oSamariya iyaakha miloko miili niithannatthaaru. 
2Kings11:1 Ataliya, amayawe Ahaziya oonakaru weera owo aahookhwa, aapacera ophwata emusi yootheene ya mwene." 
2Kings11:2 Vaheera Yehoxeba, mwaana muthiyana a mwene Yeworami ni murokoriye Ahaziya, aamukuxa Yowaxi, mwaana mulopwana a Ahaziya, mmoha a anamwane a mwene yeera yiiviwe. Aamwiikaathi mukwaartuni vamoha ni namakosoopaawe weera ahimoone Ataliya, ni hiiho khiiviwe." 
2Kings11:3 Saavinre iyaakha ithannamosa namakosoopaawe amwiipithihaka Mpaani mwa Yave, Ataliya alamulaka oYuda." 
2Kings11:4 Vayaakhani yanaathannapiili musaserdoti* Yoiyada aawiitthana asitokweene a anakupa a anakhotto ncira (yiitthaniwa aKarite), ni anamalipelela weera yamukumaneno Mpaani mwa Yave. Owo aawiiraanano aanyesererihaka ni nlipelo. Vahoolowaya aawoonihera mwaana mulopwana a mwene." 
2Kings11:5 Aahaalamulela: “Ontthuneya weera mpake ha: mwaavolowaka muteko nihuku na eSaabadu, mukuttula mmoha olipeleleke empa ya emwene." 
2Kings11:6 Mukuttula wanaaveeli walipeleleke vamulako wa Suri ni wanaararu vamulako ori wiithela wa mikuttula sikina. Iyo sarandelaneke olipelela Empa ya Yave. 
2Kings11:7 Vano mikuttula miili sikina iyo sihimvara muteko eSaabadu, silipeleleke Mpaani mwa Yave weera yaakhapelele amwene." 
2Kings11:8 Mweemeleke munrukureenreene mwene, khula mutthu ankunxeene kapwitthaawe. Yoowo aneera aattamele mmiseranimwanyu, iiviweke. Mwaahooleke amwene ankelaayawo.”" 
2Kings11:9 Asitokweene a anakupa a anakhotto ncira yaapaka ntoko musaserdoti* Yoiyada, aalamulenlaawe. Khula mutokweene aahaakuxa asilopwanaawe aaronghaka wa musaserdoti* Yoiyada, okhuma yaale yaavolowa mpaka yaakhuma muteko eSaabadu." 
2Kings11:10 Vano aahaavaha asitokweene mavaka ni ixikudu* sa mwene Davide saari Mpaani mwa Yave. 
2Kings11:11 Anamalipelela, ootheene ekunxeene ikapwitthi, yaaheemela emurukureenreene mwene mukerekhere altaari* Mpaani mwa Yave, okhuma mpatta wa ohitto mpaka wa ottuttuwani wa Empa ya Yave." 
2Kings11:12 Yoiyada aamukhumihera vaate Yowaxi, mwaana mulopwana a mwene, anamutthuka ecireemba, anamvaha elivuru ya wiiraana ni Muluku. Yaamvara omwene ni muloko omwiipelaka makuphi, okhuwelaka: “Mwene Woye!”" 
2Kings11:13 Ataliya iiwakaru onyakula wa anamalipelela ni muloko, aarowa wa yaale, Empa ya Yave." 
2Kings11:14 Aamoonawo mwene eemenleene vanrimbuni, ntoko yaakhovelenlaaya. Asitokweene a anakhotto ni anamwiipa mapalapatta yaari mukerekhere mwene ni muloko wootheene waahakalalaxa wiiwaka oruma wa mapalapatta. Vano Ataliya aahaahula soowarasawe, anakhuwela: “Koovarihiwa! Koovarihiwa!”" 
2Kings11:15 Yoiyada aahaalamulela asitokweene a anakhotto: “Munkhumihere vaate mumvirihaka mmiserani sa anakhotto ni mmwiive ni ekatana! Yoowo aneera amutthare iiviweketho!” Vanonto musaserdoti* aaheera: “Owo ahiiveliwe Mpaani mwa Yave!” 
2Kings11:16 Awo yaamvara enamurongha vanipuroni ikavalu* simvolowaaya mwa empa ya mwene enamwiivelamo. 
2Kings11:17 Vahoolowaya Yoiyada aapaka wiiraana variyari wa Yave, mwene ni muloko weera awosa ekhale muloko wa Yave. Aapakatho wiiraana variyari wa mwene ni muloko." 
2Kings11:18 Vahoolowaya atthu ootheene yaarowa mpaani mwa Bahali*, enakurumula. Yaahaapwexakasa altaari* ni icaambulo sa miluku, enamwiiva Matani, musaserdoti* a Bahali* ohoolo wa altaari*. Vahoolowaya Yoiyada aawiikaathi anamalipelela a Empa ya Yave." 
2Kings11:19 Aahaakuxa ni yoowo asitokweene a nakupa a ncira, aKariti, anamalipelela, ni atthu ootheene a elapo, anamweettiha mwene okhuma Empa ya Yave mpaka empa ya emwene eviraka vamulako wa anamalipelela. Vano mwene aakilaathi vahiceni ya emwene." 
2Kings11:20 Muloko wootheene waahakalala ni esidade yaamaaleleya niwoko na okhwela wa Ataliya empa ya emwene. 
2Kings11:21 Yowaxi aapaceraawe olamula, aarino iyaakha ithannapiili sa oyariwawawe." 
2Kings12:1 Yowaxi aathatuwa mwene vayaakhani yanaathannapiili moolamulani mwa Yehu, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha miloko mixexe. Nsina na amayawe naari Zibiya yaari oBerxeba." 
2Kings12:2 Yowaxi aapaka yeeyo yaari yooreera vamaithoni wa Yave iyaakha sootheene musaserdoti* Yoiyada, aamuxuttihaawe." 
2Kings12:3 Wa soothesene, khayaaphwatiwe mapuro ootteela a miluku sikina ni atthu yannapwaherera opakelawo sooveleela ni ohiserawo erubani*." 
2Kings12:4 Yowaxi aahaalamulela asaserdoti*: “Muthukumanyihe Mpaani mwa Yave eparatha* yootheene eruuhiwe ntoko sooveleela sootteeliheriwa Mpaani mwa Yave – eparatha* ekuxingwe onamalepelani, eparatha* yaakhelingwe mwa yoororomeliha ya atthu ni yeeyo eruuhiwe ni otthuna wa atthu." 
2Kings12:5 Asaserdoti* yaakheleleke eparatha* yootheene eyo evareliweke muteko woorehererela Empa ya Muluku mwemmo eneeraaya ephwanyaneyeke enananreene.” 
2Kings12:6 Vaheera vayaakhani yanaamiloko miili ni tthaaru moolamulani mwa mwene Yowaxi, asaserdoti* nlelo yeera ehinaaye oreherera Empa ya Yave." 
2Kings12:7 Tivawo mwene Yowaxi aamwiitthannaawe Yoiyada ni asaserdoti* akina, anaakoha: “Muhinrehererela heeni Empa ya Yave? Okhuma vaanaanova mpaka muhoolo muhikuxetho eparatha* ya omuhakhuni, mene evareliweke muteko wa orehererela Empa ya Yave paahi.”" 
2Kings12:8 Asaserdoti* yaahaakhulela weera khayaarwa ekuxatho eparatha* ni weera awosa khayaarehereratho Empa ya Yave. 
2Kings12:9 Yoiyada aakuxa ekaaxa, anattuula ekhato vayookhuneelela. Aahiikaathi mukerekhere wa altaari*, moono mulopwana wa mulako wa Empa ya Yave. Asaserdoti* yaalipelela mulako wa Empa ya Yave yaahiikaathimo eparatha* yootheene yaaruuhiwa Empa ya Yave." 
2Kings12:10 Khula emaara yoonaaya weera yohaatta eparatha* mukaaxani, anamalepa a mwene ni mutokweene a asaserdoti* yannarwa, enaphima eparatha* yaaruuhiwa Mpaani mwa Yave, ehelaka mmasaakhoni." 
2Kings12:11 Eparatha* ephimiweene, yinnyereriwa anamawehaweha a muteko woorasela Empa ya Yave. Awosa yannaaliva anamiteko yaavara muteko Mpaani mwa Yave: makalipinteiro, anamateka," 
2Kings12:12 mapatarero ni anamapwexa a maluku. Yannathumatho itthaabwa ni maluku ookheriwa sooraselano Empa ya Yave ethumakatho itthu sootheene sikina saatthuneya. 
2Kings12:13 Eparatha* yaaruuhiwa Mpaani mwa Muluku khayaavareliwa muteko woopakela ibasiya sa eparatha*, soorehererano mutthambo, ibasiya soovuuvihera, mapalapatta hoye hoye sakhalaru ikaruma sa eparatha* hoye hoye eyuuma yoorikaxa wa Empa ya Yave." 
2Kings12:14 Eparatha* ele yaavareliwa muteko woowaaliva anamiteko, mwa yaawosa yaavara muteko wa orasela Empa ya Yave." 
2Kings12:15 Khayaanyesereriwa waalikela eparatha* wa yaawo yaaliva anamiteko, niwoko yaari oororomeleya." 
2Kings12:16 Wa soothesene, eparatha* yaakheliwa ntoko sooveleelela nthowa ni soottheka khayaaroihiwa Mpaani mwa Yave; yaari ya asaserdoti*." 
2Kings12:17 Ehuhuweene yeele Hazayeli, mwene a awArami aarowa, anawanano oGati, anakuxa. Vahoolowaya aalakela owanano oYerusaleemu." 
2Kings12:18 Vaheera Yowaxi mwene a oYuda, aakuxa itthu sootheene sootteeliheriwa ni makholowaawe Yehoxafati, Yehorami ni Ahaziya, mamwene a oYuda, vamoha ni seiye owo muneenaawe aatteelihalaawe nitho eyuuma yoorikaxa yaaphwanyiwe omuhakhuni wa Empa ya Yave ni ya emwene. Aamurumihela sootheene iye Hazayeli, mwene a awArami. Vano owo aahiya owanano oYerusaleemu." 
2Kings12:19 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Yowaxi – sootheene aapankaawe– silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda." 
2Kings12:20 Asitokweenaawe yaamvaanelela, enamwiivela oBeti-Milo, mmuseweni onkela oSila." 
2Kings12:21 Asitokweene yamwiivale yaari Yozabadi, mwaana mulopwana a Ximeyati ni Yehozabadi, mwaana mulopwana a Xomeri. Aahookhwa, anavithiwa ni makholowaawe musidadeni mwa Davide. Mwanawe mulopwana, Amaziya ti aamurandenle." 
2Kings13:1 Yehowazi, mwaana mulopwana a Yehu, aathatuwa mwene a aYixrayeli oSamariya vayaakhani yanaamiloko miili ni tthaaru moolamulani mwa Yowaxi, mwaana mulopwana a Ahaziya, mwene a oYuda. Yehowazi aalamula iyaakha muloko niithannapiili." 
2Kings13:2 Aapaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave attharaka soottheka sa Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati, mwa yoowo aatthekihale aYixrayeli." 
2Kings13:3 Isara sa Yave saahaaluttuwela aYixrayeli. Aatthunihera weera ewiniwe ni Hazayeli, mwene a awArami ni mwanawe Beni-Hadadi wa ehuhu yincipale." 
2Kings13:4 Vano Yehowazi aahaasaasa murima wooreera wa Yave ni Yave aamwiiwa, niwoko aahoona moota wootepaxa mwene a awArami aahooxaawe aYixrayeli." 
2Kings13:5 Yave aahaavaha aYixrayeli namatapuxa ni awo yaahoopoliwa yaalamuliwaaya ni awArami. Hiiho aYixrayeli yaakhala mmawannyaya ntoko yaakhalelaaya. 
2Kings13:6 Vaheera yaapwaherera soottheka sa emusi ya Yerobowami, mwa seiye aatthekihalaaweno ehihiyakaru. Mpakatho nrimbu na Axera naari yeemelelo oSamariya." 
2Kings13:7 Wa anakhotto ootheene a Yehowazi, yaahanle paahi anamweettiha a ikavalu* miloko mithanu, ikaaro sa ikavalu* muloko ni anakhotto macira macireene muloko, niwoko mwene a awArami aahaaphwata akinaawo aaxilaka." 
2Kings13:8 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Yehowazi– sootheene aapankaawe ni sooweerasawe sootheene – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings13:9 Yehowazi aahookhwa, anavithiwa ni makholowaawe oSamariya. Mwanawe mulopwana, Yehowaxi, ti aamurandenle." 
2Kings13:10 Yehowaxi, mwaana mulopwana a Yehowazi, aathatuwa mwene a aYixrayeli oSamariya vayaakhani yanaamiloko miraru niithannapiili moolamulani mwa Yowaxi, mwene a oYuda. Aalamula iyaakha muloko niithannamosa." 
2Kings13:11 Aapaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave ahihiyaka soottheka sa Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati, mwa seiye aatthekihalaaweno aYixrayeli, mene aapwaherera mwa seiye." 
2Kings13:12 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Yehowazi – sootheene aapankaawe ni sooweerasawe sootheene nitho ongwananawawe Amaziya, mwene a oYuda – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings13:13 Yehowaxi aahookhwa ni Yerobowami ti aamurandenle. Yehowaxi aavithiwa oSamariya vamoha ni mamwene a oYixrayeli. 
2Kings13:14 Vano Elixa yaamphwanya eretta mwa yeeyo yeera emwiive. Yehowaxi, mwene a oYixrayeli, aarowa wa yoowo. Vano aahuuramihela ekhove, anamwiinlela, akhuwelaka: “Atithaka! Atithaka! Mwaari ntoko ekaaro ya ekhotto ni anamweettiha a ikavalu* a oYixrayel!”" 
2Kings13:15 Elixa aamweerela: “Mukiruuhele muura ni nyuupa.” Yehowaxi aapaka yeeyo. 
2Kings13:16 Owo aamweerela mwene a oYixrayeli: “Mvarele muura.” Mwene avarelakaru muura, Elixa aahiikaathera matataawe mmatatani mwa mwene," 
2Kings13:17 anamweerela: “Muhule exanela enghuleliwa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa ni mulathele.” Vano mwene aapaka yeeyo. Elixa aahima: “Ola muupa wa owina wa Yave woowaawinela awArami! Nyuwo munimwaaphwata awArami woomalela wAfeki.” 
2Kings13:18 Vano aamweerela: “Mukuxe nyuupa.” Mwene aakuxa. Elixa aamweerela: “Mmanele etthaya!” Mwene aamana etthaya imaara tthaaru, anahiyerera." 
2Kings13:19 Mulopwana a Muluku aamunyoonyeriwa, anamweerela: “Waatthuneya omana etthaya imaara ithanu hoye hoye ithannamosa. Mwaapanke hiiho, mwaamwaawina awArami mwaaphwataka woomalela. Vaheera vano munimwaawina imaara tthaaru paahi.”" 
2Kings13:20 Elixa aahookhwa, anavithiwa. Vanonto anakhotto a aMowabe yannakhovelela ovolowa mweelaponi khula mulaala." 
2Kings13:21 Emaara emoha, aYixrayeli akina emuvithaka mulopwana, wootutuxereya yaawoona anakhotto akina a aMowabe. Yaavonyera muttembo wa mulopwana ole munihiyeni na Elixa, enatthawa. Muttembo otavakaru makhuva a Elixa, mulopwana aavenyerera, aneemela." 
2Kings13:22 Hazayeli, mwene a awArami, annaahooxa aYixrayeli mweehuhuni yootheene ya olamula wa Yehowazi." 
2Kings13:23 Wa soothesene, Yave aawoonihera murimaawe wooreera, aamorelaka ikharari aapwatthaka niwoko na wiiraanawawe ni Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yakobe. Mpaka olelo Owo khantthuna waaphwata hata owoomola vamaithoniwawe." 
2Kings13:24 Hazayeli, mwene a awArami, aahookhwa ni Beni-Hadadi, mwanawe mulopwana ti aamurandenle." 
2Kings13:25 Vano Yehowaxi, mwaana mulopwana a Yehowazi, aakuxa wa Beni-Hadadi, mwaana mulopwana a Hazayeli isidadesene seiye Hazayeli aakunxaawe wa atithawe Yehowazi. Yehowaxi aangwina Beni-Hadadi imaara tthaaru ni hiiho aakuxatho isidade sa aYixrayeli." 
2Kings14:1 Amaziya, mwaana mulopwana a Yowaxi, mwene a oYuda aapacenre olamula vayaakhani yanaaveeli moolamulani mwa Yehowaxi, mwaana mulopwana a Yehowazi, mwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings14:2 Owo apaceraka olamula aarino iyaakha miloko miili niithanu sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha miloko miili niithanniixexe. Nsina na amayawe naari Yehowadini a oYerusaleemu." 
2Kings14:3 Aapaka yeeyo yaari yooreera vamaithoni wa Yave, mene ohilikanaka ni nikholonawe Davide. Aatthara mweettelo wootheene wa atithawe Yowaxi." 
2Kings14:4 Wa soothesene, khayaaphwatiwe mapuro ootteela a miluku sikina ni muloko wannapwaherera opakelawo sooveleela ni ohiserawo erubani*." 
2Kings14:5 Oonaka weera omwenaawe woolipa, aawiiva asitokweene yaawiivale atithawe yaari mwene." 
2Kings14:6 Vaheera khaawiivale anamwane a anamwiiva, attharaka hiiho yeeyo elempwale mulivuruni ya nlamulo na Moisesi, mwa mwemmo Yave olamulenlaawe: “Ehiwiive asitiithi niwoko na soottheka sa anamwanaaya naari anamwane niwoko na soottheka sa atithaya. Khula mutthu iiviweke niwoko na sootthekasawe.”" 
2Kings14:7 Ti yoowo aawinne awEdomi macira macireene muloko vanreyareyani na Maakha ni aakuxale esidade ya oSela mukhottoni. Vahoolowaya aatteha nsina na oYoketeyeli nri nsinanaya mpaka olelo. 
2Kings14:8 Vano Amaziya aamurumihela anamitthenga Yehowaxi, mwaana mulopwana a Yehowazi, mwaana mulopwana a Yehu, mwene a oYixrayeli, amutannyaka: “Ngwe niwane.”" 
2Kings14:9 Vaheera Yehowaxi, mwene a oYixrayeli aamwaakhula Amaziya, mwene a oYuda: “Mwiri wa mwiiwa wa oLibanu woorumihela mutthenga wa mwiri wa Esedari* oLibanu: ‘Munthelihe mwaninyu ni mwanaka.’ Vano mwaamunama a ntuphini a oLibanu ohoorwa, ananyikala mwiri wa mwiiwa." 
2Kings14:10 Mohaawina awEdomi ni vano munimwiixoona. Muupuwelele owinawanyu, mene mukhaleke owaani! Nyuwo muniitannyera oyevihiwa ni yeeyo enimoohelani nthala nyuwo ni oYuda." 
2Kings14:11 Wa soothesene, Amaziya, mwene a oYuda khaatthunne omwiiwa ni Yehowaxi, mwene a oYixrayeli aangwanano. Owo ni Amaziya, mwene a oYuda yaawanasa oBeti-Xemexi, elapo ya oYuda." 
2Kings14:12 Anakhotto a oYuda yaawiniwa ni aYixrayeli ni anakhottwaaya yaatthawela mmawannyaya. 
2Kings14:13 oBeti-Xemexi Yehowaxi, mwene a oYixrayeli, aamvara Amaziya, mwene a oYuda, mwaana mulopwana a Yowaxi, mwaana mulopwana a Ahaziya. Vano Yehowaxi aarowa oYerusaleemu, anaphwata exiraaya okhuma mulako wa Efrayimi mpaka mulako wa onloothoni – wookwanaka imeetru* macira meeli." 
2Kings14:14 Aakuxa eyuuma yoorikaxa yootheene, eparatha* ni ikaruma sootheene saari Mpaani mwa Muluku ni mihakhu sootheene sa empa ya emwene. Aahaakuxatho anamatthukiwa akina, anahokoleela oSamariya." 
2Kings14:15 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Yowaxi – sootheene aapankaawe ni soowerasawe sootheene nitho ongwananawawe Amaziya, mwene a oYuda – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings14:16 Yehowaxi, aahookhwa, anavithiwa oSamariya vamoha ni mamwene a oYixrayeli. Mwanawe mulopwana Yerobowami ti aamurandenle." 
2Kings14:17 Amaziya, mwaana mulopwana a Yowaxi, mwene a oYuda aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha muloko niithanu akhwiiyeene Yehowaxi, mwaana mulopwana a Yehowazi, mwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings14:18 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Amaziya – silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda." 
2Kings14:19 Atthu yaamvaanelela omwiiva oYerusaleemu Amaziya, anatthawela oLakixi. Vaheera amwiittanaawe yaamuttharelela, enamwiivelawo." 
2Kings14:20 Muttembwaawe waahokoloxeriwa ni ekavalu* oYerusaleemu, enavithasa vamoha ni makholowaawe musidadeni mwa Davide." 
2Kings14:21 Vano muloko wootheene wa oYuda waamvara omwene Azariya vanipuroni na atithawe. Owo aarino iyaakha muloko niithannamosa aarandelaawe atithawe Amaziya. 
2Kings14:22 Ti yoowo aawinnetho anarasela esidade ya wElati, elapo ya oYuda ekhwiyeene atithawe Amaziya." 
2Kings14:23 Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Yehowaxi, mwene a oYixrayeli, aathatuwa mwene a oSamariya vayaakhani yanaamuloko niithanu moolamulani mwa Amaziya, mwaana mulopwana a Yowaxi, mwene a oYuda. Yerobowami aalamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha miloko mixexe niimoha." 
2Kings14:24 Aapaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave ahihiyakaru soottheka sa Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati, mwa seiye aatthekihalaaweno aYixrayeli." 
2Kings14:25 Ti yoowo aahokoloxenre nyiinano sa oYixrayeli okhuma oLebo-Hamati mpaka Ephareiya ya wAraba, akwaniheraka hiiho masu a Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli yaalaleiwale ni murumeiyaawe Yonasi, mwaana mulopwana a Amitai, mprofeeti a oGati-Heferi." 
2Kings14:26 Yave aahoona ohaawa ni othanana wa aYixrayeli ootheene – sikhalaka ipottha hoye hoye maneethi; khaariworu oowaakhavihera. 
2Kings14:27 Eenre Yave aheera weera onoomalamaliha nsina na oYixrayeli mweelaponimu, aawoopola aYixrayeli amvarelaka muteko Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Yehowaxi." 
2Kings14:28 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Yerobowami – sootheene aapankaawe ni ikhottosawe sootheene nitho moota aawoopolenlaawe aYixrayeli oDamasku ni oHamati waari wa oYawudi – oolempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings14:29 Yerobowami aahookhwa anavithiwa ni makholowaawe, mamwene a oYixrayeli. Vano mwanawe mulopwana, Zakariya ti aamurandenle." 
2Kings15:1 Azariya, mwaana mulopwana a Amaziya, mwene a oYuda aapacenre olamulawawe vayaakhani yanaamiloko miili niithannapiili ya olamula wa Yerobowami, mwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings15:2 Azariya, apaceraka olamula aarino iyaakha muloko niithannamosa, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha miloko mithanu ni piili. Nsina na amayawe naari Yekoliya a oYerusaleemu." 
2Kings15:3 Aapaka yeeyo yaari yooreera vamaithoni wa Yave, ntoko yaapankaaya atithawe Amaziya." 
2Kings15:4 Wa soothesene, khaaphwante mattumuxa ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina ni atthu yannapwaherera opakawo sooveleela ni ohisawo erubani*." 
2Kings15:5 Yave annamuhooxa mwene ni makokho mpaka nihuku na okhwawawe ni ehuhu yootheene aakhala empaawe meekhaawe. Yotami, mwaana mulopwana a mwene, ti aawehaweha empa ya mwene, alamulaka muloko." 
2Kings15:6 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Azariya – sootheene aapankaawe – oolempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda." 
2Kings15:7 Azariya aahookhwa, anavithiwa ni makholowaawe musidadeni ya Davide. Mwanawe mulopwana, Yotami, ti aamurandenle." 
2Kings15:8 Zakariya, mwaana mulopwana a Yerobowami, aavariwa omwene wa oYixrayeli musidadeni ya oSamariya vayaakhani yanaamiloko miraru niithannatthaaru ya olamula wa Azariya, mwene a oYuda. Zakariya aalamunle nyeeri mithannamosa." 
2Kings15:9 Aapaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave, ntoko atithawe yaapankaaya. Khaahingye soottheka sa Yerobowami, mwa yoowo aatthekinghe aYixrayeli." 
2Kings15:10 Xalumi, mwaana mulopwana a Yabexi, aamvaanelela Zakariya. Aamuwanano vamaithoni wa muloko, anamwiiva, anamurandela." 
2Kings15:11 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Zakariya oolempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings15:12 Hiiho yaakwaniheriwa masu Yave aamuleenlaawe Yehu: “Ekhapiraanyu enoolamula oYixrayeli mpaka ekhapira yanaaxexe.” 
2Kings15:13 Xalumi, mwaana mulopwana a Yabexi, aavariwa omwene wa oYixrayeli vayaakhani yanaamiloko miraru niithanniixexe ya olamula wa Uziya, mwene a oYuda, ni aalamula oSamariya mweeri mmoha." 
2Kings15:14 Vano Menahemi, mwaana mulopwana a Gadi, aattimula oTireza arowaka oSamariya. Aamuwanano Xalumi, mwaana mulopwana a Yabexi oSamariya, anamwiiva, anamurandela." 
2Kings15:15 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Xalumi nitho ovaanelelawawe oolempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings15:16 Ehuhuweene yeele Menahemi apaceraka oTireza, aawanano oTipexa ni amaki ootheene yaari musidadeni ni a mukhwipimwaya niwoko na okhootta ohula milakosaya. Aahuhula oTipexa ni mpaka aahaaphula asithiyana oorupala." 
2Kings15:17 Menahemi, mwaana mulopwana a Yabexi aavariwa omwene wa oYixrayeli vayaakhani yanaamiloko miraru niithanniixexe ya olamula wa Azariya, mwene a oYuda. Menahemi aalamunle oSamariya iyaakha muloko." 
2Kings15:18 Aapaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave. Mweehuhuni yootheene ya olamulawawe Khaahingye soottheka sa Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati, mwa yoowo aatthekinghe aYixrayeli." 
2Kings15:19 Vano Puli, mwene a wAsiriya, aavolowa mweelaponi ni Menahemi aamvaha italentu* macira muloko sa eparatha* weera amukhavihere ni weera aamutthunihere opwaherera olamula oYixrayeli." 
2Kings15:20 Menahemi aahaanyesereriha aYixrayeli oliva musoko ole. Khula namapuha waatthuneya omuliva mwene a wAsiriya italentu* sa eparatha* miloko mithanu. Vano mwene a wAsiriya aahokoleela elapwaawe, ahiyaka waakamela elapo ya oYixrayeli." 
2Kings15:21 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Menahemi – sootheene aapankaawe – oolempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings15:22 Menahemi aahookhwa ni mwanawe mulopwana, Pekahiya, ti aamurandenle." 
2Kings15:23 Pekahiya, mwaana mulopwana a Menahemi, aavariwa omwene wa oYixrayeli vayaakhani yanaamiloko mithanu ya olamula wa Azariya, mwene a oYuda. Pekahiya aalamunle oSamariya iyaakha piili." 
2Kings15:24 Aapaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave. Khaahingye soottheka sa Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati, mwa yoowo aatthekinghe aYixrayeli." 
2Kings15:25 Mmoha a asitokweenaawe, Peka, mwaana mulopwana a Remaliya, aamvaanelela yoowo. Aahaarowano oGiliyade asilopwana miloko mithanu, anamwiiva Pekahiya nitho Aregobi ni Ariye vanipuroni noolipiheriwa mpaani mwa mwene oSamariya. Hiiho Peka aamwiiva Pekahiya, anamurandela." 
2Kings15:26 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Pekahiya – sootheene aapankaawe – oolempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings15:27 Peka, mwaana mulopwana a Remaliya, aavariwa omwene wa oYixrayeli vayaakhani yanaamiloko mithanu ni piili ya olamula wa Azariya, mwene a oYuda. Peka aalamunle oSamariya iyaakha miloko miili." 
2Kings15:28 Aapaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave. Khaahingye soottheka sa Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati, mwa yoowo aatthekinghe aYixrayeli." 
2Kings15:29 Mweehuhuni ya olamula wa Peka, mwene a oYixrayeli, Tigelati-Pileseri, mwene a wAsiriya, aavolowa, anakuxa wIyoni, wAbeli-Beti-Mahaka, oYanowa, oKedexi ni oHazori. Aakuxatho oGiliyadi ni oGalileya vamoha ni elapo yootheene ya oNafitali, anaavara atthu aaronghaka wAsiriya." 
2Kings15:30 Vano Hoxeya, mwaana mulopwana a Ela, aamvaanelela Peka, mwaana mulopwana a Remaliya. Aangwanano, anamwiiva, anamurandela vayaakhani yanaamiloko miili ya olamula wa Yotami, mwaana mulopwana a Uziya." 
2Kings15:31 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Peka – sootheene aapankaawe – olempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings15:32 Yotami, mwaana mulopwana a Uziya, aavariwa omwene wa oYuda vayaakhani yanaaveeli ya olamula wa Peka, mwaana mulopwana a Remaliya, mwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings15:33 Azariya, apaceraka olamula aarino iyaakha miloko miili niithanu, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha muloko niithannamosa. Nsina na amayawe naari Yeruxa, mwaana muthiyana a Zadoki." 
2Kings15:34 Aapaka yeeyo yaari yooreera vamaithoni wa Yave, ntoko yaapankaaya atithawe Uziya." 
2Kings15:35 Wa soothesene, khaaphwante mattumuxa ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina ni atthu yannapwaherera opakawo sooveleela ni ohisawo erubani*. Yotami aarasela mulako mutokweene wa Empa ya Yave." 
2Kings15:36 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Yotami – sootheene aapankaawe – oolempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda." 
2Kings15:37 Ehuhuweene yeele Yave aapacera omutannya Resini, mwene a awArami ni Peka, mwaana mulopwana a Remaliya weera ewaneno oYuda." 
2Kings15:38 Yotami aahookhwa, anavithiwa ni makholowaawe musidadeni ya atithawe Davide. Mwanawe mulopwana Ahazi, ti aamurandenle." 
2Kings16:1 Ahazi, mwaana mulopwana a Yotami, aavariwa omwene wa oYuda vayaakhani yanaamuloko niithannapiili ya olamula wa Peka, mwaana mulopwana a Remaliya." 
2Kings16:2 Ahazi, apaceraka olamula aarino iyaakha miloko miili, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha muloko niithannamosa. Ahiyanyihaka sa nikholonawe Davide khaapanke yeeyo eri yooreera vamaithoni wa Yave, Mulukwaawe." 
2Kings16:3 Aatthara iphiro sa mamwene a oYixrayeli, mpaka aamuhisa mwanawe mulopwana ntoko yooveleela atakihaka hiiho ikhovelelo sa mwiikho sa miloko sikina mwa seiye Yave oomonlaawe ohoolo wa aYixrayeli." 
2Kings16:4 Aapaka sooveleela ni aahisa erubani* mmanttumuxani ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina ni vathi wa nyiri soohiyanahiyana. 
2Kings16:5 Vano Resini, mwene a awArami ni Peka, mwaana mulopwana a Remaliya, yaarowa weera ewaneno oYerusaleemu, enarica. Vaheera khayaawenre ongwina." 
2Kings16:6 Ehuhuweene yeele Resini, mwene a awArami aakuxa wElati aweerelaka awArami awoomolaka asilopwana a oYuda. Vahoolowaya awEdomi yaavolowamo enakhalamo mpaka olelo." 
2Kings16:7 Ahazi aamurumihela anamitthenga Tigelati-Pileseri, mwene a wAsiriya amweerelaka: “Miyo murumeiyaanyu ni mpatta wa omwenaanyu. Ngweeke ni mukoopole mmatatani mwa mwene a awArami ni mwene a oYixrayeli ankiwanano.”" 
2Kings16:8 Ahazi aakuxa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha* yaari Mpaani mwa Muluku ni ikwartu sa mihakhu sa empa ya emwene, anamurumihela mwene a wAsiriya ntoko yoovaha." 
2Kings16:9 Mwene a wAsiriya aahaakhulela yooveka ela anawanano oDamasku, anakuxa. Aawoomolela amakaaya oKiri amwiivaka Rezini." 
2Kings16:10 Vano mwene Ahazi aarowa oDamasku weera amukumaneno Tigelati-Pileseri, mwene a wAsiriya. Aawoonawo altaari*, anamurumihela musaserdoti* Uriya ecaambulo ya altaareene* yaale vamoha ni miringosaya sootheene sintthuneya otekela." 
2Kings16:11 Vano musaserdoti* Uriya aahaateka altaari* attharihaka ecaambulo mwene Ahazi aamurumihenlaawe oDamasku, anamaliha mwene ahinaaye ohokolowa." 
2Kings16:12 Mwene ahokolowakaru oDamasku, aawoona altaari*, anawaattamela, anapakawo sooveleela." 
2Kings16:13 Aapaka sooveleelasaya sa etrigu ni sa ohisa, ahelaka sooveleelasawe sa owura ni aattikitthela ephome ya murettele valtaarini*." 
2Kings16:14 Altaari* a ebronze* yaari vamaithoni wa Yave eriyari ya altaari* anyowani ni Empa ya Yave, yaaceendyiwa ni Ahazi awiikaathiki mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa altaari* anyowani." 
2Kings16:15 Vano mwene Ahazi aamulamulela musaserdoti* Uriya: “Valtaarini* atokweene mpake sooveleela sa oxeexelo; soohisa ni sooveleela sa oxekuwa sa etrigu; sooveleela sa mwene soohisa ni sa etrigu, nitho sooveleela soohisa sa atthu ootheene mweelaponi, vamoha ni sooveleelasaya sa etrigu ni soowura. Mwamwaraxele valtaarini* ephome yootheene ya sooveleela soohisa. Altaari* a ebronze* eneera ekileelihere.”" 
2Kings16:16 Vano musaserdoti* Uriya aapaka yeeyo mwene Ahaziya aamulamulenlaawe. 
2Kings16:17 Mwene Ahaziya aavenxa itthaabwa saalipihera altaari* ni ibasiyasaya sa itthabwasene seiye. Aavenxatho ebasiya etokotoko yiitthaniwa Ephareiya yaari mmuru wa imombe ilopwana sa ebronze*, aniikaathi mmathipeloni a maluku." 
2Kings16:18 Aavenxa mulako mukhaani wa eSaabadu waatekiwe Mpaani mwa Yave nitho waavoleeliwa wa emwene vaate wa Empa ya Yave niwoko na otthuna wa mwene a wAsiriya. 
2Kings16:19 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Ahazi – sootheene aapankaawe – oolempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda." 
2Kings16:20 Ahazi aahookhwa, anavithiwa ni makholowaawe musidadeni ya Davide. Mwanawe mulopwana Hizekiya, ti aamurandenle." 
2Kings17:1 Hoxeya, mwaana mulopwana a Ela, aavariwa omwene wa oYixrayeli vayaakhani yanaamuloko ni piili ya olamula wa Ahazi, mwene a oYuda. Hoxeya aalamula oSamariya iyaakha ithanniixexe." 
2Kings17:2 Aapaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave, mene khawaalikana ni mamwene a oYixrayeli yaalamula owo ahinaaye." 
2Kings17:3 Xalemaneseri, mwene a wAsiriya, aarowa omuwanano Hoxeya aari mpatta wa omwenaawe ni aamuliva musoko." 
2Kings17:4 Vaheera mwene a wAsiriya aahoonelela weera Hoxeya aari namavariha, niwoko aamurumihela So, mwene a wExipitu, anamitthenga ni aahiya omulivela musoko, ntoko aakhovelenlaawe oliva khula eyaakha. Tivawo Xalemaneseri aamutthukihalaawe, anamvonyera okaliposo." 
2Kings17:5 Mwene a wAsiriya aavolowa elapo yootheene, anarowa oSamariya, anarica wa iyaakha tthaaru." 
2Kings17:6 Mwene a wAsiriya aakuxa oSamariya vayaakhani yanaathannaaxexe ya olamula wa Hoxeya, anaavarela aYixrayeli wAsiriya. Aahaatekiha oHala, elapo ya oGozani, mukerekhere mooloko Habori ni mmittettheni sa oMedesi." 
2Kings17:7 Sootheene seiye seereiye niwoko aYixrayeli yaamutthekela Yave Mulukwaaya, mwa Yoowo aakhumihale wExipitu yaalamuliwaayamo ni ikuru sa Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu. aYixrayeli yaalapa miluku sikina," 
2Kings17:8 ettharihaka mweettelo wa miloko sikina, mwa seiye Yave oomonlaawe ohoolowaya nitho ikhovelelo mamwene a oYixrayeli yaapakelenlaaya." 
2Kings17:9 Muxiirini aYixrayeli yaampakela Yave Mulukwaaya itthu soonanara. Yaateka mapuro a olapa miluku sikina mmasidadenimwaya sootheene – okhuma itoore* yeemelaayawo anamalipelela mpaka isidade soolipihiwaxa. 
2Kings17:10 Aahiikaathi maluku ootteeliheriwa ni amarimbu a muluku muthiyana Axera mmattumuxani ootheene ni vathi wa nyiri soohiyanahiyana. 
2Kings17:11 Yaahisa erubani* mmattumuxani ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina, ntoko saapakaaya miloko oomonlaawe Yave ohoolowaya. Yaapaka itthu soonanara mwa seiye saatannyale isara sa Yave." 
2Kings17:12 Yaalapa miluku sikina Yave aarooweerelaru: “Muhipake yeeyo!” 
2Kings17:13 Yave aahooperera oYixrayeli ni oYuda mwa maprofeetaawe ni anamooniheraawe* ootheene: “Muhiye iphirosanyu soonanara. Mwiiwelele ikanosaka ni malamulowaaka, muttharaka Nlamulo nootheene kaalamulenlaaka makholowaanyu wiiwelela ni koovanghaakani mwa arumeiyaaka maprofeeti.”" 
2Kings17:14 Wa soothesene, khayaatthunne owiiwa ni yaari oottiyamaaru ntoko makholowaaya, mwa yaale yahaamuroromenle Yave Mulukwaaya." 
2Kings17:15 Yaakhootta ikanosawe ni wiiraana aapankaawe ni makholowaaya nitho soowoopererasawe. Yaatthara miluku soohimuteko ethatuwaka asineenaaya oohimuteko. Yaatakiha miloko saarukureenre, Yave aarooweerelaru: “Muhitakihe.”" 
2Kings17:16 Aahiya malamulo ootheene a Yave Mulukwaaya, eniipakela miluku miili ni ekhalelo ya mwaamombe a eseeta, nitho nrimbu nimoha nootteeliheriwa Axera. Aakokhorela oohoolo wa ithenyeeri sa wiirimu, enamulapa Bahali*." 
2Kings17:17 Yaahaahisa ntoko yooveleela asinamwanaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana. Yaaheettelasa ihako ni sa okhwiri, yiithumihaka weera epake soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave, enatannya isarasawe." 
2Kings17:18 Tivawo isara sa Yave saapattenlaaya aYixrayeli, anawoomola vamaithoniwawe. Yaahanle epuumba ya Yuda paahi," 
2Kings17:19 mene hata yeeyo khayiiwelenle malamulo a Yave Mulukwaaya. Yaatthara ikhovelelo soonanara aYixrayeli yaapakelenlaaya. 
2Kings17:20 Tivawo Yave aahingyaawe aYixrayeli ootheene; aahaahooxa, awinnyereraka mmatatani mwa anamahuhula mpaka owoomola vamaithoniwawe." 
2Kings17:21 Vahoolo woomwalamwaliha oYixrayeli ni omwene wa Davide, atthu a oYixrayeli yaamvara omwene Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati. Yerobowami aahaahuluxa aYixrayeli omutthara Yave aapakihaka yoottheka etokotoko." 
2Kings17:22 aYixrayeli yannapwaherera mootthekani moothemwene mwa Yerobowami. Khayaahulungweru 
2Kings17:23 mpaka Yave aawoomonlaawe vamaithoniwawe, ntoko aawooperenraawe mwa arumeiyaawe maprofeeti ootheene. Hiiho atthu a oYixrayeli yaavenxiwa mweelaponimwaya enaronghiwa elapo ya wAsiriya, mwa weiwo ankhalaayawo mpaka olelo." 
2Kings17:24 Mwene a wAsiriya aahaaruuha atthu a oBabiloniya, oKuta, wa Awa, oHamati ni oSefarevayimi, anaatekiha mmittettheni sa oSamariya yaarandelaka aYixrayeli. Awosa yaahaakamela oSamariya enamaka mmittetthenimwaya." 
2Kings17:25 Epaceraka omakawo khayaamulapa Yave, tivawo Owo aaruminghaawe amwatto variyariwaya ni ale yaawiiva akina-akina a amaki ale." 
2Kings17:26 Mwene a wAsiriya aaleeliwa: “Atthu nyuwo mwaaruuhalaanyu ni mwaatekinghaanyu mmittettheni sa oSamariya khaasuwenle yeeyo Muluku a elapo eyo onnyesererihaawe. Owo ohaarumiha amwatto variyarwaya ni alesa anniwiiva, niwoko atthu a weiwo khaasuwenle yeeyo Muluku a elapo eyo onnyesererihaawe.”" 
2Kings17:27 Vano mwene a wAsiriya aalamula ha: “Munghokoloxere mmoha a asaserdoti* mwaavanraanyu oSamariya weera akhalewo ni weera aaxuttihe atthu yeeyo Muluku a elapo eyo onnyesererihaawe.” 
2Kings17:28 Hiiho mmoha a asaserdoti* yaavariwe oSamariya aahokoleela, anakhala oBeteli, anaaxuttiha atthu moota woomulapa Yave." 
2Kings17:29 Waarookhalaru hiiho, khula muloko waahiipakela milukusaya mmittettheni yiitekinghaaya, oniikaathi mmattumuxani ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina aYixrayeli yaapankaaya yaaraaya oSamariya." 
2Kings17:30 aBabiloniya yaapaka oSukoti-Benoti; aKuta yaapaka oNeregali ni aHamati yaapaka wAxima; 
2Kings17:31 awAwa yaapaka oNibehazi ni oTaretaki ni aSefarevayimi yaapakela milukusaya Adrameleki ni Anameleki sooveleela soohisa yaahisaka anamwanaaya. 
2Kings17:32 Awo yaamulapa Yave, vaheera akhalaru mutthu yaamunkhaliha musaserdoti* weera arumeele mmattumuxani ootteeliheriwa milukusaya." 
2Kings17:33 Yaamulapa Yave, mene yaalapatho milukusaya ettharaka ikhovelelo sa miloko yaaruuhiwaayamo." 
2Kings17:34 Mpaka olelo annapwaherera ni olapawaya wa khalayi. Khaanimulapa Yave, hata khaaniiwelela ikano, sootthuna, malamulo, hata sooruma mwa seiye Yave aavanghaawe ekhapira ya Yakobe, mwa yoowo Yave aamuttenghaawe Yixrayeli." 
2Kings17:35 Yave akhalihaka wiiraana ni aYixrayeli, aahaalamulela: “Muhilaperu miluku sikina naari muhikokhorele ohoolowaya, muhirumeele, hata muhipakele sooveleela." 
2Kings17:36 Vaheera munlape paahi Yave, mwa Yoowo ookhumihaleni wExipitu ni ikuruxa ni moono wooweraxa. Munkokhorele Yooworu ni mumpakele sooveleela." 
2Kings17:37 Mwiiwelele nnenesene ikano, sootthuna, malamulo ni sooruma Owo oolepenlaaweni. Muhilape miluku sikina." 
2Kings17:38 Muhittiwale wiiraana kipankaaka ni nyuwo. Muhilape miluku sikina. 
2Kings17:39 Ohiyanawaya, munlape Yave Mulukwaanyu. Ti Yoowo ongwoopolani mmatatani mwa amwiittanaanyu ootheene.”" 
2Kings17:40 Wa soothesene, awo khayaamwiiwelenle, mene yannapwaherera ni mitekosaya sa khalayi." 
2Kings17:41 Naari miloko iye saamulapeene Yave, sannalapatho milukusaya. Mpaka olelo anamwanaaya ni ikhapirasaya annapwaherera opaka ntoko yaapankaaya makholowaaya." 
2Kings18:1 Hizekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Ahazi, mwene a oYuda aavariwa omwene wa oYuda vayaakhani yanaararu ya olamula wa Hoxeya, mwaana mulopwana a Ela, mwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings18:2 Hizekiya apaceraka olamula aarino iyaakha miloko miili niithanu, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha miloko miili niithanniixexe. Nsina na amayawe naari Abiya, mwaana muthiyana a Zakariya." 
2Kings18:3 Aapaka yeeyo eri yooreera vamaithoni wa Yave ntoko naapankaaya nikholonawe Davide. 
2Kings18:4 Aaphwata mmattumuxani ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina, anapwexa nluku nootteeliheriwa, anaamoroxa amarimbu a Axera. Aahintakasa enowa ya ebronze* Moisesi aapankaawe niwoko mpaka ehuhuweene yeele aYixrayeli yannakhovelela ohiserawo erubani*. Vano enowa ele yiitthaniwa Nehuxitani." 
2Kings18:5 Hizekiya aamuroromela Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli. Mmamweneni a oYuda wootheene khawowo aamulikananne yoowo, okhuma khalayi mpaka vano." 
2Kings18:6 Aamutthara Yave moota woororomeleya ahimuhiyaka. Aahiiwelela malamulo Yave aamuvanghaawe Moisesi. 
2Kings18:7 Yave aari ni yoowo ni sootheene aapakaawe sannamweettela nnene. Aangwanano mwene a wAsiriya ahimurumeelakatho. 
2Kings18:8 Aahaawina aFilisti okhuma itoore* sa anamalipelela mpaka isidade soolipihiwaxa – mpakatho oGaza ni elapwaaya. 
2Kings18:9 Vayaakhani yanaaxexe ya olamula wa Hizekiya, eyo tiiyo vayaakhani yanaathannapiili ya olamula wa Hoxeya, mwaana mulopwana a Ela, mwene a oYixrayeli, Xalameneseri, mwene a wAsiriya, aarowa oSamariya, anarica." 
2Kings18:10 Simalakaru iyaakha tthaaru, awAsiriya yaakuxa oSamariya. Hiiho oSamariya waakuxiwa vayaakhani yanaathannamosa ya olamula wa Hizekiya ni vayaakhani yanaathannaaxexe ya Hoxeya, mwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Kings18:11 Mwene a wAsiriya aahaavara aYixrayeli ancipale aaroihelaka Asiriya, anaatekiha oHala, elapo ya oGozani, mukerekhere mooloko Habori ni mmittettheni sa oMedesi." 
2Kings18:12 Eyo yeereenle niwoko aYixrayeli khayaamwiiwelenle Yave Mulukwaaya, mene yaaramusa wiiraanawawe – sootheene Moisesi, murumeiyi a Yave, aalamulenlaawe. Awo khayiiwale malamulo hata khayaakwanihenre." 
2Kings18:13 Vayaakhani yanaamuloko niixexe ya olamula wa Hizekiya, Senakeribi, mwene a wAsiriya, aawanano isidade soolipihiwa sootheene sa oYuda, anakuxa." 
2Kings18:14 Vano Hizekiya, mwene a oYuda, aamurumihela mwene a wAsiriya oLakixi mutthenga ola: “Kootapanya. Muhikiwanenotho ni miyo kinimoolivani yeeyo muneeraanyu mutthune.” Mwene a wAsiriya aamunyesereriha Hizekiya omuliva italentu* macira mararu sa eparatha* ni italentu* miloko miraru sa eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
2Kings18:15 Vano Hizekiya aamvaha eparatha* yootheene yaari Mpaani mwa Muluku ni mukwartuni ya omuhakhuni wa empa ya emwene. 
2Kings18:16 Ehuhuweene yeele Hizekiya aavenxa eyuuma yoorikaxa yaahuruweleliwe masele a Empa ya Yave ni amarimbweene, anamvaha mwene a wAsiriya." 
2Kings18:17 Mwene a wAsiriya aamurumiha mutokweenaawexa, mutokweene a anakhottwaawe ni mutokweene a anamalakaawe vamoha ni anakhotto ancipale okhuma oLakixi wa mwene Hizekiya oYerusaleemu. Yaaphiya oYerusaleemu, eneemela vayiikalaandeni a nratta na osulu, mmuseweni onkela wa Ematta ya Namakattha." 
2Kings18:18 Awosa yaamwiitthana mwene ni Eliyakimi, mwaana mulopwana a Hilikiya, namareherera empa ya emwene; Xebena, namalepa, ni Yowa, mwaana mulopwana a Asafi, mutokweene a ilivuru sa nyaha sa mwene, yaarowa waakumanano." 
2Kings18:19 Vano mutokweene a anamalakaawe mwene aaweerela: “Mwamuleele Hizekiya: ‘Mwene mutokweene, mwene a wAsiriya onkoha: Munroromelani?" 
2Kings18:20 Muneera weera mookhalano miruku ni owera owana, mene ti masu a siiyo paahi. Munimuroromela taani wookivaanya hiiho?" 
2Kings18:21 Moone, munroromela wExipitu ori ntoko ettheere yoowiintakiwa enghoma ni emvulaliha ntata na mutthu onlipano yeeyo. Ti hiiho Farawu* mwene a wExipitu ongweerihelaawe animuroromela." 
2Kings18:22 Mwaakeerela: “Hiyo nnimuroromela Yave Mulukwaahu” – Hizekiya aavenxa mattumuxaawe ni altaaraawe aanyesererihaka ootheene olapa valtaarini* oYerusaleemu! 
2Kings18:23 Vano mwiiwanane ni pwiiyaaka, mwene a wAsiriya. Miyo kinimoovahani ikavalu* macira miloko miili nyuwo mwakhalano anamweettihaaya!" 
2Kings18:24 Nyuwo munroromela wExipitu weera yoovaheeni ikaaro ni anamweettihaaya. Vaheera khamungwera ongwina naari mutokweene mmoha a asikhaani a apwiyaaka. 
2Kings18:25 Ohiya toko yeeyo, kirweenle owanano ni opwatha elapo ela niwoko na olamula wa Yave. Ti Yave mwaneenaawe okeerenle weera kiwanane ni kiphwate nipuro nna.’”" 
2Kings18:26 Vano Eliyakimi, mwaana mulopwana a Hilikiya, Xebena ni Yowa yaamweerela mutokweene a anamalakaawe mwene: “Dyoontte muulumeke ni arumeiyaanyu munuulumoni na Eramewu, niwoko nnimwiiwexexa. Muhuulume vaHeberi yeenre atthu ari vasulu vaxirini eniiwa.”" 
2Kings18:27 Wa soothesene, mutokweene a anamalakaawe mwene aawaakhula: “Apwiyaaka aarumiha mutthenga ola wa ootheene – khoohiyono wa pwiyaanyu ni nyuwosa paahi. Atthu ale vaxirini animooca mahilokaaya ni anoowura minyoososaya, hiiho ntoko nyuwosa.”" 
2Kings18:28 Vano mutokweene a anamalakaawe mwene aaheemela, anakhuwela vaHeberi: “Mwiiwe masu a mwene mutokweene, mwene a wAsiriya!" 
2Kings18:29 Mwene oneera ha: Muhilokotthiwe ni Hizekiya! Owo khangwera owoopolani mmatatanimwaka. 
2Kings18:30 Muhimuhiye Hizekiya ooviriyelakani weera munroromele Yave, owo aweerelakani: ‘Vekhaikhai Yave onoonoopola hiyo; esidade ela kheerwa evahereriwa mmatatani mwa mwene a wAsiriya.’" 
2Kings18:31 Muhimwiiwelele Hizekiya! Mwene a wAsiriya oneera ha: Mwiiraane ni miyo ni mwiixinnyerere wa miyo. Hiiho khula mutthu a nyuwo onimooca sa emattaawe ya iwuuva* ni nyirisawe sa efiigu* ni onoowura maahi a muhimenimwawe 
2Kings18:32 mpaka kineeraaka kookuxeeni kooroihakani mulaponi enlikana elapwaanyu. Elapo eyo erino etrigu ni eviinyu enyowani; sooca ni imatta sa iwuuva*; elapo ya nyiri sooliveira* ni oravo. Muthanleke okumi, ohikhanle okhwa! Muhimwiiwelele Hizekiya, niwoko onimoolokotthani aweerelakani: ‘Yave onoonitapuxa.’" 
2Kings18:33 Khawoworu muluku mukina wa wakhalaru muloko mukina owenre woopola elapwaaya mwa ntata na mwene a wAsiriya. 
2Kings18:34 Miluku sa oHamati ni wArepadi siri woowi? Miluku sa oSefarevayimi, oHena ni wIwa siri woowi? Iye khasaawenre ovuluxa oSamariya mmatatanimwaka." 
2Kings18:35 Khawoworu muluku mukina wa ilapo sootheene seiye owenre woopola elapwaaya mmatatanimwaka. Ongwereya hai Yave woopola oYerusaleemu mmatatanimwaka?” 
2Kings18:36 Vaheera atthu yaari emaalelo, niwoko mwene aahaalamulela: “Muhimwaakhule.”" 
2Kings18:37 Eliyakimi, mwaana mulopwana a Hilikiya, namareherera empa ya emwene, Xebena, namalepa, ni Yowa, mwaana mulopwana a Asafi, mutokweene a ilivuru sa nyaha sa mwene, yaarowa wa Hizekiya ni ikuwo soowaahuwa, enamuthalihera yeeyo mutokweene a anamalakaawe mwene a wAsiriya aahimmaawe." 
2Kings19:1 Mwene Hizekiya iiwakaru yeeyo, aahaahula ikuwosawe, anawara sowiinanelano, anavolowa Mpaani mwa Yave." 
2Kings19:2 Aamurumiha Eliyakimi, namareherera empa ya emwene; Xebena, namalepa, ni asitokweene a asaserdoti* – ootheene ewanreene isaakho – wa Yesaya, mwaana mulopwana a Amozi." 
2Kings19:3 Awosa yaamweerela: “Hizekiya oneera ha: Olelo ti nihuku na othanana, ohiihiwa ni oyevihiwa. Nri ntoko muthiyana ohanle vakhaani oyara ahikhanleno ikuru sooyarano." 
2Kings19:4 Enoowereya weera Yave Mulukwaanyu ohiiwa masu ootheene a mutokweene a anamalaka, mwa yoowo pwiiyaawe, mwene a wAsiriya, aamurumihalaawe omutheya Muluku Mukumi. Yave Mulukwaanyu amuttaruxe niwoko na masu ale. Tivawo, munidyoonttelelele Muluku hiyo nihanle ni okumi.”" 
2Kings19:5 Asitokweene a mwene Hizekiya ephiyakaru wa Yesaya," 
2Kings19:6 owo aaweerela: “Mwamuleele pwiiyaanyu: ‘Yave oneera ha: Muhoove yeeyo mwiiwalaanyu – masweene yaale murumeiyi a mwene a wAsiriya okiveihalaaweno. 
2Kings19:7 Mwiiwe, kinoomwiiwiha mwene a wAsiriya mutthenga oneera omutthikihere elapwaawe. Aaphiyakawo, kinoopakiha weera iiviwe.’”" 
2Kings19:8 Mutokweene a anamalaka a mwene iiwakaru weera mwene a wAsiriya aattimula oLakixi, owo aahokolowatho, anamphwanya mwene awananakano oLibena." 
2Kings19:9 Vano Senakeribi aahaakhela mutthenga weera Tirehaka, muKuxi, mwene a wExipitu, eera arwaaka weera angwaneno yoowo. Tivawo aamurumihenlaawetho Hizekiya anamitthenga emweerelaka:" 
2Kings19:10 “Mwamweerele Hizekiya, mwene a oYuda: Muhimuhiye Muluku, mwa Yoowo munimuroromelaanyu, oolokotthakani, Owo aweerelakani: ‘oYerusaleemu khoowiniwa ni mwene a wAsiriya.’" 
2Kings19:11 Vekhaikhai, mohiiwa seiye mamwene a wAsiriya yaapakenlaaya ilapo sikina, ephwataka woomalela. Munuupuwela weera munimoopoliwa?" 
2Kings19:12 Miluku sa miloko – miluku sa oGozani, oHarani, oRezefi ni sa atthu a wEdeni yaari oTeli-Asayiri – saaphwatiwa ni makholowaaka sihiweraka otapuxa." 
2Kings19:13 Ori woowi mwene a oHamati; mwene a wArepadi; mwene a esidade ya oSefarevayimi; mwene a oHena hoye hoye a wIwa?” 
2Kings19:14 Hizekiya aahaakhela ekaratta wa anamitthenga, anasoma. Vano aavolowa Mpaani mwa Yave, anatapuruxa vamaithoni wa Yave." 
2Kings19:15 Hizekiya aamvekela Yave: “Ii! Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, mukilaathiye variyari wa akerubini*, ti Nyuwo paahi muri Muluku a mamwene ootheene a elapo ya vathi. Moopattuxa wiirimu ni vathi." 
2Kings19:16 Ii! Yave mwiiwe ni moone. Mwiiwe mutthenga Senakerebi orumihalaawe weera amuveihe Muluku Mukumi. 
2Kings19:17 Ii! Yave Ettiitthu weera mwene a wAsiriya aaphwata milokosene seiye ni ilaposaya. 
2Kings19:18 Aavonyera milukusaya mmooroni, aphwataka, niwoko khasaahiyono miluku, mene nyiri ni maluku paahi ookheriwa ni atthu." 
2Kings19:19 Vano Yave Mulukwaahu, munitapuxe mmatatanimwawe weera omwene wootheene wa elapo ya vathi osuwele weera Nyuwo, Yave, ti Muluku.”" 
2Kings19:20 Vanonto Yesaya, mwaana mulopwana a Amozi, aamurumihela Hizekiya mutthenga ola: “Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli oneera ha: Kohiiwa nivekelonanyu mwaha wa Senakeribi, mwene a wAsiriya." 
2Kings19:21 Masu Yave omuulumenlaawe yoowo ti ala: ‘Mwaamwali oowiikosoopa oSiyoni ohooveihani ni ohootthebwani apukunyaka muru. Mwaana muthiyana a oYerusaleemu ompukunya muru nyuwo mutthawaka. 
2Kings19:22 Munruwanne taani? Mumveihale taani? Mwaakhuwelenle taani? Mungwehexexaka ngwiixoonani? Ti Ootteela a oYixrayeli! 
2Kings19:23 Aani, moomuruwana Yave mwa anamitthengaanyu. Mweenre: “Koowela mmattumuxani a nyaako ni ikaarosaka sincipale sa ikavalu*; aani mattumuxa oosulusulu a oLibanu. Kohuuha nyirisaya sa esedari* soorakamaxa; sooreerela sa nyirisaya. Koovolowa mweelaponimwanyu moorakamelaxa ni moothakoni wootikanela." 
2Kings19:24 Koothipa ihime mweelaponi sa anamarwa ni koowurawo maahi. Kohuumiha nyooloko sootheene sa wExipitu ni inaawosaka.” 
2Kings19:25 Khamusuwenle? Kaalakela yeeyo khalayi. Okhuma khalayi miyo kaavaanela yeeyo kinkhumelelihaaka vano – weera nyuwo munoohiya isidade soolipihiwaxa sireene milepe. 
2Kings19:26 Amakaaya, ekhulumungweene, yaapororaxa ni wuulihiwa muru. Ari ntoko soomela sa ntuphini ni ntoko munyepu; ntoko malaxi ammela vampani enuuma ehikhomaanle." 
2Kings19:27 Vaheera Miyo koosuwela muraanyuwo; ehuhu ya orowawanyu ni orwawanyu ni mwaakinyoonyeriwaka. 
2Kings19:28 Niwoko na okinyoonyeriwawanyu ni wiixoonawanyu, kinimoohomani ni nimeso mphulanimwanyu ni yooweettiheriwa mwaamunama vayanoniwanyu koohokoloxerakani ephiro murweenlaanyu.’" 
2Kings19:29 Wa nyuwo, Hizekiya, kinimoovahani eneneero ela: Mutano munimooca soomorela ni mwaahiyu seiyo sineera siphuwe. Vaheera eyaakha yanaararu, mwaaleke ni muhepheke; mwaale imatta sa iwuuva* ni muce soowiimasaya." 
2Kings19:30 Yaale ahanle a ekhapira ya Yuda eniiphuwele ntoko nyiri sinrakamelihaaya mikwankhwaarisaya ni iphandisaya siniima wusawusa. 
2Kings19:31 Vekhaikhai okhuma oYerusaleemu ni omwaako Siyoni eniihalahalemo akumi. Nthiti na Yave a ikuru sootheene nnookwanihera yeeyo. 
2Kings19:32 Tivawo, Yave ommweerelaawe ha mwene a wAsiriya: ‘Khavolowa esidade ela hata khalathelamoru naari muupa. Khawanano ni exikudu* hata khateka yooricano." 
2Kings19:33 Onoohokoleela ephiro orweenlaawe; khavolowa esidade ela, onghima Yave." 
2Kings19:34 Kinimwaakiha esidade ela ni kinoovuluxa mwa osivelawaka ni wa murumeiyaaka Davide.’” 
2Kings19:35 Ohiyuweene yoole, ndyelo a Yave aarowa yaakonenlaayawo Asiriya, anawiiva anakhotto 185 000. Oxaawaya evenyakaru akinaawo, yaaphwanya yaakonenlaayawo osareiyeene mittembo." 
2Kings19:36 Vano Senakeribi, mwene a wAsiriya, aahuukulula iheemasawe, anapwaha. Aahokoleela oNinive, anakhalawo." 
2Kings19:37 Nihuku nimoha owo alapaka mpaani mwa mulukwaawe Niseroki, anamwanaawe Adrameleki ni Xarezeri yaamwiiva, enatthawela elapo ya wArarati. Mwanawe Esarehadoni ti aamurandenle." 
2Kings20:1 Ehuhuweene yeele Hizekiya aavoreiwa mpaka aahanle vakhaani okhwa. Mprofeeti Yesaya, mwaana mulopwana a Amozi, aarowa omuxekura, anamweerela: “Yave oneera ha: ‘mureherere itthusanyu niwoko munimookhwa; vekhaikhai khamulama.’”" 
2Kings20:2 Hizekiya aahuluwela oxirini, anamvekela Yave:" 
2Kings20:3 “Ii! Yave, muupuwelele moota koorumeenlaakani ni ororomeleya ni murima wootheene. Koopaka yeeyo eri yooreera vamaithoniwanyu.” Ni Hizekiya aahiinla vancipalexa." 
2Kings20:4 Yesaya ahinaaye opwaha vaate, Yave aamulamulela:" 
2Kings20:5 “Muhokolowe ni mwamuleele Hizekiya, muhooleli a mulokwaaka: ‘Yave, Muluku a atithinyu Davide oneera ha: Kohiiwa mavekelowaanyu ni kohoona maithoraanyu; kinimoolamihani. Eviraleene mahuku mararu munoorowa Mpaani mwa Yave." 
2Kings20:6 Kinimwaandyeerera iyaakha muloko niithanu sa okumaanyu. Kinoowoopolani nyuwo ni esidade ela mmatatani mwa mwene a wAsiriya. Kinimwaakiha esidade ela mwa osivelawaka ni wa murumeiyaaka Davide.’ ” 
2Kings20:7 Vano Yesaya aalamula: “Mureherere makhura a efiigu*. Yaapaka yeeyo, anahelawo vanamukoxoni, analama.”" 
2Kings20:8 Hizekiya aamukoha Yesaya: “Eneneero heeni eneera ekoonihere weera Yave onookilamiha ni weera eviraleene mahuku mararu kinoovolowa Mpaani mwa Yave?” 
2Kings20:9 Yesaya aamwaakhula: “Eneneero eneera ewoonihereni weera Yave onookwanihera ohimalaawe ti ela: Muntthuna weera munttuusi wa nsuwa otuphele ohoolo hoye hoye ohokoleele ottuli?” 
2Kings20:10 Hizekiya aamwaakhula: “Khoonrika munttuusi orowa ohoolo. Fataari ohokoleeleke ottuli.” 
2Kings20:11 Vano mprofeeti Yesaya aamvekela Yave, ni Yave aapakiha weera munttuusi ohokoleele ottuli ottharaka mwaakheriwe mmakweeleloni a Ahazi." 
2Kings20:12 Ehuhuweene yeele Merodaki-Baladani, mwaana mulopwana a Baladani, mwene a oBabiloniya aamurumihela Hizekiya ikaratta ni yoovaha niwoko aasuwela sa erettaawe." 
2Kings20:13 Hizekiya aawaakhela anamitthenga, anawoonihera sootheene saari mmapuroni oolipelela – eparatha*, eyuuma yoorikaxa, itthu sootakansiwasa ni makhura ooreera – mpakatho ekwartu ya ikapwitthisawe ni mihakhusawe sootheene. Hizekiya aawoonihera sootheene saari mpaanimwawe ya emwene ni omwenaawe." 
2Kings20:14 Vanonto mprofeeti Yesaya aarowa wa mwene Hizekiya, anamukoha: “Ahimaleni asilopwana awo yoorweenleni ni ankhuma woowi?” Hizekiya aamwaakhula: “Ankhumelela elapo yoorakamela ya oBabiloniya.”" 
2Kings20:15 Mprofeeti aamukoha: “Awosa yoonneni mpaanimwanyu ya emwene?” Hizekiya aamwaakhula: “Ahoona sootheene. Koowoonihera mihakhusaka sootheene.” 
2Kings20:16 Vano Yesaya aamweerela Hizekiya: “Mwiiwe masu a Yave: 
2Kings20:17 Muhoolommo sootheene sa mpaanimwanyu ni sa seiye makholowaanyu yaathokoronraaya mpaka olelo sinookuxiwa sironghiwaka oBabiloniya. Khasihalaru, oneera Yave." 
2Kings20:18 Akina a ekhapiraanyu, emusaanyu xaxaxa, anookuxiwa ni anootatuxiwa inoko* mpaani mwa mwene a oBabiloniya.”" 
2Kings20:19 Hizekiya aamwaakhula: “Masu a Yave muthalinghaanyu aareera.” Owo uupuwela: “Fataari, onuukhale murettele ni olipihiwa mmahukunimwaka.”" 
2Kings20:20 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Hizekiya – sootheene aapankaawe ni moota aathimpaawe nratta ni yiikalaande yaaviraayamo maahi erowaka musidade – oolempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda." 
2Kings20:21 Hizekiya aahookhwa ni mwanawe mulopwana Manaxe ti aamurandenle. 
2Kings21:1 Manaxe apaceraka olamula aarino iyaakha muloko ni piili, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha miloko mithanu niithanu. Amayawe yaari Hefeziba." 
2Kings21:2 Aapaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave attharaka mikhalelo sa mwiikho sa miloko, mwa seiye Yave oomonlaawe ohoolo wa aYixrayeli." 
2Kings21:3 Aatekatho mattumuxa ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina atithawe Hizekiya yaaphwantaaya; aamutekela altaari* Bahali* ni nrimbu nooteeliheriwa Axera, ntoko Ahabi, mwene a oYixrayeli aapankaawe. Aakokhorela ithenyeeri sootheene sa wiirimu, analapa." 
2Kings21:4 Aatekela miluku sikina altaari* Mpaani mwa Yave, mwa mwemmo Yave eenraawe: “Kinimwiikaathi Nsinanaka oYerusaleemu.”" 
2Kings21:5 Mmapuwani oomeeli a Empa ya Yave aatekelamo ithenyeeri sa wiirimu altaari*. 
2Kings21:6 Aamuhisa mwanawe mulopwana; aapaka sa okhwiri ni ihako; aarowa wa anamadyiini ni atthu anuuluma ni minepa. Aapaka soonanara sincipale vamaithoni wa Yave atannyaka isarasawe. 
2Kings21:7 Aakuxa nrimbu noohaneliwa Axera, aniikaathi Mpaani mwa Yave. Vano ti mwaha wa empeene yeele ni oYerusaleemu Muluku aamweerenlaawe Davide ni mwanawe Salomoni: “Variyari wa ipuumba sootheene sa oYixrayeli, kinookhaliha Nsinanaka wa mahuku ootheene Mpaanimu mwa Yave ni mwa oYerusaleemu." 
2Kings21:8 aYixrayeli yakosoopa weera epake sootheene kaalamulenlaaka ni yiiwelela malamulowaaka ootheene murumeiyaaka Moisesi aavanghaawe, nkirwa kiwoomolatho mweelaponi kaavanghaaka makholowaaya.”" 
2Kings21:9 Wa soothesene, muloko khawiiwale. Manaxe aahuluxa muloko moota wooweera waapaka soonanara opwaha miloko Yave aaphwantaawe ohoolo wa aYixrayeli." 
2Kings21:10 Yave aaheera mwa arumeiyaawe, maprofeeti:" 
2Kings21:11 “Manaxe, mwene a oYuda, aapaka sootthekasene seiya sa mwiikho. Aatepaxa opaka waapwaha awAmori yaakhalawo owo ahinaaye ni aahaatthekihatho aYuda ni miluku sikina aapankaawe." 
2Kings21:12 Tivawo Yave Muluku a aYixrayeli oneeraawe ha: Kinooruuhela oYerusaleemu ni oYuda nihooxo moota wooweera ootheene eneera yiiwe sa seiyo anoottiyeya iphumu. 
2Kings21:13 Kinoopakela oYerusaleemu mooteene yoowo kipakenlaaka oSamariya ni omwene wa Ahabi. Kinoopuputta oYerusaleemu ntoko empuputteliwaaya esasaani, enapopheiwa weera yuume." 
2Kings21:14 Kinimwaahiya yaawo eniihalahale a yoohiyeraaka ni kinoowinnyerera amwiittanaaya. Amwiittanaaya ootheene animwaahuhula ni anoowiiyera sootheene," 
2Kings21:15 niwoko aapaka soonanara vamaithoniwaka etannyaka isarasaka okhuma nihuku makholowaaya yaakhummaaya wExipitu mpaka olelo.” 
2Kings21:16 Manaxe aayeehatho ephome yincipale yoohinthowa moota wooweera yaasareya oYerusaleemu wootheene. Ohiya yeeyo, aahaatthekiha aYuda aapakihaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave." 
2Kings21:17 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Manaxe ni soottheka aapankaawe – oolempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda." 
2Kings21:18 Manaxe aahookhwa, anavithiwa ni makholowaawe munttimbeni na empa ya emwene, munttimbeni na Uza. Mwanawe mulopwana, Amoni, ti aamurandenle." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni apaceraka olamula aarino iyaakha miloko miili ni piili, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha piili. Amayawe yaari Mexulemeti, mwaana muthiyana a Haruzi oYoteba." 
2Kings21:20 Aapaka yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave, ntoko yaapankaaya atithawe Manaxe." 
2Kings21:21 Aahaatakiha atithawe mwa sootheene; aalapa milukusene seiye atithawe yaalampaaya akokhorelaka ohoolowaya. 
2Kings21:22 Aamuhiya Yave, Muluku a makholowaawe, ahittharaka ephiro ya Yave." 
2Kings21:23 Asitokweene a awAmoni yaamvaanelela, enamwiivela mpaanimwawe ya emwene." 
2Kings21:24 Vaheera muloko waawiiva ootheene yaamvaanelenle mwene Amoni, onamvara omwene mwanawe mulopwana Yosiya." 
2Kings21:25 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Amoni ni sootheene aapankaawe – oolempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda." 
2Kings21:26 Aavithiwa munihiyenimwawe munttimbeni na Uza. Mwanawe mulopwana, Yosiya, ti aamurandenle." 
2Kings22:1 Yosiya apaceraka olamula aarino iyaakha ithannatthaaru, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha miloko miraru niimoha. Amayawe yiitthaniwa Yedida, mwaana muthiyana a Adaya oBozekati." 
2Kings22:2 Aapaka yeeyo eri yooreera vamaithoni wa Yave attharaka mweettelo wootheene wa atithawe Davide, ahihapuwakaru."
