2Kings22:3 Vayaakhani yanaamuloko niithannatthaaru ya olamulawawe, mwene Yosiya aamurumiha namalepa Xafani, mwaana mulopwana a Azaliya, mwaana mulopwana a Mexulami, wa Empa ya Yave. Aamweerela:" 
2Kings22:4 “Murowe wa mutokweene a asaserdoti*, Hilikiya, mwamuleele weera areherereke musurukhu waaruuhiwe Mpaani mwa Yave, mwa yoowo anamalipelela a milako yaakhenlaaya munlokoni." 
2Kings22:5 Awosa ewinnyerereke musurukhu asilopwana athanliwe owehaweha muteko wa orasela Empa ya Yave. Ni anamawehaweha awo yaaliveke anamateka anrasela Empa ya Yave – 
2Kings22:6 makalipinteiru, anamateka ni mapatarero. Mwaalamule weera yathume itthaabwa ni maluku ookheriwa weera eraseliwekeno Empa ya Yave." 
2Kings22:7 Awosa animweetta moota woororomeleya; khoontthuneya weera ekileele moota amvarelaaya muteko musurukhu.” 
2Kings22:8 Mutokweene a asaserdoti*, Hilikiya, aamweerela Xafani, namalepa: “Koophwanya elivuru ya Nlamulo Mpaani mwa Yave.” Aamvaha Xafani elivuru ni owo aasoma." 
2Kings22:9 Vano namalepa, Xafani, aarowa wa mwene, anamuthalihera: “Arumeiyaanyu aaliva musurukhu waari Mpaani mwa Yave yaavahaka anamateka ni anamawehaweha a Empa ya Yave.”" 
2Kings22:10 Vano namalepa, Xafani, aamweerela mwene: “Mutokweene a asaserdoti*, Hilikiya, ookivaha elivuru.” Xafani aahaasomela amwene elivuru ele." 
2Kings22:11 Mwene iiwakaru masu ale a elivuru ya Nlamulo, aahaahula ikuwosawe." 
2Kings22:12 Aamulamulela mutokweene a asaserdoti*, Hilikiya, Ahikami, mwaana mulopwana a Xafani, Akhebori, mwaana mulopwana a Mikaya, namalepa Xafani, ni namakhavihera a mwene, Asaya:" 
2Kings22:13 “Murowe ni mwakikohakoherele Yave ni mwa muloko ni aYuda ootheene mwaha wa sa seiyo silempwale mulivuruni ela ephwanyingwe. Isara sa Yave wa hiyo ti sitokotoko niwoko makholowaahu khayiiwelenle masu a elivuru ela; khayaapanke sootheene elivuru enilamulenlaaya opaka.” 
2Kings22:14 Musaserdoti* Hilikiya, Ahikami, Akhebori, Xafani ni Asaya yaarowa wuuluma ni mprofeeti muthiyana Huleda, aari mwaariye Xalumi, mwaana mulopwana a Tikeva, mwaana mulopwana a Harehasi, mutokweene a anamathokorora a ikuwo. Huleda aakhala muttetthe munyowani wa oYerusaleemu." 
2Kings22:15 Owo aaweerela: “Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli ooneera ha: ‘Mwamuleele mulopwana oorumihaleni wa Miyo," 
2Kings22:16 ‘Yave oneera ha: Kinooruuhela nihooxo nipuro nna ni atthwaaya, ntoko elempwalaaya mulivuruni mwene a oYuda osommaawe." 
2Kings22:17 Isarasaka nsipattele nipuro nna ni malumi a isarasaka kheerwa ecipihiwa niwoko awo yaakihiya ehiseraka erubani* miluku sikina ni yaatannya isarasaka niwoko na icaambulo sincipale sa miluku sikina yaapankaaya.’ 
2Kings22:18 Mwamuleele mwene a oYuda oorumihaleni weera munkoherere Yave: ‘Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli oneera ha mwaha wa masu mwiiwalaanyu:" 
2Kings22:19 Mweenre mwaahula ikuwosanyu ni mwiinla vamaithoniwaka Miyo koowiiwani, onghima Yave, niwoko murimaanyu wookaakhulela mwiiyevihaka vamaithoni wa Yave mwiiwalaanyu yeeyo kaahimmaaka mwaha wa nipuro nna ni atthwaaya – weera nnoophwatiwa ni nnoolamphwa." 
2Kings22:20 Vanonto Miyo kinimoohiyani mukhwaaka ni ovithiwa mmuretteleni. Khamurwa moona mahooxo ootheene kineeraaka kiruuhele nipuro nna.’” Vano awosa yaarongha yoowaakhula wa mwene. 
2Kings23:1 Vano mwene aawiitthana asitokweene ootheene a oYerusaleemu ni oYuda. 
2Kings23:2 Mwene aarowa wa Empa ya Yave vamoha ni asilopwana a oYuda, a oYerusaleemu, asaserdoti* ni maprofeeti – atthu ootheene okhuma asikhaani mpaka oottittimiheyaxa. Owo aahaasomela ootheenaawo akhuwelaka masu a mulivuruni ya wiiraana yaaphwanyiwe Mpaani mwa Yave." 
2Kings23:3 Mwene aaheemela vanrimbuni vamaithoni wa Yave anarehereratho wiiraana, aroromelihaka omutthara Yave ni wiiwelela malamulowaawe, ikanosawe ni soorumasawe ni murima ni okumi wootheene, akwaniheraka hiiho masu a wiiraana alempwale mulivuruni ela. Vano atthu ootheene yaahiiroromelihatho wiiraana." 
2Kings23:4 Mwene aamulamulela Hilikiya, mutokweene a asaserdoti* ni musaserdoti* mukina vamoha ni anamalipelela a mulako weera ekhumihe Mpaani mwa Yave ikaruma sootheene saapakeliwe Bahali*, Axera ni ithenyeeri sa wiirimu. Aahisa iye okerekhere wa oYerusaleemu, vanreyareyani na oKideroni, anarongha ettuura oBeteli." 
2Kings23:5 Aawoomola asaserdoti* a miluku sikina yaathanliwe ni mamwene a oYuda weera ehisereke erubani* mmattumuxani ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina mmasidadeni sa oYuda ni muxerexere oYerusaleemu. Asaserdoti* ale yaamuhisera erubani* Bahali*, nsuwa, mweeri, ithenyeeri sa nsuwa ni ithenyeeri sootheene sa wiirimu." 
2Kings23:6 Aakhumihatho Mpaani mwa Yave nrimbu na Axera anarongha vanreyareyani na oKideroni mukerekhere oYerusaleemu, anahisawo. Naathatuwa ettuura yaamwaraxeliwe omahiyeni a muloko." 
2Kings23:7 Aaphwatatho ikwartu sa mapuuta asilopwana, mwa yaale yaakhala Mpaani mwa Yave, ni mwa mwemmo asithiyana yaatthavelaayamo Axera." 
2Kings23:8 Yosiya aahaaruuha asaserdoti* ootheene a mittetthe sootheene sa oYuda, anaveiha mattumuxa ootheene ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina, mwa weiwo asaserdoti* yaahiseraayamo erubani*, okhuma oGeba mpaka oBerxeba. Aahaaphwata altaari* a miluku sikina yaari mmilakoni vamoha ni altaari* yaari vamulako wa Yoxuwa, guvernadori a esidade, waari mpatta wa moono woothiyana wa mulako wa esidade." 
2Kings23:9 Asaserdoti* yaamuhirumeelaru valtaarini* a Yave oYerusaleemu yannaca ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu vamoha ni asaserdoti* akina. 
2Kings23:10 Aananariha oTofeti waari vanreyareyani na oBeni-Hinomi moota wooweera khaawo eera awere omuhiserawo mwanawe mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana wa muluku iitthaniwa Moleki. 
2Kings23:11 Aaphwata ikavalu* vamulako wa Empa ya Yave mamwene a oYuda yaatteelihenraaya nsuwa. Saari vanipuwani vakhiviru wa ekwartu ya murumeiyi iitthaniwa Natani-Meleki. Vahoolowaya Yosiya aahisa ikaaro sa ikavalu* saatteeliheriwe nsuwa. 
2Kings23:12 Aahaaphwata altaari* yaatenkaaya mamwene a oYuda vataratoni, vakhiviru wa ekwartu ya osulu ya Ahazi, nitho altaari* aatenkaawe Manaxe mmapuwani meeli a Mpaani mwa Yave. Aahaakhumiha, anaapwexa, anahela itthuxo vanreyareyani na oKideroni." 
2Kings23:13 Mwene aaphwatatho mattumuxa ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina yaari mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oYerusaleemu, mpatta wa ohitto wa Nttumuxa na Ophwata. Yaari altaareene yaale Salomoni, mwene a aYixrayeli, aamutekenlaawe Axeteroti, muluku ookhootteya a aSidoni, Kemoxi, muluku ookhootteya a aMowabe ni Moleki, muluku ookhootteya a awAmoni." 
2Kings23:14 Yosiya aapwexa maluku ootteeliheriwa, anaaphwata amarimbu a Axera, anakhuneela mapuro ale ni makhuva a atthu." 
2Kings23:15 Aahaaphwata mpaka oBeteli altaari* ni mattumuxa ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina yaapakiwe ni Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebati, mwa yoowo aatthekihale aYixrayeli. Aahisa mattumuxa ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina, enathatuwa ntthupi, ahisakatho nrimbu na Axera." 
2Kings23:16 Vano Yosiya awehaka mukhwipi, aahoona mahiye yaari vanttumuxani. Aalamulela okhumihiwamo makhuva yaari mmahiyeni weera ehisiwe valtaarini*. Hiiho aananariha attharihaka masu a Yave yaahimmwale khalayi mwa mulopwana a Muluku sihinaaye itthusene seiye." 
2Kings23:17 Mwene aakoha: “Nluku heeni nenna nookheriwa kinoonaaka vanihiyeni?” asilopwana a esidade yaamwaakhula: “Ninthoonyera nihiye na mulopwana a Muluku aarwiiye oYuda aalaleiyaka altaari* a oBeteli itthusene seiye mpakenlaanyu olelo.” 
2Kings23:18 Mwene aaweerela: “Muhiyeke. Ahikhaleru mukina aneera atave makhuvaawe.” Vano awosa yaahiya makhuvaawe ni makhuva a mprofeeti aarwiiye oSamariya. 
2Kings23:19 Mooteene yoowo aapankaawe oBeteli, Yosiya aakhumihatho anananariha mmattumuxani ootheene ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina yaatenkaaya mamwene a oYixrayeli mmasidadeni sa oSamariya, mwa yaawo yaatannyale isara sa Yave." 
2Kings23:20 Yosiya aawiiva asaserdoti* ootheene a mattumuxa ootteeliheriwa ale, ahisakamo makhuva a atthu. Vahoolowaya aahokoleela oYerusaleemu." 
2Kings23:21 Mwene aahaalamulela atthu ootheene: “Mumpakele Yave Mulukwaanyu efesta ya mPaska*, ntoko elempwalaaya mulivuruni ya wiiraana.”" 
2Kings23:22 Vano, okhuma mmahukuni a aphuki yaahoolela aYixrayeli mpaka mmahukuni a mamwene a oYixrayeli ni a oYuda kheenapakiwe efesta ya mPaska* ntoko ele." 
2Kings23:23 Vaheera vayaakhani yanaamuloko niithannatthaaru ya olamula wa mwene Yosiya, efesta ya mPaska* aapakeliwaawe Yave oYerusaleemu." 
2Kings23:24 Ohiya toko yeeyo Yosiya aawoomolatho anamadyiini ootheene, yaawo yaakoherera minepa, miluku soowootha sa emusi, miluku sikina ni itthu sootheene sa mwiikho saari oYuda ni oYerusaleemu. Aapaka yeeyo weera akwanihere soonyesererihiwa sa Nlamulo nilempwale mulivuruni musaserdoti* Hilikiya, oonelenlaawe Mpaani mwa Yave." 
2Kings23:25 Okhuma khalayi mpaka vahoolo wa Yosiya khawowo mwene ntoko owo. Aahokoleela wa Yave ni murimaawe, okumaawe ni ikurusawe sootheene attharihaka Nlamulo nootheene na Moisesi." 
2Kings23:26 Wa soothesene, Yave khaahingye isarasawe soowoopiha saaluttuwenle oYuda niwoko na sootheene Manaxe aapankaawe, atannyaka isara sa Yave." 
2Kings23:27 Vano Yave aaheera: Kinoovenxa oYuda vamaithoniwaka ntoko kivenxalaaka oYixrayeli ni kinoohiya oYerusaleemu, esidade kaathanlalaaka nitho Empa ya Yave ela mwa yeela kaahimmaaka: 'Nsinanaka nkahelemo.”" 
2Kings23:28 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Yosiya ni sootheene aapankaawe – oolempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda." 
2Kings23:29 Yosiya areene mwene, Farawu* Neko, mwene a wExipitu, aarowa mpaka mooloko Efratesi weera amukhavihere mwene a wAsiriya. Mwene Yosiya aarowa weera angwaneno, mene Farawu* Neko aangwanano, anamwiiva Yosiya oMegidu." 
2Kings23:30 Arumeiyi a Yosiya yaakuxa muttembwaawe mukaaroni ya ikavalu* okhuma oMegidu eronghaka oYerusaleemu, enamvitha munihiyenimwawe. Atthu a oYuda yaamuthanla Yehowahazi, mwaana mulopwana a Yosiya weera aarandele atithawe, enamuttikitthela." 
2Kings23:31 Yehowahazi, apaceraka olamula aarino iyaakha miloko miili ni tthaaru, analamula oYerusaleemu nyeeri miraru. Amayawe yiitthaniwa Hamutali, mwaana muthiyana a Yeremiya a oLibena." 
2Kings23:32 Aapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave ntoko yaapankaaya makholowaawe. 
2Kings23:33 Farawu* Neko aamutthukenle oRibela, mweelaponi ya oHamati, weera ahilamuletho oYerusaleemu. Neko owo aanyesereriha oYuda oliva italentu* ncira sa eparatha* ni etalentu* emoha ya eyuuma yoorikaxa ntoko musoko." 
2Kings23:34 Farawu* Neko aamukhaliha Eliyakimi, mwaana mulopwana a Yosiya, mwene vanipuroni na atithawe, anaceendya nsina na Eliyakimi amuttehaka Yehoyakini. Vaheera aamukuxa Yehohawazi, anamurowano wExipitu mwa weiwo okhwenlaawewo." 
2Kings23:35 Yehoyakini aamuliva Farawu* Neko eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa aanyesereringhaawe. Vano, weera amulive Neko, Yehoyakini aahaanyesereriha atthu a oYuda oliva eparatheene yeele ni eyuumeene yeele yoorikaxa attharihaka okhalano wa khula mutthu." 
2Kings23:36 Yehoyakini, apaceraka olamula aarino iyaakha miloko miili niithanu, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha muloko niimoha. Amayawe yiitthaniwa Zebida, mwaana muthiyana a Pedaya, a oRuma." 
2Kings23:37 Aapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave ntoko yaapankaaya makholowaawe. 
2Kings24:1 Moolamulani mwa Yehoyakini, Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, aakuxa elapo ya oYuda ni Yehoyakini aathatuwa oolamuliwa ni yoowo wa iyaakha tthaaru. Simanleene iyaakha tthaaru, Yehoyakini aaceendya soowuupuwelasawe, anamuvaanelela Nebukadenezari." 
2Kings24:2 Yave aamurumihela Yehoyakini nakhotto a oBabiloniya, wArami, oMowabe ni wAmoni weera yahuhule oYuda. Aahaarumiha weera ephwate oYuda, ntoko Yave aahimmaawe mwa arumeiyaawe maprofeeti." 
2Kings24:3 Iye seereenle oYuda ntoko aalamulenlaawe Yave eerelaka waasusiha ohoolowawe niwoko na soottheka sootheene aapankaawe Manaxe. 
2Kings24:4 Owo aawiiva atthu oohinthowa, asarihaka oYerusaleemu ephome yoohinthowa ni Yave khaatthunne omulevelela." 
2Kings24:5 Vano, mwaha wa sookhumelela sikina sa olamula wa Yehoyakini ni sootheene aapankaawe – oolempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda." 
2Kings24:6 Yehoyakimi aahookhwa ni mwanawe mulopwana Yehoyakini ti aamurandenle. 
2Kings24:7 Mwene a wExipitu khanakhumetho mweelaponimwawe ni anakhottwaawe, niwoko mwene a oBabiloniya aakuxa ilaposawe sootheene, okhuma Nxaapwa na wExipitu mpaka mooloko Efratesi." 
2Kings24:8 Yehoyakini, apaceraka olamula aarino iyaakha muloko niithannatthaaru, analamula oYerusaleemu nyeeri miraru. Amayawe yiitthaniwa Nehuxeta, mwaana muthiyana a Elinatani a oYerusaleemu." 
2Kings24:9 Aapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave ntoko yaapankaaya atithawe. 
2Kings24:10 Ehuhuweene yeele, anakhotto a Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, yaarowa mpaka oYerusaleemu, enaricawo," 
2Kings24:11 ni Nebukadenezari muneenaawe aaphiyawo, anakhottwaawe ericaka." 
2Kings24:12 Yehoyakini, amayawe, arumeiyaawe, maneethaawe ni asitokweenaawe ootheene yaahiixinnyerera wa Nebukadenezari. Vayaakhani yanaathannatthaaru ya olamula wa mwene a oBabiloniya, Nebukadenezari aakuxa oYerusaleemu, anamutthuka Yehoyakini." 
2Kings24:13 Ntoko Yave aahimmaawe, Nebukadenezari aakuxa mihakhu sootheene sa Mpaani mwa Yave ni mpaani mwa emwene, apwexaka ikaruma sa eyuuma yoorikaxa sootheene Salomoni aapakenlaawe Empa ya Yave." 
2Kings24:14 Aahaakuxa ntoko oovariwa amaki ancipale a oYerusaleemu – asitokweene ni anakhotto ootheene; anamaratta ni anamahana a eyuuma – wookwanaka atthu macira macireene muloko. Yaahanle paahi oohaawaxa. 
2Kings24:15 Nebukadenezari aamukuxa Yehoyakini ntoko ootthukiwa amuronghaka oBabiloniya. Aahaakuxatho oYerusaleemu amayaya amwene, axaaraya, asitokweenaaya ni asilopwana oottittimiheyaxa a mulaponi." 
2Kings24:16 Mwene a oBabiloniya aahaaronghatho anakhotto ootheene – wookwanaka macira miloko mithannamiili – oolikaneene owana ni oolipaxa, nitho anamaratta ni anamahana a eyuuma macira muloko." 
2Kings24:17 Aamukhaliha Mataneya, atatawe Yowakimi, mwene a vanipuroniwawe, anaceendya nsinanawe amuttehaka Zedekiya." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekiya, apaceraka olamula aarino iyaakha miloko miili niimoha, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha muloko niimoha. Amayawe yiitthaniwa Hamutali, mwaana muthiyana a Yeremiya a oLibena." 
2Kings24:19 Aapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave, ntoko aapankaawe Yehoyakini." 
2Kings24:20 Sootheene iye seereiye oYerusaleemu ni oYuda niwoko na isara sa Yave ni ommaleloni, aawoomola vamaithoniwawe. Vano Zedekiya aamvaanya mwene a oBabiloniya." 
2Kings25:1 Vayaakhani yanaathannaaxexe ya olamula wa Zedekiya, vanihukuni nanaamuloko na mweeri wanaamuloko, Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, aarowa oYerusaleemu ni anakhottwaawe ootheene. Aakonenle ohoolo wa esidade anapaka soowelelano exiri." 
2Kings25:2 Esidade yaariciwa mpaka eyaakha yanaamuloko niimoha ya olamula wa mwene Zedekiya. 
2Kings25:3 Vanihukuni nanaathannaaxexe na mweeri wanaaxexe etala yaatepaxa ovola moota wooweera khayaariworu yooca muloko. 
2Kings25:4 Vano exiri ya esidade yaapwexiwa ni anakhotto ootheene a oYuda yaatthawa ni ohiyu eviraka vamulako eriyari ya ixiri piili vakhiviru wa nttimbe na mwene, yaarooricaru aBabiloniya esidade. Awosa yaatthawela mpatta wa wAraba," 
2Kings25:5 mene anakhotto a oBabiloniya yaamuttharelela mwene, enamuphwanya vanreyareyani na oYeriko. Anakhottwaawe ootheene yaamutthawa mwene" 
2Kings25:6 ni owo aavariwa. Aaroihiwa wa mwene a oBabiloniya aari oRibela, mwa weiwo aathoriheliwaawewo." 
2Kings25:7 Yaawiiva anamwane asilopwana a Zedekiya vamaithoniwawe, enazoola maithwaawe, enamutthuka ni onyooro wa ebronze*, enamurowano oBabiloniya." 
2Kings25:8 Vanihukuni nanaathannameeli na mweeri wanaathanu, vayaakhani yanaamuloko niithanniixexe ya olamula wa Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, Nebuzaradani, mutokweene a anakhotto ooweraxa a mwene ni namalaka a mwene a oBabiloniya aavolowa oYerusaleemu." 
2Kings25:9 Aahisa Empa ya Yave, empa ya emwene, ni impa sootheene sa oYerusaleemu. Aahisatho soopakiwa sootheene sootthuneyaxa." 
2Kings25:10 Anakhotto ootheene yaamuhoola Nebuzaradani, yaapwexa ixiri sa oYerusaleemu." 
2Kings25:11 Nebuzaradani, mutokweene a anakhotto ooweraxa a mwene, aahaarongha wootthukiwani amaki yaahanle musidade; yaale yiixinnyerenre wa mwene a oBabiloniya ni yaale yaahanle a muloko." 
2Kings25:12 Vaheera Nebuzaradani aahaahiya akina a oohaawaxa a mulaponi weera evareke muteko mmatta sa iwuuva* ni imatta sikina. 
2Kings25:13 aBabiloniya yaahaaphwata amarimbu a ebronze*, ikaaro sa ebronze* ni Ephareiya ya ebronze* yaari Mpaani mwa Yave, enarongha ebronze* oBabiloniya." 
2Kings25:14 Yaakuxatho mookhupelamu ettuura, apoxoro, soorehererano mutthambo, isasaani ni ikaruma sa ebronze* sootheene saavareliwa muteko Mpaani mwa Yave." 
2Kings25:15 Mutokweene a anakhotto ooweraxa a mwene aakuxa yootholelano makhala ni ibasiya soovuuvihera – sootheene soopakiwa ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreeraxa hoye hoye eparatha* yooreeraxa. 
2Kings25:16 Vano atthu khayaawenre oringa olemelawaya ebronze* ya amarimbu eeli, Ephareiya ni ikaaro sa ebronze* mwa seiye Salomoni aapakenlaawe Empa ya Yave." 
2Kings25:17 Orakama wa khula nrimbu waari imeetru* ithanniixexe. Orakama wa oratteliwa wa osulu wa khula nrimbu waari emeetru* emoha ni ohala ni waacaambuleliwano irooma* sirukureerihiweene mukhwipimwaya. 
2Kings25:18 Nebuzaradani aamurongha wootthukiwani Seraya, mutokweene a asaserdoti*, Zefaniya, musaserdoti* anaaveeli ni anamalipelela araru a mulako wa Empa ya Yave." 
2Kings25:19 Variyari wa yaale yaahanle musidadeni, owo aamukuxa mutokweene a anakhotto ni anamalaka athanu a mwene. Aamukuxatho namalepa aari mutokweene aathukumanyinghe atthu a elapo weera ewane vamoha ni miloko mithannamosa a atthwaawe yaaphwanyiwe musidadeni." 
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaradni, mutokweene a anakhotto ooweraxa a mwene, aahaakuxa oottheene yaale, anaarongha wa mwene a oBabiloniya oRibela." 
2Kings25:21 oRibela iwo, mweelaponi ya oHamati, mwene aalamulela weera yiiviwe. Hiiho aYuda yaaroihiwa wootthukiwani ottai wa elapwaaya." 
2Kings25:22 Nebukadenezari aamukhaliha Gedaliya, mwaana mulopwana a Ahikami, mwaana mulopwana a Xafani weera akhale mutokweene a muloko waahiiwe oYuda." 
2Kings25:23 Asitokweene a anakhotto ootheene ni atthwaaya yiiwakaru weera Nebukadenezari aamukhaliha Gedaliya ntoko guvernadori, yaamwaattamela Gedaliya oMizepa – aari Iximayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Netaniya; Yohanani, mwaana mulopwana a Kareya; Seraya, mwaana mulopwana a Tanumeti, muNetofati; Yahazaniya, mwaana mulopwana a mMahaakati, ni asilopwanaaya." 
2Kings25:24 Gedaliya aahaaroromeliha ahooleli ale ni asilopwanaaya, aweerelaka: ""Muhiwoove asitokweene a oBabiloniya. Mwiitekiheke elapweene yeela, munrumeele mwene a oBabiloniya ni sootheene sinooweettelani nnenesene." 
2Kings25:25 Vaheera mweeri wanaathannamiili Iximayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Netaniya, mwaana mulopwana a Elixama, aari neethi aahaarowano asilopwana muloko, anamwiiva Gedaliya vamoha ni asilopwana a oYuda ni aBabiloniya yaari ni yoowo oMizepa." 
2Kings25:26 Vano atthu ootheene okhuma asikhaani mpaka asitokweene yaatthawela wExipitu vamoha ni asitokweene a anakhotto niwoko na owoova aBabiloniya. 
2Kings25:27 Vayaakhani yanaamiloko miraru niithannapiili ya oronghiwawawe Yehoyakini, mwene a oYuda, vanihukuni nanaamiloko miili ni mathannameeli na mweeri wanaamuloko ni miili, eyo tiiyo vayaakhani yoopacera ya olamulawawe mwene Evili-Merodaki a oBabiloniya, aamutaphula Yehoyakini mukaliposo." 
2Kings25:28 Mwene owo aamupwattha nnenesene, anamvaha nipuro noottittimiheya opwaha mapuro a mamwene makina aaraaweno oBabiloniya." 
2Kings25:29 Vano Yehoyakini aatthuniheriwa oceendya soowara sa mukaliposo, annaca vameesa a emwene mpaka ommaleloni wa okumaawe." 
2Kings25:30 Khula nihuku na okumaawe wootheene mwene Evili-Merodaki annamvaha Yehoyakini sootheene saatthuneya. 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu, Seti, Enoxi," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani, Mahalaleli, Yaredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 Enoki, Metusalemi, Lameki, Nowe." 
1Chronicles1:4 Anamwane asilopwana a Nowe: Xemi, Hami ni Yafeti." 
1Chronicles1:5 Anamwane asilopwana a Yafeti: Gomeri, Magoge, Madayi, Yavani, Tubali, Meseki ni Tirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Anamwane asilopwana a Gomeri: Axekenazi, Rifati ni Togarema." 
1Chronicles1:7 Anamwane asilopwana a Yava: Elixani, Tarsisi, Kitimi ni Rodanimi." 
1Chronicles1:8 Anamwane asilopwana a Hami: Kuxe, Mizrayimi, Puti ni Kanaani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Anamwane asilopwana a Kuxe: Seba, Havila, Sabeta, Raama ni Sabuteka. Anamwane asilopwana a Raama: Xeba ni Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kuxe aamuyara Nimerodi, aari mulopwana ooweraxa mulaponimu." 
1Chronicles1:11 Miserayimi aari nikholo na atthu yaamanke oLudi, wAnemi, oLeyabi ni oNafetuhi," 
1Chronicles1:12 oPatrosi, oKaseluhi (ankhumelelaayawo aFilisti) ni aKaftori." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaani aamuyara Sidoni mwanawe oopacera ni a aHiti. 
1Chronicles1:14 Aaritho tiithi a aYebesi, awAmori, aGiregaxi," 
1Chronicles1:15 aHivi, awArki ni aSini," 
1Chronicles1:16 a awArvadi, aSemari ni aHamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Anamwane asilopwana a Xemi: Elami, Axuri, Arpaksadi, Ludi ni Arami. Anamwane asilopwana a Arami: Uzi, Huli, Getheri ni Mexeki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arpaksadi aamuyara Xela, ni owo aamuyara Heberi." 
1Chronicles1:19 Wa Heberi, yaayariwa anamwane asilopwana eeli: mmoha a yaawosa iitthaniwa Pelegi, niwoko mweehuhunimwawe elapo yaakawanyeya; munneiye iitthaniwa Yokitani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Yokitani aamuyara Almodadi, Xelefe, Hazarmaveti, Yerakhi," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadorami, Uzali, Dikla," 
1Chronicles1:22 Obali, Abimayeli, Xeba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiri, Havila ni Yobabi. Ootheene ala yaari anamwane asilopwana a Yokitani." 
1Chronicles1:24 Semi, Arpaksadi, Xela," 
1Chronicles1:25 Haberi, Pelegi, Rehu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Seruge, Nahori, Tera" 
1Chronicles1:27 ni Abraamu (eyo tiiyo Abrahaamu). 
1Chronicles1:28 Anamwane asilopwana a Abraamu: Isaki ni Yixmayeli. 
1Chronicles1:29 Ekhapiraawe yaari ti ela: Nebayoti, ntthaara na Yixmayeli, Kedari Adibeeli, Mibsami," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mixema, Duma, Masa, Hadadi, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yeturi, Nafixi ni Kedema. Ala yaari anamwane asilopwana a Yixmayeli." 
1Chronicles1:32 Anamwane asilopwana a Abraamu ni ekuxowaawe Ketura: Zimerani, Yokixani, Medani, Yixbaki ni Xuwa. Anamwane asilopwana a Yoksa: Xeba ni Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Anamwane asilopwana a Midiya: Efa, Eferi, Hanoki, Abida ni Eldaha. Ootheene ala yaari a ekhapira ya Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abraamu aamuyara Isaki. Anamwane asilopwana a Isaki: Esawu ni Yixrayeli. 
1Chronicles1:35 Anamwane asilopwana a Esawu: Elifazi, Rewuyeli, Yewuxi, Yalami ni Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Anamwane a Elifazi: Temani, Omar, Zepo, Gatami, ni Kenazi; vamoha ni Amaleki, amayawe Timena." 
1Chronicles1:37 Anamwaane asilopwana a Rewuyeli: Nahati, Zera, Xama, ni Miza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Anamwane asilopwana a Seyiri: Lotani, Sobali, Zibeyoni, Ana, Dixoni, Ezeri ni Dixani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Anamwane asilopwana a Lotani: Hori, ni Hemami. Lotani, aakhalano murokoriye iitthaniwa Timena." 
1Chronicles1:40 Anamwane asilopwana a Sobali: Alvani, Manahati, Ebali, Xefo ni Onami. Anamwane asilopwana a Zibeyoni: Aya ni Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Mwaana mulopwana a Ana: Dixoni. Anamwane asilopwana a Dixoni: Hemda, Exbani, Yitrani ni Kerani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Anamwane asilopwana a Ezeri: Biliyani, Zahavani ni Akani. Anamwane asilopwana a Dixani: Uzi ni Arani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Mamwene yaalamula mulaponi ya wEdomi, aYixrayeli ehinaaye okhalano mwene, yaari ti ala: Bela, mwaana mulopwana a Bewori. Esidadaawe yiitthaniwa Dinihaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Akhwaakaru Bela, Yobabi, mwaana mulopwana a Zera, muBozera, ti aamurandenle." 
1Chronicles1:45 Akhwaakaru Yobabi, Huxami, a elapo ya aTemani, ti aamurandenle." 
1Chronicles1:46 Akhwaakaru Huxami, Hadadi, mwaana a Bedadi, mwa yoowo aawinne aMidiyani mureyariyani mwa oMowabe, ti aamuradenle. Esidadaawe yiitthaniwa Aviti." 
1Chronicles1:47 Akhwaakaru Hadadi, Samla mMasereka, ti aamurandenle." 
1Chronicles1:48 Akhwaakaru Samla, Xawuli muRehoboti, mukerekhere mooloko wEfrate, ti aamurandenle." 
1Chronicles1:49 Akhwaakaru Xawuli, Bahali-Hanani, mwaana mulopwana a Akhebori, ti aamurandenle." 
1Chronicles1:50 Akhwaakaru Bahali-Hanani, ni Hadadi ti aamurandenle. Esidadaawe yiitthaniwa Pawu, ni amwaariye yiitthaniwa Mehetabeli, mwaana muthiyana a Materedi ni osuulu wa Mezahabi." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadade aahookhwatho. Vano wEdomi waalamuliwa ni asitokweene ala: Timena, Alevani, Yethethi," 
1Chronicles1:52 Oholibama, Ela, Pinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenazi, Temani, Mibezari," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magediyeli ni Irami. Ti yaala yaari asitokweene a wEdomi. 
1Chronicles2:1 Anamwane asilopwana a Yixrayeli, yaari ti ala: Rubeni, Simeyoni, Leevi, Yuda, Isakari, Zebuloni," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dani, Yoseefe, Benyamini, Nafitali, Gadi ni Axeri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Anamwane asilopwana a Yuda: Eri, Onani ni Xela. Anamwane asilopwana araru ala aamuyarannaawe muthiyana muKanaani, mwaana muthiyana a Xuwa. Vaheera Yave khaakhulenle mweettelo wootakhala wa Eri, mwaana a ntthaara na Yuda, tivawo Owo aamwiivalaawe." 
1Chronicles2:4 Tamari pwiyamwaanaawe Yuda, aamuyarela anamwane asilopwana Perezi ni Zera. Ootheene aayanraawe Yuda, yaari anamwane asilopwana athanu." 
1Chronicles2:5 Anamwane asilopwana a Perezi: Hezironi ni Hamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Anamwane asilopwana a Zera: Zimri, Etami, Hemani, Kalkoli ni Dareda. Ootheenaawo yaari athanu." 
1Chronicles2:7 Mwaana mulopwana a Karmi: Akari. Owo aatannyera erisa oYixrayeli, wootupha nlamulo naakhoottiha okuxa itthu sootteeliheriwa Yave." 
1Chronicles2:8 Mwaana mulopwana a Etani: Azariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Anamwane asilopwana aayanraawe Hezironi: Yerakmeeli, Rami ni Kalebe." 
1Chronicles2:10 Rami aamuyanre Aminadabi, ni Aminadabi aamuyanre Nahexoni, aari muhooleli mmoha a aYuda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nahexoni aamuyanre Salomoni, ni Salomoni aamuyanre Bowazi," 
1Chronicles2:12 Bowazi aamuyanre Obedi, ni Obedi aamuyanre Yixai." 
1Chronicles2:13 Yixai aamuyanre Eliyabi, mwaniye a ntthaara; anaaveeli aari Abinadabi, anaararu aari Ximeya," 
1Chronicles2:14 anaaxexe aari Netaneli, anaathanu aari Radayi," 
1Chronicles2:15 anaathannamosa aari Ozemi, ni anaathanneeli aari Davide." 
1Chronicles2:16 Axirokorayasa yaari: Zeruha ni Abigayili. Anamwane asilopwana araru a Zeruha yaari Abixayi, Yowabe ni Asaheli." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigayili amuyanre Amasa, mwaana mulopwana a muYixmayeli Yeteri." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebe mwaana mulopwana a Hezeroni, aamuyarano mwaariye Azuba nitho Yeriyoti. Anamwane asilopwana a Azuba, yaari ala: Yexeri, Xobabi ni Ardoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Akhwiiyeene Azuba, Kalebe aamuthela Efrate, mwa yoowo aamuyarannaawe Huri." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huri aamuyara Uri, ni Uri aamuyanre Bezaleli." 
1Chronicles2:21 Vahoolowaya, Hezeroni areeneno iyaakha miloko mithannamosa, aamuthela mwaana muthiyana a Makiri, atithawe Gileyade, ni owo aamuyarano mwaana mulopwana iitthaniwa Segube." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segube aamuyara Yahiri, mwa yoowo aalamunle isidade miloko miili ni tthaaru sa oGileyade." 
1Chronicles2:23 Vaheera Gexuri ni Arami yaawina oHawoti-Yahiri, mpakatho oKenate ni mittetthe saarukureenrewo; sootheene iyo saari isidade miloko mithannamosa. Ootheene awo yaari a ekhapira ya Makiri, atithawe Gileyade." 
1Chronicles2:24 Hezeroni akhwenleene oKalebe-Efrata, Abiya, mwaarawe Hezeroni, aamuyarenle Axuri atithawe Tekowa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Anamwane asilopwana a Yerakmeeli, mwaana a ntthaara na Hezeroni: Rami, mwa yoowo aari ntthaara, Buna, Oreni, Ozemi ni Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Yerakmeeli aahaatteya amuthelaka muthiyana iitthaniwa Atara, yaari amayawe Onami." 
1Chronicles2:27 Anamwane asilopwana a Rami, ntthaara na Yerakmeeli: Maazi, Yamini ni Ekeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Anamwane asilopwana a Onami: Xamai ni Yada. Anamwane asilopwana a Xamai: Nadabe ni Abixuri. 
1Chronicles2:29 Amwaariye Abixuri yiitthaniwa Abihayili. Owo aamuyarela anamwane asilopwana eeli ala: Ahebani ni Molidi. 
1Chronicles2:30 Anamwane asilopwana a Nadabe: Selede ni Apayimi. Selede aakhwiiye ahiyanre. 
1Chronicles2:31 Mwaana mulopwana a Apayimi aari Ixi, atithawe Xexani, ni Xexani aamuyanre Ahelai." 
1Chronicles2:32 Anamwane asilopwana a Yada, munneiye Xamai: Yeteri ni Yonatani. Yeteri aakhwiiye ahiyanre." 
1Chronicles2:33 Anamwane asilopwana a Yonatani: Peleti ni Zaza. Ala yaari a ekhapira ya Yerakmeeli. 
1Chronicles2:34 Xexani khaamuyanreru mwaana mulopwana, mene aayanre asithiyanaru. Owo aakhalano epottha ya wExipitu yiitthaniwa Yareha," 
1Chronicles2:35 Xexani aamvaha Yareha mmoha a anamwanaawe asithiyana ni owo aamuyarano mwaana mulopwana iitthaniwa Atai. 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai aamuyanre Natani, Natani aamuyanre Zabada," 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabada aamuyanre Efelale, Efelale aamuyanre Obedi," 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi aamuyanre Yehu, Yehu aamuyanre Azariya," 
1Chronicles2:39 Azariya aamuyanre Helezi, Helezi aamuyanre Eleyasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleyasa aamuyanre Sisemai, Sisemai aamuyanre Xalumi," 
1Chronicles2:41 Xalumi aamuyanre Yekamiya, ni Yekamiya aamuyanre Elixama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Anamwane asilopwana a Kalebe, munneiye Yerakmeeli: Mexa, ntthaaranawe, aari tiithi a Zifi, ni mwaniye iitthaniwa Marexa, tiithi a Hebroni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Anamwane asilopwana a Hebromi: Kora, Tapuwa, Rekemi ni Xema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Xema aamuyanre Rahami, tiithi a Yorkeyami. Rekemi aamuyanre Xamai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Mwaana mulopwana a Xamayi, aari Mayone ni Mayone aari tiithi a Beti-Zuri." 
1Chronicles2:46 Ekuxowaawe Kalebe, yiitthaniwa Efa, aakhalano anamwane asilopwana araru: Harani, Moza ni Gazezi. Harani aamuyanre Gazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Anamwane asilopwana a Yakdai: Regemi, Yotami, Gexani, Peleti, Efa ni Xaafe." 
1Chronicles2:48 Ekuxowaawe Kalebe yiitthaniwa Maaka, aarino anamwane asilopwana eeli: Xeberi ni Tirehana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Owo aamuyaratho Xaafe, tiithi a Mademana, ni Xeva, tiithi a Makbena ni Gibeya. Mwaana muthiyana a Kalebe iitthaniwa Akesa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Ekhapira ya Kalebe yaari ti ela. Anamwane asilopwana a Huri, mwaana a ntthara a Efrate: Xobali, aatenke oKiriyate-Yeyarimi," 
1Chronicles2:51 Salma, aatenke oBeteleheemu, ni Harefe, aatenke oBede-Gaderi." 
1Chronicles2:52 Ekhapira ya Xobali, aatenke oKiriyate-Yeyarimi: Harowe, eriyari ya aManahate," 
1Chronicles2:53 ni mahimo a oKiriyate-Yeyarimi: awItri, aPuti, aXumati ni a Mixrayi. Ti mwa yaawosa akhumelenlaaya aZorati ni awExtawoli." 
1Chronicles2:54 Ekhapira ya Salma: Muloko wa oBeteleheemu, aNetofati, muloko wa wAtaroti-Beti-Yowabe, eriyari ya aManahate, aZori," 
1Chronicles2:55 ni mahimo a anamalepa yaakhala oYabezi: aTirati, aXimeyati ni aSukati. Alasa yaari aKeni a ekhapira ya Hamate, nikholo na emusi ya Rekabe." 
1Chronicles3:1 Anamwane asilopwana a Davide yaayareliwe oHebromi, ti ala: Mwaniye mutokweene iitthaniwa Amenoni, mwaana mulopwana a Ahinowami, muYezreyeli; anaaveeli Daniyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Abigayili, muKarameli;" 
1Chronicles3:2 anaararu Abesalomi, mwaana mulopwana a Maaka, mwaana muthiyana a Talmai, mwene a oGexuri; anaaxexe Adoniya, mwaana mulopwana a Hagiti;" 
1Chronicles3:3 anaathanu Xefatiya, mwaana mulopwana a Abitali, ni anaathannamosa Itreyame, mwaana mulopwana a mwaariye iitthaniwa Egela." 
1Chronicles3:4 Ti yaala anamwane asilopwana athannamosa a Davide, yaayareliwe oHeberoni, mwa weiwo aalamunlaawewo iyaakha ithannapiili ni nyeeri mithannamosa. Davide aalamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha miloko miraru ni tthaaru" 
1Chronicles3:5 ni anamwane asilopwana yaayareliwewo yaari ti ala: Xamuwa, Xobabe, Natani ni Salomoni, anamwane axexe aamuyarannaawe Batixeba, mwaana muthiyana a Amiyeli." 
1Chronicles3:6 Davide aahaayaratho anamwane asilopwana athannaaxexe ala: Ibehari, Elixuwa, Elipelete," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nefege, Yafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elixama, Eliyada ni Elifelete." 
1Chronicles3:9 Ootheene ala yaari anamwane asilopwana a Davide, waahiya yaawo aayarannaawe ikoxosawe, ni Tamari aari murokorayasa." 
1Chronicles3:10 Salomoni aamuyanre Rehobowami; Rehobowami aamuyanre Abiya; Abiya aamuyanre Asa; Asa aamuyanre Yehoxafati; 
1Chronicles3:11 Yehoxafati aamuyanre Yehorami; Yehorami, aamuyanre Ahaziya; Ahaziya aamuyanre Yowaxi;" 
1Chronicles3:12 Yowaxi aamuyanre Amaziya; Amaziya aamuyanre Azariya; Azariya aamuyanre Yotami; 
1Chronicles3:13 Yotami aamuyanre Ahazi; Ahazi aamuyanre Hezekiya; Hezekiya aamuyanre Manaxe; 
1Chronicles3:14 Manaxe aamuyanre Amoni; Amoni aamuyanre Yosiya. 
1Chronicles3:15 Anamwane asilopwana a Yosiya: Yohanani, aari mwaana a ntthaara, anaaveeli aari Yehoyakimi, anaararu aari Zedekiya, ni anaaxexe aari Xalumi." 
1Chronicles3:16 Anamarandela a Yehoyakimi yaari ti ala: mwanawe, Yehoyakini ni munneiye Zedekiya." 
1Chronicles3:17 Anamwane asilopwana a Yehoyakini, aaronghiwe wootthukiwani elapo ekina: mwanawe Xeyaltiyeli," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malkirami, Pedaya, Xenazari, Yekamiya, Hoxama ni Nedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Anamwane asilopwana a Pedaiya: Zerubabeli ni Ximeyi. Anamwane asilopwana a Zerubabeli: Mexulami, Hananiya ni murokoraya Xelomite." 
1Chronicles3:20 Aakhalanotho anamwane asilopwana athanu akina: Haxuba, Oheli, Berekiya, Hasadiya ni Yuxabe-Hesede." 
1Chronicles3:21 Ekhapira ya Hananiya: Pelatiya ni Yesaya vamoha ni anamwane asilopwana a Refaya, a Arenani, Obadiya ni a Xekaniya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Ekhapira ya Xekaniya: Xemaiya vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana: Hatuxi, Igali, Bariya, Neyariya ni Xafate; ootheenaawo yaari asilopwana athannamosa." 
1Chronicles3:23 Anamwane asilopwana a Neyariya: Eliyunayi, Hizekiya ni Azerikame – ootheenaawo yaari asilopwana araru." 
1Chronicles3:24 Anamwane asilopwana athanneeli a Eliyunai: Hodaviya, Eliyaxibe, Pelaiya, Akube, Yohanani, Delaya ni Anani." 
1Chronicles4:1 Ekhapira ya Yuda: Perezi, Hezeroni, Karmi, Huri ni Xobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reyaya, mwaana mulopwana a Xobali, aamuyara Yahate, ni Yahate aamuyara Ahumai ni Lahade. Ala yaari mahimo a aZorati." 
1Chronicles4:3 Anamwane asilopwana a Eta, yaari ti ala: Yezereeli, Ixema ni Idebaxi. Murokorayasa iitthaniwa Hazelelboni." 
1Chronicles4:4 Penuweli aari tiithi a Gedori, ni Ezeri, tiithi a Huxa. Alasa yaari a ekhapira ya Huri, mwaana a ntthaara na Efrata ni tiithi a Beteleheemu." 
1Chronicles4:5 Axuri, tiithi a Tekowa, aahaatteya: Heela ni Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara aamuyarela Ahuzami, Heferi, Temeni ni Haahaxtari. Alasa yaari anamwane asilopwana a Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Anamwane asilopwana a Hela: Zerete, Zowari, Etnani" 
1Chronicles4:8 ni Kozi, amuyanre Anubi ni Hazobeba ni mahimo a Aharheli, mwaana mulopwana a Harumi." 
1Chronicles4:9 Yabezi aari mulopwana oottittimiheyaxa veemusinivawe. Amayawe yaamutteha nsinanawe Yabezi, yeeraka: “Kimuyanre mmavihoni.”" 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabezi aamvekela Muluku a oYixrayeli: Ii! Mukireelihe ni mwaandyeerere ittimasaka! Ntatananyu nikhale ni miyo, nikisungaka mwa soonanara ni nikitapuxaka mwa soovoreya.” Hiiho, Muluku aahaakhulela yoovekaawe." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelube, munneiye Xuwa, aamuyara Mehiri, tiithi a Exetoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 Exetoni aamuyara Bete-Rafa, Paseya ni Tehina, aari tiithi a Yiri-Nahaxe. Alasa yaari asilopwana a oReka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Anamwane asilopwana a Kenazi: Otoniyeli ni Seraya. Anamwane asilopwana a Otoniyeli: Hatate ni Mewonotai. 
1Chronicles4:14 Mewonotai aamuyara Ofera. Seraya aamuyara Yowabe, tiithi a yaale yaamanke oGe-Haraximi. Vano waatteheriwa nsina nno, niwoko amakaawe yaari anamaratta." 
1Chronicles4:15 Anamwane asilopwana a Kalebe, mwaana mulopwana a Yefune: Iru, Ela ni Naami. Mwaana mulopwana a Ela aari Kenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Anamwane asilopwana a Yehaleleli: Zifi, Zifa, Tiriya ni Asareyeli." 
1Chronicles4:17 Anamwane asilopwana a Ezera: Yeteri, Merede, Eferi ni Yaloni. Merede aamuthenle Bitiya, ni aahaayara anamwane ala: Miriyami, Xamai ni Ixeba, aatenke wEstemowa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Amwaariye yaari muYuda yaamuyara Yerede, tiithi a Gedori, Heberi, tiithi a Soko, ni Yekutiyeli tiithi a Zanowa. Alesa yaari anamwane a mwanawe muthiyana Farawu*, Bitiya, mwa yoowo Merede aamuthenlaawe." 
1Chronicles4:19 Anamwane asilopwana a mwaariye Hodiya, murokoriye Nahami: Tiithi a Keyila, muGarmi, ni Exetemowa mMaakati." 
1Chronicles4:20 Anamwane asilopwana a Ximoni: Aminoni, Rina, Bene-Hanani ni Tiloni. Anamwane asilopwana a Ixi: Zohete ni Beni-Zohete." 
1Chronicles4:21 Anamwane asilopwana a Xela, mwaana mulopwana a Yuda: Eri, tiithi a Leka, Laada tiithi a Marexa. Xela aaritho nikholo na mahimo a yaale yaavara muteko ni eliinyu* oBete-Axebeya," 
1Chronicles4:22 a Yokimi, a atthu a oKozeba, a Yowaxi ni Sarafe, mwa yaawo yaalamula oMowabe ni oYaxube-Lehemi. Namalepela ola ti a ihuhu sa khalayi." 
1Chronicles4:23 Awosa yaari anamoopa oloko yaamanke oNetayimi ni oGedera; yaakhalawo ni yaamvarela muteko mwene. 
1Chronicles4:24 Anamwane asilopwana a Simeyoni: Nemuweli, Yamini, Yaribe, Zera ni Xawuli." 
1Chronicles4:25 Mwaana mulopwana a Xawuli iitthaniwa Xalumi, tiithi a Mibesame, mwa yoowo aari tiithi a Mixma." 
1Chronicles4:26 Ekhapira ya Mixma: Mwanawe mulopwana iitthaniwa Hamuweli, tiithi a Zakuri, mwa yoowo aari tiithi a Ximeyi." 
1Chronicles4:27 Ximeyi aarino anamwane asilopwana muloko ni athannamosa ni anamwane asithiyana athannamosa, vaheera axunneiye khayaarino anamwane ancipale, tivawo, mahimwaaya ootheene ahinlikanaaya ni waatta wa epuumba ya Yuda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Awosa yaakhala oBerxeba, oMolada, oHazar, oXuwali," 
1Chronicles4:29 oBiliya, wEzemi, oTolade," 
1Chronicles4:30 oBetuweli, oHorema, oZikalagi," 
1Chronicles4:31 oBete-Marekabote, oHazare-Susimi, oBete-Biri ni oXaarayimi. Iya saari isidadesaya mpaka olamula wa Davide." 
1Chronicles4:32 Yaakhalanotho isidade ithanu sikina: wEtami, Ayimi, oRimoni, oTokeni ni wAxani," 
1Chronicles4:33 Vamoha ni mittetthe sootheene saarukureenre seiyo mpaka oBaalate. Musidadeni mmo yaakhala ni yaampwahereriha namalepela a ekhapiraaya. 
1Chronicles4:34 Mexobabe, Yameleke, Yoxa, mwaana mulopwana a Amaziya," 
1Chronicles4:35 Yoweli, Yehu, mwaana mulopwana a Yoxibiya, mwaana mulopwana a Seraya, mwaana mulopwana a Asiyeli," 
1Chronicles4:36 nitho Elunai, Yaakoba, Yexohaya, Asaya, Adiyeli, Yesimiyeli, Benaya" 
1Chronicles4:37 ni Ziza, mwaana mulopwana a Xifi, mwaana mulopwana a Aloni, mwaana mulopwana a Yedaya, mwaana mulopwana a Zimeri, mwaana mulopwana a Xemaya." 
1Chronicles4:38 Ala masina a asitokweene a mahimwaaya. Imusisaya saahaandyeerereyaxa 
1Chronicles4:39 tivawo yaarongwaaya mukhwipi wa oGedori, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa nreyareya, yaasaka soociha muhuwaaya." 
1Chronicles4:40 Yaaphwanya sooca sooreera, mulaponi yoothanuwa, ya murettele ni yoomaaleleya, mwa weiwo aHami akina yaakhalaayawo khalayi." 
1Chronicles4:41 Mweehuhuni ya olamula wa Hezekiya, mwene a oYuda, asilopwana alempwale masinaaya ala, yaaphiya, enaawanano aHami ni aMewuni a mulaponi mmwe, enaaphwata woomalela, ntoko onooneyaaya mpaka olelo va. Vahoolowaya, yaahaakamela nipuro na miloko iyo, niwoko waakhalawo woocihamo muhuwaaya." 
1Chronicles4:42 Vano, macira mathanu a aSimeyoni awo, yaahooleliwa ni Pelatiya, Neyariya, Refaya ni Uziyeli, anamwane asilopwana a Ixi, yaavoleela elapo ya mattumuxa a oSeyiri." 
1Chronicles4:43 Awosa yaawiivakasa awAmaleki yaawo yoopongwe, ni iwe ankhalawo mpaka olelo va." 
1Chronicles5:1 Ala yaari anamwane asilopwana a Rubeni, ntthaara na Yixrayeli. Vanonto, owo ti aari ntthaara na Yixrayeli, vaheera eenre aakonano amwaaraya atithawe, soophwanelasawe sa ontthaara yaavahiwa anamwane asilopwana a Yoseefe, mwaana mulopwana a Yixrayeli, moota wooweera Rubeni khaalikeleliwe ntoko ntthaara munamalepelani a mukhapirani." 
1Chronicles5:2 Yuda aarookhalaru ooweraxa a axunneiye, ni mwa yoowo aarookhumelelaru muhooleli, soophwanela sa ontthaara aavahiwe ti Yoseefe." 
1Chronicles5:3 Anamwane asilopwana a Rubeni, mwaana a ntthaara na Yixrayeli: Hanoki, Palu, Hezeroni ni Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Ekhapira ya Yoweli: Mwaniye iitthaniwa Xemaiya, tiithi a Goge, tiithi a Ximeyi," 
1Chronicles5:5 tiithi a Mika, tiithi a Rehaya, tiithi a Bahali," 
1Chronicles5:6 tiithi a Beera, mwa yoowo Tigelati-Pileseri, mwene a wAsiriya, aaronghale wootthukiwani elapo ekina. Beera aari muhooleli a epuumba ya Rubeni." 
1Chronicles5:7 Amusaawe, yaalempwale ettharihiwaka mahimwaaya, munamalepelani a mukhapirani: Yeyeli, aari mutokweene, Zakariya" 
1Chronicles5:8 ni Bela, mwaana mulopwana a Azazi, mwaana mulopwana a Xema, mwaana mulopwana a Yoweli. Awosa yaarowa okhala mulaponi ekhumme wAroweri mpaka omwaako Nebo ni Bahali-Meyoni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Vano, wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, yaahaakamela elapo erongwe mpaka onikareni, enaphiya omoolokoni Efratesi, niwoko mihuwosaya saahaandyeerereya oGileyade." 
1Chronicles5:10 Mweehuhuni ya olamula wa Sawuli, awosa yaavolowa mukhottoni, yaawananaka aHagari, enaawinasa, enaakamela mookonelamwaya mulaponi moothemwene wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa oGileyade." 
1Chronicles5:11 Epuumba ya Gadi yaakhala vakhiviruwaya, okhuma elapo ya oBaxani mpaka oSaleka." 
1Chronicles5:12 Yoweli ti aari mutokweene oopacera a mahimo a oBaxani, anaaveeli Xafami; ni akinaawo yaari Yanai ni Xafate." 
1Chronicles5:13 Asitithaya yaalikeliwe imusi imusi, ti ala: Mikayeli, Mexulami, Xeba, Yorai, Yakani, Ziya ni Eberi. Ootheene awo yaari athanneeli." 
1Chronicles5:14 Awosa yaari a ekhapira ya Abihayali, mwaana mulopwana a Huri, mwaana mulopwana a Yarowa, mwaana mulopwana a Gileyade, mwaana mulopwana a Mikayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Yexixai, mwaana mulopwana a Yahedo, mwaana mulopwana a Buzi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi, mwaana mulopwana a Abediyeli ni osuulu wa Guni, ti aari mutokweene a emusi ele." 
1Chronicles5:16 Epuumba ya Gadi, yaamanke oGileyade, oBaxani vamoha ni mittetthesaya ni othanuwa wootheene wa moocihamo wa oXaroni." 
1Chronicles5:17 Ootheene awo yaalikeliwe munamalepelani a mukhapirani mweehuhuni ya olamula wa Yotami, mwene a oYuda ni ya Yerobowami, mwene a oYixrayeli." 
1Chronicles5:18 Ipuumba sa Rubeni, Gadi ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe, saakhalano anakhotto 44 760, oowera ovarela exikudu* ni ekatana, ovarela muteko muura, ni ooxuttihiweene owana ekhotto." 
1Chronicles5:19 Awosa yaavolowasa mukhottoni, yaawananaka aHagari, aYeturi, aNafisi ni aNodabi." 
1Chronicles5:20 Ewanaka hiihaale, yaamukhuwelela Muluku, mwa Yoowo aakhavihenre, awinnyereraka mmatatanimwaya aHagari ni oowiiraananaaya ootheene. Muluku aawaakhula, niwoko yaamuroromela Yoowo." 
1Chronicles5:21 Vano yaakuxasa mihuwo sa aHagari, ikamelu* 50 000, ikhondoolo 250 000 ni abuuru macira miloko miili. Yaahaavaratho, enaatthuka atthu 100 000." 
1Chronicles5:22 Hiiho, yaahookhwa amwiittana ancipale niwoko ekhotto ele yaari ya Muluku. Awosa yaahaakamela elapo ele mpaka ehuhu yooronghiwa wootthukiwani elapo ekina." 
1Chronicles5:23 Eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe yaahaattaxa, eniitekiha mulaponi ekhumme oBaxani mpaka oBahali-Hermoni, eyo tiiyo, mpaka oSeniri (omwaako Hermoni)." 
1Chronicles5:24 Mapwattapwattha a imusi sa epuumba ela, yaari ti ala: Eferi, Ixi, Eliyeli, Azriyeli, Yeremiya, Hodaviya ni Yakdiyeli. Awosa yaari anakhotto ooweraxa, asilopwana a epili ni mapwattapwattha a imusisaya." 
1Chronicles5:25 Vaheera khayaaroromeleiye wa Muluku a makholowaaya, enararuwasa, ettharaka miluku sa miloko aaphwantaawe Muluku ohoolowaya." 
1Chronicles5:26 Tivawo Muluku a oYixrayeli, aamutannyenraawe Puli, ori Tigelati-Pileseri, mwene a wAsiriya weera akuxe ipuumba sa Rubeni, Gadi ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe, wootthukiwani. Aahaarongha oHala, oHabori, oHara ni wa mooloko Gozani, mwa weiwo araayawo mpaka olelo va." 
1Chronicles6:1 Anamwane asilopwana a Leevi: Gerexoni, Kohate ni Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Anamwane asilopwana a Kohate: Amrami, Izehari, Hebroni ni Uziyeli." 
1Chronicles6:3 Anamwane asilopwana a Amrami: Aharoni, Moisesi ni Miriyami. Anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni: Nadabe, Abihu, Eleyazari ni Itamari." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleyazari aamuyanre Pinehasi, Pinehasi aamuyanre Abixuwa," 
1Chronicles6:5 Abixuwa aamuyanre Buki, Buki aamuyanre Uzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Uzi aamuyanre Seraya, Seraya aamuyanre Merayote," 
1Chronicles6:7 Merayote aamuyanre Amariya, Amariya aamuyanre Ahitube," 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitube aamuyanre Zadoki, Zadoki aamuyanre Ahimaaze," 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaaze aamuyanre Azariya, Azariya aamuyanre Yohanani," 
1Chronicles6:10 Yohanani aamuyanre Azariya, aari musaserdoti* Mpaani mwa Muluku, yaatekiwe ni Salomoni oYerusaleemu;" 
1Chronicles6:11 Azariya aamuyanre Amariya, Amariya aamuyanre Ahitube," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitube aamuyanre Zadoki, Zadoki aamuyanre Xalumi," 
1Chronicles6:13 Xalumi aamuyanre Hilikiya, Hilikiya aamuyanre Azariya," 
1Chronicles6:14 Azariya aamuyanre Seraya, ni Seraya aamuyanre Yehozadaki." 
1Chronicles6:15 Yehozadaki aaronghiwe wootthukiwani, Yave aamukuxaawe Yuda ni Yerusaleemu, amuronghaka wootthukiwani elapo ekina mwa Nebukadenezari." 
1Chronicles6:16 Anamwane asilopwana a Leevi: Gerexoni, Kohate ni Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Masina a anamwane asilopwana a Gerexoni: Libeni, ni Ximeyi." 
1Chronicles6:18 Anamwane asilopwana a Kohati, yaari ti ala: Amrami, Izehari, Hebroni ni Uziyeli." 
1Chronicles6:19 Anamwane asilopwana a Merari: Maheli ni Muxi. Mahimo a aLeevi alempwale, ettharihiwaka makholowaaya, ti ala:" 
1Chronicles6:20 aGerexoni: Mwaniye mulopwana iitthaniwa Libeni, tiithi a Yehate, tiithi a Zima," 
1Chronicles6:21 tiithi a Yowa, tiithi a Idu, tiithi a Zera, aari tiithi a Yehaterai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Anamwane asilopwana a Kohate: Mwaniye mulopwana Aminadabe, tiithi a Kora, tiithi a Asiri," 
1Chronicles6:23 tiithi a Elikana, tiithi a Ebiyasafe, tiithi a Asiri," 
1Chronicles6:24 tiithi a Tahate, tiithi a Uriyeli, tiithi a Uziya, tiithi a Xawuli." 
1Chronicles6:25 Anamwane asilopwana a Elikana: Amasai, Ahimote," 
1Chronicles6:26 Elikana tiithi a Zofai, tiithi a Nahate," 
1Chronicles6:27 tiithi a Eliyabe, tiithi a Yerohami, tiithi a Elikana, tiithi a Samuweli." 
1Chronicles6:28 Anamwane asilopwana a Samuweli: Yoweli, aari a ntthaara, ni anaaveeli Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:29 Anamwane asilopwana a Merari: Maheli, tiithi a Libeni, tiithi a Ximeyi, tiithi a Uza," 
1Chronicles6:30 tiithi a Ximeiya, tiithi a Hagiya, tiithi a Asaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Alasa ti asilopwana mwa yaawo Davide aathanlalaawe ohoolela icipo Mpaani mwa Yave, Arka* eronghiweene wuuwu." 
1Chronicles6:32 Awosa yaahoolela icipo ohoolo wa etabernaakulu*, ya Eheema ya Muthukumano*, mpaka Salomoni omaliha oteka Empa ya Yave oYerusaleemu. Awosa yaavara mitekosaya, ettharihaka meerelo yaakhalihiwe." 
1Chronicles6:33 Yaahoolelasa vamoha ni anamwanaaya asilopwana, ti ala: Eriyari ya aKowati: namwiipa Hemani, mwaana mulopwana a Yoweli, mwaana mulopwana a Samuweli," 
1Chronicles6:34 mwaana mulopwana a Elikana, mwaana mulopwana a Yerohami, mwaana mulopwana a Eliyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Towa," 
1Chronicles6:35 mwaana mulopwana a Zufe, mwaana mulopwana a Elikana, mwaana mulopwana a Mahate, mwaana mulopwana a Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 mwaana mulopwana a Elikana, mwaana mulopwana a Yoweli, mwaana mulopwana a Azariya, mwaana mulopwana a Zefaniya," 
1Chronicles6:37 mwaana mulopwana a Tahate, mwaana mulopwana a Asiri, mwaana mulopwana a Ebiyasafe, mwaana mulopwana a Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 mwaana mulopwana a Izehari, mwaana mulopwana a Kohate, mwaana mulopwana a Leevi, mwaana mulopwana a Yixrayeli." 
1Chronicles6:39 Yoole aamurumeela moonowaawe mulopwana Hemani aakhala mmusaawe iitthaniwa Asafi, mwaana mulopwana a Berekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Ximeiya," 
1Chronicles6:40 mwaana mulopwana a Mikayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Baaseya, mwaana mulopwana a Malekiya," 
1Chronicles6:41 mwaana mulopwana a Etini, mwaana mulopwana a Zera, mwaana mulopwana a Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 mwaana mulopwana a Etani, mwaana mulopwana a Zima, mwaana mulopwana a Ximeyi," 
1Chronicles6:43 Mwaana mulopwana a Yahate, mwaana mulopwana a Gerexoni, mwaana mulopwana a Leevi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Akina yaale a aLeevi a nihimo na aMerari yaarumeelatho yaari ti ala: Etani, mwaana mulopwana a Kixi, mwaana mulopwana a Abedi, mwaana mulopwana a Maluki," 
1Chronicles6:45 mwaana mulopwana a Haxabiya, mwaana mulopwana a Amaziya, mwaana mulopwana a Hilikiya," 
1Chronicles6:46 mwaana mulopwana a Amezi, mwaana mulopwana a Bani, mwaana mulopwana a Xemeri," 
1Chronicles6:47 mwaana mulopwana a Maheli, mwaana mulopwana a Muxi, mwaana mulopwana a Merari, mwaana mulopwana a Leevi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Amusaaya aLeevi akina yaathanliwe weera ewehaweheke miteko sootheene sikina sa etabernaakulu*, Empa ya Muluku." 
1Chronicles6:49 Vaheera, aari Aharoni ni ekhapiraawe, yaaruuha sooveleela valtaarini* a sooveleela soohisa ni valtaarini* a erubani* ni yaakwanihera miteko sootheene sikina sa vaNipuroni Nootteelaxa*. Yaahaarehererelatho aYixrayeli wiiwanana ni Muluku, ettharihaka sootheene aalamuleliwaawe Moisesi, murumeiyi a Muluku." 
1Chronicles6:50 Ekhapira ya Aharoni, yaari ti ela: Mwaniye iitthaniwa Eleyazari, tiithi a Pinehasi, tiithi a Abixuwa," 
1Chronicles6:51 tiithi a Buki, tiithi a Uzi, aari tiithi a Zerahiya," 
1Chronicles6:52 tiithi a Merayote, tiithi a Amariya, aari tiithi a Aitube," 
1Chronicles6:53 tiithi a Zadoki, tiithi a Aimaazi." 
1Chronicles6:54 Iya saari isidade ni ilapo yaavahiwaaya aLeevi weera emakemo. Eriyari ya ikhapira sa Aharoni, nihimo na aKohati, ti yaapacenre oreereliwa." 
1Chronicles6:55 Yaavahiwa: oHeberoni, oYuda ni moocihamwaya waarukureenre." 
1Chronicles6:56 Vaheera imatta ni mittetthe saarukureenre isidade, aavahiwa Kalebe, mwaana mulopwana a Yefune." 
1Chronicles6:57 Hiiho, ikhapira sa Aharoni, saahaakhela oHeberoni, esidade yootthawelawo, ni oLibena, oYatiri, wExtemowa," 
1Chronicles6:58 oHileni, oDebiri," 
1Chronicles6:59 wAxani, oYuta ni oBete-Xemexi, ni moocihamwayamwene." 
1Chronicles6:60 Wa epuumba ya Benyamini, yaahaakhela oGibiyoni, oGeba, wAlemete ni wAnatote, ni moocihamwayamwene. Isidade sootheene iye, saakawiwe eriyari ya mahimo a aKohati saari muloko ni tthaaru." 
1Chronicles6:61 Wa ikhapira sikina iyo sa aKohati, saareereliwe isidade muloko saari sa mahimo a eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe." 
1Chronicles6:62 Wa ikhapira sa Gerexoni, wa khula nihimo, saareereliwe isidade muloko ni tthaaru sa ipuumba sa Isakari, Axeri ni Nafitali ni mpatta wa epuumba ya Manaxe ori oBaxani." 
1Chronicles6:63 Wa ikhapira sa Merari wa khula nihimo, saareereliwe isidade muloko ni piili sa ipuumba sa Rubeni, Gadi ni Zebuloni." 
1Chronicles6:64 Hiiho, aYixrayeli yaahaavahasa aLeevi isidade iya ni moocihamwayamwene." 
1Chronicles6:65 Yaavahiwatho mooreereliwani isidade seiye sihimmwale sa ilapo sa ipuumba sa Yuda, Simeyoni ni Benyamini." 
1Chronicles6:66 Mahimo makina makina a aKohati yaahaakhelatho isidade sa mulaponi mwa epuumba ya Efrayimi. 
1Chronicles6:67 Yaavahiwa mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi oXekhemi, esidade yootthawela, ni oGezeri," 
1Chronicles6:68 oYokemeyami, oBete-Horoni," 
1Chronicles6:69 wAyaloni ni oGate-Rimoni vamoha ni moocihamwayamwene. 
1Chronicles6:70 Vano, eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe, mahimo yaahanle a aKohati, yaahaakhela wAneri, oBileyami ni moocihamwayamwene." 
1Chronicles6:71 aGerexoni yaakhenle isidade iya: wa nihimo na eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe yaakhenle oGolani, oBaxani, ni wAxetarote vamoha ni moocihamwayamwene." 
1Chronicles6:72 Wa epuumba ya Isakari yaakhenle oKedexi, oDaberate," 
1Chronicles6:73 oRamote ni wAnemi, ni moocihamwayamwene." 
1Chronicles6:74 Wa epuumba ya Axeri yaakhenle oMaxali, wAbedoni," 
1Chronicles6:75 oHukoke ni oRehobe ni moocihamwayamwene; 
1Chronicles6:76 ni wa epuumba ya Nafitali yaakhenle oKedexi, mulaponi ya oGalileya, oHamoni ni oKiriyatayimi, ni moocihamwayamwene." 
1Chronicles6:77 Isidade yaakhenlaaya aMerari akinaawo, saari ti iya: Wa epuumba ya Zebuloni yaakhenle oYokneyami, oKarta, oRimono ni oTabori, vamoha ni moocihamwayamwene;" 
1Chronicles6:78 wa epuumba ya Rubeni, okhopela wa Yordanu, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa oYeriko, yaakhenle oBezeri munikareni, oYaheza," 
1Chronicles6:79 oKedemote ni oMefaate ni moocihamwayamwene; 
1Chronicles6:80 ni wa epuumba ya Gadi yaakhenle oRamote, mulaponi ya oGileyade, oMahanayimi," 
1Chronicles6:81 oHexeboni ni oYazeri, ni moocihamwayamwene." 
1Chronicles7:1 Anamwane asilopwana axexe a Isakari: Tola, Puwa, Yaxube Ximeroni." 
1Chronicles7:2 Anamwane asilopwana a Tola: Uzi, Refaya, Yeriyeli, Yahemai, Ibesami ni Samuweli yaari mapwattapwattha a mahimwaaya. Moolamulani wa Davide, anakhotto oolikaneene owana a ikhapira sa Tola yaalepeliwe mukhapiranimwaya yaari asilopwana 22 600." 
1Chronicles7:3 Mwaana mulopwana a Uzi: Izeraya. Anamwane asilopwana a Izeraya: Mikayeli, Obadiya, Yoweli ni Ixiya. Athanu ootheenaawo yaari asitokweene" 
1Chronicles7:4 ni yaakhalano asithiyana ancipale. Tivawo ntoko onooneyaaya mukhapirani mwa emusaaya, awosa yaakhalano asilopwana 36 000 oolikaneene owana." 
1Chronicles7:5 Anakhotto a mahimo ootheene a Isakari, ntoko yaalepeliwaaya mukhapiranimwaya, ootheene yaari 87 000." 
1Chronicles7:6 Anamwane araru a Benyamini: Bela, Bekeri ni Yediyayeli." 
1Chronicles7:7 Anamwane asilopwana a Bela: Eziboni, Uzi, Uziyeli, Yeremote ni Iri, yaari mapwattapwattha mathanu. Munamalepelani a mukhapiranimwaya, yaalepeliwe anakhotto 22 034." 
1Chronicles7:8 Anamwane asilopwana a Bekeri: Zemira, Yowaxi, Eliyezeri, Elunai, Omeri, Yeremote, Abiya, Anatote ni Alemete. Ootheene ala, yaari anamwane asilopwana a Bekeri." 
1Chronicles7:9 Munamalepelani a mukhapiranimwaya yaalepeliwe mapwattapwattha a imusi ni anakhotto 20 200. 
1Chronicles7:10 Mwaana mulopwana a Yediyayeli: Bilami. Anamwane asilopwana a Bilexani: Yewuxi, Benyamini, Ehude, Kenaanani, Zetani, Tarexixi ni Ahixahari." 
1Chronicles7:11 Anamwane ootheene ala a Yediyayeli yaari mapwattapwattha a imusi. Mukhapiranimwaya yaari anakhotto 17 200 oolikaneene owana. 
1Chronicles7:12 aXupi ni aHupi yaari a ekhapira ya Iri; ni aHuxi a ekhapira ya Aheri. 
1Chronicles7:13 Anamwane asilopwana a Nafitali: Yaheziyeli, Guni, Yezeri ni Xilemi – ekhapira ya Bileha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Ekhapira ya Manaxe: Asriyeli aari mwaana mulopwana a ekuxowaawe ngwArami. Aamuyaratho Makiri, tiithi a Gileyade." 
1Chronicles7:15 Makiri aamuthela muthiyana eriyari ya aHupi ni aXupi. Murokoriye iitthaniwa Maaka. Zelofeyade aari mwaana mulopwana mukina a Manaxe ni aarino paahi anamwane asithiyanaru. 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka, amwaariye Makiri, aamuyara mwaana mulopwana, anamutteha Perezi. Nsina na munneiye naari Xeresi ni anamwanaawe asilopwana yiitthaniwa Ulami ni Rakemi." 
1Chronicles7:17 Mwaana mulopwana a Ulami: Bedani. Awosa yaari anamwane asilopwana a Gileyade, mwaana mulopwana a Makiri, mwaana mulopwana a Manaxe." 
1Chronicles7:18 Murokoriye, iitthaniwa Hamolekete, aamuyara Ixedode, Abiyezeri ni Mahela." 
1Chronicles7:19 Anamwane asilopwana a Xemida: Ahiyani, Xekhemi, Liki ni Aniyami." 
1Chronicles7:20 Ekhapira ya Efrayimi: Sutela, aari tiithi a Berede, tiithi a Tahate, tiithi a Eleyada, tiithi a Tahate," 
1Chronicles7:21 tiithi a Zabade, tiithi a Xutela. Ezeri ni Eleyade yaahiiviwa ni asilopwana a oGate, yeereraaya wiiya mihuwosaya." 
1Chronicles7:22 Tiithaaya Efrayimi aawiinlelaxa mmahukuni mancipale ni amusaawe yaahoorwa ompembesa. 
1Chronicles7:23 Vahoolowaya aamukonanotho mwaariye, owo aarupala, anamuyara mwaana mulopwana. Vano, owo aamutteha Beriya, niwoko yaakhumelela erisa veemusiniwawe." 
1Chronicles7:24 Mwaniye muthiyana iitthaniwa Xeera. Ti yoowo aatenke oBete-Horomi wa ottuttuwani ni wa ohitto mpakatho wUzeni-Xeera. 
1Chronicles7:25 Mwaana mulopwana a Beriya aari Refa, tiithi a Resefe, tiithi a Tela, tiithi a Tahani," 
1Chronicles7:26 tiithi a Ladami, tiithi a Amihude, tiithi a Elixama," 
1Chronicles7:27 tiithi a Nuni, tiithi a Yoxuwa." 
1Chronicles7:28 Ilaposawe ni isidadesawe saaphiya oBeteli ni mittetthe sa mukhwipimwawe, oNaarani, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, oGezeri ni mittetthesaya mpatta ninkela nsuwa, ni oXekhemi ni mittetthesaya mpaka wAya ni mittetthesaya." 
1Chronicles7:29 Mmwiinanoni mwa Manaxe waari oBeti-Xani, oTaanake, oMegidu ni oDori vamoha ni mittetthesaya. Ekhapira ya Yoseefe, mwaana mulopwana a Yixrayeli, yaakhala isidadesene seiya." 
1Chronicles7:30 Anamwane asilopwana a Axeri: Imena, Ixeva, Ixevi ni Beriya. Murokorayasa iitthaniwa Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Anamwane asilopwana a Beriya: Heberi ni Malkiyeli, aari tiithi a Birzayite." 
1Chronicles7:32 Heberi aamuyanre Yafelete, Xomeri, Hotami ni murokorayasa Xuwa." 
1Chronicles7:33 Anamwane asilopwana a Yafelete: Pasake, Bimehali ni Axevate. Ti yaala yaari anamwane asilopwana a Yafelete." 
1Chronicles7:34 Anamwane asilopwana a Xomeri: Ahi, Rohega, Huba ni Arami." 
1Chronicles7:35 Anamwane asilopwana a Helemi munneiye Xomeri: Zofa, Imena, Xelesi ni Amali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Anamwane asilopwana a Zofa: Suha, Harneferi, Xuwali, Beri, Imera," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bezeri, Hode, Xama, Xilexa, Iterani ni Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Anamwane asilopwana a Yeteri: Yefune, Pisepa ni Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Anamwane asilopwana a Ula: Ara, Haniyeli ni Riziya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Ootheene ala yaari ekhapira ya Axeri. Yaari mapwattapwattha a imusi, asilopwana oothanliwa, anakhotto ooweraxa ni ahooleli oottittimiheyaxa. Waatta wa yaale yaathanleliwe owana mukhottonimwaya, ntoko yaalepeliwaaya mukhapiranimwaya waari 26 000." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benyamini aamuyanre Bela, ntthaaranawe; anaaveeli Axebeli, anaararu Aara," 
1Chronicles8:2 anaaxexe Noha ni anaathanu Rafa. 
1Chronicles8:3 Anamwane asilopwana a Bela: Adari, Gera, Abihude," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abixuwa, Naamani, Ahowa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Sefufani, Hurami." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ekhapira ya Ewude, mapwattapwattha a imusi sa amaki a oGeba, yaaronghiwe wootthukiwani oManaate, ti ela:" 
1Chronicles8:7 Naamani, Ahiya ni Gera. Gera ola, tiithi a Uza ni Awude, ti yoowo aaronghale akina wootthukiwani." 
1Chronicles8:8 Amwalanneene axaarawe Husimi ni Baara, Xaharayimi aahaayara anamwane asilopwana mulaponi ya oMowabe." 
1Chronicles8:9 Owo ni mwaariye Hodesi, aahaayara anamwane asilopwana ala: Yobabe, Zibiya, Mesa, Malekami," 
1Chronicles8:10 Yewuzi, Sakiya ni Mirema. Alasa yaari anamwanaawe asilopwana, mapwattapwattha a imusi." 
1Chronicles8:11 Areene ni Husimi, aamuyarano Abitube ni Elipaali." 
1Chronicles8:12 Anamwane asilopwana a Elipaali: Eberi, Mixami, Xemede (aatenke wOno ni oLode vamoha ni mittetthesaya)," 
1Chronicles8:13 Beriya ni Xema, yaari mapwattapwattha a yaale yaamanke wAhiyaloni, ni ti yaawosa yaawoomonle amaki a oGate." 
1Chronicles8:14 Aiyo, Sasaki Yeremote," 
1Chronicles8:15 Zebadiya, Arade, Ederi," 
1Chronicles8:16 Mikayeli, Ixepa ni Yowa yaari anamwane asilopwana a Beriya." 
1Chronicles8:17 Zebadiya, Mexulami, Hiseki, Heberi," 
1Chronicles8:18 Ixmerai, Izeliya ni Yobabe yaari anamwane asilopwana a Elibahali." 
1Chronicles8:19 Yakimi, Zikeri, Zabedi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Eliyenai, Ziletai, Eliyeli," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaya, Beraya ni Ximerate yaari anamwane asilopwana a Ximeyi." 
1Chronicles8:22 Ixepani, Eberi, Eliyeli," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abedome, Zikeri, Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hananiya, Elami, Antotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ifedeya ni Penuweli yaari anamwane asilopwana a Xasake. 
1Chronicles8:26 Xamxerai, Xehariya, Ataliya," 
1Chronicles8:27 Yaarexiya, Eliya ni Zikeri yaari anamwane asilopwana a Yerohami." 
1Chronicles8:28 Ootheene ala, yaari mapwattapwattha a imusi sa aLeevi, ahooleli ntoko alempwalaaya mukhapiranimwaya, ni yaakhala oYerusaleemu." 
1Chronicles8:29 Yehiyeli, tiithi a Gibeyoni, aakhala musidadeni ya oGibiyoni. Amwaariye yiitthaniwa Maaka," 
1Chronicles8:30 ni mwaana mulopwana a ntthaaranawe iitthaniwa Abedomi, ni masina a anamwanaawe akina, ti ala: Zuri, Kixi, Bahali, Neri, Nadabe," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedori, Ahiyo, Zekeri" 
1Chronicles8:32 ni Mikelote, aamuyanre Ximeya. Awosatho, yaakhala vakhiviru ni amusaaya, oYerusaleemu." 
1Chronicles8:33 Neri, aamuyanre Kixi, tiithi a Sawuli. Sawuli aamuyanre Yonatani, Malki-xuwa, Abinadabe ni Exi-Bahali." 
1Chronicles8:34 Mwaana mulopwana a Yonatani aari Meribe-Bahali mwa yoowo aamuyanre Mika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Anamwane asilopwana a Mika: Pitoni, Meleke, Tareya ni Ahazi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahazi aamuyanre Yehowada, Yeyowada aamuyanre Alemete, Azimavete ni Zimeri, ni Zimeri aamuyanre Moza." 
1Chronicles8:37 Mosa aamuyanre Bineya, tiithi a Rafa, tiithi a Eleyasa, tiithi a Azeli." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azeli aarino anamwane asilopwana athannamosa, yiitthaniwa Azerikawu, Bokeru, Iximayeli, Xehariya, Obadiya ni Hanani. Ootheene ala yaari anamwane asilopwana a Azeli." 
1Chronicles8:39 Anamwane asilopwana a Exeke aari munneiye: Ulami aari a ntthaara, anaaveeli Yewuxi ni anaararu Elifelete." 
1Chronicles8:40 Anamwane asilopwana a Ulami yaari anakhotto ookhomaala ni oowera olatha muupa. Yaakhalano anamwane asilopwana ancipale mpakatho osuulu mwincipale – ootheene awo yaari ncira ni miloko mithanu. Awosa ootheene yaari a ekhapira ya Benyamini. 
1Chronicles9:1 Ikhapira sootheene sa aYixrayeli ootheene silempwale munamalepelani a nyaha mulivuruni sa mamwene a oYixrayeli. Muloko wa oYuda waaronghiwa wootthukiwani elapo ya oBabiloniya niwoko na ohimuroromelawaya Muluku. 
1Chronicles9:2 Atthu akina-akina a muloko, a asaserdoti*, a aLeevi ni a arumeiyi yaarumeela Mpaani mwa Muluku, ti yaapacenre ohokoleela muttimanimwaya ni musidadenimwaya." 
1Chronicles9:3 Vano aYuda, aBenyamini, awEfrayimi ni aManaxe yaamanke oYerusaleemu yaari ti ala:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Utai, mwaana mulopwana a Amihude, mwaana mulopwana a Omeri, mwaana mulopwana a Imeri ni mwaana mulopwana a Bani, a mukhapirani ya Perezi, mwaana mulopwana a Yuda." 
1Chronicles9:5 A aXiloni: Asaya aari mwaana mulopwana a ntthaara vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana. 
1Chronicles9:6 A Zerahi: Yehuweli. Waatta wa aYuda waari macira mathannamosa ni miloko mithannamixexe. 
1Chronicles9:7 A aBenyamini: Salu, mwaana mulopwana a Mexulami, mwaana mulopwana a Hodaviya, mwaana mulopwana a Hasenuwa;" 
1Chronicles9:8 Ibeneya, mwaana mulopwana a Yerohami; Ela, mwaana mulopwana a Uzi, mwaana mulopwana a Mikeri; ni Mexulami mwaana mulopwana a Xefatiya, mwaana mulopwana a Rehuweli, mwaana mulopwana Ibeniya." 
1Chronicles9:9 A epuumba ya Benyamini, ettharihiwaka ekhapiraaya, yaari 956. Asilopwana ootheene ala, yaari mapwattapwattha a imusisaya." 
1Chronicles9:10 A asaserdoti*: Yedaya, Yehoiyaribe, Yakini;" 
1Chronicles9:11 Azariya mwaana mulopwana a Hilikiya, mwaana mulopwana a Mexulami, mwaana mulopwana a Zadoki, mwaana mulopwana a Merayote ni mwaana mulopwana a Aitube, muhooleli aawehaweha Empa ya Muluku;" 
1Chronicles9:12 Adaya, mwaana mulopwana a Yerohami, mwaana mulopwana a Paxuri ni mwaana mulopwana a Malekiya; ni Maasayi, mwaana mulopwana a Adiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Yahezera, mwaana mulopwana a Mexulami, mwaana mulopwana a Mexeilemite ni mwaana mulopwana a Imeri." 
1Chronicles9:13 Waatta wa asaserdoti* yaari mapwattapwattha a imusi, waari 1 760. Awosa yaari asilopwana oowera, ni mutekwaaya waari orumeela Mpaani mwa Muluku." 
1Chronicles9:14 A aLeevi: Xemaya, mwaana mulopwana a Haxube, mwaana mulopwana a Azrikami ni mwaana mulopwana a Haxabiya aari mMerari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 Bakebakari, Herexi, Galali Mataniya, mwaana mulopwana a Mika mwaana mulopwana a Zikeri ni mwaana mulopwana a Asafi;" 
1Chronicles9:16 Obadiya, mwaana mulopwana a Xemaya, mwaana mulopwana a Galali ni mwaana mulopwana a Yedutuni; Berekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Asa, ni mwaana mulopwana a Elikana, aakhala mmittettheni sa aNetofati." 
1Chronicles9:17 Anamalipelela a milako: Xalumi, aari mutokweene, Akube, Talmoni, Ahimani ni axunnaya mwa yaawo ari mpaka olelo" 
1Chronicles9:18 anamalipelela a Mulako wa Mwene mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Xalumi aari mutokweene. Ala yaari anamalipelela a milako yaari a yaakonelaayawo aLeevi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Xalumi, mwaana mulopwana a Kore, mwaana mulopwana a Abiyasafe ni mwaana mulopwana a Kora, vamoha ni amusaawe ari aKorahi, anamalipelela a milako yaawehaweha olipeleliwa wa milako sa Eheema, ntoko makholowaaya yaaraaya anamawehaweha olipeleliwa wa mulako wa Woomakawawe Yave." 
1Chronicles9:20 Khalayeene, Pinehasi, mwaana mulopwana a Eleyazari, ti aawehaweha anamalipelela a milako, ni Yave aari ni yoowo." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zakariya, mwaana mulopwana a Mexelemiya, aari namalipelela a mulako wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*." 
1Chronicles9:22 Yaalikeliwaaya ootheene yaathanliwe weera ekhale anamalipelela a milako, yaalepeliwe mukhapirani a mittetthesaya, yaari macira meeli ni muloko neeli. Awo yaathanleliwe miteko iye ni Davide ni mwa namoonihera* Samuweli." 
1Chronicles9:23 Awosa ni ikhapirasaya, yaavahiwe muteko wa owehaweha milako sa Empa ya Yave, mwa yeeyo yiitthaniwa Eheema." 
1Chronicles9:24 Anamalipelela yaawehaweha milako mmipattani mixexe: Ottuttuwani, ohito, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa ni mpatta ninkela nsuwa." 
1Chronicles9:25 Amusaaya yaakhala mmittetthenimwaya waatthuneya orwa ihuhu sikina sikina ovara muteko vamoha ni yaawosa mweehuhuni ya mahuku mathannameeli. 
1Chronicles9:26 Vaheera anamalipelela asitokweene axexe a milako, yaari aLeevi, yaahaakhela muteko woowehaweha isaala ni omuhakhuni wa Empa ya Muluku." 
1Chronicles9:27 Awosa yaaviriha ohiyu muxerexere wa Empa ya Muluku, niwoko waatthuneya owehaweha ni ohula milako khula oxeexelo." 
1Chronicles9:28 aLeevi akina akina yaawehaweha ikaruma saavareliwa muteko Mpaani mwa Muluku; awosa yaalikela saakhumihiwaaya ni saahokoloxiwaaya. 
1Chronicles9:29 Akina yaakosoopa ikaruma sikina sa Nipuro Nootteela*, nitho sa ephepa, eviinyu, makhura, erubani* ni makhura oowunkhela." 
1Chronicles9:30 Vaheera yaari ti asaserdoti* yaavahiwe muteko wa oreherera makhura oowunkhela. 
1Chronicles9:31 muLeevi mmoha iitthaniwa Matitiya, mwaana a ntthaara na muKorahi Xalumi, mutekwaawe waari woowooxa ipaawu wa sooveleela." 
1Chronicles9:32 Vano eriyari ya aKohati, axunnaya akina akina, mutekwaaya waari wooreherera ipaawu siikaathiwa vameesa khula eSaabadu." 
1Chronicles9:33 Anamwiipa, mapwattapwattha a imusi sa aLeevi, yaapwaherera okhala musaala sa Mpaani mwa Muluku, ehivaraka miteko sikina, niwoko othana ni ohiyu, yaavara mutekwaaya xaxaxa." 
1Chronicles9:34 Ootheene ala yaari mapwattapwattha a imusi sa aLeevi, yaalempwale ntoko ahooleli mukhapiranimwaya, ni yaakhala oYerusaleemu." 
1Chronicles9:35 Yeyeli, tiithi aGibeyoni, aakhala oGibiyoni. Amwaariye yiitthaniwa Maaka," 
1Chronicles9:36 ni mwaniye mulopwana a ntthaara iitthaniwa Abedome. Vahoolowaya, aayariwa Zuri, Kixi, Bahali, Neri, Nadabe," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedori, Ahiyo, Zakariya ni Mikelote." 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikelote aamuyanre Ximeyami. Awosatho yaakhala vakhiviru wa amusaaya oYerusaleemu. 
1Chronicles9:39 Neri aamuyanre Kixi, Kixi aamuyanre Sawuli, Sawuli aamuyanre Yonatani, Malkixuwa, Abinadabe ni Exi-Bahali." 
1Chronicles9:40 Mwaana mulopwana a Yonatani: Meribe-Bahali, aamuyanre Mika." 
1Chronicles9:41 Anamwane asilopwana a Mika: Pitoni, Meleki, Tahereya ni Ahazi." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahazi aamuyanre Yada, Yada aamuyanre Alemete, Azemavete ni Zimeri ni Zimeri aamuyanre Moza." 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza aamuyanre Bineya, mwa yoowo mwaniye aari Refaiya; mwaana mulopwana a Refaiya aari Eleyasa, tiithi a Azeli." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azeli aarino anamwane athannamosa, ni masinaaya yaari ti ala: Azerikami, Bokeru, Yixmayeli, Xehariya, Obadiya ni Hanani. Alasa yaari anamwane asilopwana a Azeli." 
1Chronicles10:1 Vano, waaheereya weera yaawananaka aFilisti, aYixrayeli yaahoomoliwa, ni ancipale yaakhwela mmwaakoni Gilebowa." 
1Chronicles10:2 aFilisti yaamuttharelela Sawuli ni anamwanaawe, enamwiiva Yonatani, Abinadabe ni Malkixuwa, anamwane asilopwana a Sawuli." 
1Chronicles10:3 Awosa emurinceene Sawuli, ekhotto yaavihaxa, mpaka yaamuphwanya, enamulatha ananyuupa, anavulalaxa." 
1Chronicles10:4 Vano Sawuli aamulamulela yoowo aamukuxera ikapwitthisawe: “Otholole ekatanaawo ni okiive weera kihihaawe wuulihiheya muru woomorela mmatatani mwa oohiineliwa ala.” Vaheera yoowo aamukuxera ikapwitthisawe, aatondolowa ni khaatthunne opaka yeeyo. Hiiho Sawuli aakuxa ekatanaawe, aneemexa, aniivonyerawo." 
1Chronicles10:5 Vahoolowaya, yoowo aamukuxera ikapwitthisawe oonakaru weera Sawuli ohookhwa, aahiivonyeratho vakatananivawe, anakhwa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Hiiho, Sawuli aahookhwa vamoha ni anamwanaawe araru, mpakatho ekhapiraawe yootheene." 
1Chronicles10:7 aYixrayeli yaamanke mureyareyani yoonakaru weera anakhotto yaatthawa, ni Sawuli aahookhwa vamoha ni anamwanaawe, yaatthawa ehiyaka isidadesaya. Vahoolowaya, aFilisti yaarowa waakamela." 
1Chronicles10:8 Waaxiiye, aFilisti yaarongwaaya ohuhula mittembo, yaamphwannye Sawuli akhwenleene vamoha ni anamwanaawe mmwaako Gilebowa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Yaamuhita Sawuli, enakuxa ikapwitthisawe, enaarumihela anamitthenga mulaponi moothemwene mwa aFilisti, elaleiyaka ihaali eriyari ya milukusaya ni mulokwaaya." 
1Chronicles10:10 Yaahiikaathi ikapwitthisawe mpaani mwa milukusaya, enatthukelela muruwaawe mpaani mwa mulukwaaya Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Amaki ootheene a oYabexi-Gileyade esuwelaka yeeyo aFilisti yaampankaaya Sawuli," 
1Chronicles10:12 oolipaxa murima a eriyaraaya yaarowasa, enakuxa muttembo wa Sawuli ni sa anamwanaawe, enarongha oYabexi. Wu yaavithelawo makhuvaayasa vamwirini mutokweene, enatthukasa mmahukuni mathannameeli." 
1Chronicles10:13 Sawuli okhwenle hiiho niwoko khaaroromeleiye wa Yave; khiiwelenle masu a Yave, mpaka aaphiyeraawe omukoherera muthiyana uuluma ni minepa sa anamakhwa," 
1Chronicles10:14 ahiyaka omukoherera Yave. Tivawo, Yave aamwinnyerenraawe mookhwaani, anamvaha omwene Davide, mwaana mulopwana a Yixai." 
1Chronicles11:1 aYixrayeli ootheene yaathukumana ni Davide oHeberoni, emweerelaka: “Hiyo nri emusaanyu xaxaxa." 
1Chronicles11:2 Khalayeene, naari Sawuli areene mwene, ti nyuwo mwaahoolela aYixrayeli mukhottonimwaya. Vano Yave Mulukwaanyu, aaweerelani: ‘Nyuwo munimwaakukhula aYixrayeli, mulokwaaka, ni munookhala namalamulaaya.’”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Vano asitokweene ootheene a oYixrayeli, yaarowa omukumanano mwene Davide oHeberoni, ni weiwo owo aawiiraanannaaweno ohoolo wa Yave, ni iwe yaamuttikitthela Davide omwene wa oYixrayeli, ntoko Yave aahimalaawe mwa Samuweli." 
1Chronicles11:4 Davide ni aYixrayeli ootheene, yaarowasa oYerusaleemu, ori oYebusi. aYebusi, amaki a musidade," 
1Chronicles11:5 yaamweerelasa Davide: “Nyuwo khamungwera ovolowamo.” Wa soothesene Davide aawina moolipamo mwa oSiyoni, eri esidade ya Davide." 
1Chronicles11:6 Nihuku nne, Davide aaheera: “Yoowo aanaapacere waawanano aYebusi, onookhala mutokweene a anakhotto.” Vano Yowabe, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruwiya, ti aapacenre waawanano, tivawo aavahiwaawe otokweene wa anakhotto." 
1Chronicles11:7 Davide aakhala woolipawo, tivawo wiitthaniwaaya esidade ya Davide." 
1Chronicles11:8 Owo aarasela esidade, muxerexere moothemwene wa moolipamo, okhuma itarato mpaka ixiri saarukureenrewo, ni Yowabe, aareherera mpatta mukina waahanle wa esidade." 
1Chronicles11:9 Hiiho, Davide annapwaherera okhala ooweraxa, niwoko Yave, a ikuru sootheene aari ni yoowo." 
1Chronicles11:10 Masina ala anttharelana, yaari a asitokweene a anakhotto oottittimiheyaxa a Davide, mwa yaawo vamoha ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaathanlale omukhaliha Davide mwene, ntoko Yave aaroromelinghaawe." 
1Chronicles11:11 Masineene ti ala: Yaxobeyami, muHakomoni, aahoolela asitokweene; ti yoowo aawiivale ni ekatanaawe anakhotto macira mararu mukhottoni emoha." 
1Chronicles11:12 Vahoolowaya aari Eleyazari, mwaana mulopwana a Dodai, ngwAhohi, mmoha a anakhotto ooweraxa araru." 
1Chronicles11:13 Owo aari ni Davide oPas–Dayimi, weiwo aFilisti yaathukumanenlaayawo ekhotto. Vanipuroni yaaraayawo ematta ya esevada* yincipale, anakhotto a aYixrayeli yaahaatthawasa aFilisti," 
1Chronicles11:14 mene awosa yaari ethataanelo eriyari ya mmatta. Awosa yaahaakiha ematta ele, enaavulalihasa aFilisti, ni Yave ahaawinihaxa." 
1Chronicles11:15 Mukuttula mmoha wa aFilisti okonenleene mureyareyani na oRefayimi, asitokweene araru eriyari ya asitokweene miloko miraru, yaarowasa omukumanano Davide vamwala ori vakhiviru wa nikhuku na wAdulami." 
1Chronicles11:16 Ehuhuweene yeele Davide aari woolipawo vale, ni anakhotto a aFilisti yaari oBeteleheemu." 
1Chronicles11:17 Davide aahaawelaxa maahi, eeraka: Ii! Aakhanle mutthu eera akiruuhele maahi a munttankhini nri vakhiviru wa mulako wa oBeteleheemu!" 
1Chronicles11:18 Vano araru ale yaahiivolongha yaakonenlaayawo aFilisti, enarikasa maahi a munttankhini mmwe, enamuruuhela Davide. Vaheera owo aakhootta owura; ohiyanawaya, aayeeha apakaka yoomveleelela Yave." 
1Chronicles11:19 Davide aaheera: “Khoontthuniheriwaru vamaitoni wa Muluku opaka yeeyo! Maahi ala aneemelela ephome ya asilopwana ala yaalemve okumaaya!” Yeenre awosa yaleva okumaaya weera emuruuhele maahi, Davide khaatthunne owura. Wu waari ominya murima wa anakhotto oottittimiheyaxa araru ala." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abixayi, munneiye Yowabe, aari mutokweene wa mukuttula wa anakhotto miloko miraru. Owo aahaawanano ni nivaka nimoha anakhotto macira mararu, anawiiva, anakhalano epili antoko araru ale." 
1Chronicles11:21 Owo aattittimihiwaxa opwaha mukuttula wa anakhotto miloko miraru, anathatuwa mutokweenaaya, mene khaalikananne araru ale." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaiya mwaana mulopwana a Yoheyada aari oominya murima, nakhotto a oKabezeeli, aawera opaka itthu sincipale. Aawiiva anakhotto eeli a ooreerela a oMowabe, ni nihuku nimoha na etthapwe, aakhuruwela mulittini noowiixera, anamwiiva mwatto." 
1Chronicles11:23 Aamwiivatho ngwExipitu mmoha, aarino imeetru* piili ni vakhanani sa orakamawawe. ngwExipitu ole, aaroovarelaru nivaka, mwiittaaya waalikana yootthavela ya namatthava, Benaiya aangwanano ni ekopo. Aamwaakha ngwExipitu nivaka aavarenlaawe, anamwiivelano." 
1Chronicles11:24 Iya saari soopaka sa Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada, aarinotho epili ntoko anakhotto araru oottittimiheyaxa a Davide." 
1Chronicles11:25 Owo aattittimihaxiwa ompwaha akhalaru mmoha a miloko miraru, mene khanaalikanane araru ale. Hiiho, Davide aamukhaliha mutokweene a anamalipelelaawe." 
1Chronicles11:26 Anakhotto akina yaari ti ala: Asaheli, munneiye Yowabe; Elehanani, mwaana mulopwana a Dodo a oBeteleheemu;" 
1Chronicles11:27 Xamote, muHarori; Helezi, muPeloni;" 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira, mwaana mulopwana a Ikexi a oTekowa; Abiyezeri a wAnatote;" 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibekai, muHusate; Ilai, ngwAhohi;" 
1Chronicles11:30 Maarai, muNetofate; Helede, mwaana mulopwana a Baana, muNetofate;" 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai, mwaana mulopwana a Ribai, muGibeyoni, mulaponi ya oBenyamini; Benaiya, muPiratoni;" 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurayi, a mmaxaapwani a oGaaxi; Abiyeli, ngwArbate;" 
1Chronicles11:33 Azimavete, muBaharimi; Eliyaba, muXaalboni;" 
1Chronicles11:34 anamwane asilopwana a Haxemi, muGizoni; Yonatani, mwaana mulopwana a Sage, muHarari;" 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiyami, mwaana mulopwana a Sakari, muHarari; Elifali, mwaana mulopwana a Uri;" 
1Chronicles11:36 Heferi, mMekerati; Ahiya, muPeloni;" 
1Chronicles11:37 Hezeru, muKarameli; Naarai, mwaana mulopwana a Ezebai;" 
1Chronicles11:38 Yoweli, munneiye Natani; Mibehari, mwaana mulopwana a Hageri;" 
1Chronicles11:39 ngwAmoni Zeleke; Naarai, muBeroti, aamukuxera ikapwitthi Yowabe, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha;" 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira ni Garebe, awIteri;" 
1Chronicles11:41 Uriya, muHiti, Zabade, mwaana mulopwana a Ahelai;" 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina, mwaana mulopwana a Xiza, muRubeni, mutokweene a aRubeni ni a anakhotto miloko miraru;" 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanani, mwaana mulopwana a Maaka; Yosafate, mMiteni;" 
1Chronicles11:44 Uziya, ngwAxterati; Xama ni Yehiyeli, anamwane asilopwana a Hotami, ngwAroweri;" 
1Chronicles11:45 Yediyayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Ximeri, munneiye Yoha, muTizi;" 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliyeli, mMahavi; Yeribai ni Yosaviya, anamwane asilopwana a Elinaami; Itema, mMowabi," 
1Chronicles11:47 ni Eliyeli, Obede ni Yaasiyeli, mMezobayi." 
1Chronicles12:1 Yaakhala asilopwana akina yiitakansenre ni Davide oZiklage, weiwo aamwiipithaawewo Sawuli, mwaana mulopwana a Kixi. Awosa yaari eriyari ya anakhotto yaamukhavihenre Davide mukhottoni;" 
1Chronicles12:2 okhuma ntata noolopwana mpaka noothiyana yaavarela muteko muupa ni ekwamba yoovonyerano maluku. Awosa yaari a epuumba ya Benyamini ni ya Sawuli. Vano masinaaya yaari ti ala: 
1Chronicles12:3 Ahiyezeri, mutokweenaayasa, ni Yowaxi, mwaana mulopwana a Xemaahi, muGibeya; Yeziyeli ni Pelete, anamwane asilopwana a Azimavete; Beraka, Yewu, ngwAnatoti," 
1Chronicles12:4 ni Iximaiya, muGibeyoni, nakhotto mutokweene a anakhotto miloko miraru ni asitokweenaayasa; Yeremiya, Yahaziyeli, Yohanani, Yozabade, muGederati," 
1Chronicles12:5 Eluzai, Yeremote, Behaliya, Xemariya ni Xefatiya, muHarufi;" 
1Chronicles12:6 aKorahi Elekana, Isexiya, Azareeli, Yohezeri ni Yaxobeyami;" 
1Chronicles12:7 Yohela ni Zebadiya, anamwane asilopwana a Yerohayimi a oGedori." 
1Chronicles12:8 A epuumba ya Gadi, akina akina yaahiiraanano Davide moolipamwawe munikareni. Yaari anakhotto oominya murima, oolikaneene owana, ni yaasuwela owana ni exikudu* ni nivaka. Ekhalelowaaya yaari ntoko ya mwatto, ni yaari oowaaluwa ntoko naahe mmanyaakoni." 
1Chronicles12:9 Mutokweene aari ti Ezeri; anaaveeli Obadiya; anaararu Eliyabe; 
1Chronicles12:10 anaaxexe Miximana, anaathanu Yeremiya;" 
1Chronicles12:11 anaathannamosa Atayi; anaathanneeli Eliyeli; 
1Chronicles12:12 anaathannaararu Yohanani; anaathannaaxexe Elezabadi; 
1Chronicles12:13 anaamuloko Yeremiya; ni anaamuloko nimmoha aari ti Makebanai. 
1Chronicles12:14 aGadi ootheene ale, yaari asitokweene a anakhotto; mukhaanaaya aangwera waawanano anakhotto ncira, ni mutokweenaaya, waawanano anakhotto macira muloko." 
1Chronicles12:15 Ti yaala yaamulapungwe Yordanu, mweeri woopacera wa eyaakha, mooloko osareiyeene okhopela ni okhopela, enawoomolasa ootheene yaakhala mureyareyani okhuma mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka mpatta ninkela nsuwa." 
1Chronicles12:16 aBenyamini akina akina ni asilopwana akina a aYuda, yaahoorwatho wa Davide, moolipamwawe." 
1Chronicles12:17 Davide aarowa waakumanano, anaweerelasa: “Mwaarwaasiyeene mmuretteleni, weera mukikhavihere, kiri oolikaneene owaakhelani. Vaheera mwatthuna okilokottha ni okinnyerera mmatatani mwa amwiittanaaka, matataaka ehivanreeneru ya nipuhero, Muluku a makholowaahu, oone yeeyo ni oothorihaseni.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Vano, Munepa waamukhuruwela Amasai, mutokweene a anakhotto miloko miraru, ni owo aamweerela: “Ii! Davide, hiyo ti awinyu! Ii! Mwaana a Yixai, nri ni nyuwo! Sootheene siweetteleni nnene nyuwo nitho oowiiraananaanyu, niwoko Mulukwaanyu onimookhaviherani.” Hiiho Davide aawaakhelasa, anaakhaliha asitokweene a mikuttulasawe sa anamahuhula." 
1Chronicles12:19 Anakhotto akina akina a Manaxe yaatthawelela wa Davide owo aarongwaawe ni aFilisti ongwanano Sawuli. Awosa khayaakhavihenre aFilisti, niwoko asitokweenaaya aFilisti yaawoopererasa ni yaawoomolasa, yeeraka: “Nnoolivela ni okumi, Davide anihiya anahokoleela wa Sawuli, pwiiyaawe.”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Asilopwana a Manaxe, yaatthawelenle wa Davide, owo aarongwaawe oZikelage, ti ala: Adena, Yosabade, Yedihayeli, Mikayeli, Yozabade, Elihu ni Ziletai, asitokweene a anakhotto a macira muloko oManaxe." 
1Chronicles12:21 Awosa yaamukhavihera Davide waawanano anamahuhula, niwoko awosa yaari anakhotto oowera owana, ni yaari asitokweene a anakhottwaawe." 
1Chronicles12:22 Vano, khula nihuku yannarwa anakhotto weera emukhavihere Davide, mpaka anakhottwaawe yaakhala ancipalexa ntoko anakhotto a Muluku." 
1Chronicles12:23 Waatta wa anakhotto yaari oolikaneene orowa okhottoni mwa yaawo yaarwiiye wa Davide oHeberoni weera emwinnyerere omwene wa Sawuli ntoko Yave aahimalaawe, ti wu:" 
1Chronicles12:24 A epuumba ya Yuda, 6 800 oolikaneene owana ekhotto, ekuxaleene exikudu* ni nivaka;" 
1Chronicles12:25 a epuumba ya Simeyoni, 7 100 oolikaneene owana ekhotto;" 
1Chronicles12:26 a epuumba ya Leevi, 4 600," 
1Chronicles12:27 vamoha ni Yehoyada, muhooleli a emusi ya Aharoni, vamoha ni anakhotto 3 700," 
1Chronicles12:28 ni Zadoki, aari mmiravo ni murima woolipa ni mapwattapwattha miloko miili neeli a emusaawe;" 
1Chronicles12:29 a epuumba ya Benyamini, amusaawe Sawuli, macira miloko miraru, ancipale a yaawo yaari oororomeleya mweemusini ya Sawuli mpaka ehuhuweene yeele;" 
1Chronicles12:30 a epuumba ya Efrayimi, yaari anakhotto oowera owana ekhotto, oowiiwanyeyaxa mmahimonimwaya, 20 800;" 
1Chronicles12:31 a eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe, yaathanliwe eromoliwaka masinaaya weera emvare omwene Davide, yaari anakhotto 18 000;" 
1Chronicles12:32 a epuumba ya Isakari, asilopwana yiiwexenxe ihuhu soottittimiheyaxa ni yaasuwenle moota aYixrayeli waatthuneyaaya weetta yaari asitokweene macira meeli ni imusisaya sootheene sa olamulawaya;" 
1Chronicles12:33 a epuumba ya Zebuloni, anakhotto ooxuttihiweene, oolikaneene owanano wakhalaru moota wa kapwitthi, yaalakenle omukhavihera Davide moota woomalela, yaari 50 000;"
