1Chronicles12:34 a epuumba ya Nafitali yaari ahooleli macira muloko ereeneno anakhotto 37 000 ekuxaleene ixikudu* ni mavaka; 
1Chronicles12:35 a epuumba ya Dani, yaari anakhotto 28 600 oolikaneene owana ekhotto;" 
1Chronicles12:36 a epuumba ya Axeri, anakhotto ooxuttihiweene, oolikaneene owana ekhotto, yaari 40 000;" 
1Chronicles12:37 ni wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa oYordanu, a ipuumba sa Rubeni, sa Gadi ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe, yaari anakhotto 120 000 ekuxaleene ikapwitthi soohiyanahiyana." 
1Chronicles12:38 Anakhotto ootheene ala yaahiixoonihera ni otthunawaya weera erumeele mmiserani. Yaahoorwa oHeberoni elakenleene moota woomalela omvara Davide omwene wa oYixrayeli wootheene. Hiiho, aYixrayeli ootheene akinaawo yaatthunaaya yaari etthu emohamoharu yeeyo." 
1Chronicles12:39 Yaakhalasa ni Davide mahuku mararu, ecaaka ni ewuraka, niwoko amusaaya yaahaavahasa yoocaaya." 
1Chronicles12:40 Amaki a ipuumba soowaattamana mpakatho a mmapuroni oorakamela ntoko Isakari, Zebuloni ni Nafitali, yaahaaruuhelasa sooca sincipale sikuxiwaka ni abuuru, ikamelu*, amula* ni imombe. Saahaattaxa sooca ntoko iya: Ephepa, iboolu sa ifiigu, iboolu sa iwuuva* soowuumihiwa, eviinyu, makhura, imombe ni ikhondoolo, niwoko waakhala ohakalalaxa oYixrayeli." 
1Chronicles13:1 Davide ahaakoherera asitokweenaawe ootheene – asitokweene a anakhotto macira muloko, ni a ncira nimoha." 
1Chronicles13:2 Vano owo aaheerela muthukumano wootheene wa aYixrayeli: “Nyuwosa mwaakhulenleene, ni wu waareene otthuna wa Yave, Mulukwaahu, naarumihele mutthenga axunnihu mulaponi moothemwene wa oYixrayeli, mpakatho wa asaserdoti* ni aLeevi ari ni yaawosa musidadenimwaya, weera erwe yiitakansere ni hiyo." 
1Chronicles13:3 Nrowe naahokoloxe Arka* a Mulukwaahu, niwoko khanaasaasa otthuna wa Muluku mweehuhuni ya olamula wa Sawuli." 
1Chronicles13:4 Vano muthukumano wootheene waahaakhulela, niwoko muloko wootheene waahoona weera wooreera.”" 
1Chronicles13:5 Hiiho Davide aahaathukumanyiha aYixrayeli ootheene, okhuma mooloko Xihori, wExipitu, mpaka oLebo-Hamate, weera yaaruuhe oKiriyate-Yeyarimi Arka* a Muluku." 
1Chronicles13:6 Davide ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaarowasa oBaala, ori oKiriyate-Yeyarimi, oYuda, weera yaakuxe Arka* a Muluku, Yave akilaathenleene ehicaawe eriyari ya akerubini*; Arka* mwa yaawo aniitthaneliwa Nsinanawe." 
1Chronicles13:7 Vaate wa Abinadabe yaahaakuxa Arka* a Muluku mukaaroni enyowani, yeettihiwa ni Uza ni Ahiyo." 
1Chronicles13:8 Davide ni aYixrayeli ootheene, yaarowasa yiinaka ni yiipaka evihereyanxeene ohoolo wa Muluku, erumaka amakita, atthakare, ikoma, ikengere ni mapalapatta." 
1Chronicles13:9 Yaaphiyalaaya wamveeriwa etrigu wa oKidoni, Uza aahookola moono weera aavarele Arka*, niwoko imombe saakwattuliwa." 
1Chronicles13:10 Vano isara sa Yave saampattela Uza, ni Owo aamwiiva niwoko noowaatava Arka*. Uza aakhwenle vaavaale ohoolo wa Muluku." 
1Chronicles13:11 Davide aanyoonyiwa, niwoko isara sa Yave aampattihenraawe Uza. Tivawo nipuro nne nniitthaniwaaya mpaka olelo va Perezi-Uza." 
1Chronicles13:12 Nihuku nne Davide aamoova Muluku aniikoha: “Moota heeni kineeraaka kiwere waahokoloxa Arka* a Muluku?” 
1Chronicles13:13 Tivawo aahiyalaawe waaruuha Arka* musidadeni ya Davide. Ohiyanawaya aaronghale vaate wa muGiti iitthaniwa Obedi-Edomi. 
1Chronicles13:14 Arka* a Muluku yaakhala owannyawe nyeeri miraru, ni Yave aareeliha emusaawe ni sootheene aarinaawe." 
1Chronicles14:1 Hirami mwene a oTiro, aamurumihela Davide anamitthenga, vamoha ni iviika sa esidari*, mpakatho mapatarero ni makalipinteiru weera emutekele empa ya emwene." 
1Chronicles14:2 Vano, Davide aahoona weera Yave aamwaakhulela okhalawawe mwene oYixrayeli ni annamweettiherela nnene omwenaawe moosivelani mulokwaawe aYixrayeli." 
1Chronicles14:3 oYerusaleemu Davide aahaathelatho asithiyana akina, anaayaratho anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana." 
1Chronicles14:4 Masina a anamwane aayarenlaawe wu, ti ala: Xamuwa, Xobabe, Natani, Salomoni," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibehari, Elixuwa, Elipelete," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nefege, Yafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elixama, Beeliyada ni Elifelete." 
1Chronicles14:8 aFilisti yaasuwenlaaya weera Davide oovariwa omwene wa oYixrayeli wootheene, yaarowasa ni anakhotto ootheene weera emutthuke, mene Davide aasuwela yeeyo, anarowa waawanano." 
1Chronicles14:9 Afilisti evoleenleene nreyareya na oRefayimi," 
1Chronicles14:10 Davide aamukoha Muluku: “Kaawananeke aFilisti? Nyuwo munoowinnyerera mmatatanimwaka?” Yave aamwaakhula: “Murooke, Miyo kinoowinnyerera mmatatanimwanyu.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Vano Davide ni anakhottwaawe, aarowa oBahali-Perazimi, ni Davide aahaawinasa, aneera: “Muluku ohaaphwata amwiittanaaka mwa matataaka, mooteene yoowo osareya wa maahi ontannyeraaya ophwata.” Hiiho nipuro nne, naattehiwa Bahali-Perazimi." 
1Chronicles14:12 Yeenre aFilisti yahiyawo milukusaya, Davide aalamulela weera sihisiwe." 
1Chronicles14:13 aFilisti yaahokoleelatho owana onreyareyani 
1Chronicles14:14 ni Davide aamukohereratho Muluku ni Owo aamwaakhula: “Muhaawanane ohoolo, mene mwaavirele ottuliwaya ni mwaawananeke ohoolo wa ibalsamu*." 
1Chronicles14:15 Vano nyuwo mwiiwaru oruma wa mikhitto musulu wa ibalsamu*, mvenyereke ekhotto, niwoko eyo eneneero enghima weera Yave oorowa ohoolowanyu weera awiive anakhotto a aFilisti.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Davide aapaka ntoko Yave aamulamulenlaawe, ni awosa yaahaawina anakhotto a aFilisti ephiroweeneeyo, okhuma oGibiyoni mpaka oGezeri." 
1Chronicles14:17 Hiiho epili ya Davide yaamwareela elapo yootheene, ni Yave aapakiha weera miloko sootheene simoove." 
1Chronicles15:1 Davide iitekenleene impasawe musidadeni ya Davide, owo aahaarehererela nipuro Arka* a Muluku, anaakungela eheema." 
1Chronicles15:2 Vano Davide aaheera: “Ti aLeevi paahi eneera yaateexeke Arka* a Muluku, niwoko Yave aathanlenle yeeyo ni weera erumeele ohoolowawe. Vano ola okhaleke ti mutekwaayeene wa mahuku ootheene.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Davide aahaathukumanyiha aYixrayeli ootheene oYerusaleemu weera yaaruuhe Arka* a Yave vanipuroni aarehererenlaawe. 
1Chronicles15:4 Aathukumanyihatho ekhapira ya Aharoni ni aLeevi: 
1Chronicles15:5 a ekhapira ya aKohati, Uriyeli, muhooleli, ni amusi ncira ni miloko miili;" 
1Chronicles15:6 a ekhapira ya Merari, Asaya, muhooleli, ni amusi macira meeli ni miloko miili;" 
1Chronicles15:7 a ekhapira ya Gerexoni: Yoweli, muhooleli, ni amusi ncira ni miloko miraru;" 
1Chronicles15:8 a ekhapira ya Elisafani, Semaiya, muhooleli, ni amusi macira meeli;" 
1Chronicles15:9 a ekhapira ya Heberoni, Eliyeli, muhooleli, ni amusi miloko mithannamiraru;" 
1Chronicles15:10 a ekhapira ya Uziyeli, Aminadabe, muhooleli, ni amusi ncira ni muloko neeli." 
1Chronicles15:11 Woottharelana Davide aahaathukumanyiha asaserdoti* Zadoki ni Abiyatari, ni aLeevi Uriyeli, Asaya, Yoweli, Xemaiya, Eliyeli ni Aminadabe." 
1Chronicles15:12 Owo aaweerelasa: “Nyuwosa ti mapwattapwattha a imusi sa aLeevi; nyuwosa ni asikhwiinyu aLeevi ontthuneya wiitteeliha ni waaruuha Arka* a Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, wa nipuro kaarehererenlaaka." 
1Chronicles15:13 Mweenre nyuwosa mwahaatexa Arka* emaara yoopacera, isara sa Yave, Mulukwaahu, sootannyera ophwatiwa eriyaraahu. Hiyo khanaamukoherenre moota heeni neeraahu niweettihe.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Vano, asaserdoti* ni aLeevi yaahiitteeliha weera yaateexe Arka* aYave, Muluku a oYixrayeli." 
1Chronicles15:15 Vano aLeevi yaahaakuxa Arka* a Muluku, yaathatelaka ni ikopo, ntoko Moisesi aalamulenlaawe, ettharihaka masu a Yave." 
1Chronicles15:16 Davide aahaalamulelatho ahooleli a aLeevi weera yaathanle eriyari ya axunnaya anamwiipa yiipe icipo sa ohakalala, siipiwaka ni ikaruma sa icipo: atthakare, amakita ni ikengere." 
1Chronicles15:17 Hiiho, aLeevi yaamuthanla Hemani, mwaana mulopwana a Yoweli; eriyari ya asikhwaawe Asafi, mwaana mulopwana a Berakiya ni eriyari ya aMerari, amusaaya, yaamuthanla Etani, mwaana mulopwana a Kuxaya;" 
1Chronicles15:18 vamoha ni yaawosa, amusaaya yaari mukuttula wanaaveeli: Zakariya, Yaaziyeli, Xemiramoti, Yehiyeli, Uni, Eliyabe, Benaya, Maaseya, Matitiya, Elifelehu, Mikeneya, Obede-Edomi ni Yeiyeli yaari anamalipelela a milako." 
1Chronicles15:19 Anamwiipa Hemani, Asafi, ni Eta waatthuneya wiipa ikengere sa ebronze*;" 
1Chronicles15:20 Zakariya, Aziyeli, Xemiramoti, Yehiyeli, Uni, Eliyabe, Maaseya ni Benaya, waatthuneya owiipa atthakare, ettharihaka moota woowiipa oniitthaniwa alamoti*," 
1Chronicles15:21 Matatiya, Elifelehu, Mikeneya, Obede-Edomi, Yeyeli ni Azaziya, waatthuneya owiipa amakita, ettharihaka moota woowiipa oniitthaniwa Xeminiti*." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenaniya, mutokweene a aLeevi, aathanleliwe ociponi; owo waari mutekwaawe, niwoko owo annawerela mutekweene yoowo." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekiya ni Elikana yaari anamalipelela a milako ni waatthuneya waakhapelela Arka*. 
1Chronicles15:24 Asaserdoti* Xebaniya, Yoxafati, Netaneli, Amasai, Zakariya, Benaya ni Eliyezeri, waatthuneya wiipa mapalapatta ohoolo wa Arka* a Muluku. Obede-Edomi ni Yehiya waatthuneyatho okhala anamalipelela a milako ni waawehaweha Arka*." 
1Chronicles15:25 Hiiho, mfestani etokotoko Davide, asitokweene a aYixrayeli ni ahooleli a anakhotto macira muloko yaarowasa waakuxa Arka* a wiiraana a Yave yaari vaate wa Obede-Edomi." 
1Chronicles15:26 Eenre Muluku aakhavihera aLeevi yaateexa Arka* a wiiraana a Yave, yaaveleeliwa aximombe athanneeli ni anapunci a ikhondoolo athanneeli." 
1Chronicles15:27 Vano Davide aawara mukaandyo wa eliinyu* wootteettheya, ni hiihotho aLeevi ootheene yaateexa Arka*, anamwiipa nitho Kenaniya, mutokweene a anamwiipa. Davide aangwaratho mooxikotti a esaserdoti a eliinyu*." 
1Chronicles15:28 Vano, aYixrayeli ootheene yaahaahoola Arka* a wiiraana a Yave ehakalanleene, ni oruma wa mapalapatta ni mapalapatta a manyaaka ni ikengere, vamoha ni oruma wa atthakare ni amakita." 
1Chronicles15:29 Arka* a wiiraana a Yave yaavolowaaya musidadeni ya Davide, Mikali mwaana muthiyana a Sawuli, eera oonaka vaxanelani. Hiiho, waaheereya weera woomoona mwene Davide iinaka ni ahakalalaka, aamunyoosa ni murima." 
1Chronicles16:1 Awosa yaahaaruuha Arka* a Muluku, enawiikaathi muheemani aarehererenlaawe Davide, enapaka sooveleela soohisa, ni sa murettele ohoolo wa Yave." 
1Chronicles16:2 Apankeene sooveleela soohisa ni sa murettele, Davide aareeliha muloko mwa Nsina na Yave" 
1Chronicles16:3 ni aamvaha khula mulopwana ni muthiyana muYixrayeli, epaawu emoha, eboolu ya itaamara* ni eboolu ya iwuuva* soowuumihiwa." 
1Chronicles16:4 Davide aahaathanla aLeevi akina akina weera erumeele ohoolo wa Arka* a Yave, evekelaka, etthapelaka ni emvuwihaka Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli." 
1Chronicles16:5 Eriyari ya yaawosa, Asafi aari mutokweene, woottharelana aari ti Zakariya, ni vahoolowaya Yeyeli, Xemiramote, Yehiyeli, Matatiya, Eliyabe, Benaya, Obede-Edomi ni Yeyeli. Awosa, waatthuneya owiipa atthakare ni makita, Asafi iipaka ikengere." 
1Chronicles16:6 Asaserdoti* Benaya ni Yahaziyeli waatthuneya wiipa mapalapatta ehuhu yootheene ohoolo wa Arka* a wiiraana a Muluku. 
1Chronicles16:7 Naari nihuku nenenenne na emaara yoopacera Davide aamvanghaawe Asafi ni amusaawe ecipo yootthapela ela weera emvuwihaseke Yave: 
1Chronicles16:8 Muntthapele Yave, mukhuwelele Nsinanawe, mulaleiye eriyari ya miloko yeeyo Owo opankaawe." 
1Chronicles16:9 Mmwiipele Yoowo, mumvuwihe; muthalihe mitekosawe sootikhiniha sootheene." 
1Chronicles16:10 Mvuwihe Nsinanawe Nootteela; ohakalale murima wa yaawo ammwaasa Yave. 
1Chronicles16:11 Mungwehe Yave ni ikurusawe, mwaasaase ekhovaawe imaara sootheene." 
1Chronicles16:12 Muupuwelele sootikhiniha Owo opankaawe mmiiriiranimwawe ni wa soolamulela ohimmaawe," 
1Chronicles16:13 ii! Ekhapira ya Yixrayeli, murumeiyaawe, ii! Anamwane asilopwana a Yakobe, oothanliwaawe." 
1Chronicles16:14 Owo ti Yave, Mulukwaahu; soolamulasawe sinooneya mulaponi yootheene." 
1Chronicles16:15 Mahuku ootheene onuupuwelela wiiraanawawe, sa masu olamulenlaawe ikhapira ikhapirasene," 
1Chronicles16:16 sa wiiraana opankaawe ni Abrahaamu, sa nlipelo ompakenlaawe Isaaki." 
1Chronicles16:17 Aamuroromelinghe yoowo Yakobe ntoko ekano, ni wa Yixrayeli ntoko wiiraana woohimala, eeraka:" 
1Chronicles16:18 “Wa nyuwo kinimoovahani elapo ya oKanaani ntoko yoohiyeriwa muneeraanyu mukuxe.” 
1Chronicles16:19 Awosa nlelo ereene vakhaani, aani ehaattaxiyeru, ereenemo anamarwa," 
1Chronicles16:20 yaaxoraxora elapo ni elapo, ni imwene ni imwene." 
1Chronicles16:21 Owo khaatthunihenre weera ekhale oowaahasula; ohaahiiha mamwene mwaha wa yaawosa, aalamulelaka:" 
1Chronicles16:22 “Muhaatave oottikittheliwaaka; muhaapakele yoonanara maprofeetaaka.” 
1Chronicles16:23 Khula oxekuwa mmwiipele Yave! Khula nihuku mulaleiye ovuluxawawe! 
1Chronicles16:24 Mulaleiye ovuwawawe eriyari ya ilapo, soopakasawe sootikhiniha eriyari ya miloko sootheene!" 
1Chronicles16:25 Vano Yave ti Mutokweene ni oophwanelaxa ovuwihiwa; Owo oovaxiweke opwaha miluku sootheene. 
1Chronicles16:26 Miluku sootheene sa miloko ti soowootha, vaheera Yave oopaka irimu." 
1Chronicles16:27 Waara ni ovuwa ori ohoolowawe; ikuru ni ohakalala onsareya woomakawawe. 
1Chronicles16:28 Ii! Miloko sootheene sa mulaponi, simvuwihe Yave, ni silaleiye ovuwawawe ni ikurusawe." 
1Chronicles16:29 Muttittimihe Nsina na Yave moota nimphwanelaaya. Muruuhe sooveleela ni murwe vamaithoniwawe. Munlape Yave ngwaarani wa otteelawawe. 
1Chronicles16:30 Sithukumele ohoolowawe miloko sootheene! Elapo ya vathi yootekiheyaxa, ni eyo kheenttikinyeyaru!" 
1Chronicles16:31 Irimu sihakalale ni etthaya etthape, ni eriyari ya miloko yeeriwe: “Onlamula ti Yave!”" 
1Chronicles16:32 Erume ephareiya ni sootheene sirimo; nitthape ntuphi ni sootheene sirimo! 
1Chronicles16:33 Vano nyiri sa moothakoni sinimwiipa ni ohakalala, sinimwiipa ohoolo wa Yave, niwoko Owo ongwa othoriha elapo." 
1Chronicles16:34 Muntthapele Yave, niwoko Owo ti ooreera; osivelawawe khoommala." 
1Chronicles16:35 Mukhuwele: “Munivuluxe, ii! Muluku, Mvuluxaahu! Munithukumanyihe ni munitapuxe mwa miloko weera nitthapele Nsinananyu Nootteela ni ottottopeleyawanyu okhale ovuwawahu.”" 
1Chronicles16:36 Attottopeliwe Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, ohimmalaru. Vano muloko wootheene waakhuwela: “Ame! Attottopeliwe Yave!”" 
1Chronicles16:37 Davide aamuhiya Asafi ni emusaawe ohoolo wa Arka* a wiiraana a Yave weera erumeelewo woohihiyerera, ettharihaka sootthuneya sa khula nihuku" 
1Chronicles16:38 vamoha ni Obede-Edomi ni miloko mithanamosa ni athannararu akina. Vano Obede-Edomi, mwaana mulopwana a Yedutuni ni Hosa yaari anamalipelela a milako." 
1Chronicles16:39 Davide aamuhiya Zadoki, musaserdoti*, ni asaserdoti* akinaawo ohoolo wa etabernaakulu* ya Yave vanipuroni noolapa na oGibiyoni yaamurumeelaayawo Yave." 
1Chronicles16:40 Weiwo yaapaka sooveleela soohisa valtaarini* a sooveleela soohisa khula oxeexelo ni oxekuwa, ettharihaka sootheene silempwale munlamuloni na Yave, Owo aavanghaawe aYixrayeli." 
1Chronicles16:41 Hemani ni Yedutuni yaari ni yaawo, nitho akina yaaromoliwe masina weera emutthapele Yave, ekhuwelaka: “Osivelawawe khoommala.”" 
1Chronicles16:42 Hemani ni Yedutuni, mutekwaaya waari wiipa wa mapalapatta, ikengere ni ikaruma sikina soomwiipela Yave. Anamwane asilopwana a Yedutuni yaathanliwe okhala anamalipelela a milako." 
1Chronicles16:43 Vahoolowaya muloko wootheene waattimula, khula mutthu arowaka owannyawe, ni Davide aahokoleela owaani weera areelihe emusaawe." 
1Chronicles17:1 Mwene Davide akhalaka empaawe ya emwene, nihuku nimoha aamweerela mprofeeti Natani: “Miyo kinkhala va mpaani ya emwene yoopakiwa ni mwiri wa esidari*, Arka* a wiiraana a Yave ereene muheemani paahi.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Natani aamwaakhula Davide: “Mpake yeeyo munuupuwelaanyu, niwoko Muluku ori ni nyuwo.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Vano ohiyuweene yoole Muluku aahuuluma ni Natani, amweerelaka:" 
1Chronicles17:4 “Mwamuleele murumeiyaaka Davide weera Yave oneera ha: ‘Khamuhiyono nyuwo muneera mukitekele Empa yoomaka Miyo. 
1Chronicles17:5 Nkinakhaleru mpaani okhuma nihuku kaakhumihalaaka aYixrayeli wExipitu, mene kaakhala mmaheemani mmapuroni oohiyanahiyana." 
1Chronicles17:6 Keetteettaakamo ni muloko wa aYixrayeli, nkinamvekeleru akhalaru a yaale kaavanghaaka olamula mulokwaaka weera ekitekele empa yoopakiwa ni mwiri wa esidari*.’" 
1Chronicles17:7 Vano mmweerele murumeiyaaka Davide: ‘Yave a ikuru sootheene, oneera ha: Miyo kohoovenxani moocihamo mukosoopaka muhuwo, weera mukhale oolamula mulokwaaka aYixrayeli." 
1Chronicles17:8 Miyo kaari ni nyuwo moothemwene mweettaanyumo, ni kaahaamalamaliha amwiittanaanyu ootheene. Vano, kinimookhalihani oowiiwanyeyaxa ntoko atthu oottittimiheyaxa a mulaponi." 
1Chronicles17:9 Kinoovaha nipuro mulokwaaka aYixrayeli, ni kinimwaatekihawo, weera ekhaleno etthokwaaya ni ehikacamihiwetho. Khasaahasulatho miloko sootakhala ntoko saapakaaya khalayi," 
1Chronicles17:10 ni saapaka okhuma ehuhu kaathanlenlaaka aphuki mulokwaaka aYixrayeli. Kinimwaaphwatatho amwiittanaaya ootheene. Kinooleelani weera Miyo, Yave, kinimoovahani omwene." 
1Chronicles17:11 Omanleene okumaanyu munathukumanyihiwa ni makholowaanyu, kinoomuthanla mmoha a anamwaniinyu asilopwana weera oorandeleni, ni Miyo kinootekiha omwenaawe." 
1Chronicles17:12 Ti yoowo aneera akitekele empa, ni Miyo kinoolipiha ehicaawe ya emwene wa mahuku ootheene." 
1Chronicles17:13 Miyo kinookhala Atithawe, ni owo onookhala mwanaka. Nkirwa kimwaakha osivelawaka, ntoko kimwaakhiyaaka Sawuli." 
1Chronicles17:14 Miyo kinoompaka muhooleli a mulokwaaka ni a omwenaaka wa mahuku ootheene; omweenaawe onookhalihiwa wa mahuku ootheene.’ ” 
1Chronicles17:15 Hiiho, Natani aamuthalihera Davide sootheene Yave aamuleenlaawe ni aamoonihenraawe." 
1Chronicles17:16 Vano mwene Davide aavolowa mutabernaakuluni, anakilaathi ohoolo wa Yave, anavekela: “Ii! Yave Muluku, miyo taani ni emusaaka eheeni, mpaka Nyuwo okiphiiha va?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Ii! Yave Muluku, eyo ereene ntoko yoohookwanani, mohuulumatho sa muhoolo sa emusi ya murumeiyaanyu. Ii! Yave Muluku, munnakipwattha ntoko mutthu oottittimiheyaxa." 
1Chronicles17:18 Davide khanono yoowooleelanitho woomuttittimiha murumeiyaanyu. Nyuwo moomusuwela murumeiyaanyu," 
1Chronicles17:19 ii! Yave. Woomusivela murumeiyaanyu, ni muttharihaka otthunawanyu, moopaka etthu etokotoko ela munasuweliha soororomeliha sitokotoko sootheene iya." 
1Chronicles17:20 Ii! Yave, khawoworu onlikana ni Nyuwo, hata khawoworu muluku mukina woohiyani Nyuwo, ntoko niiwalaahu." 
1Chronicles17:21 Khoowoworu muloko mukina onlikana ni mulokwaanyu aYixrayeli. Mulukwaaya aarowa wiixoopolela muloko eriyari ya miloko sootheene. Aahiipakela epili, apakaka sootikhiniha sitokotoko sootava murima, woowoomola miloko ohoolo wa muloko aatapunxaawe wExipitu." 
1Chronicles17:22 Nyuwo mohaakhaliha aYixrayeli mulokwaanyu wooreera wa mahuku ootheene, ni Nyuwo, Yave, mohiitatuxa Mulukwaaya." 
1Chronicles17:23 Vanonto Yave, yoororomeliha mwaampakenlaanyu murumeiyaanyu ni ekhapiraaweene, ekwanihereye wa mahuku ootheene. Mpake ntoko muroromelinghaanyu," 
1Chronicles17:24 weera sikhalihiwe sootheene, ni weera Nsinananyu nunnuwihiwe wa mahuku ootheene. Vano, atthu eniyeere: ‘Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a aYixrayeli, ti Mulukwaaya aYixrayeli!’ Hiiho, ekhapira ya murumeiyaanyu Davide, enoopwaherera yoolipeene ohoolowanyu." 
1Chronicles17:25 Nyuwo Mulukwaaka, moomoonihera murumeiyaanyu weera munoomukhalihera ekhapira. Tivawo murumeiyaanyu olipihalaawe murima weera oovekeleni." 
1Chronicles17:26 Ii! Yave, Nyuwo ti Muluku! Nyuwo moompakela murumeiyaanyu yoororomeliha yooreera ela." 
1Chronicles17:27 Vano, moonnenenimwanyu mooreeliha emusi ya murumeiyaanyu, weera eyo epwaherere mahuku ootheene okhala vamaithoniwanyu; niwoko Nyuwo Yave mooreeliha yeeyo, ni enookhala yooreeliheya wa mahuku ootheene.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Vahoolowaya, Davide aahaawina aFilisti, anaalamulasa, anakuxa esidade ya oGate ni mittetthesaya mwa olamula wa aFilisti." 
1Chronicles18:2 Davide aahaawinatho aMowabe, enalamulasiwa ni yoowo, emulivaka musoko." 
1Chronicles18:3 Ohiya yeeyo, Davide aangwina Hadadezari, mwene a oZoba, muxerexere wa oHamate, Hadadezeri owo eereraawe okuxa elapo ya mooloko Efratesi." 
1Chronicles18:4 Vano Davide aakuxa ikaaro macira muloko sa mwene owo, soowanela ekhotto, anamweettiha a ikavalu* macira miloko mathannameeli ni anakhotto 20 000. Aakuxatho ikavalu* ncira nimoha sa ikaaro soowanela ekhotto, anakwasa misemba sikina iyo." 
1Chronicles18:5 awArami a oDamasku yaarwiiyaaya omukhavihera Hadadezeri, mwene a oZoba, Davide aawiiva 22 000 a yaawosa." 
1Chronicles18:6 Woottharelana, aakhaliha mapuro oolipelela anakhotto moomweneni mwa awArami a oDamasku, aalamulaka omuliva musoko. Vano, Yave annangwiniha Davide mmapuroni moothemwene aarowaawe." 
1Chronicles18:7 Davide aaruuhatho oYerusaleemu ixikudu* sa eyuuma yoorikaxa saavareliwa muteko ni asitokweene a Hadadezeri. 
1Chronicles18:8 Mwene Davide aakuxa oDeba ni oKuni, isidade saari sa Hadadezeri, ebronze* yincipale, mwa seiyo Salomoni aavarenlaawe muteko woopakela Ephareiya ya ebronze*, amarimbu ni ikaruma sikina." 
1Chronicles18:9 Tohu, mwene a oHamate, asuwelaka weera Davide aahaawina anakhotto ootheene a Hadadezeri, mwene a oZoba," 
1Chronicles18:10 aamurumiha mwaniye mulopwana Hadorami wa mwene Davide weera amuulumihe ni amutthapelele owinawawe moowanani ni Hadadezeri, aangwananne Tohu." 
1Chronicles18:11 Mwene Davide aamutteelihera ikaruma iye Yave, mooteene yoole aapankaawe ni eparatha*, ni eyuuma yoorikaxa saakuxiwe mmilokoni iye: wEdomi ni oMowabe, awAmoni, aFilisti, ni awAmaleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Mureyareyani na Maakha Abixayi, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha, aahaaphwata awEdomi 18 000." 
1Chronicles18:13 Vahoolowaya, aakhaliha mapuro oolipelela anakhotto wEdomi ni awEdomi ootheene elamuliwaka ni Davide. Yave annangwiniha Davide mmapuroni moothemwene aarowaawe." 
1Chronicles18:14 Davide aalamula oYixrayeli wootheene, ooniheraka wookoleleya ni ekhaikhai wa mulokwaawe wootheene." 
1Chronicles18:15 Yowabe, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha, aari mutokweene a anakhotto; Yehoxafati, mwaana mulopwana a Ahilude, aari mutokweene a ilivuru sa nyaha." 
1Chronicles18:16 Zadoki, mwaana mulopwana a Ahitube, ni Aimeleki, mwaana mulopwana a Abiyatari, yaari asaserdoti*; Xavexave aari namalepa a mwene;" 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada, aalamula aKereti ni aPeleti; anamwane asilopwana a mwene Davide yaari asitokweene yaamuhoolelaxa." 
1Chronicles19:1 Eviraleene ehuhu ekina, Nahaxi, mwene a awAmoni, aahookhwa, anamurandela mwaniye." 
1Chronicles19:2 Davide aahuupuwela: “Kimoonihere murima wooreera Hanuni, mwaana mulopwana a Nahaxi, niwoko atithawe yaakoonihera murima wooreera.” Hiiho, Davide aahaarumiha anamitthenga weera yampembese Hanumi mwaha wa okhwa wa atithawe. Vaheera anamitthenga a Davide yaaphiyalaaya mulaponi mwa awAmoni weera yampembese Hanuni mwaha wa okhwa wa atithawe," 
1Chronicles19:3 ahooleli a awAmoni yaamweerelasa: “Munuupuwela weera Davide onaattittimiherela atithinyu woowaarumiha anamitthenga weera yoopembeseni? Khaveetthuwo vawo! Davide aaruminghe ntoko anamahottela weera ehottele elapo ni ekuxe.” 
1Chronicles19:4 Vano Hanuni aahaatthukasa anamitthenga a Davide, anaametthasa ireru, anaahula vakhaani mpatta wa soowarasaya mpaka mmakhuttuni, anawoomolasa." 
1Chronicles19:5 Davide iiwakaru yeeyo, aahaarumiha anamitthenga weera yaakumanane, niwoko yaatepaxa oyevihasiwa, anaalamulelasa weera yaaleelase ha: “Mukhalase oYeriko mpaka omelela ireru, vahoolowaya, muhokoleelaseke owaani.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Hanumi ni awAmoni, yoonaka weera yaahiitannyera osoondiwa ni Davide, yaahooliha ikaaro sa ekhotto sa wArami-Naharayimi, wArami-Maaka ni oZoba, ni anamweettiha ikaaro, elivaka ni eparatha* yaalemela ikiilu* 30 000." 
1Chronicles19:7 Yaahooliha ikaaro 32 000 ni anamweettihaaya, yaahiiwananano mwene a oMaaka vamoha ni anakhottwaawe. Owo aahoorwa, anakonela vakhiviru ni oMedeba, ni awAmoni yahiitthanasiwa musidadenimwaya, enattimula erowaka okhottoni." 
1Chronicles19:8 Davide asuwelaka yeeyo, aamulamulela Yowabe weera attimule vamoha ni anakhotto ootheene." 
1Chronicles19:9 awAmoni yaavenyasa, enathataanela owana vamulako wa esidade, ni mamwene yaarwiiye yaathataanenle vanlakalakani." 
1Chronicles19:10 Yowabe oonaka weera sookhala mikuttula miili – mmoha ohoolo ni mukina ottuli –aahaathanla anakhotto akina akina ooreerela a oYixrayeli, anaareherera weera yawane ni awArami." 
1Chronicles19:11 Anakhotto yaahanle akinaawo, aahaakuxa weera elamuliweke ni Abixayi, munneiye Yowabe, anaareherera weera yaawananeke awAmoni." 
1Chronicles19:12 Yowabe aamweerela Abixayi: “awArami yalipaxa okipwaha miyo, murwe mukikhavihere; vaheera awAmoni yalipaxa woopwahani nyuwo, miyo kinimoorwa wookhaviherani." 
1Chronicles19:13 Mulipe ni niwane nnenesene mwa mulokwaahu ni mwa isidade sa Mulukwaahu, ni weera Muluku apake yeeyo eri ya otthunawawe.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Vano Yowabe vamoha ni anakhottwaawe, yaahaawanano awArami mwa yaawo yaamutthangwe." 
1Chronicles19:15 awAmoni yoonaka weera awArami yaamutthawa Yowabe, awosa yaamutthawatho munneiye Abixayi, enavolowasa musidadeni. Vahoolowaya, Yowabe aahokoleela oYerusaleemu." 
1Chronicles19:16 awArami esuwelaka weera yaawiniwa ni aYixrayeli, yaahaarumihasa anamitthenga weera yaaruuhe awArami yaakhala okhopela Efratesi, ni Xopehaki, mutokweene a anakhotto a Hadadezeri, aahoorwa ohoolowayasa." 
1Chronicles19:17 Davide aleeliweene yeeyo, aahaathukumanyiha aYixrayeli ootheene, anamulapuwa Yordanu; aahaarowelasa, anaathata anakhottwaawe weera yaawanane yaaluluwananaka. Vaheera epaceraka ekhotto," 
1Chronicles19:18 awosa yaatthawasa ohoolo wa aYixrayeli, ni Davide aawiiva anamweettihaaya ikaaro sa ekhotto macira miloko mathannameeli, ni 40 000 a anakhottwaaya. Aamwiivatho Xopehaki, aari mutokweene a anakhottwaaya." 
1Chronicles19:19 Anamakhavihera a Hadadezeri yoonakaru weera yaawinasiwa ni aYixrayeli, yaapaka murettele ni Davide, eniixinnyererasa wa yoowo. Hiiho, awArami khayaatthunnetho waakhavihera awAmoni." 
1Chronicles20:1 Ehuhu ya ottuva wa eyaakha yaattharelana, mweehuhuni mamwene anrowaaya okhottoni, Yowabe aahaarowano anakhottwaawe mpaka elapo ya awAmoni, anaphwata. Davide areene nlelo oYerusaleemu, Yowabe aarica oRaba, anawanano, ahiyaka mathalaru." 
1Chronicles20:2 Davide aamurula ecireemba mwene – ecireemba ya eyuuma yoorikaxa yaalemela ikiilu* miloko miraru niithanu, ephwanelihiweeneno maluku oowaaraxa. Ecireemba ele aawarihiwa Davide. Owo aaruuha sooreela sincipale sa musidadeni," 
1Chronicles20:3 ni aahaaruuhatho amakaaya, anaanyesereriha ovara muteko ni esera*, epikareta* ni ipaso. Davide aapaka hiiho ni isidade sootheene sa awAmoni. Vahoolowaya aahokoleela oYerusaleemu vamoha ni anakhottwaawe ootheene." 
1Chronicles20:4 Vahoolo wa yeeyo, yaakhala ekhotto yaawananiwa aFilisti oGezeri. Ehuhuweene yeele, Sibekai muHuxati, aamwiiva Sipai, mmoha a ekhapira ya aRefayimi, ni aFilisti yaawinasiwa." 
1Chronicles20:5 Mukhottoni ekina yaawananiwaaya aFilisti, Elihanani, mwaana mulopwana a aYahiri, aamwiiva Lakhemi, munneiye Goliyati, muGati, mwa yoowo mvitto wa nivakanawe waalikana wunnuwa wa mwiri." 
1Chronicles20:6 Mukhottoni ekinatho yaawaniwa oGate, aakhala mulopwana mmoha oorakama, mwa yoowo aarino ikatha ithannamosa wa khula ntata ni nnaawo; sootheene iyo, saari ikatha miloko miili niixexe. Owotho aari a ekhapira ya Rafa." 
1Chronicles20:7 Owo aaruwanaawe aYixrayeli, Yonatani, mwaana mulopwana a Ximeya, munneiye Davide, aamwiiva." 
1Chronicles20:8 Alasa yaari a ekhapira ya Rafa, oGate, ni yaahiiviwa ni Davide vamoha ni anakhottwaawe." 
1Chronicles21:1 Satana aahaamorela aYixrayeli, anamutannyera Davide ompaka namalepela a muloko." 
1Chronicles21:2 Davide aamweerela Yowabe ni asitokweene akina a anakhotto: “Murowase mwawaalikele aYixrayeli okhuma oBerxeba mpaka oDani ni mukiruuhele mutthenga weera miyo kisuwele waattawaya.” 
1Chronicles21:3 Wa soothesene, Yowabe aamwaakhula: “Yave awaandyeerere anakhottwaawe imaara imaarasene. Ii! Amwene, apwiyaaka, weeraka ootheene awo khaahiyono arumeiyi a pwiiyaaka? Vano, heeni apwiyaaka munghaawelaanyu opaka yeeyo? Munaaruuhelelani nthowa aYixrayeli?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Vaheera masu a mwene yaapwaherera moota wooweera Yowabe aattimula, anaviravira oYixrayeli woothewene, anahokoleela oYerusaleemu." 
1Chronicles21:5 Yowabe aamoonihera Davide mutthenga ni waatta wa anakhotto: oYixrayeli wootheene yaari asilopwana oowera owana 1 100 000 ni 470 000 yaari oYuda. 
1Chronicles21:6 Vaheera Yowabe khaatakansenre ipuumba sa aLeevi ni sa Benyamini, niwoko wa yaale yoolamula ya mwene yaari yoothanyeya." 
1Chronicles21:7 Nlamulo nno khanaakhuleliwetho ni Yave, tivawo yaattaruxiwaaya aYixrayeli." 
1Chronicles21:8 Vano Davide aamweerela Muluku: “Kootthekaxa ni yeeyo kipankaaka. Vano miyo kinoodyoonttelelani weera mulevelele yoottheka ya murumeiyaanyu, niwoko kootepaxa opaka ya ololo.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Yave aamweerela Gadi, namoonihera* a Davide:" 
1Chronicles21:10 “Murowe mwamuleele Davide: ‘Yave oneera ha: Kinoovahani soothanla tthaaru iya. Muthanleke emoha ya seiya, ni Miyo kinimoottaruxelani yeeyo.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Gadi aarowa wa Davide, anamweerela: “Yave oneera ha: ‘Muthanle eriyari ya:" 
1Chronicles21:12 iyaakha tthaaru sa etala, nyeeri miraru mwaatthawatthawaka amwiittanaanyu, mutthareleliwaka ni ekatanaayasa, hoye hoye mahuku mararu a ekatana ya Yave, eyo tiiyo, mahuku mararu a nihooxo vamoha ni ndyelo a Yave ahooxaka mmittettheni sa oYixrayeli.’ Vano, mulakele moota heeni kineeraaka kimwaakhule Yoole okiruminghe.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Davide aamwaakhula: “Othananawaka ti otokotoko! Fataari omorela mmatatani mwa Yave, niwoko ikhararisawe ti sitokotoko, ohikhanle omorela mmatatani mwa atthu.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Hiiho Yave aarumihela nihooxo oYixrayeli, ni yaahookhwa atthu macira miloko mathannameeli a oYixrayeli." 
1Chronicles21:15 Vano Muluku aamurumihenle ndyelo weera aphwate oYerusaleemu. Vaheera ndyelo arowaka opaka yeeyo, Yave aaweha, anakhurunuwa oruuha ehasara, anamweerela namaphwata ndyelo: “Wookwana! Paahi!” Ehuhuweene yeele, ndyelo a Yave aari vanipuroni nimveeriwa* etrigu na Arawuna, muYebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Davide aaweha osulu, anamoona ndyelo a Yave areene eriyari ya erimu ni etthaya, avarenleene ekatana, etheteeliweene oYerusaleemu. Vano Davide ni asitokweene a oYixrayeli, ewarenleene soowiinanelano, yaahuuramihela ekhove vathi." 
1Chronicles21:17 Davide aamweerela Muluku: “Ti miyo kilamulenle waalikeliwa muloko! Ti miyo kitthenke, kinapaka yoonanara. Alasa anlikana ni ikhondoolo paahi. Apankeni? Ii! Yave, Mulukwaaka, nttaruxonanyu nikimorele miyo ni emusaaka, mene nihooxo nna nihikhaletho mwa mulokwaanyu.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Vahoolowaya, ndyelo a Yave aamulamulela Gadi omuleela Davide weera amutekele altaari* Yave vanipuroni nimveeriwa* etrigu na Arawuna, muYebusi." 
1Chronicles21:19 Davide aarowawo, iiwelelaka masu a Gadi uulumalaawe mwa Nsina na Yave." 
1Chronicles21:20 Arawuna eepetthaka etrigu, aarukunuwa, anamoona ndyelo, ni owo ni anamwanaawe axexe yaari ni yoowo, yaahiipithasa." 
1Chronicles21:21 Vahoolowaya, aaphiya Davide, ni Arawuna amoonakaru yoowo, aakhuma mumveeriwa, anuuramihela ekhovaawe vathi." 
1Chronicles21:22 Vano Davide aamvekela: “Mukivahe ettima ya wamveeriwawanyu, weera miyo kimutekele altaari* Yave, weera nimale nihooxo mwa muloko. Mukithumihere ettima ni nlivo noomalela.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Vaheera Arawuna aamweerela Davide: “Moonelemo okhala yawinyu! Amwenaaka ni apwiya, mpakeleno yeeyo munghaawelaanyu. Miyo kinimoovahanitho imombe soopakela sooveleela soohisa, yookokholela weera mpake ikhuuni, ni etrigu wa sooveleela sa irooro. Sootheene iyo, miyo kinimoovahani.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Wa soothesene, mwene Davide aamwaakhula Arawuna: “Hoye! Kinooliva ni nlivo noomalela. Nkinimvaha Yave yeeyo eri yawinyu, hata nkimpaka sooveleela soohisa kihithummaaka.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Vano Davide aamuliva Arawuna ikiilu* ithannapiili sa eyuuma yoorikaxa eerelaka ettima ele. 
1Chronicles21:26 Iwe, Davide aamutekelawo altaari* Yave, anapakawo sooveleela soohisa ni sooveleelela murettele. Davide aamwiitthana Yave, ni Owo aamwaakhula ni mooro waarweela wiirimu omorelaka valtaarini* a sooveleela soohisa." 
1Chronicles21:27 Vano, Yave aamulamulela ndyelo weera aherere ekatana munluwoni." 
1Chronicles21:28 Ehuhuweene yeele, Davide oonaka weera Yave aamwaakhula wamveeriwa wa Arawuna, muYebusi, aapakelawo sooveleela." 
1Chronicles21:29 Ehuhuweene yeele, etabernaakulu* ya Yave, Moisesi aapankaawe munikareni, ni altaari* a sooveleela soohisa, saari vanipuroni noolapa oGibiyoni." 
1Chronicles21:30 Vaheera Davide khaawera omukohererawo Muluku, niwoko oova ekatana ya ndyelo a Yave." 
1Chronicles22:1 Vano Davide aaheera: “Nna ti nipuro wa Empa ya Muluku, Yave, ni na altaari* a sooveleela soohisa wa aYixrayeli.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Davide aalamulela weera ethukumanyihiwe anamarwa yaakhala oYixrayeli, ni eriyari ya yaawosa, aahaathanla atthu anamapwexa maluku weera erehererase maluku ookheriwa ootekela Empa ya Muluku." 
1Chronicles22:3 Owo aavaha eyuuma yincipale yoohanela misomaari ni sooweemelela masele, mpakatho ebronze* opwaha moota yeeraaya eringiwe olemelawaya." 
1Chronicles22:4 Aavahatho iviika sa esidari* soohaalikeleya niwoko aSidoni ni aTiri, yaamuruuhela Davide esidari* yincipalexa." 
1Chronicles22:5 Davide uupuwela ha: Mwanaka mulopwana Salomoni ori mmirawo ohixuttihingwe nnenesene. Vano Empa aneeraawe atekeliwe Yave ontthuneya okhala yootikhiniheyaxa, ya epili etokotoko ni yoowaaraxa vamaithoni wa miloko sootheene. Tivawo kineeraaka kihiye sootheene soorehereriwasene kihinaaye okhwa.”" 
1Chronicles22:6 Davide aalamulela wiitthaniwa mwaniye Salomoni, anamulamulela omutekela Empa Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli," 
1Chronicles22:7 amweerelaka: “Mwanaka, vamurimaniwaka kaatthuna oteka Empa ya Yave, kittittimiherelaka Nsina na Yave, Mulukwaaka." 
1Chronicles22:8 Vaheera Yave aahuuluma ni miyo: ‘Nyuwo moowiiva atthu ancipale ni moowana ikhotto sincipale. Tivawo muneeraanyu muhikitekele Empa yoottittimiherela Nsinanaka, niwoko mooyeeha ephome yincipale mulaponi, ohoolowaka." 
1Chronicles22:9 Vaheera nyuwo munoomuyara mwaana mulopwana anaakhale a murettele, ni Miyo kinoopakiha weera owo akhalane murettele ni amwiitana ootheene a mukhwipimwawe. Anaattehiwe Salomoni, ni Miyo kinoomvaha murettele ni mmaaleleyo oYixrayeli mweehuhuni ya olamulawawe." 
1Chronicles22:10 Ti yoowo anaateke Empa attittimiherelaka Nsinanaka. Miyo kinookhala Atithawe ni owo onookhala mwanaka. Hiiho, Miyo kinoolipiha wa mahuku ootheene ehice ya omwenaawe mwa aYixrayeli.’" 
1Chronicles22:11 Vanonto mwanaka, Muluku akhale ni weyo, ni Owo oowerihe oteka Empa ya Yave, Mulukwaawo, ntoko Owo eenraawe weera weyo onoopaka." 
1Chronicles22:12 Yave ookhalihaka muhooleli a aYixrayeli, Owo oovahe miruku ni wiiwexexa, weera weyo wiiwelele Nlamulo na Yave, Mulukwaawo." 
1Chronicles22:13 Weyo sinooweettela nnenesene wiipasoopa wiiwelela ikano ni malamulo Yave aavanghaawe aYixrayeli mwa Moisesi. Olipe ni ominye murima! Ohoove ni ohiporore! 
1Chronicles22:14 Ngwiilipiheraxani, koorehererela Empa ya Yave, ikiilu* 3 400 sa eyuuma yoorikaxa, ikiilu* 34 000 sa eparatha*, mpakatho sa ebronze* ni eyuuma ehingwereya waalikela, ohiya itthaabwa ni maluku. Ni weyo onoowera waandyeerera waatta wa ikaruma iyo." 
1Chronicles22:15 Weyo wookhalano anamiteko ancipalexa: anamapwexa maluku, mapatarero ni makalipinteiru, mpakatho aneettottho a wakhalaru moota wa muteko," 
1Chronicles22:16 ntoko ni eyuuma yoorikaxa, eparatha*, ebronze* ni eyuuma. Vano opacereke muteko, ni Yave akhale ni weyo.”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Vano Davide aahaalamulela ahooleli ootheene a oYixrayeli weera emukhavihere mwanawe Salomoni. 
1Chronicles22:18 Owo aaweerela: “Vekhaikhai Yave, Mulukwaanyu ori ni nyuwosa ni ohoovahani murettele. Vano Owo oowinnyerera amaki a elapo ela mmatatanimwaka, ni eyo enlamuliwa ni Yave vamoha ni mulokwaawe." 
1Chronicles22:19 Vano, mmwaase Yave, Mulukwaanyu ni murimaanyu wootheene ni okumaanyu wootheene. Mpacereke oteka Nipuro Nootteela* na Yave Muluku, weera nyuwosa ngwere waaruuha Arka* a Yave, ni ikaruma sootteelihiwa siri sa Muluku, wa Mpaani mwa Yave eniitekiwe nittittimihereliwaka Nsina na Yave.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Davide uuluvalanxeene, aamvara omwene wa oYixrayeli mwaniye mulopwana Salomoni." 
1Chronicles23:2 Owo aahaathukumanyihatho ahooleli ootheene a oYixrayeli, mpakatho asaserdoti* ni aLeevi." 
1Chronicles23:3 Yaahaalikeliwa aLeevi yaarino iyaakha miloko miraru woorowa ohoolo ni waattawaya waaphiyera 38 000. 
1Chronicles23:4 Davide aahaathanla 24 000 a yaawosa weera ewehawehe muteko wa Empa ya Yave, nitho macira miloko mithannamosa weera ekhale asitokweene ni aphuki." 
1Chronicles23:5 Vano macira miloko mixexe akina mutekwaaya okhaleke woolipelela milako, ni macira miloko mixexe akinatho emvuwiheke Yave ni ikaruma sa masoma, Davide aapankaawe ciireru." 
1Chronicles23:6 Davide aahaakawanyiha aLeevi, attharihaka mikuttula sa anamwane asilopwana a Leevi: Gerexoni: Kohati ni Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Anamwane asilopwana eeli a Gerexoni: Ladani ni Ximeyi. 
1Chronicles23:8 Anamwane asilopwana a Ladani: A ntthaara, Yehiyeli, woottharelana Zetani ni Yoweli; ootheene awo yaari araru." 
1Chronicles23:9 Anamwane asilopwana a Ximeyi: Xelomoti, Haziyeli ni Harani; ootheene awo yaari araru. Alasa yaari mapwattapwattha a imusi sa Ladani." 
1Chronicles23:10 Anamwane asilopwana a Ximeyi: Yahate, Ziza, Yehuxi ni Beriya. Alasa yaari anamwane asilopwana a Simeyi – ootheene awo, yaari axexe." 
1Chronicles23:11 Mwaana a ntthaara aari Yahate, ni anaaveeli aari Ziza, vaheera Yehuxi ni Beriya khayaarino ikhapira sincipale, tivawo yaalikeliwaaya ntoko a emusi emoha." 
1Chronicles23:12 Anamwane asilopwana a Kohati: Amrami, Izehari, Heberoni ni Uziyeli – ootheene awo yaari axexe." 
1Chronicles23:13 Anamwane asilopwana a Amrami: Aharoni ni Moisesi. Aharoni aamwalamwalihiwa, owo ni ekhapiraaweene wa mahuku ootheene weera aatteelihereke itthu sootteelaxa, ompakela sooveleela Yave, orumeela ohoolowawe ni oreeliha mwa Nsinanawe wa mahuku ootheene." 
1Chronicles23:14 Anamwane asilopwana a Moisesi, mulopwana a Muluku, yaalikeliwe ntoko mpatta wa epuumba ya Leevi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Anamwane asilopwana a Moisesi: Gerexomi ni Eliyezeri. 
1Chronicles23:16 Xubayeli aari pwattapwattha a ekhapira ya Gerexomi. 
1Chronicles23:17 Rehabiya ari pwattapwattha a ekhapira ya Eliyezeri. Eliyezeri khaamuyanreru mwaana, vaheera Rehabiya aakhalano anamwane ancipale." 
1Chronicles23:18 Xelomite aari pwattapwattha a anamwane asilopwana a Izehari. 
1Chronicles23:19 Anamwane asilopwana a Heberoni: Yeriya aari a ntthaara, anaaveeli aari ti Amariya, anaararu Yahaziyeli ni anaaxexe Yekameyami." 
1Chronicles23:20 Anamwane asilopwana a Uziyeli: A ntthaara aari Mika, ni anaaveeli aari Isexiya." 
1Chronicles23:21 Anamwane asilopwana a Merari: Maheli ni Muxi. Anamwane asilopwana a Maheli: Eleyazari ni Kixi. 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleyazari aakhwiiye aahaayanre anamwane asilopwana – aarino asithiyanaru. Axirokoraya a wuutiithini, anamwane asilopwana a Kixi, ti yaathelanse yaawosa." 
1Chronicles23:23 Anamwane asilopwana a Muxi: Maheli, Ederi ni Yeremoti; ootheene awo yaari araru." 
1Chronicles23:24 Iya ikhapira sa Leevi saalikeliwaka mweemusinimwaya, eyo tiiyo mapwattapwattha a imusi yaalepeliwe ettharihiwaka masinaaya ni yaalikeliwe mutthu ti mutthu, a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo, yaarumeela Mpaani mwa Yave." 
1Chronicles23:25 Vano Davide aaheera: Eenre Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, iitthuuwiha mulokwaawe, anarwa omaka oYerusaleemu wa mahuku ootheene," 
1Chronicles23:26 aLeevi khoontthuneyatho oteexa etabernaakulu* hata ikaruma simvareliwamo muteko. 
1Chronicles23:27 aLeevi yaahaalikeliwa, okhuma a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo, sittharihiwaka soolamula sookisera sa Davide." 
1Chronicles23:28 Sootthuneya sa aLeevi, waari okhavihera ikhapira sa Aharoni mmutekoni wa Empa ya Yave: yaawehaweha mapuwa, isaala sa omokoni, mootteelihani wa itthu sootheene sootteeliheriwa ni miteko sikina sa Empa ya Muluku." 
1Chronicles23:29 Yaawehaweha epaawu yootteeliheriwa, ephepa yoopakela sooveleela sa irooro, iboolu soohikhalano eferementu, wooxa epaawu ni weetheya ephepa vamoha ni olemela ni miringo sootheene." 
1Chronicles23:30 Ohiya yeeyo, waatthuneya wiixoonihera khula oxeexelo ni oxekuwa weera etthapele ni emvuwihe Yave," 
1Chronicles23:31 ni imaara sootheene sapakiwaaya sooveleela soohisa wa Yave muSaabaduni, mufestani sa mweeri munyowani ni mufestani soothanliwa. Waatthuneya orumeela imaara sootheene ohoolo wa Yave, ottharihiwaka waatta ni moota yaalepeliwaaya." 
1Chronicles23:32 Hiiho, ti aLeevi yaawehaweha Eheema ya Muthukumano*, Nipuro Nootteela*, ni waakhavihera axunnaya, ekhapira ya Aharoni mwa muteko wa Empa ya Yave." 
1Chronicles24:1 Anamwane asilopwana a Aharoni yaakawanyihiwe moota ola: Anamwanaawe asilopwana yaari Nadabe, Abihu, Eleyazari ni Itamari." 
1Chronicles24:2 Nadabe ni Abihu, ti yaapacenre okhwa ehinaaye atithaya, ni khayaayanreru; tivawo Eleyazeri ni Itamari paahi yaarumeelaaya ntoko asaserdoti*." 
1Chronicles24:3 Davide aahaakawanyiha mikuttula mikuttula, akhaviheriwaka ni Zadoki, a ekhapira ya Eleyazari, ni Ahimeleki, a ekhapira ya Itamari, weera ekwaniherase sootthuneyasaya." 
1Chronicles24:4 Eriyari ya ikhapira sa Eleyazari, yaakhala mapwattapwattha oowaattaxa opwaha eriyari ya ikhapira sa Itamari, tivawo awosa yaakawanyihiwaaya moota ola: Eriyari ya ikhapira sa Eleyazari, yaari mapwattapwattha a imusi muloko naathannamosa, ni ithannatthaaru eriyari ya ikhapira sa Itamari." 
1Chronicles24:5 Awosa yaakawanyihiwe moota woororomeleya ottharihiwaka mooreereliwani, niwoko yaakhala ahooleli erumeelaka vaNipuroni Nootteela*, ni ahooleli akina emurumeelakawo Muluku, ekhalaka a ekhapira ya Eleyazari nitho ya Itamari." 
1Chronicles24:6 Namalepa Xemaiya, mwaana mulopwana a muLeevi Netaneli, aalepa masinaaya vamaithoni wa mwene, ahooleli, musaserdoti* Zadoki ni Ahimeleki, mwaana mulopwana a Abiyatari, ni mapwattapwattha a imusi sa asaserdoti* ni sa aLeevi. Imusi sa Eleyazari ni sa Itamari saareereliwe moota woottharana." 
1Chronicles24:7 Aapacenre oreereliwa aari Yehoyaribe, anaaveeli Yedaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 anaararu Harimi, anaaxexe Seworimi," 
1Chronicles24:9 anaathanu Malekiya, anaathannamosa Miyamini," 
1Chronicles24:10 anaathanneeli Hakozi, anaathannaararu Abiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 anaathannaaxexe Yexuwa, anaamuloko Xekaniya," 
1Chronicles24:12 anaamuloko nimmoha Eliyaxibe, anaamuloko neeli Yakimi," 
1Chronicles24:13 anaamuloko naararu Hupa, anaamuloko naaxexe Yexebeyabi," 
1Chronicles24:14 anaamuloko naathanu Bilega, anaamuloko ni athannamosa Imeri," 
1Chronicles24:15 anaamuloko ni athanneeli Heziri, anaamuloko ni athannaararu Hapizezi," 
1Chronicles24:16 anaamuloko ni athannaaxexe Petahiya, anaamiloko miili Yehezikeli," 
1Chronicles24:17 anaamiloko miili nimmoha Yakini, anaamiloko miili neeli Gamuli," 
1Chronicles24:18 anaamiloko miili naararu Delaiya, ni anaamiloko miili naaxexe Maaziya." 
1Chronicles24:19 Nna nlamulo na orumeelano awosa waatthuneyaaya otthara yaavolowaka Mpaani mwa Yave, ettharihiwaka malepeliwo yaahiiwale ni nikholonaya Aharoni, ntoko Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli aamulamulenlaawe." 
1Chronicles24:20 Mapwattapwattha a aLeevi akina, yaari ti ala: a anamwane asilopwana a Amrami: Xubayeli; a anamwane asilopwana a Xubayeli: Yekhedeya." 
1Chronicles24:21 Wa Reyabiya, Isehiya ti aari pwattapwattha a anamwanaawe." 
1Chronicles24:22 Ikhapira sa Izehari: Xelomote; a anamwane asilopwana a Xelomote: Yahate. 
1Chronicles24:23 A anamwane asilopwana a Heberoni: Yeriya aari a ntthaara, anaaveeli Amariya, anaararu Yahaziyeli ni anaaxexe Yekameyami." 
1Chronicles24:24 A anamwane asilopwana a Uziyeli: Mika; a anamwane asilopwana a Mika: Xamiri. 
1Chronicles24:25 A anamwane asilopwana a Isexiya, munneiye Mika: Zakariya." 
1Chronicles24:26 A anamwane asilopwana a Merari: Maheli ni Muxi. A anamwane asilopwana a Yaaziya: Beno. 
1Chronicles24:27 A anamwane asilopwana a Merari, mwa Yaaziya: Beno, Xohami, Zakuri ni Iberi." 
1Chronicles24:28 A Maheli: Eleyazari, mwa yoowo ahaayannyeru." 
1Chronicles24:29 A Kixi: Yerakmeeli. 
1Chronicles24:30 Vano anamwane asilopwana a Musi: Maheli, Ederi ni Yeremote. Ala yaari aLeevi, sittharihiwaka imusisaya." 
1Chronicles24:31 Awosatho yaampaka mwaathanle vamaithoni wa mwene Davide, Zadoki, Ahimeleki ni mapwattapwattha a imusi sa asaserdoti* ni sa aLeevi, mooteene yoole yaapankaaya axunnaya, a ekhapira ya Aharoni. Imusi sa axunnaya a ntthaara saapakeliwe mooteene yoole saapakeliwaaya imusi sa axunna asikhaani." 
1Chronicles25:1 Davide vamoha ni asitokweene a anakhotto, aahaathanlela anamwanaawe asilopwana akina akina a Asafi, Hemani ni Yedutuni muteko wa othalihera otthuna wa Muluku, moorumani wa amakita, atthakare ni ikengere. Masina a yaawo yaathanleliwe muteko owo, ti ala:" 
1Chronicles25:2 A anamwane asilopwana a Asafi: Zakuri, Yoseefe, Netaniya ni Asarela. Anamwane asilopwana a Asafi yaawehawehiwa ni yoowo, ni owo aathalihera otthuna wa Muluku awehawehiwaka ni mwene." 
1Chronicles25:3 A anamwane asilopwana a Yedutuni: Gedaliya, Zeri, Yexaya, Ximeyi, Haxabiya ni Matitiya, ootheene awo yaari athannamosa, ewehawehiwaka ni atithaya Yedutuni, yaathalihera otthuna wa Muluku ni oruma wa makita, amutthapeleka ni amvuwihaka Yave." 
1Chronicles25:4 A anamwane asilopwana a Hemani: Bukiya, Mataniya, Uziyeli, Xubayeli, Yeremoti, Hananiya, Hanani, Eliyata, Gidalti, Romameti-Ezeri, Yoxebekaxa, Maloti, Hotiri ni Mahaziyoti." 
1Chronicles25:5 Ootheene ala yaari anamwane asilopwana a Hemani, namoonihera* a mwene. Awosa yaayariwe ntoko Yave aaroromelinghaawe weera aamuntatuxa ooweraxa. Vano Muluku aamvaha Hemani anamwane asilopwana muloko naaxexe ni asithiyana muloko naararu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Asilopwana ootheene ala yaawehawehiwa ni asitithaya mmutekoni mwa icipo Mpaani mwa Yave, ni ikengere, atthakare ni amakita erumeelaka Mpaani mwa Muluku. Asafi, Yedutuni ni Hemani yaawehawehiwa ni mwene." 
1Chronicles25:7 Awosa ni emusaaya, oolikaneene ni oowera orumeela mmutekoni woomvuwiha Yave muciponi, yaari 288." 
1Chronicles25:8 Vano yaampaka mwaathanle eriyari ya amiravo ni asitokweene; ahusiha ni oohusera weera yaavahe sootthuneyasaya. 
1Chronicles25:9 Aapacene oreereliwa ti Yoseefe, mwaana mulopwana a Asafi, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni emusaawe – ootheene awo yaari muloko neeli; anaaveeli oreereliwa ti Gedaliya, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni amusaawe – ootheene awo yaari muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:10 anaararu ti Zakuri, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni emusaawe –muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:11 anaaxexe ti Izeri, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni emusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:12 anaathanu Netaniya, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni emusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:13 anaathannamosa ti Bukiya, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni emusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:14 anaathanneeli ti Yesarela, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni emusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:15 anaathannaararu ti Yexaya, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni amusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:16 anaathannaaxexe ti Mataniya, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni amusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:17 anaamuloko ti Ximeyi, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni amusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:18 anaamuloko nimmoha ti Azareli, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni amusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:19 anaamuloko neeli ti Haxabiya, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni emusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:20 anaamuloko naararu ti Xubayeli, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni amusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:21 anaamuloko naaxexe ti Matitiya, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni amusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:22 anaamuloko naathanu ti Yeremoti, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni amusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:23 anaamuloko ni athannamosa ti Hananiya, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni amusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:24 anaamuloko ni athanneeli ti Yoxebekaxa, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni amusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:25 anaamuloko ni athannaararu ti Hanani, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni emusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:26 anaamuloko ni athannaaxexe ti Maloti, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni amusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:27 anaamiloko miili ti Eliyata, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni amusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:28 anaamiloko miili nimmoha ti Hotiri, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni amusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:29 anaamiloko miili neeli ti Gidaliti, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni amusaawe;" 
1Chronicles25:30 anaamiloko miili naararu ti Mahaziyoti, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni amusaawe – muloko neeli;" 
1Chronicles25:31 anaamiloko miili naaxexe ti Romameti-Ezeri, vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni amusaawe – muloko neeli." 
1Chronicles26:1 Mukuttula wa anamalipelela a milako ti ola: a aKorahi: Mexelemiya, mwaana mulopwana a Kore, mmoha a mwaana mulopwana a Asafi." 
1Chronicles26:2 Anamwane asilopwana a Mexelemiya yaari ti ala: A ntthaara, Zakariya, anaaveeli Yediyayeli, anaararu Zebadiya, anaaxexe Yatiniyeli," 
1Chronicles26:3 anaathanu Elami, anaathannamosa Yehohanani, ni aanaathanneeli Elihunai." 
1Chronicles26:4 Anamwane asilopwana a Obede-Edomi: A ntthaara Xemaiya, anaaveeli Yehozobadi, anaararu Yowa, anaaxexe Sakari, anaathanu Netaneli," 
1Chronicles26:5 anaathannamosa Amiyeli, anaathanneeli Isakari, ni anaathannaararu Pehuletayi. Vanonto Muluku aamureelihaxa Obede-Edomi." 
1Chronicles26:6 Mwaniye mulopwana Xemaya aakhalanotho anamwane asilopwana, yaari ahooleli eriyari ya emusi ya atithawe, niwoko awosa yaari asilopwana ooweraxa." 
1Chronicles26:7 Anamwane asilopwana a Semaiya: Oteni, Refayeli, Obede ni Elizabade. Amusaayasa, Elihu ni Semakiya, yaaritho asilopwana oowera." 
1Chronicles26:8 Ootheene ala yaari a ekhapira ya Obede-Edomi; awosa vamoha ni anamwanaaya asilopwana ni amusaaya yaari oowera ni oolikaneene ovara muteko. Ootheene awo yaari miloko mithannamosa neeli a ekhapira ya Obede-Edomi. 
1Chronicles26:9 Meselemiya aarino anamwane asilopwana ni amusi xaxaxa muloko ni athannaararu ni ootheene awo yaari oowera. 
1Chronicles26:10 Anamwane a mMerari Hosa: Ximeri, mwa yoowo aavahiwe otokweene ni atithawe, aaroohikhalaru a ntthaara," 
1Chronicles26:11 anaaveeli Hilikiya, anaararu Tabaliya, ni anaaxexe Zakariya. Anamwane asilopwana ni amusaawe Hosa, ootheene awo yaari muloko naararu." 
1Chronicles26:12 Iya saari mikuttula sa anamalipelela a milako, saattharihaka asitokweenaaya, ni awosa yaarumeela Mpaani mwa Yave, ntoko amusaaya akina." 
1Chronicles26:13 Yaampaka mwaathanle eriyari ya imusi vamoha ni amiravo ni asitokweene, weera ewehaweheke khula mulako." 
1Chronicles26:14 Mulako wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa aareereliwe ti Selemiya. Vano, aathanleleiye ti mwaniye mulopwana Zakariya, namalaka a miruku, ni mulako wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani aathanleleiye yoowo." 
1Chronicles26:15 Mulako wa mpatta wa ohitto aareereliwe ti Obede-Edomi, ni wa moosungamo yaareereliwe ti anamwanaawe asilopwana." 
1Chronicles26:16 Mulako wa mpatta ninkela nsuwa ni wa Xalekete ori musewe wa ottuttuwani, aareereliwe ti Xupimi ni Hosa. Anamalipelela yaakhala muxerexere mukina ni mukhwaawe." 
1Chronicles26:17 Khula nihuku yaakhala aLeevi athannamosa vamulako wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, axexe mpatta wa ottuttuwani, axexe mpatta wa ohitto ni khula emaara yaakhala eeli elipelelaka moosungamo." 
1Chronicles26:18 Vaheera vanipuwani na mpatta ninkela nsuwa, yaakhala axexe munseweni ni eeli vanipuwani." 
1Chronicles26:19 Ti seiya saari mikuttula sa anamalipelela a milako a ikhapira sa Kora ni Merari. 
1Chronicles26:20 Akina a axunnaya aLeevi yaawehaweha waasungiwa muhakhu wa Mpaani mwa Muluku ni saasungiwa soovaha sootteeliheriwa Yave. 
1Chronicles26:21 aGerexoni a ekhapira ya Ladani yaari mapwattapwattha a imusi saari sa muGerexoni Ladani, ti Yehiyeli" 
1Chronicles26:22 ni anamwanaawe asilopwana Zetami ni munneiye Yoweli. Yaawehaweha omuhakhuni wa Empa ya Yave. 
1Chronicles26:23 A awAmerami, awIzehari, aHeberoni ni awUziyeli:" 
1Chronicles26:24 Xubayeli, mmoha a ekhapira ya Gerxomo, mwaana mulopwana a Moisesi, aari mutokweene aawehaweha mwaasungiwa mihakhu." 
1Chronicles26:25 Amusaawe a mpatta wa Eliyezeri: mwaniye mulopwana Rehabiya, tiithi a Yexaya, tiithi a Yorami, tiithi a Zikeri, tiithi a Xelomiti." 
1Chronicles26:26 Xelomiti ni amusaawe yaawehaweha mihakhu sootheene saatteelihiwe ni mwene Davide, mwa mapwattapwattha a imusi yaari asitokweene a anakhotto macira muloko mpakatho a anakhotto ncira, ni mwa ahooleli akina a anakhotto." 
1Chronicles26:27 Awosa yaatteeliha mpatta wa soohuhuliwa saakuxiwe okhottoni sooraselano Empa ya Yave. 
1Chronicles26:28 Vano, soovaha sootheene saatteelihiwe ni namoonihera* Samuweli, Sawuli mwaana mulopwana a Kixi, Abineri, mwaana mulopwana a Neri, Yowabe, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha, ni soovaha sootheene sikina sootteelihiwa saakosoopiwa ni Xelomiti vamoha ni amusaawe." 
1Chronicles26:29 A awIzehari: Kenaniya ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ti yaavahiwa sootthuneya sa mpatta wa omokoni wa Empa ya Yave, evaraka muteko ntoko asitokweene ni aphuki a aYixrayeli." 
1Chronicles26:30 A aHeberoni: Hasabiya ni amusaawe, yaawehaweha muteko wootheene wa Yave ni mwa muteko wa mwene a oYixrayeli, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa oYordanu; ootheene awo, yaari asilopwana oowera 1 700." 
1Chronicles26:31 Yeriya aari pwattapwattha a ekhapira ya aHeberoni, ottharihiwaka munamalepelani a mukhapirani. Vayaakhani yanaamiloko mixexe ya olamula wa Davide, wahaasaasiwa munamalepelani a ekhapira ya aHeberoni, ni eriyaraaya yaaphwanyaneiye asilopwana oowera a oYazeri elapo ya oGileyade." 
1Chronicles26:32 Yeriya aakhalano amusi 2 700, asilopwana oowera ni mapwattapwattha a imusi, mwa yaawo mwene Davide aavahenraawe olamulela ipuumba sa Rubeni, Gadi ni eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe ngwiiwananani itthu sootheene sa Muluku ni sa mwene." 
1Chronicles27:1 Masina anttharelana ti a aYixrayeli ari mapwattapwattha a imusi, asitokweene a anakhotto macira muloko, asitokweene a anakhotto ncira vamoha ni asitokweenaaya yaamurumeela mwene moowehawehani mukuttula wa anakhotto. Khula mukuttula waarino asilopwana 24 000 mwa yaawo yaarumeela mweeri mmoha wa khula eyaakha." 
1Chronicles27:2 Namawehaweha a mukuttula woopacera wa anakhotto 24 000, mwa yoowo aapacenre owehaweha vamweerini woopacera, aari ti Yaxobeyami, mwaana mulopwana a Zabediyeli." 
1Chronicles27:3 Owo aari a ekhapira ya Perezi ni mutokweenexa a asitokweene ootheene a anakhotto wa mweeri woopacera. 
1Chronicles27:4 Namawehaweha a mukuttula wa mweeri wanaaveeli, aari ti Dodayi, ngwAhohi. Aawehaweha mukuttulaawe aari ti Mikelote. Mukuttulaawe waarino asilopwana 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:5 Mutokweene a anakhotto anaararu wa mweeri wanaararu aari ti Benaya, mwaana mulopwana a musaserdoti* Yehoyada. Owo aari mutokweene a mukuttula wa anakhotto 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:6 Benaiya owo aari nakhotto mutokweene a anakhottweene yaale Miloko Miraru. Aawehaweha mukuttulaawe aari ti mwaniye mulopwana Amizabade. 
1Chronicles27:7 Anaaxexe wa mweeri wanaaxexe aari ti Asaheli munneiye Yowabe; mwaniye mulopwana Zebadiya ti aamurandenle. Mukuttulaawe waarino anakhotto 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:8 Anaathanu wa mweeri wanaathanu aari ti ngwIzerahi Xamehute. Mukuttulaawe waarino anakhotto 24 000. 
1Chronicles27:9 Anaathannamosa wa mweeri wanaathannamosa aari ti Ira, mwaana mulopwana a muTekowa Ikexi. Mukuttulaawe waarino anakhotto 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:10 Anaathanneeli wa mweeri wanaathannamiili, aari ti mPeloni Helezi, a ekhapira ya Efrayimi. Mukuttulaawe waarino anakhotto 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:11 Anaathannaararu wa mweeri wanaathannamiraru, aari ti muHuxati Sibekayi, a emusi ya Zera. Mukuttulaawe waarino anakhotto 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:12 Anaathannaaxexe wa mweeri wanaathannaaxexe, aari ti ngwAnatote Abiyezeri, a epuumba ya Benyamini. Mukuttulaawe waarino anakhotto 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:13 Anaamuloko wa mweeri wanaamuloko, aari ti muNetofati Maharayi, a emusi ya Zera. Mukuttulaawe waarino anakhotto 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:14 Anaamuloko nimmoha wa mweeri wanaamuloko nimmoha aari ti mPiratoni Benaya, a ekhapira ya Efrayimi. Mukuttulaawe waarino anakhotto 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:15 Anaamuloko neeli wa mweeri wanaamuloko ni miili, aari ti muNetofati Heldayi, a emusi ya Oteniyeli. Mukuttulaawe waarino anakhotto 24 000." 
1Chronicles27:16 Ahooleli a ipuumba sa aYixrayeli, yaari ti ala: epuumba ya Rubeni: Eliyezeri, mwaana mulopwana a Zikeri; epuumba ya Simeyoni: Xefatiya, mwaana mulopwana a Maaka;" 
1Chronicles27:17 epuumba ya Leevi: Haxabiya, mwaana mulopwana a Kemuweli; epuumba ya Aharoni: Zadoki;" 
1Chronicles27:18 epuumba ya Yuda: Elihu, munneiye Davide; a epuumba ya Isakari: Omeri, mwaana mulopwana a Mikayeli;" 
1Chronicles27:19 epuumba ya Zebuloni: Ixmaya, mwaana mulopwana a Obadiya; epuumba ya Nafitali: Yeremoti, mwaana mulopwana a Azeriyeli;" 
1Chronicles27:20 epuumba ya Efrayimi: Hoxeya, mwaana mulopwana a Azaziya; eriyari ya epuumba ya Manaxe: Yoweli, mwaana mulopwana a Pedaya;" 
1Chronicles27:21 mpatta mukinoowo wa epuumba ya Manaxe, oGileyade: Ido, mwaana mulopwana a Zakariya; epuumba ya Benyamini: Yaasiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Abeneri;" 
1Chronicles27:22 epuumba ya Dani: Azareli, mwaana mulopwana a Yerohami. Ti yaala yaari ahooleli a ipuumba sa oYixrayeli." 
1Chronicles27:23 Davide khaawaalikenle asilopwana oohikwaniha iyaakha miloko miili, niwoko Yave aaroromeliha weera aangwaattiha aYixrayeli ntoko ithenyeeri sa wiirimu." 
1Chronicles27:24 Yowabe, mwaana mulopwana a Zeruha, aapacera owaalikela atthu, mene khaawenre waamaliha. Isara sa Muluku saahaamorela aYixrayeli mwaha wa namalepela ole, tivawo waalikeliwawaya ohitakanseriwaaya munamalepelani a nyaha sa mwene Davide." 
1Chronicles27:25 Azemaveti, mwaana mulopwana a Adiyeli, ti aawehaweha mihakhu sa empa ya emwene. Yonatani, mwaana mulopwana a Uziya, ti aawehaweha moosungamo mwa mwene mmittettheni sitokweene soorakamela, musidadeni, mmilokoni ni mutooreni* sa anamalipelela." 
1Chronicles27:26 Ezeri, mwaana mulopwana a Kelube, ti aawehaweha anamalima a mmamattani mwa yaawo yaalima." 
1Chronicles27:27 Ximeyi, muRamati, ti aawehaweha imatta sa iwuuva*. muXifemi Zabedi, ti aawehaweha eviinyu yaathokororiwa mukhalini." 
1Chronicles27:28 muGederi Bahali-Hanani ti aawehaweha nyiri sa sooliveira* ni sa ifiigu sa ilapo sa vathi vathi wa nyaako. Yowaxi ti aawehaweha mavaheriwo a makhura a sooliveira*. 
1Chronicles27:29 muXaroni Xiterai, ti aawehaweha mihuwo saacihiwa oXaroni. Xafate, mwaana mulopwana a Adelai, ti awehaweha mihuwo mureyareyani." 
1Chronicles27:30 muYixmayeli Obili, ti aawehaweha ikamelu*. mMeronoti Yehedeya, ti aawehaweha abuuru." 
1Chronicles27:31 muHageri Yazizi ti aawehaweha mihuwo. Ootheene awo ti yaawehaweha ittima sa Davide. 
1Chronicles27:32 Yonatani, atatawe Davide, aari namalaka, mulopwana a miruku nitho aari namalepa. Yehiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Hakemoni, aakosoopa anamwane a mwene." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofeli aari namalaka a mwene. ngwArki Husayi aari nthamwene a mwene. 
1Chronicles27:34 Ahitofeli aarandeliwe ni Yehoyada, mwaana mulopwana a Benaya, anarandeliwatho ni Abiyatari. Yowabe aari mutokweene a anakhotto a emwene." 
1Chronicles28:1 Davide aahaathukumanyiha oYerusaleemu asitokweene ootheene a oYixrayeli: Ahooleli a ipuumba, asitokweene a mikuttula sa anakhotto a mwene, asitokweene a anakhotto macira muloko ni asitokweene a anakhotto ncira, ahooleli ootheene yaawehaweha ittima ni mihuwo saari sa mwene ni anamwanaawe asilopwana, vamoha ni asitokweene a empa ya emwene, anakhotto oottittimiheyaxa ni anakhotto ooweraxa ootheene." 
1Chronicles28:2 Mwene Davide aaheemela, aneera: “Mukiwiriyane axunnaka ni mulokwaaka. Kaatthunaxa vamurimaniwaka oteka Empa ya Yave, weera mwemmo kiwiikaathi Arka* a wiiraana a Yave, moonyikaliheramo inaawo sa Mulukwaahu ni kaavaanela weera kiteke." 
1Chronicles28:3 Vaheera Muluku ookeerela: ‘Nyuwo khamukitekela Empa yoottittimiherela Nsinanaka, niwoko nyuwo muri nakhotto ni moowiiva atthu ancipale.’" 
1Chronicles28:4 Vanonto Yave, Muluku a oYixarayeli, ookithanla eriyari ya emusaaka yootheene weera kikhale mwene a oYixrayeli, wa mahuku ootheene. Owo oomuthanla Yuda ntoko muhooleli, ni mpuumbani mwa Yuda, oothanla emusaaka ni eriyari ya anamwane asilopwana a atithaka Owo ootthuna okikhaliha mwene a oYixrayeli wootheene." 
1Chronicles28:5 Hiiho, eriyari ya anamwane ancipale okivanghaawe, oomuthanla Salomoni weera akilaathele ehice ya emwene ya Yave, oYixrayeli.’" 
1Chronicles28:6 Owo ookeerela: ‘Mwaninyu mulopwana Salomoni, ti anaakitekele Empa ni mapuwaaka, niwoko Miyo koomuthanla weera akhale mwanaka, ni Miyo kinookhala atithawe." 
1Chronicles28:7 Owo apwaherera wiiwelela malamulowaaka ni soorumasaka ntoko ompakaawe olelo, kinoolipiha omwenaawe wa mahuku ootheene.’" 
1Chronicles28:8 Tivawo kinooleelaakani vaanaano va ohoolo wa aYixrayeli ootheene ni muthukumano wa Yave, Mulukwaahu: Mwiiwelele soolamula sootheene sa Yave Mulukwaanyu weera mukhale mulaponi ela yooreera ni muhiyere ikhapirasanyu wa mahuku ootheene." 
1Chronicles28:9 Vano weyo mwanaka Salomoni, omusuwele Muluku a atithawo, ni omurumeele ni murima wootheene, ohinyesereriwaka, niwoko Yave ongwehaweha mirima sootheene ni onsuwela wiixera wa soowuupuwela sootheene. Weyo wamwaasaasa, onoomphwanya, vaheera wamuhiya, Owo onimookhootta wa mahuku ootheene." 
1Chronicles28:10 Woone, Yave oothanlenle oteka Empaawe mwa yeeyo eniikhale Nipuro Nootteela*. Olipe ni ovare muteko.”" 
1Chronicles28:11 Vano Davide aamvaha mwaniye mulopwana Salomoni eyoonihero ya moota wooteka nipithela* na Empa ya Yave, ikwaartusaya, moosungamo, ikwaartu sa osulu, isaalasaya, ni nipuro noorehererela wiiwanana ni Yave." 
1Chronicles28:12 Aamvahatho iyoonihero sootheene sa matekelo ootheene, mwa seiyo Munepa waahenlaaya vamurimanivawe, mwaha wa mapuwa a Empa ya Yave, ni isaala sootheene sa mukhwipimwaya, moosungamo moothemwene mwa Empa ya Muluku, ni moosungamo soovaha sootteelihiwa." 
1Chronicles28:13 Aamuxuttihatho makawanyihero mikuttula sa asaserdoti*, sa aLeevi ni mavarelo miteko sootheene Mpaani mwa Yave, ni ikaruma seera sivareliweke muteko." 
1Chronicles28:14 Aakhaliha muringo wa olemela wa eyuuma yoorikaxa wa ikaruma sootheene sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni olemela wa eparatha* wa ikaruma sootheene sa eparatha* seera sivareliweke miteko soohiyanahiyana. 
1Chronicles28:15 Owo aamuleela olemela wa eyuuma yoorikaxa wa khula onyaari ni nyettosaya, ni olemela wa eparatha* wa khula onyaari ni nyettosaya;" 
1Chronicles28:16 olemela wa eyuuma yoorikaxa wa khula meesa a ipaawu sootteeliheriwa, olemela wa eparatha* wa meesa a eparatha*," 
1Chronicles28:17 olemela wa eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera wa igarfu, ibasiya soomiserano ni wa ikoomixi*, olemela wa eyuuma yoorikaxa wa khula nipoottoro* na eyuuma yoorikaxa, olemela wa eparatha* wa khula nipoottoro na eparatha*," 
1Chronicles28:18 ni olemela wa eyuuma yoorikaxa yaareherereliwe altaari* a erubani*. Aamvahatho eyoonihero ya ekaaro ya akerubini* a eyuuma yoorikaxa ni mapuphaaya ookungeyeene yaakosoopa Arka* a wiiraana a Yave. 
1Chronicles28:19 Davide aamweerela Salomoni: “Sootheene iya kaalepa kihooleliwaka ni Yave, ni Owo ookiweriha weera kiiwexexe sootheene iya.”" 
1Chronicles28:20 Davide aamweerelatho: “Olipe ni ominye murima! Ovare muteko! Ohoove hata ohiporore, niwoko Muluku, Yave Mulukwaaka, ori ni weyo. Owo kharwa oohiya hata oothaama mpaka omala otekiwa wootheene wa Empa ya Yave." 
1Chronicles28:21 Mikuttula sa asaserdoti* ni sa aLeevi soolikana wa miteko sootheene sineera sivariweke Mpaani mwa Muluku, ni weyo onuukhaviheriweke ni asilopwana angweraxa ovara wakhalaru muteko. Ahooleli ni muloko wootheene animwiiwelela soolamulelasawo sootheene.”" 
1Chronicles29:1 Vano mwene Davide aaheerela muthukumano wootheene: “Muluku omuthanlale mwanaka mulopwana Salomoni, vaheera owo ori mmiravo, ni khaxuttihiwe nnenesene. Muteko ori mutokotokoxa, niwoko Empa etokotoko eyo kheetekeliwa atthu, mene wa Yave, Mulukwaahu." 
1Chronicles29:2 Kookhumiha itthu soohiyanahiyana soovarela muteko Empa ya Mulukwaaka: Eyuuma yoorikaxa, eparatha*, ebronze, eyuuma ni itthaabwa, mpakatho onikisi* oovolonghera mmavattani, nitho yaspe*, maluku oohiyanahiyana, moota wootheene wa maluku oowaaraxa ni maramore*." 
1Chronicles29:3 Ohiya seiyo, moosivelani Empa ya Mulukwaaka, vano kinkhumiha sa muhakhwaaka, eyuuma yoorikxa ni eparatha* wa Empa ya Mulukwaaka, ohiya sootheene kikhumihalaaka wa Empa Yootteela ela." 
1Chronicles29:4 Vano, kimvaha itonelada* ncira niithanu sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera ya wOfiri ni itonelada* macira meeli ni miloko mixexe niithanu sa eparatha* yoorehereriwa, yoohuruwelelano ixiri sa Empa ya Yave," 
1Chronicles29:5 yoovarela muteko wa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha*, ni wa muteko wootheene wa aneettottho. Vano, taani ori oolikaneene olelo okhumiha soomvaha Yave?”" 
1Chronicles29:6 Hiiho, mapwattapwattha a imusi, ahooleli a ipuumba sa oYixrayeli, asitokweene a anakhotto macira muloko ni asitokweene a anakhotto ncira, ni asitokweene yaawehaweha muteko wa mwene, yaakhumiha soovaha ni otthunawaya." 
1Chronicles29:7 Wa muteko wa Empa ya Muluku, awosa yaavaha itonelada* ncira ni miloko mithannamiili niithanu sa eyuuma yoorikaxa, makhoobiri macira macireene muloko a eyuuma yoorikaxa, itonelada* macira mararu niithanu sa eparatha*, itonelada* macira mathannamosa ni miloko miraru sa ebronze* ni itonelada* 3 400 sa eyuuma." 
1Chronicles29:8 Vano, yoowo aarino maluku oowaaraxa aavaha onsungiwa mihakhu sa Empa ya Yave, mwa mwemmo namawehaweha aari ti muGerexoni Yehiyeli." 
1Chronicles29:9 Muloko waahakalalela mapakelo a ahoolelaaya, niwoko yaamvaha Yave iyo ni otthunawaya, ni murima wootheene. Vano mwene Davide aahakalalaxatho." 
1Chronicles29:10 Davide aamvuwiha Yave vamaithoni wa muthukumano wootheene, eeraka: “Attottopeliwe Yave wa mahuku ootheene, Muluku a tithiihu Yixrayeli." 
1Chronicles29:11 Ii! Yave, otokweene, owera, ovuwa, ottittimiheyaxa ni waara ti wawinyu, niwoko sootheene siri wiirimu ni vathi ti sawinyu. Ii! Yave, omwene ti wawinyu. Nyuwo moopwahaxa itthu sootheene." 
1Chronicles29:12 Mihakhu ni nttittimiho sinrweela wa Nyuwo; Nyuwo munlamula itthu sootheene. Ikuru ni owera siri mmatatanimwanyu weera ngwunnuwihe ni mwaavahe ikuru ootheene. 
1Chronicles29:13 Vano Mulukwaahu, nnoottottopelani ni nimvuwiha Nsinananyu noovuwaxa." 
1Chronicles29:14 Vaheera miyo taani, ni ti eheeni mulokwaaka mpaka niwenraahu ocaangaxa ntoko nipankaahu? Sootheene sinrweela wa Nyuwo, hiyo noovangheni paahi yeeyo enrweela mmatatanimwanyu." 
1Chronicles29:15 Ohoolowanyu nri ntoko anamarwa ni ookuxiwa elapo ekina, ntoko yeereyaaya ni makholowaahu. Mulaponimu mahukwaahu anlikana ni munttuusi, woohikhalano oweherera." 
1Chronicles29:16 Ii! Yave, Mulukwaahu, muhakhu wootheene ola nimvahaahu weera niteke Empa ya Yave, nittittimiherelaka Nsinananyu Nootteela, onrweela mmatatanimwanyu ni wootheene ola ti wawinyu." 
1Chronicles29:17 Ii! Mulukwaaka, koosuwela weera mumphima murima ni weera munghakalalela ekhaikhai. Sootheene kivanghaaka kipanke ni otthuna ni okwanela wa murima. Vano kohoona ni ohakalala moota weenraaya macaangero ni otthunawaya mulolokwaanyu ola ori va." 
1Chronicles29:18 Ii! Yave, Muluku a makholowaahu, Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yixrayeli, mpwahererihe mahuku ootheene ohaawela wu vamurimani wa mulokwaanyu, ni mpwahererihetho murimaaya woororomelani Nyuwo." 
1Chronicles29:19 Mumvahe mwanaka mulopwana Salomoni murima wookwanela weera iiwelele malamulowaanyu, mahusihowaanyu ni ikanosanyu, weera ateke Empa ya Yave ela, mwa yeeyo kirehererenlaaka seiyo sintthuneya.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Vano Davide aaheerela muthukumano wootheene: “Mumvuwihe Yave, Mulukwaanyu.” Hiiho, ootheene ale yaamvuwiha Yave, Muluku a makholowaaya, yuuramelaka ni ekokhorelaka ohoolo wa Yave ni wa mwene." 
1Chronicles29:21 Waaxiiye, yaampakela sooveleela Yave, mpakatho sooveleela soohisa: Aximombe macira muloko, anapunci a ikhondoolo macira muloko ni iputtiputthi macira muloko, vamoha ni sooveleela soowura, ni sooveleela sikina sincipale, yeereliwaka aYixrayeli ootheene." 
1Chronicles29:22 Nihuku nne yaahooca enawura ni ohakalalaxa vamaithoni wa Yave. Hiiho yaamvaratho omwene Salomoni, mwaana mulopwana a Davide, emuttikitthelaka ohoolo wa Yave ntoko oolamula sootheene, ni Zadoki ntoko musaseroti." 
1Chronicles29:23 Ola ti moota Salomoni aakilaathenlaawe ehice ya emwene ya Yave, aarandelaka atithawe Davide. Owo saamweettela nnene, ni aYixrayeli ootheene yannamwiiwelela." 
1Chronicles29:24 Ahooleli ootheene ni anakhotto oottittimiheyaxa, mpakatho anamwane asilopwana a mwene Davide, yaaroromeliha okhalela mpatta wa mwene Salomoni." 
1Chronicles29:25 Yave aamunnuwiha Salomoni vamaithoni wa aYixrayeli ootheene, anamukhaliha oottittimiheyaxa moolamulanimwawe ahilikanakaru ni akhalaru mwene aari oYixrayeli." 
1Chronicles29:26 Davide, mwaana mulopwana a Yixai aalamula oYixrayeli wootheene." 
1Chronicles29:27 Aalamunle iyaakha miloko mixexe oYixrayeli: Iyaakha ithannapiili oHeberoni, ni iyaakha miloko miraru ni tthaaru oYerusaleemu." 
1Chronicles29:28 Okhwiiye ni wuuluvala wooreera, apuhaka okumi mwincipale, muhakhu ni nttittmiho. Mwaniye mulopwana Salomoni ti aamurandenle." 
1Chronicles29:29 Soopaka sa mwene Davide, okhuma ompacereroni mpaka ommaleloni wa olamulawawe, silempwale mulivuruni sa nyaha sa namoonihera* Samuweli, mprofeeti Natani ni sa namoonihera* Gadi." 
1Chronicles29:30 Iyo sitakanseriwe itthu sinuuluma sa olamulawawe ni sa owerawawe, ni sookhumelela singhima sa yoowo, aYixrayeli ni imwene sa ilapo sootheene sikina." 
2Chronicles1:1 Salomoni, mwaana mulopwana a Davide, aahiitekiha moota woolipa moomwenenimwawe, niwoko Yave, Mulukwaawe, aari ni yoowo anamutatuxa ooweraxa." 
2Chronicles1:2 Vano Salomoni aahuuluma ni aYixrayeli ootheene – ni ahooleli a anakhotto macira muloko ni a ncira, aphuki, ahooleli ootheene a oYixrayeli ni asitokweene a imusi." 
2Chronicles1:3 Vahoolowaya, mwene vamoha ni muthukumano wootheene, aarowa vaNipuroni Nootteela* na oGibiyoni, niwoko Eheema ya Muthukumano* yaari weiwe, yeele aapankaawe Moisesi murumeiyi aYave munikareni." 
2Chronicles1:4 Vano Davide aahaateexa Arka* a Muluku okhuma oKiriyate-Yeharimi mpaka eheema owo aakungenlaawe oYerusaleemu. 
2Chronicles1:5 Vaheera altaari* a ebronze* mwa yaawo Bezaleli, mwaana mulopwana a Uri, ni osuulu wa Huri, aapankaawe, yaari oGibiyoni ohoolo wa etabernaakulu* ya Yave. Tivawo Salomoni ni muthukumano wootheene yaamukoherenraayawo Yave." 
2Chronicles1:6 Salomoni aamveleelela Yave sooveleela soohisa macira muloko valtaarini* a ebronze, Muheemani ya Yave." 
2Chronicles1:7 Ohiyuweene yoole, Muluku aahiixoonihera wa Salomoni, anamweerela: “Yakhalaru etthu muneeraanyu mukivekele, Miyo kinimoovahani.”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Salomoni aamwaakhula: “Nyuwo mwaawoonihera onnene atithaka Davide, munakikhaliha namarandelaaya." 
2Chronicles1:9 Vanonto Yave, Muluku, mukwanihere yeeyo mwaaroromelinghaanyu atithaka, niwoko mookikhaliha mwene a muloko woowaattaxa ntoko ntthupi." 
2Chronicles1:10 Mukivahe miruku ni esuwelo, weera miyo kiwere ohoolela muloko ola. Vano taani anaawere olamula mulokwaanyu mutokotoko ola?”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Muluku aamweerela Salomoni: “Yeenre ela ekhalaka yoohaawela ya murimaanyu, ni nyuwo muhivekelaka mihakhu, hata sooreela, naari nttittimiho, hoye hoye okhwa wa amwiittanaanyu, hata okumi mwincipale, mene miruku ni esuwelo weera mulamule mulokwaaka, mwa yoowo Miyo kookhalihenraakani mwene," 
2Chronicles1:12 nyuwo munimwaakhela yeeyo mvekenlaanyu. Kinimoovahanitho mihakhu, sooreela ni nttittimiho, ohitonkwaawe okhalano akhalaru mwene aari nyuwo muhinaaye okhalano, ni khakhalatho anaakhalane vahoolo wa nyuwo.”" 
2Chronicles1:13 Vano Salomoni aahokolowa nipuro noolapa na oGibiyoni, oohoolo wa Eheema ya Muthukumano*, anarowa oYerusaleemu, anaalamula aYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles1:14 Salomoni aathukumanyiha ikaaro ni ikavalu*, mpaka aakhalano ikaaro sa ikavalu* 1 400 ni ikavalu* 12 000, mwa seiyo mpatta mukina saalipeleliwa musidadeni sikina sikina, ni mpatta mukina saari vakhiviruwawe oYerusaleemu." 
2Chronicles1:15 Mwene aahaandyeereraxa eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa oYerusaleemu ntoko ereene maluku, ni nyiri sa esidari* saahaattaxa ntoko ifiigu sa nthupini vathi vathi vamwaako." 
2Chronicles1:16 Ikavalu* sa Salomoni saakhumelela wExipitu ni oKuwe, weiwo yaarowaayawo ananakoso a mwene weera ethume." 
2Chronicles1:17 Yaathuma wExipitu ekaaro emoha ni ixekeli* macira mathannamosa sa eparatha* ni ekavalu* emoha yaathuma ni ixekeli* ncira ni miloko mithanu sa eparatha*. Yaahaathumiheratho seiye mamwene ootheene a aHiti ni a awArami. 
2Chronicles2:1 Salomoni aalamulela otekiwa Empa ya Muluku, nittittimihereliwaka Nsina na Yave nitho empa ya emwene." 
2Chronicles2:2 Owo aahaathanla asilopwana 70 000 ntoko anamateexa, 80 000 ntoko anamapwexa a maluku mmattumuxani, ni anamawehaweha a muteko 3 600." 
2Chronicles2:3 Vahoolowaya, Salomoni aamurumihela Hirami, mwene a oTiro, mutthenga ola: “Mukirumihele nyiri sa esidari* ntoko mwaapakenlaanyu atithaka Davide, awo yaatekaaya empaaya ya emwene." 
2Chronicles2:4 Kihanle vakhaani oteka Empa ya Muluku, kittittimiherelaka Nsina na Yave, Mulukwaaka. Kintthuna omutteelihera Yoowo, weera ehiseriwemo erubani* yoowunkhelaxa ohoolowawe, yooniheriwe woohihiyerera epaawu yootteeliheriwa, ni sipakiwe sooveleela soohisa khula oxeexelo ni oxekuwa, muSaabaduni, mfestani sa nyeeri sinyowani ni mfestani soothanliwa sa Yave, Mulukwaahu. Ela ti ekano yoohimala wa aYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles2:5 Empa ya Muluku kineeraaka kiteke, enimunnuwa, niwoko Mulukwaahu ti Mutokweene opwaha miluku sikina sootheene." 
2Chronicles2:6 Vaheera, taani ongwera omutekela Empa, seenre irimu sihiweraka omukotiha, hata irimu soorakamelaxa? Vano, Miyo taani oomutekela Empa, ohikhanle paahi nipuru noohisera sooveleela ohoolowawe." 
2Chronicles2:7 Tivawo, mukirumihele mulopwana ophwanenle ovara muteko ni eyuuma yoorikaxa, eparatha*, ebronze*, eyuuma, ni ekuwo yookankela, yooxeera, yakanka, ni onsuwela opatthapattha, weera avare muteko oYuda ni oYerusaleemu, vamoha ni arattaaka ooweraxa, yaarehereriwe ni atithaka Davide." 
2Chronicles2:8 Mukirumiheletho oLebanoni itthaabwa sa esidari*, epinyeiru* ni yuniperu*, niwoko miyo koosuwela weera arumeiyaanyu ti ooweraxa othikila itthaabwa sa weiwo. Arumeiyaaka eniivareke muteko vamoha ni yaawosa," 
2Chronicles2:9 weera ekivahase itthaabwa sincipale, niwoko ontthuneya weera Empa ya Muluku kineeraaka kiteke, ekhale etokotoko ni yootikhiniheyaxa." 
2Chronicles2:10 Vano miyo kinimwaavaha yooca arumeiyaanyu anakhuuni, itonelade* 3 600 sa etrigu, itonelade* 3 600 sa esevada*, iliitru* 440 000 sa eviinyu ni iliitru* 440 000 sa makhura.”" 
2Chronicles2:11 Hirami, mwene a oTiro, aamwaakhula Salomoni mukarattani: “Yave onnasivela mulokwaawe, tivawo ookhalihalaaweni mwenaaya.”" 
2Chronicles2:12 Owo aahaandyeereratho: “Attottopeliwe Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, opanke erimu ni vathi, niwoko oomvaha mwene Davide mwaana mulopwana a miruku, oowuupuwela nnene ni a iseru, mwa yoowo aneera amutekele Yave Empa ni iitekele empa ya emwene." 
2Chronicles2:13 Kinoorumihelani Hurami-Abi, mulopwana oorattaxa." 
2Chronicles2:14 Amayawe yaari a oDani, ni atithawe a oTiro. Owo ooxuttihiwa ovara muteko ni eyuuma yoorikaxa, eparatha*, ebronze*, maluku ni itthaabwa, ni ekuwo yookankela, yakanka, yooxeera, nliinya nootteettheya ni moota wootheene wa ocaambula. Owo onoowera ovara wakhalaru muteko wa opatthapattha aneeraawe avahiwe. Anaavareke muteko vamoha ni aneettotthwaanyu ni a apwiyaaka, Davide, atithinyu." 
2Chronicles2:15 Vano apwiyaaka, mwaarumihele arumeiyaanyu etrigu, esevada*, makhura ni eviinyu mwa yeeyo apwiyaaka muroromelinghaanyu," 
2Chronicles2:16 ni ninoothikila itthaabwa sootheene sa oLebanoni, mwa seiyo sintthuneya, nirumihaka sootthukeleliwa siviraka mphareiya siphambaka, wookela oYafa. Mwakuxekewo muronghaka oYerusaleemu.”" 
2Chronicles2:17 Salomoni aampaka namalepela a anamarwa ootheene yaakhala oYixrayeli, ntoko yaapankaaya atithawe; waahooneleleya weera yaari atthu 153 600." 
2Chronicles2:18 Owo aahaathanla 70 000 a yaawo ntoko anamateexa, 80 000 ntoko anamapwexa a maluku mmattumuxani, ni anamawehaweha a muteko 3 600 weera eweheke muloko ovaraka muteko." 
2Chronicles3:1 Vano Salomoni aapacera oteka Empa ya Yave, oYerusaleemu, vamwaakoni Moriya, weiwo Yave iixoonihenraawe wa atithawe Davide, vanipuroni nimveeriwa* etrigu na muYebusi Arawuna, vanipuroni naarehereriwe ni Davide." 
2Chronicles3:2 Aapacenre oteka vanihukuni nanaaveeli na mweeri wanaaveeli wa eyaakha yanaaxexe ya olamulawawe. 
2Chronicles3:3 Mathipelo aapakenlaawe Salomoni Empa ya Muluku, yaarino imeetru* miloko miili niithannapiili sa mweerakamelonimwaya, ni imeetru* ithanniixexe sa mweekhuveelonimwaya, ottharihiwaka muringo wa khalayi." 
2Chronicles3:4 Nipithela* na mpatta wa ohoolo wa Empa ya Muluku, waarino imeetru* ithanniixexe mweekhuveelonimwaya onlikana mweekhuveeloni wa Empa ya Muluku yootheene, ni imeetru* ithanniixexe orakamelawaya osulu. Owo aahuruwela mpuwamwaya eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera." 
2Chronicles3:5 Aahuruwelanotho itthaabwa sa epinyeiru* nipuwa ntokweene, ahuruwelakano eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera, anacaambulela icaambulo sa mavare ni sa onyooro." 
2Chronicles3:6 Aaphwaneliha Empa ya Muluku ni maluku oowaaraxa. Eyuuma yoorikaxa yaavareliwa muteko yaari ya oParvayimi. 
2Chronicles3:7 Aahuruwelatho ni eyuuma yoorikaxa iviika, isereemu, ixiri ni masele a Empa ya Muluku, anaapatthela akerubini* muxirini." 
2Chronicles3:8 Aapaka Nipuro Nootteelaxa*, nreeneno imeetru* ithanniixexe sa mweerakamelonimwaya ni imeetru* ithanniixexe sa mweekhuveelonimwaya, elikanaka ni mweekhuveeloni mwa Empa ya Muluku. Mpuwamwaya, aahuruwelano itonelada* miloko miili niimoha sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera." 
2Chronicles3:9 Misomaari sa eyuuma yoorikaxa saalemela igrama* macira mathannamosa. Aahuruwelanotho ni eyuuma yoorikaxa isaala sa osulu. 
2Chronicles3:10 vaNipuroni Nootteela*, aahaapatthela, anaahuruwelelano ni eyuuma yoorikaxa akerubini* eeli." 
2Chronicles3:11 Vano ookungeyeene mapupha ooweeli yaarino imeetru* ithanniixexe. Nipupha nimoha na oopacera naari imeetru* piili ni vakhaani, nitavaka exiri ya Empa ya Muluku, nipuphanawe nikina na imeetru* piili ni vakhaani, nitavaka nipupha na kerubini* mukina." 
2Chronicles3:12 Hiihotho nipupha na kerubini* mukina naari imeetru* piili ni vakhaani, nitavaka exiri ya Empa ya Muluku, nipuphanawe nikina na imeetru* piili ni vakhaani, nitavaka nipupha na kerubini* mukina." 
2Chronicles3:13 Akerubini*, ekungeiyeene, mapuphwaaya yaari imeetru* ithanniixexe. Yaakhala yeemelelo ohoolo wa esaala etokweene." 
2Chronicles3:14 Owo aapaka eluttu ya ekuwo ya kanka, yookankela, yooxeera ni ya nliinya nootteettheya, exoreliweenemo akerubini*." 
2Chronicles3:15 Aahaapaka amarimbu eeli ohoolo wa Empa ya Muluku, ooweeli awo yaarino imeetru* muloko niithannamosa, khula nrimbu nreeneno vasuluwaya muru wa amarimbu wa imeetru* piili ni eriyari ya emeetru*." 
2Chronicles3:16 Aaphwaneliha nyuru iye ni onyooro wootthaviwa. Aapakatho irooma* ncira, aniikaathi moonyooroni." 
2Chronicles3:17 Vahoolowaya, aaweemexa amarimbu ohoolo wa Empa ya Muluku, mmoha mpatta wa ohitto, mukina mpatta wa ottuttuwani. Yoowo aari mpatta wa ohitto, aamutteha Yakini, ni yoowo aari mpatta wa ottuttuwani aamutteha Bowaxi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Salomoni aalamulelatho opakiwa altaari* a ebronze, ereeneno imeetru* ithanniixexe sa mweerakamelonimwaya ni a mweekhuveelonimwaya, ni imeetru* ixexe ni eriyari ya emeetru* sa orakamelawaya osulu." 
2Chronicles4:2 Aahana nttankhi ntokotoko, noorukureera, nireeneno imeetru* ixexe ni eriyari ya emeetru* waanuwawaya ni imeetru* piili ni eriyari ya emeetru* orakamelawaya osulu. Yaatthuneya efiiyu ya imeetru* muloko ni tthaaru ni eriyari ya emeetru* yooringano orukureerawaya." 
2Chronicles4:3 Vathi wa mmakoteloni ni mukhwipimwaya, saakhala icaambulo sa anapunci a imombe – icaambulo muloko wa khula emeetru*. Imombe saahaniwe mmiserani miili sihaneliweene vamohamoharu ni nttankhi."
