2Chronicles4:4 Nttankhi niikaathiwe vasulu wa anapunci a imombe muloko ni piili, araru ewehihiweene mpatta wa ottuttuwani, araru mpatta ninkela nsuwa, araru mpatta wa ohitto ni araru mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Naari vasuluwaya, ni nyetto sa ottuli sa anapunci saawehihiwe eriyari." 
2Chronicles4:5 Mwiittaaya nttanki nne waari wa ikatha ixexe ni owanoniwaya waalikana ni wa ekoomixi – ntoko ethutu yoothapuruwa. Mmo saavolowamo iliitru* 63 000. 
2Chronicles4:6 Aapaka ibasiya muloko, aniikaathi ithanu mpatta wa ohitto ni ithanu mpatta wa ottuttuwani. Mmo, saarapiheliwamo sootheene saavareliwa muteko wa sooveleela soohisa, vaheera nttankhi naari noowiivululela asaserdoti*." 
2Chronicles4:7 Aapakatho onyaari muloko wa eyuuma yoorikaxa, attharihaka moota waatthuneyaaya, aniikaathi Mpaani mwa Muluku, mithanu mpatta wa ohitto ni mithanu mpatta wa ottuttuwani." 
2Chronicles4:8 Aapaka meesa muloko, aniikathi Mpaani mwa Muluku, mathanu mpatta wa ohitto ni mathanu mpatta wa ottuttuwani. Aapakatho ibasiya soovuuvihera ncira sa eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
2Chronicles4:9 Aapakatho nipuwa na asaserdoti*, ni nipuwa ntokweene ni maselaaya, aahuruwelano masele ni ebronze*." 
2Chronicles4:10 Aahiikaathi nttankhi mpatta wa ohitto, vanloothoni na eriyari ya mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa ni mpatta wa ohitto wa Empa ya Muluku." 
2Chronicles4:11 Hurami-Abi aapakatho ixaaru, apoxoro ni ibasiya soovuuvihera. Aamaliha muteko wootheene wa Mpaani mwa Muluku aarummwalaawe ni mwene Salomoni." 
2Chronicles4:12 Amarimbu eeli, nyuru sa amarimbu miili saalikana ni ikoomixi sireene vasulu amarimbu; onyooro miili wootthaviwa saaphwaneliheriwe nyurusene seiye." 
2Chronicles4:13 Iroma macira maxexe wa onyooro miili wootthaveliwa, sireene misera miili sa irooma* wa khula onyooro miili wootthaveliwa saaphwaneliha nyuru;" 
2Chronicles4:14 ikarinyu muloko vamoha ni ibasiyasaya muloko; 
2Chronicles4:15 nttankhi ni anapunci muloko neeli a imombe yaari vathi wa nttankhi; 
2Chronicles4:16 ixaaru, apoxoro, igarfu sa enama ni ikaruma sootheene iye Hurami-Abi aapakenlaawe Empa ya Yave, mwa seiyo aamurummaawe mwene Salomoni, saari sa ebronze* yoohaniwa." 
2Chronicles4:17 Mwene aalamulenle ototoxiwa, munghawalawani wa oYordanu, eriyari ya oSukote ni oZaretani." 
2Chronicles4:18 Salomoni aapanke itthu sincipalexa moota wooweera mpaka ohingwereyaaya waalikela olemela wa ebronze* yaavareliwe muteko. 
2Chronicles4:19 Ohiya seiyo, Salomoni aalamulela opakiwatho ikaruma sootheene iya wa Empa ya Muluku: altaari* a eyuuma yoorikaxa, meesa mwa yaawo saakhalaayawo ipaawu sa Okhala," 
2Chronicles4:20 onyaari wa eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera ni nyettosaya, weera omwaleelele ohoolo wa Nipuro Nootteelaxa* na mpuwa, ntoko waahimmwalaaya," 
2Chronicles4:21 ithutu, onyaari ni soorehererano mutthambo – sootheene sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera." 
2Chronicles4:22 Owo aapakatho soorehererano mutthambo, ibasiya, soovuuvihera, isasaani, ibasiya soohisera erubani* sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera, ni masele a eyuuma yoorikaxa a Empa ya Muluku: ekhalaka masele a esaala ya mpuwaxa, eyo tiiyo Nipuro Nootteelaxa*, mpaka masele a esaala etokweene." 
2Chronicles5:1 Omanleene muteko wootheene aavaraawe Salomoni wa Empa ya Yave, owo aaruuha itthu yaatteelihalaaya atithawe Davide, aniikaathi vamoha ni mihakhu sa Mpaani mwa Muluku: eparatha*, eyuuma yoorikaxa ni ikaruma sootheene." 
2Chronicles5:2 Vano Salomoni, aahaathukumanyiha oYerusaleemu asitokweene a oYixrayeli ni ahooleli ootheene a ipuumba ni mapwattapwattha a imusi sa aYixrayeli, weera yaakuxe oSiyoni, esidade ya Davide, Arka* a wiiraana a Yave." 
2Chronicles5:3 Vano, asilopwana ootheene a oYixrayeli yaathukumana wa mwene, mweehuhuni ya efesta, wamweerini wanaathannamiili." 
2Chronicles5:4 Ephiyakaru asitokweene ootheene a oYixrayeli, aLeevi yaahaakuxa Arka*" 
2Chronicles5:5 vamoha ni Eheema ya Muthukumano* ni ikarumasaya sootteelihiwa sootheene. Sootheene iye yaakuxale asaserdoti* aLeevi. 
2Chronicles5:6 Mwene Salomoni ni muloko wootheene wa oYixrayeli waathukumanne ni yoowo ohoolo wa Arka*, yaaveleela ikhondoolo ni imombe sahaawereyaru waalikela." 
2Chronicles5:7 Asaserdoti* yaahaarongha Arka* a wiiraana a Yave vanipuroniwaya, vaNipuroni Nootteela* na mpuwa wa Empa ya Muluku, vaNipuroni Nootteelaxa*, enawiikaathi waamapupha a akerubini*." 
2Chronicles5:8 Mapupha a akerubini* yaakungeenle vanipuroni na Arka*, yaakuttelelaka Arka* ni ikopo saavareliwa muteko woowaateexerano Arka*." 
2Chronicles5:9 Ikopo iye saari soorakamaxa moota wooweera okhwipiwaya waakhumela omokoni wa Arka* waangwereya wooneya mpatta wa ohoolo wa Nipuro Nootteela*, vaheera opwaha vaavawo khawaawereya; ni iyo siri wuuwu mpaka olelo va." 
2Chronicles5:10 Mwarkani* saarimo paahi itthabwa piili aahenlaawemo Moisesi aaraawe oHorebe, weiwo Yave aapankaawe wiiraana ni aYixrayeli ekhumaleene wExipitu." 
2Chronicles5:11 Asaserdoti*, yaakhuma vaNipuroni Nootteela*. Ootheene awo yaahiitteelihasa, ehipwatthelaka mukuttula yaaraaya." 
2Chronicles5:12 aLeevi ootheene yaari anacipo – Asafi, Hemani, Yedutuni vamoha ni anamwanaaya asilopwana ni amusaaya yaaheemela mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa altaari*, ewanreene ikuwo sootteettheya, yiipaka ikengere, amakita ni atthakare, ehooliwaka ni asaserdoti* ncira ni miloko miili yiipaka mapalapatta." 
2Chronicles5:13 Yaawo yiipa mapalapatta ni anamwiipa a icipo, ereene murima mmoha, yaamvuwiha emutthapelaka Yave. Moorumani wa mapalapatta, ikengere ni ikaruma sikina, yaakhuwelaxa, emvuwihaka Yave ni yaahiipa moota ola: “Owo ti ooreera; osivelawawe khoommala.” Hiiho, nihutte naasareya Mpaani mwa Yave," 
2Chronicles5:14 moota wooweera asaserdoti* khayaawera ovara mitekosaya, niwoko ovuwa wa Yave waasareya Mpaani mwa Muluku." 
2Chronicles6:1 Vano Salomoni aaheera: “Yave aaheera weera onookhala munihutteni nooriipihana! 
2Chronicles6:2 Vekhaikhai kohootekelani Empa yootikhiniheyaxa, nipuro mwa nenno weera mmakemo mahuku ootheene!”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Vahoolowaya, mwene aarukunuwa anareeliha muthukumano wootheene wa aYixrayeli, waari vale yeemelelo." 
2Chronicles6:4 Vano aaheera: “Attottopeliwe Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, mwa Yoowo okwanihenre ni matataawe yeeyo aaroromelinghaawe atithaka Davide ni eyanowaawe, eeraka:" 
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Okhuma nihuku kikhumihalaaka wExipitu mulokwaaka, nkithanlaleru esidade ya ipuumba sa aYixrayeli weera kitekemo Empa ya Muluku wa Nsinanaka, hata khaawo kaamuthanlalaaka weera akhale muhooleli a aYixrayeli, mulokwaaka." 
2Chronicles6:6 Vaheera vano kithanlale oYerusaleemu weera nikhalewo Nsinanaka, kinamuthanla Davide weera aalamule aYixrayeli, mulokwaaka.’" 
2Chronicles6:7 Atithaka Davide yaatthunaxa vamurimaniwaya oteka Empa ya Muluku, ettittimiherelaka Nsina na Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles6:8 Vaheera Yave aaweerela: ‘Nyuwo moopaka nnene woohaawela vamurimaniwanyu ovaanela oteka Empa ya Muluku muttittimiherelaka Nsinanaka. 
2Chronicles6:9 Vanonto, khamuhiyono nyuwo muneera muteke, mene ti mwaninyu mulopwana, muneeraanyu mungyare; ti yoowo aneera ateke Empa ya Muluku attittimiherelaka Nsinanaka.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 Hiiho Yave ookwanihera yoororomelihaawe. Miyo ti namarandela a atithaka Davide, ni vano kookilaathela ehice ya emwene ya oYixrayeli, ntoko aaroromelinghaawe Yave, ni kooteka Empa ya Muluku kittittimiherelaka Nsina na Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles6:11 Kohaahelamo Arka*, mwa mwemmo siraayamo itthaabwa sa wiiraana wa Yave – wiiraana Owo aapankaawe ni aYixrayeli.”" 
2Chronicles6:12 Vahoolowaya, Salomoni aarowa ohoolo wa altaari* a Yave ni wa muthukumano wootheene wa aYixrayeli, anatheteya matata." 
2Chronicles6:13 Owo aalamulela opakiwa yoonyikalela ya ebronze* yaarino imeetru* piili ni vakhaani mweerakamelonimwaya nitho mweekhuveelonimwaya, ni emeetru* emoha ni vakhaani orakamelawaya osulu, eriyari ya nipuwa na omokoni. Mwene aaheemela wa yoonyikalela, ni vahoolowaya aakokhora ohoolo wa muthukumano wootheene wa aYixrayeli, anatheteela matata wiirimu," 
2Chronicles6:14 anavekela: “Ii! Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, khoowoworu muluku onlikana ni Nyuwo, okhuma wiirimu mpaka vathi! Nyuwo munthokorora wiiraanawanyu ni waasivela arumeiyaanyu, mwa yaawo aneetta ni murima wootheene ntoko Nyuwo muntthunaanyu." 
2Chronicles6:15 Mookwanihera mwaamuroromelinghaanyu murumeiyaanyu Davide, atithaka; mwaaroromelinghe ni eyanowaanyu, munakwanihera ni Ntatananyu ntoko onooneyaaya olelo." 
2Chronicles6:16 Vano Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, mukwaniheretho yoororomelihaanyu mwaampakenlaanyu murumeiyaanyu Davide, atithaka, mweeraka: ‘Nyuwo khamurwa muhiya okhalano namarandela aneera akilaathele ehice ya emwene ya oYixrayeli, anamwaniinyu asilopwana yiipasoopa weetta nnenesene, ettharihaka malamulowaaka, ntoko nyuwo mumpakaanyu.’" 
2Chronicles6:17 Vano, ii! Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, ekwanihereye yeeyo mwaamuroromelinghaanyu murumeiyaanyu Davide." 
2Chronicles6:18 Weeraka onoowereya Muluku omaka mulaponi ni atthu? Irimu, aani irimu soorakamelaxa khasinookotihani Nyuwo. Wootepaxa Empa ya Muluku ela kitenkaaka!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Orookhalaru hiiho, mwaakhule nivekelo na murumeiyaanyu ni ovekelelawawe ikharari, ii! Yave, Mulukwaaka. Mwiiwe okhuwela ni nivekelo ompakaawe olelo murumeiyaanyu vamaithoniwanyu." 
2Chronicles6:20 Maithwaanyu ewehexexe othana ni ohiyu Empa ya Muluku ela, nipuro mwa nenno mweenraanyu weera mwaamuhelamo Nsinananyu, weera mwiiwe nivekelo aneeraawe apake murumeiyaanyu akokhorenleene nipuro nna." 
2Chronicles6:21 Mwiiwe wiidyoonttelela wa murumeiyaanyu ni wa aYixrayeli, mulokwaanyu, yaavekelaka yuuramenleene nipuro nna. Mureene woomakawanyu wiirimu, mwiiwe, ni mwiiwaleene, mwaalevelele." 
2Chronicles6:22 Mutthu aamutthekelaka mukhwaawe, onatthuneya opaka yoororomeliha, anarwa olipela ohoolo wa altaaraanyu mpaanimwanyumu," 
2Chronicles6:23 muri wiirimu, mwiiwe ni mpake ekhaikhai. Mwaathorihe arumeiyaanyu; muntthuvelele nanthowa mummoroxelaka mmurumwawe yeeyo emphwanela ni mweettelowaawe. Moonihere ohikhalano nthowa wa oohinthowa, mwaakhulelaka hiiho ohinthowawawe." 
2Chronicles6:24 aYixrayeli mulokwaanyu, yawiniwa ni mwiittana mwaha wa wootthekelani, enookokhorelani yiitthanaka Nsinananyu, evekelaka ni yoodyoonttelelakani Mpaanimu mwa Muluku," 
2Chronicles6:25 muri wiirimu, mwiiwe ni mulevelele yoottheka ya aYixrayeli, mulokwaanyu, ni mwaahokoloxere mulaponi mwaavanghaanyu yaawo ni makholowaaya." 
2Chronicles6:26 Yaawaleyaka erimu, ehinarupa epula niwoko na wootthekelani mulokwaanyu, ni owo wakokhorela nipuro nna, oniitthana Nsinananyu, osusaka wa yootthekaaya, niwoko na ottaruxawanyu," 
2Chronicles6:27 muri wiirimu, mwiiwe ni mulevelele yoottheka ya arumeiyaanyu aYixrayeli, mulokwaanyu. Mwaaxuttihase ephiro ya ekhaikhai ni murumihele epula mulaponimwaya mvanghaanyu mulokwaanyu ntoko yoohiyeriwa." 
2Chronicles6:28 Yaavolaka etala, hoye hoye nihooxo mulaponi, soowaaliwa, suuma niwoko na oviha, naari aphiyaka nasoope hoye hoye axiitthu akina, hoye hoye amwiittana yaaricaka isidadesaya – nakhalaru nihooxo hoye hoye ikwerere –" 
2Chronicles6:29 mwiiwe naapakiwaka nivekelo hoye hoye wiidyoontteleliwa wa ikharari ni akina akina a mulokwaanyu hoye hoye aYixrayeli ootheene, khula mutthu simvoreyaka soothananihasawe ni soovoreya, ni atheteelaka matata Empa ya Muluku ela," 
2Chronicles6:30 muri wiirimu, nipuro mmankaanyu mwiiwe. Mulevelele ni mumpakele khula mutthu yeeyo omphwanelaawe, mweenre musuwela murimaawe. Aani, ti Nyuwo paahi musuwenle murima wa mutthu." 
2Chronicles6:31 Hiiho, awosa anoowoovani ni animweettela otthunawanyu mweehuhuni yootheene eneeraaya ekhale mulaponi mwaavanghaanyu makholowaahu." 
2Chronicles6:32 Vano, wa namarwa ohikhanle muYixrayeli, mulokwaanyu, mene okhumelenle mulaponi yoorakamela niwoko na Nsinananyu ntokotoko, Ntatananyu nooweraxa ni Moonowaanyu woolipaxa – owo aawaaka ovekela nno," 
2Chronicles6:33 muri wiirimu, woomakawanyu, mwiiwe ni mwaakhule yooveka ya namarwa, weera miloko sootheene sa mulaponi sisuwele Nsinananyu ni siwooveeni ntoko ampakaaya aYixrayeli, mulokwaanyu, ni sisuwele weera Empa ya Muluku ela kitenkaaka, enttittimiha Nsinananyu." 
2Chronicles6:34 Mulokwaanyu waarowaka okhottoni waawanano amwiittanaaya, wakhalaru muntthunaanyu waarumihelawo, woovekelakani Nyuwo okokhorelaka esidade muthanlalaanyu ni Empa ya Muluku kitenkaaka kittittimiherelaka Nsinananyu," 
2Chronicles6:35 muri wiirimu, mwiiwe nivekelonaya ni mwaakhavihere, mwaakihaka mulattwaaya." 
2Chronicles6:36 Awosa yootthekelakani, eenre ahikhalaru ohinttheka, munaanyoonyerasiwa ni munawinnyerera wa amwiittanaaya, ni awo yaarongha wootthukiwani elapo ekina yoorakamela hoye hoye yookhuveela," 
2Chronicles6:37 ni awosa yattheka mulaponi ekina mwa yeeyo aronghiwaaya, ni yarukunxa murima, enavekela mulaponi aakuxiwaaya: ‘Noottheka, noopaka yoonanara, nnakhala attiyamaaru," 
2Chronicles6:38 ni wu awosa yookokhorelani ni murimaaya wootheene ni okumaaya wootheene, mulaponi aronghiwaaya wootthukiwani, yavekela ekokhorelaka elapo mwaavanghaanyu makholowaaya, esidade muthanlalaanyu ni Empa ya Muluku kitenkaaka kittittimiherelaka Nsinananyu," 
2Chronicles6:39 vano muri wiirimu nipuro mmankaanyu, mwiiwe mavekelowaaya ni wiidyoonttelelawaya ni mwaakihe mulattwaaya. Mulevelele mulokwaanyu wootthekenleni." 
2Chronicles6:40 Hiiho Mulukwaaka, maithwaanyu yoone ni maaruwaanyu yiiwe mavekelo apakiwe nipuro nna." 
2Chronicles6:41 Vano mweemele ii! Yave, Muluku, ni murwe vanipuroniwanyu na wiitthuuwa, Nyuwo ni Arka* a owerawanyu. Ii! Yave Muluku, asaserdotaanyu ewarele sa ovuluxiwa, ootteelaanyu ehakalalele oreerawanyu murima." 
2Chronicles6:42 Ii! Yave, Muluku, muhimukhootte oottikittheliwaanyu. Muupuwelele omusivelawanyu otokotoko murumeiyaanyu Davide.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Salomoni amalihaleene ovekela, waakhuruwa mooro wiirimu, onahisa sooveleela soohisa ni sooveleela sikina, ni ovuwa wa Yave waasareya Mpaani mwa Muluku." 
2Chronicles7:2 Asaserdoti* khayaawera ovolowa Mpaani mwa Yave, niwoko waasareyamo ovuwa wa Yave." 
2Chronicles7:3 aYixrayeli ootheene yoonnaaya mooro okhuruwaka ni ovuwa wa Yave osareyaka Mpaani mwa Muluku, yaakokhora vathi yuuramihelaka ikhovesaya vatthayani, yaamulapa, enamutthapela Yave, yeeraka: “Owo ti ooreera; osivelawawe khoommala.”" 
2Chronicles7:4 Vano mwene ni aYixrayeli ootheene, yaampakela sooveleela Yave." 
2Chronicles7:5 Mwene Salomoni aapaka sooveleela sa imombe 22 000 ni sa ikhondoolo 120 000. Hiiho, mwene ni muloko wootheene yaatteeliha Empa ya Muluku." 
2Chronicles7:6 Asaserdoti* yaakhala mmapuronimwaya, mpakatho aLeevi, ekuxaleene ikaruma sa icipo sa Yave, yiipaka: “Osivelawawe khoommala.” Icipo saahooleliwe ni ikaruma Davide aapankaawe weera amutthapele Yave. Vano ohoolo wa aLeevi, asaserdoti* akina yiipa mapalapattaaya, muloko wootheene oreene yeemelelo." 
2Chronicles7:7 Salomoni aatteeliha mpatta wa eriyari ya nipuwa naari mpatta wa ohoolo wa Empa ya Yave, ni vale aapakelawo sooveleela soohisa ni makhura a sooveleelela murettele, niwoko altaari* a ebronze* aapankaawe Salomoni khasaakwanawo sooveleelela murettele, sooveleela sa irooro, ni mipatta sa makhura." 
2Chronicles7:8 Mmahukuni mathannameeli Salomoni ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaapaka efesta; aakhala nakupa mutokotoko, atthu yaarweela okhuma oLebo-Hamate mpaka nxaapwa na wExipitu." 
2Chronicles7:9 Vanihukuni nanaathannamararu, yaapaka muthukumano wa efesta, niwoko wa mahuku mathannameeli yaatteeliha altaari*. Vahoolowaya yaapwaherera ni efesta wa mahuku mathannameelitho." 
2Chronicles7:10 Vanihukuni nanaamiloko miili ni mathannamararu na mweeri wanaathanamiili, mwene aalamulela muloko orowa mmawannyaya. Hiiho, ootheene yaarowa ootteeliweene ni murima woohakalala mwa itthu sooreera Yave aampakenlaawe Davide, Salomoni ni aYixrayeli mulokwaawe." 
2Chronicles7:11 Salomoni amalihaleene oteka Empa ya Yave ni empa ya emwene, akwaniheraka nnenesene sootheene aatthunaawe opaka Mpaani mwa Yave, ni empaawe ya emwene," 
2Chronicles7:12 Yave aahiixoonihera wa yoowo moohiyuni, aneera: “Kohiiwa nivekelonanyu, kiniithanlela nipuro nna, ntoko Empa ya Yave ya sooveleelela." 
2Chronicles7:13 Miyo kawala erimu weera ehirupe epula, hoye hoye kamurumiha nasope weera anyaanye elapo, hoye hoye karumihela nihooxo mulokwaaka," 
2Chronicles7:14 vano mulokwaaka oniitthaneliwa Nsinanaka, wiiyeviha, onavekela, onaasaasa ekhovaaka, ni wasusa mphironimwaya moonanara, kiri wiirimu kinimwiiwa, kileveleleke yootthekaaya ni kilamiheke elapwaaya." 
2Chronicles7:15 Okhuma olelo woorowa muhoolo, maithwaaka animoona ni maaruwaaka animwiiwa mavekelo ampakiwa nipuro nna." 
2Chronicles7:16 Koothanla ni kootteeliha Empa ya Muluku ela, weera Nsinanaka nikhalemo mahuku ootheene. Maithwaaka ni murimaaka onookhalamo mahuku ootheene." 
2Chronicles7:17 Wa nyuwo, mweetta ohoolowaka, ntoko yaapankaaya atithinyu Davide, munapaka sootheene kinoolamulelaakani, mwiiwelelaka ikanosaka ni malamulowaaka," 
2Chronicles7:18 kinoolipiha ehicaanyu ya emwene, kittharihaka wiiraana kipankaaka ni atithinyu Davide, Miyo kaaweerenlaaka: ‘Nyuwo khamuhiya okhalano namarandela weera aalamule aYixrayeli.’" 
2Chronicles7:19 Vaheera nyuwo mwasusa, munahiya ikano ni malamulo koovanghaakani, munakokhorela miluku sikina ni munalapa," 
2Chronicles7:20 vano kinimwaavenxa aYixrayeli mulaponimwaka kaavanghaaka ni kinookhootta Empa ela kitteelihenraaka Nsinanaka. Kinoopakiha weera awo ekhalase ootthebwiwa ni ootheiwa eriyari ya miloko sootheene. 
2Chronicles7:21 Ootheene eniivire wa Empa ya Muluku ela vano eri yoophwaneliwa, anootikhiniheya, ekoheke: ‘Yave opakenle heeni etthu siiyeela? wa elapo ela, ni wa Empa ya Muluku ela?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Yoowaakhula eniikhale ela: ‘Aroomuhiya Yave, Muluku a makholowaaya, aakhumihale wExipitu, enavarexexa miluku sikina, elapaka ni ekokhorelaka; Tivawo Owo aaruhenlaawe erisa yootheene ela.’”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Siviraleene iyaakha miloko miili, mweehuhuni Salomoni aapakaawe Empa ya Muluku ni empaawe ya emwene," 
2Chronicles8:2 owo aarasela isidade aavahiwaawe ni Hirami, anaatekihawo aYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles8:3 Vahoolowaya aawanano oHamate-Zoba anawinawo. 
2Chronicles8:4 Aaraselatho oTademori munikareni, ni isidade soothokorora sooca sootheene aatenkaawe oHamate." 
2Chronicles8:5 Aaraselatho oBeti-Horoni wa ottuttuwani ni wa ohitto ntoko isidade saalipihiwe ni ixiri, masele ni anampattika," 
2Chronicles8:6 mpakatho oBaalate ni isidade sootheene soothokorora sooca, ni isidade sootheene saakhalaaya ikaarosawe ni ikavalusawe*. Aateka sootheene aahaawelaawe, oYerusaleemu, oLebanoni ni elapo yootheene aalamulaawe." 
2Chronicles8:7 Ootheene yahaakhanle aYixrayeli – a ekhapira ya aHiti, awAmori, aPerizi, aHivi ni aYebusi," 
2Chronicles8:8 eyo tiiyo yaahalahanle yahiiviwe ni aYixrayeli, vano Salomoni aahaanyesereriha awosa weera aavarihe miteko sooviha, ntoko ampwahereraaya ovara mpaka olelo." 
2Chronicles8:9 Vaheera Salomoni khaamunyesereriharu muYixrayeli mmutekoni wooviha; awosa yaari anakhottwaawe, asitokweene a anakhotto, asitokweene a ikaarosawe ni anamweettiha a ikavalu* sa ekhotto." 
2Chronicles8:10 Yaaritho asitokweenexa a mwene Salomoni – macira meeli ni miloko mithanu yaawehaweha anamiteko. 
2Chronicles8:11 Salomoni aamukuxa mwaana muthiyana a Farawu*, musidade ya Davide, anamurongha empa ya emwene aamutekenlaawe, niwoko aaheera: Amwaaraka khoontthuneya okhala empa ya emwene ya Davide, mwene a oYixrayeli, niwoko mapuro yaavolongwaaya Arka* a Yave, ari ootteela." 
2Chronicles8:12 Valtaarini* a Yave, aatenkaawe ohoolo wa nipithela*, Salomoni aampakela Yave sooveleela soohisa," 
2Chronicles8:13 attharihaka sootthuneya sa sooveleela sa khula nihuku Moisesi aalamulenlaawe mwaha wa iSaabadu, nyeeri sinyowani ni sa ifesta tthaaru sa vayaakhani: Efesta ya ipaawu soohikhalano eferementu, efesta ya isimana ni efesta ya mmikotthani." 
2Chronicles8:14 Aakawanyiha mikuttula sa asaserdoti* wa mitekosaya, ni aLeevi weera ehoolele icipo ni yaakhavihere asaserdoti*, attharihaka ekano ya atithawe, ni seiyo saatthuneya wa khula nihuku. Aahaathanlatho mikuttula mikuttula anamalipelela a milako soohiyanahiyana, attharihaka seiyo aalamulenlaawe Davide, mulopwana a Muluku." 
2Chronicles8:15 Sootheene seiye saalamuleliwe ni mwene wa asaserdoti* ni wa aLeevi, vamoha ni seiye saalamuleliwe wa omuhakhuni, saattharihiwe hiihoweene saalamuleliwaaya." 
2Chronicles8:16 Muteko wootheene Salomoni aalamulenlaawe waavariwa – okhuma nihuku yaapacenraaya mathipelo a Empa ya Yave, mpaka omalawaya. Hiiho, yaamalihiwa Empa ya Yave." 
2Chronicles8:17 Vahoolowaya, Salomoni aarowa wEzeyoni-Geberi ni wElate, muxerexere ephareiya ya wEdomi." 
2Chronicles8:18 Vano Hirami aamurumihela makula matokotoko yaalamuleliwa ni anamweettiihaawe a makula matokotoko, asilopwana yaasuwenle ephareiya. Awosa yaavira mphareiyani vamoha ni asilopwana a Salomoni mpaka wOfiri, ni iwe yaamuruuhelawo mwene Salomoni ikiilu* 15 300 sa eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
2Chronicles9:1 Pwiyamwene a oXeba, asuwelaka epili ya Salomoni, aarowa oYerusaleemu weera amoote murima ni sookoha soorika. Aphiyakaruwo, ahooliweene ni anakhotto ancipale, ni ahaaci ekuxaleene soosivasiva, eyuuma yoorikaxa yincipale, ni maluku oowaaraxa, aarowa wa Salomoni, anamukohakoha sootheene uupuwelaawe." 
2Chronicles9:2 Vano Salomoni aahaakhula sootheene; khayaariworu yaamurikenle ahaawenraawe waakhula. 
2Chronicles9:3 Owo oonaka miruku sa Salomoni, mpakatho empa ya emwene aatenkaawe," 
2Chronicles9:4 yooca aarumeeliwaawe, nipuro na asitokweenaawe, arumeiyaawe ni yaawo yaarumeela woocaani ootheene awo ewarenleene soolikana, ni sooveleela soohisa owo aapakaawe Mpaani mwa Yave, pwiyamwene ole waamuuma owanoni." 
2Chronicles9:5 Vano, pwiyamwene aamweerela mwene: “Sootheene kiiwalaaka mulaponimwaka mwaha wa soopakasanyu ni mirukusanyu yaari ekhaikhai." 
2Chronicles9:6 Vaheera miyo nkaakhulela yeeyo yaahimaaya, mpaka koonnaaka ni maithwaaka. Vekhaikhai, khaakithalihenre naari eriyari ya wunnuwa wa mirukusanyu; nyuwo moopwahaxa yeeyo kiiwalaaka." 
2Chronicles9:7 Oohakalala ti asilopwanaanyu ampwaherera okhala ohoolowanyu ni aniiwa mirukusanyu. 
2Chronicles9:8 Attottopeliwe Yave, Mulukwaanyu, owoonihenreni osivela otokotoko ni ookilaathihaleni vahiceni ya emwenaawe weera mulamule mwa Yave, Mulukwaanyu. Mulukwaanyu onaasivelaxa aYixarayeli ni onghaawela owuurela wa mahuku ootheene. Tivawo Owo ookhalinghaaweni mwene weera mpwahererihe ekhaikhai ni wookoleleya.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Owo aamvaha mwene ikiilu* 4 200 sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni itthu sooreerela sincipale ni maluku oowaaraxa. Khasinooniweru soosivasiva sooreeraxa ntoko pwiyamwene a oXeba aamvanghaawe mwene Salomoni. 
2Chronicles9:10 Anamweettiha a makula matokotoko a Hirami ni a Salomoni yaaruuha eyuuma yoorikaxa ya wOfiri, mpakatho itthaabwa sa nyiri siitthaniwa yuniperu* ni maluku oowaaraxa." 
2Chronicles9:11 Mwene aavarela muteko itthaabwa weera apakele makweelelo Empa ya Yave ni empa ya emwene, mpakatho epakiweno amakita ni atthakare a anamwiipa. Kheenooniweru etthu siiyeele oYuda." 
2Chronicles9:12 Mwene Salomoni aamvaha pwiyamwene a oXeba sootheene aahaawelaawe ni aavekenlaawe; opwaha iye aamuruuhenlaawe. Vano owo ni arumeiyaawe aahokoleela elapwaawe. 
2Chronicles9:13 Olemela wa eyuuma yoorikaxa Salomoni aakhelaawe vayaakhani waari ikiilu* 23 000," 
2Chronicles9:14 ohiya seiyo anamirindi ni ananakoso yaaruuhaaya. Mpakatho mamwene ootheene a wArabiya ni maguvernadori a elapo yaamuruuhela Salomoni eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha*. 
2Chronicles9:15 Mwene Salomoni aapaka ixikudu* sitokotoko macira meeli sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yoohaniwa; khula eyuuma sivareliwaka muteko ikiilu* ithannapiili sa eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
2Chronicles9:16 Aapakatho ixikudu* sikhaani macira mararu sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yoohaniwa, khula eyuuma ikiilu* tthaaru, aniikaathi empa ya emwene ya othako wa oLebanoni." 
2Chronicles9:17 Mwene aalamulela opakiwatho ehice etokotoko ya emwene yoophwanelihiwa ni maino a etthepo, ehuruweliweene eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera." 
2Chronicles9:18 Ehice ele yaarino malipa mathannamosa, ni yoonyikalela elipiheriweeneno eyuuma yoorikaxa. Mmipattani miili sa ehice saakhalamo nyoono, khula moono oreeneno mwatto mmoha mukerekheremwaya." 
2Chronicles9:19 Mmalipani mathannamosa, yaakhalamo amwatto muloko neeli, khula mpatta wa khula nlipa aakhala mwatto mmoha. Khawaariworu omwene waatonko opakiwa etthu siiyeele." 
2Chronicles9:20 Ikoomixi sootheene sa mwene Salomoni saari sa eyuuma yoorikaxa, ni ikarumasene sa empa ya emwene ya othako wa oLebanoni. Khayaariworu etthu ya eparatha*, niwoko eparatha* khayooneleyamo mmahukuni a Salomoni." 
2Chronicles9:21 Mwene aakhalano nakupa a makula matokotoko yeettihiwa ni anamweettiha a makula matokotoko a Hirami. Khula iyaakha tthaaru, makula matokotoko ti yaahokolowaaya ekuxaleene eyuuma yoorikaxa, eparatha*, maino a etthepo, akhole ni ilupa." 
2Chronicles9:22 Mwene Salomoni aari thadyirixa ni namirukuxa waapwaha mamwene ootheene a mulaponi. 
2Chronicles9:23 Mamwene ootheene a mulaponi yannarowa wa Salomoni weera yiiwe miruku aavahiwaawe ni Muluku. 
2Chronicles9:24 Khula eyaakha, ootheene yaarowa wa Salomoni yannaruuha yoovaha: Ikaruma sa eparatha* ni sa eyuuma yoorikaxa, mikaandyo, ikapwitthi ni soosivasiva, ikavalu* ni abuuru." 
2Chronicles9:25 Salomoni aakhalano makhoola macira miloko mixexe a ikavalu* ni ikaaro, mpakatho ikavalu* macira muloko ni piili mwa seiyo aavukulanyenraawe mwaalipeleliwa wa isidade sikina sikina, ni mpatta mukina oYerusaleemu vakhiviruwawe." 
2Chronicles9:26 Owo aalamula mamwene ootheene, okhuma wEfratesi mpaka elapo ya aFilisti ophiyeraka muxerexere mwiinano wa wExipitu." 
2Chronicles9:27 Mwene aahaattiha eparatha* moota wooweera yaasarasara oYerusaleemu ntoko maluku, ni nyiri sa esedari* saahaattaxa ntoko nyiri sa ifiigu sa ntuphini vathi vathi vamwaako wa oYuda." 
2Chronicles9:28 Ikavalu* sa Salomoni saaruuhiwa wExipitu ni ilapo sikina sootheene. 
2Chronicles9:29 Sookhumelela sikina iyo sa olamula wa Salomoni, okhuma ompacereroni mpaka ommaleloni, silempwale mulivuruni sa nyaha sa mprofeeti Natani, moolaleiyani wa muXiloni Ahiya, ni mmooneloni wa namoonihera* Ido mwaha wa Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebate." 
2Chronicles9:30 Salomoni aahaalamula aYixrayeli ootheene iyaakha miloko mixexe oYerusaleemu. 
2Chronicles9:31 Vahoolowaya aahookhwa, anavithiwa vamoha ni makholowaawe, musidadeni ya atithawe Davide. Mwaniye mulopwana Rehobowami, ti aamurandenle." 
2Chronicles10:1 Rehobowami aarowa oXekhemi, niwoko ti weiwo yaathukumannaayawo aYixrayeli ootheene weera emvare omwene." 
2Chronicles10:2 Iiwaawe ihali iye eera areene Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebate, wExipitu, aamutthawaawe mwene Salomoni. Vano aahokolowa wExipitu." 
2Chronicles10:3 Vano yaarumiha omwiitthana. Hiiho, owo ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaarowa okumana ni Rehobowami, eneera:" 
2Chronicles10:4 “Atithinyu yaanilemeliheraxa, vano mvukule muteko woovihaxa ni olemeliheraxiwa wu, vahoolowaya hiyo nnimoorumeelani.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Rehobowami aawaakhula: “Muhokoleele wa miyo eviraleene mahuku mararu.” Hiiho muloko waapwaha. 
2Chronicles10:6 Mwene Rehobowami aahaakoha asitokweene yaamurumeela Salomoni, atithawe, mweehuhuni ya okumaaya: “Miruku heeni munkivahaanyu soowaakhulelano muloko ola?”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Awosa yaahaakhulasa: “Olelo mwapakela yooreera muloko ola, munasiveliha mwaakhulaka moota onreerela, awosa anookhala arumeiyaanyu wa mahuku ootheene.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Wa soothesene, Rehobowami aakhootta miruku aavahiwaawe ni asitokweene a oYixrayeli, anaakoherera amiravo yunnungwe vamoha ni yoowo, ni yaamurumeela." 
2Chronicles10:9 Owo aahaakohasa: “Murino miruku heeni? Moota heeni nneeraahu naakhule muloko ola onkeerela: ‘Mvukule onilemelihera wa atithinyu?’” 
2Chronicles10:10 Amiravo yunnungwe ni yoowo, yaaheera: “Wa muloko owo ongweerelani: ‘Atithinyu yaanilemeliheraxa; muniveruwihele,’ mweerele: ‘Naamphaaka ti oowiittivalaxa opwaha eyuunu ya atithaka." 
2Chronicles10:11 Aani atithaka yaahoolemeliherani; vaheera miyo nkeere otepa woolemeliherani. Atithaka yoottaruxelani ekwamba; mene miyo kinimoottaruxelani awalisi.’” 
2Chronicles10:12 Eviraleene mahuku mararu, Yerobowami ni muloko wootheene yaahokoleela wa Rehobowami, ntoko aalamulenlaawe mwene: “Eviraleene mahuku mararu, muhokoleele wa miyo.”" 
2Chronicles10:13 Vaheera mwene aawaakhula mooxililini, akhoottaka miruku sa asitokweene a oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles10:14 Owo aatthara miruku sa amiravo, eeraka: “Atithaka yaahoolemeliherani; vaheera miyo nkeere otepa woolemeliherani. Atithaka yoottaruxelani ekwamba; mene miyo kinimoottaruxelani awalisi.”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Hiiho, mwene khaakhulenle muloko, niwoko sookhumelela iyo saarweela wa Muluku, weera ekwanihereiye masu aamuulumenlaawe Yave Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebate mwa muXiloni Ahiya." 
2Chronicles10:16 aYixrayeli ootheene yoonaka weera mwene aakhootta owiiwa, yaamwaakhula: “Nrinoni hiyo ni Davide? Nrinoni hiyo ni mwaana a Yixai? Khula mutthu a hiyo ahokoleeleke muheemanimwawe, ni Davide akosoopeke empaawe.” Hiiho aYixrayeli ootheene yaahokoleela owaani." 
2Chronicles10:17 Wa soothesene, aYixrayeli yaakhala musidadeni sa oYuda, Rehobowami aapwaherera okhala mwenaaya." 
2Chronicles10:18 Mwene Rehobowami aamurumiha Adonirami, mutokweene a miteko soonyesererihiwa, vaheera aYixrayeli ootheene yaamvonya maluku mpaka okhwa. Wa soothesene mwene aawera owela ekaarowaawe, anatthawela oYerusaleemu." 
2Chronicles10:19 Hiiho, aYixrayeli khaaniiwanana ni omwene wa Davide mpaka olelo." 
2Chronicles11:1 Rehobowami aphiyaleene oYerusaleemu, aahaathukumanyiha anakhotto 180 000, a epuumba ya Yuda ni Benyamini, weera yaawanane aYixrayeli ni emwaakamelele omwenaawe." 
2Chronicles11:2 Vanonto Yave aahuuluma ni Xemaya, mulopwana a Muluku:" 
2Chronicles11:3 “Munleele Rehobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Salomoni, mwene a oYuda, ni aYixrayeli ootheene a oYuda ni a oBenyamini:" 
2Chronicles11:4 ‘Yave oneera ha: Muhirowe waawanano axunninyu. Muhokoleele owaani ootheene nyuwo, niwoko ti Miyo kipanke yeeyo.’” Hiiho, awosa yaahiiwelela masu a Yave, enahiya orowa ongwanano Yerobowami." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rehobowami aakhala oYerusaleemu, anarasela isidade sikina sikina weera yaakihe oYuda. Isidadesene saari iya:" 
2Chronicles11:6 oBeteleheemu, wEta, oTekowa," 
2Chronicles11:7 oBeti-Zuri, oSoko, wAdulami," 
2Chronicles11:8 oGate, oMarexa, oZife," 
2Chronicles11:9 wAdorayimi, oLakixi, wAzeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 oZora, wAyaloni ni oHeberoni. Isidade iya, saalipihiwe oYuda ni oBenyamini." 
2Chronicles11:11 Owo aalipiha soowaakihasaya, anakumanyiha, anawiikaathimo asitokweene, aavahaka yooca, makhura a sooliveira* ni eviinyu." 
2Chronicles11:12 Aathokororamo ixikudu* ni mavaka mancipale musidadeni sootheene, atatuxaka soolipaxa. Hiiho, oYuda ni oBenyamini, waapwaherera olamuliwa ni yoowo." 
2Chronicles11:13 Asaserdoti* ni aLeevi a ilapo sootheene sa oYixrayeli, yaari a mpattaawe." 
2Chronicles11:14 aLeevi mpaka yaahiya moocihamwaya ni sooreelasaya, enarowasa oYuda ni oYerusaleemu, niwoko Yerobowami, ni anamwanaawe asilopwana yaahaakhootta okhala asaserdoti* a Yave." 
2Chronicles11:15 Owo aahaathanla asaserdotaawe wa mapuro oolapa miluku soowootha, ni miluku yaapankaaya sa ekhalelo ya anapunci a ipuri ni a imombe." 
2Chronicles11:16 Wa ipuumba sootheene sa aYixrayeli – yaale yaari oolikaneene omwaasa Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, yaahaattharasa aLeevi mpaka oYerusaleemu weera empakele sooveleela Yave, Muluku a makholowaaya." 
2Chronicles11:17 Awosa yaalipihera omwene wa oYuda, ni mweehuhuni ya iyaakha tthaaru yaamukhavihera Rehobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Salomoni, yeettelaka iphiro sa Davide ni sa Salomoni mweehuhuni yootheene ele." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehobowami aathelanne ni Mahalate, mwaana muthiyana a Yeremote, mwaana mulopwana a Davide. Amayawe Mahalate, yiitthaniwa Abihayili, mwaana muthiyana a Eliyabi, mwaana mulopwana a Yixai." 
2Chronicles11:19 Owo aamuyarela anamwane asilopwana araru: Yewuxi, Xemariya ni Zahami." 
2Chronicles11:20 Vahoolowaya aathelana ni Maaka, mwaana muthiyana a Abesalomi, mwa yoowo aamuyarannaawe anamwane asilopwana ala: Abiya, Atayi, Ziza ni Xelomiti." 
2Chronicles11:21 Rehobowami annamusivela Maaka, mwaana muthiyana a Abesalomi, ompwaha akhalaru mukina a axaariye ni ikuxosawe. Wa ootheene, aarino axaariye muloko ni athannaararu ni ikuxo miloko mithannamosa, anamwane asilopwana miloko miili ni athannaararu ni anamwane asithiyana miloko mithannamosa." 
2Chronicles11:22 Rehobowami aamuthanla Abiyasi, mwaana mulopwana a Maaka, okhala mutokweene eriyari ya axunneiye, eerelaka omukhaliha mwene." 
2Chronicles11:23 Owo aaheettela miruku, aamwaraxelaka anamwanaawe asilopwana akina mulaponi sa oYuda ni oBenyamini mpaka musidadeni soolipihiwa. Aahaavaha yooca yincipale ni asithiyana ancipale." 
2Chronicles12:1 Rehobowami iitekihaleene ni iilipihenreene ntoko mwene, owo ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaahiya Nlamulo na Yave." 
2Chronicles12:2 Vayaakhani yanaathanu ya olamula wa Rehobowami, Xixake, mwene a wExipitu, aawanano oYerusaleemu niwoko aYixrayeli khayaamuroromenle Yave." 
2Chronicles12:3 Akuxaleene ikaaro sa ekhotto 1 200, anamweettiha a ikavalu* 60 000 ni anakhotto oohaalikeleya a aLibiya, aSukiti ni awEtiyopiya yaarweela wExipitu vamoha ni yoowo," 
2Chronicles12:4 aawina isidade soolipihiwa sa oYuda, anaphiya mpaka oYerusaleemu." 
2Chronicles12:5 Vano, mprofeeti Xemaya, aahiixoonihera wa Rehobowami ni wa ahooleli a oYuda yaathukumanne oYerusaleemu, emoovaka Xixake, anaweerelasa: “Yave oneera ha: ‘Nyuwosa mookihiya; tivawo Miyo kinoohiyaakani, kiwinnyererakani wa Xixake.’”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Ahooleli a oYixrayeli ni mwene yaahiiyevihasa eneera: “Yave ti oororomeleya.” 
2Chronicles12:7 Yave oonaka weera awosa ahiiyevihasa, aamweerela Xemaya: “Yeenre awosa yiiyevihasa, nkaaphwatasa, mene kinimwaatapuxa woowaakuveya. Isarasaka khasiyeehereya oYerusaleemu mwa Xixake." 
2Chronicles12:8 Wa soothesene, awosa eniilamuliweke ni yoowo weera exuttere ohiyanawaya eriyari ya okirumeela Miyo ni waarumeela mamwene a ilapo sikina.”" 
2Chronicles12:9 Xixake mwene a wExipitu, aawananaawe oYerusaleemu, aakuxa mihakhu sootheene sa Mpaani mwa Yave ni sa empa ya emwene, vamoha ni ixikudu* sa eyuuma yoorikaxa aapankaawe Salomoni." 
2Chronicles12:10 Tivawo mwene Rehobowami aalamulenlaawe opakiwa ixikudu* sa ebronze* weera alivanyihe, anawinnyerera asitokweene a anamalipelela a empa ya emwene." 
2Chronicles12:11 Imaara sootheene mwene aarowaawe Mpaani mwa Muluku, anamalipelela yannamuhoola ekuxaleene ixikudu*, ni vahoolowaya yaahokoloxera vasaala ya anamalipelela." 
2Chronicles12:12 Eenre Rehobowami iiyeviha, isara sa Yave saasusa wa yoowo ni owo khaaphwatiwe woomalela. Vekhaikhai oYuda nlelo yaakhala etthu yooreera." 
2Chronicles12:13 Mwene Rehobowami aahiilipihera moolamulani oYerusaleemu, anapwaherera olamula. Aapaceraawe olamula, aarino iyaakha miloko mixexe niimoha sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha muloko niithannapiili, esidade aathanlalaawe Yave eriyari ya ipuumba sa oYixrayeli weera akhalihemo Nsinanawe. Amayawe yaari ngwAmoni, yiitthaniwa Naama." 
2Chronicles12:14 Owo aapaka yoonanara, niwoko murimaawe khawaamvarexexa Yave." 
2Chronicles12:15 Sookhumelela sikina iyo sa olamula wa Rehobowami, okhuma ompacereroni mpaka ommaleloni, silempwale mulivuruni sa nyaha sa mprofeeti Xemaya, ni namoonihera* Ido onreherera ilivuru sa ikhapira. Ehuhu yootheene yaakhala ekhotto eriyari ya Rehobowami ni Yerobowami." 
2Chronicles12:16 Rehobowami aahookhwa, anavithiwa vamoha ni makholowaawe musidadeni ya Davide. Vano namarandelaawe aari mwaniye mulopwana Abiya." 
2Chronicles13:1 Vayaakhani yanaathannaararu ya olamula wa Rehobowami, Abiya aathatuwa mwene a oYuda," 
2Chronicles13:2 analamula iyaakha tthaaru oYerusaleemu. Amayawe yiitthaniwa Maaka, mwaana muthiyana a Uriyeli, muGibeya. Vano, yaakhala ekhotto eriyari ya Abiya ni Yerobowami." 
2Chronicles13:3 Abiya aavolowa mukhottoni aakuxaka anakhotto 400 000 ooweraxa owana, ni Yerobowami aarowa waawanano ni anakhotto 800 000 ooweratho owana." 
2Chronicles13:4 Abiya aawela mwaako Zemarayimi, mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi, anakhuwela: “Yerobowami ni aYixrayeli ootheene, mukiiwe!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Nyuwosa khamusuwenle weera Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, oomvaha Davide vamoha ni ekhapiraawe, omwene wa oYixrayeli, attharihaka wiiraana woohimala?”" 
2Chronicles13:6 Waarookhalaru hiiho, Rehobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Nebate, murumeiyi a Salomoni, mwaana mulopwana a Davide, aamurukunuwela pwiiyaawe." 
2Chronicles13:7 Rehobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Salomoni, nlelo areene mmiravo, ahisuwenleru etthu ni ahiweraka ongwanano, asilopwana akina akina a atakhali ni oohivareleya muteko yaahitakansa ni Yerobowami enangwanano Rehobowami." 
2Chronicles13:8 Vano nyuwosa muntthuna owanano omwene wa Yave, ori mmatatani mwa ekhapira ya Davide! Vekhaikhai nyuwosa muri nakupa mutokotoko ni mookhalano imombe sa eyuuma yoorikaxa opankaawe Yerobowami weera sikhale milukusanyu." 
2Chronicles13:9 Vano, khamuhiyono nyuwosa ngwoomonle asaserdoti* a Yave, ekhapira ya Aharoni, ni aLeevi, munaathanla asaserdotaanyu ntoko simpakaaya miloko sikina? Akhalaru mutthu aneera iitteelihere mwaamombe mmoha ni anapunci a ikhondoolo athanneeli, onoowera othatuwa musaserdoti* a seiye sihikhanle miluku." 
2Chronicles13:10 Vaheera wa hiyo, Yave ti Mulukwaahu, ni khanimuhingye. Asaserdotaahu animurumeela Yave ekhaviheriwaka ni aLeevi ari a ekhapira ya Aharoni." 
2Chronicles13:11 Khula oxeexelo ni oxekuwa awosa ampaka sooveleela soohisa ni sa erubani* yoowunkhelaxa wa Yave. Awosa anthata ipaawu vameesa akhoveleliwe okhala ootteela, ni khula oxekuwa ampattiha soomwaleela sa onyaari orino nyetto sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera. Vano, hiyo nintthariha soonyesereriha sa Yave, Mulukwaahu, nyuwosa munghiyalaanyu." 
2Chronicles13:12 Moone nnenesene! Muluku ori ni hiyo; Owo ti Mutokweenaahu. Asaserdotaawe, ekuxaleene mapalapattaaya anoowiipelani mapalapatta weera ekhuwelele ekhotto. aYixrayeli, muhingwaneno Yave, Muluku a makholowaanyu, niwoko nyuwosa khamuwina.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Eyo eri hiiho, Yerobowami aahaarumihela anakhotto ottuli wa anakhotto a oYuda, moota wooweera owo aari ohoolo wa aYuda, ni anakhotto yiipinthe yaari ottuli." 
2Chronicles13:14 Anakhotto a oYuda yaarukunungwaaya yoonaka weera yaawananiwa mpatta wa ohoolo ni ottuli, yaamukhuwelela Yave. Asaserdoti* yaahiipa mapalapattaaya" 
2Chronicles13:15 ni anakhotto a oYuda yaakhuwelela ekhotto. Moorumani wa okhuweleliwa ekhotto, Muluku aangwina Yerobowami ni aYixrayeli ootheene ohoolo wa Abiya ni aYuda." 
2Chronicles13:16 aYixrayeli yaahaatthawa anakhotto a oYuda, ni Muluku aawinnyerera mmatatanimwaya." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abiya vamoha ni anakhottwaawe, aahaawinaxa; yaahookhwa anakhotto ooweraxa 500 000 a oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles13:18 Ehuhuweene yeele aYixrayeli yaanyaatuliwa ni anakhotto a oYuda yaakhalano ikuru soowinelano, niwoko yaamuroromela Yave, Muluku a makholowaaya." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abiya aamuttharelela Yerobowami, anamwaakha isidade sa oBeteli, oYexana ni wEfroni, vamoha ni mittetthesaya." 
2Chronicles13:20 Mweehuhuni ya olamula wa Abiya, omwenaawe Yerobowami khawaalipihereiye. Aavulalihiwa ni Yave, anakhwa." 
2Chronicles13:21 Ohiyanawaya, Abiya aahiitekiha. Owo aahaathela asithiyana muloko naaxexe, anaayara anamwane asilopwana miloko miili neeli ni asithiyana muloko ni athannamosa." 
2Chronicles13:22 Sookhumelela sikina iyo sa olamula wa Abiya, itthu opankaawe ni ohimmaawe, silempwale mulivuruni sa nyaha sa mprofeeti Ido." 
2Chronicles14:1 Abiya aahookhwa, anavithiwa vamoha ni makholowaawe, musidadeni ya Davide. Aamurandenle ti mwaniye mulopwana Asa, ni moolamulanimwawe, elapo yaakhala ni murettele mweehuhuni ya iyaakha muloko." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa aapaka yeeyo aakhulelaawe Yave, Mulukwaawe." 
2Chronicles14:3 Aahaavenxa altaari* a miluku sa anamarwa ni altaari* a mmattumaxani, anaapwexakasa amarimbu ootteeliheriwa, anakurumula nyiri soothipeleliwa sa Axera." 
2Chronicles14:4 Aalamulela muloko wa oYuda weera omwaase Yave, Muluku a makholowaaya, ni weera yiiwelele ikanosawe ni malamulowaawe." 
2Chronicles14:5 Aavenxa mapuro oolapa a mmattumuxani ni altaari* a erubani* musidadeni sootheene sa oYuda; hiiho omwene waakhala ni murettele moolamulanimwawe wootheene. 
2Chronicles14:6 Aaraselatho oYuda isidade soolipihiwa, niwoko yaari ehuhu ya murettele. Khaawo yaangwananne mweehuhuni ya iyaakha iye, niwoko Yave aamwiitthuuwiha." 
2Chronicles14:7 Owo aaherela muloko wa oYuda: “Nrowe niraseleke isidade iya nitekeke ixiri ni itoore*, masele ni anampattika. Elapo ti yawihu niwoko noomwaasa Yave, Mulukwaahu; hiyo noomwaasa ni Owo oonivaha murettele mmwiinanonimwahu wootheene.” Hiiho yaateka, enapuha." 
2Chronicles14:8 Asa aakhalano anakhotto yaari asilopwana 300 000 a oYuda, ereeneno ixikudu* sitokotoko ni mavaka. Aakhalanotho anakhotto 280 000 a oBenyamini, ereeneno ixikudu* ikhaanene ni nyuura. Ootheene awo yaari anakhotto oolipa." 
2Chronicles14:9 muKuxe Zera aahaarowelasa vamoha ni anakhotto ancipalexa ni ikaaro sa ekhotto 300, anaphiya oMarexa." 
2Chronicles14:10 Asa aarowa weera angwaneno, ni awosa yaahiirehererela owana mureyareyani na oZefata, waattamela oMarexa." 
2Chronicles14:11 Vano Asa aamukhuwelela Yave, Mulukwaawe: “Yave, khawoworu onlikana ni Nyuwo, onaakhavihera oolosowa yaawanaka ni oolipa. Ii! Yave, Mulukwaahu, munikhavihere, niwoko nnoororomelani Nyuwo, ni nirweenle waawanano anakhotto ancipale ala mwa Nsinananyu. Ii! Yave, Nyuwo ti Mulukwaahu; muhimuhiye mutthu oowananakani.”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Yave ahaawina aKuxe ohoolo wa Asa ni Yuda. aKuxe yaatthawasa," 
2Chronicles14:13 ni Asa vamoha ni anakhottwaawe, yaahaattharelelasa mpaka oGerari. Waatta wa yaawo yaamonre waatepaxa moota wooweera aKuxe khayaawera orehereratho waattawaya; yaaphwatasiwa ohoolo wa Yave ni anakhottwaawe. Hiho, asilopwana a oYuda yaahuhula sooreela sincipale." 
2Chronicles14:14 Yaaphwatasa isidade sootheene saarukureenre oGerari, niwoko waahaamorela amaki a weiwo woopiha wa Yave. Yaahuhula isidade sootheene iye, niwoko saakhalamo mihakhu sincipale." 
2Chronicles14:15 Yaawananotho mwaakonelingwe wa akukhuli, enakuxa ikhondoolo, ipuri ni ahaaci ancipale. Vahoolowaya, yaahokoleela oYerusaleemu." 
2Chronicles15:1 Munepa wa Muluku waamukhuruwela Azariya, mwaana mulopwana a Odedi." 
2Chronicles15:2 Owo aarowa omukumanano Asa, anamweerela: “Asa vamoha ni muloko wootheene wa oYuda ni oBenyamini, mukiwiriyane: Nyuwo mwakhala ni Yave, Owo onookhala ni nyuwo. Mwamwaasa, Owo onimootthuniherani omphwanya, vaheera mwamuhiya, Owotho onimoohiyani.”" 
2Chronicles15:3 aYixrayeli yaakhala ehuhu yincipale ehirino Muluku a ekhaikhai, naari musaserdoti* oowaaxuttiha nlamulo." 
2Chronicles15:4 Vaheera moothanananimwaya, awosa yaahokoleela wa Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, emwaasaka, ni Owo aatthunihera weera emphwanye." 
2Chronicles15:5 Mmahukuni ale weettiwa ni woova, niwoko yaakhala makacamiho wa amaki ootheene a mulaponi." 
2Chronicles15:6 Miloko ni isidade sannaphwatana, niwoko Muluku aaruuhela moota wootheene wa makacamiho." 
2Chronicles15:7 Mene mukhale oolipa ni muhiporore, niwoko munootthuveleliwa mutekwaanyu.”" 
2Chronicles15:8 Mwene Asa iiwakaru masu ale, ni mprofeeti Azariya, mwaana mulopwana a Obede, aathalihenraawe otthuna wa Muluku, aalipihaxa murimaawe. Aavenxa miluku soohiira sa elapo yootheene ya oYuda, oBenyamini ni isidade aawinnaawe mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi, anaareherera altaari* a Yave yaari ohoolo wa nipithela* na Empa ya Muluku." 
2Chronicles15:9 Vahoolowaya aathukumanyiha muloko wootheene wa oYuda ni oBenyamini, anaalattulatho yaawo yaari awEfrayimi, aManaxe ni aSimeyoni mwa yaawo yaakhala eriyaraaya, niwoko ancipale a aYixrayeli yaarowa mpatta wa mwene Asa, woowoona weera Yave, Mulukwaawe, aari ni yoowo." 
2Chronicles15:10 Vamweerini wanaararu wa eyaakha yanaamuloko niithanu ya olamula wa Asa awosa yaathukumana oYerusaleemu. 
2Chronicles15:11 Ehuhuweene yeele yaamveleelela Yave imombe macira mathannameeli, ikhondoolo ni ipuri macira miloko mathannameeli yaahuhunlaaya." 
2Chronicles15:12 Yaahiiraana ni murima wootheene ni okumi wootheene woomwaasani Yave, Muluku a makholowaaya." 
2Chronicles15:13 Akhalaru mutthu eera ahimwaase Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, waatthuneya wiiviwa – akhalaka mutthu piswa, hoye hoye oottittimiheyaxa, mulopwana hata muthiyana." 
2Chronicles15:14 Hiiho yaamuroromeliha Yave ekhuwelaka, wiiwanyeyaka oruma wa manyaaka ni mapalapatta." 
2Chronicles15:15 Muloko wootheene wa oYuda waahakalalela yoororomeliha, niwoko awosa yaapanke ni murima wootheene. Yaamwaasa Muluku ni nthiti; Owo aapakiha weera emphwanyase, ni aahaavaha murettele mmwiinanonimwaya wootheene." 
2Chronicles15:16 Mwene Asa aahaakuruxa amunneiye yiitthaniwa Maaka okhala pwiyamwene mutokweene, niwoko awo yaathipela mwiri woothipeleliwa wa Axera woohiira. Asa aaphwata mwiri ole, anathikilasa, anahisera mureyareyani na oKidroni." 
2Chronicles15:17 Yaaroohimalihiwaru oYixrayeli altaari* a mmattumuxani, murima wa Asa waamukhalelaxa nthiti Yave mookuminimwawe wootheene." 
2Chronicles15:18 Owo aaruuha Mpaani mwa Muluku eparatha*, eyuuma yoorikaxa ni ikaruma owo ni atithawe yaatteelihalaaya." 
2Chronicles15:19 Hiiho, khayaakhanlerutho ekhotto mpaka eyaakha yanaamiloko miraru ya olamulawawe." 
2Chronicles16:1 Vayaakhani yanaamiloko miraru niithannamosa ya olamula wa Asa, Baasa, mwene a oYixrayeli, aavolowa oYuda analipiha oRama, weera ahikhaleru eera awere ovolowa naari okhuma mulaponi mwa Asa, mwene a oYuda." 
2Chronicles16:2 Vano Asa aathukumanyiha eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa ya omuhakhuni wa Empa ya Yave, ni wa empaawe ya emwene, anamurumihela Ben-Hadade, mwene a wAsiriya, aalamula oDamasku ni mutthenga weera:" 
2Chronicles16:3 “Nrowe niiraane, ntoko yaapankaaya atithaka ni atithinyu. Kinoorumihelani eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa. Vano, mmalihe wiiraananawanyu ni Baasa, mwene a oYixrayeli, weera owo akhume mulaponimwaka.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Ben-Hadade aahaakhulela yoohima ya mwene Asa, anaalamulela asitokweene a anakhottwaawe weera yawanane isidade sa oYixrayeli. Awosa yaawina wIyoni, oDani, wAbeli-Mayimi ni isidade soothokorora sooca sootheene oNafitali." 
2Chronicles16:5 Baasa asuwelaka yeeyo, aahiya oteka ixiri sa oRama." 
2Chronicles16:6 Vano mwene Asa aahaathukumanyiha asilopwana ootheene a oYuda, ni awosa yaavenxa oRama maluku ni itthaabwa aavarelaawe muteko Baasa. Asa aalipiha oGeba ni oMizepa, avarelaka muteko ikaruma iye." 
2Chronicles16:7 Ehuhuweene yeele, namoonihera* Hanani aarowa omuleela Asa, mwene a oYuda: “Mweenre mwaasa ekhavihero ya mwene a wAsiriya ohikhanle wa Yave, Mulukwaanyu, anakhotto a mwene a wAsiriya ahoopowa mmatatanimwanyu." 
2Chronicles16:8 Weeraka aKuxe ni aLibiya khayaahiyono anakhotto ooweraxa, ereeneno nakupa mutokotoko a ikaaro ni anamweettiha a ikavalu*? Wa soothesene nyuwo mwaavekenlaanyu ekhavihero ya Yave, Owo aawinnyerera mmatatanimwanyu." 
2Chronicles16:9 Vano, maitho a Yave angweha elapo yootheene weera aalipihere ootheene yaawo animukhalela nthiti ni murima wootheene. Wa yeeyo, nyuwo moopaka ya ololo. Okhuma vaanaano va woorowa ohoolo, mmweereke owana ikhotto.”" 
2Chronicles16:10 Mwaha wa yeeyo, Asa aamunyoonyeriwa namoonihera*; aanyoonyaxiwa mpaka olamulela otthukiwa. Ehuhuweene yeele, Asa aahaahasula moololoni akina akina a muloko." 
2Chronicles16:11 Sookhumelela sa olamula wa Asa, okhuma ompacereroni mpaka ommaleloni, silempwale mulivruni sa nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda ni oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles16:12 Vayaakhani yanaamiloko miraru niithanniixexe ya olamulawawe, Asa yaamukela eretta munaawoni. Vano, erettaawe yaarootepaxaru, khaavekenle ekhavihero wa Yave, mene aavekenle paahi wa mamediku." 
2Chronicles16:13 Vayaakhani yanaamiloko mixexe niimoha ya olamulawawe, Asa aahookhwa, anavithiwa vamoha ni makholowaawe." 
2Chronicles16:14 Yaamvitha munihiyeni owo aalamulenlaawe othipeliwa musidadeni ya Davide. Yaamwaatalela mudyaneesani mwa muttembo sireenemo sooreerela ni soowunkhela soohiyanahiyana soorikaxa, enakukha ecirangare emuttittimiherelaka yoowo." 
2Chronicles17:1 Aamurandenle ti Yehoxafati, mwaana mulopwana a Asa, aniilipihera waawanano aYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles17:2 Aawiikaathi anakhotto musidadeni soolipihiwa sootheene sa oYuda, anamuhelamo nakupa a anamalipelela, mpakatho isidade sa wEfrayimi yaawinnaaya atithawe." 
2Chronicles17:3 Yave aari ni Yehoxafati, niwoko owo aakhalano mweettelo ntoko aaraaweno Davide ompacereroni. Khaakoherenre aBahali*," 
2Chronicles17:4 mene aamwaasa Muluku a atithawe, aniiwelela malamulowaawe, ahitakihaka ipakelo sa aYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles17:5 Yave aalipiha omwene wa Yehoxafati, ni aYuda ootheene yannamuruuhela soovaha, moota wooweera aakhalano mihakhu sincipale ni nttittimiho ntokotoko." 
2Chronicles17:6 Munthitini, aaheettela iphiro sa Yave; ohiya yeeyo, aahaavenxa oYuda altaari* a miluku soowootha ni nyiri soothipeleliwa sa Axera." 
2Chronicles17:7 Vayaakhani yanaararu ya olamulawawe, aahaarumiha asitokweene – Beni-Hayili, Obadiya, Zakariya, Netanayeli ni Mikaya weera yahusihe musidadeni sa oYuda." 
2Chronicles17:8 Yaahaarowano aLeevi akina akina – Xemaya, Netaniya, Zebadiya, Asaheli, Xemiramote, Yehonatani, Adoniya, Tobiya, Tobe-Adoniya ni asaserdoti* Elixama ni Yehorami." 
2Chronicles17:9 Awosa yaaviravira isidade sootheene sa omwene wa oYuda, ekuxaleene elivuru ya Nlamulo na Yave ni exuttihaka muloko." 
2Chronicles17:10 Woopiha wa Yave waamorela omwene wootheene waarukureenre oYuda, moota wooweera khayaavolongwe mukhottoni weera engwanane Yehoxafati." 
2Chronicles17:11 aFilisti akina akina, yaamuronghela soovaha Yehoxafati, ohiya eparatha* yaamvanghaaya ntoko mucaango, ni awArabiya yaamuronghela mihuwo – anapunci a ikhondoolo 7 700 ni anapuncitho a ipuri 7 700." 
2Chronicles17:12 Yehoxafati annathatuwa ooweraxa; aateka moolipamo ni isidade saarino soothokorora sooca oYuda," 
2Chronicles17:13 aathokororaawemo yooca yoowaattaxa. Aakhalanotho oYerusaleemu anakhotto ooxuttihiweene owana. 
2Chronicles17:14 Yaakawiwe, ettharihiwaka emusi emusi moota ola: a oYuda, ahooleli a anakhotto macira muloko: Muhooleli Adena, areeneno anakhotto 300 000;" 
2Chronicles17:15 woottharelana, muhooleli Yehohanani, areeneno anakhotto 280 000;" 
2Chronicles17:16 vahoolowaya, Amasiya, mwaana mulopwana a Zikeri, iixinnyerenre ni otthuna omvarela muteko Yave, areeneno anakhotto 200 000." 
2Chronicles17:17 A Benyamini: Eliyada, nakhotto ooweraxa, areeneno anakhotto 200 000, ekuxaleene nyuura ni ixikudu*;" 
2Chronicles17:18 woottharelana Yehozabade, areeneno anakhotto 180 000, oolikaneene owana." 
2Chronicles17:19 Alasa yaari asilopwana yaamurumeela mwene, waahiya yaari musidade soolipihiwa oYuda wootheene." 
2Chronicles18:1 Yehoxafati aakhalano mihakhu sincipale ni nttittimiho, anamwiiraanano Ahabi ni moota wa othela." 
2Chronicles18:2 Siviraleene iyaakha sikina, owo aarowa omuxekura Ahabi oSamariya. Ahabi aahiiva ikhondoolo ni imombe sincipale weera amwaakhelele Yehoxafati ni atthwaawe, anamutannya owanano oRamoti-Gileyadi." 
2Chronicles18:3 Ahabi, mwene a oYixrayeli, aamukoha Yehoxafati, mwene a oYuda: “Munoorowa ni miyo owanano oRamoti-Gileyadi?” Yehoxafati aamwaakhula: “Kiri ntoko nyuwo, ni mulokwaaka ori ntoko mulokwaanyu; nnookhala ni nyuwo okhottoni.”" 
2Chronicles18:4 Vaheera aahaandyeerera: “Kinoovekelani weera mwaasaase toko miruku sa Yave.” 
2Chronicles18:5 Vano mwene a oYixrayeli, aahaathukumanyiha maprofeeti macira maxexe, anaakoha: “Nirooke okhottoni owanano oRamoti-Gileyadi, hoye hoye nihirooke?” Awosa yaamwaakhulasa: “Murowe, niwoko Muluku onimwinnyerera mmatatani mwa mwene.”" 
2Chronicles18:6 Wa soothesene, Yehoxafati aakoha: “Khawoworu va mprofeeti a Yave, weera nimukoherere?”" 
2Chronicles18:7 Mwene a oYixrayeli, aamwaakhula Yehoxafati: “Ookhala va mulopwana oomukohererela Yave, wa soothesene miyo kinoomuthanya, niwoko khankithaliheraru itthu sooreera, mene soonanara paahi. Owo ti Mikaya, mwaana mulopwana a Imela.” Yehoxafati aamwaakhula: “Amwene khawaatthuneya ohima yeeyo.”" 
2Chronicles18:8 Vano mwene a oYixrayeli, aamwiitthana mmoha a arumeiyaawe aneera: “Munruuhe woowaakuveya Mikaya, mwaana mulopwana a Imela.”" 
2Chronicles18:9 Mwene a oYixrayeli, ni Yehoxafati, mwene a oYuda, ewanreene sa emwene, yaakilaathiye muhicenimwaya sa emwene, wamveeriwa vamulako wa oSamariya, ni maprofeeti ootheene yaathalihera yeeyo yuupuwelaaya ntoko oreene otthuna wa Muluku oohoolowaya." 
2Chronicles18:10 Zedekiya mwaana mulopwana a Kenaana, aapaka manyaka a eyuuma, aneera: “Yave oneera ha: ‘Nyuwo munimwaavulalihera manyaka ala awArami, mpaka ophwateya.’”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Maprofeeti ootheene akinaawo, yaathalihera etthweene yeeyo, yeeraka: “Ngwanane oRamoti-Gileyadi, ni munoowina, niwoko Yave onimwinnyerera mmatatani mwa mwene.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Namutthenga aarongwe omwiitthana Mikaya, aamweerela: “Ngwoone maprofeeti ootheene akinaawo anroromeliha weera mwene sinoomweettela nnene. Maswaanyutho yaakhulele ni wuulumawanyu okhaleleke mpattaaya.”" 
2Chronicles18:13 Wa soothesene, Mikaya aaheera: “Kinlipela mwa Yave Mukumi weera kinoohima paahi yeeyo aneeraawe alamulele Mulukwaaka.”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Owo aphiyaleene, mwene aamukoha: “Mikaya, nirooke nawananeke oRamoti-Gileyadi hoye hoye nihirooke?” Mikaya, aamwaakhula: “Mwawananeke, ni munoowina, niwoko awosa animwinnyereriwa mmatatanimwanyu.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Mwene aamweerela: “Koonyesererihekeni imaara ihayi weera mukileele paahi ekhaikhai mwa Nsina na Yave?” 
2Chronicles18:16 Vano Mikaya aamwaakhula: “Koowoona aYixrayeli ootheene emwareenleene mmattumuxani, ntoko ikhondoolo soohikhalano mukukhuli, ni koomwiiwa Yave eeraka: ‘Alasa khaanono mwene. Khula mutthu ahokoleeleke owaani ni murettele.’”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Vano mwene a oYixrayeli aamweerela Yehoxafati: “Kohooleelani weera owo onthalihera otthuna wa Muluku uulumaka soonanararu mwaha wa miyo, ohikhanle sooreera.”" 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikaya aapwaherera: “Mwiiwe masu a Yave: Koomoona Yave akilaathiyeene vahiceniwawe, vamoha ni anakhotto ootheene a wiirimu ereene moonowaawe woolopwana ni woothiyana." 
2Chronicles18:19 Vano Yave aaheera: ‘Taani anaamutannye Ahabi, mwene a oYixrayeli, weera awanane oRamoti-Gileyadi ni akhwelewo?’ Vano mmoha uuluma etthu emoha, mukina uuluma ekina, mpaka" 
2Chronicles18:20 ommaleloni munepa mmoha waaheemela ohoolo wa Yave oneera: ‘Miyo kinoomutannya.’ Yave aakoha: ‘Moota heeni?’ 
2Chronicles18:21 Owo waamwaakhula: ‘Kinoorowa kakhaleke munepa woowootha mmwaano mwa maprofeeti ootheene a mwene.’ Yave aaheera: ‘Nyuwo munoowera omulokottha; Murowe, mwapakewo.’" 
2Chronicles18:22 Vano Yave aahela munepa woowootha mmwaano mwa maprofeetaanyu awo. Yave ookhaliha erisaanyu.” 
2Chronicles18:23 Vano Zedekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Kenaana, aamukhuveela, anamvaha Mikaya makoofi owiitho, anamukoha: “Okuxenre ephiro heeni munepa wa mpatta wa Yave, okhumakaru mwa miyo weera wuulume ni nyuwo?”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaya aamwaakhula: “Nyuwo mmoonelele vanihukuni muneeraanyu mwiipithe mukwartuni mwa mpuwaxa.” 
2Chronicles18:25 Vano mwene a oYixrayeli aalamulela: “Munrumihe Mikaya weera ahokoleele wa Amoni, governadori a esidade ni wa Yowaxi, mwaana mulopwana a mwene," 
2Chronicles18:26 ni mweere weera mwene oneera ha: ‘Mungwalele mulopwana ola mukaliposo, mumvaheke yooca vakhaani ni maahi paahi mpaka kineeraaka kihokolowe oolipeene.’”" 
2Chronicles18:27 Mikaya aahima: “Nyuwo mwahokolowa oolipeene, Yave khuulumme mwa miyo.” Aahaandyeereratho: “Ootheene nyuwo, mwiiwe yeeyo kinghimaaka!”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Vano, mwene a oYixrayeli ni Yehoxafati, mwene a oYuda, yaarowasa owanano oRamoti-Gileyadi." 
2Chronicles18:29 Mwene a oYixrayeli, aamweerela Yehoxafati: “Kinoovolowa mukhottoni kiwanreene sikina, mene nyuwo ngwareleke sa emwene.” Mwene a oYixrayeli aawara sikina, ni ooweeli yaarowasa okhottoni." 
2Chronicles18:30 Mwene a wAsiriya aahaalamulela asitokweenaawe a ikaaro sa ekhotto: “Muhingwananeru mukina – akhalaka nakhooto, hata mutokweene – ohikhanle ongwanano mwene a oYixrayeli.”" 
2Chronicles18:31 Asitokweene a ikaaro emoonakaru Yehoxafati, yuupuwela: “Ola ti mwene a oYixrayeli.” Vano yaarukunuwa weera emuwanane, vaheera Yehoxafati aakhuwela, ni Yave aamukhavihera. Muluku aahaasusihasa wa yoowo," 
2Chronicles18:32 niwoko yoonakaru weera khaahiyono mwene a oYixrayeli, yaahiya omuttharelela." 
2Chronicles18:33 Vanonto, nakhotto mmoha aari mwaasa olatha muuraawe, anamphwanyiha mwene a oYixrayeli eriyari ya yoowaraawe ya eyuuma ya ekhotto. Mwene aamweerela namweettiha a ekaarowaawe: “Okikhumihe mukhottoni! Koovulalihiwa!”" 
2Chronicles18:34 Ekhotto yaakukumaxa nihuku nenenenno ni hiiho mwene a oYixrayeli aahiilipihera mukaaronimwawe aawehaka awArami, mpaka oxekuwa. Hiiho, nsuwa nneelaka, owo aahookhwa." 
2Chronicles19:1 Yehoxafati ahokoleenleene oolipeene empaawe ya emwene oYerusaleemu," 
2Chronicles19:2 namoonihera* Yehu, mwaana mulopwana a Hanani, aarowa omukumanano, anamweerela: “Weeraka nyuwo waatthuneya waakhavihera ni waasivela atakhali ni yaale animuthanya Yave? Mwaha wa yeeyo, isara sa Yave sohoomorelani." 
2Chronicles19:3 Wa soothesene, yookhala mwa nyuwo etthu yooreera, niwoko nyuwo mootapuxa elapo mwa nyiri soothipeleliwa sa Axera, munamwaasa Muluku ni murimaanyu wootheene.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Yehoxafati aakhala oYerusaleemu; aaviraviratho mulaponi, okhuma oBerxeba mpaka mmanyaakoni sa wEfrayimi, aahokoloxeraka aYixrayeli wa Yave, Muluku a makholowaaya." 
2Chronicles19:5 Owo aahaathanla aphuki wa khula isidade soolipihiwa sa oYuda," 
2Chronicles19:6 eeraka: “Ngwehe nnenesene yeeyo mumpakaanyu, niwoko khoohiyono wa atthu nyuwo munthorihaanyu ekhaikhai, mene ohoolo wa Yave, anaakhale ni nyuwo munthorihelaanyumo." 
2Chronicles19:7 Vano munttittimihe Yave ni mwiipasoopeno moota munthorihaanyu, niwoko Yave khamvilela ohiroromeleya, hata khanthalu, naari khanaakhulela makhwankwa.”" 
2Chronicles19:8 Yehoxafati aahaathanlatho oYerusaleemu, aLeevi akina akina, asaserdoti* ni mapwattapwattha a imusi sa aYixrayeli, weera ethorihe, ettharihaka Nlamulo na Yave, ni ereherere minyakunyaku sa amaki." 
2Chronicles19:9 Vano aahaavaha malamulo ala: “Nyuwo murumeeleke moororomeleyani ni murima wookwaneleene, moomoovani Yave." 
2Chronicles19:10 Khula mulattu muneeraanyu muruuheliwe wa mpatta wa axunninyu aYixrayeli a isidade sikina – okhalaka wa oyeehiwa ephome, naari milattu sikina mwaha wa nlamulo, sooruma, ikano hoye hoye soolamulela – nyuwosa ontthuneya wooperera weera ehimutthekele Yave; ohiyanawaya, isara sa Yave sinimoomorelasani nyuwosa ni awosa. Mpakeke hiiho ni khamuttheka." 
2Chronicles19:11 Mutokweene a asaserdoti* Amariya onookhala ni nyuwo weera alakele wakhalaru mulattu onghima sa Yave, ni Zebadiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yixmayeli, muhooleli a epuumba ya Yuda, onookhala ni nyuwosa weera alakele wakhalaru mulattu onghima sa mwene. aLeevi animookhaviherani mwa sootheene iyo. Mukwanihereke sootthuneyasanyu moolipihani murima. Yave akhale ni yaawo ampaka nnene.”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Vahoolowaya, aMowabe ni awAmoni, vamoha ni aMewuni akina akina, yaahoorwa ongwanano Yehoxafati." 
2Chronicles20:2 Vano akina yaamuleela Yehoxafati: “Nakupa a anakhotto awEdomi onoorweelani nyuwo okhuma okhopela wa ephareiya. Ori vanaano va oHazozoni-Tamari, eyo tiiyo wEni-Gedi.”" 
2Chronicles20:3 Ngwoovanimwawe Yehoxafati, aalakela omukoherera Yave, analamulela oYuda wootheene otthuka." 
2Chronicles20:4 Vano waathukumana muloko, orweelaka musidadeni sootheene sa oYuda weera waasaase ekhavihero ya Yave." 
2Chronicles20:5 Yehoxafati aaheemela munthukumanoni wa oYuda ni oYerusaleemu, Mpaani mwa Yave, ohoolo wa nipuwa nnyowani," 
2Chronicles20:6 anavekela: “Ii! Yave, Muluku a makholowaahu, ti Nyuwo Muluku muri wiirimu. Nyuwo munlamula omwene wootheene wa mulaponi. Ikuru ni owera ori mmatatanimwanyu, ni khaawo ongwera woowananani." 
2Chronicles20:7 Nyuwo ti Mulukwaahu ngwoomonle amaki a elapo ela ohoolo wa aYixrayeli, mulokwaanyu, munavaha wa mahuku ootheene ekhapira ya nthamwenaanyu Abrahaamu." 
2Chronicles20:8 Awosa aamakamo, enatekamo Nipuro Nootteela*, ettittimiherelaka Nsinananyu, yeeraka:" 
2Chronicles20:9 ‘Yaniphwanya yakhalaru erisa – okhalaka ottaruxeliwa, ekatana, naari nihooxo, hata etala, hiyo nnookhala vamaithoniwanyu ohoolo wa Empa ya Yave ela, niwoko ela enkuxa Nsinananyu, ni nnimookhuwelelani mmakacamihonimwahu, ni Nyuwo munooniiwa ni munoonivuluxa.’" 
2Chronicles20:10 Vaheera vano, ari vawo awAmoni, aMowabe ni amaki a mmanyaakoni sa oSeyiri, mwa yaawosa ilaposaya, khamwaatthunihenre aYixrayeli ohuhulamo, yaakhumaaya wExipitu; tivawo, aYixrayeli yaahapuwansaaya ni khayaaphwatanse." 
2Chronicles20:11 Vano ngwoone moota annirukunuwelaaya, erwaaka onoomola mulaponi munivanghaanyu ntoko yoohiyeriwa." 
2Chronicles20:12 Ii! Mulukwaahu, Nyuwo khamwaathoriha? Hiyo khaninono ikuru soowaawanano anakhotto ancipale ala anrwa oniwanano. Khanisuwenle yooweera, mene maithwaahu anoowehani Nyuwo.”" 
2Chronicles20:13 Asilopwana ootheene a oYuda, vamoha ni axaaraya ni anamwanaaya, mpaka a mmatatani yaari vale yeemelelo ohoolo wa Yave." 
2Chronicles20:14 Vano Munepa wa Yave, waamukhuruwela Yahaziyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Zakariya, mwaana mulopwana a Benaya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Matatiya, muLeevi ni a ekhapira ya Asafi, owo eera eemenleene eriyari ya muthukumano." 
2Chronicles20:15 Owo aaheera: “Ngwiriyane ootheene munkhala oYuda ni oYerusaleemu vamohatho ni mwene Yehoxafati! Yave ongweerelani ha: ‘Muhoove hata muhiporore mwaha wa anakhotto ancipale ala. Vano, khamuhiyono nyuwo muneera ngwane, mene ti Muluku." 
2Chronicles20:16 Omaalo mukhuruwe mwaarowelasaka. Awosa eniirweele ekhato ya oZizi, ni nyuwosa mwaakumaneno ekotenlaayawo ekhato, ohoolo wa nikare na oYeruweli." 
2Chronicles20:17 Nyuwosa khoontthuneya owana ekhotto ela. Mukhaleke mmapuronimwanyu, mpwaherere oolipeene ni moone ntapuxo onoovahaaweni Yave, ii! Yuda ni Yerusaleemu. Muhoove hata muhiporore. Mvenyase weera mwaawanane omaalo, ni Yave onookhala ni nyuwosa.’”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Yehoxafati aakokhora, anuuramihela ekhove vathi, ni muloko wootheene wa oYuda ni oYerusaleemu, waakokhora omulapaka Yave." 
2Chronicles20:19 Vano, aLeevi akina akina a ekhapira ya aKohati ni aKorahi yaaheemela, enamvuwiha Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, ekhuwelaxaka." 
2Chronicles20:20 Oyaaka ni oxa yaattimula, erowaka onikareni na oTekowa. Yaavenyaaya, Yehoxafati aaweerelasa: “Mukiiwe Yuda ni muloko wa oYerusaleemu! Munroromele Yave, Mulukwaanyu, ni nyuwosa munoolipihiwa; mwaaroromele maprofeeti a Yave ni munoowina.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 Yehoxafati akoherenreene muloko, aahaathanla asilopwana akina akina weera emwiipele Yave ni emvuwihe ngwaarani wa otteelawawe, erowaka ohoolo wa anakhotto, yiipaka: “Muntthapele Yave, niwoko osivelawawe khoommala.”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Epacenreene wiipa icipo soovuwiha, Yave aahaareherera anakhotto weera yaawanane anakhotto a wAmoni, oMowabe ni a mmanyaakoni sa oSeyiri yaahaavoleela oYuda, ni awosa yaawinasiwa." 
2Chronicles20:23 awAmoni ni aMowabe yaahaawanano yaawo yaari a mmanyaakoni sa oSeyiri weera yaaphwatase. Yaahononneene anakhotto a oSeyiri, yaawanasa, enaphwatanasa." 
2Chronicles20:24 Anakhotto a oYuda yaarongwaaya vanipuroni nnooneyaayawo nikare, ewoonakaru anakhotto ancipale, yoonne paahi mittembo sireene vathi; khaawo oopongweru." 
2Chronicles20:25 Vano Yehoxafati vamoha ni anakhottwaawe yaarowasa ohuhula mittembo, enaphwanyasa eriyari ya seiyo ikapwitthi sincipale ni soowara, mpakatho itthu sooreerela. Yaaviriha mahuku mararu ehuhulaka, mene saahaattaxa mpaka ohiwera okuxa." 
2Chronicles20:26 Vanihukuni nanaaxexe, awosa yaathukumana vanreyareyani na oBeraka, yaamvuwihalaayawo Yave. Tivawo mpaka olelo nreyareya nno nniitthaniwaaya Beraka." 
2Chronicles20:27 Vahoolowaya, ehooleliwaka ni Yehoxafati, anakhotto ootheene a oYuda ni a oYerusaleemu yaahokoleelasa oYerualeemu ni ohakalala, niwoko Yave aahaaweriha ohakalalela waawina amwiittanaaya." 
2Chronicles20:28 Yaavolowasa oYerusaleemu, enarowasa Mpaani mwa Yave, erumaka amakita, makita a ifiiyu ni mapalapatta." 
2Chronicles20:29 Esuwenleene moota Yave aawanannaawe amwiittana a oYixrayeli, woopiha wa Yave waasareya mmilokoni sootheene." 
2Chronicles20:30 Omwene wa Yehoxafati waakhala mmuretteleni, niwoko Mulukwaawe, aamvaha murettele mmwiinanonimwaya moothemwene." 
2Chronicles20:31 Hiiho Yehoxafati aalamula oYuda. Aapaceraawe olamula, aarino iyaakha miloko miraru niithanu, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha miloko miili niithanu. Amayawe yiitthaniwa Azuba, mwaana muthiyana a Xilehi." 
2Chronicles20:32 Owo aaheettela iphiro sa Asa, atithawe, ni khaahingyeru; aapaka onaakhulelaawe Yave." 
2Chronicles20:33 Wa soothesene, khaamalinghe mapuro oolapa a mmattumuxani, ni muloko weera ohinaaye omvarexexa ni nthiti Muluku a makholowaaya." 
2Chronicles20:34 Sookhumelela sikina iyo sa olamula wa Yehoxafati, okhuma ompacereroni mpaka ommaleloni, silempwale mulivuruni sa nyaha sa Yehu, mwaana mulopwana a Hanani, ni sitakanseriwe mulivuruni sa nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles20:35 Eviraleene ehuhu ekina, Yehoxafati, mwene a oYuda, aamwiiraanano Ahaziya, mwene a oYixrayeli, mwa yoowo aarino mweettelo woonanara." 
2Chronicles20:36 Aamwiiraanano weera yapake makula matokotoko a nakoso. Yaapakeliwa omuxeloni wa wEziyoni-Geberi. 
2Chronicles20:37 Vano Eliyezeri, mwaana mulopwana a Dodavahu mMarexa aamuthaliherela Yehoxafati otthuna wa Muluku, amweerelaka: “Mweenre mmwiiraanano Ahaziya, Yave onoophwata mpankaanyu.” Vekhaikhai makula matokotoko yaaphwateya ni khayaawenre orowa ompaka nakoso." 
2Chronicles21:1 Akhwiiyeene Yehoxafati, yaamvithela musidadeni ya Davide, nikholonawe, ni aamurandenle vahiceniwawe ya emwene, ti mwaniye mulopwana Yehorami." 
2Chronicles21:2 Axunneiye Yehorami, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoxafati, yaari: Azariya, Yehiyeli, Zakariya, Azariyahu, Mikayeli ni Xefatiya. Ootheene ala yaari anamwane asilopwana a Yehoxafati, mwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles21:3 Owo aahaavahasa soovaha sincipale sa eparatha*, eyuuma yoorikaxa ni itthu sooreerela, mpakatho isidade soolipihiwa sa oYuda. Vaheera omwene aamvanghe Yehorami, niwoko owo aari ntthaaranawe." 
2Chronicles21:4 Woowaakuveya, Yehorami aahiitekiha vahiceni ya emwene ya atithawe, anawiiva ni ekatana axunneiye ootheene ni ahooleli akina akina a oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles21:5 Owo aapaceraawe olamula aarino iyaakha miloko miili ni piili sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha ithannatthaaru." 
2Chronicles21:6 Aahettela iphiro sa mamwene a oYixrayeli, ntoko yaapankaaya emusi ya Ahabi, niwoko aamuthenle mwaana a Ahabi. Aapaka ohinaakhulelaawe Yave." 
2Chronicles21:7 Vanonto, Yave khaatthunne ophwata ekhapiraawe niwoko na wiiraana aapankaawe ni Davide. Owo aaroromeliha opwahereriha wa mahuku ootheene ekhapira ya Davide vahiceni ya emwene." 
2Chronicles21:8 Mmahukuni a Yehorami, awEdomi yaawanawana ni omwene wa oYuda, emvaraka mwenaaya." 
2Chronicles21:9 Tivawo Yerohami aarongwaawe owana vamoha ni ahoolelaawe ni ikaarosawe sootheene sa ekhotto. awEdomi yaamurica Yehorami ni asitokweene a ikaarosawe sa ekhotto, vaheera owo aahaawanano ohiyu, anaamwaraxa amwiittana yaamurince." 
2Chronicles21:10 Mpaka olelo va awEdomi ampwaherera ootapuxeyeene mwa aYuda. Ehuhuweene yeeyo oLibena waawanawanatho, niwoko Yehorami aamuhiya Yave, Muluku a makholowaawe." 
2Chronicles21:11 Owo aatekatho mapuro oolapa a mmattumuxani a oYuda, apakihaka weera muloko wa oYerusaleemu oraruwe, ni oYuda ohapuwe." 
2Chronicles21:12 Vano Yehorami aahaakhela ekaratta ya mprofeti Eliya, yeera: “Yave, Muluku a makholowaanyu, oneera ha: ‘Nyuwo khamweettenle iphiro sa atithinyu Yehoxafati, hata sa Asa, mwene a oYuda," 
2Chronicles21:13 mene aani, mweettenle iphiro sa mamwene a oYixrayeli, mpakihaka weera Yuda ni muloko wa oYixrayeli oraruwe ni miluku soowootha ntoko emusi ya Ahabi yaapankaaya. Mpakatho moowiiva axunninyu xaxaxa, mipatta sa emusi ya atithinyu, yaari asilopwana ooreerela woopwahani nyuwo." 
2Chronicles21:14 Tivawo Yave aneeraawe aavulalihe atthwaanyu moota woowoopiha – anamwaniinyu, axaarinyu ni sootheene siri sawinyu." 
2Chronicles21:15 Nyuwo munoovoreyaxiwa; munookhalano ekwerere mmirimani eneera yootepeleni mpaka okhuma marupwaanyu.’” 
2Chronicles21:16 Yave aatannyera weera emwiitte Yehorami aFilisti ni awArabiya yaakhala vakhiviru wa aKuxe. 
2Chronicles21:17 Awosa yaawanano omwene wa oYuda, enavolowasa, enakuxa mihakhu sootheene yaaphwannyaaya vaate wa emwene, mpakatho axaariye ni anamwanaawe. Aahanle paahi Ahaziya, mwaana eetthaako." 
2Chronicles21:18 Siviraleene sootheene iye, Yave aamutannyera eretta yoohilameya mmaruponi." 
2Chronicles21:19 Eviraleene ehuhu ekina, ommaleloni wa eyaakha yanaaveeli, erettaawe yaatepaxa mpaka okhuma marupwaawe, ni owo aakhwiiye moovoreiwani woowoopiha. Mulokwaawe khawaapattingheru ecirangare yoomuttittimiherela, ntoko waapakelaaya makholowaaya." 
2Chronicles21:20 Yehorami aapaceraawe olamula, aarino iyaakha miloko miraru ni piili sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha ithannatthaaru. Aakhwiiye ahikhalaka oomwiinlela, anavithiwa musidadeni ya Davide, mene khaavithiwe mmahiyeni mwa mamwene." 
2Chronicles22:1 Muloko wa oYerusaleemu waamvara omwene Ahaziya, mwaana eetthaako ya Yehorami, yeenre anakhotto yaarwiiye vamoha ni awArabiya yawiiva anamwane ootheene akina a Yehorami. Hiiho, aapacera olamula Ahaziya mwaana mulopwana a Yehorami, mwene a oYuda." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahaziya aapaceraawe olamula, aarino iyaakha miloko miili ni piili sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu eyaakha emoha. Amayawe yiitthaniwa Ataliya, osuulu wa Omeri." 
2Chronicles22:3 Owotho aaheettela iphiro sa emusi ya Ahabi, niwoko amayawe yaamuxuttiha miruku soonanara." 
2Chronicles22:4 Owo aapaka ohinaakhulelaawe Yave, ntoko saapankaaya imusi sa Ahabi, niwoko ekhwiiyeene atithawe, awosa yaathatuwa anamalakaawe wa oheleyawaya nthala." 
2Chronicles22:5 Owo aaheettelatho mirukusaya iiraanannaawe Yorami, mwaana mulopwana a Ahabi, mwene a oYixrayeli, ni aavenyera ongwanano Hazayeli, mwene a wAsiriya, oRamoti-Gileyade. Yorami aavulalihiwa" 
2Chronicles22:6 anahokoleela oYizereyeli weera avolihe makhwatta aavulalihiwaawe oRamote, aangwananaawe Hazayeli, mwene a wAsiriya. Vahoolowaya, Ahaziya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehorami, mwene a oYuda, aarowa oYizereyeli omuxekura Yorami, mwaana mulopwana a Ahabi, niwoko aavulala." 
2Chronicles22:7 Mooxekurani mmwe, Muluku aatannyera omora wa Ahaziya. Aaphiyalaawe, aavenya ni Yorami weera amukumaneno Yehu, mwaana mulopwana a Nimexi, mwa yoowo aamuttikitthenlaawe Yave weera aphwate emusi ya Ahabi." 
2Chronicles22:8 Yehu aasaaseraawe okwanihera nthorihelo na emusi ya Ahabi, aahaaphwanya ahooleli a oYuda ni anamwane asilopwana a emusi ya Ahaziya, mwa yaawo yaamurumeela Ahaziya, anawiiva." 
2Chronicles22:9 Vano, aavenya amwaasaka Ahaziya, ni anakhottwaawe yaamvara oSamariya iipinthaawewo. Aronghiweene wa Yehu, Ahaziya aahiiviwa. Mene khayaakhoontte omvitha, niwoko yaaheera: “Ola aari osuulu wa Yehoxafati aamwaanse Yave ni murima wootheene.” Hiiho, mweemusini mwa Ahaziya khayaarinotho mukina eera awere okhala mwene." 
2Chronicles22:10 Ataliya, amayawe Ahaziya, esuwelaka weera ohiiviwa mwanaya, yaalamulela wiiviwa emusi yootheene ya mwene a oYuda." 
2Chronicles22:11 Vaheera Yehoxeba, mwaana muthiyana a mwene Yehorami, aamukuxa Yowaxi, mmoha a anamwane asilopwana a mwene Ahaziya yeera yiivasiweke, anamwiikaathi mukwaartuni vamoha ni murumeiyaawe muthiyana. Hiiho Yehoxeba, mwaana muthiyana a mwene Yehorami, mwaara a musaserdoti* Yehoyada, ni murokoriye Ahaziya, aamwiipithiha Yowaxi mwa Ataliya, moota wooweera owo khaawenre omwiiva." 
2Chronicles22:12 Saavira iyaakha ithannamosa owo iipithihiweene ni yaawosa Mpaani mwa Muluku, Ataliya alamulaka elapo." 
2Chronicles23:1 Vayaakhani yanaathannapiili, Yehoyada aalipiha murimaawe, anawiiraanano ahooleli a mikuttula sa anakhotto ncira: Azariya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehowami, Yixmayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Yehonanani, Azariya, mwaana mulopwana a Obede, Maaseiya, mwaana mulopwana a Adaya, ni Elixafate, mwaana mulopwana a Zikeri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Awosa yaaviravira oYuda wootheene, enaathukumanyiha musidadeni sootheene aLeevi ni mapwattapwattha a imusi sa oYixrayeli. Ephiyaleene oYerusaleemu," 
2Chronicles23:3 muthukumano wootheene waamwiiraanano mwene Mpaani mwa Muluku. Vano Yehoyada aaweerelasa: “Mwaana mulopwana a mwene onoolamula, ntoko aaroromelihalaawe Yave mwaha wa ekhapira ya Davide." 
2Chronicles23:4 Nyuwosa mpakaseke ha: Mpattaanyu wanaararu wa nyuwosa asaserdoti* ni aLeevi eniivoloweke muteko nihuku na eSaabadu, owehaweheke mmilakoni sa Empa ya Yave," 
2Chronicles23:5 mpatta wanaararu owehaweheke empa ya emwene, ni mpatta wanaararu mukinoowo owehaweheke Mulako wa Mathipelo; muloko wootheene mukina okhaleke mmapuwani a Empa ya Yave." 
2Chronicles23:6 Ahikhaleru anaavolowe Mpaani mwa Yave ehikhanle asaserdoti* ni aLeevi eneera evolowe muteko; awosa evolowaseke niwoko aatteelihasiwa, vaheera asilopwana ootheene akina ewehexexeke yeeyo alamuleliwaaya ni Muluku." 
2Chronicles23:7 aLeevi ethataaneke emurukureenreene mwene, ootheene awo evarenleene ikapwitthi. Akhalaru mutthu anaavolowe Mpaani mwa Yave, mmwiiveke. Munghooleke mwene wakhalaru aneeraawe arowe.”" 
2Chronicles23:8 aLeevi ni asilopwana ootheene a oYuda yaapakasa ntoko aalamulenlaawe musaserdoti* Yehoyada. Khula mutthu aahaakuxa anakhottwaawe, okhuma yaawo yaavolowa mpaka yaawo yaakhuma, niwoko musaserdoti* Yehoyada khaatthunihenre opwaha wakhalaru mukuttula." 
2Chronicles23:9 Vano owo aahaavaha ahooleli a mikuttula sa anakhotto ncira mavaka ni ixikudu* sitokweene mpakatho sikhaani saari sa mwene Davide ni saaritho Mpaani mwa Muluku. 
2Chronicles23:10 Aahaathatasa anakhotto ootheene, khula nakhotto amvarenleene kapwitthi, emurukureenreene mwene, waattamela valtaarini* ni Mpaani mwa Yave, okhuma mpatta wa ohitto mpaka mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa Empa ya Yave." 
2Chronicles23:11 Yehoyada ni anamwanaawe asilopwana yaamukhumiha mwaana mulopwana a mwene, enangwarihasa ecireemba; yaamvaha ekaratta ya wiiraana, enamvara omwene, enamuttikitthela, ekhuwelaka: “Mwene woyee!”" 
2Chronicles23:12 Ataliya iiwaka onyakula wa muloko otthimakaka ni omutthapelaka mwene, aarowa Mpaani mwa Yave, mwemmo waaraayamo muloko." 
2Chronicles23:13 Iwe owo aamoona mwene eemenleene vamulako vanrimbuni. Asitokweene ni anamwiipa mapalapatta yaari muxerexere wa mwene, ni muloko wootheene waahakalala ni waahiipa mapalapatta; anamwiipa ekuxaleene ikarumasaya sa icipo, yaahoolela icipo. Vano Ataliya aahaahula soowarasawe, anakhuwela: “Koovarihiwa! Koovarihiwa!”" 
2Chronicles23:14 Musaserdoti* Yehoyada aahaalamulela ahooleli a mikuttula sa anakhotto ncira yaahoolela anakhotto: “Munkhumihere vaate eriyari ya misera, ni ngwiive ni ekatana ootheene yaawo eneera emutthare.” Vano musaserdoti* aaheera: “Muhimwiivele Mpaani mwa Yave.”" 
2Chronicles23:15 Hiiho awosa yaamutthukasa, enamurongha vaMulako wa Ikavalu*, vaate wa empa ya emwene, enamwiivelawo." 
2Chronicles23:16 Vano Yehoyada aahiiwananano owo, muloko ni mwene, weera yaamukhala muloko wa Yave." 
2Chronicles23:17 Vano muloko wootheene waarowa mpaani mwa Bahali*, enakurumula. Yaahaapwexakasa altaari* ni miluku, enamwiiva Matani, musaserdoti* a Bahali*, ohoolo wa altaari*." 
2Chronicles23:18 Yehoyada aahaavaha asaserdoti* aLeevi miteko sa Mpaani mwa Muluku, mwa yaawosa Davide aavanghaawe miteko Mpaani mwa Muluku. Mitekosaya saari ompakela Yave sooveleela soohisa, ntoko elempwalaaya munlamuloni na Moisesi, etthapaka ni yiipaka, ntoko Davide aalamulenlaawe." 
2Chronicles23:19 Aawiikaathitho anamalipelela mmilakoni sa Empa ya Yave, weera ahivoloweru akhalaru mutthu eera ahitteele." 
2Chronicles23:20 Aahaakuxa ahooleli a mikuttula sa anakhotto ncira, maneethi, alamuli a muloko ni muloko wootheene, anamukuxa mwene Mpaani mwa Muluku, amuronghaka empa ya emwene. Aavolowa empa ya emwene vaMulako wa Osulu, enamukilaathiha vahiceni ya emwene;" 
2Chronicles23:21 ni muloko wootheene waahakalala. Ataliya iiviweene ni ekatana esidade yaamaaleleya. 
2Chronicles24:1 Yowaxi aathatungwaawe mwene aarino iyaakha ithannapiili sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha miloko mixexe. Amayawe yiitthaniwa Zibiya; awo yaari muBerxeba." 
2Chronicles24:2 Musaserdoti* Yehoyada nlelo areene ni okumi, Yowaxi aapaka yeeyo onaakhulelaawe Yave." 
2Chronicles24:3 Owo aamuthanlela Yowaxi axaara eeli, ni owo aakhalano anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana." 
2Chronicles24:4 Eviraleene ehuhu ekina Yowaxi aalakela orasela Empa ya Yave. 
2Chronicles24:5 Owo aahaathukumanyiha asaserdoti* ni aLeevi, anaweerelasa: “Murowase musidadeni sa oYuda ni mwakuxase musoko wa khula eyaakha, oYixrayeli wootheene weera eraseliwe Empa ya Mulukwaanyu. Murowase vaanaano va!” Wa soothesene, aLeevi yaapisa orowa." 
2Chronicles24:6 Tivawo mwene aamwiitthannaawe Yehoyada, mutokweene a asaserdoti*, anamukoha: “Heeni muhaanyesereringhaanyu aLeevi weera eruuhe oYuda ni oYerusaleemu musoko waalamuleliwe ni Moisesi, murumeiyi a Yave wa muthukumano wa aYixrayeli, mwaha wa Eheema ya Arka* a wiiraana?”" 
2Chronicles24:7 Vekhaikhai Ataliya, muthiyana ootakhala ole, ni anamwanaawe asilopwana yaananariha Empa ya Muluku, mpakatho aavarela muteko ikarumasaya sootteelihiwa woowaalapano aBahali*." 
2Chronicles24:8 Vano, munlamuloni na mwene, yaapakasa ekaaxa eniikaathi vaate, vamulako wa Empa ya Yave." 
2Chronicles24:9 Woottharelana, waalaleiwa oYuda ni oYerusaleemu weera emuruuhele Yave musoko mwa yoowo Moisesi murumeiyi a Muluku aanyesereringhaawe aYixrayeli munikareni." 
2Chronicles24:10 Ahooleli ootheene ni muloko wootheene yaaruuha ni ohakalala micaangosaya, enahelasa mukaaxani mpaka osarihamo." 
2Chronicles24:11 Imaara sootheene aLeevi yaaronghaaya ekaaxa wa asitokweene a mwene, ni awosa yoonaaya weera yaakhala eparatha* yincipale, namalepa a empa ya emwene ni namwaalikela musurukhu a mutokweene a asaserdoti* yaamwiittha, enahokoloxa. Yannapaka hiiho khula nihuku enathukumanyiha eparatha* yincipale." 
2Chronicles24:12 Mwene ni Yehoyada yaawinnyerera eparatha* eyo asilopwana yaawehaweha miteko saatthuneya Mpaani mwa Yave. Awosa yaawiiwananano mapatarero ni makalipinteiru weera erasele Empa ya Muluku, ni yaavara muteko ni iyuuma ni ebronze* weera ereherere Eyo." 
2Chronicles24:13 Asilopwana yaawehaweha muteko yannavara nnenesene, moota wooweera muteko wa oreherera waaheetta nnenesene. Awosa yaarasela Empa ya Muluku ntoko yaaraaya woopacera, enalipihera." 
2Chronicles24:14 Emalihaleene, yaarongha eparatha* yaahanle eyo wa mwene ni wa Yehoyada, enapakeliwano soovarela muteko Mpaani mwa Yave: ikaruma soovarela muteko, ni wa sooveleela soohisa, ohiya itixela ni ikaruma sikina sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni sa eparatha*. Nlelo Yehoyada areene ni okumi, sooveleela soohisa saapwaherera opakeliwa Mpaani mwa Yave." 
2Chronicles24:15 Yehoyada okhwiiye uuluvalanxeene, areeneno iyaakha ncira ni miloko miraru sa oyariwawawe." 
2Chronicles24:16 Ovithiwe vamoha ni mamwene musidadeni ya Davide, mwa yooreera aapankaawe oYixrayeli, amweerelaka Muluku ni Empa ya Yave." 
2Chronicles24:17 Akhwiiyeene Yehoyada, ahooleli a oYuda yaarowasa wuuluma ni mwene enamuttittimiherela, ni owo aahaakhulela yeeyo yaahimmaaya." 
2Chronicles24:18 Vano, yaahiyasa Empa ya Yave, Muluku a makholowaaya, enakokhorela nyiri soothipeleliwa sa Axera, mpakatho miluku sikina. Isara sa Muluku saamorela oYuda ni oYerusaleemu niwoko na yoonanara ele." 
2Chronicles24:19 Yave aarimwaarumiharu maprofeeti wa muloko weera aahokoloxere wa Yoowo, ni maprofeeti yaarimwaathaliheraru otthuna wa Muluku, muloko khawaatthunne owiiwasa." 
2Chronicles24:20 Vano Munepa wa Muluku waamukhuruwela Zakariya, mwaana mulopwana a musaserdoti* Yehoyada. Owo aaheemela ohoolo wa muloko aneera: “Onghimaawe Muluk ti ela: ‘Heeni nyuwosa muhiniiwelelaanyu malamulo a Yave? Nyuwosa khasiweettelani nnene. Mweenre munghiya Yave, Owotho onimoohiyani.’ ”" 
2Chronicles24:21 Vaheera akina akina yaamvaanelela, ni munlamuloni na mwene, yaamvonya maluku mpaka okhwela vanipuwani na Empa ya Yave." 
2Chronicles24:22 Mwene Yowaxi khaapwatthenle weera Yehoyada, atithawe Zakariya, yaamoonihera murima wooreera, ni Zakariya aamwiiva mwaniye mulopwana. Vano Zakariya aakhwaawe, aakhuwela: “Yave, ooneke yeela ni apakeke ikukuttula!”" 
2Chronicles24:23 Ommaleloni wa eyaakha, anakhotto a awArami, yaamurowela Yowaxi, enavolowa oYuda ni oYerusaleemu, enawiiva ahooleli ootheene a muloko, enarumihela wa mwenaaya sootheene yaahuhunlaaya oDamasku."
