2Chronicles24:24 Yaarookhalaru vakhaani anakhotto awArami, Yave aawinnyerera mmatatanimwayasa anakhotto ancipale. Weenre oYuda wamuhiya Yave, Muluku a makholowaaya, Yowaxi aathorihiwa." 
2Chronicles24:25 awArami epwahanseene, yaamuhiyale Yowaxi avulalanxeene. Asitokweenaawe yaamvaanelelasa, niwoko owo aamwiiva mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyada, enamwiivelasa vabeettinivawe. Hiiho owo aahookhwa, anavithiwa musidadeni ya Davide, mene ohikhanle mmahiyeni a mamwene." 
2Chronicles24:26 Yaawo yaamvaanelenle yaari Zabadi, mwaana mulopwana a ngwAmoni muthiyana Ximeyate, ni Yeyozabate, mwaana mulopwana a mMowabe muthiyana Ximeriti." 
2Chronicles24:27 Nyaha sa anamwanaawe asilopwana, soothaliheriwa otthuna wa Muluku sincipale mwaha wa yoowo, ni soohimmwa sa oraseliwa wa Empa ya Muluku silempwale mulivuruni sa nyaha sa mamwene. Aamurandenle ti mwaniye mulopwana Amaziya." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amaziya aapaceraawe olamula, aarino iyaakha miloko miili niithanu sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha miloko miili niithanniixexe. Amayawe yiitthaniwa Yehowadini; awo yaari muYerusaleemu." 
2Chronicles25:2 Owo aapaka onaakhulelaawe Muluku, mene khoohiyono ni murima wootheene." 
2Chronicles25:3 Oonaka weera ori oolipeene vahiceni ya emwene, aalamulela wiiviwa asitokweene yaamwiivale mwene aari tiithaawe." 
2Chronicles25:4 Wa soothesene khaawiivale anamwane asilopwana a anamwiiva, attharihaka yeeyo elempwale munlamuloni, mulivuruni ya Moisesi, olamulenlaawemo Yave: “Asitiithi khaanaakhwela anamwanaaya, hata anamwane khaanaakhwela asitithaya; khula mutthu anaakhwele yootthekaawe.”" 
2Chronicles25:5 Amaziya aahaathukumanyiha asilopwana a oYuda, attharihaka imusisaya, aahaathanla asitokweene a anakhotto macira muloko ni a ncira wa oYuda ni oBenyamini wootheene. Vano, aawaalikela asilopwana ootheene yaarino opwaha iyaakha miloko miili, ni aahoona weera yaari asilopwana 300 000 oolikaneene owana, oowera ovarela nivaka ni ixikudu*." 
2Chronicles25:6 Aawiiwananatho anakhotto 100 000 ngwaalivani itonelada* tthaaru sa eparatha*. 
2Chronicles25:7 Vanonto, mulopwana mmoha a Muluku aarowa wa yoowo, anamweerela: “Ii! Amwene, anakhotto ala a oYixrayeli ehirowe ni nyuwo, niwoko Yave khakhanle ni aYixrayeli; khakhanleru ni a muloko wa Efrayimi." 
2Chronicles25:8 Naari murowaka ni ngwanaka oolipeene murima, Muluku onimoowinani ohoolo wa amwiittana, niwoko Owo onoowera owiniha ni ohiwiniha.”" 
2Chronicles25:9 Amaziya aamukoha mulopwana a Muluku: “Ankha itonelada* tthaaru iya kaalimvaaka anakhotto ala a oYixrayeli?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Yave onooweratho woovahani soowaata opwaha seiyo.” 
2Chronicles25:10 Vano Amaziya aahaahokoloxa anakhotto a wEfrayimi. Awosa yaahaanyoonyerasiwa aYuda, enarowasa oosareyeene isara." 
2Chronicles25:11 Amaziya aalipihaxa murimaawe, anaarowano anakhottwaawe mpaka munreyareyani na Maakha, aawiivalaawewo anakhotto macira macireene muloko a oSeyiri." 
2Chronicles25:12 Aahaavaratho akina macira macireene muloko, aaronghalaawe vasuluxa mwaako, anaakakhela vathi, ni ootheene awo yaanyaanyeya." 
2Chronicles25:13 Eyo eri hiho, anakhotto yaahokoloxiwe ni Amaziya ahaatthuniheraka orowa okhottoni, yaawanano isidade sa oYuda, okhuma oSamariya mpaka oBet-Horoni. Yaawiiva atthu macira miloko miraru, enakuxa soohuhula sincipale." 
2Chronicles25:14 Amaziya aahokolowaawe owaahononani awEdomi, aaruuha miluku sa muloko wa oSeyiri, mwa seiyo aakhalihalaawe milukusawe, aakokhorela, anahisera erubani*." 
2Chronicles25:15 Vano isara sa Yave saampattela Amaziya ni owo aamurumihela mprofeeti, aamweerenle mwene: “Munkoherelela heeni miluku sa muloko ola, mwa seiyo sihiwenre ovuluxa mulokwaaya xaxaxa?”" 
2Chronicles25:16 Vano owo uulumaka hiihaale, mwene aamukwituleliha: “Weeraka hiyo nohoothanlani okhala namalaka a mwene? Mmaale! Mmwiiveliweni?” Mprofeeti aamaala, mene aaheera: “Koosuwela weera Muluku oolakela ophwatiwawanyu, niwoko nyuwo moopaka sootheene iyo muhiiwelelaka olakawaka.”" 
2Chronicles25:17 Aakoherenreene anamalakaawe, Amaziya mwene a oYuda, aamurumihela anamitthenga Yehowaxi, mwaana mulopwana a Yehowahazi ni osuulu wa Yehu, mwene a oYixrayeli, ni mpikisaano ola: “Murwe mukiwanane.”" 
2Chronicles25:18 Wa soothesene, Yehowaxi aamwaakhula Amaziya: “Mwiri wa mwiiwa wa oLibanu waarumihela mutthenga mwiri wa esidari* ya oLibanu: ‘Munthelihe mwaninyu muthiyana ni mwanaka.’ Vaheera mwaamunama a ntuphi a oLibanu ohoorwa ananyikalasa mwiri wa mwiiwa." 
2Chronicles25:19 Nyuwo mohiixeerela weera mohaawina awEdomi, ni vano muniikuxerera ngwiixoonani. Mene mwakhale owaani! Muntannyerela heeni erisa eneera yooheleeni nthala nyuwo ni oYuda?”" 
2Chronicles25:20 Wa soothesene Amaziya khaatthunne omwiiwa, niwoko Muluku aatthuna weera amwinnyerere Amaziya ni mulokwaaweene wa Yehowaxi, niwoko yaatthara miruku sa miluku sa wEdomi." 
2Chronicles25:21 Vano Yehowaxi, mwene a oYixrayeli, aangwanano. Owo ni Amaziya, mwene a oYuda, yaawana oBet-Xemexi, mulaponi ya oYuda." 
2Chronicles25:22 aYuda yaawiniwa ni aYixrayeli, ni anakhottwaawe yaatthawela mmawannyaya." 
2Chronicles25:23 Yehowaxi aamvara Amaziya, mwaana mulopwana a Yowaxi ni osuulu wa Ahaziya oBeti-Xemexi. Vano Yehowaxi aamurongha oYerusaleemu, anakurumula exiri ya esidade, imeetru* ncira ni miloko mithannamiraru, okhuma mulako wa Efrayimi mpaka mulako wa vaNttuumbani." 
2Chronicles25:24 Owo aakuxa eyuuma yoorikaxa yootheene, eparatha* yootheene ni ikaruma sootheene saaphwanyiwe Mpaani mwa Muluku, saawehawehiwa ni Obedi-Edomi, mpakatho mihakhu sa empa ya emwene. Aahaakuxatho atthu akina akina ootthukiwa, anahokoleela oSamariya." 
2Chronicles25:25 Akhwiiyeene Yehowaxi, mwaana mulopwana a Yehowahazi, mwene a oYixrayeli, Amaziya mwaana mulopwana a Yehowaxi, mwene a oYuda, aakhalatho ni okumi iyaakha muloko niithanu." 
2Chronicles25:26 Sookhumelela sikina iyo sa moolamulani wa Amaziya, okhuma ompacereroni mpaka ommaleloni, silempwale mulivuruni sa nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda ni oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles25:27 Okhuma ehuhu Amaziya aahiyalaawe omutthara Yave, yaamvaanelelasa oYerusaleemu, ni owo aatthawela oLakixi, mene yaamuttharelelasa, enamwiivelawo." 
2Chronicles25:28 Muttembwaawe waahokoloxiwe mukavaluni*, anavithiwa vamoha ni makholowaawe, musidadeni ya oYuda." 
2Chronicles26:1 Vano muloko wootheene wa oYuda, waamvara omwene Uziya, vanipuroni na atithawe, areeneno iyaakha muloko niithannamosa sa oyariwawawe." 
2Chronicles26:2 Ti yoowo aawinne, anarasela esidade ya wElate wa oYuda, Amaziya avithiweene vamoha ni makholowaawe." 
2Chronicles26:3 Uziya aathatuwaawe mwene, aarino iyaakha muloko niithannamosa sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha miloko mithanu ni piili. Amayawe yaari muYerusaleemu, ni yiitthaniwa Yekoliya." 
2Chronicles26:4 Owo aapaka onaakhulelaawe Yave, ntoko aapankaawe Amaziya atithawe." 
2Chronicles26:5 Owo aamwaasa Muluku mweehuhuni ya okumi wa Zakariya, mwa yoowo aamuhusihale moomoovani Muluku. Mweehuhuni yootheene Uziya aamwaasaawe Yave, Muluku aamweettiherela nnene." 
2Chronicles26:6 Owo aarowa okhottoni waawanano aFilisti, anakurumula ixiri sa oGate, oYabene ni wAxidodi. Vahoolowaya, aateka isidade vakhiviru ni wAxidodi, mpakatho mapuro makina a elapo ya waFilisti." 
2Chronicles26:7 Muluku aamukhavihera waawanano aFilisti, awArabiya yaakhala oGuri-Bahali ni aMewuni." 
2Chronicles26:8 awAmoni yaamuliva musoko Uziya, ni epilaawe yaahiiwanyeya mpaka omwiinanoni wa wExipitu, niwoko aathatuwa ooweraxa." 
2Chronicles26:9 Uziya aateka itoore* soolipaxa oYerusaleemu, vamulako wa vaNttuumbani, mulako wa vaNreyareyani ni vanttuumbani na exiri." 
2Chronicles26:10 Aatekatho itoore* munikareni, anathipa ihime sincipale, niwoko owo aakhalano mihuwo sincipale vathi vathi wa mmattumuxani ni munghawalawani. Owo aakhalano anamiteko mmattamwawe ni imatta sa iwuuvasawe, mmattumuxani ni muthaadyirani, niwoko wannamusivela olima." 
2Chronicles26:11 Uziya aakhalano anakhotto oolikaneene owana, aakawanyihaka mikuttula mikuttula, attharihaka waatta wa anakhotto yaathukumanyihiwe ni namalepa Yehiyeli, ni mwa mutokweene Maaseya, elamuliwaka ni Hananiya, mmoha a asitokweene a mwene." 
2Chronicles26:12 Waatta wa mapwattapwattha a imusi yaalamula anakhotto moowanani waari 2 600. 
2Chronicles26:13 Anakhotto yaalamulasaaya yaari 307 500, oolikaneene owana, anakhotto ooweraxa yaamukhavihera mwene waawanano amwiittanaawe." 
2Chronicles26:14 Uziya aakhumiha ixikudu*, mavaka, ikapaseti, soowiixaakihera vakakasani, nyuura ni ikwambala soovonyera maluku wa anakhotto ootheene." 
2Chronicles26:15 Aapaka maakina oYerusaleemu, mwa yaawo yaapakiwe ni anamaratta weera evareliweke muteko mmatooreni* ni moowiixaakihera wa mmattuumbani. Vano maakina ale yaalatha nyuupa ni maluku matokotoko. Owo aakhaviheraxiwa, ni hiiho aathatuwa ooweraxa, ni epilaawe yaaphiya ottai." 
2Chronicles26:16 Wa soothesene, Uziya athatungweene ooweraxa, wiixoonawawe waammoroxa. Owo khaaroromeleiye wa Yave, Mulukwaawe, anavolowa Mpaani mwa Yave weera ahise erubani* valtaarini* a erubani*." 
2Chronicles26:17 Azariya, mutokweene a asaserdoti*, ni asaserdoti* akina a Yave, oolipaxa murima miloko mithannamiraru, yaamutthara ottuli." 
2Chronicles26:18 Awosa yaamululuwanano, enamweerelasa: “Khoontthuneya nyuwo Uziya omuhisera erubani* Yave. Muteko owo ti wa asaserdoti*, a ekhapira ya Aharoni, atteeliheriwe ohisa erubani*. Mvenye vaNipuroni Nootteela*, niwoko nyuwo khamuroromeleiye ni khamuttittimihiwa ni Yave, Muluku.”" 
2Chronicles26:19 Uziya avarenleene yoohisera erubani*, oolikaneene ohisa erubani*, aahaanyoonyeriwa asaserdoti*. Ehuhuweene yeeyo vamaithoniwaya, ohoolo wa altaari* a erubani* Mpaani mwa Yave, yaamukhuma maleepela vayuuciwawe." 
2Chronicles26:20 Azariya, mutokweene a asaserdoti*, ni asaserdoti* ootheene akinaawo, yoonakaru nleepela, yaamoomolasa woowaakuveya Mpaani mwa Yave. Vekhaikhai, owo muneenaawe aatthunaxa okhuma, niwoko Yave aamvulaliha." 
2Chronicles26:21 Mwene Uziya aahaawa makokho mpaka nihuku aakhwiiyaawe. Mweehuhuni yootheene eyo, aakhala empaawe meekhaawe, areene ni makokho ni ahivareleyaka muteko Mpaani mwa Yave. Yotami, mwaana mulopwana a Uziya, ti aawehaweha empa ya emwene, alamulaka muloko." 
2Chronicles26:22 Sookhumelela sikina iyo sa moolamulani wa Uziya, okhuma ompacereroni mpaka ommaleloni, silempwale ni mprofeeti Yesaya, mwaana mulopwana a Amosi." 
2Chronicles26:22 Sookhumelela sikina iyo sa moolamulani wa Uziya, okhuma ompacereroni mpaka ommaleloni, silempwale ni mprofeeti Yesaya, mwaana mulopwana a Amosi." 
2Chronicles26:23 Uziya aahookhwa, anavithiwa omahiyeni wa emwene, ohikhanle munihiyeni na emusi ya emwene, niwoko aari namakokho. Yotami, mwaniye mulopwana Uziya, ti aamurandenle." 
2Chronicles27:1 Yotami aapaceraawe olamula, aarino iyaakha miloko miili niithanu sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha muloko niithannamosa. Amayawe yiitthaniwa Yeruxa, mwaana muthiyana a Zadoki." 
2Chronicles27:2 Owo aapaka onaakhulelaawe Yave, ntoko yaapankaaya atithawe, vaheera ovirikanawaya, owo khaavolongwe Mpaani mwa Yave. Wa soothesene, muloko waapwaherera ni ipakelosaya soonanara." 
2Chronicles27:3 Yotami aapaka mulako mutokweene wa Empa ya Yave, anavaraxa miteko muxirini, mmattumuxani mwa Ofeli." 
2Chronicles27:4 Aateka isidade mmanyaakoni sa oYuda, mpakatho aapaka ntuphini itoore* soolipa ni sootthawelamo." 
2Chronicles27:5 Yotami aahaawanano awAmoni, anaawina. Vano awAmoni yaamuliva itonelada* 1 650 sa eparatha*, itonelada* 1 650 sa etrigu ni itonelada* 1 650 sa esevada*, mweehuhuni ya iyaakha tthaaru soottharana." 
2Chronicles27:6 Yotami aathatuwa ooweraxa, niwoko eetta oolipeene mootthunani wa Yave, Mulukwaawe." 
2Chronicles27:7 Sookhumelela sikina iyo sa olamula wa Yotami, vamoha ni owanawawe wootheene ni soopakasawe sikina iyo, silempwale mulivuruni sa nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli ni oYuda." 
2Chronicles27:8 Aapaceraawe olamula aarino iyaakha miloko miili niithanu sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha muloko niithannamosa." 
2Chronicles27:9 Yotami aahookhwa, anavithiwa vamoha ni makholowaawe musidadeni ya Davide. Aamurandenle ti mwaniye mulopwana Ahazi." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahazi aapaceraawe olamula, aarino iyaakha miloko miili sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha muloko niithannamosa. Ohiyanawaya ni Davide nikholonawe, khaapanke yeeyo onaakhulelaawe Yave." 
2Chronicles28:2 Owo aaheettela iphiro sa mamwene a oYixrayeli, anapaka miluku sa eyuuma, eerelaka waalapa aBahali*." 
2Chronicles28:3 Aapaka sooveleela soohisa mureyareyani na oBeni-Hinomi, mpakatho aahaapaka yooveleela anamwanaawe asilopwana, atakihaka ikhovelelo soothanyeya sa miloko oomonlaawe Yave ohoolo wa aYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles28:4 Aapakatho sooveleela ni aahisa erubani* mmanttumuxani ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina, vasulu mattumuxa ni vathi wa khula mwiri woopombaxa." 
2Chronicles28:5 Tivawo Yave, Mulukwaawe aawinnyerenraawe mmatatani mwa mwene a wAsiriya. awArami yaangwinasa, enaatthukasa atthu ancipale eriyari ya mulokwaawe, enaaronghasa oDamasku. Aahinnyereriwatho mwa aYixrayeli, mwa yaawo yaangwinanxe." 
2Chronicles28:6 Munihukuni nimoha, Peka mwaana mulopwana a Remaliya, aawiiva anakhotto 120 000 oolipaxa murima a oYuda, niwoko aYuda yaamuhiya Yave, Muluku a makholowaaya." 
2Chronicles28:7 Zikeri, nakhotto ngwEfrayimi, aamwiiva Maaseiya, mwaana mulopwana a mwene, Azerikami, mutokweene aawehaweha empa ya emwene, ni Elikana iiwananaxa ni mwene." 
2Chronicles28:8 aYixrayeli yaahaarongha oSamariya anamatthukiwa 200 000 asithiyana, amiravo ni asimwali a axunnaya aYuda. Aakuxatho soohuhula sincipale." 
2Chronicles28:9 Vaheera mprofeeti a Yave, iitthaniwa Obede, aari oSamariya, aavenya arowaka waakumanano anakhotto yaahokolowaaya oSamariya. Owo aaweerelasa: “Yave, Muluku a makholowaanyu, aanyoonyeriweene aYuda, aawinnyererasa mmatatanimwanyu. Vaheera nyuwo moowiiva woohaamorela ikharari moota wooweera Muluku ohoona." 
2Chronicles28:10 Vanonto nyuwosa muntthuna waapaka ipottha asilopwana ni asithiyana a oYuda ni oYerusaleemu! Nyuwosa mookhalanotho nthowa na omutthekela Yave, Mulukwaanyu." 
2Chronicles28:11 Vano, mukiiwe! Mwaahokoloxe axunninyu mwaapankaanyu anamatthukiwa, niwoko isara sa Muluku sohoomorelani.”" 
2Chronicles28:12 Hiiho, Azariya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehohanani, Berekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Mexilemote, Yehizekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Xalumi, ni Amasa, mwaana mulopwana a Hadelai, yaari asitokweene akina akina a Efrayimi, yaahaaluluwanano yaawo yaahokolowa okhottoni, eweerelaka:" 
2Chronicles28:13 “Muhaaruuhase va anamatthukiwa. Ohiyanawaya, nnookhalano nthowa ohoolo wa Yave. Nyuwosa muntthuna waandyeereratho yootthekaahu ni nthowanahu? Nthowanahu nri ntokotoko, ni mooro wa isarasawe woonimorela hiyo aYixrayeli.”" 
2Chronicles28:14 Vano anakhotto yaahaatapuxa anamatthukiwa, eniikaathi soohuhula vamaithoni wa ahooleli ni muthukumano wootheene." 
2Chronicles28:15 Asilopwana ala aromoliwe masinaaya, yaahaakuxasa anamatthukiwa ni soowara vamoha ni ikwakwaatta sa soohuhuliwa, enaawarihasa ootheene yaari tiriya. Yaahaavaha yooca, yoowura ni makhura ooreherera erutthu. Ootheene yaakhulumungwe yaahaawelihasa mwaabuuruni. Hiiho, yaahaahokoloxerasa mulaponimwaya yaakhalaayawo oYeriko, esidade ya mavare, enahokoleela oSamariya." 
2Chronicles28:16 Ehuhuweene yeele mwene Ahazi, aamurumihela anamitthenga mwene a wAsiriya weera amvekele ekhavihero." 
2Chronicles28:17 awEdomi yaahokoleelatho owana oYuda yaavaraka atthu," 
2Chronicles28:18 ni aFilisti yaawanano isidade vathi vathi wa mmanyaakoni ni mpatta wa ohitto wa oYuda. Yaawina enaakamela oBeti-Xemexi, wAyaloni ni oGederoti mpakatho oSoko, oTimena ni oGimezo, vamoha ni mittetthesaya." 
2Chronicles28:19 Yave aayeviha oYuda niwoko na Ahazi, mwene a oYixrayeli, mwaha wa weettelawawe yeeyo yahaakhoveleliwe oYuda, ahiroromeleyaxaka wa Yave." 
2Chronicles28:20 Aaphiyalaawe Tigelate-Pileseri, mwene a wAsiriya, ohiya omukhavihera, owo aamutannyenre milattu." 
2Chronicles28:21 Ahazi aakuxa itthu ikina ikina sa Mpaani mwa Yave, empa ya emwene ni sa ahooleli, anamvaha mwene a wAsiriya, mene eyo khayaavareleiye muteko." 
2Chronicles28:22 Naari ehuhuweene yeeyo owo aavireene mmakacamihoni, mwene Ahazi aamweera otepa ohiroromeleya wa Yave." 
2Chronicles28:23 Owo aapakela sooveleela miluku sa oDamasku mwa seiyo saangwinne, niwoko uupuwela: “Seenre miluku sa oSamariya saakhavihera, kinoopakela sooveleela weera sikikhavihere miyotho.” Vaheera iyo saamutannyenre oheleya nthala owo ni aYixrayeli ootheene." 
2Chronicles28:24 Ahazi aathukumanyiha ikaruma sa Mpaani mwa Muluku, anakhumihamo. Aawala milako sa Empa ya Yave, anaateka altaari* mmattuumbani moothemwene a oYerusaleemu." 
2Chronicles28:25 Aateka mapuro oolapa miluku sikina musidadeni sootheene sa oYuda weera apakele sooveleela miluku sikina, atannyaka isara sa Muluku a makholowaawe." 
2Chronicles28:26 Sookhumelela sikina iyo sa olamulawawe ni mitekosawe sootheene, okhuma ompacereroni mpaka ommaleloni, silempwale mulivuruni sa nyaha sa mamwene a oYuda ni oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles28:27 Ahazi aahookhwa, anavithiwa vamoha ni makholowaawe musidadeni ya oYerusaleemu, mene khoohiyono mmahiyeni a mamwene a oYixrayeli. Aamurandenle ti mwaniye mulopwana Hezekiya." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekiya aapaceraawe olamula, aarino iyaakha miloko miili niithanu sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha miloko miili niithanniixexe. Amayawe yiitthaniwa Abiya, mwaana muthiyana a Zakariya." 
2Chronicles29:2 Owo aapaka onaakhulelaawe Yave, ntoko aapankaawe Davide nikholo na Hezekiya." 
2Chronicles29:3 Vamweerini woopacera wa eyaakha yoopacera ya olamulawawe, owo aahula masele a Empa ya Yave, anarasela." 
2Chronicles29:4 Aawiitthana asaserdoti* ni aLeevi, anaathukumanyiha vanipuwani na mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa," 
2Chronicles29:5 aneera: “aLeevi mukiwiriyane! Vano mwiitteelihase nyuwosa ni Empa ya Yave, Muluku a makholowaanyu. Mvenxe vaNipuroni Nootteela* yeeyo eri yoohitteela." 
2Chronicles29:6 Asitithihu khayaaroromeleiye; yaapakasa yoonanara vamaithoni wa Yave, Mulukwaahu, enamuhiyasa. Yaahuluxa ekhove vanipuroni omankaawe Yave, enamurerasa ettuli." 
2Chronicles29:7 Yaawalatho masele a nipithela*, enacipiha soomwaleela. Khayaahinse erubani*, hata khayaapanke sooveleela soohisa vaNipuroni Nootteela* wa Muluku a oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles29:8 Tivawo, isara sa Yave simorenlaaya oYuda ni oYerusaleemu; ni Owo ootatuxawo etthu yootutuxa, yoowoopiha ni yootthebwano, ntoko nyuwosa munoonaanyu ni maithwaanyu." 
2Chronicles29:9 Tivawo asitithihu yiiviwaaya ni ekatana, ni anamwaniihu asilopwana ni asithiyana vamoha ni axaarihu, akuxiwaaya ntoko anamatthukiwa." 
2Chronicles29:10 Vano, kintthuna omwiiraanano Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, weera mooro wa isarasawe, asusihe wa hiyo." 
2Chronicles29:11 Anamwanaaka, muhikhalase oohipwatthela, niwoko Yave oothanlaleni weera mweemele ohoolowawe ni munrumeele, aani murumeele ohoolowawe ni muhise erubani*.”" 
2Chronicles29:12 Vano aLeevi yaapacera ovara muteko: ya aKohati: Mahate, mwaana mulopwana a Amasai, ni Yoweli mwaana mulopwana a Azariya; ya aMerari: Kixi, mwaana mulopwana a Abedi, ni Azariya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehaleleli; ya aGerexoni: Yowa, mwaana mulopwana a Zima, ni Edeni, mwaana mulopwana a Yowa;" 
2Chronicles29:13 ya ekhapira ya Elizafani: Ximeri ni Yehiyeli; eriyari ya ekhapira ya Asafi: Zakariya ni Mataniya; 
2Chronicles29:14 eriyari ya ekhapira ya Hemani: Yehiyeli ni Ximeyi; eriyari ya ekhapira ya Yedutuni: Xemaya ni Uziyeli. 
2Chronicles29:15 Aathukumanyingheene amusaawe ni yiitteelingheene, aLeevi yaarowasa otteeliha empa ya Yave, ntoko aalamulenlaawe mwene, ngwiiwelelani masu a Yave." 
2Chronicles29:16 Asaserdoti* yaavolowasa vaNipuroni Nootteela* na Yave weera etteelihe, ni yaaruuha vanipuwani na Empa ya Yave itthu soohitteela sootheene saarimo. Vano aLeevi yaaronghasa onreyareyani na oKideroni." 
2Chronicles29:17 Yaapacenre otteeliha vanihukuni noopacera na mweeri woopacera ni vanihukuni nanaathannaararu, yaaphiyaaya vanipithelani* na Yave. Mmahukunitho mathannamararu yaatteeliha Empa ya Yave. Sootheene saamalihiwe vanihukuni nanaamuloko ni mathannamosa na mweeri woopacera." 
2Chronicles29:18 Vahoolowaya yaarowasa wuuluma ni mwene Hezekiya, enamuthaliherasa: “Nootteeliha Empa ya Yave yootheene, altaari* a sooveleela soohisa ni meesa a epaawu yootteelihiwa, soopiili iyo ni ikarumasayasene." 
2Chronicles29:19 Nooreherera nnatteeliha ikaruma sootheene mwene Ahazi moohiroromeleyanimwawe aakhumihalaawe mweehuhuni ya olamulawawe. Iyo siri ohoolo wa altaari* a Yave.” 
2Chronicles29:20 Oxeexeloxa wa waaxiiye, mwene Hezekiya aahaathukumanyiha ahooleli a esidade, ni vamoha yaavolowa Mpaani mwa Yave." 
2Chronicles29:21 Yaahaakuxa aximombe athanneeli, anapunci a ikhondoolo athanneeli, iputtiputthi ilopwana ithannapiili ni anapunci athanneeli a ipuri ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka emweerelaka mwene, Nipuro Nootteela* ni oYuda. Mwene aalamulela weera asaserdoti*, a ekhapira ya Aharoni, yaaveleele axinama ale valtaarini* a Yave." 
2Chronicles29:22 Vano, asaserdoti* yaawiiva aximombe, enamisera ephome valtaarini*; woottharelana, yaapakatho hiiho ni anapunci a ikhondoolo ni iputtiputthi." 
2Chronicles29:23 Vahoolowaya anapunci a ipuri ooveleelela yoottheka yaaronghiwa ohoolo wa mwene ni wa muthukumano, enawiikaatherasa matata." 
2Chronicles29:24 Asaserdoti* yaawiiva anapunci a ipuri, enarongha ephome valtaarini* ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka weera yaarehererele wiiwanana ni Yave aYixrayeli ootheene, niwoko mwene aalamulela yooveleela yoohisa ni yooveleelela yoottheka aweerelaka aYixrayeli ootheene." 
2Chronicles29:25 Mwene aahaathata aLeevi Mpaani mwa Yave ekuxaleene ikengere, amakita ni atthakare ntoko aalamulenlaawe Davide, Gadi, namoonihera* a mwene, ni mprofeeti Natani; yeeyo yaalamuleliwe ni Yave, mwa maprofeetaawe." 
2Chronicles29:26 Hiiho, aLeevi yaaheemela oolikaneene ni ikaruma sa Davide, ni asaserdoti* ekuxaleene mapalapatta." 
2Chronicles29:27 Vano Hezekiya aalamulela weera epakele yooveleela valtaarini*. Sipaceraka opakiwa sooveleela, saapaceratho wiipiwa icipo soomvuwiha Yave, moorumani wa mapalapatta ni ikaruma sa Davide, mwene a oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles29:28 Muthukumano wootheene waakokhora olapaka, anacipo yiipaka icipo ni anamapalapatta yiipaka mapalapatta, mpaka saamalihiwaaya opakiwa sooveleela soohisa." 
2Chronicles29:29 Simalihiweene sooveleela, mwene ni ootheene yaariwo, yaakokhora enamulapa." 
2Chronicles29:30 Mwene Hezekiya ni asitokweenaawe yaahaalamulela aLeevi weera emvuwihe Yave ni masu a Davide ni a namoonihera* Asafi. Awosa, yaamvuwihasa ni ohakalala, ni yaahuuramasa, enamulapa." 
2Chronicles29:31 Vano Hezekiya aaheera: “Mweenre mwiitteeliherasa Yave, muruuhe sooveleela ni soovaha sootthapela Empa ya Yave.” Hiiho, muloko waakuxa sooveleela ni soovaha sootthapela, ni yaakuxatho sooveleela soohisa ni otthunawaya." 
2Chronicles29:32 Sooveleela soohisa iye muthukumano waamveleelenlaaya Yave saari imombe miloko mithannamiili, anapunci a ikhondoolo ncira ni iputtiputthi ilopwana macira meeli." 
2Chronicles29:33 Axinama yaatteelihiwe ntoko sooveleela yaaphiyera imombe macira mathannamosa, vamoha ni ikhondoolo ni anapunci a ipuri macira miloko miraru." 
2Chronicles29:34 Yeenre asaserdoti* yakhalaxa vakhaani weera epere ixapala sa sooveleela soohisa sootheene, amusaaya aLeevi yaahaakhaviherasa mpaka omalihiwa muteko, ni mpaka asaserdoti* akina yiitteelihaaya, niwoko aLeevi yaakhalela nthiti wiitteeliha woorowa orumeela waapwaha asaserdoti*." 
2Chronicles29:35 Saahaattaxa sooveleela soohisa, saaveleeliwe vamoha ni makhura a sooveleelela murettele ni sa soowura, saatthariheliwa sooveleela soohisa iye. Hiiho, waakhalihiwa muteko wa Mpaani mwa Yave." 
2Chronicles29:36 Hezekiya ni muloko wootheene waatthapela yeeyo Muluku aapakenlaawe mulokwaawe, niwoko sootheene iyo seereiye woowaakuveya." 
2Chronicles30:1 Hezekiya aahaarumihela mutthenga aYixrayeli ni aYuda ootheene, ni aahaalepelatho ikaratta awEfrayimi ni aManaxe, aalattulaka weera erwe Mpaani mwa Yave oYerusaleemu, ni empake mPaska* a Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles30:2 Mwene, asitokweene ni muloko wootheene wa oYerusaleemu, yaalakelasa ompaka mPaska* vamweerini wanaaveeli." 
2Chronicles30:3 Khawaawereiye ompaka vanihukuni naahimmwale, niwoko asaserdoti* yaatteelihiwe, khayaattiye, ni muloko khawaathukumanne oYerusaleemu." 
2Chronicles30:4 Muupuwelo ole waari ntoko wooreera wa mwene mpakatho wa muthukumano. 
2Chronicles30:5 Vano yaalakela olaleiwa oYixrayeli wootheene, okhuma oBerxeba mpaka oDani, olattuliwaka muloko weera orowe oYerusaleemu weera apakiwe mPaska* a Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli. Vano, ancipale khayaampanke ettharihaka moota waalempwalaaya." 
2Chronicles30:6 Munlamuloni na mwene, anamitthenga yaaviravira oYixrayeli ni oYuda wootheene, ekuxaleene ikaratta soottittiwa ni mwene nitho asitokweenaawe, ni mutthenga ola: “aYixrayeli, muhokoleele wa Yave, Muluku a Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yixrayeli, weera Owo ahokoleele wa nyuwosa muhanle ni moopongwe mmatatani mwa mwene a wAsiriya." 
2Chronicles30:7 Muhikhale ntoko asitithinyu ni axunninyu yahaaroromeleiye wa Yave, Muluku a makholowaaya, moota wooweera Owo aahaahiya ephwateiyeene ntoko nyuwosa munoonaanyu." 
2Chronicles30:8 Vanonto, muhikhale attiyamaaru ntoko makholowaanyu; mwiixinnyerere wa Yave. Murwaase vaNipuroni Nootteela* Owo otteelihalaawe wa mahuku ootheene. Munrumeele Yave, Mulukwaanyu, weera mooro wa isarasawe woohuluweni." 
2Chronicles30:9 Nyuwosa mwahokoleela wa Yave, yaawo yaavanre axunninyu ni anamwaniinyu, animwaamorelasa ikharari, ni awosa anoohokoleela elapo ela, niwoko Yave, Mulukwaanyu, ti ooreera murima, ni oosareya ikharari. Owo khookhoottani nyuwosa mwahokoleelasa wa Yoowo.”" 
2Chronicles30:10 Anamitthenga yaaviravirasa esidade ti esidade, wEfrayimi ni oManaxe, ni mpakatho oZebuloni, vaheera muloko waahaatheyasa, owuulihihaka muru." 
2Chronicles30:11 Vanonto, asilopwana akina akina a wAxeri, a oManaxe ni a oZebulomi, yaahiiyevihasa, enarowasa oYerusaleemu." 
2Chronicles30:12 oYuda, ntata na Muluku naari mwa muloko aavahaka wiiwanana mmuupuweloni weera ekwanihere yeeyo mwene ni asitokweenaawe yaalamulenlaaya, ettharihaka masu a Yave." 
2Chronicles30:13 Nakupa mutokotoko aathukumana oYerusaleemu vamweerini wanaaveeli, weera epake efesta ya epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu." 
2Chronicles30:14 Awosa yaahaavenxa altaari* yaari oYerusaleemu, enaaphwata altaari* ootheene a erubani*, yaavonyeraka mureyareyani na oKidroni." 
2Chronicles30:15 Yaahiiva eputtiputthi ya mPaska* vanihukuni nanaamuloko ni maxexe na mweeri wanaaveeli. Asaserdoti* ni aLeevi oowuulihiheyeene muru, yaahiitteelihasa, enaruuha Mpaani mwa Yave sooveleela soohisa." 
2Chronicles30:16 Yaakhalasa mmapuronimwaya ntoko ehimmwalaaya munlamuloni na Moisesi, mulopwana a Muluku. Asaserdoti* yaamisa ephome yaavahiwaaya ni aLeevi." 
2Chronicles30:17 Yeenre ancipale a nakupa yahitteelihiwa, waatthuneya aLeevi wiiva iputtiputthi sa mPaska* wa ootheene yahaatteelihiwe, ni hiiho khawaawereya omutteelihera Yave iputtiputthisaya." 
2Chronicles30:18 Yaarimweeraru ancipale yaakhumelenle wEfrayimi, oManaxe, wIsakari ni oZebuloni ehiitteelinghe, yaamuca mPaska*, evirikanyihaka yeeyo yaalempwale. Mene Hezekiya aahaavekelelasa, eeraka: “Yave ori a murima wooreera aalevelele yaawo" 
2Chronicles30:19 aninnyerera murimaaya omwaasa Muluku a makholowaaya, naari ehitteenle ntoko ontthuneyaaya vaNipuroni Nootteela*.”" 
2Chronicles30:20 Hiiho, Yave aahiiwa nivekelo na Hezekiya ni aalevelela muloko." 
2Chronicles30:21 aYixrayeli yaarwiiye oYerusaleemu, yaapaka ni ohakalala efesta ya epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu mweehuhuni ya mahuku mathannameeli. Khula nihuku, aLeevi ni asaserdoti* yaamwiipela icipo Yave moorumani mwa ikaruma sa Yave." 
2Chronicles30:22 Hezekiya aahaavaha masu ooreeraxa aLeevi ootheene yoonihenre wiiwexexa wooreera wa moota woomurumeela Yave. Mmahukuni mathannameeli awosa yaahooca sa sooveleela, enapaka sooveleelela murettele, enamutthapela Yave, Muluku a makholowaaya." 
2Chronicles30:23 Muthukumano wootheene waalakela opwahereriha efesta mmahukuni mathannameelitho, ni yaapakasa hiiho ni ohakalala." 
2Chronicles30:24 Hezekiya mwene a oYuda, aavaha muthukumano aximombe macira muloko, ikhondoolo ni anapunci a ipuri macira miloko mathannameeli, ni ahooleli yaavaha muthukumano aximombe macira muloko ni ikhondoolo vamoha ni anapunci a ipuri macira macireene muloko. Asaserdoti* ancipale yaahiitteelihasa." 
2Chronicles30:25 Muthukumano wootheene wa oYuda waatthapa vamoha ni asaserdoti*, aLeevi ni ootheene yaathukumanne ekhumelelaka oYixrayeli, vamoha ni anamarwa yaarwiiye oYixrayeli ni yaakhala oYuda." 
2Chronicles30:26 Waakhala ohakalalaxa oYerusaleemu, niwoko okhuma mmahukuni a Salomoni, mwaana mulopwana a Davide, mwene a oYixrayeli, kheeneereiye etthu ntoko yeele musidadeni." 
2Chronicles30:27 Asaserdoti* ni aLeevi yaaheemelasa weera ereelihe muloko, ni Muluku aawiiwa; mavekelowaaya yaaphiya wiirimu, woomakawawe wootteela." 
2Chronicles31:1 Emanleene efesta, aYixrayeli yaari ofestani yaakhumelasa musidadeni sa oYuda, enapwexakasa maluku ootteeliheriwa, enaphwata nyiri soothipeleliwa sa Axera. Awosa yaahaaphwata altaari* a miluku soowootha sa oYuda ni oBenyamini wootheene nitho wEfrayimi ni oManaxe. Ephwanteene sootheene, yaahokoleela musidadenimwaya, khula mutthu arowaka owannyawe." 
2Chronicles31:2 Hezekiya aahaathanla asaserdoti* ni aLeevi moorandelanani, khula mutthu ni sootthuneyasawe: opaka sooveleela soohisa ni sa murettele, orumeela, otthapela ni wiipa icipo soomvuwiha mmilakoni sa woomaka wa Yave." 
2Chronicles31:3 Mwene aacaanga sooreelasawe wa sooveleela soohisa sa oxeexelo ni oxekuwa, ni wa sooveleela soohisa, wa iSaabadu, wa nyeeri sinyowani ni wa ifesta soothanliwa, ntoko elempwalaaya munlamuloni na Yave." 
2Chronicles31:4 Owo aalamulela muloko wa oYerusaleemu weera waavahe asaserdoti* ni aLeevi yeeyo yaari yawaya, weera ewere wiitteelihera Nlamulo na Yave." 
2Chronicles31:5 Alaleiyeene nlamulo nna, aYixrayeli yaavahaxa mpatta woopacera wa etrigu, eviinyu, makhura, oravo ni sootheene saaruweriwe mmatta. Yaaruuha sanaamuloko sa sootheene. Iyo saari sincipalexa." 
2Chronicles31:6 Amaki a oYixrayeli ni oYuda yaakhala isidade sa oYuda, yaaruuhatho sanaamuloko sa mihuwosaya sootheene ni sa itthu sootteelihiwa eereliwaka Yave, Mulukwaaya, ethukumanyihaka mmapuroni mancipale." 
2Chronicles31:7 Yaapacenre opaka yeeyo vamweerini wanaararu, enamaliha vamweerini wanaathannamiili." 
2Chronicles31:8 Hezekiya ni asitokweenaawe yaaphiyalaaya yoonaka saathukumanyihiwaayamo soovaha, yaamvuwiha Yave, enaareeliha aYixrayeli, mulokwaaya." 
2Chronicles31:9 Hezekiya aahaakoha asaserdoti* ni aLeevi mwaha wa soovaha iye 
2Chronicles31:10 ni mutokweene a asaserdoti* Azariya, a emusi ya Zadoki, aamwaakhula: “Okhuma opacenraaya oruuha muloko micaangosaya Mpaani mwa Yave, nookhalano yookwana oca ni nlelo yookhala yincipale, niwoko Yave ooreeliha mulokwaawe, ni ela ti yincipale ehanle.”" 
2Chronicles31:11 Hezekiya aalamulela weera ereherere moothokorora Mpaani mwa Yave ni yaapakiwa hiiho. 
2Chronicles31:12 Vano yaaruuha oororomeleyeene micaango, sanaamuloko ni soovaha sootteelihiwa. muLeevi Konaniya ti aawehaweha sootthuneya iye, akhaviheriwaka ni munneiye Ximeyi." 
2Chronicles31:13 Yehiyeli, Azariya, Nahati, Asaheli, Yeremoti, Yozabade, Eliyeli, Ismakiya, Mahate ni Benaya, yaari anamawehaweha yaalamuliwa ni Konaniya vamoha ni munneiye Ximeyi, yaathanliwe ni mwene Hezekiya ni Azariya, mutokweene aawehaweha Empa ya Muluku." 
2Chronicles31:14 Kore, mwaana mulopwana a muLeevi Imena, namalipelela a mulako wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, ti aawehaweha soovaha ni otthuna saapakeliwe Muluku, akawaka micaango aatteeliheriwaawe Yave ni soovaha sootteelaxa." 
2Chronicles31:15 Edeni, Miniyamimi, Yexuwa, Xemaiya, Amariya ni Xekaniya yaamukhavihera moota woororomeleya, musidadeni sa asaserdoti*, yaakawelaka soovaha asaserdoti* asikhwaaya, ettharihaka orandelana yeeraaya, ekhalaka oowuuluvala naari amiravo." 
2Chronicles31:16 Awosa yaakawela asilopwana ni anamwane asilopwana a iyaakha tthaaru woorowa ohoolo, mwa yaawo masinaaya yaalempwale munamalepelani a ikhapira – ootheene yeera evolowe Mpaani mwa Yave, weera evare mitekosaya sa khula nihuku, ettharihaka sootthuneyasaya ni orandelanawaya." 
2Chronicles31:17 Namalepela a mukhapirani sa asaserdoti* aapakiwa sittharihiwaka imusisaya; ni namalepela a aLeevi oopwaha iyaakha miloko miili sittharihiwaka sootthuneyasaya ni orandelanawaya. 
2Chronicles31:18 Munamalepelani, yaalikeliwa anamwane asikhaani, asithiyana, anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana a mukuttula wootheene, niwoko asaserdoti* ni aLeevi yaaroromeleya mootteelihanimwaya." 
2Chronicles31:19 Eriyari ya asaserdoti*, ekhapira ya Aharoni, yaakhala mulaponi mwaacihiwamo muxerexere wa isidadesaya, yaathanliwa asilopwana akina akina, esidade ti esidade, weera yaakawele soovaha asaserdoti* asilopwana ootheene, ni ootheene yaawo yaalepeliwe mukhapirani sa aLeevi." 
2Chronicles31:20 Ti yeeyo aapankaawe Hezekiya moomweneni wootheene wa oYuda. Owo aapaka yeeyo yaari yooreera ni yoowookoleleya ni aaroromeleya wa sootheene vamaithoni wa Yave, Mulukwaawe." 
2Chronicles31:21 Sootheene owo aapakaawe Mpaani mwa Muluku, ni ngwiiwelelani ikano ni malamulo, owo aamwaasa Mulukwaawe, avaraka ni murima wootheene. Tivawo saamweettelaaya nnenesene." 
2Chronicles32:1 Vahoolo wa sootheene Hezekiya aapankaawe moororomeleyaxani, Senakeribi mwene a wAsiriya, aavolowa oYuda, anarica isidade soolipihiwa weera awine." 
2Chronicles32:2 Hezekiya oonaka weera Senakeribi aatthuna owanano oYerusaleemu," 
2Chronicles32:3 aahaakoherera asitokweenaawe ni asitokweene a anakhotto, moota woottiya yaaviraayamo maahi a anaattuuttu a mpatta wa okerekhere wa esidade; ni awosa yaahaakhulela." 
2Chronicles32:4 Hiiho yaathukumana asilopwana ancipale, enaawalasa anaattuuttu ootheene ni nxaapwa nivinre mulaponi. Awosa yeera: “Nnaahiyere heeni mamwene a wAsiriya ewaaka ni ephwanyaka maahi ootheene ala?”" 
2Chronicles32:5 Vahoolowaya, alipihaleene murima, aarasela ixiri sootheene saakurumungwe, anateka itooresaya*. Aapakatho exiri ekina mpatta wa omokoni wa yoopacera, analipihera itarato sa esidade ya Davide; aalamulelatho ohaniwa mavaka ni ixikudu* sincipaletho." 
2Chronicles32:6 Aathanlela muloko asitokweene a anakhotto, anaathukumanyiha vanipuwani, vamulako wa esidade, aalipiherakano masu ala:" 
2Chronicles32:7 “Mukhale oolipa ni mminye murima. Muhoove hata muhiporore mwaha wa mwene a wAsiriya ni wa anakhottwaawe ancipale, niwoko hiyo nookhalano Mmoha ooweraxa opwaha owerawaya." 
2Chronicles32:8 Awosa arino paahi owera wa omutthu, vaheera Yave, Mulukwaahu, ori ni hiyo weera anikhavihere ni awane ekhottwaahu.” Muloko waalipiha murima ni masu a Hezekiya, mwene a oYuda." 
2Chronicles32:9 Vahoolowaya, Senakeribi, mwene a wAsiriya ni anakhottwaawe ootheene ericaka oLakixi, aahaaruma asitokweene orowa oYerusaleemu ni mutthenga ola wa Hezekiya, mwene a oYuda, ni wa muloko wootheene waakhalawo:" 
2Chronicles32:10 “Senakeribi mwene a wAsiriya oneera ha: Munroromela heeni oYerusaleemu oriciweene? 
2Chronicles32:11 Hezekiya eeraawe: ‘Yave, Mulukwaahu, onoonivuluxa mmatatani mwa mwene a wAsiriya,’ owo onimweera woolokotthani, weera oohiyeeni mukhwaaka etala ni ntthona." 
2Chronicles32:12 Vano khahiyono Hezekiya muneenaawe aavenxale altaari* a miluku iyo, aweerelaka aYuda ni aYerusaleemu: ‘Nyuwosa mulapeke valtaarini* amoharu paahi ni muhiserekewo erubani’?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Nyuwosa khamusuwenle yeeyo miyo ni makholowaaka nimpakelaahu miloko sootheene sa ilapo ikina? Weeraka miluku sa miloko iyo saatoko waatapuxa mulaponimwaya mmatatanimwaka? 
2Chronicles32:14 Wa miluku sootheene sa miloko siphwatingwe ni makholowaaka, muluku heeni wa seiyo owenre ovuluxa mulokwaawe mmatatanimwaka? Vanonto moota heeni Mulukwaanyu aneeraawe awere wootapuxani mmatatanimwaka?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Tivawo muhimuhiye Hezekiya oolokotthakani hoye hoye oohapuxakani mooteene yoowo. Muhimwaakhulele, niwoko khoowoworu muluku wa wakhalaru muloko hoye hoye mwene otonke owera otapuxa mulokwaawe mmatatanimwaka ni wa makholowaaka. Wootepaxa Mulukwaanyu khawera wootapuxani mmatatanimwaka!”" 
2Chronicles32:16 Asitokweene a Senakeribi yannamuruwana Yave, Muluku, ni Hezekiya murumeiyi a Yave." 
2Chronicles32:17 Senakeribi aalepatho ekaratta amuruwanaka Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli ni mpikisaano ola: “Mooteene yoowo miluku sa miloko sa ilapo sikina sihitapunxaaya milokosaya mmatatanimwaka, Muluku a Hezekiya khatapuxatho mulokwaawe mmatatanimwaka.”" 
2Chronicles32:18 Vano asitokweene awAsiriya yaakhuwelela vaHeberi muloko wa oYerusaleemu waari vaxirini, weera emututuxe ni emoopopihe yeerelaka owina esidade." 
2Chronicles32:19 Yaahima sa Muluku a oYerusaleemu emulikanxeraka miluku sa miloko sikina sa mulaponi sipakingwe ni atthu. 
2Chronicles32:20 Niwoko na sootheene iyo, Hezekiya ni mprofeeti Yesaya, mwaana mulopwana a Amosi, yaakhuwelela wiirimu evekelaka." 
2Chronicles32:20 Niwoko na sootheene iyo, Hezekiya ni mprofeeti Yesaya, mwaana mulopwana a Amosi, yaakhuwelela wiirimu evekelaka." 
2Chronicles32:21 Yave aamurumiha ndyelo aawiivale anakhotto ootheene yaawana, ni ahooleli ootheene ni asitokweene waakonelingwe wa mwene a wAsiriya, moota wooweera owo aavenyawo oowuulihiheyeene muru arowaka elapwaawe. Nihuku nimoha, avolowaka mpaani mwa mulukwaawe, akina akina a anamwanaawe yaamwiiva ni ekatana." 
2Chronicles32:22 Hiiho, Yave aamvuluxa Hezekiya ni muloko wa oYerusaleemu mmatatani mwa Senakeribi, mwene a wAsiriya, ni mwa miloko sootheene sikina. Aahaakiha nyiinanosawe sootheene." 
2Chronicles32:23 Ancipale yaaruuha oYerusaleemu soomvaha Yave, ni sooreerela wa Hezekiya, mwene a oYuda. Okhuma ehuhuweene yeele woorowa ohoolo, owo aattittimihaxiwa ni miloko sootheene." 
2Chronicles32:24 Ehuhuweene yeele, Hezekiya aavoreiwa ohaleela okhwa. Owo aamvekela Yave, mwa Yoowo aamwaakhunle, amvahaka eneneero yootikhiniha." 
2Chronicles32:25 Vaheera Hezekiya aathatuwa oowiixoona, ohicelanaka onnene aapakeliwaawe; tivawo isara sa Yave saammorenlaaya owo, oYuda ni oYerusaleemu." 
2Chronicles32:26 Vano Hezekiya aahiiyeviha, oonelelaka wiixoonawawe, mpakatho muloko wa oYerusaleemu; tivawo isara sa Yave sahaamorenlaaya wa muloko, moolamulani wa Hezekiya." 
2Chronicles32:27 Hezekiya aathadyireyaxa ni aavuwa; aapaka moosungamo eparatha*, eyuuma yoorikaxa, maluku oowaaraxa, itthu sooreerela, ixikudu* ni moota wootheene wa itthu sooreerela." 
2Chronicles32:28 Aapakatho matatha oosungamo etrigu, eviinyu ni makhura; aatekelatho makhoola wa mihuwosawe soohiyanahiyana vamoha ni ikhondoolosawetho." 
2Chronicles32:29 Aateka isidade, anakhalano mihuwo sincipale, niwoko Muluku aamvahaxa mihakhu soowaattaxa." 
2Chronicles32:30 Ti Hezekiya aalamulenle owaliwa ehime ya oGihoni, mpatta wa osulu, weera avirihe maahi vathi vathi, erowaka mpatta wa ninkela nsuwa wa esidade ya Davide. Hezekiya saamweettela nnenesene sootheene aapakaawe." 
2Chronicles32:31 Vaheera alamuli a oBabiloniya yaarumihalaaya anamitthenga weera yamukohe mwaha wa eneneero yootikhiniha yeereiye mulaponi, Muluku aamuhiya weera amoote murima ni asuwele sootheene saari vamurimaniwawe." 
2Chronicles32:32 Sookhumelela sikina iyo sa olamula wa Hezekiya ni mitekosawe sa murima wa omuluku, silempwale mmooneloni wa mprofeeti Yesaya, mwaana mulopwana a Amosi, mulivuruni sa mamwene a oYuda ni oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles32:32 Sookhumelela sikina iyo sa olamula wa Hezekiya ni mitekosawe sa murima wa omuluku, silempwale mmooneloni wa mprofeeti Yesaya, mwaana mulopwana a Amosi, mulivuruni sa mamwene a oYuda ni oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles32:33 Hezekiya aahookhwa, anavithiwa vamoha ni makholowaawe onttumuxani araayawo mahiye a ekhapira ya Davide. aYuda ootheene ni muloko wa oYerusaleemu yaamuttittimiherela okhwawawe. Aamurandenle ti Manaxe, mwaniye mulopwana." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manaxe aapaceraawe olamula, aarino iyaakha muloko ni piili sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha miloko mithanu niithanu." 
2Chronicles33:2 Owo aapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave, atakihaka ipakelo soothanyeya sa miloko oomonlaawe Yave ohoolo wa aYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles33:3 Aarasela mapuro a miluku soowootha, aaphwantaawe Hezekiya atithawe, anaatekela altaari* aBahali*, anathipela nyiri soothipeleliwa sa Axera. Aakokhorela ithenyeeri sootheene sa wiirimu, analapa." 
2Chronicles33:4 Aahaateka altaari* Mpaani mwa Yave, mwa mwemmo Yave eenraawe: “Nsinanaka nnoopwaherera wa mahuku ootheene oYerusaleemu.”" 
2Chronicles33:5 Mmapuwani oomeeli a Empa ya Yave, owo aatekela altaari* ithenyeeri sootheene sa wiirimu." 
2Chronicles33:6 Mpakatho aahaahisa anamwanaawe asilopwana aapakaka yooveleela munreyareyani na oBeni-Hinomi; aapaka sookhwiri, aaheraka ihako ni macitta; aavarela muteko minepa, akohereraka minepa sa akhwiiye. Aapaka soonanara sincipale vamaithoni wa Yave, atannyaka isarasawe." 
2Chronicles33:7 Owo aakuxa ecaambulo yoopatthiwa, aniikaathi Mpaani mwa Yave, mwa mwemmo Muluku aamweerenlaawe Davide ni mwaniye Salomoni: “Mpaani mwa Yave ela ni oYerusaleemu, kithanlalaaka eriyari ya ipuumba sootheene sa aYixrayeli, kinoohelamo Nsinanaka wa mahuku ootheene." 
2Chronicles33:8 aYixrayeli yapaka paahi yeeyo kaalamulenlaaka mmalamuloni ootheene, ikano ni soolamulela sivahiwe mwa Moisesi, nkaahiyatho ekhumaka mulaponi kaavanghaaka makholowaanyu.”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Wa soothesene, Manaxe oohapuxa oYuda ni muloko wa oYerusaleemu, mpaka waatepa opaka soonanara opwaha miloko Yave aaphwantaawe ohoolo wa aYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles33:10 Yave aahuuluma ni Manaxe ni mulokwaawe, mene khayaampwatthelanse." 
2Chronicles33:11 Tivawo Yave aarumihenlaawe asitokweene a anakhotto a mwene a wAsiriya, mwa yaawosa yaamvanre Manaxe, enamuhomano mphulani eyuuma yoongweyano, enamutthuka ni onyooro wa ebronze, enamuronghasa oBabiloniya." 
2Chronicles33:12 Moothanananimwawe, owo aahaasaasa ekhavihero ya Yave, Mulukwaawe, aniiyevihaxa ohoolo wa Muluku a makholowaawe." 
2Chronicles33:13 Owo avekenleene, Yave aamwiiwa, anaakhulela yoovekaawe, anamuhokoloxera oYerusaleemu ni woomweneniwawe. Hiiho, Manaxe aahoonelela weera Yave ti Muluku." 
2Chronicles33:14 Vahoolo wa yeeyo, owo aarasela anaandyeerera exiri ya omokoni wa esidade ya Davide, mpatta ninkela nsuwa wa naattuuttu a oGihoni munreyareyani, mpaka vamulako wa Ihopa, muxerexere wa nttumuxa na wOfeli. Aawiikaathitho asitokweene a anakhotto musidadeni soolipihiwa sootheene sa oYuda." 
2Chronicles33:15 Manaxe aakhumiha Mpaani mwa Yave miluku sa anamarwa ni icaambulo iikaathiyaawemo, mpakatho altaari* ootheene a miluku soowootha aatenkaawe vanttumuxani na Empa ya Yave ni oYerusaleemu; aavonyera okerekhere wa esidade." 
2Chronicles33:16 Vahoolowaya, aahaareherera altaari* a Yave, anapakelawo sooveleelela murettele ni soovaha sootthapela, aalamulelaka aYuda weera emurumeele Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles33:17 Wa soothesene, muloko waapwaherera opakela sooveleela mwaltaarini a mmattumuxani, mene paahi wa Yave, Mulukwaaya." 
2Chronicles33:18 Sookhumelela sikina iyo sa olamula wa Manaxe, vamoha ni omvekelawawe Mulukwaawe, ni masu yaamuulumenlaaya anamoonihera* mwa Nsina na Yave, Muluku a oYixayeli, silempwale munamalepelani a nyaha sa mamwene a oYixayeli." 
2Chronicles33:19 Mmavekelonimwawe ni waakhula wa Muluku, mpaka sootthekasawe ni ohiroromeleyawawe, ohiya mmapuroni aatenkaawe altaari* a miluku soowootha ni nyiri soothipeleliwa sa Axera ni miluku sikina, ahinaaye wiiyeviha, sootheene iyo, silempwale munamalepelani a nyaha sa anamoonihera*." 
2Chronicles33:20 Manaxe aahookhwa, anavithiwa vamoha ni makholowaawe vaatewawe. Aamurandenle ti Amoni mwaniye mulopwana." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni aapaceraawe olamula, aarino iyaakha miloko miili ni piili sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha piili." 
2Chronicles33:22 Owo aapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave, ntoko atithawe. Amoni aalapa, anapakela sooveleela miluku sootheene aapankaawe Manaxe." 
2Chronicles33:23 Vaheera ovirikanawawe ni atithawe Manaxe, khiiyevinghe ohoolo wa Yave, mene aahaandyeerera nthowanawe." 
2Chronicles33:24 Asitokweene a Amoni yaamvaanelelasa, enamwiivelasa vaatewawe wa emwene." 
2Chronicles33:25 Vaheera muloko waawiiva ootheene yaamvaanelenle mwene Amoni, enamvara omwene Yosiya mwaniye mulopwana vanipuroniwawe." 
2Chronicles34:1 Yosiya aapaceraawe olamula, aarino iyaakha ithannatthaaru sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha miloko miraru niimoha." 
2Chronicles34:2 Owo aapaka onaakhulelaawe Yave, aneettela iphiro sa Davide, nikholonawe, ahihapuwakaru." 
2Chronicles34:3 Vayaakhani yanaathannaararu ya olamulawawe, areene nlelo mmiravo, owo aapacera omwaasa Muluku a Davide, nikholonawe. Vayaakhani yanaamuloko ni piili aapacera otteeliha oYuda ni oYerusaleemu mapuro oolapa a miluku soowootha, nyiri soothipeleliwa sa Axera, icaambulo soopatthiwa, ni soohaniwa." 
2Chronicles34:4 Ettharihiwaka malamulowaawe, yaaphwatiwa altaari* a aBahali*; ohiya yeeyo, owo aahaapwexakasa altaari* a erubani* yaakhala vasuluwaya. Aanyaanyatho anattikittha nyiri soothipeleliwa sa Axera, icaambulo soopatthiwa ni soohaniwa, anamwaraxela mmahiyeni a yaale yaapakenle sooveleela." 
2Chronicles34:5 Vahoolowaya aahisa makhuva a asaserdoti* valtaarini* awo; hiiho aatteeliha oYuda ni oYerusaleemu. 
2Chronicles34:6 Musidadeni sa ipuumba sa Manaxe, Efrayimi ni Simeyoni, mpaka sa Nafitali, ni mmathalani a mukhwipimwaya," 
2Chronicles34:7 ahaaphwata altaari* ni nyiri soothipeleliwa sa Axera, attikitthaka miluku mpaka othatuwa ntthupi, anaapwexakasa altaari* ootheene a erubani* mulaponi moothemwene mwa oYixrayeli. Hiiho, aahokoleela oYerusaleemu." 
2Chronicles34:8 Vayaakhani yanaamuloko niithannatthaaru ya olamulawawe, owo aamurumiha Xafani, mwaana mulopwana a Azaliya, ni Maaseiya, guvernadori a esidade, vamoha ni Yowa, mwaana mulopwana a Yowahazi, namawehaweha a empa ya emwene weera areherere Empa ya Yave Mulukwaawe, eerelaka otteeliha elapo ni Empa ya Yave." 
2Chronicles34:9 Awosa yaarowa omwinnyerera mutokweene a asaserdoti* Hilikiya, eparatha* yaaruuhiwe Mpaani mwa Muluku. aLeevi yaari anamalipelela a milako yaahaakhela yeeyo wa amaki a oManaxe ni wEfrayimi, ni wa oohalahala ootheene a oYixrayeli, mpakatho muloko wootheene wa oYuda ni oBenyamini ni wa amaki a oYerusaleemu." 
2Chronicles34:10 Yaawinnyerera eparatha* eyo asilopwana yaathanliwe weera ewehawehe orehereriwa wa Empa ya Yave, mwa yaawosa yaaliva anamiteko yaareherera ni yaarasela Empa ya Yave." 
2Chronicles34:11 Eparatha* eyo, yaahaavahasa makalipinteiru ni anamateka weera ethume maluku ookheriwa ni itthaabwa wa mikoomba ni iviika sa impa seiyo mamwene a oYuda yaahiyalaaya siheleyaka nthala." 
2Chronicles34:12 Asilopwana awo, yaavara muteko moororomeleyani. Yaahooleliwa ni Yahati ni Obadiya, aLeevi a ekhapira ya Merari, ni Zakariya ni Mexulami, a ekhapira ya Kohati. aLeevi – ootheene oowera wiipa ikaruma sa icipo –" 
2Chronicles34:13 yaawehaweha anamiteko, yaawehawehaka yaawo mmitekoni sootheene. aLeevi akina yaari anamalepa, asitokweene, ni anamalipelela a milako." 
2Chronicles34:14 Yaakhumihaaya eparatha* yaaruuhiwe Mpaani mwa Yave, musaserdoti* Hilikiya aaphwanya elivuru ya Nlamulo na Yave, yaavahiwe mwa Moisesi." 
2Chronicles34:15 Hilikiya aamweerela namalepa Xafani: “Koophwanya elivuru ya Nlamulo Mpaani mwa Yave.” Vano yaamwinnyerera Xafani. 
2Chronicles34:16 Hiiho, Xafani aarongha elivuru wa mwene, anamuleela: “Arumeiyaanyu ampaka sootheene alamuleliwaaya." 
2Chronicles34:17 Aahana eparatha* yaari Mpaani mwa Yave, enawinnyerera anamawehaweha ni anamiteko.”" 
2Chronicles34:18 Owo aahaandyeereratho: “Musaserdoti* Hilikiya ookinnyerera elivuru.” Vano Xafani aamusomela mwene mpatta woolempwa wa elivuru. 
2Chronicles34:19 Mwene iiwakaru masu a elivuru, aahaahula soowarasawe," 
2Chronicles34:20 anamulamulela Hilikiya, Ahikami, mwaana mulopwana a Xafani, Abedoni, mwaana mulopwana a Mikaya, namalepa Xafani, ni Asaya, namakhavihera a mwene:" 
2Chronicles34:21 “Mwakikoherele Yave, miyo ni oohalahala a oYixrayeli ni a oYuda mwaha wa yeeyo elempwale mulivuruni ela ephwanyingwe. Onipattiherawawe isara Yave ti otokotoko, niwoko makholowaahu khayiiwelenle masu a Yave, ni khayeettenle sootheene silempwale mulivurunimu.”" 
2Chronicles34:22 Hilikiya vamoha ni yaale aaruminghaawe mwene vamoha ni yoowo, yaarowasa wuuluma ni mprofeeti muthiyana Hulda, mwaariye Xalumi, mwaana mulopwana a Tokati ni osuulu wa Hasera, ni mutokweene a anamathokorora a ikuwo Mpaani mwa Yave. Owo aakhala muttetthe munyowani wa oYerusaleemu." 
2Chronicles34:23 Hulda aaweerelasa: “Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, oneera ha: Mwamuleele mulopwana oorumihaleni wa Miyo:" 
2Chronicles34:24 ‘Yave oneera ha: Miyo kinooruuhela erisa nipuro nna ni wa amakaaya; malapho ootheene alempwale mulivuruni esommwale vamaithoni wa mwene a oYuda. 
2Chronicles34:25 Yeenre ekihiya, enahisera erubani* miluku sikina, etannyaka isarasaka mwa miluku sootheene sipakiwe ni matataaya, isarasaka sinoopattela nipuro nna ni khasicipihiwaru.’" 
2Chronicles34:26 Mwamuleele ha mwene a oYuda, oorumihaleni weera munkoherere Yave: ‘Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha mwaha wa masu nyuwo mwiiwalaanyu:" 
2Chronicles34:27 Weenre murimaanyu ohuleya, muniiyeviha ohoolo wa Muluku, mwiiwakaru yeeyo Owo uulumenlaawe nipuro nna ni amakaaya, ni mweenre nyuwo mwiiyeviha ohoolowaka, mwaahulaka soowarasanyu, muniinla vamaithoniwaka, Miyo koowiiwani, onghima Yave." 
2Chronicles34:28 Tivawo, Miyo kineeraaka koothukumanyiheni vamoha ni makholowaanyu, ni nyuwo munoovithiwa mmuretteleni. Maithowaanyu khayoona erisa kineeraaka kiruuhele nipuro nna ni amakaaya.’ ” Vano awosa yaamuronghela Yosiya yoowaakhula ele." 
2Chronicles34:29 Vahoolowaya, mwene aahaathukumanyiha asitokweene ootheene a oYuda ni oYerusaleemu." 
2Chronicles34:30 Hiiho, aavolowa Mpaani mwa Yave, ahooliwaka ni asilopwana ootheene a oYuda ni a oYerusaleemu, asaserdoti* ni aLeevi – muloko wootheene, okhuma atthu piswa mpaka oottittimiheya. Mwene aahaasomela ootheene akhuwelaka masu ootheene a elivuru ya wiiraana yaaphwanyiwe Mpaani mwa Yave." 
2Chronicles34:31 Owo aaheemela vanrimbunivawe, ni vamaithoni wa Yave, aarehereratho wiiraana, iiroromelihaka omutthara Yave ni wiiwelela ni murima wootheene ni okumi wootheene malamulowaawe, soolamulasawe, soorumasawe ni ikanosawe. Aahiiroromelihatho okwanihera masu a wiiraana alempwale mulivuruni mmwe." 
2Chronicles34:32 Vahoolowaya aapakiha weera ootheene a oYerusaleemu ni oBenyamini yiiroromelihe ni wiiraana; amaki a oYerusaleemu yaakwanihera wiiraana wa Muluku, aani Muluku a makholowaaya." 
2Chronicles34:33 Yosiya aavenxa miluku sootheene soothanyeya sa elapo yootheene ya oYixrayeli, anaanyesereriha ootheene yaari oYixrayeli omurumeela Yave, Mulukwaaya. Owo nlelo areene ni okumi, muloko khawaahiyale omutthara Yave, Muluku a makholowaaya." 
2Chronicles35:1 Yosiya aampaka mPaska* a Yave oYerusaleemu, ni eputtiputthi ya mPaska* yiiviwe vanihukuni nanaamuloko ni maxexe na mweeri woopacera." 
2Chronicles35:2 Owo aahaathanlela asaserdoti* mitekosaya, anaalipihera okhalela nthiti muteko wa Mpaani mwa Yave." 
2Chronicles35:3 Owo aaweerela aLeevi yaahusiha aYixrayeli ootheene ni yaatteeliheriwe Yave: “Ngwiikaathi Arka* ootteelihiwa Mpaani mwa Yave etekingwe ni Salomoni, mwaana mulopwana a Davide, mwene a oYixrayeli. Khoontthuniheriwaru oweetteettiha Arka* mwaathatenleene. Vano munrumeele Yave, Mulukwaanyu, ni aYixrayeli, mulokwaawe." 
2Chronicles35:4 Mwiirehererase emusi emusi mmikuttulanimwaya, muttharihaka ikano silempwale ni Davide, mwene a oYixrayeli, ni mwaniye Salomoni." 
2Chronicles35:5 Mukhale vaNipuroni Nootteela* ni mukuttula wa aLeevi, wa khula mukuttula wa aLeevi okhaleke mukuttula wa imusi sa muloko." 
2Chronicles35:6 Mwiive iputtiputthi sa mPaska*, mwiitteelihase ni mwaarehererele iputtiputthi axunninyu aYixrayeli, mpakaka yeeyo Yave olamulenlaawe mwa Moisesi.”" 
2Chronicles35:7 Yosiya aavaha muloko wootheene waariwo, ikhondoolo ni ipuri 30 000 ntoko sooveleela wa mPaska*, mpakatho imombe macira miloko miraru – sootheene saakhumihiwe mwa sooreela sa mwene." 
2Chronicles35:8 Asitokweene yaacaangelatho ni otthuna, muloko, asaserdoti* ni aLeevi. Hilikiya, Zakariya ni Yehiyeli, anamawehaweha a Empa ya Muluku, yaahaavahasa asaserdoti* ikhondoolo ni ipuri 2 600, ni imombe macira mararu ntoko sooveleela sa mPaska*." 
2Chronicles35:9 Konaniya, vamoha ni axunneiye Xemaiya ni Netaneli, ni ahooleli a aLeevi Haxabiya, Yehiyeli ni Yozabadi, yaahaavaha aLeevi ikhondoolo ni ipuri macira miloko mithanu ni imombe macira mathanu ntoko sooveleela sa mPaska*." 
2Chronicles35:10 Miteko saarehereriwa, ni asaserdoti* yaakhala mmapuronimwaya ni aLeevi moorandelananimwaya, ntoko mwene aalamulenlaawe." 
2Chronicles35:11 Iputtiputthi sa mPaska* saahiiviwa, ni asaserdoti* yaamisa ephome yaavahiwaaya, aLeevi eperaka ixapala sa axinama." 
2Chronicles35:12 Awosa yaamwalamwaxatho sooveleela soohisa weera evahe mikuttula sa imusi sa muloko, weera awosa emveleelele Yave, ntoko elempwalaaya mulivuruni ya Moisesi; yaapakatho hiiho ni imombe." 
2Chronicles35:13 Yaawooxa axinama a mPaska*, ntoko yaalempwalaaya, enaapeya mmwaapuni, mukhalini ni musupuriyani sooveleela sootteelihiwa; yaarumeela woowaakuveya muloko wootheene." 
2Chronicles35:14 Vahoolowaya aLeevi yaahiirehererela mpattaaya ni wa asaserdoti* a ekhapira ya Aharoni yaapwaherera opaka yooveleela yoohisa ni mipatta sa makhura mpaka ohiyu. Tivawo aLeevi yiirehererenlaaya mpattaaya ni wa asaserdoti*, ekhapira ya Aharoni." 
2Chronicles35:15 Anacipo a ekhapira ya Asafi yaari mmapuroni yaavaheriwaaya ni Davide, Asafi, Hemani ni Yedutuni, namoonihera* a mwene. Anamalipelela a milako yaalipelela khula mulako khawaatthuneya ovenya mmapuronimwaya, niwoko asikhwaaya aLeevi yaahaarehererela sooveleela." 
2Chronicles35:16 Hiiho, nihuku nne, miteko sootheene sa Yave saavariwa weera apakiwe mPaska* ni sipakiwe sooveleela soohisa valtaarini* a Yave, ntoko mwene Yosiya aalamulenlaawe." 
2Chronicles35:17 aYixrayeli yaariwo yaampaka mPaska* nihuku nne, ni mmahukuni mathannameeli yaapaka efesta ya epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu." 
2Chronicles35:18 oYixrayeli khanapakiwe mPaska* siiyoole okhuma mmahukuni a mprofeeti Samuweli; ni khawoworu mwene a oYixrayeli aampanke mPaska* siiyoole, ntoko aampankaawe Yosiya, asaserdoti*, aLeevi, aYuda ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaariwo, vamoha ni muloko wa oYerusaleemu." 
2Chronicles35:19 mPaska* ole aapakiwe vayaakhani yanaamuloko niithannaatthaaru ya olamula wa Yosiya. 
2Chronicles35:20 Vahoolo wa sootheene aapankawe Yosiya ni areherenreene Empa ya Yave, Neko mwene a wExipitu, aarowa owana oKarekemixi, wEfrate, ni Yosiya aarowa ongwanano." 
2Chronicles35:21 Wa soothesene, Neko aamurumihela anamitthenga, amweerelaka: “Ii! Mwene a oYuda, muhipwatthele. Emaara ela, nkinoowananani, mene kingwanano omwene mukina. Muluku ookeerela weera kaakuveye; tivawo, muhiye omvaanya Muluku ori ni miyo; ohiyanawaya Owo onimoophwatani.”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Wa soothesene, Yosiya khaatthunne ohokolowa, ni aahiitikinsiha weera angwaneno. Owo khaatthunne wiiwa yeeyo aamuleenlaawe Neko wa mpatta wa Muluku, anarowa ongwanano munghawalawani wa oMegido." 
2Chronicles35:23 Mukhottoni ananyuupa yaamulatha mwene Yosiya, anaweerela arumeiyaawe: “Mukivenxase va, koovulalaxa.”" 
2Chronicles35:24 Awosa yaamukuruxa mukaaronimwawe, enangweliha ekaaro ekina, enamurongha oYerusaleemu, mwa weiwo okhwenlaawewo. Owo ovithiwe mmahiyeni mwa makholowaawe, ni amaki ootheene a oYuda ni oYerualeemu yaamwiinlelasa." 
2Chronicles35:25 Yeremiya aahiipa ecipo amuttittimiherelaka Yosiya, ni mpaka olelo va anamwiipa asithiyana ni asilopwana, annimuttittimiherela Yosiya ni icipo seiye sa olalamika. Eyo yoothatuwa ekhovelelo oYixrayeli, ni elempwale mulivuruni ya olalamika." 
2Chronicles35:26 Sookhumelela sikina iyo sa olamula wa Yosiya, ni mitekosawe sa murima wa omuluku, ettharihiwaka yeeyo elempwale muNlamuloni na Yave –" 
2Chronicles35:27 sookhumelela sootheene okhuma ompacereroni mpaka ommaleloni – silempwale mulivuruni sa nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli ni oYuda. 
2Chronicles36:1 Muloko waamukuxa Yehowahazi, mwaana mulopwana a Yosiya, onamvara omwene wa oYerusaleemu, erandelo ya atithawe." 
2Chronicles36:2 Yehowahazi aapaceraawe olamula aarino iyaakha miloko miili ni tthaaru sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu nyeeri miraru." 
2Chronicles36:3 Mwene a wExipitu aamukuruxa vahiceni ya emwene, alamulaka oYuda oliva musoko wa itonelada* tthaaru ni eriyari ya etonelada* sa eparatha* ni ikiilu* miloko miraru niithanu sa eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
2Chronicles36:4 Mwene a wExipitu aamvara omwene Eliyakimi, munneiye Yehowahazi, weera alamule oYuda ni oYerusaleemu, anamuceendya nsina amuttehaka Yehoyakimi. Vaheera Neko aamukuxa Yehowahazi, munneiye Eliyakimi, anamurongha wExipitu." 
2Chronicles36:5 Yehoyakimi aapaceraawe olamula aarino iyaakha miloko miili niithanu sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha muloko niimoha. Owo aapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave, Mulukwaawe." 
2Chronicles36:6 Nebukadenezari mwene a oBabiloniya, aangwanano, anamutthuka ni onyooro wa ebronze* weera amuronghe oBabiloniya." 
2Chronicles36:7 Aarowanotho oBabiloniya ikaruma sa Mpaani mwa Yave, aniikaathi mpaani mwa milukusawe." 
2Chronicles36:8 Sookhumelela sikina iyo sa olamula wa Yehoyakimi, itthu soowoopiha opankaawe ni sootheene ophwanyaniwaawe, silempwale mulivuruni sa nyaha sa mamwene a oYixrayeli ni oYuda. Aamurandenle ti Yehoyakini, mwaniye mulopwana." 
2Chronicles36:9 Yehoyakini aapaceraawe olamula, aarino iyaakha muloko niithannatthaaru sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu nyeeri miraru ni mahuku muloko. Owo aapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave." 
2Chronicles36:10 Mweehuhuni ya ottuva, mwene Nebukadenezari aalamulela Yehoyakini oronghiwa oBabiloniya, vamoha ni ikaruma saakhumihiwe Mpaani mwa Yave, anamvara omwene Zedekiya, atatawe Yehoyakini, weera alamule oYuda ni oYerusaleemu." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekiya aapaceraawe olamula, aarino iyaakha miloko miili niimoha sa oyariwawawe, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha muloko niimoha." 
2Chronicles36:12 Owo aapaka soonanara vamaithoni wa Yave, Mulukwaawe, ni khiiyevinghe ohoolo wa mprofeeti Yeremiya, mwa yoowo aamuulumela mpatta wa Yave." 
2Chronicles36:13 Aamurukunuwelatho mwene Nebukadenezari, mwa yoowo aamunyesereringhe olipela mwa Nsina na Muluku. Aathatuwa oottiyaxa maaru ni oowuuma murima, ahitthunaka ohokoleela wa Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli." 
2Chronicles36:14 Ohiya yeeyo, ahooleli ootheene a asaserdoti* ni muloko, yaamweera otepa ohiroromeleya, ettharaka ipakelo sootheene soothanyeya sa miloko sikina, evalihaka Empa ya Yave, aatteelinghaawe oYerusaleemu." 
2Chronicles36:15 Yave, Muluku a makholowaaya, aawoopererasa imaara sincipale mwa anamitthengaawe, niwoko Owo aamorela ikharari mulokwaawe ni woomakawawe." 
2Chronicles36:16 Vaheera awosa yaahaatthebwa anamitthenga a Muluku, enanyoosa maswaawe, ewuulihihaka muru maprofeetaawe, mpaka isara sa Yave opattela mulokwaawe, ni khawaariworu osemba nthorihelo." 
2Chronicles36:17 Yave aahaarumihelasa mwene a oBabiloniya, mwa yoowo aawiivale ni ekatana amiravowaaya vaNipuroni Nootteela*. Khaawuurenleru hata amiravo naari asimwali, atokweene naari mamookwaaxa. Muluku aawinnyererasa ootheene awo mmatatani mwa Nebukadenezari." 
2Chronicles36:18 Owo aarongha oBabiloniya ikaruma sootheene sa Mpaani mwa Muluku, okhuma ikhaani mpaka itokweene, vamoha ni mihakhu sa Mpaani mwa Yave, sa mwene ni sa asitokweenaawe." 
2Chronicles36:19 aBabiloniya yaahisa Empa ya Muluku, enakurumula exiri ya oYerusaleemu; yaahisa impa sa emwene sootheene, enaphwata ikaruma soorikaxa sootheene saarimo." 
2Chronicles36:20 Nebukadenezari aahaarongha wootthukiwani oBabiloniya yaawo yaahalahanle yoopowaka ekatana, weera ekhale ipotthasawe ni sa ekhapiraawe, mpaka mweehuhuni ya olamula wa aPersiya." 
2Chronicles36:21 Elapo yaahuleleya wiitthuuwa wa iSaabadu; yaahiitthuuwa mweehuhuni yootheene ya oheleya nthala, mpaka ophiyera iyaakha miloko mithannamiili, ekwanihereyaka masu a Yave, yaahimmwale mwa Yeremiya." 
2Chronicles36:22 Vayaakhani yoopacera ya olamula wa Siru, mwene a oPersiya, weera ekwanihereye masu yaalaleiwale ni Yeremiya, Yave aatava murima wa Siru, mwene a oPersiya, weera alaleiye mukarattani elapo yootheene aalamulaawe moota ola:" 
2Chronicles36:23 “Miyo Siru, mwene a oPersiya, kinghima ha: ‘Yave, Muluku a wiirimu, ookivaha omwene wootheene wa mulaponi, anakithanla weera kimutekele Empaawe oYerusaleemu, mulaponi ya oYuda. Ootheene ari a mulokwaawe, eroweke oYerusaleemu, ni weera Yave, Mulukwaaya, akhale ni yaawosa.’ ”" 
Ezra1:1 Vayaakhani yoopacera moolamulani mwa Siru, mwene a oParesi – ekwanihereyaka masu a Yave uulummaawe mwa Yeremiya – Yave aatava murima wa Siru, mwene a oParesi, weera alaleiye ekano moomwenenimwawe wootheene, yaalempwale moota ola:" 
Ezra1:2 “Siru, mwene a oParesi oneera ha: ‘Yave, Muluku a wiirimu, ookivaha omwene wootheene wa vathi ni ookithanla weera kamutekele Empa ya Yave oYerusaleemu, elapo ya oYuda." 
Ezra1:3 Akhalaru mutthu a mulokwaawe a eriyaraanyu (Mulukwaawe akhaleke ni yoowo), aroweke oYerusaleemu elapo ya oYuda, weera arasele Empa ya Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, mwa Yoowo onkhala oYerusaleemu." 
Ezra1:4 Ahalahanle ootheene nakhalaru nipuro ankhalaayawo yaakheleke wa aximwaattamanaaya eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa, sooreerela ni mihuwo ni sooveleela sa otthunawaya weera yavareleke muteko seiyo wa Empa ya Muluku oYerusaleemu.’”" 
Ezra1:5 Vano ahooleli a imusi sa oYuda ni oBenyamini vamoha ni asaserdoti* ni aLeevi – ootheene yaawo Muluku otamvaawe mirimasaya – yaahiireherera weera erowe yarasele Empa ya Yave. 
Ezra1:6 Aximwaattamanaaya ootheene yaahaavaha ikaruma sa eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa, sooreerela ni mihuwo, ni soovaha soorikaxa ohiya sooveleela sa otthunawaya." 
Ezra1:7 Ohiya toko yeeyo, mwene Siru aalamulela oruuhiwa ikaruma saari sa Mpaani mwa Yave, mwa seiye Nebukadenezari aakunxaawe oYerusaleemu, iikaathiki mpaani mwa milukusawe." 
Ezra1:8 Siru, mwene a oParesi, aamulamulela Mitredati, namawehaweha musurukhu a mwene, weera amwinnyerere seiye Xexibazari, mwaana a mwene a oYuda." 
Ezra1:9 Waattawaya waari ha: isasaani miloko miraru sa eyuuma yoorikaxa, isasaani macira muloko sa eparatha*, nyaapu miloko miili ni mithannamixexe" 
Ezra1:10 ibasiya sa eyuuma yoorikaxa miloko miraru, ibasiya sa eparatha* macira maxexe ni muloko mmoha ni ikaruma sikina macira muloko." 
Ezra1:11 Vano waatta wa ikaruma sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni sa eparatha* waari 5 400. Xexibazari aakuxa sootheene iye anamatthukiwa aYixrayeli yaahokolowaaya oBabiloniya erowaka oYerusaleemu. 
Ezra2:1 Anttharelana ti masina a atthu a ilapo, mwa yaawo Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, aakunxaawe ootthukiweene aaronghaka oBabiloniya. Awosa yaahokoleela oYerusaleemu ni oYuda, khula mutthu wa muttetthaawe." 
Ezra2:2 Yaahokolongwe ehooliwaka ni Zerubabeli, Yexuwa, Nehemiya, Seraya, Rehelaya, Mordekai, Bilexani, Misepari, Bigevai, Rehumi ni Bahana. Masina a aYixrayeli ale ti ala:" 
Ezra2:3 Ekhapira ya Paroxi atthu 2 172," 
Ezra2:4 ya Xefatei atthu macira mararu ni miloko mithannamiili neeli," 
Ezra2:5 ya Ara atthu macira mathannameeli ni miloko mithannamiili ni athanu 
Ezra2:6 ya Pahati-Mowabe irukulu sa Yexuwa ni Yowabe atthu 2 812," 
Ezra2:7 ya Elami atthu 1 254," 
Ezra2:8 ya Zatu atthu macira mathannamaxexe ni miloko mixexe ni athanu," 
Ezra2:9 ya Zakai atthu macira mathannameeli ni miloko mithannamosa," 
Ezra2:10 ya Bani atthu macira mathannamosa ni miloko mixexe neeli," 
Ezra2:11 ya Bebai atthu macira mathannamosa ni miloko miili ni araru," 
Ezra2:12 ya Azegade atthu 1 222," 
Ezra2:13 ya Adonikami atthu macira mathannamosa ni miloko mithannamosa ni athannamosa," 
Ezra2:14 ya Bigevai, atthu 2 056," 
Ezra2:15 ya Adini, atthu macira maxexe ni miloko mithanu ni axexe," 
Ezra2:16 ya Ateri irukulu sa Hizekiya atthu miloko mithannamixexe ni athannaararu," 
Ezra2:17 ya Bezai atthu macira mararu ni miloko miili ni araru," 
Ezra2:18 ya Yora atthu ncira ni muloko mmoha neeli," 
Ezra2:19 ya Haxumi atthu macira meeli ni miloko miili ni araru," 
Ezra2:20 ya Gibari atthu miloko mithannamixexe ni athanu 
Ezra2:21 amaki a oBeteleheemu atthu ncira ni miloko miili ni araru," 
Ezra2:22 a oNetofa atthu miloko mithanu ni athannamosa," 
Ezra2:23 a wAnatoti atthu ncira ni miloko miili ni athannaararu," 
Ezra2:24 a wAzemaveti atthu miloko mixexe neeli," 
Ezra2:25 a oKireyati-Yeharimi, oKefira ni oBeheroti atthu macira mathannameeli ni miloko mixexe ni araru," 
Ezra2:26 a oRama ni oGeba, atthu macira mathannamosa ni miloko miili ni mmoha," 
Ezra2:27 a oMikemasi atthu ncira ni miloko miili neeli," 
Ezra2:28 a oBeteli ni wAi atthu macira meeli ni miloko miili ni araru," 
Ezra2:29 a oNebo atthu miloko mithanu neeli," 
Ezra2:30 a oMagebixi atthu ncira ni miloko mithanu ni athannamosa," 
Ezra2:31 a wElami okina atthu 1 254 
Ezra2:32 a oHarimi atthu macira mararu ni miloko miili," 
Ezra2:33 a oLodi, oHadidi ni wOno atthu miloko mithannamiili ni miloko miili ni athanu," 
Ezra2:34 a oYeriko atthu macira mararu ni miloko mixexe ni athanu," 
Ezra2:35 a oSenaha atthu 3 630," 
Ezra2:36 Asaserdoti*: ekhapira ya Yedaya murukuluni sa Yexuwa atthu macira mathannamaxexe ni miloko mithannamiili ni araru," 
Ezra2:37 ya Imeri 1 052," 
Ezra2:38 ya Paxehuri 1 247," 
Ezra2:39 ya Harimi 1 017. 
Ezra2:40 aLeevi: ekhapira ya Yexuwa ni Kademiyeli murukuluni sa Hodeva, atthu miloko mithannamiili ni axexe." 
Ezra2:41 Anamwiipa: ekhapira ya Asafi ncira ni miloko miili ni athannaararu. 
Ezra2:42 Anamalipelela a Empa ya Muluku: ekhapira ya Xalumi, Ateri ni Talemoni, Akubi, Hatita ni Xobai ncira ni miloko miraru ni athannaaxexe." 
Ezra2:43 Arumeiyi a Empa ya Muluku: ekhapira ya Ziha, Hasufa, Tabayoti," 
Ezra2:44 Kerosi, Siya, Padoni," 
Ezra2:45 Lebana, Hagaba, Akubi," 
Ezra2:46 Hagabi, Xalema, Hanani," 
Ezra2:47 Gideli, Gahari Rehaya," 
Ezra2:48 Rezini, Nekoda, Gazami," 
Ezra2:49 Uza, Paseiyakhi, Besai," 
Ezra2:50 Asena, Mehunimi, Nefuximi," 
Ezra2:51 Bakebuki, Hakufa, Harehuri," 
Ezra2:52 Bazeliti, Mehida, Harexa," 
Ezra2:53 Barekosi, Sisera, Tema," 
Ezra2:54 Neziha ni Hatifa. 
Ezra2:55 Ekhapira ya arumeiyi a Salomoni: ekhapira ya Sotai, Hasofereti, Peruda," 
Ezra2:56 Yahala, Darekoni, Gideli," 
Ezra2:57 Xefateya, Hatili, Pokereti-Hazebayimi ni Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Arumeiyi a Empa ya Muluku ni ekhapira ya arumeiyi a Salomoni waattawaya waari atthu macira mararu ni miloko mithannamixexe ni muloko neeli. 
Ezra2:59 Yaawo yaarweenle mmittettheni sa oTeli-Mela, oTeli-Harexa, oKerubi, wAdoni ni wImeri, mene ehiweraka waakhulela weera imusisaya saaphattungwe mwa aYixrayeli yaari ti ala:" 
Ezra2:60 ekhapira ya Delaya, Tobiya ni Nekoda atthu macira mathannamosa ni miloko mithanu neeli." 
Ezra2:61 Variyari wa asaserdoti*: ekhapira ya Habaya, Hakozi ni Barezilai, mwa yoowo aamuthenle mwaana a Barezilai, muGiliyade, ni iitthaneliwa nsina na atatawe oowaathelela." 
Ezra2:62 Atthu ale yaahaasaasa masinaaya mulivurini ya imusi, mene khayaaphwannye ni yaahooneliwa ntoko oohitteela mweesaserdootini." 
Ezra2:63 Tivawo guvernadori aakhoottihenraawe oca itthu sootteeliheriwa ahikhanle musaserdoti* avarelaka muteko Urimi ni Tumimi* weera ekhaikhai esuwanyeye. 
Ezra2:64 Ootheene yaale yaahokolongwe wootthukiwani yaari atthu 42 360," 
Ezra2:65 waahiya arumeiyaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana 7 337. Yaakhala eriyaraaya anamwiipa asilopwana ni asithiyana macira meeli. 
Ezra2:66 Yaakhalano ikavalu* macira mathannameeli ni miloko miraru niithannamosa, amula* macira meeli ni miloko mixexe ni athanu," 
Ezra2:67 ikamelu* macira maxexe ni miloko miraru niithanu ni abuuru 6 720. 
Ezra2:68 Ephiyakaru wa Empa ya Yave oYerusaleemu, mapwattapwattha makina a imusi iye yaavaha soovaha sa otthunawaya wa oraseliwa Empa ya Muluku vanipuroniwaya na khalayi." 
Ezra2:69 Ettharihaka owerawaya, yaavaha wa mutekoweene yoowo idrakema* 20 000 sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni imina* macira miloko mithanu sa eparatha* nitho soowara sa esaseredoti ncira." 
Ezra2:70 Asaserdoti*, aLeevi, anamalipelela a milako, anamwiipa ni arumeiyi a Empa ya Muluku vamoha ni mpatta wa muloko ni aYixrayeli akinaawo yaahiitekiha mmittetthenimwaya yaayarelingwaaya." 
Ezra3:1 Ophiyerakaru mweeri wanaathannamiili, aYixrayeli emankeene mmittetthenimwaya, ootheene yaathukumana ni murima mmoha oYerusaleemu." 
Ezra3:2 Vano Yexuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Yozadaki, vamoha ni asaserdoti* akina, ni Zerubabeli, mwaana mulopwana a Xeyaletiyeli ni yaale yaarumeenle ni yoowo, yaapacera waateka altaari* a Muluku a oYixrayeli weera yapakemo sooveleela soohisa ettharihaka yeeyo elempwale munlamunoni na Moisesi, mulopwana a Muluku." 
Ezra3:3 Yaamoovelaru miloko saarukureenre, yaahaateka altaari* vasulu wa mathipelowaaya, enampakelamo Yave sooveleela soohisa – okhuma sooxeexelo mpaka sa wiilaka." 
Ezra3:4 Vano, ettharihaka yeeyo elempwale, yaapaka efesta ya mmikotthani ni sooveleela sootthuneyaxa wa khula nihuku na efesta." 
Ezra3:5 Vahoolowaya yaapaka sooveleela sa khula nihuku, sa Mweeri Munyowani ni sa ifesta sootheene sootteela sa Yave, vamoha ni seiye saapakeliwe Yave sa otthunawaya paahi." 
Ezra3:6 Vano okhuma munihukuni noopacera na mweeri wanaathannamiili yaapacera ompakela Yave sooveleela soohisa, yaaroohipaceraru mathipelo a Empa ya Yave." 
Ezra3:7 Vanonto yaahaavaha musurukhu mapatarero ni makalipinteiro, enaavaha sooca ni soowura ni makhura atthu a oSidoni ni oTiro weera awosa eruuhe nyiri sa esedari* mmakulani matokotoko, eviraka mphareiya okhuma oLibanu mpaka oYafa. Eyo yaalamuleliwe ni Siru, mwene a oParesi." 
Ezra3:8 Mmweerini wanaaveeli wa eyaakha yanaaveeli ephiyaleene oMpaani ya Muluku oYerusaleemu, Zerubabeli, mwaana mulopwana a Xeyaletiyeli ni Yexuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Yozadaki vamoha ni axunnaya akinaawo, eyo tiiyo asaserdoti*, aLeevi ni ootheenaawo yaahokolongwe wootthukiwani erowaka oYerusaleemu, yaapacera muteko. Eeli ale yaahaathanla aLeevi okhuma a iyaakha miloko miili woorowa ohoolo weera ewehawehe otekiwa wa Empa ya Yave." 
Ezra3:9 Yexuwa vamoha ni anamwanaawe asilopwana ni axunneiye, ni Kademiyeli ni anamwanaawe asilopwana a ekhapira ya Hodeva, ni anamwane asilopwana a Henadadi vamoha ni anamwanaaya asilopwana ni axunneiye – ootheene awo yaari aLeevi – yaahaawehawehatho yaale yaateka Empa ya Muluku." 
Ezra3:10 Anamateka epacerakaru mathipelo a Empa ya Yave, asaserdoti* ewarenleene ikuwosaya ni ekunxeene mapalapattaaya, ni aLeevi (anamwane asilopwana a Asafi) ekunxeene ikomasaya, yaakhala mmapuronimwaya weera emuttottopele Yave, ntoko Davide, mwene a oYixrayeli, aalamulenlaawe." 
Ezra3:11 Yaamwiipela Yave icipo soottottopela ni sootthapela: “Owo ti ooreeraxa; waasivelawawe aYixrayeli ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene.” Vano atthu ootheene yaakhuwelaxa vamoha, emuttottopelaka Yave niwoko mathipelo a Empa ya Yave yaatekiwa." 
Ezra3:12 Vaheera ancipale a asaserdoti*, a aLeevi ni a mapwattapwattha oowuuluvala yoonne Empa ya Muluku ya khalayi, yaahiinla ekhuwelaka yoonnaaya opaceriwa wa mathipelo a Empa yanaaveeli ele. Wa soothesene, ancipale akina yaakhuwela ni ohakalala." 
Ezra3:13 Khawaawereya osuwanyeya okhuweliwa wa ohakalala ni wa wiinla niwoko muloko wannatepa onyakuleleya. Vano onyakulawene weiwe wanniiwanyeya ottai. 
Ezra4:1 Amwiittana a aYuda ni aBenyamini yaasuwela weera anamatthukiwa aYixrayeli yeera emutekelaka Empa Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli." 
Ezra4:2 Awosa yaarowa wuuluma ni Zerubabeli ni mapwattapwattha, enaweerela: “Munitthunihere wookhaviherani oteka, niwoko ntoko nyuwosa hiyotho nnimulapa Mulukwaanyu ni ninnampakela sooveleela okhuma ehuhuweene yeele ya Esarehadoni, mwene a wAsiriya, mwa yoowo oniruuhale nno.”" 
Ezra4:3 Vaheera Zerubabeli, Yexuwa ni mapwattapwattha akinaawo a aYixrayeli yaawaakhula: “Khamuntthuniheriwa nyuwosa orasela Empa ya Yave, Mulukwaahu. Hiyo paahi nneera nimutekele Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, ntoko Siru, mwene a oParesi aanilamulenlaawe.”" 
Ezra4:4 Vano miloko saarukureenre saaheerera ovololiha muloko wa oYuda soopopihaka weera ohipwaherere otekiwawaya. 
Ezra4:5 Yaahaavaha makhwankwa anamalaka weera ehiihe muloko ni epupurumihe soovaanelasaya. Eyo yeereiye moolamulani wootheene wa Siru, mpakatho wa Dariyexi, mwene a oParesi." 
Ezra4:6 Ompacereroni wa olamula wa Xerxexi yaalepa ekaratta yoowoothera atthu a oYuda ni oYerusaleemu. 
Ezra4:7 Vanonto mmahukuni a Artaxaxete, mwene a oParesi, Bixelami, Mitredati ni Tabeheli vamoha ni asikhwaawe akinaawo yaamulepela ekaratta Artaxaxete. Ekaratteene yeele yaalempwale munuulumoni na Eramewu ni mootaaya woolepa." 
Ezra4:8 Rehumi, mutokweene a anakhotto ni Ximexai, namalepa, yaamulepela ekaratta mwene Artaxaxete yootheraka oYerusaleemu moota ola:" 
Ezra4:9 Rehumi, mutokweene a anakhotto ni Ximexai, namalepa, vamoha ni asikhwaaya ootheene – aphuki, asitokweene a atthu a oTripolisi, elapo ya oParesi, wEreki ni oBabiloniya, awElami a oSusa" 
Ezra4:10 ni miloko sikina, mutokweene Axurbanipali oothaamiha anatekiha musidadeni mwa oSamariya ni ilapo sikina mweelaponi okhopela mooloko Efratesi." 
Ezra4:11 Ekaratta yaamulepenlaaya ti ela: “Wa mwene Artaxaxete, eyo ekaratta ya arumeiyaanyu a okhopela mooloko Efratesi:" 
Ezra4:12 Nnooleelani amwene weera aYuda arwiiye wa hiyo wa mpattaanyu yaarowa oYerusaleemu ni vano anrasela esidadeene yeeyo yoovaanya ni yoonanara. Awosa anrasela ixiri epakaka mathipelowaaya. 
Ezra4:13 Ohiya toko yeeyo, amwene ontthuneya osuwela weera esidade eyo yatekiwa ni ixirisaya sarehereriwa, awosa kheerwatho ekhumiha mucaango, naari oliva musoko hoye hoye soolivela. Hiiho onoovukuwa muhakhu wa emwene." 
Ezra4:14 Vano, neenre hiyo nikhalaka arumeiyi a empa ya emwene ni ohireeraka woona mwene ahittittimihiwaka, hiyo ninlepa ekaratta ela weera amwene musuwele itthusene seiya." 
Ezra4:15 Ninlepa weera waasaasiwe munamalepelani mwa makholowaanyu. Mwemmo amwene munimoonelela weera esidade eyo ti ya ettiyamaaru, yoosareya makacamiho wa mamwene ni ilapo sikina. Nri nipuro noovaanya okhuma khalayi. Ti niwoko na yeeyo esidade eyo yaaphwatingwaaya." 
Ezra4:16 Nnooleelani amwene weera esidade eyo yatekiwa ni ixirisaya sarehereriwa, kheewo eniihale wa nyuwo okhopela mooloko Efratesi.”" 
Ezra4:17 Mwene aawaakhula ha: “Wa Rehumi, mutokweene a anakhotto ni Ximexai, namalepa, vamoha ni asikhwaaya ootheene ankhala oSamariya ni mweelaponi sikina okhopela mooloko Efratesi: Isalaama sa murettele." 
Ezra4:18 Ekaratta munirumihenlaanyu yoosommwa ni yootaphuleliwa vamaithoniwaka. 
Ezra4:19 Koolamulela ni arumeiyaaka aahaasaasa enoonelela weera esidadeene yeeyo yookhalano mwaha woorakama ngwaavaanyani mamwene ni weera naari nipuro na ovaanya ni ovaanelela. 
Ezra4:20 oYerusaleemu waakhalano mamwene a ikuruxa yaalamula ilapo sootheene sa okhopela mooloko Efratesi ni yaaliviwa misoko, mucaango ni soolivela." 
Ezra4:21 Vano mwaalamulele atthweene yaawo ohiya mutekwaaya weera esidade eyo ehiraseliwe mpaka kineeraaka kilamulele. 
Ezra4:22 Mwiipasoope weera sootheene iya sikwanihereye vanneneni. Nkintthuna weera sooreera sa emwene sikacamiheye.” 
Ezra4:23 Esommwakaru ekaratta ya mwene Artaxaxete wa Rehumi ni Ximexai, namalepa ni asikhwaaya, yaarowa woowaakuveya wa aYuda oYerusaleemu yaanyesererihaka ohiya mutekwaaya." 
Ezra4:24 Hiiho muteko wa oraseliwa wa Empa ya Muluku oYerusaleemu waahiyereriwa mpaka eyaakha yanaaveeli ya olamula wa Dariyexi, mwene a oParesi." 
Ezra5:1 Vano mprofeeti Hagai, ni musaserdoti* Zakariya, a ekhapira ya Ido, yaahaathalihera otthuna wa Muluku aYuda a oYuda ni oYerusaleemu mwa Nsina na Muluku a oYixrayeli aari mwa yaawosa." 
Ezra5:2 Vanonto Zerubabeli, mwaana mulopwana a Xeyaletiyeli ni Yexuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Yozadaki, yaapacera orasela Empa ya Muluku oYerusaleemu. Ni maprofeeti a Muluku yaari ni yaawo yaakhaviheraka." 
Ezra5:3 Ehuhuweene yeele Tatenai, guvernadori a ilapo sa okhopela mooloko Efratesi ni Xetari-Bozenai vamoha ni asikhwaawe yaarowasa woowaakuveya waakoha: “Taani oolamulenleni orasela Empa ya Yave ela ni ixirisaya?”" 
Ezra5:4 Yaahaakohatho: “Antekaawo masinaaya taani?” 
Ezra5:5 Vaheera maitho a Mulukwaaya yeera ewoonaka asitokweene a aYuda ni awosa khayaahiihiwe ovara muteko mpaka eeraawe arumiheliwe Dariyexi mutthenga ni yaakheliwe yoowaakhulaawe mwaheene yoowo. 
Ezra5:6 Ti ela ekaratta Tatenai, guvernadori a ilapo sa okhopela mooloko Efratesi ni Xetari-Bozenai vamoha ni asinthamwenaaya yaari asitokweene a ilapo sa okhopela mooloko Efratesi yaamurumihenlaaya Dariyexi." 
Ezra5:7 Ekaratta yaamurumihenlaaya ensoma ha: “Wa mwene Dariyexi: Salaama ni murettele. 
Ezra5:8 Musuwele amwene weera hiyo naarowa elapo ya oYuda, wa Empa ya Muluku Mutokweene. Muloko wa weiwo onoorasela yeeyo ni maluku matokotoko ehelaka itthaabwa sitokotoko vaxirini. Muteko onnavariwa ni nthiti ni onneetta woowaakuveya.”" 
Ezra5:9 Vano naahaakoha asitokweenaaya: “Taani oolamulenleni oteka Empa ya Yave ela ni ixirisaya?” 
Ezra5:10 Naahaakohatho masina a asitokweenaaya weera nilepe neerelaka wooleelani. 
Ezra5:11 Yoowaakhulaaya yaari ha: “Hiyo arumeiyi a Muluku a wiirimu ni vathi ni ninrasela Empa ya Muluku yaatekiwe khalayi – Empeene yeele mwenaahu mmoha mutokweene aatenkaawe ni aamalinghaawe. 
Ezra5:12 Vaheera yeenre makholowaahu yamunyoonyiha Muluku a wiirimu, Owo aawinnyerera mmatatani mwa Nebukadenezari, muKaldeya, mwene a oBabiloniya, mwa yoowo aaphwante Empa ya Yave, anatthuka muloko aronghaka oBabiloniya." 
Ezra5:13 Wa soothesene, vayaakhani yoopacera moolamulani mwa Siru, mwene a oBabiloniya, mwene Siru aalamulela weera Empeene yeele ya Muluku yaraseliwe." 
Ezra5:14 Mpaka aakhumiha mpaani mwa milukusawe oBabiloniya ikaruma sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni sa eparatha* sa Empa ya Muluku, mwa seiye Nebukadenezari aakhumihalaawe Mpaani mwa Yave oYerusaleemu aronghaka mpaani mwa milukusawe oBabiloniya. Aamwinnyerera seiye mutthu oniitthaniwa Xexibazari, mwa yoowo aamukhalinghaawe ntoko guvernadori," 
Ezra5:15 anamulamulela: ‘Mukuxe ikaruma iya, mwiikaathi Mpaani mwa Yave oYerusaleemu ni mwarasele Empa ya Muluku vaniproniwaya na khalayi.’" 
Ezra5:16 Hiiho Xexibazari ole aahoorwa, anateka mathipelo a Empa ya Muluku oYerusaleemu. Okhuma nihuku nenenenne mpaka olelo ennatekiwa, mene kheenaaye omalihiwa.”" 
Ezra5:17 Vano wooreerelani amwene, mulamule owehawehiwa munamalepelani a emwene a oBabiloniya weera moone vekhaikhai mwene Siru alamulela oraseliwa Empa ya Muluku oYerusaleemu. Ningweherera yoowaakhulaanyu wa mwaheene yoola." 
Ezra6:1 Vano mwene Dariyexi aalamulela owehawehiwa munamalepelani a oBabiloniya aari omuhakhuni wa emwene oBabiloniya. 
Ezra6:2 Elivuru yooneleliwe musidadeni yoolipihiwaxa yiitthaniwa wEkebatana, elapo ya Mediya ni mulivurini ele yaalepwa ha:" 
Ezra6:3 Vayaakhani yoopacera ya olamula wa mwene Siru, owo aavaha ekano mwaha wa Empa ya Muluku oYerusaleemu: Empa ya Yave eraseliwe weera sipakiwemo sooveleela; mathipelowaaya yatekiwe. Orakamelawaya okhaleke imeetru* miloko miili niithannapiili ni mweekhuveelonimwayatho." 
Ezra6:4 Eraseliwe ni misera miraru sa maluku matokotoko ni mmoha wa itthaabwa. Muteko wootheene owo oliviweke ni muhakhu wa emwene. 
Ezra6:5 Ohiya yeeyo, ikaruma sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni sa eparatha* sa empa ya mwene oYerusaleemu mwa seiye Nebukadenezari aakuxalaawe Mpaani mwa Muluku oYerusaleemu aruuhaka oBabiloniya sihokoloxeriweke mmapuronimwaya Mpaani mwa Muluku oYerusaleemu. Siikaathiweke mwemmo." 
Ezra6:6 Vano Tatenai, guvernadori a ilapo sa okhopela mooloko Efratesi, Xetari-Bozenai vamoha ni asitokweene akina a ilapo sa okhopela mooloko Efratesi – mwasusewo!" 
Ezra6:7 Muhikacamihe muteko omvariwa Empeene yeeyo ya Muluku. Guvernadori asitokweene a aYuda yaraseleke Empeene yeeyo ya Muluku vanipuroniwaya na khalayi. 
Ezra6:8 Ohiya toko yeeyo, miyo kinlamulela weera mwaakhavihere asitokweene a aYuda mooraselani wa Empa ya Muluku. Kinlamulelatho weera miteko sootheene sa atthweene yaawo siliviwekeno omuhakhuni wa emwene ni misoko sinaakheliwa sa ilapo sa okhopela mooloko Efratesi weera muteko oheemele." 
Ezra6:9 Khula nihuku mwaavaheke asaserdoti* a oYerusaleemu sootheene sintthuneya ompakela Muluku a wiirimu sooveleela soohisa, sikhalaka imombe ilopwana, anapunci, ikhondoolo ilopwana sikhaani, vamoha ni etrigu, maakha, eviinyu ni makhura. Vano mwaavaheke woohicombela." 
Ezra6:10 Hiiho awosa empakele Muluku a wiirimu sooveleela soomusiveliha ni emvekelele mpuha mwene ni anamwanaawe. 
Ezra6:11 Kinlamulelatho weera akhala mukina anaarambure ekano ela, wakuxiwe mukhukulu owannyawe, aswanyeriweno. Vano empaawe yatatuxiwe ettuxo."
