Ezra6:12 Vano Muluku mwa Yoowo aalakenle weera Nsinanawe nikhalewo, amphwate akhalaru mwene hoye hoye muloko oneera weerere oceendya ekano ela naari ophwata Empa ya Yave oYerusaleemu. Miyo, Dariyexi koolaleiya ekano ela. Vano ettharihiweke nnenesene." 
Ezra6:13 Vano, yaakhelakaru ekano ya mwene Dariyexi, Tatenai, guvernadori a ilapo sa okhopela mooloko Efratesi, Xetari-Bozenai, vamoha ni asitokweene akina yaakwanihera ekanoweene yeele moota woomalela." 
Ezra6:14 Vano asitokweene a aYuda yannapwaherera oteka ni weeteteela nnenesene ni olipiheya murima niwoko na olaleiya wa maprofeeti Hagai ni Zakariya a ekhapira ya Ido. Yaamalihera otekiwa wa Empa ya Yave ntoko Muluku a aYixrayeli aalamulenlaawe ni ettharaka ikano sa Siru, Dariyexi ni Aritaxaxete, mamwene a oParesi." 
Ezra6:15 Empa ya Yave yaamalihiwe munihukuni nanaararu na mweeri wanaararu oniitthaniwa Adari, vayaakhani yanaathannamosa ya olamula wa mwene Dariyexi." 
Ezra6:16 Vahoolowaya muloko wa aYixrayeli – asaserdoti*, aLeevi ni ootheenaawo yaahokolongwe wootthukiwani yaapaka efesta, ehakalalelaka otteelihiwa wa Empa ya Muluku." 
Ezra6:17 Wootteeliheriwani Empa ya Muluku yaapaka sooveleela yiivaka imombe ilopwana ncira, anapunci macira meeli, ikhondoolo ilopwana sikhaani macira maxexe, ni wa soottheka wa aYixrayeli ootheene yaahiiva ipuri ilopwana muloko ni piili – emoha wa khula epuumba ya aYixrayeli." 
Ezra6:18 Vano yaahaakhaliha asaserdoti* mmipattanimwaya ni hiihotho aLeevi mmikuttulanimwaya wa omurumeela Muluku oYerusaleemu, ettharihaka yeeyo elempwale mulivuruni ya Nlamulo na Moisesi." 
Ezra6:19 Munihukuni na naamuloko ni maxexe na mweeri woopacera anamatthukiwa aYixrayeli yaapaka efesta ya mPaska*. 
Ezra6:20 Asaserdoti* ni aLeevi yaahiitteeliha ni yaari ootteela, ettharihaka soonyesereriwasaya sa otteela. aLeevi yaahiiva eputtiputthi ya mPaska* wa anamatthukiwa aYixrayeli ootheene, wa axunnaya asaserdoti* ni wa asineenaaya." 
Ezra6:21 Hiiho aYixrayeli yaahokolongwe wootthukiwani yaahooca vamoha ni ootheene yaale yiitteelinghe mwa soopakiwa soohitteela sa aximwaattamanaaya anamarwa weera emwaasaase Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli." 
Ezra6:22 Yaapaka efesta ya epaawu yoohikhalano eferementu mmahukuni mathannameeli niwoko Yave aahaasariha ohakalala wooceendya murima wa mwene a wAsiriya moota wooweera mwene ole aahaakhavihera yaawo ni otekiwa wa Empa ya Muluku, Muluku a aYixrayeli." 
Ezra7:1 Siviraleene itthu iye, moolamulani mwa mwene Aritaxaxete, mwene a oParesi, aakhala mulopwana iitthaniwa Ezera. Aari mwaana mulopwana a Seraya, mwaana mulopwana a Azariya, mwaana mulopwana a Hilikiya" 
Ezra7:2 mwaana mulopwana a Xalumi, mwaana mulopwana a Zadoki, mwaana mulopwana a Ahitube," 
Ezra7:3 mwaana mulopwana a Amariya, mwaana mulopwana a Azariya, mwaana mulopwana a Merayoti," 
Ezra7:4 mwaana mulopwana a Zerahiya, mwaana mulopwana a Uzi, mwaana mulopwana a Buki," 
Ezra7:5 mwaana mulopwana a Abixuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Pinehasi, mwaana mulopwana a Eleyazari, mwaana mulopwana a Aharoni, Musaserdoti* mutokweene." 
Ezra7:6 Vano Ezera owo aarweenle oBabiloniya. Aari namalepa aasuwelanxe nnenesene Nlamulo na Moisesi naavahiwe ni Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli. Mwene aamvaha sootheene aavekenlaawe niwoko ntata na Yave Mulukwaawe naari mwa yoowo." 
Ezra7:7 Akina a aYixrayeli, mpaka asaserdoti*, aLeevi, anamwiipa, anamalipelela milako ni arumeiyi a Empa ya Yave yaarowatho oYerusaleemu muyaakhani yanaathannapiili ya olamula wa mwene Artaxaxete." 
Ezra7:8 Ezera aaphiyale oYerusaleemu mmweerini wanaathanu wa eyaakha yanaathannapiili ya olamula wa mwene. 
Ezra7:9 Munihukuni noopacera na mweeri woopacera owo aavenya oBabiloniya anaphiya oYerusaleemu vanihukuni noopacera mweeri wanaathanu niwoko ntata noosareya ikharari na Mulukwaawe naari ni yoowo. 
Ezra7:10 Vano Ezera aalakela okhalela nthiti osoma Nlamulo na Yave ni weettela aaxutihaka aYixrayeli ikanosaya ni soolamulasaya. 
Ezra7:11 Vano ekaratta mwene Aritaxaxete aamwinnyerenraawe musaserdoti* Ezera, ni namalepa, mulopwana aaxuttihiwe munlamuloni ni mukanoni sa Yave a aYixrayeli, yeenre ha:" 
Ezra7:12 Aritaxaxete, mwene a mamwene, wa Ezera, Musaserdoti* ni namahusiha a Nlamulo na Muluku a wiirimu – salaama ni murettele." 
Ezra7:13 Miyo kinlamulela weera akhalaru muYixrayeli a moomwenenimwaka, mpaka asaserdoti* ni aLeevi, anaatthune orowa oYerusaleemu ni nyuwo – khamwaha." 
Ezra7:14 Nyuwo munrumihiwa ni mwene ni anamalakaawe athanneeli weera mwakohakohe oYerusaleemu, elapo ya oYuda mwaha wa Nlamulo na Mulukwaanyu ori mmatatanimwanyu." 
Ezra7:15 Ohiya toko yeeyo, murowaneke eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha* mwa yeeyo mwene ni anamalakaawe amvanghaaya ni otthunawaya Muluku a aYixrayeli, mwa Yoowo onkhala oYerusaleemu." 
Ezra7:16 Mukuxe vamoha ni eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha* yootheene muneeraanyu mwaakhele mweelaponi mwa oBabiloniya nitho sooveleela sa otthunawaya sa muloko ni asaserdoti* wa Empa ya Mulukwaaya oYerusaleemu. 
Ezra7:17 Ni musurukhu owo mwathumele imombe ilopwana, anapunci ni ikhondoolo vamoha ni seiyo sineera sitthuneye wa sooveleelasanyu soowura ni sa etrigu ni mwapakelewo sooveleela seiyo valtaarini* a Empa ya Mulukwaanyu oYerusaleemu." 
Ezra7:18 Nyuwo ni axunninyu aYuda mwapakeke eniyooreereleni ni eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa eniihale eyo, muttharihaka otthuna wa Mulukwaanyu." 
Ezra7:19 Mwamvahe Muluku a oYerusaleemu ikaruma sootheene weera sirumeeliweno Mpaani mwa Mulukwaanyu. 
Ezra7:20 Ni sootheene iyo sinisitthuneye wa Empa ya Mulukwaanyu sinooliviwano omuhakhuni wa emwene. 
Ezra7:21 Vano miyo, mwene Aritaxaxete kinaalamulela anamawehaweha ootheene a soosungiwa a ilapo sa okhopela mooloko Efratesi weera mwamvahe Ezera, musaserdoti* ni muhusiha a Nlamulo na Muluku a wiirimu, sootheene aneeraawe oovekeleni –" 
Ezra7:22 mpakatho ikiilu* 3 400 sa eparatha*; iliitru* 22 000 sa etrigu, iliitru* 2 200 sa eviinyu; iliitru* 2 200 sa sooliveira*, makhura, ni maakha ootheene eniitthuneye." 
Ezra7:23 Sootheene Muluku a wiirimu onnyesererihaawe wa Empaawe sipakiweke ni nthiti weera ahirumihele isarasawe omwene wa mwene ni wa anamwanaawe asilopwana. 
Ezra7:24 Musuwele nnenesene weera nyuwosa khamunono ikuru waanyesereriha misoko, micaango hoye hoye sooliviha sa akhalaru musaserdoti*, muLeevi, namwiipa, namalipelela, murumeiyi a Empa ya Muluku hoye hoye akhalaru namuteko mukina a Empeene yeeyo ya Muluku." 
Ezra7:25 Vano nyuwo, Ezera, ni miruku oovanghaaweni Mulukwaanyu, mwaakhalihe anamalamula ni aphuki weera ekwanihere ekhaikhai wa atthu ootheene a ilapo sa okhopela mooloko Efratesi – ootheene ansuwela malamulo a Mulukwaanyu. Ni mwaaxuttihe yaale ahisuwenle malamulo ale." 
Ezra7:26 Yaawo eneera ehiiwelele malamulo a Mulukwaanyu ni malamulo a mwene ethoriheliwe okhwa hoye hoye eronghiwe wootthukiwani, naari yaakhiwe sooreelasaya hoye hoye ewaleliwe." 
Ezra7:27 Yave, Muluku a makholowaahu atthapeliwe, mwa Yoowo aamviriyenle mwene weera attittimihe moota ola Empa ya Yave oYerusaleemu." 
Ezra7:28 Owo aakoonihera murima wooreera vamaithoni wa mwene, anamalakaawe ni asitokweenaawe ootheene ooweraxa. Neenre ntata na Yave Mulukwaaka naakhala ni miyo, kaalipiheya murima, kinaathukumanyiha asitokweene akina akina a aYixrayeli weera erowe ni miyo." 
Ezra8:1 Mapwattapwattha ni imusi sa yaale yaalepaniwaaya, mwa yaawo yaavennye ni miyo oBabiloniya moolamulanimwawe mwene Artaxaxete ti ala:" 
Ezra8:2 a ekhapira ya Pinehasi, Gerxomo; a ekhapira ya Ithamari, Daniyeli, a ekhapira ya Davide, Hatuxi;" 
Ezra8:3 a ekhapira ya Xekaneya, a ekhapira ya Paroxi, Zakariya ni vamoha ni yoowo asilopwana ncira ni miloko mithanu yaalempwe;" 
Ezra8:4 a ekhapira ya Pahati-Mowabe, Elihunai, mwaana mulopwana a Zerahiya ni vamoha ni yoowo asilopwana macira meeli;" 
Ezra8:5 a ekhapira ya Zatu, Xekaneya, mwaana mulopwana a Yahaziyeli ni vamoha ni yoowo asilopwana macira mararu;" 
Ezra8:6 a ekhapira ya Adini, Ebedi, mwaana mulopwana a Yonatani ni vamoha ni yoowo asilopwana miloko mithanu." 
Ezra8:7 a ekhapira ya Elami, Yexaya, mwaana mulopwana a Ataliya, ni vamoha ni yoowo asilopwana miloko mithannamiili;" 
Ezra8:8 a ekhapira ya Xefateya, Zebedeya, mwaana mulopwana a Mixayeli ni vamoha ni yoowo asilopwana miloko mithannamiraru;" 
Ezra8:9 a ekhapira ya Yowabi, Obadiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehiyeli, ni vamoha ni yoowo asilopwana macira meeli ni muloko ni athannaararu;" 
Ezra8:10 a ekhapira ya Bani, Xelomiti, mwaana mulopwana a Yosifiya ni vamoha ni yoowo asilopwana ncira ni miloko mithannamosa;" 
Ezra8:11 a ekhapira ya Bebai, Zakariya, mwaana mulopwana a Bebai ni vamoha ni yoowo asilopwana miloko miili ni athannaararu;" 
Ezra8:12 a ekhapira ya Azegade, Yohanani, mwaana mulopwana a Hakatani ni vamoha ni yoowo asilopwana ncira ni muloko mmoha;" 
Ezra8:13 a ekhapira ya Adonikami, atthu ookisera yaaphiyale, Elifeleti, Yehuweli ni Xemaya ni vamoha ni yaale asilopwana miloko mithannamosa ni" 
Ezra8:14 a ekhapira ya Bigevai, Utai ni Zakuri ni vamoha ni yaale asilopwana miloko mithannamiili." 
Ezra8:15 Miyo kaahaathukumanyiha atthweene yaale mukerekhere mooloko onkela mpatta wa Ahava, nnakonelawo mahuku mararu. Miyo kaawehawehaaka variyari wa muloko ni asaserdoti*, nkaamphwannyeru muLeevi." 
Ezra8:16 Tivawo kaamwiitthannaaka Eliyezeri, Ariyeli, Xemaya, Elinatani, Yaribi, Elinatani, Natani, Zakariya ni Mexulami yaari ahooleli ni Yoyaribi ni Elinatani yaari anamiruku," 
Ezra8:17 kinaarumihela wa Ido, mutokweene a oKasifiya. Miyo kaahaathalihera yeeyo yaatthuneya omuleela Ido ni atthwaawe yaari arumeiyi a Empa ya Yave oKasifiya weera eniruuhele anamarumeela wa Empa ya Mulukwaahu." 
Ezra8:18 Neenre ntata noosareya ikharari na Muluku nakhala mwa hiyo, awosa yaaniruuhela Xerebeya, mulopwana ooweraxa, a ekhapira ya Maheli, mwaana mulopwana a Leevi, mwaana mulopwana a Yixrayeli, vamoha ni anamwane asilopwana ni axunneiye Xerebeya – ootheenaawo asilopwana muloko ni athannaararu," 
Ezra8:19 ni Haxabeya vamoha ni Yexaya, a ekhapira ya Merari, ni axunneiye ni anamwanaawe – ootheenaawo asilopwana miloko miili." 
Ezra8:20 Yaahaaruuhatho arumeiyi a Empa ya Yave macira meeli ni miloko miili – mukuttula aakhalihalaawe Davide ni asitokweenaawe weera yaakhavihere aLeevi. Vano masina a ootheene yaale yaalempwa mulivuruni ya namalepela. 
Ezra8:21 Iwe, mukerekhere mooloko wAhava, miyo kaalaleiya otthuka weera niiyevihe vamaithoni wa Mulukwaahu ni nimuvekele ekhavihero ya munkwahani wa hiyo ni anamwaniihu vamoha ni sooreelasahu sootheene." 
Ezra8:22 Khawaakikhalenle nnene omuvekela mwene anakhotto ni anamweettiha ikavalu* weera enaakihe wa amwiittana mphironi, niwoko naamweerela: “Ntata noosareya ikharari na Mulukwaahu nri mwa ootheene ammwaasa, vaheera isarasawe sitokotoko khasiniiwanana ni yaale animuhiya.”" 
Ezra8:23 Tivawo naatthunkaahu nidyoonttelelaka mareeliho a Mulukwaahu ni Owo oonaakhulela. 
Ezra8:24 Vahoolowaya kaahaathanla asaserdoti* muloko neeli a asaserdoti* asitokweenexa – Xerebeya, Haxabeya ni atthu muloko a axunneiye –" 
Ezra8:25 ni kaaringa ohoolowaya soovaha sa eparatha*, eyuuma yoorikaxa ni ikaruma mwene, anamalakaawe, asitokweenaawe ni aYixrayeli ootheene yaariwo yaavanghe wa Empa ya Mulukwaahu." 
Ezra8:26 Kaaringa ohoolowaya kinawinnyerera ikiilu* 22 000 sa eparatha*, ikiilu* 3 400 sa ikaruma sa eparatha*, ikiilu* 3 400 sa eyuuma yoorikaxa," 
Ezra8:27 ibasiya miloko miili sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yaalemela ikiilu* ithanatthaaru ni eriyari ya ekiilu* emoha, ni ikaruma piili sooreeraxa sa ebronze* sootthuneyaxa ntoko eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Ezra8:28 Miyo kaaweerela: “Nyuwo ni ikaruma iya mootteeliheriwa Yave. Eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa ti sooveleela sa otthunawanyu wa Yave, Muluku a makholowaanyu." 
Ezra8:29 Muthokorore nnenesene mpaka muneeraanyu mwaringe mmakwartuni mwa Empa ya Yave oYerusaleemu vamaithoni wa asaserdoti* asitokweene, aLeevi ni mapwattapwattha a aYixrayeli.”" 
Ezra8:30 Vano asaserdoti* ni aLeevi yaahaakhela eparatha*, eyuuma yoorikaxa ni ikaruma sootteliheriwa saaringiwe weera siroihiwe oYerusaleemu, oMpaani ya Mulukwaahu." 
Ezra8:31 Munihukuni nanaamuloko ni meeli na mweeri woopacera, hiyo naattimula omoolokoni wAhava, nnarowa oYerusaleemu. Ntata na Mulukwaahu naari ni hiyo ni Owo aanaakiha mphironi mwa amwiittana ni anamahuhula." 
Ezra8:32 Hiiho naaphiya oYerusaleemu, nniitthuuwawo mahuku mararu." 
Ezra8:33 Vanihukuni nanaaxexe, Mpaani mwa Yave, naaringa eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa ni ikaruma sootteeliheriwa, ninamvaha Meremoti mwaana mulopwana a musaserdoti* Uriya. Eleyazari, mwaana mulopwana a Pinehasi aari ni yoowo ni hiihotho aLeevi Yozabade, mwaana mulopwana a Yexuwa ni Nowadeya, mwaana mulopwana a Bavai." 
Ezra8:34 Sootheene saaringiwa sinaalikeliwa ni olemelawaya wootheene waalempwa ehuhuweene yeele. 
Ezra8:35 Vano anamatthukiwa yaahokolongwe wootthukiwani oBabiloniya yaampakela Muluku a aYixrayeli sooveleela soohisa: imombe ilopwana muloko ni piili wa aYixrayeli ootheene; anapunci miloko mithannamixexe ni athannamosa; iputtiputthi ilopwana miloko mithannamiili niithannapiili ni, ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, ipuri ilopwana muloko ni piili. Sootheene iye saari sooveleela soohisa wa Yave." 
Ezra8:36 Yaahaavahatho soolamula sa Aritaxaxete mapwattapwattha a mwene ni maguvernadori a ilapo sa okhopela mooloko Efratesi, ni awosa yaahaakhavihera aYixrayeli ni otekiwa wa Empa ya Muluku." 
Ezra9:1 Sipakiweene itthusene seiye, asitokweene yaakaattamela, enakeerela: “Atthu a oYixrayeli vamoha ni asaserdoti* ni aLeevi khaamwalamwanle ni miloko soowaattamana ni soopakasaya sa mwiikho – ntoko sa aKanaani, aHiti, aPerizi, aYebusi, awAmoni, aMowabe, awExipitu ni awAmori." 
Ezra9:2 Awosa ni anamwanaaya aathelana ni miloko iye enatakanserana ekhapira yootteela. Vano ahooleli ni asitokweene ti ari oopacera opaka ohiroromeleya iwo.” 
Ezra9:3 Kiiwakaru yeeyo, kaahaahula evestiduwaaka ni mukaandyowaaka, kinarosola mayihaaka ni irerusaka, kinakilaathi oothananaxeene." 
Ezra9:4 Vano ootheene yoova masu a Muluku a aYixrayeli, yaathukumana ekirukureenreene niwoko na ohiroromeleya iwe wa yaale yaahokolongwe wootthukiwani. Miyo kaakilaathiwo oothananaxeene mpaka ehuhu yooveleela ya ohiyu." 
Ezra9:5 Vanonto, mweehuhuni ya opaka sooveleela sa ohiyu, kaavenya moothanananimwaka, evestiduwaaka ni mukaandyowaaka woowaahuweene, kinakokhora, kinatheteela matata wa Yave Mulukwaaka," 
Ezra9:6 kinamvekela: “Ii Mulukwaaka! Kootepaxa wuulihiwa muru ni kooyevihiwa moota wooweera nkingwera woowehani Nyuwo, Mulukwaaka, niwoko sootthekasahu sookuttelela muruwaahu ni nthowanahu noophiya wiirimu." 
Ezra9:7 Okhuma mahuku a makholowaahu mpaka olelo nthowanahu nohunnuwaxa. Niwoko na sootthekasahu hiyo, mamwenaahu ni asaserdoti* nohinnyereriwa mmahooxoni a ekatana, wootthukiwani, moohuhuliwani ni oyevihiwa mmatatani mwa mamwene a ilapo sikina, ntoko eneereyaaya olelo." 
Ezra9:8 Vaheera nnaanaanoni, Yave Mulukwaahu oonoonihera murimaawe wooreera apakihaka weera akina akina a hiyo etapuxeye ephwanyaka nipuro noolipeene mpaanimwawe. Hiiho Mulukwaahu oomwaleela maithwaahu ni ookurunuxa opakiwawahu opottha." 
Ezra9:9 Hata nireene ipottha, Mulukwaahu khanihingye mpotthanimwahu. Owo oonoonihera murimaawe wooreera vamaithoni wa mamwene a oParesi: Oonivaha okumi munyowani weera nirasele Empa ya Mulukwaahu ni nivenyererihe mathalaaya, ananivaha exiri yoowiixaakiherano oYuda ni oYerusaleemu." 
Ezra9:10 Mene ii! Mulukwaahu, neereke hai mwaha wa itthusene seiye? Hiyo khaniiwelenle malamulo" 
Ezra9:11 munivanghaanyu mwa arumeiyaanyu maprofeeti, mweenraanyu: ‘Elapo muneeraanyu mwakuxe ti elapo yoosareya soohitteela sa amakaaya. Awosa aahiiriha elapo yootheene ni soopakasaya sa mwiikho." 
Ezra9:12 Tivawo asinamwaniinyu asithiyana muhaathelihe ni anamwanaaya asilopwana, hata muhiwaakhulele anamwaniinyu asilopwana waathela anamwanaaya asithiyana. Muhaasaase wiiraana ni yaawo hata okhalawaya nnene weera nyuwosa mukhale oolipeene ni mwakuxe soowiima sooreera sa mulaponi mwaahiyeraka anamwaniinyu ntoko yoohiyeriwa yoohimala.’" 
Ezra9:13 Seiyo sinikhumelenle ti niwoko na soopakasahu soonanara ni nthowanahu ntokotoko. Hata hiiho, Mulukwaahu, moonittaruxa vakhaani, ohiphiyeraka naaphwanelaahu, munivahaka ahalahanle ala." 
Ezra9:14 Onoowereya hiyo ohokoleela orambura ikanosanyu ni waathela atthu ala a mwiikho? Napaka hiiho, munooninyoonyeriwa mpaka ophiyera oniphwata woomalela, muhinihiyerakaru mutthu." 
Ezra9:15 Ii! Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, Nyuwo ti oororomeleya. Hiyo ninkhala olelo ntoko atthu ahalahanle. Hiyo nri vamaithoniwanyu ni nthowanahu nroosuwelaru weera khawowo a hiyo ongwera okhala vamaithoniwanyu ni nthowa nna.”" 
Ezra10:1 Ezera avekelaka ni alapaka akokhonreene iinlaka ohoolo wa Empa ya Muluku, atthu ancipale a aYixrayeli – asilopwana, asithiyana ni amiravo – yaathukumana emurukureenreene. Awosatho yaahiinlaxa." 
Ezra10:2 Vano Xekaneya, mwaana mulopwana a Yehiyeli, mmoha a ekhapira ya Elami, aamweerela Ezera: “Khanaaroromeleiye wa Mulukwaahu naathenlaahu asithiyana anamarwa a miloko soowaattamana. Mene orookhalaru hiiho, wookhalatho oweherera wa aYixrayeli." 
Ezra10:3 Vano niiraaneke ni Mulukwaahu niwoomolaka asithiyana ootheene ale ni anamwanaaya, nittharaka miruku sa pwiiyaaka ni sa yaale anoova malamulo a Mulukwaahu. Eyo epakiwe nittharihiwaka Nlamulo." 
Ezra10:4 Mvenye; mulattu ola ori mmatatanimwanyu. Hiyo nnimookhaviherani; vano mulipihe murima ni mpake yeeyo.” 
Ezra10:5 Vano Ezera aavenya, anaanyesereriha asaserdoti* asitokweene, aLeevi ni aYixrayeli ootheene weera elipele opaka yeeyo yaalakenlaaya. Vanonto awosa yaalipela." 
Ezra10:6 Vahoolowaya Ezera aavenya ohoolo wa Empa ya Muluku, anarowa mukwaartuni mwa Yohanani, mwaana mulopwana a Eliyaxibi. Owo ari mwemmo, khaaciiye hata khaawunre alalamikelaka ohiroromela wa anamatthukiwa yaahokolongwe." 
Ezra10:7 Vano mweelaponi ya oYuda ni oYerusaleemu waalaleiwa weera anamatthukiwa ootheene yaahokolongwe ethukumane oYerusaleemu. 
Ezra10:8 Ahooleli ni asitokweene akinaawo yaalakela weera yaawo yeera ehirwe mmahukuni mararu yaamuyeleela sooreelasaya sootheene ni yaamoomoliwa mmuthukumanoni mwa anamatthukiwa. 
Ezra10:9 Mmahukuni mararu, asilopwana ootheene a oYuda ni oBenyamini yaathukumana oYerusaleemu. Vano munihukuni nanaamiloko miili na mweeri wanaathannamixexe atthu ootheene yaakilaathi vanipuwani ohoolo wa Empa ya Muluku, oothananaxeene niwoko na mulattu ole ni na niphirimindo na epula." 
Ezra10:10 Vano musaserdoti* Ezera aavenya, anaweerela: “Moheetta moota woohiroromeleya; mohaathela anamarwa mwaandyeereraka nthowa na oYixrayeli." 
Ezra10:11 Vano, mulape sootthekasanyu ohoolo wa Yave, Muluku a makholowaanyu ni mpake otthunawawe. Mmwalamwale ni miloko soowaattamana ni axaarinyu anamarwa.”" 
Ezra10:12 Muthukumano wootheene waamwaakhula, okhuwelaka: “Ettiitthu, Ontthuneya opaka yeeyo munghimaanyu." 
Ezra10:13 Vaheera va, aakhala atthu ancipale ni ela eyiitta, tiwawo nihikhaleke vaate. Ohiya toko yeeyo, khoongwereya omaliha mulattu ola nihuku nimoha hoye hoye meeli niwoko atthenke hiiha aahaatta." 
Ezra10:14 Ahoolelaahu elakeleke muthukumano wootheene. Vanonto, khula mulopwana a mmittetthenimwahu omuthenle namarwa arweeke mweehuhuni yoothanliwa vamoha ni asitokweene ni aphuki a muttetthaawe mpaka sineeraaya sisusihiwe wa hiyo isara soowoopiha sa Mulukwaahu sitannyiwe ni soottheka iya.”" 
Ezra10:15 Yahaakhulenle yaari Yonatani, mwaana mulopwana a Asaheli ni Yazeya, mwaana mulopwana a Tikeva, vamoha ni aMexulami ni muLeevi Xabetai paahi." 
Ezra10:16 Hiiho anamatthukiwa yaapaka ntoko yaalakenlaaya. Musaserdoti*, Ezera, aahaathanla mapwattapwattha, mmoha a khula emusi – ootheenaawo yiitthaneliwa masinaaya. Munihukuni noopacera na mweeri wanaamuloko yaakilaathi weera ewehawehe khula mulattu." 
Ezra10:17 Munihukuni noopacera na mweeri woopacera yaamalihera milattu sa othelana ni anamarwa. 
Ezra10:18 Eriyari ya ikhapira sa asaserdoti* yaathelanne ni anamarwa saari ti iya: mukhapirani mwa Yexuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Yozadaki, ni axunneiye: Mahaseiya, Eliyezeri, Yaribi ni Gedaliya." 
Ezra10:19 Ootheenaawo yaaroromeliha owoomola axaaraya ni khula mutthu a yaale amuruuha napunci a muhuwaawe ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka. 
Ezra10:20 Mukhapirani ya Imeri: Hanani ni Zebadiya. 
Ezra10:21 Mukhapirani ya Harimi: Mahaseiya, Eliya, Xemaya, Yehiyeli ni Uziya." 
Ezra10:22 Mukhapirani ya Paxuri: Elihunai, Mahaseiya, Iximayeli, Netaneli, Yozabadi ni Elasa." 
Ezra10:23 Eriyari ya aLeevi: Yozabadi, Ximei, Kelaya (eyo tiiyo Kelita), Petaheya, Yuda ni Eliyezeri." 
Ezra10:24 Eriyari ya anamwiipa: Eliyaxibi. Eriyari ya anamalipelela milako: Xalumi, Telemi ni Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Ni eriyari ya aYixrayeli akinaawo: mukhapirani ya Paroxi: Ramiya, Iziya, Malekiya, Miyamini, Eleyazari, Malkiya ni Benaiya." 
Ezra10:26 Mukhapirani ya Elami: Mataneya, Zakariya, Yehiyeli, Abedi, Yeremoti ni Eliya." 
Ezra10:27 Mukhapirani ya Zatu: Elihunai, Eliyaxibi, Mataniya, Yeremoti, Zabadi ni Aziza." 
Ezra10:28 Mukhapirani ya Bebai: Yehohanani, Hananiya, Zabai ni Atelai." 
Ezra10:29 Mukhapirani ya Bani: Mexulami, Maluki, Adaya, Yaxubi, Xeyali ni Yeremoti." 
Ezra10:30 Mukhapirani ya Pahati-Mowabe: Adena, Kelali, Benaiya, Mahaseiya, Mataniya, Bezaleli, Bavai ni Manaxe." 
Ezra10:31 Mukhapirani ya Harimi: Eliyezeri, Ixiya, Malekiya, Xemaya, Ximeyoni," 
Ezra10:32 Benyamini, Maluki, Xemariya." 
Ezra10:33 Mukhapirani ya Haxumi: Matenai, Matata, Zabadi, Elifeleti, Yeremai, Manaxe ni Ximei." 
Ezra10:34 Mukhapirani ya Bani: Mahadai, Amerami ni Uweli," 
Ezra10:35 Benaiya, Beneya, Keluhi," 
Ezra10:36 Vaniya, Meremoti, Eliyaxibi," 
Ezra10:37 Mateneya, Matenai ni Yahasu." 
Ezra10:38 Mukhapirani ya Bavai: Ximei," 
Ezra10:39 Xelemeya, Natani, Adaya," 
Ezra10:40 Makenadebai, Xaixai, Xarai," 
Ezra10:41 Azareli, Xelemeya, Xemariya," 
Ezra10:42 Xalumi, Amariya ni Yoseefe." 
Ezra10:43 Mukhapirani ya Nebo: Yeyeli, Matiteya, Zabadi, Zebina, Yadai, Yoweli ni Benaiya." 
Ezra10:44 Asilopwana ootheene ala yaahaathela anamarwa ni akina a yaale yaahaayarano anamwane. 
Nehemiah1:1 Masu a Nehemiya, mwaana a Hakaliya ti ala: Mmweerini oniitthaniwa Kisilevi, muyaakhani yanaamiloko miili, miyo kireene musidadeni yoolipaxa oSusa," 
Nehemiah1:2 Hanani, mmoha a axunnaka, aarweenle oYuda vamoha ni asilopwana akina. Vano kaahaakohakoha mwaha wa aYuda yaahanlewo vahoolo wa ehuhu yaavariwaaya ancipale eroihiwaka oBabiloniya ni mwaha wa oYerusaleemu." 
Nehemiah1:3 Awo yaakaakhula: “Yaawo ahanle vahoolo wa ehuhuweene yeele annahaawa vancipale ni annayevihiwa. Exiri ya oYerusaleemu yookurumuliwa ni maselaaya aahisiwa.” 
Nehemiah1:4 Kiiwakaru itthusene seiye kaathanana, kiinlaka. Wa mahuku makina kaalalamika, kitthukaka ni kivekelaka vamaithoni wa Muluku a wiirimu." 
Nehemiah1:5 Vano kaaheera: “Ii! Yave, Muluku a wiirimu, Nyuwo ti Mutokotoko ni Oowoopiha ni munttittimiha wiiraanawanyu wa osivela ni yaale anoosivelani ni aniiwelela malamulowaanyu." 
Nehemiah1:6 Maaruwaanyu ewiriyaneke ni maithwaanyu ehuleyeke wa mavekelo murumeiyaanyu ompakaawe ohoolowanyu othana ni ohiyu aweerelaka arumeiyaanyu, aYixrayeli. Kinlapa soottheka hiyo, aYixrayeli, nootthekenlaahuni. Aani, miyo ni mulokwaaka noottheka." 
Nehemiah1:7 Noheetta ntoko attiyamaaru woowuuliheya muru wa Nyuwo. Khaniiwelenle ikano, malamulo ni soonyesereriwa mwaamvanghaanyu murumeiyaanyu, Moisesi." 
Nehemiah1:8 Vano, muupuwelele mwaamweerenlaanyu murumeiyaanyu Moisesi: ‘Nyuwo mwaahiroromeleya, Miyo kinimoomwaramwaxelani variyari wa miloko." 
Nehemiah1:9 Vaheera, mwakihokoleela mwiiwelelaka malamulowaaka mweettelaka yaawo, vano Miyo kinimoothukumanyasani naari nyuwosa mmwaramwareiyeene mmapuroni oorakamela. Aani, kinimooruuhasani nipuro kithanlalaaka weera nimakewo Nsinanaka.’" 
Nehemiah1:10 Awo ti arumeiyaanyu ni mulokwaanyu, mwa yaawo ngwooponlaanyu ni ikurusanyu sitokotoko ni Ntatananyu noolipaxa." 
Nehemiah1:11 Ii! Yave, Maaruwaanyu ewiriyaneke nivekelo na murumeiyaanyu ni mavekelo a arumeiyaanyu anoova Nsinananyu. Mweerihe weera murumeiyaanyu ola olelo arandeliwe nnenesene areereliwaka murima wa mwene.” Vano ehuhuweene yeele miyo kaari namarumeela a soowura a mwene." 
Nehemiah2:1 Mmweerini oniitthaniwa Nisani, muyaakhani yanaamiloko miili ya mwene Aritaxaxete, ehuhu yoomurumeela eviinyu, miyo kaamuronghela mwene. Nkinatoko othananaxa ohoolowawe." 
Nehemiah2:2 Tivawo mwene aakikonghaawe: “Heeni ekhovaawo eraaya yoohitteene weyo ohivoreiwaka? Ohitta wu okhalaka wa murima.” Miyo kaahoova vancipale," 
Nehemiah2:3 kinamweerela mwene: “Mwene akhale ni okumi mahuku ootheene! Ekhovaaka enghittela, niwoko esidade, mwa weiwo makholowaaka avithingwaaya, eri mathala ni maselaaya aahisiwa.”" 
Nehemiah2:4 Mwene aakeerela: “Weyo ontthunani?” Vano miyo, kivekelaka wa Muluku a wiirimu," 
Nehemiah2:5 kaamwaakhula mwene: “Wooreenreni amwene ni murumeiyaanyu aakhuleleya vamaithoniwanyu, mukitthunihere orowa esidade eri oYuda mwa mweiwo avithingwaayamo makholowaaka weera kateketho.”" 
Nehemiah2:6 Vano mwene ni pwiyamwene akilaantheene mukhwipimwawe, aakikoha: “Ommala mahuku mahai mukwaahaawo ni onghokolowa yaakhani?” Kaahaaleela amwene malekelelowaaka, ni awo yaakaakhula weera kiroweke." 
Nehemiah2:7 Kaamweerela mwene: “Wooreenreni amwene, mukivaheke ikaratta wa maguvernadori ari okhopela mooloko Efratesi weera ekitthunihere ophiya oYuda." 
Nehemiah2:8 Mukivahetho ekaratta wa Asafi, mutokweene a othako wa mwene weera akivahe itthaabwa soopakela masele a esidade yoolipaxa eri vakhiviru ni Empa ya Muluku, wa exiri ya esidade ni wa nipuro kineeraaka kakhale.” Weenre onnene wa Muluku wakhala ni miyo, mwene aakaakhulela soovekelasaka." 
Nehemiah2:9 Vano kaarowa wa maguvernadori ari okhopela mooloko Efratesi, kinaavaherera ikaratta sa mwene. Vanonto, mwene aahaarumihatho asitokweene akina a anakhotto ni anamweettiha ikavalu* weera ekihoole." 
Nehemiah2:10 Sanibalata, muHoroni ni Tobiya, ngwAmoni mutokweene mmoha, yiiwaka yeeyo, khayaahakalalanse woowoona weera mukina ohoorwa aasaasaka mpuha wa aYixrayeli." 
Nehemiah2:11 Kaaphiya oYerusaleemu ni kiviringheenewo mahuku mararu," 
Nehemiah2:12 kaavenya ohiyu ni asilopwana akina vakhaani. Nkaamuthalihenre naari mutthu mmoha yeeyo Mulukwaaka iikaathenraawe mmurimanimwaka yoopakela oYerusaleemu. Nkaamukuxaleru mwaamunama mukina ahikhanle yoowo kaangwenlaaka. 
Nehemiah2:13 Moohiyuni kaakhuma kiviraka Mulako wa Oreyareyani kirowaka oNaattuuttuni wa Khwatte ni Mulako wa Osalani, kiwehawehaka exiri ya oYerusaleemu yaakurumuliwe ni milakosaya saahisiwe." 
Nehemiah2:14 Vahoolowaya kaarowa mpaka Mulako wa Naattuuttu ni ontthiyani wa mwene, mene khanaariwo nlaka noovira mwaamunamaaka." 
Nehemiah2:15 Tivawo kaawelenlaaka oreyareyani ohiyu kiwehawehaka exiri. Vahoolowaya kaahokoleela kivoleelaka Mulako wa Oreyareyani. 
Nehemiah2:16 Asitokweene khayaasuwenle weiwo kaarongwaaka hata yeeyo kaapankaaka, niwoko mpaka ehuhuweene yeele miyo nkaaleenle etthu aYuda naari asaserdoti*, hata maneethi naari asitokweene hoye hoye akhalaru mukina a yaawo yeera ekwanihere muteko ole." 
Nehemiah2:17 Vano kaaweerela: “Moone mahooxo nraahuno: oYerusaleemu wooheleya nthala ni milakosaya soohisiwa. Nrowe, niteketho exiri ya oYerusaleemu weera nihipwahereretho mmukhaleloni ola woonyoorweya.”" 
Nehemiah2:18 Kaahaathaliheratho moota wa onnene Yave aaraaweno ni miyo ni yeeyo mwene aakeerenlaawe. Vano awo yaahaakhula: “Nrowe niteketho.” Vanonto yaasareyasa olipa murima woovara muteko wooreera ole. 
Nehemiah2:19 Sanibalata, muHoroni, Tobiya, ngwAmoni mutokweene mmoha, ni Gexemi, ngwArabi yiiwaka yeeyo, yaanitheya, eninyemulaka yeeraka: “Mumpakani? Munimvaanya mwene?”" 
Nehemiah2:20 Miyo kaawaakhulasa: “Muluku a wiirimu onooneettihera nnene. Hiyo, arumeiyaawe, nnoopacera otekatho. Vaheera nyuwo khamunono mpatta, hata nsu muYerusaleemu, niwoko khamumpatta nnyahanimwaya.”" 
Nehemiah3:1 Eliyaxibi, mutokweene a asaserdoti*, ni asaserdoti* asikhwaawe yaapacera ovara muteko eraselaka Mulako wa Ikhondoolo. Awo yaatteeliha owo yiikaathiki maselaaya mmapuronimwaya, eraselaka mpaka Etoore* ya Ncira ni Etoore* ya Hananeli." 
Nehemiah3:2 Asilopwana a oYeriko yaarasela mpatta waattharelana ni Zakuri, mwaana mulopwana a Imiri aarasela ciireru ohoolo." 
Nehemiah3:3 Mulako wa Ihopa waaraseliwe ni anamwane asilopwana a Hasenaha. Yaahelela isereemu yiikaatheraka maselaaya, etthaabwa yoowalela ni anampattika mmapuronimwaya." 
Nehemiah3:4 Meremoti, mwaana mulopwana a Uriya, mwaana mulopwana a Hakozi, aarasela mpatta waattharelana. Mukhwipimwawe Mexulami, mwaana mulopwana a Berekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Mexezabeli, aarasela ni mukhwipimwawe Zadoki, mwaana mulopwana a Bahana, aaraselatho." 
Nehemiah3:5 Mpatta woottharelana waaraseliwe ni asilopwana a oTekowa, mene maneethaaya khayaatthunne otakansana vamutekoni ekhoottaka elamulelo ya anamawehaweha." 
Nehemiah3:6 Mulako wa khalayi waaraseliwe ni Yoiyada, mwaana mulopwana a Paseiya ni Mexulami, mwaana mulopwana a Besodeya. Yaahelela isereemu yiikaatheraka maselaaya, etthaabwa yoowalela ni anampattika mmapuronimwaya." 
Nehemiah3:7 Mukhwipimwaya waaraseliwe ni Melatiya a oGibiyoni ni Yadoni a oMerenoti – asilopwana a oGibiyoni ni oMizepa, ilapo saalamuliwa ni guvernadori a okhopela wa Efratesi." 
Nehemiah3:8 Uziyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Harahaya, mmoha a anamahana a eyuuma yoorikaxa, aarasela mpatta onttharelana ni mukhwipimwawe Hananeya, mmoha a anamweeka a soowunkhela, aarasela. Awosa yaarasela oYerusaleemu mpaka Exiri Yoothanuwa." 
Nehemiah3:9 Refaya, mwaana mulopwana a Huri, namalamula a mpatta mmoha wa oYerusaleemu, aarasela mpatta waattharelana." 
Nehemiah3:10 Mukhwipimwawe Yedaya, mwaana mulopwana a Harumafi, aarasela ohoolo wa empaawe ni mukhwipimwawe Hatuxi, mwaana mulopwana a Haxabeneya aarasela." 
Nehemiah3:11 Malekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Harimi, ni Paxubi, mwaana mulopwana a Pahati-Mowabe, yaaraselasa mpatta mukina ni Etoore* ya Maikho." 
Nehemiah3:12 Xalumi, mwaana mulopwana a Haloxexe, namalamula a mpatta mukina wa oYerusaleemu, aarasela mpatta waattharelana ni ekhavihero ya anamwanaawe asithiyana." 
Nehemiah3:13 Mulako wa Oreyareyani waaraseliwa ni Hanuni ni atthu a oZanowa. Yaahelela isereemu yiikaatheraka maselaaya, etthaabwa yoowalela ni anampattika mmapuronimwaya. Yaaraselasatho imeetru* macira maxexe ni miloko mithanu sa exiri mpaka Mulako wa Osalani." 
Nehemiah3:14 Mulako wa Osalani waaraseliwa ni Malekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Rekabi, namalamula a elapo ya oBet-Hakeremi. Aahelela isereemu iikaatheraka maselaaya, etthaabwa yoowalela ni anampattika mmapuronimwaya." 
Nehemiah3:15 Mulako wa Onaattuuttuni waaraseliwa ni Xaluni, mwaana mulopwana a Kol-Hoze, namalamula a elapo ya oMizepa. Aarasela, anathomeela nipatho, iikaatheraka maselaaya, etthaabwa yoowalela ni anampattika mmapuronimwaya. Aaraselatho exiri ya ntthiya na Silowami, vakhiviru wa nttimbe na mwene mpaka ixikada sinkhuruwela esidade ya Davide." 
Nehemiah3:16 Mukhwipimwawe Nehemiya, mwaana mulopwana a Azebuki, namalamula a mpatta mmoha wa elapo ya oBet-Zuri aarasela mpaka ohoolo wa mahiye a Davide, mpakatho ntthiya noothimpwa ni empa ya anakhotto oosuwanyeyaxa." 
Nehemiah3:17 Mukhwipimwawe aLeevi yaalamuliwa ni Rehumi, mwaana mulopwana a Bani, yaarasela ni mukhwipimwaya Haxabeya, namalamula a mpatta mmoha wa elapo ya oKeyila, aarasela mpattaawe." 
Nehemiah3:18 Mukhwipimwawe asikhwaawe yaalamuliwa ni Bavai, mwaana mulopwana a Henadadi, namalamula a mpatta mmoha wa elapo ya oKeyila yaarasela." 
Nehemiah3:19 Mukhwipimwawe Ezeri, mwaana mulopwana a Yexuwa, namalamula a oMizepa, aarasela mpatta mukina, apaceraka mpatta wa ottuttuwani awelelaka mpatta wa empa ya ikapwitthi, mpaka vanloothoni na exiri." 
Nehemiah3:20 Mukhwipimwawe Baruki, mwaana mulopwana a Zabai, aarasela ni nthiti mpatta mukina, okhuma vanloothoni mpaka vamulako wa empa ya Eliyaxibi, mutokweene a asaserdoti*." 
Nehemiah3:21 Mukhwipimwawe Meremoti, mwaana mulopwana a Uriya, mwaana mulopwana a Hakozi, aarasela mpatta mukina, okhuma vamulako wa empa ya Eliyaxibi mpaka ommaleloniwaya." 
Nehemiah3:22 Woottharelana asaserdoti* a ilapo sa mukhwipimwaya yaarasela. 
Nehemiah3:23 Mukhwipimwaya Benyamini ni Haxubi yaarasela ohoolo wa impasaya, ni woottharelana Azariya, mwaana mulopwana a Mahaseiya, mwaana mulopwana a Ananiya, aarasela mpatta wa owannyawe." 
Nehemiah3:24 Mukhwipimwawe Bavai, mwaana mulopwana a Henadadi aarasela mpatta mukina, okhuma empa ya Azariya mpaka vanloothoni na exiri." 
Nehemiah3:25 Vano Palali, mwaana mulopwana a Uzai, aarasela ohoolo wa nlootho na exiri ni na etoore* ekhumme vanankatthani a empa ya mwene, vakhiviru wa nipuwa na namalipelela. Mukhwipimwawe Pedaya, mwaana mulopwana a Paroxi," 
Nehemiah3:26 vamoha ni arumeiyi a Empa ya Muluku yaamanke vanttumuxani na Ofeli, yaarasela mpaka ohoolo wa Mulako wa Maahi mpatta wa ninkhuma nsuwa ni wa etoore* ekhumme weiwe." 
Nehemiah3:27 Mukhwipimwaya asilopwana a oTekowa yaarasela mpatta mukina, okhuma etoore* etokotoko mpaka exiri ya Ofeli." 
Nehemiah3:28 Vasulu wa Mulako wa Ekavalu* asaserdoti* yaarasela, khula musaserdoti* ohoolo wa empaawe." 
Nehemiah3:29 Mukhwipimwaya, Zadoki, mwaana mulopwana a Imeri aarasela mpatta wa ohoolo wa empaawe. Woottharelana Xemaya, mwaana mulopwana a Xekaneya, namalipelela a mulako wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa aarasela." 
Nehemiah3:30 Mukhwipimwawe Hananiya, mwaana mulopwana a Xelemiya, ni Hanuni, mwaana mulopwana anaathannamosa a Zalafi, yaarasela mpatta mukina. Mukhwipimwaya Mexulami, mwaana mulopwana a Berekiya, aarasela ohoolo wa aakonaawewo." 
Nehemiah3:31 Mukhwipimwawe Malekiya, mmoha a anamahana a eyuuma yoorikaxa, aarasela mpaka empa ya arumeiyi a Empa ya Muluku ni ananakoso, ohoolo wa Mulako wa Namalipelela mpaka ekwartu eri vasulu vanloothoni." 
Nehemiah3:32 Vano anamahana ni ananakoso yaarasela okhuma ekwartu vasulu vanloothoni mpaka Mulako wa Ikhondoolo. 
Nehemiah4:1 Sanibalata asuwelaka weera awo yaapacera orasela exiri, aanyoonyiwa vancipale ni aasareya isara. Aahaanyohola aYuda ni" 
Nehemiah4:2 vamaithoni wa asikhwaawe ni anakhotto a oSamariya aaheera: “Ampakasani aYuda oohilipa ale? Weeraka eniirasele exiraaya? Mpaka epakele sooveleela? Eniimalihe muteko munihukuni nimoha paahi? Weeraka eniiwere ovenyereriha maluku ale oohisiwa oovarela muteko a mittunduruma iye sa ittuxo?” 
Nehemiah4:3 Tobiya, ngwAmoni aari mukhwipimwawe, aaheera: “Hata mutekaka, weera arwe khwatte atuphelaka exiri, eyo enookurumuwa ekhalaka muttunduruma!”" 
Nehemiah4:4 Ii! Muluku, muniiwe, niwoko nnoonyemuliwa. Mwaahokoloxere onyemuliwa weera okhale wawaya. Evarasiwe eronghiwaka elapo ekina!" 
Nehemiah4:5 Muhilevelele sootthekasaya naari muhittiwale sootakhalasaya, niwoko aatannyera isarasanyu vamaithoni wa anamateka." 
Nehemiah4:6 Vano nneera niraselaka exiri mpaka wunnuwawaya, noophiya eriyari ya orakamelawaya osulu, niwoko atthu yaavara muteko ni murimaaya wootheene." 
Nehemiah4:7 Wa soothesene, Sanibalata, Tobiya, awArabi, awAmoni ni atthu a wAxidoti, esuwelaka weera oraseliwa wa exiri ya oYerusaleemu waaheettihiwa ni weera mukhatoni waamuttiyattiiwa, yaanyoonyiwa vancipale." 
Nehemiah4:8 Ootheene yaavaanela vamoha owanano oYerusaleemu ni otannyera munyakunyaku. 
Nehemiah4:9 Hiyotho naamvekela Mulukwaahu niwiikaathiki anamalipelela othana ni ohiyu weera enaakihereke. 
Nehemiah4:10 Eyo eri hiiho, atthu a oYuda yaaheera: “Anamateka aakhulumuwa nitho sootepa ittuxo moota wooweera yoohiru khaningwera orasela exiri.”" 
Nehemiah4:11 Amwiittanaahu yaaheeratho: “Awo ehinaaye woonelelasa etthu naari onoona, nnikhale variyariwayasa niwiivaka, ni hiiho nnimalihe mitekosaya.”" 
Nehemiah4:12 aYuda yaamanke vakhiviruwaya aanileela imaara sincipale: “Weiwo muntthunaanyu orukunuwela musuwele weera nimmoowananani wa mipatta sootheene.” 
Nehemiah4:13 Tivawo kaakhalinghaaka atthu akina a muloko wiithela omakhuruweloni wa exiri, mmapuroni moowooneya. Kaahaakawanyiha emusi emusi ekuxaleene ikatana, mavaka ni nyuupa." 
Nehemiah4:14 Kaawehaweha, kinaweerela maneethi, asitokweene ni muloko mukinoowo: “Muhiwoovase. Muupuwelele weera Yave ti Mutokotoko ni Oowoopiha ni ngwane ngweerelaka axunninyu, anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana, axaarinyu ni mmavaatenimwanyu.”" 
Nehemiah4:15 Amwiittanaahu yoonelelaka weera naasuwela soovaanelasaya sootheene ni weera Muluku aahaanganyera mirukusaya, ootheene hiyo naahokoleela exiri, khula mutthu ni mutekwaawe." 
Nehemiah4:16 Okhuma nihuku nne woorowa ohoolo mpatta mmoha wa atthwaaka ovaraka muteko, mpatta mukina waapwaherera woolikaneene ni mavaka, ixikudu*, nyuupa ni ikapaseti. Asitokweene yannakhavihera muloko wootheene wa oYuda" 
Nehemiah4:17 waarasela exiri. Yaawo yaattuutta ikaruma yaavara muteko ntata nimoha ni nikinanno yaamvarela kapwitthi. 
Nehemiah4:18 Anamateka ootheene yeettano ekatanaaya muyuununi evaraka muteko. Mulopwana mmoha oolikaneene weera iipe nipalapatta aakhala ni miyo. 
Nehemiah4:19 Kaaweerela maneethi, asitokweene ni muloko mukinoowo: “Muteko wohaatta ni wohunnuwa ni nri oomwalamwaleene nirakamelanaka exiri yootheene." 
Nehemiah4:20 Weiwo muneeraanyu mwiiwelewo oruma wa nipalapatta, nathukumanelewo. Mulukwaahu onoowana aneerelaka hiyo!”" 
Nehemiah4:21 Vano mooteene yoole naapwaherera muteko, ni mpatta wa atthu ovarenleene mavaka okhuma oxeexelo mpaka wiila." 
Nehemiah4:22 Ehuhuweene yeele kaaweerelatho: “Khula mutthu ni namakhaviheraawe akhaleke ohiyu muYerusaleemu weera alipeleleke ni avareke muteko othana.” 
Nehemiah4:23 Hata miyo, naari axunnaka, hata atthwaaka oororomeleya hoye hoye anamalipelela yaari ni miyo khanaarularu. Khula mutthu aakhala ni kapwitthaawe mmatatani, hata arikaka maahi." 
Nehemiah5:1 Vano asilopwana ni axaaraya yaapacerasa waattaandawula axunnaya aYuda. 
Nehemiah5:2 Akina yeera: “Hiyo vamoha ni anamwanaahu asilopwana ni asithiyana nohaatta. Nintthuna etrigu weera nipwaherere ni okhumi.” 
Nehemiah5:3 Akina yeera: “Nneemexera imattasahu, imattasahu sa iwuuva* ni impasahu weera niphwanye etrigu yoowiivano etala.”" 
Nehemiah5:4 Nlelo akina yeera: “Nnooliha musurukhu weera nilivele musoko wa mwene wa imattasahu ni imattasahu sa iwuuva*. 
Nehemiah5:5 Nrookhalaru emusi emohamoharu ni axunnihu, ni anamwanaahu asilopwana okhala ooreera antoko a yaawosa, nlelo hiiho, anamwanaahu asilopwana ni asithiyana naakhaliheke ipottha. Vekhaikhai akina a anamwanaahu asithiyana aakhalihiwa ipottha, mene khaningwera opaka etthu neenre niweemexerela imattasahu ni imattasahu sa iwuuva*.”" 
Nehemiah5:6 Kiiwakaru otaandawulawaya ni soowoothera iye, kaanyoonyiwa vancipale." 
Nehemiah5:7 Kaaneelela sootheene ni kaahaahiiha maneethi ni asitokweene, kiweerelaka: “Nyuwosa munaakokoca axunninyu moota woohitthuneya!” Vano kaahaalattulela muthukumano mutokotoko." 
Nehemiah5:8 Kaaheera: “Moota naaweraahu, nohaathuma axunna aYuda wa amalapo. Vano nyuwo munoovira mwaathumihaka moota wooweera hiyo naathumetho!” Awo yaari emaalelo, niwoko khayaarino yoowaakhula." 
Nehemiah5:9 Kaapwaherera: “Yeeyo mumpakaanyu kheereenre. Nyuwo mweettaseke mmoovaka Mulukwaahu weera nihipuheriwe ni amalapo ari amwiittanaahu. 
Nehemiah5:10 Miyo, vamoha ni axunna ni atthwaaka oororomeleya nneera noolihaka musurukhu ni etrigu wa muloko. Vano mmaliheke okokoca musoko moota woohitthuneya!" 
Nehemiah5:11 Mwaahokoloxerase khuluwi imattasaya, imattasaya sa iwuuva* ni sooliveira*, impasaya nitho musoko mphwannyaanyu mwaakokocaka, mpatta wanaancira wa musurukhu, etrigu, eviinyu ni makhura.”" 
Nehemiah5:12 Awo yaahaakhula: “Nnimwaahokoloxerasa sootheene muhimmaanyu ni khannaanyesereratho etthu. Nnoopaka yeeyo mumvekelaanyu.” Kaawiitthana asaserdoti* ni vamaithoniwaya kaahaalipeliha maneethi ni asitokweene weera anookwaniherasa yoororomeliha epakeiye. 
Nehemiah5:13 Kaatathatho mukaandyowaaka keeraka: “Muluku atatheke hiiho empa ni sooreela sa khula mutthu aneera ahikwanihere yoororomelihaawe. Mutthweene yoowo atathiwe ni ahale hiiho.” Wiiwaka yeeyo muthukumano wootheene waaheera: “Ame!*,” Waamvuwiha Yave. Vano atthu yaakwanihera yeeyo yaaroromelinghaaya." 
Nehemiah5:14 Ohiya toko yeeyo, wa iyaakha muloko ni piili, okhuma vayaakhani yanaamiloko miili ya mwene Aritaxaxete mpaka eyaakhaawe yanaamiloko miraru ni piili, miyo kaakhalihiwaaka ntoko guvernadori a elapo ya oYuda, vano hata miyo naari axunnaka khannace sooca soopakeliwa guvernadori." 
Nehemiah5:15 Maguvernadori a khalayi, yaale yaalamula kihinaaye miyo, yaalemelihaxa muloko yaakhelaka wa yoowo ixekeli* miloko mixexe sa eparatha* ohiya sooca ni eviinyu. Anamakhaviheraayatho yannahasula muloko. Vaheera kimoovaka Muluku, nkeettela yeeyo." 
Nehemiah5:16 Ohiyanawaya, miyo muneenaaka kaakhalela nthiti muteko wa exiri ela. Atthwaaka ootheene oororomeleya yaathukumanyihiwawo omutekoni. Hiyo khanaathummeru naari mwaamatta." 
Nehemiah5:17 Ohiya ikina iyo, atthu ncira ni miloko mithanu variyari wa aYuda ni asitokweenaaya yaaca vameesaniwaka, mpakatho atthu a miloko soowaattamana yaarweela onixekura." 
Nehemiah5:18 Khula nihuku yaarehereriwa yawaka emombe elopwana emoha, ikhondoolo ithannamosa sooreerela ni ilakhu sikina ni khula nihuku nanaamuloko miyo kannaakhela moota woohiyanahiyana wa eviinyu. Waarookhalaru hiiho, nkinanyeserere yooca yoopakeliwa guvernadori, niwoko muloko wannalemelihiwa ni miteko soolipaxa." 
Nehemiah5:19 Mukuupuwelele ni murima wooreera, Yave, niwoko na sootheene seiye kipakenlaaka muloko ola." 
Nehemiah6:1 Sanibalata, Tobiya, Gexemi, ngwArabi ni amwiittanaahu akina esuwelakaru weera miyo koorasela exiri ni weera khayaahanleru ekhato (kaarimweeraru kihihenle masele mmapuronimwaya ehuhuweene yeele)," 
Nehemiah6:2 vano Sanibalata ni Gexemi yaakirumihela mutthenga ola: “Nrowe nathukumane mmuttettheni mmoha, onghawalawani wa wOno.” Wa soothesene, awosa yaahuupuwela okipakela yoonanara." 
Nehemiah6:3 Vanonto, kaahaarumihela anamitthenga ni yoowaakhula ela: “Kiri oowaakameleyeene ni muteko mutokotoko ni nkinrowawo. Nkineemexera muteko ola weera kootthareeni.”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Yaakirumihela imaara ixexe mutthenga mmoharu ni imaara sootheene iyo kaawaakhula moota mmoharu. 
Nehemiah6:5 Vano emaara yanaathanu Sanibalata aakirumihela mmoha a atthwaawe oororomeleya akunxeene ekaratta yoohuleya 
Nehemiah6:6 elempwaleenemo masu ala: “Yeeriwa variyari wa miloko weera nyuwo ni aYuda mumvaanela ovaanya. Tivawo munraselaanyu exiri. Mpaka Gexemi oneera weera ti hiiho. Ohiya toko yeeyo, yeeriwatho weera nyuwo munookhala mwenaaya" 
Nehemiah6:7 ni mpaka mohaakhaliha maprofeeti weera yoothoonyeni oYerusaleemu, yeeraka: ‘Ookhala mwene oYuda!’ Vano mwene onkela wiiwa sa masu ala. Nrowe nitthekulele.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 Kaamurumihela yoowaakhula ela: “Kheewo munghimaanyu eneera yeereiye. Eyo ti yoopakelelaanyu.” 
Nehemiah6:9 Awo ootheene, yanneerera onitteengula yuupuwelaka: “Awosa anootteenguwa moota wooweera khaammaliha muteko.” Wa soothesene, kaavekela: “Mulipihe murimaaka.”" 
Nehemiah6:10 Nihuku nimoha kaarowa vaate wa Xemaya, mwaana mulopwana a Delaya, mwaana mulopwana a Mehetabeli iiwalenle mpaanimwawe. Owo aaheera: “Nithukumane Mpaani mwa Muluku, mpuwa, ni niwaleke masele a Empa ya Muluku, niwoko atthu akina animoowa weera ewiiveeni ohiyuweene yoola.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 Wa soothesene, kaamwaakhula: “Weeraka miyo kinootthawa? Mukina ntoko miyo onoovolowa Mpaani mwa Muluku weera iivuluxe? Hoye! Miyo nkinrowa!”" 
Nehemiah6:12 Kaasuwela weera Muluku khaamuruminghe, mene weera aakihima miyo, niwoko Tobiya ni Sanibalata yaamuttiyasa makhwaankwa wa yeeyo." 
Nehemiah6:13 Aattiyeliwe makhwankwa weera ekitutuxase ni weera ekitthekihe kapaka hiiho. Vano kapaka yeeyo, yaarwa okaaluxa ni atthwaaka khayaarwa okaakhulela." 
Nehemiah6:14 Ii! Mulukwaaka mmuupuwelele Tobiya ni Sanibalata niwoko na yeeyo apankaaya. Mmuupuweleletho mprofeeti muthiyana Nowadeya ni maprofeeti makina aneerera okoopopiha. 
Nehemiah6:15 Vano, exiri yaamalihiwe vanihukuni nanaamiloko miili ni mathanu na mweeri Eluli, mmahukuni miloko mithanu ni meeli." 
Nehemiah6:16 Amwiittanaahu ootheene esuwelakaru yeeyo, miloko soowaattamana sootheene saahoova sihovelaka, niwoko saasuwela weera muteko wootheene ole waamalihiwe ni ekhavihero ya Mulukwaahu." 
Nehemiah6:17 Mahukweene yaaletho maneethi a oYuda yannamurumihela Tobiya ikaratta sincipale ni owo aarumihela soowaakhulasawe. 
Nehemiah6:18 Vano ancipale a oYuda yaaroromelihasiwa ni yoowo munlipeloni, eenre akhala nkamwenaawe Xekaneya, mwaana mulopwana a Ara, ni mwanawe mulopwana, Yehokanani, aathelana ni mwaana muthiyana a Mexulami, mwaana mulopwana a Berekiya." 
Nehemiah6:19 Awosa yannamuttapahera Tobiya vamaithoniwaka, emuthaliheraka yeeyo kaakhulaaka. Ni Tobiya annapwaherera okirumihela ikaratta sookoopopiha." 
Nehemiah7:1 Emalihiwakaru oraseliwa exiri ni kiiyaatherakaru masele mmapuronimwaya, yaakhalihiwa anamalipelela a milako, anamwiipa ni aLeevi." 
Nehemiah7:2 Kaamukhaliha munnaka Hanani ntoko namalamula a oYerusaleemu vamoha ni Hananiya, mutokweene a esidade yoolipaxa, niwoko aari mulopwana oororomeleya, amoovaka Muluku waapwaha atthu ancipale akinaawo." 
Nehemiah7:3 Kaaweerela: “Milako sa oYerusaleemu sihihuliweke nsuwa nihinaaye okhuma. Anamalipelela a milako nlelo elipelelaka, ewaleke milako ni ekokotteleke. Kaahaathanlatho amaki a oYerusaleemu weera elipelele – akina yeemeleleke exiri; akina ohoolo wa impasaya.”" 
Nehemiah7:4 Vano, esidade yaari etokotoko ni yoothanuwa, mene yaamankemo yaari vakhaani. Vanonto, impa iyo seera sihinaaye oraseliwa." 
Nehemiah7:5 Mulukwaaka aahela mmurimanimwaka waathukumanyiha maneethi, asitokweene ni muloko wootheene weera kaalepele emusi emusi. Kaaphwanya elivuru ya masina ootheene a yaale yaapacenre ohokoleela. Vano masina kaaphwannyaaka elempwaleenemo ti ala:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Ala ti atthu a elapo ele yaahokolongwe woovariwani, mwa yaawo Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, aavanraawe aaronghaka elapwaawe. Awo yaahokoleela oYerusaleemu ni oYuda, khula mutthu muttetthaawe." 
Nehemiah7:7 Yaahooliwe ni Zerubabeli, Yexuwa, Nehemiya, Azariya, Rahameya, Nahamani, Mordekai, Bilexani, Miseperete, Bigivai, Nehumi ni Bahana. Vano waatta wa aYixrayeli waari ha:" 
Nehemiah7:8 ekhapira ya Paroxi, atthu 2 172," 
Nehemiah7:9 ya Xefateya macira mararu ni miloko mithannamiili ni atthu eeli," 
Nehemiah7:10 ya Ara macira mathannamosa ni miloko mithanu ni atthu eeli," 
Nehemiah7:11 ya Pahati-Mowabe, etthariheleyaka emusi ya Yexuwa ni Yowabi, 2 818," 
Nehemiah7:12 ya Elami 1 254," 
Nehemiah7:13 ya Zatu macira mathannamararu ni miloko mixexe ni athanu," 
Nehemiah7:14 ya Zakai macira mathannameeli ni miloko mithannamosa," 
Nehemiah7:15 ya Bavai macira mathannamosa ni miloko mixexe ni athannaararu," 
Nehemiah7:16 ya Bebai macira mathannamosa ni miloko miili ni athannaararu," 
Nehemiah7:17 ya Azegade 2 322," 
Nehemiah7:18 ya Adonikami macira mathannamosa ni miloko mithannamosa ni athanneeli," 
Nehemiah7:19 ya Bigevai 2 067," 
Nehemiah7:20 ya Adini macira mathannamosa ni miloko mithanu naathanu," 
Nehemiah7:21 ya Ateri etthariheleyaka emusi ya Hizekiya miloko mithannamixexe ni athannaararu," 
Nehemiah7:22 ya Haxumi macira mararu ni miloko miili ni athannaararu," 
Nehemiah7:23 ya Bezai macira mararu ni miloko miili ni axexe," 
Nehemiah7:24 ya Harifi ncira ni muloko mmoha ni atthu eeli," 
Nehemiah7:25 ya Gibiyoni miloko mithannamixexe ni athanu," 
Nehemiah7:26 asilopwana a oBeteleheemu ni oNetofa ncira ni miloko mithannamiraru ni athannaararu," 
Nehemiah7:27 asilopwana a wAnatoti ncira ni miloko miili ni atthu athannaararu," 
Nehemiah7:28 asilopwana a oBet- Azemaveti miloko mixexe ni atthu eeli," 
Nehemiah7:29 asilopwana a oKiriyati-Yeharimi, oKefira ni oBeheroti macira mathannameeli ni miloko mixexe ni atthu araru," 
Nehemiah7:30 asilopwana a oRama ni oGeba macira mathannamosa ni miloko miili ni mutthu mmoha," 
Nehemiah7:31 asilopwana a oMikemasi ncira ni miloko miili ni atthu eeli," 
Nehemiah7:32 asilopwana a oBeteli ni wAi ncira ni miloko miili ni atthu araru," 
Nehemiah7:33 asilopwana a elapo ekina yiitthaniwatho oNebo miloko mithanu ni atthu eeli," 
Nehemiah7:34 ekhapira ya Elami mukina 1 254," 
Nehemiah7:35 ya Harimi macira mararu ni miloko miili," 
Nehemiah7:36 ya oYeriko macira mararu ni miloko mixexe ni athanu," 
Nehemiah7:37 ya Lodi, Hadidi ni wOno macira mathannameeli ni miloko miili ni mutthu mmoha," 
Nehemiah7:38 ya Senaha 3 930. 
Nehemiah7:39 Asaserdoti*: ekhapira ya Yedaya etthariheleyaka emusi ya Yexuwa macira mathannamaxexe ni miloko mithannamiili ni atthu araru," 
Nehemiah7:40 ya Imeri 1 052," 
Nehemiah7:41 ya Paxehuri 1 247," 
Nehemiah7:42 ya Harimi 1 017. 
Nehemiah7:43 aLeevi: ekhapira ya Yexuwa, etthariheleyaka emusi ya Kademiyeli mwa Hodeva, miloko mithannamiili ni axexe." 
Nehemiah7:44 Anamwiipa: ekhapira ya Asafi ncira ni miloko mixexe ni athannaararu," 
Nehemiah7:45 anamalipelela a Empa ya Muluku: ekhapira ya Xalumi, Ateri ni Talemoni, Akubi, Hatita ni Xobai ncira ni miloko miraru ni athannaararu." 
Nehemiah7:46 Arumeiyi a Empa ya Muluku: ekhapira ya Ziha, Hasufa, Tabayoti," 
Nehemiah7:47 Kerosi, Siya, Padoni," 
Nehemiah7:48 Lebana, Hagaba, Xalema," 
Nehemiah7:49 Hanani, Gideli, Gahari," 
Nehemiah7:50 Rehaya, Rezini, Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 Gazami, Uza, Paseiya" 
Nehemiah7:52 Besai, Mehunimi, Nefuximi," 
Nehemiah7:53 Bakebuki, Hakufa, Harehuri," 
Nehemiah7:54 Bazeliti, Mehida, Harexa," 
Nehemiah7:55 Barekosi, Sisera, Tema," 
Nehemiah7:56 Neziha ni Hatifa. 
Nehemiah7:57 Ekhapira ya arumeiyi a Salomoni: ekhapira ya Sotai, Sofereti, Perida," 
Nehemiah7:58 Yahala, Darekoni, Gideli," 
Nehemiah7:59 Xefateya, Hatili, Pokereti-Hazebayimi ni Amoni." 
Nehemiah7:60 Arumeiyi a Empa ya Muluku ni ekhapira ya arumeiyi a Salomoni macira mararu ni miloko mithannamixexe ni atthu eeli. 
Nehemiah7:61 Yaawo yaaphiyale mmittettheni sa oTeli-Mela, oTeli-Harexa, oKerubi, wAdoni ni wImeri, mene ehiweraka woonihereya weera imusisaya saari ikhapira sa aYixrayeli" 
Nehemiah7:62 ekhapira ya Delaya, Tobiya ni Nekoda macira mathannamosa ni miloko mixexe ni atthu eeli." 
Nehemiah7:63 Variyari wa asaserdoti*: ekhapira ya Habaya, Hakozi ni Barezilai, mwa yoowo aamuthenle mwaana a Barezilai, muGiliyade, ni iitthaneliwa nsina nenenenne." 
Nehemiah7:64 Atthu ale yaahaasaasa masinaaya mulivuruni ya imusi, mene khayaaphwannye ni yaahiihiwa okhala asaserdoti* yeenre yahitteela." 
Nehemiah7:65 Tivawo guvernadori aalamulenlaawe weera ehicaseke sooveleela sootteelaxa mpaka aneeraawe musaserdoti* avareleke muteko Urimi ni Tumimi* weera ekhaikhai esuwanyeye. 
Nehemiah7:66 Ootheene yaale yaalepeliwe yaari 42 360," 
Nehemiah7:67 waahiya arumeiyaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana 7 337. Yaahaakhalanotho anamwiipa asilopwana ni asithiyana macira meeli ni miloko mixexe ni athanu. 
Nehemiah7:68 Yaakhalanotho ikavalu* macira mathannameeli ni miloko miraru niithannamosa, amula* macira meeli ni miloko mixexe ni athanu," 
Nehemiah7:69 ikamelu* macira maxexe ni miloko miraru niithanu, ni abuuru 6 720." 
Nehemiah7:70 Mapwattapwattha makina a imusi iye yaacaangela muteko. Guvernadori aaveleela sa muteko ole idrakema* macira muloko sa eyuuma yoorikaxa, ibasiya miloko mithanu ni ikuwo sa esaseredoti macira mathanu ni miloko miraru." 
Nehemiah7:71 Mapwattapwattha makina yaaveleela idrakema* 20 000 sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni imina* 2 200 sa eparatha* weera sivareliweke muteko. 
Nehemiah7:72 Atthu akinaawo yaaveleenle idrakema* 20 000 sa eyuuma yoorikaxa, imina* macira miloko miili sa eparatha* ni ikuwo sa esaseredoti miloko mithannamosa niithannapiili." 
Nehemiah7:73 Asaserdoti*, aLeevi, anamalipelela a milako, anamwiipa ni arumeiyi a Empa ya Muluku vamoha ni mpatta wa muloko ni aYixrayeli akinaawo yaahiitekiha mmittetthenimwaya." 
Nehemiah8:1 Ophiyerakaru mweeri wanaathanamiili, atthu emankeene mmittetthenimwaya, ootheene yaathukumana ni murima mmoha vanipuwani ohoolo wa Mulako wa Maahi. Yaamvekela Ezera, namalepa, oruuha Elivuru ya Nlamulo na Moisesi, mwa yeeyo Yave aavanghaawe aYixrayeli." 
Nehemiah8:2 Vano vanihukuni noopacera na mweeri wanaathanamiili musaserdoti*, Ezera, aaruuha Nlamulo ohoolo wa muthukumano wootheene wa asilopwana, asithiyana ni ootheene yaawera wiiwexexa." 
Nehemiah8:3 Aasoma arumihaka okhuma oxeexelo mpaka othana eriyari vanipuwani ohoolo wa Mulako wa Maahi, vamaithoni wa asilopwana, asithiyana ni yaawo yaawera wiiwexexa. Atthu ootheene yaawiriyana nnenesene osommwa wa Elivuru ya Nlamulo." 
Nehemiah8:4 Namalepa, Ezera, aaheemela musulusulu waapakeleliwe ni itthaabwa wa ehuhuweene yeele. Mukhwipimwawe, moonowaawe mulopwana, eemenle Matiteya, Xema, Anaya, Uriya, Hilikiya ni Mahaseiya ni moonowaawe muthiyana Pedaya, Mixayeli, Malekiya, Hasumi, Haxebadana, Zakariya ni Mexulami." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ezera aakhunula elivuru. Vano aari oowooneya wa atthu ootheene, niwoko eemenle musulusulu. Vanonto, akhunulakaru elivuru, atthu ootheene yaaheemela." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezera aamutthapela Yave, Muluku Mutokweene ni ootheene yaaheemexa matata yaakhulaka: “Ame*! Ame*!” Vahoolowaya yaamulapa Yave, yuuramihenleene ikhovesaya vathi." 
Nehemiah8:7 aLeevi Yexuwa, Bani, Xerebeya, Yamini, Akubi, Xabetai, Hodiya, Maseiya, Kelita, Azariya, Yozabade, Hanani ni Pelaya yaahaaxuttiha atthu munlamuloni, ootheene yeemenleene vaavaale." 
Nehemiah8:8 Yaasoma elivuru ya Nlamulo na Muluku yaataphulelaka ni yaathaliheraka weera atthu yiiwexexe yeeyo yaasommwa. 
Nehemiah8:9 Vano guvernadori, Nehemiya, musaserdoti*, Ezera, ni namalepa, ni aLeevi yaaxuttiha atthu, yaaweerela: “Nihuku nna nitteeliheriwe Yave Mulukwaahu. Muhithanane naari muhiinle.” Yeereenle yeeyo, niwoko atthu ootheene yaamwiinla yiiwaka masu a Nlamulo." 
Nehemiah8:10 Nehemiya aaweerela: “Mpwahaseke, mwaceeke ni mwawure sooreerela muraanyuno. Mwaameeleke yaawo ahireherenre etthu. Nihuku nna nitteeliheriwe Yave. Muhithanane niwoko ohakalala wa Yave ti ikurusanyu.”" 
Nehemiah8:11 aLeevi yaahaakurunuxa atthu ootheene yeeraka: “Mmaaleke, muhithanane, niwoko nihuku nna ti nihuku nootteela.”" 
Nehemiah8:12 Atthu ootheene yaattimula weera yace ni yawure, yaameelaka yaawo yahaareherenre etthu. Yaapaka efesta ehakalalaxaka, niwoko vano yaahiiwexexa masu yaathaliheriwaaya." 
Nehemiah8:13 Vanihukuni nanaaveeli na mweeri ole mapwattapwattha a imusi sootheene vamoha ni asaserdoti* ni aLeevi yaathukumana ni namalepa Ezera, weera esomele masu a Nlamulo." 
Nehemiah8:14 Munlamuloni yaahoonelela weera Yave aalamula mwa Moisesi weera aYixrayeli ekhaleke mmikotthani mweehuhuni ya mweeri wanaathannamiili. 
Nehemiah8:15 Muluku aalamulatho weera elaleiyeke mmittettheni ni oYerusaleemu masu ala: “Murowe onyaakoni, mwaruuhase iphandi sa sooliveira* sa mmatta ni sa ntuphini, iphandi sa murta*, mavare ni sa nyiri sikina weera mpakase mikottha, ntoko elempwalaaya.”" 
Nehemiah8:16 Atthu yaarowa, enaruuha iphandi, enateka mikottha mutaratonimwaya, mmapuwani a impasaya ni a Empa ya Muluku, vanipuwani na esidade, vakhiviru wa Mulako wa Maahi ni vanipuwani na Mulako wa Efrayimi." 
Nehemiah8:17 Ootheene yaahokolongwe woovariwani yaatekasa mikottha, enakhalamo. Okhuma mahuku a Yoxuwa, mwaana a Nuni, mpaka nihuku nenenenne aYixrayeli khaanapake efesta moota ole. Vano yaahakalalaxa." 
Nehemiah8:18 Khula nihuku, okhuma nihuku noopacera mpaka nookisera na efesta, Ezera aasoma elivuru ya Nlamulo na Muluku. Yaapaka efesta wa mahuku mathannameeli ni nihuku nanaathanaararu waakhala muthukumano, ntoko nlamulo ninnyesereraaya." 
Nehemiah9:1 Vanihukuni nanaamiloko miili ni maxexe na mweeri, aYixrayeli yaathukumana, etthukaka, ewaraka isaakho eniihelasa ettuura mmuru." 
Nehemiah9:2 Vano aYixrayeli yaamwalamwala ni anamarwa. Yaaheemela mmapuronimwaya elapaka sootthekasaya ni sootakhala sa makholowaaya. 
Nehemiah9:3 Yaaheemela mmapuronimwaya esomaka elivuru ya Nlamulo na Yave Mulukwaaya wookwana iwoora tthaaru ni yaavirihatho iwoora tthaaru elapaka sootthekasaya, emutthapelaka Yave Mulukwaaya." 
Nehemiah9:4 Yeemenleene musulusulu yaari aLeevi ala: Yexuwa, Kademiyeli, Xibaniya, Buni, Xerebiya, Bani ni Kenani, mwa yaawo yaamukhuwelela Yave Mulukwaaya." 
Nehemiah9:5 aLeevi Yexuwa, Kademiyeli, Haxabiniya, Xerebeya, Hodiya, Xibaniya ni Petahiya yaaheera: “Mweemele muntthapeleke Yave Mulukwaanyu ori oohimala.” Nsinananyu noovuwaxa nreelihiwe. Nivuwihiweke woopwahaxa mareeliho ni otthapela wootheene." 
Nehemiah9:6 Nyuwo paahi ti Yave. Moopattuxa erimu ya osulusulu ni ithenyeerisaya; elapo ya vathi ni sootheene sirimo; iphareiya ni sootheene sirimo. Moovaha okumi wa itthu sootheene ni anakhotto a wiirimu annoolapani. 
Nehemiah9:7 “Nyuwo ti Yave Muluku aamuthanlale Abraamu amukhumihaka wUri wa oKaldeya, anamutteha Abrahaamu." 
Nehemiah9:8 Mwaahoona weera murimaawe waari woororomeleya wa Nyuwo, mwaakhaliha wiiraana ni yoowo muroromelihaka ovaha ekhapiraawe ilapo sa aKanaani, aHiti, awAmori, aPerizi, aYebusi ni aGirgasi. Vano mookwanihera yoororomelihaanyu, niwoko ti oororomeleya." 
Nehemiah9:9 Mwaahoona ohaawa wa asitithihu wExipitu ni mwaahiiwa okhuwelawaya mphareiyani Yooxeera. 
Nehemiah9:10 Mwaampakela ineneero ni sootikhiniha Farawu*, asitokweenaawe ootheene ni atthu ootheene a elapwaawe, niwoko mwaasuwela moota yaahasulaaya mulokwaanyu. Mwaawina epili etokotoko empwaherera mpaka olelo va." 
Nehemiah9:11 Mwaakawanyiha ephareiya ohoolowaya weera elapuwe woowuumeene. Vaheera mwaahaavonyera anamattharattharaaya moowiixera, ntoko nluku mmaahini a niipili." 
Nehemiah9:12 Khula nihuku mwaaweettiha ni nrimbu na mahutte ni khula ohiyu ni nrimbu na mooro weera mwaamwaleele ephiro yaaviraaya. 
Nehemiah9:13 Mwaakhuruwela vamwaakoni Sinayi. Mwaawuulumano muri wiirimu. Mwaahaavaha miruku sooreera, malamulo a ekhaikhai, ikano ni soonyesereriwa sooreerela." 
Nehemiah9:14 Mwaahaasuweliha nihukunanyu nootteela na eSaabadu ni mwaahaavaha miruku, ikano ni malamulo mwa murumeiyaanyu Moisesi." 
Nehemiah9:15 Yaavoliwaaya etala, mwaahaavaha sooca saarweela wiirimu ni yaavoliwaaya ntthona mwaahaakhumihera maahi vamwala. Mwaahaalamulela ovolowa ni okuxa elapo mwaalipenlaanyu mwaaroromelihaka waavaha." 
Nehemiah9:16 Wa soothesene, asitithihu yaahiixoona ni yaahuumiha mirima ehiiwelelaka malamulowaanyu." 
Nehemiah9:17 Yaakhootta owiiwani ni yaattiwala sootikhiniha mwaapakenlaanyu. Yaahuumiha mirima moovaanyanimwaya, emuthanlaka mutokweene weera ehokoleele mpotthanimwaya. Wa soothesene, Nyuwo ti Muluku onlevelela; moosareya mahala ni ikharari; oopisa onyoonyiwa ni oosareya osivela. Tivawo mwahaahingyaanyu," 
Nehemiah9:18 yaarimwiipakelaru muluku oowootha mmukhaleloni wa mwaamombe, yeeraka: ‘Ola ti mulukwaanyu mwa yoowo ookhumihaleni wExipitu,’ hata yaapakaaya sooveiha soonanaraxa." 
Nehemiah9:19 Niwoko na ikhararisanyu sitokotoko khamwaahingye munikareni. Khula nihuku nrimbu na mahutte naaweettiha mphironi ni hiihotho khula ohiyu nrimbu na mooro naahaamwaleela ephiro yaatthuneya ovira. 
Nehemiah9:20 Mwaahaavaha Munepaanyu Wooreera weera waalake. Mwaahaavaha emanaanyu* yaacaaya ni maahi yaawuraaya. 
Nehemiah9:21 Wookwana iyaakha miloko mixexe Nyuwo mwaahaaciha munikareni. Yaakhalano sootheene saatthuneya ni soowarasaya khasaathaalaru ni inawosaya khasiiparu. 
Nehemiah9:22 Mwaahaavaha omwene ni miloko mwaakawanyeraka seiyo. Yaawina elapo ya Sihoni, mwene a oHexeboni, nitho elapo ya Ogi, mwene a oBaxani." 
Nehemiah9:23 Mwaahaakhaliha anamwanaaya asilopwana oowaattaxa ntoko ithenyeeri sa wiirimu ni mwaahaavolonghasa mweelaponi, mwa yeeyo mwaaroromelinghaanyu asitithaya." 
Nehemiah9:24 Anamwanaaya asilopwana yaavolowamo, enawina elapo. Mwaahaawina ohoolowaya aKanaani mwa yaawo yaamankemo. Mwaawinnyerera aKanaani vamoha ni mamwenaaya ni atthu a elapweene yeele weera aYixrayeli yaapake yaatthunaaya." 
Nehemiah9:25 Yaawina isidade soolipaxa ni ilapo sa ethaadyira; yaakuxa impa soosareya sooreela; ihime soothimpwa; imatta sa iwuuva* ni sooliveira* ni nyiri soowiima sincipale. Yaahooca mpaka yaavona, enacihiwa, nnenesene epuhasaka wa onnenaanyu otokotoko." 
Nehemiah9:26 Wa soothesene, yaari oohiiwelela yoovaanyakani. Yaarera ettuli Nlamulonanyu. Yaawiiva maprofeetaanyu, mwa yaawo yaawooperera weera yoohokoleeleni Nyuwo. Yaapaka sootakhala sitokotoko." 
Nehemiah9:27 Tivawo mwaawinnyerenraanyu mmatatani mwa amwiittanaaya weera ehooxiwe. Vano ehooxiwakaru, yaahookhuwelelani Nyuwo. Mwaawiiwa muri wiirimu ni ikhararisanyu sitokotoko munaavahasa anamatapuxa, mwa yaawo yaatapunxe mmatatani mwa amwiittanaaya." 
Nehemiah9:28 Ephwanyakaru murettele, yaapakatho yeeyo mwahaatthunaanyu. Vano mwaawinnyerera mmatatani mwa amwiittanaaya weera elamuliwe ni yaawo. Vanonto yookhuwelelaayanitho, mwaangwiiwa muri wiirimu ni ikhararisanyu, mwaatapuxaka emaara ti emaara." 
Nehemiah9:29 Nyuwo mwaawooperera weera ehokoleele Nlamulonanyu, mene awosa yaahiixoona ehiiwelelaka malamulowaanyu. Yaatthekela ikanosanyu, mwa seiyo sintthuneya wiiwelela weera ekhale ni okumi. Ni murima woowuuma yaahoorerani ettuli, ekhalaka attiyamaaru, ehitthunaka owiiwani." 
Nehemiah9:30 Wa iyaakha sincipale mwaahaavilela. Mwannawooperera mwa Munepaanyu ni mwa maprofeeti. Hata hiiho, khayaawiiwelelani moota wooweera mwaawinnyerera mmatatani mwa miloko soowaattamana." 
Nehemiah9:31 Wa soothesene, mukhararinimwanyu sitokotoko khamwaaphwante naari khamwaahingye, niwoko Nyuwo ti Muluku oosareya mahala ni ikharari." 
Nehemiah9:32 Vano, Mulukwaahu ori Muluku Mutokweene, a ikuru ni oovuwaxa, mwa Yoowo onttittimiha wiiraanawawe wa osivela ni oosareya ikharari, mukhaleke oopwatthela othanana wootheene wu onirweenle hiyo, mamwenaahu, asitokweenaahu, asaserdotaahu, maprofeetaahu, asitithihu ni mulokwaanyu wootheene, okhuma mahuku a mamwene a wAsiriya mpaka olelo." 
Nehemiah9:33 Mwaari oororomeleya mwa sootheene saanikhumelela. Mweettenle moota woororomeleya naaroohiroromeleyaru. 
Nehemiah9:34 Mamwenaahu, asitokweenaahu, asaserdotaahu ni asitithihu khayaattharinghe Nlamulonanyu; khayiiwelenle soolamulelasanyu naari owoopererawanyu." 
Nehemiah9:35 Yaarookhalaru moomwenenimwaya epuhaka oreerawanyu otokotoko, mweelaponi yoothanuwa ni yooruwereya mwaavanghaanyu, awosa khayoorumeenleni hata khayaahiya iphirosaya sootakhala." 
Nehemiah9:36 Moone, hiyo olelo nri ipottha, aani ipottha mweelaponi mwaavanghaanyu asitithihu weera eceeke soowiimasaya ni sooreela sikina siniimamo." 
Nehemiah9:37 Soohepha soowaattaxa siri sa mamwene annilamula niwoko na sootthekasahu. Annilamula hiyo ni mihuwosahu ntoko antthunaaya. Othananawahu ti otokotoko.” 
Nehemiah9:38 “Vano niwoko na sootheene seiya, nimpaka wiiwanana woolipaxa – mpakatho nilepaka. Asitokweenaahu, aLeevi ni asaserdotaahu animwaakhulela ni olepa.”" 
Nehemiah10:1 Masina a yaale yaalempe ti ala: Guvernadori, Nehemiya, mwaana a Hakaliya ni Zedekiya," 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraya, Azariya, Yeremiya," 
Nehemiah10:3 Paxehuri, Amariya, Malekiya," 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatuxi, Xebaniya, Maluki," 
Nehemiah10:5 Harimi, Meremoti, Obadiya," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniyeli, Gineto, Baruki," 
Nehemiah10:7 Mexulami, Abiya, Miyamini," 
Nehemiah10:8 Mahazeya, Bilegai, Xemaya. Ti yaala yaari asaserdoti*." 
Nehemiah10:9 Vano aLeevi: Yexuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Azaniya, Bavai a anamwane asilopwana a Henadadi, Kademiyeli," 
Nehemiah10:10 ni asikhwaaya: Xebaniya, Hodiya, Kelita, Pelaya, Hanani," 
Nehemiah10:11 Mika, Rehobi, Haxabiya," 
Nehemiah10:12 Zakuri, Xerebeya, Xebaneya," 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodiya, Bani, Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Asitokweene a muloko: Paroxi, Pahate-Mowabi, Elami," 
Nehemiah10:15 Buni, Azegade, Bebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 Adoniya, Bigevai, Adini," 
Nehemiah10:17 Ateri, Hizekiya, Azuri," 
Nehemiah10:18 Hodiya, Haxumi, Bezai," 
Nehemiah10:19 Harifi, Anatoti, Nebai," 
Nehemiah10:20 Magepiyaxi, Mexulami, Heziri," 
Nehemiah10:21 Mexezabeli, Zadoki," 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelateya, Hanani, Anaya," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hoxeya, Hananiya, Haxubi," 
Nehemiah10:24 Haloxexe, Pileha, Xobeki," 
Nehemiah10:25 Rehumi, Haxabena, Mahaseiya," 
Nehemiah10:26 Ahiya, Hanani, Anani," 
Nehemiah10:27 Maluki, Harimi, Bahana." 
Nehemiah10:28 Vano, atthu akinaawo – asaserdoti*, aLeevi, anamalipelela a milako, anamwiipa, arumeiyi a Empa ya Muluku, ni ootheene yaamwalamwanle ni miloko soowaattamana moosivelani Nlamulo na Muluku vamoha ni axaaraya ni anamwanaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana yaawera wiiwexexa –" 
Nehemiah10:29 aani, ootheene yaale yaathukumana ni axunnaya maneethi yiilipelelaka mulaponi ni munreelihoni weera etthare Nlamulo noovahiwa ni Muluku mwa Moisesi, murumeiyi a Muluku, ni weera yiiwelele ikano, soonyesereriwa ni malamulo ootheene a Yave, aani Yavaahu." 
Nehemiah10:30 Yeenre: “Noororomeliha weera khannaatheliha anamwanaahu asithiyana wa miloko soowaattamana, hata waakhulela anamwanaaya asithiyana otheliwa ni anamwanaahu." 
Nehemiah10:31 Miloko soowaattamana saaruuhaka soothumiha hoye hoye etrigu weera ethumihe vanihukuni na eSaabadu naari nakhalaru nihuku nikina nootteela, khanithuma itthusaya mahukweene yaawo. Khula eyaakha yanaathannapiili nnoohiya imattasahu weera siitthuuwe ni ninoomaliha ikoongori sootheene." 
Nehemiah10:32 Nohiivaherera ohoolela, ntoko nlamulo ninnyesereraaya, ovaha vayaakhani mpatta wanaararu wa exekeli* wa Empa ya Mulukwaahu." 
Nehemiah10:33 Vano musurukhu owo ti wa ipaawu sootteelihiwa, sooveleela soohihiyerereya sa etrigu ni soohisa, sooveleela mmaSaabaduni, ifesta sa mweeri munyowani ni ifesta sikina, sooveleela sootteela ni sa soottheka weera aYixrayeli yiiraanyihiwe, ni wa miteko sootthuneya sootheene sa Empa ya Mulukwaahu." 
Nehemiah10:34 Hiyo ntoko asaserdoti*, aLeevi ni muloko nnimwaasaaseratho khula eyaakha osuwela taani aneera aruuhele ikhuuni Empa ya Mulukwaahu weera sihisiwe valtaarini* a Yave Mulukwaahu, ntoko elempwalaaya munlamuloni." 
Nehemiah10:35 Nohiivahereratho ohoolela oruuhela Empa ya Muluku vayaakhani mpatta woopacera wa soohephasahu ni sa nyiri soowiima sootheene. 
Nehemiah10:36 Nnooruuhelatho Empa ya Muluku ni asaserdoti* anrumeelamo matthaara a anamwanaahu asilopwana ni a ikhondoolosahu ni imombesahu, ntoko elempwalaaya munlamuloni." 
Nehemiah10:37 Ohiya sikina iyo, nnooruuhela matatha a Empa ya Mulukwaahu ni asaserdoti* mpatta woopacera wa ephepa, mipatta soopacera sa sooveleela sa etrigu, sa soowiima sa nyirisahu sootheene, sa eviinyuwaahu enyowani, ni sa makhura. Nnimwaaruuhelatho aLeevi mpatta wanaamuloko wa soohephasahu, niwoko ti yaawosa anaakhelela mpatta wanaamuloko mmasidadeni moothemwene nimvaraahumo muteko." 
Nehemiah10:38 Musaserdoti* mmoha a ekhapira ya Aharoni aahooleke aLeevi yaakhelasaka mpatta wanaamuloko. Vano aLeevi eruuheleke Empa ya Mulukwaahu mpatta wanaamuloko sanaamuloko iyo, munsungiwamo." 
Nehemiah10:39 Atthu aYixrayeli vamoha ni aLeevi eruuheke sooveleela sa etrigu, eviinyu enyowani ni makhura eronghaka munsungiwa siraayamo ikaruma sa Nipuro Nootteela*. Ti mwemmo asaserdoti* anrumeelaaya, anamalipelela a milako ni anamwiipa ankhalaayamo. Khanithaama Empa ya Mulukwaahu.”" 
Nehemiah11:1 Vano asitokweene a muloko yaakhala oYerusaleemu ni atthu akinaawo yaampaka mwaathanle emuthanlaka hiiho mutthu mmoha a khula muloko weera amakeke oYerusaleemu, esidade yootteela. Akina athannaaxexaawo waatthuneya okhala mmittetthenimwaya." 
Nehemiah11:2 Muloko waahaareeliha oottheene yiixinnyerenre otthunawaya weera ekhale oYerusaleemu. 
Nehemiah11:3 Akina a aYixrayeli, asaserdoti*, aLeevi, arumeiyi a Empa ya Muluku ni a ekhapira ya arumeiyi a Salomoni, yaakhala mmittettheni sa oYuda – khula mutthu yawaweene. Vaheera akina a oYuda ni a oBenyamini yaakhala oYerusaleemu. Vano masina a asitokweene a ilapo yaakhala oYerusaleemu ti ala: Yaale a ekhapira ya Yuda: Ataya, mwaana mulopwana a Uziya, mwaana mulopwana a Zakariya, mwaana mulopwana a Amariya, mwaana mulopwana a Xefateya, mwaana mulopwana a Mahalaleli, a ekhapira ya Perezi;" 
Nehemiah11:4  
Nehemiah11:5 ni Mahaseiya, mwaana mulopwana a Baruki, mwaana mulopwana a Koli-Hoze, mwaana mulopwana a Hazaya, mwaana mulopwana a Adaya, mwaana mulopwana a Yoyaribi, mwaana mulopwana a Zakariya, a ekhapira ya Xela." 
Nehemiah11:6 Yaale a ekhapira ya Perezi yaakhala oYerusaleemu ootheenaawo yaari macira maxexe ni miloko mithannamosa ni athannaararu. 
Nehemiah11:7 Yaale a ekhapira ya Benyamini: Salu, mwaana mulopwana a Mexulami, mwaana mulopwana a Yowedi, mwaana mulopwana a Pedaya, mwaana mulopwana a Kolaya, mwaana mulopwana a Mahaseiya, mwaana mulopwana a Itiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Yexaya," 
Nehemiah11:8 ni vahoolowaya Gabai ni Salai, ootheenaawo yaari macira mathannamaxexe ni miloko miili ni athannaararu." 
Nehemiah11:9 Yoweli, mwaana mulopwana a Zikeri, aari mutokweene a asitokweene, aakhaviheriwa ni Yuda, mwaana mulopwana a Hasenuwa, mutokweene anaaveeli a esidade." 
Nehemiah11:10 Variyari wa asaserdoti*: Yedaya, mwaana mulopwana a Yoyaribi, Yakini," 
Nehemiah11:11 Seraya, mwaana mulopwana a Hilikiya, mwaana mulopwana a Mexulami, mwaana mulopwana a Zadoki, mwaana mulopwana a Merayoti, mwaana mulopwana a Ahitube, aawehaweha Empa ya Muluku," 
Nehemiah11:12 ni asikhwaaya yaavara muteko Mpaani mwa Muluku, ootheenaawo yaari macira mathannamararu ni miloko miili neeli; Adaya mwaana mulopwana a Yerohami, mwaana mulopwana a Pelaleiya, mwaana mulopwana a Amezi, mwaana mulopwana a Zakariya, mwaana mulopwana a Paxuri, mwaana mulopwana a Malekiya," 
Nehemiah11:13 ni asikhwaaya yaari mapwattapwattha a imusi, ootheenaawo yaari macira meeli ni miloko mixexe neeli; Amaxesai, mwaana mulopwana a Azareli, mwaana mulopwana a Ahezai, mwaana mulopwana a Mexilemoti, mwaana mulopwana a Imeri," 
Nehemiah11:14 ni asikhwaaya yaari asilopwana ookupaleya, ootheenaawo yaari ncira ni miloko miili ni athannaararu. Vano mutokweenaaya aari Zabediyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Hagedolimi." 
Nehemiah11:15 Variyari wa aLeevi: Xemaya, mwaana mulopwana a Haxubi, mwaana mulopwana a Azerikami, mwaana mulopwana a Haxabaya, mwaana mulopwana a Buni;" 
Nehemiah11:16 Xabetai ni Yozabade, eeli a asitokweene a aLeevi, yaawehaweha muteko wa omokoni wa Empa ya Muluku," 
Nehemiah11:17 Mataneya, mwaana mulopwana a Mika, mwaana mulopwana a Zabedi, mwaana mulopwana a Asafi, muhooleli aahoolela muloko moomutthapelani Muluku ni mmavekeloni, Bakebukeya, anaaveeli a axunnawe, Abeda, mwaana mulopwana a Xamuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Galali, mwaana mulopwana a Yedutuni." 
Nehemiah11:18 aLeevi ootheenaawo yaakhala esidade yootteela yaari macira meeli ni miloko mithannamiraru ni axexe. 
Nehemiah11:19 Anamalipelela a milako: Akubi, Talemoni ni asikhwaaya ootheenaawo yaari ncira ni miloko mithannamiili neeli." 
Nehemiah11:20 aYixrayeli akinaawo, waatakansa ni asaserdoti* ni aLeevi, yaari mmittettheni sootheene sa oYuda, khula mutthu yoohiyeriwaawe." 
Nehemiah11:21 Arumeiyi a Empa ya Muluku yaakhala onttumuxani na wOfeli. Vano Ziha ni Gixepa yaari asitokweenaaya. 
Nehemiah11:22 Mutokweene a aLeevi oYerusaleemu aari Uzi, mwaana mulopwana a Bani, mwaana mulopwana a Haxabeya, mwaana mulopwana a Mataneya, mwaana mulopwana a Mika. Uzi aari a ekhapira ya Asafi, mwa yeeyo yaari ahooleli a icipo Mpaani mwa Muluku." 
Nehemiah11:23 Anamwiipa yaalamuleliwa ni mwene, mwa yoowo aareherera mitekosaya sa vanihukuni." 
Nehemiah11:24 Petaheya, mwaana mulopwana a Mexezabeli, a ekhapira ya Zera, mwaana mulopwana a Yuda, aari mwaakhula a mwene onreherera makacamiho mmawani." 
Nehemiah11:25 Akina a muloko wa oYuda yaarowa omaka oKiriyati-Arba ni mittetthesaya, oDiboni ni mittetthesaya ni oYekabezeheli ni mittetthesaya," 
Nehemiah11:26 oYexuwa, oMoloda, oBet-Peleti," 
Nehemiah11:27 oHazari-Xuwali, oBerxeba ni mittetthesaya," 
Nehemiah11:28 oZikalagi, oMekona ni mittetthesaya," 
Nehemiah11:29 wEni-Rimoni, oZora, oYaremuti," 
Nehemiah11:30 oZanowa, wAdulami ni mittetthesaya, oLakixi ni mukerekheremwaya ni wAzeka ni mittetthesaya. Awosa yaahiitekiha okhuma oBerxeba mpaka nreyareya na oHinomi." 
Nehemiah11:31 Ekhapira ya aBenyamini yaarowa omaka oGeba, oMikemasi, wAya, oBeteli ni mittetthesaya," 
Nehemiah11:32 wAnatoti, oNobi, wAnaneya," 
Nehemiah11:33 oHazori, oRama, oGitayimi," 
Nehemiah11:34 oHadidi, oZeboyimi, oNebalata," 
Nehemiah11:35 oLodi, wOno ni oreyareyani wa Aneettottho." 
Nehemiah11:36 Nakupa mukina a aLeevi yaari oYuda aahiitekiha oBenyamini. 
Nehemiah12:1 Masina a asaserdoti* ni aLeevi yaahokolongwe ni Yexuwa vamoha ni Zerubabeli, mwaana mulopwana a Xeyaletiyeli, ti ala: Seraya, Yeremiya, Ezera," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amariya, Maluki, Hatuxi," 
Nehemiah12:3 Xekaniya, Rehumi, Meremoti," 
Nehemiah12:4 Ido, Gineto, Abiya" 
Nehemiah12:5 Miyamini, Mowadeya, Bigela," 
Nehemiah12:6 Xemaya, Yoyaribi, Yedaya," 
Nehemiah12:7 Salu, Amoki, Hilikiya, Yedaya. Alasa yaari asitokweene a asaserdoti* ni asikhwaaya mmahukuni a Yexuwa." 
Nehemiah12:8 aLeevi: Yexuwa, Bavai, Kadamiyeli, Xerebiya, Yuda nitho Mataniya, mwa yoowo aalamuleliwa vamoha ni asikhwaawe oreherera icipo sa otthapela." 
Nehemiah12:9 Bakebukeya ni Uni, asikhwaaya, yaakhala ohoolowaya weera yiipaka, ewaakhuleleke." 
Nehemiah12:10 Yexuwa aari tiithi a Yoyakimi, Yoyakimi aari tiithi a Eliyaxibi, Eliyaxibi aari tiithi a Yoiyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 Yoiyada aari tiithi a Yonatani, Yonatani aari tiithi a Yaduwa." 
Nehemiah12:12 Mmahukuni a Yoyakimi mapwattapwattha a imusi sa asaserdoti* yaari ti ala: Meraya a emusi ya Seraya; Hananiya a emusi ya Yeremiya; 
Nehemiah12:13 Mexulami a emusi ya Ezera; Yehokanani a emusi ya Amariya; 
Nehemiah12:14 Yonatani a emusi ya Maluki; Yoseefe a emusi ya Xekaniya; 
Nehemiah12:15 Adena a emusi ya Harimi; Helekai a emusi ya Meremoti; 
Nehemiah12:16 Zakariya a emusi ya Ido; Mexulami a emusi ya Gineto; 
Nehemiah12:17 Zikeri a emusi ya Abiya; Piletai a emusi ya Mineyamini ni Mowadeya; 
Nehemiah12:18 Xamuwa a emusi ya Bilega; Yehonatani a emusi ya Xemaya; 
Nehemiah12:19 Matenai a emusi ya Yoyaribi; Uzi a emusi ya Yedaya; 
Nehemiah12:20 Kalai a emusi ya Salu; Heberi a emusi ya Amoki; 
Nehemiah12:21 Haxabiya a emusi ya Hilikiya; Netaneli a emusi ya Yedaya. 
Nehemiah12:22 Mmahukuni a Eliyaxibi, Yoiyada, Yohanani ni Yaduwa mapwattapwattha a imusi sa aLeevi ni sa asaserdoti* yaalepelingwe alamulaka Dariyexi muParesi." 
Nehemiah12:23 Mapwattapwattha a imusi sa ekhapira ya aLeevi mpaka ehuhu ya Yohanani, mwaana mulopwana a Eliyaxibi, yaalepelingwe mulivuruni ya inyaha sa aYixrayeli." 
Nehemiah12:24 Asitokweene a aLeevi yaari Haxabiya, Xerebiya, Yexuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Kademiyeli ni asikhwaaya yaakhala ohoolowaya weera, mpatta mmoha wiipaka icipo sa olapa ni otthapela, mpatta mukina owaakhuleleke, ntoko Davide, mulopwana a Muluku aalamulenlaawe." 
Nehemiah12:25 Mataneya, Bakebukeya, Obadiya, Mexulami, Talemoni ni Akubi yaari anamalipelela a milako yaawehaweha saasungiwa saari vamulako." 
Nehemiah12:26 Yaarumeela mmahukuni a Yoiyakimi, mwaana mulopwana a Yexuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Yozadaki, ni mmahukuni a guvernadori, Nehemiya, ni musaserdoti* ni namalepa Ezera." 
Nehemiah12:27 Wa efesta ya otteelihiwa wa ixiri sa oYerusaleemu, yaalattulana aLeevi a ilapo yaakhalasaaya weera erwe oYerusaleemu yeerelaka opaka efesta ya ixiri ni ohakalala, ni icipo sa otthapela siipeliwaka ikengere, amakita ni atthakare." 
Nehemiah12:28 Anamwiipa yaaruuhiwe ilapo soowaattamana oYerusaleemu, sa mmittettheni sa aNetofati," 
Nehemiah12:29 oBet-Giligali, ni mmiittetheni sa oGeba ni wAzemavete, niwoko anamwiipa awo yaahiitekela mittetthesaya mukerekhere oYerusaleemu." 
Nehemiah12:30 Asaserdoti* ni aLeevi yaahiitteeliha ntoko ekhovelelowaaya, enatteelihatho muloko, milako ni ixiri." 
Nehemiah12:31 Kaahaalamulela asitokweene a oYuda weera ewelase vasulu exiri. Kaamuthata nakupa miili a anamwiipa weera etthapelele. Mmoha aari vasulu exiri akelaka moono mulopwana mpatta wa Mulako wa Osalani. 
Nehemiah12:32 Hoxayeya ni mpatta mukina wa asitokweene a oYuda yaahaattharasa," 
Nehemiah12:33 vamoha ni Azeriya, Ezera ni Mexulami," 
Nehemiah12:34 Yuda, Benyamini, Xemaya, Yeremiya" 
Nehemiah12:35 ni asaserdoti* akina ekunxeene mapalapatta omuhiya Zakariya, mwaana mulopwana a Yonatani, mwaana mulopwana a Xemaya, mwaana mulopwana a Mataneya, mwaana mulopwana a Mikaya, mwaana mulopwana a Zakuri, mwaana mulopwana a Asafi," 
Nehemiah12:36 ni asikhwaaya: Xemaya, Azareli, Milalai, Gilalai, Mahaya, Nataneli, Yuda ni Hanani. Awosa yiipa ikaruma soowiinano saalamuleliwa ni Davide, mulopwana a Muluku, ni namalepa, Ezera, aakhala ohoolowayasa." 
Nehemiah12:37 Vamulako wa Naattuuttu awosa yaawelasa ciireru ixikada sa esidade ya Davide, woowelela exiri, ni yaavirasa vaate wa Davide mpaka wa Mulako wa Maahi, mpatta wa ninkhuma nsuwa." 
Nehemiah12:38 Nakupa anaaveeli aarowa moono muthiyana. Awosa ewelelaka exiri, miyo kaarowano kikuxaleene mpatta mukina wa muloko. Naavinre Etoore* ya Maikho mpaka Mulako Woothanuwa," 
Nehemiah12:39 niviraka vamilako sa Efrayimi, Yexana ni sa Ihopa, itoore* sa Hananeli ni sa Ncira, nirowaka mpaka Mulako wa Ikhondoolo. Vano naaheemela vamulako wa anamalipelela." 
Nehemiah12:40 Nakupa oomiili a anamwiipa aarowa mmapuronimwawe Mpaani mwa Muluku ni miyo kaarowatho vamoha ni mpatta wa asitokweene 
Nehemiah12:41 nitho wa asaserdoti*: Eleyakimi, Mahaseiya, Mineyamini, Mikaya, Eleyoyena, Zakariya ni Hananiya ni mapalapattaaya," 
Nehemiah12:42 nitho Mahaseiya, Xemaya, Eleyazari, Uzi, Yehokanani, Malekiya, Elami ni Ezeri. Nakupa oomiili a anamwiipa aahooleliwa ni Yizeraheya." 
Nehemiah12:43 Vano nihuku nne ereene oohakalaleene, yaavaha sooveleela sincipale, niwoko Muluku aahaasariha ohakalala otokotoko. Asithiyana ni asinamwanetho yaahakalalasa ni oruma wa ohakalala wa oYerusaleemu waamwiiwayeya ottai." 
Nehemiah12:44 Ehuhuweene yeele yaathanliwa ahooleli akina a moosungamo sooveleela, soowiima soopacera ni sanaamuloko. Soolimmwa saari mukhwipi wa esidade awosa waatthuneyaaya oruuhela moosungamo mipatta soonyesereriwa ni Nlamulo waavaha asaserdoti* ni aLeevi. Vekhaikhai muloko wa oYuda waahaahakalalela asaserdoti* ni aLeevi yaahoolela Mpaani mwa Muluku." 
Nehemiah12:45 Awosa yaakwanihera soorumeela sa Mulukwaaya saanyesereriwa Mpaani mwa Muluku nitho soorumeela sa otteeliha ni anamwiipa ni anamalipelela a milako yaarumeelano, ntoko Davide ni mwanawe mulopwana Salomoni yaalamulenlaaya." 
Nehemiah12:46 Vano khalayeene vawo, mmahukuni a Davide ni Asafi, yaakhala ahooleli a anamwiipa ni atthu yaahoolela icipo sa omuttottopela ni omutthapela Muluku." 
Nehemiah12:47 Hiiho mmahukuni a Zerubabeli ni Nehemiya, aYixrayeli ootheene yannacaanga khula nihuku wa anamwiipa ni anamalipelela a milako. Yaamukawanyihatho mpattaaya wa aLeevi akina ni aLeeveene yaale yaakawanyiha mpattaaya wa ekhapira ya Aharoni." 
Nehemiah13:1 Nihuku nne elivuru ya Moisesi yaasommwa orumihiwaka ohoolo wa muloko ni mwemmwe waahooniwa woolempwa weera ahikhaleru ngwAmoni hoye hoye mMowabe aneera atthuniheriwe munlokoni wa Muluku," 
Nehemiah13:2 niwoko awosa ohiya waavaha aYixrayeli yooca ni maahi, yaamuliva Balaami weera aalaphe. Wa soothesene, Mulukwaahu nlapho aatatuxa mareeliho." 
Nehemiah13:3 Muloko wiiwakaru malamulo awo, waahiikhumiha mwa aYixrayeli yaawo yaari anamarwa." 
Nehemiah13:4 Ehinaaye yeeyo, musaserdoti*, Eliyaxibi, aari muhooleli a soosungiwa sa Empa ya Mulukwaahu. Vano owo aari mpatta wa emusi ya Tobiya." 
Nehemiah13:5 Eliyaxibi aamwinnyerera ekwartu etokotoko, khalayi yaavareliwa muteko woosunga sooveleela sa irooro, erubani*, ikaruma sa Empa ya Muluku, mpakatho sanaamuloko sa etrigu, eviinyu enyowani ni wa makhura, seiyo saari sa aLeevi, anamwiipa ni anamalipelela a milako, ohiya sooveleela wa asaserdoti*." 
Nehemiah13:6 Vaheera sootheene iyo seereyaaya, miyo nkaakhanle oYerusaleemu, niwoko muyaakhani miloko miraru ni piili, alamulaka Aritaxaxete, mwene a oBabiloniya, kaahokoleela wa mwene. Eviraka ehuhu ekina, kaavekela otthuniherawawe," 
Nehemiah13:7 kinahokoleela oYerusaleemu. Kihokoleelakaru, kaasuwela yoonanara Eliyaxibi aapankaawe woomwinnyerera ekwartu etokotoko Tobiya mmapuwani a Empa ya Muluku." 
Nehemiah13:8 Kaanyoonyiwa vancipale, kinavonyera vaate itthu sootheene sa Tobiya." 
Nehemiah13:9 Kaalamulela orapihiwa ikwartu ni kaahokoloxeramo ikaruma sa Empa ya Muluku ni sooveleela sa irooro ni erubani*. 
Nehemiah13:10 Kaasuwelatho weera aLeevi khayaakhenle mpatta waari wawayeene ni weera aLeevi ootheene ni anamwiipa ahooleli a soorumeela Mpaani mwa Muluku yaahokoleela mweelaponimwaya. 
Nehemiah13:11 Tivawo kaahiihalaaka asitokweene, kinaakoha: “Ehinsamareliwa heeni Empa ya Muluku?” Vano kaahaalattula aLeevi ni anamwiipa, kinawiikaathi mmapuronimwaya." 
Nehemiah13:12 Atthu ootheene a oYuda yaaruuhela mwaasungiwamo sanaamuloko sa etrigu, eviinyu enyowani ni makhura." 
Nehemiah13:13 Kaamukhaliha musaserdoti* Xelemeya, namalepa Zadoki ni muLeevi mmoha iitthaniwa Pedaya ntoko anamawehaweha a soosungiwa kimukhalihaka Hanani, mwaana a Zakuri, mwaana a Mataneya namakhaviheraaya, niwoko asilopwana awo yaari oororomeleya. Awosa yaari ahooleli a soosungiwa yaakawelaka asikhwaaya." 
Nehemiah13:14 Mukuupuwelele miyo Mulukwaaka ni muhittiwale yeeyo kipakenlaaka Empa ya Mulukwaaka ni soorumeelasaya moota woororomeleyaxa.
