Nehemiah13:15 Mmahukuni ale kaahoona weera oYuda akina yaavara mmattankhini moowaama iwuuva* nihuku na eSaabadu ni yaathukumanya etrigu ettuuttaka mwaabuuruni vamoha ni eviinyu, iwuuva*, ifiigu ni moota wootheene wa mirindi. Sootheene iyo saaruuhiwa oYerusaleemu eSaabadu. Vano kaawoopererasa weera ehithumiheru etthu nihuku nenenenno." 
Nehemiah13:16 Yaakhala akina a esidade ya oTiro yaamanke oYerusaleemu yaaruuha ethumihaka ihopa ni moota wootheene wa maronda. Vano iyo yaathumihera muloko wa oYuda onkhala oYerusaleemu eSaabadu. 
Nehemiah13:17 Ohoolo wa yeeyo kaahaahiiha maneethi a oYuda kiweerelaka: “Ongwereya hai nyuwosa opaka etthu yoonanaraxa munanarihaka eSaabadu? 
Nehemiah13:18 Ti hiiho yaapankaaya makholowaanyu, tivawo Mulukwaahu aakuruxenlaawe esidade ela irisa iya. Nyuwosa mungwaandyeererela isara sa Muluku aYixrayeli munanarihaka eSaabadu.”" 
Nehemiah13:19 Nyunttuusi sa oxekuwa siikitthaaya milako sa oYerusaleemu, ekhuveelaka eSaabadu, kaalamulela weera iyo siwaliweke sihuliweke paahi evinreene eSaabadu. Kaawiikaathi akina a atthwaaka oororomeleya mmilakoni weera ohikhaleru murindi weera ovolonghiwe nihuku na eSaabadu." 
Nehemiah13:20 Imaara vakhaani anakeeni ni anamathumiha a moota wootheene wa maronda yaavirihasa ohiyu vaate wa oYerusaleemu. 
Nehemiah13:21 Vaheera miyo kaawooperera keeraka: “Mumvirihela heeni ohiyu muxirini? Mwapakatho yeeyo, kinimootthukihani.” Vahoolo wa yeeyo khayaarwiiyetho eSaabadu." 
Nehemiah13:22 Vano kaahaalamulela aLeevi weera yiitteelihase ni erowe yawehawehase milako weera nihuku na eSaabadu nittittimihiwe ntoko nootteela. Mukuupuweleletho mwa yeeyo Mulukwaaka, mukimorele ikharari moosivelanimwanyu otokotoko." 
Nehemiah13:23 Ohiya toko yeeyo, mmahukuni ale kaawoona aYuda akina yaathelanne ni asithiyana a wAxidoti, wAmoni ni oMowabe." 
Nehemiah13:24 Mpatta wa anamwanaaya wuuluma nuulumo na wAxidoti hoye hoye na miloko sikina ohiweraka wuuluma nuulumo na oYuda. 
Nehemiah13:25 Miyo kaawoopopihasa ni kaawiitthanelasa malaphwaaya. Kaahaamana akina a yaawo ni kaarosola mayihaaya. Kaahaalipeliha mwa Nsina na Muluku kiweerelaka: “Muhaathelihetho anamwaniinyu wa asinamwanaya, hata ehitheliwe anamwanaaya ni anamwaniinyu hoye hoye ni nyuwosa." 
Nehemiah13:26 Naari niwoko na othelathela ntoko wu Salomoni, mwene a aYixrayeli, aatthenkaawe. Variyari wa miloko sincipale khaariworu mwene ntoko yoowo. Owo annasiveliwa ni Mulukwaawe, ni Muluku aamukhaliha mwene a aYixrayeli ootheene. Waarookhalaru hiiho, mpaka yooweene aatthekiheya niwoko na asithiyana anamarwa." 
Nehemiah13:27 Yeeyo niiwalaahu kheenaakhuleleya. Mungwereya hai ottheka yootakhala yoowoopiha ele muhiroromeleyaka wa Mulukwaahu, muthelanaka ni asithiyana anamarwa?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Mmoha a anamwane asilopwana aYoiyada, mwaana mulopwana a mutokweene a asaserdoti*, Eliyaxibi, aari mukamwene a Sanibalata, muGori. Kaamoomola mpaka ottaiwaka." 
Nehemiah13:29 Ii! Mulukwaaka, muhaattiwalase, niwoko aananariha muteko wa esaseredoti ni wiiraana wa esaserdoti ni wa aLeevi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Mooteene yoowo kaahaamwaramwaxa asaserdoti* ni aLeevi ootheene ni anamarwa. Kaahaathanlela yoovaraaya khula mutthu ni mutekwaawe. 
Nehemiah13:31 Kookhalihatho moota woovara miteko sa ikhuuni ni wooruuha soowiima soopacera kithalihaka ehuhuwaaya. Ii! Mulukwaaka, mukuupuwelele miyo mooreeranimwanyu murima!" 
Esther1:1 Ti ela yeereiye mweehuhuni ya Ahaxeveroxi, mwa yoowo aalamula ilapo ncira ni miloko miili niithannapiili okhuma wIndiya mpaka oKuxe:" 
Esther1:2 Ehuhuweene yeele mwene Ahaxeveroxi aalamula akilaathenleene ehicaawe ya emwene musidadeni yoolipihiwaxa ya oSusa. 
Esther1:3 Vano eyaakha yanaararu moolamulanimwawe, aahaarehererela efesta maneethi ni asitokweenaawe ootheene. Yaari vaavaawo ahooleli a anakhotto a oParesi ni oMediya, asinamwane a mamwene ni maneethi a ilaposawe." 
Esther1:4 Wa mahuku ncira ni miloko mithannamiraru aahoonihera othadyirixawawe nitho waara ni ovuwa wa omwenaawe. 
Esther1:5 Emalakaru mahuku ale, mwene aapaka efesta ekinatho ya mahuku mathannameeli munttimbeni vaate wa empa ya mwene. Aahaapakela efesta ele atthu ootheene – okhuma oohittittimiheya mpaka oottittimiheyaxa yaari musidadeni ya oSusa." 
Esther1:6 Vano nttimbe naasareya iluttu sa eliinyu* yootteela ni ya kanka sitthukiweeneno annela a eparatha* ni mikhoyi sa eliinyu* yootteela ni ikuwo sooxeera – sootheene vasulu wa amarimbu a maluku maramore*. Saakhala ihice sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni sa eparatha* ni soonyikalela sa maluku a maramore* oothatiwa oorimbelela ni ootteela ecaambuliweene ni maluku ooreeraxa makina. 
Esther1:7 Eviinyu yaawureriwa mukoomixini sa eyuuma yoorikaxa – khula koomixi oovirikana ni sikina. Yaakhala eviinyu ya emwene yincipale yoovahiwa mahala niwoko na oreerawawe murima mwene. 
Esther1:8 Mwene aalamula weera khula namalattuliwa awureke aatthunelaawe. Owo aahaalamula arumeiyi yaakawa eviinyu weera erumeeleke ehoovelaka. 
Esther1:9 Eyo eri hiiho, pwiyamwene Vaxetitho aahaapakela efesta asithiyana mpaani mwa mwene Ahaxeveroxi." 
Esther1:10 Yaakhala inoko* athanneeli yaamurumeela mwene, masinaaya Mehumani, Bizeta, Harebona, Bigeta, Abageta, Zetari ni Karekasi. Vano, vanihukuni nanaathannameeli, mwene ahapalaxiweene, aahaalamula inoko* awo" 
Esther1:11 weera emuruuhele pwiyamwene Vaxeti awanreene ecireemba ya epwiyamwene. Owo aatthuna owoonihera asitokweene ni maneethi ophwaneliwawawe, niwoko pwiyamwene aari ooreeraxa." 
Esther1:12 Wa soothesene, emuleelaka pwiyamwene Vaxeti nlamulo na mwene, owo aakhootta orowa. Vanonto, mwene aanyoonyiwa vancipale asareiyeene isara." 
Esther1:13 Weenre wakhoveleliwa mwene waasaasa miruku sa yaale yaasuwela nnenesene malamulo ni ikano, owo aalamulela wiitthaniwa anamiruku yaasuwenle otaphulela ihuhu ni" 
Esther1:14 yaari asinthamwenaawexa mwene. Aahuuluma ni asitokweene athanneeli a oParesi ni oMediya yaarino mapuro oopacera vakhiviru wa mwene ni yaari oottittimiheya moomweneni. Masinaaya yaari Karexena, Xetari, Ademata, Tarexixi, Meresi, Maresena ni Memukani." 
Esther1:15 Aahaakoha: “Kimpakeleke eheeni pwiyamwene Vaxeti? Nlamulo ninghimani? Owo khiiwelenle nlamulo na mwene Ahaxeveroxi aaleeliwaawe ni inoko*.” 
Esther1:16 Vano Memukani aamwaakhula mwene vamaithoni wa oottittimiheyaxa akina: “Pwiyamwene Vaxeti khaaveighale amweneru, menetho maneethi ootheene nitho miloko sa ilapo sootheene sa mwene." 
Esther1:17 Mweettelo wa pwiyamwene onoosuweliwa ni asithiyana ootheene akinaawo ni awosa khayaahelela asiiyaya yeeraka: ‘Mwene Ahaxeveroxi aalamula weera pwiyamwene Vaxeti arowe wa yoowo, mene owo aakhootta.’" 
Esther1:18 Olelo vaava maneethi asithiyana a oParesi ni oMediya anoosuwela mweettelo wa pwiyamwene, ni ammwaapakela mooteene yoowo maneethi asilopwana ootheene a mwene. Eyo enootannyera niveiho ni minyakunyaku soohimala." 
Esther1:19 Vano, wamusivela mwene, akhalihe nlamulo na emwene ni nilepiwe vamoha ni ikano sikina sa oParesi ni oMediya siri ikano soohiceendyeya weera Vaxeti ahiphiyetho ohoolo wa mwene Ahaxeveroxi wa mahuku ootheene. Mwene amvare pwiyamwene mukina ooreerela ompwaha yoowo." 
Esther1:20 Hiiho, nathalihiwaru nlamulo na emwene mweelaponimwawe moothemwene sitokotoko, asithiyana ootheene eniyaattittimihe asiiyaya – okhuma oohittittimiheya mpaka oottittimiheyaxa.”" 
Esther1:21 Mwene ni maneethaawe yaahaakhulela miruku iye ootteeliwene moota wooweera mwene aavarela muteko yeeyo uulummaawe Memukani. 
Esther1:22 Aarumihela ikaratta mipatta sootheene sa omwenaawe – wa khula elapo ni khula muloko, ekarattaaya ni elepeliwaaya ni nuulumonaya. Ekaratta ele yaalamula weera khula mulopwana alamuleke vaatewawe." 
Esther2:1 Eviraleene ehuhu, omukhurunungweene murima mwene Ahaxeveroxi, aamuupuwelela Vaxeti ni yeeyo aapankaawe nitho moota aalamulihalaawe aamalihalaawe mulattwaawe." 
Esther2:2 Vano anamalaka a mwene yaaheera: “Aasaaseriwe mwene asimwali oowiikosoopa ooreeraxa. 
Esther2:3 Mwene aathanleke asitokweene mweelaponi sootheene sa omwenaawe weera emuruuhele asimwali ooreeraxa awo wa empa ya axaara a mwene musidadeni yoolipihiwa ya oSusa. Awosa ewehawehiweke ni Hegai, enoko* ya mwene onaawehaweha asithiyanaawe ni ephwanelihiweke." 
Esther2:4 Mwaamwali owo eera amusivelihe mwene ti yoowo aarowa okhala pwiyamwene erandelo ya Vaxeti.” Miruku iye saamusivela mwene, analamula opakiwa hiiho." 
Esther2:5 Vano ehuhuweene yeele aakhala musidadeni yoolipiheriwa ya oSusa muYuda a epuumba ya Benyamini iitthaniwa Mordekai, mwaana mulopwana a Yahiri, mwaana mulopwana a Ximei, mwaana mulopwana a Kixi." 
Esther2:6 Aakuxiwe oYerusaleemu vamoha ni Yekoniya, mwene a oYuda ni akina mukhottoni ni Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya." 
Esther2:7 Owo aakhalano naamaayaawe iitthaniwa Hadasa aamunnuwihalaawe niwoko na ohikhalano atithawe naari amayawe. Mwaamwali owo aasuweliwatho ntoko Exteri, aari oovoreiha murima ni ooreeraxa. Mordekai aamukuxa ntoko mwanawe ekhwaakaru atithawe ni amayawe." 
Esther2:8 Nihimmwakaru nlamulo na mwene, yaaruuhasiwa asimwali ancipale musidadeni yoolipihiwa ya oSusa ewewawehiwaka ni Hegai. Aaruuhiwatho Exteri empa ya mwene awehawehiwaka ni Hegai aari namawehaweha a asithiyanaawe mwene." 
Esther2:9 Mwaamwali ole aamusiveliha Hegai ni aamukhavihera. Woowaakuveya aamvaha sootthuneya sooreerela ni yooca yooreerela. Aahaathanla arumeiyi asithiyana athanneeli vaate wa mwene weera emurumeele Exteri ni aamuthaamihera Exteri vamoha ni arumeiyi asithiyana ale vanipuroni nooreerela na asithiyanaawe mwene. 
Esther2:10 Vano Exteri khuulumme etthu ya mulokwaawe naari ya makholowaawe, niwoko Mordekai aamukhoottiha ohima." 
Esther2:11 Khula nihuku owo anneettelela niinno niinno waattamela nipuwa na empa ya asithiyanaawe mwene weera asuwele moota aaraawe Exteri ni etthu heeni yaamukhumelela. 
Esther2:12 Ahinaaye wiixoonihera wa mwene akhalaru mwaamwali, waatthuneya okwanihera eyaakha iirehereraka ophwaneliwa waahimmwale wa asithiyana: nyeeri mithannamosa ni makhura a emira*; ni nyeeri mithannamosa sikina iyo ni makhura moota mukina oowunkhela." 
Esther2:13 Aarowaawe wiixoonihera wa mwene, mwaamwali aamwaakhela sootheene seiyo aatthunaawe orowano okhuma empa ya asithiyanaawe mwene mpaka empa ya mwene." 
Esther2:14 Aarowawo oxekuwa ni oxaawaya aahokoleela mpatta mukina wa empa ya asithiyanaawe mwene aawehawehiwa ni Xahaxegasi, enoko* ya mwene aawehaweha ikuxosawe. Mwaamwali owo khaahokoleela wa mwene ahimusivelanxe ni ahimwiitthanenle nsina." 
Esther2:15 Yaaphiyalaaya emaaraawe Exteri, mwaana muthiyana a Abihaili, atatawe Mordekai, mwa yoowo aampankaawe mwaniye, Exteri khaavekenleru etthu ohiya seiye Hegai, enoko* aawehaweha asithiyanaawe mwene, aahimalaawe. Exteri annaavoreihela murima ootheene yaamoona." 
Esther2:16 Aaroihiwa wa mwene Ahaxeveroxi mpaanimwawe mwa mwene mmweerini wanaamuloko (eyo tiiyo mweeri Tebeti) wa eyaakha yanaathannapiili ya olamulawawe. 
Esther2:17 Vano mwene aamusivelaxa Exteri waapwaha asithiyana akina. Owo aahaakheleliwa ni mwene niwoko na ophwaneliwawawe waapwaha asimwali akinaawo. Hiiho aamutthuka ecireemba ya opwiyamwene, anathatuwa pwiyamwene erandelo ya Vaxeti." 
Esther2:18 Vahoolowaya mwene aampakela Exteri efesta etokotoko aalattulaka maneethaawe ni asitokweenaawe ootheene. Aalamulela wiitthuuwa mweelaponi sootheene, anakawa samahala mooreeranimwawe murima." 
Esther2:19 Vano asimwali oowiikosoopa yaathukumanyihiwaaya emaara yanaaveeli, Mordekai eera akilaantheene vamulako wa empa ya mwene." 
Esther2:20 Exteri aahiipithiha exiiri ya mulokwaawe ni ephattuwelo ya makholowaawe ntoko Mordekai aamulamulenlaawe, niwoko annapwaherera otthara malamulo a Mordekai antoko aapakaawe aaraawe vaatewawe." 
Esther2:21 Nihuku nimoha, Mordekai akilaathiyeene vamulako wa empa ya mwene, arumeiyi eeli yiitthaniwa Bigetani ni Terexi yaalipelela mulako wa mwene yaanyoonyiwa emvaanelelaka omwiiva mwene." 
Esther2:22 Wa soothesene, Mordekai aasuwela sa yoovaanela ele, anamuthalihera pwiyamwene Exteri ni owo aalamula othaliheriwa mwene aromolaka nsina na Mordekai." 
Esther2:23 Iiwexenxeene, waahooneya weera yaari ekhweeli. Arumeiyi ooweeli yaathomeiwa waatthukelelaniwa kuleele. Sootheene seiye saalempwa mulivuruni sa nyaha vamaithoni wa mwene." 
Esther3:1 Vahoolo wa yookhumelela ele, Ahaxeveroxi aamuttittimiha Hamani, mwaana mulopwana a Hamedata, ngwAgagi, amvuwihaka ni amvahaka nipuro noottittimiheyaxa noowaapwaha maneethi ootheene akina." 
Esther3:2 Arumeiyi ootheene a mwene yaari vamulako wa mwene yannuurama ekokhoraka emuttittimihaka Hamani, ntoko aalamulenlaawe mwene. Wa soothesene, Mordekai khuuramaru hata khaamukokhorelaru." 
Esther3:3 Arumeiyi a mwene yaari vamulakwaawe yaamukoha Mordekai: “Munramburelani nlamulo na mwene?” 
Esther3:4 Khula nihuku awosa yannamuleela, mene owo khaawiriyana eeraka muYuda. Tivawo yaamuthalihenraaya Hamani weera yoone owo aakhulela mweettelo wa Mordekai." 
Esther3:5 Hamani oonaka weera Mordekai khuurama hata khaakokhora, aanyoonyaxiwa." 
Esther3:6 Wa soothesene, asuwelaka muloko wa Mordekai, aalakela ohimwiiva Mordekai paahi. Ohiyanawaya, aasaasa moota woowiiva aYuda ootheene moomweneni wootheene mwa Ahaxeveroxi, eyo tiiyo muloko wootheene wa Mordekai!" 
Esther3:7 Mweeri woopacera wa eyaakha yanaamuloko ni piili ya olamula wa Ahaxeveroxi, mweeri wa Nisani, yaapaka macitta yiitthaniwa Puri ohoolo wa Hamani weera ethanle nihuku ni mweeri wa owiiva. Waareereliwe mweeri wanaamuloko ni miili wiitthaniwa Adari." 
Esther3:8 Vanonto Hamani aamweerela Ahaxeveroxi: “Wookhala muloko woomwalamwaleya variyari wa miloko sikina mweelaponi sootheene sa omwenaanyu mwa yoowo ikhovelelosaya soovirikana ni sa miloko sootheene sikina. Atthu a muloko owo khaaniiwelela malamulo a mwene. Khoophwanenle waahiya epakaka seiyo. 
Esther3:9 Woosivelani amwene, mulamulele ophwatiwawaya. Miyo nkihele italentu* macira macireene muloko sa eparatha* onsungiwa muhakhu wa mwene weera sivareliwe muteko ni yaawo eneera ekwanihere ophwatiwawaya.”" 
Esther3:10 Iiwakaru yeeyo, mwene aamurula munelaawe woottittano, anamvaha Hamani, mwaana mulopwana a Hamedata, ngwAgagi, mwiittana a aYuda," 
Esther3:11 amweerelaka: “Musurukhu ti wawinyu. Mpakele muloko owo yeeyo enooreerelani.” 
Esther3:12 Hiiho, munihukuni nanaamuloko ni mararu na mweeri woopacera, anamalepa a mwene yaathukumanyihiwa. Hamani aalamulela weera silepiwe ikaratta munuulumoni ni elepelo ya khula muloko erumiheliwaka mapwattapwattha a mwene, wa maguvernadori a ilaposawe sootheene ni wa ahooleli a khula muloko. Sootheene saalempwe mwa nsina na mwene sittittiweene ni munelaawe." 
Esther3:13 Ikaratta saarumiheliwe ilapo sootheene sa mwene ni anamitthenga silamulelaka waamaliha ni waahoonona woomalela aYuda ootheene – amiravo ni asitokweene; asithiyana ni anamwane. Eyo yaatthuneya opakeya nihuku nimoharu, nri nihuku nanaamuloko ni mararu na mweeri wanaamuloko ni miili, oniitthaniwa Adari. Saalamulelatho weera ehuhuleliwe sooreelasaya." 
Esther3:14 Ekaratta yaalempwale siweheriwaka sikina sa ekano ya Hamani waatthuneya osuwelihiwa ntoko nlamulo wa khula elapo sisuwelihiwaka miloko sootheene weera sikhale soolikaneene nihuku nno. 
Esther3:15 Munlamuloni na mwene anamitthenga yaavenyasa woowaakuveya ni ekano yaalaleiwa musidadeni yoolipihiwa ya oSusa. Mwene ni Hamani yaakilaathi weera ewure; vaheera esidade ele yaari ni minyakunyaku. 
Esther4:1 Mordekai asuwelaka sootheene saakhumelenle, aahaahula soowarasawe, anawara esaakho, aniihela ettuura, anakhuma musidade iinlaka ni alalamikaka vancipale." 
Esther4:2 Aarowa mpaka vamulako wa mwene, mene khaavolongwe, niwoko khaatthuniheriwa ovolowa mutthu oowara esaakho." 
Esther4:3 Khula elapo yaaphiyalaayawo ekano ele ni nlamulo na mwene waakhala wiikhupanyera otokotoko variyari wa aYuda, enatthuka, eniinla, enalalamika. Ancipale yiixaatalela vasaakhoni yiihenleene ettuura." 
Esther4:4 Arumeiyi asithiyana ni inoko saawehaweha asithiyanaawe mwene emuthaliherakaru Exteri yaamweerela Mordekai, owo aathananaxa. Aamurumihela soowara weera aware ni arule esaakho, mene owo khaakhelenle." 
Esther4:5 Vano Exteri aamwiitthana Hataki, enoko* emoha ya mwene aathanliwe weera amurumeele Exteri, anamulamulela weera asuwele enimukacamiha Mordekai ni heeni ompakaawe hiiho." 
Esther4:6 Hataki aarowa wuuluma ni Mordekai vanipuwani na esidade, ohoolo wa mulako wa mwene." 
Esther4:7 Mordekai aamuthalihera sootheene saamukhumelenle ni moota wa musurukhu Hamani aaroromelinghaawe ohela onsungiwa muhakhu wa mwene weera ephwatiwe aYuda. 
Esther4:8 Aamvahatho ekaratta yaalempwale siweheriwaka sikina ya ekano yuuluma sa ophwatiwa wa aYuda ni yaasuwelihiwe oSusa weera owo amoonihere Exteri. Mordekai aamuleela enoko* omunyesereriha Exteri weera aphiye vamaithoni wa mwene amudyoonttelelaka ni ikharari mwaha wa mulokwaawe. 
Esther4:9 Hataki aahokolowa, anamuthalihera Exteri sootheene Mordekai aamuleenlaawe." 
Esther4:10 Vanonto, Exteri aamulamula Hataki omweerela Mordekai ha:" 
Esther4:11 “Asitokweene ni atthu ootheene a ilapo sa mwene aasuwela weera eri ekano emoha paahi wa akhalaru mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana anaamwaattamele mwene vanipuwani na mpuwa ahiitthaniwe ni yoowo – onimwiiviwa, mwene aahimookolela ekopwaawe ya eyuuma yoorikaxa amuurelaka okumi. Aavira mahuku miloko miraru kihiitthaniwaka vamaithoni wa mwene.”" 
Esther4:12 Mordekai aakhelelakaru yoowaakhula ya Exteri 
Esther4:13 aalamulela oleeliwa: “Muhuupuwele weera, mweenre mukhala mpaani mwa mwene, mmoopowe nyuwo paahi eriyari ya aYuda ootheene." 
Esther4:14 Nyuwo mwaahuuluma mweehuhuni ntoko ela, ekhavihero ni otapuxeya wa aYuda onuurweele mpatta mukina, mene nyuwo ni emusi ya atithinyu munimookhwa. Onoowereya weera mvarelingwe opwiyamwene niwoko na ehuhu ntoko ela.”" 
Esther4:15 Vano Exteri aamurumihela Mordekai yoowaakhula ela: 
Esther4:16 “Murowe mwaathukumanyihe aYuda ootheene ari oSusa ni mwatthuke mukeerelaka miyo. Muhice naari muhiwure othana ni ohiyu miraru. Miyo vamoha ni arumeiyaaka asithiyana ninootthuka ntoko nyuwosa. Vahoolowaya kinoowaattamela amwene onoohitthunihereyaru munlamuloni. Wakhala okhwa, nkikhweeke!”" 
Esther4:17 Hiiho Mordekai aavenya anapaka sootheene Exteri aamulamulenlaawe. 
Esther5:1 Eviraleene mahuku mararu, Exteri aawarela sa epwiyamwene, aneemela vanipuwani na mpuwa wa empa ya mwene ohoolo wa esaala ya mwene. Mwene aari vahiceniwawe oluluwana wa mulako." 
Esther5:2 Amoonakaru pwiyamwene Exteri vanipuwani vale aammorela ikharari, anamookolela ekopwaawe ya eyuuma yoorikaxa aavarenlaawe. Vano Exteri aamwaattamela, anatava okhwipi wa ekopo." 
Esther5:3 Mwene aamukoha: “Pwiyamwene Exteri, muntthunani? Yoovekaanyu eheeni? Hata okhalaka eriyari ya omwenaaka, munoovahiwa.”" 
Esther5:4 Exteri aamwaakhula: “Woosivelani amwene, mungwaane Hamani ofestani kireherenraaka.”" 
Esther5:5 Mwene aaheera: Munruuheke woowaakuveya Hamani weera nipake yeeyo Exteri omvekelaawe.” Hiiho mwene ni Hamani yaarowa ofestani Exteri aareherenraawe. 
Esther5:6 Ewuraka eviinyu hiihaale, mwene amukohatho Exteri: “Yoovekaanyu eheeni? Nyuwo munimwaakhuleliwa. Munghaawela eheeni? Hata okhalaka eriyari ya omwenaaka, munoovahiwa.”" 
Esther5:7 Owo aamwaakhula: “Yoovekaaka ni yoohaawelaaka ti ela: 
Esther5:8 Amwene mwasivelihiwa ni miyo ni woosivelani wiiwa ni waakhulela yoovekaaka, nyuwo ni Hamani murwaase omaalo ofestani kineeraaka kooreherereleni. Vaavaawo kineeraaka kiwaakhuleni yookohaanyu.”" 
Esther5:9 Nihuku nne Hamani aavenya ootteeliweene ni ohakalala. Wa soothesene, amoonaka Mordekai vamulako wa mwene ahuuramaka naari ahimuttittimihaka, aamunyoonyeraxiwa." 
Esther5:10 Waarookhalaru hiiho, Hamani kheewo aapankaawe, anarowa owaani. Awiitthanaka asinthamwenaawe ni mwaarawe Zerexi," 
Esther5:11 aahiivuwiha niwoko na mihakhusawe sincipale, anamwanaawe asilopwana ancipale ni moota aamuttittimihalaawe mwene amukhalihaka mutokweene a maneethi ni asitokweene akina." 
Esther5:12 Owo aahaandyeerera: “Ohiya yeeyo, pwiyamwene Exteri okilattunle yoomiru weera kaahoole amwene ofestani owo aarehererenlaawe. Ookilattula orowawo omaalo ni amwene." 
Esther5:13 Vaheera sootheene iyo khasinkihakalaliha miyo kimoonaka muYuda Mordekai akilaantheene vamulako wa mwene.” 
Esther5:14 Mwaarawe Zerexi ni asinthamwenaawe ootheene yaamweerela: “Mulamulele weera otekiwe wootthukeleliwa kuleele, orakamawaya imeetru* miloko miili niithanu ni oxeexeleru mwaavekele amwene weera Mordekai atthukeleliwewo. Vahoolowaya mwaahooleke amwene ofestani mutteeliweene.” Miruku saamusiveliha Hamani, analamulela otekiwa wootthukeleliwa kuleele." 
Esther6:1 Ohiyu ole mwene khasaamurwa ikhove, tivawo aalamulenlaawe oruuheliwa elivuru ya nyaha sa olamulawawe weera asomeliwe." 
Esther6:2 Yaasommwa yaalempwale weera Mordekai aamphwanyera Bigetana ni Terexi, arumeiyi eeli a mwene yaalipelela mulako wa mwene, awosa evaanelaka omwiiva Ahaxeveroxi." 
Esther6:3 Mwene aakoha: “Epakiwe eheeni yoomutthapelela ni omutthuvela Mordekai?” Arumeiyaawe yaamwaakhula: “Khaakhenle etthu.” 
Esther6:4 Mwene aahaakoha: “Vaate vawo ari taani?” Vano Hamani eera avolongweene vaanaanoru vanipuwani na vaate wa empa ya mwene weera amvekele mwene otthukeleliwa kuleele wa Mordekai aareherenraawe. 
Esther6:5 Arumeiyaawe yaamwaakhula: “Ti Hamani ori vanipuwani.” Mwene aahaalamula: “Mumvoleihe mu.” 
Esther6:6 Hamani avolowakaru, mwene aamukoha: “Ontthuneya ompakela eheeni yoole onimusiveliha mwene?” Vano Hamani aahiixuupuwelela: “Taani amwene antthunaxaaya omuttittimiha kihikhanle miyo?”" 
Esther6:7 Hiiho aamwaakhula mwene: “Amwene mwatthuna omuttittimiha mulopwana owo," 
Esther6:8 mulamulele weera oruuhiwe mukaandyo wa emwene ni ekavalu* yaawelaaya amwene etthukiweene ecireemba ya emwene. 
Esther6:9 Vahoolowaya aavaheke akina a oottittimiheyaxa oororomeleya mukaandyo ni ekavalu* ni awosa engwariheke mukaandyo mulopwana owo amwene antthunaaya omuttittimiha ni emweettiheke vakavaluni* mmiseweni sa esidade, emuttottopelaka ohoolowawe: ‘Empakeya ti ela wa mutthu mwene ontthunaawe omuttittimiha.’ ”" 
Esther6:10 Vano mwene aamulamula Hamani: “Murowe woowaakuveya, mwakuxe mukaandyo ni ekavalu* ni mwampakele muYuda Mordekai yeeyo muhimmaanyu. Owo okilaathiye vamulako wa mwene. Muhiipithiheru etthu nyuwo muhimalaanyu.”" 
Esther6:11 Hiiho Hamani aakuxa mukaandyo ni ekavalu*. Aangwariha Mordekai, anamweettiha vakavaluni* mmiseweni sa esidade, amuttottopelaka ohoolowawe: “Empakeya ti ela wa mutthu mwene ontthunaawe omuttittimiha.”" 
Esther6:12 Vahoolowaya Mordekai aahokoleela vamulako wa mwene, vaheera Hamani aatthimakela owaannyawe ooyeviheyeene, oowuulihiheyeene muru," 
Esther6:13 anamuthalihera mwaarawe Zerexi ni asinthamwenaawe ootheene sootheene seiye saamukhumelenle. Anamalakaawe ni mwaarawe yaamweerela: “Eenre Mordekai, mwa yoowo onooyeleelihani, akhala muYuda, khamuwera ongwina. Woohihovela munoophwatiwa.”" 
Esther6:14 Etthekulaka hiihaale, yaahoorwa inoko* a mwene, enamwaakuvihiha Hamani ofestani Exteri aareherenraawe." 
Esther7:1 Vano mwene ni Hamani yaarowa ofestani vamoha ni pwiyamwene Exteri. 
Esther7:2 Ewuraka eviinyu nihuku nanaaveeli nne, mwene aamukohatho: “Pwiyamwene Exteri, yoovekaanyu eheeni? Nyuwo munimwaakhuleliwa. Munghaawela eheeni? Hata okhalaka eriyari ya omwenaaka, munoovahiwa.”" 
Esther7:3 Pwiyamwene Exteri aamwaakhula: “Kaaphwanenle ophwanya mahala wuuluma ni amwene ni eyo yoosivelihani, muurele okumaaka ni mulokwaaka. Yoovekaaka ni yootthunaaka ti yeela." 
Esther7:4 Miyo vamoha ni mulokwaaka noothumihiwa weera niphwatiwe, nikhwe ni nimalihiwe. Naathumihiwe ntoko ipottha paahi, saano kimaanleene, niwoko nkaawera wiitapuxa yoothananiha ntoko ela kaaxupaka amwene.”" 
Esther7:5 Mwene Ahaxeveroxi aamukoha pwiyamwene Exteri: “Taani uupuwenle etthu siiyeela? Ori woowi yoowo?” 
Esther7:6 Exteri aamwaakhula: “Ngwanani ni mwiittanaahu ti mulopwana oonanara ola, Hamani.” Vanonto Hamani aahookhwa maririmela vamaithoni wa mwene ni pwiyamwene." 
Esther7:7 Oonyoonyiweene mwene aavenya ahiyaka eviinyu, anarowa munttimbeni na empa ya mwene. Vaheera Hamani, asuwelaka weera mwene oolakela omwiiva, aahala vamoha ni pwiyamwene Exteri amudyoonttelelaka wuurela okumaawe." 
Esther7:8 Mwene ahokolowaka ottimbeni na empaawe avolowaka esaala ya efesta, aamoona Hamani uuwenleene vahiceni aaraawe Exteri amuuramenleene. Mwene aakhuwela: “Mulopwana ola, ohiya yeeyo opankaawe, ontthunatho ompuhera pwiyamwene vaatewaka!” Mwene amalihakaru wuuluma masu ale, anamalipelela yaakhuneela ekhove ya Hamani." 
Esther7:9 Vano enoko* mmoha a mwene iitthaniwa Harebona aaheera: “Wookhala wootthukeleliwa kuleele orakamawaya imeetru* miloko miili niithanu vaate wa Hamani. Aampakela Mordekai, mwa yoowo uulumme amulopolaka mwene.” Mwene aaheera: “Mwamutthukelelewo!”" 
Esther7:10 Hiiho Hamani aakhwela vanipuroni aamurehererenlaawe Mordekai omutthukelela kuleele. Vahoolowaya isara sa mwene saamala. 
Esther8:1 Nihuku nenenenne mwene aamvaha pwiyamwene Exteri sooreela sootheene sa Hamani, mwiittana a aYuda. Mordekai aaronghiwa vamaithoni wa mwene, niwoko Exteri aamuthalihera weera aari mmusaawe." 
Esther8:2 Mwene aamurula munelaawe woottittano aamurunlaawe Hamani, anamvaha Mordekai. Vano Exteri aamukhaliha namawehaweha a vaate wa Hamani." 
Esther8:3 Vanonto Exteri aamudyoonttelelatho mwene iinlaka mmettonimwawe weera ahiihe yoovaanela yoonanara ya Hamani, muGagi, aavaanelenlaawe aYuda." 
Esther8:4 Mwene aamookolela ekopo ya eyuuma yoorikaxa ni owo aaheemela ohoolowawe eeraka: 
Esther8:5 “Woosivelakani amwene, kaphwanya mahala vamaithoniwanyu ni muupuwela weera ti etthu ya ekhaikhai, mulepe nlamulo nikina nimalihaka nne muGagi Hamani, mwaana mulopwana a Hamedata, aalempaawe weera aYuda emalihiwe mweelaponi sootheene sa mwene." 
Esther8:6 Nkingwera ovilela woowoona mulokwaaka omoreliwaka mahooxo. Nkingwera ovilela woowoona ophwatiwa wa emusaaka!” 
Esther8:7 Mwene Ahaxeveroxi aamwaakhula pwiyamwene Exteri ni Mordekai muYuda: “Eenre Hamani aawananaka aYuda, koomvaha vaatewawe Exteri ni koolamula weera owo atthukeleliwe kuleele." 
Esther8:8 Vano mulepe ekano ekina mwa nsina na mwene ngweerelaka aYuda moota oneeraaya wooreereleni. Muttiittele munela woottittano wa mwene, niwoko ekaratta elempwale mwa nsina na mwene ni ettittiweene ni munelaawe ti yoohiceendyeya.”" 
Esther8:9 Iye seereiye vanihukuni nanaamiloko miili ni mararu na mweeri wanaararu oniitthaniwa Sivani. Anamalepa a mwene yaathukumanyihiwa woowaakuveya. Yaahaalepela ikano sootheene sa Mordekai aYuda ootheene ni mapwattapwattha, maguvernadori ni maneethi ootheene a ilapo ncira ni miloko miili niithannapiili okhuma wIndiya mpaka oKuxe. Ikano iye saalempwale ettharihiwaka muulumo ni elepelo ya khula muloko mweelaponi sootheene nitho wa aYuda ni elepelowaaya ni nuulumonaya." 
Esther8:10 Mordekai aalepa mwa nsina na mwene Ahaxeveroxi, anattitta ikaratta ni munela woottittano wa mwene, anarumiha mwa anamitthenga ewenleene ikavalu* soowaaluwaxa saakuxiwe munikhoolani na mwene." 
Esther8:11 Ekano ya mwene yaawaakhulela aYuda wa khula esidade weera ethukumane vamoha ni weera yiixaakihe. Yaalamulatho weera ephwate, yiive ni ehonone wakhalaru muloko hoye hoye yakhalaru elapo yeera yaawanane naari ewoopopihe awosa, axaaraya ni anamwanaaya ni weera ehuhule sooreela sa amwiittanaaya." 
Esther8:12 Nihuku naathanliwe weera aYuda epake yeeyo mweelaponi sootheene sa mwene Ahaxeveroxi naari nihuku na naamuloko ni mararu na mweeri wanaamuloko ni miili oniitthaniwa Adari. 
Esther8:13 Ekaratta emoha ya ekano yaalempwale eweheriwaka sikina yaathalihiwa ntoko nlamulo wa khula elapo esuwelihiwaka miloko sootheene weera nihuku nno aYuda ekhale oolikaneene wiixaakiha ni amwiittanaaya. 
Esther8:14 Anamitthenga ewenleene ikavalu* saakuxiwe munikhoolani na mwene yaattimula woowaakuveya mwaha wa nlamulo na mwene. Ekano ele yaasuwelihiwatho musidadeni yoolipihiwaxa ya oSusa. 
Esther8:15 Mordekai aavenya vamaithoni wa mwene awarenleene sa emwene sa kanka ni sootteela, ecireemba etokotoko ya eyuuma yoorikaxa ni mukaandyo wookankela wa nliinya nootteettheya. Esidade ya oSusa yaatthapa ni ohakalala." 
Esther8:16 Wa aYuda yaari ehuhu ya mpuha, ohakalalaxa, otthapa ni nttittimiho." 
Esther8:17 Waakhala ohakalala variyari wa aYuda mweelaponi sootheene ni mmasidadeni sootheene mwemmo yaaphiyalaayamo ekano ya mwene. Atthu ancipale a miloko sikina sa moomweneni yaathatuwa aYuda, niwoko woopiha wa aYuda waahaatepelasa." 
Esther9:1 Vanihukuni na naamuloko ni mararu na mweeri wanaamuloko ni miili oniitthaniwa Adari, ekano ya mwene yeeraaya ekwaniheriwe. Nihuku nne amwiittana a aYuda yaaweherera waawina, mene waavirikana aYuda yaahaawina yaawo yaasoonda." 
Esther9:2 aYuda yaathukumana mmasidadenimwaya mweelaponi sootheene sa mwene Ahaxeveroxi weera yaawaneno yaale yaatthuna waaphwata. Khaawo yaawera waawina, niwoko miloko sootheene sannawoovasa." 
Esther9:3 Maneethi a ilapo sootheene, mapwattapwattha, maguvernadori ni anamawehaweha a mwene yaahaakhavihera aYuda, niwoko woopiha wa Mordekai waahaatepelasa." 
Esther9:4 Mordekai aari ooweraxa mpaani mwa mwene. Epilaawe yaamwareela mweelaponi sootheene ni otokweenaawe wannaandyeerereya. 
Esther9:5 aYuda yaawiiva amwiittanaaya ootheene ni ikatana yaaphwataka, enaapakela yeeyo yaatthunaaya." 
Esther9:6 Musidadeni yoolipihiwaxa ya oSusa aYuda yaawiiva asilopwana macira mathanu. 
Esther9:7 Yaamwiivatho Parexanedata, Dalefoni, Asepata," 
Esther9:8 Porata, Adaleya, Aridata," 
Esther9:9 Paremaxeta, Arisai, Aridai ni Vayezata," 
Esther9:10 anamwane asilopwana muloko a Hamani, mwaana mulopwana a Hamedata, mwiittana a aYuda. Wa soothesene, khayaakamenle sooreelasaya." 
Esther9:11 Nihuku nenenenne mwene aathaliheriwa waatta wa ootheene yiiveliwe musidadeni yoolipihiwa ya oSusa. 
Esther9:12 Vano mwene aamweerela pwiyamwene Exter: “aYuda aawiiva yaaphwataka asilopwana macira mathanu musidadeni yoolipihiwaxa ya oSusa, nitho anamwane asilopwana muloko a Hamani. Ekhumelenle eheeni mweelaponimwaka sikina? Vano yoovekaanyu eheeni? Nyuwo munimwaakhuleliwa. Munghaawelatho eheeni? Eyo munoovahiwa.”" 
Esther9:13 Exteri aamwaakhula: “Woosivelani amwene, mwaatthunihere aYuda a oSusa weera epwaherere ekano ya olelo mpakatho omaalo weerela mittembo sa anamwane asilopwana muloko a Hamani sitthukeleliweke kuleele.”" 
Esther9:14 Mwene aalamula weera eyo epakiwe. Ekano yaalaleiwa oSusa ni mittembo sa anamwane asilopwana muloko a Hamani saatthukeleliwa kuleele. 
Esther9:15 aYuda a oSusa yaathukumanasa nihuku nanaamuloko ni maxexe na mweeri Adari, enawiiva asilopwana macira mararu. Wa soothesene, khayaakamenle sooreelasaya." 
Esther9:16 Eyo eri hiiho, aYuda a ilapo sikina sa mwene yaathukumanatho weera yiixaakihe ni yiitapuxe mwa amwiittananaaya. Yaawiiva asilopwana 75 000, mene khayaakamenle soorelasala." 
Esther9:17 Eyo yeereiye vanihukuni na naamuloko ni mararu na mweeri Adari ni waaxiiye yaahiitthuuwa epakaka nihuku na efesta ni ohakalala. 
Esther9:18 Wa soothesene, aYuda yaakhala oSusa yaathukumana nihuku nanaamuloko ni mararu ni waaxiiye ni munihukuni na naamuloko ni mathanu yaahiitthuuwa epakaka nihuku na efesta ni ohakalala." 
Esther9:19 Tivawo aYuda a isidade sikhaani ni mittetthe anuupuwelelaaya nihuku na naamuloko ni maxexe na mweeri Adari ntoko nihuku na efesta ni na ohakalala ni ovahanana. 
Esther9:20 Mordekai aalepa sookhumelela iye aarumihelaka ikaratta aYuda a ilapo sootheene sookhuveela ni soorakamela sa mwene Ahaxevoroxi. 
Esther9:21 Aalamula weera epake efesta khula eyaakha mmahukuni anaamuloko ni maxexe ni anaamuloko ni mathanu a mweeri wa Adari," 
Esther9:22 yuupuwelelaka ehuhu aYuda yiitapunxaaya mwa amwiittanaaya. Mweeri ole othananawaya waathatuwa ohakalala ni olalamikawaya waathatuwa efesta. Aahaalepela eerelaka weera yuupuwelele mahuku ale ntoko mahuku a efesta ni a ohakalala evahananaka ni yaavahaka oohaawa. 
Esther9:23 Hiiho aYuda yaakhaliha ntoko ekhovelelo eyuupuwelelo ele ettharihaka yeeyo Mordekai aalamulenlaawe mukarattani. 
Esther9:24 Hamani, mwaana mulopwana a Hamedata, mwiittana a aYuda ootheene aahaavaanelela aYuda weera aaphwate, aapaka macitta aniitthaniwa Puri weera ethanliweke ehuhu ya ophwatiwawaya ni okhwawaya." 
Esther9:25 Wa soothesene, mwene asuwelakaru yeeyo, aalamulela mukarattani weera yoovaanela yoonanara ele ya Hamani wa aYuda emuhokoleele muneenaawe ni weera owo vamoha ni anamwanaawe etthukelelasiwe kuleele." 
Esther9:26 Tivawo mahuku ale yiitthaniwaaya Purimi* niwoko na nsu “Puri”*. Niwoko na ekaratta ya Mordekai ni yeeyo yooningwe ni yaakhumelenle," 
Esther9:27 aYuda yaalakela okhaliha ekhovelelo ele elamulaka ekhapiraaya ni ootheene yaathatungwe aYuda weera yuupuwelele mahuku meeli ale khula eyaakha, ettharaka moota ni ehuhuwaaya yaalamuliwaaya." 
Esther9:28 Mahuku ale yuupuweleliwe ni epakiwe wa khula ekhapira, khula emusi ni mweelaponi sootheene sa khula esidade. Ehihiyereriweru wuupuweleliwa ni aYuda, ni ekhapiraaya ehittiwaleru mahukweene yaale." 
Esther9:29 Vano pwiyamwene Exteri, mwaana muthiyana a Abihaili, ni Mordekai, muYuda, yaalepasa ekaratta yanaaveeli ni ikuru sa mwene weera yaakhulele ekaratta ela yoopacera mwaha wa mahuku a Purimi*." 
Esther9:30 Mordekai aahaarumihela ikaratta aYuda ootheene a ilapo ncira ni miloko miili niithannapiili sa mwene Ahaxeveroxi, aweerelaka murettele ni ororomeleya." 
Esther9:31 Aalamula weera mahuku ale a Purimi* yuupuweleliweke mweehuhunimwaya yootthuneya ntoko Mordekai, muYuda, ni pwiyamwene Exteri yaalamulelansaaya okhaliha ni ntoko aYuda yiikhalihenraaya ni wa ikhapirasaya. Yaahaandyeereratho malamulo mwaha wa otthuka ni olalamika." 
Esther9:32 Ekano ya Exteri yaahaakhulela ikano iye mwaha wa Purimi* ni iye saalempwa mulivuruni ya nyaha. 
Esther10:1 Mwene Ahaxeveroxi aalamula oliviwa musoko moomwenenimwawe moothemwene, mpakatho ilapo soorakamela mukerekhere ephareiya." 
Esther10:2 Vano mitekosawe sootheene sa ikuru vamoha ni mwaha wootheene wa Mordekai ni moota mwene aamukhalinghaawe ntoko oottittimiheyaxa – sootheene iye silempwale mulivuruni ya nyaha sa mamwene a oMediya ni oParesi. 
Esther10:3 muYuda Mordekai aari anaaveeli moomweneni vahoolo wa mwene Ahaxeveroxi. Aari mulopwana oottittimeheya variyari wa aYuda ni aari oosiveleyaxa, niwoko aavarela mpuha wa mulokwaawe aakhalelaka nnene ootheene." 
Job1:1 Mulaponi ya wUzi aakhala mulopwana iitthaniwa Yobi. Aari mulopwana ookwanela ni oororomeleya; annamoova Muluku, asembaka opaka sootakhala." 
Job1:2 Owo aakhalano anamwane asilopwana athanneeli ni anamwane asithiyana araru," 
Job1:3 ni aakhalano ikhondoolo macira miloko mithannamiili, ikamelu* macira miloko miraru, imombe seettaka piili piili macira mathanu ni abuuru macira mathanu, mpakatho arumeiyi ancipale. Aari mulopwana oopuhaxa a mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa." 
Job1:4 Anamwane asilopwana yannakhovelela opaka ifesta owaani, khula mutthu emaaraawe, ni yannaalattula axirokoraya araru weera ece ni ewureno." 
Job1:5 Yaamalaaya ehuhu ya ifesta, Yobi aalamulela wiitthanasiwa ni aapakiha weera etteelihiwe. Annapeherera opaka sooveleela soohisa aweerelaka yaawosa, niwoko uupuwela: “Apaale anamwanaaka aampahula Muluku mpuwamwaya, emutthekelaka ni emulaphaka Yoowo.” Eyo yaari epakelo ya Yobi." 
Job1:6 Nihuku nimoha, andyelo yaahoorwa wa Yave, ni Satanatho aahoorwa ni yaawosa." 
Job1:7 Yave aamukoha Satana: “Munrweela woowi?” Satana aamwaakhula Yave: “Orukureera mulaponi kiviraviraka mwemmo.” 
Job1:8 Vano Yave aamukoha Satana: “Moomoona murumeiyaaka Yobi? Khawoworu mukina mulaponimu ntoko yoowo, oohihuluxeya, ookwanela ni mulopwana ommoova Muluku, asembaka opaka yootakhala.”" 
Job1:9 Satana aamwaakhula: “Owo ongwoovani Nyuwo niwoko na omooniherawanyu murima wooreera. 
Job1:10 Moomurukureerihela exiri yoomwaakiha yoowo, emusaawe ni sootheene oraaweno. Nyeenyuweene mooreeliha sootheene ompakaawe, moota wooweera mihuwosawe sootheene soomwareela mulaponi yootheene." 
Job1:11 Mene mutheteye ntatananyu ni mvulalihe sootheene owo oraaweno, ni woohihovela, owo onimoolaphani ohoolowanyu.”" 
Job1:12 Yave aamweerela Satana: Paahi, sootheene owo orinaawe siri mmatatanimwanyu; mene muhimutaveru yoowo.” Vano Satana aavenya vamaithoni wa Yave." 
Job1:13 Nihuku nimoha, anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana a Yobi yaaraaya wafestani, ecaaka ni ewuraka eviinyu vaate wa munnaya mutokweene," 
Job1:14 namutthenga mmoha aahoorwa omuleela Yobi: “Imombe seera sittipuraka ni abuuru yeera ecihiwaka mukhiviru," 
Job1:15 yaawananaaya aSabeyani enaakuxasa. Yaawiivakasa ni ekatana arumeiyi ootheene. Ti miyo paahi koopongwe weera koothalihereni!” 
Job1:16 Nlelo owo uulumaka, aaphiya namutthenga mukina aneera: “Mooro wa Muluku woomora wiirimu, onahisa woomalela ikhondoolo ni arumeiyi. Ti miyo paahi koopongwe weera koothalihereni.”" 
Job1:17 Nlelo owo uulumaka, aaphiya namutthenga mukina aneera: “Yaahoorwa aKaldeya mikuttula miraru, yaavoleela ikamelu*, enarowano. Yaawiivakasa ni ekatana arumeiyi. Ti miyo paahi koopongwe weera koothalihereni!”" 
Job1:18 Nlelo owo uulumaka, aaphiya namutthenga mukina, aneera: “Anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana, yaari wafestani, ecaaka ni ewuraka eviinyu vaate wa munnaya mutokweene," 
Job1:19 wootutuxereya yaaphiya epheyo etokotoko yaarweela onikareni, enamana malootho maxexe a empa, enaakurumuwela. Awosa ahookhwa ni ti miyo paahi koopongwe weera koothalihereni!”" 
Job1:20 Yobi iiwaka yeeyo, aaheemela, anaahula mukaandyo ni anamettha. Vano aahuuramihela ekhove vathi moolapani," 
Job1:21 aneera: “Kikhumale woohiwara mmirimani mwa amayaka, ni nkittimuletho woohiwara. Yave aakivaha, ni Owo ookuxa; Nsina na Yave nittottopeliwe.”" 
Job1:22 Waarookhalaru hiiho, Yobi khaatthenke ni khaamoothenreru Yave." 
Job2:1 Nihuku nikina andyelo yaahoorwa wa Yave, ni Satanatho aahoorwa ni yaawosa." 
Job2:2 Yave aamukoha Satana: “Munrweela woowi?” Satana aamwaakhula Yave: “Orukureera mulaponi, kiviraviraka mwemmo.”" 
Job2:3 Vano Yave aamukoha Satana: “Moomoona murumeiyaaka Yobi? Khawoworu mulaponimu ntoko yoowo, oohihuluxeya, ookwanela ni mulopwana ommoova Muluku, asembaka opaka yootakhala. Naari nyuwo mukinyesererihaka omuhela nthala woohinthowa, owo ompwaherera ookwaneleene.”" 
Job2:4 Satana aamweerela Yave: “Mutthu onoowera ovaha sootheene orinaawe mpaka erutthwaaweene, weera oopole okumaawe." 
Job2:5 Mutheteye ntatananyu ni mvulalihe erutthwaawe ni makhuveene – woohihovela owo onimoolaphani vamaithoniwanyu.” 
Job2:6 Yave aamweerela Satana: “Paahi, owo ori mmatatanimwanyu, mene muurelaru okumaawe.”" 
Job2:7 Vano Satana aavenya vamaithoni wa Yave anampiluwiha Yobi itthuku soowoopiha, okhuma waannaawo mpaka mmuru." 
Job2:8 Yobi aakuxa nivali aniisunelano akilaathiyeene vattuurani. 
Job2:9 Vano amwaariye yaamweerela: “Nlelo nyuwo mumpwaherera mookwanelanimwanyu? Munlaphe Muluku ni mukhwe!” 
Job2:10 Yobi aamwaakhula: “Nyuwo munuuluma ntoko mulolo. Naakheleleke paahi yooreera nivahiwaahu ni Muluku, woohaakhelatho yoonanara?” Waarookhalaru hiiho, Yobi khuulumaru naari nsu nimoha noomveiha Muluku." 
Job2:11 Asinthamwene araru a Yobi yaahiiwa suulummwaka sa ehasara yaamukhumelenle Yobi. Awosa yaari: Elifazi muTemani, Bildade muXuhi ni Zofari muNaamati. Khula mutthu aavenya owannyawe eniiwanana orowa ottheene omukhavihera Yobi ni ompembesa." 
Job2:12 Emoonaka ottai ottai, khayaamusuwelaru ni yaapacerasa omwiinlela ekhuwelaka. Khula mutthu a yaawosa aahaahula mukaadyowaawe, aniihela etthaya mmuru." 
Job2:13 Hiiho awosa yaapwaherera okilaathi puruvuru ni yoowo, ahikhalaka oomuulumano othana mithannamiili ni ohiyu mithannamiilitho, niwoko yoona weera ohaawawawe waatepaxa." 
Job3:1 Vahoolowaya, Yobi aahula eyano, analapha nihuku na oyariwawawe," 
Job3:2 eeraka: 
Job3:3 “Nilakaseye nihuku na oyariwawaka ni ohiyu weeriwaaya: ‘Ooyariwa mwaana mulopwana!’ 
Job3:4 Nihuku nne nithatuwe epiphi; Muluku wiirimu iwo ahipwatthele; nihimwaleeleye. 
Job3:5 Epiphi yooriipihana esareele nenno; nihuruweleye ni nihutte nooriipihanaxa; epiphi yoopopihe nne. 
Job3:6 Ohiyu ole, epiphi etokotoko evarexexe! Ohaalikeleliwe eriyari ya mahuku a eyaakha, hata ohikhaleleno mpatta wa mahuku a wakhalaru mweeri." 
Job3:7 Ohiyu ole okhale weekupa, mwa yoole ohiiwanyeye okhuweliwa wa ohakalala." 
Job3:8 Elaphe nihuku nne yaawo anlapha mahuku ni angwera omvenxa Levitiyani*. 
Job3:9 Ithenyeerisaya sa oxeexelo sihaare, oweherere siiyo waara wa oxa ni ohiwere woona ekamaama ya oxa," 
Job3:10 niwoko nne khanaawanle kaakhumelaakawo mmirimani mwa amaayi weera nikisembihe woona soonanara. 
Job3:11 Kahaavirelaaka weiwo, kinayariwa ookhweene?" 
Job3:12 Yaakhalelani makutha weera ekaakhelele, ni mapele weera ekaamwihe?" 
Job3:13 Hiiho, kaangwera wiixaatalela mmuretteleni ni ophwanya wiitthuuwa" 
Job3:14 vamoha ni mamwene nitho anamalaka a mulaponi, yiitekenle mapuro oowiitthuuwa, vano eheleiyeene nthala," 
Job3:15 vamoha ni alamuli yaarino eyuuma yoorikaxa, yaasaringhe mpaanimwaya iparatha." 
Job3:16 Kahaariheliwani ntoko mwaana ooweera otatheya, aani ntoko mwaana ohoonneru nsuwa" 
Job3:17 Mmo, atakhali khaanramarama, ni ookhulumuwa ampwaherera ngwiitthuuwani." 
Job3:18 Anamatthukiwatho ankhala ngwiitthuuwani, khaaniiwatho okhuwela wa anamakhaliha opottha." 
Job3:19 Atthu piswa ni aweri ari weiwo, ni epottha eri yootapuxeyeene wa pwiiyaaya." 
Job3:20 Onaareliheriwani mutthu oohaawa; okumi wa oothanana; 
Job3:21 yaawosa anghaawela okhwa ehiphwanyaka, ni anaasaasaxa okhwa opwaha muhakhu woovitheya;" 
Job3:22 yaawosa anghakalala ni antthapa yaarowaka woovithiwani? 
Job3:23 Omvaheriwani okumi yoole yiipithiheiye ephirowaawe, ni wa yoole Muluku ohimmooniheraawe makhumelo?" 
Job3:24 Vano, ohiya yooca, onkirweela ohihimera; wiipulelawaka onsareya ntoko maahi." 
Job3:25 Yookirweela koovaaka; yaakoopopiha, yookeereela." 
Job3:26 Nkinono murettele, hata mmaaleleyo, naari wiitthuuwa; kiri ootthukuruwa paahi.”" 
Job4:1 Vano Elifazi muTemani, aahaakhula:" 
Job4:2 “Mukina atthuna wooleelani masu, nyuwo munoomwiiwa? Mene taani anaawere ohuuluma?" 
Job4:3 Muupuwele nnenesene! Nyuwo mohaaxuttiha ancipale; moolipihera matata oolosowa. 
Job4:4 Maswaanyu yaalipihera yaawo yaakwattuliwa; nyuwo moolipihera makutha ootteenguwa. 
Job4:5 Vaheera vano anooneyaaya makacamiho, nyuwo munooporora; awo ahoomanani ni nyuwo moottenguwa." 
Job4:6 Omoovawanyu Yave khoonoolipihani nkoxo? Mweettelowaanyu woohihuluxeya khoonoovahani oweherera? 
Job4:7 Vano, mutthokelele: oohinthowa heeni omalenle mooriheyani? Ookwanela ahaawiye woowi ophwateya?" 
Job4:8 Hiiho ntoko koonaaka, yoowo onlima yoonanara ni onaala sootakhala anaahephe seiyo." 
Job4:9 Amphwatiwa ni wiiseela wa Muluku; anriheya mpheyoni mwa isarasawe. 
Job4:10 Naari mwatto iipaka ni anyakulaka, mpaka maino a mwatto mutokotoko anookhuleya." 
Job4:11 Mwatto onkhwa aahivara yoolupatthaawe, ni axaana a mwatto muthiyana anoomwareya." 
Job4:12 Aakileela masu muxiirini, mwa yaawo maaruwaaka yaakupunraaya orumawaya." 
Job4:13 Kilohaka sooloha soowoopiha, kikonanxeene," 
Job4:14 waakivara woova ni otteenguwa, onathukumeliha makhuvaaka ootheene." 
Job4:15 Yaakiviravira eduusiduusi ni kaasareya maririmela. 
Job4:16 Eyo yaaheemela, mene nkaawenre osuwela. Yaari ntoko ecaambulo ohoolowaka ni kiniiwa nsu vathi vathi neera:" 
Job4:17 ‘Kheewowo enkhwa engwera okhala yoororomeleya ompwaha Muluku. Khawoworu mutthu ongwera okhala ootteela ompwaha Mpattuxaawe. 
Job4:18 Muluku aahaaroromela arumeiyaawe ni aathoonya sootapanya sa andyelowaawe," 
Job4:19 wootepaxa yaawosa ankhala mpaani mwa oloko, mwa yaawo mathipelowaaya ari vathi! Ti ookhweyaxa onyakattiwa ompwaha tthumpwiha!" 
Job4:20 Awosa ankhala waaxekuwaka, mene enguungu anoonyaanyiwa; anriheya woomalela, woohisuwanyeyatho." 
Job4:21 Simpaseya mikhoyi sa iheemasaya ni awosa ankhwa woohikhalano miruku.’” 
Job5:1 “Mwatthuna, mukhuwele, vaheera taani anaawiiweeni? Wa taani a ootteela muneeraanyu munlipeno?" 
Job5:2 Oximwela ommwiiva mulolo, ni nrima nnimphwata nsikini." 
Job5:3 Yoomeene, koomoona mulolo simweettelaka nnene, vaheera wootutuxereya, empaawe yoolamphwa." 
Job5:4 Anamwanaawe ari ottai okhala oolipeene, aahasuliwa sinuulummwaayawo milattu, ehikhalanaka oowaakiha." 
Job5:5 Anamavoliwa annyaanya yoohephaawe, eronghaka mpaka eriyari ya nyiiwa, ni anantthona anghaawela mihakhusawe." 
Job5:6 Vano ohaawa khoomphuwa vantthupini, ni makacamiho khaammela vathi." 
Job5:7 Vaheera mutthu ongyareliwa makacamiho hiihoweene ntoko malumi a mooro amvavelaaya osulu. 
Job5:8 Vaheera yaakeereenle miyo, kaamundyoonttelela Muluku; kaamunleela mulattwaaka." 
Job5:9 Owo ompaka sootikhiniha soohihimeya, aani sootikhiniha soohaalikeleya." 
Job5:10 Onrupihela epula etthaya, ni onrumihela maahi mmatta." 
Job5:11 Ongwunnuwiha oowiiyeviha, ni onaarongha vanipuroni noolipa yaawo anlalamika." 
Job5:12 Owo omvirikanyiha soowuupuwela sa anamacendyera weera matataaya ehiwere etthu. 
Job5:13 Onaavara asuweli moolokotthanimwaya ni soovaanelasaya sootakhala sinkumburuliwa ntoko maahi oowuupa. 
Job5:14 Enaarweela epiphi othana; anaapapela nsuwa nri vamuru ntoko waari ohiyu. 
Job5:15 Owo onimvuluxa onghooxiwa mwa ekatana mmwaanomwaya; onimvuluxa mmatatani mwa aweri. 
Job5:16 Tivawo anamahaawa ankhalanaaya oweherera ni ohiroromeleya ommaaliha eyanowaaya. 
Job5:17 Ooreelihiwa yoole onookoleliwa ni Muluku; tivawo, muhinyoose olaka wa Muluku a ikuru sootheene." 
Job5:18 Vano Owo onnavulaliha, menetho onnapenuxa, onnamana, menetho ntatanawe ninnalamiha." 
Job5:19 Owo onimootapuxani mwa irisa ithannamosa; aani mwa ithannapiili sa seiyo, nyuwo khamuhaawaru." 
Job5:20 Mutalani, Owo onimootapuxani mookhwaani, ni mukhottoni onimootapuxani mwa ikuru sa ekatana." 
Job5:21 Nyuwo munookhapeleliwa mwa ekwamba ya nlumi, ni khootthuneya woova waarwaaka ophwata." 
Job5:22 Nyuwo munootheya mwaha wa ophwatiwa ni etala, ni khootthuneya owoova axinama ooluwa a elapo ya vathi." 
Job5:23 Vano munimwiiraanano maluku a ntuphini, ni axinama a ntuphini anookhalano murettele ni nyuwo." 
Job5:24 Nyuwo munoosuwela weera eheemaanyu yoolipa; munoowehaweha sooreelasanyu sootheene sa vaatewanyu ni kheewo eniyoothoweeni. 
Job5:25 Munoosuwela weera anamwaniinyu animwaatta, ni weera ekhapiraanyu enookhala ntoko malaxi a mulaponi." 
Job5:26 Nyuwo munoorowa woovithiwani oowuuluvaleene, ntoko ehupu ehemphwale mweehuhuni yootthuneya." 
Job5:27 Nooweha yeeyo, nnoona weera ettiitthu. Tivawo, mwiiwe ni mweettele mookuminimwanyu.”" 
Job6:1 Vano Yobi aahaakhula: 
Job6:2 “Mwaawera paahi ophima othananawaka ni ohela wamphimoni erisaaka," 
Job6:3 mwaamoona weera olemelawaya ti otokotoko opwaha ehaava ya mphareiya. Tivawo maswaaka araaya oowuupaxa. 
Job6:4 Nyuupa sa Muluku a ikuru sootheene sookilatha, ni munepaaka onnuula yoohapalaaya; soowoopiha sa Muluku sookirica." 
Job6:5 Weeraka buuru a ntuphini onimwiinla oonaka malaxi hoye hoye emombe vayoocaniwaya. 
Job6:6 Enooceya yooheeleeliwa evaheriwe weeleeliwa? Ni yootteela ya nooce yookhalano esivelowaaya? 
Job6:7 Kinkhootta otava yeeyo; moota wa yooca eyo wookihiiriha. 
Job6:8 Ii! Kaakhuleliwe paahi yoovekaaka, ni Muluku aakivanghe yoohaawelaaka!" 
Job6:9 Muluku aakinyakantte, avenxaka ntatanawe noowaakiha ni aakimalamalinghe!" 
Job6:10 Mwa yeeyo, miyo kaampepesiwa ni kaanghakalala naari kihaawaka ovoreiwa woohihiyerereya, keenre kihikhootta masu a Muluku Ootteela" 
Job6:11 Oweherera heeni kiraakano keenre kihikhalano ikuru? Nkivilele hai kihinono ya muhoolo? 
Job6:12 Weeraka kookhalano ikuru ntoko nluku? Weeraka erutthwaaka ti ya ebronze*? 
Job6:13 Wa miyo, nkinono yooweera; weetteleya nnene wookivira." 
Job6:14 Mutthu amoonihereke murima wooreera nthamwenaawe ohinoona yooweera, mene munkoothera muhimoovaka Muluku a ikuru sootheene." 
Job6:15 Axunnaka ahiixoonihera wa miyo ntoko maxaapwa oowaakuva owelela, aani ansara enapwekhuwa," 
Job6:16 niwoko na orumbula wa woopaana ni etthapwe. 
Job6:17 Vaheera maxaapwa awo anghiya opiluwa mweelimweni, ni moovihani anlakaseya antthimakaayamo." 
Job6:18 Mikuttula sa ikamelu* singhiya simviraayamo; sinkela mmapuroni oowuumelela, sinalakaseya." 
Job6:19 Mikuttula sa ikamelu* sa oTemani sinaasa maahi, ananakoso a oXeba anaaweha moowehererani." 
Job6:20 Ankhala oothanana niwoko yaaroromela; yaaphiyaka wu anghala lakalaka. 
Job6:21 Vano nyuwosatho khamukivareleiye muteko; mohoona ovalavelawaka, munasareya woova." 
Job6:22 Kaatoko woovekelani weera mukivahe etthu, hoye hoye weera mukoopolele mihakhusanyu," 
Job6:23 naari weera mukitapuxe mmatatani mwa amwiittana, hata mukoopole mmatatani mwa yaawo ankihooxa?" 
Job6:24 Mukixuttihe ni miyo kinoomaala, mukoonihere kitapannyaakawo." 
Job6:25 Moota heeni masu a ekhaikhai amvulalihaaya! Mene soowootherasanyu singwera hai? 
Job6:26 Nyuwosa muntthuna wookolela kinghimaaka ni oreherera ntoko epheyo masu a mutthu ohinono yooweera 
Job6:27 Nyuwosa munoowera ompakela macitta mukwaasuni ni omuthumiha nthamwenaanyu mwa etthu yoohooneleyamo. 
Job6:28 Vaheera vano, mukiwehe moonneneni. Weeraka kinimootha ohoolowanyu?" 
Job6:29 Moonelemo mulattu, muhikhale oohiroromeleya; mutthokeleletho, niwoko okwanelawaka ori mwa yeeyo." 
Job6:30 Yookhala yootakhala mmwaanomwaka? Weeraka eyanowaaka kheengwera othanla yoonanara? 
Job7:1 Okumi wa khula mutthu mulaponimu ti woovihaxa, omviriha mahukwaawe ntoko namaliviwa." 
Job7:2 Mooteene yoowo epottha enghaawelaaya wiila, hoye hoye namaliviwa onghaawelaawe, awehereraka oliviwa," 
Job7:3 hiihotho koovaheriwa okhala nyeeri nyeerisene kiwehereraka siiyo ni ohiyu, ohiyuweene kihaawaka." 
Job7:4 Kiixaatalelaka kinuupuwela: Nkivenye yaakhani? Opisa oxa, ni kinkhulumuwa orukunuwasa mpaka oxeexelo." 
Job7:5 Erutthwaaka yoosareya nyuungu ni makangaru a nikhwatta, exapalaaka yoothaleyasa ekhumaka marohi." 
Job7:6 Mahukwaaka antthimaka opwaha yootthavano ya namatthava, ni amphiya ommaleloni woohiwehereraru." 
Job7:7 Ii! Muluku, muupuwelele weera okumaaka onlikana ni iphumu; maithwaaka kheerwa yoonatho mpuha." 
Job7:8 Yaawo ankoona vano, kheekoonatho; mookiweha, mene nkiwowo." 
Job7:9 Mooteene yoowo nihutte nimmwaramwareyaaya, nnalakaseya, navetho yoowo onkhwa khanghokolowatho." 
Job7:10 Khanghokoleelatho owannyawe; khaawo a vaatevawe eniimusuweletho. 
Job7:11 Tivawo kihimmaalaaka; moothananani wa munepaaka kinimuuluma nnenesene, moohaawani wa munepaaka kinimwiittaandawulela." 
Job7:12 Miyo ephareiya, hoye hoye enowa yoowoopihaxa ya moowiixera, weera mukiwehawehe?" 
Job7:13 Kuupuwelaka weera ekaamaaka enookipepesa ni weera wiixaatalelawaka onookurunuxa ottaandawulawaka," 
Job7:14 hata vawo, munkitutuxa ni sooloha mukoopopihaka ni nyoonelo." 
Job7:15 Fataari okhumuliwa nxiko ni okhwa ohikhanle ohaawa hiiha. 
Job7:16 Nkinoonelamo okumaaka! Nkinkhala mahuku ootheene; mukihiye, niwoko mahukwaaka khaveetthuwo." 
Job7:17 Mutthu taani oomoonelamo ni oompwattha," 
Job7:18 aani taani mutthu oongwehaweha khula oxeexelo ni oomoota murima khula ehuhu? 
Job7:19 Khamurwa mukihuluwaru? Khamurwa mukihiya meekhaaka naari ehuhu emoha? 
Job7:20 Kaatthenke, yoonanara heeni koopakenlaakani, Muluku, munaawehaweha atthu? Mukitatuxenreni yoolupaanyu? Weeraka koothatuwa yoolemelaanyu?" 
Job7:21 Muhinlevelelela heeni sooveihasaka ni muhincipiherani sootthekasaka? Vano kihanle vakhaani wiixaatalela vantthupini; Nyuwo munookaasa, mene miyo nkikhalatho.”" 
Job8:1 Vano, Bildade muXuhi, aahaakhula:" 
Job8:2 “Mpaka yaakhani nyuwo muneeraanyu muulume mooteene yoowo? Maswaanyu ti epheyo etokotoko! 
Job8:3 Weeraka Muluku onoopiritula ekhaikhai? Weeraka Muluku a ikuru sootheene onookhoromanyiha yeeyo eri yoowookoleleya? 
Job8:4 Anamwaniinyu yaamutthekenlaaya, Owo aahaattaruxela yoonanara yaapankaaya." 
Job8:5 Vaheera nyuwo mwaamwaasa Muluku, munadyoonttelela wa Muluku a ikuru sootheene," 
Job8:6 nyuwo mwakhala ootteela ni ookwanela, Owo onoovenya vaanaano va aaweerelakani nyuwo ni onimootekihani vanipuroni nookwanela." 
Job8:7 Ompacereroniwanyu onuukhale wookhweyakhweya, ohiyanawaya ommaleloniwaya onuukhale wooweetteleya nnene." 
Job8:8 Mukohe ikhapira sa khalayi ni moone yeeyo asitithinyu yaaxuttenraaya," 
Job8:9 niwoko hiyo niyariwe vaanaano ni khanisuwenle etthu. Mahukwaahu a mulaponi anlikana ntoko munttuusi. 
Job8:10 Awosa animooxuttihani ni animooleelani. Awosa animuuluma masu anrweela mwa ngwiiwexexanimwaya. 
Job8:11 Ettiili enunnuwa mmoolokoni. Ettheere enunnuwa mmaahini. 
Job8:12 Iyo nlelo sunnuwaka ni sipaceraka ophuwa, sinuuma sihinaaye okhomaala, aani sinuuma woowaakuveya opwaha yakhalaru erooro." 
Job8:13 Iwo ommaleloni wa ootheene animuttiwala Muluku; hiiho onlakaseya oweherera wa atakhali. 
Job8:14 Yeeyo onroromelaawe ti yoophweeya, yeeyo oniikhaviheraaweno ti ifiiyu sa ttandaasi." 
Job8:15 Onimphiteera ttandaasaawe, mene owo khanlipa; onoomvarexexa, mene owo onoopaseya." 
Job8:16 Owo ori ntoko mwiri woohelelaxiwa ohinnyaala nsuwa, okuttukutteelaka muttimbeni;" 
Job8:17 mikwankhwaarisaya sintthavelana vamwaako a maluku ni sinaasaasa moowaaleleya eriyari ya nyala. 
Job8:18 Vaheera waapheliwaka vanipuroniwaya, nipuro nno ninkhootta neeraka: ‘Nkinoone.’" 
Job8:19 Iwo ti ommaleloni wa okumaaya, ni vatthayani simmela nyiri sikina." 
Job8:20 Vano, ettiitthu ti weera Muluku khanimukhootta mutthu ookwanela ni khanlipihera matata a yaale ampaka yoonanara." 
Job8:21 Vaheera wa nyuwo, Owo onoosarihatho mmwaanomwanyu otheya ni okhuwela wa ohakalala." 
Job8:22 Amwiittanaanyu animuulihiheya muru, ni iheema sa atakhali khasikhalatho.”" 
Job9:1 Vano Yobi aahaakhula: 
Job9:2 “Koosuwela weera eyo ettiitthu. Vaheera anaawere hai onkhwa okhala ookwanela vamaithoni wa Muluku? 
Job9:3 Naari aatthuneene omwaakhulanano, khaaweraru waakhulela." 
Job9:4 Mirukusawe ti soowiixera, owerawawe ti otokotoko. Taani eerenre ongwanano, sinamweettela nnene?" 
Job9:5 Owo onttuutta nyaako iyo sihisuwelaka, ni musaranimwawe onoopopheya." 
Job9:6 Ookukuttha etthaya, anathaamiha vanipuroniwaya, ni onthukumeliha mattumuxaaya." 
Job9:7 Onuuluma ni nsuwa ni nno khannoopa; Owo oniipithiha waara wa ithenyeeri. 
Job9:8 Owo paahi onkunga irimu ni oneetta vasulu wa mitekuteku sa ephareiya. 
Job9:9 Owo Mpattuxa a Ursu* ni Oriyoni*, a mikuttula sa ithenyeeri ithannapiili ni mikuttula sa ithenyeeri sa mpatta wa ohitto." 
Job9:10 Ompaka miiriira sihinthaliheya, sootikhiniha soohaalikeleya." 
Job9:11 Aaviraka wa miyo, nkingwera omoona; avira mukhivirumwaka nkinimusuwela." 
Job9:12 Owo aphwanya etthu, taani eniimweemexe. Taani anaamweerele: ‘Mumpakani?’" 
Job9:13 Muluku khankurunuxa isarasawe; mpaka anamakhavihera a Rahabe anuuramela inaawosawe. 
Job9:14 Vano, nkiwere hai omwaakhulanano? Nkiphwanye hai masu oomwaakhulanano?" 
Job9:15 Kiroohikhalanaru nthowa, miyo nkaawera omwaakhula; kaaheereke paahi omudyoonttelela ikharari Mphukaaka." 
Job9:16 Naari kimwiitthanneene ni Owo akaakhunleene, nkinroromela weera aamukiiwa." 
Job9:17 Owo aamukittikittha ni ettheku ni woohinthowa aamwaandyeerera makhwattaaka. 
Job9:18 Khaakitthunihera okhala ni okumi, mene aamukiikaathi moohireerela." 
Job9:19 Wakhala mwaha wa ikuru, vano Owo ti ooweraxa! Ni wakhala mwaha wa ekhaikhai, vano taani eniimulamulele" 
Job9:20 Naari kihikhanleno nthowa, eyanowaaka yaamukithoriha; kaari ookwanela, eyo yaamukeerela kookhalano nthowa." 
Job9:21 Naari kireene ookwaneleene, nkiniipwatthela; kinnyoosa okumaaka." 
Job9:22 Sootheene emohamoharu; tivawo kineeraaka Owo onimphwata okhuma ookwanela mpaka mutakhali. 
Job9:23 Nihooxo niivaka wootutuxereya, Owo ontthebwa ohiweherera wa oohinthowa." 
Job9:24 Elapo yaamorelaka mmatatani mwa atakhali, Owo onkuttelela maitho a aphuki. Aahikhala Yoowo, anaakhale taani?" 
Job9:25 Mahukwaaka antthimaka ompwaha namatthimaka, mahuku ammala ehoonneru ohakalala." 
Job9:26 Anlakaseya ntoko nikula na ettiili, ntoko xaaka amorelaka yoovaraawe." 
Job9:27 Miyo keera: ‘Kinoottiwala wiittaandawulelawaka ni kinooceendya ekhovaaka kitheyeke,’" 
Job9:28 hata hiiho, kintteenguwa moohaawanimwaka wootheene niwoko koosuwela weera khamukoona ohikhalano nthowa." 
Job9:29 Keenre kooneliwa okhala nanthowa, kaahiwanele heeni siiyoweene?" 
Job9:30 Naari kiirapingheene ni sabawu, kinyangweene," 
Job9:31 Nyuwo mwaankivonyera muhimeni mwa nttoko weera mpaka ikuwosakasene sikithanye. 
Job9:32 Owo khahiyono mutthu ntoko miyo weera kingwaneno munuulummwa milattu. 
Job9:33 Aari mukina paahi weera anilakelele, ni aniikaathere matata hiyo ooweeli," 
Job9:34 mukina aakisusinghe wa ekopo ya Muluku weera woopihawawe ohikoopopihetho! 
Job9:35 Vano miyo kaamuuluma woohoova; vaheera mmwahani ola, wookivirikaneela.”" 
Job10:1 “Kinthanya okumaaka! Tivawo kineeraaka wiixinnyerera wa ottaandawulawaka, kinimoonihera othanana kiraakano mookuminimwaka." 
Job10:2 Kinoomweerela Muluku: Muhikithorihe; mukoonihere soowootapanyanisaka. 
Job10:3 Muntthunaxa okihooxa ni okhootta miteko sa matataanyu, muhiyaka soovaanela soonanara sa atakhali?" 
Job10:4 Munkhalano maitho ntoko mutthu? Mungweha ntoko ongweheraawe onkhwa? 
Job10:5 Weeraka mahukwaanyu ni iyaakhasanyu sa okumi sinlikana seiyo sa mutthu onkhwa? 
Job10:6 Niwoko Nyuwo munaasaasera yootakhalaaka ni mummwamwanyula yootthekaaka," 
Job10:7 muroosuwelaru weera nkinthowa ni weera khaawo anaawere okitapuxa mmatatanimwanyu. 
Job10:8 Matataanyu aakipattuxa, enakoopa. Vano munoorukunuwa weera mukiphwate?" 
Job10:9 Muupuwelele weera mukoopiye ntoko oloko! Vano munookihokoloxera vantthupini? 
Job10:10 Nyuwo mookiittha ntoko mukaka munakuumiha ntoko ekeixu*. 
Job10:11 Mookihuruwela exapala ni erutthu, munakitthava ni makhuva ni misemba." 
Job10:12 Mookivaha okumi, munakoonihera murima wooreera, moovahanimwanyu moocekenda munepaaka." 
Job10:13 Vaheera vano koosuwela weera vamurimaniwanyu mwaakhalano miruku soowiipithiheya. 
Job10:14 Kaatthenke, mwaankoona ni khamwaahiya woohittaruxa oveihawaka." 
Job10:15 Kaarino nthowa, maayi miyo! Naari kihinthowa, nkingwera ottukhula muru, niwoko kohuulihiheyaxa muru ni koosareya othanana." 
Job10:16 Kattukhula muru, munookithurumela ntoko mwatto ni munkoonihera owerawanyu woothukumeliha." 
Job10:17 Munkiruuhela anamoona anyowani ni munkaandyeererela isarasanyu; anakhottwaanyu ankiwanano imaara imaarsene. 
Job10:18 Vano, mukihiyenreni kiyariwaka? Fataari kaakhwiiye kihooniweru." 
Job10:19 Fataari kahaakhanleru, hoye hoye kaavirenle weiwo!" 
Job10:20 Mahuku a okumaaka ahanle vakhaani. Mususe wa miyo weera kikhaleno ehuhu vakhaani ya ohakalala," 
Job10:21 kihinaaye orowa nipuro nihinghokoloiwa, wa elapo ya nyunttuusi ni epiphi yooriipihana," 
Job10:22 wa elapo ya ewiriphi ni nyunttuusi soowoopiha, aani naari oreenewo waara enooneyaaya epiphiru.”" 
Job11:1 Vano Zofari muNaamati, aahaakhula:" 
Job11:2 “Ontthuneya waakhula maswaawe ala mancipale. Khaningwera omwaakhulela nayano ola. 
Job11:3 Otthekulawanyu wa osikini onimwaamaaliha atthu? Khaawo anaahiihe mootthebwanimwanyu? 
Job11:4 Mummweerela Muluku: ‘Kinghima ettiitthu ni kiri ootteela ohoolowanyu.’ 
Job11:5 Ii! Kaatthunaxa weera Muluku ooleenleni, weera ahime woolakelelaniwanyu." 
Job11:6 Owo awoonihereni exiiri ya mirukusawe! Vano miruku sa ekhaikhai simpwaha seiyo muniiwexexaanyu. Musuwele weera Muluku oottiwala sootthekasanyu sikina sikina. Muluku khanoottaruxani attharihaka sootthekasanyu. 
Job11:7 Nyuwo munoowera ophima mitikhinelo sa Muluku? Munoowera oringa nyiinano sa Muluku a ikuru sootheene? 
Job11:8 Ti soorakamaxa opwaha erimu! Mmwipakeni? Ti soowiixeraxa opwaha moowiixera! Mmwisuweleni? 
Job11:9 Mweerakamelonimwaya ti otokotoko opwaha etthaya, ni mweekhuveelonimwaya ti otokotoko opwaha ephareiya." 
Job11:10 Owo alamulela otthukiwa, anatthunihera oronghiwa onuulummwa milattu, taani anaamukhoottele?" 
Job11:11 Owo ohaasuwela anamootha ni weiwo eraayawo yoonanara, Owo onnoonaxa." 
Job11:12 Vaheera hiiho ntoko ohingwereyaaya buuru a mutuphini omuyara mwaaxaana mulopwana, hiihotho khoongwereya weera mulolo athatuwe musuweli." 
Job11:13 Wa soothesene, mwamutteelihera murima Yoowo, munamutheteela matata;" 
Job11:14 mwasusiha soottheka siri mmatatanimwanyu, muhinatthunihera weera yoonanara emake mpaanimwanyu," 
Job11:15 vano nyuwo munoottukhula ekhove muhuulihiheyaka muru; munookhala oolipeene ni oohoova. 
Job11:16 Nyuwo munoottiwala irisasanyu, muupuwelelaka paahi ntoko maahi avinre." 
Job11:17 Okumaanyu onimwaara opwaha nsuwa nri vamuru, ni mpaka epiphi eniithatuwe ntoko ekamaama ya oxa." 
Job11:18 Nyuwo munookhala oolipeene niwoko wookhala oweherera; munooweha mukhwipi, ni munimwiitthuuwa oolipeene." 
Job11:19 Nyuwo munimwiixaatalela, ni khaawo anootannyereni woova, ni ancipale animwaasaasa murimaanyu wooreera." 
Job11:20 Vaheera oonanara murima anoothatuwa oohoona, yaasaka wootthawelawo woohiphwanya; owehererawaya onuukhale ohihimera wa okhwa paahi.”" 
Job12:1 Vano Yobi aahaakhula: 
Job12:2 “Woohihovela nyuwosa muri asuweli xaxaxa ni mwakhwa, miruku sinimookhwatho!" 
Job12:3 Vaheera miyo kookhalano iseru ntoko nyuwo; nkihiyono mukhaanaanyu. Taani ohisuwenle itthusene seiya? 
Job12:4 Kiri mutheelelo wa amwaattamanaaka! Koomvekela Muluku weera akaakhule ni ankitthebwa miyo kireene oowookoleleya ni oororomeleya! 
Job12:5 Yaawo ampuha, anaaveiha yaawo oowuulihiheya muru. Anaakakha yaawo anghaleela omora." 
Job12:6 Iheema sa atakhali simmweetteleya nnene, ni ahinimpwattha Muluku ankhala oolipeene ekuxaka milukusaya mmatatanimwaya." 
Job12:7 Wa soothesene, mwaakohe axinama, ni awosa animooxuttihani, hoye hoye ipalame ni iyo sinimoothaliherani;" 
Job12:8 muulume ni etthaya, ni eyo enimooxuttihani, muhiye sooleelakani ihopa sa mphareiya." 
Job12:9 Taani a sootheene iyo ohisuwenle weera ti ntata na Yave nipanke yeeyo? 
Job12:10 Okumi wa soopattuxiwa sootheene ori mmatatanimwawe nitho ngwiya wa omutthu wootheene. 
Job12:11 Naaru nnoowera okawanyiha masu ntoko nlumi ninthanlaaya osiva wa yooca. 
Job12:12 Miruku simphwanyiwa eriyari ya anamuuluvala. Okhalano okumi mwincipale onooruuha wiiwexexa. 
Job12:13 Ti Muluku orino miruku ni owera; olaka ni wiiwexexa ti wawawe. 
Job12:14 Yeeyo Owo omphwataawe, kheenraseleya; yoowo Owo onimvaraawe, khaawo angwera omutapuxa." 
Job12:15 Owo aahirupiha epula, anthowa maahi; arupihaxa epula, antothowa maahi." 
Job12:16 Ikuru ni miruku ti sawawe; okhuma oolokotthiwa mpaka oolokottha, anlamuliwa ni Yoowo." 
Job12:17 Owo onaahuhula ni onaakuruxa anamalaka, ni aphuki onaatatuxa alolo." 
Job12:18 Owo onaataphula mamwene alaambaaya a emwene; onaahiya ttewu ohoolo wa ootheene. 
Job12:19 Onaarongha aarulaka asaserdoti*, onaahela nthala atthu yaari vanipuroni noolipa." 
Job12:20 Ommaaliha iyano sa anamalaka oororomeleya, omvenxa iseru sa ahooleli a muloko." 
Job12:21 Onaayeehera onyoosiwa maneethi, ni ongwaakha ikapwitthi aweri." 
Job12:22 Onthupulula mpiphini itthu soowiixera, anaruuhela waara mpiphini mooriipihana." 
Job12:23 Onunnuwiha miloko, anaphwata; onaattiha miloko, anamwaraxa." 
Job12:24 Onaavirikanyiha akhili a asitokweene a mulaponi, anaathweeleliha woomalela munikareni." 
Job12:25 Aneetta piphiripiphiri mpiphini woohikhalaru waara; Owo onaaveveleiha ntoko anamuhapaliwa. 
Job13:1 Maithwaaka ahoona sootheene iyo, maaruwaaka ahiiwa, eniiwexexa." 
Job13:2 Yeeyo musuwenlaanyu miyotho koosuwela; nkihiyono mukhaanaanyu. 
Job13:3 Vaheera kinghaawela wuuluma ni Muluku a ikuru sootheene, kaakihaka mulattwaaka ohoolo wa Muluku." 
Job13:4 Wa soothesene, nyuwosa munkiverula ni soowootha; ootheene nyuwo muri mameediku oohimuteko!" 
Job13:5 Mwaasiye omaala paahi, mwaamoonihera miruku." 
Job13:6 Vano mwiiwe waakhuleleyawaka; ngwiriyane yeeyo kintthunaaka wuuluma. 
Job13:7 Nyuwosa munimuuluma soonanara mwa Nsina na Muluku? Munimuuluma moolokotthani mwa Yoowo? 
Job13:8 Munimoonihera nthalu mwa Yoowo? Munimwaakiha mulattu mwa Muluku? 
Job13:9 Waamookhalelani nnene Owo ooronghani onuulummwa milattu? Mwaangwera omulokottha ntoko onlokottheliwaawe mutthu? 
Job13:10 Woohihovela, Owo aamoohiihani mwakhalela onamoona ni nthalu wiiphiini." 
Job13:11 Ovuwawawe khawaawoopihani? Ohoolowawe khaawootondolowihani? 
Job13:12 Mirukusanyu siri ntoko ettuura; wiixaakihawanyu ori ntoko oloko. 
Job13:13 Mmaale ni mukihiye kuulume ni vano ekeereele eniikeereele. 
Job13:14 Kiniihelela heeni ngwoopihani, kilevaka okumaaka?" 
Job13:15 Naari Owo akiivaka, hata hiiho, kinooweherera mwa Yoowo; vekhaikhai kinimwaakiha iphirosaka ohoolowawe." 
Job13:16 Wu onookirongha wuutaphuwani, niwoko khawoworu mutakhali ongwera ophiya vamaithoniwawe." 
Job13:17 Vano mwiiwe nnenesene maswaaka; ngwiriyane yeeyo kinthalihaaka. 
Job13:18 Keenre kiirehererela mulattwaaka, koosuwela weera kinimwaakhuleliwa." 
Job13:19 Ookhala anaakoothere? Aakhanle, kinoomaala, kikhweeke.”" 
Job13:20 “Ii! Muluku, mukivahe paahi itthu piili iya, ni nkiwiipithani:" 
Job13:21 Mususihere ottai wa miyo ntatananyu, ni muhikitutuxetho ni soowoopihasanyu." 
Job13:22 Vano mukiitthane ni miyo kinimwaakhula, hoye hoye mukihiye kuulume, ni Nyuwo munimwaakhula." 
Job13:23 Sootapanya ni soottheka ihai kipankaaka? Mukoonihere soohiyanyihasaka ni otthekawaka. 
Job13:24 Munkirerelani ettuli munakoona okhala mwiittanaanyu? 
Job13:25 Munimoopopiha nikukhu nimvavihiwa epheyo? Munoottharatthara makamba? 
Job13:26 Vano, munookiwaawiherela, munapakiha weera kihalane soottheka sa emiravowaaka." 
Job13:27 Muntthuka imettosaka munawehaweha iphirosaka sootheene, muhelelaka nyiinano malipaaka." 
Job13:28 Okumaaka ompupuhuwa ntoko etthu yoowuntta, ntoko ekuwo enceyaaya ni oweexe.”" 
Job14:1 “Mutthu oyariwe onkhala ehuhu vakhaani ni okumaawe woosareya mmakacamihoni. 
Job14:2 Onttuva ntoko ethutu, ananyaala. Onlakaseya ntoko erungu emvira; khanlekelaxa." 
Job14:3 Munoongwehexexa mutthu ntoko alasa? Munoomurongha wookhalawanyu onthoriheloni? 
Job14:4 Taani ongwera okhaliha etthu yootteeleene mwa yoohitteela? Khaawo! 
Job14:5 Mahuku a mutthu ari oowaalikeleyeene; Nyuwo moohima waatta wa nyeerisawe mukhalihaka nyiinano owo ohingweraawe otupha. 
Job14:6 Tivawo, munghuluwe ni munghiye mpaka aneeraawe akwanihere ehuhuwaawe ntoko namuteko onliviwa vamweerini." 
Job14:7 Naari mwiri wookhalano oweherera: Wuuhiwa, onoophuwatho, ni soophuwasaya khasinghaleela." 
Job14:8 Naari mikwankhwaarisaya suuluvalaka vathi ni nikottonaya nimoraka," 
Job14:9 hata hiiho, waanaanelaka, onoophuwa iphandi ntoko mwiri woophatteiwa." 
Job14:10 Vaheera mutthu onimookhwa ni ompwaherera ookhweene; onghihimera wookisera, acipheke." 
Job14:11 Mooteene yoowo maahi a enyandya etokotoko angwelelaaya ni mooloko ongwelelaaya, onuuma," 
Job14:12 hiihotho mutthu oniixaatalelaawe, ahinavenya; mpaka erimu eneeraaya ehikhale, atthutho kheevenya, hata kheevenxiwa mookonani." 
Job14:13 Naari mano mwaakiipithihale mmahiyeni mukisungaka mpaka omala isarasanyu! Naari mano mwaakaalikelenle mahuku a okhalawaka, vahoolowaya mukuupuwelelaka!" 
Job14:14 Mutthu akhwa, onookhalatho ni okumi? Mahukwaaka ootheene a soorumeelasaka kinoowehererela otapuxeyawaka." 
Job14:15 Munookiitthana ni kinoowaakhulani, munoohaawela woona ephattuwelo mpattunxaanyu." 
Job14:16 Vekhaikhai vano munimwaalikela malipaaka ootheene, mene khamunaalikelela sootthekasaka." 
Job14:17 Soohiyanyihasaka sinootthukiwa musaakhoni; Nyuwo munimwiipithiha yootakhalaaka. 
Job14:18 Vaheera mooteene yoowo mwaako onghaawaaya oceya, onamalamala, ni mwala onsusihiwaawe vanipuroniwawe," 
Job14:19 ni mooteene yoowo maahi anlalihaaya maluku, ni nyooloko sinkumburulaaya etthaya, hiihotho mumphwata oweherera wa mutthu." 
Job14:20 Munoomphwata, analakaseya woomalela, munceendya ekhovaawe, munamoomola." 
Job14:21 Anamwanaawe yattittimihiwa hoye hoye yayevihiwa, owo khasuwelaru hata khoona." 
Job14:22 Onoona ovoreya wa erutthwaawe paahi, iikhupanyeraka.”" 
Job15:1 Vano Elifazi muTemani, aahaakhula:" 
Job15:2 “Musuweli aamwaakhula ni miruku soohimuteko, hoye hoye aamvona epheyo?" 
Job15:3 Aangwera ni masu oohimuteko, ni soowuuluma soohooneleyamo?" 
Job15:4 Nyuwo khamummoova Muluku ni munnyoosa omurumeela Yoowo. 
Job15:5 Yootthekaanyu entannya eyanowaanyu; munthanla masu a atthu oocendyera. 
Job15:6 Ti eyanowaanyu enoothorihani, ehikhanle yawaka; iyanosanyu sinookhalelani onamoona." 
Job15:7 Weeraka ti nyuwo mpacenre oyariwa? Weeraka muyariwe ehinaaye mattumuxa? 
Job15:8 Nyuwo mungwiriyanela olaka wa Muluku? Weeraka miruku ti sawinyu paahi? 
Job15:9 Musuwenleni hiyo nihisuwenlaahu? Mwiiwexexo heeni murinaanyu hiyo nihikhalannaahu? 
Job15:10 Anayipwi ni oowuuluvalaxa waapwaha atithinyu ari mpattaahu. 
Job15:11 Khawookwanneni opembesa wa Muluku ni maswaahu oosiveleya? 
Job15:12 Muniihiyerani mukuxiwaka ni murima, ni onaarela heeni mmaithonimwanyu?" 
Job15:13 Vano nyuwo muningyeehera isarasanyu Yave, mukhumihaka masu ala mmwaanomwanyu." 
Job15:14 Ongwereya hai mutthu okhala ootteela? Ongwereya hai mutthu onkhwa wuupuwela weera kookwanela? 
Job15:15 Vano waari weera Muluku mpaka khanaaroromela andyelowaawe, ni mpaka irimutho khasimutteenle woomalela," 
Job15:16 wootepaxa mutthu oothanyeya ni ootakhala; mutthu ongwura sootakhala ntoko angwureliwaaya maahi. 
Job15:17 Mukiwiriyane ni miyo kinimoothaliherani; kinimooleelani yeeyo koonnaaka," 
Job15:18 yeeyo asuweli ahimalaaya ehikhuwakaru seiyo aleeliwaaya wa asitithaya," 
Job15:19 wa yoowo paahi ovahiwe elapo ni ahinaaye akhalaru namarwa ovinremo: 
Job15:20 Mutakhali onghaawa makacamiho mookuminimwawe wootheene, hiihotho mutthu oowuuma murima onghaawa mmahukuni ootheene ooniheriwaawe." 
Job15:21 Oniiwa paahi sooruma soowoopiha, iixoonaka okhala mmuretteleni, anamwiiya anoongwanano." 
Job15:22 Khanoona matthawelo epiphi; olakeleliwe ekatana. 
Job15:23 Onkhala oovalaveleene; ti yooca ya marepo; oosuwela nnenesene weera mahuku a epiphi aakhuveela. 
Job15:24 Makacamiho ni othanana anoomutondolowiha, enamukhulumula ntoko mwene oolikaneene owana," 
Job15:25 niwoko aampakela mpikisano Muluku, amuramusaka Muluku a ikuru sootheene," 
Job15:26 angwananaka moota woowuuma murima ni exikudu* ya mwiitti ni yoolipa. 
Job15:27 Ekhovaawe eroosareyaru makhura ni eyuunu yoowaatta yooneneva," 
Job15:28 onoomaka musidadeni soophwatiwa, mpaani moohimakeya, siphottomowaka." 
Job15:29 Khapuhatho; mihakhusawe khasilekela ni sooreelasawe khasimwareela mulaponi. 
Job15:30 Khawera woopowa mpiphini; mooro onoorusula iphuwelasawe, ni iphumu sa mmwaano mwa Muluku sinoommaliha." 
Job15:31 Owo ahiilokotthe ororomela yeeyo ehimuteko, niwoko khaakhelaru etthu ntoko ntthuvelo." 
Job15:32 Ehiphiyenre ehuhuwaawe, eyo enookwaniheriwa ni khaphuwelatho." 
Job15:33 Onuukhale ntoko evideira* emmora soowiimasaya sireene ikithi, aani ntoko mwiri wa sooliveira* ommala omora ithutusaya," 
Job15:34 niwoko mukhwaayaxa atakhali khaaruuhelaru etthu, ni mooro onoolaliha iheema sa yaawo ansivela makhwankwa." 
Job15:35 Awosa anrupala yoonanara, enayara sootakhala; aani angyara soolokottha.”" 
Job16:1 Vano Yobi aahaakhula: 
Job16:2 “Kohiiwa masu mancipale ntoko yaala. Nyuwosa ootheene ti anamapembesa oohikhavihera! 
Job16:3 Maswaanyu oohivareleya muteko kheemala? Vano eheeni enoopwahererihani nyuwo waakhulana? 
Job16:4 Nyuwo mwaakhanle vanipuroniwaka, miyo kaangwera wuuluma ntoko nyuwosa; kaangwera woothorihani ni masu ooreera koopukunyerakani muru." 
Job16:5 Vaheera, eyanowaaka yaamwaasaasa woolipiherani; opembesa wa iyanosaka waamookurunuxani." 
Job16:6 Wa soothesene, kuuluma, ovoreyawaka khoonkhurunuwa; kamaala, ovoreya iwo khoommalamala." 
Job16:7 Ii! Muluku, woohihovela, Nyuwo moomaliha ikurusaka; moophwata emusaaka yootheene." 
Job16:8 Nyuwo mookivara ni ehasaraaka yoothatuwa namoona; woondawaka onookitepela okikhalela onamoona. 
Job16:9 Musaranimwawe Muluku onkiwanana, anakinyaanya, akikhuurihelaka maino; amwiittanaaka aakixeerela maitho." 
Job16:10 Atthu anookaathamela, ankimana owiitho, ekitthebwaka, ekithukumanenleene." 
Job16:11 Muluku ookimoroxela mmatatani mwa atakhali, aani ookinnyerera mmatatani mwa oonanara murima." 
Job16:12 Miyo kaari emaalelo, mene Owo ookiwaawihera; ookivara vaxiko, anakittikittha. Ookipaka yoolupaawe;" 
Job16:13 ananyuupaawe aakirica. Ahimorelaka ikharari, Owo oohoma misosaka, anamuyeehera vathi wamwaaka." 
Job16:14 Oniivonyera wa miyo imaara imaarasene; akiwananaka ntoko nakhotto. 
Job16:15 Kohiittotthela yoowarela olalamika, kinattukutthera eyuucaaka vantthupini." 
Job16:16 Maitho aakixeera mwaha woowiinlaxa, ni ewiriphi yookisara," 
Job16:17 nroohikhalaru nipuhero mmatatanimwaka ni nivekelonaka nreene noottela. 
Job16:18 Ii! Etthaya, ohikhuneele ephomaaka! Okhuwelawaka ohikhaleno nipuro noowiitthuuwa!" 
Job16:19 Hata vaanaano va Namoonaaka ori wiirimu; Namwaakihaaka ori musulu. 
Job16:20 Maithoraaka yaamorelaka ohoolo wa Yave, nthamwenaaka onkitthebwa." 
Job16:21 Owo onaakiha mulattu wa mutthu ohoolo wa Muluku ntoko mukina onaakihaawe mulattu wa nthamwenaawe. 
Job16:22 Vano sihanle iyaakha vakhaani kipwaheke mukwaha woohihokolowa.” 
Job17:1 “Munepaaka woomalamala, mahukwaaka aakwituleleya, nihiye nnookiweherera." 
Job17:2 Ettiitthu ti weera anamatthebwa ankirukureera ni ontthuneya oweha wiittawaya. 
Job17:3 Ii! Muluku, mukhaleke Olipiheriwawaka. Khaawo anaakilipihere muhikhanle Nyuwo." 
Job17:4 Moowala muupuwelowaaya weera ehiiwexexe; hiiho khamwaahiya ewinaka. 
Job17:5 Mutthu amukhootta nthamwenaawe eerelaka ntthuvelo, maitho a anamwanaawe anoorweeleya eevaasi." 
Job17:6 Vano Muluku ookitatuxa maxiripulo eriyari ya atthu, ntoko mutthu onsenyeliwa owiitho." 
Job17:7 Maithwaaka ankhulumuwa ni olalamika, erutthwaaka enlakaseya ntoko munttuusi." 
Job17:8 Ookwanela ankhala ootikhina ni yeeyo, ni oohinthowa oniixuungurumihela ni atakhali." 
Job17:9 Vaheera oororomeleya anookhala oolipeene mphironimwaya, ni atthu ootteela matata animunnuwa moowerani." 
Job17:10 Wa soothesene, murwaase ootheene nyuwo, ni mweereretho! Nkimphwanyaru musuweli eriyaraanyu." 
Job17:11 Mahukwaaka aamala, soovaanelasaka soolakaseya, mpakatho soohaawela sa murimaaka." 
Job17:12 Awosa antthuna otatuxa ohiyu othana; yaattamelaka epiphi, aneera: ‘Onniwa waara.’" 
Job17:13 Vano waari weera etthoko emoharu kingwehereraaka ti nihiye, kareherera wookonawaka mpiphini," 
Job17:14 keerela yoohitteela: ‘Nyuwo ti tiithaaka,’ ni wa nyuungu: ‘Nyuwosa ti amayaka’ hoye hoye ‘axirokoraka,’" 
Job17:15 vano ori woowi owehererawaka? Taani anaawere woona yakhalaru yoowehereraaka? 
Job17:16 Oweherera iwo onuukhuruwele mmilakoni wa okhwa? Hiyo nnoovithiwanowo?” 
Job18:1 Vano Bilidade, muXuhi, ahaakhula:" 
Job18:2 “Mmuhiyerere yaakhani wuuluma? Mweettele miruku, vahoolowaya nitthekuleke." 
Job18:3 Heeni onoonelaka ntoko axinama, aani ntoko axinama masikini?" 
Job18:4 Ii, nyuwo, muniinyaanya musarinimwanyu! Elapo ethaamiweke mwaha wa nyuwo? Hoye hoye nyala sithaameke mmapuronimwaya?" 
Job18:5 Muthuko wa mutakhali oncipihiwa, ni malumi a moorowaaya anrimihiwa." 
Job18:6 Muheemanimwawe enookhala epiphi; omwaleelawawe onoociphihiwa. 
Job18:7 Okhomaalawawe onooporora, ni soovaanelasawe sinoommoroxela vathi." 
Job18:8 Inaawosawe sinimphariha, ni onimweetta munraakhoni." 
Job18:9 Ntapha nimphariha itthottopwa; muraakho onimphariha woomalela. 
Job18:10 Esurula yohiipithihiwa vathi weera empharihe, nookhala ntapha mphironimwawe." 
Job18:11 Woopiha ommoopopiha mipatta sootheene ni onimuttharatthara onkhalaawewo. 
Job18:12 Ehasara entthuna omukhuura, ni erisa eningweherera owo aamoraka." 
Job18:13 Eyo enkhuura mipatta sa exapalaawe, ntthaara na okhwa ninnyaanya mipatta sa erutthwaawe." 
Job18:14 Onimwaakhiwa omaaleleya wa vaatewawe, aronghiweke wa mwene a woopiha wa okhwa." 
Job18:15 Mooro ommaka muheemanimwawe; enxofre* evarelaka emmwareela vaatewawe. 
Job18:16 Mikwankhwaarisawe sinuuma vathi, ni iphandisawe sinnyaala musulu." 
Job18:17 Wuupuweleliwawawe onlakaseya mulaponi, ni nsinanawe khaniwoworu." 
Job18:18 Ookhumihiwa ngwaarani, avonyeriwaka mpiphini; ohoomoliwa mulaponi." 
Job18:19 Khanono anamwane hata ekhapira eriyari ya mulokwaawe; khamuhalenleru mukumi mmapuroni aakhalaawe khalayi. 
Job18:20 Atthu a mpatta ninkela nsuwa antuthuwa oheleyawawe nthala, ni yaawo a mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa ansareya otteenguwa." 
Job18:21 Ti hiiha woomaka wa mutakhali; wu ti okhala wa yoole ohimusuwenle Muluku.” 
Job19:1 Vano Yobi aahaakhula: 
Job19:2 “Mpaka yaakhani nyuwosa mpwahereraka okihooxa ni okittikittha ni masu? 
Job19:3 Nyuwosa mookihiiha imaara muloko; mookikarawela ohiwuulihakani muru! 
Job19:4 Kaahapungweene ni ettiitthu, ohiyanyiha iwo ti wawaka." 
Job19:5 Nyuwo mohiivuwiha okipwaha miyo muvarelaka muteko oyevihiwawaka ntoko eneneero weera koottheka. 
Job19:6 Vaheera musuwele weera ti Muluku okeerihihale hiiha, akipharihaka mutthavinimwawe." 
Job19:7 Kakhuwela: “Nipuhero!,” nkinaakhuliwa; naari kivekelaka ekhavihero, khoowowo ororomeleya." 
Job19:8 Owo ookikuttelela ephiro, nkingwera ovira; onkihiya kaapapelaka mpiphini." 
Job19:9 Ookirula ottittimiheyawaka vamoha ni ecireembaakeene. 
Job19:10 Owo onkikurumula mipatta sootheene mpaka oriheya; omphela owehererawaka ntoko ompheleliwaaya mwiri. 
Job19:11 Isarasawe sookipattela; owo onkoona ntoko mwiittanaawe. 
Job19:12 Anakhottwaawe anrwa mukuruni; anteka ekaaro yookurumulela exiri, enakikonelela mukhwipi wa eheemaaka." 
Job19:13 Owo ookirakameliha axunnaka, mpaka kaasuwelannaaka aakirakamela." 
Job19:14 Amusaaka aakihiya ni asinthamwenaaka aakittiwala. 
Job19:15 Alettwaaka ni arumeiyaaka asithiyana ankoona ntoko namarwa; aani ankoona ntoko oohisuwanyeya. 
Job19:16 Kaamwiitthanaka murumeiyaaka, khankaakhula, naari kimudyoonttelelaka muneenaaka." 
Job19:17 Amwaaraka anoona ohiira iphumusaka, ni axunnaka xaxaxa khaankitthuna." 
Job19:18 Mpaka amiravo ankitthebwa ni ankitheya kaarwaaka. 
Job19:19 Asinthamwenaaka xaxaxa ankithanya; yaale kinaasivelaaka aakirukunuwela. 
Job19:20 Miyo kihanle makhuvaru, kihokolongwe mulittini." 
Job19:21 Ikharari asinthamwenaaka! Ikharari! Niwoko ntata na Muluku nookivulaliha. 
Job19:22 Munkittharattharela heeni ntoko opakihalaawe Muluku? Khamumvonaru erutthwaaka? 
Job19:23 Ii! Maswaaka yaalempwe woolempwa aani yaalempwe mukarattani," 
Job19:24 yaalempwe ni eyuuma vanlukuni, hoye hoye yaakheriwe vamwala wa mahuku ootheene!" 
Job19:25 Miyo koosuwela weera Mvuluxaaka ti Mukumi, ni weera ommaleloni onoovenyera elapo." 
Job19:26 Ephwatiweene erutthwaaka, hata hiiho kinoomoona Muluku." 
Job19:27 Miyo kinoomoona ni maithwaaka; yoomeene, ahikhanle mukina! Ii! Moota onghaawelaaya murimaaka!" 
Job19:28 Nyuwosa mweera: ‘Moota nneeraahu nimutthare, neenre nthowa nikhala nawawe,’" 
Job19:29 vano fataari nyuwosa asineenaanyu moove ekatana, niwoko mwa yeeyo isara sinimoottaruxani. Ni vano munoosuwela weera nookhala nthorihelo.”" 
Job20:1 Vano Zofari muNaamati, aahaakhula:" 
Job20:2 “Soowuupuwelasaka sootannyeya ni sinkaakhuliha niwoko kookacamiheya. 
Job20:3 Kohiiwa ohiiha onkiveiha, ni wiiwexexawaka onkitannyera waakhula." 
Job20:4 Vekhaikhai, nyuwo moosuwela weera, okhuma khalayi; aani ekhumelo iikaathiwakaru mutthu vathi," 
Job20:5 otheya wa oonanara murima ti woovira, ni ohakalala wa atakhali khoonlekela." 
Job20:6 Naari wiixoonawawe ophiyaka wiirimu ni muruwaawe otavaka mahutte," 
Job20:7 owo onooriheya wa mahuku ootheene, ntoko mahilokaawe; yaawo yaamoonne eniikohe: ‘Ori woowi?’" 
Job20:8 Owo omvava, anavira ntoko oloha ohimphwanyiwaawetho, ommwareya ntoko moonelo wa ohiyu." 
Job20:9 Niitho naamoonne, khanimoonatho, hata nipuronawe khanimoonatho." 
Job20:10 Anamwanaawe eniyeereke waahokoloxera musurukhu anamahaawa; owo muneenaawe aneereke wiithukumanyera musurukhu. 
Job20:11 Ikuru sa emiravowaawe sinlipiha makhuvaawe nsiixaataleleno muntthupini. 
Job20:12 Naari yoonanara ecoocowaka mmwaanomwawe ni owo avithaka waanlumi," 
Job20:13 naari ahiyaka mmwaano weera emusive ahitthunaka omira," 
Job20:14 hata hiiho, yoocaawe enoonyuunya mmirimani; ni enoothatuwa yoohapala ya enowa mpuwamwawe." 
Job20:15 Owo anaarapheye mihakhu ominraawe; Muluku onoopakiha weera nipwiipwinawe nikhumihere vaate mihakhu iyo. 
Job20:16 Anaanuule yoohapala ya enowa; oluma wa evili onoomwiiva. 
Job20:17 Khanoonatho maxaapwa ni nyooloko sa orawo ni mukaka. 
Job20:18 Ahokoloxeke yeele owanenlaawe woohiphurela etthu, ni khaphwanyaru ewinelo ya marondaawe," 
Job20:19 niwoko ohaahooxa anamahaawa anaahiya ttewu, anaakamela impa ohintekaawe." 
Job20:20 Ettiitthu ti weera ohaawelawawe khoonimwiitthuuwiha, ni mihakhusawe khasingwera omvuluxa." 
Job20:21 Kheewo emuhalenle yoonyaanya; weetteleyawawe nnene khoonlekela. 
Job20:22 Asareiyeene mihakhu, othanana onoommorela, makacamiho ootepaxa anoomphwanya." 
Job20:23 Owo iivonihaka, Muluku onoomurumihela isarasawe sivarelaka ni orupa wa omanawawe Muluku onoomuyeehera." 
Job20:24 Naari amoopowaka kapwitthi a eyuuma, nivaka na ebronze* nnoomuhoma." 
Job20:25 Owo onookhumihera muupa ottuliwawe; ethoka ya muupa eceremelaka wahapaniwawe; soowoopiha sootepaxa sinimmorela. 
Job20:26 Ewiriphi engweherera mihakhusawe. Mooro woohiiseeliwa onoomulaliha, ni onoonyaanya yeeyo eniihale muheemanimwawe."
