Job20:27 Erimu enoothupulula nthowanawe; etthaya enoomvenyera. 
Job20:28 Mirupi sitokotoko sinookumburula empaawe, aani maahi oowuupa vanihukuni na isara sa Muluku." 
Job20:29 Wu ti ommaleloni Muluku onaavahaawe atakhali; ti yoohiyera aathanlenlaawe Muluku.” 
Job21:1 Vano Yobi aahaakhula: 
Job21:2 “Ngwiriyane nnenesene maswaaka; wu okhale opepesa muneeraanyu mukivahe. 
Job21:3 Mukivilele kuulumaka; vano kuulumaleene mpwaherereke okitthebwa. 
Job21:4 Waakhulanawaka khoohiyono ni mutthu piswa. Miyo koophwanela ohipixa murima. 
Job21:5 Mukiwehe miyo ni muumiweke owanoni; mphute iyano. 
Job21:6 Kuupuwelelaka yeeyo, kinnoova; erutthwaaka yootheene enoothukumela." 
Job21:7 Oonanara murima ampwahererela heeni okhala ni okumi, saandyeerereyaka ikurusaya mpaka wuuluvalawaya?" 
Job21:8 Awosa angwoona amusaaya oolipeene mukhwipimwaya ni ikhapirasaya vamaithoniwaya. 
Job21:9 Itthokosaya siri soolipasene ni khasinoova; ekopo ya Muluku kheenrwa waavulaliha. 
Job21:10 Anapunci a imombesaya kheehiya orelanyiha; imombesaya ithiyana singyara ni khasintatha. 
Job21:11 Sinaahiya axaanaaya etthimakaka ntoko ipuri, aani antupha ootaphuweene." 
Job21:12 Aniipa ettharihaka oruma wa ikoma ni makita; anghakalalela oruma wa mpetta. 
Job21:13 Awosa ongweetteleya nnenesene okumaaya, enavithiwa mmuretteleni." 
Job21:14 Hata hiiho, awosa ammweerela Muluku: ‘Munihiye! Khanintthuna iphirosanyu.’" 
Job21:15 Muluku a ikuru sootheene taani weera nimurumeele? Nimphwanyani namulapa Muluku? 
Job21:16 Vaheera saaweettelaka nnene, khoohiyono ni owerawaya; tivawo kihimpwatthaaka ikano sa atakhali." 
Job21:17 Vano, imaara ihai yoomwaleela ya atakhali enciphaaya? Imaara ihai sinaamorelaaya irisa, emalihero Muluku onaavahaawe musaranimwawe?" 
Job21:18 Imaara ihai amvavihiwaaya ni epheyo ntoko malaxi, hiihaale makamba ankuxakuxiwaaya ni eyuupuru?" 
Job21:19 Eneeriwa weera Muluku onsunga nttaruxo na mutthu wa anamwanaawe. Tiithi muneene attaruxiwe weera asuwele! 
Job21:20 Maithwaawe muneenaawe yoone oheleyawawe nthala. Owo muneenaawe awure isara sa Muluku a ikuru sootheene. 
Job21:21 Vano yoopwattheleya heeni wa emusi aneeraawe ahiye ottuliwawe saamalaka nyeeri aavaheriwaawe? 
Job21:22 Taani ongwera omuxuttiha Muluku, eenre Owo aathorihaka mpaka oottittimiheyaxa?" 
Job21:23 Mutthu mmoha onkhwa ahitekeleiye, oolipeene ni oomaaleleyeene," 
Job21:24 acaaka nnene ni oolipa makhuva. 
Job21:25 Vanonto, mutthu mukina onkhwa oothananaxeene, ahitonkoru ohakalala." 
Job21:26 Mukina ni mukhwaawe aniixaatalela vantthupini, ooweeli esareiyeene nyuungu." 
Job21:27 Koosuwela nnenesene yeeyo munuupuwelaanyu, okivaanelelawanyu." 
Job21:28 Koosuwela weera munookoha: “Eri woowi empa ya neethi ni iheema ankhalaayamo atakhali? 
Job21:29 Khamutonke waakoha atthu aneetteetta? Khamuniiwa yeeyo awosa anthalihaaya? 
Job21:30 Vano awosa aneera weera oonanara murima anuureliwa muhasarani, ni weera vanihukuni na isara animoopoliwa." 
Job21:31 Taani ommoothera, amooniheraka yoonanara ompakaawe? Taani onimuhokoloxera yoonanara ompakaawe?" 
Job21:32 Vano onroihiwa munihiyeni, nihiyenawe noolipeleliwa." 
Job21:33 Makottomola a nihiye khaanimuxupa; ootheene anoomutthara, ni mukuttula woohaalikeleya waarowa ohoolowawe." 
Job21:34 Nlelo muntthuna okilipihera ni maswaanyu oololo! Seiyo sihanle sa soowaakhulasanyu siri soolokottha paahi!” 
Job22:1 Vano Elifazi muTemani, aahaakhula:" 
Job22:2 “Weeraka mutthu oolipa naari musuweli onoowera omukhavihera Muluku? 
Job22:3 Yooreera heeni mweeraanyu mumvahe Muluku a ikuru sootheene mwaari oororomeleya? Eheeni eeraawe awine iphirosawe saari sookwanela? 
Job22:4 Weeraka Owo onoohiihani ni ongwootherani niwoko na nroromelonanyu? 
Job22:5 Yoonanaraanyu khayunnungwe? Sootthekasanyu khasimmala? 
Job22:6 Ohitthuneyaka nyuwo mwaanyesereriha nyeemexero sa axunninyu; nyuwo mwaahuhula soowara sa yaale yahaarinoru. 
Job22:7 Nyuwo khamwaamvaha maahi oovoliwa ntthona ni mwaakamela yooca ya oovoliwa etala," 
Job22:8 nyuwo mureene ooweraxa, muneene a ilapo ni mwemmo mukhalaka, muttittimihiwaka ohoolo wa ootheene." 
Job22:9 Nyuwo moowoomola, enarowa matataru asinaamukhweli, ni mohaalosoiha akwaasuni." 
Job22:10 Tivawo murukureeriwaanyu ni itapha ni woopiha wootutuxereya woovanraayani. 
Job22:11 Tivawo epiphi yoosanraayani moota wooweera muhooneru, ni osara wa maahi anoomireihaayani." 
Job22:12 Muluku ori osuluxa wa erimu. Moone moota sikhanlaayawo ithenyeeri soorakamelaxa! 
Job22:13 Wa soothesene, nyuwo muneera: ‘Muluku osuwenleni?’ Onoowera othoriha mpiphini ntoko ela?" 
Job22:14 Mahutte anoomukuttelela ni khangwera onoona hiyo, Owo eetteettaka musulusulu erimu." 
Job22:15 Muntthuna okuxera ephiro ya epiphi, mwa yeeyo yaaviraayamo atthu oonanara murima?" 
Job22:16 Awosa yaakuxiwa ehinaaye ehuhuwaaya; mathipelowaaya aakumburuliwa ni mirupi. 
Job22:17 Awosa ammweerela Muluku: ‘Munihiye mmuretteleni! Anaanipake eheeni Muluku a ikuru sootheene? 
Job22:18 Wa soothesene, ti Yoowo aasaringhe mihakhu impasaya; tivawo kinkhalaaka ottaiwene wa ikano sa atakhali." 
Job22:19 Oororomeleya anoona oheleyawaya nthala, ni antthapa; oohinthowa anaatthebwa, yeeraka:" 
Job22:20 ‘Vekhaikhai amwiittanaahu aaphwatiwa, ni mooro woolaliha mihakhusaya.’" 
Job22:21 Munkhalele Muluku, mukhale mmuretteleni ni Yoowo, vahoolowaya sinooweettelani nnene." 
Job22:22 Mwaakhulele oxuttiha onrweela mmwaanomwawe, ni muthokorore maswaawe vamurimani." 
Job22:23 Nyuwo mwamuhokoleela Muluku a ikuru sootheene, munoorehereriwatho. Mwasusa ohiroromeleya vaheemaniwanyu," 
Job22:24 ni mwarihela vantthupini eyuuma yoorika, eyuumaanyu yoorikaxa ya wOfiri, vanyala sa mureyareyani," 
Job22:25 vano Muluku a ikuru sootheene, onookhala eyuumaanyu yoorikaxa, onimookhalelani eparatha* yoowaattaxa." 
Job22:26 Hiiho, munoomuhakalalela Muluku ni munoottukhulela ekhove wa Muluku." 
Job22:27 Munoomvekela Yoowo ni Owo onoowiiwani, ni munookwanihera soolipelasanyu." 
Job22:28 Yeeyo muneeraanyu mulakele enimweereya ni waara onoomwaleela mphironimwanyu. 
Job22:29 Asilopwana yaayevihiwaka ni mweera: ‘Ngweemexe,’ Muluku onimwaakhavihera yaawosa." 
Job22:30 Owo onimwaatapuxa mpakatho yaawo arino nthowa; aani anootapuxiwa niwoko na matataanyu ootteela.” 
Job23:1 Vano Yobi aahaakula: 
Job23:2 “Mpaka olelo kiniikhupanyeratho; naari otepaka wiipulelawaka, ntata na Muluku nookilemelaxa." 
Job23:3 Naari mano kaasuwenle woomphwanyawo ni moota woorowa omankaawewo! 
Job23:4 Miyo kaamunthalihera mulattwaaka ni kaamusariha eyanowaaka ni soowuuluma. 
Job23:5 Kaamusomela yeeyo Owo eeraawe akaakhule ni kaamwiiwexexa yoowaakhulaawe. 
Job23:6 Weeraka Owo aamukivaanya ni ikuru sitokotoko? Hoye, Owo khaakoothera." 
Job23:7 Vano mulopwana ookwanela aangwera wuuluma mulattwaawe vamaithoni wa Muluku, ni miyo kaamutapuxiwa mwa yoowo aakoothenre." 
Job23:8 Vaheera, karowa ninkhuma nsuwa, iwo Owo khakhanlewo; karowa ninkela nsuwa, nkinimphwanyawo." 
Job23:9 Owo akhala mpatta wa ottuttuwani, nkinimusuwela; aarowaka mpatta wa ohitto, hata erungwaawe nkinoonaru!" 
Job23:10 Vaheera Owo oosuwela ephiro kimviraaka; aakootaka murima, kinookhumela wiithela ntoko eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Job23:11 Kannamutthara aaviraawemo; kaakuxera ephirowaawe kihihapuwaka. 
Job23:12 Nkihiyale malamulo a iyanosawe; kaahoonelaxamo masu a mmwaanomwawe opwaha yoocaaka ya nihuku ti nihuku. 
Job23:13 Vaheera Owo khanceendya! Khaawo angwera omvaanya. Owo ompaka yeeyo ontthunaawe. 
Job23:14 Onoopaka yeeyo owo okilakelenlaawe ni itthu sincipaletho ikina ovaanenlaawe. 
Job23:15 Tivawo kintteengwaaka ohoolowawe; kuupuwelaka yeeyo, kinsareya woova." 
Job23:16 Muluku ookomokiha murimaaka; Muluku a ikuru sootheene ookitondolowiha. 
Job23:17 Wa soothesene, nkimaalihiwe ni epiphi – epiphi yooriipihana enkuttelela ekhovaaka." 
Job24:1 Muluku a ikuru sootheene ohinkhaliherani mahuku a nthorihelo? Yaale amusuwenle anaasera heeni woona mahuku awo? 
Job24:2 Aakhala anceendya ikanyero sa nyiinano ni anciha mihuwo yiiyalaaya. 
Job24:3 Animukuxa buuru a mukwaasuni ni ankuxa emombe ya naamukhweli ntoko mweemexero. 
Job24:4 Anaakakha mphironi oohaawa, anaanyesereriha wiipitha oowiiyevihaxa a mulaponi." 
Job24:5 Oohaawa anaasa yooca ntoko abuuru a ntuphini ereene munikareni; awo amphwanya yooca wa anamwanaaya munikareni. 
Job24:6 Anthukumanya yooca mmatta, enahepha iwuuva* sa atakhali." 
Job24:7 Moosiwani amviriha ohiyu woohiwara; khaanono yoowiikhuneela waariiraka. 
Job24:8 Erupaxiweene epula ya mmwaako, amphiteera nyala niwoko na ohoona wootthawelawo." 
Job24:9 Mwaana mukwaasuni onaakatthuliwa vanipeleni na amayawe; ooyariwa vaanaano a namahaawa omvariwa niwoko na ekoongori. 
Job24:10 Aneetta pwitipwiti niwoko na othowa yoowara; ankuxa ihupu, mene ampwaherera oovoliweene." 
Job24:11 Anaama makhura a sooliveira* variyari itarato; amvotta iwuuva* nipuro emvottiwa eviinyu, mene hata hiiho, anghaawa ntthona." 
Job24:12 Musidade oniiwanyeya wiipulela wa yaawo anghaleela vakhaani okhwa, ni minepa sa oovulalihiwa sinkhuwelela ekhavihero. Vaheera Muluku kheemunananre yeeyo." 
Job24:13 Aakhala aniittanano waara, khaasuwenle iphiro sa waara iwo, ni khaampwaherera mphironimwaya." 
Job24:14 Waaxaaka mutakhali ompeherera ovenya, anawiiva oohaawa ni oothoiwa; ohiyu, ompaka sa enamwiiya." 
Job24:15 Maitho a namararuwa angweherera ewukawuka; owo onuupuwela ha: ‘Khaawo anaakoone,’ ni onkhala yiipithihero ekhove." 
Job24:16 Anamwiiya aniiya mpiphini; vaheera othana aniiwalela mpaani; khaantthunaru waara. 
Job24:17 Wa awosa ootheene, epiphi yooriipaxa ti oxeexelowaaya; awosa ti asinthamwene a otteengula wa epiphi." 
Job24:18 Wa soothesene, ari ntoko nimpheru vasulu maahi; mpattaaya wa etthaya woolamphwa, tivawo ohikhanlaaweru onrowa mmatta mwa iwuuva*." 
Job24:19 Mooteene yoowo oviha ni othowa wa maahi onttakaneelihaaya etthapwe yootothowa, hiihotho nihiye nnaattakaneeliha yaale atthenke." 
Job24:20 Amayaya animwaattiwala, nyuungu sinaakhuura yaawosa. Khaawo ongwuupuwelela oonanara murima; aninteyasa ntoko nyiri." 
Job24:21 Animunyaanya mwali eekupa ahinono mwaana, ni khaammoonihera onnene naamukhweli." 
Job24:22 Vaheera mooweranimwawe Muluku onimwaaphela ooweraxa; arimwiitekiharu, okumaaya khoolimpe." 
Job24:23 Owo aangwera waahiya yiitthuuwaka, yiixoonaka okhala oolipeene, vaheera onaawehaweha nnenesene ephiro amviraaya." 
Job24:24 Anunnuwihiwa mweehuhuni ya vakhaani, vahoolowaya elakaseyeke; aayevihiwa ni aathukumanyihiwa ntoko akina ootheene; anghephiwa ntoko makala a irooro." 
Job24:25 Waahikhanle hiiho, taani aneera akivaanye, ni aneera eere weera maswaaka kihitaphulele etthu?”" 
Job25:1 Vano Bilidade, muXuhi, ahaakhula:" 
Job25:2 “Olamula ni wooveya ti wa Muluku; Owo onkhalela sootheene siri wiirimu sa osulusulu. 
Job25:3 Anamarumeelaawe ti nakupa oohaalikeleya, ni waarawawe onaamwaleela atthu ootheene." 
Job25:4 Mutthu khangwera ohikhalano nthowa vamaithoni wa Muluku, mutthu onkhwa paahi khangwera okhala ootteela." 
Job25:5 Mpaka mweeri khoonaaraxa vamaithoniwawe, ni ithenyeeri sinrima ohoolowawe," 
Job25:6 wootepaxa mutthu ori ntoko muungu, aani mutthu oopattuxiwa onlikana ni muungu.”" 
Job26:1 Vano Yobi aahaakhula: 
Job26:2 “Ekhavihero mumvanghaanyu oohooneleyamo ti etokotoko! Moota mukhavihenraanyu moono woohilipa! 
Job26:3 Moota wa esuwelo mumvanghaanyu oohimiruku, moota sunnungwaaya miruku moonihenraanyu!" 
Job26:4 Taani oovangheni masu awo? Muuluma mwa munepa wawani? 
Job26:5 Anamakhwa anthukumelaxa – yaawosa ari vathi va maahi vamoha ni sootheene sinkhalamo. 
Job26:6 Okhwa ori pwitipwiti ohoolo wa Muluku; kheewo enkhuneela ophwatiwa. 
Job26:7 Owo onkunga irimu sa mpatta wa ottuttuwani vatthuni woohikhala etthu; ontthukelela etthaya ehikhanlaayawo etthu. 
Job26:8 Onghuruwela maahi mmahuttenimwaya, vaheera naari elemenleene, khaankhwalala." 
Job26:9 Muluku onkuttelela ekhove ya mweeri, akungaka mahuttaawe." 
Job26:10 Onkhera omakoteloni vasulu wa maahi weera okhale mwiinano eriyari ya waara ni epiphi. 
Job26:11 Amarimbu a erimu anthukumela enatteenguwa ohoolo wa ohiihawawe. 
Job26:12 Mooweranimwawe aatekumihaxa ephareiya; moosuwelanimwawe aamunyaanya Rahabi. 
Job26:13 Iphumusawe saaphwaneliha erimu; ntatanawe naahoma enowa yoowiipirikixa. 
Job26:14 Sootheene iyo ti epacerero paahi ya mutekwaawe! Ti olokolola vathi vathi niiwalaahu wa Yoowo. Vano, taani anaawere wiiwexexa okukutteya wa owerawawe?”" 
Job27:1 Yobi aapwaherera ni maswaawe: 
Job27:2 “Mwa Muluku Mukumi ohitthunne okipakela ekhaikhai, mwa Muluku a ikuru sootheene othananinghe okumaaka –" 
Job27:3 nlelo kireene ni okumi ni ngwiya wa Muluku oreene mphulanimwaka – 
Job27:4 iyanosaka khasuulumaru yoonanara, ni nluminaka khanuulumaru yakhalaru yoowootha." 
Job27:5 Nkirwa kiwaakhulelani nyuwosa! Mpaka okhwawaka nkirwa kikhoottatho okwanelawaka. 
Job27:6 Kinoopwaherera ngwookoleleyanimwaka ni nkirwa kihiya wookoleleya wu; kireene nlelo ni okumi muupuwelowaaka khookihiiha. 
Job27:7 Amwiittanaaka ekhale ntoko atakhali, ni awananaaka ntoko oohiroromeleya!" 
Job27:8 Mutakhali anaakhaleno ni oweherera heeni Muluku aammalamalihaka, aamwiivaka?" 
Job27:9 Weeraka Muluku onimwiiwa okhuwelawawe mutakhali yaamurweelaka makacamiho? 
Job27:10 Owo onoomuhakalalela Muluku a ikuru sootheene? Khula ehuhu, anaamwiitthane Muluku?" 
Job27:11 Miyo nkooxuttihaseni sa owera wa Muluku; nkiwiipithihasani iphiro sa Muluku a ikuru sootheene. 
Job27:12 Vano, ettiitthu ti weera ootheene nyuwo mohoona yeeyo. Vanonto muntthekulelani hiiho vasiiyoniwene?" 
Job27:13 Ommaleloni ovahiwaawe mutakhali, yoohiyeriwa onaakhelaawe oonanara murima wa Muluku a ikuru sootheene ti wu:" 
Job27:14 Naari atakhali ekhalanaka anamwane, ommaleloniwayasa ti wiiviwa ni ekatana; awosa kheekhalanotho yooca yoowaatta." 
Job27:15 Ikwerere sinoowiiva yaawo eniyaahalahalele, ni asinaamukhwelaaya kheewiinlelasa." 
Job27:16 Naari owo athukumanyaka eparatha* ntoko ntthupi ni uukelaka soowara ntoko naapapattheene," 
Job27:17 yeeyo owo aneeraawe athokorore eniikhale ya oororomeleya, ni oohinthowa anookawana eparathaawe*." 
Job27:18 Empa owo otenkaawe eri ntoko epuuru ya nikuruthu, aani ntoko mukottha wootekiwa ni namalipelela." 
Job27:19 Oniixaatalela oopuheene, mene khakhalatho namapuha! Aakhunulaka maitho, omphwanya sootheene sihiwowo." 
Job27:20 Onimurweela otteenguwa ntoko mirupi; ohiyu ettheku enimukuxakuxa. 
Job27:21 Epheyo ya mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa enimukuxakuxa ni owo onlakaseya; enimphela vanipuroniwawe. 
Job27:22 Enimukakha woohimmorela ikharari owo atthawaka moohiwehererani. 
Job27:23 Emmwiipela makuphi, ni yaamwiipelaka muturi, emmoomola vanipuroniwawe.”" 
Job28:1 Nookhala nipuro nimphwanyiwa eparatha* ni mapuro enrehereriwaayawo eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
Job28:2 Eyuuma enthimpwa vathi, ni ebronze* entotoxiwa vayuumani." 
Job28:3 Mutthu ommaliha epiphi, anarowa waasaasatho iyuuma mmapuroni oowiipithiheyaxa, aani makhuku a mmunttuusini wooriipihanaxa." 
Job28:4 Owo onthipa ehime ottai wa moomakiwa, vanipuroni noottiwaliwa ahimviraayamo atthu; owo oniitthukelelawo ottai wa ootheene, anakhala kuleele." 
Job28:5 Etthaya, mwa weiwo enkhumaayawo yooca, ti empittikuxiwaayawo ntoko yaari mmooroni;" 
Job28:6 mmwalamwaya ankhumelela maluku a safira*, ni ntthupinaya nookhalano eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Job28:7 Khawoworu mwaapalame a wiirimu osuwenle ephiro yoowiipithiheya eyo hata khawoworu xaaka oonne yeeyo. 
Job28:8 Mwene a axinama khananyikaleworu; mwatto khanavirewo. 
Job28:9 Matata a atthu ampwexa mwala woolipa ni amphela mikwankhwaari sa nyaako. 
Job28:10 Ampaka iphiro vathivathi ni maithwaaya anoona mihakhu sootheene sa mwemmo. 
Job28:11 Awosa anaamwamwanyula anaattuuttu a nyooloko ni anruuha ngwaarani itthu soowiipithiheya. 
Job28:12 Wa soothesene, nsiphwanyiwe woowi miruku? Wiiwexexa omanke woowi?" 
Job28:13 Mutthu khaniiwexexa otthuneya wa miruku; iyo khasimphwanyaneya mulaponi mwa akumi. 
Job28:14 Moowiixera oneera: “Khasikhanle mwa miyo;” ephareiya eneera: “Khasikhanle mwa miyo.” 
Job28:15 Khasinthumeya, hata ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreerela, naari mutteengwaaya khoomphimeya ni eparatha*." 
Job28:16 Khasinthumeya hata ni eyuuma yoorikaxa ya wOfiri, naari ni onikisi* ootthuneyaxa hata ni maluku a safira*." 
Job28:17 Eyuuma yoorikaxa ni ekristalo* khasinlikanxereya ni yeeyo, ni ti woohiwereya waakakhanyiha ni maluku oowaaraxa a eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Job28:18 Maluku a korali* ni yaspe* khasinghimeyaru; miruku ti sootthuneyaxa opwaha erubi*. 
Job28:19 Etopaziyo* ya oKuxe kheenlikanxereya ni seiyo; miruku khasinthumeya hata ni eyuuma yoorikaxa! 
Job28:20 Vano, singweela woowi miruku? Wiiwexexa onkhala woowi?" 
Job28:21 Ti soowiipithihiwa ottaiwene wa akumi ootheene, hata ipalame sa wiirimu sihingweraaya woonelela." 
Job28:22 Ophwatiwa ni Okhwa oneera: “Nnimwaasa wiiwa suulummwaka sa seiyo;” 
Job28:23 ti Muluku paahi osuwenle ephiro enrowawo; weiwo sinkhalaayawo miruku," 
Job28:24 niwoko Owo ongweha ekotenlaayawo, anoona sootheene sa mulaponi." 
Job28:25 Owo akhalingheene ikuru sa epheyo ni aphimmeene ni muringo wookwanela wa maahi; 
Job28:26 Owo alamulenleene epula ni ephiro wa ettheku yookukutteya," 
Job28:27 ehuhuweene yeeyo, Owo aahoona miruku anaweha; aahaakhulela, anoota murima." 
Job28:28 Vano aamweerela mutthu: “Miruku ti omoova Yave, ni osemba yoonanara ti okhalano wiiwexexa.”" 
Job29:1 Yobi aapwaherera wuulumawawe: 
Job29:2 “Moota kunkheliwaaka nyeeri sivinre, mmahukuni aakikosoopaawe Muluku," 
Job29:3 aamwaleelaawe ni yoomwaleelaawe mmurumwaka, ni miyo kaangwera weetta mpiphini ngwaaraniwawe!" 
Job29:4 Moota kunkheliwaaka mmahukuni a emiravowaaka, onthamwene wooreeraxa wa Muluku waareelihaaya empaaka," 
Job29:5 Muluku a ikuru sootheene aaraawe ni miyo ni anamwanaaka yaaraaya mukhwipimwaka," 
Job29:6 inaawosaka saarapihiwaaya ni mukaka ni nyooloko sa makhura saapiluwaaya mmwalani. 
Job29:7 Kaarowaaka vamulako wa esidade kikilaathiki mmapuwani oowaatteliwa a musidade," 
Job29:8 amiravo yaakoona, enakihapuwa, ni mamookwaaxa yaamweemela;" 
Job29:9 ahooleli khayuuluma, ni yaaphuta iyano;" 
Job29:10 maneethi yuuluma vathi vathi, ni malumaaya yaatthukana waahottokoroko." 
Job29:11 Ootheene yaakiiwa yuuluma nnenesene sa miyo, ni yoowo aakoona aamukittapahera," 
Job29:12 niwoko miyo kaamukhavihera namahaawa aavekela ekhavihero, ni mukwaasuni ahaakhalanne oomukhavihera." 
Job29:13 Yoowo aahanle vakhaani okhwa aakireeliha, ni miyo kaahakalaliha murima wa naamukhweli." 
Job29:14 Wookoleleya waari yoowaraaka, ni ekhaikhai yaaphwaneliha erutthu ni muruwaaka." 
Job29:15 Miyo kaari maitho wa oohoona ni inaawo wa ootuthunya. 
Job29:16 Miyo kaari tiithi wa oothoiwa, ni kaapwatthela omwaakiha namarwa." 
Job29:17 Miyo kaapwexa mirondye sa atakhali weera yoovaraaya yoopowe mmwaanomwaya. 
Job29:18 Miyo kuupuwela: ‘Nkikhwele owaani, ni mahukwaka animwaattaxa ntoko muhaava." 
Job29:19 Mikwankhwaarisaka sinoophiya omaahini, ni ohiyu nikame nnimwiimela mphandinimwaka." 
Job29:20 Khula imaara onookihokoleela ovuwa, ni kinoovarelatho muura munyowani.’" 
Job29:21 Atthu yannakiwiriyana nnenesene, ewehereraka emaalelo olakawaka." 
Job29:22 Kuulumaleene, awosa khayaahima etthu; maswaaka yannaavolowa nnenesene mmaarunimwaya." 
Job29:23 Yaaweherera maswaaka ntoko engwehereriwaaya epula, ni yaawura maswaaka ntoko yoole ongwura epula mutthulo." 
Job29:24 Kaatheyaaka, khayaakhulelaru; waara wa ekhovaaka waamwaareerela." 
Job29:25 Ti miyo kaathanlela ephiro, ni kaakilaathi ntoko muhoolelaaya; kaakhala ntoko mwene eriyari ya anakhottwaawe. Kaari ntoko namapembesa a yaale aniinla." 
Job30:1 Vaheera vano ankitthebwa miyo – asilopwana asikhaani oohikilikanano, mwa yaawo asitithaya kaaramusaaka, kihaatthuniherakaru okhala ni alapwa anlipelela muhuwo." 
Job30:2 Yaahikivarele muteko heeni seenre saamalela ikurusaya? 
Job30:3 Ekotakonteene mwaha wa etala ni othoiwa, waatthuneya oca ni ohiyu etthaya yoowuuma mwa yeeyo yaari mmathalani;" 
Job30:4 yaaphoota malaxi mmaphuwani ni mikwankhwaari sa ezimbera* weera ekhuure. 
Job30:5 Yaahoomolasiwa mwa asinthamwenaaya, okhuweleliwa ntoko anamwiiya." 
Job30:6 Waatthuneya okhala muttikirikani, munyattani ni mmakhukuni." 
Job30:7 Yaatturuma eriyari ya maphuwa ethukumanaka mutorosoni. 
Job30:8 Ekhapira yoonyooseya ni yoohihimeya, yaahoomolasiwa mulaponi." 
Job30:9 Vano anamwanaaya ankitthebwa miyo ni iciposaya; koothatuwa oopuheriwa variyariwaya. 
Job30:10 Awosa ankithanya, enakivenyera, ehihiyereraka okisenyela owiitho." 
Job30:11 Eenre Muluku apasa mukoyi wa muuraaka ni akiveiha mwaatthuni, awosa ammwaasa okirweela." 
Job30:12 Ankivenyera miyo mpatta woolopwana; aarehererela miraakho inaawosaka, enakitekela ikaaro sookurumulela exiri." 
Job30:13 Anraaleliha ephirowaaka; angwera okiphwata ehikhaviheriwakaru. 
Job30:14 Amvira muntarini mutokotoko ni angwa wa miyo eriyari ya mathala. 
Job30:15 Otteenguwa wookivara; ophwanelawaka wookuxiwa ni epheyo, olipawaka woolakaseya ntoko mahutte." 
Job30:16 Vano okumaaka wooyavayava; kootthukeya mmahukuni a ohaawa. 
Job30:17 Ohiyu makhuva anookivoreya; ovorewawaka onkitepela woohihiyerera. 
Job30:18 Mooweranimwawe otokotoko, Muluku oonyongorora yoowaraaka; oonyongorora ekolarinya ya muxikomwaka." 
Job30:19 Onkivonyera vanttokoni, ni kintatuxiwa ntthupi ni ettuura." 
Job30:20 Ii! Muluku, kinnookhuwelelani, mene khamunkaakhularu; kinneemela, mene munimwaasa okiweha." 
Job30:21 Munkirukunuwela mooxililini, ni munkiwanano ni ntatananyu nooweraxa." 
Job30:22 Nyuwo munkivara, munakikuxa mpheyoni, ni munkivonyera ninno ninno mutthekuni." 
Job30:23 Koosuwela weera munookirongha wookhwaani, vanipuroni athanleliwaaya atthu ootheene." 
Job30:24 Ettiitthu ti weera khaawo animmana mutthu ooheleya nthala, owo akhuwelelaka ekhavihero." 
Job30:25 Weeraka nkaawiinlela oohooxiwa? Nkaathananela oohaawa? 
Job30:26 Hata hiiho, kaawehereraaka mpuha, yaarwiiye yoonanara; kaasaasaaka waara, yaarwiiye epiphi." 
Job30:27 Mpuwamwaka khoonghiyerereya otannyereya; mahuku a ohaawa annikihooxa. 
Job30:28 Kineetta ngwukawukani ni woohikhala nsuwa; kineemela mmuthukumanoni kivekelaka ekhavihero. 
Job30:29 Koothatuwa munna a akhwatte, aani mukhwaaya a isiisi." 
Job30:30 Exapalaaka enriipa, enapumuwa; erutthwaaka enkiviha moovoreiwani." 
Job30:31 Makitaaka ookokhiwa weera iipeliwe icipo sa mariro, ni mpeettaaka iipeliwe icipo soolalamika." 
Job31:1 Kohiiwananano maithwaaka ohaaweha kaahaawelaka asimwali. 
Job31:2 Vano, ettima heeni onaakhelaawe mutthu wa Muluku Musulu, yoohiyera heeni ya Muluku a ikuru sootheene onkhala musulusulu?" 
Job31:3 Ti oheleya nthala wa atakhali, erisa wa yaawo ampaka yoonanara." 
Job31:4 Owo onnoona iphirosaka, anoonelamo khula malipaaka." 
Job31:5 Keentte ni ololo, hoye hoye inaawosaka saakuveiyeene olokottha –" 
Job31:6 Muluku akiphime munringoni woororomeleya ni Owo onoosuwela weera nkinono nthowa – 
Job31:7 malipaaka yaahapungweene, murimaaka weettihingweene ni maithwaaka, hoye hoye matataaka yaavalihingweene," 
Job31:8 vano atthu akina ece yeeyo kaanlaaka, ni seiyo kiphatteiyaaka sipheliwe woomalela." 
Job31:9 Murimaaka waakuxeiyeene ni muthiyana mukina, hoye hoye kaathurumenleene mulako wa mukhwaaka," 
Job31:10 vano mwaaraka axile etrigu ya mulopwana mukina ni asilopwana akina emukoneno yoowo. 
Job31:11 Vano, kaapanke, kaamuulihiheya muru, aani yoottheka yoophwanela othoriheliwa." 
Job31:12 Eyo ti mooro onghisa mpaka ophwatiwa ni yaamulaliha soohephasaka sootheene. 
Job31:13 Kaakhoottiyeene waapakela ekhaikhai arumeiyaaka alopwana ni athiyana awosa yiittaandawulenlaaya wa miyo," 
Job31:14 nkipakeni miyo Muluku aakithorihaka? Nkaakhuleni kaakohakohiwaka? 
Job31:15 Yoowo okipattunxe miyo, ohaapattuxatho yaawosa: Muluku mmoharu ti onipattunxe hiyo mmirimani mwa asimayihu." 
Job31:16 Nkaakhoontteru yoovekela ya oohaawa, hoye hoye nkaamuhiyale naamukhweli aasaka wiinla." 
Job31:17 Nkaaciiye meekhaaka yoocaaka, kihaavahaka akwaasuni." 
Job31:18 Okhuma emiravowaaka kohaahuwa akwaasuni ntoko tiithi, ni okhuma enamwanaaya ti miyo kaahoolela asinaamukhweli." 
Job31:19 Imaara sootheene kaamoonaaka mukina ahaawaka ni osiwa, hoye hoye athoiwaka yoowiikhuneela," 
Job31:20 owo aamukireeliha niwoko na omvaha yoowiikhuneela ya nttukuttha yoopakiwa ni mapururu a muhuwaaka. 
Job31:21 Kaapanke itthu iyo hoye hoye kaamvirikanyihenleene mukwaasuni, kisuwelaka weera aphuki ari a mpattaaka," 
Job31:22 vano moonowaaka okivasuwe, ni winteye okumannaayawo." 
Job31:23 Vano miyo koova ophwatiwa ni Muluku, ni koovaka waarawawe, nkaawera opaka itthu iyo." 
Job31:24 Nkaaroromenle eyuuma yoorikaxa naari nkoonenlemo okhala yoolipaaka eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreerelaxa. 
Job31:25 Nkiikuxerenreno mihakhusaka, sooreela sootheene seiyo matataaka yaawinnaaya." 
Job31:26 Nkaakokhorenle nsuwa ngwaaraniwaya naari mweeri ngweettanimwaya otokweene," 
Job31:27 moota wooweera murimaaka waatannyereya muxiirini, kaarumihelaaka ebeecu ni ntata." 
Job31:28 Vano iyotho saamukhala soottheka simphwanela othoriheliwa, niwoko kaamunkhootta Muluku ori osulusulu." 
Job31:29 Nkihakalalenle erisa ya mwiittanaaka, naari milattu aarinaawe." 
Job31:30 Hoye! Miyo nkaahingyeru eyanowaaka etthekaka niwoko na omulapha mukina. 
Job31:31 Yaawo ankhala vaatewaka khaatonke weera: ‘Khanaakhela ni Yobi enama.’ 
Job31:32 Khawoworu namarwa aakona munseweni, niwoko mulakwaaka waari ehuleliwo eereliwaka namavira." 
Job31:33 Nkiipithihaleru yootthekaaka, ntoko ampakaaya akina, kikuttelelaka vamurimani nthowanaka." 
Job31:34 Nkimoovaru nakupa hoye hoye onyoosa wa amusi moota wooweera kaahiimaaliha, kihirowaka onuulummwa milattu." 
Job31:35 Ii! Mukina aakiiwale! Vano kinttitta wiixaakihawaka. Muluku a ikuru sootheene akaakhule; Namootheraaka akihimahime mukarattani. 
Job31:36 Vekhaikhai miyo kaamukuxa yeeyo veetthuuri ni kaangwara ntoko ecireemba. 
Job31:37 Miyo kaamunleela sa weettawaka wootheene; kaammwaattamela ntoko mwaana mulopwana a mwene. 
Job31:38 Etthayaaka yakoothera ni mikhutu sootheene siinla," 
Job31:39 kaaciiyeene itthusaya woohilivaru hoye hoye kaawiivaleene amakaaya," 
Job31:40 vano sikikhumelele nyiiwa vanipuroni na etrigu ni nakhwali, ohiya esevada*.” Mpaka va masu a Yobi." 
Job32:1 “Vano asilopwana araru ale yaahiyerera omwaakhula Yobi, niwoko owo iihelano okhala oororomeleya." 
Job32:2 Vaheera, mwaana mulopwana a Barakeli, mBuzi, a emusi ya Rami, aamunyoonyeraxiwa Yobi, niwoko owo iixaakiha ohoolo wa Muluku." 
Job32:3 Aahaanyoonyerasiwatho asinthamwene araru, niwoko khayaaphwannye moota woomviriyela Yobi yaaroomootheraru." 
Job32:4 Vanonto Elihu aamaala awehereraka wuuluma ni Yobi, niwoko awosa yaari asitokweene ompwaha yoowo." 
Job32:5 Vaheera oonaka weera araru ale khayaarino yoohima, aanyoonyiwa." 
Job32:6 Vano Elihu, mwaana mulopwana a Barakeli, mBuzi, aahuuluma: “Miyo mmiravo, nyuwosa mohunnuwasa. Tivawo, kaahovelaaka kihooleelakani yeeyo kisuwenlaaka." 
Job32:7 Miyo kuupuwela: ‘Asitokweene antthuneya wuuluma; yaawo arino iyaakha sincipale ti antthuneya ovaha miruku.’ 
Job32:8 Vaheera ti munepa onkhala mpuwa mwa mutthu onimvaha wiiwexexa – ngwiya wa Muluku a ikuru sootheene. 
Job32:9 Esuwelo khaarino asitokweeneru, khaahiyono oowunnuwaxa paahi ansuwela yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai." 
Job32:10 Tivawo kineeraaka: Mukiwiriyane; kinoohimatho yeeyo kisuwenlaaka. 
Job32:11 Nyuwosa nlelo muulumaka, kaaweherera; kaahiiwa ovaanyihanawanyu; nyuwosa mwaasaasaka moota woowuuluma," 
Job32:12 kaahoowiriyanani nnenesene. Vaheera khawoworu a nyuwosa oonihenre weera Yobi ootapanya. Khawoworu a nyuwosa aakhunle maswaawe. 
Job32:13 Muheerase: ‘Noophwanya miruku; Muluku ti onaakhula ahikhanle mutthu.’ 
Job32:14 Owo khuulumme ni miyo ni miyo nkimmwaakhula ntoko nyuwosa mpankaanyu. 
Job32:15 Awosa aapondya, khaanono yoowaakhula, khaangweraru wuuluma." 
Job32:16 Kaaweherereke awosa nlelo ehuulumaka, ekhalaka emaalelo woohaakhula?" 
Job32:17 Vano, ti emaaraaka yoowuuluma; kintthuna wuuluma moonelowaaka." 
Job32:18 Aakhala masu ankikaphula mpuwamwaka ni nkingwera omaalano. 
Job32:19 Kihanle vakhaani ophuleya ntoko eviinyu enyowani exaxaka eheliweene mmapoottoroni manyowani. 
Job32:20 Ontthuneya wuuluma weera kiphwanye okhurunuwa. Ontthuneya ohula iyanosaka kaakhulaka. 
Job32:21 Khaawo kineeraaka kimukhalele nthalu naari mmoha a nyuwo, hata nkaasaasera omusiveliha mukina." 
Job32:22 Vano miyo nkingwera weepesa, niwoko kaapanke hiiho, Muluku aamukittaruxa.”" 
Job33:1 “Vaheera vano Yobi, ngwiriyane maswaaka; mwiiwe nnenesene sootheene kineeraaka kihime." 
Job33:2 Kihanle vakhaani ohula eyano; maswaaka ari oolikaneene wuuluma. 
Job33:3 Maswaaka ankhumelela vamurimani wookwanela; iyanosaka sinuuluma ekhaikhai ya seiyo kisuwenlaaka. 
Job33:4 Munepa wa Muluku wookipaka; iphumu sa Muluku a ikuru sootheene sookivaha okumi. 
Job33:5 Vano mwawera, mukaakhule; mwiireherere weera mwiixaakihe." 
Job33:6 Vamaithoni wa Muluku miyo kinlikana ni nyuwo; miyotho kipakiwe ni oloko. 
Job33:7 Tivawo, khoontthuneya okoova, hata nkiwuumelaxani murima." 
Job33:8 Vaheera nyuwo muuluma kiiwaka; kohiiwa nnenesene masu ale: 
Job33:9 ‘Kootteela, kihikhalanaka yoottheka; nkinono nthowa naari nkipankeru yootakhala." 
Job33:10 Wa soothesene, Muluku oophwanya soomutapanyasaka; Owo onkoona okhala mwiittanaawe." 
Job33:11 Owo ontthuka inaawosaka ni onyooro; ongwehaweha mukhivirumwene iphirosaka. 
Job33:12 Vaheera miyo kinooleelani weera nyuwo mootapanya, niwoko Muluku ti Mutokweene ompwaha mutthu." 
Job33:13 Heeni nyuwo munimukhupanyaanyu Yoowo mweeraka khanaakhula masu a atthu? 
Job33:14 Vano ettiitthu ti weera Muluku onuuluma ni moota woohiyanahiyana, naari mutthu ahisuwelaka." 
Job33:15 Moolohani hoye hoye mmooneloni mweehuhuni ya ohiyu, atthu saattokoneenleene ikhove ni awosa ekonasaka vabeettiniwaya," 
Job33:16 Owo onoowera wuuluma owaaruwaya awoopopihaka ni soowooperera," 
Job33:17 weera mutthu asembe miteko soonanara ni Owo amutapuxe ngwiixoonani," 
Job33:18 nitho uurele okumaawe munlittini ni ahiiviwe ni ekatana. 
Job33:19 Hoye hoye ongwereya weera mutthu onttaruxiwa vabeettini wa ovoreiwa woohihiyerereya mmakhuvanimwawe 
Job33:20 moota wooweera okhalawawe xaxaxa simmweettiha murima sooca hata sireene sooca soosivaxa. 
Job33:21 Vano ohoondaxa, ni makhuvaawe yaari oohooneya vano ari wusa." 
Job33:22 Muneepaawe onaattamela nlitti, ni okumaawe onaakhuveela anamitthenga a wiiva." 
Job33:23 Wa soothesene, akhala ndyelo mukhwipimwawe, namwiiraanyiha eriyari ya atthu macira muloko weera amuleele mutthu yeeyo eri yoowookoleleya wa yoowo," 
Job33:24 ni Muluku amoonihera murima wooreera amweerelaka: ‘Mmuurele okhuruwela mulittini, niwoko koophwanya moota woomoopola,’" 
Job33:25 vano erutthwaawe enoohokoloxereya ekhalaka ntoko ya mwaana; owo onookhala mmiravoweene. 
Job33:26 Owo onimvekela Muluku, ni onimwaakhuleliwa ni Yoowo; onoona ekhove ya Muluku, anakhuwela ni ohakalala, ni Muluku onoomuhokoloxera okhalawawe woororomeleya." 
Job33:27 Vahoolowaya owo onrowa wa atthu, aneera: ‘Koottheka, kinapiritula yeeyo yaari yoowookoleleya, mene Owo khakivanghe yeeyo kaaphwanelaaka." 
Job33:28 Owo ohoopola munepaaka ooceelihaka okhuruwela mulittini, ni vano okumaaka onoona waara." 
Job33:29 Sootheene iyo Muluku onaapakela atthu imaara imaarasene," 
Job33:30 weera aavenxe okumaaya ngwiixerani ni apakihe weera yoonetho waara. 
Job33:31 Yobi, mwiiwe ni mukiwiriyane; mmaale, ni nkuulume." 
Job33:32 Mwaarino yoohima, mukaakhuleke; muulumeke niwoko kintthuna weera nyuwo mukhale oowookoleleya." 
Job33:33 Mwaahikhalanne yoohima, mukiiwe ni mmaaleke, ni miyo kinimooxuttihani miruku.”" 
Job34:1 Elihu aapwaherera wuuluma: 
Job34:2 “Nyuwosa muri asuweli, mwiiwe maswaaka; nyuwosa murino esuwelo, mukiwiriyane." 
Job34:3 Vano maaru ankawanyiha masu ntoko nlumi nnoonaaya masivelo a yooca. 
Job34:4 Nireherere othanla vamoha yeeyo eri yoowookoleleya nixuttaka yeeyo eri yooreera. 
Job34:5 Yobi oneera: ‘Nkinono nthowa, vaheera Muluku onkikhoottela ekhaikhai." 
Job34:6 Kirookhalaru oowookoleleyeene, kinooneliwa onamootha; kiroohikhalanaru nthowa, muupaawe onkivulaliha nikhwatta noohivola.’" 
Job34:7 Mulopwana heeni ori ntoko Yobi, ongwura matthebwa ntoko maahi?" 
Job34:8 Owo ti nthamwene a yaawo ampaka yoonanara, ni oneetta ni atakhali." 
Job34:9 Vano oneera: ‘Kheengwineleya etthu owo eereraka waakhuleliwa ni Muluku.’ 
Job34:10 Tivawo, mukiwiriyane, nyuwosa murino esuwelo. Muluku khampakaru yoonanara, aani Muluku a ikuru sootheene khampakaru yootakhala." 
Job34:11 Owo onimutthuvela mutthu attharihaka yeeyo opankaawe, ni onimvaha yeeyo emphwanela mweettelowaawe." 
Job34:12 Ohuupuweliweru weera Muluku apake yoonanara, weera Mukuku a ikuru sootheene avirikanyihe ekhaikhai." 
Job34:13 Taani amuthanlale olamula elapo? Taani amukhalinghe Namakosoopa a elapo ya vathi yootheene? 
Job34:14 Waari otthunawawe ohokoloxera wa Yoowo Munepaawe ni iphumusawe," 
Job34:15 omutthu wootheene waamuriheya khuluwi, ni mutthu aamuhokoleela vantthupini." 
Job34:16 Tivawo, nyuwo mwaarino wiiwexexa, mukiiwe, ngwiriyane yeeyo kinooleelaakani." 
Job34:17 Weeraka yoowo onthanya ekhaikhai onoowera olamula? Nyuwo munoowera omuthoriha Yoowo ori oororomeleya ni ooweraxa? 
Job34:18 Khahiyono Yoowo ongweerela mamwene: ‘Nyuwosa khamunooneleyamo,’ ni wa maneethi: ‘Nyuwosa muri atakhali’?" 
Job34:19 Owo khanoonihera nthalu aweerelaka anamwane a mamwene, ni khanimpakela mpatta thadyiri amunyoosaka oohaawa yeenre ootheene epakiwa ni matataawe." 
Job34:20 Awosa ankhwa ehuhu emoharu, wiilaxiyeene atthu amveveleya, enavira. Oowera amvenxiwa ehivareliwaka ni matata a atthu." 
Job34:21 Vano Muluku onoona iphiro sa atthu; Owo oningwehaweha mukhwipimwawe khula mutthu ni malipaawe. 
Job34:22 Khoowowo munttuusi wooriipihanaxa woomalela weera yiipithemo yaawo ampaka yoonanara. 
Job34:23 Wa Muluku khoontthuneya ehuhu yincipale weera aaphime atthu ni aaronghe vamaithoniwawe weera aathorihe. 
Job34:24 Owo onaaphwata aweri anaahela akina vanipuroniwayasa, ohitthuneyaka waasaasera." 
Job34:25 Eenre Owo awehaka miteko amvaraaya, onaaphwata moohiyuni, enattikittheya." 
Job34:26 Owo onaattaruxela vamaithoni wa atthu ootheene niwoko na otakhalawaya. 
Job34:27 Yeeyo eneereela omuhiyawaya Muluku, ehipwatthelaka iphirosawe." 
Job34:28 Aamwiiwiha okhuwela wa oohaawa ophiye ohoolowawe. Muluku ohiiwa okhuwela wa oothoiwa. 
Job34:29 Vaheera Owo apwaherera omaala, taani anaamuthorihe? Iipithiha ekhove, taani eniiwere omoona? Vanonto, Owo onaalamula atthu ni miloko moota mmohamoharu yoowo," 
Job34:30 aasembihaka atakhali weera ehilamule ni ehireele miraakho muloko. 
Job34:31 Noone, mulopwana mmoha amweerela Muluku: ‘Kookhalano nthowa, mene nkirwa kitthekatho." 
Job34:32 Mukixuttihere yeeyo miyo kihinoonaaka; kaaheentte nnene, nkeeratho hiiho." 
Job34:33 Vaheera wa nyuwo – Muluku aamootthuvelani, nyuwo muhaakhulelaka nthowananyu? Ti nyuwo muntthuneya olakela, nkihiyono miyo; vano, mukithalihere yeeyo nyuwo musuwenlaanyu." 
Job34:34 Atthu a miruku sooreera anghima; asuweli ankiiwa ankeerela: 
Job34:35 ‘Yobi khasuwenle onghimaawe; khasimomo iseru mmasunimwawe. 
Job34:36 Yobi oophwanela wootiwa murima mpaka ommaleloni niwoko na soowaakhulasawe sootakhala! 
Job34:37 Wa yootthekaawe owo onaandyeerera ovaanya; moonyoosani oniipa makuphi eriyaaraahu ni onaandyeera maswaawe ahiniiwanana ni Muluku.’” 
Job35:1 Elihu aapwaherera wuuluma: 
Job35:2 “Nyuwo munuupuwela weera eyo ti yoororomeleya? Vano nyuwo muneera: ‘Miyo kinimwaakhuleliwa ni Muluku.’ 
Job35:3 Wa soothesene, nyuwo munimukoha: ‘Mphurelo heeni kirinaaka, ni kaahittheka kingwinani?" 
Job35:4 Kintthuna owaakhulani nyuwo ni asinthamwenaanyu ari ni nyuwo.’ 
Job35:5 Ngwehe wiirimu ni moone; moone moota mahutte arakamenlaaya osuluwanyu. 
Job35:6 Mwattheka, kheewoworu yoonanara munimpakelaanyu Muluku; mwaandyeerera sootakhalasanyu, khamunimukacamiharu Yoowo." 
Job35:7 Nyuwo mwaroromeleya, khamunimpuhiha Yoowo, niwoko kheewo mungweraanyu omvaha." 
Job35:8 Otakhalawanyu onaavolowa atthu anlikana nyuwo paahi, ni ororomeleyawanyu onaavolowa paahi anamwane a atthu." 
Job35:9 Atthu aniikhupanyera elemeliweene ni mahooxo; andyoonttelela weera yaatapuxe mmatatani mwa aweri. 
Job35:10 Vaheera, khawowo onkoha: ‘Ori woowi Muluku Mpattuxaaka, mwa Yoowo omvaha icipo moohiyuni" 
Job35:11 ni onnixuttihaxa hiyo waapwaha axinama a mulaponi ni onnikhaliha asuwelixa opwaha ipalame sa wiirimu?’ 
Job35:12 Yaakhuwelaka, Owo khanaakhula niwoko na wiixoona wa atakhali." 
Job35:13 Muluku khampwattha wiidyoonttelela woohimuteko ampakaaya; Muluku a ikuru sootheene khanaawiriyana. 
Job35:14 Owo khoowiriyananitho nyuwo mweeraka weera khamummoona ni weera mulattwaanyu ori ohoolowawe, nyuwo mungwehereraka Yoowo." 
Job35:15 Ohiya toko yeeyo, nyuwo muneera weera isarasawe khasinttaruxa ni Owo khampwattharu sootakhala." 
Job35:16 Ti hiiho Yobi onghulaawe eyanowaawe weera ahime masu oohimuteko; ahisuwelaka etthu owo onaandyeera masu.” 
Job36:1 Elihu aaheeratho: 
Job36:2 “Kinoovekelani weera mukivileletho, ni kinoowooniherani soohima sikinatho sa ekhaikhai soowiixaakiherano wa Muluku." 
Job36:3 Enrweela ottaiwene esuwelowaaka; kinookhalela onamoona sa ekhaikhai ya Mpattuxaaka. 
Job36:4 Muhihovele, maswaaka khaahiyono oowootha; vano yoowo ori ni nyuwo ookhalano esuwelo etokotoko." 
Job36:5 Muluku ti ooweraxa, mene khanaanyoosa atthu; aani ti ooweraxa ni oolipeene mwa yeeyo ontthunaawe opaka." 
Job36:6 Khanuurela okumi wa atakhali, mene onlipihera soophwanela sa oohooxiwa." 
Job36:7 Oningwehexexa oororomeleya; Owo onaakilaathiha vahiceni sa emwene vamoha ni mamwene, awunnuwihaka mahuku ootheene." 
Job36:8 Vaheera atthu yatthukiwa ni onyooro, enawaleliwa oolipeene mahuku ootheene ni mikhoyi soohooxa," 
Job36:9 Owo onimwaaleela yeeyo apankaaya, weera aattheka moota woowiixoona." 
Job36:10 Owo onoopakiha weera elakiwe ni onimwaalamula orukunxa murima wa yoonanara apankaaya. 
Job36:11 Vano, yamwiiwelela, enamurumeela Yoowo, sinooweettela nnenesene mpaka ommaleloni wa mahukwaaya ni anoohakalala muyaakhani saahaleenle." 
Job36:12 Vaheera yaahiiwelela, animwiiviwa ni ekatana ni animookhwa woohikhalano esuwelo." 
Job36:13 Yaawo arino murima wootakhala aasareya isara; naari Owo aatthukaka, awosa khaamvekela ekhavihero." 
Job36:14 Awosa ankhwa nlelo ereene amiravo eriyari ya yaale anraruwa mmapuroni a ediini. 
Job36:15 Vaheera Yaawo anghaawa Owo onaatapuxa moohaawaxanimwaya; Muluku onuuluma ni yaawo moothanananimwaya. 
Job36:16 Owo onoovenxani mmakacamihoni, ookhalihakani vanipuroni noothanuwa, nootaphuwa, ni vameesaniwanyu esareiyeene yooca yincipale." 
Job36:17 Vaheera vano, yoolemelaanyu ti nthorihelo avaheriwe atakhali; nthorihelo ni ekhaikhai yohoovaraxani." 
Job36:18 Nnene! Ahikhale anootannyeni ni mihakhu; muhiihiyerere muhapuxeyaka ni makhwankwa matokotoko. 
Job36:19 Weeraka mihakhusanyu hoye hoye wiilipiherawanyu waamookhaviherani ni waamookurunuxani mmakacamihoni? 
Job36:20 Muhihaawele moohiyuni muloko waavenxiwaka mmatthokonimwaya. 
Job36:21 Nnene! Muhihokoleele mootakhalani; kinoona ntoko munkupaleela otakhala ohiya ohaawa. 
Job36:22 Muluku onunnuwihiwa mooweranimwawe. Taani ori muhusiha ntoko Yoowo? 
Job36:23 Taani omulakelenle iphirosawe, hoye hoye amweerenle: ‘Khampanke nnene’?" 
Job36:24 Muupuwelele wunnuwiha mitekosawe, mwa seiyo atthu aniipelaaya ni icipo soovuwiha." 
Job36:25 Omutthu wootheene onnoona; ottaiwene atthu annoonatho. 
Job36:26 Moota unnungwaawe Muluku! Oopwaha mwiiwexexowaahu! Khasinaalikeleya iyaakha sa okhalawawe. 
Job36:27 Owo onttukhulela osulu mattonyo a maahi, antothowa ntoko epula, enamwaareela." 
Job36:28 Epula enrupa mmahutteni, aniitthela maahi awo mwaatthuni." 
Job36:29 Khaawo onsuwela nnenesene moota onkungaawe mahutte, ni moota itari sinoopaaya wiirimu." 
Job36:30 Moone moota Muluku onaarihaawe overinya mmahutteni, omwaleelaka mpaka mphareiyani moowiixera." 
Job36:31 Ti hiiho Owo onlamulaawe miloko, aruwerihaka yooca yincipale." 
Job36:32 Owo omphuta overinya mmatatanimwawe, anaphimela wookotelawo." 
Job36:33 Etaraawe enghima waattamelawaya ettheku; mpaka mihuwo sinsuweliha okhuveelawaya.” 
Job37:1 “Kuupuwelaka yeeyo onnakivavaxa murima, otuphatuphaka vanipuroniwaya." 
Job37:2 Mwiiwe! Ngwiriyane oruma wa nsunawe, ni okukutteya wa eyanowaawe." 
Job37:3 Owo ootaphula overinyawawe vathi wa erimu yootheene, anarumihela elapo yootheene." 
Job37:4 Vahoolowaya onrwa orumaxawawe otokotoko: Owo onkukutteya ni nsunawe ntokweene. Nsunawe naarumaka, khanghiiha etari." 
Job37:5 Nsu na Muluku ninkukutteya moota wootikhiniheya; Owo ompaka itthu sitokotoko nihingweraahu wiiwexexa. 
Job37:6 Owo oneerela etthapwe: ‘Mmorele vathi,’ ni epula: ‘Mukhale mirupi.’" 
Job37:7 Muluku oneemexera muteko wa khula mutthu weera ootheene Owo aapattunxaawe esuwele mitekosawe. 
Job37:8 Axinama antthawela aniipithaayamo, enakhalasa munyattanimwaya." 
Job37:9 Ettheku enkhuma enuukaanaayawo, ni oriira onrweela mpheyoni etokotoko." 
Job37:10 Iphumu sa Muluku sinoopaaniha maahi, ni maahi mancipale annoopaana." 
Job37:11 Owo onsariha maahi mmahutteni, ni ommwareela overinya eriyaraaya." 
Job37:12 Owo ompakiha weera eyo erukureere vasulu wa etthaya yootheene epakaka sootheene Owo aneeraawe alamulele. 
Job37:13 Muluku onruuha mahutte – vakina waattaruxa atthu – vakinatho ohelela etthayaawe ni owoonihera osivelawawe. 
Job37:14 Yobi, ngwiriyane nnenesene yeeyo; mweemele ni mutthokelele sootikhiniha sa Muluku." 
Job37:15 Weeraka nyuwo moosuwela moota Muluku onlamulelaawe mahutte ni omverinyihaawe? 
Job37:16 Nyuwo moosuwela moota mahutte amvavaaya – sootikhiniha iyo sa Yoole orino mwiiwexexo wookwanela? 
Job37:17 Nyuwo munxupeya ni oviha, ehoopaka epheyo ya mpatta wa ohitto," 
Job37:18 munoowera omukhavihera okunga irimu soolipaxa ntoko eloola ya ebronze*? 
Job37:19 Munileele yeeyo entthuneya omuleela Yoowo, khaningwera oreherera yoowiixaakiherano niwoko na epiphaahu." 
Job37:20 Onootthuneya omuleela weera kintthuna wuuluma? Khaawo eera avekele weera amiriwe. 
Job37:21 Khaawo angwera oweha otutha wa nsuwa wiirimu, epheyo emwaranxeene mahutte." 
Job37:22 Mpatta wa ottuttuwani Owo ongweela ngwaarani mwa ekoore ya eyuuma yoorikaxa; Muluku ongwa moovuwani otokotoko. 
Job37:23 Mukuku a ikuru sootheene ori weiwo nihingweraahuwo omoona, avuwaka moowerani; vaheera, moororomeleyanimwawe ni ngwookoleleyanimwawe, khaawo onimuhooxaawe." 
Job37:24 Tivawo atthu animuttittimihaaya, niwoko Owo khangweha ekhove ya yaale aniixeerela asuweli.”" 
Job38:1 Vano Yave aamwaakhula Yobi mutthekuni, aneera:" 
Job38:2 “Taani yoola onghela ewukawuka mirukusaka ni masu oohikhalano esuwelo? 
Job38:3 Mwiireherere ntoko mutthu, kinimookohakohani, ni nyuwo mukaakhuleke." 
Job38:4 Mwaari woowi kaapakaka mathipelo a elapo? Mwiiwexexa, mukaakhuleke." 
Job38:5 Taani ohenle nyiinano sa wunnuwawaya? Vekhaikhai moosuwela! Taani yookolenle mukhoyi wooringelano? 
Job38:6 Amarimbwaaya athipeliwe vaavi? Ahenle taani nlukunaya noopacera," 
Job38:7 ithenyeeri sa oxeexelo siipaaya, sikhuwelaka ni ohakalala ikhalelo sootheene sa wiirimu?" 
Job38:8 Taani aattuunle ephareiya mmilakoni miili, yaakhumaaya ni wuupa vanaattuuttuniwaya," 
Job38:9 kaawaringhaaka eyo ni mahutte, kihuruwelakano ewiriphi?" 
Job38:10 Miyo kaahelela mwiinano, kinaakhaliha anampattikaaya ni milakosaya," 
Job38:11 keeraaka: ‘mukotele vaava; mweemeleke vaava ni mitekutekusanyusene soolipaxa. 
Job38:12 Mwaatoko olamulela oxeexelo hoye hoye othoonyera enguungu nipuronaya," 
Job38:13 weera avarexexe elapo yootheene ni mapuphaaya ni waatatha atakhali ootheene? 
Job38:14 Elapo enthatuwa ekhalelowaaya ntoko oloko onceendyiwaaya ni ekanyero, aani ekhalelowaawe enlikana ni ekuwo erino icaambulo." 
Job38:15 Atakhali ankhoottihiwa waarawawe, ni moonowaaya wooweemexiwa oninteya." 
Job38:16 Nyuwo mwaatoko ophiya mphattuwelani mwa ephareiya, hoye hoye ovira mpiphini mwa moowiixeraxa?" 
Job38:17 Mohooniheriwa milako sa okhwa? Nyuwo mohoona milako sa ewiriphi ya okhwa? 
Job38:18 Munoowera osuwela moota wootheene wa mulaponi? Mwasuwela, mukileele." 
Job38:19 Ephiro heeni enrowa vanipuroni onkhalaayawo waara? Epiphi enkhala woowi? 
Job38:20 Munoowera orongha vanipuroniwaya? Moosuwela ephiro enrowa enkhalaayawo? 
Job38:21 Woohihovela moosuwela mweenre muyariwa ehinaaye ehuhuweene yeele. Mookhala wa iyaakha sincipalexa! 
Job38:22 Mwaatoko ovolowa vatathani wa etthapwe? Mohoona athokororiwaayawo maralala," 
Job38:23 kithokororenlaaka ehuhu ya woopiha, aani nihuku na owana ni ekhotto?" 
Job38:24 Ephiro heeni enrowa weiwo ommwalamwalaaya overinya, hoye hoye nri woowi nipuro ipheyo sa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa sinkawanyihereliwaaya elapo ya vathi?" 
Job38:25 Taani onghula mooviramo epula etokotoko ni ephiro wa epheyo yookukutteya," 
Job38:26 weera erupihele epula mulaponi mwa mwemmo ohinkhalaawemo mutthu, aani munikareni ohinkhaliwaru," 
Job38:27 weera emalihe ntthona na munikareni moowuumelela ni ophuwihamo munyepu? 
Job38:28 Weeraka epula yookhalano tiithaaya? Taani ori tiithi a mattonyo a nikame? 
Job38:29 Maahi oowoopaana angyariwa naani? Taani oyanre etthapwe emmora wiirimu," 
Job38:30 maahi yoopaanaka ntoko nluku, ni vasulu wa moowiixera woopaanaka?" 
Job38:31 Nyuwo munoowera otthuka Pleyade* yooreera? Munoowera opasa mikhoyi sa Oriyoni*? 
Job38:32 Munoowera okhumeleliha mweehuhunimwaya mukuttula wa ithenyeeri hoye hoye okhumeleliha mukuttula oniitthaniwa Ursu* ni axaanaawe? 
Job38:33 Nyuwo moosuwela malamulo a wiirimu? Nyuwo munoowera okhaliha olamulawawe elapo ya vathi? 
Job38:34 Nyuwo munoowera okhuwela mpaka mmahutteni ni wiirupihela epula etokotoko? 
Job38:35 Ti nyuwo munrumiha overinya, ni iwo onaweerelani: ‘Nri va’?" 
Job38:36 Taani ovanghe miruku murima ni wiiwexexa mmuupuweloni? 
Job38:37 Taani orino miruku weera aalikele mahutte? Taani ongwera wiittha maahi a mmanyaapuni sa wiirimu," 
Job38:38 ntthupi nuumelelaka ni makottomola a mulaponi yaathataanyeranaka? 
Job38:39 Ti nyuwo muninlupatthela mwatto muthiyana, munamaliha etala ya amwatto," 
Job38:40 awosa yiixaatalenleene munyattanimwaya hoye hoye ethurumelaka ereene mwemmo aniipithaayamo? 
Job38:41 Taani onaavaha yooca anakhuku axaanaaya yaamukhuwelelaka Muluku ni yaaxoraxoraka niwoko na ohikhalano yooca? 
Job39:1 Nyuwo moosuwela ehuhu heeni singyaraaya ikhomaci? Moosuwela ehuhu naahe ongyaraawe? 
Job39:2 Weeraka nyuwo mohaalikela nyeeri simmalihaaya sireeneno eyaasi? Moosuwela nihuku singyaraaya? 
Job39:3 Iyo sinkokhora sinaayara axaanaaya ni ovoreyawaya onamaala. 
Job39:4 Axaanaaya anunnuwela mutuphini, enakhomaala; anttimula woohihokolowatho." 
Job39:5 Taani amutapunxe buuru a mutuphini? Taani apanse mikhoyisawe? 
Job39:6 Miyo koomvaha nikare ntoko nivaatenawe, ni inyandya soowuuma sa maakha ntoko woomakawawe." 
Job39:7 Owo ontheya onyakuliwa wa musidade ni khampwatthela wiiwa okhuwela wa namweettiha. 
Job39:8 Omviravira mmanyaakoni aasaasaka yooca, aani onaasa munyepu mipatta sootheene." 
Job39:9 Munuupuwela weera enari enimwaakhulela olamuliwa ni nyuwo hoye hoye okhala munikhoolanimwanyu ohiyu? 
Job39:10 Munoowera otthukelela eyo ihipa soolimano, hoye hoye eyo enoottipura mattumuxa ottuliwanyu?" 
Job39:11 Nyuwo munoororomela yeeyo niwoko na olipaxawaya? Munoohiyera mutekwaanyu woovihaxa wa yeeyo? 
Job39:12 Munoororomela weera eyo eroihe etrigwaanyu vaatewanyu, ethukumanyaka muneepetthelaanyuwo?" 
Job39:13 Nikhakandore ninkuphula mapupha ni wiixoona, mene khoongwereya olikanxera ni mapupha ni mapururu a ntiki." 
Job39:14 Ninrela moocaaya veehaavani, nnahiya epurameleyaka ni ehaava," 
Job39:15 nihuupuwelaka weera anoophweeya, ni weera wookhala woonyikalaka akhalaru mwaamunama." 
Job39:16 Nnaahasula axaanaaya ntoko khaahiyono awaya, ni khannuupuwela weera mutekwaaya khoomvareleya etthu." 
Job39:17 Eneereela hiiho, niwoko Muluku khavanghe miruku nikhakandore hata wakhalaru moota wa muupuwelo wooreera." 
Job39:18 Wa soothesene, nakunga mapururu weera nitthimake, nno nintheya ekavalu* ni namweettihaaya." 
Job39:19 Weeraka moovaha ikuru ekavalu*, hoye hoye moowarihela muxikomwaya nceecera?" 
Job39:20 Ti nyuwo mpakihale weera ekavalu* etuphe ntoko musoope, etannyeraka woova ni otturumaxawaya?" 
Job39:21 Eyo emvalatha enyoonyiweene, enghakalala mukurunimwaya, enatthimakela mukhottoni." 
Job39:22 Ennyoosa woova ehoovaka etthu, kheenghuluwaru ekatana." 
Job39:23 Murupa wa nyuupasaya oniinaina mukhwipimwaya nivaka naaraka ni mphutulo. 
Job39:24 Ethukumelaka ni owali, eniihelelaxa otthimaka; nipalapatta naarumaka, kheentthuna weemela." 
Job39:25 Imaara sootheene ninrumaaya nipalapatta, eyo eneera: Nrowe! Enoona wunkha wa ekhotto ottai ottai, okhuwela wa asitokweene ni munyakunyaku wa ekhotto." 
Job39:26 Ti niwoko na mirukusanyu murumaasi omvavaawe, ni akungelaka mapuphaawe mpatta wa ohitto?" 
Job39:27 Ti niwoko na nlamulonanyu xaaka omvavaawe osuluxa, anatekawo epuuruwaawe?" 
Job39:28 Mookhalamwawe ti mwala mutokotoko, ni omviriha weiwo ohiyu wootheene; woolipawawe ti nikhuku na mwala na osuluxa." 
Job39:29 Omvenyera weiwo arowaka waasa yooca; ottai ottai, maithwaawe anoona yooca eyo." 
Job39:30 Axaanaawe angwura ephome, ni owo onkhala weiwo araayawo anamakhwa.”" 
Job40:1 Yave aamweerelatho Yobi: 
Job40:2 “Weeraka yoole aamvaanya Muluku a ikuru sootheene onoomookolela? Yoole ommoothera Muluku a ikuru sootheene amwaakhule!” 
Job40:3 Vano Yobi aamwaakhula Yave: 
Job40:4 “Nkiphwanenle; moota heeni kineeraaka kaakhule? Kimphuta iyanosaka. 
Job40:5 Kohuuluma emaara emoha, mene nkinonotho yoowaakhula; aani imaara piili, mene nkihimatho etthu.”" 
Job40:6 Vahoolowaya Yave aamuulumano Yobi mutthekuni: 
Job40:7 “Mwiireherere ntoko mutthu; Miyo kinimookohakohani, ni nyuwo mukaakhuleke." 
Job40:8 Nyuwo munoohovela ororomeleyawaka? Munookithoriha weera mwiixaakihe? 
Job40:9 Weeraka moonowaanyu onlikana ni wa Muluku, ni nsunanyu nnoowera okukutteya ntoko nawawe?" 
Job40:10 Vano, mwiiphwanelihe waara ni ovuwa, ni ngwarele otokweene ni nttittimiho." 
Job40:11 Muyeehe onyoonyiwa wa isarasanyu, mungwehe khula namwiixoona ni mungyevihe," 
Job40:12 mwaawehe anamwiixoona ootheene ni mwaayevihe, mwaattikitthe atakhali weiwo araayawo." 
Job40:13 Mwaavithe ootheenaawo vantthupini; nkuttelele ikhovesaya mmahiyeni. 
Job40:14 Hiiho, kinimwaakhulela weera ntatananyu noolopwana niwere woovuluxani." 
Job40:15 Mungwehe Bahemoti* kimpattunxaaka ntoko koopattuxaakani nyuwo – owo onca malaxi ntoko emombe. 
Job40:16 Ookhalano ikuru sitokotoko mmettonimwawe! Moota okhomaanlaaya waamirimawawe! 
Job40:17 Mwiilaawe oniinaina ntoko mwiri wa esedari*; misemba sa itakhwisawe siri soolipasene. 
Job40:18 Makhuvaawe ti mipheve sa ebronze*, mipatta sa erutthwaawe ti ikopo sa eyuuma." 
Job40:19 Owo ti ethoonyero yooreeraxa ya miteko sa Muluku. Wa soothesene Mpattuxaawe paahi ongwera omwaattamela yoowo ni ekatanaawe. 
Job40:20 Nyaako sinoomvaha sootheene sinruweraaya, ni axinama ootheene a ntuphini antheela mukhivirumwawe." 
Job40:21 Oniixaatalela vathi wa niphuwa nniitthaniwa Elotu*, iipithiheiyeene eriyari ya itiili." 
Job40:22 Ilotu* iyo sinimukhuneela mmunttuusinimwaya, isalgeru* sinimurukureera mukerekhere mmoolokoni." 
Job40:23 Mooloko waasareyaka, owo khantuthuwa; naari Yordanu aammanihaka mitekutekusawe mmwaanomwawe, owo onkhala emaalelo." 
Job40:24 Ookhala anaawere omvara mmaithoni, hoye hoye omphariha mutaphani ni ongweyiha iphula?" 
Job41:1 Nyuwo munoowera ongwarula Levitiyani* ni nimeso hoye hoye otthuka nluminawe ni mukhoyi? 
Job41:2 Munoowera ongweyiha mukhoyi mphulanimwawe hoye hoye omuhomano ittwattwara eyuuma yoopakiwa nimesonene? 
Job41:3 Nyuwo munuupuwela weera owo onimoodyoonttelelani ikharari ni owuulumelani masu oosiveleya? 
Job41:4 Munuupuwela weera owo onoowiiraananani, weera mumpake epottha mookuminimwawe wootheene ohanle?" 
Job41:5 Weeraka nyuwo munoowera ompaka yoowo muhuwo, ntoko mwaapalame, hoye hoye ongwariha onyooro weera mwaavahe anamwaniinyu asithiyana?" 
Job41:6 Ananakoso anoowera othumiha hoye hoye anookawana eriyari ya anamaronda? 
Job41:7 Nyuwo munoowera ohoma exapalaawe ni mavaka hoye hoye muruwaawe ni momba woomeserelano? 
Job41:8 Mwamwiikaatheraru ntata, munimuupuwelela ekhotto entthara ni khamurwa mpakatho yeeyo." 
Job41:9 Wakhalaru oweherera omvara yoowo khomvareleya muteko! Omoonaru paahi ti woowoopihaxa. 
Job41:10 Khaawo ongweraru olipa murima weera amutannye. Vano hiiho, taani anaawere okiwanano Miyo?" 
Job41:11 Taani opacenre okivaha etthu, weera kimuhokoloxere? Sootheene siri vathi, ti sawaka." 
Job41:12 Miyo nkihiyerera wuuluma sa mpatta wa erutthwaawe, ikurusawe ni ekhalelowaawe yooreera." 
Job41:13 Taani anaawere omurula yoowaraawe ya omokoni? Taani anaawere ophutula exapalaawe ya mwiitti? 
Job41:14 Taani otonke waathamiha milako sa eyanowaawe yooriciwa ni maino oowoopiha? 
Job41:15 Mmakhatanimwawe, aakhala makamba a exikudu* elipaleene nnenesene;" 
Job41:16 khula nikamba naattamanne ni nikhwaaya moota wooweera ehimviraayaru epheyo. 
Job41:17 Awo aaphitaanaxa moota ahingwereyaaya omwalamwaxa. 
Job41:18 Wuupa wa iphumusawe onkhumiha imangani; maithwaawe ari ntoko ekamaama ya oxa. 
Job41:19 Mmwaanomwawe sinkhuma mithuko; mmo onttettheruwa mooro. 
Job41:20 Mphulanimwawe ontthuwa mwiixi ntoko esupuriya eviluwaka muthukoni. 
Job41:21 Iphumusawe simpattiha makhala, ni mmwaanomwawe ankhuma malumi a mooro." 
Job41:22 Ikuru sincipale siri muxikomwawe ni woopiha onoomuhoola. 
Job41:23 Otikana wa ethayaawe ori woovaraana; ori woolipaxa ohingwereyaaya wiinaina. 
Job41:24 Ehocaawe ti yoolipaxa ntoko nluku, aani ntoko nxilo." 
Job41:25 Owo eemelaka, aweri anootondolowa; antthawa yoovaka oruma wa mikhittosawe." 
Job41:26 Ekatana enimphiyera kheengwera omukakattha, hata nivaka, naari muupa, mano ephutulo." 
Job41:27 Eyuuma onoonela ntoko okhala ekokhola, ni ebronze* ntoko etthaabwa yoowuntta." 
Job41:28 Nyuupa khasimmoomola; wa yoowo maluku a ekhwambala ari ntoko malaxi. 
Job41:29 Ekopo enimukhalela ntoko etiili, ontheya oruma wa nivaka." 
Job41:30 Waamirimawawe onlikana mavali oowiitha; owo oniipurulela muttokoni akhurulaka. 
Job41:31 Owo onkaphuliha moowiixera ntoko esupuriya, ontannya ephareiya ntoko nipoottoro nooheliwa yoowiixoottihera." 
Job41:32 Onghiya ottuliwawe mphito wooceremela, onoowereya wuupuwela weera moowiixera wookhalano ipwi." 
Job41:33 Kheewo ya mulaponi enlikana ni yoowo; eyo ti yoopattuxiwa yoohoova. 
Job41:34 Owo ongweha soowiikuxerera sootheene; ti mwene a oowiixoona ootheene.” 
Job42:1 Vano Yobi aamwaakhula Yave: 
Job42:2 “Koosuwela weera munoowera opaka itthu sootheene; khasiwoworu soovaanelasanyu sineera sooceeliheye. 
Job42:3 Nyuwo mookoha: ‘Taani yoola onghela ewukawuka mirukusaka ni masu oohikhalano esuwelo?’ Ettiitthu ti weera miyo kohuuluma itthu kahiiwexexaaka, aani itthu sootikhiniheya kahaaweraaka osuwela." 
Job42:4 Nyuwo mweenre: ‘Vano ngwiriyane ni Miyo kinimuuluma, kinimookohakohani, ni nyuwo mukaakhuleke.’" 
Job42:5 Maaruwaaka yaahiiwa sa Nyuwo; vaheera vano maithwaaka aawoonani. 
Job42:6 Tivawo kiniinyoosaaka muneenaaka, kinarukunxa murima vantthupini ni vattuurani.”" 
Job42:7 Yave amuulumenleene masu ale Yobi, aamweerelatho Elifazi muTemani: “Kohoonyoonyeriwani nyuwo ni asinthamwenaanyu eeli, niwoko nyuwosa khamuulumme yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai mwaha wa Miyo; ntoko opankaawe murumeiyaaka Yobi." 
Job42:8 Vano murowase mpaka wa murumeiyaaka Yobi, mwaakuxe aximombe athanneeli, ni anapunci a ikhondoolo athanneeli, ni mwaapakele sooveleela soohisa mwiixeerelaka asineenaanyu. Murumeiyaaka Yobi onimoovekelelasani ni Miyo kinimwaakhulela nivekelonawe ni nkinoopakelasani yeeyo mumphwanelaanyu moololoni mpankaanyu. Nyuwosa khamuulumme yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai mwaha wa Miyo, ntoko opankaawe murumeiyaaka Yobi.”" 
Job42:9 Vano Elifazi muTemani, Bilidade, muXuhi, ni Zofari muNaamati, yaapakasa yeeyo yaalamuleliwaaya ni Yave; ni Yave aahaakhulela nivekelo na Yobi." 
Job42:10 Yobi aavekelenleene asinthamwenaawe, Yave aamweettiherelatho nnenesene, anamvaha iphura sa seiye aarinaawe khalayi." 
Job42:11 Axunneiye ni axirokoriye ootheene ni yaale yaamusuwenle khalayi yaarowa oca ni yoowo owannyawe. Awosa yaampembesa, enamulipiha murima mwa makacamiho ootheene aamuruuhenlaawe Yave, ni khula mutthu aamvaha mpatta wa eparatha* ni munela a eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Job42:12 Yave aareeliha mpatta wookisera wa okumaawe opwaha woopacera. Owo aakhalano ikhondoolo 14 000, ikamelu* macira miloko mithannamosa, imombe soolimano macira muloko ni abuuru macira muloko." 
Job42:13 Aakhalanotho anamwane asilopwana athanneeli ni anamwane asithiyana araru. 
Job42:14 Mwaana muthiyana oopacera iitthaniwa Yemima, anaaveeli Keziya ni anaararu Kerene-Hapuki." 
Job42:15 Khoowoworu mpatta wa elapweene yeela yaariworu asithiyana ooreera ntoko anamwane asithiyana a Yobi, ni atithayasa yaahaavahasa yoohiyeriwa vamoha ni axirokoraya." 
Job42:16 Vahoolowaya Yobi aakhala ni okumi iyaakha ncira ni miloko mixexe; aawoona anamwanaawe, osuulwaawe ni mpakatho ekhapira yanaaxexe." 
Job42:17 Hiiho Yobi aakhwiiye uuluvalanxeene. 
Psalms1:1 Ooreelihiwa ti yoowo ohintthara miruku sa atakhali, hata ohintakiha mweettelo wa anamattheka, naari ohinkilaathi vamoha ni anamapuhera." 
Psalms1:2 Ohiyanawaya, ohakalalawawe ori munlamuloni na Yave ni mwa nenno onnatthokelela ohiyu ni othana." 
Psalms1:3 Owo ori ntoko mwiri ophatteiwe mukerekhere mooloko: oniima ehuhu yootthuneya ni makukhwaaya khaannyaala. Soothesene ompakaawe sinoomweettela nnenesene. 
Psalms1:4 Khoohiyono ntoko atakhali. Ari ntoko makamba amvavihiwa ni epheyo. 
Psalms1:5 Tivawo atakhali eneeraaya ehilipe ehuhu ya nthorihelo, hata anamattheka munthukumanoni mwa oororomeleya." 
Psalms1:6 Vano Yave onsuwela ephiro ya oororomeleya, mene ephiro ya anamatakhala enrongha woophwatiwani." 
Psalms2:1 Heeni miloko simvaanelaaya ni ilapo siniiwananaaya siiyoweene? 
Psalms2:2 Mamwene a mweelaponi animvaanya Yave ni anamalamula anoomvaanelela Yoowo ni oottikittheliwaawe, yeeraka:" 
Psalms2:3 “Nrowe nipase onyooro ni niitapuxe mootthukiwani.” 
Psalms2:4 Vahiceniwawe wiirimu Yave onnaatheya, aanyemulaka." 
Psalms2:5 Musaranimwawe onoowooceeliha ni moonyoonyiwanimwawe ongwoopopiha, aweerelaka:" 
Psalms2:6 “Miyo muneenaaka koomukhaliha mwenaaka oSiyoni, vamwaakoniwaka wootteela.”" 
Psalms2:7 Kinoolaleiya ekano ya Yave. Owo ookeerela: “Weyo mwanaka; olelo kohooyara.” 
Psalms2:8 Okivekele ni Miyo kinimoovaha olamula miloko ntoko yoohiyeriwa ni elapo yootheene ntoko yawawo. 
Psalms2:9 Weyo onoophwata iyo ni ekopo ya eyuuma, onuupwexakase ntoko nivali.”" 
Psalms2:10 Tivawo, mukhale ni miruku nyuwo mamwene ni nyuwo anamalamula a mulaponi mwaakhulele yoowoopereriwa." 
Psalms2:11 Munrumeele Yave ni woova; mumvuwihe Yoowo ni othukumela. 
Psalms2:12 Mumbeece Mwaana, weera Owo ahinyoonyiwe ni nyuwo muhiphwatiwe wootutuxereya niwoko isarasawe waakuva opatta. Ooreelihiwa yaawo ootheene antthawela mwa Yoowo!" 
Psalms3:1 Yave, amwiittanaaka ari ancipale ni yaawo ankiitta aahaatta!" 
Psalms3:2 Ancipale ankeerela: “Muluku kharwa oovuluxa.” Sela* 
Psalms3:3 Vaheera Nyuwo, Yave, ti exikudu* enkaakiha; ti ovuwawaka ni munkiweriha weetta ookakamuweene." 
Psalms3:4 Wa Yave kinnakhuwela ni vamwaakoniwawe wootteela onnakaakhula. 
Psalms3:5 Miyo kinimwiixaatalela, kinakona ni vano kinoovenya, niwoko ti Yave onkikosoopa." 
Psalms3:6 Nkinaatuthuwa atthu ancipale ankirica. 
Psalms3:7 Mvenye Yave! Mukivuluxe Mulukwaaka! Mpwexe ittwattwara sa amwiittanaaka ootheene ni mukhule maino a atakhali ootheene! 
Psalms3:8 Otapuxa ti wa Yave. Nreelihonanyu nikhaleke vamulokoniwanyu wootheene. Sela* 
Psalms4:1 Mukaakhule miyo kaakhuwelaka Mulukwaaka a ekhaikhai. Mukurunuxe othananawaka; mukimorele ikharari ni mwiiwe nivekelonaka. 
Psalms4:2 Mpaka yaakhani nyuwo asilopwana oowera muneeraanyu muhiye otatuxa ovuwawaka wuuliha muru? Mpaka yaakhani muneeraanyu musivele itthu soolokottha mwaasaasaka soowootha? 
Psalms4:3 Musuwele weera Muluku oomuthanla yoowo ori a murima wa omuluku; Yave anaakiiwe miyo kaamwiitthanaka. 
Psalms4:4 Nyuwo mwaanyoonyiwaka, muhittheke; mwiixaatalelaka, mutthokelele yeeyo ni mwiikurunuxe." 
Psalms4:5 Mvahe sooveleela sa ekhaikhai ni munroromele Yave. 
Psalms4:6 Ancipale ankoha: “Taani anaanoonihere yakhalaru etthu yooreera?” Munimwaleele ni waara wa ekhovaanyu, Yave." 
Psalms4:7 Moosariha murimaaka ni ohakalala opwaha wa yaale anghakalalela waatta wa etrigwaaya ni eviinyuwaaya. 
Psalms4:8 Kiniixaatalela, kinakona mmuretteleni niwoko ti Nyuwo paahi Yave munkikhaliha oolipeene." 
Psalms5:1 Yave, mwiiwe maswaaka ni moonelemo wiixinlelawaka." 
Psalms5:2 Mpwatthe okhuwelelawaka ekhavihero, Mwenaaka ni Mulukwaaka, niwoko ti wa Nyuwo miyo kinoodyoonttelelaakani." 
Psalms5:3 Yave oxeexelo munniiwa okhuwelawaka; kaavenyaka, kinnoovahererani nivekelonaka, kiwehereraka ni nroromelo." 
Psalms5:4 Nyuwo khamuhiyono Muluku onghakalalela yootakhala; soonarara khasingwera okhala vamaithoniwanyu. 
Psalms5:5 Oowiixoona khaanaakhuleleya vamaithoniwanyu, munaathanya ootheene ampaka yoonanara." 
Psalms5:6 Munaaphwata anamootha; munaathanya anamwiiva ni anamavariha. 
Psalms5:7 Wa soothesene, moosivelanimwanyu otokotoko kinoovolowa Mpaanimwanyu; ni woova kinookokhorela Empaanyu Yootteela." 
Psalms5:8 Yave, mukeettihe mweekhaikhaiyinimwanyu niwoko na amwiittanaaka; muthatawalihe ephirowaanyu ohoolowaka." 
Psalms5:9 Mmwaanomwaya khaniwoworu nsu noororomeleya; mirimasaya sinuupuwela ophwata; mimilosaya ti nihiye noohuleya ni anlokottha moota woowiipithiheya. 
Psalms5:10 Ii! Muluku, mwaathorihe, awosa emorele mwa soovaanelasaya. Ngwoomole niwoko na sootakhalasaya sincipale yeenre enoovaanyani." 
Psalms5:11 Wa soothesene, ehakalale ootheene antthawela mwa Nyuwo. Yiipeke mahuku ootheene ni ohakalala! Mwaakhuneele yaawo ni waakihawanyu. Yaawo ansivela Nsinanaanyu ehakalale mwa Nyuwo." 
Psalms5:12 Vano Nyuwo Yave, munimureeliha oororomeleya; oreerawanyu ommwaakiha ntoko exikudu*." 
Psalms6:1 Yave, muhikittaruxe musaranimwanyu hata muhikilake mooyoonyiwanimwanyu." 
Psalms6:2 Mukimorele ikharari Yave, niwoko nkilimpe. Ii Yave! Mukilamihe niwoko kootteenguwa!" 
Psalms6:3 Munepaaka woosareya othanana. Mpaka yaakhani Yave; mpaka yaakhani? 
Psalms6:4 Murukunuwe Yave ni mukoopole; mukivuluxe niwoko na osivelawanyu woororomeleya! 
Psalms6:5 Vano okhwiiye khangwuupuwelelani; taani a akhwiiye aneera oottottopeleni? 
Psalms6:6 Kookhulumuwa wiixinlelaxa; ohiyu wootheene kinniinlaxa vakaamaniwaka kinaanihaka yoophiteeraaka. 
Psalms6:7 Maithwaaka aathananiheya; khaanoona nnene niwoko na amwiittanaaka ootheene. 
Psalms6:8 Mususeke wa miyo ootheene nyuwo mumpaka sootakhala, niwoko Yave ohiiwa wiinlawaka." 
Psalms6:9 Yave ohiiwa okhuwelelawaka ikhararisawe; Owo ohaakhulela nivekelonaka. 
Psalms6:10 Amwiittanaaka ootheene anooyevihiwa yoopopihiwaka; woowaakuveya anoohokoleela ottuli yuuliheiyeene muru. 
Psalms7:1 Ii! Yave Mulukwaaka, Nyuwo ti wootthawelawaka. Mukivuluxe ni mukoopole wa ootheene ankittharatthara" 
Psalms7:2 weera ehikikhuure naari ehikinyaanye ntoko amwatto, ahikhalakaru ookivuluxa." 
Psalms7:3 Ii Yave, Mulukwaaka! Waari weera koopaka yeeyo kikhalakano nthowa;" 
Psalms7:4 kaampakenleene yoonanara nthamwenaaka hata kaamwiiyenreene mwiittanaaka woohinthowa," 
Psalms7:5 vano mwiittanaaka akittharatthareke mpaka okiphwanya; akinyikalelase vathi mpaka okiiva, akiswanyaka. Sela*" 
Psalms7:6 Ii! Yave mvenyeke musaranimwanyu! Mweemele muvirikanyihe owali otokotoko wa amwiittanaaka. Mvenye, Mulukwaaka! Mulamule weera ekhaikhai ekwaniheriwe!" 
Psalms7:7 Sithukumane miloko mukhwipimwanyu. Mulamule mureene osulusulu. 
Psalms7:8 Yave athoriheke miloko. Mwaakhuleleke ohikhalanawaka nthowa ni osivelawaka ekhaikhai. 
Psalms7:9 Ii! Yave a ekhaikhai, Nyuwo munoona soowuupuwela ni mirima sa atthu ootheene, mmalihe nipuhero na atakhali ni mwaalipihe oororomeleya." 
Psalms7:10 Muluku a osulusulu ti yoowiixaakiheraaka; Yoowo onimuvuluxa mutthu a murima wa ekhaikhai. 
Psalms7:11 Muluku ti Mphuki a ekhaikhai; Owo onnoonihera isarasawe khula nihuku. 
Psalms7:12 Mutthu aahitthuna orukunxa murimaawe, Muluku onnona ekatanaawe, anareherera muupaawe." 
Psalms7:13 Owo ooreherera ikapwitthisawe soowiiva ni nyuupasawe soovarela. 
Psalms7:14 Yoole onsareya soonanara ni onrupala sootakhala onyara soowootha. 
Psalms7:15 Yoole onthipa elakasa, aniixiha, onoomorela elakaseene yeeyo othimpaawe." 
Psalms7:16 Soonanarasawe sinoomuhokoleela; nipuheronawe nnoommorela muneenaawe. 
Psalms7:17 Kinoomutthapela Yave niwoko na ororomeleyawawe ni kinimwiipa icipo kittottopelaka Nsina na Yave a Musulusulu. 
Psalms8:1 Ii! Yave, Pwiiyaahu, moota nunnungwaaya Nsinananyu mulaponi moothemwene! Ovuwawanyu oniipiwa wiirimu." 
Psalms8:2 Mmwaano mwa anamwane ni wa ooyariwa vaanaano Nyuwo mookhaliha ottottopela niwoko na amwiittanaanyu weera mwaamalihe amwiittana anaasaasa ikuhu. 
Psalms8:3 Miyo kaatthokelelaka irimusanyu – miteko sa ikathasanyu – mweeri ni ithenyeeri mukhalihalaanyuwo," 
Psalms8:4 vano kiniikoha: Mutthu taani oophwanela omuupuwela Nyuwo; omutthu eheeni wootthukuruwela? 
Psalms8:5 Nyuwo moompattuxa ahaleelaka vakhaani olikana ikhalelo sa wiirimu ni moongwariha ecireemba ya ovuwa ni nttittimiho. 
Psalms8:6 Moomukhaliha oolamula miteko sa matataanyu ni mohiikaathi sootheene vathi wa inaawosawe: 
Psalms8:7 Mihuwo ni mikuttula sootheene sa inama, mpakatho sa ntuphini," 
Psalms8:8 ipalame sa wiirimu, ihopa sa mphareiya, ni sootheene sineetta mwemmo." 
Psalms8:9 Ii! Yave, Pwiiyaahu, moota nunnungwaaya Nsinananyu mulaponi moothemwene!" 
Psalms9:1 Yave, kinimoottottopelani Nyuwo ni murimaaka wootheene; kinoolaleiya sa sootikhinihasanyu sootheene." 
Psalms9:2 Kinoohakalala ootteeliweene mwa Nyuwo; kinimwiipa icipo soottottopela Nsinananyu na musulusulu. 
Psalms9:3 Amwiittanaaka yaahokolowaka, anookwattuliwa, enaphwatiwa." 
Psalms9:4 Mohaakiha mulattwaaka wa ekhaikhai; mookilaathela ehicaanyu muthorihaka ni ekhaikhai. 
Psalms9:5 Moohiiha miloko munaaphwata atakhali; moocipiha masinaaya wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms9:6 Milepe soohimala sohaaphiyera amwiittana; Nyuwo moophwata isidadesaya ni khaawo ongwuupuwelelaru. 
Psalms9:7 Yave onlamula wa mahuku ootheene; Owo ookhaliha ehicaawe weera athorihe. 
Psalms9:8 Owo muneenaawe onthoriha elapo ya vathi moota woororomeleya; onlamula miloko mweekhaikhaiyini. 
Psalms9:9 Yave ti wootthawelamo wa oohooxiwa; Nipuro Noolipihiwa mweehuhuni ya makacamiho. 
Psalms9:10 Yaale ansuwela Nsinananyu animoororomelani, niwoko Nyuwo, Yave, khamurwa mwaahiya angwaasani." 
Psalms9:11 Mmwiipele Yave icipo sa ottottopela – Yoowo onkhala oSiyoni; mulaleiye variyari wa miloko seiye opankaawe. 
Psalms9:12 Yoole oniinlela ikukuttula onimuupuwelela; Owo ompwattha okhuwela wa oohasuliwa. 
Psalms9:13 Ii! Yave, moone moota ankihasulaaya yaale ankittharatthara! Mukimorele ikharari ni mukivuluxe vamulako wa okhwa" 
Psalms9:14 weera kilaleiye ottottopeleyawanyu vamulako wa Mwaana Muthiyana a oSiyoni kahakalalelewo ovuluxawanyu. 
Psalms9:15 Miloko soomorela munlittini sithimpaaya; inaawosaya soophariheya mutthavini sireiyaaya. 
Psalms9:16 Yave ohiixoonihera ni ekhaikhai; atakhali aapharihiwa muntaphanimwaya. Higayoni* Sela* 
Psalms9:17 Atakhali ankhwa; hiihotho miloko sootheene sinimuttiwala Muluku. 
Psalms9:18 Wa soothesene, oohaawa kheerwa ettiwaliwa wa mahuku ootheene, hata oweherera wa oohasuliwa khooyeleeleya." 
Psalms9:19 Mvenye, Yave, muhitthunihere weera akhalaru mutthu awine; miloko sithorihiweke vamaithoniwanyu." 
Psalms9:20 Mutannyere seiyo woova, Yave; miloko sisuweleke weera siri atthu paahi. Sela*" 
Psalms10:1 Yave, murakamelenleni? Muniivithavithelani mweehuhuni ya makacamiho?" 
Psalms10:2 Ngwiixoonanimwawe mutakhali onimuttharatthara oohilipa, mwa yoowo ompharihiwa munraakhonimwawe mwa soovaanelasawe." 
Psalms10:3 Mutakhali onlapa soohaawelasawe; owo onimureeliha namilili, anamukhootta Yave." 
Psalms10:4 Ngwiixoonanimwawe mutakhali khammwaasa Yave; mwa soowuupuwelasawe sootheene khanimpwattha Muluku. 
Psalms10:5 Mahuku ootheene owo sinnamweettela nnene; ti oowiixoona ahipwatthaka Nlamulonanyu, anaaramusa amwiittanaawe ootheene." 
Psalms10:6 Owo oniixeerela: “Kheewowo eneera ekittikinye; kinoohakalala oohakalaleene wa mahuku ootheene kihikhalanaka sookacamiha.” 
Psalms10:7 Eyaanowaawe yoosareya soolapha, soowootha ni soowoopopiha; sookacamiha ni soonanara siri vanluminiwawe." 
Psalms10:8 Onimwiipitha vakhiviru wa mittetthe ni vanipuroni nenenenne oniwiiva yaawo oohinthowa aathurumelaka muxiirini yaale eneera evire. 
Psalms10:9 Onimwiipitha ntoko mwatto; ongweherera weera amvare oohaawa. Onimvara oohaawa, anamupurulela mutthavinimwawe." 
Psalms10:10 Yoovaraawe onookakhela vatthayani, enamorela vathi niwoko na ikurusawe." 
Psalms10:11 Oniixeerela: “Muluku oottiwala – Owo ohiipithiha ekhovaawe ni kharwa oona yeela.” 
Psalms10:12 Mvenye Yave! Ii! Muluku, mweemexe ntatananyu! Muhaattiwale atthu oohaawa." 
Psalms10:13 Mutakhali onimuruwanelani Muluku? Heeni oniixeerelaawe: “Owo kheewo aneeraawe akipakele”? 
Psalms10:14 Wa soothesene, Nyuwo, Muluku, munnoona sookacamiha ni soohooxa. Munnoona seiyo, munakosoopa. Yoovaraawe mutakhali eniixinnyerera wa Nyuwo; Nyuwo ti Namwaakiha a akwaasuni." 
Psalms10:15 Mwintake moono wa mutakhali; munthorihe niwoko na soonanarasawe mpaka omalamala khuluwi. 
Psalms10:16 Yave ti Mwene wa mahuku ootheene! Miloko sinoolakaseya mweelaponimwawe. 
Psalms10:17 Ii! Yave, mohiiwa soovekela sa oohooxiwa; Nyuwo munaapepesa munawaakhulela." 
Psalms10:18 Mungwaakiha akwaasuni ni oohasuliwa weera mutthu ongweherera okhwa ahihokoleele woopopiha. 
Psalms11:1 Kintthawela mwa Yave. Heeni mukeerenlaanyu: “Mutthawele vamwaakoniwanyu ntoko mwaapalame?” 
Psalms11:2 Vano moone moota atakhali ankungaaya muura enareya muupa weera yiipithihaka, yaalathe atthu oororomeleya." 
Psalms11:3 Mathipelo yaaphwatiwaka, oororomeleya anaapake hai?" 
Psalms11:4 Yave ori Mpaanimwawe Yootteela; Owo onkilaathi vahiceniwawe ya wiirimu. Onnaawehaweha atthu a elapo ya vathi; maithwaawe annoona. 
Psalms11:5 Yave onoowoota murima oororomeleya, vaheera onaathanya atakhali ni yaale ansivela nipuhero." 
Psalms11:6 Yave onimwaarupihela atakhali makhala evarelaka ni enxofre*; epheyo yoovihaxa. Hiiho awosa eniikhaleno yeeyo enaaphwanela," 
Psalms11:7 niwoko Yave ti a ekhaikhai; onsivela ekhaikhai; yaawo a murima woororomeleya animoona ekhovaawe. 
Psalms12:1 Mvuluxe Yave, niwoko khawowo oororomeleyatho. Yaawo a murima woororomeleya aalakaseya variyari wa atthu." 
Psalms12:2 Ootheene animulokottha mwaattamanaaya; iyanosaya sinuuluma ni onyeengerera. 
Psalms12:3 Yave athikile iyano sootheene soonyeenga ni nlumi noowiixoona 
Psalms12:4 na yaawo aneera: “Nnoowina ni iyanosahu; ti sawihu – hiyo awani?” 
Psalms12:5 Yave oneera: “Kinoovenya vaanaanova niwoko na ohasuliwa wa oohilipa ni okhuwela wa oohaawa. Kinimwaapakela ekhaviheroweene yeeyo antthunaxaaya.” 
Psalms12:6 Vano masu a Yave ti ookwanela, ntoko eparatha* yoototoxiwa muttukutthani yoorehereriwa imaara ithannapiili." 
Psalms12:7 Ii! Yave, Nyuwo munoonikosoopa oolipeene ni munoonaakihera wa atthweene yaala mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms12:8 Weiwo atthu ankupaleelaaya soonarara, annaattawo atakhali." 
Psalms13:1 Mpaka yaakhani, Yave? Munookittiwala wa mahuku ootheene? Mpaka yaakhani muneeraanyu mwiipithihe ekhovaanyu wa miyo?" 
Psalms13:2 Mpaka yaakhani murimaaka ni munepaaka onghaawaaya ni othanana khula nihuku? Mpaka yaakhani mwiittanaaka aneeraawe akiwine? 
Psalms13:3 Yave Mulukwaaka, mukiwehe ni mukaakhuleke. Mmwaleele maithwaaka weera kihimorele mookhwaani." 
Psalms13:4 Amwiittanaaka animweera: “Noongwina.” Ni awosa anoohakalalela omorawaka. 
Psalms13:5 Wa soothesene, miyo kinroromela osivelawanyu woororomeleya; murimaaka onghakalalela otapuxawanyu." 
Psalms13:6 Kimmwiipela Yave niwoko ookoonihera murima wooreera. 
Psalms14:1 Mulolo oneera mmurimanimwawe: “Khawowo Muluku.” Ootheene anghapuwa epakaka soonanara; khawoworu ompaka yooreera. 
Psalms14:2 Wiirimu iwo Yave onnaaweha atthu weera amoone aakhanle oowiiwexexa; akhalaru mutthu ommwaasa Muluku. 
Psalms14:3 Ootheene aahapuwa; ootheene aathatuwa oonanara murima. Khawoworu ompaka yooreera naari mano mmoha! 
Psalms14:4 Weeraka yaawo ampaka soonanara khaanxutta etthu – yaawo ankhuura mulokwaaka ntoko mutthu oncaawe yooca, ehimwiitthanaka Yave?" 
Psalms14:5 Moone, awo aatteenguwasa, niwoko Muluku ori variyari wa atthu oororomeleya." 
Psalms14:6 Nyuwosa mumpaka soonanara munghiiha soovaanela sa oohaawa, mene Yave ti Wootthawelawaya." 
Psalms14:7 Ii! Kinghaawela weera ovuluxiwa wa aYixrayeli orweele oSiyoni! Yave aarehereraka mulokwaawe, Yakobe ni Yixrayeli anoohakalalela!" 
Psalms15:1 Yave, taani ophwanenle okhala vaNipuroniwanyu Nootteela*? Taani ongwera omaka vaNttumuxaniwanyu Nootteela?" 
Psalms15:2 Yoowo oneetta moota wookwanela apakaka yeeyo eri yoororomeleya ni onuuluma ekhaikhai mmurimanimwawe. 
Psalms15:3 Mutthu owo khanaaluxa, ahimpakelaka yoonanara mukhwaawe naari khanimuuluma mukina." 
Psalms15:4 Ti yoowo onnyoosa yeeyo emphwanela onyoosiwa, vaheera onimuttittimiha yoole ommoova Yave. Owo onkwanihera nlipelonawe naari orikaka." 
Psalms15:5 Mutthu owo onkoongoriha, ahinnyesererihaka waakhela musurukhu woopwahaxa ni owo khanaakhulela makhwankwa amwiikitthaka oohinthowa. Yoowo ompaka hiiho, khattikinyeya!" 
Psalms16:1 Ii! Yave, mukaakihe, niwoko Nyuwo ti Wootthawelawaka." 
Psalms16:2 Kimmweerela Yave: “Nyuwo ti Pwiiyaaka; nkinonoru yooreera muhikhanle Nyuwo.” 
Psalms16:3 Mwaha wa atthu ootteela ankhala mweelaponi – ti yaale ari oovuwihiweene, mwa yaawo Miyo kinnaahakalalela." 
Psalms16:4 Soohooxa sa yaale antthara miluku sikina sinimwaandyeerereya ni nkinkhala ampakaayawo sooveleela sa ephome hata eyanowaaka kheerwa eromola masinaaya. 
Psalms16:5 Yave, Nyuwo mookivaha mpattaaka ni ekoomixaaka; ti Nyuwo munlipiha sa muhoolomwaka." 
Psalms16:6 Okikawelawanyu mwiinano ti wooreeraxa ni kookhalano yoohiyeriwa yooreeraxa. 
Psalms16:7 Kinoomutthapela Yave mwa Yoowo onkilaka; mpaka moohiyuni murimaaka onnakixuttiha. 
Psalms16:8 Mahuku ootheene kiningweha Yave ohoolowaka. Ti Yoowo onkookolela – nkirwa kittikinyeya. 
Psalms16:9 Tivawo murimaaka onghakalalaaya ni hiihotho eyanowaaka. Okumaaka onkhala woolipeene," 
Psalms16:10 niwoko Nyuwo khamukihiya mookhwaani, hata khamuntthunihera oororomeleyaanyu omalamalela munihiyeni." 
Psalms16:11 Mookoonihera ephiro ya okumi; ohoolowanyu kinoosareya ohakalala; moonowaanyu mulopwana wookhala otteeliwa woohimala 
Psalms17:1 Ii! Yave, mwiiwe mavekelowaaka ororomeleya ni okhuwelawaka; mwiiwe nivekelonaka, niwoko khaninrweela mmwaano moowootha." 
Psalms17:2 Mukipakele ekhaikhaiyaanyu; maithwaanyu yooneke yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai. 
Psalms17:3 Naari mootaka murimaaka ni mukiwehawehaka moohiyuni, hata mukisuwelaka nnenesene, khamuphwanya etthu yoottheka. Koolakela weera eyanowaaka kheettheka" 
Psalms17:4 ntoko ampakaaya atthu. Kittharaka maswaanyu, koosemba mweettelo wa anamapuhera." 
Psalms17:5 Malipaaka anneetta mphironimwanyu oolipeene; inaawosaka khasinserenguwa. 
Psalms17:6 Koowiitthanani Nyuwo, Muluku, niwoko munookaakhula. Mukipwatthe ni mwiiwe nivekelonaka." 
Psalms17:7 Moonihere osivelawanyu otokotoko, Nyuwo mungwoopola ni ntatananyu noolopwana yaale anaasaasa ekhaviherowaanyu wa yaawo angwoopopiha." 
Psalms17:8 Mukikosoope ntoko oosiveleyaxaanyu; mukiipithihe mmunttuusini mwa mapuphaanyu 
Psalms17:9 wa atakhali ankiwanano; wa amwiittanaaka ankirica etthunaka okiiva. 
Psalms17:10 Awosa ti a murima woowuumaxa ni eyanowaaya enuuluma moota woowiixoona. 
Psalms17:11 Awosa aakiphwanya ni vano aakirica ekiwehawehaka weera ekimoroxele vathi. 
Psalms17:12 Ari ntoko mwatto onghaawela ovara, ntoko mwatto mutokotoko iipithaka oolikaneene weera atuphele." 
Psalms17:13 Mvenye, Yave! Mwaawanane ni mwaaphwate! Mukivuluxe ni ekatanaanyu mwa atthu oonanara." 
Psalms17:14 Ii! Yave! Mukivuluxe mwa atthu ale; atthu a elapo ya vathi, mwa yaawosa nttuvelonaya nri mookumini ola. Nyuwo munaavoniha oosiveleyaanyu. Anamwanaaya asilopwana aavonaxa, yaahiyeraka anamwanaaya singhalahala." 
Psalms17:15 Wa miyo – keenre kiroromeleya, kinimoona ekhovaanyu. Miyo kaavenyaka, kinoohakalala niwoko kohoona ekhalelowaanyu." 
Psalms18:1 Davide aamwiipela Yave ecipo ela Yave aamooponlaawe mmatatani mwa amwiittanaawe ootheene ni mwa Sawuli. Davide eenre: Ii! Yave, Nyuwo ti ikurusaka; kinnoosivelani!" 
Psalms18:2 Yave ti Mwalaaka, Woolipawaka ni Namoopolaaka. Mulukwaaka ti Mwalaaka, mwa mwemmo kintthawelaakamo. Owo ti Exikudwaaka ni Nnyaka na ovuluxiwawaka – Nipuronaka noolipaxa nootthawelamo." 
Psalms18:3 Kinimwiitthana Yave mwa Yoowo omphwanela ottottopeliwa ni miyo koovuluxiwa wa amwiittanaaka. 
Psalms18:4 Mikhoyi sa okhwa sookitthuka; nyooloko sa ophwata sookoopopiha. 
Psalms18:5 Onyooro wa munihiyeni wookivitikelela; matapha a okhwa aakiphariha. 
Psalms18:6 Ngwoovanimwaka kaamwiitthana Yave; kaamukhuwelela Mulukwaaka weera akikhavihere. Mpaanimwawe aahiiwa nsunaka; okhuwelawaka woophiya ohoolowawe; ohiiwa. 
Psalms18:7 Etthaya yaatetereyaxa; mathipelo a nyaako yaattikinyeya. Saattikinyeenre niwoko Owo aanyoonyiwa. 
Psalms18:8 Mphulanimwawe waatthuwa mwiixi; mmwaanomwawe yaakhuma makhala a mooro woolaliha. 
Psalms18:9 Aahula wiirimu, anakhuruwa; mahutte ooriipihana yaari vathi wa inaawosawe." 
Psalms18:10 Aangwela kerubini*, anavava; aavava mmapuphani a epheyo." 
Psalms18:11 Aahiixiipithiha mpiphini iikuttelelaka ni mahutte ooripihana. 
Psalms18:12 Ngwaarani wa okhalawawe yaavarela mahutte vamoha ni maralala ni overinya. 
Psalms18:13 Yave aakukutteya wiirimu; nsu na Musulusulu naaruma. 
Psalms18:14 Owo aalatha nyuupasawe anaamwaraxa amwiittanaaka; aaverunyiha mipatta sootheene, awoomolaka." 
Psalms18:15 Moohiihanimwanyu vamoha ni wiiselelawanyu wa mphulani waahooneya wiixera wa ephareiya ni mathipelo a elapo ya vathi yaakhala vanlakani. 
Psalms18:16 Musulusulu aahookola ntata, anakivarela; aakikhumiha mmaahini moowiixera." 
Psalms18:17 Aakivuluxa mwa mwiittanaaka ooweraxa; mwa awananaaka yaari ookivikana. 
Psalms18:18 Awosa yaakiwanano nihuku na othananawaka, mene Yave aari ekhaviherowaaka." 
Psalms18:19 Aakitapuxa woomalela; aakoopola niwoko onnakitthuna nnenesene. 
Psalms18:20 Yave aakipakela yeeyo niwoko na olokawaka; aakitthuvela attharihaka mweettelowaaka woohinthowa. 
Psalms18:21 Miyo koheettela ephiro ya Yave; nkitapannye kimuhiyaka Mulukwaaka. 
Psalms18:22 Malamulowaawe ootheene ari ohoolowaka; nkihingyeru ikanosawe. 
Psalms18:23 Nkipahunle etthu vamaithoniwawe; koosemba soottheka. 
Psalms18:24 Yave ookitthuvela niwoko na olokawaka ni na mweettelowaaka woohinthowa vamaithoniwawe. 
Psalms18:25 Nyuwo muniixoonihera Oororomeleya wa yaale ari oororomeleya; ni Ookwanela wa yaale ari ookwanela. 
Psalms18:26 Muniixoonihera Ootteela wa yaale ari ootteela, vaheera muri Mwiittana a alavilavi." 
Psalms18:27 Munaavuluxa oowiiyeviha, mene munaayeviha oowiixoona." 
Psalms18:28 Nyuwo, Yave, mumpwaherera opattiha onyaaraaka; Mulukwaaka onkimwaleela mpiphinimwaka." 
Psalms18:29 Mukurunimwanyu kinoowera waawina anakhotto ancipale; ni ekhavihero ya Mulukwaaka kinoowera otupha exiri. 
Psalms18:30 Ephiro ya Muluku ti yookwanela; masu a Yave ti oophwanela ororomela. Owo ti yoowiixaakihera wa ootheene animuroromela. 
Psalms18:31 Khoowowo muluku mukina ahikhanle Yave; Mulukwaaka ti Mwala Mmoharu. 
Psalms18:32 Ti Muluku onkilipiha ni ontatuxa ephirowaaka yookwanela. 
Psalms18:33 Owo onaaluxa nyettosaka ntoko ekhomaci; onkeettiha oolipeene mmanyaakoni soorakamela. 
Psalms18:34 Onxuttiha matataaka owana; onkivareliha muupa wa ebronze*. 
Psalms18:35 Nyuwo munkivaha yoowiixaakiheraanyu yoowina ni ntatananyu noolopwana ninkikosoopa; munkikhavihera, mukunnuwihaka." 
Psalms18:36 Mookikhweihera ephirowaaka weera inaawosaka sihiserenguwe. 
Psalms18:37 Kohaattharelela amwiittanaaka, kinaaphwanya. Nkihokolongwe ehiphwatingwe." 
Psalms18:38 Kohaanyaanyaxa weera ehiwere weemelatho; yaamorela mmettonimwaka. 
Psalms18:39 Nyuwo mookivaha ikuru soowanano; moopakiha weera amwiittanaaka elamuliweke ni miyo. 
Psalms18:40 Moowoomola amwiittanaaka; kohaaphwata yaale yaakithanya. 
Psalms18:41 Awosa yaakhuwela evekelaka ekhavihero, mene khaariwo oowaavuluxa; yaamvekelaxa Yave, mene Owo khaawaakhunle." 
Psalms18:42 Kohaatatuxa ntthupi nimvavihiwa ni epheyo; kohaanyikalasa ntoko nttoko na munseweni. 
Psalms18:43 Mookoopola mwa muloko onkiwanano; mookikhaliha muhooleli a miloko; muloko wahaakisuwenle wookirumeela. 
Psalms18:44 Awosa yakiiwaru, animwiiwelela khuluwi; anamarwa ankittittimihaxa ni woova." 
Psalms18:45 Ootheenaawo aapororasa; ankhuma moolipamwaya ethukumelaka. 
Psalms18:46 Yave Mukumi! Atthapeliwe Mwalaaka. Avuwihiwe Muluku, Mvuluxaaka!" 
Psalms18:47 Owo ti Muluku onkiinlelela ikukuttula; Owo onlamulela miloko weera sikirumeele.
