Psalms18:48 Ti Nyuwu munkoopola mwa amwiittanaaka. Nyuwo mookikhaliha vasulu wa awananaaka. Mookivuluxa mwa anamapuhera. 
Psalms18:49 Tivawo kineeraaka kitthapele Nsinananyu variyari wa miloko, ii Yave. Kinimwiipela soottottopela Nsinananyu." 
Psalms18:50 Owo oningwinihaxa mwenaawe; ommoonihera onnene oottikittheliwaawe, wa Davide ni ekhapiraawe wa mahuku ootheene!”" 
Psalms19:1 Wiirimu onlaleiya ovuwa wa Muluku; musulusulu onlaleiya miteko sa matataawe. 
Psalms19:2 Nihuku ti nihuku onuuluma sa ovuwawawe; ohiyu ti ohiyu ovuwawawe onimooniheriwa. 
Psalms19:3 Othana ni ohiyu khoonlokolola hata ni masu ni nsunaya khanniiwanyeya. 
Psalms19:4 Vaheera nsunaya ninsuwanyeya mweelaponi ya vathi yootheene ni maswaaya mpaka ekotenle elapo. Wiirimu Yave aakungela nsuwa eheema," 
Psalms19:5 nri ntoko namatthomera onkhuma mukwartunimwawe, ntoko mulopwana ootthimaka ontthuna opacera otthimaka." 
Psalms19:6 Ninkhuma mpatta mmoha wa wiirimu, nneetta mpatta mukina; ovihawaya onookwanela itthu sootheene." 
Psalms19:7 Nlamulo na Yave ti nookwanela nivahaka okumi; ikano sa Yave ti soororomeleya sintatuxaka oohilipa namiruku. 
Psalms19:8 Soolamula sa Yave ti sa ekhaikhai sihakalalihaka murima; malamulo a Yave ti waara ommwaleela muupuwelo. 
Psalms19:9 Wooveya wa Yave ti wootteela ompwaherera mahuku ootheene; ikano sa Yave ti sa ekhaikhai ni soororomeleya. 
Psalms19:10 Ti sootthuneyaxa opwaha eyuuma yoorikaxa – aani iyuuma soorikaxa sincipale. Ti soocoocowa opwaha oravo, aani opwaha ikuttha." 
Psalms19:11 Murumeiyaanyu onoopereriwa ni seiye ni yoole onkwanihera seiyo onimwaakhela ntthuvelo ntokotoko. 
Psalms19:12 Taani onsuwela sootapanyasawe sootheene? Mukilevelele sootapanya seiyo kihisuwenlaaka. 
Psalms19:13 Mukihiihe wa soottheka sa emwayiini weera sihikilamule. Hiiho kinookhala ookwanela ni oohinthowa. 
Psalms19:14 Masu a eyaanowaaka ni sootthokelela sa murimaaka soosiveliheni Nyuwo Yave, Mwalaaka ni Namoopolaaka." 
Psalms20:1 Yave awaakhuleni mweehuhuni ya othanana Nsina na Muluku a Yakobe niwaakiheni. 
Psalms20:2 Owo oorumiheleni ekhavihero wa Nipuro Nootteela* ni oovaheeni, ekhavihero enrweela oSiyoni." 
Psalms20:3 Owo uupuwelele soovahasanyu sootheene ni aakhuleleke sooveleelasanyu soohisa. Sela* 
Psalms20:4 Owo oovaheeni yeeyo murimaanyu onghaawelaaya ni ookhavihereni okwanihera soovaanelasanyu sootheene. 
Psalms20:5 Hiyo nnookhuwela moohakalalani Nyuwo mwaawinaka ni nnimweemexa ineneerosahu soowina mwa Nsina na Mulukwaahu. Yave aakhulele soovekelasanyu sootheene. 
Psalms20:6 Vano koosuwela weera Yave onoomvuluxa oottikittheliwaawe; Owo onimwaakhula wiirimu wootteela ni ikurusawe soovuluxa sa ntatanawe noolopwana. 
Psalms20:7 Akina anroromela ikaaro sa ikavalu* ni akinatho mwa ikavalu*, vaheera hiyo ninroromela mwa Nsina na Yave Mulukwaahu." 
Psalms20:8 Awosa anooserenguwa, enamora, vaheera hiyo, nneemela oolipeene." 
Psalms20:9 Ii! Yave, mumvuluxe mwene! Munaakhule hiyo niitthanaka!" 
Psalms21:1 Ii! Yave, mwene onnahakalalela ikurusanyu! Onghakalalela owinawanyu otokotoko!" 
Psalms21:2 Moomvaha seiyo onghaawelaaya murimaawe ni khamunkhoottenle yoovekaawe. Sela* 
Psalms21:3 Moomwaakhela nnene ni mareeliho oowaatta, munangwariha ecireemba ya eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Psalms21:4 Owo ohoovekelani okumi ni Nyuwo moomvaha – okumi woowaatta ni woohimala. 
Psalms21:5 Ovuwawawe mwene ti otokotoko niwoko na owina mumvanghaanyu. Moomukhuneelano waara ni ovuwa. 
Psalms21:6 Vekhaikhai moomvaha mareeliho oohimala munghakalalihaka vamaithoniwanyu. 
Psalms21:7 Vano mwene onimuroromela Yave; niwoko na osivelawawe woororomeleya a Musulusulu, owo kharwa attikinyeya." 
Psalms21:8 Ntatananyu nnimwaavara amwiittanaanyu ootheene; aani ntatananyu noolopwana nnimwaaphwanya ootheene yaale anoothanyani. 
Psalms21:9 Nyuwo mwaaphiyaka, munimwaapakela niikho noovihaxa. Musaranimwawe Yave onimwaahonona ni moorowaawe onimwaahisa." 
Psalms21:10 Nyuwo munoophwata ikhapirasawe mweelaponimu – aani, anamwanaawe variyari wa atthu." 
Psalms21:11 Naari yoorukunuwelakani ni efittina, kheerwa ewera okwanihera yeeyo," 
Psalms21:12 niwoko munoowoomola mwaalathaka ni muupaanyu. 
Psalms21:13 Mukhaleke oovuwihiwa Yave mukurunimwanyu; hiyo nnimwiipela ni nnoottottopela owerawanyu. 
Psalms22:1 Mulukwaaka, Mulukwaaka, heeni mukihingyaanyu? Heeni munkhalaanyu ottai wa okivuluxa, muhipwatthaka maswaaka oowiikhupanyera?" 
Psalms22:2 Ii! Mulukwaaka, miyo kinnakhuwela othana, mene khamunaakhula – moohiyuni, nkiniitthuuwa." 
Psalms22:3 Hata hiiho Nyuwo ti Mwene Ootteela; ti Ottottopela wa oYixrayeli. 
Psalms22:4 Makholowaahu yaahoororomelani Nyuwo; yaahoororomelani ni Nyuwo mwaawoopola. 
Psalms22:5 Awosa yaahookhuwelelani ekhavihero, enavuluxiwa; yaahoororomelani enapwaneya." 
Psalms22:6 Wa soothesene, miyo muungu, nkihiyono mutthu, koopuheriwa ni kooramusiwa ni atthu." 
Psalms22:7 Ootheene ankoona anookitthebwa; awosa epukunyaka muru ankiruwana, yeeraka:" 
Psalms22:8 “Owo onimuroromela Yave – Yave amoopole. Owo amvuluxe eenre amusivela!” 
Psalms22:9 Wa soothesene, Nyuwo mookikhumiha mmirimani mwa amayaka ni mookilipiha oomaaleleyeene miyo nlelo kaamwaaka." 
Psalms22:10 Okhuma oyariwawaka kohinnyereriwa mmatatanimwanyu; kireene nlelo mmirimani mwa amayaka nyuwo mwaari Mulukwaaka. 
Psalms22:11 Muhikirakamele, niwoko othanana wookikhuveela ni khawowo ookikhavihera." 
Psalms22:12 Sookhala imombe ilopwana sincipale sinkirica; imombe ilopwana soolipa sa oBaxani sookirukureera. 
Psalms22:13 Awosa ankaattamela ntoko mwatto oonyaanya oopaka murika. 
Psalms22:14 Kimmiiniwa ntoko maahi ni makhuvaaka ootheene aakocakoca. Murimaaka woothatuwa nnyoma etothowelaka mmirimanimwaka. 
Psalms22:15 Ikurusaka soomala ntoko nivali ni nluminaka nootthukana waahottokoroko. Nyuwo mookihiya muntthupini na okhwa. 
Psalms22:16 Alapwa aakirica; atthu oonanaraxa aakirukureera; awosa aahoma matataaka ni inawosaka. 
Psalms22:17 Ammooneya makhuvaaka ootheene. Atthu ankiweha ehikoonelakamo. 
Psalms22:18 Aakawana soowarasaka epakelaka macitta ikuwosaka. 
Psalms22:19 Vaheera Nyuwo, Yave, muhikirakamele; Ii!, Ikurusaka, murwe woowaakuveya weera mukikhavihere." 
Psalms22:20 Mukivuluxe wa ekatana; mutapuxe okumaaka kaakaraweliwaka ni alapwa. 
Psalms22:21 Mukoopole mmwaano mwa amwatto ni wa manyaka a inari. Ni mookaakhula. 
Psalms22:22 Kinimwaalaleera axunnaka Nsinananyu; mmuthukumanoni kinimoottottopelani. 
Psalms22:23 Nyuwo mummoova Yave, munttottopeleke! Nyuwo ekhapira yootheene ya Yakobe, munttittimihe. Mmoove, nyuwo ekhapira yootheene ya Yixrayeli." 
Psalms22:24 Owo khanramusa hata khaanyoosa oohaawa wa oohooxiwa; Khaamuhulungwe yoowo, mene ohiiwa okhuwelelawawe ekhavihero." 
Psalms22:25 Kinimoottottopelani mmuthukumanoni mutokotoko ni kinookwanihera soororomelihasaka vamaithoni wa yaale angwoovani. 
Psalms22:26 Oohaawa animooca mpaka ovona; yaale animwaasa Yave anoomuttottopela. Nyuwosa mukhaleke ni okumi mahuku mancipale! 
Psalms22:27 Atthu a elapo ya vathi yootheene anoomuupuwelela, ehokoleeleke wa Yave, ni imusi sootheene sa miloko sinoomukokhorela," 
Psalms22:28 niwoko omwene ti wa Yave ni Owo onlamula miloko sootheene. 
Psalms22:29 Anamapuha ootheene a mulaponi animooca ni anoottottopela. Ootheene eneera ehokoleele muntthupini anoomukokhorela – yaawo avithingwe. 
Psalms22:30 Anamwanaahu anoomurumeela Yave; ikhapira sa muhoolo nsileeliwe sa Yave. 
Psalms22:31 Awo eniilaleere ororomeleyawawe muloko nlelo ohiyariwe, niwoko Owo ookwanihera yeeyo.’" 
Psalms23:1 Yave ti Mukukhulaaka – kheewo eniikihaleele. 
Psalms23:2 Onkiitthuuwiha munnyepuni eri yooca yooreeraxa ni onkiroiha wa maahi oomaaleleya. 
Psalms23:3 Onnalipihera okumaaka ni onkeettiha mphironi ya ekhaikhai niwoko na Nsinanawe. 
Psalms23:4 Naari miyo keettaka munxepani na epiphi ya okhwa, nkinrowaru woova yoowoopiha, niwoko Nyuwo muri ni miyo; ekopwaanyu ni ttoottwaanyu onkaakiha." 
Psalms23:5 Nyuwo munkirehererela efesta vamaithoni wa amwittanaaka. Munkittikitthela mmurumwaka ni makhura, musarihaka ekoomixaaka mpaka owanoni." 
Psalms23:6 Vekhaikhai koosuwela weera onnene ni ororomeleya onookihoolela mookuminimwaka wootheene ni miyo nkikhale vaate wa Yave wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms24:1 Elapo ya vathi ti ya Yave vamoha ni sootheene sirimo; hiihotho elapo ni ootheene ankhalamo," 
Psalms24:2 niwoko Owo oopaka yeeyo vasulu wa maahi a mphareiyani, anapattuxa antthimakaayawo maahi." 
Psalms24:3 Taani ophwanenle owela Nttumuxa na Yave? Taani ongwera weemela vaNipuroniwawe Nootteela? 
Psalms24:4 Yoole orino matata ni murima wootteela, mwa yoowo ohinttottopela miluku soowootha hata ohinaasa olipela." 
Psalms24:5 Owo onimwaakhela mareeliho a Yave ni Muluku Mvuluxaawe onoompakela ekhaikhai. 
Psalms24:6 Ti hiiho yaale ammwaasa Yave, yaale angwaasani Nyuwo, Muluku a Yakobe. Sela*" 
Psalms24:7 Ii! Milako, muhuleye; muhuleye milako sa khalayi, weera Mwene a ovuwa avolowe." 
Psalms24:8 Mwene a ovuwa taani? Ti Yave a ikuru ni ooweraxa, Yave a ikuru mukhottoni." 
Psalms24:9 Ii! Milako, muhuleye; muhuleye milako sa khalayi, weera Mwene a ovuwa avolowe." 
Psalms24:10 Mwene a ovuwa taani? Ti Yave a ikuru sootheene; ti Yave a ovuwa. Sela* 
Psalms25:1 Okumaaka ongwaasani Nyuwo, Yave;" 
Psalms25:2 Ii! Mulukwaaka, kinoororomelani Nyuwo. Muhikihiye kiyevihiwaka hata amwiittanaaka ehikiwine." 
Psalms25:3 Ootheene anoororomelani Nyuwo anoopwaneya; vaheera yaale aneetta moota woovariha khampwaneya. 
Psalms25:4 Mukoonihere iphirosanyu Yave; mukixuttihe misewesanyu. 
Psalms25:5 Mukeettihe mweekhaikhaiyinimwanyu ni mukixuttihe, niwoko Nyuwo ti Muluku Mvuluxaaka ni miyo kinoororomelani mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms25:6 Yave, muupuwelele ikharari ni osivelawanyu otokotoko moonihenraanyu okhuma khalayi." 
Psalms25:7 Muhuupuwelele soottheka sa enamwanaaka ni iphirosaka soohiiwelela; mukuupuwelele mwa osivelawanyu, niwoko Nyuwo, Yave ti Ooreeraxa." 
Psalms25:8 Yave ti a murima wooreera ni a ekhaikhai, tivawo onaaxuttihaawe anamattheka iphirosawe." 
Psalms25:9 Owo ongweettiha oowiiyeviha mweekhaikhaiyini ni onaaxuuttiha ephirowaawe. 
Psalms25:10 Iphiro sootheene sa Yave ti soosiveleya ni soororomeleya wa yaale ankwanihera soonyesererihiwa sa wiiraanawawe. 
Psalms25:11 Ii! Yave, mulevelele sootthekasaka sirookhalaru sitokotoko, mwaha wa Nsinanaanyu." 
Psalms25:12 Mutthu heeni ommoova Yave? Yave onoomuxuttiha ephiro heeni yookuxera. 
Psalms25:13 Owo onookhala mumpuhani ni ekhapiraawe eniyaakhele elapo. 
Psalms25:14 Yave onaathupululela ixiirisawe yaale ammoova; Owo onaasuweliha wiiraanawawe. 
Psalms25:15 Maithwaaka aningweha Yave mahuku ootheene niwoko Owo paahi ti onkikoongola munraakhoni. 
Psalms25:16 Mukirukunuwele ni mukimorele ikharari niwoko kiri meekhaaka ni oohooxeya. 
Psalms25:17 Soothanana sa murimaaka sohaatta, mukoopole wa soovalavelihasaka." 
Psalms25:18 Ngwehe soohooxasaka ni othananawaka ni mulevelele sootthekasaka sootheene. 
Psalms25:19 Moone moota amwiittanaaka yaattiyaaya ni moota ankithanyaxaaya. 
Psalms25:20 Mwaakihe okumaaka ni mukoopole; muhikihiye kuulihiheyaka muru niwoko kintthawela wa Nyuwo. 
Psalms25:21 Ekhaikhai ni ororomeleya okaakiheke, niwoko kinimoororomelani." 
Psalms25:22 Ii! Muluku, mvuluxe muloko wa aYixrayeli mwa soohoxasaya sootheene!" 
Psalms26:1 Ii! Yave, mukoonihere ekhaikhai, niwoko kinkhala moota wookwanela; koomuroromela Yave kihihovelakaru." 
Psalms26:2 Mukiringe Yave ni mukoote murima; ngwehawehaxe murimaaka ni soowuupuwelasaka," 
Psalms26:3 niwoko osivelawanyu ori ohoolowaka mahuku ootheene ni kinneetta mweekhaikhaiyinimwanyu. 
Psalms26:4 Nkinkilaathi vamoha ni asilopwana oolokottha hata nkineettano anamwiixeera. 
Psalms26:5 Kinthanya muthukumano wa atakhali ni kinkhootta okilaathi vamoha ni atthu oonanara murima. 
Psalms26:6 Kinnyawa matataaka kireene oohinthowa; kinnawaattamela altaaraanyu, Yave." 
Psalms26:7 Vano kinlaleiya ni nsu ntokotoko ottottopeleyawanyu, kithaliheraka soopakasanyu, sootikhiniha sootheene." 
Psalms26:8 Yave miyo kinnasivela nipuro munkhalaanyuwo, mwa weiwo onkhalaayawo ovuwawanyu." 
Psalms26:9 Muhivenxe okumaaka vamoha ni anamattheka hoye hoye ni anamwiiva. 
Psalms26:10 Mmatatanimwaya sookhala soovaanela soonanara ni matataaya oolopwana aasareya makhwankwa. 
Psalms26:11 Vaheera miyo kinkhala moota wookwanela; mukoopole ni mukimorele ikharari. 
Psalms26:12 Malipaaka antthara ephiro yoowookowa ni kinoomuttottopela Yave mmuthukumanoni mutokotoko. 
Psalms27:1 Yave ti waarawaka ni ovuluxiwawaka – taani kineeraaka kimoove? Yave ti wootthawelawaka woolipa – taani aneera akoopopihe? 
Psalms27:2 Asilopwana oonanara yaakaattamelaka weera ekiphwate ni amwiittanaaka ootheene yaakiwananaka, awosa anookwakwathuwa, enamora." 
Psalms27:3 Naari anakhotto ancipale ekiricaka, murimaaka khoorwa woova; naari epaceraka okiwanano, hata hiiho, kinoororomela." 
Psalms27:4 Koomvekela Yave etthu emoha ni ti yeela kinaasaaka: kintthuna okhala Mpaani mwa Yave mahuku ootheene a okumaaka weera koone oreera wa Yave ni kamwaase Mpaanimwawe. 
Psalms27:5 Vano nihuku na mahooxo, Owo onookikosoopa nnenesene mpaanimwawe; Owo onookiipithiha mutabernaakulunimwawe* akiikaathiki oolipeene vamwalawawe." 
Psalms27:6 Vano kinimwaawina amwiittanaaka ankirica; vatabernaakuluniwawe* kinoopakela sooveleela kikhuwelaka ni ohakalala. Kinoomwiipela Yave kimuttottopelaka. 
Psalms27:7 Ii! Yave, mwiiwe nsunaka miyo kaakhuwelaka; mukimorele ikharari ni mukaakhuleke." 
Psalms27:8 Murimaaka oneera ha sa Nyuwo: “Mwaasaase ekhovaawe.” Ekhovaanyu, Yave, kinimwaasaasa." 
Psalms27:9 Muhikiipithihe ekhovaanyu naari muhimukhootte murumeiyaanyu musarani. Nyuwo ti namakhaviheraaka. Ii! Muluku Mvuluxaaka, muhikihiye naari muhikithaame." 
Psalms27:10 Naari atithaka ni amayaka ekihiyaka, Yave onookaakhela." 
Psalms27:11 Mukixuttihe ephirowaanyu Yave; mukeettihe mmuseweni wookwanela niwoko na anamahooxaaka. 
Psalms27:12 Muhikinnyerere otthuna wa amwiittanaaka, niwoko anamoona oowootha ankoothera oosareyeene nipuhero." 
Psalms27:13 Hata hiiho, kooviriyeliwa ni seiya: kinimoona oreera murima wa Yave mweelaponi ya akumi." 
Psalms27:14 Mungweherere Yave, mukhale oolipa ni oominya murima; mungweherere Yave!" 
Psalms28:1 Ii! Yave, Mwalaaka, kingwiitthanani Nyuwo. Muhikisembe, niwoko Nyuwo mwaahuuluma, kinookhala ntoko yaale ankhuruwela mmahiyeni." 
Psalms28:2 Mwiiwe okhuwelelawaka ikharari, miyo kaawiitthanakani weera mukikhavihere ni kaatheteelaka matataaka Nipuronanyu Nootteelaxa*." 
Psalms28:3 Muhikivahe nttaruxo ahiyeriwaaya atakhali ni wa yaale ampaka soonanara – yaale anuuluma ntoko nthamwene ni aximwaattamanaaya, mene mirimasaya soosareya soonanara." 
Psalms28:4 Mwaatthuvele muttharihaka mitekosaya ni soopakasaya soonanara – mwa yeeyo matataaya amvaraaya, ni mwaavahe yeeyo amphwanelaaya." 
Psalms28:5 Yeenre ehipwattha miteko sa Yave naari seiye matataawe apankaaya, Owo onimwaaphwata khuluwi." 
Psalms28:6 Yave atthapeliwe, niwoko ohiiwa okhuwelelawaka ekhavihero." 
Psalms28:7 Yave ti ikurusaka ni Yoowiixaakiheraaka; murimaaka onimuroromela Yoowo ni ekhavihero kimphwanya mwa Yoowo. Murimaaka woosareya ohakalala ni kinoomutthapela muciponimwaka. 
Psalms28:8 Yave ti ikuru sa mulokwaawe; Nipuro Noolipihiwaxa nnimvuluxa oottikittheliwaawe. 
Psalms28:9 Moopole mulokwaanyu ni mureelihe yoohiyeraanyu; mukhaleke Mukukhulaaya ni muhoolele mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms29:1 Nyuwosa ooweraxa a wiirimu, munttittimihe Yave niwoko na ovuwawawe ni ikurusawe." 
Psalms29:2 Mvuwihe Nsina na Yave noophwaneleya. Munttottopele Yave moovuwani mwa Nipuronawe Nootteela*. 
Psalms29:3 Nsu na Yave ninruma mmaahini; Muluku a ovuwa onookukutteya; Yave onkukutteya mmaahini mancipalexa. 
Psalms29:4 Nsu na Yave ti nooweraxa; aani nsu na Yave noosareya ovuwa. 
Psalms29:5 Nsu na Yave nnintakasa nyiri sitokotoko; nnintakasa mipatta mipatta nyiri sitokotoko sa oLibanu. 
Psalms29:6 Owo ontuphiha oLibanu ntoko mwaaxaana a emombe; oSiyoni ntoko mwaaxaana a inari. 
Psalms29:7 Nsu na Yave nnaaleiha erimu ni waara wootutha. 
Psalms29:8 Nsu na Yave ninthukumeliha nikare; Yave ontetereiha nikare na oKadexi. 
Psalms29:9 Nsu na Yave nnaarelanyiha anaahe ni ninnamoroxiha makukhu a moothakoni. Vano Mpaanimwawe ootheene ankhuwela: “Ovuwa!” 
Psalms29:10 Yave onkilaathi vahiceniwawe vasulu wa mirupi; Yave onlamula ntoko Mwene wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms29:11 Yave omvaha ikuru mulokwaawe; Yave onreeliha mulokwaawe ni murettele. 
Psalms30:1 Kinoovuwihani Nyuwo, Yave, niwoko mookikhumiha ngwiixerani, muhaatthuniheraka amwiittanaaka okitheya." 
Psalms30:2 Ii! Yave Mulukwaaka, koowiitthanani weera mukikhavihere ni mookilamiha." 
Psalms30:3 Ii! Yave, mookikhumiha mmahiyeni ni mookoopola weera kihivolowe mookhwaani." 
Psalms30:4 Mmwiipele Yave, nyuwosa ootteelaawe; mutthapele Nsinanawe Nootteela." 
Psalms30:5 Vano isarasawe simpwaherera vakhaani paahi, vaheera murimaawe wooreera ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. Wiinla onoowereya opwaherera moohiyuni, mene ohakalala onoophiya oxeexelo." 
Psalms30:6 Miyo koonakaru weera kiri oolipeene, keenre: “Nkirwatho kittikinyeya.”" 
Psalms30:7 Ii! Yave, mwaakireereliwaanyu kaari oolipeene. Vaheera mwiipithihalaanyu ekhovaanyu, kaatteenguwa." 
Psalms30:8 Wa Nyuwo Yave koowiitthanani; koomukhuwelela Yave ekhavihero. 
Psalms30:9 Kaphwatiwa, hoye hoye kakhwa, ewinelo heeni? Apaale ntthupi nnimootthapelani? Nno nnoolaleiya ororomeleyawanyu?" 
Psalms30:10 Mwiiwe Yave ni mukimorele ikharari; ii! Yave, mukhaleke ekhaviherowaaka." 
Psalms30:11 Wiinlawaka mootatuxa wiina; mookirula sa wiinanela, munakiwariha sa ohakalala." 
Psalms30:12 Vano murimaaka ongwiipelani ohimaalaka. Ii! Yave, Mulukwaaka, kinootthapelani mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms31:1 Kootthawela mwa Nyuwo, Yave; muhikihiyeru kiyevihiwaka. Mukivuluxe moororomeleyanimwanyu." 
Psalms31:2 Mukiiwe ni mukivuluxe woowaakuveya. Mukhaleke Mwalaaka Wootthawelamo; Nipuro Noolipaxa mwa mwemmo kinlipaakamo. 
Psalms31:3 Nyuwo ti Mwalaaka ni Nipuronaka Noolipaxa; mukihoole ni mukeettiheke niwoko na Nsinananyu Nooreera. 
Psalms31:4 Mukikoongole munraakhoni akireiyaaya, niwoko Nyuwo ti Wootthawelawaka." 
Psalms31:5 Kininnyerera okumaaka mmatatanimwanyu; mukoopole, Yave, Muluku a ekhaikhai." 
Psalms31:6 Kinaathanya yaale anlapa miluku soowootha soohimuteko; kinoomuroromela Yave. 
Psalms31:7 Kinoohakalala kitteeliweene moosivelanimwanyu, niwoko mohoona ohasuliwawaka ni moosuwela soohooxa sa okumaaka." 
Psalms31:8 Khamukinnyerenre mmatatani mwa amwiittana, vaheera mookeettiha vanipuroni noowunnuwa." 
Psalms31:9 Mukimorele ikharari Yave niwoko koothananihiwa ni maithwaaka aasareya wiinla; aani erutthwaka ni okumaaka wooriipiweene murima. 
Psalms31:10 Okumaaka woosareya ni othanana ni iyaakhasaka simvira ngwiikhupanyerani. Ikurusaka sinlakaseya niwoko na ohooxiwawaka ni makhuvaaka aatteenguwa. 
Psalms31:11 Aximwaattamanaaka ankiramusa niwoko na amwiittanaaka ootheene ni asinthamwenaaka anookisemba. Yaale ankoona mmuseweni anookitthawa. 
Psalms31:12 Aakittiwala ntoko kirimookhwa. Koothatuwa ntoko nivali. 
Psalms31:13 Vano kingwiiwa ancipale ekuulumaka; koosareya woova; awosa ankivaanelela miyo yaasaasaka moota wookiiva. 
Psalms31:14 Vaheera kimmoororomelani Nyuwo Yave; kineera: 'Nyuwo ti Mulukwaaka. 
Psalms31:15 Ti Nyuwo munlakela ihuhusaka; mukoopole wa amwiittanaaka ni yaale ankittharatthara. 
Psalms31:16 Ekhovaanyu emmwaleele murumeiyaanyu; mukivuluxe moosivelanimwanyu woohimala. 
Psalms31:17 Muhikihiye kuulihiheyaka muru Yave, niwoko koowiitthanani Nyuwo. Vaheera ngwuulihihe muru atakhali, evonyeriwaka mmahiye oomaaleene." 
Psalms31:18 Iyanosaya soowootha simaalihiwe, niwoko angwuulihiha muru oororomeleya, yiixoonaka ni yaaramusaka." 
Psalms31:19 Ii! Ti otokotoko oreerawanyu murima mwaathokororenlaanyu yaale angwoovani. Vamaithoni wa atthu munimwaavaha oreerawanyu murima yaale anootthawelelani Nyuwo. 
Psalms31:20 Munipuroni noolipa na okhalawanyu Nyuwo mungwiipithiha mwa soovaanela sa atthu. Woomakawanyu mungwaakiha mwa anamoothera. 
Psalms31:21 Yave atthapeliwe niwoko ookoonihera osivelawawe wooreeraxa miyo kaaraaka musidadeni yooriciwa. 
Psalms31:22 Moothanananimwaka keenre: 'Mookirakameliha vamaithoniwanyu.’ Vaheera mohiiwa okhuwelelawaka ikharari miyo kaawiitthannaakani Nyuwo weera mukikhavihere. 
Psalms31:23 Munsivele Yave ootteelaawe ootheene! Yave onaathokorora oororomeleyaawe, mene onaavaha oowiixoona yeeyo amphwanelaaya." 
Psalms31:24 Mukhale oolipa ni oominya murima ootheene nyuwosa munimuroromela Yave. 
Psalms32:1 Ooreelihiwa ti yoole sileveleliwe soopakasawe soonanara ni sootthekasawe simalihingwe. 
Psalms32:2 Ooreelihiwa mutthu Yave ohimmoonanaawe soottheka ni mwa yoowo ohinimphwanyanaawe wiixeera. 
Psalms32:3 Miyo kiipithihaaka sootthekasaka, makhuvaaka yaatteenguwa niwoko na wiikhupanyerawaka mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms32:4 Vano othana ni ohiyu ntatananyu nannakittaruxa ni saakimalela ikuru ntoko mweehuhuni ya ovihaxa. Sela* 
Psalms32:5 Vanonto koolapa sootthekasaka, kihiipithihakatho mitekosaka soonanara. Keenre: “Kinoolapa sootthekasaka wa Yave,” ni Nyuwo mooleveleela nthowa na seiye." 
Psalms32:6 Tivawo, ootheene a murima wa oMuluku yoovekeleni, Nyuwo nlelo mulikanneene ophwanyiwa. Hata esaraka maahi mancipale, khayaaphwanya." 
Psalms32:7 Nyuwo ti Wootthawelawaka; munkaakiha mwa makacamiho; munkirukureerihano icipo sa owina. 
Psalms32:8 Kinoovahani miruku kooxuttihakani ephiro muneeraanyu mukuxere; kinimoolakani ni kinimookosoopani. 
Psalms32:9 Muhikhale ntoko ekavalu* hoye hoye buuru mwa yoowo ohirino wiiwexexa, mene ontthuneya olamuleliwano onyooro mmwaano – waahikhala hiiho kharwa iiwelela." 
Psalms32:10 Soohooxa sa atakhali soohaatta, mene osivela woororomeleya wa Yave onimurukureera yoowo onimuroromela Yave." 
Psalms32:11 Munghakalalele Yave ni mukhaleke ni murima wootteela, nyuwosa oororomeleya; mwiipe, nyuwosa ootheene a murima wa ekhaikhai." 
Psalms33:1 Mmwiipele Yave ni ohakalala, nyuwosa oororomeleya. Ti woophwaneleya omuttottopela, nyuwosa a murima wooreera." 
Psalms33:2 Muntthapele Yave ni makita; mmwiipele ni lira* a ifiiyu muloko. 
Psalms33:3 Mmwiipele ecipo enyowani, mwiipe nnenesene ni munkhuweleleno ni ohakalala." 
Psalms33:4 Vano masu a Yave ti a ekhaikhai; Owo ti oororomeleya mwa sootheene ompakaawe. 
Psalms33:5 Yave onsivela ororomeleya ni ekhaikhai; elapo ya vathi yoosareyano osivelawawe woohimala. 
Psalms33:6 Erimu yaapattuxiwa ni nsu na Yave; ithenyerisaya saapattuxiwa ni iphumu sa eyanowaawe. 
Psalms33:7 Owo onthukumanyiha maahi a ephareiya nipuro nimoha; onghela mmattankhini moowiixera. 
Psalms33:8 Elapo yootheene ya vathi emooveke Yave; miloko sootheene sa mulaponi simuttittimihe Yoowo. 
Psalms33:9 Vano Owo aahuuluma ni sootheene saapakeya; Owo aalamula ni sootheene saakhumelela. 
Psalms33:10 Yave onooceeliha soovaanela sa miloko; onghiiha soowuupuwelasaya. 
Psalms33:11 Vaheera soovaanela sa Yave sinkhala mahuku ootheene ni soowuupuwela sa murimaawe simpwaherera wa ikhapira sootheene. 
Psalms33:12 Wooreelihiwa ti muloko orino Yave ntoko Mulukwaaya; muloko Owo othanlalaawe weera okhale yoohiyeraawe. 
Psalms33:13 Yave ari wiirimu ongweha vathi awoonaka atthu ootheene a elapo ya vathi; 
Psalms33:14 vahiceniwawe onaaweha amaki ootheene a mulaponi. 
Psalms33:15 Ti Yoowo opanke mirima sa atthu ni onsuwela sootheene atthu ampakaaya. 
Psalms33:16 Khawoworu mwene omvuluxiwa niwoko na waatta wa anakhottwaawe naari khawoworu nakhotto ooweraxa omutthawa niwoko na ikurusawe sitokotoko. 
Psalms33:17 Ekavalu* engweherera siiyo woopola, naari ekhalanaka ikuru sitokotoko, kheengwera ovuluxa." 
Psalms33:18 Vaheera maitho a Yave angwoona yaale ammoova; yaale anroromela mwa osivelawawe woohimala. 
Psalms33:19 weera awoopole mookhwaani ni aathokorore mookumini mweehuhuni ya etala. 
Psalms33:20 Hiyo nningweherera Yave munroromeloni; Owo ti Ekhaviherowaahu ni Yoowiixaakiheraahu. 
Psalms33:21 Mirimasahu sinimuhakalalela Yoowo, niwoko ninroromela mwa Nsinanawe Nootteela." 
Psalms33:22 Ii! Yave, osivelawanyu woohimala okhaleke ni hiyo neenre noororomelani Nyuwo." 
Psalms34:1 Kinoomvuwiha Yave mahuku ootheene; iyanosaka sinoomuttottopela Yoowo woohihiyerera. 
Psalms34:2 Okumaaka onoomunnuwiha Yave; oohooxiwa yiiweke ni ehakalaleke. 
Psalms34:3 Mmwiipele otokotokwaawe Yave vamoha ni miyo; nivuwiheke Nsinanawe. 
Psalms34:4 Koomwaasa Yave ni Owo ookaakhula; Owo ookoopola mwa woovawaka wootheene. 
Psalms34:5 Yaale aningweha anootutha; ikhovesaya khasirwatho saamora. 
Psalms34:6 Mulopwana oohaawa ola aahiitthana ni Yave oomwiiwa; Owo oomoopola mwa sookacamihasawe sootheene. 
Psalms34:7 Ndyelo a Yave ti namalipelela aarukureenreene yaale ammoova Yave ni Owo ongwoopola. 
Psalms34:8 Ngwehe ni moonelele weera Yave ti ooreeraxa; ooreelihiwa ti yoole onimutthawelela Yoowo. 
Psalms34:9 Munttittimihe Yave nyuwosa ootteela, niwoko yaale animuttittimiha kheewo enaahaleela." 
Psalms34:10 Mpaka amwatto annahaawa evoliwaka etala, vaheera yaale ammwaasa Yave kheewowo etthu yooreera enaahaleela." 
Psalms34:11 Ngweeke anamwanaaka, ni mukiiwe; kinimooxuttihani omuttittimiha Yave." 
Psalms34:12 Ootheene nyuwo munsivela okumi ni muntthuna woona mahuku mancipale ooreera," 
Psalms34:13 muhiihe malumaanyu wuuluma soonanara ni iyanosanyu weera sihoothe. 
Psalms34:14 Mususe wa soonanara ni mpake yooreera; mwaasaase murettele ni nthiti. 
Psalms34:15 Yave ongwoona yaale ari oororomeleya ni Owo onimwiiwa okhuwelawaya. 
Psalms34:16 Yave ti Mwiittana a yaale ampaka soonanara aaphwataka mweelaponimu weera ehuupuweleliwetho. 
Psalms34:17 Atthu oororomeleya ankhuwela ni Yave ongwiiwa; Owo ongwoopola mwa sookacamihasaya sootheene. 
Psalms34:18 Yave ori vakhiviru wa yaale oothananaxa vamurimani, anaavuluxa yaale ari oopororeene." 
Psalms34:19 Sookacamiha sa oororomeleya sohaatta, vaheera Yave ommoopola mwa sootheene seiyo." 
Psalms34:20 Owo onaakiha makhuvaawe ootheene – khaniwoworu nneera nintakiwe. 
Psalms34:21 Yoonanara enoowiiva atthu oonanara murima; amwiittana a oororomeleya anoothorihiwa. 
Psalms34:22 Yave onaavuluxa arumeiyaawe; khawowo ontthawela mwa Yoowo onthorihiwa. 
Psalms35:1 Ii! Yave! Mukaakihe wa yaale ankoothera; mwaawanane yaawo ankiwanano. 
Psalms35:2 Mukuxe exikudwaanyu ekhaanene ni etokotoko; murwe, mukikhavihere." 
Psalms35:3 Mwaatheteele nivakananyu nikhaani ni ntokotoko yaale ankittharatthara; mweerele okumaaka: “Miyo ti ovuluxiwawanyu.” 
Psalms35:4 Yaale anaasa okumaaka yuulihiheye muru ni enyoosiwe. Yaale ankivaanelela okiphwata ehokoloweke yuulihiheiyeene muru. 
Psalms35:5 Awosa ekhaleke ntoko makamba amvavihiwa ni epheyo, ndyelo a Yave aawoomolaka." 
Psalms35:6 Ephirowaaya ekhaleke yoowiilihana ni yootherera, ndyelo a Yave aattharattharaka." 
Psalms35:7 Nkaapakela yoonanara, hata hiiho aakireya muraakho woowiipithiheya; kiroohikhalanaru nthowa, aathipa nlitti weera kimorelemo." 
Psalms35:8 Ophwata waaphwanye wootutuxereya; epharihiwe munraakhonimwaya ni emorele vanlittini athimpaaya, weera ephwateye." 
Psalms35:9 Vano okumaaka onoomuhakalalela Yave okitteelaka murima niwoko na ovuluxawawe. 
Psalms35:10 Kinoolaleiya ni okumaaka wootheene: “Khawowo onlikana ni Nyuwo, Yave. Nyuwo mungwoopola oohaawa wa yaale oolipaxa waapwaha yaawo; aani mungwoopola oohaawa ni oohooxiwa wa yaale angwiiyera.”" 
Psalms35:11 Anamoona oonanara murima ankeemelela; awosa ankikohakoha sa itthu kihisuwenlaaka. 
Psalms35:12 Awosa ankaakakhanyihera yooreera ni yoonanara; miyo kihanle ttewu. 
Psalms35:13 Vaheera, awosa yaavoreiwaaya, miyo kaawarela sa olalamika, kiiyevihaka ni otthuka, kaavekelelaxaka." 
Psalms35:14 Kaahaalalamikela ntoko yaari asinthamwenaaka hoye hoye axunnaka. Kaathananaxa ntoko kaalalamikela amayaka. 
Psalms35:15 Wa soothesene, miyo kikwattuliwakaru, awosa yaathukumana ni ohakalala. Miyo kihisuwelaka yaathukumana weera ekiwaneno. Woohihiyerera awosa yannakuuluma." 
Psalms35:16 Yaakitheya ni murima woonanara; ntoko alavilavi enakikhuurihela maino. 
Psalms35:17 Ii! Yave, mpaka yaakhani mpwahereraka oweha paahi? Moopole okumaaka mwa okiwananawaya; aani okumaaka woosiveleya mwa amwatto ale." 
Psalms35:18 Kinoottottopelani munthukumanoni mutokotoko; kinootthapelani variyari wa atthu ancipale. 
Psalms35:19 Ehitheye wuuliheyawaka muru amwiittanaaka oovariha; muhitthunihere weera yaale ankithanya kihinthowa, ekiwehe ncerekhule." 
Psalms35:20 Awosa khaanuuluma mmuretteleni, mene anaavaanelela soowoothera soowootha yaale ankhala oomaaleene mweelaponi." 
Psalms35:21 Awosa ankiweha yeeraka: “Ahe! Nohoona ni maithwaahu!” 
Psalms35:22 Ii! Yave, mohoona yeeyo; muhikhale emaalelo. Yave muhikirakamele!" 
Psalms35:23 Mvenye ni mweemele weera mukaakihe! Ii! Mulukwaaka ni Apwiyaaka, mwaakihe mulattwaaka." 
Psalms35:24 Ii! Yave Mulukwaaka, moororomeleyanimwanyu moonihere ohikhalanawaka nthowa; muhaahiye ekitheyaka." 
Psalms35:25 Muhaahiye yuupuwelaka: “Ahe, ti yeeyo naatthunaahu,” hoye hoye eheere: “Noommaliha!”" 
Psalms35:26 Erukureereye nyuru oowuulihiheyeene muru ootheene anghakalalela ohooxiwawaka. Epupurumiheye ni yuulihiheye muru ootheene aniixunnuwiha okipwaha miyo. 
Psalms35:27 Yaale anghakalalela ohikhalanawaka nthowa ekhuweleke ni ohakalala; awosa yeere mahuku ootheene: “Yave avuwihiwe, mwa Yoowo ontthuna weera murumeiyaawe akhale nnene.”" 
Psalms35:28 Nluminaka nnuuluma sa ororomeleyawanyu ni ottottopeleyawanyu ehuhu yootheene! 
Psalms36:1 Aakhala masu mmurimanimwaka mwaha wa soottheka sa mutakhali: owo khammoovaru Muluku. 
Psalms36:2 Vano wootepaxa wiixoonawawe moota wooweera khanoona hata khanghiya sootthekasawe. 
Psalms36:3 Maswaawe ti oonanara ni oovariha. Owo khampwattha okhalano miruku naari opaka yooreera. 
Psalms36:4 Mpaka iixaatalenleene owo omvaanela soonanara; onthanla ephiro yootthekeya ahihiyaka yeeyo eri yoonanara. 
Psalms36:5 Osivelawanyu, Yave, wophiya mpaka wiirimu; ororomeleyawanyu mpaka mmahutteni!" 
Psalms36:6 Ekhaikhaiyaanyu enlikana nyaako sitokotoko ni ororomeleyawanyu onlikana ntoko wiixera wa ephareiya. Ii! Yave, nyuwo munkosoopa omutthu nitho axinama ootheene." 
Psalms36:7 Ii! Muluku, osivelawanyu woohimala ti wootthuneyaxa! Atthu amphwanya wootthawelawo mmunttuusini wa mapuphaanyu." 
Psalms36:8 Awosa anca sa seiye saattiye Mpaanimwanyu ni munimwaavaha owura sa moolokwaanyu wa ohakalala. 
Psalms36:9 Vano mwa Nyuwo ookhala naattuuttu a okumi; ngwaaranimwanyu hiyo ninnamwaleeleya. 
Psalms36:10 Mpwaherere waasivelawanyu yaale yoosuwenleni; ekhaikhaiyaanyu wa yaale ari oororomeleya murima. 
Psalms36:11 Muhitthunihere weera nnaawo na oowiixoona nikinyikale, hata ntata na mutakhali nikimoroxele vathi." 
Psalms36:12 Moone moota atakhali amoroxingwaaya, ehiweraka weemelatho!" 
Psalms37:1 Muhinyoonyiwe niwoko na atakhali hata muhaapuhihe yaale ampaka yoonanara. 
Psalms37:2 Vano ntoko malaxi awosa animuuma woowaakuveya ni ntoko munyepu anoonyaala woohilekela. 
Psalms37:3 Munroromele Yave ni mpake yooreera – hiiho nyuwo munoomaka mweelaponi mukhalaka oolipeene. 
Psalms37:4 Munghakalalele Yave ni Owo onimoovahani yeeyo munghaawelaanyu. 
Psalms37:5 Mwinnyerere ephirowaanyu mmatatani mwa Yave; munroromele Yoowo ni Owo onoopaka ha: 
Psalms37:6 Owo onimwaariha ororomeleyawanyu ntoko nsuwa nimmwaleela waaxaaka; ohinthowawanyu ntoko nsuwa vamuru. 
Psalms37:7 Mukhaleke oomaaleene vamaithoni wa Yave ni mungweherere ni ovilela. Muhinyoonyiwe niwoko na opuha wa atakhali, hata wa yaale amvaanelela soonanara." 
Psalms37:8 Musembe isara ni mukhootte onyoonyiwa; muhiximwe niwoko eyo enrongha wa yoonanara paahi. 
Psalms37:9 Vano atthu oonanara murima anoophwatiwa, mene yaale animuroromela Yave animwaakhela elapo ntoko yoohiyeriwa." 
Psalms37:10 Atakhali anoolakaseya woowaakuveya; naari ngwaasaasaka, khamwaaphwanya." 
Psalms37:11 Vaheera atthu oomaala murima animwaakhela elapo ehakalalaka mmuretteleni. 
Psalms37:12 Atakhali anaavaanelela oororomeleya yaakhuurihelaka maino," 
Psalms37:13 mene Yave onaatheya atthu oonanara murima niwoko oosuwela weera nihukunaya nnimoowa. 
Psalms37:14 Atakhali antholola ekatana, enakunga muupa weera ewiive oohaawa ni yaale aneetta mphironi ya ekhaikhai." 
Psalms37:15 Vaheera ikatanasaya sinimwaahoma asineenaaya ni nyuupasaya sinimwintakasiwa. 
Psalms37:16 Fataari vakhaani ya oororomeleya ohikhanle mihakhu sincipale sa atakhali," 
Psalms37:17 niwoko ikuru sa atakhali sinoophwatiwa, mene Yave onaakhavihera oororomeleya." 
Psalms37:18 Yave onkosoopa okumi wa oororomeleya ni yoohiyeriwaaya enoopwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms37:19 Itthu saaheettaka nnene awosa anoopwaneya ni mmahukuni a etala awosa anoovona. 
Psalms37:20 Vaheera atakhali anoophwatiwa. Amwiittana a Yave anoonyaala ntoko ithutu sa ntuphini, elakaseyaka ntoko mwiixi." 
Psalms37:21 Atakhali annakoongora woohiliva, mene oororomeleya amvaha ni murima wootheene." 
Psalms37:22 Yaale anreelihiwa ni Yave animwaakhela elapo ntoko yoohiyeriwa, vaheera yaale onaalaphaawe, anoophwatiwa." 
Psalms37:23 Yave aahakalalelaka mweettelo wa mutthu, Owo onlipiha malipaawe." 
Psalms37:24 Naari akwakwathuwaka, khamora, niwoko Yave onoomukaphula." 
Psalms37:25 Kaari mmiravo ni vano koohuuluvala, mene nkinamooneru oororomeleya ahiiweene, hata anamwanaawe evekelaka yooca." 
Psalms37:26 Mahuku ootheene kimmoona oomaaleleyeene, oolihihaka ni murima wootheene; anamwanaawe anooreelihiwa." 
Psalms37:27 Musembe soonanara ni mpake yooreera ni munookhala mweelaponi mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms37:28 Vano Yave onaasivela oororomeleya ni khanaahiya oosiveleyaawe. Awosa anookosoopiwa mahuku ootheene, mene ikhapira sa atakhali sinoophwatiwa." 
Psalms37:29 Oororomeleya animwaakhela elapo, enakhalamo mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms37:30 Eyano ya mulopwana oororomeleya enghima sa miruku, nluminawe nnuuluma ekhaikhai." 
Psalms37:31 Nlamulo na Mulukwaawe nri mmurimanimwawe; inaawosawe khasinserenguwa. 
Psalms37:32 Mutakhali onimulupattha oororomeleya aasaasaka omwiiva. 
Psalms37:33 Vaheera Yave khanimuhiya mukurunimwawe hata khantthunihera weera oonaniwe nthowa omulattuni. 
Psalms37:34 Mungweherere Yave ni mweette mphironimwawe. Owo onoowunnuwihani weera mwaakhele elapo. Atakhali yaaphwatiwaka, munimoona." 
Psalms37:35 Koomoona mutakhali oowuuma murima unnuwaka kuttu-kuttu ntoko mwiri woopomba. 
Psalms37:36 Wa soothesene, owo oolakaseya woowaakuveya ni khamphwanyiwatho; kiroomwaasaasaru, owo khawowo." 
Psalms37:37 Mwaawehe atthu ookwanela; ngwoone atthu a ekhaikhai; mulopwana a murettele ookhalano ya muhoolo. 
Psalms37:38 Vaheera anamavaanya ootheene anoophwatiwa; muhoolo wa atakhali onoomalamalihiwa. 
Psalms37:39 Ovuluxiwa wa oororomeleya onrweela wa Yave; Owo ti Wootthawelawaya mweehuhuni ya ohasuliwa. 
Psalms37:40 Yave onaakhavihera ni onaavuluxa; Owo ongwoopola mwa atakhali aavuluxaka, niwoko awosa animuroromela Yoowo." 
Psalms38:1 Ii! Yave, muhikihiiheke musaranimwanyu, hata muhikittaruxe moonyoonyiwanimwanyu." 
Psalms38:2 Vano mookihoma ni nyuupasanyu ni ntatananyu nookiphwanya. 
Psalms38:3 Niwoko na isarasanyu erutthwaaka yootheene yoovoreyeya ni mwaha wa sootthekasaka makhuvaaka khaanlipalipa. 
Psalms38:4 Koomireya niwoko na sootthekasaka, aani iya sookivikana." 
Psalms38:5 Makhwattaaka anunkhaxa ni ahuntta niwoko na ololowaaka. 
Psalms38:6 Ehuhu yootheene kineetta kooceelaka wiinuwa oothananeene. Aani nihuku nootheene kinaasa weetta kilalamikaka. 
Psalms38:7 Koosareya xipwexa; erutthwaaka yootheene yoovoreyeya. 
Psalms38:8 Nkinlipalipa kikhalaka oonyoongoweene; kinkhuwela ni murima woothananaxa. 
Psalms38:9 Soohaawelasaka sootheene ti soowoneya vamaithoniwanyu, Yave; Nyuwo munsuwela ohihimerawaka." 
Psalms38:10 Murimaaka onnakitthimaka; ikurusaka soolakaseya ni mpaka maithwaaka khaanoona nnene. 
Psalms38:11 Asinthamwenaaka ootheene ankisemba niwoko na makhwattaaka; aximwaattamanaaka ankhala ottaiwaka. 
Psalms38:12 Yaale anaasa okumaaka ankireya ntapha; yaale antthuna okihasula anuuluma sa ophwatiwawaka. Nihuku ti nihuku annakivaanelela okivariha. 
Psalms38:13 Miyo kinkhala ntoko mutthu oowalana maaru aahiiwaka; ntoko mutthu oohuuluma ohingwera ohula eyanowaawe. 
Psalms38:14 Koothatuwa ntoko mutthu oohiiwa, mwa yoowo ohinaakhula etthu." 
Psalms38:15 Kinoowehererani Nyuwo Yave; Ii! Yave Mulukwaaka munookiiwa. 
Psalms38:16 Vano keenre: “Awosa ehikihakalalele naari ehikiwine miyo kaamoraka.” 
Psalms38:17 Miyo kihanle vakhaani omora ni kinnoona ovoreya nihuku ti nihuku. 
Psalms38:18 Kinlapa soonanarasaka ni koothananiheya ni sootthekasaka. 
Psalms38:19 Yaale ari amwiittanaaka aatepa waatta ni yaale ankithanya woohinthowa ari ancipale. 
Psalms38:20 Yaale ankaakakhanyihera yooreera ni yoonanara ankuuluma miyo kaattharaka yeeyo eri yooreera. 
Psalms38:21 Ii! Yave, muhikihiyeke naari muhikirakamele, Mulukwaaka." 
Psalms38:22 Ngweeke woowaakuveya weera mukikhavihere, Yave Mvuluxaaka." 
Psalms39:1 Keenre: “Kinoowehaweha mweettelowaaka ni nkinttheka ni maswaaka. Nkuuluma etthu atakhali ereene mukhwipimwaka.” 
Psalms39:2 Wa soothesene, kaaraaka emaalelo kihuulumakaru etthu, othananawaka waamutepa." 
Psalms39:3 Murimaaka waamukivava. Miyo kitthokelelaka, waamutepa okivava. Vanonto kaapacera weera:" 
Psalms39:4 “Ii! Yave, mukoonihere ommaleloni wa okumaaka ni mahuku mahai ahanle; mukisuweliheke moota omviraaya okumaaka." 
Psalms39:5 Waatta wa okumaaka ori vakhaani; mahuku a okumaaka khaveetthuwo vamaithoniwanyu. Vekhaikhai okumi wa mutthu onlikana ni ngwiya paahi. 
Psalms39:6 Mutthu omvira, anahokolowa ntoko munttuusi paahi. Owo ontthukhuruwa siiyo athukumanyihaka mihakhu, mene khansuwela taani anaahaleno." 
Psalms39:7 Mene vano Yave, kiwehererekeni? Ororomelawaka ti mwa Nyuwo." 
Psalms39:8 Mukivuluxe mwa sootthekasaka sootheene; muhaahiye alolo ekitthebwaka. 
Psalms39:9 Kiri emaalelo, kihihulaka eyanowaaka, niwoko ti Nyuwo mpanke yeeyo." 
Psalms39:10 Mvenxeke wa miyo ohoxawanyu; koomoroxiwa ni okimanawanyu. 
Psalms39:11 Nyuwo munaattaruxa ni munaalaka atthu niwoko na sootthekasaya; mumphwata mihakhusaya ntoko tthumpwiha – mutthu onlikana ni ngwiya paahi. 
Psalms39:12 Mwiiwe nivekelonaka Yave; mwiiweke okhuwelelawaka ekhavihero. Muhimaale miyo kiinlaka. Vano kiri ntoko namarwaanyu omvira – ntoko yaaraaya makholowaaka. 
Psalms39:13 Muhuluxe maithwaanyu wa miyo weera kihakalaletho kihinaaye miyo opwaha kihooneyaka.” 
Psalms40:1 Koongweherera Yave ni ovilela; Owo ookiweha, aniiwa okhuwelawaka." 
Psalms40:2 Ookikhumiha muhimeni ya ophwata; murattani na ittoko. Aakeemexa vamwala akivahaka nipuro noolipa weera keemele. 
Psalms40:3 Aakivaha ecipo enyowani; ecipo yoomutthapela Mulukwaahu. Ancipale animoona yeeyo, yooveke ni anoomuroromela Yave." 
Psalms40:4 Ooreelihiwa ti yoole onimuroromela Yave; yoole ohinaatthara oowiixoona, hata ohintthara miluku soolokottha." 
Psalms40:5 Yave, Mulukwaaka, sootikhiniha mumpakaanyu ti sincipale. Soowuupuwelasanyu sooreera mwaha wa hiyo ti soohaalikeleya. Kaatthuna wuuluma ni olaleiya sa seiye, nkingwera, seenre saattaxa." 
Psalms40:6 Khamuntthuna sooveleela soohiyanahiyana, mene moothorola maaruwaaka. Khamuntthuna sooveleela soohisa ni sa soottheka." 
Psalms40:7 Vano keenre: “Miyo kiri va – yeeyo elempwale mulivuruni ti mwaha wa miyo. 
Psalms40:8 Kintthuna opaka otthunawanyu Mulukwaaka; Nlamulonanyu nri mmurimanimwaka.” 
Psalms40:9 Kinlaleiya ekhaikhai mmuthukumanoni mutokotoko; nkimmaala, Yave, ntoko musuwenlaanyu." 
Psalms40:10 Nkiniipithiha ekhaikhaiyaanyu mmurimanimwaka; kinuuluma sa ororomeleyawanyu ni ovuluxawanyu. Nkiniipithiha osivelawanyu naari ekhaikhaiyaanyu mmuthukumanoni mutokotoko. 
Psalms40:11 Muhikikhoottihere ikhararisanyu Yave; osivelawanyu ni ekhaikhaiyaanyu ekaakihe mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms40:12 Vano sookacamiha soohaalikeleya sookirukureera; sootthekasaka sookiphwanya ni nkingwera woona. Seiye sohaattaxa opwaha mayihaaka ni murimaaka wooporora. 
Psalms40:13 Yave, woosiveleni okitapuxa; Ii! Yave mwaakuveke weera mukikhavihere." 
Psalms40:14 Ootheene anaasa okumaaka yuulihiheyeke muru ni erukureeriheiyeke muru; ootheene antthuna ophwatiwawaka ehokoloweke oonyooseyeene. 
Psalms40:15 Yaale ankeerela: Ahe! Ahe! yiituthuwe niwoko na erisaaya. 
Psalms40:16 Vaheera ootheene angwaasani ehakalale mwa Nyuwo; yaale ansivela ovuluxawanyu yeere mahuku ootheene: “Atthapeliwe Yave!” 
Psalms40:17 Vano wa miyo, ti oohaawa ni oothoiwa. Hata hiiho Yave onnikitthukuruwela. Nyuwo ti ekhaviherowaaka ni woopoliwawaka. Ii! Mulukwaaka, muhipise!" 
Psalms41:1 Ooreelihiwa ti yaale anaapwattha oohaawa; Yave onimwaavuluxa mweehuhuni yoohooxa. 
Psalms41:2 Yave onoomwaakiha ni onoothokorora okumaawe, anamuhakalaliha mweelaponi, ahimwinnyereraka mmatatani mwa amwiittanaawe." 
Psalms41:3 Yave onoomukhavihera vanikwakhwani ni onoomuhokoloxera okumi. 
Psalms41:4 Keenre: “Ii! Yave, mukimorele ikharari; mukilamihe niwoko kohootthekelani.”" 
Psalms41:5 Amwiittanaaka ankuulumela soonanara yeeraka: “Onkhwa yaakhani? Nsinanawe nnimalamale yaakhani?” 
Psalms41:6 Imaara sootheene mukina a yaale onkixekuraawe, onnuuluma ithiru. Murimaawe onsariha soowaapa, anapwaha, anamwaraxela onkelaawewo." 
Psalms41:7 Amwiittanaaka ootheene annikuuluma yuupuwelaka yootepaxa wa miyo, yeeraka:" 
Psalms41:8 “Eretta yoonanaraxa yoomphwanya; ori vanikwakhwani ni khanlamatho.” 
Psalms41:9 Mpaka nthamwenaaka xaxaxa mwa yoowo kaamuroromelaaka – yoole aaca epaawu vamoha ni miyo, ookirukunuwela." 
Psalms41:10 Wa soothesene, Nyuwo, Yave, mukimorele ikharari; mukilamihe weera kaarulele ikukuttula." 
Psalms41:11 Koosuwela weera kiri oosiveleyaanyu, niwoko amwiittanaaka khaankiwina." 
Psalms41:12 Munkikhavihera niwoko na ororomeleyawaka ni munkikhaliha vamaithoniwanyu mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms41:13 Atthapeliwe Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli ni otthapela woohimala. Ame*, aani Ame*." 
Psalms42:1 Okumaaka onoohaawelani Nyuwo, Muluku, ntoko ekhomaci enghaawela maahi oovira." 
Psalms42:2 Okumaaka onimuhaawela Muluku, aani Muluku Mukumi. Nkivolowe yaakhani weera kiixoonihere wa Muluku?" 
Psalms42:3 Yoocaaka ti maithori othana ni ohiyu, atthu ekikohaka nihuku nootheene: “Mulukwaanyu ori woowi?”" 
Psalms42:4 Kuupuwelelaka itthu iye, kinniinla oothananeene, niwoko miyo kaakhovelela orowa ni muloko kihoolelaka wookela Mpaani mwa Muluku. Naavolowamo niipaka icipo sa ohakalala ni sa oxukurela variyari wa atthu a efesteene yeele." 
Psalms42:5 Ii! Okumaaka – muthananenle heeni? Munriipeliwa heeni murima? Munroromele Muluku, niwoko kinoomutthapela Yoowo, Mvuluxaaka ni" 
Psalms42:6 Mulukwaaka. Koothananaxa, tivawo kingwuupuwelelaakani, okhuma elapo ya oYordanu, mmanyaakoni sa oHeremoni mpaka vamwaako oMizari." 
Psalms42:7 Moowiixera oniitthana moowiixera moorumani wa ekhuli; mitekuteku soowali sookikhuneela. 
Psalms42:8 Khula othana Yave onkoonihera osivelawawe ni khula ohiyu ecipowaawe enkhala ni miyo – ti nivekelonaka wa Muluku a okumaaka. 
Psalms42:9 Kaamweerela Muluku Mwalaaka: “Heeni munkittiwalaanyu? Nkivenyereke heeni kaasaka weetta ni kilalamikaka, amwiittanaaka ekihasulaka?”" 
Psalms42:10 Otthebwa wa amwiittanaaka omvolowa mpaka mmakhuvanimwaka. Mahuku ootheene annakikoha: “Mulukwaanyu ori woowi?” 
Psalms42:11 Ii! Okumaaka – muthananenle heeni? Munriipeliwa heeni murima? Munroromele Muluku, niwoko kinoomutthapela Yoowo, Mvuluxaaka ni Mulukwaaka." 
Psalms43:1 Ii! Muluku, moonihere ohikhalanawaka nthowa! Mwaakihe mulattwaaka wa muloko woohiroromeleya! Mukoopole mwa atthu oovariha ni oonanara murima." 
Psalms43:2 Nyuwo ti Muluku, Wootthawelawaka. Mukihiyenreni? Nkivenyereke heeni kaasaka weetta ni kilalamikaka, amwiittanaaka ekihasulaka?" 
Psalms43:3 Mukirumihele waarawanyu ni ekhaikhaiyaanyu – eyo ekeettiheke, ekironghaka omwaakoniwanyu wootteela, mwa weiwo munkhalaanyuwo." 
Psalms43:4 Vano kinoorowa valtaarini* a Muluku mwa Yoowo onkivaha ohakalalaxa. Ii! Muluku Mulukwaaka, kinootthapelaniwo ni makita." 
Psalms43:5 Ii! Okumaaka – muthananenle heeni? Munriipeliwa heeni murima? Munroromele Muluku, niwoko kinoomutthapela Yoowo, Mvuluxaaka ni Mulukwaaka." 
Psalms44:1 Ii, Muluku! Nohiiwa ni maaruwaahu; makholowaahu yaanithalihera seiye mwaapankaanyu mmahukunimwaya; ehuhuweene yeele ya khalayi." 
Psalms44:2 Mohoomola miloko ni matataanyu, munaamakiha makholowaahu mulaponimwaya. Mwaaphwata miloko munaakhaliha nnenesene makholowaahu." 
Psalms44:3 Awosa khayaawinne elapo ni ikatanasaya naari ni ikurusaya; mwaari Nyuwo mwaawinne ni ntatananyu noolopwana, moonowaanyu ni waara wa ekhovaanyu mweenre mwaasivela." 
Psalms44:4 Nyuwo ti Mwenaaka ni Mulukwaaka, ti Nyuwo muningwiniha Yakobe." 
Psalms44:5 Mwa Nyuwo ningwoomola amwiittanaahu; mwa Nsinananyu nnaanyikalasa yaawo anniwanano. 
Psalms44:6 Nkinroromela muupaaka ni ekatanaaka kheenkiwiniha. 
Psalms44:7 Vaheera Nyuwo munnivaha waawina amwiittanaahu; Nyuwo mungwuulihiha muru yaale annithanya. 
Psalms44:8 Ehuhu yootheene nnimvuwiha Muluku ni nnoottottopela Nsinananyu mahuku ootheene. Sela* 
Psalms44:9 Wa soothesene, vano moonihiya ni mooniyeviha; khamunaahoola anakhottwaahu." 
Psalms44:10 Moonihiya naatthawaka amwiittanaahu ni yaale anithannye aanihuhula. 
Psalms44:11 Mooninnyerera weera ninyaanyiwe ntoko ikhondoolo ni moonimwaraxela variyari wa miloko. 
Psalms44:12 Moothumiha mulokwaanyu wa musurukhu vakhaani muhiwinaka moothumihanimwanyu. 
Psalms44:13 Mooniyeviha vamaithoni wa aximwaattamanaahu; nootthebwiwa ni nootheiwa ni yaale ari mukhwipimwahu. 
Psalms44:14 Moonitatuxa oopuheriwa vamaithoni wa miloko; awosa yaanoonaka, ampukunya muru." 
Psalms44:15 Ehuhu yootheene kinnahaawa oyevihiwa ni ekhovaaka yookimora 
Psalms44:16 niwoko na matthebwa a yaale ankuuluma ni ankithanya, aani, niwoko na amwiittana ankiinlela ikukuttula." 
Psalms44:17 Sootheene seiye sinikhumelenle hiyo nihoottiwanleni naari nihihiyale wiiraanawanyu. 
Psalms44:18 Mirimasahu khasinghokoleela ottulu ni inaawosahu khasinghapuwa mphironimwanyu. 
Psalms44:19 Wa soothesene, mooniphwata munitatuxaka nipuro ankhalaayawo akhwatte. Moonikhuneela ni epiphi yooripihana." 
Psalms44:20 Hiyo naattiwanle Nsina na Mulukwaahu hoye hoye neemexenre matataahu miluku sikina soolokottha," 
Psalms44:21 vekhaikhai Muluku aamoona yeeyo eenre asuwela ixiiri sa murima. 
Psalms44:22 Wa soothesene, niwoko na Nyuwo okhwa ori ohoolowahu ehuhu yootheene; nnooniwa ntoko ikhondoolo sinroihiwa owiiviwani." 
Psalms44:23 Ii! Yave, mvenye! Heeni munkonaanyu? Mwemele! Muhinihiye mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms44:24 Muniipithihera heeni ekhovaanyu muttiwalaka ohaawawahu ni ohasuliwawahu? 
Psalms44:25 Hiyo noomoroxeliwa vathi; irutthusahu siri puruwuru. 
Psalms44:26 Mvenye ni munikhavihere. Munivuluxe niwoko na osivelawanyu woohimala. 
Psalms45:1 Murimaaka wootaviwa ni masu ooreeraxa miyo kimuthaliheraka mwene maswaaka a ecipo; nluminaka nri ntoko nipururu na namalepa ooratta. 
Psalms45:2 Nyuwo ti mutthu oosuwanyeyaxa ni eyanowaanyu yoottikittheliwano mahala, eenre Muluku ooreelihani mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms45:3 Ii, Namaweraxa! Muherere ekatanaanyu muyuununi; mwiiwariheno ovuwa ni waaraxa." 
Psalms45:4 Mutthimake moovuwanimwanyu moowineya niwoko na ekhaikhai, ikharari ni ororomeleya. Ntatananyu noolopwana niwereke miteko sootikhiniha." 
Psalms45:5 Nyuupasanyu soowiithihiwa sihomeke mirima sa amwiittana a mwene; miloko simoreleke vathi wa inaawosanyu. 
Psalms45:6 Ehicaanyu ya emwene, Muluku, enoopwaherera mahuku ootheene; ekopo ya emwene ya ekhaikhai enookhala ekopo ya omwenaanyu." 
Psalms45:7 Nyuwo munsivela ekhaikhai muthanyaka sootakhala. Tivawo Muluku Mulukwaanyu oothanlalaaweni variyari wa asikhwiinyu oottikitthelakani makhura a ohakalala. 
Psalms45:8 Soowarasanyu sootheene sinunkhela makhura a emira*, alowe* ni kasiya*; mpaani mwa emwene sicaambuliweeneno maino a itthepo, oruma wa ikaruma sa ecipo onoohakalalelani." 
Psalms45:9 Anamwane asithiyana a mamwene ari eriyari ya asithiyanaanyu a oneethi; moonowaanyu woolopwana ori ootthomeriwa a mwene awanreene eyuuma yoorikaxa ya wOfiri. 
Psalms45:10 Mwiiwe, mwaana muthiyana, mooneke ni mwiiwexexe. Muttiwaleke mulokwaanyu ni empa ya atithinyu." 
Psalms45:11 Mwene ootthukeya ni oreerawanyu. Munttittimihe niwoko ti pwiiyaanyu. 
Psalms45:12 Mwaana muthiyana a oTiro onooruuha yoovaha; atthu arino mihakhu sincipale animwaasa murimaanyu wooreera. 
Psalms45:13 Mwaana muthiyana a mwene ti oosareya waara mukwartunimwawe. Ikuwosawe sootthaveliwa eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
Psalms45:14 Awanreene mikaandyo sooxoraxoriwa owo onroihiwa wa mwene; asikhwaawe oowiikosoopa animutthara; ootheenaawo anrowa vamaithoni wa mwene. 
Psalms45:15 Awosa aneetta ehakalalanxeene evolowaka vaate wa mwene ootteeliweene. 
Psalms45:16 Anamwaniinyu asilopwana anookuxa ehice ya asitithaya; munimwaakhaliha anamwane a mwene mweelaponi yootheene. 
Psalms45:17 Kinoopwahereriha wuupuweleliwa nyuwo wa khula ekhapira; tivawo miloko sineeraaya sootthapeleni mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms46:1 Muluku ti Wootthawelawahu ni ikurusahu; ekhavihero yoohimala mweehuhuni ya makacamiho. 
Psalms46:2 Tivawo nihinoovaahu naari elapo etetereyaka ni nyaako simireyaka mphareiyani," 
Psalms46:3 mitekutekusaya sirumaka ni owali ni nyaako sittikinyeyaka moonyoonyiwanimwaya. 
Psalms46:4 Wookhala mooloko mirorasaya singhakalalela esidade ya Muluku, Nipuro Nootteela* onkhalaawewo a Musulusulu." 
Psalms46:5 Muluku ori mwemmo. Kheerwa ettikinyeya. Muluku onimoowa weera akhavihere waaxaaka. 
Psalms46:6 Miloko soonyakuleleya; omwene onnamoramora; Muluku ookhuwela ni elapo ya vathi enootetereya. 
Psalms46:7 Yave a ikuru sootheene ori ni hiyo; Muluku a Yakobe ti nipuronahu noolipaxa. Sela* 
Psalms46:8 Ngweeke ni mooneke miteko sa Yave, milepe oruuhalaawe mulaponi." 
Psalms46:9 Owo ommaliha ikhotto mulaponimu yootheene; Owo onintaka nyuupa anyaanyaka mavaka ahisaka ixikudu* ni mooro. 
Psalms46:10 Mmaaleke ni musuwele weera Miyo ti Muluku. Kinoovuwihiwa variyari wa miloko; kinoovuwihiwa mweelaponimu. 
Psalms46:11 Yave a ikuru sootheene ori ni hiyo; Muluku a Yakobe ti Nipuronahu Noolipaxa. Sela* 
Psalms47:1 Miloko sootheene nyuwo, mwiipe makuphi, munkhuwelele Muluku ni icipo sa ohakalala." 
Psalms47:2 Yave a Musulusulu ti ootikhiniheya; ti Mwene Mutokweene mweelaponimu! 
Psalms47:3 Owo oohiya miloko sikina silamuliwaka ni hiyo, aani miloko weera sikhale vathi wa inaawosahu." 
Psalms47:4 Owo oonithanlela yoohiyeriwaahu, oosiveleyaxa a Yakobe, mwa yoowo aamusivenlaawe. Sela*" 
Psalms47:5 Muluku oowela arukureeriweeneno okhuwela wa ohakalala ni oruma wa mapalapatta. 
Psalms47:6 Mmwiipele Muluku icipo soottottopela; mmwiipele Mwenaahu icipo soottottopela; mmwiipele! 
Psalms47:7 Eenre Muluku akhala Mwene a elapo yootheene; mmwiipele ecipo yootthapela. 
Psalms47:8 Muluku onlamula miloko; Owo ookilaathi vahiceniwawe yootteela. 
Psalms47:9 Maneethi a miloko anthukumana vamoha ni muloko wa Muluku a Abrahaamu, niwoko mamwene a elapo ya vathi anlamuliwa ni Muluku. Owo ori vasulu wa itthu sootheene." 
Psalms48:1 Mutokweene ti Yave omphwanela ottottopeliwa wootheene musidadeni mwa Mulukwaahu, vamwaakoniwawe wootteela." 
Psalms48:2 Mwaakweene yoowo ti wooreeraxa – ohakalala wa elapo ya vathi yootheene. Mwaako Siyoni, esidade ya Mwene Mutokweene, ori ntoko itthomela sa mwaako Zafoni." 
Psalms48:3 Muluku ori mmapuronimwaya oolipaxa; Owo oniixoonihera ntoko Wootthawelawaya. 
Psalms48:4 Mamwene aawaandyeerera anakhottwaaya weera erowele vamoha esidade. 
Psalms48:5 Vaheera yoonakaru yaattenguwa; yaatthawa oowooveene. 
Psalms48:6 Othukumela waahaaphwanyawo; yaavoreiwa ntoko muthiyana ahaleelaka oyara. 
Psalms48:7 Nyuwo mwaaphwata ntoko makula matokotoko a oTarsisi oophwatiwa ni epheyo ya ninkhuma nsuwa. 
Psalms48:8 Ntoko niiwalaahu, vano nohoona musidadeni mwa Yave a ikuru sootheene, musidadeni mwa Mulukwaahu: Muluku munlipiha mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms48:9 Mpaanimwanyu, Yave, hiyo nintthokelela sa osivelawanyu woohimala." 
Psalms48:10 Soottottopeleyasanyu sookwanela ekotenle elapo – hiiho ntoko Nsinananyu; ntatananyu noolopwana noosareya ororomeleya. 
Psalms48:11 Mwaako Siyoni onghakalala; mittetthe sa oYuda sintthapa niwoko na soolakelasanyu sa ekhaikhai. 
Psalms48:12 Mweetteette mukhwipi moothemwene mwa oSiyoni ni mwaalikele itoore* sootheene; 
Psalms48:13 ngwehawehe nnenesene soowiixaakiherasaya ni mapurowaaya oolipaxa weera muthalihere sa seiyo ikhapira sa muhoolo. 
Psalms48:14 Vano Muluku owo ti Mulukwaahu mahuku ootheene; Owo onookhala Namweettihaahu mpaka ommaleloni. 
Psalms49:1 Mwiiwe yeeyo, miloko sootheene nyuwo; mwiiwe, ootheene nyuwo munkhala mweelaponimu," 
Psalms49:2 mukhalaka oottittimiheya naari oohittittimiheya; oohaawa hoye hoye oopuha: 
Psalms49:3 Eyanowaaka enimuuluma ni miruku; masu a murimaaka anooruuha wiiwexexa. 
Psalms49:4 Kinimwiiwa nnenesene yoohimmwa ya musuweli; ni ekhavihero ya makita kinootaphulela ethale. 
Psalms49:5 Nkoova yaarwaaka mahuku oonanara hoye hoye atakhali oolokottha yaakiricaka- 
Psalms49:6 yaale anroromela mihakhusaya, yiikuxereraka ni opuhawaya." 
Psalms49:7 Khawowo ongwera omvuluxa munneiye hata omuliva Muluku nlivo noowiixoopolela. 
Psalms49:8 niwoko nlivo noowiixoopolela khaninthumeya – khaniwoworu nlivo nookwana 
Psalms49:9 weera mutthu akhale wa mahuku ootheene ahoonakaru nihiye. 
Psalms49:10 Vano onnooneya weera anamiruku ankhwa – anaanepa ni alolo ankhwatho yaahiyeraka mihakhusaya akina. 
Psalms49:11 Mahiye eniikhale mapurowaaya oohimala; woomakawaya wa ikhapira sootheene sinttharelana, naari yaarinweene imatta yaattenghaaya masinaaya." 
Psalms49:12 Wa soothesene, mutthu, naari areene namapuha, khampwaherera ni okumi. Ori ntoko inama sinkhwa." 
Psalms49:13 Wu ti ommaleloni wa yaale aniiroromela ni wa anamattharaaya anaakhulela soohimasaya. Sela* 
Psalms49:14 Ntoko ikhondoolo ommaleloniwaya onuukhale okhwa ni okhwawene weiwo onuukhale mukukhulaaya. Mooxeexeloni oororomeleya animwaalamula; mittembosaya sinimuntta mmahiyeni ottai wa impasaya soovuwa. 
Psalms49:15 Vaheera Muluku onimoopola okumaaka munihiyeni; vekhaikhai onookirongha wa Yoowo. Sela* 
Psalms49:16 Muhitthukuruwe mukina athadyiri aandyeereraka mihakhu," 
Psalms49:17 niwoko aakhwaaka kheewo aneeraawe akuxe. Mihakhusawe khasimuhoola. 
Psalms49:18 Naari uupuwela weera ooreelihiwa owo nlelo areene mukumi yeenre atthu yaamuttottopela niwoko na opuha," 
Psalms49:19 owo onoothukumanyiheya ni makholowaawe, mwa weiwo ohinooneyaayawo waara wa okumi." 
Psalms49:20 Mutthu naari areeneno mihakhu aahiiwexexaka ori ntoko inama sinkhwa. 
Psalms50:1 Yave, Muluku ooweraxa, onuuluma alattulaka elapo ya vathi okhuma ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkelaayawo." 
Psalms50:2 oSiyoni, ophwaneliwa wookwanela, Muluku onnaaraxa." 
Psalms50:3 Mulukwaahu onimoowa ni khamaala; mooro omvarela ohoolowawe arukureeriweene ettheku. 
Psalms50:4 Oniitthana wiirimu osulu ni elapo ya vathi weera athorihe mulokwaawe: 
Psalms50:5 “Mwaathukumanyihe ohoolowaka oororomeleyaaka, nyuwo mumpaka wiiraana ni Miyo, mookipakelani sooveleela.”" 
Psalms50:6 Wiirimu onlaleiya ekhaikhaiyaawe, niwoko Muluku muneenaawe ti Mphuki. Sela*" 
Psalms50:7 Mwiiwe mulokwaaka niwoko kinimuuluma; mwiiwe oYixrayeli ni kinimookhalelani onamoona: Miyo ti Muluku, Mulukwaanyu!" 
Psalms50:8 Nkinoohiihani niwoko na sooveleelasanyu naari sooveleelasanyu soohisa mwa seiyo munkiveleelelaanyu mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms50:9 Nkinghaawela emombe elopwana naari ipuri sa munikhoolanimwanyu," 
Psalms50:10 niwoko asinama ootheene a mutuphini ti awaka nitho mihuwo sa mmattumuxani oohaalikeleya. 
Psalms50:11 Koosuwela ipalame sootheene sa mmanyaakoni ni soopattuxiwa sootheene sa ntuphini ti sawaka. 
Psalms50:12 Kaavoliwe etala, nkooleelani niwoko elapo ya vathi ni sootheene sirimo ti sawaka." 
Psalms50:13 Weeraka Miyo kinookhuura imombe hoye hoye kinoowura ephome ya ipuri? 
Psalms50:14 Mumpakele Muluku sooveleela sootthapela, mukwanihere soomuroromelihasanyu a Musulusulu." 
Psalms50:15 Mukikhuwelele nihuku na othanana – Miyo kinoowopolani ni nyuwo munookittittimiha. 
Psalms50:16 Vaheera wa atakhali Muluku oneera: “Khoontthunihereya weera nyuwo mulaleiye malamulowaaka naari muulume sa wiiraanawaka.” 
Psalms50:17 Nyuwo munthanya soolakasaka mureraka ettuli maswaaka. 
Psalms50:18 Mwaamoonaka namwiiya, munoomutthara; muniithukumanyiha ni anamararuwa." 
Psalms50:19 Mumvarela muteko eyanowaanyu wuuluma soonanara ni muneettiha nuulumonanyu weera mulokotthe. 
Psalms50:20 Emaara ti emaara mummuuluma munninyu, mmwaapaka munninyu xaxaxa." 
Psalms50:21 Moopaka sootheene iyo ni koomaala. Muupuwela weera Miyo kinoolikana ni nyuwo, mene kinimoohiihani ni kinimoothorihelani ttunda-ttunda." 
Psalms50:22 Muupuwele sa seiya, nyuwosa munimuttiwala Muluku. Ohiyanawaya kinimoophwatani woomalela, ahikhalaka oowoopolani." 
Psalms50:23 Yoole ompaka sooveleela sootthapela onkittittimiha Miyo ni owo onreherera ephiro weera kimoonihere ovuluxa wa Muluku. 
Psalms51:1 Ii, Muluku! Mukimorele ikharari niwoko na osivelawanyu woohimala; mucipihe sootthekasaka soonanara niwoko na murimaanyu wooreera." 
Psalms51:2 Mukirapihe wa soonanarasaka sootheene ni mukitteelihe wa sootthekasaka. 
Psalms51:3 Vano kinsuwela sootthekasaka soonanara ni soohiyanyihasaka sinnakittharatthara. 
Psalms51:4 Kohootthekelani Nyuwo paahi, kipakaka yeeyo eri yoonanara vamaithoniwanyu moota wooweera nthorihelonanyu ti na ekhaikhai ni moophwanela okittaruxa." 
Psalms51:5 Vekhaikhai kiri namattheka eyareliwaaka; aani okhuma ehuhu yaakirupanlaaya amayaka. 
Psalms51:6 Koosuwela weera muntthuna woona ekhaikhai mpuwamwaka; munkixuttiha miruku mmurimanimwaka. 
Psalms51:7 Mukitteelihe ni hisopo* ni kinootteeliheya; mukirapihe ni kinookhala ootteelaxa opwaha etthabwe. 
Psalms51:8 Mukiiwihetho ohakalala ni otteeliwa murima; makhuva mwaapwenxaanyu ehakalaleke! 
Psalms51:9 Mwiipithihe ekhovaanyu wa sootthekasaka ni mucipihe soonanarasaka sootheene. 
Psalms51:10 Ii Muluku! Mpattuxe murima wootteela mpuwamwaka ni mukirehererele munepa woohihoveleya. 
Psalms51:11 Muhikoomole vamaithoniwanyu hoye hoye muhikivenxere Munepaanyu Wootteela. 
Psalms51:12 Mukitthunihereke woonatho ohakalala wa ovuluxawanyu ni mukilipihere ni murima woolikaneene wiiwelela. 
Psalms51:13 Vano kinimwaaxuttiha ephirowaanyu atakhali ni anamattheka anoohokoleela wa Nyuwo, Muluku." 
Psalms51:14 Ii! Muluku, Nyuwo munkoopola, mukivuluxe mmathowani a ephome ni nluminaka nnoolaleiya ororomeleyawanyu." 
Psalms51:15 Ii! Yave, mukivaheke masu ni eyanowaaka enoolaleiya ottottopeleyawanyu." 
Psalms51:16 Mwaatthuna sooveleela hoye hoye sooveleela soohisa, saano kooruuhenleeneni." 
Psalms51:17 Sooveleela Muluku ontthunaawe ti munepa woosareya olapa; Nyuwo, Muluku khamunramusa murima woorukunuwa ni woowiiyeviha." 
Psalms51:18 Niwoko na murimaanyu wooreera, mweettiherele nnene oSiyoni; murasele exiri ya oYerusaleemu." 
Psalms51:19 Vano nsikhale sooveleela sa ekhaikhai; sooveleela soohisa soohiyanahiyana weera soohakalaliheni. Aani imombe ilopwana sinoopakeliwa sooveleela valtaariniwanyu. 
Psalms52:1 Ecipo ela yaalempwale ehuhuweene yeele Doweki, ngwEdomi, aarongwaawe wa Sawuli, anamuthalihera: “Davide oorowa vaate wa Ahimeleki.” Nyuwosa asilopwana ooweraxa, heeni mumvuwihaanyu soonanara? Murima wooreera wa Muluku ompwaherera nihuku ti nihuku." 
Psalms52:2 Nluminanyu nimvaanela ophwata, nri ntoko navaya oowiitha noosareya olokottha." 
Psalms52:3 Munsivela soonanara ohiya sooreera; masu oolokottha ohiya wuuluma ekhaikhai. 
Psalms52:4 Ii! Nlumi noolokottha, nyuwo munsivela masu oonanara!" 
Psalms52:5 Vekhaikhai Muluku onimoophwatanitho khuluwi. Owo onimoovarani oovenxakani muheemanimwanyu ni onimoovenxani mweelaponi mwa akumi. 
Psalms52:6 Atthu oororomeleya animoona yeeyo, yooveke; animwaatheya, yeeraka:" 
Psalms52:7 “Vano, ori va mulopwana, mwa yoowo ohimwaakhenle Muluku ntoko Yoowiixaakiheraawe, aroromelaka mihakhusawe sitokotoko ni mitekosawe soonanara." 
Psalms52:8 Vaheera miyo kiri ntoko mwiri wa sooliveira* onttuva vaate wa Muluku; kinroromela osivela woohimala wa Muluku.” 
Psalms52:9 Kinimootthapelani mahuku ootheene niwoko na yeeyo mpankaanyu; kinoororomela Nsinananyu, niwoko nno ti nooreeraxa. Kinimootthapelani variyari wa ootteelaanyu." 
Psalms53:1 Mulolo oneera mmurimanimwawe: “Khawowo Muluku.” Awosa arino mirima soonanara ni iphirosaya siri sa mwiikho. Khawoworu ompaka yooreera. 
Psalms53:2 Muluku ari wiirimu onaaweha atthu a elapo ya vathi weera oone aakhanleene mutthu oniiwexexa; akhalaru ommwaasa Muluku. 
Psalms53:3 Ootheene aahapuwa; aathatuwa a murima woonanara. Khawoworu ompaka yooreera, hata mmoha!" 
Psalms53:4 Yaawo ampaka soonanara khaanxuttera. Awosa ankhuura mulokwaaka ntoko enkhureliwaaya yooca ni khaammwiitthana Muluku. 
Psalms53:5 Moone, aatteenguwaxa oroohiphwanelaru woova. Muluku oommwaramwaxa makhuva a yaale yoowananneni; nyuwo mohaayeviha niwoko Muluku ohaakhootta." 
Psalms53:6 Ii! Weera ovuluxiwa wa oYixrayeli orweele oSiyoni! Muluku aarehereraka mulokwaawe, vano Yakobe ni Yixrayeli anoohakalalaxa!" 
Psalms54:1 Ecipo ela yaalempwale ehuhuweene yeele aZifi yaarongwaaya wa Sawuli, enamuthalihera: “Davide iipinthe variyariwahu.” Ii! Muluku, mukivuluxe mwa Nsinananyu. Mukaakihe ni ikurusanyu." 
Psalms54:2 Ii! Muluku, mwiiwe nivekelonaka; ngwiriyane masu a eyanowaaka." 
Psalms54:3 Anamarwa anookiwanano; atakhali anaasaasa okumaaka – atthu ahinimpwattha Muluku. Sela* 
Psalms54:4 Vekhaikhai Muluku ti ekhaviherowaaka; Yave ti Yoole onkilipiha. 
Psalms54:5 Soonanara saahokoleeleke yaale ankaapa miyo. Mwaaphwate moororomeleyanimwanyu. 
Psalms54:6 Kinimoopakelani yooveleela ya otthunawaka; miyo kinootthapela Nsinananyu Yave, niwoko ti nooreeraxa." 
Psalms54:7 Vano Owo ookoopola mwa moothanananimwaka moothemwene ni maithwaaka ahoona owiniwa wa amwiittanaaka. 
Psalms55:1 Ii! Muluku, mwiiwe nivekelonaka; muhiramuse wiidyoonttelelawaka." 
Psalms55:2 Mukiiwe ni mukaakhuleke. Soowuupuwelasaka soosareya milattu ni kooriipiwa murima 
Psalms55:3 woowiiwa onyakula wa amwiittana ni okhuwela wa atakhali. Awosa anaandyeerera ohaawawaka, ekithanyaka musaranimwaya." 
Psalms55:4 Murimaaka onookitthimaka, woopiha wa okhwa wookiphwanya." 
Psalms55:5 Woova ni othukumela wookisareya; woovaxa wookivara. 
Psalms55:6 Keenre: Ii! Kaarino mapupha ntoko ekhunda, kaamvava weera kiitthuuwe;" 
Psalms55:7 aani kaamtthawela ottaiwenexa, kikhalaka munikareni. Sela*" 
Psalms55:8 Kaamwaakuvela ophwanya nipuro nootthawela, ottai wa isara sa epheyo ni ettheku." 
Psalms55:9 Ii! Yave, mwaarukureerihe nyuru atakhali; muvirikanyihe muulumelowaaya, niwoko kinoona opuhera ni owana musidadeni." 
Psalms55:10 Ohiyu ni othana anneetta muxirinimwaya; soonanara ni sootakhala siri musidade. 
Psalms55:11 Ikuru soophwata simvara muteko musidadeni; soowoopiha ni soowootha siri mmuseweni ehuhu yootheene. 
Psalms55:12 Mwiittana aakiruwanne, kaamvilela; ngwanani aakiwananne, kaamwiixaakiha." 
Psalms55:13 Vaheera ti nyuwo kineettanaaka, mukhwaaka ni nthamwenaaka xaxaxa," 
Psalms55:14 mwa nyuwo keettaakano mmuretteleni wooreeraxa naarowaahu vamoha ni atthu ancipale wa Empa ya Muluku. 
Psalms55:15 Okhwa waaphwanye amwiittanaaka wootutuxereya; awosa ekhuruwele munihiyeni ereeneno okumi, niwoko soonanara simmaka variyariwaya." 
Psalms55:16 Vaheera miyo kimmwiitthana Yave ni Owo onookoopola. 
Psalms55:17 Wiilaka, oxeexelo ni othana kinnakhuwela moothanananimwaka ni Owo onniiwa nsunaka." 
Psalms55:18 Owo onkoopola woomalela mukhottoni arookhalaru ancipale yaale ankiwanano. 
Psalms55:19 Muluku mwa Yoowo onlamula wa mahuku ootheene onookiiwa ni onimwaattaruxa. Sela* Awosa ari asilopwana ahinceendyaru mweettelowaaya ehimoovakaru Muluku. 
Psalms55:20 Mukhwaaka oningwanano nthamwenaawe; owo onnanariha wiiraanawawe. 
Psalms55:21 Maswaawe ari oonyekettheya, mene mmurimwanimwawe yookhala ekhotto; maswaawe ankhala ntoko ooreeraxa ereene ikatana soowiitha." 
Psalms55:22 Mmwinnyerere Yave soocecewukasanyu ni Owo onimookosoopani; Owo khatthuniheraru weera oororomeleya amore. 
Psalms55:23 Vaheera Nyuwo, Muluku, munaakuruxela atakhali munlittini na ophwata. Anamapuhera ni anamwiiva khaankwanihera eriyari ya mahukwaaya a okumi. Wa soothesene, wa mpattaaka, kinoororomelani Nyuwo." 
Psalms56:1 Ecipo ela yaalempwale ehuhuweene yeele aFilisti yaamvanraaya Davide oGati. Ii! Muluku, mukimorele ikharari, niwoko atthu annakittharelelaxa; ehuhu yootheene annakiwanano ekihasulaka." 
Psalms56:2 Yaale ankaapa annakittharelela ehuhu yootheene. Ancipale ankiwanano ngwiixoonanimwaya. 
Psalms56:3 Miyotho, koovaka, nkoororomeleni Nyuwo." 
Psalms56:4 Mwa Muluku, mwa Yoowo maswaawe kintthapelaaka, mwa Muluku Owo kinnimuroromela ni nkoova. Anaakipakeleni mutthu onkhwa?" 
Psalms56:5 Ehuhu yootheene annavaanya maswaaka; ankuupuwelela weera ekinanarihe. 
Psalms56:6 Awosa amvaanela, anniireherera otuphela kimviraakamo, angwehaweha malipaaka – oolikaneene okiiva." 
Psalms56:7 Muhaahiyeru etthawaka atakhali awo; Ii! Muluku, mphwate miloko moonyoonyiwanimwanyu." 
Psalms56:8 Muupuwelele olalamikawaka; mulepe maithoraaka mpaphelonimwanyu – vekhaikhai alempwale mulivurunimwanyu. 
Psalms56:9 Miyo kaamvekelaka ekhavihero Muluku, amwiittanaaka anoohokolowa. Hiiho kinoosuwela weera Muluku ori ni miyo." 
Psalms56:10 Kinimuroromela Muluku, mwa Yoowo maswaawe kintthapelaaka, mwa Yave, mwa Yoowo maswaawe kintthapelaaka –" 
Psalms56:11 kinimuroromela Muluku. Nkoova – anaakipakeleni mutthu onkhwa? 
Psalms56:12 Ii! Muluku! Seiyo koororomelinghaakani kintthuna okwanihera; kinimoopakelani sooveleela sootthapela. 
Psalms56:13 Nyuwo mookoopola mookhwaani ni inaawosaka weera sihikwakwathuwe keette vamaithoni wa Muluku ngwaarani wa okumi. 
Psalms57:1 Ecipo ela yaalempwale ehuhuweene yeele Davide aamutthangwaawe Sawuli arowaka munikhukuni. Mukimorele ikharari – Ii! Muluku, mukimorele ikharari, niwoko okumaaka ontthawela mwa Nyuwo. Kintthawela mmunttuusini mwa mapuphaanyu mpaka soowoopiha sineeraaya sivire." 
Psalms57:2 Kinimukhuwelela Muluku a Musulusulu, Muluku mwa Yoowo onkikwaniherela otthunawawe." 
Psalms57:3 Wiirimu Owo onkirumihela ovuluxa, awoomolaka yaale ankittharelelaxa. Sela* Muluku onrumiha osivelawawe ni ororomeleyawawe." 
Psalms57:4 Miyo kooriciwa ni amwatto; kiniixaatalela vamoha ni axinama ooluma – mainowaaya ari mavaka ni nyuupa ni malumaaya ari ikatana soowiittha. 
Psalms57:5 Mvuwihiwe Muluku osulusulu wiirimu; ovuwawanyu okhaleke mweelaponi yootheene. 
Psalms57:6 Awosa aakireya muraakho – koothananiheya. Yaathipa elakasa mphironimwaka, vaheera yaamorelamo asineenaaya. Sela*" 
Psalms57:7 Murimaaka ti woomaaleleya, Muluku, murimaaka ti woomaaleleya. Kinimwiipa icipo sootthapela." 
Psalms57:8 Mvenyeke okumaaka; mvenyeke makita ni lira*. Olelo kintthuna oxiiha. 
Psalms57:9 Ii! Yave, kinimoottottopelani variyari wa miloko; kinimwiipa sa Nyuwo variyari wa ilapo." 
Psalms57:10 Vano osivelawanyu ti otokotoko omphiya wiirimu; ororomeleyawanyu omphiya mmahutteni. 
Psalms57:11 Mvuwihiwe Muluku osulusulu wiirimu; ovuwawanyu okhaleke mweelaponi yootheene. 
Psalms58:1 Weeraka nyuwosa anamalamula munuuluma ekhaikhai? Weeraka nyuwosa munthoriha moota woororomeleya? 
Psalms58:2 Hoye! Mmurimanimwanyu mumvaanelela ohiroromeleya, ni matataanyu mummwaramwaxa nipuhero mweelaponimu." 
Psalms58:3 Hata okhuma oyariwawaya atakhali antthara ephiro yoonanara; awoosa yaari atakhali nlelo ereene mmirimani mwa amayaya. 
Psalms58:4 Wamwaaya ori ntoko a inowa; aniipakiha oohiiwa ntoko enowa 
Psalms58:5 ehitthunaka wiiwelela ecipo ya namwiipela inowa orookhalaru ooweraxa. 
Psalms58:6 Ii! Muluku, mpwexe maino mmwaanomwaya; Ii! Yave, mukhule mirondye sa amwatto awo." 
Psalms58:7 Awosa elakaseyeke ntoko maahi ankhwalala; awosa yaatheteyaka muupa, nyuupasaya sikhaleke soohinoneya." 
Psalms58:8 Ekhaleke ntoko nantta ontothowa mphironi; ehoone nsuwa ntoko mwaana oovirela weiwo. 
Psalms58:9 Sihinaaye ikarikhosaya okukheliwa mooro wa ikhuuni ikitthi hoye hoye soowuuma, atakhali ekweseriwe ottaiwene." 
Psalms58:10 Atthu oororomeleya anoohakalala yiinleliwaka ikukuttula, yaarapihaka inawosaya mphomeni mwa atakhali." 
Psalms58:11 Vano atthu eniyeere: “Vekhaikhai oororomeleya nlelo anaakhela ntthuvelonaya; vekhaikhai ookhala Muluku onthoriha elapo ya vathi.” 
Psalms59:1 Ecipo ela yaalempwale ehuhuweene yeele Sawuli aaruminghaawe atthwaawe owehaweha vaate wa Davide weera emwiive. Ii! Muluku, mukoopole mwa amwiittanaaka; mukaakihe mwa yaale ankiwanano." 
Psalms59:2 Mukoopole mwa atakhali ni mukivuluxe mwa anamwiiva. 
Psalms59:3 Moone moota awosa ankithurumelaaya! Atthu oowuuma murima ankivaanelela kiroohipahularu naari kiroohitthekaru. 
Psalms59:4 Nkipanke etthu yoonanara; hata hiiho awosa antthuna okiwanano. Mvenye weera mukikhavihere ni moone moota kiraaka! 
Psalms59:5 Ii! Muluku a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a aYixrayeli, mvenye weera muttaruxe miloko sootheene. Muhaamorele ikharari anamavariha oonanara. Sela*" 
Psalms59:6 Awosa anghokolowa oxekuwa ewuwaka ntoko alapwa eviraviraka musidade. 
Psalms59:7 Moone soowoopopiha sinkhuma mmwaanomwaya – iyanosaya siri ntoko ikatana yeeraka: “Taani anaaniiwe?” 
Psalms59:8 Vaheera Nyuwo, Yave, munimwaatheya, munoonyemula miloko sootheene seiye." 
Psalms59:9 Ii! Ikurusaka, kinimoowehererani; Nyuwo, Muluku ti wiixaakihawaka." 
Psalms59:10 Ii! Mulukwaaka oororomeleya, Owo onimoorwa wa miyo ni onootthunihera weera kaawine amwiittanaaka." 
Psalms59:11 Wa soothesene, muhiwiive yaale, Yave, Yoowiixaakiheraahu, weera mulokwaaka ohittiwale. Mukurunimwanyu mwaamwaramwaxe ni mwaavonye." 
Psalms59:12 Awosa evariweke ngwiixoonanimwaya niwoko na soottheka sa iyanosaya ni na maswaaya oonanara. Niwoko na soolaphasaya ni soowoothasaya 
Psalms59:13 mwaalalihe musaranimwanyu; mwaalalihe mpaka ehooneyetho. Hiiho enimwiiwanyeya mweelaponi yootheene weera Muluku onlamula oYakobe. Sela* 
Psalms59:14 Awosa anghokolowa oxekuwa ewuwaka ntoko alapwa eviraviraka musidade. 
Psalms59:15 Amviravira yaasaka sooca ni yaahivona, ankhuwela ohiyuweene owo." 
Psalms59:16 Vaheera miyo kinimwiipa sa ikurusanyu; oxeexelo kinimwiipa sa osivelawanyu, niwoko Nyuwo ti Olipawaka ni Nipuronaka nootthawelamo mweehuhuni ya makacamiho." 
Psalms59:17 Ii! Ikurusaka, kinimootthapelani; Nyuwo, Muluku ti Olipawaka ni Mulukwaaka onkisivela." 
Psalms60:1 Ecipo ela yaalempwale ehuhuweene yeele Davide aawanannaaweno awArami Naharayimi ni awArami Zoba; ehuhuweene yeele Yowabe aahokolongwaawee aavulalihaka awEdomi 12 000 vanreyareyani na Maakha. Ii! Muluku, moonikhootta; moophwata yoowiixaakiheraahu; Nyuwo moonipattihera isarasanyu. Vano munihokoloxeretho wa Nyuwo." 
Psalms60:2 Mooteterexa etthaya enathaleya – muttiye mitarisaya niwoko enookomowa. 
Psalms60:3 Mooviriha mulokwaanyu mweehuhuni soohooxa; moonivaha eviinyu yoorukureeriha muru. 
Psalms60:4 Vaheera mooweemexera eneneero yaale angwoovani weera etthawe nyuupa. 
Psalms60:5 Munivuluxe ni munikhavihere ni ntatananyu noolopwana weera yaale munaasivelaanyu yoopowe. 
Psalms60:6 Muluku ohuuluma vanipuroniwawe nootteela: “Moowinanimwaka kinookawa oXekhemi, kinooringa nreyareya na oSukota." 
Psalms60:7 oGiliyade ni oManaxe ti wawaka; wEfrayimi ti ekapaseetaaka ni oYuda ti ekopowaaka yoolamulela. 
Psalms60:8 oMowabe ti ebasiyaaka kinsuusulelaaka ni wEdomi kimvonyeraakawo ikwakwattasaka; wa oFilistiya kinkhuwelela owinawaka.” 
Psalms60:9 Taani anaakironghe osidade yoolipihiwa? Taani anaakihoole wEdomi? 
Psalms60:10 Vekhaikhai ti Nyuwo Muluku munikhoottiye, muhaahoolaka anakhottwaahu." 
Psalms60:11 Munikhavihere ni amwiittanaahu niwoko ekhavihero ya atthu kheemvareleya muteko. 
Psalms60:12 Kinoowina ni ekhavihero ya Muluku ni Owo onimwaanyikalela amwiittanaahu. 
Psalms61:1 Ii! Muluku! Mwiiwe wiidyoonttelelawaka ni nivekelonaka. 
Psalms61:2 Okhuma ekotenle elapo kingwiitthanani Nyuwo ni murima woovalaveleya. Mukihoole wa mwala ori woorakamaxa okipwaha miyo. 
Psalms61:3 Nyuwo muri wootthawelawaka; Nipuro Noolipaxa nootthawelamo wa amwiittana. 
Psalms61:4 Kintthuna okhala muheemanimwanyu wa mahuku ootheene, kitthaweleka ngwaakihiwani wa mapuphaanyu. Sela*" 
Psalms61:5 Ii! Muluku! mohiiwa soororomelihasaka; mookivaha yoohiyeriwa ya yaale anoova Nsinananyu. 
Psalms61:6 Mpwahererihe mahuku a okumi wa mwene weera akhale ni okumi iyaakha ni iyaakha. 
Psalms61:7 Owo akilaathiki vahiceni ya emwene vamaithoni wa Yave wa mahuku ootheene. Murumihe osivelawanyu ni ororomeleyawanyu weera onkhapelele. 
Psalms61:8 Vano kinoottottopela Nsinananyu wa mahuku ootheene, kikwaniheraka soororomelihasaka khula nihuku." 
Psalms62:1 Mwa Muluku paahi okumaaka onimwiitthuuwa; ovuluxiwawaka onrweela wa Yoowo paahi. 
Psalms62:2 Ti Owo paahi Mwalaaka ni Ovuluxiwawaka. Owo ti Olipawaka – nkirwaru kittikinyiwa. 
Psalms62:3 Mpaka yaakhani muneeraanyu mukiwaneno, ootheene etthunaka okiiva – miyo kiri ntoko exiri yoothetemana ni ntoko etthu yootekeleliwa ehaleelaka omora?" 
Psalms62:4 Awosa antthunaxa okikuruxa vanipuroniwaka na osulu; awosa anghakalalela soowootha. Anreeliha ni iyanosaya, mene anlapha ni soowuupuwela. Sela*" 
Psalms62:5 Okumaaka, mwiitthuuwe mwa Muluku paahi; owehererawaka onrweela mwa Yoowo." 
Psalms62:6 Ti Yoowo paahi Mwalaaka ni Ovuluxiwawaka. Owo ti Olipawaka – nkirwaru kittikinyiwa. 
Psalms62:7 Ovuluxiwawaka ni ottittimiheyawaka onrweela wa Muluku; Owo ti Mwalaaka oolipa ni Wootthawelawaka. 
Psalms62:8 Ii! Muloko, munroromele Yoowo mahuku ootheene; mmoonihere mirimasanyu sootheene, niwoko Muluku ti Wootthawelawahu." 
Psalms62:9 Atthu a murima woowiiyeviha anlikana ni iphumu paahi; maneethi anlikana ni wootha. Awosa ootheene yaaphimiwaka vamiringoni, olemelawaya khoomphiyera vaphumuni." 
Psalms62:10 Muhiroromele waahasula akina naari muhiixoone mwa itthu soowiiwa. Saandyeerereya mihakhusanyu, muhiroromele seiyo." 
Psalms62:11 Muluku aahuuluma, ni miyo kohiiwa nnenesene: Owera ti wawawe." 
Psalms62:12 Osivela woororomeleya ti wawinyu, Nyuwo, Yave. Vekhaikhai khula mutthu munoomutthuvela yeeyo omphwanelaawe." 
Psalms63:1 Ii! Muluku, Nyuwo ti Mulukwaaka – ni murima wootheene kinoowaasani. Okumaaka onoohaawelani ni ekhalelowaaka yootheene enootthunani Nyuwo mweelaponi yoowuumaxa yoohikhala maahi." 
Psalms63:2 Koowoonani vaNipuroni Nootteela*, kiwehawehaka ikurusanyu ni ovuwawanyu." 
Psalms63:3 Eyanowaaka enoovuwihani niwoko osivelawanyu ti wooreerela opwaha okumi. 
Psalms63:4 Kinimoottottopelani mahuku ootheene a okumaaka ni mwa Nsinananyu kinimweemexa matata. 
Psalms63:5 Okumaka onoohakalala ntoko ociiye yooca yoosivaxa. Kinimoottottopelani ni eyano yoosareya ohakalala. 
Psalms63:6 Vakaamaniwaka kingwuupuwelelani Nyuwo; ohiyu wootheene kintthokelela sa Nyuwo. 
Psalms63:7 Mweenre mukhala ekhaviherowaaka, kiniipa ni ohakalala vamunttuusini wa mapuphaanyu." 
Psalms63:8 Okumaaka onoovarexexani Nyuwo; Ntatananyu noolopwana ninkilipiha. 
Psalms63:9 Vaheera yaale anaasaasa okumaaka anoophwatiwa; anoomorela mulittini noowiixeraxa. 
Psalms63:10 Animwinnyereriwa weera yiiviwe ethatuwaka hiiho sooca sa akhwatte. 
Psalms63:11 Vaheera mwene onoomuhakalalela Muluku. Ootheene yaale anlipela mwa Nsina na Muluku anoomuttottopela, mene iyano sa anamootha sinoomaalihiwa." 
Psalms64:1 Ii! Muluku, mukiiwe, miyo kaattaandawulaka. Mwaakihe okumaaka mwa soowoopiha sa amwiittana." 
Psalms64:2 Mukaakihe moovaanelelani mwa atakhali ni wa munyakunyaku wa mukuttula wa anyali. 
Psalms64:3 Awosa anniithiha malumaaya ntoko ikatana enaanya ni maswaaya ntoko nyuupa soosareya wamwa. 
Psalms64:4 Animulatha mutthu oohinthowa mwa weiwo yiipinthaayawo; animulatha wootutuxereya ehoovaka. 
Psalms64:5 Awosa anlipiherana ni soovaanela soonanara; amvaanela moota woowiipithiha itaphasaya, yeeraka: “Khaawowo eniyoone.”" 
Psalms64:6 Amvaanela epakaka soonanara, yeeraka: “Noovaanela moota wookwanela!” Vekhaikhai, murima ni soowuupuwela sa omutthu woololo!" 
Psalms64:7 Vaheera Muluku onimwaalathela nyuupasawe; anoovulalihiwa woowaakuveya. 
Psalms64:8 Mmasunimwaya anoomoroxana mukina ni mukhwaawe. Ootheene eneera ewoone, animwaapukunyera nyuru, yaatheyaka." 
Psalms64:9 Atthu ootheene a elapo ya vathi animoova; anoolaleiya miteko sa Muluku etthokelelaka seiye opankaawe. 
Psalms64:10 Oororomeleya emuhakalaleleke Yave emutthawelelaka; ootheene a murima woororomeleya emuttottopeleke! 
Psalms65:1 Ii! Muluku! Ottottopela onimoowehererani oSiyoni; hiyo nnookwanihera soororomeliha noopakenlaahuni. 
Psalms65:2 Ii! Nyuwo muniiwa mavekelo, atthu ootheene anoowaattamelani." 
Psalms65:3 Sinilemelaka sootthekasahu, Nyuwo muneenaanyu moolevelela." 
Psalms65:4 Ooreelihiwa yaale Nyuwo mwaathanlalaanyu, mwiiruuhelaka weera ekhale mmapuwanimwanyu. Hiyo noosareya mareeliho a vaatewanyu ni a Empaanyu Yootteela." 
Psalms65:5 Ii! Muluku, Mvuluxaahu, Nyuwo munaakhula ni miteko sootikhiniheya soororomeleya. Nyuwo ti oweherera wa elapo ya vathi yootheene ni mpaka wa iphareiya sa ottaiwene." 
Psalms65:6 Ti Nyuwo mpattunxe nyaako ni ikurusanyu ni owerawanyu otokotoko. 
Psalms65:7 Ti Nyuwo mummaaliha oruma wa iphareiya, oruma wa mitekutekusaya ni minyakunyaku sa miloko." 
Psalms65:8 Amaki a ilapo soorakamela anoova sootikhinihasanyu. Okhuma ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkela nsuwa soopakasanyu sinruuhela icipo soottottopela. 
Psalms65:9 Nyuwo munkosoopa etthaya murupihelaka epula munathadyiriha woomalela. Nyooloko sa Muluku soosareya maahi weera atthu ekhaleno etrigu, niwoko moolamulela hiiho." 
Psalms65:10 Moosariha maahi mittunduruma sa etthaya moothatawaliha moovinavineya. Nyuwo munooloiha ni epula ni munreeliha soohephasaya. 
Psalms65:11 Munreeliha eyaakha ni murimaanyu wooreera ni khula nipuro munrowaanyu ninnaruwereya. 
Psalms65:12 Woocihamo wa munikareni woosareya munyepu ni mattumuxa aaphwaneliheya ni ohakalala. 
Psalms65:13 Imatta soosareya mihuwo ni mareyareya aasareya etrigu; iyo sintthapa, siipaka ni ohakalala." 
Psalms66:1 Munkhuwelele Muluku ni ohakalala, elapo ya vathi yootheene!" 
Psalms66:2 Mwiipe sa ovuwa wa Nsinanawe. Munttottopele moota woovuwaxa! 
Psalms66:3 Mmweereleke: “Mitekosanyu ti sootikhiniheyaxa! Ikurusanyu ti sitokotoko moota wooweera amwiittanaanyu aniipurula ohoolowanyu. 
Psalms66:4 Elapo ya vathi yootheene enookokhorelani Nyuwo. Amakaaya angwiipelani icipo soottottopela; animwiipa icipo soottottopela Nsinananyu.” Sela* 
Psalms66:5 Ngweeke ni moone yeeyo Muluku opankaawe. Miteko aapakenlaawe atthu ti sooreeraxa. 
Psalms66:6 Aatatuxa ephareiya etthaya yoowuuma ni awo yaalapuwa vathi; ngwe, nimuhakalalele." 
Psalms66:7 Owo onlamula wa mahuku ootheene ni ikurusawe; maithwaawe angwehaweha miloko. Anamapuhera ehingwaneno. Sela* 
Psalms66:8 Ii! Miloko, munttottopele Mulukwaahu. Icipo sa omuttottopelawahu siiwiweke!" 
Psalms66:9 Owo ohoopola okumaahu ahitthuniheraka weera inawosahu siserenguwe. 
Psalms66:10 Vano Nyuwo, Muluku moonoota murima; moonitteeliha ntoko entotoxiwaaya ereheriwaka eparatha*." 
Psalms66:11 Moonimoroxela mutaphani munanithateliha mirindi soolemela. 
Psalms66:12 Mwaahaatthunihera atthu oninyikalela nyurusahu; naavira mmooroni ni mmaahini, mene ommaleloni Nyuwo mooniphiiha vanipuroni nooruwereya." 
Psalms66:13 Kinoovolowa Empaanyu Yootteela kikuxaleene sooveleela soohisa, kikwanihereke malipelo koopakenlaakani." 
Psalms66:14 Ti malipeloweene yaale kaaroromelinghaaka ni kuulumaaka xaxaxa kaaraaka moovalavelani. 
Psalms66:15 Kinimoopakelani sooveleela sa axinama ooneneva ni sa anapunci mwa yaawo mwiixaaya onootthuwela wa Nyuwo vamoha ni sa imombe ilopwana ni sa ipuri. Sela* 
Psalms66:16 Ngweeke ni mwiiwe, ootheene nyuwo mummoova Muluku; mukihiye koothalihereni yeeyo okipakenlaawe." 
Psalms66:17 Kaamukhuwelela Yoowo ni eyanowaaka; koomuttottopela ni nlumi. 
Psalms66:18 Kaathokoronre soottheka mmurimanimwaka, Yave khaakiiwa." 
Psalms66:19 Vaheera vekhaikhai Muluku ookiiwa, aakhulaka nivekelonaka." 
Psalms66:20 Muluku atthapeliwe niwoko khakhoontte nivekelonaka ni ohoonihera okisivelawawe. 
Psalms67:1 Muluku animorele ikharari, anireelihe ni anaarihele ekhovaawe Sela*" 
Psalms67:2 weera iphirosanyu sisuweliwe mweelaponimu nitho ovuluxawanyu variyari wa miloko sootheene. 
Psalms67:3 Miloko soottottopeleni Nyuwo Muluku; miloko sootheene soottottopeleni. 
Psalms67:4 Miloko sihakalaleke ni siipeke ni ohakalala, niwoko Nyuwo munlamula miloko moota wa ekhaikhai ni munghoolela miloko sa elapo ya vathi. Sela*" 
Psalms67:5 Miloko soottottopeleni Nyuwo Muluku; miloko sootheene soottottopeleni. 
Psalms67:6 Etthaya enrunwera soohephasaya ni Muluku, Mulukwaahu onoonireeliha." 
Psalms67:7 Muluku onoonireeliha ni elapo ya vathi yootheene enoomoova. 
Psalms68:1 Muluku aweemelele ni amwiittanaawe emwaraxiwe; aani awosa etthaweke ohoolowawe. 
Psalms68:2 Nyuwo mwaalakaseihe ntoko epheyo enlakaseihaaya mwiixi. Ntokotho nnyoma nintothowaaya mukerekhere mooro, hiiho eriheye atakhali vamaithoni wa Muluku." 
Psalms68:3 Oororomeleya ehakalaleke vancipale vamaithoni wa Muluku; awosa ekhaleke oosareya ohakalala. 
Psalms68:4 Mmwiipele Muluku; mwiipe icipo soottottopela Nsinanawe. Mumvuwihe Yoowo oneetta mmahutteni. Nsinanawe ti Yave. Muhakalaleke ohoolowawe.
