Psalms68:5 Tiithi a akwaasuni ni Namwaakiha a asinaamukhweli ti Muluku vaNipuroniwawe Nootteela*. 
Psalms68:6 Wa anamwiixeetta Muluku onnaavaha emusi. Onnaatapuxa anamatthukiwa weera epuhe, mene anamapuhera ankhala mweelaponi yoowuumelela." 
Psalms68:7 Ehuhuweene yeele Nyuwo mwaahoolenlaanyu mulokwaanyu, Muluku, mwaavinraanyu munikareni, Sela*" 
Psalms68:8 vano etthaya yaatetereya ni erimu yaarupiha epula ohoolo wa Muluku, Yoole a oSinayi; ohoolo wa Muluku ori Muluku a oYixrayeli." 
Psalms68:9 Mwaavaha epula yoowaattaxa Muluku, mwaariiriha yoohiyeraanyu yaakhulumungwe." 
Psalms68:10 Mulokwaanyu waahiitekihamo ni mwaahaavaha oohaawa sooreerela sootthuneyaxa niwoko na murimaanyu wooreera. 
Psalms68:11 Yave aahuuluma masu ni anamitthenga ancipale yannalaleiya: 
Psalms68:12 “Mamwene ni anakhottwaaya antthawa woowaakuveya ni asilopwana ankawa soohuhula. 
Psalms68:13 Hata mwaakonaka mukerekhere maikho wa waakonelingwe, mapupha a ekhundaaka aahuruweleliwano eparatha*; mapururuwaaya ni eyuuma yoowaara." 
Psalms68:14 Muluku a ikuru sootheene aamwaranxaawe mamwene mweelaponi, waari ntoko etthabwe vamwaako oZalemoni." 
Psalms68:15 Nyaako sa oBaxani ti nyaako soorakamaxa; soovinavineya ti nyaako sa oBaxani. 
Psalms68:16 Ii! Nyaako soovinavineya! Mungweherani ni nrima mwaako Muluku oothanlalaawe weera akhalewo, mwa weiwo Yave muneenaawe ommakaawewo mahuku ootheene?" 
Psalms68:17 Ikaaro sa ikavalu* sa Muluku ti soohaalikeleya. Yave onrwa mwemmo akhumaka oSiyoni wa Nipuronawe Nootteela*. 
Psalms68:18 Mwaawenlaanyu moowinani osulusulu weera mwakhalewo, Yave Muluku, mwaahaakuxa anamatthukiwa ancipale. Mwaawaakhela atthu ntoko yoovaha – mpakatho anamavaanya." 
Psalms68:19 Yave, Muluku ni Mvuluxaahu atthapeliwe, mwa Yoowo omvilela soolemelasahu khula nihuku. Sela*" 
Psalms68:20 Mulukwaahu ti Muluku omvuluxa. Owo ti Namalamula muneene; Owo ti Yave onnitapuxa mookhwaani. 
Psalms68:21 Vekhaikhai, Muluku onooswanya nyuru sa amwiittanaawe; makarakasa oohileeleya a yaale ampwaherera mootthekanimwaya." 
Psalms68:22 Yave oneera: Kinimwaahokoloxera oBaxani; kinimwaahokoloxera moowiixera mwa ephareiya 
Psalms68:23 weera nyuwo muruweye inawosanyu mphomeni mwa amwiittanaanyu, mwa yeeyo malumi a alapwaanyu eneeraaya ekhaleno woolata.”" 
Psalms68:24 Ii! Mulukwaaka ni Mwenaaka ti woowooneya weettawanyu woowineya. Atthu ammoona Muluku arowaka wa Nipuro Nootteela*. 
Psalms68:25 Anamwiipa a icipo anrowa muhoolo ni vahoolowaya anakaruma a icipo vamoha ni asimwali ewiipaka akarakaxa. 
Psalms68:26 Munttottopele Muluku mmuthukumanoni mutokotoko; munttottopele Yave muloko wootheene wa aYixrayeli. 
Psalms68:27 Moone, ohoolo eri epuumba ekhaani ya Benyamini; vahoolowaya ori nakupa a anamwane a mwene a oYuda nitho anamwane a mwene a oZebuloni ni oNafitali." 
Psalms68:28 Ii! Muluku, moonihere ikurusanyu; Ii! Muluku, munoonihere oweraxawanyu ntoko mwaanipakenlaanyu." 
Psalms68:29 Niwoko na Empaanyu eri oYerusaleemu, mamwene animooruuhelani soovaha." 
Psalms68:30 Muhiihe enama yooluwa variyari wa etiili; mihuwo sa imombe ilopwana variyari wa aximombe a muloko. Yooyevihiweene enruuha mwithi wa eparatha*. Mmwaramwaxe miloko sintthunaxa ekhotto. 
Psalms68:31 Maneethi anrweela wExipitu; oKuxi onimutthimakela Muluku oolemeliweene soovaha. 
Psalms68:32 Ii! Omwene wa elapo ya vathi, mmwiipele Muluku; mmwiipele Yave icipo soottottopela. Sela*" 
Psalms68:33 Mmwiipele Yoowo oneetta wiirimu, erimu ya khalayi. Owiriyane, Owo onkukutteya ni nsu nooweraxa." 
Psalms68:34 Mulaleiye ikuru sa Muluku. Ovuwawawe ori wa oYixrayeli. Ikurusawe siri mmahutteni a osulusulu. 
Psalms68:35 Ii! Muluku, Nyuwo ti oovuwihiwa vaNipuroniwanyu Nootteela*. Muluku a oYixrayeli omvaha mulokwaawe ikuru ni owera. Muluku atthapeliwe!" 
Psalms69:1 Ii! Muluku, mukivuluxe, niwoko kihanle omireya." 
Psalms69:2 Miyo koodora muttokoni moowiixera; inawosaka khasinono woolipano. Koovolowa moowiixa ni miipili anookikumburula. 
Psalms69:3 Kookhulumuwaxa ovekela ekhavihero; wammiilo wookitthukana ni maithwaaka aakixeera engwehereraka vancipale Mulukwaaka. 
Psalms69:4 Yaale ankithanya woohinthowa ahaattaxa opwaha mayihi a mmurumwaka. Aani, ti ancipale ankikacamiha woohinthowa, yaale anaasaasa okiiva. Kinnyesererihiwa ohokoloxa kihiiyalaaka." 
Psalms69:5 Nyuwo Muluku munsuwela nnenesene ohikhalanawaka miruku; nthowanaka khanihiyono noovitheya wa Nyuwo. 
Psalms69:6 Ii! Yave, Yave a ikuru sootheene, yaale anoororomelani Nyuwo ehuulihiheye muru niwoko na miyo. Ii! Muluku a oYixrayeli, yaale angwaasani ehiyeviheye niwoko na miyo." 
Psalms69:7 Vano kooramusiwa niwoko na Nyuwo ni ekhovaaka yoosareya wuuliwa muru. 
Psalms69:8 Kiri namarwa wa axunnaka, mutthu oohisuwanyeya wa anamwane a amayaka." 
Psalms69:9 Nthiti kinkhalelaaka Empaanyu nookisareya ni oruwana wa yaale anooruwanani wookimorela. 
Psalms69:10 Miyo kiinlaka ni kitthukaka, nkinooneliwamo." 
Psalms69:11 Kaawaraka sa othananela, atthu ankipaka mutheelelowaaya." 
Psalms69:12 Yaale ankilaathi vamulako ankuuluma ni kiri icipo sa anamawura. 
Psalms69:13 Vaheera kinimoovekelani Nyuwo, Yave, mweehuhuni yootthuneya. Ii! Muluku, moosivelanimwanyu otokotoko mukaakhuleke ni ovuluxawanyu woolipaxa." 
Psalms69:14 Mukoopole muttokoni weera kihimireye. Mukivuluxe mwa yaale ankithanya ni mmaahini moowiixa. 
Psalms69:15 Muhitthunihere weera miipili ekikumburule, naari weera moowiixera okimire, hata kihuuheeleleye mulittini." 
Psalms69:16 Mukaakhuleke Yave niwoko na osivelawanyu wooreera; mukhararinimwanyu sitokotoko mukiwehe. 
Psalms69:17 Muhimuhuluxere ekhovaanyu murumeiyaanyu; mukaakhuleke woowaakuveya niwoko koovalavelaxa. 
Psalms69:18 Mukaattameleke ni mukivuluxe; mukoopole mwa amwiittanaaka. 
Psalms69:19 Nyuwo moosuwela nnenesene otthebwiwawaka, oyevihiwa ni wuulihihiwa muru. Mohaasuwela amwiittanaaka ootheene." 
Psalms69:20 Otheiwa wookiriipiha murima, nkinoona yooweera! Kaasaasa ikharari, mene nkiphwannye; kaahaadyoonttelela anamapepesa, mene khayaawoworu." 
Psalms69:21 Aahela yoowaawa muyoocanimwaka ni kaavoliwaaka ntthona, yaakivaha eviinyu yoonyuunya." 
Psalms69:22 Meesa yaareherenraaya yaathatuwele muraakho, ikukuttula ni ntapha." 
Psalms69:23 Mwaahele ewiriphi mmaithonimwaya weera ehiwere woona; mwaathukumelihe irutthusaya woohihiyerera. 
Psalms69:24 Saamorele isarasanyu; onyoonyiwawanyu woopatta waaphwanye. 
Psalms69:25 Mookonelamwaya oheleyemo nikare ni ahikhaleru anaakhale muheemanimwaya. 
Psalms69:26 Vano awosa anaasoonda yaale Nyuwo munaavulalihaanyu ni antthekulela sa ovoreya wa yaale munaattaruxaanyu. 
Psalms69:27 Mwaathorihele niwoko na soopakasaya soonanara; muhaatthunihere waakhela mpatta wa ororomeleyawanyu. 
Psalms69:28 Awosa evenxiweke mulivuruni ya okumi, ehaalikeleliwe vamoha ni oororomeleya." 
Psalms69:29 Othananawaka ni ovoreiwawaka ti otokotoko; Ii! Muluku, ovuluxawanyu okaakiheke!" 
Psalms69:30 Kinoottottopela Nsina na Muluku muciponi ni kinoomvuwiha ni icipo sootthapela. 
Psalms69:31 Eyo enoomuhakalalihaxa Yave opwaha yooveleela ya emombe elopwana naari napunci ni minyakasawe ni mapitaawe. 
Psalms69:32 Oohaawa animoona yeeyo, enahakalala. Nyuwosa mummwaasa Muluku, mirimasanyu sikhaleke ni okumi!" 
Psalms69:33 Yave ongwiiwa atthu oohaawa ahiramusaka mulokwaawe wootthukiwa. 
Psalms69:34 Elapo ya vathi ni erimu emuttottopeleke Yave vamoha ni ephareiya ni sootheene sirimo," 
Psalms69:35 niwoko Yave onoovuluxa oSiyoni, onoorasela isidade sa oYuda. Vahoolowaya mulokwaawe onimwiitekihawo okuxaka elapo." 
Psalms69:36 Anamwane a arumeiyaawe animwaakhela ntoko yoohiyeriwa ni yaale ansivela Nsinanawe anoomakamo. 
Psalms70:1 Ii! Muluku, mwaakuveke weera mukivuluxe. Ii! Yave, ngweeke woowaakuveya weera mukikhavihere." 
Psalms70:2 Yaale anaasaasa okumaaka erukureereye nyuru yuulihiheye muru; ootheene antthuna ophwatiwawaka ehokolowe ootapaneene. 
Psalms70:3 Yaale ankeerela: Ee! Ee! ehokoloweke ootapaneene. 
Psalms70:4 Vaheera ootheene angwaasani ehakalalaxe mwa Nyuwo; yaale ansivela ovuluxawanyu yeere mahuku ootheene: “Moota unnungwaawe Muluku!” 
Psalms70:5 Kirookhalaru oohaawaxa ni oothoiwa, Ii! Muluku mukaattameleke woowaakuveya! Nyuwo ti ekhaviherowaaka ni woopoliwawaka. Ii! Yave, muhipise!" 
Psalms71:1 Kootthawela mwa Nyuwo, Yave; muhitthunihere weera kikhale ooyevihiwa." 
Psalms71:2 Mukivuluxe ni mukoopole moororomeleyanimwanyu; mukiiweke ni mukivuluxe. 
Psalms71:3 Mukhaleke Mwalaaka wootthawelamo kineeraaka kivireru. Mulamulele weera kivuluxiwe niwoko Nyuwo ti Mwalaaka ni Wootthawelawaka woolipa. 
Psalms71:4 Ii! Mulukwaaka, mukoopole mwa matata a atakhali; mwa ovara wa atthu a murima woonanara ni woowuuma." 
Psalms71:5 Ii! Yave onlamula sootheene, Nyuwo muri owehererawaka, ororomelawaka okhuma enamwanaaka." 
Psalms71:6 Okhuma oyariwawaka kohoororomelani Nyuwo; Nyuwo mookikhumiha mmirimani mwa amayaka. Kinimoottottopelani wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms71:7 Koothatuwa ethoonyero wa ancipale, niwoko Nyuwo ti Wootthawelawaka woolipaxa." 
Psalms71:8 Eyanowaaka yoosareya woottottopelani; kinlaleiya ovuwawanyu ehuhu yootheene. 
Psalms71:9 Muhikikhootte ngwuuluvalanimwaka, muhikihiyeke saakimalelaka ikuru." 
Psalms71:10 Vano amwiittanaaka annikuuluma; yaale ankiipithela annathukumana evaanelelaka okiiva. 
Psalms71:11 Awosa aneera: “Muluku oomuhiya – munttharatthare, muntthuke niwoko khaawo anaamutapuxe.”" 
Psalms71:12 Ii! Muluku, muhikirakamele; Ii! Mulukwaaka, mwaakuveke weera mukikhavihere." 
Psalms71:13 Yaale ankoothera emwaramwareye ooyeviheyeene; yaale antthuna okipakela yoonanara eveiheye ni yuulihiheye muru. 
Psalms71:14 Vaheera wa miyo – mahuku ootheene kinookhalano oweherera, kitepaka woottottopelani." 
Psalms71:15 Eyanowaaka enoolaleiya ororomeleyawanyu ni ovuluxawanyu ehuhu yootheene kiroohisuwelaru wunnuwawaya. 
Psalms71:16 Ii! Yave onlamula sootheene, kinimuuluma soopakasanyu sa owera. Kinoolaleiya ororomeleyawanyu xaxaxa." 
Psalms71:17 Ii! Muluku, mookixuttiha okhuma enamwanaaka ni mpaka olelo kinnahima mitekosanyu sootikhiniheya." 
Psalms71:18 Ii! Muluku, vano kuuluvanlaaka ni ipwi, muhikihiye, weera kilaleiye ikurusanyu wa anamwaniihu ni owerawanyu wa ikhapira sa muhoolo." 
Psalms71:19 Ororomeleyawanyu omphiya wiirimu; Ii! Muluku moopaka itthu sootikhiniheya. Khaawo onlikana ni Nyuwo. 
Psalms71:20 Naari mukivirihaleene mmakacamihoni moota woovihaxa, munookivahatho okumi munyowani; munookikhumiha moowiixera mwa etthaya." 
Psalms71:21 Munimwaandyeerera ottittimiheyawaka mukipepesakatho. 
Psalms71:22 Ii! Mulukwaaka, kinimoottottopelani ni makita niwoko na ororomeleyawanyu; Ii! Ootteela a oYixrayeli, kinoowiipelani icipo soottottopela ni lira*." 
Psalms71:23 Eyanowaaka enookhuwela ni ohakalala miyo kaawiipelakani icipo soottottopela, niwoko Nyuwo mookoopola." 
Psalms71:24 Kinoolaleiya miteko soororomeleya mahiku ootheene, niwoko yaale yaatthuna okipakela itthu soonanara aayevihiwa, enuulihiheya muru." 
Psalms72:1 Ii! Muluku, mungwarihe mwene ororomeleyawanyu; mwaana a mwene ni ekhaikhaiyaanyu" 
Psalms72:2 weera owo athorihe mulokwaanyu mweekhaikhaiyini ni aathorihe oohasuliwaanyu moota woororomeleya. 
Psalms72:3 Nyaako siruuhele mpuha muloko ni mattumuxa eruuhele soowiima sa ororomeleya. 
Psalms72:4 Owo onnimwaakiha oohasuliwa variyari wa muloko ni onimwaavuluxa anamwane a oohaawa; onoomphwata namahasula. 
Psalms72:5 Owo ooviwe nsuwa noopaka ni mweeri waaraka wa ikhapira sootheene. 
Psalms72:6 Owo akhaleke ntoko epula enrupela mmatta yoohemphwa; ntoko epula etokweene ennaaniha etthaya. 
Psalms72:7 Mmahukunimwawe oororomeleya anoottuva ni weetteleya nnene onimwaatta mpaka ommaleloni wa mweeri. 
Psalms72:8 Owo onoolamula khula ephareiya ni okhuma mooloko Efratesi mpaka ekotenle elapo. 
Psalms72:9 Ipuumba sa munikareni sinoomukokhorela ni amwiittanaawe anoomorela vathi. 
Psalms72:10 Mamwene a oTaresisi ni a iphareiya soorakamela anoomuruuhela soovaha ni hiihotho mapwiyamwene a oXeba ni a oSeba. 
Psalms72:11 Mamwene ootheene anoomukokhorela ni miloko sootheene sinoomurumeela. 
Psalms72:12 Vano Owo onoowoopola oohaawa yaale amvekela ekhavihero; oohasuliwa yaale ahirino oowaakhavihera. 
Psalms72:13 Owo onaamorela ikharari yaale oohilipa ni oohaawa ni onoowoopola oohaawa mookhwaani. 
Psalms72:14 Owo onoowoopola moohasuliwani ni munipuheroni, niwoko okumaaya ti wootthuneyaxa vamaithoniwawe." 
Psalms72:15 Owo akhaleno okumi woowaatta! Eyuuma yoorikaxa ya oXeba avahiweke. Atthu emvekelele woohihiyerereya ni emureeliheke mahiku ootheene. 
Psalms72:16 Etrigu yaatte mweelaponi yootheene – mpaka mmatthomelani mwa mattumuxa; soowiimasaya sittuve ntoko sa oLibanu ni ntoko malaxi a ntuphini. 
Psalms72:17 Nsinanawe nipwaherereke wa mahuku ootheene ni epilaawe elekele nsuwa noopaka. Miloko sootheene sinooreelihiwa mwa yoowo ni awosa anoomweerela ooreelihiwa. 
Psalms72:18 Yave Muluku, Muluku a oYixrayeli attottopeliwe, niwoko Owo paahi ompaka itthu sootikhiniheya." 
Psalms72:19 Nsinanawe noovuwa nittottopeliweke wa mahuku ootheene; elapo yootheene esareyeke ni ovuwawawe. Ame* ni Ame*. 
Psalms72:20 Mpaka va mavekelo a Davide, mwaana mulopwana a Yixai." 
Psalms73:1 Vekhaikhai Muluku ti ooreera murima wa oYixrayeli ni wa yaale ari ootteela murima. 
Psalms73:2 Vano wa miyo, inaawosaka saahanle vakhaani okakathuwa. Kaahanle vakhaani oserenguwa." 
Psalms73:3 Kaahaakhalela nrima oowiixoona koonnaaka siweettelaka nnene atakhali ale. 
Psalms73:4 Awosa khaanghaawa; irutthusaya siri salaama ni soolipasene. 
Psalms73:5 Khaanghaawa ni soovalaveliha sa okumi ntoko akina ni khaanghaawa ni iretta sa atthu akina. 
Psalms73:6 Tivawo wiixoona amvarela muteko wa yoowiiphwaneliha ni awosa aniiwariha nipuhero. 
Psalms73:7 Sootakhala sinkhuma mmirimanimwaya soowuuma; mmuupuwelonimwaya woosareya soovaanela soonanara. 
Psalms73:8 Awosa anderera yuulumaka ni moota woonanara; ngwiixoonanimwaya anoopopiha ni nihasu. 
Psalms73:9 Awosa anuulumela wiirimu moota woowiixoona ni malumaaya aniivahano elapo. 
Psalms73:10 Tivawo mulokwaaya onaarukunuwelaaya ewuraka maswaaya mpaka ovona. 
Psalms73:11 Awosa aneera: “Muluku khansuwela yeela. Muluku a Musulusulu khoonelelaru.” 
Psalms73:12 Mweettelo wa atakhali ti ola: mahuku ootheene khaampwattha etthu yaandyeereraka mihakhusaya. 
Psalms73:13 Vekhaikhai khookivareleiye muteko okhalano murima wootteela ni okhalano matata ooreereene wa soonanara sootheene. 
Psalms73:14 Koohooxiwa mahuku ootheene ni khula oxeexelo kinnattaruxiwa. 
Psalms73:15 Miyo keenre: “Kuulumme ntoko awosa,” saano kaavarihaleene anamwaniinyu." 
Psalms73:16 Miyo keereraaka wiiwexexa sootheene iye, kaahoona weera sookirikela," 
Psalms73:17 mpaka kaavolongwaaka Nipuro Nootteela* na Muluku – vano kohiiwexexa ommaleloni wa atakhali ale. 
Psalms73:18 Vekhaikhai mungwiikaathi vanipuroni nootherera; mohaamoroxela mmathalani. 
Psalms73:19 Awosa amphwatiwa wootutuxereya; esareiyeene otteenguwa woomalela! 
Psalms73:20 Ari ntoko oloha onlakaseya naavenyaka; Ii! Yave, mwaavenyaka, munimwaalakaseiha." 
Psalms73:21 Murimaaka waakiriipalaaya ni okumaaka waasareiyaaya nrima," 
Psalms73:22 nkiiwexexa, kihisuwelakatho etthu. Vamaithoniwanyu kaari ntoko mwaamunama." 
Psalms73:23 Hata hiiho miyo kinkhala ni Nyuwo mahuku ootheene; munkeettiha mukivarenleene moonowaaka woolopwana. 
Psalms73:24 Munkihoolela ni mirukusanyu ni vahoolowaya munookaakhela moovuwanimwanyu. 
Psalms73:25 Khawowo mukina kiraakano wiirimu muhikhanle Nyuwo. Mweelaponi kheewoworu kinghaawelaaka ohikhanle okhala ni Nyuwo. 
Psalms73:26 Enoowereya erutthwaaka ni murimaaka olosowa, mene Muluku ti ikuru sa murimaaka ni yoohiyeriwaaka wa mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms73:27 Moone, yaale yoohiyaleni anooriheya; Nyuwo munaaphwata oohiroromeleya ootheene." 
Psalms73:28 Vaheera wa miyo ti wooreera okhala vakhiviru wa Muluku. Koomuthanla Yave onlamula sootheene ntoko Wootthawelawaka; kinoolaleiya mitekosanyu sootheene. 
Psalms74:1 Ii! Muluku, munnikhoottela heeni wa mahuku ootheene? Simpattela heeni isarasanyu wa ikhondoolo sa muhuwaanyu?" 
Psalms74:2 Muupuwelele mulokwaanyu, mwa yoowo mwaathummaanyu khalayi; epuumba ya yoohiyeraanyu, mwa yeele mooponlaanyu nitho mwaako oSiyoni mwaamankaanyuwo." 
Psalms74:3 Muhokoleele mathala ala oohiraseleya – ophwatiwa wootheene wu amwiittana aruuhenlaaya vaNipuroni Nootteela*. 
Psalms74:4 Amwiittanaanyu yaakhuwela oowineene vanipuroni mumphwanyaneyaanyuwo ni hiyo; yaathomeyaawo eneneerowaaya ya owina. 
Psalms74:5 Yaakhala ntoko asilopwana ekuxaleene ipaso mutorosoni mootthavelana ehekulaka. 
Psalms74:6 Yaakakatthanya ni ipasosaya soohiyanahiyana soopakiwa sooreera sa itthaabwa. 
Psalms74:7 Yaahisa vaNipuroniwanyu Nootteela* woomalela; yaanyoowiha nipuro nimmakaaya Nsinananyu. 
Psalms74:8 Yaaheera mmirimanimwaya: “Nrowe naahasule ootheene moota woovihaxa.” Yaahisa mapuro ootteela ootheene a mulaponi aalapiwaawemo Muluku. 
Psalms74:9 Khanivahiwatho ineneero sootikhiniheya; khaawoworu maprofeeti ni khaawo a hiyo osuwenle omalawaya. 
Psalms74:10 Ii! Muluku, mpaka yaakhani amwiittana eneeraaya yootheyeeni? Weeraka awosa anooderera Nsinananyu wa mahuku ootheene?" 
Psalms74:11 Heeni musungaanyu ntatananyu noolopwana nooweraxa? Muhiikhuraanetho – mwaaphwate! 
Psalms74:12 Vaheera Nyuwo Muluku ti Mwenaaka okhuma khalayi. Nyuwo munruuhela ovuluxa mweelaponi. 
Psalms74:13 Ti Nyuwo mwaakawanyinghe ephareiya ni ikurusanyu; mwaanyakatta nyuru sa inama soowoopihaxa sa mphareiyani. 
Psalms74:14 Ti Nyuwo mwaanyakantte muru wa Levitiyani*, munavaha soopattuxiwa sa munikareni weera sikhuureke." 
Psalms74:15 Ti Nyuwo mwaahunle anaattuuttu ni iphattuwela, mene mwaahuumiha nyooloko sitokweene." 
Psalms74:16 Othana ti wawinyu ni hiihotho ohiyu; Nyuwo moopattuxa nsuwa ni mweeri. 
Psalms74:17 Ti Nyuwo mwaakhalinghe nyiinano sootheene sa elapo ya vathi; moopaka elimwe ni eyiita. 
Psalms74:18 Ii! Yave, muupuwelele moota amwiittana yootheiyaayani ni moota alolo atthembwaaya Nsinananyu." 
Psalms74:19 Muhinnyerere okumi wa ekhundaanyu wa axinama a ntuphini; muhittiwale mahuku ootheene okumi wa mulokwaanyu woohasuliwa. 
Psalms74:20 Muupuwelele wiiraanawanyu, niwoko ilapo sootheene soosareya mapuhero." 
Psalms74:21 Muhaahiyeke oohasuliwa ehokolowaka oowuulihiheyeene muru; atthu oohaawa ni oothoiwa ettottopeleke Nsinananyu. 
Psalms74:22 Ii! Muluku, mvenyeke ni mwaakihe Nsinananyu; muupuwelele moota alolo yootheiyaayani woohihiyerera." 
Psalms74:23 Muhittiwale okhuwela wa amwiittanaanyu; munyakunyaku wa yaale anoothanyani. 
Psalms75:1 Ii! Muluku, nnootthapelani Nyuwo, nnootthapelani, niwoko Nsinananyu nri vakhiviru; ootheene anuuluma sa mitekosanyu sootikhiniheya." 
Psalms75:2 Nyuwo muneera: “Miyo kinthanla ehuhu kineeraaka kithorihe ni ekhaikhai. 
Psalms75:3 Elapo ya vathi ni milokosaya sootheene saatetereyaka, ti Miyo kinlipiha mathipelowaaya. Sela*" 
Psalms75:4 Wa atthu oowiixoona kingweerela: ‘Muhiixoonetho’ ni wa atakhali: ‘Muhikhale anamavaanya.’ 
Psalms75:5 Muhiikuxerere hata muhuulume ni wiixoona!’ ” 
Psalms75:6 Khawowo okhuma ninkhuma nsuwa naari ninkela nsuwa hata onikareni ongwera omvuwiha mukina. 
Psalms75:7 Ti Muluku onthoriha. Mmoha Owo onoomuyeviha ni mukina onoomvuwiha. 
Psalms75:8 Mmatatani mwa Yave yookhalamo ekoomixi yoosareya eviinyu yooxaxa ni yoothiteliwa; Owo ommiinela vathi ni atakhali ootheene a elapo ya vathi angwura mpaka nttonyo noosinsa. 
Psalms75:9 Wa miyo, kinoolaleiya itthu iya mahuku ootheene; kinoomwiipela Muluku a Yakobe icipo soottottopela." 
Psalms75:10 Muluku oneera: “Kinoophwata owera wa atakhali, vaheera ikuru sa oororomeleya kinimwaandyeerera.”" 
Psalms76:1 oYuda Muluku ti oosuwanyeya; Nsinanawe ti ntokweene oYixrayeli. 
Psalms76:2 Eheemaawe enkhala oSalemi; omankaawe ti oSiyoni. 
Psalms76:3 Iwo aahintakawo nyuupa soovarela, ixikudu* ni ikatana – ikapwitthi sa ekhotto. Sela*" 
Psalms76:4 Nyuwo moosareya waara, moovuwaxa opwaha nyaako soosareya inama sa ntuphini." 
Psalms76:5 Iwo asilopwana ooweraxa aahuhuliwa ekonaka ikhove sa okhwa; khawoworu nakhotto owenre weemexa matata. 
Psalms76:6 Niwoko na ohiihawanyu Yave, ikavalu* ni ikaaro khasineettaru." 
Psalms76:7 Ontthuneya owoovani Nyuwo paahi. Khaawo anaawere opwaherera ohoolowanyu Nyuwo munyoonyiweene. 
Psalms76:8 Wiirimu moohima nthorihelo ni elapo ya vathi yohoova, enamaala," 
Psalms76:9 Nyuwo mwaavenyenraanyu othoriha weera mwaavuluxe oohasuliwa ootheene a elapo. Sela* 
Psalms76:10 Mpaka isara munaakhalelaanyu atthu sinimooruuhelani ottottopela ni eniihalahale musaranimwanyu anoohiiheya. 
Psalms76:11 Mumpakele soororomeliha Yave Mulukwaanyu ni mukwanihere; ilapo sootheene soowaattamana simuruuhele samahala Yoole omphwanela wooviwa. 
Psalms76:12 Owo onaakha otthuna wa alamuli; Owo ti oowooviwa ni mamwene a elapo ya vathi. 
Psalms77:1 Kinimukhuwelela Muluku ekhavihero; kinimukhuwelela Yoowo weera akiiwe. 
Psalms77:2 Kaathananaaka, kaamwaasa Yave; ohiyu kannatheteya matata woohihiyerera, mene okumaaka khawaamoona oopepesa." 
Psalms77:3 Ii! Muluku, kaawuupuwelelani Nyuwo, kinahihimera; kaatthokelela ni okumaaka waavolola." 
Psalms77:4 Khamwaakitthunihenre oputiha; kaari ootthukuruwaxa, kihiweraka wuuluma ni Nyuwo." 
Psalms77:5 Kaahuupuwela sa mahuku avinre ni sa ihuhu sa khalayi. 
Psalms77:6 Kinuupuwelela iciposaka kiipalaaka ohiyu; murimaaka waatthokelela ni okumaaka wannakoha: 
Psalms77:7 “Yave onoonikhootta mahuku ootheene? Owo kharwatho anoonihera murimaawe wooreera? 
Psalms77:8 Osivelawawe woomala khuluwi? Soororomelihasawe soomala? 
Psalms77:9 Muluku oottiwala omoriwawawe ikharari? Musaranimwawe onghiiha murimaawe wooreera?” Sela* 
Psalms77:10 Vano kaahuupuwela: “Kinghaawa niwoko ntata na Muluku a Musulusulu khanimvaratho muteko. 
Psalms77:11 Kinimuupuwelela miteko sa Yave, aani kinimuupuwelela sootikhinihasanyu sa khalayi." 
Psalms77:12 Kinootthokelela mitekosanyu sootheene, kuupuwelaka sootikhinihasanyu sootheene.”" 
Psalms77:13 Ii! Muluku, iphirosanyu ti sootteela. Khawoworu muluku mukina ahikhanle Mulukwaahu." 
Psalms77:14 Nyuwo ti Muluku ompaka sootikhiniha; Nyuwo munoonihera ikurusanyu variyari wa miloko. 
Psalms77:15 Mohoopola mulokwaanyu ni moonowaanyu wooweraxa – ikhapira sa Yakobe ni Yoseefe. Sela* 
Psalms77:16 Ii! Muluku, maahi yaawoonani, yaawoonani, enaasareya owali; mpaka moowiixera waatetereya ni woova." 
Psalms77:17 Mahutte yaarupiha epulaaya; woopa wa etari waaruma wiirimu; overunyawanyu waahooneya mipatta sootheene. 
Psalms77:18 Etaraanyu yaahiiwiwa muyuupuruni; overunyawanyu waamwaleela elapo ni etthaya yaatetereya vancipalexa. 
Psalms77:19 Ephirowaanyu yaavira mphareiyani; musewaanyu mmaahini mmaahini, ni khaawo oonne mwaanyikalaanyumo." 
Psalms77:20 Mwaahoolela mulokwaanyu ntoko muhuwo mmatatani mwa Moisesi ni Aharoni. 
Psalms78:1 Ii! Mulokwaaka, mwiiwe nihusihonaka ni masu a eyanowaaka." 
Psalms78:2 Kinoohula eyanowaaka kuulumaka mmaphwanaphwanihoni; kinimwaala ithale sa khalayi – 
Psalms78:3 seiye niiwalaahu ni nixuttenraahu; seiye asitithihu yaanithalihenraaya. 
Psalms78:4 Khanaakhuwa anamwaniihu; ninoothalihera ekhapira ya muhoolo miteko soottottopeleya sa Yave – ikurusawe ni sootikhinihasawe aapankaawe. 
Psalms78:5 Aahaavaha ikano anamwane a Yakobe ni aakhaliha Nlamulo oYixrayeli, mwa nne naalamulela makholowaahu weera yaaxuttihe itthusene seiye anamwanaaya." 
Psalms78:6 Hiiho ekhapira ya muhoolo enoosuwela Nlamulo nna – mpakatho anamwane eneera eyariwe, ni awosa wa mpattaaya, yaathalihere anamwanaaya." 
Psalms78:7 Vano awosa eniyeereke omuroromela Muluku ehittiwalaka mitekosawe, mene yiiwelelaka malamulowaawe." 
Psalms78:8 Awosa kheekhala ntoko makholowaaya – ekhapira yoottiyamaaru ni yoovaanya; muloko wa murima woohimuroromela Muluku; atthu a okumi woohimutthara Yoowo. 
Psalms78:9 Asilopwana a wEfrayimi, yaarookuxaru nyuupa, yaatthawa munihukuni na ekhotto." 
Psalms78:10 Awosa khayiiwelenle wiiraana wa Muluku ekhoottaka otthara entthuneya munlamulonimwawe. 
Psalms78:11 Yaattiwala seiye Muluku aapankaawe; sootikhiniha oonihenraawe. 
Psalms78:12 Owo aapaka sootikhiniha vamaithoni wa makholowaaya wExipitu, elapo ya oZowaani." 
Psalms78:13 Owo aakawanya ephareiya weera awosa evire; aapakiha weera maahi yeemele ntoko exiri. 
Psalms78:14 Aahaahoola ni nihutte othana ni ngwaarani wa mooro ohiyu. 
Psalms78:15 Aamutotoxa mwala munikareni, anaavaha maahi oowaattaxa ntoko a mphareiyani." 
Psalms78:16 Aakhumiha maahi vamwala oovira ntoko nyooloko. 
Psalms78:17 Vaheera yannapwaherera omutthekela, emvaanyaka Muluku a Musulusulu munikareni." 
Psalms78:18 Awosa yaamoota murima Muluku mwayiini emunyesererihaka sooca yaatthunaaya. 
Psalms78:19 Yaamukhupanya Muluku yeeraka: “Weeraka Owo onoowera onirehererela yooca munikareni?” 
Psalms78:20 Ettiitthu Owo aammanaawe mwala, yaakhuma maahi oowaatta. Weeraka onoowera onivahatho yooca? Onoowera ovaha mulokwaawe inama?”" 
Psalms78:21 Yave awiiwakaru, aanyoonyaxiwa; aahaarumihela anamwane a Yakobe mooro, ni isarasawe saahaapattela aYixrayeli," 
Psalms78:22 yeenre yahimuroromelaka Muluku, hata yahaakhelaka ovuluxawawe." 
Psalms78:23 Wa soothesene, Owo aalamulela mahutte, anahula milako sa wiirimu." 
Psalms78:24 Aarupihela muloko emana* wiirimu weera oce; aavaha yooca ya wiirimu. 
Psalms78:25 Atthu yaahooca sooca sa andyelo*; aahaarumihela sooca soowaattaxa. 
Psalms78:26 Ari wiirimu aarumiha epheyo yaaweela ninkhuma nsuwa anahoola epheyo ya ohitto ni ikurusawe. 
Psalms78:27 Aawuukelela enama ntoko ntthupi; ipalame soowaatta ntoko muhaava wa mukerekhere wa ephareiya. 
Psalms78:28 Aamoroxela waakonelingwe mukhwipi wa iheemasaya. 
Psalms78:29 Awosa yaahooca mpaka ovonaxa, niwoko Owo aahaavaha yeeyo yaatthunaayaxa." 
Psalms78:30 Vaheera awosa ehinaaye ovona, sooca nlelo siri mmwaano," 
Psalms78:31 isara sa Muluku saahaaluttuwela; Owo aawiiva atthu oolipaxa variyariwaya, eyo tiiyo amiravo a aYixrayeli." 
Psalms78:32 Hata hiiho, yannapwaherera ottheka; aaroopakaru sootikhiniha sincipale, khayaamuroromenle." 
Psalms78:33 Tivawo aapakinghaawe mahukwaaya weera eciphe ntoko iphumu ni yaaviriha iyaakhasaya ngwoovani. 
Psalms78:34 Khula emaara Muluku aattaruxelaawe okhwa, aYixrayeli ti yaapaceraaya omwaasaasa emuhokoleelakatho ni nthiti." 
Psalms78:35 Yannuupuwelela weera Muluku aari Mwalaaya ni weera Muluku a Musulusulu aari Mvuluxaaya. 
Psalms78:36 Vaheera ohoolo vakhaani awosa yannapacera omweepesa, emulokotthaka ni malumaaya." 
Psalms78:37 Mirimasaya khasaamukhalela ekhaikhai ni khayaaroromeleiye ni wiiraanawawe. 
Psalms78:38 Hata hiiho aahaamorela ikharari; aahaalevelela sootthekasaya ni khaaphwata. Emaara ti emaara annahuluxa isarasawe ni khaanyoonyeriwa. 
Psalms78:39 Aahuupuwelela weera yaari atthu paahi ankhwa; epheyo emvira woohihokolowa. 
Psalms78:40 Imaara sincipale yannamuvaanya munikareni, emuthananihaka mweelaponi ya meekhaaya!" 
Psalms78:41 Imaara imaarasene yannamoota murima Muluku, emutannyaka Ootteela a oYixrayeli." 
Psalms78:42 Khayuupuwelela ikurusawe – ehuhuweene yeele aawooponlaawe mmatatani mwa anamahasula; 
Psalms78:43 nihuku nenenenne oonihenraawe ineneerosawe sootikhiniha wExipitu; mitekosawe sooweraxa oZowaani. 
Psalms78:44 Owo aatatuxa nyoolokosaya ni maxaapwaaya ephome; khayaawenre owura maaheene yaale. 
Psalms78:45 Aahaarumihela nasope a amunkaanga mwa yaale yaalumakanse ni anaphulu mwa yaale yaaphwante. 
Psalms78:46 Aahinnyerera soohephasaya misoope; sooruwera wa okuukule. 
Psalms78:47 Aaphwata imattasaya sa iwuuva* ni maralala ni nyirisaya sa ifiigu sa ntuphini ni ihuhu sooriiraxa. 
Psalms78:48 Aahinnyereratho mihuwosaya maralala ni sookukhulasaya overinya. 
Psalms78:49 Aahaakuruxela isarasawe sitokotoko, onyoonyiwawawe, othananawawe ni owiittawawe aarumihelaka nakupa a andyelo oophwata." 
Psalms78:50 Aarehererela isarasawe ephiro; khaawuurenle mookhwaani mene aahaaruuhela mahooxo. 
Psalms78:51 Aahiiva matthaara ootheene a wExipitu; ooyariwa oopacera asilopwana a mmaheemani mwa Hami. 
Psalms78:52 Vaheera aakhumiha mulokwaawe ntoko muhuwo; ahoolelaka ntoko ikhondoolo munikareni. 
Psalms78:53 Aaweettiha oolipeene moota wooweera khayoova; vaheera ephareiya yaahaakhuneela amwiittanaaya. 
Psalms78:54 Hiiho aarongha mulokwaawe omwiinanoni wa elapwaawe yootteela; mweelaponi ya nyaako ntatanawe noolopwana naakuxalaaya. 
Psalms78:55 Aahoomola miloko saakhalamo avahaka mulokwaaya ilaposaya ntoko yoohiyeriwa; aapakiha weera ipuumba sa oYixrayeli siitekihemo mmaheemanimwaya. 
Psalms78:56 Vaheera yaamoota murima Muluku emvaanyaka a Musulusulu; khayiiwelenle ikanosawe. 
Psalms78:57 Yaari oohiroromeleya ni ohiiwelela ntoko makholowaaya, yaapirituwa ntoko muupa woohimuteko." 
Psalms78:58 Yaamunyoonyiha ni mattumuxa ooteeliheriwa miluku sikina; yaamutannya ni milukusaya sikina. 
Psalms78:59 Muluku asuwelakaru yeeyo, aahaanyoonyeraxiwa woomalela anakhootto a muloko wa aYixrayeli." 
Psalms78:60 Aahiya etabarnaakulu oXilo – eheema ele aakungaawe eriyari ya atthu. 
Psalms78:61 Aawinnyerera Arka* a ikurusawe mootthukiwani; ovuwawawe mmatatani mwa amwiittana. 
Psalms78:62 Aatthunihera mulokwaawe wiiviwa ni ekatana, niwoko aanyoonyeriwa yoohiyeraawe." 
Psalms78:63 Mooro waahaahisa amirawaaya ni aximwalaaya khayiipeliwe icipo sa okwatti; 
Psalms78:64 asaserdotaaya yaahiiviwa ni ekatana ni asinaamukhwelaaya khayaawenre wiinla. 
Psalms78:65 Vano Yave aavenya ntoko mulipa ookona; ntoko mulopwana omvenya ahapaliweene eviinyu. 
Psalms78:66 Aahaawina amwiittanaawe; awuulihihaka muru wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms78:67 Vahoolowaya aakhootta iheema sa Yoseefe; khaathanlale epuumba ya Efrayimi; 
Psalms78:68 Ohiyanawaya aathanlale epuumba ya Yuda ni mwaako oSiyoni, mwa yoowo aasivenlaawe." 
Psalms78:69 Aateka Nipuronawe Nootteela* noorakamela ntoko erimu, ntoko elapo aakhalinghaawe wa mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms78:70 Aamuthanla murumeiyaawe Davide, anamurongha munikhoolani na ikhondoolo;" 
Psalms78:71 aamvenxa aakukhulaawewo ikhondoolo weera akhale mukukhuli a Yakobe mulokwaawe; a Yixrayeli, yoohiyeraawe." 
Psalms78:72 Vano Davide aakosoopa yoowo ni murima woororomeleya; aahoolela moota wooweraxa. 
Psalms79:1 Ii! Muluku, miloko soovoleela yoohiyeraanyu; soonyoowiha Empaanyu Yootteela ni soomuhela Yerusaleemu nthala." 
Psalms79:2 Sohinnyerera mittembo sa arumeiyaanyu ipalame sa wiirimu weera sikhuure; aahaavaha irutthu sa ootteelaanyu axinama a mutuphini. 
Psalms79:3 Aayeehera ephomaaya oYerusaleemu ntoko maahi ni khawoworu oovitha. 
Psalms79:4 Vamaithoni wa aximwaattamanaahu hiyo noothatuwa mutheelelowaaya, aani awosa aanitheya ni aaniruwana." 
Psalms79:5 Ii! Yave, mpaka yaakhani? Munoonyoonyiwa wa mahuku ootheene? Mpaka yaakhani ehacaanyu eneeraaya ehise ntoko mooro?" 
Psalms79:6 Muyeehere isarasanyu miloko sihinoosuwelani; omwene ohiniitthana Nsinananyu," 
Psalms79:7 niwoko saamukhuura Yakobe ni saaphwata elapwaawe. 
Psalms79:8 Muhinithorihe niwoko na soottheka sa makholowaahu; ikhararisanyu siniphiyereke woowaakuveya, neenre niporora." 
Psalms79:9 Ii! Muluku Mvuluxaahu, munikhavihere niwoko na ovuwa wa Nsinananyu. Munoopole ni mulevelele sootthekasahu niwoko na Nsinananyu." 
Psalms79:10 Heeni ontthuneyaaya miloko weera: “Ori woowi Mulukwaaya?” Vamaithoniwahu moonihere miloko ikukuttulasanyu mwa ephome ya arumeiyaanyu. 
Psalms79:11 Okhuwela wa anamatthukiwa ophiyeke wa Nyuwo; ngwoopole oothoriheliwa okhwa ni ikuru sa moonowaanyu. 
Psalms79:12 Mwaahokoloxere ikukuttula aximwaattamanaahu moota wootepaxa wa sooveiha yoopakenlaayani Yave. 
Psalms79:13 Vano hiyo nri mulokwaanyu ni ikhondoolo sa munikhoolanimwanyu nnimoottottopelani wa mahuku ootheene; nnoothalihera khula ekhapira sa ottottopeleyawanyu. 
Psalms80:1 Ii!, Mukukhuli a oYixrayeli, muniiwe – Nyuwo muninghoolela Yoseefe ntoko muhuwo; Nyuwo munkilaathi vahiceni ya emwene variyari wa akerubini* – moonihere ovuwawanyu" 
Psalms80:2 ohoolo wa Efrayimi, Benyamini ni Manaxe. Mvenyererihe ikurusanyu; ngweeke ni munivuluxe." 
Psalms80:3 Ii! Muluku, munirehereretho; moonihere murimaanyu wooreera weera nivuluxiwe." 
Psalms80:4 Ii! Yave Muluku a ikuru sootheene, mpaka yaakhani isarasanyu sineeraaya sipattele mavekelo a mulokwaanyu?" 
Psalms80:5 Moociha mulokwaanyu ni sooca sa maithori; moowuriha ekoomixi ya maithori. 
Psalms80:6 Moonikhaliha oohiiwanana ni aximwaattamanaahu ni amwiittanaahu anninitheya. 
Psalms80:7 Ii! Muluku, munirehereretho; moonihere murimaanyu wooreera weera nivuluxiwe." 
Psalms80:8 Mwaaruuha evideira* wExipitu; mwaahoomola miloko, munaphatteya owo." 
Psalms80:9 Mwaarehererela woophatteya, mwiri owo woophuwa mikwankhwaari sinasareya mulaponi." 
Psalms80:10 Nyaako saakhuneeliwano munttuusaaya ni nyiri sitokotoko sa oLibanu ni iphandisaya. 
Psalms80:11 Iphandisaya saaphiya mpaka ophareiya ni soophuwasaya mpaka omoolokoni Efratesi. 
Psalms80:12 Mphwatenleni ixirisaya mutthuniheraka weera ootheene amvirawo erukule iwuuvasaya? 
Psalms80:13 Aphako a moothakoni annanariha mwiri owo ni soopattuxiwa sa ntuphini sinnacawo. 
Psalms80:14 Ii! Muluku a ikuru sootheene, muhokoleele wa hiyo. Ngwehawehe wiirimu ni moone. Mukosoope mwiri ola wa iwuuva*," 
Psalms80:15 nkwankhwaari ophatteiwale ni ntatananyu noolopwana, aani munkosoope mwaana mulopwana mmunnunghalaanyu." 
Psalms80:16 Mwiraanyu wa iwuuva* wohuuhiwa; woohisiwa ni mooro; mulokwaanyu wooriheya niwoko na ohiihawanyu. 
Psalms80:17 Mmwiikaathere ntatananyu mulopwana ori moonowaanyu woolopwana, mwaana a mutthu mwiixununghenraanyu." 
Psalms80:18 Vano hiyo khanirwa nihapuwa wa Nyuwo; munirehereretho ni nnimwiitthana Nsinananyu. 
Psalms80:19 Ii! Muluku, munirehereretho; moonihere murimaanyu wooreera weera nivuluxiwe." 
Psalms81:1 Mmwiipele oohakalaleene Muluku ori ikurusahu; munkhuwelele ni nsu ntokotoko Muluku a Yakobe! 
Psalms81:2 Mpacereke icipo, mwaarumihe akarakaxa vamoha ni makita ni lira* moorattani." 
Psalms81:3 Mwiipele nipalapatta wooneya wa mweeri munyowani ni wa mweeri woowunnuwa, vanihukuni na efestaahu." 
Psalms81:4 Eyo ti ekano wa aYixrayeli; otthuna wa Muluku a Yakobe," 
Psalms81:5 mwa yeeyo aakhalinghaawe ntoko ekano wa Yakobe owo aawanannaaweno wExipitu. Iwe naahiiwawo nuulumo nahaasuwenlaahu. 
Psalms81:6 Owo aaheera: “Kaahaarula murindi yaathatenlaaya; matataaya aatapuxeya wa soolemela. 
Psalms81:7 Moothanananimwanyu mwaahiitthana ni kaawoopolani, kaawaakhulani mookukutteyani wa mmahutteni; kaawootani murima mmaahini a oMeriba. Sela*" 
Psalms81:8 Ii! Mulokwaaka, mwiiwe ni kinoowoopererani; ii! oYixrayeli, kaatthunaxa weera mukiiwelele!" 
Psalms81:9 Muhikhalenoru miluku sikina variyariwanyu; muhikokhoreleru miluku sa amalapo. 
Psalms81:10 Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu, mwa Yoowo ookhumihaleni wExipitu. Mwaathame ni kinimoocihani." 
Psalms81:11 Wa soothesene, mulokwaaka khawaatthuna okiiwa, aYixrayeli yaakhootta okiiwelela." 
Psalms81:12 Tivawo kiinnyerenraaka mirimasaya soowuuma weera etthare soovaanelasaya. 
Psalms81:13 Mano mulokwaaka waakiiwale, aYixrayeli yeettenle ephirowaaka," 
Psalms81:14 woowaakuveya Miyo kaamwaayeviha amwiittanaaya ni kaamwaattaruxa awananaaya. 
Psalms81:15 Mwaha wa yeeyo, yaale animuthanya Yave yaamweemexa matata ohoolowaka ni yaamwaakhela nttaruxo noohimala." 
Psalms81:16 Vaheera Miyo kaamwaaciha aYixrayeli ni etrigu yooreerelaxa ni kaamwaavoniha ni oravo woowaavuliwa vamwala.” 
Psalms82:1 Ti Muluku oneemela mmuthukumanoni mutokweene; Owo onthoriha variyari wa ooweraxa. 
Psalms82:2 Mpaka yaakhani muneeraanyu ngwaakihe anamathowa mwaakhalelaka mpatta atakhali? Sela* 
Psalms82:3 Ngwaakihe oohilipa ni akwaasuni; mpwatthe sootthuneya sa oohaawa ni oohasuliwa. 
Psalms82:4 Ngwoopole oohilipa ni oohaawa; mwaavuluxe mmatatani mwa atakhali. 
Psalms82:5 Awosa khaansuwela hata khaaniiwexexa etthu. Aneetta mpiphini; mathipelo ootheene a elapo ya vathi aatetereya. 
Psalms82:6 Keenre: “Nyuwosa ti ‘miluku’; ootheene nyuwo ti anamwane a Muluku a Musulusulu.” 
Psalms82:7 Vaheera nyuwosa munimookhwa ntoko onkhwelaawe mutthu; munoomora ntoko ommorelaawe akhalaru namalamula. 
Psalms82:8 Ii! Muluku, mvenyeke; muthorihe elapo ya vathi, niwoko miloko sootheene ti sawinyu." 
Psalms83:1 Ii! Muluku, muhimaale; muhipwaherere muhuulumaka ni muhikhale ntoko oohiiwa." 
Psalms83:2 Moone moota amwiittanaanyu anramaramaaya; moota awosa anoovaanyaayani. 
Psalms83:3 Awosa amvaanelela mulokwaanyu ni miruku; antthunaxa waapakela soonanara yaale ari oothanliwaanyu. 
Psalms83:4 Awosa aneera: “Nrowe, nimalamalihe muloko ola weera nsina na oYixrayeli nihiiwanyeyetho.”" 
Psalms83:5 Amvaanelela ni murima mmoharu; angwiiwananelani Nyuwo," 
Psalms83:6 yiiraanakano iheema sa awEdomi, aYixmayeli, aMowabi ni aHageriti," 
Psalms83:7 aGebali, awAmoni ni awAmaleki vamoha ni amaki a oFilistiya ni oTiro." 
Psalms83:8 Mpakatho atthu a wAsiriya ti a mpattaaya eruuhelaka ikuru ekhapira ya Loti. Sela* 
Psalms83:9 Mwaapakele yaawo seiye mpakenlaanyu oMidiyani; ntoko mumpakenlaanyu Sisera ni Yabini omoolokoni Kixoni," 
Psalms83:10 mwa yaale yaakhwenle wEnidori, ethatuwaka ethaadyira vatthayani." 
Psalms83:11 Mwaapakele maneethaaya yeeyo mwaampakenlaanyu Orebi ni Zehebi; mwaapakele anamwane a mwene yeeyo mwaampakenlaanyu Zeba ni Zalemuna," 
Psalms83:12 mwa yaawo yeenre: “Nrowe nikuxe moocihamo mwa Muluku.” 
Psalms83:13 Ii! Mulukwaaka, mwaapake ntoko ihalahala, ntoko makamba amvavihiwa ni epheyo." 
Psalms83:14 Mooteene yoowo mooro onghisaaya othako hoye hoye malumaaya amvarelaaya mpaka mmwaako," 
Psalms83:15 mwaattharelele hiihotho ni etthekwaanyu ni ngwoopopihe ni epheyowaanyu etokotoko. 
Psalms83:16 Ii! Yave, ngwuulihihe muru weera atthu yaasaase Nsinananyu." 
Psalms83:17 Awosa eyevihiwe ni yoopopiheye wa mahuku ootheene; eriheyeke ngwuuliheyeyani muru. 
Psalms83:18 Mwaasuwelihe weera Nyuwo muniitthaniwa Yave, aani weera Nyuwo paahi ti Muluku a Musulusulu mweelaponi yootheene." 
Psalms84:1 Ii! Yave a ikuru sootheene, moota nireenraaya nipuro munkhalaanyu!" 
Psalms84:2 Okumaaka onghaawelaxa mapuwa a Yave; murimaaka ni erutthwaaka emmwiipela ni ohakalala Muluku Mukumi. 
Psalms84:3 Mpaka cirikhu oophwanya wookhalawo ni meenkesa onreherera epuurwaawe vakhiviru wa altaaraanyu mwa weiwo onaahuwaawewo axaanaawe, Yave a ikuru sootheene, Mwenaaka ni Mulukwaaka." 
Psalms84:4 Ooreelihiwa ti yaale ammaka vaatewanyu; awosa anoottottopelani Nyuwo woohihiyerera. Sela* 
Psalms84:5 Ooreelihiwa ti yaale amphwanya ikurusaya mwa Nyuwo; yaale anrowa wa Empaanyu ekhumaka ottaiwene! 
Psalms84:6 Awosa yaaviraka nreyareya na oBahaka, antatuxa nipuro noosareya anaattuuttu; epula mutthulotho ensariha matthiyaaya." 
Psalms84:7 Awosa anrowa saandyeerereyaka ikurusaya mpaka khula mutthu a yaale wiixoonihera ohoolo wa Muluku oSiyoni. 
Psalms84:8 Ii! Yave Muluku a ikuru sootheene, mwiiwe nivekelonaka; Ii! Muluku a Yakobe, mukiiwe! Sela*" 
Psalms84:9 Ii! Muluku, ngwehe exikudwaahu; mmoonihere murimaanyu wooreera oottikittheliwaanyu." 
Psalms84:10 Fataari okhala nihuku nimoha mmapuwanimwanyu ohikhanle mahuku macira muloko nakhalaru nipuro nikina. Kookupaleela okhala namalipelela a mulako wa Empa ya Mulukwaaka ohikhanle okhala mmaheemani sa atakhali. 
Psalms84:11 Vano Yave Muluku ti Nsuwa ni Exikudu*; Yave onoonihera murima wooreera ni nttittimiho; khanaakhoottelaru mpuha yaale aneetta moota wookwanela. 
Psalms84:12 Ii! Yave a ikuru sootheene! Ooreelihiwa ti yoole onoororomelani Nyuwo. 
Psalms85:1 Ii! Yave. Mohoonihera murimaanyu wooreera wa elapwaanyu; mooreherera weetteleya nnene oYixrayeli. 
Psalms85:2 Moolevelela sootakhala sootheene sa mulokwaanyu ni mookhuneela sootthekasaya sootheene. 
Psalms85:3 Moohiya isarasanyu sootheene ni moosusa wa onyoonyiwawanyu woowoopiha. 
Psalms85:4 Ii! Muluku Mvuluxaahu, munirehereretho ni mmaalihe oninyoonyeriwawanyu." 
Psalms85:5 Munooninyoonyeriwa mahuku ootheene? Isarasanyu sinoopwaherera wa ikhapira sootheene? 
Psalms85:6 Dyoontte, muniirehereratho weera mulokwaanyu woohakalaleleni Nyuwo." 
Psalms85:7 Ii! Yave, munoonihere osivelawanyu woohimala ni munivahe ovuluxawanyu." 
Psalms85:8 Kinimwiiwa yeeyo Yave Muluku ohimmaawe. Owo onroromeliha murettele wa mulokwaawe; wa oororomeleyaawe. Awosa ehihokoleele iphiro soololo! 
Psalms85:9 Vekhaikhai ovuluxawawe ori vakhiviru wa yaale animoova ni ovuwawawe onookhala mweelaponimwahu. 
Psalms85:10 Osivela ni ororomeleya onookumanela; ekhaikhai ni murettele sinoobeecana. 
Psalms85:11 Ororomeleya onoophuwa vathi ni ekhaikhai enooweha wiirimu. 
Psalms85:12 Vekhaikhai, Yave onoovaha yeeyo eri yooreera ni elapwaahu enooruwera soohephasaya." 
Psalms85:13 Ekhaikhai enrowa ohoolowawe, enareherera ephiro ya malipaawe." 
Psalms86:1 Ii! Yave mwiiwe ni mukaakhuleke niwoko miyo ti oohaawa ni oothoiwa. 
Psalms86:2 Mwaakihe okumaaka niwoko kinoottharani moota woororomeleya. Nyuwo ti Mulukwaaka; mumvuluxe murumeiyaanyu onoororomelani Nyuwo. 
Psalms86:3 Ii! Yave, mukimorele ikharari, niwoko kinookhuwelelani ehuhu yootheene." 
Psalms86:4 Munghakalalihe murumeiyaanyu niwoko wa Nyuwo, Yave, kinimwinnyerera okumaaka." 
Psalms86:5 Ii! Yave, Nyuwo ti oolikaneene olevelela ni a murima wooreera. Nyuwo moosareya mahala wa ootheene angwiitthanani." 
Psalms86:6 Ii! Yave mwiiwe nivekelonaka; mwaakhulele okhuwelelawaka ikharari. 
Psalms86:7 Vanihukuni na othananawaka kinimookhuwelelani niwoko Nyuwo munookaakhula. 
Psalms86:8 Yave, khasiwoworu miluku soowoolikanxerani; mitekosanyu ti soohilikanxereya." 
Psalms86:9 Miloko sootheene mpattunxaanyu sinoorowa weera silape ohoolowanyu; Ii! Yave seiyo sinoovuwiha Nsinananyu," 
Psalms86:10 niwoko Nyuwo ti Mutokweenexa mpakaka miteko sootikhiniha; Nyuwo paahi ti Muluku! 
Psalms86:11 Ii! Yave, mukixuttihe iphirosanyu weera keette mweekhaikhaiyinimwaanyu; mukivahe murima woororomeleyaxa weera koove Nsinananyu." 
Psalms86:12 Ii! Yave Mulukwaaka, kinimoottottopelani ni murimaaka wootheene; kinoovuwiha Nsinananyu wa mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms86:13 Vano okisivelawanyu ti otokotoko; mookivuluxa mookhwaani moowiixera. 
Psalms86:14 Ii! Muluku, atthu oowiixoona annakiwanano; nakupa a anamapuhera anaasa okumaaka – atthu ahinoopwatthani Nyuwo." 
Psalms86:15 Vaheera Nyuwo, Yave, ti Muluku a ikharari ni a murima wooreeraxa, oopisa onyoonyiwa ni oosareya osivela ni ororomeleya." 
Psalms86:16 Mukiwehe ni mukimorele ikharari; mumvahe murumeiyaanyu ikurusanyu ni mumvuluxe mwaana mulopwana a murumeiyaanyu muthiyana. 
Psalms86:17 Mukivahe eneneero ya oreerawanyu murima weera amwiittanaaka yoone yeeyo ni eyevihiwe, niwoko Nyuwo, Yave, mookikhavihera ni mookipepesa." 
Psalms87:1 Yave aateka esidadaawe vamwaako wootteela; 
Psalms87:2 Owo onnasivela milako sa oSiyoni opwahaxa mookhala mukina wa Yakobe. 
Psalms87:3 Ii! Esidade ya Muluku, itthu soovuwaxa singhimmwa sa Nyuwo. Sela*" 
Psalms87:4 Variyari wa yaale ankisuwela kimmwaalikelela Rahabi ni oBabiloniya – hiihotho oFilistia, oTiro nitho oKuxi. Kinoohima sa yaale: “Ala ayareliwe oSiyoni.”" 
Psalms87:5 Vekhaikhai atthu anoohima sa oSiyoni: “Ola ni ole oyareliwe oSiyoni ni Muluku a Musulusulu onoolipiha esidade eyo.” 
Psalms87:6 Yave onoolepa munamalepelani a miloko: “Ola oyareliwe oSiyoni.” Sela* 
Psalms87:7 Yiipaka ni yiinaka, awosa eniyeere: “Niphattuwenle oSiyoni.”" 
Psalms88:1 Ii! Yave, Muluku onkivuluxa, ohiyu ni othana kinnakhuwela ohoolowanyu." 
Psalms88:2 Nivekelonaka niphiyeke wa Nyuwo; mwiiwe okhuwelawaka. 
Psalms88:3 Okumaaka woosareya sookacamiha ni ori mukerekhere mahiye. 
Psalms88:4 Kohaalikeleliwa variyari wa ankhuruwela munlittini; kiri ntoko mutthu simmalenle ikuru. 
Psalms88:5 Kohiikaathiwa vamoha ni anamakhwa; kiri ntoko mittembo siniitthuuwa mmahiye, mwa seiyo muhinuupuwelelaanyu niwoko soovenxiwa mmatatanimwanyu." 
Psalms88:6 Mookiikaathi munlittini moowiixeraxa, aani ngwiixerani mwa epiphi." 
Psalms88:7 Mookilemelihera isarasanyu; mitekutekusanyu sootheene sookikhuneela. Sela* 
Psalms88:8 Mookivenxera asinthamwenaaka ooreerela munakitatuxa ethirwaaya. Kiri ntoko namatthukiwa ohingwera otthawa. 
Psalms88:9 Maithwaaka aakotakota niwoko na othananaxa. Ii! Yave, khula nihuku kinnawiitthanani; wa Nyuwo kinnootheteelani matataaka." 
Psalms88:10 Khamungwoonihera sootikhinihasanyu anamakhwa. Anamakhwa khaamvenya weera yoottottopeleni. Sela* 
Psalms88:11 Osivelawanyu khoonlaleiwa munihiyeni naari ororomeleyawanyu moophwatani. 
Psalms88:12 Sootikhinihasanyu khasinsuweliwa mmapuroni a epiphi naari mitekosanyu sa ekhaikhai mweelaponi ya ottiwalaxa. 
Psalms88:13 Vaheera miyo kinnookhuwelelani ekhavihero, Yave; oxeexelo mavekelowaaka annaphiya wa Nyuwo." 
Psalms88:14 Ii! Yave, munkikhoottelani ni munkihuluwelani?" 
Psalms88:15 Okhuma enamwanaaka kinghooxiwa kihalaka vakhaani okhwa. Kinnahaawa soohasulasanyu ni nkinoona yooweera. 
Psalms88:16 Isarasanyu sookikhuneela ni soohasulasanyu sookiphwata. 
Psalms88:17 Mahuku ootheene seiyo sinnakirica ntoko mirupi; sinnakirukureera woomalela. 
Psalms88:18 Mookaakha asinthamwenaaka ni asinkhwaaka; epiphi ti namahoolaaka paahi. 
Psalms89:1 Kinimwiipa ehuhu yootheene sa osivela otokotoko wa Yave; kinoolaleera ni eyanowaaka ororomeleyawanyu ikhapira sootheene. 
Psalms89:2 Koosuwela weera osivelawanyu ompwaherera woolipeene wa mahuku ootheene ni weera ororomeleyawanyu moolipiha wiirimu. 
Psalms89:3 Mweenre: “Koopaka wiiraana ni oothanliwaaka; koomuroromeliha murumeiyaaka Davide ni nlipelo: 
Psalms89:4 ‘Kinookhaliha ekhapiraanyu wa mahuku ootheene kilipihaka omwenaanyu wa ikhapira soohimala.’ ” 
Psalms89:5 Munthukumanoni wa ootteela wiirimu onttottopela sootikhinihasanyu Yave, nitho ororomeleyawanyu." 
Psalms89:6 Vano taani a wiirimu iwo oomulikanxera Yave? Taani a ikhalelo sa wiirimu onlikana ni Yoowo? 
Psalms89:7 Munthukumanoni wa ootteela, Muluku ti oowooveya; Owo ti oowoopiha waapwaha ootheene amurukureenre." 
Psalms89:8 Ii! Yave Muluku a ikuru sootheene, khawowo onlikana ni Nyuwo. Ii! Yave, Nyuwo ti a ikuruxa ni ororomeleyawanyu wohoorukureerani." 
Psalms89:9 Nyuwo munlamula ephareiya yoowali; yakhala ni mitekuteku, Nyuwo munnamaaliha." 
Psalms89:10 Nyuwo moomuswanya munamwiiva ntutu a mphareiya; mohaamwaramwaxa amwiittanaanyu ni moonowaanyu woolipaxa. 
Psalms89:11 Wiirimu ti wawinyu ni hiihotho elapo ya vathi; moopaka elapo ni sootheene sirimo. 
Psalms89:12 Moopattuxa ottuttuwani ni ohitto; oTabori ni oHeremoni oniipela ni ohakalala Nsinananyu. 
Psalms89:13 Moonowaanyu woosareya ikuru; ntatananyu ti noolipaxa; moonowaanyu woolopwana ti woovuwihiwa. 
Psalms89:14 Ororomeleya ni ekhaikhai ti mathipelo a ehicaanyu ya emwene. Osivela ni ororomeleya onrowa ohoolowanyu. 
Psalms89:15 Wooreelihiwa ti muloko onxuttera wookhuwelelani Nyuwo ni oneetta ngwaarani mwa okhalawanyu, Yave." 
Psalms89:16 Owo onghakalalela Nsinananyu ehuhu yootheene ni omvuwiha ororomeleyawanyu. 
Psalms89:17 Vano Nyuwo ti ovuwawaya ni ikurusaya; niwoko na okhalawanyu mpattaahu hiyo noolipihiwa. 
Psalms89:18 Vekhaikhai exikudwaahu ti ya Yave; Ii! Ootteela a oYixrayeli, Nyuwo ti Mwenaahu." 
Psalms89:19 Khalayi mwaaheera mmooneloni mweerelaka mulokwaanyu woororomeleya: “Koomusariha ikuru namawana ooweraxa; koomvuwiha oothanliwa variyari wa muloko. 
Psalms89:20 Koomphwanya murumeiyaaka Davide; koomuttikitthelano makhuraaka ootteela. 
Psalms89:21 Ntananaka nnoomukhavihera; moonowaaka onoomulipiha. 
Psalms89:22 Khawoworu mwiittana anaamunyesererihe oliva musoko; khawoworu oohiroromeleya anaamuhasule. 
Psalms89:23 Kinimwaahonona amwiittanaawe vamaithoniwawe ni kinoowiiva awananaawe. 
Psalms89:24 Osivelawaka woororomeleya onoomuhoola ni ikurusawe sinoovuwihiwa niwoko na Nsinanaka. 
Psalms89:25 Kinooweriha ntananawe weera alamule mpaka ophareiya, aani ntatanawe noolopwana mpaka nnyoolokoni." 
Psalms89:26 Owo onookeerela: ‘Nyuwo ti Atithaka, Mulukwaaka, Mwala ni Mvuluxaaka.’" 
Psalms89:27 Miyo kinoomukhalihatho Ntthaaranaka, oottittimihaxiwa waapwaha mamwene a mulaponi." 
Psalms89:28 Omusivelawaka onoopwaherera wa mahuku ootheene ni wiiraanawaka ni yoowo khoorwa omala. 
Psalms89:29 Kinookhaliha ekhapiraawe wa mahuku ootheene ni ehicaawe ya emwene enoopwaherera mpaka khalayi. 
Psalms89:30 Anamwanaawe yahiya nlamulonaka ehittharaka ikanosaka; 
Psalms89:31 awosa yavirikanyiha soolamulasaka ehipwatthaka sootthunasaka," 
Psalms89:32 kinimwaalaka ni ekopo ni sootapanyasaya ni ekwamba. 
Psalms89:33 Vaheera nkivenxa mwa yoowo osivelawaka hata nkirwa kihiya ororomeleyawaka. 
Psalms89:34 Nkivirikanyiha wiiraanawaka hata nkinceendya soororomeliha sa iyanosaka. 
Psalms89:35 Koomala kilipenlaaka mootteelanimwaka, ni nkimulokottha Davide," 
Psalms89:36 weera ekhapiraawe enoopwaherera wa mahuku ootheene ni ehicaawe ya emwene enoolekela mpaka khalayi. 
Psalms89:37 Eyo enookhalihiwa wa mahuku ootheene ntoko mweeri ori namoona oororomeleya wiirimu.” 
Psalms89:38 Vaheera Nyuwo moomukhootta, moomuramusa, moomunyoonyeriwaxa oottikittheliwaanyu." 
Psalms89:39 Mooruwana wiiraana ni murumeiyaanyu ni mohuupuruxa ecireembaawe. 
Psalms89:40 Mookurumula ixirisawe sootheene, munahela nthala moolipamwawe." 
Psalms89:41 Ootheene amviraru annamuhuhula; owo oothatuwa mutheelelo wa aximwaattamanaawe. 
Psalms89:42 Moovuwiha ntata noolopwana na amwiittanaawe; mohaahakalalihaxa awananaawe ootheene. 
Psalms89:43 Mooturiha ekatanaawe ni khamunimukhavihera mukhottoni. 
Psalms89:44 Moomaliha waarawawe ni mohuupuruxa ehicaawe ya emwene. 
Psalms89:45 Moovukula mahuku a emirawaawe moomukhuneelano mukaandyo woowuuliheya muru. 
Psalms89:46 Ii! Yave, mpaka yaakhani? Munimwiivithavitha mahuku ootheene? Mpaka yaakhani isarasanyu sineeraaya sihise ntoko mooro?" 
Psalms89:47 Muupuwelele moota okumaaka omviraaya woowaakuveya. Okhala wa omutthu khoomuteko! 
Psalms89:48 Khawoworu mutthu onkhala ni okumi ahinakhwa hata oniitapuxa mwa ikuru sa nihiye. Sela* 
Psalms89:49 Ii! Yave, ori woowi osivelawanyu wa khalayi, mwa weiwo mwaamuroromelinghaanyu ni nlipelo Davide moororomeleyanimwanyu?" 
Psalms89:50 Ii! Yave, muupuwelele moota murumeiyaanyu otheiwalaawe; matthebwa owo omvilelaawe wa miloko sootheene;" 
Psalms89:51 wa matthebweene yaawo a amwiittanaanyu, Yave, animuhooxano khula nlipa na oottikittheliwaanyu." 
Psalms89:52 Yave atthapeliwe wa mahuku ootheene! Ame* ni Ame*. 
Psalms90:1 Yave Nyuwo ti Ntthawelonahu wa ikhapira sootheene. 
Psalms90:2 Nyaako sihinaaye okhala naari Nyuwo muhinaaye opattuxa wiirimu ni vathi, aani, okhuma ompacereroni mpaka ommaleloni Nyuwo ti Muluku." 
Psalms90:3 Munaahokoloxera atthu vantthupini mweeraka: “Muhokoleele vantthupini, atthu!”" 
Psalms90:4 Vekhaikhai vamaithoniwanyu iyaakha macira muloko sinkhala ntoko nihuku nimoha nivinre, ntoko ihuhu sikina sa ohiyu." 
Psalms90:5 Munaavenxa atthu mookonani. Oxeexelo ankhala ntoko malaxi amphuwa – 
Psalms90:6 ammela ni amphuwa oxeexelo, vaheera oxekuwa annyaala, enuuma." 
Psalms90:7 Ninghisiwa ni isarasanyu ni nnoopopihiwa ni onyoonyiwawanyu. 
Psalms90:8 Moosuwela sootakhalasahu ni sootthekasahu sa muxiirini munnoona ngwaarani wa okhalawanyu. 
Psalms90:9 Mahukwaahu ootheene amvira musaranimwanyu; iyaakhasahu sinlakaseya woowaakuveya. 
Psalms90:10 Iyaakha sa okumaahu ti miloko mithannamiili – apaale miloko mithannamiraru wa yaale ari salaama. Wa soothesene, iyakhasene seiyo soosareya sookacamiha ni othanana; simvira woowaakuveya ni hiyo nimmweera olakaseya." 
Psalms90:11 Taani asuwenle ikuru sa isarasanyu? Vano onyoonyiwawanyu ti otokotoko ntoko woopihawanyu mumphwanelaanyu. 
Psalms90:12 Munuupuxere waakuva omala wa mahukwaahu weera mirimasahu siphwanye miruku. 
Psalms90:13 Ii! Yave, muniwehe! Mpaka yaakhani eneeraaya ekhale hiiho? Mwaamorele ikharari arumeiyaanyu." 
Psalms90:14 Munihakalalihe mooxeexeloni ni osivelawanyu woohimala weera niipe ni ohakalalaxa mahukwaahu ootheene. 
Psalms90:15 Munihakalalihe mmahukuni a onihasulawanyu; wa iyaakha nihaawanxaahu. 
Psalms90:16 Mitekosanyu soonihereye vamaithoni wa arumeiyaanyu ni waarawanyu wa anamwanaaya. 
Psalms90:17 Oreera murima wa Yave Mulukwaahu okhale ni hiyo; mulipihe miteko sa matataahu, aani, mulipihe soopakiwa sa matataahu!" 
Psalms91:1 Yoole onkhala vanipuroni noolipa na a Musulusulu onniitthuuwa mmunttuusini mwa Muluku a ikuru sootheene. 
Psalms91:2 Miyo kinoomweerela Yave: “Nyuwo ti Wootthawelawaka ni Nipuronaka Noolipaxa, Mulukwaaka kinimuroromelaaka.”" 
Psalms91:3 Vekhaikhai Owo onimookoongolani munraakhoni wa namalupattha ni wa nihooxo noowiiva. 
Psalms91:4 Owo onimookhuneelani ni mapururuwaawe; munoophwanya nipuro nootthawelamo vathi wa mapuphaawe. Ororomeleyawawe onookhala exikudu* yoowiixaakiheraanyu. 
Psalms91:5 Khoontthuneya nyuwo woova soowoopiha sa ohiyu naari muupa onuumbihiwa othana," 
Psalms91:6 hata nihooxo nimmwareela mpiphini, hoye hoye iretta simphwata othana." 
Psalms91:7 Naari atthu macira muloko emorelaka moonowaanyu woothiyana ni macira miloko muloko moonowaanyu mulopwana, kheewo eneera yoophwanyeeni." 
Psalms91:8 Mmwaase woona nttaruxo na atakhali. 
Psalms91:9 Muluku a Musulusulu akhala Nipuronanyu Noolipa, aani Yave Wootthawelawanyu," 
Psalms91:10 vano khayoophwanyaniru yoonanara naari yakhalaru erisa muheemanimwanyu. 
Psalms91:11 Owo onimwaalamulela andyelowaawe aweerelakani nyuwo weera yoothokororeni mphironimwanyu moothemwene. 
Psalms91:12 Awosa animoovarelani weera muhikwattuliwe mmalukuni. 
Psalms91:13 Munoomunyikalela mwatto ni enowa; munoomuswanya mwatto oolipa ni enowa. 
Psalms91:14 Yave oneera: “Eenre akisivela, kinoomvuluxa; kinoomwaakiha niwoko owo oosuwela Nsinanaka." 
Psalms91:15 Owo onookiitthana ni kinoomwaakhula; kinookhala ni yoowo mmakacamihoni; kinoomoopola ni kinoomuttittimiha. 
Psalms91:16 Kinoomvaha okumi woowaatta ni kinoomoonihera ovuluxawaka.” 
Psalms92:1 Ti wooreera omuttottopela Yave ni wiipela Nsinananyu, Muluku a Musulusulu;" 
Psalms92:2 olaleiya osivelawanyu woohiceendyeya ni ororomeleyawanyu ohiyu," 
Psalms92:3 ni oruma wa ekaruma ya ifiiyu muloko ni oratta wa makita. 
Psalms92:4 Vano Nyuwo Yave munkihakalaliha ni mitekosanyu; kiniipa ni ohakalala niwoko na soopakiwa sa matataanyu. 
Psalms92:5 Ii! Yave, sitokotoko ti mitekosanyu; sootikhiniheya ti soowuupuwelasanyu!" 
Psalms92:6 Mulopwana oohikhalano miruku khaniiwexexa; mulolo khanoona 
Psalms92:7 weera naari atakhali ephuwaka ntoko malaxi ni atthu oonanara ekhalaka nnene, anoophwatiwa woomalela." 
Psalms92:8 Vaheera Nyuwo, Yave, ti oovuwihiwa wa mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms92:9 Vekhaikhai Yave, amwiittanaanyu ootheene anoophwatiwa; atakhali ootheene anoomwaramwaxiwa." 
Psalms92:10 Mohaandyeerera ikurusaka ntoko sa inari; koottikittheliwa ni makhura manyowani. 
Psalms92:11 Maithwaaka yaahoona owiniwa wa amwiittanaaka; maaruwaaka yaahiiwa wiixinlela wa yaale yaatthuna okipaka yoonanara. 
Psalms92:12 Atthu oororomeleya anoottuva ntoko nivare; animunnuwa ntoko esedari* ya oLibanu 
Psalms92:13 ephatteiwe Mpaani mwa Yave; awosa anoottuva mmapuwani mwa Mulukwaahu. 
Psalms92:14 Naari ngwuuluvalani, nlelo animwiima; nlelo anoopwaherera oolipeene ereene akithi," 
Psalms92:15 elaleiyaka: “Yave ti a ekhaikhai; Owo ti Mwalaaka ni kheewoworu yoonanara mwa Yoowo.” 
Psalms93:1 Yave onlamula awarenleene sa otokweene; sa otokweene Yave oowarela ni oosareya ikuru. Elapo ya vathi eri yoolipeene ni kheenttikinyeya. 
Psalms93:2 Ehicaanyu ya emwene yaakhalihiwa khalayi; Nyuwo munkhala okhuma ohinaaye ompacereroni. 
Psalms93:3 Ii! Yave, ephareiya yohiiwiha orumawaya; ephareiya yookhuwela; ephareiya yootannya mitekutekusaya." 
Psalms93:4 Yave a Musulusulu ti a ikuruxa opwaha owali wa maahi; ti ooweraxa opwaha mitekuteku sa ephareiya. 
Psalms93:5 Ii! Yave, ikanosanyu ti soolipeene; otteela omphwaneliha Empaanyu wa mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms94:1 Ii! Yave, Muluku Nakukuttula; Ii! Muluku Nakukuttula – mwaare!" 
Psalms94:2 Mvenye, Mphuki a elapo ya vathi; mwaalivele oowiixoona yeeyo amphwanelaaya." 
Psalms94:3 Mpaka yaakhani, Yave; mpaka yaakhani atakhali anghakalalaaya?" 
Psalms94:4 Awosa anuuluma masu oowiixoona; atakhali ootheene ti oosareya wiikuxerera. 
Psalms94:5 Awosa aahonona mulokwaanyu Yave; awosa anghasula yoohiyeraanyu. 
Psalms94:6 Angwiiva asinaamukhweli ni anamarwa; mpaka angwiiva akhwaasuni," 
Psalms94:7 nlelo aneera: “Yave khannoona; Muluku a Yakobe khansuwela etthu.” 
Psalms94:8 Mwiiwexexe nyuwosa oohikhalano miruku; alolo nyuwo, mmwiwere wiiwexexa yaakhani?" 
Psalms94:9 Apaale Yoole opattunxe naaru khaniiwa? Apaale Yoole opanke niitho khanoona? 
Psalms94:10 Apaale Yoole onlaka miloko khanttaruxa? Yoole onaaxuttiha atthu khankhalano miruku? 
Psalms94:11 Yave oosuwela soowuupuwela sa atthu; oosuwela weera ti sa siiyo. 
Psalms94:12 Ii! Yave, ooreelihiwa ti mulopwana Nyuwo munimulakaanyu; yoole Nyuwo munimuxuttihaanyu Nlamulonanyu." 
Psalms94:13 Munimvaha wiitthuuwa mmahukuni mwa makacamiho vaheera wa atakhali ninthipeya nlitti. 
Psalms94:14 Vano Yave khahiya mulokwaawe; kharwa athaama yoohiyeraawe. 
Psalms94:15 Nthorihelo nnoohokoleelatho mweekhaikhaiyini ni oororomeleya ootheene anootthara yeeyo. 
Psalms94:16 Taani anaawanane atakhali akeerelaka Miyo? Taani anaakhale mpattaaka aawananaka anamananariha? 
Psalms94:17 Yave ahaakikhavihenre, saano kikhanleene moomaalani mwa okhwa." 
Psalms94:18 Miyo kaaheera: “Inaawosaka sihanle oserenguwa,” osivelawanyu woororomeleya, Yave, wookilipiha." 
Psalms94:19 Kaasareyaaka makacamiho, opepesawanyu wannahakalaliha okumaaka." 
Psalms94:20 Khoongwereya weera ehice ya emwene yoonanara yiiwanane ni Nyuwo – ehiceene yeele enruuhela ohiroromeleya niwoko na ikanosaya. 
Psalms94:21 Awosa amvaanelela okumi wa oororomeleya ni anaathorihela okhwa oohinthowa. 
Psalms94:22 Vaheera Yave ti Nipuronaka noolipaxa ni Mulukwaaka ti Mwala kintthawelaakamo. 
Psalms94:23 Owo onimwaamoroxela sootthekasaya ni onimwaaphwata niwoko na sootakhalasaya; Yave Mulukwaahu onimwaahonona. 
Psalms95:1 Nrowe, nimwiipeleke Yave ni ohakalala; nimukhuwelele Mwala a ovuluxiwawahu." 
Psalms95:2 Nrowe vamaithoniwawe ni otthapela nimvuwihaka ni icipo soottottopela," 
Psalms95:3 niwoko Yave ti Muluku Mutokweene; Mwene Mutokweene opwaha miluku sootheene. 
Psalms95:4 Wiixera wa elapo ya vathi ori mmatatanimwawe ni itthomela sa nyaako ti sawawe. 
Psalms95:5 Ephareiya ti yawawe niwoko ti Yoowo aapattunxe ni matataawe yaapaka etthaya yoowuuma. 
Psalms95:6 Nrowe, nilape ekokhorelo ohoolo wa Yave Mpattuxaahu," 
Psalms95:7 niwoko Owo ti Mulukwaahu ni hiyo nri muloko wa nikhoolanawe; muhuwo Owo onkosoopaawe. Olelo, mwiiwaka nsunawe," 
Psalms95:8 “Muhuumihe mirimasanyu ntoko mwaapankaanyu munikareni na oMeriba ni oMasa. 
Psalms95:9 Iwe makholowaanyu yaakoota murima, ekitannyaka, yaarimoonaru yeeyo kaapankaaka." 
Psalms95:10 Kaanyoonyeriwa ekhapira ele wa iyaakha miloko mixexe; keenre: ‘Awosa ti muloko woohapuwa ni khaaneetta mphironimwaka.’ 
Psalms95:11 Vano musaranimwaka kaalipela: ‘Awosa khaamvolowaru ngwiitthuuwanimwaka.’ ” 
Psalms96:1 Mmwiipele Yave ecipo enyowani; mmwiipele Yave, elapo yootheene." 
Psalms96:2 Mmwiipele Yave; muttottopele Nsinanawe; mulaleiyeke ovuluxawawe khula nihuku! 
Psalms96:3 Mulaleiye ovuwawawe variyari wa miloko; mitekosawe sootikhiniha variyari wa atthu a elapo. 
Psalms96:4 Vano Yave ti Mutokweene ni omphwanela ottottopeliwa wootheene; ontthuneya omoova Yoowo opwaha miluku sikina. 
Psalms96:5 Miluku sootheene sa miloko ti miluku soowootha, vaheera Yave oopattuxa erimu." 
Psalms96:6 Waara ni ovuwa ori ohoolowawe; ikuru ni ovuwa onkhala Mpaanimwawe. 
Psalms96:7 Mumvahe Yave, miloko sootheene nyuwosa, mumvahe Yave ovuwa ni ikuru!" 
Psalms96:8 Mumvahe Yave ovuwa Nsinanawe nimphwanelaaya; muruuheke sooveleela ni mphiiheke mmapuwanimwawe. 
Psalms96:9 Munlape Yave ngwaarani mwa otteelawawe; muthukumele ohoolowawe, amaki ootheene a mulaponi." 
Psalms96:10 Mweere eriyari ya miloko: “Yave onlamula.” Elapo ya vathi eri yoolipeene ni kheenttikinyeya. Owo onoothoriha miloko mweekhaikhaiyini. 
Psalms96:11 Erimu ehakalale ni elapo etthape; ephareiya ni sootheene sirimo sikhuwele! 
Psalms96:12 Imatta ni sootheene sirimo sihakalale; vano nyiri sootheene sa moothakoni siipe ni ohakalala. 
Psalms96:13 Seiyo siniipa vamaithoni wa Yave, niwoko Owo ongwa, aani onrweela weera athorihe elapo ya vathi. Owo onoothoriha elapo mweekhaikhaiyini ni miloko sootheene moota woororomeleya." 
Psalms97:1 Yave onlamula, miloko sihakalale; icirumba soorakamela sihakalaletho." 
Psalms97:2 Mahutte ooriipihana ni wiilihana aamurica; ekhaikhai ni ororomeleya ti mathipelo a ehicaawe ya emwene. 
Psalms97:3 Mooro onrowa ohoolowawe waahisaka amwiittanaawe a mukhwipimwawe. 
Psalms97:4 Overinyawawe ommwaleela elapo; elapo ya vathi enoona, enatetereya." 
Psalms97:5 Nyaako sintothowa ntoko nnyoma vamaithoni wa Yave, ohoolo wa Yave a elapo ya vathi yootheene." 
Psalms97:6 Erimu enlaleiya ororomeleyawawe ni miloko sootheene sinoona ovuwawawe. 
Psalms97:7 Ootheene anlapa icaambulo anuulihiheya muru, yaale aniivuwihera miluku soolokottha. Munkokhorele Yoowo nyuwosa miluku sootheene soolokottha!" 
Psalms97:8 oSiyoni oniiwa, onahakalala ni mittetthe sa oYuda singhakalalaxatho niwoko na soothorihasanyu, Yave." 
Psalms97:9 Vano Nyuwo, Yave, ti Mutokweenexa a elapo yootheene; mumvuwihiwa opwaha miluku sootheene!" 
Psalms97:10 Yaale animusivela Yave ethanye soonanara, niwoko Owo onkosoopa okumi wa oororomeleyaawe, aavuluxaka mmatatani mwa atakhali." 
Psalms97:11 Oororomeleya aamwaleeliwa ni waara ni ohakalala onaakhuneela atthu a murima wooreera. 
Psalms97:12 Munghakalalele Yave nyuwosa oororomeleya ni muttottopele Nsinanawe Nootteela! 
Psalms98:1 Mmwiipele Yave ecipo enyowani, niwoko oopaka itthu sootikhiniha; ntatanawe noolopwana ni moonowaawe wootteela wookwanihera ovuluxa." 
Psalms98:2 Yave oolaleiya ovuluxawawe ni ohoonihera ekhaikhaiyaawe miloko. 
Psalms98:3 Owo ohuupuwelela osivelawawe woohihiyanyiheya ni ororomeleyawawe wa ikhapira sa oYixrayeli; elapo ya vathi yootheene yohoona ovuluxa wa Mulukwaahu. 
Psalms98:4 Munkhuwelele Yave ni ohakalala, elapo yootheene; munttottopele ni icipo soohakalala ni orumawaya." 
Psalms98:5 Mmwiipele Yave icipo ni makita, aani makita vamoha ni oruma wa icipo," 
Psalms98:6 ni malope ni oruma wa nipalapatta – mukhuwele ni ohakalala vamaithoni wa Yave ori Mwene! 
Psalms98:7 Ephareiya ni sootheene sirimo sirumeke; hiihotho elapo ya vathi ni amakaaya ootheene. 
Psalms98:8 Nyooloko siipe makuphi; nyaako siipe vamoha ni ohakalala; 
Psalms98:9 seiyo siipe vamaithoni wa Yave, niwoko onrweelaa othoriha elapo. Owo onoothoriha elapo mweekhaikhaiyini ni miloko moota woororomeleya." 
Psalms99:1 Yave onlamula – miloko sithukumele; Owo onkilaathi vahiceniwawe ya emwene variyari wa akerubini* – elapo etetereyeke! 
Psalms99:2 Yave ti Mutokweenexa oSiyoni; Owo ti oovuwihiwa opwaha miloko sootheene. 
Psalms99:3 Seiyo sittottopeleke Nsinananyu ntokotoko ni noowooveya nri nootteela. 
Psalms99:4 Mwene ti a ikuru – Owo onsivela ekhaikhai. Mookhaliha meerelo a ekhaikhai; moopaka oYakobe yeeyo eri yoowookoleleya ni yoororomeleya. 
Psalms99:5 Mumvuwihe Yave Mulukwaahu ni mukokhorele vathi wa ehicaawe ya emwene; Owo ti Ootteela. 
Psalms99:6 Moisesi ni Aharoni yaalikeleliwa mpatta wa asaserdotaawe; Samuweli aari mpatta wa yaale yiitthana Nsinanawe; awosa yannamwiitthana Yave ni Owo annawaakhula. 
Psalms99:7 Owo aahuuluma ni yaawo munrimbuni na nihutte; awosa yiiwelela ikano ni malamulo Owo aavaahaawe. 
Psalms99:8 Ii! Yave, Mulukwaahu, Nyuwo mwaawaakhula; wa aYixrayeli mwaari Muluku onlevelela mwaamwaattaruxelaru sootthekasaya." 
Psalms99:9 Mumvuwihe Yave Mulukwaahu ni mulape vamwaakwaawe wootteela, niwoko Yave Mulukwaahu ti Ootteela." 
Psalms100:1 Mmwiipele Yave, atthu ootheene a mulaponi." 
Psalms100:2 Munlape Yave ni ohakalala; mphiyeke vahoolowawe ni icipo sa ohakalala. 
Psalms100:3 Musuwele weera Yave ti Mulukwaahu. Owo aanipattuxa ni hiyo nri a Yoowo. Nri mulokwaawe ni muhuwo wa nipuronaya na oca. 
Psalms100:4 Mvolowe mmilakonimwawe muntthapelaka, mmapuwanimwawe munttottopelaka; muntthapele ni mvuwihe Nsinanawe." 
Psalms100:5 Vano Yave ti ooreera ni osivelawawe woohihiyanyiheya ti woohimala. Ororomeleyawawe onkhala ni ikhapira sootheene. 
Psalms101:1 Kiniipa sa osivelawanyu ni ororomeleyawanyu; wa Nyuwo, Yave, kiniipa icipo soottottopela." 
Psalms101:2 Kinimwiikosoopa weera keette moota wookwaneleya. Mmwikikumanane yaakhani? Kinookhala vaatewaka ni murima woohikhalano nthowa. 
Psalms101:3 Nkintthunaru woona etthu yoonanara; kinthanya miteko sa atthu oohiroromeleya; seiyo khasirwa sikilamulatho. 
Psalms101:4 Kiri ottaiwene wa ooriheya vamurimani; nkintthuna wiitakansa mwa soonanara. 
Psalms101:5 Kinoommaaliha yoowo ommuuluma wiiphiini mukhwaawe; yoowo ooweemexa maitho ni murima woowiixoona nkinimvilela. 
Psalms101:6 Maithwaaka angwoona atthu oororomeleya mulaponi weera awosa ekhale ni Miyo; yoole oneetta moota wookwaneleya paahi ti aneera akirumeele. 
Psalms101:7 Khawoworu ompaka itthu soolokottha anakhala Mpaanimwaka hata namootha khapwaherera okhala vamaithoniwaka. 
Psalms101:8 Khula oxeexelo kinimwaamaaliha atakhali a mulaponi; kinoowoomola anamapaka soonanara ootheene musidadeni mwa Yave. 
Psalms102:1 Mwiiwe nivekelonaka Yave; okhuwelelawaka ekhavihero woophiyereni. 
Psalms102:2 Muhikihuluwe miyo kaakhalaka moohaawani. Mukiiweke ni kaakhuwelaka, mukaakhuleke woowaakuveya." 
Psalms102:3 Vano mahukwaaka anlakaseya ntoko mwiixi; makhuvaaka anza ntoko makhala a mooro. 
Psalms102:4 Murimaaka ti woopheepuwa ni woowuuma ntoko malaxi; mpaka kinnattiwala oca. 
Psalms102:5 Niwoko na wiipulelawaka kihanle makuvaru. 
Psalms102:6 Kiri ntoko esiisi ya munikareni; ntoko esiisi eriyari ya mathala. 
Psalms102:7 Nkingwera okona; kiri ntoko mwaapalame meekhaawe ari vampani. 
Psalms102:8 Ehuhu yootheene amwiittanaaka annakitthebwa; yaale ankiruwana amvarela muteko nsinanaka weera elapheno. 
Psalms102:9 Vano kinca ettuura ntoko yoocaaka ni yoowuraaka entakansereya ni maithori," 
Psalms102:10 niwoko na isarasanyu sitokotoko mweenre mukikhootta munakoomolela ottaiwanyu. 
Psalms102:11 Mahukwaaka ari ntoko munttuusi wa oxekuwa; kimpheepuwa ntoko malaxi. 
Psalms102:12 Vaheera Nyuwo, Yave, munkilaathi vahiceni ya emwene wa mahuku ootheene; epilaanyu empwaherera wa ikhapira sootheene." 
Psalms102:13 Munoovenya, mmorelaka ikharari oSiyoni, niwoko yoophiya ehuhu yoomoonihera murimaanyu wooreera; yoophiya ehuhu yootthuneya." 
Psalms102:14 Vano malukwaaya anaasiveliha arumeiyaanyu; mathalaaya antannya ikhararisaya. 
Psalms102:15 Miloko sootheene sinimoova Nsina na Yave; mamwene ootheene a elapo anoottittimiha ovuwawanyu. 
Psalms102:16 Yave onoorasela oSiyoni ni onimwiixoonihera moovuwanimwawe. 
Psalms102:17 Owo onaakhula nivekelo na oowiixeetta; khanramusa wiidyoonttelelawaya. 
Psalms102:18 Seiyo silepeliwe ikhapira sa muhoolo weera muloko ohinaaye okhala omuttottopele Yave olaleiyaka: 
Psalms102:19 “Yave onoona vanipuroniwawe nootteela na osulu; ongwehaweha elapo ya vathi areene wiirimu 
Psalms102:20 weera iiwe ottaandawula wa ootthukiwa ni aataphule athoriheliwe okhwa.” 
Psalms102:21 Hiiho Nsina na Yave nnoolaleiwa oSiyoni ni ottottopeliwawawe oYerusaleemu," 
Psalms102:22 miloko ni omwene waathukumanaka weera omulape Yave. 
Psalms102:23 Eriyari ya okumaaka, Owo oomaliha ikurusaka; Owo oovukula mahukwaaka." 
Psalms102:24 Vano kaavekela: Ii! Mulukwaaka, muhikivenxe eriyari ya mahukwaaka. Mahukwaanyu ampwaherera wa mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms102:25 Ompacereroni mwaakhaliha mathipelo a elapo ya vathi ni wiirimu woopakiwa ni matataanyu. 
Psalms102:26 Awosa anooriheya, mene Nyuwo munoopwaherera okhala; ootheene animuuluvala ntoko ikuwo; munimwaaceendya ntoko ikuwo ni anoovonyeriwa okerekhere." 
Psalms102:27 Vaheera Nyuwo munookhala oohiceendyeya ni iyaakhasanyu khasimmala. 
Psalms102:28 Anamwane a arumeiyaanyu anookhalano woomakawo; ikhapirasaya sinootekihiwa vamaitoniwanyu. 
Psalms103:1 Ii! Okumaaka, munttottopele Yave; okumaaka wootheene, muttottopele Nsinanawe Nootteela!" 
Psalms103:2 Ii! Okumaaka, munttottopele Yave ni muhittiwale sookipakelasawe sootheene," 
Psalms103:3 mwa Yoowo onlevelela sootthekasanyu sootheene ni onlamiha irettasanyu sootheene. 
Psalms103:4 Owo onoopola okumaanyu mmahiyeni ni onootthukani ecireemba ya osivela ni ikharari. 
Psalms103:5 Owo onkwanihera okhalawanyu ni itthu sooreerela moota wooweera omiravowaanyu othatuwe onyowani ntoko wa xaaka. 
Psalms103:6 Yave ongwoonihera oohasuliwa ootheene ekhaikhai ni ororomeleya. 
Psalms103:7 Aamusuweliha Moisesi iphirosawe ni mitekosawe wa muloko wa aYixrayeli. 
Psalms103:8 Yave ti a ikharari ni a murima wooreera; Owo ti oopisa onyoonyiwa ni oosareya osivela. 
Psalms103:9 Owo khanoothera wa mahuku ootheene hata khampwaherera okhala oonyoonyiweene. 
Psalms103:10 Owo khannipakela attharihaka sootthekasahu hata khannihokoloxera sootakhalasahu. 
Psalms103:11 Vano mooteene yoowo erimu erakamelannaaya ni elapo ya vathi, hiihotho ti waasivelawawe yaale ammoova." 
Psalms103:12 Owo onnirakameliha sootthekasahu ntoko orakamelanawaya ninkhuma nsuwa ni ninkela nsuwa. 
Psalms103:13 Yave onaamorela ikharari yaale ammoova ntoko tiithi onaamorelaawe ikharari anamwanaawe. 
Psalms103:14 Vano Owo oosuwela moota nipakiwaahu ni weera hiyo nri ntthupi. 
Psalms103:15 Vano mwaha wa mutthu – ori ntoko malaxi; owo onttuva ntoko ethutu ya ntuphini; 
Psalms103:16 yoopaka epheyo, eyo emvavihiwa, ehinooneya nipuro yaattuvalaaya." 
Psalms103:17 Vaheera osivela woororomeleya wa Yave ori woohimala wa yaale ammoova ni ekhaikhaiyaawe eri ni anamwane a anamwanaaya," 
Psalms103:18 yaale antthara wiiraanawawe ni anuupuwelela wiiwelela ikanosawe. 
Psalms103:19 Yave ookhaliha ehicaawe ya emwene wiirimu ni omwenaawe onlamula soothesene. 
Psalms103:20 Andyelo nyuwosa, munttottopele Yave; nyuwosa ooweraxa muniiwelela maswaawe." 
Psalms103:21 Anakhotto a wiirimu nyuwosa, munttottopele Yave, nyuwosa arumeiyaawe mumpaka otthunawawe." 
Psalms103:22 Mitekosawe sa mapuro ootheene moomwenenimwawe, munttottopele Yave. Ii! Okumaaka, munttottopele Yave!" 
Psalms104:1 Ii! Okumaaka, munttottopele Yave! Ii! Yave Mulukwaaka, Nyuwo ti Mutokweenexa ngwarenle sa otokweene ni soowaara." 
Psalms104:2 Owo ohiiwariha waara ntoko mukaandyo; Owo ontapuruxa erimu ntoko eluttu. 
Psalms104:3 Oniikaathi itthaabwa sa ekwartwaawe ya osulu vasulu wa maahi a wiirimu. Owo ompaka mahutte ikaarosawe ni oneetta mmapuphani a epheyo. 
Psalms104:4 Owo omvarela muteko epheyo ntoko anamitthengaawe ni malumi a mooro ntoko arumeiyaawe. 
Psalms104:5 Aakhaliha elapo mmathipelonimwaya; khoongwereya weera ettikinyeye. 
Psalms104:6 Mookhuneela elapo ni ephareiya yoowiixa ntoko mukaandyo; maahi aaneeliha nyaako. 
Psalms104:7 Vaheera muhiihaka, maahi yaatthawa; yiiwaka oruma wa etaraanyu, yaawelela." 
Psalms104:8 Yaawela mmanyaakoni enasereneela mureyareyani wa mapuro muthanlenlaanyu. 
Psalms104:9 Mwaakhaliha mwiinano awo ahingweraaya olapuwa; kheerwa ekhuneelatho etthaya. 
Psalms104:10 Owo ohaakhaliha anaattuuttu mphattuwelani ni antthimaka maahi eriyari ya nyaako. 
Psalms104:11 Anaattuuttu anaavaha maahi axinama a ntuphini; abuuru a ntuphini ammaliha ntthonanaya. 
Psalms104:12 Ipalame sa wiirimu sinteka ipuurusaya mukerekhere maahi; siniipa variyari wa iphandi. 
Psalms104:13 Mmakwartunimwawe sa wiirimu Owo onnanaaniha nyaako; etthaya emvona soowiima sa mitekosawe. 
Psalms104:14 Ti Yave onunnuwiha moocihamo mihuwo ni nyiri omphatteyaawe mutthu weera siruuhele yooca mulaponi: 
Psalms104:15 eviinyu enghakalaliha murima wa mutthu; makhura ammwaariha ekhovaawe ni yooca enimvaha ikuru. 
Psalms104:16 Nyiri sa Yave sinkhala soonaaniheyasene – esedari* ya oLibanu ophatteiyaawe. 
Psalms104:17 Mwemmo ipalame sintekaayamo ipuurusaya; epuuru ya ntiki eri mwaapinyeiruni* 
Psalms104:18 Nyaako soorakamela siri sa ikhomaci; mmakhukuni ti sintthawelaayamo ipila. 
Psalms104:19 Mweeri onthoonyera ihuhu soohiyanahiyana sa eyaakha ni nsuwa noosuwela ehuhu ninneelaaya. 
Psalms104:20 Nyuwo munruuha epiphi, oniila; vano axinama a ntuphini animweetteetta." 
Psalms104:21 Amwatto aniipa emwaasaka oomvara emvekelaka Muluku sookhuurasaya; 
Psalms104:22 vaheera nsuwa naakhumaka, awosa anoohokolowa, eniixaatalela munikhukunimwaya." 
Psalms104:23 Vano mutthu ti onrowaawe omutekoniwawe, anavara mpaka wiila." 
Psalms104:24 Ii! Yave! Sincipalexa ti soopakasanyu! Moopaka sootheene seiyo mmirukunimwanyu. Elapo yoosareya itthu mpattunxaanyu. 
Psalms104:25 Yookhala ephareiya etokotoko ni yoothanuwa; mwemmo sinkhala soopattuxiwa soohaalikeleya – sa okumi sitokotoko ni sikhaani. 
Psalms104:26 Mwemmo annaviramo makula matokotoko nitho ookhalamo ntutu mumpattunxaanyu weera atheelekemo. 
Psalms104:27 Sootheene seiyo sinoowehani Nyuwo siwehereraka weera mvahe yooca mweehuhuni yootthuneya. 
Psalms104:28 Mwaavahaka, iyo sinnaakhela; mwaahulaka ntatananyu, iyo sinnavona ni itthu sooreera." 
Psalms104:29 Mwaahuluwaka, iyo sinoopupuruma ni mwaavenxaka ngwiyaaya, sinimookhwa sihokoleelaka vantthupini." 
Psalms104:30 Mwiiseelelaka ngwiyaanyu, iyo sinoophattuwa ni munrehereratho mulaponi." 
Psalms104:31 Ovuwa wa Yave opwaherere wa mahuku ootheene; Yave ahakalalele seiyo opattunxaawe. 
Psalms104:32 Owo ongweha etthaya ni eyo enootetereya; Owo ontava nyaako ni seiyo sinootthuwa. 
Psalms104:33 Kinimwiipela Yave mahuku ootheene a okumaaka; kinoomuttottopela Mulukwaaka mookuminimwaka wootheene. 
Psalms104:34 Otthokelelawaka omuhakalaliheke, niwoko mwa Yoowo kinnahakalala." 
Psalms104:35 Vaheera anamattheka elakaseye mweelaponi ni atakhali ehikhaletho. Ii! Okumaaka, munttottopele Yave. Munttottopele Yave." 
Psalms105:1 Muntthapele Yave; mulaleiye Nsinanawe; musuwelihe miloko seiye opankaawe. 
Psalms105:2 Mmwiipele Yoowo; mmwiipele icipo soottottopela; mulaleiye mitekosawe sootikhiniha sootheene. 
Psalms105:3 Mvuwihe Nsinanawe Nootteela; mirima sa yaale ammwaasa Yave sihakalaleke. 
Psalms105:4 Mungwehe Yave ni ikurusawe; mwaasaase ekhovaawe wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms105:5 Muupuwelele sootikhiniha opankaawe – aani sootikhinihasawe ni soolakela ohimmaawe," 
Psalms105:6 nyuwosa ikhapira sa Abrahaamu, murumeiyaawe ni nyuwosa anamwawe a Yakobe, oothanliwaawe." 
Psalms105:7 Owo ti Yave Mulukwaahu; ikanosawe ti sa elapo yootheene. 
Psalms105:8 Owo onuupuwelela wiiraanawawe wa mahuku ootheene; masu olamulenlaawe wa ikhapira macira muloko," 
Psalms105:9 aani onuupuwelela wiiraana aapankaawe ni Abrahaamu; nlipelo aapankaawe ni Isaki. 
Psalms105:10 Owo aamuroromeliha wiiraana yoowo ni Yakobe ntoko ekano; wa aYixrayeli ntoko wiiraana woohimala, eenraawe:" 
Psalms105:11 “Kinimoovahani nyuwo elapo ya oKanaani ntoko yoohiyeriwa eri yawinyu.” 
Psalms105:12 Awosa nlelo ereene atthu vakhaani – aani atthu vakhaani yaari oohikhalano elapo," 
Psalms105:13 eviraviraka mmilokoni soohiyanahiyana, emwene emwene," 
Psalms105:14 Muluku khaatthunihenreru ohooxiwa, mene niwoko na yaawosa aahaahiiha mamwene aweerelaka:" 
Psalms105:15 Muhaatave oottikittheliwaaka; muhaananarihe maprofeetaaka. 
Psalms105:16 Owo aarumihela etala mweelaponi, anaphwata soocasaya sootheene" 
Psalms105:17 aamurumiha mulopwana ohoolowaya- Yoseefe aathumihiwe ntoko epottha. 
Psalms105:18 Owo aatthukiwa mmettoni ni onyooro ni yaamutthuka muxiko ni eyuuma 
Psalms105:19 mpaka okwanihereya yeeyo aahimmaawe ni mpaka masu a Yave yaahaakhuleliha weera aahima ekhaikhai. 
Psalms105:20 Mwene aalamulela weera ataphuliwe; mulamuli a atthu aamutapuxa. 
Psalms105:21 Mwene aamukhaliha mutokweene a vaatewawe; namalamula a sootheene aarinaawe 
Psalms105:22 weera aalake anamwane a mwene seiye aatthunaawe ni aaxuttihe asitokweenaawe miruku. 
Psalms105:23 Vano Yixrayeli aavolowa wExipitu; Yakobe aakhala ntoko namarwa mweelaponi ya oHami. 
Psalms105:24 Yave aarelanyiha mulokwaawe anatatuxa woolipaxa waapwaha amwiittanaaya. 
Psalms105:25 Vano aaceendya mirima sa amwiittanaaya weera ethanye mulokwaawe epaceraka ovaanelela yoowo. 
Psalms105:26 Aamurumiha murumeiyaawe Moisesi ni Aharoni, mwa yaawo aathanlalaawe." 
Psalms105:27 Mwa yaawotho aapaka ineneerosawe sootikhiniha ni miiriirasawe mweelaponi ya oHami. 
Psalms105:28 Aarumihela epiphi mweelaponi ni yaakhala, niwoko awosa yaavaanya maswaawe." 
Psalms105:29 Aatatuxa maahaaya ephome atannyeraka okhwa wa ihopasaya. 
Psalms105:30 Elapwaaya yaasareya anaphulu mwa yaale yaavolongwe mpaka mukwartuni mwa anamalamulaaya. 
Psalms105:31 Aalamulela ni nasope a amunkaanga aaphiya ni anlukuveeve yaasareya elapwaaya. 
Psalms105:32 Ohiya epula aarumihela maralala ni waakhala overinya mweelaponimwaya yootheene 
Psalms105:33 ophwataka nyirisaya sa iwuuva* ni sa ifiigu ahononaka nyiri sa elapo. 
Psalms105:34 Aalamulela, anawa nasope; misoope soohaalikeleya," 
Psalms105:35 mwa seiye saawennye mapoonda ootheene a elapo ele – sooruwera sootheene sa imattasaya. 
Psalms105:36 Vahoolowaya aahiiva matthaara ootheene a wExipitu – anamwanaaya asilopwana oopacera ootheene. 
Psalms105:37 Aakhumiha muloko wa aYixrayeli okunxeene eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yincipalexa ni khawoworu ahaakhalanne etthu variyari wa ipuumbasaya. 
Psalms105:38 wExipitu waahakalala aYixrayeli epwahakaru, niwoko yaahaattenguwaxa aYixrayeli." 
Psalms105:39 Muluku aawiikathera nihutte weera waakhaleleke munttuusi ni mooro weera waamwaleele ohiyu. 
Psalms105:40 Awosa yaamvekela ni Owo aahaaruuhela anapiri ni aahaavoniha ni sooca sa wiirimu. 
Psalms105:41 Aamuthorola mwala enakhumamo maahi mwa yaawo yaatthimanke moolokweene munikareni. 
Psalms105:42 Vano aahuupuwelela yoororomeliha yootteela aampakenlaawe murumeiyaawe Abrahaamu. 
Psalms105:43 Aakhumiha mulokwaawe ohakalalaka; oothanliwaawe waatteelaka murima. 
Psalms105:44 Aavaha ilapo sa miloko ni aYixrayeli yaakuxa sooreerela sa miteko sa miloko sikina 
Psalms105:45 weera yiiwelele ikanosawe ni ethokorore malamulowaawe. Munttottopele Yave! 
Psalms106:1 Munttottopele Yave! Muntthapele Yave niwoko Owo ti ooreeraxa. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms106:2 Khawowo ongwera olaleiya nnenesene soopaka sa ikuru sa Yave hata othalihera ottottopeleyawawe moota omphwanelaaya. 
Psalms106:3 Ooreelihiwa ti yaale anthokorora murima woororomeleya ni ampaka mahuku ootheene yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai. 
Psalms106:4 Ii! Yave, mukuupuwelele miyo mooniheraka mulokwaanyu murima wooreera; mukikhavihere Nyuwo mwaavuluxaka yoowo" 
Psalms106:5 weera kikhale mpatta wa oweettelawaya nnene oothanliwaanyu. Hiiho kinoohakalala vamoha ni mulokwaanyu, kittottopelaka vamoha ni yoohiyeraanyu." 
Psalms106:6 Hiyo noottheka ntoko makholowaahu yaatthenkaaya; hiyo noopaka soonanara, nnakhala attiyamaaru." 
Psalms106:7 Makholowaahu yaaraaya wExipitu, khayaapwantthe sootikhinihasanyu; khayuupuwelenle mitekosanyu sincipale sa murima wooreera ni yaavaanya mukerekhere ephareiya, eyo tiiyo Ephareiya Yooxeera." 
Psalms106:8 Hata hiiho Owo aahaavuluxa eerelaka Nsinanawe weera oonihere ikurusawe sitokotoko. 
Psalms106:9 Owo aahiiha Ephareiya Yooxeera ni eyo yaahuuma; Owo aahaahoolela mpuwa ntoko yaari munikareni. 
Psalms106:10 Owo aahaavuluxa mmatatani mwa yaale yaathanya; aawoopola mmatatani mwa amwiittana. 
Psalms106:11 Maahi yaahaakhuneela amwiittanaaya ni khawoworu aahanle. 
Psalms106:12 Vano yaahaakhulela soororomelihasawe ni yaamwiipela icipo sa ottottopela. 
Psalms106:13 Wa soothesene, yaattiwala woowaakuveya seiye aapankaawe ni khayaaweherenre osuwela mirukusawe." 
Psalms106:14 Yeettihiwa ni soohaawelasaya munikareni, aani munikareni yaamoota murima Muluku." 
Psalms106:15 Vano Owo aahaavaha yeeyo yaamvekenlaaya; mene aahaarumihelatho eretta yoowoopiha. 
Psalms106:16 Waakonelingwe yaamukhalela nrima Moisesi ni Aharoni, mwa yaale yaatteelihiwe ni Yave." 
Psalms106:17 Etthaya yaahuleya, enammira Datani; yaamvitha nakupa a Abirami." 
Psalms106:18 Mooro waakhumelela eriyari ya anamattharaaya; malumaaya yaahaalaliha atakhali. 
Psalms106:19 oHorebi yaampaka mwaamombe ni yaalapa muluku woolokottha waahaniwe ni iyuuma. 
Psalms106:20 Yaaceendya ovuwa yaarinaaya ni Muluku ni ecaambulo ya emombe elopwana mwa yeeyo enca malaxi. 
Psalms106:21 Yaamuttiwala Muluku Mvuluxaaya, mwa Yoowo aapanke itthu sitokotoko wExipitu;" 
Psalms106:22 sootikhiniha mweelaponi ya oHami ni miteko sooweraxa mukerekhere Ephareiya Yooxeera. 
Psalms106:23 Vano Muluku aaheera weera onimwaaphwata, mene Moisesi, oothanliwaawe, aaheemela ohoolowawe vaniproniwaya weera isara sa Muluku sihaaphwate." 
Psalms106:24 Vahoolowaya awosa yaaramusa elapo yooreeraxa; khayaaroromenle yoororomelihaawe. 
Psalms106:25 Awosa yaattaandawula mmaheemanimwaya ehimwiiwelelaka Yave. 
Psalms106:26 Tivawo aawuumenlaawe eemenxeene ntata weera Owo onimwaamoroxela munikareni; 
Psalms106:27 ni onoomwaraxela ikhapirasaya variyari wa miloko ni ilapo sikinatho. 
Psalms106:28 Yaahiixinnyerera wa Bahali* a oPeyori enaca sooveleela saavahiwe miluku sookhwa. 
Psalms106:29 Yaatannya isara sa Yave ni mitekosaya ni naakhumelela nihooxo eriyaraaya. 
Psalms106:30 Vaheera Pinehasi aaheemela aweerelaka yaawo ni nihooxo naamala. 
Psalms106:31 Eyo aakhaliheriwe ntoko muteko wa ekhaikhai weera yuupuweleliwe mahuku ootheene wa ikhapira sootheene.
