Psalms106:32 Mmaahini a oMeriba aYixrayeli yaamunyoonyiha Muluku ni, niwoko na yaawo, Moisesi aavolowa mmakacamihoni mancipale;" 
Psalms106:33 yaavaanya Munepa wa Muluku ni Moisesi aahuuluma woohitthokelela. 
Psalms106:34 Awosa khayaaphwante miloko ntoko Yave aalamulenlaawe; 
Psalms106:35 Ohiyanawaya yaahiitakansera ni miloko, ettharaka ikhovelelosaya." 
Psalms106:36 Yaalapa milukusaya soolokottha mwa seiye saathatungwe ntaphanaya. 
Psalms106:37 Yaapakela sooveleela minepa soonanara yaahisaka asinamwanaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana. 
Psalms106:38 Yaayeeha ephome yoohinthowa; ephome ya anamwanaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana yaaveleeleliwa miluku soolokottha sa oKanaani ni elapo ele yaanyoowihiwa ni ephomaaya. 
Psalms106:39 Yaahiitatuxa oohiitteela niwoko na yeeyo yaapankaaya; yaathatuwa mapuuta niwoko na mitekosaya. 
Psalms106:40 Tivawo Yave aanyoonyeringwaawe mulokwaawe, athanyaka yoohiyeraawe." 
Psalms106:41 Aawinnyerera mmatatani mwa miloko ni amwiittanaaya yaahaalamula. 
Psalms106:42 Amwiittanaaya yaahaahasula yaalamulaka ni ikurusaya soovihaxa. 
Psalms106:43 Yave annaatapuxa imaara sincipale, mene yannapwaherera ni mirima soovaanelela ni yannattharexexa sootthekasaya." 
Psalms106:44 Vaheera iiwaka okhuwelawaya, Owo aapwattha othananawaya." 
Psalms106:45 Aahuupuwelela owiiraananawawe ni niwoko na waasivelawawe otokotoko aahiya waattaruxa. 
Psalms106:46 Aapakiha weera anamawinaaya yaamorele ikharari. 
Psalms106:47 Ii! Yave Mulukwaahu, munivuluxe ni munithukumanyihe variyari wa miloko weera nitthapele Nsinananyu Nootteela* nivuwihaka ngwoottottopelanimwanyu." 
Psalms106:48 Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli atthapeliwe wa mahuku ootheene. Miloko sootheene seere: Ame*! Munttottopele Yave." 
Psalms107:1 Muntthapele Yave, niwoko Owo ti a murima wooreeraxa ni osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms107:2 Oovulixiwa a Yave anghima yeeyo – yaale Owo aatapunxaawe mmatatani mwa amwiittana; 
Psalms107:3 yaale aathukumanyinghaawe mweelaponi – mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa; ninkela nsuwa; ottuttuwani ni ohitto. 
Psalms107:4 Akina yeetteetta munikareni ni mweelaponi yoowuumelela ehiphwanyaka esidade weera yiitekihemo. 
Psalms107:5 Yaakhalano etala ni ntthona ni okumaaya waahanle vakhaani olakaseya. 
Psalms107:6 Moohaawanimwaya yaamukhuwelela Yave ni Owo aawoopola moothanananimwaya. 
Psalms107:7 Owo aahaahoolela mphironi yoolipeene aaronghaka musidadeni yoomakeya. 
Psalms107:8 Awosa emutthapele Yave niwoko na osivelawawe woohimala ni mitekosawe sootikhiniha aapakenlaawe atthu. 
Psalms107:9 Vano Owo onaamaaliha anantthona ni onaavoniha anatala ni itthu sooreerela. 
Psalms107:10 Akina yaakilaathi mpiphini ni mmunttuusini wa okhwa; oothananeene ni etthukiweene," 
Psalms107:11 niwoko yaavaanya masu a Muluku eramusaka olaka wa a Musulusulu. 
Psalms107:12 Tivawo Owo aavarihalaawe miteko soovihaxa; awosa ankwattuliwa, mene khawoworu oowaakhavihera." 
Psalms107:13 Vano yaamukhuwelela Yave mmahooxonimwaya ni Owo aawoopola moothanananimwaya. 
Psalms107:14 Aahaakhumiha mpiphini ni mmunttuusini wa okhwa anapasa onyooro yaatthukeliwaayano. 
Psalms107:15 Awosa emutthapele Yave niwoko na osivelawawe woohimala ni mitekosawe sootikhiniha aapakenlaawe atthu," 
Psalms107:16 niwoko Owo oopwexakasa masele a ebronze* anaakhula anampattika a eyuuma. 
Psalms107:17 Akinatho aathatuwa masikini niwoko na iphirosaya soovaanya enahaawa niwoko na sootakhalasaya. 
Psalms107:18 Khayaatthunaru oca ni yaahaattamela mulako wa okhwa. 
Psalms107:19 Vano yaamukhuwelela Yave mmahooxonimwaya ni Owo aawoopola moothanananimwaya. 
Psalms107:20 Owo aarumiha maswaawe anaalamiha; Owo aahaavuluxa mookhwaani. 
Psalms107:21 Awosa emutthapele Yave niwoko na osivelawawe woohimala ni mitekosawe sootikhiniha aapakenlaawe atthu. 
Psalms107:22 Awosa epakeleke sooveleela sootthapela elaleiyaka mitekosaya ni icipo sa ohakalala. 
Psalms107:23 Akinatho yaarowa mphareiyani ni makula matokotoko; yaampaka nakoso mmaahini oowaatta. 
Psalms107:24 Yaahoona miteko sa Yave; soopakasawe sootikhiniha moowiixera. 
Psalms107:25 Vano Muluku aahuuluma, anatannya epheyo etokotoko yaawelinghe mitekuteku." 
Psalms107:26 Makula matokotoko yaavonyereya osulu, emorexeleyaka moowiixera; ngwoopihanimwaya yaatteenguwa." 
Psalms107:27 Yaaveveleyaxa ntoko anamuhapaliwa; owerawaya waahooceeleya. 
Psalms107:28 Vano yaamukhuwelela Yave mmakacamihonimwaya ni Owo aawoopola moohaawanimwaya. 
Psalms107:29 Aatatuxa ettheku epheyo yoomaaleleya; mitekuteku sa ephareiya saamaala. 
Psalms107:30 Awosa yaahakalala ephareiya yaamaaleleiyaaya ni Owo aahaarongha mmuxeloni yaatthunaaya. 
Psalms107:31 Awosa emutthapele Yave niwoko na osivelawawe woohimala ni mitekosawe sootikhiniha aapakenlaawe atthu. 
Psalms107:32 Emvuwihe munthukumanoni mwa atthu ni emuttottopele variyari wa asitokweene. 
Psalms107:33 Owo ontatuxa nyooloko nikare; ongwuumeleliha anaattuuttu," 
Psalms107:34 atatuxaka ya maakha etthaya yooruwereya niwoko na sootakhala sa yaale yaamankewo. 
Psalms107:35 Owo ontatuxa nikare maratta ni ilapo soowuumaxa anaattuuttu; 
Psalms107:36 Onaakilaathihawo anamavoliwa weera eteke esidade yoomakeya. 
Psalms107:37 Yaahaalawo irooro, enaphatteya imatta sa iwuuva* mwa seiye yaahemphaaya soowaatta;" 
Psalms107:38 Aahaareeliha ni awosa yaahaattaxa; Owo khaatthunihera weera mihuwosaya sivukuwe. 
Psalms107:39 Wa soothesene, yaavukuliwaaya waattawaya, yaangyevihiwa, yaahasuliwa, mweerisani ni moothananani." 
Psalms107:40 Muluku mwa Yoowo onaakuruxela maneethi oramusiwa ohaaxoraxoriha munikareni moohikhalamo iphiro. 
Psalms107:41 Vaheera wa oohaawa aahaavenxa moosiwani ni aahaattiha imusisaya ntoko mihuwo. 
Psalms107:42 Oororomeleya ootheene animoona sootheene iyo enahakalala, mene atakhali ootheene anoomaala." 
Psalms107:43 Yaale arino miruku yiiweke itthu iya ni etthokelele osivela otokotoko wa Yave. 
Psalms108:1 Ii! Muluku, murimaaka ori woolipeene; kinimwiipa ni kinoottottopela ni okumaaka wootheene." 
Psalms108:2 Mvenyeke makita ni lira*! Miyo kinoovenya engweengweengwe. 
Psalms108:3 Ii! Yave, kinimoottottopelani variyari wa miloko; kinimwiipa sa Nyuwo variyari wa seiyo," 
Psalms108:4 niwoko osivelawanyu woororomeleya omphiya mpaka vasulu erimu ni ororomeleyawanyu omphiyera mmahutteni. 
Psalms108:5 Mvuwihiwe Muluku osulu erimu; ovuwawanyu okhaleke mweelaponi yootheene. 
Psalms108:6 Munivuluxe ni munikhavihere ni ntatananyu noolopwana weera yaale munaasivelaanyu yoopoliwe. 
Psalms108:7 Muluku aahuuluma vaNipuroniwawe Nootteela*: “Moowinanimwaka kinookawanya oXekhemi ni kinooringa nreyareya na oSukota. 
Psalms108:8 oGiliyade ti wawaka ni hiihotho oManaxe; wEfrayimi ti ekapaseetaaka; oYuda ekopowaaka ya emwene. 
Psalms108:9 oMowabe ti ebasiya kinsuusulelaaka, wEdomi kimvonyerawo ikwakwaattasaka; oFilistiya kinkhuwelelawo owinawaka.”" 
Psalms108:10 Taani anaakihoole esidade yoolipihiwa? Taani anaakironghe wEdomi? 
Psalms108:11 Vekhaikhai ti Nyuwo Muluku, munikhoontte ni moohiya waahoola anakhottwaahu." 
Psalms108:12 Munikhavihere waawanano amwiittanaahu niwoko ekhavihero ya atthu kheemuteko. 
Psalms108:13 Kinoowina ni ekhavihero ya Muluku ni Owo onimwaanyikalela amwiittanaahu. 
Psalms109:1 Ii! Muluku, mwa Yoowo kinimutthapelaaka, muhimaale," 
Psalms109:2 niwoko atakhali ni anamootha ankuulumela, ekootheraka ni malumi oowootha." 
Psalms109:3 Aakirica ni masu oosareya othanya; ankiwanano miyo kihinthowa. 
Psalms109:4 Awosa ankoothera ehiyaka onthamwenaaka, mene miyo kimpwaherera mmavekeloni." 
Psalms109:5 Awosa anaakakhanyiha yooreera ni yoonanara ni onthamwenaaka ni othanya. 
Psalms109:6 Awosa aneera: “Munthanle mulopwana oonanara weera amoothere; namoothera eemeleke moonowaawe woolopwana.” 
Psalms109:7 Omulattuni ooneye weera nanthowa ni mpaka mavekelowaawe yooniwe weera yoottheka. 
Psalms109:8 Mahukwaawe a okumi ekhale vakhaani; mukina amurandele ntoko muhooleli. 
Psalms109:9 Anamwanaawe ekhaleke akwaasuni ni mwaariye akhaleke naamukhweli. 
Psalms109:10 Anamwanaawe yaase weetta ekhalaka anamavekela; yoomolasiwe owaani eheleyaka nthala. 
Psalms109:11 Namakoongoriha avareke sooreelasawe sootheene; anamarwa ehuhule soowiima sa mutekwaawe. 
Psalms109:12 Ahikhaleru anaamoonihere murima wooreera hata anaamorele ikharari anamwanaawe akwaasuni. 
Psalms109:13 Ekhapiraawe ephwatiwe; masinaaya emalamalihiwe wa ikhapira sa muhoolo. 
Psalms109:14 Sootakhala sa asitithawe suupuweleliweke vamaithoni wa Yave; soottheka sa amayawe sihittiwaliweke! 
Psalms109:15 Sootthekasaya sikhaleke vamaithoni wa Yave mahuku ootheene ni mweelaponi ahikhaleru anuupuweleletho emusaawe. 
Psalms109:16 Niwoko owo khuupuwela opaka yooreera, mene aahaattharatthara mpaka okhwa oohaawa, oothoiwa ni oothananaxa." 
Psalms109:17 Owo onsivela olapha – olapha iwo ommorele; khaatthunne nreeliho – nno nikhaleke ottaiwawe! 
Psalms109:18 Aawara nlapho ntoko ekuwo; nlapho nno noovolowa mweerutthunimwawe ntoko maahi, mmakhuvani ntoko makhura." 
Psalms109:19 Nno nimvitikelele ntoko mukaandyo; nimunine ntoko laamba wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms109:20 Itthu sootheene iya sikhaleke soowaalivela Yave yaale ankoothera; yaale ankuuluma. 
Psalms109:21 Vaheera Nyuwo, Yave munlamula sootheene, mukipakele sooreera; mukivuluxe niwoko na osivelawanyu wooreeraxa." 
Psalms109:22 Vano miyo oohaawa ni oothoiwa ni murimaaka woothananaxa. 
Psalms109:23 Miyo kinlakaseya ntoko munttuusi wooxekuwa; kintathiwa ntoko musoope. 
Psalms109:24 Makuthaaka aatteenguwa niwoko na otthukawaka; erutthwaaka yooyavayava ni woonda. 
Psalms109:25 Kootthebwiwa ni anamoothera; awosa yaakoonaka, ankipukunyera muru." 
Psalms109:26 Ii! Yave Mulukwaaka, mukikhavihere; mukivuluxe niwoko na osivelawanyu!" 
Psalms109:27 Awosa esuwele weera ti ntatananyu; weera ti Nyuwo mpanke. 
Psalms109:28 Onoowereya awosa olapha, mene Nyuwo munooreeliha; awosa yaawanaka; anooyevihiwa, vaheera murumeiyaanyu onoohakalala." 
Psalms109:29 Anamootheraaka waasareye wuulihiheya muru; ekhuneeliweno ntoko mukaandyo. 
Psalms109:30 Kinoomvuwiha Yave ni eyanowaaka; kinoomuttottopela variyari wa atthu ancipale. 
Psalms109:31 Vano Owo ti Namwaakiha a mutthu oohaawa weera amvuluxe mwa yaale animuthoriha. 
Psalms110:1 Yave onimweerela pwiiyaaka: “Mukilaathi moonowaaka mulopwana mpaka kineeraaka kiwiikaathi amwiittanaanyu vathi wa inaawosanyu.” 
Psalms110:2 Yave onimookolela ekopowaanyu ya emwene okhuma oSiyoni; nyuwo munoolamula eriyari ya amwiittanaanyu. 
Psalms110:3 Anakhottwaanyu anookhalano murima woolipa vanihukuni na ekhotto, ewarenleene soowara sootteela; okhuma oxeexelo amirawaanyu anoothukumana wa nyuwo ntoko nikame." 
Psalms110:4 Yave aalipela ni kharwa aceendya soowuupuwelasawe: “Nyuwo ti Mutokweenexa a asaserdoti* mahuku ootheene mmukhaleloni mwa Melkhisedeki.” 
Psalms110:5 Yave ori moonowaanyu woolopwana; Owo onimwaaphwata mamwene vanihukuni na isarasawe. 
Psalms110:6 Owo onoothoriha miloko awaandyeereraka ookhwa ni aaphwataka anamalamula a elapo ya vathi. 
Psalms110:7 Owo onoowura maahi a munxaapwani mukerekhere mphironi ni vano onimweemwexa muru. 
Psalms111:1 Munttottopele Yave. Kinoomvuwiha Yave ni murimaaka wootheene mmuthukumanoni wa oororomeleya. 
Psalms111:2 Miteko sa Yave ti sitokotoko; ootheene ansivela seiyo anootthokelela. 
Psalms111:3 Soopakasanyu ti soovuwiheya ni soowaaraxa ni ororomeleyawanyu ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms111:4 Owo khannihiya nittiwalaka sootikinihasawe; Yave ti a ikharari ni a murima wooreera. 
Psalms111:5 Owo onaavaha yooca yaale animoova; Owo onuupuwelela wiiraanawawe wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms111:6 Owo ohoonihera mulokwaawe ikuru sa mitekosawe avahaka ilapo sa miloko sikina. 
Psalms111:7 Miteko sa matataawe ti soororomeleya ni sa ekhaikhai; ikanosawe sootheene soophwanela ororomela. 
Psalms111:8 Seiyo siri soolipasene wa mahuku ootheene ni sikhalihiwe ni ororomeleya ni wookoleleya. 
Psalms111:9 Owo ooruuhela ovuluwa mulokwaawe; Owo ookhaliha wiiraanawawe wa mahuku ootheene – Nsinanawe ti nootteela ni noowooveya. 
Psalms111:10 Omoova Yave ti epacerero ya miruku; ootheene antthara ikanosawe ari a wiiwexexa nnenesene. Wa Yoowo okhale ottottopela woohimala. 
Psalms112:1 Munttottopele Yave. Ooreelihiwa ti yoole onimoova Yave ni onsivela malamulowaawe. 
Psalms112:2 Anamwanaawe anookhala ooweraxa mweelaponi; enookhala ekhapira yooreelihiwa ni yoororomeleya. 
Psalms112:3 Mihakhu ni opuha ori Mpaanimwawe ni ororomeleyawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms112:4 Hata mpiphini, waara onaamwaleela oororomeleya; yoole ori a murima wooreera, a ikharari ni a ekhaikhai." 
Psalms112:5 Oohakalala ti mutthu onkoongoriha ni murima wooreera ni ommweettiha nakoswaawe mweekhaikhaiyini. 
Psalms112:6 Mutthu oororomeleya kharwa attikinyeya; onimuupuweleliwa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms112:7 Owo khoova ihaali soonanara; murimaawe ti woohihoveleya, amuroromelaka Yave." 
Psalms112:8 Murimaawe ti woolipeene; owo khoovaru etthu; ommaleloni onimoona owiniwa wa amwiittanaawe. 
Psalms112:9 Owo ohaakawela soovaha sincipale oohaawa; ororomeleyawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene; owerawawe onoohakalaleliwa munttittimihoni. 
Psalms112:10 Mutakhali onimoona yeeyo ni onoonyoonyiwa akhuurihaka maino ni onimoondaxa; soohaawelasawe khasinkwana etthu. 
Psalms113:1 Munttottopele Yave! Ii! Arumeiyi a Yave, muttottopele Nsina na Yave." 
Psalms113:2 Nsina na Yave nittottopeliwe okhuma vaanaanova mpaka khalayi. 
Psalms113:3 Okhuma ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkelaayawo Nsina na Yave nittottopeliweke. 
Psalms113:4 Yave ti oovuwihiweene opwaha wa miloko sootheene; ovuwawawe ori vasulu erimu. 
Psalms113:5 Taani onlikana ni Yave Mulukwaahu orino ehicaawe ya emwene ya musulusulu," 
Psalms113:6 mwa Yoowo onuurama weera oone erimu ni vathi? 
Psalms113:7 Owo onaavenxa oohaawa vantthupini ni onaakhavihera oothoiwa ovenya vasalani. 
Psalms113:8 Owo onaakilaathiha vamoha ni anamwane a mwene ni atthu oottittimiheyaxa a mulokwaawe. 
Psalms113:9 Owo onimvaha mwali eekupa emusi, anampaka maayi oohakalala a anamwane ancipale. Munttottopele Yave." 
Psalms114:1 aYixrayeli ekhumaleene wExipitu, ekhapira ya Yakobe ekhumaleenetho eriyari ya muloko wa nuulumo na elapo ekina," 
Psalms114:2 oYuda waathatuwa Nipuro Nootteela* na Muluku; oYixrayeli omwenaawe. 
Psalms114:3 Ephareiya yaahoona, enatthawa; oYordanu woorukunuwa." 
Psalms114:4 Nyaako saatuphatupha ntoko anapunci ni mattumuxa ntoko iputtiputthi. 
Psalms114:5 Ii! Ephareiya, otthawenle heeni; oYordaanu nyuwo murukunuwenleni;" 
Psalms114:6 nyuwosa nyaako mutuphatuphenleni ntoko anapunci ni nyuwosa mattumuxa ntoko iputtiputthi? 
Psalms114:7 Mutetereye elapo vamaithoni wa Yave, ohoolo wa Muluku a Yakobe," 
Psalms114:8 mwa Yoowo aatatunxe mwala nratta; vanlukuni aantatunxe naattuuttu. 
Psalms115:1 Khoohiyono wa hiyo, Yave, khoohiyono wa hiyo, mene wa Nsinananyu okhale ovuwa niwoko na osivelawanyu ni ororomeleyawanyu." 
Psalms115:2 Heeni miloko sinkohaaya: “Ori woowi Mulukwaaya?” 
Psalms115:3 Mulukwaahu ori wiirimu; Owo ongwera opaka sootheene sinimusivela. 
Psalms115:4 Vaheera milukusaya siri sa eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa – soopakiwa ni matata a atthu. 
Psalms115:5 Sookhalano iyano, mene khasingwera wuuluma; maitho, mene khasingwera woona." 
Psalms115:6 Sookhalano maaru, mene khasingwera wiiwa; iphula, mene khasingwera wiimura." 
Psalms115:7 Sookhalano matata, mene khasingwera waapapela; inaawo, mene khasingwera weetta hata wamilowaya kheeniiwanyeya etthu." 
Psalms115:8 Yaale ampaka seiyo anoothatuwa ntoko seiyo ni hiihotho ootheene anroromela seiyo. 
Psalms115:9 Ii! aYixrayeli, munroromele Yave – Owo ti ekhaviherowaanyu ni exikudwaanyu." 
Psalms115:10 Ii! Asaserdoti*, munroromele Yave – Owo ti ekhaviherowaanyu ni exikudwaanyu." 
Psalms115:11 Nyuwosa mummoova Yave, munroromele Yoowo – Owo ti ekhaviherowaanyu ni exikudwaanyu." 
Psalms115:12 Yave onnanuupuwelela ni onoonireeliha; Owo onooreeliha ekhapira ya aYixrayeli ni asaserdoti*. 
Psalms115:13 Owo onimwaareeliha yaale ammoova Yave – okhuma asikhaani mpaka asitokweene. 
Psalms115:14 Yave awaattiheni – nyuwo ni anamwaniinyu. 
Psalms115:15 Nyuwosa mureelihiwe ni Yave, Mpattuxa a wiirimu ni vathi." 
Psalms115:16 Irimu sa osuluxa ti sa Yave, vaheera Owo oovaha omutthu elapo ya vathi." 
Psalms115:17 Khaahiyono anamakhwa animuttottopela Yave, naari yaale ankhuruwela nipuro noomaaleleya." 
Psalms115:18 Ti hiyo nnimuttottopela Yave okhuma vaanaanova mpaka khalayi. Munttottopele Yave! 
Psalms116:1 Kinimusivela Yave, niwoko Owo onkiiwa kaamudyoonttelaka." 
Psalms116:2 Eenre akiiwaka, miyo kinoomwiitthana wa mahuku ootheene a okumaaka." 
Psalms116:3 Mikhoyi sa okhwa sookivitikelela; othananaxa wa mookhwaani wookimorela; koosareya sookacamiha ni othanana. 
Psalms116:4 Vano kaahiitthana Nsina na Yave: “Ii! Yave, mukivuluxe!”" 
Psalms116:5 Yave ti a murima wooreera ni a ikharari; Mulukwaahu ti oopixa murima. 
Psalms116:6 Yave ongwaakiha oohooneliwa; miyo kaamaleliwaaka ikuru, Owo aakivuluxa." 
Psalms116:7 Ii! Okumaaka, mwiitthuuwe, niwoko Yave oowooniherani murimaawe wooreera." 
Psalms116:8 Vano Nyuwo, Yave, mohoopola okumaaka mookhwaani; mohuukuttha maithoraaka ni inaawosaka mookwakwathuwani" 
Psalms116:9 weera keette vamaithoni wa Yave mweelaponi ya akumi. 
Psalms116:10 Miyo koororomela naari keeraka: “Koothananihiwaxa.” 
Psalms116:11 Oorukurereyeene muru kaaheera: “Khawoworu omphwanela omuroromela.” 
Psalms116:12 Khoongwereya omuliva Yave onnene wootheene onkipakelaawe. 
Psalms116:13 Kinootheteya ekoomixi ya ovuluxa ni kinimwiitthana Nsina na Yave. 
Psalms116:14 Kinookwanihera soororomelihasaka kimpakenlaaka Yave vamaithoni wa mulokwaawe wootheene. 
Psalms116:15 Yave ompwattha vancipale okhwa wa ootteelaawe. 
Psalms116:16 Ii! Yave, vekhaikhai kiri murumeiyaanyu; aani kiri murumeiyaanyu, mwaana mulopwana a murumeiyaanyu muthiyana; mookoopola mootthukiwanimwaka." 
Psalms116:17 Kinimoopakelani yooveleela ya otthapela, kinimwiitthana Nsina na Yave." 
Psalms116:18 Kinookwanihera soororomelihasaka kimpakenlaaka Yave vamaithoni wa mulokwaawe wootheene," 
Psalms116:19 mmapuwani mwa Empa ya Yave – Ii! Yerusaleemu, eriyaraanyu! Munttottopele Yave!" 
Psalms117:1 Miloko sootheene nyuwo, munttottopele Yave; mumvuwihe miloko sootheene nyuwo!" 
Psalms117:2 Vano onisivelawawe ti otokotoko ni ororomeleya wa Yave ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. Munttottopele Yave. 
Psalms118:1 Muntthapele Yave niwoko Owo ti ooreera murima; osivelawawe khoommala. 
Psalms118:2 oYixrayeli weere: “Osivelawawe khoommala.” 
Psalms118:3 Asaserdoti* yeere: “Osivelawawe khoommala.” 
Psalms118:4 Yaale ammoova Yave yeere: “Osivelawawe khoommala.” 
Psalms118:5 Moothanananimwaka kaamukhuwelela Yave ni Owo aakaakhula anakivuluxa. 
Psalms118:6 Yave ori ni miyo; nkoova – atthu khaangwera okipaka etthu. 
Psalms118:7 Yave ori ni miyo – ti Namakhaviheraaka; kinimoona owiniwa wa amwiittanaaka. 
Psalms118:8 Ti wooreera otthawela mwa Yave ohikhanle omuroromela mutthu. 
Psalms118:9 Ti wooreera otthawela mwa Yave ohikhanle waaroromela anamwane a mwene. 
Psalms118:10 Miloko sootheene sookirica, mene mwa Nsina na Yave koonyaatula." 
Psalms118:11 Saakirica mipatta sootheene, mene mwa Nsina na Yave koonyaatula." 
Psalms118:12 Saakirica ntoko muupattetthe, mene saahookhwa woowaakuveya ntoko olaliheya wa nyiiwa; mwa Nsina na Yave koonyaatula." 
Psalms118:13 Saakikakha ni kaahanle vakhaani omora, mene Yave aakikhavihera." 
Psalms118:14 Yave ti ikurusaka ni ecipwaaka; ti ovuluxiwawaka. 
Psalms118:15 Okhuwela wa ohakalala ni owina wiiwiwa mmaheemani mwa oororomeleya: “Ntata noolopwana na Yave noopaka itthu sooweraxa! 
Psalms118:16 Ntata noolopwana na Yave ti nootheteyeya; Ntata noolopwana na Yave noopaka itthu sooweraxa!” 
Psalms118:17 Nkinkhwa, mene kinookhala ni okumi; kinoolaleiya soopaka sa Yave." 
Psalms118:18 Yave ookittaruxa moota wootepaxa, vaheera khakinnyerenre mookhwaani." 
Psalms118:19 Mukihulele nsele na ororomeleya; kintthuna ovolowa weera kimutthapele Yave. 
Psalms118:20 Ola mulako wa Yave mwa yoola amvolowaaya oororomeleya. 
Psalms118:21 Kinimootthapelani niwoko mookaakhula; moothatuwa ovuluxiwawaka. 
Psalms118:22 Nluku anamateka yaakhoonttaaya noothatuwa nluku noottittimiheyaxa. 
Psalms118:23 Yave opanke yeeyo ni ti yootikhinihaxa mmaithonimwahu. 
Psalms118:24 Nna nihuku Yave opankaawe; nihakalaleleke nna. 
Psalms118:25 Ii! Yave munivuluxe; Ii! Yave mweerihe weera sootheene sineettele nnenesene. 
Psalms118:26 Ooreelihiwa ti yoole onrwa mwa Nsina na Yave. Hiyo nnooreelihani Mpaani mwa Yave. 
Psalms118:27 Yave ti Muluku ni Owo oonimwaleela ni waarawawe; mukuxe mikhoyi sa efesta mutthukelele mmanyakani ari mmaloothoni mwa altaari*. 
Psalms118:28 Nyuwo ti Mulukwaaka; kinimootthapelani; Nyuwo ti Mulukwaaka; kinimoovuwihani. 
Psalms118:29 Muntthapele Yave niwoko Owo ti ooreera murima; osivelawawe khoommala. 
Psalms119:1 Ooreelihiwa ti yaale aneetta mphironi mookwanela; yaale antthara Nlamulo na Yave. 
Psalms119:2 Ooreelihiwa ti yaale aniiwelela ikanosawe ni animwaasa Yoowo ni murima wootheene. 
Psalms119:3 Awosa khampaka etthu yoonanara; anneetta mphironi mwa Yave. 
Psalms119:4 Nyuwo muneenaanyu moovaha ikano sintthuneya wiiweleliwa nnenesene. 
Psalms119:5 Moota kinghaawelaaka okhala oororomeleyeene keettelaka ikanosanyu! 
Psalms119:6 Hiiho nkinuulihiheya muru wootthara malamulowaanyu ootheene. 
Psalms119:7 Kinimootthapelani ni murima wa ekhaikhai, miyo kaaxutteraka soolamulelasanyu soororomeleya." 
Psalms119:8 Kinimwiiwelela ikanosanyu; muhikihiyeru! 
Psalms119:9 Mmiravo anaawere hai weetta mphironi mootteela? Onoowera iiwelelaka maswaanyu. 
Psalms119:10 Kinoowaasani ni murimaaka wootheene; muhikihiyeke weera kihihapuwe mmalamulonimwanyu. 
Psalms119:11 Koothokorora maswaanyu mmurimanimwaka weera kihootthekeleni. 
Psalms119:12 Mukhaleke ootthapeliwa, Yave; mukixuttihe ikanosanyu." 
Psalms119:13 Ni eyanowaaka kimphitela malamulowaanyu ootheene Nyuwo mvanghaanyu. 
Psalms119:14 Kinghakalalaxa wootthara ikanosanyu ompwaha yoole onghakalalela mihakhu sincipale. 
Psalms119:15 Kintthokelela ikanosanyu ni kinuupuwela nnenesene iphirosanyu. 
Psalms119:16 Kinghakalalela malamulowaanyu ni nkinttiwala maswaanyu. 
Psalms119:17 Mmoonihere murimaanyu wooreera murumeiyaanyu weera kikhale ni okumi; kinimwiiwelela maswaanyu. 
Psalms119:18 Muhuleke maithwaaka weera koone sootikhiniha sa malamulowaanyu. 
Psalms119:19 Kiri namarwa mweelaponi; muhikiipithihe malamulowaanyu. 
Psalms119:20 Okumaaka onghaawelaxa malamulowaanyu mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms119:21 Nyuwo munaahiiha anamwiixoona; yaale oolaphiwa anghapuwa mmalamulonimwanyu. 
Psalms119:22 Mukitapuxe mootthebwiwani ni mooramusiwani, niwoko kiniiwelela ikanosanyu." 
Psalms119:23 Naari anamalamula ekithukumanelaka, murumeiyaanyu onootthokelela soolamulasanyu." 
Psalms119:24 Aani ikanosanyu ti ohakalalawaka; iyo ti anamalakaaka. 
Psalms119:25 Vano kohuuramela vathi; mwaakihe okumaaka ntoko muroromelinghaanyu. 
Psalms119:26 Kohoothaliherani mweettelowaaka wootheene ni mookaakhula; mukixuttihe ikanosanyu. 
Psalms119:27 Mukiweriheke wiiwexexa mahusiho a ikanosanyu ni hiiho kinootthokelela sootikhinihasanyu. 
Psalms119:28 Okumaaka wookhulumuwa ni othananaxa; mukilipiheke ni maswaanyu. 
Psalms119:29 Mukihuluxe iphiro soolokottha; mukixuttihe malamulowaanyu niwoko na murimaanyu wooreera. 
Psalms119:30 Koothanla ephiro ya ekhaikhai; koolakela otthara ikanosanyu. 
Psalms119:31 Ii! Yave, kimvarexexa soolamulelasanyu; muhikihiye kuulihiheyaka muru." 
Psalms119:32 Kintthara ephiro ya malamulowaanyu niwoko mookiiwexexiha. 
Psalms119:33 Ii! Yave, mukixuttihe otthara ikanosanyu; vano kinimwiiwelela seiyo mpaka ommaleloni." 
Psalms119:34 Mukiiwexexihe weera kitthare Nlamulonanyu ni kinimwiiwelela ni murima wootheene. 
Psalms119:35 Mukeettihe mphironi ya malamulowaanyu niwoko kinghakalalela mwemmo. 
Psalms119:36 Murukunuxele mukanoni murimaaka ohikhanle wa munlulani. 
Psalms119:37 Muhuluxe maithwaaka wa itthu soohimuteko; muthokorore okumaaka mmasunimwanyu. 
Psalms119:38 Mukwanihere yoororomeliha mumpakenlaanyu murumeiyaanyu weera mooviwe. 
Psalms119:39 Mvenxeke wuulihiwa muru kinoovaaka, niwoko malamulowaanyu ti ooreera." 
Psalms119:40 Moota kinghaawelaaka ikanosanyu! Muthokorore okumaaka moororomeleyanimwanyu. 
Psalms119:41 Ii! Yave osivelawanyu okiphwanye nitho ovuluxawanyu ntoko muroromelinghaanyu; 
Psalms119:42 vano kinoowaakhula yaale ankitthebwa, niwoko kinroromela maswaanyu." 
Psalms119:43 Muhicophole masu a ekhaikhai vayanoniwaka niwoko kinroromela malamulowaanyu. 
Psalms119:44 Kinimwiiwelela woohihiyerera Nlamulonanyu wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms119:45 Kinimweetta mootapuxeyani, niwoko kinaasa ikanosanyu." 
Psalms119:46 Kinimuuluma sa ikanosanyu ohoolo wa mamwene kihuulihiheyaka muru," 
Psalms119:47 niwoko kinghakalalela malamulowaanyu keenre kisivela yaawo. 
Psalms119:48 Kintheteela matataaka malamulowaanyu, mwa yaawo kinsivelaaka kinatthokelela ikanosanyu." 
Psalms119:49 Muupuwelele masu mwaamvanghaanyu murumeiyaanyu, niwoko mookivaha oweherera." 
Psalms119:50 Opepesiwawaka moohaawanimwaka ti wu: Soororomelihasanyu sinnakikhaliha ni okumi. 
Psalms119:51 Oowiixoona annakitthebwa mahuku ootheene, vaheera nkinghuluwa mmalamulonimwanyu." 
Psalms119:52 Ii! Yave, kinuupuwelela malamulowaanyu a khalayi ni mwa yaawo kinnapepeseya." 
Psalms119:53 Wookitepela onyoonyiwa niwoko na atakhali, mwa yaawo akhoontte malamulowaanyu." 
Psalms119:54 Malamulowaanyu annakiruuhela wiipa mmapuroni moothemwene kinkhalaaka. 
Psalms119:55 Moohiyuni kinuupuwelela Nsinananyu Yave ni kinimwiiwelela Nlamulonanyu. 
Psalms119:56 Mweettelowaaka ti ola: wiiwelela ikanosanyu. 
Psalms119:57 Ii! Yave, Nyuwo ti yoohiyeriwaaka; koororomeliha weera kinimwiiwelela maswaanyu." 
Psalms119:58 Kinaasaasa ekhovaanyu ni murima wootheene; mukoonihere murimaanyu wooreera ntoko mukiroromelinghaanyu. 
Psalms119:59 Kohiixuupuwela sa mweettelowaaka ni koohokoleela wiiwelela ikanosanyu. 
Psalms119:60 Miyo kohaakuveya, kihipisaka wiiwelela malamulowaanyu." 
Psalms119:61 Naari mikhoyi sa atakhali sitthunaka okitthuka; nkinttiwala malamulowaanyu. 
Psalms119:62 Ohiyu eriyari kimvenya weera kootthapeleni niwoko na malamulowaanyu oororomeleya. 
Psalms119:63 Miyo nthamwene a ootheene angwoovani; ootheene antthara ikanosanyu. 
Psalms119:64 Ii! Yave, elapo yoosareya osivelawanyu; mukixuttihe ikanosanyu." 
Psalms119:65 Ii! Yave, mumpakele onnene murumeiyaanyu ntoko muroromelinghaanyu." 
Psalms119:66 Mukixuttihe esuwelo ni mathanlelo, niwoko kinroromela malamulowaanyu." 
Psalms119:67 Kihinaaye ottaruxiwa, miyo keetta ooriheiyeene, mene vano kiniiwelela maswaanyu." 
Psalms119:68 Nyuwo ti ooreera ni yeeyo mumpakaanyu ti yooreera; mukixuttihe ikanosanyu. 
Psalms119:69 Naari anamwiixoona ekittikitthelaka ni soowootha, miyo kiniiwelela ikanosanyu ni murima wootheene." 
Psalms119:70 Mirimasaya ti soowuumaxa, vaheera miyo kinghakalala mmalamulonimwanyu." 
Psalms119:71 Wookireerela ottaruxiwawaka weera kixuttere ikanosanyu," 
Psalms119:72 Nlamulo na eyanowaanyu ti nootthuneyaxa opwaha eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa yootheene ya mulaponi. 
Psalms119:73 Matataanyu aakipaka, enakipattuxa, mukivahe wiiwexexa weera kixuttere malamulowaanyu." 
Psalms119:74 Yaale angwoovani yaakoonaka, anoohakalala, niwoko owehererawaka ori mmasunimwanyu." 
Psalms119:75 Ii! Yave, koosuwela weera malamulowaanyu ti a ekhaikhai ni mookittaruxa moororomeleyanimwanyu." 
Psalms119:76 Osivelawanyu woohimala okhaleke opepesiwawaka ntoko munroromelinghaanyu murumeiyaanyu. 
Psalms119:77 Ikhararisanyu sikiphwanye weera kikhale ni okumi, niwoko Nlamulonanyu ti ohakalalawaka." 
Psalms119:78 Anamwiixoona eyevihiwe niwoko na okipakela yoonanara woohinthowa, vaheera miyo kinootthokelela ikanosanyu." 
Psalms119:79 Yaale angwoovani ewe wa miyo; aani yaale aniiwexexa ikanosanyu. 
Psalms119:80 Murimaaka okhaleke wookwanela wa ikanosanyu weera kihuulihiheye muru. 
Psalms119:81 Okumaaka onghaawelaxa ovuluxawanyu, mene owehererawaka ori mmasunimwanyu." 
Psalms119:82 Maithwaaka aakixeera wooweherera soororomelihasanyu ni kinkoha: “Mmukipepese yaakhani?” 
Psalms119:83 Kirookhalaru ntoko nipoottoro nootthuwela mwiixi, nkinttiwala ikanosanyu." 
Psalms119:84 Mpaka yaakhani murumeiyaanyu aneeraawe aweherere? Yaakhani muneeraanyu mwaattaruxe yaale ankisoonda? 
Psalms119:85 Anamwiixoona aakithipela ekhokwe, yaale ahintthara malamulowaanyu." 
Psalms119:86 Malamulowaanyu ootheene aaphwanela ororomeliwa; mukikhavihere, niwoko atthu ankittharatthara woohinthowa." 
Psalms119:87 Ahanle vakhaani okiiva mweelaponi, mene nkihingye ikanosanyu." 
Psalms119:88 Muthokorore okumaaka moosivelanimwanyu ni miyo kinimwiiwelela ikano sa eyanowaanyu. 
Psalms119:89 Maswaanyu Yave ti oohimala; ari oolipihiweene khuluwi wiirimu. 
Psalms119:90 Ororomeleyawanyu ori wa ikhapira sootheene; mookhaliha elapo ni eyo empwaherera yoolipeene. 
Psalms119:91 Malamulowaanyu ampwaherera mpaka olelo, niwoko sootheene sinlamuliwa ni Nyuwo." 
Psalms119:92 Nahaakisivenle Nlamulonanyu, saano kiphwatiweene moohasuliwanimwaka" 
Psalms119:93 Nkirwa kittiwala ikanosanyu, niwoko Nyuwo munuurela okumaaka mwa seiya." 
Psalms119:94 Mukivuluxe niwoko kiri awinyu; kinaasaasa ikanosanyu. 
Psalms119:95 Atakhali angweherera okiphwata, vaheera miyo kintthokelela ikanosanyu." 
Psalms119:96 Kohoona weera itthu sootheene sookhalano mwiinanowaaya, vaheera malamulowaanyu khaanono." 
Psalms119:97 Ii! Moota ankisivelaaya malamulowaanyu! Miyo kintthokelela nihuku nenenno. 
Psalms119:98 Soolamulasanyu sinkitatuxa namiruku waapwaha amwiittanaaka, niwoko seiya siri ni miyo mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms119:99 Kinniiwexexa waapwaha ahusihaaka ootheene, niwoko kintthokelela ikanosanyu." 
Psalms119:100 Kinniiwexexa waapwaha asitokweene niwoko kinniiwelela malamulowaanyu. 
Psalms119:101 Koosemba khula ephiro yoonanara weera kiiwelele maswaanyu. 
Psalms119:102 Nkinghuluwa mmalamulonimwanyu, niwoko ti Nyuwo munkixuttiha." 
Psalms119:103 Maswaanyu ti oosivaxa wa miyo; oocoocowaxa opwaha oravo. 
Psalms119:104 Kinnawina wiiwexexa mwa ikanosanyu; tivawo kinthanyaaka iphiro soonanara sootheene. 
Psalms119:105 Maswaanyu ti yoomwaleela ya malipaaka ni waara onooniha ephirowaaka. 
Psalms119:106 Koororomeliha ni nlipelo weera kinootthara malamulowaanyu a ekhaikhai. 
Psalms119:107 Koohaawa vancipale; Ii! Yave, muthokorore okumaaka ntoko muroromelinghaanyu." 
Psalms119:108 Ii! Yave, mwaakhulele soottottopela sootthuneya sa eyanowaaka ni mukixuttihe malamulowaanyu." 
Psalms119:109 Okumaaka onkhala ngwoopihani mahuku ootheene; mene nkinttiwala malamulowaanyu. 
Psalms119:110 Atakhali aakireya ntapha, mene nkinghuluwa ikanosanyu." 
Psalms119:111 Ikanosanyu ti yoohiyeriwaaka ya mahuku ootheene; ti ohakalala wa murimaaka. 
Psalms119:112 Murimaaka woothanla khuluwi wiiwelela ikanosanyu mpaka ommaleloni. 
Psalms119:113 Kinimuthanya namvara piili-piili, mene kinsivela Nlamulonanyu." 
Psalms119:114 Nyuwo ti wootthawelawaka ni yoowiixaakiheraaka; owehererawaka ori mmasunimwanyu. 
Psalms119:115 Mukivenyere nyuwosa mumpaka soonanara! Miyo kintthuna weettela malamulo a Mulukwaaka! 
Psalms119:116 Mukilipihere ntoko mukiroromelinghaanyu ni miyo kinookhala ni okumi; muhitthunihere weera owehererawaka waase omala. 
Psalms119:117 Mukikhavihere ni kinoovuluxiwa; miyo kinoopwattha ikanosanyu mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms119:118 Nyuwo munaakhootta ootheene anghiya ikanosanyu, niwoko soowuupuwelasaya soolokottha khasimuteko." 
Psalms119:119 Nyuwo munaavonyera okerekhere atakhali ootheene a elapo ntoko ikokhola; tivawo kinsivelaaka ikanosanyu. 
Psalms119:120 Erutthwaaka enthukumela ohoolowanyu; malamulowaanyu ankiruuhelaxa woova. 
Psalms119:121 Kookhala moororomeleyani ni ngwookoleleyani; muhikithaame mmatatani mwa anamakihasula. 
Psalms119:122 Muroromelihe mpuha wa murumeiyaanyu; muhaatthunihere anamwiixoona okihasula. 
Psalms119:123 Maithwaaka aakixeera kiwehereraka ovuluxawanyu ni okwanihera ekhaikhaiyaanyu. 
Psalms119:124 Mmoonihere murumeiyaanyu osivelawanyu ni mukixuttihe ikanosanyu. 
Psalms119:125 Miyo murumeiyaanyu; mukivahe miruku weera kiiwexexe soolamulasanyu. 
Psalms119:126 Ii! Yave yoophiya ehuhu yoopaka etthu, niwoko Nlamulonanyu khaninttittimihiwa." 
Psalms119:127 Miyo kinnasivela malamulowaanyu opwaha eyuuma yoorikaxa, aani eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera." 
Psalms119:128 Tivawo kinoonelaaka ekhaikhai ikanosanyu sootheene ni kinthanyaaka khula ephiro yoonanara. 
Psalms119:129 Soolamulasanyu ti sootikhiniha; tivawo kiniiwelelaaka. 
Psalms119:130 Ethalihero ya maswaanyu emmwaleela, enaavaha wiiwexexa oohiiwexexa." 
Psalms119:131 Kinghula eyanowaaka kinahihimera, kihaawelaxaka malamulowaanyu." 
Psalms119:132 Mukiwehe ni mukimorele ikharari ntoko munaapakelaanyu mahuku ootheene yaale ansivela Nsinananyu. 
Psalms119:133 Muhoolele malipaaka mmasunimwanyu; muhikitthunihereru olamuliwa ni yoottheka. 
Psalms119:134 Mukoopole mwa ohasula wa atthu weera kiiwelele ikanosanyu. 
Psalms119:135 Mummwaleele murumeiyaanyu ni waara wa ekhovaanyu ni mukixuttihe ikanosanyu. 
Psalms119:136 Nkimmaala wiinla, niwoko Nlamulonanyu khanneetteliwa." 
Psalms119:137 Yave, Nyuwo ti oororomeleya ni malamulowaanyu ti a ekhaikhai." 
Psalms119:138 Moolamulela ikanosanyu ni ekhaikhai; seiya ti soophwanela ororomela. 
Psalms119:139 Nthitinaka ninnakikhulumula, niwoko amwiittanaaka khaampwattha maswaanyu." 
Psalms119:140 Soororomelihasanyu sohaakhuleleyaxa; tivawo murumeiyaanyu ola onsivelaawe. 
Psalms119:141 Kirookhalaru mukhaanene ni oohooneliwa, nkinttiwala ikanosayu." 
Psalms119:142 Ororomeleyawanyu ti woohimala ni Nlamulonanyu ti na ekhaikhai. 
Psalms119:143 Ohaawa ni othanana wookimorela, mene malamulowaanyu ti ohakalalawaka." 
Psalms119:144 Ikanosanyu ti sa ekhaikhai wa mahuku ootheene; mukivahe wiiwexexa weera kikhale ni okumi. 
Psalms119:145 Kinkhuwela ni murima wootheene; Ii! Yave mukaakhule ni kinimwiiwelela soolamulasanyu. 
Psalms119:146 Kinookhuwelelani Nyuwo; mukivuluxe ni kinimwiiwelela ikanosanyu. 
Psalms119:147 Ohinaaye oxa kinnavenya ni kindyoonttelela ekhaviherowaanyu; owehererawaka ori mmasunimwanyu. 
Psalms119:148 Ohiyu wootheene nkinkona weera kitthokelele soororomelihasanyu. 
Psalms119:149 Mwiiwe nsunaka moosivelanimwanyu; Ii! Yave, muthokorore okumaaka mmalamulonimwanyu." 
Psalms119:150 Yaale amvaanelela soowuupuwela soonanara ari vakhiviru; vaheera ari ottaiwene wa Nlamulonanyu. 
Psalms119:151 Wa soothesene, Nyuwo, Yave, muri vakhiviru; malamulowaanyu ootheene ari a ekhaikhai." 
Psalms119:152 Kixuttenre khalayi ikanosanyu seiyo mukhalihalaanyu wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms119:153 Ngwehe ohaawawaka ni mukoopole niwoko nkinttiwala Nlamulonanyu. 
Psalms119:154 Mwaakihe nthowanaka ni mukoopole; muthokorore okumaaka ntoko muroromelinghaanyu. 
Psalms119:155 Ovuluxiwa ori ottai wa atakhali, niwoko awosa khaanaasaasa ikanosanyu." 
Psalms119:156 Ii! Yave, ikhararisanyu ti sitokotoko; muthokorore okumaaka muttharihaka malamulowaanyu." 
Psalms119:157 Ancipale ari amwiittana ankittharatthara; vaheera nkinghuluwa ikanosanyu. 
Psalms119:158 Kaawoonaka oohiroromela kinnaaramusa, niwoko khaaniiwelela maswaanyu." 
Psalms119:159 Moone moota kinsivelaaka ikanosanyu; muthokorore okumaaka moosivelanimwanyu. 
Psalms119:160 Maswaanyu ootheene ari a ekhaikhai; malamulo oororomeleya ootheene ari oohimala. 
Psalms119:161 Anamalamula ankittharatthara woohinthowa, mene murimaaka onthukumela woowiiwa maswaanyu paahi." 
Psalms119:162 Kinghakalalela yoororomelihaanyu ntoko mutthu omphwanya soohuhula sincipale. 
Psalms119:163 Kinthanya ni kinramusa soowootha, mene kinsivela Nlamulonanyu." 
Psalms119:164 Vanihukuni kinnoottottopelani imaara ithanapiili niwoko na malamulowaanyu oororomeleya. 
Psalms119:165 Yaale ansivela Nlamulonanyu ankhalano murettele mutokotoko; kheewowo enaakwattuliha. 
Psalms119:166 Ii! Yave, kingweherera ovuluxawanyu ni kintthara malamulowaanyu." 
Psalms119:167 Kiniiwelela ikanosanyu niwoko kinsivela moota woohimala. 
Psalms119:168 Kiniiwelela ikanosanyu ni soolamulasanyu sootheene, niwoko iphirosaka sootheene soosuweliwa ni Nyuwo." 
Psalms119:169 Ii! Yave, okhuwelawaka ophiye vamaithoniwanyu; mukivahe wiiwexexa mmasunimwanyu." 
Psalms119:170 Wiidyoonttelelawaka ophiye wa Nyuwo; mukoopole ntoko muroromelinghaanyu. 
Psalms119:171 Iyanosaka sinoosareya ottottopela, niwoko Nyuwo munkixuttiha ikanosanyu." 
Psalms119:172 Nluminaka nnimwiipela maswaanyu, niwoko malamulowaanyu ootheene ari a ekhaikhai." 
Psalms119:173 Ntatananyu nirwe nikikhavihere, niwoko koothanla ikanosanyu." 
Psalms119:174 Ii! Yave, kinghaawela ovuluxawanyu ni kinghakalalela Nlamulonanyu." 
Psalms119:175 Mukitthunihere okhala ni okumi weera koottottopeleni ni nlamulonanyu nikikhavihereke. 
Psalms119:176 Kooxoraxora ntoko ekhondoolo yoothweelela. Murwe, mmwaasaase murumeiyaanyu, niwoko nkittiwanle malamulowaanyu." 
Psalms120:1 Moothanananimwaka kinimukhuwelela Yave ni Owo onnakaakhula. 
Psalms120:2 Ii! Yave mukivuluxe mwa iyano sa anamootha ni wa malumi a anamanyeenga. 
Psalms120:3 Ii! Anamootha, anoopakeeni eheeni Muluku? Nttaruxo heeni aneeraawe oophwanyiheni!" 
Psalms120:4 Owo onimoottaruxani ni nyuupa soowiithihiwa sa nakhotto ooweraxa, ni makhala evarelaka a mwiiri wa ezimbera*." 
Psalms120:5 Ii! Wa miyo niwoko na okhala ntoko namarwa oMexeki; niwoko na okhala variyari wa iheema sa oKedari! 
Psalms120:6 Kootepa okhalaxa wenno variyari wa yaale anthanya murettele. 
Psalms120:7 Miyo kinsivela murettele, mene naari kuulumaka sa murettele, awosa anuuluma sa ekhotto paahi." 
Psalms121:1 Kinttukhulela maithwaaka omwaako, kinakoha: Ekhaviherowaaka engweela woowi?" 
Psalms121:2 Ekhaviherowaaka enrweela wa Yave opanke erimu ni vathi. 
Psalms121:3 Owo khatthunihera weera inaawosanyu sikwattuliwe – Yoole onookosoopani khankona; 
Psalms121:4 vekhaikhai Yoole onkosoopa oYixrayeli khankonaxa – Owo khaniitthaalaru. 
Psalms121:5 Yave onookosoopani – Owo ti Munttuusi wookosoopa ori moonowaanyu mulopwana; 
Psalms121:6 Othana nsuwa khanoohisani hata ohiyu mweeri khawooxupani. 
Psalms121:7 Yave onimoothokororani mwa soonanara sootheene; Owo onookosoopa okumaahu. 
Psalms121:8 Yave onoothokorora ophiyawanyu ni opwahawanyu – olelo ni wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms122:1 Koohakalala ni yaale yaakeerenle: “Niroweke Mpaani mwa Yave.” 
Psalms122:2 Ii! Yerusaleemu, inaawosahu soophiya mmilakonimwanyu." 
Psalms122:3 oYerusaleemu wootekiwa ntoko esidade yoolipa, ekhalihiweene nnenesene." 
Psalms122:4 Ti weiwo ipuumba sinrowaayawo; aani ipuumba sa Yave weera sittottopele Nsina na Yave, sittharaka ikano sa oYixrayeli." 
Psalms122:5 Sookhalawo ihice sa emwene soothoriha; ihice sa emwene sa ekhapira ya Davide. 
Psalms122:6 Muvekelele murettele oYerusaleemu: “Yaale ansivela oYerusaleemu ekhaleke oolipeene. 
Psalms122:7 Okhaleke murettele mpuwa wa ixirisanyu ni olipihiwa mpuwa wa mapurowaanyu oolipaxa.” 
Psalms122:8 Ngwaasivelani axunnaka ni asinthamwenaaka nkeere: murettele okhale mpuwamwanyu. 
Psalms122:9 Moosivelani Empa ya Yave Mulukwaahu kinimwaasaasa mpuhaanyu. 
Psalms123:1 Kinttukhulela maithwaaka wa Nyuwo, wa Nyuwo munkilaathela ehicaanyu ya emwene wiirimu." 
Psalms123:2 Hiiho ntoko maitho a epottha elopwana angwehexexaaya ntata na pwiiyaaya, ni hiiho ntoko maitho a epottha ethiyana angwehexexaaya ntata na muhanowaaya, mpakatho maithwaahu aningwehexexa Yave Mulukwaahu, niwehereraka weera animorele ikhararisawe." 
Psalms123:3 Ii! Yave, munimorele ikharari; munimorele ikharari, niwoko noohaawa oramusiwa vancipale." 
Psalms123:4 Noohaawa otthebwiwa vancipale ni anamwiixoona; oramusiwa vancipale ni anamwiikuxa. 
Psalms124:1 Yave ahaakhanle mpattaahu – aYixrayeli ephitele – 
Psalms124:2 Yave ahaakhanle mpattaahu, amwiittanaahu yaaniwananaaya," 
Psalms124:3 awosa saano eniminreene hiyo nlelo nreene ni okumi moonyoonyiwanimwaya. 
Psalms124:4 Aani, mwaha wa yeeyo, mirupi saano sinikumburunleene ni miipiili yaannimireiha;" 
Psalms124:5 aani, maahi oowuupaxa yaannimireiha." 
Psalms124:6 Yave atthapeliwe mwa Yoowo ohitthunihenre weera ninyaanyiwe ni mainowaaya. 
Psalms124:7 Nohoopowa ntoko mwaapalame munraakhoni; muraakho woopaseya ni hiyo nohoopowa. 
Psalms124:8 Ekhaviherowaahu ti mwa Nsina na Yave, Mpattuxa a erimu ni vathi." 
Psalms125:1 Yaale animuroromela Yave ari ntoko mwaako Siyoni mwa yoowo ohingwereya ottikinyiwa, mene ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms125:2 Hiiho ntoko nyaako sirukureenraaya oYerusaleemu; mpakatho Yave onrukureera mulokwaawe – okhuma vaanaanova ni mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms125:3 Ekopo ya atakhali kheepwaherera mweelaponi avahiwaaya oororomeleya, niwoko waari hiiho, mpaka oororomeleya yaaheereke opaka soonanara." 
Psalms125:4 Ii! Yave, mwaapakele yooreera yaale ampaka yooreera; yaale ari a murima wa ekhaikhai." 
Psalms125:5 Vaheera Yave onoowoomola yaale antthara iphiro soolavilavi vamoha ni anamapaka soonanara. Murettele okhaleke mwa oYixrayeli! 
Psalms126:1 Yave aahokoloxenraawe anamatthukiwa oSiyoni, waari ntoko oloha." 
Psalms126:2 Vano iyanosahu saasareya otheya ni malumaahu ni icipo sa ohakalala. Mpaka miloko sikina seera: “Yave oopakela itthu sootikiniheyaxa muloko ola.” 
Psalms126:3 Aani, itthu sootikiniheyaxa Yave oonipakela, tivawo ninghakalalaahu." 
Psalms126:4 Yave, munihokoloxe wootthukiwaniwahu ntoko munsarihaanyu maahi munikareni na Negeba." 
Psalms126:5 Yaale anaala ni maithori, eniihephe ni wiipa wa ohakalala." 
Psalms126:6 Yaale amvenya yiinlaka eneera yaalaka, vano eniihokolowe ni icipo sa ohakalala eruuhaka iharasaya." 
Psalms127:1 Yave aahiteka empa, anamateka amvara muteko vasiiyoni. Yave aahikosoopa esidade, namalipelela onkosoopa vasiiyoni." 
Psalms127:2 Khoovareleya muteko opeherera ovenya ni opisa okona, mvaraka muteko woovihaxa weera muce – Yave onaavaha ikhove yaale animusivela." 
Psalms127:3 Anamwane ti yoohiyera ya Yave ni ntthuvelo Owo omvaahaawe. 
Psalms127:4 Anamwane asilopwana ayariwe moomiravonimwahu ari ntoko nyuupa mmatatani mwa nakhotto ooweraxa. 
Psalms127:5 Ooreelihiwa ti mulopwana mwa yoowo okapantte murupaawe woosareya nyuupa iyo! Awosa kheeyeviheya yaawananaka amwiittanaaya vamulako. 
Psalms128:1 Ooreelihiwa yaale ammoova Yave ni aneettela iphirosawe. 
Psalms128:2 Nyuwo mmwice soowiima sa mutekwaanyu; mareeliho ni mpuha onuukhale mpattaanyu. 
Psalms128:3 Mwaarinyu anaakhale ntoko evideira* eniima vaatewanyu; anamwaniinyu asilopwana eniikhale ntoko iphandi sa sooliveira* ekilaathiyeene vameesaniwanyu. 
Psalms128:4 Anaareelihiwe hiiho mulopwana ommoova Yave. 
Psalms128:5 Yave ooreeliheni okhuma oSiyoni mahukwaanyu ootheene weera nyuwo moone weetteleya nnene wa oYerusaleemu," 
Psalms128:6 ni weera moone osuuluwaanyu. Murettele okhale ni oYixrayeli! 
Psalms129:1 Awosa aakihasulaxa okhuma enamwanaaka – oYixrayeli ophitele – 
Psalms129:2 awosa aakihasulaxa okhuma enamwanaaka, mene khayaawenre okiwina." 
Psalms129:3 Anamalima aattipura ottuliwaka, epakaka mikhutu soorakama." 
Psalms129:4 Vaheera Yave ti oororomeleya – Owo ookitapuxa moonyooroni wa atakhali. 
Psalms129:5 Ootheene anthanya oSiyoni ehokolowe ngwuulihiheyani muru. 
Psalms129:6 Awosa ekhaleke ntoko malaxi vanipathoni, mwa yaawo annyaala ehunnungwe." 
Psalms129:7 Malaxi awo ahinsara mmatatani mwa namahepha hata nyoononi sa yoole ontthuka ihupu. 
Psalms129:8 Yaale amvirawo eheere: “Nreeliho na Yave nikhaleke ni nyuwo; hiyo nnooreelihani mwa Nsina na Yave.” 
Psalms130:1 Ii! Yave, ngwiixerani kinookhuwelelani Nyuwo;" 
Psalms130:2 Ii! Yave, mwiiwe nsunaka! Maaruwaanyu ewiriyane wiidyoonttelelawaka." 
Psalms130:3 Ii! Yave, Nyuwo mwaalikelela soottheka sootheene, taani aneera oopowe?" 
Psalms130:4 Vaheera mwa Nyuwo yookhala elevelelo weera mooviwe. 
Psalms130:5 Mwa Yave kingweherera ni okumaaka wootheene ni kinroromela maswaawe. 
Psalms130:6 Okumaaka oningweherera Yave ompwaha namalipelela okelaka oxa; ompwaha namalipelela onlipelela oxeexelo. 
Psalms130:7 Ii! aYixrayeli! Munroromele Yave, niwoko mwa Yoowo wookhala osivela woororomeleya ni ovuluxa wookwanela." 
Psalms130:8 Owo muneenaawe onimwaavuluxa aYixrayeli mwa sootthekasaya sootheene. 
Psalms131:1 Ii! Yave murimaaka khoohiyono woowiixoona; maithwaaka khaahiyono oowiikuxerera; nkiniihelanamo ni itthu sitokotoko naari sookitikhinihaxa. 
Psalms131:2 Ohiyanawaya kohiisuumaaliha murimaaka weera okhale woomaaleleya. Ntoko mwaana ovonne ottuli wa amayawe – okumaaka ori ntoko mwaana owo. 
Psalms131:3 Ii! oYixrayeli, munroromele Yave – okhuma vaanaano vaava ni mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms132:1 Ii! Yave, mmuupuwelele Davide ni makacamiho ootheene aahaawaawe." 
Psalms132:2 Owo aamulipela Yave ni aamuroromeliha Muluku Ooweraxa a Yakobe: 
Psalms132:3 Nkimvolowa mpaani kinkhalaaka hata nkiniixaatalela vabeettiniwaka; 
Psalms132:4 nkintthunihera maithwaaka ovoliwa ikhove, naari makwikhwaaka wiitthuuwa" 
Psalms132:5 kihinaaye ophwanya nipuro wa Yave, woomakawo wa Muluku Ooweraxa a Yakobe." 
Psalms132:6 Nohiiwa weera Arka* a wiiraana yaari wEfrata, mene naaphwannye mweelaponi ya oYahari:" 
Psalms132:7 “Niroweke omankaawewo Yave; nattottopeleke vathi wa ehicaawe – 
Psalms132:8 Ii! Yave, mvenye ni mwaphiye vanipuroniwanyu noowiitthuuwa – Nyuwo ni Arka* a ikurusanyu." 
Psalms132:9 Asaserdotaanyu eware ororomeleya; ootteelaanyu yiipeke ni ohakalala.” 
Psalms132:10 Woomusivelani murumeiyaanyu Davide, muhimukhotte oottikittheliwaanyu." 
Psalms132:11 Yave aamuroromeliha murumeiyaawe Davide – nlipelo na ekhaikhai noohiceendyeya: “Kinoomukhaliha vahiceniwanyu ya emwene mmoha a ekhapiraanyu xaxaxa. 
Psalms132:12 Anamwaniinyu yiiwelela wiiraanawaka ni ikano kinaaxuttihaaka, vano anamwanaayatho eniikilaathi vahiceniwanyu ya emwene wa mahuku ootheene.”" 
Psalms132:13 Vano Yave oothanla oSiyoni eerelaka opaka nipuro na omakawawe: 
Psalms132:14 “Nna nnikhale nipuronaka noowiitthuuwa wa mahuku ootheene; va kinookilaathi vahiceni ya emwene, niwoko eyo ti yoohaawelaaka." 
Psalms132:15 Kinooreeliha nipuro nna ni sooreerela sincipale; oohaawaaya kinimwaavoniha ni sooca. 
Psalms132:16 Kinimwaawariha asaserdotaaya sa ovuluxiwa ni ootteelaaya animwiipa ni ohakalala wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms132:17 Va kinookhumeleliha ikuru sa Davide, kaarihaka omwaleela wa oottikittheliwaaka." 
Psalms132:18 Kinimwaawariha amwiittanaawe sa wuulihiwa muru, vaheera ecireemba vamuruwawe eniikhale yoowaaraxa.”" 
Psalms133:1 Moota onreeraaya ni onsiveleyaaya axunna yaakhalaka oowiiwanana! 
Psalms133:2 Onlikana ni makhura ooreeraxa amiineliwe vamuru enakhwalalela mureruni, aani ireru sa Aharoni, mpakatho ekolarinya ya malayaawe." 
Psalms133:3 Onlikana ni nikame na mwaako Hermo, ninkhwalalela nyaako sa oSiyoni. Ti weiwo Yave omvahaawe mareeliho a okumi woohimala." 
Psalms134:1 Munttottopele Yave nyuwosa arumeiyi ootheene a Yave munrumeela ohiyu Mpaani mwa Yave. 
Psalms134:2 Mutheteele matata mpatta wa Nipuro Nootteela* ni munttottopele Yave. 
Psalms134:3 Yave, Mpattuxa a erimu ni vathi ooreeliheni oSiyoni." 
Psalms135:1 Munttottopele Yave; muttottopele Nsina na Yave; munttottopele Yoowo nyuwosa arumeiyi a Yave; 
Psalms135:2 nyuwosa munrumeela Mpaani mwa Yave, mmapuwani mwa Empa ya Mulukwaahu." 
Psalms135:3 Munttottopele Yave niwoko Yave ti ooreera murima; mmwiipele icipo soottottopela Nsinanawe, niwoko ti noosiveleyaxa." 
Psalms135:4 Vano Yave oomuthanla Yakobe weera akhale awawe; Yixrayeli weera akhale muhakhwaawe. 
Psalms135:5 Koosuwela weera Yave ti Mutokweenexa; Namalamulaahu ti Mutokweene opwahaxa miluku sootheene. 
Psalms135:6 Yave ompaka seiyo sinimusivela, wiirimu ni vathi; mphareiyani ni moowiixeramwaya moothemwene." 
Psalms135:7 Owo onruuha mahutte okhuma ekotenle elapo; onrumiha overinya vamoha ni epula ni ompakiha weera epheyo ekhume enoopaanaayawo. 
Psalms135:8 Ti Yoowo iivale matthaara a wExipitu, matthaara a atthu ni a axinama." 
Psalms135:9 Aarumihela ineneerosawe ni sootikhinihasawe variyariwanyu, wExipitu, wa Farawu* ni arumeiyaawe ootheene." 
Psalms135:10 Ti Yoowo aavulalinghe miloko sincipale anawiiva mamwene oowera – 
Psalms135:11 Sihoni, mwene a awAmori ni Ogi, mwene a oBaxani ni mamwene ootheene a oKanaani." 
Psalms135:12 Aavaha mulokwaawe oYixrayeli ilaposaya ntoko yoohiyeriwa, aani yoohiyeriwa." 
Psalms135:13 Ii! Yave, Nsinananyu nimpwaherera wa mahuku ootheene; epilaanyu wa ikhapira sootheene." 
Psalms135:14 Yave onimwaakiha mulokwaawe ni onimwaamorela ikharari arumeiyaawe. 
Psalms135:15 Miluku soowootha sa miloko siri sa eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa – soopakiwa ni matata a atthu. 
Psalms135:16 Sookhalano iyano, mene khasingwera wuuluma; maitho, mene khasingwera woona;" 
Psalms135:17 maaru, mene khasingwera wiiwa, hata khasinono iphumu mmwaanomwaya." 
Psalms135:18 Yaale ampaka seiyo anoothatuwa ntoko seiyo ni hiihotho ootheene anroromela seiyo. 
Psalms135:19 Ii! Emusi ya Yixrayeli, munttottopele Yave! Ii! Emusi ya Aharoni, munttottopele Yave." 
Psalms135:20 Ii! Emusi ya Leevi, munttottopele Yave; ootheene nyuwo mummoova Yave, munttottopele Yoowo!" 
Psalms135:21 Yave attottopeliwe oSiyoni – Yoowo onkhala oYerusaleemu. Munttottopele Yave! 
Psalms136:1 Muntthapele Yave, niwoko Owo ti ooreera. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms136:2 Muntthapele Muluku a miluku. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene! 
Psalms136:3 Muntthapele Yave a asipwiiya. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms136:4 Ti Yoowo paahi ompaka sootikhiniha sitokotoko. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms136:5 Ti Yoowo opattunxe erimu moorattani. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms136:6 Ti Yoowo aatanle etthaya vasulu wa maahi. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms136:7 Ti Yoowo opattunxe soomwaleela sitokotoko – osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene," 
Psalms136:8 ni nsuwa weera nilamule othana – osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene," 
Psalms136:9 mweeri ni ithenyeeri weera silamule ohiyu – osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms136:10 Ti Yoowo iivale matthaara a wExipitu. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms136:11 Ti Yoowo aakhumihale aYixrayeli variyariwaya – osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene," 
Psalms136:12 ni ntata nooweraxa ni moono woolipaxa. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms136:13 Ti Yoowo aakawanyinghe ephareiya yooxeera – osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene," 
Psalms136:14 anaalapuxa aYixrayeli. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene," 
Psalms136:15 vaheera aamvonyera Farawu* ni anakhottwaawe mphareiyani yooxeera. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms136:16 Ti Yoowo eettinghe mulokwaawe munikareni. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms136:17 Ti Yoowo aamanne mamwene matokotoko – osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene," 
Psalms136:18 anawiiva mamwene ooweraxa – osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene: 
Psalms136:19 Sihoni, mwene a awAmori – osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene," 
Psalms136:20 ni Ogi, mwene a oBaxani. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms136:21 Ti Yoowo aavanghe ilaposaya ntoko yoohiyeriwa – osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene," 
Psalms136:22 ntoko yoohiyeriwa wa murumeiyaawe Yixrayeli. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms136:23 Ti Yoowo aanuupuwelenle naayevihiwaahu – osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene," 
Psalms136:24 ni oonoopola mwa amwiittanaahu. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms136:25 Ti Yoowo omvaha sooca sootheene sirino okumi. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms136:26 Muntthapele Muluku a wiirimu. Osivelawawe ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms137:1 Mukerekhere nyooloko sa oBabiloniya hiyo naakilaathi, nniinla, nuupuwelelaka oSiyoni." 
Psalms137:2 Wu, vamwirini esalgeru* hiyo naahaathomeya amakitaahu." 
Psalms137:3 Iwe yaanitthunke yaanivekela icipo; yaale yaanihasula yaaninyesereriha weera niipe icipo soohakalaliha, yeeraka: “Muniipele ecipo emoha ya oSiyoni!”" 
Psalms137:4 Moota heeni nneeraahu niipe ecipo ya Yave nireene mweelaponi ya anamarwa? 
Psalms137:5 Ii! oYerusaleemu, miyo koottiwalani, ntatanaka noolopwana nihiratte." 
Psalms137:6 Nluminaka nikitthukane waahottokoroko, miyo kaahiwuupuwelelani; miyo kaahoonelamo oYerusaleemu ori ohakalalawaka otokotoko." 
Psalms137:7 Ii! Yave muupuwelele yeeyo awEdomi yaapankaaya nihuku nenenenne Yerusaleemu aawiniwaawe. Awosa yaakhuwela: “Mumphwate! Muphwate moota woomalela!” 
Psalms137:8 Ii! Mwaana muthiyana a oBabiloniya, olakeliwe ophwatiwa – oohakalala ti yoole onootthuvelani attharihaka yeeyo munipakenlaanyu." 
Psalms137:9 Aani oohakalala yoole onaakuxa anamwaniinyu aavatarulelaka vamwala. 
Psalms138:1 Ii! Yave kinimoottottopelani ni murima wootheene; kinimwiipa ottottopeleyawawe ohoolo wa miluku sikina. 
Psalms138:2 Kinookokhorela Mpaanimwanyu Yootteela ni kinoottottopela Nsinananyu mwaha wa osivelawanyu ni ororomeleyawanyu, niwoko moovuwiha Nsinananyu ni maswaanyu opwaha itthu sootheene sikina." 
Psalms138:3 Miyo kookhuwelenlaakani, Nyuwo mwaakaakhula; mookitatuxa oolipa murima ni oosareya ikuru." 
Psalms138:4 Mamwene ootheene a elapo animoottottopelani, Yave, yiiwaka masu a eyanowaanyu." 
Psalms138:5 Awosa animwiipela soopaka sa Yave, niwoko ovuwa wa Yave ti otokotoko." 
Psalms138:6 Naari Yave akhalaka musulusulu, onnaaweha oowiiyeviha, vaheera ottai ottai, onnaasuwela oowiixoona." 
Psalms138:7 Naari kiviraka mmakacamihoni, nyuwo munuurela okumaaka; munookolela moonowaanyu woolopwana isara sa amwiittanaaka, munakitapuxa." 
Psalms138:8 Yave onookwanihera yootthunaawe wa miyo; Ii! Yave, osivelawanyu ompwaherera wa mahuku ootheene – muhihiye miteko sa matataanyu." 
Psalms139:1 Ii! Yave, Nyuwo mohoota murimaaka ni mookisuwela." 
Psalms139:2 Munsuwela kaakilaathiki ni kaavenyaka. Ottai ottai munoona soowuupuwelasaka. 
Psalms139:3 Munsuwela miyo keettaka ni kiixaatalelaka; munsuwela nnenesene iphirosaka sootheene. 
Psalms139:4 Maswaaka ehinaaye ophiya vanlumini, Nyuwo Yave, munnasuwela nnenesene." 
Psalms139:5 Nyuwo munkikhikidyera mipatta sootheene munakiikaathera ntatananyu. 
Psalms139:6 Soosuwela iya ti sootikhiniheyaxa ni sookivikana miyo – ti soowalamela kihimpixeeraaka. 
Psalms139:7 Khoongwereya otthawa Munepaanyu. Khoowowo wootthawela weera kisembe okhalawanyu. 
Psalms139:8 Miyo kawela wiirimu – mookhalawo; miyo kiixaatalela ngwiixerani – mookhalamotho. 
Psalms139:9 Miyo kawela ni mapupha a ekamaama, miyo kamaka ekotenle ephareiya," 
Psalms139:10 naari weiwo ntatananyu noolopwana nnookihoolela; nnookikhavihera. 
Psalms139:11 Naari miyo keeraka: “Vekhaikhai epiphi enookikuttelela ni waara onoothatuwa ohiyu mukhwipimwaka,”" 
Psalms139:12 kinimoona weera mpaka epiphi kheeniilihana wa Nyuwo; ohiyu onaara ntoko othana, niwoko wa Nyuwo epiphi enkhala ntoko waara." 
Psalms139:13 Nyuwo mpanke okhalawaka xaxaxa; mookitthava mmirimani mwa amayaka. 
Psalms139:14 Miyo kinoottottopelani niwoko mookipaka moota wooreerela ni wootikhiniheya; mitekosanyu ti sootikhiniheyaxa – miyo kinsuwela yeeyo nnenesene. 
Psalms139:15 Yaapakiwaaya erutthwaaka muxiirini, eyo khayaahiyono yoowiipithiheya wa Nyuwo. Miyo kaatthaviwaaka moowiixera mwa etthaya," 
Psalms139:16 maithwaanyu yaahoona kihinaaye omalela omutthu. Mahuku ootheene a okumaaka alempwale mulivurunimwanyu kihinaaye okhalanaru nihuku. 
Psalms139:17 Ii! Muluku, soowuupuwelasanyu ti sootthuneyaxa wa miyo. Sootheene seiyo ti soohilikanxereya!" 
Psalms139:18 Miyo kaalikela seiyo, sinookwana soopwaha muhaava wa mphareiyani. Miyo kamaliha waalikela, nlelo kiri ni Nyuwo." 
Psalms139:19 Ii! Muluku; kaatthunaxa weera ngwiive atakhali! Mukirakamihele anamwiiva! 
Psalms139:20 Awosa angwuulumelani moota woonanara; amwiittanaanyu anramusa Nsinananyu. 
Psalms139:21 Ii! Yave, miyo kinaathanya yaale anoothanyani. Kinaaramusa yaale anoovaanyani Nyuwo." 
Psalms139:22 Kinaathanya ni okumaaka wootheene; kingwaalikela ntoko amwiittanaaka. 
Psalms139:23 Ii! Muluku, mukoote ni musuwele murimaaka; mukiwehe ni moone soowuupuwelasaka sinkitthukuruwiha." 
Psalms139:24 Moone kaattharaka ephiro Nyuwo munthanyaanyu ni mukihoole mphironi yoohimala. 
Psalms140:1 Ii! Yave mukoopole mwa atthu oonanara murima; mukaakihe mwa anamapuhera," 
Psalms140:2 mwa yaawo vamurimaniwaya amvaanelela soowuupuwela soonanara etannyaka ekhotto khula nihuku. 
Psalms140:3 Ansongola malumaaya ntoko a enowa; yoohapala ya evili eri vayanoniwaya. Sela* 
Psalms140:4 Ii! Yave, mukithokorore mwa matata a atakhali; mukaakihe mwa anamapuhera antthuna okikwattuliha." 
Psalms140:5 Asilopwana oowiixoona aakireya muraakho, anamariheya anreya itthavisaya; mphironimwaka aakireya itapha." 
Psalms140:6 Ii! Yave, miyo kinooleelani: “Nyuwo ti Mulukwaaka.” Ii! Yave, mwiiwe okhuwelelawaka ikharari." 
Psalms140:7 Ii! Yave onlamula sootheene, Namoopolaaka oolipaxa, Nyuwo munaakiha muruwaaka munihukuni na ekhotto." 
Psalms140:8 Ii! Yave, muhaakhulele soohaawela sa atakhali; muhitthunihere weera soovaanelasaya seetteleye nnenesene yiixoonaka." 
Psalms140:9 Nyuru sa yaale ankirica sikhuneeliwe ni soonanara seiye iyanosaya suulummaaya. 
Psalms140:10 Yaamorele makhala a mooro; awosa evonyeriwe mmooroni, mulittini eneeraaya ehiwereru okhuma." 
Psalms140:11 Yaale ankaapa ehitekihiwe mweelaponi; erisa yaalupatthe anamapuhera mpaka okhwa. 
Psalms140:12 Koosuwela weera Yave onimwaakiha mulattu wa oothoiwa ni onimwaapakela ekhaikhai oohaawa. 
Psalms140:13 Vekhaikhai oororomeleya anoottottopela Nsinananyu ni atthu ansivela ekhaikhai anookhala vamaithoniwanyu. 
Psalms141:1 Ii! Yave, miyo kinookhuwelelani Nyuwo; ngwe woowaakuveya. Mwiiwe nsunaka miyo kookhuwelelakani." 
Psalms141:2 Nivekelonaka nikhale ntoko erubani* ohoolowanyu; otheteyawaka matata okhaleke ntoko yooveleela ya ohiyu. 
Psalms141:3 Ii! Yave, mmwiikaathi namalipelela vayanoniwaka; ngwehawehe mulako wa eyanowaaka." 
Psalms141:4 Muhitthunihere weera murimaaka ohokoleele wa yoonanara, hata miyo kihivitikeleleye mwa soopaka sa ooriheya ni atakhali. Miyo kihirwe kipakela mpatta wa ifestasaya." 
Psalms141:5 Mutthu oororomeleya akimaneke ni mutthu oomaaleleya murima akihiihe; onuukhale ntoko makhura ooreeraxa mmurumwaka miyo nkirwa kikhootta. Wa soothesene, mavekelowaaka khaancelana ni ipakelo sa atthu oonanara." 
Psalms141:6 Anamalamulaaya yaavonyeriwaka moowiixera ootheene anoosuwela weera maswaaka yaari a ekhaikhai. 
Psalms141:7 Awosa eniyeere: “Makhuvaahu aamwareela mmwano mwa nihiye ntoko etthaya yaalimmwaka ni yaakhwiriwaka.” 
Psalms141:8 Vaheera maithwaaka anoowehexexani Nyuwo Yave munlamula sootheene; miyo kintthawela wa Nyuwo – muhikinnyerere mookhwaani. 
Psalms141:9 Mukithokorore mwa itapha akireiyaaya; mwa miraakho sa atakhali. 
Psalms141:10 Atakhali ephariwe mutthavinimwaya miyo koopowaka oolipeene. 
Psalms142:1 Kinimukhuwelela Yave ni nsu ntokotoko; kinimudyoonttelela Yave ikharari. 
Psalms142:2 Miyo kinrongha ottaandawulawaka ohoolowawe; vamaithoniwawe kinthalihera makacamihowaaka. 
Psalms142:3 Okumaaka waapororaka, ti Nyuwo munsuwela ephiro entthuneya okuxera miyo. Mphironi kimviraaka, aakireya ntapha." 
Psalms142:4 Ngwehe mpatta wa moonowaaka mulopwana ni moone – khaawo onkipwattha. Nkinonoru wootthawelawo; khawowo ompwattha okumaaka. 
Psalms142:5 Miyo kinookhuwelelani Nyuwo Yave, keeraka: “Nyuwo ti Wootthawelawaka; mweelaponi ya akumi kinoororomelani Nyuwo paahi.”" 
Psalms142:6 Mwiiwe okhuwelawaka, niwoko koothananaxa. Mukivuluxe mwa yaala ankittharatthara, niwoko ari oolipaxa okipwaha miyo." 
Psalms142:7 Mukitapuxe mukaliposo ni kittottopele Nsinananyu. Vano atthu oororomeleya anoothukumana mukhwipimwaka niwoko na onnene mukipakenlaanyu. 
Psalms143:1 Ii! Yave, mwiiwe nivekelonaka; mwiiwe okhuwelelawaka ikharari; mukikhavihere moororomeleyani ni mweekhaikhaiyinimwanyu." 
Psalms143:2 Muhimuronghe murumeiyaanyu onthoriheloni, niwoko khawoworu ori oohikhalano nthowa vamaithoniwanyu." 
Psalms143:3 Mwiittana onkittharatthara anakiswanyera vathi. Owo ompakiha weera kikhale mpiphini ntoko yaale akhwiiye khalayi. 
Psalms143:4 Vano okumaaka wooporora; murimaaka khoonkikhalakhala. 
Psalms143:5 Kinuupuwelela mahuku a khalayi; kintthokelela mitekosanyu sootheene kuupuwelelaka seiye matataanyu apankaaya. 
Psalms143:6 Kinootheteelani matataaka; ntoko etthaya yoowuumaxa okumaaka woovoliwa ntthona nowoohaawelani Nyuwo. Sela* 
Psalms143:7 Ii! Yave, mwaakuve okaakhula; okumaaka wooporora. Muhikihuluxere ekhovaanyu weera kihikhale ntoko yaawo anrowa munihiyeni." 
Psalms143:8 Mooxeexeloni, mukiiwihe sa osivelawanyu woororomeleya,- niwoko kohoororomelani Nyuwo. Mukoonihereke ephiro entthuneya otthara, niwoko okumaaka kingwinnyererani Nyuwo." 
Psalms143:9 Mukivuluxe mwa amwiittanaaka Yave, niwoko kiniipitha mwa Nyuwo." 
Psalms143:10 Mukixuttihe opaka otthunawanyu, niwoko Nyuwo ti Mulukwaaka. Munepaanyu Wooreera okeettihe munghawalawani." 
Psalms143:11 Ii! Yave, mwaha wa Nsinananyu, muthokorore okumaaka; mukivenxe moothanananimu niwoko na ororomeleyawanyu." 
Psalms143:12 Moosivelanimwanyu woohimala mwaamalihe amwiittanaaka; mwaaphwate yaawosa ootheene, niwoko kiri murumeiyaanyu." 
Psalms144:1 Yave Mwalaaka atthapeliwe, mwa Yoowo onxuttiha matataaka owana; ikathasaka wa ekhotto." 
Psalms144:2 Owo ti Mulukwaaka oosareya osivela ni Nipuronaka Noolipaxa; Yoowiixaakiheraaka ni Namoopolaaka; exikudwaaka mwa Yeeyo kintthawelaaka. Ti Yoowo onlamula miloko akeerelaka miyo. 
Psalms144:3 Ii! Yave mutthu taani oompwattha Nyuwo, ni mwaana a mutthu weera mmoonelemo?" 
Psalms144:4 Mutthu ori ntoko iphumu; mahukwaawe ari ntoko munttuusi omvira. 
Psalms144:5 Muhuleke erimwaanyu Yave ni mukhuruwe; mutave nyaako weera sitthuwe. 
Psalms144:6 Murumihe overinya ni mwaamwaraxe amwiittana; mulathe nyuupasanyu ni mwaaphwate. 
Psalms144:7 Osulu iwo, mookole moonowaanyu ni mukitapuxe; mukivuluxe mmaahini oowaatta; mmatatani mwa anamarwa," 
Psalms144:8 mwa yaawo arino iyano soowootha ni yeemenxeene moono anlipela yoothaka. 
Psalms144:9 Ii! Yave, kinoowiipelani ecipo enyowani; kinoowiipelani lira* a ifiiyu muloko," 
Psalms144:10 Nyuwo munaawiniha mamwene ni munimutapuxa murumeiyaanyu Davide wa ekatana yoowiiva. 
Psalms144:11 Mukivuluxe ni mukoopole mwa matata a anamarwa, mwa yaawo arino iyano soowootha ni yeemenxeene moono anlipela yoothaka." 
Psalms144:12 Vano moomiravoni anamwaniihu asilopwana anookhala ntoko soophatteiwa sookosoopiwa nnenesene ni anamwaniihu asithiyana ntoko amarimbu oocaambuliwa weera ephwaneliwe empa ya emwene. 
Psalms144:13 Matathaahu anoosareya ni sooreerela soohiyanahiyana. Mihuwosahu sinimwaatta macira macireene mmattamwahu. 
Psalms144:14 Imombesahu sinoolemeliwa ni mirindi sa sooreerela. Elapwaahu kheevoleeliwa, naari hiyo khaniroihiwa wootthukiwani. Khookhala okhuwela wa othanana mmisewenimwahu." 
Psalms144:15 Wooreelihiwa ti muloko oneereeliwa hiiho; wooreelihiwa ti muloko orino Yave ntoko Mulukwaaya. 
Psalms145:1 Miyo kinimoovuwihani Nyuwo, Mulukwaaka, Mwenaaka; kinoottottopela Nsinananyu wa mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms145:2 Khula nihuku kinimoottottopelani, kivuwihaka Nsinananyu wa mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms145:3 Mutokweene ni oophwanela oovuwihiwa ti Yave; otokweenaawe khoonkota. 
Psalms145:4 Ekhapira enoothalihera ekhapira ekina mitekosanyu; eniilaleiye soopakasanyu sooweraxa. 
Psalms145:5 Iyo nsuulume sa waara woovuwaxa sa otokwenaanyu ni miyo kinootthokelela mitekosanyu sootikhiniha. 
Psalms145:6 Iyo nsithalihere sa ikuru sa soopakasanyu soowooveya ni miyo kinoolaleiya mitekosanyu sitokotoko. 
Psalms145:7 Nsuupuwelele murimaanyu wooreeraxa, siipelaka ni ohakalala sa ororomeleyawanyu." 
Psalms145:8 Yave ti a ikharari ni oopixa murima, Owo ti oopisa onyoonyiwa ni oosareya osivela." 
Psalms145:9 Yave ongwoonihera murimaawe wooreera ootheene; ommorela ikharari soopattuxasawe sootheene. 
Psalms145:10 Ii! Yave, ootheene mwaapankaanyu animootthapelani; ootteelaanyu animoottottopelani." 
Psalms145:11 Awosa anoolaleiya sa ovuwa wa omwenaanyu, yuulumaka sa ikurusanyu" 
Psalms145:12 weera ootheene esuwele mitekosanyu sooweraxa ni sa ovuwa woowaara wa omwenaanyu. 
Psalms145:13 Omwenaanyu ti omwene woohimala ni olamulawanyu ompwaherera wa ikhapira sootheene. Yave ti oororomeleya mwa soororomelihasawe sootheene ni onoonihera murima wooreera mwa sootheene opankaawe. 
Psalms145:14 Yave onaakhavihera weemela ootheene anuuwa, ongweemexa ootheene yuuramenle vathi." 
Psalms145:15 Maitho a ootheene anoowehani Nyuwo ni munaavaha soocasaya mweehuhuni yootthuneyaxa. 
Psalms145:16 Nyuwo mughula ntatananyu, munahakalaliha soohaawela sa ikumi sootheene." 
Psalms145:17 Yave ti oororomeleya mphironimwawe moothemwene, asivelaka sootheene ompakaawe." 
Psalms145:18 Yave ori vakhiviru wa ootheene ammwiitthana; ootheene ammwiitthana mweekhaikhaiyini. 
Psalms145:19 Owo onkwanihera soohaawela sa yaale ammoova; oniiwa okhuwelawaya, anaavuluxa." 
Psalms145:20 Yave onaakosoopa ootheene animusivela, vaheera atakhali ootheene onimwaaphwata." 
Psalms145:21 Kinoomuttottopela Yave ni eyanowaaka. Ikumi sootheene sittottopele Nsinanawe Nootteela wa mahuku ootheene. 
Psalms146:1 Munttottopele Yave. Ii! Okumaaka, munttottopele Yave." 
Psalms146:2 Kinoomuttottopela Yave mahuku ootheene a okumaaka; kinoomwiipela Mulukwaaka icipo soottottopela mookuminimwaka wootheene. 
Psalms146:3 Muhaaroromele anamwane a mamwene hoye hoye atthu ankhwa ahingwera ovuluxa. 
Psalms146:4 Awosa yaakhwaaka, anghokoleela vantthupini, ni nihuku nenenenno soovaanelasaya sinimwaamalela." 
Psalms146:5 Oreelihiwa ti yoole ekhaviherowaawe eri Muluku a Yakobe; yoole onimuroromela Yave Mulukwaawe. 
Psalms146:6 Owo ti Mpattuxa a erimu ni vathi, ephareiya ni sootheene sirimo; Owo ompwahereriha ororomeleyawawe mahuku ootheene." 
Psalms146:7 Owo onaakiha mulattu wa oohasuliwa ni onaavaha yooca oovoliwa. Yave onaatapuxa ootthukiwa," 
Psalms146:8 ongwooniha oohoona; onaavenxa oomoroxiwa, Yave onaasivela atthu oororomeleya." 
Psalms146:9 Yave ongwaakiha anamarwa ni onaathokorora akwaasuni ni asinaamukhweli, vaheera ompupurumiha soovaanela sa atakhali." 
Psalms146:10 Yave onlamula wa mahuku ootheene; Mulukwaanyu, oSiyoni, wa ikhapira sootheene. Munttottopele Yave." 
Psalms147:1 Munttottopele Yave. Moota onreeraaya wiipa icipo soomutthapela Mulukwaahu – ti wootthuneyaxa ni woophwaneleya! 
Psalms147:2 Yave onrasela oYerusaleemu; Owo onaathukumanyiha ooroihiwa wootthukiwani a oYixrayeli. 
Psalms147:3 Owo onaalamiha a murima wootaphuwa ni onkosoopa makhwattaaya. 
Psalms147:4 Owo ookhaliha waatta wa ithenyeeri, khula ethenyeeri ootteha nsinanaya." 
Psalms147:5 Mutokweene ti Namalamulaahu ni ikurusawe ti soothukumeliha; khoongwereya ophima wiiwexexawawe. 
Psalms147:6 Yave onaakhavihera oohasuliwa, mene onaamoroxela vathi atakhali." 
Psalms147:7 Mmwiipele Yave ni icipo sootthapela; mmwiipele Mulukwaahu ni oruma wa icipo sa makita. 
Psalms147:8 Owo onkuttelela erimu ni mahutte; onrupihela epula etthaya ni onunnuwiha malaxi mmattumuxani. 
Psalms147:9 Owo onciha mihuwo ni axaana a anakhuku, awosa yiinlaka etala." 
Psalms147:10 Yave khanghakalalela ikuru sa ikavalu* hata nyetto sa atthu; 
Psalms147:11 Yave onaahakalalela yaale ammoova; yaale anroromela osivelawawe woohimala. 
Psalms147:12 Ii! Yerusaleemu, munttottopele Yave; Ii! Siyoni, munttottopele Mulukwaanyu," 
Psalms147:13 niwoko Owo onaalipiha anampattika a maselaanyu ni onaareeliha atthwaanyu ankhala mwa nyuwo. 
Psalms147:14 Ti Yoowo ompwahereriha olipa nyiinanosanyu ni onaandyeerera etrigu yooreerela. 
Psalms147:15 Onrumihela Nlamulonawe mulaponi, ni maswaawe antthimaka woowaakuveya." 
Psalms147:16 Onkukuttha etthabwe ntoko mapururu a ikhondoolo ni ommwaramwaxa maralala ntoko ettuura. 
Psalms147:17 Ommoroxa maralalaawe ntoko maluku. Khawowo ongwera ovilela oriirawaya. 
Psalms147:18 Onrumiha nsunawe ni maralala anootothowa; Owo onrumiha epheyowaawe ni maahi anoopacera okhwalala. 
Psalms147:19 Ommoonihera Nsunawe Yakobe; malamulowaawe ni ikanosawe wa Yixrayeli. 
Psalms147:20 Owo khampakelaru yeeyo miloko sikina; iyo khasisuwenle malamulowaawe. Munttottopele Yave. 
Psalms148:1 Munttottopele Yave. Munttottopele Yave okhuma wiirimu; Munttottopele a Musulusulu. 
Psalms148:2 Munttottopele Yave nyuwosa andyelowaawe ootheene; munttottopele Yave nyuwosa anakhottwaawe ootheene a wiirimu. 
Psalms148:3 Munttottopele Yave nyuwo nsuwa ni mweeri; munttottopele Yave nyuwosa ithenyeeri sootheene soowaaraxa. 
Psalms148:4 Munttottopele nyuwo irimu soorakamelaxa ni maahi ari musulusulu. 
Psalms148:5 Sootheene iyo sittottopele Nsina na Yave, niwoko Owo aalamulela ni seiyo saapattuxiwa." 
Psalms148:6 Owo ookhaliha mmapuronimwaya wa mahuku ootheene; aalaleiya ikano soohiceendyeya. 
Psalms148:7 Munttottopele Yave okhuma mweelaponi, nyuwosa soopattuxiwa sitokotoko sa mphareiyani ni moowiixera moothemwene," 
Psalms148:8 nyuwosa overinya ni maralala, etthabwe ni kanyenye, ipheyo soolipaxa sinkwanihera otthunawawe." 
Psalms148:9 Munttottopele Yave nyuwosa nyaako ni mattumuxa ootheene, nyiri siniima ni sa esedari*," 
Psalms148:10 axinama ootheene a mutuphini ni mihuwo sootheene, soowiipurula ni ipalame." 
Psalms148:11 Munttottopele Yave mamwene a elapo ya vathi ni miloko sootheene, anamwane asilopwana a mamwene ni aphuki ootheene a vathi," 
Psalms148:12 amiravo ni asimwali, asitokweene ni anamwane." 
Psalms148:13 Awosa ettottopeleke Nsina na Yave, niwoko Nsinanawe paahi ti noovuwihiwa; ovuwawaya woopwaha etthaya ni erimu." 
Psalms148:14 Oovaha mulokwaawe ikuru anaakhela soottottopela sa ootteelaawe ootheene, aYixrayeli, muloko onsivelaxaawe. Munttottopele Yave." 
Psalms149:1 Munttottopele Yave. Mmwiipele Yave ecipo enyowani, munttottopele munthukumanoni wa oororomeleya." 
Psalms149:2 aYixrayeli emuhakalaleleke Mpattuxaaya; amaki a oSiyoni emuhakalalele Mwenaaya. 
Psalms149:3 Awosa ettottopele Nsinanawe yiinaka; emmwiipele icipo ni oruma wa ekoma ni makita. 
Psalms149:4 Vano Yave onsiveleya ni mulokwaawe; onaatthuka ecireemba ya ovuluxa oowiiyeviha. 
Psalms149:5 Oororomeleyaawe ehakalalele moovuwanimu ni yiipeke ni ohakalala vabeettiniwaya. 
Psalms149:6 Omuttottopela Muluku okhaleke vayanoniwaya ni ekatana yoowiitha ninno ninno ekhaleke mmatatanimwaya 
Psalms149:7 weera ewiinlele ikukuttula amalapo ni ettaruxe miloko," 
Psalms149:8 ni weera yaatthuke mamwenaaya ni onyooro, maneethaaya ni onyooro wa eyuuma." 
Psalms149:9 Hiiho nthorihelonaya nnookwaniheriwa. Wu ti ovuwa wa oororomeleyaawe ootheene. Munttottopele Yave. 
Psalms150:1 Munttottopele Yave. Munttottopele Muluku vanipuroniwawe nootteela. Munttottopele wiirimuwawe wooweraxa. 
Psalms150:2 Munttottopele niwoko na mitekosawe sa ikuru; munttottopele niwoko na Otokweenaawe woohilikanxereya. 
Psalms150:3 Munttottopele ni oruma wa nipalapatta; munttottopele ni makita ni lira*," 
Psalms150:4 Munttottopele ni ekoma ni wiina, munttottopele ni ikaruma sa mikhoyi ni ampetta;" 
Psalms150:5 Munttottopele ni oruma wa ikengere, muttottopele ni ikengere soorumaxa." 
Psalms150:6 Sootheene sirino okumi simuttottopele Yave. Munttottopele Yave. 
Proverbs1:1 Ala masu a miruku a Salomoni, mwaana mulopwana a Davide, mwene a oYixrayeli:" 
Proverbs1:2 Iyo sinimookhaviherani makhalanelo miruku ni olakeya; masuwelelo masu amvaha wiiwexexa; 
Proverbs1:3 okhala oolakeya ni mmirukuni, mpakaka yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai, ya nnenesene ni yoowookoleleya." 
Proverbs1:4 Sinookhavihera waavaha mapakelo yaale ahingwera, saavahaka esuwelo ni iseru sooreera amiravo." 
Proverbs1:5 Namiruku awiriyaneke aandyeereraka osuwelawawe, ni yoowo orino miruku aakheleke weetteleya nnenesene" 
Proverbs1:6 weera iiwexexe masu a miruku ni maphwanaphwaniho, andiisi ni ithale sa asuweli." 
Proverbs1:7 Omoova Yave ti mathipelo a esuwelo, vaheera alolo khaanoonelamo miruku ni olakiwa." 
Proverbs1:8 Mwanaka, wiiwe mahusiho a atithawo ni ohinyoosere onxuttihiwaawo ni amayawo." 
Proverbs1:9 Awo eniikhale yoophwaneliha mmuru ni muxikomwawo. 
Proverbs1:10 Mwanaka, oonanara murima yeerera woohapuxa, ohiwaakhulele." 
Proverbs1:11 Yeera: “Haya nrowe; niipithele ephome yoohinthowa; nrowe nitthekule niwiipithelaka yaale ahinnihovelaru; 
Proverbs1:12 nrowe naamire akumi ntoko nihiye nnaamiraaya anamakhwa; aani naaphwate apurukuma, ntoko amphwatiwaaya yaale ankhuruwela munlittini." 
Proverbs1:13 Nnoophwanya itthu sootheene sootthuneyaxa ni nnoosariha mpaanimwahu seiyo niiyalaahu. 
Proverbs1:14 Mwiitakansere mmukuttulanimwahu; nikawaneke mipatta soolikana sootheene nneeraahu niphwanye. 
Proverbs1:15 Mwanaka, ohivire mphironi sa atthu awo! Osusihe inaawo mphironi awo ankuxeraaya," 
Proverbs1:16 niwoko inaawosaya sintthimakela opaka yoonanara; ari oolikaneene oyeeha ephome. 
Proverbs1:17 Mooteene yoowo ohimvareleyaaya muteko oreya ntthavi ipalame soonaka," 
Proverbs1:18 hiihotho asilopwana awo khaansuwela weera aniixiipithela wa ephomaaya asineenaaya; anreela muraakho inaawosaya! 
Proverbs1:19 Iwo ti ommaleloni wa anamahaawela; yoole oneetta moota owo, oniiphwata muneenaawe." 
Proverbs1:20 Miruku sinkhuwelaxa mmiseweni, aani mmapuwani amviraxiwa;" 
Proverbs1:21 mmattuumbani a misewe soonyakuleleya iyo sinkhuwela, mmilakoni sa esidade sinlaleiya:" 
Proverbs1:22 “Nyuwosa muhisuwenle opaka yooreera, mpaka yaakhani muneeraanyu mpwaherere ni ohisuwelawanyu? Nyuwosa anamatthebwa, mpaka yaakhani muneeraanyu muhakalalele otthebwawanyu? Ni nyuwosa alolo, mpaka yaakhani muneeraanyu muhoonele esuwelo?" 
Proverbs1:23 Mwiiwelela ohiihawaka, Miyo kinimoovahani munepa wa miruku ni kinimoothupululelani soowuupuwelasaka." 
Proverbs1:24 Wa soothesene, nyuwosa mookhootta wiitthanawaka; khaawo aapwatthenle kookonlaaka moonowaaka!" 
Proverbs1:25 Mweenre muhoonelarumo olakawaka ni muhitthuna waakhulela ohiihawaka," 
Proverbs1:26 wa mpattaaka, Miyo kinootthebwa erisaanyu; kinootheya nihooxo noophwanyakani" 
Proverbs1:27 woomanakani woova ntoko ettheku, erisa yoophwanyakani ntoko eyuupuru ni othanana ni ovalavela wootepelakani." 
Proverbs1:28 Vano awosa anookiitthana, mene nkaakhula; anookaasa, mene kheekiphwanya." 
Proverbs1:29 Yeenre ethanya esuwelo ni ekhootta wooveya wa Yave," 
Proverbs1:30 ehitthunaka waakhulela olakawaka ni ehipwatthelaka woopererawaka," 
Proverbs1:31 animooca yoowiima ya mweettelowaaya ni anoovona sa mapakelowaaya. 
Proverbs1:32 Vano oceendyaceendyeya wa oohisuwela onoowiiva, ni ohipwattha wa alolo onimwaaphwata;" 
Proverbs1:33 vaheera yoowo anaakiiwe onookhala oolipeene ni oomaaleleya, ahoovakaru yakhalaru yoonanara." 
Proverbs2:1 Mwanaka, weyo waakhulela maswaaka, onathokorora vamurimani malamulowaaka;" 
Proverbs2:2 wawiriyana miruku ni wahuleya murimaawo weera wiiwexexe; 
Proverbs2:3 ni wakhuwelela esuwelo ni wiitthanela wiiwexexa; 
Proverbs2:4 waasaasa miruku ntoko enaasiwaaya eparatha*, ni watholathola ntoko onaaseriwaaya muhakhu woovithiwa," 
Proverbs2:5 vano weyo onimwiiwexexa ti heeni omoova Yave ni onoophwanya esuwelo ya Muluku. 
Proverbs2:6 Vanonto ti Yave omvaha miruku; mmwaanomwawe enkhuma esuwelo ni wiiwexexa. 
Proverbs2:7 Owo onimusungera akhili yoowo ori oororomeleya; Owo ti exikudu* emmwaakiha yoowo ori oowookoleleya," 
Proverbs2:8 niwoko onthokorora ephiro ya oowookoleleya ni onkosoopa musewe wa oororomeleyaawe. 
Proverbs2:9 Vano nyuwo munoosuwela yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai, yoowookoleleya ni ya nnenesene, ni munooxuttera iphiro sooreerela." 
Proverbs2:10 Vano miruku sinoovolowa vamurimaniwanyu, ni esuwelo enookhala yoosiveliha okumaanyu." 
Proverbs2:11 Olaka wooreerela onimoothokororani, ni wiiwexexa onimookhaviherani." 
Proverbs2:12 Miruku sinimootapuxani mphironi mwa oonanara murima, mwa atthu a masu ooriheya," 
Proverbs2:13 anghiya iphiro soowookoleleya weera ekuxere iphiro sa mpiphini," 
Proverbs2:14 anghaawela opaka yoonanara, antthapela yoonanara ya ootakhala." 
Proverbs2:15 Awosa anneetta mphironi sookhoromana, aani mphironi yoohapuxa." 
Proverbs2:16 Miruku iyo sinoomutapuxatho mwa muthiyana ooraruwa, mwa oonanarihiwa onlokottha ni maswaawe," 
Proverbs2:17 mwa yoowo omuhiyale yoole aari mukhwaawe okhuma emiravowaawe, ahipwatthaka wiiraana opankaawe ohoolo wa Muluku." 
Proverbs2:18 Empa ya muthiyana ooraruwa enrongha wookhwaani, ni iphirosawe simphiyera mmuntuusini wa okhwa." 
Proverbs2:19 Yaawo ammwaasaasa muthiyana owo kheehokolowatho, kheehokoleela ophwanya iphiro sa okumi." 
Proverbs2:20 Miruku sinooweettihani mphironi sa atthu a nnene ni woopwahererihani mphironi mwa oororomeleya. 
Proverbs2:21 Vanonto oororomeleya anoomaka mulaponi, ni ookwanela anoopwahereramo;" 
Proverbs2:22 vaheera atakhali anoomalamalihiwa mulaponi, ni mmo oohiroromeleya anoovenxiwamo." 
Proverbs3:1 Mwanaka ohittiwale oxuttihawaka, mene othokorore malamulowaaka vamurimani," 
Proverbs3:2 niwoko awo animwaandyeerera okumaawo wa iyaakha sincipale ni animoovaha weetteleya nnene ni murettele. 
Proverbs3:3 Osivela ni ororomeleya ohoohiyeru; otthukelele muxikomwawo, ni olepe vatthaabwani wa murimaawo." 
Proverbs3:4 Hiiho, weyo onoophwanya murima wooreera wa mpatta wa Muluku ni wa atthu, ni epili yooreera." 
Proverbs3:5 Omuroromele Yave ni murimaawo wootheene ni ohiikhavihereno muupuwelowaawo. 
Proverbs3:6 Omusuwelihe Yave iphirosawo sootheene, ni Owo onimookolela iphirosene seiyo." 
Proverbs3:7 Ohiihelane okhala musuweli; omoove Yave ni osembe yoonanara. 
Proverbs3:8 Eyo enoovaha okumi erutthwaawo elipihaka makhuva. 
Proverbs3:9 Omuttittimihe Yave ni mihakhusawo sootheene ni soowiima soopacera sa soophatteyasawo sootheene 
Proverbs3:10 vano matathaawo anoosareiya, ni moosungamwawo eviinyu enoosareiyamo yeeyo." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwanaka ohinyoose olaka wa Yave naari ohiramuse ohiihawawe," 
Proverbs3:12 niwoko Yave onimulaka yoowo onimusivelaawe, hiiho ntoko tiithi ompakaawe wa mwaana onimuhaawelelaawe mpuha." 
Proverbs3:13 Ooreelihiwa ti mutthu omphwanya miruku, mutthu orino mwiiwexexo," 
Proverbs3:14 niwoko miruku ti soophureleyaxa opwaha eparatha* ni sinoowineleyaxa opwaha eyuuma yoorikaxa. 
Proverbs3:15 Ti sootthuneyaxa opwaha rubi*; sootheene munghaawelaanyu khasinlikanano seiyo. 
Proverbs3:16 Moono woolopwana wa miruku wookhala okumi woowaatta; moonowaaya woothiyana sookhala mihakhu ni ottittimiheya. 
Proverbs3:17 Iphiro sa miruku ti soosiveleyaxa, ni iphirosaya sootheene ti murettele." 
Proverbs3:18 Miruku ti mwiri onimvaha okumi yoole onkhubaarela; ni yoowo omvarexexa onooreelihiwa. 
Proverbs3:19 Mmirukunimwawe Yave oopaka mathipelo a etthaya, mwaakhilinimwawe oolipiha erimu vanipuroniwaya;" 
Proverbs3:20 moosuwelanimwawe anaattuuttu oowiixera ampiluwa ni mahutte anttonya nikame. 
Proverbs3:21 Mwanaka, othokorore wuupuwela woorera ni olaka wooreerelaxa; iwo ohoorakamele;" 
Proverbs3:22 niwoko onimooruuhela okumi ni onookhala yoophwaneliha muxikomwawo. 
Proverbs3:23 Vano weyo onookuxera ephirowaawo oolipeene ni khookwattuliwa. 
Proverbs3:24 Wiixaatalelaka, khawoova, ni olohawawo onookhala woomaaleleya." 
Proverbs3:25 Khoontthuneya woova ehasara yootutuxereya hata ophwata onaaphwanya atakhali. 
Proverbs3:26 Niwoko Yave onookhala yoororomelihiwaawo ni onoowooceeliha omorela munraakhoni. 
Proverbs3:27 Wawereya wa weyo, ohihiye ompakela yooreera yoowo omphwanela." 
Proverbs3:28 Ohimweerele mukhwaawo: “Ohokoloweke omaalo, koovaheke etthu, owereyaka omukhavihera olelo." 
Proverbs3:29 Ohimvaanelele yoonanara mwaattamanaawo, onkhala moota woororomeleya vakhiviruwawo." 
Proverbs3:30 Ohimoothere mutthu woohinthowa, owo ahoopakenleru yoonanara." 
Proverbs3:31 Ohihaaweleru sa namapuhera hata ohitakihe mweettelowaawe," 
Proverbs3:32 niwoko Yave onimuthanya oonanara murima, vaheera oororomeleya ti nthamwenaawexa." 
Proverbs3:33 Nlapho na Yave nri mpaani mwa atakhali, vaheera owo onreeliha etthoko ya oororomeleya." 
Proverbs3:34 Owo onaatthebwa anamatthebwa, mene onaavaha mahala oowiiyeviha." 
Proverbs3:35 Nttittimiho ti yoohiyeriwa ya asuweli, vaheera Yave ohaasungera alolo wuulihiheya muru." 
Proverbs4:1 Anamwanaaka, mwiiwe mahusiho a tiithi; ngwiriyane, ni munoophwanya wiiwexexa." 
Proverbs4:2 Mahusiho kinoovahaakani ti ooreera; tivawo muhihiye mahusihowaaka. 
Proverbs4:3 Miyo kaaraaka mmiravo, nlelo mukhaanene, vaate wa atithaka, mwaana mmoharu a amayaka," 
Proverbs4:4 atithaka yannakixuttiha, ekeerelaka: “Ovarexexe maswaaka ni murima wootheene; wiiwelele malamulowaaka, ni weyo onookhalano okumi." 
Proverbs4:5 Waasaase okhalano miruku ni mwiiwexexo; ohittiwale maswaaka hata ohisuse mwa yaawo. 
Proverbs4:6 Ohihiye miruku, ni iyo sinimookhapelela; osivele, ni iyo sinimookosoopa." 
Proverbs4:7 Miruku ti soohilikanxereya; waasaase okhalano miruku; ovarele muteko sootheene orinaawo weera okhaleno wiiwexexa. 
Proverbs4:8 Ottittimihaxeke miruku, ni iyo sinimoohakalaliha; ovarexexe, ni iyo sinimoottittimiha." 
Proverbs4:9 Iyo sinimoowariha ecireemba mmurumwawo, aani sinimoovaha ecireemba yoowaara." 
Proverbs4:10 Wiiwe, mwanaka, waakhulele kinghimaaka, ni weyo onoowaattela okumaawo."
