Proverbs4:11 Miyo kooweettiha mphironi ya miruku, aani kooweettiha mphironi soowookowa." 
Proverbs4:12 Hiiho, waattharaka seiyo, khoophwanya makacamiho; waatthimakaka, khookwattuliwa." 
Proverbs4:13 Ovarexexe mahusiho, ohihiye, othokorore nnenesene, niwoko okumaawo onkhalela yeeyo." 
Proverbs4:14 Ohitthare ephiro ya atakhali, hata ohivire mphironi sa oonanara murima." 
Proverbs4:15 Osembe, ohiviremo; osusemo ni ohivarexexe." 
Proverbs4:16 Niwoko awosa khaangwera okona ehivaraka yoonanara; onaarweela naawalaphile yaahimuhela nthala mukina. 
Proverbs4:17 Vano awosa aniiciha ni soonanara, ni anghapaliwa mmapuheroni." 
Proverbs4:18 Ephiro ya oororomeleya eri ntoko ekamaama ya oxa, enaaraxa mpaka onkwanelaaya oxa." 
Proverbs4:19 Vaheera ephiro ya atakhali eri ntoko epiphi yootepaxa; mpaka awosa khaansuwela yeeyo enaakwattula. 
Proverbs4:20 Mwanaka, wiiwe kinooleelaaka; owiriyane maswaaka." 
Proverbs4:21 Ehoorakamele; othokororaxe vamurimaniwawo," 
Proverbs4:22 niwoko ti okumi wa yoowo omphwanya, ni mpuha wa erutthwaawo yootheene." 
Proverbs4:23 Yoontthuneyaxa ti othokorora murimaawo, niwoko owo onlamulela ephiro ya okumaawo." 
Proverbs4:24 Osusihe mmwaanomwawo masu a oriheya; iyanosawo sikhale ottai wa yoonanara. 
Proverbs4:25 Mahuku ootheene oweheke ohoolo, owehexexeke eri ohoolowawo." 
Proverbs4:26 Opakele inaawosawe ephiro yoothatawala weera miphitosawo sootheene sikhale soolipasene. 
Proverbs4:27 Ohihapuweleru hata moono woolopwana naari woothiyana; osusihe inaawosawo mwa soonanara. 
Proverbs5:1 Mwanaka, owiriyane mirukusaka, otheteye maaru weera wiiwexexe olakawaka wooreerela." 
Proverbs5:2 Hiiho weyo onookhalano muupuwelo wooreera, ni iyanosawo sinoothokorora esuwelo." 
Proverbs5:3 Vano iyano sa muthiyana ooraruwa sinaama oravo; nsunawe ti noosivaxa opwaha makhura," 
Proverbs5:4 vaheera ommaleloni iyanosawe ti soowaawa ntoko wamwe, soosongowa ntoko ekatana yoowiitha ninno ninno." 
Proverbs5:5 Inaawosawe sinkhuruwela mookhwaani; malipaawe animurongha munihiyeni. 
Proverbs5:6 Owo khansuwela weera oneetta mphironi sookhoromana, ni khanoona weera ephirowaawe ti yoohilipaxa." 
Proverbs5:7 Vanonto, mwanaka, okiiwe, ohihapuwe mmasunimwaka." 
Proverbs5:8 Omurakamele muthiyana owo; ohikhuveele mulako wa empaawe," 
Proverbs5:9 weera weyo ohaavahe akina ikurusawo, hata okumaawo wa mutthu mukina oowuuma murima," 
Proverbs5:10 ni weera atthu oohisuwanyeya ehivone sa mutekwaawo ni akina ehithadyirele wiilipihawawo. 
Proverbs5:11 Ommaleloni wa okumaawo weyo onimwiipulela, ni erutthwaawo yootheene enookhala yoomalamaleene." 
Proverbs5:12 Weyo ngweere: “Moota kaathanyaaka olakiwa! Moota murimaaka waakhoottaaya ohiihiwa! 
Proverbs5:13 Nkiwiiwelenle ahusihaaka, hata nkaapwantthe yaale yaakixuttiha." 
Proverbs5:14 Koophiya muxerexere wa ophwatiwa woomalela, muloko wootheene woonaka." 
Proverbs5:15 Owure maahi a muttankhinimwawo xaxaxa, maahi ampiluwa muhimenimwawo." 
Proverbs5:16 Ngwaahiyere heeni anaattuuttwaawo emwareelaka mmiseweni, ni maxaapwaawo mmapuwani?" 
Proverbs5:17 Awo ekhale paahi awawo, ohikawaneru ni oohisuwanyeya akina." 
Proverbs5:18 Areelihiwe naattuuttwaawo! Omuhakalalele muthiyana omuthenlaawo woomiravoniwawo – 
Proverbs5:19 naahe oosiveleyaxa, eveyado* yooyevela; mapele a mwaariyo yoovonihe ni ohakalala, ni mahuku ootheene okuxakuxiwe ni osivelawawe." 
Proverbs5:20 Mwanaka, onkuxakuxeriwa heeni ni muthiyana ooraruwa? Onkhubaarela heeni mapele a mwaara a mukina?" 
Proverbs5:21 Yave onoona iphiro sa mutthu ni ongwehaweha malipaawe ootheene. 
Proverbs5:22 Sootakhala sa mutakhali sinnaphariha munraakhoni; owo onthatuwa namatthukiwa mmikhoyini sa sootthekasawe. 
Proverbs5:23 Vekhaikhai anaakhwele ohilakeyawawe; ahapuxiwaka ni ololowaawe xaxaxa. 
Proverbs6:1 Mwanaka, waareene weera woororomeliha omukhavihera mukhwaawo oolinghe musurukhu, ni waathatungweene namaroromeliha wa namarwa," 
Proverbs6:2 waamorenleene munraakhoni niwoko na masu waahimmaawo, wootthukiwa ni yeeyo wuulummaawo," 
Proverbs6:3 vano mwanaka, weenre omorela mmatatani mwa mukhwaawo – orowe wiiyevihe, omudyoonttelelaka mwaattamanaawo wiiwa mulattwaawo!" 
Proverbs6:4 Ohitthunihere maithwaawo okona hata ohaasase wiitthuuwa. 
Proverbs6:5 Wiitapuxe ntoko oniitapuxaawe naahe wa namalupattha, ntoko mwaapalame ntaphani nnimphariha." 
Proverbs6:6 Moone eneneele nyuwo ooreesi; mutthokelele iphirosanyu ni mukhale musuweli! 
Proverbs6:7 Eyo kheenono mutokweene, hata namawehaweha, naari mulamuli," 
Proverbs6:8 hata hiiho, enthokorora yoocaaya mweelimweni ni mweehuhuni ya ohepha enthukumanya yoocaaya." 
Proverbs6:9 Mpaka yaakhani mpwahereraka wiixaatalela, ooreesi nyuwo? Mmuvenye yaakhani mukhovenimwanyu?" 
Proverbs6:10 Mulohaka ni mooseelaka ni mwiikimanyaka nyoono weera mukone nnene," 
Proverbs6:11 ni vano ohaawawanyu onimootutuxerani ntoko namwiiya, ni onimoorweelani othoiwa ntoko mulopwana amukunxeene kapwiitthi." 
Proverbs6:12 Oohimuteko ni mutakhali onimwaasa weetteetta ahimaka itthu soonanara; 
Proverbs6:13 owo onkaphila, ompurula inaawo ni ompaka ineneero ni ikatha;" 
Proverbs6:14 vamurimanivawe woolokottha omvaanela soonanara; mahuku ootheene ontannya minyakunyaku. 
Proverbs6:15 Tivawo erisa eneeraaya emurweele wootutuxereya; onoophwatiwa woowaakuveya woohimurette. 
Proverbs6:16 Sookhala itthu ithannamosa onthanyaawe Yave, itthu ithannapiili Owo ohinoonelaawe:" 
Proverbs6:17 Maitho oowiixoona, nlumi noowootha, matata angyeeha ephome yoohinthowa," 
Proverbs6:18 murima omvaanelela soonanara, inaawo sinaakuva opaka soonanara," 
Proverbs6:19 namoona oowootha ommwaraxa soowootha ni yoole ontannyera minyakunyaku eriyari ya axunna. 
Proverbs6:20 Mwanaka, wiiwelele malamulo a atithawo ni ohihiye mahusiho a amayawo." 
Proverbs6:21 Otthukelele mahuku ootheene vamurimani; oware muxiko. 
Proverbs6:22 Weyo weettaka awo animoohoolela; waakonaka, animookosoopa; waavenyaka, animuuluma ni weyo," 
Proverbs6:23 niwoko nlamulo nna nri ntoko yoomwaleela, mahusiho ala ari ntoko waara, ni wooperera wa olaka ori ntoko ephiro enrongha wookumini;" 
Proverbs6:24 iyo sinoowaakihera wa muthiyana ooraruwa, ni ottapaheriwa woonanara wa muthiyana ooraviwa." 
Proverbs6:25 Ohoovorenghele murima ophwaneliwawawe hata ohihapuxeye ni maweherowaawe," 
Proverbs6:26 niwoko puuta onimooruuhela ohaawa, vaheera muthiyana a mulopwana mukina onlupattha okumaawo xaxaxa." 
Proverbs6:27 Mutthu onoowera wiikaathi mooro vakakasani woohiza soowara? 
Proverbs6:28 Mutthu onoowera weetta vamakhalani a mooro woohiza inaawo? 
Proverbs6:29 Eneereya hiiho ni yoole onkonano mwaara a mukina; khaawo onimutava ahinattaruxiwa. 
Proverbs6:30 Namwiiya khannyoosiwa, owo iiya weera iive etala." 
Proverbs6:31 Wa soothesene, avariwa, aliveke imaara ithannapiili yeeyo iiyalaawe, naari yeeyo emurikelaka wa sootheene orinaawe owaani." 
Proverbs6:32 Vaheera mulopwana onraruwa, khanono iseru; ootheene aneetta moota owo animwiihonona." 
Proverbs6:33 Onoohaawa ovulalasa ni wuulihiheya muru, ni oyeviheyawawe khoomala," 
Proverbs6:34 niwoko ehace entannya onyoonyiwa wa iyawe ni owo khammorela ikharari, iinlelaka ikukuttula" 
Proverbs6:35 Khaakhulelaru oliviwa; soovaha sooreerela khasinimmaaliha. 
Proverbs7:1 Mwanaka, wiiwelele maswaaka ni othokorore malamulowaaka mpuwamwawo." 
Proverbs7:2 Wiiwelele malamulowaaka, ni weyo onookhalano okumi; othokorore mahusihowaaka ntoko emboni ya mmaithonimwawo." 
Proverbs7:3 Otthukelele mukathanimwawo; olepe vatthaabwani wa murimaawo. 
Proverbs7:4 Weerele miruku: “Nyuwo ti amayaka,” ni wiitthanele wiiwexexa mmusaawo." 
Proverbs7:5 Iyo sinimoorakameliha wa muthiyana ooraruwa, aani wa puuta ni maswaawe oonyeenga." 
Proverbs7:6 Waxanelani wa empaaka kaaweha kithurumelaka wa mwiikitthoni," 
Proverbs7:7 kinamoona eriyari ya oohisuwela, aani eriyari ya amiravo, mmiravo mmoha oohikhalano iseru." 
Proverbs7:8 Owo aarweela mmuseweni vakhiviru wa muthiyana mmoha, akelaka owannyawe." 
Proverbs7:9 Yaari ewukawuka, wiilaka, epiphi ekumanaka." 
Proverbs7:10 Vano muthiyana aahoorwa omukumanano, awanreene ntoko puuta, asareiyeene ocendyera vamurimaniwawe." 
Proverbs7:11 Owo ti oowiitha nlumi ni namatannya, ti oohikilaathi vaate;" 
Proverbs7:12 ehuhu ekina munseweni, ekina mmapuwani; khula nlootho onkhala oothurumela." 
Proverbs7:13 Owo aamvara mmiravo, anambeeca woohuuliwa muru, amweerelaka:" 
Proverbs7:14 “Kookhalano owaani enama ya yooveleelela murettele, kipankaaka olelo weera kikwanihere soororomelihasaka." 
Proverbs7:15 Tivawo kirwiiyaaka wookumananoni weera kiwaaseeni ni kohoophwanyani! 
Proverbs7:16 Kohaatala wookonawaka kikhuneelaka ni ikuwo sootteettheya soorika sa wExipitu. 
Proverbs7:17 Kohunkheliha wookonawaka ni emira*, alowe* ni ekanela*." 
Proverbs7:18 Orwe, nrowe nahapalihane orottolo mpaka oxa, nipuhe osiva wa osivela!" 
Proverbs7:19 Niwoko aiyaka khaakhanle owaani – aarowa ottaiwene. 
Proverbs7:20 Aakuxa murupa woosareya eparatha* ni khaanghokolowa ohinaaye mweeri okhomaala. 
Proverbs7:21 Amunyeengaka hiiho, aamviriyela ni masu ooreera mmwano amulokotthaka." 
Proverbs7:22 Woowaakuveya, owo aamutthara ntoko emombe enronghiwa owiiviwani, hoye hoye ntoko eveyado* emmorela munraakhoni" 
Proverbs7:23 mpaka nivaka omuhoma hapa. Aamutthara ntoko mwaapalame ontuphela munraakhoni, ahisuwelaka weera yeeyo enoomurikihela okumaawe." 
Proverbs7:24 Vano mwanaka, okiiwe; owiriyane maswaaka." 
Proverbs7:25 Ohiinlele murimaawo iphiro sa muthiyana owo, naari ohitthunihere ovariwa muntthavinimwawe." 
Proverbs7:26 Ancipale yiiviwe ni yoowo; owiivalaawe ahaattaxa. 
Proverbs7:27 Empaawe ti ephiro enrowa woovithiwani, eronghaka wookhwaani." 
Proverbs8:1 Miruku sinkhuwela; akhili ankhuwelaxa; 
Proverbs8:2 muttuttuwani, muxerexere ephiro, mmathakalaano owo onimweemela;" 
Proverbs8:3 waansele, vamulako wa esidade, milako sa mpuwa owo onkhuwelaxa." 
Proverbs8:4 Wa nyuwosa asilopwana, kinookhuwelelani; wa omutthu wootheene kinookhuwelelaxa." 
Proverbs8:5 Nyuwosa oohisuwela, mphwanye miruku; ni nyuwosa alolo, mukhaleno muupuwelo wooreera." 
Proverbs8:6 Vano mwiiwe, kookhalano itthu sintthuneya ohima; iyanosaka sinimuuluma ekhaikhai." 
Proverbs8:7 Eyanowaaka enuuluma ekhaikhai, niwoko iyanosaka sinthanya soonanara." 
Proverbs8:8 Maswaaka ootheene ti oororomeleya; khaniwoworu nsu noolokottha naari noohuureya. 
Proverbs8:9 Wa yaale arino akhili, maswaaka ti oowiiwanyeya, ni oowookoleleya wa yaale arino esuwelo." 
Proverbs8:10 Mukupaleele oxuttihawaka ohikhanle eparatha*, ni esuwelo ohikhanle eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera," 
Proverbs8:11 niwoko miruku ti etthu yooreeraxa opwaha erubani*; kheewo mungweraanyu ohaawela enlikana ni seiyo. 
Proverbs8:12 Miyo miruku, kinkhala vamoha ni akhili, ni kookhalano esuwelo enrweela mmuupuweloni wooreera." 
Proverbs8:13 Omoova Yave ti othanya yoonanara; kinthanya wiixoona ni wiikuxerera, mweettelo woonanara ni wuuluma wootakhala." 
Proverbs8:14 Olaka wooreerela ti wawaka; wiiwexexa ni owera ti wawaka. 
Proverbs8:15 Mwa miyo mamwene anlamula, asitokweene ankhaliha ikano sa ekhaikhai;" 
Proverbs8:16 mwa miyotho maneethi anlamula nitho aphuki ootheene a mulaponi. 
Proverbs8:17 Kinaasivela yaawo ankisivela, ni yoowo onkaasa onookiphwanya." 
Proverbs8:18 Mwa miyo sookhala mihakhu ni nttittimiho, weetteleya nnene ni ekhaikhai yoolekela." 
Proverbs8:19 Yoowiimaaka ti yooreerela opwaha eyuuma yoorikaxa, aani opwaha eyuuma yooreeraxa; yeeyo kimvahaaka ti yoopwaha eparatha* yooreerelaxa." 
Proverbs8:20 Kineetta mmuseweni mwa wookoleleya, mphironi mwa ekhaikhai," 
Proverbs8:21 kaavahaka mihakhu yaawo ankisivela ni kisarihaka mukwartunimwaya wa mihakhu. 
Proverbs8:22 Yave okipattunxe ntoko epacerero ya soopakasawe, sihinaaye mitekosawe sa khalayixa;" 
Proverbs8:23 kikhalihiwe okhuma khalayi, aani ompacereroni, ehinaaye okhala etthaya." 
Proverbs8:24 Kiyariwe sihikhanle iphareiya, nlelo ehinaaye okhala anaattuuttu a maahi;" 
Proverbs8:25 Miyo kiyariwe sihinaaye okhalihiwa nyaako ni mattumuxa. 
Proverbs8:26 Owo eera ahinaaye opaka etthaya hata ntuphi, naari ntthupi mwa nenno opakenlaaweno elapo ya vathi." 
Proverbs8:27 Owo aakhalihaawe erimu, miyo kaakhalawo; aahelaawe mwiinano ephareiya," 
Proverbs8:28 iikaathaawe mahutte osulu ni aakhalihaawe anaattuuttu a moowiixera," 
Proverbs8:29 aahelaawe nyiinano sa mphareiya weera maahi ehivoleelane, aakhalihaawe nyiinano sa mathipelo a elapo." 
Proverbs8:30 Vano miyo kaari mukhwipimwawe ntoko namarattaawe ooweraxa. Khula nihuku kaari oosiveleyaawe ni kaahakalala woohihiyerera vamaithoniwawe. 
Proverbs8:31 Miyo kaahakalalela elapo opattunxaawe, ni omutthu wannakihakalaliha." 
Proverbs8:32 Vano anamwanaaka, mukiiwe: Ooreelihiwa yaale aneettela iphirosaka!" 
Proverbs8:33 Mwiiwe mahusihowaaka, ni munookhala asuweli. Muhinyoose." 
Proverbs8:34 Ooreelihiwa mulopwana onkiiwa, awehawehaka mahuku ootheene mulakwaaka, awehereraka wa milakoni sa empaaka." 
Proverbs8:35 Vano ootheene yaale ankiphwanya, anookhalano okumi ni anoophwanya murima wooreera wa Yave." 
Proverbs8:36 Vaheera yoowo onkirakamela, oniinanariha mwaneenaawe; ootheene ankithanya ansivela okhwa." 
Proverbs9:1 Miruku sooteka empaaya; sohaareherera amarimbwaaya athanneeli. 
Proverbs9:2 Soowiiva axinama oowaarera, sohootowela eviinyuwaaya, sinareherera meesa." 
Proverbs9:3 Sohaarumiha arumeiyaaya athiyana oolattula okhuma vanipuroni na osuluxa wa esidade, ekhuwelaka:" 
Proverbs9:4 “Oohisuwela ootheene murwaase! Wa yaawo ahinono muupuwelo wooreera ongweerela: 
Proverbs9:5 “Murwaase muce yoocaaka ni ngwure eviinyu kootowenlaaka. 
Proverbs9:6 Muhiye iphirosanyu soohuupuwela, ni nyuwosa munookhalano okumi; mukuxere ephiro ya wiiwexexa." 
Proverbs9:7 Yoowo onimookolela namatthebwa onimwiiruwaniha; yoowo onimuhiiha mutakhali onimwaakhela onyoholiwa. 
Proverbs9:8 Muhimuhiihe namatthebwa weera owo ahoothanyeni; munghiihe musuweli, ni owo onimoosivelani." 
Proverbs9:9 Munxuttihe musuweli, ni owo onookhalaxatho musuweli; munxuttihe oororomeleya, ni owo onimwaandyeerera osuwelawawe." 
Proverbs9:10 Omoova Yave ti mathipelo a miruku, ni omusuwela Oottela ti okhalano wiiwexexa." 
Proverbs9:11 Mwa Miyo mahukwaanyu animwaandyeerereya, ni ehuhu ya okumaanyu enoopwaherera." 
Proverbs9:12 Nyuwo mwakhala musuweli, weetteleya nnene onookhala wawinyu; mwakhala namatthebwa munimwiihaawihera." 
Proverbs9:13 Muthiyana oololo ti oowuunguruma, oohuupuwela nnene ni oohimiruku." 
Proverbs9:14 Akilaathiyeene vamulako wa empaawe, nipuro na osuluxa wa esidade," 
Proverbs9:15 onaakhuwelela amvirawo, erowaka ankelaayawo:" 
Proverbs9:16 “Murwe ootheene nyuwo oohisuwela!” Wa yaawo ahinono muupuwelo wooreera ongweerela: 
Proverbs9:17 “Maahi oowiiyiwa ti oocoocowa, ni yooca enciwa wiiphiini ti yoosiva!”" 
Proverbs9:18 Vaheera awosa khaansuwela weera iwe ori okhwa, aani, weera oolattuliwaaya ari moowiixera mwa nihiye." 
Proverbs10:1 Miruku sa Salomoni: Mwaana a miruku onaahakalaliha atithawe; Mwaana mulolo onaathananiha amayawe. 
Proverbs10:2 Mihakhu simphwanyiwa moohiroromeleyani khasimvareleya muteko, vaheera ororomeleya ontapuxa mookhwaani." 
Proverbs10:3 Yave khanimuhiya oororomeleya avoliwaka; mene khamphwanyiha soohaawela sa atakhali. 
Proverbs10:4 Matata ooreesi animuhaawiha mutthu, wa soothesene, matata amvara muteko animuruuhela muhakhu." 
Proverbs10:5 Yoowo onghepha mulaala ti mwaana a miruku, vaheera yoowo onkona mweehuhuni ya ohepha ti mwaana oniiruuhela wuulihiheya muru." 
Proverbs10:6 Mareeliho ti ecireemba mmuru mwa oororomeleya, vaheera masu a atakhali aniipithiha nipuhero." 
Proverbs10:7 Wuupuwelela ehiiwale ni oororomeleya onookhala mareeliho, vaheera nsina na atakhali nnimuutta." 
Proverbs10:8 Murima wa miruku onimwaakhulela malamulo, vaheera eyano ya alolo enaarongha wuuheleyani nthala." 
Proverbs10:9 Yoowo oneetta mookwanelani oneetta oolipeene, vaheera yoowo onkuxera iphiro sookhoromana onimooneleliwa." 
Proverbs10:10 Yoowo ongweha ncerekhule ontannyera milattu, ni eyano ya oohimiruku enimurongha wuuheleyani nthala." 
Proverbs10:11 Eyano ya oororomeleya ti naattuuttu a okumi, vaheera masu a atakhali aniipithiha nipuhero." 
Proverbs10:12 Othanya ontannyera munyakunyaku; vaheera osivela onkuttelela soottheka sootheene. 
Proverbs10:13 Miruku siri mmwaano mwa yaale arino iseru, vaheera ekopo ti ya yaale ahirino iseru." 
Proverbs10:14 Anamiruku anthukumanya esuwelo, vaheera eyano ya oohimiruku enlattula oheleya nthala." 
Proverbs10:15 Mihakhu sa apuhi ti esidadaaya yoolipihiwa, vaheera othoiwa ti oheleya nthala wa oohaawa." 
Proverbs10:16 Nlivo na oororomeleya nninruuhela okumi, vaheera ewinelo ya mutakhali enimuruuhela nttaruxo." 
Proverbs10:17 Yoowo onaakhulela olakiwa ori mphironi ya okumi, vaheera yoowo ohinghiiheya onaahapuxa akina." 
Proverbs10:18 Yoowo oniipithiha othanya ookhalano iyano soowootha, ni yoowo ommwaramwaxa waapanana ti mulolo." 
Proverbs10:19 Yaattaka masu, yoottheka eri vaavaawo, vaheera yoowo ongwehaweha nlumi ti a miruku." 
Proverbs10:20 Nlumi na oororomeleya ti eparatha* yoothanliwa, vaheera murima wa atakhali khoomphureleya etthu." 
Proverbs10:21 Masu a oororomeleya anaaciha ancipale, vaheera mulolo onkhwa niwoko na ohikhalano iseru." 
Proverbs10:22 Mareeliho a Yave othadyiriha, ni khaantakanseraru wakhalaru othanana." 
Proverbs10:23 Mulolo onghakalalela mweettelo woonanara, vaheera mutthu oosareya wiiwexexa ontteeliwa mmirukuni." 
Proverbs10:24 Yeeyo onoovaawe mutakhali enoomukhumelela; yeeyo onghaawelaawe oororomeleya onoovahiwa. 
Proverbs10:25 Yaaviraka ettheku, mutakhali khankhalatho, vaheera oororomeleya ompwaherera oolipeene mahuku ootheene." 
Proverbs10:26 Ntoko muthiikila mmainoni ni mwiixi mmaithoni, ti hiihotho nooreesi wa yaale animurumiha." 
Proverbs10:27 Omoova Yave waandyeerera okumi, vaheera okumi wa mutakhali onoovukuwa." 
Proverbs10:28 Oweherera wa oororomeleya onnaahakalaliha, vaheera oweherera wa atakhali khaamphurela etthu." 
Proverbs10:29 Ephiro ya Yave ti wootthawela wa oororomeleya, vaheera ti oheleya nthala wa yaale ampaka yoonanara." 
Proverbs10:30 Oororomeleya kheepheliwa, vaheera atakhali khaanlekela mulaponi." 
Proverbs10:31 Eyano ya oororomeleya enruwera miruku, vaheera nlumi noonanara nnoothikiliwa." 
Proverbs10:32 Eyano ya oororomeleya ensuwela yeeyo eri yooreera, vaheera eyano ya atakhali ensuwela yeeyo paahi eri yoonanara." 
Proverbs11:1 Yave onthanya miringo soohiroromeleya, vaheera miringo sa ekhaikhai sinnamuhakalaliha." 
Proverbs11:2 Waarwaaka wiixoona, emphiyatho erisa, vaheera miruku siri ni oowiiyeviha." 
Proverbs11:3 Okwanela wa oororomeleya onnaweettiha, vaheera ohikwanakwana wa oohiroromeleya onimwaaphwata." 
Proverbs11:4 Mihakhu khasimvareleya muteko munihukuni na isara sa oMuluku, vaheera wookoleleya ontapuxa mookhwaani." 
Proverbs11:5 Wookoleleya wa oororomeleya onnaathatawalihera ephiro, vaheera mutthu oonanara murima ommora niwoko na yoonanaraawe." 
Proverbs11:6 Ekhaikhai ya oororomeleya ennaatapuxa, vaheera soohaawela sa oohiroromeleya sinnaatthuka." 
Proverbs11:7 Aakhwaaka mutakhali, owehererawawe onoolakaseya; sootheene aawehereraawe mukurunimwawe khasimphureleya etthu." 
Proverbs11:8 Oororomeleya onoopowa mmakacamihoni, ni awo anthaamiheriwa wa mutakhali." 
Proverbs11:9 Mutakhali ontthuna omphwata mukhwaawe ni eyano, vaheera oororomeleya onootapuxiwa mmirukuni." 
Proverbs11:10 Oororomeleya saaweettelaka nnene, esidade ennatthapa; atakhali yaariheyaka, wookhala wiipa wa ohakalala." 
Proverbs11:11 Mmareelihoni mwa oororomeleya esidade enoovuwihiwa, vaheera ni eyano ya atakhali enoophwatiwa." 
Proverbs11:12 Mulolo ongwuulumela soonanara akhwaawe, vaheera mutthu a akhili onsuwela wiimaaliha." 
Proverbs11:13 Namuulumaxa onthupulula exiiri, vaheera oophwanela ororomeliwa onsunga exiiri." 
Proverbs11:14 Ohinkhalaayawo olaka wooreera elapo kheeneetta nnene, vaheera wookhala oneetteleya nnene ankhalaayawo anamalaka ancipale." 
Proverbs11:15 Yoowo onimukhavihera namarwa oolinghe, onoohaawa, vaheera yoowo onkhootta opaka yeeyo ori oolipeene." 
Proverbs11:16 Muthiyana a nnene omphwanya nttittimiho, vaheera asilopwana oowuuma murima antthukuruwela mihakhu." 
Proverbs11:17 Yoowo onaapakela yooreera akina oniipakela muneenaawe; mutthu oowuuma murima oniiruuhela milattu. 
Proverbs11:18 Mutakhali onaakhela nlivo noolokottheya, vaheera yoowo onaala moota woowookoleleya onghepha ntthuvelo noororomeleya." 
Proverbs11:19 Yoowo ompwaherera moororomeleyani onookhala ni okumi, vaheera yoowo onaasa opaka yoonanara ontthimakela wookhwaani." 
Proverbs11:20 Yave onaathanya atthu a murima woonanara, vaheera yaawo a mweettelo woororomeleya annimuhakalaliha." 
Proverbs11:21 Musuwele nnene weera atakhali kheekhala woohittaruxiwa, vaheera oororomeleya anootapuxiwa." 
Proverbs11:22 Ntoko munela a eyuuma yoorikaxa munnumbini wa ekuluwe, ti hiihotho muthiyana ooreera oohikhalano akhili." 
Proverbs11:23 Soohaawela sa oororomeleya sinnawineleya; ommaleloni wa oweherera wa atakhali ti nttaruxo. 
Proverbs11:24 Yoowo anaavahe ni murima wootheene, onimwaandyeerera mihakhusawe; yoowo onlipano mmatatani ni yeeyo eeraawe avahe, ommorela moohaawani." 
Proverbs11:25 Mutthu a murima wooreera sinoomweettela nnene; yoowo onaakhavihera oovoliwa ntthona onookhaviheriwatho. 
Proverbs11:26 Muloko onimulapha yoole oniipithiha etrigu, vaheera mareeliho animurweela yoole ori oolikaneene othumiha." 
Proverbs11:27 Yoowo onaasaasa mpuha onoophwanya murima wooreera; vaheera yoonanara enimurowela yoowo onaasa. 
Proverbs11:28 Vekhaikhai yoowo onroromela mihakhusawe onoomora, vaheera oororomeleya anoophuwa ntoko nikukhu noopombaxa." 
Proverbs11:29 Yoohiyeriwa wa yoowo ontannyera milattu emusaawe eniikhale epheyo paahi; mulolo anaakhale murumeiyi a musuweli. 
Proverbs11:30 Yoowiima ya yoororomeleya ti mwiri wa okumi, ni yoowo onaarukunxiha murima akina ti musuweli." 
Proverbs11:31 Oororomeleya yaakhela mweelaponi nttaruxo amphwanelaaya, wootepaxa mutakhali ni namattheka!" 
Proverbs12:1 Ootheene ansivela olakiwa ansivela esuwelo, vaheera yoowo onthanya ohiihiwa ti mulolo." 
Proverbs12:2 Mutthu a nnene onimusiveliha Yave, vaheera Yave onoomuttaruxa yoowo omvaanelela soonanara." 
Proverbs12:3 Khaawo ongwera wiilipihera mootakhalani, ni khoongwereya omphela oororomeleya." 
Proverbs12:4 Muthiyana a ethoonyero yooreera ti ecireemba ya aiyawe, vaheera muthiyana a mweettelo woowuuliheya muru ti ntoko eretta mmakhuvanimwawe." 
Proverbs12:5 Soovaanela sa oororomeleya ti soowookoleleya, vaheera ikano sa atakhali ti soolokottha." 
Proverbs12:6 Masu a atakhali ti mwiipithelo oniiva, vaheera oororomeleya yuulumaka, wookhala otapuxeya." 
Proverbs12:7 Atakhali anoophwatiwa, enalakaseya, vaheera ntthoko na oororomeleya nimpwaherera noolipanene." 
Proverbs12:8 Mutthu onttittimihiwa ottharihiwaka mmirukunimwawe, vaheera yoowo ori a murima woonanara onoonyoosiwa." 
Proverbs12:9 Fataari okhala oohittittimiheya, okhalanneene oowoorumeela, ohikhanle wiixeera oottittimimeya ohikhalanaka yooca." 
Proverbs12:10 Oororomeleya onkosoopa nnenesene mihuwosawe, vaheera mpaka ipakelo sooreera sa atakhali simmalela mooxililini." 
Proverbs12:11 Yoowo onlima mmattamwawe onooruwera, vaheera yoowo ontthara ethiru, khanono miruku." 
Proverbs12:12 Atakhali anghaawela soohuhula sikuxiwe ni oonanara murima, vaheera mukwankhwaari wa oororomeleya onimwiima." 
Proverbs12:13 Mutakhali ompharihiwa muntaphani mwa ngwoothanimwawe, vaheera oororomeleya onoowera wiitapuxa mmakacamihoni." 
Proverbs12:14 Mutthu onaakhela mureerelo mwa soowiima sa eyanowaawe, ni miteko sa matataawe onootthuveliwano." 
Proverbs12:15 Ephiro ya mulolo enimukhalela ntoko yoororomeleya, vaheera musuweli oniiwa soolakiwa." 
Proverbs12:16 Mulolo onoonihera woowaakuveya onyoonyiwawawe, vaheera mutthu a miruku khanghelela oveihiwawawe." 
Proverbs12:17 Namoona a nnene onkhalela onamoona woororomeleya, vaheera namoona oohiroromeleya onthaliha soowootha." 
Proverbs12:18 Aakhala masu amvulaliha ntoko ekatana, vaheera nlumi na asuweli ninruuha olama." 
Proverbs12:19 Iyano singhima ekhaikhai simpwaherera mahuku ootheene, vaheera nlumi noowootha ninkhala ehuhu vakhaani." 
Proverbs12:20 Olokottha ori vamurimani wa yaale anuupuwela soonanara, vaheera ohakalala ori eriyari ya yaale ankhaliha murettele." 
Proverbs12:21 Kheewoworu yoonanara eneera emphwanye oororomeleya, vaheera atakhali aasareya milattu." 
Proverbs12:22 Yave onthanya iyano soowootha, vaheera onaahakalalela yaawo anuuluma ekhaikhai." 
Proverbs12:23 Mutthu a miruku onnakhuwa osuwelawawe, vaheera murima wa alolo ongyeeha ololo." 
Proverbs12:24 Matata amvara muteko anoolamula, vaheera anooreesi anoomalamalela mpotthani." 
Proverbs12:25 Murima wookacamiheya onnamuthananiha mutthu, vaheera nsu nooreerelaxa ninnamuhakalaliha." 
Proverbs12:26 Mutthu oororomeleya ti oomaaleleya moonthamwenenimwawe, vaheera iphiro sa atakhali sinaarongha wooriheyani." 
Proverbs12:27 Nooreesi mpaka khanaaneela yoolupatthaawe, vaheera namavara muteko onnoonelamo sooreelasawe." 
Proverbs12:28 Okumi ori mphironi mwa ekhaikhai; mphironi mmo khoomomo okhwa. 
Proverbs13:1 Mwaana musuweli oniiwelela mahusiho a tiithi, vaheera namatthebwa khaniiwa ohiihiwa." 
Proverbs13:2 Mutthu onaakhela mureerelo mwa soowiima sa eyanowaawe, vaheera oohiroromela anghaawela nipuhero." 
Proverbs13:3 Yoowo onthokorora eyanowaawe onthokorora okumaawe, vaheera namuulumaxa onimweera wiihela nthala." 
Proverbs13:4 Nooreesi onnihaawela, mene kheewo omphwanyaawe, vaheera soohaawela sa anamavara muteko sinookwaniheriwa woomalela." 
Proverbs13:5 Oororomeleya anthanya yoohikwanakwana, vaheera atakhali anruuha wuuliha muru ni erisa." 
Proverbs13:6 Ekhaikhai enimukosoopa mutthu ookwanela, vaheera sootakhala sinimphwata namattheka." 
Proverbs13:7 Mukina oniixeera thadyiri ahikhalanaka etthu; mukinatho oniixeera oohaawa, areeneno mihakhu sincipale." 
Proverbs13:8 Mihakhu sa mutthu simvareleya muteko woowoopolela okumaawe, vaheera namahaawa khaniiwaru woopopihiwa." 
Proverbs13:9 Waara wa oororomeleya onnamwaleelaxa, vaheera yoomwaleela ya atakhali enoocipha" 
Proverbs13:10 Wiixoona ongyara minyakunyaku, vaheera miruku siri ni yaale aniiwa olakiwa." 
Proverbs13:11 Musurukhu omphwanyiwa moohiroromeleyani onoovukuwa, vaheera yoowo onthukumanya vakhaani vakhaani onookhalanaxa." 
Proverbs13:12 Oweherera woopisa ontannyera ovoreya murima, vaheera ohaawela wookwaniheriwa ti mwiri wa okumi." 
Proverbs13:13 Yoowo onderera ohusihiwa onoolivelano, vaheera yoowo onttittimiha nlamulo onootthuveliwa." 
Proverbs13:14 Nihusiho na asuweli ti naattuuttu a okumi, ni nnimuhapuxa mutthu mmiraakhoni mwa okhwa." 
Proverbs13:15 Mwiiwexexo wooreera ongwina nttittimiho, vaheera ephiro ya oohiroromeleya kheempwaherera." 
Proverbs13:16 Atthu ootheene arino miruku aneetta ettharihaka esuwelo, vaheera mulolo onoonihera ololowaawe." 
Proverbs13:17 Namutthenga ootakhala ommorela mmakacamihoni, vaheera oororomeleya onruuha olama." 
Proverbs13:18 Yoowo ohinoonelamo olakiwa ommorela moohaawani ni ngwuulihiheyani muru, vaheera yoowo oniiwelela ohiihiwa onaakhela opwatthiwa woottittimiheya." 
Proverbs13:19 Ohaawela wookwaniheriwa onsiveliha okumi, vaheera mulolo onkhootta ohiya yoonanara." 
Proverbs13:20 Yoowo oneetta ni asuweli ompwaherera okhala musuweli, vaheera mukhwaaya alolo ommalela moonanarani." 
Proverbs13:21 Erisa enimuttharatthara namattheka, vaheera weetteleya nnene ti ntthuvelo na oororomeleya." 
Proverbs13:22 Mutthu a nnene onghiyera yoohiyeriwa osuuluwaawe, vaheera mihakhu sa namattheka anthokororeliwa oororomeleya." 
Proverbs13:23 Ematta ya oohaawa ennaruweraxa yooca, vaheera engyeleeliwa niwoko na ohiroromeleya." 
Proverbs13:24 Yoowo onkhootta omuttaruxa mwanawe khanimusivela; vaheera yoowo onimusivela khanghovela omuttaruxa. 
Proverbs13:25 Oororomeleya onca mpaka ovona, vaheera atakhali ampwaherera oovoliweene." 
Proverbs14:1 Muthiyana a miruku onteka ntthokonawe, vaheera oohimiruku omphwata ntthokonawe ni matataawe." 
Proverbs14:2 Yoowo oneetta ngwookoleleyani ommoova Yave, vaheera yoowo ontthara iphiro soolokottheya onoomunyoosa." 
Proverbs14:3 Otthekula wa oohimiruku oniiruuhela ekopo yoomaneliwano ottuli, vaheera iyano sa asuweli sinnawaakihera." 
Proverbs14:4 Sihinkhalaayawo imombe matatha khaankhala etthu, vaheera ikuru sa emombe sinruuha oruweraxa." 
Proverbs14:5 Namoona a ekhaikhai khanlokottha, vaheera namoona oowootha onsareya soowootha." 
Proverbs14:6 Namatthebwa onaasaasa miruku woohiphwanya, vaheera esuwelo enimurweela wookhweya yoowo orino iseru." 
Proverbs14:7 Mwiirakamelihe ni mulolo, niwoko nyuwo khamumphwanya esuwelo mwa yeeyo aneeraawe uulume." 
Proverbs14:8 Esuwelo ya mutthu a miruku ti okhalela iseru ephirowaawe, vaheera ohimiruku wa mulolo ti woolokottheya." 
Proverbs14:9 Alolo antheya saarehereriwaka soottheka, vaheera eriyari ya oororomeleya wookhala onnene." 
Proverbs14:10 Khula murima onsuwela yoowaawaaya, ni khawowo anaakhalele mpatta wa ohakalalawaya." 
Proverbs14:11 Empa ya atakhali enoophwatiwa, vaheera eheema ya oororomeleya enimweetteleya nnene." 
Proverbs14:12 Yookhala ephiro enkhala ntoko yooreera wa mutthu, vaheera ommaleloniwaya enrongha wookhwaani." 
Proverbs14:13 Naari wootheyani onoowereya weera murima onghaawa, ni ongwereyatho weera ohakalala onoomalela woothananani." 
Proverbs14:14 Oohiroromeleya anootthuveleliwa mweettelowaaya, vaheera mutthu a nnene onimwaakhela ntthuvelonawe nooreera." 
Proverbs14:15 Oohisuwela anaakhulela yakhalaru etthu, vaheera mutthu a miruku onoona nnenesene onnyikalaawemo." 
Proverbs14:16 Musuweli ti oowiipasoopa asembaka yoonanara, vaheera mulolo ti oovirikanya ni oohihiiheya." 
Proverbs14:17 Noowali ompaka sa ololo ni mutthu oowalaala onoothanyiwa. 
Proverbs14:18 Yoohiyeriwa ya oohisuwela ti ololo, vaheera esuwelo ti ecireemba ya anamiruku." 
Proverbs14:19 Oonanara murima anookokhorela ohoolo wa atthu a nnene, ni atakhali anookokhorela milako sa atthu a ekhaikhai." 
Proverbs14:20 Oohaawa ansembiwa mpaka ni aximwaattamanaaya, vaheera asinthamwene a apuhi ti ancipale." 
Proverbs14:21 Yoowo onimunyoosa mukhwaawe onoottheka, vaheera ooreelihiwa yoowo onaapakela onnene oothoiwa!" 
Proverbs14:22 Yaawo anuupuwela soonanara paahi anooyeleela, vaheera yaawo anuupuwela yeeyo eri yooreera amphwanya osivela ni ororomeleya." 
Proverbs14:23 Muteko wootheene woovihaxa owineleya, vaheera wuulumaru paahi ohaawiha." 
Proverbs14:24 Mihakhu sa asuweli ti ecireembaaya, vaheera ohimiruku wa alolo onruweratho ololo." 
Proverbs14:25 Namoona onuuluma ekhaikhai onoopola okumi, vaheera namoona oowootha ti oolokottha." 
Proverbs14:26 Yoowo ommoova Yave ookhalano ntthawelo noolipa ni omoova iwo onookhala wootthawela wa anamwanaawe. 
Proverbs14:27 Omoova Yave ti naattuuttu a okumi, ni onimususiha mutthu mmiraakhoni mwa okhwa." 
Proverbs14:28 Waatta wa atthu ti ovuwa wa mwene, vaheera ohikhala wa atthu, mwaana mulopwana a mwene ooheleya nthala." 
Proverbs14:29 Mutthu oovilela onoonihera wiiwexexa, vaheera noowali onoonihera ololo." 
Proverbs14:30 Murima wa murettele onruuhela okumi erutthu, vaheera nrima nnunttiha makhuva." 
Proverbs14:31 Yoowo onimuhooxa oohaawa onimunyoosa Mpattuxaawe vaheera yoowo onimpakela onnene oothoiwa onimuttittimiha Muluku. 
Proverbs14:32 Yaaphiyaka ehasara, atakhali anoophwatiwa; wa soothesene, mpakatho mookhwaani oororomeleya anoophwanya ntthawelo." 
Proverbs14:33 Miruku simmaka mmurimani mwa anaseru – mpaka eriyari ya alolo iyo sinimwiisuweliha. 
Proverbs14:34 Ekhaikhai enunnuwiha elapo, vaheera yoottheka ti wuuliha muru wa miloko sootheene." 
Proverbs14:35 Murumeiyi musuweli onimusiveliha mwene, vaheera yoowo oneetta ngwuuliheyani muru oniiruuhela isara sa mwene." 
Proverbs15:1 Yoowaakhula yoomaaleleya enghuluxa onyoonyiwa, vaheera masu ookwitula antannya isara." 
Proverbs15:2 Nlumi na asuweli nintannyera ohaawela esuwelo, vaheera eyano ya alolo engyeeha ololo." 
Proverbs15:3 Maitho a Yave ari mipatta sootheene, yaawehaka ooreera ni oonanara murima." 
Proverbs15:4 Wuuluma woosiveleya ti mwiri wa okumi, vaheera wuuluma woolokottha onttikittha munepa." 
Proverbs15:5 Mulolo khampwatthela olaka wa atithawe, vaheera yoowo oniiwelela olaka wa atithawe onoonihera miruku." 
Proverbs15:6 Empa ya oororomeleya sookhalamo mihakhu sitokotoko, vaheera ewinelo ya atakhali sinaaruuhela milattu sitokotoko." 
Proverbs15:7 Masu a asuweli ammwaramwaxa esuwelo; vaheera khoohiyono hiiho murima wa alolo. 
Proverbs15:8 Yave onthanya sooveleela sa atakhali, vaheera nivekelo na oororomeleya ninnamusiveliha." 
Proverbs15:9 Yave onthanya iphiro sa atakhali, vaheera onimusivela yoowo onaasaasa ekhaikhai." 
Proverbs15:10 Wookhala olakiwa woolipaxa wa yoowo onghiya ephiro ya ekhaikhai; yoowo ohinoonelamo ohiihiwa onimookhwa. 
Proverbs15:11 Nihiye ni ophwata soohuleya ohoolo wa Yave; wootepaxa mirima sa atthu! 
Proverbs15:12 Namatthebwa khanimutthuna yoowo ommookolela, hata khanaasaasa ekhavihero ya musuweli." 
Proverbs15:13 Ohakalala wa murima onooneya owiitho, vaheera murima woothanana onttikittha munepa." 
Proverbs15:14 Murima onsuwela iseru onaasaasa esuwelo, vaheera eyano ya alolo eniiciha ololo." 
Proverbs15:15 Mahuku ootheene a namahooxiwa ti ooripiha murima, vaheera murima wootteeliwa ompwaherera okhala woohakalaleene." 
Proverbs15:16 Fataari okhalano vakhaani omoovaka Yave, ohikhanle okhalano mihakhu sincipale mootthukuruwani." 
Proverbs15:17 Fataari oca mapoonda oraayawo osivela, ohikhanle emombe yooneneva oreenewo othanyana." 
Proverbs15:18 Noowali onnatannyera owanawana, vaheera oovilela ommaliha minyakunyaku." 
Proverbs15:19 Ephiro ya nooreesi ti yoosareya nyiiwa, vaheera ephiro ya oororomeleya ti musewe woothatawala." 
Proverbs15:20 Mwaana musuweli onaahakalaliha atithawe, vaheera mulolo onaanyoosa amayawe." 
Proverbs15:21 Ololo onimuhakalaliha oohikhalano iseru, vaheera mutthu oowiiwexexa oneetta ngwookoleleyani." 
Proverbs15:22 Soovaanela khasineetta nnene niwoko na ohilakiwa wooreera, vaheera sineetta nnene yakhala anamalaka ancipale." 
Proverbs15:23 Waakhula yeeyoweene onimuhakalaliha mutthu; ni moota onreeraaya olakiwa mweehuhuni yootthuneya! 
Proverbs15:24 Ephiro ya okumi enimurongha osulu yoowo orino miruku weera owo ahikhuruwele munihiyeni. 
Proverbs15:25 Yave omphwata empa ya namwiixoona, vaheera onaakiha nyiinano sa etthoko ya naamukhweli." 
Proverbs15:26 Yave onthanya soowuupuwela sa oonanara murima, vaheera animusiveliha masu anghima woohikhala soonanara." 
Proverbs15:27 Namilili onghonona emusaawe, vaheera yoowo onthanya makhwankwa onookhala ni okumi." 
Proverbs15:28 Oororomeleya onuupuwela nnene ahinaawe waakhula, vaheera iyano sa atakhali simvuuva soonanara." 
Proverbs15:29 Yave ori ottai wa atakhali, vaheera oniiwa nivekelo na oororomeleya." 
Proverbs15:30 Oweha wooreera onghakalaliha murima, ni ihaali sooreera sinlipiha makhuva." 
Proverbs15:31 Yoowo oniiwa ohiiha wookhavihera, onookhalano nipuronawe eriyari ya asuweli." 
Proverbs15:32 Yoowo onkhootta olakiwa oniinyoosa muneenaawe, vaheera yoowo oniiwa ohiihiwa ongwina wiiwexexa." 
Proverbs15:33 Omoova Yave onxuttiha miruku, ni ottittimiheya ontthara wiiyeviha." 
Proverbs16:1 Soovaanela sa murima ti sa mutthu, vaheera wa Yave enrweela yoowaakhula ya vanlumini." 
Proverbs16:2 Iphiro sootheene sa mutthu sinimukhalela ntoko sooreera, vaheera Yave omphima munepa." 
Proverbs16:3 Muntteelihere Yave sootheene mumpakaanyu, ni soovaanelasanyu sinooweettelani nnenesene." 
Proverbs16:4 Yave ompakela sootheene mwa yeeyo onuupuwelelaawe; mpaka atakhali wa nihuku na nttaruxo. 
Proverbs16:5 Yave onaathanya oowiixoona vamurimani. Woohihovela anoottaruxiwa. 
Proverbs16:6 Moosivelani ni moororomeleyani elevelelo ya soottheka yooweriwa; moomoovani Yave mutthu onsemba yoonanara. 
Proverbs16:7 Iphiro sa mutthu saamusivelaka Yave, Owo ompakiha weera mpaka amwiittanaawe ekhale mmuretteleni ni yoowo." 
Proverbs16:8 Fataari okhalano vakhaani moororomeleyani ohikhanle okhalano sincipale moota woohiroromeleya. 
Proverbs16:9 Mmurimanimwawe mutthu omvaanela ephirowaawe, vaheera Yave onlamula malipaawe." 
Proverbs16:10 Iyano sa mwene sinuuluma soolakela soolipaxa; owo ahithoriheke moota woohikhala ekhaikhai. 
Proverbs16:11 Miringo ni miphimo soororomeleya sinrweela wa Yave; miringo sootheene sa munrupani simpakiwa ni Yoowo. 
Proverbs16:12 Mamwene anthanya mapakelo oonanara, woonaka weera ehice ya emwene enkhalihiwa mweekhaikhaiyini." 
Proverbs16:13 Mwene sinimusiveliha iyano soororomeleya, ni ommoonelamo mutthu onuuluma ekhaikhai." 
Proverbs16:14 Isara sa mwene ti namutthenga a okhwa, vaheera mutthu a miruku onookurunuxa isarasene seiyo." 
Proverbs16:15 Ohakalala wa ekhove ya mwene ontaphulela okumi; oreerawawe murima onlikana ni nihutte na epula mutthulo. 
Proverbs16:16 Fataari okhalano miruku ohikhanle eyuuma yoorikaxa! Fataari okhalano mwiiwexexo ohikhanle eparatha*. 
Proverbs16:17 Ephiro ya oororomeleya ensemba yoonanara; yoowo onkosoopa ephirowaawe onuurela okumaawe. 
Proverbs16:18 Ophwatiwa ontthara wiixoona; omora ontthara wiikuxerera. 
Proverbs16:19 Fataari okhalano okumi woowiiyeviha eriyari ya oohooxiwa, ohikhanle okawana soohuhula ni oowiixoona." 
Proverbs16:20 Yoowo ori ni miruku sinoomweettela nnene, ni ooreelihiwa ti yoole onimuroromela Yave." 
Proverbs16:21 Yoowo orino murima wa miruku oniitthaniwa naseru; yoowo onuuluma masu oosiveleya, onoowera oviriyela." 
Proverbs16:22 Wiiwexexa ti naattuuttu a okumi wa yaale arino, vaheera ololo onaaruuhela nttaruxo alolo." 
Proverbs16:23 Murima wa musuweli onxuttiha eyanowaawe, ni iyanosawe sinaandyeera mahusiho." 
Proverbs16:24 Masu oosiveleya ari ntoko macerephe a oravo, ti oocoocowa wa okumi ni anruuhela olama makhuva." 
Proverbs16:25 Yookhala ephiro enkhala ntoko yooreera wa mutthu, vaheera ommaleloniwaya enrongha wookhwaani." 
Proverbs16:26 Etala emmooperera yoowo ovara muteko, ovoliwawawe etala onnimunyesereriha." 
Proverbs16:27 Mutthu oohuupuwela nnene ompaka soonanara; maswaawe ti mooro woolaliha. 
Proverbs16:28 Mutthu ooriheya ontannyera minyakunyaku ni yoowo ommwaraxa soowootha onaasusiha asinthamwene ooreera. 
Proverbs16:29 Namapuhera onimutannyera mukhwaawe amuronghaka ephiro yoohiloka. 
Proverbs16:30 Yoowo omphuta maitho omvaanela yoonanara, yoowo onlumanyiha iyano ontannyera sootakhala." 
Proverbs16:31 Ipwi ti ecireemba yoowaara ni eyo emphwanyiwa wakhala mookumini woororomeleya. 
Proverbs16:32 Fataari mutthu oovilela ohikhanle nakhotto; fataari yoowo oniisuumaaliha ohikhanle yoowo ongwina esidade. 
Proverbs16:33 Eparakha emvonyeriwa mutakhwini, vaheera olakela onrweela wa Yave." 
Proverbs17:1 Yooreerela ti okhalano ekapatthi yooca vakhaani mmuretteleni ni mummaaleleyoni, ohikhanle mpaani siraayamo ifesta vamoha ni minyakunyaku sincipale." 
Proverbs17:2 Murumeiyi a miruku onoomulamula mwaana a mweettelo woowuuliha muru, ni onookhalano yoohiyeriwa ntoko mmoha a axunna." 
Proverbs17:3 Eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha* sinrehereriwa vayikho, vaheera ti Yave onoota mirima sa atthu." 
Proverbs17:4 Mutakhali ompwattha iyano soonanara; namootha oniiwelela nlumi noosareya sootakhala. 
Proverbs17:5 Yoowo onaatheya oohaawa onoonihera ohimoonelamo Mpattuxaawe; yoowo onghakalalela erisa khakhala oohittaruxiwa. 
Proverbs17:6 Osuulu ti ecireemba ya anamuuluvala, ni asitiithi ti wiittikha wa anamwanaaya." 
Proverbs17:7 Iyano soowiikuxerera khasinimukhalela nnene mulolo; wootepaxa iyano soowootha wa mulamuli. 
Proverbs17:8 Makhwankwa ti macitta wa yoole omvaha; aneeraawe aroweru sinoomweettela nnene. 
Proverbs17:9 Yoowo onkuttelela yootakhala onoonihera osivela, vaheera yoowo omphitela yeeyo onaamwaraxa asinthamwene ooreera." 
Proverbs17:10 Ohiiha omoha ti wooreerelaxa wa mutthu a iseru, opwaha mirepettho ncira wa mulolo." 
Proverbs17:11 Mutthu oonanara murima onaasaasa ovaanya paahi; tivawo mutokweene oohimorela ikharari aneeraawe arumiheliwe. 
Proverbs17:12 Fataari omphwanya ursu* mwa yoowo iiyeriwe axaana, ohikhanle mulolo moololonimwawe." 
Proverbs17:13 Yoowo onaakakhanyiha yooreera ni yoonanara, kheemalaru yoonanara vaatewawe." 
Proverbs17:14 Opacera munyakunyaku ori ntoko waaleya mutari; tivawo muulume mulattu owo ohinaaye munyakunyaku. 
Proverbs17:15 Omutapuxa mutakhali ti omuthoriha oororomeleya ni eyo ti itthu Yave onthanyaawe. 
Proverbs17:16 Enimvareleya eheeni mulolo ovarela musurukhu mmatatanimwawe, eenre owo ahitthunaka miruku?" 
Proverbs17:17 Nthamwene onsivela mweehuhuni sootheene; ti munna mweehuhuni yoorika. 
Proverbs17:18 Mutthu oohiseru oniiwanano omukhavihera mukhwaawe ni musurukhu, athatuwaka namaroromeliha a mukina oolinghe." 
Proverbs17:19 Yoowo onsivela waakhulana onsivela yoottheka; yoowo oniixoona onaasaasa ophwateyawawe. 
Proverbs17:20 Mutthu a murima woonanara khasimmweettela nnene, ni yoowo a nlumi noolokottha ommora moottiluni." 
Proverbs17:21 Mwaana mulolo onruuha othanana paahi; khoowowo ohakalala wa atithawe mulolo. 
Proverbs17:22 Murima woosareya ohakalala ti murette wa erutthu, vaheera okumi woohooxeya onuumiha makhuva." 
Proverbs17:23 Mutakhali onaakhulela makhwankwa wiiphiini weera ahapuxe ephiro ya ekhaikhai. 
Proverbs17:24 Mutthu a iseru onnoona miruku, vaheera maitho a mulolo anxoraxora mpaka ekotenle elapo." 
Proverbs17:25 Mwaana mulolo ti othanana wa atithawe ni owaawihereya wa yaale amuyanre. 
Proverbs17:26 Khoonreera omuttaruxa oohinthowa, hata ongwaxula ophwanenle ottittimiheya." 
Proverbs17:27 Yoowo onuurela masu ti musuweli, mutthu a miruku onkhala oomaaleleya." 
Proverbs17:28 Aamaalaka, mpaka mulolo onimooneliwa okhala musuweli ni alamula nluminawe, onimooneliwa okhala a iseru." 
Proverbs18:1 Mweetta meekha ontthara murimaawe paahi, ni owo onkhootta iseru sooreera." 
Proverbs18:2 Mulolo khanghaawelaru wiiwexexa, mene onghakalalela soowuupuwelasawe paahi." 
Proverbs18:3 Ohoonela onrwa vamoha ni sootakhala, ni overula onrwa vamoha ni wuuliha muru." 
Proverbs18:4 Masu a mutthu ti maahi oowiixera, vaheera naattuuttu a miruku ti nxaapwa ninsarasara." 
Proverbs18:5 Khoonreera waakhalela mpatta atakhali ngwiiyeraka oororomeleya ekhaikhaiyaaya. 
Proverbs18:6 Masu a mulolo antannyera ococopolana, ni otthekulawawe onlattula owaxuliwa." 
Proverbs18:7 Otthekula wa mulolo ti omorawawe, ni iyanosawe ti muraakho wa okumaawe." 
Proverbs18:8 Masu a nawunawu ari ntoko icikwaasula sooreeraxa; simphiya mpaka mpuwa mwa mutthu. 
Proverbs18:9 Yoowo onkhalela oreesi omutekoniwawe ti munna a yoole onnanariha. 
Proverbs18:10 Nsina na Yave ti Nipuro Noolipaxa nootthawelamo; oororomeleya antthimakela weiwo, enakhala oolipeene." 
Proverbs18:11 Esidade yoolipihiwa ti mihakhu sa apuhi, awosa anuupuwela weera ti exiri ehingwereya owela." 
Proverbs18:12 Ehinaaye omora murima wa mutthu onimwiihelanamo, vaheera nttittimiho nintthara wiiyeviha." 
Proverbs18:13 Yoowo onaakhula ahinaaye wiiwa ompaka soololo, uulihiheyaka muru." 
Proverbs18:14 Munepa wa mutthu onkhavihera murettani, vaheera taani anaavilele munepa woottikittheya?" 
Proverbs18:15 Murima wa yoowo orino iseru omphwanya esuwelo; maaru a asuweli annaasa yeeyo. 
Proverbs18:16 Yoovaha enimuhelela ephiro yoole omvaha ni enimurongha vamaithoni wa asitokweene. 
Proverbs18:17 Ompacera woonihera mulattwaawe onkhala ntoko khanono nthowa, mpaka aneeraawe awe mukina, amukohakohaka." 
Proverbs18:18 Waasaasera mookohakohani ommaliha minyakunyaku ni onlakela mulattu eriyari ya oowera. 
Proverbs18:19 Ti woorika ongwina munna ooveihiwa opwaha okuxa esidade yoolipihiwa, ni minyakunyaku sinkhala ntoko masele ookokotteliwa esidade." 
Proverbs18:20 Mutthu onsariha nipwiipwi ni yoowiima ya eyanowaawe; ni sinimuhakalaliha soopaka sa eyano. 
Proverbs18:21 Nlumi nrino ikuru soolamulelano okumi ni okhwa; yaawo onaasivela ovarela muteko animooca yoowiima ya eyanowaaya. 
Proverbs18:22 Yoowo onthela omphwanya etthu yooreera; ohaakhela mareeliho a Yave. 
Proverbs18:23 Oohaawa ondyoonttelela ikharari, vaheera namapuha onaakhula ni oxilili." 
Proverbs18:24 Yoowo orino asinthamwene ancipale enoowereya omalela woophwatiwani, vaheera ookhalatho nthamwene a vamurimani waapwaha axunna." 
Proverbs19:1 Fataari oohaawa onkhala moororomeleyani ohikhanle mulolo onuuluma moota woonanara. 
Proverbs19:2 Khoonreera okhalela nthiti ohikhalanne miruku, hata ocereenga ni oyeleela ephiro." 
Proverbs19:3 Ti ololo wa mutthu onghela nthala okumaawe, vaheera murimaawe onimunyoonyeriwa Yave." 
Proverbs19:4 Muhakhu onaaruuha asinthamwene ancipale, vaheera mpaka nthamwene a oohaawa onoomuhiya." 
Proverbs19:5 Namoona oowootha khakhala oohittaruxiwa, ni yoole ommwaramwaraxa soowootha khavenya ootapuxeyeene." 
Proverbs19:6 Ancipale ammweepesa mulamuli, ni ootheene ti asinthamwene a yaale amvaha soovaha." 
Proverbs19:7 Oohaawa khanooneliwamo ni amusaawe ootheene, wootepaxa ni asinthamwenaawe! Naari owo awaasaka weera aavekele ekhavihero, khanaaphwanyaru." 
Proverbs19:8 Yoowo orino miruku onniisivela; yoowo onoonelamo wiiwexexa sinoomweettela nnene. 
Proverbs19:9 Namoona oowootha khakhala woohittaruxiwa, ni yoole ommwaramwara soowootha onooriheya." 
Proverbs19:10 Khoonreerela mulolo okhala mmihakhuni; wootepaxa murumeiyi aalamulaka anamwane asilopwana a mwene! 
Proverbs19:11 Miruku sa mutthu sinimvaha ovilela; ovuwawawe ti ohipwatthela oveihiwa. 
Proverbs19:12 Isara sa mwene siri ntoko murika wa mwatto, vaheera onnenaawe ori ntoko nikame mmalaxini." 
Proverbs19:13 Mwaana mulolo ti oheleya nthala wa atithawe, ni mwaara ooxupa ti ottonya wa maahi oohihiyerera." 
Proverbs19:14 Impa ni mihakhu sinaakheliwa wa asitiithi, vaheera mwaara orino miruku onrweela wa Yave." 
Proverbs19:15 Oreesi onruuhela okonaxa, ni nooreesi omvoliwa etala." 
Proverbs19:16 Yoowo oniiwelela malamulo onuurela okumaawe, vaheera yoowo ohinoonelamo iphirosawe onimookhwa." 
Proverbs19:17 Yoowo onaapwattha oohaawa ommooliha Yave, ni Owo onoomutthuvela." 
Proverbs19:18 Munlake mwaninyu, niwoko mwa yeeyo wookhala oweherera; muhihaawele okhwawawe." 
Proverbs19:19 Mutthu oosareya isara ontthuneya omuttaruxa, nyuwo mwamuurela, ontthuneya omuurelatho." 
Proverbs19:20 Mwiiwe ikano ni mwaakhulele oxuttihiwa, ni munookhala musuweli." 
Proverbs19:21 Vamurimani wa mutthu sookhala soovaanela sincipale, vaheera ompwaherera ti olakawawe Yave." 
Proverbs19:22 Enghaaweleya wooneya muntthuni ti osivela woororomeleya; fataari okhala oohaawa ohikhanle namootha. 
Proverbs19:23 Omoova Yave onrongha wookumini: Yoowo ommoova onoowera wiitthuuwa mmuretteleni, ahikhalanaka milattu." 
Proverbs19:24 Nooreesi onghela ntata nsasaanini, ni khangwera orongha owanoni!" 
Proverbs19:25 Mungwaxule namatthebwa, ni oohisuwela anooxuttera miruku; munghiihe naseru, ni owo onookhalano esuwelo." 
Proverbs19:26 Mwaana ongwiiya atithawe anawoomola amayawe ti namatannyera wuuliha muru ni overuleya. 
Proverbs19:27 Nyuwo mwahiyerera wiiwa mahusiho, mwanaka, munimwiirakameliha masu amvaha esuwelo." 
Proverbs19:28 Namoona oowootha ontthebwa ekhaikhai, ni eyano ya atakhali emmira sootakhala." 
Proverbs19:29 Mattaruxo aareherereliwa anamatthebwa, ni ikwamba soowaxuleliwa alolo." 
Proverbs20:1 Eviinyu enimutatuxa mutthu oowiikuxerera; soowura soohapala sinimutannyera onyakulihana; oniixinnyerera mwa seiyo khakhala musuweli. 
Proverbs20:2 Isara sa mwene sinlikana ni murika wa mwatto; yoowo onimutannya onleva okumaawe. 
Proverbs20:3 Ti nttittimiho nimmaliha minyakunyaku, vaheera alolo ootheene amvarexexa seiyo." 
Proverbs20:4 Nooreesi khanlima mweehuhuni ya olima; vano mweehuhuni ya ohepha onimwaasaasa, mene khamphwanyaru etthu." 
Proverbs20:5 Soowuupuwela sa mutthu siri ntoko mmaahini moowiixa, vaheera mutthu orino iseru sooreerela onoowera orikawo." 
Proverbs20:6 Ancipale aniixeerela asinthamwene oopwaneya, vaheera taani anaawere omphwanya mutthu oororomeleya?" 
Proverbs20:7 Mutthu oororomeleya onkhalano okumi woororomeleya; oorelihiwa anamwanaawe! 
Proverbs20:8 Mwene aakilaathelaka ehice ya wuuluma milattu, omveera ni maithwaawe soonanara sootheene." 
Proverbs20:9 Taani aneere: “Koorapiha murima; kootaphuwa mwa yootthekaaka?” 
Proverbs20:10 Ovarela muteko miphimo ni miringo soolokottha ti itthu Yave onthanyaawe. 
Proverbs20:11 Mpaka mwaana onsuweliwa ni ipakelosawe – mweettelowaawe onimoonihera owo akhala oowookoleleya ni oororomeleya. 
Proverbs20:12 Maaru aniiwa ni maitho anoona apakiwe ni Yave. 
Proverbs20:13 Muhisivele ikhove, niwoko mwasivela munoohaawa; mvenye mukhoveni ni munookhalano yooca mpaka ohala." 
Proverbs20:14 “Muhirikihe! Muhirikihe!” oneera namathuma, vaheera aapwahaka, oniittikhano yeeyo othummaawe." 
Proverbs20:15 Yookhala eyuuma yoorikaxa ni rubi* sincipale, mene iyano singhimahima esuwelo ti soothowathowa." 
Proverbs20:16 Mukuxe mukaandyo wa yoowo onimukhavihera namarwa oolinge, ni muthokorore yoowo, owo akhala namaroromeliha a muthiyana mmalapo." 
Proverbs20:17 Yooca yoowiiyiwa enkhala ntoko yoosiva, vaheera vahoolowaya emmalela ntoko muhaava mmwaano." 
Proverbs20:18 Soolaka ti sootthuneya wa yoole ontthuna opaka soovaanela, ni yoowo onrowa okhottoni ontthuneya oleeliheriwa." 
Proverbs20:19 Nawunawu oneetteetta athupululaka ixiiri; tivawo munsembe yoowo onuulumaxa. 
Proverbs20:20 Yoowo onaalapha atithawe ni amayawe onookhwela mpiphini mooriipihana. 
Proverbs20:21 Yoohiyeriwa emphwanyiwa woowaakuveya ompacereroni, ommaleloni kheereelihiwa." 
Proverbs20:22 Muheere: “Miyo kinoomuliviha mwa yoonanara okipankaawe!” Mungweherere Yave, ni Owo onimoowinihani." 
Proverbs20:23 Yave onthanya miringo soohikwanakwana, ni miphimo soolokottha khasinimusiveliha." 
Proverbs20:24 Malipa a mutthu anghooleliwa ni Yave. Anaawere hai mukina wiiwexexa ephirowaawe? 
Proverbs20:25 Ti muraakho otteelihera etthu woowaakuveya, ni otthokelela paahi vahoolo wa ororomeliha." 
Proverbs20:26 Mwene musuweli onaasusiha atakhali, ni onaaphita ni nreko nooveerelano." 
Proverbs20:27 Munepa wa mutthu ori ntoko yoomwaleela Yave omvarelaawe muteko weera etholatholeke khula mpatta wa okhalawawe mutthu. 
Proverbs20:28 Onnene ni ororomeleya onnamukhapelela mwene, moonnenenimwawe onnalipihera ehicaawe ya emwene." 
Proverbs20:29 Ophwaneliwa wa amiravo ori mukurunimwaya; ovuwa wa mamookwaaxa ori mupwinimwaya. 
Proverbs20:30 Omanakasiwa ni ovulalasa simmaliha yoonanara; owaxulasiwa ontteeliha moowiixera mwa okhalawawe. 
Proverbs21:1 Murima wa mwene onlikana ni mooloko ongwehawehiwa ni Yave; owo onimuhoolela weiwo ontthunaawewo. 
Proverbs21:2 Iphiro sootheene sa mutthu sinimukhalela ntoko sa ekhaikhai, vaheera Yave omphima murima." 
Proverbs21:3 Opaka ya ekhaikhai ni ya ettiitthu ti yoowaakhuleleya wa Yave opwaha opaka sooveleela. 
Proverbs21:4 Okumi wa yoottheka ya atakhali onooneya mmaweheroni moota woowiixoona ni mmurimani woowiikuxa. 
Proverbs21:5 Soovaanela sa ananthiti sinooruweriha; vaheera soovaanela sa mvai simmalela moosiwani. 
Proverbs21:6 Mihakhu simphwanyiwa ngwoothani ti itthu simvira sipurulelaka wookhwaani. 
Proverbs21:7 Nipuhero na atakhali nimmwaapurula, niwoko ankhootta opaka yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai." 
Proverbs21:8 Ephiro ya nanthowa ti yookhoromana, vaheera mweettelo wa oohinthowa ti woowookowa." 
Proverbs21:9 Okona vanloothoni na etarato ti wooreera opwaha okhala vamoha ni muthiyana ooxupa. 
Proverbs21:10 Yoohaawela ya namariheya ti opaka yoonanara; khanimmorela ikharari mukhwaawe. 
Proverbs21:11 Namatthebwa aattaruxiwaka, oohisuwela omphwanya miruku; musuweli aaxuttihiwaka, omphwanya esuwelo." 
Proverbs21:12 Oororomeleya ongweha empa ya atakhali; owo onaamoroxela atakhali mmathalani. 
Proverbs21:13 Yoowo onttiyela maaru mookhuwelani mwa oohaawa, vano aakhuwelaka khaakhuliwatho." 
Proverbs21:14 Ovaha muxiirini onkurunuxa isara, ni makhwankwa amvahiwa wiiphiini ammaliha onyoonyaxiwa." 
Proverbs21:15 Yaapakiwaka ekhaikhai, oororomeleya onoohakalala, vaheera atakhali anootteenguwa." 
Proverbs21:16 Yoowo onghapuwa mphironi mwa iseru onoophiyera munthukumanoni mwa anamakhwa. 
Proverbs21:17 Yoowo omvarexexa soohaawela onoothoiwa; yoowo omvarexexa eviinyu ni soowunkheliha khakhalaru thadyiri. 
Proverbs21:18 Mutakhali onthatuwa moopolelo wa oororomeleya, ni oohiroromeleya wa mutthu ookwanela." 
Proverbs21:19 Fataari okhala munikareni ohikhanle okhala ni muthiyana ooxupa ni oowaakuva onyoonyiwa. 
Proverbs21:20 Vaate wa musuweli yookhala yooca ni makhura soothokororiwasene, vaheera mulolo onnanariha sootheene oraaweno." 
Proverbs21:21 Yoowo onaasa ekhaikhai ni ororomeleya omphwanya okumi, ekhaikhai ni ottittimiheya." 
Proverbs21:22 Namiriku ongwina esidade ya aweri ni omphwata esidade yoolipihiwa anroromelaayawo. 
Proverbs21:23 Yoowo onuurela eyanowaawe ni nluminawe onsemba ohaawaxa. 
Proverbs21:24 Oowixoona ni oowiikuxa oniitthaniwa namatthebwa; owo ontepa waapakela akina moota woowaaronyihela. 
Proverbs21:25 Nooreesi onkhwa niwoko na ohaawelaxa ni na ohitoko ovara muteko. 
Proverbs21:26 Mahuku ootheene owo onnahaawelaxa, oororomeleya eeraka ovakulela." 
Proverbs21:27 Sooveleela sa atakhali ti soothanyeya; wootepaxa saaveleeliwaka ni muupuwelo woonanara. 
Proverbs21:28 Namoona oowootha onooriheya, vaheera namoona a ekhaikhai onoopwaherera wuuluma." 
Proverbs21:29 Mutakhali onooneya mukhoveni wiixoonawawe, vaheera oororomeleya onkuxera ephirowaawe ni iseru." 
Proverbs21:30 Khasiwoworu miruku, hata iseru, naari yoovaanela singwera omvaanya Yave." 
Proverbs21:31 Ekavalu* enreherereliwa nihuku na ekhotto, vaheera owina onrweela wa Yave." 
Proverbs22:1 Fataari okhalano mweettelo wooreera ohikhanle okhalano mihakhu sincipale; ottittimiheya ni atthu akina ti wooreera opwaha eyuuma yoorikaxa hoye hoye eparatha*. 
Proverbs22:2 Namapuha ni namahaawa ooweeli awo arino etthu emohamoharu ela: Ooweeli apattuxiwe ni Yave. 
Proverbs22:3 Namiruku onsuwela yoowoopiha, anaasaasa wootthawelawo; oohisuwela ampwaherera, enavolowa mmahooxoni." 
Proverbs22:4 Wiiyeviha ni omoova Yave onruuha mihakhu, nttittimiho ni okumi." 
Proverbs22:5 Mphironi mwa mutakhali sookhalamo nyiiwa ni miraakho; yoowo ontthuna waakiha okumaawe onimwiirakameliha wa seiyo. 
Proverbs22:6 Munxuttihe mwaana ephiro entthuneya okuxera, ni hata uuluvalaka, khahapuwaru." 
Proverbs22:7 Namapuha onimulamula namahaawa; yoowo onkopa ti epottha ya namakopiha. 
Proverbs22:8 Yoowo onaala ohiroromeleya onghepha yoonanara; nttaruxo na wiixoonawawe nnookwanela. 
Proverbs22:9 Yoowo ori ookwanela onooreelihiwa niwoko onimmeela yoocaawe oohaawa. 
Proverbs22:10 Oomoliwaka namatthebwa, ococopolana onoomala; simmala minyakunyaku ni oruwana." 
Proverbs22:11 Yoowo onsivela murima wa ekhaikhai ni maswaawe ereene oosiveliha, onookhala nthamwene a mwene." 
Proverbs22:12 Maitho a Yave anthokorora esuwelo, vaheera Owo onooceeliha soovaanela sa oohiroromeleya." 
Proverbs22:13 Nooreesi oneera: “Ii! Ookhala mwatto vaate!” “Kakhumela vaate kinookhwela munseweni.” 
Proverbs22:14 Mutthekulelo wa muthiyana puuta ti nlitti noowiixera; yoowo aneeraawe amunyoonyeriwe Yave, onoomorelamo." 
Proverbs22:15 Ololo okumanyihiwe ni murima wa mwaana, vaheera ekopo ya olakano enoomutapuxa mwa yoowo." 
Proverbs22:16 Yoowo onimuhooxa oohaawa weera iipuhihe nitho yoowo onimvaha soovaha namapuha onoophiyera moohaawani. 
Proverbs22:17 Ngwiriyane ni mwiiwe masu a asuweli, ni muhele vamurimani oxuttihawaka." 
Proverbs22:18 Onoohakalaleya nyuwo mwathokorora vamurimani ni mwakhalana ootheene vanlumini. 
Proverbs22:19 Olelo kinimooxuttihani, aani wa nyuwo weera nyuwo munroromele Yave." 
Proverbs22:20 Kohoolepelani soolaka ni ikano," 
Proverbs22:21 kooxuttihakani masu oophwanela ororomela weera nyuwo mmwaakhule ni ekhaikhai yoowo oorumingheni. 
Proverbs22:22 Muhaahooxe oohaawa mwaha wa ohaawa, hata muhaahasule oothoiwa munuulummwa milattu," 
Proverbs22:23 niwoko Yave onookhala Namwaakihaaya, ni onimwaahuhula yaawo eneera yaahuhule." 
Proverbs22:24 Muhiithukumanyihe ni yoowo onkhala moowalini, hata muheette ni yoowo onaakuva onyoonyiwa" 
Proverbs22:25 weera muhitakihe mweettelo owo ni muhimorele munraakhoni mwa okhwa. 
Proverbs22:26 Muhikhale ntoko yaale anlipa mmatatani, eroromelihaka waakhavihera yaale yoolinghe." 
Proverbs22:27 Mwaahikhalanne moota woolivano, munimwaakhiwa ekaamaanyu mukonenleene." 
Proverbs22:28 Muhiceendye ineneero sa nyiinaano sa khalayi, mwa seiye saaheliwe ni makholowaanyu." 
Proverbs22:29 Nyuwo mummoona mulopwana a ettottho mmutekonimwawe? Onooweliheriwa muteko wa emwene; khaavarela muteko atthu oohisuwanyeya. 
Proverbs23:1 Nyuwo mwaakilaathiki weera muce ni mutokweene, ngwehexexe yeeyo eri ohoolowanyu paahi," 
Proverbs23:2 vano mwavolaxiwa mutheteerele mwaalo vammilo. 
Proverbs23:3 Muhihaawele sooca sooreerela onoovahaaweni, niwoko iyo okhalaka soolokottha." 
Proverbs23:4 Muhimalihe ikurusanyu mweerelaka okhala thadyiri; mukhaleno iseru soowiixumaaliherano! 
Proverbs23:5 Mihakhu sinoolakaseya hiiho nyuwo munoonaanyu; iyo sinkhalano mapupha ni simvavela osulu ntoko xaaka. 
Proverbs23:6 Muhaakhulele yooca ya muletto namilili, hata muhaakhulele sooca sooreerela onoovahaaweni," 
Proverbs23:7 niwoko owo onuupuwela paahi mutteengo wa seiyo. Owo ongweerelani: “Muceeke ni ngwureke!” Vaheera khanuuluma mweekhaikhaiyini. 
Proverbs23:8 Nyuwo munoorapheya yeeyo muciiyaanyu, ni munoonanariha maswaanyu oosiveleya." 
Proverbs23:9 Muulume ni mulolo, niwoko onoonyoosa miruku sa maswaanyu." 
Proverbs23:10 Muhiceendye ineneero sa nyiinaano sa khalayi, hata muhivoleele ittima sa akwaasuni," 
Proverbs23:11 niwoko Yoowo onaakiha soophwanelasaya ti oolipa, Owo onimoowananani weera aakihe soophwanela sa akwaasuni." 
Proverbs23:12 Mulake murimaanyu weera oxuttihiwe, ni maaruwaanyu weera yiiwe masu a esuwelo." 
Proverbs23:13 Muhoovelele omulaka mwaana; nyuwo mwamuttaruxa ni ekopo, owo khakhwa." 
Proverbs23:14 Munttaruxe nyeenyuweene ni ekopo, ni hiiho munoomutapuxa mookhwaani." 
Proverbs23:15 Mwanaka, murimaawo wakhalano miruku, murimaaka onoohakalala." 
Proverbs23:16 Kinoohakalala iyanosawo suuluma ngwookoleleyani. 
Proverbs23:17 Ohaakhalele nrima anamattheka, mene omoove Yave mahuku ootheene." 
Proverbs23:18 Wapaka hiiho, vekhaikhai sinooweettela nnenesene muhoolommo, ni owehererawawo khawooceeleya." 
Proverbs23:19 Mwanaka, wiiwe ni okhale musuweli; ohoolele murimaawo mphironi mooreera." 
Proverbs23:20 Ohiitakanse ni anamuhapaliwa, naari anamaca," 
Proverbs23:21 niwoko anamuhapaliwa ni anamaca ammalela moosiwani; ni oreesaaya onimwaawariha mattapwatta. 
Proverbs23:22 Ngwiiwe atithinyu yooyanreni; muhaanyoose amayinyu yuuluvalaka. 
Proverbs23:23 Mphwanye ekhaikhai ni muhithumihe; mphwanyetho esuwelo, olakiwa ni miruku." 
Proverbs23:24 Tiithi a oororomeleya onootthapa ni ohakalala; yoowo orino mwaana musuweli onoomuhakalalela. 
Proverbs23:25 Atithinyu ni amayinyu ehakalaleke; amayinyu yooyanreni etteeliweke murima. 
Proverbs23:26 Mwanaka, okivahe murimaawo; maithwaawo ewehexexe iphirosaka," 
Proverbs23:27 niwoko puuta ti nlitti noowiixera ni muthiyana namararuwa ti ehime yoophureya. 
Proverbs23:28 Owo ongwiipithela ntoko anamahuhula, ni ompakiha weera asilopwana ancipale ekhale oohiroromeleya." 
Proverbs23:29 Taani aniithananihera? Taani ariipiwe murima? Taani aniikhupanyera? Taani avulanle makhwatta oohitthuneya? Taani yaaxeenre maitho? 
Proverbs23:30 Ti yaale aniihiya epuruliwaka ni eviinyu, anaasaasa woohihiyerera othitela soowura soohapala." 
Proverbs23:31 Muhiihiyerere mulokotthiwaka ni eviinyu exeenreene, eceremelaka mukoomixini ni engwuriwa esivaxaka." 
Proverbs23:32 Ommaleloni, eyo enluma ntoko enowa ni enghapala ntoko evili." 
Proverbs23:33 Maithwaanyu animoona itthu soohisuwanyeya, ni mpuwamwanyu munimuupuwela itthu soohookoleleya." 
Proverbs23:34 Nyuwo mmwilikaneno mutthu onkona eriyari ephareiya, aani ntoko mutthu oniixaatalela osulu wa mwiri mutokweene wa nikula ntokotoko." 
Proverbs23:35 Ni munimweera: “Aakuuputtha, mene nkoonne ovoreya! Aakimana, mene nkaasuwenle weera koomaniwa! Nkivenye yaakhani mukhoveni weera kiwuretho?”" 
Proverbs24:1 Muhaakhalele nrima atakhali, naari muhihaawele oweettano," 
Proverbs24:2 niwoko vamurimaniwaya amvaanela ophwata, ni anuuluma paahi sa nipuhero." 
Proverbs24:3 Empa entekiwa ni miruku, ni enlipihiwa ni iseru." 
Proverbs24:4 Mweesuweloni ikwaartusaya sinsareya ni itthu siri sooreeraxa ni soosiva. 
Proverbs24:5 Mutthu oosuwela ti ooweraxa, ni yoowo orino esuwelo onaandyeerera ikurusawe." 
Proverbs24:6 Yoowo onrowa okhottoni ontthuneya oxuttihiwa, ni yaattiyeene anamalaka, onoowera owina." 
Proverbs24:7 Miruku sinimulemelelaxa mulolo; owo khansuwela wuuluma mmuthukumanoni. 
Proverbs24:8 Yoowo omvaanelela anaasuweliwe ntoko namatannyera minyakunyaku. 
Proverbs24:9 Soovaanela sa mulolo ti yoottheka, ni namatthebwa onthanyiwa ni atthu." 
Proverbs24:10 Mwahovela munihukuni na makacamiho, ikurusanyu sinooporora." 
Proverbs24:11 Mwaatapuxe anronghiwa owiiviwani; mwaakhavihere yaale aneetta ethukumelaka woorowa wookhwaani. 
Proverbs24:12 Naari nyuwo mweeraka: “Khanaasuwela yeereya!” Yoowo omphima mirima oosuwela. Yoowo onuurela okumaanyu oosuwela. Owo onoomutthuvela khula mutthu, attharihaka soopakasawe." 
Proverbs24:13 Oce oravo mwanaka. Ti wooreera. Macerephe ti oocoocowa vanlumini. 
Proverbs24:14 Musuwele weera mirukutho sinooreera wa okumaanyu; nyuwo mwaphwanya, vekhaikhai munookhalano ya muhoolo." 
Proverbs24:15 Muhiipithe ntoko ompakelaawe mutakhali empa ya oororomeleya, ni muhihuhule nipuronanyu noowiitthuuwa," 
Proverbs24:16 niwoko naari oororomeleya amoraka imaara ithannapiili, onimweemelatho, vaheera atakhali ampuruliwa ni ehasara." 
Proverbs24:17 Muhihakalale aamoraka mwiittanaanyu, naari murimaanyu ohitteeliwe owo aakwakwathuwaka," 
Proverbs24:18 weera Yave ahoone yeeyo ni, ahihakalalaka, onoomurakameliha isara mwiittanaanyu." 
Proverbs24:19 Muhinyoonyiwe niwoko na oonanara murima, naari muhaakhalele nrima atakhali," 
Proverbs24:20 niwoko kheewowo ya muhoolo wa oonanara murima, ni yoomwaleela ya atakhali enoocipha." 
Proverbs24:21 Mwanaka, omoove Yave nitho mwene, ni ohiitakanse ni anamawanawana," 
Proverbs24:22 niwoko anoophwatiwa wootutuxereya, ni taani onsuwela moota wa ophwata Yave ni mwene ongweraawe otannyera?" 
Proverbs24:23 Alatho ti masu makina a anamiruku: Khoonreera opaka nthalu munuulummwa milattu. 
Proverbs24:24 Yoowo anaamweerele mutakhali: “Nyuwo ti oohinthowa,” onoolamphwa ni miloko, ni onoohaawa ohooneliwa mulaponi." 
Proverbs24:25 Vaheera yaawo animuthoriha nanthowa anookhalano okumi woosiveleya; animwaakhela mareeliho matokotoko. 
Proverbs24:26 Yoowaakhula ya ekhaikhai eri ntoko ebeecu owanoni. 
Proverbs24:27 Mmalihe toko mutekwaanyu vanlakani; mulikanyihe emattanyu, vahoolowaya muteke empaanyu." 
Proverbs24:28 Muhimoothere mukhwiinyu woohinthowa, naari muhivarele muteko iyanosanyu weera mulokotthe." 
Proverbs24:29 Muheere: “Kinoompakela yeeyo okipakenlaawe; owo onoolivela yeeyo opankaawe. 
Proverbs24:30 Koovira mmatta mwa nooreesi, mmatta mwa iwuuva* mwa mutthu oohimiruku;" 
Proverbs24:31 saari nyiiwaru mipatta sootheene, etthaya yaasareya malaxi ni exiri ya maluku yaaphwateya." 
Proverbs24:32 Kaawehexexa, kinuupuwela; kaaweha, kinaxuttera nihusiho nna:" 
Proverbs24:33 Oxuukona vakhaani; oxiwuuseela; oxiwiikhuraana wiitthuuwaka," 
Proverbs24:34 ni hiiho ohaawa onimoorweelani ntoko namwiiya, ni osiwaanyu ntoko nakhotto." 
Proverbs25:1 Ala ti masu a miruku sikina sa Salomoni, silempwale ni arumeiyi a Hizekiya, mwene a oYuda." 
Proverbs25:2 Ti ovuwa wa Yave wiipithiha itthu, weerera woonelela itthu ti ovuwa wa mamwene." 
Proverbs25:3 Mooteene yoowo erimu eraaya osuluxa ni etthaya yiixenraaya, murima wa mamwenetho khoonghotteleya." 
Proverbs25:4 Saavenxiwaka soohalahala sa eparatha*, seiyo singhala ti wa namahana;" 
Proverbs25:5 atakhali yaavenxiwaka vamaithoni wa mwene ni ehicaawe ya emwene enoolipihiwa mweekhaikhaiyini. 
Proverbs25:6 Muhiixunnuwihe vamaithoni wa mwene, ni muheerere okilaathi mmapuroni mwa atthu oottittimiheya." 
Proverbs25:7 Fataari weereliwa ni mwene: “Murwe va!” ohikhanle oyevihiwa ohoolo wa mutokweene. Yeeyo moonnaanyu ni maithwaanyu 
Proverbs25:8 muhitthimakihere omulattuni, niwoko mmwipakeni aahiwaakhulelani mukhwiinyu?" 
Proverbs25:9 Mwaasaase wuuluma mulattwaanyu ni mukhwiinyu, ni muhithupulule exiiri ya mukina," 
Proverbs25:10 ohiyanawaya, yoowo aniiwe onoowuulihihani muru, ni nyuwo munimooceela ophwanyatho epilaanyu." 
Proverbs25:11 Masu yuulummwale mweehuhuni yootthuneya ari ntoko soowiima sa eyuuma yoorikaxa siheliweene mparathani yoohaniwa. 
Proverbs25:12 Ohiiha onrweela mmirukuni wa yoowo onkhala oolikaneene wiiwa ori ntoko xiveeve a eyuuma yoorikaxa hoye hoye yoophwaneliha yooreeraxa. 
Proverbs25:13 Namutthenga oororomeleya ori ntoko oriirela wa etthapwe mweehuhuni ya ohepha wa yaale animurumiha. Owo onaandyeera otteeliwa murima wa asipwiiyaawe. 
Proverbs25:14 Yoole oniikuxererano soovaha ohivanghaawe ori ntoko mahutte ni epheyo ehikhalanaka epula. 
Proverbs25:15 Moowehererani ni ovilela onoowereya omviriyela mutokweene, ni wuuluma moota woosiva onoowera opwexa makhuva." 
Proverbs25:16 Nyuwo mwaphwanya oravo, muhicaaxeke, weera muheettiwe murima murapheyaka." 
Proverbs25:17 Muhixekuraxeke vaate wa mwaattamanaanyu weera owo ahookhulumuweni, oothanyakani." 
Proverbs25:18 Ntoko mwaakopo, ekatana hoye hoye muupa woowiitha ti yoole onimukhalela namoona oowootha mukhwaawe." 
Proverbs25:19 Omuroromela oowiixeera mweehuhuni ya makacamiho ori ntoko niino nooposowa hoye hoye nnaawo noorakala. 
Proverbs25:20 Yoowo ommwiipela mutthu ni murima woothanana ori ntoko orula yoowaraawe vanihukuni nooriira, hoye hoye waamela eviinyu yoonyuunya vanikhwattani." 
Proverbs25:21 Mwiittanaanyu avoliwa etala, mumvahe yooca; avoliwa ntthona mumvahe yoowura." 
Proverbs25:22 Mwapaka yeeyo, munoomuukelela makhala a mooro mmurumwawe, ni Yave onimootthuvelani." 
Proverbs25:23 Mooteene yoowo epheyo enrweela ottuttuwani enruuhaaya epula, hiihotho nlumi noowootha ninruuha oweha woosareya isara." 
Proverbs25:24 Fataari okhala vanloothoni na etarato, ohikhanle okhala ni muthiyana ooxupa." 
Proverbs25:25 Ntoko maahi ooriira wammilo woowuuma ti mutthenga wooreera onrweela elapo yoorakamela. 
Proverbs25:26 Ntoko ephattuwela yoosareya ittoko hoye hoye naattuuttu a maahi oonanara, hiihotho ti oororomeleya onimpororiha mutakhali." 
Proverbs25:27 Ocaaxa oravo khoonreera, naari khoonttittimiheya waasaasa nttittimihonanyu muneenaanyu." 
Proverbs25:28 Ntoko esidade erino ixiri sookurumuwa, ti mutthu ohingwera wiilamula." 
Proverbs26:1 Ntoko etthapwe mweelimweni hoye hoye epula mweehuhuni ya ohepha, hiihotho nttittimiho khanimukhalela mulolo." 
Proverbs26:2 Ntoko cirikhu omvava atthawaka, ni meenkesa omvavaxa, hiihotho nlapho noohiphwanela khaniitthuuwa." 
Proverbs26:3 Ekwamba ti wa ekavalu*, eneettiheriwa ti wa buuru ni ekopo wa mmakhatani a mulolo." 
Proverbs26:4 Muhimwaakhule mulolo moota woololo, mwapaka hiiho, nyuwo munoolikana ni yoowo." 
Proverbs26:5 Mmwaakhule mulolo ntoko omphwanelaaya ololowaawe, ohiyanawaya, owo anuupuwele weera ti musuweli." 
Proverbs26:6 Ntoko okwitula nnaawonanyu hoye hoye owura yoohapala ti orumiha mutthenga mmatatani mwa mulolo. 
Proverbs26:7 Ntoko antthukaaya oohivareleya muteko imetto sa ootuthunya, hiiho ti masu a miruku mmwaano mwa mulolo." 
Proverbs26:8 Ntoko otthukelela nluku mukwambani, ti omuttittimiha mulolo." 
Proverbs26:9 Ntoko ephandi ya nyiiwa mmatatani mwa namawura, ti masu a miruku mmwaano mwa mulolo." 
Proverbs26:10 Ntoko namuupa onaasa olatha ti omvariha muteko mulolo hoye hoye akhalaru mutthu omvira. 
Proverbs26:11 Ntoko mwalapwa onghokoleelaawe marapheyowaawe, ti mulolo onghokoleelaawe ololowaawe." 
Proverbs26:12 Nyuwo mummoona mukina oniihelano onamiruku? Mulolo ookhalano oweherera ompwaha yoowo. 
Proverbs26:13 Nooreesi oneera: “Ookhala mwatto mphironi, mwaatto ooluwaxa oniipa mmiseweni.”" 
Proverbs26:14 Ntoko nsele nniinainaaya nitthukeleliwaayawo, hiihotho nooreesi onrukunuwasaawe onkonaawewo." 
Proverbs26:15 Nooreesi onghela ntata musasaanini, vaheera onimurikelaxa ohokoloxera mmwaano." 
Proverbs26:16 Nooreesi oniihelana okhalaxa musuweli waapwaha asilopwana athanneeli anaakhula ni iseru. 
Proverbs26:17 Ntoko mukina omvara maaru a akhalaru mwalapwa, ti mutthu omvolowa moonyakulihanani ohimwaattamme." 
Proverbs26:18 Ntoko naanepa omvonya makhala a mooro ni nyuupa soowiiva," 
Proverbs26:19 ti mutthu onimulokottha mukhwaawe anamweerela: “Miyo kaamweera otheela paahi.” 
Proverbs26:20 Saahikhala ikhuuni, mooro onoocipha; aahikhala nawunawu ommala onyakulihana." 
Proverbs26:21 Makhala ti oopattihera, ni ikhuuni wa vayikho ni hiihotho nawunawu ti ootannya minyakunyaku." 
Proverbs26:22 Masu a nawunawu ari ntoko icikwaasula sooreeraxa; simphiya mpaka mpuwa mwa mutthu. 
Proverbs26:23 Ntoko yooningano ereene muyoopweni, iyano sinuuluma masu oosiva sinkhuwa murima woonanara." 
Proverbs26:24 Yoowo onthanya onkhuwa ni masu oosiva, vaheera vamurimaniwawe soosareya soolokottha." 
Proverbs26:25 Naari otthekulawawe oreene woowiisuumaaliha, muhimwaakhulele, niwoko itthu sa mwiikho ithannapiili sinsareya mmurimanimwawe." 
Proverbs26:26 Owo onoowera wiixeera ni wiipithiha othanyawawe, vaheera yoonanaraawe enimoonihereya mwaatthuni." 
Proverbs26:27 Yoowo onthipa elakasa, onoomorelamo; mukina ompirikixa nluku, nno nnoomphirikeela muneenaawe." 
Proverbs26:28 Nlumi noowootha nnaathanya yaawo nnaavulalihaaya ni eyano yoolokottha entannyera oheleya nthala 
Proverbs27:1 Muhiikuxerereno nihuku na omaalo, niwoko nyuwo khamusuwenle yeeyo ehuhu ya muhoolo eneeraaya eruuhele." 
Proverbs27:2 Akina yoottapaherekeni, ohikhale ni eyanowaanyu; aani atthu akina, ohikhanle nyeenyuweene." 
Proverbs27:3 Nluku ti noolemela, ni muhaava ti murindi, vaheera onyoonyiwa ontannyiwa ni mulolo ti woolemelaxa opwaha soopiili iyo." 
Proverbs27:4 Onyoonyiwa ti woowuuma murima, ni isara ti soophwata, vaheera taani ongwera ovilela nrima?" 
Proverbs27:5 Fataari ohiiha ompakiwa woohikhuwanyeya ohikhanle osivela woowiipithiheya. 
Proverbs27:6 Yoowo omvulaliha moosivelani onoonihera ekhaikhai, vaheera mwiittana onaandyeera ibeecu." 
Proverbs27:7 Yoowo ovonne khanoonelamo oravo, vaheera ovolingwe – mpaka yoowaawa enoomucoocowela." 
Proverbs27:8 Ntoko mwaapalame onxoraxora ottai wa epuuru, ti mulopwana onxoraxora ottai wa etthokwaawe." 
Proverbs27:9 Yoowiixunkheliha ni erubani* singhakalaliha murima; soolaka sa ekhaikhai sa nthamwene sinkhaliha onthamwene wooreera. 
Proverbs27:10 Muhimuhiye nthamwenaanyu naari nthamwene a atithinyu; muhirowe vaate wa munninyu munihukuni namakacamiho; fataari mwaattamanaanyuxa ohikhanle wa munna oorakamela. 
Proverbs27:11 Okhale musuweli mwanaka, ni ohakalalihe murimaaka; hiiho kinoowera omwaakhula yoowo onkinyoosa." 
Proverbs27:12 Namiruku onsuwela yoowoopiha anaasaasa wootthawelawo; oohisuwela onrowa ohoolo anakhala moohaawani. 
Proverbs27:13 Mukuxe mukaandyo wa yoowo onimukhavihera namarwa oolinge, ni muthokorore yoowo, owo akhala namakhavihera a muthiyana mmalapo." 
Proverbs27:14 Nreeliho nimvahiwa mookhuwelani oxeexeloxa nnaakheliwa ntoko nlapho. 
Proverbs27:15 Mwaara ooxupa onlikana ni mattonyo oohihiyerera vanihukuni na epula; 
Proverbs27:16 ommaaliha yoowo ori ntoko omaaliha epheyo hoye hoye orika makhura ni matata. 
Proverbs27:17 Ntoko eyuuma ennonaaya eyuuma, mutthu onimvoleiha mukhwaawe." 
Proverbs27:18 Yoowo onkosoopa mwiri wa ifiigu onimooca soowiimasaya, ni yoowo onimpakela nnene pwiiyaawe, onoopwatthiwa munttittimihoni." 
Proverbs27:19 Ntoko ekhove enooneyaaya mmaahini, murima onoonihera okhalawawe mutthu." 
Proverbs27:20 Okhwa ni ophwata khoomvona, ti hiihotho ahimvonaaya maitho a mutthu." 
Proverbs27:21 Eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha* sinrehereriwa vayikho, vaheera yeeyo onootaawe murima wa mutthu ti ottapaheriwawawe." 
Proverbs27:22 Naari nyuwo munxilaka mulolo ntoko etrigu muraweni, ololo khoomurakamelaru." 
Proverbs27:23 Mwiilipihere weera musuwele nnenesene moota siraaya ikhondoolosanyu, ngwehawehaka nnenesene muhuwaanyu," 
Proverbs27:24 niwoko mihakhu khasinkhala mahuku ootheene, ni kheewo enroromeliha weera ecireemba ya emwene epwaherere wa ikhapira sootheene." 
Proverbs27:25 Yaalimmwaka malaxi, enaphuwa makina ni malaxi a mmattumuxani yapheliwa," 
Proverbs27:26 iputtiputthi sinimoovahani yoowara ni anapunci animoowinihani mutteengo wa ematta. 
Proverbs27:27 Onoosareya mukaka wa epuri woowoocihani nyuwo ni emusaanyu mpakatho arumeiyaanyu asithiyana. 
Proverbs28:1 Mutakhali ontthawa naari ahitthareleliwaka, vaheera oororomeleya anlipiha murima ntoko mwatto." 
Proverbs28:2 Elapo yaakhalaka yoovaanya, enaakhalano ahooleli ancipale, vaheera muhooleli musuweli ni a miruku onimweettiha nnenesene elapo." 
Proverbs28:3 Namahaawa onthatuwa mpuhi anaahasula oohaawa, ori ntoko ettheku yootutuxereya emphwata soophatteiwa sootheene." 
Proverbs28:4 Yaawo anghiya nlamulo anaattapahera atakhali, vaheera aniiwelela nlamulo anaawanano yaawo." 
Proverbs28:5 Atthu oonanara murima khaaniiwexexa ekhaikhai, vaheera ammwaasa Yave anniiwexexa nnenesene." 
Proverbs28:6 Fataari namahaawa oneetta moota wookwanela ohikhanle namapuha mwa yoowo iphirosawe siri sootakhala. 
Proverbs28:7 Yoowo oniiwelela nlamulo ti mwaana a miruku, vaheera mukhwaaya anamaca ongwuulihiha muru atithawe." 
Proverbs28:8 Yoowo onaandyeerera mihakhusawe ni olivihaxa iphura, onimuthukumanyihera mukina, mwa yoowo anaakhale a nnene wa oohaawa." 
Proverbs28:9 Mukina akhootta wiiwa nlamulo, mpaka mavekelowaawe anoothanyeya." 
Proverbs28:10 Yoowo onimuhapuxera mutthu oowookoleleya mphironi yoonanara, onoomorela muneenaawe munraakhoni orengyaawe, vaheera yoowo ohiniihiyerera ahapuxiwaka, onookhalano ntthuvelo nooreera." 
Proverbs28:11 Namapuha oniixeerela musuweli, vaheera namahaawa orino iseru onoomphimaxa." 
Proverbs28:12 Oororomeleya yaawinaka, onoosareya weetteleya nnene, vaheera atakhali yaalamulaka, atthu animwiipithasa." 
Proverbs28:13 Yoowo oniipithiha sootthekasawe khasimweettela nnene, vaheera yoowo onlapa, anahiya omphwanya ikharari." 
Proverbs28:14 Ooreelihiwa mutthu onkhalela nthiti omoova Yave! Vaheera yoowo onuumiha murima onoomorela mwa soonanara. 
Proverbs28:15 Ntoko mwatto oniipa, ni ursu* ooluwaxa ti mutakhali onlamula muloko woothoiwa." 
Proverbs28:16 Mulamuli oohikhalano iseru onaandyeerera mahasu, vaheera yaawo anthanya ewinelo yoohiroromeleya anoopwaherera olamulawaya." 
Proverbs28:17 Namwiiva onghooxiwa ni nthowa onookhala namatthawatthawa mpaka okhwa; woohikhala oomukhavihera. 
Proverbs28:18 Yoowo oneetta mookwanelani onookhala oolipeene, vaheera yoowo oneetta moota wooriheya, onoomora wootutuxereya." 
Proverbs28:19 Yoowo onlima mmattamwawe, onooruwera, vaheera yoowo ontthara ethiru onoosareya osiwa." 
Proverbs28:20 Oororomeleya onooreelihaxiwa, vaheera yoowo ontthuna othadyiri woowaakuveya khakhala woohittaruxiwa." 
Proverbs28:21 Weetta nthalu khoonreera; mpaka wa yooca vakhaani mutthu onoopaka yoonanara. 
Proverbs28:22 Namilili onaakuvela mihakhu, ni khansuwela weera ohaawa onoongweherera." 
Proverbs28:23 Yoowo onimuhiiha mukhwaawe, ommaleloniwawe onoophwanyaxa murima wooreera, ompwahaxa yoole onttapahera moolokotthani." 
Proverbs28:24 Yoowo ongwiiya atithawe hoye hoye amayawe eeraka: “Nkitapannye,” ti nthamwene a yoole omphwata." 
Proverbs28:25 Namahaawelaxa ontannyera onyakulihana, vaheera yoowo onimuroromela Yave, sinoomweettela nnene." 
Proverbs28:26 Yoowo oniiroromela, ti mulolo, vaheera yoowo oneettela miruku khakhanle ngwoopihani." 
Proverbs28:27 Yoowo onaavaha oohaawa, khathoiwaru, vaheera yoowo omputiha weera ahiwoone, onoohaawa malapho mancipale." 
Proverbs28:28 Atakhali yaalamulaka, muloko onimwiipitha; vaheera awosa yaalakaseyaka, oororomeleya sinooweettela nnene." 
Proverbs29:1 Yoowo onnyeserera mootapanyani ahiihaxiweene, onoophwatiwa woohileeliwa ni woohimurette." 
Proverbs29:2 Oororomeleya yaawinaka, muloko onoohakalala; atakhali yaalamulaka muloko onimwiipulela." 
Proverbs29:3 Mutthu onsivela miruku onaahakalaliha atithawe, vaheera yoowo oneetta ni mapuuta, ommaliha mihakhusawe." 
Proverbs29:4 Mwene oneettiha ekhaikhai, onkhaliha mmaaleleyo elapwaawe, vaheera yoowo onsivela makhwankwa animurongha woophwatiwani." 
Proverbs29:5 Yoowo onimuttapahera mukhwaawe moolokotthani onimureela miraakho inaawosawe. 
Proverbs29:6 Yoottheka ya mutthu oonanara murima enimvara mmuraakhonimwawe, vaheera oororomeleya onoowera wiipa ni ohakalala." 
Proverbs29:7 Oororomeleya ampwattha soophwanela sa oohaawa, vaheera atakhali khaampwatthelaru yeeyo." 
Proverbs29:8 Anamatthebwa anghela mutekuteku esidade, vaheera asuweli anoomaliha." 
Proverbs29:9 Namiruku arowa onuulummwa milattu mwaha wa mulolo, khookhala murettele, niwoko mulolo onoonyoonyiwa amutthebweke." 
Proverbs29:10 Namapuhera onaathanya oororomeleya ni onaasaasa omwiiva mutthu ookwanela. 
Proverbs29:11 Mulolo oniittha isarasawe, vaheera namiruku onimwiilamula." 
Proverbs29:12 Mulamuli iiwelela soowootha, asitokweenaawe ootheene anookhala atakhali." 
Proverbs29:13 Namahaawa ni namahooxa ooweeli awo arino etthu emohamoharu ela: Yave ongwooniha ootheenaawo. 
Proverbs29:14 Mwene aathorihaka oohaawa ni ekhaikhai, ehicaawe ya emwene enoopwaherera yoolipeene." 
Proverbs29:15 Ekopo ya ohiiha emvaha miruku, vaheera mwaana oohipwatthiwa ongwuulihiha muru amayawe." 
Proverbs29:16 Atakhali saaweettelaka nnene, eneetteleyatho nnene yoottheka, vaheera oororomeleya animoona omorawaya seiyo." 
Proverbs29:17 Munlake mwaninyu, ni owo onimooruuhelani murettele; onooruuhelaxa sooreera okumaanyu." 
Proverbs29:18 Ohinoonihereyaayawo otthuna wa Muluku, muloko onoohapuwa; vaheera ooreelihiwa yoole oniiwelela Nlamulo!" 
Proverbs29:19 Epottha kheenxuttihiwa ni masu paahi, niwoko naari yiiwexexaka, kheempwatthela." 
Proverbs29:20 Nyuwo mummoona mukina onaakuva wuuluma? Mulolo ookhalano oweherera ompwaha yoowo. 
Proverbs29:21 Akhala mukina onramela epotthaawe ahilakaka okhuma emiravowaaya, ommaleloni onoothanana." 
Proverbs29:22 Mutthu oonyoonyiwa ontannyera ococopolana, ni mwaana oopuhera ompaka soottheka sincipale." 
Proverbs29:23 Wiixoona wa mutthu onoomuyeviha, vaheera oowiiyeviha onookhalano nttittimiho." 
Proverbs29:24 Nthamwene a namwiiya onimwiithanya; owo onnyesereriwa okhalela onamoona, mene khangwera opaka." 
Proverbs29:25 Yoowo ommoova mutthu ommorela mmuraakhoni, vaheera yoowo onimuroromela Yave ori oolipeene." 
Proverbs29:26 Ancipale ammweepesa mulamuli, vaheera ekhaikhai enrweela wa Yave." 
Proverbs29:27 Oororomeleya anaathanya oohiroromeleya, ni atakhali anaathanya ookwanela." 
Proverbs30:1 Miruku sa Aguri, mwaana mulopwana a Yaki. Owo aamulaleera Itiyeli; wa Itiyeli ni Ukali:" 
Proverbs30:2 Miyo ti muloloxa a atthu; nkinonoru mwiiwexexo wa mutthu. 
Proverbs30:3 Nkixuttenre miruku, naari nkimusuwenle Ootteela." 
Proverbs30:4 Taani owenle wiirimu anakhuruwa? Taani ophunte mmatatani ipheyo? Taani ohuruwenle maahi mmukaandyonimwawe? Taani okhalinghe nyiinano sa mulaponi? Nsinanawe taani ni na mwanawetho? Mukithalihere nyuwo mwaasuwenleene! 
Proverbs30:5 Khula nsu na Muluku vekhakhai ti nootteela. Owo ti Yoowiixaakihera wa yoowo onimutthawelela. 
Proverbs30:6 Muhaandyeerere maswaawe, ohiyanawaya, onimoohiihani awooniherakani weera nyuwo namootha." 
Proverbs30:7 Kimvekela itthu piili weera mukivahe kihinaaye okhwa: 
Proverbs30:8 Mukirakamelihere olokottha ni wootha; muhikivaheru ohaawa naari opuha; mukivahe paahi yooca yootthuneya. 
Proverbs30:9 Ohiyanawaya kakhalano soowaatta, kaamookhoottani ni kaamoohiyani keeraka: “Yave taani?” Kahaawa, kaamweera wiiya, kiveihaka hiiho Nsina na Mulukwaaka." 
Proverbs30:10 Muhimuulumele yoonanara murumeiyi ohoolo wa pwiiyaawe; ohiyanawaya onimoolaphani ni nyuwo munookhalano nthowa. 
Proverbs30:11 Aakhala anaalapha atithaya ni ahinaareeliha amayaya; 
Proverbs30:12 yaawo aniixoona otteela, ereene nlelo oohitteela;" 
Proverbs30:13 yaawo arino maitho oowiixoona, ewehaka moota woowiikuxerera;" 
Proverbs30:14 atthu mwa yaawo mainowaaya ari ikatana ni ananderaaya ti nyaalo weera yaanyaanye oothoiwa a mulaponimu ni oohaawa a omutthu. 
Proverbs30:15 Mututhi wookhalano anamwane asithiyana eeli. Awosa ankhuwela: “Mvahe! Mvahe!” Sookhala itthu tthaaru sihimvonaru; ixexe sihineeraru: “Wookwana!”: 
Proverbs30:16 Okhwa, mwali eekupa, etthaya ehinkwaneyaru maahi, ni mooro ohineeraru: “Wookwana!”" 
Proverbs30:17 Maitho a yoowo onaatthebwa atithawe, ni aatthebwaka, onkhootta owiiwelela amayawe, anoozooliwa ni anakhuku a mureyareyani, ni anoonyaanyiwa ni axaana a marepo." 
Proverbs30:18 Sookhala itthu tthaaru sookitikhiniha; ixexe kihingweraaka wiiwexexa: 
Proverbs30:19 Makhalelowaawe xaaka wiirimu, mpurulo wa enowa vamwala, ephiro ya nikula ntokotoko mphareiyani ni ephiro ya mulopwana ni mwaamwali." 
Proverbs30:20 Ephiro ya puuta ti ela: Owo onca, anuukuttha owanoni, eeraka: “Nkipankeru yoonanara.”" 
Proverbs30:21 Itthu tthaaru sinteterexa etthaya; ixexe sihingwereya ovilela:
