Proverbs30:22 Epottha enthatuwa mwene, mulolo oovonaxa," 
Proverbs30:23 muthiyana ootheliwa ohinsiveliwa, ni epottha ethiyana enkuxa nipuro na muhanowaaya." 
Proverbs30:24 Ikhalelo ixexe sa mulaponi siri ikhaanene, hata hiiho ti sookhalanaxa miruku:" 
Proverbs30:25 Ineneele siri soopattuxiwa soohikhalanaxa ikuru, wa soothesene, sinthokorora yoocaaya elimwe;" 
Proverbs30:26 ipila ti soopattuxiwa soohiweraxa, wa soothesene sinkhala mmakhukuni;" 
Proverbs30:27 misoope sihikhalanne mwene, wa soothesene, sineetta vamoha sithataanneene," 
Proverbs30:28 ni nimara ningwereya ovara ni matata, wa soothesene, nimphwanyaneya mmavaate mwa emwene." 
Proverbs30:29 Sookhala soopattuxiwa tthaaru sineetta soophwaneliwa, ixexe sineetta siinyarulaka:" 
Proverbs30:30 Mwatto, ori ooweraxa eriyari ya axinama, ni khaawo onimutthawaawe;" 
Proverbs30:31 Muthupi oneetta wiixoonaka; napunci ni mwene ohoolo wa anakhottwaaya. 
Proverbs30:32 Nyuwo muupuwenleene ntoko mulolo ni mwiivuwihaleene, hoye hoye mwaavaanenleene yoonanara, mphute eyano ni ntata." 
Proverbs30:33 Niwoko hiiho ntoko waama mukaka ankhuma manteiga, ni hiiho ntoko opiritula ephula onkhumiha ephome, mpakatho otannyera isara sinkhumelela minyakunyaku." 
Proverbs31:1 Masu a miruku sa mwene Lemuweli, moota yaamuxuttinghaaya amayawe:" 
Proverbs31:2 Ii! Mwanaka, mwaana mulopwana kimuyanraaka, aani kaamvekenlaaka," 
Proverbs31:3 ohinanarihe ikurusawo mwaathiyanani, okhomaalawawo, ni yaale anaaphwata mamwene." 
Proverbs31:4 Khoontthuneya wa mamwene, ii! Lemuweli; khoontthuneya wa mamwene owura eviinyu, khoontthuneya alamuli owura soohapala," 
Proverbs31:5 weera, ewuraka, ehittiwale silamuleliwe munlamuloni, ewiiyeraka hiiho oohooxiwa soophwanelasaya." 
Proverbs31:6 Mwaavahe yoowura yoohapala yaawo ahanle vakhaani okhwa, eviinyu yaawo ari moothananani;" 
Proverbs31:7 weera ewure ni ettiwale ohaawawaya, ni ehuupuweletho ohihakalalawaya." 
Proverbs31:8 Mukhuwele ngweerelaka yaawo ahingwera wiixaakiha, mukhale namwaakiha a yaawo anaasa wiixeetta." 
Proverbs31:9 Mukhuwele ni muthorihe ni ekhaikhai; mwaakihe soophwanela sa oohaawa ni oothoiwa. 
Proverbs31:10 Mwaara a ethoonyero yooreera – taani anaamphwanye? Ti ootthuneyaxa opwaha rubi*. 
Proverbs31:11 Iyawe onnamuroromela moota wookwanela ni kheenimuhaleelaru etthu yootthuneyaxa. 
Proverbs31:12 Owo onimpakela yooreeraru, ahimpakelakaru yoonanara, mmahukuni ootheene a okumaawe." 
Proverbs31:13 Onthanla mapururu a ikhondoolo ni eliinyu*, anavara muteko ni matataawe ni murima wootheene." 
Proverbs31:14 Owo ori ntoko makula matokotoko ankuxa miritti, aruuhaka ottaiwene sooca." 
Proverbs31:15 Ohinaaye oxa owo omvenya, anaarehererela yooca ootheene a vaatewawe, anaavaha miteko arumeiyaawe asithiyana." 
Proverbs31:16 Owo ongwehaweha ematta, anathuma; yeeyo ongwinelaaweno omphatteya ematta ya iwuuva*." 
Proverbs31:17 Oniixinnyerera mmutekonimwawe ni murima wootheene; nyoonosawe siri soolipa ni sookhomaala. 
Proverbs31:18 Ommweettiha nnenesene nakoswaawe oowineleya, ni yoomwaleelaawe kheencipharu ohiyu wootheene." 
Proverbs31:19 Mmatatani omvarela mukopothi, ni ikatha omvarela yoottotthano." 
Proverbs31:20 Onaakhavihera oothoiwa ni onaavaha oohaawa. 
Proverbs31:21 Khangwoova amusaawe yaakhalaka etthapwe yooriiraxa, niwoko ootheenaawo angwara ikuwo sa mwiitti." 
Proverbs31:22 Owo ompakela yoowaatala vakaamaniwawe, aniiwariha ikuwo sa eliinyu* ni sa kanka." 
Proverbs31:23 Iyawe onttittimihiwa vamulako wa esidade, onkilaathaawewo eriyari ya asitokweene a elapo." 
Proverbs31:24 Owo ompaka soowara sa eliinyu*, anathumiha, ni onaapakela alaamba ananakoso." 
Proverbs31:25 Oniiwariha ikuru ni ophwanelela; ontheya uupuwelaka sa muhoolo. 
Proverbs31:26 Onuuluma ni miruku ni onxuttiha ni osivela. 
Proverbs31:27 Onimukosoopa nakoso a vaatewawe ni khantthuniheraru oreesi. 
Proverbs31:28 Anamwanaawe amvenya, enamuttapahera; iyawetho onimuttapahera eeraka:" 
Proverbs31:29 “Asithiyana ancipale ari a ethoonyero yooreera, vaheera nyuwo mohaapwahaxa." 
Proverbs31:30 Ekhove yoovorenghela murima ti yoolokottha, ni ophwaneliwa ti woovira; vaheera muthiyana ommoova Yave onoottapaheriwa." 
Proverbs31:31 Owo aakhele ntthuvelo nnimphwanela ni mitekosawe sittapaheriwe vamulako wa esidade. 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Masu a muhusiha, mwaana mulopwana a Davide, mwene a oYerusaleemu ti ala:" 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Moota ohivareleiyaaya muteko! Moota ohivareleiyaaya muteko, onghima muhusiha. Ii!, moota ohivareleiyaaya muteko! Kheentaphulelaru etthu!" 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Etthu heeni ongwinaawe mutthu ni mutekwaawe woovihaxa wootheene mulaponimu? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Ikhapira singwa ni iyo sinoorowatho, vaheera elapo enoopwaherera mahuku ootheene." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Nsuwa ninkhuma ni nno nnooneelatho, ni woowaakuveya ninghokoleela weiwo naakhumalaayawo." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Epheyo enoopela ohitto enarukunuwela ottuttuwani; enrukureerasa erowaka enkelaayawo. 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Nyooloko sootheene sinkela mphareiya, mene ephareiya kheensararu. Nyooloko singhokoleela ota weera siviremotho." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Itthu sootheene ti sookhulumula, mutthu khangwera othaliha; maitho khaankwaneya woona, hata maaru khaankwaneya wiiwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Yeeyo yeereiye, enimweereyatho, yeeyo epakingwe, enoopakiwatho. Kheewowo etthu enyowani vathi wa nsuwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Kheekhala etthu eneera yeeriwe: “Moone! Ela ti enyowani. Yaari yookhaleene okhuma khalayi, hiyo nihinaaye.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Khawoworu onuupuwelela seiye sooniwe khalayi, ni seiyo sineera seereiye, khasuupuweleliwaru ni yaawo eneera erwe muhoolomwaya." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Miyo, muhusiha, kaari mwene a oYixrayeli, mulaponi mwa oYerusaleemu." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Kookhalela nthiti waasaasera ni woonelela miruku weera kisuwele nnenesene sootheene simpakiwa vathi wa nsuwa. Ela ti yoolemela yootepaxa Muluku ovanghaawe omutthu! 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Kohoona sootheene simpakiwa vathi wa nsuwa; sootheene khasimvareleya muteko, ti woomola epheyo!" 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Yeeyo eri yookhoromana kheenookoleya; yeeyo enghaleela kheenaalikeleliwa. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Kuupuwela: “Miyo koothatuwa neepili kikhalanaxaka miruku waapwaha ootheene alamunle oYerusaleemu, miyo kihinaaye; vekhaikhai koophwanyaxa miruku ni esuwelo yincipale.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Tivawo kiilipihenraaka weera kiiwexexe miruku, mpakatho ololo ni ohimiruku, vaheera kooxuttera weera iwotho ti woomola epheyo." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Vano okhalanaxa miruku, onaattaxa ohaawa; yaattaxaka esuwelo, ohaaweya." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Miyo kaahiixeerela: “Murwe, kinimwaasaasera itthu soosiveleya weera koonelele seiyo saareerelaka.” Vaheera eyotho yaahoonihera ohivareleya muteko." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ommaleloni, kohoona weera otheya ti ololo, ni soosiveleya khasimphureleya etthu." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Vano kaahuupuwela wiixinnyerera moowurani ni ololo, naari munepaaka waapwaherereene weettihiwa ni miruku. Keera koone waakireerelaka ohakalalela ehuhu vakhaani ninkhalaahu mulaponimu." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Kaahiivaherera mmitekoni sitokotoko: Kooteka impa kiniiphatteela iwuuva*. 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Koopaka mattimbe ni moophatteya nyiri; koophatteyamo nyoota sootheene sa nyiri siniima. 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Koopakatho ittankhi weera kihelele othako wa nyirisaka soopomba. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Koothuma ipottha ilopwana ni ithiyana ni kaakhalano iphottha saayareliwe vaatewaka. Ohiya yeeyo, kaakhalanaxatho imombe ni ikhondoolo waapwaha ootheene yaakhala oYerusaleemu miyo kihinaaye." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Kaahiithukumanyera eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa, mihakhu sa mamwene ni ilapo soohiyanahiyana. Kaakhalano anamwiipa asilopwana ni asithiyana, mpakatho axaaseeta ancipale, aani soohaawela sa omutthu." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Kaathatuwa neepilixa waapwaha ootheene yaakhala oYerusaleemu miyo kihinaaye, kiixuurelelaka miruku." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Nkaakhoontteru yeeyo yaahaawelaaya maithowaaka; nkaavaannyeru yeeyo waatthunaaya murimaaka. Vekhaikhai, miyo kaahakalalela mitekosaka sootheene; nno naari ntthuvelo na wiiminyaalelawaka wootheene." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Wa soothesene, kiwehawengheene sootheene kaapakaaka ni muteko kaaminyaalenlaaka opaka, kaahoona weera sootheene khasaavareleya muteko, waari woomola epheyo paahi; seiyo simpakeya mulaponi khasingwineleyaru etthu." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Vano kaatthokelela mmirukuni, moololoni ni moohimirukuni. Apakeke eheeni namarandela a mwene, ohikhanle opakatho yeeyo epakingwe?" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Kaahoona weera fataari miruku ohikhanle ohimiruku, ntoko onreerelaaya waara ohikhanle epiphi." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Mutthu a miruku ookhalano maitho anoona, vaheera mulolo oneetta mpiphini; wa soothesene, kaahoona weera ooweeli arino ommaleloni omoharu." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Vano kaahuupuwela: Yeeyo emmweereela mulolo, enookeereelatho. Kiwinne eheeni okhalawaka namiruku? Hiiho, kaahiixeerela: Eyotho kheentaphulelaru etthu." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Hata musuweli naari mulolo khayuupuweleliwaru; mmahukuni a muhoolo oweeli awo anoottiwaliwa. Mooteene yoowo onkhwaawe mulolo, musuwelitho onkhwa hiiho." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Tivawo kinthanyaaka okumi, niwoko muteko omvariwa mulaponi kinoona ntoko woolemelaxa. Sootheene khasaavareleiye muteko, waari woomola epheyo paahi." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Koothanya itthu sootheene mwa seiyo miyo kaaminyaalenlaaka mulaponi, niwoko ontthuneya omuhiyera yoowo anaakirandele." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Vano taani anaasuwele weera owo onookhala musuweli hoye hoye mulolo? Wa soothesene, onoolamula sootheene kipankaaka mmutekonimwaka ni mmirukunimwaka mulaponimu. Eyotho kheentaphulelaru etthu." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Yaakiphiyera ehuhu yoohoona yooweera wa miteko sootheene kaaminyaalenlaaka mulaponi. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Vano, mutthu onoowera ovara mutekwaawe mmirukuni, mweesuweloni ni mweettotthoni, mene ontthuneya ohiya sootheene orinaawe ntoko yoohiyeriwa wa mukina ahaaminyaalenle yeeyo, eyotho kheentaphulelaru etthu, aani ti ohiroromeleya." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Ewinelo heeni orinaawe mutthu ngwiiminyaalelanimwawe wootheene ni ohaawelawawe wootheene omvarelaawe muteko mulaponi? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Mookuminimwawe wootheene, mutekwaawe ti woovoreya ni woothananiha; hata ohiyu muupuwelowaawe khooniitthuuwa. Eyotho kheentaphulelaru etthu." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Wa mutthu, kheewoworu yooreerela ohikhanle oca, owura ni ophwanya mureerelo mmutekonimwawe. Kaahoonatho weera eyo enrweela mmatatani mwa Muluku." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Vano, taani owenre oca hoye hoye ophwanya ohakalala ahikhanleno Muluku?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Wa mutthu onimusiveliha Muluku, Owo onimvaha miruku, esuwelo ni weetteleya nnene. Vaheera wa namattheka, Muluku onimvaha muteko woothukumanya ni woothokorora mihakhu weera amvahe yoowo onimusiveliha. Eyotho kheentaphulelaru etthu, ti woomola epheyo paahi." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Khula etthu yookhalano ehuhuwaaya; khula etthu yookhalano emaaraaya mulaponimu: 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Ehuhu ya oyariwa ni ehuhu ya okhwa, ehuhu ya ophatteya ni ehuhu ya ophela ephatteiwale," 
Ecclesiastes3:3 ehuhu ya wiiva ni ehuhu ya olamiha, ehuhu ya ophwata ni ehuhu ya orasela," 
Ecclesiastes3:4 ehuhu ya wiinla ni ehuhu ya otheya, ehuhu ya wiikhupanyera ni ehuhu ya wiina," 
Ecclesiastes3:5 ehuhu yoomwaramwara maluku ni ehuhu ya othukumanyiha, ehuhu ya okhubaara ni ehuhu ya ohuluwa," 
Ecclesiastes3:6 ehuhu ya waasaasa ni ehuhu ya ohaasa, ehuhu ya othokorora ni ehuhu ya ovonyera okerekhere," 
Ecclesiastes3:7 ehuhu ya waahula ni ehuhu ya ottottha, ehuhu ya omaala ni ehuhu ya wuuluma," 
Ecclesiastes3:8 ehuhu ya osivela ni ehuhu ya othanya, ehuhu ya owana ni ehuhu ya okhala mmuretteleni." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Namuteko ongwinani moominyaalelanimwawe moothemwene? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Kohoona murindi Muluku aareiyaawe atthu. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Owo opanke sootheene sooreeraxa mweehuhunimwaya. Oohelatho vamurimani wa mutthu ekhaikhai ya ehuhu yoohimala; orookhalaru hiiho, omutthu khoongwera wiiwexexa nnenesene yeeyo Muluku opankaawe okhuma ompacereroni mpaka ommaleloni." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Kohoonelela weera kheewoworu yoomureerela mutthu, ohikhanle okhala oohakalala ni opaka yooreera nlelo areene ni okumi." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Kohoonelelatho weera owera oca, owura ni ophwanya mureerelo mmutekonimwawe, ti yoovaha ya Muluku." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Koosuwela weera sootheene Muluku opankaawe, sinoopwaherera wa mahuku ootheene; wa yeeyo kheenaandyeerereya etthu, hata kheemvukuwaru etthu. Muluku opakenle hiiho weera atthu emoove." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Yeele eriwo, yaakhala, ni yeeyo eniikhale, yaakhala khalayiru; Muluku onooweriha weereya yeele yeereiye." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Kohoonelelatho etthu ekina mulaponimu: vanipuroni na ekhaikhai wookhala otakhala, vanipuroni na wookoleleya, yookhalaxa yoonanara." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Kaahuupuwela: Muluku onimwaathoriha okhuma oororomeleya mpaka mutakhali, niwoko khula etthu yookhalano ehuhuwaaya, aani ehuhu wa khula etthu enkhumelela." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Kaahuupuwelatho: Muluku ongwoota murima atthu weera awo yoone weera ari ntoko axinama. 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Ommaleloni wa mutthu onoolikana wa mwaamunama. Ommaleloniwene weiwo onimwaaweherera. Mooteene yoowo onkhwaawe mmoha, onkhwatho mukinoowo. Ootheene arino ngwiya mmohamoharu wa okumi; mutthu khanooneleyaxa ompwaha mwaamunama. Eyo kheentaphulelaru etthu." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Ootheene anrowa nipuro nimoharu; ootheene arweenle vantthupini, ni anoohokoleelawotho." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Taani onsuwela ngwiya wa mutthu waarweelaka osulu ni ngwiya wa mwaamunama waakhuruwelaka vathi? 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Tivawo koonnaaka weera kheewoworu yoomureerela mutthu ohikhanle opuha mmutekonimwawe, niwoko nno ti ntthuvelonawe. Vano, taani anaawere woonihera yeeyo eniikhumelele vahoolo wa okhwa?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Kaawehatho, kinoona nihasu nootheene nneereya mulaponimu: Kaahoona maithori a oohooxiwa ni khaakhanleru oowaapembesa; olamula ti wa anamahasula, ni khawoworu oowaapembesa." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Tivawo kiwoonenlaaka anamakhwa okhala oohakalalaxa ohikhanle yaawosa nlelo ontthuneya okhala ni okumi. 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Vanonto, fataari yoole ohiyariwe, aani yoole ohoonne yootakhala empakiwa mulaponimu, ohikhanle ooweel ale." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Kohoonelela weera muteko wootheene ni simpakiwa sootheene sa mutthu siri niwoko na omukhalela nrima mwaattamanaawe. Mene eyotho kheentaphulelaru etthu, ti woomola epheyo paahi." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Mulolo oniikhuraana aphwataka okumi. 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Fataari okhalano etthu muntatani nimoha ni moota woomaaleleya, ohikhanle mmatatani meeli ophwanyaka ni wiiminyaalelaxa ni woomola epheyo." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Kohoonelelatho mulattu mukina mulaponimu, mwa yoowo ori wa siiyo." 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Aakhala mulopwana mmoha aari meekhaaweru paahi; khaarinoru mwaana naari munneiye. Aavara muteko woohihiyerera! Wa soothesene, maithwaawe khayaahakalalela mitekosawe. Owo oniikoha: Kimvarelaxa heeni muteko ni kinixiimanela heeni itthu soosiveliha? Eyo kheentaphulelaru etthu; owo ori mulattu woothananiheya." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Fataari weetta eeli ohikhanle okhala meekhaawo, niwoko ntthuvelo ntokweene, ti muteko omvariwa atthu eeli." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Amora mmoha, nthamwene onoomukhavihera weemela. Vaheera ii! Mulopwana owo ommora ahinakhalano oomvenxa." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Hiihotho, atthu eeli yakona vamoha anoovahana nttukuttha. Vanonto, moota heeni mutthu mmoha aneeraawe iivahe nttukuttha?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Mutthu mmoha onoowineya, vaheera atthu eeli anoowera wiixaakiha. Mukhoyi orithingwe itika tthaaru ti woorika opaseya." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Fataari mmiravo oohaawa ohikhanle mwene oowuuluvala ni mulolo ohinaakhulela ohiihiwa. 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Mmiravo wookhala wookhumaka mukaliposo anakilaathela ehice ya emwene, orooyariwaru oohaaweene moomweneni mwa mwene." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Kaahoona weera ootheene ankhala mulaponi yaamutthara mmiravo aari namarandela a mwene. 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Waatta wa yaale yaamutthara yoowo, waari woohaalikeleya. Wa soothesene, ekhapira yaattharelana khayaamuhakalalenle namarandela. Eyotho kheentaphulelaru etthu, ti woomola epheyo paahi." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Nyuwo mwaarowaka vaNipuroni Nootteela* na Muluku mwiipasoope ni mweettelowaanyu. Fataari yoowo onkhuveela weera iiwe ohikhanle alolo ampaka sooveleela ehisuwelaka weera khaampaka nnene. 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Muhaakuvele wuuluma, hata murimaanyu ohikhale woowaakuva omuruuhela Muluku milattu. Muluku ori wiirimu ni nyuwo muri mulaponimu, tivawo muulumeke vakhaani paahi." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Saattaxaka sootthukuruwela, simphuwa sooloha; ngwuulumaxani wa mulolo, ankhumaxa masu a siiyo." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Nyuwo mwaaroromelihaka ni nlipelo, muhipise okwanihera nno, niwoko alolo khaanimusiveliha Muluku; mukwanihere nno." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Fataari ohiroromeliha ni nlipelo ohikhanle ororomeliha woohikwanihera. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Muhitthunihere eyanowaanyu wootthekihani. Muhimweerele namutthenga a Empa ya Muluku: Kootapanya opaka nlipelo nna.’ Omunyoonyihera heeni Muluku ni yeeyo munghimaanyu, ni omuhiyera heeni aphwataka yeeyo mpankaanyu?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Sooloha sincipale ni masu mancipale khaantaphulelaru etthu. Tivawo mmoovekeno Muluku. 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Nyuwo mwamoona namahaawa ahasuliwaka mulaponi emoha, munoonatho weera onkhootteliwa soophwanela ni ekhaikhai, muhituthuwe; vano, khula mutokweene ookhalano namalamulaawe mutokweenexa, ni wa ooweeli awo, aakhalatho anaapwaha." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Sooruwera sa elapo siri sooreerela wa ootheene; mwene muneene ongwinela seiyo. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Yoowo onsivela musurukhu, khampwanyarutho yoomukwana; yoowo onsivela mihakhu, khahakalalelarutho seiyo ongwinaawe. Eyotho kheentaphulelaru etthu." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Saandyeerereyaka sooreela, anaandyeerereyatho yaawo anca. Yoowineleya heeni sinruuhaaya sooreela wa yoowo orino, ohikhanle woona ni maithwaawe paahi?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Ikhove sa namuteko ti soosiva, hata acaaka vaakhaani naari vancipale, vaheera osareya wa namapuha, onimuruuhela naawalaphile." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Yookhala yoonanara yoowoopihaxa koonnaaka mulaponi: Mihakhu sithukumanyiwe sinimuruuhela yoothananaxa muneene. 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Owo sinimuriheya mihakhusawe niwoko na oheettihawawe nnene. Ommaleloni mwaana aneeraawe amuyare khankhalano etthu. 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Mutthu oyariwe tiriya mmirimani mwa amayawe, ni mooteene yoowo onrwaawe, onrowatho hiiho. Mmutekoni wootheene ominyaalenlaawe, khanrowano." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Yookhalatho etthu ekina yoothananihaxa: Mooteene yoowo mutthu onrwaawe, onrowatho hiiho, vano omphwanyani wiiminyaalelawawe wootheene, eenre oomolaka epheyo?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Omviriha okumaawe wootheene mpiphini, ni makacamiho matokotoko, iretta ni othanana." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Hiiho, kohoonelela weera wa mutthu, yoomureerela ni yootthunaawe, ti oca, owura ni opuha yeeyo ophwannyaawe ngwiiminyaalelanimwawe wootheene mulaponi mmahukuni vakhaani a okumi Muluku onimvahaawe, niwoko eyo ti yoovaheriwaawe." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Vano, Muluku aamvahaka mukina mihakhu ni sooreela, ni aangwerihaka opuha seiyo, waakhulela yoovaheriwaawe ni ohakalalela mitekosawe, vano eyo ti yoovaha ya Muluku." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Mutthu owo khanuupuwela vancipale sa mahuku vakhaani a okumaawe, niwoko Muluku oomukhaliha oohikhalano nipeesa moohakalalani ni murima." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Kohoonatho yoothananihaxa ekina mulaponimu, enaalemelaxa atthu." 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Muluku onimvaha mutthu mihakhu, sooreela ni nttittimiho, moota wooweera kheewo enimuhaleelaru anghaawelaaya maithwaawe; vaheera Muluku khanimutthunihera opuha itthu seiyo, ni vanipuroniwawe, ompuha mukina. Eyo kheentaphulelaru ni ti yoothananihaxa." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Mutthu onoowera okhalano anamwane ncira ni okhala ni okumi iyaakha sincipale. Wa soothesene, aahipuha itthu sooreera sa mookumini ni aahivithiwa nnene, kinghima weera mwaana ongyariwa ookhweene ti ooreeraxiwa ompwaha yoowo." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Owo omvirela weiwo, analakaseera mpiphini, ni mmo nsinanawe nnimwiipithiheya." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Oroohitokoru woona nsuwa, hoye hoye osuwela yakhalaru etthu, owo ohiitthuuwaxa ompwaha mutthu owo –" 
Ecclesiastes6:6 hata owo akhalaka wa iyaakha macira miloko miili ahipuhaka weetteleyawawe nnene. Ootheene anrowa omoharu weiwo. 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Wiiminyaalelawawe wootheene mutthu opakeliwe eyanowaawe; wa soothesene ohaawelawawe, khooninkwanaru." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Ewinelo heeni orinaawe musuweli mwa mulolo? Ewinelo heeni orinaawe namahaawa ongwera wiittikhano ohoolo wa akina? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Fataari ohakalalela yeeyo anoonaaya maitho, ohikhanle olohera yeeyo munghaawelaanyu. Eyotho kheentaphulelaru etthu, ti woomola epheyo paahi." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Sootheene sikhanle, sookhalano nsina, ni okhalawawe mutthu ti woosuwanyeya; khawowo ongwera ongwina mutthu oolipa ompwaha yoowo." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Yaattaxaka masu onaatta ololo woohiphureleya etthu. 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Vekhaikhai, khaawo asuwenle yeeyo enimureerela mutthu mmahukuni vakhaani a okumaawe woohiphureleya etthu omviraawe ntoko munttuusi. Vano, taani anaawere omuthalihera yeeyo eniikhumelele mulaponi owo attimunleene?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Fataari nsina nooreera ohikhanle makhura oowunkhela oorikaxa, ni nooreerela ti nihuku na okhwa ohikhanle oyariwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Fataari orowa omarironi ohikhanle ofestani, niwoko okhwa ti ommaleloni wa ootheene; akumi ehikuxereke matheela yeeyo!" 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Fataari othanana ohikhanle otheya, niwoko ekhove yoothanana enreeriha murima." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Murima wa musuweli ori vaate ori olalamika, vaheera murima wa mulolo ori vaate onghakalaliwa." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Fataari wiiwa ohiiha wa musuweli, ohikhanle wiiwelela icipo sa alolo." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Otheya wa mulolo ori ntoko nivisi na nyiiwa vathi wa esupuriya; eyotho kheentaphulelaru etthu. 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ewinelo yoohiroromeleya enimutatuxa musuweli okhala mulolo, ni makhwankwa annanariha murima." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Fataari ommaleloni wa itthu ohikhanle ompacereroniwaya, ni fataari ovilela ohikhanle wiikuxerera." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Muhitthunihere otannyereya isara woowaakuveya okumaanyu, niwoko isara sinkilaathi vaciroroni wa alolo." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Muheere: “Yaareerenle heeni mahuku a khalayi opwaha oolelo?” Vano, makoheroweene yaawo khaanrweela mmirukuni." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Miruku ti sooreera – ntoko yoohiyeriwa; sinaakhaliha nnenesene yaawo ankhala mulaponi. 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Miruku waakiha, ntoko onaakihaaya musurukhu, vaheera mureerelo wa esuwelo ti ola: Miruku sinuurela okumi wa yoowo orino seiyo." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Moonelemo yeeyo Muluku ompakaawe: Taani ongwera wookola yeeyo Owo opankaawe yookhoromaneene? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Mahuku yaakhalaka ooreera, mweettihe nnenesene; vaheera yaakhalaka oonanara, moonele ha: Muluku opanke yaawo ntoko nikhwaaya, asembihaka weera mutthu ahoonelele etthu ya muhoolomwawe." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Mookumini ola ohintaphulela etthu, miyo kohoona sootheene: Oororomeleya akhwaaka aarookhalaru oororomeleyeene, ni mutakhali akhalakano okumi mwincipale aarookhalaru mootakhalani." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Muhikhalaxe oororomeleya hata muhaattanaxe miruku; mmwiiphwatele heeni? 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Muhitepaxe okhala mutakhali ni muhikhale mulolo; mmwikhweleni ehinaaye ophiyera ehuhuwaanyu? 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Fataari ovarexexa olakiwa omoha muhihiyaka okina, niwoko yoowo ommova Muluku onootthara soopiili." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Miruku sinimukhaliha musuweli mmoha ooweraxa waapwaha alamuli muloko musidadeni. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Vanonto, khawoworu naari mmoha mulaponimu oororomeleya ompaka yooreera, ahinatthekaru." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Muhiwiriyane masu ootheene anghimmwa ni muloko; ohiyanawaya, onoowereya omwiiwa mpaka murumeiyaanyu awuulumelakani soonanara;" 
Ecclesiastes7:22 niwoko vamurimaniwanyu moosuwela weera nyuwotho imaara sincipale moowuulumela soonanara akina. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Sootheene iyo miyo kaawehaweha mmirukuni, keeraka: “Koolakela okhala musuweli;” vaheera eyo nkiwenreru." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Ekhaikhai eri ottaiwenexa ni ti yoowiixeraxa; vano taani anaawere woonelela? 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Tivawo kikhalenlaaka nthiti wiiwexexa, waasaasera ni waasaasa miruku ni osuwela moota siraaya itthu, ni weera kiiwexexe ohimiruku wa otakhala ni ololo wa ohimiruku." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Kohoonelela weera yootepaxa owaawa opwaha okhwa ti muthiyaya ori muraakho, mwa yoowo murimaawe ti ntapha ni matataawe ti onyooro. Vano mulopwana onimusiveliha Muluku, onimoopowa mwa yoowo, vaheera namattheka onoovariwa ni yoowo." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 “Moone,” onghima muhusiha, “koonelenlaaka ti ela: Kaalikanxaka ekina ni ekhwaaya weera koonelele moota eraaya," 
Ecclesiastes7:28 aani mweehuhuni ya waasaasawaka iwo nlelo ohikonte, kimoonne mulopwana oororomeleya mmoha paahi eriyari ya asilopwana macira muloko, vaheera eriyari ya asithiyana, nkimphwannyeru naari mmoha." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Yeeyo koonelenlaaka ti ela paahi: Muluku ohaapaka atthu oororomeleya, vaheera awosa yaasaanse mikhalelosaya sincipale.”" 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Taani onlikana ni namiruku? Taani ongwera otaphulela itthu? Miruku sinaariha ekhove ni sinceendya omora wa ekhovaawe. 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Olakawaka ti wu: Mwiiwelele malamulo a mwene niwoko nyuwo moolipela vamaithoni wa Muluku. 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Muhaakuve ovenya vamaithoni wa mwene, hata muhikhalele mpatta wa mulattu wootapanyeya, eenre mwene apakaka yeeyo ontthunaawe." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Vano, masu a mwene ti ooceendyeya, ni khaawo ongwera omukoha: “Mumpaka eheeni?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Yoowo oniiwelela malamulo a mwene khahaawaru yakhalaru yoonanara, ni murima wa miruku, onoosuwela ehuhu ni moota woopwaherera." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Vano, yookhala ehuhu yootthuneya ni mootatho ontthuneya wa khula yookhumelela, naari mukina ahaawaka yoolemelaxa." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Vekhaikhai, khawoworu osuwenle ya muhoolo. Taani anaawere omuleela yeeyo eniikhumelele?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Khawoworu ongwera olamula munepaawe; hata vakhaani khangweraru olamula nihuku na okhwawawe. Mooteene yoowo ohinkhalaawe ontthuniheriwa orowa owaani mweehuhuni ya ekhotto, hiihotho yootakhala kheenaatapuxa yaawo ampaka yeeyo." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Sootheene iyo koonne kiixinnyereraaka otthokelela sootheene simpakiwa elapo ya vathi. Sookhala ihuhu mutthu onaalamulaawe akina, ommaleloniwaya oreene wiithananiha." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ohiya toko yeeyo, koowoona atakhali evithiwaka – yaawosa yaakhovelela orowa ni orwa vaNipuroni Nootteela* yaakhelaka sootthapela musidadeni mwa weiwo yaapakaaya itthu soonanara seiyo. Eyotho, kheentaphulelaru etthu." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Sootakhala saahittaruxiwaka woowaakuveya, murima wa mutthu onsareya soovaanela weera apake yoonanara." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Mutakhali onoowera opaka sootakhala soohaalikeleya, ni orookhalaru hiiho, onkhalano okumi woowaatta, mene koosuwela nnenesene weera itthu sinooweettela nnene yaawo ammova Muluku, aani yaawo anoonihera nttittimiho ohoolowawe." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Tivawo, wa atakhali khasiweettelaru nnene, niwoko khaammova Muluku, ni mahukwaaya khaampwaherera ntoko munttuusi wa oxekuwa." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Yookhalatho etthu ekina ehintaphulelaru etthu mulaponimu: Oororomeleya anaakhela yeeyo enaaphwanela atakhali, ni atakhali anaakhela yeeyo enaaphwanela oororomeleya. Kinuupuwela weera eyotho kheentaphulelaru etthu." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Tivawo olakawaka ti weera mpuhe okumi, niwoko mulaponi ya vathi kheewoworu yoomureerela mutthu ohikhanle oca, owura ni ohakalala. Itthu iyo sikhale asikhwaawe mmutekonimwawe woovihaxa wa mmahukunimwawe ootheene Muluku omvanghaawe mulaponi ya vathi." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Kihokoleenleene otthokelela weera kisuwele ni koone miteko sa mutthu mulaponimu; mwa seiyo sinimuruuhela naawalaphile ohiyu ni othana," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 kaahiiwexexa sootheene Muluku opankaawe. Khaawo ongwera wiiwexexa seiyo simpakiwa mulaponi. Naari mutthu aminyaalelaka weera oonelele ekhalelo ya itthu, khamphwanya. Naari musuweli ahimaka weera onniiwexexa, vekhaikhai khangwera ophwanya." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Kaatthokelela yeeyo, kinoona weera oororomeleya ni anamiruku, vamoha ni seiyo ampakasaaya, siri mmatatani mwa Muluku. Seiyo sinaaweherera – okhalaka osivela hoye hoye othanya, khaawo asuwenle." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Ootheene arino ommaleloni omoharu: Oororomeleya ni mutakhali, ooreera murima ni oonanara murima, ootteela ni oohitteela, ompaka sooveleela ni ohimpaka. Yeeyo emmweereela mutthu ooreera murima, emmweereelatho namattheka; emmweereela yoowo onroromeliha, emmweereelatho yoowo onoova ororomeliha." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Yoonanara eri mwa sootheene sineereya mulaponi ya vathi ela, ti ela: Ommaleloni wa ootheene, ti omoharu. Ohiya sikina iyo, murima wa atthu woosareya soonanara ni soololo mookumini wootheene ni ommaleloni awosa animookhwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Yoowo ori eriyari ya akumi ookhalano oweherera; vano, fataari mwalapwa mukumi ohikhanle mwatto ookhwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Vano akumi aasuwela weera animookhwa, vaheera anamakhwa khaansuwelaru; wa yaawosa khanikhalaru ntthuvelo ni mpaka khaanuupuweleliwaru." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Wa yaawosa, osivela, othanya ni nrima soolakaseya khalayi; kheekhalelaru mpatta etthu ya seiyo sineereya mulaponimu." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Tivawo, muce ni ohakalala yoocaanyu, ni ngwure eviinyuwaanyu mutteeliweene murima, niwoko Muluku oohakalalela yeeyo nyuwo mumpakaanyu." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Mahuku ootheene, ngwarele sa ofestani, ni muttikitthele makhura mmurumwanyu." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Mpuhe okumi ni muthiyana munimusivelaanyu, mmahukuni ootheene a okumi ola ohintaphulelaru etthu, onoovahaaweni Muluku mulaponimu – mmahukuni ootheene ahintaphulelaru etthu! Vano, ela ti yoovaheriwaanyu mookumini ni mmutekonimwaanyu woovihaxa mulaponimu." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Yeeyo antthunaaya ovara matataanyu, mpakeke ni ikurusanyu sootheene, niwoko mmahiyeni munrowaanyumo, khoowoworu muteko hata yoovaanela; kheewoworu esuwelo naari miruku." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Kohoonelela etthu ekina mulaponimu: Ooweraxa otthimaka, khaangwina mahuku ootheene a otthimakawaya; oolipa khaangwina mahuku ootheene mukhottoni; asuweli khaankhalano yooca mahuku ootheene; anamiruku khaankhala mathadyiri mahuku ootheene; niwoko ehuhu ni mikhalelo sinaakhalela ootheene." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Ohiya toko iyo, khaawo osuwenle ehuhuwaawe: Mooteene yoowo ihopa simpharihiwaaya muttavini noowiiva, ni ipalame simpharihiwaaya munraakhoni, atthutho anreiwa itthavi mweehuhuni ya erisa ammorelaayamo moota yahaawehereraaya." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Kaahoonatho mulaponimu ethoonyero ela ya miruku ekitamve vamurimani: 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Yaakhala esidade emoha ekhaanene, yamakiwe atthu vakhaani. Vano, mwene ooweraxa aahoorwa owanano, anarica ni ikaaro sookurumulela exiri sincipale sa ekhotto." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Wa soothesene, musidadeni mmwe, aakhala mulopwana mmoha ohaawa, mene aari namiruku, ni mmirukunimwawe, owo aahoopola esidade. Vanonto khaawo yaamuupuwelenletho namahaawa ole." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Tivawo kuupuwenlaaka: Miruku ti sooreera opwaha ikuru, vaheera miruku sa namahaawa ti soonyoosiwa, ni woowaakuveya maswaawe anoottiwaliwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Masu oomaaleleya a namiruku yiiwiweke nnenesene, ohikhanle okhuwela wa yoowo onaalamula alolo." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Miruku ti sooreera opwaha ikapwitthi sa ekhottho, vaheera namattheka mmoha paahi omphwata itthu sooreera sincipale." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Mooteene yoowo ephepele yookhwa enunkhaxaaya enananariha makhura oowunkhela, ohimirukutho vakhaani onlemelaxa opwaha miruku ni nttittimiho." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Murima wa namiruku onkuxera ephiro yooreera, vaheera murima wa mulolo, onkuxera ephiro yoonanara." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Mpaka eettaka mphironi, mulolo onuupuwela woohikhalanoru iseru sooreera, awooniheraka ootheene weera owo mulolo." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Isara sa mutokweene soopattelani, muhihiye mutekwaanyu; wiimaaliha onsembiha otapanyaxa otokotoko." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Yookhalatho yoonanara ekina koonnaaka mulaponimu, otapanya wa yaale anlamula:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Alolo amvahiwa miteko soottittimiheya, vaheera anamapuha amvahiwa miteko sooveyaveya." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Koowoona arumeiyi yeettaka mukavaluni*, ni asitokweene yeettaka vathi ntoko arumeiyi." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Yoowo onthipa elakasa, onoowereya omorelamo; yoowo onkurumula exiri, onoowereya olummwa ni enowa." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Omphela maluku onoowereya wiivulalihano; yoowo onthikila ikhuuni onimwiileva. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Epaso yatura, ehinanoniwa, ontthuneya wiilipihaxa; ovarela muteko miruku, onruuhela weetteleya nnene." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Enowa yaluma ehinaaye olavihiwa, amphureleya eheeni malavi?" 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Masu a namiruku animuruuhela mpuha, vaheera iyano sa mulolo sinoomuphwata." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Ompacereroni, maswaawe ti oololo, vaheera ommaleloni ti ololo wootakhala." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Naari mulolo uulumaka woohihiyerera, khaawo ansuwela yeeyo eniirwe; taani anaawere omuleela mutthu mukina yeeyo eniimukhumelele muhoolo?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Muteko wa mulolo onimuhiya ookhulumuweene moota wooweera mpaka khangweraru woona ephiro ya owaani. 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Ii! Wa nyuwo elapo, mwa yeeyo mwenaanyu aari murumeiyi, ni anamwanaawe mwene ampaka ifesta oxeexeloru." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Ooreelihiwa ti nyuwo elapo mwa yeeyo mwenaanyu oyariwe mweemusini ya oneethi, ni anamwanaawe anca mweehuhuni yootthuneya weera ephwanyetho ikuru ohikhanle ohapaliwa." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Nipatho ninkurumuwa mwaha wa oreesi; empa enttonya mwaha woowiikhuraana. 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Efesta empakeliwa otthekula, ni eviinyu enghakalaliha okumi, vaheera sootheene iyo sinliviwa ni musurukhu." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Mmuupuwelonimwanyu muhimuruwane mwene! Hata mureene okwaartuniwanyu, muhaalapheru mathadyiri! Vano, onoowereya weera mwaapalame a wiirimu onookuxa maswaanyu, ni ikhalelo simvava sinoowera omwaramwaxa yeeyo nyuwo muneeraanyu muhime." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Mvonyere mmaahini yoocaanyu, ni eviraleene mahuku mancipale, munoophwanyatho." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Mukawe sa ithannapiili murinaanyu, mpakatho ya ithannatthaaru, niwoko nyuwo khamusuwenle erisa heeni eneera emorele mulaponi." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Mahutte yakungela, angyeehera epula mulaponi. Naari mwiri omorenleene mpatta wa ohitto hoye hoye ottuttuwani, weiwo oneeraaya omoreleru, onookhalawo." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Yoowo ongwehexexa epheyo, khaphatteya, ni yoowo ongwehexexa mahutte, khahepha." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Mooteene yoowo muhisuwenlaanyu ephiro ya epheyo, naari moota empakeyaaya erutthu mmirimani mwa muthiyana, khamungweratho wiiwexexa miteko sa Muluku, Mpattuxa a itthu sootheene." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Mwaale oxeexelo mmiswaanyu, ni naari oxekuwaka, muhiikhuraane, niwoko khamusuwenle yeeyo eniikhumelele; apaale ela hoye hoye ele ti eneera yiime hoye hoye soopiili sinooreera." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Waara ti woosiveleya, aani ti wooreera woona nsuwa." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Naari mutthu akhalaka ni okumi wa iyaakha sincipale, owo apuheke seiyo mookuminimwawe wootheene. Wa soothesene, muupuwelele mahuku a epiphi, niwoko animwaattaxa. Sootheene sihanle owa, khasintaphulelaru etthu." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Ohakalale mmiravo hiiha oraawo mukithi! Otteeliwe murimaawo mmahukuni a omiravowaawo! Orowe weiwo onoolamulelaayawo murimaawo, mpaka anoonaayawo maithwaawo; Vaheera osuweleke weera mwa itthu sootheene iyo onoomwaakhulano Muluku." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Osusihe vamurimaniwawo sookacamiha, ni omalihe soovalaveliha wa erutthwaawo, niwoko omiravo ni okhala mukithi, ti itthu simvira woowaakuveya." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Omuupuwelele Mpattuxaawo mmahukuni a omiravowaawo, ehinaaye ophiyera mahuku a makacamiho ni okhuveela iyaakha oneeraawo weere: “Nkinghakalalela seiyo,”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 nihinaaye okupha nsuwa ni ocipha yoomwaleela, mweeri ni ithenyeeri, ni mahutte emaaxiyeene epula;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 anamalipelela a empa yaathukumelaka ni asilopwana oolipa yeettaka khupakhupa; anamaxila yaahiyaka oxila mwaha wookhala vakhaani, ni yaale angwehera muxanelani yaahiweraka woona;" 
Ecclesiastes12:4 milako sa mmiseweni saawaliwaka ni waakhurunuwaka oruma wa nxilo; onyakula wa ipalame waavenxaka mukhoveni, vaheera oruma wa iciposaya sootheene waakhalelaka woohikwanakwana;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 atthu yoovaka orakamela wa musulu ni soowoopiha sa munseweni; waattuvaka mwiri wa emandoweira*; ni musoope wiipurulaka ni saahikwanihereyaka soohaawela, vano mutthu onrowa vaatevawe woohimala ni anamalalamika anxoraxora mmiseweni." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Aani, omuupuwelele Mpattuxaawo, ohinaaye opaseya mukhoyi wa eparatha*, hoye hoye ophweeya ekoomixi ya eyuuma yoorikaxa; ohinaaye ovakareela mwaapu vanaattuuttuni hoye hoye nreko nihinaaye ophuleela vahimeni," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 ni ntthupi nihinaaye ohokoleela vatthayani nikhumelenlaayawo, ni munepa ohinaaye ohokoleela wa Muluku ovanghe." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 “Sootheene khasintaphulela etthu! Khasintaphulela etthu!” onghima muhusiha. “Khasintaphulelaru etthu!” 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Ohiya okhala musuweli, muhusiha ooxuttihatho esuwelo muloko. Owo ootthokelela, anathatelela nnenesene maxiripulo mancipale." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Annaasaasatho ophwanya masu oowookoleleya, ni yeeyo owo aalempaawe yaari yoowookoleleya ni ya ekhaikhai." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Masu a musuweli ari ntoko mipuule, waatta wa soohimasawe ori ntoko misomaari sookhomeliwa nnenesene, soovahiwa ni mukukhuli mmoharu." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Mwanaka, nnene; ohaandyeerere etthu mwa seiyo. Khasinghiyereriwa opakiwa ilivuru; ni osomaxa onkhulumula erutthu." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Vano, seenre siiwiwa sootheene, emaliherowaaka ti ela: Mmoove Muluku ni mwiiwelele malamulowaawe, niwoko eyo ti yootthuneyaxa wa mutthu." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Vano, Muluku onooruuhela nthorihelo sootheene sipakingwe, vamoha ni seiyo siipithihingwe – ekhalaka yooreera naari yoonanara." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Ecipo yooreeraxa ya Salomoni. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Ii! Owo aakibeeciye, eyanowaawe yaakibeecasiye. Aani, okitthunawawe ti woosiveleyaxa opwaha eviinyu." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Wunkhela wa makhuraawe ti wooreera; nsinanawe ninlikana makhura oowunkhela ooyeehiwa. Kheehiyono yootikhiniha weera asimwali animoosivelani! 
SongOfSongs1:4 Mukikuxe! Nrowe naakuveke! Amwene ekironghe mmapuronimwaya! Ninghakalala ni otteeliwa mwaha wa nyuwo; nnootthapela osivelawanyu opwaha eviinyu. Vekhaikhai, nyuwo ti oolapeya!" 
SongOfSongs1:5 Kooriipa, mene kiri ooreera, ii! Asithiyana a oYerusaleemu; ooriipa ntoko iheema sa oKedari, ntoko iluttu sa iheema sa Salomoni." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Muhikiwehe hiiho niwoko na oriipawaka; ti nsuwa nihinse exapalaaka. Anamwane asilopwana a amayaka aakinyoonyeriwa, enakikhaliha namawehaweha a imatta sa iwuuva*; wa soothesene, nkaawera okosoopa emattaaka ya iwuuva*." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Mukileele, nyuwo kinoosivelaakani, muncihaanyuwo muhuwaanyu ni muniitthuuwihaanyuwo muhuwaanyu nsuwa vamuru. Mukileele weera kihivire mmuhuwoni wa asinthamwenaanyu kiikhuneenleene eluttu." 
SongOfSongs1:8 Nyuwo, ooreeraxa a asithiyana, mwaahisuwenle, mutthare mphito wa muhuwaaka ni mwaacihe axaana a ipurisanyu mukerekhere iheema sa akukhuli." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Nyuwo oosiveleyaaka kinoolikanxerani ekavalu* ethiyana etthukiweene eriyari ya ikavalu* silopwana sa Farawu*. 
SongOfSongs1:10 Moota areenraaya maramaanyu eriyari ya axiveeve, ni muxikomwanyu ngwanreene onyooro wa eyuuma yoorikaxa!" 
SongOfSongs1:11 Nnimoopakelani axiveeve a eyuuma yoorikaxa ehuruweliweeneno eparatha*. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Mwene areene vameesaniwawe, wunkhela wa makhuraaka a enardu*, waamwareela." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Oosiveleyaaka kimmoona okhala ntoko mwaamurupa wa emira* omvira ohiyu eriyari ya mapelaaka. 
SongOfSongs1:14 Oosiveleyaaka ori ntoko ekhuce ya ithutu sa hena* a imatta sa iwuuva* sa wEni-Gedi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Moota mureenraanyu, ii! Oosiveleyaaka! Ii! Moota mureenraanyu! Maithwaanyu anlikana ikhunda!" 
SongOfSongs1:16 Moota mureenraanyu oosiveleyaaka! Ii! Moota mutikhiniheiyaanyu! Vamunyepuni wootikanela ti wookonawahu. 
SongOfSongs1:17 Mikoomba sa empaahu ti sa nyiri sa esidari*, ni nipathonahu ti na nyiri sa ipinyeiru*." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Miyo ti ethutu yooxeera ya Saroni, aani ethuthu yooreeraxa ya mmareyareyani." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Oosiveleyaaka ti eriyari ya amiravo ntoko ethutu yooreeraxa eriyari ya nyiiwa. 
SongOfSongs2:3 Oosiveleyaaka eriyari ya amiravo ori ntoko emasiyera eriyari ya nyiri sa moothakoni. Kintthunaxa okilaathi vamunttuusinivawe ni yoowiimaawe ti yoocoocowaxa vanluminiwaka. 
SongOfSongs2:4 Owo aakirongha vasaala ya ifesta, ni ebandeiraawe mwa miyo, ti osivela." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Dyoontte mukicihe iwuuva* soowuumihiwa, mukikhomaalihe ni masa, niwoko kimvoreiwa osivela." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Moonowaawe woothiyana, onkhala waamuruwaka, ni moonowawe woolopwana, onkikhubaara." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Asithiyana a oYerusaleemu, miyo kinoodyoonttelelani mwa anaahe ni ikorsa sa ntuphini: muhivenye mukhoveni hata muhitannye osivela ehuhuwaaya ehinaaye." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Ngwiriyane! Ti oosiveleyaaka! Moone! Owo ongwa weiwo atuphaka mmanyaakoni, iinaka mmattumuxani." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Oosiveleyaaka ori ntoko naahe, aani ntoko napunci a naahe. Moone! Owo ori wiithela exiraahu, aweheraka muxanelani, athurumelaka mmwiikitthoni." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Oosiveleyaaka aahuuluma, anakeerela: “Oosiveleyaaka, mweemele; ooreeraaka, mukitthare.”" 
SongOfSongs2:11 Moone! Eyiitta yoovira; epula yoomala, enarowa." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Ithutu sinttuva mulaponi, ni yoophiyera ehuhu yoowiipa; mulaponimwahu oniiwanyeya wiipa wa ikhunda." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Mwiri wa ifiigu oniima soowiima soopacera; iwuuva* sinttuva onamwareela wunkhelawaya. Mweemele, murwe oosiveleyaaka; ooreeraaka, nrowe." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Ekhundaaka eri mmakhukuni a nyala, moowiipitha muxerexere nyaako, mukoonihere ekhovaanyu, mukihiye kiiwe nsunanyu; niwoko nsunanyu ti noosiveleya, ni ekhovaanyu ti yooreeraxa." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Munivarele akhwatte, axaana a akhwatte annanariha imatta sa iwuuva*, niwoko imattasahu sa iwuuva* soottuva." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Oosiveleyaaka ti awaka ni miyo ti awawe; owo onciha eriyari ya ithutu sooreeraxa. 
SongOfSongs2:17 Muhokolowe oosiveleyaaka ohinaaye wiila ni sihinaaye olakaseya nyunttuusi; mukhale ntoko naahe hoye hoye ntoko napunci a naahe mmattumuxani oovinavineya. 
SongOfSongs3:1 Ohiyu wootheene vabeettiniwaka koomwaasaasa yoole onimusivelaaya murimaaka, mene nkimphwannye." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Vano kinoovenya kiviravireke musidadeni, kinoovira mmiseweni ni mmapuronimwaya; kinoomwaasaasa yoole onimusivelaaya murimaaka. Miyo koomwaasaasa, mene nkimphwannye." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Anamalipelela yaakikumanano yeetteettaaya musidadeni, ni miyo kaahaakoha: “Nyuwosa moomoona yoole onimusivelaaya murimaaka?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Kipwahakaru, kaamphwanya yoole onimusivelaaya murimaaka. Miyo kaamvarela kihimuhiyaka arowaka, mpaka omphiiha vaate wa amayaka, aani mukwaartuni mwa yaale akiyanre." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Asithiyana a oYerusaleemu, miyo kinoodyoonttelelani mwa anaahe ni ikorsa sa ntuphini: muhivenye mukhoveni hata muhitannye osivela ehuhuwaaya ehinaaye." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Taani yoowo onrwa aweelaka munikareni ntoko otthuwa wa mwiixi, wunkhelihiweene ni makhura a emira*, erubani* ni itthu sootakansiwa ni makhura ooreera sootheene sa anamathumiha?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Moone! Ti ekaaro ya ehice ya emwene ya Salomoni, enghooliwa ni anakhotto miloko mithannamosa ari ooweraxa a oYixrayeli;" 
SongOfSongs3:8 ootheene awo eherenreene ikatana, ni oowera mukhottoni, khula mutthu ni ekatanaawe munluwoni, iireherenreene weera awanane otteengula wa ohiyu." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Mwene Salomoni ohiipakela ekaaro ya ehice ya emwene; owo opakenle itthaabwa sa oLibanu. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Imettosaya opakenle eparatha*, nipathonaya na eyuuma yoorikaxa. Enkilaatheliwa opakenle sa kanka, mpuwamwaya orehereriwe nnenesene ni asithiyana a oYerusaleemu." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Asithiyana a oSiyoni, mvenyase! Murwe, mmoone mwene Salomoni! Owo ongwara ecireemba, mwa yeeyo yaangwaringhaaya amayawe vanihukuni na othelawawe, aani nihuku waahakalanlaaya murimaawe." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Moota mureenraanyu oosiveleyaaka! Ii, moota mureenraanyu! Maithwaanyu, wiithela eluttu, ari ntoko ekhunda. Mayihaanyu ari ntoko muhuwo wa ipuri singwa sikhuruwaka vamwaako Giliyade." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Mainowaanyu ari ntoko muhuwo wa ikhondoolo soometthiwa vaanaano sinkhuma woorapihiwani. Khula ekhondoolo eri ni ekhwaaya; kheewoworu ehikhanle ni axaana. 
SongOfSongs4:3 Iyanosanyu siri ntoko efiiyu yooxeera; mmwaanomwanyu ti wooreeraxa. Mphatamaarumwanyu ori wiithela wa eluttu onlikana ni ekapatthi ya yoowiima ya eromazera*. 
SongOfSongs4:4 Nxikonanyu nri ntoko etoore* ya Davide etekiwe ntoko moosungamo. Mmo soothomeiwamo ixikudu* macira muloko, sootheene iyo ti ixikudu* sa anakhotto ooweraxa." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Mapelaanyu oomeeli ari ntoko axaana a naahe, aani ntoko axaana maphapo a naahe anca eriyari ya ithutu sooreeraaxa." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Ohinaaye oxa, ni ohilakaseiye munttuusi, kinoorowa omwaako wa emira* ni onttumuxani na erubani*." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Oosiveleyaaka, nyuwo muri ooreera moota woomalela; mwa nyuwo, khoowoworu murakanlaanyuwo." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Mvenye oLibanu ootthomeriwaaka, mvenye oLibanu. Mukhuruwe osuluxa wa wAmana, vanttumuxani na oSeniri, osulu wa oHermoni, mmalittini mwa amwatto ni mmakhukuni mwa anantthavi ankhala mmanyaakoni." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Nyuwo mookwattula murimaaka, murokoraka, ootthomeriwaaka; mookwattula murimaaka okiweharu paahi, ni mwa nluku noowaaraxa nimoha na mukuhuwaanyu." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Moota oreenraaya oramelawanyu, murokoraka, ootthomeriwaaka! Oramelawanyu ti woosiveleyaxa opwaha eviinyu, ni wunkhela wa makhuraanyu woopwaha wakhalaru moota wa soosivasiva!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Iyanosanyu sinttonya ocoocowa ntoko wa macerephe a oravo, ootthomeriwaaka; mukaka ni oravo siri vanluminiwanyu. Wunkhela wa soowarasanyu onlikana ni wunkhela wa oLibanu." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Nyuwo ti nttimbe noowalana, murokoraka, ootthomeriwaaka; nyuwo ti ephattuwela yoowalana, aani naattuuttu oowaliwa." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Wa nyuwo, simmela soowiima soohiyanahiyana sa eromazera* vamoha ni ithutu sa hena* ni sa enardu*," 
SongOfSongs4:14 enardu* ni esafarano*, etthu yoowunkhelaxa ni ekanela, vamoha ni nyiri sootheene soowunkhela, emira*, ni alowe* ni soosivasiva sikinatho." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Nyuwo ti naattuuttu a nttimbe, ehime ya maahi makumi ankhuma oLibanu." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Mvenye mookonani epheyo ya mpatta wa ottuttuwani! Murwe epheyo ya mpatta wa ohitto. Moopele muttimbenimwaka weera wunkhelawaya omwareele mukhwipimwaya. Oosiveleyaaka avolowe muttimbenimwawe ni ace soowiimasaya sooreera. 
SongOfSongs5:1 Koovolowa muttimbenimwaka murokoraka, ootthomeriwaaka; koothukumanyiha emiraaka vamoha ni soosivasiva. Kohooca macerephaaka ni oravowaaka; koowura eviinyuwaaka ni mukakaaka. Muceeke asinthamwene, ii! Oosivelana, ngwureke muntthunelaanyu." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Keera kikonaka, mene murimaaka khawaakonne. Ngwiriyane! Oosiveleyaaka ommana nsele: “Mukihulele nsele murokoraka, oosiveleyaaka, ekhundaaka, ookwanelaxaaka. Mmurumwaka wohiimeliwamo nikame, ni mayihaaka aakhuwaleliwa ni onaanela wa ohiyu.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 Koorula mukaandyowaaka; onootthuneya owaratho? Koovulula inaawo; onootthuneya onanarihatho? 
SongOfSongs5:4 Oosiveleyaaka oovolongha ntata vanlakani na nampattika; murimaaka waapacera okivava mwaha wa yoowo. 
SongOfSongs5:5 Kaavenya weera kimuhulele nsele; matataaka yaavuuva emira*, ikathasaka saattonya emira* vakhatoni ya nampattika." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Kaahula, mene oosiveleyaaka aapwaha; oosiveleyaaka aattimula. Kaathananaxa woottimulaniwawe! Kaamwaasaasa, mene nkaamphwannye. Miyo kaamwiitthana, mene owo khaakhunle." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Anamalipelela yaakikumanano yeetteettaka musidadeni. Yaakimana, yaakivulaliha; yaakuxa mukaandyowaaka, aani anamalipelela awo a ixiri!" 
SongOfSongs5:8 Ii! Asithiyana a oYerusaleemu, Miyo kinoodyoonttelelani: mwamphwanya oosiveleyaaka, mmunleeleni? Munleele weera, kimvoreiwa osivela." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Ohiyanne hai eriyari ya oosiveleyaanyu ni akhalaru mukina, Ii! Nyuwo ooreeraxa a asithiyana ootheene? Ohiyanne hai eriyari ya oosiveleyaanyu ni akhalaru mukina, mpaka nyuwo munninyesererihaanyu yoororomeliha ela?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Oosiveleyaaka ti ooreera ni exapalaawe yooxeera, tivawo ohintikinsaawe eriyari ya atthu macira macireene muloko." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Murwaawe ori ntoko eyuuma yoorikaxa, aani eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera; mayihaawe aniinihiwa ni ooriipa ntoko mapururu a nakhuku." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Maithwaawe ari ntoko ikhunda muxerexere nxaapwa na maahi, erapihiweene munkakani, ereerihiweene ntoko maluku oowaaraxa." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Ekhovaawe eri ntoko nttimbe ni itthu sooreerela simvuuva makhura oowunkhelaxa. Iyanosawe siri ntoko ithutu sinttonya emira*. 
SongOfSongs5:14 Nyoonosawe ti soovilikeya sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ahuruweliweeneno krisolito*. Eyitikilaawe eri ntoko maino a etthepo ooratteliwa ephwaneliheriweene maluku a safira*. 
SongOfSongs5:15 Nyettosawe, ti amarimbu a maramore*, silipiheriweeneno mikoomba sa eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreera. Ekhalelowaawe eri ntoko Libanu; owo ti ooreera ntoko nyiri sooreerela sa isidari* sa Libanu." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Eyanowaawe ti yoocoocowa; owo ti oohaaweleyaxa. Owo ti oosiveleyaaka, owo nthamwenaaka, Ii! Asithiyana a oYerusaleemu." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Okenle woowi oosiveleyaanyu, nyuwo ooreeraxa a asithiyana? Munileele okenlaawewo oosiveleyaanyu ni hiyo nnoomwaasa vamoha ni nyuwo." 
SongOfSongs6:2 Oosiveleyaaka okenle ottimbeniwawe, omikhutuni wa soosivasiva, weera awehawehe ni avurule ithutu." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Miyo ti a oosiveleyaaka, ni oosiveleyaaka, ti awaka; owo ongwehaweha eriyari ya ithutu." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Oosiveleyaaka, nyuwo ti ooreera ntoko oTireza, ni oophwaneliwa ntoko oYerusaleemu, oovuwiheya ntoko anakhotto ni ibandeirasaya." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Mukihuluwe, niwoko owehawanyu onookitutha. Mayihaanyu ari ntoko muhuwo wa ipuri sinrweela oGiliyade." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Mainowaanyu ari ntoko muhuwo wa ikhondoolo singweela onkatthiwa. Khula muhuwo oneetta piili piili, kheewoworu ehikhanle ni axaana." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Mphatamaarumwanyu ori wiithela wa eluttu onlikana ni ekapatthi ya yoowiima ya eromazera*. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Naari ekhanleene mapwiyamwene miloko mithannamosa, ni axaaseeta miloko mithannamiraru, ni waatta woohaalikeleya wa asimwali oowiikosoopa," 
SongOfSongs6:9 hata hiiho owo ti mmoharu, ekhundaaka, ookwanelaaka! Owo ti mwaana muthiyana oohaaweleyaxa a amayawe, aani oosiveleyaxa a yaale amuyanre. Asimwali akina aamoona, enamuttottopela; mapwiyamwene ni axaaseeta, annimuttapahera." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Taani yoola onkhumelela ntoko ekamaama ya oxa, omphwaneliwa ntoko mweeri, ontutha ntoko nsuwa, ootikhiniheya ntoko ithenyeeri mphironimwaya?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Koorowa moothakoni wa inogeira, weera koonewo iphuwela sa mureyareyani ni weera koone ivideira saaphuwaleene ni irooma* saattuvaleene." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Kihinaaye osuwela, koonnewene kireene eriyari ya ikaaro sa emwene sa mulokwaaka." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Muhokolowe, muhokolowe, Muxulami; muhokolowe, muhokolowe weera niwooneeni. Heeni mummoonaanyu ookwanela owo ntoko aareene wiina wa oManahayimi?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Moota sireenraaya inaawosawe, siwanreene ikwakwaatta, ii! Mwaana muthiyana a mwaana mulopwana a mwene! Ottiminuwa wa eyuunuwaanyu, ori ntoko axiveeve, oopakiwa ni matata a namaratta." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Mutekhwaanyu ti ekoomixi yoovilikeya ehinthowaayamo eviinyu yoosivaxa. Eyuunuwaanyu ti etrigu yoowuukeliwa ericiweene ithutu sooreera. 
SongOfSongs7:3 Mapelaanyu ari ntoko axaana eeli a naahe, aani maphapo a naahe." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Nxikonanyu nri ntoko etoore* ya maino a etthepo. Maithwaanyu ari ntoko vankatthiwa wa oHexeboni, vamulako wa oBate–Rabimi. Ephulaanyu eri ntoko etoore* ya oLibanu ewenghe oDamasku." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Murwaanyu ori woovuwiheya ntoko mwaako Karameli. Otaphuwa wa mayihaanyu atthaveliwe moota wa emwene; mwene oovareya mmattuuttonimwawe. 
SongOfSongs7:6 Moota mphwaneliwaanyu! Moota munkisivelihaanyu! Ii!, oosiveleyaaka ni moota musareiyaanyu osiveliha!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Ekhalelowaanyu eri ntoko nivare, ni mapelaanyu ntoko ikhuce sa soowiima." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Miyo kaaheera: “Kinoowela nivare, kivareleke soowiimasaya.” Mapelaanyu ekhaleke ntoko ikhuce sa iwuuva*, wunkhela wa iphumusanyu ntoko masa." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Eyanowaanyu ekhaleke ntoko eviinyu yooreerelaxa empiluwenle moota wooreerela oosiveleyaaka, ekhwalalelaka iyano ni maino." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Miyo ti a oosiveleyaaka, ni owo onkihaawela miyo." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Murwe, oosiveleyaaka, nrowe mmittettheni, nivirihe ohiyu mmuttettheni." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Nipeherere orowa omatta wa iwuuva* weera noone ivideira saaphuwaleene, ithutusaya saathapurungweene ni irooma* saattuvaleene; wu miyo kinimoovahani osivelawaka." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Imadragora* sinaandyeera wunkhelawaya, ni vamulakwaahu wookhalano moota wootheene wa soowiima sooreera, soowuuma ni sooriirela, koothokororenlaakani nyuwo, oosiveleyaaka." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Ii! Kaatthunaxa weera mwaari munnaka, aamwihiwe mmapeleni mwa amayaka! Vano miyo koophwannyeni vaate, kaamoobeecani, ni khaawo yeera ekinyoose." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Miyo kaamookuxani kooruuhekeni vaate wa amayaka – yaale akixuttinghe. Kaamoovahani eviinyu yoosivaxa owura, soocoocowa sa iroomasaka*." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Moonowaawe woothiyana, onkhala waamuruwaka, ni moonowawe woolopwana, onkikhubaara." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Asithiyana a oYerusaleemu, miyo kinoodyoonttelelani mwa anaahe ni ikorsa sa ntuphini: muhivenye mukhoveni hata muhitannye osivela ehuhuwaaya ehinaaye." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Taani onrwa awelaka wookhuma munikareni, akhaviheriwaka ni oosiveleyaawe? Vathi wa mwiri wa imasa miyo kaahoovenxani mukhoveni; weiwo amayinyu yooyanreni, iwe yaale yaahaawa ovoreya wa oyara, yaahooyarani." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Mukikhalihe ntoko ewalelo* ya vamurimaniwanyu; ntoko ewalelo* mmoononimwanyu; niwoko osivela ti woolipaxa ntoko okhwa, ni ehacaaya ti yoohikota ntoko ovithiwa. Makhalaaya ti mooro woopatta, aani malumi a mooro woovarelaxa." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Hata maahi mancipale khaangwera ocipiha osivela; nyooloko khasingwera okumburula. Mukina avaha mihakhu sootheene sa vaatevawe weera aphwanye osivela, onoonyoosiwa moota woomalela." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Nookhalano murokorihu, mapelaawe nlelo khaanaaye wunnuwa. Nnipakeni ni murokorihu, vanihukuni aneeraawe uuriwe?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Owo aari exiri, naamuteka vasuluwawe etoore* ya eparatha*. Owo aari mulako, hiyo naamulipiherano itthaabwa sa nyiri sa esidari*." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Miyo ti exiri, ni mapelaaka ari ntoko itoore*. Hiiho, oosiveleyaaka aakiwehaka, onoosiveleya." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Salomoni aakhalano ematta ya iwuuva* oBahali–Hamoni; owo oowoolihiha atthu akina weera elimeke. Khula mutthu, waatthuneya omuliva ixekeli* macira muloko sa eparatha* wa soowiima sa mwemmwe." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Vaheera wa emattaaka ya iwuuva* – ti yawakaxa; Ixekeli* macira muloko sa eparatha* ti sawinyu, Salomoni, ni ixekeli* macira meeli sa eparatha* ti sa yaale yaawehaweha soowiimasaya." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Nyuwo munkhala mmattimbeni, asinthamwene antthuna wiiwa nsunanyu; mukihiye kiiwetho!" 
SongOfSongs8:14 Murwe woowaakuveya, oosiveleyaaka, ni mukhale ntoko naahe hoye hoye ntoko napunci a naahe mmanyaakoni moosareya soosivasiva." 
Isaiah1:1 Moonelo mwaha wa oYuda ni oYerusaleemu Yesaya, mwaana mulopwana a Amozi aaraaweno, moolamulani mwa Uziya, Yotami, Ahazi ni Hezekiya, mamwene a oYuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Mwiiwe wiirimu; ngwiriyane elapo ya vathi, niwoko Yave eenre: “Miyo kohaapattuxa anamwane kinawunnuwiha, mene awosa aakirukunuwela." 
Isaiah1:3 Emombe elopwana yoomusuwela pwiiyaaya ni buuru oosuwela nikhoola na pwiiyaawe, vaheera aYixrayeli khaasuwenle etthu; mulokwaaka khooniiwexexa.”" 
Isaiah1:4 Ii!, muloko woottheka, ekhapira elemelingwe sootakhala, nakupa a anyali; anamwane avaheriwe ohitteela! Awosa aamuhiya Yave; aamuramusa Ootteela a oYixrayeli, emukhoottaka Yoowo." 
Isaiah1:5 Ontthunela heeni opwaherera ottaruxiwa? Munnyesererelani ovaanya? Muruwaanyu wootheene ori makhwattaru ni murimaanyu wootheene woovoreyeya. 
Isaiah1:6 Erutthu yootheene khoowowo ori vakumi – paahi makwattharu, ovoreyeya ni anantthweenye – ahilamihiwe naari ahitthukiweru ni algadura hata ahikurunuxiwe ni makhura." 
Isaiah1:7 elapwaanyu yoophwatiwa; isidadesanyu soohisiwa ni mooro; imattasanyu soohuhuliwa ni anamarwa vamaithoniwanyu; siphwatiwaka ntoko sinkuxiwaaya ni anamarwa. 
Isaiah1:8 Ohanle paahi mwaana muthiyana a oSiyoni ntoko nipuro nootthawela mmatta mwa eviinyu, ntoko yoowaakiha mmatta mwa mwiirukule ni ntoko esidade yooriciwa." 
Isaiah1:9 Yave a ikuru sootheene ahaawuurenle akina akina a hiyo, saano nipakeiyeene ntoko oSodoma ni oGomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Mwiiwe masu a Yave nyuwosa anamalamula a oSodoma; ngwiriyane Nlamulo na Muluku, nyuwosa amaki a oGomora." 
Isaiah1:11 Yave oneera: “Sooveleelasanyu soowaatta nkipwattha. Miyo kookhalano sooveleela soohisa soopwahaxa sa anapunci ni sa makhura a axaana a imombe. Ephome ya imombe ilopwana, iputtiputthi ni ipuri kheekihakalaliha." 
Isaiah1:12 Nyuwosa mwaarwaaka wa Miyo vano taani aweerenleni weera munyikale mapuwaaka? 
Isaiah1:13 Muhiyerere okiruuhela sooveleela soohimuteko. Erubanaanyu ti ya mwiikho wa Miyo. Nyeeri sinyowani, iSaabadu ni mithukumano – nkingwera ovilela iyo soosareya soonanara!" 
Isaiah1:14 Kinthanyaxa ifestasanyu sa nyeeri sinyowani ni sa sikina; seiyo soothatuwa soolemela wa Miyo. Nkingwera ovilelatho. 
Isaiah1:15 Mwaatheteyaka matata mmavekeloni, kinimoohuluwani. Naari mwaandyeeraka mavekelowaanyu, nkiniiwa. Matataanyu aasareya ephome." 
Isaiah1:16 Mwiirapihe ni mwiitteelihe. Mvenxeke mitekosanyu soohitteela vamaithoniwaka! Muhiyerere opaka yoonanara," 
Isaiah1:17 muxuttere opaka yooreera, mwaasaase ekhaikhai, mmalihe nihasu. Ngwanele soophwanela sa akwaasuni ni mwaakihe mulattu wa asinaamukhweli.”" 
Isaiah1:18 Yave oneera: “Ngwe, nuulume mulattu ola. Naari sootthekasanyu siriipaleene phii, nsikhale sootteela ntoko ephepa; naari sixeeraleene zuu, sinootteela ntoko etthabwe." 
Isaiah1:19 Nyuwosa mwakhala oolikaneene wiiwelela, munimooca soowiima sooreerela sa elapo ela;" 
Isaiah1:20 Vaheera mwakhootta munavaanya, munoonyaanyiwa ni ekatana.” Vano eyano ya Yave ti yeenre yeeyo." 
Isaiah1:21 Moone esidade yoororomeleya ethatungwaaya puuta. Khalayi yaasareya ekhaikhai emakiwaka ni wookoleleya, mene vano yoosareya anamwiiva!" 
Isaiah1:22 Eparathaanyu* yoothatuwa ikokhola ni eviinyuwaanyu yooreera yoothatuwa arekha. 
Isaiah1:23 Anamalamulaanyu ari anamavaanya aneetta vamoha ni anamwiiya; awosa ootheene ansivela makhwankwa yaasaasaka soovahiwa. Awosa khaanaakiha soophwanela sa akwaasuni ni khaanaasaasa osuwela mulattu wa asinaamukhweli. 
Isaiah1:24 Tivawo, muneene Yave a ikuru sootheene, Ooweraxa a oYixrayeli onlaleiyaawe: “Ii! Kinimwaapattihera isara awananaaka ni kinoowiinlela ikukuttula amwiittanaaka." 
Isaiah1:25 Kinimootheteelani ntata; kinoovenxa soohitteelasanyu, kisusihaka sootheene siri soonanara mwa nyuwo." 
Isaiah1:26 Kinimoovahanitho aphuki ntoko a khalayi ni anamalaka ntoko yaaraaya ompacereroni. Vahoolowaya muniimwiitthaniwa Esidade ya Ekhaikhai, Esidade Yoororomeleya.”" 
Isaiah1:27 oSiyoni onoovuluxeya mweekhaikhaiyini ni yaale oorukunxa murima ni oororomeleya. 
Isaiah1:28 Vaheera anamavaanya ni anamattheka anoophwatiwa ni yaawo animuhiya Yave anooriheya. 
Isaiah1:29 “Munimuulihiheya muru niwoko na nyiri sa ikarivalyu* sootteeliheriwa muntthunaanyuxa; munooyevihaxiwa niwoko na mattimbe muthanlalaanyu. 
Isaiah1:30 Munookhala ntoko mwiri wa ekarivalyu* yoomora makukhu, ni ntoko nttimbe noohikhalano maahi." 
Isaiah1:31 Mulopwana oowera onoothatuwa imbarumbaru ni mutekwaawe ntoko maaceeso; owo onoohisa vamoha ni mutekwaawe, ahikhalakaru oocipiha.”" 
Isaiah2:1 Yeeyo Yesaya, mwaana mulopwana a Amozi oonnaawe mwaha wa oYuda ni oYerusaleemu yaari ti ela:" 
Isaiah2:2 Mmahukuni ookisera mwaako wa Empa ya Yave onimunnuwihiwa; onookhalihiwa mutokweene a mattumuxa ni miloko sootheene sinoorowa wa yoowo. 
Isaiah2:3 Miloko sincipale sinimoowa seereke: “Nrowe, nawele mwaako wa Yave, wa Empa ya Muluku a Yakobe weera Owo anixuttihe iphirosawe ni hiiho nnimweetta mootthunanimwawe.” Vano Nlamulo nnookhuma oSiyoni ni masu a Yave oYerusaleemu." 
Isaiah2:4 Owo onoothoriha eriyari ya miloko ni onimuuluma minyakunyaku sa miloko sincipale. Awosa anootatuxa ikatanasaya ixaruwa ni mavakaaya icikwaakhwa. Muloko mmoha khookuxaru ikapwitthi soowanelano muloko mukina hata khasiirehererelatho owana. 
Isaiah2:5 Ii!, ekhapira ya Yakobe, nrowe neetteke ngwaarani mwa Yave!" 
Isaiah2:6 Moohiya mulokwaanyu – emusi ya Yakobe. Iyo soosareya ni ikhovelelo sa miloko sa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, sinaahera ihako, saattharaka aFilisti ni singwiiraanano amalapo." 
Isaiah2:7 Elapo yoosareya eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa ni mihakhusaya soowaattaxa; elapo yoosareya ikavalu* ni ikaarosaya sa ikavalu* khasinaalikeleya. 
Isaiah2:8 Elapwaaya yoosareya miluku soowootha; awosa anlapa miteko sa matataaya – seiyo apankaaya. 
Isaiah2:9 Tivawo omutthu oneeraaya oveiheya ni oyevihiwa; muhaalevelele yaawosa. 
Isaiah2:10 Mvolowe munikhukuni; mwiipithe vatthayani mwa soowoopiha sa Yave ni waara wa otokweenaawe! 
Isaiah2:11 Maitho a oowiixoona anooyevihiwa ni wiikuxa wa atthu onooveiheya. Yave paahi ti anaavuwihiwe nihuku nenenenno. 
Isaiah2:12 Yave a ikuru sootheene oothanla nihukunawe wa anamwiixoona ni anamwiikuxa ootheene – aani ootheene oovuwihiwa – ni awosa anooyevihiwa. 
Isaiah2:13 Yave ookhalano nihuku wa esedari* yootheene a oLibanu – yoorakameleya ni yoowiikuxerera, nitho nyiri sa ekaravalyu* sootheene sa oBaxani," 
Isaiah2:14 wa nyaako soorakamelaxa sootheene ni mattumuxa oorakamela ootheene," 
Isaiah2:15 wa khula etoore* yoorakamela ni exiri yoolipihiwaxa," 
Isaiah2:16 wa khula nikula ntokotoko na nakoso ni khula nikula nooreeraxa. 
Isaiah2:17 Wiikuxa wa omutthu onooveiheya ni wiixoonawaya onooyevihiwa. Yave paahi ti anaavuwihiwe nihuku nenenenno 
Isaiah2:18 ni miluku soowootha sinoolakaseya woomalela. 
Isaiah2:19 Atthu anootthawela munikhukuni vamwala ni munyattani niwoko na woopiha wa Yave ni waara wa otokweenaawe, Owo aavenyeraka otatha etthaya." 
Isaiah2:20 Nihuku nenenenno atthu anoorihela mmakhuleni ni mwaanaantuuthuni milukusaya soowootha sa eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa, mwa seiye apankaaya weera elape." 
Isaiah2:21 Atthu anootthawela munikhukuni vamwala ni munyattani niwoko na woopiha wa Yave ni waara wa otokweenaawe, Owo aavenyeraka otatha etthaya." 
Isaiah2:22 Muhimuroromele mutthu mwa yoowo okumaawe onlikana ni iphumu mphulanimwaya! Otthuneiye mootani? 
Isaiah3:1 Moone, Namalamula, Yave a ikuru sootheene onoovenxa woowaakuveya mwa oYerusaleemu ni oYuda sooreelasaya ni ekhaviherowaaya yootheene, mpaka waatta wa yooca ni maahi." 
Isaiah3:2 Aani, onoomvenxa nakhotto oottittimiheyaxa ni namawanaxa; mphuki ni mprofeeti, nahako ni mutokweene," 
Isaiah3:3 namalamula a anakhotto miloko mithanu ni neethi, namalaka ni muratti vamoha ni namadyiini." 
Isaiah3:4 Kinimwaakhaliha amiravo ntoko asitokoweenaaya; aani anamwane animwaalamula yaawosa. 
Isaiah3:5 Muloko onoohooxana – asilopwana asilopwanaru, khula mutthu ni mwaattamanaawe. Amiravo animwaahasula anamuuluvala, ooveihereya ni maneethi." 
Isaiah3:6 Mulopwana mmooha onoomvara munneiye, mmusi a atithawe, amweerelaka: “Naari nyuwo mookhalano mukaandyo – mukhaleke muhooleelaahu; mulamulele ittuxo iya!”" 
Isaiah3:7 Vaheera vanihukuni nenenenno owo onookhuwela: “Nkinonoru mirette! Owannyaka kheewowo yooca hata yoowara; muhikikhalihe muhooleli a muloko.” 
Isaiah3:8 oYerusaleemu onooveveleya; oYuda ohanle vakhaani omora; maswaaya ni mitekosaya nsiniiwanana ni Yave, siramusaka okhalawawe woovuwa." 
Isaiah3:9 Maweherowaaya ammwiixoothera; awosa anoonihera yootthekaaya mwaatthuni ntoko oSodoma; ootakhaliwa yaale! Niwoko aahiiruuhela erisa asineenaaya. 
Isaiah3:10 Mwaaleele oororomeleya weera sootheene sinooweettela nnene, niwoko animooca soowiima sa mitekosaya soororomeleya." 
Isaiah3:11 Ii! Wa atakhali! Nttaruxo nohaaphiyera! Awosa animwaakhela ntthuvelo na seiye matataaya apankaaya. 
Isaiah3:12 Amiravo anghasula mulokwaaka; asithiyana anlamula yoowo. Ii! Mulokwaaka yaale anoohoolelani annoolokotthani ni anoohapuxani mphironi. 
Isaiah3:13 Yave onkilaathi vanipuroniwawe na nthorihelo; Owo oovenyera weera athorihe miloko. 
Isaiah3:14 Yave oopacera waathoriha asitokweene ni ahooleli a mulokwaawe: “Ti nyuwosa munanaringhe emattaaka ya iwuuva*; soohuhula sa oohaawa siri mpaanimwanyu. 
Isaiah3:15 Enoohaaxihani eheeni mulokwaaka, muupuruxelaka vathi ikhove sa oothoiwa?” onkoha Yave, Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Isaiah3:16 Yave oneera: “Ngwoone asithiyana a oSiyoni moota aniivuwihaaya! Ankottola nyuru, angweha ehuuliwaka muru, yeettaka murima murima, mmettonimwaya orumaka ngilingili." 
Isaiah3:17 Tivawo Yave aneeraawe aametthe asithiyana a oSiyoni; awosa anookhala miputuru oowuulihiheyeene muru.” 
Isaiah3:18 Vanihukuni nenenenno Yave onoowaakha soowiiphwaneliherasaya sootheene: ipangiiri, sootthukela muru ni mikuhu," 
Isaiah3:19 axiveeve, ipangiiri ni ikuwo soowooneela soowiikhuneela owiitho," 
Isaiah3:20 soowara sa mmuru, soophwaneliha munaawoni, alaamba, axikaaxa sa makhura oowunkhela ni mapaatiri," 
Isaiah3:21 annela ni icipini; 
Isaiah3:22 soowara sooreeraxa, mikaandyo, misako ni mahottha," 
Isaiah3:23 iloola ni soowara sa eliinyu*, icireemba ni sootthukela muxiko." 
Isaiah3:24 Ohiya wunkhela onuukhale wunkha; omuhiya laamba onuukhale, mukhoyi; ohiya otthaveliwa mayihi oophwaneliwa, onuukhale mputu; ohiya ikuwo soowaaraxa, nsikhale isaakho; ohiya ophwaneliwa, eniikhale mapharima oowoopiha." 
Isaiah3:25 Asilopwanaanyu animwiiviwa ni ekatana ni anakhottwaanyu anookhwela mukhottoni. 
Isaiah3:26 Milako sa oSiyoni sinoolalamika sithananelaka seiyo; esidade enookilaathi woohikhalano etthu. 
Isaiah4:1 Vanihukuni nenenenno asithiyana athanneeli anoomvara mulopwana mmoha emweerelaka: “Yooheene nnimwiisaasera yoocaahu ni soowarasahu; mwaase onithela ni munitapuxe wuulihiwa muru niwoko na othupa!” 
Isaiah4:2 Vanihukuni nenenenno ephandi ya Yave eniikhale yooreeraxa ni yoovuwaxa ni soowiima sa elapo nsikhale ovuwa ni nttittimiho na yaawo eniihalahale oYixrayeli. 
Isaiah4:3 Yaale eneera ehale oSiyoni, enakhala oYerusaleemu animwiitthaniwa ootteela: ootheene alepeliwe weera emake oYerusaleemu." 
Isaiah4:4 Yave onoorapiha ohitteela wa asithiyana a oSiyoni; onootteeliha ephome eyeehiwe oYerusaleemu ni munepa wa othoriha ni wa mooro. 
Isaiah4:5 Vano Yave onoohela omwaako Siyoni wootheene ni wa ootheene eniithukumanewo nihutte na othana ni waara wa mooro ohiyu; ovuwa onuukuttelele sootheene. 
Isaiah4:6 Iwo onuukhale yoowaakiha ni munttuusi wa oviha wa othana; wootthawelamo woowiipitha mwaha wa ettheku ni epula. 
Isaiah5:1 Kinoomwiipela oosiveleyaaka mwaha wa emattaawe ya iwuuva*: Oosiveleyaaka aakhalano ematta ya iwuuva* mukerekhere nttumuxa na ethaadyira. 
Isaiah5:2 Owo aapatthula, anavenxa maluku ootheene, anaphatteya iwuuva* sooreerelaxa. Aateka etoore* ya namalipelela, anatekatho nipuro sinaameliwa iwuuva*. Vano aaweherera ohepha iwuuva* sooreeraxa, vaheera ematta yaaruwenre soonyuunya paahi." 
Isaiah5:3 “Vano, nyuwo amaki a oYerusaleemu ni asilopwana a oYuda, muthorihe variyari wa Miyo ni emattaaka ya iwuuva*." 
Isaiah5:4 Kaahipakele eheenitho yeela kaahaapankaaka? Vano siimenleni soonyuunya kaaweherereene sooreera? 
Isaiah5:5 Vano kinimoothaliherani yeeyo kineeraaka kipakele emattaaka ya iwuuva*: Kinookurumula mukuswaaya weera eyo ethatuwe moocihamo; kinoophwata exiraaya weera enyikalasiwe. 
Isaiah5:6 Kinootatuxa nthala; khaniseekeliwa naari khoolimmwamo; onimunnuwamo rupulula ni nyiiwa. Kinoolamulela mahutte weera ehirupihelemo epula.” 
Isaiah5:7 Ematta ya iwuuva* ya Yave a ikuru sootheene ti ekhapira ya Yixrayeli ni asilopwana a oYuda ti nttimbe Owo aasivelaawe. Owo aaweherera ekhaikhai, mene oona oyeehiwa wa ephome; aasaasa wookoleleya, mene iiwale sookhuwela sa ohasula." 
Isaiah5:8 Ii! Munoohaawa nyuwo munkhalano impa soowaatta, nyuwosa munaandyeerera mapuro mpaka ohiphwanyaneya nipuro na mukina ni nyuwosa asineenaanyu munkhala ntoko muneene a sootheene." 
Isaiah5:9 Yave a ikuru sootheene aakeerela: “Vekhaikhai, impa sincipale sinoothaamiwa; impasene sooreera ni sitokotoko khasikhaliwa." 
Isaiah5:10 Ematta ya mikwara muloko enooruwera iliitru* miloko miili ni piili sa eviinyu paahi ni ikiilu* macira meeli ni miloko miili sa mmiso sinooruwera ikiilu* miloko miili ni piili sa etrigu paahi.” 
Isaiah5:11 Ii! Munoohaawa nyuwosa mumpeherera ovenya weera muhapaliwe, nyuwosa mumpwaherera owura mpaka ohiyu." 
Isaiah5:12 Ofestaniwaya ankhalano amakita, atthakare, akarakaxa, ampetta ni eviinyu. Vaheera khaampwattha miteko sa Yave, ehittittimihaka soopaka sa matataawe." 
Isaiah5:13 Tivawo mulokwaaka onroihiwaaya wootthukiwani niwoko na ohiiwexexawaya; maneethaaya animookhwa etala ni ancipalaaya anoovolaxiwa ntthona. 
Isaiah5:14 Tivawo okhwa onaandyeereraaya ohaawelawaya ohulaka eyanowaaya. Mmwaanomwaya anoolakaseelamo maneethaaya ni ancipalaaya vamoha ni atakhalaaya ni anamawuraaya. 
Isaiah5:15 Hiiho mutthu onoonyokiwa ni omutthu onooyevihiwa; oowiixoona anookurunuxiwa. 
Isaiah5:16 Vaheera Yave a ikuru sootheene onoovuwihiwa mweekhaikhaiyinimwawe ni Muluku Ootteela onimwiixoonihera Ootteela moororomeleyanimwawe. 
Isaiah5:17 Vano ikhondoolo nsiceeke mwemmo ntoko moocamwaya; iputtiputthi nsiceeke mmathalani mwa anamapuha. 
Isaiah5:18 Ii! Anoohaawa yaale ampurula sootthekasaya ni mikhoyi sa olokottha ni soonanarasaya ni efiiyu ya ekaaro eneettihiwa ni emombe; 
Isaiah5:19 yaale aneera: “Muluku aakuvihe ovara mutekwaawe weera hiyo noone; ekwanihereye yoovaanela ya Ootteela a oYixrayeli weera nisuwele.” 
Isaiah5:20 Ii! Anoohaawa yaale aneerela yoonanara yooreera ni yooreera yoonanara, yaale aneerela epiphi waara ni waara epiphi, yoowaawa yoocoocowa ni yoocoocowa yoowaawa." 
Isaiah5:21 Ii! Anoohaawa yaale anuupuwela weera ari asuweli, yaale aniixeerela anamiruku." 
Isaiah5:22 Ii! Anoohaawa yaale ari asimwaneene owura eviinyu ni anamawera ophuka soowura; 
Isaiah5:23 yaale anaakhela makhwankwa emukuttelelaka nanthowa, vaheera ankhootta ekhaikhai wa oohinthowa." 
Isaiah5:24 Tivawo, mooteene yoowo malumi a mooro anghisaaya makayawaya ni munyepu woowuuma onghisiwaaya mmalumini a mooro, hiihotho mikwankhwaarisaya sinimuntta ni ithutusaya sinoovavihiwa ntoko ntthupi, niwoko awosa aakhootta Nlamulo na Yave ni aaramusa masu a Ootteela a aYixrayeli." 
Isaiah5:25 Mwaha wa sootheene iya isara sa Yave soopattela mulokwaawe; Owo ootheteya ntatanawe weera avulalihe. Nyaako sootetereya ni mittembosaya siri ntoko ikokhola mmiseweni. Hata hiiho isarasawe khasimmala; ntatanawe nri etheteeliwo. 
Isaiah5:26 Owo oneemexa eneneero wa miloko sa ottai; ongwoopela muturi yaale a ekotenle elapo. Moone, angwa vale woowaakuveyaxa!" 
Isaiah5:27 Khawoworu a yaale onkhulumuwa hata ontuthunya; khawoworu a yaale onuuseela naari onkona; khawoworu onimmolomondola laambaawe hata ontaphula miramba sa ikwakwaattasawe. 
Isaiah5:28 Nyuupasaya siri soowiitha ni nyuura sootheene siri sootupa; mapita a ikavalusaya* ari oolipa ntoko maluku ni mareko a ikaarosaya ntoko eyuupuru. 
Isaiah5:29 Murikaaya onlikana ni wa mwatto; anoopa murika ntoko amwatto oovara; antturuma evanreene yaatthunaaya, enapurula ahikhalaka oowaakihera." 
Isaiah5:30 Nihuku nenenenno awosa anootturumela oYuda ntoko oruma wa ephareiya. Mukina aweha elapo ya oYixrayeli, onimoona epiphi ni othanana; mpaka waara wa othana onimwiilihiwa ni mahutte." 
Isaiah6:1 Vayaakhani aakhwiiyaawe mwene Uziya, miyo kaamoona Yave akilaantheene vahiceni ya emwene – osulusulu ni oovuwihiweene, ni maleembe a mukaandyowaawe yaasarasara Mpaani mwa Muluku." 
Isaiah6:2 Vasuluwawe yaakhala aserafi* – khula serafi* aarino mapupha mathannamosa; meeli yaakhuneela ekhove; meeli makinaawo yaakhuneela inaawo ni meeli makinaawotho yaamvavano. 
Isaiah6:3 Awosa yaamukhuwelelana, yeeraka: “Ootteela, ootteela, ootteela ti Yave a ikuru sootheene; elapo yootheene yoosareya ovuwawawe.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Wa oruma wa maswaaya, isereemu sa masele saattikinyeya ni Empa ya Muluku yaasareya mwiixi." 
Isaiah6:5 Kaakhuwela: “Maayi miyo! Miyo kooriheya! Niwoko kiri mutthu a eyano yoohitteela ni kinkhala variyari wa muloko wa iyano soohitteela, ni vano maithwaaka aamoona Mwene, Yave a ikuru sootheene!”" 
Isaiah6:6 Vano mmoha a aserafi* aavava mpaka kaaraakawo, akunxeene nikhala na mooro, mwa nenne aavenxalaawe valtaarini* apampeene." 
Isaiah6:7 Aatavano eyanowaaka, anakeerela: “Moone, nna nootava eyanowaanyu; nthowananyu noovenxiwa ni sootthekasanyu sooleveleliwa.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Vano kaahiiwa nsu na Yave, akohaka: “Kimurume taani? Taani anaarowe wa Hiyo?” Vanonto miyo keenre: “Miyo va. Mukirumihe.”" 
Isaiah6:9 Owo aakeerela: “Murowe ni mwaleele muloko owo: ‘wiiwa munimwiiwa, mene khamwiiwexexa; woona munimoona, mene khamusuwela.’" 
Isaiah6:10 Muumihe mirima sa muloko owo; mwaattiyanihe maaruwaaya ni mwaawale maithwaaya. Mwaahipaka yeeyo, owo onimoona ni maithowaaya, onimwiiwa ni maaruwaaya ni onimwiiwexexa ni mirimasaya, ni vano onoorukunuwa ni onoolamihiwa.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Vano miyo kaamukoha: “Ii! Yave, mpaka yaakhani?” Ni Owo aakaakhula: “Mpaka isidade sineeraaya siheleye nthala woohimakiwamo, mpaka impa othaamiwa ni imatta oheleya nthala woomalela," 
Isaiah6:12 mpaka Yave aneeraawe aarumihele ootheene ottai ni elapo ohala meekhaaya ttewu. 
Isaiah6:13 Hata mpatta wanaamuloko ohalaka mweelaponi, awotho anoophwatiwa. Vaheera ntoko mwiri wa ekaravalyu* onuuhiwaaya onahala nikottoru, hiiho mmiso wootteela onuukhale nikotto noohala oYixrayeli.”" 
Isaiah7:1 Vano Ahazi, mwaana mulopwana a Yotami, mwaana mulopwana a Uziya, aaraawe mwene a oYuda, mwene Rezini a awArami ni Peka, mwaana mulopwana a Remaliya, mwene a oYixrayeli yaarowa weera ewaneno oYerusaleemu, mene khayaawenre owina." 
Isaiah7:2 Vano mwene aaleeliwa: “awArami aawiiraanano awEfrayimi.” Hiiho murima wa Ahazi ni mulokwaawe waathukumela, ntoko nyiri sa moothakoni siniinihiwaaya ni epheyo." 
Isaiah7:3 Vano Yave aamweerela Yesaya: “Murowe nyuwo ni mwaninyu mulopwana, Xeyari-Yaxubi, ni mwamukumaneno Ahazi vayiikalaandeni a vanrattani na osulu, mmuseweni onkela wa Ematta ya Namakattha." 
Isaiah7:4 Mwamuleele: ‘Mwiipasoope, mwiimaalihe ni muhoove. Muhiporore niwoko na ikhuuni piili iya sintthuwa mwiixi – niwoko na isara sa Rezini ni Arami ni sa mwaana mulopwana a Remaliya." 
Isaiah7:5 Vano Arami, Efrayimi ni mwaana mulopwana a Remaliya aavaanelela ophwatiwawanyu, yeeraka:" 
Isaiah7:6 “Nivoloweke oYuda, niphwateke ni nikawaneke variyariwahu ni nimukhaliheke mwaana mulopwana a Tabeheli mwene a elapo eyo.” Yave onlamula soothesene oneera ha: “Khookhala hiiho.”" 
Isaiah7:7 Wa soothesene, eyo khayeereya," 
Isaiah7:8 niwoko muru wa awArami ti oDamasku ni muru wa oDamasku ti Rezini paahi. Sihivinreene iyaakha miloko mithannamosa ni iyaakha ithanu, awEfrayimi anoophwatiwa moota wooweera khoongwereya opwahereratho ntoko muloko." 
Isaiah7:9 Muru wa Efrayimi ti oSamariya ni muru wa oSamariya ti mwaana mulopwana a Remaliya. Nyuwo mwaahilipa munroromeloni, woohihovela khamulekela.’ ”" 
Isaiah7:10 Yave aamweerelatho Ahazi: 
Isaiah7:11 “Mumvekele Yave Mulukwaanyu eneneero yootikhiniha, ekhaleke yoowiixeraxa naari yoorakamelaxa osulu.”" 
Isaiah7:12 Vaheera Ahazi aamwaakhula: “Nkimvekela; nkirwa kimoota murima Yave.” 
Isaiah7:13 Vanonto, Yesaya aaheera: “Hear Mwiiwe, nyuwo emusi ya Davide. Khawookwanneni waakhulumula atthu? Munimootatho opixa murima wa Mulukwaaka?" 
Isaiah7:14 Tivawo Yave muneene aneeraawe oovaheeni, eneneero: mwaamwali oowiikosoopa onoorupala, amuyareke Mwaana Mulopwana ni onoomutteha Emanuweli." 
Isaiah7:15 Owo onimooca manteeka ni oravo mpaka aneeraawe unnuwe, aweraka othanla yooreera ni yoonanara." 
Isaiah7:16 Vano mwaana owo ahinaaye osuwela othanla yooreera ni yoonanara, ilapo sa mamwene meeli awo munoovaanyu sinooheleya nthala." 
Isaiah7:17 Yave onimooruuhelasani mwene a wAsiriya, wa mulokwaanyu ni emusi ya atithinyu. Eniikhale ehuhu ehitonke okhala mmahukuni a khalayi okhuma wEfrayimi waamwalannaaya ni oYuda.”" 
Isaiah7:18 Vanihukuni nenenenno Yave onimoopa muturi weera awiitthane amukaanga a ottai wa nyooloko sa wExipitu ni oravo wa wAsiriya. 
Isaiah7:19 Sootheene iyo sinimowa seemeleke mphattuwelani moowiixera ni mmakhukuni a vamwala, esareyaka nyiri sa nyiiwa ni mmattankhini moothemwene." 
Isaiah7:20 Vanihukuni nenenenno Yave onoovarela muteko nimettho aneeraawe oolihe okhopela Efratesi – mwene a wAsiriya – weera ametthe mayihaanyu, mapururu a mmettonimwanyu ni irerusanyu." 
Isaiah7:21 Vanihukuni nenenenno mulopwana anaakhaleno emombe ethiyana ni ipuri piili," 
Isaiah7:22 onookhalano manteeka weera ace niwoko na waatta wa mukaka sineeraaya sivahe. Ootheene eniihale mweelaponi animooca manteeka ni oravo. 
Isaiah7:23 Vanihukuni nenenenno mmapuroni moothemwene saaraayamo imatta sa iwuuva* macira miloko a ixekeli* macira muloko a eparatha* onookhala rupulula ni nyiiwa paahi. 
Isaiah7:24 Asilopwana anoovolowano nyuura ni nyuupa niwoko elapo enoosareya rupulula ni nyiiwa. 
Isaiah7:25 Mmattumuxani khalayi waalimmwamo ni ehipa, nyuwo khamunrowatho niwoko na woopiha wa rupulula ni nyiiwa. Mmapuroni mmo imombe sinootaphuwa ni ikhondoolo sinootthimakamo nnenesene." 
Isaiah8:1 Yave aakeerela: “Mukuxe nivali nooreerela ni mwalepemo moota woowiiweya: ‘Maher-Xabali-Haxi-Baze.’ 
Isaiah8:2 Miyo kinoomwiitthana musaserdoti* Uriya ni Zakariya, mwaana mulopwana a Yeberekiya ntoko anamoonaaka oororomeleyaxa.”" 
Isaiah8:3 Vano kaarowa wa mprofeeti muthiyana ni owo aarupala, anamuyara mwaana mulopwana. Vanonto Yave aakeerela: “Munttehe ‘Maher-Xabali-Haxi-Baze.’" 
Isaiah8:4 Mwaana ola ahinaaye osuwela weera ‘tiithi naari’ maayi, mwene a wAsiriya onookuxa mihakhu sa oDamasku ni soohuhula sa oSamariya.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Yave aakeerelatho: 
Isaiah8:6 “Weenre muloko ola okhootta maahi a oXilowa ampiluwaxa ni omuhakalalelaka Rezini ni mwaana mulopwana a Remaliya," 
Isaiah8:7 Yave onimwaaruuhela maahi oowuupaxa a Efratesi – mwene a wAsiriya ni ikurusawe sootheene. Mooloko owo onoosareya mmiroranimwaya moothemwene okhopela ni okhopela 
Isaiah8:8 ni anoomwareela oYuda, emireihaka mpaka muxiko. Mapuphaaya ookungeyeene anookhuneela elapwaanyu yootheene, Emanuweli!”" 
Isaiah8:9 Ii! Nyuwosa miloko, mukhuweleleke ekhotto ni munoophwatasiwa! Mwiiwe nyuwosa ilapo sa ottai. Hata mwiirehererelaka okhottoni munoophwatiwa! Aani, naari mwiirehererelaka owana munoophwatiwa!" 
Isaiah8:10 Naari nyuwosa mpakaka miruku, iyo sinoopupurumiheya; naari mvaanelaka, khasiweettelani nnene, niwoko Muluku ori ni hiyo." 
Isaiah8:11 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, akilipiheraka ni okooperera weera kihitthare ephiro ya muloko ola. Owo aakeerela:" 
Isaiah8:12 “Muhiitthanele ‘yoovaanelela’ sootheene seiyo muloko ola oniitthanaaya ‘yoovaanelela’; muhoove seiyo owo onoovaaya hata muhithukumele. 
Isaiah8:13 Yave a ikuru sootheene ti Yoowo ontthuneya omoonela Ootteela; ti Yoowo ontthuneya omoova ni omuthukumela. 
Isaiah8:14 Wa omwene miili wa oYixrayeli Owo onookhala Nipuro Nootteela*, mene onookhalatho Nluku Nookwattula ni Mwala oowuuwiha. Ni onookhala Ntapha ni Muraakho wa amaki a oYerusaleemu." 
Isaiah8:15 Ancipale a yaale anookwakwathuwa; anoomora ni anookakatthanyiwa; anoopharihiwa munraakhoni evariweke.” 
Isaiah8:16 Muthokorore nnenesene Nlamulo ni mulipihe soolamulasaka eriyari ya oohuseraaka. 
Isaiah8:17 Kinooweherera mwa Yave, mwa Yoowo oniipithihera ekhovaawe ekhapira ya Yakobe. Mwa Yoowo kinoomuroromela." 
Isaiah8:18 Miyo kiri va vamoha ni anamwane Yave okivanghaawe. Hiyo nri ineneero ni icaambulo oYixrayeli sinrweela mpatta wa Yave a ikuru sootheene, mwa Yoowo ommaka vamwaako Siyoni." 
Isaiah8:19 Akhala mukina ongweerelani: “Mwaakohakohe yaale anaahera ihako ni anuuluma ni anamakhwa, yaapaapaka ni yuulumaka muxiirini,” vano khoontthuneya weera muloko omukoherere Mulukwaaya? Munaakohererela heeni anamakhwa ngweerelaka akumi?" 
Isaiah8:20 Vano moone Nlamulo ni ikano sa Yave! Atthu yaahuuluma ntoko masu ala awosa khaanoonatho waara. 
Isaiah8:21 Awosa oothananeene ni oovoliweene anooxoraxora mweelaponi. Yaavoliwaka etala, anoonyoonyiwa ni, yaawehaka osulu, anoomulapha mwenaaya ni Mulukwaaya." 
Isaiah8:22 Vahoolowaya anooweha vathi, yooneke othanana ni epiphi yoowoopiha paahi ni anoovonyeriwa mpiphini moohoonaniwa." 
Isaiah9:1 Wa soothesene, kheekhalatho epiphi wa yaale yaakacamiheiye. Khalayi Owo aayeviha elapo ya Zebuloni ni Nafitali, vaheera muhoolommo Owo onoottittimiha elapo ya oGalileya ya amalapo, musewe wa mphareiya, mukerekhere Yordanu." 
Isaiah9:2 Muloko weetta mpiphini waahoona waara otokotoko; waara waahaamwaleela yaale yaakhala mweelaponi ya munttuusi wa okhwa.
