Isaiah9:3 Nyuwo mohunnuwiha muloko ni mohaandyeerera ohakalalawaya; awosa anghakalala vamaithoniwanyu ntoko atthu anghakalalelaaya ohepha ni ntoko atthu antteeliwaaya ekawanaka soohuhula mukhottoni. 
Isaiah9:4 Vano Nyuwo moopwexa yoolemela yaahasula, etthaabwa enlimano emombe yaari mmakhatanimwaya ekopo yaattaruxelaayano anamahasula, ntoko nihuku na owiniwa wa oMediya." 
Isaiah9:5 Iboota sootheene sa nakhotto singwareliwa mukhottoni ni soowara sootheene soosareya ephome sinoohisiwa ntoko ikhuuni vamooroni. 
Isaiah9:6 Wa hiyo nooyareliwa Mwaana; wa hiyo noovahiwa Mwaana Mulopwana ni olamula ori mmakhatanimwawe. Owo onimwiitthaniwa Namalaka Ooreeraxa, Muluku a ikuruxa, Tiithi Oohimala ni Mutokweene a murettele." 
Isaiah9:7 Olamulawawe ni murettelaawe khoommala. Owo onoolamula vahiceni ya Davide ni wa omwenaawe akhalihaka ni apwahererihaka yoowo ni ororomeleya ni ekhaikhai, okhuma ehuhuweene yeeyo mpaka khalayi. Nthiti na Yave a ikuru sootheene nnooweriha yeeyo." 
Isaiah9:8 Yave oorumihela mutthenga emusi ya Yakobe, mutthenga owo woophiya oYixrayeli." 
Isaiah9:9 Atthu ootheene anoosuwela yeeyo – awErayimi ni amaki a oSamariya, mwa yaawo aneera ni murima woowiixoona ni woowiikuxa:" 
Isaiah9:10 “Indyerwa soomora, mene hiyo nnoorasela ni maluku ookheriwa; nyiri sa efiigu* sohuuhiwa, mene nnoottiyattiyera ni nyiri sa esedari*.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Vaheera Yave aahaalipiha amwiittana a Rezini weera yaawaneno anakhottwaawe ni aahaatannya amwiittanaaya. 
Isaiah9:12 awArami a mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa ni aFilisti a mpatta ninkela nsuwa yaanyaanya woomalela oYixrayeli. Sirookhalaru sootheene iye, isara sa Muluku khasihapungwe ni ntatanawe nri etheteeliwo." 
Isaiah9:13 Vaheera muloko khawaamurukunuwenle Yoowo aavulalinghe, naari khawaamwaanse Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Isaiah9:14 Tivawo Yave aneeraawe akwase oYixrayeli okhuma waamuru mpaka waametto; aani kancesa ni ettheere munihukuni nimoha. 
Isaiah9:15 Asitokweene ni asilopwana oottittimiheyaxa ti muru ni maprofeeti anxuttiha soowootha ti waametto. 
Isaiah9:16 Yaale anghooleliwa a muloko owo annalokottha yoowo ni yaale anghooleeliwa anoothweelelihiwa. 
Isaiah9:17 Tivawo Yave ohinaahakalalelaawe amiravo hata ohinaamorelaawe ikharari akwaasuni naari asinaamukhweli, niwoko ootheene aamurakamela Muluku ni a murima woonanara, anuuluma moota woohiloka. Sirookhalaru sootheene iye, isara sa Muluku khasihapungwe ni ntatanawe nri etheteeliwo." 
Isaiah9:18 Vekhaikhai sootakhala singhisa ntoko mooro; seiyo sinimuhisa rupulula ni nyiiwa. Simpattiha maphuwa a moothakoni sitthuwiheraka mwiixi wiirimu. 
Isaiah9:19 Elapo enoohisiwa niwoko isara sa Yave a ikuru sootheene ni atthu anoovareliwa muteko weera mooro owo opwaherere; khawowo anaamuurele munneiye. 
Isaiah9:20 Awo anookhuura mpatta wa moono woolopwana, mene kheevona; anookhuura mpatta wa moono woothiyana, mene kheekwaneya. Khula mutthu onookhuura erutthu ya munneiye." 
Isaiah9:21 Manaxe onoomukhuura Efrayimi ni Efrayimi Manaxe. Eeli ale anoongwanano Yuda. Sirookhalaru sootheene iyo, isara sa Muluku khasihapungwe ni ntatanawe nri etheteeliwo." 
Isaiah10:1 Ii! Anoohaawa yaale ampaka malamulo oohiroromeleya, yaale anlepa ikano soohasula" 
Isaiah10:2 weera eriirihele soophwanela sa oohaawa ni sa ekhaikhai sa oohasuliwa variyari wa mulokwaaka. Atthweene yaale anaakhaliha asinaamukhweli yoolupatthaaya ni angwiiyera akwaasuni. 
Isaiah10:3 Mmwipakeni nyuwosa munihukuni na nthorihelo, erisa yaarweelaka ottai? Wa taani muneeraanyu mutthimakele weera ookhavihereni? Mmwahiye woowi mihakhusanyu?" 
Isaiah10:4 Kheewo muneeranyu mpake ohikhanle wiipitha variyari wa anamatthukiwa hoye hoye omorela eriyari ya anamakhwa. Sirookhalaru sootheene iyo, isara sa Muluku khasihapungwe ni ntatanawe nri etheteeliwo." 
Isaiah10:5 Ii!, awAsiriya anoohaawa! Awosa ti ekopo ya onyoonyiwawaka ni mmatatanimwaya ori murepettho wa isarasaka." 
Isaiah10:6 Miyo kinrumihela muloko woomurakamela Muluku, wa muloko onkinyoonyiha, weera ohuhule ni waakhe sooreela ni weeratho ovotte ntoko ittoko sa mmiseweni." 
Isaiah10:7 Vaheera kheehiyono ti yeeyo owo ontthunaaya hata oomvaanelaaya; otthunawaya waari ophwata ni omaliha miloko sincipale. 
Isaiah10:8 Awosa aneera: “Ootheene a asitokweenaahu a anakhotto ari mamwene.” 
Isaiah10:9 Yeeyo yaakhumelenle ni Karekemixi yaakhumelela ni Kalnu. Vekhaikhai Hamati onlikana ni Arepadi oSamaria ni oDamasku. 
Isaiah10:10 Ntananaka noowina imwene sa miluku soolokottha iye, mwa seiyo icaambulosaya siri soowaatta opwaha miluku sa oYerusaleemu ni oSamaria." 
Isaiah10:11 Vekhaikhai kinoopakela oYerusaleemu ni icaambulosaya seiye kipakenlaaka oSamaria ni milukusaya. 
Isaiah10:12 Yave aamalihaka mutekwaawe wootheene wa mwaako Siyoni ni oYerusaleemu, owo onimweera: “Kinoomuttaruxa mwene a wAsiriya niwoko na wiixoona ni wiivuwihawawe wa murimaawe ni na owehawawe woowiikuxerera." 
Isaiah10:13 Niwoko owo oneera: ‘Koopaka yeeyo ni ikuru sa ntatanaka ni niwoko na mirukusaka ni wiiwexexawaka. Koosusiha nyiinano sa miloko, kinahuhula mihakhusaya; kohaakuxa mamwenaaya ntoko mutthu ooweraxa." 
Isaiah10:14 Mooteene yoowo mutthu onookolaawe moono weera apixeere epuuru, hiiho kohookola moono weera kikuxe mihakhu sa miloko; mooteene yoowo atthu anthukumanyaaya mooce oohiiwa, hiihotho koothukumanyiha miloko. Khawoworu omvavela ni mapuphaawe hata oneera swi.’”" 
Isaiah10:15 Weeraka epaso enimulamulela yoole omvarela muteko hata seroti oniingyeviha yoole onimuramaramiha? Waamukhala ntoko ekopo emuramaramihaka ovarenle hata ttootto simweemexaka seiyo sihikhanle etthaabwa. 
Isaiah10:16 Tivawo Namalamula, Yave a ikuru sootheene onaarumihelaawe eretta yoophwata anakhottwaawe ooweraxa; vanipuroni na ovuwawawe onoopattihiwa mooro ntoko malumi ooviha." 
Isaiah10:17 Waara wa oYixrayeli onoothatuwa mooro; Ootteelaawe nlumi na mooro. Munihukuni nimoharu Owo onoomuhisa ni onoomulaliha rupulula ni nyiiwasawe. 
Isaiah10:18 Mooro owo onoophwataxa ovuwa wa othakwaawe ni imatta sooruwereya ntoko mutthu ongyavayavaawe ni ekwerere. 
Isaiah10:19 Nyiri sineera sihalahale moothakoni mwa wAsiriya nsikhale vakhaani mpaka mwaana mukhaanene ongweraawe waalikela. 
Isaiah10:20 Vanihukuni nenenenno oohalahala oYixrayeli; yaale eniikhale ni okumi a ekhapira ya Yakobe khayaaroromela yaale yaavulalinghe, mene anoomuroromelaxa Yave, Ootteela Yoowo a oYixrayeli." 
Isaiah10:21 Oohalahala a oYixrayeli onoohokolowa, aani oohalahala a Yakobe onoohokoleela wa Muluku Ooweraxa." 
Isaiah10:22 Naari mulokwaanyu oYixrayeli okhalaka ntoko muhaava wa mphareiya, oohalahala vakhaani ti eneera ehokolowe. Ophwatiwa oolamuliwa ni onimoowa woosareya ekhaikhai." 
Isaiah10:23 Namalamula, Yave a ikuru sootheene onookwanihera ophwatiwa olamuliwe mweelaponi yootheene." 
Isaiah10:24 Tivawo, ti yeeyo Namalamula, Yave a ikuru sootheene oneeraawe: “Ii! Mulokwaaka munkhala oSiyoni, muhiwoove awAsiriya naari yoottaruxakani ni ekopo hata eweemexerakani murepettho, ntoko yaapankaaya awExipitu." 
Isaiah10:25 Woonyoonyeriwaniwaka onoomala woowaakuveya, ni isarasaka sinoohokolowa weera saaphwate.”" 
Isaiah10:26 Yave a ikuru sootheene onimwaawaxula awAsiriya ni ekwaambaawe, ntoko aapankaawe oMidiyani vamwala wa Orebi ni onootheteela ekopwaawe mphareiya, ntoko aapankaawe wExipitu." 
Isaiah10:27 Vanihukuni nenenenno yoolemelaaya enoovenxiwa mmakhatanimwanyu; aani vaxikoniwanyu. Yoolemela enoophweeya niwoko nyuwosa munoonenevaxa. 
Isaiah10:28 Awosa amvolowa wAyati; amvira oMigeroni; anthokorora sooreelasaya oMikemaxi. 
Isaiah10:29 Amvira mukhatoni yeeraka: “Nivireke ni ohiyu, nakoneleke oGeba.” oRama onthukumela; oGibeya wa Sawuli ontthawa." 
Isaiah10:30 Mukhuwele, amaki a oGalimi! Mwiiwe oLaixa! Ii! wAnatoti!" 
Isaiah10:31 oMademena ontthawa; amaki a oGebimi aniipitha. 
Isaiah10:32 Olelo awosa ankela weemela oNobi ekungelaka icipakhirasaya vamwaako wa Mwaana Muthiyana a oSiyoni; vanttumuxani na oYerusaleemu. 
Isaiah10:33 Moone, Namalamula, Yave a ikuru sootheene onimuuha iphandi soolipaxa. Nyiri soorakama sinimuuhiwa; seiyo soorakamaxa sinoomoroxeliwa vathi." 
Isaiah10:34 Owo onimuuha othako ni epaso; oLibanu onoomora ohoolo wa Namaweraxa. 
Isaiah11:1 Niphuwa nnoophuwa munikottoni mwa Yixai; mukwankhwaarinimwawe enoophuwa ephandi enyowani. 
Isaiah11:2 Munepa wa Yave onookhala ni yoowo – Munepa wa miruku ni wiiwexexa; Munepa wa olaka ni ikuru; Munepa wa osuwela ni omoova Yave 
Isaiah11:3 ni owo onoohakalalela omuttittimiha Yave. Owo khathoriha awehaka ekhove, hata khalakela attharaka yeeyo iiwalaawe." 
Isaiah11:4 Owo onaareherera oothoiwa mweekhaikhaiyini ni onaalakelela moota woororomeleya oohaawa a elapo ya vathi. Onoomana elapo ya vathi ni ekopo ya eyanowaawe; onoowiiva atakhali ni iphumusawe. 
Isaiah11:5 Ekhaikhai eniikhale yoowiitthukelano vakakasani ni ororomeleya laamba a muyuununi. 
Isaiah11:6 mwiici onookhala vamoha ni eputtiputthi; havara onimwiixaatalela vamoha ni epuri; mwaamobe, mwatto ni emombe yooneneva enimooca vamoha ni mwaana mukhaani ti anaakukhule." 
Isaiah11:7 Emombe ethiyana enimooca vamoha ni ursu* ni axaanaaya animwiixaatalela vamoha, ni mwatto onimooca malaxi ntoko emombe." 
Isaiah11:8 Mwaana mukhaani onootheela vakhiviru wa mwiithe wa enowa; owo onoovolongha ntatanawe mpuuruni mwa evili. 
Isaiah11:9 Khaawo anaapakeru yoonanara hata anaphwate yakhalaru etthu vamwaakoniwaka wootteela, niwoko elapo eniisareye ni omusuwela Yave ntoko maahi ankhuneela ephareiya." 
Isaiah11:10 Vanihukuni nenenenno Mukwankhwaari wa Yixai onuukhale ntoko eneneero wa miloko; iyo sinoomwaattamela ni nipuronawe noowiitthuuwa nnikhale noovuwa. 
Isaiah11:11 Vanihukuni nenenenno Yave onimookolatho moono weera aahokoloxere oohalahala a mulokwaawe ahiiwe wAsiriya, wExipitu, oPatrosi, oKuxe, wElami, oBabiloniya, oHamati ni icirumba sa mphareiya." 
Isaiah11:12 Owo onimweemexa eneneero wa miloko ni onaathukumanyiha anamatthukiwa a oYixrayeli; onoothukumanyiha muloko woomwaramwaxeya wa oYuda wa ilapo sootheene. 
Isaiah11:13 Ehace ya Efrayimi enkoongora ni amwiittana a oYuda anoomalamalihiwa. wEfrayimi khookhalela ehace oYuda, hata oYuda khawiitta wEfrayimi." 
Isaiah11:14 Awosa anoovoleela mukerekhere nyaako sa aFilisti mpatta ninkela nsuwa ni anoohuhula muloko wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa; anookuxa wEdomi ni oMowabe, ni awAmoni anoolamuliwa ni yaawo." 
Isaiah11:15 Yave onimuumiha mpatta wa ephareiya ya wExipitu; onoomukuphula mooloko Efratesi ni ntatanawe apakihaka epheyo yoowuupaxa. Owo onoomukawanyiha mirora mithannamiili moota wooweera atthu anoowera olapuwa ni ikwakwaatta. 
Isaiah11:16 Onuukhale musewe mutokotoko wa oohalahala a mulokwaawe ohiiwe wAsiriya, ntoko waaraaya wa aYixrayeli ehuhuweene yeele yaakhumaaya wExipitu." 
Isaiah12:1 Vanihukuni nenenenno nyuwo munimweera: “Kinoottottopelani Nyuwo. Vano mwaakinyoonyeriwa, vaheera onyoonyiwawanyu woomala ni mookipepesa." 
Isaiah12:2 Vekhaikhai Muluku ti ovuluxiwawaka. Kinoororomela kihoovaka. Yave, aani, Yave ti ikurusaka ni ecipwaaka; Owo ti ovuluxiwawaka.”" 
Isaiah12:3 Munoorika maahi a muhimeni mwa ovuluxiwa, muhakalalaka." 
Isaiah12:4 Vanihukuni nenenenno nyuwo munimweera: “Muntthapele Yave; mwiitthane Nsinanawe, musuwelihe miloko seiye opankaawe ni mulaleiye weera Nsinanawe ti noovuwihiwa." 
Isaiah12:5 Mmwiipele Yave, niwoko oopaka itthu soovuwaxa; musuwelihe yeeyo elapo ya vathi yootheene." 
Isaiah12:6 Amaki a oSiyoni, mukhuwele ni mwiipe ni ohakalala, niwoko Ootteela a oYixrayeli ti Mutokweene variyariwanyu.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Masu a Muluku mwaha wa oBabiloniya, Yesaya, mwaana mulopwana a Amozi, aakhenlaawe mmooneloni ti ala:" 
Isaiah13:2 Mweemexe eneneero vanttumuxani noohimela etthu; mwaakhuwelele yaawo; ngwiitthane ngwuuvelaka ntata weera evolowe mmilakoni mwa maneethi. 
Isaiah13:3 Miyo kohaalamulela ootteelaaka weera ekwanihere isarasaka; koowiitthana anakhottwaaka ooweraxa, yaawosa anghakalalela owinawaka." 
Isaiah13:4 Mwiiwe onyakula vamwaako ntoko wa atthu ancipalexa. Mwiiwe ti okhuweliwa variyari wa omwene ntoko miloko sithukumanaka munkuttulani woowaatta. Yave a ikuru sootheene onaathukumanyiha anakhotto weera ewane. 
Isaiah13:5 Awosa anrweela mweelaponi sa ottai; ekotenle erimu – Yave ni ikapwitthi sa isarasawe – weera aphwate mwa yaawo elapo yootheene. 
Isaiah13:6 Mulalamike, niwoko nihuku na Yave nookhuveela; nnimoowa ntoko ophwata wa mpatta wa Namaweraxa." 
Isaiah13:7 Niwoko na yeeyo matata ootheene anootondolowa ni mirima sa atthu ootheene sinooporora ni woova. 
Isaiah13:8 Onimwaavara woova; ovoreya ni othanana onimwaalamula. Awosa anoovoreyeya ntoko muthiyana ayaraka. Anoowehana ootuthuwaxeene, ikhovesaya sivihereiyeene." 
Isaiah13:9 Moone, nihuku na Yave nnimoowa; nihuku noonanara noosareya isara ni onyoonyiwa vancipale. Munihukuni nno elapo enooheleya nthala ni anamattheka anoophwateya." 
Isaiah13:10 Ithenyeeri sa wiirimu ni nakupaaya khasaara. Nsuwa nikhumaka nnooheliwa epiphi ni mweeri khawaara. 
Isaiah13:11 Kinoottaruxa elapo ya vathi niwoko na yoonanaraaya; atakhali niwoko na sootakhalasaya. Kinoomaliha wiixoona wa oowiikuxa ni kinooyeviha wiixoona wa oowuuma murima. 
Isaiah13:12 Kinimwaavukula atthu opwaha eyuuma yoorikaxa, aani yoothowathowaxa opwaha eyuuma yoorikaxa ya wOfiri." 
Isaiah13:13 Tivawo kineeraaka kithukumelihe erimu ni etthaya enootetereya vanipuroniwaya niwoko na isara sa Yave a ikuru sootheene vanihukuni na onyoonyiwawawe woopatta. 
Isaiah13:14 Khula mutthu onoohokoleela mulokwaawe ni onootthawela elapwaawe ntoko naahe onlupatthiwa, ntoko ekhondoolo yoohikhalano mukukhuli." 
Isaiah13:15 Ootheene eniivariwe anoohommwa; ootheene eniiphwanyiwe anookakatthiwa. 
Isaiah13:16 Anamwanaaya asikhaani anoohononeliwa vamaithoniwaya; vaatewaya onoohuhuliwa ni axaaraya anoopuheriwa. 
Isaiah13:17 Moone, kinimwaatannya aMedesi weera yaawaneno. Awosa khaampwatthela eparatha* hata eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Isaiah13:18 Nyuupasaya sinimwaamoroxa amiravo; awosa khayaamorela ikharari asikhaani hata anamwanaaya. 
Isaiah13:19 oBabiloniya, nluku noowaaraxa na omwene wootheene, waara wa ovuwa wa aBabiloniya, onoophwatiwa ni Muluku ntoko oSodoma ni oGomora." 
Isaiah13:20 Khawoworu aniitekihewotho naari khawoworu anaamakewo wa mahuku ootheene. Khawowo ngwArabi anaakungewo eheemaawe hata khawoworu mukukhuli aniitthuuwihewo muhuwaawe. 
Isaiah13:21 Vaheera soopattuxiwa sa munikareni sinookhalawo ni impasaya anoosaramo akhwatte. Mwemmo sinoomakamo isiisi ni ikhomaci sinootuphamo. 
Isaiah13:22 aKusupa animwiipa vanipuroni noolipaxa na oBabiloniya ni akhwatte mpaanimwaya sitokotoko sooreeraxa. Ehuhuwaaya eneera emalaka ni mahukwaya khaampwahererihiwatho. 
Isaiah14:1 Yave onoomorela ikharari ekhapira ya Yakobe; onoothanlatho ekhapira ya Yixrayeli ni onootekiha mweelaponimwayaxa. Anamarwa anookhala ni yaawo epakelaka mpatta ekhapira ya Yakobe. 
Isaiah14:2 Miloko sinoophwanya yoowo siroiheke mmapuronimwayaxa. Ekhapira ya Yixrayeli enoolamula miloko ntoko ipottha ilopwana ni ithiyana mweelaponi mwa Yave. Awosa animwaakhaliha anamatthukiwa anamavaraaya ni animwaalamula anamahasulaaya. 
Isaiah14:3 Vanihukuni Yave aneeraawe oovaheeni, wiitthuuwa wa ohaawa, makacamiho ni otthukiwa wa oxilili," 
Isaiah14:4 nyuwosa munoomutthebwa mwene a oBabiloniya: Ngwehe ekisero ya namahasula! Moone ommaleloni wa isarasawe! 
Isaiah14:5 Yave ohintaka ekopo ya atakhali, ekopo ya emwene ya anamalamula," 
Isaiah14:6 mwa yaawo yaamanelaayano miloko moota woohihiyerereya oonyoonyiweene ni, oosareiyeene isara, yaanyaatula miloko ni osoonda woohimala." 
Isaiah14:7 Ilapo sootheene sookhalano wiitthuuwa ni mmaaleleyo; sootheene simpacera wiipa ni ohakalala. 
Isaiah14:8 Mpakatho nyiri sa ipinyeiru* ni sa isedari* sa oLibanu sinoottottopelani, seeraka: “Mweenre muuhiwaka, khawoworu nakhuuni aneera arwe onuuha.”" 
Isaiah14:9 Ngwiixerani okhwa ori woowali weera owaakheleni mwaarwaaka; owo omvenyereriha minepa sa anamakhwa weera sooxekureni – ootheene yaale yaari ahooleli mweelaponi ya vathi; owo onaavenyereriha vahiceniwaya – ootheene yaale yaari mamwene a miloko. 
Isaiah14:10 Ootheene yaawo anoomwaakhula; awosa anooweerelani: “Nyuwotho moothatuwa oohilipa ntoko hiyo; moothatuwa ntoko mmoha a hiyo.” 
Isaiah14:11 Waarawanyu wootheene wookuruxiwa omoroxeliwaka munihiyeni vamoha ni oruma wa makitaanyu; macanama ari vathiwanyu – moosareya nyuungu. 
Isaiah14:12 Ii! Ethenyeeri ya oxeexelo, mwaana a oxa! Moota mmonraanyu wiirimu! Moota mmoroxeliwaanyu vathi – nyuwo khalayi mwaaphwata miloko sincipalexa." 
Isaiah14:13 Nyuwo mwiixeerela: “Kinoowela wiirimu; kinimweemexa ehicaaka ya emwene osulu wa ithenyeeri sa Muluku; kinookilaathi vamwaako wa muthukumano; vathokani sa mwaako wootteela. 
Isaiah14:14 Kinoowela osuluxa opwaha mahutte oorakamelaxa; kinimwiikhaliha ntoko Muluku.” 
Isaiah14:15 Vaheera mookuruxeliwa munihiyeni; mpuwa ngwiixerani. 
Isaiah14:16 Yaale angwoonani anootikhina; awosa antthokelela ommaleloniwanyu: “Mulopwaneene ti yoola aathukumeliha elapo, aattikinya imwene," 
Isaiah14:17 aatatuxa elapo ya vathi nikare, aawina isidade ahitthuniheraka weera anamatthukiwaaya ehokoleele owaani?”" 
Isaiah14:18 Mamwene ootheene a miloko anaataleleya moovuwani, khula mwene munihiyenimwawe." 
Isaiah14:19 Vaheera nyuwo munkhumihiwa munihiyenimwanyu mvonyeriwaka vaate ntoko ephandi yookhoottiwa, ntoko soowara sa anamakhwa yiiviwe ni ekatana, ntoko yaale ankhuruwela mmalukuni a nlitti, ntoko muttembo woonyikalasiwa." 
Isaiah14:20 Nyuwo khamvithiwa vamoha ni mamweneene yaawo niwoko moophwata elapwaanyu mwiivaka mulokwaanyu. Ekhapira ya atakhalai kheeromoliwatho wa mahuku ootheene. 
Isaiah14:21 Mureherere nipuro noowiivela anamwanaawe niwoko na soottheka sa makholowaaya; awosa ehivenyeru weera yaakhele elapo esarihaka isidadesaya. 
Isaiah14:22 Yave a ikuru sootheene onghima: “Miyo kinimwaawanano yaawo. Kinoovenxa mwa oBabiloniya nsinanaya, anamahalahalaaya, anamwanaaya ni ekhapiraaya,” onghima Yave." 
Isaiah14:23 “Kinootatuxa oBabiloniya nipuro na isisi ni elapo ya mattapo; kinookwesa ni mvelo wa ophwata,” onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Isaiah14:24 Yave a ikuru sootheene oolipela: “Vekhaikhai, yeeyo kivaanenlaaka enookhumelela ni yeeyo kintthunaaka enimweereya." 
Isaiah14:25 Kinoophwata wAsiriya mwelaponimwaka; kinimwaanyikalela mmanyaakonimwaka. Yoolemelaaya enoovenxiwa mwa mulokwaaka ni murittaaya mmakhatanimwaya.” 
Isaiah14:26 Eyo ti yoovaanela ekhaliheriwe elapo yootheene; ola ti moono wookoleliwe miloko sootheene. 
Isaiah14:27 Vano Yave a ikuru sootheene oolakela ni taani anaawere oohiiha? Moonowaawe ti woowookoweene ni taani anaawere ohokoloxa? 
Isaiah14:28 Vayaakhani aakhwiiyawe mwene Ahazi yaavahiwa masu anooperera ala: 
Isaiah14:29 Nyuwosa aFilisti, muhihakalalele wintakiwa wa ekopo yoomanani. Mukwankhwaarini wa enowa enoophuwa evili; soowiimasaya sinookhala enowa yoowali ni ya wamwa oohapala." 
Isaiah14:30 Oohaawaxa anoophwanya mapuro ooca ni oothoiwa animwiixaatalela oolipeene. Vaheera Miyo kinoophwata mikwankhwarisanyu ni etala; eyo enoowiiva anamahalahalaanyu. 
Isaiah14:31 Ii, mulako! Mulalamike! Ii, esidade! Mukhuwele! aFilisti ootheene nyuwosa, mutothowase. Anakhotto angweela mpatta wa ottuttuwani ni khawoworu a yaawo onghapuwa mmiseranimwawe." 
Isaiah14:32 Yoowaakhula heeni eneeraaya evahiwe anamitthenga a muloko owo? Yoowaakhula ti ela: “Yave ookhaliha oSiyoni ni mwemmo oohasuliwa a mulokwaawe anootthawelamo.” 
Isaiah15:1 Masu mwaha wa oMowabe ti ala: wAri elapo ya oMowabe wooheleya nthala, woophwatiwa moohiyuni mmoha! oKiri elapo ya oMowabe wooheleya nthala woophwatiwa moohiyuni mmoha!" 
Isaiah15:2 oDiboni onrowa mpaani mwa mulukwaaya, wa mmattumuxanimwaya ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina weera wiinle; oMowabe onlalamikela oNebo ni oMedeba; nyuru sootheene soomeetthiwa ni irerusene." 
Isaiah15:3 Mmiseweni awosa aneetta ewanreene isaakho; mmapathoni ni mmapuwani a mwaatthuni ootheene anlalamika, yuupuruwaka, yiinlaka." 
Isaiah15:4 oHexeboni ni wEleyaleni onkhuwela; okhuwelawaya oniiwanyeya mpaka oYahazi. Tivawo anakhotto a oMowabe ankhuwelaaya ni mirimasaya sinthukumelaaya. 
Isaiah15:5 Murimaaka oniinlela oMowabe; anamatthawaaya antthawela mpaka oZowari ni mpaka wEgelati Xeliya. Awosa anrowa mpatta wa oLuhiti yiinlaka mphironimwaya; mmuseweni mwa oHoronayimi anlalamikela ophwatiwawaya. 
Isaiah15:6 Maahi a oNinrimi aawelela ni malaxaaya aanyaala. Mapoonda ahuuma ni kheewoworu yoorimbelela ehanle. 
Isaiah15:7 Vano mihakhu yaaphwannyaaya ni yaathokoronraaya ankuxa eviraka Nxaapwa na eSalgeru*. 
Isaiah15:8 Okhuwelawaya oniiwanyeya namalwe mmwiinanoni wootheene wa oMowabe; olalamikawaya omphiya wEglayimi, mpakatho oBeheri- wElimi." 
Isaiah15:9 Maahi a oDimoni aasareya ephome, mene Miyo kinooruuhelawotho soonanara – mwatto a anamatthawa a oMowabe ni wa yaawo anghala mweelaponi." 
Isaiah16:1 Munrumihele namalamula a elapo iputtiputthi ntoko yooliva okhuma oSela, muvirihaka munikareni mpaka vamwaako wa Mwaana Muthiyana a oSiyoni." 
Isaiah16:2 Asithiyana a oMowabe ari mmirorani sa wArenoni ari ntoko ipalame sivavaka soomoliweene mpuuruni. 
Isaiah16:3 “Munivahe miruku; mulakele. Mpake munttuusaanyu ntoko ohiyu, hata okhalaka othana. Ngwiipithihe anamatthawa; muhiwoonelelihe yiipinthaayawo." 
Isaiah16:4 Anamatthawa a oMowabe ekhaleke ni nyuwo; mukhaleke yoowaakihaaya wa namaphwata.” Namahasula onoomalihiwa, ophwatiwa onoomalatho. Namwiittana onkoongora mweelaponi." 
Isaiah16:5 Ehice ya emwene enookhalihiwa moosivelani; moororomeleyani mulopwana onookilaathimo – mmoha a ekhapira ya Davide: Mphuki onaasaasa ekhaikhai aakuveyaka waakiha eri ya ekhaikhai. 
Isaiah16:6 Nohiiwa sa wiixoona wa oMowabe – wiikuxawaya otokotoko, wiivuwihawaya wootheene, ni niveihonaya, mene sootheene iyo khasimuteko." 
Isaiah16:7 Tivawo aMowabe aniinlaaya; anlalamikela vamoha oMowabe; olalamika ni othanana wa asilopwana a oKiri Hareseti. 
Isaiah16:8 Imatta sa oHexeboni soonyaala ni hiihotho imatta sa iwuuva* sa oSibema. Anamalamula a miloko aanyikalela imatta sa iwuuva* sooreerelaxa, mwa seiye khalayi saaphiya mpaka oYazari ni mpatta wa munikareni. Iphandisaya saaphuwa siphiyaka ophareiya." 
Isaiah16:9 Vano kiniinla ntoko oniinlaaya oYazari niwoko na imatta sa iwuuva* sa oSibema. Ii! Hexeboni, Ii! wEleyali, kinoonaanihani ni maithoraaka! Okhuwela wa ohakalala niwoko na soowiimasanyu ni ohephawanyu woomala." 
Isaiah16:10 Ohakalala ni otteela murima woovenxiwa mmatta; khawoworu oniipa hata onkhuwela mmatta mwa iwuuva*; khawoworu onaama iwuuva* mmattankhini, niwoko koomaliha okhuwelawaya wa ohakalala." 
Isaiah16:11 Murimaaka onlalamikela oMowabe ntoko makita ni okumaaka onghihimerela oKiri Hareseti. 
Isaiah16:12 oMowabe wiixooniheraka mmattumuxanimwaya ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina; onimwiikhulumula paahi; waavolowaka vanipuroniwaya nootteela weera ovekele, khoowera etthu." 
Isaiah16:13 Ti ala masu Yave aahimmaawe mwaha wa oMowabe. 
Isaiah16:14 Vaheera vano Yave oneera: “Muyaakhani tthaaru paahi ovuwa wa oMowabe ni amakaaya ancipale ootheene anooramusiwa ni anamahalahalaaya anookhala vakhaani ni oohilipa.” 
Isaiah17:1 Masu oowooperera oDamasku ti ala: “Moone oDamasku kheenkhalatho esidade, mene ittuxoru paahi." 
Isaiah17:2 Isidade sa wAroweri sinoothaamiwa; sinoovahiwa mihuwo, mwa seiyo sineera siixaatalelewo sihoovaka etthu." 
Isaiah17:3 Esidade yoolipihiwaxa enkoongora wEfrayimi ni hiihotho ikuru sa emwene oDamasku. Anamahalahala a awArami anookhala ntoko ovuwa wa aYixrayeli,” onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Isaiah17:4 “Vanihukuni nenenenno ovuwa wa Yakobe onooyavayava; oneneva wa erutthwaawe onimoonda. 
Isaiah17:5 Onuukhale ntoko namahepha athukumanyaka, ahelaka makala vamoononi; ntoko mulopwana onttottattottaawe ihupu sa etrigu vanreyareyani na Refayimi." 
Isaiah17:6 Wa soothesene, anoohala makala mamoha mamoha ntoko simpukunyiwaaya ifiigu, sinoohala soowiima piili hoye hoye tthaaru osuluxa wa mwiiri, ni soowiima ixexe naari ithanu mphandini moowiimaxa,” onghima Yave Muluku a oYixrayeli." 
Isaiah17:7 Vanihukuni nenenenno asilopwana anoongweha Mpattuxaaya, emurukunuwelaka ongweha Ootteela a oYixrayeli." 
Isaiah17:8 Khayaaweha altaari* ari miteko sa matataaya naari kheeroromelatho nyiri soothipeleliwa Axera ni altaari* a erubani* yaapankaaya. 
Isaiah17:9 Vanihukuni nenenenno isidadesaya soolipaxa saathaamiwe niwoko na aYixrayeli sinookhala ntoko mapuro oowinnyereriwa ntuphi ni othako. Vano sinookhala ittuxoru. 
Isaiah17:10 Moomuttiwala Muluku Mvuluxaanyu; khamummuupuwelela Mwala ori Nipuronanyu Noolipaxa. Tivawo, naari mphatteyaka nyiri sooreerela ni imatta sa iwuuva* sa ilapo sikina," 
Isaiah17:11 aani, naari nihuku muneeraanyu mwaale, mununnuwiha ni oxeexelo sinattuva, khoorwa okhala ohepha vanihukuni na othanana ni ovoreya woohilamiheya." 
Isaiah17:12 Ii! Oruma wa miloko sincipale onlikana ni oruma wa ephareiya yoowali! Ii! Onyakula wa miloko; seiyo sinruma ntoko oruma wa maahi oowuupa! 
Isaiah17:13 Naari miloko sirumaka ntoko maahi oowuupa, Owo aahiihaka, iyo sinootthawela ottai, sivavihiwaka ni epheyo ntoko makamba mmattumuxani, ntoko ntthupi ninkuxiwa ni eyuupuru." 
Isaiah17:14 Ohiyu – woova wootutuxereya! Ohinaaye oxa awosa anoopwaha! Wu ti ommaleloni wa yaale annihuhula, wa yaale aniiya." 
Isaiah18:1 Ii! Onoohaawa weyo, elapo ya oruma wa aciitthu mukerekhere nyooloko sa oKuxe." 
Isaiah18:2 Awosa anaarumiha anamitthenga ni makula matokotoko a etiili mphareiyani. Anamitthenga oowaakuveya, murowe wa muloko woorakamelaxa ni wa exapala yootteettheya, wa muloko woowooviwa ni ootheene ari vakhiviru ni ottai, muloko ontthunaxa owana, onuuluma nuulumo noovirikanaxa, mwa yoowo elapwaaya ekawanyeiye ni nyooloko." 
Isaiah18:3 Miloko sootheene nyuwo sa elapo ya vathi; ootheene nyuwo mummaka mulaponimu, eneneero yeemexiwaka mmanyaakoni, munimoona, ni nipalapatta naarumaka, munimwiiwa." 
Isaiah18:4 Yave onkeerela ha: “Vanipuroni kimankaaka kinoomaala, kiwehaka, ntoko oviha wa nsuwa nootutha, ntoko nihutte na nikame moovihani mwa ehuhu ya ohepha.”" 
Isaiah18:5 Vano ohinaaye ohepha, emalaka ephovo ni ithutu sithatuwaka soowiima owo onooseekela soophuwa; avenxaka iphandi soorakama." 
Isaiah18:6 Ootheene yaawo animwinnyereriwa marepo ni axinama a ntuphini; ipalame sinookhuura mittembosaya elimwe yootheene ni axinama a ntuphini eyiitta yootheene. 
Isaiah18:7 Ehuhuweene yeeyo Yave onoovahiwa samahala ni muloko woorakamelaxa ni wa exapala yootteettheya, muloko woowooviwa ni ootheene ari vakhiviru ni ottai, muloko ontthunaxa owana, onuuluma nuulumo noovirikanaxa, mwa yoowo elapwaaya ekawanyeiye ni nyooloko. Soovahasene seiyo sinooruuhiwa omwaako Siyoni, nipuro na Nsina na Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Isaiah19:1 Masu mwaha wa wExipitu ti ala: “Moone, Yave oneetta munihutteni noowaakuveya ninrowa wExipitu. Miluku soolokottha sa wExipitu sinthukumela ohoolowawe ni mirima sa awExipitu simporora." 
Isaiah19:2 Kinoongwanawaniha ngwExipitu ni ngwExipitu: khula mutthu onoongwanano munneiye, mwaattamana ni mwaattamanaawe, esidade ni esidade, omwene ni omwene." 
Isaiah19:3 awExipitu anooporora ni Miyo kinoovirikanyiha soovaanelasaya; awosa anookohakoha miluku soowootha, minepa sa anamakhwa, yaale yaahera ihako ni yuuluma ni anamakhwa." 
Isaiah19:4 Kinoowinnyerera awExipitu mmatatani mwa mutokweene oowuuma murima ni mwene oonanara murima onimwaanyaatula,” onghima Namalamula, Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Isaiah19:5 Maahi a mooloko anoowelela ni mukerekhere mooloko onimuumaxa. 
Isaiah19:6 Mipope sinimunkha; nyooloko sa wExipitu sinoovukuwa mpaka wuuma. Ittheere ni etiili sinoonyaala. 
Isaiah19:7 Mapuro ootheene a mukerekhere mooloko animuuma mpakatho ohelannaayawo ni ephareiya. Imatta soophatteiwa sootheene sa mukerekhere mooloko sinimuuma, sinoovavihiwa ni epheyo, silakaseyeke." 
Isaiah19:8 Anamamesera anoottaandawula ni anoolalamika – ootheene amvonyera mameso mmoolokoni Nilu; yaale amvonyera itthavi mmaahini anooporora. 
Isaiah19:9 Yaale amvara muteko ni eliinyu* yoorehereriwa anookhalano murima woohilipa. Anamatthava a nliinya nootteettheya anooporora. 
Isaiah19:10 Maneethi ootheene anookhala oohitteene ni anamiteko ootheene anaakhela nlivo anookhala ooriipiweene murima. 
Isaiah19:11 Asitokweene a oZowaani ari alolo; anamalaka a miruku a Farawu* amvaha miruku soololo. Moota heeni mungweraanyu omweerela Farawu*: “Miyo namiruku, oohusera a mamwene a khalayi”?" 
Isaiah19:12 Vano anamirukwaanyu ari woowi? Awosa ewoonihereni ni yoosuweliheni yeeyo Yave a ikuru sootheene omvaanelelaawe wExipitu. 
Isaiah19:13 Asitokweene a oZowaani aathatuwa alolo; ahooleli a oMemfesi ti oolokotthiwa. Mapwattapwattha a mahimwaaya aahapuxa wExipitu. 
Isaiah19:14 Yave ohaasariha munepa wa opupurumiha; awosa amveveleiha wExipitu mwa sootheene ampakaaya, ntoko omveveleelaawe namuhapaliwa muxerexere wa marapheyowaawe." 
Isaiah19:15 Kheewowo etthu wExipitu ongweraaya opaka – aani okhuma waamuru mpaka waametto; aani kancesa ni ettheere – kheewowo ongweraaya opaka. 
Isaiah19:16 Vanihukuni nenenenno awExipitu anookhala ntoko asithiyana. Anoothukumela ni woova niwoko na moono wa Yave a ikuru sootheene aneeraawe aatheteele yaale. 
Isaiah19:17 Vano elapo ya oYuda enimwaaruuhela awExipitu woova; ootheene eneera eromole nsina na oYuda, onoowuuma owanoni niwoko na yeeyo Yave a ikuru sootheene aavaanelenlaawe yaawo." 
Isaiah19:18 Vanihukuni nenenenno isidade ithanu sa wExipitu sinimuuluma nuulumo na oKanaani simukhalelaka nthiti Yave a ikuru sootheene. Emoha ya seiyo eniyitthaniwe Esidade ya Nsuwa. 
Isaiah19:19 Vanihukuni nenenenno anookhala altaari* a Yave eriyari ya elapo ya wExipitu ni ecaambulo yoowuupuxera wa Yave mmwiinanonimwaya. 
Isaiah19:20 Eyo eniikhale eneneero ni namoona wa Yave a ikuru sootheene mweelaponi ya wExipitu. Awosa yaamukhuwelelaka Yave niwoko na anamahasulaaya, Owo onimwaarumihela Mvuluxa ni Namwaakiha ni Owo onoowoopola." 
Isaiah19:21 Vano Yave onimwiisuweliha wa awExipitu ni vanihukuni nenenenno awosa anoosuwela weera Yave taani. Anoottottopela ni sooveleela sa axinama ni etrigu, anoomuroromeliha Yave ni nlipelo, ekwaniheraka seiyo." 
Isaiah19:22 Yave onoovulaliha wExipitu ni nihooxo; onoomana alamiheke. Awosa anoohokoleela wa Yave ni Owo onimwaakhula soodyoonttelelasaya, aalamiheke." 
Isaiah19:23 Vanihukuni nenenenno onuukhale musewe mutokotoko okhuma wExipitu mpaka wAsiriya. awAsiriya anoorowa wExipitu ni awExipitu wAsiriya. Vano awExipitu ni awAsiriya anoolapa vamoha. 
Isaiah19:24 Vanihukuni nenenenno oYixrayeli onuukhale namwiiraanyiha eriyari ya wExipitu ni wAsiriya – nreeliho na mweelaponi ya vathi. 
Isaiah19:25 Yave a ikuru sootheene onooreeliha ilapo iya eeraka: “Ooreelihiwa ekhale awExipitu, mulokwaaka, awAsiriya kaapattunxaaka ni aYixrayeli yoohiyeraaka.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Vayaakhani mutokweenexa a anakhotto aarumiheliwe ni Saregoni, mwene a wAsiriya, aawanannaaweno wAxidoti awinaka," 
Isaiah20:2 vano ehuhuweene yeele Yave aahuuluma mwa Yesaya, mwaana mulopwana a Amozi. Owo aamweerela: “Murule isaakho ni ikwakwaattasanyu.” Vano aapaka yeeyo aneetta pwitipwiti woohikwakwaatta." 
Isaiah20:3 Vano Yave aaheera: “Mooteene yoowo murumeiyaaka Yesaya eettaawe pwitipwiti ni woohikwakwaatta wa iyaakha tthaaru ntoko eneneero ni niphwanaphwaniho wa wExipitu ni oKuxe," 
Isaiah20:4 hiiho mwene a wAsiriya onimwaakuxa anamatthukiwa a wExipitu ni oKuxe ehiwanreene ikuwo naari ikwakwaatta – ekhalaka amiravo naari asitokweene, ni makhuttu vaate – mpaka wuulihiwa muru wa wExipitu." 
Isaiah20:5 Yaale yaaroromela oKuxe ni yiikuxererano wExipitu animoova ni onoowuuma owanoni. 
Isaiah20:6 Vanihukuni nenenenno atthu ammaka mukerekhere ephareiya eniyeere: ‘Moone yeeyo eweereenle yaale naaroromelaahu; yaale naatthimakelaahu weera enikhavihere ni enoopole mwa mwene a wAsiriya. Ni vano? Nniitthawe hai?’ ” 
Isaiah21:1 Masu mwaha wa Nikare na ephareiya ti ala: Ntoko iyuupuru siviraka elapo ya oNegeba, amwiittana anrweela munikareni, mweelaponi yoowoova." 
Isaiah21:2 Koovahiwa moonelo woowoopiha: Namavariha oovarihiwa; namahuhula onghuhuliwa. wElami, ngwane! oMediya, murice! Miyo kimmaliha ottaandawula wootheene oBabiloniya otannyalaaya." 
Isaiah21:3 Vahoolowaya kaathananiheya; kaavoreiwa ntoko muthiyana ayaraka; kooriipiwa murima ni yeeyo kiiwalaaka; nkinono masu niwoko na yeeyo koonnaaka. 
Isaiah21:4 Murimaaka onthukumela; woova wookivara; wiilawene weiwo kaawehereraaka woothatuwa woovaxa wa miyo. 
Isaiah21:5 Awosa anreherera meesa, anaatala ekuwo ya vameesa; anca, enawura. Mvenye, asitokweene a anakhotto nyuwosa, mureherere ixikudu* ni makhura!" 
Isaiah21:6 Yave onkeerela ha: “Murowe, mwamukhalihe namalipelela ni owo ooleeleni yeeyo aneeraawe oone." 
Isaiah21:7 Owo oonaka ikaaro sa anakupa a ikavalu*, anamweettiha eweettihaka abuuru ni ikamelu*, owo akhaleke oolikaneenexa!”" 
Isaiah21:8 Vano namalipelela ookhuwela: “Pwiiyaaka, khula othana kinneemela vatooreni* ya olipelela ni khula ohiyu kinkhala vanipuroni nna." 
Isaiah21:9 Moone, vale ongwa mulopwana mukaaroni ya ikavalu*. Owo oneera: ‘oBabiloniya woomora, woomora! Icaambulo sootheene sa milukusaya ti soonyaanyeriwa vathi!’ ”" 
Isaiah21:10 Ii! Mulokwaaka woonyikaleliwa vanipuroni nimveeriwa* etrigu, miyo kinoothaliherani yeeyo kiiwalaaka wa mpatta wa Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli." 
Isaiah21:11 Masu mwaha wa oDuma ti ala: “Mukina onkiitthana oSeyiri: Namalipelela khoonaaye oxa? Namalipelela nlelo khoonaaye oxa?” 
Isaiah21:12 Namalipelela onaakhula: “Ohanle oxa, mene ohiyu onimoowatho. Mwatthuna okikohatho, muhokolowe ni mukikohe.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Masu mwaha wa wArabiya ti ala: Nyuwosa aDedani, nakupa oneettiha ikamelu* onkonela moothakoni wa wArabiya," 
Isaiah21:14 Mwaaruuhele maahi anantthona. Nyuwosa munkhala oTema, mwaaruuhele sooca anamatthawa." 
Isaiah21:15 Awosa antthawa mwa ekatana, aani mwa ekatana yootheteiwa, mwa muupa woolikaneene ni ekhotto yoovihaxa." 
Isaiah21:16 Yave onkeerela ha: “Muyaakhani emoha paahi soowaara sootheene sa oKedari sinoomalihiwa. 
Isaiah21:17 Yaale eniihalahale a ananyuupa, anakhotto a oKedari eniikhale vakhaani paahi.” Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli ti eenre yeeyo." 
Isaiah22:1 Masu mwaha wa Nreyareya na Eyoonihero: Enookacamihani eheeni ophiyera mungwelaanyu mmapathoni," 
Isaiah22:2 esidade nyuwo yoosareya onyakuleleya, yoosareya ococopolana. Anamakhwaanyu khaakhwiiye ni ekatana naari mukhottoni." 
Isaiah22:3 Ahoolelaanyu ootheene aatthawa vamoha. Awosa aavariwa ehivarelaka muteko muupa. Ootheene nyuwo moophwanyiwa, munatthukiwa, mwaarootthawelaru ottaiwenexa." 
Isaiah22:4 Tivawo keenraaka: “Mususe wa miyo, mukihiye kiixiinlele. Muheerere okipepesa niwoko na ophwatiwa wa mulokwaaka.”" 
Isaiah22:5 Namalamula, Yave a ikuru sootheene oothanla nihuku na munyakunyaku, onyikalasiwa ni woovaxa vaNreyareyani na Moonelo; nihuku na omoroxa ixiri ni okhuwelela ekhavihero nyaako." 
Isaiah22:6 awElami ankuxa nyuupa, enarwa ni anamweettihaaya a ikavalu* ni ikavalusaya*. aKiri anoonihera exikudu*." 
Isaiah22:7 Mareyareyaanyu a ethaadyira aasareya ikaaro sa ikavalu* ni anamweettiha a ikavalu* ahiirehererela owana vamilako sa esidade. 
Isaiah22:8 Soowaakiha sa oYuda soovenxiwa. Nihuku nenenenne nyuwosa mwaweha ikapwitthi siri mpaani mwa emwene Moothakoni," 
Isaiah22:9 munoona weera esidade ya Davide yaakhalano ikhato muxirinimwaya woohikhalano yoowaakiha. Moothokorora maahi vanrattani na vathi. 
Isaiah22:10 Mohaalikela impa siri oYerusaleemu ni moophottomola impa sikina weera mulipihe exiri. 
Isaiah22:11 Mooteka nipuro ninthokororiwa maahi variyari wa ixiri piili wa maahi a nratta na khalayi, vaheera khammoonne Yoole opanke itthu seiyo, hata khamumpwantthe Yoowo aavaanelenle yeeyo khalayi." 
Isaiah22:12 Nihuku nenenenne Namalamula, Yave a ikuru sootheene oowiitthanani weera mwiinle ni mulalamike, murosole mayihaanyu ni ngware isaakho." 
Isaiah22:13 Mene ovirikanawaya, waakhala ohakalala ni ococopolana; wiiviwa wa imombe ni ikhondoolo; okhuura wa enama ni owura wa soowura! Nyuwosa mweera: “Niceeke ni niwureke niwoko omaalo nnimookhwa!”" 
Isaiah22:14 Yave a ikuru sootheene ookoonihera ha: “Yoottheka ela kheenleveleliwa mpaka okhwawanyu,” onghima Namalamula, Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Isaiah22:15 Yave, Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: “Murowe ni mwamuleele Xebena owo, namareherera sootheene mpaani ya emwene:" 
Isaiah22:16 Mumpakani va ni taani ootthunihenreni othipa nihiyenanyu, mwaakaka vanttumuxani, muttuulaka nipuronanyu noowiitthuuwa vamwalani?" 
Isaiah22:17 Mwiipasoope, Yave ohanle vakhaani woovarani weera oovonyereni ottaiwene, nyuwo mulopwana oowera." 
Isaiah22:18 Owo onimookhunyanyani ntoko boola oovonyerekeni mweelaponi etokotoko. Iwo munimookhwa ni ikaarosanyu sa ikavalu* sooreeraxa sinookhalawo ntoko wuulihiwa muru wa vaate wa pwiiyaanyu! 
Isaiah22:19 Miyo kinoowoomolani mmitekonimwanyu ni munoosusihiwa wa okhalihiwawanyu. 
Isaiah22:20 Vanihukuni nenenenno kinoomwiitthana murumeiyaaka Eliyakimi, mwaana mulopwana a Hilikiya." 
Isaiah22:21 Kinoongwariha mukaandyo mwaawaraanyu, kimutthukaka laambaanyu muyuununi, kimvahaka ikurusanyu sa muteko. Owo onookhala tiithi wa yaale ankhala oYerusaleemu ni wa ekhapira ya Yuda." 
Isaiah22:22 Kinoomuthateliha exaavi ya omwene wa Davide; yeeyo aneeraawe ahule, khaawo anaawere owala, ni yeeyo aneeraawe awale, khaawo anaawere ohula." 
Isaiah22:23 Kinoomukhomela ntoko ekhomo vanipuroni noolipaxa; owo onookhala omwene wa ovuwa wa vaate wa atithawe. 
Isaiah22:24 Ovuwa wootheene wa emusaawe eniimuweheke yoowo – anamwanaawe ni osuuluwaawe; ikarumasawe sikhaani sootheene okhuma ibasiya mpaka nyaapu sootheene. 
Isaiah22:25 Vanihukuni nenenenno,” onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene, “ekhomo ekhomelingwe vanipuroni noolipaxa enoozoowa, enookwasuwa, enoomora, ni yoolemelaaya enoomoratho.” Yoole eenre yeeyo ti Yave." 
Isaiah23:1 Masu mwaha wa oTiro ti ala: Ii!, makula matokotoko a oTaresisi, mwiinle! Niwoko oTiro woophwatiwa kheehanleru empa naari muxelo. Mutthenga ola orweenle oKipro:" 
Isaiah23:2 Nyuwosa amaki a ecirumba ni nyuwosa ananakoso a oSidoni munthadyirela mwa yaale anlapuwa ephareiya, mmaaleke!" 
Isaiah23:3 Mphareiyani etokotoko enrweela etrigu ya oXihori; ohepha wa Nilu ti musurukhwaaya ni oTiro woothatuwa emerekadu ya miloko. 
Isaiah23:4 Wuulihiheye muru, Sidoni, ni nyuwo, nipuro noolipaxa na ephareiya, niwoko ephareiya yeenre: “Nkivilenle ovoreya wa oyara naari nkiyanre; nkaahungwe anamwane asilopwana hata asithiyana.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Ehabari yaaphiyakaru wExipitu, anoothananela ihaali sa oTiro." 
Isaiah23:6 Mulapuwele oTaresisi, mwiinle nyuwosa amaki a ecirumba." 
Isaiah23:7 Ela ti esidade yootthapa, esidade ya khalayi, mwa yeeyo inaawosaya saaronghale woowinani ilapo sa ottai?" 
Isaiah23:8 Taani aavaanelenle yeeyo oTiro? Ti oTiro ontthuka icireemba ni ananakoswaaya ari maneethi ni anamarondaaya ti oosuwanyeyaxa mweelaponi ya vathi! 
Isaiah23:9 Ti Yave a anakhotto omvaanelela yeeyo weera aphwate wiixoona wa ovuwa wootheene ni aayevihe atthu ootheene arino epili mulaponi. 
Isaiah23:10 Ii! Mwaana muthiyana a oTaresisi, mulime mulaponimwanyu ntoko ompakiwaaya muxerexere Nilu, muxelowaanyu khoowowo." 
Isaiah23:11 Yave ootheteela ntata mphareiyani anathukumeliha imwenesaya. Mwaha wa oFenisiya oolamulela weera mapurowaaya oolipihiwaxa ephwatiweke. 
Isaiah23:12 Owo eenre: “Ii! Mwaamwali oowiikosoopa a oSidoni vano moovonyeriwa vathi. Mvenye, mulapuwe ephareiya mpaka oKipro; hata wuuwu iwo khamwiitthuuwawo.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Moone elapo ya oBabiloniya; owo ti muloko olakaseiye. awAsiriya aatatuxa elapo eyo okhala ya axinama a munikareni. Aaweliha itooresaya* sa orica; aahuhula mapurowaaya oolipihiwaxa enatatuxa milepe. 
Isaiah23:14 Ii!, makula matokotoko a oTaresisi, mwiinle! Nipuronanyu noolipihiwaxa noophwatiwa." 
Isaiah23:15 Ehuhuweene yeeyo oTiro onoottiwaliwa wa iyaakha miloko mithannamiili; eyo tiiyo ehuhu ya okumi wa mwene mmoha. Mene simanleene iyaakha miloko mithannamiili iyo, enookhumelela oTiro yeeyo enghimmwa muciponi mwa Puuta:" 
Isaiah23:16 “Ii! Puuta oottiwaliwa, munkuxe makita, mviravirihe musidade. Mmwiipe makita nnenesene, mwiipe icipo sincipale weera muupuweleliwe nyuwo.”" 
Isaiah23:17 Simanleene iyaakha miloko mithannamiili, Yave onimuupuwelela oTiro. Owo onoohokoleela wa mutekwaawe wa opuuta araruwaka ni omwene wootheene wa elapo ya vathi." 
Isaiah23:18 Wa soothesene, ewinelo ya othumihawawe enookhala ya Yave. Ewinelowaawe anoovahiwa yaale ankhala vamaithoni wa Yave, wa sooca soowaatta ni ikuwo sooreera." 
Isaiah24:1 Moone, Yave onoophwata elapo ya vathi, ahononaka. Onoonanariha ekhalelowaaya, awoomolaka amakaaya." 
Isaiah24:2 Ommaleloni wa asaserdoti* onoolikana wa muloko; pwiiya wa murumeiyi, pwiiya muthiyana wa murumeiyi muthiyana, namathumiha wa namathuma, namakopa ni namakopiha, namakoongora wa namakoongoriha." 
Isaiah24:3 Elapo ya vathi enoophwatiwaxa ni enoohuhuliwa woomalela. Yoole ohimme masu ala ti Yave. 
Isaiah24:4 Elapo ennuuma, enanyaala; elapo ya vathi ennayavayava, enanyaala. Asitokweene a elapo ya vathi amporora." 
Isaiah24:5 Elapo yoovaliheya ni amakaaya; awosa aarambura malamulo, aaramusa ikano ehipwatthaka wiiraana woohimala." 
Isaiah24:6 Tivawo nlapho ninlalihaaya elapo ya vathi, amakaaya aakhalano nthowa. Tivawo amaki a elapo ya vathi anlalihiwaaya ni yaale anghala ari vakhaani." 
Isaiah24:7 Eviinyu enyowani yoomala ni ematta ya iwuuva* yoonyaala; ni yaale yeetta ehakalalaka anniipulela. 
Isaiah24:8 Oruma wa ikoma sa moohakalalani woomaalihiwa ni onyakula wa anamacocopolana woomala, makita oosareya ohakakala khanrumatho." 
Isaiah24:9 Awosa khangwuratho eviinyu yiipaka; soowura sohaawaawela anamawura. 
Isaiah24:10 Esidade yoonanarihiwa eri yoothaamiwa. Mulako wa khula empa woowaliwa. 
Isaiah24:11 Mmiseweni awosa ankhuwelela eviinyu; ohakalala wootheene onthatuwa wooripa murima; otteela murima wootheene wohoomoliwa mweelaponi ya vathi. 
Isaiah24:12 Esidade yoothatuwa milepe; maselaaya aapwexakasiwa. 
Isaiah24:13 Onuukhale hiiho mweelaponi eriyari miloko ntoko emvareliwaaya muteko ekopo omaniwaka mwiri wa sooliveira*, hoye hoye sinaasiwaaya soohalahala sa iwuuva* vahoolo wa ohepha." 
Isaiah24:14 Awosa animwiipa ni ohakalala; okhuma ninkela nsuwa anlaleiya ovuwa wa Yave. 
Isaiah24:15 Tivawo amaki a ninkhuma nsuwa ni icirumba sa mphareiya, munttottopele Yave; mvuwihe Nsina na Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli." 
Isaiah24:16 Okhuma ekotenle elapo ningwiiwa atthu yiipaka: “Ovuwa okhale wa Muluku a Ekhaikhai.” Vaheera kineera: “Maayi miyo, maayi miyo! Ii! Wa miyo! Anamavariha amvariha; awosa aneetta moovarihani!”" 
Isaiah24:17 Woopiha, nlitti ni muraakho sinimoowehererani nyuwosa amaki a elapo ya vathi!" 
Isaiah24:18 Ootheene antthawa okhuweliwa wa woopiha, anoomorela mulittini; ootheene ankhuma munlittini, anoopharihiwa. Milako sa wiirimu soohuleya; mathipelo a elapo ya vathi anootetereya." 
Isaiah24:19 Elapo yoonyaanyiwa; etthaya yoophwatiwa, aani elapo yoottikinyiwa woomalela." 
Isaiah24:20 Etthaya emveveleya ntoko namuhapaliwa; enttikinyeya ntoko mukottha ni epheyo. Emmora ni olemelaxiwa niwoko na nthowanaya na ovaanya ni kheevenyatho. 
Isaiah24:21 Nihuku nenenenno Yave onoottaruxa ikuru siri osulu erimu ni mamwene a elapo ya vathi. 
Isaiah24:22 Awosa anoothukumanyihiwa mukaliposo ntoko anamatthukiwa. Anoowaleliwa mukaliposo ni eviraleene mahuku mancipale anoottaruxiwa. 
Isaiah24:23 Mweeri onooyeviheya ni nsuwa nnimuulihiheya muru niwoko Yave a ikuru sootheene onoolamula vamwaako Siyoni ni oYerusaleemu – oovuwihiweene vamaithoni wa asitokweenaawe. 
Isaiah25:1 Ii! Yave, Nyuwo ti Mulukwaaka. Kinimoovuhiwani ni kinoottottopela Nsinananyu, niwoko moopaka itthu sootikhiniha moororomeleyanimwanyu wookwanela – itthu saavaaneliwe khalayi." 
Isaiah25:2 Moohela esidade nthala; esidade yoolipihiwaxa yoothatuwa ittuxoru; munoopakiha weera esidade ya anamarwa ehikhaletho; eyo kheeraseliwaru. 
Isaiah25:3 Tivawo muloko woolipa oneeraaya woottittimiheni; isidade sa anamapuhera sinoowoovani. 
Isaiah25:4 Muri Nipuro nootthawelamo oohaawa ni oothoiwa; Wootthawelela epheyo ni Munttuusi wa oviha. Vano iphumu sa anamapuhera siri ntoko ettheku, emanaka exiri" 
Isaiah25:5 ni ntoko oviha wa nikare. Nyuwo mummaaliha onyakula wa anamarwa; ecipo ya anamapuhera emmaalihiwa ntoko munttuusi wa nihutte omvukulaaya oviha. 
Isaiah25:6 Vamwaako ola Yave a ikuru sootheene onooreherera efesta yookwana oca miloko sootheene; efesta ya iwuuva* ya khalayi – enama yoosiva ni eviinyu yooreerelaxa. 
Isaiah25:7 Vamwaako ola onimwaahula ekuwo enkhuneela miloko sootheene; eluttu enkhuneela ilapo sootheene. 
Isaiah25:8 Owo onoophwata khuluwi okhwa. Yave onlamula sootheene onimuukuttha maithori a ikhove sootheene; onoovenxa wuuliheya muru wa mulokwaawe mweelaponi yootheene. Ti Yave eenre. 
Isaiah25:9 Nihuku nenenenno awosa eniyeere: “Vekhaikhai Owo ti Mulukwaahu; hiyo nnimuroromela ni Owo oonivuluxa. Owo ti Yave, nnimuroromelaahu. Nihakalalelaxe ovuluxawawe.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Ntata na Yave nniitthuuwa vamwaako ola; vaheera oMowabe onoovottiwa vanipuroniwawe ntoko malaxi amvottiwaaya osalani. 
Isaiah25:11 oMowabe onimweemexerawo matata ntoko ompakaawe namayavela ayavelaka, mene Yave onoonyoka wiikuxererawawe, naari ereene ooweraxa." 
Isaiah25:12 Owo onookurumula ixirisaya soorakamelaxa soolipihiwa; onoomoroxela vathi vantthupini. 
Isaiah26:1 Nihuku nenenenno enimwiipiwa oYuda ecipo ela: Nookhalano esidade yoolipaxa; Muluku ookhaliha ovuluxa ntoko ixirisaya ni moowiipithamo. 
Isaiah26:2 Muhule Milako weera muloko woororomeleya ovolowe, muloko ompwaherera moororomeleyani." 
Isaiah26:3 Nyuwo Yave munoomuthokorora ni mmuretteleni wookwanela yoole olakelanxe niwoko onoororomelani Nyuwo. 
Isaiah26:4 Munroromele Yave wa mahuku ootheene, niwoko Yave, aani Yave paahi ti Mwala woohimala." 
Isaiah26:5 Owo onaayeviha yaale ankhala musulusulu; Owo onkuruxa ni omphwata esidade yoorakama; owo ommoroxela vathi. 
Isaiah26:6 Eyo ennyikalasiwa ni inaawo – inawo sa oohasuliwa ni sa oohaawa. 
Isaiah26:7 Ii! Nyuwo muri a murima wa ekhaikhai, ephiro ya oororomeleya ti yoowookoleleya; Nyuwo munookola ephiro ya oororomeleya." 
Isaiah26:8 Neettaka mphironi mwa ikanosanyu hiyo nnoowehererani Nyuwo, Yave. Nsinananyu ni epilaanyu ti ohaawela wa mirimasahu." 
Isaiah26:9 Okumaaka onoohaawelani Nyuwo moohiyuni; oxeexelo munepaaka onootthunani Nyuwo. Saaphiyaka mweelaponi soothorihasanyu, amaki a elapo ya vathi anooxuttera ekhaikhai." 
Isaiah26:10 Naari mutakhali amoreliwaka ikharari, owo khanxuttera ekhaikhai. Mulaponi mwa oowookoleleya owo oneetta mooriheyani ni khanoona ovuwa wa Yave." 
Isaiah26:11 Ii! Yave, ntatananyu nootheteiwa, mene awosa khaanoona. Awosa yooneke nthiti munkhalelaanyu mulokwaanyu ni yuulihiheye muru; mooro athokororeliwaaya amwiittanaanyu waalalihe." 
Isaiah26:12 Yave, Nyuwo moonikhalihera murettele; moonipakela sootheene niwenraahu." 
Isaiah26:13 Ii! Yave Mulukwaahu, asipwiiya akina yaanilamula, mene hiyo ninttittimiha Nsinananyu paahi." 
Isaiah26:14 Awosa ahookhwa kheekhalatho ni okumi; minepasaya khasimvenyereratho. Nyuwo mohaattaruxa mwaaphwataka; Nyuwo moomaliha wuupuweleliwawaya woomalela. 
Isaiah26:15 Ii! Yave, Nyuwo mohaattiha mulokwaahu; aani moohaattiha mulokwaahu. Nyuwo moowina ovuwaxa; mootanuxa nyiinano sootheene sa elapwaahu." 
Isaiah26:16 Yave awosa yaawaattamelani moovalavelanimwaya; Nyuwo mwaattaruxaanyu, awosa yaaxuuvekela." 
Isaiah26:17 Ii!, Muluku, hiyo naakhala vamaithoniwanyu ntoko muthiyana oorupala ahanleene vakhaani oyara, anyokosowaka, akhuwelaka mwaha wa ovoreya wa mooyarani." 
Isaiah26:18 Hiyo naarupala, nnanyonkosowa moovoreyani, vaheera niyanre epheyo paahi. Khaniruuhenle elapo ya vathi ovuluwa; khanaayanre amaki a elapo ya vathi." 
Isaiah26:19 Mene anamakhwaanyu anookhala ni okumi; mittembosaya sinoovenyerera. Nyuwosa munkhala muntthupini, mvenye ni mwiipe ni ohakalala. Nikamenanyu nri ntoko nikame na oxeexelo; elapo ya vathi enimwaayara anamakhwaaya." 
Isaiah26:20 Murowe, mulokwaaka, mwavolowe mukwaartuni ni mwiiwalele. Mwiipithe vakhaani mpaka isarasawe sineeraaya sivire." 
Isaiah26:21 Moone, Yave onkhuma omankaawewo weera athorihe miloko sa elapo ya vathi niwoko na sootthekasaya. Elapo enimoonihera ephome eyeeheriwemo; eyo khayaasungatho anamakhwaaya." 
Isaiah27:1 Nihuku nenenenno Yave onoottaruxa ni ekatanaawe, ekatanaawe yoowoopiha, etokotoko ni yooweraxa, Levitiyani*, enowa eniipurula, Levitiyani*, enowa yoowiipirikixa. Yave onimwiiva enowa yoowoopiha eyo ya mphareiya." 
Isaiah27:2 Nihuku nenenenno onimweeriwa: “Mwiipele ematta ya iwuuva* soowiimaxa. 
Isaiah27:3 Miyo, Yave, ti namakosoopaaya; kinghelela maahi khula nihuku; kinlipelela ohiyu ni othana weera ahikhale anaananarihe ematta eyo." 
Isaiah27:4 Nkinyoonyiwa. Rupulula ni nyiiwa sakixupa, kinimwaattamela seiyo weera kiphwate ni mooro." 
Isaiah27:5 Waahikhala hiiho, awosa erweeke weera etthawele wa Miyo; awosa epakeke murettele ni Miyo; aani epakeke murettele ni Miyo.”" 
Isaiah27:6 Mmahukuni a muhoolo, Yakobe onookhala ni mikwankhwaari ni oYixrayeli onoottuva ithutu, osarihaka elapo yootheene ni soowiima." 
Isaiah27:7 Apaale Yave oomvulaliha ntoko yaale yaamvulalinghe? Apaale ohiiviwa ntoko yiiviwaaya yaale yaamvulalinghe? 
Isaiah27:8 Nyuwo munimuthoriha yoowo mukhottoni mmoomolelaka ottai. Owo onoomola muloko ni iphumusawe sooweraxa ntoko munihukuni na epheyo etokotoko ya ninkhuma nsuwa. 
Isaiah27:9 Hiiho nthowa na Yakobe nnoomalihiwa ni soowiima sookwanela sa ovenxiwa wa sootthekasawe nsikhale ha: owo aapwexa altaari* a maluku ootheene mpaka othatuwa ntthupi khasihala nyiri soothipeleliwa Axera, hata altaari* a erubani*." 
Isaiah27:10 Esidade yoolipihiwaxa yoothaamiwa; yoohimakiwa ni yoottiwaliwa ntoko nikare. Weiwo imombe ixaana sincaayawo sinakona ni simvurula makukhu a iphandisaya. 
Isaiah27:11 Iphandisaya suumaka ni saavasuwaka, asithiyana anootetheera. Vano muloko owo ti woohiiwexexa; tivawo Yoole aapanke ohinaamorelaawe ikharari; Mpattuxaaya khanoonihera murima wooreera." 
Isaiah27:12 Nihuku nenenenno Yave onoottottattotta iphandisaya okhuma wEfrates mpaka nxaapwa na wExipitu, ni nyuwosa anamwane a Yixrayeli munoothukumanyihiwa mmoha mmoha." 
Isaiah27:13 Nihuku nenenennotho ninooruma nipalapatta ntokotoko. Yaale yaariheenle wAsiriya ni yaale yaatthukingwe, eronghiwaka wExipitu animoowa weera emulape Yave vamwaako wootteela oYerusaleemu." 
Isaiah28:1 Ii! Wa ecireemba eri wiixoona wa anamuhapaliwa a wEfrayimi! Ii! Wa wiiphwanelihawaya, mwa iwo onlikana ni ethutu yoonyaala. Ii! Wa yaale yaacorweenle eviinyu." 
Isaiah28:2 Moone, Yave onimurumiha mukina ori ooweraxa ni a ikuruxa. Owo onoovatarulela vathi ecireemba ntoko epheyo yoophwata ni ettheku ya maralala, ntoko epula etokotoko ni mirupi." 
Isaiah28:3 Ecireemba eri wiixoona wa anamuhapaliwa a wEfrayimi enoonyikaleliwa. 
Isaiah28:4 Ophwaneliwawaya ori ophattuwelani wa nreyareya na ethaadyira vanonto ethutu ennyaala. Onookhala ntoko efiigu* yoowaakuva wiitthwa sikina sihinaaye. Anooneru, onoorukula aceeke." 
Isaiah28:5 Nihuku nenenenno Yave a ikuru sootheene onookhala ecireemba yoovuwa, ecireemba yooreeraxa wa mulokwaawe." 
Isaiah28:6 Owo onookhala Munepa wa ekhaikhai wa yoole onkilaathela othoriha; ikuru wa yaale anghokoleela owana ekhotto vamulako. 
Isaiah28:7 Vano yaale amveveleyaxa niwoko na eviinyu ni soowura ti ala: asaserdoti* ni maprofeeti amveveleya niwoko na soowura ni anrukureereya nyuru niwoko na eviinyu. Awosa khaangwera weemela niwoko na owura yoohapala, mmoonelonimwaya anoona soopupuruma ni khaangwera othoriha ekhaikhai." 
Isaiah28:8 Meesa ootheene ari marapheyoru; khaniwoworu Nipuro Nootteela*. 
Isaiah28:9 Awosa ankoha: Owo oneerera omuxuttiha taani? Onimuthalihera mutthengaawe taani? Apaale wa anamwane oohiya waamwa; yaale aneera ohiyaru waamwa? 
Isaiah28:10 Vano ti ha: ikano ni ikano; nlamulo ni nlamulo; yooruma ni yooruma; vakhaani va ni vakhaani iwe. 
Isaiah28:11 Paahi, Muluku onimuuluma ni muloko owo avarelaka muteko nuulumo ni iyano sootikinsa." 
Isaiah28:12 Owo aaheera: “Nna nipuro noowiitthuuwa – munghiye ookhulumuwa iitthuuweke”; ni “nna nipuro noomumulela,” vaheera awosa khayaatthunne wiiwa." 
Isaiah28:13 Tivawo Yave eenraawe: ikano ni ikano, nlamulo ni nlamulo; yooruma ni yooruma; vakhaani va ni vakhaani iwe, moota wooweera awosa emore ninttuli, evulale, epharihiwe ni evariwe." 
Isaiah28:14 Tivawo, mwiiwe masu a Yave, nyuwosa anamaveiha munlamula muloko ola oYerusaleemu." 
Isaiah28:15 Nyuwosa muniikuxerera mweeraka: “Hiyo noopaka wiiraana ni okhwa, nohiiwanana ni nihiye. Naarwaaka nthorihelo noowoopihaxa, khaniniphwanya niwoko ntthawelonahu nipanke wootha ni woowiipithawahu ti olokottha.”" 
Isaiah28:16 Vano Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: “Moone, kiniikaathi nluku oSiyoni; nluku noowootiwa murima – nluku nooreeraxa noottittimiheyaxa ninkhaliha mathipelo oolipaxa; yoole onroromela nenno khattikinyeyaru." 
Isaiah28:17 Kinoopaka ekhaikhai efiiyu yooringelano ni ororomeleya efiiyu yoowookolela. Maralala anoophwata ntthawelonanyu na wootha ni maahi a mirupi anookumburula moowiipithamwanyu. 
Isaiah28:18 Wiiraanawanyu ni okhwa onoomalihiwa; wiiwananawanyu ni nihiye khoolekela. Naarwaaka nthorihelo noowoopiha, nyuwo munoophwanyiwa ni nno." 
Isaiah28:19 Khula emaara nneeraaya nirwe, nno nnimookuxani; khula oxeexelo, ohiyu ni othana.” Wiiwexexa wa mutthenga ola onooruuhela woovaxa." 
Isaiah28:20 Ekaama yookhuveyaxa moota wooweera khamungwera okonawo. Yoowiikhuneela yootepa oyeva ni kheenkwana wiikhuneela. 
Isaiah28:21 Yave onoovenya ntoko aapankaawe vamwaako oPerazimi; onimoonihera isarasawe ntoko oonihenraawe vanreyareyani na oGibiyoni weera akwanihere mutekwaawe; muteko ohisuwelaxiwe; weera akwanihere mutekwaawe, aani mutekwaawe wootikhiniha." 
Isaiah28:22 Vano, mmaalihe otthebwawanyu weera onyoorowaanyu ohitepe; Yave a ikuru sootheene ookithalihera sa ophwata olakelingwe elapo yootheene." 
Isaiah28:23 Mwiiwexexe nsunaka; mpwattheke ni mwiiwe yeeyo kinghimaaka. 
Isaiah28:24 Vano namalima aalimaka weera aphatteye, owo onlima woohihiyerera? Owo ompwaherera olima ni ottipura mahuku ootheene?" 
Isaiah28:25 Owo athatawalihaleene, vekhaikhai onimwaala ervilyaka* ni ekominyu*. Owo omphatteya etrigu ni esevada* vanipuroni nno nitho esenteyo* mukhwipimwaya." 
Isaiah28:26 Mulukwaawe onimuxuttiha amuleelaka mapakelo. 
Isaiah28:27 Ervilyaka* kheeneepetthiwa ni mukhukulu hata ekominyu* ni nreko na ekaaro. Hoye, ervilyaka* enepetthiwa ni ekopo ni ekominyu* ni ephandi." 
Isaiah28:28 Ontthuneya oxila etrigu weera epakiwe epaawu; tivawo ohintthuneyaaya opwaherera oxila wa mahuku ootheene. Naari namalima eettihaka nreko na ekaaro yoohoora etrigu, ikavalusawe* khasinimuxila yoowo." 
Isaiah28:29 Sootheene iyo sinrweela wa Yave a ikuru sootheene, oohilikanxereya moolakanimwawe ni Muneene miruku." 
Isaiah29:1 Ii! Wa nyuwo, wAriyeli, wAriyeli, esidade aakonenlaawe Davide! Khula eyaakha mumpwaherera ni ifestasanyu." 
Isaiah29:2 Hata hiiho kinoorica wAriyeli; eyo enimwiinla ni enoolalamika; eniikhale wa Miyo ntoko ttukuttha a altaari*. 
Isaiah29:3 Kinoorica moota woomalela; kinimoorukureerihani ni itoore* soorica kirehereraka soowelelano exiraanyu. 
Isaiah29:4 Mukurumungweene, munimuuluma vatthayani; nsunanyu noohiiwanyeya nniiwiwe muntthupini. Nsunanyu nnikhume vatthayani ettuusittuuseene; nnikhale ntoko waapa woorweela muntthupini." 
Isaiah29:5 Vaheera amwiittanaanyu ancipale anoothatuwa ntoko ntthupi nootteettheya; nakupa a anamapuhera ntoko makamba amvavihiwa ni epheyo. Eyo eniyeereiye woowaakuveya, wootutuxereya," 
Isaiah29:6 Yave a ikuru sootheene onimoowa mutarini, motetereyani ni moorumani otokotoko; muyuupuruni ni mutthekuni ni mmalumini a mooro woolaliha." 
Isaiah29:7 Miloko sincipalexa soowanano wAriyeli; seiyo singwanano wAriyeli sirweelaka ni siricaka nipuronaya noolipaxa, nsikhale ntoko yeeyo eneereya moolohani ni mmooneloni wa ohiyu." 
Isaiah29:8 Eniikhale ntoko mulopwana oovoliwa etala onloha acaaka, mene aavenyaka, omphwanya avoliweene etala; ntoko mulopwana oovoliwa ntthona onloha awuraka, mene aavenyaka oohilipa omphwanya vammilo omuumaleene. Nsikhale hiiho ni miloko sincipale sineeraaya siwaneno mwaako Siyoni." 
Isaiah29:9 Owuumeeni owanoni ni mutikhiniheye; mwiipake oohoona mpwaherere ohoona; mukhaleke oohapaliwa muhiwunre; mumveveleya muhiwunre yoohapala. 
Isaiah29:10 Yave ohootannyerani okonaxa; Owo oophuta maitho a maprofeeti; Owo ookuttelela nyuru sa anamoonihera* 
Isaiah29:11 Wa nyuwosa eyoonihero ela yootheene ti masu oowaleliwa mulivuruni paahi. Vano nyuwo mwamvaha elivuru ela mukina ongwera osoma, mmweerelaka: “Dyoontte, musomeke,” owo onoowaakhulani: “Nkingwera, niwoko yoowaleliwa.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Naari mwamvaha elivuru ela mukina ohingwera osoma, mmweerelaka: “Dyoontte, musomeke,” owo onoowaakhulani: “Nkingwera osoma.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Yave oneera: “Muloko ola onkaattamela ni masu ni onkittittimiha ni iyano paahi, vaheera mirimasaya siri ottaiwaka. Onkilapa ni ekhovelelo ya atthu paahi." 
Isaiah29:14 Tivawo, kineeraaka kitikhinihetho muloko ola ni sootikhiniha sincipale; miruku sa anamiruku sinooriheya; owalaala wa oocendyeraaya onkoongora.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Ii! Wa yaale amvara muteko muxiirini emwiipithihaka Yave soovaanelasaya; yaale amvaanela soonyeengasaya mpiphini, yiixeerelaka: “Onkoona taani? Onsuwela taani yeela?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Nyuwosa mumvirikanyiha itthu. Ori ntoko wuupuwela weera namoopa a nyaapu onlikana ni oloko. Apaale yeeyo yoopakiwa enoomweerela namapakaaya: “Owo khakipanke”? Apaale mwaapu onoowera omweerela namoopa a nyaapu: “Owo khasuwenle etthu”? 
Isaiah29:17 Woowaakuveya oLibanu onootatuxiwa elapo ya ethaadyira ni elapo eyo enoolikana ni othako. 
Isaiah29:18 Nihuku nenenenno atthu oohiiwa animwiiwa masu a elivuru, ni mpiphini ni mmunttuusini maitho a atthu oohoona animoona." 
Isaiah29:19 Emaara ekinatho atthu oowiiyeviha anoomuhakalalela Yave; atthu oohaawa anoomuhakalalela Ootteela a oYixrayeli. 
Isaiah29:20 Anamapuhera ankoongora ni hiihotho anamatthebwa; ootheene antthunaxa sootakhala anoomalamalihiwa," 
Isaiah29:21 yaale animutatuxa nanthowa ohikhalano nthowa ni nsu nimoha paahi; onuulummwa milattu animvirikanyihela namwaakiha, ekhalelaka onamoona woowootha, ehiihaka hiiho weera ehooneye ekhaikhai." 
Isaiah29:22 Tivawo Yave omooponle Abrahaamu eerenlaawe ekhapira ya Yakobe: “Ekhapira ya Yakobe kheeyevihiwatho, hata ekhovaaya khayaamoratho." 
Isaiah29:23 Awosa yaawoonaka anamwanaaya eriyaraaya – muteko wa matataaka – vano anoolaleiya Nsinanaka ntoko Nootteela; awosa animwaakhulela weera Muluku a Yakobe ti Ootteela ni anoopwaherera emuttittimihaka Muluku a oYixrayeli. 
Isaiah29:24 Yaale anghapuwa mmunepani anookhalano wiiwexexa ni anamattaandawula animwaakhulela oxuttihiwa.” 
Isaiah30:1 “Ii! Wa anamwane oottiyamaaru,” onghima Yave, “Ii! Wa yaale ankwanihera soowuupuwela sihinrweela wa Miyo; yaale aniiwanana kihaakhulenle, yaandyeereraka sootthekasaya." 
Isaiah30:2 Ii! Wa yaale anrowa wExipitu ehikikoherenre; yaale anuupuwela weera waakiha wa Farawu* onimwaakhavihera ni munttuusi wa wExipitu onimwaavaha nipuro noolipaxa. 
Isaiah30:3 Vaheera waakiha wa Farawu* onoowuulihihani muru; munttuusi wa wExipitu onimooyevihihani. 
Isaiah30:4 Naari asitokoweenaaya erowaka oZowaani ni anamitthengaaya ephiyaka oHanesi," 
Isaiah30:5 ootheene animuulihiheya muru niwoko na muloko ohinaavareleya muteko; muloko ohinruuha ekhavihero hata onnene, mene wuulihihaxa muru paahi.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Masu mwaha wa axinama a oNegeba: Abuurwaaya ni ikamelusaya silemeliweene mihakhu, anarumiha simviravira mweelaponi yoosareya ohaawa ni ovalavela, yoosareya amwatto alopwana ni athiyana, yoosareya ivili ni inowa soowali, erowaka wa mulokweene yoowo woohimuteko." 
Isaiah30:7 Awosa anrowa wExipitu ori woohimutekoxa. Tivawo kinttehaaka Rahabi ohimuteko. 
Isaiah30:8 Murowe vaanaanova, mwaalepele vatthaabwani; mwaalepele mulivuruni weera eyo ekhale namoona oohimala wa mahuku a muhoolo." 
Isaiah30:9 Muloko owo ti woovaanya, anamwane oowootha, anamwane ahintthuna wiiwelela ikano sa Yave." 
Isaiah30:10 Awosa aniweerela anamoonihera*: “Muhikhalenotho moonelo!” ni wa maprofeeti: “Muhinooniheretho yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai! Munithalihere masu oosiveliha, muhime iyoonihero soolokottha." 
Isaiah30:11 Muhiye ephiro eyo; musembe musewe owo; mmaaleke onoopopiha ni Ootteela a oYixrayeli.” 
Isaiah30:12 Tivawo, Ootteela a oYixrayeli oneeraawe: “Mweenre mukhootta mutthenga ola muroromelaka nihasu ni sootakhala," 
Isaiah30:13 yoottheka ela enoothatuwa wa nyuwosa ntoko exiri yoorakamelaxa ehinaaye omora, enimwaaleya, enookhutubuwa, mwa yeeyo eneera emore wootutuxereya." 
Isaiah30:14 Eyo enoopwexakaseya ntoko nivali; yoopwexiwa moota wooweera variyari wa mipattasaya khanimphwanyeyaru nivali noovalela mooro naari orikela maahi.” 
Isaiah30:15 Muluku onlamula sootheene, Ootteela a oYixrayeli oneera ha: “Ovuluxiwawanyu ori moorukunxani murima ni ngwiitthuuwani; ikurusanyu sirimoomalani ni moororomelani, vaheera nyuwosa khamutthunne." 
Isaiah30:16 Nyuwosa mweenre: ‘Hoye, nnootthawa ni ikavalu*.’ Vano munootthawa! ‘Nnimweettiha ikavalu* soowaakuveyaxa.’ Vano anamattharelelaanyu ti eneera yaakuve ophiya." 
Isaiah30:17 Atthu macira muloko anootthawa woopiha wa mutthu mmoha ni niwoko na woopihiwa wa atthu athanu, ootheene nyuwosa munootthawa mpaka muneeraanyu mwahiiwe ntoko eneneero vamwaako, ntoko ecaambulo vanttumuxani.”" 
Isaiah30:18 Hata hiiho Yave ontthunaxa woomorelani ikharari. Owo onoovenya weera awoonihereni murima wooreera. Vano Yave ti Muluku a ekhaikhai. Ooreelihiwa ootheene yaale aningweherera Yoowo! 
Isaiah30:19 Ii! Muloko wa oSiyoni ommaka oYerusaleemu, nyuwosa khamwiinlatho. Moota owo aneeraawe awoonihereni onnene nyuwosa mwaamukhuwelelaka ekhavihero! Owo iiwaru, onoowaakhulani." 
Isaiah30:20 Naari Yave oovahakani yooca ya omwiittana ni maahi a ohaawa, ahusihaanyu khayiivithatho; nyuwosa munoowoona ni maithwaanyu." 
Isaiah30:21 Naari mwaahapuwelaka moono woolopwana hoye hoye woothiyana, maaruwaanyu animwiiwa nsu ottuliwanyu neeraka: “Ephiro ti ela, mutthare.”" 
Isaiah30:22 Vanonto munooveiha milukusanyu soolokottha soohuruweliwa eparatha* ni icaambulosanyu soohuruweliwa eyuuma yoorikaxa; munoovonyera vaate ntoko nttapwatta noonanara mweerelaka: “Khuma!” 
Isaiah30:23 Owo onimooruuhelanitho epula wa mmiso muneeraanyu mwaale ni etthaya enooruwera yooca yoowaatta. Vanihukuni nenenenno mihuwosanyu sinimooca moowaatta. 
Isaiah30:24 Imombe ni abuuru aamvareliwa muteko olima animooca malaxi ni maakha oowuutuwanyeriwa ni ekhope ni ehipa. 
Isaiah30:25 Mmanyaakoni ni mmareyareyani oorakamela ootheene eniyeereiyeke ereenemo maahi, munihukuni nno na noomala, saapittuwaka itoore*." 
Isaiah30:26 Mweeri onimwaara ntoko nsuwa ni nsuwa nnimoopaxa woopwexerereya mahuku mathannameeli, Yave aarehereraka soovulalihiwa sa mulokwaawe ni aalamihaka makhwatta Owo aatannyenraawe." 
Isaiah30:27 Moone, Nsina na Yave ninrweela ottaiwene, isarasawe sivarelaka ni mahutte ooriipihana a mwiixi; iyanosawe soosareya isara ni nluminawe ti mooro woolaliha." 
Isaiah30:28 Iphumusawe siri ntoko miipiili ammireiha mpaka muxiko. Owo omveera miloko mutheloni ya ophwata; Owo omvolongha mmwaano mwa miloko etthu eneettiheriwa mwa yeeyo enghapuxa. 
Isaiah30:29 Nyuwo munimwiipa ntoko muniipelaanyu ohiyu wa efesta yootteela; mirimasanyu sinoohakalala ntoko muloko woomwiiwa mpetta, owelaka mwaako wa Yave, Mwala wa oYixrayeli." 
Isaiah30:30 Yave onimwiiwiha nsunawe noovuwaxa ni onimoonihera ikuru sa moonowaawe woowoopopiha. Onimoonihera onyoonyiwawawe mmalumini a mooro woolaliha, eriyari ya epheyo etokotoko, etari ni maralala." 
Isaiah30:31 Nsu na Yave nnoophwata wAsiriya; Owo onoomaliha ni ekopwaawe ya emwene. 
Isaiah30:32 Omana wootheene Yave aneeraawe aphwanyihe wAsiriya ni ekopwaawe yoottaruxa onootthareleya murumani wa ecipo ya ikoma ni amakita, Owo awanaka ni nyoonosawe soowera." 
Isaiah30:33 oTopeti woorehereriwa khalayi; ooreherereliwawo mwene. Moorowaaya ti woowaattaxa ni mutokotoko, okukumaka. Iphumu sa Yave simpatta ntoko enxofre* evarelaka mooro." 
Isaiah31:1 Ii wa yaale anrowa wExipitu yaasaasaka ekhavihero; yaale anroromela ikavalu* ni ikaarosaya soowaatta, anroromela mwa ikuru sa anamweettihaaya, mene khaaningweha Ootteela a oYixrayeli naari khaanaasaasa ekhavihero enrweela wa Yave." 
Isaiah31:2 Wa soothesene, Yave ti a mirukutho ni ongwera oruuhela erisa; Owo khanceendya maswaawe. Owo onoovenyera impa sa anamariheya, aawananakano yaale anaakhavihera anamapaka a soonanara." 
Isaiah31:3 awExipitu ti atthu, khaahiyono Muluku ni ikavalusaya* ti sa erutthu, khasihiyono munepa. Yave aatheteyaka ntata, vano yoole onkhavihera onookwakwathuwa ni yoole onkhaviheriwa onoomora – ooweeli anooriheya." 
Isaiah31:4 Yeeyo Yave onkeerelawe ti ela: “Hiiho ntoko mwatto mutokotoko onoopelaawe murika, mukhwipi yoovaraawe onamurica mukuttula wa akukhuli, owo khanoova okhuwelawaya, hiihotho Yave a anakhotto onookhuruwa weera awane vamwaako Siyoni ni mmattumuxanimwaya." 
Isaiah31:5 Hiiho ntoko ipalame sinaakhapelelaaya axaanaaya ni mapuphaaya, Yave a anakhotto onimwaakiha oYerusaleemu; Owo onimwaakiha ni onoovuluxa; Owo onoovira osuluwaya, amoopoleke yoowo.”" 
Isaiah31:6 Ii! aYixrayeli, munghokoleele Yoowo mwaamvaanyaxiyaanyu." 
Isaiah31:7 Vano vanihukuni nenenenno ootheene nyuwosa munookhootta miluku soolokottha sa eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa soopakiwa ni matataanyu a onamattheka. 
Isaiah31:8 wAsiriya onoomora mwa ekatana ehikhanle ya mutthu; ekatana ehikhanle ya anamakhwa enoomuhonona yoowo. Awosa anootthawa ekatana ni amiravowaaya anoovarihiwa miteko sooviha. 
Isaiah31:9 Nipuronaya noolipaxa nnoomora niwoko na woova; asitokweenaaya yoonaka eneneero ya ekhotto, anoorukureereya nyuru,” onghima Yave, mwa Yoowo moorowaawe onkhala oSiyoni, niikhonawe ninkhala oYerusaleemu." 
Isaiah32:1 Moone, mwene onoolamula moororomeleyani ni anamalamula anoolamula mweekhaikhaiyini." 
Isaiah32:2 Khula mutthu onookhala ntoko mwiikittho wa epheyo ni wootthawelela ettheku, ntoko nyooloko sa maahi munikareni ni munttuusi wa mwala mutokotoko mweelaponi yoowuumaxa." 
Isaiah32:3 Vano maitho a yaale anoona kheewaleyatho ni maaru a yaale aniiwa animwiiwa. 
Isaiah32:4 Muupuwelo wa oowaakuva opaka onoowera othoriha nnene ni nlumi nookokomela nnimuuluma nnenesene woohihaawano. 
Isaiah32:5 Mulolo khiitthaniwatho neethi hata mutakhali khattittimihiwatho. 
Isaiah32:6 Vano mulolo onuuluma sa ololo, uupuwelaka paahi soonanara: owo ompaka itthu soohitteela amwaraxelaka soowootha mwaha wa Yave. Owo onimuhiya oovoliwa etala woohikhalano yooca ni ommwiimana maahi nantthona." 
Isaiah32:7 Mweettelo wa mutakhali ti woonanara, owo omvaanela soowuupuwela soonanara weera aaphwate oohaawa, orookhalaru odyoonttelelawawe wa ekhaikhai." 
Isaiah32:8 Vaheera neethi sa oneethi ni owo onaakiha yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai. 
Isaiah32:9 Asithiyana nyuwosa muri emaalelo, mvenye ni mukiiwe; anamwane asithiyana nyuwosa munoona weera moolipa, mwiiwe yeeyo kintthunaaka wooleelani." 
Isaiah32:10 Eviraleene eyaakha emoha ni vakhaani, nyuwosa munoona weera moolipa munootteenguwa; ohepha wa iwuuva* onimooceeleya ni ohepha wa soowiima khookhala." 
Isaiah32:11 Muthukumele nyuwosa asithiyana muri emaalelo, Owuumeeni owanoni anamwane asithiyana nyuwosa munoona weera moolipa. Muruleke ni ngware isaakho!" 
Isaiah32:12 Mmane ekakasa niwoko na imatta sooreera, niwoko na imatta sa iwuuva* soowiimaxa," 
Isaiah32:13 niwoko na elapo ya mulokwaaka, elapo yoosareya rupulula ni nyiiwa, aani mwiinlele impa sootheene soosareya ohakalala ni esidade ela yoosareya otteeliwa murima." 
Isaiah32:14 Nipuro noolipihiwaxa nnoothaamiwa, esidade ya minyakunyaku enoohiiwa, nipuro noolipaxa ni etoore* ya anamalipelela enoothatuwa nthala wa mahuku ootheene, ohakalala wa abuuru ni moocamo mihuwo" 
Isaiah32:15 mpaka nneeraahu nikuruxeliwe Munepa wiirimu ni nikare nithatuwe elapo yooruwereya ni imatta sooruwereya sinlikana othako. 
Isaiah32:16 Ekhaikhai enoomaka munikareni ni ororomeleya mmatta mooruwereya. 
Isaiah32:17 Yoowiima ya ekhaikhai eniikhale murettele; emalihero ya ororomeleya eniikhale mmaaleleyo ni nroromelo wa mahuku ootheene. 
Isaiah32:18 Mulokwaaka onoomaka mmapuroni a murettele, okhalaka moomaaleleya ni mmapuroni ootikithereya," 
Isaiah32:19 naari maralala ephwataka othakho ni esidade ehononiwaka. 
Isaiah32:20 Moota muneeraanyu mutteeliwe, mwaalaka mukerekhere nyooloko sootheene, muhiyaka mihuwosanyu ni abuurwaanyu yaasaka weetta." 
Isaiah33:1 Ii! Wa nyuwo, namaphwata, nyuwo muhaakumve ophwatiwa. Ii! Wa nyuwo namavariha, nyuwo muhaakumve ovarihiwa! Nyuwo mwaamalihaka ophwata, munoophwatiwa; mwaamalihaka ovariha, munoovarihiwa." 
Isaiah33:2 Ii! Yave, munoonihere murimaanyu wooreera; hiyo nnoohaawelani Nuwo. Mukhaleke ikurusahu khula oxeexelo, ovuluxiwawahu mweehuhuni yoowoopiha." 
Isaiah33:3 Moorumani mwa nsunanyu miloko sinootthawa; Nyuwo mwaavenyaka, iyo sinoomwareya." 
Isaiah33:4 Ii! Miloko, sinoothukumanyiheya soohuhulasanyu ntoko onthukumanaawe nasope, sinimwiivonyera mwa soohuhula ntoko nakupa a misoope." 
Isaiah33:5 Yavetho oovuwihiwa, Owo onkhala osulusulu; Owo onoosariha oSiyoni ekhaikhai ni ororomeleya." 
Isaiah33:6 Owo onookhala mathipelo oolipeene wa ehuhuwaanyu, mihakhu sitokotoko sa ovuluxiwa, miruku ni osuwela; omoova Yave ti exaavi ya mirukusene seiyo." 
Isaiah33:7 Moone, asilopwanaaya ookhomaalaxa ankhuwela mmuseweni; anamarumihiwa a murettele aniinlaxa." 
Isaiah33:8 Misewe sitokotoko soohiiwa; khaawowo amviramo; woonanariheya wiiraana, anamoonaaya aaramusiwa; khoonttittimihaniwa." 
Isaiah33:9 Elapo yohuumelela ni yookotakota; oLibanu onnyaala woowuulihiheyeene muru; oXaroni onlikana wAraba ni oBaxani ni oKaremeli woomora makukhu. 
Isaiah33:10 Yave oneera: “Kinoovenya vaanaanova; vano kinoovuwihiwa; kinoottittimihiwa vaanaanova.” 
Isaiah33:11 Nyuwosa munrupala makamba, munayara malaxi; iphumusanyu ti mooro onoohisani." 
Isaiah33:12 Miloko sinoohisiwa ntoko empakeliwaaya ekaali*; sinoovonyeriwa vayikho ntoko nyiiwa soothikilasiwa. 
Isaiah33:13 Nyuwosa muri ottai, mwiiwe yeeyo kipankaaka; nyuwosa muri vakhiviru, mwaakhele ikurusaka!" 
Isaiah33:14 Anamattheka oSiyoni aatteenguwa; yaale ahikhalanne Muluku aanthukumela yeeraka: “Taani a hiyo ongwera opwaherera ni okumi mmooroni woohisa? Taani a hiyo ongwera opwaherera ni okumi mmalumini oohimala?” 
Isaiah33:15 Yoole oneetta moota woororomeleya ni onuuluma ekhaikhai, yoole onkhootta ewinelo yoohiroromeleya ohinaakhela makhwankwa, yoole ohintthuna wiiwa soovaanela sa anamwiiva, akhoottaka woona soonanara." 
Isaiah33:16 Ti yoole mulopwana aneera akhale musulusulu ni wootthawelawawe onuukhale mwaako. Onookhalano yooca ni maahi kheemuthowa. 
Isaiah33:17 Maithwaanyu anoomoona mwene ngwaaranimwawe, yoonaka wunnuwa wa elapo yootheene." 
Isaiah33:18 Mmuupuwelonimwanyu munimuupuwelela soowoopiha sa khalayi: “Ori woowi mutokweene ole? Ori woowi aalikela aakhelelaka musurukhu? Ori woowi mutokweene a itoore*?” 
Isaiah33:19 Khamoonatho muloko ole woowiixoona; mulokweene yoowo ni nuulumo noohiiweya, noorikaxa ni noohiiwexexeya." 
Isaiah33:20 Moone oSiyoni, esidade ya ifestasahu; maithwaanyu animoona oYerusaleemu, woomaka wa murettele, eheema eneera ehivenxiwe; ikhomosaya khasirwa sipheliwa naari mikhoyisaya khasipasiwaru." 
Isaiah33:21 Weiwo Yave onookhala Mulukwaahu a ikuru sootheene; Nniikhale ntoko nipuro nrino nyooloko ni mirora soothanuwa. Khanivirarumo nikula ni itthaabwa sineettiheriwa naari nikula ntokotoko. 
Isaiah33:22 Vano Yave ti Mphukaahu onnilamula. Yave ti Mwenaahu; ti Yoowo aneera anivuluxe. 
Isaiah33:23 Mikhoyisaya sooxekexeya, nrimbunaya nikula ntokotoko nooxekexeya, mitthambo khasithapurungwe. Vano sinookawaniwa soohuhula soowaattaxa ni mpakatho atthu ooheetta anookuxa soohuhula." 
Isaiah33:24 Khawoworu mmaki a oSiyoni aneera eere: “Kinoovoreiwa” ni soottheka sa yaale amankewo sinooleveleliwa. 
Isaiah34:1 Murweeke, nyuwosa miloko ni mwiiwe, mwiiwe nnenesene miloko nyuwosa! Elapo yiiwe ni sootheene sirimo; elapo ya vathi ni sooruwerasaya!" 
Isaiah34:2 Yave oonyoonyeriwa miloko sootheene; isarasawe siri vasulu wa anakhottwaaya ootheene. Owo onimwaaphwata moota woomalela; Owo onimwinnyerera mookhwaani. 
Isaiah34:3 Anamakhwaaya anoovonyeriwa vaate; mittembosaya sinimunkhaxa; nyaako sinoosareya ephomaaya. 
Isaiah34:4 Ithenyeeri sa wiirimu sinoolakaseya ni irimu sinoovitikeya ntoko buukhu a khalayi; anakhotto ootheene a wiirimu anoomora ntoko makukhu oowuuma a evideira* ni a efiigu. 
Isaiah34:5 Ekatanaaka emalihaleene mutekwaaya wiirimu; moone, vano musuwele weera eyo enookhuruwela othoriha wEdomi, muloko owo kithorihenlaaka ophwata." 
Isaiah34:6 Ekatana ya Yave yoosareya ephome; yoohuruweleya makhura – ephome ya iputtiputthi ni ipuri, makhura a miso sa anapunci. Vano Yave onnyesereriha yooveleela oBozera, noomala mweelaponi mwa wEdomi." 
Isaiah34:7 Inari sinoomora vamoha ni aximombe ni imombe ilopwana. Elapwaaya enoosareya ephome ni ntthupi nnoosareya makhura. 
Isaiah34:8 Vano Yave ookhalano nihukunawe na nthorihelo, eyaakha ya ikuhu weera aakihe mulattu wa oSiyoni." 
Isaiah34:9 Nyooloko sa wEdomi sinoothatuwa nnyoma; ntthupinaya nnoothatuwa enxofre* evarelaka; elapwaaya enoothatuwa nttoko. 
Isaiah34:10 Kheecipihiwa ohiyu naari othana; mwiixaaya khoohiyerera otthuwela. Wa ikhapira sootheene sinoohala mathalaru; khaawo aneera avirewo. 
Isaiah34:11 Esiisi ya munikareni ni namame onookuxa elapo eyo; esiisi etokweene ni nakhuku anoopakamo ipuurusaya. Muluku onimookolela wEdomi efiiyu yooringelano ya ophwata ni efiiyu yoowookolela ya mathala. 
Isaiah34:12 Maneethaaya kheekhalanowo etthu eniitthaniwa omwenaaya. Anamwane a mwenaaya ootheene ankoongora. 
Isaiah34:13 Nyiiwa sinookhuneela isidadesaya soolipaxa, aani rupulula ni nyiiwa mapurowaaya oolipihiwaxa. Nno nnoothatuwa nipuro ankhalaayawo akhwatte ni isiisi." 
Isaiah34:14 Soopattuxiwa sa munikareni sinimwaakumanano akusupa, ni ikhomaci sinimwiitthanana. Iwotho sinimwiitthuuwawo sooweetta ohiyu ni sinoophwanyamo nipuro nookhala." 
Isaiah34:15 Mwemmo esiisi enoopakamo epuuruwaaya, enoorelamo moocaaya; enootothola yaakosoopaka axaanaaya mmunttuusini mwa mapuphaaya. Weiwo axaaka anoothukumanatho eeli-eeli." 
Isaiah34:16 Ngwehe mulivuruni mwa Yave ni musome: Soopattuxiwa sootheene iyo sinookhalawo, khaawo anaakhale meekhaawe. Vano ti eyanowaawe elamulenle ni Munepaawe onimwaathukumanyiha." 
Isaiah34:17 Owo onimwaakawela mapuro ootheene; ntatanawe nnookawa mmiringoni; seiyo sinookuxa wa mahuku ootheene sikhalakawo ikhapira ikhapirasene. 
Isaiah35:1 Nikare ni elapo yoowuumelela enoohakalala; nikare nnoohakalala nittuvaka ntoko ethutu yoothapuruwa. 
Isaiah35:2 Sinoottuva ithutu; sinoohakalala vancipale sikhuwelaka ni murima wootteela. Nnoovahiwa ovuwa wa oLibanu ni mpaka waara wa oKaremeli ni oXaroni. Weiwo Yave onimoonihera ovuwawawe ni waara wa Mulukwaahu. 
Isaiah35:3 Mulipihe nyoono sookhulumuwa; mulipihe makutha ootteenguwa. 
Isaiah35:4 Mwaaleele yaale amporora: “Mukhaleke oolipeene, muhoove; Mulukwaanyu onimoowa, onimoowa ni ikuhu, ni ottaruxiwa wa wiirimu; Owo onimoowa weera oovuluxeni.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Vano maitho a oohoona anoohuleya ni maaru a oohiiwa animwiiwa. 
Isaiah35:6 Vano atthu ooheetta anootupha ntoko naahe ni nlumi na mutthu oohuuluma nnimwiipa ni ohakalala. Maahi anoopiluwa munikareni, aani nyooloko mweelaponi yoowuumelela." 
Isaiah35:7 Ehaava yoovihaxa enoothatuwa nratta; etthaya yoovoliwa ntthona enoothatuwa ihime soosareya maahi. Vanipuroni yaakhalaayawo akhwatte, vano onoophuwa munyepu, ettheere ni etiili." 
Isaiah35:8 Ni musewe mutokotoko onookhalawo; onimwiitthaniwa Musewe Wootteela. Yaale oohitteela kheeviramo; onookhala wa yaale paahi aneettamo; alolo kheeviramo. 
Isaiah35:9 Khakhalawo mwatto naari mwaamunama ooluwa. Khawoworu anaaphwanyaneyemo. Oovuluxiwa paahi eneera yeettemo," 
Isaiah35:10 ni oowoopoliwa ni Yave anoohokolowa. Awosa anoovolowa oSiyoni yiipaka ni ohakalala. Ti ohakalala woohimala onuukhale icireembasaya. Ohakalala ni murima wootteela onimwaaphwanya ni murima wooriipa ni ohihimera onootthawa. 
Isaiah36:1 Vayaakhani yanaamuloko niixexe ya olamula wa Hizekiya, Senakeribi, mwene a wAsiriya, aawanano isidade soolipihiwa sootheene sa oYuda, anakuxa." 
Isaiah36:2 Vano mwene a wAsiriya aamurumihela mutokweene a anakhottwaawe vamoha ni anakhotto ancipalexa okhuma oLakixi wa mwene Hizekiya oYerusaleemu. Vanonto mutokweene ole eemelaka vayiikalaandeni a vanrattani na osulu, mmuseweni onkela wa Ematta ya Namakattha," 
Isaiah36:3 Eliyakimi, mwaana mulopwana a Hilikiya, namareherera empa ya emwene, Xebena, namalepa, ni Yowa, mwaana mulopwana a Asafi, mutokweene a ilivuru sa nyaha sa mwene, yaarowa omukumanano." 
Isaiah36:4 Vano mutokweene a anamalakaawe mwene aaweerela: “Mwamuleele Hizekiya: ‘Mwene mutokweene, mwene a wAsiriya onkoha: Munroromelani?" 
Isaiah36:5 Nyuwo muneera weera mookhalano miruku ni owera owana, mene ti masu a siiyo paahi. Munimuroromela taani wookivaanya hiiho?" 
Isaiah36:6 Moone, munroromela wExipitu ori ntoko ettheere yoowintakiwa enghoma ni emvulaliha ntata na mutthu onlipano yeeyo. Ti hiiho Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu, ongwerihelaawe animuroromela." 
Isaiah36:7 Mwaakeerela: “Hiyo nnimuroromela Yave Mulukwaahu” – Hizekiya aavenxa mmanttumuxanimwawe ni altaaraawe aanyesererihaka ootheene olapa valtaarini* oYerusaleemu! 
Isaiah36:8 ‘Vano mwiiwanane ni pwiiyaaka, mwene a wAsiriya. Miyo kinimoovahani ikavalu* macira miloko miili nyuwo mwakhalano anamweettihaaya!" 
Isaiah36:9 Nyuwo munroromela wExipitu weera yoovaheeni ikaaro ni anamweettihaaya. Vaheera khamungwera ongwina naari mutokweene mmoha a asikhaani a apwiyaaka. 
Isaiah36:10 Ohiya toko yeeyo, kirweenle owanano ni ophwata elapo ela niwoko na olamula wa Yave. Ti Yave mwaneenaawe okeerenle weera kiwanane ni kiphwate nipuro nna.’”" 
Isaiah36:11 Vano Eliyakimi, Xebena, ni Yowa, yaamweerela mutokweene a anamalakaawe mwene: “Dyoontte muulumeke ni arumeiyaanyu munuulumoni na Eramewu, niwoko nnimwiiwexexa. Muhuulume vaHeberi yeenre atthu ari vasulu vaxirini eniiwa.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Wa soothesene, mutokweene a anamalakaawe mwene aawaakhula: “Apwiyaaka aarumiha mutthenga ola wa ootheene – khoohiyono wa pwiiyaanyu ni nyuwosa paahi. Atthu ale vaxirini animooca mahilokaaya ni anoowura minyososaya, hiiho ntoko nyuwosa.”" 
Isaiah36:13 Vano mutokweene a anamalakaawe aaheemela, anakhuwela vaHeberi: “Mwiiwe masu a mwene mutokweene, mwene a wAsiriya!" 
Isaiah36:14 Mwene oneera ha: Muhilokotthiwe ni Hizekiya! Owo khangwera owoopolani mmatatanimwaka. 
Isaiah36:15 Muhimuhiye Hizekiya ooviriyelakani weera munroromele Yave, owo aweerelakani: ‘Vekhaikhai Yave onoonopola hiyo; esidade ela kheerwa evahereriwa mmatatani mwa mwene a wAsiriya.’" 
Isaiah36:16 Muhimwiiwelele Hizekiya! Mwene a wAsiriya oneera ha: Mwiiraane ni miyo ni mwiixinnyerere wa miyo. Hiiho khula mutthu a nyuwo onimooca sa emattaawe ya iwuuva* ni nyirisawe sa efiigu* ni onoowura maahi a muhimenimwawe 
Isaiah36:17 mpaka kineeraaka kookuxeeni kooroihakani mulaponi enlikana elapwaanyu. Elapo eyo erino etrigu ni eviinyu enyowani; sooca ni imatta sa iwuuva*. 
Isaiah36:18 Muhimwiiwelele Hizekiya, niwoko onimoolokotthani aweerelakani: ‘Yave onoonitapuxa.’ Khawoworu muluku mukina wa wakhalaru muloko mukina owenre woopola elapwaaya mwa ntata na mwene a wAsiriya." 
Isaiah36:19 Miluku sa oHamati ni wArepadi siri woowi? Miluku sa oSefarevayimi, siri woowi? Iye khasaawenre ovuluxa oSamariya mmatatanimwaka." 
Isaiah36:20 Khawoworu muluku mukina wa ilapo sootheene seiye owenre woopola elapwaaya mmatatanimwaka. Ongwereya hai Yave woopola oYerusaleemu mmatatanimwaka?” 
Isaiah36:21 Vaheera atthu yaari emaalelo ehimwaakhulaka etthu, niwoko mwene aahaalamulela: “Muhimwaakhule.”" 
Isaiah36:22 Vano Eliyakimi, mwaana mulopwana a Hilikiya, namareherera empa ya emwene, Xebena, namalepa, ni Yowa, mwaana mulopwana a Asafi, mutokweene a ilivuru sa nyaha sa mwene, yaarowa wa Hizekiya ni ikuwo soowaahuwa, enamuthalihera yeeyo mutokweene a anamalakaawe mwene a wAsiriya aahimmaawe." 
Isaiah37:1 Mwene Hizekiya iiwakaru yeeyo, aahaahula ikuwosawe, anawara sowiinanelano, anavolowa Mpaani mwa Yave." 
Isaiah37:2 Aamurumiha Eliyakimi, namareherera empa ya emwene; namalepa Xebena, ni asitokweene a asaserdoti* – ootheene ewanreene isaakho – wa Yesaya, mwaana mulopwana a Amozi." 
Isaiah37:3 Awosa yaamweerela: “Hizekiya oneera ha: Olelo ti nihuku na othanana, ohiihiwa ni oyevihiwa. Nri ntoko muthiyana ohanle vakhaani oyara ahikhanleno ikuru sooyarano." 
Isaiah37:4 Enoowereya weera Yave Mulukwaanyu ohiiwa masu ootheene a mutokweene a anamalaka, mwa yoowo pwiiyaawe, mwene a wAsiriya, aamurumihalaawe omutheya Muluku Mukumi. Yave Mulukwaanyu amuttaruxe niwoko na masu ale. Tivawo, mundyoonttelele Muluku wa hiyo nihanle ni okumi.”" 
Isaiah37:5 Asitokweene a mwene Hizekiya ephiyakaru wa Yesaya,"
