Isaiah37:6 owo aaweerela: “Mwamuleele pwiiyaanyu: ‘Yave oneera ha: Muhoove yeeyo mwiiwalaanyu – masweene yaale murumeiyi a mwene a wAsiriya okiveihalaaweno. 
Isaiah37:7 Mwiiwe, kinoomwiiwiha mwene a wAsiriya mutthenga oneera omutthikihere elapwaawe. Aaphiyakawo, kinoopakiha weera iiviwe.’”" 
Isaiah37:8 Mutokweene a anamalaka a mwene iiwakaru weera mwene a wAsiriya aattimula oLakixi, owo aahokolowatho, anamphwanya mwene awananakano oLibena." 
Isaiah37:9 Vano Senakeribi aahaakhela mutthenga weera Tirehaka, muKuxi, mwene a wExipitu, eera arwaaka weera angwaneno yoowo. Tivawo aamurumihenlaawetho Hizekiya anamitthenga emweerelaka:" 
Isaiah37:10 “Mwamweerele Hizekiya, mwene a oYuda: Muhimuhiye Muluku, mwa Yoowo munimuroromelaanyu, oolokotthakani, Owo aweerelakani: ‘oYerusaleemu khoowiniwa ni mwene a wAsiriya.’" 
Isaiah37:11 Vekhaikhai, mohiiwa seiye mamwene a wAsiriya yaapakenlaaya ilapo sikina, ephwataka woomalela. Munuupuwela weera munimoopoliwa?" 
Isaiah37:12 Miluku sa miloko – miluku sa oGozani, oHarani, oRezefi ni sa atthu a wEdeni yaari oTeli-Asayiri – saaphwatiwa ni makholowaaka sihiweraka wiitapuxa." 
Isaiah37:13 Ori woowi mwene a oHamati; mwene a wArepadi; mwene a esidade ya oSefarevayimi; mwene a oHena hoye hoye a wIwa?” 
Isaiah37:14 Hizekiya aahaakhela ekaratta wa anamitthenga, anasoma. Vano aavolowa Mpaani mwa Yave, anatapuruxa vamaithoni wa Yave." 
Isaiah37:15 Hizekiya aamvekela Yave: 
Isaiah37:16 “Ii! Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, mukilaathiye variyari wa akerubini*, ti Nyuwo paahi muri Muluku a mamwene ootheene a elapo ya vathi. Moopattuxa wiirimu ni vathi." 
Isaiah37:17 Ii! Yave mwiiwe ni moone. Mwiiwe mutthenga Senakeribi orumihalaawe weera amuveihe Muluku Mukumi. 
Isaiah37:18 Ii! Yave! Ettiitthu weera mamwene a wAsiriya yaaphwata milokosene seiye sootheene ni ilaposaya. 
Isaiah37:19 Yaavonyera milukusaya mmooroni, ephwataka, niwoko khasaahiyono miluku, mene nyiri ni maluku paahi, ookheriwa ni atthu." 
Isaiah37:20 Vano Yave Mulukwaahu, munitapuxe mmatatanimwawe weera omwene wootheene wa elapo ya vathi osuwele weera Nyuwo, Yave, ti Muluku.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Vanonto Yesaya, mwaana mulopwana a Amozi, aamurumihela Hizekiya mutthenga ola: “Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli oneera ha: Kohiiwa nivekelonanyu mwaha wa Senakeribi, mwene a wAsiriya." 
Isaiah37:22 Masu Yave omuulumenlaawe yoowo ti ala: Mwaamwali oowiikosoopa a oSiyoni ohooveihani ni ohootthebwani. Mwaana muthiyana a oYerusaleemu ompukunya muru nyuwo mutthawaka. 
Isaiah37:23 Munruwanne taani? Mumveihale taani? Mwaamukhuwelenle taani, mungwehexexaka ngwiixoonani? Ti Ootteela a oYixrayeli!" 
Isaiah37:24 Aani, moomuruwana Yave mwa anamitthengaanyu. Mweenre: ‘Koowela mmattumuxani a nyaako ni ikaarosaka sincipale sa ikavalu*; aani mmattumuxani osulusulu a oLibanu. Kohuuha nyirisaya sa esedari* soorakamaxa; sooreerela sa nyirisaya. Koovolowa mweelaponimwanyu moorakamelaxa ni moothakoni wootikanela." 
Isaiah37:25 Koothipa ihime mweelaponi sa anamarwa ni koowurawo maahi. Kohuumiha nyooloko sootheene sa wExipitu ni inaawosaka.’ 
Isaiah37:26 Khamusuwenle? Kaalakela yeeyo khalayi. Okhuma khalayi miyo kaavaanela yeeyo kinkhumelelihaaka vano – weera nyuwo munoohiya isidade soolipihiwaxa sireene milepe. 
Isaiah37:27 Amakaaya, ekhulumungweene, yaapororaxa ni wuulihiwa muru. Ari ntoko soomela sa ntuphini ni ntoko munyepu; ntoko malaxi ammela vampani, enuuma ehikhomaanle." 
Isaiah37:28 Vaheera Miyo koosuwela muraanyuwo; ehuhu ya orowawanyu ni orwawanyu ni mwaakinyoonyeriwaka. 
Isaiah37:29 Niwoko noowiiwa okinyoonyeriwawanyu ni wiixoonawanyu, kinimoohomani ni nimeso mphulanimwanyu ni yooweettiheriwa mwaamunama vayanoniwanyu koohokoloxerakani ephiro murweenlaanyu." 
Isaiah37:30 Wa nyuwo, Hizekiya, kinimoovahani eneneero ela: Mutano munimooca soomorela ni mwaahiyu seiyo sineera siphuwe. Vaheera eyaakha yanaararu, mwaaleke ni muhepheke; mwaale imatta sa iwuuva* ni muce soowiimasaya." 
Isaiah37:31 Yaale ahanle a ekhapira ya Yuda eniiphuwele ntoko nyiri sinrakamelihaaya mikwankhwaarisaya ni iphandisaya siniima wusawusa. 
Isaiah37:32 Vekhaikhai okhuma oYerusaleemu ni omwaako Siyoni eniihalahalemo akumi. Nthiti na Yave a ikuru sootheene nnookwanihera yeeyo. 
Isaiah37:33 Tivawo, Yave ommweerelaawe ha mwene a wAsiriya: Khavolowa esidade ela hata khalathelamoru naari muupa. Khawanano ni exikudu* hata khateka yooricano." 
Isaiah37:34 Onoohokoleela ephiro orweenlaawe; khavolowa esidade ela,” onghima Yave." 
Isaiah37:35 “Kinimwaakiha esidade ela ni kinoovuluxa mwa osivelawaka ni wa murumeiyaaka Davide.” 
Isaiah37:36 Vano ndyelo a Yave aarowa yaakonenlaayawo awAsiriya, anawiiva anakhotto 185 000. Oxaawaya evenyakaru akinaawo, yaaphwanya yaakonenlaayawo osareiyeene mittembo!" 
Isaiah37:37 Vano Senakeribi, mwene a wAsiriya, aahuukulula iheemasawe, anapwaha. Aahokoleela oNinive, anakhalawo." 
Isaiah37:38 Nihuku nimoha owo alapaka mpaani mwa mulukwaawe Niseroki, anamwanaawe Adrameleki ni Xarezeri yaamwiiva, enatthawela elapo ya wArarati. Mwanawe Esarehadoni ti aamurandenle." 
Isaiah38:1 Ehuhuweene yeele Hizekiya aavoreiwa mpaka ohaleela vakhaani okhwa. Mprofeeti Yesaya, mwaana mulopwana a Amozi, aarowa omuxekura, anamweerela: “Yave oneera ha: ‘Mureherere itthusanyu niwoko munimookhwa; vekhaikhai khamulama.’”" 
Isaiah38:2 Hizekiya aahuluwela oxirini, anamvekela Yave:" 
Isaiah38:3 “Ii! Yave, muupuwelele moota koorumeenlaakani ni ororomeleya ni murima wootheene. Koopaka yeeyo eri yooreera vamaithoniwanyu.” Ni Hizekiya aahiinla vancipalexa." 
Isaiah38:4 Vano Yave aamulamulela Yesaya: 
Isaiah38:5 “Muhokolowe ni mwamuleele Hizekiya: ‘Yave, Muluku a atithinyu Davide oneera ha: Kohiiwa mavekelowaanyu ni kohoona maithoraanyu. Kinimwaandyeerera iyaakha muloko niithanu sa okumaanyu." 
Isaiah38:6 Kinoowoopolani nyuwo ni esidade ela mmatatani mwa mwene a wAsiriya. Kinimwaakiha esidade ela. 
Isaiah38:7 Eneneero eneera ewoonihereni weera Yave onookwanihera ohimalaawe ti ela: 
Isaiah38:8 Kinoopakiha weera munttuusi wa nsuwa otuphele ohokoleelaka ottuli malipa muloko, ottharaka mwaakheriwe mmakweeleloni a Ahazi.’ ” Vano nsuwa naahokoleela malipa muloko." 
Isaiah38:9 Ekaratta ya Hizekiya vahoolo wa erettaawe ni olamihiwawawe: 
Isaiah38:10 Keenre: “Miyo nlelo kihuuluvanleene, vano onootthuneya orowa vamulako wa okhwa ni ovukuleliwa iyaakhasaka sihanle?”" 
Isaiah38:11 Keenre: ‘“Miyo nkimmoonatho Yave, aani Yave mweelaponi mwa akumi; nkingwehatho omutthu hata nkinkhalatho ni yaawo ammaka mweelaponi ya vathi." 
Isaiah38:12 Empaaka yoophwatiwa kinaakhiwa ntoko yaari eheema ya mukukhuli. Okumaaka woovitikiwa ntoko nttaaka omvitikaawe namatthava ni Owo ookithikila ntoko nleembe. Ohiyu ni othana koomalamalihiwa. 
Isaiah38:13 Kaaweherera ni ovilela mpaka oxeexelo, mene ntoko mwatto Owo aapwexa makhuvaaka ootheene. Ohiyu ni othana koomalamalihiwa." 
Isaiah38:14 Kaahiinla ntoko meenkesa hoye hoye naankhwaare, kaattaandawula ntoko ekhunda elalamikaka; maithwaaka aakhaliwa evaasi miyo kiwehexexaka wiirimu. Ii! Yave, Koovalavela – mukikhavihere!”" 
Isaiah38:15 Vano, keereke hai? Owo ohuuluma ni miyo ni Owo muneenaawe ti opanke yeeyo." 
Isaiah38:16 Yave, atthu ankhala mwa itthusene seiyo ni munepaaka onkhalatho mwa seiyo. Mookilamiha, munakikhalihatho ni okumi." 
Isaiah38:17 Vekhaikhai kaahaawela onnenaaka paahi. Moosivelanimwanyu mookokhorela mwa nlitti na ophwata. Moovonyera ottaiwanyu sootthekasaka sootheene. 
Isaiah38:18 Vano nihiye khaningwera woottottopelani hata okhwa khooniipa icipo soowoottottopelani. Yaawo ankhuruwela mulittini khaangwera oweherera ororomeleyawanyu. 
Isaiah38:19 Akumi, paahi aani, akumi anoottottopelani Nyuwo, ntoko miyo kimpakaaka olelo. Asitiithi anaathalihera anamwanaaya sa ororomeleyawanyu." 
Isaiah38:20 Yave ookoopola ni hiyo nnimwiipa ni ikaruma sa mikhoyi mahuku ootheene a okumaahu Mpaani mwa Yave. 
Isaiah38:21 Vano Yesaya eenre: “Muttikitthe efiigu* mmarele vanikhwattani ni owo onoolama.” 
Isaiah38:22 Hizekiya aamukoha: “Eneneero heeni eneera ekoonihere weera kinoovolowa Mpaani mwa Yave?” 
Isaiah39:1 Ehuhuweene yeele Merodaki-Baladani, mwaana mulopwana a Baladani, mwene a oBabiloniya, aamurumihela Hizekiya ikaratta ni yoovaha niwoko aasuwela sa erettaawe ni olamihiwawawe." 
Isaiah39:2 Hizekiya aawaakhela anamitthenga ni ohakalala, anawoonihera sootheene saari mmapuroni a osunga – eparatha*, eyuuma yoorikaxa, itthu sootakansiwasa ni makhura ooreera – mpakatho ekwartu ya ikapwitthisawe ni mihakhusawe sootheene. Hizekiya aawoonihera sootheene saari mpaanimwawe ya emwene ni omwenaawe." 
Isaiah39:3 Vanonto mprofeeti Yesaya aarowa wa mwene Hizekiya, anamukoha: “Ahimaleni asilopwana awo yoorweenleni ni ankhuma woowi?” Hizekiya aamwaakhula: “Ankhumelela elapo yoorakamela ya oBabiloniya.” Yaarweenle okixekura." 
Isaiah39:4 Mprofeeti aamukoha: “Awosa yoonneni mpaanimwanyu ya emwene?” Hizekiya aamwaakhula: “Ahoona sootheene. Koowoonihera mihakhusaka sootheene.” 
Isaiah39:5 Vano Yesaya aamweerela Hizekiya: “Mwiiwe masu a Yave a ikuru sootheene: 
Isaiah39:6 Muhoolommo sootheene sa mpaanimwanyu ni sa seiye makholowaanyu yaathokoronraaya mpaka olelo sinookuxiwa sironghiwaka oBabiloniya. Khasihalaru, oneera Yave." 
Isaiah39:7 Akina a ekhapiraanyu, emusaanyu xaxaxa, anookuxiwa ni anootatuxiwa inoko* mpaani mwa mwene a oBabiloniya.”" 
Isaiah39:8 Hizekiya aamwaakhula: “Masu a Yave muthalinghaanyu aareera.” Owo uupuwela: “Fataari, onuukhale murettele ni olipihiwa mmahukunimwaka.”" 
Isaiah40:1 Muluku oneera: “Mupepese, mupepese mulokwaaka.”" 
Isaiah40:2 Mwalipihe murima oYerusaleemu ni mwalaleiye weera ehuhuwaaya yoovihaxa yoomala, weera sootthekasaya sooliviwa ni weera wohaakhela mmatatani mwa Yave ottaruxiwa iphura niwoko na sootthekasaya." 
Isaiah40:3 Nsu na mukina oniitthana: “Murehererele munikareni ephiro wa Yave; mmookolelele Mulukwaahu musewe munikareni.” 
Isaiah40:4 Khula nreyareya nnoowelihiwa ni khula mwaako ni nttumuxa nnoothatawalihiwa; etthaya yoothipeya enoothatuwa yoowaataleya ni ilapo sa nyaako sinoothatuwa ilapo sa musaatala. 
Isaiah40:5 Vano ovuwa wa Yave onimooniheriwa ni omutthu wootheene onimoona. Vanonto, ohimale ti Yave.”" 
Isaiah40:6 Nsu ninlamula: “Mukhuwele.” Ni miyo kaakhunle: “Kikhuwelekeni?” Atthu ootheene ari ntoko malaxi ni ovuwawaya wootheene ori ntoko ithutu sa ntuphini. 
Isaiah40:7 Malaxi anuuma ni ithutu simmora niwoko sinoopelamo iphumu sa Yave. Vekhaikhai atthu ari malaxi. 
Isaiah40:8 Anuuma malaxi ni simmora ithutu, mene masu a Mulukwaahu ampwaherera wa mahuku ootheene." 
Isaiah40:9 Nyuwo munruuhela oSiyoni ihaali sooreera, ngwele vamwaako woorakamelaxa; nyuwo munruuhela oYerusaleemu ihaali sooreera, mukhuwelaxe, muhoovaka. Muleele isidade sa oYuda: “Mulukwaanyu ori va!”" 
Isaiah40:10 Moone, Yave onlamula sootheene onrwa ni ikuru, Owo onlamula ni moonowaawe wa ikuruxa. Moone, ntthuvelonawe nri ni Yoowo, aani nri ni Yoowo." 
Isaiah40:11 Owo onkosoopa muhuwaawe ntoko Mukukhuli; Owo onthukumanyiha iputtiputthi ni moonowaawe anaakanda. Owo onghoolela nnenesene ikhondoolo sinaamwiwa. 
Isaiah40:12 Taani omphima maahi a mphareiya ni ntata? Taani omphima waanuwa wa wiirimu ni nikuphi? Taani onringa elapo ya vathi olemelawaya hoye hoye omphima nyaako ni mattumuxa olemelawaya? 
Isaiah40:13 Taani onsuwela soowuupuwela sa Munepa wa Yave hata onimulaka ntoko namalakaawe? 
Isaiah40:14 Wa taani Yave omukoherenraawe omuthalihera ni omuxuttiha othoriha ni ekhaikhai? Taani omuxuttihale esuwelo naari omuthoonyenre ephiro ya miruku? 
Isaiah40:15 Vekhaikhai miloko siri ntoko nttonyo mbasiyani; saalikeliwa ntoko ntthupi ninghala vamiringoni; wa Yoowo icirumba siri ntoko muhaava paahi. 
Isaiah40:16 Othako wa oLibanu khoonkwana okukhela mooro vaaltaariniwawe*, naari axinamaaya khaankwana ntoko sooveleela soohisa." 
Isaiah40:17 Ohoolowawe miloko sootheene khaveetthwaawewo; vamaithoniwawe siri ntoko sa siiyo ni soohimuteko. 
Isaiah40:18 Muninlikanxera eheeni Muluku? Mummoona hai? 
Isaiah40:19 Vano, mwaha wa muluku oopatthiwa – namaratta ti ompaka ni namahana a eyuuma yoorikaxa ti onghuruwela ni eyuuma yoorikaxa, ampakelaka onyooro wa eparatha*." 
Isaiah40:20 Mulopwana oohaawa ohingwera yeeyo, onthanla nimparumparu. Owo onimwaasa namaratta ooweraxa weera ampake muluku oowootha ohimmora." 
Isaiah40:21 Khamusuwenle? Khamwiiwale? Khamuthaliheringwe okhuma ompacereroni? Khamwiiwexenxe okhuma ephattuwelo ya elapo ya vathi? 
Isaiah40:22 Owo onkilaathi vahiceniwawe ya emwene wiirimu wa yookhuneelano elapo ya vathi ni amakaaya ari ntoko misoope. Owo ontapuruxa erimu ntoko eluttu, ntoko eheema weera ekhalemo." 
Isaiah40:23 Owo onaamaliha woomalela anamwane a mamwene ni onaavukula anamalamula a elapo ya vathi. 
Isaiah40:24 Ephatteiwakaru, yaaliwakaru hoye hoye yaaphuwakaru mikwankhwaari, Owo ongwoopihera iphumusawe enanyaala; vano eyuupuru enaavaviha ntoko makamba." 
Isaiah40:25 “Munkilikanxera taani? Taani onlikana ni Miyo?” onkoha Ootteela. 
Isaiah40:26 Ngwehe osulu, moone: taani opattunxe itthu sootheene iya? Yoole onkhaliha ni ontteha khula ethenyeeri. Kheendyuwaru niwoko na ikurusawe ni owerawawe otokotoko." 
Isaiah40:27 Ii! Yakobe, muntaandawulelani, Ii! Yixrayeli munkhupanyerani: “Yave khampwattha enkeereela; Mulukwaaka khanuupuwela sa mulattwaaka?”" 
Isaiah40:28 Weeraka khamusuwenle? Khamwiiwale? Yave ti Muluku Oohimala, Mpattuxa a elapo yootheene. Owo khankhulumuwa naari khantomba, ni khawowo ongwera oringa mirukusawe." 
Isaiah40:29 Owo onimvaha ikuru ookhulumuwa ni ommwaandyeerera ikuru oohilipa. 
Isaiah40:30 Mpaka amiravo ankhulumuwa enatomba, aani mpaka awosa ankwakwathuwa, enamora," 
Isaiah40:31 vaheera yaale animuroromela Yave anoophwanyatho ikurusaya; anoovavela osuluxa ntoko axaaka; anootthimaka woohikhulumuwaru, animweetta woohitomba." 
Isaiah41:1 Nyuwosa icirumba, mmaaleke vamaithoniwaka! Miloko siphwanyetho ikurusaya! Seiyo sirweeke weera siixaakihe; nathukumaneke weera nuulume mulattu." 
Isaiah41:2 Taani amutannyenre yoole onrweela ninkhuma nsuwa, amwiitthanaka weera amurumeele mweekhaikhaiyini? Owo ohinnyerera miloko wa yoowo ni onaalamulela mamwene weera emurumeele. Owo onaatatuxa ntthupi ni ekatanaawe, aani makamba ni muupaawe." 
Isaiah41:3 Owo onaattharelela, anavira oolipeene mphironi inawosawe sihitonkwaaya oviramo." 
Isaiah41:4 Taani opanke sootheene iyo? Taani okhalinghe ikhapira okhuma ompacereroni? Ti yoomi, Yave kiri oopacera ni ikhapira sookisera, saamalaka nlelo ti Yoomi kinookhala." 
Isaiah41:5 Icirumba sohoona yeeyo, sinoova; ekotenle elapo ya vathi entetereya. Eyo enimwaattamela, erowaka ohoolo;" 
Isaiah41:6 khula mutthu onimukhavihera mukhwaawe, amweerelaka munneiye: “Mukhaleke oolipa murima!”" 
Isaiah41:7 Namaratta onnamulipiha murima namahana a eyuuma yoorikaxa ni yoole omvara muteko ni enyutto onnamulipiha murima yoole ommana eyuuma. Oonaka vannyomiheriwa oneera: “Ti wooreera.” Owo onlipiha muluku woolokottha ni misomaari weera ohimore. 
Isaiah41:8 “Wa soothesene, nyuwo, Yixrayeli, murumeiyaaka, Yakobe kimuthanlalaaka, nyuwosa ekhapira ya Abrahaamu, nthamwenaaka," 
Isaiah41:9 kookhumihaleni ekotenle elapo, mmapuroni oorakamelaxa koowiitthanani. Keenre: ‘Nyuwo murumeiyaaka.’ Kohoothanlani ni nkokhoontteni." 
Isaiah41:10 Vano muhoove niwoko Miyo kiri ni nyuwo; muhitteenguwe niwoko Miyo ti Mulukwaanyu. Miyo kinimoolipihani ni kinimookhaviherani. Kinimoovarelani ni ntatanaka noolopwana noowina. 
Isaiah41:11 Ootheene anoothanyani vekhaikhai anooyevihiwa ni animuulihihiwa muru; yaale anoowananani kheeheleliwa, anooriheya." 
Isaiah41:12 Naari ngwaasaasaka amwiittanaanyu khamwaaphwanya. Yaale anoowananani anoovukuliwa khuluwi. 
Isaiah41:13 Niwoko Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu kinoovarelani ntatananyu noolopwana kiweerelakani: Muhoove, Miyo kinimookhaviherani." 
Isaiah41:14 Muhoove, muungu Yakobe, Ii! Yixrayeli mukhaani, niwoko Miyo muneenaaka kinimookhaviherani,” onghima Yave, Mvuluxaanyu, Ootteela a oYixrayeli." 
Isaiah41:15 “Moone, kinimootatuxani maakina ookhurulela etthaya – manyowani ni arino maino a eyuuma. Nyuwo munookhurula nyaako ni munoottikittha mattumuxa mutatuxaka ntthupi." 
Isaiah41:16 Munimwaaveera, epheyo enimwaakuxa ni ettheku enimwaarongha ottai. Vaheera nyuwo munoomuhakalalela Yave mumvuwihaka Ootteela a oYixrayeli." 
Isaiah41:17 Oohaawa ni oothoiwa anaasa maahi, mene khaamphwanya; malumaaya ahuumiwa ntthona. Vaheera Miyo, Yave, kinoowaakhula; Miyo, Muluku a oYixrayeli nkaahiya." 
Isaiah41:18 Kinoopakiha weera nyooloko sivire mmattumuxani oowuumaxa ni anaattuuttu anookhuma mmareyareyani. Kinootatuxa nikare maratta ni ilapo soowuumaxa anaattuuttu. 
Isaiah41:19 Kinoophatteya munikareni nyiri sa esedari*, akaasiya*, murta* ni sooliveira*; kinoophatteya mmapuroni oowuumaxa nyiri sa esiprestu*, abetu* ni pinyeiru*," 
Isaiah41:20 weera atthu yoone ni esuwele, yuupuwele ni yiiwexexe weera ntata na Yave nipanke yeeyo ni weera Ootteela a oYixrayeli opattunxe.”" 
Isaiah41:21 Yave oneera: “Muulumeke mulattwaanyu.” Mwene a Yakobe oneera: “Muthalihere soowuupuwelasanyu.” 
Isaiah41:22 “Muruuheke milukusanyu soolokottha weera sinithalihere seiye sineera seereiye. Sinithalihere itthu sa khalayi weera noonelemo ni nisuwele ommaleloniwaya. Hoye hoye sinileele itthu sineera sikhumelele muhoolo," 
Isaiah41:23 sooniheraka itthu seiyo weera nisuwele weera iyo miluku. Sipake etthu – ekhalaka yooreera hoye hoye yoonanara – weera hiyo nithukumele ni nisareye woova. 
Isaiah41:24 Vaheera nyuwosa miluku soolokottha khamunteko ni mitekosanyu khasimvararu etthu; yoole onoothanlani ti a mwiikho. 
Isaiah41:25 Koomutannya mmoha okhuma mpatta wa ottuttuwani ni onimoowa; mmoha a ninkhuma nsuwa oniitthana Nsinanaka. Owo onaanyikalela anamalamula ntoko yaari kokotto, ntoko owo aari namoopa avottaka oloko." 
Isaiah41:26 Taani uulumme sa seiyo okhuma ompacereroni weera nisuwele hata sa seiyo khalayixa weera naakhuleleke: ‘Ole aahima ettiitthu’? Khawowo amoonihenre; khawowo amulaleenre, khaawo iiwaleru maswaanyu." 
Isaiah41:27 Miyo kaari oopacera othalihera yeeyo oSiyoni. Koomurihela oYerusaleemu namutthenga a ihaali sooreera. 
Isaiah41:28 Koomwaasa, mene nkimmoona mutthu – khawowo variyariwaya ongwera olaka, khawowo onkaakhula Miyo kaakohaka." 
Isaiah41:29 Moone, ootheene yaawo ti oolokottha. Mitekosaya khasimvararu etthu; icaambulosaya soohaniwa sinlikana iphumu ni etthu yoohimuteko.”" 
Isaiah42:1 “Ola murumeiyaaka kinimukhaviheraaka; oothanliwaaka, mwa yoowo onkihakalaliha; mwa yoola kinoohela Munepaaka ni Owo onooruuhela miloko ekhaikhai." 
Isaiah42:2 Owo khakhuwela naari khanyakula hata kharumiha mmiseweni. 
Isaiah42:3 Owo khasinsa ettheere yoowinteya, naari khacipiha mutthambo ontthuwaxa. Owo onookwanihera ekhaikhai moororomeleyani." 
Isaiah42:4 Owo khoonihera okhulumuwa naari khaporora mpaka aneeraawe akhalihe ekhaikhai mweelaponi. Icirumba sinoororomela munlamulonimwawe.” 
Isaiah42:5 Muluku Yave ti Yoole opattunxe irimu ni aatanle seiye, Yoole otanunxe etthaya ni sootheene simmelamo, Yoole onaavaha ngwiya amakaaya ni okumi wa sootheene sinkhalamo. Vano, Mulukweene Yoowo oneera ha:" 
Isaiah42:6 “Miyo, Yave, koowiitthanani moororomeleyani; kinimoovarelani oolipeene. Kinimoothokororani kookhalihakani ntoko namwiiraanyiha a miloko ni waara wa amalapo," 
Isaiah42:7 weera muhule maitho a oohoona, mwaatapuxe ootthukiwa mukaliposo ni ngwoopole yaale ankhala mpiphini." 
Isaiah42:8 Miyo ti Yave – nna ti Nsinanaka! Nkirwa kimuvaha mukina ovuwawaka naari otthapelawaka wa miluku sikina. 
Isaiah42:9 Moone, soohimmwa sa khalayi sookhumelela ni Miyo kinlaleiya inyowani; seiyo sihinaaye okhumelela, Miyo kinimoolaleerani.”" 
Isaiah42:10 Mmwiipele Yave ecipo enyowani, ottottopeleyawawe okhuma ekotenle elapo nyuwosa muneetta mphareiya ni sootheene siri mwemmo, nyuwosa icirumba ni sootheene sinkhalamo." 
Isaiah42:11 Nikare ni mittetthesaya sikhuweleke, mittetthe onkhalaawewo Kedari sihakalale. Amaki a oSela yiipeke ni ohakalala; awosa ekhuweleke vasulu nyaako!" 
Isaiah42:12 Awosa emuvuwihe Yave, elaleiyaka ottottopeleyawawe mucirumbani." 
Isaiah42:13 Yave onoovenya ntoko mulopwana oowera, ntoko nakhotto ooweraxa onootannya nthitinawe; onimwaawina amwiittanaawe ni okhuwelela wa ekhotto." 
Isaiah42:14 “Koomaala wa ehuhu yincipale, nkuulumaru, kiisuumaalihaka, mene vano kinkhuwela ntoko muthiyana ayaraka, kiniipulela, kinghihimera oohooxeyeene." 
Isaiah42:15 Kinoophwata nyaako ni mattumuxa, kinimuumiha malaxaaya ni nyirisaya sootheene. Kinootatuxa nyooloko icirumba ni kinimuumiha maratta." 
Isaiah42:16 Kinooweettiha oohoona mphironi ahisuwenlaaya; mphironi soohisuwanyeya kinooweettiha. Kinootatuxa epiphi waara ohoolowaya ni iphiro soothipeya kinoothatawaliha. Ti seiyo itthu kineeraaka kipake, ni Miyo nkaahiya." 
Isaiah42:17 Vaheera yaale anroromela icaambulo ni aneerela seiyo: ‘Nyuwosa ti milukusahu’ animuulihiheyaxa muru.” 
Isaiah42:18 “Mwiiwe nyuwosa oohiiwa; ngwehe nyuwosa oohoona ni moone! 
Isaiah42:19 Oohoona taani ahikhanle murumeiyaaka ni oohiiwa ntoko namutthenga kimurumihalaaka? Oohoona taani ntoko yoole kitteeliheriwaaka, oohoona ntoko murumeiyi a Yave?" 
Isaiah42:20 Nyuwo mohoona itthu sincipale, mene khampwantthe; maaruwaanyu aahuleya, mene khamwiiwaleru.”" 
Isaiah42:21 Yoomuhakalaliha Yave moororomeleyanimwawe opaka Nlamulonawe ntokotoko ni noovuwiheya. 
Isaiah42:22 Vaheera ola ti muloko woohuhuliwa ni woowiiyiwa, ophwanyingwe mmakhukuni ovithiweene mukaliposo. Owo woothatuwa yooviriwa ahikhalaka oowoopola; woopakihiwa yoohuhuliwa ahikhalaka ooweera: “Muhokoloxe.”" 
Isaiah42:23 Taani a nyuwosa anaawiriyane hoye hoye apwatthe yeeyo mweehuhuni eneera erwe? 
Isaiah42:24 Taani amwinnyerenre Yakobe weera athatuwe yoohuhuliwa, ni oYixrayeli wa anamahuhula? Aari Yave mwa Yoowo hiyo naamutthekenlaahu, niwoko awosa khaatthunne otthara iphirosawe; awosa khayiiwelenle Nlamulonawe." 
Isaiah42:25 Tivawo aayeehenraawe oYixrayeli onyoonyiwawawe, eyo tiiyo nipuhero na ekhotto. Eyo yaarica ni malumi a mooro, hata hiiho khooxuttenre; eyo yaahisa, mene khawaapwatthenle." 
Isaiah43:1 Vano Yave mwa Yoowo oopattunxeni nyuwo Yakobe ni oopankeni nyuwo Yixrayeli, oneera ha: “Muhoove, niwoko koowoopolani; koowiitthanani ni nsinananyu; nyuwo ti awaka." 
Isaiah43:2 Mwaalapuwaka, kinookhala ni nyuwo; mwaalapuwaka yooloko, seiyo khasoomireihani; mwaaviraka mmooroni, khamunza; malumi a mooro khaanoohisani." 
Isaiah43:3 Niwoko Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu, Ootteela a oYixrayeli, Mvuluxaanyu. Miyo kininnyerera wExipitu ntoko nlivo weera moopoliwe ni oKuxe ni oSeba vanipuroniwanyu." 
Isaiah43:4 Nyuwo ti ootthuneyaxa ni oottittimiheya vamaithoniwaka, ni keenre koosivelani, kinoowinnyerera asilopwana vanipuroniwanyu ni atthu ntoko yoowaakakhanyihera okumaanyu." 
Isaiah43:5 Muhoove niwoko kiri ni nyuwo; kinimwaaruuha anamwaniinyu okhuma ninkhuma nsuwa ni kinimoothukumanyiherani ninkela nsuwa. 
Isaiah43:6 Kinimweerela mpatta wa ottuttuwani: ‘Ngwinnyerere yaawo!’ Ni wa ohitto: ‘Muhiwooceelihe ohokolowa.’ Ottai ottai mwaaruuhe anamwanaaka asilopwana ni ekotenle elapo anamwanaaka asithiyana – 
Isaiah43:7 ootheene aniitthaneliwa Nsinanaka, mwa yaawo kaapattuxenraaka ovuwawaka, yaawo kiwoopalaaka, kinaapaka.”" 
Isaiah43:8 Muruuhe muloko orino maitho, mene ohoonaka; maaru, mene ohiiwaka." 
Isaiah43:9 Miloko sootheene sa elapo ya vathi sinthukumana. Taani a seiyo yaahimme, elaleiyaka itthusene seiye sivinre? Awosa yaaruuheke anamoonaaya, yooniheraka weera khayootha, ni akina yiiwa, yeere: “Ettiitthu.”" 
Isaiah43:10 Yave onghima: “Nyuwosa ti anamoonaaka; nyuwo ti murumeiyaaka kimuthanlalaaka weera musuwele ni mukiroromele ni weera mwiiwexexe: Miyo ti Yoowo. Khoowowo muluku kihinaaye Miyo, naari khookhala vahoolowaka." 
Isaiah43:11 Miyo muneenaaka ti Yave ni khawoworu mvuluxa kihikhanle Miyo. 
Isaiah43:12 Miyo kohoonihera, koovuluxa ni koolaleiya – Miyo, ahikhanle muluku mukina variyariwanyu. Nyuwosa ti anamoonaaka weera Miyo Muluku,” onghima Yave." 
Isaiah43:13 “Aani, okhuma khalayixa Miyo ti Yoowo. Khawoworu ongwera omoopola mukina mmatatanimwaka. Miyo kaapakaka etthu, khawoworu ongwera oceendya yeeyo.”" 
Isaiah43:14 Vano Yave, Mvuluxaanyu, Ootteela a oYixrayeli oneera ha: “Ngwoosivelanimwaka kinimwaarumihela anakhotto oBabiloniya kaapakihaka aBabiloniya ootheene okhala ootthukiweene mmakulani matokotoko mwa yaawo yiixoonelaayano." 
Isaiah43:15 Miyo ti Yave, Ootteelaanyu, Mpattuxa a aYixrayeli, Mwenaanyu.”" 
Isaiah43:16 Yave ti Yoowo opanke musewe mphareiyani, ephiro mmaahini oowuupaxa," 
Isaiah43:17 eettinghe ikaaro sa ikavalu* vamoha ni ikavalusaya*, anakhotto ni anamakhaviheraaya ni awosa yaattakaneelamo ehivenyakatho – emalihiweene, aani aacipihiwa ntoko mutthambo. Vanonto Yave ola oneera ha:" 
Isaiah43:18 “Muttiwale itthu sa khalayi; muhuupuwelele seiye sa ihuhu sivinre. 
Isaiah43:19 Moone, kimpaka etthu enyowani. Eyo eneera ekhumelelaka. Khamoonne yeeyo? Kimpaka musewe munikareni ni nyooloko mulaponi yoowuumaxa." 
Isaiah43:20 Axinama a ntuphini ankittittimiha – akhwatte ni isiisi, niwoko kohaavaha maahi munikareni ni nyooloko mulaponi yoowuumaxa weera owure mulokwaaka, woothanliwaaka –" 
Isaiah43:21 muloko kiipakenlaaka weera owo olaleiye ottottopeleyawaka. 
Isaiah43:22 Hata hiiho nyuwo Yakobe khamukiitthanne mwaarookikhulumuwelaru nyuwo Yixrayeli. 
Isaiah43:23 Khamwaakiruuhenle ikhondoolo sa sooveleela soohisa naari khamwaakittittiminghe ni sooveleelasanyu. Nkoonyesereringheni opaka sooveleela sa etrigu naari nkaatthunne erubani*. 
Isaiah43:24 Khamukithumenle etthu yoowunkhelaxa hata khamukivanghe makhura a sooveleelasanyu. Vaheera mukilemelihenre sootthekasanyu ni mukikhulumunle ni sootakhalasanyu. 
Isaiah43:25 Miyo, aani Miyo ti Yoole ommaliha soonanarasanyu moosivelani ni nkuupuwelatho sootthekasanyu." 
Isaiah43:26 Muupuwelele seiye sivinre wa Miyo, nuulumasere vamoha mulattwaanyu; mukithalihere ohinthowawanyu." 
Isaiah43:27 Tiithiinyu oopacera oottheka; mamwaakhulaanyu aakivaanya. 
Isaiah43:28 Tivawo kineeraaka kiwuulihihe muru asitokweene a Empa ya Yave ni kimmwinnyerera Yakobe moophwatiwani ni oYixrayeli mootheiwani.” 
Isaiah44:1 “Vano Yakobe, murumeiyaaka, Yixrayeli kimuthanlalaaka, mwiiwe!" 
Isaiah44:2 Yave mwa Yoowo oopattunxeni ni oopankeni mmirimani mwa amayinyu, Yoowo onookhaviherani, oneera ha: Ii! Yakobe, murumeiyaaka, muhoove, Yexuruni kimuthanlalaaka." 
Isaiah44:3 Niwoko kinooyeehera maahi mulaponi mwa ntthona ni nyooloko vatthayani yoowuumaxa. Kinooyeehera Munepaaka mukhapiranimwanyu ni mareelihowaaka mwa anamwaniinyu. 
Isaiah44:4 Awosa anoophuwa ntoko munyepu, ntoko ixopu* mukerekhere nyooloko." 
Isaiah44:5 Mmoha onimweera: ‘Miyo ti a Yave’ ni mukinatho onimwiitteha nsina na Yakobe ni mpaka mukinatho onoolepa mmatatanimwawe: ‘A Yave’ ni onimwiixiitthanela Yixrayeli.” 
Isaiah44:6 “Vano, Yave, mwene ni Mvuluxa a oYixrayeli, Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: Miyo ti Oopacera ni Ookisera, kihikhanle Miyo khawowo muluku mukina." 
Isaiah44:7 Taani onlikana ni Miyo? Owo alaleiyeke yeeyo. Owo ahime ni athalihe ohoolowaka yeeyo yeereiye okhuma ehuhuweene yeele kaakhalinghaaka mulokwaaka wa khalayi ni seiyo nlelo sineera sikhumelele – aani owo atthomeke seiyo sineera seereye. 
Isaiah44:8 Muhithukumele, hata muhoove. Khalayeene Miyo kaalaleiye yeeyo ni kaathalihera. Nyuwosa ti anamoonaaka. Khoowowo muluku mukina kihikhanle Miyo. Hoye! Khawowo Mwala mukina; nkimusuwenle hata mmoha.”" 
Isaiah44:9 Ootheene ampaka miluku sa icaambulo ari ethiru ni seiyo anttittimiheraaya khasimuteko. Yaale ankhalela onamoona seiyo ti oohoona, ehisuwelaka etthu mpakatho wuulihiheya muru." 
Isaiah44:10 Taani ommoopa muluku ni onghana icaambulo sihinimukhavihera? 
Isaiah44:11 Owo ni asikhwaawe ootheene animuulihihiwa muru niwoko anamaratta ti atthu paahi. Ootheenaawo ethukumane ni yeemele vamoha; awosa anoovonyeriwa mootteenguwani ni ngwuulihani muru. 
Isaiah44:12 Namahana onkuxa ekaruma anavarela muteko mmakhalani. Onimuhana muluku ni inyutto; owo onimureherera ni ikuru sa moonowaawe owo omvoliwa etala sinammalela ikuru; owo omvoliwa ntthona anakhulumuwa. 
Isaiah44:13 Kalipinteiru onringa etthaabwa ni miringo, analepelela ni epesuru; owo ompatthapattha ecaambuloweene yeeyo ni ephalo, anakheramo. Owo ompattha mmukhaleloni mwa mutthu, mwa mutthu moovuwihanimwawe wootheene weera ekhale mpaani." 
Isaiah44:14 Onuuha esedari*, hoye hoye apaale mwiri wa goferi* hoye hoye ekarivalyu*. Owo aahingye sunnuwaka eriyari ya nyiri sa othako hoye hoye aaphatteiye mwiri wa ipinyeiru* ni epula enunnuwiha." 
Isaiah44:15 Owo omvarela muteko mpatta mmoha wa mwiri woopattihera mooro. Yoowo onkuxa, akukhelaka woora, anooxa epaawu. Mene ompakatho muluku, analapa. Owo ompaka ecaambulo, anuuramela ohoolowaya." 
Isaiah44:16 Mpatta wa mwiri owo onghisa mmooroni arehererakano yoocaawe, owo onooxa enamaawe, anakhuura. Owo onooratho, eeraka: “Ahee! kinimoora, kinoona mooro.”" 
Isaiah44:17 Okina iwo onimpaka mulukwaawe, ecaambulowaawe; owo onkokhorela ohoolowaya, alapaka. Owo omvekela yeeyo, eeraka: “Mukivuluxe – nyuwo ti mulukwaaka.”" 
Isaiah44:18 Awosa khaansuwela etthu, khaaniiwexexa etthu; maithowaaya aakhuneeleya weera ehoone ni soowuupuwelasaya soowaleya weera ehiiwexexe." 
Isaiah44:19 Khawowo ommaala weera uupuwele; khawowo orino miruku hoye hoye iseru sooweerano: “Mpatta mukina koopattiha; mpaka vamakhalaniwaya kohooxawo epaawu, enama, kinakhuura. Vano kinoopaka etthu ya mwiikho sa seiyo sihanle? Miyo kinookokhorela ohoolo wa etthaabwa?”" 
Isaiah44:20 Owo onca ettuura; murima woolokhottheya onimuhapuxa; khangwera wiivuluxa naari weera: “Etthu ela muntatanimwaka noolopwana ti yoowootha.” 
Isaiah44:21 Muupuwelele itthu iya, Yakobe, niwoko nyuwo, Yixrayeli ti murumeiyaaka. Miyo kohoopakani nyuwo murumeiyaaka; Ii! Yixrayeli, Miyo nkoottiwalani." 
Isaiah44:22 Kookwesera ottaiwene soonanarasanyu ntoko nihutte, sootthekasanyu ntoko nikame na oxeexelo. Muhokoleele wa Miyo niwoko Miyo koowoopolani.”" 
Isaiah44:23 Mwiipe ni ohakalala erimu, niwoko Yave opanke yeeyo; mukhuwelaxe, nyuwo moowiixera mwa elapo. Mpacereke wiipa nyaako, nyuwosa othakho ni nyirisanyu sootheene, niwoko Yave oomoopola Yakobe, Owo onoonihera ovuwawawe oYixrayeli." 
Isaiah44:24 Vano Yave Mvuluxaanyu oopankeni mmirimani mwa amayinyu oneera ha: “Miyo ti Yave kipanke itthu sootheene; Miyo paahi kikunge erimu ni kiitapuruxenle elapo. 
Isaiah44:25 Ti Miyo kimvirikanyiha ineneero sa maprofeeti oolokottha ni kinaatatuxa anamatthoma alolo; kimvonyera vatthayani miruku sa anamiruku kitatuxaka seiyo sa siiyo. 
Isaiah44:26 Ti miyo kinkwanihera masu a murumeiyaaka ni otthoma wa anamitthengaaka; ti Miyo kinghima sa oYerusaleemu: ‘Onoomakiwatho,’ ni sa mittetthe sa oYuda: ‘Sinootekiwa’ ni sa mathalaaya: ‘Kinoorasela.’" 
Isaiah44:27 Ti Miyo kineerela moowiixera: ‘Muume, ni Miyo kinimuumiha nyoolokosanyu.’" 
Isaiah44:28 Ti Miyo kinghima sa Siru: ‘Owo ti mukukhulaaka ni onookwanihera sootheene sinkisiveliha; owo onoohima sa oYerusaleemu: “Eyo eraseliwe” ni sa Empa ya Yave: “Epakiwe mathipelo.” ’” 
Isaiah45:1 “Vano Miyo kinkuxa ntata noolopwana na Siru weera kilamule miloko ohoolowawe kaarulaka mamwene mwa soowarasaya sa ekhotto ni weera kihule masele ohoolowawe weera Milako sihiwaliwe. Yeeyo kinimweerelaaka Siru ti ela: 
Isaiah45:2 Miyo kinoorowa ohoolowanyu, kithatawaliheke nyaako; Miyo kinoophwata masele a ebronze* ni kinimwaakhulakasa anampattika a eyuuma." 
Isaiah45:3 Kinimoovahani mihakhu sa wiiphiini, mihakhu soothokororiwa mmapuroni a exiiri weera nyuwo musuwele weera Miyo ti Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli kingwiitthanelani nsinananyu." 
Isaiah45:4 Kinoowiitthanelani nsinananyu mwaha wa murumeiyaaka Yakobe ni oothanliwaaka Yixrayeli ni kinimoovahani ekhalelo ya nttittimiho naari muhikaakhulelaka. 
Isaiah45:5 Miyo ti Yave ni khawowo mukina; khoowowo muluku kihikhanle Miyo. Miyo kinimoolipihani naari muhikaakhulelaka," 
Isaiah45:6 weera okhuma ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkelaayawo ootheene esuwele weera khawoworu kihikhanle Miyo. Miyo ti Yave ni khawowo mukina. 
Isaiah45:7 Miyo kimpaka waara ni kinkhaliha epiphi. Miyo kinruuha onnene ni kimpakiha erisa. Miyo, Yave, kimpaka sootheene iyo." 
Isaiah45:8 Nyuwosa erimu osulusulu, murupihe ekhaikhai ni mahutte erupihele vathi ororomeleya. Ehuleye elapo weera ophuwe ovuluwa ni ehuhuweene yeeyo emele ekhaikhai. Miyo, Yave kimpattuxa sootheene iyo." 
Isaiah45:9 Ii wa yoole onnyakulihana ni Mpattuxaawe, yoole onlikana ni nivali variyari wa mavali vatthayani paahi. Weeraka oloko onoomweerela namoopa: ‘Mumpakani?’ Weeraka mutekwaanyu onimweera: ‘Ola khanono matata’?" 
Isaiah45:10 Ii! Wa yoole ongweerela atithawe: ‘Muyanreni?’ Hoye hoye wa amayawe: ‘Muyanreni?’ 
Isaiah45:11 Yave, Ootteela a oYixrayeli ni Mpattuxaaya oneera ha: ‘Wa itthu sa muhoolo – nyuwo munkikohakoha mwaha wa anamwanaaka hoye hoye munkilamulela mwaha wa miteko sa matataaka?" 
Isaiah45:12 Ti Miyo kipanke elapo ya vathi, kinaapattuxamo atthu. Matataaka ti akunge erimu; Miyo koolamulela ithenyeerisaya." 
Isaiah45:13 Kinoomukhaliha Siru moororomeleyanimwaka; kinimookolela iphirosawe sootheene. Owo onoorasela esidadaaka ni onimwaatapuxa ootthukiwaaka mulaponi yoorakamelaxa, vaheera khanaanyesereriha nlivo naari ntthuvelo, onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene.”" 
Isaiah45:14 Yave oneera ha: “Sooruwera sa wExipitu ni soothumiha sa oKuxe ni aSabeyani awo oorakamaxa – awosa animoowa wa nyuwo ni anookhala awinyu; awosa animoottharani ootthukiweene. Awosa anookokhorela ohoolowanyu yoodyoonttelelakani: ‘Vekhaikhai Muluku ori ni nyuwosa ni khawowo mukina, Khoowowo muluku mukina.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:15 Ii! Muluku ni Mvuluxa a oYixrayeli, vekhaikhai Nyuwo ti Muluku onniipitha." 
Isaiah45:16 Ootheene ampaka miluku soowootha animuulihiheya muru ni anooyevihiwa; awosa anoomorela vamoha ngwuulihiheyani muru. 
Isaiah45:17 Vaheera Yave onoovuluxa oYixrayeli ni ovuluxiwa woohimala; khookhalatho wuulihiheya muru hata oyeviheya wa mahuku ootheene 
Isaiah45:18 Vano Yave opattunxe wiirimu – Owo ti Muluku; Owo oopattuxa elapo ya vathi; ti yoowo oompe etthaya. Khaanse opattuxa, mene weera ekhaliwe. Vano Mulukweene Yoowo oneera ha: “Miyo ti Yave ni khawoworu mukina." 
Isaiah45:19 Nkuulumme muxiirini, mweelaponi yoosareya epiphi; nkeerenle ekhapira ya Yakobe: ‘Mukaasaase wa siiyo.’ Miyo, Yave, kinuuluma ekhaikhai, Miyo kinghima yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai." 
Isaiah45:20 Muthukumane ni nkarwani, muthukumane nyuwosa anamatthawa a miloko. Yaale ankuxa miluku sa etthaabwa, yaale amvekela miluku sihingwera ovuluxa ti oohisuwela etthu." 
Isaiah45:21 Muhime yeeyo eneera yeereiye, moonihere yoowaakhuleleya. Awosa ethukumane elakane. Taani aahimale yeeyo khalayi? Taani aalaleiye mweehuhuni evinre? Kaari Miyo, Yave. Khoowowo muluku mukina kihikhanle Miyo, Muluku Oororomeleya ni Mvuluxa. Khoowowo muluku mukina kihikhanle Miyo." 
Isaiah45:22 Muhokoleele wa Miyo ni mvuluxiwe, nyuwosa a ekotenle elapo, niwoko Miyo ti Muluku ni Khoowowo muluku mukina kihikhanle Miyo." 
Isaiah45:23 Kohiilipela muneenaaka, eyanowaaka yoohima mweekhaikhaiyini masu oohiceendyeya: Ohoolowaka atthu ootheene anookokhorela ni malumi ootheene anookilipela." 
Isaiah45:24 Awosa eniyeere sa Miyo: ‘Ekhaikhai ni ikuru siri mwa Yave paahi.’” Ootheene animuthanya anoorowa wa Yoowo ni animuulihiheya muru. 
Isaiah45:25 Vaheera ekhapira yootheene ya Yixrayeli enimwaakhuleliwa mwa Yave ni enoomvuwiha. 
Isaiah46:1 Beli onkokhora ni Nebo onuurama; milukusaya sinkuxiwa ni axinama anteexa mirindi. Icaambulo sinronghiwawo ti soolemela, yoolemela wa ookhulumuwa." 
Isaiah46:2 Seiyo sinkokhora, sinuurama vamoha, sihiweraka orula murindi; awosa asineenaaya anrowa elapo ekina wootthukiwani." 
Isaiah46:3 “Mukiiwe, ekhapira ya Yakobe, ootheene nyuwo muhalahanle a ekhapira ya Yixrayeli – nyuwosa Miyo kookhavihenraakani okhuma oyariwawanyu ni kookunxaakani okhuma enamwanaanyu." 
Isaiah46:4 Mpaka muuluvanleene mukhumaleene ipwi, ti Miyo kineera kookhavihereni. Kohoopakani ni kinimookuxani; Miyo kinimookhaviherani ni kinimoovuluxani." 
Isaiah46:5 Munkaanyihera ni munkilikanxera taani? Taani anaalikane ni Miyo hoye hoye omphwanaphwana ni Miyo? 
Isaiah46:6 Akina ankhumiha eyuuma yoorikaxa mmurupanimwaya ni anringa eparatha* mmunringoni; awosa animuliva namahana a eyuuma yoorikaxa weera ahane miluku ni vano ankokhorela, enalapa." 
Isaiah46:7 Anthatela enattuutta; aneemexa vanipuroniwaya sinkhalaayamo woohiramarama. Naari yiitthanaka khasinaakhula. Khawoworu sinimvuluxaaya ngwoopihani. 
Isaiah46:8 Muupuwelele yeeyo, muupuwele sa yeeyo, mwiiwexexe nnenesene, nyuwosa anamavaanya." 
Isaiah46:9 Muupuwelele itthu sa khalayi, seiye sa ihuhu sivinre; Miyo Muluku ni khawowo mukina; Miyo Muluku ni khawowo mukina onlikana ni Miyo." 
Isaiah46:10 Okhuma ompacereroni Miyo kinsuweliha ommaleloni; okhuma khalayi seiye sineera seereye. Miyo kineera: ‘Otthunawaka onoopwahereraxa ni kinoopaka sootheene sinkisiveliha.’ 
Isaiah46:11 Okhuma ninkhuma nsuwa kimmwiitthana mwaapalame oolupattha ni okhuma elapo ya ottai mulopwana weera akwanihere otthunawaka. Yeeyo kaahimmaaka kinookwanihera; yeeyo kuupuwenlaaka kinoopaka. 
Isaiah46:12 Mukiiwe nyuwosa muri attiyamaaru ni ottaiwene wa ororomeleya! 
Isaiah46:13 Kinkhuveeliha ororomeleyawaka; khoonkhala ottaiwene; ni ovuluxawaka khawooceelihiwa. Kinoovaha oSiyoni ovuluxa ni waarawaka wa oYixrayeli.” 
Isaiah47:1 “Nyuwo mwaamwali oowiikosoopa, murowe, mwakilaathi muntthupini; mukilaathi puruvuru woohikhala ehice ya emwene, mwaana muthiyana a oBabiloniya. Khamwiitthaniwatho ooreera ni oophwaneliwa." 
Isaiah47:2 Mukuxe maxilo ni muxile ephepa; muruleke eluttwaanyu; mukwinye esaayaanyu itara sikhale vatakantthiru ni mulapuwe nyooloko. 
Isaiah47:3 Etiriyaanyu enimooneya ni hiihotho wuulihiheyawanyu muru. Kinimwiinlela ikukuttula; khaawo kineeraka kimuurele.” 
Isaiah47:4 Mvuluxaahu – Yave a ikuru sootheene ti Nsinanawe – Owo ti Ootteela a oYixrayeli. 
Isaiah47:5 “Mwaana muthiyana a oBabiloniya, mukilaathi emaalelo, mvolowe mpiphini; khamurwa mwiitthaniwatho pwiyamwene a imwene." 
Isaiah47:6 Kaanyoonyeriwa mulokwaaka kinanarihaka yoohiyeraaka; kaawinnyerera mmatatanimwanyu ni nyuwo, Babiloniya, khamwaamorenle ikharari. Mpaka mwaawiikaathera yoolemelaxa anamuuluvala." 
Isaiah47:7 Mweenre: ‘Kinoopwaherera wa mahuku ootheene ntoko pwiyamwene oohimala!’ Mene nyuwo khamwaatthokelenle hata khamuupuwenle seera seereye. 
Isaiah47:8 Vano mwiiwe nyuwo muri oopattuxiwa onsivela sa elapo, muneetta oolipeene mwiixeerelaka: ‘Ti miyo paahi; khawowo mukina.’ Nkikhalatho naamukhweli hata nkihaawa okhweliwa anamwane." 
Isaiah47:9 Itthu piili iya sinimookhumelelani mweehuhuni emoharu, nihuku nimoha: okhweliwa anamwane ni onaamukhweli. Seiya sinimoorweelani ni olemelawaya wootheene sihipwatthaka okhwiraanyu naari onamacittaanyu woowera." 
Isaiah47:10 Munroromela soonanarasanyu, muneera: ‘Khaawo onkoona.’ Mirukusanyu ni soosuwelasanyu sinoolokotthani nyuwo mwiixeerelaka: ‘Ti miyo paahi; khawowo mukina.’" 
Isaiah47:11 Erisa enimoophwanyani muneeraanyu mooceele osemba. Nttaruxo nnimoophwanyani mwa nenno muneeraanyu muhiwere wiixaakiha ni yoowiixoopolano. Mahooxo animoophwanyani wootutuxereya mwahuupuwelelaanyu. 
Isaiah47:12 Vano, mpwaherere ni maswaanyu a macitta ni soolowasanyu sincipale, mwa seiyo mumpakaanyu okhuma enamwanaanyu. Apaale munoowera, apaale munootannyera woova." 
Isaiah47:13 Mirukusanyu sootheene mwaakhenlaanyu sohookhulumulani! Anamasomelaanyu a ithenyeeri erweeke, anamaweheene yaawo antthoma khula mweeri; awosa ewoopoleni mwa seiyo sineera soophwanyeeni." 
Isaiah47:14 Vekhaikhai awosa ari ntoko ittuxo; mooro onimwaahisa. Awosa mpaka khaangwera wiivuluxa mwa ikuru sa malumi a mooro. Va khaawowo makhala weera mukina oore. Va khoowowo mooro weera mukilaathi mukerekhere. 
Isaiah47:15 Ti yeeyo paahi awosa angweraaya woopakelani – atthweene yaawo nyuwo mumvaraanyuno muteko ni mungweettanaanyuno nakoso okhuma enamwanaanyu. Khula mutthu a yaawo ompwaherera moonanarihanimwawe; khawoworu ongwera woovuluxani.” 
Isaiah48:1 “Mwiiwe yeeyo ekhapira ya Yakobe, nyuwosa muniitthaneliwa nsina na Yixrayeli ni muri mpatta wa ekhapira ya Yuda, nyuwosa munlipela mwa Nsina na Yave ni munimwiitthana Muluku a oYixrayeli, ohikhanle mweekhaikhaiyini hata moororomeleyani." 
Isaiah48:2 Mwiiwe nyuwosa muneera weera muri amaki a esidade yootteela ni weera munimuroromela Muluku a oYixrayeli – Yave a ikuru sootheene ti Nsinanawe: 
Isaiah48:3 Khalayi Miyo kaahima itthu sivinre, eyanowaaka yaalaleiya seiye ni Miyo kaasuweliha; vano wootutuxereya koopaka, sinakhumelela." 
Isaiah48:4 Vano koosuwela ettiyamaarwaanyu; misemba sa muxikomwanyu saari sa eyuuma ni eyuucaanyu yaari ya ebronze*. 
Isaiah48:5 Tivawo kooleenlaakani itthusene seiye khalayi; kaahoolaleerani seiye sihinaaye okhumelela weera muheere: ‘Ti milukusaka sipanke seiye; ecaambulowaaka ya etthaabwa ni mulukwaaka a eyuuma ti okhalinghe.’ 
Isaiah48:6 Mohiiwa itthu iya kaahimmaaka; ngwehe sootheene iya. Weeraka khamuntthuna waakhulela? Okhuma vaanaano kinimoothaliherani sa itthu sinyowani, sa itthu soowiipithiheya nyuwo muhisuwenlaanyu." 
Isaiah48:7 Iya sipattuxiwe vaanaano – khoohiyono khalayi. Nyuwo khamunasuwele seiya. Tivawo muhingweeraanyu weera: ‘Aani, kaasuwela sa seiya.’" 
Isaiah48:8 Khamwiiwale hata khamwiiwexenxe; okhuma khalayi maaruwaanyu yaari oowaleyeene. Kinsuwela nnenesene mootaanyu woolokottheya. Mwiitthaniwa namavaanya okhuma oyariwawanyu. 
Isaiah48:9 Kinkurunuxa isarasaka mwaha wa Nsinanaka ni mwaha wa ottottopeleyawaka weera muhiphwatiwe. 
Isaiah48:10 Moone, kohoocapani ni maviho ntoko eparatha* entotoxiwaaya; koowootani murima muniikhoni noohooxa." 
Isaiah48:11 Kimpaka yeeyo kiixeerelaka, aani kiixeerelaka Miyo. Nkirwa kitthunihera weera kaaluxiwe. Ovuwawaka nkinimuvaha mutthu.”" 
Isaiah48:12 “Ii! Yakobe, mukiiwe, Yixrayeli kimwiitthannaaka: Miyo nkinceendyeya; Miyo ti Oopacera ni Ookisera." 
Isaiah48:13 Kaapaka mathipelo a elapo ya vathi ni matataaka ni ntatanaka noolopwana naakunga erimu; Miyo kiitthanaka seiyo, sootheene sineemela vamoha." 
Isaiah48:14 Muthukumane nyuwo ootheene ni mwiiwe nnenesene. Taani a milukusanyu aahimme itthu iya? Oosiveleya a Yave onookwanihera otthunawawe wa oBabiloniya; moonowaawe onoowanano oBabiloniya. 
Isaiah48:15 Miyo, aani Miyo muneenaaka kuulumme yeeyo; Miyo koomwiitthana. Miyo kinoomuruuha ni owo onoomweettela nnenesene mutekwaawe." 
Isaiah48:16 Mukaattamele ni mwiiwe yeeyo: Okhuma maswaaka oopacera nkuulumme muxiirini; mweehuhuni sineeraaya sikhumelele Miyo kinookhalawo. Vano Yave onlamula sootheene ookirumiha ni Munepaawe.” 
Isaiah48:17 Yave, Mvuluxaanyu, Ootteela a oYixrayeli oneera ha: “Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu kinooxuttihani yeeyo eri yooreerelaanyu ni kingwooniherani ephiro yookuxera." 
Isaiah48:18 Mwaakhulenle malamulowaaka, saano murettelaanyu olikanneene mooloko ni ororomeleyawanyu ntoko mitekuteku sa ephareiya." 
Isaiah48:19 Ikhapirasanyu saano sikhanleene ntoko ihaava sa ephareiya ni anamwaniinyu oohaalikeleya; masinaaya saano ehimalihiwe naari ehiphwatiwe ohoolowaka.” 
Isaiah48:20 Mukhume oBabiloniya, mwaatthawe aBabiloniya! Mwahime yeeyo ni ohakalala ni mwalaleiye. Mwarumihele mutthenga ola ekotenle elapo, mweeraka: “Yave oomoopola murumeiyaawe Yakobe.”" 
Isaiah48:21 aYixrayeli khayaavoliwa ntthona Owo aaweettinghaawe munikareni; Owo aahaapiluweliha maahi vamwala, Owo aamana mwala ni maahi yaakhuma." 
Isaiah48:22 Yave oneera: “Khoowowo murettele wa atakhali.” 
Isaiah49:1 Mukiiwe nyuwosa icirumba, mwiiwe yeeyo nyuwosa miloko sinkhala ottai: Miyo kihinaaye oyariwa, Yave aakiitthana; okhuma oyariwawaka Owo iitthana nsinanaka." 
Isaiah49:2 Owo aapaka eyanowaaka ntoko ekatana yoowiitha; aakisunga mmunttuusini mwa ntatanawe; aakitatuxa muupa woowiitha anakihela mmurupanimwawe. 
Isaiah49:3 Owo aakeerenle: “Nyuwo ti murumeiyaaka Yixrayeli, kinimoonihera ovuwawaka mwa nyuwo.”" 
Isaiah49:4 Mene keenre: “Koovara muteko wa siiyo; kimalihale ikurusene woohiphurela etthu. Wa soothesene, yeeyo miyo kimphwanelaaka eri mmatatani mwa Yave ni ntthuvelonaka nri ni Mulukwaaka.”" 
Isaiah49:5 Vano Yave onuuluma ni miyo – Yoowo okipanke mmirimani weera kikhale murumeiyaawe ni weera kamuhokoloxe Yakobe ni kamuthukumanyihere aYixrayeli, niwoko koottittimihiwa vamaithoniwawe ni Mulukwaaka ori ikurusaka." 
Isaiah49:6 Yave oneera: “Wa nyuwo khoonkwana okhala murumeiyaaka paahi weera mureherere ipuumba sa Yakobe ni mwaahokoloxe yaale a aYixrayeli kaathokoronraaka. Kinimootatuxanitho waara wa amalapo weera ovuluxawaka okwanele ekotenle elapo.” 
Isaiah49:7 Vano Yave, Mvuluxa ni Ootteela a oYixrayeli onimweerela yoole ooramusiwa ni oothanyiwa ni miloko, murumeiyi a anamalamula: “Mamwene anoowoonani, eneemela; anamwane a mamwene anoowoonani, enakokhora niwoko na Yave ori oororomeleya, Ootteela a oYixrayeli othanlaleni.”" 
Isaiah49:8 Yave oneera ha: “Mweehuhuni yoothanliwa Miyo kinoowaakhulani ni vanihukuni na ovuluxa kinimookhaviherani. Miyo kinimoothokororani ni kinoopakiha weera mukhale wiiraana wa muloko, weera mureherere elapo mukawaka soohiyeriwasaya soothaamiwa." 
Isaiah49:9 Vano nyuwo munooweerela anamatthukiwa: ‘Mukhume’ ni wa yaale ankhala mpiphini: ‘Ngwe ngwaarani.’ Awosa anookhala moocihamo mukerekhere musewe ni anoophwanya sooca mmattumuxani ootheene yahaamelamo etthu. 
Isaiah49:10 Awosa kheevoliwa etala naari ntthona, hata oviha wa nsuwa na munikareni khanaahisa. Owo ongwoonihera ikharari onimwaahoolela ni onimwaaphiiha omaahini." 
Isaiah49:11 Kinootatuxa nyaakosaka sootheene misewe ni misewesaka sitokotoko sinoorehereriwa. 
Isaiah49:12 Moone, awosa eniirweele ottaiwene – akina okhuma mpatta wa ottuttuwani, akinaawo ninkhuma nsuwa ni akinatho mweelaponi mwa wAsewani.”" 
Isaiah49:13 Ii! Erimu, mukhuweleke ni ohakalala; Ii! Elapo, muhakalale; Ii! Nyaako mwiipe ni ohakalala! Niwoko Yave ompepesa mulokwaawe ni onaamorela ikharari oohooxiwaawe." 
Isaiah49:14 Vaheera Siyoni eenre: “Yave ookihiya, Yave ookittiwala." 
Isaiah49:15 Weeraka ookhala maayi onimuttiwala mwaniye nlelo onaamwa ni ohinimmorela ikharari mwaana omuyanraawe? Naari amuttiwalaka, Miyo nkoottiwalani!" 
Isaiah49:16 Moone, Miyo kohoolepani mmatatanimwaka; ixirisanyu siri ohoolowaka mahuku ootheene." 
Isaiah49:17 Anamwaniinyu asilopwana waakuva orukunuwa ni yaale yoohuhunleni aasusa wa nyuwo. 
Isaiah49:18 Muttukhule maitho ni ngwehe mukhwipi; anamwaniinyu asilopwana ootheene anthukumana erwaaka wa nyuwo.” Yave onghima: “Kinlipela mwa okumaaka weera awosa anookhala ntoko yoowaraanyu yooreerela, aani ntoko soowarela sa ootthomeriwa." 
Isaiah49:19 Naari muheleiyeene nthala ni muthaamiweene, naari elapwaanyu ereene ittuxoru, vano elapwaanyu enooyevaxa wa mulokwaanyu wootheene ni yaale yookhuuraleni anookhala ottaiwene." 
Isaiah49:20 Anamwane ayariwe mweehuhuni mwa olalamikawanyu anooweerelani vamaithoniwanyu: ‘Nipuro nna nooniyevela, munivahe elapo yoowunnuwa weera nikhalemo.’" 
Isaiah49:21 Vano munimwiixeerela: ‘Taani okiyarenle anamwane ala? Kaamwiinanela ni kaari mwali eekupa, kaari wootthukiwani ni ookhoottiwa. Taani aapattunxe? Kaahiiwa ttewu, mene yaala anrweela woowi?’”" 
Isaiah49:22 Vano Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: “Moone, kingwuuvela ntata amalapo; kinimweemexera eneneerowaaka miloko; iyo simmooruuhelani anamwaniinyu asilopwana siwaakandeene ni anamwaniinyu asithiyana veetthuuri." 
Isaiah49:23 Mamwene anookhala anamakosoopaanyu ni mapwiyamwenaaya oowaamwihaanyu. Awosa animookokhorelani ephiihaka muruwaaya vathi; anoolata ntthupi na inaawosanyu. Vano, munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave; yaale ankiroromela Miyo annapwaneya.”" 
Isaiah49:24 Khoongwereya waakha soohuhula wa anakhotto ooweraxa hata waatapuxa anamatthukiwa wa anakhotto a ikuruxa. 
Isaiah49:25 Vaheera Yave oneera ha: “Aani, anamatthukiwa anootapuxiwa mwa anakhotto ooweraxa ni soohuhula animwaakhiwa mwa atthu oolipaxa; Miyo kinimwaawanano yaale anoowananani ni kinimwaavuluxa anamwaniinyu." 
Isaiah49:26 Kinoopakiha weera anamahasulaanyu yiikhuure; anoohapaliwa ni ephomaaya ntoko ereene eviinyu. Vanonto atthu ootheene anoosuwela weera Miyo, Yave, ti Mvuluxaanyu, Namoopolaanyu, Ooweraxa a Yakobe.”" 
Isaiah50:1 Yave oneera ha: “Eri woowi ekaratta ya omwalana ya amayinyu Miyo kaawoomolenlaaka? Mwa yeeyo, wa namakoongoriha taani koothumihaakani nyuwo? Muthumihiwe niwoko na sootthekasanyu; amayinyu yoomoleliwe niwoko na soonanarasanyu." 
Isaiah50:2 Miyo kaarwaaka, kihimphwanyenreni mutthu? Miyo kiitthanaaka, kahaakhuleliweni? Apaale moonowaaka wookhuveyaxa ohiweraka owoopolani? Apaale nkinono ikuru sowoovuluxani? Kinuumiha ephareiya ni nsu na ohiiha paahi, kintatuxa nyooloko nikare; ihopasaya sinuntta niwoko na ohikhalano maahi ni sinkhwa ntthona." 
Isaiah50:3 Kiniilihiha erimu ni kinkhuneelano esaakho yoolalamika.” 
Isaiah50:4 Yave onlamula sootheene ookivaha nlumi nooxuttihiwa weera kisuwele masu anaakhavihera ookhulumuwa. Owo onkivenxa khula oxeexelo, onghula maaruwaaka weera yiiwe ntoko mukina onxuttihiwaawe." 
Isaiah50:5 Yave onlamula sootheene oohula maaruwaaka ni nkaattingyemaaru, nkaasunse." 
Isaiah50:6 Kaawinnyerera ettulaaka yaale yaakimana, ekhovaaka yaale yaarosola irerusaka; nkaahulunxe ekhovaaka mootthebwiwani ni moosenyeliwani." 
Isaiah50:7 Eenre Yave onlamula sootheene akikhavihera, nkuulihiheya muru. Tivawo miyo kiraaka oolipeene ntoko mwala woolipa ni kinsuwela weera nkikhala oohipwaneya." 
Isaiah50:8 Yoole onkaakiha ori vakhiviru. Taani anaawere okoothera? Nrowe, nikumane. Namootheeraaka taani? Owo akoothereke!" 
Isaiah50:9 Ti Yave onlamula sootheene onkikhavihera. Taani anaakithorihe? Awosa ootheene anoothaala ntoko ekuwo; atthumpwiha animwaakhuura. 
Isaiah50:10 Taani a nyuwo ommoova Yave ni oniiwelela masu a murumeiyaawe? Yoole oneetta mpiphini ahikhalanaka waara aroromeleke mwa Nsina na Yave ni mwa Mulukwaawe. 
Isaiah50:11 Vano, ootheene nyuwo mumpattiha mooro, mwiiwarihakano mithuko sivarelaka, murowe, mweette ngwaarani mwa moorowaanyu ni mwa mithukusanyu mupattinghaanyu. Yeeyo muneeraanyu mwaakhele mmatatanimwaka ti ela: munimwiixaatalela oohooxeyeene." 
Isaiah51:1 Mukiiwe nyuwosa muntthara yoororomeleya ni mummwaasa Yave: Mungwehe mwala mwa yoowo mwaathikiliwaanyuwo ni ompwexiwa maluku mwaathimpwaanyuwo; 
Isaiah51:2 Mungwehe Abrahaamu, atithinyu ni Sara ooyanreni. Miyo kaamwiitthanaaka, aari meekhaawe ni kaamureeliha, kimutatuxaka atthu ancipale." 
Isaiah51:3 Vekhaikhai Yave onoopepesa oSiyoni ni onoomorela ikharari mathalaaya ootheene; Owo onootatuxa nikarenaya ntoko wEdeni, elapwaaya yoowuumaxa ntoko nttimbe na Yave. Ohakalalaxa onoophwanyiwa oSiyoni, otthapela ni oruma wa wiipa." 
Isaiah51:4 Mukiiwe, atthwaaka, mukiiwe mulokwaaka: Nlamulo nnookhuma mwa Miyo; ekhaikhaiyaaka enoothatuwa waara wa miloko." 
Isaiah51:5 Ekhaikhaiyaaka enimoowa woowaakuveya; ovuluxawaka ori mphironi ni moonowaaka onooruuhela ekhaikhai miloko. Icirumba sinookiweha siwehereraka moonowaaka. 
Isaiah51:6 Ngwehe wiirimu ni moone elapo ya vathi; erimu enoolakaseya ntoko mwiixi ni elapo enoothaala ntoko ekuwo ni amakaaya animookhwa ntoko ikulihi. Vaheera ovuluxawaka onoopwaherera wa mahuku ootheene ni ororomeleyawaka khoorwaru wooceela. 
Isaiah51:7 Mukiiwe nyuwosa munsuwela yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai, nyuwosa munkhalano nlamulonaka mmurimanimwanyu. Muhoove ohiiha wa atthu hata woopopihiwa ni oruwanawaya." 
Isaiah51:8 Vano tthumpwiha onimwaakhuura ntoko ekuwo; muungu onimwaanyaanya ntoko exapala ya ekhondoolo. Vaheera ororomeleyawaka onoopwaherera wa mahuku ootheene ni ovuluxawaka ikhapira ikhapirasene. 
Isaiah51:9 Ii! Moono wa Yave, mvenye! mvenye! mwiiwarihe ni ikuru, mvenye ntoko mmahukuni avinre ntoko mweehuhuni ya ikhapira sa khalayi. Ti nyuwo mwaamunyaannye Rahabi a mphareiya ni mwaathoronle enowa yoowoopihaxa ya mphareiyani." 
Isaiah51:10 Ti Nyuwo muuminghe ephareiya, maahi a moowiixeraxa, mwaapanke musewe moowiixera mwa ephareiya weera oowoopoliwa elapuwe." 
Isaiah51:11 Oowoopoliwa a Yave anoohokolowa. Anoovolowa oSiyoni ni wiipa; ohakalala woohimala onookhala icireembasaya. Ohakalalaxa onimwaaphwanya ni ohitteela ni ohihimera onimwaatthawa. 
Isaiah51:12 “Miyo, aani ti Yoomi kinoopepesani. Heeni mungwoovaanyu atthu ankhwa, anamwane a atthu ari malaxi paahi?" 
Isaiah51:13 Munimuttiwalelani Yave Mpattuxaanyu, mwa Yoole okunge erimu ni opanke mathipelo a elapo? Heeni munkhalaanyu ngwoovani mahuku ootheene niwoko na isara sa anamahasula antthunaxa ophwata? Vano siri woowi isara sa anamahasula?" 
Isaiah51:14 Anamatthukiwaanyu ootheene anootaphuliwa woowaakuveya; awosa kheekhwela mukaliposo hata kheethoiwa yooca. 
Isaiah51:15 Vanonto Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu kintannya ephareiya moota wooweera mitekuteku sirume – Yave a ikuru sootheene ti Nsinanaka. 
Isaiah51:16 Koohela maswaaka vayanoniwanyu ni kohoothokororani mmunttuusini mwa matataaka – Miyo kinkunga erimu kihelaka mathipelo a elapo ni kineerela oSiyoni: ‘Nyuwo mulokwaaka.’ ” 
Isaiah51:17 Mvenye! Mvenye. Mweemeleke, oYerusaleemu, nyuwo ngwunre mmatatani mwa Yave ekoomixi ya isarasawe, nyuwo mminre mpaka nttonyo nookisera ekoomixi yaaveveleihale atthu." 
Isaiah51:18 Wa anamwane asilopwana ootheene aayanraawe khaariworu oomuhoolela; wa anamwane asilopwana owunnuwihalaawe, khaariworu oomvarela ntata." 
Isaiah51:19 Sinoomorelani irisa sooheleleleya: mathala ni ophwata, etala ni ekatana. Taani anoomoreleni ikharari? Taani anoopepeseni?" 
Isaiah51:20 Anamwaniinyu asilopwana aakomoka, yiixaatalelaka mmiseweni ntoko etthove yoophariwa munraakhoni. Awosa aasareya isara sa Yave ni ohiiha wa Mulukwaanyu." 
Isaiah51:21 Tivawo, mwiiwe yeeyo, nyuwo oohasuwa, oohapaliwa muhiwunre." 
Isaiah51:22 Yave onlamula sootheene, Mulukwaanyu onaakiha mulokwaawe, oneera ha: “Moone, koovenxa mmatatanimwanyu ekoomixi yooveveleihani, khamurwa ngwuratho ekoomixeene yeeyo ya isarasaka." 
Isaiah51:23 Kinimwiikaathi mmatatani mwa anamahasulaanyu yaaweerelani: ‘Muurame weera noovireeni ni nyuwo mwaahaatalela makhataanyu ntoko etthaya ni musewe omviriwa.’” 
Isaiah52:1 Ii! oSiyoni, mvenye, mvenye, mwiiwarihe ikuru. Ii! oYerusaleemu, esidade yootteela, ngware mikaandyosanyu soovuwaxa. Oohiineliwa ni oohitteela kheevolowatho mmilakoni." 
Isaiah52:2 Mutathele ottai ntthupinanyu, Ii! oYerusaleemu, mvenye ni mukilaathi vahiceni ya emwene. Ii! Mwaana muthiyana a oSiyoni, mwiitapuxe onyooro ori muxikomwanyu." 
Isaiah52:3 Vano Yave oneera ha: “Nyuwo murimwaasa othumihiwa ni munimoopoliwa woohikhala musurukhu.” 
Isaiah52:4 Vanonto Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: “Khalayi mulokwaaka waarowa wExipitu weera wamakewo, mene mweehuhuni yeela awAsiriya ti anamahooxaaya.”" 
Isaiah52:5 Yave onghima: “Ni vano, kirinoni va? Mulokwaaka orimwaasa okuxiwa ni yaawo anlamula anootthebwa,” onghima Yave. “Ni ehuhu yootheene Nsinanaka noolaphiwa." 
Isaiah52:6 Tivawo mulokwaaka oneeraaya osuwele Nsinanaka; vanihukuni nenenenno owo onoosuwela weera ti Miyo kaahimme yeeyo. Aani ti Yoomi.” 
Isaiah52:7 Moota onreeraaya woona sirweelaka mmanyaakoni inaawo sa yaale anruuhela mutthenga wooreera, anlaleiya murettele, anruuhela ihaali sooreeraxa, anghima ovuluxiwa yeerelaka oSiyoni: “Mulukwaanyu onlamula!”" 
Isaiah52:8 Mwiiwe! Anamalipelelaanyu ankhuwela; awosa ankhuwela vamoha ni ohakalala. Yave aahokoleelaka oSiyoni, awosa anoomoona ni maithowaaya." 
Isaiah52:9 Mpacere wiipa vamoha ni ohakalala, nyuwosa milepe sa oYerusaleemu, niwoko Yave oopepesa mulokwaawe, Owo ohoopola oYerusaleemu." 
Isaiah52:10 Yave onimoonihera moonowaawe wootteela vamaithoni wa miloko sootheene ni ekotenle elapo yootheene enimoona ovuluxa wa Mulukwaahu. 
Isaiah52:11 Mususe, mususe! Mvenye va! Muhitaveru etthu yoohitteela! Muhiyeke ni mukhaleke ootteela, nyuwosa munteexa ikaruma sa Yave." 
Isaiah52:12 Vaheera khamumpwaha woowaakuveya hata khamumvenya ni otthawa niwoko Yave onimoohoolelani ni Muluku a oYixrayeli onookhala ottuliwanyu. 
Isaiah52:13 Moone, murumeiyaaka onimweetta ni miruku; owo onimunnuwihiwa, onoottittimihiwa ni onoovuwihiwa." 
Isaiah52:14 Ekhalelowaawe yaavirikanyihiwa moota wooweera aatikinsa ahinasuwanyeya omutthu; khaalikana ntoko mutthu. Mooteene yoowo yaaraaya ancipale yaamututhungwe woomoona yoowo," 
Isaiah52:15 hiihotho miloko sincipale sinootikhina ni mamwene animuumiwa owanoni niwoko na yoowo. Vano yeeyo awosa yahaaleeliwaaya, animoona ni yeeyo yahiiwalaaya animwiiwexexa." 
Isaiah53:1 Taani ororomenle mutthengaahu ni moono wa Yave ooniheringwe taani? 
Isaiah53:2 Owo unnungwe ohoolowawe ntoko niphuwa nikhaanene ni ntoko mukwankhwaari vatthayani yoowuumelela. Owo khaaphwaneliwaru hata khaattittimiheya weera nimusivele, veekhalelonivawe khayaariworu etthu yoonihaaweliha yoowo." 
Isaiah53:3 Khooneliwa ni atthu yaamuhiya, mulopwana a othananaxa asuwelaka nnenesene soohaawa. Ntoko oohuluwiwa, oothanyiwa ni hiyo khanaamuttittiminghe." 
Isaiah53:4 Vekhaikhai aakuxa irettasahu ni soothananasahu, mene hiyo naamoona ntoko onttaruxiwa ni Muluku, oomaniwa ni oohasuliwa ni Yoowo." 
Isaiah53:5 Ookhomeliwa niwoko na sootthekasahu, oohononiwa niwoko na soonanarasahu; ottaruxa oniwerenle murettele waari wawawe ni noolamihiwa ni makhwattaawe." 
Isaiah53:6 Hiyo ootheene nooriheya ntoko ikhondoolo, khula mutthu a hiyo oohapuwa; ni Yave oomureya Yoowo sootakhala sa ootheene hiyo." 
Isaiah53:7 Owo oohasuliwa ni oohooxiwa, mene khaahunle eyanowaawe; ntoko eputtiputthi eronghiwaka owiiviwani ni ntoko ekhondoolo emmaalaaya ohoolo wa anamametthaaya, hiihotho Owo khaahunle eyanowaawe." 
Isaiah53:8 Ookuxiwa munthoriheloni ni moohasuliwani. Taani ongwera wuuluma sa ikhapirasawe? Vano Owo aamalamalihiwa mwa akumi; oomaniwa niwoko na soottheka sa mulokwaaka. 
Isaiah53:9 Oovahiwa nihiye variyari wa mahiye a atakhali ni anamapuha mookhwaani, aaroohipahularu hata ehooneyakaru yoowootha." 
Isaiah53:10 Hata hiiho waari otthuna wa Yave omuhonona ni omuhooxa ni, Yave aaroopakaru okumaawe yooveleelela nthowa, Owo onimoona ekhapiraawe ni animwaandyeerereya mahukwaawe ni otthuna wa Yave onimweetteleya nnenesene mmatatanimwawe." 
Isaiah53:11 Vahoolo wa ohaawa wa munepaawe, Owo onimoona waara wa okumi ni onookhala oomaaleleya; ni mweesuweloni eyo, Murumeiyaaka oororomeleya onoopakiha weera ancipale yaakhuleliwe ni Muluku, akuxaka sootthekasaya." 
Isaiah53:12 Tivawo kineeraaka kimuvahe mpatta variyari wa asitokweenexa ni Owo onookawa soohuhula vamoha ni ooweraxa, niwoko ohinnyerera okumaawe mookhwaani ni aahaalikeleliwa vamoha ni anamattheka. Vano ookuxa soottheka sa ancipale aavekelelaka anamattheka." 
Isaiah54:1 “Ii! Muthiyana mwali eekupa, nyuwo muhitonke oyara, mwiipe! Mpacere wiipa ni mukhuwele ni ohakalala, nyuwo muhitonke ohaawa ovoreya wa oyara, niwoko anamwane a muthiyana oohiiwa ari ancipale oowaapwaha anamwane a muthiyana ootheliwa,” onghima Yave." 
Isaiah54:2 “Munnuwihe nipuro na eheemaanyu, mukokhe nnenesene eluttu ya eheemaanyu; mwaandyeerere mikhoyisaya ni mulipihe ikhomosaya." 
Isaiah54:3 Niwoko nyuwo munimwaandyeerera mipatta sootheene; ekhapiraanyu enookuxa miloko, eniitekiha mmasidadenimwaya moothaamiwa." 
Isaiah54:4 Muhoove, khamuulihiheya muru. Muhoove wuulihihiwa muru, khamuyevihiwatho. Munoottiwala wuulihihiwa muru wa enamwanaanyu ni khamuupuwelelatho ohiiha wa onaamukhwelaanyu." 
Isaiah54:5 Vano Mpattuxaanyu ori iyinyu – Yave a ikuru sootheene ti Nsinanawe – Ootteela a oYixrayeli ti Mvuluxaanyu. Owo oniitthaniwa Muluku a elapo ya vathi yootheene. 
Isaiah54:6 Yave onimoohokoloxanitho ntoko mureene muthiyana oohiiwa ni oothanana mmunepani – muthiyana ootheliwa areene mukhaanene eereliwaka ohikhoolihiwa,” oneera Mulukwaanyu." 
Isaiah54:7 “Miyo kohoohiyani wa ehuhu vakhaani, mene kinimoohokoleelani ni ikharari sitokotoko." 
Isaiah54:8 Musarani ni mweehuhuni emoha kohoohuluwani, mene kinoowooniherani murima wooreera ni ikharari soohimala,” oneera Yave, Mvuluxaanyu." 
Isaiah54:9 “Wa miyo eyo eri ntoko mahuku a Nowe miyo kaalipenlaaka weera maahi a Nowe khayaakhuneelatho elapo. Vano koolipela weera nkinoonyoonyeriwani hata nkinoohiyani. 
Isaiah54:10 Naari nyaako sittikinyeyaka ni mattumuxa evenxiwaka, woosivelaniwaka woohimala khoottikinyeyaru naari wiiraanawaka wa murettele khoovenxiwa,” onghima Yave onoomorelani ikharari." 
Isaiah54:11 Ii! Esidade, yoohooxiwa ni ettheku ni yoohipepesiwa! Kinimooraselani ni maluku oowaaraxa ni mathipelowaanyu anookhala a maluku a safira*." 
Isaiah54:12 Kinoopaka ixikudusanyu* sa rubi* ni maselaanyu a maluku oorikaxa ni ixirisanyu sa maluku oowaaraxa. 
Isaiah54:13 Anamwaniinyu asilopwana ootheene anooxuttihiwa ni Yave ni murettele wa anamwaniinyu onuukhale mutokotoko. 
Isaiah54:14 Munookhalihiwa moororomeleyani: onimoorakamelani ohasuliwa; khamurwa moova etthu. Woopopiha onoosuseeriheliwa ottaiwanyu; iwo khoowaattamelani. 
Isaiah54:15 Akina yoowananani, khookhala mutekwaaka. Yaawo anoowananani, munimwaawina." 
Isaiah54:16 Moone, ti Miyo kimpattunxe namahana omvekhulela makhala enapatta, ampakaka kapwitthi oolikaneene wa mutekwaawe. Ti Miyotho kimpattunxe namaphwata weera ananarihe." 
Isaiah54:17 Khawoworu kapwitthi mpakeliwaanyu woonanarihani anaaweereeni etthu ni nyuwo munoomuvaanya khula anawoothereni. Eyo ti yoohiyeriwa wa arumeiyi a Yave, ni wu ti waakiha kimpakelaaka mwaha wa yaawo,” onghima Yave." 
Isaiah55:1 “Ngweeke ootheene nyuwo mumvoliwa ntthona, nkarwani wa maahi; ni nyuwo muhinono musurukhu, ngweeke, muthume ni muceeke! Nkarwani, muthume eviinyu ni mukaka wa mahala woohiliva etthu." 
Isaiah55:2 Munnanarihela heeni musurukhu ni etthu ehinciwa ni mwiikhulumulakano muteko woohiphureleya etthu? Mwiiwe, mukiiwe ni muce yeeyo eri yooreera ni okumaanyu onoohakalalela sooca sooreerelaxa." 
Isaiah55:3 Mwiiwe ni nkarwani wa Miyo; mukiiwe weera munepaanyu okhale ni okumi. Kinoopaka wiiraana woohimala ni nyuwo ntoko wiiraanawene weiwe kaapankaaka ni Davide. 
Isaiah55:4 Moone, koompaka namoona a miloko, muhooleli ni namalamula a miloko." 
Isaiah55:5 Vekhaikhai munimwiitthana miloko muhisuwenlaanyu ni miloko sihoosuwenleni sinoowaattamelani nyuwo niwoko na Yave Mulukwaanyu, Ootteela a oYixrayeli eenre Owo oovahakaani waara.”" 
Isaiah55:6 Mmwaase Yave vaava ongwereyaaya, mmwiitthane Owo nlelo areene vakhiviru." 
Isaiah55:7 Mutakhali ahiyeke ephirowaawe ni mutthu oonanara soowuupuwelasawe. Owo ahokoleele wa Yave ni Owo onoommorela ikharari, arukunuwele wa Muluku ni Owo onoomulevelela ni murima wooreera." 
Isaiah55:8 “Vano soowuupuwelasaka soovirikanaxa ni yeeyo nyuwo munuupuwelaanyu ni iphirosaka soohiyanaxa ni sawinyu,” onghima Yave." 
Isaiah55:9 Hiiho ntoko erimu erakamelannaaya ni etthaya, hiihotho iphirosaka soorakamelana ni sawinyu ni soowuupuwelasaka ni sawinyu." 
Isaiah55:10 Epula ni etthabwe enrweela wiirimu ni kheenghokoleelawo ehinaanihale etthaya, emelihaka ni epombihaka weera etthaya eruwere mmiso ni yooca wa namalima." 
Isaiah55:11 Hiihotho ni masu kinghimaaka: khaankihokoleela ehipanke etthu, mene anookwanihera yeeyo kintthunaaka ni anoomalihera yeeyo kirumihenlaaka." 
Isaiah55:12 Munookhuma moohakalalani ni munoohooleliwa mmuretteleni; nyaako ni mattumuxa anoopacera wiipa ohoolowanyu ni nyiri sootheene sa ntuphini sinimwiipa makuphi. 
Isaiah55:13 Mwiri wa epinyeiru* onimunnuwa vanipuroni na nyiiwa ni vanipuroni na rupulula onimunnuwa murta*. Eyo enoomuttittimiha Yave ntoko eneneero yoohimala eneera ehiphwatiwe. 
Isaiah56:1 Yave oneera ha: “Muthokorore ekhaikhai ni mpake yeeyo eri yookwanela, niwoko ovuluxawaka ori vakhiviru ni ororomeleyawaka onimoonihereya woowaakuveya." 
Isaiah56:2 Ooreelihiwa ti mulopwana ompaka yeeyo, yoole ompwaherera mwa yeeyo oolipeene, onttittimihera eSaabadu, ahiveihaka yeeyo ni ahitthuniheraka matataawe opaka yoonanara.”" 
Isaiah56:3 Ahikhale namarwa aniiwanane ni Yave aneere: “Vekhaikhai Yave onookimwalamwaxa mwa mulokwaawe.” Ni ahikhaleru enoko* anaattaandawule: “Miyo mwiri woowuumeene paahi.” 
Isaiah56:4 Vano Yave oneera ha: “Wa inoko* anttittimihera iSaabadusaka ni anthanla yeeyo enkisiveliha ni aniiwelela wiiraanawaka – 
Isaiah56:5 wa yaawo kinimwaavaha Mpaanimwaka ni ixirisaya eyuupuxero ni nsina nooreerela waapwaha anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana. Kinimwaavaha nsina noohimala nneera nihicipihiwe. 
Isaiah56:6 Mwaha wa anamarwa aniiwananano Yave weera emurumeele, esivele Nsina na Yave ni emulape, ootheene anthokorora eSaabadu ehiveihaka ni aniiwelela wiiraanawaka –" 
Isaiah56:7 vano yaawo kinimwaaruuha vamwaakoniwaka wootteela ni kinimwaavaha ohakalala Mpaanimwaka wa mavekelo. Sooveleelasaya soohisa ni sikina sinimwaakhuleliwa valtaariniwaka; vanonto Empaaka eniitthaniwa Empa ya mavekelo wa miloko sootheene.” 
Isaiah56:8 Yave onlamula sootheene, Yoowo onaathukumanyiha anamatthukiwa a oYixrayeli onghima: “Kinimwaathukumanyihatho akina yaathukumanyihiwe.”" 
Isaiah56:9 Ngweeke, nyuwosa axinama a ntuphini ootheene, ngweeke ni mukhuure, nyuwosa axinama a moothakoni!" 
Isaiah56:10 Anamalipelela a oYixrayeli ari oohoona, awosa ootheene khaaniiwexexa etthu; ootheene ari ntoko alapwa oomaala, ahingweraru owuwa; aniixaatalela elohaka, ansivela okona paahi." 
Isaiah56:11 Awosa ari ntoko alapwa oonyaanya; khaamvona. Awosa ari akukhuli oohiiwexexa; ootheene yaawo antthara iphirosaya asineenaaya, khula mutthu a yaawo onaasaasa enimusiveliha." 
Isaiah56:12 Khula mutthu a yaawo onkhuwela: “Murwe, mukiruuhele eviinyu! Niwureke mpattaahu wa soowura soohapala! Omaalo onookhala ntoko olelo hoye hoye mpaka wootepaxa.”" 
Isaiah57:1 Oororomeleya onkhwa ni khawowo ontthokelela yeeyo mmurimanimwawe. Atthu ootteeliheriwa amvenxiwa ni khawowo oniiwexexa weera oororomeleya amvenxiwa weera yuurereliwe soonanara. 
Isaiah57:2 Yaawosa aneetta moota wookwanela amvolowa mmuretteleni; amphwanya wiitthuuwa woomaaleleya mookhwaani. 
Isaiah57:3 “Vaheera nyuwosa, ngweeke va nyuwosa anamwane asilopwana a akhwiri, ekhapira ya anamararuwa ni mapuuta!" 
Isaiah57:4 Nyuwosa munaatthebwa taani? Munaanyemula taani? Mungwoonihera taani nlumi? Nyuwosa muri nakupa a anamapuhera, ekhapira ya anamootha." 
Isaiah57:5 Moosareya soohaawela variyari wa ikaravalyu* ni vathi wa khula mwiri woopombaxa; nyuwosa munaapaka sooveleela anamwaniinyu mmaxaapwani ni munyattani. 
Isaiah57:6 Miluku variyari wa maluku oovilikeya a maxaapwa ti mpattaanyu; muniithukumanyiha ni seiyo. Aani, munlapa seiyo ni sooveleela soowura ni sa etrigu. Vano, Miyo kinoowera ohakalalela yeeyo?" 
Isaiah57:7 Mwaahiipakela wookonawo vanttumuxani noorakamaxa; moowelawo weera mwapakewo sooveleelasanyu. 
Isaiah57:8 Mohiikaathera eneneerowaanyu ya miluku sikina musereemuni. Mukihiyaka Miyo, mohoonelela wookonawanyu, munawelawo, muhulaka yeeyo nnenesene. Mohiiwanana ni yaawo munkonaanyuno, yaale moonnaanyu etiriyaaya." 
Isaiah57:9 Mwaarowa mpaka wa Moleki ni makhura a sooliveira* ni mohaandyeereriha makhuraanyu oowunkhelaxa; mwaahaarumihela anamitthengaanyu wa ilapo sa ottai; mwaakhuruwela moowiixera. 
Isaiah57:10 Mwaathatuwa ookhulumuweene ni iphirosanyu sootheene, mene khamutthunne weera: ‘Seiyo siri soohimuteko!’ sohoorweelani ikuru sinyowani, tivawo muhitteengungwaanyu." 
Isaiah57:11 Yaawoopopihani ni yoothukumelihani taani weera nyuwo mukilokotthe, muhikuupuwelelaka hata muhitthokelelaka yeeyo mmurimanimwanyu? Weeraka mwahaakoovela niwoko kiroomaalaxa?" 
Isaiah57:12 Kinimoonihera yeeyo munuupuwelaanyu eri ekhaikhai nitho mitekosanyu ni seiyo khasooreerelani. 
Isaiah57:13 Nyuwosa mwaakhuweleleka ekhavihero, vano milukusanyu sookhavihereni! Epheyo enookuxakuxa seiyo sootheene, iphumu paahi sinimoopela ottai! Vaheera yoole ontthawela mwa Miyo onimwaakhela elapo ntoko yoohiyeriwa ni onookuxa mwaakowaaka wootteela.”" 
Isaiah57:14 Ni enimweeriwa: “Muthatawalihe, muthatawalihe, mureherere musewe, mvenxeke ikuttelelo mphironi mwa mulokwaaka.”" 
Isaiah57:15 Vano Oosulusuluxa, Yoowo onkhala ni okumi wa mahuku ootheene, Nsinanawe Ootteela, oneera ha: “Miyo kinkhala vanipuroni noosuluxa ni nootteela, menetho ni yoowo orino murima woothananaxa ni wooyevihiwa mmunepani weera kikakamuxe munepa wa oowiiyeviha ni opepesa murima wa oothanana." 
Isaiah57:16 Nkinoothera wa mahuku ootheene naari nkimpwaherera onyoonyiwa. Ovirikanawaya, munepa wa omutthu saano okhulumungweene ohoolowaka nitho ngwiya wa mutthu kimpattunxaaka." 
Isaiah57:17 Koosareya isara niwoko na soohaawelasaya sootthekeya; koonyoonyiwa, kinaahuluwa, mene awo ampwaherera ephiro athanlalaaya." 
Isaiah57:18 Kohoona iphirosaya, mene kinimwaalamiha; kinimwaahoolela ni kinimwaapepesa," 
Isaiah57:19 kiwerihaka ottottopela vayanoni wa anamalalamika a oYixrayeli.” Yave oneera: “Murettele, murettele wa yaale ari ottai ni vakhiviru. Vano wa yaawo ni Miyo kinimwaalamiha.”" 
Isaiah57:20 Vaheera atakhali ari ntoko ephareiya yoowali, ehiweraka omaaleleya, ni mitekutekusaya sinkhumiha nipheru na ittoko." 
Isaiah57:21 “Wa atakhali khoowowo murettele,” oneera Mulukwaaka." 
Isaiah58:1 “Mukhuwele ni nsu ntokotoko, muhihovelaka! Murumihe nsunanyu ntoko nipalapatta. Mulaleere mulokwaaka ovaanyawaya ni wa ekhapira ya Yakobe sootthekasaya." 
Isaiah58:2 Vano khula nihuku awosa annikaasa; awosa antthunaxa osuwela iphirosaka ntoko waari muloko ompaka yeeyo eri yooreera ni ohihingye malamulo a Mulukwaaya. Awosa ankivekela soolakela sa ekhaikhai ni ankhala ntoko anamahaawela weera Muluku aakhuveele. 
Isaiah58:3 Awosa ankoha: Hiyo naatthukaka heeni muhinoonelani? Hiyo niiyevihaka, muhimpwatthelani?” Wa soothesene, vanihukuni na otthukawanyu nyuwosa mumpaka yeeyo muntthunaanyu muhaapwatthelaka anamutekwaanyu ootheene." 
Isaiah58:4 Emalihero ya otthukawanyu ti onyakulihana ni opuhera mmananaka ni icipakhira. Khamungwera otthuka ntoko mumpakaanyu olelo munaroromela weera nsunanyu nnimwiiwiwa wiirimu. 
Isaiah58:5 Weeraka otthukawene ti weiwo kithanlalaaka – nihuku nimoha paahi weera mutthu iiyevihe? Weeraka otthuka ori wuuramiha muru ntoko ettheere ni wiixaatalela vasaakhoni ni ettuura paahi? Munuupuwela weera wu ti otthuka, nihuku noowaakhuleliwa ni Yave?" 
Isaiah58:6 Moota wa otthuka kintthunaaka wa nyuwosa ti ola: otaphula onyooro wa ohiroromeleya ni mikhoyi sa soolemelaxa; owoopola oohasuliwa ni ophwata moota wootheene wa yoolemelaxa. 
Isaiah58:7 Otthuka wa ekhaikhai ti omukawela soocasanyu oovoliwa etala ni omvaha oohaawa nipuro noowiitthuuwa, aani waawariha oothaaleliwa mwaaphwannyaanyu ni ohimurera ettuli munninyu." 
Isaiah58:8 Vano, waarawanyu onimooneya ntoko ekamaama ya oxa ni olamihiwawanyu onimoonihereya woowaakuveya. Ekhaikhaiyaanyu enoorowa ohoolowanyu ni ovuwa wa Yave onookhala yoowaakihaanyu ya ottuli." 
Isaiah58:9 Hiiho nyuwosa munoomwiitthana, ni Yave onoowaakhulani; nyuwosa munookhuwelela ekhavihero ni Owo onooweerelani: “Kiri va.” Nyuwosa mwamalamaliha eriyaraanyu yoolemela yoohooxa, soowoothera ni masu oowootha," 
Isaiah58:10 nyuwosa mwaavaha yooca oovoliwa, mweerera waahakalaliha oohaawa, vano waarawanyu onoomwaleela mpiphini ni ohiyuwaanyu onoothatuwa ntoko othana." 
Isaiah58:11 Yave onimoohoolelani mahuku ootheene; onoohakalaliha sohaawelasanyu mweelaponi moowuumelelihiwa ni nsuwa ni onoolipihera erutthwaanyu. Munookhala ntoko nttimbe noohelelaxiwa ni naattuuttu oohimala maahi. 
Isaiah58:12 Mulokwaanyu onoorasela milepe sa khalayi, onootekatho mathipelo a iyaakha sincipale sivinre. Munimwiitthaniwa Namareherera a ixiri soopwexiwa ni Namareherera a misewe sirino impa." 
Isaiah58:13 Nyuwosa mwawehaweha inaawosanyu weera muhinanarihe eSaabadu, mpakaka yeeyo muntthunaanyu vanihukuninaka nootteela, nyuwosa mwiitthana eSaabadu nihuku na ohakalala ni nihuku nootteela na Yave, nihuku noottittimiheyaxa ni nyuwosa mwattittimiha, muhittharaka iphirosanyu, muhipakaka seiyo muntthunaanyu paahi hata muhuulumaka masu oohorahora," 
Isaiah58:14 vano munoophwanya ohakalalawanyu mwa Yave ni Miyo kinoopakiha weera mweette mweelaponi ya musulusulu ni mpake efesta ni yoohiyeriwa ya atithinyu Yakobe.” Onuuluma ti Yave. 
Isaiah59:1 Vekhaikhai moono wa Yave khookhuveiye woohiwera woovuluxani hata maaruwaawe khaattiyeiye woohiwera wiiwa. 
Isaiah59:2 Mene sootthekasanyu sinoomwalamwaxani ni Mulukwaanyu; ti niwoko na sootakhalasanyu Owo oohulungwaaweni moota wooweera Owo khawiiwani. 
Isaiah59:3 Vano matataanyu aasareya ephome ni ikathasanyu soosareya mathowa. Iyanosanyu sinuuluma soowootha ni malumaanyu anlokolola itthu soonanara. 
Isaiah59:4 Khawoworu oniitthana onuuluma mulattwaawe ni ekhaikhai; khawoworu onaakiha nthowanawe ni murima wa ekhaikhai. Awosa anroromela soowuuluma sa siiyo ni masu oowootha; awosa anrupala sookacamiha ni angyara soonanara. 
Isaiah59:5 Awosa anrela mooce a enowa ni animutthava ttandaasi. Yoowo onca moocaaya onimookhwa, ni nooce nimoha noopwexiwa, enkhuma evili." 
Isaiah59:6 Ttandaasaaya khangwareya; awosa khaangwera wiikuttelelano yeeyo ampakaaya. Mitekosaya ti soonanara ni soopaka sa nipuhero siri mmatatanimwaya. 
Isaiah59:7 Inaawosaya sintthimakela yoonanara; awosa khaampisa oyeeha ephome yoohinthowa. Soowuupuwelasaya ti soonanara; ophwata ni ohonona ti ineneero sa iphirosaya. 
Isaiah59:8 Awosa khaansuwela ephiro ya murettele; kheewowo ekhaikhai mphironimwaya. Aatatuxa seiyo iphiro sookhoromana ni yoowo anaaviremo khasuwela murettele. 
Isaiah59:9 Vano ekhaikhai eri ottaiwahu ni ororomeleya khoonniphwanya. Hiyo ninaasa waara, mene sootheene siri epiphi; ninaasa waara, mene nineetta mmunttuusini woowiilihana." 
Isaiah59:10 Hiyo ninaapapela exiri ntoko oohoona naasaasaka ntoko atthu oohikhalano maitho. Ninkwakwathuwa othana ntoko oreene ohiyu. Variyari wa oolipa hiyo nri ntoko anamakhwa. 
Isaiah59:11 Ootheene hiyo nnoopa murika ntoko ursu*; nniipulela ntoko ikhunda. Hiyo nnimwaasa ekhaikhai, mene khanimphwanya; nnimwaasa ovuluxiwa, mene ori ottaiwene." 
Isaiah59:12 Aani, sootakhalasahu sohaattaxa vamaithoniwanyu ni sinnoothera sootthekasahu. Soopakasahu soonanara siri ni hiyo mahuku ootheene ni nohaakhulela sootakhalasahu:" 
Isaiah59:13 Noomurukunuwela ni noomulokottha Yave; noomuhiya omutthara Mulukwaahu, wuulumawahu ti wa nihasu ni ovaanya ni noolokolola soowootha mirimasahu siyanraaya." 
Isaiah59:14 Hiiho ekhaikhai enghokoleela ottuli ni ororomeleya onkhala ottaiwene; ekhaikhai enkwakwathuwa mmiseweni ni murima wa ekhaikhai khoongwereya ovolowa. 
Isaiah59:15 Khoowowo emphwanyaneyaayaru ekhaikhai ni yoowo onsemba yoonanara onthatuwa oolupatthiwa. Yave ohoona, ahinahakalalela ohikhala ekhaikhai." 
Isaiah59:16 Yave ohoona weera khaariworu mutthu mmoha; aatikhina niwoko khawowo hata mmoha aapwatthenle; tivawo moonowaawe muneenaaya omuruuhenlaaya ovuluxa ni ororomeleyawawe waamukhavihera. 
Isaiah59:17 Oowarela ororomeleya ntoko malaya a eyuuma vakakasani ni ekapasete ya ovuluxa mmuru; oowarela ikukuttula ni ohiikuttelelano nthiti ntoko nireene mukaandyo. 
Isaiah59:18 Owo onimwaatthuvela attharihaka mitekosaya; wa awananaawe isara; wa amwiittanaawe ntthuvelo nootthuneya ni wa icirumba seiyo simphwanela. 
Isaiah59:19 Okhuma ninkela nsuwa atthu animoova Nsina na Yave ni okhuma ninkhuma nsuwa onoottittimiha ovuwawawe. Vano Owo onimoowa ntoko mirupi soowoopihaxa seettihiwaka ni iphumu sa Yave. 
Isaiah59:20 “Mvuluxa onimoowa wa oSiyoni, wa yaale a Yakobe anrukunxa murima mwa sootthekasaya,” onghima Yave." 
Isaiah59:21 Vano Yave oneera: “Wa Miyo, owiiraananawaka yaawo ti wu: Munepaaka ori mwa nyuwo ni maswaaka kihenlaaka vayanoniwanyu khayoohiyani eyanowaanyu hata iyano sa anamwaniinyu naari iyano sa ikhapirasaya okhuma vaanaanova mpaka ommaleloni,” onghima Yave." 
Isaiah60:1 “Mvenye, mwaare, niwoko waarawanyu wohoorwa ni ovuwa wa Yave onoomwaleelani." 
Isaiah60:2 Moone, epiphi enkhuneela elapo ya vathi, ewiriphi eri vasulu wa miloko, mene mwa nyuwo onoomwaleelani Yave ni ovuwa wa Yave onooneya mwa nyuwo." 
Isaiah60:3 Miloko sinimoowa ngwaaraniwanyu ni mamwene ngwaarani wa oxeexelowaanyu. 
Isaiah60:4 Muttukhule maitho ni ngwehe mukhwipimwanyu: ootheene anthukumana, yoowehakani; anamwaniinyu asilopwana anrweela ottai ni anamwaniinyu asithiyana anrwa ekuxiweene veetthuuri." 
Isaiah60:5 Vano munimoona ni munoosareya waara; murimaanyu onookhalano ikuru ni onoosareya ohakalala; mihakhu sa ephareiya munooruuheliwa ni wa nyuwo mihakhu sa miloko sinimoorweelani. 
Isaiah60:6 Mukuttula wa ikamelu* onoosareya elapwaanyu, ikamelu* inyowani a oMidiyani ni wEfa. Ootheene a oXeba animoowa ekunxeene eyuuma yoorikaxa ni erubani* elaleiyaka ottottopeleya wa Yave." 
Isaiah60:7 Mihuwo sootheene sa oKedari sinoothukhumanyihiwa wa nyuwo; anapunci a oNebayoti animoorumeelani ni awosa animwaakhuleliwa ntoko sooveleela valtaariniwaka* ni kinoophwaneliha Empaaka yoovuwaxa. 
Isaiah60:8 Awosa taani amvava ntoko mahutte, ntoko ikhunda sivavelaka mpuurunimwaya?" 
Isaiah60:9 Vekhaikhai, icirumba sinkiweherera Miyo; oopacera ti makula matokotoko a oTaresesi yaaruuhaka anamwaniinyu okhuma ottaiwene, ekunxeene eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa wa nttittimiho na Yave Mulukwaanyu, Ootteela a oYixrayeli niwoko Owo ohiiwariha waara." 
Isaiah60:10 Anamarwa anoorasela ixirisanyu ni mamwenaaya animoorumeelani. Naari koomanakani kinyoonyiweene, ni murima wooreera kinoowooniherani ikharari." 
Isaiah60:11 Milakosanyu sinoopwaherera ohuleya mahuku ootheene ni seiyo khasirwaru siwaliwa – ohiyu naari othana – weera atthu yooruuheleni mihakhu sa miloko, mamwenaaya ereene oopacera oruuha." 
Isaiah60:12 Vano muloko hoye hoye omwene ohintthuna woorumeelani onooriheya; owo onoohononaxiwa. 
Isaiah60:13 Ovuwa wa oLibanu onimoorwa wa nyuwo – nyiri sa epinyeiru* vamoha ni abetu* ni goferi*, weera ephwanelihe Nipuronaka Nootteela*, ni Miyo kinoovuwiha nipuro na inaawosaka." 
Isaiah60:14 Anamwane asilopwana a anamahasulaanyu animoowa ekokhorelaka vanaawoniwanyu; ootheene anoothanyani anookokhorela inaawosanyu ni anoowiitthanani Esidade ya Yave; oSiyoni wa Ootteela wa oYixrayeli. 
Isaiah60:15 Naari muhiiwaka ni muthanyiwaka ahikhalaka ontthuna oviraviramo, kinimookhalihani ovuwa woohimala ni ohakalala wa ikhapira sootheene." 
Isaiah60:16 Munoowura mukaka wa miloko ni munimwaamwihiwa ni asithiyana a maneethi. Vano nyuwo munoosuwela weera Miyo, Yave, ti Mvuluxaanyu ni Namoopolaanyu, Namaweraxa a Yakobe." 
Isaiah60:17 Kinimooruuhelani eyuuma yoorikaxa vanipuroni na ebronze* ni eparatha* vanipuroni na eyuuma. Ehikhanle etthaabwa kinimooruuhelani ebronze* ni eyuuma vanipuroni na maluku. Kinoopaka murettele mwa guvernadooraanyu ni ekhaikhai namalamulaanyu. 
Isaiah60:18 Mulaponimwanyu khawiiwanyeyatho wuulummwa sa mapuhero naari sa mathala a ophwatiwa mmwiinanonimwanyu, mene munimwiitthana ixirisanyu Ovuluxa ni milakosanyu Ottottopela." 
Isaiah60:19 Nsuwa khanikhalatho waarawanyu wa othana naari mweeri moohiyuni, niwoko Yave onookhala waarawanyu woohimala ni Mulukwaanyu onookhala ovuwawanyu." 
Isaiah60:20 Nsuwananyu khanneela naari mweeraanyu khoolakaseya; Yave onookhala waarawanyu woohimala ni mahukwaanyu a othananaxa anoomala. 
Isaiah60:21 Vanonto mulokwaanyu wootheene onookhala woororomeleya ni onookuxa elapo wa mahuku ootheene. Awosa ti niphuwa kiphatteiyaaka, muteko wa matataaka ntoko eyoonihero ya ovuwawaka." 
Isaiah60:22 Emusi eri vakhaani enoothatuwa macira muloko ni ooyevaxa a nyuwo muloko wooweraxa. Miyo ti Yave, mweehuhuni yootthuneyaxa kinoopaka yeeyo woowaakuveya.”" 
Isaiah61:1 Munepa wa Yave ori mwa miyo, niwoko Yave ookittikitthela weera kaalaleere oohaawa mutthenga wooreera. Owo ookirumiha weera kaakosoope yaale arino murima woothananaxa, weera kaalaleere otaphuwa anamatthukiwa ni kaatapuxe mpiphini yaawo ari mukaliposo." 
Isaiah61:2 Ookirumiha weera kilaleiye eyaakha ya murima wooreera wa Yave ni nihuku na ikuhu sa Mulukwaahu, weera kaapepese ootheene anlalamika ni" 
Isaiah61:3 kaakosoope yaale aniinla oSiyoni kaavahaka ecireemba yooreera vanipuroni na ettuura, makhura a ohakalala vanipuroni na olalamika ni mukaandyo wa ottottopela vanipuroni na munepa wooriipiwa. Awosa animwiitthaniwa ikaravalyu* sa ororomeleya soophatteiwa ni Yave ntoko eyoonihero ya ovuwawawe." 
Isaiah61:4 Awosa anoorasela milepe sa khalayi ni anooreherera mapuro oophwatiwa mweehuhuni sivinre. Awosa anooreherera isidade sooheliwa nthala saahuhuliwe ni ikhapira ti ikhapira. 
Isaiah61:5 Anamarwa anookosoopa mihuwosanyu, aani anoovara muteko mmattamwanyu ni mwa iwuuva*." 
Isaiah61:6 Nyuwosa munimwiitthaniwa asaserdoti* a Yave, munoottehiwa anamarumeela a Mulukwaahu. Munimooca sa mihakhu sa miloko, mwiivuwiheraka seiyo yiivuwiheraayano." 
Isaiah61:7 Mulokwaaka onimwaakhela iphura sa ettima vanipuroni na oyevihiwa ni onoohakalalela yoohiyeriwaaya vanipuroni na wuulihiheya muru. Hiiho onimwaakhela iphura sa mweelaponimwaya ni ohakalala woohimala onookhala wawaya. 
Isaiah61:8 Vano Miyo, Yave, kinsivela ekhaikhai; kinthanya wiiya ni sootakhala sootheene. Moororomeleyanimwaka kinimwaavaha ntthuvelo ni kinoopaka wiiraana woohimala ni yaawo." 
Isaiah61:9 Ikhapirasaya sinoosuweliwa eriyari ya miloko ni anamwanaaya eriyari ya amalapo. Ootheene eniiwoone animwaakhulela weera awosa ti atthu ooreelihiwa ni Yave.
