Isaiah61:10 Kinimuhakalalelaxa Yave, munepaaka onimuhakalalela Mulukwaaka. Niwoko Owo ookiwariha ni soowara sa ovuluxiwa ni ookikuttelelano mukaandyo wa ekhaikhai, ntoko namatthomera omphwaneliha murwaawe alikanaka musaserdoti* ni ntoko ootthomeriwa oniiphwaneliha ni axiveeve." 
Isaiah61:11 Vano hiiho ntoko etthaya emmelihaaya maphuwa ni nttimbe nimmelihaaya inuku, hiihotho Yave onlamula sootheene onookhaliha ororomeleya ni ottottopela ohoolo wa miloko sootheene." 
Isaiah62:1 Woosivelaniwaka oSiyoni, nkimaala; niwoko na oYerusaleemu nkiitthuuwa mpaka ororomeleyawaya oneeraaya waare ntoko ekamama ya oxa ni ovuluxiwawaya ntoko ovarela wa muthuko." 
Isaiah62:2 Miloko sinimoona ororomeleyawanyu ni mamwene ootheene ovuwawanyu; munimwiitthaneliwa nsina nnyowani Yave aneeraawe ootteheeni. 
Isaiah62:3 Munookhala ecireemba yoovuwa mmatatani mwa Yave, ediyadema* ya emwene vantatani na Mulukwaanyu." 
Isaiah62:4 Awosa khayiitthaniwatho oothaamiwa naari elapwaanyu yoohiiwa. Mene munimwiitthaniwa Hefeziba ni elapwaanyu oBewula, niwoko Yave onimoohakalalelani ni elapwaanyu enootheleya." 
Isaiah62:5 Mooteene yoowo mmiravo onthelanaawe ni yoowo omutthomenraawe, hiihotho anamwaniinyu asilopwana anoothelana ni nyuwo; mooteene yoowo namatthomera onimuhakalalelaawe omutthomenraawe, hiihotho Mulukwaanyu onimoohakalalelani." 
Isaiah62:6 Ii! oYerusaleemu, kohaakhaliha anamalipelela vaxiriniwanyu; awosa khayiitthuuwaru ohiyu naari othana. Nyuwosa mummwiitthana Yave muhiitthuuwe," 
Isaiah62:7 ni muhimutthunihere Yoowo wiitthuuwa mpaka Owo aneeraawe amutekihe Yerusaleemu mutatuxaka yeeyo ottottopela wa elapo ya vathi. 
Isaiah62:8 Yave aalipela mwa ntatanawe noolopwana ni moonowaawe wooweraxa: Nkirwa kivaha etrigwaanyu ntoko yooca wa amwiittanaanyu ni anamarwa kheewuratho eviinyu enyowani mwa yeeyo yookhulumunleni. 
Isaiah62:9 Vaheera yaawo anghepha yeeyo, animooca emuttottopelaka Yave ni yaawo anthukumanyiha iwuuva*, anoowura eviinyuwaaya mmapuwani mwa Empaaka.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Mvire, mvire vamulako! Murehererele muloko ephiro. Muhule, muhule musewe mutokotoko! Mvenxe maluku. Mweemexere eneneero wa miloko." 
Isaiah62:11 Yave oolaleera ekotenle elapo: “Munleele mwaana muthiyana a Siyoni: ‘Moone, Mvuluxaanyu onimoowa! Moone, ntthuvelonawe nri ni Yoowo, aani arwaaka ni nlivonawe.’”" 
Isaiah62:12 Awosa animwiitthaniwa muloko wootteela; oowoopoliwa ni Yave, ni nyuwo munimwiitthaniwa ootthuneya, Esidade Yoohithaamiwa." 
Isaiah63:1 Taani ole onrweela wEdomi, oBozera, soowarasawe sittikittheliweene yooxeera? Taani ole owanre mukaandyo woovuwaxa, aanulaka malipa mukurunimwawe sitokotoko? “Ti Yoomi kinuuluma mweekhaikhaiyini, oowera ovuluxa.”" 
Isaiah63:2 Sixeerenleni soowarasanyu ntoko sa yoole omvotta iwuuva* mmattankhini moowaama iwuuva*? 
Isaiah63:3 Koovotta iwuuva* mmattankhini moowaama iwuuva* meekhaaka; variyari wa miloko khawoworu aari ni Miyo. Koovotta seiyo kinyoonyiweene, kiwattaka musaranimwaka; ephomaaya yoottonyera mukaandyowaaka ni kooninga ikuwosaka sootheene." 
Isaiah63:4 Vano nihuku na ikuhu naari mmurimwanimwaka ni eyaakha ya woopola yoophiya. 
Isaiah63:5 Kaawehaweha, mene khaakhanleru ookikhavihera; kaatikhina kahaamoonaaka ookikhavihera, tivawo moonowaaka waawenraaya ovuluxa ni isarasaka saakikhavihenraaya." 
Isaiah63:6 Koovotta miloko moonyoonyiwanimwaka ni musarinimwaka koohapaliha kinayeehera ephomaaya vatthayani. 
Isaiah63:7 Kinimuuluma sa murima wooreera wa Yave, sa mitekosawe sootikhinihaxa – sootheene onipakenlaawe, aani itthu sooreera sincipale opakenlaawe ekhapira ya Yixrayeli niwoko na ikhararisawe ni murimaawe wooreera mutokotoko." 
Isaiah63:8 Owo eenre: “Vekhaikhai awosa ti mulokwaaka, anamwane asilopwana eneera ehikivarihe”; ni hiiho oothatuwa Mvuluxaaya." 
Isaiah63:9 Moothanananimwaya moothemwene Owo aathananatho ni ndyelo a okhalawawe aahaavuluxa. Owo aawoopola moosivelanimwawe ni mukhararinimwawe. Ti Yoowo aavenxa, aweettihaka mmahukuni a khalayi." 
Isaiah63:10 Waarookhalaru hiiho awosa yaamurukunuwela, enathananiha Munepaawe Wootteela. Tivawo Owo aathatungwaawe Mwiittanaaya ni Owo muneenaawe aahaawanano." 
Isaiah63:11 Vano mulokwaawe waahuupuwelela mahuku a khalayi, mweehuhuni ya Moisesi ni ekhapiraawe: Ori woowi Yoole aavirihale mphareiya ni mukukhuli a muhuwaawe? Ori woowi Yoole aakhalinghe Munepaawe Wootteela variyariwaya" 
Isaiah63:12 ni ookonle moonowaawe woovuwaxa weera okhale moonowaawe mulopwana wa Moisesi, Yoole aakawanyinghe maahi ohoolowaya weera akwanihere epili yoohimala?" 
Isaiah63:13 Ori woowi Yoole aahoolenle aavirihaka moowiixera? Awosa khayaakwakwathungwe ntoko ekavalu* mweelaponi yoothanuwa. 
Isaiah63:14 Ntoko imombe sinrowa omuhawalawani, awosa aavahiwa wiitthuuwa ni Munepa wa Yave. Ti hiiho Nyuwo mweettinghaanyu mulokwaanyu weera mwiipakele Nsina noovuwaxa." 
Isaiah63:15 Ngwehe wiirimu woorakamela ni moone mukilaathiyeene vahiceniwanyu ya osulu, yootteela ni yoovuwa. Nri woowi nthitinanyu ni ikurusanyu? Murimaanyu wooreera ni ikhararisanyu nohiimaniwa." 
Isaiah63:16 Wa soothesene, Nyuwo ti Atithihu. Abrahaamu khanisuwenle ni Yixrayeli khanaanoonne; Nyuwo, Yave, ti Atithihu ni okhuma khalayi muniitthaniwa Mvuluxaahu." 
Isaiah63:17 Yave munneettiherelani ottai wa iphirosanyu ni munnuumiha murimaahu weera nihoottittimiheni? Muhokolowe mwaha wa arumeiyaanyu, ipuumba siri yoohiyeraanyu." 
Isaiah63:18 Mulokwaanyu waakuxa Nipuronanyu Nootteela* wa ehuhu vakhaani, mene vano amwiittanaahu aanyikalela Empaanyu Yootteela." 
Isaiah63:19 Okhuma khalayi hiyo nri awinyu, mene Nyuwo khamunaalamulele yaawo; awosa khaaniitthaneliwe Nsinananyu." 
Isaiah64:1 Ii! Waari weera Nyuwo mwaahula erimu munakhuruwa! Nyaako saano sitetereiyeene ohoolowanyu! 
Isaiah64:2 Ntoko mooro onghisaaya imparumparu ni omviluwihaaya maahi, mukhuruwe ni mwaasuwelihe amwiittanaanyu Nsinananyu weera miloko sithukumele ohoolowanyu." 
Isaiah64:3 Vano mwaapankaanyu itthu sootikhinihaxa hiyo nahaawehereraahu, mwaakhuruwa ni nyaako saatetereya ohoolowanyu." 
Isaiah64:4 Okhuma khalayi khawowo iiwale hata naaru niiwexenxe naari niitho naamoonne Muluku mukina muhikhanle Nyuwo munaavarela muteko yaale anoororomelani. 
Isaiah64:5 Nyuwo munaakhavihera yaale ampaka yooreera ni murima woohakalala, yaale anuupuwelela iphirosanyu. Vaheera hiyo naapwahereraahu mwa sootthekasahu, mwaaninyoonyeriwa. Vano nnivuluxiwe hai?" 
Isaiah64:6 Hiyo ootheene naathatuwa ntoko oohitteela ni mitekosahu soororomeleya sootheene siri ntoko mattapwatta oonanara; ootheene hiyo ninnyaala ntoko makukhu, ni ntoko epheyo sootthekasahu sinnivavihera ottai." 
Isaiah64:7 Khawoworu oniitthana Nsinananyu hata onghaawela woovarexexani Nyuwo. Vano moonihuluwa munihiyaka mooriheyani niwoko na sootthekasahu. 
Isaiah64:8 Wa soothesene, Nyuwo, Yave, ti Atithihu; Hiyo nri oloko, Nyuwo Namoopa; hiyo ootheene nri muteko wa matataanyu." 
Isaiah64:9 Ii! Yave, muhininyoonyeraxiwe; muhuupuwelelaxe sootthekasahu wa mahuku ootheene. Ii! Nimvekela weera muniwehe, niwoko hiyo ootheene nri mulokwaanyu." 
Isaiah64:10 Isidadesanyu sootteela soothatuwa nikare; mpaka oSiyoni ti nikare, oYerusaleemu esidade yoothaamiwa." 
Isaiah64:11 Empaanyu Yootteela ni yoovuwaxa, yoovuwihaayanimo makholowaahu yoophwatiwa ni mooro ni sootheene saari sootthuneyaxasahu sooheleya nthala." 
Isaiah64:12 Vahoolo wa sootheene iye, Yave nlelo khamurwa mpaka etthu? Munoopwaherera emaalelo, munittaruxaka opwaha ikhomo?" 
Isaiah65:1 “Kohiixoonihera wa yaale yahaakikoha; koophwanyiwa ni yaale yahaakaasa. Kaaheerela muloko wahiitthana Nsinanaka: ‘Kiri va, kiri va.’" 
Isaiah65:2 Mahuku ootheene kootheteela matata muloko woottiyamaaru, mwa yoowo oneetta mphironi yoonanara ni onaasa soowuupuwelasaya paahi." 
Isaiah65:3 Ti muloko onkitannya woohihiyerera woohiipithiheya opakaka sooveleela munttimbeni ni ohisaka erubani* valtaarini* a indyerwa. 
Isaiah65:4 Ti muloko onkilaathi variyari wa mahiye ovirihaka ohiyuwaaya mmakhukuni; onkhuura ekuluwe ni mukarikhonimwaya nookhalamo nrupantakanse na inama soohitteela. 
Isaiah65:5 Muloko owo oneera: ‘Mukhaleke ottai, muhikaattamele, niwoko miyo kootepa ootteela wa nyuwo!’ Atthu ntoko awo ari mwiixi onunkha mphulanimwaka, mooro omvarela nihuku nootheene." 
Isaiah65:6 Moone, ti yoolempwa vamaithoniwaka: nkirwa kimaala, mene kinimoohokoloxerani ikuhu sookwanela ni soomalela niwoko na" 
Isaiah65:7 sootthekasanyu nitho soottheka sa makholowaanyu,” onghima Yave. “Yeenre awosa epakela sooveleela mmanyaakoni ni ekiveihera mmattumuxani, Miyo kinimwaanyesereriha nlivo mwa soopakasaya sa khalayi.”" 
Isaiah65:8 Yave oneera ha: “Wooneyaka weera ekhuce ya iwuuva* yookhalano maahi oocoocowa, kheemvuruliwa niwoko yookhalano yoowura yooreera, hiihotho kinoopaka mwaha wa arumeiyaaka, nkirwa kaaphwata ootheene." 
Isaiah65:9 Kinimwaaruuha akina a ekhapira ya Yakobe ni ya Yuda weera ekuxe nyaakosaka; mulokwaaka woothanliwa onimwaakhela ntoko yoohiyeriwa ni arumeiyaaka anookhalawo. 
Isaiah65:10 Wa mulokwaaka onkaasa Miyo, oXaroni onoothatuwa woociha ikhondoolo ni nreyareya na Akori nipuro noowiitthuuwa imombe." 
Isaiah65:11 Vaheera wa nyuwo munimuhiya Yave ni munttiwala mwaakowaaka wootteela, nyuwo munimurehererela meesa muluku a eparakha ni munsariha ikoomixi sa iviinyu sootakanseriwa wa muluku a oreeriwa," 
Isaiah65:12 Miyo kinimoophwatasani ni ekatana ni ootheene nyuwo munimuurama weera muhitiwe. Niwoko koowiitthanani, mene khamukaakhunleru; kohuuluma, mene khamukiiwale. Moopaka soonanara vamaithoniwaka ni moothanla yeeyo ehinkisiveliha.”" 
Isaiah65:13 Tivawo, Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: “Arumeiyaaka animooca, mene nyuwosa munoovoliwa etala; arumeiyaaka anoowura, mene nyuwosa munoovoliwa ntthona; arumeiyaaka anoohakalala, mene nyuwosa munimuulihiheya muru." 
Isaiah65:14 Arumeiyaaka animwiipa ni murima woohakalalaxa, mene nyuwosa munookhuwela ni murima woothananaxa mwiinlaka ni munepa wooriipiwa." 
Isaiah65:15 Munimwaahiyera oothanliwaaka nsinananyu ntoko nlapho; Yave onlamula sootheene onoowiivasani, mene onimwaavaha arumeiyaawe nsina nikina." 
Isaiah65:16 Yoole ontthuna nreeliho wa elapo ela, amvekeleke Muluku a ekhaikhai; yoole onlipela mweelaponi, apakeke yeeyo mwa Muluku a ekhaikhai. Vano sookacamiha sivinre sinoottiwaliwa ni sinoovitheya vamaithoniwaka.”" 
Isaiah65:17 “Moone, kinoopattuxa irimu ni ilapo sinyowani. Itthu sa khalayi khasuupuweleliwa hata khasikhalatho mmuupuweloni." 
Isaiah65:18 Wa soothesene, muhakalalelaxe mwa yeeyo kineeraaka kipattuxe, niwoko kinoopattuxa oYerusaleemu ntoko nipuro na ohakalalaxa ni amakaaya animwaahakalaliha akina." 
Isaiah65:19 Kinoohakalalela oYerusaleemu ni amakaaya anookisiveliha. Okhuwela wa wiinla ni olalamika khawiiwiwamotho. 
Isaiah65:20 Mwemmo khakhalamo mwaana anaakhale mahuku vakhaani a okumaawe naari namuuluvala anaahikwanihere iyaakha sa okumaawe; anaakhwe muyaakhani ncira anooneliweke ntoko mmiravo; ni yoowo anaahikwanihe iyaakha ncira anaalikeleliwe ntoko oolaphiwa. 
Isaiah65:21 Awosa anooteka impa, ekhalekemo; anoophatteya imatta sa iwuuva* ni animooca soowiimasaya." 
Isaiah65:22 Awosa kheerwatho eteka impa weera yaakamele akina hata kheephatteya weera ece akina. Vano mahuku a mulokwaaka anoolikana ntoko nyiri; oothanliwaaka anoohakalalela yoowiima ya miteko sa matataaya. 
Isaiah65:23 Awosa kheevara muteko wa siiyo, hata khayaayara anamwane weera ethananiheye. Vano awosa anookhala muloko wooreelihiwa ni Yave, awosa vamoha ni ikhapirasaya." 
Isaiah65:24 Awosa ehinaaye wiitthana, Miyo kinoowaakhula; awosa nlelo yuulumaka, kinoowiiwelela." 
Isaiah65:25 Mwiici ni eputtiputthi enimooca vamoha, ni mwatto onimooca malaxi ntoko emombe elopwana, vaheera ntthupi nnikhale yooca ya enowa. Iyo khasinanariha hata ophwata vamwaakowaaka wootteela wootheene,” onghima Yave." 
Isaiah66:1 Yave oneera ha: “Erimu ti ehicaaka ya emwene ni elapo ya vathi ti ntthatto na inaawosaka. Moota heeni wa empa muneeraanyu mukitekele? Nipuro na wiitthuuwawaka nri woowi? 
Isaiah66:2 Vekhaikhai, Ntatanaka noopaka itthu sootheene iya ni hiiho sookhala,” onghima Yave. Mutthu Miyo kinimuttittimihaaka ti ola: yoole ori oowiiyeviha ni a munepa woosareya omoova Muluku ni onthukumela woowiiwa maswaaka." 
Isaiah66:3 Vaheera yoole omveleela emombe ori ntoko mutthu yoowo ommwiiva mutthu ni yoole oniiva eputtiputthi ori ntoko mulopwana ompiritula exiko ya mwaaxaana a mwalapwa. Yoole ompaka yooveleela ya etrigu ori ntoko mulopwana onoonihera ephome ya ekhumba ni yoole onghisa erubani* yoowuupuwelela ori ntoko mulopwana onlapa muluku mukina woolokottha. Awosa aathanla iphirosaya ni minepasaya singhakalalela mitekosaya sa mwiikho. 
Isaiah66:4 Tivawo kineeraka kaahasuletho, kaaruuhelaka yeeyo anoovaxaaya. Niwoko Miyo kaawiitthana, mene khaawo aakhunle; Miyo kaahuuluma, mene khaawo iiwale. Awosa aapaka soonanara vamaithoniwaka ni aathanla yeeyo ehinkisiveliha Miyo.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Mwiiwe masu a Yave, nyuwosa munthukumela woowiiwa maswaawe: “Axunninyu anoothanyani ni anookhoottani niwoko na Nsinanaka yaaheera: ‘Yave avuwihiweke weera noone ohakalalawanyu!’ Wa soothesene, awosa eneera yuulihiheye muru." 
Isaiah66:6 Mwiiwe onyakulihana musidadeni; mwiiwe oruma onrweela Mpaani mwa Yave. Ti oruma wa Yave aalivaka amwiittana sootheene seiyo amphwanelaaya. 
Isaiah66:7 Owo ahinaaye okurukuttuwa weera ayare, onooyara; ohinaaye omutepela ovoreya, onoomukhalano mwaana mulopwana." 
Isaiah66:8 Taani otonke wiiwa ntoko hiiha? Taani oonne hiiha? Khoongwereya muloko oyariwa nihuku nimoha paahi. Hata hiiho, ehuhu emoharu oSiyoni ompaceraaya okurukuttuwa, onimwaayara anamwanaaya.”" 
Isaiah66:9 Yave oneera: “Miyo nkinruuha ehuhu ya oyara kihipakihaka weera oyariwe.” Muluku oneera: “Miyo nkinooceeliha oyariwa wa muloko owo. 
Isaiah66:10 Muhakalale vamoha ni oYerusaleemu ni muhakalale niwoko na yoowo, ootheene nyuwosa munimusivela yoowo; muhakalalaxe vamoha ni oYerusaleemu ootheene nyuwosa mwaamulalamikela yoowo." 
Isaiah66:11 Vano nyuwo munimwaamwa mpaka ovona mmapeleni mookurunuxeya. Munimwaamwa nnenesene ni munoohakalalela waattawaya.” 
Isaiah66:12 Vano Yave oneera ha: “Kinoomvaha yoowo murettele ntoko mooloko ni mihakhu sa miloko ntoko wuupa wa okumburula. Munimwaamwa mwaakandiweene ni otutheliwa vaciroroniwaya. 
Isaiah66:13 Hiiho ntoko maayi onimpepesaawe mwaniye, hiihotho kinimoopepesani ni munoopepesiwa mwaha wa oYerusaleemu.”" 
Isaiah66:14 Nyuwosa moonakaru yeeyo, murimaanyu onoohakalala ni munoottuva ntoko malaxi; Yave onimwaasuweliha moonowaawe arumeiyaawe, vaheera isarasawe animooniheriwa amwiittanaawe." 
Isaiah66:15 Moone, Yave ongwa ni mooro ni ikaarosawe sa ikavalu* siri ntoko eyuupuru. Onooruuhela vathi onyoonyiwawawe ni isara ni ohiihawawe ni malumi a mooro." 
Isaiah66:16 Vano Yave onookwanihera waathoriha atthu ootheene ni mooro ni ekatanaawe; ancipale animwiiviwa ni ntatanawe. 
Isaiah66:17 Yaale aniitteeliha weera evolowe munttimbeni, emuttharaka musaserdoti* ori eriyaraaya, ankhuura ekuluwe, makhule ni itthu sikina sa mwiikho – awosa ootheene anooriheya,” onghima Yave." 
Isaiah66:18 “Niwoko na mitekosaya ni soovaanyasaya kinimoorwa othukumanyiha miloko ni ipuumba sootheene sa elapo ya vathi ni seiyo sinimoowa, sooneke ovuwawaka." 
Isaiah66:19 Miyo kinookhaliha eneneero variyariwaya ni kinimwaarumihela akina akina ahalahanle wa miloko – wa oTaresisi, wa aLibiya, wa aLidiya (oosuwanyeyaxa ntoko alipa oolatha nyuupa), wa oTubali, wa oGresiya, ni wa icirumba sa ottaiwene, mwa seiyo sihiiwale sa epilaaka hata sihoonne ovuwawaka. Awosa anoolaleiya ovuwawaka variyari wa miloko." 
Isaiah66:20 Ni awosa animwaaruuhatho axunninyu ootheene okhuma miloko sootheene mpaka wa mwaakowaaka wootteela, oYerusaleemu, ntoko yooveleela wa Yave. Awosa animoowa ni ikavalu*, ikaaro sa ikavalu* ni ikaaro sikina, ni abuuru ni ikamelu*,” onghima Yave. “Awosa anooruuhiwa ntoko aYixrayeli anruuhaaya sooveleelasaya sa etrigu wa Empa ya Yave ni ikaruma sootteeliheriwa." 
Isaiah66:21 Ni Miyo kinimwaathanla akina a yaawo weera ekhale asaserdoti* ni aLeevi,” onghima Yave." 
Isaiah66:22 “Mooteene yoowo erimu ni elapo enyowani kineeraaka kipattuxe empwahereraaya wa mahuku ootheene,” onghima Yave, “hiihotho nsinananyu ni ekhapiraanyu enoopwaherera." 
Isaiah66:23 Khula mweeri munyowani ni khula eSaabadu omutthu wootheene onimoowa weera okokhorele ohoolowaka,” onghima Yave." 
Isaiah66:24 “Vano awosa anookhuma, animoona mittembo sa yaale yaakivaannye; nyuungusaya khasirwa sikhwa hata moorowaaya khoocipha ni seiyo sinookhala sa mwiikho wa omutthu wootheene.”" 
Jeremiah1:1 Masu a Yeremiya, mwaana mulopwana a Hilikiya, musaserdoti* mmoha a wAnatoti, elapo ya oBenyamini." 
Jeremiah1:2 Yave aahuuluma ni Yeremiya vayaakhani yanaamuloko niitthaaru ya olamula wa Yosiya, mwaana mulopwana a Amoni, mwene a oYuda." 
Jeremiah1:3 Aapwaherera wuuluma ni yoowo mpaka ehuhu ya olamula wa Yehoyakimi, mwaana mulopwana a Yosiya, mpakatho mweeri wanaathanu wa eyaakha yanaamuloko niimoha ya olamula wa Zedekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yosiya, mwene a oYuda, ehuhuweene yeele amaki a oYerusaleemu yaaronghiwaaya wootthukiwani elapo ekina." 
Jeremiah1:4 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo akeerelaka: 
Jeremiah1:5 “Miyo kihinaaye woopakani mmirimani mwa amayinyu, kaahoosuwelani. Nyuwo muhinaaye oyariwa, Miyo kaahoothanlani ni kaahookhalihani ntoko mprofeeti wa miloko.”" 
Jeremiah1:6 Kaamwaakhula: “Ii! Yave onlamula sootheene, nkingwera wuuluma nnenesene; kiri mmiravo paahi.”" 
Jeremiah1:7 Mene Yave aakeerela: “Muheere: ‘Kiri mmiravo paahi,’ mene murowe wa ootheene miyo kineeraaka koorumiheleni ni mwahime sootheene kineeraaka koolamuleleni." 
Jeremiah1:8 Muhiwoove yaawo, niwoko Miyo kiri ni nyuwo ni kinimookosoopani,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah1:9 Vano Yave aahookola moono, anatava eyaanowaaka, anakeerela; “Vano koohela maswaaka mmwanomwanyu." 
Jeremiah1:10 Moone, olelo kohoovahani ikuru wa miloko ni omwene weera mwaakhe, mphwate, muhele nthala ni mukankhanyule, nitho weera muteke ni mphatteye.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo akeerelaka: “Munoonani, Yeremiya?” Kaamwaakhula: “Kinoona ephandi ya mwiri wa emandoweira*.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Yave aakeerela: “Mohoona nnene, niwoko kingwehaweha weera maswaaka ekwanihereye.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Yave aahuulumatho ni miyo akeerelaka: “Munoonani?” Kaamwaakhula: “Kinoona mwaapu okaphulaka, owo woothetemana oreraka ettuli ottuttuwani.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Yave aakeerela: “Ottuttuwani anooyeeheriwa erisa amaki ootheene a elapo ela. 
Jeremiah1:15 Miyo kinlattula miloko sootheene sa imwene sa ottuttuwani,” onghima Yave. “Mamwene animoowa, yiikaathiki ihicesaya sa emwene vamilako sa oYerusaleemu. Anoowanano ixirisaya sootheene sirince ni mittetthe sootheene sa oYuda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Kinoothoriha mulokwaaka niwoko na sootakhalasaya sootheene wookihiya Miyo, ohiseraka erubani* miluku sikina ni olapaka seiyo apankaaya matataaya." 
Jeremiah1:17 Nyuwo mwiireherere! Murowe mwaaleele sootheene kineeraaka koolamuleleni. Muhiwoove weera kihiwoopopiheni ohoolowaya. 
Jeremiah1:18 Olelo miyo kinoopakani nyuwo esidade yoolipihiwa, nrimbu na eyuuma ni exiri ya ebronze* wa elapo yootheene: wa mamwene a oYuda, asitokweenaaya, asaserdotaaya ni muloko wa mulaponi." 
Jeremiah1:19 Awosa animoowananani, mene khayoowinani, niwoko Miyo kiri ni nyuwo ni kinoowoopolani,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah2:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo akeerelaka: 
Jeremiah2:2 “Murowe mwalaleere maaru a oYerusaleemu: Miyo kinuupuwelela ororomeleyawanyu mwaaraanyu mmiravo: ‘Ntoko ootthomeriwa nyuwo mwannakisivela, mukittharaka munikareni, mulaponi yoohaaleya." 
Jeremiah2:3 Mulokwaaka aYixrayeli, waari wootteeliheriwa Yave, soowiima soopacera sa ohephawawe; ootheene yaanyaanya muloko owo yooneliwa okhala ananthowa, ni erisa yaahaaphwanya,’ ” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah2:4 Ii! Muloko wa Yakobe, mwiiwe masu a Yave, mahimo ootheene a muloko wa aYixrayeli." 
Jeremiah2:5 Yave oneera ha: “Yoohiyanyiha heeni makholowaanyu yaaphwannyaaya wa Miyo weera ekihiye, ekirakamelaka Miyo? Awosa yaatthara miluku soohimuteko, yiitatuxaka asineenaaya oohimuteko." 
Jeremiah2:6 Awosa khayaakonghe: Ori woowi Yave, onikhumihale wExipitu ananeettiha munikareni, mulaponi moowuumelela ni moothipeyasa, elapo yoothowa maahi ni ya epiphi, mwa yeeyo ehimviriwaru ni ehinkhaliwaru?" 
Jeremiah2:7 Miyo kohooruuhasani mulaponi mooruwereya, weera muce soowiimasaya ni sooreerelasaya. Vaheera nyuwosa moovaliha elapwaaka; mootatuxa yoohiyeraaka okhala yoohiira." 
Jeremiah2:8 Asaserdoti* khayaamukoherera Yave; anamataphulela a nlamulo khayaakisuwela, ni ahooleli a muloko yaakivaanya. Maprofeti yaathalihera otthuna wa Muluku mwa nsina na Bahali*, ettharaka miluku soohimuteko." 
Jeremiah2:9 Tivawo Miyo kinooniheraaka yeeyo ehinkisiveliha wa nyuwo,” onghima Yave, “nitho wa ikhapirasanyu." 
Jeremiah2:10 Mulapuwe ephareiya mpaka okhopela oKitimi ni moone; mwaarumihele oKedari anamawehaweha ni mwaawehexexe mukhuveenleene; moone yaatonkweene okhumelela etthu ntoko ela: 
Jeremiah2:11 Wookhala muloko oceendyiye milukusaya? Ni iyo hata vakhaani khasihiyono miluku! Vaheera mulokwaaka wohaakakhanyiha ovuwawa wa Mulukwaaya ni miluku soohimuteko. 
Jeremiah2:12 Ii! Irimu, mututhuwe ohoolowaya! Moopopiheye ni muthukumele,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah2:13 Mulokwaaka woopaka itthu sootakhala piili: owo wookihiya Miyo kiri naattuuttu a maahi a okumi, ni woothipa ihimesaya, aani ihime soowaaleleya sihingwera okhalano maahi." 
Jeremiah2:14 Weeraka mulokwaaka aYixrayeli ti epottha okhuma oyariwawaya? Othatuwenleni yoohuhuliwa? 
Jeremiah2:15 Amwatto anootturumela ekongelaka ohoolowaya; elapwaaya yaahiiwa ttewu; isidadesaya sooheleya nthala, soothaamiwa woomalela." 
Jeremiah2:16 Mpaka atthu a oMemfesi ni oTafanyesi aamettha mmurumwanyu. 
Jeremiah2:17 Nyuwo muneenaanyu ti nanthowa mwa yeeyo yookhumelenleni, woomuhiya Yave, Mulukwaanyu, Owo oweettihaleni mphironimwawe." 
Jeremiah2:18 Vano, murowenleni wExipitu ongwura Nilu? Ni munrowelani wa Asiriya ongwura Efratesi?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Yootakhalaanyu enimoottaruxani ni ovaanyawanyu onimoohiihani. Mwiiwexexe ni moone moota onnanaraaya ni ongwaawihaaya omuhiya Yave, Mulukwaanyu, muhikoovaka Miyo,” onghima Yave, a ikuru sootheene." 
Jeremiah2:20 Khalayi Miyo kaaphwata yoolemelaanyu, kinapasa onyooro wootthukani. Vaheera nyuwosa mweenre: Miyo nkoorumeelani! Ohiyanawaya, mwaako wootheene woorakamela ni vathi wa nyiri sootheene soopomba, nyuwo mwiixaatalela ntoko puuta." 
Jeremiah2:21 Miyo koophatteiyeni ntoko ewuuva yooreerela, yoothanleya. Mene moone yookhumelenleni! Mohiitatuxa ewuuva yoovaliheya ya ntuphini." 
Jeremiah2:22 Naari nyuwo mwiirapihaka ni muthiikila ni sabawu mwincipale, malepa a yootakhalaanyu anoopwaherera ohoolowaka,” onghima Yave onlamula soothesene." 
Jeremiah2:23 Mungwera hai weera khamwiivalinghe ni weera khamwaalampe aBahali*? Muupuwelele mweettelowaanyu mureyareyani ni moonelemo yeeyo mpankaanyu. Nyuwo muri ntoko ekamelu* eniileva, etthimakelaka mapuro ootheene;" 
Jeremiah2:24 ntoko buuru a mutuphini okhovelenle munikareni onimulamula moohaawelanimwawe. Taani anaawere omuhiiha areene ookwaneleene okumana ni ilopwana? ’Abuuru anapunci ammwaasa khoontthuneya wiikhulumula, niwoko anoomphwanya areene ookwaneleene omukumanano.”" 
Jeremiah2:25 Muhitthimake mpaka inaawosanyu ottukuttuwa, hata ohiwuumeni wammilo! Mene nyuwo muneera: ‘Khoongwereya! Kookhovelela miluku sikina, ni kintthuna otthara seiyo.’" 
Jeremiah2:26 Hiiho ntoko namwiiya onuulihiheyaawe muru aaphwanyeriwaka iiyaka, muloko wa aYixrayelitho onimuulihiheya muru: mamwenaaya ni asitokweenaaya, asaserdotaaya ni maprofeetaaya." 
Jeremiah2:27 Vano, aneerela mwiri: ‘Nyuwo tiithaaka,’ ni wa nluku:‘Ti nyuwo mukiyanre.’ Aakirera ettuli ni khaakiwenghe, vaheera mmakacamihoni aneera: ‘Murwe munivuluxe!’" 
Jeremiah2:28 Siri woowi miluku mwiipakenlaanyu? Iyo sirwe sawera soovuluxeni mmakacamihoni! Vano milukusanyu khasireere ntokotho isidadesanyu, oYuda!" 
Jeremiah2:29 Munkootherelani? Ootheene nyuwo mookivaanya,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah2:30 “Khoovareleiye muteko ottaruxa mulokwaanyu, awosa khayaakhulenle olakiwa. Ekatanaaya yohaaphwata maprofeetaanyu ntoko mwatto oonyaanyaxa." 
Jeremiah2:31 Nyuwosa a ekhapira ela, muupuwele masu a Yave: Kaatoko okhala nikare wa aYixrayeli? Apaale kaari elapo yoosareya epiphi? Heeni mulokwaaka onkeerelaaya: ‘Hiyo nnimwiiwehaweha! Kaninrwatho wa Nyuwo’?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Weeraka mwaamwali onimwaattiwala axiveevaawe hoye hoye, ootthomeriwa soowarelasawe? Wa soothesene, mulokwaaka wookittiwala mahuku ootheene." 
Jeremiah2:33 Moota wa mapakelo mancipale munaasaaseraanyu osivela! Mpaka asithiyana a mapakelo oonanaraxa anooxuttera ni mweettelowaanyu. 
Jeremiah2:34 Soowarasanyu soophwanyaniwa ephome ya atthu oohaawa oohinthowa, ahiphwanyeriwe enanarihaka impa. Wa soothesene, orookhalaru hiiho," 
Jeremiah2:35 nyuwo muneera: ‘Nkinthowa; Owo khakinyoonyeringwe.’ Mene Miyo kinimoolakelelani yoothorihaaka, niwoko nyuwo muneera weera khamutthenke." 
Jeremiah2:36 Munghapuwelaxani muceendyaka imaara sincipale ephirowaanyu? Nyuwo munoopwaneya wExipitu, ntoko mwaapwaneyaanyu wAsiriya." 
Jeremiah2:37 Myuwo munoohiyatho nipuro nno mwiivarenleene vamuru, niwoko Yave ohaakhootta yaale munaaroromelaanyu; nyuwo khamukhaviheriwatho ni yaawosa.”" 
Jeremiah3:1 “Mulopwana aahiya amwaariye, ni emwalanneene enatheliwa ni mulopwana mukina, mulopwana oopacera onoomuhokoleela? Elapo kheevaliheya woomalela? Vaheera nyuwo mooraruwano ancipale ni vano, muntthuna ohokoleela wa Miyo?” onkoha ti Yave." 
Jeremiah3:2 “Ngwehe mattumuxa ni moone: nookhala nipuro muhimveruliwaanyuwo? Nyuwo mookilaathi muxerexere ephiro mwaawehereraka munraruwanaanyu, mookilaathi ntoko namathaamathaama munikareni. Nyuwo moovaliha elapo ni opuutaanyu ni otakhalawanyu." 
Jeremiah3:3 Tivawo ewaleiyaaya epula ni ehintthulaayaru. Vaheera nyuwo mwiixooniheraka vanlakani ntoko puuta, munkhootta wuulihiheya muru." 
Jeremiah3:4 Nyuwo khamukiitthanne vanaano va: ‘Tiithaaka, Nthamwene a emiravowaaka," 
Jeremiah3:5 munoonyoonyiwa mahuku ootheene? Ohimorelawanyu ikharari onoopwaherera mpaka ommaleloni?’ Ti hiiho nyuwo munuulumaanyu, mene mumpaka soonanara sootheene mungwerelaanyu.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 Moolamulani wa mwene Yosiya, Yave aakeerela: “Nyuwo mohoona yoohiroromeleya apankaaya aYixrayeli? Aawela mwaako wootheene woorakamela, enarowa vathi wa nyiri sootheene soopombaxa weera eraruwe." 
Jeremiah3:7 Epankeene sootheene iyo, kuupuwela weera anoohokoleela wa Miyo, mene khaahokoleenle. Ni axunnaya oovariha aYuda, ahoona itthusene seiyo." 
Jeremiah3:8 aYuda ahoonatho weera kohaavaha nlaxi na omwalana wa aYixrayeli oohiroromeleya niwoko na oraruwawaya wootheene. Hata hiiho kohoona weera axunnaya, aYuda, anamavariha, aararuwatho ehoovaka." 
Jeremiah3:9 Yeenre wahiwoopihaka oraruwa, aYuda yaavaliha elapo, eraruwakano miluku sa maluku ni sa itthaabwa." 
Jeremiah3:10 Orookhalaru hiiho, axunnaya aYuda anamavariha, khaahokoleenle wa Miyo ni murima wootheene, mene ni woothereriha,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah3:11 Yave aakeerela: “aYixrayeli oohiroromeleya, fataari ovirikana ni aYuda, anamavariha." 
Jeremiah3:12 Murowe ni mwalaleiye masu ala mpatta wa ottuttuwani: ‘Ii! aYixrayeli oohiroromeleya, muhokolowe,’ onghima Yave, ‘kinimoomorelani ikharari ni nkinoonyoonyeriwani, aani nkinoonyoonyeriwani mahuku ootheene,’ onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah3:13 Mulape nthowananyu paahi. Moomvaanya Yave Mulukwaanyu, mohiixinnyerera wa miluku sikina vathi wa nyiri sootheene soopombaxa ni khamukiiwelenle Miyo,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah3:14 “Muhokolowe, muloko woohiroromeleya,” onghima Yave, “niwoko Miyo ti Aiyinyu. Kinimookuxani – mmoha a khula muttetthe ni eeli a khula nihimo – ni kinimoohokoloxerani oSiyoni." 
Jeremiah3:15 Vano kinimoovahani ahooleli ansivela otthunawaka, mwa yaawo eneera yoohooleleni mmirukuni ni ngwiiwexexani." 
Jeremiah3:16 Mmahukuni awo, waattawanyu waandyeerereyaka vancipale mweelaponi,” onghima Yave. “Asilopwana kheerwatho yeera: ‘Arka* a wiiraana a Yave.’” Kheekhala mmuupuwelonimwaya hata kheewuupuwelelatho; atthu kheewaasaasa Arka* awo hata kheerwa epakiwa akina." 
Jeremiah3:17 Ehuhuweene yeeyo animwiitthana oYerusaleemu ‘Ehice ya Emwene ya Yave’ ni miloko sootheene sinoothukumana oYerusaleemu weera sittittimihe Nsina na Yave. Seiyo khasirwatho sitthara ettiyamaarwaaya. 
Jeremiah3:18 Mmahukuni awo ikhapira sa Yakobe sinoothukumanano seiyo sa aYixrayeli ni vamoha sinoohokolowa elapo ya ottuttuwani, sirowaka wa elapo kaavanghaaka makholowaanyu ntoko yoohiyeriwa." 
Jeremiah3:19 Miyo muneenaaka keenre: “Kaatthunaxa waapaka nnene ntoko ampakeliwaaya anamwane kaavahaka elapo yootthuneyaxa, yoohiyeriwa yooreerelaxa variyari wa miloko sootheene. Kuupuwela weera mwaankiitthana ‘Tiithi’ ni khamwaahiya okitthara." 
Jeremiah3:20 Vaheera ntoko muthiyana onimvariha iyawe, ipuumba sa oYuda,” onghima Yave, “hiiho nyuwo khamuroromeleiye wa Miyo.”" 
Jeremiah3:21 Okhuwela oniiwanyeya vanttumuxani, wiinla ni odyoonttelela wa muloko wa oYixrayeli, niwoko waathanla iphiro sookhoromana omuttiwalaka Yave Mulukwaaya." 
Jeremiah3:22 “Muhokolowe, muloko woohiroromeleya; kinoolamiha murimaanyu woovaanya.” Muloko waahaakhula: “Aani, nnimoowa wa Nyuwo, niwoko Nyuwo ti Yave Mulukwaahu.”" 
Jeremiah3:23 Vekhaikhai, naalapaahu miluku sikina vanttumaxani ti wiilokottha; vekhaikhai ovuluxiwa wa oYixrayeli ori mwa Yave Mulukwaahu." 
Jeremiah3:24 Okhuma emiravowaahu miluku soowuuliha muru soomaliha soowiima sa miteko sa makholowaahu – mihuwosaya sa ikhondoolo ni imombe nitho anamwanaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana. 
Jeremiah3:25 Niixaatalele oowuulihiheyeene muru ni omora ekhove onikhuneele. Noomutthekela Yave Mulukwaahu – hiyo nitho makholowaahu; okhuma enamwanaahu mpaka olelo khanimwiiwelenle Yave Mulukwaahu.” 
Jeremiah4:1 “Mwahokolowa, vano muhokoleele wa Miyo,” onghima Yave. “Mwasuseeriha ottaiwaka milukusanyu sa mwiikho, muhihapuwakatho," 
Jeremiah4:2 ni nyuwosa mwalipela mwa Nsina na Yave moota woororomeleya, wa ekhaikhai ni wookwanela, vano miloko sinooreelihiwa ni Yoowo ni sinoomvuwiha.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Yave ongweerela ha asilopwana a oYuda ni oYerusaleemu: “Mulime imattasanyu soohittipuriwa ni muhaale variyari wa nyiiwa. 
Jeremiah4:4 Mwiixiinele wa Yave, mwiinele mirimasanyu, nyuwosa asilopwana a oYuda ni amaki a oYerusaleemu. Mwaahipaka yeeyo, isarasaka sinoopatta sihiseke ntoko mooro, niwoko na yoonanara mpankaanyu, aani, sinoohisa ni khaawo anaawere ocipiha.”" 
Jeremiah4:5 “Vano mulaleiye ha oYuda ni oYerusaleemu: ‘Mwiipele nipalapatta mweelaponi yootheene!’ Mwiinle ni nsu ntokotoko, mweeraka: ‘Muthukumane, nitthawele isidade soolipihiwa!’" 
Jeremiah4:6 Mweemexe eneneero enthoonyera oSiyoni. Mutthawe woowaakuveya mwaasaasaka wootthawelamo! Miyo kinooruuha erisa okhuma mpatta wa ottuttuwani, ophwata woowoopihaxa.”" 
Jeremiah4:7 Mwatto ookhuma munyattanimwawe; namaphwata a miloko oovenya. Owo ookhuma munyattanimwawe weera aphwate elapwaanyu. Mittetthesanyu sinoohala ittuxoru soothaamiwa. 
Jeremiah4:8 Vano, ngware isaakho soolalamikano, mwiinle ni mulalamike, niwoko isara soowoopiha sa Yave khasinihulungwe." 
Jeremiah4:9 “Vanihukuni nenenenno,” onghima Yave, “mwene ni asitokweenaawe anooporora, asaserdoti* anoosareya woova ni maprofeeti anootuthuwa.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Vano keenre: “Ii! Yave onlamula sootheene, moolokottha muloko owo ni oYerusaleemu moota woomalela, mweeraka: ‘Munookhalano murettele, ekatana ereene vaxikowahu.’”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Ehuhuweene yeeyo muloko ola ni oYerusaleemu onooleeliwa: “Epheyo yoovihaxa enrweela mmattumuxani a munikareni enoopela mpatta wa mulokwaaka, mene kheeneerela oveera hoye hoye otteeliha." 
Jeremiah4:12 Epheyo yoowuupaxa yeeyo yoorumihiwa ni Miyo. Vano kinlaleiya kaalakelenlaaka yaawo.” 
Jeremiah4:13 Moone, Owo ongwa ntoko mahutte; ikaarosawe sa ekhotto sinrwa ntoko eyuupuru, ikavalusawe* soowaaluwaxa ompwaha xaaka. Ii! Wa hiyo! Hiyo nooriheya!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Ii oYerusaleemu! Mukatthe soonanara siri mmurimanimwanyu ni mvulixiwe! Mpaka yaakhani muneeraanyu mukhaleno soowuupuwela soonanara? 
Jeremiah4:15 Nniiwanyeya nsu nilaleiyaka okhuma oDani, ni okhuma mattumuxa a wEfrayimi ninlaleiya nihooxo." 
Jeremiah4:16 “Muleele yeeyo miloko; mulaleiye yeeyo oYerusaleemu: ‘Anakhotto anamarica anrweela mulaponi ya ottai, ekhuwelelaka ekhotto wa isidade sa oYuda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Awosa anrica oYerusaleemu ntoko asilopwana anlipelelaaya ematta, niwoko esidade eyo yookivaanya Miyo,’ ” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah4:18 “Mweettelowaanyu ni mitekosanyu muneenaanyu sohooruuhelani ekhotto eyo. Moota noowaawenlaayani nttaruxonanyu ni nno noophiya vamurimaniwanyu.” 
Jeremiah4:19 Ii! Othananawaka, othananawaka! Kinnathukumela ni ovoreya! Ii! Exiri ya murimaaka! Murimaaka onnakitthimaka ni nkingwera omaala. Niwoko kohiiwa oruma wa nipalapatta; kohiiwa okhuweliwa wa ekhotto." 
Jeremiah4:20 Erisa enttharelana erisa; elapo yootheene yooheleya nthala. Wootutuxereya iheemasaka soophwatiwa vamohamoharu moowiipithamwaka. 
Jeremiah4:21 Mpaka yaakhani kintthuneyaaka woona eneneero ya ekhotto ni wiipiwa wa nipalapatta? 
Jeremiah4:22 “Mulokwaaka ti mulolo; awosa khaakisuwenle Miyo, ehiiwexexaka etthu. Ankhovelela opaka soonanara, mene khaangwera opaka yooreera.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Kaaweha elapo ya vathi ni eyo khayaarino ekhalelo; kaaweha wiirimu ni soomwaleelasaya soolakaseya. 
Jeremiah4:24 Kaaweha nyaako ni seiyo saatetereya ni mattumuxa ootheene yaamuttikinyeya. 
Jeremiah4:25 Kaaweha ni khayaariworu atthu. Ipalame sootheene sa wiirimu saavavela ottaiwene. 
Jeremiah4:26 Kaaweha ni elapo yooruwereyaxa yaathatuwa nikare; mittetthesaya sootheene sooheleya nthala vamaithoni wa Yave; ohoolo wa isarasawe soowoopiha. 
Jeremiah4:27 Yave oneera ha: “Elapo yootheene ela enoonanarihiwa, kiroohiphwataru woomalela." 
Jeremiah4:28 Tivawo elapo eneeraaya elalamike ni erimu enooriipihana niwoko kohuuluma ni nkirwa kiceendya; koolakela ni nkirwa kihokolowa.” 
Jeremiah4:29 Woowiiwa oruma wa anamweettiha ikavalu* ni anamuupa, amaki a mittetthe sootheene antthawa. Amaki akina a yaawo amvolowa mmaphuwani, akinaawo antthawela mmakhukuni. Mittetthe sootheene singhala soothaamiweene; khawowo onkhalamo." 
Jeremiah4:30 Ii! Namaphwatiwa, mumpakani? Mungwarelani sooxeera mwiiphwanelihaka ni axiveeve a eyuuma yoorikaxa? Muniihingela heeni mmakwikhwinimwanyu? Muniiphwaneliha siiyo. Vano Oosiveleyaanyu anoothanyani, yaasaasaka okumaanyu." 
Jeremiah4:31 Kiniiwa okhuweliwa ntoko wa muthiyana ahaleelaka oyara, ntoko muthiyana ahaleelaka oyara muxutto – okhuwela wa mwaana muthiyana a oSiyoni iilipiheraka omumula ni atheteyaka matata, eeraka: “Ii! Wa miyo, kihanle vakhaani okomoka; okumaaka ori mmatatani mwa anamwiiva!”" 
Jeremiah5:1 “Muviravire mmiseweni sa oYerusaleemu, ngwehawehe ni moone; mwaasaase mmapuwanimwaya. Mwamphanya hata mutthu mmoha ni mweettelowaawe woororomeleya, aasaasaka ekhaikhai, kinoolevelela esidade ela." 
Jeremiah5:2 Naari yeeraka: ‘Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave,’ vekhaikhai anlipela moota woowootha.”" 
Jeremiah5:3 ii! Yave, maithwaanyu anaasaasa ekhaikhai. Nyuwo mwaahaavulaliha, mene awosa khayoonne ovoreya; mwaahaattaruxa, mene yaakhoottha olakiwa. Yaahuumihaxa mirimasaya, ekhoottaka orukunxa murima." 
Jeremiah5:4 Kaahuupuwela: “Awo ti oohaawa paahi; ti alolo, niwoko khaansuwela ephiro ya Yave hata soonyesereriha sa Mulukwaaya." 
Jeremiah5:5 Tivawo kineeraaka kirowe wa ahooleelaaya weera kuulumeno – woohihovela awosa aasuwela ephiro ya Yave, soonyesereriha sa Mulukwaaya!” Vaheera ootheene awo aaphwata yoolemela eyo enapasa onyooro." 
Jeremiah5:6 Tivawo mwatto a moothakoni aneeraawe aakarawele, mwiici wa munikareni onimwaaluma, havara onoowiipithela mukhwipi mwa mittetthesaya weera amunyaanye akhalaru mutthu aneera akhumemo, niwoko ovaanyawaya ti otokotoko ni soohapuwasaya ti sincipale." 
Jeremiah5:7 “Kaahooleveleleleni heeni? Anamwaniinyu aakihiya ni anlipela mwa miluku sihikhanle miluku. Kohaavaha sootheene yaatthunaaya, hata hiiho aararuwa ni annarowa wa impa sa mapuuta." 
Jeremiah5:8 Awosa anlikana ni ekavalu* elopwana enca nnene ni yoosareya soohaawela; khula mutthu a yaawo onimuhaawelaxa mwaara a mukhwaawe. 
Jeremiah5:9 Vekhaikhai ontthuneya waattaruxela yeeyo!,” onghima Yave. “Vekhaikhai ontthuneya wiinlela ikukuttula muloko ntoko ola!" 
Jeremiah5:10 Muviravire eriyari ya imattasaya sa iwuuva* ni mwananarihe, mene muhiphwate woomalela. Mwakwasere iphandi niwoko muloko owo khoohiyono wa Yave." 
Jeremiah5:11 Vano ipuumba sa oYixrayeli ni sa oYuda khasiroromeleiye moota woomalela,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah5:12 Awosa yaahootha mwaha wa Yave; awosa yaaheera: “Owo kharwa apaka etthu. Kheewowo eneera enikhumelele. Khanirwa noonatho ekatana hata etala. 
Jeremiah5:13 Maprofeeti ti epheyo paahi ni maswaaka khaakhanle mwa yaawo; tivawo, yaakhumelele yeeyo anghimaaya.”" 
Jeremiah5:14 Tivawo, Yave, Muluku a ikuru sootheene, oneeraawe ha: “Weenre muloko wuulumaka masu ala, kinoopakiha weera maswaaka ekhale mooro mmwaanomwanyu ni muloko owo okhale ikhuuni sinlalihiwa ni mooro owo." 
Jeremiah5:15 Ii! Ipuumba sa oYixrayeli,” onghima Yave, “kinooruuhelani muloko wa ottai weera woowananeni – muloko wa khalayi ni woohiwineya, mwa yoowo muhisuwenlaanyu nuulumonaya hata muhiniiwexexaanyu onghimaaya." 
Jeremiah5:16 Nluwonaya nri ntoko nihiye noohuleya; ootheene a yaawo ari anakhotto ooweraxa. 
Jeremiah5:17 Awosa anoomira soohephasanyu ni soocasanyu; animwaamira anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana; anoomira imombesanyu ni ikhondoolosanyu, imattasanyu sa iwuuva* ni nyiri sa efiigu*. Awosa anoophwata ni ekatana isidade soolipihiwa mwa seiyo munroromelaanyu." 
Jeremiah5:18 Hata hiiho, mpaka mmahukuni awo nkirwa koophwataani woomalela,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah5:19 “Vano awosa yaakohaka: ‘Yave Mulukwaahu onipakenleni itthu sootheene iya?’ vano ngweerelaseke: ‘Mooteene yoowo mukihingyaanyu murumeelaka miluku sikina mweelaponimwanyu, hiihotho munimwaarumeela anamarwa mweelaponimwaya.’" 
Jeremiah5:20 Vano mulaleere yeeyo ikhapira sa Yakobe ni Yuda: 
Jeremiah5:21 Mwiiwe yeeyo muloko wa ololo ni woohimiruku orino maitho, ohoonaka ni maaru, ohiiwaka:" 
Jeremiah5:22 Nyuwo khoontthuneya okoova?” onghima Yave, “koontthuneya othukumela ohoolowaka? Ti Miyo kikhalihale muhaava ntoko mwiinano wa ephareiya – mwiinano woohimala ephareiya ehingweraaya ovinuwa. Mitekuteku sinoophweeya, mene khasingwera opwaherera; seiyo sinoowera oruma, mene khasingwera ovinuwa mwiinaanoweene yoowo." 
Jeremiah5:23 Vaheera muloko owo ti woowuuma murima ni wa ettiyamaaru; owo woosusa, onapwaha." 
Jeremiah5:24 Awosa khaaniixeerela: ‘Nrowe, nimooveke Yave Mulukwaahu, mwa Yoowo onrupiha epula mutthulo ni ya mulaala mweehuhunimwaya ni onnivaha isimana sa ohepha mweehuhunimwaya.’" 
Jeremiah5:25 Wa soothesene soopakasanyu soonanara soosusiha itthusene seiyo; sootthekasanyu soowiiyerani sooreerela iyo. 
Jeremiah5:26 Aakhala atakhali variyari wa mulokwaaka mwa yaawo aniipitha ntoko aniipithaayamo anamalupattha a ipalame; anreya miraakho weera yaapharihe atthu. 
Jeremiah5:27 Impasaya soosareya olokottha ntoko ikeelo soosareya ipalame; awosa aathatuwa anamapuha ni ooweraxa; 
Jeremiah5:28 enenevaka ni ecaaka nnene. Mitekosaya soonanara khasinono nyiinano; awosa khaanimpwattha mukwaasuni naari khaanaakiha soophwanela sa namahaawa. 
Jeremiah5:29 Vekhaikhai ontthuneya waattaruxela yeeyo!” onghima Yave. “Vekhaikhai ontthuneya wiinlela ikukuttula muloko ntoko ola!” 
Jeremiah5:30 Etthu yoonanaraxa ni yoowuumiha owanoni enkhumelela mweelaponi ela: 
Jeremiah5:31 Maprofeeti anuuluma soowootha, asaserdoti* anlamula sa mmurumwaya ni mulokwaaka onsiveliwa ni seiyo. Mene mmwipakeni ommaleloni?" 
Jeremiah6:1 “Ii! Ekhapira ya Benyamini, mutthawele nipuro noolipaxa! Mutthawe oYerusaleemu! Mwiipe nipalapatta oTekowa! Mweemexe eneneero oBeti-Hakeremi! Niwoko ennooneya erisa enrweela ottuttuwani – ophwata woowoopihaxa." 
Jeremiah6:2 Kinoomphwata mwaana muthiyana a oSiyoni ooreeraxa ni oophwanelaxiwa. 
Jeremiah6:3 Akukhuli ni mihuwosaya animoowa emuriceke; anookunga iheemasaya sa mukhwipimwaya, khula mukukhuli akosoopaka nipuronawe.”" 
Jeremiah6:4 “Mwiirehererele ongwanano! Mvenye, niwananeke nsuwa vamuru! Mene ii! Nsuwa noothetemana ni munttuusi wa oxekuwa woorakama." 
Jeremiah6:5 Vano muvenye, niwananeke esidade ni ohiyu, niphwataka mapurowaaya oolipaxa!”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: “Muuhe nyiri ni niteke ikaaro sookurumulelano exiri ya oYerusaleemu. Esidade ela ettaruxiwe, ti yoosareya nihasu." 
Jeremiah6:7 Eyo empaka soonanara ntoko ehime enkhumihaaya maahi. Nipuhero ni ophwata oniiwanyeya mpuwamwaya. Iretta ni makhwattaaya ari ohoolowaka wa mahuku ootheene. 
Jeremiah6:8 Ii! oYerusaleemu, mwiiwe woopererawaka! Mwaahiiwa, kinoosusa woomalela ohoolowanyu koohiyakani ttewu mulaponi yoohimakiwa.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: “Mwaattottattotte oohalahala a oYixrayeli nnenesene ntoko sinttottattottiwaaya iwuuva* sa evideira*, ni ntoko ompakaawe yoole onrukula iwuuva*: nyuwo mviravire mphandini khula ekhuce." 
Jeremiah6:10 Kimuulumeno ni kimooperere taani? Taani aneera akiiwe? Maaruwaaya aattiyana moota wooweera khaaniiwaru. Awosa anthanya masu a Yave, ehisivelakaru yaawo." 
Jeremiah6:11 Mene miyo koosareya isara sa Yave ni nkingweraru okhalano.” Mwaayeehere seiyo anamwane mmiseweni ni amiravo anthukumana mikuttula mikuttula; asiiya ni axaaraaya anoophwanyiwa ni seiyo ni hiihotho anamuuluvala – yaawosa arino iyaakha sincipale. 
Jeremiah6:12 Impasaya animwinnyereriwa akina vamoha ni imattasaya ni axaaraya Miyo kaawookolelaka moonowaaka yaawo amanke elapo ela,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah6:13 “Okhuma asikhaani mpaka asitokweene – ootheene aasareya ohaawelaxa mihakhu; maprofeeti nitho asaserdoti* ootheene aneetta moota woolokottha. 
Jeremiah6:14 Awosa anreherera makhwatta a mulokwaaka ehoonelakamo. Awosa aneera: ‘Murettele, murettele’ ohikhanleru murettele." 
Jeremiah6:15 Awosa khaanuuliwa muru niwoko na mweettelowaaya wa mwiikho. Awo khaanoonaru wuuliha muru – mpaka kheenaamoraru ekhove. Tivawo eneeraaya emorele variyari wa yaale ammora. Anooyevihiwa Miyo kaattaruxaka,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah6:16 Yave oneera ha: “Mweemele vamathakalaano ni moone; mwaasaasere iphiro sa khalayi, mukohe eri woowi ephiro yooreera ni mukuxere, ni vano munoophwanya wiitthuuwa wa okumaanyu. Vaheera mweenre: ‘Hiyo khaninkuxera yeeyo.’" 
Jeremiah6:17 Kohaakhaliha anamalipelela variyariwanyu kiweerelaka: ‘Mwiiwe nnenesene oruma wa nipalapatta.’ Vaheera mweenre: ‘Khanimpwattha.’ 
Jeremiah6:18 Tivawo, mwiiwe miloko ni moone anamoona, yeeyo eneera yaakhumelele yaawo." 
Jeremiah6:19 Ii! Elapo ya vathi, mwiiwe: Kinooruuhela muloko ola erisa, soowiima sa soovaanelasaya, niwoko khoopwantthe maswaaka, okhoottaka Nlamulonaka." 
Jeremiah6:20 Nkimpwattharu erubani* ya oXeba hoye hoye etthu yoowunkhelaxa enruuhiwa ilapo sa ottai. Sooveleelasanyu soohisa khasinaakhuleleya; sooveleelasanyu khasinkisiveliha.” 
Jeremiah6:21 Tivawo Yave oneeraawe ha: “Kinimwiikittha muloko ola. Asitiithi ni anamwanaayatho anookwakwathuliwa; aximwaattamana ni asinthamwene anooriheya.” 
Jeremiah6:22 Yave oneera ha: “Moone, anakhotto ancipale anrweela elapo ya mpatta wa ottuttuwani; muloko mutokotoko onrehereriwa okhuma ekotenle elapo." 
Jeremiah6:23 Awosa avarenle nyuupa ni mavaka; ti a murima woowuumaxa ni khaammorelaru ikharari. Yeettihaka ikavalusaya*, orumawaya onlikana oruma otokotoko wa ephareiya; awosa anrwa ethataanenleene owana ni nyuwo, mwaana muthiyana a oSiyoni.”" 
Jeremiah6:24 Nohiiwa ihaali sa yaawosa ni matataahu aanilosowa. Woova woonivara, ovoreya ntoko wa muthiyana ongyara." 
Jeremiah6:25 Muhirowe mmatta naari muheette mmiseweni, niwoko amwiittana anrwaano ekatana ni wookhala woopiha mipatta sootheene." 
Jeremiah6:26 Ii! Mulokwaaka, muwarele isaakho ni mwiihele ettuura. Mwiinle moota woolalamikaxa ntoko mutthu ommwiinlela mwaniye mmoharu, niwoko wootutuxereya namaphwata onooniphwanya." 
Jeremiah6:27 Miyo kohookhalihani namawehaweha a iyuuma, mulokwaaka okhalaka eyuuma weera ngwehe ni moote murima iphirosaya." 
Jeremiah6:28 Ootheene awosa ti anamavaanya a murima woowuuma, epwahereraka owuuluma akina. Awosa ti ebronze* ni eyuuma; ootheene aneetta moota wookhoromana." 
Jeremiah6:29 Vano mvekhu oniiselela ni ikuru weera omwalamwaxe murawa ni eyuuma yootteelaxa, mene eyo enimwaasa osama hapo atakhali khaammwalamwaxeya." 
Jeremiah6:30 Awosa aniitthaniwa eparatha* yookhoottiwa niwoko Yave ohaakhootta.” 
Jeremiah7:1 Masu Yeremiya aakhenlaawe wa mpatta wa Yave ti ala: 
Jeremiah7:2 “Mweemele vamulako wa Empa ya Yave ni mwalaleiyewo mutthenga ola: ‘Nyuwosa muloko wootheene wa oYuda mumvira mmilakoni iya weera munttottopele Yave, mwiiwe masu a Yave." 
Jeremiah7:3 Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: Muceendye mweettelowaanyu ni mitekosanyu ni Miyo kinimootthuniherani okhala vanipuroni nna." 
Jeremiah7:4 Muhiroromele masu oolokhottha mweeraka: “Ela ti Empa ya Yave, Empa ya Yave, Empa ya Yave!”" 
Jeremiah7:5 Nyuwosa vekhaikhai mwaceendya mweettelowaanyu ni mitekosanyu ni mwapakelana ekhaikhai," 
Jeremiah7:6 nyuwosa mwaahaahasula anamarwa, akwaasuni hoye hoye asinaamukhweli ni mwaahiyeehera ephome yoohinthowa nipuro nna, ni mwaahitthara miluku sikina mwiihelaka nthala," 
Jeremiah7:7 vano kinimootthuniherani okhala vanipuroni nna, mweelaponi kaavanghaaka makholowaanyu wa mahuku ootheene." 
Jeremiah7:8 Mene moone, nyuwosa munroromela masu oolokhottha ni oohimuteko." 
Jeremiah7:9 Munuupuwela weera onoowereya wiiya, wiiva, oraruwa, wootha, omuhisera erubani* Bahali* ni otthara miluku sikina muhisuwenlaanyu," 
Jeremiah7:10 ni vahoolowaya okhala ohoolowaka Mpaanimu ela erino Nsinanaka, mweeraka: “Noolipa!” Noolipa weera mpwaherere ni miteko sootheene iyo sa mwiikho?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Mootatuxa Empa ela erino Nsinanaka nikhuku na anamwiiya, mene nnene! Miyo kineera koonaka yeeyo, onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah7:12 Murowe vaanaano va oXilo mwa weiwo nri Nipuronaka na ovekeliwa kaapacenraakawo omaka kittittimiherelaka Nsinanaka, ni moone yeeyo Miyo kaapakenlaaka nipuro nno niwoko na sootakhala sa mulokwaaka aYixrayeli." 
Jeremiah7:13 Nyuwosa mwaapakaanyu itthu sootheene iya,’ onghima Yave, ‘Miyo kannooleelani imaara sincipale, mene khamwiiwale; kaawiitthanani, mene khamwaakhunle." 
Jeremiah7:14 Tivawo, yeeyo kipakenlaaka oXilo vano kinoopakela Empa ela erino Nsinanaka, Empa ya Yave mwa yeeyo munroromelaanyu, nipuro koovanghaakani nyuwosa ni makholowaanyu." 
Jeremiah7:15 Kinoowoomolasani vamaithoniwaka ntoko kaapakenlaaka axunninyu, muloko wa wEfrayimi.’”" 
Jeremiah7:16 “Ni nyuwo, Yeremiya, muhivekelele muloko ola naari muhidyoonttelele mwaha wa yoowo; muhikidyoonttelele, niwoko nkirwa kiwiiwaani." 
Jeremiah7:17 Khamunoona yeeyo awosa ampakaaya mmittettheni sa oYuda ni mmiseweni sa oYerusaleemu? 
Jeremiah7:18 Anamwane anaasa ikhuuni, asitiithi ampattiha mooro ni asithiyana aneetheya ephepa empakelaka iboolu pwiyamwene a wiirimu. Awosa angyeehera sooveleela soowura miluku sikina weera etannyere isarasaka." 
Jeremiah7:19 Mene weeraka ankitannya Miyo? onkoha Yave. Awosa aniixuulihiha muru asineenaaya. 
Jeremiah7:20 ‘Tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: Onyoonyiwawaka ni isarasaka sinooyeeheriwa nipuro nna, mwaatthuni, mwaaxinamani, mmirini sa mmatta nitho mwa soowiima sa vathi; iyo sinoohisa ni khasicipihiwa." 
Jeremiah7:21 Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: Muroweke, mwathukumanye sooveleelasanyu soohisa ni sooveleelasanyu sikina ni mukhuureke inama asineenaanyu!" 
Jeremiah7:22 Vano Miyo kaakhumihalaaka makholowaanyu wExipitu, kuulumaka ni yaawo, nkaalamulenleru mwaha wa sooveleela soohisa hoye hoye sikina." 
Jeremiah7:23 Ohiyanawaya, nlamulo kaavanghaaka ti nna: mukiiwelele ni kinookhala Mulukwaanyu ni nyuwosa munookhala mulokwaaka. Mweette mphironi kinoolamulelaakani weera itthu siweetteleni nnene." 
Jeremiah7:24 Vaheera awosa khayaakiiwale hata khayaakipwantthe; ohiyanawaya yaatthara soowuupuwela soovaanya sa mirimasaya soonanara. Yaahokoleenle ottuli ohiya ohoolo. 
Jeremiah7:25 Okhuma ehuhuweene yeele makholowaanyu yaakhummaaya wExipitu mpaka vanaano va, Miyo kaahaarumihelasa arumeiyaaka maprofeeti nihuku ti nihuku." 
Jeremiah7:26 Vaheera awosa khayaakiiwale hata khayaakipwantthe. Yaari oottiyamaaru ni yaapaka soonanara waapwaha makholowaaya.’ 
Jeremiah7:27 Nyuwo mwaaleelaka sootheene iya, awosa kheewiiwani; nyuwo mwaawiitthanaka, awosa kheewaakhulani." 
Jeremiah7:28 Vano mwaaleele: ‘Ola ti muloko ohimmwiiwelela Yave Mulukwaaya naari ohintthuna wookoleliwa. Ekhaikhai yoophwateya, enalakaseya mmwaanomwaya." 
Jeremiah7:29 Mmetthe mayihaanyu ni murihe; mulalamike mmattumuxani oothaamiwa, niwoko Yave oohiya ni ookhootta ekhapira ela entannya isarasawe." 
Jeremiah7:30 Muloko wa oYuda woopaka soonanara vamaithoniwaka, onghima Yave. Wookhaliha milukusaya sa mwiikho Mpaani erino Nsinanaka oveihaka yeeyo." 
Jeremiah7:31 Wookhaliha mapuro ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina sa oTofete vanreyareyani na Beni-Hinomi weera yaahise anamwanaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana – etthu Miyo kihitonkwaaka olamulela hata kahuupuwenlaaka. 
Jeremiah7:32 Vano mwiipasoope, anoophiyera mahuku, onghima Yave, nipuro nno nneeraaya nihiitthaniwetho oTofeti hoye hoye Nreyareya na Beni-Hinomi, mene Nreyareya na Noomala niwoko awosa anoovithawo mittembo mpaka ohiphwanyaneya nipuro." 
Jeremiah7:33 Vano mittembo sa atthweene yaawo sinoociwa ni ipalame sa wiirimu ni axinama a nthupini ni kheekhalaru oowoomolela. 
Jeremiah7:34 Kinoomalamaliha okhuwela wa ohakalala ni otteeliwa murima nitho masu a namatthomeriwa ni namatthomera mmittettheni sa oYuda ni mmiseweni sa oYerusaleemu, niwoko elapo ela enooheleya mathala.’”" 
Jeremiah8:1 “ ‘Ehuhuweene yeeyo, onghima Yave, makhuva a mamwene ni asitokweene a oYuda ni makhuva a asaserdoti* ni maprofeeti ni makhuva a amaki a oYerusaleemu anookhumihiwa mmahiyenimwaya." 
Jeremiah8:2 Anookhala vanlakani yoopeliweke nsuwa, ni yaareliweke mweeri ni ithenyeri sa wiirimu mwa seiyo awosa yaasivelaaya ni yaarumeelaaya ni mwa seiyo yaattharaaya, yaakokhorelaaya ni yaattottopelaaya. Makhuveene yaawo kheethukumanyihiwa hata kheevithiwa, mene eniikhale ntoko ikokhola vatthayani." 
Jeremiah8:3 Ootheene ahalahanle a muloko owo anoothanla wiiviwa ohiya okhala ni okumi mmapuroni ootheene mwa weiwo kineeraaka kiwoomolele, onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene.’”" 
Jeremiah8:4 “Mwaaleele: ‘Yave oneera ha: Atthu yaamoraka, khaamvenyatho? Mukina ahapuwa, khanghokoleelamotho?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Vanonto heeni muloko ola ohapungwaaya? Heeni oYerusaleemu ompwahereraaya opahuwa? Amakaaya aavarexexa olokottha, ekhoottaka ohokolowa." 
Jeremiah8:6 Kohoonexexa nnenesene, mene awosa khaanghima ya ekhaikhai. Khawoworu onrukunxa murimaawe eeraka: “Kipankeni?” Khula mutthu a yaawo ontthara ephirowaawe muneenaawe ntoko ekavalu* eniivonyeraxa mukhottoni." 
Jeremiah8:7 Mpaka ntiki onsuwela ihuhu ovaheriwaawe; hiihotho ekhunda, meenkesa ni malooya annoona ihuhu sa othaamawaya, mene mulokwaaka khoosuwenle soonyesereriha sa Yave." 
Jeremiah8:8 Mungwera hayi weera: “Hiyo asuweli niwoko nookhalano Nlamulo na Yave,” mene vekhaikhai sireene paahi soowootha sa anamalepa atatunxaaya?" 
Jeremiah8:9 Asuweli animuulihiheya muru; animoopopiheya ni anoopharihiwa. Yeenre ekhootta masu a Yave – vano miruku heeni awosa arinaaya? 
Jeremiah8:10 Tivawo kineeraaka kaavaherere axaaraya asilopwana akina ni imattasaya wa atthu akina. Ootheene oosareya ohaawela mihakhu – okhuma asikhaani mpaka asitokweene; maprofeeti nitho asaserdoti* ootheene aneetta moolokotthani. 
Jeremiah8:11 Awosa anreherera makhwatta a mulokwaaka ehoonelakamo. Aneera: “Murettele, murettele” ohikhanleru murettele." 
Jeremiah8:12 Awosa khaanuuliwa muru niwoko na mweettelowaaya wa mwiikho. Awo khaanoonaru wuuliha muru – mpaka kheenaamoraru ekhove. Tivawo eneeraaya emorele variyari wa yaale ammora. Anooyevihiwa Miyo kaattaruxaka, onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah8:13 Yave onghima: Kinoovurula soohephasaya. Khasihalaru soowiima mmatta mwa iwuuwa. Khasihalarutho soowiima sa nyiri sa efiigu* ni makukhwaaya animuuma. Yeeyo kaavanghaaka animwaakhiwa.’ ” 
Jeremiah8:14 Nikilaathenleni va? Muthukumane! Nitthaweleke isidade soolipihiwa weera nakhwelewo. Yave Mulukwaahu oonithorihela weera niphwatiwe ni oonivaha maahi ooheliwa yoohapala weera niwure niwoko noomutthekela. 
Jeremiah8:15 Nannaweherera murettele, mene khawaarwiiyeru mpuha; nannaweherera ehuhu ya olama, mene oriwo paahi woopiha." 
Jeremiah8:16 Otturuma wa ikavalu* sa amwiittana onimwiiwanyeya okhuma oDani; woowiiwa oruma wa mikhittosaya elapo yootheene enootetereya. Awosa yaarweenle onyaanya elapo ela ni sootheene siri mwemmo, esidade ela ni amakaaya.”" 
Jeremiah8:17 “Moone, kinoorumihelani inowa soohapalaxa variyariwanyu mwa seiyo khawowo anaawere wiipela ni iyo sinimoolumani,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah8:18 Othanana wookivara; murimaaka woovalavelaxa. 
Jeremiah8:19 Mwiiwe okhuwela wa mulokwaaka mweelaponi ya ottai: “Yave khakhanle oSiyoni? Mwenaaya khamphwanyaneyawo?” Vano Yave aahaakhula: “Heeni awosa atannyalaaya isarasaka ni icaambulosaya ni milukusaya soohimuteko sa anamarwa?“ 
Jeremiah8:20 “Yoovira ehuhu ya ohepha, yoomala eyiita ni hiyo khanivulungwe.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Weenre mulokwaaka ovulalihiwa, miyotho koovulalaxa; kinnalamikaxa ni koothananaxa." 
Jeremiah8:22 Khoowowo murette oGileyade? Khawowo meediku? Nihimvolela heeni nikhwatta na mulokwaaka? 
Jeremiah9:1 Ii! Muruwaaka waari naatuuttu a maahi ni maitwaaka ehime ya maithori! Vano kaamwiinla ohiyu ni othana niwoko na okhwa wa mulokwaaka. 
Jeremiah9:2 Ii! Waariwo woophiyerawaka munikareni, weera kihiye mulokwaaka kisusaka mwa yoowo; ootheene awo anamararuwa ni nakupa a anamavariha." 
Jeremiah9:3 “Awosa anreherera nluminaya ntoko muupa weera elathele soowootha. Ti soowootha, ehikhanle ekhaikhai sinlamula mweelaponi. Awosa anghelelela opaka sootakhala; awosa khaankisuwela Miyo,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah9:4 “Mwiipasoope ni asinthamwenaanyu; muhaaroromele axunninyu. Niwoko khula munna ti namalokottha ni khula nthamwene ti nawunawu. 
Jeremiah9:5 Nthamwene onimulokottha mukhwaawe ni khawowo onuuluma ekhaikhai. Awosa anxutteriha malumaaya wootha; aniikhulumula mwa soottheka. 
Jeremiah9:6 Awosa ankuukelelaxa ohooxa ni olokottha, ehitthunaka okisuwela Miyo,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah9:7 Tivawo Yave a ikuru sootheene oneeraawe ha: “Moone, Miyo kinimwaatteeliha ni kinoowoota murima, niwoko kweewowo etthu ekina kineeraaka kipakele mulokwaaka." 
Jeremiah9:8 Nluminaya ti muupa woowiiva; anuuluma moota woolokottha. Ni eyano khula mutthu oniixoonihera oosaambwaneya ni mukhwaawe, mene mmurimanimwawe amurehererelaka ntapha." 
Jeremiah9:9 Kintthuneya waattaruxa niwoko na yeeyo,” onghima Yave. “Kintthuneya wiinlela ikukuttula muloko ntoko ola.”" 
Jeremiah9:10 Kinimwiinla, kinimwiikhupanyera ni kinoolalamikela nyaako niwoko na moocihamo weenre othaamiwamo ni khaawowo amviramo. Khooniiwanyeya onyakula wa mihuwo; ipalame sa wiirimu sootthawa ni axinama aalakaseya." 
Jeremiah9:11 “Kinootatuxa oYerusaleemu ittuxoru, nipuro ankhalaayawo akhwatte; ni kinoophwata mittetthe sa oYuda weera ehikhale eneera emakewo.”" 
Jeremiah9:12 Taani ori oosuwelaxa weera iiwexexe yeeyo? Taani oxuttihiwe ni Yave anaawere othaliha yeeyo? Heeni elapo eheleiyaaya nthala ni ephwatiwaaya ntoko nikare nihimviriwaru? 
Jeremiah9:13 Yave eenre: “Ti niwoko awosa ahingyaaya nlamulonaka kaavanghaaka; awosa khaakiiwelenle hata khaatthanre nlamulonaka. 
Jeremiah9:14 Ohiyanawaya, aatthara ettiyamaaru ya mirimasaya; ahaatthara aBahali*, ntoko makholowaaya yaaxuttinghaaya.”" 
Jeremiah9:15 Tivawo Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a aYixrayeli oneeraawe ha: “Moone, kinoonyesereriha muloko ola oca sooca soowaawa ni owura maahi ooheliwa yoohapala." 
Jeremiah9:16 Kinimwaamwaraxela variyari wa miloko awosa naari makholowaaya yahaasuwenlaaya ni kinimwaarumihela ekatana mpaka kineeraaka kaaphwate.” 
Jeremiah9:17 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: “Moonelemo! Ngwiitthane anamwiikhupanyera oothummwa; mulamulele wiitthaniwa yaawosa angweraxa wiinla eriyaraaya. 
Jeremiah9:18 Awosa erwaase woowaakuveya weera enilalamikele mpaka maithwaahu osareya maithori ni maahi okhwalalela mmakwikhwinimwahu. 
Jeremiah9:19 Oruma wa olalamika wohiiwanyeya oSiyoni: ‘Moota niphwatiwaahu! Moota niyevihaxiwaahu! Nintthuneya ohiya elapwaahu niwoko impasahu sooheleya nthala.’” 
Jeremiah9:20 Vano asithiyana, mwiiwe masu a Yave; muhuleke maaruwaanyu weera mwiiwe masu a eyanowaawe. Mwaaxuttihe anamwaniinyu asithiyana moota woolalamika; muxuttihane ecipo yoowiikhupanyera." 
Jeremiah9:21 Okhwa woowela onavolowa muxanelanimwahu ovolowakatho mapurowaahu oolipihiwaxa; wohaamalamaliha anamwane mmiseweni ni amiravo mmapuwani. 
Jeremiah9:22 Mweere: “Yave oneera ha: ‘Mittembo sinookhala ntoko ikokhola vanlakani, ntoko etrigu enghiiwahiiwa ni namahepha, ahikhalaka oothukumanya.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:23 Yave oneera ha: “Namiruku ahiivuwiheno mirukusawe hata nakuru mukurunimwawe naari namapuha moopuhanimwawe. 
Jeremiah9:24 Hoye, yoowo ontthuna ovuwiha, avuwiheke ha: mookiiwexexani ni mookisuwelani, niwoko Miyo ti Yave onoonihera murima wooreera, oororomeleya ni a ekhaikhai mweelaponi yootheene. Vano ti mwa itthusene seiya Miyo kinghakalalelaaka,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah9:25 “Anoophiyera mahuku,” onghima Yave, “Kineeraaka kaattaruxe ootheene yaawo yiineliwe mweerutthuni paahi –" 
Jeremiah9:26 awExipitu, aYuda, awEdomi, awAmoni, aMowabe ni ootheene ankhala munikareni na ottaiwene. Vano milokosene seiyo sootheene siri soohiineliwa ni mpakatho ekhapira yootheene ya oYixrayeli ti yoohiineliwa mmurimanimwaya.”" 
Jeremiah10:1 Ii! Muloko wa oYixrayeli, mwiiwe yeeyo Yave onooleelaaweni." 
Jeremiah10:2 Yave oneera ha: “Muhixuttere mweettelo wa miloko, naari muhoove niwoko na ineneero sa wiirimu naari miloko sitteenguwaka." 
Jeremiah10:3 Vano ikhovelelo sa miloko khasimuteko; awosa anuuha mwiri wa moothakoni ni neettotto ompattha ni ephalo. 
Jeremiah10:4 Awosa amphwaneliha ni eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa; ankhomela ecaambulo eyo ni enyutto ni misomaari weera ehiinaine. 
Jeremiah10:5 Ntoko moopopihero mmatta mwa mixiri milukusaya khasingwera wuuluma; ontthuneya okuxiwa niwoko khasingwera weetta. Muhoove milukusene seiyo, niwoko khasingwera opaka yoonanara naari yooreera.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 Khawowo onlikana ni Nyuwo, Yave; Nyuwo ti Mutokweenexa ni owera wa Nsinananyu ti otokotoko." 
Jeremiah10:7 Taani aneera ahiwooveni Nyuwo, Mwene a miloko? Woopiha iwo wohoophwanelani. Variyari wa anamiruku ootheene a miloko ni moomwenenimwaya sootheene khawowo onlikana ni Nyuwo." 
Jeremiah10:8 Ootheene yaawo khaamiruku ni alolo; awosa anxuttihiwa ni miluku soohimuteko. 
Jeremiah10:9 Eparatha* yoohaniwa enruuhiwa oTaresisi ni eyuuma yoorikaxa wUpazi. Muteko wa muratti ni namahana enghuruweliwa ni soowara sa kanka ni sookankela – sootheene soopakiwa ni anamaratta ooweraxa. 
Jeremiah10:10 Vaheera Yave ti Muluku a ekhaikhai; Owo ti Muluku Mukumi, Mwene Oohimala. Owo aanyoonyiwaka, elapo enootetereya; miloko khasingwera ovilela isarasawe." 
Jeremiah10:11 Mwaaleele ha: “Miluku seiyo sihipattunxe erimu naari vathi, sinooriheela mweelaponi ni vathi wa erimu.”" 
Jeremiah10:12 Vano ti Muluku opattunxe elapo ya vathi ni ikurusawe; Owo aakhaliha yeeyo ni mirukusawe ni aakunga erimu ni wiiwexexawawe. 
Jeremiah10:13 Oruma wa etaraawe, maahi anooruma wiirimu epakeyaka mahutte okhuma ekotenle elapo. Owo onrumiha overinya vamoha ni epula, akhumihaka epheyo enuukaanaayamo." 
Jeremiah10:14 Asilopwana ootheene awo ti alolo, ehisuwelaka etthu; khula namahana onuulihiheya muru ni icaambulosawe. Seiyo siri soowootha sihikhalanaka ngwiya wa okumi." 
Jeremiah10:15 Seiyo ti soohimuteko, sootthebwiwa ni atthu; nthorihelonaya naaphiyaka, sinoophwatiwa." 
Jeremiah10:16 Yoole ori a mpatta wa Yakobe khanlikana ni icaambulo iyo, niwoko Owo ti Mpattuxa a sootheene, ni aYixrayeli ti epuumbaaweene – Yave a ikuru sootheene ti Nsinanawe." 
Jeremiah10:17 Nyuwosa munkhala ooriciweene, muthukumanyihe sooreerelasanyu weera mulaxere elapo." 
Jeremiah10:18 Yave oneera ha: “Emaara ela kinimwaavonyera okerekhere yaawo ankhala mweelaponi ela; kinimwaaruuhela othanana otokotoko moota wooweera anoovarasiwa.” 
Jeremiah10:19 Maayi miyo! Koovulala! Nikhwattanaka ti nankoxo. Wa soothesene kohiixeerela: “Ela ti ekwereraaka, ni kintthuneya ovilela.”" 
Jeremiah10:20 Eheemaaka yoophwatiwa; mikhoyisaya sootheene soopasiwa. Anamwanaaka asilopwana aakihiya ni khaawoworu; khahanleru mutthu weera akunge eheemaaka naari weera akipakele wookonawaka. 
Jeremiah10:21 Akukhuli a muloko ti alolo ni khaanimukoherera Yave; tivawo awosa sihingweettelaaya nnene ni muhuwaaya wootheene woomwaramwaxeya. 
Jeremiah10:22 Mwiiwe! Ehaali enrwa – minyakunyaku sitokotoko sinrweela mpatta wa ottuttuwani. Mittetthe sa oYuda sinoophwatiwa, sitatuxiweke mookhalamo akhwatte." 
Jeremiah10:23 Ii! Yave! Koosuwela weera mutthu khanlakela sa muhoolomwawe; mutthu khanghoolela malipaawe. 
Jeremiah10:24 Mukookolele Yave, mene mweekhaikhaiyini paahi – khoohiyono musarani weera muhikimalamalihe woomalela." 
Jeremiah10:25 Muyeehere isarasanyu miloko sihoosuwenleni Nyuwo; miloko sihiniitthana Nsinananyu. Niwoko iyo soomphwata soommira Yakobe woomalela ni soophwata elapwaawe. 
Jeremiah11:1 Masu Yeremiya aakhenlaawe wa Yave ti ala: 
Jeremiah11:2 “Mwiiwe soonyesereriwa sa wiiraana wu ni mwaleele muloko wa oYuda ni wa yaale ankhala oYerusaleemu. 
Jeremiah11:3 Mwaaleele weera Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Oolaphiwa yoole aneera ahiiwelele soonyesereriwa sa wiiraana wu –" 
Jeremiah11:4 mwa weiwo kaalamulenlaaka makholowaanyu, kaakhumihaaka wExipitu, muttukutthani enghaniwa eyuuma.’ Keenre: ‘Mukiiwelele ni mpake sootheene kinoolamulelaakani ni munookhala mulokwaaka ni Miyo Mulukwaanyu." 
Jeremiah11:5 Vano kinookwanihera yoororomeliha kaapakenlaaka makholowaanyu ni nlipelo weera kinimwaavaha elapo yoosareya mukaka ni oravo’ – eyo tiiyo elapo eri yawinyu olelo.” Miyo kaamwaakhula: “Ame* Yave.” 
Jeremiah11:6 Yave aakeerela: “Mwalaleere masu ootheene ala mmittettheni sa oYuda ni mmiseweni sa oYerusaleemu: ‘Mwiiwe soonyesereriha sa wiiraana wu ni mutthareke. 
Jeremiah11:7 Okhuma ehuhuweene yeele kaakhumihalaaka makholowaanyu wExipitu mpaka olelo kannawooperera keeraka: “Mukiiwelele.” 
Jeremiah11:8 Vaheera awosa khayaakiiwale hata khayaakipwantthe; ohiyanawaya yaatthara ettiyamaaru ya mirimasaya soonanara. Tivawo kaaruuhenlaaka malapho ootheene ala a wiiraana kaalamulenlaaka otthara, awosa ehiiwelelaka.’ ”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Vano Yave aakeerela: “Wookhala ovaanelela variyari wa muloko wa oYuda ni yaawo ankhala oYerusaleemu. 
Jeremiah11:10 Awosa aahokoleela soottheka sa makholowaaya mwa yaawo yaakhoontte wiiwelela maswaaka, ettharaka miluku sikina weera erumeele. Ipuumba sootheene sa oYixrayeli ni sa oYuda khasiiwelenle wiiraanawaka kaapakenlaaka makholowaaya." 
Jeremiah11:11 Yave oneera ha: ‘Kinimwaaruuhela erisa mwa yeeyo eneeraaya ehiwere woopowa. Naari ekikhuwelelaka, Miyo nkiwiiwa." 
Jeremiah11:12 Vano mittetthe sa oYuda ni amaki a oYerusaleemu anookhuwelela miluku mwa seiyo anghiseraaya erubani*, mene iyo khasirwa saavuluxa yaaphwanyaka erisa." 
Jeremiah11:13 Ii! oYuda, nyuwo mookhalano miluku sincipale ntoko waatta wa mittetthesanyu ni waatta wa altaaraanyu* mwiitekenlaanyu weera munghisere erubani* mulukweene yoowo wa mwiikho Bahali*, ori ntoko waatta wa misewe sa oYerusaleemu.’" 
Jeremiah11:14 Ni nyuwo, Yeremiya, muhivekelele muloko ola naari muhidyoonttelele mwaha wa yoowo; muhikidyoonttelele, niwoko nkirwa kiwiiwaani." 
Jeremiah11:15 Eheeni ompakaawe oosiveleyaaka Mpaanimwaka eerelaka olokottha? Weeraka soolipela ni enama yootteelihiwa sinoosembiha nttaruxo? Vano wakhala hiiho, weeraka munoowera otthapa?" 
Jeremiah11:16 Yave oowiitthanani mwiri wa sooliveira* woopombaxa orino soowiima sooreeraxa. Vaheera Owo onoohisa mwiri ola ni oruma wa ettheku etokotoko, ni iphandisaya sinoovonyoliwa.”" 
Jeremiah11:17 Yave a ikuru sootheene, ophatteiye, ohoorumihelani erisa, niwoko ipuumba sa oYuda ni oYixrayeli soopaka soonanara sitannyaka isarasaka woomuhisera erubani* Bahali*." 
Jeremiah11:18 Miyo kaaleeliwa niwoko Yave aakoonihera; Nyuwo mookoonihera yeeyo amvaanelelaaya. 
Jeremiah11:19 Kaari ntoko eputtiputthi yoomaala eronghiwaka owiiviwani; nkaasuwela weera aakivaanelela. Awosa yeenre: “Niphwate mwiri ni soowiimasaya; nuuhe mweelaponi mwa akumi weera nsinanawe nihuupuweleliwetho.” 
Jeremiah11:20 Ii! Yave a ikuru sootheene, Mphuki a ekhaikhai munoota murima ni soowuupuwela sa omutthu, kingweherera woona owiinlelawanyu ikukuttula niwoko mulattwaaka kingwinnyererani Nyuwo." 
Jeremiah11:21 Asilopwana a wAnatoti animwaasa okumaanyu, yeeraka: “Muhithalihere otthuna wa Yave mwa Nsinanawe weera muhiiviwe.” Vano, Yave oneera ha mwaha wa yaawo," 
Jeremiah11:22 aani, oneera ha mwaha wa yaawosa: “Kinimwaattaruxa. Amiravowaaya animwiiviwa ni ikatana ni anamwanaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana ni etala." 
Jeremiah11:23 Khawoworu anaahale mwa yaawo, niwoko kinimwaaruuhela erisa asilopwana a wAnatoti vayaakhani ya ottaruxiwawaya.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 Ii! Yave, khula emaara kinooruuhelaakani mulattu, Nyuwo munlakela ni ekhaikhai. Wa soothesene, kintthuna wuuluma ni Nyuwo mwaha wa ekhaikhayaanyu. Atakhali singweettelela heeni nnene? Anamavariha ootheene ahinkhalanela heeni milattu?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Nyuwo mohaaphatteya ni awosa aaphuwa mikwankhwaari; annunnuwa, eniima. Mahuku ootheene Nyuwo muri vayanoniwaya, mene ottaiwene wa mirimasaya." 
Jeremiah12:3 Wa soothesene mookisuwela miyo, Yave; munkoona, mootaka murima soowuupuwelasaka mwaha wa Nyuwo. Mwaavenxe atakhali ntoko ikhondoolo sinroihiwa owiiviwani. Ngwuurelele nihuku na wiiviwa!" 
Jeremiah12:4 Mpaka yaakhani elapo yiinanelaka ni malaxi a ntuphini enyaalaka? Axinama ni ipalame aaphwatiwa niwoko amaki a elapo aasareya otakhala. Ohiya toko yeeyo – atthu aneera: “Owo khoona ommaleloniwahu.” 
Jeremiah12:5 “Nyuwo mwaatthimankeene ni atthu munakhulumuliwa, vano moota heeni muneeraanyu mutthimake ni ikavalu*? Mwakwattuliwa mweelaponi yoothatawala, mmwiwere hai moothakoni mwa oYordanu?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Mpaka axunninyuweene ni amusaanyu xaxaxa ahoovarihani; awosa anoottharelelani ekhuwelaka. Muhaaroromele, naari yooleelakani itthu sooreera." 
Jeremiah12:7 Koohiya empaaka ni yoohiyeraaka. Kinoomwinnyerera yoowo kinimusivelaaka mmatatani mwa amwiittanaawe. 
Jeremiah12:8 Yoohiyeraaka yookithatuwela mwatto ntoko a moothakoni. Eyo enkoopela murika, tivawo kinthanyaaka." 
Jeremiah12:9 Yoohiyeraaka yookithatuwela ntoko enyatta ya kusupa sinaraaraayamo ipalame sa wiirimu. Mwaathukumanyihe axinama a ntuphini ootheene; mwaaruuhe ofestani. 
Jeremiah12:10 Akukhuli ancipale aananariha emattaaka ya iwuuva* enyikhalelaka yeeyo; awosa aatatuxa emattaaka yooreeraxa nikare noophwatiwa. 
Jeremiah12:11 Eyo aapaka elapo yoophwatiwa, yoowuumelela ni yoothaamiwa vamaithoniwaka; elapo yootheene yoophwatiwa, mene khawowo ompwatthela." 
Jeremiah12:12 Anamaphwata animoowa eviraviraka mmattumuxani oowuumelela onikareni, niwoko ekatana ya Yave enoophwata elapo yootheene eyo. Khawowo anaakhale oolipeene." 
Jeremiah12:13 Awosa yaahaala etrigu, mene ahemphe nyiiwa; wohaakhulumula ovara muteko woohiruwera etthu. Vano, awosa anuulihiheya muru ni ohepha niwoko na isara sitokotoko sa Yave.”" 
Jeremiah12:14 Yave oneera ha mwaha wa amwaattamanaaka ootheene, miloko sootakhala sinaakamela yoohiyeriwa kaavanghaaka aYixrayeli mulokwaaka: “Kinoowaakha mweelaponimwaya ni kinoovenxa oYuda eriyaraaya." 
Jeremiah12:15 Vaheera kivenxaleene, kinoomorelatho ikharari ni kinoomuhokoloxera khula mutthu yoohiyeriwaawe ni elapwaawe." 
Jeremiah12:16 Vano awosa aaxuttera nnenesene ekhovelelo ya mulokwaaka ni yaalipela mwa Nsinanaka yeeraka: ‘Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave’ – ntoko khalayi yaaxuttinghaaya mulokwaaka omulipela Bahali* – vano anookhalihiwa variyari wa mulokwaaka. 
Jeremiah12:17 Vaheera awosa yaahikiiwelela, kinimwaavenxa, kaaphwataka woomalela,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah13:1 Vano Yave aakeerela ha: “Murowe ni mwamuthume laamba a eliinyu*, mungware, mene muhimunaanihe.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 Vano kaamuthuma laamba ntoko Yave aakilamulenlaawe, kinangwara." 
Jeremiah13:3 Vano Yave aahuulumatho ni miyo eeraka: 
Jeremiah13:4 “Munkuxe laamba munthummaanyu ni muningwaraanyu, muroweno wEfratesi ni mwaamusungewo munikhukuni.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 Vano kaarowa, kinamusunga wEfratesi ntoko Yave aakilamulenlaawe." 
Jeremiah13:6 Eviraleene mahuku mancipale, Yave aakeerela: “Murowe vano wEfratesi ni mwamukuxe laamba koolamulenlaakani omusungawo.”" 
Jeremiah13:7 Vanonto, kaarowa wEfratesi, kinamuthupulula laamba kimvenxaka vanipuroni kaamusungalaakawo, mene vano aari oowuntta ni oohimutekoru." 
Jeremiah13:8 Vano Yave aahuulumatho ni miyo eeraka: 
Jeremiah13:9 “Yave oneera ha: ‘Mooteene yoowo kinoonanariha wiikuxa wa oYuda ni wiixoona otokotoko wa oYerusaleemu. 
Jeremiah13:10 Muloko ola wootakhala onkhootta wiiwa maswaaka, ottharaka ettiyamaaru ya mirimasaya, orumeelaka miluku sikina weera olape, okhaleke ntoko laamba ola – oohimutekoru." 
Jeremiah13:11 Vano mooteene yoowo laamba onlipihaawe eyuunu ya mutthu, hiihotho koolipiha oYuda ni oYixrayeli wootheene weera okivarexexe, ni weera okhale mulokwaaka wa epilaaka, ottottopelawaka ni nttittimihonaka,’ onghima Yave. ‘Wa soothesene awosa khayaakiiwale.’" 
Jeremiah13:12 “Mwaaleeletho: ‘Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: Khula nipoottoro nisarihiweke eviinyu.’ Awosa yaaweerelakani: ‘Noosuwela weera khula nipoottoro nisarihiweke eviinyu,’" 
Jeremiah13:13 vano mwaaleele: ‘Yave oneera ha: Kinoopakiha weera ootheene ankhala mweelaponi ela ehapalasiwe vamoha ni mamwene ankilaathi vahiceni ya emwene ya Davide, asaserdoti*, maprofeeti ni ootheene ankhala oYerusaleemu." 
Jeremiah13:14 Kinimwaanyaanya kaathataanyeraka mpaka asitiithi ni anamwanaaya asilopwana, onghima Yave. Hata ikharari hata murima wooreera naari osivela khookikhoottiha waaphwata.’”" 
Jeremiah13:15 Mwiiwe nnenesene ni muhiixoone, niwoko Yave ohuuluma." 
Jeremiah13:16 Mumvuvihe Yave Mulukwaanyu ahinaaye oruuhela epiphi ni, inaawosananyu sihinaaye okwakwathuwa mmattumuxani oosareya epiphi. Nyuwo mungweherera waara, mene Owo onootatuxa epiphixa, aani Owo onootatuxa ewiriphi." 
Jeremiah13:17 Mene nyuwo mwaahiiwa, kinimwiinla muxiirini niwoko na wiixoonawanyu. Kinimwiinlaxa ni maithwaaka anoosareya maithori, niwoko muhuwo wa Yave onooronghiwa wootthukiwani." 
Jeremiah13:18 Mwamuleele mwene ni naangolo pwiyamwene: “Mukhuruwe vahiceniwanyu, niwoko icireembasanyu sa emwene soovuwa sinoomoroxiwa.”" 
Jeremiah13:19 Isidade sa oNegeba sinoowaliwa ni khawoworu aneera awere ohula. aYuda ootheene anooroihiwa wootthukiwani; aani anooroihiwa ottaiwene. 
Jeremiah13:20 Yerusaleemu, muhuleke maithwaanyu ni ngwoone yaawo anrweela mpatta wa ottuttuwani. Ori woowi muhuwo mwinnyereriwaanyu; ikhondoolo mwa seiyo mwiixooneraanyuno?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Mmuhimeni mwaalamuliwaka ni yaawo mwaawiiraananaanyu? Munimoona ovoreya ntoko muthiyana ayaraka. 
Jeremiah13:22 Vano nyuwo mwiikoha: “Eyo enkikhumelelelani?” Vano musuwele weera ti niwoko na sootthekasanyu sincipale ikuwosanyu sivenuleliwaaya ni nyuwo moopuheriwa. 
Jeremiah13:23 Apaale muKuxe onoowera oceendya oriipawawe? Apaale havara onoowera oceendya malepaawe? Mooteene yoowo nyuwosa khamungweratho opaka yooreera niwoko mookhovelela opaka soonanara. 
Jeremiah13:24 “Kinimoomwaraxani ntoko makamba amvavihiwa ni epheyo ya munikareni. 
Jeremiah13:25 Ola ti mpattaanyu ni yeeyo koolakelenlaakani,” onghima Yave, “niwoko mookittiwala ni moororomela miluku soolokottha." 
Jeremiah13:26 Yoomeene kinoovenula soowarasanyu mpaka ekhovaanyu weera wuulihiheyawanyu muru wooneye. 
Jeremiah13:27 Miyo kohoona mitekosanyu sa mwiikho, oraruwawanyu ni soohaawelasanyu soonanara, soopuutasanyu sohuuliheya muru mmattumuxani ni mmatta. Ii! Wa nyuwo, oYerusaleemu! Mpaka yaakhani muneeraanyu mpwaherere okhala oohitteela?”" 
Jeremiah14:1 Masu Yeremiya aakhenlaawe wa Yave mwaha wa etala ti ala: 
Jeremiah14:2 “oYuda onlalamika ni isidadesaya simporora; amakaaya aniilalamikela yuuramenleene vathi ni okhuwelaxiwa ongweela oYerusaleemu. 
Jeremiah14:3 Maneethi anaaruma arumeiyaaya orika maahi; awosa anoorowa mmattankhini, mene khaamphwanyamo. Vano awosa anghokolowa ehikunxe maahi oopororeene ni ehoonaka yooweera aniikhuneela muru." 
Jeremiah14:4 Etthaya yohuumelela niwoko khayaarumpe epula; anamalima aapororaxa yiikhuneelaka mmuru. 
Jeremiah14:5 Mpakatho naahe mutuphini onimuhiya mwaaxaana ooyariwa vaanaano niwoko khaawowo malaxi. 
Jeremiah14:6 Abuuru a ntuphini ampwaherera weemela mmattumuxani oowuumelela emumulaka ntoko akhwatte; maithwaaya anaasaasaxa malaxi, mene khaawowo.”" 
Jeremiah14:7 Ii! Yave! Naari sootthekasahu sinikhalelaka onamoona, dyoontte, munikhavihere moosivelani wa Nsinananyu. Vano ohiroromeleyawahu wootepa; nohootthekelani." 
Jeremiah14:8 Ii! Oweherera wa oYixrayeli ni Mvuluxaaya mweehuhuni yoovalaveliha, heeni munkhalaanyu ntoko namarwa mweelaponi, ntoko namukwaha omviriha ohiyu mmoha paahi?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Heeni munkhalaanyu ntoko mutthu ovariwe wootutuxereya, ntoko nakhotto ohingwera ovuluxa? Nyuwo muri variyariwahu, Yave, ni hiyo ti awinyu; muhinihiye!" 
Jeremiah14:10 Vano Yave oneera ha mwaha wa muloko ola: “Awosa ansivela oxoraxora; awosa khaangwehaweha weettawaya. Tivawo Yave ohingwaakhulelaawe; Owo vano onimuupuwelela soonanarasaya ni onimwaattaruxa niwoko na sootthekasaya.” 
Jeremiah14:11 Vano Yave aakeerela: “Muhivekelele weetteleya nnene wa muloko ola. 
Jeremiah14:12 Naari etthukaka, Miyo nkirwa kiwiiwa okhuwelawaya; naari epakaka sooveleela soohisa ni sa etrigu, nkirwa kiwaakhulela. Ohiyanawaya, kinimwaaphwata ni ekatana, etala ni nihooxo.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 Mene miyo kaamweerela: “Ii! Yave onlamula sootheene, maprofeeti ampwaherera waaleela atthu: ‘Nyuwosa khamurwa moona ekatana hata ohaawa etala. Miyo kinimoovahani murettele woohimala vanipuroni nna.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Vano Yave aakeerela: “Maprofeeti anthalihera soowootha mwa Nsinanaka. Miyo nkaaruminghe, hata nkaakhalinghe naari nkuulumme ni yaawo. Awosa anoothaliherani nyoonelo soowootha, sootthoma soohimuteko, ni masu a mmurumwaya." 
Jeremiah14:15 Tivawo Yave oneeraawe ha mwaha wa maprofeeti anthalihera masu a maprofeeti mwa Nsinanaka: Miyo nkaaruminghe, hata hiiho awosa aneera: ‘Kheewowo ekatana naari etala eneera etave elapo ela.’ Vano maprofeeti yaaweene animwiiviwa ni ekatana ni etala." 
Jeremiah14:16 Ni wa yaawo anaathaliheraaya anoovonyerasiwa mmiseweni sa oYerusaleemu niwoko na ekatana ni etala. Khawowo aneera ahale weera aavithe naari axaaraaya, anamwane asilopwana hoye hoye asithiyana. Miyo kinimwaamoroxela erisa awosa amphwanelaaya." 
Jeremiah14:17 “Mwaaleele ha: ‘Maithwaaka esareyeke maithori ohiyu ni othana woohihiyerera, niwoko mwanaka oowiikosoopa, mulokwaaka, oovulalaxa, oomaniwa moota woowoopiha." 
Jeremiah14:18 Miyo karowa ntuphini, kingwoona yaawo yiiviwe ni ekatana; miyo kavolowa musidade, kimmoona noomala a etala. Maprofeeti ni asaserdoti* aarowa elapo ahisuwenlaaya.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:19 Nyuwo moomuhiya Yuda moota woomalela? Nyuwo moomuramusa Siyoni? Heeni munihasunlaanyu moota wooweera khaningweratho olama? Naaweherera murettele, mene khanoonneru. Naaweherera ehuhu ya olama, mene oriwo otteenguwa paahi." 
Jeremiah14:20 Ii! Yave, nohoonelela sootakhalasahu ni nthowa na makholowaahu; vekhaikhai, nohootthekelani." 
Jeremiah14:21 Mwaha wa Nsinananyu muhiniramuse; muhiveihe ehicaanyu ya emwene yoovuwaxa. Muupuwelele wiiraanawanyu ni hiyo ni muhimalihe. 
Jeremiah14:22 Khoowowo hata mmoha wa miluku soohimuteko sa miloko ongwera orupiha epula. Erimu muneenaaya kheengwera orupiha epula. Ti Nyuwo paahi, Yave Mulukwaahu mungwera. Tivawo owehererawahu oraaya mwa Nyuwo, niwoko ti Nyuwo mumpaka sootheehe seiyo." 
Jeremiah15:1 Vano Yave aakeerela: “Naari Moisesi ni Samuweli yaakhanle ohoolowaka evekelelaka muloko ola, hata hiiho nkaamorela ikharari muloko. Moomole ohoolowaka. Muloko owo opwaheke!" 
Jeremiah15:2 Vano, awosa yookohani: ‘Niroweke woowi?’ Vano mwaaleele: ‘Yave oneera ha: Yaawosa alakeleliwe wiiviwa, animwiiviwa; yaawosa alakeleliwe ekatana, anookakatthiwa; yaawosa alakeleliwe etala, anoohaawa etala ni yaawosa alakeleliwe wootthukiwani, anooronghiwa wootthukiwani.’" 
Jeremiah15:3 Kinimwaarumihela nyoota mixexe sa anamaphwata,” onghima Yave, “ekatana weera ewiive, alapwa weera yaapurule ni ipalame sa wiirimu ni axinama a ntuphini weera yaalume ni yaaphwate." 
Jeremiah15:4 Miyo kinimwaapaka yaawo etthu yoowoopiha wa omwene wootheene wa mweelaponi, niwoko na yeeyo Manaxe, mwaana mulopwana a Hizekiya, mwene a oYuda, opankaawe oYerusaleemu." 
Jeremiah15:5 Taani anoomoreleni ikharari oYerusaleemu? Taani anoolalamikeleni? Taani aneemele akohaka muri salaama? 
Jeremiah15:6 Nyuwo mookihiya,” onghima Yave, “nyuwo mumpwaherera okhala oohapuweene. Tivawo kineeraaka kootaveeni koophwatakani; nkingweratho woomorelani ikharari." 
Jeremiah15:7 Miyo kinimwaaveerela musidade sa elapweene yeela ntoko makamba. Kinooruuhela mulokwaaka olalamika ni ophwatiwa, niwoko awosa khaanceendya iphirosaya." 
Jeremiah15:8 Kinoopakiha weera asinaamukhwelaaya yaattaxe opwaha ihaava sa mphareiya. Othana eriyari kinimwaaruuhela asimaayi a amiravowaaya asilopwana namaphwata; wootutuxereya kinimwaaruuhela woova ni otteenguwa. 
Jeremiah15:9 Maayi a anamwane athanneeli onookomoka, akhweeke. Wa yoowo onoomwiilela nsuwa nreene vamuru. Owo onimuulihiheya muru ni onooyeviheya. Yaawo eniihalahale kinoowinnyerera ophwatiwa ni ekatana ohoolo wa amwiittanaaya,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah15:10 Ii! Wa nyuwo, maayi, mukiyanre, niwoko koothanyiwa ni kooramusiwa ni atthu ootheene a elapo yootheene. Miyo nkinoolihihe naari nkinoolihe, hata hiiho ootheene anookilapha." 
Jeremiah15:11 Yave aaheera: “Vekhaikhai, Miyo kinimoolipiherani mpuha, Yeremiya ni kinimookhaviherani. Vekhaikhai mweehuhuni ya erisa ni ya makacamiho kinoopakiha weera amwiittanaanyu yoodyoontteleleni." 
Jeremiah15:12 Ookhala ongwera wiintaka eyuuma – eyuuma enrweela mpatta wa ottuttuwani – hoye hoye ebronze*? 
Jeremiah15:13 Muleele muloko ola: Kinoovaha mmahalani sooreelasanyu ni mihakhusanyu ntoko soohuhuliwa niwoko na sootthekasanyu sootheene mweelaponimwanyu yootheene. 
Jeremiah15:14 Kinimootatuxani ipottha sa amwiittanaanyu mulaponi muhisuwenlaanyu, niwoko isarasaka sinimoopattelasani.”" 
Jeremiah15:15 Nyuwo Yave mookisuwela; mukuupuwelele ni mukikosoope. Mukiinlelele ikukuttula anamattharattharaaka. Nyuwo muri a murima woopixa – muhikivenxe. Muhittiwale weera kinghaawa oramusiwa niwoko na Nsinananyu. 
Jeremiah15:16 Maswaanyu yaarwiiyaaya, miyo kaahooca yaawo; awo ti ohakalalawaka ni otteeliwawaka murima, niwoko miyo kohiitthaniwa mwa Nsinananyu, Yave, Muluku a ikuru sootheene." 
Jeremiah15:17 Nkinakilaathi vamoha ni atakhali hata nkipankeru ifestasaya. Kikilaathiye meekhaaka niwoko ntatananyu naari osuluwaka ni mookisariha ohiphwanela. 
Jeremiah15:18 Heeni ohimmalaaya ovoreiwawaka ni nikhwattanaka nintepelani nihivolaka? Mukitatuxerenleni ntoko nxaapwa noowelela ahinkhwalalaayawo anaattuuttu? 
Jeremiah15:19 Tivawo Yave oneeraawe ha: “Mwarukunxa murimaanyu, Miyo kinimoorehererani moota wooweera mukirumeeletho. Nyuwo mwahima masu a ekhaikhai, ehikhalaka oohiphwanela, munookhala namutthengaaka. Muloko ola ohokoleeleke wa nyuwo, mene nyuwo muhirowe wa yoowo." 
Jeremiah15:20 Kinimoopakani exiri wa muloko ola, exiri ya ebronze*; awosa animoowananani, mene kheerwa yoowinaani, niwoko Miyo kiri ni Nyuwo weera kiwoopoleni ni koovuluxeni,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah15:21 “Kinimoovuluxani mmatatani mwa atakhali ni kinoowoopolani mwa mmankharuni mwa anamapuhera.” 
Jeremiah16:1 Vano Yave aahuulumatho ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Jeremiah16:2 “Muhithele naari muhaayare anamwane asilopwana hoye hoye asithiyana vanipuroni nna.” 
Jeremiah16:3 Vano yeeyo Yave onghimaawe mwaha wa anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana ayareliwe mweelaponi ela ni mwaha wa asithiyana ari asimayaya ni asilopwana ari asitithaya ti ela: 
Jeremiah16:4 “Awosa sinoowiiva iretta soowoopiha. Khaawo anaakhupanyere awosa hata kheevithiwa, mene anookhala ntoko ikokhola vatthayani. Animwiiviwa ni ekatana ni etala ni mittembosaya sinookhala sooca wa ipalame sa wiirimu ni axinama a ntuphini.”" 
Jeremiah16:5 Vano Yave oneera ha: “Muhivoloweru mpaani oraawemo nookhwa, muhirowe olalamika hata woonihera ikharari, niwoko Miyo koovenxa nreelihonaka, osivelawaka, murimaaka wooreera mwa muloko ola,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah16:6 “Okhuma maneethi mpaka asikhaani animookhwa mweelaponi ela. Awosa kheevithasiwa naari kheelalamikeliwa ni khaawo aneera iipophe naari ametthe mwaha wa yaawosa.
