Jeremiah16:7 Khaawo anaavahe yooca yoowaalipihera yaale angwiinlela anamakhwa ni khaawo anaavahe yoowura ya opepesa – hata wa tiithi naari wa maayi. 
Jeremiah16:8 Muhivolowetho mpaani empakiwamo efesta, mukilaathikino weera mwace ni mwawure ni yaawo." 
Jeremiah16:9 Vano Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli, oneera ha: Vamaithoniwanyu ni mweehuhuni ya okumaanyu kinoomalamaliha oruma wa ohakalala ni otteeliwa murima ni wa masu a ootthomeriwa ni namatthomera vanipuroni nna." 
Jeremiah16:10 Nyuwo mwaathaliheraka muloko ola sootheene iya ni awosa yookohani: ‘Yave olakelenle heeni erisa yoowoopiha ela wa hiyo? Nipankeni yootakhala heeni hoye hoye yoottheka heeni nimpakenlaahu Yave Mulukwaahu?’ 
Jeremiah16:11 Vano mwaaleele yaawo: ‘Ti niwoko na okihiya wa makholowaanyu,’ onghima Yave, ‘ni na otthara miluku sikina erumeelaka ni elapaka seiyo. Awosa yaakihiya ni khayiiwelenle Nlamulonaka." 
Jeremiah16:12 Vaheera nyuwosa mootepihaxa waapwaha makholowaanyu. Moone moota khula mutthu a nyuwo onttharaawe ettiyamaaru ya murimaawe woonanara, ohiya okiiwelela Miyo." 
Jeremiah16:13 Tivawo kineeraaka koovonyereni ottai wa elapo ela, mweelaponi hata nyuwo naari makholowaanyu yahaasuwenlaaya ni weiwo munkela orumeelawo miluku sikina othana ni ohiyu, niwoko nkoomorelasanitho ikharari.’”" 
Jeremiah16:14 “Wa soothesene, anoophiyera mahuku,” onghima Yave, “asilopwana eneeraaya eheeretho: ‘Ninlipela mwa Nsina na Yave, mwa Yoowo aakhumihale aYixrayeli wExipitu,’" 
Jeremiah16:15 mene awosa animweera: ‘Ninlipela mwa Nsina na Yave, mwa Yoowo aakhumihale aYixrayeli mweelaponi mwa ottuttuwani ni mweelaponi sootheene mwa weiwo aawoomolenlaawewo.’ Vano kinimwaahokoloxera mweelaponimwaya, mwa yeeyo kaavanghaaka makholowaaya." 
Jeremiah16:16 Vanonto, kinoowiitthana anamamesera ancipale,” onghima Yave, “ni awosa animwaamesera. Vahoolowaya kinoowiitthana anamalupattha ancipale ni awosa animwaalupattha mmanyaakoni sootheene, mmattumuxani ni mmakhukuni." 
Jeremiah16:17 Maithwaaka annoona iphirosaya sootheene; awosa khayiipithiheiye vamaithoniwaka ni hiihotho sootthekasaya. 
Jeremiah16:18 Kinimwaattaruxa moota woopwahaxa wa sootakhalasaya ni sootthekasaya, niwoko awosa yaaveiha elapwaaka ni icaambulosaya sa mwiikho ni aasariha yoohiyeraaka ni milukusaya sa mwiikho.”" 
Jeremiah16:19 Ii! Yave! Ikurusaka ni Nipuronaka noolipaxa, Wootthawelawaka mweehuhuni yoowoopiha, vano miloko sinimoowa wa Nyuwo okhuma ekotenle elapo seeraka: “Makholowaahu yaakhalano miluku soowootha paahi, soohimuteko sihaapakenleru yooreera." 
Jeremiah16:20 Mutthu onkhwa onoowera opaka milukusawe? Aani, mene iyo khasinkhala miluku!”" 
Jeremiah16:21 “Tivawo kineeraaka kaaxuttihe; emaara ela kinimwaaxuttiha sa ikurusaka ni owerawaka. Vano anoosuwela weera Nsinanaka ti Yave.” 
Jeremiah17:1 “Yoottheka ya oYuda yoolempwa ni ikaruma sa eyuuma; yoolempwa ni elaapixi yoolipaxa vatthaabwani sa mirimasaya ni mmanyakani mwa altaaraaya*. 
Jeremiah17:2 Mpakatho anamwanaaya angwuupuwelela altaaraaya* ni nyirisaya soothipeleliwa sa Axera mukerekhere nyiri soopombaxa, mmattumuxani oorakamela," 
Jeremiah17:3 ni mmanyaakoni sa ntuphini. Kinimwaavaha akina mihakhusanyu ni sooreerelasanyu sootheene vamoha ni mapurowaanyu ootteela vasulu wa mattumuxa ntoko soohuhuliwa. Eyo enookhala nlivo na sootthekasanyu mwaaltaarini* a miluku sikina mweelaponimwanyu yootheene. 
Jeremiah17:4 Nyuwo munooyeleela okhalano yoohiyeriwaanyu koovanghaakani niwoko na nthowananyu xaxaxa. Kinimoopakani ipottha sa amwiittanaanyu mweelaponi muhisuwenlaanyu, niwoko soopatta isarasaka ni seiyo sinoohisa wa mahuku ootheene.”" 
Jeremiah17:5 Yave oneera ha: “Oolaphiwa ti yoole onimuroromela mutthu, uupuwelaka weera omutthu ti ikurusawe, mene murimaawe omurakamenleene Yave." 
Jeremiah17:6 Owo onookhala ntoko niphuwa na munikareni; khoonaru waarwaaka mpuha. Owo onookhala mmapuroni oowuumelela a munikareni, mweelaponi mwa maakha mwa weiwo ohimmakiwaru." 
Jeremiah17:7 Vaheera ooreelihiwa yoole onimuroromela Yave, aani onimuroromela Yoowo." 
Jeremiah17:8 Owo onookhala ntoko mwiri ophwatteiwale mukerekhere mooloko ni mikwankhwaarisaya sinkhuruwela mmaahini. Mwiri owo khoonoova waarwaaka ovihaxa; makukhwaaya ankhala oorimbeleleene. Khoonghaawela maahi yaahitthula hata khoonghiya wiima.” 
Jeremiah17:9 Murima ti woolokotthaxa opwaha itthu sootheene ni erettaaya ti yoohilameya. Khaawo anaawere wiiwexexa. 
Jeremiah17:10 “Miyo, ti Yave kinoota murima ni kinoona nnenesene soowuupuwelasaya weera khula mutthu kimutthuvele, kittharihaka mweettelowaawe, aani mwa soopakasawe.”" 
Jeremiah17:11 Yoole onkhalano mihakhu moota woohiroromeleya onlikana ni ekhwali empuramela mooce ehirenlaaya. Waaviraka eriyari ya okumaawe mutthu owo, mihakhusawe sinoomuhiya ni ommaleloni onimwiixoonihera weera ti mulolo." 
Jeremiah17:12 Ehice ya emwene yoovuwaxa, evuwihiwe okhuma ompacereroni ti Nipuronahu Nootteela*." 
Jeremiah17:13 Ii! Yave, Oweherera wa oYixrayeli – ootheene anoohiyani Nyuwo anoohaawa wuulihiheya muru. Yaale anoohuluwani, vano masinaaya anoolempwa muntthupini, niwoko na omuhiya Yave, Naattuuttu a maahi a okumi." 
Jeremiah17:14 Ii! Yave, mukilamihe ni miyo kinoolama! Mukivuluxe ni kinoovuluwa, niwoko Nyuwo ti Yoole kinimuttottopelaaka." 
Jeremiah17:15 Aakhala akina ankeerela mahuku ootheene: “Masu a Yave ari woowi? Awo ekhwanihereye!” 
Jeremiah17:16 Miyo nkinkhootta okhala mukukhulaanyu. Munsuwela weera miyo nkaahaawenle nihuku na ohiweherera. Yeeyo kinuulumaaka yoosuwanyeya wa Nyuwo. 
Jeremiah17:17 Muhikhale moopopiherowaaka; Nyuwo ti Wootthawelawaka vanihukuni na erisa. 
Jeremiah17:18 Yaale ankisoonda eyeviheyeke, mene kihikhale miyo; awosa yoopopiheye, mene kihikhale miyo. Mwaaruuhele nihuku na erisa, mwaaphwate woomalelaxa." 
Jeremiah17:19 Vano Yave aakeerela ha: “Murowe ni mweemele vamulako wa Muloko, mwa weiwo mamwene a oYuda amvoleelaaya ni ankhumelaaya; mweemeletho mmilakoni sootheene sikina sa oYerusaleemu." 
Jeremiah17:20 Mwaaleele: ‘Ii! Mamwene a oYuda ni atthu ootheene a oYuda nitho amaki ootheene a oYerusaleemu amvira mmilakoni iya, mwiiwe masu a Yave." 
Jeremiah17:21 Yave oneera ha: Mwiipasoope weera muhiteexeru yoolemela vanihukuni na eSaabadu naari muhivoleihe yeeyo mmilakoni sa oYerusaleemu. 
Jeremiah17:22 Muhikuxeru yoolemela mukhumiheraka vaate, naari muhivareru muteko muSaabaduni, mene mutteelihe eSaabadu, ntoko kaalamulenlaaka makholowaanyu." 
Jeremiah17:23 Wa soothesene awosa khayaakiiwale hata khayaakipwantthe. Yaattiyamaaru ni khayaatthunne wiiwa ehaakhulelaka olakiwa. 
Jeremiah17:24 Vano nyuwo mwiipasoopa weera mukiiwelele,’ onghima Yave, ‘ni mwaahiviriharu yoolemela mmilakoni sa esidade ela vanihukuni na eSaabadu, mene mwatteeliha eSaabadu muhivarakaru wakhalaru muteko," 
Jeremiah17:25 vano mamwene ankilaathi vahiceni ya Davide anoovolowa mmilakoni sa esidade ela vamoha ni anamalakaaya. Awosa ni anamalakaaya animoowa mukaaroni yeettihiwaka ni ikavalu*, ehooliweene ni asilopwana a oYuda ni yaale amanke oYerusaleemu, ni esidade ela enoomakiwa wa mahuku ootheene." 
Jeremiah17:26 Atthu animoowa erweelaka mmittettheni sa oYuda ni sirukureenre oYerusaleemu, mweelaponi ya oBenyamini, ilapo sa vathi wa nyaako, elapo ya oNegeba, eruuhaka Mpaani mwa Yave sooveleela soohisa ni sooveleela sa etrigu, erubani* ni sootthapela." 
Jeremiah17:27 Vaheera mwaahikiiwa muhitteelihaka eSaabadu, mvirihaka yoolemela mmilakoni sa oYerusaleemu vanihukuni na eSaabadu, vano kinoopattiha mooro woohimala mmilakonimwaya oneera ohise moolipamwaya oYerusaleemu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Masu Yeremiya aakhenlaawe wa Yave ti ala: 
Jeremiah18:2 “Murowe vaate wa namoopa ni iwo kinimoovahani mutthengaaka.” 
Jeremiah18:3 Vano kaarowa vaate wa namoopa ni kaamoona avaraka muteko ni nreko. 
Jeremiah18:4 Vano mwaapu oopaawe waampotowela, tivawo namoopa aapankaawetho mwaapu mukina ntoko aatthunaawe." 
Jeremiah18:5 Vano Yave aahuulumatho ni miyo akeerelaka: 
Jeremiah18:6 “Ii! Ikhapira sa oYixrayeli! Weeraka Miyo nkinoopakani nyuwo ntoko opankaawe namoopa?” onkoha Yave. “Ntoko oloko mmatatani mwa namoopa, nyuwo muri hiihotho mmatatanimwaka, ikhapira sa oYixrayeli." 
Jeremiah18:7 Mweehuhuni ekina Miyo kalamulela weera muloko hoye hoye omwene ophwatiwe, onyaanyiwe ni oheliwe nthala," 
Jeremiah18:8 ni muloko owo kooperenraaka waarukunxa murima mwa soonanarasaya, vano kinookhurunuwa ni nkiruuhela erisa kaavaanenlaaka." 
Jeremiah18:9 Ni mweehuhuni ekinatho Miyo kaalamulela weera muloko hoye hoye omwene oraseliwe ni ophatteiwe," 
Jeremiah18:10 ni wapaka soonanara vamaithoniwaka ohikiiwelelaka, vano kinoohiya onnene keeraaka kipakele." 
Jeremiah18:11 Vano mwaaleele atthu a oYuda ni yaale amanke oYerusaleemu: Yave oneera ha: ‘Moone, kinreherera erisa ni woovaanelelani. Tivawo, muhiye iphirosanyu soonanara ni muceendye mweettelowaanyu ni mitekosanyu.’”" 
Jeremiah18:12 “Vaheera awosa animwaakhula: ‘Muhipacere. Nnoopwaherera ni soovaanelasahu; khula mutthu a hiyo onootthara ettiyamaaru ya murimaawe woonanara.’” 
Jeremiah18:13 Tivawo Yave oneeraawe ha: “Mwakohakohe eriyari ya miloko: Ookhala otonke wiiwa itthu ntoko iya? Etthu yoowoopihaxa opankaawe mwali oowiikosoopa, Yixrayeli." 
Jeremiah18:14 Etthabwe ya oLebanoni kheengwereya olakaseya mmanyaakonimwaya. Maahaaya ooriira khaanghiya opiluwa erweelaka mmapuroni a ottai. 
Jeremiah18:15 Wa soothesene mulokwaaka wookittiwala; awosa anghisera erubani* miluku soohimuteko, mwa seiyo sinaakwattuliha mphironimwaya ni mphironi sa khalayi. Iyo sohaatannyera weetta moothweelelani mmiseweni soothipakaseya." 
Jeremiah18:16 Elapwaaya enoheleya nthala, eneneero ya otthebwiwa woohimala; ootheene eniiviremo anootheya, epukunyeraka muru." 
Jeremiah18:17 Kinimwaamwaraxa ohoolo wa amwiittanaaya epheyo enrweela mpatta wa ninkhuma nsuwa. Kinimwaarera ettuli nkinaaweha vanihukuni na owiniwawaya.” 
Jeremiah18:18 Awosa yaaheera: “Nrowe, nimvaanelele Yeremiya; niwoko khanimala nihusiho na Nlamulo na musaserdoti*, hata olaka wa namiruku, naari masu a maprofeeti. Vano, nrowe namoothere weera nihiiwe onghimaawe.”" 
Jeremiah18:19 Ii! Yave, mukiiwe; mwiiwe yeeyo anamootheraaka anghimaaya!" 
Jeremiah18:20 Weeraka eliviweke yooreera mwa yoonanara? Aakithipela miyo elakasa. Muupuwelele weera miyo kaaheemela vamaithoniwanyu kuulumaka mwaha wa yaawo weera muhaapattiyere isarasanyu. 
Jeremiah18:21 Vano ngwinnyerere anamwanaaya mutalani ni mukatanani. Axaaraya etatuxiweke asinaamukhweli woohikhalano anamwane; asiiyaya yiiviwe ni amiravowaaya yiiviwetho ni ekatana mukhottoni. 
Jeremiah18:22 Wiiwanyeye okhuwela ongweela mmawannyaya mwaaruuhelaka wootutuxereya anakhotto a elapo ekina, niwoko aathipa elakasa weera ekivare ni aakireya miraakho weera epharihe inaawosaka." 
Jeremiah18:23 Mene ii! Yave, Nyuwo moosuwela okivaanelelawaya okiiva. Muhilevelele sootakhalasaya hata muhittiwale sootthekasaya vamaithoniwanyu. Awosa ephwatiwe ohoolowanyu. Mwaattaruxe mweehuhuni mwa isarasanyu." 
Jeremiah19:1 Yave oneera ha: “Murowe ni mwathume mwaapu wa namoopa. Mwaakuxetho akina a asitokweene ni asaserdoti* 
Jeremiah19:2 ni murowe munreyareyani na oBen-Himoni, vakhiviru wa mulako wa Nivali. Vawo mwalaleiye masu kineeraka kooleeleni," 
Jeremiah19:3 mweeraka: ‘Ii! Mamwene a oYuda ni amaki a oYerusaleemu, mwiiwe masu a Yave. Vano Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: Mwiiwe, kinooruuhela erisa nipuro nna mpaka okhaawa maaru yaawo eneera yiiwe." 
Jeremiah19:4 Vano awosa aakihiya ni aatatuxa nipuro nna nipuro na miluku sa anamarwa; awosa aahisera erubani* miluku mwa seiyo awosa, naari makholowaaya, hata mamwene a oYuda yahaasuwenlaayaru ni aasariha nipuro nna ephome ya oohinthowa." 
Jeremiah19:5 Awosa aamutekela Bahali* mapuro a mmattumuxani wa Bahali* weera yaahiseremo anamwanaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana – etthu Miyo kihitonkwaaka olamulela hata kahuupuwenlaaka. 
Jeremiah19:6 Tivawo, mwiipasoope, anoophiyera mahuku,’ onghima Yave, ‘atthu eneeraaya ehiitthaneletho nipuro nna oTofeti, hoye hoye Nreyareya na oBen-Himoni, mene Nreyareya na Noomala." 
Jeremiah19:7 Vanipuroni nna kinoonanariha soovaanela sa oYuda ni oYerusaleemu. Kinoopakiha weera yiiviwe ni amwiittanaaya mukatanani; mmatatani mwa yaawo anaattharatthara ni kinoovaha mittembosaya ntoko yooca wa ipalame sa wiirimu ni axinama a ntuphini. 
Jeremiah19:8 Kinoophwata esidade ela kitatuxaka eneneero yootthebwiwa; ootheene eniiviremo onoowuuma owanoni etheyeke, niwoko na makhwattaaya ootheene." 
Jeremiah19:9 Kinoopakiha weera yaakhuure anamwanaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana ni awosa anookhuurana mweehuhuni yoohaawa ya oriciwa ni amwiittanaaya anaasaasa okumaaya.’ 
Jeremiah19:10 Vano mpwexe mwaapu ohoolo wa asilopwana yoohoonleni," 
Jeremiah19:11 ni mwaaleele: ‘Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: Kinoopwexa muloko ola ni esidade ela mooteene yoowo omphweeyaaya mwaapu ola wa namoopa ohiwereyaka orehereratho. Awosa animwaavitha anamakhwa oTofeti mpaka omala mapuro. 
Jeremiah19:12 Ti yeeyo kineeraka kipakele nipuro nna ni amakaaya, onghima Yave, Kinoopakela esidade ela ntoko oTofeti." 
Jeremiah19:13 Impa sa oYerusaleemu ni sa mamwene a oYuda sinooveihiwa ntoko nipuro nna na oTofeti – impa sootheene mwa seiyo itaratosaya yaahisenraaya erubani* ithenyeeri sa wiirimu ni yaayeehenraaya soowura miluku sikina.’ ” 
Jeremiah19:14 Vano Yeremiya aahokolowa oTofeti mwa weiwo Yave aamurumihenlaawe weera athaliherewo otthuna wa Muluku, aneemela vanipuwani na Empa ya Yave ni aaweerela atthu ootheene:" 
Jeremiah19:15 “Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Mwiiwe, kinooruuhela esidade ela ni mittetthe sa mukhwipimwaya irisa sootheene kaalaleenraaka niwoko khayiiwelenle, ehitthunaka wiiwa maswaaka.’”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Vano Paxuri, mwaana mulopwana a Imeri, mutokweene oopacera Mpaani mwa Yave iiwalaawe seiyo Yeremiya aathalihenraawe mwaha wa otthuna wa Muluku," 
Jeremiah20:2 aalamula weera Yeremiya amaniwe ni atthukeleliwe vatthaabwani vamulako mutokweene wa Benyamini ori vakhiviru wa Empa ya Yave. 
Jeremiah20:3 Oxaawaya, Paxuri amutaphulaka vatthaabwani, Yeremiya aamweerela: “Nsina Yave onoottehaaweni khanihiyono Paxuri, mene Magor-Misabibi*." 
Jeremiah20:4 Vano Yave oneera ha: ‘Kinimoopakelani yoowoopihaanyu ni wa asinthamwenaanyu ootheene. Nyuwo munimoona ni maithwaanyu xaxaxa amwiittanaanyu yaawiivaka asinthamenaanyu. Kinimwinnyerera muloko wootheene wa oYuda mmatatani mwa mwene a oBabiloniya mwa yoowo anaaronghe oBabiloniya, awiivaka ni ekatana." 
Jeremiah20:5 Kinimwinnyerera mmatatani mwa amwiittanaaya mihakhu sootheene sa esidade ela, sooruwerasaya, itthusaya sootheene ni mihakhu sootheene sa mamwene a oYuda. Awosa anookuxa ntoko soohuhula, erongheke oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah20:6 Ni nyuwo, Paxuri, ni emusaanyu yootheene munookhala ntoko anamatthukiwa oBabiloniya. Wu munimookhwa ni munoovithiwa – nyuwo ni asithamwenaanyu ootheene mwa yaawo mwaathalihenraanyu soowootha mwa Nsina na Yave.’”" 
Jeremiah20:7 Ii! Yave, Nyuwo mookilokottha ni koolokottheya ni Nyuwo; Nyuwo mwaari a ikuruxa okipwahaxa miyo ni moowina. Miyo kintthebwiwa mahuku ootheene; ootheene anookitheya." 
Jeremiah20:8 Miyo kaalaleiyaka, kintthuneya olaleiya nipuhero ni ophwata. Vano masu a Yave ankiruuhela oveihiwa ni otthebwiwa mahuku ootheene." 
Jeremiah20:9 Vaheera miyo keera: “Nkimuromolatho hata nkuuluma mwa Nsinananyu,” maswaanyu anlikana mooro ovarelaka mmurimanimwaka; mooro mpuwa mwa makhuvaaka. Miyo kookhulumuwa niwoko na yeeyo; nkingwera opwaherera moota hiiho." 
Jeremiah20:10 Kiniiwa soowaapa sincipale: “Woova wa mipatta sootheene! Munthoonye! Nrowe Nimuthoonye!” Asinthamwenaaka ootheene angweherera weera kitapanye, yeeraka: “Apaale onoolokhotteya, ni vano ninoongwina ni nimwiinleleke ikukuttula.”" 
Jeremiah20:11 Vaheera Yave ori ni miyo ntoko nakhotto ooweraxa; tivawo yaawo ankisoonda eneeraaya ekwattuliwe, ehiwinaka. Awosa animuulihiheya muru woomalela; overuliwawaya khoottiwaliwa." 
Jeremiah20:12 Ii! Yave a ikuru sootheene, Nyuwo mungwehaweha murima wa oororomeleya ni munoota murima ni soowuupuwela, mukihiye koone owiinlelawanyu ikukuttula, niwoko kininnyerera mulattwaaka mwa Nyuwo." 
Jeremiah20:13 Mmwiipele Yave! Munttottopele Yave! Owo onoopola okumi wa oohaawa mmatatani mwa atakhali. 
Jeremiah20:14 Noolaphiwa nikhale nihuku kiyariwaaka! Nihuku amayaka yaakiyanraaya nihireelihiweru! 
Jeremiah20:15 Oolaphiwa akhale mulopwana aathalihenre atithaka ihaali sa oyariwawaka; yoole aahakalalinghe, aweerelaka: “Nyuwo tiithi a mwaana mulopwana!”" 
Jeremiah20:16 Mulopwana owo akhaleke ntoko isidade Yave aaphwantaawe woohimorela ikharari. Owo iiweke okhuweleliwa ekhavihero mooxeexeloni ni okhuweleliwa ekhotto othana. 
Jeremiah20:17 Niwoko owo khaakiivale miyo mmirimani mwa amayaka ntoko nihiyenaka, ni hata khaahingye epwahereraka oorupaleene." 
Jeremiah20:18 Kiyareliweni? Woona paahi soohooxa ni soothananiha ni waalikeleleya mahukwaaka ngwuulihiheyaxani muru? 
Jeremiah21:1 Yeremiya aahaakhela masu a Yave mweehuhuni mwene Zedekiya aamurumihalaawe Paxuri, mwaana mulopwana a Malekiya ni musaserdoti* Zefaniya, mwaana mulopwana a Maaseya. Awosa yaamweerela:" 
Jeremiah21:2 “Mwanikohererele Yave niwoko Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya onooniwanano. Apaale Yave onoonipakelatho sootikhinihasawe ntoko aapankaawe khalayi moota wooweera Nebukadenezari onoohokoleela elapwaawe.”" 
Jeremiah21:3 Vaheera Yeremia aawaakhula: “Mwamuleele Zedekiya: 
Jeremiah21:4 ‘Yave Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: Miyo kihanle vakhaani woorukunuwelani ikapwitthi siri mmatatanimwanyu mwa seiyo muningwanelaanyuno mwene a oBabiloniya ni aBabiloniya anooricani vaate wa exiri. Miyo kinimwaathukumanyiha mpuwa mwa eside ela. 
Jeremiah21:5 Miyo muneenaaka kinimoowananani ni ntata noolipaxa, ni moono wooweraxa musarani, moonyoonyiwani wootepaxa." 
Jeremiah21:6 Kinoowiiva amaki a esidade ela – atthu nitho axinama – ni awosa animookhwa ni nihooxo noowoopiha. 
Jeremiah21:7 Vahoolowaya,’ onghima Yave, ‘Miyo kinoomwinnyerera Zedekiya, mwene a oYuda, asitokweenaaya ni amaki a esidade ela eneera ehalahale munihooxoni, mukatanani ni mutalani mmatatani mwa Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya ni mwa amwiittanaaya mwa yaale antthuna owiiva. Nebukadenezari onoowiiva, ahaamorelaka ikharari, hata ihaaya naari murima wooreera.’" 
Jeremiah21:8 Ohiya toko yeeyo, mwaleele muloko: ‘Yave oneera ha: Nnene! Kingwooniherani olelo ephiro ya okumi ni ya okhwa." 
Jeremiah21:9 Yaale eneera ehiixinnyerere mwa aBabiloniya yoorinceni animookhwa ni ekatana, etala hoye hoye nihooxo. Vaheera yaale eneera ekhume yiixinnyereraka mwa aBabiloniya anookhalano okumi. Awo anootthawa yoopoweke." 
Jeremiah21:10 Koolakela opakela yoonanara esidade ela, ehikhanle yooreera, onghima Yave. Eyo enimwinnyereriwa mmatatani mwa mwene a oBabiloniya ni owo onoohisa." 
Jeremiah21:11 Ohiya toko yeeyo, mwaleele emusi ya emwene ya oYuda: ‘Mwiiwe masu a Yave:" 
Jeremiah21:12 Ii! Ekhapira ya Davide, Yave oneera ha: Mpake ekhaikhai khula oxeexelo ni mmoopole mmatatani mwa namahasula yoole ohuhuliwe. Waahikhala hiiho, isarasaka sinoopatta sihiseke ntoko mooro woohicipiheya niwoko na soonanara mumpakaanyu." 
Jeremiah21:13 Kiri Mwiittanaanyu, oYerusaleemu, nyuwo mmanke vasulu vanreyareyani nna vamwala, onghima Yave, aani nyuwo muneera: “Taani anaaniwanane? Taani anaawere ovolowa nipuronahu na otthawelawahu?”" 
Jeremiah21:14 Miyo kinimoottaruxani kittharihaka mitekosanyu, onghima Yave. Miyo kinoopattiha mooro moothakonimwanyu oneera ohise sootheene siri mukhwipimwaya.’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:1 Yave oneera ha: “Murowe wa empa ya mwene ya oYuda ni mwalaleiyewo mutthenga ola: 
Jeremiah22:2 ‘Ii! Mwene a oYuda munkilaathi vahiceni ya Davide, mwiiwe masu a Yave – nyuwo, asitokwenaanyu ni ootheene amvira milakosene seiya." 
Jeremiah22:3 Yave oneera ha: Mpake yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai ni yoororomeleya. Mmoopole mmatatani mwa namahasula yoole ohuhuliwe. Muhimupakeleru yoonanara hata nihasu namarwa, akhwaasuni naari asinaamukhweli ni muhimwiiveleru oohinthowa vanipuroni nna." 
Jeremiah22:4 Nyuwosa mwiipasoopa wookwanihera soolamula seiya sootheene, vano mwene onkilaathi vahiceni ya Davide onoovolowa vamilakoni seiya, eettihaka ikavalu* ni ikaaro sa ikavalu* vamoha ni asitokweenaawe ni mulokwaawe." 
Jeremiah22:5 Vaheera nyuwo mwaahiiwelela soolamula seiya’ onghima Yave, ‘Miyo kinlipela mwa Nsinanaka muneenaaka weera empa ela ya emwene enoothatuwa milepe.’”" 
Jeremiah22:6 Vano yeeyo Yave ohimmaawe mwaha wa empa ya emwene ya oYuda ti ela: “Murookikhalelaru ntoko oGileyade, ntoko ethoka ya oLebaboni, vekhaikhai kinimoopakelani ntoko nikare, ntoko mittetthe soohimakiwaru." 
Jeremiah22:7 Kinimoorumihelani anamaphwata, khula mutthu a yaawo ni ikapwitthisawe ni awosa animuuha nyirisanyu sa esidari* sooreerela, evonyereke vayikho." 
Jeremiah22:8 Atthu a miloko sincipale anoovira esidade ela, ekohanaka: ‘Yave opakenleni hiiha esidade etokweene ela?’" 
Jeremiah22:9 Ni yoowaakhula eniikhale: ‘Niwoko awosa aahiya wiiraana wa Yave Mulukwaaya ni aalapa miluku sikina, erumeelaka seiyo.’”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Muhimwiinlele mwene okhwiiye, hata muhimulalamikele; ohiyanawaya, mmwiinlelaxe yoole onroihiwa wootthukiwani niwoko khahokolowatho naari khoonatho elapo oyareliwaawe." 
Jeremiah22:11 Vano yeeyo Yave onghimaawe mwaha wa Xalumi, mwaana mulopwana a Yosiya, mwa yoowo aarandenle atithawe ntoko mwene a oYuda ni aavennye nipuro nna, ti ela: “Owo khanghokolowatho." 
Jeremiah22:12 Owo onookhwela vanipuroni oronghiwaawe wootthukiwani; owo khoonatho elapo ela.” 
Jeremiah22:13 “Ii! Wa yoole onteka empaawe ya emwene moota woohiroromeleya; ikwartusaya sa osulu ahipwatthaka ekhaikhai, aanyesererihaka asikhwaawe ovara muteko woohaaliva ontthuneyaaya." 
Jeremiah22:14 Owo oneera: ‘Miyo kinimwiitekela empa ya emwene etokotoko ni isaala sa osulu sitokotoko.’ Owo ompaka ixanela sitokotoko ni itthaabwa sa esidari* attikitthelakano yooxeera. 
Jeremiah22:15 Apaale munuupuwela weera waattano itthaabwa sa esidari* onimookhalihani mwene? Atithinyu yaakhalano sooca ni soowura, ni awo yaapaka yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai, tivawo sootheene saaweettelaaya nnene." 
Jeremiah22:16 Awo yaahaakiha nthowa na oohaawa ni ootthoiwa, tivawo sootheene saaweettelaaya nnene. Eyo ti eneero ya okisuwela Miyo,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah22:17 “Mene nyuwo munghaawela makhwankwa paahi, mutthunaka owiiva oohinthowa, mwaasaka ohasula ni ewinelo yoohiroromeleya.”" 
Jeremiah22:18 Tivawo, Yave oneeraawe ha mwaha wa Yehoyakimi, mwaana mulopwana a Yosiya, mwene a oYuda: “Awosa kheemulalamikela ekhuwelaka: ‘Ii! Munnaka!,’ hoye hoye ‘Ii! Murokoraka!’ hata khayiilalamikela ekhuwelaka: ‘Ii! Pwiiyaaka!’ hoye hoye: ‘Ii! Atokweene!’" 
Jeremiah22:19 Owo onoovithiwa ntoko buuru mwaaxaana. Onoopuruleliwa, avonyeriwaka okerekhere wa milako sa oYerusaleemu.”" 
Jeremiah22:20 “Ii! oYerusaleemu, murowe oLebanoni ni mwakhuwelewo; nsunanyu nniiwanyeye oBaxani; mukhuwele wAbarimi, niwoko ilapo sootheene mwiiraanaanyuno soophwatiwa." 
Jeremiah22:21 Kannawoopererani nyuwo mwiixoonaanyu okhala oolipeene, mene khamwaatthunne okiiwa. Owo waari mweettelowaanyu wa mahuku ootheene, niwoko okhuma emiravowaanyu; khamwaakiiwelela." 
Jeremiah22:22 Epheyo enimwaavavihera ottaiwene akukhulaanyu ottheene, ni ootheene mwiiraannaanyuno a ilapo sikina anooroihiwa wootthukiwani. Vano munooyevihiwa ni munimuulihiheya muru niwoko na sootakhalasanyu sootheene." 
Jeremiah22:23 Nyuwo munkhala oLebanoni, oolipeene mpaani mwa esidari* – moota muneeraanyu mwiipulele woorweelakani ovoreya wa oyara ntoko wa muthiyana onghaleela oyara!”" 
Jeremiah22:24 “Kinlipela mwa Nsinanaka,” onghima Yave, “naari nyuwo Yehoyakini, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyakimi, mwene a oYuda, mwaari munela woottittano vantataniwaka noolopwana, kaamoorulani." 
Jeremiah22:25 Kinoowinnyererani mmatatani mwa yaale anaasa okumaanyu, yaawosa mungwoovaanyu – Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya ni aBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah22:26 Kinoowoomolelani nyuwo ni amayinyu mwa yaawo yooyanreni mweelaponi ekina, muhiyareliwaanyuwo ni weiwo ooweeli nyuwo munookhwelawo." 
Jeremiah22:27 Nyuwo khamuhokoleelatho mweelaponi munghaawelaanyu ohokoleela.” 
Jeremiah22:28 Mulopwana ola, Yehoyakini, ti ooramusiwa, mwaapu woophweeya, ekaruma ehintthuniwaru. Heeni owo ni anamwanaawe eneeraaya yoomoleliwe mweelaponi ahisuwenlaaya?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Ii! Elapo, elapo, elapo, mwiiwe masu a Yave!" 
Jeremiah22:30 Yave oneera ha: “Mmwaalikelele mulopwana ola ntoko oohikhalano anamwane. Owo khasimweettela nnene mookuminimwawe wootheene; khaawoworu a ekhapiraawe sineera simweettele nnene, ni khaawo anaakilaathele vahiceni ya Davide, hata anaalamule oYuda.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 “Ii! Wa akukhuli amphwata ni ammwaraxa ikhondoolo sa nikhoolanaka!” onghima Yave. 
Jeremiah23:2 Tivawo Yave Muluku a oYixrayeli ongweerelaawe ha akukhuli ankosoopa mulokwaaka: “Mweenre mmwaraxa ni moomola muhuwaaka muhikosoopaka, kinimooruuhelani nttaruxo niwoko na soonanara mpankaanyu,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah23:3 Miyo muneenaaka kinimwaathukumanyiha yaawo ahalahanle a muhuwaaka mweelaponi sootheene kiwoomolenlaakawo ni kinimwaahokoloxera yaacaayamo. Wu animunnuwa erelaneke. 
Jeremiah23:4 “Kinimwaakhalihera akukhuli eneera yaakosoope ni awosa khayoovatho naari kheetteenguwa ni khaawo anaahaleele,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah23:5 “Anoophiyera mahuku,” onghima Yave, “Miyo kineeraaka kimurehererele Davide Ephuwela ya Ekhaikhai, mwene anaalamule ni miruku ni anaapake yeeyo eri yoororomeleya ni ya ekhaikhai mweelaponi." 
Jeremiah23:6 Mmahukunimwawe oYuda onoovuluxiwa ni oYixrayeli onookhala woolipeene. Ni nsina aneeraawe iitthaneliwe ti nna: ave ti Ekhaikhaiyaahu. 
Jeremiah23:7 Vano, anoophiyera mahuku,” onghima Yave, “atthu eneeraaya eheeretho: ‘Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave, mwa Yoowo aakhumihale aYixrayeli wExipitu,’" 
Jeremiah23:8 mene eniyeere: ‘Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave mwa yoowo aakhumihale ekhapira ya aYixrayeli mweelaponi mwa ottuttuwani ni mweelaponi sootheene mwa weiwo owoomolenlaawewo.’ Ni awosa anookhala mweelaponimwaya.” 
Jeremiah23:9 Mwaha wa maprofeeti: Murima wookiriipa; makhuvaaka anthukumela. Miyo kiri ntoko namuhapaliwa, ntoko mulopwana omucorweenle owura niwoko na Yave ni maswaawe ootteela." 
Jeremiah23:10 Elapo yoosareya anamararuwa; niwoko na nlapho elapo eri yoowuumelela ni moocihamo mwa munikareni woonyaala. Maprofeeti antthara ephiro yoonanara evarelaka muteko ikurusaya moota woohiroromeleya. 
Jeremiah23:11 “Okhuma maprofeeti mpaka asaserdoti* ti anamahiiriha; mpakatho Mpaanimwaka kimphwanya sootakhalasaya,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah23:12 “Tivawo ephirowaaya eneeraaya ethatuwe yootherera ni animoomoleliwa mpiphini, ni iwo anoomorelawo. Miyo kinimwaaruuhela erisa vayaakhani ya ottaruxiwawaya,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah23:13 “Variyari wa maprofeeti a oSamaria kohoona etthu ela ya mwiikho: Aathalihera otthuna wa Bahali* ehapuxaka mulokwaaka, aYixrayeli." 
Jeremiah23:14 Ni variyari wa maprofeeti a oYerusaleemu kohoonatho etthu ya mwiikho ela: Awosa anraruwa, okhalawaya ti woowootha. Awosa anaalipihera yaawo ampaka soonanara weera ahikhaleru a yaawo anaarukunxe murima mwa sootakhalasawe. Wa Miyo, ootheene yaawo anlikana oSodoma; amaki a oYerusaleemu anlikana oGomora.”" 
Jeremiah23:15 Tivawo yeeyo Yave a ikuru sootheene onghimaawe mwaha wa maprofeeti ti ela: “Miyo kinoopakiha weera ece yooca yoowaawa ni ewure maahi ooheliwa yoohapala, niwoko okhuma maprofeeti a oYerusaleemu otakhala woomwareela mweelaponi yootheene ela.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: “Muhiiwe yeeyo maprofeeti anoothaliheraayani; awosa anoosarihani ni oweherera woowootha. Anuuluma nyoonelo apakelenlaaya, ohikhanle vayanoni ya Yave." 
Jeremiah23:17 Awosa annaweerela yaawosa ankiramusa: ‘Yave oneera: Nyuwo munookhalano murettele.’ Ni wa ootheene antthara ettiyamaaru ya mirimasaya angweerela: ‘Khayoophwanyaniru yoonanara.’ 
Jeremiah23:18 Vaheera taani a yaawo aakhanle munthukumanoni wa Yave weera oone hoye hoye iiwe maswaawe? Taani iiwelenle ni eettenle maswaaka? 
Jeremiah23:19 Moone ettheku ya Yave! Onyoonyiwawawe wootaphuwa! Eyuupuru enlukama mmuru wa atakhali. 
Jeremiah23:20 Isara sa Yave khasisusa mpaka Owo aneeraawe akwanihere soolakelasawe. Mmahukuni a muhoolo nyuwo munimwiiwexexa. 
Jeremiah23:21 Nkaaruminghe maprofeeti awo, mene awosa aarowa etthimakaka okuxa mutthengaaya; kihuulumme ni yaawo, mene awosa aathalihera otthuna wa Muluku." 
Jeremiah23:22 Vaheera awosa yaarwiiye omuthukumanoniwaka, yaamulaleera maswaaka mulokwaaka ni yaampakiha weera orukunxe murima mmweettelonimwaya ni soopakasaya soonanara." 
Jeremiah23:23 “Ti Miyo paahi Muluku a vakhiviru,” onkoha ti Yave, “nkihiyonotho Muluku a ottai?" 
Jeremiah23:24 Mukina onoowera wiipitha Miyo woohimoona?” onkoha ti Yave. Nkihiyono Miyo kinsariha erimu ni vathi?” onkoha ti Yave. 
Jeremiah23:25 “Kohiiwa anuulumaaya maprofeeti, anthalihera soowootha mwa Nsinanaka, yeeraka: ‘Kooloha! Kooloha!’" 
Jeremiah23:26 Mpaka yaakhani maprofeeti epwahereraka othalihera soowootha ni ohima sa mmurumwaya? 
Jeremiah23:27 Awosa anuupuwela weera sooloha anthaliheranaaya mukina ni mukhwaawe anoottiwaliha muloko Nsinanaka, hiiho ntoko makholowaaya yaattiwanlaaya Nsinanaka mwaha wa omulapa Bahali*." 
Jeremiah23:28 Mprofeeti olonghe, athalihe yooloha, ni yoowo orino maswaaka alaleiye moota woororomeleya. Vano malaxi ancelana hai ni etrigu?” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah23:29 “Maswaaka ari ntoko mooro,” onghima Yave, “ni ntoko enyutto enimpwexa mwala." 
Jeremiah23:30 Vanonto,” oneera Yave, “nkiniiwananano maprofeeti anootherela maswaaka." 
Jeremiah23:31 Aani,” oneera Yave, “nkiniiwananano maprofeeti anttapahera ni malumaaya sootthoma." 
Jeremiah23:32 Vekhaikhai nkiniiwananano yaawo anthalihera sooloha soowootha,” oneera Yave. “Awo anghima ni anghapuxa mulokwaaka ni soowoothasaya soohimuteko. Miyo nkaaruminghe naari nkaalamulenle. Awosa khaanruuhelaru mureerelo muloko ola,” oneera Yave." 
Jeremiah23:33 “Muloko ola, hoye hoye mapofeeti naari musaserdoti* ookohakani: ‘Mutthenga heeni woolemela mwa yoowo Yave owinnyerenraaweni?’ Mwaaleele: ‘Nyuwo ti yoolemela! Ni Miyo kinimoovenyerani, oneera Yave.’" 
Jeremiah23:34 Mprofeeti hoye hoye musaserdoti* naari mukina a muloko ahima: ‘Ola ti mutthenga mwa yoowo okinnyerenraawe Yave,’ Miyo kinoomuttaruxa mulopwana owo ni emusaawe." 
Jeremiah23:35 Ti yeeyo khula mutthu a nyuwo ongweerelaawe asinthamwenaawe hoye hoye amusi: “Yave aakhunleni? Yave uulummeni? 
Jeremiah23:36 Muhiromoletho eyuulumelo: ‘Ola ti mutthenga mwa yoowo Yave okinnyerenraawe,’ weera masu ala ehithatuwe yoolemela wa yoowo anuulume. Niwoko nyuwosa mumpiritula masu a Muluku mukumi, Yave a ikuru sootheene, Mulukwaahu." 
Jeremiah23:37 Ti ha muneeraanyu mmweereleke mprofeeti: ‘Yoowaakhula heeni mwaakhenlaanyu wa Yave? Hoye hoye uulumme eheeni Yave?’ 
Jeremiah23:38 Mene nyuwosa mweera: ‘Ola ti mutthenga okinnyerenraawe Yave,’ vano Yave oneera ha: Nyuwosa muneera: ‘Ola ti mutthenga mwa yoowo Yave okinnyerenraawe,’ Miyo kaawooperenreeneni weera muheere hiiho." 
Jeremiah23:39 Tivawo kineeraaka koottiwalaseni ni koovonyeraseni ottaiwaka, vamoha ni esidade koovanghaakani nyuwo ni makholowaanyu." 
Jeremiah23:40 Kinimooruuhelasani oyeviheya woohimala, wuulihiheya muru woopwaherera, oneera ohittiwaliwe.”" 
Jeremiah24:1 Ni Yave aakoonihera mipapara miili sa ifiigu siikaathiweene ohoolo wa Empa ya Yave. Eyo yeereiye Nebukadenezari aaroihaleene oYerusaleemu wootthukiwani oBabiloniya, Yehoyakini, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyakimi, mwene a oYuda vamoha ni ahooleli a oYuda, ni aneettottho ni anamaratta." 
Jeremiah24:2 Mpapara mmoha waakhalano ifiigu sooreeraxa, ntoko seiye siniitthwa mweehuhuni ya ohepha; ifiigu sa mpapara mukinoowo saari soonanara ni soohiceya." 
Jeremiah24:3 Vano Yave aakikoha: “Yeremiya, munoonani?” Miyo kaamwaakhula: “Ifiigu. Sooreera iyo ti sooreeraxa, vaheera soonanara iyo ti soohiceya.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Vano Yave aakeerela: 
Jeremiah24:5 “Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Mooteene yoowo kinoonelaakamo okhala sooreera ifiigu, kingwoonelatho okhala ooreera anamatthukiwa a oYuda, mwa yaawo kiwoomonlaaka nipuro nna wa elapo ya oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah24:6 Kinimwaapwattha, ni nkinaahokoloxera elapweene yeela. Miyo kinimwaatekiha, kihaaphwataka; Miyo kinimwaatikithera, kihaavenxaka." 
Jeremiah24:7 Miyo kinimwaavahasa murima woowera okisuwela, aani osuwela weera Miyo ti Yave. Anookhalasa mulokwaaka, ni Miyo kinookhala Mulukwaaya, niwoko awosa anoohokoleela wa Miyo ni murima wootheene." 
Jeremiah24:8 Vaheera ntoko simpakeliwaaya ifiigu soonanara ni soohiceya,’ onghina Yave, ‘hiihotho kinoompakela Zedekiya, mwene a oYuda, ni ahoolelaawe nitho yaawo ahalahanle oYerusaleemu– okhuma awosa ankhala elapweene yeela mpaka wExipitu." 
Jeremiah24:9 Miyo kinimwaatatuxa etthu yoowoopopihera ni ya mwiikho wa omwene wootheene wa mulaponi. Khula nipuro kineeraaka kiwoomolele, anoothanliwa, anootthebwiwa, animuulihiwa muru ni anoolaphiwa." 
Jeremiah24:10 Kinimwaarumihelasa ekhotto, etala ni nihooxo mpaka eneeraaya emalamalihiwe mulaponi kaavanghaaka awo ni makholowaaya.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:1 Masu yaamurweela Yeremiya mwaha wa muloko wootheene wa oYuda vayaakhani yanaaxexe ya Yehoyakimi, mwaana mulopwana a Yosiya, mwene a oYuda. Vano yaari eyaakha yoopacera ya Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah25:2 Mprofeeti Yeremiya aaheerela muloko wootheene wa oYuda ni amaki ootheene a oYerusaleemu: 
Jeremiah25:3 Mweehuhuni ya iyaakha miloko miili ni tthaaru masu a Yave yannakirweela – okhuma eyaakha yanaamuloko ni tthaaru ya olamula wa Yosiya, mwaana mulopwana a Amoni, mwene a oYuda, mpaka nihuku na olelo. Ni miyo kohuuluma ni nyuwo imaara soohaalikeleya, vaheera nyuwosa khamukiiwale." 
Jeremiah25:4 Yave aarimoorumihelaniru arumeiyaawe, maprofeeti, emaara ti emaara, khangwiiwale, hata khamwaapwantthe." 
Jeremiah25:5 Awosa yannaweerelani: “Murukunxe murima khula mutthu mweettelowaawe woonanara ni wa mapakelowaawe oonanara, ni nyuwosa munoopwaherera okhala mulaponi Yave oovanghaaweni nyuwo ni makholowaanyu wa mahuku ootheene." 
Jeremiah25:6 Muhitthare miluku sikina weera mukokhorele ni mulape; muhitannye isarasaka ni miluku soopakiwa ni nyuwo. Hiiho Miyo nkinooruuhelani erisa.” 
Jeremiah25:7 “Vaheera nyuwosa khamukiiwale ni mootannya isarasaka ni miluku nyuwosa mpankaanyu, mwiiruuhelaka erisa,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah25:8 Vano Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: “Mweenre muhiiwasa maswaaka," 
Jeremiah25:9 kinimwiitthana miloko sootheene sa ottuttuwani ni murumeiyaaka Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya,” onghima Yave. “Kinooruuha weera siwaneno elapo ela, amakaaya ni miloko sootheene soorukureenreni. Miyo kinimoophwatani woomalela ni kinimookhalihani moopopihero, otthebwiwa, ni oheleya nthala woohimala." 
Jeremiah25:10 Kinoomalamaliha okhuwela wa otthapa ni wa ohakalala, masu a namatthomera ni a namatthomeriwa, oruma wa nxilo ni omwaleela wa onyaari." 
Jeremiah25:11 Elapo yootheene ela enoothatuwa nthala noohiiwa ttewu, ni muloko ola onoolamuliwa ni mwene a oBabiloniya wa iyaakha miloko mithannamiili." 
Jeremiah25:12 Vaheera sikwanenleene iyaakha miloko mithannamiili, kinoomuttaruxa mwene a oBabiloniya ni mulokwaawe, elapo ya oBabiloniya, niwoko na nthowanaya,” onghima Yave, “ni kinoohiya yoophwateyeene wa mahuku ootheene." 
Jeremiah25:13 Kinookwanihera mulaponi mmo sootheene kuulumenlaaka yeeyo – sootheene silempwale mulivurunimu, Yeremiya uulumenlaawe miloko sootheene." 
Jeremiah25:14 Vano aBabiloniyeene yaawo anoopakiwa ipottha ni miloko sincipale ni mamwene matokweene; Miyo kinimwaatthuvela kittharihaka ipakelosaya ni mitekosaya.” 
Jeremiah25:15 Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli aakeerela ha: “Mwaakhele mmatatanimwaka ekoomixi ela esareiye eviinyu ya isarasaka ni mwawurihe miloko sootheene kinoorumihelaakani." 
Jeremiah25:16 Siwunreene, sinooveveleya, soohorahoreene niwoko na ekatana kineeraaka kaarumihele.”" 
Jeremiah25:17 Vano kaakuxa ekoomixi mmatatani mwa Yave, ni mwa yeeyo kaapakiha weera siwure miloko sootheene mwa seiyo Yave aakirumihenlaawe:" 
Jeremiah25:18 Yerusaleemu ni mittetthe sa oYuda, mamwenaaya ni ahoolelaaya, weera seiyo ehiye ttewu ni moopopihero, otthebwiwa ni nlapho ntoko eneereyaaya olelo;" 
Jeremiah25:19 Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu, anamalakaawe, ahoolelaawe ni mulokwaawe, wootheene," 
Jeremiah25:20 ni anamarwa ootheene ankhalawo; mamwene ootheene a wUzi; mamwene ootheene a oFilisti: a wAskeloni, oGaza, wEkroni ni muloko ohanle wAxidoti;" 
Jeremiah25:21 wEdomi, oMowabe ni wAmoni;" 
Jeremiah25:22 Mamwene a oTiro ni oZidoni; mamwene a mucirumbani ni a ilapo sa okhopela ephareiya; 
Jeremiah25:23 oDedani, oTema, oBuzi ni ootheene ammetthamettha;" 
Jeremiah25:24 mamwene ootheene a wArabiya ni mamwene ootheene a anamarwa ankhala munikareni; 
Jeremiah25:25 mamwene ootheene a oZimri, a wElami ni a oMediya;" 
Jeremiah25:26 mamwene ootheene a ottuttuwani, ookhuveelana hoye hoye oorakamelana mukina ni mukhwaawe; ni imwene sootheene sa mulaponi. Vahoolo wa ootheenaawo mwene a oXexakitho onoowura ekoomixi eyo." 
Jeremiah25:27 “Woottharelana mwaweerelase: ‘Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: Ngwure, muhapaliwe, murapheye, mmore ni muhivenyetho, niwoko na ekatana kinoorumihelaakani.’" 
Jeremiah25:28 Vaheera yakhootta owura, mwaweerele: ‘Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: Nyuwosa munoowura!" 
Jeremiah25:29 Moone, kimpacera oruuhela erisa esidade enkuxa Nsinanaka; ni nyuwosa munuupuwela weera munoovenya oohittaruxiwa? Hata vakhaani khamukhala oohittaruxiwa! Kinaaruuhela ekatana amaki ootheene a mulaponi, onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene.’" 
Jeremiah25:30 Vano, mwaathalihere yaawosa masu ootheene ala, mweeraka: ‘Yave ontturuma ari osulu; onkukutteela wookhalawawe wootteela; ontturumela mukuruni yawaweene. Owo onkhuwela ntoko anamavotta a iwuuva*; onaakhuwelela amaki ootheene a mulaponi." 
Jeremiah25:31 Munyakunyaku oniiwanyeya mpaka ekotenle elapo, niwoko Yave onthoonyera soopaka sa miloko, ni onthoriha omutthu wootheene: Owo onoowinnyerera atakhali woophwatiwani ni ekatana,’ ” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah25:32 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: “Moone! Erisa ennamwareela khula muloko; nihooxo noowoopiha ninnakhuruwela elapo yootheene.” 
Jeremiah25:33 Nihuku nno, eniyiiviwe ni Yave anoosareya mapuro ootheene – mipatta sootheene sa mulaponi. Khaawo anaawiinlele, ni kheettottanyiwa weera evithiwe, mene eniikhale ethaadyira ya etthaya." 
Jeremiah25:34 Akukhuli, mvenye ni mukhuwele! Mphirikeye vantthupini, asitokweene a muhuwo! Niwoko nohoophiyerani nihuku na wiiviwawanyu ni na omwaraxiwawanyu; nyuwosa munoomora ni munoottikitthasiwa ntoko mapoottoro makhaanene." 
Jeremiah25:35 Naari alamuli hata akukhuli a muloko khayoona matthawelo. 
Jeremiah25:36 Oniiwanyeya okhuwela ni olalamika wa akukhuli ni alamuli a muhuwo, niwoko Yave omphwata moocihamwaya." 
Jeremiah25:37 Soociha soomaaleleya soohuhuliwa niwoko na mooro wa isara sa Yave. 
Jeremiah25:38 Owo omvenya munikhukunimwawe ntoko mwatto; elapwaaya yoohuhuleya niwoko na ekatana ya namahooxa ni mooro wa isara sa Yave. 
Jeremiah26:1 Ompacereroni wa olamula wa Yehoyakimi, mwaana mulopwana a Yosiya, mwene a oYuda, masu yaarwiiye wa Yave ti ala:" 
Jeremiah26:2 “Yave oneera ha: Mweemele vanipuwani na Empa ya Yave, ni mwaleele muloko wootheene wa isidade sa oYuda onrwa olapa Mpaani mwa Yave; mwaleele sootheene Miyo kineeraaka koolamuleleni; muhiipithiheru nsu." 
Jeremiah26:3 Apaale awosa eniyiiwe ni khula mutthu anaahiye mweettelowaawe woonanara. Vano Miyo kinoohiya waaruuhela erisa kaavaanelenlaaka niwoko na yoonanara ampakaaya. 
Jeremiah26:4 Mwaaleele: ‘Yave oneera ha: Nyuwosa mwaahikiiwa, hata mwaahitthara malamulowaaka koovanghakani," 
Jeremiah26:5 ni mwaahiiwa masu a arumeiyaaka, maprofeeti, mwa yaawo kinoorumihelaakani imaara imaarasene, munoohiwiiwelelaru." 
Jeremiah26:6 Vano Empa ya Muluku ela kinoopakela yeeyo kipakenlaaka Nipuro Nootteela* na oSilo ni esidade ela kinoopakelatho etthu ya nlapho eriyari ya miloko sootheene sa mulaponi.’ ” 
Jeremiah26:7 Masaserdoti*, maprofeeti ni muloko wootheene waamwiiwa Yeremiya uulumaka masu awo Mpaani mwa Yave." 
Jeremiah26:8 Vanonto, Yeremiya amalihaleene oleela muloko wootheene aalamuleliwaawe ni Yave, asaserdoti*, maprofeeti ni muloko wootheene waamvara, oneera: “Vekhaikhai nyuwo munimookhwa." 
Jeremiah26:9 Heeni nyuwo muthalihenraanyu otthuna wa Muluku mwa Nsina na Yave muhimaka weera Empa ya Muluku ela enookhala ntoko oSilo ni weera esidade ela enoophwatiwa ehiiweke?” Ni muloko wootheene waamurica Yeremiya Mpaani mwa Yave. 
Jeremiah26:10 Ahooleli a oYuda esuwelakaru yeeyo, yaarowa vaate wa emwene mpaka Mpaani mwa Yave, enakilaathela wuuluma milattu, vamulako munyowani wa Empa ya Yave." 
Jeremiah26:11 Asaserdoti* ni maprofeeti yaaweerela ahooleli ni muloko wootheene: “Mulopwana ola athoriheliweke okhwa niwoko oothalihera otthuna wa Muluku moota woonanara esidade ela. Nyuwosa moomwiiwa ni maaruwaanyu!” 
Jeremiah26:12 Vano Yeremiya aaweerela ahooleli ni muloko wootheene: “Yave ookirumiha weera kithalihere otthuna wa Muluku Empa ya Yave ni wa esidade ela sootheene mwiiwalaanyu. 
Jeremiah26:13 Vano, muhiye mweettelowaanyu ni ipakelosanyu soonanara ni mmwiiwelele Yave, Mulukwaanyu. Hiiho Yave onoohiya woopakelani erisa oolakelenlaaweni." 
Jeremiah26:14 Wa miyo – kiri mmatatanimwanyu; mukipake enooreerelani. 
Jeremiah26:15 Vanonto musuwele weera, mwakiivasa, esidade ela ni amakaaya anookhalano nthowa na oyeeheya wa ephome yoohinthowa, niwoko vekhaikhai, Yave okirumihale wa nyuwo weera kooleeleni masu ala.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Vano ahooleli ni muloko wootheene yaaweerela asaserdoti* ni maprofeeti: “Mulopwana ola ahithoriheliwe okhwa! Owo onileenle mwa Nsina na Yave, Mulukwaahu.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Akina a ahooleli a elapo yaaheemela, eneerela muthukumano wootheene wa muloko:" 
Jeremiah26:18 “Mika a oMorexeti aathalihera otthuna wa Muluku mmahukuni a Hizekiya, mwene a oYuda, aneerela muloko wootheene wa aYuda: ‘Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: Siyoni onoottipuriwa ntoko mmatta. Yerusaleemu onoothatuwa ettuxo, Empa ya Muluku nttumuxa, mwaako woophipa.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 Weeraka Hizekiya, mwene a oYuda, hoye hoye mukina a muloko wa oYuda woomwiiva? Hizekiya khamoomve Yave ni khamuroromenle Yoowo? Ni Yave khahingye waapakela erisa aalakelenlaawe? Nihanle vakhaani wiiruuhela erisa!”" 
Jeremiah26:20 Mulopwana mukina aathalihenre otthuna wa Muluku mwa Nsina na Yave aari Uriya, mwaana mulopwana a Xemayeya, a oKireyati-Yeharimi. Owo aathalihera otthuna wa Muluku esidade ela ni elapo ela itthusene seiya sihimmwale ni Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah26:21 Mwene Yehoyakimi, anakhottwaawe ootheene ni asitokweenaawe yiiwakaru yeeyo, mwene aahaasaasera omwiiva. Vano, Uriya iiwakaru yeeyo, aatthawela wExipitu." 
Jeremiah26:22 Vaheera mwene Yehoyakimi aamurumihela wExipitu Elinatani, mwaana mulopwana a Akibori vamoha ni asilopwana akina," 
Jeremiah26:23 mwa yaawo yaamurwanne Uriya wExipitu, enamurongha wa mwene Yehoyakimi, aalamulenle wiiviwa ni ekatana. Vahoolowaya yaamurihela mulittini yaariheliwaayawo yakhalaru atthu." 
Jeremiah26:24 Vaheera Ahikami, mwaana mulopwana a Xafani aamukhapelela Yeremiya, ooceelihaka winnyereriwa wa muloko weera iiviwe." 
Jeremiah27:1 Ompacereroni wa olamula wa Zedekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Yosiya, mwene a oYuda, yaamurweela masu ala Yeremiya wa mpatta wa Yave:" 
Jeremiah27:2 Yave okilamulenle ha: “Mwiipakele nivatta nitthukiweene ni mikhoyi ni etthaabwa ni ngware muxiko. 
Jeremiah27:3 Vahoolowaya mwaarumihele mutthenga mamwene a awEdomi, oMowabe, wAmoni, oTiro ni oSidoni, mwa anamitthengaaya arwiiye oYerusaleemu weera emoone Zedekiya, mwene a oYuda." 
Jeremiah27:4 Mutthenga muneeraanyu mwaarumiheleke asipwiiyaanyu ti ola: ‘Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha:" 
Jeremiah27:5 “Miyo koopattuxa elapo, atthu ni axinama arimo, ni owerawaka otokotoko ni moonowaaka wowookoweene, ni Miyo kinimvaha kinimutthunaaka." 
Jeremiah27:6 Vano ti Miyo muneenaaka kininnyerera miloko sootheene iya mmatatani mwa murumeiyaaka Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya; koomukhaliha mutokweene mpaka wa axinama a mutuphini." 
Jeremiah27:7 Miloko sootheene nsilamuliweke ni yoowo, mwaniye ni osuulwaawe; mpaka ophiyera mahuku eneeraaya enyaatuliwe elapwaaya ni miloko sincipale ni mamwene ooweraxa." 
Jeremiah27:8 Wa soothesene, muloko hoye hoye omwene oneera ohimwiiwelele Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, naari ohiware nivatta noolemela muxikomwawe, Miyo kinoottaruxa muloko owo ni ekhotto, etala ni nihooxo, oneera Yave, ni mwa yoowo kinoophwata woomalela." 
Jeremiah27:9 Muhiwiiwelele maprofeetaanyu, anahakwaanyu, anamataphulelaanyu, anamadyiinaanyu ni akhwiraanyu, mwa yaawo angweerelani weera muhimwiiwelele mwene a oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah27:10 Vano yeeyo awosa anthalihaaya ti yoowootha ni animooronghani ottai wa elapwaanyu. Miyo kinoowoomolani ni munooriheya. 
Jeremiah27:11 Vaheera, wakhala muloko onuuhele nivatta noolemela muxikomwaya ni onuumurumeele mwene a oBabiloniya, vano muloko owo kinoohiya opwahereraka mulaponimwaya weera okhale ni olimemo, oneera Yave.”’”" 
Jeremiah27:12 Mutthengeene yoowo koomwinnyerera Zedekiya, mwene a oYuda, kimweerelaka: “Ngware muxikomwanyu nivatta noolemela mwene a oBabiloniya ni mulokwaawe, ni nyuwosa munookhala ni okumi." 
Jeremiah27:13 Mmwikhweleni nyuwo vamoha ni mulokwaanyu mwaha wa ekhotto, etala, ni nihooxo, mwa seiyo Yave onoopopiheraaweno ottaruxela muloko oneera ohimwiiwelele mwene a oBabiloniya?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Muhiiwelele masu a maprofeeti angweerelani weera muhimwiiwelele mwene a oBabiloniya; anthalihera soowootha. 
Jeremiah27:15 Miyo nkaaruminghe! Oneera Yave. Awosa anthalihera soowootha mwa Nsinanaka. Tivawo, Miyo kinoowoomolani, ni nyuwosa munooriheya vamoha ni maprofeeti anoothaliherani masweene yaawo.”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Vano kaaweerela asaserdoti* ni muloko wootheene ola: “Yave oneera ha: Muhiwiiwelele maprofeetaanyu aneera weera woohipiseya ikaruma sa Mpaani mwa Yave sinoohokoloxiwa oBabiloniya woowaakuveya. Awosa anoothaliherani soowootha. 
Jeremiah27:17 Muhiwiiwelele. Mwiixinnyerere wa mwene a oBabiloniya, ni nyuwosa munookhala ni okumi. Eheleeleke heeni nthala esidade ela?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Awosa yaareene maprofeeti ookhalano masu a Yave, emudyoonttelele Yave a ikuru sootheene, evekelaka weera ikaruma sihanle Mpaani mwa Yave, vaate wa emwene ya oYuda ni oYerusaleemu sihironghiwe oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah27:19 VanoYave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha mwaha wa amarimbu, a nttankhi, na ilipihero ni sa ikaruma sikina sihiiwale esidadeene yeela," 
Jeremiah27:20 mwa seiyo Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, ahaakuxalaawe oYerusaleemu arowaka oBabiloniya, aamutthukalaawe Yehoyakini, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyakimi, mwene a oYuda vamoha ni maneethaawe ootheene a oYuda ni a oYerusaleemu." 
Jeremiah27:21 Aani Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli, oneera ha mwaha wa ikaruma sihanle Mpaani mwa Yave, vaate wa mwene a oYuda ni oYerusaleemu:" 
Jeremiah27:22 ‘Sinooronghiwa oBabiloniya ni iwo sinookhalawo mpaka nihuku kineeraaka kitthune okuxawo,’ oneera Yave. ‘Vano kinoohokoloxa kitekiheke mapuroweene yaala.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:1 Mmweerini wanaathanu wa eyaakheene yeele, eyaakha yanaaxexe, apacerakaru olamula Zedekiya, mwene a oYuda, Hananiya, mwaana mulopwana a Azuri, mprofeeti aayareliwe oGibiyoni, aakeerela Mpaani mwa Yave, vamaithoni wa asaserdoti* ni muloko wootheene:" 
Jeremiah28:2 “Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a aYixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Kinoomaliha nihasu na mwene a oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah28:3 Muyaakhani piili kinoohokoloxera nipuro nenenenna ikaruma sootheene sa Mpaani mwa Yave Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, okuxalaawe nno arowakano." 
Jeremiah28:4 Kinoomuhokoloxeratho nipuro nenenenna Yehoyakini, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyakimi, mwene a oYuda, ni anamatthukiwa ootheene a oYuda aronghiwe oBabiloniya,’ oneera Yave, ‘niwoko kinoomaliha nihasu na mwene a oBabiloniya.’”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Vaheera mprofeeti Yeremiya aamwaakhula mprofeeti Hananiya ohoolo wa asaserdoti* ni wa muloko wootheene waari Mpaani mwa Yave: 
Jeremiah28:6 “Ame! Yave apake hiiho! Yave akwanihere masu nyuwo muthalihenraanyu, wooruuha ikaruma sa Mpaani mwa Yave ni anamatthukiwa ootheene a oBabiloniya wa nipuro nna." 
Jeremiah28:7 Wa soothesene, mwiiwe yeeyo kinooruuhelaakani nyuwo ni muloko wootheene:" 
Jeremiah28:8 Maprofeeti yaakhanle nyuwo ni miyo nihiyariwe, okhuma ihuhu sa khalayi, yaathaliha sa ikhotto, erisa ni nihooxo wa miloko sincipale ni imwene sitokotoko." 
Jeremiah28:9 Vaheera mprofeeti onthaliha weetteleya nnene onoosuweliwa ntoko oorumihiwa a ekhaikhai a Yave yakhumelela yeeyo onthaliheraawe.” 
Jeremiah28:10 Vano mprofeeti Hananiya aapasa nivatta noolemela muxiko mwa Yeremiya," 
Jeremiah28:11 aneera ohoolo wa muloko wootheene: “Yave oneera ha: ‘Ti hiiha kineeraaka kivenxeke nihasu na mwene a oBabiloniya, kivenxaka muxiko wa miloko sootheene mweehuhuni mwa iyaakha piili.’ ” Vahoolowaya, mprofeeti Yeremiya aavenyawo." 
Jeremiah28:12 Mprofeeti Hananiya amalihaleene opasa nihasu muxiko wa mprofeeti Yeremiya, Yave amweerela Yeremiya:" 
Jeremiah28:13 “Mwamuleele Hananiya: ‘Yave oneera ha: Nyuwo moopasa nivatta noolemela na etthaabwa, mene vanipuroniwaya munookhaliha nivatta noolemela na eyuuma." 
Jeremiah28:14 Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: Kinoopakiha nivatta noolemela na eyuuma vaxiko wa miloko sootheene weera simurumeele Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, ni iyo nsilamuliwe ni yoowo. Mpaka axinama a ntuphini anoolamuliwa ni yoowo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Vano mprofeeti Yeremiya aamweerela Hananiya: “Mwiiwe Hananiya! Yave khoorumingheni, mene moohapuxa muloko ola, onaroromela wootha." 
Jeremiah28:16 Tivawo Yave oneeraawe ha: ‘Kinimoovenxani mulaponi. Nyuwo munimookhwa mutano, niwoko moomvaanya Yave.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Vano mprofeeti Hananiya aahookhwa mmweerini wanaathannamiili wa eyaakheene yeele. 
Jeremiah29:1 Ti hiiha Yeremiya aalempaawe mukarattani arumihaka oYerusaleemu wa ahooleli, yaahalahanle wa anamatthukiwa, asaserdoti*, maprofeeti ni muloko wootheene Nebukadenezari aatthunkaawe oYerusaleemu aronghaka oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah29:2 Eyo yeereiye vahoolo wa mwene Yehoyakini ni pwiyamwene mutokweene, asitokweene a empa ya emwene, ahooleli a oYuda ni oYerusaleemu, anamapakapaka ni anaruso yaatthukiwaaya oYerusaleemu eronghiwaka oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah29:3 Owo aarumiha ekaratta amwinnyereraka Elasa mwaana mulopwana a Xafani, ni Gemariya, mwaana mulopwana a Hilikiya, mwa yaawo Zedekiya, mwene a oYuda, aarumihenlaawe wa Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya. Vano ekaratta yeera ha:" 
Jeremiah29:4 Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli, oneera ha wa anamatthukiwa ootheene kaavenxalaaka oYerusaleemu kaaruuhaka oBabiloniya:" 
Jeremiah29:5 “Muteke impa ni mukhalemo; mphatteye mmatimbeni ni muce soowiimasaya. 
Jeremiah29:6 Muthelane ni mukhalane anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana; mwaathanle asithiyana oowaatheliha anamwaniinyu ni mwaathelihe anamwaniinyu asithiyana weera ekhalanetho anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana. Murelaneke, muhivukuweke." 
Jeremiah29:7 Mwaasaase weetteleya nnene wa esidade mwa weiwo Miyo kootthukenlaakani ni mumvekele Yave mweerelaka yeeyo, niwoko weetteleyawanyu nnene oneereleya mwa yeeyo.”" 
Jeremiah29:8 Aani, Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli, oneera ha: “Muhaahiye maprofeeti ni anahako ari eriyaraanyu yoolokotthakani. Muhiwiiwelele mwa sooloha munaalipiheraanyuno." 
Jeremiah29:9 Awosa anthalihera soowootha mwa Nsinanaka. Miyo nkaaruminghe,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah29:10 Yave oneera ha: “Sikwanenleene iyaakha miloko mithannamiili mureene oBabiloniya, Miyo kinookwanihera yoororomelihaaka mwaha wa nyuwo, woohokoloxerani nipuro nna." 
Jeremiah29:11 Vano Miyo koosuwela soowuupuwelasaka kiweerelakani nyuwo,” onghima Yave, “soowuupuwela keerelaka murettelaanyu ohikhanle woophwatani, soowuupuwela woovahani oweherera ni sa muhoolo." 
Jeremiah29:12 Vano nyuwo mmwikikhuwelele Miyo, ni mmwikivekele, ni Miyo kinoowiiwani." 
Jeremiah29:13 Nyuwo mmwikaase ni munookiphwanya mwakaasa ni murima wootheene. 
Jeremiah29:14 Miyo kinimwiihiya weera kiphwanyiwe ni nyuwo,” onghima Yave, “ni kinimoohokoloxani wootthukiwani. Miyo kinimoothukumanyihani mmilokoni moothemwene ni mmapuroni moothemwene koomwaraxenlaakani, ni kinimoohokoloxerani mmapuroni kootthukenlaakani,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah29:15 Nyuwo naari mweeraka: “Yave oonikhalihera maprofeeti oBabiloniya,”" 
Jeremiah29:16 vaheera Yave ommweerela ha mwene onkilaathela ehice ya emwene ya Davide ni wa muloko wootheene ompwaherera okhala esidade ela, asikhwiinyu ahirongwe ni nyuwo wootthukiwani." 
Jeremiah29:17 Aani, Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: “Kinimwaarumihela ekhotto, etala ni nihooxo; kinimwaapakela ntoko ifiigu soonanaraxa soohiwereya oceya." 
Jeremiah29:18 Miyo kinimwaattharelela ni ekhotto, etala ni nihooxo; kinimwaapaka moopopihero wa imwene sootheene sa mulaponi, nlapho, ethoonyero, otthebwa ni munyakunyaku eriyari ya miloko sootheene mwa weiwo Miyo kaamwaraxenlaaka." 
Jeremiah29:19 Kinoopaka yeeyo, niwoko awosa khayaapwatthenle maswaaka,” onghima Yave, “masu kaarumihenlaaka mwa arumeiyaaka, maprofeeti. Ni nyuwosatho khampwatthenle!” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah29:20 Vano mwiiwe masu a Yave, anamatthukiwa ootheene nyuwo, koovarenlaakani oYerusaleemu kooronghakani oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah29:21 Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha mwaha wa Ahabi, mwaana mulopwana a Kolaya ni wa Zedekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Maaseya, anoothaliherani nyuwo soowootha mwa Nsinanaka: “Miyo kinoowinnyererasa mmatatani mwa Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, ni owo onoowiiva, nyuwo moonaka." 
Jeremiah29:22 Mwaha wa yeeyo, anamatthukiwa ootheene a oYuda ari oBabiloniya anoovarela muteko nlapho nna: ‘Yave oopakeleni ntoko aampakenlaawe Zedekiya ni Ahabi, mwa yaawo mwene a oBabiloniya aahinsaawe ereene nlelo ni okumi.’" 
Jeremiah29:23 Niwoko aapaka yoololo oYixrayeli: Aararuwa ni axaara a asinthamwenaaya ni mwa Nsinanaka ahuuluma soowootha, Miyo kihaalamulenlaaka wuuluma. Vaheera Miyo kineera kisuwelaka; kiri Namoona a yeeyo,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah29:24 Munleele Xemayeya muNehelami: 
Jeremiah29:25 “Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera: Nyuwo moorumiha ikaratta mwa nsinananyu wa muloko wootheene wa oYerusaleemu, Zefaniya, mwaana mulopwana a musaserdoti* Maaseya, ni wa asaserdoti* ootheene. Nyuwo mmweerenle ha Zefaniya:" 
Jeremiah29:26 ‘Yave ohoothanlani okhala musaserdoti* vanipuroni na Yehoyada ntoko namawehaweha Empa ya Yave; waatthuneya nyuwo omutthukelela vamukhukuluni ni onyooro, akhalaru naanepa oniixoonihera ntoko mprofeeti." 
Jeremiah29:27 Vano heeni nyuwo muhimuhiihalaanyu Yeremiya a wAnatote, oniixoonihera ntoko mprofeeti variyariwanyu?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Owo oonirumihela mutthenga ola hiyo nri oBabiloniya, eeraka weera otthukiwa onoovirelela, tivawo ontthuneyaaya oteka impa, omakawo, ophatteya mmattimbeni ni oca soowiimasaya.’”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Wa soothesene musaserdoti* Zefaniya aamusomela ekaratta mprofeeti Yeremiya. 
Jeremiah29:30 Vano Yave aamweerela Yeremiya: 
Jeremiah29:31 “Mwaarumihele mutthenga ola anamatthukiwa ootheene: Yave onghima ha sa Xemayeya muNehelami: ‘Kiroohimurumiharu, Xemayeya ohoothaliherani nyuwosa apakihaka weera nyuwosa mpwaherere ngwoothani." 
Jeremiah29:32 Tivawo Yave oneeraawe ha: Kinoomuttaruxa Xemayeya, muNehelami, ni ekhapiraaweene. Khamuhaleelaru naari mmoha eriyari ya muloko ola, ni owo khoona itthu kineeraaka kipake keerelaka mulokwaaka, onghima Yave, niwoko owo oolaleiya omvaanya Yave.’”" 
Jeremiah30:1 Mutthenga waamurweenle Yeremiya wa mpatta wa Yave ti ola: 
Jeremiah30:2 “Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, oneera ha: ‘Mulepe mulivuruni masu ootheene kooleenlaakani." 
Jeremiah30:3 Vekhaikhai anoophiyera mahuku,’ onghima Yave, ‘kineeraaka kiceendye oreereliwa wa mulokwaaka, aYixrayeli ni aYuda, ni kinimwaahokoloxera elapo kaavanghaaka makholowaaya, weera ekuxe,’ oneera Yave.”" 
Jeremiah30:4 Masu Yave uulummaawe mwaha wa oYixrayeli ni oYuda ti ala: 
Jeremiah30:5 “Yave oneera ha: ‘Oniiwanyeya okhuweliwa wa orukureeriheya nyuru – otteenguwa ohikhanle wa murettele. 
Jeremiah30:6 Mukohe ni moone: Mulopwana onoowera oyara ntoko muthiyana? Heeni kingwoonaaka asilopwana ootheene evarenleene vamirimani ntoko muthiyana ayaraka? Owuumenleni owanoni? 
Jeremiah30:7 Moota nneeraaya noopihe nihuku nno! Noohilikanxereya! Eniikhale ehuhu ya othanana wa Yakobe; mene owo onoovuluxiwa. 
Jeremiah30:8 Nihuku nno,’ onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene, kinoophwata nivatta noolemela nri muxikomwaya ni kinoopasa onyoorowaaya; kheepakiwatho ipottha ni anamarwa." 
Jeremiah30:9 Anoomurumeela Yave, Mulukwaaya, ni Davide, mwenaaya, kineeraaka kaavahe." 
Jeremiah30:10 ‘Tivawo, ohoove, murumeiyaaka, Yakobe! Ii! Yixrayeli! Muhituthuwe,’ onghima Yave. ‘Miyo kinoowoopolani nipuro noorakamela, ni ekhapiraanyu, elapo mutthukeliwaanyuwo. Yakobe onoohokolowa ni onookhala mmuretteleni ni oolipeene; khaawo anooramaramihe." 
Jeremiah30:11 Vano Miyo kiri ni nyuwo ni kinimoovuluxani,’ onghima Yave. ‘Kinoophwata woomalela miloko sootheene mwa seiyo Miyo koomwaraxenlaakani; vaheera wa nyuwo, nkoophwatani woomalela. Miyo kinimoolakani, ntoko mumphwanelaanyu. Nkoohiyani woohoottaruxani.’" 
Jeremiah30:12 Yave oneera ha: ‘Ovulalawanyu wootepaxa, nikhwattananyu, noohilameya." 
Jeremiah30:13 Khawowo anaakihe nthowananyu; khoowowo murette wa nikhwattananyu, khoowowo olamihiwa wa nyuwo." 
Jeremiah30:14 Oosiveleyaanyu ootheene ahoottiwalani; awosa khaanoopwatthani. Miyo kohoowananani ntoko ompakaawe mwiittana; kohoovahani nttaruxo nootepaxa niwoko otakhalawanyu ti otokotoko ni sootthekasanyu khasinaalikeleya. 
Jeremiah30:15 Munkhuwelela heeni mwaha wa ovulalawanyu, wa nikhwattananyu noohivola? Koopakenleni itthusene seiya niwoko sootakhalasanyu ti sitokotoko ni sootthekasanyu khasinaalikeleya." 
Jeremiah30:16 Vaheera ootheene anoonyaanyani anoonyaanyiwa; amwiittanaanyu ootheene anooronghiwa wootthukiwani. Ootheene anohuhulani, anoohuhuliwa; ni kinimwaahooxa ootheene anoohooxani." 
Jeremiah30:17 Kinoohela mapharima ovulalawanyu ni kinoovoliha makhwattaanyu,’ onghima Yave, ‘niwoko nyuwo, Siyoni, angwiitthanani ookhoottiwa, mwa yoole ohimpwatthiwaru.’" 
Jeremiah30:18 Yave oneera ha: ‘Kinooceendya oreereliwa wa iheema sa Yakobe ni kinoomorela ikharari mookhalamwawe. Esidade enooraseliwa mmathalanimwaya ni empa ya emwene vanipuroniwaya. 
Jeremiah30:19 Mwa yaawosa sinimoorwa icipo sootthapela ni oruma wa ohakalala. Miyo kinoowaattiha ni awosa kheevukuwa; Miyo kinimwaattittimiherela ni awosa kheenyoosiwa. 
Jeremiah30:20 Anamwanaaya eniikhale ntoko yaaraaya mmahukuni a khalayi, ni mulokwaaya onoolipihiwa ohoolowaka; kinimwaattaruxa ootheene anaahasula." 
Jeremiah30:21 Muhoolelaaya anaakhale mmoha a eriyaraaya; namalamula anaakhumelele eriyaraaya. Miyo kinoomuruuha vakhiviru ni owo onookaattamela; vano taani eera iileve akaattamelaka Miyo?’ onkoha Yave. 
Jeremiah30:22 ‘Tivawo, nyuwosa munookhala mulokwaaka, ni Miyo kinookhala Mulukwaanyu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:23 Moone, ettheku ya Yave! Onyoonyiwawawe wookurukuttuwa! Eyuupuru emmorela mmuru mwa atakhali." 
Jeremiah30:24 Isara sa Yave khasisusa mpaka Owo aneeraawe akwanihere yoolakelaawe. Mmahukuni a muhoolo nyuwosa munimwiiwexexa yeeyo. 
Jeremiah31:1 “Mweehuhuni eyo,” onghima Yave, “kinookhala Muluku a ipuumba sootheene sa aYixrayeli, ni awosa anookhala mulokwaaka.”" 
Jeremiah31:2 Yave oneera ha: “Muloko woopongwe mookhwaani onoophwanya ekhavihero munikareni. Kinimoowa weera kaavahe aYixrayeli wiitthuuwa.” 
Jeremiah31:3 Yave aahiixoonihera wa hiyo khalayi, eeraka: “Miyo kohoosivelani ni osivela woohimala; Miyo kohoopurulelasani nyuwo wa Miyo moosivelanimwaka woororomeleya." 
Jeremiah31:4 Miyo kinimootekatho, Ii! Mwaamwali oowiikosoopa oYixrayeli! Weyo onooraseliwa! Weyo onimwiiphwanelihatho ni miheya ni onookhuma wiinaka ni yaawo anghakalala." 
Jeremiah31:5 Onoophatteyatho imatta sa iwuuva* mmattumuxani a oSamariya; aani anamalima anoophatteya ni anoohakalalela soowiimasaya. 
Jeremiah31:6 Vano nnoophiyera nihuku anamalipelela eneeraaya ekhuwele mmattumuxani a wEfrayimi: ‘Nrowe, niwele oSiyoni, vamaithoni wa Yave Mulukwaahu.’”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Yave oneera ha: “Mwiipe ni ohakalala mwaha wa Yakobe; mukhuwele muntthapelaka mutokweene a miloko! Mulaleiye ni munttottopele, mweeraka: ‘Ii! Yave mvuluxe mulokwaanyu ohalahanle oYixrayeli.’" 
Jeremiah31:8 Moone Miyo kinimwaaruuha mweelaponi ya ottuttuwani ni kinimwaathukumanyiha ekotenle elapo. Eriyaraaya onookhala oohoona ni oorakala, asithiyana oorupala ni angyara; nakupa mutokotoko onoohokolowa." 
Jeremiah31:9 Anoohokolowa yiinlaka, mene Miyo kinooweettiha keerelaka waapepesa. Miyo kinooweettiha kaaronghaka mmanyoolokoni kaavirihaka mphironi moothatawala, niwoko kiri Tiithi a aYixrayeli ni Efrayimi ti mwanaka a ntthaara." 
Jeremiah31:10 Ii! Miloko, mwiiwe masu a Yave, ni mulaleiye mucirumbani soorakamela: ‘Yoole aamwaranxe aYixrayeli onimwaathukumanyiha ni, onoowehaweha muhuwaawe ntoko mukukhuli.’" 
Jeremiah31:11 Yave oomoopola Yakobe ni oomutapuxa mmatatani mwa oolipaxa ompwaha yoowo. 
Jeremiah31:12 Awosa animoona ni animwiipa ni ohakalala vasulu oSiyoni; anoohakalalela sooreela sincipale eneeraaya evahiwe ni Yave: etrigu, eviinyu enyowani, makhura ooreera ni axaana a ikhondoolo ni a imombe. Anookhala ntoko nttimbe noohelelaxiwa, ni kheethananatho." 
Jeremiah31:13 Vano aximwali animwiina ni ohakalala – mpakatho amiravo ni asitokweene. Olalamikawaya kinootatuxa otthapa; Miyo kinimwaavaha nipepeso ni ohakalala, ohikhanle othanana." 
Jeremiah31:14 Kinimwaavaha asaserdoti* itthu soowaatta; ni mulokwaaka onoovonihiwa mwa onnenaaka,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah31:15 Yave oneera ha: “Nniiwanyeya nsu oRama, wiikhupanyera ni wiixiinlelaxa: ti Rakheli ongwiinlela anamwanaawe ni onkhootta opepesiwa, niwoko anamwanaawe aamala.”" 
Jeremiah31:16 Yave oneera ha: “Mmalihe wiinlawanyu ni maithoraanyu, niwoko ohaawawanyu munootthuveleliwa,” onghima Yave. “Awosa anoohokolowa mulaponi mwa amwiittana." 
Jeremiah31:17 Tivawo ekhanlaaya yooweherera wa muhoolomwanyu,” onghima Yave. “Anamwaniinyu anoohokoleela elapwaaya xaxaxa." 
Jeremiah31:18 Koomwiiwa nnenesene Efrayimi iikhupanyeraka: ‘Nyuwo mookilaka ntoko mwaaxaana a emombe oohihuweya, ni koolakiwa. Mukihokoloxe, ni kinoohokolowa, niwoko Nyuwo ti Yave, Mulukwaaka." 
Jeremiah31:19 Vekhaikhai, kihapungweene, koorukunxa murima; kiiwexenxeene koomana ekakasaaka. Kohuulihiheya muru ni kooyeviheya, niwoko kiniiruuhela wuuliheya muru wa emiravowaaka.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 Khahiyono Efrayimi oosiveleyaaka? Mwaana kinimutthunaxaaka? Imaara sootheene Miyo kinuulumaaka sa Efrayimi, kimmuupuwelelaxa yoowo. Tivawo, kinimuhelaxaaka vamurimani; kinimmorelaaka ikharari,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah31:21 “Muhele ikanyero ni mwiikaathi ineneero mmiseweni. Ngwehexexe ephiro mvinraanyu. Ii! Mwaamwali oowiikosoopa, muhokolowe. Ii! oYixrayeli! muhokoleele musidadenimwanyu." 
Jeremiah31:22 Ii! Mwaana muthiyana oohiroromeleya, mpaka yaakhani nyuwo munxoraxoraanyu? Yave oopattuxa etthu enyowani mulaponimu: Muthiyana onimwaakiha nakhotto.”" 
Jeremiah31:23 Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: “Miyo kaahokoloxaka wootthukiwani, muloko wa oYuda ni mittetthesaya onimweeratho: ‘Ii! Wookhala woororomeleya, ii! Mwaako wootteela – Yave ooreeliheni.’" 
Jeremiah31:24 Muloko onookhala oYuda ni mmittetthenimwaya moothemwene – anamalima vamoha ni yaawo ankukhula mihuwo. 
Jeremiah31:25 Kinoomulipihera ookhulumuwa ni kinoomvoniha oohilipalipa.” 
Jeremiah31:26 Vanonto, kaavenya, kinaweha mukhwipi. Ikhovesaka saari soosiveleya." 
Jeremiah31:27 “Anoophiyera mahuku,” onghima Yave, “kineeraaka kaale mmulokoni mwa oYixrayeli ni mwa oYuda ikhapira sa atthu ni sa axinama." 
Jeremiah31:28 Mooteene yoowo kaawehawenghaaka weera kiphele ni kinyaaye, weera kuuhe, kiphwate ni kaaruuhele erisa, kinimwaawehawehatho weera kiteke ni kiphatteye,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah31:29 “Mmahukuni awo khaweeriwatho: ‘Asitiithi aakhuura iwuuva* sikithi, ni maino a anamwane aasosomera.’" 
Jeremiah31:30 Ohiyanawaya, khula mutthu anaakhwele niwoko na yootthekaawe. Maino a ootheene yaale eniikhuure iwuuva* sikithi anoososomera." 
Jeremiah31:31 Vano anoophiyera mahuku,” onghima Yave, “kineeraaka kikhalihere wiiraana onyowani muloko wa oYixrayeli ni wa oYuda." 
Jeremiah31:32 Khookhala ntoko wiiraana kaapankaaka ni makholowaanyu kaavarenlaaka ni ntata weera kaakhumihe wExipitu; niwoko aananariha wiiraanawaka, kaarookhalaru Iyaya,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah31:33 Yave oneera: “Wiiraana kineeraaka kipakele muloko wa oYixrayeli eviraleene mahuku awo, ti wu: Kinoohela Nlamulonaka mpuwamwaya ni kinoolepa mmurimanimwaya. Kinookhala Mulukwaaya, ni awosa anookhala mulokwaaka." 
Jeremiah31:34 Khakhalaru mukina anaamuxuttihe mwaattamanaawe hata munneiye, eeraka: ‘Munsuwele Yave,’ niwoko ootheenaawo anookisuwela, okhuma mukhaani mpaka mutokweene,” onghima Yave. “Niwoko Miyo kinimwaalevelela soonanara ni nkuupuwelelatho sootthekasaya.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Vano Yave, mwa Yoowo okhalinghe nsuwa weera nimwaleele othana, olamulenle mweeri ni ithenyeeri weera simwaleele ohiyu, ontekumiha ephareiya weera sirume mitekutekusaya, aani Yoowo iitthaniwe Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera, ha:" 
Jeremiah31:36 “Paahi salakaseya ikano iyo ohoolowaka,” onghima Yave, “ekhapira ya aYixrayeli enoohiya okhala mulokwaaka wa mahuku ootheene.”" 
Jeremiah31:37 Yave oneera ha: “Paahi irimu sawereya ophima, ni mathipelo vathi yawereya woona, vano Miyo kinookhootta ekhapira ya aYixrayeli niwoko na sootheene awosa ampakaaya,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah31:38 “Vano anoophiyera mahuku,” onghima Yave, “eneeraaya eraseliwe esidade ela wa Yave, okhuma etoore* ya Hananeli mpaka mulako wa oNloothoni." 
Jeremiah31:39 Mukhoyi wooringelano onimookoliwa mpaka nttumuxa na oGarebi, wookela mpatta wa oGowa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Nreyareya nootheene sinriheliwaayamo mittembo ni ettuura, ni itarato sootheene siri oreyareyani na oKideroni mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, mpaka nlootho na mulako wa Ikavalu*, sinootteeliheriwa Yave. Esidade kheesusihiwatho hoye hoye kheephwatiwa.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Ala ti masu Yeremiya aakhenlaawe wa Yave muyaakhani yanaamuloko ya olamula wa Zedekiya, mwene a oYuda, yaari eyaakha yanaamuloko niithannatthaaru ya olamula wa Nebukadenezari." 
Jeremiah32:2 Ehuhu ele, anakhotto a mwene a oBabiloniya yaamurica Yerusaleemu ni mprofeeti Yeremiya aari etthukeliwo vanipuwani na anamalipelela, vaate wa emwene ya oYuda." 
Jeremiah32:3 Vano, Zedekiya, mwene a oYuda, aamutthukawo Yeremiya, “Amootheraka othalihera moota ola: ‘Yave onimwinnyerera esidade mmatatani mwa mwene a oBabiloniya, ni owo onoowina." 
Jeremiah32:4 Zedekiya, mwene a oYuda, khoopowa mmatatani mwa aBabiloniya, mene woohihovela onimwinnyereriwa mmatatani mwa mwene a oBabiloniya, onoomuulumano ttundattunda, ni onoomoona ni maithwaawe." 
Jeremiah32:5 Owo onoomurongha Zedekiya oBabiloniya, weiwo aneeraawe akhalewo mpaka Yave aneeraawe amalihe mulattwaawe ni, nyuwosa mwaawanano aBabiloniya, khasiweettelani nnene.’”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Vano Yeremiya aaheera: “Yave aakirumihela maswaawe, eeraka ha:" 
Jeremiah32:7 Hanameeli, mwaana mulopwana a atatinyu, Xalumi, onimoorwa okumana ni nyuwo aweerelakani: ‘Muthume emattaaka eri wAnatote, niwoko, mureene mmusi xaxaxa, nyuwo moophwanela ni ontthuneya othuma.’" 
Jeremiah32:8 Ntoko Yave aahimalaawe, munnaka Hanameeli aahoorwa okikumanano vaate wa emwene vanipuroni na anamalipelela, aneera: ‘Muthume ettimaaka eri wAnatote, mulaponi mwa Benyamini, niwoko emphwanela okuxa nyuwo ni woopola. Muthumeke.’ Vano kaasuwela weera ale yaari masu a Yave." 
Jeremiah32:9 Hiiho kaathuma wa munnaka Hanameeli ematta yaari yawawe wAnatote. Kaaringa ixekeli* sa eparatha* muloko niithannapiili, kinamuliva." 
Jeremiah32:10 Kaattitta, kinalipiha yoolempwa, kinaringa eparatha* vamuringoni, ohoolo wa anamoona kaawiitthannaaka." 
Jeremiah32:11 Kaakuxa yoolempwa ya othumihiwa yoowaliwa yaarino soonyesererihiwa ni ikano sa othuma, vamoha ni yoolempwa yoohiwaliwa." 
Jeremiah32:12 Vano yoolempwa ya othuma eyo kaamwinnyerera Baruki, mwaana mulopwana a Neriha, mwaana mulopwana a Makheseya vamaithoni wa munnaka Hanameeli, wa anamoona yaattintte yoolempwa ni wa aYuda ootheene yaakilaathiye vanipuwani na anamalipelela." 
Jeremiah32:13 Vamaithoniwaya kaamulamula ha Baruki: 
Jeremiah32:14 ‘Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a aYixrayeli oneera ha: Mukuxe icipaaso iya – yoottittiwa ni yoohittittiwa ya yoolempwa ya mathumeliwo, ni mwiikaathi mmwaapuni weera sithokororeye wa iyaakha sincipale." 
Jeremiah32:15 Niwoko Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a aYixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Impa, imatta ni imatta sa iwuuva* sinoohokoleela othumihiwa elapweene yeela.’”" 
Jeremiah32:16 “Kimwinnyerenreene Baruki mwaana mulopwana a Neriha, yoolempwa ya othuma, kaamvekela Yave:" 
Jeremiah32:17 Ii! Yave onlamula sootheene, Nyuwo moopaka erimu ni vathi mooweranimwanyu otokotoko ni mwa moonowaanyu woowookowa. Kheewo enoorikani." 
Jeremiah32:18 Munoonihera onnene mpaka ikhapira ikhapirasene, vaheera munaavonyera anamwane soottheka sa asitithaya. Ii! Muluku Mutokweene ni Ooweraxa, mwa Yoowo Nsinanawe ti Yave a ikuru sootheene," 
Jeremiah32:19 sootthunasanyu ti sitokotoko ni soopakasanyu ti sa ikuru. Maithwaanyu angwehexexa ipakelo sa atthu; Nyuwo munimutthuvela khula mutthu muttharaka mweettelowaawe, ntoko ipakelo sa mutekwaawe simphwanelaaya." 
Jeremiah32:20 Mwaapaka ineneero ni sootikhiniha wExipitu ni mumpwaherera opaka mpaka olelo okhuma oYixrayeli mpaka eriyari ya omutthu wootheene, ni moophwanela epili eri yawinyu mpaka olelo." 
Jeremiah32:21 Mwaakhumiha mulokwaanyu wExipitu ni ineneero ni sootikhiniha, ni ntata noowera ni moono woowookowa, mutannyeraka woova otokotoko." 
Jeremiah32:22 Mohaavaha elapo ela, mwa yeeyo mwaaroromelinghaanyu makholowaaya ni nlipelo; elapo yoosareya mukaka ni oravo." 
Jeremiah32:23 Awosa yaahoorwa okuxa elapo ela, mene khaawiiwelenleni hata khayeettenle Nlamulonanyu. Khaapankeru etthu ya seiye mwaalamulenlaanyu. Tivawo yiiruhenlaaya erisa yootheene ela." 
Jeremiah32:24 Ikaaro sookurumulela exiri sintekiwa ni amwiittana weera ekuxe esidade. Eyo enimwinnyereriwa mmatatani mwa aBabiloniya angwanano niwoko na ekhotto, etala ni nihooxo. Yookwanihereya yeele mwaahimmaanyu, ntoko munoonaanyu vano." 
Jeremiah32:25 Ii Yave onlamula sootheene, eyo eri hiiho, ‘Nyuwo mookiruma othuma ematta ni waalattula anamoona wa othuma wu, naari esidade yinnyereriweene mmatatani mwa aBabiloniya!’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Vano Yave aamweerela Yeremiya: 
Jeremiah32:27 “Miyo ti Yave, Muluku a omutthu wootheene. Kheewo enkirikela." 
Jeremiah32:28 Vanonto Yave oneera ha: Kininnyerera esidade ela mmatatani mwa aBabiloniya ni mwa Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, anaawine." 
Jeremiah32:29 aBabiloniya angwanano esidade ela, anoovolowamo, ehiseke. Awosa anoohisa vamoha ni impasene mwa seiyo muloko otannyenraaya isarasaka emuhiseraka erubani* Bahali* mmapathonimwaya, eyeehaka sooveleela soowura ettittimiherelaka miluku sikina." 
Jeremiah32:30 Okhuma emiravowaaya muloko wa aYixrayeli ni wa oYuda, khoompakaru ekina ehikhanle yeeyo kinoonelaaka okhala yoonanara; vekhaikhai muloko wa oYixrayeli khoopankeru ekina ohikhanle otannya isarasaka, onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah32:31 Okhuma nihuku etekiwaaya mpaka olelo, esidade ela entannyera onyoonyiwawaka moota wooweera ontthuneya ovenxa ohoolowaka." 
Jeremiah32:32 Muloko wa oYixrayeli ni wa oYuda onnatannya isarasaka mwa soonanara sootheene ompakaaya – awosa, mamwenaaya ni ahoolelaaya, asaserdotaaya ni maprofeetaaya, atthu a oYuda ni amaki a oYerusaleemu." 
Jeremiah32:33 Aakirera ettuli ehikiwehaka; kaamwaaxuttiharu imaara imaarasene, khayaatthuna okiiwa hata khayaakhulenle wookoleliwa." 
Jeremiah32:34 Aahiiriha Empa enkuxa Nsinanaka, ehelakamo icaambulo sa milukusaya sa mwiikho." 
Jeremiah32:35 Yaamutekela Bahali* mapuro ootteela oorakama mureyareyani na oBeni-Hinomi, weera emveleelele Moloki anamwanaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana. Vano eyo ti etthu kihitonkwaaka olamulela, epakelo yoohiira kihinuupuwelelaaka weera epake; ni hiiho, aamutthekiha Yuda." 
Jeremiah32:36 Vanonto Yave oneerela ha esidade ela, mwa yeeyo nyuwosa muneerelaanyu weera enimwinnyereriwa mmatatani mwa aBabiloniya mwa ekhotto, etala ni mwa nihooxo:" 
Jeremiah32:37 Vekhaikhai Miyo kinimwaathukumanyiha mulaponi moothemwene kaamwaraxenlaaka musaranimwaka soopatta ni moonyoonyiwanimwaka otokotoko; Miyo kinimwaahokoloxera nipuro nna ni kinootthunihera weera ekhale oolipeene. 
Jeremiah32:38 Awosa anookhala mulokwaaka, ni Miyo kinookhala Mulukwaaya." 
Jeremiah32:39 Kinimwaavaha muupuwelo ni mweettelo mmoha, weera ekoove mookuminimwaya wootheene, wa okhalawaya nnene awosa ni anamwanaaya ni ikhapirasaya." 
Jeremiah32:40 Kinimwaakhalihera wiiraana woohimala: Nkirwa kihiya waapakela nnene, ni kinoopakiha weera ekoove ni murima, weera ehikihuluwetho." 
Jeremiah32:41 Kinoohakalalela waapakelawaka nnene, ni kinimwaakhaliha oolipeene mulaponimu ni murimaaka wootheene ni okumaaka wootheene." 
Jeremiah32:42 Yave oneera ha: Mooteene yoowo kiruuhenlaaka irisa sitokotoko sootheene muloko ola, kinimwaavahatho yawayeene kaaroromelinghaaka." 
Jeremiah32:43 Anoothummwatho mapuro oomaka mulaponimu, mwa yeela nyuwosa mweerenlaanyu: ‘Ti elapo yooheleya nthala, yoohikhala atthu naari axinama, niwoko yohinnyereriwa mmatatani mwa aBabiloniya.’" 
Jeremiah32:44 Imatta sinoothummwa ni eparatha*, ni soolempwa sinoottittiwa silipihiwaka ohoolo wa anamoona mulaponi mwa Benyamini, mmittettheni sirukureenre oYerusaleemu, mmasidadeni sa oYuda, ni sa mmanyaakoni, sa vathi wa mmanyaakoni ni oNegeba, niwoko Miyo kinooreherera oreereliwawaya, onghima Yave.”" 
Jeremiah33:1 Yeremiya areene nlelo etthukeliwo vanipuwani na anamalipelela, Yave aahuuluma ni yoowo emaara yanaaveeli amweerelaka:" 
Jeremiah33:2 “Yave opanke erimu, Yave okhalinghe, analipiha, mwa Yoowo Nsinanawe ti Yave, vano Owo oneera ha:" 
Jeremiah33:3 ‘Mukikhuwelele Miyo ni kinoowaakhulani kiwooniherakani itthu sitokotoko ni soohaalikeleya nyuwo muhisuwenlaanyu.’ 
Jeremiah33:4 Niwoko Yave, Muluku a aYixrayeli, oneera ha mwaha wa itthu sa esidade ela ni sa impa sa emwene sa oYuda, siphwatingwe weera yiixaakihereno ikaaro sookurumulela ixiri ni wa ekatana," 
Jeremiah33:5 ngwaawananani aBabiloniya: ‘Iyo sinoosareya mittembo sa atthu kineeraaka kiwiive moonyoonyiwanimwaka. Kinoohuluwa esidade ela niwoko na soonanarasaya sootheene. 
Jeremiah33:6 Wa soothesene, kinooruuhela oreherera ni olamiha; kinoophuweliha mulokwaaka kivahaka murettele ni ekhaikhai yoowaatta." 
Jeremiah33:7 Kinooceendya oreereliwa wa oYuda ni oYixrayeli ni kinooreherera ntoko waaraaya khalayi. 
Jeremiah33:8 Miyo kinimwaatteeliha mwa soottheka sootheene akipakenlaaya ni kinoolevelela soottheka sootheene sa okivaanyawaya. 
Jeremiah33:9 Vano esidade ela enookivaha epili, ohakalala, ottottopela ni ovuwa, ohoolo wa miloko sootheene sa mulaponi sineera siiwe sa mipuha sootheene kimpakelaaka. Ni seiyo sinoosareya woova sithukumelaka niwoko na onnene otokotoko ni murettele kimvahaaka oYerusaleemu.’" 
Jeremiah33:10 Yave oneera ha: ‘Nyuwosa muneera weera nipuro nna nooheleya nthala, ni khanikhaliwa atthu naari axinama. Wasoothesene, mmasidadeni sa oYuda ni mmiseweni sa oYerusaleemu, siheleiye nthala soohimakiwa atthu naari axinama, animwiiwiwatho" 
Jeremiah33:11 masu a otthapa ni a ohakalala, masu a namatthomera ni namatthomeriwa, ni masu a yaale anruuha soovaha sootthapela wa Empa ya Yave yeeraka: Muntthapele Yave a ikuru sootheene, niwoko Owo ti ooreera, osivelawawe woororomeleya khoommala. Vano Miyo kinooceendya oreereliwa wa elapo ela ntoko khalayi,’ onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah33:12 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Nipuro nna nri ttewu ni noohikhaliwa atthu naari axinama – aani, mmasidadenimwaya moothemwene onookhalamotho moocihamo, eneeraayamo akukhuli yiitthuuwiheke mihuwosaya." 
Jeremiah33:13 Okhuma mmasidadeni sa mmanyaakoni, sa vathi wa mmanyaakoni, oNegeba ni mulaponi mwa Benyamini, mpaka mmittettheni simurukureenre Yerusaleemu ni mmasidadeni sa oYuda, sinooviramotho ikhondoolo mmatatani mwa yoole onaalikela,’ oneera Yave.”" 
Jeremiah33:14 “‘Anoophiyera mahuku,’ onghima Yave, ‘kineeraaka kikwanihere yoororomeliha kipakenlaaka muloko wa oYixrayeli ni wa oYuda." 
Jeremiah33:15 Mmahukuni awo ni mweehuhuni eyo kinoophuwihatho Ephandi Yoororomeleya ya ekhapira ya Davide; Owo onoopaka yeeyo eri yoororomeleya ni yooreera mulaponi. 
Jeremiah33:16 Mmahukuni awo oYuda onoovuluxiwa ni oYerusaleemu onookhala woolipeene, Nsina aneeraawe iitthaneliwe ti nna: Yave ti ekhaikhayaahu.’" 
Jeremiah33:17 Niwoko Yave oneera ha: ‘Davide kharwaru ahiya okhalano ekhapira eniikilaathi vahiceni ya emwene ya oYixrayeli," 
Jeremiah33:18 hata asaserdoti* ari aLeevi, kheehiya okhalano ekhapira eniikhale ohoolowaka weera eveleele moota woohihiyerereya sooveleela soohisa, ohisa sooveleela sa irooro ni weera yoonihere sooveleela.’ ”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Vano Yave aamweerela Yeremiya: 
Jeremiah33:20 “Yave oneera ha: ‘Nyuwosa mwawera omaliha wiiraanawaka ni othana ni ohiyu, moota wooweera othana naari ohiyu oheereye mweehuhuni okhaliheriwaaya," 
Jeremiah33:21 vano onoomalihiwa wiiraanyihawaka ni murumeiyaaka Davide, ni weereya hiiho, owo khakhalanotho ekhapira eniilamule vahiceniwawe ya emwene; onoomalihiwatho wiiraanawaka ni aLeevi ari asaserdoti* ankirumeela." 
Jeremiah33:22 Ekhapira ya murumeiyaaka Davide ni aLeevi anrumeela ohoolowaka kinimwaattiha ntoko ithenyeeri sa wiirimu ni oohaalikeleya ntoko ihaava sa muxerexere ephareiya.’” 
Jeremiah33:23 Yave aamweerela Yeremiya: 
Jeremiah33:24 “Nyuwo mohoona weera atthu ala aneera weera Yave ookhootta imwene piili aathanlalaawe! Tivawo ahinoonelaaya mulokwaaka ni ahimpwatthelaaya ntoko muloko. 
Jeremiah33:25 Yave oneera ha: Hiiho ntoko kihinceendyaakaru okhalihawaka othana ni ohiyu, hoye hoye wiirimu ni vathi, hiihotho nkirwa kikhootta mulokwaaka." 
Jeremiah33:26 Miyo nkirwa kihiya ekhapira ya Yakobe ni ya murumeiyaaka Davide hata nkiceendya soowuupuwelasaka weera mmoha a ekhapira ya Davide alamule ikhapira sa Abrahaamu, Isaki ni Yakobe. Miyo kinooreherera oreereliwawaya ni kinoowoonihera ikhararisaka.”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, anakhottwaawe ootheene a imwene sootheene ni miloko sa omwene owo aalamulaawe yaawananaaya oYerusaleemu ni isidade sootheene saarukureenrewo, Yave aamurumihela masu ala Yeremiya:" 
Jeremiah34:2 “Yave oneera ha Muluku a oYixrayeli: Murowe wa mwene Zedekiya a oYuda ni mwamuleele: ‘Yave oneera ha: Kininnyerera esidade ela mmatatani mwa mwene a oBabiloniya, ni owo onoohisa." 
Jeremiah34:3 Nyuwo khamoopowa, mene munoovariwa mwinnyereriweke mmatatanimwawe. Nyuwo munoomoona mwene a oBabiloniya, ni owo onimuuluma ni nyuwo ttundattunda. Ni nyuwo munoorowa oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah34:4 Wa soothesene, mwiiwe yoororomeliha ya Yave, ii Zedekiya mwene a oYuda. Yave Oneera ha mwaha wa nyuwo: Nyuwo khamwiiviwa ni ekatana," 
Jeremiah34:5 mene mmwikhwe mmuretteleni. Ni hiiho ntoko muloko ohinsaaya erubani* ottittimiherelaka makholowaaya, mamwene yaaradenlaaya, eniihise erubani* yoottittimiherelakani, ni animookhupanyerani yeeraka: “Ii, Apwiya!” Aani ti yoomeene kinroromeliha, onghima Yave.’ ”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Mprofeeti Yeremiya aamuleela masu ootheene ala mwene Zedekiya a oYuda oYerusaleemu," 
Jeremiah34:7 anakhotto a mwene a oBabiloniya yaawananaaya oYerusaleemu ni isidade sikina sa oYuda nlelo saawanano – oLakixi ni wAzeka. Vano paahi isidadesene seiya ti soolipihiwa saahanle oYuda. 
Jeremiah34:8 Yave aamurumihela masu Yeremiya vahoolo wa wiiwanana Zedekiya aapankaawe ni muloko wootheene wa oYerusaleemu, alaleiyaka otapuxiwa wa ipottha." 
Jeremiah34:9 Ootheene waatthuneya otapuxa ipotthasaya ilopwana ni ithiyana aHeberi; khaawo eera ampake opottha muYuda mukhwaawe. 
Jeremiah34:10 Hiiho, ahooleli ootheene ni muloko yaakhalinghe mwiiwanano ola wa otapuxa ipottha, yaahaakhulela otapuxa ehaakhalihakatho ipottha; muloko waahiiwelela, onaatapuxa opottha." 
Jeremiah34:11 Vaheera, vahoolowaya, waaceendya soowuupuwela onaahokoloxa asilopwana ni asithiyana waatapunxaaya, onahokoleelatho waapaka opottha." 
Jeremiah34:12 Vano Yave aamweerela Yeremiya: 
Jeremiah34:13 Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, oneera ha: “Kaapaka wiiraana ni makholowaanyu kaakhumihaleene wExipitu, mulaponi ya opottha. Miyo kaaheera:" 
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Simanleene iyaakha ithannapiili, khula mutthu a nyuwo amutapuxeke muHeberi mukhwaawe iithuminghe wa nyuwosa. Oorumeenleeneni iyaakha ithannamosa, nyuwo munoomutapuxa.’ Vaheera makholowaanyu khayaakiiwelenle hata khayaakipwantthe."
