Jeremiah34:15 Nnaanaanoni nyuwosa moorukunxa murima, munapaka yeeyo kinaakhulela: Khula mutthu a nyuwo oolaleiya otapuxiwa wa asikhwaawe. Nyuwosa moopaka wiiwanana ohoolowaka mpaani enkuxa Nsinanaka." 
Jeremiah34:16 Vaheera, vano, nyuwosa moohokoleela ottuli ni moohiiriha Nsinanaka, niwoko khula mutthu a nyuwo ohaahokoloxa asilopwana ni asithiyana mwaatapunxaanyu. Nyuwosa moohokoleela waapaka opottha." 
Jeremiah34:17 Vanonto, Yave oneera ha: Nyuwosa khamukiiwelenle; khamulaleiye otapuxa wa mukhwiinyu ni wa mwaattamanaanyu. Tivawo, Miyo kinlaleiyaaka otapuxeyawanyu, onghima Yave, aani, moota wa otapuxeya oneera owiiveeni mwa ekatana, mwa nihooxo ni mwa etala. Kinoopakiha weera nyuwosa mukhale etthu yoowoopiha wa omwene wootheene wa mulaponi." 
Jeremiah34:18 Kinoowinnyerera atthu ananarihale wiiraanawaka ni ahikwanihenre wiiraana yaapankaaya vamaithoniwaka. Kinimookawanyihani ntoko nyuwosa mwaamukawanyinghaanyu mwaamombe ikapatthi piili, munavira eriyari ya ikapatthi sa mwaamunama ole," 
Jeremiah34:19 eyo tiiyo, ahooleli a oYuda ni a oYerusaleemu, asitokweene a empa ya emwene, asaserdoti* ni muloko wootheene wa mulaponi waavinre eriyari ya mwaamombe." 
Jeremiah34:20 Aani, Miyo kinoowinnyerera yaawo mmatatani mwa amwiittanaaya anghaawela owiiva. Mittembosaya sinookhala yooca ya ipalame ni axinama." 
Jeremiah34:21 Miyo kinoomwinnyerera Zedekiya, mwene a oYuda, ni ahoolelaawe, mmatatani mwa amwiittana anghaawela owiiva ni mwa anakhotto a mwene a oBabiloniya, omalihale oriciwa." 
Jeremiah34:22 Kinoolamulela, onghima Yave, ni kinimwaahokoloxera esidadeene yeela. Awosa anoowanano yeela, ni anoowina, ehiseke. Kinoopakiha weera isidade sa oYuda siheleye nthala ni sihimakiwe.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 Ala ti masu Yeremiya aakhenlaawe wa Yave mweehuhuni ya olamula wa Yehoyakimi mwaana mulopwana a Yosiya, mwene a oYuda:" 
Jeremiah35:2 “Murowe wa emusi ya aRekabi, mwaalattule weera erwe musaalani emoha ya Empa ya Yave ni mwaavahe eviinyu weera ewure.”" 
Jeremiah35:3 Vano kaamwaasaasa Yaazaniya, mwaana mulopwana a Yeremiya, mwaana mulopwana a Habazaniya vamoha ni axunneiye ni anamwanaawe ootheene ni emusi yootheene ya aRekabi." 
Jeremiah35:4 Miyo kaahaarongha Mpaani mwa Yave, vasaala ya anamwane asilopwana a Hanani, mwaana mulopwana a Higedaliya, mulopwana a Muluku. Esaala yaari mukerekhere esaala ya ahooleli ni vathivaya yaari esaala ya Maaseya, mwaana mulopwana a Xalumi, namalipelela a mulako." 
Jeremiah35:5 Vano kaahiikaathi nyaapu soosareya eviinyu ni ikoomixi ohoolo wa asilopwana a emusi ya aRekabi, kinaavekelasa weera ewurase." 
Jeremiah35:6 Wa soothesene awosa yaaheera: “Khaningwura eviinyu niwoko nikholonahu Yonadabi, mwaana mulopwana a Rekabi, aanilamulela ha: ‘Hata nyuwo naari ekhapiraanyu, muhiwureru eviinyu." 
Jeremiah35:7 Nyuwosa muhiteketho impa hata muhaale; muhiphatteye iwuuva* hata mmiso; muhikhalane itthusene seiyo, mene nyuwosa mmwimakase muheemani. Hiiho nyuwosa munookhala ehuhu yincipale mulaponi mmo nyuwo muraanyu anamathaamathaama.’" 
Jeremiah35:8 Ninniiwelela sootheene nilamuleliwaahu ni nikholonahu Yonadabi, mwaana mulopwana a Rekabi. Hiyo, axaarihu, anamwaniihu asilopwana ni asithiyana khaningwuraru eviinyu mookuminimwahu wootheene," 
Jeremiah35:9 khaninteka impa weera nikhalemo, hata khaninono imatta sa iwuuva*, imatta hata soophatteya." 
Jeremiah35:10 Ninkhala muheemani niiwelelaka oororomeleyeene sootheene nilamuleliwaahu ni nikholonahu Yonadabi. 
Jeremiah35:11 Vaheera, Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, avolowakaru mulaponimu, naaheera: ‘Niroweke oYerusaleemu weera noopowe mwa anakhotto a aBabiloniya ni a awaSiriya.’ Hiiho nimpwaherera okhala oYerusaleemu.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Vano Yave aamweerela Yeremiya: 
Jeremiah35:13 “Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli, oneera ha: Mwaaleele atthu a oYuda ni amaki a oYerusaleemu: ‘Weeraka nyuwo khamuxuttera etthu ni khamuniiwelela maswaaka?’ onkoha Yave." 
Jeremiah35:14 ‘Yonadabi, mwaana mulopwana a Rekabi, aahaalamulela anamwanaawe weera ehiwure eviinyu, ni malamulo awo anneettela mpaka olelo. Awosa khaangwura eviinyu mpaka olelo niwoko aneettela malamulo a nikholonaya. Vaheera Miyo kannuuluma ni nyuwosa imaara sincipale – wasoothesene nyuwosa khamunkiiwelela." 
Jeremiah35:15 Kaahoorumihelasani imaara sincipale arumeiyaaka ootheene, maprofeeti. Awosa yeera khula mutthu a nyuwo waatthuneya ohiya mweettelowaawe woonanara, okhaliha nnene soopakasawe ni ohiya otthara miluku sikina weera alape. Hiiho, nyuwosa mwaammaka mulaponi koovanghaakani nyuwo ni makholowaanyu. Vaheera nyuwosa khamwaakipwantthe hata khamwaakiiwelenle." 
Jeremiah35:16 Ekhapira ya Yonadabi, mwaana mulopwana a Rekabi, yookwanihera nlamulo evahiwaaya ni nikholonaya, vaheera muloko ola khoonkiiwelela.’" 
Jeremiah35:17 Vanonto Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Mwiiwe, kinooruuhela oYuda ni amaki ootheene a oYerusaleemu erisa yootheene mwa yeeyo kaawoopererenlaaka; niwoko kaahaaleela, mene khayaakiiwale, kaawiitthana, mene khayaakaakhunle.’ ”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Yeremiya aaheerela emusi ya aRekabi: “Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Nyuwo mohiiwelela yeeyo nikholonanyu Yonadabi oolamulenlaaweni; mookwanihera mahusihowaawe ootheene ni moopaka sootheene owo oolamulenlaaweni." 
Jeremiah35:19 Tivawo, Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneeraawe ha: ‘Kheemuhaleelaru Yonadabi, mwaana mulopwana a Rekabi, ekhapira eniikirumeele.’ ”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Muyaakhani yanaaxexe moolamulani mwa Yehoyakimi, mwaana mulopwana a Yosiya, mwene a oYuda, Yave aamurumihela masu ala Yeremiya:" 
Jeremiah36:2 “Mukuxe nikwakhwala ni mulepemo masu ootheene kooleenlaakani mwaha wa Yixrayeli ni Yuda ni wa miloko sootheene, okhuma kipacenraaka wooleelani moolamulani wa Yosiya, mpaka olelo." 
Jeremiah36:3 Apaale, muloko wa oYuda woonelela khula erisa kaavaanelenlaaka, khula mutthu anaahiye mweettelowaawe woonanara ni Miyo nkaalevelele yootakhala ni yootthekaaya.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Vano Yeremiya aamwiitthana Baruki mwaana mulopwana a Neriha, weera alepe vanikwakhwalani, attharihaka soohima sa Yeremiya, masu ootheene Yave aamuleenlaawe." 
Jeremiah36:5 Vahoolowaya Yeremiya aamweerela Baruki: “Kookhoottihiwa orowa Mpaani mwa Yave. 
Jeremiah36:6 Tivawo murowe Mpaani mwa Yave munihukuni na otthuka ni mwasomele muloko masu a Yave miyo koovanghaakani, mwa yaawo mulempaanyu. Nyuwotho musomele muloko wootheene wa oYuda onrweela mmasidadenimwaya." 
Jeremiah36:7 Apaale wiidyoonttelelawaya onoophiya wa Yave, ni khula mutthu anaahiye mweettelowaawe woonanara, niwoko ti onyoonyiwa otokotoko olaleiwale ni Yave mwaha wa muloko ola.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Baruki, mwaana mulopwana a Neriha, aapaka nnenesene sootheene mprofeeti Yeremiya aamulamulenlaawe opaka ni aasoma masu a Yave Mpaani mwa Yave." 
Jeremiah36:9 Mmweerini wanaathannamixexe wa muyaakhani yanaathanu moolamulani mwa Yehoyakimi, mwaana mulopwana a Yosiya, mwene a oYuda, waalaleiwa otthuka ohoolo wa Yave wa muloko wootheene wa oYerusaleemu ni wa muloko wootheene waarweela mmasidadeni sa oYuda orowaka oYerusaleemu." 
Jeremiah36:10 Baruki aasomela muloko wootheene masu a Yeremiya yaalempwale vanikwakhwalani. Owo aasoma Mpaani mwa Yave, musaala ya Gemariya, mwaana mulopwana a namalepa Xafani. Esaala yaari vanipuwani ntokweene, vamulako munyowani wa Empa ya Yave." 
Jeremiah36:11 Mikaiya, mwaana mulopwana a Gemariya, mwaana mulopwana a Xafani, iiwakaru masu ootheene a Yave yaalempwale vanikwakhwalani," 
Jeremiah36:12 aarowa musaala ya namalepa, vaate wa emwene, yaakilaathiyaayawo ahooleli ootheene: namalepa Elixama, Delaya, mwaana mulopwana a Xemaya, Elinatani, mwaana mulopwana a Akhebori, Gemariya, mwaana mulopwana a Xafani, Zedekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Hananeya, ni ahooleli ootheene akinaawo." 
Jeremiah36:13 Mikaiya aahaaleela sootheene iiwalaawe Baruki aasomenlaawe muloko yeeyo yaalempwale. 
Jeremiah36:14 Vano ahooleli ootheene yaamurumihela mutthenga Baruki mwa Yehudi, mwaana mulopwana a Netaniya, mwaana mulopwana a Xelemeya, mwaana mulopwana a Kuxi, eeraka ha: “Mukuxe nikwakhwala musomenlaanyu muloko ni murwe nno.” Baruki, mwaana mulopwana a Neriha, aakuxa nikwakhwala, anarowa yaaraayawo." 
Jeremiah36:15 Yaamweerelasa: “Mukilaathi, ni munisomele.” Vano Baruki aahaasomelasa." 
Jeremiah36:16 Yiiwakaru masu ootheene ale yaawehanasa ni woova, enamweerela Baruki: “Ti wootthuneyaxa omuleela mwene masu ootheene ala.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Yaamukoha Baruki: “Munileele moota heeni mulempaanyu sootheene iya? Ti Yeremiya ooleelani?” 
Jeremiah36:18 “Aani,” aahaakhula Baruki, “owo ookileela masu ootheene ela, ni miyo koolepa ni owiini vanikwakhwalani.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Ahooleli yaamweerela Baruki: “Mwiipithe nyuwo nitho Yeremiya; ni ahikhale anaasuwele muraanyuwo.” 
Jeremiah36:20 Vano yaahiya nikwakhwala musaala mwa Elixama, namalepa, enarowa vanipuwani na empa ya emwene, enamuleela sootheene mwene." 
Jeremiah36:21 Mwene aamulamulela Yehudi okuxa nikwakhwala, ni owo aaruuha musaala mwa namalepa Elixama, anamusomela mwene ni ahooleli ootheene yaamurumeela yoowo." 
Jeremiah36:22 Eyo yeereiye mmweerini wanaathannamixexe. Vano mwene aakilaathiye owannyawe mweehuhuni ya mulaala, ooraka mooro." 
Jeremiah36:23 Yehudi aamalihaawe osoma mipatta miraru hoye hoye mixexe sa nikwakhwala, mwene aamuthikila mipatta seiye ni mwaalo wa namalepa, avonyeraka vayikho, mpaka nikwakhwala nenenenno oza." 
Jeremiah36:24 Mwene ni anamalakaawe ootheene yiiwale masu ootheene ale khayoomve, hata khayaahunle soowarasaya naari khayiikhupanyenre." 
Jeremiah36:25 Naari Elinatani, Delaya ni Gemariya yaamundyoonttelelaru mwene weera ahihise nikwakhwala, owo khaatthunne owiiwa." 
Jeremiah36:26 Ohiyanawaya, mwene aamulamulela Yerameeli, mwaana mulopwana mmoha a mwene, Seraiya, mwaana mulopwana a Azeriyeli, ni Xelemeya, mwaana mulopwana a Abediyeli, weera emutthuke Baruki ni mprofeeti Yeremiya. Vaheera Yave aawiipithiha." 
Jeremiah36:27 Mwene ahisaleene nikwakhwala naarino masu yaahimmwale ni Yeremiya ni yaalempwale ni Baruki, Yave aamurumihela Yeremiya masu ala:" 
Jeremiah36:28 “Mukuxe nikwakhwala nikina ni mulepe masu ootheene yaari munikwakhwalani noopacera, Yehoyakimi mwene a oYuda ohinsaawe." 
Jeremiah36:29 Munleeletho Yehoyakimi mwene a oYuda: ‘Yave oneera ha: Moohisa nikwakhwala nne munakoha: “Mulepenlenimo weera mwene a oBabiloniya onimoorwa aphwateke elapo ela ni mmo aaphwatekemo atthu ni axinama?” 
Jeremiah36:30 Vano Yave oneera ha mwaha wa Yehoyakimi, mwene a oYuda: Owo khakhalanaru ekhapira eniikilaathele ehice ya emwene ya Davide; muttembwaawe onoovonyeriwa okerekhere wiikaathiweke vansuwani ni ohiyuweene." 
Jeremiah36:31 Miyo kinoomuttaruxa yoowo, anamwanaawe ni anamalakaawe niwoko na sootthekasawe. Kinimwaaruuhelasa awo, amaki a oYerusaleemu ni atthu a oYuda erisa yootheene kaalakelenlaaka, yeenre ehikipwattha.’”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Vano Yeremiya aakuxa nikwakhwala nikina, anamvaha namalepa Baruki, mwaana mulopwana a Neriha, weera alepemo, ntoko aahimmaawe Yeremiya, masu ootheene a mulivuruni Yehoyakimi, mwene a oYuda, aahinsaawe. Vano, masu mancipale makina oolikana yaandyeereriwe." 
Jeremiah37:1 Zedekiya mwaana mulopwana a Yosiya, mwene a oYuda, aavariwa omwene ni Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya. Owo aalamula vanipuroni na Yehoyakini, mwaana mulopwana a Yehoyakimi." 
Jeremiah37:2 Owo naari anamalakaawe, hata muloko wa mulaponi khayaapwantthe masu Yave uulummaawe mwa mprofeeti Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah37:3 Wa soothesene, mwene Zedekiya, aamuruma Yehukali, mwaana mulopwana a Xelemeya, ni musaserdoti* Zefaniya, mwaana mulopwana a Maaseya, wa mprofeeti Yeremiya ni mutthenga ola: “Mwanivekelele wa Yave Mulukwaahu.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 Mweehuhuni ele Yeremiya aari ootaphuweene oviravira eriyari ya muloko, niwoko nlelo khaatthukiwe." 
Jeremiah37:5 Eyo eri hiiho, anakhotto a Farawu* yaavenya wExipitu. aBabiloniya yaamurince Yerusaleemu yiiwakaru yeeyo, yaahiya orica." 
Jeremiah37:6 Vanonto Yave aamweerela mprofeeti Yeremiya: 
Jeremiah37:7 “Yave Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: Mwamuleele mwene a oYuda, oorumihaleni weera mukikoherere: ‘Anakhotto a Farawu*, avennye wExipitu weera yookhavihereni, anoohokoleela mulaponimwaya wExipitu." 
Jeremiah37:8 Vahoolowaya aBabiloniya anoohokolowa ewananeke esidade ela; awosa anoowina, ephwateke ni mooro.’" 
Jeremiah37:9 Yave oneera ha: Muhiilokotthe, mweeraka: ‘Woohihovela aBabiloniya anoopwaha.’ Niwoko awosa khaampwaha." 
Jeremiah37:10 Naari mwaawinneene anakhotto ootheene a oBabiloniya anoowananani, ni ehalaka asilopwana oovulalaru mmaheemanimwaya, awosa nlelo yaamvenyera ehiseke esidade ela.”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Anakhotto a oBabiloniya evennyeene oYerusaleemu niwoko na anakhotto a Farawu*," 
Jeremiah37:12 Yeremiya aakhuma musidade weera arowe elapo ya Benyamini weera akuxe yawaweene aaraaweno eriyari ya muloko wa nipuro nne. 
Jeremiah37:13 Vaheera aphiyakaru vamulako wa Benyamini, mutokweene a namalipelela, mwa yoowo iitthaniwa Iriya, mwaana mulopwana a Xelemeya, mwaana mulopwana a Hananeya, aamutthuka, amweerelaka: “Nyuwo moothummwa ni aBabiloniya.”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Yeremiya aaheera: “Hoye! Nkithummwale ni aBabiloniya.” Vaheera Iriya khaatthunne omwiiwa; ni amutthukaka Yeremiya, aamurongha wa ahooleli." 
Jeremiah37:15 Awosa yaamunyoonyeriwa Yeremiya, yaammana, enamutthukela mpaani mwa Yonatani, yaatatunxaaya ekaliposo;" 
Jeremiah37:16 Yeremiya aaheliwa mukaliposo ya vathi aalekenlaawemoxa. 
Jeremiah37:17 Vano mwene aalamula oroweliwa, ni Yeremiya aaruuhiwa empa ya emwene. Muxiirini mwene aamukoha: “Aakhala masu a mpatta wa Yave?” Yeremiya aaheera: “Aakhala, nyuwo munimwinnyereriwa mmatatani mwa mwene a oBabiloniya.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Vano Yeremiya aamukoha mwene Zedekiya: “Yootakhala heeni koopakenlaakani nyuwo hoye hoye wa anamalakaanyu naari wa muloko ola yoophwanela okitthukela? 
Jeremiah37:19 Ari woowi maprofeetaanyu yoothalihenreni otthuna wa Muluku, yeeraka: ‘Mwene a oBabiloniya khoowananani nyuwo naari elapo ela’?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Vaheera, ii! Amwene, pwiiyaaka, dyoontte mukiiwe. Mukitthunihere owooniherani wiidyoonttelelawaka: Muhikihokoloxere mpaani mwa namalepa Yonatani, weera miyo kihikhwelemo.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Vano mwene Zedekiya aalamulela weera Yeremiya iikaathiwe vanipuwani na namalipelela ni weera khula nihuku aakhele epaawu amviraayaamo anapaawu, mpaka seeraaya simale ipaawu sootheene sa musidade. Hiiho Yeremiya aapwaherera okhala vanipuwani na namalipelela." 
Jeremiah38:1 Waaheereya weera Xefateya, mwaana mulopwana a Matani, Gedaliya, mwaana mulopwana a Paxehuri, Yehukali, mwaana mulopwana a Malekiya, yaahiiwa yeeyo Yeremiya aaleenlaawe muloko wootheene eeraka:" 
Jeremiah38:2 “Yave oneera ha: ‘Yoowo anaapwaherere musidademu onimookhwa mwa ekatana, etala hoye hoye nihooxo; vaheera yoowo aniixinnyerere wa aBabiloniya onookhala ni okumi. Onimoopowa akhaleke.’" 
Jeremiah38:3 Yave oneera ha: ‘Vekhaikhai esidade ela enimwinnyereriwa mmatatani mwa mwene a oBabiloniya, anaakuxe.’”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Vano ahooleli yaamweerela mwene: “Mulopwana ola akhweeke. Owo onaapororiha anakhotto ahalahanle musidadeni ela vamoha ni muloko wootheene ni itthu owo onghimaawe. Mulopwana owo khanaasaasa mpuha wa muloko ola, mene oheleyawaya nthala.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Mwene Zedekiya aahaakhula: “Owo ori mmatatanimwanyu; mwene khanoovaanyani.” 
Jeremiah38:6 Hiiho, yaamvara Yeremiya, enamvonyera muhimeni mwa Malekiya, mwaana mulopwana a mwene, mwa yeeyo yaari vanipuwani na namalipelela. Yaamukuruxelamo Yeremiya ni mukhoyi muhimeni mmwe. Khayaarimo maahi, naarimo nttokoru paahi; ni Yeremiya aadora." 
Jeremiah38:7 Vaheera Ebedi-Meleki, muKuxi, mutokweene a empa ya emwene, aahiiwa weera Yeremiya oovonyeriwa muhimeni. Vano mwene akilaathiyeene vamulako wa Benyamini," 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedi-Meleki aavenya empa ya emwene, anarowa omweerela:" 
Jeremiah38:9 “Ii amwene pwiiyaaka, asilopwana ala aapaka yoonanara mwa yeeyo ampakenlaaya mprofeeti Yeremiya. Awosa aamvonyera muhimeni weera akhwe etala, niwoko musidade kheewowo yooca.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Vano mwene aamulamulela Ebedi-Meleki, muKuxi: “Mwaarowane atthu araru ni mwamukhumihe muhimeni mprofeeti Yeremiya ahinaaye okhwa.”" 
Jeremiah38:11 Vano Ebedi-Meleki aahaarowano asilopwana aalamulaawe, anavolowa musaala eri vathi wa omuhakhuni wa mwene. Aakuxa mattapwatta ni soowara sa khalayi, anakuruxela mikhoyi muhimeni aaraawe Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah38:12 Ebedi-Meleki, muKuxi, aamweerela Yeremiya: “Mwiikaathi mattapwatta ni ikuwo sa khalayi iya waanyoono weera mphiteere sihoovoreyeni mikhoyi.” Yeremiya aapaka hiiho." 
Jeremiah38:13 Vano, yaamukhumiha ni mikhoyi, enamvenxa muhimeni. Yeremiya aapwaherera okhala vanipuwani na namalipelela." 
Jeremiah38:14 Vano mwene Zedekiya aalamulela oruuhiwa Yeremiya, anamphwanya vamulako wanaararu wa Empa ya Yave. Mwene aamweerela: “Kinoovekelani nsu nimoha. Muhikikhuweru.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Yeremiya aamweerela Zedekiya: “Kawaakhulani, khamunkiiva? Naari miyo woolopolani, khamunkiiwa.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Wa soothesene, mwene Zedekiya aamuroromeliha ni nlipelo muxiirini Yeremiya: “Kinlipela mwa Nsina na Yave, onnivaha okumi, weera miyo nkiwiivani, hata nkiwinnyererani mmatatani mwa yaale antthuna owiivani.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Vano Yeremiya amweerela Zedekiya: “Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Nyuwo mwiixinnyerera woowaakuveya mmatatani mwa mwene a oBabiloniya, okumaanyu onimuureliwa ni esidade ela kheehisiwa; nyuwo ni emusaanyu munookhala ni okumi." 
Jeremiah38:18 Vaheera nyuwo mwaahiixinnyerera woowaakuveya wa asitokweene a mwene a oBabiloniya, esidade ela enimwinnyereriwa mmatatani mwa aBabiloniya, ni awosa anoohisa; hata nyuwo khamoopowa mmatatanimwaya.’”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Mwene Zedekiya aamweerela Yeremiya: “Kingwoova aYuda anaakhavihera aBabiloniya, niwoko apaale aBabiloniya anookinnyerera mmatatanimwaya, ni awosa anookihasula.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Yeremiya aahaakhula: “Awosa kheewinnyererani. Mmwiiwelele Yave mpakaka yeeyo kinooleelaakani, weera sootheene siweetteleni nnene ni okumaanyu wuureleye." 
Jeremiah38:21 Vaheera nyuwo mwaahitthuna wiixinnyerera, yeeyo Yave okoonihenraawe ti ela:" 
Jeremiah38:22 Asithiyana ootheene ahiiwale empa ya emwene ya oYuda anooronghiwa wa asitokweene a mwene a oBabiloniya. Awosa anooweerelani: ‘Asinthamwenaanyu mwaaroromelaanyu ahoolokotthani ni ahoopwahererelani. Inaawosanyu soodora; asinthamwenaanyu ahoohiyani.’ 
Jeremiah38:23 Axaarinyu ni anamwaniinyu ootheene anooronghiwa wa aBabiloniya. Nyuwo khamoopowa mmatatanimwaya, mene munoovariwa ni mwene a oBabiloniya; ni esidade ela enoohisiwa.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Vano Zedekiya aamweerela Yeremiya: “Mwaha ola wasuweliwa, nyuwo munimookhwa." 
Jeremiah38:25 Ahooleli yiiwa weera miyo kootthekula ni nyuwo ni yaweerelani: ‘Munithalihere mwaaleenlaanyu amwene ni awo yooleenlaayani; muhinikhuwe weera nihiwiiveni,’" 
Jeremiah38:26 vano mweere: ‘Kaakenle waadyoonttelela amwene weera ehikihokoloxeretho mpaani mwa Yonatani, weera kihikhwelemo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:27 Ahooleli yaarwiiyaaya omukohakoha Yeremiya, owo aahaaleela sootheene mwene aamulamulenlaawe ohima. Awosa khayaamukonghetho etthu, niwoko khaawo yiiwale otthekula wa mwene." 
Jeremiah38:28 Yeremiya aapwaherera okhala vanipuwani na anamalipelela mpaka ophiyera nihuku aawiniwaawe Yerusaleemu. 
Jeremiah39:1 Yerusaleemu aakuxiwe ha: Muyaakhani yanaathannaaxexe moolamulani wa Zedekiya, mwene a oYuda, mmweerini wanaamuloko, Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, aamvenyera Yerusaleemu ni anakhottwaawe enamurica." 
Jeremiah39:2 Munihukuni nanaathannamaxexe na mweeri wanaaxexe wa eyaakha yanaamuloko niimoha ya olamula wa Zedekiya exiri ya esidade yaapwexiwa. 
Jeremiah39:3 Vano asitokweene ootheene a mwene a oBabiloniya yaahoorwa, enakilaathi vamulako wa eriyari: Nergali-Xarezeri a oSamegari, Nebo-Sarsekimi, mmoha a ahooleli a asitokweene, Nergali-Xarezeri, mutokweene mmoha a asitokweene, ni asitokweene ootheene a mwene a oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah39:4 Zedekiya, mwene a oYuda ni anakhotto ootheene yaawoonnaaya, yaatthawa. Yaakhuma musidade ohiyu, erowaka mpatta wa nttimbe na emwene, eviraka vamulako eriyari ya ixiri piili, enarowa wAraba." 
Jeremiah39:5 Vaheera anakhotto a oBabiloniya yaamuttharelela, enamphwanya Zedekiya omuhawalawani wa oYeriko. Awosa yaamvara, enamurongha wa Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, oRibela, mulaponi mwa oHamati, mwa weiwo aamulakelenlaawewo." 
Jeremiah39:6 oRibela, mwene a oBabiloniya aalamulela wiiviwa anamwane a Zedekiya vamaithoniwawe ni aawiivatho maneethi ootheene a oYuda." 
Jeremiah39:7 Aalamulela okhoroboliwa maitho a Zedekiya ni omutthuka ni onyooro wa ebronze* weera emuronghe oBabiloniya. 
Jeremiah39:8 aBabiloniya yaahisa empa ya emwene ni impa sa muloko, enapwexa ixiri sa oYerusaleemu." 
Jeremiah39:9 Nebuzaradani, mutokweene a anamalipelela a mwene, aarongha oBabiloniya muloko waahanle musidade, vamoha ni yaale yiixinnyerenre mwa yoowo, ni aratti akinaawo." 
Jeremiah39:10 Nebuzaradani aahiyale oYuda akina akina oohaawa paahi a muloko, yahaakhalanne etthu. Ehuhuweene yeele, owo aahaavaha imatta ni imatta sa iwuuva*." 
Jeremiah39:11 Vaheera Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, aamulamulela Nebuzaradani amweerelaka Yeremiya:" 
Jeremiah39:12 “Munrowele ni mwamukosoope; muhimuhasule, mene mpake yeeyo aneeraawe avekele.”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Vano Nebuzaradani, mutokweene a namalipelela a emwene, Benuxaxebani, mutokweene mmoha a asitokweene, Nergali-Xarezeri, mutokweene a asitokweene ootheene ni akinaawo a mwene a oBabiloniya" 
Jeremiah39:14 yaalamulela okhumihiwa Yeremiya vanipuwani na anamalipelela, enamwinnyerera Gedaliya, mwaana mulopwana a Ahikami, mwaana mulopwana a Xafani, weera emuronghe owannyawe. Hiiho, Yeremiya aapwaherera okhala eriyari ya mulokwaawe." 
Jeremiah39:15 Yeremiya areene etthukeliwo vanipuwani na namalipelela, Yave aamweerela:" 
Jeremiah39:16 “Murowe mwamuleele Ebedi-Meleki, muKuxi: ‘Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: Kihanle vakhaani okwanihera soowoopererelasaka esidade ela – mwa irisa ohikhanle weetteleya nnene. Nihuku nno, iyo sinookwanihereya vamaithoniwanyu." 
Jeremiah39:17 Vaheera Miyo kinoowoopolani nihuku nno, oneera Yave; nyuwo khamwinnyereriwa mmatatani mwa yoole mummoovaanyu." 
Jeremiah39:18 Vekhaikhai Miyo kinoowoopolani; nyuwo khamwiiviwa ni ekatana, mene munimoopowa, niwoko nyuwo munkiroromela Miyo, oneera Yave.’ ”" 
Jeremiah40:1 Yave aamurumihela masu Yeremiya vahoolo wa mutokweene a anakhotto a namalipelela a emwene, Nebuzaradani, aamutapuxa oRama. Owo aamphwannye Yeremiya atthukiweene eriyari ya anamatthukiwa ootheene a oYerusaleemu ni aYuda yaaronghiwa wootthukiwani oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah40:2 Mutokweene a anakhotto a namalipelela amphwanyakaru Yeremiya, aamweerela: “Ti Yave, Mulukwaanyu, olakelenle erisa nipuro nna." 
Jeremiah40:3 Vano Yave ookwaniherela, anapaka yeeyo aaroromelihalaawe. Sootheene iyo seereenle niwoko na omutthekela nyuwosa Yave ni ohimwiiwelela." 
Jeremiah40:4 Vaheera olelo miyo kinootapuxani moonyooroni otthunke matataanyu. Nyuwo mwatthuna, nrowe ni miyo oBabiloniya ni miyo kinimookosoopani; wasoothesene, mwaahitthuna muhaleke. Moone! Elapo yootheene eri ohoolowanyu; murowe onooreerelani.”" 
Jeremiah40:5 Wa soothesene, Yeremiya ahinaaye orukunuwa weera apwahe, Nebuzaradani aamweerela: “Muhokoleele wa Gedaliya, mwaana mulopwana a Ahikami, mwaana mulopwana a Xafani, mwa yoowo mwene a oBabiloniya aamuthanlalaawe okhala guvernadori a isidade sa oYuda, ni mwakhale ni yoowo eriyari ya muloko, hoye hoye murowe nipuro nikina muneeraanyu mutthune.” Vano mutokweene a anakhotto aamvaha pooso ni yoovaha, anamuhiya arowaka." 
Jeremiah40:6 Yeremiya aarowa wa Gedaliya, mwaana mulopwana a Ahikami, oMizepa, anapwaherera okhala ni yoowo eriyari ya muloko waahiiwale mulaponi ya oYuda." 
Jeremiah40:7 Yaakhala asitokweene a anakhotto ni anakhottwaaya yaari mmatta. Awosa yaahiiwa weera mwene a oBabiloniya aamuthanla Gedaliya, mwaana mulopwana a Ahikami, okhala guvernadori a oYuda ni waahoolela asilopwana, asithiyana, anamwane ni oohaawaxa a mulaponi yahaaronghiwe wootthukiwani oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah40:8 Vano yaarowa mpaka wa Gedaliya, oMizepa – Yixmayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Netaniya, Yohanani ni Yonatani, anamwane asilopwana a Kareya, Seraya, mwaana mulopwana a Tanumeti, anamwane asilopwana a Efai, muNetofati ni Yaazaniya, mwaana mulopwana a mMaakahi, vamoha ni anakhottwaawe." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedaliya, mwaana mulopwana a Ahikami, mwaana mulopwana a Xafani, aahaaroromeliha ni nlipelo awo ni anakhottwaaya: “Muhoove olamuliwa ni aBabiloniya. Mwiitekihase mulaponi, mmurumeele mwene a oBabiloniya, ni sootheene sinooweettelani nnene." 
Jeremiah40:10 Yoomeene kinoopwaherera okhala oMizepa weera kookhaleleni ohoolo wa aBabiloniya eniirwe wa hiyo. Vaheera nyuwosa muhepheke iwuuva* wa eviinyu ni soowiima ni sooliveira* wa makhura. Seiyo muheleke mmanyaapuni, ni mukhaleke mmasidadeni mwaakamenlaanyu.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 aYuda ootheene yaari oMowabe, wAmoni, wEdomi ni mulaponi sootheene sikina yaahiiwa weera mwene a oBabiloniya ohaahiya ahalahanle oYuda, ni weera aamuthanla Gedaliya, mwaana mulopwana a Ahikami, mwaana mulopwana a Xafani, okhala guvernadoraaya." 
Jeremiah40:12 Vano yaahokolowa mmapuroni moothemwene yaamwareenlaayamo; yaahoorwa mulaponi mwa oYuda, enarowa wa Gedaliya oMizepa. Yaahepha soowiima soowaatta sa elimwe ni iwuuva* wa eviinyu." 
Jeremiah40:13 Yohanani, mwaana mulopwana a Kareya, ni asitokweene ootheene a anakhotto yaari mmatta, yaarowa wa Gedaliya oMizepa," 
Jeremiah40:14 enamweerela: “Nyuwo khamusuwenle weera Bahalisi, mwene a awAmoni, oomurumiha Yixmayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Netaniya, weera awiiveeni?” Mene Gedaliya, mwaana mulopwana a Ahikami khaamwaakhulenle." 
Jeremiah40:15 Vano Yohanani, mwaana mulopwana a Kareya, aamuleela wiiphiini Gedaliya oMizepa: “Kinoorowa vaanaano va ni kinoomwiiva Yixmayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Netaniya, ni khaawo anaasuwele yeeyo. Niwoko na heeni owo eeraawe apakihe weera aYuda yiiraanne ni nyuwo emwaraxiwe ni ahalahanle a oYuda ephwatiwe?”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Vaheera Gedaliya mwaana mulopwana a Ahikami, aamweerela Yohanani, mwaana mulopwana a Kareya: “Muhipake etthu siiyeeyo. Yeeyo nyuwo munghimaanyu sa Yixmayeli kheehiyono ettiitthu.”" 
Jeremiah41:1 Vano mmweerini wanaathannamiili, Yixmayeli, mwaana mulopwana aNetaniya, mwaana mulopwana a Elixama, aari a emusi ya emwene ni aari mmoha a asitokweene a mwene, aarowa wa Gedaliya, mwaana mulopwana a Ahikami, oMizepa, aarowanaka asilopwana muloko. Ecaaka vamoha," 
Jeremiah41:2 Yixmayeli ni asilopwana muloko yaari ni yoowo yaaheemela, enamvulaliha ni ekatana Gedaliya, mwaana mulopwana a Xafani, amwiivaka yoole mwene a oBabiloniya aamuthanlalaawe okhala guvernadori a oYuda." 
Jeremiah41:3 Yixmayeli aawiivatho aYuda ootheene yaari ni Gedaliya oMizepa, vamoha ni anakhotto a oBabiloniya yaariwo." 
Jeremiah41:4 Waaxiiye, iiviweene Gedaliya, ohinaayeru osuweliwa," 
Jeremiah41:5 asilopwana miloko mithannamiraru yaamentthe ireru, yaahunleene soowarasaya ni yiipompheene yaahoorwa ekhumaka oXekhemi, oXilo ni oSamariya, eruuhaka soovaha sa irooro ni erubani* weera eveleele Mpaani mwa Yave." 
Jeremiah41:6 Yixmayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Netaniya, aavenya oMizepa weera amukumaneno, eetta iinlaka. Aaphwanyakaru aaheera: “Murwe mpaka oraawewo Gedaliya, mwaana mulopwana a Ahikami.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 Evolowakaru musidade, Yixmayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Netaniya, ni asilopwana aaraaweno, yaawiiva, enaavonyera muhimeni." 
Jeremiah41:8 Vaheera muloko a yaawo yaamweerela Yixmayeli: “Muhiniive! Nookhalano etrigu ni esevada*, makhura ni oravo, nisungaahu mutuphini.” Vano owo aahaahiya mmuretteleni ni owo khaawiivale ni akinaawo." 
Jeremiah41:9 Ehime mwa yeeyo owo aavonyenraawemo mittembo sa asilopwana aawiivalaawe, vamoha ni wa Gedaliya, yaathimpwale ni mwene Asa weera iixaakiheno wa Baaxa, mwene a oYixrayeli. Yixmayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Netaniya, aasarihamo mittembo." 
Jeremiah41:10 Yixmayeli aahaakuxa ntoko anamatthukiwa yaahalahanle ootheene a muloko oMizepa, vamoha ni anamwane asithiyana a mwene. Vano Nebuzaradani, mutokweene a anamalipelela a mwene, aamuthanla Gedaliya waalamula. Yixmayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Netaniya, aahaakuxasa ntoko anamatthukiwa, anarowa mulaponi ya wAmoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Yohana, mwaana mulopwana a Kareya ni asitokweene ootheene a anakhotto yaari ni yoowo esuwelaka yootakhala aapankaawe Yixmayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Netaniya," 
Jeremiah41:12 yaawiitthana anakhottwaaya ootheene weera engwaneno. Awosa yaamphwanya vakhiviru wa nratta ntokweene na oGibiyoni. 
Jeremiah41:13 Muloko wootheene, aakunxaawe Yixmayeli ntoko anamatthukiwa, omoonakaru Yohanani, mwaana mulopwana a Kareya, ni asitokweene a anakhotto yaari ni yoowo, waahakalala." 
Jeremiah41:14 Muloko wootheene aakunxaawe Yixmayeli ntoko anamatthukiwa oMizepa waahokolowa, onakhala mpatta wa Yohanani, mwaana mulopwana a Kareya." 
Jeremiah41:15 Vaheera Yixmayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Netaniya, ni athannaararu a asilopwanaawe yaamoopowa Yohanani, enatthawela mulaponi ya wAmoni." 
Jeremiah41:16 Vano Yohanani, mwaana mulopwana a Kareya, ni asitokweene ootheene a anakhotto aaraaweno, yaahaakuxa ootheene yaahanle oMizepa, mwa yaawo owo aawooponlaawe mwa Yixmayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Netaniya, amwiivaleene Gedaliya, mwaana mulopwana a Ahikami: Anakhotto, asithiyana, asinamwane ni asitokweene a empa ya emwene, Yixmayeli aaruuhalaawe oGibiyoni." 
Jeremiah41:17 Awosa yaapwahererasa, yeemelelo oGeruti-Kinyami, vakhiviru wa oBeteleheemu, mwa weiwo yiireherenraaya orowa wExipitu." 
Jeremiah41:18 Yaatthuna owoopowa aBabiloniya. Yaamoova niwoko Yixmayeli, mwaana mulopwana a Netaniya, aamwiiva Gedaliya, mwaana mulopwana a Ahikami, mwa yoowo mwene a oBabiloniya aamuthanlalaawe okhala guvernadori a oYuda." 
Jeremiah42:1 Vano ahooleli ootheene a anakhotto, vamoha ni Yohanani, mwaana mulopwana a Kareya, ni Yezaniya, mwaana mulopwana a Hoxaya, ni muloko wootheene, okhuma mukhaani mpaka mutokweene yaamwaattamela" 
Jeremiah42:2 mprofeeti Yeremiya, enamweerela: “Dyoontte, mwiiwe yoovekaahu ni mumvekele Yave, Mulukwaanyu, mwa hiyo ni wa ahalahanle ootheene ala. Ntoko munoonaanyu, naarookhalaru ancipale, vano nihanle vakhaani." 
Jeremiah42:3 Mvekele mundyoonttelelaka Yave, Mulukwaanyu, weera anileele wookela ni entthuneya opaka.”" 
Jeremiah42:4 Mprofeeti Yeremiya aawaakhula: “Miyo kinoowaakhulani. Kinoomvekela Yave, Mulukwaanyu, ntoko nyuwosa mvekenlaanyu. Sootheene aneeraawe aakhule Yave kinimooleelani; kheewo kineeraaka kookhuweeni.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Vano yaamweerela Yeremiya: “Yave akhale Namoona a ekhaikhai ni Oororomeleya wa hiyo, naahipaka sootheene Yave, Mulukwaanyu, aneeraawe anilamulele mwa nyuwo." 
Jeremiah42:6 Enireerele hata ehinireerele, nnoomwiiwelela Yave, Mulukwaahu, mwa Yoowo hiyo nnoorumihelaahuni, weera sootheene sineettele nnenesene, niwoko nnoomwiiwelela Yave, Mulukwaahu.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Eviraleene mahuku muloko, Yave aamurumihela masu Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah42:8 Vano Yeremiya aamwiitthana Yohanani, mwaana mulopwana a Kareya, ni asitokweene ootheene a anakhotto yaari ni yoowo ni muloko wootheene, okhuma mukhaani mpaka mutokweene." 
Jeremiah42:9 Vano aaweerela: “Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli mwa Yoowo nyuwosa mukirumihenlaanyu omoonihera yoovekaanyu oneera ha:" 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Nyuwosa mwapwaherera okhala mulaponimu, Miyo kinimootekihani ni nkoophwatani; Miyo kinimoophatteyani ni nkoophelani, niwoko koothananaxa mwaha wa erisa kooruuhenlaakani." 
Jeremiah42:11 Muhimoove mwene a oBabiloniya, mwa yoowo mummoovaanyu vano. Muhimoove, onghima Yave, niwoko kiri ni nyuwosa ni kinimoovuluxani ni kinimootapuxani mmatatanimwawe." 
Jeremiah42:12 Miyo kinimoomorelasani ikharari, ni hiihotho owo. Vano owo onimootthuniherani ohokoleela mulaponimwanyu.’" 
Jeremiah42:13 Wa soothesene, nyuwosa mweera: ‘khanipwaherera okhala elapweene yeela,’ hiiho mwaahimwiiwelela Yave, Mulukwaanyu," 
Jeremiah42:14 ni mweera: ‘Hoye, hiyo ninkela wExipitu, weiwo nneeraahu nihoone ekhotto naari nihiiwe oruma wa nipalapatta, hata etala,’" 
Jeremiah42:15 vano mwiiwe masu a Yave, oohalahala a oYuda! Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Nyuwosa mwaalakenleene orowa wExipitu munamakawo," 
Jeremiah42:16 vano ekhotto munoovaanyu enimoophwanyani ni etala munghovelaanyu enimoottharani mpaka wExipitu, ni iwo munkela okhwelawo." 
Jeremiah42:17 Vekhaikhai, ootheene alakenle oottimula ni orowa omaka wExipitu animookhwa ekhotto, etala ni nihooxo; khahalaru naari mmoha a yaawo hoye hoye khoopowa wa erisa kineeraaka kaaruuhele.’" 
Jeremiah42:18 Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Mooteene yoowo onyoonyiwawaka oyeeheriwaaya oYerusaleemu, isarasakatho munooyeeheriwa nyuwosa, mwaarowaka wExipitu. Nyuwosa munookhala eneneero ya nlapho ni moopopihero, woonyooserano ni otthebwiwa. Nyuwosa khamoonatho nipuro nna.’" 
Jeremiah42:19 Ii! Oohalahala a oYuda, Yave ooweerelani: ‘Muhirowe wExipitu.’ Musuwele ela: Miyo kingwoopererani olelo" 
Jeremiah42:20 weera nyuwosa moopaka yootakhala eniiva mwaakiruminghaanyu wa Yave, Mulukwaanyu, mvekelaka: ‘Mumvekele Yave, Mulukwaahu, muneerelaka hiyo. Munileele sootheene Owo aneeraawe ooleeleni, ni hiyo nnoopaka.’" 
Jeremiah42:21 Miyo kohooleelani olelo vaava, yeeyo Yave, Mulukwaanyu, okilamulenlaawe wooleelani, vaheera nyuwosa khamummwiiwelela moota wookwanela." 
Jeremiah42:22 Wa soothesene, vano mukupali weera munimookhwa ni ekhotto, etala ni nihooxo, vanipuroni munghaawelaanyu okhala.”" 
Jeremiah43:1 Yeremiya amalihaleene oleela muloko sootheene Yave, Mulukwaawe, aamulamulenlaawe waaleela," 
Jeremiah43:2 Azariya, mwaana mulopwana a Hoxaya, ni Yohanani, mwaana mulopwana a Kareya, ni asilopwana oowiixoona ootheene yaamweerela Yeremiya: “Nyuwo mummweera wootha! Yave khoorumingheni weera nihirowe omaka wExipitu." 
Jeremiah43:3 Vaheera ti Baruki, mwaana mulopwana a Neriha, onoonyesererihani weera ninnyereriwe mmatatani mwa aBabiloniya, weera eniive hoye hoye enironghe wootthukiwani oBabiloniya.”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Hiiho Yohanani, mwaana mulopwana a Kareya, asitokweene ootheene a anakhotto ni muloko wootheene waarambura Nlamulo na Yave weera epwaherere okhala mulaponi mwa oYuda." 
Jeremiah43:5 Ohiyanawaya, Yohanani, mwaana mulopwana a Kareya, ni asitokweene ootheene a anakhotto yaahaakuxa oohalahala ootheene a oYuda yaahokolongwe mmilokoni sootheene yaamwareenlaaya weera ekhale mulaponi ya oYuda." 
Jeremiah43:6 Yaahaakuxatho asilopwana, asithiyana ni asinamwane ootheene, anamwane asithiyana a mwene, mwa yaawo Nebuzaradani, aamuhiyenraawe Gedaliya, mutokweene a anamalipelela a emwene, mwaana mulopwana a Ahikami, mwaana mulopwana a Xafani. Vano mprofeeti Yeremiya ni Baruki, mwaana mulopwana a Neriha yaatakanseriwatho." 
Jeremiah43:7 Awosa yaarowa wExipitu, ehimwiiwelelaka Yave, ephiyaka mpaka oTapanyesi." 
Jeremiah43:8 oTapanyesi, Yave aamweerela Yeremiya:" 
Jeremiah43:9 “Mukuxe maluku makina makina matokotoko, asilopwana a oYuda ewoonakani, muthipele moopapatthiwa vamulako wa empa ya mwene Farawu*, oTapanyesi." 
Jeremiah43:10 Vano mwaweerelase: Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Kinoomwiitthaniha murumeiyaaka Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, ni owo onimwiikaathi ehicaawe ya emwene vamalukuni ala kithipenlaaka, ni onookungelawo eheemaawe ya emwene." 
Jeremiah43:11 Owo onimoorwa ni onoowanano wExipitu, onoowiiva alakeleliwe wiiviwa, wootthukiwani alakeleliwe otthukiwa, ni ekatana alakeleliwe wiiviwa ni ekatana." 
Jeremiah43:12 Owo onoohisa impa sa miluku sa wExipitu; onoopattiha impa sa milukusaya ni onoorowano sootthukiweene milukusaya. Mooteene yoowo mukukhuli omvenxaawe itutulumbwa sa muhuwo mukuwonimwawe, hiihotho mwene a oBabiloniya onoovenxa sootheene sa wExipituwawe ni onoorowa mmuretteleni." 
Jeremiah43:13 Owo onimwaanyaanya amarimbu a empa ya Nsuwa eri wExipitu. Onoopattiha impa sa miluku sa wExipitu.’ ” 
Jeremiah44:1 Masu a Yave, aarumiheliwaawe Yeremiya, mwaha wa aYuda ootheene yaakhala wExipitu ni yaamanke oMigedoli, oTapanyesi, oMemfesi ni mulaponi mwa oPatrosi ti ala:" 
Jeremiah44:2 “Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli, oneera ha: Nyuwosa munimoona irisa sootheene Miyo kiruuhenlaaka oYerusaleemu wootheene ni wa isidade sootheene sa oYuda. Olelo iyo sooheleya nthala ni khasimakiwe," 
Jeremiah44:3 niwoko na yoonanara apankaaya. Amakaaya aatannya isarasaka, ehisaka erubani* ni elapaka miluku sikina, mwa seiyo hata awosa, naari nyuwo hata makholowaanyu ahisuwenlaaya." 
Jeremiah44:4 Emaara ti emaara Miyo kannoorumihelani arumeiyaaka, maprofeeti, yeera: ‘Muhipake etthu ela ya mwiikho yoothanyeya!’" 
Jeremiah44:5 Vaheera awosa khayiiwale naari khayaakipwantthe; khaahingye sootakhalasaya hata khaahiyerenre ohisera erubani* miluku sikina. 
Jeremiah44:6 Tivawo, onyoonyiwawaka oyeehereiyaaya ni ohinsaaya isidade sa oYuda ni misewe sa oYerusaleemu, othatuwaka mathala ttewu mpaka olelo." 
Jeremiah44:7 Yave, Muluku a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli, oneera ha: ‘Wiiruuhelela heeni erisa etokotoko, mwaamalamalihaka oYuda alopwana ni athiyana, anamwane mpaka ooyariwa vaanaano, muhiihiyerakaru oohalahala?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Mutannyerenleni isarasaka ni yeeyo mumpakaanyu, muhiseraka erubani* miluku sikina sa wExipitu, wenno murwiiyaanyu okhala? Nyuwosa munimwiiphwata ni munimwiitatuxa etthu yoonyoosiwa ni yootthebwiwa variyari wa miloko sootheene sa mulaponi." 
Jeremiah44:9 Weeraka nyuwosa moottiwala sootakhala yaapankaaya makholowaayu ni mamwene a oYuda ni axaaraya, ni sootakhalasanyu mumpakaanyu vamoha ni axaarinyu mulaponi mwa oYuda ni mmiseweni sa oYerusaleemu?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Mpaka olelo khamwiiyevinghe hata khamwiittittimihale, naari khamutthanre malamulowaaka ni ikano kiiyaathiyaaka ohoolowanyu ni wa makholowaanyu." 
Jeremiah44:11 Vanonto Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli, oneera ha: Koolakela wooruuhelani erisa ni omphwata Yuda ootheene." 
Jeremiah44:12 Kinoomvenxa oohalahala a oYuda, aalakenle orowa okhala wExipitu. Ootheene awosa anookhwela wExipitu; animwiiviwa ni ekatana hoye hoye etala. Okhuma mukhaani mpaka mutokweene, animwiiviwa ni ekatana hoye hoye etala. Awosa anoothatuwa eneneero ya nlapho ni moopopihero, onyoosiwa ni otthebwiwa." 
Jeremiah44:13 Yaale ankhala wExipitu kinimwaattaruxa ni ekhotto, etala ni nihooxo, ntoko kaamuttaruxalaaka Yerusaleemu." 
Jeremiah44:14 Khawoworu a ahalahanle a oYuda orongwe okhala wExipitu anoopowe hoye hoye anookhowe weera ahokoleele mulaponi ya oYuda, mwa weiwo anghaawelaaya ohokoleela ni okhalawo; khawoworu anaahokolowe, ehikhanle paahi vakhaani a anamatthawa.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Vano, asilopwana ootheene yaasuwela weera axaaraya yannahisera erubani* miluku sikina, ni asithiyana ootheene yaari vaavaale, muthukumano mutokotoko, ni muloko wootheene waakhala wExipitu, ni oPatrosi, yaamweerela Yeremiya:" 
Jeremiah44:16 “Hiyo khanipwatthelaru munnivahaanyu mwa Nsina na Yave! 
Jeremiah44:17 Ettiitthu nnoopaka sootheene nihimmaahu weera nnoopaka: nnoomuhisera erubani* pwiyamwene a wiirimu ni nnoomuyeehera soovaha sa soowura, ntoko nipankaahu hiyo, makholowaahu, mamwenaahu ni ahoolelaahu mmasidadeni sa oYuda ni mmiseweni sa oYerusaleemu. Ehuhuweene yeele naaruwera, naari ooweetteleya nnene nihihaawelaka etthu." 
Jeremiah44:18 Vaheera, nihiyererakaru omuhisera erubani* pwiyamwene a wiirimu ni omuyeehera soovaha soowura, khannakhalane etthu ni naariheya mwa ekatana ni mwa etala.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 Asithiyana yaahaandyeerera: “Naamuhiseraahu erubani* pwiyamwene a wiirimu ni naamuyeeheraahu soovaha sa soowura, weeraka asiiyihu khayaasuwenle weera naampaka iboolu nimulikanxaka yoowo ni naamuyeeha soovaha sa soowura?”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Vano Yeremiya aaheerela muloko wootheene, okhuma alopwana mpaka asithiyana yaamwaakhula yoowo:" 
Jeremiah44:21 “Ankha Yave? Owo khanuupuwelela erubani* ehisiwe ni nyuwo musidadeni ya oYuda ni mmiseweni sa oYerusaleemu ni makholowaanyu, ni muloko wa mulaponi? Weeraka Owo khanuupuwela yeeyo?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Yave ahiweraka ovilelatho sootakhalasanyu ni ipakelo soohiirasanyu, elapwaanyu yoophwateya ni yoohiiwa ttewu, yoothatuwa nlapho ni kheemakiwe, ntoko onooneyaaya olelo." 
Jeremiah44:23 Yeereenle yeeyo niwoko moohisa erubani* ni moontthekela Yave, ni khamwiiwelenle maswaawe hata khamutthanre nlamulonawe, ikanosawe ni soolamulasawe. Tivawo yoomorenlaayani erisa ela, ntoko onooneyaaya olelo.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Vano Yeremiya aaheerela muloko wootheene vamoha ni asithiyana: “Mwiiwe masu a Yave aYuda ootheene nyuwo muri wExipitu. 
Jeremiah44:25 Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli, oneera ha: Nyuwosa ni axaarinyu mukwanihere mwaaroromelinghaanyu mweeraka: ‘Ettiitthu nnookwanihera soororomelihasahu soomuhisera erubani* ni soovaha sa soowura pwiyamwene a wiirimu.’ “Mpwaherere! Mpake muroromelinghaanyu! Mukwanihere soororomelihasanyu!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Mene mwiiwe masu a Yave, ootheene nyuwo, aYuda munkhala wExipitu: Miyo kinlipela mwa Nsinanaka ntokweene,’ oneera Yave, ‘wExipitu wootheene khawoworu a oYuda aniitthanetho Nsinanaka hoye hoye anaalipele mwa okumi wa Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Jeremiah44:27 Kinimwaawehaweha weera kaaruuhele erisa ohikhanle mpuha; aYuda a wExipitu anooriheya mwa ekatana ni mwa etala mpaka eneeraaya ephwateye ootheene. 
Jeremiah44:28 Eniyoopowe ni ekatana ni eniihokolowe wExipitu erowaka elapo ya oYuda khayaatta. Vano ahalahanle ootheene a oYuda arwiiye okhala wExipitu anoosuwela masu a yoole ompwaherera – awaka hoye hoye awayasa. 
Jeremiah44:29 Eyo eniikhale eneneerowaanyu weera kinimoottaruxelani nipuro nenenenna,’ onghima Yave, ‘vano nyuwosa munoosuwela weera woopopiherelawaka wooruuhelani erisa onimweereya vekhaikhai.’" 
Jeremiah44:30 Yave oneera ha: ‘Kinoomwinnyerera Farawu* Hofera, mwene a wExipitu, mmatatani mwa amwiittanaawe anghaawela omwiiva, ntoko kaamwinnyerenraaka Zedekiya mwene a oYuda, mmatatani mwa Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, mwiittana aahaawela omwiiva.’ ”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Muyaakhani yanaaxexe moolamulani mwa Yehoyakimi, mwaana mulopwana a Yosiya, mwene a oYuda, Yeremiya aamweerela Baruki mwaana mulopwana a Neriha, alempeene Baruki vanikwakhwalani masu yaahimmwale ni Yeremiya:" 
Jeremiah45:2 “Masu Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, ongweerelaaweni nyuwo Baruki ti ala:" 
Jeremiah45:3 Nyuwo muneera: ‘Maayi miyo! Yave ohaandyeerera othanana wa ohaawawaka. Kookhulumuwa wiipulelaxa, nkiniitthuuwa.’" 
Jeremiah45:4 Vaheera Yave ookiruma wooleelani: ‘Yave oneera ha: Kinoophwata kitenkaaka ni kinoophela kiphatteiyaaka mweelaponi yootheene ela. 
Jeremiah45:5 Vano, nyuwo munoowera wiisaasera itthu soowooreerelani? Muhaasaase, niwoko kinooruuhela erisa omutthu wootheene,’ oneera Yave, ‘vaheera Miyo kinimoohiyani moopowaka muneeraanyu muroweru.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Mutthenga wa Yave waamurweenle mprofeeti Yeremiya mwaha wa miloko ti ola: 
Jeremiah46:2 Mwaha wa wExipitu: Ola mutthenga wa anakhotto a mwene a wExipitu, Farawu* Neko, aawiniwe oKarikemixi, omoolokoni Efratesi ni Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, muyaakhani yanaaxexe moolamulani wa Yehoyakimi, mwaana mulopwana a Yosiya, mwene a oYuda:" 
Jeremiah46:3 “Mureherere ixikudusanyu*, itokweene ni ikhaanene ni murowe okhottoni." 
Jeremiah46:4 Mureherere ikavalusanyu* ni ngwele! Mukhale oolikaneene ni ngware ekapaseti! Mukutthe othokani wa mavaka ni ngwarele sa ekhotto. 
Jeremiah46:5 Vaheera kingwoona etteengungweene, eneera yiihululaka; anakhottwaaya aawiniwa. Antthawa yaakuveyaka, ehiwehaka ottuli; wookhala woopiha mipatta sootheene,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah46:6 “Namaweraxa khangwera otthawa, hata oolipa khangwera woopowa. Mpatta wa ottuttuwani omoolokoni Efratesi, awosa ankwattuliwa, enuuwa." 
Jeremiah46:7 Taani ole onsara ntoko mooloko Nilu, aani ntoko maahi ootekumihiwa?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Exipitu onsara ntoko mooloko Nilu, aani ntoko nyooloko sootekumihiwa. Owo oneera: ‘Miyo kinoovenya kikhuneeleke elapo; kinoophwata isidade ni amakaaya.’" 
Jeremiah46:9 Haya nyuwo ikavalu*! Mweettihe ikaaro sa ekhotto nyuwosa anamweettiha! Murowe ohoolo, anakhotto! asilopwana a oKuxe ni a oLibiya, ankuxa ixikudu*, asilopwana oLidiya ankunga nyuura!" 
Jeremiah46:10 Vaheera nihuku nno ti na Muneene Yave a ikuru sootheene. Nnikhale nihuku na ikukuttula – noowiinlela ikukuttula awananaawe. Ekatana enoonyaanya mpaka okwaneya, aani mpaka okwaneya ohaawelawaya ephome. Niwoko Yoole onlamula sootheene, Yave a ikuru sootheene, onoopaka yooveleela mulaponi ya ottuttuwani, omoolokoni Efratesi." 
Jeremiah46:11 Murowe oGiliyade mwaase ebalsamu*; Ii! Mwaamwali oowiikosoopa, mwaana a wExipitu! Nyuwo munaasa wuukelawene mirette; khamunlama." 
Jeremiah46:12 Miloko saahiiwa sa oyevihiwawanyu; okhuwelawanyu wohiiwanyeya mulaponi yootheene ya vathi. Nakhotto mmoha onoomukwattula mukina, ni ooweeli anoomora.”" 
Jeremiah46:13 Mutthenga Yave aamuulumenlaawe mprofeeti Yeremiya mwaha wa orwa wa Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya weera awaneno wExipitu ti ola:" 
Jeremiah46:14 “Mulaleiye ela wExipitu ni muthalihe oMigdoli; muthalihetho oMemfesi ni oTapanyesi: ‘Mukhale oolikaneene! Mwiireherere! Niwoko ekatana enaanyaanya yaale ari mukhwipimwanyu. 
Jeremiah46:15 Amorelenleni anakhottwaanyu vathi? Awosa khaangwera weemela niwoko Yave ohaamoroxa.’ 
Jeremiah46:16 Anookwakwathuwa, enuuwa, animuuwelana. Awosa aneerelana: ‘Mvenye. Nrowe nihokoleele omulokoniwahu ni elapo niyareliwaahu, ottai wa ekatana ya namahooxa.’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Iwo eniyeere: ‘Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu, ti munyakunyaku paahi! Owo ooyeleela ehuhuwaawe.’" 
Jeremiah46:18 Kinlipela mwa okumaaka,” onghima Mwene, mwa Yoowo Nsinanawe Yave a ikuru sootheene, “Mmoha onimoorwa ntoko Tabori eriyari ya nyaako, aani ntoko Karemeli ophareiya." 
Jeremiah46:19 Mutthukatthuke mirindi weera murowe wootthukiwani, nyuwo munkhala wExipitu, niwoko oMemfesi onoophwatiwa; onoohala ttewu ni woohimakiwa." 
Jeremiah46:20 Exipitu ti mwaamombe ooreera, vaheera mpatta wa ottuttuwani onlummwa ni mukaanga." 
Jeremiah46:21 Anakhotto anliviwa, mmiseranimwaya ankhala ntoko aximombe ooneneva. Awosatho anoorukunuwa, etthaweke vamoha; khayaakhiwa ankhalaayamo, niwoko nihuku na owiniwawaya nneera nikhuveelaka, ehuhu ya ottaruxiwawaya." 
Jeremiah46:22 Exipitu onimoopa murika ntoko enowa etthawaka, mpaka amwiittana anaarowela ni ikuruxa. Awosa animwaarweela awExipitu ni ipaso ntoko mulopwana onuuha nyiri." 
Jeremiah46:23 Awosa animuuha othakwaawe,” onghima Yave, “naari wiilihanneene. Ahaattaxa opwaha misoope; khaanaalikeleya!" 
Jeremiah46:24 Esidade ya wExipitu enimuulihihiwa muru, enimwinnyereriwa mmatatani mwa muloko wa ottuttuwani.”" 
Jeremiah46:25 Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera: “Kinoomuttaruxa Amoni, muluku a oTebesi, Farawu*, wExipitu, milukusaya ni mamwenaaya, mpakatho yaawo animuroromela Farawu*." 
Jeremiah46:26 Miyo kinoowinnyererasa mmatatani mwa yaale antthuna owiiva; mmatatani mwa Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, ni asitokweenaawe. Wa soothesene, othanathanaru wExipitu onoomakiwa ntoko ehuhu ya khalayi,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah46:27 “Wa nyuwo murumeiyaaka Yakobe – muhoove! Ii! Yixrayeli, muhituthuwe! Miyo kinimoovuluxani mulaponi yoorakamela, ni ekhapiraanyu mulaponi mutthukiwaanyu. Yakobe onoohokolowa ni onookhala mmuretteleni; oolipeene ni khaawo eniimuungurumihe." 
Jeremiah46:28 Ii! Murumeiyaaka Yakobe, muhoove! Miyo kiri ni nyuwo,” onghima Yave. “Kinoophwata woomalela miloko sootheene eriyari ya seiyo koomwaraxenlaakani; vaheera wa nyuwo nkoophwatani woomalela. Miyo kinimoolakani ntoko mumphwanelaanyu; nkookhalelaxani oxilili.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Masu a Yave yaamurweenle mprofeeti Yeremiya mwaha wa aFilisti, Farawu* ahinaaye owanano oGaza ti ala:" 
Jeremiah47:2 Yave oneera ha: “Moone moota maahi ansaraaya ottuttuwani; awo anthatuwa oowuupa ekumburulaka. Anookombaanya elapo ela ni sootheene sirimo; mittetthe ni amakaaya. Vano, muloko onookhuwela, amaki ootheene a elapo ela anookhuwela," 
Jeremiah47:3 woowiiwa oruma wa mikhitto sa ikavalu* khira khira, onyakula wa ikaarosaya sa ekhotto, ni ophirikeya wa marekwaaya. Asitiithi kheehokolowa weera yaakhavihere anamwanaaya, niwoko matataaya anootteenguwa." 
Jeremiah47:4 Vano noophiyera nihuku noowaaphwata aFilisti ootheene ni waamalamaliha ahalahanle ootheene yeera ekhavihere oTiro ni oSidoni. Yave onimwaaphwata aFilisti, oohalahala a ecirumba ya oKaftori." 
Jeremiah47:5 Amaki a oGaza aamettha mayihi; wAxekeloni ori emaalelo. Ii! Oohalahala a munghawalawani, mpaka yaakhani nyuwo mwiinanelaka?" 
Jeremiah47:6 ‘Ii, ekatana ya Yave, mmwiitthuuwe yaakhani? Muhokoleele munluwonimwanyu, mmaale ni mwiitthuuwe.’" 
Jeremiah47:7 Vaheera eyo eniiwere hai wiitthuuwa elamuleliweene ni Yave, alakenleene weera awanane wAxekeloni ni muxerexere ephareiya?”" 
Jeremiah48:1 Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli, oneera ha mwaha wa oMowabe: “Ii! Wa Nebo, niwoko wooheleya mathala. oKiriyatayimi wohuulihiheya muru, onakuxiwa; woolipawo woohuulihiheya muru, onapwexiwa" 
Jeremiah48:2 oMowabe Khoomvuwihiwatho; oHexeboni omvaanelela oheleyawaya nthala oMowabe: ‘Nrowe! Nimalamalihe muloko ole.’ Ii! oMadimeni nyuwotho, munookhala emaalelo; ekatana enimoottharattharani." 
Jeremiah48:3 Mwiiwe okhuwela wa oHoronayimi: ‘Onanarihiwa! Ophwataxiwa!’ 
Jeremiah48:4 oMowabe woophwatiwa! Asikhaanaaya anookhuwela. 
Jeremiah48:5 Awosa ankuxera ephiro ya oLuhiti, yiinlaxaka erowoka; mmuseweni onkela oHoronayimi, oniiwanyeya okhuweliwa wa othanana mwaha wa ophwatiwa." 
Jeremiah48:6 Mutthawe! Mutthimake weera moopole okumaanyu; muthatuwe niphuwa na munikareni. 
Jeremiah48:7 Mweenre muroromelaka soopakasanyu ni mihakhusanyu, nyuwosa munoovarasiwatho, ni Kemoxi onoorowa wootthukiwani, vamoha ni asaserdotaawe ni ahoolelaawe." 
Jeremiah48:8 Namaphwata onoorweela isidade sootheene, kheewo eniyoopowe. Nreyareya nnoothatuwa nthala, ni muttuttuwani onoophwatiwamo, ntoko Yave uulummaawe." 
Jeremiah48:9 Mweeleele oMowabe, niwoko iwo onoohiiwa mathalaru; isidadesaya sinoomalamalihiwa, woohihalarumo mutthu." 
Jeremiah48:10 “Oolaphiwa yoowo omvara mooreesini muteko wa Yave! Oolaphiwa yoowo onooceeliha ekatanaawe oyeeha ephome! 
Jeremiah48:11 oMowabe onkhala woomaaleleya okhuma emiravowaaya, ntoko eviinyu ehiiwale ni nttaarikhanaya; kheeceendyiwe nipoottoro nipoottoro. oMowabe Khoonarowe wootthukiwani; tivawo, osivawaya oraaya omohamoharu ni wunkhelawaya khooceendyeiye." 
Jeremiah48:12 Tivawo, vekhaikhai anoophiyera mahuku,” oneera Yave, “kineeraaka kaarumihe anamahela a mmapoottoroni; eniihele mmapoottoroni, yiitthaxaka, epwexaka woomalela." 
Jeremiah48:13 Vano Mowabe onimuulihiheya muru ni Kemoxi, ntoko aYixrayeli yuulihihengyaaya muru ni oBeteli, mwa weiwo yaaroromelaayawo." 
Jeremiah48:14 Ongwereya hai nyuwo weera: ‘Hiyo anakhotto ooweraxa, nri anamawana’?" 
Jeremiah48:15 oMowabe woophwatiwa ni isidadesaya sinoovoloiwa; amiravowaaya ooreerela anoorowa owiiviwani,” onghima Mwene, mwa Yoowo Nsinanawe ti Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Jeremiah48:16 “Owiniwa wa oMowabe wookhuveela; erisaaya enrwa woowaakuveya. 
Jeremiah48:17 Amwiittanaaya ootheene ni ootheene asuwenle epilaaya elalamikele. Awosa yeereke: ‘Moota yintakiwaaya ekopo yoowera, ekopo ya emwene yoovuwaxa!’" 
Jeremiah48:18 Mukhuruwe moovuwanimwanyu ni mukilaathi vathi puruvuru, ii! Amaki a esidade ya oDiboni, niwoko namaphwata a oMowabe ohoorwa woowananani ni ophwata isidadesanyu soolipihiwa." 
Jeremiah48:19 Mukhale munseweni ni ngwehawehe, nyuwosa munkhala wAroweri. Munkohe mulopwana ontthawa ni muthiyana onoopowa, mwaakohase: ‘Ekhumelenleni?’" 
Jeremiah48:20 oMowabe wohuulihiheya muru, niwoko woopwexiwa. Mukhuwele ni muhihimere! Mulaleiye wArenoni weera Mowabe oophwatiwa." 
Jeremiah48:21 Nthorihelo noophiya ottuttuwani: oHoloni, oYahazi ni oMefaati," 
Jeremiah48:22 oDiboni, oNebo ni oBeti-Diblatayimi," 
Jeremiah48:23 oKiriyatayimi, oBeti-Gamuli ni oBeti-Meyoni," 
Jeremiah48:24 oKertiyoti ni oBozera – wa isidade sootheene sa oMowabe sa ottai ni sa vakhiviru. 
Jeremiah48:25 Owera wa Mowabe woomalihiwa; moonowaawe wohintakiwa,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah48:26 “Munghapalihe, niwoko owo oomveiha Yave. oMowabe wiivottokolele marapheyowaaya ni okhale munyemu." 
Jeremiah48:27 Yixrayeli aari eneneero ya otthebwiwawanyu. Weeraka owo aaphwanyiwa vamoha ni anamwiiya nyuwo mumpukunyeraanyu muru suulummwaka sa yaale? 
Jeremiah48:28 Muhiye isidadesanyu! Mmake mmakhukuni, nyuwosa munkhala oMowabe! Mukhale ntoko ekhunda empaka epuurwaaya mmilakoni mwa inyatta." 
Jeremiah48:29 Nohiiwa sa wiixoona wa oMowabe – wiikuxawaya otokotoko, wiivuwihawaya wootheene, ni murimaaya woowiikuxerera." 
Jeremiah48:30 Koosuwela nnenesene wiixoonawaya,” onghima Yave, “mene ti woohimuteko, ni mitekosaya soohivareleya muteko." 
Jeremiah48:31 Tivawo kinlalamikelaaka oMowabe, kinookhuwelela elapo yootheene ya oMowabe, kinimwaathananela amaki ootheene a oKiri-Hareseti." 
Jeremiah48:32 Ii! Ivideira* sa oSibema, kinoowiinlelaxani ntoko kiinlenlaaka oYazeri. Iphandisaya saarambela mphareiya siphiyaka mpaka mphareiya ya oYazeri. Namaphwata oomorela soowiimasaya ni iwuuvasaya." 
Jeremiah48:33 Ohakalala ni mpuha woolakaseya wa ilapo sooruwereya sa Mowabe. Kohooceeliha waatta wa iwuuva* sinaamiwaayamo. Khawoworu omvotta iwuuva* ni okhuwela wa ohakalala; naari okhuweliwaka – khoohiyono wa ohakalala. 
Jeremiah48:34 Okhuweliwa wa oHexiboni oniiwanyeya wEleyaleni ni oYahazi, okhuma oZowari mpaka oHoronayimi ni wEglati-Xelisiya, niwoko mpaka maahi a oNimerimi aawelela." 
Jeremiah48:35 oMowabe kinimwaamalamaliha yaale ampakela sooveleela mwaaltaarini a miluku sikina ni anghisera erubani* milukusaya,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah48:36 “Tivawo murimaaka onlalamikelaaya oMowabe, ntoko mpetta; aani ntoko mpetta mwa amaki a oKiri-Hareseti. Mihakhu yaathukumanyaaya soolakaseya." 
Jeremiah48:37 Khula muru woometthiwa ni irerusene; matata ootheene ari makhwattaru ni eyuunu yootheene yookutteleliwa ni ikuwo soolalamikano. 
Jeremiah48:38 Mutaratoni moothemwene mwa oMowabe ni mmapuwani kheewo eriwo ohikhanle wiikhupanyera, niwoko koopwexakasa oMowabe ntoko nipoottoro nihinghaaweliwaru,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah48:39 “Moota ophwatiwaaya! Moota anlalamikaaya amakaaya! Moota oMowabe onreraaya ettuli, woowuulihiheyeene muru! oMowabe woothatuwa eneneero ya otthebwiwa ni moopopihero wa amwaattamanaaya ootheene.”" 
Jeremiah48:40 Yave oneera ha: “Moone! Xaaka onkungela mapupha oMowabe. 
Jeremiah48:41 oKeriyoti onoovariwa, ni isidadesaya soolipihiwa sinookuxiwa. Nihuku nno ominya murima wa anakhotto a oMowabe onuukhale ntoko wa muthiyana ayaraka." 
Jeremiah48:42 oMowabe onoophwatiwa ntoko muloko niwoko owo woomvaanya Yave. 
Jeremiah48:43 Ii! Muloko wa oMowabe woopiha, nlitti ni muraakho onimoowehererani,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah48:44 “Yoowo anaatthawe woopiha, onoomorela mulittini, ni yoowo anaakhume mulittini, onoopharihiwa munraakhoni. Kinooruuhela oMowabe ehuhu ya nttaruxonaya,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah48:45 “Vamunttuusini wa oHexiboni, anamatthawa anoophwanyiwa ttewu, niwoko mooro onrweela oHexiboni, ekamaama ya oSihoni; ni onghisa iyuuci sa aMowabe ni makarakasa a atthu oonyakula." 
Jeremiah48:46 Ii! Wa nyuwo oMowabe! Muloko wa Kemoxi woophwatiwa; anamwaniinyu asilopwana anronghiwa wootthukiwani, ni anamwaniinyu asithiyana wuuwutho." 
Jeremiah48:47 Wa soothesene, kinooreherera oreereliwa wa Mowabe muhoolommo,” onghima Yave. Nthorihelo na oMowabe ninkotela va." 
Jeremiah49:1 Mwaha wa awAmoni: Yave oneera ha: “Weeraka Yixrayeli khanono anamwane? Khawoworu namahiyeriwa? Heeni Moleki iikuxenraawe oGadi? Mulokwaawe onkhalelani musidade sa oGadi? 
Jeremiah49:2 Vanonto, vekhaikhai anoophiyera mahuku,” onghima Yave, “kineeraaka kirumihihele okhuweliwa wa ekhotto oRaba ankhalaayawo awAmoni; eyo enookhala ittuxo sa mathala, ni mittetthe sa mukhwipimwaya sinoohisiwa. Vano aYixrayeli anoowoomola yaale yaawoomonle,” oneera Yave." 
Jeremiah49:3 “Ii! Hexiboni, wiikhupanyere, niwoko wAi woophwatiwawo! Ii! Amaki a oRaba! Mukhuwele! Ngware soolalamikano ni mwiinle! Mwaase otthimaka, niwoko Moloki onoorowa wootthukiwani vamoha ni asaserdotaawe ni asitokweenaawe." 
Jeremiah49:4 Muniixoonela heeni ni mareyareyaanyu? Muniixoonela heeni ni mareyareyaanyu a ethaadyira? Ii! Mwaana muthiyana oohiroromeleya! Nyuwo munroromela mihakhusanyu mweeraka: ‘Taani anaakiwanane?’ 
Jeremiah49:5 Kinoopakiha weera moove sootheene soorukureenreni,” oneera Yave, Yave a ikuru sootheene. “Nyuwosa munoomwaraxiwa, khula mutthu mpattaawe, ni khaawo anaawere waathukumanyiha anamatthawa." 
Jeremiah49:6 Wa soothesene, vahoolowaya, kinooreherera oreereliwa wa awAmoni,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah49:7 Mwaha wa wEdomi: Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: “Weeraka miruku soomala oTema? Weeraka olaka wa anamiruku woolakaseya? Mirukusaya soothowa? 
Jeremiah49:8 Murukunuwe ni mutthawe, mwiipithe munikhukuni moowiixa, nyuwosa munkhala oDedani, niwoko kinoomuhela nthala Esawu mweehuhuni kineeraaka kimuttaruxe." 
Jeremiah49:9 Anamahepha a iwuuva* yoorweenleni, khayoohiyerani iwuuva* vakhaani? Anamwiiya yaarwiiye moohiyuni, khayiiya paahi yeeyo antthunaaya?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Mene Miyo koomurula Esawu, kinoonelela moowiipithamwawe, weera owo ahiipithetho. Anamwanaawe xaxaxa ni amwaattamanaawe aaphwatasiwa. Khawoworu ohanle." 
Jeremiah49:11 ‘Mwaahiye akwaasunaanyu; Miyo kinimwaakosoopa. Asinaamukhwelaanyutho ekiroromele Miyo.’ ” 
Jeremiah49:12 Yave oneera ha: “Yaale yahaaphwanela owura ekoomixi antthuneya owura, heeni nyuwosa muhintthuneyaanyu owura? Nyuwo khamukhala woohittaruxiwa, mene munoowura." 
Jeremiah49:13 Miyo kiniilipela muneenaaka,“ onghima Yave, “weera Bozera onookhala mathala oohimakiwa; owo onoothatuwa eneneero ya munyakunyaku, otthebwiwa ni nlapho, ni isidadesawe sootheene sinookhala mathala oohimala.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Kohiiwa mutthenga wa mpatta wa Yave; namutthenga oorumiheliwa oleela miloko: “Muthukumane weera mungwanane Edomi! Mwiirehererele owana!” 
Jeremiah49:15 “Vano Miyo kinoopakani nyuwo muloko mukhaanene eriyari ya sikina iyo, ahinoonelaaya atthu." 
Jeremiah49:16 Woova muntannyaanyu ni wiixoona wa mirimasanyu wohoolokotthani, nyuwo munkhala mmakhukuni, munaakamela osuluxa wa mattumuxa. Naari nyuwo mpakaka epuurwaanyu osuluxa ntoko xaaka, kinimoomoroxaniwo,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah49:17 “wEdomi onoothatuwa moopopihero; ootheene eniivirewo anoothikileya muthana, etheyeke, niwoko na makhwattaawe ootheene." 
Jeremiah49:18 Mooteene yoowo waaphwatiwaaya oSodoma ni oGomora vamoha ni isidade soowaattamana,” oneera Yave, “hiihotho khaawo anaamakewotho, naari mutthu mmoha." 
Jeremiah49:19 Ntoko mwatto omvolowa ntuphini na Yordanu arowoka moocaani moosareya malaxi, wootutuxereya Miyo kinoomulupattha Edomi kimoomolaka mulaponimwawe. Oothanliwa heeni kineeraaka kimurume yeeyo? Taani ori ntoko Miyo anaawere okipakela mpikisaano? Ni mukukhuli heeni anaawere okiwanano?”" 
Jeremiah49:20 Tivawo, mwiiwe yeeyo Yave omvaanelenlaawe Edomi ni yeeyo aarehererenlaawe amaki a oTemani: Axaana a muhuwo anoopuruliwa, ni moocihamo onoonanarihiwa mwaha wa yaawosa." 
Jeremiah49:21 Etthaya enootetereya woowiiwa oruma wa omorawaya; okhuwelawaya onimwiiwanyeya mpaka Ephareiya Yooxeera. 
Jeremiah49:22 Moone! Xaaka awelaka onkhuruwa, akungenleene mapupha oBozera. Nihuku nno ominya murima wa anakhotto a wEdomi onuukhale ntoko muthiyana ayaraka." 
Jeremiah49:23 Mwaha wa oDamasku: “wAmati ni wArepadi wohoopopiheya niwoko ahiiwa ihaali soonanara. Khaalipiheiye murima ni ootthukuruweene ntoko ephareiya yootekumihiwa. 
Jeremiah49:24 oDamasku woothatuwa woophweeya, woorukunuwa weera otthawe, orukureereya muru woovara; othanana ni ovoreyawaya woovara, ovoreya ntoko muthiyana ayaraka." 
Jeremiah49:25 Moota ethaamiwaaya esidade yoowiiwanyeya – aani esidade ya ohakalala! 
Jeremiah49:26 Tivawo, amiravowaaya eneeraaya emorele mmiseweni ni anakhottwaaya ootheene emaale nihuku nno,” onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Jeremiah49:27 “Kinoopattiha ixiri sa oDamasku, sineera silalihe mapuro oolipihiwa mwa Beni-Hadadi.”" 
Jeremiah49:28 Vano yeeyo Yave onghimaawe mwaha wa oKedari ni imwene sa oHazori, mwa seiye Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, aawinnaawe ti ela: Mwiireherere, ngwaneno oKedari ni mphwate muloko wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa." 
Jeremiah49:29 Mukuxe iheemasaya ni mihuwosaya, iluttusaya vamoha ni ikarumasaya sootheene ni ikamelu*. Atthu animwaakhuwelela: ‘Wookhala woopiha mipatta sootheene!’" 
Jeremiah49:30 Mutthawe woowaakuveya! Mwiipithe mmakhukuni oowiixa, nyuwosa amaki a oHazori,” onghima Yave. “Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, ohoovaanelelani." 
Jeremiah49:31 Mwiireherere ni ngwanane elapo enkhala yoomaaleleya ni yoowiiroromela,” onghima Yave, “elapo ehinono masele naari anampattika, enkhala meekhaaya." 
Jeremiah49:32 Ikamelusaya sinoothatuwa soohuhuliwa ni nakupa a axinamaaya oohiiwa. Kinimwaamwaraxela mpheyoni yaale amvukula mayihi ni kinimwaaruuhela erisa mipatta sootheene,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah49:33 “oHazori onoothatuwa nipuro ankhalaayawo akwatte, nthala noohimala. Khaawo anaamakewotho, naari mutthu mmoha.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Masu a Yave yaamurweenle mprofeeti Yeremiya mwaha wa wElami, ompacereroni wa olamula wa mwene Zedekiya, mwene a oYuda, ti ala:" 
Jeremiah49:35 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: “Moone, kinimwiintaka muura wa Elami, erimarima ya owerawaya." 
Jeremiah49:36 Kinoopakiha weera ipheyo ixexe sinrweela mipatta mixexe sa wiirimu soopele wElami. Miyo kinimwaamwaraxela mpheyoni ixexe, anamatthukiwa a wElami anooronghiwa wootthukiwani mmilokoni sootheene sa mulaponi." 
Jeremiah49:37 Kinoopakiha weera wElami othukumele ohoolo wa amwiittanaaya, ohoolo wa yaale anghaawela owiiva amakaaya. Kinimwaaruuhela erisa, isarasaka soopatta,” onghima Yave. “Kinoopakiha weera ekatana yaattharelele mpaka Miyo kineeraaka kaamalamalihe." 
Jeremiah49:38 Kinookhaliha wElami ehicaaka ya emwene ni kinoomphwata mwene ni asitokweenaawe,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah49:39 “Wa soothesene, kinooreherera oreereliwa wa Elami mmahukuni a muhoolo,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah50:1 Masu uulummaawe Yave mwa mprofeeti Yeremiya mwaha wa oBabiloniya ni elapo ya aBabiloniya ti ala: 
Jeremiah50:2 “Muhime ni mulaleiye eriyari ya miloko, mweemexe eneneero ni mulaleiye; muhikhuweru. Mweere: ‘oBabiloniya woowiniwa; Beli ooyevihiwa, Marduki ootteenguwa. Icaambulo sa aBabiloniya sooyevihiwa ni milukusaya sootteenguwa.’" 
Jeremiah50:3 Muloko onuurweele mpatta wa ottuttuwani onoowanano, onoophwata elapwaaya woohimuhiyarumo mmaki; okhuma atthu mpaka axinama anootthawa." 
Jeremiah50:4 Mmahukuni awo ni mweehuhuni eyo,” onghima Yave, “muloko wa oYixrayeli ni wa oYuda onimoorwa vamoha, wiinlaka ni omwaasaka Yave Mulukwaaya." 
Jeremiah50:5 Anookoha ephiro enkela oSiyoni ni anookuxera. Animoorwa emvarexexeke Yave ngwiiraanani woohimala oneera ohittiwaliwe. 
Jeremiah50:6 Mulokwaaka woothweelela ntoko ikhoondoolo sooriheya; akukhulaaya aathweeleliha, sinamwareela mmwaako. Iyo sooxoraxorela mmanyaakoni ni mmattumuxani sinattiwala munikhoolanimwaya." 
Jeremiah50:7 Ootheene amphwanya anookhuura. Awananaaya yeenre: ‘Khaninthowa, niwoko awo aamutthekela Yave, Moocamwaya xaxaxa, aani Yave ori Oweherera wa makholowaaya.’" 
Jeremiah50:8 Mutthawe oBabiloniya! Mukhume mulaponi mwa aBabiloniya ni mukhale ntoko anapunci anghoolela muhuwo. 
Jeremiah50:9 Mpatta wa ottuttuwani kinoorumiha miloko sooweraxa weera singwaneno Babiloniya. Anoowanano elapo ni eyo enookuxiwa mpatta wa ottuttuwani. Nyuupasaya nsikhale ntoko anakhotto ooweraxa mwa seiyo sihinkuzaru. 
Jeremiah50:10 Hiiho oBabiloniya onoohuhuliwa; ootheene eniihuhule oBabiloniya anookwaneya,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah50:11 “Hapo nyuwo moohakalala, mutthapaka, nyuwo munghuhula yoohiyeraaka; hapo nyuwo munthamaliwa ntoko mwaamombe ootaphuliwa aatthukeleliwaawewo, ni muntturuma ntoko ikavalu* ilopwana," 
Jeremiah50:12 amayinyu animuulihiheyaxa muru; yoowo ooyanreni onooyevihiwa. oBabiloniya onookhala wooyevaxa wa ilapo sootheene; ntoko nikare noowuumelela noohikhalano maahi. 
Jeremiah50:13 Niwoko na isara sa Yave iwo khoomakiwa, mene onoohala ttewu woomalela. Ootheene eniivire oBabiloniya anoothikileya muthana, etheyeke mwaha wa makhwattaawe ootheene." 
Jeremiah50:14 Muthataanele owana murukureenreene oBabiloniya, ootheene nyuwo mvarenle nyuupa. Mulathele! Muhuurele nyuupa, niwoko iwo woomutthekela Yave." 
Jeremiah50:15 Orumele oBabiloniya okhuweliwa wa ekhotto mipatta sootheene! Iwo oneemexa matata, itooresaya* simmora ni ixirisaya simphwatiwa. Iyo ikukuttula sa Yave; mwiinlele ikukuttula! Mpakele yeeyo iwo waapakenlaaya ikhwaaya!" 
Jeremiah50:16 Mummalamalihe namwaala ni namahepha vamoha ni ecikwaakhwaawe moohephani. Khula mutthu ahokoleele omulokoniwawe, ni atthawele mulaponimwawe niwoko na namahooxa." 
Jeremiah50:17 Yixrayeli muhuwo woomwaraxiwa, woomoliwe ni amwatto. Opacenre omunyaanya aari mwene a wAsiriya; oomalihera opwexakasa makhuvaaya aari Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya.”" 
Jeremiah50:18 Vano Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: “Kinoomuttaruxa mwene a oBabiloniya ni elapwaaweene ntoko kaamuttarunxaaka mwene a wAsiriya." 
Jeremiah50:19 Vaheera kinoomuhokoloxera Yixrayeli moocamwawe ni anaace mmanyaakoni sa oKaremelu ni oBaxani; onoomaliha ovoliwawawe etala mmattumuxani a wEfrayimi ni oGiliyade. 
Jeremiah50:20 Mmahukuni awo ni mweehuhuni eyo,” onghima Yave, “sinimwaasaasiwa sootakhala sa oYixrayeli, mene khasiphwanyiwaru; mwa soottheka sa oYuda, mene khasiphwanyiwaru, niwoko kinimwaalevelela ahalahanle kineeraaka kiwuurele." 
Jeremiah50:21 Ngwanane elapo ya oMeratayimi ni yaale ankhala oPekodi. Mwaattharelele, ngwiive ni mwaaphwate woomalela,” onghima Yave. “Mpake sootheene koolamulenlaakani." 
Jeremiah50:22 Wookhala oruma wa owaniwa mulaponi; ophwata otokotoko! 
Jeremiah50:23 Moota epwexiwaaya ni ephwatiwaaya enyutto ela ya mulaponi moothemwene! Moota othaamiwaaya oBabiloniya eriyari ya miloko! 
Jeremiah50:24 Ii! oBabiloniya, kohoorehererelani ntapha, nyuwo mvariwe muhisuwelaka; nyuwo mphwanyeriwe ni mvareliwe niwoko na omvaanya Yave." 
Jeremiah50:25 Yave oohula okapwitthiniwawe, anakhumihera vaate ikapwitthi sa isarasawe, niwoko Yave onlamula sootheene, Yave a ikuru sootheene, ookhalano muteko woovara mulaponi mwa oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah50:26 A ekotenle elapo murwe ngwaneno yeeyo. Mukarasule matathaaya; muthataanyere ntoko ihupu sa irooro. Mphwate woomalela ni muhimuhiyeru naari oohalahala mmoha. 
Jeremiah50:27 Ngwiivakase amiravowaaya ootheene! Awosa erowase owiiviwani! Ii! Wa yaawosa! Nohaaphiyera nihukunaya, ehuhu ya ottaruxiwawaya." 
Jeremiah50:28 Ngwiiwe anamatthawa ni yaale atthangwe ekhumaka oBabiloniya, elaleiyaka oSiyoni moota Yave, Mulukwaahu, iinlenlaawe ikukuttula, aani iinlenlaawe Empaawe." 
Jeremiah50:29 Ngwiitthanele ananyuupa oBabiloniya, ootheene yaale amvarela nyuura. Ekonele ootheene mukhwipimwawe; ahikhaleru anaatthawe. Mutthuvele muttharihaka ipakelosaya; mpakele iwo sootheene opankaaya. Niwoko iwo woomveiha Yave, Ootteela a oYixrayeli." 
Jeremiah50:30 Tivawo, amiravowaaya eneeraaya emorele mmiseweni ni anakhottwaaya ootheene anoomaala nihuku nno,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Ii! Namwiixoona, moone, koowiittani,” onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, Yave a ikuru sootheene, “Niwoko noophiyera nihukunanyu, ehuhuwaanyu ya ottaruxiwa." 
Jeremiah50:32 Namwiixoona onookwakwathuwa, uuweke ni khaawo anaamukhavihere ovenya. Kinoopattiha isidadesawe, ni mooro onoolaliha sootheene sa mukhwipimwawe.”" 
Jeremiah50:33 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: “Muloko wa oYixrayeli onnihasuliwa, mpakatho muloko wa oYuda. Anamavaraaya ootheene anaavara yaalipihaka, ekhoottaka waahiya orowa." 
Jeremiah50:34 Wa soothesene, Namoopolaaya ti oolipa; Nsinanawe ti Yave a ikuru sootheene. Yooweene ti anaakihe mulattwaaya, ni onooruuhela wiitthuuwa elapwaaya, mene onoowuungurumiha yaawo ankhala oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah50:35 Ekatana yoowaawanano aBabiloniya!” onghima Yave, “wa yaawo ankhala oBabiloniya ni wa ahooleli ni anamirukwaaya!" 
Jeremiah50:36 Ekatana yoowaawanano maprofeetaaya oowootha! Awosa anoothatuwa masikini. Ekatana yoowaawanano anakhottwaaya! Awosa anootteenguwa. 
Jeremiah50:37 Ekatana yoowanano ikavalusaya*, wa ikaarosaya sa ekhotto ni wa anamarwa ootheene mmisewenimwaya! Awosa eniikhale ntoko asithiyana. Ekatana yoowanano mihakhusaya! Awosa anoohuhuliwa." 
Jeremiah50:38 Ekatana yoowanano maahaaya! Awo animuuma. Niwoko ti elapo yoosareya icaambulo soopatthiwa, ni elapo eyo ensivelaxa icaambulo iyo." 
Jeremiah50:39 Tivawo soopattuxiwa sa munikareni ni akusupa eneeraaya ekhalemo, ni isiisi sinoomakamo. Eyo kheemakiwatho hata muhoolommo khakhalaru anaamakemo." 
Jeremiah50:40 Mooteene yoole Muluku aaphwantaawe oSodoma ni oGomora ni isidade soowaattamana,” onghima Yave, “khaawo anaamakewo, naari mmoha." 
Jeremiah50:41 Moone! Oneera orwaaka muloko wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani; muloko mutokotoko ni mamwene mancipale aniireherera okhuma ekotenle elapo. 
Jeremiah50:42 Awosa amvarela muura ni nivaka; ti oowuuma murima ni oohimorela ikharari. Onyakulawaya ori ntoko oruma wa ephareiya. Anrwa ewenleene ikavalu*, ethataanelaka owana, weera yoowananeni nyuwo, esidade ya oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah50:43 Mwene a oBabiloniya iiwakaru suulummwaka sa yaawo, matataawe yaatteenguwa. Othanana waamvara, ovoreya ntoko muthiyana ayaraka." 
Jeremiah50:44 Miyo kinoolupattha oBabiloniya wootutuxereya ntoko mwatto onkhuma mutuphini na oYordanu arowaka omunyepuni wooreerela, iirakamelihaka elapwaawe. Oothanliwa heeni kineeraaka kimurume yeeyo? Taani onlikana ni Miyo ongwera okipakela mpikisaano? Khawowo mukukhuli anaawere okiwanano.”" 
Jeremiah50:45 Tivawo, mwiiwe yeeyo Yave aavaanelenlaawe aBabiloniya, yeeyo orehererenlaawe oBabiloniya: Axaana a mihuwo anoopuruliwa, ni moocihamo onoonanarihiwa niwoko na yaawosa." 
Jeremiah50:46 Elapo enootetereya woowiiwa oruma wa okuxiwa wa elapo ya oBabiloniya; okhuwelawaya onimwiiwanyeya eriyari ya miloko. 
Jeremiah51:1 Yave oneera ha: “Moone! Kinimoopihera epheyo yoophwata oBabiloniya ni wa muloko wa oLebi-Kamai. 
Jeremiah51:2 Kinimwaarumihela anamarwa oBabiloniya weera eveerewo ntoko etrigu ni ephwate elapwaaya. Munihukuni na erisaaya atthu a mipatta sootheene anoorweela yeeyo. 
Jeremiah51:3 Namuupa ahikunge muuraawe naari ahiwarele sa ekhotto. Muhiwuurele amiravowaaya ari anakhotto; mwaaphwate woomalela anakhottwaaya. 
Jeremiah51:4 Awosa anookhwela oBabiloniya, oovulaliheriweene mmiseweni ehalaka vakhaani okhwa." 
Jeremiah51:5 Yixrayeli ni Yuda khaathaamiwe ni Mulukwaaya, Yave a ikuru sootheene ntoko asinaamukhweli, elapo ya aBabiloniya eroosareyaru nthowa ohoolo wa Ootteela a oYixrayeli." 
Jeremiah51:6 Mutthawe oBabiloniya! Khula mutthu atthimakeke uurelaka okumaawe! Muhiphwatiwe niwoko na sootakhalasaya. Ti ehuhu ya ikukuttula sa Yave; Owo onooliva oBabiloniya yeeyo emphwanelaaya. 
Jeremiah51:7 Babiloniya aari ekoomixi ya eyuuma yoorikaxa mmatatani mwa Yave; eyo yoohapaliha elapo yootheene. Miloko soowura eviinyuwaaya; tivawo sipupurumiheiyaaya. 
Jeremiah51:8 Wootutuxereya oBabiloniya woomora, onaheleya nthala. Mulalamikele yeeyo! Mwaasere ebalsamu* nikhwattanaya; apaale nnoovola." 
Jeremiah51:9 ‘Nannatthuna olammeene oBabiloniya, mene iwo khoongwera olamihiwa; muhiye, nrowe, khula mutthu mulaponimwawe, niwoko othorihiwawaya woophiya wiirimu, woorakamaxa mpaka waamahutte.’" 
Jeremiah51:10 ‘Yave oonaakiha; nrowe, nathalihe oSiyoni yeeyo Yave, Mulukwaahu opankaawe.’" 
Jeremiah51:11 Munone nyuupa, mukuxe ixikudu! Yave ohaatannya mamwene a oMediya, eerelaka ophwata oBabiloniya. Yave onimwiinlela ikukuttula ophwatiwa wa Empaawe!" 
Jeremiah51:12 Mweemexe eneneero yoowanano oBabiloniya! Ngwaandyeerere anamalipelela! Mwaathate masintinela! Mwiirehererele owana! Yave onookwanihera yoovaanelaawe, yeeyo yoopopinghe opakeliwa amaki a oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah51:13 Nyuwo munkhala moohithowa maahi ni musareiye mihakhu – woophiyera ommaleloniwanyu, aani ehuhu ya omalamalihiwawanyu." 
Jeremiah51:14 Yave a ikuru sootheene ohiilipela eeraka: “Vekhaikhai kinoosariha oBabiloniya ni atthu, ntoko nasope, ni awosa anookhuwela ngwoowinanimwanyu." 
Jeremiah51:15 Vaheera ti Muluku opattunxe elapo ya vathi ni ikurusawe; Owo aakhaliha yeeyo ni mirukusawe ni aakunga erimu ni wiiwexexawawe. 
Jeremiah51:16 Etaraawe erumaka, maahi a wiirimu anoorumatho; Owo ompakiha weera mahutte ekungeele okhuma ekotenle elapo. Owo omverunyiha epula, anoopiha epheyo yuukaannaayawo." 
Jeremiah51:17 Ootheenaawo alolo ni oohisuwela; khula neettottho onuulihiheya muru mwa ecaambulo opantthaawe. Icaambulosawe soopatthiwa ti mwiiyero, iyo khasinono ngwiya wa okumi." 
Jeremiah51:18 Iyo ti soohivareleya muteko, siri etthu yootthebwano. Waarwaaka othorihiwawaya, sinooriheya." 
Jeremiah51:19 Yoole ori ettima ya Yakobe khanlikana ni yaalasa, niwoko ti Yoowo ompaka itthu sootheene, ni Yixrayeli ti epuumba ya yoohiyeraawe; Nsinanawe ti Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Jeremiah51:20 Nyuwo ti enyuttwaaka, kapwitthaaka oongwanano. Kinnyaanya miloko mwa nyuwo; kimphwata imwene mwa nyuwo." 
Jeremiah51:21 Mwa nyuwo kinnyaanya ekavalu* ni namweettihaaya, aani kinnyaanya ekaaro ya ekhotto ni namweettihaaya;" 
Jeremiah51:22 mwa nyuwo kinimunyaanya mulopwana ni muthiyana, mutokweene ni mukhaani, mmiravo ni mwaamwali," 
Jeremiah51:23 mukukhuli ni muhuwo, namalima ni emombe, maguvernadori ni asitokweene." 
Jeremiah51:24 Vamaithoniwanyu kinootthuvela oBabiloniya ni ootheene ankhalawo yoonanara yootheene apankaaya oSiyoni,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah51:25 “Ii!, mwaako woophwata, elapweeneeyo, Miyo koowiittani,” onghima Yave. “Kinoowookolelani moonowaaka, Miyo kinimoopirikixelani vamwala, ni kinimoopakani mwaako wa ettuxuweene." 
Jeremiah51:26 Khanikhalaru nluku nneera nivenxiwe mwa nyuwo weera nikhale noottittimiheya, naari wa mathipelo, niwoko nyuwo munooheleya nthala wa mahuku ootheene,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Mweemexe eneneero mulaponi! Mwiipe nipalapatta eriyari ya miloko! Murehererele miloko soowanano; mwiitthane imwene iya: wArarate, oMini ni wAxekenaxi. Munthanlele mutokweene a anakhotto anaawaneno; murumihele ikavalu* okhottoni ntoko nasope." 
Jeremiah51:28 Mureherere miloko weera siwaneno oBabiloniya: Mamwene a waMedu, maguvernadoraaya ni asitokweenaaya ootheene, ni ilapo sootheene anlamulaaya." 
Jeremiah51:29 Elapo enthukumela, epirituwaka mwaha wa ovoreya, niwoko soovaanela sa Yave simpwahererela oBabiloniya: Ohela nthala elapo ya oBabiloniya weera ehimakiwe." 
Jeremiah51:30 Anakhotto a oBabiloniya aahiyerera owana; ampwaherera okhala moolipamwaya. Sohaamalela ikurusaya; aathatuwa ntoko asithiyana. Moomakamwaya moohisiwa; anampattika a maselaaya akarasuliwa. 
Jeremiah51:31 Murummwa onrowa mmoha mmoha ni namutthenga omvenya mmoha mmoha weera emulaleere mwene a oBabiloniya weera esidadaawe yootheene yoovariwa," 
Jeremiah51:32 mithato sa nyooloko sookuxiwa, munyepu wa muttaponi woohisiwa, ni anakhotto ahoopopiheya.”" 
Jeremiah51:33 Yave a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli oneera ha: “Esidade ya oBabiloniya eri ntoko waneepettheliwa; ehuhu ya ohepha enoophiyerela woowaakuveya.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, ooninyaanya, oonipupurumiha, oonipaka exaaru yoohikhala etthu. Oonimira ntoko enowa, oonivona ni ikhaanikhaanisahu, ananirapheya." 
Jeremiah51:35 “Nipuhero nipakeliwe irutthusahu nikhale mwa oBabiloniya,” aneera amaki a oSiyoni. “Ephomaahu yaamorele yaale ankhala oBabiloniya,” oneera Yerusaleemu." 
Jeremiah51:36 Tivawo Yave oneeraawe ha: “Moone, kinimwaakiha mulattwaanyu ni kinoowiinlelani ikukuttula; kinimuumiha ephareiyaaya ni kinimwaaweleliha anaattuuttwaaya." 
Jeremiah51:37 oBabiloniya onoohala ittuxoru, woomaka wa akhwatte, moopopihero ni yootthebwano; nipuro nihinkhaliwaru." 
Jeremiah51:38 Mulokwaaya wootheene wa oBabiloniya ontturuma ntoko amwatto axaana, ankonga ntoko axaana a mwatto." 
Jeremiah51:39 Vaheera ehaawelaxaka oca, kinimwaarehererela efesta kaahapaliheke, weera ehakalalaxe, ni evirelele okona woohivenyatho,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah51:40 “Miyo kinimwaakuxa ntoko eputtiputthi eronghiwaka owiiviwani, ntoko ikhondoolo ni anapunci." 
Jeremiah51:41 Moota oXexaki ovariwaaya! Moota wiixoona wa elapo yootheene okuxiwaaya! Moota oBabiloniya woopihaaya eriyari ya miloko! 
Jeremiah51:42 Ephareiya enookhalela owali oBabiloniya; mitekutekusaya sinookhuneela iwo. 
Jeremiah51:43 Isidadesaya sinoophwatiwa, elapo yoowuumelela ni ya nikare, elapo ehinkhaliwaru, mwa weiwo ohimviriwaru." 
Jeremiah51:44 Kinoomuttaruxela Beli oBabiloniya, kimurapheihaka ominraawe. Miloko khasitthimakelawo. Ni exiri ya oBabiloniya enoomora." 
Jeremiah51:45 Mulokwaaka, mukhumemo! Khula mutthu oopole okumaawe musarani soopatta sa Yave." 
Jeremiah51:46 Muhiporore naari muhoove mwiiwaka minyakunyaku mulaponi; munyakunyaku mmoha mutano, mukina mwaahiyu, munyakunyaku mwaha wa nipuhero mulaponi ni wa mulamuli mmoha angwananaka mukina." 
Jeremiah51:47 Vanonto, woohihovela, anoophiyera mahuku kineeraaka kittaruxe icaambulo soopatthiwa sa oBabiloniya; elapwaaya yootheene enimuulihiheya muru, ni anamakhwaaya animwaataleleyamo oomoreene." 
Jeremiah51:48 Vano erimu ni etthaya ni sootheene sirimo sinookhuwela ni ohakalala mwaha wa oBabiloniya, niwoko anamaphwata a mpatta wa ottuttuwani anoowanano,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah51:49 “oBabiloniya onoomora mwaha wa anamakhwa a oYixrayeli, ntokotho anamakhwa a elapo yootheene yaamonraaya niwoko na oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah51:50 Nyuwosa moopongwe mwa ekatana mukhume! Muhipwaherere! Mmuupuwelele Yave mulaponi yoorakamela, ni muupuwelele oYerusaleemu.”" 
Jeremiah51:51 Nyuwosa mmweere: “Nohuulihiheya muru niwoko nooruwaniwa ni wuuliheya muru woosareya mukhovenimwahu, yeenre anamarwa ephutula mmapuroni ootteela a Empa ya Yave." 
Jeremiah51:52 Vanonto vekhaikhai anoophiyera mahuku,” onghima Yave, “kineeraaka kittaruxe icaambulosaya soopatthiwa, ni mulaponimwaya yootheene oovulala onimwiipulela." 
Jeremiah51:53 Naari oBabiloniya ophiyaka wiirimu ni opakaka osulu wootthawelawaya woolipa, kinoorumihela anamaphwata,” onghima Yave." 
Jeremiah51:54 “Oniiwanyeya onyakuliwa oBabiloniya; onyakula wa ophwata otokotoko onrweela mulaponi ya oBabiloniya. 
Jeremiah51:55 Yave onoophwata oBabiloniya; Owo onoomaaliha orumawaya woowiiwanyeya. Mitekuteku sa amwiittana sinoopwaherera ntoko maahi oowaatta; otturuma wa maswaaya onooruma. 
Jeremiah51:56 Namaphwata onoorweela oBabiloniya; anakhottwaawe anoovariwa, ni nyuurasawe sinimwintakiwa. Niwoko Yave ti Muluku a ikukuttula; Owo onootthuvela woomalela." 
Jeremiah51:57 Kinimwaahapaliha ahoolelaaya ni anamirukwaaya; maguvernadoraaya, asitokweenaaya ni anakhottwaaya. Awosa anoovirelela okona kheevenyatho,” onghima Mwene, mwa Yoowo Nsinanawe ti Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Jeremiah51:58 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: “Exiri yoothanuwa ya oBabiloniya enoomoroxeliwa vathi ni maselaaya oorakama anoohisiwa. Miloko nsaase okhulumuwawene, ommaleloni wa muteko wa miloko onimooza.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Ola mutthenga Yeremiya aamvanghaawe Seraiya, mwaana mulopwana a Neriha, mwaana mulopwana a Makheseya, owo aarongwaawe oBabiloniya ni mwene Zedekiya a oYuda, vayaakhani yanaaxexe ya olamulawawe." 
Jeremiah51:60 Yeremiya aalepa munikwakhwalani irisa sootheene seera sirwe oBabiloniya, sootheene saalempwale mwaha wa oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah51:61 Owo amweerela Seraiya: “Mwaaphiyaka oBabiloniya, mwiipasoope weera mwasome masu ala ni nsu noowiiwexexeya." 
Jeremiah51:62 Vano mweere: ‘Ii! Yave, mwaaheera weera munoophwata nipuro nna, moota wooweera naari mutthu hata mwaamunama ahikhalemo, niwoko enooheleya mathala wa mahuku ootheene.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Nyuwo mmalihaleene osoma nikwakhwala nno, mwatthukelelemo nluku ni mwavonyere mmoolokoni Efratesi." 
Jeremiah51:64 Vano mweere: ‘oBabiloniya onoottatta ntoko hiiha ni khootekiwatho, niwoko na erisa kineeraaka kiruuhele. Ni mulokwaaya onoomora. Mpaka va masu a Yeremiya.’ ”" 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiya aathatuwaawe mwene aarino iyaakha miloko miili niimoha, analamula oYerusaleemu iyaakha muloko niimoha. Amayawe yiitthaniwa Hamutali, mwaana muthiyana a Yeremiya, a oLibena." 
Jeremiah52:2 Owo aapaka ohintthunaawe Yave, ntoko aapankaawe Yehoyakimi." 
Jeremiah52:3 Isara sa Yave saatannyiwa oYerusaleemu ni oYuda, moota wooweera waatthuneya Owo waavenxa vamaithoniwawe. Vano Zedekiya aamvaanya mwene a oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah52:4 Tivawo, vayaakhani yanaathanniixexe ya olamula wa Zedekiya, vamweerini wanaamuloko, Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, aarongwaawe oYerusaleemu vamoha ni anakhottwaawe ootheene. Yaakonela okerekhere wa esidade, enateka ikaaro sookurumulela ixiri." 
Jeremiah52:5 Esidade yaariciwa mpaka eyaakha yanaamuloko niimoha ya olamula wa Zedekiya. 
Jeremiah52:6 Niphiyeraka nihuku nanaathannamaxexe na mweeri wanaaxexe, yaawirimaxa etala moota wooweera muloko khawoona yooca."
