Jeremiah52:7 Vano exiri ya esidade yaakakhiwa. aBabiloniya yaarooricaru esidade, mwene ni anakhotto ootheene yaatthawa, enakhuma musidade ni ohiyu, ottimbeni wa emwene, vamulako eriyari ya ixiri piili, enarowasa wAraba." 
Jeremiah52:8 Vaheera aBabiloniya yaamuttharelela mwene Zedekiya, enamphwanyasa vanreyareyani na oYeriko. Anakhottwaawe ootheene yaamuhiya enamwareya," 
Jeremiah52:9 ni owo aavariwa. Zedekiya aaronghiwa wa mwene a oBabiloniya oRibela, mulaponi ya oHamate, mwa weiwo aamulakelenlaawewo." 
Jeremiah52:10 oRibela, mwene a oBabiloniya aalamulela ohitiwa anamwane asilopwana a Zedekiya vamaithoniwawe, anawiivatho maneethi ootheene a oYuda." 
Jeremiah52:11 Vano aalamulela ozooliwa maitho a Zedekiya ni otthukiwa ni onyooro wa ebronze*, anaronghiwa oBabiloniya, aangwalenlaawewo mukaliposo mpaka nihuku na okhwawawe." 
Jeremiah52:12 Vanihukuni nanaamuloko na mweeri wanaathanu, vayaakhani yanaamuloko niithanniixexe sa olamula wa Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, Nebuzaradani, mutokweene a anamalipelela a emwene, aamurumeela mwene a oBabiloniya, aahoorwa oYerusaleemu." 
Jeremiah52:13 Owo aahisa Empa ya Yave, empa ya emwene ni impa sootheene sa oYerusaleemu. Impa soottittimiheya sootheene saahisiwa ni yoowo." 
Jeremiah52:14 Anakhotto a oBabiloniya, ehooleliwaka ni mutokweene a anamalipelela a emwene, aakurumula impa sootheene saarukureenre oYerusaleemu." 
Jeremiah52:15 Nebuzaradani aahaarongha ootthukiweene akina akina a oohaawaxa ni muloko waahanle musidade, vamoha ni aneettottho yaahanle ni yaale yiixinnyerenre wa mwene a oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah52:16 Vaheera Nebuzaradani aahaahiya ottuli yaahanle a oohaawaxa a mulaponi weera evareke muteko mmatta mwa iwuuva* ni imatta sikina. 
Jeremiah52:17 aBabiloniya yaahaapwexakasa, amarimbu a ebronze*, ikaaro sa ebronze* ni Ephareiya ya ebronze* yaari Mpaani mwa Yave, enarongha ebronze* oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah52:18 Yaakuxatho mookhupelamo ettuura, apoxoro, soorehererano mutthambo, ibasiya soovuuvihera, isasaani ni ikaruma sa ebronze* sootheene saavareliwa muteko Mpaani mwa Yave." 
Jeremiah52:19 Mutokweene a anamalipelela a emwene aarowano ibasiya, ibasiya soomiserano, moohisera erubani*, ibasiya soovuuvihera, mookhupelamo ettuura, onyaari, ikhope ni ibasiya saavareliwa muteko wa sooveleela sooyeehiwa – sootheene saapakeliwe eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreerela hoye hoye sa eparatha*." 
Jeremiah52:20 Ebronze* yaavenxiwe mwaamarimbuni eeli, ephareiya ni imombe muloko ni piili sa ebronze* vathiwaya, ni ikarinyu muloko sa ebronze* aapakenlaawe mwene Salomoni Empa ya Yave, saahaattaxa sihiwereyaka ophima." 
Jeremiah52:21 Khula nrimbu naarino imeetru* ithannatthaaru sa orakamawaya ni imeetru* ithanu ni eriyari ya emeetru* mmwaanomwaya, mwiittaaya waari ikatha ixexe ni mpuwamwaya khayaarimo etthu." 
Jeremiah52:22 Nyuru miili sa ebronze* vasulu vanrimbu saarino imeetru* piili ni vakhaani orakamawaya, ni saaphwanelihiwe ni nivali ni irooma* sa ebronze* mukhwipimwaya. Nrimbu nikina nno, ni iroomasaya*, naamulikanela." 
Jeremiah52:23 Mukhwipimwaya saakhala irooma* miloko mithannamixexe niithannamosa; irooma* sootheene vasulu wa nivali saari ncira. 
Jeremiah52:24 Mutokweene a anamalipelela aamukuxa ntoko namatthukiwa Seraiya, mutokweene a asaserdoti*, musaserdoti* aamutthara iithaniwa Zefaniya ni anamalipelela araru a milako." 
Jeremiah52:25 Wa yaale yaari nlelo musidade, aamukuxa mutokweene aawehaweha asilopwana yaari anakhotto ni anamalaka athanneeli a mwene. Aamukuxatho namalepa aari mutokweenexa, aawehaweha woolepeliwani wa muloko wa mulaponi, ni miloko mithannamosa a asilopwanaawe yaaphwanyasiwe musidade." 
Jeremiah52:26 Mutokweene a anakhotto Nebuzaradani aahaakuxa ootheene ale, anaarongha wa mwene a oBabiloniya oRibela." 
Jeremiah52:27 oRibela iwe, mulaponi ya oHamate, mwene aalamulela weera yiivasiwe. Hiiho, Yuda aaronghiwa wootthukiwani, ottai wa elapwaawe." 
Jeremiah52:28 Waatta wa yaale Nebukadenezari aaronghalaawe wootthukiwani ti wu: vayaakhani yanaathannapiili, aYuda 3 023;" 
Jeremiah52:29 vayaakhani yanaamuloko niithannatthaaru ya Nebukadenezari: 832 a oYerusaleemu; 
Jeremiah52:30 vayaakhani yanaamiloko miili ni tthaaru, aYuda 745 yaaronghiwe wootthukiwani ni mutokweene a anamalipelela a emwene, Nebuzaradani. Ootheene awo yaari aYuda 4 600." 
Jeremiah52:31 Vayaakhani yanaamiloko miraru niithannapiili ya oronghiwa wootthukiwani wa Yehoyakini, mwene a oYuda, vayaakhani Evili-Merodaki aathatungwaawe mwene a oBabiloniya, owo aamutapuxa Yehoyakini, mwene a oYuda, mukaliposo vanihukuni nanaamiloko miili ni mathanu na mweeri wanaamuloko ni miili." 
Jeremiah52:32 Owo aamuulumela ni onnene Yehoyakini, anamvaha nipuro noottittimiheyaxa waapwaha mamwene makina yaari ni yoowo oBabiloniya." 
Jeremiah52:33 Hiiho Yehoyakini aarula soowara sa mukaliposo ni vahoolo wa okumaawe wootheene aaca vamoha ni mwene. 
Jeremiah52:34 Mwene a oBabiloniya aamvaha yooca Yehoyakini ya khula nihuku mpaka okhwawawe. 
Lamentations1:1 Moota eheleiyaaya nthala esidade, khalayi yaari yoosareiya atthu! Moota enlikanaaya ni naamukhweli mwa yeeyo khalayi yaari etokotoko eriyari ya miloko! Khalayi yaari pwiyamwene variyari wa ilapo sootheene, vano yoothatuwa epottha." 
Lamentations1:2 Ohiyu onimwiinlaxa, maithoraaya ankhwalala owiithowaya. Variyari wa oosiveleyaawe ootheene khawoworu onimpembesa. Asinthamwenaawe ootheene aamvariha; aani aathatuwa amwiittanaawe." 
Lamentations1:3 Moothananani ni mmitekoni soonyesereriwa, Yuda ooronghiwa wootthukiwani. Onkhala eriyari ya miloko ahiphwanyaka wiitthuuwa. Yaamuttharelela ootheene yaamvarasa moohaawanimwawe." 
Lamentations1:4 Iphiro sinrowa oSiyoni sinlalamika niwoko khaawo anrowa mufestanimwaya soothanliwa. Milakosaya sootheene sooheleya nthala, asaserdotaaya animwiipulela, asimwalaaya anoothanana ni eyo emphwanyaneya moothanananixa." 
Lamentations1:5 Awananaawe aathatuwa asitokweenaawe; amwiittaanaawe ahiimaaliha. Yave oomuruuhela othanana niwoko na sootthekasawe sincipale. Anamwanaawe asilopwana aaronghiwa wootthukiwani, anamatthukiwa a awanani." 
Lamentations1:6 Waara wootheene woolakaseya osidade ya oSiyoni. Anamwane a mwenaaya ari ntoko anamungoma ahimphwanya yooca; aatthawa emaleliweene ikuru ohoolo wa namattharelela. 
Lamentations1:7 Mmahukuni mwa makacamiho ni othanana, oYerusaleemu onuupuwelela itthu sooreerela sincipale waarinaaya mmahukuni avinre. Vano amakaaya amorenlaaya mmatatani mwa amwiittanaaya, khaakhanleru ookhavihera. Amwittanaaya annoona ni anootheya ohaawawaya." 
Lamentations1:8 Yerusaleemu ootthekaxa; tivawo othatungwaawe oohitteela. Ootheene yaamuttittimiha, vano aamunyoosa niwoko ahoona etiriyaaya; owo muneenaawe oniipulela ni onaahapuwa yaawosa." 
Lamentations1:9 Ohitteelawawe woosareya mukuwoni; eyo khayaaweherera ophiya ommaleloniwaya. Omorawaya waari woowuumiha owanoni; khaawo arwiiye opembesa.”Ii! Yave, moone othananawaka niwoko mwiittana oowina.”" 
Lamentations1:10 Mwiittana onghuhula mihakhusanyu sootheene; owo ohoona miloko sa amalapo sivolowaka vaNipuroniwaya Nootteela* – yaawosa nyuwo mwaakhoottihalaanyu ovolowa mmuthukumanonimwanyu. 
Lamentations1:11 Mulokwaaya wootheene onlalamika orowaka waasa yooca weera okhaleno okumi; onceendya mihakhusaya ni sooca. “Moone Yave, ni moonelemo, niwoko kooramusiwa.”" 
Lamentations1:12 “Ootheene nyuwo mumvira va, murwe moone moota kihaawiyaaka! Eyo khamumpwatthela? Khoowoworu ovoreya onlikana ovoreya wu okitannyenraawe Yave vanihukuni aakinyoonyeringwaawe." 
Lamentations1:13 Ari osulu, oorumiha mooro ovolongwe mmakhuvanimwaka; ooreya muraakho inaawosaka onakimoroxela vathi; ookihiya oophwateyeene ni oohihakalala mahuku ootheene." 
Lamentations1:14 Owo ookipakela yoolemela ni matataawe avarelaka muteko sootakhalasaka sootheene anakiwariha muxiko; Yave oomaliha ikurusaka anakinnyerera mwa amwiittana, mwa yaawo kihingweraaka waawina." 
Lamentations1:15 Yave ohaamwaraxa anakhotto ootheene yaakikhavihera; ookirumihela anakhotto weera yaaphwate amiravowaaka. Yave oomunyikalela mwali oowiikosoopa wanaameliwa iwuuva*, eyo tiiyo esidade ya oYuda." 
Lamentations1:16 Tivawo miyo kiniinlaaka; mmaithonimwaka esareiyeene maithori. Khawoworu onkaattamela weera akipembese, khawoworu onreherera okumaaka. Anamwanaaka khaanonoru oowaakosoopa, niwoko mwiittana oopwaherera owina.”" 
Lamentations1:17 “Siyoni ontheteya nyoono adyoonttelelaka, mene khawoworu onimpembesa. Yave oolamulela weera amwaattamana a Yakobe ethatuwase amwiittanaawe; Yerusaleemu oothatuwa etthu yoohitteela eriyaraaya." 
Lamentations1:18 Yave ti oororomeleya, vaheera miyo koovaanya olamulenlaawe. Nyuwosa miloko sootheene mwiiwe; ngwehe ohaawawaka. Amiravowaaka ni asimwalaaka aaronghiwa wootthukiwani." 
Lamentations1:19 Kaawiitthana yaawo kiiraanannaaka, mene awosa aakivariha. Asaserdotaaka ni ahoolelaaka aakhwela musidade yaasaasaka yooca weera ewere okhalano okumi." 
Lamentations1:20 Yave, moone moota kithanannaaka! Koohooxeya mpuwa wa murimaaka ni kooriipiwa murima niwoko kootepaxa ovaanya. Mmuseweni, ootheene annyaanyiwa ni ekatana; mpuwa ori okhwa paahi." 
Lamentations1:21 Olalamikawaka wohiiwanyeya, mene khawoworu onkipembesa. Amwiittanaaka ootheene aasuwela othananawaka; awosa anghakalalela yeeyo mpankaanyu. Ii! Nyuwo fataari muruuhe nihuku mulaleiyaanyu weera awosa ethatuweke ntoko miyo!" 
Lamentations1:22 Yootakhalaayasa esuweliwe ohoolowanyu; mwaapakelase yaawo yeeyo mukipakenlaanyu niwoko na sootthekasaka sootheene. Wiipulelawaka wootepaxa ni murimaaka onnakomoka.” 
Lamentations2:1 Yave ookuttelela esidade ya oSiyoni ni nihutte na isarasawe! Oovonyera vatthayani waara wa oYixrayeli okhuma wiirimu; vanihukuni na isarasawe, khuupuwelenle seiyo aanyikalelaawe." 
Lamentations2:2 Yave oonyaanya moomakamwawe moothemwene wa Yakobe, ahimorelaka ikharari; musaranimwawe oophwata mapuro oolipaxa a mwaana muthiyana a oYuda. Oomphwatela vathi anaverula omwenaawe ni ahoolelaawe." 
Lamentations2:3 Musaranimwawe soopatta, ookwasa owera wootheene wa oYixrayeli. Oovenxa moonowaawe woolopwana amwiittana emwaattamelaka. Oomuhisa Yakobe ntoko mooro ovarelaka onlaliha sootheene sirukureenre." 
Lamentations2:4 Ooreherera muuraawe ntoko mwiittana; moonowaawe woolopwana ori woolikaneene. Ntoko mwiittana Owo oohonona sootheene saari soosiveleya woona; ooyeehera isarasawe ntoko mooro muheemani mwa esidade ya oSiyoni. 
Lamentations2:5 Yave ori ntoko mwiittana; Owo oonyaanya oYixrayeli. Oonyaanya impasawe sootheene sa emwene aphwataka moolipamwawe, ohaandyeerera wiikhupanyera ni olalamika wa mwaana muthiyana a oYuda." 
Lamentations2:6 Owo ookurumula woomakawawe ntoko nttimbe piswa; oophwata nipuronawe na mithukumano. Yave oopakiha weera Siyoni attiwale ifestasawe soothanliwa ni iSaabadusawe; moonyoonyiwanimwawe otokotoko oomukhootta mwene ni musaserdoti*. 
Lamentations2:7 Yave ohaakhootta altaaraawe ni oohiya Nipuronawe Nootteela*. Oowinnyerera amwiittana ixiri sa impasawe sa emwene, ni awosa yaakhuwelasa Mpaani mwa Yave, ntoko naapakaahu mmahukuni a ifesta." 
Lamentations2:8 Yave oolakela ophwata ixiri sa Mwaana a oSiyoni. Owo ohookola mukhoyi woophimano, ahooceelihaka moonowaawe woophwata. Oopakiha weera moowiipithamo ni ixiri silalamike; sookurumuwa vamoha." 
Lamentations2:9 Maselaaya aamorela vathi; anampattikaaya ohaaphwata. Mwenaaya ni ahoolelaaya aaronghiwa wootthukiwani wa ilapo soohiyanahiyana ni khaniwoworu nlamulo; maprofeetaaya khaanaakhela nyoonelo sa Yave. 
Lamentations2:10 Ahooleli a esidade ya oSiyoni ankilaathi vathi emaalelo. Aniihela ntthupi mmuru ni angwarela soolalamikano. Asimwali a oYerusaleemu anuuramihela muru vathi oowuulihiheyeene muru. 
Lamentations2:11 Maithwaaka aakhulumuwa wiinla, munepaaka woohasuwa, murimaaka wookiriipaxa, niwoko mulokwaaka woophwatiwa ni amiravo ni anamwane ankomokela mmiseweni sa musidade." 
Lamentations2:12 Anaakhuwelela asimayaya: “Eri woowi yooca ni eviinyu?” awosa ankomokaaya mmiseweni sa musidade ntoko oovulala, ni okumaaya ommalamalela vayaawani wa asimayaya." 
Lamentations2:13 Ii! Mwaana muthiyana a oYerusaleemu, kooleeleketho eheeni? Kheewowo enlikana ni yawawo! Ii! Mwali oowiikosoopa a oSiyoni! Moota heeni kineeraaka koopepese? Nikhwattanawo ti noowiixera ntoko ephareiya. Taani anoolamihe?" 
Lamentations2:14 Nyoonelo sa maprofeetaawo saari soowootha ni soohivareleya muteko; awosa khaawoonihenre yootthekaawo weera osembe oronghiwa wootthukiwani. Mitthenga yoovahaaya saari soowootha ni soolokottha. 
Lamentations2:15 Ootheene yaawo amvira mphironimwawo aniipa makuphi; awosa antthebwa epukunyaka muru niwoko na mwaana muthiyana a oYerusaleemu, yeeraka: “Ti yeela esidade yiitthaniwa esidade yoophwanelaxiwa, ohakalala wa elapo yootheene?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Amwiittanaawo ootheene angwaathamela weyo; awosa anootthebwa, ekhuurihaka maino, yeeraka: “Hiyo noomunyaanya. Nna ti nihuku naawehereraahu ni moone, ehuhu yoophiya!" 
Lamentations2:17 Yave oopaka yeeyo aavaanenlaawe; ookwanihera maswaawe aalaleiyaawe khalayi. Ahoophwata, ahimorelaka ikharari ni ootthunihera weera mwiittana ootthebwe, ohunnuwiha ikuru sa amwiittanaawo." 
Lamentations2:18 Murima wa muloko onimukhuwelela Yave. Ii! Exiri ya mwaana muthiyana a oSiyoni, maithoraawo ekhwalale ntoko mooloko ohiyu ni othana; ohitthuniheriweru wiitthuuwa hata wuuseela." 
Lamentations2:19 Ovenye, okhuwele ohiyu eriyari, yaapaceraka ehuhu ya olipelela wa ohiyu; oyeehe murimaawo ntoko maahi vamaithoni wa Yave. Omutheteele nyoono weerelaka okumi wa anamwanaawo, ankomoka etala mmathakalaano a misewe sootheene." 
Lamentations2:20 “Moone Yave! Mungwehe muneeneene yoowo munimpakelaanyu hiiha. Weeraka asithiyana yohaaphiyera ehuhu yoowaakhuura anamwanaaya asilopwana yaayanraaya ni yaahungwaaya? Weeraka asaserdoti* ni maprofeeti yaamwiiveliwa vaNipuroniwanyu Nootteela? 
Lamentations2:21 Amiravo ni asitokweene aamorela mmiseweni. Amirovowaaka ni asimwalaaka ahiiviwa ni ekatana. Moowiivakasa vanihukuni na isarasanyu mwaanyaanyaka woohaamorela ikharari. 
Lamentations2:22 Mookilattulela soowoopiha mipatta sootheene ntoko onlattuleliwaaya vanihukuni na efesta. Vanihukuni na isara sa Yave khawoworu oopongwe hata opwaherenre okhala ni okumi. Mwiittanaaka ohaaphwata yaale miyo kaakosoopaaka ni kiwunnuwihalaaka.” 
Lamentations3:1 Miyo ti mutthu oonne makacamiho aruuhiwe ni ekopo ya isarasawe. 
Lamentations3:2 Yave ookoomola, anakeettiha mpiphini, ohikhanle ngwaarani;" 
Lamentations3:3 vekhaikhai ntatanawe khaninkihiyaru hata vakhaani imaara imaarasene. 
Lamentations3:4 Oopakiha weera exapalaaka ni erutthwaaka yuuluvale, ni oopwexa makhuvaaka." 
Lamentations3:5 Owo ookirica, ookipakela yookuttelela yoowaawa ni yoovoreya." 
Lamentations3:6 Ookimakiha mpiphini ntoko yaale akhwiiye khalayi. 
Lamentations3:7 Ookirica ni ixiri, ni nkingwera woopowa; ookitthukaxa ni onyooro." 
Lamentations3:8 Naari kiitthanaka hoye hoye kikhuwelelaka ekhavihero, Owo onookhootta mavekelowaaka." 
Lamentations3:9 Ookuttelela ni maluku kimviraakamo, anakeettiha mphironi mootapanyeya." 
Lamentations3:10 Ntoko ursu* athurumelaka, aani ntoko mwatto iipintheene ntuphini," 
Lamentations3:11 ookikhumiha mphironimwaka anakinyaanya akihiyaka oothaamiweene. 
Lamentations3:12 Ooreherera muuraawe, anakikhaliha yoolatha nyuupasawe." 
Lamentations3:13 Oolatha murimaaka ni nyuupa sa munrupanimwawe. 
Lamentations3:14 Koothatuwa mutheelelo wa mulokwaaka; muciponimwaya ankitheya miyo mahuku ootheene. 
Lamentations3:15 Ookivoniha ni makukhu oonyuunya, anakiwuriha wamwa." 
Lamentations3:16 Ookhula mainowaaka ni maluku; ookinyikalela vantthupini. 
Lamentations3:17 Ookaakha murettele; koottiwala weetteleya nnene. 
Lamentations3:18 Tivawo kineeraaka: “Waarawaka woolakaseya nitho sootheene miyo kaawehereraaka wa Yave.” 
Lamentations3:19 Kinuupuwelela ohaawawaka ni othananawaka, onlikana ni wamwa ni yoohapala." 
Lamentations3:20 Kinnuupuwelela nnenesene sootheene iyo, ni munepaaka ooriipiweene mpuwamwaka." 
Lamentations3:21 Wa soothesene, yeeyo kinuupuwelelaaka ni kingwehereraaka ti ela:" 
Lamentations3:22 Niwoko na murimaawe wooreera Yave, nlelo khoomanle, weenre osivelawawe ohooceeleyaka." 
Lamentations3:23 Ti onyowani khula oxeexelo; ororomeleyawawe ti otokotoko. 
Lamentations3:24 Kiniixeerela: Ettimaaka ti Yave; tivawo, mwa Yoowo kinoohela owehererawaka." 
Lamentations3:25 Yave ti ooreera wa yaale owehererawaya ori mwa Yoowo, aani yaale ammwaasa;" 
Lamentations3:26 ti wooreera oweherera oomaaleleyeene wa ovuluxa wa Yave. 
Lamentations3:27 Ti wooreera mutthu ovilela soonyesereriha nlelo areene mmiravo. 
Lamentations3:28 Owo aakilaathi meekhaawe oomaaleene, niwoko Yave oomwiikaathera." 
Lamentations3:29 Uupuruxe ekhovaawe vantthupini; apaale onuukhale oweherera. 
Lamentations3:30 Ahinghuluwe yoowo ontthuna ommana, ni aakhele onyemulawawe." 
Lamentations3:31 Vano Yave khanaakhootta atthu mahuku ootheene. 
Lamentations3:32 Naari Owo aruuhaka othanana, onimoonihera ikharari niwoko na osivelawawe otokotoko woohooceeleya." 
Lamentations3:33 Vano Owo khoonimusivela waahasula anamwane a atthu. 
Lamentations3:34 Atthu yaanyakatta ni inaawo anamatthukiwa ootheene a mulaponi," 
Lamentations3:35 ni yaamukhoottiha mukina soophwanelasawe vamaithoni wa Muluku a musulusulu; 
Lamentations3:36 ni yaakhootta ekhaikhai, vano, vekhaikhai Yave onoona yeeyo!" 
Lamentations3:37 Taani anaawere wuuluma ni okhumeleliha Yave ahilamulenle? 
Lamentations3:38 Ti wa eyano ya Musulusulu sinrweelaaya irisa ni mareeliho. 
Lamentations3:39 Ongwereya hai mutthu okhupanya attaruxeliwaka sootthekasawe? 
Lamentations3:40 Niwehawehe nnenesene mweettelowaahu, vahoolowaya nihokoleeleke wa Yave." 
Lamentations3:41 Nivekele ni murima wootheene, nitheteelaka nyoono wa Muluku a wiirimu." 
Lamentations3:42 “Noottheka ni noovaanya, vano Nyuwo khamunilevelenle." 
Lamentations3:43 Nyuwo mohiisariha isara munanittharelela, moonihonona woohinimorela ikharari." 
Lamentations3:44 Mohiixiipithiha wiithela nihutte weera muhiiweru nakhalaru nivekelonahu. 
Lamentations3:45 Moonitatuxa nsala ni ikokhola eriyari ya miloko. 
Lamentations3:46 Amwiittanaahu ootheene annaathamela hiyo. 
Lamentations3:47 Ninghaawa woova ni mirakho, oheleya nthala ni ophwatiwa.”" 
Lamentations3:48 Owiithowaka aasareya maithori niwoko mulokwaaka woophwatiwa. 
Lamentations3:49 Maithwaaka aniinla woohihiyerera, woohiitthuuwaru," 
Lamentations3:50 mpaka Yave ari wiirimu, awehe ni oone!" 
Lamentations3:51 Ankivoreya maitho koonaka yeeyo yaakhumelenle asithiyana a esidadaaka. 
Lamentations3:52 Yaale yaari amwiittanaaka woohinthowa yaakilupattha ntoko mwaapalame. 
Lamentations3:53 Yaasaasa okiivela mulittini, enakivonya maluku;" 
Lamentations3:54 kaamireya mmaahini, mpaka kaahuupuwela weera ommaleloniwaka woophiya." 
Lamentations3:55 Moowiixera mwa nlitti kaahiitthana Nsinananyu Yave. 
Lamentations3:56 Nyuwo mohiiwa okhuwelawaka: “Muhiwale maaruwaanyu kaakhuwelelaka ekhavihero.” 
Lamentations3:57 Nyuwo mwaakaattamela kookhuwelenlaakani, muneera: “Muhoove.”" 
Lamentations3:58 Ii! Yave, Nyuwo mohaakiha nthowanaka; ni mohoopola okumaaka." 
Lamentations3:59 Mohoona ohasuliwawaka woohinthowa, Yave; mwaakihe mulattwaaka." 
Lamentations3:60 Nyuwo mohoona moota soopinghaaya ikukuttulasaya, miraakho sootheene akireiyaaya." 
Lamentations3:61 Ii! Yave, mohiiwa oruwanawaya, miraakho sootheene akireiyaaya," 
Lamentations3:62 yeeyo amwiittanaaka anaapaaya, ekikhupanyaka ehuhu yootheene." 
Lamentations3:63 Mwaawehase! Ekilaantheene hoye hoye yeemenleene, ankitthebwa miyo ni iciposaya." 
Lamentations3:64 Yave, mwaavahe yeeyo amphwanelaaya, niwoko na yeeyo apankaaya matataaya." 
Lamentations3:65 Muumihe mirimasaya, ni nlaphonanyu nikhale vasuluwaya." 
Lamentations3:66 Mwaattharelelase moonyoonyiwani ni mwaamalamalihe vathi wa wiirimuwanyu, Yave." 
Lamentations4:1 Moota ehingyaaya waara eyuuma yoorikaxa! Moota ehingyaaya ottittikala eyuuma yoorikaxa yooreerela! Maluku oowaaraxa aamwaraxeliwa mmathakalaano a misewe. 
Lamentations4:2 Anamwane asilopwana oottittimiheya a oSiyoni, khalayi yooneleyamo ntoko eyuuma yoorikaxa, olelo anooneliwa ntoko iyoopwe, muteko wa matata a namoopa!" 
Lamentations4:3 Mpaka akhwatte anaavaha mapele anamwanaaya weera ewaamwihe, mene mulokwaaka khoononotho murima; ori ntoko makhakandore a munikareni." 
Lamentations4:4 Nlumi na anamwane noovolaxiwa ntthona nootthukana waahottokoroko; anamwane andyoonttelela yooca, mene khaawo onaavaha." 
Lamentations4:5 Yaale yaakhovelenle oca yooca yooreerela, anghaawela mmiseweni. Yaale yiiphwaneliha ni ikuwo sa kanka olelo anuupuruwa mukokholani." 
Lamentations4:6 Ottaruxiwa wa mulokwaaka wootepaxa opwaha wa oSodoma, waaphwatiwa ehuhu emoharu woohikhala ookhaviherawo." 
Lamentations4:7 Anamwane asilopwana a mamwenaaya yaari oowaara opwaha etthapwe, ootteelaxa opwaha mukaka; exapalaaya yaari yooxeera opwaha erubi*; ni ekhalelowaaya yaari yakanka opwaha maluku a safira*." 
Lamentations4:8 Vaheera vano aariipaxa opwaha makhala; khaansuwanyeya mmiseweni, exapalaaya yohuumelela mmakhuvanimwaya; yaathatuwa ntoko ephandi yoowuumaxa." 
Lamentations4:9 Fataari yaale yiiviwe ni ekatana ohikhanle okhwa etala; awosa ankomoka oowoondeene, niwoko soowiima sa mmatta sohaathowa." 
Lamentations4:10 Asithiyana annene aawaapeya anamwanaaya asilopwana ni matataaya, athatungwe yoocaaya, mulokwaaka waaphwatiwaaya." 
Lamentations4:11 Yave ohoonihera moota woomalela isarasawe; ooyeeha onyoonyaxiwawawe woowoopiha. Owo oopattiha oSiyoni mooro olalinghe mathipelowaaya. 
Lamentations4:12 Mamwene a mulaponi ni miloko sa elapo ya vathi yootheene khayaakhulela weera amwiittana ni awanani yaangwera ovoleela mmilakoni sa oYerusaleemu. 
Lamentations4:13 Vaheera yeereiye niwoko na yoottheka ya maprofeetaaya ni sootakhala sa asaserdotaaya mwa yaawo yaayeeha ephome ya oororomeleya musidade. 
Lamentations4:14 Olelo, awosa anxoraxora mmiseweni ntoko oohoona. Erampeene ephome, khaawo aneera eerere otava soowarasaya." 
Lamentations4:15 “Mususeke! Nyuwosa khamutteenle!” muloko onaakhuwelelasa yaawosa! “Mususe, muhinitave!” Awosa yaatthawaka ni yeettaka oothweeleleene, miloko sa ilapo sikina sineera: “Awosa ehimakase va.”" 
Lamentations4:16 Yave muneenaawe ohaamwaraxasa; Owo khanaakosoopasatho. Khawoworu onaattittimiha asaserdoti* hata ahooleli. 
Lamentations4:17 Maithwaahu aakhulumuwa waasaasa ekhavihero vasiiyoniwene; naaweherera mmatoorenimwahu* muloko wahaawera onivuluxa. 
Lamentations4:18 Khula malipaahu nannawehawehiwa; khanaaweraru weetta mmisewenimwahu. Waakhuveela ommaleloni, mahukwaahu yaanimalela, niwoko waaphiyera ommaleloniwahu." 
Lamentations4:19 Anamattharattharaahu yaari oowaaluwa waapwaha axaaka a wiirimu; yaanittharelela mmanyaakoni, yaaniweherera munikareni." 
Lamentations4:20 Oottikittheliwa a Yave, ngwiya xaxaxa wa okumaahu woopharihiwa mmiraakhonimwaya. Hiyo nuupuwela weera mwa okhapelelawawe naamukhala eriyari ya miloko." 
Lamentations4:21 Muhakalale, mwaana muthiyana a Edomi, munkhala mulaponi ya wUzi. Vaheera munoowuratho ekoomixi yoowaawa ya nttaruxo eneera yoohapaliheni yoohiyakani pwitipwiti." 
Lamentations4:22 Ii! Esidade ya oSiyoni, nttaruxonanyu nnoomala; Yave khapwahereriha oroihiwawanyu wootthukiwani. Vaheera, ii! Nyuwo mwaana muthiyana a Edomi, Owo onoottaruxa yootthekaanyu ni onimoonihera yootakhalaanyu." 
Lamentations5:1 Muupuwelele Yave yeeyo enikhumelenle; ngwehe ni moone wuulihiheyawahu muru. 
Lamentations5:2 Yoohiyeriwaahu ahinnyereriwa amalapo, impasahu ahinnyereriwa anamarwa." 
Lamentations5:3 Nri akwaasuni a wuutiithini, asimayihu ari ntoko asinaamukhweli." 
Lamentations5:4 Ontthuneya othuma maahi oowura; ikhuunisahu nnimweera othuma. 
Lamentations5:5 Yaawo annittharelela aanikhuveelaxa; nookhulumuwa ni khanimphwanya wiitthuuwa. 
Lamentations5:6 Nohiixinnyerera wExipitu ni wAsiriya weera niphwanye yooca. 
Lamentations5:7 Asitithihu yaattheka ni khaawowotho ni hiyo ninttaruxeliwa sootthekasaya. 
Lamentations5:8 Ninlamuliwa ni ipottha, ni khawoworu oonitapuxa mmatatanimwaya." 
Lamentations5:9 Nimphwanya yooca nilevaka okumaahu, niwananiwaka ni ekatana ya munikareni." 
Lamentations5:10 Exapalaahu yooviha ntoko ttukuttha, yoovihereya evolaxiweene etala." 
Lamentations5:11 Asithiyana ampuherasiwa oSiyoni, ni aximwali oowiikosoopa ampuheriwa mmasidadeni sa oYuda." 
Lamentations5:12 Ahooleli aathomeiwa ni matataaya; mamookwaaxa khaanooniheriwa nttittimiho. 
Lamentations5:13 Asimiravo amvaraxa muteko mmaxiloni; asinamwane amveveleya yiireiyeene mavisi a ikhuuni. 
Lamentations5:14 Ahooleli khaanthukumana mmilakoni sa esidade; amiravo aahiya wiipawaya. 
Lamentations5:15 Mmurimanimwahu khoowowo ohakalala; wiinawahu woothatuwa olalamika. 
Lamentations5:16 Ecireemba yoomora mmurumwahu. Ii! Wa hiyo, niwoko noottheka!" 
Lamentations5:17 Tivawo murimaahu onkomokaaya, ni maithwaahu ahinceremelaaya." 
Lamentations5:18 Yeereenle hiiho niwoko mwaako Siyoni wooheleya nthala ni akhwatte aneetteetta mwemmo. 
Lamentations5:19 Nyuwo, Yave, munlamula wa mahuku ootheene; ehicaanyu ya emwene empwaherera wa ekhapira ni ekhapira." 
Lamentations5:20 Vano munnittiwalelani mahuku ootheene? Munnithaamelani mweehuhuni yincipale? 
Lamentations5:21 Munironghe wa Nyuwo Yave, weera nihokolowe; mureherere mahukwaahu ntoko a khalayi," 
Lamentations5:22 waahikhanle weera moonikhootta woomalela ni onipattiherawanyu isara soohimala! 
Ezekiel1:1 Vanihukuni nanaathanu na mweeri wanaaxexe wa eyaakha yanaamiloko miraru, ni miyo kireene eriyari ya anamatthukiwa muxerexere mooloko Kebari, yaahuleya erimu ni miyo kaahoona nyoonelo sa Muluku." 
Ezekiel1:2 Yaari eyaakha yanaathanu ya oronghiwa wootthukiwani wa mwene Yehoyakini, vanihukuni nanaathanu na mweeri wanaaxexe." 
Ezekiel1:3 Yave aahuuluma ni musaserdoti* Ezekiyeli, mwaana mulopwana a Buzi, muxerexere mooloko Kebari, mulaponi mwa aBabiloniya. Iwe, ntata na Yave naari mwa yoowo." 
Ezekiel1:4 Kaaweha kinoona ettheku yaarweela mpatta wa ottuttuwani – nihutte ntokotoko ni overinya wooceremela nirukureeriweene ni waara wootutha. Eriyari ya mooro yaalikana ni eyuuma yooweera mangani," 
Ezekiel1:5 ni mmooroni owo saakhala ikhalelo ixexe sa okumi. Ekhalelowaaya yaari ntoko ya mutthu," 
Ezekiel1:6 vaheera khula ekhalelo ya seiyo yaakhalano ikhove ixexe ni maphupha maxexe. 
Ezekiel1:7 Nyettosaya saari soowookowa; inaawosaya saari ntoko sa mwaamombe ni saacapeya ntoko ebronze* yoohaniwa. 
Ezekiel1:8 Waamapuphawaya, mipatta soomixexe, iyo saakhalano matata ntoko a atthu. Sooxeexe iyo saakhalano ikhove ni mapupha," 
Ezekiel1:9 ni mapuphaaya yaamukumanela. Yaaramaramaaya, yaakela ohoolo ni khayaarukunuwa." 
Ezekiel1:10 Ohoolowaya, khula ekhalelo yaakhalano ekhove enlikana ya mutthu, moono woolopwana ekhove ya mwatto, moono woothiyana ekhove ya emombe, ni ottuliwaya ya xaaka." 
Ezekiel1:11 Ikhovesaya saari hiiho. Mapuphaaya yaakungeela osulu; khula ekhalelo yaakhalano mapupha meeli yaakumanela ni ekhalelo ekina, okhuma mpatta mmoha ni mukina, ni mapupha meeli yaakuttelela irutthusaya." 
Ezekiel1:12 Khula ekhalelo ya seiye, yaarowa muhoolo paahi. Mapuro ootheene Munepa waatthunaaya orowa, iyo saamurowatho; saaramaramaaya, khayaarukunuwaru." 
Ezekiel1:13 Ikhalelo iyo saalikana ni makhala a mooro; saari ntoko mithuko. Mooro waarowa ninno ninno eriyari ya ikhalelo sa okumi, mmooroni mmwe waamverinya ni ottetthereya." 
Ezekiel1:14 Ikhalelo sa okumi iye saarowa, sinarwa woowaakuveyaxa ntoko overinya." 
Ezekiel1:15 Miyo kaawehaaka, kaahoona nreko vatthayani muxerexere wa khula emoha ya seiyo, nreko nimoha wa khula ekhalelo eyo." 
Ezekiel1:16 Ekhalelowaaya ni olikanawaya nreko waari ha: Mareko awo yaaceremela ntoko krisolito*; ooxeexe yaamulikana. Khula nreko naakhala ntoko naarino nreko nikina mpuwamwaya. 
Ezekiel1:17 Ikhalelosene seiyo saaramaramaaya, saakela wakhalaru mpatta wa ikhove ixexe, ni saarowaaya, mareko khayaarukunuwaru." 
Ezekiel1:18 Maviiraaya yaari oorakamela ni oowuumiha owanoni ni yaasareya maitho mukhwipimwaya. 
Ezekiel1:19 Ikhalelo sa okumi saaramaramaaya, mareko a mukhwipimwaya yaamuramaramatho; ikhalelo saattukhuwaaya, marekotho, yaamuttukhuwa." 
Ezekiel1:20 Weiwo Munepa waatthuneyaaya orowa, ikhalelo sa okumi iyo saamurowawo, ni mareko yaamutthara, niwoko Munepeene yoowo waari mwa mareko awo." 
Ezekiel1:21 Ikhalelo iye sa okumi saaramaramaaya, awotho yaamuramarama; iye sahaaramaramaaya, awotho khayaaramarama; ikhalelo sa okumi saattukhuwaaya, marekotho yaamuttukhuwano, niwoko Munepaayeene yoowo waari mwa yaawo." 
Ezekiel1:22 Vasulu wa nyuru sa ikhalelo sa okumi yaakhala etthu yaalikana ni erimu, yooceremela ntoko maahi oowoopaana, ni yaari yoowuumiha owanoni." 
Ezekiel1:23 Vathi wa erimu, mapupha meeli a khula ekhalelo yaakungeeleya yeeyo yaakhuveelannaaya, ni mapupha meeli makinaawo yaakuttelela erutthu." 
Ezekiel1:24 Saaramaramaaya, kaahiiwa oruma wa mapuphaaya, waalikana ni oruma wa maahi mancipale, ntoko nsu na Muluku a ikuru sootheene. Waari oruma ntoko okhuwela wa anakhotto ancipalexa. Seemelaaya, saangwala mapuphaaya." 
Ezekiel1:25 Vano naahoorwa nsu nikhumaka wiirimu, iyo siwanleene mapuphaaya." 
Ezekiel1:26 Vasulu wa erimu yaari mmurumwaya, yaakhala etthu yaalikana ni ehice ya safira* ni yoorakamelaxa, vahiceni, yaakhala ekhalelo yaalikana ni mutthu." 
Ezekiel1:27 Kaahoona weera mpatta wa osulu okhuma muyuununi mpaka waamuru waari ntoko eyuuma yoowaara, aani ntoko yoosareya mooro, ni mpatta wa vathi wa yeeyo waalikana ni mooro; waaraxa waamurica." 
Ezekiel1:28 Mooteene yoowo saakhalaaya nyoota sa nyuura mmahutteni vanihukuni na epula, hiihotho ovuwaxa waamurukureera Yoowo. Ti moota ola koonnaaka ekhalelo ya ovuwaxa wa Yave. Woowoona sootheene iyo, kaamora ni wiipopheya, kiniiwa nsu na mukina akuulumanaka." 
Ezekiel2:1 Owo aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, mweemele, niwoko miyo kinimuuluma ni nyuwo.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 Uulumaawe, Munepa waakivolowa, onakeemexa, kinamwiiwa yoole aakuulumano." 
Ezekiel2:3 Owo aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, kinimoorumihani wa aYixrayeli, muloko woovaanya mwa yoowo okivaannye; awosa ni makholowaayeene ankivaanya mpaka olelo va." 
Ezekiel2:4 Wa muloko kineeraaka koorumiheleni ti woottiyamaaru ni woowuuma murima. Mweerele: ‘Ala ti masu a Yave onlamula sootheene.’ 
Ezekiel2:5 Naari wiiwaka hata ohiiwaka – niwoko ti anamavaanya – onoosuwela weera ookhala mprofeeti eriyaraaya. 
Ezekiel2:6 Nyuwo, mwaana a mutthu, muhiwoove atthu awo hata maswaayeenetho. Muhiwoove, naari yooricakani ni rupulula ni nyiiwa, ni nyuwo mukhalaka eriyari ya awalisi. Muhoove yeeyo anghimaaya, hata mwaawoonaka, muhitteenguwe, arookhalaru muloko woovaanya." 
Ezekiel2:7 Nyuwo mwaaleeleke maswaaka, yiiwe hata ehiiwe, niwoko awosa ti anamavaanya." 
Ezekiel2:8 Vaheera nyuwo, mwaana a mutthu, mwiiwe yeeyo kinooleelaakani. Muhikhale oovaanya ntoko muloko owo; mwaathame ni mukhuure yeeyo kineeraaka koovaheeni.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Vano kaaweha kinoona ntata na mukina kitheteeliweene. Mmwe naakhala nikwakhwala na elivuru," 
Ezekiel2:10 mwa nenne aatapurunxaawe ohoolowaka. Mipatta soomiili sa nikwakhwala yaalempwamo masu a olalamika, wiikhupanyera ni othananaxa." 
Ezekiel3:1 Owo aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, mukhuure nikwakhwala nna; vahoolowaya murowe ni muulume ni muloko wa oYixrayeli.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Miyo kaahaathama ni owo aakivaha nikwakhwala weera miyo kikhuure. 
Ezekiel3:3 Vano aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, mukhuure nikwakhwala nna kinoovahaakani, ni mvone.” Hiiho miyo kaakhuura, ni mmwaanomwaka naacoocowa ntoko oravo." 
Ezekiel3:4 Vahoolowaya, owo aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, vano murowe omulokoni wa aYixrayeli ni mwaaleele maswaaka." 
Ezekiel3:5 Nyuwo khamunrumiheliwa omulokoni wa nuulumo nohiiweya ni noorika, mene wa muloko wa aYixrayeli;" 
Ezekiel3:6 khamunrowa mmilokoni sincipale sa nuulumo nohiiweya ni noorika, mwa seiyo maswaaya nyuwo muhingweraanyu wiiwexexa. Vekhaikhai, miyo koorumihenleni wa seiyo, miloko iyo saangwiiwani." 
Ezekiel3:7 Vaheera muloko wa aYixrayeli khoontthuna owiiwani niwoko owo khoontthuna okiiwa. Vano muloko wootheene wohuumiha murima ni woottiyamaaru. 
Ezekiel3:8 Wa soothesene, miyo kinimootatuxani oottiyamaaru ni oowuumiha murima ntoko yaawo." 
Ezekiel3:9 Eyuucaanyu kinootatuxa yoolipaxa opwaha maluku, aani opwaha mwala woolipaxa. Muhiwoove, hata muhitteenguwe mwaawoonaka, arookhalaru muloko woovaanya.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 Owo aapwaherera eeraka: “Mwaana a mutthu, mwiiwe nnenesene ni muhele vamurimani masu ootheene kineeraaka kooleeleni." 
Ezekiel3:11 Vano murowe wa axunninyu aronghiwe wootthukiwani ni mwawuulumane. Mwaaleele, hata yiiwe, ehiiwe: Yave onlamula sootheene ti oohimala.”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Vahoolowaya, Munepa waakittukhula, kiniiwa okhuwelaxiwa ottuliwaka ntoko ha:” Ovuwa wa Yave ottottopeliwe omankaawewo!”" 
Ezekiel3:13 Kaahiiwa oruma wa mapupha a ikhalelo sa okumi emananaka, ni muxerexeremwaya, oruma wa mareko, aani oruma otokotoko!" 
Ezekiel3:14 Vano Munepa waakittukhula onakivenxawo, munepaaka othanananxeene ni owaawanxeene musarani, ntata noolipaxa na Yave nreene mwa miyo." 
Ezekiel3:15 Kaarowa wa anamatthukiwa yaakhala oTeli-Habibe, muxerexere mooloko Kebari. Wu kaakhala eriyaraaya mahuku mathannameeli kirukureereiyeene muru!" 
Ezekiel3:16 Emanleene mahuku mathannameeli, Yave aahuuluma ni miyo." 
Ezekiel3:17 Owo aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, Miyo kohoopakani namalipelela a muloko wa aYixrayeli; tivawo, mwiiwe masu kinghimaaka ni mwaaleele woopererawaka." 
Ezekiel3:18 Miyo kaamweerelaka mutakhali weera onimookhwa, ni nyuwo mwaahimooperera, hata mwaahimuleela weera ahiye mweettelowaawe woonanara eerelaka woopola okumaawe, mutakhali owo onimookhwa niwoko na sootakhalasawe, vaheera wa Miyo, nyuwo munookhalano nthowa na okhwawawe." 
Ezekiel3:19 Wa soothesene, nyuwo mwamooperera mutakhali ni owo aahihiya otakhalawawe ni mweettelowaawe woonanara, owo anaakhwele sootakhalasawe, vaheera nyuwo mmwiivuluxe okumaanyu." 
Ezekiel3:20 Mooteene yoowo, oororomeleya ahiya ororomeleyawawe, anapaka yoonanara, ni Miyo kamwiikaathera nluku nookwattula ohoolowawe, owo anaakhwe. Vano mweenre nyuwo muhimooperera, owo anaakhwele soottheka opankaawe. Soopakasawe soororomeleya nsuupuweleliwa ni wa Miyo, nyuwo munookhalano nthowa na okhwawawe." 
Ezekiel3:21 Wa soothesene, nyuwo mwamooperera oororomeleya ni owo aahittheka, vekhaikhai owo anaakhale ni okumi niwoko ohiiwelela woopereriwa, ni nyuwo khamukhalano nthowa.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Iwe, ntata na Yave naari mwa miyo, ni Owo aakeerela: “Mvenye ni murowe onghawalawani ni kinimuulumawo ni nyuwo.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Vano, kaavenya, kinarowa onghawalawani. Iwe, waakhalawo ovuwa wa Yave, ntoko ovuwa koonnaaka muxerexere mooloko Kebari. Kaahuuramihela vathi ekhove." 
Ezekiel3:24 Vano Munepa waakivolowa, onakeemexa. Owo waakeerela: “Murowe owaani ni mwiiwalelewo." 
Ezekiel3:25 Vanonto nyuwo, mwaana a mutthu, munootthukiwa ni mikhoyi moota wooweera khamuwera okhumela eriyari ya muloko." 
Ezekiel3:26 Kinoopakiha weera nluminanyu nitthukeye waahottokoroko weera mmaale ni muhiwere waawiiha, arookhalaru muloko woovaanya." 
Ezekiel3:27 Vaheera Miyo kuulumaka ni nyuwo, kinoohula eyanowaanyu ni nyuwo mmwaaleelase weera Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: ‘Yoowo ontthuna wiiwa, iiwe, ni yoowo ohintthuna, akhootte, niwoko awosa ti muloko woovaanya.”" 
Ezekiel4:1 “Vano mwaana a mutthu, mukuxe endyerwa, mwiikaathi ohoolowanyu ni mulepeleleno esidade ya oYerusaleemu." 
Ezekiel4:2 Vano murice ni mutekelele ikaaro sookurumulela ixiri, mpakele yooricano, mpake mukuso ni mookonelamo, murehererele ikaruma soottiittela ixiri mukhwipimwaya." 
Ezekiel4:3 Vahoolowaya, mukuxe muceco wa eyuuma, mwiikaathi eriyari ya nyuwo ni esidade ntoko exiri ya eyuuma ni mwakhale ohoolowaya. Eyo eniiriciwe, aani oorica mmwikhale ti nyuwo. Eyo eniikhale eneneero wa muloko wa oYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel4:4 Vano mwiixaatalelele moonowaanyu woothiyana ni mwiixiikaathere sootakhala sa muloko wa oYixrayeli. Nyuwo mwathateleke sootakhalasaya mweehuhuni ya waatta wa mahuku muneeraanyu mwiixaatalelele moonowaanyu woothiyana. 
Ezekiel4:5 Koolakela weera waatta wa mahuku awo elikaneleke waatta wa iyaakha sa otakhalawaya. Nyuwo muthateleke sootakhala sa muloko wa oYixrayeli wa mahuku macira mararu ni mahuku miloko mithannamixexe. 
Ezekiel4:6 Emanleene ehuhu eyo, mwiixaatalelele moonowaanyu woolopwana, ni mwathatele sootakhala sa muloko wa oYuda wa mahuku miloko mixexe – nihuku nimoha wa khula eyaakha ya sootakhala sa oYuda." 
Ezekiel4:7 Ngwehe oriciwa wa oYerusaleemu, ni, moono wookwinyiweene, mwathaliherele otthuna wa Muluku." 
Ezekiel4:8 Kinimootthukani ni mikhoyi weera muhirukunuwe mpaka muneeraanyu mukwanihere mahuku a oricawanyu. 
Ezekiel4:9 Mukuxe etrigu ni esevada*, ttaangare ni irooro, meele ni esenteyo*; muhele munrupani ni mwiipakeleno yooca. Nyuwo mmwiceeke mweehuhuni ya mahuku macira mararu ni miloko mithannamixexe mwiixaatalelenleene moonowaanyu woothiyana." 
Ezekiel4:10 Muringe igrama* macira meeli ni miloko mixexe sa yooca wa khula nihuku ni muceeke mweehuhuni mulakeleliwaanyu. 
Ezekiel4:11 Muringetho nttikha na eliitru* emoha ya maahi ni ngwureke mweehuhuni yoolakeleliwa. 
Ezekiel4:12 Muceeke epaawu mooteene yoowo mweeraanyu muce eboolu ya esevada*; mooxeke woonaka muloko, muvarelaka muteko mahiloka a atthu ntoko ikhuuni.”" 
Ezekiel4:13 Yave aaheera: “Mooteene yoowo, aYixrayeli animooca yooca yoohitteela eriyari ya miloko kineeraaka kiwoomolele.”" 
Ezekiel4:14 Vano miyo kaaheera: “Ii! Yave onlamula sootheene! Miyo nkiniivaliheru. Okhuma enamwanaaka mpaka vaanaano va, nkinakhuureru yoovettuliwa hoye hoye yoonyaanyiwa ni mwaamunama a ntuphini. Mmwaanomwaka kheenavoloweru yakhalaru etthu yoohitteela.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Owo aaheera: “Paahi, kinimootthuniherani wooxa epaawaanyu vamahilokani a emombe, ohikhanle vamahilokani a atthu.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Yave aaheeratho: “Mwaana a mutthu, kinoovukula waatta wa yooca oYerusaleemu. Muloko onuuce ngwoovani yooca yookwandiwa, owurakatho maahi ookwandiwa ohoonaka yooweera," 
Ezekiel4:17 niwoko eniithowe yooca ni maahi. Onuuwuume owanoni yaawehanaka, ni eniiyavayave niwoko na sootakhalasaya.”" 
Ezekiel5:1 “Vano mwaana a mutthu, mukuxe ekatana yoowiitha ni mvarele muteko ntoko ncemo na namamettha weera mmetthe mayihi ni ireru. Vahoolowaya, mukuxe muringo ni mukawanyihe mayihi awo." 
Ezekiel5:2 Emanleene mahuku a oriciwa wa esidade, muhisere mmooroni mpatta wanaararu wa mayihi musidadeni mmo. Mukuxe mpatta wanaararu ni muthikile ni ekatana muxerexere wa esidade yootheene. Mpatta wanaararu mukinoowo, mmwaraxele mpheyoni. Vano Miyo kinimwaattharelela ni ekatana yoohululiwa munluwoni." 
Ezekiel5:3 Mene mukuxe aximenxa ni musunge mmaleembeni mwa soowarasanyu. 
Ezekiel5:4 Mwa imenxa iyo, mukuxe sikina sikina ni mvonyere mmooroni weera size. Vano, mooro onuumwareele mmulokoni moothemwene mwa oYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel5:5 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Esidade ela ti Yerusaleemu, kiikaathiyaaka eriyari ya miloko, erukureeriweene ni miloko sikina." 
Ezekiel5:6 Wa soothesene, mwa soonanarasaya, eyo yoovaanyera malamulowaaka ni ikanosaka opwaha miloko sikina sootheene sirukureenrewo. Eyo yookhootta malamulowaaka ni kheettharinghe ikanosaka." 
Ezekiel5:7 Tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: Nyuwo mookhalaxa namavaanya opwaha miloko soorukureenreni ni khamuttharinghe ikanosaka, hata khamwiiwelenle malamulowaaka. Nyuwo mpaka khamutthanre mweettelo wa miloko soorukureenreni." 
Ezekiel5:8 Tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: Miyo kinoowananani nyuwo Yerusaleemu ni kinimoottaruxani miloko soonaka. 
Ezekiel5:9 Vano niwoko na milukusanyu sa mwiikho, kinimoopakelani etthu kihitonkwaaka opaka hata kineeraaka kihipaketho." 
Ezekiel5:10 Tivawo, eriyaraanyu, eniyeereye weera asitiithi eniyaakhuure anamwanaaya ni anamwane eniyaakhuure asitithaya. Kinimoottaruxani kaamwaraxeleke mipatta sootheene sa mpheyoni yaawo eniyaahalele." 
Ezekiel5:11 Vanonto, kinlipela mwa okumaaka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, mweenre mvaliha Nipuronaka Nootteela* ni icaambulosanyu soothanyeya ni soopakasanyu soohiira, Miyo kinoovenxa mareelihowaaka. Nkoomorelani ikharari hata nkiwuurelani." 
Ezekiel5:12 Mpatta wanaararu wa mulokwaanyu oniwiiviwe ni nihooxo hoye hoye onuuriheye mutalani mpuwa mwa ixirisanyu; mpatta wanaararu mukina oniwiiveliwe ekatana mukerekhere wa esidade; ni mpatta mukinoowo kinoomwaraxela mipatta sootheene sa mpheyoni kitthareleleke kivarenleene ekatana. 
Ezekiel5:13 Hiiho isarasaka sinoomala ni waanyoonyeriwawaka onookhurunuwa, ni kinimwiinleliwa ikukuttula. Saamalenleene isarasaka, anoosuwela weera ti Miyo, Yave, kuulumme munthitinimwaka." 
Ezekiel5:14 Kinimookhalihani nthala kootatuxekeni ootthebwiwa eriyari ya miloko soorukureenreni, yoonaka ootheene yoovinreni." 
Ezekiel5:15 Miyo koottaruxakani nyuwo musarani, moonyoonyiwani ni moohiihani, nyuwo munookhala mutheelelo ni yootthebwano, moopererelo ni yootannyera otteenguwa wa miloko soorukureenreni. Ti Miyo, Yave, kuulumme." 
Ezekiel5:16 Koolathelakani nyuupasaka soowiiva ni soophwata, nyuupasaka sa etala, nkilathele owiivani. Kinimwaandyeera ovoliwawanyu ni kinoovenxa yoocaanyu." 
Ezekiel5:17 Kinimoorumihelani etala ni axinama a ntuphini ni awo eniyoohiyeeni woohikhalano anamwane. Nihooxo ni oyeeheya wa ephome sinimoophwanyani, ni kinimooruuhelani ekatana. Ti Miyo, Yave, kuulumme.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo eeraka: 
Ezekiel6:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, murukunuwe ni ngwehe nyaako sa oYixrayeli; muthalihere otthuna wa Muluku" 
Ezekiel6:3 ni mweere: ‘Ii! Nyaako sa oYixrayeli, mwiiwe masu a Yave onlamula sootheene. Oneerela ha Yave onlamula sootheene, nyaako ni mattumuxa, maxaapwa ni mareyareya: Kihanle vakhaani wooruuhelasani ekatana; kinimwaaphwata altaaraanyu* mwa mwemmo munlapaanyu miluku soowootha." 
Ezekiel6:4 Altaaraanyu* anoophwatiwa ni altaaraanyu a erubani* anoonyaanyiwa, ni kinimwiiva mulokwaanyu ohoolo wa milukusanyu." 
Ezekiel6:5 Kinimwiikaathi mittembo sa aYixrayeli ohoolo wa milukusaya, ni kinoomwaraxela makhuvaanyu mukhwipi mwa altaaraanyu." 
Ezekiel6:6 Muneeraanyu mukhaleru, isidade iyo sinookurumuliwa ni miluku soowootha sa mmattumuxani sinoopuruliwa, siphwatiweke; milukusanyu sinoonyaanyiwe sitatuxiweke mathala. Altaaraanyu a erubani* anoopwexiwa ni sootheene mpankaanyu sinoomalamalihiwa." 
Ezekiel6:7 Mulokwaanyu onimookhwa eriyaraanyu ni nyuwosa mmwisuwele weera Miyo ti Yave. 
Ezekiel6:8 Vaheera akina kinoowuurela. Akina a nyuwo eniyoopowe ekatana mwaamwaraxeliwaka eriyari ya ilapo ni miloko. 
Ezekiel6:9 Vano, mmilokoni mmo muneeraanyu muronghiwe ootthukiweene, yaawo eneera yoopowe anookuupuwelela. Animuupuwelela moota kaathananihiwaaka ni mirimasaya sooraruwa sikihingye Miyo, ni maithwaaya yaahaawela milukusaya. Animwiixeettiha murima niwoko na yoonanara apankaaya ni na soopakasaya sootheene soohiira." 
Ezekiel6:10 Awo eniisuwele weera Miyo ti Yave, ni weera kaahuuluma ekhakhai keenraaka kinimwaaruuhela erisa ela." 
Ezekiel6:11 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Muttikitthe matata, mmane inaawo ni mukhuwele: “Maayi miyo!” mwaha wa soopaka sootakhala soohiira sa muloko wa aYixrayeli, niwoko awosa eniyiiviwe ni ekatana, etala ni nihooxo." 
Ezekiel6:12 Yoowo orakamenle aniiviwe ni nihooxo; yoowo ori vakhiviru aniiviwe ni ekatana, ni yoowo anaahalahale anuureliwa, anaakhwe etala. Ti hiiho kineeraaka kaayeeherase isarasaka." 
Ezekiel6:13 Awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave mulokwaaya waataleliwaka wookhweene eriyari ya milukusaya, muxerexere altaaraaya*, mmattumuxani ootheene oorakamela ni mutthomelani sootheene sa nyaako, vathi wa nyiri sootheene soopombaxa ni khula mwiri wa ekarivalyu* yoosareya makukhu – mmapuroni moothemwene mwa mwemmo yaahiseraayamo miluku erubani* yoowunkhelaxa." 
Ezekiel6:14 Kinimwaatheteela moonowaaka ni kinootatuxa elapo oheleyaxa nthala, okhuma munikareni mpaka oDibela, aani weiwo eneeraaya ekhaleru. Hiiho, anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.’ ”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo moota ola: 
Ezekiel7:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, Yave onlamula sootheene oneerela ha muloko wa oYixrayeli: ‘Woophiya ommaleloni! Woophiya ommaleloni wa mattuumba maxexe a elapo ya oYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel7:3 Vano ommaleloni ori mwa nyuwo, ni Miyo kinimooyeeherani isarasaka. Kinimoottaruxani kittharihaka mweettelowaanyu, ni kinimootthuvelelani soopakasanyu soohiira." 
Ezekiel7:4 Nkoowehani ni ikharari hata nkiwuurelani; vekhaikhai Miyo kinimootthuvelelani mweettelowaanyu ni soopakiwa soohiira eriyaraanyu. Hiiho, nyuwo munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.’" 
Ezekiel7:5 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: ‘Moone erisa! Erisa mwa yeeyo ehitonko wuupuweleliwa enimoowa. 
Ezekiel7:6 Woophiya ommaleloni! Woophiya ommaleloni! Owo onimoorukunuwelani. Woophiya! 
Ezekiel7:7 Nthorihelo nohoophiyerelani nyuwo munkhala mulaponi. Yoophiyera ehuhu, nihuku nookhuveela; wookhala orukureereya muru ohikhanle ohakalala mmanyaakoni." 
Ezekiel7:8 Kihanle vakhaani wooyeeherani isarasaka ni okwanihera woonyoonyeriwaniwaka. Miyo kinimoothorihani kittharihaka mweettelowaanyu ni kinimootthuvelani kittharihaka soopakasanyu soohiira sootheene. 
Ezekiel7:9 Nkoowehani ni ikharari hata nkiwuurelani; Miyo kinimootthuvelani kittharihaka mweettelowaanyu ni soopakasanyu soohiira sootheene siri eriyaraanyu. Hiiho, nyuwo munoosuwela weera ti Miyo, Yave, kinoomanani." 
Ezekiel7:10 Moone nihuku! Noophiya! Nthorihelo nohoonihereya, ekopo yoophuwa, wiixoona woottuva." 
Ezekiel7:11 Nipuhero noothatuwa ntoko ekopo weera nittaruxe yoonanara; khawoworu a muloko anaahale, aani khawoworu a nakupa ole – mihakhu ni epilaaya soothesene sinoovenxiwa." 
Ezekiel7:12 Yoophiya ehuhu, noophiyera nihuku. Namathuma ahitthape hata namathumiha ahithanane, niwoko isarasaka soosareela munakupani moothemwene." 
Ezekiel7:13 Naari namathuma ni namathumiha ehalaka ni okumi, namathumiha khoopola ettima othumihalaawe, niwoko moonelo mwaha wa nakupa ootheene khahokoleela ottuli. Khoowoworu oniwuureliwe niwoko na sootakhalasaya." 
Ezekiel7:14 Naari yiipaka mapalapatta, ni erehereraka sootheene soolikanasene, khawoworu anaarowe okhottoni, niwoko isarasaka soommorela nakupa ootheene." 
Ezekiel7:15 Ekatana eri vaate, nihooxo ni etala siri mpuwa; yoowo anaakhale ntuphini, aniiviwe ni ekatana, ni yoowo anaakhale musidade, anaakhwe etala ni nihooxo." 
Ezekiel7:16 Ootheene eneera ehale ni eneera yoopowe, anookhala mmanyaakoni yiipulelaka ntoko ikhunda sireene mmareyareyani, khula mutthu niwoko na yootakhalaawe." 
Ezekiel7:17 Matata ootheene kheelipalipa, ni makutha ootheene anookocakoca ekhalaka oohilipa ntoko maahi." 
Ezekiel7:18 Awosa eniyiikhuneele ikuwo soolalamikano ni eniiwarele ikuwo sootteengula. Ikhovesaya sinimuulihiheyaxa muru, ni mayihaaya eniimetthiwe." 
Ezekiel7:19 Eparathaaya* anoovonyera mmiseweni ni eyuumaaya yoorikaxa eniyooneliwe okhala yoohitteela. Eparathaaya* ni eyuumaaya yoorikaxa khasiwera waatapuxa vanihukuni na isara sa Yave. Ovoliwawaya khawaamalela hata kheevona niwoko iyo saahaakwattuliha mootakhalani. 
Ezekiel7:20 Awosa yaahakalalela axiveevaaya ooreera, ni yaavarela muteko woopakela milukusaya soohiira ni icaambulosaya sa mwiikho. Tivawo kineeraaka kaatatuxere itthu iyo soohitteelasaya." 
Ezekiel7:21 Sootheene iyo kinimwinnyerera mmatatani mwa anamarwa ntoko soohuhuliwa ni mmatatani mwa atakhali a mulaponi ntoko soowiiyiwa, ni awosa anoovaliha iyo." 
Ezekiel7:22 Kinimwaahuluwasa, ni awosa anoohiiriha Nipuronaka noosiveleyaxa; anamwiiya eniivolowe ni eniihiirihe." 
Ezekiel7:23 Mureherere onyooro niwoko elapo yoosareya ephome yooyeehiwa, ni esidade yoosareya nipuhero." 
Ezekiel7:24 Kinimwaaruuha atthu ootepaxa otakhala a mmilokoni weera ekuxase impasaya; kinoomaliha wiixoona wa aweri ni mapurowaaya ootteela anoohiirihiwa. 
Ezekiel7:25 Waaphiyaka otteenguwa, awosa animwaasa murettele, mene kheephwanya." 
Ezekiel7:26 Eviraleene erisa, enimoorwa erisa ekinatho, ni oviraleene woopiha, onimoorwa woopiha okinatho. Eniyeerere waasaasa moonelo wa mpatta wa mprofeeti, ni nihusiho na nlamulo mwa asaserdoti* nnooriheya, mpakatho olaka wa asitokweene." 
Ezekiel7:27 Mwene aniikhupanyere, mwaana mulopwana a mwene anaawarele ikuwo sa olalamika, ni matata a muloko wa mulaponi eniithukumele. Kinimwaapakelasa yeeyo mweettelowaaya omphwanelaaya, ni kinimwaathoriha kittharihaka moota wa okhalawaya. Hiiho eniisuwele weera Miyo ti Yave.’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Vanihukuni nanaathanu na mweeri wanaathannamosa wa eyaakha yanaathannamosa ya oronghiwa wootthukiwani, miyo vamoha ni asitokweene a oYuda nikilaathiyeene vaatewaka, ntata na Yave onlamula sootheene naakirweela." 
Ezekiel8:2 Kaaweha, kinoona ekhalelo ntoko ya mutthu. Wookhuma muyuununi woorowa vathi owo aalikana ni mooro, ni woorowa osulu, ekhalelowaawe yaari yoowaaraxa ntoko eyuuma yoocapeya." 
Ezekiel8:3 Owo aahookola etthu yaalikana ni moono, anakivara mayihi. Munepa waakittukhulela eriyari ya etthaya ni erimu. Munyooneloni sa Muluku, Owo aakirongha oYerusaleemu, mpaka vamulako wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa nipuwa na mpuwa, mwa mwemmo yiikaathiwaayamo ecaambulo entannyera ehace ya Muluku." 
Ezekiel8:4 Iwe waakhala ohoolowaka ovuwa wa Muluku a oYixrayeli, ntoko moonelo koonnaaka munghawalawani." 
Ezekiel8:5 Vano Owo aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, ngwehe mpatta wa ottuttuwani.” Miyo kaaweha, kinoona mpatta wa ottuttuwani, muxerexere wa mulako vakhiviru wa altaari* ecaambulo entannya ehace ya Muluku." 
Ezekiel8:6 Owo aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, nyuwo munnoona yeeyo ampakaaya? Soopaka sa mwiikho sa muloko wa oYixrayeli, itthu sineera sikirakamelihere Nipuronaka Nootteela? Vaheera nyuwo mmoone soopaka soonanaraxa opwaha seiya.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 Woottharelana aakirongha vamulako wa nipuwa. Kaaweha, kinoona nlaka vaxirini." 
Ezekiel8:8 Owo aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, muthipe vaxirini.” Miyo kaathipa exiri, kinoona mulako woowiipithiheya." 
Ezekiel8:9 Owo aakeerelatho: “Mvolowe ni moone itthu soohiira ni sa mwiikho ampakaayawo.” 
Ezekiel8:10 Miyo kaavolowa, kinaweha mmwe muxirini moothemwene saacaambuliwa ikhalelo soopattuxiwa soowiipurula soohiyanahiyana ni axinama oohiira ni icaambulo sootheene sa muloko wa oYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel8:11 Ohoolo wa seiyo yaakhala asitokweene miloko mithannamiili a muloko wa aYixrayeli ni Yaazaniya, mwaana mulopwana a Xafani, aari eriyaraayasa. Khula mutthu a yaawosa aarino enghiseriwa erubani* mmatatanimwawe, ni naakhumelelamo nihutte noowunkhelaxa." 
Ezekiel8:12 Vano Yave aakeerela: “Mwaana a nutthu, nyuwo mohoona yeeyo asitokweene a oYixrayeli ampakaaya mpiphini, khula mutthu vanipuroniwawe noolapa ecaambulowaawe yoopatthiwa? Awosa aneera: ‘Yave khannoona; Owo oothaama mulaponi.’”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Yave aaheeratho: “Nyuwo munoowoona epakaka itthu sootepaxa ohiira.” 
Ezekiel8:14 Vano Owo aakirongha vamulako wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa Empa ya Yave. Iwe, kaawoona asithiyana ekilaathiyeene emwiinlelaka Tamuzi." 
Ezekiel8:15 Owo aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, nyuwo munnoona yeeyo? munimoonatho miteko soohiiraxatho opwaha seiya.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Vano owo aakirongha vanipuwani na mpuwa na Mpaani mwa Yave, ni mmwe vamulako wa Empa ya Yave, eriyari ya nipithela* ni altaari*, yaakhala asilopwana miloko miili naathanu. Awo, erenreene ettuli Empa ya Yave ni ewengheene mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa yaakokhorela onsuwani." 
Ezekiel8:17 Owo aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, nyuwo mohoona yeeyo? Weeraka miteko soohiira iya khavetthwaayawo muloko wa oYuda? Onootthuneyatho osariha nipuhero mulaponi ni opwaherera okitannyera isara? Moone! Awosa aniikaathi ephandi muxerexere ephula!" 
Ezekiel8:18 Tivawo kineeraaka kiwoonihere isara; nkaaweha ni ikharari hata nkiwuurelaru. Naari ekikhuwelelaka, nkiwiiwa.”" 
Ezekiel9:1 Vano miyo kaamwiiwa iitthanaka ni okhuwelaxa: “Mwaaruuhe va anamalipelela a esidade, khula mutthu amvarenleene kapwitthi.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Kaawoona asilopwana athannamosa yaarweela vamulako mutokweene, owenghe mpatta wa ottuttuwani, khula mutthu amvarenleene kapwitthi oomwiivano. Aakhala mulopwana aari ni yaawosa awanreene sa eliinyu* yoopindeleliwa nihoottha na namalepa noopakiwa ni exapala muyuununi. Awosa yaavolowa, eneemela muxerexere altaari* a ebronze*." 
Ezekiel9:3 Vanonto ovuwa wa Muluku a oYixrayeli waakhumelela vasulu wa akerubini*, waakhalaayawo ni vaavaawo anasuseerela vamulako wa Empa ya Yave. Yave aamwiitthana mulopwana aawanre sa eliinyu* ni yoopindeleliwa nihoottha na namalepa muyuununi," 
Ezekiel9:4 anamweerela: “Mviravire musidade ya oYerusaleemu ni mwawiikaathere vayuuci eneneero yaale anlalamika, yiipulelaka niwoko na miteko soohiira simpakiwa mwemmo.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 Miyo kiwiriyanaka, Owo aaweerela akina: “Muntthare musidadeni moothemwene ni mwawiive muhaamorelaka ikharari naari murima woowuurela." 
Ezekiel9:6 Mwaawiive asitokweene, amiravo, asimwali, asithiyana ni asinamwane. Vaheera, muhimutaveru yoowo anaakhaleno eneneero. Mpacereke vaNipuroniwaka Nootteela*.” Vano awosa yaapacenre asitokweene yaari ohoolo wa Empa ya Yave." 
Ezekiel9:7 Hiiho, Owo aaweerelasa: “Mvalihe Empa ya Yave ni musarihe mittembo mmapuwani. Murowaseke!” Awosa yaarowasa, enampacerasa noomala musidadeni moothemwene." 
Ezekiel9:8 Eyo eri hiiho, miyo kaahanle meekhaaka. Vano kaahuuramihela ekhove vathi, kiitthanaka: “Ii! Yave onlamula sootheene! Munimwaaphwata ahalahanle ootheene a oYixrayeli muyeeheraka isarasanyu oYerusaleemu?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 Owo aakaakhula: “Sootakhala sa amaki a oYerusaleemu ni muloko wa oYuda, sohaattaxa; etthaya yoosareya ephome yooyeehiwa, ni esidade yoosareya soohiroromeleya. Awosa aneera: ‘Yave oothaama mulaponi; Yave khannoona.’" 
Ezekiel9:10 Vano wa mpattaaka Miyo nkaawehasa ni ikharari hata nkiwuurelaru, vaheera kinimwaamoroxela mmurumwaya yeeyo apakansaaya.”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Vano mulopwana aawanre sa eliinyu* ni yoopindeleliwa nihoottha na namalepa muyuununi, aahokolowa ni mutthenga ola: “Koopaka yeele mwaakilamulenlaanyu.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Kaaweha, kinoona etthu yaalikana ni ehice ya safira* yaari vasulu wa nipatho naari mmuru wa akerubini*." 
Ezekiel10:2 Yave aamweerela mulopwana aawanre sa eliinyu*: “Murowe eriyari ya mareko vathi wa akerubini*. Musarihe mmatatani makhala a mooro muneeraanyu mwakuxe eriyari ya akerubini* ni mwamwaraxele musidadeni.” Vano owo aarowa miyo kingwehaka. 
Ezekiel10:3 Vano akerubini* yaari mpatta wa ohitto wa Empa ya Yave mulopwana aavolowaawe, ni nihutte naasareya vanipuwani na mpuwa." 
Ezekiel10:4 Hiiho ovuwa wa Yave waakhumelela vasulu akerubini*, onasuseerela vamulako wa Empa ya Yave. Nihutte naasareya Empa ya Muluku ni nipuwa naasareya waara wa ovuwa wa Yave." 
Ezekiel10:5 Oruma wa mapupha a akerubini* waamwiiwanyeya mpaka vanipuwani na omokoni, ntoko wiiwanyeya wa oruma wa Muluku a ikuru sootheene, Owo uulumaka." 
Ezekiel10:6 Yave aamulamulenlaawe mulopwana aawanre sa eliinyu*: “Mukuxe mooro ori eriyari ya mareko ni ya akerubini*,” mulopwana ole aarowa aneemela muxerexere nreko." 
Ezekiel10:7 Vano mmoha a akerubini* aahookola moono mmooroni waari eriyaraaya. Aattotta makhala makina a mooro ole, anahela mmatatani mwa mulopwana aawanre sa eliinyu* mwa yoowo aakhenle, anavenya." 
Ezekiel10:8 Waamapupha a akerubini* yaamooneya etthu yaalikana ni matata a mutthu. 
Ezekiel10:9 Kaaweha, kinoona muxerexere akerubini* mareko maxexe, nreko nimoha muxerexere mwa khula akerubini*; mareko yaaceremela ntoko krisolito*." 
Ezekiel10:10 Ekhalelowaaya mareko yaamulikana, ni khula nreko naakhala ntoko naarino nreko nikina mpuwamwaya." 
Ezekiel10:11 Yeettaaya, yaarowa wakhalaru mpatta yaakelaaya akerubini*; akerubini* yaaramaramaaya, mareko khayaarukunuwaru. Awo yaarowa wakhalaru mpatta wa ohoolowaya ehirukunuwakaru." 
Ezekiel10:12 Irutthusaya sootheene ni ottuliwene, matata ni mapupha, yaasareya maitho ni hiihotho marekwaayeene ootheene." 
Ezekiel10:13 Wa mareko kaawiiwa yiitthanelaka “mareko oorukureera.” 
Ezekiel10:14 Khula kerubini* aakhalano ikhove ixexe – ekhove yoopacera yaari ya kerubini*, yanaaveeli ya mutthu, yanaararu ya mwatto ni yanaaxexe ya xaaka." 
Ezekiel10:15 Vano akerubini* yaahiittukhula. Saari ikhalelosene seiye sa okumi koonnaaka muxerexere mooloko Kebari. 
Ezekiel10:16 Akerubini* yaaramaramaaya, mareko a mukhwipimwaya yaamuramaramatho; vano akerubini* yaakungaaya mapupha weera yiittukhule, marekotho yaamurowano." 
Ezekiel10:17 Akerubini* yahaaramaramaaya, awotho khayaaramarama; vaheera akerubini* yiittukhulaaya, mareko awo yaamwiittukhulatho niwoko munepa wa ikhalelo sa okumi iye waakhalamo." 
Ezekiel10:18 Vano ovuwa wa Yave waasusa vamulako wa Empa ya Yave, oneemela vasulu wa akerubini*." 
Ezekiel10:19 Miyo kaawehaka hiihaale, akerubini* yaakunga mapupha eniittukhula, ni mareko yaarowano. Awosa yaaheemela vamulako ori mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa Empa ya Yave ni ovuwa wa Muluku a oYixrayeli, waari vasulu wa yaawosa." 
Ezekiel10:20 Ikhalelo sa okumi iye ti seiyeene koonnaaka vathi wa Muluku a oYixrayeli, muxerexere mooloko Kebari. Kaahoonelela weera alesa yaari akerubini*." 
Ezekiel10:21 Khula kerubini* aakhalano ikhove ixexe ni mapupha maxexe, ni waamapuphawaya yaakhala etthu yaalikana ni matata a mutthu." 
Ezekiel10:22 Ikhovesaya saalikana seiyo miyo koonnaaka muxerexere mooloko Kebari. Ootheene yaarowa paahi ohoolo. 
Ezekiel11:1 Vano Munepa waakeemexa, onakirongha vamulako wa Empa ya Yave owenghe mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Iwe, vamulako yaakhala asilopwana miloko miili naathanu ni eriyaraayasa kaamoona Yaazaniya, mwaana mulopwana a Azuri, ni Pelateya, mwaana mulopwana a Benaya, ahooleli a muloko." 
Ezekiel11:2 Yave aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, alasa ti atthu amvaanelela sootakhala, evahaka olakela woonanara musidadeene yeela." 
Ezekiel11:3 Awosa aneera: ‘Kheekhuveenle ehuhu yooteka impa. Esidade ela ti mwaapu, ni hiyo nri enama yaapeiwalemo.’" 
Ezekiel11:4 Tivawo, mwaathalihere otthuna wa Muluku, mwaana a mutthu, mwaathalihere.”" 
Ezekiel11:5 Vano Munepa wa Yave, waahoorwa wa miyo, onakiruma ohima weeraka: “Yave oneera ha: Ii! Muloko wa oYixrayeli, ti yeeyo nyuwosa munghimaanyu, vaheera Miyo koosuwela yeeyo munuupuwelaanyu." 
Ezekiel11:6 Nyuwosa khamureere owiiva atthu ancipale a esidadeene yeela ni mmisewenimwaya moosariha mittembo. 
Ezekiel11:7 Vanonto Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Mittembo mvonyenraanyu mmuseweni ti enama ni esidade ela ti mwaapu, mene Miyo kinoowoomolanimo." 
Ezekiel11:8 Nyuwosa munoova ekatana, ni ekatana, kinimooruuhelanisa, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel11:9 Miyo kinoowoomolasani musidade, kiwinnyererekeni mmatatani mwa anamarwa ni koottaruxekeni." 
Ezekiel11:10 Nyuwosa munimwiiviwa ni ekatana, ni Miyo kinimoothorihelasani nnyiinanoni sa oYixrayeli. Hiiho nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel11:11 Esidade ela kheekhala mwaapu wa nyuwo, hata nyuwosa khamukhala enama mpuwamwaya. Miyo kinimoothorihelasani nnyiinanoni sa oYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel11:12 Hiiho, nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave, niwoko nyuwosa khamuttharinghe ikanosaka hata khamwiiwelenle malamulowaaka, mene muttharinghe makhalelo a miloko soorukureenreni.”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Vano, miyo kithaliheraka otthuna wa Muluku, Pelateya, mwaana mulopwana a Benaya, aahookhwa. Vahoolowaya kaahuuramihela ekhove vathi, kinakhuwelaxa: “Ii! Yave onlamula sootheene! Munimwaaphwata woomalela oohalahala a oYixrayeli?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo moota ola: 
Ezekiel11:15 “Mwaana a mutthu, axunninyu, aani axunninyu ari emusaanyu xaxaxa ni muloko wootheene wa oYixrayeli, ti yaawosa aneereliwa ni amaki a oYerusaleemu: ‘Awosa aamurakamela Yave. Ti hiyo nivahingwe elapo ela weera ekhale yawihuweene.’" 
Ezekiel11:16 Vanonto mweere: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Kaaroowoomolelaru ilapo soorakamelaxa eriyari ya miloko kaamwaraxelaka eriyari ya ilapo, mweehuhuni yeele kaakhala ntoko nipuronaya nootteela yakhalaru elapo yaarowaaya.’" 
Ezekiel11:17 Vanonto, mweerase: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Miyo kinimoothukumanyihani eriyari ya miloko koohokoloxekeni mulaponi mmwaraxeliwaanyu, ni kinimoohokoloxerasani elapo ya oYixrayeli.’" 
Ezekiel11:18 Awosa anoohokoleelamo ni anoovenxa icaambulosaya soohiira ni milukusaya soothanyeya. 
Ezekiel11:19 Kinimwaavahasa murima woohikawanyeya, kiheleke munepa munyowani mpuwamwaya; kinoovenxa mwa yaawo murima wa nluku kaavaheke murima wa ethayi." 
Ezekiel11:20 Hiiho eniittharihe ikanosaka ni anoopasoopa wiiwelela malamulowaaka. Awosa anookhala mulokwaaka, ni Miyo kinookhala Mulukwaaya." 
Ezekiel11:21 Vaheera wa yaawo murimaaya wuuramenle icaambulosaya soohiira ni milukusaya soothanyeya, kinoomoroxela mmurumwaya yeele apakansaaya, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.”" 
Ezekiel11:22 Vano akerubini* ni mareko a muxerexeremwaya, yaakunga mapuphaaya, ni ovuwa wa Muluku a oYixrayeli waari vasulu wa yaawo." 
Ezekiel11:23 Ovuwa wa Yave waavenya musidadeni ele, oneemela vamwaako ori mpattaaya ninkhuma nsuwa." 
Ezekiel11:24 Vano Munepa wa Muluku waakeemexa, ni mmooneloni, waakirongha wa yaale yaaronghiwe wootthukiwani oBabiloniya. Hiiho, moonelo kaarinaaka, waamala," 
Ezekiel11:25 kinaathalihera anamatthukiwa sootheene aakoonihenraawe Yave. 
Ezekiel12:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo moota ola: 
Ezekiel12:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, nyuwo munkhala eriyari ya muloko woovaanya. Awosa aakhalano maitho oowoonela, mene kaanoona, ni maaru oowiiwela, mene khaaniiwa, niwoko ari anamavaanya." 
Ezekiel12:3 Vanonto, mwaana a mutthu, mutthukatthuke mirindisanyu soorowano wootthukiwani moothanani ootheene yoonaka, muttimuleke ni muroweke nipuro nikina. Awosa arookhalaru muloko woovaanya, apaale eniyiiwexexe." 
Ezekiel12:4 Moothanani, muloko woonaka, mukhumihere vaate seiyo siri sawinyu sootthukatthukiwasene soorowano wootthukiwani. Vano moohiyuni, awosa yoonaka, murowe ntoko munronghiwa wootthukiwani elapo ekina." 
Ezekiel12:5 Awosa yoonaka, mpake nlaka vaxirini ni mvirihekewo mirindisanyu." 
Ezekiel12:6 Muthateleke iyo muloko woonaka ni mukuxeke oxekuwaka. Mukuttelele ekhove weera muhooneru mulaponi, niwoko Miyo kohoopakani eneneero wa muloko wa oYixrayeli.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 Vano miyo kaapaka yeeyo kaalamuleliwaaka. Moothanani, kaakhumihera vaate itthusaka sitthukatthukiweene soorowano wootthukiwani. Vahoolowaya, wiilaka, kaahula nlaka vaxirini ni matataaka. Wiilaka kaakhuma ni mirindisaka kithatenleene, ootheene yoonaka." 
Ezekiel12:8 Oxeexelo, kaahaakhela masu a Yave ala:" 
Ezekiel12:9 “Mwaana a mutthu, muloko woovaanya ole wa oYixrayeli wohookohani: ‘Mumpakani?’" 
Ezekiel12:10 Mwaaleele weera Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Mutthenga ola ti mwaha wa mutokweene a oYerusaleemu ni muloko wootheene wa oYixrayeli ori weiwo. 
Ezekiel12:11 Mwaaleele ha: ‘Miyo kiri eneneero wa nyuwo.’ Mooteene yoowo kipankaaka, munoopakeliwatho hiiho. Awosa anoorowa wootthukiwani mulaponi ekina ntoko anamatthukiwa." 
Ezekiel12:12 Mutokweenaaya anaathatele murindaawe wiilaka, aphutuweleke vanlakani nihuliwe vaxirini weera owo avirewo. Owo anaakuttelele ekhove weera ahooneru elapo." 
Ezekiel12:13 Kinoomureya ntthavinaka ni owo onoopharihiwa munraakhonimwaka; Miyo kinoomurongha oBabiloniya, mulaponi mwa aKaldeya, mene owo khoona ni onookhwelawo." 
Ezekiel12:14 Ootheene ari mukhwipimwawe kinimwaamwaraxela mpheyoni – asitokweenaawe ni anakhottwaawe ootheene, kaatthareleleke kivarenleene ekatana." 
Ezekiel12:15 Miyo kaamwaraxelaka eriyari ya miloko ni awosa yaamwareelaka mulaponi, anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel12:16 Vaheera kinoowuurela akina akina a yaawosa mwa ekatana, etala ni mwa nihooxo weera mmilokoni eneeraaya eroweru, yalape mitekosaya sootheene soohiira. Hiiho anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo eeraka: 
Ezekiel12:18 “Mwaana a mutthu, muthukumele mwaacaaka yoocaanyu, aani muthukumelaxe ni woova mwaawuraka maahaanyu." 
Ezekiel12:19 Mweerele muloko wa mulaponi weera Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha mwaha wa yaale ankhala oYerusaleemu ni oYixrayeli: ‘Awosa animooca yoocaaya moohaawelani ni anoowura maahaaya moohiwehererani, niwoko sootheene siri mulaponimwaya animwaakhiwamo mwaha wa nipuhero na yaawo ankhalamo." 
Ezekiel12:20 Isidade simakingwe sinoophwatiwa ni elapo enoothaamiwa. Hiiho nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.’” 
Ezekiel12:21 Yave, aakeerelatho:" 
Ezekiel12:22 “Mwaana a mutthu, nxiripulo heeni nna nyuwosa murinaanyu oYixrayeli nneera: ‘Mahuku amvira ni nyoonelo sootheene khasivareleya muteko.’" 
Ezekiel12:23 Vano mwaaleele: ‘Yave oneera ha: Kinoomaliha niphwanaphwaniho nna ni khanuulummwatho oYixrayeli.’ Mwaaleeletho ha: ‘Eneera ekhuveelaka mahuku sineeraaya sikwaniheriwe nyoonelo sootheene. 
Ezekiel12:24 Vano khasikhalatho nyoonelo soowootha hoye hoye sootthoma soolokottha eriyari ya muloko wa oYixrayeli. 
Ezekiel12:25 Vaheera Miyo Yave, kinimuuluma yakhalaru kintthunaaka ni ohilekenleene, eyo enookwanihereya. Ii! Muloko woovaanya, mmahukunimwaya kinookwanihera sootheene kineeraaka kihime, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.’ ”" 
Ezekiel12:26 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo moota ola: 
Ezekiel12:27 “Mwaana a mutthu, muloko wa oYixrayeli oneera ha: ‘Moonelo owo onoonaawe oniweereye muhoolommo, ni owo onthalihera otthuna wa Muluku mwaha wa sa muhooloxa.’" 
Ezekiel12:28 Vano mwaaleelase weera Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: ‘Khaawoworu maswaaka eniipisetho weereya; sootheene kineeraaka kihime, sinookwanihereya, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.’ ”" 
Ezekiel13:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel13:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, mwaathaliherele otthuna wa Muluku maprofeeti a oYixrayeli mwa yaawo anthalihera otthunawaya mwa Nsina na Yave vaanaano va. Mwaaleele yaawo anthaliha seiyo anuupuwelaaya: ‘Mwiiwe masu a Yave!" 
Ezekiel13:3 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Ii! Wa maprofeeti alolo antthara munepaaya ehoonaka etthu! 
Ezekiel13:4 Ii! aYixrayeli, maprofeetaanyu ari ntoko akhwatte eriyari ya mmilepeni." 
Ezekiel13:5 Nyuwosa khamurongwe ottiya mitari sa exiri wa muloko wa oYixrayeli weera eyo epwaherere yoolipeene mukhottoni vanihukuni na Yave. 
Ezekiel13:6 Nyoonelosanyu ti soowootha ni sootthomasanyu ti soolokottha. Awosa aneera: “Yave onghima,” Owo ahaaruminghe; wa soothesene angweherera weera Owo onookwanihera maswaaya." 
Ezekiel13:7 Nyoonelo iyo murinaanyu ti soowootha ni itthu muntthomaanyu ti soolokottha. Muneera “Yave onghima,” Miyo kihooleenleni!" 
Ezekiel13:8 Tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: Niwoko na maswaanyu oolokottha ni nyoonelosanyu soowootha, koowiittasani, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel13:9 Ntatanaka nnimwaawanano maprofeeti arino nyoonelo soolokottha ehimaka sootthoma soowootha. Awosa kheekhalela mpatta wa muthukumano wa mulokwaaka, naari khayaalikeleliwa munamalepelani a oYixrayeli, hata kheevolowa mulaponi mwa oYixrayeli. Hiiho, nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel13:10 Eyo eniyeereele niwoko anghapuxa mulokwaaka yeerelaka: “Murettele,” ohikhanle murettele, ni yaatekaka exiri yoohilipa, anttikitthela ekaali*." 
Ezekiel13:11 Tivawo, ngweerele yaale anttikitthela ekaali* weera exiri enoomora! Enimoorwa epula etokotoko, ni kinoorupiha epula ya maralala, yoopeke epheyo yoowuupa." 
Ezekiel13:12 Exiri ekurumungweene, muloko onimookohani: “Eri woowi exiri mwaattikitthenlaanyu ekaali*?”" 
Ezekiel13:13 Tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: ‘musaranimwaka kinoorumiha woopa epheyo yoowuupaxa, ni moonyoonyiwanimwaka epula ya maralala ni epula etokotoko enoorupaxa, ephwateke." 
Ezekiel13:14 Kinookurumula exiri muttikitthenlaanyu ni kinoophwata mpaka wooneya mathipelowaaya. Eyo yaamoraka, nyuwosatho munoophwateliwa vamoha, ni munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel13:15 Hiiho kinookurunuxela isarasaka exiri ni wa yaale yaattikitthenle. Kinooweerelasani: “Exiri yoolakaseya, vamoha ni yaale yaattikitthenle –" 
Ezekiel13:16 maprofeeti awosa a oYixrayeli yaamuthalihenre otthuna wa Muluku moota woowootha Yerusaleemu ni yaarino nyoonelo sa murettele wa yeeyo ohikanle murettele, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.” ’" 
Ezekiel13:17 Vano mwaana a mutthu, ngwuulumele anamwane asithiyana a mulokwaanyu anthalihera soowuupuwelasaya mwa Nsina na Yave. Mwaathalihere yaawosa otthuna wa Muluku," 
Ezekiel13:18 ni mweere: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Ii! Wa asithiyana anttottha mapaatiri ookhwiri oowara mmoononi ni ampaka soowiikhuneela owiitho soorakamaxa weera mpharihe muloko. Munuupuwela weera munoophariha munraakhoni mulokwaaka nyuwosa mwiiruuhelaka muneenaanyu? 
Ezekiel13:19 Nyuwosa mookihiirela eriyari ya mulokwaaka mwaakakhanyihaka ni esevada* vakhaani ni inyenyeeri sa epaawu. Woolokottha mulokwaaka oniiwa soowootha, nyuwosa moowiiva yaale yahaaphwanenle okhwa, munawuurela yaale yahaaphwanenle okumi." 
Ezekiel13:20 Tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: Kiniittanano mapaatiraanyu a ekhwiri mwa yaawo mumpharihaanyuno muloko ntoko ipalame, ni kinoopasa munyoononimwanyu; kinootapuxa muloko mumpharihaanyu ntoko ipalame." 
Ezekiel13:21 Kinimwaahula soowiikhuneelasanyu owiitho kitapuxeke mulokwaaka mmatatanimwanyu, ni owo khoolamuliwatho ni ikurusanyu. Hiiho, nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel13:22 Nyuwosa moompororiha oororomeleya ni soowoothasanyu, Miyo kihitthunaka waathananiha, ni mohaalipihera atakhali weera ehihiye iphirosaya soonanara, yoopolaka hiiho okumaaya." 
Ezekiel13:23 Tivawo nyuwosa khamukhalanotho nyoonelo soolokottha ni khamurwatho mweettela sa ehako. Kinootapuxa mulokwaaka mmatatanimwanyu. Hiiho, nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.’”" 
Ezekiel14:1 Asitokweene akina akina a oYixrayeli yaahoorwa okilaathi ohoolowaka. 
Ezekiel14:2 Vano Yave aakeerela: 
Ezekiel14:3 “Mwaana a mutthu, atthu ala aheemexa miluku mmirimanimwaya, yiikaatheraka sookwattula sootakhala vamaithoniwaya xaxaxa. Heeni kintthuneyaaka waatthunihera okaasa?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Vano, muulume ni yaawo ni mwaaleele: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Akhalaru muYixrayeli aneemexe miluku sikina vamurimanivawe, aniikaathi sookwattula sootakhala vamaithoniwawe xaxaxa, ni vahoolowaya anaarowe omukoherera mprofeeti, Miyo Yave, Yoomeene kinoomwaakhula moota omphwanelaaya ni olapawawe miluku." 
Ezekiel14:5 Nkipakele yeeyo weera kiwinetho murima wa muloko wa aYixrayeli mwa yoowo okihiyale okaakakhanyihaka ni miluku sikina.’ 
Ezekiel14:6 Tivawo, mweerele muloko wa oYixrayeli Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: ‘Murukunxe murima! Muhiye milukusanyu ni mulape soopakasanyu soothaneya sootheene!" 
Ezekiel14:7 Akhalaru muYixrayeli hoye hoye namarwa onkhala oYixrayeli aniimwalanyihe ni Miyo, aneemexe miluku sikina vamurimanivawe, aniikaathi sookwattula sootakhali vamaithoniwawe xaxaxa, ni vahoolowaya anaarowe omukoherera mprofeeti, Miyo Yave Yoomeene kinoomwaakhula." 
Ezekiel14:8 Kinoothatuwa Mwiittanaawe mulopwaneene yoowo ni kinoomukhaliha ethoonyero ni yootthebwano. Miyo kinoommalamaliha eriyari ya mulokwaaka. Hiiho, nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel14:9 Vano mprofeeti alokottheya, anapacera othalihera itthu, ti Miyo Yave, kimulokontthe mprofeeteene yoowo, ni kinoomutheteela ntata kimphwateke ni kimvenxeke eriyari ya mulokwaaka aYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel14:10 Ooweeli awo – mprofeeti ni yoowo anaamukoherere – anookhalano nthowa nimoharu ni anoottaruxiwa. 
Ezekiel14:11 Vano eniyeereele yeeyo weera muloko wa oYixrayeli ohikihiyetho, hata ohiivalihetho ni sootthekasaya sootheene. Awosa anookhala mulokwaaka, ni Miyo kinookhala Mulukwaaya, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.’ ”" 
Ezekiel14:12 Yave aahuuluma ni Miyo akeerelaka: 
Ezekiel14:13 “Mwaana a mutthu, muloko mmoha wakitthekela niwoko na ohiroromeleya, katheteela ntatanaka weera kimalihe yoocaaya ni karuuhela etala ni kaamalamaliha atthwaaya ni axinamaaya –" 
Ezekiel14:14 naari Nowe, Daniyeli ni Yobi, ereene mpatta wa muloko owo, yaangwera wiitapuxa asineenaaya paahi ngwookoleleyanimwaya, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel14:15 Hoye hoye Miyo kaarumihela axinama a ntuphini mulaponi mmo ni awosa yahiyasa ehiyanre, ni eyo yathatuwa yoothaamiwa moota wooweera khaawo anaaviremo, awoovaka axinama," 
Ezekiel14:16 kinlipela mwa okumaaka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, naari asilopwana araru ala ereene mwemmo, awosa khayaawera waatapuxa anamwanaaya asilopwana hoye hoye asithiyana. Yaamwiitapuxa paahi asineenaaya, mene elapo yaamphwatiwa." 
Ezekiel14:17 Hoye hoye Miyo karuuhela ekatana elapo eyo, kineera: ‘Ekatana eviravire elapo yootheene ela,’ ni Miyo kaamalamalihamo amakaaya ni axinama," 
Ezekiel14:18 kinlipela mwa okumaaka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, naari asilopwana araru ale ereene mwemmo, awosa khayaawera waatapuxa anamwanaaya asilopwana hoye hoye asithiyana. Yaamwiitapuxa paahi asineenaaya." 
Ezekiel14:19 Hoye hoye Miyo karumihela nihooxo elapo eyo, kinayeeheramo isarasaka, kiyeehaka ephome ni kaamalamalihaka amakaaya ni axinamaaya," 
Ezekiel14:20 kinlipela mwa okumaaka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, naari Nowe, Daniyeli ni Yobi ereenemo, awosa khayaawera waatapuxa anamwanaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana. Moororomeleyanimwaya yaamwiitapuxa asineenaaya paahi." 
Ezekiel14:21 Vano Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Onuutepaxe kaarumihelaka oYerusaleemu mattaruxowaaka oowoopiha maxexe ala: Ekatana, etala, axinama a ntuphini ni nihooxo, weera kaamalamaliheremo amakaaya ni axinamaaya!" 
Ezekiel14:22 Wa soothesene anoohalahala akina akina – anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana eniivenxiwemo. Awosa eniirwe wa nyuwosa ni moonaka mweettelowaaya ni makhalelowaaya, munoopepeseya mwaha wa erisa kiruuhenlaaka oYerusaleemu – khula erisa kiruuhenlaaka yeeyo." 
Ezekiel14:23 Nyuwosa munoopepeseya moonaka mweettelowaaya ni makhalelowaaya, niwoko munoosuwela weera nkaasiye opakawo sootheene iye, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.”" 
Ezekiel15:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel15:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, ereerenle moota heeni evideira* nalikanxera nyiri sikina sa ntuphini?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Mwireene yoowo waatoko ovareleya muteko woopakela etthu? Aakhala angwera opakela evideira* etthu yoothomeela itthu? 
Ezekiel15:4 Ovonyeriweene vayikho ntoko yoopattihera ni onahisiwa mmakoteloni oomeeli onalalamo eriyariru, vano onoovareleya muteko?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Waahivareleiyeru muteko waaraaya mpurukuma, wootepaxa waza ni walala." 
Ezekiel15:6 Tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: Mooteene yoowo kilakelenlaaka evideira* eriyari ya nyiri sa ntuphini weera okhale ikhuuni paahi, kinimwaapakelatho hiiho amaki a oYerusaleemu." 
Ezekiel15:7 Kinoothatuwa Mwiittanaaya. Arookhumaru mmooroni, animooza. Kitathungweene Mwiittanaaya, nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel15:8 Kinoohiya elapo yoothaamiweene niwoko awosa khaaroromeleiye, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.”" 
Ezekiel16:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo eeraka ha: 
Ezekiel16:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, muulumele oYerusaleemu mwaha wa soopakasaya soothanyeya," 
Ezekiel16:3 ni muleele: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneerela ha oYerusaleemu: Mukhumelenlaanyu ni muyareliwaanyu yaari elapo ya oKanaani. Atithinyu yaari ngwAmori, ni amayinyu yaari muHiti." 
Ezekiel16:4 Oyariwawanyu weereiye ha: nihuku mwaayariwaanyu, etekhwaanyu khayaathikiliwe, naari khamwaarapihiwe weera mureere, hata khamwaattikittheliwe maakha hoye hoye khamwaahuruweliwe ekuwo." 
Ezekiel16:5 Khaawo yoomorenleni ikharari hata naari mano ehaaya weera yoopakeleni yakhalaru etthu ya seiya. Ohiyanawaya, nyuwo mwaavonyeriwa okerekhere, mmatta, niwoko nihuku mwaayariwaanyu, mwaanyoosiwa." 
Ezekiel16:6 Vano, kaaviraaka mukhivirumwanyu, kaawoonani mpirituwasaka ephome teri teri, ni nyuwo mwaaluwelaanyu mureene ephomeru, Miyo kaaweerelani: “Mukhale ni okumi!”" 
Ezekiel16:7 Miyo kaawunnuwihani ntoko mwiri woowaaliwa mmatta. Nyuwo mwaahunnuwa, munapomba, munathatuwa ooreeraxa a axiveeve. Mapelaanyu yaakhuma, ni mayihaanyu yaahunnuwa, vaheera nyuwo mwaari tiriya." 
Ezekiel16:8 Evinreene ehuhu ekina, kiviravirakarutho mukhivirumwanyu, kaahoowehani, kinoona weera mohunnuwa mungweraanyu osivela, ni kaawaatalelani malayaaka, kinakuttelela etiriyaanyu. Kaalipela, kinakhaliha wiiraana ni nyuwo, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, ni nyuwo moothatuwa awaka." 
Ezekiel16:9 Miyo kohoorapihani, kaacapa ephomaanyu, kinawunkhelihani makhura." 
Ezekiel16:10 Kohoowarihani mukaandyo wooxoriwa ni ikwakwaatta sa exapala. Miyo kohoowarihani eliinyu* yootteettheya kinookuttelelani ni ikuwo soorikaxa. 
Ezekiel16:11 Kohoophwanelihani ni axiveeve; kohoowarihani ipangiiri mmoononimwanyu, ni mukuhu muxikomwanyu;" 
Ezekiel16:12 kohoovahani ecipini, axiveeve ni ecireemba yooreeraxa." 
Ezekiel16:13 Hiiho, nyuwo moophwanelihiwa ni eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha*; yoowaraanyu yaari ya eliinyu* yootteettheya ni ekuwo yoorikaxa yooxoriwa. Yoocaanyu yaari ya ephepa yooreerela, oravo ni makhura a sooliveira*. Nyuwo mwaari ooreeraxa muthatuwaka pwiyamwene." 
Ezekiel16:14 Epilaanyu yoomwareela mmilokoni mwaha wa ophwaneliwawanyu, niwoko ovuwa koovanghaakani wookwanihera ophwaneliwawanyu,’ onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel16:15 ‘Vaheera nyuwo muroromenle ophwaneliwawanyu ni epilaanyu, muniikhaliha puuta. Mohaavaha sooreelasanyu yaawo avinre mukhwipimwanyu, ni ophwaneliwawanyu woothatuwa wawayasa." 
Ezekiel16:16 Nyuwo moovarela muteko ikuwosanyu sikina sikina weera mulapeno altaari* a miluku vanttumuxani, weiwo mwaapwaherenraanyu opuutaanyu. Khawaatthuneyaru weereya itthu ntoko iya – hata vakhaani!" 
Ezekiel16:17 Nyuwo mohaakuxa axiveeve ooreeraxa oopakiwa ni eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha* koovanghaakani, muniipakela nyuwo miluku mwa ekhalelo ya mulopwana ni mooraruwano." 
Ezekiel16:18 Nyuwo moowarihatho soowarasanyu sooxoriwa, munaveleelela makhuuraaka ni erubanaaka." 
Ezekiel16:19 Hiihotho yoocaakeene koovanghaakani – ephepa yooreerela, makhura a sooliveira* ni oravo – nyuwo mooveleelela sootheene vamoha ni erubani* yoowunkhelaxa ohoolowaya. Ti yeeyo yeereiye, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel16:20 Vano nyuwo mohaakuxatho anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana mwaakiyarenlaanyu, munaaveleela ntoko sooca wa miluku sikina. Opuutaanyu khawookwanneni?" 
Ezekiel16:21 Nyuwo moowiiva anamwanaaka munaapakela yooveleelela miluku sikina! 
Ezekiel16:22 Mwa ipakelosanyu sootheene soothanyeya, ni oraruwawanyu, nyuwo khamuupuwelenle mmahukuni a oyariwawanyu, mwaaraanyu tiriya, muluwelaka ephome teri teri." 
Ezekiel16:23 Ii! Ii! Wa nyuwo, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene. Ohiya soonanarasanyu sikina sootheene," 
Ezekiel16:24 nyuwo mohiitekela altaari* vanttumuxani ni khula nipuwa ninkhalaxiwa mohiipakela mapuro oolapa oorakama. 
Ezekiel16:25 Opacenraayaru khula musewe nyuwo mohiitekela mapurowaanyu oolapa oorakama, muveihaka ophwaneliwawanyu ni mwaasaka oveleela erutthwaanyu wa khula omviraru." 
Ezekiel16:26 Nyuwo mooraruwa ni awExipitu, aximwaattamanaanyu oohaawelaxa, ni munaandyeerera opuutaanyu weera mutannye isarasaka." 
Ezekiel16:27 Vano koowookolelani moonowaaka ni koovukula elapwaanyu. Koowinnyererani mwa soohaawelaxa sa amwiittanaanyu, anamwanaaya asithiyana a aFilisti mwa yaawo yaatikhinaxa mwaha wa okumaanyu wa opuuta." 
Ezekiel16:28 Nyuwo mooraruwatho ni awAsiriya, niwoko mwaari oohikwaneya ni naari eviraleene yeeyo, khamukwaneiye." 
Ezekiel16:29 Vahoolowaya mooraruwano aBabiloniya, muloko ole wa ananakoso. Wa soothesene, awosatho khayookwaningheni." 
Ezekiel16:30 Murimaanyu woovoreyeya, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, nyuwo mpakaka itthu sootheene iya, mweettaka ntoko puuta oohiyuleya!" 
Ezekiel16:31 Mwaatekaanyu altaaraanyu a miluku wa khula nttuumba ni mwaapakaanyu mapurowaanyu oolapa oorakama wa khula nipuwa ninkhalaxiwa, mwaatepaxa opuuta mweenre muhinyesereraka oliviwa." 
Ezekiel16:32 Nyuwo muthiyana ooraruwa! Munaakupaleela anamarwa omuhiya iyinyu! 
Ezekiel16:33 Khula puuta onooliviwa, vaheera nyuwo mwaavaha itthu yaawo munaakonanaanyu ootheene, mwaavahaka soovaha weera ewe wa nyuwo mmapuroni moothemwene waakhela wa nyuwo munkhaleloni wa opuuta." 
Ezekiel16:34 Mooraruwanimwanyu omvirikana ni yeeyo eneereya ni asithiyana akina; khaawo ongwaasani nyuwo. Nyuwo moovirikana, niwoko mummwaasa opuheriwa." 
Ezekiel16:35 Tivawo, nyuwo puuta, mwiiwe masu a Yave!" 
Ezekiel16:36 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Mweenre munanariha mihakhusanyu mooniheraka etiriyaanyu ni yaawo munaakonanaanyu, ni niwoko na milukusanyu soothanyeya sootheene, ni niwoko na owiivelawanyu anamwaniinyu milukusanyu," 
Ezekiel16:37 mwaha wa yeeyo, kinimwaathukumanyiha ootheene yaawo munaakonanaanyu, yaawo nyuwo munaatthunaxaanyu – okhuma yaawo mwaasivenlaanyu mpakatho yaawo mwaathannyaanyu. Miyo kinimoothukumanyiherani mipatta sootheene, koohiyekeni tiriya ohoolowayasa, ni awosa eniyoone etiriyaanyu yootheene." 
Ezekiel16:38 Miyo kinimoothorihelani nttaruxo alakeleliwaaya asithiyana anraruwa ni angyeeha ephome; kinoowiinlelelani ikukuttula sa ephome ya isarasaka ni onyoonyiwa ontannyeriwa ni ehacaaka.
