Ezekiel16:39 Vahoolowaya, Miyo kinoowinnyererani mmatatani mwa yaawo munaasivelaanyu, ni awosa animwaakurumula altaaraanyu a miluku sikina, ephwateke mapurowaanyu oolapa oorakamela. Awosa anoowaakhani soowarasanyu yaakuxeke axiveevaanyu ooreeraxa ni yoohiyekeni tiriya." 
Ezekiel16:40 Eniyooruuhelaseni nakupa anoovonyeeni maluku oonyaanyekeni ni ikatana. 
Ezekiel16:41 Awosa anoohisa impasanyu, yoottaruxekeni vamaithoni wa asithiyana ancipale. Kinoomaliha opuutaanyu ni nyuwo khamwaalivarutho yaawo nyuwo munaakonanaanyu." 
Ezekiel16:42 Hiiho wookhalelaniwaka isara onookhurunuwa ni onyoonyiwawaka woosareya ehaace onimoohiyani; kinoomaaleleya ni nkinnyoonyiwatho. 
Ezekiel16:43 Mweenre muhuupuwelela mahuku a emiravowaanyu mutannyaka isarasaka ni itthu sootheene iya, woohihovela kinoomoroxela mmurumwanyu yeeyo mpankaanyu, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene. Nyuwo mohaandyeerera ohiroromeleya ni soopakasanyu sikina sootheene iya." 
Ezekiel16:44 Yaawo onaasivela wuuluma maxiripulo, eniiwuulumeleni nxiripulo nna: “Mwaana muthiyana onaalatta amayawe!”" 
Ezekiel16:45 Vekhaikhai nyuwo ti mwaana muthiyana xaxaxa a amayinyu, mwa yaawo yaathannye aiyaya ni anamwanaaya; ni nyuwo ti munna xaxaxa a axunninyu, mwa yaawo yaathannye asiiyaya ni anamwanaaya. Amayinyu yaari muHiti ni atithinyu yaari ngwAmori." 
Ezekiel16:46 Munninyu mutokweene aakhala mpaattaanyu wa ottuttuwani aari Samariya aakhala vamoha ni anamwanaawe asithiyana; ni munninyu mukhaani aakhala mpattaanyu wa ohitto vamoha ni anamwanaawe asithiyana aari Sodoma. 
Ezekiel16:47 Nyuwo khamweettiye paahi mphironimwaya mutakihaka soopakasaya soohiira, menetho mphironimwanyu moothemwene wowaakuveya mootepaxa otakhala waapwaha yaawo." 
Ezekiel16:48 Kinlipela mwa okumaaka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, munninyu Sodoma vamoha ni anamwanaawe asithiyana khaanapake yeeyo mpankaanyu ni anamwaniinyu asithiyana." 
Ezekiel16:49 Vano, yoottheka ya munninyu Sodoma yaari ti ela: Owo ni anamwanaawe asithiyana yaari oowiixoona, yaakhalano yooca yincipale ni khayaatthukuruwa; khayaakhavihera oohaawa ni oothoiwa." 
Ezekiel16:50 Yaari oowiixoona, enapaka soohiira ohoolowaka. Tivawo Miyo kaavenxalaaka, ntoko moonnaanyu." 
Ezekiel16:51 Samariya khatthenke ntoko nyuwo. Nyuwo moottheka moota woohiira waapwaha yaawosa, ni nyuwo moopakiha weera axunninyu ekhale ntoko oororomeleya ni soohiira sootheene mpankaanyu." 
Ezekiel16:52 Mvilele wuulihiheyawanyu muru, niwoko nyuwo mumpakiha weera axunninyu ekhale ntoko ooreerela opwaha yaaraaya. Seenre sootthekasanyu sithanyeyaxa opwaha sawaya, awosa ankhala ntoko oororomeleyaxa woopwahani nyuwo. Vano muulihiheye muru ni mvilele oyeviheyawanyu mweenre nyuwo mpakiha weera axunninyu ekhale ntoko oororomeleya opwaha yaaraaya." 
Ezekiel16:53 Wa soothesene, Miyo kinooreherera oreereliwa wa Sodoma ni wa anamwanaawe asithiyana, ni wa Samariya vamoha ni anamwanaawe asithiyana nitho oreereliwawanyu vamoha ni yaawosa," 
Ezekiel16:54 weera nyuwo muhaawe wuulihiheyawanyu muru ni muyeviheye wa sootheene nyuwo mpankaanyu ngwaapepesanimwanyu. 
Ezekiel16:55 Axunninyu – Sodoma ni anamwanaawe asithiyana, ni Samariya vamoha ni anamwanaawe asithiyana, anoohokoleela okhala ntoko yaaraaya; ni nyuwotho vamoha ni anamwaniinyu asithiyana, munoohokoleela okhala ntoko mwaaraanyu." 
Ezekiel16:56 Mweehuhunimwanyu yoowiikuxerera nyuwo mwaamunyoosa munninyu Sodoma – 
Ezekiel16:57 ohinaaye wooniheriwa otakhalawanyu. Vaheera vano nyuwo muri mutheelelo wa anamwane asithiyana a Edomi ni amwaattamanaaya ootheene, ni anamwane asithiyana a aFilisti – ootheene yaawo ankhala mukhwipimwanyu anoonyoosani." 
Ezekiel16:58 Munoohaawa niwoko na otakhalawanyu ni ipakelosanyu soohiira, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.’ ”" 
Ezekiel16:59 “ ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Miyo kinimoopakelani yeeyo mphwanenlaanyu, niwoko nyuwo moonyoosa nlipelonaka woonanarihani wiiraana." 
Ezekiel16:60 Wa soothesene, Miyo kinimuupuwelela wiiraanawaka ni nyuwo kaapankaaka mmahukuni a emiravowaanyu, ni kinimookhaliheranitho wiiraana woohimala." 
Ezekiel16:61 Vano nyuwo munimuupuwelela iphirosanyu ni munimuulihiheya muru mwaawaakhelaka axunninyu mutokweene ni mukhaani. Kinimoovahasani yaawosa ntoko anamwaniinyu asithiyana, mene khoohiyono niwoko na owiiraanananiwaka." 
Ezekiel16:62 Tivawo kineeraaka kikhalihe wiiraana ni nyuwo, ni nyuwo munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel16:63 Vano Miyo kaarehereraka wiiraana mwaha wa nyuwo niwoko na sootheene mpankaanyu, nyuwo munimuupuwelela ni munimuulihiheya muru ni khamuhularutho eyano niwoko na oyeviheyawanyu, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.’”" 
Ezekiel17:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo moota ola: 
Ezekiel17:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, muulume ni niphwanahwaniho ni muthalihere yoolikanyiha muloko wa oYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel17:3 Mwaaleelase: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Xaattula makula ni mapuphaawe ooweraxa, mapururu oorakama ni a malepa oohiyanahiyana aahoorwa oLebanoni. Aaheemela osuluxa wa esedari*," 
Ezekiel17:4 anavasula ephuwela ya osulu wa wiikhaani wa esidari*, anarongha mulaponi mwa ananakoso, ophatteiyaawewo musidadeni mwa ananakoso." 
Ezekiel17:5 Aakuxatho inuku vakhaani sa mulaponimwanyu, anaala vathaadyirani. Owo aaphatteya ntoko mwiri mutokweene muxerexere wa maahi mancipale," 
Ezekiel17:6 ni iyo saaphuwa, sinakhala evideira* yookhuveya ni yoopombaxa. Iphandisaya, saakuttukutteela wa xaattula makula, mene mikwankhwaarisaya saapwaherera vathi wa evideira*. Evideira* yaahunnuwa, enasareya iphandi ni soophuwaphuwa ni makukhu." 
Ezekiel17:7 Vaheera aakhala xaattula makula mukina aarino mapupha ooweraxa ni mancipale. Mikwankhwaari sa evideira* saakhuruwelela mpatta wa xaattula makula anaaveeli owo, okhuma yaaphatteiwalaayawo, ni iphandisaya saamukuttukutteela yoowo, saasaka maahi." 
Ezekiel17:8 Vano, eyo yaaphatteiwale vataadyirani, muxerexere wa maahi mancipale, yeeraaya ephuwe iphandi, yiime ni ethatuwe evideira* yooreerelaxa.’" 
Ezekiel17:9 Mwaaleelase: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Weeraka eyo enimunnuwa nnenesene? Hoye! EnoooyeEnoopheliwa ni soowiimasaya sinoorukuliwa weera eyo yuume. Sootheene sineera siphuwemo, sinimuuma. Khasitthuneyaru nyoono sookhomaala hata atthu ancipale weera epheliwe." 
Ezekiel17:10 Naari epheliwaka, epatteiwaka nipuro nikina, weeraka enimunnuwa nnenesene? Hoye! Eniyuume woomalela yaaphwanyiwaka ni epheyo ya mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, enyaalaka ni elakaseyaka vanipuroni yaaphatteiwalaayawo.’”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Vahoolowaya Yave aahuuluma ni miyo eeraka: 
Ezekiel17:12 “Mweerele muloko woovaanya owo: ‘Nyuwo khamusuwenle etaphulelo ya itthu iya?’ Mwaaleelasetho ha: ‘Mwene a oBabiloniya aarowa oYerusaleemu anamurowano mwene a weiwo ni maneethaayeene, anaahokoloxera oBabiloniya vamoha ni yoowo." 
Ezekiel17:13 Aamukuxa mutthu a emusi ya emwene anamwiiraanano ni anamulipeliha. Aahaakuxatho aweri a mulaponi," 
Ezekiel17:14 weera ahele vathi omwene, ohiweraka opwaherera. Onoowera okhala paahi mookwaniherani wiiraanawaya ni oBabiloniya." 
Ezekiel17:15 Vaheera mwene aamvaanya yoowo, anarumihela mutthenga wExipitu, avekelaka ikavalu* ni anakhotto ancipale. Weeraka owo sinoomweettela nnene? Yoowo onuupuwela mooteene yoola onootthawa? Owo onoonanariha wiiraana oopoweke nttaruxo?" 
Ezekiel17:16 Kinlipela mwa okumaaka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, owo anaakhwele oBabiloniya, mulaponi mwa mwene omukhalinghe namalamula, mwa yoowo onyoosale nlipelo ananarihaka wiiraana." 
Ezekiel17:17 Farawu* ni anakhottwaawe oowera vamoha ni nakupaawe kheekhalaru ekhaviherowaawe mukhottoni, saatekiwaka ikaaro sookurumulela exiri ni saapakiwaka sooricano weera siwiive atthu ancipale." 
Ezekiel17:18 Owo aanyoosa nlipelo, ananarihaka wiiraana. Eenre aroromeliha, anapaka itthu sootheene iya, khoopowaru." 
Ezekiel17:19 Tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: Kinlipela mwa okumaaka weera kinoomoroxela mmurumwawe nlipelonaka onyoosalaawe ni wiiraanawaka owo onanarihalaawe. 
Ezekiel17:20 Kinoomureya ntthavinaka, ni owo onoopharihiwa munraakhonimwaka. Miyo kinoomurongha oBabiloniya kamuttaruxelekewo, niwoko kharoromeleiye wa Miyo." 
Ezekiel17:21 Anakhottwaawe ootheene yaatthawaka, animwiiviwa ni ekatana, ni yaawo eniihalahale anoomwaraxeliwa mulaponi moothemwene. Hiiho nyuwo munoosuwela weera ti Miyo Yave kuulumme." 
Ezekiel17:22 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Yoomeene kinoovasula ephuwela ya osulu wa wiikhaani wa esidari* kiphatteyeke; kinoovasula ephandi ya iphandisaya soorakamaxa kiphatteyeke vamwaako woorakamaxa ni mutokotoko. 
Ezekiel17:23 Kinoophatteya mmanyaakoni soorakamela sa oYixrayeli; owo onookhalano iphandi wiimeke ni othatuweke esidari* yooreerelaxa. Ikhalelo sa ipalame sootheene nsipake ipuurusaya mwemmo; sinoophwanyamo munttuusi. 
Ezekiel17:24 Nyiri sootheene sa ntuphini sinoosuwela weera Miyo, Yave, kimmoroxa mwiri woorakama, kinunnuwiha mwiri wookhuveya. Miyo kinuumiha mwiri mukithi, kinattuviha mwiri woowuuma. Miyo Yave kohuuluma ni kinoopaka yeeyo.’”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo eeraka: 
Ezekiel18:2 “Muntthuna ohimani muulumelaka oYixrayeli nxiripulo nna: ‘Asitiithi aakhuura iwuuva* soonyuunya, anamwane enaasosomera maino’?" 
Ezekiel18:3 Kinlipela mwa okumaaka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, nyuwosa khamuulumelatho nxiripulo nna oYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel18:4 Vano akumi ootheene ti awaka, okhuma tiithi mpaka mwaana – ooweeli ti awaka. Yoowo anaattheke ti aneera akhwe." 
Ezekiel18:5 Noone ha: areene oororomeleya ompaka yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai ni yoowookoleleya. 
Ezekiel18:6 Owo khanca mmapuroni oolapa miluku sikina mmanyaakoni ni khampwattharu miluku sa muloko wa oYixrayeli. Owo khanimvaliha mwaara a mukhwaawe ni khanimukonano muthiyana mweehuhuni ya mpingwaawe. 
Ezekiel18:7 Owo khanimuhasularu mutthu, mene onghokoloxera yeeyo eemexenraawe mookoongoranimwawe. Khaniiya, mene onaavaha yooca oovoliwa aakawelaka soowara oothaaleliwa." 
Ezekiel18:8 Owo khankoongoriha eerelaka owina musurukhu hata khankokoca eerelaka iphura. Owo onghuluxa ntatanawe weera nihipake soonanara, athorihaka ni ekhaikhai eriyari ya atthu eeli." 
Ezekiel18:9 Owo oneettela ikanosaka, iiwelelaka oororomeleyeene malamulowaaka. Mutthu owo ti oororomeleya; vekhaikhai, owo anaakhale ni okumi,’ onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel18:10 Noonetho ha: owo areeneno mwaana oopuhera, ongyeeha ephome hoye hoye ompaka yakhalaru etthu ya seiya," 
Ezekiel18:11 atithawe ahitonkwaaya opaka: Onkhalela mpatta mfestani ya sooveleela mmapuroni oolapa miluku sikina mmanyaakoni, anamukonano mwaara a mukhwaawe." 
Ezekiel18:12 Owo onaahasula oohaawa ni oothoiwa. Onimwiiya. Khanghokoloxa aakuxalaawe ntoko mweemexero. Onlapa miluku sikina ni ompaka itthu soothanyeya. 
Ezekiel18:13 Onkoongoriha eerelaka owina musurukhu ni onkokoca iphura. Mutthweene yoowo akhaleke ni okumi? Hoye! Mwa ipakelosawe sootheene iya soothanyeya, vekhaikhai owo onimwiiviwa, ni nthowa na okhwawawe ti nawawe." 
Ezekiel18:14 Vaheera, noonetho ha: mulopwana anaaveeli ola areene mwaana mulopwana, onkhalela onamoona soottheka sa atithawe, mene khanaatakiha." 
Ezekiel18:15 Owo khanca mmapuroni oolapa miluku sikina mmanyaakoni ni khampwattharu miluku sa muloko wa oYixrayeli. Owo khanimvaliha mwaara a mukhwaawe. 
Ezekiel18:16 Khanimuhasularu mukina hata khannyesereriha weemexerela ekoongori. Khaniiya, mene onaavaha yooca oovoliwa, aakawelaka soowara oothaaleliwa." 
Ezekiel18:17 Owo onghuluxa ntata weera nihittheke ni khankoongoriha eerelaka owina musurukhu hata khankokoca iphura. Oniiwelela malamulowaaka ni oneettela ikanosaka. Owo khankhwela sootakhala sa atithawe; vekhaikhai, anaakhale ni okumi." 
Ezekiel18:18 Vaheera atithawe eniikhwele niwoko na yootakhalaaya xaxaxa, yeenre awo yakuxa musurukhu ngwoopopihani, emwiiyeraka mukhwaaya, enapaka yeeyo eri yoonanara eriyari ya mulokwaaya." 
Ezekiel18:19 Vano apaale munookoha: ‘Ohimpakelani mpatta wa nthowa na atithawe?’ Eenre mwaana owo apakaka yeeyo eri yoororomeleya ni yoowookoleleya ni iiwelela nnenesene ikanosaka sootheene, vekhaikhai owo anaakhale ni okumi." 
Ezekiel18:20 Yoowo anaattheke ti anaakhwe. Mwaana khakuxa nthowa na atithawe, hata tiithi khakuxa nthowa na mwanawe. Oororomeleya, onimwaakhuleliwa ngwookoleleyanimwawe, ni sootakhala sa mutakhali onookokoceriwa." 
Ezekiel18:21 Vaheera, mutakhali ahiya soottheka sootheene opankaawe, aniiwelela ikanosaka, apakaka yeeyo eri yoororomeleya, vekhaikhai anaakhale ni okumi." 
Ezekiel18:22 Khasuupuweleliwaru soottheka opankaawe. Eenre owo apaka itthu soororomeleya, anaakhale ni okumi." 
Ezekiel18:23 Weeraka kinoohakalalela okhwa wa mutakhali? onghima Yave onlamula sootheene. Ohiyanawaya, kinghakalalela woomoona ahapuwaka iphirosawe ni akhalaka ni okumi." 
Ezekiel18:24 Wa soothesene, oororomeleya ahapuwa moororomeleyanimwawe, anattheka, apakakatho itthu soothanyeya atakhali ampakaaya, onookhala ni okumi? Khasuupuweleliwaru mitekosawe soororomeleya. Owo anaakhwele ohiroromeleya ni soottheka opankaawe." 
Ezekiel18:25 Wa soothesene, nyuwosa muneera: ‘Ephiro ya Yave kheeroromeleiye.’ Ii! Muloko wa oYixrayeli, mwiiwe: Ephirowaaka ti yoororomeleya. Ti iphirosanyu siri soohiroromeleya." 
Ezekiel18:26 Oororomeleya ahiya ororomeleyawawe, anattheka, owo anaakhwele yeeyo; aani, anaakhwele yoottheka opankaawe." 
Ezekiel18:27 Vaheera, mutakhali ahiya yoonanaraawe, anapaka yeeyo eri yooreera ni yoowookoleleya, owo anoopole okumaawe." 
Ezekiel18:28 Eenre oonelela sootthekasawe sootheene opankaawe, anahiya, vekhaikhai owo anaakhale ni okumi ni khakhwa." 
Ezekiel18:29 Wa soothesene muloko wa oYixrayeli oneera weera ephiro ya Yave kheeroromeleiye. Ii! aYixrayeli, munuupuwela weera ephirowaaka kheeroromeleiye? Ti ephirowaanyu eri yoohiroromeleya." 
Ezekiel18:30 Ii! Muloko wa oYixarayeli, vanonto Miyo kinimoothorihasani, khula mutthu kimuttharihelaka mweettelowaawe, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene. Murukunxe murima! Muhiye soonanarasanyu sootheene weera yoottheka ehoomoroxeni." 
Ezekiel18:31 Mwiitapuxe mwa soonanara sootheene mpankaanyu, ni mphwanye murima munyowani ni munepa munyowani. Ii! Muloko wa oYixrayeli, mmwikhweleni?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Miyo khoonkisiveliharu okhwa wa mutthu, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene. Murukunxe murima ni mukhale ni okumi!”" 
Ezekiel19:1 “Mwiipe ecipo yoowaakhupanyera anamwane a mamwene a oYixrayeli, mweeraka:" 
Ezekiel19:2 ‘Moota wa mwatto muthiyana amayinyu yaaraya variyari wa amwatto! Owo aaciha axaanaawe, iixaatalenleene eriyari ya amwatto ooxuwunnuwa." 
Ezekiel19:3 Owo aamunnuwiha mmoha a axaanaawe mwa yoowo aathatungwe mwatto oolipa. Owo aaxuttera onyaanya yoovara ni waakhuura atthu. 
Ezekiel19:4 Miloko saahiiwa sa yoowo ni owo aavareliwa mulittinimwaya. Awosa yaamutthuka engweiyeene enamurongha wExipitu. 
Ezekiel19:5 Amayawe yoonnaaya weera owehererawaya khawaakwanihereiye ni waalakaseya, awo yaamuraati enamuthanla mukina a axaanaaya, mwa yoowo yaamukhalinghaaya mwatto oolipa." 
Ezekiel19:6 Owo aaheetteetta eriyari ya amwatto, niwoko aathatuwa mwatto oolipa. Owo aaxuttera onyaanya yoovara ni waakhuura atthu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Aaphwata moolipwamwaya, anahonona isidadesaya. Elapo ni ootheene yaakhalamo yaahoopopiheya ni otturumawawe." 
Ezekiel19:8 Vano miloko soowaattamana saangwanano. Saareya ntthavinaya weera empharihe, ni owo aapharihiwa munraakhoni yaapankaaya." 
Ezekiel19:9 Yaamuhela mukeeloni, enamungweya, enamurongha wa mwene a oBabiloniya. Yaangwalela mukaliposo weera ahitturumeletho mmanyaakoni sa oYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel19:10 Amayinyu yaari ntoko evideira* mmattamwanyu ephatteiwaleene muxerexere maahi; yanniimaxa ekuttukutteiyeene, mwaha wa maahi mancipale." 
Ezekiel19:11 Iphandisaya saari soolipa, sooreerela opakela ekopo ya mulamuli. Eyo yaahunnuwa enarakamaxa ehiyaka vathi maphuwa oowiilihana; atthu ootheene yaangwera woona orakamawaya, ni okuttukutteyawaya." 
Ezekiel19:12 Vaheera moonyoonyiwani yaapheliwa, enamoroxeliwa vathi. Epheyo ya mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa yaanyaaliha. Soowiimasaya saavuruliwa; iphandisaya soolipa saahuuma, sinalalihiwa ni mooro." 
Ezekiel19:13 Vano, ephatteiwale munikareni, mulaponi moowuumelela ni moohikhala maahi." 
Ezekiel19:14 Mooro waamwareela mphandinimwaya itokweene, onalaliha soowiimasaya. Mmwe, kheehanleru ephandi yoolipa yookwana opakela ekopo ya mulamuli.’ Ela ti ecipo yoowiikhupanyera ni ontthuneya ovarela muteko ntoko wiikhupanyera.”" 
Ezekiel20:1 Vanihukuni nanaamuloko na mweeri wanaathanu wa eyaakha yanaathannapiili ya wootthukiwani mulaponi ekina, ahooleli akina akina a oYixrayeli yaahoorwa omukoherera Yave, enakilaathisa ohoolowaka." 
Ezekiel20:2 Vano Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel20:3 “Mwaana a mutthu, muulume ni ahooleli a oYixrayeli ni mwaaleelase: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Nyuwosa murweenle okikoherera? Kinlipela mwa okumaaka weera Miyo nkoohiyani mukikohereraka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.’" 
Ezekiel20:4 Mwaana a mutthu, munimwaathoriha? Munimwaathoriha? Vano, ngwuupuxere soohiira yaapankaaya asitithaya." 
Ezekiel20:5 Vaheera, ‘Mwaaleelase weera mutokweene Yave, oneera ha: Vanihukuni kaathanlalaaka aYixrayeli, kaalipela kitheteenleene ntata ekhapira ya emusi ya Yakobe, kiniixoonihera wa yaawosa wExipitu. Kitheteiyeene ntata, Miyo kaaweerelasa: “Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu.”" 
Ezekiel20:6 Nihuku nenenenne, kaalipela wa yaawosa weera kaamwaakhumiha wExipitu kaarongheke mulaponi kaathanlenlaaka, elapo yoosareyamo mukaka ni oravo; elapo yooreeraxa opwaha ilapo sootheene." 
Ezekiel20:7 Miyo kaaweerelasa: “Mwiivenxere ootheene nyuwo icaambulo soohiira mwa seiyo saari vamaithoniwanyu, ni muhiivalihe ni miluku sa wExipitu. Miyo ti Yave, Mulukwaanyu.”" 
Ezekiel20:8 Vaheera awosa yaakivaanya ni khayaakiiwelenle; khayiivenxenre icaambulo soohiira mwa seiyo saari vamaithoniwaya, hata khayaahingye miluku sa wExipitu. Tivawo keenraaka weera kaamwaayeehera isarasaka ni kaamwaanyoonyeriwa wExipitu." 
Ezekiel20:9 Vaheera moosivelani Nsinanaka, nkaapanke hiiho. Kaasembiha ohiirihiwa Nsinanaka vamaithoni wa miloko sa eriyari ya seiyo yaakhalaayawo, ni ohoolo wa seiyo kiixooniherenlaaka wa aYixrayeli, keerelaka waakhumiha wExipitu." 
Ezekiel20:10 Tivawo Miyo kaakhuminghaaka wExipitu kinaaruuha munikareni. 
Ezekiel20:11 Miyo kaahaavaha ikanosaka kinaasuweliha malamulowaaka, niwoko yoowo aniiwelele yaawo, onookhala ni okumi mwa yaawo." 
Ezekiel20:12 Kohaavahasatho iSaabadusaka ntoko eneneero ya eriyaraahu, weera esuwele weera Miyo, Yave, kohaapakasa yaawo muloko wootteela." 
Ezekiel20:13 Orookhalaru weera yoowo aniiwelele malamulo awo anaakhale ni okumi, aYixrayeli yaakivaanya munikareni. Khayeettenle ikanosaka, mene yaakhootta malamulowaaka, ehiirihaka iSaabadusaka. Tivawo keenraaka weera kaamwaayeehera isarasaka kaaphwateleke munikareni." 
Ezekiel20:14 Vaheera, mwaha wa Nsinanaka nkaapanke seiyo kisembihaka ohiirihiwa Nsinanaka vamaithoni wa miloko mwa seiyo saawoonne, Miyo kaakhumihasaaka wExipitu." 
Ezekiel20:15 Kitheteiyeene ntata, kaalipelatho wa yaawosa weera nkaarongha mulaponi kaavanghaaka, elapo yoosareyamo mukaka ni oravo; elapo yooreeraxa opwaha ilapo sootheene," 
Ezekiel20:16 niwoko awosa aakhootta malamulowaaka, khayeettenle ikanosaka, enahiiriha iSaabadusaka, seenre mirimasaya savarexexa milukusaya." 
Ezekiel20:17 Wa soothesene kaahaawehasa mukhararini ni nkaaphwante, hata nkaamalamalinghe munikareni." 
Ezekiel20:18 Miyo kaaweerelasa anamwanaaya munikareni: “Muhittharihe mweettelo wa asitithinyu hata muhiiwelele malamulowaaya naari muhiivaliheno milukusaya. 
Ezekiel20:19 Miyo ti Yave, Mulukwaanyu; mweetteleke ikanosaka ni mwiipasoope woowiiwelela malamulowaaka." 
Ezekiel20:20 Mutteelihe iSaabadusaka, weera iyo sikhale eneneero ya eriyaraahu. Hiiho nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave, Mulukwaanyu.”" 
Ezekiel20:21 Orookhalaru weera yoowo aniiwelele malamulo awo anaakhale ni okumi, anamwanaaya yaakivaanya. Khayeettenle ikanosaka, khayiipasoompe woowiiwelela malamulowaaka, ni aahiiriha iSaabadusaka. Tivawo keenraaka weera kaamwaayeehera isarasaka ni kamwaanyoonyeriwa munikareni." 
Ezekiel20:22 Vaheera, nkaatheteiye moonowaaka ni mwaha wa Nsinanaka, kaapaka yeeyo yaatthuneya weera Nsinanaka nihihiirihiwe vamaithoni wa miloko, mwa seiyo saawoonne, Miyo kaakhumihasaaka wExipitu." 
Ezekiel20:23 Kitheteiyeene ntata, kaalipelatho wa yaawo munikareni weera kaamwaamwaraxela eriyari ya miloko ni kangwoomolela ilapo sikina," 
Ezekiel20:24 niwoko khayiiwelenle malamulowaaka, mene aakhootta ikanosaka, ni aahiiriha iSaabadusaka, ni maithwaaya yaahaawela miluku sa asitithaya." 
Ezekiel20:25 Hiiho, kaawinnyerera malamulo oorikaxa ni ikano saavalaveliha okumaaya." 
Ezekiel20:26 Kaahaahiya yiivalihakano sooveleelasaya, eyo tiiyo, omveleela khula mwaana a ntthaara, weera kaatteengulaxe ni weera awosa esuwele weera Miyo ti Yave.’" 
Ezekiel20:27 Tivawo mwaana a mutthu, muulume ni muloko wa oYixrayeli ni mweerele: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Mwa seiyetho makholowaanyu yaakilapha, ekikhoottaka." 
Ezekiel20:28 Kaaruuhaleene mulaponi mwa yeeyo kaalipenlaaka weera kaamwaavaha, yaamweera woonawene wakhalaru mwaako woorakamela hoye hoye mwiri woopombaxa, yaapakelawo sooveleelasaya, aani sooveleela saatannyale isarasaka. Yaaveleelawo erubanaaya yoowunkhelaxa ni yaapaka sooveleela soowura." 
Ezekiel20:29 Vano Miyo kaahaakohasa: Nipuro heeni nna nri vamwaako mwa weiwo munrowaanyuwo?’ ” Vano mpaka olelo va nipuro nna nniitthaniwa Bama. 
Ezekiel20:30 “Vanonto, mweerele muloko wa oYixrayeli weera Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Weeraka nyuwosa munimwiivaliha mooteene yoole yiivalinghaaya makholowaanyu? Munoohaawelaxa icaambulosanyu soohiira?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Nyuwosa mwaapakaka sooveleelasanyu – mwaaveleelaka vayikho anamaniinyu – mumpwaherera wiivaliha ni milukusanyu sootheene mpaka olelo va. Ii! Muloko wa oYixrayeli, Miyo koohiyekeni mukikohereraka? Kinlipela mwa okumaaka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, Miyo nkootthuniherani okikoherera." 
Ezekiel20:32 Nyuwosa muneera: ‘Nintthuna okhala ntoko miloko, aani, ntoko miloko sa elapo ya vathi, sinrumeela mwiri ni nluku.’ Vaheera yeeyo nyuwosa munuupuwelaanyu, kheekhumelelaru." 
Ezekiel20:33 Kinlipela mwa okumaaka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, kinimoolamulani ni ntata nooweraxa ni moono wootheteiwa ni isara sooyeehiwa." 
Ezekiel20:34 Kinimooruuhasani eriyari ya miloko koothukumanyihekeni eriyari ya ilapo mwa weiwo nyuwosa mmwaraxeliwaanyuwo ni ntata nooweraxa ni moono wootheteiwa ni isara sooyeehiwa. 
Ezekiel20:35 Kinimooruuhani munikareni na miloko, ni iwo, kinimoothorihaniwo ttunda ttunda." 
Ezekiel20:36 Kinimoothorihasani mooteene yoole kaathoringhaaka makholowaanyu munikareni na wExipitu, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel20:37 Kinoowaalikelani mwaavirasaka vathi wa ekopo ya mukukhuli, kooruuhekeni moonyesererihani mwa wiiraana." 
Ezekiel20:38 Miyo kinimoomwalanyihani ni yaawo ankirukunuwela ni ankivaanya. Naari Miyo kaavenxaka mulaponi mmankaanyu, awosa kheevolowasa mulaponi mwa oYixrayeli. Hiiho, nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel20:39 Vaheera wa nyuwosa, muloko wa oYixrayeli, Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Khula mutthu a nyuwosa arowe ni alape milukusawe! Vaheera vahoolo wa yeeyo, vekhaikhai mmwikiiwe ni khamuhiirihatho Nsinanaka nootteela ni sooveleelasanyu ni milukusanyu." 
Ezekiel20:40 Vano, vamwaakoniwaka wootteela, mwaako woorakama wa oYixrayeli, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, iwo muloko wootheene wa oYixrayeli, onuukilape mulaponi, ni iwo Miyo kinoowaakhulelawo. Wu kinimwaanyesereriha sooveleelasanyu ni soovahasanyu sooreerela, vamoha ni sooveleelasanyu sootheene sootteelihiwa." 
Ezekiel20:41 Miyo kinoowaakhulelasani ntoko erubani* yoowunkhelaxa, kookhumihasakani eriyari ya miloko ni koothukumanyihasakani eriyari ya ilapo, mwa seiyo nyuwosa mwamwaraxeliwaanyu, ni kinimwiixoonihera ootteeleene eriyaraanyusa vamaithoni wa miloko." 
Ezekiel20:42 Nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave, kooruuhasakani mulaponi mwa oYixrayeli, elapo mwa yeeyo kaalipelenlaaka kitheteiyeene ntata waavaha makholowaanyu." 
Ezekiel20:43 Wu, nyuwosa munimuupuwelela mweettelo mwaarinaanyu ni mitekosanyu sootheene mwa seiyo nyuwosa mwiivalihansaanyuno, ni munimwiixeettiha murima niwoko na soonanara sootheene mpankaanyu." 
Ezekiel20:44 Ii! Muloko wa oYixrayeli, munoosuwelatho weera Miyo ti Yave, koopwatthakani, kireerelaka Nsinanaka, ohikhanle mwa iphirosanyu soonanara ni soopakasanyu sootakhala,’ onghima Yave onlamula sootheene. ”" 
Ezekiel20:45 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel20:46 “Mwaana a mutthu, muhuluwele mpatta wa ohitto; mulaleerewo ni muthaliherele otthuna wa Muluku othako wa elapo ya oNegeba." 
Ezekiel20:47 Mweerele othako wa oNegeba: ‘Mwiiwe masu aYave. Vano Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Kihanle vakhaani woohisani. Hiiho, kinoolaliha nyirisanyu sootheene, okhuma ikithi mpaka soowuuma. Ovarela wa malumi a mooro khoocipihiwa, ni ikhove sootheene, okhuma oNegeba mpaka mpatta wa ottuttuwani onuurusuliwe ni malumi awo." 
Ezekiel20:48 Ootheene eniisuwele weera ti Miyo Yave kipattinghe ni kheecipihiwaru.’ ” 
Ezekiel20:49 Vano miyo kaaheera: “Ii! Yave onlamula sootheene! Awosa ankeerela ha: ‘Ola onthaliha maxiripulo paahi.’ ” 
Ezekiel21:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel21:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, muhuluwele oYerusaleemu, ni mulaleere Nipuro Nootteela*. Muthaliherele oYixrayeli otthuna wa Muluku," 
Ezekiel21:3 mweerelaka: ‘Yave oneera ha: Koowiittani. Kinoohulula ekatanaaka munluwoni weera kimmalamalihe okhuma oororomeleya mpaka mutakhali eriyaraanyu. 
Ezekiel21:4 Hapo kinoommalamaliha oororomeleya ni mutakhali, kinoovarela ekatanaaka weera kiwiive ootheene, okhuma oNegeba mpaka mpatta wa ottuttuwani." 
Ezekiel21:5 Hiiho, ootheene eniisuwele weera Miyo, Yave, kootholola ekatana munluwoni ni nkithokororatho.’" 
Ezekiel21:6 Tivawo, mwaana a mutthu, mpacere wiipulela! Mpacere wiipulela ohoolowayasa ni murima wooriipeene ni othananaxa." 
Ezekiel21:7 Vano, yookohakani weera muniipulelela heeni? Nyuwo mweere: ‘Mwaha wa ihaali singwa. Khula murima onuutothowe, ni ntata nootheene khanilipalipa; munepa wootheene onuukomoke, ni makutha ootheene eniithatuwe oohilipa ntoko maahi.’ Eneera ewaaka! Woohihovelaru, enimweereya, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.”" 
Ezekiel21:8 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel21:9 “Mwaana a mutthu, muthalihere otthuna wa Muluku ni mweere: ‘Yave oneera ha: Ekatana emoha, aani ekatana yoowiitha ni yoocapeya –" 
Ezekiel21:10 enoneliwe weera yiive, yoocapeya weera eceremele ntoko overinya! Weeraka nnoohakalalela ekopo ya mwanaka Yuda? Ekatana ennyoosa yakhalaru ekopo." 
Ezekiel21:11 Ekatana yoovaheriwa ocapeya ni ovareliwa; yoononiwa ni yoocapeya, yoorehereriwa weera evareliwe ni ntata na namwiiva." 
Ezekiel21:12 Mwaana a mutthu, mukhuwele ni mwiikhupanyere, niwoko ekatana eyo yohiittanano mulokwaaka; yoowiittanano asitokweene ootheene a oYixrayeli. Awosa ni mulokwaaka amvonyeriwa vakatanani. Vano mmane ekakasa." 
Ezekiel21:13 Vekhaikhai onimoorwa wootiwa murima. Vanonto, eniikhuweleleni ekopo ya Yuda, ennyoosiwa ni ekatana eyo, ekopo eyo yaahipwaherera okhalatho? onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.’" 
Ezekiel21:14 Tivawo mwaana a mutthu, muthalihere otthuna wa Muluku, ni mmane matata. Ekatana ekakatthe imaara piili – mpaka tthaarutho. Eyo ti ekatana ya noomala, aani noomala mutokweene, aakhuveelaka yaawosa mipatta sootheene." 
Ezekiel21:15 Vano, kookhaliha ekatana kimweerelaka noomala mmilakonimwaya moothemwene weera mirima sitothowe ni emoroxiwe ancipale. Ii! Eyo epakeliwe weera eceremele ntoko overinya; yoovareliwa eereliwaka noomala." 
Ezekiel21:16 Ii! Ekatana, mverunyihele mpattaanyu woolopwana ni mpattaanyu woothiyana – wakhalaru mpatta muntthunaanyu okakatthawo." 
Ezekiel21:17 Miyotho, kinimwiipa makuphi, ni isarasaka sinookhurunuwa. Miyo Yave, kohuuluma.”" 
Ezekiel21:18 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel21:19 “Mwaana a mutthu, mulepelele misewe miili eneeraaya eviremo ekatana ya mwene a oBabiloniya, soomiili sikhumaka elapo emoharu. Vano vamathakalaano mwiikaathi eneneero enthoonyera epacerero ya musewe onkela osidade." 
Ezekiel21:20 Mulepelele musewe mmoha weera ekatana engwanane Raba, elapo ya awAmoni ni okina weera engwanane Yuda ni oYerusaleemu olipihiwe." 
Ezekiel21:21 Vano mwene a oBabiloniya aneemele vamathakalaano weera apakele macitta oothanlano. Owo anaapakele macitta ni nyuupa, anaakoherere milukusawe angwehawehaka hapa." 
Ezekiel21:22 Muntatanimwawe noolopwana, anaathanleliwe Yerusaleemu, mwa weiwo aneeraawe arehererele ikaruma soottiittano ixiri, alamulele opakiwa noomala, alamule munyakunyaku wa ekhotto, iikaatheriwe ikaruma soottiittano ixiri sa esidade, epakiwe yooricano ni atekeliwe ikaaro sookurumulela ixiri sirukureenre." 
Ezekiel21:23 Vaheera amaki a oYerusaleemu eniyuupuwele weera ti macitta oowaalokottha. Awosa yaapaka wiiraana munlipeloni, vaheera mwene a oBabiloniya anawuupuxere nthowanaya ni anaakuxe ootthukiweene." 
Ezekiel21:24 Tivawo, Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: ‘Mweenre muupuxera sootakhalasanyu, mooniheraka ovaanyawanyu ni sootthekasanyu mwa sootheene mumpakaanyu, munooronghiwa wootthukiwani." 
Ezekiel21:25 Ii! Mwaana a mwene oohiira ni ootakhala a oYixrayeli, mwa yoowo niphiyenre nihukunawe ni ehuhu ya ottaruxiwawawe," 
Ezekiel21:26 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Murule eturbante* ni ecireemba. Khookhala ntoko khalayi – oowiiyeviha eniivuwihiwe ni oovuwihiwa eniiyevihiwe. 
Ezekiel21:27 Oheleya nthala! Oheleya nthala! Miyo kinooheliha nthala! Kheerehereriwa ahirwiiye yoole ophwanenle okhala muneene yeeyo; vano wa yoowo kinoomvaha.’ 
Ezekiel21:28 Vano nyuwo mwaana a mutthu, muthalihere otthuna wa Muluku, mweeraka: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha mwaha wa awAmoni ni oruwanawaya: Ekatana emoha, ekatana emoha, evareliwe ompakela noomala, yoocapeya weera enyaanye ni weera eceremele ntoko overinya!" 
Ezekiel21:29 Atakhali anthalihera nyoonelo soowootha ni sootthoma munlokottheliwaanyuno. Tivawo eneeraya ehiteliweno ekatana eyo antthuneya wiiviwa, wa yaawosa nihukunaya niphiyale, ni ehuhu ya nttaruxonaya yookhuveela." 
Ezekiel21:30 Muthokorore ekatana munluwoni. Vanipuroni mpattuxerasiwaanyuwo, mulaponi mwa makholowaanyu, Miyo kinimoothorihelanimo." 
Ezekiel21:31 Kinimooyeeherasani isarasaka, kinoowiiseelelasani onyoonyiwawaka woowuupaxa Miyo kinoowinnyererasani mmatatani mwa atthu oopuhera, mwa yaawo akhovelenle ophwata." 
Ezekiel21:32 Nyuwosa mmwikhalase yoopattihera mooro, ephomaanyu eniiyeeheriwe mulaponimwanyu, ni nyuwosa khamuupuweleliwatho, niwoko Miyo Yave, kohuuluma.’ ”" 
Ezekiel22:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo eeraka: 
Ezekiel22:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, munoothoriha? Nyuwo munoothoriha esidade ela yoosareya ephome? Vano ngwuupuxere soohiira sootheene yaapankaaya" 
Ezekiel22:3 ni mweere: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Ii! Esidade, yiiruuhenle nthorihelo wooyeeha ephome eriyaraaya ni woowiivaliha epakaka miluku," 
Ezekiel22:4 Nyuwo mohiitatuxa nanthowa mwaha wa ephome muyeehalaanyu ni woowiivalihano miluku mpankaanyu. Nyuwo moomaliha mahukwaanyu; woophiyera ommaleloni wa iyaakhasanyu. Tivawo kineeraaka koopakeeni mutheelelo wa miloko ni mutthebwelo wa ilapo sootheene. 
Ezekiel22:5 Ii! Esidade yoowuuliha muru ni yoohimaaleleya, okhuma miloko soowaattamana mpaka soorakamela sinimootthebwani!" 
Ezekiel22:6 Moone moota wa khula mwaana mulopwana a mwene a oYixrayeli ori mwa nyuwo omvarelaawe muteko ikurusawe wooyeehera ephome. 
Ezekiel22:7 Mpuwamwanyu awosa annaanyoosa atithaya ni amayaya, emuhooxaka namarwa ni emuhasulaka mukwaasuni ni naamukhweli." 
Ezekiel22:8 Nyuwo moonyoosa soovahasaka sootteela ni moohiiriha iSaabadusaka. 
Ezekiel22:9 Mpuwamwanyu aakhala anawunawu, oolikaneene oyeeha ephome; mpuwamwanyu aakhala yaawosa anca mmapuroni oolapa miluku sikina mmanyaakoni ni ampaka itthu soowuulihaxa muru." 
Ezekiel22:10 Mpuwamwanyu aakhala yaale amveiha ebeetti ya asitithaya, ni yaale ankonano asithiyana mmahukuni a mpingwaaya, awosa ereene oohitteela." 
Ezekiel22:11 Mpuwamwanyu mulopwana mmoha onimuraruwano muthiyana a mukhwaawe, mukina onimvaliha moota woowuuliha muru pwiyamwaanaawe, ni mukina onimverula murokoriye, mwaana muthiyana a atithawe xaxaxa." 
Ezekiel22:12 Mpuwamwanyu, aakhala atthu anaakhulela makhwankwa weera eyeehe ephome; nyuwo munkoongoriha mweerelaka oliviwa iphura, ophwanya ewinelo, ni mungwina moota woohiroromeleya munnyesererihaka ni mmwiiyeraka mukhwiinyu. Nyuwo mookittiwala, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel22:13 Vekhaikhai Miyo kinoomana matata mwaha wa soowina soohiroromeleya mwaaphwannyaanyu ni mwaha wa ephome muyeehalaanyu. 
Ezekiel22:14 Weeraka olipihawanyu murima onuuvilele hoye hoye matataanyu eniilipe vanihukuni kineeraaka koopakeleni yeeyo enoophwanelani? Miyo Yave, kohuuluma ni kinoopaka yeeyo." 
Ezekiel22:15 Kinoowoomolani eriyari ya miloko koomwaraxelekeni mulaponi; kinoomaliha woomalela ohitteelawanyu. 
Ezekiel22:16 Nyuwo mwaaveruliwaka vamaithoni wa miloko, munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.’”" 
Ezekiel22:17 Vahoolowaya, Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel22:18 “Mwaana a mutthu, muloko wa aYixrayeli wookithatuwela manyowa – ekobre, eyuuma ya eseeta, eyuuma yoolipa ni eyuuma yoolemela – soohiiwa vattukutthani. Muloko owo onlikana ni manyowa a eparatha*." 
Ezekiel22:19 Tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: ‘Mweenre ootheene nyuwo muthatuwa manyowa, Miyo kinimoothukumanyihani oYerusaleemu." 
Ezekiel22:20 Musaranimwaka ni moonyoonyiwanimwaka, kinimoothukumanyihasani musidadeni, koototoxekeni mooteene yoole atthu anthukumanyihaaya eparatha*, ekobre, eyuuma ya eseeta, eyuuma yoolipa ni eyuuma yoolemela vattukutthani weera etothowe evekhulaxaka vayikho." 
Ezekiel22:21 Miyo kinimoothukumanyihasani koovekhulelekeni mooro wa isarasaka, ni nyuwosa mmwitothowase mpuwamwaya." 
Ezekiel22:22 Nyuwosa mmwitothowase musidadeni mooteene yoole eparatha* entothowaaya vattukutthani, ni munoosuwela weera Miyo, Yave, kohooyeeherasani isarasaka.’ ”" 
Ezekiel22:23 Yave aahuulumatho ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel22:24 “Mwaana a mutthu, mweerele elapo ela: ‘Nyuwo ti etthaya ehitonkoru orupeliwa epula, hata nthokolapalaka vanihukuni na isara.’" 
Ezekiel22:25 Wookhalamo ovaanelela wa asitokweenaanyu, ntoko mwatto onoopa murika anyaanyaka yoovaraawe; munaanyaanya atthu, munkuxa mihakhu ni itthu sootthuneyaxa, mwaakhalihaka asithiyana ancipele asinaamukhweli." 
Ezekiel22:26 Asaserdotaanyu ampuhera Nlamulonaka ni anghiiriha itthusaka sootteela; Awosa khaanthanla eriyari ya yootteeliheriwa ni piswa; anxuttiha weera khoovirikanneru eriyari ya yootteela ni yoohitteela; khaampwatthelaru ottittimihera iSaabadusaka, moota wooweera Miyo kimveruliwa eriyaraaya." 
Ezekiel22:27 Asitokweenaaya ari mpuwamwaya anlikana ni miici sinnyaanya soovarasaya; angyeeha ephome ewiivaka atthu weera ewine musurukhu moota woohiroromeleya. 
Ezekiel22:28 Maprofeetaaya ankuttelela seiyo, elokotthaka muloko ni nyoonelo soolokottha ni sootthoma soowootha. Awosa aneera: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene onghima hiiho’ – Yave ahuulummeene." 
Ezekiel22:29 Muloko wa mulaponi annyesereriha oliviwa, wiiyaka; onaahooxa oohaawa ni othoiwa waahasulaka anamarwa, waakhoottelaka waapakela ekhaikhai." 
Ezekiel22:30 Koomwaasaasa eriyaraaya mulopwana eera arasele exiri ni eemelele mitari vamaithoniwaka, eerelaka elapo ela, weera Miyo kihiphwate, mene nkimphwannyeru." 
Ezekiel22:31 Tivawo kineeraaka kaayeeherase isarasaka ni kaalalihe ni onyoonyaxiwawaka woovarela; koottaruxelakani yoonanara opankaaya,’ onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.”" 
Ezekiel23:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo moota ola: 
Ezekiel23:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, yaakhala asithiyana eeli, yaayariwe ni maayi mmoharu." 
Ezekiel23:3 Awosa yaathatuwasa mapuuta wExipitu, evarexexaka opuuta okhuma emwalaaya. Mulaponi mmwe, ikakasasaya saatheelihasiwa ni mapelaaya a emwali yaavarakasiwa." 
Ezekiel23:4 Mutokweene iitthaniwa Ohola ni munneiye Oholiba. Awosa yaari awaka ni yaahaayarasa anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana. Vano Ohola ti Samariya, ni Oholiba ti Yerusaleemu." 
Ezekiel23:5 Ohola aavarexexa opuuta areene nlelo awaka; owo aasareya waahaawelaxa yaawo aakonanaawe – anakhotto a awAsiriya," 
Ezekiel23:6 ewanreene sooxeera, maguvernadori ni asitokweene a anakhotto, ootheene awo yaari amiravo ooreera ni anamweettiha ikavalu*." 
Ezekiel23:7 Owo aahiixinnyerera moopuutani wa ooreerela ootheene a awAsiriya, aniivalihano miluku sootheene sa khula mulopwana aamuhaawelaawe." 
Ezekiel23:8 Owo khaahiyale opuuta aapacenraawe wExipitu, mweehuhuni ya emwalaawe asilopwana yaamukonano, yaavaravarasa mapelaawe a emwali, emuyeeheraka soohaawelasaya." 
Ezekiel23:9 Tivawo kimwinnyerenraaka mmatatani mwa yaawo aakonanaawe – awAsiriya, mwa yaawo owo aahaawelaxaawe." 
Ezekiel23:10 Awosa yaamurulasa soowara, enamuhiyasa tiriya, yaahaakuxasa anamwanaawe asilopwana ni asithiyana, enamwiivasa ni ekatana. Vahoolo wa ottaruxiwawawe, epilaawe yaari yoonanaraxa eriyari ya asithiyana." 
Ezekiel23:11 Munneiye iitthaniwa Oholiba, aahoona yeeyo. Hata hiiho, moohaawelanimwawe ni moopuutani, owo aariheyaxa ompwaha munneiye." 
Ezekiel23:12 Aahaahaawelatho awAsiriya, maguvernadori ni asitokweene a anakhotto, anakhotto oowarelasa sootheene soolikana. Ootheene awo yaari amiravo oophwaneliwa ni anamweettiha ikavalu*." 
Ezekiel23:13 Kaahoona weera owotho aahiivaliha; ooweeli yaatthara ephiro emoharu. 
Ezekiel23:14 Vaheera Oholiba aatepihaxa opuutaawe. Aawoona asilopwana oocaambuliwa vaxirini, icaambulo sa aKaldeya, sicaambuliweene ni yooxeera," 
Ezekiel23:15 yaawanreene alaamba ni iturbante seera pettu pettu mmuru; ootheene yaalikana ni asitokweene a aBabiloniya yeettiha ikaaro, ooyareliwa oKaldeya." 
Ezekiel23:16 Owo awoonakaru, aahaahaawelaxa anaarumihela anamitthenga mpaka oKaldeiya." 
Ezekiel23:17 Vano aBabiloniya, yaahoorwa omwaasaasa, mpaka omukonano, ni moohaawelanimwawe, yaamvalihasa. Avalihiweene ni yaawosa, owo aasusa wa yaawosa oonyooseyeene." 
Ezekiel23:18 Vano aapwaherera ahikhuwanyeihaka oraruwawawe ni aahooniha etiriyaawe, tivawo Miyo kaasunsaaka wa yoowo oonyooseyeene, mooteene yoole kaasunsaaka wa munneiye." 
Ezekiel23:19 Wa soothesene, owo annatepaxa onyoowa, uupuwelelaka mahuku a emwalaawe aararuwaawe wExipitu." 
Ezekiel23:20 Aahaahaawelaxa yaawo aakonanaawe, mipatta sa erutthu saari ntoko sa buuru mwaaxaana, ni owelawawe waari ntoko owelana wa ikavalu*." 
Ezekiel23:21 Hiiho, Oholiba, moohaawela yoosiva ya emwalaanyu, mwa yeeyo wExipitu ekakasaanyu yaatheelihasiwa ni mapele a emwalaanyu yaavarakasiwa." 
Ezekiel23:22 Tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: Kinimwaathubera yaawo munaakonanaanyu weera yoowananeni nyuwo – yaale mwaasunsaanyu oonyooseyeene, ni kinimwaaruuha weera yoowananeni mmipattani sootheene –" 
Ezekiel23:23 aBabiloniya ni aKaldeya ootheene, atthu a oPekode, oXowa ni oKowa vamoha ni awAsiriya ootheene, amiravo ooreera, ootheene ereene maguvernadori ni asitoweene a anakhotto, asitokweene anghoolela ikaaro ni atthu oottittimiheyaxa ni ootheene ari anamweettiha ikavalu*." 
Ezekiel23:24 Awosa eniyoorweeleni ekuxaleene ikapwitthi, vamoha ni ikaaro sincipale, ni anakhotto ancipale; eniyoothataaneleni mipatta sootheene ni ixikudu* itokweene ni ikhaani vamoha ni ikapaseti. Kinoowinnyererani wa yaawosa weera yoottaruxeni, ni awosa eniyoottaruxeleni ettharaka mootaaya wa ottaruxa." 
Ezekiel23:25 Kinimooruuhelani isara sa ehacaaka, ni enyoonyasiweene, awosa anoosuwela moota woowoopakani. Anoothikila ephulaanyu ni maaruwaanyu, ni atthu eneera ehalahale animwiiviwa ni ekatana. Animwaakuxa anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana, ni yaawo eniihalahale anoolalihiwa ni mooro." 
Ezekiel23:26 Anoowaakhanitho soowarasanyu yaakuxeke axiveevaanyu ooreera. 
Ezekiel23:27 Hiiho, kinoomaliha onyoowawanyu ni opuutaanyu nyuwo mwaapacenraanyu wExipitu. Nyuwo mmuhiye oweha woohaawela itthusene seiya ni khamuupuwelelatho wExipitu." 
Ezekiel23:28 Vano Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Kihanle vakhaani owinnyererani mmatatani mwa yaale munaathanyaanyu, mwa yaale nyuwo mwaasunsaanyu oonyooseyeene." 
Ezekiel23:29 Awosa eniyoopakeleni moota woothanyeya ekuxaka sootheene nyuwo mphwannyaanyu mmutekonimwanyu. Awosa eniyoohiyeeni yoorunleeneni mukhalaka tiriya, ni wuulihiheya muru wa opuutaanyu onimoonihereya. Eyo eniyookhumeleleni niwoko na otakhalawanyu ni oveleela erutthwaanyu," 
Ezekiel23:30 niwoko nyuwo moohaawelaxa miloko ni muniivalihano milukusaya. 
Ezekiel23:31 Nyuwo mookuxera ephiro ya munninyu; mwaha wa yeeyo Miyo kinimwiikaathi ekoomixaawe mmatatanimwanyu. 
Ezekiel23:32 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Nyuwo mmwiwure ekoomixi ya munninyu, ekoomixi etokotoko ni yoowiixa; eyo enootannyera otheiwa ni otthebwiwa moota woohilikanxereya." 
Ezekiel23:33 Nyuwo onimootepelaxani ohapaliwa ni othanana, ekoomixi eyo ya ehasara ni oheleya nthala, aani ekoomixi ya munninyu Samariya." 
Ezekiel23:34 Nyuwo mmwiwure, mmiraka mpaka nttonyo nookisera; vahoolowaya, mmwipwexakase ni mmuthikile mapelaanyu. Miyo koohima, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel23:35 Vano Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Mweenre nyuwo mukittiwala Miyo, munakirera ettuli, munoohaawa niwoko na otakhalawanyu ni opuutaanyu.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Yave aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, nyuwo munoomuthoriha Ohola ni Oholiba? Vanonto, mwaawanane ni soopakasaya soohiira," 
Ezekiel23:37 niwoko awosa aararuwa ni mmatatanimwaya ori ephomeru. Aararuwano milukusaya; mpakatho ahaahisa ntoko sooveleela anamwanaaya asilopwana wa milukusaya, mwa yaawo yaakiyarenlaaya." 
Ezekiel23:38 Aakipakelatho ha: Ehuhuweene yeele, yaavaliha Nipuronaka Nootteela*, enahiiriha iSaabadusaka." 
Ezekiel23:39 Nihuku nenenenne yaaveleelasaaya anamwanaaya asilopwana wa milukusaya, awosa yaamvolowa vaNipuroniwaka Nootteela*, enahiiriha. Ti yeeyo apankaaya Mpaanimwaka." 
Ezekiel23:40 Awosa yaahaarumihasatho anamitthenga eweerelasaka asilopwana yaarweelasa ottaiwene, ni asilopwana awo ephiyakaru, nyuwo mwaarapa weera ngwaakhelele; mwaaphwaneliha maitho, munaawara axiveeve." 
Ezekiel23:41 Nyuwo mwaakilaathi vahiceni yooreeraxa, ohoolowanyu yaakhala meesa, mwa yaawo nyuwo mwiikaathiyaanyuwo erubani* ni makhura yaari awaka." 
Ezekiel23:42 Mukhwipimwawe wiiwanyeya onyakula wa atthu ancipale yahaakacamiheya – aSabeyani yaaruuhiwe onikareni vamoha ni asilopwana oohiyanahiyana, ni awosa yaangwariha ipangiiri muthiyana ole ni munneiyeenetho, ni icireemba sooreeraxa." 
Ezekiel23:43 Vanonto miyo kaahuuluma kimuhimaka yoole aaphwatingwe mooraruwani: ‘Vano mumvarele muteko woopuuta niwoko owo puuta paahi.’ 
Ezekiel23:44 Vahoolowaya alesa yaamukonano. Yaahaakonanosa asithiyana ale ootakhala – Ohola ni Oholiba mooteene yoole onkonaneliwaawe puuta. 
Ezekiel23:45 Vaheera atthu oororomeleya eniyaattaruxele yeeyo amphwanelaaya asithiyana anraruwa ni angyeeha ephome, niwoko awosa ari anamararuwa ni mmatataniwaya ori ephomeru." 
Ezekiel23:46 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Nakupa a atthu aawanane ni awosa yinnyereriwe mootteenguwani ni moohuhuliwani. 
Ezekiel23:47 Nakupa anaavonye maluku ni anaanyaanye ni ekatana; anaawiive anamwanaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana, ahiseke impasaya." 
Ezekiel23:48 Hiiho kinoomaliha otakhala wa mulaponi weera asithiyana ootheene yooperereye ni ehootakihaseni. 
Ezekiel23:49 Nyuwosa munoohaawa nttaruxo na ohaawelawanyu ni munoottaruxiwa niwoko na soottheka moolapani miluku. Hiiho nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.” 
Ezekiel24:1 Vanihukuni nanaamuloko na mweeri wanaamuloko wa eyaakha yanaathannaaxexe, Yave aahuuluma ni miyo eeraka:" 
Ezekiel24:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, mulepe nihuku nna na olelo, niwoko mwene a oBabiloniya oomurica Yerusaleemu nihuku nenenenna." 
Ezekiel24:3 Muthalihere muloko woovaanya ola niphwanaphwaniho ni mwaaleelase weera Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: ‘Mwaapeye esupuriya weera evihe; mwaapeye weera evihemo maahi. 
Ezekiel24:4 Muhelemo itthuri sa enama, itthuri sooreerela sa etakhwi ni sa khakobe. Musarihemo makhuva ooreerela;" 
Ezekiel24:5 mukuxe yooreerela ya muhuwo. Muhutte ikhuuni waathiwaya weera yiitthwe makhuva; mukaphulihe maahi ni mwaapeye sootheene siri musupuriyani. 
Ezekiel24:6 Niwoko Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Ii! Esidade yoosareya ephome, esupuriya erino murawa, mwa yeeyo mavovowaaya eneera ehimale! Mwiitthe muruulaka entthuri entthuri muhithanlaka." 
Ezekiel24:7 Vano ephome owo oyeehalaawe eri eriyaraaya; owo oyeehenre vamwala woohimela etthu; khayeehenre vathi yeeraaya yuuheeleleye ni ntthupi. 
Ezekiel24:8 Kohiikaathi ephomaawe vamwala woohimela etthu weera kitannye isara ni kiinle ikukuttula ni weera eyo ehikutteleliwe. 
Ezekiel24:9 Tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: Ii! Esidade yoosareya ephome! Miyotho kinimuukelela ikhuuni, aani ikhuuni sincipalexa." 
Ezekiel24:10 Vanonto, muukele ikhuuni ni mpattihe mooro. Mwaapeye nnenesene enama muhelaka soosivasiva; makhuva awo eze mpaka othatuwa ettuura." 
Ezekiel24:11 Vahoolowaya mwiikaathi esupuriya yoohikhalamo etthu vamakhalani a mooro weera evihe mpaka ebronzaaya* oluttuwa weera soohitteelasaya sitothowe ni soohalahalasaya size, silakaseye." 
Ezekiel24:12 Vaheera khoongwereya opaka yeeyo; hata mooro khoongwera omalamaliha yoohalahalaaya ya murawa. 
Ezekiel24:13 Vano, soohitteelasanyu ti soohaawelasanyu. Keenre Miyo kahaawela wootteelihani, ni nyuwo khamutthunne otteelihiwa, nyuwo khamuhokoleela okhalatho ootteela isarasaka sihookhurunuwenleni." 
Ezekiel24:14 Miyo, Yave, kohuuluma. Yoophiyera ehuhu kineeraaka kivare muteko. Nkikhurunuwa; nkimorela ikharari, hata nkihiyerera. Nyuwo mmwithorihiwe ottharihiwaka mweettelowaanyu ni mitekosanyu, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.’ ”" 
Ezekiel24:15 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo eeraka: 
Ezekiel24:16 “Mwaana a mutthu, kihanle vakhaani ovenxa yeeyo munsivelaxaanyu. Wa soothesene, muhilalamike, naari muhiinle hata muhimoroxeru niithori." 
Ezekiel24:17 Muhitthunihereru wiiwiwa wiipulelawanyu; muhiikhupanyere mwaha wa anamakhwa. Mulipihe eturbantaanyu* ni ngware ikwakwaattaanyu; muhikuttelele ekhove hata muhice yooca ekhoveleliwe ociwa ni anamalalamika.” 
Ezekiel24:18 Hiiho, oxeexelo kaahuuluma ni muloko, ni oxekuwa mwaaraka aahookhwa. Waaxiiye, kaapaka yeeyo kaalamuleliwaaka." 
Ezekiel24:19 Vano muloko waakikoha: “Dyoontte, munithalihere etaphulelo ya itthu iyo.”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Miyo kaawaakhulasa: “Yave okeerenle ha: 
Ezekiel24:21 Mwaleele muloko wa oYixrayeli weera Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: ‘Kihanle vakhaani ohiiriha Nipuronaka Nootteela* – nipuro noolipa nyuwosa muniikuxereraanyuno, mwa nenno munsivelaxaanyu, etthu yoowooreeraxani. Anamwane asilopwana ni asithiyana, nyuwosa mwaahiyalaanyu oYuda animwiiviwa ni ekatana." 
Ezekiel24:22 Nyuwosa mmwipakase yeeyo miyo kipankaaka. Khamukuttelelasa ekhove hata khamuca yooca ekhoveleliwe ociwa ni anamalalamika. 
Ezekiel24:23 Nyuwosa mmwiware eturbante* mmurumwanyu ni ikwakwaatta munaawonimwanyu. Khamulalamika hata khamwiinla, mene munimoondasa niwoko na sootakhalasanyu ni khula mutthu onimwiipulela meekhaawe." 
Ezekiel24:24 Ezekiyeli anaakhale eneneero wa nyuwo; nyuwosa mmwipakase yeeyo owo opankaawe. Eyo yeereyaka, nyuwo munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave onlamula sootheene.’" 
Ezekiel24:25 Vano nyuwo, mwaana a mutthu, vanihukuni kineeraaka kivenxe Nipuronaya Noolipa, ohakalalawaya ni ovuwawaya, yeeyo ansivelaxaaya, mpakatho anamwanaaya asilopwana ni asithiyana ari oosiveleyaxaaya," 
Ezekiel24:26 nihuku nno, namatthawa anooruuheleni ihaali." 
Ezekiel24:27 Ehuhuweene yeeyo eyanowaanyu enoohuleya; nyuwo mmuulume ni yoowo ni khammaala. Hiiho, nyuwo mmwikhale eneneero wa yaawosa, ni awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel25:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, murukunuwele wa awAmoni ni mwaathaliherele otthuna wa Muluku." 
Ezekiel25:3 Mwaaleele ha: ‘Mwiiwe masu a Yave onlamula sootheene. Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Mweenre nyuwosa mukhuwelasa mweeraka: “Eya! Eya!” Nipuronaka Nootteela* naahiirihiwaaya, elapo ya oYixrayeli yaanyaatuliwaaya ni muloko wa oYuda waarongwaaya elapo ekina wootthukiwani," 
Ezekiel25:4 Miyo kinoowinnyererasani ntoko ettima ya muloko wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Awosa anoopakasa mookonelamwaya ekungeke iheemasaya eriyaraanyu; animooca soowiimasanyu ni anoowura mukakaanyu. 
Ezekiel25:5 Kinoopaka oRaba moocihamo wa ikamelu* ni wAmoni nipuro noowiitthuuwa ikhondoolo. Hiiho, nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel25:6 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Mweenre nyuwosa mwiipa makuphi, munatupha ni ohakalala, murimaanyu osareiyeene sootakhala mwaha wa elapo ya aYixrayeli," 
Ezekiel25:7 mwaha wa yeeyo, kinimootheteelani moono ni kinoowinnyererasani mmilokoni ntoko soohuhuliwa. Kinimoomalamalihasani eriyari ya ilapo ni kinimookotihasani eriyari ya miloko. Miyo kinimoophwatasani, ni nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.’ ”" 
Ezekiel25:8 “Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: ‘Eenre Mowabe ni Seyiri eeraka ha: “Moone, muloko wa Yuda woothatuwa ntoko miloko sikina sootheene,”" 
Ezekiel25:9 mwaha wa yeeyo, kinoohula mwiinano wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oMowabe, kipaceraka musidadenimwawe siri mmwiinanoni – oBeti-Yeximoti, oBahali-Meyoni ni oKiriyatayimi siri ovuwa wa elapo eyo." 
Ezekiel25:10 Kinoomwinnyerera Mowabe ni awAmoni ntoko ettima ya muloko wa mpatta ninkhua nsuwa. awAmoni khayuupuweleliwatho eriyari ya miloko," 
Ezekiel25:11 ni kinooruuhela nttaruxo oMowabe. Hiiho, awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.’ ”" 
Ezekiel25:12 “Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: ‘Eenre Edomi iinlelaka ikukuttula muloko wa oYuda, ni mwaha wa yeeyo aniiruuhela nthowa," 
Ezekiel25:13 tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: Kinootheteela moono wEdomi kiwiiveke atthwaawe ni axinamaawe. Miyo kinoophwataxa – okhuma oTemani mpaka oDedani, awosa animwiiviwa ni ekatana." 
Ezekiel25:14 Miyo kinimwiinlela ikukuttula wEdomi mwa matata a aYixrayeli, mulokwaaka, ni owo onoopakela wEdomi attharihaka isarasaka ni onyoonyiwawaka; wEdomi onoosuwela ikukuttulasaka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.’ ”" 
Ezekiel25:15 “Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: ‘Yeenre aFilisti epakelaka ikukuttula, soonanara sireene vamurimani, ni wiittawaya wa khalayi ohuruwela ophwata oYuda," 
Ezekiel25:16 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Kihanle vakhaani waatheteela moono aFilisti. Kinimwaamalamaliha aKereti kaaphwateke eniihalahale muxerexere ephareiya. 
Ezekiel25:17 Kinoowiinlelaxa ikukuttula kaattaruxeke musaranimwaka. Kaawiinlelaka ikukuttula, anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.’ ”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Vayaakhani yanaamuloko niimoha, vanihukuni noopacera na mweeri, Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel26:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, eenre Tiro uulumaka sa oYerusaleemu, eeraka: ‘Eya! Mulako mutokweene wa miloko woophwatiwa, ni maselaaya aahuleya; vano owo aheleiyeene nthala, Miyo sinookeettela nnene,’" 
Ezekiel26:3 tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: Ii! oTiro, koowiittani ni kinooruuha miloko sincipale soowananekeni; nsirwe ntoko ephareiya soopaanaka mitekutekusaya." 
Ezekiel26:4 Iyo sinoophwata ixiri sa oTiro sikurumuleke itooresaya*; Miyo kinoomwaraxa ittuxosaya, kitatuxeke mwala woohimela etthu." 
Ezekiel26:5 Muxerexere ephareiya, vawo nnoothatuwa nipuro nneeneene noowaaneya itthavi sa ihopa, niwoko Miyo kohuuluma, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene. Vawo onoothatuwawo yoohuhula wa miloko," 
Ezekiel26:6 ni amaki a mittetthesaya sa mulaponi animwiiviwa ni ekatana. Hiiho, amaki a oTiro anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel26:7 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Wa nyuwo oTiro, kinooruuhelani mpatta wa ottuttuwani mwene a oBabiloniya, Nebukadenezari, mwene a mamwene, vamoha ni ikavalu* ni ikaaro, anamweettiha ni anakhotto ancipale." 
Ezekiel26:8 Owo onoohonona ni ekatana mittetthe sa mulaponimwanyu. Owo onooteka ikaaro sookurumulela ni yooricano ixirisanyu aweemexerelaka ixikudusawe*. 
Ezekiel26:9 Owo onooreherera ikaruma soottiittela weera simane ixiri ni onookurumula itooresanyu* ni ikapwitthi sa eyuuma. 
Ezekiel26:10 Ikavalusawe* sinookhala sincipalexa moota wooweera sineera sooheleeni ntthupi. Ixirisanyu nsittikinyeye ni mikhitto sa ikavalu* sa ekhotto ni ikaaro soohiyanahiyana, owo aavoleelaka mmilakonimwanyu woohihaawano ntoko omvoloiwaaya musidade ixiri sikurumungweene." 
Ezekiel26:11 Anamweettihaaya ikavalu* anoosareya mmiseweni, owo onoowiiva amakaanyu ni ekatana. Amarimbwaanyu oolipaxa anoomoroxeliwa vathi." 
Ezekiel26:12 Anoohuhula mihakhusanyu ni nakoswaanyu; anookurumula ixirisanyu ni impasanyu sooreerela, evonyereke mphareiya malukwaanyu, itthaabwasanyu ni ittuxo sootheene." 
Ezekiel26:13 Kinoomalamaliha wiipawanyu woonyakula, ni khawiiwanyeyatho oruma wa amakitaanyu." 
Ezekiel26:14 Kinimoopakani mwala woohimela etthu, ni nyuwo munoothatuwa nipuro nneeneene noowaaneya itthavi sa ihopa. Nyuwo khamuraseliwatho, niwoko Miyo Yave, kohuuluma,’ onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel26:15 Yave onlamula sootheene oneerela ha oTiro: “Ilapo sa muxerexere ephareiya sinoothukumela woowiiwa oruma wa omorawaya, wiipulela wa oovulala ni woowoona okhwa waakhumelelaka eriyaraaya." 
Ezekiel26:16 Vano anamwane a mamwene ootheene a muxerexere ephareiya anookhuruwa vahiceni sa emwene yiikaathiki mikaandyosaya mpattaaya ni anoorula soowarasaya sooxoriwa. Etteenguwanxeene, anookilaathi puruvuru, ethukumelaka woohihiyerera niwoko na yeeyo yookhumelenleni." 
Ezekiel26:17 Vahoolowaya, animwiipa ecipo yoowoolalamikelani nyuwo, yeeraka: ‘Ii!, Moota mphwatingwaanyu nyuwo esidade ya epili, emakingwe ni atthu a ophareiya! Nyuwo mwaari ikuru sa mphareiya, nyuwo ni amakaanyu; nyuwosa mohaatteengula ootheene yaawo ankhalawo." 
Ezekiel26:18 Vano ilapo sa muxerexere ephareiya sinthukumela vanihukuni na omorawaya; icurumba sa mphareiya, sootteenguwa niwoko na oheleyawanyu nthala.’" 
Ezekiel26:19 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: ‘Miyo koopakakani esidade yoothaamiwa, ntoko isidade soohimakiwa, ni kooruuhelakani maahi mancipale a ephareiya ni maahi a moowiixera yookuttelelakani," 
Ezekiel26:20 vano, kinimookuruxelani munlittini ntoko yaale ankuruxeliwa munlittini weera yaatthare amuhakhalai. Miyo kinimwaamakiha mpuwa etthaya, ntoko mathala a khalayi, vamoha ni yaale ankuruxeliwa munlittini, ni nyuwo khamuhokoleelatho vanipuroniwanyu mulaponi mwa akumi." 
Ezekiel26:21 Kinimoomalamalihani moota woowoopiha ni nyuwo khamukhalatho. Mmwaasaasiwe, mene khamphwanyiwaru, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.”" 
Ezekiel27:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel27:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, mulalamikele oTiro." 
Ezekiel27:3 Muleele oTiro ori vamulako wa ephareiya, ni ommweetta nakoso ni miloko sinkhala muxerexere ephareiya: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Nyuwo mwaleele ha oTiro: “Ophwaneliwawaka ti wookwanela.”" 
Ezekiel27:4 Eriyari ya ephareiya yaari omwenaanyu, anamatekaanyu ahoophwanelihani moota wookwanela." 
Ezekiel27:5 Itthaabwasanyu sootheene ti sa ipinyeiru* sa oSeniri; aakuxa esidari* ya oLebanoni weera apakeleno nrimbunanyu na nikula ntokotoko. 
Ezekiel27:6 Aapakela itthaabwa sineettiheriwa nikula ntokotoko sa nyiri sitokotoko sa oBaxani; sa nyiri sa goferi* saarweela muxerexere ephareiya ya oKipro, aapakela mpuwa mwa nikula ntokotoko sihuruweliweeneno maino a itthepo." 
Ezekiel27:7 Mitthambosanyu sipakeliwe eliinyu* yooreera yooxoriwa yaaruuhiwe wExipitu, sivarelaka muteko ntoko eneneerowaanyu; sookhuneela nikula ntokotoko saari sooxeera ni sa kanka saarweela muxerexere ephareiya ya wElixa." 
Ezekiel27:8 Amaki a oSidoni ni wArevadi yaari anamweettihaanyu nikula ntokotoko; asilopwanaanyu oowaaluwa, ii! oTiro, yaari anamweettiha a makula matokotoko*." 
Ezekiel27:9 Anakhotto oowereene a oGebali yaari aneettottho ooratta opaka makula weera ettiye moothorowa. Makula matokotoko ootheene a mphareiya ni anamweettihaaya yaarweela woothumiherasani nakoswaanyu. 
Ezekiel27:10 aPersiya, aLidiya ni asilopwana a oPuti yaavarela muteko ntoko anakhotto ereene mukhottonimwanyu. Awosa yaathomeya ixikudusaya* ni ikapaseti muxirinimwanyu yooruuhelakani ovuwa." 
Ezekiel27:11 Asilopwana a wArevadi ni oHeleki yaalipelela ixirisaya mmipattani sootheene; asilopwana a oGamade yaari mutoorenimwanyu*. Awosa yaathomeya ixikudusaya* muxirinimwanyu saarukureenre; awosa yaakwaneliha ophwaneliwawaya. 
Ezekiel27:12 oTaresisi woompaka nakoso ni nyuwo, sooneyaka sooreelasanyu sincipale; awosa yaakhumiha eparatha*, eyuuma, eyuuma ya eseeta ni eyuuma yoolipa yaakakhanyihaka ni soothumihasanyu." 
Ezekiel27:13 oGresiya, oTubali ni oMeseke yaampakasa nakoso ni nyuwo; yaakuxa ipottha ni ikaruma sa ebronze* mwa sooreelasanyu." 
Ezekiel27:14 Atthu a oBete-Togarema yaahaakakhanyiha ikavalu* sooteexa mirindi, ni sa ekhotto mpakatho abuuru mwa soothumihasanyu." 
Ezekiel27:15 Atthu a oRodesi yaampakasa nakoso ni nyuwosa ni ilapo sincipale sa muxerexere ephareiya saathatuwa anamathumaanyu; yaahoolivani ni maino a itthepo ni itthaabwa sa ebanu*. 
Ezekiel27:16 wArani waampaka nakoso ni nyuwo niwoko na soothumihasanyu sincipale; waahoolivani ni yaspe*, ekuwo yooxeera, itthu sooxoriwa, eliinyu* yootteettheya, korali* ni rubi* wa soothumihasanyu." 
Ezekiel27:17 Yuda ni Yixrayeli yaampakasa nakoso ni nyuwo; mwa sooreelasanyu yaahaakakhanyiha etrigu ya oMiniti, ifiigu, oravo, makhura ni balsamu*." 
Ezekiel27:18 Mwaha wa itthu sincipale murinaanyu ni mihakhu sincipale sa sooreelasanyu, oDamasku woompaka nakoso ni nyuwo, woolivakani eviinyu ya oHeleboni ni mapururu a ikhondoolo sa oZahari." 
Ezekiel27:19 aDani ni aGrego a wUzali yaathumasa soothumihasanyu, yaakakhanyihaka ni eyuuma yoohaniwa, kasiya* ni itthu soowunkhelaxa." 
Ezekiel27:20 Dedani oompaka nakoso ni nyuwo oothumiherakani mikaandyo sa sookilaathelano ikavalu*. 
Ezekiel27:21 awArabi ni asitokweene ootheene a oKedari yaari anamathumaanyu; yaampaka nakoso ni nyuwo yoolivakani iputtiputthi, anapunci a ikhondoolo ni a ipuri." 
Ezekiel27:22 Ananakoso a oXeba ni oRaama yaampaka nakoso ni nyuwo; mwa soothumihasanyu awosa yaahaakakhanyiha sooreerelasaya sa soosivasiva soohiyanahiyana, maluku ootthuneyaxa ni eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Ezekiel27:23 oHarani, oKane, wEdeni ni ananakoso a oXeba, wAxuri ni oKilimade yaampaka nakoso ni nyuwo." 
Ezekiel27:24 Moothumihanimwanyu, awosa yaampaka nakoso ni nyuwo, ethumihaka ikuwo sooreera, soowara sa kanka, itthu sooxoriwa ni matthatto a ikoore soovaxavaxiwa ni mikhoyi sooyevela soorithiwa ni malutte oolipaxa." 
Ezekiel27:25 Makula matokotoko a oTaresisi anttuutta sooreelasanyu. Mooreiwa mirindi soolemela mureene eriyari ya ephareiya. 
Ezekiel27:26 Anamweettihaanyu nikula ntokotoko ahooronghani eriyari ya ephareiya. Epheyo enrweela mpatta wa ninkhuma nsuwa yohoonyaanyerani mphareiya. 
Ezekiel27:27 Mihakhusanyu, soothumihasanyu ni sooreelasanyu, anamweettiha a makulaanyu matokotoko, anamiteko a makula matokotoko, ni anamaratta a makulaanyu, ananakoswaanyu ni anakhottwaanyu ootheene ari munikulani nitokotoko anoomireya eriyari ya ephareiya vanihukuni na noomalaanyu." 
Ezekiel27:28 Ilapo sa mukerekhere ephareiya nsithukumele yaakhuwelaka anamweettiha a makula matokotoko. 
Ezekiel27:29 Anamweetiha ootheene a makula matokotoko, anoohiya makulaaya matokotoko; anamiteko a makula matokotoko ni ootheene aneetta mmakulani matokotoko anookhala muxerexere ephareiya." 
Ezekiel27:30 Anookhuwelaxa ni othanana niwoko na nyuwo; animwiihela ntthupi mmuru yiixuupuruxeke vattuurani. 
Ezekiel27:31 Anoomettha mayihi niwoko na nyuwo ni anoowarela soolalamikano. Anoowiinlelani ni munepa woothananaxa ni murima wooriipeene. 
Ezekiel27:32 Yaakhuwelasaka ni yookhupanyerakani, anoolalamikaxa mwaha wa nyuwo, yeeraka: “Taani otonko omaalihiwa ntoko Tiro, oriciwe ni ephareiya?”" 
Ezekiel27:33 Soothumihasanyu saaronghiwaaya ophareiya, nyuwo mwaahakalaliha miloko sincipale; nyuwo mwaahaathadyiriha mamwene a mulaponi ni mihakhusanyu ni sooreelasanyu sincipale." 
Ezekiel27:34 Vano mphwatiwaanyu ni ephareiya, moowiixera mwa maahi; mihakhusanyu ni ootheene anoohoolani aamireya ni nyuwo." 
Ezekiel27:35 Ootheene ankhala ilapo sa muxerexere ephareiya yohaathananihaxa yeeyo enookhumelelani; mamwenaaya anoova oowoopopiheyeene ni ikhovesaya sohaamora mwaha woowoova. 
Ezekiel27:36 Ananakoso a eriyari ya miloko angwoopelani murika yaawoonakani; woophiya ommaleloniwanyu woowoopiha, ni nyuwo khamukhalatho.’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel28:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, mwaaleele alamuli a oTiro weera Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: ‘Ngwixoonani wa murimaanyu nyuwo muneera: “Miyo ti Muluku; kinkilaathela ehice ya emwene ya Muluku eriyari ya ephareiya.” Vaheera nyuwo muri mutthu paahi, khamuhiyono Muluku, naari mwiixeeraka okhala musuweli ntoko Muluku." 
Ezekiel28:3 Weeraka nyuwo musuweli ompwaha Daniyeli? Kheekhala exiiri muhisuwenlaanyu? 
Ezekiel28:4 Mweesuwelonimwanyu ni ngwiiwexexanimwanyu nyuwo moophwanya mihakhu munathukumanyiha eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha* mmihakhunimwanyu. 
Ezekiel28:5 Mooweranimwanyu otokotoko omweetta nakoso, nyuwo mohaandyeerera mihakhusanyu, ni murimaanyu ommweera otepa wiikuxerera niwoko na seiyo." 
Ezekiel28:6 Tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: ‘Mweenre nyuwo mwiixeeraka musuweli ntoko Muluku," 
Ezekiel28:7 kinimooruuhelani anamarwa a mmilokoni soohimorelaru ikharari; awosa anoovarela ikatanasaya, ewananeke ophwaneliwawanyu, mirukusanyu ni waarawanyu wootutha." 
Ezekiel28:8 Awosa animookuruxelani mulittini, ni nyuwo munookhwela eriyari ya ephareiya moota woopuhereya." 
Ezekiel28:9 Weeraka nyuwo mmweere: “Miyo ti Muluku,” vamaithoni wa yaale eniiwiiveeni? Nyuwo mmwikhale mutthu paahi, ohikhanle Muluku mmatatani mwa yaawo eniiwiiveeni." 
Ezekiel28:10 Okhwawanyu onuukhale ntoko wa oohiineliwa mmatatani mwa anamarwa. Miyo kohuuluma, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:11 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel28:12 “Mwaana a mutthu, mulalamike mwaha wa mwene a oTiro ni mmweerele: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Nyuwo mwaari moota wookwanela, oosareya miruku ni oophwanelaxiwa." 
Ezekiel28:13 Nyuwo mwaari wEdeni, munttimbeni na Muluku; maluku ootthuneyaxa ootheene yannoophwanelihani – erubi*, topaziyo*, esmeralda*, krisolito*, onikisi*, yaspe*, safira*, yaspe* ni berilo*. Ivarelelosaya ni soolipelelasaya, saapakeliwe ni eyuuma yoorikaxa; sootheene iyo saarehereriwe nihuku nyuwo mpattuxiwaanyu." 
Ezekiel28:14 Nyuwo mwaattikittheliwa ntoko kerubini* oolipelela, niwoko koothanlenleni yeeyo. Nyuwo mwaari vamwaakoni wootteela wa Muluku, ni mweetta eriyari ya maluku ooceremela." 
Ezekiel28:15 Nyuwo khamwaarino nthowa mphironimwanyu, okhuma nihuku mwaapattuxingwaanyu mpaka siphwanyingwaaya sootakhalasanyu mwa nyuwo." 
Ezekiel28:16 Mumvarexenxaanyu nakoswaanyu moosareya nipuhero, munattheka. Tivawo Miyo koovonyenraakani ooyeviheyeene ottai wa mwaako wa Muluku, kinawoomolani, ii! Kerubini* oolipelela eriyari ya maluku ooceremela." 
Ezekiel28:17 Murimaanyu woothatuwa woowiixoona niwoko na ophwaneliwawanyu, ni nyuwo moonanariha mirukusanyu niwoko na waarawanyu. Tivawo Miyo koovonyenraakani vathi; kohoopakani mutheelelo wa mamwene." 
Ezekiel28:18 Nyuwo moohiiriha mapurowaanyu ootteela niwoko na sootthekasanyu sincipale ni nakoswaanyu oohiroromeleya. Tivawo kikhumihalaaka mwa nyuwo mooro woolalingheni onootatuxani ettuura vathi vamaithoni wa ootheene yaawoonani. 
Ezekiel28:19 Miloko sootheene soosuwenleni saawoonakani sinootikhiniheyaxa; wohoophiyerelani ommaleloniwanyu woowoopiha ni khamukhalatho.’ ” 
Ezekiel28:20 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo eeraka: 
Ezekiel28:21 “Mwaana a mutthu, murukunuwele oSidoni; muthaliherele otthuna wa Muluku" 
Ezekiel28:22 ni mweerele: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: ‘Koowiittani Sidoni ni ovuwawaka kinimoonihera mpuwamwanyu. Ootheene anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave, koottaruxakani ni kiixooniheraka Ootteela mpuwamwanyu." 
Ezekiel28:23 Kinimoorumihelani nihooxo ni kinoosariha ephome mmisewenimwanyu. Anamakhwa anoomora mpuwamwanyu ni ekatana eniyoorweeleni mmipattani sootheene. Hiiho awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave. 
Ezekiel28:24 aYixrayeli kheekhalanotho amwaattamana oonanara murima hata eniyaahome ntoko nyiiwa ni eniyaavulalihe ntoko rupulula. Hiiho, awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:25 “ ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Kaathukumanyihaka aYixrayeli eriyari ya miloko mwa seiyo amwaraxeliwaaya, Miyo kinimwiixoonihera Ootteela eriyaraaya vamaithoni wa miloko. Hiiho awosa anookhalasa mulaponimwaya xaxaxa, mwa yeeyo kaamvanghaaka murumeiyaaka Yakobe." 
Ezekiel28:26 Awosa anookhalawo oolipeene, anooteka impa, ephatteyeke ivideira*; anookhala oolipeene Miyo kaattaruxaka amwaattamanaaya ootheene yaapakenle yoonanara. Hiiho, awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaaya.’”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Vanihukuni nanaamuloko ni meeli na mweeri wanaamuloko wa eyaakha yanaamuloko ya wootthukiwani, Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel29:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, murukunuwele wa Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu, ni munthaliherele owo ni awExipitu ootheene otthuna wa Yave." 
Ezekiel29:3 Mwaaleele: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Koowiittani nyuwo Farawu*, mwene a Exipitu, nyuwo ntutu mutokweene mwiixaatalenle eriyari ya maxaapwaanyu. Nyuwo muneera: “Nilu ti awaka; kiipakenle muneenaaka.”" 
Ezekiel29:4 Vaheera Miyo kinoohoma ni nimeso ettwattwaraanyu, ni kinoopakiha weera ihopa sa maxaapwaanyu saange mmakambanimwanyu, ii! wExipitu. Kinimoopurulelani omokoni wa maxaapwaanyu, vamoha ni ihopa saangiye mmakambanimwanyu." 
Ezekiel29:5 Kinimoohiyani munikareni vamoha ni ihopa sootheene sa maxaapwaanyu. Nyuwo mmwimorele vanlakani ni khamvenxiwa hata khamvithiwa. Kinimwaavaha erutthwaanyu axinama a ntuphini ni ipalame sa wiirimu. 
Ezekiel29:6 Hiiho ootheene anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave. Nyuwo ti ekopo yoopakiwa ni ettheere wa muloko wa oYixrayeli. 
Ezekiel29:7 aYixrayeli yoophiteenraayani, mwaahaapera, munaavulaliha mmakhatanimwaya; yaasaansaaya ekhaviherowaanyu, mwaawintaka, munaalosowiha nyettosaya." 
Ezekiel29:8 Vanonto, Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Kinooruuha ekatana yoowoowananani nyuwo, kiwiiveke atthwaanyu ni axinamaanyu." 
Ezekiel29:9 Exipitu onookhala mathalaru woohimakiwa. Hiiho, anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave. Mweenre mweera: “Nilu ti awaka; ti miyo kimpanke,”" 
Ezekiel29:10 koowiittani nyuwo ni nyoolokosanyu, ni kinoopakiha wExipitu ehasara ni nikare noophwatiwa, okhuma oMigedoli mpaka wAsewani, okotela omwiinanoni wa oKuxe." 
Ezekiel29:11 Khakhalaru mutthu naari mwaamunama anaavirewo. Kheewoworu eniikhale ni okumi wa iyaakha miloko mixexe. 
Ezekiel29:12 Kinookhaliha wExipitu elapo ya nikarexa opwaha ilapo sootheene; mweehuhuni ya iyaakha miloko mixexe isidadesaya sinookhala mathalaru eriyari ya mathala a isidade sootheene. Kinimwaamwaraxa awExipitu variyri wa miloko ni kinimwaakawanyiha mmilokoni soohiyanahiyana. 
Ezekiel29:13 Wa soothesene Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: ‘Simanleene iyaakha miloko mixexe kinimwaathukumanyiha awExipitu eriyari ya miloko mwa seiyo amwaraxeliwaaya. 
Ezekiel29:14 Miyo kinimwaahokoloxa wootthukiwani, kaarongheke wExipitu, elapo ya makholowaaya. Wu anookhala omwene wooyeva." 
Ezekiel29:15 Onookhala omwene wooyevaxa, ni khawiivuwihatho mmilokoni. Kinookhaliha woohilipa ni khoorwa olamulatho miloko." 
Ezekiel29:16 wExipitu khookhalatho oweherera wa aYixrayeli, mene onuukhale yoowuupuwelela moota yaatakhanlaaya woowaasaasa ekhavihero ya wExipitu. Hiiho awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave onlamula sootheene.’ ”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Vanihukuni noopacera na mweeri woopacera wa eyaakha yanaamiloko miili niithannapiili ya wootthukiwani, Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel29:18 “Mwaana amutthu, Nebukadenezari mwene a oBaniloniya aahaarumihela anakhottwaawe ongwanano Tiro ekhotto yoovihaxa; nyurusaya sootheene soometthiwa mpaka ohihalaru mayihi ni makhataaya ovulalaxa. Wa soothesene, owo ni anakhottwaawe khayaatthuveliweru wa ekhotto yaawanannaaya oTiro." 
Ezekiel29:19 Tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene oneeraawe ha: Kinoomvaha wExipitu Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, ni owo onoorowano mihakhu sa muloko owo. Owo, onoohuhula, akuxeke elapo ntoko yoowaalivano anakhottwaawe." 
Ezekiel29:20 Miyo koomvaha wExipitu ntoko yoomutthuvelela ngwiilipiheranimwawe, mwa yeeyo owo vamoha ni anakhottwaawe akipakenlaaya, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel29:21 Nihuku nno, kinimwaandyeerera ikuru sa muloko wa oYixrayeli ni eriyaraayasa, kinoohula eyanowaanyu. Hiiho, awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo eeraka: 
Ezekiel30:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, muthalihere otthuna wa Muluku ni mweere: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Mukhuwele ni mweere: “Ii! Nihuku nno!”" 
Ezekiel30:3 Vano, nihuku nookhuveela, nihuku na Yave nookhuveela; nno nnikhale nihuku na mahutte, ehuhu ya othorihiwa wa miloko." 
Ezekiel30:4 Ekatana enoongwanano Exipitu, ni otteenguwa onookhumelela oKuxe. Anamakhwa yaamoraka wExipitu, mihakhusaya sinoovenxiwa ni mathipelowaaya anoopwexakasiwa." 
Ezekiel30:5 oKuxe ni oPute, oLidiya ni wArabiya wootheene, oLibiya ni muloko wa elapo ya wiiraana, onoomoroxiwa ni ekatana vamoha ni wExipitu." 
Ezekiel30:6 Yave oneera ha: Yaawosa yiiraanne ni wExipitu anoomora, ni ikuru aniikuxereraayano sinooporora. Okhuma oMigedoli mpaka wAsewani, awosa animwiiviwa ni ekatana. Masu a Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel30:7 Anoophwatasiwa eriyari ya ilapo sa nikare, ni isidadesaya sinookhala mathalaru eriyari ya isidade soothaamiwa." 
Ezekiel30:8 Miyo kaahisaka wExipitu ni ootheene ankhaviherawo yaattikitthiwaka, awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel30:9 Nihuku nno kinimwaarumiha anamitthenga mmakulani matokotoko weera etutuxe muloko wa oKuxe oniixoona okhala woolipeene. Otteenguwa onimwaasaraxa vanihukuni na othorihiwa wa wExipitu, niwoko vekhaikhai, nno nnoophiya." 
Ezekiel30:10 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Kinoomaliha muloko wa wExipitu mwa matata a Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya." 
Ezekiel30:11 Owo vamoha ni anakhottwaawe – muloko ohimmorelaxaru ikharari – anookuxiwa weera yaphwate elapo. Awosa anoovarela ekatana ewananeke wExipitu, ni elapo enoosareya mittembo." 
Ezekiel30:12 Kinimuumiha maxaapwa a Nilu, ni kinimwaathumihera elapo atthu oonanara murima; mwa matata a anamarwa kinoohiya elapo yoophwatiweene vamoha ni sootheene sirimo. Miyo, Yave, kohuuluma." 
Ezekiel30:13 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Kinoophwata miluku ni kinoomaliha icaambulo siri oMemfesi. Khakhalatho mwaana mulopwana a mwene wExipitu, ni kinoomwaraxela woova mulaponi moothemwene." 
Ezekiel30:14 Kinoophwata ottuttuwani wa wExipitu, kinoohisa oZowani ni kinoottaruxa oTebesi." 
Ezekiel30:15 Kinooyeehera isarasaka oPelusiyumi, woolipawo wa wExipitu, ni kinimwaamaliha atthu oohaatta a oTebesi." 
Ezekiel30:16 Kinoohisa wExipitu; oPelusiyumi onookhunyanyeya moovoreyani. oTebesi onoovavihiwa ni epheyo etokotoko; oMemfesi onoottenguwaxa. 
Ezekiel30:17 Amiravo a oHeliyopolisi ni a oBubastis, animwiiviwa ni ekatana, ni muloko wa isidade onooronghiwa wootthukiwani." 
Ezekiel30:18 Kaamalihaka nihasu na wExipitu, epiphi enoolamula othana Tafanyesi; iwo wiixoona wa ikurusaya onoomala. Onookutteleleya ni mahutte, ni amaki a mmittetthenimwaya anooronghiwa wootthukiwani." 
Ezekiel30:19 Hiiho, Miyo kinoottaruxa wExipitu ni ootheene anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.’ ”" 
Ezekiel30:20 Vanihukuni nanaathannameeli na mweeri woopacera wa eyaakha yanaamuloko niimoha, Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel30:21 “Mwaana a mutthu, Miyo kohintaka moono wa mwene a wExipitu; khaawo amuttumbaanyenre emmaraka weera alame ni avareletho ekatana." 
Ezekiel30:22 Vano, Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Koomwiitta Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu. Kinimwintaka nyoonosawe miili – woohinteya ni yoowo winteiye, ni kinoommoroxiha ekatana mmatatanimwawe." 
Ezekiel30:23 Kinoowoomola awExipitu variyari wa miloko, kaamwaraxeleke mulaponi moothemwene." 
Ezekiel30:24 Kinoolipihera nyoono sa mwene a oBabiloniya, kimwinnyerereke ekatanaaka mmatatanimwawe, mene kinimwintaka nyoono sa Farawu* ni onimwiipulela akhwaaka ohoolo wa mwene a oBabiloniya." 
Ezekiel30:25 Aani, kinoolipiha nyoono sa mwene a oBabiloniya, mene nyoono sa mwene a wExipitu sinooporora. Vano kaamwinnyereraka ekatanaaka mmatatani mwa mwene a oBabiloniya ni owo aatheteelaka wExipitu, atthu ootheene anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel30:26 Kinoowoomola awExipitu variyari wa miloko kaamwaraxeleke mulaponi moothemwene. Vano awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.” 
Ezekiel31:1 Vanihukuni noopacera na mweeri wanaararu wa eyaakha yanaamuloko niimoha, Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel31:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, munleele Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu, ni mulokwaawe woowaattaxa: ‘Taani onlikana ni nyuwo mootokweeneni?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Mmoonelemo wAsiriya – khalayi waari ntoko mwiri wa esedari* wa oLebanoni ni iphandi sooreera saahela munttuusi othako; yaari yoorakamaxa, makukhwaaya ereene a mwiitti yaari vasulu wa othako wootheene." 
Ezekiel31:4 Khayaahaleela epula yoowunnuwiha, hata oriirela wa etthaya weera opombihe. Maahi yaahelela nipuro wunnuwaayawo mwiri, ekhwalalelaka mmirini sootheene sa moothakoni." 
Ezekiel31:5 Yunnuwaxa opwaha nyiri sootheene sa mutuphini; saaphuwa iphandi sincipale ni iyo saahunnuwa sikuttukutteyaka mwaha woowaatta maahi. 
Ezekiel31:6 Ipalame sootheene sa wiirimu saapaka ipuuru mphandinimwaya, axinama a mutuphini ootheene yaayarela vathi wa iphandisaya; miloko sincipale sootheene saakhalela munttuusaaya." 
Ezekiel31:7 Ophwaneliwawaya waari otokotoko, ni iphandisaya saakuttukutteiye, niwoko mikwankhwaarisaya saarowa yaaraayawo maahi mancipale." 
Ezekiel31:8 Khayaariworu esidari* ya muttimbeni mwa Muluku yaalikanxereya; nyiri sa ipinyeiru* khasaakuttukutteiye ntoko iphandisaya, hata nyiri sikina khasaarino iphandi ntoko seiyo; khawaariworu mwiri wa muttimbeni mwa Muluku, wooreera ntoko yeeyo." 
Ezekiel31:9 Miyo koophwaneliha ni iphandi sooreeraxa, sihilikanaka nyiri sootheene sa wEdeni muttimbeni mwa Muluku." 
Ezekiel31:10 Vanonto, Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Weenre owo wunnuwaka, onarakama ophiyaka osuluxa, ni makukhwaaya a mwiitti yakhalaka vasulu wa othako wootheene, ni weenre wiikuxererakano orakamawaya," 
Ezekiel31:11 Miyo kohinnyerera wa mulamuli a miloko weera owo opakeliwe ottharihiwaka otakhalawaya. Miyo, kookhootta," 
Ezekiel31:12 ni muloko woohimorelaxa ikharari wa anamarwa, woomoroxa, onahiya. Iphandisaya soomorela mmanyaakoni ni mmareyareyani moothemwene; iphandisaya sirimwaasa omwaraxeliwa mulaponimwaya. Miloko sootheene sa mulaponi soovenya mmunttuusinimwaya, sinathaama." 
Ezekiel31:13 Ipalame sootheene sa wiirimu sohiitekiha mmwirini woomora, ni axinama ootheene a mutuphini, angkhala mphandinimwaya." 
Ezekiel31:14 Tivawo, khoowoworu mwiri wa muxerexere maahi oniwunnuwaxe ngwiixoonani, orakamaxaka ni makukhwaaya a mwiitti ekhalaka vasulu wa othako wootheene. Khoowoworu mwiri mukina woohelelaxiwa oniwunnuwetho hiiho; sootheene silakeleliwe okhwa ntoko atthu ankhwa, sivithiweke ntoko amvitheliwaaya atthu." 
Ezekiel31:15 Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Vanihukuni na ovithiwawawe, kaapakiha weera maxaapwaaya oowiixera yaalalamikele; kaahiiha maxaapwaaya ni kaahuumiha maahaaya oowaattaxa. Niwoko na yaawo, koomuhela epiphi Lebanoni, ni nyiri sootheene sa mutuphini saahuuma woomalela." 
Ezekiel31:16 Koothukumeliha miloko woorumani omorawaya, kaakhuruwelihaaka mulittini vamoha ni yaawo amvithiwa. Vano, nyiri sootheene sa wEdeni, sooreeraxa ni sooreerela sa oLebanoni, nyiri sootheene soohelelaxiwa, saapembesiwa vathi wa etthaya." 
Ezekiel31:17 Ootheene yaakhala mmunttuusinimwaya, oowiiraananaaya eriyari ya miloko, yaavithiwano vamoha ni yaale yiiviwe ni ekatana." 
Ezekiel31:18 Mwiri heeni wa wEdeni woolikanxera ni nyuwo ngwaarani ni mootokweeneni? Vanonto nyuwotho, munoomoroxeliwa vathi, vamoha ni nyiri sa wEdeni; nyuwo munimwiixaatalela eriyari ya oohiineliwa, vamoha ni yaale yiiviwe ni ekatana. Ti yeeyo eniimukhumelele Farawu* ole ni mulokwaawe mwincipale wootheene, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.’ ”" 
Ezekiel32:1 Vanihukuni noopacera na mweeri wanaamuloko ni miili wa eyaakha yanaamuloko ni piili, Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel32:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, mmwiipele Farawu*, mwene a wExipitu ecipo ya olalamika, ni mmweerele: ‘Nyuwo muri ntoko mwatto eriyari ya miloko, ntoko enowa yoowoopihaxa ya moowiixera, enyoongolowaka mmaxaapwanimwanyu, etekumihaka maahi ni yiihelaka nttoko ni inaawosanyu." 
Ezekiel32:3 Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Kinimooreyani ntthavinaka ohoolo wa muloko mwincipale, ni awosa animookhumiherani omokoni muntthavinimwaka." 
Ezekiel32:4 Kinimookhumiherani omokoni, koovonyerekeni mutuphini. Kinoohiya ipalame sootheene sa wiirimu soopakakani wootthawelawaya, ni axinama a mulaponi moothemwene animookhuurani mpaka ovona." 
Ezekiel32:5 Kinimwaaneya erutthwaanyu mmanyaakoni, ni mmareyareyani kinoosariha makhuvaanyu." 
Ezekiel32:6 Elapo kinoosariha ephomaanyu ephiroweeneeyo mpaka mmanyaakoni, ni mareyareya anoosareya erutthwaanyu." 
Ezekiel32:7 Koophwatakani, kinookuttelela erimu kirimiheke ithenyeeri; kinookuttelela nsuwa ni nihutte, ni mweeri khawaara." 
Ezekiel32:8 Ithenyeeri sinaara wiirimu nsoorimeleni, ni kinooruuha epiphi mulaponimwanyu, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel32:9 Kaatannyaka ophwatiwawanyu eriyari ya miloko, kinootutuxa miloko sa atthu ancipale, mulaponi mwahaasuwenlaanyu." 
Ezekiel32:10 Kinoopakiha weera saawoonakani miloko sincipale suumiwe owanoni, ni weera mamwenaaya yoopihaxiwe niwoko na nyuwo, Miyo kaavukhulaka ekatanaaka ohoolowaya. Vanihukuni na omorawaya, khula mutthu a yaawo anaathukumele ni woova woohihiyerera mwa okumaawe." 
Ezekiel32:11 Niwoko Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Ekatana ya mwene a oBabiloniya enimoorweelani." 
Ezekiel32:12 Kinoopakiha weera ancipale a mulokwaanyu yiiviwe ni ekatana ya aweri, oohimorelaxa ikharari a miloko sootheene. Awosa eniiphwate wiixoona wa Exipitu, ni mulokwaawe wootheene onoowiniwa." 
Ezekiel32:13 Kinoophwatela muhuwaawe wootheene, muxerexere wa maahi mancipale, mwa yaawo eneera ehitekumihiwetho ni nnaawo na mutthu, hata eneera ehisarihiwe nttoko ni mapita a axinama." 
Ezekiel32:14 Vano, kinoohiya maahaaya elakhelaka, ni maxaapwaaya epiluwaka ntoko makhura, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel32:15 Miyo kaamphwataka Exipitu ni kaavenxaka sootheene sirimo, kaawiivaka ootheene amankemo, awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.’" 
Ezekiel32:16 Wu ti olalamika wa ecipo eneeraaya yiipe mwaha wa yoowo. Anamwane asithiyana a miloko eniyiipe; awosa eniyiipe mwaha wa wExipitu ni nakupaaya ootheene, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.”" 
Ezekiel32:17 Vanihukuni nanaamuloko ni mathanu na mweeri, wa eyaakha yanaamuloko ni piili, Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel32:18 “Mwaana a mutthu, munlalamikele nakupa a wExipitu ni munkuruxele mulittini, okhuma owo mpaka anamwane asithiyana a miloko sa aweri, vamoha ni yaawo ankuruxeliwa mulittini." 
Ezekiel32:19 Mweerele muloko: ‘Weeraka ti nyuwo mphwanenle opwatthiwa opwaha miloko sikina? Mukhuruwe ni mwiixaatalele vamoha ni oohiineliwa.’ 
Ezekiel32:20 Awosa eniimore eriyari ya yaawo yiiviwe ni ekatana. Ekatana eri yoorehereriweene; awosa epurulasiwe vamoha ni nakupa ootheene a mulokwaaya. 
Ezekiel32:21 Munihiyeni, ahooleli ooweraxa enimweerele Exipitu ni yaawo iiraanannaawe: ‘Awosa aakuruxeliwa mulittini ni aniixaatalela vamoha ni oohiineliwa – ni yaawo yiiviwe ni ekatana." 
Ezekiel32:22 Asiriya ori vale vamoha ni anakhottwaawe ootheene; orukureeriwe ni mahiye a anamakhwa ootheene, aani, ootheene yiiviwe ni ekatana." 
Ezekiel32:23 Mahiyaaya ari moowiixera, ni anakhottwaaya aniixaatalela muxerexere mwa nihiyenaya. Ootheene yaamwaraxenle otteenguwa mulaponi mwa akumi ahiiviwa ni ekatana." 
Ezekiel32:24 wElami ori vale ni mulokwaawe wootheene orukureenre nihiyenaya. Ootheene awo ahiiviwa ni ekatana. Ootheene yaamwaranxe otteenguwa mulaponi mwa akumi aakuruxeliwa mulittini oohiineliweene. Aniireya wuulihiheyawaya muru vamoha ni yaawo ankuruxeliwa mulittini. 
Ezekiel32:25 Ooreherereliwa ekaama eriyari ya anamakhwa vamoha ni anakhottwaawe ootheene arukureenre nihiyenawe. Ootheene awo ti oohiineliwa, yiiviwe ni ekatana. Woopihawawe waamwareela mulaponi mwa akumi, tivawo awo aniireyaaya overuliwawaya vamoha ni yaawo ankuruxeliwa mulittini; aniixaatalela eriyari ya anamakhwa." 
Ezekiel32:26 Meseki ni Tubali, ari vale vamoha ni mulokwaaya wootheene erukureenreene mahiyaaya. Ootheene awo ti oohiineliwa ni yiiviwe ni ekatana, niwoko yaamwaraxela woopihawaya mulaponi mwa akumi." 
Ezekiel32:27 Khaaniixaatalela vamoha ni anakhotto akina oohiineliwa, yiiviwe enakuruxeliwa mmahiyeni ni ikapwitthisaya sa ekhotto, mwa yaawo ikapwitthisaya siikaathiwe waamuruwaya? Nttaruxo na sootakhalasaya nri mmakhuvanimwaya, niwoko otteenguwa waatannyeriwe ni anakhottwaaya, nooviravira mulaponi mwa akumi."
