Ezekiel32:28 Ii! Farawu*, nyuwotho munimwiiviwa ni mmwiixaatalele eriyari ya oohiineliwa, vamoha ni yaawo yiiviwe ni ekatana." 
Ezekiel32:29 Edomi ori vale, mamwenaawe ni asitokweenaawe ootheene; ni naari ekhalaka ooweraxa, aniixaatalela vamoha ni yaale yiiviwe ni ekatana. Aniixaatalela ni oohiineliwa, vamoha ni yaawo ankuruxeliwa mulittini." 
Ezekiel32:30 Asitokweene ootheene a mpatta wa ottuttuwani ni aZidoni ootheene ari vale; awosa aakuruxeliwa mulittini esareiyeene wuulihiheya muru, yaarookhalanaru owera otannyera otteenguwa. Awosa aniixaatalela oohiineliweene vamoha ni yaawo yiiviwe ni ekatana, ni aniireya overuliwawaya vamoha ni yaawo ankuruxeliwa mulittini." 
Ezekiel32:31 Farawu* vamoha ni anakhottwaawe ootheene anaawoone ni anaapepesiwe mooyeleelanimwawe mulokwaawe wootheene, wiiviwe ni ekatana, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel32:32 Kaaroopakiharu weera owo amwaraxele otteenguwa mulaponi mwa akumi, Farawu* ni mulokwaawe wootheene eniyiixaatalele eriyari ya oohiineliwa, vamoha ni yaawo yiiviwe ni ekatana, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.”" 
Ezekiel33:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel33:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, muulume ni axunninyu ni ngweerelase: ‘Miyo, Yave, kaaruuhelaka ekatana mulaponi emoha, ni muloko wa elapo eyo wamuthanla mutthu weera akhale namalipelela," 
Ezekiel33:3 ni owo oona ekatana enrweela mulaponi, aniipa nipalapatta noowooperera muloko," 
Ezekiel33:4 vano mukina iiwa oruma wa nipalapatta ahinapwatthela woopereriwa, ni yarwa ekatana, enamwiiva, nthowa na okhwawawe, ti nawawe." 
Ezekiel33:5 Eenre owo iiwa oruma wa nipalapatta ahinapwatthela woopereriwa, nthowa na okhwawawe, ti nawawe. Owo aapwatthenle, saano iixooponleene." 
Ezekiel33:6 Vaheera namalipelela oona erwaaka ekatana, ahiniipa nipalapatta weera ooperere muloko, ni ekatana yarwa, enamwiiva mmoha a yaawosa, mulopwana owo anaakhwe niwoko na yootakhalaawe, mene kinoomoonela namalipelela okhalano nthowa na okhwa wa mutthu owo.’" 
Ezekiel33:7 Mwaana a mutthu, kohookhalihani namalipelela a muloko wa aYixrayeli; tivawo, mwiiwe maswaaka ni ngwooperere mwa Nsinanaka." 
Ezekiel33:8 Kaamweerelaka mutakhali weera vekhaikhai owo anaakhwe, ni nyuwo mwaahuuluma ni yoowo weera aceendye iphirosawe, mutakhali owo anaakhwe mwa yootakhalaawe, vaheera Miyo kinoowoonelani okhalano nthowa na okhwawawe." 
Ezekiel33:9 Vanonto, nyuwo mwamooperera mutakhali weera ahapuwe mphironimwawe, ni owo aahihapuwa, anaakhwe mwaha wa yootakhalaawe, mene nyuwo mohiivuluxa." 
Ezekiel33:10 Mwaana a mutthu, muleele muloko wa oYixrayeli: ‘Nyuwosa muneera: “Soopahulasahu ni sootthekasahu ti yoolemelaahu ni sinnoondiha seiyo. Vano moota heeni nneeraahu nikhale ni okumi?” ’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Mwaaleelase: ‘Kinlipela mwa okumaaka,’ onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, ‘khoonkisivelaru okhwa wa atakhali, kimpacera toko ohaawela weera awosa ehapuwe mphironimwaya ni ekhale ni okumi. Muhokolowase! Muhokolowase mphironimwanyu moonanara! Ii! Muloko wa oYixrayeli, muntthunela heeni okhwa?’" 
Ezekiel33:12 Tivawo, mwaana a mutthu, mwaaleele ha axunninyu: ‘Wookoleleya wa oororomeleya khoomutapuxa owo attiyamaaru, ni otakhala wa mutakhali khoommoroxa owo ahiyaleene yeeyo. Vano oororomeleya attheka, khakhala ni okumi niwoko na ororomeleyawawe wa khalayi.’" 
Ezekiel33:13 Miyo kamuroromeliha oororomeleya weera owo anaakhale ni okumi, anapaka yoonanara, khasuupuweleliwaru mitekosawe soororomeleya; owo anaakhwele yoonanara opankaawe." 
Ezekiel33:14 Miyo kamweerela mutakhali: ‘Vekhaikhai nyuwo mmwikhwe,’ vaheera owo ahiya yootthekaawe, anapaka yeeyo eri yoororomeleya ni yoowookoleleya," 
Ezekiel33:15 owo ahokoloxa yeeyo aakuxalaawe ntoko yooweemexera mookoongoranimwawe, anahokoloxa iiyalaawe, aneettela ikano simvaha okumi ahipakakaru yoonanara, vekhaikhai owo anaakhale ni okumi." 
Ezekiel33:16 Kheekhalaru yoottheka opankaawe eneera yuupuweleliwe. Owo oopaka yeeyo eri yoororomeleya ni yoowookoleleya; vekhaikhai owo anaakhale ni okumi. 
Ezekiel33:17 Wa soothesene, axunninyu aneera: ‘Ephiro ya Yave, kheehiyono yoororomeleya.’ Mene ti iphirosaya sihiroromeleiye." 
Ezekiel33:18 Oororomeleya ahiya ororomeleyawawe, anapaka yoonanara, owo anaakhwele yeeyo." 
Ezekiel33:19 Vano mutakhali ahiya yootakhalaawe anapaka yeeyo eri yoororomeleya ni yoowookoleleya, eenre apaka hiiho, onookhala ni okumi." 
Ezekiel33:20 Vanonto, ii! Muloko wa oYixrayeli, nyuwo muneera: ‘Ephiro ya Apwiya kheehiyono yoororomeleya.’ Vaheera, Miyo kinoomuthoriha khula mutthu kittharihaka mweettelowaawe.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 Vanihukuni nanaathanu na mweeri wanaamuloko wa eyaakha yanaamuloko ni piili ya otthukiwawahu, mulopwana mmoha oopongwe oYerusaleemu aahoorwa wa miyo, anakeerela: “Esidade yoomora!”" 
Ezekiel33:22 Vano oxekuwa ahinaaye ophiya mulopwana ole ntata na Yave naari mwa miyo, ni Owo aahula eyanowaaka. Hiiho, yaahuleya eyanowaaka, ni miyo nkaamaanletho." 
Ezekiel33:23 Vahoolowaya, Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel33:24 “Mwaana a mutthu, muloko onkhala mmathalani mmwe a oYixrayeli, oneera: ‘Abrahaamu aari mulopwana mmoha paahi, ni naari hiiho yoowo aakhalano elapo. Vaheera hiyo nri ancipale; vekhaikhai nnimwaakhela elapo ntoko yawihuweene.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 Vano ngweerelase weera Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: ‘Mweenre nyuwosa mukhuuraka enama ni ephomaaya, munakokhorela milukusanyu muyeehaka ephome, moota heeni muneeraanyu mukhaleno elapo?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Nyuwosa munroromela ekatana, mumpaka itthu soohiira, ni khula mutthu a nyuwosa onimvaliha mwaara a mukhwaawe. Hiiho, onootthuneya okhalano elapo?’" 
Ezekiel33:27 Mwaaleelase weera Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: ‘Kinlipela mwa okumaaka weera yaawo eniihale mmathalani, eniyiiviwe ni ekatana, yaawo ari mutuphini kinoowinnyerera wa axinama a mutuphini weera enyaanyiwe, ni yaawo antthawela moolipa ni munyattani animwiiviwa ni nihooxo." 
Ezekiel33:28 Kinootatuxa elapo nikare noothaamiwa. Kinoomaliha ikurusaya soowiixunnuwiha, ni nyaako sa oYixrayeli sinoothaamiwa moota wooweera mpaka ohikhalaru mutthu anaahaawele ovirawo." 
Ezekiel33:29 Miyo kaatatuxaka elapo nikare noothaamiwa niwoko na soopaka soohiira sootheene awosa ampakaaya, eniisuwele weera Miyo ti Yave.’" 
Ezekiel33:30 Vaheera wa nyuwo, mwaana a mutthu, axunninyu antthekulela sa nyuwo muxirini ni mmaseleni mwa impa, yeerelanaka: ‘Murwe, mwiiwe mutthenga onrweela mpatta wa Yave.’" 
Ezekiel33:31 Mulokwaaka onrwa wa nyuwo ntoko okhovelenlaaya opaka, ni onkilaathi weera wiiwe maswaanyu, mene khooneettela. Ngwuulumanimwaya ankhala ntoko oororomeleya, vaheera anghaawela owina woohiroromeleya." 
Ezekiel33:32 Wa soothesene, wa yaawosa nyuwo khaanoopwatthelani ompwaha namwiipa oniipa icipo sa osivela ni nsu nooreera ni ongwera wiipa nnenesene ekaruma ya masoma, niwoko awosa aniiwa maswaanyu, vaheera khaaneettela." 
Ezekiel33:33 Saakhumelelaka sootheene iyo – ni vekhaikhai sinookhumelela – vano, awosa anoosuwela weera aakhala maprofeeti eriyaraaya.”" 
Ezekiel34:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel34:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, mwaathaliherele otthuna wa Muluku akukhuli a oYixrayeli; mwaathalihere ni mwaaleele weera Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: ‘Ii! Akukhuli a oYixrayeli aniipwattha asineenaayaru! Weeraka khawaatthuneya weera akukhuli ekosoope mihuwo?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Nyuwosa mungwura mukaka, mungwara sa mutteengo ni mungwiiva axinama ooreerela, mene khamunkosoopa muhuwo." 
Ezekiel34:4 Nyuwosa khamulipihenre yoohilipa, hata khamulaminghe yoovoreiwa, naari khamutthunke nikhwattanaya. Nyuwosa khamuhokolonxe soothweelela naari khamwaasaanse sooriheya. Nyuwosa munuumela murima mooxililini." 
Ezekiel34:5 Tivawo iyo simwareiyaaya, niwoko khawoworu mukukhuli, ni simwareiyeene, iyo soothatuwa yooca ya axinama a mutuphini." 
Ezekiel34:6 Ikhondoolosaka sooxoraxorela mmanyaakoni ni mmattumuxani oorakamela osulu ootheene. Soomwareela elapo yootheene, ni khaawo otthukuruwenle ni aasaanse." 
Ezekiel34:7 Tivawo, akukhuli, mwiiwe masu a Yave:" 
Ezekiel34:8 Kinlipela mwa okumaaka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene: Weenre muhuwaaka ohikhalanaka mukukhuli, woohuhuliwa, onathatuwa yooca ya axinama ootheene a mutuphini, ni yeenre akukhulaaka ehitthukuruwelaka muhuwaaka, mene aniipwattha asineenaaya ohiya opwattha muhuwo," 
Ezekiel34:9 vano nyuwosa akukhuli, mwiiwe masu a Yave:" 
Ezekiel34:10 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Koowiitta akukhuli ni nthowa na oriheya wa ikhondoolo ti nawaya. Miyo kinoowaakha muteko woociha muhuwo moota wooweera akukhuli ehikhuuretho. Kinootapuxa muhuwaaka mmwaanomwaya, ni kheekhuuratho ikhondoolo." 
Ezekiel34:11 Vano, Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Yoomeene kinimwaasaasa ikhondoolosaka kikosoopeke." 
Ezekiel34:12 Miyotho kinookosoopa ikhondoolosaka ntoko mukukhuli onaasaasaawe ikhondoolo sooriheya akosoopaka muhuwo. Vanihukuni na mahutte ni epiphi Miyo kinimoopola mmapuroni moothemwene simwareenlaayamo. 
Ezekiel34:13 Miyo kinookhumiha mmilokoni sikina, kithukumanyiheke, kihokoloxaka omilokoni sikina, kiruuhelaka mulaponimwaya. Kinoociha mmanyaakoni sa oYixrayeli, mureyareyani ni mmittettheni sootheene sa elapo." 
Ezekiel34:14 Kinookosoopa seiyo moociha mooreera, ni mmanyaakoni soorakamela osulu sa oYixrayeli enookhala elapo sineeraaya sice; wu nsicewo moociha mootikanela mmanyaakoni sa oYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel34:15 Yoomeene kinookosoopa ikhondoolosaka, kihiyeke siixaatalelaka ni siitthuuwaka,onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel34:16 Kinimwaasaasa sooriheya, kihokoloxeke soothweelela. Kinootthuka sineera sivulale kilipihereke yoohilipalipa, vaheera sooneneva ni soolipa, kinoophwata. Kinoociha muhuwo moororomeleyani." 
Ezekiel34:17 Wa nyuwo, muhuwaaka, Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Kinoothoriha khula ekhondoolo ni anapunci a ikhondoolo ni anapunci a ipuri." 
Ezekiel34:18 Khawookwanneni oca mooreera? Onootthuneyatho onyikalasa mooca ohanle? Khayookwanneni owura maahi ooreera? Onootthuneyatho wuutuwanyera ni inaawo maahi ahanle? 
Ezekiel34:19 Onootthuneya muhuwaaka oca yeele nyuwosa munyikalansaanyu ni owura maahi yaale nyuwosa muutuwanyenraanyu ni inaawo? 
Ezekiel34:20 Tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene ongweerelaawe ha: Moone, Yoomeene nkithorihe eriyari ya ekhondoolo yooneneva ni yoowoonda." 
Ezekiel34:21 Mweenre mutthunya ni erutthu ni makhata, mukakhaka ikhondoolo soohilipalipa sootheene ni manyaka mpaka woomola," 
Ezekiel34:22 Miyo kinimoopola muhuwaaka, ni owo khoohuhuliwatho. Kinoothoriha eriyari ya ikhondoolo." 
Ezekiel34:23 Kinoomwiikaathi eriyaraaka mukukhuli mmoha, murumeiyaaka Davide, ni owo anaakosoope seiyo ni anaakhale mukukhulaaya." 
Ezekiel34:24 Miyo Yave, kinookhala Mulukwaaya, ni murumeiyaaka Davide anaakhale mwaana a mwene eriyari ya seiyo. Miyo Yave, kohuuluma." 
Ezekiel34:25 Kinookhaliha wiiraana wa murettele ni seiyo, kihiyeke elapo etapuxeiyeene ni axinama a mutuphini weera ikhondoolosaka siwere okhala soolipeene munikareni ni sikone moothakoni." 
Ezekiel34:26 Miyo kinooreeliha seiyo vamoha ni mapuro arukureenre nttumuxanaka. Kinoorupiha epula mweehuhunimwaya; enookhala epula ya mareeliho. 
Ezekiel34:27 Nyiri sa mutuphini nsiime soowiimasaya, etthaya eniiruwere soohephasaya, ni ootheene eniikhale oolipeene mulaponi. Awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave, kaapasaka onyooro wa opotthaaya, kaatapuxaka mmatatani mwa yaale yaahasula." 
Ezekiel34:28 Kheehuhuliwatho ni miloko, hata kheenyaanyiwa ni axinama a mutuphini. Eniikhale oolipeene, ni khaawo anaawoopopihe." 
Ezekiel34:29 Miyo kinimwaavaha elapo yoowiiwanyeyaxa ni soohephasaya, ni awosa kheevoliwatho etala mulaponi, hata kheetthebwiwa ni miloko." 
Ezekiel34:30 Hiiho, awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo Yave, Mulukwaaya, kiri ni yaawosa, ni awosa, muloko wa oYixrayeli, ti mulokwaaka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel34:31 Nyuwosa, ikhondoolosaka, mwa seiyo kinkosoopaaka, ti mulokwaaka; Miyo ti Mulukwaanyu, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.’ ”" 
Ezekiel35:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel35:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, muhuluwele omwaako Seyiri; muthaliherele otthuna wa Muluku ni mweere:" 
Ezekiel35:3 ‘Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Koowiittani, mwaako Seyiri, ni kinimootheteelani moonowaaka, koopakekeni nikare noophwatiwa." 
Ezekiel35:4 Kinootatuxa mathala isidadesanyu, ni nyuwo munoothaamiwa. Hiiho, nyuwo munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel35:5 Mweenre nyuwo mwavarexexaka wiittana wa khalayi, munawinnyerera aYixrayeli mukatanani mweehuhuni naaphiyalaaya nttaruxonaya, mweehuhuni ya ehasaraaya," 
Ezekiel35:6 tivawo kinlipelaaka mwa okumaaka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, weera kinoowinnyererani noomala, ni owo onimoottharelelani. Mweenre nyuwo muhimuthanya noomala, owo onimoottharelelani." 
Ezekiel35:7 Kinookhaliha mwaako Seyiri nikare noophwatiwa, ni mwa yoowo kinimwaamalamaliha ootheene ankhalawo ni anrowawo." 
Ezekiel35:8 Kinoosariha mmanyaakonimwanyu mittembo; oowiiviwa ni ekatana eniimorele mmattumuxanimwanyu, mureyareyanimwanyu ni mmaxaapwanimwanyu moothemwene." 
Ezekiel35:9 Kimmoophwatani wa mahuku ootheene; isidadesanyu khasimakeyaru. Hiiho, nyuwo munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel35:10 Mweenre nyuwo mweera: “Ilapo ni miloko miili iya nsikhale sawihu ni nnikuxe,” Miyo kiri weiwo," 
Ezekiel35:11 kinlipela mwa okumaaka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, weera kinimoopakelani nyuwo kittharihaka isara ni ehace moonihenraanyu mwa yaawo moosoondanimwanyu, ni kinimwiisuweliha eriyaraayasa koothorihakani nyuwo." 
Ezekiel35:12 Hiiho, nyuwo munoosuwela weera, Miyo Yave, kohiiwa itthu soonyooseya sootheene nyuwo mweerenlaanyu nyaako sa oYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel35:13 Nyuwo mookisareela wiixoona ni okuulumelawanyu kohiiwa. 
Ezekiel35:14 Vano Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Miyo kinimoophwatani elapo yootheene etthapaka." 
Ezekiel35:15 Mweenre nyuwo mwatthapa yoohiyeriwa ya muloko wa oYixrayeli yaaphwatiwaaya, kinimoopakelanitho hiiho. Ii! Mwaako Seyiri, nyuwo munoophwatiwa vamoha ni wEdomi wootheene. Hiiho, anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.’”" 
Ezekiel36:1 “Mwaana a mutthu, muthaliherele otthuna wa Muluku nyaako sa oYixrayeli, mweeraka: ‘Ii! Nyaako sa oYixrayeli, mwiiwe masu a Yave." 
Ezekiel36:2 Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: ‘Mwaha wa nyuwosa mwiittana eenre ha: “Eya! Eya! Ittuttuwa sa khalayi soothatuwa sawihu.” ’" 
Ezekiel36:3 Tivawo, muthalihere otthuna wa Muluku ni mweere weera Yave onlamula sootheene, ‘Oneera ha: Awosa yaahoophwatani, enoottharelelasani mmapuroni moothemwene, moota wooweera nyuwosa moothatuwa okhala a miloko sincipale ni ethoonyero ya mutheelelo woonanara ni ya onawunawu wootheene." 
Ezekiel36:4 Tivawo ii! Nyaako sa oYixrayeli, mwiiwe masu a Yave onlamula sootheene: Owo oneerela ha nyaako, mattumuxa, maxepa, mareyareya, mathala oophwatiwa ni isidade soothaamiwa sihuhuliwe, sinatthebwiwa ni miloko sikina sa mukhwipimwaya:" 
Ezekiel36:5 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Muhacenimwaka moopatta, kohuulumela miloko sihanle ni wEdomi wootheene, niwoko moohaawelani ni murima woonanara yaakhaliha elapwaaka okhala yawayeene, weera ehuhule mihuwosaya.’" 
Ezekiel36:6 Tivawo, muthalihere otthuna wa Muluku mwaha wa elapo ya oYixrayeli, ni mweerele nyaako, mattumuxa, maxepa ni mareyareya weera Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Kinuuluma ni ehace musaranimwaka, niwoko nyuwosa moohaawa otthebwiwa ni miloko." 
Ezekiel36:7 Tivawo Yave onlamula sootheene, oneeraawe ha: Kinlipela kitheteiyeene ntata, weera miloko sa mukhwipimwanyu nsihaawetho otthebwiwa." 
Ezekiel36:8 Vaheera nyuwosa, nyaako sa oYixrayeli, munooruwera iphandi ni soowiima wa mulokwaaka aYixrayeli, niwoko woowaakuveya owo onoohokoleela owaani." 
Ezekiel36:9 Kinootthukuruwelasani nyuwo, ni nkoowehaseni ni murima wooreera; nyuwosa mmwittipurasiwe ni mmwaaliwe," 
Ezekiel36:10 ni kinoowaandyeererasani, aani, muloko wootheene wa oYixrayeli. Isidade sinoomakiwa ni mathala anooraseliwa." 
Ezekiel36:11 Kinoowaattiha atthu ni axinama, ni awosa anooyaranasa yaatteke. Kinimwaatekiha ntoko khalayi, ni kinooweettiherelani nnene opwaha khalayi. Hiiho, nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel36:12 Nyuwosa mulokwaaka wa oYixrayeli, kinoopakiha weera muhokoleeletho mulaponimwanyu, weera mwakhalemotho. Elapo eyo enookhalatho yawinyu ni khangwiiyeratho anamwanaaya." 
Ezekiel36:13 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Yeenre atthu eweerelakani: ‘Nyuwo munaanyaanya atthu ni munooceeliha mulokwaanyu okhalano anamwane,’" 
Ezekiel36:14 vanonto, okhuma vaanaano va woorowa muhoolo, kinlamulela elapo ela weera muhaanyaanyetho atthu, hata muhaayeleelihetho anamwanaaya, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel36:15 Miyo nkitthuniheratho weera nyuwosa moone matthebwa a miloko, ni nyuwo khamuhaawatho matthebwa a miloko, hata kheemoroxa mulokwaanyu, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.”" 
Ezekiel36:16 Yave aahuulumatho ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel36:17 “Mwaana a mutthu, aYixrayeli yaakhalaaya mulaponimwaya, awosa yaavaliha elapo eyo ni mweettelowaaya ni ipakelosaya. Mweettelowaaya koonela okhala ntoko ohitteela wa muthiyana areene ni mpingu." 
Ezekiel36:18 Mwaha wa yeeyo kaahaayeehera isarasaka, niwoko awosa aayeehera ephome mulaponi ni aavaliha ni milukusaya." 
Ezekiel36:19 Miyo kaahaamwaraxela eriyari ya miloko ni awosa aamwareelamo; Miyo kohaathoriha kittharihaka mweettelowaaya ni ipakelosaya. 
Ezekiel36:20 Vano, weiwo yaarowaayaru eriyari ya miloko, awosa yaahiiriha Nsinanaka Nootteela, niwoko yeerelasiwa: ‘Ola muloko wa Yave, mene waarookhalaru hiiho, waatthuneya okhuma mulaponi yaavahiwaaya ni Yave.’" 
Ezekiel36:21 Kaatthukuruwela Nsinanaka Nootteela, mwa nenne nihiirihiwe ni muloko wa oYixrayeli eriyari ya miloko yaarowaaya." 
Ezekiel36:22 Tivawo, muleele muloko wa oYixrayeli weera Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: ‘Ii! Muloko wa oYixrayeli, khanihiyono nthowananyu kineeraaka kipakele itthu iyo, mene niwoko na Nsinanaka Nootteela nyuwosa muhiirihalaanyu eriyari ya miloko mwaarowaanyu." 
Ezekiel36:23 Kinimoonihera otteela wa Nsinanaka Nootteela nihiirihiwe eriyari ya miloko, Nsina muhiirihalaanyu eriyaraaya. Miyo kiixooniheraka ootteela mwa nyuwosa vamaithoniwaya, miloko sinoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel36:24 Vano Miyo kinimoovenxani eriyari ya miloko, kinimoothukumanyihani eriyari ya ilapo sootheene, koohokoloxerekeni elapwaanyu." 
Ezekiel36:25 Kinimoomiserani maahi ooreera ni munootteela; Miyo kinimoocapani ohitteelawanyu wootheene ni wa milukusanyu sikina sootheene. 
Ezekiel36:26 Kinimoovahani murima munyowani kiheleke mwa nyuwo munepa munyowani; kinimoovenxani murima wa nluku koovahasekeni wa ethai. 
Ezekiel36:27 Kinoohela wa nyuwosa Munepaaka, kipakiheke weera muttharihe ikanosaka ni mwiiwelele oororomeleyeene Malamulowaaka." 
Ezekiel36:28 Nyuwosa munookhala mulaponi kaavanghaaka makholowaanyu; nyuwosa munookhala mulokwaaka, ni Miyo kinookhala Mulukwaanyu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Miyo kinimoovuluxani moohitteelanimwanyu wootheene. Kinooromola irooro sittupeke, ni nkooruuhelasani etala." 
Ezekiel36:30 Kinimwaandyeerera soowiima sa nyiri, ni soohepha sa mmatta, moota wooweera nyuwo khamuhaawatho wuulihiheya muru eriyari ya miloko niwoko na etala." 
Ezekiel36:31 Hiiho, nyuwosa mmuupuwelele iphirosanyu soonanara ni ipakelosanyu sootakhala, ni munimwiixeettiha murima niwoko na sootakhalasanyu ni ipakelosanyu soohiira." 
Ezekiel36:32 Kintthuna weera nyuwosa musuwele weera nkimpakela yeeyo mwaha wa nyuwosa, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene. Muulihiheye muru ni mwiiyevihe niwoko na mweettelowaanyu, ii! Muloko wa oYixrayeli!" 
Ezekiel36:33 Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Vanihukuni kineeraaka kicape sootthekasanyu sootheene, kinookhaliha isidadesanyu, ni mathala anooraseliwa." 
Ezekiel36:34 Elapo yoophwateya enoolimmwa; kheepwaherera yoophwateyeene vamaithoni wa ootheene eniivirewo. 
Ezekiel36:35 Awosa eniyeere: “Elapo ela yaari yoophwateyeene, yoothatuwa ntoko nttimbe na wEdeni; isidade saari mathalaru, sookurumuwa ni soophwateya, vano soolipihiwa ni soomakiwa.”" 
Ezekiel36:36 Vano miloko sineera sikhale mukhwipimwanyu, ni sineera sihakalale nsisuwele weera Miyo Yave koorasela yaaphwatiwe, kinaphatteya yooheleya nthala. Miyo Yave, kohuuluma ni kinoopaka yeeyo.’" 
Ezekiel36:37 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Kinimwaakhulelatho wiidyoonttelela wa muloko wa oYixrayeli, kipakelaka ha: Kinootatuxa mulokwaaya woowaattaxa ntoko ikhondoolo," 
Ezekiel36:38 ni ntoko mihuwo soowaatta sinronghiwa wooveleeliwani wa ifesta soothanliwa sa oYerusaleemu. Mooteene yoowo isidade sihanle mathalaru, sinoosareya mihuwo sa atthu. Hiiho, awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.”" 
Ezekiel37:1 Ntata na Yave naari ni miyo, ni mwa Munepaawe, Owo aakirongha mureyareyani noosareya makhuva." 
Ezekiel37:2 Owo aakeetteettiha, ni kaawera woona weera makhuva yaahaattaxa mureyareyani, ni weera makhuva ale yaahuumaxa." 
Ezekiel37:3 Owo aakikoha: “Mwaana a mutthu, makhuva ala anooweratho okhala ni okumi?” Miyo kaamwaakhula: “Ii! Yave onlamula sootheene, ti Nyuwo paahi musuwenle.”" 
Ezekiel37:4 Vano Owo aakeerela: “Muthalihere otthuna wa Muluku makhuva ala ni mweerele: ‘Makhuva oowuuma, mwiiwe masu a Yave!" 
Ezekiel37:5 Yave onlamula sootheene oneerela ha makhuva ala: Kinoopakiha weera iphumu sivolowe mwa nyuwo, ni nyuwosa munookhalano okumi." 
Ezekiel37:6 Kinoohela mwa nyuwosa misemba, kihuruweleke ni ethai vamoha ni exapala; kinoohela iphumu mwa nyuwosa, ni nyuwosa munookhalano okumi. Hiiho, nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.’”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Vano Miyo kaathalihera otthuna wa Muluku kittharihaka yeeyo kilamuleliwaaka. Kithaliherakaru hiihaale, waakhala munyakunyaku, aani, onyakuleleyaxa ni makhuva, ni awo yaattombaanyereya." 
Ezekiel37:8 Kaaweha, ni makhuva yaahuruweleya ni misemba, ethai ni exapala, mene khasaarimo iphumu." 
Ezekiel37:9 Woottharelana, Owo aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, muthalihere iphumu otthuna wa Muluku, ni mweerele weera Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: ‘Ii! Iphumu, murwe okhuma mattuumba maxexe a ipheyo, ni mwiiseelele mpuwa wa anamakhwa ala, weera ekhaleno okumi.’”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Kaathalihera otthuna wa Muluku ntoko Owo okilamulenlaawe, ni iphumu saavolowa mwa yaawo; awo yaahaakhela okumi, eneemela. Vano yaari anakhotto ancipale." 
Ezekiel37:11 Vano Owo aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, makhuva ala ti muloko wootheene wa oYixrayeli. Awosa aneera: ‘Makhuvaahu ahuuma ni owehererawahu woolakaseya; vano, noomalamalihiwa.’" 
Ezekiel37:12 Tivawo, muthalihere otthuna wa Muluku ni ngweerele weera Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Ii! Mulokwaaka, kinimuuhula mahiyaanyu, kikhumihekemo; kinoohokoloxera mulaponi mwa oYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel37:13 Vano, kuuhulaka mahiyaanyu, kinookhumihasanimo ni nyuwosa, mulokwaaka, munoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel37:14 Kinoohela Munepaaka mwa nyuwosa, ni munookhala ni okumi ni Miyo kinimootekihasani mulaponimwanyusa. Hiiho, nyuwosa munoosuwela weera Miyo, Yave, kaahuuluma, kinapaka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.”" 
Ezekiel37:15 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel37:16 “Mwaana a mutthu, mukuxe ekopo emoha ni mulepe: ‘Ekopo ya Yuda ni ootheene ari awawe.’ Vano mukuxe yanaaveeli, mulepe: ‘Ekopo ya Efrayimi, eri ya Yoseefe ni ya muloko wootheene wa oYixrayeli ari awawe.’" 
Ezekiel37:17 Muthukumanyihe mukoponi emoha weera eyo ekhale emoha paahi mmatatanimwanyu. 
Ezekiel37:18 Axunninyu yookohakani, yeeraka: ‘Nyuwo khamunnileela etaphulelo ya yeela?,’" 
Ezekiel37:19 mwaaleelase weera Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Kinookuxa ekopo eri mmatatani mwa Efrayimi, eri ya Yoseefe ni ya ipuumba sikina iyo sa oYixrayeli siri sawawe, kitakanseke ni ekopo ya Yuda. Hiiho, kinookhaliha ekopo emoha paahi, ni iyo sinoothatuwa emoha paahi mmatatanimwaka." 
Ezekiel37:20 Mvarele ikopo vamaithoniwaya, mwa seiyo nyuwo mulempaanyu," 
Ezekiel37:21 ni mwaaleelase weera Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Kinimwaakhumiha aYixrayeli mmilokoni arongwaayamo. Kinimwaathukumanyihasa mmapuroni moothemwene yaarukureenre, kaahokoloxereke mulaponimwaya." 
Ezekiel37:22 Miyo kinimwaapaka muloko mmoha paahi wa mulaponi, mmanyaakoni sa oYixrayeli. Wa yaawosa anaakhale mwene mmoharu paahi, ni khasirwa sikhalatho miloko miili, ni iyotho khasikawanyeya omwene miili." 
Ezekiel37:23 Khayiivalihasatho ni milukusaya vamoha ni icaambulosaya sa mwiikho hata wakhalaru ovaanya, niwoko Miyo kinoowoopola moohapuwanimwaya wootthekeya wootheene, kaatteeliheke. Awosa anookhala mulokwaaka ni Miyo kinookhala Mulukwaaya." 
Ezekiel37:24 Murumeiyaaka Davide, anaakhale mwenaaya, ni ootheene awo eniikhaleno mukukhuli mmoharu. Eniyeettele malamulowaaka, yiipasoopaka wiiwelela ikanosaka." 
Ezekiel37:25 Eniikhalase mulaponi kimvanghaaka murumeiyaaka Yakobe, elapoweene yeeyo yaakhalaaya makholowaaya. Awosa vamoha ni anamwanaaya, mpakatho osuulwaaya eniikhalewo wa mahuku ootheene, ni murumeiyaaka Davide onookhala mwaana a emwenaaya wa mahuku ootheene." 
Ezekiel37:26 Kinookhaliha wiiraana wa murettele ni yaawosa; onuukhale wiiraana woohimala. Miyo kinimwaalipiha, kiwaandyeerereke, ni kinimwiikaathi eriyaraayasa Nipuronaka Nootteela*." 
Ezekiel37:27 Wookhalawaka onuukhale ni yaawosa; Miyo kinookhala Mulukwaayasa ni awosa anookhala mulokwaaka. 
Ezekiel37:28 Vano, Nipuronaka Nootteela* naakhalaka eriyaraayasa mahuku ootheene, miloko nsisuwele weera ti Miyo Yave, kinaatteeliha aYixrayeli.”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Yave aahuuluma ni miyo, eeraka:" 
Ezekiel38:2 “Mwaana a mutthu, muhuluwele wa Gogi, a elapo ya oMagoge, mutokweenexa a oMeseke ni a oTubali; munthaliherele otthuna wa Muluku" 
Ezekiel38:3 ni mweere weera Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Ii! Gogi, mutokweenexa a oMeseki ni oTubali, koowiittani." 
Ezekiel38:4 Kinimoorukureerihani, kinoohoma ni nimeso ettwattwaraanyu, kookhumihekeni vamoha ni anakhottwaanyu ootheene – ikavalusanyu*, ni anamweettihaaya vamoha ni ikapwitthisaya ni nakupa mutokotoko akuxaleene ixikudu* itokweene ni ikhaani, ootheene awo evukhulaka ikatanasaya." 
Ezekiel38:5 aPersiya, aKuxe ni aLibiya eniikhalase ni yaawo – ootheene awo ekuxaleene ixikudu* ni ikapaseti." 
Ezekiel38:6 Anakhotto a ilapo sa oGomeri ni oBeti – Togarema, muxerexere wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani, waahiya asilopwana ancipale a ilapo sikina." 
Ezekiel38:7 Mwiireherere; mukhale oolikaneene, nyuwo ni nakupa ootheene oorukureenreni, ni mukhale muhoolelaaya." 
Ezekiel38:8 Eviraleene mahuku mancipale kimmoolamulelani weera mwavoleele elapo ohokoloxeriwaayawo muloko okhumaka okhottoni. Vano muloko ole waathukumanyiwa ni miloko sincipale mmanyaakoni sa oYixrayeli, saathaamiwe wa ehuhu yincipale. Vaheera ootheene yaawosa anookhalawo oolipeene, evenxiweene eriyari ya miloko." 
Ezekiel38:9 Nyuwo, anakhottwaanyu ootheene ni miloko sincipale siri ni nyuwo, munoorowa, mweettaka ntoko ettheku; nyuwo mmwikhale ntoko nihutte nikuttelelaka elapo." 
Ezekiel38:10 Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Nihuku nno, munookhalano soowuupuwela mmurumwanyu, mukhalaneke yoovaanela yootakhala." 
Ezekiel38:11 Nyuwo mmweere: ‘Kinoovoleela elapo ya mittetthe soohilipa; kinoowanano muloko wa murettele ni ohinghovelaru etthu, mwa weiwo onkhalaayawo musidadeni soohitekeleliwa, soohikhalano masele ni anampattika." 
Ezekiel38:12 Kinoohuhula, kikuxeke, ni kinootheteela ntatanaka mathala araseliwe nitho muloko othukumanne eriyari ya ilapo, mwa yoowo okhalananxe mihuwo ni mihakhu sincipale, okhalaka eriyari ya elapo.’" 
Ezekiel38:13 Xeba, Dedani ni ananakoso a oTaresisi vamoha ni amakaaya ootheene anooweerelani: ‘Nyuwo murweenle okuxa soohuhula? Munthukumanenle nakupa ola weera munghuhule, murowanaka eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa, mukuxaka muhuwo ni sooreela ni mwaakamelaka sooreela sincipale?’" 
Ezekiel38:14 Tivawo mwaana a mutthu, munthalihere otthunawaka ni mmweerele Gogi: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Nihuku nno, mulokwaaka aYixrayeli waakhalaka woolipeene, weeraka nyuwo khamoona yeeyo?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Nyuwo munoorweela vanipuroniwanyu, mmwiinanoni wa ottuttuwani, muhooliwaka ni miloko sincipale, ootheene awo ewenleene ikavalu*, aani, nakupa mutokotoko ni anakhotto oowaattaxa." 
Ezekiel38:16 Nyuwo mmwaathataanele aYixrayeli, mulokwaaka, ntoko nihutte ninkhuneela elapo. Ii! Gogi, mmahukuni a muhoolo, kinimooruuhani weera ngwaneno elapwaaka, weera miloko sikisuwele Miyo kiixooniheraka ootteeleene mwa nyuwo vamaithoniwaya." 
Ezekiel38:17 Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: ‘Weeraka nyuwo khamuhiyono yoole kaamuhimaaka mmahukuni avinre, mwa arumeiyaaka, maprofeeti a oYixrayeli? Ehuhuweene yeele, awosa yaathalihera otthuna wa Muluku iyaakha sincipale weera Miyo kaamooruuhani weera mwaawaneno aYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel38:18 Yeeyo eniikhumelele nihuku nno, ti ela: Gogi aawananaka aYixrayeli, onyoonyiwawaka onootannyeya, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel38:19 Kinghima muhacenimwaka ni moonyoonyiwanimwaka, weera ehuhuweene yeeyo onookhala otetereya otokotoko mulaponi mwa oYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel38:20 Ihopa sa mphareiya, ipalame sa wiirimu, axinama a ntuphini, soopattuxiwa siniipurula sootheene ni atthu ootheene anoothukumela vamaithoniwaka. Nyaako sinoopittuwa, nyala sinoophweeya ni ixiri sootheene sinoopittuwa." 
Ezekiel38:21 Kinoolattula ekatana weera engwaneno Gogi mmanyaakonimwaka moothemwene,’ onghima Yave onlamula sootheene. Khula mutthu onookuxa ekatana angwananeke munneiye." 
Ezekiel38:22 Kinoomuthorihela yoowo nihooxo ni oyeehiwa wa ephome; kinoorupiha epula yookumburula, ya maralala ni enxofre* enoompattela yoowo vamoha ni anakhottwaawe ni miloko sincipale sineera sikhale ni yoowo." 
Ezekiel38:23 Hiiho, kinimoonihera otokweenaaka ni otteelawaka, kiisuweliheke mmilokoni sincipale. Vano awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave.’”" 
Ezekiel39:1 “Mwaana a mutthu, munthaliherele Gogi otthuna wa Muluku ni mweere: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Ii! Gogi, mutokweenexa a oMeseki ni oTubali, koowiittani." 
Ezekiel39:2 Kinimoorukureerihani, koopurulekeni; Miyo kinimooruuhani kookhumihakani omwiinanoni wa ottuttuwani, koorumihelekeni mmanyaakoni sa oYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel39:3 Vano, kinimwintaka muura ori muntatanimwanyu noothiyana, kimoroxeke nyuupasanyu siri muntatanimwanyu noolopwana." 
Ezekiel39:4 Nyuwo vamoha ni anakhottwaanyu ootheene ni miloko sineera sikhale ni nyuwo munoomorela mmanyaakoni sa oYixrayeli. Kinoopakiha weera erutthwaanyu eciwe ni moota wootheene wa marepo mpakatho axinama a ntuphini. 
Ezekiel39:5 Nyuwo munoomorela vanlakalakani, niwoko Miyo kohuuluma, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel39:6 Kinoomurumihela mooro Magoge ni yaawo ankhala oolipeene muxerexere ephareiya, ni awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave." 
Ezekiel39:7 Kinoosuweliha Nsinanaka Nootteela eriyari ya mulokwaaka aYixrayeli. Nkihiyatho nihiirihiwaka Nsinanaka, ni miloko sinoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave, Ootteela a oYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel39:8 Nneera niphiyaka! Vekhaikhai enimweereya, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene. Nna ti nihuku kaahimalaaka." 
Ezekiel39:9 Vano, yaawo eniikhale musidadeni sa oYixrayeli, anookhuma, evareleke muteko ikapwitthi ntoko yoopattihera ni ehiseke – ixikudu* ikhaani ni itokweene, nyuura ni nyuupa, ikopo sa mukhottoni ni mavaka. Anoovarela muteko ntoko yoopattihera mweehuhuni ya iyaakha ithannapiili." 
Ezekiel39:10 Khootthuneya wa yaawo waasa ikhuuni ntuphini, naari othikila moothakoni, niwoko awosa anoovarela muteko ikapwitthi ntoko yoopattihera. Awosa animwaahuhula yaawo yaahuhunle, yaakuxeke yaawo yaakunxe, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel39:11 Nihuku nno, kinoomvaha Gogi nihiye oYixrayeli, mureyareyani na yaawo amvira erowaka mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wookela ophareiyani. Nno nnoowala ephiro ya anamweetta, niwoko Gogi ni mikuttulasawe sootheene sa anakhotto anoovitheliwawo. Tivawo oneeraaya wiitthaneliwewo oHamoni–Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:12 Mweehuhuni ya nyeeri mithannamiili muloko wa oYixrayeli onimwaavitha weera elapo etteelihiwe. 
Ezekiel39:13 Muloko wootheene wa mulaponi onimwaavitha, ni vanihukuni kineeraaka kivuwihiwe nnimwaakhalela nihuku noowuupuwelela, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel39:14 Anoothanliwa asilopwana weera eviravire mulaponi ni yaavithe yaawo eneera ehale vatthayani. Awosa animwaasa mittembo iyo wa nyeeri mithannamiili. Hiiho, elapo enootteelihiwa." 
Ezekiel39:15 Yaaviraviraka mulaponi, ni mmoha a yaawosa oona nikhuva na mutthu, aheleke ekanyero muxerexeremwaya mpaka anamathipa eneeraaya evithele mureyareyani na oHamoni–Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:16 Enookhalawotho esidade eneera yiitthaneliwe nsina na “Hamona.” Hiiho, awosa anootteeliha elapo.’" 
Ezekiel39:17 Mwaana a mutthu, Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Mwiitthane moota wootheene wa ipalame ni axinama ootheene a ntuphini: ‘Ekhumase mmapuroni moothemwene yaarukureenre ni ethukumanele yooveleela kinoorehererelasaakani, yooveleela etokotoko mmanyaakoni sa oYixrayeli. Wu, nyuwosa munookhuurawo enama ni munoowura ephome." 
Ezekiel39:18 Munookhuura enama ya aweri ni munoowura ephome ya asitokweene a mulaponi ekhalaka ntoko anapunci a ikhondoolo, eputtiputthi, ipuri ni imombe ilopwana – ootheene awo ereene axinama ooneneva a oBaxani." 
Ezekiel39:19 Yooveleela kinoorehererelasaakaniwo, nyuwosa munookhuura makhura mpaka woohurukani ni munoowura ephome mpaka woohapalani." 
Ezekiel39:20 Vameesaniwaka nyuwosa munookhuura enama ya ekavalu* ni anamweettihaaya, enama ya atthu ooweraxa ni ya anakhotto moota moota,’ onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel39:21 Kinimoonihera ovuwawaka eriyari ya miloko, ni miloko sootheene sinimoona nttaruxo kineeraaka kiruuhe ni ntata kineeraaka kiwiikaatherase." 
Ezekiel39:22 Okhuma nihuku nno woorowa ohoolo, aYixrayeli anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave, Mulukwaaya." 
Ezekiel39:23 Hiiho, miloko sinoosuwela weera aYixrayeli arongheliwe wootthukiwani elapo ekina niwoko na sootakhalasaya, yeenre ehiroromeleya wa Miyo. Tivawo kaahulungwaaka kinawinnyerera mmatatani mwa amwiittanaaya, ni awosa ootheene ahiiviwa ni ekatana." 
Ezekiel39:24 Kohaapakela yaawosa, kittharihaka ohitteelawaya ni mwaha wa sootthekasaya, kinaahuluwa." 
Ezekiel39:25 Tivawo oneeraawe ha Yave onlamula sootheene: Vano kinoomuhokoloxa Yakobe wootthukiwani elapo ekina ni kinoomorela ikharari muloko wootheene wa oYixrayeli, kaakhaleleke nthiti mwa Nsinanaka Nootteela." 
Ezekiel39:26 Awosa anoottiwala wuulihiheya muru yaarinaaya, ni ohiroromeleya wootheene akoonihenraaya yaakhalaaya oolipeene mulaponimwaya ahikhalaka oowoopopiha." 
Ezekiel39:27 Miyo kaahokoloxaka mmilokoni ni kaathukumanyihaka eriyari ya ilapo sa amwiittanaaya, Miyo kinimwiixoonihera ootteela mwa yaawosa vamaithoni wa miloko sincipale." 
Ezekiel39:28 Hiiho, awosa anoosuwela weera Miyo ti Yave, Mulukwaaya, niwoko kaarimwaarumihelaru wootthukiwani elapo ekina eriyari ya miloko, Miyo kinimwaathukumanyiha mulaponimwaya, kihimuhiyakaru ottuli naari mmoha a yaawosa." 
Ezekiel39:29 Nkaahuluwatho, niwoko kinooyeehera Munepaaka muloko wa oYixrayeli, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.”" 
Ezekiel40:1 Ompacereroni wa eyaakha yanaamiloko miili niithanu ya wootthukiwani elapo ekina, epaceraka eyaakha, vanihukuni nanaamuloko na mweeri, vayaakhani yanaamuloko niixexe emonreene esidade, nihuku nenenenne, ntata na Yave naari mwa Miyo, ni Owo aakironghawo." 
Ezekiel40:2 Mmooneloni wa Muluku, Owo aakikunxe elapo ya oYixrayeli ni aakiikaathi vamwaakoni woorakamela osulu, mwa yoowo mpattaaya wa ohitto, saakhala impa saalikana ni esidade." 
Ezekiel40:3 Owo aakironghawo, ni kaamoonawo mulopwana aalikana ni ebronze*; owo eemenle vamulako avarenleene mukhoyi wa eliinyu* ni ekopo yooringelano." 
Ezekiel40:4 Owo aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, ngwehexexe nnenesene ni mukhale oolikaneene wiiwa, ni ngwehexexe nnenesene sootheene kineeraaka kiwoonihereni, niwoko muruuheliwe yeeyo. Muthalihere muloko wa oYixrayeli sootheene muneeraanyu moone.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Kaahoona exiri yaarince woomalela nipuro na Empa ya Muluku. Orakama wa ekopo yooringelano aakunxaawe mulopwana waari imeetru* tthaaru. Owo aaringa exiri yaarino imeetru* tthaaru sa mwiittaaya, ni imeetru* tthaaru orakamelawaya osulu." 
Ezekiel40:6 Vahoolowaya aarowa vamulako waari mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Aawela ixikadasaya, anaringa mpatta wa vathi wa nsele ni orakamawaya waari imeetru* tthaaru." 
Ezekiel40:7 Isaala sa anamalipelela saarino imeetru* tthaaru mweerakameloni ni mweekhuveeloni, ni ixiri saasuka saari eriyaraaya saarino mwiitti wa imeetru* piili ni eriyari ya emeetru*. Mpatta wa vathi wa nsele, muxerexere wa mpithela* waawehana Empa ya Muluku, waarino imeetru* tthaaru sa othanuwawaya." 
Ezekiel40:8 Vahoolowaya owo aaringa nipithela* na mulako mutokweene; 
Ezekiel40:9 naarino imeetru* ixexe wunnuwawaya, ni mwiitti wa amarimbwaaya waarino emeetru* emoha. Mpithela* wa mulako mutokweene waawehana ni Empa ya Muluku." 
Ezekiel40:10 Saakhala isaala tthaaru sa anamalipelela wa mipatta soomiili sa mulako wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Sootthaaru saarino muringo mmohamoharu, ni mwiitti wa amarimbwaaya waarino muringo mmohamoharu." 
Ezekiel40:11 Woottharelana, owo aaringa mweekhuveeloni wa nsele na mulako; waarino imeetru* ithanu, ni mweerakamelonimwaya waarino imeetru* ithannamosa ni eriyari ya emeetru*." 
Ezekiel40:12 Ohoolo wa khula esaala ya anamalipelela, yaakhala exiri, orakamelawaya osulu waari wa eriyari ya emeetru* emoha, ni isaalasene seiyo saamulikanela sikhalanaka imeetru* tthaaru wa khula mpatta." 
Ezekiel40:13 Vahoolowaya owo aaringa mulako okhuma vanipathoni na esaala emoha mpaka nipatho na esaala yaawehanaaya; orakamelanawaya waari imeetru* muloko ni piili ni eriyari ya emeetru* okhuma nlaka na esaala emoha mpaka nlaka naawehanaayano. 
Ezekiel40:14 Aaringa orakama wa osuka wa ixiri sa mpuwa wa mipatta sootheene sa mpuwa wa mulako; waari imeetru* miloko miraru ni piili. Orakamawaya waaphiya mpithela* woorowa vanipuwani. 
Ezekiel40:15 Orakamelana okhuma vamulako wa mpatta wa omokoni mpaka mpithela* wa mulako wa mpuwa, waarino imeetru* miloko miili niithanu." 
Ezekiel40:16 Isaala ni ixiri sa osukawaya wa mulako saalipeleliwa ni malaka oophureya erukureeriweene ni hiihotho mpithela*. Malaka awo ootheene yaaweha mpuwa. Amarimbwaaya yaacaambuliwa mavare. 
Ezekiel40:17 Vahoolowaya, aakirongha vanipuwani na omokoni. Kahoonawo ikwaartu ni yoonyikalela yaapakiwe erukureerihiwaka nipuwa nootheene; wa yoonyikalela yootheene saakhalamo ikwaartu miloko miraru." 
Ezekiel40:18 Yoonyikalela ele yaari muxerexere milako ni mweekhuveelonimwaya waamulikanela ni mweerakamelonimwaya. Eyo yaari yoonyikalela ya vathi vathi. 
Ezekiel40:19 Woottharelana, owo aaringa orakama wa mpatta wa mpuwa wa mulako wa vathi vathi mpaka omokoni wa nipuwa na mpuwa. Waarino imeetru* miloko mithanu ni imeetru* tthaaru – mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa nitho mpatta wa ottuttuwani." 
Ezekiel40:20 Vahoolowaya aaringa mweerakameloni ni mweekhuveeloni wa mulako ori mpatta wa ottuttuwani omvoleeliwa nipuwa na omokoni. 
Ezekiel40:21 Isaalasaya – tthaaru wa khula mpatta, amarimbwaaya ni mapithela* yaamulikanela mweerakameloni wa mulako woopacera. Waarino imeetru* miloko miili niithanu mweerakameloni, ni imeetru* muloko ni piili ni eriyari ya emeetru* mweekhuveeloni." 
Ezekiel40:22 Malakaaya, mapithelaaya* ni moophwanelihiwamwaya ni mavare, waamulikanela ni mulako owenghe mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Saakhala ixikada ithannapiili woorowa weiwo, ni mpithelamwaya* waawehana ni seiyo." 
Ezekiel40:23 Waakhala mulako waavoleeliwa vanipuwani na mpuwa waawenghe mulako wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani, mpakatho waari mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Owo aaringa mulako waawehanaayano; waarino imeetru* miloko mithanu ni imeetru* tthaaru." 
Ezekiel40:24 Vahoolowaya aakirongha mpatta wa ohitto, ni kaahoonawo mulako waawehana mpatteene yoowo. Owo aahaaringa amarimbwaaya ni mapithelaaya*, ni awo yaamulikanela ni makinaawo." 
Ezekiel40:25 Mulako ole ni nipithelanaya* saakhalano malaka oophureya mukhwipimwaya, ntoko malaka a milako sikina iye. Saarino imeetru* miloko miili niithanu mweerakameloni ni mweekhuveeloni saari imeetru* muloko ni piili ni eriyari ya emeetru*." 
Ezekiel40:26 Saakhala ixikada ithannapiili woorowa weiwo, ni nipithelanaya* naawehana ni seiyo; amarimbwaaya yaaphwanelihiwa ni mavare wa khula mpatta." 
Ezekiel40:27 Mpakatho nipuwa na mpuwa naakhalano mulako waaweha mpatta wa ohitto, ni owo aaringa okhuma mulako ole mpaka mulako wa omokoni wa mpatta wa ohitto; saari imeetru* miloko mithanu ni imeetru* tthaaru." 
Ezekiel40:28 Woottharelana, owo aakirongha vanipuwani na mpuwa akivirihaka vamulako wa mpatta wa ohitto, anaringa mulako owo; miringosaya saamulikanela ni miringo sikina." 
Ezekiel40:29 Isaalasaya, amarimbwaaya ni nipithelanaya*, miringosaya saamulikanela ni sikina iyo. Mulako owo ni nipithelanaya*, saakhalano malaka mukhwipimwaya. Mweerakamelonimwaya saari imeetru* miloko miili niithanu, ni mweekhuveeloni imeetru* muloko ni piili ni eriyari ya emeetru*." 
Ezekiel40:30 Mapithela* yaavoleeliwa mukhwipi wa nipuwa na mpuwa, mweekhuveelonimwaya yaarinotho imeetru* muloko ni piili ni eriyari ya emeetru* ni othanuwawaya waari imeetru* piili ni eriyari ya emeetru*." 
Ezekiel40:31 Nipithelanaya* naaweha mpatta wa onipuwani na omokoni, amarimbwaaya yaaphwanelihiwa ni mavare, ni ixikada ithannatthaaru saaweliwa mpaka vaavaawo." 
Ezekiel40:32 Vahoolowaya owo aakirongha vanipuwani na mpuwa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, anaringa mulako; miringosaya saamulikana ni sikina iye." 
Ezekiel40:33 Isaalasaya, amarimbwaaya ni nipithelanaya*, miringosaya saamulikanela ni sikina iyo. Mulako owo ni nipithelanaya*, saakhalano malaka mukhwipimwaya. Mweerakamelonimwaya saari imeetru* miloko miili niithanu, ni mweekhuveeloni imeetru* muloko ni piili ni eriyari ya emeetru*." 
Ezekiel40:34 Nipithelanaya* naaweha mpatta wa onipuwani na omokoni; mipatta sootheene sa amarimbwaaya saaphwanelihiwa ni mavare, ni ixikada ithannatthaaru saaweliwa mpaka vaavaawo." 
Ezekiel40:35 Vahoolowaya, owo aakirongha vamulako wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani, anaringa; miringosaya, saamulikana ni sikina iye," 
Ezekiel40:36 mpakatho miringo sa isaalasaya, amarimbwaaya ni nipithelanaya*, ni saakhalano malaka mukhwipimwaya. Mweerakamelonimwaya waarino imeetru* miloko miili niithanu, ni mweekhuveelonimwaya imeetru* muloko ni piili ni eriyari ya emeetru*." 
Ezekiel40:37 Nipithelanaya* naaweha mpatta wa onipuwani na omokoni; mipatta sootheene sa amarimbwaaya saaphwanelihiwa ni mavare, ni ixikada ithannatthaaru saaweliwa mpaka vaavaawo." 
Ezekiel40:38 Ekwaartu ni mulakwaaya yaari mpithela* mwa khula mulako wa mpuwa, saarapiheliwaayawo sooveleela soohisa." 
Ezekiel40:39 Mpithela* mwa mulako, yaakhala meesa meeli wa khula mpatta, mwa weiwo siiveliwaayawo sooveleela soohisa, sooveleelela yoottheka ni sooveleelela nthowa." 
Ezekiel40:40 Vaxirini ya omokoni wa nipithela* naavoleeliwa muxerexere ixikada sa mulako wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani, yaakhala meesa meeli, ni mpatta mukina wa ixikada, yaakhalatho meesa meeli." 
Ezekiel40:41 Vano, mpatta mmoha wa mulako yaakhala meesa maxexe ni maxexetho mpatta mukina siiveliwaayawo sooveleela. Otakansa yaari meesa mathannamararu." 
Ezekiel40:42 Yaakhalatho meesa maxexe a maluku ookheriwa wa sooveleela soohisa. Khula meesa, yaarino isentimeetru* miloko mithannamiili niithanu mweerakameloni nitho mweekhuveeloni, ni isentimeetru* miloko mithanu orakamelawaya osulu. Mmo, siikaathiwa ikaruma soowiivela sooveleela soohisa ni sooveleela sikina iyo." 
Ezekiel40:43 Saakhalatho soongweyano sa mipatta miili, khula mpatta waakhalano ikatha ixexe sa mweerakamelonimwaya, saakhomeliwe vaxirini yootheene. Muteko wa meesa waari wa wiikaathi enama ya yooveleelela." 
Ezekiel40:44 Mpatta wa omokoni mwa nipuwa na mpuwa, ohinaaye ophwanya mulako wa mpuwa saakhala ikwaartu piili; mmoha waari okhwipi wa mulako wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani waaweha mpatta wa ohitto, ni mukina okhwipi wa mulako wa mpatta wa ohitto waaweha mpatta wa ottuttuwani." 
Ezekiel40:45 Owo aakeerela: “Mulako owenghe mpatta wa ohitto, ti wa asaserdoti* angwehaweha Empa ya Muluku," 
Ezekiel40:46 ni mulako owenghe mpatta wa ottuttuwani, ti wa asaserdoti* anaawehaweha altaari*. Awosa ti anamwane asilopwana a Zadoki. Ti yaawo paahi ari aLeevi eneera emwaattameleke Yave weera emurumeele ohoolowawe.”" 
Ezekiel40:47 Vahoolowaya owo aaringa nipuwa; mipattasaya sootheene saamulikanela – mweerakameloniwaya saari imeetru* miloko mithanu ni imeetru* tthaaru ni hiihotho mweekhuveelonimwaya. Vano altaari* yaari ohoolo wa Empa ya Muluku. 
Ezekiel40:48 Woottharelana aakirongha mpithela* mwa Empa ya Muluku, anaaringa amarimbwaaya; awo yaarino imeetru* piili ni eriyari ya emeetru* mweekhuveeloni wa mipatta soomiili. Mweekhuveeloni wa mulako, waarino imeetru* ithannapiili, ni ixirisaya saasuka, saarino emeetru* emoha ni eriyari ya emeetru* mweekhuveeloni wa khula mpatta." 
Ezekiel40:49 Nipithela* naarino imeetru* muloko mweerakamelonimwaya, ni imeetru* ithannapiili mweekhuveeloni. Saakhala ixikada saaweleliwa woorowa weiwo, ni amarimbu araru muxerexere wa khula nrimbu na nipithela*." 
Ezekiel41:1 Vahoolowaya, mulopwana ole aakirongha mpatta wa vaNipuroni Nootteela* na omokoni, anaaringa amarimbu; khula mpatta wa mweekhuveeloni wa nrimbu waarino imeetru* tthaaru." 
Ezekiel41:2 Mweekhuveeloni wa mulako waari imeetru* ithanu, ni khula mpatta wa ixiri saasuka, waarino imeetru* piili ni eriyari ya emeetru*. Owo aaringatho Nipuro Nootteela* na omokoni; nno naarino imeetru* miloko miili mweerakameloni ni imeetru* muloko mweekhuveeloni." 
Ezekiel41:3 Vahoolowaya, aavolowa vaNipuroni Nootteela* na mpuwa, anaaringa amarimbu a mulako; mweekhuveeloni wa khula nrimbu, waarino emeetru* emoha. Mweekhuveeloni wa mulako waarino imeetru* tthaaru ni mweekhuveeloni wa khula exiri yaasuka waarino imeetru* tthaaru ni eriyari ya emeetru*." 
Ezekiel41:4 Owo aaringa mweerakameloni wa Nipuro Nootteela* na mpuwa; naarino imeetru* muloko, ni hiihotho mweekhuveelonimwaya mpaka okhwipi wa nipuwa nootteela na omokoni. Owo akeerela: “Nna ti Nipuro Nootteelaxa*.”" 
Ezekiel41:5 Vahoolowaya aaringa exiri ya Empa ya Muluku; mwiittaaya waarino imeetru* tthaaru, ni khula ekwartu ya mukhwipi yaarukureenre Empa ya Muluku mweekhuveelonimwaya yaarino imeetru* piili." 
Ezekiel41:6 Ikwaartu sa mukhwipi saathataanyeranne impa tthaaru ni khula empa yaarino ikwartu miloko miraru. Mukerekhere exiri yootheene ya Empa ya Muluku yaakhalano soolipiherano ikwaartu sa omokoni, sihipitheeraka exiri ya Empa ya Muluku." 
Ezekiel41:7 Khula empa yoothataanyerana yaamuthanuwa opwaha ya vathi ni hiihotho ikwaartusaya sa omokoni sa Empa yootheene ya Muluku. Tivawo othanuwa wa Empa ya Yave yaapwahereraaya wunnuwawaya wa khula empa yoothataanyerana. Vano yoowelanowaaya yaakumanela epaceraka vathi mpaka impa soopiili sa osulu. 
Ezekiel41:8 Kaahoona weera mukhwipi wa Empa ya Muluku yootheene, aapakiwa cikhi, mwa yoowo aari mathipelo a ikwartu sa omokoni. Owo aalikana ni orakama wa ekopo yooringano; eyo tiiyo, araru." 
Ezekiel41:9 Mwiittaaya exiri ya omokoni ya ikwaartu sa omokoni waarino imeetru* piili ni eriyari ya emeetru*. Nlaka naari eriyari ya ikwaartu sa omokoni wa Empa ya Muluku," 
Ezekiel41:10 ni ikwaartu sa asaserdoti* mweekhuveelonimwaya saarino imeetru* muloko Empa ya Muluku yootheene. 
Ezekiel41:11 Saakhala milako soovoleela ikwaartu sa omokoni wookhuma vanlakani, mmoha wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani ni mukina mpatta wa ohitto; okhuveela wa nlaka waarino imeetru* piili ni eriyari ya emeetru* Empa ya Muluku yootheene." 
Ezekiel41:12 Empa yoothataanyerana ohoolo wa nipuwa na Empa ya Muluku, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, mweekhuveelonimwaya yaarino imeetru* miloko miraru ni imeetru* ithannapiili. Exiri ya empeeneyo yoothataanyerana, mwiittaaya waari imeetru* piili ni eriyari ya emeetru*, ni mweerakamelonimwaya yaarino imeetru* miloko mixexe ni imeetru* ithannapiili." 
Ezekiel41:13 Vahoolowaya owo aaringa Empa ya Muluku; mweerakamelonimwaya yaarino imeetru* miloko mithanu ni imeetru* tthaaru. Vano nipuwa na Empa ya Muluku ni impa soothataanyerana vamoha ni ixirisayatho mweerakamelonimwaya, saarino imeetru* miloko mithanu ni imeetru* tthaaru." 
Ezekiel41:14 Mweekhuveeloni wa nipuwa na Empa ya Muluku, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, vamoha ni mpatta wa ohoolo wa Empa ya Muluku, yaarino imeetru* miloko mithanu ni imeetru* tthaaru." 
Ezekiel41:15 Woottharelana owo aaringa mweerakameloni wa impa soothataanyerana saari ohoolo wa nipuwa, mpatta wa opithela wa Empa ya Muluku, vamoha ni mapithelaaya* ootekeleliwa wa khula mpatta; saarino imeetru* miloko mithanu. Nipuro Nootteela* na omokoni mpaka na mpuwa ni nipithela* naawehanne ni nipuwa," 
Ezekiel41:16 vamoha ni isereemu sootheene, ixanela ikhaanene ni mapithelaaya* ootekeleliwa mukhwipi mwa sootthaaru, sootheene saari mpatta wa omokoni, vamoha ni isereemu, saahuruweliwe etthaabwa. Waahuruweliwatho moonyikalela, exiri mpaka omakoteloni wa ixanela ni muxanelanimwene." 
Ezekiel41:17 Vakhatoni wa osulu wa mpatta wa omokoni vamulako wa Nipuro Nootteela* ni muxirini, saakhala ikhato soottharana, muxerexere wa Nipuro Nootteela* na mpuwa ni na omokoni," 
Ezekiel41:18 yaakhala akerubini* ni mavare ookheriwa. Mavare yaavaxana ni akerubini* ettharanaka esaaleeneeyo. Khula kerubini* aarino ikhove piili – 
Ezekiel41:19 ekhove ya mutthu ewengheene mavare a mpatta mmoha, ni ekhove ya mwatto ewengheene mavare a mpatta mukina. Iyo saakheriwe ixiri sootheene sa Empa ya Muluku." 
Ezekiel41:20 Okhuma vathi mpaka mpatta wa osulu wa mulako, yaakhala akerubini* ni mavare yaakheriwe muxirini wa omokoni wootheene wa Empa ya Muluku." 
Ezekiel41:21 Nipuro Nootteela* na omokoni naakhalano sinlipanaayano masele saari esikweya, ni iyo saari ohoolo wa Nipuro Nootteelaxa*, saamulikanano." 
Ezekiel41:22 Yaakhala altaari* a etthaabwa, orakamelawaya osulu yaarino emeetru* emoha ni eriyari ya emeetru*, ni khula mpatta wa altaari*, waarino emeetru* emoha; mattuumbaaya, mwettowaaya ni mipattasaya saari sa etthaabwa. Mulopwana ole, aakeerela: “Ala ti meesa ankhala ohoolo wa Yave.”" 
Ezekiel41:23 Nipuro Nootteela* na omokoni mpaka Nipuro Nootteelaxa* naakhalano masele oophitaanyiwa. 
Ezekiel41:24 Masele oomeeli yaaphitaanyiwa ni yaahuleya nikuruthu. 
Ezekiel41:25 Mmaseleni a Nipuro Nootteela* na omokoni, yaakhala akerubini* ni mavare ookheriwa moothemwenemmo, ntoko yaale yaakheriwe muxirini; saakhalatho itthaabwa soosuka ohoolo wa nipithela*." 
Ezekiel41:26 Muxirini sa omokoni wa nipithela*, saakhala ixanela sikhaani ni mavare exireeneeyo. Ikwaartu sa mukhwipi mwa Empa ya Muluku, saasukatho." 
Ezekiel42:1 Vahoolowaya mulopwana ole aakirongha mpatta wa ottuttuwani, mpaka nipuwa na omokoni, anakivolongha mmakwaartuni saawehanne nipuwa na Empa ya Muluku ni exiri ya omokoni wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani." 
Ezekiel42:2 Impa soothataanyerana mwa seiyo mulakwaaya waawenghe mpatta wa ottuttuwani, mweerakamelonimwaya waarino imeetru* miloko mithanu ni imeetru* tthaaru ni mweekhuveelonimwaya waarino imeetru* miloko miili niithannamosa." 
Ezekiel42:3 Mpatta mmoha wa ikwaartu waarakamelana imeetru* muloko okhuma nipuwa na mpuwa mpaka mpatta mukina wa soonyikalela sa nipuwa na omokoni, waatekeleliwamo ohoolo wa impa tthaaru soothataanyerana." 
Ezekiel42:4 Ohoolo wa ikwaartu waakhala woovira wa mpuwa waarino imeetru* ithanu mweekhuveeloni, ni mweerakamelonimwaya imeetru* miloko mithanu ni imeetru* tthaaru. Milakosaya saawenghe mpatta wa ottuttuwani." 
Ezekiel42:5 Vano, ikwaartu sa osulu saaphureyaxa, niwoko mootekeleliwamwaya, waathanuwaxa opwaha ikwartu sa empa ekhaani ni ya eriyari." 
Ezekiel42:6 Ikwartu sa empa yanaararu khasaarino amarimbu ntoko yaaraayano mapuwa. Tivawo, soonyikalelasaya saaraaya ikhaanene opwaha sa ikwartu sa empa ekhaanene ni ya eriyari." 
Ezekiel42:7 Yaakhala exiri ya omokoni yeereranne ni ikwartu ni nipuwa na omokoni; mweerakamelonimwaya waarino imeetru* miloko miili niithannamosa, ohoolo wa ikwaartu." 
Ezekiel42:8 Musera wa ikwaartu muxerexere ni nipuwa na mpuwa, mweerakamelonimwaya waarino imeetru* miloko miili niithannamosa, ni yoowo waakhuveenle Nipuro Nootteela*, mweerakamelonimwaya waarino imeetru* miloko mithanu ni imeetru* tthaaru." 
Ezekiel42:9 Ikwaartu sa vathi vathi, saarino mulako mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, nooneyaayawo nipuwa na omokoni." 
Ezekiel42:10 Mpatta wa ohitto, exiri yootheeneeyo ya nipuwa na omokoni, wooluluwana nipuwa na Empa ya Muluku, ni mpatta waawehanaaya ni exiri ya omokoni, saakhala ikwaartu" 
Ezekiel42:11 waaviriwaaya ohoolowaya. Saari ntoko ikwaartu sa mpatta wa ottuttuwani; saamulikanela mweerakameloni ni mweekhuveeloni, moovoleela ni munnuwelowaaya. Milako sa mpatta wa ottuttuwani" 
Ezekiel42:12 saamulikana ni milako sa ikwaartu sa mpatta wa ohitto. Waakhala mulako ompacereroni wa waavoleeliwa weereranne ni exiri yaaweha mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, mwa yoowo waavoleeliwa." 
Ezekiel42:13 Vahoolowaya, mulopwana ole aakeerela: “Ikwaartu sa mpatta wa ottuttuwani ni ohitto singwehana onipuwani na Empa ya Muluku ti ikwaartu mwa seiyo asaserdoti* ammwaattamela Yave ancaayawo sooveleela sootteelaxa. Weiwo awosa anthokorora sooveleela sootteelaxa –sooveleela sa irooro, sa soottheka ni sa nthowa, niwoko nipuro nno ti nootteela." 
Ezekiel42:14 Hiiho, asaserdoti* yaavolowaka mmapuroni ootteela, erooke paahi onipuwani na omokoni erunleene soowara amvaranaaya muteko, niwoko iyo ti sootteela. Ewareke soowara sikina ehinaaye okhuveela mapuro ohiyeriwaaya muloko.”" 
Ezekiel42:15 Mulopwana ole amalihaleene oringa seiyo saari Mpaani mwa Muluku, aakikhumihera vaate, akivirihaka vamulako wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, anaringa mukhwipimwaya moothemwene." 
Ezekiel42:16 Aaringa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa ni ekopo yooringano; waarino imeetru* macira meeli ni miloko mithannamosa. 
Ezekiel42:17 Aaringa mpatta wa ottuttuwani; waarino imeetru* macira meeli ni miloko mithannamosa, attharihaka ekopo yooringano." 
Ezekiel42:18 Aaringa mpatta wa ohitto; waarino imeetru* macira meeli ni miloko mithannamosa, attharihaka ekopo yooringano." 
Ezekiel42:19 Vahoolowaya aarowa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, anaringa; waarino imeetru* macira meeli ni miloko mithannamosa, attharihaka ekopo yooringano." 
Ezekiel42:20 Hiiho, owo aaringa ettima ya mipatta soomixexe. Mukhwipimwaya, yaakhala exiri yaarino imeetru* macira meeli ni miloko mithannamosa mweerakamalonimwaya mpakatho mweekhuveelonimwaya, amwalamwalihaka Nipuro Nootteela* ni piswa." 
Ezekiel43:1 Vano mulopwana ole aakirongha vamulako waawenghe mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa," 
Ezekiel43:2 kinoonawo ovuwa wa Muluku a oYixrayeli waarweela mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Nsunawe naalikana ni oruma wa maahi mancipale, ni elapo yaatutha ni ovuwawawe." 
Ezekiel43:3 Moonelo koonnaaka waalikana ni yoole koonnaaka Owo aarwiiyaawe ophwata esidade, ni ntokotho nyoonelo seiye koonnaaka omoolokoni Kebari; vano kaahuuramihela ekhove vathi." 
Ezekiel43:4 Ovuwa wa Yave waavolowa Mpaani mwa Muluku, oviraka vamulako waari mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa." 
Ezekiel43:5 Vano Munepa waakeemexa, onakirongha munipuwani na mpuwa, ni ovuwa wa Yave waasareya Mpaani mwa Muluku." 
Ezekiel43:6 Mulopwana ole areene mukhwipimwaka, kaamwiiwa mukina uulumaka ni miyo areene Mpaani mwa Muluku." 
Ezekiel43:7 Owo aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, nna ti nipuro na ehicaaka ya emwene ni noonyikalihera inaawosaka. Va kinookhala mahuku ootheene eriyari ya aYixrayeli. Muloko wa aYixrayeli khoovalihatho Nsinanaka Nootteela, hata aYixrayeli, naari mamwenaaya kheevaliha ni opuutaaya ni miluku soohikhalano okumi sa mamwenaaya mmattumuxanimwaya ootteeliheriwa miluku sikina." 
Ezekiel43:8 Awosa yiikaathiyaaya yoonyikalelaaya vakhiviru wa yoonyikalelaaka ni isereemusaya vakhiviru wa isereemusaka, ereene exiri emoha paahi yaakawanyiha eriyari ya Miyo ni yaawosa, yaavaliha Nsinanaka Nootteela ni soopakasaya soohiira. Tivawo kaaphwantaaka musaranimwaka." 
Ezekiel43:9 Vano, esusihase wa Miyo opuutaaya ni miluku soohikhalano okumi sa mamwenaaya, ni Miyo kinookhala ni yaawosa mahuku ootheene." 
Ezekiel43:10 Mwaana a mutthu, mulepelelele muloko wa oYixrayeli Empa ya Muluku, weera yuulihiheye muru mwa sootthekasaya. Awosa esomele mukhalelowaaya," 
Ezekiel43:11 ni yuulihiheya muru mwa sootheene apankaaya, mwaaleelase moota eraaya Empa ya Muluku – mukhalelowaaya, mookhumela ni moovoleelamwaya: Matekeliwaaya ootheene ni soolamulasaya ni ikanosaya sootheene. Mulepe itthu sootheene iyo ohoolowaya weera ettharihe ekhalelowaaya yootheene nitho ikanosaya sootheene moota woororomeleya." 
Ezekiel43:12 Vano, nlamulo na Empa ya Muluku ti nna: ettima yootheene erukureenre vasulu mwaako enookhala yootteela. Nna ti nlamulo na Empa ya Muluku." 
Ezekiel43:13 Miringo sa altaari* ti iya: Wiixera wa nlittinaya, okhaleke eriyari ya emeetru* emoha, ni mweekhuveelonimwaya, okhaleketho eriyari ya emeetru*, exoriweke mukhwipimwaya moothemwene oringiwakamo nikuphi nimoha. Orakamela osulu wa altaari*, ti wu:" 
Ezekiel43:14 Okhuma nlitti nri vathi mpaka yoosuka ekhaani, orakamelawaya osulu orino emeetru* emoha ni mweekhuveelonimwaya eriyari ya emeetru* emoha; ni okhuma yoosuka ekhaani mpaka etokweene, mweerakamelonimwaya, orino imeetru* piili ni mweekhuveelonimwaya, emeetru* emoha." 
Ezekiel43:15 Ttukuttha a altaari*, orakamelawawe osulu, orino imeetru* piili, ni mattuumba maxexe onlipanaaweno manyaka maxexe woorowa osulu." 
Ezekiel43:16 Owo onoolikanela mipatta soomixexe, mweerakamelonimwawe orino imeetru* ithannamosa mpakatho mweekhuveelonimwawe." 
Ezekiel43:17 Yoosuka etokweene, mmipattanimwayatho moothemwene onoolikanela – mweerakamelonimwaya orino imeetru* ithannapiili, mpakatho mweekhuveelonimwaya, ni exoriweke mukhwipimwaya moothemwene oringiwakamo nikuphi nimoha, wiixeera wa nlittinaya orino eriyari ya emeetru* mukhwipimwaya. Ixikada sa altaari* siwenghe mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa.”" 
Ezekiel43:18 Vano owo aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Meerelo eneera ettharihiweke saapakiwaka sooveleela soohisa ni yaamiseriwaka ephome altaari* awo eteekiweene, ti ala:" 
Ezekiel43:19 Nyuwo mwaavaheke mwaamombe asaserdoti* ari aLeevi, a emusi ya Zadoki, mwa yaawo ankhuveela weera erumeele ohoolowaka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel43:20 Nyuwo muhingeke ephomaaya ekina mmanyakani maxexe a altaari*, mmattuumbani maxexe a soosuka itokweene ni murukureeriheke mukhwipimwaya moothemwene. Hiiho, munimwaatteeliha altaari* ni munoowera waarehererela wiiwanana ni Muluku." 
Ezekiel43:21 Nyuwo munghisereke mwaamombe oomveleelela nthowa vanipuroni nithanliwe na Empa ya Muluku, mpatta wa omokoni wa Nipuro Noottela." 
Ezekiel43:22 Waaxiiye, nyuwo mumveleeleke napunci oohirakala ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka, ni altaari* etteelihiweke ntoko yaatteelihiwaaya ni mwaamombe." 
Ezekiel43:23 Mmalihaleene waatteeliha, mumveleeleke mwaamombe ni napunci a ikhondoolo a muhuwo. Soopiili iyo sikhaleke soohirakala." 
Ezekiel43:24 Nyuwo mwaaveleeleke ohoolo wa Yave, ni asaserdoti* eweeleeleke ni yaaveleeleke ntoko sooveleela soohisa wa Yave." 
Ezekiel43:25 Mmahukuni mathannameeli nyuwo munkhumiheke khula nihuku napunci ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka; munkhumiheketho mwaamombe ni napunci a ikhondoolo. Soopiili iyo sikhaleke soohirakala. 
Ezekiel43:26 Mmahukuni mathannameeli asaserdoti* ereherereke wiiwanana ni Yave wa altaari* ni yaatteeliheke; hiiho awosa animwaatteeliha. 
Ezekiel43:27 Emanleene mahuku awo, wookhuma nihuku nanaathannamararu, asaserdoti* epakeke sooveleelasanyu soohisa ni sa murettele valtaarini*. Vano Miyo kinoowaakhulelani, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene.”" 
Ezekiel44:1 Vahoolowaya, mulopwana ole aakihokoloxera vamulako wa omokoni wa Nipuro Nootteela* waawenghe mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, ni owo waari ewaleliwo." 
Ezekiel44:2 Yave aakeerela: “Mulako ola okhaleke ewaleliwo. Ohihuliweru; ahikhaleru anaavoleele. Okhaleke ewaleliwo, niwoko Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, ovoleenle vaavaawo." 
Ezekiel44:3 Akhaleke mwaana a mwene paahi aneera avolowe ni akilaathiwo weera ace vamaithoni wa Yave. Owo avoleeleke nipithela* ni akhumeleketho nenno.” 
Ezekiel44:4 Vano mulopwana owo aakirongha ohoolo wa Empa ya Muluku, niviraka vamulako wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani. Kaaweha, kinoona ovuwa wa Yave osareyaka Mpaani mwa Muluku, ni kaahuuramihela ekhove vathi." 
Ezekiel44:5 Yave aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, ngwiriyane, ngwehe ni mwiiwe nnenesene yeeyo Miyo kineeraaka kihime mwaha wa meerelo ootheene anghima sa Empa ya Yave. Ngwiriyane mavoleeliwo ni makhumeliwo ootheene a Mpaani mwa Muluku." 
Ezekiel44:6 Muleele ha muloko woovaanya wa oYixrayeli: ‘Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Ii! Muloko wa oYixrayeli, sookwana soopakasanyu soohiira!" 
Ezekiel44:7 Ohiya soopakasanyu sikina sootheene soohiira, nyuwosa moohaaruuha vaNipuronivaka Nootteela* anamarwa oohiineliwa mmurimani ni mweerutthuni, muhiirihaka Empaaka wookipakela sooveleela sa yooca, makhura ni ephome. Vano, nyuwosa moonanariha wiiraanawaka." 
Ezekiel44:8 Ohiya okwanihera sootthuneyasanyu sa itthusaka sootteelihiwa, nyuwosa mwaavanghe akina weera evareke muteko vaNipuronivaka Nootteela*." 
Ezekiel44:9 Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Ahikhaleru namarwa oohiineliwa mmurimani ni mweerutthuni aneera avolowe vaNipuronivaka Nootteela*, aani, hata vakhaani wa namarwa onkhala eriyari ya aYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel44:10 aLeevi yiirakamelihanxe ni Miyo, aYixrayeli yaahapungwaaya exoraxorelaka ottaiwaka weera elape milukusaya, sinimwaahaawiha sootakhalasaya." 
Ezekiel44:11 Awosa erumeeleke vaNipuronivaka Nootteela* ntoko anamawehaweha a milako sa Empa ya Muluku ni evareketho muteko mwemmo; ewiiveke axinama oowaapakela sooveleela soohisa ni sooveleela sikina wa muloko ni ekhaleke ohoolo wa muloko, erumeelaka." 
Ezekiel44:12 Vaheera, yeenre erumeela vamaithoni wa milukusaya, ni emoroxela mootthekani muloko wa oYixrayeli, koolipela kitheteiyeene ntata weera awosa sinimwaahaawiha sootakhalasaya, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel44:13 Awosa kheekhuveela weera ekirumeele ntoko asaserdoti*, hata kheekhuveelaru yakhalaru etthu ya sootteeliheriwasaka hoye hoye seiyo siri sootteelaxa; animwiihaawiha ni soopakasaya soohiira." 
Ezekiel44:14 Wa soothesene, Miyo kohaavaha sootthuneya sa Mpaani mwa Muluku, ni miteko sootheene sintthuneya opakamo." 
Ezekiel44:15 Vaheera asaserdoti* ari aLeevi, a ekhapira ya Zadoki, ni akwanihenre moororomeleyani sootthuneyasaka sa Nipuronaka Nootteela*, aYixrayeli yaakihingyaaya, ekhuveeleke weera erumeele ohoolowaka; awosa anookhala ohoolowaka weera epake sooveleela sa makhura ni sa ephome, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel44:16 Ti yaawo paahi eniivolowe vaNipuroniwaka Nootteela*, ni eniikhuveele vameesaniwaka weera erumeele ohoolowaka ni evare mutekwaaka." 
Ezekiel44:17 Yaavolowasaka mmilakoni sa nipuwa na mpuwa, ewareke ikuwo sa eliinyu*; ehiwareru ekuwo yoopakiwa ni mapururu a ikhondoolo yaarumeelaka mmilakoni sa nipuwa na mpuwa hoye hoye Mpaani mwa Muluku." 
Ezekiel44:18 Ewareke mmuru iturbante* sa eliinyu*, nitho campuwa a eliinyu*. Ehiwareru etthu eneera yaatannyere orettheela." 
Ezekiel44:19 Yaakhumelaka vanipuwani na omokoni, weiwo onkhalaayawo muloko, eruleke ikuwo seiyo yaarumeelaayano ni ehiyeke mukwaartuni sootteelihiwa, ni ewareke ikuwo ikina weera ehitteeliheno muloko ikuwosaya sa esaserdoti." 
Ezekiel44:20 Ehimettheru mayihi hata mayihaaya ehihiye erakamaka, mene yeere ohama paahi." 
Ezekiel44:21 Ahikhaleru musaserdoti* anaawure eviinyu aavolowaka vanipuwani na mpuwa. 
Ezekiel44:22 Awosa ehimutheleru naamukhweli hoye hoye muthiyana omwalanne ni iyawe; emutheleke paahi mwaamwali oowiikosoopa muYixrayeli, hoye hoye naamukhweli a musaserdoti*." 
Ezekiel44:23 Awosa exuttihaseke mulokwaaka ohiyana wa yootteeliheriwa ni piswa, ni yoonihereke moota wookawanyiha eriyari ya yootteela ni yoohitteela." 
Ezekiel44:24 Yakhalaru yoovaanela, asaserdoti* ekhaleke ntoko aphuki, ni olakela ottharihiweke moota wa soolakelasaka. Awosa yiiweleleke malamulowaaka ni ikanosaka ettittimiherelaka ifestasaka soothanliwa, ni epwaherereke otteeliha iSaabadusaka." 
Ezekiel44:25 Musaserdoti* ahiivaliheru niwoko na waattamela muttembo wa mukina; wa soothesene, owo iivaliheke yakhwa atithawe, amayawe, mwanawe mulopwana hoye hoye muthiyana, munneiye hoye hoye murokoriye owo aahitheliwaru." 
Ezekiel44:26 Iitteelihaleene, aweherereke mahuku mathannameeli." 
Ezekiel44:27 Vanihukuni aneeraawe avolowe vanipuwani na mpuwa wa Nipuro Nootteela* weera arumeelemo, musaserdoti* iiveleeleleke yooveleelela yoottheka, onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel44:28 Miyo kinookhala yoohiyeriwa emoharu avahiwe asaserdoti*. Nyuwosa muhaavaheru aYixrayeli yakhalaru ettima; Miyo kinookhala yoohiyeriwaaya. 
Ezekiel44:29 Awosa eceeke sooveleela sa irooro, sa yoottheka ni sa nthowa. Vano sootheene sa oYixrayeli sineera sitteeliheriwe Yave, ti sawaya." 
Ezekiel44:30 Sooreerela sootheene sa soowiima soopacera, ni micaango sootheene muneeraanyu mpake, ti sa asaserdoti*. Nyuwosa mwaavahaseke mpatta woopacera wa yooca ya irooro sooxiliwa weera ekhale mareeliho mmampaanimwanyu." 
Ezekiel44:31 Asaserdoti* ehikhuureru enama ya ipalame hoye hoye ya axinama oovettuliwa, naari oonyaanyiwa ni axinama a ntuphini.’”" 
Ezekiel45:1 “ ‘Nyuwosa mwaakawasaka elapo ntoko yoohiyeriwa, mumvaheke Yave ettima emoha ya elapo ntoko yootteelihiwa; mweerakamelonimwaya, ekhalaneke ikilomeetru* muloko ni tthaaru, ni mweekhuveelonimwaya, ekhalaneke ikilomeetru* muloko ni eriyari ya ekilomeetru* emoha; ettima yootheene eyo enookhala yootteelihiwa." 
Ezekiel45:2 Mpatta wa ettimeene yeeyo eringingwe ekhalihiweke ntoko Nipuro Nootteela*; wunnuwawaya okhaleke imeetru* macira meeli ni imeetru* miloko mithannamosa ni imeetru* piili yoolikanela khula mpatta. Mukhwipimwaya moothemwene ehikhaleke etthu wookwanaka imeetru* miloko miili niithannamosa. 
Ezekiel45:3 Mpuwa mwa elapo yootteelihiwa yeeyo, muringe mpatta mmoha wa ikilomeetru* muloko ni tthaaru mweerakamelonimwaya, ni mweekhuveelonimwaya ekhalaneke ikilomeetru* ithanu. Mmo nikhaleke Nipuro Nootteela*, aani, Nipuro Nootteelaxa*." 
Ezekiel45:4 Ela eniikhale ettima yootteelihiwa ya elapo wa asaserdoti*, mwa yaawo eniirumeele vaNipuroni Nootteela* ni eniikhuveele weera erumeele ohoolo wa Yave. Nno, nnikhale nipuro nooteka impasanyu, mpakatho Nipuro Nootteela* na Empa ya Yave." 
Ezekiel45:5 Ettima ya ikilomeetru* muloko ni tthaaru ya mweerakamelonimwaya, ni ikilomeetru* ithanu mweekhuveelonimwaya, ekhaleke ya aLeevi, mwa yaawo eniirumeele Mpaani mwa Muluku; eyo eniikhale ettimaaya wa mittetthesaya." 
Ezekiel45:6 Nyuwosa mwaavahaseke ettima ya ikilomeetru* piili ni eriyari ya ekilomeetru* emoha ya mweekhuveelonimwaya ni ikilomeetru* muloko ni tthaaru ya mweerakamelonimwaya, ntoko ettima ya musidade, ekhuveelanne ettima yootteelihiwa; eyo ekhaleke ya muloko wootheene wa oYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel45:7 Mwaana a mwene akuxeke elapo eri mmipattani soomiili sa ettima eri mulaponi yootteelihiwa ni mwa ettima ya musidade. Vano ettima emoha ekhaleke mpatta ninkela nsuwa erowaka weiwo weiwo, ni ettima ekineeyo mpatta ninkhumwa nsuwa erowakatho weiwo weiwo, wookhuma omwiinanoni wa mpatta ninkela nsuwa, mpaka omwiinanoni wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa silikanaka ni ittima sa mpuumbani." 
Ezekiel45:8 Elapo eyo enookhala yawinyuweene oYixrayeli. Vano anamwane a mamwenaaka kheehasulatho mulokwaaka, mene eniitthunihere weera muloko wa oYixrayeli okuxe elapo, ottharihaka ipuumbasaya." 
Ezekiel45:9 Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Ii! Anamwane a mamwene a oYixrayeli, nyuwosa mootepihaxa paahi! Muhiye nipuheronanyu, nihasunanyu ni mpake yeeyo eri yoororomeleya ni yoowookoleleya. Muhiyerere okuxa yeeyo eri ya mulokwaaka,’ onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel45:10 Mvarele muteko miringo soororomeleya, miphimo soororomeleya ni mwaapu woororomeleya." 
Ezekiel45:11 Mphimo ni mwaapu, silikaneleke. Waatta wa mphimo ni mwaapu okhalaneke mpatta wanaamuloko wa waatta wa ekhali ya iliitru* macira meeli ni miloko miili." 
Ezekiel45:12 Exekeli* elemeleke igrama* muloko ni piili. Ixekeli* miloko mithannamosa, sinookwana igrama* macira mathannameeli ni miloko miili.’”" 
Ezekiel45:13 “ ‘Yooveleela yootteelihiwa muneeraanyu mutteelihase ti ela: Ikiilu* tthaaru ni eriyari ya ekiilu* emoha sa khula ikiilu* macira meeli ni miloko miili sa etrigu ni hiihotho wa esevada*; 
Ezekiel45:14 mpatta woolamuleliwa wa makhura ti wanaancira sa sootheene; 
Ezekiel45:15 nitho wa khula ikhondoolo macira meeli, ekuxiweke ekhondoolo emoha mwa seiyo sincihiwa munnyepuni woopombaxa wa oYixrayeli. Sootheene iyo sivareliweke muteko wa sooveleela sa irooro, sooveleela soohisa ni sa murettele weera oreherereliwe wiiwanana ni Yave,’ onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel45:16 Muloko wootheene wa mulaponi oveleelekeno sooveleela iyo weera sivareliwe muteko ni mwaana a mwene a oYixrayeli. 
Ezekiel45:17 Ekhaleke yootthuneya ya mwaana a mwene ovaha sooveleela soohisa, sooveleela sa irooro ni sooveleela soowura mufestani, nyeeri sinyowani ni muSaabaduni, aani mufestani soothanliwa sootheene sa muloko wa oYixrayeli. Owo avaheke sooveleelela yoottheka, sa irooro, soohisa ni sa murettele weera oreherereliwe wiiwanana ni Muluku weereliwaka muloko wa oYixrayeli.’”" 
Ezekiel45:18 “ ‘Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: Vanihukuni noopacera na mweeri woopacera nyuwo munkuxeke mwaamombe oohirakala ni mutteeliheke Nipuro Nootteela*. 
Ezekiel45:19 Musaserdoti* akuxeke ephome vakhaani ya yooveleelela yoottheka ni ahingeke musereemuni mwa Empa ya Muluku, mmattuumbani maxexe a soosuka itokweene sa altaari* ni musereemuni mwa mulako wa nipuwa na mpuwa." 
Ezekiel45:20 Nyuwo mpakeketho hiiho vanihukuni nanaathannameeli na mweeri, mmweerelaka akhalaru mutthu anaattheke mweerisani hoye hoye moohisuwelani; hiiho nyuwo munooreherera wiiwanana ni Muluku mweerelaka Empa ya Muluku." 
Ezekiel45:21 Vanihukuni nanaamuloko ni maxexe na mweeri woopacera nyuwosa mpakeke efesta ya mPaska*, efesta ya mahuku mathannameeli muceeke ipaawuru soohikhalano eferementu mweehuhuweene eyo." 
Ezekiel45:22 Nihuku nno na mPaska*, mwaana a mwene amukhumiheke mwaamombe ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka iixeerelaka muneenaawe vamoha ni muloko wootheene wa mulaponi." 
Ezekiel45:23 Khula nihuku na mahuku mathannameeli awo a efesta, owo aakhumiheke aximombe athanneeli ni anapunci a ikhondoolo athanneelitho oohirakala, ntoko yoomveleelela yoohisa Yave, ni napunci ntoko yooveleelela yoottheka." 
Ezekiel45:24 Owo akhumiheke ntoko yooveleela ya irooro, ikiilu* miloko miili ni ikiilu* piili sa etrigu vamoha ni iliitru* tthaaru ni nttikha sa makhura sa khula mwaamombe ni wa khula napunci a ikhondoolo." 
Ezekiel45:25 Mweehuhuni ya mahuku mathannameeli awo a efesta empacera vanihukuni nanaamuloko ni mathanu na mweeri wanaathannamiili, owo aruuheke soovahasene seiyo wa sooveleelela yoottheka, soohisa ni sa irooro vamoha ni makhura.’”" 
Ezekiel46:1 “ ‘Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Mulako wa nipuwa na mpuwa owenghe mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, okhaleke ewaleliwo mmahukuni mathannamosa ootthuneyaxa, vaheera vanihukuni na eSaabadu ni nihuku na mweeri munyowani ohuliweke." 
Ezekiel46:2 Mwaana a mwene arweelaka onipuwani na omokoni, avoleeleke nipithela* nimvoleeliwa ni akhaleke vamulako. Eyo eri hiiho, asaserdoti* eveleeleke sooveleelasawe soohisa ni sa murettele. Owo amulapeke Yave vathi mulako, vahoolowaya akhumeke. Vaheera, mulako owo ohiwaliweke mpaka oxekuwa." 
Ezekiel46:3 muSaabaduni ni nyeeri sinyowani, muloko wa mulaponi omulapeke Yave vamulako owo, wuuramihelaka ekhove mpaka vathi." 
Ezekiel46:4 Yooveleela yoohisa mwaana a mwene aneeraawe amuruuhele Yave vanihukuni na eSaabadu ekhaleke ya iputtiputthi ithannamosa ni napunci mmoha a ikhondoolo, sootheene iyo sikhaleke soohirakala." 
Ezekiel46:5 Yooveleela ya irooro eveleeliweke vamoha ni napunci a ikhondoolo ekhaleke ikiilu* miloko miili ni piili, ni yooveleela ya irooro eveleeliweke vamoha ni iputtiputthi ekhaleke moota owo ontthunelaawe, vamoha ni iliitru* tthaaru ni nttikha sa makhura wa khula ikiilu* miloko miili ni piili sa irooro." 
Ezekiel46:6 Vanihukuni na mweeri munyowani owo amveleeleke mwaamombe mmoha, iputtiputthi ithannamosa ni napunci mmoha a ikhondoolo. Sootheene iyo sikhaleke soohirakala." 
Ezekiel46:7 Owo aveleeleke irooro ikiilu* miloko miili ni piili vamoha ni yooveleela ya mwaamombe, ni hiihotho ni yooveleela ya napunci a ikhondoolo, ni vamoha ni iputtiputthi owo avaheke yeeyo ontthunelaawe ovaha vamoha ni iliitru* tthaaru ni nttikha sa makhura wa khula ikiilu* miloko miili ni piili sa irooro." 
Ezekiel46:8 Aavolowaka mwaana a mwene, owo apakeleke nipithela* nimvoleeliwa ni akhumeleke ephiro ovoleenlaawe." 
Ezekiel46:9 Muloko wa mulaponi waarwaaka vamaithoni wa Yave, mfestani soothanliwa, khula mutthu anaavoleele mulako wa ottuttuwani weera amulape, akhumeleke mulako wa ohitto, ni khula mutthu anaavoleele mulako wa ohitto, akhumeleke mulako wa ottuttuwani. Ahikhaleru anaakhumele mulako mwa yoowo ovoleenlaawe, mene ootheene ekhumeleke mulako owehannaayano." 
Ezekiel46:10 Mwaana a mwene akhaleke eriyaraayasa, avolowaka awosa yaavolowaka, ni akhumaka awosa yaakhumaka." 
Ezekiel46:11 Mufestani, vamoha ni ifesta soothanliwa, sooveleela sa irooro sikhaleke irooro ikiilu* miloko miili ni piili vamoha ni yooveleela ya mwaamombe, ni hiihotho ni yooveleela ya napunci a ikhondoolo, ni vamoha ni iputtiputthi owo avaheke yeeyo ontthunelaawe ovaha vamoha ni iliitru* tthaaru ni eriyari ya eliitru* emoha ya makhura wa khula ikiilu* miloko miili ni piili sa irooro." 
Ezekiel46:12 Mwaana a mwene aamvahaka Yave yooveleela ya otthunawawe – ekhalaka yooveleela yoohisa hoye hoye ya murettele, ahuleliweke mulako owenghe mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Owo apakeke yooveleelaawe yoohisa hoye hoye ya murettele ntoko ompakaawe vanihukuni na eSaabadu. Vano owo akhumeke, ni akhummeene, mulako owaliweke." 
Ezekiel46:13 Khula nihuku, nyuwosa mukhumiheke eputtiputthi ya eyaakha emoha yoohirakala ntoko yoomveleelela Yave yoohisa; nyuwosa muruuheke khula oxeexelo." 
Ezekiel46:14 Vamoha ni yoowo, nyuwo muruuheke khula oxeexelo yooveleela ya irooro ya ikiilu* tthaaru ni eriyari ya ekiilu* emoha vamoha ni eliitru* emoha ni vakhaani ya eliitru* ya makhura ookhuwalihera ephepa. Woopaka yooveleela ya irooro ela, ti ekano yoohimala." 
Ezekiel46:15 Hiiho, eputtiputthi, yooveleela ya irooro, ni makhura siruuhiweke khula oxeexelo ntoko yooveleela yoohisa wa mahuku ootheene." 
Ezekiel46:16 Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: Mwaana a mwene amvaha mwaniye mmoha ettima ya yoohiyeriwaawe, eyo ekhaleketho ya ekhapiraawe; eyo ekhaleke ettimaaya ya yoohiyeriwa." 
Ezekiel46:17 Wa soothesene, amvaha mmoha a ipotthasawe ettima ya yoohiyeriwaawe, epottha eyo epwaherereke okhalano ettimeene yeeyo mpaka Eyaakha ya Otapuxiwa; vanonto ettima ehokoleeleke wa mwaana a mwene. Yoohiyeriwaawe ti ya anamwanaawe paahi; ekhaleke yawayasa." 
Ezekiel46:18 Mwaana a mwene ahikuxeru etthu ya yoohiyeriwa ya muloko, awoomolaka muttimanimwaya anamahiyeriwa. Aavaheke anamwanaawe yoohiyeriwa ya yeele eri ettimaawe, weera ahikhaleru a mulokwaaka aneera amwalanyihiwe ni ettimaawe." 
Ezekiel46:19 Vahoolowaya mulopwana ole aakiviriha omvoleeliwa ori muxerexere wa mulako onkela mpaka ikwaartu sootteelihiwa singweha mpatta wa ottuttuwani, mwa seiyo saari sa asaserdoti*. Owo aakoonihera nipuro naari mpatta okotenle wa ninkela nsuwa.’ ”" 
Ezekiel46:20 Vano, owo aakeerela: “Nna ti nipuro mwa nenno asaserdoti* eneeraaya yaapeyeke yooveleelela nthowa, yooveleelela yoottheka ni yooxeke yooveleela ya irooro, weera sihironghiwe onipuwani na omokoni ni otteelihiwaka hiiho muloko." 
Ezekiel46:21 Vahoolowaya owo aakirongha vanipuwani na omokoni, anakiviriha mmattuumbanimwaya oomaxexe, ni khula nttuumba kaahoona nipuwa nikina." 
Ezekiel46:22 Yaari mapuwa oowaliwa, mweerakamelonimwaya yaarino imeetru* miloko miili niimoha, ni mweekhuveelonimwaya yaarino imeetru* muloko niithanu; miringo sa mapuwa a mattuumba maxexe saamulikana.”" 
Ezekiel46:23 Muxerexere wa khula nipuwa mpuwamwaya yaakhalano soosuka sa maluku, ni mapuro oopattiha mooro etekiweene vathiwaya mukwipimwaya moothemwene." 
Ezekiel46:24 Mulopwana ole akeerela: “Ala ti mapuro ootterekha mwa mwemmo yaale anrumeela Mpaani mwa Muluku eneeraaya yaapeyeke sooveleela sa muloko.” 
Ezekiel47:1 Mulopwana ole aakihokoloxera vamulako wa Empa ya Muluku, kinoona maahi epiluwelaka waathi nsele, erowaka mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, niwoko Empa ya Muluku yaawenghe mpatta ninkela nsuwa. Maahi yaakhuma vathi wa mpatta wa ohitto wa Empa ya Muluku, mpatta wa ohitto wa altaari*." 
Ezekiel47:2 Vano, owo aakikhumihera vaate akivirihaka vamulako wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani, anakirongha mpatta wa vaate mpaka mulako wa omokoni owenghe mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa. Maahi yaapiluwa mpatta wa ohitto." 
Ezekiel47:3 Mulopwana ole aarowa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa avarenleene nliinya nooringano; arowaka hiihaale, aaringa imeetru* macira mathanu ni imeetru* miloko miraru, anakiviriha mmaahini yaakikotela mukosomwani." 
Ezekiel47:4 Aaringatho imeetru* macira mathanu ni imeetru* miloko miraru, anakiviriha mmaahini yaakikotela mmakuthani. Aaringatho imeetru* macira mathanu ni imeetru* miloko miraru, anakiviriha mmaahini yaakikotela muyuununi." 
Ezekiel47:5 Aaringatho imeetru* macira mathanu ni imeetru* miloko miraru, mene emaara ela waari mooloko kahaaweraaka olapuwa, niwoko maahi yaahaandyeerereya oniixaxa owereyaka paahi olapuwa oyavelaka. Waari mooloko wahaawereya olapuwa weettaka." 
Ezekiel47:6 Mulopwana ole, aakikoha: “Mwaana a mutthu, Nyuwo munnoona yeela?” Vano aakihokoloxera okhopela mooloko." 
Ezekiel47:7 Kiphiyakaruwo, kaahoona nyiri sincipale wa khula mpatta wa mooloko." 
Ezekiel47:8 Owo aakeerela: “Maahi ala ampiluwa mpatta wa elapo eri mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, enarowa mpaka wAraba, mwa weiwo ahenlaaya mphareiya. Yaahelanaka mphareiya mmo, maahi anootatuxa ephareiya maahi oowureya." 
Ezekiel47:9 Wakhalaru omviraayawo mooloko ole, onookhala moota wootheene wa axinama ni wa ihopa, niwoko maahi ale ampiluwela weiwo, enaceendya maahi a maakha okhala oowureya; tivawo weiwo ompiluwaayawo mooloko, sootheene sinookhala ni okumi." 
Ezekiel47:10 Anamamesera anookhala muxerexere wa ephareiya yootheene; okhuma wEni-Gedi mpaka wEni-Eglayimi, onookhalano mapuro ooreerela waaneya itthavi. Ihopa sinookhala sa nyoota sincipale, ntoko ihopa sa ephareiya etokweene." 
Ezekiel47:11 Vaheera maratta ni mattapo kheeceendyeya; anoohiiwa weera ekhale maakha. 
Ezekiel47:12 Nyiri siniima sa nyoota sootheene sinimunnuwa mmipattani soomiili sa mooloko. Makukhwaaya kheenyaala ni soowiimasaya khasimora. Sinimwiima khula mweeri, niwoko maahi anrweela vaNipuroni Nootteela*, amphiya mwa seiyo. Soowiimasaya sinoociwa, ni makukhwaaya anoovareliwa muteko wa murette.”" 
Ezekiel47:13 Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: “Iya nyiinano muneeraanyu mukawanekeno elapo, ntoko yoohiyeriwa wa khula epuumba ya aYixrayeli ni Yoseefe onimwaakhela ittima piili." 
Ezekiel47:14 Nyuwosa mukaweke nnenesene eriyaraaya. Keenre Miyo kilipela kitheteiyeene ntata weera kaamwaavaha makholowaanyu, elapo ela enoothatuwa yoohiyeriwaanyu." 
Ezekiel47:15 Mwiinano wa elapo ti ola: Mpatta wa ottuttuwani okhumeke ephareiya etokweene, oroweke munseweni wa oHetelomi, oviraka oLebo-Hamati mpaka oZedadi," 
Ezekiel47:16 oBerota ni oSibrayimi, ori mmwiinanoni wa eriyari ya oDamasku ni oHamati ni onrowa mpaka oHazeri-Hatikoni, ori muxerexere wa oHawurani." 
Ezekiel47:17 Mwiinano ovireke wookhuma ophareiya mpaka oHazari-Enani, ottharaka mwiinano wootheene wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa oDamasku, ni mwiinano wa oHamate woorowa mpatta wa ottuttuwani. Ti yoola oneera okhale mwiinano wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani." 
Ezekiel47:18 Mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, mwiinano ovireke eriyari ya oHawurani ni oDamasku, ottharaka muYordanu, eriyari ya oGileyade ni elapo ya oYixrayeli mpaka ephareiya ya mpatta ninkela nsuwa, opwahereraka mpaka oTamari. Ola ti mwiinano wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa." 
Ezekiel47:19 Mpatta wa ohitto, owo okhumeke oTamari mpaka maahi a oMeriba-Kadexi, opwahereraka woorowa onxaapwani na wExipitu mpaka ephareiya etokweene. Ola ti mwiinano wa mpatta wa ohitto." 
Ezekiel47:20 Mpatta ninkela nsuwa ephareiya etokweene ti mwiinano mpaka wiithela wa oLebo-Hamati. Ola ti mwiinano wa mpatta ninkela nsuwa. 
Ezekiel47:21 Mukawaneke elapo ela muttharihaka ipuumba sa oYixrayeli. 
Ezekiel47:22 Nyuwosa mukawaneke ntoko yoohiyeriwaanyu ni wa anamarwa ankhala eriyaraanyu arino anamwane. Nyuwosa ngwooneleke okhala ntoko aYixrayeli xaxaxa; nyuwosa vamoha ni yaawosa evahiweke yoohiyeriwa eriyari ya ipuumba sa aYixrayeli. 
Ezekiel47:23 Yakhalaru epuumba aneeraawe akhale namarwa, mumvahekewo yoohiyeriwa eniimukwanelele,” onghima Yave onlamula sootheene."
