Ezekiel48:1 “Ipuumba sintthariheliwa masinaaya ti iya: Mmwiinanoni wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani, aDani ekhalaneke ettima emoha; mwiinano otthariheke musewe wa oHeteloni mpaka oLebo-Hamati; oHazari-Henani ni mwiinano wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani wa oDamasku, waattamela oHamate sipakele mpatta nyiinanosaya okhuma mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka mpatta ninkela nsuwa." 
Ezekiel48:2 awAxeri ekhalaneke ettima emoha; eyo evireke mmwiinanoni mwa elapo ya Dani, okhuma mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkela nsuwa." 
Ezekiel48:3 aNafitali, ekhalaneke ettima emoha; eyo evireke mmwiinanoni mwa ettima ya awAxeri, okhuma mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkela nsuwa." 
Ezekiel48:4 aManaxe ekhalaneke ettima emoha; eyo evireke mmwiinanoni mwa elapo ya aNafitali, okhuma mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkela nsuwa." 
Ezekiel48:5 awEfrayimi ekhalaneke ettima emoha; eyo evireke mmwiinanoni mwa elapo ya aManaxe, okhuma mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkela nsuwa." 
Ezekiel48:6 aRubeni ekhalaneke ettima emoha; eyo evireke mmwiinanoni mwa ettima ya awEfrayimi, okhuma mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkela nsuwa." 
Ezekiel48:7 aYuda akhalaneke ettima emoha; eyo evireke mmwiinanoni mwa ettima ya aRubeni, okhuma mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkela nsuwa." 
Ezekiel48:8 Ettima nyuwosa muneeraanyu moonihere ntoko yoovaha yootteelihiwa, evireke mmwiinanoni mwa elapo ya aYuda, okhuma mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka mpatta ninkela nsuwa. Eyo ekhalaneke ikilomeetru* muloko ni tthaaru ya mweekhuveelonimwaya, ni mweerakamelonimwaya okhuma mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkela nsuwa olikaneke ni wunnuwa wa khula ettima ya ipuumba iyo; Nipuro Nootteela* nikhaleke eriyari ya seiyo." 
Ezekiel48:9 Ettima yootteelihiwa nyuwosa muneeraanyu mumveleeleleke Yave, ekhalaneke ikilomeetru* muloko ni tthaaru sa mweerakamelonimwaya, ni ikilomeetru* ithanu sa mweekhuveelonimwaya." 
Ezekiel48:10 Ti yeela eneera ekhale ettima yootteeliheriwa asaserdoti*. Eyo ekhalaneke ikilomeetru* muloko ni tthaaru sa mweerakamelonimwaya mpatta wa ottuttuwani, ikilomeetru* ithanu sa mweekhuveelonimwaya wa mpatta ninkela nsuwa, ikilomeetru* ithanu sa mweekhuveelonimwaya wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, ni ikilomeetru* muloko ni tthaaru sa mweerakamelonimwaya wa mpatta wa ohitto. Eriyaraaya, nikhaleke Nipuro Nootteela* na Yave." 
Ezekiel48:11 Ettima eyo ekhaleke ya asaserdoti* ootteelihiwa, eyo tiiyo, ekhapira ya Zadoki, mwa yaawo yaaroromeleiye wookirumeela, ni yahaahapungwe ntoko yaapankaaya aLeevi ehapungweene aYixrayeli." 
Ezekiel48:12 Enookhala yoovaha yootteela wa yaawosa, ettima yootteelaxa, eviraka mmwiinanoni mwa elapo ya aLeevi." 
Ezekiel48:13 Elapo yootheene ya aLeevi, ekhalaneke ettima ya ikilomeetru* muloko ni tthaaru sa mweerakamelonimwaya, ni ikilomeetru* ithanu sa mweekhuveelonimwaya. Orakamawaya wootheene, okhalaneke ikilomeetru* muloko ni tthaaru ni mweekhuveelonimwaya, ikilomeetru* ithanu." 
Ezekiel48:14 Awosa ehithumiheke, hata ehaakakhanyiheke ni etthu ekina ya yeeyo. Ettima ela ti yooreerela ya elapo yootheene, ni ahivahiweru mutthu mukina, niwoko ti yootteela wa Yave." 
Ezekiel48:15 Ettima enghaleeyo, ikilomeetru* piili ni eriyari ya ekilomeetru* emoha sa mweekhuveelonimwaya, ni ikilomeetru* muloko ni tthaaru sa mweerakamelonimwaya evareliweke muteko esidade yootheene wa oteka impa ni ociha mihuwo. Esidade ekhaleke eriyaraaya" 
Ezekiel48:16 ni ekhalaneke miringo iya: Mpatta wa ottuttuwani, imeetru* macira miloko miili ni macira mararu; mpatta wa ohitto, imeetru* macira miloko miili ni macira mararu; mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, imeetru* macira miloko miili ni macira mararu; ni mpatta ninkela nsuwa, imeetru* macira miloko miili ni macira mararu." 
Ezekiel48:17 Mpatta wa ottuttuwani, esidade ekhalaneke ettima yoohikhala etthu ya imeetru* ncira ni miloko miili niithanu, mpatta wa ohitto imeetru* ncira ni miloko miili niithanu, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa imeetru* ncira ni miloko miili niithanu ni mpatta ninkela nsuwa imeetru* ncira ni miloko miili niithanu. Eyo evareliweke muteko woociha mihuwo." 
Ezekiel48:18 Ettima enghaleeyo, empakelana mwiinano ni ettima yootteelihiwa yootheene, ekhalaneke ikilomeetru* ithanu mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa ni ikilomeetru* ithanu wa mpatta ninkela nsuwa. Soohephasaya sikhaleke yooca ya anamiteko a musidade." 
Ezekiel48:19 Anamiteko a ipuumba sootheene sa musidadeni anoolimamo. 
Ezekiel48:20 Ettima yootheene vamoha ni esidade, elikaneleke mipatta sootheene sinkhala ikilomeetru* muloko ni tthaaru wa khula mpatta. Eyo ti yoovaha yootteelihiwa, mwa yeeyo nyuwosa muneeraanyu muurele." 
Ezekiel48:21 Ilapo sineera sihale mmipattani soomiili sa ettima siri vattimani yootteeliheriwa ni wa esidade sikhaleke sa mwaana a mwene. Iyo sirooke okhuma ikilomeetru* muloko ni tthaaru sa ettima yootteelihiwa mpaka omwiinanoni wa ninkhuma nsuwa ni okhuma ikilomeetru* muloko ni tthaaru sa esidadee mpaka mmwiinanoni mwa ninkela nsuwa. Ittima piili iyo, soolikanela mweerakameloni wa ittima sa ipuumba, sikhaleke sa mwaana a mwene, ni ettima yootteelihiwa vamoha ni Nipuro Nootteela* na Empa ya Muluku, sikhaleke eriyaraaya." 
Ezekiel48:22 Hiiho, ettima ya aLeevi ni ya esidade sikhaleke eriyari ya ettima eri ya mwaana a mwene. Ettima ya mwaana a mwene ekhaleke eriyari ya mwiinano wa aYuda ni wa aBenyamini." 
Ezekiel48:23 Mwaha wa ipuumba sikina iyo: aBenyamini anookhalano ettima emoha; eyo ekhumeke mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wookela mpatta ninkela nsuwa. 
Ezekiel48:24 aSimeyoni ekhalaneke ettima emoha; eyo evireke mmwiinanoni mwa elapo ya aBenyamini, okhuma mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkela nsuwa." 
Ezekiel48:25 awIsakari ekhalaneke ettima emoha; eyo evireke mmwiinanoni mwa elapo ya aSimeyoni, okhuma mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkela nsuwa." 
Ezekiel48:26 aZebulomi ekhalaneke ettima emoha; eyo evireke mmwiinanoni mwa elapo ya awIsakari, okhuma mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkela nsuwa." 
Ezekiel48:27 aGadi ekhalaneke ettima emoha; eyo evireke mmwiinanoni mwa elapo ya aZebuloni, okhuma mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkela nsuwa." 
Ezekiel48:28 Mwiinano wa mpatta wa ohitto wa aGadi okhumeke oTamar, mpatta wa ohitto mpaka maahi a oMeriba-Kadexi, vahoolowaya, ovireke onxaapwani na wExipitu mpaka ephareiya etokweene." 
Ezekiel48:29 Ela ti elapo muneeraanyu mukawele ipuumba sa aYixrayeli ntoko yoohiyeriwa, ni iyo sinookhala ittimasanyu,” onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Ezekiel48:30 “Milako sa musidade ti iya: Vaxirini wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani orino imeetru* 2 300 mweerakamelonimwaya," 
Ezekiel48:31 milako sa esidade sitteheriweke masina a ipuumba sa aYixrayeli. Milako miraru sa mpatta wa ottuttuwani sikhaleke milako sa Rubeni, Yuda ni Leevi." 
Ezekiel48:32 Vaxirini wa mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, orino imeetru* 2 300 mweerakamelonimwaya, sikhaleke milako miraru – sa Yoseefe, Benyamini ni sa Dani." 
Ezekiel48:33 Vaxirini wa mpatta wa ohitto orino imeetru* 2 300 mweerakamelonimwaya, okhalaneke milako miraru: mulako wa Simeyoni, wa Isakari ni wa Zebulomi." 
Ezekiel48:34 Vaxirini wa mpatta wa ottuttuwani orino imeetru* 2 300 mweerakamelonimwaya, okhalaneke milako miraru: mulako wa Gadi, wa Axeri ni wa Nafitali." 
Ezekiel48:35 Othanuwa wa mukhwipimwaya moothemwene okhalaneke ikilomeetru* ithanniixexe ni eriyari ya ekilomeetru* emoha. Okhuma ehuhuweene yeeyo woorowa ohoolo, esidade yiitthaniweke: ‘Yave ori vaava.’ ”" 
Daniel1:1 Vayaakhani yanaararu moolamulani mwa Yehoyakimi, mwene a oYuda, Nebukadenezari, mwene a oBabiloniya, aarowa oYerusaleemu, anarica." 
Daniel1:2 Vano Yave aamwinnyerera Yehoyakimi, mwene a oYuda, mmatatanimwawe vamoha ni ikaruma sikina sa Empa ya Muluku. Nebukadenezari aakuxa seiye aronghaka wa empa ya mulukwaawe oBabiloniya, aniikaathi mpaani mwa mihakhu sa mulukwaawe." 
Daniel1:3 Vanonto mwene aamulamulela Axepenazi, mutokweene a arumeiyi a empa ya emwene, weera aaruuhe aYixrayeli akina akina a emusi ya mwene ni a maneethi:" 
Daniel1:4 Amiravo oohirakala, oophwaneliwa, oolikaneene ooxuttera, a miruku, yiiwexexaka woowaakuveya ni oowera orumeela mpaani mwa mwene. Owo aalamuliwa waaxuttiha nuulumo ni ilivuru sa aBabiloniya." 
Daniel1:5 Vameesaniwawe mwene Nebukadenezari awosa yaahaalikeleliwa sooca ni eviinyu ya khula nihuku. Awosa yaaxuttihiwa mweehuhuni ya iyaakha tthaaru ni vahoolowaya yaamurumeelaaya mwene. 
Daniel1:6 Variyariwaya yaakhala akina yaakuxiwe oYuda: Daniyeli, Hananeya, Mixayeli ni Azariya." 
Daniel1:7 Mutokweene a arumeiyi a mwene aahaatteha masina manyowani: Daniyeli iitthaniwa Beltexazari, Hananeya Xadraki, Mixayeli Mixaki ni Azariya Abedneku." 
Daniel1:8 Vaheera Daniyeli aalakelaxa ohiinanariha ni sooca ni eviinyu ya mwene, anamvekela mutokweene a arumeiyi a mwene omutthunihera weera atthare moota owo." 
Daniel1:9 Vano Muluku aatava murima wa mutokweene ole moota wooweera aamoonihera Daniyeli ikharari ni murima wooreera. 
Daniel1:10 Hata hiiho, mutokweene aamweerela Daniyeli: “Kingwoova apwiyaaka mwene, mwa yaawo alamulenle weera ngwure ni muce sooca iya. Awo yoona weera nyuwosa munimoonda waapwaha asikhwiinyu, okumaaka onookhala ngwoopihani niwoko na nyuwosa.”" 
Daniel1:11 Vano Daniyeli aamweerela namalipelela aakhalihingwe ni mutokweene weera amukosoope Daniyeli, Hananeya, Mixayeli ni Azariya:" 
Daniel1:12 Dyoontte, ngwoote murima arumeiyaanyu wa mahuku muloko: Munivahe mapoonda paahi weera nice ni maahi oowura." 
Daniel1:13 Vahoolowaya mphimelele ekhalelowaahu ni ya amiravo anca sooca sa mwene ni vano mwaapakele arumeiyaanyu muttharihaka yeeyo moonnaanyu.” 
Daniel1:14 Vanonto owo aahaakhulela masu ale, anawoota murima mahuku muloko." 
Daniel1:15 Evinreene mahuku muloko ekhalelowaaya yaari oolipakaneene waapwaha asikhwaaya ootheene yaaca sooca sa mwene. 
Daniel1:16 Tivawo namalipelela aavenxalaawe sooca ni eviinyu yaathanliwe ni mwene, anaavaha mapoondaru." 
Daniel1:17 Muluku aahaavaha amiravo axexe ale miruku ni wiiwexexa wa ilivuru ni sooxuttiha soohiyanahiyana. Vano Daniyeli annawera otaphulela soowoona ni sooloha soohiyanahiyana. 
Daniel1:18 Ommaleloni wa ehuhu mwene aalakenlaawe weera eruuhiwe wa yoowo, mutokweene a arumeiyi a mwene aahaarongha wa Nebukadenezari." 
Daniel1:19 Mwene aahuuluma ni yaawo ni aahoona weera khaawoworu aalikana ni Daniyeli, Hananeya, Mixayeli, ni Azariya. Tivawo yaapacenraaya omurumeela mwene." 
Daniel1:20 Mwaha wa miruku ni wiiwexexa, mwene aahoona weera yannaweraxa waapwaha anamacitta ni akhwiri ootheene yaari moomwenenimwawe wootheene." 
Daniel1:21 Vanonto Daniyeli aakhalawo mpaka eyaakha yoopacera ya olamula wa mwene Siru. 
Daniel2:1 Vayaakhani yanaaveeli ya olamulawawe, Nebukadenezari aaloha; aari oohitteene, ahiweraka okona." 
Daniel2:2 Tivawo aawiitthannaawe anamacitta, anahako, akhiwiri ni anamawehaweha ithenyeeri, anaalamula omuleela yeeyo aalonghaawe." 
Daniel2:3 Aaweerela: “Kooloha yookivalaveliha ni kintthuna osuwela etaphulelowaaya.” 
Daniel2:4 Vano anamawehaweha ithenyeeri yaamwaakhula mwene munuulumoni na Eramewu: “Ii! Mwene, mukhaleke wa mahuku ootheene! Mwaaleele arumeiyaanyu yoolohaanyu ni hiyo nnootaphulela.”" 
Daniel2:5 Mwene aawaakhula anamawehaweha ithenyeeri: “Yeeyo kilakenlaaka ti ela: nyuwosa mwaahikithalihera yoolohaaka ni etaphulelowaaya, kinoolamula weera mukakatthasiwe ni impasanyu sinootatuxiwa ittuxo." 
Daniel2:6 Vaheera mwakithalihera yooloha ni etaphulelowaaya, munimwaakhela wa miyo soovaha, sooliva ni nttittimiho ntokotoko. Vano mukithalihere yooloha ni etaphulelowaaya.”" 
Daniel2:7 Emaara yanaaveeli awosa yaamwaakhula: “Mwaaleele arumeiyaanyu yoolohaanyu ni hiyo nnootaphulela.” 
Daniel2:8 Vanonto mwene aaweerela: “Koosuwela weera muntthuna omaliha ehuhu niwoko moosuwela weera yoolakelaaka ti ela: 
Daniel2:9 Mwaahikithalihera kilonghaaka, ootheene nyuwo kinimoottaruxani moota mmoha. Nyuwosa moovaanela okilokottha mmalihaka ehuhuweene, ngwehereraka weera kittiwale. Vanonto, mukithalihere yoolohaaka ni kinoosuwela weera munoowera otaphulela seiyo.”" 
Daniel2:10 Anamawehaweha ithenyeeri yaamwaakhula mwene: “Khawoworu mutthu mweelaponi ongwera opaka yeeyo amwene munnyesererihaanyu! Khawowo mwene mukina, akhalaka mutokweenexa ni ooweraxa, otonke ovekela mooteene yoola wa anamacitta, anahako naari anamawehaweha ithenyeeri." 
Daniel2:11 Yeeyo amwene mumvekelaanyu yootepaxa orika. Khawoworu ongwera omuthalihera mwene sihikhanle miluku ni seiyo khasinkhala variyari wa atthu.” 
Daniel2:12 Eyo yaamunyoonyiha mwene, emusarihaka isara moota wooweera aalamulela ohitiwa wa anamiruku ootheene a oBabiloniya." 
Daniel2:13 Hiiho ekano yaalaleiwa weera anamiruku ehitasiwe; anamitthenga yaarowa omwaasaasa Daniyeli ni asinthamwenaawe weera yiivasiwetho. 
Daniel2:14 Vano Ariyoke, mutokweene a anamalipelela a mwene, arowaka weera awiive anamiruku, Daniyeli aahuuluma ni yoowo ni masu a miruku ni soowuupuwela sooreera." 
Daniel2:15 Aamukoha mutokweene ole: “Amwene alamulenleni ni oxilili?” Vano Ariyoke aamuthalihera Daniyeli mulattu ole. 
Daniel2:16 Iiwakaru yeeyo, Daniyeli aarowa wa mwene, anamvekela ehuhu weera owo awere otaphulela yooloha ele." 
Daniel2:17 Vahoolowaya Daniyeli aahokoleela owannyawe, anaathalihera mulattu asinthamwenaawe Hananeya, Mixayeli, ni Azariya." 
Daniel2:18 Owo aahaavekela omudyoonttelela Muluku a wiirimu ikharari mwaha wa ntikhinelo nne weera owo ni asinthamwenaawe ehiiviwe vamoha ni anamiruku akinaawo a oBabiloniya. 
Daniel2:19 Ohiyuweene yoole ntikhinelo naathupululiwa wa Daniyeli mmooneloni. Vano Daniyeli aamutthapela Muluku a wiirimu," 
Daniel2:20 eeraka: “Nsina na Muluku nitthapeliwe wa mahuku ootheene; miruku ni ikuru ti sawawe. 
Daniel2:21 Owo onceendya ihuhu sa vanihukuni ni sa vayaakani; Owo onaakhaliha mamwene ni Owo onaakuruxa yaawo. Owo onaavaha miruku anamiruku ni esuwelo yaale aniiwexexa nnene. 
Daniel2:22 Owo onthupulula itthu sa moowiixera ni soowiipithiheya. Owo onsuwela yeeyo eri mpiphini ni waara onkhala ni Yoowo. 
Daniel2:23 Kinootthapelani ni kinoottottopelani Nyuwo, Muluku a makholowaaka; mookivaha miruku ni ikuru; mookisuweliha yeeyo noovekenlaahuni; moonisuweliha yooloha ya mwene.”" 
Daniel2:24 Vano Daniyeli aarowa wa Ariyoke, mwa yoowo mwene aamuthanlalaawe weera awiive anamiruku a oBabiloniya, anamweerela: “Muhiwiive anamiruku a oBabiloniya. Mukironghe wa mwene ni kinoomutaphulelela yoolohaawe.”" 
Daniel2:25 Ariyoke aamurongha Daniyeli wa mwene, anamweerela: “Koomphwanya mulopwana variyari wa anamavariwa a oYuda ongwera omuthaphulela mwene etaphulelo ya oloha.”" 
Daniel2:26 Mwene aamukoha Daniyeli, iitthaniwatho Beltexazari: “Nyuwo munoowera okitaphulela yeeyo koonnaaka moolohanimwaka?”" 
Daniel2:27 Daniyeli aamwaakhula: “Khawowo namiruku, namatthoma, namacitta naari nahako ongwera omutaphulela mwene ntikhinelo owo okoherenraawe." 
Daniel2:28 Mene ookhala Muluku wiirimu onthupulula mitikhinelo. Owo oomoonihera mwene Nebukadenezari yeeyo eneera yeereye mmahukuni a muhoolo. Yooloha ni nyoonelo moonnaanyu mukonaka ti iya: 
Daniel2:29 Ii! Mwene, nyuwo mwaakonaanyu, mmuupuwelonimwanyu waahuleya wa itthu sa muhoolo ni Namathupulula a mitikhinelo oowooniherani yeeyo eneera yeereye." 
Daniel2:30 Wa miyo, ntikhinelo nna kithupululeliwaaka – khoohiyoni niwoko kirookhalanaxa miruku waapwaha akina, mene weera nyuwo, mwene, musuwele etaphulelowaaya ni weera mwiiwexexe yeeyo evinre mmuupuwelonimwanyu." 
Daniel2:31 Amwene, mwaahoona ni ohoolowanyu yaakhala ecaambulo etokotoko; ecaambulo yoorakamaxa yoowaara ni ekhalelowaaya yoowoopihaxa." 
Daniel2:32 Muru wa ecambuloweene yeele waapakiwe ni eyuuma yoorikaxa; ekakasa ni nyoonosaya sa eparatha*; erukulu ni eyuunu ya ebronze*; 
Daniel2:33 nyetto sa eyuuma ni inaawosaya saatakanseriwe eyuuma ni oloko. 
Daniel2:34 Nyuwo ngwehexexaka, nluku nimoha naakurukunduwa muneenaayaru. Naaswanya nyetto sa eyuuma ni oloko sinattikittheya." 
Daniel2:35 Vano eyuuma, oloko, ebronze*, eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa saanyaanyiwa sinakhala ntthupi ntoko makamba vanipuroni nimveeriwa* etrigu ehuhu ya elimwe. Epheyo yaavaviha seiyo sihihiyaka eneneero ya okhalawaya. Vaheera nluku naaswannye ecaambulo naathatuwa mwaako woorakamelaxa osulu ni waasareya elapo ya vathi yootheene." 
Daniel2:36 Eyo yaari yooloha ni vano kinootaphulela yeeyo wa mwene. 
Daniel2:37 Nyuwo, mwene, ti mwene a mamwene. Muluku a wiirimu ohoovahani olamula ni ikuru, owera ni ovuwa;" 
Daniel2:38 ohinnyerera mmatatanimwanyu omutthu ni axinama a ntuphini ni ipalame sa wiirimu. Weiwo sintthunaaya okhalawo, Owo ohookhalihani namalamula a sootheene seiyo. Muru wa eyuuma yoorikaxa ti nyuwo." 
Daniel2:39 Vahoolowanyu omwene okina onookhumelela – wooyevaxa ohilikanaka ni wawinyu. Vahoolowaya omwene wanaararu wa ebronze* onoolamula mweelaponi yootheene. 
Daniel2:40 Woomalihera onuukhale omwene wanaaxexe – woolipa ntoko eyuuma, ni yeenre ekhalaka eyuuma, enoopwexa ni enoophwata sootheene. Mooteene yoowo eyuuma ennyaanyaaya sootheene, omwene yoowotho onoophwata itthu sootheene sikina." 
Daniel2:41 Ntoko moonnaanyu, inaawo ni ikatha saatakanseriwe eyuuma ni oloko. Eyo entaphulela weera omwene yoowo onuukhale wookawanyeya. Hata hiiho onookhalano ikuru sa eyuuma murimoonaru eyuuma yootakansereya ni oloko." 
Daniel2:42 Mooteene yoowo ikatha saatakanseriwaaya eyuuma ni oloko, hiihotho mpatta mukina wa omwene owo onoolipa ni mukinoowo woohilipa." 
Daniel2:43 Ntoko moonnaanyu, eyuuma yaatakanseriwe ni oloko. Eyo entaphulela weera omwene owo onimwaasaasa wiiraana ni miloko sikina, mene wiiwananawaya khoolipa, hiiho ntoko eyuuma ehintakansiwaaya ni oloko." 
Daniel2:44 Mweehuhuni ya mamwene awo, Muluku a wiirimu onookhaliha omwene oneera ohiphwatiweru hata ohilamuliwe ni miloko sikina. Omwene owo onoophwata imwene sootheene sikina iyo, vaheera owo onoopwaherera wa mahuku ootheene." 
Daniel2:45 Ela etaphulelo ya moonelo wa nluku naakurukundungwe vamwaako muneenaayaru – nluku nno naanyaannye eyuuma, ebronze*, oloko, eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa. Muluku Mutokweene oomoonihera mwene yeeyo eneera yeereye muhoolo. Yooloha ti ya ekhaikhai ni etaphulelowaaya ti yoororomeleya.”" 
Daniel2:46 Vano mwene Nebukadenezari aamukokhorela Daniyeli, anamuttittimiha, analamula weera apakeliwe soovaha ni sooveleela ni avahiwe erubani*." 
Daniel2:47 Mwene aamweerela Daniyeli: “Vekhaikhai Mulukwaanyu ti Muluku a miluku ni Apwiya a mamwene ni Namathupulula a mitikhinelo, niwoko moowera woonihera ntikhinelo nna.”" 
Daniel2:48 Vanonto mwene aamukhaliha Daniyeli vanipuroni noottittimiheyaxa, amvahaka soovaha sincipale. Aamukhaliha namalamula a elapo yootheene ya oBabiloniya ni aamukhalihatho mutokweene a anamiruku ootheene a elapo ele." 
Daniel2:49 Ohiya toko yeeyo, niwoko na nivekelo na Daniyeli, mwene aamukhaliha Xadraki, Mixaki ni Abedneku maguvernadori a elapo ya oBabiloniya, Daniyeli owo areene vaate wa emwene." 
Daniel3:1 Mwene Nebukadenezari aapaka ecaambulo ya eyuuma yoorikaxa, orakamelawaya osulu imeetru* miloko miili niithannapiili ni mweekhuveelonimwaya imeetru* tthaaru, aneemexa mweelaponi yoothatawala ya oDura, mweelaponi ya oBabiloniya." 
Daniel3:2 Vahoolowaya aawiitthana mapwattapwattha, asitokweene, maguvernadori, anamalaka, anamawehaweha musurukhu a mwene, aphuki, anamalamula ni asitokweene ootheene a ilapo sikina weera erwe yoone ohuleliwa wa ecaambulo eemenxaawe." 
Daniel3:3 Vano mapwattapwattha, asitokweene, maguvernadori, anamalaka, anamawehaweha musurukhu a mwene, aphuki, anamalamula ni asitokweene ootheene a ilapo sikina yaathukumanela ohuleliwa wa ecaambulo mwene Nebukadenezari eemenxaawe, eneemela ohoolowaya." 
Daniel3:4 Vanonto namutthenga aalaleiya ni nsu ntokotoko: “Ii! Atthu, miloko ni asilopwana a muulumo ootheene, yeeyo mulamuleliwaanyu opaka ti ela:" 
Daniel3:5 Mwiiwaru oruma wa nipalapatta, ampetta, amakita oohiyanahiyana, mapalapatta makina ni ikaruma soohiyanahiyana, muurameleke vathi, mulapeke ecaambulo ya eyuuma yoorikaxa mwene Nebukadenezari eemenxaawe." 
Daniel3:6 Yoole aneera ahikokhorele ni ahilape, onoovonyeriwa woowaakuveya muniikhoni noovihaxa.”" 
Daniel3:7 Tivawo, yiiwakaru oruma wa nipalapatta, ampetta, amakita oohiyanahiyana, mapalapatta makina ni ikaruma soohiyanahiyana, miloko sa ilapo sootheene ni atthu a muulumo ootheene yaakokhorela enalapa ecaambulo ya eyuuma yoorikaxa mwene Nebukadenezari eemenxaawe." 
Daniel3:8 Ehuhuweene yeele anamawehaweha ithenyeeri akina yaarowa, enaahimahima aYuda." 
Daniel3:9 Awosa yaamweerela mwene Nebukadenezari: “Ii! Amwene, mukhaleke wa mahuku ootheene!" 
Daniel3:10 Moohela ekano, amwene, weera ootheene eniyiiwe oruma wa nipalapatta, ampetta, amakita oohiyanahiyana, mapalapatta makina ni ikaruma soohiyanahiyana, ekokhoreleke ni elapeke ecaambulo ya eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Daniel3:11 Moolamulelatho weera ootheene eneera ehikokhorele ni ehilape, anoovonyeriwa muniikhoni noovihaxa." 
Daniel3:12 Vano aakhala aYuda akina va nyuwo mwaakhalihenraanyu owehaweha milattu sa elapo ya oBabiloniya – Xadraki, Mixaki ni Abedneku – mwa yaawo ahoopwanttheni nyuwo, amwene. Awosa khaanlapa milukusanyu hata ecaambulo ya eyuuma yoorikaxa mweemenxaanyu.”" 
Daniel3:13 Oonyoonyiweene Nebukadenezari aamwiitthana Xadraki, Mixaki ni Abedneku. Vano asilopwana ale yaaronghiwa ohoolo wa mwene" 
Daniel3:14 ni Nebukadenezari aaweerela: “Xadraki, Mixaki ni Abedneku, etiitthu weera khamunkokhorela milukusaka naari khamunlapa ecaambulo ya eyuuma yoorikaxa keemenxaaka?" 
Daniel3:15 Vano mwiiwaka oruma wa nipalapatta, ampetta, amakita oohiyanahiyana, mapalapatta makina ni ikaruma soohiyanahiyana, mwakokhorela ni mwalapa ecaambulo – onimooreerelani. Vaheera mwaahilapa ecaambulo, munoovonyeriwa woowaakuveya muniikhoni noovihaxa. Vano muluku heeni aneera awoopoleni mmatatanimwaka?”" 
Daniel3:16 Xadraki, Mixaki ni Abedneku yaamwaakhula mwene: “Ii! Nebukadenezari, khoontthuneya weera hiyo niixaakihe ohoolowanyu." 
Daniel3:17 Hiyo navonyeriwa muniikhoni noovihaxa, Muluku mwa Yoowo nnimulapaahu onoowera onitapuxa ni Owo onoonoopola mmatatanimwanyu, nyuwo amwene." 
Daniel3:18 Ni waaheereya hiiho, vano musuwele nnenesene amwene weera hiyo khaninlapa milukusanyu naari ecaambulo ya eyuuma yoorikaxa mweemenxaanyu.”" 
Daniel3:19 Vano Nebukadenezari aamunyoonyeriwa Xadraki, Mixaki ni Abedneku ni ekhovaawe yaaceendyeya. Aalamula weera oviha wa niikho waandyeereriwe imaara ithannapiili." 
Daniel3:20 Aalamulelatho weera akina a anakhottwaawe ooweraxa emutthuke Xadraki, Mixaki ni Abedneku, ni yaavonyere muniikhoni." 
Daniel3:21 Hiiho asilopwana araru ale, ewanreene mikaandyosaya, ikuwo, akaputtula, ixuuli ni ikuwo sikina, yaatthukiwa, enavonyeriwa muniikhoni noovihaxa." 
Daniel3:22 Olamula wa mwene waari woowaakuveya ni niikho naavihaxa moota wooweera malumaaya yaawiiva anakhotto yaamuronghale Xadraki, Mixaki ni Abedneku." 
Daniel3:23 Vano amiravo araru ale yaamorela muniikhoni etthukiweene nnenesene. 
Daniel3:24 Vanonto mwene Nebukadenezari aaheemela ootikhinihiweene, anaakoha anamalakaawe: “Hiyo naatthunke asilopwana araru, nnaavonyera mmooroni, keera?” Awosa yaamwaakhula: “Ii! Amwene, etiitthu.”" 
Daniel3:25 Owo aaweerela: “Moone! Kingwoona asilopwana axexe ootaphuliweene ni ooreereleene, yeetteettaka mmooroni, ni anaaxexe ole onlikana mwaana a miluku.”" 
Daniel3:26 Nebukadenezari aahaattamela mulako wa niikho noovihaxa, anakhuwela: “Xadraki, Mixaki ni Abedneku, arumeiyi a Muluku a Osulusulu, mukhumeke, ngweeke wenno!” Vano Xadraki, Mixaki ni Abedneku yaakhuma mmooroni." 
Daniel3:27 Mapwattapwattha, asitokweene, maguvernadori, ni anamalaka a mwene yaathukumanasa yaarukureenreene. Yaahoona weera mooro khawaahinse irutthusaya naari mayihi a nyurusaya khayaaziiye hata mikaandyosaya khasaaziiye ni khayuunkharu murule." 
Daniel3:28 Vano Nebukadenezari aaheera: “Muluku a Xadraki, Mixaki ni Abedneku attottopeliwe, mwa Yoowo omurumihale ndyelowaawe, anaavuluxa arumeiyaawe! Awosa aamuroromela Yoowo ehipwatthaka nlamulo na mwene ni yaalikana oleva okumaaya ohiya okokhorela naari olapa miluku sikina ahikhanle Mulukwaaya." 
Daniel3:29 Vano kinlamula weera atthu a sakhalaru miloko hoye hoye nuulumo eneera emuulumele etthu yoovirikana Muluku a Xadraki, Mixaki ni Abedneku ekakatthanyiwe ni impasaya sitatuxiwe ettuxo, niwoko khoowowo muluku mukina ongwera ovuluxa moota ola.”" 
Daniel3:30 Vanonto mwene aangweliha Xadraki, Mixaki ni Abedneku mweelaponi mwa oBabiloniya." 
Daniel4:1 Ya mwene Nebukadenezari, wa atthu a ilapo, miloko ni muulumo ootheene ankhala mweelaponi ya vathi: murettele ni mpuha okhale ni nyuwosa!" 
Daniel4:2 Enkisiveliha woothaliherani sa ineneero ni sootikhiniha sooweraxa Muluku a Osulusulu okipakenlaawe. 
Daniel4:3 Ineneerosawe ti sitokotoko ni sootikhinihasawe ti sooweraxa! Omwenaawe ti woohimala ni olamulawawe ompwaherera wa ikhapira sootheene. 
Daniel4:4 Miyo, Nebukadenezari, kaari mpaanimwaka ya emwene, oohakalaleene ni opuha." 
Daniel4:5 Kaaloha kinakhala oowooveene. Kiixaatalenleene vabeettiniwaka, kaahookhwa maririmela niwoko na nyoonelo ni icaambulo koonnaaka mmuupuwelonimwaka." 
Daniel4:6 Vano kaalamula weera anamiruku ootheene a oBabiloniya eruuhiwe ohoolowaka weera ekitaphuleleke yoolohaaka. 
Daniel4:7 Vanonto, ephiyakaru anamacitta, akhwiri, anamawehaweha ithenyeeri ni anahako, kaahaathalihera yooloha, mene khayaawenre otaphulela yeeyo." 
Daniel4:8 Woomalihera Daniyeli aaphiya ohoolowaka, kinamuthalihera yoolohaaka. Owo oniitthaniwa Beltexazari nri nsina na mulukwaaka ni munepa wa miluku sootteela onkhala mwa yoowo." 
Daniel4:9 Keenre: “Beltexazari, mutokweene a anamacitta, koosuwela weera munepa wa miluku sootteela onkhala mwa nyuwo, ni mungwera othupulula nakhalaru ntikhinelo. Vano mukitaphuleleleke yoolohaaka." 
Daniel4:10 Nyoonelo koonnaaka kiixaatalenleene vabeettiniwaka ti iya: Kaahoona ni waakhalawo ohoolowaka mwiri woorakamaxa eriyari ya elapo. 
Daniel4:11 Mwiri waahunnuwaxa mpaka omakoteloniwaya waaphiya wiirimu; waari woowooneya mpaka ekotenle elapo. 
Daniel4:12 Makukhwaaya yaari ooreera ni soowimasaya saahaatta ni saakhalamo sooca wa ootheene. Vathiwaya axinama a ntuphini yaamutthawelawo ni ipalame sa wiirimu saakhala mphandinimwaya; soopattuxiwa sootheene saaca mwemmo. 
Daniel4:13 Mmooneloni kaarinaaka kikonaka, kaaweha ni ohoolowaka aakhala namutthenga ootteela aarweela wiirimu." 
Daniel4:14 Owo aakhuwela ni nsu ntokotoko: Muuhe mwiri ni mutaase; mvuruleke makukhwaaya ni mmwaraxe soowiimasaya. Axinama ari vathiwaya etthawewo ni hiihotho ipalame sinkhala mphandinimwaya. 
Daniel4:15 Vaheera nikotto ni mikhwankwaarisaya, sitthukiweene ni eyuuma ni ebronze*, sikhaleke vathi; eriyari ya malaxi a ntuphini. Owo iimeliwe nikame na wiirimu ni owo aceeke malaxi vamoha ni axinama a elapo ya vathi." 
Daniel4:16 Muupuwelowaawe wa omutthu oceendyiwe ni okhale ntoko mwaamunama mpaka omvirela ihuhu ithannapiili. 
Daniel4:17 Yoolakela enlaleiwa ni anamitthenga; ootteela anghima yoolakela eyo weera akumi ootheene esuwele weera Muluku Musulusulu onlamula meekhaawe omwene wootheene wa omutthu. Owo onimvaha onimutthunaawe ni onimwinnyerera olamula yoole oohiphwanelela. 
Daniel4:18 Ela yooloha miyo Nebukadenezari kaaraakano. Vano, Beltexazari, mukithalihere etaphulelowaaya niwoko khawowo a anamirukwaaka moomwenenimwaka ongwera okithalihera etaphulelowaaya. Vaheera nyuwo mungwera niwoko munepa wa miluku sootteela onkhala mwa nyuwo.”" 
Daniel4:19 Vano Daniyeli (iitthaniwatho Beltexazari) aatikhinihiwaxa wa ehuhu ekina ni soowuupuwelasawe samoopopiha. Vanonto mwene aamweerela: “Beltexazari, muhihiye yooloha naari etaphulelowaaya ewoopopihakani.” Daniyeli aamwaakhula: “Pwiiyaaka, waari weera yooloha ela yaaweereela amwiittanaanyu ni etaphulelowaaya awananinyu!" 
Daniel4:20 Mwiri moonnaanyu wunnungwe woorakamaxa omakoteloniwaya ophiyaka wiirimu ni woowooneya mpaka ekotenle elapo," 
Daniel4:21 aani, mwireene yoowo ni makukhu ooreeraxa ni soowiima soowaatta, waavahaka sooca wa ootheene, wiitthuuwa wa axinama ni mapuro a ipuurusaya ipalame sa wiirimu –" 
Daniel4:22 vano nyuwo, mwene, ti mwiri mutokweene owo! Moothatuwa mutokweene ni oolipaxa; otokweenaanyu wohunnuwa mpaka woophiya wiirimu ni olamulawanyu ompwaherera mpaka ilapo sa ottai sa elapo ya vathi." 
Daniel4:23 Nyuwo, amwene mwaamoonatho namutthenga, ootteela, aarweela wiirimu, eeraka: ‘Muuhe mwiri ni mutaase! Vaheera nikotto ni mikhwankwaarisaya sitthukiweene ni eyuuma ni ebronze*, muhiyeke. Nno nikhaleke vathi eriyari ya malaxi a ntuphini. Owo onimwiimeliwa nikame na wiirimu ni onookhala ni axinama a ntuphini mpaka omvirela ihuhu ithannapiili.’" 
Daniel4:24 Ii! Amwene, etaphulelo ni ekano Muluku a Musulusulu olamulenlaawe mwaha wa pwiiyaaka mwene ti ela:" 
Daniel4:25 Munimoomoleliwa ottai wa atthu ni munookhala vamoha ni axinama a ntuphini; munimooca malaxi ntoko imombe ni munimwiimeliwa nikame na wiirimu. Sinimoovirelani ihuhu ithannapiili mpaka muneeraanyu mwaakhulele weera Muluku a Musulusulu onlamula omwene wa omutthu, amvahaka akhalaru mutthu onimutthunaawe." 
Daniel4:26 Nlamulo noohiya nikotto ni mikhwakwaarisaya nintaphulela weera omwenaanyu munoohokoloxeriwatho nyuwo mwaakhulela olamula wa wiirimu. 
Daniel4:27 Tivawo, amwene, mwaakhulele olakawaka: muhiyeke sootthekasanyu mpakaka yeeyo eri ya ekhaikhai ni muhiyeketho soonanarasanyu, ngwooniheraka oohooxiwa murima wooreera. Apaale vano opuhawanyu onoopwaherera.”" 
Daniel4:28 Itthu sootheene iye saamukhumelela mwene Nebukadenezari. 
Daniel4:29 Sivirakaru nyeeri muloko ni miili, mwene eetteettaka hiihaale vataratoni wa empa ya emwene oBabiloniya," 
Daniel4:30 aahiixeerela: “Moone, Babiloniya mutokweene kiitekenlaaka ntoko erikiriki ya omwenaaka. Kohiitekela ola ni ikurusaka sooweraxa ni wa ovuwawaka.”" 
Daniel4:31 Owo uulumaka hiihaale, nsu naahoorwa wiirimu: “Mwene Nebukadenezari, ekano elamuliwe wa nyuwo ti ela: Olamulawanyu wa omwene woovenxiwa wa nyuwo." 
Daniel4:32 Munimoomoleliwa ottai wa atthu ni munookhala vamoha ni axinama a ntuphini; munimooca malaxi ntoko imombe. Sinimoovirelani ihuhu ithannapiili mpaka muneeraanyu mwaakhulele weera Muluku a Musulusulu onlamula omwene wa omutthu, amvahaka akhalaru mutthu onimutthunaawe.”" 
Daniel4:33 Vano yeeyo yuulummwe mwaha wa Nebukadenezari yaakwaniheriwa khuluwi. Aahoomoleliwa ottai wa atthu, anaca malaxi ntoko imombe. Erutthwaawe yaahiimeliwa nikame na wiirimu mpaka mayihaawe ni mapururuwaawe wunnuwa ntoko a xaaka ni mankharwaawe yaavera ntoko a apalame." 
Daniel4:34 Simalakaru ihuhusene seiye, miyo, Nebukadenezari, kaaweha wiirimu ni kaahoonelela weera muupuwelowaaka waahokolowa. Vano kaamuttottopela Muluku a Musulusulu; kaamuttittimiha ni kaamvuwiha. Olamulawawe ti woohimala; omwenaawe ompwaherera wa ikhapira sootheene." 
Daniel4:35 Atthu ootheene a elapo ya vathi khaveetthwaawewo. Owo ompaka yeeyo ontthunaawe ni ikuru sa wiirimu ni amaki a vathi. Khawowo ongwera ohiiha ntatanawe hata omweerela: “Mpankeni?” 
Daniel4:36 Ehuhuweene yeele waakihokoleela muupuwelowaaka ni kaahaakhelatho nttittimihonaka ni waarawaka wa ovuwa wa omwenaaka. Anamalakaaka ni maneethaaka yaakaasa ni kaahokoleela vahiceniwaka ya emwene kithatuwaka mutokweene opwaha khalayi. 
Daniel4:37 Vano miyo, Nebukadenezari, kinimuttottopela, kinimuttittimiha ni kinimvuwiha Mwene a wiirimu, niwoko sootheene ompakaawe ti sa ekhaikhai ni iphirosawe sootheene ti sookwanela. Owo ongwera wayeviha ootheene aneetta moota woowiixoona." 
Daniel5:1 Mwene Belixazari ahaapakela efesta etokotoko maneethaawe macira muloko, anawuraxa vamoha ni yaawosa." 
Daniel5:2 Awuraka hiihaale eviinyuwaawe, aalamula weera ikoomixi sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha* atithawe Nebukadenezari yaakhumihalaaya Mpaani mwa Muluku oYerusaleemu siruuhiwe. Aatthuna weera maneethaawe, axaarawe ni ikuxosawe ewurere." 
Daniel5:3 Vano yaaruuha ikoomixi sa eyuuma yoorikaxa saakhumihiwe Mpaani mwa Muluku oYerusaleemu ni mwene, maneethaawe, axaarawe ni ikuxosawe yaawurera." 
Daniel5:4 Ewuraka eviinyu, yaattottopela miluku sa eyuuma yoorikaxa, eparatha*, ebronze*, eyuuma, nyiri ni maluku." 
Daniel5:5 Wootutuxereya ntata na mutthu naahooneya nilepaka vaxirini mpatta woowooneyaxa mpaani mwa emwene. Mwene aahoona ntata nlepaka. 
Daniel5:6 Aahookhwa maririmela ni aahoovaxa moota wooweera makuthaawe yaamanana ni khaawera weemela. 
Daniel5:7 Mwene aawiitthana anamacitta, anamawehaweha ithenyeeri ni anahako, anaweerela anamiruku ale a oBabiloniya: “Yoole aneera asome masu ala ni akithalihere etaphulelowaaya onoowarihiwa ekuwo yoorikaxa ni onyooro wa eyuuma yoorikaxa muxikomwawe ni onookhala oottittimiheya anaararu mweelaponi yootheene.”" 
Daniel5:8 Vano anamiruku ootheene a mwene yaahoorwa, mene khayaawenre osoma masu hata omuthalihera mwene etaphulelowaaya." 
Daniel5:9 Hiiho mwene Beltexazari aahoopopiheyaxatho ni ekhovaawe yaamoraxa. Vanonto maneethaawe yaatikhinihiwa. 
Daniel5:10 Pwiyamwene, iiwakaru okhuwela wa mwene ni maneethaawe, aavolowa mukwartuni mwa efesta, anamweerela: “Ii! Amwene, mukhaleke wa mahuku ootheene! Muhoove ni muhitteenguwe!" 
Daniel5:11 Ookhala mulopwana moomwenenimwanyu orino munepa wa miluku mwa yoowo. Mweehuhuni mwa atithinyu waahooneya weera aakhalano wiiwexexa ni miruku ntoko sa miluku. Mwene Nebukadenezari, atithinyu mwaarandenlaanyu, aamukhaliha mutokweene a anamacitta, akhwiri, anamawehaweha ithenyeeri ni anahako." 
Daniel5:12 Mulopwana owo, Daniyeli, mwene aamuttenghaawe Beltexazari, aakhalano iseru ni oweratho otaphulela sooloha, othalihera ethale ni othupulula mitikhinelo soorikaxa. Mmwiitthane Daniyeli ni owo onimoothaliherani etaphulelo ya masu ala.”" 
Daniel5:13 Vano Daniyeli aaroihiwa ohoolo wa mwene ni owo aamukoha: “Nyuwo Daniyeli, mmoha a anamatthukiwa atithaka, amwene, yaakhumihalaaya oYuda?" 
Daniel5:14 Kohiiwa weera munepa wa miluku ori mwa nyuwo ni weera mookhalano wiiwexexa, soosuwela ni miruku sitokotoko." 
Daniel5:15 Anamiruku ni akhwiri kaaruuheliwa ohoolowaka weera esome masu ala ni ekithalihere etaphulelowaaya, mene khaawenre othalihera." 
Daniel5:16 Vano miyo kohoona weera nyuwo munoowera otaphulela ni othupulula mitikhinelo. Mwawera osoma masu ala mukithaliheraka etaphulelowaaya, munoowarihiwa ikuwo soorikaxa, onyooro wa eyuuma yoorikaxa muxikomwanyu ni munookhalihiwa oottittimiheya anaararu moomwenenimwaka.”" 
Daniel5:17 Vano Daniyeli aamwaakhula mwene: “Muhiyeke soovahasanyu ni mwaavahe akina. Wa soothesene, kinimoosomelani yoolempwa ni kinimoothaliherani etaphulelowaaya." 
Daniel5:18 Ii! Amwene, Muluku a Musulusulu aahaavaha atithinyu, Nebukadenezari, olamulaxa, otokweenexa, ovuwa ni waara." 
Daniel5:19 Niwoko na otokweene Muluku aavanghaawe, miloko sootheene sa elapo ya vathi ni atthu a muulumo ootheene yaamoovaxa. Yaale mwene aatthunnaawe owiiva, aangwiiva ni yaale aatthunaawe owuurela, aangwuurela; yaale aatthunaawe waakhaliha mapuro oottittimiheya, aamwaakhaliha ni yaale aatthunaawe waayeviha aamwaayeviha." 
Daniel5:20 Wa soothesene, murimaawe waathatungwaaya woowiixoona ni woowuuma niwoko na wiikuxa, aavenxiwa vahiceniwawe ya emwene ni aahaakhiwa ovuwawawe." 
Daniel5:21 Aahoomoleliwa ottai wa atthu ni muupuwelowaawe waari ntoko mwaamunama. Aakhala vamoha ni abuuru a ntuphini, anaca malaxi ntoko imombe ni erutthwaawe yaahiimeliwa nikame na wiirimu mpaka aakhulenlaawe weera Muluku a Musulusulu onlamulaxa omwene wa atthu ni onimukhaliha mulamuli yoowo onimutthunaawe." 
Daniel5:22 Vaheera nyuwo, Beltexazari, namarandelaawe, khamwiiyevinghe muroosuwelaru sootheene iye." 
Daniel5:23 Ohiyanawaya mohiivuwiha ompwaha Yave a wiirimu. Moolamula weera ikoomixi sa Mpaani mwa Yave muruuheliwe nyuwo, maneethaanyu, axaarinyu ni ikuxosanyu weera ngwurere. Moottottopela miluku sa eparatha*, eyuuma yoorikaxa, ebronze*, eyuuma, nyiri ni maluku mwa seiyo sihingwera woona, wiiwa naari wiiwexexa. Vaheera khamunttittiminghe Muluku mwa Yooworu onlakela okumaanyu ni iphirosanyu sootheene." 
Daniel5:24 Tivawo aaruminghaawe ntata nilempe masu ala. 
Daniel5:25 Masu alempwe ti ala: MENE, MENE, TEKEL, PARSINI." 
Daniel5:26 Vano etaphulelo ya masu ala ti ela: MENE: Muluku ohaalikela mahuku a olamulawanyu, anahela ommaleloniwaya." 
Daniel5:27 TEKEL: moophimiwa vamuringoni ni mooveruwa. 
Daniel5:28 PARSINI: Omwenaanyu wookawanyeya, enavahiwa aMedesi ni aParesi.”" 
Daniel5:29 Vano Beltexazari aalamula weera Daniyeli awarihiwe ikuwo soorikaxa, onyooro wa eyuuma yoorikaxa muxikomwawe ni owo aamukhaliha oottittimiheya anaararu moomwenenimwawe." 
Daniel5:30 Ohiyuweene yoole Beltexazari, mwene a oBabiloniya, aahiiviwa" 
Daniel5:31 ni Dareyexi, mMedesi, aakuxa omwene areeneno iyaakha miloko mithannamosa ni piili." 
Daniel6:1 Yaamusiveliha Dareyexi waakhaliha mapwattapwattha ncira ni miloko miili weera elamule mmapuroni moothemwene a omwenaawe ni 
Daniel6:2 anamawehaweha asitokweene araru yaalamulaka yaawosa. Vano Daniyeli aari mmoha a araru ale. Mapwattapwattha yaatthuneya owaakhula araru ale weera mwene ahiyeleele etthu. 
Daniel6:3 Vano Daniyeli aaweraxa moolamulanimwawe eriyari ya asitokweene eeli akina ni mapwattapwattha, moota wooweera mwene aahuupuwela omukhaliha mutokweene anaaveeli a omwene wootheene." 
Daniel6:4 Mwa yeeyo, maguvernadori eeli akina ni mapwattapwattha yannaasaasa moota woomoothera Daniyeli moolamulanimwawe, mene khayaawenre ophwanya. Khayaaphwanya etthu yookhoromana mwa yoowo niwoko aari oororomeleya ni khaankhanle a murima wookhoromana naari murima woohipwattha." 
Daniel6:5 Ommaleloni asilopwana ale yaaheera: “Khanirwa niphwanya etthu weera nimoothere mulopwana owo, Daniyeli, ohikhanle mwaha wa nlamulo na Mulukwaawe.”" 
Daniel6:6 Tivawo maguvernadori eeli akina ni mapwattapwattha oowiiwananeene yaarongwaaya wa mwene, enamweerela: “Ii! Mwene Dariyexe, mukhaleke wa mahuku ootheene!" 
Daniel6:7 Anamawehaweha a itthu sa emwene, anamalamula, mapwattapwattha, anamalaka ni maguvernadori ootheene yaahiiwanana weera mwene akhalihe ekano ni anyesererihe yeeyo. Vano ekanoweene yeeyo ti ela: Wa mahuku miloko miraru, yoole aneera amulape akhalaru muluku hata mutthu mukina ahikhanle mwene onoovonyeriwa mulittini mwa amwatto." 
Daniel6:8 Vano, amwene, mukhalihe ekano ni mulepe yeeyo weera ehiceendyiwe, muttharaka ikano sa aMedesi ni aParesi sihingwereya oceendyeya.”" 
Daniel6:9 Vano Dareyexe aalepa ekano. 
Daniel6:10 Vano Daniyeli iiwakaru weera ekano yoolempwa, aarowa owannyawe, anavolowa mukwaartunimwawe mwa osulu mwa mwemmo ixanela saahuleleya mpatta wa oYerusaleemu. Mmwe aapaka yeeyo aakhovelenlaawe opaka: imaara tthaaru khula nihuku annakokhora, annavekela, amutthapelaka Mulukwaawe." 
Daniel6:11 Vano asilopwana ale yaarowa vamoha, enamphwanya Daniyeli avekelaka, amvekelaka Muluku ekhavihero." 
Daniel6:12 Tivawo yaarongwaaya wa mwene, enuuluma ni yoowo mwaha wa ekanowaawe ya emwene: “Ii! Amwene, moolepa ekano weera wa mahuku miloko miraru, yoole aneera amulape akhalaru muluku hata mutthu mukina ohikhanle mwene, onoovonyeriwa mulittini mwa amwatto, keera?” Mwene aawaakhula: “Ekano ti ya ekhaikhai, ettharaka ikano sa aMedesi ni aParesi sihingwereya oceendyeya.”" 
Daniel6:13 Vano yaamweerela: “Daniyeli, mmoha a ootthukiwa a oYuda, khanoopwatthani nyuwo, amwene, hata ekano mulempaanyu. Owo nlelo onnavekela imaara tthaaru khula nihuku.”" 
Daniel6:14 Mwene iiwakaru yeeyo aathananaxa; aatthunaxa omoopola Daniyeli ni aahaasaasa moota woomoopola mpaka wiila. 
Daniel6:15 Vano asilopwana yaarowa vamoha wa mwene, enamweerela: “Ii! Amwene, muupuwelele weera nlamulo na aMedesi ni aParesi nneera nnenesene weera khoongwereya oceendya yakhalaru ekano hoye hoye yoolamula ya emwene.”" 
Daniel6:16 Vano mwene aalamula ni awosa yaamuruuha Daniyeli, enamvonyera mulittini mwa amwatto. Wa soothesene mwene aamweerela Daniyeli: “Mulukwaanyu munimurumeelaanyu khula nihuku awoopoleni!”" 
Daniel6:17 Yaawala nlitti ni nluku, ni mwene aattitta ni munelaawe a emwene ni annela a maneethaawe weera aalakeleliwaawe Daniyeli kheenceendyeya." 
Daniel6:18 Vahoolowaya mwene aaholokoleela mpaanimwawe ya emwene, anaviriha ohiyu ahicaaka, hata ahimutthunaka mutthu vamaithoniwawe. Vano khaawenre okona." 
Daniel6:19 Oxaakaru, mwene aavenya, anatthimakela onlittini na amwatto." 
Daniel6:20 Aakhuveelaawe vanlittini, aamwiitthana Daniyeli ni nsu noothananaxa: “Daniyeli, murumeiyi a Muluku Mukumi, weeraka Mulukwaanyu mwa Yoowo munimurumeelaanyu khula nihuku oowera oowoopolani?”" 
Daniel6:21 Vano Daniyeli aamwaakhula: “Ii! Amwene, mukhaleke wa mahuku ootheene!" 
Daniel6:22 Mulukwaaka aamurumiha ndyelowaawe ni owo oowala iyano sa amwatto. Awosa khaakivulalinghe niwoko koophwanyiwa woohinthowa vamaithoniwawe. Hata nkipankeru etthu yoonanara ohoolowanyu, amwene.”" 
Daniel6:23 Mwene aahakalalaxa, analamula weera Daniyeli akhumihiwe munlittini. Vano Daniyeli akhumihiweene munlittini, yaahoona weera khaavulanleru niwoko aamuroromela Mulukwaawe." 
Daniel6:24 Mwene aalamula weera asilopwana yaamoothenre Daniyeli moota woolokotheya eruuhiwe ni evonyeriwe munlittini na amwatto vamoha ni axaaraaya ni anamwanaaya. Awosa ehinaaye ophiya vathi, amwatto yaahaakaphula, enapwexakasa makhuvaaya ootheene." 
Daniel6:25 Vano mwene Dareyexi aalepela miloko sootheene ni atthu a muulumo ootheene mweelaponi yootheene: “Mpuha okhaleke ni nyuwo! 
Daniel6:26 Kinkhaliha ekano weera moomwenenimwaka wootheene atthu emooveke ni emuttittimiheke Muluku a Daniyeli, niwoko Owo ti Muluku Mukumi ni Owo onkhala wa mahuku ootheene. Omwenaawe khoorwa ophwatiwa ni olamulawawe khoommala." 
Daniel6:27 Owo onnoopola ni onnivuluxa; Owo ompaka sootikhiniha ni ineneero wiirmu ni vathi. Owo oomoopola Daniyeli mwa ikuru sa amwatto.” 
Daniel6:28 Hiiho Daniyeli saamweettela nnene moolamulani mwa Dareyexi ni mwa Siru, mParesi." 
Daniel7:1 Vayaakhani yoopacera ya olamula wa Beltexazari, mwene a oBabiloniya, Daniyeli aaloha ni nyoonelo sikina sikina saavira mmuupuwelonimwawe iixaatalenleene vabeettiniwawe. Owo aalepa nkwasu wa yoolohaawe." 
Daniel7:2 Daniyeli aahera: “Moolohanimwaka ohiyu kaahoona ni ohoolowaka saakhala ipheyo ixexe sa wiirimu sitekumihaka ephareiya etokotoko. 
Daniel7:3 Axinama axexe atokotoko, ekhalelowaaya yoovirikana mukina ni mukhwaawe, yaakhuma mphareiyani." 
Daniel7:4 Oopacera aari ntoko mwatto akhalanaka mapupha a xaaka. Kaaweha mpaka mapuphaawe yaavasuliwa ni owo aaheemexiwa vathi moota wooweera aaheemela nyetto miili ntoko mutthu, anaakhela murima wa mutthu." 
Daniel7:5 Vano ohoolowaka kaamoona mwaamunama anaaveeli aalikana ni ursu*. Owo eemenle ni nyetto sa ohoolo ni mmwaano eriyari ya maino aakhalano iparari tthaaru. Aaleeliwa: ‘Mvenye ni mukhuure enama yincipale.’ 
Daniel7:6 Vahoolowaya kaaweha ni ohoolowaka aakhala mwaamunama anaararu, aalikana ni havara. Ottuliwawe aakhalano mapupha maxexe ntoko a mwaapalame. Mwaamunama ole aakhalano nyuru mixexe ni aavahiwa ikuru sa olamula." 
Daniel7:7 Vahoolowaya, moolohanimwaka ohiyu kaaweha ni aakhalawo mwaamunama anaaxexe – oowoopihaxa ni a ikuru sitokotoko. Aakhalano maino matokotoko a eyuuma mwa yaawo aakhuurelaaweno aavaraawe ni aanyikalela seiyo saahala. Khaalikanano axinama araru akina ni aakhalano manyaka muloko." 
Daniel7:8 Miyo kiwehexexaka manyaka, kaahoona nnyaka nikhaani nikina, naakhuma eriyaraaya ni manyaka mararu a yaale oopacera yaakompholiwa weera nikhaani nne niphwanye nipuro. Nnyaka nne naakhalano maitho ntoko a atthu ni eyano yuuluma moota woowiikuxa." 
Daniel7:9 Miyo kiwehaka, saahiikaathiwa ihice sa emwene ni Muluku Oohimala aakilaathela. Yoowaraawe yaari yootteela ntoko etthabwe ni mayihaawe etteenleene ntoko mapururu a eputtiputthi. Ehicaawe ya emwene yaariciwa ni mooro ni mareekwaaya yaavarelatho." 
Daniel7:10 Mooloko wa mooro waakhuma ohoolowawe. Atthu ancipalexa yaamurumeela; atthu oohaalikeleya yaaheemela ohoolowawe. Nipuro nuulummwa milattu naapacera nthorihelo ni ilivuru saahuliwa. 
Daniel7:11 Vano miyo kaapwaherera oweha niwoko na masu oowiikuxa nnyaka nne nuulumaaya. Kaaweha mpaka aakhwaawe mwaamunama ni erutthwaawe yaaphwatiwa, enavonyeriwa vayikho." 
Daniel7:12 Ikuru soolamula sa axinama akinaawo saavenxiwa, mene yaatthuniheriwa okhala ni okumi wa ehuhu ekina." 
Daniel7:13 Mmoonelonimwaka ohiyu kaaweha ni aakhala ohoolowaka mmoha aalikana ni mwaana a mutthu arwaaka mmahutteni a wiirimu. Owo aamwaattamela Muluku Oohimala, anaronghiwa vamaithoniwawe." 
Daniel7:14 Owo aavahiwa olamula, ovuwa ni omwene; miloko sootheene ni atthu a muulumo ootheene yaamulapa. Olamulawawe ti woohimala ni khoorwa omala ni omwenaawe khoorwa ophwatiwa.”" 
Daniel7:15 “Miyo, Daniyeli, kaariipiwa murima ni nyoonelo saavinre mmuupuwelonimwaka saakivalaveliha." 
Daniel7:16 Kaamwaattamela mmoha a yaale yeemenle vaavaale, kinamvekela etaphulelo ya ekhaikhai ya itthu sootheene iye. Vano owo aakileela, akithaliheraka etaphulelo ya itthu iye:" 
Daniel7:17 ‘Axinama axexe atokotoko ari imwene ixexe sineera sikhumelele mweelaponi. 
Daniel7:18 Vaheera ootteela a Muluku a Musulusulu animwaakhela omwene ni anookuxa yoowo wa mahuku ootheene – aani, wa mahuku ootheene.’" 
Daniel7:19 Vanonto, kaatthuna osuwela etaphulelo ya ekhaikhai ya mwaamunama anaaxexe aavirikana ni akinaawo ni aari oowoopihaxa, aarino maino matokotoko a eyuuma ni mankharu a ebronze* – mwaamunameene yoole aakhuura ni aanyaanya seiyo aavaraawe ni aanyikalela sootheene saahala." 
Daniel7:20 Kaatthuna osuwelatho mwaha wa manyaka muloko a mmurumwawe ni sa nnyaka nikina naakhumelenle vanipuroni na manyaka mararu makina yaakomphongwe – nnyakanene nenne naarino maitho ni eyano yuuluma moota woowiikuxa. 
Daniel7:21 Miyo kiwehexexaka, nnyaka nne naawanano ootteela, nnaawina," 
Daniel7:22 mpaka Muluku a Musulusulu aaphiyalaawe, alaleiyaka nthorihelo aweerelaka ootteela a Muluku a Musulusulu. Yoophiya ehuhu awosa yookuxa omwene." 
Daniel7:23 Owo aakithalihera etaphulelo ela: ‘Mwaamunama anaaxeexe ti omwene wanaaxexe onuukhumelele mweelaponi. Onoovirikana ni omwene mukina wootheene ni onoonyaanya elapo yootheene ya vathi, ahononaka ni anyikalelaka." 
Daniel7:24 Manyaka muloko ti mamwene muloko eniikhumelele omweneene yoowo. Vahoolowaya mwene mukina onookhumelela – avirikanaxaka ni mamwene oopacera. Owo onimwaakuruxa mamwene mararu. 
Daniel7:25 Owo onimuuluma soomvirikanyihela Muluku a Musulusulu, aahasulaka ootteelaawe, eereraka oceendya ihuhu ni malamulo. Ootteela animwinnyereriwa mmatatanimwawe wa ehuhu, ihuhu ni eriyari ya ehuhu." 
Daniel7:26 Vaheera Mphuki onookilaathi ni ikurusawe sinoovenxiwa ni sinoophwatiwa woomalela wa mahuku ootheene. 
Daniel7:27 Vano olamula, ikuru ni ovuwa wa omwene wootheene wa vathi onimwinnyereriwa mmatatani mwa ootteela, muloko wa Muluku a Musulusulu. Omwenaawe onookhala woohimala ni anamalamula ootheene anoomulapa emwiiwelelaka.’" 
Daniel7:28 Ela emalihero ya moonelo. Miyo, Daniyeli kaathananaxa niwoko na soowuupuwelasaka ni ekhovaaka yaakimora, mene kaathokorora itthu iya vamurimani.”" 
Daniel8:1 Vayaakani yanaararu ya olamula wa mwene Beltexazari, miyo, Daniyeli, kaakhalano moonelo mukina, ohiya woopacera." 
Daniel8:2 Mmoonelonimwaka koonnaaka yaari ti ela: Kaari musidadeni yoolipaxa eniitthaniwa Susani, elapo ya wElami. Mmoonelonimwaka kaari mukerekhere mooloko Ulai." 
Daniel8:3 Kaaweha okhopela mooloko ni kaamoona napunci ni manyaka meeli, eemenleene mukerekhere mooloko ni manyakeene yaale yaarakamaxa. Vano nnyaka naamalihenre omela naari noorakamaxa opwaha nikina." 
Daniel8:4 Kaangwehexexa napunci eetteettaka mpatta wa ninkela nsuwa, ottuttuwani ni ohitto. Khaariworu mwaamunama aawera ongwanano hata waakiha mwa ikurusawe. Aapaka yeeyo aatthunaawe ni aamutepa wunnuwa." 
Daniel8:5 Miyo nlelo kitthokelelaka yeeyo, wootutuxereya epuri etokotoko yaarweela mpatta ninkela nsuwa ekhalanaka nnyaka eriyari ya maithwaaya. Eyo yaaviravira elapo ya vathi yootheene, ehitavaka vathi." 
Daniel8:6 Epuri ele yaamwaattamela napunci a manyaka meeli kaamoonnaaka eemenleene mukerekhere mooloko, enamurowela enyoonyaxiweene." 
Daniel8:7 Kaahoona epuri engwananaka napunci moota woowoopihaxa; yaammana napunci epwexaka manyakaawe. Napunci khaawenre owina ni aamoroxeliwa vathi, ananyikaleliwa ni khaawo aawera omoopola mwa ikuru sa epuri." 
Daniel8:8 Epuri yaahunnuwaxa, mene ereene ya ikuruxa, nnyakanaya ntokweene naapwexiwa, ni vanipuroniwaya manyaka maxexe matokotoko yaahunnuwa ewehaka mipatta mixexe sa vathi." 
Daniel8:9 Vannyakani nimoha a yaawo naakhuma nikina nikhaani, mene naahunnuwa woowaakuveya mukuruni niwehaka mpatta wa ohitto, ninkhuma nsuwa ni wa Elapo Yooreeraxa." 
Daniel8:10 Naahunnuwa mpaka waatava anakhotto a wiirimu, nnavonyera vathi sikina sa ithenyeeri sa wiirimu, nnanyikalela." 
Daniel8:11 Aahunnuwa moota wooweera aamutannya mutokweene a anakhotto a wiirimu avenxaka yooveleela ya khula nihuku aapakeliwa mutokweene yoowo, ni nipuronawe nootteela naaphwatiwa." 
Daniel8:12 Niwoko na ovaanya, anakhotto a ootteela ni yooveleela ya khula nihuku yaavahiwa nnyaka. Nnyaka nno naamweetteleya nnene mwa sootheene naapakaaya ni ekhaikhai yaavonyeriwa vathi." 
Daniel8:13 Vano kaawiiwa andyelo etthekulaka ni mmoha a yaawo aamukoha mukhwaawe: “Sookhumelela iya nsimale yaakhani sihimmwale ni moonelo ola? Mpaka yaakhani ovaanya woophwata oneeraaya opwaherere wooceeliha sooveleela sa khula nihuku? Mpaka yaakhani Nipuro Nootteela* ni anakhotto eneeraaya evahereriwe mukuruni mwa nnyaka enyikaleliwaka?” 
Daniel8:14 Owo aakaakhula: “Sootheene iyo sinoomala oxeexelo ni ohiyu 2 300. Vahoolowaya Nipuro Nootteela* nnooraseliwa.” 
Daniel8:15 Miyo, Daniyeli kiwehexexaka moonelo ni keereraka wiiwexexa, ohoolowaka aakhumelela mmoha aalikana ni mutthu." 
Daniel8:16 Kaahiiwa nsu na mulopwana wUlai iitthanaka: “Gabriyeli, munthalihere mulopwana ola etaphulelo ya moonelo.”" 
Daniel8:17 Owo aakaattamenlaawe, kaahoova, kinamorela vathi. Owo aakeerela: “Mwaana a mutthu, mwiiwexexe weera moonelo ola onthoonyera ihuhu sa ommaleloni." 
Daniel8:18 Owo uulumaka ni miyo, miyo kiipopheiyeene kaakomoka. Vano aakitava, anakeemexa.”" 
Daniel8:19 Owo aakeerela: “Miyo kinimoothaliherani yeeyo eneera ekhumelele muhoolo, mweehuhuni ya isara, niwoko moonelo ola onthoonyera ehuhu ya ommaleloni." 
Daniel8:20 Napunci a manyaka meeli mmoonnaanyu onaathoonyera mamwene a oMedesi ni oParesi. 
Daniel8:21 Epuri ya mapururu mancipale enimuthoonyera mwene a oGresiya ni nnyaka ntokotoko erirari ya maithwaaya ti mwene oopacera. 
Daniel8:22 Manyaka maxexe akhumme vanipuroni na nnyaka nenenenno naaphweeye, anthoonyera imwene ixexe sineera sikhumelele mwa muloko owo, mene ohikhalanaka ikhurusene seiyo sa muloko yoowo." 
Daniel8:23 Mweehuhuni yoomalihera ya olamulawaya, ovaanya wa atakhali waatepaka, onookhumelela mwene a oxilili, namawera onyeenga." 
Daniel8:24 Owo onoothatuwa oolipaxa, mene khoohiyono ni ikurusawe. Owo onootannyera ophwata woowoopiha ni sinoomweettela nnenesene mwa sootheene aneeraawe apake. Owo onimwaaphwata asilopwana ooweraxa ni atthu ootteela." 
Daniel8:25 Onoopakiha weera olokottha weetteleye nnene ni onimwiixoona okhala mutokweene waapwaha akina. Owo onimwaaphata ancipale a yaawosa aniixuupuwela weera nri mmuretteleni ni onoongwanano Mutokweenexa a anamwane asilopwana a mamwene. Vaheera owo onoophwatiwa, mene khoohiyono ni ikuru sa omutthu." 
Daniel8:26 Moonelo wa oxeexelo ni ohiyu 2 300 nyuwo moonnaanyu etiitthu, mene muthokorore muxiirini niwoko onthoonyera itthu sa muhooloxa.”" 
Daniel8:27 Miyo Daniyeli kaakhulumuwaxa, kinavoreiwa mahuku makina. Vahoolowaya kaavenya, kinapwaherera omurumeela mwene. Kaatuthuwa mwaha wa moonelo ole; nkiiwexexa etaphulelowaaya." 
Daniel9:1 Dariyexe, mwaana mulopwana a Xerxexi, mMedi, aakhalihiwa namalamula a oBabiloniya." 
Daniel9:2 Vano vayaakani yoopacera ya olamulawawe, miyo, Daniyeli, kaahiiwexexa kisomaka masu a Yave aamvahalaawe mprofeeti Yeremiya, weera oYerusaleemu onooheleya nthala wa iyaakha miloko mithannamiili." 
Daniel9:3 Vano kaamwaattamela Yave Muluku kimudyoonttelelaka ni mavekelo, soodyoonttelela ni kitthukaka, kiwanreene isaakho ni kiihenleene ettuura." 
Daniel9:4 Kaamvekela Yave Mulukwaaka, kilapaka: “Ii! Yave, Muluku Mutokweene ni Oowooveya, mwa Yoowo onthokorora wiiraanawawe wa osivela ni ootheene animusivela ni aniiwelela soolamulasawe," 
Daniel9:5 hiyo noottheka ni nookhalano nthowa. Naari atakhali ni anamavaanya; noohiya soolamulasanyu ni ikanosanyu. 
Daniel9:6 Khaniwiiwelenle arumeiyaanyu, maprofeeti yuulumme mwa Nsinananyu ni mamwenaahu, anamwanaaya ni asitithihu ni atthu ootheene a elapo." 
Daniel9:7 Yave, Nyuwo ti a ekhaikhai, mene olelo nohuulihiheyaxa muru niwoko na ohiroromeleyawahu ni Nyuwo – aani hiyo a oYuda, amaki a oYerusaleemu ni aYixrayeli ootheene ekhalaka vakhiviru naari ottaiwene, mweelaponi sootheene munimwaraxenlaanyu." 
Daniel9:8 Ii! Yave, hiyo, mamwenaahu, anamwanaaya ni asitithihu nohuulihiheyaxa muru niwoko na wootthekelani." 
Daniel9:9 Yave Mulukwaahu ti a ikharari ni oolikaneene olevelela, nrimoovaanyaniru." 
Daniel9:10 Hiyo khanimwiiwelenle Yave Mulukwaahu naari khaneettenle ikano aanivanghaawe mwa arumeiyaawe, maprofeeti." 
Daniel9:11 aYixrayeli ootheene aahiya nlamulonanyu, enahapuwa, ekhoottaka owiiwelelani. Tivawo malapho ni mahooxo alempwale munlamuloni na Moisesi, murumeiyi a Muluku, animorenlaaya, niwoko nohootthekelani Nyuwo." 
Daniel9:12 Mookwanihera masu naalakeleliwaahu hiyo ni anamalamulaahu, muniruuhelaka erisa etokotoko. Mweelaponi moothemwene kheenapakiwe etthu ntoko epakingwe oYerusaleemu." 
Daniel9:13 Irisa sootheene iye saanikhumelela ntoko elempwalaaya munlamuloni na Moisesi. Hata hiiho khanaanse waakhuleliwa ni Yave Mulukwaahu, nihiyaka sootthekasahu ni nittharaka ekhaikhaiyaawe." 
Daniel9:14 Yave khaapinse oniruuhela erisa, niwoko Yave Mulukwaahu ti a ekhaikhai mwa sootheene ompakaawe; hata hiiho khanimwiiwelenle." 
Daniel9:15 Vano, Yave Mulukwaahu mukhumihale mulokwaanyu wExipitu ni Ntata Nooweraxa ni mwiipakenle Nsina nimpwaherera mpaka olelo, hiyo noottheka ni nookhalano nthowa." 
Daniel9:16 Ii! Yave, muhapuxe isarasanyu ni onyoonyeriwawanyu oYerusaleemu, esidadaanyu, mwaakwaanyu wootteela, muttharaka soopakasanyu sootheene sa ekhaikhai. Sootthekasahu ni miteko sootakhala sa makholowaahu sootannyera otthebwiwa wa oYerusaleemu ni mulokwaanyu wootheene ni ootheene anirukureenre." 
Daniel9:17 Ii! Muluku, mwiiwe mavekelo ni wiidyoonttelela wa murumeiyaanyu. Dyoontte! Moosivelanimwanyu ngwehe ni onnene nipuronanyu nootteela nithaamiwe!" 
Daniel9:18 Ii! Muluku Dyoontte mwiiwe; muhuleke maithwaanyu ni ngwehe othaamiwa wa esidade enkuxa Nsinananyu. Hiyo khannoovekelani Nyuwo niwoko na ororomeleyawahu, mene niwoko na ikhararisanyu sitokotoko." 
Daniel9:19 Ii! Yave, mwiiwe! Ii! Yave, mulevelele! Ii! Yave, mwiiwe ni mpake. Ii! Mulukwaaka, moosivelanimwanyu muhipise, niwoko esidadaanyu ni mulokwaanyu onkuxa Nsinananyu.”" 
Daniel9:20 Miyo kilokololaka ni kivekelaka, kilapaka sootthekasaka ni seiyo sa mulokwaaka aYixrayeli, ni kimvekelaka Yave Mulukwaaka keerelaka mwaakwaawe wootteela," 
Daniel9:21 vano miyo nlelo kivekelaka hiihale, Gabriyeli, mulopwana ole kaamonnaaka mmooneloni wa khalayi, aakaattamela avavaka woowaakuveya, wookwanaka ehuhu ya yooveleela ya oxekuwa." 
Daniel9:22 Owo aakixuttiha akeerelaka: “Daniyeli, miyo kirweenle woovahani wiiwexexa ni miruku." 
Daniel9:23 Nyuwo mpacerakaru ovekela, yaahoorwa yoowaakhula yoolikana ni miyo kirweenle woothaliherani, niwoko moosiveleyaxa. Vano, moonele mutthenga ni mwiiwexexe moonelo:" 
Daniel9:24 Soothanliwa isimana miloko mithannamiili wa mulokwaanyu ni esidadaanyu yootteela weera sootakhala ni soottheka simalihiwe; weera eliviwe mathowa, eruuhiwe ekhaikhai wa mahuku ootheene, okwanihereye moonelo ni masu a muhoolo ni weera Ootteelaxa attikittheliwe." 
Daniel9:25 Mwiiwexexe nnenesene etthu ela: Okhuma olamuleliwaaya orasela ni otekihiwa oYerusaleemu mpaka orwa wa Ootteelaxa, Namalamula, sinoovira isimana ithannapiili, ni isimana miloko mithannamosa ni piili. Esidade enooraseliwa ekhalanaka misewe ni yiikalaande, mene nsikhale ihuhu soorikaxa." 
Daniel9:26 Siviraleene isimana miloko mithannamosa ni piili sa seiyo, Oottikittheliwa onimwiiviwa ni khakhalanatho etthu. Esidade ni Nipuro Nootteela* nnoophwatiwa ni muloko wa namalamula anaarwe. Ommaleloni onoophiya ntoko mirupi: owana onoopwaherera mpaka ommaleloni ni woolaleiwa oheleya mathala." 
Daniel9:27 Owo onoopaka wiiraana ni ancipale wa esimana emoha. Vano eriyari ya esimaneene yeeyo sinoomala sooveleela ni soovaha. Mpatta mmoha wa Empa ya Muluku onootekiwa muluku oohiira aneeraawe akhalewo mpaka ophiya ommaleloni olakeleliwaawe.” 
Daniel10:1 Vayaakhani yanaararu ya olamula wa Siru, mwene a oParesi, Daniyeli (iitthaniwatho Beltexazari) aahaakhela ethupululo. Mutthenga wa moonelo ole waari wa ekhaikhai ni waathoonyera ekhotto etokotoko. Aahaakhela wiiwexexa wa mutthenga ole mmooneloni." 
Daniel10:2 Ehuhuweene yeele miyo, Daniyeli, kaaviriha isimana tthaaru kiinlaka." 
Daniel10:3 Nkaaciiyeru yooca yooreeraxa; enama ni eviinyu nkaalawingheru ni nkaavarenleru muteko soowunkhela mpaka omala isimana tthaaru. 
Daniel10:4 Vanihukuni nanaamiloko miili ni maxexe na mweeri woopacera, miyo kaaheemela mukerekhere mooloko mutokotoko oniitthaniwa Tigere." 
Daniel10:5 Kaaweha osulu ni aakhala ohoolowaka mulopwana awanreene eliinyu*, iiphitelenleene laamba a eyuuma yoorikaxa." 
Daniel10:6 Erutthwaawe yaalikana krisolito*, ekhovaawe yaalikana overinya ni maithwaawe yaalikana mithuko sivarelaka, nyoonosawe ni nyettosawe saalikana waara wa ebronze* yoohaniwa nnenesene, ni nsunawe ntoko onyakula wa atthu ancipale." 
Daniel10:7 Ti miyo, Daniyeli, koonne moonelo owo; yaakihoolaawo khayoonne etthu, mene yaasareya woova, enatthawa ni eniipitha." 
Daniel10:8 Vano miyo kaahanle meekhaaka kiwehexexaka moonelo mutokotoko ole; nkaakhalannetho ikuru; ekhove yaakimoraxa ni kaahanle vakhaani okhwa. 
Daniel10:9 Vano kaamwiiwa yoowo uulumaka ni miyo kimwiiwakaru, kaamorela vathi kiipopheiyeene kaakomaka." 
Daniel10:10 Woottharelana ntata naakivarela nnakikokhoriha nikivarenleene kithukumelaka. 
Daniel10:11 Owo aakeerela: “Daniyeli, nyuwo muri oosiveleyaxa. Ngwiriyane nnenesene masu kineeraaka kooleeleni, ni mweemele niwoko miyo kirumiheliwe nyuwo.” Owo akileelakaru yeeyo, miyo kaaheemela, kithukumelaka." 
Daniel10:12 Owo aapwaherera: “Muhoove, Daniyeli, okhuma nihuku noopacera mwaapacenraanyu waasaasa wiiwexexa, mwiiyevihaka vamaithoni wa Mulukwaanyu, maswaanyu ahiiwiwa ni miyo kirweenle waakhula yaawo." 
Daniel10:13 Vaheera mwaana a mwene a oParesi aakihiiha wa mahuku miloko miili ni nihuku nimoha. Vano Mikayeli, ndyelo mutokweene mmoha, aahoorwa okikhavihera, niwoko kaahiihiwa ni mwaana a mwene a oParesi." 
Daniel10:14 Vano kirweenle woothaliherani yeeyo eneera yeereeliwe mulokwaanyu mweehuhuni mwa muhoolo, niwoko moonelo onthoonyera ehuhu ya muhoolo.”" 
Daniel10:15 Owo akileelakaru masu ala, kaahuuramela vathi, kihiweraka wuuluma." 
Daniel10:16 Vanonto mmoha aalikana mutthu aatava eyanowaaka ni kaahula eyanowaaka, kinapacera wuuluma. Kaamweerela yoole eemenle ohoolowaka: “Pwiiyaaka, koothananaxa niwoko na moonelo ni kihanle vakhaani okhwa." 
Daniel10:17 Miyo, murumeiyaanyu, nkingwera wuuluma ni nyuwo, pwiiyaaka. Ikurusaka sookimalela ni kihanle kimumulaka ttakhi ttakhi.”" 
Daniel10:18 Emaara ekinatho yoole aalikana ni mutthu aakitava, anakivaha ikuru." 
Daniel10:19 Owo aakeerela: “Ii! Mulopwana oosiveleyaxa, muhoove. Murettele okhaleke ni nyuwo! Mukhaleke oolipa, aani oolipaxa.” Owo ahimakaru masu ale, kaalipihereya, kinamweerela: “Pwiiyaaka, muulume mweenre mukivaha ikuru.”" 
Daniel10:20 Vano Owo aakikoha: “Nyuwo moosuwela kirweenlaaka? Ontthuneya ohokolowa weera kangwaneno mwaana a mwene a oParesi, ni karowaru, mwaana a mwene a oGresiya onimoowa." 
Daniel10:21 Mene kinimoothaliherani toko yeeyo elempwale mulivuruni ya Ekhaikhai. Mukhottoni eyo khawowo onkikhavihera ahikhanle Mikayeli, namwaakiha a mulokwaanyu." 
Daniel11:1 Vano vayaakhani yoopacera ya Dareyexi, mMedesi, kaaheemela weera kimwaakihe ni kimukhavihere.”" 
Daniel11:2 Vano, kinoothaliherani ekhaikhai: “Mamwene mararu makina animoowa oParesi, ni vahoolowaya anaaxexe oopuhaxa waapwahaxa araru akinaawo. Owo aakhalaka moolamulani niwoko na mihakhusawe, onimwaatannya ootheene weera ewaneno omwene wa oGresiya." 
Daniel11:3 Vanonto mwene ooweraxa onookhumelela mwa yoowo aneera alamule ni ikuru sitokotoko, apakaka yeeyo ontthunaawe." 
Daniel11:4 Vahoolo wa okhalihiwa, omwenaawe onoomwaramwareya ni onookawanyeya mipatta mixexe sa elapo ya vathi. Omwenaawe khookhala wa ekhapiraawe ni khoolipa ntoko waaraaya, niwoko omwenaawe onimwaakhiwa, yinnyereriweke akina." 
Daniel11:5 Mwene a ohitto onoothatuwa oolipa, mene mmoha a asitokweene a anakhottwaawe onoothatuwa oolipaxa ompwaha yoowo, ni owo onoolamula omwenaawe ni ikuru sitokotoko." 
Daniel11:6 Siviraleene iyaakha sikina, awosa anoopaka wiiraana. Mwaana muthiyana a mwene a ohitto onoorowa wa mwene a ottuttuwani weera apakeno wiiraana, mene muthiyana owo kharwa apwahereriha ikurusawe ni hiihotho atithawe. Mmahukuni awo owo, vamoha ni yaamuhoola, atithawe ni namakhaviheraawe animwinnyereriwa mookhwaani." 
Daniel11:7 Mmoha a emusaawe onoovenya vanipuroniwawe muthiyana ole. Owo onimwaawanano anakhotto a mwene a ottuttuwani, avolowaka nipuronaya noolipaxa; onimwaawanano, aawinaka." 
Daniel11:8 Owo onookuxatho milukusaya, icaambulosaya sa eyuuma ni ikarumasaya soorikaxa sa eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa, aroihaka wExipitu. Owo onoomuhiya mmuretteleni mwene a ottuttuwani wa iyaakha sikina." 
Daniel11:9 Vano mwene a ottuttuwani onoovolowa omwene wa mwene a ohitto, mene onoohokoleela elapwaawe." 
Daniel11:10 Anamwanaawe animwiirehererela ekhotto etokotoko yaathukumanyihaka anakhotto ancipale, mwa yaawo eniyaarowele ntoko maahi oowuupaxa, ewanaka mpakatho nipuronaya noolipaxa na amwiittanaaya." 
Daniel11:11 Vanonto mwene a ohitto onookhuma oonyoonyiweene, angwananaka mwene a ottuttuwani mwa yoowo aneera aangwanane ni anakhotto ancipale, mene orookhalaru hiiho mwene a ottuttuwani onoowiniwa." 
Daniel11:12 Vano anakhottweene yaawo yaawiniwaka, mwene a ohitto onoosareya wiixoona, awiivaka anakhotto ancipalexa, vaheera owinawawe khoopwaherera." 
Daniel11:13 Niwoko mwene a ottuttuwani onimwaathukumanyiha anakhotto ancipale akina waapwaha anakhottweene yaale oopacera ni, siviraleene iyaakha sikina, owo onoorowa ni anakhotweene yaawo oolikaneene owana." 
Daniel11:14 Ehuhuweene yeeyo ancipale anoongwanano mwene a ohitto. Anamapuhera variyari wa mulokwaanyu anoorukunuwelana, ekwaniheraka hiiho moonelo ola, mene khasiweettela nnene." 
Daniel11:15 Vanonto mwene a ottuttuwani onimoowa, atekaka ikaaro sookurumulela exiri, akuxaka esidade yoolipaxa. Anakhotto a ohitto kheerwa ongwanano; mpakatho anakhottwaaya ooweraxa kheerwa ewera." 
Daniel11:16 Namahuhula owo onoopaka yeeyo ontthunaawe; khaawo aneera amooceelihe. Owo onimwiitekiha mweelaponi Yooreeraxa ni onookhalano ikuru soophwatano yeeyo. 
Daniel11:17 Owo onimoowa ni ikuru sa omwenaawe wootheene, apakaka wiiraana ni mwene a ohitto. Vano owo onoomutheliha mwanawe muthiyana mmoha eerelaka ophwata omwene wa ohitto, mene soovaanelasawe khaseetteleya nnene hata khasinimukhavihera etthu." 
Daniel11:18 Vano owo onoorowa mpatta wa ilapo sa ephareiya akuxaka sincipale sa seiyo, mene mutokweene mmoha a anakhotto onoomaliha wiixoonawawe mwene owo ni wiixoona iwo onoomuhonona." 
Daniel11:19 Vahoolowaya mwene owo onoohokoleela esidadaawe yoolipaxa ya elapwaawe, mene onookwakwathuwa, amoraka ni khooneyatho." 
Daniel11:20 Namarandelaawe onoomurumihela namaliviha misoko weera mihakhu sa emwene sipwaherere. Wa soothesene, siviraleene iyaakha sikina, owo onoophwatiwa, mene khoohiyono musarani naari mukhottoni." 
Daniel11:21 Vanonto onoorandeliwa ni mulopwana oohooneleya mwa yoowo ahaaphwanenle okhala mwene. Owo onoovolowa moomweneni, amakaaya yuupuwelaka weera noolipa, ni onookuxa omwene avarelaka muteko wootha." 
Daniel11:22 Vano anakhotto ancipalexa anoopuruliwa ohoolowawe; anakhottweene yaawo vamoha ni mwaana a mwene mmoha a wiiraana onoophwatiwa. 
Daniel11:23 Vahoolo wa wiiraana aapankaawe ni yoowo, onoopaka mootapanyani ni mukuttula vakhaani paahi ti onuuhale olamulaka." 
Daniel11:24 Ilapo sa mihakhu siixoona okhala soolipa, owo onoovolowamo, aweraka yeeyo atithawe naari makholowaawe yahaawenraaya: Owo onookawa soohuhula, soowiiyiwa ni mihakhu eriyari ya anamattharaawe. Onoovaanela okuxa isidade soolipaxa, mene wa ehuhu ekina paahi." 
Daniel11:25 Onimwaathukumanyiha anakhotto ancipalexa ni olipawawe murima wa ongwanano mwene a ohitto. Mwene a ohitto onoowana ni anakhotto ancipale ni ooweraxa, mene owo khawera owina niwoko na ovaaneleliwa." 
Daniel11:26 Mpakatho yaale ancihiwa ni mwene animweerera omphwata; anakhottwaawe anoophwatiwa ni ancipale anookhwela mukhottoni. 
Daniel11:27 Mamwene meeli awo, mirimasaya soosareya soonanara, anookilaathi vameesa mamoharu, elokotthanaka, mene kheephura etthu niwoko ommaleloni nlelo oneera orwe mweehuhuni yoothanliwa." 
Daniel11:28 Mwene a ottuttuwani onoohokoleela elapwaawe ni mihakhu sincipale, mene murimaawe onootthuna owanano wiiraana wootteela. Owo onoopaka ntoko uupuwenlaawe, ahokoleeleke elapwaawe." 
Daniel11:29 Mweehununi yoothanliwa, onoovolowatho elapo ya ohitto, mene ehuhuweene yeeyo emalihero enoovirikana yoopacera." 
Daniel11:30 Makula matokotoko a ilapo sa ephareiya ya ninkela nsuwa anoongwanano ni owo anooporora. Woottharelana anyoonyiweene owo onimweerera ophwata wiiraana wootteela. Owo onoohokolowa awooniheraka murimaawe wooreera yaale ahingye wiiraana wootteela. 
Daniel11:31 Anakhottwaawe anoorowa weera eveihe Empa ya Muluku yoolipaxa, emalihaka sooveleela sa khula nihuku. Vanonto anoomuteka muluku oohiira." 
Daniel11:32 Owo onoonanariha mirima sa yaale yaaveihale wiiraana, mene atthu animusivela Mulukwaaya anoomukhootta nnenesene." 
Daniel11:33 Yaale arino miruku animwaaxuttiiha ancipale, mene wa ehuhu ekinaawosa animwiiviwa ni ekatana, anoohisiwa, anoovariwa ni anoohuhuliwa." 
Daniel11:34 Awosa yaamoraka, anooxuukhaviheriwa ni ancipale ahikhanle mweekhaikhaiyini anootakanserana ni yaawo." 
Daniel11:35 Akina a anamiruku anookwakwathuwa weera awosa etteelihiwe, etotoxiwe ni epakiwe moota wookwanela mpaka ommaleloni wa ehuhu niwoko ommaleloni nlelo onoophiya mweehuhuni yoothanliwa.”" 
Daniel11:36 “Mwene onoopaka yeeyo ontthunaawe. Onimwiivuwiha ni onimwiixunnuwiha opwaha wakhalaru muluku ni onoomveiha Muluku a miluku ni itthu sihitonke wiiwiwa. Owo sinoomweettela nnene mpaka okwanela ehuhu ya isara, niwoko yeeyo elakeliwe ontthuneya okhumelela." 
Daniel11:37 Owo kharwa attittimiha miluku sa makholowaawe hata miluku soothanliwa ni asithiyana naari kharwa ampwattha akhalaru muluku, mene onimwiivuwiha eeraka ti mutokweene opwaha iyo." 
Daniel11:38 Vanipuroniwaya owo onoomuttittimiha muluku a moolipa; onoomuttittimiha ni eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha* muluku oohisuweliwa ni makholowaawe, amuttittimihaka ni maluku oowaaraxa ni soovaha soorikaxa." 
Daniel11:39 Onoowanano mapuro oolipaxa ni ekhavihero ya muluku oohisuwanyeya aattittimihaka yaawo animwaakhulela. Owo onimwaakhaliha yaawo anamalamula a ancipale ni onimwaakawela ilapo ni ntthuvelo ntokotoko. 
Daniel11:40 Mweehuhuni ya ommaleloni, mwene a ohitto onoovolowa mukhottoni ni mwene a ottuttuwani onoongwanano mwene a ohitto ni ikaaro sa ikavalu*, anamweettiha a ikavalu* ni makula matokotoko mancipale. Owo onoovolowa ilapo sincipale aviraka ntoko maahi oowuupaxa." 
Daniel11:41 Owo onoovolowatho Elapo Yooreeraxa. Ilapo sincipale sinookuxiwa, mene wEdomi, oMowabe ni asitokweene a wAmoni anootapuxeya mmatatanimwawe." 
Daniel11:42 Owo onimunnuwiha olamulawawe mweelaponi sincipale; wExipitu khoonoopowa. 
Daniel11:43 Mwene owo onookhalano mihakhu sa eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha* ni soopuha sootheene sa wExipitu, aalamulakatho aLibiya ni aNubiya." 
Daniel11:44 Vaheera ihaali sa ninkhuma nsuwa ni ottuttuwani sinoomoopopiha ni oonyoonyiweene onoovenyera ophwata ni wiiva miloko sincipale. 
Daniel11:45 Owo onookunga iheemasawe sa emwene eriyari ya iphareiya vathi wa mwaako wootteela wooreeraxa. Vaheera ommaleloniwawe onoomphiyera ni khaawo anaamukhavihere.” 
Daniel12:1 “Mweehuhuni yeeyo Mikayeli, Namwaakiha a mulokwaanyu onoovenya. Enookhala ehuhu ya othanana moota ohitonke wooniwa okhuma epacerero ya miloko mpaka ehuhuweene yeeyo. Vaheera ehuhu eyo mulokwaanyu – ootheene masinaaya alempwale mulivuruni – onoovuluxiwa." 
Daniel12:2 Ancipale ankona vatthayani anoovenyerera: akina wa okumi woohimala ni akinaawo wa wuulihiheya muru ni munyemu woohimala. 
Daniel12:3 Yaawosa ari a miruku animwaara ntoko waaraxa wa wiirimu ni yaawo angweettiha ancipale weera yaakhuleliwe ni Muluku, anooceremela ntoko ithenyeeri wa mahuku ootheene." 
Daniel12:4 Mene nyuwo, Daniyeli, ngwale ni mutthuke masu a elivuru mpaka ommaleloni wa ehuhu. Ancipale anooviravira moothemwene yaasaka miruku.”" 
Daniel12:5 Vano miyo Daniyeli kaaweha ni ohoolowaka yaakhala atthu eeli akina – mmoha ekhopela ela wenno ni mukina ekhopela ele. 
Daniel12:6 Mmoha a yaawosa aamukoha mulopwana aawanre ikuwo sa eliinyu* aari vasulu maahi: “Mpaka yaakhani sineeraaya sikwanihereye itthu iyo sootikinsa?” 
Daniel12:7 Mulopwana aawanre ikuwo sa eliinyu* aari vasulu maahi aatheteelela moonowaawe mulopwana ni muthiyana wiirimu ni kaamwiiwa amulipelaka Yoowo onkhala ni okumi woohimala: “Enoovira ehuhu, ihuhu ni eriyari ya ehuhu. Ikuru sa muloko wootteela saamalakaru, itthu sootheene iyo sinookwaniheriwa.”" 
Daniel12:8 Kaahiiwa, mene nkiiwenxenxe, tivawo kaamukonghaaka: “Pwiiyaaka, sootheene iyo emalihero heeni?”" 
Daniel12:9 Owo aakaakhula: “Mukuxere mphironimwanyu Daniyeli, niwoko masu aawaleliwa ni aatthukiwa mpaka ehuhu ya ommaleloni." 
Daniel12:10 Ancipale anootteelihiwa, anoopakiwa moota wookwanela ni anoototoxiwa, vaheera atakhali anoopwaherera okhala oonanara. Khawoworu mutakhali aneera iiwexexe yeeyo, mene yaawo ari a miruku animwiiwexexa." 
Daniel12:11 Okhuma ehuhu sooveleela sa khula nihuku sineeraaya simalihiwe mpaka otekiwa wa muluku oohiira, anoovira mahuku 1 290." 
Daniel12:12 Ooreelihiwa yoole aneera aweherere ni aphiyere ommaleloni wa mahuku 1 335! 
Daniel12:13 Wa nyuwo, mukuxere mphironimwanyu mpaka ommaleloni. Munimwiitthuuwa ni vano ommaleloni wa mahuku munoovenyerera weera mwaakhele yoohiyeriwaanyu mphwanenlaanyu.”" 
Hosea1:1 Yave aahuuluma ni Hoxeya, mwaana mulopwana a Beeri, moolamulani mwa Uziya, Yotami, Ahazi ni Hezekiya, mamwene a oYuda ni Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Yehowaxi, mwene a oYixrayeli." 
Hosea1:2 Yave apaceraka wuuluma mwa Hoxeya, Owo aamweerela: “Murowe, mwamukuxe muthiyana puuta ni anamwane asilopwana a moohiroromeleyani, niwoko muloko wookhalano nthowa na oraruwa moota woowuulihiheya muru, omuhiyaka Yave.”" 
Hosea1:3 Tivawo owo aamuthenlaawe Gomeri, mwaana muthiyana a Diblayimi ni owo aarupala, anamuyarano mwaana mulopwana." 
Hosea1:4 Vano Yave aamweerela Hoxeya: “Munttehe nsina na Yizereyeli, niwoko kinoottaruxa woowaakuveya ekhapira ya Yehu mwaha wa noomala eereiye oYizereyeli ni kinoomalamaliha omwene wa oYixrayeli." 
Hosea1:5 Nihuku nno kinimwintaka muura wa Yixrayeli mureyareyani na oYizereyeli.” 
Hosea1:6 Gomeri aarupalatho, anamuyarano mwaana muthiyana. Vano Yave aamweerela Hoxeya: “Munttehe nsina na Lo-Ruhama, niwoko nkooniheratho osivela muloko wa oYixrayeli naari nkilevelelatho nthowanaya." 
Hosea1:7 Wa soothesene, kinoopwattha ni osivela muloko wa oYuda; ni Miyo kinoovuluxa, ohikhanle mwa muura, ekatana hoye hoye mukhottoni, hata mwa ikavalu* ni anamweettihaaya, mene mwa Yave, Mulukwaaya.”" 
Hosea1:8 Ahiyaleene waamwa Lo-Ruhama, Gomeri aamuyaratho mwaana mulopwana." 
Hosea1:9 Vano Yave aaheera: “Munttehe nsina na Lo-Ami, niwoko nyuwosa khamuhiyono mulokwaaka ni Miyo nkihiyono Mulukwaanyu." 
Hosea1:10 Wa soothesene, aYixrayeli animwaatta ntoko ehaava ya mphareiya ehimphimeyaru, hata ehinaalikeleyaru. Vanipuroni yeerelasiwaaya: ‘Nyuwosa khamuhiyono mulokwaaka,’ awosa animwiitthaniwa ‘anamwane a Muluku Mukumi.’" 
Hosea1:11 Muloko wa oYuda ni wa oYixrayeli onoothukumanyihiwa, ni awosa anoomukhaliha muhooleli mmoha ni sinooweettela nnene mulaponi, niwoko nihuku nno, nnookhala ntokotoko oYizereyeli." 
Hosea2:1 Ngwiitthane axunninyu ‘Mulokwaaka,’ ni axirokorinyu ‘Oosiveleyaaka.’”" 
Hosea2:2 “Mwaahiihe amayinyu, mwaahiihe, niwoko awo khaahiyono amwaaraka, ni Miyo nkihiyono aiyaya. Awo ehiye mawehero oopuuta, ni evenxe ohiroromeleya eriyari ya mapele." 
Hosea2:3 Ohiyanawaya, Miyo kinimwaarula ehaleke pwitipwiti ntoko nihuku yaayariwaaya; kinimwaapaka ntoko nikare, kaatatuxaka elapo yoowuumelela, ni kinoowiiva ni ntthona." 
Hosea2:4 Anamwanaaya nkaapwattha ni osivela, niwoko ari anamwane ooraruwiwa." 
Hosea2:5 Amayaya khayaaroromeleiye, yaarupalaka yaawosa ngwuulihiheyani muru. Vano awo yeenre: ‘Kinimwaatthara yaawo kinaakonanaaka ankivaha yooca, maahi, soowara sa mapururu a ikhondoolo, eliinyu*, makhura ni yoowura.’" 
Hosea2:6 Tivawo kineeraaka kittiyelele iphirosaya ni nyiiwa; kinimwaarica moota wooweera awo kheewera ophwanya ephiro. 
Hosea2:7 Awo eniyaatthimakele yaawo anaasivelaaya, mene khayaaphwanyasa, eniiwaasaase, mene kheewoona. Hiiho awo eniyeere: ‘Kinoohokoleela okhala ni aiyaka ntoko woopacera, niwoko kaari nnenesene opwaha vano.’" 
Hosea2:8 Awo khaanoonelela weera ti Miyo kaavanghe etrigu, eviinyu enyowani ni makhura; kaavanghe eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha* yoowaattaxa, mwa yeeyo yaavarenlaaya muteko woomurumeelano Bahali*." 
Hosea2:9 Tivawo kineeraaka kikuxe etrigwaaka eyo yiitthwaka, ni eviinyuwaaka yaakhalaka yoolikaneene. Kinoowaakha yoowaraaya ya mapururu a ikhondoolo ni eliinyuwaaka, mwa yeeyo yaavarelaaya muteko wookuttelelano etiriyaaya." 
Hosea2:10 Vano, kinoowuulihiha muru vamaithoni wa yaawo anaakonanaaya; khaawo anaawere waatapuxa mmatatanimwaka." 
Hosea2:11 Kinoomaliha ohakalalawaya wootheene: ifestasaya sa vayaakhani, sa nyeerisaya sinyowani, mahukwaaya a eSaabadu ni ifestasaya soothanliwa sootheene." 
Hosea2:12 Kinoohela nthala imattasaya sa iwuuva* ni ifiigu, mwa seiyo yaaliviwaayano ni yaawo anaakonanaaya; kinootatuxa maphuwa, ni axinama a ntuphini anoonyaanyasa." 
Hosea2:13 Miyo kinimwaattaruxela mahuku yaahisenraaya aBahali* erubani*; awo yaahiiphwanelihano annela ni axiveeve, enaatthara yaawo anaakonanaaya, vaheera yaakittiwala Miyo,” onghima Yave." 
Hosea2:14 “Vanonto, kinimwaaruuhatho; kinimwaarongha onikareni kawuulumekeno ni masu oosiveleya." 
Hosea2:15 Weiwo, kinkela waahokoloxera imattasaya sa iwuuva*, ni kinookhaliha oreyareyani wa Akori mulako wa oweherera. Weiwo, awo eniyiipe ntoko mmahukuni a omiravowaaya, aani ntoko nihuku yaakhummaaya wExipitu.”" 
Hosea2:16 Yave onghima ha: “Nihuku nno, nyuwo munookiitthana ‘aiyinyu’; khamukiitthanatho ‘pwiiyaanyu.’" 
Hosea2:17 Kinoovenxa vayanoniwaya masina a aBahali*; masinaaya khayiitthaniwatho. 
Hosea2:18 Vanihukuni nno, kiweerelakani nyuwo, kinoowiiraanano axinama a ntuphini, ipalame sa wiirimu, mpakatho axinama aniipurula. Kinoovenxa mulaponi muura, ekatana ni ekhotto, weera ootheene ewere okhala oolipeene." 
Hosea2:19 Miyo kinimoothelani mahuku ootheene; Miyo kinimoothelani moororomeleyani ni ngwookoleleyani, moosivelani ni mukhararini." 
Hosea2:20 Miyo kinimoothelani moororomeleyani, ni nyuwo munoomusuwela Yave." 
Hosea2:21 Nihuku nno, Miyo kinimwaakhula,” onghima Yave. “Kinimwaakhula irimu, ni iyo sinimwaakhula etthaya;" 
Hosea2:22 ni etthaya eniwaakhula irooro, eviinyu ni makhura, ni iyo sinimwaakhula oYizereyeli." 
Hosea2:23 Miyo kinimwiiphatteela muloko mulaponi; kinoompwattha ni osivela yoole kaamwiitthanaaka ‘Oohisiveleya.’ Kinoomweerela yoole iitthaniwa ‘Khahiyono mulokwaaka,’ ‘Nyuwo ti mulokwaaka’; ni awosa eniyeere: ‘Nyuwo ti Mulukwaaka.’”" 
Hosea3:1 Yave aakeerela: “Murowe mwawoonihere osivelawanyu amwaarinyu, arookhalaru oosiveleya a akina ni arookhalaru puuta. Mwaasivele ntoko Yave onaasivelaawe aYixrayeli, aroovarexexaru miluku sikina esivelaka iboolu ni iwuuva* soowaarikiwa sootteeliheriwa miluku sikina.”" 
Hosea3:2 Tivawo miyo kaathummaaka ni ixekeli* muloko niithanu sa eparatha* ni ikiilu* macira meeli ni miloko mithannamiili sa esevada*. 
Hosea3:3 Miyo kaamweerela: “Nyuwo mukhaleke ni miyo mmahukuni mancipale; khamukhalatho puuta hata muhimukoneno mulopwana mukina, ni miyo kinookhala ni nyuwo.”" 
Hosea3:4 Eyo enthoonyera weera aYixrayeli anookhala mahuku mancipale woohikhalano mwene hata mwanawe, woohikhalano yooveleela naari amarimbu ootteeliheriwa, woohikhalano mooxikootti a esaserdoti ni mpaka woohikhalano miluku sikina." 
Hosea3:5 Vahoolowaya, aYixrayeli anoohokolowa, emwaaseke Yave, Mulukwaaya, ni Davide mwenaaya. Mmahukuni ookisera animoowa ethukumelaka vamaithoni wa Yave ni wa mareelihowaawe." 
Hosea4:1 aYixrayeli nyuwo, mwiiwe masu a Yave, niwoko Owo onoohimahimani nyuwo munkhala elapo ela: “Ororomeleya ni osivela, mpakatho esuwelo ya Muluku soolakaseya mulaponimu." 
Hosea4:2 Anooneya paahi malapho, wootha ni wiivaniwa, wiiyeraniwa, oraruwelaniwa; iyo soopwaha nyiinano sootheene! Oyeehiwa wa ephome wootepaxa." 
Hosea4:3 Tivawo elapo enlalamikaaya, ni amakaaya ootheene anoondaaya; axinama a ntuphini, ipalame sa wiirimu ni ihopa sa mphareiya sinnikhwa." 
Hosea4:4 Vaheera, ahikhaleru anaamoothere mukina, niwoko Miyo kinoohimahimasani nyuwosa, asaserdoti*!" 
Hosea4:5 Nyuwosa munnikwattuliwa khula nihuku, ni maprofeeti ankwattulasiwa ni nyeenyu. Tivawo kineeraaka kaaphwate amayinyu." 
Hosea4:6 Mulokwaaka woophwatiwa niwoko na ohikisuwela Miyo. Mweenre mukhoottaka esuwelo, Miyotho kinimookhoottani okhala asaserdotaaka; mweenre mukhoottaka Nlamulo na Mulukwaanyu, Miyotho nkaapwattha anamwaniinyu." 
Hosea4:7 Yaandyeerereiyaaya asaserdoti*, awosa aatepaxa okitthekela; ovuwawaya ahaakakanyiha ni etthu yoowuuliha muru." 
Hosea4:8 Awosa anca sooveleela sa soottheka sa mulokwaaka ni anghakalalela ottheka wa mulokwaaka. 
Hosea4:9 Tivawo kineeraaka kittaruxe hata okhalaka muloko naari asaserdoti*, niwoko na iphirosaya, ni kinimwaatthuvelela mitekosaya." 
Hosea4:10 Awosa eniice, mene kheevona; eniiraruwe, mene khayaandyeerera waattawaya, niwoko aamuhiya Yave weera yiixinnyerere" 
Hosea4:11 mooraruwani, mviinyuni ya khalayi ni yiiyeraka iseru sa mulokwaaka." 
Hosea4:12 Awosa animwaasa miruku wa miluku sa nyiri, ni anaakhuliwaaya ni mwaatthaabwa. Munepa wa oraruwa ti onaahapuxa; awosa khaanroromeleya wa Mulukwaaya." 
Hosea4:13 Ampakela sooveleela vasulu nyaako, enahisera erubani* mmattumuxani vathi wa ikarivalyu* ni ixopu* oraayawo munttuusi wooreerela. Tivawo anamwaniinyu asithiyana amvolowaaya opuuta ni asipwiyamwaaniinyu anraruwaaya." 
Hosea4:14 Nkaattaruxa anamwaniinyu asithiyana niwoko na opuuta, hata asipwiyamwaaniinyu mwaha wa oraruwa, niwoko asilopwanaanyu aniitakansano mapuuta ni ampakano sooveleela simpakiwa ni mapuuta mpaani mwa miluku sikina. Muloko ohinono wiiwexexa, onoophwatiwa." 
Hosea4:15 Ii! Yixrayeli, naari nyuwo muraruwaka, Yuda ahikhaleno nthowa. Muhirowetho oGiligali; muhiwele oBet-Aveni, ni muheere: ‘Kinlipela mwa okumi wa Yave.’" 
Hosea4:16 aYixrayeli ti oottiyamaaru, ari oohihuweya ntoko mwaaxaana a emombe oohihuweya. Moota heeni Yave aneeraawe aakukhule ntoko iputtiputthi sireene munghawalawani?" 
Hosea4:17 Efrayimi ohiiraanano miluku soowootha; munghiyeke meekhaawe! 
Hosea4:18 Naari yaamalaka yoowura, awosa ampwaherera mooraruwanimwaya; alamulaaya ansivelaxa iphiro soowuuliha muru." 
Hosea4:19 Eyuupuru enimwaavavihera ottaiwene, ni altaaraaya* animwaaruuhela wuulihiheya muru.”" 
Hosea5:1 “Asaserdoti* mwiiwe yeela! Nnene, aYixrayeli! Ii! Emusi ya emwene, ngwiriyane! Nthorihelo nna ti nawinyu: nyuwosa mwaari ntapha oMizepa, ntthavi naareiwe omwaako Tabori." 
Hosea5:2 Anamavaanya aahuruweliwa ngwiiviwani. Miyo kinimwaalaka ootheenaawo. 
Hosea5:3 Koosuwela wEfrayimi; oYixrayeli khoongwera okiipitha. Vano nyuwo Efrayimi mohiixinnyerera mooraruwani; aYixrayeli ahiinanariha. 
Hosea5:4 Mitekosaya khasinaatthunihera ohokoleela wa Mulukwaaya. Munepa wa opuuta ori vamurimaniwaya; awosa khaanimusuwelaru Yave. 
Hosea5:5 Wiixoona wa oYixrayeli onkhalela onamoona; aYixrayeli ni awEfrayimi ankwattuliwa mootthekanimwaya; aYuda ankwattuliwatho vamoha ni yaawo. 
Hosea5:6 Awosa yaarowasaka omwaasa Yave vamoha ni ikhondoolo ni mihuwosaya sootheene, kheemphwanya; Owo ohaarakamelasa yaawo." 
Hosea5:7 Khayaaroromeleiye waYave; ahaayarasa anamwane mooraruwani. Vano ifestasaya sa mweeri munyowani sinimwaanyaanya, okhuma awosa mpaka imattasaya." 
Hosea5:8 Mwiipe nipalapatta oGibeya, ni nloope oRama. Mukhuwelele ecipo ya ekhotto oBet-Aveni, Ii! oBenyamini, moove!" 
Hosea5:9 Efrayimi onooheleya nthala vanihukuni na nttaruxo. Yeeyo Miyo kinlaleiyaaka eniikhumelele eriyari ya ipuumba sa aYixrayeli. 
Hosea5:10 Ahooleli a oYuda ari ntoko yaale anceendya ikanyero sa nyiinano. Kinimwaayeeherasa isarasaka ntoko okumburula wa mirupi.
