Hosea5:11 Efrayimi oohasuliwa, oottikitthiwa munthoriheloni, niwoko na olakela otthara miluku sikina." 
Hosea5:12 Wa Efrayimi, kiri ntoko tthumpwiha, ntoko yoowunttiha wa muloko wa oYuda." 
Hosea5:13 Efrayimi oonaka ekwereraawe, ni Yuda oonaka makhwattaawe, Efrayimi aarukunuwela wAsiriya, analamulela waasaasa ekhavihero ya mwene mutokweene. Vaheera owo khangwera woolamihasani, hata khangwera ovoliha ithukusanyu." 
Hosea5:14 Vano, wa Efrayimi, kinookhala ntoko mwatto, ni ntoko mwatto mutokweene wa Yuda. Miyo kinoomunyaanya kipwaheke; Miyo kinimwaakuxa, ahikhalaka oowaatapuxa." 
Hosea5:15 Vahoolowaya, kinoohokoleela vanipuronivaka mpaka awosa eneeraaya yaakhulele nthowanaya. Ni awosa animwaasa ekhovaaka; moohaawanimwaya anookaasa ni murima wootheene.”" 
Hosea6:1 “Nrowe, nihokoleele wa Yave. Owo ooninyaanya, mene onoonilamiha; Owo oonivulaliha, mene onoovoliha makhwattaahu." 
Hosea6:2 Eviraleene mahuku meeli, Owo onoonivahatho okumi; vanihukuni nanaararu, onoonireherera weera nikhale vamaithoniwawe." 
Hosea6:3 Nimusuwele Yave; niilipiheraxe omusuwela. Owo aniixoonihere mooteene yoole ninkhumaaya nsuwa; onimoorwa wa hiyo ntoko epula ya mulaala, aani ntoko epula mutthulo ennaanihaaya etthaya.”" 
Hosea6:4 “Nkoopakele eheeni Efrayimi? Nkoopakele eheeni Yuda? Osivelawanyu ori ntoko ekasikasi ya oxeexelo, ntoko nikame nimpeherera wiima nnamora woowaakuveya." 
Hosea6:5 Tivawo koonyaanyasiyaakani mwa maprofeetaaka, Miyo koowiivasani ni masu a mmwaanomwaka; nthorihelonaka nohooceremelelani ntoko overinya." 
Hosea6:6 Vano, kinghaawela ororomeleya ohikhanle sooveleela; omusuwela Muluku ohikhanle sooveleela soohisa." 
Hosea6:7 Ntoko Adamu, awosa aananariha wiiraana, enakikhalela oohiroromeleya." 
Hosea6:8 Giliyade ti esidade ya atakhali, yoosareya ephome." 
Hosea6:9 Mooteene yoowo atakhali aniipithaaya emuthurumelaka mutthu oomvara, hiihotho mikuttula sa asaserdoti*; awosa aniivela mmiseweni sa oXekhemi, enapaka sootakhala sikina soowuulihaxa muru." 
Hosea6:10 Kohoona etthu yoowuumiha owanoni mulaponi mwa oYixrayeli. Mmo Efrayimi ooraruwa, ni Yixrayeli oovaliheya." 
Hosea6:11 Ii! Yuda, wa nyuwotho ehuhu ya ohepha nthorihelo eri yoolikaneene, Miyo kaahokoloxaka mulokwaaka." 
Hosea7:1 Miyo keereraka olamiha oYixrayeli, soottheka sa Efrayimi sinkhala vanlakalakani ni sootakhala sa Samariya sinoothupululiwa. Vano awosa ampaka soonanara; anamwiiya amvolowa mmampaani, alavilavi aniiya mmiseweni;" 
Hosea7:2 vaheera awosa khaansuwela weera Miyo kinuupuwelela mitekosaya soonanara sootheene. Sootthekasaya sinaamira; Miyo kinnoonoona. 
Hosea7:3 Awosa animuhakalaliha mwene ni sootakhalasaya, anamwane a mwene ni soowoothasaya." 
Hosea7:4 Ootheene awo ti anamararuwa ehisaka ntoko ttukuttha, moorweene yoowo namooxa ipaawu ohintthuneyaaya otetheera okhuma oneetheiwaaya mpaka onnyaruwaaya." 
Hosea7:5 Vanihukuni na efesta ya mwenaahu, anamwanaawe anghapaliwa eviinyu, ni mwene onaavara matata anamatthebwa." 
Hosea7:6 Yaakhuveelasaka ni minyakunyakusaya, mirimasaya simpatta ntoko ttukuttha. Onyoonyasiwawaya ompatta vakhaani vakhaani ohiyuweene owo; mooxeexeloni onghisa ntoko malumi a mooro." 
Hosea7:7 Ootheene awo ampatta ntoko ttukuttha; awosa anaanyaanya ahoolelaaya. Mamwenaaya ootheene ammora, ni khaawo ankikhuwelelaru." 
Hosea7:8 Efrayimi oniitakansa ni miloko; Efrayimi ori ntoko eboolu yoohipittikuxiwa 
Hosea7:9 Anamarwa sohaamalela ikuru, mene awosa khaansuwela. Mayihaaya anthatuwa ipwi, mene owo khanoona." 
Hosea7:10 Wiixoona wa Yixrayeli onkhalela onamoona, mene sirookhalaru sootheene iyo, owo khanghokoleela wa Yave, Mulukwaawe, ni khammwaasa." 
Hosea7:11 Efrayimi ori ntoko ekhunda yoolokottheya ni yoohiiwexexa. Ondyoonttelela ekhavihero wExipitu; onkhuwelela waakiha wa wAsiriya. 
Hosea7:12 Vaheera yaattimulakaru, kinaavonyerasa ntthavinaka; kinimwaakuruxela vathi ampharihiwa ntoko ipalame sa wiirimu. Koonaka weera aathukumana, kinimwaattaruxa." 
Hosea7:13 Ii! Wa yaawosa, niwoko aakirakamela! Waarweelase ophwatiwa, niwoko aakivaanya! Miyo kinghaawela owoopola, vaheera awosa ankuulumela soowootha." 
Hosea7:14 Awosa khaankiitthana ni murima wootheene, vaheera yiinlaxa oothananeene vabeettiniwaya. Aniipophakasa mwaha wa etrigu ni eviinyu enyowani, mene ankirakamela Miyo." 
Hosea7:15 Miyo kohaaxuttiha, kinaalipihera, vaheera awosa ankivaanelela soonanara." 
Hosea7:16 Awosa khaanghokoleela wa Muluku Musulusulu; ari ntoko muura woohilokaloka. Ahoolelaaya animwiiviwa ni ekatana niwoko na maswaaya ooveiha. Tivawo atthu a wExipitu anaatthebwaaya.” 
Hosea8:1 “Muhele nipalapatta owanoniwanyu! Nrepo nnaaraara osulu wa Empa ya Yave, niwoko muloko woonanariha wiiraanawaka ovaanyaka Nlamulonaka." 
Hosea8:2 aYixrayeli ankikhuwelela Miyo yeeraka: ‘Ii! Mulukwaahu, hiyo ningwaakhulelani Nyuwo!" 
Hosea8:3 Vaheera aYixrayeli aakhootta yeeyo eri yooreera; mwiittana onimwaattharelela. 
Hosea8:4 Awosa ahaavara mamwene kihaatthunihenre; ahaathanla anamwane a mamwene kihaakhulenle. Ahiipakela miluku sa eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa sinaaroiha woophwatiwani. 
Hosea8:5 Ii! oSamariya, mvonyere okerekhere milukusanyu sipakiwe ntoko mwaamombe! Isarasaka soopattelasa seiyo. Mpaka yaakhani muhiwereyaka okhala ootteela?" 
Hosea8:6 Mwaamombe ola opakiwe ni aYixrayeli! Opakiwe ni namapattha. Owo khahiyono Muluku. Mwaamombe a oSamariya onoopwexakasiwa. 
Hosea8:7 Awosa anaala epheyo, enahepha eyuupuru. Etrigu ehinthapuruwa kheenkhumiha ephepa. Naari yaathapuruwa, anamarwa yaamunyaanyaxa." 
Hosea8:8 oYixrayeli woomiriwa; vano ori eriyari ya miloko ntoko etthu yoohooneleyamo; 
Hosea8:9 Vano woorowa wAsiriya ntoko buuru a ntuphini ompwaherera ootaphuweene. wEfrayimi wohiithumiha wa yaawo anaakonanaaya. 
Hosea8:10 Arimwiithumiharu eriyari ya miloko, vano kinimwaathukumanyiha, ni woowaakuveya anoopacera woonda moohasulani wa mwene ooweraxa." 
Hosea8:11 wEfrayimi orimwaatekaru altaari* ancipale oowaaveleelela yoottheka, awo aathatuwa altaari* wa yoottheka xaxaxa." 
Hosea8:12 Miyo kohaalepelasa mahusiho ootheene a Nlamulonaka, vaheera awosa anoona ntoko etthu yoohisuweleyaaya." 
Hosea8:13 Awosa ampaka sooveleela enakhuura enama, vaheera Yave khanghakalalela. Okhuma vaanaano va woorowa ohoolo, Owo onimuupuwelela sootakhalasaya ni onoottaruxa sootthekasaya. Awosa anoohokoleela wExipitu." 
Hosea8:14 oYixrayeli woomuttiwala Mvuluxaaya, onateka impa sa emwene; oYuda woolipiha isidade sincipale. Vaheera Miyo kinoorumihela mooro musidadenimwaya oneera olalihe moolipamwaya.”" 
Hosea9:1 Ii! oYixrayeli, muhitthape; muhihakalale ntoko miloko sikina, niwoko nyuwo mooraruwa munghiyaka Mulukwaanyu. Nyuwo munsivela nlivo na mooraruwani munipuroni nootheene nimveeriwaayawo etrigu." 
Hosea9:2 Mapuro amveeriwa etrigu ni munaameliwa iwuuva*, khayaaciha atthu; eviinyu enyowani eniyaathowe." 
Hosea9:3 Awosa kheepwaherera okhala mulaponi mwa Yave; wEfrayimi onoohokoleela wExipitu, ni wAsiriya onimooca yooca yoohitteela." 
Hosea9:4 Awosa kheempakela Yave yooveleela ya eviinyu, hata sooveleelasaya khasimusiveliha. Sooveleela iyo nsaakhalele ntoko yooca ya anamalalamika – eniimutatuxe oohitteela yoowo anaace. Yooca eyo eniikhale yawayeene paahi; kheevolowa Mpaani mwa Yave." 
Hosea9:5 Mmwipakaseni vanihukuni na ifestasanyu soothanliwa, mmahukuni a ifesta sa Yave?" 
Hosea9:6 Munootthawaru ophwatiwa, wExipitu onimoothukumanyihani ni oMemfesi onimoovithani. Mihakhusanyu sa eparatha* sinoomeleliwa oyele ni miraambela sinoovitikelela woomalela iheemasanyu." 
Hosea9:7 Mahuku a nttaruxo ahanle vakhaani ophiya; mahuku a nthorihelo animoowa. aYixrayeli esuweleke yeeyo. Seenre saatta sootthekasanyu ni ovaanyawanyu otokotoko, mprofeeti onooneliwa okhala nsikini, mutthu oosareya Munepa Wootteela ntoko naanepa." 
Hosea9:8 Mprofeeti vamoha ni Mulukwaaka ti namalipelela ongwehaweha wEfrayimi; wa soothesene, miraakho siningweherera mphironimwawe moothemwene, ni wookhala wiittana Mpaani mwa Muluku." 
Hosea9:9 Awosa aasareya soonanara soohiyanahiyana ntoko mmahukuni a oGibeya. Muluku onimuupuwelela sootakhalasaya ni onimwaattaruxela sootthekasaya. 
Hosea9:10 “Kaaphwanyaaka aYixrayeli, waari ntoko ophwanya iwuuva* munikareni; koonaaka makholowaanyu, waari ntoko woona soowiima soopacera sa ifiigu. Vaheera awosa yaaphiyaaya oBahali-Peyori, yaahiitteeliherasa muluku owo oowuulihaxa muru, enathatuwa oohiira ntoko yeele yaasivelaaya." 
Hosea9:11 Ovuwa wa wErayimi onoovavela ottai ntoko mwaapalame. Khookhala oyara, naari orupala hata weemelela." 
Hosea9:12 Naari yaahuwaka anamwane, kinoomwiinaneliha khula mutthu a yaawosa. Ii! Wa yaawosa miyo kaarakamelaka!" 
Hosea9:13 Kohoona wEfrayimi otekiweene vanipuroni nooreerela ntoko oTiro. Vaheera wEfrayimi onoowinnyerera anamwanaaya owiiviwani.” 
Hosea9:14 Ii! Yave, mmwaavahase eheeni? Mwaapakihe weera yaarupalaka, sitatheye ni mapelaaya yuumelele." 
Hosea9:15 “Miyo kaahaathanyawo niwoko na sootakhalasaya sootheene sa oGiligali. Miyo kinoowoomola mulaponimwaka mwaha wa sootthekasaya. Nkaasivelatho; ahoolelaaya ootheene ti oottiyamaaru. 
Hosea9:16 wEfrayimi woohomeya, mikwankhwaarisaya sohuuma, awosa khaaniima. Naari yaahuwaka anamwane, Miyo kinoowiiva anamwane anaasivelaaya.”" 
Hosea9:17 Mulukwaaka onimwaakhootta niwoko khaamwiiwale; anookhala anamaxoraxora eriyari ya miloko. 
Hosea10:1 aYixrayeli yaari ntoko evideira* yookuttukutteya; yaahiima wusa wusa. Yiimaxaaya, ti Yaatekaaya altaari* ancipale; elapwaaya yeetteleyaaya nnene yaaphwanelihaxaaya amarimbwaaya ootteeliheriwa." 
Hosea10:2 Mirimasaya ti soolokottha, ni vano ontthuneya othatela nthowanaya. Yave onimwaakurumula altaaraaya ni onimwaaphwata amarimbwaaya ootteeliheriwa." 
Hosea10:3 Vano awosa eniyeere: “Khaninonoru mwene niwoko khanimuttittiminghe Yave. Vaheera, hata naarino mwene, owo aahinipakele eheeni?”" 
Hosea10:4 Awosa anroromelihaxa, anlipela ni aniiraana moota woowootha; tivawo omphuwaaya wootherana ntoko maphuwa oohapala mmatta moottipuriwa." 
Hosea10:5 Muloko onkhala oSamariya ommoova muluku opakiwe ntoko mwaamombe a oBeti-Aveni. Mulokwaaya onuumukhupanyere, vamoha ni asaserdotaaya a miluku yaahakalalela waarawaya, niwoko awo ahaakhiwa, onaronghiwa wootthukiwani." 
Hosea10:6 Aani owotho onooronghiwa wAsiriya ntoko yoomvaha mwene mutokweene. wEfrayimi onuuhaawe oyevihiwa; ni oYixrayeli onimuulihiheya muru niwoko na mulukwaaya oopatthiwa. 
Hosea10:7 Samariya ni mwenaawe anookumburuliwa ntoko nthatu. 
Hosea10:8 Altaari* a Empa ya Sootakhala ari soottheka sa aYixrayeli, anoophwatiwa. Nyiiwa ni malaxi sinimunnuwa saakutteleleke altaaraaya*. Vano awosa eniyeerele nyaako: “Munikhuneele!” Ni wa mattumuxa: “Munipittuwele!”" 
Hosea10:9 “Ii! oYixrayeli, okhuma mmahukuni a Gibeya nyuwo mwannattheka, ni mumpwaherera hiiho. Ekhotto yaahaaphwanya atakhali oGibeiya." 
Hosea10:10 Mweehuhuni ya othanliwawaka kinimwaattaruxa; miloko sinimwaathukumanela weera saatthuke niwoko na woopelelawaya soottheka. 
Hosea10:11 wEfrayimi ori mwaamombe ooxuttihiweene, ontthunaxa onyikalasa; tivawo kineeraaka kimuthatelihe murindi woolemela vaxikwawe wooreera. Kinimweettiha wEfrayimi, oYuda ontthuneya ottipura, ni Yakobe ontthuneya opittikuxa etthaya yoohittipuriwa." 
Hosea10:12 Mwiixaalele wookoleleya, muhephe yoowiima ya osivela woohimala, ni mpittikuxe etthaya yoohittipuriwa, niwoko ela ehuhu yoomwaasa Yave mpaka aneeraawe arwe ni oorupihelaseni waakhuleliwa ni Muluku." 
Hosea10:13 Vaheera nyuwosa mphatteiye sootakhala; munahepha yoonanara; mohooca soowiima soolokottha. Mweenre muroromelaka ikurusanyu ni anakhottwaanyu oowaata," 
Hosea10:14 munyakunyaku wa okhottoni onimoovenyerani moota wooweera moolipamwanyu moothemwene onoophwatiwa, ntoko Xalemani ophwantaawe oBeti-Arbeli vanihukuni na ekhotto – yaanyikalasiwaaya asimaayi vamoha ni anamwanaaya." 
Hosea10:15 Ii! Beteli, enimookhumelelani hiihotho nyuwo, niwoko sootakhalasanyu ti sitokotoko. Waaxaaka nihuku nno, mwene a oYixrayeli, onoophwatiwa woomalela.”" 
Hosea11:1 “Yixrayeli aaraawe mmiravo, Miyo kaamusivela, ni wExipitu kaamwiitthana mwanaka." 
Hosea11:2 Vaheera Miyo kaawiitthanaxaaka aYixrayeli, awosa ti yaakirakamelasaaya. Awosa yaahaapakela sooveleela aBahali*, ehiseraka erubani* icaambulo." 
Hosea11:3 Vano, ti Miyo kaaxuttihale weetta awEfrayimi kiweerelaka eta eta; vaheera awosa khayaasuwenle weera ti Miyo kaalamihale." 
Hosea11:4 Miyo kaaweettiha ni mikhoyi sa murima wooreera, ni sa osivela; kaavenxa muxikomwaya murindi woolemela, kinuurama weera kaacihe." 
Hosea11:5 Awosa anoohokoleela wExipitu ni awAsiriya animwaalamula niwoko na okhoottawaya orukunxa murima. 
Hosea11:6 Ikatana sinooceremela mmasidadenimwaya, sinimwaaphwata anampattika a maselaaya ni sinoomalamaliha soovaanelasaya." 
Hosea11:7 Mulokwaaka woolakelaxa okihiya Miyo. Anoomwiitthanaru Bahali*, owo khanaavuwiha." 
Hosea11:8 Moota heeni kineeraaka koohiyeeni Efrayimi? Yixrayeli, moota heeni kineeraaka kiwinnyerereni mmatatani mwa akina? Moota heeni kineeraaka koopakeeni ntoko kaampankaaka Adema? Moota heeni kineeraaka koopakeleni yeele kaampakenlaaka Zeboyimi? Murimaaka khoonoona mathanlelo; ikhararisaka sootannyereya." 
Hosea11:9 Nkikwanihera isarasaka soowuupa, hata nkihokoleelatho omphwata Efrayimi, niwoko Miyo ti Muluku nkihiyono mutthu. Miyo ti Ootteela eriyaraanyu. Nkirwa musarani." 
Hosea11:10 Awosa eniimutthare Yave; Owo anoope murika ntoko mwatto. Owo oopaka murika, anamwanaawe eniirwe ethukumelaka, ekhumaka mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa." 
Hosea11:11 Eniirweele ethukumelaka wExipitu, evavaka ntoko ipalame, ekhumaka wAsiriya ntoko ikhunda; Miyo kinimwaatekiha mmatthokonimwaya,” onghima Yave." 
Hosea11:12 wEfrayimi wookirica ni soowootha, empa ya oYixrayeli ni soolokottha ni Yuda onimvaanya Muluku, aani Ootteela oororomeleya." 
Hosea12:1 Efrayimi onca epheyo; owo ontthara epheyo ya mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa nihuku nootheene, aandyeereraka soowootha ni nipuhero. Oniiraanano wAsiriya ni onrumihela makhura a sooliveira* wExipitu." 
Hosea12:2 Yave onimuhimahima Yuda, ni onoomuttaruxa Yakobe, attharihaka mweettelowaawe; aani onoomutthuvela attharihaka soopakasawe." 
Hosea12:3 Aavarela etthottopwa ya munneiye areene mmirimani mwa amayawe; areene mulopwana aawana ni Muluku. 
Hosea12:4 Owo aawana ni ndyelo, anavenya oowineene; aahiinla adyoonttelelaka nreeliho na Muluku. oBeteli aamukumanano Muluku, anamutthekulanowo." 
Hosea12:5 Aani, Yave muneene, Muluku a ikuru sootheene, Yave ti Nsinanawe, mwa nenno aneeraawe uupuweleliweno!" 
Hosea12:6 Vanonto, muhokoleele wa Mulukwaanyu, ni mweettele ororomeleya ni ekhaikhai; mahuku ootheene mungweherere Mulukwaanyu." 
Hosea12:7 Nanakoso omvarela muteko mphimo woohiroromeleya; ni ontthunaxa olokottha. 
Hosea12:8 Efrayimi oniikuxerera, eeraka: “Moota kithadyireiyaaka, kinakwaneya! Mmitekoni sootheene kimvaraaka khaphwannyeru mwa miyo yootakhala hoye hoye yoottheka.”" 
Hosea12:9 “Vaheera Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu ookhumihaleni mwa wExipitu; kinoopakiha weera muhokoleele muheemani ntoko mmahukuni ale a ifestasanyu soothanliwa. 
Hosea12:10 Yoomeene kuuluma ni maprofeeti, kannaavaha nyoonelo sincipale, ni mwa yaawosa kuuluma mmaphwanaphwanihoni mancipale.”" 
Hosea12:11 Moota otakhanlaaya oGileyadi! Amakaaya khaamuteko! Awosa ampakela sooveleela oGileyadi, vaheera altaaraaya anookhala ntoko mittunduruma sa maluku vatthayani yoottipuriwa." 
Hosea12:12 Yakobe aatthawela elapo ya wArami; Yixrayeli aavara muteko weera amphwanye muthiyana; aakosoopa ikhondoolo weera amuthume. 
Hosea12:13 Yave aamvarela muteko mprofeeti weera aakhumihe aYixrayeli wExipitu, ni Owo aahaakosoopa mwa mprofeeti." 
Hosea12:14 wEfrayimi waatannyaxa isara sa Yave; tivawo Yave aneeraawe amoroxele nthowa na ephome wEfrayimi oyeehalaaya, ni onoohokoloxera onyoosawaya." 
Hosea13:1 Efrayimi uulumaawe, atthu yaamuthukumela; owo aari oottittimiheya oYixrayeli. Mene oothatuwa nanthowa woomulapani Bahali*, anakhwa." 
Hosea13:2 Vano awosa annatthekaxa; wa eparathaaya* aniipakelano miluku, icaambulo soohaniwa moota wooratteliwa, sootheene iyo ti miteko sa namaratta. Eneeriwa sa muloko owo: “Awosa anaapaka sooveleela atthu ni ambeeca miluku ni ekhalelo ya mwaamombe.”" 
Hosea13:3 Tivawo eneeraaya ekhale ntoko ekasikasi ya oxeexelo, aani ntoko nikame nnaakuva omora, ntoko makamba ekuxakuxiweene muyuupuruni ekhumaka wamveereliwa etrigu, ntoko mwiixi ontthuwa vaxanelani." 
Hosea13:4 “Vaheera Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaanyu ookhumihaleni wExipitu. Nyuwosa muhaakhuleleru muluku mukina okihiya Miyo. Khawoworu mvuluxa mukina. 
Hosea13:5 Miyo kaahookosoopani munikareni, mulaponi mmwe moovihaxa." 
Hosea13:6 Miyo kaacihasaaka, yaamvona; yaavonasaaya, yaamwiixoona, enakittiiwala." 
Hosea13:7 Tivawo kineeraaka kaarukunuwele ntoko mwatto; kinoowiipithela mphironi ntoko nantthavi. 
Hosea13:8 Kinimwaakarawela ntoko ursu* muthiyana oowaakhiwa axaanaawe, ni kinimwaaperakaxa. Kinimwaanyaanya ntoko mwatto; mwaamunama a ntuphini onimwaahonona." 
Hosea13:9 Ii! Yixrayeli, nyuwo moophwatiwa niwoko mookirukunuwela – aani Miyo, Namakhaviheraanyu." 
Hosea13:10 Vano ori woowi namakhaviheraanyu? Owo oovuluxeni mmasidadenimwanyu moothemwene! Ari woowi asitokweene mwaavekelaanyu mweeraka: ‘Munivahe mwene ni muhooleli’? 
Hosea13:11 Kaahoovahani mwene musaranimwaka, kinamvenxa moonyoonyiwanimwaka." 
Hosea13:12 Nthowa na Efrayimi noolempwa; sootthekasawe siri munamalepelani. 
Hosea13:13 Onimphwanya ovoreya ntoko wa muthiyana ayaraka, vaheera owo ti mwaana oohimiruku; yaaphiyeraka ehuhu, khankhuma mmirimani orupaliwaawe." 
Hosea13:14 Miyo kinoowoopola moowerani mwa nihiye; Miyo kinimwaavuluxa mwa okhwa. Ii! Okhwa, mahooxowaanyu ari woowi? Ii! Nihiye, ori woowi ophwatawanyu? Nkinoomorelani ikharari," 
Hosea13:15 naari Efrayimi simweettelaka nnene eriyari ya axunneiye. Epheyo ya mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa enoorweela mpatta wa Yave, yoopaka okhuma munikareni; naattuuttwaawe khapiluwa maahi, ni ehimaawe enimuuma. Mihakhusawe sootheene sinoohuhuliwa sithokororiwaayawo." 
Hosea13:16 Muloko wa oSamariya ontthuneya wiireya nthowanaya niwoko na omvaanya Mulukwaaya. Awosa animwiiviwa ni ekatana; anamwanaaya anoonyikalasiwa, axaaraya oorupala anoophulakasiwa irukulusaya.”" 
Hosea14:1 Ii! oYixrayeli, ohokoleele wa Yave, Mulukwaawo. Sootthekasawo sohoomoroxa!" 
Hosea14:2 Oreherere yoohima ni ohokoleele wa Yave. Mumvekele ha: “Mulevelele sootthekasahu sootheene ni mukhararinimwanyu munaakhulele weera noovaheeni sootthapela sa iyanosahu ntoko imombe simveleeliwa. 
Hosea14:3 awAsiriya khaangwera onivuluxa; khaniwelatho ikavalu* sa ekhotto. Seiye sipakiwe ni matataahu khaneerelatho ‘milukusahu,’ niwoko mwa Nyuwo mukwaasuni omphwanya ikharari.”" 
Hosea14:4 “Miyo kinoolamiha ohiroromeleyawaya ni kinimwaasivela ni murimaaka wootheene, niwoko isarasaka sohaahuluwa." 
Hosea14:5 Miyo kinookhalela oYixrayeli ntoko nikame; iwo onoottuva ntoko ethutu. Aani, ntoko esidari* ya oLebanoni, sinoorakamelaxa mikwankhwaarisaya;" 
Hosea14:6 soophuwasaya sinimunnuwa. Waarawaya onuulikane ni wa sooliveira*, wunkhelawaya ntoko esidari* ya oLebanoni." 
Hosea14:7 Yaale yaakhovelenle okhala vamunttuusinivawe, anoohokoleelawotho. Anoophuwela ntoko etrigu. Anoottuva ntoko evideira*, ni epilaaya eniikhale ntoko eviinyu ya oLebanoni." 
Hosea14:8 Ii! wEfrayimi, nkipwatthele heenitho miluku sikina? Ti Miyo kinimwaakhula, kinamukosoopa. Kiri ntoko mwiri wa epinyeiru* ekithi; soowiimasanyu sootheene sinrweela wa Miyo.”" 
Hosea14:9 Musuweli taani? Ti yoowo anoonelemo itthu iya. Taani orino akhili? Ti yoowo aniiwexexe. Iphiro sa Yave ti soororomeleya; oororomeleya amvira mwemmo, vaheera attiyamaaru anookwattuliwamo." 
Joel1:1 Masu a Yave yaamurweenle Yoweli, mwaana mulopwana a Petuweli ti ala:" 
Joel1:2 Mwiiwe nyuwosa asitokweene ni amaki ootheene a elapo ela. Kheenatoko weereya etthu ntoko ela mmahukunimwanyu hata mmahukuni a makholowaanyu. 
Joel1:3 Mwaathalihere anamwaniinyu yeeyo ekhumelenle, ni awosa yaathalihere anamwanaaya, ni anamwane awo wa ekhapira enttharelana." 
Joel1:4 Seiye nasope mmoha ohiyalaawe, misoope mitokotoko sikina saakhuura; seiye misoope mitokotoko sikina saahiyalaaya, misoope mikhaani saakhuura ni seiye mikhaani saahiyalaaya, misoope sikinatho saakhuura." 
Joel1:5 Mvenye nyuwosa anamuhapaliwa ni mwiinleke! Mulalamike nyuwosa anamawura a eviinyu ootheene! Mulalamike niwoko na eviinyu enyowani yeenre evenxiwa owanoniwanyu. 
Joel1:6 Muloko wooweraxa woohaalikeleya woovolowa elapwaaka. Mainowaaya anlikana ni mwatto; miroondyesaya sinlikana ni mwatto muthiyana. 
Joel1:7 Muloko ole woophwata imattasaka sa iwuuva* ni nyirisaka sa efiigu*. Wohaattula makulaaya ohiyaka iphandisaya soowaattuliwasene ttwee. 
Joel1:8 Mulalamike ntoko mwaamwali oowiikosoopa awanreene sa enaamukhweli onimulalamikela namatthomeraawe akhwiiyeene vaanaanoru. 
Joel1:9 Khasiwowotho sooveleela sa etrigu naari soowura Mpaani mwa Yave. Asaserdoti*, anrumeelamo vamaithoni wa Yave ammwiinanela." 
Joel1:10 Imatta soophwatiwa ni etthaya yohuumelela; etrigu yoohononiwa; eviinyu enyowani yoomala ni makhura aathowa. 
Joel1:11 Mutteenguwe nyuwosa anamalima; mwiinleke nyuwosa murino imatta sa iwuuva*. Mulalamikele etrigu ni esevada*, niwoko soohepha soophwatiwa." 
Joel1:12 Ematta ya iwuuva* yohuuma ni mwiri wa efiigu* woonyaala. Nyiri sa eromazera*, nivare ni sa masa* – nyiri soowiima sootheene sa mmatta – sohuuma. Vekhaikhai, ohakalala wa omutthu woomala." 
Joel1:13 Ngware isaakho, nyuwosa asaserdoti* ni mulalamike nyuwosa munrumeela ohoolo wa altaari*. Murwe, mvirihe ohiyu ngwanreene isaakho, nyuwosa munrumeela vamaithoni wa Mulukwaaka, niwoko sooveleela sa etrigu ni soowura soorakamelihiwa Mpaani mwa Mulukwaanyu." 
Joel1:14 Mulamulele otthuka moota wootteela, mpake muthukumano wootteela. Ngwiitthane Mpaani mwa Yave Mulukwaanyu asitokweene ni ootheene ankhala mweelaponi weera mundyoontteleleke Yave." 
Joel1:15 Ii! Nihuku nno! Vano nihuku na Yave nookhuveela ni nnimoowa ntoko ophwata wooweraxa wa Muluku a ikuru sootheene. 
Joel1:16 Vekhaikhai soocasahu noohaakhiwa – hiihotho ohakalala ni otthapa Mpaani mwa Mulukwaahu. 
Joel1:17 Mmiso wohuntta vathi wa makottomola. Matatha aaheleya nthala ni icikutti soophwatiwa niwoko soohepha sootheene sooyeleeleya. 
Joel1:18 Mwiiwe onyakula wa mihuwo – imombe sineetteetta ni owali, niwoko khasinono yooca. Mpakatho ikhondoolo sinnahaawaxa." 
Joel1:19 Ii Yave! Kinoovekelani Nyuwo, niwoko mooro woohisa waacihiwamo axinama ni malumi a mooro aalaliha nyiri sootheene sa mmatta." 
Joel1:20 Mpaka axinama a ntuphini annoodyoonttelelani, niwoko nyooloko sohuuma ni mooro woohisa muncaayamo inama." 
Joel2:1 Mwiipe nipalapatta oSiyoni! Aani, mukhuwele vamwaakwaaka Wootteela! Muthukumele amaki ootheene a mulaponi, niwoko nihuku na Yave nneera niphiyaka. Nookhuveela" 
Joel2:2 nihuku na epiphi ni nooriipa; nihuku na mahutte ni ekuttatta. Anakhotto ancipale ooweraxa animoowa yiixooniheraka ntoko ekamaama ya oxa emmwareela mmanyaakoni moota ohitonke wooniwa hata oneera ohooniwetho ni ikhapira sa muhoolo. 
Joel2:3 Ohoolowaya mooro onnahisa ni ottuliwaya amvarela malumi a mooro. Ohoolowayasatho elapo eri ntoko ematta ya wEdeni, ottuliwaya ntoko nikare noohikhala etthu; kheewo eniyaakuze." 
Joel2:4 Iyo sinlikana ni ikavalu*, sinlikana ikavalu* sincipale singwanaaya sitthimakaka." 
Joel2:5 Simvinuwa nyaako ni onyakulawaya onlikana ni oruma wa ikaaro sa ikavalu*, ntoko otetereya wa mooro onlaliha masaara, ntoko anakhotto ancipalexa oolikaneene owana." 
Joel2:6 Soonaka seiyo, miloko sinoothukumela ni ekhove yoomoreene soovaka." 
Joel2:7 Iyo singwana ntoko anakhotto ooweraxa, etuphaka exiri. Sootheene iyo sineetta soothataanasene sihihapuwaka simviraayamo." 
Joel2:8 Khasinkakhanaru sirowaka muhoolo paahi. Naari saawanaka, khasinghuluwa." 
Joel2:9 Siniivonyera musidade situphaka exiri. Simvolowa mpaani ntoko anamwiiya amvoleelaaya vaxanelani. 
Joel2:10 Ohoolowaya elapo enootetereya, erimu enothukumela, nsuwa ni mweeri soophilaatteya ni ithenyeeri soohiya waara." 
Joel2:11 Yave onnakhuwela ohoolo wa anakhottwaawe. Awo ari oohaalikeleya ni yaawo aniiwelela nlamulonawe ari ooweraxa. Nihuku na Yave ti ntokotoko ni noowoopihaxa. Khaawo anaawere ovilela. 
Joel2:12 Yave oneera: “Muhokoleele wa Miyo vaanaano va ni murimaanyu wootheene, mutthukaka, mwiinlaka ni mulalamikaka.”" 
Joel2:13 Muhaahule sowarasanyu, mene muhule mirimasanyu. Muhokoleele wa Yave Mulukwaanyu, niwoko Owo ti a ikharari ni murima wooreera; oovilela ni oosareya osivela. Ti oopisa oruuha nihooxo." 
Joel2:14 Apaale Owo onooceendya olakelawawe aruuhaka nreeliho ohikhanle nihooxo. Hiiho nyuwo munoowera ompakelatho Yave Mulukwaanyu sooveleela sa etrigu ni soowura. 
Joel2:15 Mwiipe nipalapatta oSiyoni. Mulamulele otthuka moota wootteela ni mpake muthukumano wootteela. 
Joel2:16 Muthukumanyihe muloko; mutteelihe muthukumano, mwaathukumanyihe asitokweene, anamwane mpaka yaawo anaamwa. Mpakatho oothela vaanaanoru ekhumeke ankonaayamo." 
Joel2:17 Asaserdoti* anrumeela vamaithoni wa Yave elalamike eriyari vanipuwani na empa ya mwene ni altaari*. Awosa evekeleke: “Dyoontte Yave, muurele mulokwaanyu. Muhihiye yoohiyeraanyu epakiwaka etthu yoowuuliha muru; etthu yootthebwiwa ni miloko. Eheeriwe variyari wa miloko: ‘Ori woowi Mulukwaaya?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Vano Yave ookhalela ehace elapwaawe, anamorela ikharari mulokwaawe." 
Joel2:19 Yave onaakhula: “Kinimooruuhelani etrigu, eviinyu enyowani ni makhura mancipale mpaka sineeraaya sookwaneeni. Nkirwatho kitthunihera weera miloko sikina sootthebweeni." 
Joel2:20 Kinoowoomolelasani amwiittana anrweela mpatta wa ottuttuwani, kaathaamiheraka munikareni noowuumaxa. Ohoolowaya kinimwaavonyera mphareiyani ya ninkhuma nsuwa ni ottuliwaya mphareiyani ya ninkela nsuwa. Mittembosaya nsunkhaxa.” Vekhaikhai Yave oopaka itthu sootikhiniheya sitokotoko!" 
Joel2:21 Elapo, muhoove; muhakalale ootteeliweene. Vekhaikhai Yave oopaka itthu sootikhiniheya!" 
Joel2:22 Axinama a ntuphini, muhoove, niwoko malaxi muncaanyu eneera ephuwaka. Nyiri sineera siimaka; aani nyiri sa efiigu* ni imatta sa iwuuva* siri nyeya nyeya." 
Joel2:23 Muhakalale atthu a oSiyoni! Munghakalalele Yave Mulukwaanyu, niwoko ohoovahani epula mutthulo moororomeleyanimwawe. Owo ohoovahani epula mutthulo ni ya mulaala, ntoko aapakaawe khalayi." 
Joel2:24 Mapuro amveeriwa etrigu anoosareya etrigu ni mapuro oowaama iwuuva* anoosareya eviinyu enyowani ni makhura. 
Joel2:25 “Kinimoolivani muyaakhani sa soohepha saaphwatiwe ni nasope – misoope sitokotoko ni sikhaani, misoope sikina, aani misoope soohiyanahiyana – anakhottwaaka koorumihenlaakani." 
Joel2:26 Munimooca mpaka ovona ni munootthapela Nsina na Yave Mulukwaanyu, mwa Yoowo oopakenleni sootikhiniheya. Mulokwaaka khoorwa oyevihiwatho." 
Joel2:27 Vano munoosuwela weera kiri oYixrayeli; weera ti Yave Mulukwaanyu ni weera khawoworu muluku mukina. Mulokwaaka khoorwa oyevihiwatho.” 
Joel2:28 “Vahoolowaya nkaayehere Munepaaka atthu ootheene. Anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana eniithalihere otthuna wa Muluku, anamuuluvalaanyu eniilohe ni amiravowaanyu eniikhaleno nyoonelo." 
Joel2:29 Mmahukuni awo nkaayeehere Munepaaka mpaka arumeiyaanyu asilopwana ni asithiyana ncira. 
Joel2:30 Nkoonihere sootikhiniha wiirimu ni vathi: ephome, mooro ni amarimbu a mwiixi." 
Joel2:31 Nsuwa nnithatuwe epiphi ni mweeri onuuthatuwe ephome nihinaaye ophiya nihuku ntokweene ni noowoopihaxa na Yave. 
Joel2:32 Ootheene eneera yiitthane Nsina na Yave eniivuluxiwe, niwoko vamwaako Siyoni ni oYerusaleemu onuukhale woopoliwa, ntoko Yave aaroromelinghaawe wa yaawo eniihale ni okumi ni wa yaawo aneeraawe awiitthane.”" 
Joel3:1 “Mmahukuni awo ni mweehuhuweene yeeyo, Miyo kaareereliwaka oYuda ni oYerusaleemu," 
Joel3:2 kinoothukumanyiha miloko sootheene, kikuruxelaka mureyareyani na Yehoxafati. Nkathorihelewo miloko mwaha wa yoohiyeraaka, eyo tiiyo mulokwaaka aYixrayeli, niwoko iyo soomwaraxa mulokwaaka siikawelaka elapwaaka." 
Joel3:3 Miloko iyo saapakela macitta mulokwaaka siwaakakhanyiheraka amiravo mapuuta. Saahaathumiha asimwali ni eviinyu weera sihapaliwe. 
Joel3:4 Ii! oTiro, oSidoni ni ilapo sootheene sa oFilistiya – mulattu heeni muraanyuno ni Miyo? Muneerera okiinlela ikukuttula niwoko na etthu kipankaaka? Mwatthuna, mwiipasoope! Kinimoohokoloxerani woowaakuveya wa yeeyo muntthunaanyu okipaka." 
Joel3:5 Mookiiyera iyuumasaka soorikaxa ni iparathasaka, munarongha mpaani mwa milukusanyu mihakhusaka sootthuneyaxa." 
Joel3:6 Mwaahaathumihera aGrego muloko wa oYuda ni oYerusaleemu mwaarakamelihaka mulaponi ayareliwaayamo. 
Joel3:7 Moone, kinimwaakhumihamo mmapuroni mwaathumihenraanyumo ni kinimoohokoloxerani yeeyo mpankaanyu." 
Joel3:8 Kinimwaathumihera anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana amaki a oYuda ni awosa eniyaathumihere aSabeyani ankhala ottaiwene.” Ti Yave eenre. 
Joel3:9 Mwalaleiye yeeyo eriyari ya miloko: Mwiirehererele okhottoni! Ngweemexe anakhotto. Anakhotto ootheene yaattameleke weera ewane! 
Joel3:10 Ikarumasanyu soolimela mutatuxe ikatana ni mavaka! Yoole ori oohilipa eereke: “Koolipa!” 
Joel3:11 Ngweeke miloko sinaattamenle ni muthukumanewo. Ii! Yave Mwaakuruxelewo anakhottwaanyu! 
Joel3:12 “Miloko seette sirwaaka munreyareyani na Yehoxafati, niwoko weiwo kineeraka kakilaathi weera kathorihe miloko sootheene sa mukhwipi." 
Joel3:13 Muvarele muteko ecikwaakhwa, niwoko yoohepha yoolikana. Ngweeke mvotteke ni ikuru iwuuva* niwoko nipuro sinaameliwa iwuuva* ni simvuuvelaayamo soosareya. Vekhaikhai, soonanarasaya ti sootepaxa!" 
Joel3:14 Atthu oohaalikeleya angweherera muNreyareyani na Olakela. Moone, nihuku na Yave nookhuveela muNreyareyani na Olakela." 
Joel3:15 Nsuwa ni mweeri sinooriipihana ni ithenyeeri khasaara. 
Joel3:16 Yave anaatturume oSiyoni; nsunawe nniiwiwe oYerusaleemu. Erimu ni vathi eniitetereye, mene Yave anaakhale Wootthawelawo mulokwaawe; aani Nipuro Noolipaxa na aYixrayeli.”" 
Joel3:17 “Vano nihuku nno mmwisuwele weera Miyo, Yave Mulukwaanyu, kinkhala oSiyoni, mwaakowaaka wootteela. OYerusaleemu onuutteele ni anamarwa kheewinatho." 
Joel3:18 Nihuku nno nyaako nsittonye eviinyu enyowani; mmattumuxani onuuvuuve mukaka. Maxaapwa ootheene a oYuda eniitthimake maahi. Mpaani mwa Yave anaakhume naattuuttu ahelelaka nreyareya na oXitimi. 
Joel3:19 Wa soothesene, wExipitu onuuheleye nthala ni wEdomi nnipakeye nikare noowuumelela, niwoko na mapuhero yaapakenlaaya atthu a oYuda, mwa weiwo yaawiivalaayawo atthu oohinthowa." 
Joel3:20 oYuda onuumakiwe mahuku ootheene nitho oYerusaleemu wa ikhapira sootheene. 
Joel3:21 Soonanara seiye Miyo kihilevelenlaaka, kinoolevelela.” Yave onkhala oSiyoni!" 
Amos1:1 Ala masu aakhenlaawe mmooneloni Amosi, mukukhuli mmoha a oTekowa, mwaha wa aYixrayeli, sivinreene iyaakha piili ehinaaye otetereya etthaya. Ehuhuweene yeele, Uziya aari mwene a oYuda ni Yerobowami, mwaana mulopwana a Yehowaxi, aari mwene a oYixrayeli." 
Amos1:2 Owo aaheera: “Yave ontturuma oSiyoni ni onkukutteya oYerusaleemu; onuuma ancihaayamo akukhuli, ni ennyaala etthomela ya mwaako Karemeli.”" 
Amos1:3 Yave oneera ha: “Niwoko na sootakhala sincipale seereiye oDamasku, nkirwa kihiya ottaruxa. Awosa ahaamana aGiliyade ni iyuuma soosongowa," 
Amos1:4 kinoohisa empa ya Hazayeli, ni malumi a mooro anoolaliha moolipamo mwa Ben-Hadade." 
Amos1:5 Kinookurumula mulako wa oDamasku; kinoomphwata mwene ori mureyareyani na wAveni, vamoha ni yoole omvarelela ekopo ya emwene oBete-Edomi. Muloko wa wAsiriya onooronghiwa wootthukiwani elapo ekina ya oKiri,” onghima Yave." 
Amos1:6 Yave oneera ha: “Niwoko na sootakhala sincipale seereiye oGaza, nkirwa kihiya ottaruxa. Waaronghasa muloko wootheene wootthukiwani elapo ekina enaathumihera awEdomi." 
Amos1:7 Tivawo kineeraaka kirumihele mooro ixiri sa oGaza, ni malumi a mooro anoolaliha moolipamwaya." 
Amos1:8 Kinoomphwata mwene a wAsdode ni yoole omvarelela ekopo ya emwene wAskaloni. Kinootheteela Ntatanaka wEkroni, mpaka aneeraawe akhwe ookisera a aFilisti,” onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Amos1:9 Yave oneera ha: “Niwoko na sootakhala sincipale seereiye oTiro, nkirwa kihiya ottaruxa. Vano aathumiha muloko wootheene, yaathumiheraka awEdomi, enyoosaka wiiraana wa axunna," 
Amos1:10 Tivawo kineeraaka kihise ixiri sa oTiro ni malumi a mooro anoolaliha moolipamwaya.” 
Amos1:11 Yave oneera ha: “Niwoko na sootakhala sincipale seereiye wEdomi, nkirwa kihiya ottaruxa. Vano owo oomuttharatthara munneiye, ni ohooceeliha ikharari, amunyoonyeraxiwaka ni apwahererihaka isarasawe." 
Amos1:12 Tivawo kineeraaka kirumihele mooro oTemani, olaliheke moolipamo mwa oBozera.”" 
Amos1:13 Yave oneera ha: “Niwoko na sootakhala sincipale seereiye wAmoni, nkirwa kihiya ottaruxa. Vano oophula irukulu sa asithiyana oorupala a oGiliyade, weera aandyeerere nyiinanosawe." 
Amos1:14 Tivawo kineeraaka kirumihele mooro ixiri sa oRaba olaliheke moolipamwaya. Vano vanihukuni na owana onimwiiwanyeya okhuweliwa wa ekhotto, yoopaxaka epheyo yoowuupaxa vanihukuni na ettheku." 
Amos1:15 Mwenaawe onooronghiwa wootthukiwani vamoha ni asitokweenaawe,” onghima Yave." 
Amos2:1 Yave oneera ha: “Niwoko na sootakhala sincipale seereiye oMowabe, nkirwa kihiya omuttaruxa. Vano owo oohisa mpaka olaliha makhuva a mwene a awEdomi." 
Amos2:2 Tivawo kineeraaka kirumihele mooro oMowabe olaliheke moolipamo mwa oKeriyote. Mowabe onoolakaseya mmunyakunyakuni mutokotoko, okhuwelaxiwaka mukhottoni ni moorumani mwa nipalapatta." 
Amos2:3 Kinoomphwata mulamulaawe kiwiiveke asitokweenaawe vamoha ni yoowo,” onghima Yave." 
Amos2:4 Yave oneera ha: “Niwoko na sootakhala sincipale seereiye oYuda, nkirwa kihiya ottaruxa. Vano aYuda aakhootta Nlamulo na Yave ni khayiiwelenle ikanosawe, niwoko aalokottheya ni miluku soowootha, mwa seiyo yaattharaaya makholowaaya." 
Amos2:5 Tivawo kineeraaka kirumihele mooro oYuda, olaliheke moolipamo mwa oYerusaleemu.”" 
Amos2:6 Yave oneera ha: “Niwoko na sootakhala sincipale seereiye oYixrayeli, nkirwa kihiya ottaruxa. Awosa animuthumiha ni eparatha* oororomeleya, nitho ikwakwaatta piili oohaawa." 
Amos2:7 Annyikala muru wa oothoiwa, mooteene yoowo annyikalaaya ntthupi, ni animukhoottela ompakela ekhaikhai oohasuliwa. Tiithi ni mwaana animukonano muthiyana mmoharu, ehiirihaka hiiho Nsinanaka Nootteela." 
Amos2:8 Anuuramela ohoolo wa yakhalaru altaari* ewanreene ikuwo sooweemexeriwa. Ereene mpaani mwa mulukwaaya, angwura eviinyu yoothummwa ni musurukhu wooliviwa mmulattuni." 
Amos2:9 Yaaroorakamaxaru ntoko mwiri wa esidari*, ni yaaroolipaxaru ntoko ikaravaliyu, ti Miyo kaaphwante awAmori ohoolo wa aYixrayeli. Koovurula soowiimasaya, kinaruttumula mikwankhwaarisaya." 
Amos2:10 Ti yoomeene kookhumihaleni wExipitu, kinaweettihani iyaakha miloko mixexe munikareni, weera koovaheeni elapo ya awAmori." 
Amos2:11 Kohaathanlatho anamwaniinyu akina akina asilopwana weera ekhale maprofeeti, ni akina akina a amiravowaanyu weera ekhale aNaziri*. Muloko wa oYixrayeli, kheehiyono ettiitthu?” onghima Yave." 
Amos2:12 “Vaheera nyuwosa moopakiha weera aNaziri* ewure eviinyu, munaalamulela maprofeeti weera ehithalihere otthuna wa Muluku." 
Amos2:13 Vanonto, Miyo kinooweetheyasani ntoko ekaaro eneetheyaaya etthaya elemelaxiweene etrigu." 
Amos2:14 Oowaaluweya khoopowa, oolipa khalipa, ni nakhotto khoopola okumaawe." 
Amos2:15 Namalatha muura khapwaherera okhala vanipuroniwawe, ontthimaka khatthawa, ni namweettiha a ekavalu* khoopola okumaawe." 
Amos2:16 Nihuku nno mpaka anakhotto oolipihaxa murima anootthawa tiriya,” onghima Yave." 
Amos3:1 Ii! aYixrayeli, mwiiwe masu ala Yave owuulumenlaaweni; kinuulumela emusi yootheene ela kikhumihalaaka wExipitu:" 
Amos3:2 “Wa imusi sootheene sa mulaponi koothanlaleni nyuwo paahi; tivawo Miyo kineeraaka koottaruxeleni sootakhala sootheene.” 
Amos3:3 Atthu eeli ehiiwananaka, animweetta vamoha?" 
Amos3:4 Mwatto aahivara yoovaraawe, onimoopa murika moothakoni? Ankha mwaaxaana a mwatto onimoopa murika munikhukunimwawe ahilupanttheru?" 
Amos3:5 Mwaapalame onoopharihiwa munraakhoni ahireiwale? Weeraka muraakho onootaphuliwa ohipharihaleru etthu? 
Amos3:6 Nipalapatta naarumaka musidade, muloko khoonthukumela? Enimweereya erisa musidade Yave ahilamulenle?" 
Amos3:7 Vekhaikhai Yave onlamula sootheene, khampakaru etthu ahiwoonihenre yoovaanelaawe arumeiyaawe maprofeeti." 
Amos3:8 Mwatto ohoopa murika, taani aneera ahoove? Yave onlamula sootheene, ohuuluma, taani aneera ahithalihere otthuna wa Muluku?" 
Amos3:9 Mulaleerele moolipamo mwa wAxedode ni mwa wExipitu: “Muthukumane mmanyaakoni sa oSamariya, weera moone munyakunyaku mutokotoko ori musidadeni mmo, ni nihasu nri eriyari ya mulokwaaya.”" 
Amos3:10 “Awosa khaangwera okhalano mweettelo woowookoleleya,” onghima Yave, “awosa anthukumanya moolipamwaya seiyo yiiyalaaya ni ahuhunlaaya.”" 
Amos3:11 Vanonto Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: “Mwiittana mmoha onookuxa elapo. Owo onoophwata moolipamwanyu ni onoohuhula impasanyu soolipa." 
Amos3:12 Vanonto Yave onlamula sootheene oneera ha: mooteene yoowo mukukhuli onoopolaawe ekhondoolo, akhumihaka mmwaano mwa mwatto makhuva meeli a mmettoni hoye hoye entthuri emoha ya naaru paahi, aYixrayeli anoovenxiwa oSamariya – yaawosa ankilaathi okhwipi wa ebeetti ni ehice sa nsawu." 
Amos3:13 Mwiiwe yeeyo ni mukhalele onamoona ekhapira ya Yakobe,” onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, Muluku a ikuru sootheene." 
Amos3:14 “Vanihukuni Miyo kineeraaka kaattaruxe aYixrayeli mwaha wa sootthekasaya, kinimwaaphwata altaari* a oBeteli; manyaka a altaari* anoothikiliwa, emoreleke vathi." 
Amos3:15 Kinoophwata empa ya mulaala vamoha ni empa ya elimwe; impa siphwanelihiwe maino a etthepo sinoophwatiwa ni impa sitokotoko sinoolakaseya,” onghima Yave." 
Amos4:1 Mwiiwe masu ala nyuwosa imombe ithiyana sa oBaxani muri vamwaako wa oSamariya, nyuwosa asithiyana munaahasula oohaawa, munaattikittha oothoiwa, ngweerelaka asiiyinyu: “Muniruuheleke soowura weera niwure!”" 
Amos4:2 Yave onlamula sootheene oolipela mootteelanimwawe: “Vekhaikhai enoophiyera ehuhu muneeraanyu mpuruliwe ni iyuuma soongweyano, ni ookisera a nyuwo onoopuruliwa ni mameso." 
Amos4:3 Khula mutthu a nyuwosa onookhumela mmitarini sa exiri, ni munoovonyeriwa mpatta wa oHaremoni,” onghima Yave." 
Amos4:4 “Murowe oBeteli ni mwatthekewo; murowe oGiligali ni mwatthekaxewo. Khula oxeexelo mpake sooveleelasanyu, mvahe sanaamulokosanyu khula vayaakhani yanaararu." 
Amos4:5 Muhise epaawu yookhalano eferementu ntoko yooveleela yootthapela ni mwiikuxerereno soovahasanyu sootheene sa otthunawanyu, nyuwosa aYixrayeli, niwoko ti yeeyo munsivelaanyu opaka,” onghima Yave onlamula sootheene." 
Amos4:6 “Ti Miyo koovolihani etala wa khula esidade, ni othowa wa yooca mmapuroni moothemwene, ni waarookhalaru hiiho, nyuwosa khamuhokoleenle wa Miyo,” onghima Yave." 
Amos4:7 “Ti Miyo kahaarupihale epula, saahalaaya nyeeri miraru wa ohepha. Kaarumihela epula esidade emoha, vaheera esidade ekina hoye. Ematta emoha yaarupeliwa epula; ekina khayaarupeliwe, enuuma." 
Amos4:8 Atthu a isidade piili hoye hoye tthaaru yaarowa esidade ekina eveveleyaka waasa maahi, ehimalihaka ntthona. Vano waarookhalaru hiiho, nyuwosa khamuhokoleenle wa Miyo,” onghima Yave." 
Amos4:9 “Imaara sincipale kittarunxaaka mattimbaanyu ni imatta sa iwuuvasanyu; kaattaruxa ni soowaaliwa suuma niwoko na oviha. Nasope oonyaanya imattasanyu sa iwuuva* ni sooliveirasanyu*. Mene orookhalaru hiiho, nyuwosa khamuhokoleenle wa Miyo,” onghima Yave." 
Amos4:10 “Kaahoorumihelasani mahooxo ntoko kaapakenlaaka wExipitu. Kaawiiva amiravo ni ekatana; kaahiya sivariwaka ikavalusanyu*. Kaahunkhihaxa mphulanimwanyu ni wunkha wa anamakhwa mwaakonenlaanyuwo, mene waarookhalaru hiiho, nyuwosa khamuhokoleenle wa Miyo,” ongima Yave." 
Amos4:11 “Kaaphwata isidadesanyu ikina ikina, ntoko kaaphwantaaka oSodoma ni oGomora. Mwaari ntoko nrusuwela, mene waarookhalaru hiiho, nyuwosa khamuhokoleenle wa Miyo,” onghima Yave." 
Amos4:12 “Tivawo ti yeeyo kineeraaka koopakeleni, Ii! aYixrayeli. Keenre kinoopakelani yeeyo, aYixrayeli, mwiirehererele okumana ni Mulukwaanyu!”" 
Amos4:13 Yoowo ompaka nyaako, ompattuxa epheyo ni onimusuweliha mutthu soowuupuwelasawe, yoowo ontatuxa ekamaama ya oxa epiphi, ni onnyikala nyaako sa mulaponi –Nsinanawe ti Yave, Muluku a ikuru sootheene!" 
Amos5:1 Ii! Muloko wa oYixrayeli, mwiiwe masu ala a olalamikeliwawanyu:" 
Amos5:2 “Mwaamwali oowiikosoopa oYixrayeli, oomora woohiweherera ovenyatho. Oothaamiwa mulaponimwawe ni khawoworu aneera amvenxe.”" 
Amos5:3 Yave onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: “Esidade eneera yaarumihele okhottoni asilopwana macira muloko, enoohalano asilopwana ncira paahi; ni muttetthe oneera waarumihe ncira, onoohalano asilopwana muloko paahi.”" 
Amos5:4 Yave oneerela ha muloko wa oYixrayeli: “Mukaase, ni munookhalano okumi;" 
Amos5:5 muhaase oBeteli, muhirowe oGiligali, muhivireru oBerexeba. Vano vekhaikhai, amaki a oGiligali anoroonghiwa wootthukiwani, ni oBeteli onooheliwa nthala.”" 
Amos5:6 Mmwaase Yave ni munookhalano okumi; ohiyanawaya, Owo onimwiixoonihera ntoko mooro eriyari ya ekhapira ya Yoseefe, mwa yoowo onuulalihe esidade ya oBeteli, ahikhalakaruwo aneera acipihe." 
Amos5:7 Nyuwosa muntatuxa yookwanela enakhala yoohapala, mumvonyera vathi ekhaikhai." 
Amos5:8 Yoowo opanke mikuttula sa ithenyeeri ithannapiili ni mikuttula sa ithenyeeri siitthaniwa Oriyoni*, ontatuxa epiphi ekamaama ni othana wa epiphi ya ohiyu; Yoowo oniitthana maahi a ephareiya, anamwaraxela mulaponi, vano Nsinanawe ti Yave." 
Amos5:9 Owo onruuhela wootutuxereya ophwata moolipa, ni ophwata onrweela esidade yoolipihiwa." 
Amos5:10 aYixrayeli animusoonda yoowo onaakiha ekhaikhai munuulummwa milattu, ni animuthanya yoowo onuuluma ekhaikhai." 
Amos5:11 Nyuwosa munimuhasula oohaawa munnyesererihaka woovahani etrigu. Tivawo, murootekaru impa sa maluku, khamukhalamo; muroophatteyaru imatta sa iwuuva* soopomba, khamuwura eviinyuwaaya." 
Amos5:12 Vano Miyo koosuwela waatta seenraaya sootakhalasanyu ni wunnuwa seenraaya sootthekasanyu. Nyuwosa munimuhasula oororomeleya, munaakhela makhwankwa ni munghiiha opakeliwa ekhaikhai oohaawa munuulummwa milattu." 
Amos5:13 Tivawo namiruku ommaalaawe weereyaka hiiho, niwoko ti ehuhu yoonanaraxa." 
Amos5:14 Mwaasaase mpuha ohikhanle yoonanara, weera mukhaleno okumi. Hiiho Yave, Muluku a ikuru sootheene, onookhala ni nyuwosa ntoko muhimmaanyu." 
Amos5:15 Muthanye yoonanara; musivele mpuha. Mukhalihe ekhaikhai munuulummwa milattu. Apaale Yave, Muluku a ikuru sootheene, anaamorele ikharari yaawo ahalahanle a Yoseefe." 
Amos5:16 Vanonto Yave, Muluku a ikuru sootheene, oneera ha: “Onookhala olalamika mmapuwani moothemwene, ni okhuweliwa wa othanana mmiseweni moothemwene. Anamalima anoolattuliwa weera yiinle, ni anamwiikhupanyera weera elalamike." 
Amos5:17 Onookhala olalamika mmamattani moothemwene mwa iwuuva*, niwoko kinoovira eriyaraanyusa,” onghima Yave." 
Amos5:18 Ii! Nyuwosa munghaawela nihuku na Yave! Munghaawelela heeni nyuwosa nihuku na Yave? Nno nnikhale nihuku na epiphi, ohikhanle waara." 
Amos5:19 Nnikhale ntoko mutthu onimutthawa mwatto anamukumanano ursu*; ntoko mutthu omvolowa mpaanimwawe, anaphiteerihela ntatanawe vaxirini, analummwawo ni enowa." 
Amos5:20 Nihuku na Yave, nnikhale na epiphi ohikhanle waara. Eniikhale ewiriphi woohimwaleeleyaru." 
Amos5:21 “Miyo kinthanya ni kinnyoosa ifestasanyu sa ediini; nkimvilela mithukumanosanyu soolapa. 
Amos5:22 Naari nyuwosa mukiruuhelaka sooveleela soohisa ni sa irooro, iyo khasinkisiveliha. Naari mukiruuhelaka sooveleela sooreerela sa murettele, nkimpwatthelaru seiyo." 
Amos5:23 Mususihe wa Miyo oruma wa iciposanyu ni oruma wa amakitaanyu. 
Amos5:24 Ohiya yeeyo, wookoleleya otthimake ntoko mooloko, ekhaikhai ntoko nxaapwa nihingwelelaru!" 
Amos5:25 Ii! Muloko wa oYixrayeli, weeraka nyuwo mwaakivaha sooveleela ni soovaha mweehuhuni ya iyaakha miloko mixexe kaaweettihaakani munikareni?" 
Amos5:26 Hoye! Nyuwosa mwaateexa ecaambulo ya mwenaanyu Sikute ni Kiwumi, muluku wa ethenyeeri, mwa seiyo mwiipakenlaanyu." 
Amos5:27 Tivawo Miyo kineeraaka koorongheni wootthukiwani elapo ekina, okhopela elapo ya oDamasku,” onghima Yave, mwa Yoowo Nsinanawe ti Muluku a ikuru sootheene." 
Amos6:1 Ii! Nyuwosa munkhala muhipwatthaka etthu oSiyoni, ni muniixoona okhala oolipeene vamwaakoni wa oSamariya; nyuwosa atthu oosuwanyeyaxa mwiixuupuwelaka weera muri ooreerela eriyari ya miloko, mwa seiyo ontthimakelaayawo muloko wa oYixrayeli!" 
Amos6:2 Murowase oKalene ni mwawehewo; vahoolowaya, mwapwaherere mpaka oHamate, ni woottharelana mwakhuruwele oGati, mulaponi mwa aFilisti. Weeraka iyo ti sooreerelaxa opwaha omwenaanyu miili? Elapwaaya ti etokweene opwaha yawinyu?" 
Amos6:3 Nyuwosa munuupuwela weera munsusa nihuku noonanara, mene vekhaikhai munkhuveeliha nihuku noowoopihaxa." 
Amos6:4 Nyuwosa muniixaatalela mbeettini soophwanelihiwa ni maino a etthepo muniixookola muhicenimwanyu sa nsawu. Munkhuura iputtiputthi sooreerela ni aximombe oonenevaxa. 
Amos6:5 Mungwiipa amakitaanyu ntoko Davide, ni mumpakelela ikaruma sa masoma." 
Amos6:6 Nyuwosa mungwurera eviinyu mukoomixini sitokotoko, mwiixoottihaka makhura ooreeraxa, mene khamunthananela oheleya nthala wa Yoseefe." 
Amos6:7 Tivawo nyuwosa muneeraanyu mukhale eriyari ya yaawo eniipacere oronghiwa wootthukiwani elapo ekina; sinoomala ifesta sa yaawo ankhala moopuhani. 
Amos6:8 Yave onlamula sootheene ohiilipela! Yave, Muluku a ikuru sootheene, oneera ha: “Onkihiira wiixoona wa Yakobe, ni kinthanya impasawe sa emwene; kinimwinnyerera esidade ni sootheene sirimo.”" 
Amos6:9 Asilopwana muloko yahiiwa empa emoha, awosatho animookhwa." 
Amos6:10 Vano mmusi onghisa mittembo arwa okhumiha mpaani, ni amukoha mukina aniipithemo: “Ookhalatho mukina ori ni nyuwo?” Ni owo aakhula ha: “Hoye,” vano mmusi owo onoomweerela: “Mmaale! Nihiromoleru Nsina na Yave.”" 
Amos6:11 Vano Yave, oolamulela, ni Owo onoophwata empa etokweene apwexakasaka, ni empa ekhaanene mpaka othatuwa impharumpharu." 
Amos6:12 Weeraka ikavalu* sinootthimaka vasulu mwala? Mukina onoowera ottipuramo ni imombe? Vaheera nyuwosa mootatuxa yoowookoleleya, enakhala yoohapala, ni yoowiima ya ekhaikhai enakhala yoowaawa;" 
Amos6:13 nyuwosa munghakalalela owinawanyu oLo-Debari, mweeraka: “Naakuxa oKarnayimi ni ikurusahu.”" 
Amos6:14 Yave, Muluku a ikuru sootheene, oneera ha: “Ii! Muloko wa oYixrayeli, kinimoorumihelani muloko ni owo onimoohasulani okhuma oLebo-Hamate mpaka nreyareya na wAraba.”" 
Amos7:1 Aakoonihenraawe Yave, onlamula sootheene, ti ela: Owo aamureherera nasope vahoolo wa ohepha wa mwene, ehuhuweene yeele onthapuruwaaya ohepha wanaaveeli." 
Amos7:2 Ahononneene soohepha sootheene sa mmatta, miyo kaakhuwela: “Yave, onlamula sootheene, mulevelele! Anaakhale hayi ni okumi Yakobe? Niwoko owo ori mukhaanene!”" 
Amos7:3 Vano Yave aakhurunuwa. Yave onlamula sootheene aaheera: “Eyo khayeereya.” 
Amos7:4 Yeeyo Yave, onlamula sootheene, aakoonihenraawe ti ela: Kaamoona Yave onlamula sootheene iitthanaka mooro wa nthorihelo; owo waalaliha wuumihaka moowiixera, onanyaanya etthaya." 
Amos7:5 Vano miyo kaakhuwela: “Yave, onlamula sootheene, miyo kinoodyoonttelelani weera mweemele! Anaawere hayi Yakobe okhala ni okumi? Niwoko owo ori mukhaanene!”" 
Amos7:6 Hiiho Yave aakhurunuwa. Yave onlamula sootheene aaheera: “Eyotho khayeereya.” 
Amos7:7 Owo aakooniheratho ela: Kaamoona Yave eemenleene muxerexere exiri yootekiwa ni efiiyu yoowookolelano, avarenleene efiiyu yoowookolelano." 
Amos7:8 Yave aakikoha: “Amosi, munoonani?” Miyo kaamwaakhula: “Kinoona efiiyu yoowookolelano.” Vano Yave aaheera: “Moone! Kiniikaathi efiiyu yoowookolelano eriyari ya mulokwaaka aYixrayeli; muloko owo nkuurelatho." 
Amos7:9 Vaheera mapuro oolapa a Isaaki anooheliwa nthala, ni mapuro ootteela a Yixrayeli anoophwatiwa; Miyo kinoovenyera ekhapira ya Yerobowami kikuxaleene ekatana.”" 
Amos7:10 Vano Amaziya, musaserdoti* a oBeteli, aalamulela oleeliwa Yerobowami, mwene a oYixrayeli: “Amosi onnoovaanelelani eriyari ya aYixrayeli; elapo kheewera ovilela maswaawe ootheene." 
Amos7:11 Onghimaawe Amosi ti ela: ‘Yerobowami onimwiiviwa ni ekatana, ni woohihovela Yixrayeli onooronghiwa wootthukiwani elapo ekina, ottai wa elapo oyareliwaawe.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Vahoolowaya, Amaziya aamweerela Amosi: “Opwaheke namoonihera* weyo! Orowe oYuda wathalihere otthuna wa Muluku; waphwanyewo yoocaawo." 
Amos7:13 Ohithaliheretho otthuna wa Muluku oBeteli, niwoko nna ti Nipuro Nootteela* na mwene ni empa ya olapa ya omwene.”" 
Amos7:14 Amosi aamwaakhula Amaziya: “Miyo nkihiyono mprofeeti naari mwaana a mprofeeti, kaakosoopa muhuwo paahi ni kaahepha ifiigu sa ntuphini." 
Amos7:15 Vaheera Yave ookivenxa vamutekoni, muxerexere muhuwo, anakeerela: ‘Murowe mwathalihere otthuna wa Muluku oYixrayeli, mulokwaaka.’" 
Amos7:16 Vanonto, mwiiwe masu a Yave, nyuwo muneera: ‘Muhithalihere oYixrayeli otthuna wa Muluku, ni muhihiyerere olaleera ekhapira ya Isaaki.’" 
Amos7:17 Vaheera Yave ongweerelani: ‘Amwaarinyu anoothatuwa puuta a musidade, ni anamwaniinyu asilopwana ni asithiyana animwiiviwa ni ekatana. Ilaposanyu sinookawaniwa, ni nyeenyuweene munookhwela omalaponi. Vano, woohihovela, Yixrayeli onooronghiwa wootthukiwani elapo ekina, ottai wa elapo oyareliwaawe.’”" 
Amos8:1 Yave a ikuru sootheene ookoonihera mpapara wa soowiima soowiitthwa. 
Amos8:2 Owo aakeerela: “Amosi munoonani?” Vano miyo kaamwaakhula: “Kinoona mpapara wa ifiigu soowiitthwa.” Vano Owo aakeerela: “Woophiya ommaleloni wa aYixrayeli, mulokwaaka; nkuurelatho.”" 
Amos8:3 Yave, onlamula sootheene, oneera ha: “Nihuku nno, icipo siniipiwa Mpaani mwa Muluku, sinoothatuwa soolalamika. Sinookhala mittembo sincipalexa sineera sivonyerasiwe mmipattani sootheene! Fataari mmaaleke!”" 
Amos8:4 Mwiiwe, nyuwosa munaanyikalasa oohaawa ni munaahela nthala oothoiwa a mulaponi," 
Amos8:5 mweeraka: “Yaakhani sineeraaya sivire ifesta sa mweeri munyowani weera nithumihe etrigu, ni yaakhani sineeraaya sivire iSaabadu weera nithumihaxe irooro?” Nintthuna orikiha, nivukulaka miringo wa musurukhu woopwaha," 
Amos8:6 nimuthumaka oohaawa ni eparatha* ni oothoiwa ni ikwakwaatta piili, nithumihaka mpaka ikokhola ni etrigu." 
Amos8:7 Yave aalipela mwaha wa wiixoona wa Yakobe: “Nkinttiwalaru yeeyo apankaaya. 
Amos8:8 Weeraka etthaya kheetetereya mwaha wa yeeyo, ni khayiinla ootheene ankhalamo? Elapo yootheene ela enoonyakhula ntoko Nilu, enootekuma vahoolowaya ettatteke ntoko mooloko wa wExipitu." 
Amos8:9 Nihuku nno,” onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, “kinoopakiha weera nsuwa nineele othana eriyari, ni oreene ngwee kiruuheleke epiphi elapo." 
Amos8:10 Ifestasanyu kinootatuxa wiinanela ni iciposanyu sootheene olalamika. Kinoopakiha weera ootheene nyuwo ngware soowiinanelano ni mmetthe. Kinoopakiha weera nihuku nno nikhale ntoko na omwiinlela mwaana mmoharu, ni ommaleloniwaya ntoko nihuku na othananaxa." 
Amos8:11 Eneera ephiyaka mahuku,” onghima Yave onlamula sootheene, “kineeraaka kirumihele etala elapo yootheene ela – ehikhanle etala ya yooca naari ya ntthona, mene etala ni ntthona na wiiwa masu a Yave." 
Amos8:12 Atthu eniixoraxorele ephareiya ephareiya, mpatta wa ottuttuwani mpaka mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa, yaasaasaka masu a Yave, mene kheephwanya." 
Amos8:13 Nihuku nno asimwali ooreera ni amiravo oophwaneliwa anookomoka ntthona. 
Amos8:14 Yaale anlipela mwa nsina na oSamariya yeeraka: ‘Mwa nsina na muluku a oDani,’ hoye hoye, ‘Mwa nsina na muluku a oBerxeba,’ anoomora woohivenyatho.”" 
Amos9:1 Kaamoona Yave valtaarini* ni Owo aaheera: “Mmane vasulu wa amarimbu weera sittikinyeye isereemu. Mpakihe weera iyo saamorele ootheene arimo; ni yaawo eniihalahale kinoowiiva ni ekatana. Khawoworu anaatthawe naari anoopowe. 
Amos9:2 Naari ethipaxaka mpaka moowiixera mwa okhwa, ntatanaka nnimwaakhumihamo. Naari ewelaka mpaka wiirimu, iwo kinimwaakuruxawo." 
Amos9:3 Naari yiipithaka vatthomelani wa mwaako Karamelu, iwo kinimwaalupattha, kaatthukeke. Naari ekiipithaka moowiixera mwa ephareiya kinoolamulelamo enowa weera yaalume." 
Amos9:4 Naari eronghiwaka wootthukiwani elapo ekina ni amwiittanaaya, kinoolamulelawo ekatana weera ewiive. Kinimwaawehaweha weera kaaruuhele erisa ohikhanle mpuha.”" 
Amos9:5 Yave, Muluku a ikuru sootheene onoopaka yeeyo. Owo ontava etthaya ni eyo enootothowa; ootheene ankhalamo aniikhupanyera; Owo onnyakhuliha elapo yootheene ntoko Nilu, ni vahoolowaya onttattiha ntoko mooloko wa wExipitu." 
Amos9:6 Yave onteka ikwartusawe sa osulu wiirimu ni onkhaliha mathipelowaaya vatthayani. Owo oniitthana maahi a mphareiya, anamwaraxela vatthayani. Nsinanawe ti Yave." 
Amos9:7 “Nyuwosa aYixrayeli, khamuhiyono ooreerela wa Miyo waapwaha aKuxe,” onghima Yave. “Miyo kohaakhumiha aYixrayeli wExipitu, menetho aFilisti oKaftori ni awArami oKiri." 
Amos9:8 Woohihovela Yave a ikuru sootheene ongwehexexa omwene ola wootthekeya. Miyo kinoohonona mulaponi, mene nkiphwata woomalela ekhapira ya Yakobe,” onghima Yave." 
Amos9:9 “Vano kinoolamulela ni kinookukuttha muloko wa oYixrayeli eriyari ya miloko sootheene, mooteene yoole etrigu emveeriwaaya, ehinamoraru enuku." 
Amos9:10 Anamattheka ootheene ari eriyari ya mulokwaaka animwiiviwa ni ekatana, ootheene yaawo aneera: ‘Kheenitavaru naari kheeniphwanyaru erisa.’”" 
Amos9:11 “Nihuku nno kinooreherera eheema ya Davide emonre. Kinooreherera yeeyo mipattasaya soonanara, ni kinoorasela milepesaya. Miyo kinimweemexa ntoko yaaraaya khalayi," 
Amos9:12 weera mulokwaaka omukuxe ohalahanle a wEdomi ni miloko sootheene siri sawaka,” onghima Yave, aneera apake itthu iya." 
Amos9:13 “Anoophiyera mahuku,” onghima Yave, “namahepha aneeraawe aphwanyiwe ni namattipura, ni namwaala aphwanyiwe ni namavotta iwuuva*. Enoottonya eviinyu enyowani mmanyaakoni ni enoopiluwa mmattumuxani moothemwene." 
Amos9:14 Kinimwaahokoloxa aYixrayeli, mulokwaaka oronghiwe wootthukiwani; awosa anoorasela isidade sooheleya nthala ni mmo anookhalamo. Anoophatteya imatta sa iwuuva*, ewureke eviinyuwaaya; anoolima woophatteyamo nyiri eceeke soowiimasaya." 
Amos9:15 Kinimwaatekiha aYixrayeli mulaponimwaya ni kheevenxiwamotho mulaponi kaavanghaaka,” onghima Yave, Mulukwaanyu." 
Obadiah1:1 Moonelo wa Obadiya: Yave Onlamula Sootheene oneerela ha wEdomi: Nohiiwa mutthenga wa Yave – namutthenga orumiheliwe miloko sa elapo ya vathi eeraka: “Mvenyeke ni niroweke nawaneno wEdomi! 
Obadiah1:2 Moone, kinimooyevihani variyari wa miloko. Munooramusiwa!" 
Obadiah1:3 Wiixoonawanyu wohoolokotthani, nyuwo munkhala mmakhukuni a nyala ni munteka wookhalawanyu vasulu wa mwaako mwiixeerelaka: ‘Khaawo anaakimoroxe.’" 
Obadiah1:4 Hata mwiirakamelihaka ntoko xaaka munapaka epuurwaanyu variyari wa ithenyeeri, Miyo kinimoomoroxani,” oneera ti Yave." 
Obadiah1:5 “Anamwiiya ni anamatakhala yoorweelakani ohiyu, anookuxa seiyo antthunaaya paahi. Yaale anghepha iwuuva* yoorweelakani, anoohiya iwuuva* sikina? Ii! Moota muhaleenlaanyu ophwatiwa!" 
Obadiah1:6 Vanonto, moota aneeraawe ahuhuliwe Esawu ni mihakhusawe sa wiiphiini aniiyeriwe!" 
Obadiah1:7 Asinthamwenaanyu ootheene anoonyesererihelani omwiinanoni; aani awo anoolokotthani yoowinakani. Yaale anca yoocaanyu animoorehererelani ntapha wa nyuwo, mene khamurwa moona." 
Obadiah1:8 Vanihukuni nno kinimwaaphwata anamiruku a wEdomi ankhala mmanyaakoni sa Esawu,” oneera ti Yave." 
Obadiah1:9 “Anakhotto a nyuwo, Temani, onoowuuma owanoni ni ootheene ankhala mmanyaakoni sa Esawu animwiiviwa.”" 
Obadiah1:10 “Munimuulihiheya muru niwoko na nipuhero na omwiiva munninyu Yakobe; munoophwatiwa woomalela. 
Obadiah1:11 Nyuwosa mwaakhalawo muhaakhaviheraka, anamarwa yaarwiiyaaya ehuhulaka mihakhusawe, evolowaka milakosawe epakelaka macitta oYerusaleemu. Nyuwosa mweettelowaanyu waari ntoko yaawosa." 
Obadiah1:12 Nyuwo khawaawereya oweha ni ohakalalela yeeyo yaamweereenle munninyu munihukuni na mahooxowaawe, naari ohakalalela ophwatiwa wa muloko wa Yuda, hata khawaawereya wuuluma ni wiixoona munihukuni na makacamihowaawe." 
Obadiah1:13 Khawaawereya ovoleela milako sa mulokwaaka munihukuni na mahooxowaawe, naari ohakalalela ohaawawawe munihukuni na oheliwawawe nthala, hata wiiyeriwa mihakhusawe munihukuni na erisaawe." 
Obadiah1:14 Khawaawereya oweherera mmathakalaano weera ngwiive yoopongwe hata owinnyerera yaawo yaahalahanle munihukuni na mahooxowaaya. 
Obadiah1:15 Nihuku na Yave nookhuveela wa miloko sootheene. Mweenre mpaka hiiha, munoopakeliwatho. Yoonarara mpankaanyu, enimoomorelani." 
Obadiah1:16 Mooteene yoowo mwaawunraanyu nthorihelonaka vaNttumuxaniwaka Nootteela, hiihotho miloko sootheene sinoowura. Sinoowuraxa woohihiyerereya mpaka ommaleloni, ni nsikhale ntoko khasinakhale." 
Obadiah1:17 Vaheera vamwaako Siyoni onuukhale woopowa; mwaako ole onuukhale wootteela ni ekhapira ya Yakobe enookhalano yoohiyeriwaaya. 
Obadiah1:18 Ekhapira ya Yakobe eniikhale mooro ni yeeyo ya Yoosefe malumaaya, vaheera ekhapira ya Esawu eniikhale malaxi. Anoohisiwa ni mooroweene yoowo. Khakhalaru naari mmoha a ekhapira ya Esawu,” oneera ti Yave." 
Obadiah1:19 Atthu a oNegeba anookuxa mmanyaakoni sa Esawu ni atthu a muxerexere wa mmanyaakoni anookuxa elapo ya aFilisti. Awosa anookuxasa imatta sa wEfrayimi ni oSamariya ni aBenyamini anookuxa oGiliyade. 
Obadiah1:20 Anamavariwa a aYixrayeli anookuxasa elapo ya oKanaani mpaka oZarefati. Anamavariwa a oYerusaleemu ari oSefaradi anookuxa mittetthe sa oNegeba. 
Obadiah1:21 Yaale yoopongwe anoowela vamwaako wa oSiyoni weera elamule nyaako sa Esawu. Ni omwene onuukhale wa Yave. 
Jonah1:1 Masu a Yave yaamurweenle Yoonasi, mwaana a Amitai, ni nlamulo nna:" 
Jonah1:2 “Murowe woowaakuveya esidade etokweene ya oNinive ni mwalaleerewo, niwoko otakhalawaya woowela mpaka wa Miyo.”" 
Jonah1:3 Yoonasi aatthawelatho ottaiwene wa Muluku arowaka oTaresisi. Aarowa mpaka esidade ya oYafa, mwa weiwo aaphwannyaawewo nikula ntokotoko naarowa oTaresisi. Alivakaru musurukhu wa mukwaha, aavolowa, arowaka oTaresisi weera amutthawe Yave." 
Jonah1:4 Wa soothesene, Yave aahoopihera epheyo etokotoko mphareiyani. Mitekuteku saari sitokotoko mpaka nikula naahanle vakhaani ottatta." 
Jonah1:5 Anamiteko a munikulani yaahoova, khula mutthu avekelaka okhaviheriwa wa mulukwaawe. Yaakhumbweliha mirindi mphareiyani weera niveruwe. Eyo eri hiiho, Yoonasi aarowa waakhurukutuwela, aniixaatalela, anakonaxa." 
Jonah1:6 Mutokweene a nikula aarowa wa yoowo, anamukoha: “Mungwera hai okhala vawo mukonaka? Mvenye ni munkhuwelele Mulukwaanyu. Apaale anaanimoreliwe ikharari weera nihikhwe.”" 
Jonah1:7 Vano anamiteko a nikula yaahiiwanana yaaworu yeerelanaka: “Nrowe nipake macitta weera nimusuwele taani ori ni nthowa mwa yeela enikhumelenle.” Yaapaka macitta ni yaamphwanyano Yoonasi. 
Jonah1:8 Vano yaamukohakoha: “Munileele, taani ori ni nthowa na yoonanara ela? Mutekwaanyu tuuvi? Munrweela woowi? Elapwaanyu tiivi? Nyuwo a muloko heeni?”" 
Jonah1:9 Yoonasi aawaakhula: “Miyo muHeberi, kinimulapa Yave, Muluku a wiirimu opattuxale ephareiya ni elapo ya vathi.”" 
Jonah1:10 Anamiteko yaahookhwa maririmela, enamukoha: “Mpankeni?” Vano awo yaasuwela weera owo aamutthawa Yave, niwoko owo aahaaleela." 
Jonah1:11 Woonaka weera mphareiya sannatepa mitekuteku, awo yaamukoha: “Nyuwo niweerihekeni eheeni weera ephareiya emaale?”" 
Jonah1:12 Yoonasi aawaakhula: “Mukivare ni mukivonyere mphareiyani ni ela enoomaala. Miyo koosuwela weera ettheku etokotoko ela yoorweenleni nyuwo niwoko na miyo.” 
Jonah1:13 Wa soothesene, anamiteko a nikula yaakhurula ni ikuru sootheene yeereraka weera ehokoleele mukerekhere. Mene yaahooceela, niwoko ettheku yaahaattaxa." 
Jonah1:14 Yaamudyoonttelela Yave: “Dyoontte Yave, muhinihiye nikhwaaka niwoko noomwiiva mulopwana ola. Nihikhaleno nthowa woomwiiva mutthu oohikhalano nthowa. Vano Nyuwo Yave, moopaka yeeyo mwaatthunaanyu.”" 
Jonah1:15 Vanonto yaamvara Yoonasi, enamvonyera mphareiyani yoosareya owali ni ele yaamaala." 
Jonah1:16 Yoonaka yeeyo, anamiteko a nikula yaamulapa Yave, yoovaka, empakelaka sooveleela ni emuroromelihaka itthu." 
Jonah1:17 Yave aarumiha ehopa etokotoko weera emmire Yoonasi. Owo aakhala mmirimani mwa ehopa ele othana miraru ni ohiyu miraru. 
Jonah2:1 Mmirimani mwa ehopa Yoonasi aamvekela Yave, Mulukwaawe, eeraka:" 
Jonah2:2 “Kihiwehereraka kaamukhuwelela Yave ni Owo aakaakhula. Mpuwa mookhwaani kaakhuwelela ekhavihero ni mohiiwa okhuwelawaka. 
Jonah2:3 Mookivonyera moowiixera mwa ephareiya ni wuupa waakinyongorora. Mitekutekusanyu ni miipilaanyu saakikhuneela. 
Jonah2:4 Kaaheera: ‘Kohoomooliwa vamaithoniwanyu. Wa soothesene, kinikoonetho Empaanyu yoottela.’" 
Jonah2:5 Maahi oowoopopiheya aakikuxakuxa ni wiixera wookirukureera. Namphayaphaya ookivitikelela mmurumwaka. 
Jonah2:6 Koomireya mpaka ophiyera moowixera mwa nyaako. Elapo ya vathixa yaathatuwa ekaliposowaaka. Mene Nyuwo, Yave Mulukwaaka, moohokoloxa okumaaka mmahiyeni." 
Jonah2:7 Kihanleene vakhaani okhwa, koowuupuwelelani Nyuwo, Yave. Nivekelonaka noophiya wa Nyuwo, mpaka wa Empaanyu yootteela." 
Jonah2:8 Yaawo anroromela miluku sikina, anramusa ikharari sa Muluku." 
Jonah2:9 Wa soothesene, miyo kinimoopakelani sooveleela ni icipo sooxukurela ni kinookwanihera soororomelihasaka. Ovuluwa ongweela wa Yave.”" 
Jonah2:10 Vano Muluku aalamula ehopa weera emurapheele Yoonasi vatthayani. 
Jonah3:1 Masu a Muluku yaamurweela Yoonasi emaara yanaaveeli ni nlamulo nna: 
Jonah3:2 “Murowe osidade etokweene ya oNinive ni mwalaleere mutthenga kineeraka koovaheeni.” 
Jonah3:3 Yoonasi aahiiwelela masu a Yave, anarowa oNinive. Yaari esidade etokotoko moota wooweera waatthuneya weetteetta mahuku mararu." 
Jonah3:4 Yoonasi aavolowa esidade ni aaheetteetta nihuku nimoma alaleiyaka: “Woomala mahuku miloko mixexe, oNinive onoophwatiwa.”" 
Jonah3:5 Vano atthu a oNinive yaahaakhulela masu a Muluku. Awo yaavaanela otthuka ni ootheene okhuma asitokweene mpaka asikhaani yaawara isaakho. 
Jonah3:6 Iiwakaru mwene ihaali iye, aavenya vahiceniwawe, anarula mukaandyo wa emwene, anawara isaakho akilaathiki vattuurani." 
Jonah3:7 Vano aaruma othalihiwa muNinive: “Mukanoni sa mwene ni sa maneethaawe: Khantthuniheriwaru mutthu hoye hoye mwaamunama, imombe naari ikhondoolo olawiha yakhalaru etthu; muhice hata muhiwure!" 
Jonah3:8 Mwiikhuneele isaakho, atthu ni axinama! Oottheene emundyoonttelele Muluku ni ikurusaya sootheene. Muhiyeke iphiro soonanara ni nipuhero." 
Jonah3:9 Apaale Muluku onooceendya soowuupuwelasawe ahiyaka isarasawe ni hiiho khanimphwatiwa.” 
Jonah3:10 Oonaka seiyo awo yaapankaaya ni moota yaahingyaaya iphirosaya soonanara, Muluku aaceendya soowuupuwelasawe ni khaaphwante ntoko aawoopopinghaawe." 
Jonah4:1 Wa soothesene, Yoonasi khaahakalalelanxe yeeyo ni aanyoonyiwa." 
Jonah4:2 Owo aamvekela Yave: “Yave, kheehiyono yeela miyo kaahimalaaka nlelo kaaraka owaani? Ti yeeyo miyo kaatthawenlaka oTaresisi. Kaasuwela weera Nyuwo muri Muluku a ikharari, a murima wooreera, oopixa murima, oosareya osivela ni munroromeliha ottaruxa, mene vahoolowaya munooceendya." 
Jonah4:3 Vano Yave, miyo kinoodyoonttelelani: mukiive, niwoko wa miyo fataari okhwa ohikhanle okhala ni okumi.”" 
Jonah4:4 Yave aamwaakhula: “Munnyoonyereliwa heeni?” 
Jonah4:5 Yoonasi aavenya, anakilaathi vanipuroni nimoha mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa esidade. Weiwe aahiitekela mukotthaawe, anakilaathi vamunttuusini ni aaweherera weera oone yeeyo yeera ekhumelele ni esidade." 
Jonah4:6 Vano Yave Muluku aammelihera mwiri Yoona weera ahelele munttuusi murwaawe ni ahooneke oviha nsuwa. Eyo yaamuhakalalihaxa Yoonasi. 
Jonah4:7 Wa soothesene, waaxiiye, Muluku aarumiha muungu weera okhuure mwiri ni ole waahuuma." 
Jonah4:8 Nikhumaka nsuwa, Muluku aarumiha epheyo yoovihaxa ekhumaka ninkhuma nsuwa ni nsuwa naamvihera Yoonasi mpaka ohaleela okomoka. Hiiho owo aahaawela okhwa eeraka: “Wa miyo waari fataari okhwa ohikhanle okhala ni okumi.”" 
Jonah4:9 Mene Muluku aamweerela Yoonasi: “Nyuwo moophwanela onyoonyaxiwa moota ola mwaha wa mwiri?” Owo aamwaakhula: “Aani koophwanela! Koonyoonyiwa mpaka otthuna okhwa!” 
Jonah4:10 Yave aamweerela: “Nyuwo muneeteteela mwiri ola muhiphatteiyaanyu naari muhunnuwihalaanyu. Ola waamenle ohiyu omoha, onakhwa ohiyu omoha." 
Jonah4:11 Wa soothesene, oNinive aakhalawo atthu 120 000 ahisuwenleru hata okawanyiha moono mulopwana ni muthiyana, ohiya mihuwo sincipale. Vano Miyo nkaawera weeteteela esidade etokotoko ela?”" 
Micah1:1 Masu Yave uulummaawe mwa Mikeyasi a oMorexeti mweehuhuni ya olamula wa Yotami, Ahazi ni Hezekiya, mamwene a oYuda. Nyoonelo owo oonnaawe singhima sa oSamariya ni oYerusaleemu." 
Micah1:2 Mwiiwe, miloko sootheene; ngwiriyane, Ii! Elapo ni ootheene amankemo! Yave onlamula sootheene ori Mpaanimwawe yootteela, onimookhalelani onamoona." 
Micah1:3 Moone! Yave oneera avenyaka woomakawawe; Owo onkhuruwa, ananyikala mapuro a mulaponi oorakamelaxa osulu." 
Micah1:4 Vathivawe, nyaako sintothowa ntoko nnyooma nreene vayikho, ni nyala sinookurukunduwela vathi ntoko maahi mancipale ekhuruwaka vamwaako." 
Micah1:5 Sootheene iyo sineereela mwaha wa ovaanya wa Yakobe ni soottheka sa muloko wa oYixrayeli. Ovaanya heeni wa Yakobe? Weeraka khoohiyono oSamariya? Mapuro heeni a miluku sikina sa aYuda? Weeraka khoohiyono oYerusaleemu? 
Micah1:6 “Tivawo kineeraaka kipake oSamariya ittuxo soowuukeliwa vanlakani, nipuro noophatteiwa ivideira; malukwaaya kinoovonyera mureyareyani koonihereke mathipelowaaya." 
Micah1:7 Icaambulosaya soopatthiwa sootheene, sinoonyaanyiwa ni soovaha sootheene sa impa sa milukusaya sinoolalihiwa ni mooro; kinoophwata icaambulosaya sootheene. Seenre seiyo iwo othukumanyinghaaya sakhala ntoko soowina mooraruwani, icaambulo iyo sinoovareleyatho muteko ntoko nlivo na mooraruwani.”" 
Micah1:8 Mwaha wa yeeyo, kinimwiinla ni kinoolalamika; kinimweetta woohiwararu ikwakwaatta ni pwitipwiti. Kinookhuwela ntoko khwatte kiipuleleke ntoko mwaaxaana a esiisi." 
Micah1:9 Vano nikhwatta na Samariya ti nankoxo ni noomphiyera Yuda. Noophiya mpaka vamulako wa mulokwaaka, aani, noophiya mpaka mmilakoni sa oYerusaleemu." 
Micah1:10 Muhithalihere yeeyo oGate, ni muhiinle. oBeti-Ofera mwiixuupuruxe vantthupini." 
Micah1:11 Mvenyase pwitipwiti ni oowuulihiheyeene muru, nyuwosa munkhala oXafiri. Amaki a oZaanani, kheekhuma musidademwaya. oBeti-Ezeli onimwiikhupanyera; yoovenxiwa yoowiixaakiheraaya." 
Micah1:12 Yaawo ankhala oMarote, ampirituwasa moovoreiwani, ewehereraka okhurunuwa, niwoko erisa erweenle mpatta wa Yave mpaka mmilakoni sa oYerusaleemu." 
Micah1:13 Amaki a oLakixi, mutthukelele mukavaluni* ikaaro sa ekhotto. Soottheka sa mwaana muthiyana a oSiyoni saapacenre mwa nyuwo, niwoko ovaanya wa aYixrayeli, oxutteriwe ni nyuwo." 
Micah1:14 Tivawo nyuwo muneeraanyu mvahe soovaha sooraxelela oMoreseti-Gati. Esidade ya wAkizibe eniikhale etthu yoohisaambwaneya wa mamwene a oYixrayeli. 
Micah1:15 Kinimooruuhelasani oowoowinasani nyuwo munkhala oMarexa. Owo ori ovuwa wa oYixrayeli onoorowa wAdulami. 
Micah1:16 Mmetthe mayihaanyu mooniheraka wiikhupanyera mwaha wa anamwane mwa yaawo munaahakalalelaxaanyu; mmetthe mputu moli ntoko mwaaxaana a nrepo, niwoko awosa aaronghiwa wootthukiwani." 
Micah2:1 Ii! Wa yaawo amvaanelela yoonanara, wa yaawo anuupuwela soovaanela soonanara ankonaayawo! Waaxaaka ankwanihera sootheene seiyo, niwoko angwera opaka seiyo." 
Micah2:2 Anghaawela ittima, enaakha; anghaawela impa, enakuxa. Animulokotthela mukina empaawe; aani, mwaattamanaawe ni yoohiyeriwaawe." 
Micah2:3 Tivawo Yave oneeraawe ha: “Kinaavaanelela erisa atthu ala, mwa yeeyo nyuwosa muneeranyu muhiwere wiitapuxa. Nyuwosa khamweettatho ngwiixoonani, niwoko enookhala ehuhu ya erisa." 
Micah2:4 Nihuku nno, nyuwosa munootthebwiwa; animootheyani ni ecipo yoothananiha ela: ‘Nooheleyaxa nthala; ettima ya mulokwaaka yookawanyeya. Owo ookaakha! Ittimasahu ohaavaha anamavariha.’ ”" 
Micah2:5 Tivawo nyuwosa muneeraanyu muhikhalanase mutthu munthukumanoni moothemwene mwa Yave aakawaka elapo, apakelaka mwaathanle." 
Micah2:6 “Muhilaleiye moota hiiho,” aneera maprofeetaaya. “Muhilaleiye mwaha wa itthusene seiya; erisa kheeniphwanya.”" 
Micah2:7 Weeraka ekhapira ya Yakobe eneera: “Munepa wa Yave, khoonyoonyiwa? Owo ompaka hiihaawo? Maswaaka animpakela nnene yoowo orino mweettelo wooreera." 
Micah2:8 Vaheera mweehuhuni soomalihera iya, mulokwaaka wookivenyera ntoko amwiittana. Munimwiiyera mukaandyo nthamwene, yoole onghokolowa mmuretteleni, muntatuxaka ntoko aahokolowa okhottoni." 
Micah2:9 Nyuwosa munaavenxa asithiyana a mulokwaaka mmatthokonimwaya moosiveleya. Nyuwosa mumvenxa mareelihowaaka wa anamwanaaya wa mahuku ootheene. 
Micah2:10 Mvenye, mpwahe! Vano nna khanihiyono nipuronanyu noowiitthuuwa, niwoko nna noovaliheya ohikhalakaru murette." 
Micah2:11 Namootha ni namalokottha arwa, aneera: ‘Miyo kohoolaleerani waatta wa eviinyu ni wa yoowura yoohapala,’ owo onookhala ti mprofeeteene a muloko ola!”" 
Micah2:12 “Ii! Yakobe, vekhaikhai kinimoothukumanyihasani ootheene nyuwo, aani, kinimwaathukumanyiha oohalahala a oYixrayeli. Miyo kinimwaathukumanyiha ntoko ikhondoolo sireene munikhoolani, aani ntoko muhuwo oreene muncihiwa; awosa animwaatta moota wooweera onookhala onyakuleleya wa nakupa owo." 
Micah2:13 Yoowo onghula ephiro, onoorowa ohoolowaya; anoovira vamulako, ekhumeke. Mwenaaya onoovira ohoolowaya, Yave onimwaahoolela.”" 
Micah3:1 Vano miyo kaaheera: “Mwiiwe, nyuwosa muri ahooleli a Yakobe, alamuli a muloko wa oYixrayeli. Nyuwosa waatthuneya osuwela ekhaikhai." 
Micah3:2 Vaheera nyuwosa munthanya yeeyo eri yooreera, munasivela yoonanara, mumpera exapala ya mulokwaaka ni ethayi ya mmakhuvanimwaya." 
Micah3:3 Nyuwosa munkhuura enama ya mulokwaaka, mumpera exapalaaya, munapwexakasa makhuvaaya muthikilelaka ntoko enama enaapeiwa mmwaapuni.”" 
Micah3:4 Muhoolommo anoomwiitthana Yave, mene Owo khawaakhula. Ehuhu eyo Owo onimwaahuluwa niwoko na yootakhala apankaaya." 
Micah3:5 Yave oneera ha: “Nyuwosa maprofeeti oowootha munghapuxa mulokwaaka! Mukina oovahakani yooca, munlaleiya, murettele, vaheera yaahoovahani yooca, munaalaleerela ekhotto." 
Micah3:6 Mwaha wa sootheene iyo, ohiyu onimoorweelani, aani, ohiyu woohikhala nyoonelo; enookhala epiphi woohikhala sootthoma. Nsuwa nnimwaaneelela maprofeeti, ni othana onimwaariipela yaawosa." 
Micah3:7 Anamoonihera* anooyevihiwa ni anamatthoma animuulihiheya muru. Ootheene awo anookuttelela ekhove, niwoko Muluku khawaakhula.”" 
Micah3:8 Vaheera wa miyo, koosareya ni ikuru, ni Munepa wa Yave, ekhaikhai ni owera, weera kimuleele Yakobe opahulawawe, ni wa aYixrayeli otthekawaya." 
Micah3:9 Mwiiwe yeela, nyuwosa muri asitokweene a ekhapira ya Yakobe, alamuli a muloko wa aYixrayeli anthanya ekhaikhai ni amvirikanyiha yeeyo eri yoororomeleya;" 
Micah3:10 anteka oSiyoni ni oyeeha ephome, ni Yerusaleemu ni sootakhala." 
Micah3:11 Ahoolelaaya anlakela yeerelaka makhwankwa, asaserdotaaya anxuttiha yeerelaka owina, ni maprofeetaaya antthoma yeerelaka musurukhu. Eyo eri hiiho, aniikhaviherano Yave, yeeraka: “Yave ori eriyaraahu. Kheenikhumelelaru erisa.”" 
Micah3:12 Tivawo niwoko na nyuwosa, oSiyoni oneeraaya ottipuriwe ntoko ematta, oYerusaleemu onoothatuwa ettuxo, ni nttumuxa na Empa ya Muluku nnoosareya maphuwa." 
Micah4:1 Mmahukuni ookisera, mwaako wa Empa ya Yave onookhalihiwa ntoko mutokweene eriyari ya nyaako; onoorakama opwaha mattumuxa, ni miloko sinootthimakelawo." 
Micah4:2 Miloko sincipale sinimoorwa, seeraka: “Nrowe, niwele mwaako wa Yave, Mpaani mwa Muluku a Yakobe. Owo onoonixuttiha iphirosawe weera neette mphironimwawe.” Vano Nlamulo nnoorweela oSiyoni, masu a Yave oYerusaleemu." 
Micah4:3 Owo onoothoriha eriyari ya miloko sincipale ni onuuluma minyakunyaku eriyari ya miloko sooweraxa ni soorakamela. Awosa anootatuxa ikatanasaya ixaruwa ni mavakaaya icikwaakhwa. Muloko mmoha khookuxaru ikapwitthi soowanelano muloko mukina hata khasiirehererelatho owana. 
Micah4:4 Khula mutthu onoowera okilaathi vathi wa ivideirasawe ni wa nyirisawe sa ifiigu, ni khakhalaru mutthu anaamuxupe, niwoko uulumale hiiho ti Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Micah4:5 Miloko sootheene seetteleke mwa nsina na milukusaya, vaheera hiyo nnimweetta mwa Nsina na Yave, Mulukwaahu, wa mahuku ootheene." 
Micah4:6 “Nihuku nno,” Onghima Yave, “kinimwaathukumanyiha ooheetta; yaawo atthukeliwe elapo ekina, ni yaale Miyo kaathananinghaaka." 
Micah4:7 Ooheetta kinimwaakhaliha ephuwela, ni oowoomoliwa, muloko woolipa. Yave onimwaalamulasa vamwaako Siyoni okhuma nihuku nno woorowa ohoolo ni wa mahuku ootheene." 
Micah4:8 Ii! Etoore* ya muhuwo, wa nyuwo muri woolipawo wa mwaana muthiyana a oSiyoni, munoohokoloxeriwa olamulawanyu wa khalayi; omwene onoohokoleela wa esidade ya oYerusaleemu.”" 
Micah4:9 Munkhuwelelaxani vano? Khamunono mwene? Weeraka namalakaanyu ori mookhwa, weera ovoreya wootepelaxeni ntoko ovoreya wa muthiyana ayaraka?" 
Micah4:10 Ii! Mwaana a muthiyana a oSiyoni, mpirituwase, ntoko muthiyana ayaraka, ni mweettiwe murima, niwoko vano ontthuneya ohiya ixirisanyu weera mwakhale vanlakani. Nyuwo munoorowa oBabiloniya, ni wu munootapuxiwawo. Wu Yave onoowoopolaniwo mmatatani mwa amwiittanaanyu." 
Micah4:11 Vaheera vano, miloko sincipale sohoothukumanelasani. Iyo sineera: “oYerusaleemu ohiirihiwe. Hiyo nooneke ophwatiwa wa oSiyoni.”" 
Micah4:12 Vaheera iyo khasisuwenle soowuupuwela sa Yave; khasiniiwexexa soovaanela sa Yoowo onthukumanyiha mulokwaawe ntoko ihupu sinronghiwa oneepettheliwa. 
Micah4:13 “Ii! Esidade ya oSiyoni, mvenye ni mukokhole, niwoko Miyo kinimoovahani manyaka a eyuuma ni itthottopwa sa ebronze* weera munyaanyeno miloko sincipale.” Nyuwo munoomutteelihera Yave mwa Yoowo onlamula elapo yootheene, soowinasaya soohireerela ni mihakhusaya sootheene." 
Micah5:1 Ii! Esidade ya anakhotto, mwaathukumanyihe anakhottwaanyu, niwoko oYerusaleemu wooriciwa. Muhooleli a oYixrayeli, onoovulalihiwa ekhove ni ekopo." 
Micah5:2 “Vaheera nyuwo Beteleheemu Efrata, murookhalaru mukhaani eriyari ya mahimo a oYuda, wa nyuwo onimoorwa wa Miyo mmoha aneera akhale mulamuli a oYixrayeli – mwa yoowo epacererowaawe ekhumale khalayixa.”" 
Micah5:3 Tivawo aYixrayeli eneeraaya ehiiwe mpaka eneeraaya ephiye ehuhu yooyara ya yoole ongyara. Vano ephuwela ya axunna a mulamuli, enoohokolowa weera ethukumane ni aYixrayeli." 
Micah5:4 Owo onimweemela ni onookukhula muhuwaawe mukuruni sa Yave, mootokweeneni wa Nsina na Yave, Mulukwaawe. Hiiho awosa anookhala oolipeene niwoko wunnuwawawe onoophiyera elapo yootheene." 
Micah5:5 Owo onookhala murettelaaya. awAsiriya yaavoleelaka elapwaahu, ni yeetteettaka moolipamwahu, nnimwaakhumihera akukhuli athanneeli, mpakatho ahooleli athannaararu oothanliwa." 
Micah5:6 Awosa anoolamula elapo ya awAsiriya ni ekatana, ni elapo ya Ninrode evarenleene ekatana. Mwenaahu onoonitapuxa awAsiiriya yaavoleelaka elapwaahu, ni yaalapuwaka nyiinanosahu." 
Micah5:7 Oohalahala a oYixrayeli anookhala eriyari ya miloko sincipale, ntoko nikame na mpatta wa Yave, aani, ntoko epula yincipale enrupela munnyepuni; kheeningweherera mutthu, hata kheenkhalela omutthu." 
Micah5:8 Oohalahala a Yakobe anookhala eriyari ya miloko, aani, eriyari ya miloko sincipale, ntoko mwatto eriyari ya axinama a ntuphini, ntoko mwatto oolipa eriyari ya mihuwo sa ikhondoolo, mwa yoowo omvara ni onnyaanya yoovara, ahikhalakaru ongwera otapuxa." 
Micah5:9 Ntatananyu nnimwaavenyera amwiittanaawe ni ootheene awosa anoophwatiwa. 
Micah5:10 “Nihuku nno,” onghima Yave, “kinimwiiva ikavalusanyu*, ni kinoophwata ikaarosanyu sa ekhotto." 
Micah5:11 Kinoophwatatho isidade sa elapwanyu, kikurumuleke moolipamwanyu." 
Micah5:12 Kinoomaliha okhwiraanyu ni nyuwosa khamwaaherasatho ihako. 
Micah5:13 Kinoophwata icaambulosanyu soopatthiwa ni amarimbwaanyu ootteeliheriwa; nyuwosa khamukokhoratho ohoolo wa soopakiwa ni matataanyu. 
Micah5:14 Kinoophela eriyaraanyu nyiri soothipeleliwa sa Axera, kiphwateke milukusanyu." 
Micah5:15 Kinimwiinlela ikukuttula musarani ni moonyoonyeriwani miloko sihikiiwelenle.” 
Micah6:1 Mwiiwe yeeyo Yave onghimaawe: “Mweemele, mwaakihe mulattwaanyu ohoolo wa nyaako; mattumuxa yiiweke yeeyo nyuwo muneeraanyu muhime." 
Micah6:2 Ii! Nyaako, mwiiwe ohimahima wa Yave; mathipelo oohimala a mulaponi, mwiiwe. Vano Yave ookhalano yoohimahimera mulokwaawe; Owo ohoona nthowa na oYixrayeli." 
Micah6:3 Mulokwaaka, koopakenleni eheeni? Koolemelingheni moota heeni? Mukaakhuleke." 
Micah6:4 Miyo kohookhumihani wExipitu, kinawoopolani mulaponi mwa opottha; kaamurumiha Moisesi, Aharoni ni Miriyami weera yoohoolelaseni." 
Micah6:5 Mulokwaaka, muupuwelele moota Balaki, mwene a oMowabe oovaanelenlaaweni, ni yeele Balaami mwaana mulopwana a Beyori aakhunlaawe. Muupuwelele mukwaha mwaapankaanyu okhuma oXitimi mpaka oGiligali, ni moonelele weera miteko sa Yave ti soororomeleya.”" 
Micah6:6 Kaahikhuveele ni eheeni ohoolo wa Yave, ni kahiikokhorele moota heeni ohoolo wa Muluku oovuwihiwa? Kimpakeleke sooveleela soohisa, ni aximombe a eyaakha emoha?" 
Micah6:7 Yave aamwaahakalalela anapunci a ikhondoolo oohaalikeleya, ni nyooloko macira macireene muloko sa makhura? Kimveleeleke mwanaka a ntthaara niwoko na soopahulasaka, aani, yoowiima ya erutthwaaka niwoko na yoottheka ya munepaaka?" 
Micah6:8 Ii! Mutthu, Owo oowooniherani yeeyo eri yooreera ni yeeyo Yave onnyesererihaawe: Mpake ekhaikhai, musivele ororomeleya ni mweette oowiiyeviheene ni Mulukwaanyu." 
Micah6:9 Nsu na Yave nniitthana esidade; woova Nsinananyu ti miruku! “Ngwiriyane ekopo yoottaruxela ni Yoowo okhalihale. 
Micah6:10 Vaate wa mutakhali, nkirwa kittiwala muhakhu woophwanyiwa moota woohiroromeleya ni muringo woolokottha ori woolamphwa." 
Micah6:11 Nkinaakhulela miringo soohiroromeleya ni miphimo soolokottha! 
Micah6:12 Anamapuhaaya ti anamapuhera; mulokwaaya ti woowootha ni malumaaya anuuluma moolokotthani. 
Micah6:13 Tivawo Miyo kineeraaka koohasuleni, ni kooheleeni nthala niwoko na sootthekasanyu." 
Micah6:14 Nyuwosa mmwicaase, mene khamvona; munoopwaherera okhala oovoliweene. Nyuwosa munoothokorora, mene khamuurelaru etthu, niwoko yeeyo muneeraanyu musunge, kinimwinnyerera ekatana." 
Micah6:15 Nyuwosa mmwiphatteye, mene khamuhepha; mmweeke makhura, mene khamuttikitthelana; mmwaame iwuuva* mene khangwura eviinyu." 
Micah6:16 Nyuwosa muniiwelela ikano sa Omeri ni soopaka sootheene sa emusi ya Ahabi, muttharaka ikhovelelosaya. Tivawo kineeraaka kooheleeni nthala ni amakaanyu anoohaawa otheiwa; nyuwosa ootheene munootthebwiwa ni miloko.”" 
Micah7:1 Moota kinghaawaaka! Kinlikana ni yoole onrukula soowiima mweelimweni singhalahala mmatta mwa iwuuva*; kheewoworu ekhuce ya iwuuva* weera kilawihe, kheewoworu efiigu* enyowani kinghaawelaxaaka." 
Micah7:2 Yaawo a murima woororomeleya aalakaseya mulaponi; khawoworu oororomeleya. Ootheene aniipithela weera eyeehe ephome; khula mutthu onimulupattha munneiye ni ntapha. 
Micah7:3 Oolikaneene opaka yoonanara, mulamuli onnyesereriha soovaha, mphuki onaakhulela makhwankwa, aweri annyeserera yeeyo antthunaaya; ootheene awo amvaanelela vamoha." 
Micah7:4 Yoowaareerelaaya eri ntoko rupulula, ni yoowookoleleyaaya ti yootepaxa opwaha ekintali ya nyiiwa. Noophiyera nihuku na anamalipelelaanyu, nihuku na nttaruxo na Muluku, ehuhu ya munyakunyakwaanyu." 
Micah7:5 Muhaaroromele amwaattamanaanyu; hata muhiwaakhulele asinthamwenaanyu. Mpaka yoowo munkupaleelanxaanyu, khula mutthu iipasoope ni yeeyo onghimaawe." 
Micah7:6 Vano, mwaana mulopwana onaanyoosa atithawe, ni mwaana muthiyana onaavaanya amayawe, pwiyamwaana ni apwiyamwaanaawe; amwiittana a mutthu ti amusaawe xaxaxa." 
Micah7:7 Vaheera wa miyo, kiningwiriyanela Yave, kiwehereraka mwa Muluku, Mvuluxaaka; Mulukwaaka onookiiwa." 
Micah7:8 Amwiittanaaka, muhiixoone ni miyo. Naari miyo kimoraka, kinoovenyatho. Naari miyo kikhalaka mpiphini, Yave onookhala yoomwaleelaaka." 
Micah7:9 Keenre miyo kimutthekela Yave, kinoovilela isarasawe mpaka Owo aneeraawe akaakihe ni awerihe ekaikaiyaaka. Owo onookikhumihera ngwaarani; Miyo kinimoona wookoleleyawawe." 
Micah7:10 Vano mwiittanaaka anoone yeeyo uulihiheyaxeke muru, yoole aakeerenle: “Ori woowi Yave, Mulukwaanyu?” Maithwaaka animoona omorawawe; owo onoonyikalasiwa ntoko nttoko na munseweni." 
Micah7:11 Nnoophiyera nihuku na oraseliwa ixirisanyu, nihuku sineeraaya sithanuliwe nyiinanosanyu." 
Micah7:12 Nihuku nno, atthu animoorwa wa nyuwo okhuma wAsiriya mpaka wExipitu, ni okhuma wExipitu mpaka wEfratesi, ni okhuma ophareiya mpaka ophareiya ni omwaako mpaka omwaako." 
Micah7:13 Elapo enoohala ttewu niwoko na yeeyo amakaaya apankaaya. 
Micah7:14 Mukukhule mulokwaanyu ni ekopwaanyu, muhuwo wa yoohiyeriwaanyu onkhala mpattaaya moothakoni, moocihamo moopomba. Muhiye ocaaka oBaxani ni oGiliyade, ntoko khalayi." 
Micah7:15 Ntoko mmahukuni mwaakhumaanyu wExipitu, kinimoonihera sootikhinihasaka." 
Micah7:16 Miloko sinimoona yeeyo, suulihiheyeke muru, sihuhuleliweene owerawaya wootheene. Sinoophuta iyano, sittiyeyeke maaru."
