Micah7:17 Sinimweesela ntthupi ntoko enowa, aani ntoko axinama aniipurula. Sinookhuma moolipamwaya sithukumelaka; ngwoovani, sinoomuhokoleela Yave, Mulukwaahu, ni sinoowoovani." 
Micah7:18 Ii! Muluku, khawoworu muluku mukina ntoko Nyuwo, munttiwala soottheka ni ovaanya wa yaawo anghalahala a mmulokonimwanyu! Nyuwo khamunnyoonyiwa wa mahuku ootheene, mene munghakalalela woowoonihera murima wooreera." 
Micah7:19 Munoonimorelatho ikharari; munoonyikalela sootakhalasahu ni munoorihela sootthekasahu sootheene moowiixera mwa ephareiya. 
Micah7:20 Munoomoonihera Yakobe ororomeleya, ni munoommorela ikharari Abrahaamu, ntoko mwaaroromelinghaanyu ni nlipelo makholowaahu khalayeene." 
Nahum1:1 Masu a Muluku mwaha wa oNinive ti ala. Ela ti elivuru ya moonelo wa Nahumi, ngwElekoxi." 
Nahum1:2 Yave ti Muluku a ehace ni nakukuttula. Aani Yave onrulela ikukuttula onyoonyiwawawe ti woowoopiha. Yave onaarulela ikukuttula amwiittanaawe ooniheraka isarasawe wa yaawo. 
Nahum1:3 Yave ti oopixaxa murima ni a ikuruxa; Owo khanimuhiya woohimuttaruxa nanthowa. Ephirowaawe eri muyuupuruni ni mutthekuni; mahutte ti ari ntthupi na inaawosawe. 
Nahum1:4 Owo onghiiha ephareiya ni eyo enuuma; ongweleliha nyooloko sootheene. Owo onnyaaliha muncihiwamo inama oBaxani ni oKaremeli vamoha ni ithutu sa oLibanu. 
Nahum1:5 Nyaako sintetereya ohoolowawe ni mattumuxa anootothowa. Elapo enimoopopiheya ohoolowawe ni ootheene arimo. 
Nahum1:6 Khaawo angwera ovilela onyoonyiwawawe hata isarasawe. Onyoonyiwawawe omvarela ntoko mooro ni nyala simphweeya ohoolowawe. 
Nahum1:7 Yave ti ooreera murima; wootthawelawo mweehuhuni ya ohaawaxa. Owo ongwaakiha yaawo animuroromela. 
Nahum1:8 Vaheera onoomaliha oNinive ni mirupi; onoowoomolela amwiittanaawe mpiphini. 
Nahum1:9 Yave onoomaliha sakhalaru soomvaanelela; khoonrwatho osomelana emaara yanaaveeli. 
Nahum1:10 Amwiittanaawe animwaanga munyiiwani esareiyeene nluma; anoohisiwa ntoko malaxi oowuumaxa. 
Nahum1:11 Mwa weyo Ninive, ookhumelela mukina ni soowuupuwela sooriheya amvaanelelaka Yave." 
Nahum1:12 Yeeyo Yave onghimaawe ti ela: “Arookhalaru oolipa ni oowaatta, anoophwatiwa, elakaseyeke. Vaheera wa nyuwo, Yuda, kaari mooyevihaniru, nkinooyevihanitho." 
Nahum1:13 Kinoovenxa soolemelasanyu muxikomwanyu kootaphulakani aliceemaanyu.” 
Nahum1:14 Wa weyo, Ninive, Yave ongweerela ha: “Khookhalano ekhapira eniipwahererihe nsinananawo. Kinoophwata icaambulo sa nyiri ni miluku sa iyuuma siri mpaani mwa milukusawo. Kinimoorehererela nihiyenawo, niwoko weyo ti oothanyeya.”" 
Nahum1:15 Woone oYuda! Siriwo vamwaako inaawo sa yoole onruuha mutthenga wooreeraxa ni onlaleiya murettele! Opakeke ifestasawo oYuda ni okwanihere soororomelihasawo. Anamariheya kheerwatho ehonona; awo anoophwataxiwa. 
Nahum2:1 Namaphwata onnoorweela weyo, Ninive! Olipelele nipuro noolipihiwa; owehawehe musewe; wiirehererele owana, othukumanye ikurusawo sootheene!" 
Nahum2:2 Yave onoohokoloxera ovuwa wa Yakobe, ovuwa wa oYixrayeli yaaroohuhularu anamaphwata iwuuvasaya." 
Nahum2:3 Ixikudu* sa anakhotto a amwiittana ti sooxeera; anakhotto oolipaxa murima ewanreene ikuwo sooxeera. Ikaarosaya sa ekhotto sinaara yaathataanelaka ekhotto evonyiwaka mavaka. 
Nahum2:4 Ikaaro sineetta woowaaluwa siviraviraka mmiseweni ni mmapuwani. Ekhalelowaaya eri ntoko mithuko sivarelaka sinaakuveya ntoko overinya. 
Nahum2:5 Mwene a oNinive ongwiitthana anakhottwaawe oothanliwa ni awosa annikwattuliwa. Antthimakela oxirini wa esidade weera yiirehererele wiixaakiha. 
Nahum2:6 Milako sa omoolokoni soopwexiwa ni empa ya mwene yookomowa. 
Nahum2:7 Woolamuliwa weera amaki a oNinive ankuxiwa ntoko ootthukiwa eronghiwaka elapo ekina. Asimwali ookuxiwa ntoko ipottha, aniipulela ntoko ikhunda emanaka vakakasani." 
Nahum2:8 oNinive ori ntoko ntthiya na khalayi noowelela. Awosa ankhuwela yeeraka: “Ee! Ee!,” mene khawowo anaawehe ottuli." 
Nahum2:9 Muhuhule eparatha*! Muhuhule eyuuma yoorikaxa. Mihakhusaya khasimmala; yoosareya itthu sootthuneyaxa! 
Nahum2:10 Ii! Esidade yoovalavela! Otoloxiwa, ohuhuliwa! Murima onnavava; makutha annitteenguwa; erutthu yootheene ennithukumela ni ikhove sootheene sinnaamora." 
Nahum2:11 Nri woowi nikhuku na mwatto, mwa weiwo aacihaawewo axaanaawe; nipuro nno mwa weiwo aarowaawewo mwatto mulopwana ni muthiyana vamoha ni axaanaaya ehoovaka etthu?" 
Nahum2:12 Mwatto annavara, anaakawela amwatto athiyana ni axaana, asarihaka makhukwaawe enama aavaraawe." 
Nahum2:13 Yave a ikuru sootheene ongweerela: “Weyo ti Mwiittanaaka; kinoohisa ikaarosawo sa ekhotto mpaka otthuwa mwiixi, amwattwaawo yiiviwaka ni ekatana. Kinoomaliha olupatthawawo mulaponi, ni masu a anamitthenga awo khayiiwiwatho.”" 
Nahum3:1 Ii! Onoohaawa weyo, esidade yoosareya ephome, soowootha ni soohuhula. Mahuku ootheene sinoosareya mittembo." 
Nahum3:2 Mwiiwe oruma wa ikwamba ni ophirikeya wa mareko; mikhitto sa ikavalu* ni otura wa ikaaro sa ekhotto! 
Nahum3:3 Anamweettiha a ikavalu*; ikatana siverinyaka ni mavaka yaaraka. Ekhwiiyeene ancipale nduu; mittembo soohaalikeleya ohivireyakamo. 
Nahum3:4 Eyo yeereenle niwoko mwaari ntoko puuta musareiyeene ocece. Mwaasesera miloko ni mitekosanyu soolokottha. 
Nahum3:5 Yave oneera: “Weyo ti mwiittanaaka; kinimoorula soowarasawo mpaka owiitho. Kinimoonihera miloko etiriyaawo kiwuulihihaka muru vamaithoni wa imwene. 
Nahum3:6 Kinimoovonyera ikokhola; kihiwoonelaka weera wooneliwe weyo. 
Nahum3:7 Ootheene eneera emoone eniitthawe yeeraka: ‘Ninive ooheleya nthala – taani eniimwiinlele?’ Taani eniimpepese?” 
Nahum3:8 Weeraka weyo ti ootthuneyaxa opwaha oTebesi, esidade etekiwe mukerekhere Nilu erukureeriweene maahi ni awo ereene exiraaya?" 
Nahum3:9 oKuxi ni wExipitu saari ikurusaya soohimala; oPuti ni oLibiya yaari oowiiraananaaya. 
Nahum3:10 Hata hiiho yaavariwa, enaronghiwa elapo ekina. Anamwanaaya yaahononeliwa mipatta sootheene sa mmiseweni. Yaahaahera ehako weera yoone ommaleloni wa maneethaaya ni anamawera ootheene yaatthukasiwa." 
Nahum3:11 Weyotho onoohapaleya; onimwiipitha weereraka waatthawa amwiittanaawo. 
Nahum3:12 Mootthawelamwawo ori ntoko nyiri sa ifiigu soowiitthwa. Wapukunyaru, omora ni oca." 
Nahum3:13 Woone, anakhottwaawo ootheene ari ntoko athiyana! Milako sa esidadaawo siri khweengwere weera amwiittanaawo evoloweke; anampattikaaya aahisiwa ni mooro." 
Nahum3:14 Wiirikele maahi ciireru ohinaaye oriciwa; olipihere yoowiixaakihano. Ovotte ittoko sooreera opakela indyerwa! 
Nahum3:15 Weereru hai mooro onimoohisa ni ekatana enimoophwata ntoko miwaru sookhuuriwa ni nasope. Wiixaandyeereraxe ntoko misoope! 
Nahum3:16 Woowaandyeerera anamarondaawo owaattihaka opwaha ithenyeeri sa wiirimu, mene awo annanariha elapo, ntoko nasope, mwa yoowo vahoolowaya omvavela ottai." 
Nahum3:17 Anamalipelelaawo ni asitokweenaawo ari ntoko nasope onoopaana muxirini vanihukuni nooriira. Vaheera nsuwa noopa, onoomwareya woohisuwanyeya okenlaawe." 
Nahum3:18 Ii! Mwene a wAsiriya – akukhulaawo animuuseela ni maneethaawo anookona. Mulokwaawo woomwareela mmanyaakoni ahikhalaka oothukumanyiha. 
Nahum3:19 Makhwattaawo ti ookhwano; ovulalawawo onoorongha wookhwaani. Ootheene aniiwa mwahaawo, aniipa makuphi niwoko na omorawawo yeenre ootheene ehaawa niwoko na ohooxawawo." 
Habakkuk1:1 Ola mutthenga Muluku aamvanghaawe Habakuki. 
Habakkuk1:2 Ii, Yave, mpaka yaakhani ontthuneyaaya owiitthanani, Nyuwo muhikaakhulaka? Hoye hoye ontthuneyaaya wookhuwelelani: “Nipuhero,” vaheera Nyuwo khamumvuluxa?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Munkooniherelani soonanara mukinyesererihaka woona mahooxo? Ophwatiwa ni mapuhero ari ohoolowaka. Wookhala ohiiwanana ni owanawana mipattasaka. 
Habakkuk1:4 Tivawo Nlamulo nihimvaraaya muteko ni ekhaikhai kheenkwaniheriwa. Atakhali anaattharatthara oororomeleya moota wooweera ekhaikhai enoovaanyiwa. 
Habakkuk1:5 Moone miloko ni muwehawehe. Mututhuwe ni mmaale, niwoko kinoopaka etthu mmahukunimwanyu, mwa yeeyo mweeraanyu muhiroromele, naari muleeliweene." 
Habakkuk1:6 Kinimwaatannyera aBabiloniya – muloko woohikhalano ikharari ni woowali, mwa yoowo oneetteetta elapo yootheene okuxaka ilapo sa miloko sikina." 
Habakkuk1:7 Owo ti muloko woowooviwa ni woowoopopiha. Ompaka yeeyo ontthunaaya, wiittittimihaka." 
Habakkuk1:8 Ikavalusaya* ti soowaaluwa ompwaha havara, sooluwaxa opwaha miici sintotha ohiyu. Anamweettihaaya a ikavalu* anrweela ottaiwene; ikavalusaya* sinrwa sitthimakaka. Awo amvava ntoko xaaka oniihiyahiya akungaleene mapupha weera avare." 
Habakkuk1:9 Awosa ootheene anrwa etthunaka opuhera paahi. Atthu oowaattaxa anrwa ntoko epheyo ya munikareni yaatthukaka atthu oohaalikeleya. 
Habakkuk1:10 Animwaaramusa mamwene ni animwaanyemula anamalamula. Antheya isidade soolipihiwa; anteka soowelano ixiri, enakuxa isidade iyo." 
Habakkuk1:11 Vahoolowaya anoovira ntoko epheyo, erowaka mpatta mukina – ananthowa yoonaka ikurusaya ntoko mulukwaaya." 
Habakkuk1:12 Ii! Yave! Vekhaikhai Nyuwo ti oohimala! Mulukwaaka ni Ootteelaaka, Nyuwo khamunkhwa. Ii! Yave! Mookhaliha muloko owo weera okwanihere nthorihelo. Ii! Mwala, Nyuwo mohaathanla aBabiloniya weera ettaruxe." 
Habakkuk1:13 Maithwaanyu ti ootteelaxa ehiweraka oweha soonanara; khamungwera ovilela sootakhala. Munaavilelelani oohiroromeleya? Mummaalelani, atakhali yaamiraka oororomeleya oowaapwaha yaale?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Mohaatatuxa atthu ntoko ihopa sa mphareiya, ntoko soopattuxiwa sa mphareiya sihinlamuliwaru." 
Habakkuk1:15 Mwiittana oonanara onaawarula ootheene yaale ni nimeso; onaavara aathukumanyihaka mutthavini, mwa yeeyo anoohakalalelaxa." 
Habakkuk1:16 Tivawo ompakelaawe ntthavi yooveleela, ahiseraka erubani* ntthavi attittimiherelaka, niwoko ti nenno ninthadyiriha ni yooca yoowaattaxa." 
Habakkuk1:17 Vano owo onoopwaherera wiittha ntthavinawe, aphwataka miloko woohikhalano ikharari?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Miyo kinimweemela vanipuronivaka noolipelela; vaxirini ya esidade. Kinoowehererawo weera kiiwe yeeyo Yave aneeraawe akaakhule; aani yoowaakhulaawe ya ottaandawulawaka. 
Habakkuk2:2 Vano Yave aamwaakhula: Mulepe nnenesene moonelo vatthaabwani weera namutthenga atthimakeno. 
Habakkuk2:3 Vanonto moonelo oniweereiye mweehuhuni yootthuneya; onghima sa ommaleloni ni ti wa ekhaikhai. Naari opisaka, ngweherere yoowo, niwoko vekhaikhai enoophiya ehuhuwaaya." 
Habakkuk2:4 Mmoone, owo ti oowiixoona; soohaawelasawe khasireenre; vaheera oororomeleya onookhala niwoko na nroromelonawe." 
Habakkuk2:5 Aani eviinyu ti enimulokottha; owo ti oowiixoona ahiitthuuwaka mahuku ootheene. Khamvona ntoko okhwa okhalawawe ti wootthunatthuna, awinaka miloko sincipale. Onthukumanyiha mukhwipimwawe milokosene seiyo." 
Habakkuk2:6 Nihuku na muhoolo miloko sootheene iyo sinoomutthebwa ni icipo sa munyemu, seeraka: ‘Ii! Yoowo onthukumanyiha itthu soohuhula ni oniipuhiha ni wiixoopopiha. Mpaka yaakhani eyo eneeraaya epwaherere?’" 
Habakkuk2:7 Anamakopaanyu anoovenya woowaakuveya; yaawosa avennye animoothukumelihani. Vano munoothatuwa oovariwa ni yaawosa. 
Habakkuk2:8 Mweenre muhuhulaka miloko sincipale, seiyo sihalahanle sinimoohuhulani nyuwo niwoko na owiivawanyu oohinthowa. Moophwata ilapo ni isidade ni amakaaya ootheene." 
Habakkuk2:9 Ootakhaliwa yoole onteka empaawe ni musurukhu woowiiyiwa. Mulopwana owo onreherera epuurwaawe vanipuroni na osuluxa weera atthawe ngwoopihani moothemwene. 
Habakkuk2:10 Moovaanela waaphwata atthu ancipale muulihihaka muru vaatevanyu ni mutthekihaka okumaahu. 
Habakkuk2:11 Maluku a exiri animookhuwelelani ni itthaabwa sa mapatho sinimookhalelani namalwe. 
Habakkuk2:12 Ootakhaliwa yoole onteka esidade ni ephome ni oniitekela muttetthe ni nipuhero! 
Habakkuk2:13 Yave a ikuru sootheene oolakela weera miteko sa miloko sinoomala ni mooro paahi. Mitekosaya soovihaxa sinookhala soohivareleya etthu. 
Habakkuk2:14 Vaheera elapo ya vathi eniisareye ni osuwela ovuwa wa Yave, ntoko maahi ansareyaaya mphareiya." 
Habakkuk2:15 Ootakhaliwa yoowo onimvaha eviinyu mukhwaawe, atakanseraka yoohapala weera amuhapalihe eerelaka omoona tiriya." 
Habakkuk2:16 Munoosareya wuuliwa muru ohikhanle ovuwa. Vano, ti emaaraanyu! Ngwureke ni mwiixoonihere etiriyaanyu. Ekoomixi ya ntata noolopwana na Yave mumvahiwa nyuwo ni ovuwawanyu onoosareya wuuliwa muru." 
Habakkuk2:17 Nipuhero mwaapakenlaanyu oLibanu nnimoophwanyani ni munoosareya woova niwoko na owiivawanyu axinama. Nyuwo mooyeeha ephome yincipale, munapuhera ilapo, isidade ni amakaaya." 
Habakkuk2:18 Muluku oolokottha khamvareleya muteko, eenre apakiwaka ni mutthu. Hiihotho ecaambulo enxuttiha soowootha kheemvareleya muteko. Vano yoowo opanke onroromela yeeyo opankaawe, apakaka miluku sihingwera wuuluma." 
Habakkuk2:19 Ootakhaliwa yoowo oneerela mwiri: ‘Okhaleke ni okumi!’ Hoye hoye oneerela nluku noohikhalano okumi: ‘Ovenyeke!’ Nno nnoowera woovahani miruku? Nihuruweliwe eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha*, mene khanimmumula.”" 
Habakkuk2:20 Vaheera Yave ori Mpaanimwawe yootteela; elapo ya vathi yootheene emaaleke vahoolowawe. 
Habakkuk3:1 Nivekelo na mprofeeti, Habakuki, attharaka moota wa ecipo eniitthaniwa Xigiyonoti*." 
Habakkuk3:2 Yave kohiiwa sa epilaanyu; Ii! Yave, kootikhiniheya niwoko na mitekosanyu. Mpaketho seiye mweehuhunimwahu; musuweliheke mmahukunimwahu. Musaranimwanyu muupuwelele ikharari." 
Habakkuk3:3 Yave orweenle oTemani; Ootteela orweenle wa mwaako Parani. Sela*. Ovuwawawe wookhuneela erimu ni ottottopeleyawawe woosareya elapo ya vathi. 
Habakkuk3:4 Waarawawe onlikana ni woopa wa nsuwa, mmatatanimwawe otuthaka siraayamo ikurusawe sitokotoko." 
Habakkuk3:5 Mahooxo onrumihela ohoolowawe; iretta soowoopiha sintthara ottuliwawe. 
Habakkuk3:6 Aaheemela, ni elapo yaathukumela; aaweha ni miloko saasareya woova. Nyaako sa khalayi soophwateya; mattumuxa a khalayixa aamwaramwareya. Iphirosawe ti soohimala." 
Habakkuk3:7 Kohoona iheema sa oKuxani moothananani; iluttu sa iheema sa oMidiyani sithukumelaka ni woova. 
Habakkuk3:8 Yave, weeraka mwaanyoonyeringwe nyooloko hoye hoye mirora? Weeraka mwaanyoonyeringwe ephareiya, Nyuwo mweettihaanyu ikavalusanyu* ni ikaarosanyu sa owina?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Mooreherera muuraanyu; movekela nyuupa sincipale. Sela*. Moototoxa etthaya ni nyooloko. 
Habakkuk3:10 Nyaako soowoonani sinatetereya. Nyooloko sa maahi simvira ni wuupa; moowiixera onruma ni mitekutekusaya sitokotoko. 
Habakkuk3:11 Nsuwa ni mweeri saaheemela wiirimu woowoona otutha wa nyuupasanyu sivavaka; waara wa nivakananyu noowaaraxa. 
Habakkuk3:12 Munyoonyiweene mwaavira elapo ya vathi ni musaranimwanyu mwaanyikalasa miloko. 
Habakkuk3:13 Mwaakhuma weera mvuluxe mulokwaanyu ni weera muntapuxe oottikittheliwaanyu. Moomphwata mutokweene a elapo ya atakhali; munrulaka okhuma waamuru mpaka waametto. Sela*. 
Habakkuk3:14 Mwaamuthorola ni nivakanawe muneenaawe, anakhottwaawe ekhumaka weera enimwaramwaxe. Yaakhuma enitthukuruwelaka oohakalaleene weera yiive ahikhalaka ompwattha." 
Habakkuk3:15 Mwaanyikala ephareiya ni ikavalusanyu* mutekumihaka maahi mancipale. 
Habakkuk3:16 Kohiiwa ni murimaaka woosareya woova; eyanowaaka yaathukumela; ophwata waakitteengula ni nyettosaka saaveveleya. Hata hiiho kinooweherera ni ovilela nihuku noowuuliha muru nneera niphiyere muloko onniwanano. 
Habakkuk3:17 Naari ohittuvaka mwiri wa efiigu* hata sihooneyaka iwuuva* muvideirani*; naari wooceeleyaka ohepha wa sooliveira* ni imatta sihiruwereyaka; naari sihikhalaka ikhondoolo hoye hoye imombe munikhoolani – 
Habakkuk3:18 hata hiiho, kinoomuhakalalela Yave; aani kinoomuhakalalela Muluku Mvuluxaaka." 
Habakkuk3:19 Yave onlamula soothesene ti ikurusaka. Onaaluxa nyettosaka ntoko sa naahe ni ekhomaci. Onkiweriha weetta oolipeene mapuro a osulu mwaako woowoopiha. Wa mutokweene a icipo, ni ikaruma sa mikhoyi." 
Zephaniah1:1 Yave aahuuluma ni Zefaniya, mwaana mulopwana a Kuxi, mwaana mulopwana a Gedaliya, mwaana mulopwana a Amariya, mwaana mulopwana a Hezekiya. Zefaniya aalaleiya mutthenga ola mweehuhuni ya olamula wa mwene Yosiya, mwaana mulopwana a Amoni, mwene a oYuda:" 
Zephaniah1:2 “Kinoophwata itthu sootheene sa mulaponi,” onghima Yave." 
Zephaniah1:3 “Kinimwaaphwata atthu ni axinama; kinoophwata ipalame sa wiirimu ni ihopa, ni yaawo antannyera okwattula vamoha ni atakhali. Kinoopaka yeeyo, kiphwataka omutthu mulaponi,” onghima Yave." 
Zephaniah1:4 Kinootheteela ntata oYuda vamoha ni amaki a oYerusaleemu. Kinimwaamalamaliha nipuro nna ahalahanle a Bahali*, masina a yaawo anrumeela miluku ni asaserdotaaya," 
Zephaniah1:5 yaawo anlapa ithenyeeri sa wiirimu vasulu vanipathoniwaya, ni yaawo ankokhora elipelaka mwa Yave nitho mpaka Moleki;" 
Zephaniah1:6 Yaawo anghapuwa ehiyaka omutthara Yave, hata ehimwaasaka naari ehimukohereraka." 
Zephaniah1:7 Mmaale ohoolo wa Yave onlamula sootheene, niwoko nihuku na Yave nookhuveela. Yave ooreherera yooveleela; ohaatteeliha yaawo aalattunlaawe." 
Zephaniah1:8 Vanihukuni na yooveleela ya Yave, kinimwaattaruxa ahooleli, anamwane asilopwana a mwene, ni ootheene awanre ikuwo sa enamarwa." 
Zephaniah1:9 Nihuku nno kinimwaattaruxa ootheene anraramela waathi nsele, esarihaka mpaani mwa milukusaya nipuhero ni olokottha." 
Zephaniah1:10 “Nihuku nno,” onghima Yave, “onookhuweliwa vakhiviru wa mulako wa Ihopa, olalamikiwa munttettheni munyowani, ni oruma otokotoko mmattumuxani." 
Zephaniah1:11 Mulalamike nyuwosa munkhala mmuttettheni wa nakoso a esidade; ananakoswaanyu ootheene anoophwatiwa woomalela. Anooheleya nthala ootheene anthumiha eparatha*. 
Zephaniah1:12 Ehuhuweene yeeyo, kinoomukungura Yerusaleemu ni onyaari, kaattaruxeke atthu mootthekanimwaya ahimpwattharu etthu ni yiixuupuwelaka: ‘Yave khapakaru yooreera naari yoonanara.’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Mihakhusaya sinoohuhuliwa; impasaya sinookurumuliwa. Naari etekaka impa inyowani, kheekhalamo; anoophatteya imatta sa iwuuva*, mene kheewura eviinyuwaaya.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 Nihuku ntokweene na Yave, nookhuveela; nookhuveela, ningwa woowaakuveya. Mwiiwe! Nihuku na Yave nnoowaawa ni okhuwelaxa woowaawa wa anakhotto." 
Zephaniah1:15 Nihuku nno, nnikhale na isara, nihuku na makacamiho ni othanana, nihuku na ohaawa ni oheleya nthala, na epiphi ni ewiriphi, na mahutte ni oriipihana," 
Zephaniah1:16 nihuku na wiipiwa mapalapatta ni okhuweleliwa ekhotto isidade soolipihiwa ni itoore* sa mmaloothoni. 
Zephaniah1:17 “Kinimwaaruuhela atthu ohaawa, ni animweetta ntoko oohoona, niwoko aamutthekela Yave. Ephomaaya enoomwaraxiwa ntoko ntthupi ni erutthwaaya ntoko mahiloka." 
Zephaniah1:18 Eparathaaya* ni eyuumaaya yoorikaxa khayaatapuxa vanihukuni na isara sa Yave. Mmooroni wa ehacaawe, enoolalihiwa elapo yootheene, niwoko Owo onimwaamaliha wootutuxereya ootheene ankhala mulaponi.”" 
Zephaniah2:1 Muthukumane ni mvarexexane, nyuwo muloko woohikhalano muru," 
Zephaniah2:2 ehinaaye ophiya ehuhu elakeliwe ni nihuku nno, niviraka ntoko ikokhola, sihinaaye woomorelani isara soowuupa sa Yave, ni nihinaaye woophwanyani nihuku na isara sa Yave." 
Zephaniah2:3 Mmwaase Yave, ootheene nyuwo oowiiyeviha a mulaponi, nyuwosa mumpaka yeeyo Owo olamulenlaawe. Mwaasaase ekhaikhai; mwaasaase wiiyeviha; apaale nyuwosa mmwikhaleno wootthawela vanihukuni na isara sa Yave." 
Zephaniah2:4 Gaza onoothaamiwa, ni Axekeloni onooheleya nthala. Axedodi onimwiitthiwa nsuwa vamuru, ni Ekroni onoomalamalihiwa." 
Zephaniah2:5 Ii! Nyuwosa munkhala muxerexere ephareiya, muloko wa aKereti; ii! Kanaani, masu a Yave aawiittani, elapo ya aFilisti. Miyo kinimoophwatani ni khaawo anaahale." 
Zephaniah2:6 Elapo ya muxerexere ephareiya, ankhalaayawo aKereti, enookhala wookhalawo akukhuli ni nikhoola na ikhondoolo." 
Zephaniah2:7 Enookhala ya oohalahala a epuumba ya Yuda. Wu anoophwanyawo moocihamo; ni wiilaka, animwiixaatalela mpaani mwa Axekeloni. Yave, Mulukwaaya, onimwaakosoopa, ni onimwaahokoloxera oreeriwa." 
Zephaniah2:8 Kohiiwa oruwana wa aMowabe ni oveiha wa awAmoni, mwa yaawo aruwanne mulokwaaka, enawoopopiherela elapwaaya." 
Zephaniah2:9 Tivawo kinlipelaaka mwa okumaaka,’ onghima Yave, a ikuru sootheene, Muluku a oYixrayeli, ‘weera oMowabe onoothatuwa ntoko oSodoma, ni wAmoni ntoko oGomora – nipuro noophipihana malaxi a ntuphini, ni ihime sa maakha, oheleya nthala woohimala. Anoohuhuliwa ni oohalahala a mulokwaaka; oohalahala a mulokwaaka, anookuxa elapwaaya ntoko yoohiyeriwa." 
Zephaniah2:10 Ti yeeyo eneeraaya yaakhele ntoko ntthuvelo na wiixoonawaya, mwaha wa oruwana ni otthebwa muloko wa Yave, a ikuru sootheene." 
Zephaniah2:11 Yave onookhala oowoopihaaya aaphwataka miluku sootheene sa mulaponi. Miloko sa elapo yootheene sinoomulapa, khula mutthu mulaponimwawe." 
Zephaniah2:12 “Ii! aKuxe, nyuwosatho munimwiiviwa ni ekatanaaka.”" 
Zephaniah2:13 Owo onootheteela moono mpatta wa ottuttuwani, aphwateke wAsiriya, ahiyeke oNinive oheleiyeene nthala woomalela, wuumelenleene ntoko nikare." 
Zephaniah2:14 Sinimwiixaatalelawo mihuwo soohiyanahiyana ni moota wootheene wa axinama a ntuphini. Esiisi ya munikareni ni namame, sinimwiitthaala vasulu wa amarimbwaawe. Okhuwelawaya onimwiiwanyeela muxanelanimwawe. Sinookhala ittuxo mmilakoni, ni iviika sa esidari* sinimooneya." 
Zephaniah2:15 Ela ti esidade ehimpwattha etthu, ekhalaka yoolipeene, yiixeerelaka: “Ti miyo paahi, khawoworu mukina!” Moota eheleiyaaya nthala! Nikhuku na axinama a ntuphini! Ootheene amviramo, anootthebwa yiipaka makuphi." 
Zephaniah3:1 Ii! Esidade ya anamahasula, anamapuhera ni oohitteela!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Khawoworu emmwiiwaaya, ni kheentthuna wookoleliwa. Kheenimuroromela Yave, kheemmwaattamela Mulukwaaya." 
Zephaniah3:3 Ahoolelaaya ti amwatto anoopa murika. Anamalamulaaya ti miici soovolaxiwa sihinghiyaru yookhuura omaalo. 
Zephaniah3:4 Maprofeetaaya ti oohikhalano miruku, ti asilopwana oovariha. Asaserdotaaya anghiiriha Nipuro Nootteela*, epuheraka Nlamulo." 
Zephaniah3:5 Yave ori eriyaraaya, ori oororomeleya ni ohimpakaru yoohiroromeleya. Khula oxeexelo Owo onkoonihera ekhaikhayaawe, ni khula nihuku, Owo khanghiyanyiharu, vaheera oohiroromeleya, khoommuuliha muru." 
Zephaniah3:6 “Koomalamaliha miloko; moolipamwaya woophwateya. Misewesaya kihiyale mathalaru ni khawoworu omvirawo. Isidadesaya soophwatiwa; khawoworu ohalahanle; khawoworu! 
Zephaniah3:7 Miyo kaaheerela esidade: ‘Woohihovela nyuwo munookoova ni munimwaakhulela wookoleliwa!’ Vano hiiho, woomakawanyu khawaamalamalihiwa, hata khayaamorelamo mattaruxowaaka ootheene. Vaheera awosa yaahaawelaxa opaka moota wootheene wa yoonanara.”" 
Zephaniah3:8 “Tivawo, mukiweherere Miyo,” onghima Yave, “ngweherere nihuku Miyo kineeraaka kivenyere okhalela onamoona. Koolakela othukumanyiha miloko ni omwene weera kiyeehere isarasaka, wuupa wootheene wa onyoonyiwawaka. Elapo yootheene enoolalihiwa ni mooro wa isarasaka sa ehace." 
Zephaniah3:9 Hiiho, kinootteeliha iyano sa miloko weera sootheene iyo siitthane Nsina na Yave, ni simurumeele ni murima mmoha." 
Zephaniah3:10 Okhuma okhopela nyooloko sa oKuxe, anamalapaaka, mulokwaaka omwareiye, anookiruuhela sooveleela." 
Zephaniah3:11 Nihuku nno nyuwosa khamuulihiheya muru mwa soopakasanyu sa okivaanyawanyu, niwoko kinimwaavenxa musidadenimu yaawo anghakalalela wiixoonawaya. Nyuwosa khamukhalatho oowiixoona vamwaakoniwaka wootteela." 
Zephaniah3:12 Vaheera kinimwaahiya musidade oomaala murima ni oowiiyeviha, ni yaawo eniitthawelele Nsina na Yave." 
Zephaniah3:13 Oohalahala a oYixrayeli kheepaka yoohiroromeleya; awosa khayootha, hata kheephwanyaniwa mmwaanomwaya yoolokottha. Awosa animooca yiitthuuweke, ahikhalaka anaawoopopihe.”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Ii! Mwaana muthiyana a oSiyoni, mwiipe; ii! Yixrayeli, mutthape! Muhakalale ni mutthape ni murima wootheene, ii! Mwaana muthiyana a oYerusaleemu!" 
Zephaniah3:15 Yave oovenxa ottaruxiwawanyu, Owo ohaahokoloxa amwiittanaanyu. Yave, mwene a oYixrayeli, ori eriyaraanyu; nyuwo khamoovaru etthu." 
Zephaniah3:16 Nihuku nno onimweereliwa Yerusaleemu: “Ii! Siyoni, muhoove; muhihiye matataanyu etteenguwaka." 
Zephaniah3:17 Yave, Mulukwaanyu, ori ni nyuwo, oolikaneene ovuluxa. Owo onootthapa mwa nyuwo; moosivelanimwawe onimoorehererani, Owo onimoohakalalelani mookhuwelani wa ohakalala.”" 
Zephaniah3:18 “Miyo kinimwaarakameliha yaawo aniinlela ifesta soothanliwa, yaawo ari mpatta wa nyuwo, ni yiilemelihenre yuulihiheyaka muru." 
Zephaniah3:19 Ehuhuweene yeeyo, kinimwaapakela kintthunaaka yaawo yoohasunleni; kinoowoopola ooheetta, kaathukumanyiheke yaawo amwareiye. Kinoopakiha weera etthapeliwe ni ettittimihiwe mulaponi moothemwene yuulihihiwaayamo muru." 
Zephaniah3:20 Ehuhuweene yeeyo, Miyo kinimoothukumanyihani; ehuhuweene yeeyo, Miyo kinimoohokoloxerani owaani. Miyo kinimoovahani nttittimiho ni ovuwa eriyari ya miloko sootheene sa mulaponi, kaarehereraka oreeriwawanyu vamaithoniwanyu,” oneera Yave." 
Haggai1:1 Vanihukuni noopacera na mweeri wanaathannamosa muyaakhani yanaapiili ya olamula wa Dariyu, Yave aahuuluma mwa mprofeeti Axewu ni Zerubabeli, mwaana mulopwana a Xeyaletiyeli, guvernadori a oYuda ni Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Yehozadaki, mutokweene a asaserdoti*, eeraka:" 
Haggai1:2 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: “Muloko ola oneera: ‘Nlelo kheenaaye ophiyera ehuhu ya orasela Empa ya Yave.’ ” 
Haggai1:3 Tivawo Yave uulummaawetho mwa mprofeeti Axewu: 
Haggai1:4 “Weeraka ti ehuhu ya okhala nyuwosa mpaani mooreerela, Empaaka epwahereraka okhala yooheleyeene nthala?”" 
Haggai1:5 Vano, Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: “Moone nnenesene ephiro mukuxenraanyu." 
Haggai1:6 Nyuwosa munnaphatteyaxa, vaheera munghepha vakhaani. Nyuwosa munnaca, mene khamumvona. Munnawura, mene khamunkwaneya. Munnawara, mene khamumviherana. Munnaakhela nlivonanyu, munahela munrupani woothorowa.”" 
Haggai1:7 Vano, Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: “Moone nnenesene ephiro mukuxenraanyu." 
Haggai1:8 Ngwele mwaako weera mwaruuhe itthaabwa. Muteke Empaaka, weera Miyo kihakalale ni kivuwiheriweno,” oneera Yave." 
Haggai1:9 “Nyuwosa mwaaweherera yincipale, mene erwiiye vakhaani. Vano yeeyo nyuwosa muruuhalaanyu owaani Miyo kiphwante ni iphumu. Kipakenleni hiiho?” onkoha Yave a ikuru sootheene. “Niwoko Empaaka eheleiyeene nthala, khula mutthu a nyuwo ompwatthela paahi mpaanimwawe." 
Haggai1:10 Tivawo, niwoko na nyuwosa, erimu ehiimihalaaya nikame ni etthaya ehiyalaaya wiimiha soowiimasaya." 
Haggai1:11 Mutuphini ni mmwaako kootannyera wuumelela ophwannye etrigu, eviinyu, makhura ni sootheene enruweraaya etthaya, mpakatho atthu, mihuwo ni miteko sootheene sa matataanyu.”" 
Haggai1:12 Vano, Zerubabeli, mwaana mulopwana a Xeyaletiyeli, Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Yehozadaki, mutokweene a asaserdoti*, ni akina yaahalahanle a muloko yaahiiwelela nsu na Yave, Mulukwaaya, niwoko na masu a mprofeeti Axewu, mwa yoowo Yave, Mulukwaawe, aamurumihenlaawe. Vanonto muloko waamoova Yave." 
Haggai1:13 Vano Axewu, namutthenga a Yave, aaronghela muloko mutthenga wa Yave ola: “Miyo kiri ni nyuwosa,” onghima Yave." 
Haggai1:14 Hiiho, Yave aamulipihera Zerubabeli, mwaana mulopwana a Xeyaletiyeli, guvernadori a oYuda ni Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Yehozadaki, mutokweene a asaserdoti*, vamoha ni muloko mukinoowo, enapacerasa orasela Empa ya Yave a ikuru sootheene, Mulukwaaya," 
Haggai1:15 vanihukuni nanaamiloko miili ni maxexe na mweeri wanaathannamosa vayaakhani yanaaveeli ya olamula wa Dariyu. 
Haggai2:1 Vanihukuni nanaamiloko miili nnimoha na mweeri wanaathannamiili, Yave aahuuluma mwa mprofeeti Axewu:" 
Haggai2:2 “Munkohe ha, Zerubabeli, mwaana mulopwana a Xeyaletiyeli, guvernadori a oYuda ni Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Yehozadaki, mutokweene a asaserdoti*, vamoha ni muloko mukinoowo:" 
Haggai2:3 ‘Taani ahalahanle a nyuwosa oonne Empa ya Muluku ela ngwaaranimwaya woopacera? Naalikanxeraka yeele, kheenlikana ni yeeyo munoonaanyu vano." 
Haggai2:4 Mene vano, mulipihe murima Zerubabeli,’ onghima Yave. ‘Mulipihe murima, Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Yehozadaki, mutokweene a asaserdoti*. Mulipihe murima! ootheene nyuwosa a muloko wa mulaponi ni muvare muteko,’ onghima Yave, ‘niwoko Miyo kiri ni nyuwosa,’ onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Haggai2:5 ‘Wu ti wiiraana kipankaaka ni nyuwosa mukhumaleene wExipitu; Munepaaka ori eriyaraanyu. Muhoovase.’ 
Haggai2:6 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera: ‘Ohilekenle, kinooteterexatho erimu, etthaya, ni mipatta sikina sa elapo." 
Haggai2:7 Kinoothukumeliha miloko sootheene, mwa seiyo, sinooruuha mihakhusaya ni kinoosariha ovuwa Empa ya Muluku ela,’ onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Haggai2:8 ‘Okhuma eparatha* mpaka eyuuma yoorikaxa ti sawaka,’ onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Haggai2:9 ‘Ovuwa wa Empa enyowani ya Muluku ela, onimunnuwaxa opwaha wa khalayi,’ oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene. ‘Ni kinookhaliha murettele nipuro nna,’ onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene.”" 
Haggai2:10 Vanihukuni nanaamiloko miili ni maxexe na mweeri wanaathannaaxexe, vayaakhani yanaaveeli ya olamula wa Dariyu, Yave aahuuluma ni mprofeeti Axewu, amweerelaka:" 
Haggai2:11 “Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Mwaakohe asaserdoti* yookoha ela mwaha wa Nlamulo: 
Haggai2:12 Mukina akuxa enama yootteeliheriwa mooxoriwa mwa soowarasawe ni iyo satava yoocaanyu hoye hoye etthu ekina yoowaapeiwa naari eviinyu hata makhura hoye hoye yakhalaru yooca, vano yeeyo enookhala yootteelihiwa?’ ” Vanonto asaserdoti* yaamwaakhula: “Hoye!”" 
Haggai2:13 Woottharelana Axewu aahaakoha: “Mukina aahitteela niwoko na otava muttembo, vahoolowaya anatava ikina ikina sa itthusene seiya, vano iyo sinookhala soohitteela?” Asaserdoti* yaamwaakhula: “Aani, khasitteela.”" 
Haggai2:14 Vanonto Axewu aahima yoowaakhula ya Yave: “Ti yeeyo eneereya ni muloko ola ni elapo ela. Sootheene ompakaaya ni sootheene onkiveleelelaaya ti soohitteela. 
Haggai2:15 Vano ngwiriyane: Okhuma olelo mpaka muhoolo, moonelemo. Moota heeni mwaakhalaanyu nihinaaye wiikaathiwa nluku vanlukuni Mpaani mwa Yave?" 
Haggai2:16 Mukina aaphiyaawe yuukeliwaayawo etrigu aasaasaka miringo miloko miili, saakhala paahi muloko. Mukina aarowaawe yaathokororiwaayawo eviinyu weera akuxe miringo miloko mithanu, aaphwanya miloko miili paahi." 
Haggai2:17 Miyo koophwata muteko wootheene wa matataanyu ni nihooxo, murawa ni maralala, vaheera nyuwosa khamwaahokoleenle wa Miyo,” onghima Yave." 
Haggai2:18 “Okhuma olelo, nihuku nanaamiloko miili ni maxexe na mweeri wanaathannamixexe, moonelemo nihuku na mathipelo a Empa ya Yave yaapakingwaaya, aani muupuwele nnene:" 
Haggai2:19 Vatathani wookhala nlelo mmiso? Mpaka olelo evideira*, mwiri wa ifiigu, mwiri wa eromazera* ni wa sooliveira* khasiimale soowiima. Vaheera, okhuma olelo mpaka muhoolo, kinimooreelihasani.”" 
Haggai2:20 Yave aahuuluma ni Axewu emaara yanaaveeli, munihukuni nanaamiloko miili ni maxexe na mweeri wanaathannamixexe:" 
Haggai2:21 “Mwamuleele Zerubabeli, guvernadori a oYuda, weera Miyo kinooteterexa erimu ni etthaya." 
Haggai2:22 Kinoomoroxa ihice sa emwene ni kinoophwata olamula wa omwene wa anamarwa. Kinoopittula ikaaro ni anamweettihaaya; ikavalu* ni anamweettihaaya anoomora, khula mutthu mwa ekatana ya mukhwaawe." 
Haggai2:23 ‘Nihuku nno,’ onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene, ‘Miyo kinimookuxani nyuwo, murumeiyaaka Zerubabeli, mwaana mulopwana a Xeyaletiyeli,’ onghima Yave ‘ni kinimoopakani munela woottittano, niwoko kohoothanlani nyuwo,’ onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene.”" 
Zechariah1:1 Mmweerini wanaathannamiraru wa eyaakha yanaaveeli ya olamula wa Dariyu, Yave aahuuluma ni mprofeeti Zakariya, mwaana mulopwana a Berekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Ido, amweerelaka:" 
Zechariah1:2 “Yave aahaanyoonyeraxiwa makholowaanyu. 
Zechariah1:3 Tivawo, mwaaleele aYixrayeli: ‘Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Muhokoleele wa Miyo,’ onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene, ‘ni Miyo kinoohokoleela wa nyuwosa,’ onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Zechariah1:4 Muhikhale ntoko makholowaanyu, wa yaawo yaalaleeriwe ni maprofeeti a khalayi masu ala: ‘Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Muhiyeke iphirosanyu ni mitekosanyu soonanara.’ Mene awosa khayaatthunne wiiwa naari khayaakipwantthe, onghima Yave." 
Zechariah1:5 Vano ari woowi makholowaanyu? Ni maprofeeti – weeraka anookhala mahuku ootheene? 
Zechariah1:6 Vaheera maswaaka ni ikanosaka mwa seiyo kaalamulenlaaka arumeiyaaka, maprofeeti, saahaaphwanya makholowaanyu. Vano yaakurunuxa mirimasaya yeeraka: ‘Yave a ikuru sootheene oonipakela yeeyo iphirosahu ni mitekosahu simphwanelaaya, ntoko aalakenlaawe opaka.’”" 
Zechariah1:7 Vanihukuni nanaamiloko miili ni maxexe na mweeri wanaamuloko nimmoha oniitthaniwa Xebati, vayaakhani yanaaveeli ya olamula wa Dariyu, Yave aahuuluma ni mprofeeti Zakariya, mwaana mulopwana a Berekiya, mwaana mulopwana a Ido." 
Zechariah1:8 Moohiyuni kaahoona moonelo ni ohoolowaka aakhala mulopwana eettiha ekavalu* yooxeera! Owo aari yeemelelo variyari wa imurta* vanxaapwani. Ottuliwawe saakhala ikavalu* sooxeera, sancano ni sootteela." 
Zechariah1:9 Miyo kaakoha: “Pwiiyaaka, iya iheeni?” Ndyelo uuluma ni miyo aakaakhula: “Kinoowooniherani seiyo.”" 
Zechariah1:10 Vano mulopwana aari eriyari ya murta* aakithalihera: “Ti seiya Yave orumihenlaawe weera siviravire elapo ya vathi yootheene.” 
Zechariah1:11 Vano seiyo saahuuluma ni ndyelo a Yave eemenle eriyari ya murta* simweerelaka: “Hiyo nooviravira elapo ya vathi yootheene, nnaphwanya elapo yootheene yoomaaleleya munretteleni.”" 
Zechariah1:12 Vano ndyelo a Yave aamweerela Yave: “Yave a ikuru sootheene, mpaka yaakhani muhimorelaka ikharari oYerusaleemu ni mittetthe sa oYuda, mwa seiyo munyoonyeringwaanyu wa iyaakha miloko mithannamiili iya?”" 
Zechariah1:13 Vano Yave aahuuluma masu ooreera ni oolipiha murima ni ndyelo uuluma ni miyo. 
Zechariah1:14 Vano ndyelo uuluma ni miyo aakeerela: “Mulaleiye masu ala: Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Koosareya ihace ni oYerusaleemu ni oZiyoni," 
Zechariah1:15 mene koonyoonyeriwa miloko siniixoona okhala soolipasene. Kaanyoonyeriwa vakhaani paahi, mene iyo saahaandyeerera erisa.’" 
Zechariah1:16 Tivawo, ti yeeyo Yave eenraawe: “Kinghokoleela oYerusaleemu ni ikharari ni Empaaka enooraseliwawo. Vano efiiyu yooringelano enimookoleliwa oYerusaleemu,” onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Zechariah1:17 Mulaleiyetho: “Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Mittetthesaka sinoosareyatho weetteleya nnene ni Yave onoopepesatho oSiyoni athanlakatho oYerusaleemu.’” 
Zechariah1:18 Vano kaaweha osulu kinoona ohoolowaka manyaka maxexe! 
Zechariah1:19 Miyo kaamukoha ndyelo uuluma ni miyo: “Iheeni iya?” Owo aakaakhula: “Ala ti manyaka amwaranxe oYuda, oYixrayeli ni oYerusaleemu.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Vanonto Yave aakoonihera anamaratta axexe. 
Zechariah1:21 Miyo kaakoha: “Awosa anrweelani?” Owo aakaakhula: “Ala ti manyaka amwaranxe oYuda moota wooweera khaawo angwera weemexa muru, mene anamaratta aarweenle woopopiha ni wiintaka manyaka awo a miloko avenyenre muloko wa oYuda weera yaamwaraxe amakaaya.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Vano miyo kaaweha ni aakhalawo ohoolowaka mulopwana avarenleene efiiyu yooringelano. 
Zechariah2:2 Miyo kaamukoha: “Munkela woowi?” Owo aakaakhula: “Kinkela oringa oYerusaleemu weera kisuwele mweerakamelonimwaya ni mweekhuveelonimwaya.” 
Zechariah2:3 Vano ndyelo uuluma ni miyo aapwaha ni ndyelo mukina aarowa omukumanano," 
Zechariah2:4 anamweerela: “Mutthimake ni mwamuleele mmiravo ole: ‘oYerusaleemu eniikhale esidade yoohikhalano ixiri niwoko na waatta wa atthu ni mihuwo. 
Zechariah2:5 Vano Yoomeene kinookhala exiraaya ya mooro mukhwipimwaya, onghima Yave, ‘ni mpuwamwaya kinookhala ovuwawaya.’" 
Zechariah2:6 Ngweeke, ngweeke, mutthawe mweelaponi ya ottuttuwani,” onghima Yave, “niwoko kohoomwaraxelani mipatta mixexe sa mulaponi, onghima Yave." 
Zechariah2:7 Ngweeke, oSiyoni, mutthawe, nyuwo munkhala mwa mwaana muthiyana a oBalilonia!”" 
Zechariah2:8 Vano Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: “Owo okirumihenle ohokoloxera ovuwawawe variyari wa miloko soohuhunleni, niwoko ootheene aneera ootannyeni onimweera wiitutha." 
Zechariah2:9 Vekhaikhai miyo kinootheteela matata miloko moota wooweera ipotthasaya sinimwaahuhula. Vano munoosuwela weera Yave a ikuru sootheene ti okiruminghe. 
Zechariah2:10 Mukhuwele ni muhakalale, mwaana muthiyana a oSiyoni! Niwoko kinrwa woopakani woomakawaka,” onghima Yave." 
Zechariah2:11 “Miloko sincipale sinoothukumanyihiwa nihuku nenenenno ni Yave, sithatuwaka mulokwaaka. Miyo kinookhala variyariwanyu ni munoosuwela weera Yave a ikuru sootheene ti okiruminghe wa nyuwo." 
Zechariah2:12 Yave onookuxa oYuda ntoko yoohiyeraawe mweelaponi yootteela, ni onoothanlatho oYerusaleemu." 
Zechariah2:13 Omutthu wootheene omaaleke vamaithoni wa Yave, niwoko oovenya vaNipuroninawe Nootteela*.”" 
Zechariah3:1 Vano ookoonihera Yoxuwa, mutokweene a asaserdoti* eemenleene ohoolo wa ndyelo a Yave ni Satana areene moonowaawe woolopwana weera amoothere." 
Zechariah3:2 Yave aamweerela Satana: “Yave onimoohiihani Satana! Yave othanlale oYerusaleemu onimoohiihani! Mulopwana ola ori ntoko nthatu noovenxiwa vayikho.” 
Zechariah3:3 Vano Yoxuwa aawara ikuwo soonanara eemenleene ohoolo wa ndyelo. 
Zechariah3:4 Ndyelo aaweerela yaale yeemenle ohoolowawe: “Murule ikuwosawe soonanara.” Vano aamweerela Yoxuwa: “Moone, koovenxa sootthekasanyu ni kinoowarihani sa eneethi.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Vano kaaweerela: “Muntthuke ecireemba yootteela.” Ni awosa yaamutthuka ecireemba yootteela, enangwariha, ndyelo a Yave oonaka." 
Zechariah3:6 Ndyelo a Yave aamulipihera Yoxuwa amweerelaka: 
Zechariah3:7 “Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Nyuwo mweetta mphironimwaka ni mwiiwelela ikanosaka, vano munoolamula Empaaka ni munookhala muhooleli a vaatewaka ni Miyo kinimoovahani nipuro eriyari ya yaala ari va." 
Zechariah3:8 Mwiiwe Yoxuwa, mutokweene a asaserdoti*, ni anamakhaviheraanyu akilaathiye ohoolowanyu – nyuwosa ti asilopwana anthoonyera itthu sineera seereiye: Kinoomuruuha murumeiyaaka, Ephuwelo." 
Zechariah3:9 Moone nluku kiiyaathiyaaka ohoolo wa Yoxuwa. Nno nookhalano maitho mathannameeli ni Miyo kinoolepamo yoolepa,’ oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene, ‘ni kinoovenxa soottheka sa elapo ela munihukuni nimoha." 
Zechariah3:10 Vanihukuni nenenenno khula mutthu a nyuwosa onoomulattula mukhwaawe weera akilaathi vathi wa evideiraawe* ni wa mwiraawe wa efiigu*,’ onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene.”" 
Zechariah4:1 Vano ndyelo uuluma ni miyo aakihokoleela, anakivenxa, ntoko omvenxeriwaawe onkona." 
Zechariah4:2 Owo aakikoha: “Munoonani?” Miyo kaamwaakhula: “Kinoona onyaari wa eyuuma yoorikaxa yoolipaxa orino nipoottoronaya na makhura nri vasulu ni soomwaleela ithannapiili ni mipope mithannamiili sinkhaliha vamoha soomwaleela siri vasuluwaya. 
Zechariah4:3 Saakhalatho nyiri miili sooliveira* mukhwipimwaya, mmoha moono woolopwana wa nipoottoro owo ni mukina woothiyana.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Kaamukoha ndyelo uuluma ni miyo: “Pwiiyaaka, entaphulela eheeni yeeyo?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Owo aakaakhula: “Nyuwo khamusuwenle?” Vano kaamwaakhula: “Hoye, Pwiiyaka.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Owo aakeerela: “Masu a Yave wa Zerubabeli ti ala: ‘Khoohiyono ni ikuru hata ni oweraxa, mene mwa Munepaaka,’ oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Zechariah4:7 Ii! Nyaako sooweraxa, nyuwosa taani? Ohoolo wa Zerubabeli munoothatawalihiwa. Vano onimwiikaathi nluku noottittimiheyaxa atthu ekhuwelaka: ‘Muluku areelihe nna, Muluku areelihe nna!’”" 
Zechariah4:8 Vanonto Yave aahuuluma ni miyo akeerelaka: 
Zechariah4:9 “Mathipelo a Empa ela ya Yave yaaheliwe ni matata a Zerubabeli ni ti yoowo aneera amalihetho empeene yeela. Vano munoosuwela weera Yave a ikuru sootheene ti okiruminghe wa nyuwo. 
Zechariah4:10 Yaale yahoonenlemo itthu ikhaanene anoohakalalaxa, yoonaka efiiyu yooringelano mmatatani mwa Zerubabeli. Vano soomwaleela ithannapiili iya ti maitho a Yave angwehaweha elapo yootheene.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Vano kaamukoha ndyelo: “Nyiri miili iya sooliveira* siri moono woolopwana ni woothiyana wa onyaari sintaphulela eheeni?” 
Zechariah4:12 Kaamukohatho: “Sintaphulela eheeni iphandi piili iya sa eyuuma yoorikaxa mukerekhere mipope miili sa eyuuma yoorikaxa simvuuviha makhura a eyuuma yoorikaxa?” 
Zechariah4:13 Owo aakaakhula: “Nyuwo khamusuwenle?” Miyo kaamwaakhula: “Hoye, Pwiiyaaka.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Vano aakeerela: “Iya sinthoonyera asilopwana eeli oothanliwa weera emurumeele Yave a elapo yootheene.” 
Zechariah5:1 Kaawehatho, ni naakhalawo vamaithoniwaka nikwakhwala nivavaka." 
Zechariah5:2 Owo aakikoha: “Munoonani?” Miyo kaamwaakhula: “Kinoona nikwakhwala nivavaka, mweerakamelonimwaya imeetru* muloko ni mweekhuveelonimwaya imeetru* ithanu.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Vano aakeerela: “Mmo noolempwa nlapho ningyeeheriwa mweelaponi yootheene. Mpatta mmoha wa nikwakhwala yoolempwa weera ootheene aniiya animoomoliwa mweelaponi; mpatta mukina weera ootheene anlipela moota woowootha animoomoliwatho. 
Zechariah5:4 Yave a ikuru sootheene onghima: ‘Miyo kirumihenle nlapho nno weera nivolowe mpaani mwa namwiiya ni mwa yoowo onlipela moota woowootha mwa Nsinanaka. Nno nnookhala mpaanimwaya, ni nnoophwata okhuma itthaabwa mpaka indyerwa.’”" 
Zechariah5:5 Vano ndyelo uuluma ni miyo aakaattamela, anakeerela: “Ngwehe ni moone yeeyo enkhumelela.”" 
Zechariah5:6 Miyo kaamukoha: “Eheeni ela?” Owo aakaakhula: “Ti mpapara wooringelano.” Aaheeratho: “Mmo sirimo sootakhala sa miloko sa elapo yootheene.” 
Zechariah5:7 Vano ekhuneelelo ya eyuuma yaakhuneliwa ni mumpaparani mmo aakhalamo muthiyana akilaathiyeene! 
Zechariah5:8 Ndyelo eenre: “Wu otakhaliwa” ni aamukakhelatho mumpaparani, anakhuneela ni ekhuneelelo ya eyuuma." 
Zechariah5:9 Vano kaaweha, kinawoona asithiyana eeli ohoolowaka yaarino mapupha ntoko a ntiki; epheyo yaavenula mapuphaaya. Vano awosa yaattukhulela mpapara eriyari ya erimu ni vathi." 
Zechariah5:10 Kaamukoha ndyelo uuluma ni miyo: “Omvavela woowi mpapara?” 
Zechariah5:11 Owo aakaakhula: “Wa elapo ya oBabiloniya weera yamutekelewo empa yoowo. Mweehuhuni yootthuneyaxa, mpapara onookhalihiwawo vanipuroniwaya.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Kaawehatho ni kaahoona ohoolowaka ikaaro ixexe sa ikavalu* sirweelaka wiirimu eriyari ya nyaako miili sa ebronze*! 
Zechariah6:2 Ekaaro yoopacera yaakhalano ikavalu* sooxeera, yanaaveeli ikavalu* sooriipa," 
Zechariah6:3 yanaararu sootteela ni yanaaxexe sa malepa – sootheene iyo saari sooweraxa. 
Zechariah6:4 Kaamukoha ndyelo uuluma ni miyo: “Pwiiyaka iya sinthoonyera eheeni?” 
Zechariah6:5 Ndyelo aakaakhula: “Iya ti minepa mixexe sa wiirimu sivennye vaanaano okhuma onkhalaawewo Yave sirowaka wa elapo ya vathi yootheene. 
Zechariah6:6 Ekaaro yeettihiwa ni ikavalu* sooriipa enrowa wa elapo ya ottuttuwani, ekaaro yeettihiwa ni ikavalu* sootteela wa elapo ninkela nsuwa, ni ekaaro yeettihiwa ni ikavalu* sa malepa wa elapo ya ohitto.”" 
Zechariah6:7 Ikavalu* sooweraxa saarowaaya ni wiilipiha weera siviravire mweelaponi ya vathi yootheene. Vano owo aaheera: “Mviravire elapo ya vathi!” Ni iye saaviravira mweelaponi ya vathi yootheene. 
Zechariah6:8 Vano owo aakiitthana, anakeerela: “Moone, iyo sirongwe wa elapo ya ottuttuwani soovaha Munepaaka wiitthuuwa mweelaponi eyo.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Yave aakilamulela: 
Zechariah6:10 “Mukuxe eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa ya anamakuxiwa ootthukiweene Heldai, Tobiya ni Yedaya mwa yaawo arweenle oBabiloniya. Murowe nihuku nenenenno wa empa ya Yosiya, mwaana mulopwana a Zefaniya." 
Zechariah6:11 Mukuxe eparatha* ni eyuuma yoorikaxa eyo ni mpake ecireemba ni muntthuke mutokweene a asaserdoti*, Yoxuwa, mwaana mulopwana a Yehozadaki." 
Zechariah6:12 Mwamuleele weera Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Ori va mulopwana oniitthaniwa Ephuwela ni owo onoophuwa vanipuroniwawe ni onooteka Empa ya Yave. 
Zechariah6:13 Ti yoowo aneera ateke Empa ya Yave ni owo onoowarihiwa ni ovuwa, alamulaka akilaathiyeene vahiceniwawe ya emwene. Ni owo onookhala musaserdoti* vahiceniwawe. Vano onookhala murettele variyari wa esaserdotaawe ni emwenaawe.’" 
Zechariah6:14 Ecireemba enoovahiwa wa Heldai, Tobiya, Yedaya ni Heni, mwaana mulopwana a Zefaniya, ntoko eyuupuxero Mpaani mwa Yave." 
Zechariah6:15 Yaawo ari ottaiwene animoowa weera ekhavihere otekiwa wa Empa ya Yave ni munoosuwela weera Yave a ikuru sootheene ti okiruminghe wa nyuwo. Eyo eniiyereye nyuwo mwamwiiwelela oororomeleyeene Yave Mulukwaanyu.” 
Zechariah7:1 Vanihukuni nanaaxexe na mweeri wanaathannaaxexe (oniitthaniwa Kisilevi), vayaakhani yanaaxexe ya olamula wa Dariyu, Yave aahuuluma ni mprofeeti Zakariya." 
Zechariah7:2 Yeereiye amaki a oBeteli yaamurumihalaaya Zarezeri ni Regemi-Meleki vamoha ni asilopwanaaya weera emudyoonttelele Yave," 
Zechariah7:3 yaavekelaka asaserdoti* a Empa ya Yave a ikuru sootheene ni maprofeeti: “Nilalamikeke ni nitthukeke mmweerini wanaathanu ntoko nimpakaahu iyaakha sootheene?” 
Zechariah7:4 Vano Yave a ikuru sootheene aahuuluma ni miyo akeerelaka: 
Zechariah7:5 “Mwaakohe atthu ootheene a elapo nitho asaserdoti*: ‘Nyuwosa mwaatthukaka ni mwaalalamikaka mmweerini wanaathanu ni wanaathannamiili iyakhasene seiye miloko mithannamiili sivinre, vekhaikhai mwaakipakela Miyo?" 
Zechariah7:6 Ni mwaacaanyu ni mwaawuraanyu, khamwiipakela asineenaanyu?" 
Zechariah7:7 Ankha masu Yave aalaleiyaawe mwa maprofeeti a khalayi ehuhuweene yeele oYerusaleemu ni mittetthe sa mukhwipimwaya saaraaya ngwiitthuuwani ni moopuhani ni oNegeba ni ilapo sa vathi wa nyaako saahiitekiha?’” 
Zechariah7:8 Yave aahuulumatho ni Zakariya amweerelaka: 
Zechariah7:9 “Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Mpake ekhaikhai moota woororomeleya, mmorelaneke ikharari, mooniheranaka murima wooreera." 
Zechariah7:10 Muhaahasule asinaamukhweli hata akwaasuni, anamarwa hoye hoye oohaawa. Muhuupuwelelaneke soonanara.’" 
Zechariah7:11 Vaheera yaakhootta opwattha; ni murima woowuuma yaahoorerani ettuli, ekhalaka attiyamaaru." 
Zechariah7:12 Yaahuumiha mirimasaya ehitthunaka wiiwa malamulo hata masu Yave a ikuru sootheene uulumaawe mwa Munepaawe mmwaano mwa maprofeeti a khalayi. Tivawo Yave a ikuru sootheene aanyoonyaxiwaawe. 
Zechariah7:13 ‘Miyo kaawiitthanaaka, awosa khayaatthunne wiiwa; tivawo awosa yaakiitthanaka, Miyo kihingwiiwaakatho,’ onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Zechariah7:14 ‘Kaahaamwaraxela muyuupuruni variyari wa miloko, mwa weiwo yaakhalaayawo ntoko anamarwa. Elapo yaahiiwa yoothaamiweene moota wooweera khaawo aawera ophutulamo. Ti hiiho yaatatunxaaya milepe elapo yooreera.’”" 
Zechariah8:1 Yave a ikuru sootheene aahuulumatho ni miyo akeerelaka: 
Zechariah8:2 “Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Miyo kookhalela ehace oSiyoni; aani kookhalelaxa ehace weiwo.’ 
Zechariah8:3 Yave oneera ha: ‘Kinghokoleela oSiyoni, kakhaleke oYerusaleemu. Vano oYerusaleemu onimwiitthaniwa esidade ya ekhaikhai ni mwaako wa Yave a ikuru sootheene onimwiitthaniwa mwaako wootteela.’" 
Zechariah8:4 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Anamuuluvala asilopwana ni asithiyana eniikilaathitho mmuseweni mwa oYerusaleemu, khula mutthu a yaawo areeneno muttonttwaawe niwoko na wuuluvalawaya." 
Zechariah8:5 Misewe sa esidade sinoosareya amiravo ni aximwali etheelakawo.’ 
Zechariah8:6 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Wa yaale eniihalahale a mulokwaaka apaale enimwaakhalela ntoko yoohiwereya, mene khoohiyoni wa Miyo,’ onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Zechariah8:7 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Kinimoopola mulokwaaka mweelaponi sa ninkela nsuwa ni ninkhuma nsuwa. 
Zechariah8:8 Miyo kinimwaahokoloxera weera ekhale oYerusaleemu; awosa anookhala mulokwaaka ni Miyo kinookhala Mulukwaaya moororomeleyani ni mweekhaikhaiyini.” 
Zechariah8:9 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Nyuwosa muniiwa masu ala olelo ahimmwale ni maprofeeti yaapaceriwaaya mathipelo a Empa ya Yave a ikuru sootheene, mukhale nyoono wii weera Empa ya Yave etekiwe." 
Zechariah8:10 Vano, ehinaaye ehuhu ele, khanaariworu nlivo wa mutthu hoye hoye mwaamunama. Khaawo aampaka nakoso oolipeene niwoko na awananaawe keenre Miyo kangwanawaniha mukina ni mukhwaawe." 
Zechariah8:11 Vaheera nkaapakelatho yaale ahalahanle a muloko ola ntoko kaapankaaka khalayi,’ onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Zechariah8:12 Onimwaattaxa mmiso ni imatta sa iwuuva* sinooruwera soowiimasaya, etthaya enooruwera soohephasaya ni erimu enimwiimiha nikame. Kinimwaavaha itthu sootheene iya yaawo ahalahanle a muloko ola." 
Zechariah8:13 Ii! Yuda ni Yixrayeli, mooteene yoowo mwaalaphiwaanyu variyari wa miloko, hiihotho Miyo kinimoovuluxani ni munookhala nreeliho. Muhoove ni mukhale toko oolipeene.’" 
Zechariah8:14 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Mooteene yoowo kaalakenlaaka woottaruxani kihoomorelakani ikharari ehuhuweene yeele makholowaanyu yaakinyoonyihalaaya,’ onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene," 
Zechariah8:15 ‘hiihotho vano koolakela opakela nnene oYerusaleemu ni oYuda. Muhoove. 
Zechariah8:16 Itthu sintthuneya opaka ti iya: Muulumelaneke ni muthorihe ekhaikhai munuulumaanyumo milattu. 
Zechariah8:17 Muhimuvaanelele yoonanara mwaattamanaanyu hata muhisivele olipela moota woowootha. Miyo kinthanya itthu sootheene iya,’ onghima Yave." 
Zechariah8:18 Emaara ekinatho Yave aahuuluma ni miyo. 
Zechariah8:19 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Otthuka wa mweeri wanaaxexe, wanaathanu, wanaathannamiili ni wanaamuloko onoothatuwa ihuhu soohakalalaxa ni ifesta soosareya ohakalala wa oYuda. Tivawo, musivele ekhaikhai ni murettele.’" 
Zechariah8:20 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Atthu ancipale ni amaki a isidade sincipale animoowa," 
Zechariah8:21 ni amaki a esidade emoha anoorowa wa ekina yeereke: ‘Niroweke khuluwi weera namudyoonttelele Yave ni namwaase Yave a ikuru sootheene. Miyo muneenaaka kineera kirowaka.’ 
Zechariah8:22 Vano miloko sincipale ni sooweraxa sinimoowa oYerusaleemu weera simwaase Yave a ikuru sootheene ni simudyoonttelele.’ 
Zechariah8:23 Yave a ikuru sootheene oneera ha: ‘Vanihukuni nno asilopwana a miloko ni muulumo oohiyanahiyana anoovarexexa mooxoriwa mwa mukaandyo wa muYuda mmoha, emweerelaka: Munitthunihere orowa ni nyuwo, niwoko nohiiwa weera Muluku ori ni mulokwaanyu.’”" 
Zechariah9:1 Wooperera wa Yave ti wa elapo ya Hadraki ni onoomorela oDamasku. Vano maitho a Yave angweha omutthu wootheene ni wa ipuumba sootheene sa oYixrayeli," 
Zechariah9:2 oHamati ohelanne mwiinano ni oDamasku, angwehatho oTiro ni oSidoni arookhalaru aneettottho." 
Zechariah9:3 oTiro wohiitekela nipuro noolipaxa; woothukumanyiha eparatha* ntoko ntthupi, ni eyuuma yoorikaxa ntoko nttoko na mmiseweni." 
Zechariah9:4 Vaheera Yave onoovenxa mihakhusaya, aphwatelaka mphareiyani ni vano onoolalihiwa ni mooro." 
Zechariah9:5 wAxekeloni onimoona yeeyo, wooveke. oGaza onootteenguwaxa ni hiihotho wEkroni, niwoko owehererawaya onoolakaseya. oGaza onoohiiwa woohikhalano mwene ni wAxekeloni onoothaamiwa." 
Zechariah9:6 Anamarwa anookuxa wAxidoti ni Miyo kinoomaliha wiikuxa wa aFilisti. 
Zechariah9:7 Kinimuukuttha ephome owanoniwaya; yooca yoohitthuniheriwa mmainonimwaya. Yaale eneera ehale, anookhala a Mulukwaahu, ethatuwaka asitokweene a oYuda ni wEkroni onoolikana aYebusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Kinimwaakiha Empaaka mwa anamahuhula. Namahasula kharwatho ahasula mulokwaaka, niwoko vano Miyo kinoona yeeyo ni maithwaaka." 
Zechariah9:9 Muhakakalaxe mwaana muthiyana a oSiyoni; mukhuwele mwaana muthiyana a oYerusaleemu! Moone, mwenaanyu ongwaattamelani, oororomeleya ni oowineene, a murima woomaaleleya ni angwenleene buuru, aani mwaaxaana a buuru muthiyana." 
Zechariah9:10 Owo onoophwata ikaaro sa ekhotto sa wEfrayimi, ikavalu* sa ekhotto sa oYerusaleemu ni nyuura sa ekhotto sinimwintakiwa. Owo onoolaleera murettele wa miloko, alamulaka okhuma ephareiya ni ephareiya; okhuma mooloko Efratesi mpaka ekotenle elapo." 
Zechariah9:11 Mwaha wa nyuwo – niwoko na ephome ya wiiraanawaka ni nyuwo – kinoowoopola anamatthukiwaanyu muhimeni moohikhala maahi. 
Zechariah9:12 Ii!, anamatthukiwa oosareya oweherera, muhokoleele vanipuroniwanyu noolipihiwaxa. Vaanaanova kinlaleiya weera kinimoorehererelani sootheene moota wa iphura." 
Zechariah9:13 Miyo kaakungaka oYuda ntoko onkungeliwaaya muura, kivarelaka muteko wEfrayimi ntoko muupa, kinoopakiha weera anamwane asilopwana a oSiyoni yaavenyere anamwane asilopwana a oGresiya ni kinoopaka oSiyoni ntoko ekatana ya nakhotto ooweraxa." 
Zechariah9:14 Vano Yave onimwiixoonihera wa yaawo; muupaawe onootutha ntoko overinya. Yave onlamula sootheene onimwiipa nipalapatta; Owo onimweetta mutthekuni ya ohitto; 
Zechariah9:15 ni Yave a ikuru sootheene onoowaakiha. Awosa anoonyikalela ni anoophwata ni ekhwambala. Awosa anoowura ephome ya amwiittana ntoko ereene eviinyu; anookhala oosareyeene ntoko ebasiya yoovuuvihera mmaloothoni mwa altaari*. 
Zechariah9:16 Yave Mulukwaaya onimwaavuluxa vanihukuni nenenenno ntoko Mukukhuli omvuluxaawe ikhondoolosawe. Awosa animwaara mweelaponimwawe ntoko maluku oowaaraxa mucireembani. 
Zechariah9:17 Ii! Anookhala ooreeraxa ni oophwaneliwaxa! Etrigu enimwaavaha ikuru amiravo, ni hiihotho eviinyu enyowani aximwali." 
Zechariah10:1 Mumvekele Yave epula mutthulo; ti Yave ompaka etari. Owo onaarupihela epula atthu, aameliheraka soomela." 
Zechariah10:2 Miluku soowootha sinuuluma soowootha; anahako anoona nyoonelo siri soowootha. Awosa anthalihera sooloha soolokottha ni ampepesa wa siiyo. Tivawo muloko onxoraxoraaya ntoko ikhondoolo soothananela ohikhalano mukukhuli. 
Zechariah10:3 “Isara sa Yave sinaapattela akukhuli ni onimwaattaruxa ahooleli, niwoko Yave a ikuru sootheene onookosoopa mulokwaawe, empa ya oYuda ni onoopakiha ntoko ekavalu* yooreerela mukhottoni." 
Zechariah10:4 Nluku noottittimiheyaxa nnoorweela oYuda, hiihotho ekhomo ya eheema, muura wa okhottoni ni anamalamula ootheene." 
Zechariah10:5 Awosa anoolikana asilopwana ooweraxa enyikalaka nttoko mmiseweni okhottoni. Eenre Yave akhala ni yaawosa, awosa anoowana, yaawineke anamweettiha a ikavalu*." 
Zechariah10:6 Kinoolipiha ekhapira ya oYuda ni kinoovuluxa ekhapira ya Yoseefe. Kinooreherera niwoko koosarela ikharari. Atthwaaya anookhala ntoko nkinaakhootte, niwoko Miyo ti Yave Mulukwaaya ni kinoowaakhulasa." 
Zechariah10:7 awEfrayimi anoothatuwa ntoko asilopwana ooweraxa ni mirimasaya sinoohakalala ntoko soowura eviinyu. Anamwanaaya animoona, ehakalaleke; mirimasaya sinoomuhakalalela Yave." 
Zechariah10:8 Kinoowuuvela ntata, kaathukumanyeke. Vekhaikhai kinoowoopola ni anookhala oowaattaxa ntoko yaaraaya khalayi." 
Zechariah10:9 Naari Miyo kaamwaraxelaka variyari wa miloko soorakamela, awosa anookuupuwelela. Animwaahuwa anamwanaaya ehokoloweke." 
Zechariah10:10 Miyo kinimwaahokoloxa wExipitu ni kinimwaathukumanyiha wAsiriya. Kinimwaarongha oGileyade ni oLebanoni, ni vano elapo kheekhalano nipuro nowaakwanelela." 
Zechariah10:11 Awosa anoovira mphareiyani mwa makacamiho; ephareiya yoowali enoomaalihiwa ni maahi ootheene a Nilu animuuma. Wiikuxa wa wAsiriya onoohononiwa ni ekopo ya emwene ya wExipitu enoolakaseya. 
Zechariah10:12 Miyo kinimwaalipiha mwa Yave ni mwa Nsinanawe awosa animweetta,” onghima Yave." 
Zechariah11:1 Ii! oLebanoni, muhule milakosanyu weera mooro olalihe nyirisanyu sa esedari*." 
Zechariah11:2 Ii! Epinyeiru*, mwiipulele, niwoko esedari* yaamora; nyiri sooreerelaxa sohuuhiwa! Mulalamike, ekaravalyu* ya oBaxani, niwoko othakwaanyu woowiilihana woophwateya!" 
Zechariah11:3 Mwiiwe olalamika wa akukhuli; moocihamwaya mooruwereyaxa moophwatiwa! Mwiiwe wiipa wa amwatto; othako woowunttelana wa oYordanu woohononiwa! 
Zechariah11:4 Yave Mulukwaaka oneera ha: “Mukukhule muhuwo olakeliwe wiiviwa. 
Zechariah11:5 Anamathumaaya aniiva, epwahereraka ohittaruxiwa. Yaale anthumiha muhuwo aneera: ‘Yave atthapeliwe, miyo koopuhaxa!’ Mpaka akukhulaaya khaanuurela yoowo." 
Zechariah11:6 Miyo nkirwatho kaamorela ikharari amaki a elapo,” onghima Yave. “Khula mutthu kinoomwinnyerera wa mwaattamanaawe ni wa mwenaawe. Awosa anoohasula elapo ni Miyo khaawo kineeraaka kimutapuxe mmatatanimwaya.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Vano kaakukhula muhuwo waalakeliwe wiiviwa – oohasulaxiwa a muhuwo. Vanonto kaakuxa ikopo piili, emoha kinatteha Weerela ni ekina Wiiwanana, kinakukhulelano muhuwo." 
Zechariah11:8 Kohaamaliha akukhuli araru mmweerini mmoha paahi. Muhuwo waakihovela ni Miyo kaakhulumuwano. 
Zechariah11:9 Vano kaaheera: “Nkinkhalatho mukukhulaanyu. Yaale ankhwa, ekhweeke ni yaale anriheya, eriheyeke. Yaale eneera ehale ekhuuraneke.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Vano kaakuxa ekopwaaka yiitthaniwa Weerela, kinintaka, kimalihaka wiiraana kaapankaaka ni miloko sootheene." 
Zechariah11:11 Waamalihiwa nihuku nenenenne ni hiiho oohasuliwa a muhuwo yaakiweha yaasuwela weera yaari masu a Yave. 
Zechariah11:12 Kaaweerela: Wooreerelani hiiho, mukiliveke; waahooreerelani, muhikilive.” Vano yaakiliva makhoobiri miloko miraru a eparatha*." 
Zechariah11:13 Vanonto Yave aakeerela: “Mumvonyere yaawo namoopa” – nlivo nooreera awosa yaalakenlaaya! Miyo kaakuxa makhoobiri ale, kinamvonyera namoopa Mpaani mwa Yave." 
Zechariah11:14 Vano kaahintaka ekopwaaka yanaaveeli yiitthaniwa Wiiwanana, kimalihaka hiiho wiiwanana variyari wa aYuda ni aYixrayeli." 
Zechariah11:15 Vanonto Yave aakeerela: “Mukuxetho ikaruma sa mukukhuli oohikhalano miruku. 
Zechariah11:16 Miyo kinoomukhaliha mukukhuli mweelaponi aneera ahitthukuruwele ikhondoolo sooriheya, naari ahaasaase yootaphuliwa, hata ahilamihe soovulala hoye hoye ahicihe seiye siri salaama, mene anaakhuure enama ya ikhondoolo sooreerelaxa, awottholaka nyettosaya." 
Zechariah11:17 Ii! Wa mukukhuli oohisambwaneya mwa yoowo onghiya muhuwo! Ekatana evulalihe moonowaawe ni ethorole niithonawe noolopwana! Moonowaawe oriire woomalela ni niithonawe noolopwana nihoone woomalela!” 
Zechariah12:1 Ala ti masu a Yave mwaha wa aYixrayeli. Yave onkunga erimu, ompaceriha mathipelo a elapo ya vathi ni opattunxe munepa wa mutthu mpuwamwawe, vano Owo onghima:" 
Zechariah12:2 “Kinoopaka oYerusaleemu ekoomixi eneera eveveleihe miloko sa mukhwipimwaya. oYuda onooriciwa ni hiihotho oYerusaleemu. 
Zechariah12:3 Vanihukuni nenenenno, miloko sootheene sa elapo ya vathi sithukumanneene weera siwaneno oYerusaleemu, Miyo kinootatuxa oYerusaleemu mwala woolemela wa miloko sootheene. Sootheene sineera seerere weemexa, sinoovulalaxa." 
Zechariah12:4 Vanihukuni nenenenno kinoorukureeriha nyuru ikavalu* sootheene ni anamweettihaaya kinimwaapupurumiha,” onghima Yave. “Miyo kinookosoopa nnenesene ekhapira ya oYuda, mene kinoohela evaasi ikavalu* sootheene sa miloko." 
Zechariah12:5 Vano ahooleli a aYixrayeli animwiixeerela: ‘Muloko wa oYerusaleemu ori woolipaxa niwoko Yave a ikuru sootheene ti Mulukwaaya.’ 
Zechariah12:6 Vanihukuni nenenenno kinoopakiha weera ahooleli a oYuda elikane ni niikho eriyari ya ikhuuni sincipale, ni ntoko muthuko ovarelaka eriyari ya ithatu. aYuda anoohisa woomalela miloko sa mukhwipimwaya sootheene, mene oYerusaleemu onookhala vanipuroniwaya woolipeene." 
Zechariah12:7 Yave onoovuluxa toko woomaka wa oYuda weera nttittimiho na ekhapira ya Davide ni amaki a oYerusaleemu nihipwahe nno na oYuda. 
Zechariah12:8 Vanihukuni nenenenno Yave onimwaakosoopa amaki a oYerusaleemu, moota wooweera oohilipaxa variyariwaya anaakhale ntoko Davide, ni ekhapira ya Davide eniikhale ntoko Muluku, ntoko ndyelo a Yave onaahoolela." 
Zechariah12:9 Vanihukuni nenenenno kinimwaasa ophwata miloko sootheene sineera siwaneno oYerusaleemu. 
Zechariah12:10 Kinooyeehera ekhapira ya Davide ni amaki a oYerusaleemu munepa wa oreera murima ni odyoonttelela. Awosa anookiweha – yoowo yaamuhommaaya – ni anoomwiinlela ntoko oniinlelaawe yoole okhwiiye mwaniye aari mmoharu ni ntoko onlalamikeliwaaya okhwa wa ntthaara. 
Zechariah12:11 Vanihukuni nenenenno olalamika oYerusaleemu onookhala otokotoko, ntoko wiinliwaaya oHadadi-Rimoni vanreyareyani na oMegido." 
Zechariah12:12 Khula epuumba ya elapo enimwiinla; axaaraya mukhwipimwaya: epuumba ya ekhapira ya Davide ni axaaraya, epuumba ya ekhapira ya Natani ni axaaraya," 
Zechariah12:13 epuumba ya ekhapira ya Leevi ni axaaraya, epuumba ya ekhapira ya Ximeyi ni axaaraya," 
Zechariah12:14 ni ipuumba sootheene sikina vamoha ni axaaraya.” 
Zechariah13:1 “Vanihukuni nenenenno anaattuuttu anoopiluwela ekhapira ya Davide ni amaki a oYerusaleemu weera yaatteelihe mwa soottheka ni soohitteela. 
Zechariah13:2 Vanihukuni nenenenno kinoomalamaliha mweelaponi masina a miluku soowootha ni seiyo khasuupuweleliwatho,” onghima Yave a ikuru sootheene. “Kinimwaavenxa mulaponi maprofeeti nitho munepa wa ohitteela." 
Zechariah13:3 Vano mukina nlelo atthuna othalihera ntoko mprofeeti atithawe ni amayawe anoomweerela: ‘Muntthuneya okhwa niwoko mohootha mwa Nsina na Yave.’ Owo eerera opaka oprofeeti, asinaangolowaawe anoomuhomasa." 
Zechariah13:4 Vanihukuni nenenenno maprofeeti ootheene animuulihiheya muru niwoko na nyoonelosaya sa oprofeeti. Awosa kheewara mukaandyo wa eprofeeti woopakiwa ni exapala weera elokotthe. 
Zechariah13:5 Owo onimweera: ‘Miyo nkihiyono mprofeeti; kiri namalima; onkiciha olima okhuma emiravowaaka.’ 
Zechariah13:6 Mukina amukoha: ‘Mvulanle hai?' owo onimwaakhula: ‘Kivulalihiwe mpaani mwa asinthamwenaaka.’” 
Zechariah13:7 “Ii! Ekatana, muvenye ni ngwaneke ni mukukhulaaka, yoowo ori mukhwaaka!” ongima Yave a ikuru sootheene.”Mummane mukukhuli ni muhuwo onoomwaraxeya ni kinimwaarukunuwela asikhaani." 
Zechariah13:8 Mweelaponi yootheene,” onghima Yave, “mipatta miili sa miraru sinoohononasiwa, siriheyeke; vaheera mpatta mukinoowo onoohala." 
Zechariah13:9 Mpatta wanaararu owo kinohela vayikho; kinootteelihamo ntoko eparatha*, aani ntoko eyuuma yoorikaxa. Awosa animwiitthana Nsinanaka ni Miyo kinoowaakhula, keeraka: ‘Awosa ti mulokwaaka’ ni awosa animweera: ‘Yave ti Mulukwaahu.’”" 
Zechariah14:1 Moone, nihuku na Yave nnimoowa mwa nenno soohuhulasanyu sinookawaniwa variyariwanyu." 
Zechariah14:2 Kinoothukumanyiha miloko sootheene weera siwaneno oYerusaleemu; esidade enookuxiwa, impasaya sinoohuhuliwa ni asithiyana anoopuheriwa. Eriyari ya amaki a esidade anooronghiwa ottai ootthukiweene, mene akinaawo kheeronghiwa." 
Zechariah14:3 Vano Yave onookhuma awananeke milokosene seiyo, ntoko ongwanaawe vanihukuni na ekhotto." 
Zechariah14:4 Vanihukuni nenenenno inaawosawe sinimweemela vasulu mwaako wa Sooliveira*, mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa wa oYerusaleemu. Vano mwaako owo onookawanyeya eriyariru okhuma mpatta ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkelaayawo ni nnookhala nreyareya ntokotoko. Vanonto mpatta mmoha wa mwaako onoosusiheriwa mpatta wa ottuttuwani ni mpatta mukinoowo mpatta wa ohitto." 
Zechariah14:5 Nyuwosa munootthawela oreyareyaniwaka, niwoko nno nnimwaataleya mpaka wAzeli. Munootthawa ntoko mwaatthangwaanyu otetereya mweehuhuni mwa Uziya, mwene a oYuda. Vano Yave Mulukwaaka onimoowa vamoha ni ootteelaawe ootheene." 
Zechariah14:6 Vanihukuni nenenenno khooviha hata khooriira. 
Zechariah14:7 Nnikhale nihuku noohilikanxereya, nihikhalanaka othana naari ohiyu – nihuku noosuweliwa ni Yave paahi. Naari wiilaleene onoomwaleeleya." 
Zechariah14:8 Vanihukuni nenenenno nyooloko sinoopiluwa oYerusaleemu, mpatta mmoha wa seiyo sinrowa wa ephareiya ya ninkhuma nsuwa ni mpatta mukinoowo mpatta wa ephareiya ya ninkela nsuwa. Eyo enimweereya okhuma elimwe mpaka eyiita." 
Zechariah14:9 Yave onookhala Mwene a elapo ya vathi yootheene. Vanihukuni nenenenno onookhala Yave mmoha ni Nsinanawe nimoharu paahi. 
Zechariah14:10 Elapo yootheene okhuma oGeba mpaka oRimoni, mpatta wa ohitto wa oYerusaleemu enookhala ntoko wAraba. Vaheera oYerusaleemu onookhalihiwa ni onookhala vanipuroniwaya, okhuma mulako wa Benyamini mpaka nipuro waaraayawo Mulako Woopacera, mpakatho Mulako wa oNloothoni ni okhuma etoore* ya Hananeli mpaka nipuro emvottiwa eviinyu ya mwene." 
Zechariah14:11 oYerusaleemu onoomakiwa; khoorwaru ophwatiwa. Iwo onookhala woolipeene. 
Zechariah14:12 Nihooxo mwa nenno Yave aneeraawe attaruxele miloko sootheene singwananne Yerusaleemu ti nna: irutthusaya sinimuntta yeemelelo; maithwaaya animuntta mpuurunimwaya ni malumaaya animuntta mmwaanomwaya. 
Zechariah14:13 Vanihukuni nenenenno Yave onootannyera munyakunyaku mutokotoko. Khula mutthu onoongwanano mutthu ori mukhwipimwawe. 
Zechariah14:14 oYuda onoowananotho oYerusaleemu. Mihakhu sa miloko soowaattamela sootheene sinoowawaanyiwa – eyuuma yoorikaxa, eparatha* ni ikuwo sincipalexa." 
Zechariah14:15 Nihooxo nenenenno nnoohasula ikavalu*, abuuru ootheene, ikamelu* ni axinama ootheene a miloko iyo." 
Zechariah14:16 Vano yaale eneera ehale variyari wa miloko saawananne oYerusaleemu anoorowa khula eyaakha weera yamulape Mwene, Yave a ikuru sootheene, ni weera yapake Efesta ya Mmikotthani." 
Zechariah14:17 Mukina a miloko sa mulaponi aahirowa oYerusaleemu weera amulape Mwene, Yave a ikuru sootheene, vano owo kheenimurupela epula." 
Zechariah14:18 awExiputu yaahirowa oYerusaleemu weera yapakele mpatta, awosa khayaarupela epula. Vano Yave onimwaarumihela nihooxo mwa nenno aneeraawe ahooxere miloko sineera sikhootte orowa opakano Efesta ya Mmikotthani." 
Zechariah14:19 Aani nno nnikhale nttaruxo wa awExipitu ni miloko sootheene sineera sihirowe opakano Efesta ya Mmikotthani. 
Zechariah14:20 Vanihukuni nenenenno “OOTTEELIHERIWA YAVE” anoolempwa mungilingilini sa ikavalu* ni nyaapu sa Mpaani mwa Yave sinootteelihaxiwa ntoko siraaya ibasiya sootteela ohoolo wa altaari*. 
Zechariah14:21 Khula mwaapu wa oYerusaleemu ni oYuda onootteeliheriwa Yave a ikuru sootheene ni ootheene eneera erwe weera epake yooveleela anookuxa nyaapu sikina, yaapeyekemo. Vanonto okhuma nihuku nenenenno kheekhalatho ananakoso Mpaani mwa Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Malachi1:1 Wooperera wa masu a Yave mwa Malekiya mwaha wa aYixrayeli: 
Malachi1:2 “Miyo kohoosivelani mahuku ootheene,” oneera Yave. “Vaheera nyuwosa munkoha: ‘Munisivenle moota heeni?’ Khaahiyono Esawu munneiye Yakobe?” onghima Yave. “Wa soothesene, Miyo koomusivela Yakobe," 
Malachi1:3 mene koomukhootta Esawu. Nyaakosawe kootatuxa munikareni noothaamiwa ni koohiya ilapo sa yoohiyeriwaawe moomakamo akhwatte a munikareni.” 
Malachi1:4 Naari Edomi eeraka: “Noottikitthiwa, mene nnoorasela milepe.” Yave, a ikuru sootheene oneera: “Mutekeke, mene Miyo kinookurumula. Eyo enimwiitthaniwa elapo yooriheya, muloko wa yoowo Yave onyoonyeringwaawe wa mahuku ootheene." 
Malachi1:5 Nyuwosa munimoona yeeyo ni maithwaanyu, mweereke: ‘Yave ti Mutokweene, mpakatho opwaha nyiinano sa oYixrayeli!’”" 
Malachi1:6 “Mwaana onaattittimiha atithawe, ni murumeiyi onimuttittimiha pwiiyaawe. Miyo kaareene Tiithi, okittittimihawanyu ori woowi? Miyo kaareene Pwiiya, okoovawanyu ori woowi? Onookohani ti Yave, a ikuru sootheene. Ti nyuwo asaserdoti* munnyoosa Nsinanaka! Vaheera nyuwosa munkoha: ‘Ninyoosale moota heeni Nsinananyu?’" 
Malachi1:7 Munruuha valtaariniwaka* yooca yoohitteela! Orookhalaru hiiho, munkoha: ‘Nihoottittimihaleni moota heeni?’ Muneera weera khoontthuneya ottittimiha meesa a Yave!" 
Malachi1:8 Mweehuhuni yoowaaruuha axinama oohoona weera mwaapake yooveleela, nyuwosa khamunoonaru yakhalaru yoonanara. Mwaaruuhaka axinama oorakala ni oovoreiwa ntoko yooveleela, khamunona weera yoonanara! Mweerere omuvaha hiiho guvernadoraanyu! Weeraka owo onimoohakalalelani? Weeraka onoowaakhulani?” onkoha Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Malachi1:9 “Vano asaserdoti*, mweerere omukurunuxa Muluku weera animorele ikharari! Weeraka ni moota wa yoovaheene yeela mwa matataanyu Owo onoowaakhulani?” onkoha Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Malachi1:10 “Ii! Mmoha a nyuwosa aawanle milako sa Empa ya Yave! Hiiho naari mano mwaamupattiha vasiiyoniwene mooro valtaariniwaka*. Nkoohakalalenleni,” oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene, “ni nkinaakhulela soovahasanyu." 
Malachi1:11 Vano okhuma ninkhuma nsuwa mpaka ninkelaayawo, eriyari ya miloko, Nsinanaka nnookhala noottittimihiwaxa. Mipatta sootheene erubani* soovaha sootteela sinoohiseriwa Nsinanaka, niwoko Nsinanaka nnookhala noottittimihiwaxa eriyari ya miloko,” oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Malachi1:12 “Vaheera nyuwosa munghiiriha mweeraka weera meesa a Yave ti oohitteela, ni yoocaawe ti yoonyooseya." 
Malachi1:13 Muneeratho: ‘Yoonilemelela! Muntheya munyoosaka,’ oneera Yave, a ikuru sootheene. ‘Mwaaruuhaka axinama oowiiyiwa, oorakala ni oovoreiwa mwaapakaka yooveleela, hiiho, kiwaakhulelekeni?’” onkoha Yave." 
Malachi1:14 “Oolaphiwa akhale yoowo onkilokottha, areeneno mmuhuwoni napunci oohirakala, onroromeliha omveleela, vahoolowaya, anakiveleelela mwaamunama oorakala,” oneera Yave, a ikuru sootheene. “Vano Miyo ti Mwene Mutokweene, ni Nsinanaka nnooviwa eriyari ya miloko.”" 
Malachi2:1 “Vano, woopereriwa wu ti wawinyu, nyuwo asaserdoti*." 
Malachi2:2 Nyuwosa mwaahiiwelela, muhipwatthelaka Nsinanaka,” oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene, “kinimoolaphasani, mpakatho kinoolapha mareelihowaanyu. Aani koolapha, niwoko nyuwosa khamukittittiminghe ni murimaanyu." 
Malachi2:3 Niwoko na nyuwosa, Miyo kinoohiiha ekhapiraanyu; kinoottikitthela owiithowanyu mahiloka a axinama ampakeliwa sooveleela mfestanimwanyu, koovonyerasekeni vaate vamoha ni mahiloka." 
Malachi2:4 Hiiho, nyuwosa munoosuwela weera ti Miyo kiwooperenreni weera owiiraananawaka aLeevi opwaherere,” oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Malachi2:5 “Omwiiraananawaka yoowo waari wa okumi ni murettele, ni vekhaikhai kaamvahenre weera akoove. Owo ookoova, anathukumela ohoolo wa Nsinanaka." 
Malachi2:6 Soolaka sa ekhaikhai saari mmwaanomwawe, ni mmo khayaaphwanyaneyaru yoowootha. Owo aaheetta ni Miyo mmuretteleni ni wookoleleya, anaahapuxa ancipale mwa soottheka." 
Malachi2:7 Niwoko iyano sa musaserdoti* sithokororeke esuwelo, ni mmwaanomwawe, ootheene yaaseke oxuttihiwa nlamulo, niwoko owo ti namutthenga a Yave, a ikuru sootheene." 
Malachi2:8 Vaheera nyuwosa moohapuwa mphironi. Ni oxuttihawanyu mootannyera omora wa atthu ancipale; nyuwosa moonanariha wiiraana wa Leevi,” oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Malachi2:9 “Tivawo kipakihalaaka weera munyoosiwe ni muyevihiwe ohoolo wa miloko sootheene, niwoko nyuwosa khamuneettela iphirosaka, mene mumpaka nthalu mwaaxuttihaka nlamulo.”" 
Malachi2:10 Vano, ootheene hiyo tiithaahu khahiyono mmoharu? Khanipattuxiwe ni Muluku mmoharu? Vanonto heeni ninnanarihaahu wiiraana wa makholowaahu nihiroromelanaka?" 
Malachi2:11 Yuda kharoromeleiye. oYixrayeli ni oYerusaleemu yoopakiwa etthu yoohiira: aYuda yaaveiha Nipuro Nootteela* onsivelaawe Yave, yaathelaka asithiyana anlapa miluku sa anamarwa." 
Malachi2:12 Yave amvonyere okerekhere wa iheema sa Yakobe akhalaru mutthu ompaka yeeyo, naari akhalaka onimpakela yooveleela Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Malachi2:13 Yookhalatho etthu ekina nyuwosa mumpakaanyu: Munaasariha maithori altaari* a Yave; muniinla, mwiipulelaka, niwoko Owo khampwatthela sooveleelasanyu, hata khanaakhela mmatatanimwanyu ntoko soowaakhuleleya." 
Malachi2:14 Nyuwosa nlelo munkoha: “Heeni?” Niwoko ti Yave onkhalela onamoona eriyari ya nyuwo ni muthiyana a emiravowaanyu, niwoko nyuwo khamuroromeleiye ni yoowo, owo orookhalaru mwaarinyu, muthiyana mwiiraanannaanyu moothelanani." 
Malachi2:15 Khahiyono Yave oopakanseni okhala mmoha? Awosa ti awawe mweerutthuni mpaka mmunepani. Vano akhalenleni mmoha? Niwoko Owo aahaawela ekhapira ya oMuluku. Vanonto mwiipasoope ni muhiroromeleye wa muthiyana a emiravowaanyu. 
Malachi2:16 “Miyo kinthanya omwalana,” oneera Yave, Muluku a oYixrayeli, “kinimuthanyatho mutthu oniikuttelela ni nipuhero ntoko oniikuttelelaawe ni soowara,” oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene. Tivawo, mukhaleno muupuwelo wooreera ni muhikhale oohiroromeleya." 
Malachi2:17 Nyuwosa moomukhulumula Yave ni maswaanyu. “Nimukhulumunle hai?” munkoha. Niwoko muneera: “Ootheene ampaka yoonanara ti ooreera vamaithoni wa Yave, ni Owo onnaahakalalela,” munakohatho: “Ori woowi Muluku a ekhaikhai?”" 
Malachi3:1 “Moone, Miyo kinoomurumiha namutthengaaka, anaareherere ephiro ohoolowaka. Hiiho, woowaakuveya Yave mummwaasaanyu onoorowa Mpaanimwawe; namutthenga a wiiraana, mwa yoowo nyuwosa munimuhaawelaanyu onimoorwa,” oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Malachi3:2 Vaheera, taani anaavilele nihuku na orwawawe? Ni taani aneemele ohoolowawe aarwaaka? Niwoko Owo anaakhale ntoko mooro ontteeliha ni ntoko sabawu oomukatthela." 
Malachi3:3 Owo onookilaathi ntoko namatotoxa ni namatteeliha a eparatha*; onimwaatteeliha aLeevi aareherereke ntoko eyuuma yoorikaxa ni eparatha*. Hiiho, anookhala atthu eniimuruuhele Yave sooveleela moororomeleyani." 
Malachi3:4 Vano sooveleela sa oYuda ni oYerusaleemu sinoomusiveliha Yave, ntoko mmahukuni avinre, aani ntoko mweehuhuni ya khalayi." 
Malachi3:5 “Miyo kinimoorwa wa nyuwosa ntoko Mphuki. Woohipisa, kinookhalela onamoona mwaha wa akhwiri, anamararuwa, anlipela vasiiyoniwene ni wa yaale angwiiyera anamiteko ngwaalivani, anaahasula akwaasuni ni asinaamukhweli, ehooniheraka soophwanela wa anamarwa, ni ahinkittittimiha Miyo,” oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Malachi3:6 “Mwa yeeyo, Miyo, Yave, nkinceendya. Tivawo nyuwosa, ekhapira ya Yakobe, muhiphwatiwaanyu." 
Malachi3:7 Okhuma ehuhu ya makholowaanyu, nyuwosa moohiya ikanosaka, muhiiwelelaka. Muhokoleele wa Miyo, ni Miyo kinoohokoleela wa nyuwosa,” oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene. “Vaheera nyuwosa munkoha: ‘Nnihokolowe hai?’”" 
Malachi3:8 “Mutthu onoowera omwiiyera Muluku?” Wa soothesene nyuwosa munnakiiyera. Vano munkohatho: ‘Niwiiyenreni moota heeni?’ Mookiiyera sanaamuloko ni soovaha. 
Malachi3:9 Nyuwosa moosareya malapho, niwoko muloko wootheene nyuwosa munnakiiyera." 
Malachi3:10 Muruuhe sanaamuloko sootheene onsungiwa muhakhu weera ekhale yooca owannyaka. Mukooteno murima yeeyo,” oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene, “ni moone kaahihula milako sa wiirimu kooyeeherakani mareeliho mpaka muneeraanyu muhikhaleno woosungawo." 
Malachi3:11 Kinimooceeliha mahooxo ohonona soohepha, ni iwuuva* sinimwiima soowiimasaya mweehuhunimwaya,” oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Malachi3:12 “Hiiho miloko sootheene sinooweerelani ooreelihiwa, niwoko elapwaanyu enookhala yootikhiniheya,” oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Malachi3:13 “Nyuwosa munnakuulumela masu oolipaxa,” oneera Yave. “Orookhalaru hiiho, munkoha: ‘Yoonanara heeni niwuulumenlaahuni?’" 
Malachi3:14 Nyuwosa mweenre: ‘Khoomvareleya muteko omurumeela Muluku. Ningwinani niiwelelaka ikanosawe ni olalamika ohoolo wa Yave a ikuru sootheene? 
Malachi3:15 Tivawo, vano ningwoonelaahu okhala oohakalala anamwiixoona, niwoko sinnaweettelaxa nnene yaawo ampaka yoonanara. Mpaka yaawosa aningwanano Muluku animoopowa!’”" 
Malachi3:16 Vanonto yaale yaamoova Yave yaatthekula mukina ni mukhwaawe, ni Yave annaawiriyanela. Yaalempwa elivuru ntoko eyuupuxero vamaithoniwawe mwaha wa yaawo yaamoova Yave ni anttittimiha Nsinanawe." 
Malachi3:17 “Vanihukuni kineeraaka kireherere muhakhwaaka” oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene, “awosa anookhala yawaka xaxaxa. Miyo kinoowuurela ntoko tiithi onimuurelaawe mwaniye ommwiiwelela." 
Malachi3:18 Hiiho, nyuwosa munimoonatho ovirikana eriyai ya oororomeleya ni mutakhali, eriyari ya yaawo animurumeela Muluku, ni ahinimurumeela.”" 
Malachi4:1 “Vano, vekhaikhai nihuku ntokotoko nnoophiyera ntoko ttukuttha. Anamwiixoona ootheene ni atakhali ootheene anookhala ntoko ikokhola, ni nihuku nno ninrwa onimwaapattela mooro,” oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene. “Khoohalaru mukwankhwaari naari mano nikukhu." 
Malachi4:2 Vaheera wa nyuwosa munttittimiha Nsinanaka, nsuwa na ekhaikhai nnookhuma niruuhaka olama ngwaaranimwaya. Hiiho, nyuwosa munookhuma mutupheke ntoko aximombe oohuleliwa munikhoolani." 
Malachi4:3 Vanihukuni kineeraaka kipake itthu iyo, munimwaattikittha atakhali; anookhala ntoko ittoko munaawonimwanyu,” oneera Yave a ikuru sootheene." 
Malachi4:4 “Muupuwelele nlamulo na murumeiyaaka Moisesi, ikano ni soolamulela kaamvanghaaka oHorebi, wa muloko wootheene wa oYixrayeli." 
Malachi4:5 Moone, Miyo kinimoorumihelasani mprofeeti Eliya nihinaaye ophiyera nihuku ntokweene ni noowoopiha na Yave." 
Malachi4:6 Owo onoopakiha weera mirima sa asitiithi, ni sa anamwanaaya siiraane; ohiyanawaya Miyo kinimoorwa kittaruxeke elapo ni malapho.”" 
Luke3:25 mwaana a Matathiya, mwaana a Amosi, mwaana a Nawume, mwaana a Esili, mwaana a Nagai,"
